div.p: BhG 1.1

lg.l: dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ_dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca_vac
dharma--_dharma kṣetre_kṣetra kuru--_kuru kṣetre_kṣetra samavetāḥ_samave yuyutsavaḥ_yuyutsu
māmakāḥ_māmaka pāṇḍavāḥ_pāṇḍava ca_ca eva_eva kim_ka akurvata_kṛ saṃjaya_saṃjaya
śeṣa--_śeṣa aśeṣa--_aśeṣa mukha--_mukha vyākhyā--_vyākhyā cāturyam_cāturya tu_tu eka--_eka vaktrataḥ_vaktra
dadhānam_dhā adbhutam_adbhuta vande_vand parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda mādhavam_mādhava
śrī--_śrī mādhavam_mādhava praṇamyaḥ_praṇam mādhavam_mādhava viśveśam_viśveśa ādarāt_ādara
tad--_tad bhakti--_bhakti yantritaḥ_yantray kurve_kṛ gītā--_gītā vyākhyām_vyākhyā subodhinīm_subodhinī
bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kāra--_kāra matam_man samyak_samyak tad--_tad vyākhyātṛ--_vyākhyātṛ giraḥ_gir tathā_tathā
yathāmati_yathāmati samālocya_samālocay gītā--_gītā vyākhyām_vyākhyā samārabhe_samārabh
gītā_gītā vyākhyāyate_vyākhyā yasyāḥ_yad pāṭha--_pāṭha mātra--_mātra prayatnataḥ_prayatna
sā_tad iyam_idam subodhinī_subodhinī ṭīkā_ṭīkā sadā_sadā dhyeyā_dhyā manīṣibhiḥ_manīṣin

div.p: iha_iha khalu_khalu sakala--_sakala loka--_loka hita--_hita avatāraḥ_avatāra parama--_parama kāruṇikaḥ_kāruṇika bhagavān_bhagavant devakī--_devakī nandanaḥ_nandana tattva--_tattva ajñāna--_ajñāna vijṛmbhita--_vijṛmbh śoka--_śoka moha--_moha bhraṃśita--_bhraṃśay viveka--_viveka tayā_tā nija--_nija dharma--_dharma parityāga--_parityāga pūrvaka--_pūrvaka para--_para dharma--_dharma abhisandhinam_abhisaṃdhin dharma--_dharma jñāna--_jñāna rahasya--_rahasya upadeśa--_upadeśa plavena_plava tasmāt_tad śoka--_śoka moha--_moha sāgarāt_sāgara uddadhāra_uddhṛ tam_tad eva_eva bhagavat--_bhagavant upadiṣṭam_upadiś artham_artha kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa dvaipāyanaḥ_dvaipāyana saptabhiḥ_saptan śloka--_śloka śataiḥ_śata upanibabandha_upanibandh tatra_tatra ca_ca prāyaśas_prāyaśas śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa mukhāt_mukha viniḥsṛtān_viniḥsṛ eva_eva ślokān_śloka alikhat_likh kāṃścid_kaścit tad--_tad saṅgataye_saṃgati svayam_svayam ca_ca vyaracayat_viracay yathā_yathā uktam_vac gītā--_gītā māhātmye_māhātmya
gītā_gītā su_su gītā_gītā kartavyā_kṛ kim_ka anyaiḥ_anya śāstra--_śāstra vistaraiḥ_vistara yā_yad svayam_svayam padmanābhasya_padmanābha mukha--_mukha padmāt_padma viniḥsṛtā_viniḥsṛ

tatra_tatra tāvat_tāvat dharma--_dharma kṣetre_kṣetra iti_iti ādinā_ādi viṣīdan_viṣad idam_idam abravīt_brū iti_iti antena_anta granthena_grantha śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa arjuna--_arjuna saṃvāda--_saṃvāda prastāvāya_prastāva kathā_kathā nirūpyate_nirūpay tatas_tatas param_param ā_ā samāpteḥ_samāpti tayoḥ_tad dharma--_dharma jñāna--_jñāna arthe_artha saṃvādaḥ_saṃvāda tatra_tatra dharma--_dharma kṣetre_kṣetra iti_iti ādinā_ādi ślokena_śloka dhṛtarāṣṭrena_dhṛtarāṣṭra hastināpura--_hastināpura sthitam_sthā sva--_sva sārathim_sārathi samīpa--_samīpa stham_stha sañjayam_saṃjaya prati_prati kurukṣetra--_kurukṣetra vṛttānte_vṛttānta pṛṣṭhe_pṛṣṭha sañjayaḥ_saṃjaya hastināpura--_hastināpura sthitaḥ_sthā api_api vyāsa--_vyāsa prasāda--_prasāda kurukṣetra--_kurukṣetra vṛttāntam_vṛttānta sākṣāt_sākṣāt paśyan_paś iva_iva dhṛtarāṣṭrāya_dhṛtarāṣṭra nivedayāmāsa_niveday dṛṣṭvā_dṛś tu_tu pāṇḍava--_pāṇḍava anīkam_anīka iti_iti ādinā_ādi

dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ_dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca_vac iti_iti dharma--_dharma kṣetre_kṣetra iti_iti bhoḥ_bhoḥ sañjaya_saṃjaya dharmakṣete_dharmakṣeta dharma--_dharma bhūmau_bhūmi kurukṣetre_kurukṣetra dharma--_dharma kṣetre_kṣetra iti_iti kurukṣetra--_kurukṣetra viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa eṣām_idam ādi--_ādi puruṣaḥ_puruṣa kaścid_kaścit kuru--_kuru nāmā_nāman babhūva_bhū tasya_tad kuroḥ_kuru dharma--_dharma sthāne_sthāna māmakāḥ_māmaka mad--_mad putrāḥ_putra pāṇḍu--_pāṇḍu putrāḥ_putra ca_ca yuyutsavaḥ_yuyutsu yoddhum_yudh icchantaḥ_iṣ samavetāḥ_samave militāḥ_mil santaḥ_as kim_ka akurvata_kṛ kim_ka kṛtavantaḥ_kṛ

lg.l: sva--_sva abhikhyayā_abhikhyā goḥ_go tamasaḥ_tamas nihantā_nihantṛ
manaḥ_manas adhitiṣṭhan_adhiṣṭhā svaratim_svarati karotu_kṛ
prācīna--_prācīna vācaḥ_vāc su_su vicārya_vicāray saḥ_tad aham_mad
ajñaḥ_ajña api_api gīta--_gīta amṛta--_amṛta leśa--_leśa lipsuḥ_lipsu
yateḥ_yati prabhoḥ_prabhu eva_eva mate_mata tat_tad atra_atra
santaḥ_as kṣamadhvam_kṣam śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgatasya_āgam

div.p: iha_iha khalu_khalu sakala--_sakala śāstra--_śāstra abhimata--_abhiman śrīmat--_śrīmat caraṇa--_caraṇa saroja--_saroja bhajanaḥ_bhajana svayam_svayam bhagavān_bhagavant nara--_nara ākṛti--_ākṛti para--_para brahma--_brahman śrī--_śrī vasudeva--_vasudeva sūnuḥ_sūnu sākṣāt_sākṣāt śrī--_śrī gopāla--_gopāla puryām_purī avatīrya_avatṛ apāra--_apāra parama--_parama atarkya--_atarkya prāpañcika--_prāpañcika bhava--_bhava abdhi--_abdhi nimajjamānān_nimajj jagat--_jagant janān_jana udhṛtya_uddhṛ sva--_sva saundarya--_saundarya mādhurya--_mādhurya āsvādanayā_āsvādanā svīya--_svīya prema--_preman mahā--_mahat ambudhau_ambudhi nimajjayāmāsa_nimajjay

śiṣṭa--_śās rakṣā_rakṣā duṣṭa--_duṣ nigraha--_nigraha vrata--_vrata niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā mahiṣṭha--_mahiṣṭha pratiṣṭhaḥ_pratiṣṭhā api_api bhuvaḥ_bhū bhāra--_bhāra duḥkha--_duḥkha apahāra--_apahāra miṣeṇa_miṣa duṣṭānām_duṣ api_api sva--_sva dveṣṭṝṇām_dveṣṭṛ api_api mahā--_mahat saṃsāra--_saṃsāra grāsībhūtānām_grāsībhū api_api mukti--_mukti dāna--_dāna sva--_sva antardhāna--_antardhāna uttara--_uttara kāla--_kāla janiṣyamāṇān_jan anādi--_anādi avidyā--_avidyā bandha--_bandha nibadnhana--_nibandhana śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādi--_ādi ākulān_ākula api_api jīvān_jīva uddhartum_uddhṛ śāstra--_śāstra kṛt--_kṛt muni--_muni gaṇa--_gaṇa gīyamāna--_gā yaśaḥ_yaśas ca_ca dhartum_dhṛ sva--_sva priya--_priya sakham_sakha tādṛśa--_tādṛśa sva--_sva udbhūta--_udbhū śoka--_śoka moham_moha śrīmat--_śrīmat arjunam_arjuna lakṣyīkṛtya_lakṣyīkṛ kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa tritaya--_tritaya ātmaka--_ātmaka sarva--_sarva veda--_veda tātparya--_tātparya paryavasita--_paryavasā artha--_artha ratna--_ratna alaṅkṛtam_alaṃkṛ śrī--_śrī gītā--_gītā śāstram_śāstra aṣṭādaśa--_aṣṭādaśan adhyāyam_adhyāya antarbhūta--_antarbhū aṣṭādaśa--_aṣṭādaśan āvirbhāvayāmbabhūva_āvirbhāvay

tatra_tatra adhyāyānām_adhyāya prathamena_prathama niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga dvitīyena_dvitīya bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga tṛtīyena_tṛtīya jñāna--_jñāna yogaḥ_yoga darśitaḥ_darśay tatra_tatra api_api bhakti--_bhakti yogasya_yoga ati_ati rahasya--_rahasya tvāt_tva ubhaya--_ubhaya saṅjīvaka--_saṃjīvaka tvena_tva abhyarhita--_abhyarhita tvāt_tva sarva--_sarva durlabha--_durlabha tvāt_tva ca_ca madhyavartīkṛtaḥ_madhyavartīkṛ karma--_karman jñānayoḥ_jñāna bhakti--_bhakti rāhityena_rāhitya vaiyarthyāt_vaiyarthya te_tad dve_dvi bhakti--_bhakti miśre_miśra eva_eva sammatīkṛte_sammatīkṛ

bhaktiḥ_bhakti tu_tu dvividhā_dvividha kevalā_kevala pradhānībhūtā_pradhānībhū ca_ca tatra_tatra ādyā_ādya svatas_svatas eva_eva parama--_parama prabalā_prabala te_tad dve_dvi karma--_karman jñāne_jñāna vinā_vinā eva_eva viśuddha--_viśudh prabhāvatī_prabhāvat akiñcanā_akiñcana ananya--_ananya ādi--_ādi śabda--_śabda vācyā_vac dvitīyā_dvitīya tu_tu karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna miśrā_miśra iti_iti akhilam_akhila agre_agra vivṛtībhaviṣyati_vivṛtībhū

atha_atha arjunasya_arjuna śoka--_śoka mohau_moha kathaṃbhūtau_kathaṃbhūta iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā mahābhārata--_mahābhārata vaktā_vaktṛ śrī--_śrī vaiśampāyanaḥ_vaiśampāyana janamejayam_janamejaya prati_prati tatra_tatra bhīṣma--_bhīṣma parvaṇi_parvan kathām_kathā avatārayati_avatāray dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ_dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca_vac iti_iti kurukṣetre_kurukṣetra yuyutsavaḥ_yuyutsu yuddha--_yuddha artham_artha saṅgatāḥ_saṅgam māmakāḥ_māmaka duryodhana--_duryodhana ādyāḥ_ādya pāṇḍavāḥ_pāṇḍava ca_ca yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira ādayaḥ_ādi kim_ka kṛtavantaḥ_kṛ tat_tad brūhi_brū nanu_nanu yuyutsavaḥ_yuyutsu iti_iti tvam_tvad bravīṣi_brū eva_eva atas_atas yuddham_yuddha eva_eva kartum_kṛ udyatāḥ_udyam te_tad tat_tad api_api kim_ka akurvata_kṛ iti_iti kena_ka abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya pṛcchasi_pracch iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah dharma--_dharma kṣetre_kṣetra iti_iti kurukṣetram_kurukṣetra deva--_deva yajanam_yajana iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tad--_tad kṣetrasya_kṣetra dharma--_dharma pravartaka--_pravartaka tvam_tva prasiddham_prasidh

atas_atas tad--_tad saṃsarga--_saṃsarga mahimnā_mahiman yadi_yadi adharmikāṇām_adharmika api_api duryodhana--_duryodhana ādīnām_ādi krodha--_krodha nivṛttyā_nivṛtti dharme_dharma matiḥ_mati syāt_as pāṇḍavāḥ_pāṇḍava tu_tu svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva eva_eva dhārmikāḥ_dhārmika tatas_tatas bandhu--_bandhu hiṃsanam_hiṃsana anucitam_anucita iti_iti ubhayeṣām_ubhaya api_api viveke_viveka udbhūte_udbhū sandhiḥ_saṃdhi api_api sambhāvyate_sambhāvay tatas_tatas ca_ca mama_mad ānandaḥ_ānanda evā_eva iti_iti sañjayam_saṃjaya prati_prati jñāpayitum_jñāpay iṣṭaḥ_iṣ bhāvaḥ_bhāva bāhyaḥ_bāhya ābhyantaraḥ_ābhyantara tu_tu sandhau_saṃdhi sati_as pūrvavat_pūrvavat sa_sa kaṇṭakam_kaṇṭaka eva_eva rājyam_rājya mad--_mad ātmajānām_ātmaja iti_iti me_mad durvāraḥ_durvāra eva_eva viṣādaḥ_viṣāda tasmāt_tasmāt asmākīnaḥ_asmākīna bhīṣmaḥ_bhīṣma tu_tu arjunena_arjuna durjayaḥ_durjaya evā_eva iti_iti atas_atas yuddham_yuddha eva_eva śreyaḥ_śreyas tat_tad eva_eva bhūyāt_bhū iti_iti tu_tu tad--_tad manoratha--_manoratha upayogī_upayogin durlakṣyaḥ_durlakṣya
tad--_tad pālakasya_pālaka śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa kṛṣi--_kṛṣi bala--_bala sthānīya--_sthānīya tvam_tva
Baladevaḥ_Baladeva

lg.l: satya--_satya ananta--_ananta acintya--_acintya śakti--_śakti eka--_eka pakṣe_pakṣa
sarva--_sarva adhyakṣe_adhyakṣa bhakta--_bhakta rakṣā--_rakṣā ati_ati dakṣe_dakṣa
pūrṇānande_pūrṇānanda nityam_nityam āstām_ās matiḥ_mati me_mad
ajñāna--_ajñāna nīradhiḥ_nīradhi upaiti_upe yayā_yad viśeṣam_viśeṣa
bhaktiḥ_bhakti parā_para api_api bhajate_bhaj paripoṣam_paripoṣa uccais_uccais
tattvam_tattva param_para sphurati_sphur durgamam_durgama api_api ajasram_ajasram
sādguṇya--_sādguṇya bhṛt_bhṛt sva--_sva racitām_racay praṇamāmi_praṇam gītām_gītā

div.p: atha_atha sukha--_sukha cit--_cit ghanaḥ_ghana svayam_svayam bhagavān_bhagavant acintya--_acintya śaktiḥ_śakti puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama sva--_sva saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa āyatta--_āyat vicitra--_vicitra jagat--_jagant udaya--_udaya ādi--_ādi viriñci--_viriñci ādi--_ādi sañcintya--_saṃcintay caraṇaḥ_caraṇa sva--_sva janma--_janman ādi--_ādi līlayā_līlā sva--_sva tulyān_tulya saha_saha āvirbhūtān_āvirbhū bahūn_bahu avidyā--_avidyā śārdūlī--_śārdūlī vadanāt_vadana vimocya_vimocay sva--_sva antardhāna--_antardhāna uttara--_uttara bhāvinaḥ_bhāvin anyān_anya uddidhīrṣuḥ_uddidhīrṣu āhava--_āhava mūrdhni_mūrdhan sva--_sva ātma--_ātman bhūtam_bhū api_api arjunam_arjuna a_a vitarkya_vitarkay sva--_sva śaktyā_śakti sa_sa moham_moha iva_iva kurvan_kṛ tad--_tad moha--_moha vimārjana--_vimārjana sa_sa parikara--_parikara sva--_sva ātma--_ātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya eka--_eka nirūpikām_nirūpaka sva--_sva gītopaniṣadam_gītopaniṣad upādiśat_upadiś

tasyām_tad khalu_khalu īśvara--_īśvara jīva--_jīva prakṛti--_prakṛti kāla--_kāla karmāṇi_karman pañca--_pañcan arthāḥ_artha varṇyante_varṇay teṣu_tad vibhu--_vibhu saṃvid_saṃvid īśvaraḥ_īśvara aṇu--_aṇu saṃvid_saṃvid jīvaḥ_jīva traiguṇya--_traiguṇya śūnyam_śūnya jaḍa--_jaḍa dravyam_dravya kālaḥ_kāla pum_puṃs prayatna--_prayatna niṣpādyam_niṣpāday adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa ādi--_ādi śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac karma_karman iti_iti

teṣām_tad lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa eṣu_idam īśvara--_īśvara ādīni_ādi catvāri_catur nityāni_nitya jīva--_jīva ādīni_ādi tu_tu īśvara--_īśvara vaśyāni_vaśya karma_karman tu_tu prāc--_prāñc abhāvavat_abhāvavat anādi_anādi vināśi_vināśin ca_ca tatra_tatra saṃvid--_saṃvid svarūpaḥ_svarūpa api_api īśvaraḥ_īśvara jīvaḥ_jīva ca_ca saṃvettā_saṃvettṛ asmad--_mad arthaḥ_artha ca_ca vijñānam_vijñāna ānandam_ānanda brahma_brahman yaḥ_yad sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña sarva--_sarva vid_vid mantā_mantṛ boddhā_boddhṛ kartā_kartṛ vijāna--_vijñāna ātmā_ātman puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti saḥ_tad akāmayata_kāmay bahu_bahu syām_as sukham_sukham aham_mad asvāpsam_svap na_na kiñcid_kaścit avediṣam_vid iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca na_na ca_ca ubhayatra_ubhayatra mahat--_mahant tattva--_tattva jātaḥ_jan ayam_idam ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra

tadā_tadā tasya_tad anutpatteḥ_anutpatti vilīna--_vilī tvāt_tva ca_ca sa_tad sa_tad kartā_kartṛ bhoktā_bhoktṛ siddhaḥ_siddha sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña sarva--_sarva vid_vid kartā_kartṛ boddhā_boddhṛ padebhyaḥ_pada anubhavitṛ--_anubhavitṛ tvam_tva kahlu_kahlu bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvam_tva sarva--_sarva abhyupagatam_abhyupagam saḥ_tad aśnute_aś sarvān_sarva kāmān_kāma saha_saha brahmaṇā_brahman vipaścitā_vipaścit iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tu_tu ubhayoḥ_ubhaya tat_tad pravyaktam_pravyakta yadi_yadi api_api saṃvid--_saṃvid svarūpāt_svarūpa saṃvettṛ--_saṃvettṛ tva--_tva ādi_ādi na_na anyat_anya prakāśa--_prakāśa svarūpāt_svarūpa raveḥ_ravi iva_iva prakāśaka--_prakāśaka tva--_tva ādi_ādi tathā_tathā api_api viśeṣa--_viśeṣa sāmarthyāt_sāmarthya tad--_tad anya--_anya tva--_tva vyavahāraḥ_vyavahāra viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa ca_ca bheda--_bheda pratinidhiḥ_pratinidhi na_na bhedaḥ_bheda sa_tad ca_ca bheda--_bheda abhāve_abhāva api_api bheda--_bheda kāryasya_kārya dharma--_dharma dharmi--_dharmin bhāva--_bhāva ādi--_ādi vyavahārasya_vyavahāra hetuḥ_hetu sattā_sattā satī_as bhedaḥ_bheda bhinnaḥ_bhid kālaḥ_kāla sarvadā_sarvadā asti_as iti_iti ādiṣu_ādi vidvadbhiḥ_vidvas pratītaḥ_pratī tad--_tad pratīti--_pratīti anyathā_anyathā anupapattyā_anupapatti evam_evam dharmān_dharma pṛthak_pṛthak paśyan_paś tān_tad eva_eva anuvidhāvati_anuvidhāv iti_iti śrutyā_śruti ca_ca siddhaḥ_sidh iha_iha hi_hi brahma--_brahman dharmān_dharma abhidhāya_abhidhā tad--_tad bhedaḥ_bheda pratiṣidhyate_pratiṣidh

na_na khalu_khalu bheda--_bheda pratinidheḥ_pratinidhi tasya_tad api_api abhāve_abhāva dharma--_dharma dharmi--_dharmin bhāva--_bhāva dharma--_dharma bahutve_bahutva śakye_śakya vaktum_vac iti_iti anicchubhiḥ_anicchu api_api svīkāryāḥ_svīkṛ syuḥ_as te_tad ime_idam arthāḥ_artha śāstre_śāstra asmin_idam yathāsthānam_yathāsthānam anusandheyāḥ_anusaṃdhā iha_iha hi_hi jīvātma--_jīvātman paramātma--_paramātman tad--_tad dhāma_dhāman tad--_tad prāpti--_prāpti upāyānām_upāya svarūpāṇi_svarūpa yathāvat_yathāvat nirūpyante_nirūpay tatra_tatra jīvātma--_jīvātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya paramātma--_paramātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya upayogitayā_upayogitā paramātma--_paramātman yāthātmyam_yāthātmya tu_tu tad--_tad upāsana--_upāsana upayogitayā_upayogitā prakṛti--_prakṛti ādikam_ādika tu_tu paramātmanaḥ_paramātman sraṣṭuḥ_sraṣṭṛ upakaraṇatayā_upakaraṇatā upadiśyate_upadiś

tad--_tad upāyāḥ_upāya ca_ca karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna bhakti--_bhakti bhedāt_bheda tredhā_tredhā tatra_tatra śruta--_śruta tad--_tad tad--_tad phalanaiḥ_phalana apekṣeṇa_apekṣa kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa parityāgena_parityāga ca_ca anuṣṭhitasya_anuṣṭhā sva--_sva vihitasya_vidhā karmaṇaḥ_karman hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhi--_viśuddhi dvārā_dvār jñāna--_jñāna bhaktyoḥ_bhakti upakāri--_upakārin tvāt_tva paramparayā_paramparā tad--_tad prāptau_prāpti upāya--_upāya tat_tad ca_ca śruti--_śruti vihita--_vidhā karma_karman hiṃsā--_hiṃsā śūnyam_śūnya atra_atra mukhyam_mukhya mokṣa--_mokṣa dharme_dharma pitā--_pitṛ putra--_putra ādi--_ādi saṃvādāt_saṃvāda hiṃsā--_hiṃsā vat_vat tu_tu gauṇam_gauṇa viprakṛṣṭa--_viprakṛṣṭa tvāt_tva tayoḥ_tad tu_tu sākṣāt_sākṣāt eva_eva tathātvam_tathātva

nanu_nanu tathā_tathā anuṣṭhitena_anuṣṭhā karmaṇā_karman hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhyā_viśuddhi jñāna--_jñāna udayena_udaya muktau_mukti satyām_as bhaktyā_bhakti kaḥ_ka viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa ucyate_vac jñānam_jñāna eva_eva kiñcid_kaścit viśeṣāt_viśeṣāt bhaktiḥ_bhakti iti_iti bhakteḥ_bhakti jñāna--_jñāna tvam_tva tu_tu "sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda eka--_eka rase_rasa bhakti--_bhakti yoge_yoga tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti siddham_sidh

tat_tad idam_idam śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi bhāva--_bhāva ādi--_ādi śabda--_śabda vyapadiṣṭam_vyapadiś dṛṣṭam_dṛṣṭa jñānasya_jñāna śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi ākāra--_ākāra tvam_tva cit--_cit sukhasya_sukha viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu kuntala--_kuntala ādi--_ādi pratīka--_pratīka tva--_tva vat_vat pratyetavyam_pratī iti_iti vakṣyāmaḥ_vac ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ trike_trika asmin_idam śāstre_śāstra prathamena_prathama ṣaṭkena_ṣaṭka īśvara--_īśvara aṃśasya_aṃśa jīvasya_jīva aṃśi--_aṃśin īśvara--_īśvara bhakti--_bhakti upayogi--_upayogin svarūpa--_svarūpa darśanam_darśana tat_tad ca_ca antar_antar gata--_gam jñāna--_jñāna niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman sādhyam_sādhay nirūpyate_nirūpay abhidhīyate_abhidhā antyena_antya tu_tu pūrva--_pūrva uditānām_vad eva_eva īśvara--_īśvara ādīnām_ādi svarūpāṇi_svarūpa pariśodhyante_pariśodhay trayāṇām_tri ṣaṭkānām_ṣaṭka karma--_karman bhakti--_bhakti jñāna--_jñāna pūrvatā--_pūrvatā vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa tu_tu tad--_tad tad--_tad prādhānyena_prādhānya eva_eva

asya_idam śāstrasya_śāstra śraddhāluḥ_śraddhālu sad--_sat dharma--_dharma niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā vijita--_viji indriyaḥ_indriya adhikārī_adhikārin sa_tad ca_ca sa_sa niṣṭha--_niṣṭhā pariniṣṭhita--_pariniṣṭhā nirapekṣa--_nirapekṣa bhedāt_bheda trividhaḥ_trividha teṣu_tad svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi lokān_loka api_api didṛkṣṭ_didṛkṣu niṣṭhayā_niṣṭhā sva--_sva dharmān_dharma hari--_hari arcana--_arcana rūpān_rūpa ācaran_ācar prathamaḥ_prathama loka--_loka saṃjighṛkṣayā_saṃjighṛkṣā tān_tad ācaran_ācar hari--_hari bhakti--_bhakti nirataḥ_niram dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya sa_tad ca_ca sa_tad ca_ca sa_sa āśramaḥ_āśrama satya--_satya tapaḥ--_tapas japa--_japa ādibhiḥ_ādi viśuddha--_viśudh cittaḥ_citta hari--_hari eka--_eka nirataḥ_niram tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya nirāśramaḥ_nirāśrama vācya--_vac vācaka--_vācaka bhāvaḥ_bhāva sambandhaḥ_sambandha vācya_vac ukta--_vac lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa vācakaḥ_vācaka tat_tad gītā--_gītā śāstram_śāstra tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa saḥ_tad atra_atra viṣayaḥ_viṣaya atra_atra īśvara--_īśvara ādiṣu_ādi triṣu_tri brahma--_brahman śabdaḥ_śabda akṣara--_akṣara śabdaḥ_śabda ca_ca baddha--_bandh jīveṣu_jīva tad--_tad deheṣu_deha ca_ca kṣara--_kṣara śabdaḥ_śabda īśvara--_īśvara jīva--_jīva dehe_deha manasi_manas buddhau_buddhi dhṛtau_dhṛti yatne_yatna ca_ca ātma--_ātman śabdaḥ_śabda triguṇāyām_triguṇa vāsanāyām_vāsanā śīle_śīla svarūpe_svarūpa ca_ca prakṛti--_prakṛti śabdaḥ_śabda sattā--_sattā abhiprāya--_abhiprāya svabhāva--_svabhāva padārtha--_padārtha janmasu_janman kriyāsu_kriyā ātmasu_ātman ca_ca bhāva--_bhāva śabdaḥ_śabda karma--_karman ādiṣu_ādi triṣu_tri citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhe_nirodha ca_ca yoga--_yoga śabdaḥ_śabda paṭhyate_paṭh etat_etad śāstram_śāstra khalu_khalu svayam_svayam bhagavataḥ_bhagavat sākṣāt_sākṣāt vacanam_vacana sarvatas_sarvatas śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha gītā_gītā su_su gītā_gītā kartavyā_kṛ kim_ka anyaiḥ_anya śāstra--_śāstra vistaraiḥ_vistara yā_yad svayam_svayam padmanābhasya_padmanābha mukha--_mukha padmāt_padma viniḥsṛtā_viniḥsṛ iti_iti pādmāt_pādma

dhṛtarāṣṭra--_dhṛtarāṣṭra ādi--_ādi vākyam_vākya tu_tu tad--_tad saṅgati--_saṃgati lābhāya_lābha dvaipāyanena_dvaipāyana viracitam_viracay tat_tad ca_ca lavaṇākara--_lavaṇākara nipāta--_nipāta nyāyena_nyāya tad--_tad mayam_maya iti_iti upodghātaḥ_upodghāta

lg.l: saṅgrāma--_saṃgrāma mūrdhni_mūrdhan saṃvādaḥ_saṃvāda
yaḥ_yad abhūt_bhū govinda--_govinda pārthayoḥ_pārtha
tad--_tad saṅgatyai_saṃgati kathām_kathā prākhyāt_prakhyā
gītāsu_gītā prathame_prathama muniḥ_muni

div.p: iti_iti tāvat_tāvat bhagavat--_bhagavat arjuna--_arjuna saṃvādam_saṃvāda prastautum_prastu kathā_kathā nirūpyate_nirūpay dharmakṣetre_dharmakṣetra iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi sapta--_saptan viṃśatyā_viṃśati tad--_tad bhagavataḥ_bhagavat pārtha--_pārtha sārathyam_sārathya vidvān_vid dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ_dhṛtarāṣṭra sva--_sva putra--_putra vijaye_vijaya sandihānaḥ_saṃdih sañjayam_saṃjaya pṛcchati_pracch iti_iti āha_ah janmejayam_janmejaya prati_prati vaiśampāyanaḥ_vaiśampāyana dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ_dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca_vac iti_iti yuyutsavaḥ_yuyutsu yoddhum_yudh icchavaḥ_icchu māmakāḥ_māmaka mad--_mad putrāḥ_putra pāṇḍavāḥ_pāṇḍava ca_ca kurukṣetre_kurukṣetra samavetāḥ_samave kim_ka akurvata_kṛ iti_iti

nanu_nanu yuyutsavaḥ_yuyutsu samavetāḥ_samave iti_iti tvam_tvad eva_eva ātthya_ah tatas_tatas yudheran_yudh eva_eva punar_punar kim_ka akurvata_kṛ iti_iti kaḥ_ka te_tvad bhāvaḥ_bhāva iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah dharma--_dharma kṣetre_kṣetra iti_iti yat_yad anu_anu kurukṣetram_kurukṣetra devānām_deva deva--_deva yajanam_yajana sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta brahma--_brahman sadanam_sadana iti_iti ādi--_ādi śravaṇāt_śravaṇa dharma--_dharma prarohi--_prarohin bhūmi--_bhūmi bhūtam_bhū kurukṣetram_kurukṣetra prasiddham_prasidh tad--_tad prabhāvāt_prabhāva vinaṣṭa--_vinaś vidveṣāḥ_vidveṣa mad--_mad putrāḥ_putra kim_kim pāṇḍavebhyaḥ_pāṇḍava tat_tad rājyam_rājya dātum_dā niścikyuḥ_niści kim_kim vā_vā pāṇḍavāḥ_pāṇḍava sadā_sadā eva_eva dharma--_dharma śīlāḥ_śīla dharma--_dharma kṣetre_kṣetra tasmin_tad kula--_kula kṣaya--_kṣaya hetukāt_hetuka adharmāt_adharma bhītāḥ_bhī vana--_vana praveśam_praveśa eva_eva śreyaḥ_śreyas vimamṛśuḥ_vimṛś iti_iti he_he sañjaya_saṃjaya iti_iti vyāsa--_vyāsa prasādāt_prasāda vinaṣṭa--_vinaś rāga--_rāga dveṣaḥ_dveṣa tvam_tvad tathyam_tathya vada_vad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava māmaka--_māmaka tva--_tva anuktiḥ_anukti dhṛtarāṣṭrasya_dhṛtarāṣṭra teṣu_tad droham_droha abhivyanakti_abhivyañj dhānya--_dhānya kṣetrāt_kṣetra tad--_tad virodhinām_virodhin dhānya--_dhānya ābhāsānām_ābhāsa iva_iva dharma--_dharma kṣetrāt_kṣetra tad--_tad virodhinām_virodhin dharma--_dharma ābhāsānām_ābhāsa tvad--_tvad putrāṇām_putra apagamaḥ_apagama bhāvi_bhāvin iti_iti dharma--_dharma kṣetra--_kṣetra śabdena_śabda gīḥ--_gir devyā_devī vyajyate_vyañj
BhG 1.2
saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac

lg.l: dṛṣṭvā_dṛś tu_tu pāṇḍava--_pāṇḍava anīkam_anīka vyūḍham_vyūh duryodhanaḥ_duryodhana tadā_tadā
ācāryam_ācārya upasaṃgamya_upasaṃgam rājā_rājan vacanam_vacana abravīt_brū

div.p: uvāca_vac adhiṣṭhitam_adhiṣṭhā uvāca_vac

bhavet_bhū kintu_kintu tat_tad manoratha--_manoratha pratikulam_pratikula iti_iti manasi_manas kṛtvā_kṛ uvāca_vac dṛṣṭvā_dṛś iti_iti vyūḍham_vyūh vyūha--_vyūha racanayā_racanā avasthitam_avasthā rājā_rājan duryodhanaḥ_duryodhana sa_sa antar_antar bhayam_bhaya uvāca_vac paśya_paś etām_etad iti_iti navabhiḥ_navan ślokaiḥ_śloka

evam_evam janma--_janman andhasya_andha prajñā--_prajñā cakṣuṣaḥ_cakṣus dhṛtarāṣṭrasya_dhṛtarāṣṭra dharma--_dharma prajñā--_prajñā vilopāt_vilopa moha--_moha andhasya_andha mad--_mad putraḥ_putra kadācid_kadācid pāṇḍavebhyaḥ_pāṇḍava tat_tad rājyam_rājya dadyāt_dā iti_iti vimlāna--_vimlā cittasya_citta bhāvam_bhāva vijñāya_vijñā dharmiṣṭhaḥ_dharmiṣṭha api_api tebhyaḥ_tad rājyam_rājya na_na arpayuṣyati_arpay iti_iti tad--_tad santoṣam_saṃtoṣa utpādayan_utpāday āha_ah dṛṣṭvā_dṛś iti_iti pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava anīkam_anīka sainyam_sainya vyūḍham_vyūh vyūha--_vyūha racanayā_racanā avasthitam_avasthā ācāryam_ācārya dhanuḥ--_dhanus vidyā--_vidyā pradam_prada droṇam_droṇa upasaṅgamya_upasaṃgam svayam_svayam eva_eva tad--_tad antikam_antika gatvā_gam rājā_rājan rāja--_rājan nīti--_nīti nipuṇaḥ_nipuṇa vacanam_vacana alpa--_alpa akṣara--_akṣara tvam_tva gambhīra--_gambhīra artha--_artha tvam_tva saṅkrānta--_saṃkram vacana--_vacana viśeṣam_viśeṣa atra_atra svayam_svayam ācārya--_ācārya sannidhi--_saṃnidhi gamanena_gamana pāṇḍava--_pāṇḍava sainya--_sainya prabhāva--_prabhāva darśana--_darśana hetukam_hetuka tasya_tad antar_antar bhayam_bhaya guru--_guru gauraveṇa_gaurava tad--_tad antikam_antika svayam_svayam āgatavān_āgam asmi_as iti_iti bhaya--_bhaya saṅgopanam_saṃgopana ca_ca vyajyate_vyañj tat_tad idam_idam rāja--_rājan nīti--_nīti naipuṇyāt_naipuṇya iti_iti ca_ca rāja--_rājan padena_pada
BhG 1.3

lg.l: paśya_paś etām_etad pāṇḍu--_pāṇḍu putrāṇām_putra ācārya_ācārya mahatīm_mahat camūm_camū
vyūḍhām_vyūh drupada--_drupada putreṇa_putra tava_tvad śiṣyeṇa_śiṣya dhīmatā_dhīmat

div.p: āha_ah paśya_paś iti_iti ādi_ādi he_he ācārya_ācārya pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava mahatīm_mahat vitatām_vitan camūm_camū senām_senā paśya_paś tava_tvad śiṣyeṇa_śiṣya drupada--_drupada putreṇa_putra dhṛṣṭadyumnena_dhṛṣṭadyumna vyūḍhām_vyūh vyūha--_vyūha racanayā_racanā adhiṣṭhitām_adhiṣṭhā

Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha drupada--_drupada putreṇa_putra dhṛṣṭadyumnena_dhṛṣṭadyumna tava_tvad śiṣyeṇa_śiṣya sva--_sva vadha--_vadha artham_artha utpannaḥ_utpad iti_iti jānatā_jñā api_api tvayā_tvad ayam_idam adhyāpitaḥ_adhyāpay iti_iti tava_tvad manda--_manda buddhi--_buddhi tvam_tva dhīmatā_dhīmat iti_iti śatroḥ_śatru api_api tvattaḥ_tvad sakāśāt_sakāśāt tvad--_tvad vadha--_vadha upāya--_upāya vidyā_vidyā gṛhītā_grah iti_iti asya_idam mahābuddhi--_mahābuddhi tvam_tva phal--_phala kāle_kāla api_api paśya_paś iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

āha_ah paśya_paś etām_etad priya--_priya śiṣyeṣu_śiṣya yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira ādiṣu_ādi sneha--_sneha atiśayāt_atiśaya ācāryaḥ_ācārya na_na yudhyet_yudh iti_iti vibhāvya_vibhāvay tad--_tad kopa--_kopa utpādanāya_utpādana tasmin_tad tad--_tad avajñām_avajñā vyañjayan_vyañjay āha_ah etām_etad iti_iti etām_etad ati_ati sannihitām_saṃnidhā prāgalbhyena_prāgalbhya ācāryam_ācārya ati_ati śūram_śūra ca_ca tvām_tvad a_a vigaṇayya_vigaṇay sthitām_sthā dṛṣṭvā_dṛś tad--_tad avajñām_avajñā pratīhi_pratī iti_iti vyūḍhām_vyūh vyūha--_vyūha racanayā_racanā sthāpitām_sthāpay drupada--_drupada putreṇa_putra iti_iti tvad--_tvad vairiṇā_vairin drupadena_drupada tvad--_tvad vadhāya_vadha dhṛṣṭadyumnaḥ_dhṛṣṭadyumna putraḥ_putra yajña--_yajña agni--_agni kuṇḍāt_kuṇḍa utpāditaḥ_utpāday asti_as iti_iti tava_tvad śiṣyeṇa_śiṣya iti_iti tvam_tvad sva--_sva śatrum_śatru jānan_jñā api_api dhanuḥ--_dhanus vidyām_vidyā adhyāpitavān_adhyāpay asi_as iti_iti tava_tvad manda--_manda dhī--_dhī tvam_tva dhīmatā_dhīmat iti_iti śatroḥ_śatru tvattaḥ_tvad tvad--_tvad vadha--_vadha upāyaḥ_upāya gṛhītaḥ_grah iti_iti tasya_tad sudhī--_sudhī tvam_tva tvad--_tvad apekṣyakāri--_apekṣyakārin tā_tā eva_eva asmākam_mad
anartha--_anartha hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti

lg.l: atra_atra śūrāḥ_śūra mahā--_mahat iṣvāsāḥ_iṣvāsa bhīma--_bhīma arjuna--_arjuna samāḥ_sama yudhi_yudh
yuyudhānaḥ_yuyudhāna virāṭaḥ_virāṭa ca_ca drupadaḥ_drupada ca_ca mahā--_mahat rathaḥ_ratha
dhṛṣṭaketuḥ_dhṛṣṭaketu cekitānaḥ_cekitāna kāśi--_kāśi rājaḥ_rāja ca_ca vīryavān_vīryavat
purujit_purujit kuntibhojaḥ_kuntibhoja ca_ca śaibyaḥ_śaibya ca_ca nara--_nara puṃgavaḥ_puṃgava
yudhāmanyuḥ_yudhāmanyu ca_ca vikrāntaḥ_vikram uttamaujāḥ_uttamaujas ca_ca vīryavān_vīryavat
saubhadraḥ_saubhadra draupadeyāḥ_draupadeya ca_ca sarve_sarva eva_eva mahā--_mahat rathāḥ_ratha

div.p: atra_atra asyām_idam camvām_camū iṣavaḥ_iṣu bāṇāḥ_bāṇa asyaḥ_asi te_tad kṣipyante_kṣip ebhiḥ_idam iti_iti iṣāsāḥ_iṣāsā dhanūṃṣi_dhanus mahāntaḥ_mahat iṣvāsaḥ_iṣvāsa yeṣām_yad te_tad maheṣvāsāḥ_maheṣvāsa bhīma--_bhīma arjunau_arjuna tāvat_tāvat atra_atra ati_ati prasiddhau_prasidh yoddhārau_yoddhṛ tābhyām_tad samāḥ_sama śūrāḥ_śūra śauryeṇa_śaurya kṣātra--_kṣātra dharmeṇa_dharma upetāḥ_upe santi_as tān_tad eva_eva nāmabhiḥ_nāman nirdiśati_nirdiś yuyudhānaḥ_yuyudhāna sātyakiḥ_sātyaki kim_kim ca_ca dhṛṣṭaketuḥ_dhṛṣṭaketu iti_iti vikrāntaḥ_vikram yudhāmanyuḥ_yudhāmanyu nāma_nāma ekaḥ_eka saubhadraḥ_saubhadra abhimanyuḥ_abhimanyu draupadeyāḥ_draupadeya draupadyām_draupadī pañcabhyaḥ_pañcan yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira ādibhyaḥ_ādi jātāḥ_jan putrāḥ_putra prativindhya--_prativindhya ādayaḥ_ādi pañca_pañcan mahā--_mahat ratha--_ratha ādīnām_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa

lg.l: ekaḥ_eka daśa_daśan sahasrāṇi_sahasra yodhayet_yodhay yaḥ_yad tu_tu dhanvinām_dhanvin
śastra--_śastra śāstra--_śāstra pravīṇaḥ_pravīṇa ca_ca mahārthaḥ_mahārtha iti_iti smṛtaḥ_smṛ

div.p: amitān_amita yodhayet_yodhay yaḥ_yad tu_tu samproktaḥ_sampravac atirathaḥ_atiratha tu_tu saḥ_tad ca_ca ekena_eka yaḥ_yad yudhyet_yudh tad--_tad nyūnaḥ_nyūna ardha--_ardha rathaḥ_ratha smṛtaḥ_smṛ

Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha atra_atra camvām_camū mahāntaḥ_mahat śatrubhiḥ_śatru chettum_chid aśakyāḥ_aśakya iṣvāsāḥ_iṣvāsa dhanūṃṣi_dhanus yeṣām_yad te_tad yuyudhānaḥ_yuyudhāna sātyakiḥ_sātyaki saubhadraḥ_saubhadra abhimanyuḥ_abhimanyu draupadeyāḥ_draupadeya yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira ādibhyaḥ_ādi pañcabhyaḥ_pañcan jātāḥ_jan prativindhya--_prativindhya ādayaḥ_ādi mahā--_mahat ratha--_ratha ādīnām_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa

lg.l: ekaḥ_eka daśa_daśan sahasrāṇi_sahasra yodhayet_yodhay yaḥ_yad tu_tu dhanvinām_dhanvin
śastra--_śastra śāstra--_śāstra pravīṇaḥ_pravīṇa ca_ca mahārthaḥ_mahārtha iti_iti smṛtaḥ_smṛ

div.p: amitān_amita yodhayet_yodhay yaḥ_yad tu_tu samproktaḥ_sampravac atirathaḥ_atiratha tu_tu saḥ_tad ca_ca ekena_eka yaḥ_yad yudhyet_yudh tad--_tad nyūnaḥ_nyūna ardha--_ardha rathaḥ_ratha smṛtaḥ_smṛ

syāt_as āha_ah atra_atra camvām_camū mahāntaḥ_mahat śatrubhiḥ_śatru chettum_chid aśakyāḥ_aśakya iṣvāsāḥ_iṣvāsa cāpāḥ_cāpa yeṣām_yad te_tad yuddha--_yuddha kauśalam_kauśala āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah bhīma--_bhīma iti_iti yuyudhānaḥ_yuyudhāna sātyakiḥ_sātyaki mahā--_mahat rathaḥ_ratha iti_iti yuyudhānīdānām_yuyudhānīda trayāṇām_tri nara--_nara puṅgavaḥ_puṃgava iti_iti purujit--_purujit ādīnām_ādi trayāṇām_tri yudyā_yudya iti_iti vikrānte_vikram iti_iti yudhāmanyoḥ_yudhāmanyu vīryavān_vīryavat iti_iti uttamaujasaḥ_uttamaujas ca_ca iti_iti viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa saubhadraḥ_saubhadra abhimanyuḥ_abhimanyu draupadeyāḥ_draupadeya yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira ādibhyaḥ_ādi pañcabhyaḥ_pañcan kramāt_kramāt draupadyām_draupadī jātāḥ_jan prativindhya--_prativindhya śrutasena--_śrutasena śrutakīrti--_śrutakīrti śatānīka--_śatānīka śrutakarma--_śrutakarman ākhyāḥ_ākhyā pañca--_pañcan putrāḥ_putra ca_ca śabdāt_śabda anye_anya ca_ca ghaṭotkaca--_ghaṭotkaca ādayaḥ_ādi pāṇḍavāḥ_pāṇḍava tu_tu atikhyāta--_atikhyā tvāt_tva na_na gaṇitāḥ_gaṇay ye_yad ete_etad saptadaśa_saptadaśan gaṇitāḥ_gaṇay ye_yad ca_ca anye_anya tad--_tad pakṣīyāḥ_pakṣīya te_tad sarve_sarva mahā--_mahat rathāḥ_ratha eva_eva atirathasya_atiratha api_api upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad tad--_tad lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa ca_ca uktam_vac

lg.l: ekaḥ_eka daśa_daśan sahasrāṇi_sahasra yodhayet_yodhay yaḥ_yad tu_tu dhanvinām_dhanvin
śastra--_śastra śāstra--_śāstra pravīṇaḥ_pravīṇa ca_ca mahārthaḥ_mahārtha iti_iti smṛtaḥ_smṛ

div.p: amitān_amita yodhayet_yodhay yaḥ_yad tu_tu samproktaḥ_sampravac atirathaḥ_atiratha tu_tu saḥ_tad ca_ca ekena_eka yaḥ_yad yudhyet_yudh tad--_tad nyūnaḥ_nyūna ardha--_ardha rathaḥ_ratha smṛtaḥ_smṛ
BhG 1.7

lg.l: asmākam_mad tu_tu viśiṣṭāḥ_viśiṣ ye_yad tān_tad nibodha_nibudh dvijottama_dvijottama
nāyakāḥ_nāyaka mama_mad sainyasya_sainya saṃjñā--_saṃjñā artham_artha tān_tad bravīmi_brū te_tvad

div.p: asmākam_mad iti_iti nibodha_nibudh budhyasva_budh nāyakāḥ_nāyaka netāraḥ_netṛ saṃjñā--_saṃjñā artham_artha samyak_samyak jñāna--_jñāna artham_artha
nibodha_nibudh budhyasva_budh

asi_as ācchādayan_ācchāday āha_ah asmākam_mad sarveṣām_sarva madhye_madhya ye_yad viśiṣṭāḥ_viśiṣ parama--_parama utkṛṣṭāḥ_utkṛṣṭa budhi--_budhi ādi--_ādi bala--_bala śālinaḥ_śālin nāyakāḥ_nāyaka netāraḥ_netṛ tān_tad saṃjñā--_saṃjñā artham_artha samyak_samyak jñāna--_jñāna artham_artha bravīmi_brū iti_iti pāṇḍava--_pāṇḍava premṇā_preman tvam_tvad ced_ced naḥ_mad yotsyase_yudh tadā_tadā api_api bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādibhiḥ_ādi mad--_mad vijayaḥ_vijaya setsyati_sidh eva_eva iti_iti tat_tad kopa--_kopa utpādana--_utpādana artham_artha dyotyam_dyotay

lg.l: bhavān_bhavat bhīṣmaḥ_bhīṣma ca_ca karṇaḥ_karṇa ca_ca kṛpaḥ_kṛpa ca_ca samitiṃjayaḥ_samitiṃjaya
aśvatthāmā_aśvatthāman vikarṇaḥ_vikarṇa ca_ca saumadattiḥ_saumadatti jayadrathaḥ_jayadratha
anye_anya ca_ca bahavaḥ_bahu śūrāḥ_śūra mad--_mad arthe_artha tyakta--_tyaj jīvitāḥ_jīvita
nānā_nānā śastra--_śastra praharaṇāḥ_praharaṇa sarve_sarva yuddha--_yuddha viśāradāḥ_viśārada

div.p: tān_tad eṣā_etad āha_ah bhavān_bhavat iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi bhavān_bhavat droṇaḥ_droṇa samitim_samiti saṃgrāmam_saṃgrāma jayati_ji iti_iti tathā_tathā saumadattiḥ_saumadatti somadattasya_somadatta putraḥ_putra bhūriśravāḥ_bhūriśravas anye_anya ca_ca iti_iti mad--_mad arthe_artha mad--_mad prayojana--_prayojana artham_artha jīvitam_jīvita tyaktum_tyaj adhyavasitāḥ_adhyavaso iti_iti arthaḥ_artha anekāni_aneka śastrāni_śastra praharaṇa--_praharaṇa sādhanāni_sādhana yeṣām_yad te_tad yuddhe_yuddha viśāradāḥ_viśārada nipuṇāḥ_nipuṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

tyakta--_tyaj jīvitāḥ_jīvita iti_iti jīvita--_jīvita tyāgena_tyāga api_api yadi_yadi mad--_mad upakāraḥ_upakāra syāt_as tadā_tadā tat_tad api_api kartum_kṛ pravṛttāḥ_pravṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha vastutas_vastutas tu_tu mayā_mad eva_eva ete_etad nihatāḥ_nihan pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva nimitta--_nimitta mātram_mātra bhava_bhū savyasācin_savyasācin iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavat ukteḥ_ukti duryodhana--_duryodhana sarasvatī_sarasvatī satyam_satya eva_eva āha_ah sma_sma

Baladeva_Baladeva bhavān_bhavat iti_iti bhavān_bhavat droṇaḥ_droṇa vikarṇaḥ_vikarṇa mad--_mad bhrātā_bhrātṛ kaniṣṭhaḥ_kaniṣṭha saumadattiḥ_saumadatti bhūriśravāḥ_bhūriśravas samitiñjayaḥ_samitiṃjaya saṃgrāma--_saṃgrāma vijayī_vijayin iti_iti droṇa--_droṇa ādīnām_ādi saptānām_saptan viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa nanu_nanu etāvantaḥ_etāvat eva_eva mad--_mad sainye_sainya viśiṣṭāḥ_viśiṣ kintu_kiṃtu asaṅkhyeyāḥ_asaṃkhyeya santi_as iti_iti āha_ah anye_anya ca_ca iti_iti bahavaḥ_bahu jayadratha--_jayadratha kṛtavarma--_kṛtavarman śalya--_śalya prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti tyakta--_tyaj ity--_ity ādi_ādi karmaṇi_karman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā jīvitāni_jīvita tyaktum_tyaj kṛta--_kṛ niścayā_niścaya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ittham_ittham ca_ca teṣām_tad sarveṣām_sarva mayi_mad sneha--_sneha atirekāt_atireka śaurya--_śaurya atirekāt_atireka yuddha--_yuddha pāṇḍityāt_pāṇḍitya ca_ca mad--_mad vijayaḥ_vijaya siddhyet_siddhi evā_eva iti_iti dyotyate_dyotay
BhG 1.10

lg.l: a_a paryāptam_paryāp tat_tad asmākam_mad balam_bala bhīṣma--_bhīṣma abhirakṣitam_abhirakṣ
paryāptam_paryāp tu_tu idam_idam eteṣām_etad balam_bala bhīma--_bhīma abhirakṣitam_abhirakṣ

div.p: āha_ah tat_tad tathābhūtaiḥ_tathābhūta vīraiḥ_vīra yuktam_yuj api_api bhīṣmeṇa_bhīṣma abhirakṣitam_abhirakṣ api_api asmākam_mad balam_bala sainyam_sainya aparyāptam_aparyāpta taiḥ_tad saha_saha yoddhum_yudh asamartham_asamartha bhāti_bhā idam_idam eteṣām_etad pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava balam_bala bhīma--_bhīma abhirakṣitam_abhirakṣ sat_as paryāptam_paryāp samartham_samartha bhāti_bhā bhīṣmasya_bhīṣma ubhaya--_ubhaya pakṣapāti--_pakṣapātin tvāt_tva asmad--_mad balam_bala pāṇḍava--_pāṇḍava sainyam_sainya prati_prati asamartham_asamartha bhīmasyika--_bhīmasyika pakṣapāti--_pakṣapātin tvāt_tva pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava balam_bala samartham_samartha

pāṇḍavaiḥ_pāṇḍava saha_saha yoddhum_yudh akṣamam_akṣama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhīṣmeṇa_bhīṣma ati_ati sūkṣma--_sūkṣma buddhinā_buddhi śastra--_śastra śāstra--_śāstra pravīṇena_pravīṇa abhitas_abhitas rakṣitam_rakṣ api_api bhīṣmasya_bhīṣma ubhaya--_ubhaya pakṣapāti--_pakṣapātin tvāt_tva eteṣām_etad pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava tu_tu bhīmena_bhīma sthūla--_sthūla buddhinā_buddhi śastra--_śastra śāstra--_śāstra anabhijñaḥ_anabhijña api_api rakṣitam_rakṣ paryāptam_paryāp paripūrṇam_paripṛ asmābhiḥ_mad saha_saha yuddhe_yuddha pravīṇam_pravīṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah aparyāptam_aparyāpta aparimitam_aparimita asmākam_mad balam_bala tatra_tatra api_api bhīṣmeṇa_bhīṣma mahā--_mahat buddhimatā_buddhimat atirathena_atiratha abhirakṣitam_abhirakṣ eteṣām_etad pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava balam_bala tu_tu paryāptam_paryāp parimitam_parimā tatra_tatra api_api bhīmena_bhīma tuccha--_tuccha buddhinā_buddhi ardha--_ardha rathena_ratha abhirakṣitam_abhirakṣ atas_atas siddha--_sidh vijayaḥ_vijaya aham_mad
BhG 1.11

lg.l: ayaneṣu_ayana ca_ca sarveṣu_sarva yathābhāgam_yathābhāgam avasthitāḥ_avasthā
bhīṣmam_bhīṣma eva_eva abhirakṣantu_abhirakṣ bhavantaḥ_bhavat sarve_sarva eva_eva hi_hi

div.p: āha_ah rakṣantu_rakṣ yudhyamānaḥ_yudh ayam_idam pṛṣṭhatas_pṛṣṭhatas kaiścid_kaścit na_na hanyate_han bhīṣma--_bhīṣma balena_bala eva_eva asmākam_mad jīvitam_jīvita iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

udāsīta_udās arpayan_arpay āha_ah ayaneṣu_ayana sainya--_sainya praveśa--_praveśa vartmasu_vartman yathābhāgam_yathābhāgam vibhaktām_vibhaj svām_sva svām_sva yuddha--_yuddha bhūmim_bhūmi a_a parityajya_parityaj avasthitāḥ_avasthā bhavantaḥ_bhavat bhavat--_bhavat ādayaḥ_ādi eva_eva abhitas_abhitas rakṣantu_rakṣ yuddha--_yuddha abhiniveśāt_abhiniveśa pārśvatas_pārśvatas pṛṣṭhatas_pṛṣṭhatas ca_ca a_a paśyantam_paś tathā_tathā kurvantu_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha senāpatau_senāpati bhīṣme_bhīṣma nirbodhe_nirbodha mad--_mad vijaya--_vijaya siddhiḥ_siddhi iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

ayam_idam āśayaḥ_āśaya bhīṣmaḥ_bhīṣma asmākam_mad pityāmahaḥ_pityāmaha bhavān_bhavat tu_tu guruḥ_guru tau_tad yuvām_tvad asmat_mad ekānta--_ekānta hita--_hita eṣiṇau_eṣin viditau_vid yau_yad akṣa--_akṣa sadasi_sadas mad--_mad anyāyam_anyāya vidantau_vid api_api draupadyāḥ_draupadī nyāyam_nyāya pṛṣṭau_pracch na_na avocatām_vac mayā_mad tu_tu pāṇḍaveṣu_pāṇḍava pratītam_pratī sneha--_sneha ābhāsam_ābhāsa tyājayitum_tyājay tathā_tathā niveditam_niveday iti_iti

lg.l: BhG 1.12
tasya_tad saṃjanayan_saṃjanay harṣam_harṣa kuru--_kuru vṛddhaḥ_vṛddha pitāmahaḥ_pitāmaha
siṃha--_siṃha nādam_nāda vinadya_vinad uccais_uccais śaṅkham_śaṅkha dadhmau_dham pratāpavān_pratāpavat

div.p: āha_ah dadhmau_dham

dadhmau_dham āha_ah siṃha--_siṃha nādam_nāda iti_iti upamāne_upamāna karmaṇi_karman ca_ca iti_iti pāṇini--_pāṇini sūtrāt_sūtra ṇamul_ṇamul cāt_ca kartari_kartṛ upamāne_upamāna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha siṃhaḥ_siṃha iva_iva vinadya_vinad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mukhataḥ_mukha kiñcid_kaścit an_an uktvā_vac śaṅkha--_śaṅkha nāda--_nāda mātra--_mātra karaṇena_karaṇa jaya--_jaya parājayau_parājaya khalu_khalu īśvara--_īśvara adhīnau_adhīna tvad--_tvad arthe_artha kṣatra--_kṣatra dharmeṇa_dharma deham_deha tyakṣyāmi_tyaj iti_iti vyajyate_vyañj
BhG 1.13

lg.l: tatas_tatas śaṅkhāḥ_śaṅkha ca_ca bheryaḥ_bherī ca_ca paṇava--_paṇava ānaka--_ānaka gomukhāḥ_gomukha
sahasā_sahasā eva_eva abhyahanyanta_abhihan sa_tad śabdaḥ_śabda tumulaḥ_tumula abhavat_bhū

div.p: āha_ah paṇavāḥ_paṇava mārdalāḥ_mārdala ānakāḥ_ānaka gomukhāḥ_gomukha ca_ca vādya--_vādya viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa sahasā_sahasā tad--_tad kṣaṇam_kṣaṇa eva_eva abhyahanyanta_abhihan vāditāḥ_vāditā sa_tad ca_ca śaṅkha--_śaṅkha ādi--_ādi śabdaḥ_śabda tumulaḥ_tumula mahān_mahat abhūt_bhū
āha_ah

senāpatau_senāpati bhīṣme_bhīṣma pravṛtte_pravṛt tad--_tad sainye_sainya sahasā_sahas tad--_tad kṣaṇam_kṣaṇa eva_eva śaṅkha--_śaṅkha ādayaḥ_ādi abhyahanyanta_abhihan vāditāḥ_vāday karma--_karman kartari_kartṛ prayogaḥ_prayoga paṇava--_paṇava ādayaḥ_ādi trayaḥ_tri vāditra--_vāditra bhedāḥ_bheda sa_tad śabdaḥ_śabda tumulaḥ_tumula eka--_eka ākāra--_ākāra tayā_tā mahān_mahat āsīt_as
BhG 1.14

lg.l: tatas_tatas śvetaiḥ_śveta hayaiḥ_haya yukte_yuj mahati_mahat syandane_syandana sthitau_sthā
mādhavaḥ_mādhava pāṇḍavaḥ_pāṇḍava ca_ca eva_eva divyau_divya śaṅkhau_śaṅkha pradadhmatuḥ_pradham

div.p: āha_ah tatas_tatas kaurava--_kaurava sainya--_sainya vādya--_vādya kolāhala--_kolāhala anantaram_anantaram mahati_mahat syandane_syandana rathe_ratha sthitau_sthā santau_as śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa arjunau_arjuna divyau_divya śaṅkhau_śaṅkha prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa dadhmatuḥ_dham vādayāmāsatuḥ_vāday
div.l: Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha Nothing_nothing
div.p: atha_atha pāṇḍava--_pāṇḍava sainye_sainya pravṛttam_pravṛt yuddhosavam_yuddhosava āha_ah tatas_tatas iti_iti anyeṣām_anya api_api ratha--_ratha sthita--_sthā tve_tva sati_as api_api kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa arjunayoḥ_arjuna ratha--_ratha sthita--_sthā tva--_tva uktiḥ_ukti tad--_tad rathasya_ratha agni--_agni datta--_dā tvam_tva trailokya--_trailokya vijetṛ--_vijetṛ tvam_tva mahā--_mahat prabhava--_prabhava tvam_tva ca_ca vyajyate_vyañj

lg.l: pāñcajanyam_pāñcajanya hṛṣīkeśaḥ_hṛṣīkeśa devadattam_devadatta dhanaṃjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya
pauṇḍram_pauṇḍra dadhmau_dham mahā--_mahat śaṅkham_śaṅkha bhīma--_bhīma karmā_karman vṛkodaraḥ_vṛkodara
anantavijayam_anantavijaya rājā_rājan kuntī--_kuntī putraḥ_putra yudhiṣṭhiraḥ_yudhiṣṭhira
nakulaḥ_nakula sahadevaḥ_sahadeva ca_ca sughoṣa--_sughoṣa maṇipuṣpakau_maṇipuṣpaka
kāśyaḥ_kāśya ca_ca parama--_parama iṣvāsaḥ_iṣvāsa śikhaṇḍī_śikhaṇḍin ca_ca mahā--_mahat rathaḥ_ratha
dhṛṣṭadyumnaḥ_dhṛṣṭadyumna virāṭaḥ_virāṭa ca_ca sātyakiḥ_sātyaki ca_ca aparājitaḥ_aparājita
drupadaḥ_drupada draupadeyāḥ_draupadeya ca_ca sarvaśas_sarvaśas pṛthivīpate_pṛthivīpati
saubhadraḥ_saubhadra ca_ca mahā--_mahat bāhuḥ_bāhu śaṅkhān_śaṅkha dadhmuḥ_dham pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthak_pṛthak

div.p: āha_ah pāñcajanya--_pāñcajanya ādīni_ādi nāmāni_nāman śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa ādi--_ādi śaṅkhānām_śaṅkha bhīmaḥ_bhīma ghoram_ghora karma_karman yasya_yad saḥ_tad vṛka--_vṛka vat_vat udaram_udara yasya_yad sa_tad vṛkodaraḥ_vṛkodara mahā--_mahat śaṅkham_śaṅkha pauṇḍram_pauṇḍra dadhmau_dham iti_iti ananta--_ananta iti_iti nakulaḥ_nakula sughoṣam_sughoṣa nāma_nāma śaṅkham_śaṅkha dadhmau_dham sahadevaḥ_sahadeva maṇipuṣpakam_maṇipuṣpaka nāma_nāma kāśyaḥ_kāśya ca_ca iti_iti kāśyaḥ_kāśya kāśirājaḥ_kāśirāja kathambhūtaḥ_kathambhūta paramaḥ_parama śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha iṣvāsaḥ_iṣvāsa dhanuḥ_dhanus yasya_yad saḥ_tad drupadaḥ_drupada iti_iti he_he pṛthivīpate_pṛthivīpati dhṛtarāṣṭra_dhṛtarāṣṭra

atra_atra hṛṣīkeśa--_hṛṣīkeśa śabdena_śabda parameśvara--_parameśvara sahāyi--_sahāyin tvam_tva rājā_rājan bhīma--_bhīma karmā_karman dhanañjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya iti_iti ebhiḥ_idam yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira ādīnām_ādi rāja--_rājan sūya--_sūya yāji--_yājin tva--_tva hiḍimba--_hiḍimba ādi--_ādi nihantṛ--_nihantṛ tva--_tva digvijaya--_digvijaya āhṛta--_āhṛ ananta--_ananta dhana--_dhana tvāni_tva ca_ca vyajya_vyañj pāṇḍava--_pāṇḍava senā--_senā su_su utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa sūcyate_sūcay para--_para senāsu_senā tad--_tad abhāvāt_abhāva apakarṣaḥ_apakarṣa ca_ca kāśyaḥ_kāśya iti_iti kāśyaḥ_kāśya kāśirājaḥ_kāśirāja parama--_parama iṣvāsaḥ_iṣvāsa mahā--_mahat dhurdharaḥ_dhurdhara ca_ca aparājitaḥ_aparājita dhanuṣā_dhanus dīptaḥ_dīp drupadaḥ_drupada iti_iti pṛthivīpate_pṛthivīpati he_he dhṛtarāṣṭra_dhṛtarāṣṭra iti_iti tava_tvad durmantraṇa--_durmantraṇa udayaḥ_udaya kula--_kula kṣaya--_kṣaya lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa a_a narthaḥ_nartha samāsata_samās
iti_iti sūcyate_sūcay
BhG 1.19

lg.l: sa_tad ghoṣaḥ_ghoṣa dhārtarāṣṭrāṇām_dhārtarāṣṭra hṛdayāni_hṛdaya vyadārayat_vidāray
nabhaḥ_nabhas ca_ca pṛthivīm_pṛthivī ca_ca eva_eva tumulaḥ_tumula vyanunādayan_vyanunāday

div.p: janayāmāsa_janay āha_ah dhārtarāṣṭrāṇām_dhārtarāṣṭra tvadīyānām_tvadīya vyadārayat_vidāray vidāritavān_vidāray kim_ka kurvan_kṛ nabhaḥ_nabhas ca_ca pṛthivīm_pṛthivī ca_ca eva_eva tumulaḥ_tumula abhyanunādayan_abhyanunāday pratidhvanibhiḥ_pratidhvani a_a pūryan_pṛ
Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

Baladeva_baladeva saḥ_tad iti_iti pāṇḍavaiḥ_pāṇḍava kṛtaḥ_kṛ śaṅkha--_śaṅkha nādaḥ_nāda dhārtarāṣṭrāṇām_dhārtarāṣṭra bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādīnām_ādi sarveṣām_sarva vyadārayat_vidāray tad--_tad vidāraṇa--_vidāraṇa tulyām_tulya pīḍām_pīḍā ajanayat_janay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tumulaḥ_tumula ati_ati tīvraḥ_tīvra abhyanunādayan_abhyanunāday pratidhvanibhiḥ_pratidhvani iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dhārtarāṣṭraiḥ_dhārtarāṣṭra kṛtaḥ_kṛ tu_tu śaṅkha--_śaṅkha ādi--_ādi nādaḥ_nāda tumulaḥ_tumula api_api teṣām_tad kiñcid_kaścit api_api kṣobham_kṣobha na_na ajanayat_janay tathā_tathā anukteḥ_anukti iti_iti bodhyam_budh

lg.l: atha_atha vyavasthitān_vyavasthā dṛṣṭvā_dṛś dhārtarāṣṭrān_dhārtarāṣṭra kapidhvajaḥ_kapidhvaja
pravṛtte_pravṛt śastra--_śastra saṃpāte_sampāta dhanuḥ_dhanus udyamya_udyam pāṇḍavaḥ_pāṇḍava

div.p: vijñāpayāmāsa_vijñāpay āha_ah
Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

evam_evam dhārtarāṣṭrāṇām_dhārtarāṣṭra yuddhe_yuddha bhītim_bhīti pradarśya_pradarśay pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava tu_tu tatra_tatra utsāham_utsāha āha_ah atha_atha iti_iti sārdhakena_sārdhaka atha_atha ripu--_ripu śaṅkha--_śaṅkha nāda--_nāda kṛta--_kṛ utsāha--_utsāha bhaṅga--_bhaṅga anantaram_anantaram vyavasthitān_vyavasthā tad--_tad bhaṅga--_bhaṅga virodhi--_virodhin yuyutsayā_yuyutsā avasthitān_avasthā dhārtarāṣṭrān_dhārtarāṣṭra bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādīn_ādi kapidhvajaḥ_kapidhvaja arjunaḥ_arjuna yena_yad śrī--_śrī dāśaratheḥ_dāśarathi api_api mahānti_mahat adhitiṣñhitā_adhitiṣṭh hanumatā_hanumant anugṛhītaḥ_anugrah bhaya--_bhaya gandha--_gandha śūnyaḥ_śūnya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha he_he mahīpate_mahīpati pravṛtte_pravṛt pravartamāne_pravṛt hṛṣīkeśam_hṛṣīkeśa iti_iti hṛṣīkeśam_hṛṣīkeśa sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya pravartakam_pravartaka kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa tat_tad idam_idam vākyam_vākya uvāca_vac iti_iti sarva--_sarva īśvaraḥ_īśvara hariḥ_hari yeṣām_yad niyojyaḥ_niyuj teṣām_tad tat_tad ekānta--_ekānta bhaktānām_bhakta pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava
vijaye_vijaya sandeha--_saṃdeha gandhaḥ_gandha api_api na_na iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

lg.l: hṛṣīkeśam_hṛṣīkeśa tadā_tadā vākyam_vākya idam_idam āha_ah mahīpate_mahīpati
senayoḥ_senā ubhayoḥ_ubhaya madhye_madhya ratham_ratha sthāpaya_sthāpay me_mad acyuta_acyuta
yāvat_yāvat etān_etad nirīkṣe_nirīkṣ aham_mad yoddhu--_yoddhu kāmān_kāma avasthitān_avasthā
kaiḥ_ka mayā_mad saha_saha yoddhavyam_yudh asmin_idam raṇa--_raṇa samudyame_samudyama
yotsyamānān_yudh avekṣe_avekṣ aham_mad ye_yad ete_etad atra_atra samāgatāḥ_samāgam
dhārtarāṣṭrasya_dhārtarāṣṭra durbuddheḥ_durbuddhi yuddhe_yuddha priya--_priya cikīrṣavaḥ_cikīrṣu

div.p: āha_ah yāvat_yāvat etān_etad iti_iti nanu_nanu tvam_tvad yoddhā_yoddhṛ na_na tu_tu yuddha--_yuddha prekṣakaḥ_prekṣaka tatra_tatra āha_ah kaiḥ_ka mayā_mad iti_iti ādi_ādi kaiḥ_ka saha_saha mayā_mad yoddhavyam_yudh yotsyamānān_yudh iti_iti dhārtarāṣṭrasya_dhārtarāṣṭra duryodhanasya_duryodhana priyam_priya kartum_kṛ icchantaḥ_iṣ ye_yad iha_iha samāgatāḥ_samāgam tān_tad aham_mad drakṣyāmi_dṛś yāvat_yāvat tāvat_tāvat ubhayoḥ_ubhaya senayoḥ_senā madhye_madhya me_mad ratham_ratha sthāpaya_sthāpay iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya
Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

Baladeva--_Baladeva arjuna--_arjuna vākyam_vākya āha_ah senayoḥ_senā iti_iti he_he acyuta--_acyuta idi_idī svabhāva--_svabhāva siddhāt_sidh bhakta--_bhakta vātsalyāt_vātsalya pāramaiśvaryāt_pāramaiśvarya ca_ca na_na cyavase_cyu sma_sma iti_iti tena_tad tena_tad ca_ca bhaktasya_bhakta me_mad vākyāt_vākya tatra_tatra ratham_ratha sthitam_sthā kuru_kṛ nirbhaya_nirbhaya tatra_tatra ratha--_ratha sthāpane_sthāpana phalam_phala āha_ah yāvat_yāvat iti_iti yoddhu--_yoddhu kāmān_kāma na_na tu_tu saha_saha asmābhiḥ_mad sandhim_saṃdhi cikīrṣūn_cikīrṣu avasthitān_avasthā na_na tu_tu bhītyā_bhīti pracalitān_pracal

nanu_nanu tvam_tvad yoddhā_yoddhṛ na_na tu_tu yuddha--_yuddha prekṣakaḥ_prekṣaka tatas_tatas tad--_tad darśanena_darśana kim_ka iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah kaiḥ_ka iti_iti asmin_idam bandhūnām_bandhu eva_eva mithas_mithas raṇa--_raṇa udyoge_udyoga kaiḥ_ka bandhubhiḥ_bandhu saha_saha mama_mad yuddham_yuddha bhāvi_bhāvin iti_iti etad--_etad jñānāya_jñāna eva_eva madhye_madhya

nanu_nanu bandhu--_bandhu tvāt_tva sandhim_saṃdhi eva_eva iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah yotsyamānān_yudh iti_iti na_na tu_tu sandhim_saṃdhi vidhāsyataḥ_vidhā avekṣe_avekṣ pratyemi_pratī durbuddheḥ_durbuddhi kudhiyaḥ_kudhī sva--_sva jīvana--_jīvana upāya--_upāya anabhijñasya_anabhijña yuddhe_yuddha na_na tu_tu durbuddhi--_durbuddhi apanayane_apanayana atas_atas mad--_mad yuddha--_yuddha pratiyogi--_pratiyogin nirīkṣaṇam_nirīkṣaṇa yuktam_yukta iti_iti

lg.l: evam_evam uktaḥ_vac hṛṣīkeśaḥ_hṛṣīkeśa guḍākeśena_guḍākeśa bhārata_bhārata
senayoḥ_senā ubhayoḥ_ubhaya madhye_madhya sthāpayitvā_sthāpay ratha--_ratha uttamam_uttama
bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa pramukhatas_pramukhatas sarveṣām_sarva ca_ca mahīkṣitām_mahīkṣit
uvāca_vac pārtha_pārtha paśya_paś etān_etad samavetān_samave kurūn_kuru iti_iti

div.p: tatas_tatas kim_ka vṛttam_vṛt iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā sañjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac evam_evam uktaḥ_vac iti_iti ādi_ādi uḍākā_uḍāka nidrā_nidrā tasya_tad īśena_īśa jita--_ji nidreṇa_nidrā arjunena_arjuna uktaḥ_vac san_as he_he bhārata_bhārata he_he dhṛtarāṣṭra_dhṛtarāṣṭra senayoḥ_senā madhye_madhya rathānām_ratha uttamam_uttama ratham_ratha hṛṣīkeśaḥ_hṛṣīkeśa sthāpitavān_sthāpay bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇaḥ_droṇa iti_iti mahīkṣitām_mahīkṣit rājñām_rājan ca_ca pramukhatas_pramukhatas sammukhe_sammukha ratham_ratha sthāpayitvā_sthāpay he_he pārtha_pārtha etān_etad kurūn_kuru paśya_paś iti_iti śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac

arjuna--_arjuna vāc--_vāc indriya--_indriya mātreṇa_mātra api_api niyamyaḥ_niyam abhūt_bhū iti_iti aho_aho prea--_prea vaśya--_vaśya tvam_tva bhagavataḥ_bhagavant iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva guḍākeśena_guḍākeśa guḍāḥ_guḍa yathā_yathā mādhurya--_mādhurya mātra--_mātra prakāśakāḥ_prakāśaka tat_tad tathā_tathā svīya--_svīya sneha--_sneha rasa--_rasa āsvāda--_āsvāda prakāśakāḥ_prakāśaka akeśāḥ_akeśa viṣṇu--_viṣṇu brahma--_brahman śivāḥ_śiva yasya_yad tena_tad akāraḥ_akāra viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu kaḥ_ka brahmā_brahman īśaḥ_īśa mahā--_mahat devaḥ_deva yatra_yatra sarva--_sarva avatāri--_avatārin cūḍāmaṇi--_cūḍāmaṇi indraḥ_indra svayam_svayam bhagavān_bhagavant śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa eva_eva prema--_preman adhīnaḥ_adhīna san_as ājñā--_ājñā anuvartī_anuvartin babhūva_bhū prakāśayantu_prakāśay kintu_kiṃtu sva--_sva kartṛkam_kartṛka sneha--_sneha rasam_rasa prakāśya_prakāśay eva_eva svam_sva svam_sva kṛtārtham_kṛtārtha manyante_man iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad uktam_vac śrī--_śrī bhagavatā_bhagavant para--_para vyoma--_vyoman nāthena_nātha api_api me_mad yuvayoḥ_tvad didṛkṣuṇā_didṛkṣu iti_iti

yat_yat vā_vā guḍākaḥ_guḍāka nidrā_nidrā tasyāḥ_tad īśena_īśa jita--_ji nidrena_nidrā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra api_api vyākhyāyām_vyākhyā sākṣāt_sākṣāt māyāyāḥ_māyā api_api niyantā_niyantṛ yaḥ_yad śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa sa_tad ca_ca api_api yena_yad premṇā_preman vijitya_viji vaśīkṛtaḥ_vaśīkṛ tena_tad arjunena_arjuna māyā--_māyā vṛttiḥ_vṛtti nidrā_nidrā varākī_varāka jitā_ji iti_iti kim_ka citram_citra iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇayoḥ_droṇa pramukhatas_pramukhatas pramukhe_pramukha sammukhe_sammukha sarveṣām_sarva mahīkṣitām_mahīkṣit rājñām_rājan ca_ca pramukhatas_pramukhatas iti_iti samāsa--_samāsa praviṣṭe_praviś api_api pramukhatas_pramukhatas śabdaḥ_śabda ākṛṣyate_ākṛṣ

tatas_tatas kim_ka vṛttam_vṛt iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā sañjayaḥ_saṃjaya prāha_prāh evam_evam iti_iti guḍākā_guḍākā nidrā_nidrā tasyāḥ_tad īśaḥ_īśa sva--_sva sakha--_sakha śrī--_śrī bhagavat--_bhagavant guṇa--_guṇa lāvaṇya--_lāvaṇya smṛti--_smṛti niveśena_niveśa vijita--_viji nidraḥ_nidrā tad--_tad parama--_parama bhaktaḥ_bhakta tena_tad arjunena_arjuna evam_evam uktaḥ_vac pravartitaḥ_pravartay hṛṣīkeśaḥ_hṛṣīkeśa tad--_tad citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti abhijñaḥ_abhijña sarveṣām_sarva ca_ca mahīkṣitām_mahīkṣit bhū--_bhū bhujām_bhuj ca_ca pramukhatas_pramukhatas sammukhe_sammukha ratha--_ratha uttamam_uttama agnidattam_agnidatta ratham_ratha sthāpayitvā_sthāpay uvāca_vac he_he pārtha_pārtha samavetān_samave etān_etad kurūn_kuru paśya_paś iti_iti pārtha--_pārtha hṛṣīkeśa--_hṛṣīkeśa śabdābhyām_śabda idam_idam sūcyate_sūcay mati--_mati pitṛ--_pitṛ svasṛ--_svasṛ putra--_putra tvāt_tva tvad--_tvad sārathyam_sārathya aham_mad kariṣyāmi_kṛ eva_eva tvam_tvad tu_tu adhunā_adhunā eva_eva yuyutsām_yuyutsā
tyakṣyasi_tyaj iti_iti kim_ka śatru--_śatru sainya--_sainya vīkṣaṇena_vīkṣaṇa iti_iti sa_sa upahāsaḥ_upahāsa bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 1.26

div.p: pravṛttam_pravṛt āha_ah apaśyat_paś

evam_evam bhagavatā_bhagavat uktaḥ_vac arjunaḥ_arjuna para--_para senām_senā apaśyat_paś iti_iti āha_ah tatra_tatra iti_iti sārdhakena_sārdhaka tatra_tatra para--_para senāyām_senā pitṝn_pitṛ pitṛvyān_pitṛvya bhūriśravaḥ--_bhūriśravas prabhṛtīn_prabhṛti pitāmahān_pitāmaha bhīṣma--_bhīṣma somadatta--_somadatta ādīn_ādi ācāryān_ācārya droṇa--_droṇa kṛpa--_kṛpa ādīn_ādi mātulān_mātula śalya--_śalya śakuni--_śakuni ādīn_ādi bhrātṝn_bhrātṛ duryodhana--_duryodhana ādīn_ādi putrān_putra lakṣmaṇa--_lakṣmaṇa sakhīn_sakhi vayasyān_vayasya drauṇi--_drauṇi saindhava--_saindhava ādīn_ādi suhṛdaḥ_suhṛd kṛtavarma--_kṛtavarman bhagadatta--_bhagadatta ādīn_ādi evam_evam sva--_sva sainye_sainya api_api upalakṣaṇīyam_upalakṣay ubhayoḥ_ubhaya api_api senayoḥ_senā avasthitān_avasthā tān_tad sarvān_sarva samīkṣya_samīkṣ iti_iti anvayāt_anuyā 26_26
BhG 1.27

lg.l: tān_tad samīkṣya_samīkṣ sa_tad kaunteyaḥ_kaunteya sarvān_sarva bandhūn_bandhu avasthitān_avasthā
kṛpayā_kṛpā parayā_para āviṣṭaḥ_āviś viṣīdan_viṣad idam_idam abravīt_brū

div.p: kṛtavan_kṛ āha_ah abravīt_brū

hiṃsyāt_hiṃs āha_ah tān_tad samīkṣyate_samīkṣ kaunteyaḥ_kaunteya iti_iti svīya--_svīya pitṛ--_pitṛ svasṛ--_svasṛ putra--_putra tva--_tva uktyā_ukti tad--_tad dharmaḥ_dharma moha--_moha śokau_śoka tadā_tadā tasya_tad vyajyete_vyañj kṛpayā_kṛpā kartryā_kartṛ iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti svabhāva--_svabhāva siddhasya_sidh kṛpā_kṛpā iti_iti dyotsyate_dyut atas_atas parayā_para iti_iti tad--_tad viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa aparayā_apara iti_iti vā_vā chedaḥ_cheda sva--_sva sainye_sainya pūrvam_pūrvam api_api kṛpā_kṛpā asti_as para--_para sainye_sainya tu_tu aparā_apara api_api sā_tad abhūt_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha viṣīdan_viṣad anutāpaḥ_anutāpa vindan_vid atra_atra ukti--_ukti viṣādayoḥ_viṣāda aikakālya--_aikakālya ādi--_ādi ukti--_ukti kāle_kāla
viṣāda--_viṣāda kāryāṇi_kārya aśru--_aśru kampa--_kampa sanna--_sad kaṇṭha--_kaṇṭha ādīni_ādi vyajyate_vyañj

sīdanti_sad mama_mad gātrāṇi_gātra mukham_mukha ca_ca pariśuṣyati_pariśuṣ

gāṇḍīvam_gāṇḍīva sraṃsate_sraṃs hastāt_hasta tvac_tvac ca_ca eva_eva paridahyate_paridah

div.p: abravīt_brū āha_ah he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa yoddhum_yudh icchataḥ_iṣ puratas_puratas samavasthitān_samavasthā sva--_sva janān_jana bandhu--_bandhu janān_jana dṛṣṭvā_dṛś madīyāni_madīya gātrāṇi_gātra kara--_kara caraṇa--_caraṇa ādīni_ādi sīdanti_sad viśīryante_viśṛ kim_ka ca_ca vepahtuḥ_vepahtṛ ca_ca ityādi_ityādi vepathuḥ_vepathu kampaḥ_kampa romaharṣaḥ_romaharṣa romāñcaḥ_romāñca sraṃsate_sraṃs nipatati_nipat paridahyate_paridah sarvatas_sarvatas santapyate_saṃtap

Baladeva_Baladeva kaunteyaḥ_kaunteya śoka--_śoka vyākulam_vyākula yat_yad āha_ah tat_tad anuvadati_anuvad dṛṣṭvā_dṛś imam_idam iti_iti sva--_sva janam_jana sva--_sva bandhu--_bandhu vargam_varga jātau_jāti eka--_eka vacanam_vacana sa_sa gotra--_gotra bāndhava--_bāndhava jñāti--_jñāti bandhu--_bandhu sva--_sva sva--_sva janāḥ_jana samāḥ_sama iti_iti amaraḥ_amara mama_mad gātrāṇi_gātra kara--_kara caraṇa--_caraṇa ādīni_ādi sīdanti_sad śīryante_śṛ pariśuṣyati_pariśuṣ iti_iti śrama--_śrama ādi--_ādi hetukāt_hetuka śoṣāt_śoṣa atiśayi--_atiśayin tvam_tva asya_idam śoṣasya_śoṣa vyajyate_vyañj vepathuḥ_vepathu kampaḥ_kampa romaharṣaḥ_romaharṣa pulakaḥ_pulaka gāṇḍīva--_gāṇḍīva bhraṃśena_bhraṃśa adhairyam_adhairya hṛd--_hṛd vidāhaḥ_vidāha darśitaḥ_darśay
BhG 1.30

lg.l: na_na ca_ca śaknomi_śak avasthātum_avasthā bhramati_bhram iva_iva ca_ca me_mad manaḥ_manas
nimittāni_nimitta ca_ca paśyāmi_paś viparītāni_viparīta keśava_keśava

div.p: śaknomi_śak paśyāmi_paś

tatas_tatas ca_ca yuddhe_yuddha vijayinaḥ_vijayin mama_mad rājya--_rājya lābhāt_lābha sukham_sukha na_na bhaviṣyati_bhū kintu_kiṃtu tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta anutāpa--_anutāpa duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva bhāvi_bhāvin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

bhramti_bhram nimittāni_nimitta phalāni_phala atra_atra yuddhe_yuddha viparītāni_viparīta paśyāmi_paś vijayinaḥ_vijayin me_mad rājya--_rājya prāptiḥ_prāpti ānandaḥ_ānanda na_na bhaviṣyati_bhū kintu_kiṃtu tad--_tad viparītaḥ_viparīta anutāpaḥ_anutāpa eva_eva bhāvi_bhāvin iti_iti nimitta--_nimitta śabdaḥ_śabda phala--_phala vācī_vācin kasmai_ka nimittāya_nimitta atra_atra vasasi_vas iti_iti ādau_ādi tathā_tathā pratīteḥ_pratīti
BhG 1.31

lg.l: na_na ca_ca śreyaḥ_śreyas anupaśyāmi_anupaś hatvā_han sva--_sva janam_jana āhave_āhava
na_na kāṅkṣe_kāṅkṣ vijayam_vijaya kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa na_na ca_ca rājyam_rājya sukhāni_sukha ca_ca

div.p: paśyāmi_dṛś paśyasi_dṛś āha_ah

Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha śreyaḥ_śreyas na_na paśyāmi_dṛś iti_iti dvau_dvi imau_idam puruṣau_puruṣa loke_loka sūrya--_sūrya maṇḍala--_maṇḍala bhedinau_bhedin parivrāj_parivrāj yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj ca_ca raṇe_raṇa ca_ca abhimukhe_abhimukha hataḥ_han iti_iti ādinā_ādi hatasya_han eva_eva śreyaḥ--_śreyas vidhānāt_vidhāna hantuḥ_hantṛ tu_tu na_na kim_ka ap_ap su_su kṛtam_kṛ dṛṣṭam_dṛś phalam_phala yaśaḥ_yaśas rājyam_rājya vartate_vṛt yuddhasya_yuddha iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah na_na kāṅkṣe_kāṅkṣ iti_iti

āha_ah āhave_āhava sva--_sva janam_jana hatvā_han śreyaḥ_śreyas nā_na eva_eva paśyāmi_paś iti_iti dvau_dvi imau_idam puruṣau_puruṣa loke_loka sūrya--_sūrya maṇḍala--_maṇḍala bhedinau_bhedin parivrāj_parivrāj yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj ca_ca raṇe_raṇa ca_ca abhimukhe_abhimukha hataḥ_han iti_iti ādinā_ādi hatasya_han śreyaḥ--_śreyas smaraṇāt_smaraṇa hantuḥ_hantṛ me_mad na_na kiñcid_kaścit śreyaḥ_śreyas asva--_asva janam_jana iti_iti vā_vā chedaḥ_cheda asva--_asva jana--_jana vadhe_vadha api_api śreyasaḥ_śreyas abhāvāt_abhāva sva--_sva jana--_jana vadhe_vadha punar_punar kutastarām_kutastarām tat_tad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu yaśaḥ--_yaśas rājya--_rājya lābhaḥ_lābha dṛṣṭam_dṛś phalam_phala asti_as iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na kāṅkṣe_kāṅkṣ iti_iti rājya--_rājya ādi--_ādi spṛhā--_spṛhā virahāt_viraha upāye_upāya vijaye_vijaya mama_mad pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti na_na yuktā_yukta randhane_randhana yathā_yathā bhojana--_bhojana ichā--_icchā virahiṇaḥ_virahin tasmāt_tasmāt araṇya--_araṇya nivasanam_nivasana eva_eva asmākam_mad ślāghya--_ślāgh jīvana--_jīvana tvam_tva bhāvi_bhāvin iti_iti

lg.l: kim_ka naḥ_mad rājyena_rājya govinda_govinda kim_ka bhogaiḥ_bhoga jīvitena_jīvita vā_vā
yeṣām_yad arthe_artha kāṅkṣitam_kāṅkṣ naḥ_mad rājyam_rājya bhogāḥ_bhoga sukhāni_sukha ca_ca
te_tad ime_idam avasthitāḥ_avasthā yuddhe_yuddha prāṇān_prāṇa tyaktvā_tyaj dhanāni_dhana ca_ca
ācāryāḥ_ācārya pitaraḥ_pitṛ putrāḥ_putra tathā_tathā eva_eva ca_ca pitāmahāḥ_pitāmaha
mātulāḥ_mātula śvaśurāḥ_śvaśura pautrāḥ_pautra śyālāḥ_śyāla saṃbandhinaḥ_sambandhin tathā_tathā
etān_etad na_na hantum_han icchāmi_iṣ ghnataḥ_han api_api madhusūdana_madhusūdana

div.p:
api_api trailokya--_trailokya rājyasya_rājya hetoḥ_hetu kim_ka nu_nu mahī--_mahī kṛte_kṛte
nihatya_nihan dhārtarāṣṭrān_dhārtarāṣṭra naḥ_mad kā_ka prītiḥ_prīti syāt_as janārdana_janārdana

naḥ_mad te_tad ime_idam iti_iti yad--_yad artham_artha asmākam_mad rājya--_rājya ādikam_ādika apekṣitam_apekṣ te_tad ete_etad prāṇa--_prāṇa dhanāni_dhana tyaktvā_tyaj tyāgam_tyāga aṅgīkṛtya_aṅgīkṛ yuddha--_yuddha artham_artha avasthitāḥ_avasthā atas_atas kim_ka asmākam_mad rājya--_rājya ādibhiḥ_ādi kṛtyam_kṛtya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu yadi_yadi kṛpayā_kṛpā tvam_tvad etān_etad na_na haṃsi_han tarhi_tarhi tvām_tvad ete_etad rājya--_rājya lobhena_lobha haniṣyanti_han eva_eva atas_atas tvam_tvad eva_eva etān_etad hatvā_han rājyam_rājya bhuṅkṣva_bhuj iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah etān_etad iti_iti ādi_ādi sārdhena_sārdha ghnataḥ_han api_api asmān_mad mārayataḥ_māray api_api etān_etad api_api iti_iti trailokya--_trailokya rājyasya_rājya api_api hetoḥ_hetu tad--_tad prāpti--_prāpti artham_artha api_api hantum_han na_na icchāmi_iṣ kim_ka punar_punar mahīmātra--_mahīmātra prāptaye_prāpti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

Baladeva_Baladeva govinda_govinda iti_iti gāḥ_go sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vṛttīḥ_vṛtti vindasi_vid iti_iti tvam_tvad eva_eva me_mad manogatam_manogata pratīhi_pratī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha rājya--_rājya ādi--_ādi an_an ākāṅkṣāyām_ākāṅkṣā hetum_hetu āha_ah yeṣām_yad iti_iti prāṇān_prāṇa prāṇa--_prāṇa āśām_āśā dhanāni_dhana dhana--_dhana āśām_āśā iti_iti laksaṇayā_laksaṇā bodhyam_budh sva--_sva prāṇa--_prāṇa vyaye_vyaya api_api sva--_sva bandhu--_bandhu sukha--_sukha arthā_artha rājya--_rājya spṛhā_spṛhā syāt_as teṣām_tad api_api atra_atra nāśa--_nāśa prāpteḥ_prāpti apārthā_apārtha eva_eva yuddhe_yuddha pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu tvam_tvad ced_ced kāruṇikaḥ_kāruṇika etān_etad na_na hanyāḥ_han tarhi_tarhi te_tvad sva--_sva rājyam_rājya niṣkaṇṭakam_niṣkaṇṭaka kartum_kṛ tvām_tvad eva_eva hanyuḥ_han iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āh_ah etān_etad iti_iti mām_mad ghnataḥ_han api_api hiṃsataḥ_hiṃs api_api etān_etad hantum_han aham_mad na_na icchāmi_iṣ trailokya--_trailokya rājyasya_rājya prāptaye_prāpti api_api kim_kim punar_punar bhū--_bhū mātrasya_mātra

nanu_nanu anvayān_anvaya hitvā_hā dhṛtarāṣṭra--_dhṛtarāṣṭra putrāḥ_putra eva_eva hantavyāḥ_han bahu--_bahu duḥkha--_duḥkha dātṝṇām_dātṛ teṣām_tad ghāte_ghāta sukha--_sukha sambhavāt_sambhava iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah nihatya_nihan iti_iti dhārtarāṣṭrān_dhārtarāṣṭra duryodhana--_duryodhana ādīn_ādi nihatya_nihan sthitānām_sthā naḥ_mad pāṇḍāvānām_pāṇḍāva kā_ka prītiḥ_prīti prasanna--_prasad tā_tā syāt_as na_na kā_ka api_api iti_iti acira--_acira sukha--_sukha ābhāsa--_ābhāsa spṛhayā_spṛhā ciratara--_ciratara naraka--_naraka hetu--_hetu bhrāṛhaḥ_bhrāṛha na_na yogyaḥ_yogya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva he_he janārdana_janārdana iti_iti yadi_yadi ete_etad hantavyāḥ_han tarhi_tarhi bhū--_bhū bhāra--_bhāra apahārī_apahārin tvam_tvad eva_eva tān_tad hahi_hahi pareśasya_pareśa te_tvad pāpa--_pāpa gandha--_gandha sambandhaḥ_sambandha na_na bhavet_bhū iti_iti vyajyate_vyañj
BhG 1.36

tatra_tatra āha_ah pāpam_pāpa eva_eva iti_iti ādi--_ādi sārdhena_sārdha ātatāyinam_ātatāyin āyāntam_āyā iti_iti ādikam_ādika artha--_artha śāstram_śāstra tat_tad dharma--_dharma śāstrāt_śāstra durbalam_durbala yathā_yathā uktam_vac yājñavalkyena_yājñavalkya smṛtyoḥ_smṛti virodhe_virodha nyāyaḥ_nyāya tu_tu balavān_balavat vyavahārataḥ_vyavahāra artha--_artha śāstrāt_śāstra tu_tu balavān_balavat dharma--_dharma śāstram_śāstra iti_iti sthitiḥ_sthiti iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt ātatāyinām_ātatāyin api_api eteṣām_etad ācārya--_ācārya ādīnām_ādi vadhe_vadha asmākam_mad pāpam_pāpa eva_eva bhavet_bhū anyāyya--_anyāyya tvāt_tva adharma--_adharma tvāt_tva ca_ca etat_etad vadhasya_vadha amutra_amutra ca_ca iha_iha vā_vā na_na sukham_sukha syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah sva--_sva janam_jana iti_iti

kṣetra--_kṣetra dāra--_dāra apahārī_apahārin ca_ca ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ ete_etad hi_hi ātatāyinaḥ_ātatāyin iti_iti ātatāyinam_ātatāyin āyāntam_āyā hanyāt_han eva_eva a_a vicārayan_vicāray na_na ātatāyi--_ātatāyin vadhe_vadha doṣaḥ_doṣa hantuḥ_hantṛ bhavati_bhū kaścana_kaścana iti_iti ādi--_ādi vacanāt_vacana eṣām_idam vadhaḥ_vadha ucitaḥ_ucita eva_eva iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah pāpam_pāpa iti_iti etān_etad hatvā_han sthitān_sthā asmān_mad ātatāyinam_ātatāyin āyāntam_āyā iti_iti ādikam_ādika artha--_artha śāstram_śāstra dharma--_dharma śāstrāt_śāstra durbalam_durbala yat_yad uktam_vac yājñavalkyena_yājñavalkya artha--_artha śāstrāt_śāstra tu_tu balavat_balavat dharma--_dharma śāstram_śāstra iti_iti smṛtam_smṛ iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt ācārya--_ācārya ādīnām_ādi vadhe_vadha pāpam_pāpa syāt_as eva_eva na_na ca_ca aihikam_aihika sukham_sukha api_api syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah sva--_sva janam_jana iti_iti

nanu_nanu agnidaḥ_agnida garadaḥ_garada ca_ca eva_eva śastra--_śastra pāṇiḥ_pāṇi dhana--_dhana apahaḥ_apaha kṣetra--_kṣetra dāra--_dāra apahārī_apahārin ca_ca ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ ete_etad hi_hi ātatāyinaḥ_ātatāyin ātatāyinam_ātatāyin āyāntam_āyā hanyāt_han eva_eva a_a vicārayan_vicāray na_na ātatāyi--_ātatāyin vadhe_vadha doṣaḥ_doṣa hantuḥ_hantṛ bhavati_bhū kaścana_kaścana iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti eṣām_idam ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ vidhyena_vidhya ātatāyinām_ātatāyin yuktaḥ_yuj vadhaḥ_vadha iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah pāpam_pāpa iti_iti etān_etad hatvā_han sthitān_sthā asmān_mad pāpam_pāpa eva_eva bandhu--_bandhu kṣaya--_kṣaya hetukam_hetuka āśrayet_āśri ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva ātatāyinam_ātatāyin āyāntam_āyā iti_iti ādikam_ādika artha--_artha śāstram_śāstra mā_mā hiṃsyāt_hiṃs sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti dharma--_dharma śāstrāt_śāstra durbalam_durbala artha--_artha śāstrāt_śāstra tu_tu balavat_balavat dharma--_dharma śāstram_śāstra iti_iti sthitiḥ_sthiti iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti tasmāt_tasmāt durbala--_durbala artha--_artha śāstra--_śāstra balena_bala pūjyānām_pūjay droṇa--_droṇa bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādīnām_ādi vadhaḥ_vadha pāpa--_pāpa hetuḥ_hetu eva_eva iti_iti na_na ca_ca śreyaḥ_śreyas anupaśyāmi_anupaś iti_iti ārabhya_ārabh uktam_vac upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti pāpa--_pāpa sambhavāt_sambhava daihika--_daihika sukhasya_sukha api_api abhāvāt_abhāva ca_ca iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na hi_hi gurubhiḥ_guru bandhu--_bandhu janaiḥ_jana ca_ca vinā_vinā asmākam_mad rājya--_rājya bhogaḥ_bhoga sukhāya_sukha api_api tu_tu anutāpāya_anutāpa eva_eva sampatsyate_sampad he_he mādhava_mādhava iti_iti śrīpatiḥ_śrīpati tvam_tvad aśrīke_aśrīka yuddhe_yuddha katham_katham bhāvaḥ_bhāva

div.p: pratibodhya_pratibodhay hariḥ_hari cakre_kṛ sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa tatas_tatas kim_ka vṛttam_vṛt iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā sañjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac tam_tad tathā_tathā iti_iti ādi_ādi aśrubhiḥ_aśru pūrṇe_pṛ ākule_ākula īkṣaṇe_īkṣaṇa yasya_yad tam_tad tathā_tathā ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra arjunam_arjuna prati_prati madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idam_idam vākyam_vākya uvāca_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā paramaḥ_parama dharmaḥ_dharma bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aśanam_aśana ca_ca iti_iti evaṃ-lakṣaṇayā_evaṃlakṣaṇa buddhyā_buddhi yuddha--_yuddha vaimukhyam_vaimukhya arjunasya_arjuna śrutvā_śru sva--_sva putrāṇām_putra rājyam_rājya apracalitam_apracalita avadhārya_avadhāray svastha--_svastha hṛdayasya_hṛdaya dhṛtarāṣṭrasya_dhṛtarāṣṭra ākāṅkṣām_ākāṅkṣā apaninīṣuḥ_apaninīṣu saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya tam_tad pratyuktavān_prativac iti_iti āha_ah vaiśampāyanaḥ_vaiśampāyana

kṛpā_kṛpā mama_mad ete_etad iti_iti vyāmoha--_vyāmoha nimittaḥ_nimitta sneha--_sneha viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa tayā_tad āviṣṭam_āviś svabhāva--_svabhāva siddhyā_siddhi vyāptam_vyāp arjunasya_arjuna karma--_karman tvam_tva kṛpāyāḥ_kṛpā ca_ca kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva vadatā_vad tasyāḥ_tad āgantuka--_āgantuka tvam_tva vyudastam_vyudas ataeva_ataeva viṣīdantam_viṣad sneha--_sneha viṣayībhūta--_viṣayībhū sva--_sva jana--_jana viccheda--_viccheda āśaṅkā--_āśaṅkā nimittaḥ_nimitta śoka--_śoka apara--_apara paryāyaḥ_paryāya citta--_citta vyākulībhāvaḥ_vyākulībhāva viṣādaḥ_viṣāda tam_tad prāpnuvantam_prāp atra_atra viṣādasya_viṣāda karma--_karman tvena_tva arjunasya_arjuna kartṛ--_kartṛ tvena_tva ca_ca tasya_tad āgantuka--_āgantuka tvam_tva sūcitam_sūcay

ataeva_ataeva kṛpā--_kṛpā viṣāda--_viṣāda vaśāt_vaśa aśrubhiḥ_aśru pūrṇe_pṛ ākule_ākula darśana--_darśana akṣame_akṣama ca_ca īkṣaṇe_īkṣaṇa yasya_yad tam_tad evam_evam aśru--_aśru pāta--_pāta vyākulībhāva--_vyākulībhāva ākhya--_ākhya kārya--_kārya dvaya--_dvaya janaka--_janaka tayā_tā paripoṣam_paripoṣa gatābhyām_gam kṛpā--_kṛpā viṣādābhyām_viṣāda udvignam_udvij tam_tad arjunam_arjuna idam_idam sa_sa upapattikam_upapattika vakṣyamāṇam_vac vākyam_vākya uvāca_vac na_na tu_tu upekṣitavān_upekṣ madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana iti_iti svayam_svayam duṣṭa--_duṣ nigraha--_nigraha kartā_kartṛ arjunam_arjuna prati_prati api_api tathā_tathā eva_eva vakṣyati_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

lg.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha
ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman vivekena_viveka śoka--_śoka moha--_moha tamaḥ_tamas nudan_nud
dvitīye_dvitīya kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa candraḥ_candra atra_atra proce_pravac muktasya_muc lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa
baladevaḥ_baladeva
dvitīye_dvitīya jīva--_jīva yāthātmya--_yāthātmya jñānam_jñāna tad--_tad sādhanam_sādhana hariḥ_hari
niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma_karman ca_ca proce_pravac sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa

div.p: evam_evam arjuna--_arjuna vairāgyam_vairāgya upaśrutya_upaśru sva--_sva putra--_putra rājya--_rājya abhraṃśa--_abhraṃśa āśayā_āśā hṛṣyantam_hṛṣ dhṛtarāṣṭram_dhṛtarāṣṭra ālakṣya_ālakṣay sañjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac tam_tad tathā_tathā iti_iti madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana iti_iti tasya_tad śokam_śoka api_api madhu--_madhu vat_vat nihaniṣyati_nihan iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 2.2

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
kutas_kutas tvā_tvad kaśmalam_kaśmala idam_idam viṣame_viṣama samupasthitam_samupasthā
an_an ārya--_ārya juṣṭam_juṣ asvargyam_asvargya akīrti--_akīrti karam_kara arjuna_arjuna

div.p: āha_ah uvāca_vac prāptaḥ_prāp
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad eva_eva bhagavataḥ_bhagavant vākyam_vākya avatārayati_avatāray kutas_kutas tvā_tvad iti_iti

lg.l: aiśvaryasya_aiśvarya samagrasya_samagra dharmasya_dharma yaśasaḥ_yaśas śriyaḥ_śrī
vairāgyasya_vairāgya atha_atha mokṣasya_mokṣa ṣaṇṇām_ṣaṣ bhagaḥ_bhaga iti_iti iṅganā_iṅganā

div.p: samagasya_samaga iti_iti pratyekam_pratyekam sambandhaḥ_sambandha mokṣasya_mokṣa iti_iti tad--_tad sādhanasya_sādhana jñānasya_jñāna iṅganā_iṅganā saṃjñā_saṃjñā etādṛśam_etādṛśa samagram_samagra aiśvarya--_aiśvarya ādikam_ādika nityam_nityam apratibandhena_apratibandha yatra_yatra vartate_vṛt sa_tad bhagavān_bhagavant nitya--_nitya yoge_yoga matup_matup tathā_tathā

lg.l: utpattim_utpatti ca_ca vināśam_vināśa ca_ca bhūtānām_bhūta āgatim_āgati gatim_gati
vetti_vid vidyām_vidyā avidyām_avidyā ca_ca sa_tad vācyaḥ_vac bhagavān_bhagavat iti_iti

div.p: atra_atra bhūtānām_bhūta iti_iti pratyekam_pratyekam sambadhyate_sambandh utpatti--_utpatti vināśa--_vināśa śabdau_śabda tad--_tad kāraṇasya_kāraṇa api_api upalakṣakau_upalakṣaka āgati--_āgati gatī_gati āgaminyau_āgamin sampad--_sampad āpadau_āpad etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa bhagavat--_bhagavant śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha śrī--_śrī vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva eva_eva paryavasitaḥ_paryavasā

idam_idam svadharmāt_svadharma parāṅmukha--_parāṅmukha tvam_tva kṛpā--_kṛpā vyāmoha--_vyāmoha aśru--_aśru pāta--_pāta ādi--_ādi puraḥsaram_puraḥsara kaśmalam_kaśmala śiṣṭa--_śās garhita--_garh tvena_tva malinam_malina viṣame_viṣama sa_sa bhaye_bhaya sthāne_sthāna tvā_tvad tvām_tvad sarva--_sarva kṣatriya--_kṣatriya pravaram_pravara kutas_kutas hetoḥ_hetu samupasthitam_samupasthā svarga--_svarga icchātaḥ_icchā iti_iti kim_ka śabdena_śabda ākṣipyate_ākṣip hetu--_hetu trayam_traya api_api niṣedhati_niṣidh tribhiḥ_tri viśesaṇaiḥ_viśesaṇa uttara--_uttara ardhena_ardha āryaiḥ_ārya mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu na_na juṣṭam_juṣ a_a sevitam_sev sva--_sva dharmaiḥ_dharma āśaya--_āśaya śuddhi--_śuddhi dvārā_dvār moks_moks icchadbhiḥ_iṣ apakva--_apakva kaṣāyaiḥ_kaṣāya mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu katham_katham sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma tyājyaḥ_tyaj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa adhikārī_adhikārin tu_tu pakva--_pakva kaṣāyaḥ_kaṣāya agre_agra vakṣyate_vac asvargyam_asvargya svarga--_svarga hetu--_hetu dharma--_dharma virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva na_na svarga--_svarga icchayā_icchā sevyam_sev akīrti--_akīrti karam_kara kīrti--_kīrti abhāva--_abhāva karam_kara apakīrti--_apakīrti karam_kara vā_vā na_na kīrti--_kīrti icchayā_icchā sevyam_sev tathā_tathā ca_ca mokṣa--_mokṣa kāmaiḥ_kāma svarga--_svarga kāmaiḥ_kāma kīrti--_kīrti kāmaiḥ_kāma ca_ca varjanīyam_varjay tat_tad kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva tvam_tvad sevasva_sev iti_iti aho_aho anucitam_anucita ceṣṭitam_ceṣṭita tava_tvad iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

viṣame_viṣama atra_atra saṅgrāma--_saṃgrāma saṅkaṭe_saṃkaṭa kutas_kutas hetoḥ_hetu upasthitam_upasthā tvām_tvad prāptam_prāp abhūt_bhū an_an ārya--_ārya juṣṭam_juṣ supratiṣṭhita--_supratiṣṭhita lokaiḥ_loka a_a sevitam_sev asvargyam_asvargya akīrti--_akīrti karam_kara iti_iti pāratrika--_pāratrika aihika--_aihika sukha--_sukha pratikūlam_pratikūla iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad vākyam_vākya anuvadati_anuvad śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant

lg.l: aiśvaryasya_aiśvarya samagrasya_samagra dharmasya_dharma yaśasaḥ_yaśas śriyaḥ_śrī
vairāgyasya_vairāgya atha_atha mokṣasya_mokṣa ṣaṇṇām_ṣaṣ bhagaḥ_bhaga iti_iti iṅganā_iṅganā

div.p: iti_iti parāśara--_parāśara ukta--_vac aiśvarya--_aiśvarya ādibhiḥ_ādi ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ nityam_nityam viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ samagrasya_samagra iti_iti etat_etad ṣaṭsu_ṣaṣ yojyam_yuj he_he arjuna_arjuna idam_idam sva--_sva dharma--_dharma vaimukhyam_vaimukhya kaśmalam_kaśmala śiṣṭa--_śās nindya--_nind tvāt_tva malinam_malina kutas_kutas hetoḥ_hetu tvām_tvad kṣatriya--_kṣatriya cūḍāmaṇim_cūḍāmaṇi samupasthitam_samupasthā abhūt_bhū viṣame_viṣama yuddha--_yuddha samaye_samaya na_na ca_ca mokṣāya_mokṣa svargāya_svarga kīrtaye_kīrti vā_vā etat_etad yuddha--_yuddha vairāgyam_vairāgya iti_iti āha_ah anārya--_anārya iti_iti āryaiḥ_ārya mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu na_na juṣṭam_juṣ sevitam_sev āryāḥ_ārya khalu_khalu hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhaye_viśuddhi svadharmān_svadharma ācaranti_ācar akīrti--_akīrti karam_kara kīrti--_kīrti viplāvakam_viplāvaka
BhG 2.3

lg.l: klaibyam_klaibya mā_mā sma_sma gamaḥ_gam pārtha_pārtha na_na etat_etad tvayi_tvad upapadyate_upapad
kṣudram_kṣudra hṛdaya--_hṛdaya daurbalyam_daurbalya tyaktvā_tyaj uttiṣṭha_utthā paraṃtapa_paraṃtapa

div.p: tasmāt_tasmāt he_he pārtha_pārtha klaibyam_klaibya kātaryam_kātarya mā_mā sma_sma gamaḥ_gam prāpnuhi_prāp yatas_yatas tvayi_tvad etat_etad na_na upapadyate_upapad yogyam_yogya na_na bhavati_bhū kṣudram_kṣudra tuccham_tuccha hṛdaya--_hṛdaya daurbalyam_daurbalya kātaryam_kātarya yuddhāya_yuddha uttiṣṭha_utthā he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa śatru--_śatru tāpana_tāpana

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu bandhu--_bandhu senā--_senā avekṣaṇa--_avekṣaṇa jātena_jan adhairyeṇa_adhairya dhanuḥ_dhanus api_api dhārayitum_dhāray aśaknuvatā_aśaknuvat mayā_mad kim_ka kartum_kṛ śakyam_śakya iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah klaibyam_klaibya iti_iti klaibyam_klaibya klīb--_klīb bhāvam_bhāva adhairyam_adhairya ojaḥ--_ojas tejaḥ--_tejas ādi--_ādi bhaṅga--_bhaṅga rūpam_rūpa mā_mā sma_sma gamaḥ_gam mā_mā gāḥ_gā he_he pārtha_pārtha pṛthā--_pṛthā tanaya_tanaya pṛthayā_pṛthā deva--_deva prasāda--_prasāda labdhe_labh tad--_tad tanaya--_tanaya mātre_mātra vīrya--_vīrya atiśayasya_atiśaya prasiddha--_prasidh tvāt_tva pṛthā--_pṛthā tanaya--_tanaya tvena_tva tvam_tvad klaibya--_klaibya ayogyaḥ_ayogya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha arjuna--_arjuna tvena_tva api_api tad--_tad ayogya--_ayogya tvam_tva āha_ah na_na etat_etad iti_iti tvayi_tvad arjune_arjuna sākṣāt_sākṣāt maheśvareṇa_maheśvara api_api saha_saha kṛta--_kṛ āhave_āhava prakhyāta--_prakhyā mahā--_mahat prabhāve_prabhāva nā_na upapadyate_upapad na_na yujyate_yuj etat_etad klaibyam_klaibya iti_iti asādhāraṇyena_asādhāraṇya tad--_tad ayogya--_ayogya tva--_tva nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa

nanu_nanu na_na ca_ca śaknomi_śak avasthātum_avasthā bhramati_bhram iva_iva ca_ca me_mad manaḥ_manas iti_iti pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva mayā_mad uktam_vac iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah kṣudram_kṣudra iti_iti hṛdaya--_hṛdaya daurbalyam_daurbalya manasaḥ_manas bhramaṇa--_bhramaṇa ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa adhairyam_adhairya kṣudra--_kṣudra tva--_tva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvāt_tva kṣudram_kṣudra sunirasanam_sunirasana vā_vā tyaktvā_tyaj vivekena_viveka apanīya_apanī uttiṣṭha_utthā yuddhāya_yuddha sajjaḥ_sajja bhava_bhū he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa param_para śatrum_śatru tāpayati_tāpay iti_iti tathā_tathā saṃbodhyate_sambodhay hetu--_hetu garbham_garbha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha klaibyam_klaibya klīb--_klīb dharmam_dharma kātaryam_kātarya he_he pārtha_pārtha iti_iti tvam_tvad pṛthā--_pṛthā putraḥ_putra san_as api_api gacchasi_gam tasmāt_tasmāt mā_mā sma_sma gamaḥ_gam mā_mā prāpnuhi_prāp anyasmin_anya kṣatra--_kṣatra bandhau_bandhu varam_vara idam_idam upapadyatām_upapad tvayi_tvad mad--_mad sakhau_sakhi tu_tu na_na

nanu_nanu idam_idam śaurya--_śaurya abhāva--_abhāva lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa klaibyam_klaibya mā_mā śaṅkiṣṭhāḥ_śaṅk kintu_kiṃtu bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādi--_ādi guruṣu_guru dharma--_dharma dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi vivekaḥ_viveka ayam_idam dhārtarāṣṭreṣu_dhārtarāṣṭra tu_tu durbaleṣu_durbala mad--_mad astra--_astra āghātam_āghāta āsādya_āsāday martum_mṛ udyateṣu_udyam dayā_dayā eva_eva iyam_idam iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah kṣudram_kṣudra iti_iti na_na ete_etad tava_tvad viveka--_viveka daye_dayā kintu_kintu śoka--_śoka mohau_moha eva_eva tau_tad ca_ca manasaḥ_manas daurbalya--_daurbalya vyañjakau_vyañjaka hṛdaya--_hṛdaya daurbalyam_daurbalya idam_idam tyaktvā_tyaj uttiṣṭha_utthā parantapa_paraṃtapa parān_para śatrūn_śatru tāpayan_tāpay yudhyasva_yudh

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu bandhu--_bandhu kṣaya--_kṣaya adhyavasāya--_adhyavasāya doṣāt_doṣa prakampitena_prakamp mayā_mad kim_ka bhāvyam_bhū iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah klaibyam_klaibya iti_iti he_he pārtha_pārtha devarāja--_devarāja prasādāt_prasāda pṛthāyām_pṛthā utpanna_utpad klaibyam_klaibya kātaryam_kātarya mā_mā sma_sma gamaḥ_gam prāpnuhi_prāp tvayi_tvad viśva--_viśva vijetari_vijetṛ mad--_mad sakhe_sakhi arjune_arjuna kṣatra--_kṣatra bandhau_bandhu iva_iva etat_etad īdṛśam_īdṛśa klaibyam_klaibya nā_na upayujyate_upayuj

nanu_nanu na_na me_mad śaurya--_śaurya abhāva--_abhāva rūpam_rūpa klaibyam_klaibya kintu_kiṃtu bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādiṣu_ādi pūjyeṣu_pūjay dharma--_dharma buddhyā_buddhi vivekaḥ_viveka ayam_idam duryodhana--_duryodhana ādiṣu_ādi bhrātṛṣu_bhrātṛ mad--_mad śastra--_śastra prahāreṇa_prahāra mariṣyatsu_mṛ kṛpeyam_kṛp iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah kṣudram_kṣudra iti_iti na_na ete_etad tava_tvad viveka--_viveka kṛpe_kṛpā kintu_kintu kṣudram_kṣudra laghiṣṭham_laghiṣṭha hṛdaya--_hṛdaya daurbalyam_daurbalya eva_eva tasmāt_tasmāt tat_tad tyaktvā_tyaj yuddhāya_yuddha uttiṣṭha_utthā sajjībhava_sajjībhū he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa śatru--_śatru tāpana_tāpana iti_iti śatru--_śatru hāsa--_hāsa pātra--_pātra tām_tā mā_mā gāḥ_gā
BhG 2.4

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
katham_katham bhīṣmam_bhīṣma aham_mad saṃkhye_saṃkhya droṇam_droṇa ca_ca madhusūdana_madhusūdana
iṣubhiḥ_iṣu pratiyotsyāmi_pratiyudh pūjā--_pūjā arhau_arha ari--_ari sūdana_sūdana

div.p: asmi_as āha_ah uvāca_vac bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇau_droṇa pūjā--_pūjā arhau_arha pūjāyām_pūjā arhaḥ_arha yogyau_yogya tau_tad prati_prati katham_katham aham_mad yotsyāmi_yudh tatra_tatra api_api iṣubhiḥ_iṣu yatra_yatra vācā_vāc api_api yotsyāmi_yudh iti_iti vaktum_vac anucitam_anucita tatra_tatra bāṇaiḥ_bāṇa katham_katham yotsyāmi_yudh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha he_he ari--_ari sūdana_sūdana śatru--_śatru mardana_mardana

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu na_na ayam_idam svadharmasya_svadharma tyāgaḥ_tyāga śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādi--_ādi vaśāt_vaśa kintu_kiṃtu dhara--_dhara tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva adharma--_adharma tvāt_tva ca_ca asya_idam yuddhasya_yuddha tyāgaḥ_tyāga mayā_mad kriyate_kṛ iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant abhiprāyam_abhiprāya apratipadyamānasya_apratipadyamāna arjunasya_arjuna bhīṣmam_bhīṣma pitāmaham_pitāmaha droṇām_droṇā ca_ca ācāryam_ācārya saṅkhye_saṃkhya raṇe_raṇa iṣubhiḥ_iṣu sāyakaiḥ_sāyaka pratiyotsyāmi_pratiyudh prahariṣyāmi_prahṛ katham_katham na_na kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid api_api iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yatas_yatas tau_tad pūjā--_pūjā arhau_arha kusuma--_kusuma ādibhiḥ_ādi arcana--_arcana yogyau_yogya pūjā--_pūjā arhābhyām_arha saha_saha krīḍā--_krīḍā sthāne_sthāna api_api vācā_vāc api_api harṣa--_harṣa phalam_phala api_api līlā--_līlā yuddham_yuddha anucitam_anucita kim_ka punar_punar yuddha--_yuddha bhūmau_bhūmi śaraiḥ_śara prāṇa--_prāṇa tyāga--_tyāga phalakam_phalaka praharaṇam_praharaṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdana--_madhusūdana ari--_ari sūdana_sūdana iti_iti sambodhana--_sambodhana dvayam_dvaya śoka--_śoka vyākula--_vyākula tvena_tva pūrva--_pūrva apara--_apara parāmarśa--_parāmarśa vaikalyāt_vaikalya atas_atas na_na madhusūdana--_madhusūdana ari--_ari sūdana_sūdana iti_iti asya_idam arthasya_artha punar_punar ukta--_vac tvam_tva doṣaḥ_doṣa yuddha--_yuddha mātram_mātra api_api yatra_yatra nā_na ucitam_ucita dūre_dūra tatra_tatra vadhaḥ_vadha iti_iti pratiyotsyāmi_pratiyudh iti_iti anena_idam sūcitam_sūcay

athavā_athavā pūjā--_pūjā arhau_arha katham_katham pratiyotsyāmi_pratiyudh pūjā--_pūjā arhayoḥ_arha eva_eva vivaraṇam_vivaraṇa bhīṣmam_bhīṣma droṇam_droṇa ca_ca iti_iti dvau_dvi brāhmaṇau_brāhmaṇa bhojaya_bhojay deva--_deva dattam_dā yajña--_yajña dattam_dā ca_ca itivat_itivat sambandhaḥ_sambandha ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva duryodhana--_duryodhana ādayaḥ_ādi na_na a_a puraskṛtya_puraskṛ bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇau_droṇa yuddhāya_yuddha sajjībhavanti_sajjībhū tatra_tatra tābhyām_tad saha_saha yuddham_yuddha na_na tāvat_tāvat dharmaḥ_dharma pūjā--_pūjā ādi--_ādi vat_vat a_a vihita--_vidhā tvāt_tva na_na ca_ca ayam_idam a_a niṣiddha--_niṣidh tvāt_tva adharmaḥ_adharma api_api na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti vācyam_vac gurum_guru huṅkṛtya_huṃkṛ tvaṃkṛtya_tvaṃkṛ iti_iti ādinā_ādi śabda--_śabda mātreṇa_mātra api_api guru--_guru drohaḥ_droha yadā_yadā aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa phalatva--_phalatva pradarśanena_pradarśana niṣiddhaḥ_niṣidh tadā_tadā kim_ka vācyam_vac tābhyām_tad saha_saha saṅgrāmasya_saṃgrāma adharma--_adharma tve_tva niṣiddha--_niṣidh tve_tva ca_ca iti_iti

pratibadhnāti_pratibandh atas_atas aham_mad yuddhāt_yuddha nivarte_nivṛt iti_iti āha_ah katham_katham iti_iti pratiyotsyāmi_pratiyudh pratiyotsye_pratiyudh nanu_nanu etau_etad yudhyete_yudh tarhi_tarhi anayoḥ_idam pratiyoddhā_pratiyoddhṛ bhavitum_bhū tvam_tvad kim_ka na_na śaknoṣi_śak satyam_satya na_na śaknomi_śak eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah pūjā--_pūjā arhau_arha iti_iti anayoḥ_idam caraṇeṣu_caraṇa bhaktyā_bhakti kusumāni_kusuma eva_eva dātum_dā arhāmi_arh na_na tu_tu krodhena_krodha tīkṣṇa--_tīkṣṇa śarān_śara iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva bho_bho vayasya_vayasya kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa tvam_tvad api_api śatrūn_śatru eva_eva yuddhe_yuddha haṃsi_han na_na tu_tu sandīpanim_saṃdīpani sva--_sva gurum_guru nā_na api_api bandhūn_bandhu yadūn_yadu iti_iti āha_ah he_he madhusūdana_madhusūdana iti_iti nanu_nanu mādhavaḥ_mādhava yadavaḥ_yadu eva_eva tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he ari--_ari sūdana_sūdana madhuḥ_madhu nāma_nāma daityaḥ_daitya yaḥ_yad tava_tvad ariḥ_ari iti_iti bravīmi_brū iti_iti
