baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādiṣu_ādi pratiyoddhṛṣu_pratiyoddhṛ satsu_as tvayā_tvad katham_katham na_na yoddhavyam_yudh āhūtaḥ_āhvā na_na nivarteta_nivṛt iti_iti yuddha--_yuddha vidhānāt_vidhāna ca_ca kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah katham_katham iti_iti bhīṣmam_bhīṣma pitāmaham_pitāmaha droṇam_droṇa ca_ca vidyā--_vidyā gurum_guru iṣubhiḥ_iṣu katham_katham yotsye_yudh yat_yat imau_idam pūjā--_pūjā arhau_arha puṣpa--_puṣpa ādibhiḥ_ādi abhyarcyau_abhyarc parihāsa--_parihāsa vāgbhiḥ_vāc api_api yābhyām_yad yuddham_yuddha na_na yuktam_yuj tābhyām_tad saha_saha iṣubhiḥ_iṣu tat_tad katham_katham yujyeta_yuj pratibadhnāti_pratibandh hi_hi śreyaḥ_śreyas pūjya--_pūjay pūjya--_pūjay pūjā--_pūjā vyatikramaḥ_vyatikrama iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca madhusūdana_madhusūdana ari--_ari sūdana_sūdana iti_iti sambodhana--_sambodhana punar_punar uktiḥ_ukti śoka--_śoka ākulasya_ākula pūrva--_pūrva uttara--_uttara anusandhi--_anusaṃdhi virahāt_viraha tad--_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva ca_ca tvam_tvad api_api śatrūn_śatru eva_eva yuddhe_yuddha nihaṃsi_nihan na_na tu_tu ugrasena--_ugrasena sāndīpani--_sāṃdīpanī ādīn_ādi
pūjyān_pūjay iti_iti
BhG 2.5

lg.l: gurūn_guru a_a hatvā_han hi_hi mahā--_mahat anubhāvān_anubhāva
śreyaḥ_śreyas bhoktum_bhuj bhaikṣyam_bhaikṣya api_api iha_iha loke_loka
hatvā_han artha--_artha kāmān_kāma tu_tu gurūn_guru iha_iha eva_eva
bhuñjīya_bhuj bhogān_bhoga rudhira--_rudhira pradigdhān_pradih

div.p: syāt_as āha_ah gurūn_guru droṇa--_droṇa ācārya--_ācārya ādīn_ādi a_a hatvā_han para--_para loka--_loka viruddham_virudh guru--_guru vadham_vadha a_a kṛtvā_kṛ iha_iha loke_loka bhaikṣyam_bhaikṣya bhikṣā--_bhikṣā annam_anna api_api bhoktum_bhuj śreyaḥ_śreyas ucitam_ucita vipakṣe_vipakṣa tu_tu na_na kevalam_kevala paratra_paratra duḥkham_duḥkha kintu_kiṃtu iha_iha eva_eva ca_ca naraka--_naraka duḥkham_duḥkha anubhaveyam_anubhū iti_iti āha_ah hatvā_han iti_iti gurūn_guru hatvā_han iha_iha eva_eva tu_tu rudhireṇa_rudhira pradigdhān_pradih prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa liptān_lip artha--_artha kāma--_kāma ātmakān_ātmaka bhogān_bhoga aham_mad bhuñjīya_bhuj aśnīyām_aś yat_yat vā_vā artha--_artha kāmān_kāma iti_iti gurūṇām_guru viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa artha--_artha tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā ākula--_ākula tvāt_tva ete_etad tāvat_tāvat yuddhāt_yuddha na_na nivarteran_nivṛt tasmāt_tasmāt etat_etad vadhaḥ_vadha prasajyeta_prasañj eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca yudhiṣṭhiram_yudhiṣṭhira prati_prati bhīṣmeṇa_bhīṣma uktam_vac
arthasya_artha puruṣaḥ_puruṣa dāsaḥ_dāsa dāsaḥ_dāsa tu_tu arthaḥ_artha na_na kasyacid_kaścit iti_iti satyam_satya mahā--_mahat rāja_rāja baddhaḥ_bandh asmi_as arthena_artha kauravaiḥ_kaurava iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇayoḥ_droṇa pūjā--_pūjā arha--_arha tvam_tva guru--_guru tvena_tva eva_eva evam_evam anyeṣām_anya api_api kṛpa--_kṛpa ādīnām_ādi na_na ca_ca teṣām_tad guru--_guru tvena_tva svīkāraḥ_svīkāra sāmpratam_sāṃpratam ucitaḥ_ucita

lg.l: guroḥ_guru api_api avaliptasya_avalipta kārya--_kārya akāryam_akārya a_a jānataḥ_jñā
utpatha--_utpatha pratipannasya_pratipad parityāgaḥ_parityāga vidhīyate_vidhā

div.p: iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti tasmāt_tasmāt eṣām_idam yuddha--_yuddha garveṇa_garva avaliptānām_avalip anyāya--_anyāya rājya--_rājya grahaṇena_grahaṇa śiṣya--_śiṣya droheṇa_droha ca_ca kārya--_kārya akārya--_akārya viveka--_viveka śūnyānām_śūnya utpatha--_utpatha niṣṭhānām_niṣṭha vadhaḥ_vadha eva_eva śreyān_śreyas iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah gurūn_guru iti_iti

gurūn_guru a_a hatvā_han para--_para lokaḥ_loka tāvat_tāvat asti_as eva_eva asmin_idam tu_tu loke_loka taiḥ_tad hṛta--_hṛ rājyānām_rājya naḥ_mad nṛpa--_nṛpa ādīnām_ādi niṣiddham_niṣidh bhaikṣam_bhaikṣa api_api bhoktum_bhuj śreyaḥ_śreyas praśasyataram_praśasyatara ucitam_ucita na_na tu_tu tad--_tad vadhena_vadha rājyam_rājya api_api śreyaḥ_śreyas iti_iti dharme_dharma api_api yuddhe_yuddha vṛtti--_vṛtti mātra--_mātra phalatvam_phalatva

nanu_nanu avalipta--_avalipta tva--_tva ādinā_ādi teṣām_tad guru--_guru tva--_tva abhāvaḥ_abhāva uktaḥ_vac iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah mahā--_mahat anubhāvān_anubhāva iti_iti mahā--_mahat anubhāvaḥ_anubhāva śruta--_śruta adhyayana--_adhyayana tapaḥ--_tapas ācāra--_ācāra ādi--_ādi nibandhanaḥ_nibandhana prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva yeṣām_yad tān_tad tathā_tathā ca_ca kāla--_kāla kāma--_kāma ādayaḥ_ādi api_api yaiḥ_yad vaśīkṛtāḥ_vaśīkṛ teṣām_tad puṇya--_puṇya atiśaya--_atiśaya śālinām_śālin na_na avalipta--_avalip tva--_tva ādi--_ādi kṣudra--_kṣudra pāpma--_pāpman saṃśleṣaḥ_saṃśleṣa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha hi_hi mahā--_mahat anubhāvān_anubhāva iti_iti ekam_eka vā_vā padam_pada himam_hima jāḍyam_jāḍya apahanti_apahan iti_iti hima--_hima hā_han ādityaḥ_āditya agniḥ_agni vā_vā tasya_tad eva_eva anubhāvaḥ_anubhāva sāmarthyam_sāmarthya yeṣām_yad tān_tad tathā_tathā ca_ca ati_ati tejasvi--_tejasvin tvāt_tva teṣām_tad avalipta--_avalipta tva--_tva ādi--_ādi doṣaḥ_doṣa na_na asti_as eva_eva

lg.l: dharma--_dharma vyatikramaḥ_vyatikrama dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś īśvarāṇām_īśvara ca_ca sāhasam_sāhasa
tejīyasām_tejīyas na_na doṣāya_doṣa vahneḥ_vahni sarva--_sarva bhujaḥ_bhuj yathā_yathā

div.p: nanu_nanu yadā_yadā artha--_artha lubdhāḥ_lubh santaḥ_as yuddhe_yuddha pravṛttāḥ_pravṛt tadā_tadā eṣām_idam vikrīta--_vikrī ātmanām_ātman kutastyam_kutastya pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac māhātmyam_māhātmya tathā_tathā ca_ca uktam_vac bhīṣmeṇa_bhīṣma yudhiṣṭhiram_yudhiṣṭhira prati_prati

lg.l: arthasya_artha puruṣaḥ_puruṣa dāsaḥ_dāsa dāsaḥ_dāsa tu_tu arthaḥ_artha na_na kasyacid_kaścit
iti_iti satyam_satya mahā--_mahat rāja_rāja baddhaḥ_bandh asmi_as arthena_artha kauravaiḥ_kaurava

div.p: iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah hatvā_han iti_iti artha--_artha lubdhāḥ_lubh api_api te_tad mad--_mad apekṣayā_apekṣā guravaḥ_guru bhavanti_bhū eva_eva iti_iti punar_punar guru--_guru grahaṇena_grahaṇa uktam_vac tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda api_api arthe_artha īdṛśān_īdṛśa api_api gurūn_guru hatvā_han bhogān_bhoga eva_eva bhuñjīya_bhuj na_na tu_tu mokṣam_mokṣa labheya_labh bhujyante_bhuj iti_iti bhogāḥ_bhoga viṣayāḥ_viṣaya karmaṇi_karman ghañ_ghañ te_tad ca_ca bhogāḥ_bhoga iha_iha eva_eva na_na para--_para loke_loka iha_iha api_api ca_ca rudhira--_rudhira pradigdhāḥ_pradih iva_iva apayaśaḥ--_apayaśas vyāpta--_vyāp tvena_tva atyanta--_atyanta jugupsitāḥ_jugups iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yadā_yadā iha_iha api_api evam_evam tadā_tadā para--_para loka--_loka duḥkham_duḥkha kiyat_kiyat varṇanīyam_varṇay iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
div.l: athavā_athavā gurūn_guru hatvā_han artha--_artha kāma--_kāma ātmakān_ātmaka bhogān_bhoga eva_eva bhuñjīya_bhuj na_na tu_tu dharma--_dharma mokṣau_mokṣa iti_iti artha--_artha kāma--_kāma padasya_pada bhoga--_bhoga viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa tayā_tā vyākhyāna--_vyākhyāna antaram_antara draṣṭavyam_dṛś
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nanu_nanu evam_evam te_tvad yadi_yadi sva--_sva rājye_rājya asmin_idam na_na asti_as jighṛkṣā_jighṛkṣā tarhi_tarhi kayā_ka vṛttyā_vṛtti jīviṣyasi_jīv iti_iti atra_atra āha_ah gurūn_guru a_a hatvā_han iti_iti guru--_guru vadham_vadha a_a kṛtvā_kṛ bhaikṣyam_bhaikṣya kṣatriyaiḥ_kṣatriya vigītam_vigā api_api bhikṣā--_bhikṣā annam_anna api_api bhoktum_bhuj śreyaḥ_śreyas aihika--_aihika duryaśaḥ--_duryaśas lābhe_lābha api_api pāratrikam_pāratrika amaṅgalam_amaṅgala tu_tu nā_na eva_eva syāt_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na ca_ca eva_eva guravaḥ_guru avaliptāḥ_avalip kārya--_kārya akāryam_akārya a_a jānantaḥ_jñā ca_ca adhārmika--_adhārmika duryodhana--_duryodhana ādi--_ādi anugatāḥ_anugam tyājyāḥ_tyaj eva_eva yat_yad uktam_vac

guroḥ_guru api_api avaliptasya_avalipta kārya--_kārya akāryam_akārya a_a jānataḥ_jñā
utpatha--_utpatha pratipannasya_pratipad parityāgaḥ_parityāga vidhīyate_vidhā iti_iti vācyam_vac

iti_iti āha_ah mahā--_mahat anubhāvān_anubhāva iti_iti kāla--_kāla kāma--_kāma ādayaḥ_ādi api_api yaiḥ_yad vaśīkṛtāḥ_vaśīkṛ teṣām_tad bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādīnām_ādi kutas_kutas tad--_tad doṣa--_doṣa sambhavaḥ_sambhava iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva nanu_nanu

lg.l: arthasya_artha puruṣaḥ_puruṣa dāsaḥ_dāsa dāsaḥ_dāsa tu_tu arthaḥ_artha na_na kasyacid_kaścit
iti_iti satyam_satya mahā--_mahat rāja_rāja baddhaḥ_bandh asmi_as arthena_artha kauravaiḥ_kaurava

div.p: iti_iti yudhiṣṭhiram_yudhiṣṭhira prati_prati bhīṣmeṇa_bhīṣma eva_eva uktam_vac atas_atas sāmpratam_sāṃpratam artha--_artha kāma--_kāma tvāt_tva eteṣām_etad mahā--_mahat anubhāva--_anubhāva tvam_tva prāktanam_prāktana vigalitam_vigal satyam_satya tat_tad api_api etān_etad hatavataḥ_han mama_mad duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah artha--_artha kāma--_kāma hatvā_han aham_mad bhogān_bhoga bhuñjīya_bhuj kintu_kiṃtu eteṣām_etad rudhireṇa_rudhira pradigdhān_pradih praliptān_pralip eva_eva ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha eteṣām_etad artha--_artha lubdha--_lubh tve_tva api_api mad--_mad guru--_guru tvam_tva asti_as eva_eva ataeva_ataeva etad--_etad vadhe_vadha sati_as guru--_guru drohiṇaḥ_drohin mama_mad khalu_khalu bhogaḥ_bhoga duṣkṛti--_duṣkṛti miśraḥ_miśra syāt_as iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu sva--_sva rājye_rājya spṛhā_spṛhā ced_ced tava_tvad na_na asti_as tarhi_tarhi deha--_deha yātrā_yātrā vā_vā katham_katham setsyati_sidh iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah gurūn_guru iti_iti gurūn_guru a_a hatvā_han guru--_guru vadham_vadha a_a kṛtvā_kṛ sthitasya_sthā me_mad bhaikṣya--_bhaikṣya annam_anna kṣatriyāṇām_kṣatriya nindyam_nind api_api bhoktum_bhuj śreyaḥ_śreyas praśastataram_praśastatara aihika--_aihika duryaśaḥ--_duryaśas hetu--_hetu tve_tva api_api para--_para loka--_loka avighāti--_avighātin tvāt_tva

nanu_nanu ete_etad bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi guravaḥ_guru api_api yuddha--_yuddha garva--_garva avalepāt_avalepa chadmanā_chadman yuṣmad--_tvad rājya--_rājya apahāram_apahāra yuṣmad--_tvad droham_droha ca_ca kurvatām_kṛ duryodhana--_duryodhana ādīnām_ādi saṃsargeṇa_saṃsarga kārya--_kārya akārya--_akārya viveka--_viveka virahāt_viraha ca_ca samprati_samprati tyājyāḥ_tyaj eva_eva

guroḥ_guru api_api avaliptasya_avalipta kārya--_kārya akāryam_akārya a_a jānataḥ_jñā
utpatha--_utpatha pratipannasya_pratipad parityāgaḥ_parityāga vidhīyate_vidhā iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti

iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah mahā--_mahat anubhāvān_anubhāva iti_iti mahān_mahat sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa anubhāvaḥ_anubhāva veda--_veda adhyayana--_adhyayana brahmacarya--_brahmacarya ādi--_ādi hetukaḥ_hetuka prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva yeṣām_yad tān_tad kāla--_kāla kāma--_kāma ādayaḥ_ādi api_api yad--_yad vaśyāḥ_vaśya teṣām_tad tad--_tad doṣa--_doṣa sambandhaḥ_sambandha

lg.l: arthasya_artha puruṣaḥ_puruṣa dāsaḥ_dāsa dāsaḥ_dāsa tu_tu arthaḥ_artha na_na kasyacid_kaścit
iti_iti satyam_satya mahā--_mahat rāja_rāja baddhaḥ_bandh asmi_as arthena_artha kauravaiḥ_kaurava

div.p: iti_iti bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ukteḥ_ukti artha--_artha lobhena_lobha vikrīta--_vikrī ātmanām_ātman teṣām_tad kutas_kutas mahā--_mahat anubhāva--_anubhāva tā_tā tatas_tatas yuddhe_yuddha hantavyāḥ_han te_tad iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah hatvā_han artha--_artha kāmān_kāma iti_iti artha--_artha kāmān_kāma api_api gurūn_guru hatvā_han aham_mad iha_iha eva_eva loke_loka bhogān_bhoga bhuñjīya_bhuj na_na tu_tu para--_para loke_loka tān_tad ca_ca rudhira--_rudhira pradigdhān_pradih tad--_tad rudhira--_rudhira miśrān_miśra eva_eva na_na tu_tu śuddhān_śudh bhuñjīya_bhuj tad--_tad hiṃsayā_hiṃsā tad--_tad lābhāt_lābha tathā_tathā ca_ca yuddha--_yuddha garva--_garva avalepa--_avalepa ādi--_ādi mattve_mattva api_api teṣām_tad mad--_mad gurutvam_gurutva asti_as eva_eva iti_iti punar_punar guru--_guru grahaṇena_grahaṇa sūcyate_sūcay
BhG 2.6

lg.l: na_na ca_ca etat_etad vidmaḥ_vid katarat_katara naḥ_mad garīyaḥ_garīyas
yat_yat vā_vā jayema_ji yadi_yadi vā_vā naḥ_mad jayeyuḥ_ji
yān_yad hatvā_han jijīviṣāmaḥ_jijīviṣ
te_tad avasthitāḥ_avasthā pramukhe_pramukha dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ_dhārtarāṣṭra

div.p:
śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara kim_ka ca_ca yadi_yadi api_api adharmam_adharma aṅgīkariṣyāmaḥ_aṅgīkṛ tathā_tathā api_api kim_kim asmākam_mad jayaḥ_jaya parājayaḥ_parājaya vā_vā garīyān_garīyas bhavet_bhū iti_iti na_na jñāyate_jñā iti_iti āha_ah na_na ced_ced ityādi_ityādi etat_etad dvayoḥ_dvi madhye_madhya naḥ_mad asmākam_mad katarat_katara kim_ka nāma_nāma garīyaḥ_garīyas adhikataram_adhikatara bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti na_na vidmaḥ_vid tat_tad eva_eva dvayam_dvaya darśayati_darśay yat_yat vai_vai etān_etad vayam_mad jayema_ji jeṣyāmaḥ_ji yadi_yadi vā_vā naḥ_mad asmān_mad ete_etad jayeyuḥ_ji jeṣyanti_ji iti_iti jayaḥ_jaya api_api kim_ka ca_ca asmākam_mad katarat_katara jaya--_jaya parājayayoḥ_parājaya madhye_madhya kim_ka khalu_khalu garīyaḥ_garīyas adhikataram_adhikatara bhaviṣyati_bhū etat_etad na_na vidmaḥ_vid tat_tad eva_eva pakṣa--_pakṣa dvayam_dvaya darśayati_darśay etān_etad vayam_mad jayema_ji na_na u_u asmān_mad vai_vai ete_etad jayeyuḥ_ji iti_iti kim_ka
ca_ca jayaḥ_jaya api_api asmākam_mad phalataḥ_phala parājayaḥ_parājaya eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah yān_yad eva_eva iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aśanasya_aśana kṣatriyam_kṣatriya prati_prati niṣiddha--_niṣidh tvāt_tva yuddhasya_yuddha ca_ca vihita--_vidhā tvāt_tva svadharma--_svadharma tvena_tva yuddham_yuddha eva_eva tatra_tatra śreyaskaram_śreyaskara iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah na_na ca_ca etat_etad iti_iti etat_etad api_api na_na jānīmaḥ_jñā bhaikṣa--_bhaikṣa yuddhayoḥ_yuddha madhye_madhya katarat_katara naḥ_mad asmākam_mad garīyaḥ_garīyas śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha kim_kim bhaikṣam_bhaikṣa hiṃsā--_hiṃsā śūnya--_śūnya tvāt_tva uta_uta yuddham_yuddha svadharma--_svadharma tvāt_tva iti_iti idam_idam ca_ca na_na vidmaḥ_vid ārabdhe_ārabh api_api yuddhe_yuddha yat_yat vā_vā vayam_mad jayema_ji atiśayīmahi_atiśī yadi_yadi vā_vā naḥ_mad asmān_mad jayeyuḥ_ji dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ_dhārtarāṣṭra ubhayoḥ_ubhaya sāmya--_sāmya pakṣaḥ_pakṣa api_api arthāt_artha boddhavyaḥ_budh

kim_kim ca_ca jātaḥ_jan api_api jayaḥ_jaya naḥ_mad phalataḥ_phala parājayaḥ_parājaya eva_eva yatas_yatas yān_yad bandhūn_bandhu hatvā_han jīvitum_jīv api_api vayam_mad na_na icchāmaḥ_iṣ kim_ka punar_punar viṣayān_viṣaya upabhoktum_upabhuj eva_eva avasthitāḥ_avasthā dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ_dhārtarāṣṭra dhṛtarāṣṭra--_dhṛtarāṣṭra sambandhinaḥ_sambandhin bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādayaḥ_ādi sarve_sarva api_api tasmāt_tasmāt bhaikṣāt_bhaikṣa yuddhasya_yuddha śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvam_tva na_na siddham_sidh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

tat_tad evam_evam prāktanena_prāktana granthena_grantha saṃsāra--_saṃsāra doṣa--_doṣa nirūpaṇāt_nirūpaṇa adhikāri--_adhikārin viśeṣaṇāni_viśeṣaṇa uktāni_vac tatra_tatra na_na ca_ca śreyaḥ_śreyas anupaśyāmi_anupaś hatvā_han sva--_sva janam_jana āhave_āhava iti_iti atra_atra raṇe_raṇa hatasya_han parivrāj--_parivrāj samāna--_samāna yoga--_yoga kṣema--_kṣema tva--_tva ukteḥ_ukti anyat_anya śreyaḥ_śreyas anyat_anya uta_uta eva_eva preyaḥ_preyas iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti siddham_sidh śreyaḥ_śreyas mokṣa--_mokṣa ākhyam_ākhyā arthāt_artha ca_ca tat_tad itarat_itara aśreyaḥ_aśreyas iti_iti nitya--_nitya anitya--_anitya vastu--_vastu vivekaḥ_viveka darśitaḥ_darśay na_na kāṅkṣe_kāṅkṣ vijayam_vijaya kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa iti_iti atra_atra aihika--_aihika phala--_phala virāgaḥ_virāga api_api trailokya--_trailokya rājyasya_rājya hetoḥ_hetu iti_iti atra_atra pāralaukika--_pāralaukika phala--_phala virāgaḥ_virāga narake_naraka niyatam_niyatam vāsa_vāsa iti_iti atra_atra sthūla--_sthūla deha--_deha atiriktaḥ_atiric ātmā_ātman kim_ka naḥ_mad rājyena_rājya iti_iti vyākhyāta--_vyākhyā vartmanā_vartman śamaḥ_śama kim_ka bhogaiḥ_bhoga iti_iti damaḥ_dama yadi_yadi api_api ete_etad na_na paśyanti_dṛś iti_iti atra_atra nirlobha--_nirlobha tā_tā tat_tad me_mad kṣemataram_kṣematara bhavet_bhū iti_iti atra_atra titikṣā_titikṣā iti_iti prathama--_prathama adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa sādhana--_sādhana sūcanam_sūcana asmin_idam tu_tu adhyāye_adhyāya śreyaḥ_śreyas bhoktum_bhuj bhaikṣam_bhaikṣa api_api iti_iti atra_atra bhikṣā--_bhikṣā caryā--_caryā upalakṣitaḥ_upalakṣay saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa pratipāditaḥ_pratipāday

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kim_ka ca_ca guru--_guru drohe_droha pravṛttasya_pravṛt api_api mama_mad jayaḥ_jaya parājayaḥ_parājaya vā_vā bhavet_bhū iti_iti api_api na_na jñāyate_jñā iti_iti āha_ah na_na ca_ca etat_etad ityādi_ityādi tathā_tathā api_api naḥ_mad asmākam_mad katarat_katara jaya--_jaya parājayayoḥ_parājaya madhye_madhya kim_ka khalu_khalu garīyaḥ_garīyas adhikataram_adhikatara bhaviṣyati_bhū etat_etad na_na vidmaḥ_vid tat_tad eva_eva pakṣa--_pakṣa dvayam_dvaya darśayati_darśay etān_etad vayam_mad jayema_ji na_na u_u asmān_mad vai_vai ete_etad jayeyuḥ_ji iti_iti kim_kim ca_ca jayaḥ_jaya api_api asmākam_mad phalataḥ_phala parājayaḥ_parājaya eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah yān_yad eva_eva iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu bhaikṣa--_bhaikṣa bhojanam_bhojana kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya vigarhitam_vigarh yuddham_yuddha ca_ca sva--_sva dharmam_dharma vijānan_vijñā api_api vibhāṣase_vibhāṣ iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na ca_ca etat_etad iti_iti etat_etad vayam_mad na_na vidmaḥ_vid bhaikṣya--_bhaikṣya yuddhayoḥ_yuddha madhye_madhya naḥ_mad asmākam_mad katarat_katara garīyaḥ_garīyas praśastataram_praśastatara hiṃsā--_hiṃsā virahāt_viraha bhaikṣam_bhaikṣa garīyaḥ_garīyas svadharma--_svadharma tvāt_tva yuddham_yuddha vā_vā iti_iti etat_etad ca_ca na_na vidmaḥ_vid samārabdhe_samārabh yuddhe_yuddha vayam_mad dhārtarāṣṭrān_dhārtarāṣṭra jayema_ji te_tad vā_vā naḥ_mad asmān_mad jayeyuḥ_ji iti_iti

nanu_nanu mahā--_mahat vikramiṇām_vikramin dharmiṣṭhānām_dharmiṣṭha ca_ca bhavatām_bhavat eva_eva vijayaḥ_vijaya bhāvi_bhāvin iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah yān_yad eva_eva iti_iti yān_yad dhārtarāṣṭrān_dhārtarāṣṭra bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādīn_ādi sarvān_sarva na_na jijīviṣāmaḥ_jijīviṣ jīvitum_jīv api_api nā_na icchāmaḥ_iṣ kim_kim punar_punar bhogān_bhoga bhoktum_bhuj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca vijayaḥ_vijaya api_api asmākam_mad phalataḥ_phala parājayaḥ_parājaya eva_eva iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt yuddhasya_yuddha bhaikṣāt_bhaikṣa garīyaḥ_garīyas tvam_tva a_a prasiddham_prasidh iti_iti evam_evam etāvatā_etāvat granthena_grantha tasmāt_tasmāt evaṃvid_evaṃvid śānta--_śam dāntaḥ_dam uparataḥ_uparam titikṣuḥ_titikṣu śraddhā--_śraddhā anvitaḥ_anvita bhūtvā_bhū ātmani_ātman eva_eva ātmānam_ātman paśyet_paś iti_iti śruti--_śruti prasiddham_prasidh arjunasya_arjuna jñāna--_jñāna adhikāri--_adhikārin tvam_tva darśitam_darśay tatra_tatra kim_ka naḥ_mad rājyena_rājya iti_iti śama--_śama damau_dama api_api trailokya--_trailokya rājyasya_rājya iti_iti aihika--_aihika pāratrika--_pāratrika bhoga--_bhoga upekṣā--_upekṣā lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa uparatiḥ_uparati bhaikṣam_bhaikṣa bhoktum_bhuj śreyaḥ_śreyas iti_iti dvandva--_dvaṃdva sahiṣṇu--_sahiṣṇu tva--_tva lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa titikṣā_titikṣā guru--_guru vākya--_vākya dṛḍha--_dṛḍha viśvāsa--_viśvāsa lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa śraddhā_śraddhā tu_tu uttara--_uttara vākye_vākya vyaktībhaviṣyati_vyaktībhū na_na khalu_khalu śama--_śama ādi--_ādi śūnyasya_śūnya jñāne_jñāna asti_as adhikāraḥ_adhikāra paṅga--_paṅga ādeḥ_ādi iva_iva karmaṇi_karman iti_iti
BhG 2.7

lg.l: kārpaṇya--_kārpaṇya doṣa--_doṣa upahata--_upahan svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva
pṛcchāmi_pracch tvām_tvad dharma--_dharma saṃmūḍha--_sammuh cetāḥ_cetas
yat_yad śreyaḥ_śreyas syāt_as niścitam_niścitam brūhi_brū tat_tad me_mad
śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya te_tvad aham_mad śādhi_śās mām_mad tvām_tvad prapannam_prapad

div.p: sūcayati_sūcay arthāt_artha kārpaṇya--_kārpaṇya doṣa--_doṣa upahata--_upahan svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva etān_etad hatvā_han katham_katham jīviṣyāmaḥ_jīv iti_iti kārpaṇyam_kārpaṇya dosaḥ_dosa ca_ca sva--_sva kula--_kula kṣaya--_kṣaya kṛtaḥ_kṛ tābhyām_tad upahataḥ_upahan abhibhūtaḥ_abhibhū svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva śaurya--_śaurya ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa yasya_yad saḥ_tad aham_mad yasya_yad saḥ_tad yuddham_yuddha tyaktvā_tyaj bhikṣāṭanam_bhikṣāṭana api_api kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya dharmaḥ_dharma adharmaḥ_adharma vā_vā iti_iti sandigdha--_saṃdih cittaḥ_citta san_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atas_atas me_mad yat_yad niścitam_niści śreyaḥ_śreyas yuktam_yuj syāt_as tat_tad brūhi_brū kim_kim ca_ca te_tvad aham_mad śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya śāsana--_śāsana arhaḥ_arha atas_atas tvām_tvad prapannam_prapad śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgatam_āgam mām_mad śādhi_śās śikṣaya_śikṣay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana guru--_guru upasadanam_upasadana idānīm_idānīm pratipādyate_pratipāday samadhigata--_samadhigam saṃsāra--_saṃsāra doṣa--_doṣa jātasya_jan atitarām_atitarām nirviṇṇasya_nirviṇṇa vidhivat_vidhivat gurum_guru upasannasya_upasad eva_eva vidyā--_vidyā grahaṇe_grahaṇa adhikārāt_adhikāra tat_tad evam_evam bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādi--_ādi saṃkaṭa--_saṃkaṭa vaśāt_vaśa vyutthāya_vyutthā atha_atha bhikṣā--_bhikṣā caryam_carya caranti_car iti_iti śruti--_śruti siddha--_sidh bhikṣā--_bhikṣā carye_carya arjunasya_arjuna abhilāṣam_abhilāṣa pradarśya_pradarśay vidhivat_vidhivat guru--_guru upasattim_upasatti api_api tad--_tad saṅkaṭa--_saṃkaṭa vyājena_vyāja eva_eva darśayati_darśay kārpaṇya--_kārpaṇya iti_iti

yaḥ_yad su_su alpām_alpa api_api citta--_citta kṣatim_kṣati na_na kṣamate_kṣam sa_tad kṛpaṇaḥ_kṛpaṇa iti_iti loke_loka prasiddhaḥ_prasidh tad--_tad vidha--_vidha tvāt_tva akhilaḥ_akhila anātma--_anātman vid_vid aprāpta--_aprāpta puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha tayā_tā kṛpaṇaḥ_kṛpaṇa bhavati_bhū yaḥ_yad vai_vai etat_etad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī a_a viditvā_vid asmāt_idam lokāt_loka praiti_pre sa_tad kṛpaṇa_kṛpaṇa iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tasya_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva kārpaṇyam_kārpaṇya anātma--_anātman adhyāsavat--_adhyāsavat tvam_tva tad--_tad nimittaḥ_nimitta asmin_idam janmani_janman ete_etad eva_eva madīyāḥ_madīya teṣu_tad hateṣu_han kim_ka jīvitena_jīvita iti_iti abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa rūpaḥ_rūpa mamatā--_mamatā lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa doṣaḥ_doṣa tena_tad upahataḥ_upahan tiraskṛtaḥ_tiraskṛ tathā_tathā dharme_dharma viṣaye_viṣaya nirṇāyaka--_nirṇāyaka pramāṇa--_pramāṇa a_a darśanāt_darśana saṃmūḍham_sammuh kim_ka eteṣām_etad vadhaḥ_vadha dharmaḥ_dharma kim_ka etad--_etad paripālanam_paripālana dharmaḥ_dharma tathā_tathā kim_ka pṛthvī--_pṛthvī paripālanam_paripālana dharmaḥ_dharma kim_ka vā_vā yathā_yathā avasthitaḥ_avasthā araṇya--_araṇya nivāsaḥ_nivāsa eva_eva dharmaḥ_dharma iti_iti ādi--_ādi saṃśayaiḥ_saṃśaya vyāptam_vyāp cetaḥ_cetas yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā na_na ca_ca etat_etad vidmaḥ_vid katarat_katara naḥ_mad garīyaḥ_garīyas iti_iti atra_atra vyākhyātam_vyākhyā etat_etad evaṃvidhaḥ_evaṃvidha san_as aham_mad tvā_tvad tvām_tvad idānīm_idānīm pṛcchāmi_pracch śreyaḥ_śreyas iti_iti anuṣaṅgaḥ_anuṣaṅga

atas_atas yat_yad niścitam_niści aikāntikam_aikāntika ātyantikam_ātyantika ca_ca śreyaḥ_śreyas parama--_parama pumartha--_pumartha bhūtam_bhū phalam_phala syāt_as tat_tad me_mad mahyam_mad brūhi_brū sādhana--_sādhana anantaram_anantara avaśyambhāvi--_avaśyambhāvin tvam_tva aikāntikatavam_aikāntikatava jātasya_jan avināśe_avināśa ātyantika--_ātyantika tvam_tva yathā_yathā hi_hi auṣadhe_auṣadha kṛte_kṛ kadācid_kadācid roga--_roga nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti na_na bhavet_bhū api_api jātā_jan api_api ca_ca roga--_roga nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti punar_punar api_api roga--_roga utpattyā_utpatti vināśyate_vināśay evam_evam kṛte_kṛ api_api yāge_yāga pratibandha--_pratibandha vaśāt_vaśa svargaḥ_svarga na_na bhavet_bhū api_api jātaḥ_jan api_api svargaḥ_svarga duḥkha--_duḥkha ākrāntaḥ_ākram naśyati_naś ca_ca iti_iti na_na aikāntika--_aikāntika tvam_tva ātyantika--_ātyantika tvam_tva vā_vā tayoḥ_tad tat_tad uktam_vac

duḥkha--_duḥkha traya--_traya abhighātāt_abhighāta jijñāsā_jijñāsā tad--_tad apaghātake_apaghātaka hetau_hetu
dṛṣṭe_dṛś sā_tad apārthā_apārtha ced_ced na_na ekānta--_ekānta atyantataḥ_atyanta abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti dṛṣṭavad ānuśravikaḥ sa hy avaiśuddhi-kṣayātiśaya-yuktaḥ |
tad--_tad viparītaḥ_viparīta śreyān_śreyas vyakta--_vyakta avyakta--_avyakta jña--_jña vijñānāt_vijñāna iti_iti

nanu_nanu tvam_tvad mama_mad sakhā_sakhi na_na tu_tu śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya atas_atas āha_ah śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya te_tvad aham_mad iti_iti tvad--_tvad anuśāsana--_anuśāsana yogya--_yogya tvāt_tva aham_mad tava_tvad śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya eva_eva bhavāmi_bhū na_na sakhā_sakhi nyūna--_nyūna jñāna--_jñāna tvāt_tva atas_atas tvām_tvad prapannam_prapad śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgatam_āgam mām_mad śādhi_śās śikṣaya_śikṣay karuṇayā_karuṇā na_na tu_tu aśiṣya--_aśiṣya tva--_tva śaṅkayā_śaṅkā upekṣaṇīyaḥ_upekṣ aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etena_etad tat_tad vijñāna--_vijñāna artham_artha sa_tad gurum_guru eva_eva abhigacchet_abhigam samidh--_samidh pāṇiḥ_pāṇi śrotriyam_śrotriya brahma--_brahman niṣṭham_niṣṭhā ṃuṇḍu--_ṃuṇḍu varuṇam_varuṇa pitaram_pitṛ upasasāra_upasṛ adhīhi_adhī bhagavaḥ_bhagavat brahma_brahman iti_iti iti_iti ādi--_ādi guru--_guru upasatti--_upasatti pratipādakaḥ_pratipādaka śruti--_śruti arthaḥ_artha darśitaḥ_darśay

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi sopapattikam_sopapattika śāstra--_śāstra artham_artha tvam_tvad eva_eva bruvāṇaḥ_brū kṣatriyaḥ_kṣatriya bhūtvā_bhū bhikṣāṭanam_bhikṣāṭana niścinoṣi_niści tarhi_tarhi alam_alam mad--_mad uktyā_ukti iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah kārpaṇya--_kārpaṇya iti_iti svābhāvikasya_svābhāvika śauryasya_śaurya tyāgaḥ_tyāga eva_eva me_mad kārpaṇyam_kārpaṇya dharmasya_dharma sūkṣmā_sūkṣma gatiḥ_gati iti_iti atas_atas dharma--_dharma vyavasthāyām_vyavasthā api_api aham_mad mūḍha--_muh buddhiḥ_buddhi eva_eva asmi_as tvam_tvad niścitya_niści śreyaḥ_śreyas brūhi_brū

nanu_nanu mad--_mad vācaḥ_vāc tvam_tvad paṇḍata--_paṇḍata māni--_mānin tvena_tva khaṇḍayasi_khaṇḍay ced_ced katham_katham brūyām_brū tatra_tatra āha_ah śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya te_tvad aham_mad asmi_as na_na atam_atam param_param vṛthā_vṛthak khaṇḍayāmi_khaṇḍay iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha tat_tad vijñāna--_vijñāna artham_artha sa_tad gurum_guru eva_eva abhigacchet_abhigam samidh--_samidh pāṇiḥ_pāṇi śrotriyam_śrotriya brahma--_brahman niṣṭham_niṣṭhā ṃuṇḍu--_ṃuṇḍu ācāryavān_ācāryavat puruṣaḥ_puruṣa veda_vid chā--_chā 6.14.2--_6.14.2 iti_iti ādi_ādi śruti--_śruti siddhām_sidh guru--_guru upasattim_upasatti yaḥ_yad vai_vai etat_etad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī a_a viditvā_vid asmāt_idam lokāt_loka praiti_pre sa_tad kṛpaṇa_kṛpaṇa iti_iti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa a_a brahma--_brahman vid--_vid tvam_tva kārpaṇyam_kārpaṇya tena_tad hetunā_hetu yaḥ_yad doṣaḥ_doṣa yān_yad eva_eva hatvā_han iti_iti bandhu--_bandhu vargam_varga amatā--_amatā lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa tena_tad upahata--_upahan svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva yuddha--_yuddha spṛhā--_spṛhā lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa svadharmaḥ_svadharma yasya_yad saḥ_tad dharme_dharma saṃmūḍham_sammuh kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya me_mad yuddham_yuddha svadharmaḥ_svadharma tat_tad vihāya_vihā bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aṭanam_aṭana vā_vā iti_iti evam_evam sandihānam_saṃdih cetaḥ_cetas yasya_yad saḥ_tad īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa san_as aham_mad tvām_tvad idānīm_idānīm pṛcchāmi_pracch tasmāt_tasmāt niścitam_niści ekāntikam_ekāntika ātyantikam_ātyantika yat_yad me_mad śreyaḥ_śreyas syāt_as tat_tad tvam_tvad brūhi_brū sādhana--_sādhana uttaram_uttara avaśyaṃbhāvi--_avaśyambhāvin tvam_tva aikāntika--_aikāntika tvam_tva bhūtasya_bhūta avināśi--_avināśin tvam_tva ātyantika--_ātyantika tvam_tva

nanu_nanu śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgatasya_āgam upadeśaḥ_upadeśa tat_tad vijñāna--_vijñāna artham_artha sa_tad gurum_guru eva_eva abhigacchet_abhigam iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti sakhāyam_sakhi tvām_tvad katham_katham upadiśāmi_upadiś iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya te_tvad aham_mad iti_iti śādhi_śās śikṣaya_śikṣay
BhG 2.8

lg.l: na_na hi_hi prapaśyāmi_prapaś mama_mad apanudyāt_apanud
yat_yad śokam_śoka ucchoṣaṇam_ucchoṣaṇa indriyāṇām_indriya
avāpya_avāp bhūmau_bhūmi asapatnam_asapatna ṛddham_ṛdh
rājyam_rājya surāṇām_sura api_api ca_ca ādhipatyam_ādhipatya

div.p: kuru_kṛ āha_ah prapaśyāmi_prapaś indriyāṇām_indriya ucchoṣaṇam_ucchoṣaṇa atiśoṣaṇa--_atiśoṣaṇa karam_kara madīyam_madīya śokam_śoka yat_yad karma_karman apanudyāt_apanud apanayet_apanī tat_tad aham_mad na_na prapaśyāmi_prapaś iti_iti yadi_yadi api_api bhūmau_bhūmi niṣkaṇṭakam_niṣkaṇṭaka samṛddham_samṛdh rājyam_rājya prāpsyāmi_prāp tathā_tathā sura--_sura indra--_indra tvam_tva api_api yadi_yadi prāpsyāmi_prāp evam_evam abhīṣṭam_abhīṣ tat_tad tat_tad sarvam_sarva avāpya_avāp api_api śoka--_śoka apanodana--_apanodana upāyam_upāya na_na prapaśyāmi_prapaś iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu svayam_svayam eva_eva tvam_tvad śreyaḥ_śreyas vicāraya_vicāray śruta--_śruta sampannaḥ_sampad asi_as kim_ka para--_para śiṣya--_śiṣya tvena_tva iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah nahi_nahi iti_iti yat_yad śreyaḥ_śreyas prāptam_prāp sat--_sat kartṛ_kartṛ mama_mad śokam_śoka apanudyāt_apanud apanudet_apanud nivārayet_nivāray tat_tad na_na paśyāmi_paś hi_hi yasmāt_yad tasmāt_tad mām_mad śādhi_śās iti_iti saḥ_tad aham_mad bhagavaḥ_bhagavat śocāmi_śuc tam_tad mā_mad bhagavān_bhagavat śokasya_śoka pāram_pāra tārayatu_tāray iti_iti śoka--_śoka anapanode_anapanoda kaḥ_ka doṣaḥ_doṣa iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk tad--_tad viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa āha_ah indriyāṇām_indriya ucchoṣaṇam_ucchoṣaṇa iti_iti sarvadā_sarvadā santāpa--_saṃtāpa karam_kara iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu yuddhe_yuddha prayatamānasya_prayat tava_tvad śoka--_śoka nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti bhaviṣyati_bhū jeṣyasi_ji ced_ced tadā_tadā rājya--_rājya prāptyā_prāpti dvau_dvi etau_etad puruṣau_puruṣa loke_loka iti_iti ādi--_ādi dharma--_dharma śāstrāt_śāstra iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah avāpya_avāp iti_iti ādinā_ādi śatru--_śatru varjitam_varjay sasya--_sasya ādi--_ādi sampannam_sampad ca_ca rājyam_rājya tathā_tathā surāṇām_sura ādhipatyam_ādhipatya hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha tva--_tva paryantam_paryanta aiśvaryam_aiśvarya avāpya_avāp sthitasya_sthā api_api mama_mad yat_yad śokam_śoka apanudyāt_apanud tat_tad na_na paśyāmi_dṛś iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya tat_tad yathā_yathā iha_iha karma--_karman jitaḥ_ji lokaḥ_loka kṣīyate_kṣi evam_evam eva_eva amutra_amutra puṇya--_puṇya jitaḥ_ji lokaḥ_loka kṣīyate_kṣi iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti yat_yad kṛtakam_kṛtaka tat_tad anityam_anitya iti_iti anumānāt_anumāna pratyakṣeṇa_pratyakṣa api_api aihikānām_aihika vināśa--_vināśa darśanāt_darśana ca_ca na_na aihikaḥ_aihika āmutrikaḥ_āmutrika vā_vā bhogaḥ_bhoga śoka--_śoka nivartakaḥ_nivartaka kintu_kintu sva--_sva sattā--_sattā kāle_kāla api_api bhoga--_bhoga pāratantrya--_pāratantrya ādinā_ādi vināśa--_vināśa kāle_kāla yuddham_yuddha śoka--_śoka nivṛttaye_nivṛtti anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etena_etad iha_iha amutra_amutra bhoga--_bhoga virāgaḥ_virāga adhikāri--_adhikārin viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa tvena_tva darśitaḥ_darśay

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nanu_nanu mayi_mad tava_tvad sakhya--_sakhya bhāvaḥ_bhāva eva_eva na_na tu_tu gauravam_gaurava atas_atas tvām_tvad katham_katham aham_mad śiṣyam_śiṣya karomi_kṛ tasmāt_tasmāt yatra_yatra tava_tvad gauravam_gaurava tam_tad kam_ka api_api dvaipāyana--_dvaipāyana ādikam_ādika prapadyasva_prapad iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah na_na hi_hi iti_iti mama_mad śokam_śoka apanudyāt_apanud dūrīkuryāt_dūrīkṛ evam_evam janam_jana na_na prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa paśyāmi_dṛś trijagati_trijagatī ekam_eka tvām_tvad vinā_vinā svasmāt_sva adhika--_adhika buddhimantam_buddhimat bṛhaspatim_bṛhaspati api_api na_na jānāmi_jñā iti_iti atas_atas śoka--_śoka ārtaḥ_ārta eva_eva khalu_khalu kam_ka prapadyeya_prapad iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva yat_yad yatas_yatas śokāt_śoka indriyāṇām_indriya ucchoṣaṇam_ucchoṣaṇa mahā--_mahat nidāghāt_nidāgha kṣudra--_kṣudra sarasām_saras iva_iva utkarṣeṇa_utkarṣa śoṣaḥ_śoṣa bhavati_bhū

nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi sāmpratam_sāṃpratam tvam_tvad śoka--_śoka ārtaḥ_ārta eva_eva khalu_khalu yudhyasva_yudh tatas_tatas ca_ca etān_etad jitvā_ji rājyam_rājya tava_tvad rājya--_rājya bhoga--_bhoga abhiniveśena_abhiniveśa eva_eva śokaḥ_śoka apayāsyati_apayā iti_iti āha_ah avāpya_avāp iti_iti bhūmau_bhūmi niṣkaṇṭakam_niṣkaṇṭaka rājyam_rājya svarge_svarga surāṇām_sura ādhipatyam_ādhipatya vā_vā prāpya_prāp api_api sthitasya_sthā mama_mad indriyāṇām_indriya etat_etad ucchoṣaṇam_ucchoṣaṇa eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu tvam_tvad śāstra--_śāstra jñaḥ_jña asi_as sva--_sva hitam_hita vicārya_vicāray anutiṣṭha_anuṣṭhā sakhyuḥ_sakhi me_mad śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya katham_katham bhaveḥ_bhū iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na hi_hi iti_iti yat_yad karma_karman mama_mad śokam_śoka apanudyāt_apanud dūrīkuryāt_dūrīkṛ tat_tad aham_mad na_na prapaśyāmi_prapaś śokam_śoka viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ indriyāṇām_indriya ucchoṣaṇam_ucchoṣaṇa iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt śoka--_śoka vināśāya_vināśa tvām_tvad prapannaḥ_prapad asmi_as iti_iti ittham_ittham ca_ca saḥ_tad aham_mad bhagavaḥ_bhagavat śocāmi_śuc tam_tad mām_mad bhavān_bhavat śokasya_śoka pāram_pāra tārayatu_tāray iti_iti śruti--_śruti arthaḥ_artha darśitaḥ_darśay

nanu_nanu tvam_tvad adhunā_adhunā śoka--_śoka ākulaḥ_ākula prapadyase_prapad yuddhāt_yuddha sukha--_sukha samṛddhi--_samṛddhi lābhe_lābha viśokaḥ_viśoka bhaviṣyasi_bhū iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah avāpya_avāp iti_iti yadi_yadi yuddhe_yuddha vijayī_vijayin syām_as tadā_tadā bhūmau_bhūmi asapatnam_asapatna niṣkaṇṭakam_niṣkaṇṭaka rājyam_rājya prāpya_prāp yadi_yadi ca_ca tatra_tatra hataḥ_han syām_as tadā_tadā svarge_svarga surāṇām_sura ādhipatyam_ādhipatya prāpya_prāp sthitasya_sthā me_mad viśoka--_viśoka tvam_tva na_na bhavet_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad yathā_yathā iha_iha karma--_karman jitaḥ_ji lokaḥ_loka kṣīyate_kṣi evam_evam eva_eva amutra_amutra puṇya--_puṇya jitaḥ_ji lokaḥ_loka kṣīyate_kṣi iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti na_na aihikam_aihika pāratrikam_pāratrika vā_vā yuddha--_yuddha labdham_labh sukham_sukha śoka--_śoka apaham_apaha tasmāt_tasmāt tādṛśam_tādṛśa eva_eva śreyastvam_śreyastva brūhi_brū
BhG 2.9

lg.l: saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac
evam_evam uktvā_vac hṛṣīkeśam_hṛṣīkeśa guḍākeśaḥ_guḍākeśa parantapaḥ_paraṃtapa
na_na yotsye_yudh iti_iti govindam_govinda uktvā_vac tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm babhūva_bhū ha_ha

div.p: kṛtavan_kṛ uvāca_vac _

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tad--_tad anantaram_anantaram arjunaḥ_arjuna kim_ka kṛtavān_kṛ iti_iti dhṛtarāṣṭra--_dhṛtarāṣṭra ākāṅkṣāyām_ākāṅkṣā sañjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac evam_evam iti_iti ādi_ādi guḍākeśaḥ_guḍākeśa jita--_ji ālasyaḥ_ālasya parantapaḥ_paraṃtapa śatru--_śatru tāpanaḥ_tāpana arjunaḥ_arjuna hṛṣīkeśam_hṛṣīkeśa sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya pravartaka--_pravartaka tvena_tva antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin govindam_govinda gām_go veda--_veda lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa vāṇīm_vāṇī vindati_vid iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti sarva--_sarva veda--_veda upādāna--_upādāna saṅkhye_saṃkhya iti_iti ādinā_ādi yuddha--_yuddha svarūpa--_svarūpa ayogyatām_ayogyatā uktvā_vac tad--_tad anantaram_anantaram na_na yotsye_yudh iti_iti yuddha--_yuddha phala--_phala abhāvam_abhāva ca_ca uktvā_vac tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm babhūva_bhū bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya vyāpārasya_vyāpāra yuddha--_yuddha artham_artha pūrvam_pūrvam kṛtasya_kṛ nivṛttyā_nivṛtti nirvyāpāraḥ_nirvyāpāra svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva jita--_ji ālasye_ālasya sarva--_sarva śatru--_śatru tāpane_tāpana ca_ca tasmin_tad āgantukam_āgantuka ālasyam_ālasya atāpaka--_atāpaka tvam_tva ca_ca na_na āspadam_āspada ādhāsyati_ādhā iti_iti dyotayitum_dyotay ha_ha śabdaḥ_śabda
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva tatas_tatas arjunaḥ_arjuna kim_ka akarot_kṛ iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā sañjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac evam_evam uktvā_vac iti_iti ādi_ādi guḍākeśaḥ_guḍākeśa hṛṣīkeśam_hṛṣīkeśa prati_prati evam_evam na_na hi_hi prapaśyāmi_prapaś iti_iti ādinā_ādi yuddhasya_yuddha śoka--_śoka a_a nivartaka--_nivartaka tvam_tva uktvā_vac parantapaḥ_paraṃtapa api_api govindam_govinda sarva--_sarva veda--_veda jñam_jña prati_prati na_na yotsye_yudh iti_iti ca_ca uktvā_vac iti_iti yojyam_yuj tatra_tatra hṛṣīkeśa--_hṛṣīkeśa tvāt_tva buddhim_buddhi yuddhe_yuddha pravartayiṣyati_pravartay sarva--_sarva veda--_veda vid--_vid tvāt_tva yuddhe_yuddha sva--_sva dharma--_dharma tvam_tva grāhayiṣyati_grāhay iti_iti vyajya_vyañj dhṛtarāṣṭra--_dhṛtarāṣṭra hṛdi_hṛd saṃjātā_saṃjan sva--_sva putra--_putra rājya--_rājya āśā_āśā nirasyate_niras
BhG 2.10

lg.l: tam_tad uvāca_vac hṛṣīkeśaḥ_hṛṣīkeśa prahasan_prahas iva_iva bhārata_bhārata
senayoḥ_senā ubhayoḥ_ubhaya madhye_madhya viṣīdantam_viṣad idam_idam vacaḥ_vacas

div.p: āha_ah uvāca_vac san_as _

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam yuddham_yuddha upekṣitavati_upekṣ api_api arjune_arjuna bhagavān_bhagavat na_na upekṣitavān_upekṣ iti_iti dhṛtarāṣṭra--_dhṛtarāṣṭra durāśā--_durāśā nirāsāyāḥ_nirāsa aha_ah tam_tad uvāca_vac iti_iti senayoḥ_senā ubhayoḥ_ubhaya madhye_madhya yuddha--_yuddha udyamena_udyama āgatya_āgam tad--_tad virodhinam_virodhin viṣādam_viṣāda moham_moha prāpnuvantam_prāp tam_tad arjunam_arjuna prahasan_prahas iva_iva anucita--_anucita ācāraṇa--_ācāraṇa prakāśanena_prakāśana lajjā--_lajjā ambudhau_ambudhi majjayan_majjay iva_iva hṛṣīkeśaḥ_hṛṣīkeśa sarva--_sarva antaryāmī_antaryāmin iti_iti ādi_ādi vacaḥ_vacas parama--_parama gambhīra--_gambhīra artham_artha anucita--_anucita ācaraṇa--_ācaraṇa prakāśakam_prakāśaka uktavān_vac na_na iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

anucita--_anucita ācaraṇa--_ācaraṇa prakāśanena_prakāśana lajjā--_lajjā utpādanam_utpādana prahāsaḥ_prahāsa lajjā_lajjā ca_ca duḥkha--_duḥkha ātmikā_ātmaka iti_iti dveṣa--_dveṣa viṣayaḥ_viṣaya eva_eva sa_tad mukhyaḥ_mukhya arjunasya_arjuna tu_tu bhagavat--_bhagavant kṛpā--_kṛpā viṣaya--_viṣaya tvāt_tva anucita--_anucita ācaraṇa--_ācaraṇa prakāśanasya_prakāśana ca_ca viveka--_viveka utpatti--_utpatti hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva eka--_eka dala--_dala abhāvena_abhāva gauṇaḥ_gauṇa eva_eva ayam_idam prahāsaḥ_prahāsa iti_iti kathayitum_kathay iva_iva śabdaḥ_śabda lajjām_lajjā utpādayitum_utpāday iva_iva vivkam_vivka utpādayitum_utpāday arjunasya_arjuna anucita--_anucita ācaraṇam_ācaraṇa bhagavatā_bhagavant prakāśyate_prakāśay lajjā--_lajjā utpattiḥ_utpatti tu_tu nāntarīyaka--_nāntarīyaka tayā_tā astu_as mā_mā astu_as vā_vā iti_iti na_na vivakṣitā_vivakṣita iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

yadi_yadi hi_hi yuddha--_yuddha ārambhāt_ārambha prāk_prāk eva_eva sthitaḥ_sthā yuddham_yuddha upekṣeta_upekṣ tadā_tadā na_na anucitam_anucita kuryāt_kṛ mahatā_mahat saṃrambheṇa_saṃrambha tu_tu yuddha--_yuddha bhūmau_bhūmi āgatya_āgam tad--_tad upekṣaṇam_upekṣaṇa atīva_atīva anucitam_anucita iti_iti kathayitum_kathay senayoḥ_senā iti_iti ādi--_ādi viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa bhaviṣyati_bhū

ca_ca iti_iti arthaḥ_artha hṛṣīkeśaḥ_hṛṣīkeśa iti_iti pūrvam_pūrvam premā_preman iva_iva arjuna--_arjuna vāc--_vāc niyamyaḥ_niyam api_api sāmpratam_sāṃpratam arjuna--_arjuna hita--_hita kāri--_kārin tvāt_tva premṇā_preman eva_eva arjuna--_arjuna manaḥ--_manas niyantā_niyantṛ api_api bhavati_bhū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva senayoḥ_senā ubhayoḥ_ubhaya iti_iti arjunasya_arjuna viṣādaḥ_viṣāda bhagavatā_bhagavant prabodhaḥ_prabodha ca_ca ubhābhyām_ubh senābhyām_senā sāmānyatas_sāmānyatas dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva vyaṅgam_vyaṅga artham_artha prakāśayan_prakāśay āha_ah tam_tad uvāca_vac iti_iti tam_tad viṣīdantam_viṣad arjunam_arjuna prati_prati hṛṣīkeśaḥ_hṛṣīkeśa bhagavān_bhagavat aśocyān_aśocya iti_iti ādikam_ādika ati_ati gambhīra--_gambhīra artham_artha vacanam_vacana uvāca_vac vivekaḥ_viveka iti_iti sakhya--_sakhya bhāvena_bhāva prahasan_prahas anaucitya--_anaucitya bhāṣi--_bhāṣin tvena_tva trapā--_trapā sindhau_sindhu nimajjayan_nimajjay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha iva_iva iti_iti tadā_tadā eva_eva śiṣya--_śiṣya tām_tā prāpte_prāp tasmin_tad hāsa--_hāsa anaucityāt_anaucitya īṣat_īṣat adhara--_adhara ullāsam_ullāsa kurvan_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha arjunasya_arjuna viṣādaḥ_viṣāda bhagavatā_bhagavant tasya_tad upadeśaḥ_upadeśa ca_ca sarva--_sarva sākṣikaḥ_sākṣika iti_iti bodhayitum_bodhay senayoḥ_senā ubhayoḥ_ubhaya iti_iti etat_etad
BhG 2.11

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
a_a śocyān_śuc anvaśocaḥ_anuśuc tvam_tvad prajñā--_prajñā vādān_vāda ca_ca bhāṣase_bhāṣ
gatāsūn_gatāsu agatāsūn_agatāsu ca_ca na_na anuśocanti_anuśuc paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita

div.p: bhavati_bhū uvāca_vac śokasya_śoka a_a viṣayībhūtān_viṣayībhū eva_eva bandhūn_bandhu tvam_tvad anvaśocaḥ_anuśuc anuśocitavān_anuśuc asi_as dṛṣṭvā_dṛś imān_idam sva--_sva janān_jana kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa iti_iti ādinā_ādi tatra_tatra kutas_kutas tvā_tvad kaśmalam_kaśmala idam_idam viṣame_viṣama samupasthitam_samupasthā iti_iti ādinā_ādi mayā_mad bodhitaḥ_bodhay api_api punar_punar ca_ca prajñāvatām_prajñāvat paṇḍitānām_paṇḍita vādān_vāda śabdān_śabda katham_katham bhīṣmam_bhīṣma aham_mad saṅkhye_saṃkhya iti_iti ādīn_ādi kevalam_kevalam bhāṣase_bhāṣ na_na tu_tu gata--_gam prāṇān_prāṇa bandhūn_bandhu agatāsūn_agatāsu ca_ca jīvataḥ_jīv api_api bandhu--_bandhu hīnāḥ_hā ete_etad katham_katham jīviṣyanti_jīv iti_iti na_na anuśocanti_anuśuc paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita vivekinaḥ_vivekin
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana here_here

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha bho_bho arjuna_arjuna tava_tvad ayam_idam bandha--_bandha vadha--_vadha hetukaḥ_hetuka śokaḥ_śoka bhrama--_bhrama mūlakaḥ_mūlaka eva_eva tathā_tathā katham_katham bhīṣmam_bhīṣma aham_mad saṅkhye_saṃkhya iti_iti ādikaḥ_ādika vivekaḥ_viveka ca_ca aprajñā--_aprajñā mūlakaḥ_mūlaka eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah aśocyān_aśocya iti_iti ādi_ādi a_a śocyān_śuc śokān_śoka ārhān_ārha eva_eva tvam_tvad anvaśocaḥ_anuśuc anuśocitavān_anuśuc asi_as tathā_tathā tvām_tvad prabodhayantam_prabodhay mām_mad prati_prati prajñā--_prajñā vādān_vāda prajñāyām_prajñā satyām_as eva_eva ye_yad vādāḥ_vāda katham_katham bhīṣmam_bhīṣma aham_mad saṅkhye_saṃkhya iti_iti ādīni_ādi vākyāni_vākya tān_tad bhāṣase_bhāṣ na_na tu_tu tava_tvad kā_ka api_api prajñā_prajñā vartate_vṛt iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva yatas_yatas paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita prajñāvantaḥ_prajñāvat gatāsūn_gatāsu gatāḥ_gam niḥsṛtāḥ_niḥsṛ bhavanti_bhū asavaḥ_asu yebhyaḥ_yad tān_tad sthūla--_sthūla dehān_deha na_na śocanti_śuc teṣām_tad naśvara--_naśvara bhāva--_bhāva tvāt_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva agatāsūn_agatāsu aniḥsṛta--_aniḥsṛta prāṇān_prāṇa sūkṣma--_sūkṣma dehān_deha api_api na_na śocanti_śuc te_tad hi_hi mukteḥ_mukti pūrvam_pūrvam naśvarāḥ_naśvara eva_eva ubhayeṣām_ubhaya api_api tathā_tathā tathā_tathā svabhāvasya_svabhāva duṣparihara--_duṣparihara tvāt_tva mūrkhāḥ_mūrkha tu_tu pirtṛ--_pirtṛ ādi--_ādi dehebhyaḥ_deha prāṇeṣu_prāṇa niḥsṛteṣu_niḥsṛ eva_eva śocanti_śuc sūkṣma--_sūkṣma dehān_deha tu_tu na_na te_tad prāyas_prāyas paricinvantyaḥ_parici atas_atas taiḥ_tad alam_alam ete_etad hi_hi sarve_sarva bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi sthūla--_sthūla sūkṣma--_sūkṣma deha--_deha sahitāḥ_sahita ātmānaḥ_ātman eva_eva ātmanām_ātman tu_tu itya--_itya tvāt_tva teṣu_tad śoka--_śoka pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti eva_eva na_na asti_as iti_iti atas_atas tvayā_tvad yat_yad pūrvam_pūrvam artha--_artha śāstrāt_śāstra dharma--_dharma śāstram_śāstra balavat_balavat iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra mayā_mad tu_tu dharma--_dharma śāstrāt_śāstra api_api jñāna--_jñāna śāstram_śāstra balavat_balavat iti_iti ucyate_vac

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam arjune_arjuna tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm sthite_sthā tad--_tad buddhim_buddhi ākṣipan_ākṣip bhagavān_bhagavat āha_ah aśocyān_aśocya iti_iti he_he arjuna_arjuna aśocyān_aśocya śocitum_śuc ayogyān_ayogya eva_eva dhārtarāṣṭrān_dhārtarāṣṭra tvam_tvad anvaśocaḥ_anuśuc śocitavān_śuc asi_as tathā_tathā mām_mad prati_prati prajñā--_prajñā vādān_vāda prajñāvatām_prajñāvat iva_iva vacanāni_vacana dṛṣṭvā_dṛś imam_idam sva--_sva janam_jana iti_iti ādīni_ādi katham_katham bhīṣmam_bhīṣma iti_iti ādīni_ādi ca_ca bhāṣase_bhāṣ na_na ca_ca te_tvad prajñā--_prajñā leśaḥ_leśa api_api asti_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ye_yad tu_tu prajñāvantaḥ_prajñāvat te_tad gatāsūn_gatāsu nirgata--_nirgam prāṇān_prāṇa sthūla--_sthūla dehān_deha a_a gatāsūn_gatāsu ca_ca a_a nirgata--_nirgam prāṇān_prāṇa sūkṣma--_sūkṣma dehān_deha ca_ca śabdāt_śabda ātmanaḥ_ātman ca_ca na_na śocanti_śuc ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha śokaḥ_śoka sthūla--_sthūla dehānām_deha vināśi--_vināśin tvāt_tva na_na antyaḥ_antya sūkṣma--_sūkṣma dehānām_deha mukteḥ_mukti prāk_prāk tadvatām_tadvat ātmanām_ātman tu_tu ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ bhāva--_bhāva vikāra--_vikāra varjitānām_varjay nitya--_nitya tvāt_tva na_na deha--_deha ātma--_ātman svabhāva--_svabhāva vidām_vid na_na kaḥ_ka api_api śoka--_śoka hetuḥ_hetu yat_yad artha--_artha śāstrāt_śāstra dharma--_dharma śāstrasya_śāstra balavat--_balavat tvam_tva ucyate_vac tat_tad kila_kila tatas_tatas api_api balavatā_balavat jñāna--_jñāna śāstreṇa_śāstra pratyucyate_prativac tasmāt_tasmāt aśocye_aśocya śocya--_śuc bhramaḥ_bhrama pāmara--_pāmara sādhāraṇaḥ_sādhāraṇa paṇḍitasya_paṇḍita te_tvad na_na yogyaḥ_yogya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 2.12

lg.l: na_na tu_tu eva_eva aham_mad jātu_jātu na_na āsam_as na_na tvam_tvad na_na ime_idam janādhipāḥ_janādhipa
na_na ca_ca eva_eva na_na bhaviṣyāmaḥ_bhū sarve_sarva vayam_mad atas_atas param_param

div.p: āha_ah yathā_yathā aham_mad parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara jātu_jātu kadācid_kadācid līlā--_līlā vigrahasya_vigraha āvirbhāva--_āvirbhāva tirobhāvataḥ_tirobhāva na_na āsam_as iti_iti tu_tu nā_na eva_eva api_api tu_tu āsam_as eva_eva anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva na_na ca_ca tvam_tvad na_na āsīḥ_as na_na abhūḥ_bhū api_api tu_tu āsīḥ_as eva_eva ime_idam vā_vā janādhipāḥ_janādhipa nṛpāḥ_nṛpa na_na āsan_as iti_iti na_na api_api tu_tu āsan_as eva_eva mad--_mad aṃśa--_aṃśa tvāt_tva tathā_tathā atas_atas param_param itas_itas upari_upari api_api na_na bhaviṣyāmaḥ_bhū na_na sthāsyāmaḥ_sthā iti_iti ca_ca nā_na eva_eva api_api tu_tu sthāsyāmaḥ_sthā eva_eva iti_iti janma--_janman maraṇa--_maraṇa śūnya--_śūnya tvāt_tva aśocyāḥ_aśocya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha athavā_athavā sakhe_sakhi tvām_tvad aham_mad evam_evam pṛcchāmi_pracch kim_ka ca_ca prīti--_prīti āspadasya_āspada maraṇe_maraṇa dṛṣṭe_dṛś sati_as śokaḥ_śoka jāyate_jan tatra_tatra iha_iha prīti--_prīti āspadam_āspada ātmā_ātman dehaḥ_deha vā_vā sarveṣām_sarva eva_eva bhūtānām_bhūta nṛpa_nṛpa sva--_sva ātmā_ātman eva_eva vallabhaḥ_vallabha iti_iti śuka--_śuka ukteḥ_ukti ātmā_ātman eva_eva prīti--_prīti āspadam_āspada dvividhasya_dvividha eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman nitya--_nitya tvāt_tva eva_eva maraṇa--_maraṇa abhāvāt_abhāva ātmā_ātman śokasya_śoka viṣayaḥ_viṣaya na_na iti_iti āha_ah na_na tu_tu eva_eva aham_mad iti_iti aham_mad paramātmā_paramātman jātu_jātu kadācid_kadācid api_api pūrvam_pūrvam na_na āsam_as iti_iti na_na api_api tu_tu āsam_as eva_eva tathā_tathā tvam_tvad api_api jīva--_jīva ātmā_ātman āsīḥ_as eva_eva tathā_tathā ime_idam janādhipāḥ_janādhipa rājānaḥ_rājan ca_ca jīva--_jīva ātmānaḥ_ātman āsan_as eva_eva iti_iti prāk--_prāñc abhāva--_abhāva abhāvaḥ_abhāva darśitaḥ_darśay tathā_tathā sarve_sarva vayam_mad aham_mad tvam_tvad ime_idam janādhipāḥ_janādhipa ca_ca atas_atas param_param na_na bhaviṣyāmaḥ_bhū na_na sthāsyāmaḥ_sthā iti_iti na_na api_api tu_tu sthāsyāmaḥ_sthā eva_eva iti_iti dhvaṃsa--_dhvaṃsa abhāvaḥ_abhāva ca_ca darśitaḥ_darśay iti_iti paramātmanaḥ_paramātman jīvātmanām_jīvātman ca_ca nitya--_nitya tvāt_tva ātmā_ātman na_na atra_atra śrutayaḥ_śruti nityaḥ_nitya nityānām_nitya cetanaḥ_cetana cetanānām_cetana ekaḥ_eka bahūnām_bahu yaḥ_yad vidadhāti_vidhā kāmān_kāma iti_iti ādyāḥ_ādya

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam asthāna--_asthāna śoci--_śocin tvāt_tva apāṇḍityam_apāṇḍitya arjunasya_arjuna āpādya_āpāday tattva--_tattva jijñāsum_jijñāsu niyojita--_niyojay añjalim_añjali tam_tad prati_prati sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara bhagavān_bhagavant nityaḥ_nitya nityānām_nitya cetanaḥ_cetana cetanānām_cetana ekaḥ_eka bahūnām_bahu yaḥ_yad vidadhāti_vidhā kāmān_kāma svasmāt_sva jīvānām_jīva ca_ca pāramarthikam_pāramarthika bhedam_bheda āha_ah na_na tu_tu eva_eva aham_mad iti_iti he_he sarva--_sarva īśvaraḥ_īśvara bhagavān_bhagavant itas_itas pūrvasmin_pūrva ādau_ādi kāle_kāla jātu_jātu kadācid_kadācid na_na āsam_as iti_iti na_na api_api tu_tu āsam_as eva_eva tathā_tathā tvam_tvad arjunaḥ_arjuna na_na āsīḥ_as iti_iti na_na kintu_kiṃtu āsīḥ_as eva_eva ime_idam janādhipāḥ_janādhipa rājānaḥ_rājan na_na āsan_as iti_iti na_na kintu_kiṃtu āsan_as eva_eva tathā_tathā itas_itas parasmin_para ante_anta kāle_kāla sarve_sarva vayam_mad aham_mad ca_ca tvam_tvad ca_ca ime_idam ca_ca na_na bhaviṣyāmaḥ_bhū iti_iti na_na kintu_kiṃtu bhaviṣyāmaḥ_bhū eva_eva iti_iti sarveśvara--_sarveśvara vat_vat jīvānām_jīva ca_ca traikālika--_traikālika sattā--_sattā yogitvāt_yogitva tad--_tad viṣayakaḥ_viṣayaka na_na śokaḥ_śoka yuktaḥ_yuj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na ca_ca avidyā--_avidyā kṛta--_kṛ tvāt_tva vyavahārikaḥ_vyavahārika ayam_idam bhedaḥ_bheda sarvajñe_sarvajña bhagavati_bhagavant avidyā--_avidyā yogāt_yoga idam_idam jñānam_jñāna upāśritya_upāśri iti_iti ādinā_ādi mokṣe_mokṣa api_api tasya_tad abhidāsyamāna--_abhidā tvāt_tva ca_ca na_na ca_ca abheda--_abheda jñasya_jña api_api hareḥ_hari bādhita--_bādh anuvṛtti--_anuvṛtti nyāyena_nyāya iyam_idam arjuna--_arjuna ādi--_ādi bheda--_bheda dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi iti_iti vācyam_vac tathā_tathā sati_as upadeśa--_upadeśa asiddheḥ_asiddhi maru--_maru marīcika--_marīcika ādau_ādi udaka--_udaka buddhiḥ_buddhi bādhitā_bādh api_api anuvartamānā_anuvṛt mithyārtha--_mithyārtha viṣaya--_viṣaya tva--_tva niścayāt_niścaya na_na udaka--_udaka āharaṇa--_āharaṇa ādau_ādi pravartayet_pravartay evam_evam abheda--_abheda bodha--_bodha bādhitā_bādh api_api anuvartamānā_anuvṛt arjuna--_arjuna ādi--_ādi bheda--_bheda dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi yat_yad kiñcid_kaścit etat_etad

nanu_nanu phalavati_phalavat ajñāte_ajñāta arthe_artha śāstra--_śāstra tātparya--_tātparya vīkṣaṇāt_vīkṣaṇa tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa abhedaḥ_abheda tātparya--_tātparya viṣayaḥ_viṣaya vaiphalyāt_vaiphalya jñāta--_jñā tvāt_tva ca_ca bhedaḥ_bheda tad--_tad viṣayaḥ_viṣaya na_na syāt_as kintu_kiṃtu adbhyaḥ_ap vai_vai eṣa_etad prātar_prātar udeti_udi apaḥ_ap sāyam_sāyam praviśati_praviś iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti arthavat_arthavat anuvādyaḥ_anuvāday eva_eva saḥ_tad iti_iti ced_ced mandam_manda etat_etad pṛthak_pṛthak ātmānam_ātman preritāram_preritṛ ca_ca matvā_man juṣṭaḥ_juṣ tatas_tatas tena_tad amṛta--_amṛta tvam_tva eti_i iti_iti ādinā_ādi bhedaḥ_bheda eva_eva amṛta--_amṛta tva--_tva phala--_phala śravaṇāt_śravaṇa viruddha--_virudh dharma--_dharma avacchinna--_avacchid pratiyogika--_pratiyogika tayā_tā loke_loka tasya_tad ajñāta--_ajñāta tvāt_tva ca_ca te_tad ca_ca dharmāḥ_dharma vibhu--_vibhu tva--_tva aṇu--_aṇu tva--_tva svāmi--_svāmin tva--_tva bhṛtya--_bhṛtya tva--_tva ādayaḥ_ādi śāstra--_śāstra eka--_eka gamyāḥ_gam mithas_mithas viruddhāḥ_virudh bodhyāḥ_budh abhedaḥ_abheda tu_tu aphalaḥ_aphala tatra_tatra phala--_phala anaṅgīkārāt_anaṅgīkāra a_a jñātaḥ_jñā ca_ca śaśa--_śaśa śṛṅga--_śṛṅga vat_vat a_a sattvāt_sattva tasmāt_tasmāt paramārthikaḥ_paramārthika tad--_tad bhedaḥ_bheda siddhaḥ_sidh
BhG 2.13

lg.l: dehinaḥ_dehin asmin_idam yathā_yathā dehe_deha kaumāram_kaumāra yauvanam_yauvana jarā_jarā
tathā_tathā deha--_deha antara--_antara prāptiḥ_prāpti dhīraḥ_dhīra tatra_tatra na_na muhyati_muh

div.p: tatra_tatra āha_ah dehinaḥ_dehin iti_iti ādi_ādi dehinaḥ_dehin deha--_deha abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin jīvasya_jīva yathā_yathā asmin_idam sthūla--_sthūla dehe_deha kaumāra--_kaumāra ādi--_ādi avasthāḥ_avasthā tad--_tad deha--_deha nibandhanāḥ_nibandhana eva_eva na_na tu_tu svatas_svatas vasthā--_vasthā antara--_antara utpattau_utpatti api_api saḥ_tad eva_eva aham_mad iti_iti pratyabhijñānāt_pratyabhijñāna tathā_tathā eva_eva etad--_etad deha--_deha nāśe_nāśa deha--_deha antara--_antara prāptiḥ_prāpti api_api liṅga--_liṅga deha--_deha nibandhanā_nibandhana eva_eva na_na tāvat_tāvat ātmanaḥ_ātman nāśaḥ_nāśa jāta--_jan mātrasya_mātra pūrva--_pūrva saṃskāreṇa_saṃskāra stanya--_stanya pāna--_pāna ādau_ādi pravṛtti--_pravṛtti darśanāt_darśana atas_atas dhīraḥ_dhīra dhīmān_dhīmat tatra_tatra tayoḥ_tad deha--_deha nāśa--_nāśa utpattyoḥ_utpatti na_na muhyati_muh ātmā_ātman eva_eva mṛtaḥ_mṛ jātaḥ_jan ca_ca iti_iti na_na manyate_man
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana

syāt_as atas_atas teṣām_tad nāśe_nāśa śokaḥ_śoka syāt_as eva_eva iti_iti ced_ced atas_atas āha_ah dehinaḥ_dehin iti_iti dehinaḥ_dehin jīvasya_jīva asmin_idam dehe_deha kaumāra_kaumāra kaumāram_kaumāra kaumāra--_kaumāra prāptiḥ_prāpti bhavati_bhū tatas_tatas kaumāra--_kaumāra nāśa--_nāśa anantaram_anantaram jarā--_jarā prāptiḥ_prāpti yathā_yathā tathā_tathā eva_eva deha--_deha antara--_antara prāptiḥ_prāpti iti_iti tatas_tatas ca_ca ātma--_ātman sambandhinām_sambandhin kaumāra--_kaumāra ādīnām_ādi prīti--_prīti āspadānām_āspada nāśe_nāśa yathā_yathā śokaḥ_śoka na_na kriyate_kṛ tathā_tathā dehasya_deha api_api ātma--_ātman sambandhinaḥ_sambandhin prīti--_prīti āspadasya_āspada nāśe_nāśa śokaḥ_śoka na_na kartavyaḥ_kṛ yauvanasya_yauvana nāśe_nāśa jarā--_jarā prāptau_prāpti śokaḥ_śoka jāyate_jan iti_iti ced_ced kaumārasya_kaumāra nāśe_nāśa yauvana--_yauvana prāptau_prāpti harṣaḥ_harṣa api_api jāyate_jan iti_iti atas_atas bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādīnām_ādi jīrṇa--_jṛ deha--_deha nāśe_nāśa khalu_khalu navya--_navya deha--_deha antara--_antara prāptau_prāpti tarhi_tarhi harṣaḥ_harṣa yat_yat vā_vā ekasmin_eka api_api dehe_deha kaumāra--_kaumāra ādīnām_ādi yathā_yathā prāptiḥ_prāpti tathā_tathā eva_eva ekasya_eka api_api dehinaḥ_dehin jīvasya_jīva nānā_nānā dehānām_deha prāptiḥ_prāpti iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādi--_ādi deha--_deha avacchinnānām_avacchid ātmanām_ātman nitya--_nitya tve_tva api_api tad--_tad dehānām_deha tad--_tad bhogāyatanānām_bhogāyatana nāśe_nāśa yuktaḥ_yuj śokaḥ_śoka iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah dehinaḥ_dehin asmin_idam iti_iti traikālikāḥ_traikālika bahavaḥ_bahu dehāḥ_deha yasya_yad santi_as tasya_tad dehinaḥ_dehin jīvasya_jīva asmin_idam vartamāne_vṛt dehe_deha kramāt_kramāt kaumāra--_kaumāra yauvana--_yauvana jarāḥ_jarā tisraḥ_tri avasthāḥ_avasthā bhavanti_bhū tāsām_tad ātma--_ātman sambandhinām_sambandhin tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga upayuktānām_upayuj pūrva--_pūrva pūrva--_pūrva vināśena_vināśa para--_para para--_para prāptau_prāpti yathā_yathā na_na śokaḥ_śoka tathā_tathā eva_eva tad--_tad deha--_deha vināśe_vināśa sati_as deha--_deha antara--_antara prāptiḥ_prāpti yayāti--_yayāti yauvana--_yauvana prāpti--_prāpti nyāyena_nyāya harṣa--_harṣa hetuḥ_hetu tad--_tad deha--_deha vināśa--_vināśa hetukaḥ_hetuka śokaḥ_śoka tava_tvad ucitaḥ_ucita iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva dhīraḥ_dhīra dhīmān_dhīmat deha--_deha svabhāva--_svabhāva jīva--_jīva karma--_karman vipāka--_vipāka svarūpa--_svarūpa jñaḥ_jña atra_atra dehinaḥ_dehin iti_iti eka--_eka vacanam_vacana jāti--_jāti abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya bodhyam_budh pūrvatra_pūrvatra ātma--_ātman bahutva--_bahutva ukteḥ_ukti

atra_atra āhuḥ_ah ekaḥ_eka eva_eva viśuddha--_viśudh ātmā_ātman tasya_tad avidyayā_avidyā aparicchinnasya_aparicchinna tasyām_tad pratibimbitasya_pratibimb vā_vā nānā_nānā ātma--_ātman tvam_tva śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah ākāśam_ākāśa ekam_eka hi_hi yathā_yathā ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādiṣu_ādi pṛthak_pṛthak bhavet_bhū tathā_tathā ātmā_ātman ekaḥ_eka hi_hi aneka--_aneka sthaḥ_stha jala--_jala ādhāreṣu_ādhāra iva_iva aṃśumān_aṃśumant iti_iti tad--_tad vijñānena_vijñāna tasya_tad vināśe_vināśa tu_tu tad--_tad nānātva--_nānātva nivṛttyā_nivṛtti tad--_tad aikyam_aikya sidhyati_sidh iti_iti eka--_eka vacanena_vacana etat_etad pārtha--_pārtha sārathiḥ_sārathi āha_ah iti_iti tat_tad mandam_manda jaḍayā_jaḍa tayā_tad caitanya--_caitanya rāśeḥ_rāśi cheda--_cheda asambhavāt_asaṃbhava taiḥ_tad api_api tad--_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya tva--_tva anaṅgīkārāt_anaṅgīkāra ca_ca vāstave_vāstava chede_cheda vikāri--_vikārin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi āpattiḥ_āpatti ṭaṅka--_ṭaṅka chinna--_chid pāṣāṇa--_pāṣāṇa vat_vat syāt_as nīrūpasya_nīrūpa vibhoḥ_vibhu pratibimba--_pratibimba asambhavāt_asaṃbhava ca_ca anyathā_anyathā ākāśa--_ākāśa ādi--_ādi ga--_ga ādīnām_ādi tad--_tad āpattiḥ_āpatti na_na ca_ca pratīti--_pratīti anyathā_anyathā anupapattiḥ_anupapatti eva_eva ākāśasya_ākāśa pratibimbe_pratibimba mānam_māna tad--_tad varti--_vartin graha--_graha nakṣatra--_nakṣatra prabhā--_prabhā maṇḍalam_maṇḍala bhāsamāna--_bhās tvena_tva pratīteḥ_pratīti ākāśam_ākāśa ekam_eka hi_hi iti_iti śrutiḥ_śruti tu_tu paramātma--_paramātman viṣayā_viṣaya tasya_tad ākāśa--_ākāśa vat_vat sūrya--_sūrya vat_vat ca_ca bahu--_bahu vṛttika--_vṛttika tvam_tva vadati_vad iti_iti aviruddham_aviruddha na_na ca_ca ātma--_ātman aikyasya_aikya upadeṣṭā_upadeṣṭṛ sambhavati_sambhū sa_tad hi_hi tattva--_tattva vid_vid na_na vā_vā ādye_ādya advitīyam_advitīya ātmānam_ātman vijānataḥ_vijñā tasya_tad upadeśya--_upadiś a_a parisphūrtiḥ_parisphūrti bādhita--_bādh anuvṛtti--_anuvṛtti āśrayaṇam_āśrayaṇa tu_tu pūrva--_pūrva nirastam_niras
BhG 2.14

lg.l: mātrā--_mātrā sparśāḥ_sparśa tu_tu kaunteya_kaunteya śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha dāḥ_da
āgama--_āgama apāyinaḥ_apāyin anityāḥ_anitya tān_tad titikṣasva_titikṣ bhārata_bhārata

div.p: āha_ah mīyante_mā jāyante_jan viṣayāḥ_viṣaya ābhiḥ_idam iti_iti mātrāḥ_mātrā indriya--_indriya vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti tāsām_tad sparśāḥ_sparśa viṣayeṣu_viṣaya sambaddhāḥ_sambandh te_tad śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi pradāḥ_prada bhavanti_bhū te_tad tu_tu āgama--_āgama apāyi--_apāyin tvāt_tva anityāḥ_anitya asthirāḥ_asthira tān_tad titikṣasva_titikṣ sahasva_sah yathā_yathā jala--_jala ātapa--_ātapa ādi--_ādi saṃsargāḥ_saṃsarga tad--_tad tad--_tad kāla--_kāla kṛtāḥ_kṛ svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi_ādi prayacchanti_prayam evam_evam iṣṭa--_iṣ saṃyoga--_saṃyoga viyogāḥ_viyoga api_api sukha--_sukha duḥkhāni_duḥkha prayacchanti_prayam teṣām_tad ca_ca asthira--_asthira tvāt_tva sahanam_sahana tava_tvad tad--_tad nimitta--_nimitta harṣa--_harṣa viṣāda--_viṣāda pāravaśyam_pāravaśya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tat_tad api_api avivekinaḥ_avivekin mama_mad manaḥ_manas eva_eva anarthakāni_anarthaka śoka--_śoka moha--_moha vyāptam_vyāp duḥkhayati_duḥkhay iti_iti tatra_tatra na_na kevalam_kevala ekam_eka manaḥ_manas eva_eva api_api tu_tu manasaḥ_manas vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti api_api sarvāḥ_sarva tu_tu agādi--_agādi indriya--_indriya rūpāḥ_rūpa sva--_sva viṣayān_viṣaya anubhāvya_anubhāvay anartha--_anartha kāriṇyaḥ_kārin iti_iti āha_ah mātrāḥ_mātrā indriya--_indriya grāhya--_grah viṣayāḥ_viṣaya teṣām_tad sparśāḥ_sparśa śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa iti_iti āgama--_āgama apāyinaḥ_apāyin iti_iti yat_yad eva_eva śītala--_śītala jala--_jala ādikam_ādika uṣṇa--_uṣṇa kāle_kāla sukha--_sukha dam_da tat_tad eva_eva śīta--_śīta kāle_kāla duḥkha--_duḥkha dam_da atas_atas aniyata--_aniyata tvāt_tva āgama--_āgama apāyi--_apāyin tvāt_tva ca_ca tān_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya anubhavān_anubhava titikṣasva_titikṣ sahasva_sah teṣām_tad sahanam_sahana eva_eva śāstra--_śāstra vihitaḥ_vidhā dharmaḥ_dharma nahi_nahi māghe_māgha māsi_mās jalasya_jala duḥkha--_duḥkha tva--_tva buddhyā_buddhi eva_eva śāstre_śāstra vihitaḥ_vidhā snāna--_snāna rūpaḥ_rūpa dharmaḥ_dharma tyajyate_tyaj dharmaḥ_dharma eva_eva kāle_kāla sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha nivartakaḥ_nivartaka bhavati_bhū evam_evam eva_eva ye_yad putra--_putra bhrātra--_bhrātṛ ādya--_ādya utpatti--_utpatti kāle_kāla dhana--_dhana ādi--_ādi upārjana--_upārjana kāle_kāla ca_ca sukha--_sukha dāḥ_da te_tad eva_eva mṛtyu--_mṛtyu kāle_kāla duḥkha--_duḥkha dāḥ_da āgama--_āgama apāyinaḥ_apāyin anityāḥ_anitya tān_tad api_api titikṣasva_titikṣ na_na tu_tu tad--_tad anurodhena_anurodha yuddha--_yuddha rūpaḥ_rūpa śāstra--_śāstra vihitaḥ_vidhā sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma tyājyaḥ_tyaj vihita--_vidhā dharma--_dharma an_an ācaraṇam_ācaraṇa khalu_khalu kāle_kāla mahā--_mahat anartha--_anartha kṛt_kṛt eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi mṛtāḥ_mṛ katham_katham bhaviṣyanti_bhū iti_iti tad--_tad duḥkha--_duḥkha nimittaḥ_nimitta śokaḥ_śoka mā_mā tad--_tad viccheda--_viccheda duḥkha--_duḥkha nimittaḥ_nimitta tu_tu me_mad mana--_mana prabhṛtīni_prabhṛti pradahanti_pradah iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah mātrā--_mātrā iti_iti mātrāḥ_mātrā tu_tu a_a c--_c ādi--_ādi indriya--_indriya vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti mīyante_mā paricchidyante_paricchid viṣayāḥ_viṣaya abhiḥ_idam iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti sparśāḥ_sparśa tābhiḥ_tad viṣayāṇām_viṣaya anubhava--_anubhava ante_anta khalu_khalu śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha dāḥ_da bhavanti_bhū yat_yad eva_eva śītalam_śītala udakam_udaka grīṣme_grīṣma sukha--_sukha dam_da tat_tad eva_eva hemante_hemanta duḥkha--_duḥkha dam_da iti_iti atas_atas aniyata--_aniyata tvāt_tva āgama--_āgama apāyi--_apāyin tvāt_tva ca_ca anityān_anitya asthirān_asthira tān_tad titikṣasva_titikṣ sahasva_sah etat_etad uktam_vac bhavati_bhū māgha--_māgha snānam_snāna duḥkha--_duḥkha karam_kara api_api dharmatayā_dharmatā vidhānāt_vidhāna yathā_yathā kriyate_kṛ tathā_tathā bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādibhiḥ_ādi saha_saha yuddham_yuddha duḥkha--_duḥkha karam_kara api_api tathā_tathā vidhānāt_vidhāna kāryam_kṛ eva_eva tatratyaḥ_tatratya duḥkha--_duḥkha anubhavaḥ_anubhava tu_tu āgantukaḥ_āgantuka dharma--_dharma siddha--_sidh tvāt_tva soḍhavyaḥ_sah dharmāt_dharma jñāna--_jñāna udayena_udaya mokṣa--_mokṣa lābhe_lābha tu_tu uttaratra_uttaratra tasya_tad nā_na anuvṛttiḥ_anuvṛtti ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā paripākam_paripāka vinā_vinā eva_eva dharma--_dharma tyāgaḥ_tyāga tu_tu anartha--_anartha hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti kaunteya_kaunteya bhārata_bhārata iti_iti padābhyām_pada ubhaya--_ubhaya kula--_kula śuddhasya_śudh te_tvad dharma--_dharma bhraṃśaḥ_bhraṃśa na_na ucitaḥ_ucita iti_iti sūcyate_sūcay
BhG 2.15

lg.l: yam_yad hi_hi na_na vyathayanti_vyathay ete_etad puruṣam_puruṣa puruṣa--_puruṣa ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha
sama--_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukham_sukha dhīram_dhīra saḥ_tad amṛta--_amṛta tvāya_tva kalpate_kﾱp

div.p: āha_ah ete_etad mātrā--_mātrā sparśāḥ_sparśa yam_yad puruṣam_puruṣa na_na vyathayanti_vyathay na_na abhibhavanti_abhibhū same_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhe_sukha sa_tad tam_tad sa_tad taiḥ_tad a_a vikṣipyamāṇaḥ_vikṣip dharma--_dharma jñāna--_jñāna dvārā_dvār amṛta--_amṛta tvāya_tva mokṣāya_mokṣa kalpate_kﾱp yogyaḥ_yogya bhavati_bhū
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana
duḥkhayanti_duḥkhay duḥkhayanti_duḥkhay āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva dharma--_dharma artha--_artha duḥkha--_duḥkha sahana--_sahana abhyāsasya_abhyāsa uttaratra_uttaratra sukha--_sukha hetu--_hetu tvam_tva darśayan_darśay āha_ah yam_yad hi_hi iti_iti ete_etad mātrā--_mātrā sparśāḥ_sparśa priya--_priya apriya--_apriya viṣaya--_viṣaya anubhāvāḥ_anubhāva yam_yad dhīram_dhīra dhiyam_dhī īrayati_īray dharmeṣu_dharma iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti dharma--_dharma niṣṭham_niṣṭha puruṣam_puruṣa na_na vyathayanti_vyathay sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha mūrcchitam_mūrchay na_na kurvanti_kṛ saḥ_tad amṛta--_amṛta tvāya_tva na_na tu_tu tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa duḥkha--_duḥkha sukha--_sukha mūrcchitaḥ_mūrchay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha uktam_vac artham_artha sphuṭayan_sphuṭay puruṣam_puruṣa viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ sama--_sama iti_iti dharma--_dharma anuṣṭhānasya_anuṣṭhāna kaṣṭa--_kaṣṭa sādhya--_sādhay tvāt_tva duḥkham_duḥkha anuṣaṅga--_anuṣaṅga labdham_labh sukham_sukha ca_ca yasya_yad samam_sama bhavati_bhū tābhyām_tad
mukha--_mukha mlānita--_mlānita ullāsa--_ullāsa rahitam_rahita iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 2.16

lg.l: na_na asataḥ_asat vidyate_vid bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na abhāvaḥ_abhāva vidyate_vid sataḥ_as
ubhayoḥ_ubhaya api_api dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś antaḥ_anta tu_tu anayoḥ_idam tattva--_tattva darśibhiḥ_darśin

div.p: atyantam_atyantam tad--_tad sahane_sahana ca_ca kadācid_kadācid deha--_deha nāśaḥ_nāśa syāt_as iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk tattva--_tattva vicārataḥ_vicāra sarvam_sarva soḍhum_sah śakyam_śakya iti_iti āśayena_āśaya āha_ah na_na asataḥ_asat vidyate_vid iti_iti asataḥ_asat anātma--_anātman dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva avidyamānasya_avidyamāna śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādeḥ_ādi ātmani_ātman bhāvaḥ_bhāva sattā_sattā na_na vidyate_vid tathā_tathā sataḥ_as sat--_as svabhāvasya_svabhāva ātmanaḥ_ātman abhāvaḥ_abhāva nāśaḥ_nāśa na_na vidyate_vid evam_evam ubhayoḥ_ubhaya sat--_as asatoḥ_asat antaḥ_anta nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś kaiḥ_ka tattva--_tattva darśibhiḥ_darśin vastu--_vastu yāthārthya--_yāthārthya vedibhiḥ_vedin evambhūta--_evambhūta vivekena_viveka sahasva_sah iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana

vastutas_vastutas tu_tu a_a saṅgaḥ_saṅga hi_hi ayam_idam puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman ca_ca sthūla--_sthūla sūkṣma--_sūkṣma dehābhyām_deha tad--_tad dharmaiḥ_dharma śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādibhiḥ_ādi ca_ca sambandhaḥ_sambandha na_na asti_as eva_eva tad--_tad sambandhasya_sambandha avidyā_avidyā kalpita--_kalpay tvāt_tva iti_iti āha_ah na_na iti_iti asataḥ_asat anātma--_anātman dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva ātmani_ātman jīve_jīva avartamānasya_avartamāna śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādeḥ_ādi tad--_tad āśrayasya_āśraya dehasya_deha ca_ca bhāvaḥ_bhāva sattā_sattā na_na asti_as tathā_tathā sataḥ_as satya--_satya rūpasya_rūpa jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman abhāvaḥ_abhāva nāśaḥ_nāśa na_na asti_as tasmāt_tasmāt ubhayoḥ_ubhaya etayoḥ_etad asat--_asat satoḥ_as antaḥ_anta nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya ayam_idam dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś tena_tena bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādiṣu_ādi tvad--_tvad ādiṣu_ādi ca_ca jīvātmasu_jīvātman satya--_satya tvāt_tva anaśvareṣu_anaśvara deha--_deha daihika--_daihika viveka--_viveka śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādayaḥ_ādi na_na eva_eva santi_as katham_katham bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi naṅkṣanti_naś katham_katham
vā_vā tān_tad tvam_tvad śocasi_śuc iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad evam_evam bhagavatā_bhagavat pārthasya_pārtha asthāna--_asthāna aśoci--_aśoci tvena_tva tat_tad pāṇḍityam_pāṇḍitya ākṣiptam_ākṣip śoka--_śoka haram_hara ca_ca sva--_sva upāsanam_upāsana eva_eva tat_tad ca_ca upāsā--_upāsā upāsaka--_upāsaka bheda--_bheda ghaṭitam_ghaṭay iti_iti upāsyāt_upās jīva--_jīva aṃśinaḥ_aṃśin svasmāt_sva upāsakānām_upāsaka jīvāṃśānām_jīvāṃśa tāttvikam_tāttvika dvaitam_dvaita upadiṣṭam_upadiś atha_atha yat_yat ātma--_ātman tattvena_tattva tu_tu brahma--_brahman tattvam_tattva dīpa--_dīpa upamena_upama iha_iha yuktaḥ_yuj prapaśyet_prapaś iti_iti ādau_ādi aṃśa--_aṃśa svarūpa--_svarūpa jñānasya_jñāna aṃśi--_aṃśin svarūpa--_svarūpa jñāna--_jñāna upayogi--_upayogin tva--_tva śravaṇāt_śravaṇa tat_tad ādau_ādi saniṣṭha--_saniṣṭha ādīn_ādi sarvān_sarva prati_prati vaidharmya--_vaidharmya dhiyam_dhī antarā_antarā na_na syāt_as iti_iti tad--_tad vaidharmya--_vaidharmya bodhāya_bodha ārabhyate_ārabh na_na āsate_ās iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi asataḥ_asat pariṇāminaḥ_pariṇāmin deha--_deha ādeḥ_ādi bhāvaḥ_bhāva apariṇāmi--_apariṇāmin tvam_tva na_na vidyate_vid sataḥ_as a_a pariṇāminaḥ_pariṇāmin ātmanaḥ_ātman tu_tu abhāvaḥ_abhāva pariṇāmi--_pariṇāmin tvam_tva na_na vidyate_vid deha--_deha ātmānau_ātman pariṇāma--_pariṇāma apariṇāma--_apariṇāma svabhāvau_svabhāva bhavataḥ_bhū evam_evam ubhayoḥ_ubhaya asat--_asat sat--_as śabditayoḥ_śabday deha--_deha ātmanoḥ_ātman antaḥ_anta nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya tattva--_tattva darśibhiḥ_darśin tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya svabhāva--_svabhāva vedibhiḥ_vedin puruṣaiḥ_puruṣa dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś anubhūtaḥ_anubhū atra_atra asat--_asat śabdena_śabda vinaśvaram_vinaśvara deha--_deha ādi_ādi jaḍam_jaḍa sat--_as śabdena_śabda tu_tu avinaśvaram_avinaśvara ātma--_ātman caitanyam_caitanya ucyate_vac evam_evam eva_eva śrī--_śrī viṣṇu--_viṣṇu purāṇe_purāṇa api_api nirṇītam_nirṇī dṛṣṭam_dṛś jyotīṃṣi_jyotis viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu bhuvanāni_bhuvana viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu iti_iti upakramya_upakram yat_yad asti_as yat_yad na_na asti_as ca_ca vipra--_vipra varya_varya iti_iti asti_as nāsti--_nāsti śabda--_śabda vācyayoḥ_vac cetana--_cetana jaḍayoḥ_jaḍa tathātvam_tathātva vastu_vastu asti_as kim_ka kutradcid_kutradcid iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay tatra_tatra na_na asti_as śabda--_śabda vācyam_vācya jaḍam_jaḍa caitanyam_caitanya vivṛtam_vivṛ yat_yad tu_tu sat--_sat kārya--_kārya vāda--_vāda sthāpanāyai_sthāpanā tat_tad padyam_padya iti_iti āhuḥ_ah tat_tad niravadhānam_niravadhāna deha--_deha ātma--_ātman svabhāva--_svabhāva anabhijñāna--_anabhijñāna mohitam_mohay prati_prati tad--_tad moha--_moha vinivṛttaye_vinivṛtti tad--_tad svabhāva--_svabhāva abhijñāpanasya_abhijñāpana prakṛta--_prakṛ tvāt_tva
BhG 2.17

lg.l: avināśi_avināśin tu_tu tat_tad viddhi_vid yena_yad sarvam_sarva idam_idam tatam_tan
vināśam_vināśa avyayasya_avyaya asya_idam na_na kaścid_kaścit kartum_kṛ arhati_arh

div.p: viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā āha_ah
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha na_na abhāvaḥ_abhāva vidyate_vid sataḥ_as iti_iti asya_idam artham_artha spaṣṭayati_spaṣṭay avināśi_avināśin iti_iti tam_tad jīvātma--_jīvātman svarūpam_svarūpa yena_yad sarvam_sarva idam_idam śarīram_śarīra tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp nanu_nanu śarīra--_śarīra mātra--_mātra vyāpi--_vyāpin caitanya--_caitanya tve_tva jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman madhyama--_madhyama parimāṇa--_parimāṇa tvena_tva anitya--_anitya tva--_tva prasaktiḥ_prasakti mā_mā evam_evam sūkṣmāṇām_sūkṣma api_api aham_mad jīvaḥ_jīva iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant ukteḥ_ukti eṣā_etad uṇuḥ_uṇu ātmā_ātman cetasā_cetas veditavyaḥ_vid yasmin_yad prāṇaḥ_prāṇa pañcadhā_pañcadhā saṃviveśa_saṃviś iti_iti
bālāgra--_bālāgra śata--_śata bhāgasya_bhāga śatadhā_śatadhā kalpitasya_kalpay ca_ca bhāgaḥ_bhāga jīvaḥ_jīva sa_tad vijñeyaḥ_vijñā iti_iti

ārā--_ārā agra--_agra mātraḥ_mātra hi_hi aparaḥ_apara api_api dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś iti_iti śrutibhyaḥ_śruti ca_ca tasya_tad paramāṇu--_paramāṇu parimāṇa--_parimāṇa tvam_tva eva_eva tat_tad api_api sampūrṇa--_sampṛ deha--_deha vyāpi--_vyāpin śaktimattvam_śaktimattva jatu--_jatu jaṭitasya_jaṭ mahā--_mahat maṇeḥ_maṇi mahā--_mahat oṣadhi--_oṣadhi khaṇḍasya_khaṇḍa vā_vā śirasi_śiras urasi_uras vā_vā dhṛtasya_dhṛ sampūrṇa--_sampṛ deha--_deha puṣṭi--_puṣṭi karaṇa--_karaṇa śaktimattvam_śaktimattva iva_iva na_na asamañjasam_asamañjasa svarga--_svarga naraka--_naraka nānā_nānā yoniṣu_yoni gamanam_gamana ca_ca tasya_tad upādhi--_upādhi pāravaśyāt_pāravaśya eva_eva tat_tad uktam_vac prāṇam_prāṇa adhikṛtya_adhikṛ dattā--_dattā trayeṇa_traya yena_yad saṃsarate_saṃsṛ pumān_puṃs iti_iti ataeva_ataeva asya_idam sarva--_sarva gata--_gam tvam_tva api_api agrima--_agrima śloke_śloka vakṣyamāṇam_vac nā_na asamañjasam_asamañjasa ataeva_ataeva avyayasya_avyaya nityasya_nitya nityaḥ_nitya nityānām_nitya cetanaḥ_cetana cetanānām_cetana ekaḥ_eka bahūnām_bahu yaḥ_yad vidadhāti_vidhā kāmān_kāma iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

yat_yad vā_vā nanu_nanu dehaḥ_deha jīvātmā_jīvātman paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti etat_etad vastu--_vastu trikam_trika manuṣya--_manuṣya tiryak--_tiryañc ādiṣu_ādi sarvatra_sarvatra dṛśyate_dṛś tatra_tatra ādyayoḥ_ādya deha--_deha jīvayoḥ_jīva tattvam_tattva na_na asataḥ_asat vidyate_vid bhāvaḥ_bhāva iti_iti anena_idam uktam_vac tṛtīyasya_tṛtīya paramātma--_paramātman vastunaḥ_vastu kim_ka tattvam_tattva iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah avināśi_avināśin tu_tu iti_iti tu_tu bhinna--_bhid upakrame_upakrama

viśadayati_viśaday tat_tad jīvātma--_jīvātman tattvam_tattva avināśi_avināśin nityam_nitya viddhi_vid yena_yad sarvam_sarva idam_idam śarīram_śarīra tatam_tan dharma--_dharma bhūtena_bhū jñānena_jñāna vyāptam_vyāp asti_as asya_idam avyayasya_avyaya parma--_parman aṇu--_aṇu tvena_tva ca_ca vināśa--_vināśa anarhasya_anarha vināśam_vināśa na_na kaścid_kaścit sthūlaḥ_sthūla arthaḥ_artha kartum_kṛ arhati_arh prāṇasya_prāṇa iva_iva dehaḥ_deha iha_iha jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman deha--_deha parimita--_parimā tvam_tva na_na pratyetavyam_pratī eṣaḥ_etad aṇuḥ_aṇu ātmā_ātman cetasā_cetas veditavyaḥ_vid yasmin_yad prāṇaḥ_prāṇa pañcadhā_pañcadhā saṃviveśa_saṃviś iti_iti ādiṣu_ādi tasya_tad parama--_parama aṇu--_aṇu tva--_tva śravaṇāt_śravaṇa tādṛśasya_tādṛśa nikhila--_nikhila deha--_deha vyāptiḥ_vyāpti tu_tu dharma--_dharma bhūta--_bhū jñānena_jñāna eva_eva syāt_as evam_evam āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra guṇāt_guṇa vā_vā āloka--_āloka vat_vat iti_iti iha_iha api_api svayam_svayam vakṣyati_vac yathā_yathā prakāśayati_prakāśay ekaḥ_eka iti_iti ādinā_ādi
BhG 2.18

lg.l: antavantaḥ_antavat ime_idam dehāḥ_deha nityasya_nitya uktāḥ_vac śarīriṇaḥ_śarīrin
anāśinaḥ_anāśin aprameyasya_aprameya tasmāt_tasmāt yudhyasva_yudh bhārata_bhārata

div.p: sandarśyati_saṃdarśay antaḥ_anta vināśaḥ_vināśa vidyate_vid yeṣām_yad te_tad antavantaḥ_antavat nityasya_nitya sarvadā_sarvadā eka--_eka rūpasya_rūpa śarīriṇaḥ_śarīrin śarīravataḥ_śarīravat ataeva_ataeva anāśinaḥ_anāśin vināśa--_vināśa rahitasya_rahita aprameyasya_aprameya aparicchinnasya_aparicchinna ātmanaḥ_ātman ime_idam sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi dharmaka--_dharmaka dehāḥ_deha uktāḥ_vac tattva--_tattva darśibhiḥ_darśin yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam ātmanaḥ_ātman na_na vināśaḥ_vināśa na_na ca_ca sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi sambandhaḥ_sambandha tasmāt_tasmāt moha--_moha jam_ja tyaktvā_tyaj yudhyasva_yudh svadharmam_svadharma mā_mā tyakṣīḥ_tyaj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu sphuraṇa--_sphuraṇa rūpasya_rūpa sataḥ_as katham_katham avināśi--_avināśin tvam_tva tasya_tad deha--_deha dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva dehasya_deha ca_ca anu_anu kṣaṇa--_kṣaṇa vināśāt_vināśa iti_iti bhūta--_bhūta caitanya--_caitanya vādinaḥ_vādin tān_tad nirākurvan_nirākṛ āsataḥ_asat vidyate_vid bhāvaḥ_bhāva iti_iti etat_etad antavantaḥ_antavat vināśinaḥ_vināśin ime_idam aparokṣāḥ_aparokṣa dehāḥ_deha upacita--_upaci apacita--_apaci rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva śarīrāṇi_śarīra bahu--_bahu vacanāt_vacana sthūla--_sthūla sūkṣma--_sūkṣma kāraṇa--_kāraṇa rūpāḥ_rūpa virāj--_virāj sūtra--_sūtra avyākṛta--_avyākṛta ākhyāḥ_ākhyā samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi vyaṣṭi--_vyaṣṭi ātmanaḥ_ātman sarve_sarva nityasya_nitya avināśinaḥ_avināśin eva_eva śarīriṇaḥ_śarīrin ādhyāsika--_ādhyāsika sambandhena_sambandha śarīravataḥ_śarīravat ekasya_eka ātmanaḥ_ātman sva_sva bhogya--_bhuj tvena_tva ca_ca uktāḥ_vac śrutibhiḥ_śruti brahma--_brahman vādibhiḥ_vādin ca_ca tathā_tathā ca_ca taittirīyake_taittirīyaka anna--_anna maya--_maya ādi--_ādi ānanda--_ānanda maya--_maya anantān_ananta pañca_pañcan kośān_kośa kalpayitvā_kalpay tad--_tad adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna a_a kalpitam_kalpay brahma_brahman puccham_puccha pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti darśitam_darśay tatra_tatra pañcīkṛta--_pañcīkṛ pañca--_pañcan mahābhūta--_mahābhūta tad--_tad kārya--_kārya ātmakaḥ_ātmaka virāj--_virāj mūrta--_mūrch rāśiḥ_rāśi anna--_anna maya--_maya kośaḥ_kośa sthūla--_sthūla samaṣṭiḥ_samaṣṭi tad--_tad kāraṇī--_kāraṇī bhūtaḥ_bhū apañcīkṛta--_apañcīkṛta pañca--_pañcan mahā--_mahat bhūta--_bhūta tad--_tad kārya--_kārya ātmakaḥ_ātmaka hiraṇyagarbhaḥ_hiraṇyagarbha sūtram_sūtra amūrta--_amūrta rāśiḥ_rāśi sūkṣma--_sūkṣma samaṣṭiḥ_samaṣṭi trayam_traya vai_vai idam_idam nāma_nāman rūpam_rūpa karma_karman iti_iti bṛhat--_bṛhant āraṇyaka--_āraṇyaka ukta--_vac kriyā--_kriyā śakti--_śakti mātram_mātra ādāya_ādā prāṇa--_prāṇa maya--_maya kośaḥ_kośa uktaḥ_vac nāma--_nāman ātmaka--_ātmaka tvena_tva jñāna--_jñāna śakti--_śakti mātram_mātra ādāya_ādā manaḥ--_manas maya--_maya kośaḥ_kośa uktaḥ_vac rūpa--_rūpa ātmaka--_ātmaka tvena_tva tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya āśraya--_āśraya tayā_tā kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva ādāya_ādā vijñāna--_vijñāna maya--_maya kośaḥ_kośa uktaḥ_vac tatas_tatas prāṇa--_prāṇa maya--_maya manaḥ--_manas maya--_maya vijñāna--_vijñāna maya--_maya ātmā_ātman ekaḥ_eka eva_eva hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ākhyaḥ_ākhyā liṅga--_liṅga śarīra--_śarīra kośaḥ_kośa tad--_tad kāraṇībhūtaḥ_kāraṇībhū tu_tu māyā--_māyā upahita--_upadhā caitanya--_caitanya ātmā_ātman sarva--_sarva saṃskāra--_saṃskāra śeṣaḥ_śeṣa avyākṛta--_avyākṛta ākhyaḥ_ākhyā ānanda--_ānanda maya--_maya kośaḥ_kośa te_tad ca_ca sarve_sarva ekasya_eka eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman śarīrāṇi_śarīra iti_iti uktam_vac tasya_tad eṣaḥ_etad eva_eva śārīraḥ_śārīra ātmā_ātman yaḥ_yad pūrvasya_pūrva iti_iti tasya_tad prāṇa--_prāṇa mayasya_maya eṣaḥ_etad eva_eva śarīre_śarīra bhavaḥ_bhava śārīraḥ_śārīra ātmā_ātman yaḥ_yad satya--_satya jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa guhā--_guhā nihita--_nidhā tvena_tva uktaḥ_vac pūrvasya_pūrva anna--_anna mayasya_maya evam_evam prāṇa--_prāṇa maya--_maya manaḥ--_manas maya--_maya vijñāna--_vijñāna maya--_maya ānanda--_ānanda mayeṣu_maya yojyam_yuj

athavā_athavā ime_idam sarve_sarva dehāḥ_deha trailokya--_trailokya varti--_vartin sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin sambandhinaḥ_sambandhin ekasya_eka eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman uktāḥ_vac iti_iti yojanā_yojana tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti

lg.l: ekaḥ_eka devaḥ_deva sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta gūḍhaḥ_guh
sarva--_sarva vyāpī_vyāpin sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta antarātmā_antarātman
sākṣī_sākṣin kevalaḥ_kevala nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa ca_ca

div.p: iti_iti sarva--_sarva śarīra--_śarīra sambandhinam_sambandhin ekam_eka ātmānam_ātman nityam_nitya vibhum_vibhu darśayati_darśay

nanu_nanu nitya--_nitya tvam_tva yāvat--_yāvat kāla--_kāla sthāyi--_sthāyin tvam_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca avidyā--_avidyā ādi--_ādi vat_vat kālena_kāla saha_saha nāśe_nāśa api_api tad--_tad upapannam_upapad iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah anāśinaḥ_anāśin iti_iti deśataḥ_deśa kālataḥ_kāla vastutaḥ_vastu ca_ca paricchinasya_paricchid avidyā--_avidyā ādeḥ_ādi kalpita--_kalpay tvena_tva anitya--_anitya tve_tva api_api yāvat_yāvat kāla--_kāla sthāyi--_sthāyin svarūpam_svarūpa aupacārikam_aupacārika nitya--_nitya tvam_tva vyavahriyate_vyavahṛ yāvat_yāvat vikāram_vikāra tu_tu vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga loka--_loka vat_vat iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya ātmanaḥ_ātman tu_tu pariccheda--_pariccheda traya--_traya śūnyasya_śūnya akalpitasya_akalpita vināśa--_vināśa hetu--_hetu abhāvāt_abhāva mukhyam_mukhya eva_eva kūṭastha--_kūṭastha nitya--_nitya tvam_tva na_na tu_tu pariṇāmi--_pariṇāmin nitya--_nitya tvam_tva yāvat--_yāvat kāla--_kāla sthāyi--_sthāyin tvam_tva ca_ca iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

nanu_nanu etādṛśe_etādṛśa dehini_dehin kiṃcid_kaścit pramāṇam_pramāṇa avaśyam_avaśyam vācyam_vac anyathā_anyathā niṣpramāṇasya_niṣpramāṇa tasya_tad alīka--_alīka tva--_tva āpatteḥ_āpatti śāstra--_śāstra ārambha--_ārambha vaiyarthya--_vaiyarthya āpatteḥ_āpatti ca_ca tathā_tathā ca_ca vastu--_vastu paricchedaḥ_pariccheda duṣpariharaḥ_duṣparihara śāstra--_śāstra yoni--_yoni tvāt_tva iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya ca_ca atas_atas āha_ah aprameyasya_aprameya iti_iti ekadhā_ekadhā eva_eva anudraṣṭavyam_anudṛś etat_etad a_a pramayam_pramaya dhruvam_dhruva a_a pramayam_pramaya a_a prameyam_pramā

na_na tatra_tatra sūryaḥ_sūrya bhāti_bhā na_na candra--_candra tārakam_tāraka
na_na imāḥ_idam vidyutaḥ_vidyut bhānti_bhā kutas_kutas ayam_idam agniḥ_agni
tam_tad eva_eva anubhāti_anubhā sarvam_sarva tasya_tad bhāsā_bhās sarvam_sarva idam_idam vibhāti_vibhā

iti_iti ca_ca śruteḥ_śruti sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa caitanya--_caitanya rūpaḥ_rūpa eva_eva ātmā_ātman atas_atas tasya_tad sarva--_sarva bhāsakasya_bhāsaka sva--_sva bhāna--_bhāna artham_artha na_na sva--_sva bhāsya--_bhās apekṣā_apekṣā kintu_kiṃtu kalpita--_kalpay ajñāna--_ajñāna tad--_tad kārya--_kārya nivṛtti--_nivṛtti artham_artha kalpita--_kalpay vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣa--_viśeṣa kalpitasya_kalpay eva_eva kalpita--_kalpay virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva yakṣa--_yakṣa anurūpaḥ_anurūpa baliḥ_bali iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya tathā_tathā ca_ca sarva--_sarva kalpita--_kalpay nivartaka--_nivartaka vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣa--_viśeṣa utpatti--_utpatti artham_artha śāstra--_śāstra ārambhaḥ_ārambha tasya_tad tattvam_tattva asi_as ādi--_ādi vākya--_vākya mātra--_mātra adhīna--_adhīna tvāt_tva svatas_svatas sarvadā_sarvadā ābhāsamāna--_ābhās tvāt_tva sarva--_sarva kalpanā--_kalpanā adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tvāt_tva dṛśya--_dṛś mātra--_mātra bhāsaka--_bhāsaka tvāt_tva ca_ca na_na tasya_tad tuccha--_tuccha tva--_tva āpattiḥ_āpatti tathā_tathā ca_ca ekam_eka eva_eva advitīyam_advitīya satyam_satya jñānam_jñāna anantam_ananta brahma_brahman iti_iti ādi--_ādi śāstram_śāstra eva_eva sva--_sva prameya--_prameya anurodhena_anurodha svasya_sva api_api kalpita--_kalpay tvam_tva āpādayati_āpāday anyathā_anyathā sva--_sva prāmāṇya--_prāmāṇya anupapatteḥ_anupapatti

kalpitasya_kalpay ca_ca akalpita--_akalpita paricchedaka--_paricchedaka tvam_tva na_na asti_as iti_iti prāk--_prāñc pratipāditam_pratipāday ātmanaḥ_ātman sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa tvam_tva ca_ca yuktitaḥ_yukti api_api bhagavat--_bhagavat pūjya--_pūjay pādaiḥ_pāda upapāditam_upapāday tathā_tathā hi_hi yatra_yatra jijñāsoḥ_jijñāsu saṃśaya--_saṃśaya viparyaya--_viparyaya vyatireka--_vyatireka pramāṇānām_pramāṇa anyatamam_anyatama api_api na_na asti_as tatra_tatra tad--_tad virodhi_virodhin jñānam_jñāna iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra dṛṣṭam_dṛś anyathā_anyathā tritaya--_tritaya anyatama--_anyatama āpatteḥ_āpatti ātmani_ātman ca_ca aham_mad vā_vā na_na aham_mad vā_vā iti_iti na_na kasyacid_kaścit saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya nā_na api_api na_na aham_mad iti_iti viparyayaḥ_viparyaya vyatirekaḥ_vyatireka pramā_pramā vā_vā iti_iti tad--_tad svarūpa--_svarūpa pramā_pramā sarvadā_sarvadā asti_as iti_iti vācyam_vac tasya_tad sarva--_sarva saṃśaya--_saṃśaya viparyaya--_viparyaya dharmi--_dharmin tvāt_tva sarvam_sarva abhra--_abhra antam_anta prakāre_prakāra tu_tu viparyayaḥ_viparyaya iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya atas_atas eva_eva uktam_vac

lg.l: pramāṇam_pramāṇa apramāṇam_apramāṇa ca_ca pramā--_pramā ābhāsaḥ_ābhāsa tathā_tathā eva_eva ca_ca
kurvanti_kṛ eva_eva pramām_pramā yatra_yatra tad--_tad asambhāvanā_asaṃbhāvanā kutas_kutas

div.p: sva--_sva prakāśe_prakāśa sat--_as rūpe_rūpa dharmiṇi_dharmin pramāṇa--_pramāṇa apramāṇayoḥ_apramāṇa viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātmanaḥ_ātman abhāsamānatve_abhāsamānatva
