yatatām_yat api_api siddhānām_sidh kaḥ_ka cit_cit mām_mad vetti_vid tattvataḥ_tattva

śravaṇāya_śravaṇa api_api bahubhiḥ_bahu yaḥ_yad na_na labhyaḥ_labh śṛṇvantaḥ_śru api_api bahavaḥ_bahu yam_yad na_na vidyuḥ_vid āścaryaḥ_āścarya vaktā_vaktṛ kuśalaḥ_kuśala asya_idam labdhā_labdhṛ
āścaryaḥ_āścarya jñātā_jñātṛ kuśala--_kuśala anuśiṣṭaḥ_anuśās iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca
evam_evam śravaṇa--_śravaṇa śrotavyayoḥ_śru āścarya--_āścarya tvam_tva prāgvat_prāgvat vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā

nanu_nanu yaḥ_yad śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana ādikam_ādika karoti_kṛ saḥ_tad ātmānam_ātman veda_vid iti_iti kim_ka āścaryam_āścarya atas_atas āha_ah na_na ca_ca eva_eva kaścid_kaścit iti_iti ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra kriyā--_kriyā karma--_karman padayoḥ_pada anuṣaṅga--_anuṣaṅga arthaḥ_artha kaścid_kaścit enam_enad nā_na eva_eva veda_vid śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādikam_ādika kurvan_kṛ api_api tat_tad akurvan_kṛ tu_tu na_na veda_vid iti_iti kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac aihikam_aihika aprastuta--_aprastuta pratibandhe_pratibandha tad--_tad darśanāt_darśana iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya uktam_vac ca_ca vārtika--_vārttika kāraiḥ_kāra

kutas_kutas tad--_tad jñānam_jñāna iti_iti ced_ced tat_tad hi_hi bandha--_bandha parikṣayāt_parikṣaya
asau_adas api_api ca_ca bhūtau_bhūti vā_vā bhāvī_bhāvin vā_vā vartate_vṛt athavā_athavā

śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi_ādi kurvatām_kṛ api_api pratibandha--_pratibandha parikṣayāt_parikṣaya eva_eva jñānam_jñāna jāyate_jan anyathā_anyathā tu_tu na_na sa_tad ca_ca pratibandha--_pratibandha parikṣayaḥ_parikṣaya kasyacid_kaścit bhūtaḥ_bhū eva_eva yathā_yathā hiraṇyagarbhasya_hiraṇyagarbha kasyacid_kaścit bhāvī_bhāvin yathā_yathā vāsudevasya_vāsudeva kasyacid_kaścit vartate_vṛt yathā_yathā śvetaketoḥ_śvetaketu tathā_tathā ca_ca pratibandha--_pratibandha kṣaya--_kṣaya sya_tya ati_ati durlabha--_durlabha tvāt_tva jñānam_jñāna utpadyate_utpad puṃsām_puṃs kṣayāt_kṣaya pāpasya_pāpa karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca durvijñeyaḥ_durvijñeya ayam_idam ātmā_ātman iti_iti nirgalitaḥ_nirgal arthaḥ_artha

yadi_yadi tu_tu śrutvā_śru api_api enam_enad veda_vid na_na ca_ca eva_eva kaścid_kaścit iti_iti eva_eva vyākhyāyeta_vyākhyā tadā_tadā āścaryaḥ_āścarya jñātā_jñātṛ kuśala--_kuśala anuśiṣṭaḥ_anuśās iti_iti śrutyā_śruti eka--_eka vākya--_vākya tā_tā na_na syāt_as yatatām_yat api_api siddhānām_siddha kaḥ_ka cit_cit mām_mad vetti_vid tattvataḥ_tattva iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant vacana--_vacana virodhaḥ_virodha ca_ca iti_iti vidvadbhiḥ_vidvas avinayaḥ_avinaya kṣantavyaḥ_kṣam athavā_athavā na_na ca_ca eva_eva kaścid_kaścit iti_iti asya_idam sarvatra_sarvatra sambandhaḥ_sambandha kaścid_kaścit enam_enad na_na paśyati_dṛś na_na vadati_vad na_na śṛṇoti_śru śrutvā_śru api_api na_na veda_vid iti_iti pañca_pañcan prakārāḥ_prakāra uktāḥ_vac kaścid_kaścit paśyati_dṛś eva_eva na_na vadati_vad kaścid_kaścit paśyati_paś na_na vadati_vad tad--_tad artham_artha jānāti_jñā ca_ca kaścid_kaścit śrutvā_śru api_api na_na jānāti_jñā na_na kaścid_kaścit tu_tu sarva--_sarva bahirbhūtaḥ_bahirbhū iti_iti avidvat--_avidvat pakṣe_pakṣa tu_tu asambhāvanā--_asaṃbhāvanā viparīta--_viparīta bhāvanā--_bhāvanā abhibhūta--_abhibhū tvāt_tva āścarya--_āścarya tulya--_tulya tvam_tva darśana--_darśana vadana--_vadana śravaṇeṣu_śravaṇa iti_iti nigada--_nigada vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā ślokaḥ_śloka caturtha--_caturtha pāde_pāda tu_tu dṛṣṭvā_dṛś uktvā_vac śrutvā_śru api_api iti_iti yojanā_yojana 29_29

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nanu_nanu kim_ka idam_idam āścaryam_āścarya brūṣe_brū kim_ka ca_ca etat_etad api_api āścaryam_āścarya yat_yat eva_eva prabodhyamānasya_prabodhay api_api avivekaḥ_aviveka na_na apayāti_apayā iti_iti tatra_tatra satyam_satya eva_eva īm_īṃ eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah āścarya--_āścarya vat_vat iti_iti enam_enad ātmānam_ātman deham_deha ca_ca tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya rūpam_rūpa sarva--_sarva lokam_loka 29_29

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu sarvajñena_sarvajña tvayā_tvad bahu_bahu upadiśyamānaḥ_upadiś api_api aham_mad śoka--_śoka nivārakam_nivāraka ātma--_ātman yāthātmyam_yāthātmya na_na budhye_budh kim_ka etat_etad iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah āścarya--_āścarya vat_vat iti_iti vijñānānda--_vijñānānda ubhaya--_ubhaya sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa tve_tva api_api tad--_tad bheda--_bheda a_a pratiyoginam_pratiyogin vijñāna--_vijñāna sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa tve_tva api_api vijñātṛ--_vijñātṛ tayā_tā santam_as paramāṇu--_paramāṇu tve_tva api_api vyāpta--_vyāp bṛhat--_bṛhat kāyam_kāya nānā_nānā kāya--_kāya sambandhe_sambandha api_api tad--_tad tad--_tad vikāraiḥ_vikāra a_a bahu--_bahu viruddha--_virudh dharma--_dharma tayā_tā āścarya--_āścarya vat_vat adbhuta--_adbhuta sādṛśyena_sādṛśya sthitam_sthā enam_enad mad--_mad upadiṣṭam_upadiś jīvam_jīva kaścid_kaścit eva_eva svadharma--_svadharma anuṣṭhānena_anuṣṭhāna satya--_satya tapaḥ--_tapas japa--_japa ādinā_ādi ca_ca vimṛṣṭa--_vimṛś hṛd--_hṛd guru--_guru prasāda--_prasāda labdha--_labh āścaryavat_āścaryavat iti_iti kriyā--_kriyā viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa vā_vā kartṛ--_kartṛ viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa vā_vā iti_iti vyākhyātāraḥ_vyākhyātṛ kaścid_kaścit enam_enad yat_yat paśyati_paś tat_tad āścaryavat_āścaryavat yaḥ_yad kaścid_kaścit paśyati_dṛś saḥ_tad api_api āścarya--_āścarya vat_vat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam agre_agra api_api śrutvā_śru api_api enam_enad iti_iti kaścid_kaścit samyak_samyak amṛṣṭa--_amṛṣṭa hṛd_hṛd iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca duradhigamam_duradhigama jīvātma--_jīvātman yāthātmyam_yāthātmya śrutiḥ_śruti api_api evam_evam āha_ah

śravaṇāya_śravaṇa api_api bahubhiḥ_bahu yaḥ_yad na_na labhyaḥ_labh śṛṇvantaḥ_śru api_api bahavaḥ_bahu yam_yad na_na vidyuḥ_vid āścaryaḥ_āścarya vaktā_vaktṛ kuśalaḥ_kuśala asya_idam labdhā_labdhṛ āścaryaḥ_āścarya jñātā_jñātṛ kuśala--_kuśala anuśiṣṭa_anuśās
BhG 2.30

lg.l: dehī_dehin nityam_nityam avadhyaḥ_avadhya ayam_idam dehe_deha sarvasya_sarva bhārata_bhārata
tasmāt_tasmāt sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta na_na tvam_tvad śocitum_śuc arhasi_arh

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_idānīm sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin sādhāraṇa--_sādhāraṇa bhrama--_bhrama nivṛtti--_nivṛtti sādhanam_sādhana uktam_vac upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ dehi_dā iti_iti sarvasya_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin jātasya_jāta dehe_deha vadhyamāne_vadh api_api ayam_idam dehī_dehin liṅga--_liṅga deha--_deha upādhiḥ_upādhi ātmā_ātman vadhyaḥ_vadh na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti nityam_nityam niyatam_niyam yasmāt_yasmāt tasmāt_tasmāt sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta sthūlāni_sthūla sūkṣmāṇi_sūkṣma ca_ca bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādi--_ādi bhāva--_bhāva sthūla--_sthūla dehasya_deha a_a śocya--_śuc tvam_tva a_a parihārya--_parihṛ tvāt_tva liṅga--_liṅga dehasya_deha aśocya--_aśocya tvam_tva ātma--_ātman vat_vat eva_eva avadhya--_avadhya tvāt_tva iti_iti na_na sthūla--_sthūla dehasya_deha liṅga--_liṅga dehasya_deha ātmanaḥ_ātman vā_vā śocya--_śuc tvam_tva yuktam_yuj iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tarhi_tarhi niścitya_niści brūhi_brū kim_ka aham_mad kuryām_kṛ kim_ka vā_vā na_na kuryām_kṛ iti_iti tatra_tatra śokam_śoka mā_mā kuru_kṛ yuddham_yuddha tu_tu kuru_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah dehi_dā iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad evam_evam duradhigamam_duradhigama jīva--_jīva yāthātmyam_yāthātmya samāsena_samāsena upadiśan_upadiś aśocyatvam_aśocyatva upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ dehi_dā iti_iti sarvasya_sarva jīva--_jīva gaṇasya_gaṇa dehe_deha hanyamāne_han api_api ayam_idam dehī_dehin jīvaḥ_jīva nityam_nityam avadhyaḥ_avadhya yasmāt_yasmāt tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādi--_ādi bhāva--_bhāva āpannāni_āpad śocitum_śuc na_na arhasi_arh ātmanām_ātman nitya--_nitya tvāt_tva aśocya--_aśocya tvam_tva tad--_tad dehānām_deha tu_tu avaśya--_avaśya vināśa--_vināśa tvāt_tva tattvam_tattva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 2.31

lg.l: sva--_sva dharmam_dharma api_api ca_ca avekṣya_avekṣ na_na vikampitum_vikamp arhasi_arh
dharmyāt_dharmya hi_hi yuddhāt_yuddha śreyaḥ_śreyas anyat_anya kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya na_na vidyate_vid

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara yat_yad ca_ca uktam_vac arjunena_arjuna vepathuḥ_vepathu ca_ca śarīre_śarīra mama_mad iti_iti ādi_ādi tat_tad api_api ayuktam_ayukta iti_iti āha_ah svadharmam_svadharma api_api iti_iti ātmanaḥ_ātman nāśa--_nāśa abhāvāt_abhāva eva_eva hanane_hanana api_api vikampitum_vikamp nā_na arhasi_arh kim_kim ca_ca svadharmam_svadharma api_api avekṣya_avekṣ vikampitum_vikamp na_na arhasi_arh iti_iti sambandhaḥ_sambandha yat_yad ca_ca uktam_vac na_na ca_ca śreyaḥ_śreyas anupaśyāmi_anupaś hatvā_han sva--_sva janam_jana āhave_āhava iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah dharmyāt_dharmya iti_iti dharmāt_dharma an_an apetāt_ape nyāyāt_nyāya yuddhāt_yuddha anyat_anya

upādhi--_upādhi traya--_traya vivekena_viveka ātma--_ātman svarūpam_svarūpa abhihitavān_abhidhā samprati_samprati yuddha--_yuddha ākhye_ākhyā sva--_sva dharme_dharma hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādi--_ādi bāhulyena_bāhulya adharma--_adharma tva--_tva pratibhāsa--_pratibhāsa rūpam_rūpa arjunasya_arjuna eva_eva karuṇā--_karuṇā ādi--_ādi doṣa--_doṣa nibandhanam_nibandhana asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa bhramam_bhrama nirākartum_nirākṛ hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādimattve_ādimattva api_api yuddhasya_yuddha sva--_sva dharma_dharma bhagavān_bhagavant svadharmam_svadharma api_api iti_iti

na_na kevalam_kevala paramārtha--_paramārtha tattvam_tattva eva_eva avekṣya_avekṣ kim_ka tu_tu svadharmam_svadharma api_api kṣatriya--_kṣatriya dharmam_dharma api_api yuddha--_yuddha a_a parāṅmukha--_parāṅmukha tva--_tva rūpam_rūpa avekṣya_avekṣ śāstrataḥ_śāstra paryālocya_paryālocay vikampitum_vikamp vicalitum_vical dharmāt_dharma adharma--_adharma tva--_tva bhrāntyā_bhrānti nivartitum_nivṛt nā_na tatra_tatra evam_evam sati_as yadi_yadi api_api ete_etad na_na paśyanti_dṛś iti_iti ādinā_ādi narake_naraka niyatam_niyatam vāsaḥ_vāsa bhavati_bhū iti_iti antena_anta yuddhasya_yuddha pāpa--_pāpa hetutvam_hetutva tvayā_tvad yat_yad uktam_vac katham_katham bhīṣmam_bhīṣma aham_mad saṅkhye_saṃkhya iti_iti ādinā_ādi ca_ca guru--_guru vadha--_vadha brahma--_brahman vadha--_vadha tat_tad sarvam_sarva dharma--_dharma śāstra--_śāstra paryālocanāt_paryālocana eva_eva uktam_vac kasmāt_kasmāt hi_hi yasmāt_yad dharmyāt_dharmya a_a parāṅmukha--_parāṅmukha tva--_tva dharmāt_dharma an_an apetāt_ape yuddhāt_yuddha anyat_anya kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya śreyaḥ_śreyas śreyaḥ--_śreyas sādhanam_sādhana na_na vidyate_vid yuddham_yuddha eva_eva hi_hi pṛthivī--_pṛthivī jaya--_jaya dvāreṇa_dvāra prajā--_prajā rakṣaṇa--_rakṣaṇa brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa śuśrūṣā--_śuśrūṣā ādi--_ādi kṣātra--_kṣātra dharma--_dharma nirvāhakam_nirvāhaka iti_iti tat_tad eva_eva kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya praśastataram_praśastatara iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya tathā_tathā ca_ca uktam_vac parāśareṇa_parāśara

kṣatriyaḥ_kṣatriya hi_hi prajāḥ_prajā rakṣan_rakṣ śastra--_śastra pāṇiḥ_pāṇi pradaṇḍayan_pradaṇḍay nirjitya_nirji para--_para sainya--_sainya ādi_ādi kṣitim_kṣiti dharmeṇa_dharma pālayet_pālay iti_iti
manunā_manu api_api

lg.l: sama--_sama uttama--_uttama adhamaiḥ_adhama rājā_rājan tu_tu āhūtaḥ_āhvā pālayan_pālay prajāḥ_prajā
na_na nivarteta_nivṛt saṃgrāmāt_saṃgrāma kṣātram_kṣātra dharmam_dharma anusmaran_anusmṛ

div.p:
saṃgrāmeṣu_saṃgrāma anivarti--_anivartin tvam_tva prajānām_prajā ca_ca eva_eva pālanam_pālana
śuśrūṣā_śuśrūṣā brāhmaṇānām_brāhmaṇa ca_ca rājñām_rājan śreyaskaram_śreyaskara param_para

rāja--_rājan śabdaḥ_śabda ca_ca kṣatriya--_kṣatriya jāti--_jāti mātra--_mātra vācī_vācin iti_iti sthitam_sthā eva_eva iṣṭhī--_iṣṭhī adhikaraṇe_adhikaraṇa tena_tena bhūmi--_bhūmi pālasya_pāla eva_eva ayam_idam dharmaḥ_dharma iti_iti na_na bhramitavyam_bhram udāhṛta--_udāhṛ vacane_vacana api_api kṣatriyaḥ_kṣatriya hi_hi iti_iti kṣāttram_kṣātra dharmam_dharma iti_iti ca_ca spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa liṅgam_liṅga tasmāt_tasmāt kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya yuddham_yuddha praśastaḥ_praśaṃs dharmaḥ_dharma iti_iti sādhu_sādhu bhagavataḥ_bhagavant abhihitam_abhidhā a_a paśavaḥ_paśu anye_anya go--_go aśvebhyaḥ_aśva paśavaḥ_paśu go--_go aśvāḥ_aśva iti_iti vat_vat praśaṃsā--_praśaṃsā lakṣaṇayā_lakṣaṇa yuddhāt_yuddha anyat_anya śreyaḥ--_śreyas sādhanam_sādhana na_na vidyate_vid iti_iti uktam_vac iti_iti na_na doṣaḥ_doṣa etena_etad yuddhāt_yuddha praśastataram_praśastatara kiṃcid_kaścit anuṣṭhātum_anuṣṭhā tatas_tatas nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti ucitā_ucita iti_iti nirastam_niras na_na ca_ca śreyaḥ_śreyas anupaśyāmi_anupaś hatvā_han sva--_sva janam_jana āhave_āhava iti_iti etat_etad api_api
arhasi_arh arhasi_arh _

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_evam paramātma--_paramātman jñāna--_jñāna upayogi--_upayogin tvāt_tva ādau_ādi jīvātma--_jīvātman jñānam_jñāna sarvān_sarva prati_prati taulyena_taulya upadiśya_upadiś sa_sa niṣṭhān_niṣṭhā prati_prati niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tayā_tā anuṣṭhitāni_anuṣṭhā karmāṇi_karman hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhi--_viśuddhi sahakṛtām_sahakṛta ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna utpādayitum_utpāday sa_sa kāma--_kāma tayā_tā anuṣṭhitānām_anuṣṭhā karmaṇām_karman kāmya--_kāmay phala--_phala prada--_prada tvam_tva āha_ah dvābhyām_dvi svadharmam_svadharma api_api iti_iti

yuddham_yuddha khalu_khalu kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi--_ādi vat_vat vihitam_vidhā tat_tad ca_ca śatru--_śatru prāṇa--_prāṇa vihaṃsana--_vihaṃsana rūpam_rūpa agniṣṭoma--_agniṣṭoma ādi--_ādi paśu--_paśu hiṃsana--_hiṃsana vat_vat na_na pratyavāya--_pratyavāya nimittam_nimitta ubhayatra_ubhayatra hiṃsā_hiṃsā iyam_idam upakṛti--_upakṛti rūpā_rūpa eva_eva hīnayoḥ_hā deha--_deha lokayoḥ_loka tyāgena_tyāga divyayoḥ_divya tayoḥ_tad lobhāt_lobha āha_ah ca_ca evam_evam smṛtiḥ_smṛti

lg.l: āhaveṣu_āhava mithas_mithas anyonyam_anyonya jighāṃsantaḥ_jighāṃs mahīkṣitaḥ_mahīkṣit
yudhyamānāḥ_yudh param_param śaktyā_śakti svargam_svarga yānti_yā a_a parāṅmukhāḥ_parāṅmukha

div.p: yajñeṣu_yajña paśavaḥ_paśu brahman_brahman hanyante_han satatam_satatam dvijaiḥ_dvija saṃskṛtāḥ_saṃskṛ kila_kila mantraiḥ_mantra ca_ca te_tad api_api svargam_svarga avāpnuvan_avāp iti_iti ādyā_ādya

evam_evam nija--_nija dharmam_dharma avekṣya_avekṣ vikampitum_vikamp dharmāt_dharma pracalitum_pracal na_na arhasi_arh yuktam_yuj na_na ca_ca śreyaḥ_śreyas anupaśyāmi_anupaś iti_iti ādinā_ādi narake_naraka vāsaḥ_vāsa antyena_antya yuddhasya_yuddha pāpa--_pāpa hetu--_hetu tvam_tva tvayā_tvad uktam_vac tat_tad ca_ca ajñānāt_ajñāna eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah dharmyāt_dharmya iti_iti yuddham_yuddha eva_eva bhūmi--_bhūmi jaya--_jaya dvārā_dvār prajā--_prajā pālana--_pālana guru--_guru vipra--_vipra saṃsevana--_saṃsevana ādi--_ādi kṣātra--_kṣātra dharma--_dharma nirvāhi_nirvāhin iti_iti āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat parāśaraḥ_parāśara

kṣatriyaḥ_kṣatriya hi_hi prajāḥ_prajā rakṣan_rakṣ śastra--_śastra pāṇiḥ_pāṇi pradaṇḍayan_pradaṇḍay nirjitya_nirji para--_para sainya--_sainya ādi_ādi kṣitim_kṣiti dharmeṇa_dharma pālayet_pālay iti_iti
BhG 2.32

lg.l: yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā ca_ca upapannam_upapad svarga--_svarga dvāram_dvāra apāvṛtam_apāvṛ
sukhinaḥ_sukhin kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya pārtha_pārtha labhante_labh yuddham_yuddha īdṛśam_īdṛśa

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara kim_kim ca_ca mahati_mahat śreyasi_śreyas svayam_svayam eva_eva upāgate_upāgam sati_as kutas_kutas vikampase_vikamp iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā iti_iti yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā a_a prārthitam_prārthay eva_eva upapannam_upapad prāptam_prāp īdṛśam_īdṛśa yuddham_yuddha labhante_labh yatas_yatas nirāvaraṇam_nirāvaraṇa svarga--_svarga dvāram_dvāra eva_eva etat_etad yat_yat vā_vā ye_yad evaṃvidham_evaṃvidha yuddham_yuddha labhante_labh te_tad eva_eva sukhinaḥ_sukhin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etena_etad sva--_sva janam_jana hi_hi katham_katham hatvā_han sukhinaḥ_sukhin syāma_as mādhave_mādhava iti_iti yat_yad uktam_vac tat_tad nirastam_niras bhavati_bhū 32_32

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu yuddhasya_yuddha kartavya--_kṛ tve_tva api_api na_na bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi gurubhiḥ_guru saha_saha tat_tad kartum_kṛ ucitam_ucita ati_ati garhita--_garh tvāt_tva iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā iti_iti yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā sva--_sva prayatna--_prayatna vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka caḥ_c avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa a_a prārthanayā_prārthanā eva_eva upasthitam_upasthā īdṛśam_īdṛśa bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādi--_ādi vīra--_vīra puruṣa--_puruṣa pratiyogikam_pratiyogika kīrti--_kīrti rājya--_rājya lābha--_lābha dṛṣṭa--_dṛś phala--_phala sādhanam_sādhana yuddham_yuddha ye_yad kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya pratiyogi--_pratiyogin tvena_tva labhante_labh te_tad sukhinaḥ_sukhin sukha--_sukha jaye_jaya satyena_satya āyāsena_āyāsa eva_eva yaśasaḥ_yaśas rājyasya_rājya ca_ca lābhāt_lābha parājaye_parājaya ca_ca ati_ati śīghram_śīghram eva_eva svargasya_svarga lābhāt_lābha iti_iti āha_ah svarga--_svarga dvāram_dvāra apāvṛtam_apāvṛ iti_iti svarga--_svarga dvāram_dvāra iti_iti anena_idam śyena--_śyena ādi--_ādi vat_vat pratyavāya--_pratyavāya śaṅkā_śaṅkā parihṛtā_parihṛ śyena--_śyena ādayaḥ_ādi hi_hi vihitāḥ_vidhā api_api phala--_phala doṣeṇa_doṣa duṣṭāḥ_duṣ tad--_tad phalasya_phala śatru--_śatru vadhasya_vadha na_na hiṃsyāt_hiṃs sarvā_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta brāhmaṇam_brāhmaṇa na_na hanyāt_han iti_iti ādi--_ādi śāstra--_śāstra niṣiddhasya_niṣidh pratyavāya--_pratyavāya janaka--_janaka tvāt_tva phale_phala vidhi--_vidhi abhāvāt_abhāva ca_ca na_na vidhi--_vidhi spṛṣṭe_spṛś niṣedha--_niṣedha anavakāśaḥ_anavakāśa iti_iti nyāya--_nyāya yuddhasya_yuddha hi_hi phalam_phala svargaḥ_svarga sa_tad ca_ca na_na niṣiddhaḥ_niṣidh tathā_tathā ca_ca manuḥ_manu

āhaveṣu_āhava mithas_mithas anyonyam_anyonya jighāṃsantaḥ_jighāṃs mahīkṣitaḥ_mahīkṣit
yudhyamānāḥ_yudh param_param śaktyā_śakti svargam_svarga yānti_yā a_a parāṅmukhāḥ_parāṅmukha

yuddham_yuddha tu_tu agnīṣomīya--_agnīṣomīya ādi--_ādi ālambha--_ālambha vadha--_vadha vihita--_vidhā tvāt_tva na_na niṣedhena_niṣedha spraṣṭum_spṛś śakyate_śak ṣoḍaśi--_ṣoḍaśin grahaṇa--_grahaṇa ādi--_ādi vat_vat grahaṇa--_grahaṇa agrahayoḥ_agraha tulya--_tulya bala--_bala tayā_tā vikalpa--_vikalpa vat_vat sāmānya--_sāmānya śāstrasya_śāstra viśeṣa--_viśeṣa śāstreṇa_śāstra saṅkoca--_saṃkoca sambhavāt_sambhava tathā_tathā ca_ca vidhi--_vidhi spṛṣṭe_spṛś niṣedha--_niṣedha anavakāśaḥ_anavakāśa iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya yuddham_yuddha na_na pratyavāya--_pratyavāya janakam_janaka na_na api_api bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādi--_ādi guru--_guru brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādi--_ādi vadha--_vadha nimittaḥ_nimitta doṣaḥ_doṣa teṣām_tad ātatāyi--_ātatāyin tvāt_tva tat_tad uktam_vac manunā_manu

lg.l: gurum_guru vā_vā bāla--_bāla vṛddhau_vṛddha vā_vā brāhmaṇam_brāhmaṇa vā_vā bahu--_bahu śrutam_śruta
ātatāyinam_ātatāyin āyāntam_āyā hanyāt_han eva_eva a_a vicārayan_vicāray
ātatāyinam_ātatāyin āyāntam_āyā vedānta--_vedānta pāragam_pāraga
jighāṃsantam_jighāṃs jighāṃsīyān_jighāṃsīyas na_na tena_tena brahma--_brahman hā_han bhavet_bhū

div.l: na_na ātatāyi--_ātatāyin vadhaḥ_vadha doṣaḥ_doṣa hantuḥ_hantṛ bhavati_bhū kaścana_kaścana iti_iti ādi_ādi

lg.l: smṛtyoḥ_smṛti virodhe_virodha nyāyaḥ_nyāya tu_tu balavān_balavat vyavahārataḥ_vyavahāra
artha--_artha śāstrāt_śāstra tu_tu balavat_balavat dharma--_dharma śāstram_śāstra iti_iti sthitiḥ_sthiti

div.p: iti_iti yājñavalkya--_yājñavalkya vacanāt_vacana ātatāyi--_ātatāyin brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa vadhe_vadha api_api pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya asti_as eva_eva brāhmaṇam_brāhmaṇa na_na hanyāt_han iti_iti hi_hi dṛṣṭa--_dṛś prayojana--_prayojana anapekṣa--_anapekṣa tvāt_tva dharma--_dharma śāstram_śāstra jighāṃsantam_jighāṃs jighāṃsīyān_jighāṃsīyas na_na tena_tad brahma--_brahman hā_han bhavet_bhū iti_iti ca_ca sva--_sva jīvana--_jīvana artha--_artha tvāt_tva artha--_artha śāstram_śāstra

atra_atra ucyate_vac brahmaṇe_brahman brāhmaṇam_brāhmaṇa ālabheta_ālabh iti_iti vat_vat yuddha--_yuddha vidhāyakam_vidhāyaka api_api dharma--_dharma śāstram_śāstra eva_eva sukha--_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha same_sama kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti atra_atra dṛṣṭa--_dṛś prayojana--_prayojana anapekṣa--_anapekṣa tvasya_tva vakṣyamāṇa--_vac tvāt_tva yājñavalkya--_yājñavalkya vacanam_vacana tu_tu dṛṣṭa--_dṛś prayojana--_prayojana uddeśyaka--_uddeśyaka kūṭa--_kūṭa yuddha--_yuddha ādi--_ādi kṛta--_kṛ vadha--_vadha viṣayam_viṣaya iti_iti adoṣaḥ_adoṣa mitākṣarā--_mitākṣarā kāraḥ_kāra tu_tu dharma--_dharma artha--_artha sannipāte_saṃnipāta artha--_artha grāhiṇaḥ_grāhin etat_etad eva_eva iti_iti dvādaśa--_dvādaśan vārṣika--_vārṣika prāyaścittasya_prāyaścitta etad--_etad śabda--_śabda parāmṛṣṭasya_parāmṛś āpastambena_āpastamba vidhānāt_vidhāna mitra--_mitra labdhi--_labdhi ādi--_ādi artha--_artha śāstra--_śāstra anusāreṇa_anusāra dharma--_dharma śāstra--_śāstra atikramaḥ_atikrama na_na kartavyaḥ_kṛ iti_iti etat_etad param_para vacanam_vacana etat_etad iti_iti āha_ah bhavatu_bhū evam_evam na_na naḥ_mad hāniḥ_hāni tat_tad evam_evam yuddha--_yuddha karaṇe_karaṇa sukha--_sukha ukteḥ_ukti sva--_sva janam_jana hi_hi katham_katham
hatvā_han sukhinaḥ_sukhin syāma_as mādhavaḥ_mādhava iti_iti arjuna--_arjuna uktam_vac apākṛtam_apākṛ
kuru_kṛ āha_ah svarga--_svarga sādhanam_sādhana karma--_karman yogam_yoga a_a kṛtvā_kṛ api_api iti_iti arthaḥ_artha apāvṛtam_apāvṛ apagata--_apagam āvaraṇam_āvaraṇa 32_32

baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_kim ca_ca ayatnāt_ayatna āgate_āgam asmin_idam mahati_mahat śreyasi_śreyas na_na yuktaḥ_yuj te_tvad kampaḥ_kampa iti_iti āha_ah yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā iti_iti caḥ_c avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa yatnam_yatna vinā_vinā eva_eva ca_ca upapannam_upapad īdṛśam_īdṛśa bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādibhiḥ_ādi mahā--_mahat vīraiḥ_vīra saha_saha yuddham_yuddha sukhinaḥ_sukhin sa_sa bhāgyāḥ_bhāgya kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya labhante_labh vijaye_vijaya satya--_satya śrameṇa_śrama kīrti--_kīrti rājyayoḥ_rājya mṛtyau_mṛtyu sati_as śīghram_śīghram eva_eva svargasya_svarga ca_ca prāpteḥ_prāpti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etat_etad vyañjayan_vyañjay viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ svarga--_svarga dvāram_dvāra upāvṛtam_upāvṛ iti_iti a_a pratiruddha--_pratirudh svarga--_svarga sādhanam_sādhana iti_iti arthaḥ_artha jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādikam_ādika ciratareṇa_ciratara svarga--_svarga upalambhakam_upalambhaka iti_iti tatas_tatas asya_idam atiśayaḥ_atiśaya 32_32
BhG 2.33

lg.l: atha_atha ced_ced tvam_tvad imam_idam dharmyam_dharmya saṃgrāmam_saṃgrāma na_na kariṣyasi_kṛ
tatas_tatas sva--_sva dharmam_dharma kīrtim_kīrti ca_ca hitvā_hā pāpam_pāpa avāpsyasi_avāp

div.l: āha_ah
div.p: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu na_na aham_mad yuddha--_yuddha phala--_phala kāmaḥ_kāma na_na kāṅkṣe_kāṅkṣ vijayam_vijaya kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa api_api trailokya--_trailokya rājyasya_rājya iti_iti ukta--_vac tvāt_tva tat_tad katham_katham mayā_mad kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk akaraṇe_akaraṇa doṣam_doṣa āha_ah atha_atha ced_ced iti_iti atha_atha iti_iti pakṣa--_pakṣa antare_antara imam_idam bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādi--_ādi vīra--_vīra puruṣa--_puruṣa pratiyogikam_pratiyogika dharmyam_dharmya hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādi--_ādi doṣaṇa--_doṣaṇa aduṣṭam_aduṣṭa satām_sat dharmāt_dharma an_an apetām_ape iti_iti vā_vā sa_tad ca_ca manunā_manu darśitaḥ_darśay

lg.l: na_na kūṭaiḥ_kūṭa āyudhaiḥ_āyudha hanyāt_han yudhyamānaḥ_yudh raṇe_raṇa ripūn_ripu
na_na karṇibhiḥ_karṇin na_na api_api digdhaiḥ_dih na_na agni--_agni jvalita--_jval tejanaiḥ_tejana
na_na ca_ca hanyāt_han sthala--_sthala ārūḍham_āruh na_na klībam_klība na_na kṛtāñjalim_kṛtāñjali
na_na mukta--_muc keśam_keśa na_na āsīnam_ās na_na tava_tvad asmi_as iti_iti vādinam_vādin
na_na suptam_svap na_na visaṃnāham_visaṃnāha na_na nagnam_nagna na_na nirāyudham_nirāyudha
na_na ayudhyamānam_ayudhyamāna paśyantam_paś na_na pareṇa_para samāgatam_samāgam

div.p:
na_na āyudha--_āyudha vyasana--_vyasana prāptam_prāp na_na ārtam_ārta na_na ati_ati parikṣatam_parikṣan
na_na bhītam_bhī na_na parāvṛttam_parāvṛt satām_sat dharmam_dharma anusmaran_anusmṛ
div.l: satām_sat dharmam_dharma ullaṅghya_ullaṅghay yudhyamānaḥ_yudh hi_hi pāpīyān_pāpīyas syāt_as tvam_tvad tu_tu paraiḥ_para āhūtaḥ_āhvā api_api sat--_sat dharma--_dharma upetam_upe api_api saṅgrāmam_saṃgrāma yuddham_yuddha na_na kariṣyasi_kṛ dharmataḥ_dharma lokataḥ_loka vā_vā bhītaḥ_bhī parāvṛttaḥ_parāvṛt bhaviṣyasi_bhū ced_ced tatas_tatas nirjitya_nirji para--_para sainyāni_sainya kṣitim_kṣiti dharmeṇa_dharma pālayet_pālay iti_iti ādi--_ādi śāstra--_śāstra vihitasya_vidhā yuddhasya_yuddha akaraṇāt_akaraṇa svadharmam_svadharma hitvā_hā an_an anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā kīrtim_kīrti ca_ca mahādeva--_mahādeva ādi--_ādi samāgama--_samāgama nimittām_nimitta hitvā_hā na_na nivarteta_nivṛt saṅgrāmāt_saṃgrāma iti_iti ādi--_ādi śāstra--_śāstra niṣiddha--_niṣidh saṅgrāma--_saṃgrāma nivṛttyā_nivṛtti ca_ca raṇa--_raṇa tu_tu dharmam_dharma kīrtim_kīrti ca_ca iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
div.p: athavā_athavā aneka--_aneka janma--_janman arjitam_arjay dharmam_dharma tyaktvā_tyaj rāja--_rājan kṛtam_kṛ pāpam_pāpa eva_eva avāpsyasi_avāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yasmāt_yasmāt tvām_tvad parāvṛttam_parāvṛt ete_etad duṣṭāḥ_duṣṭa avaśyam_avaśyam haniṣyanti_han atas_atas parāvṛtta--_parāvṛt hataḥ_han san_as cira--_cira upārjita--_upārjay nija--_nija sukṛta--_sukṛta parityāgena_parityāga para--_para upārjita--_upārjay duṣkṛta--_duṣkṛta mātra--_mātra bhāj_bhāj mā_mā bhūḥ_bhū iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya tathā_tathā ca_ca manuḥ_manu

lg.l: yaḥ_yad tu_tu bhītaḥ_bhī parāvṛttaḥ_parāvṛt saṅgrāme_saṃgrāma hanyate_han paraiḥ_para
bhartuḥ_bhartṛ yat_yad duṣkṛtam_duṣkṛta kiṃcid_kaścit tat_tad sarvam_sarva pratipadyate_pratipad

div.p:
yat_yad ca_ca asya_idam su_su kṛtam_kṛ kiṃcid_kaścit amutrārtham_amutrārtham upārjitam_upārjay
bhartā_bhartṛ tat_tad sarvam_sarva ādatte_ādā parāvṛtta--_parāvṛt hatasya_han tu_tu iti_iti

yājñavalkyaḥ_yājñavalkya api_api rājā_rājan sukṛtam_sukṛta ādatte_ādā hatānām_han vipalāyinām_vipalāyin iti_iti tena_tad yat_yad uktam_vac pāpam_pāpa eva_eva āśrayet_āśri asmān_mad hatvā_han etān_etad ātatāyinaḥ_ātatāyin etān_etad na_na hantum_han icchāmi_iṣ api_api madhusūdana_madhusūdana iti_iti tat_tad nirākṛtam_nirākṛ bhavati_bhū 33_33
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha vipakṣe_vipakṣa doṣam_doṣa āha_ah atha_atha iti_iti caturbhiḥ_catur
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva vipakṣe_vipakṣa doṣān_doṣa darśayati_darśay atha_atha iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi svasya_sva tava_tvad dharmyam_dharmya yuddha--_yuddha lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa kīrtim_kīrti ca_ca rudra--_rudra santoṣaṇa--_saṃtoṣaṇa nivāta--_nivāta kavaca--_kavaca ādi--_ādi vadha--_vadha labdhām_labh hitvā_hā pāpam_pāpa na_na nivarteta_nivṛt saṅgrāmāt_saṃgrāma iti_iti ādi_ādi smṛti--_smṛti pratiṣiddham_pratiṣidh sva--_sva dharma--_dharma tyāga--_tyāga lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa 33_33
BhG 2.34

lg.l: akīrtim_akīrti ca_ca api_api bhūtāni_bhūta kathayiṣyanti_kathay te_tvad avyayām_avyaya
saṃbhāvitasya_sambhāvay ca_ca akīrtiḥ_akīrti maraṇāt_maraṇa atiricyate_atiric

div.p: atiricyate_atiric bhavati_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam kīrti--_kīrti dharmayoḥ_dharma iṣṭayoḥ_iṣ aprāptiḥ_aprāpti aniṣṭasya_aniṣṭa ca_ca pāpasya_pāpa prāptiḥ_prāpti yuddha--_yuddha parityāge_parityāga darśitā_darśay tatra_tatra pāpa--_pāpa ākhyam_ākhyā aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa vyavadhānena_vyavadhāna duḥkha--_duḥkha phala--_phala dam_da āmutrika--_āmutrika tvāt_tva śiṣṭa--_śās garhā--_garhā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa tu_tu aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa āsanna--_āsad phala--_phala dam_da ati_ati asahyam_asahya iti_iti āha_ah akīrtim_akīrti iti_iti bhūtāni_bhūta deva--_deva ṛṣi--_ṛṣi manuṣya--_manuṣya ādīni_ādi te_tad tava_tvad avyayām_avyaya dīrgha--_dīrgha kālam_kāla akīrtim_akīrti na_na dharma--_dharma ātmā_ātman ayam_idam na_na śūraḥ_śūra ayam_idam iti_iti evaṃrūpām_evaṃrūpa kathayiṣyanti_kathay anyonyam_anyonya kathā--_kathā prasaṅge_prasaṅga kīrti--_kīrti dharma--_dharma nāśa--_nāśa samuccaya--_samuccaya arthau_artha nipātau_nipāta na_na kevalam_kevala kīrti--_kīrti dharmau_dharma hitvā_hā pāpam_pāpa prāpsyasi_prāp api_api tu_tu akīrtim_akīrti ca_ca prāpsyasi_prāp na_na kevalam_kevala tvam_tvad eva_eva tām_tad prāpsyasi_prāp api_api tu_tu bhūtāni_bhūta api_api kathayiṣyanti_kathay iti_iti vā_vā nipātayoḥ_nipāta arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu yuddhe_yuddha sva--_sva maraṇa--_maraṇa sandehāt_saṃdeha tad--_tad parihāra--_parihāra artham_artha akīrtiḥ_akīrti api_api soḍhavyā_sah ātma--_ātman rakṣaṇasya_rakṣaṇa atyanta--_atyanta apekṣita--_apekṣ tvāt_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca uktam_vac śāntiparvaṇi_śāntiparvan

lg.l: sāmnā_sāman dānena_dāna bhedena_bheda samastaiḥ_samasta atha_atha vā_vā pṛthak_pṛthak
vijetum_viji prayateta_prayat arīn_ari na_na yuddhena_yuddha kadā_kadā cana_cana
anityaḥ_anitya vijayaḥ_vijaya yasmāt_yasmāt dṛśyate_dṛś yudhyamānayoḥ_yudh
parājayaḥ_parājaya ca_ca saṃgrāme_saṃgrāma tasmāt_tasmāt yuddham_yuddha vivarjayet_vivarjay
trayāṇām_tri api_api upāyānām_upāya pūrva--_pūrva uktānām_vac asaṃbhave_asaṃbhava
tathā_tathā yudhyeta_yudh saṃpannaḥ_sampad vijayeta_viji ripūn_ripu yathā_yathā

div.p: evam_evam eva_eva manunā_manu api_api uktam_vac

tathā_tathā ca_ca maraṇa--_maraṇa bhītasya_bhī kim_ka akīrti--_akīrti duḥkham_duḥkha iti_iti śaṅkām_śaṅkā apanudati_apanud sambhāvitasya_sambhāvay dharma--_dharma ātmā_ātman śūraḥ_śūra iti_iti evam_evam ādibhiḥ_ādi ananya--_ananya labhyaiḥ_labh guṇaiḥ_guṇa bahu--_bahu matasya_man janasya_jana akīrtiḥ_akīrti maraṇāt_maraṇa api_api atiricyate_atiric caḥ_c hetau_hetu evam_evam yasmāt_yasmāt atas_atas akīrteḥ_akīrti maraṇam_maraṇa eva_eva varam_vara nyūna--_nyūna tvāt_tva tvam_tvad api_api atirsambhāvitaḥ_atirsambhāvita asi_as mahādeva--_mahādeva ādi--_ādi samāgamena_samāgama atas_atas na_na akīrti--_akīrti duḥkham_duḥkha soḍhum_sah śakṣyasi_śak iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya udāhṛta--_udāhṛ vacanam_vacana tu_tu artha--_artha śāstra--_śāstra tvāt_tva na_na nivarteta_nivṛt saṅgrāmāt_saṃgrāma iti_iti ādi--_ādi dharma--_dharma śāstrāt_śāstra durbalam_durbala iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha avyayām_avyaya anaśvarām_anaśvara saṃbhāvitasya_sambhāvay ati_ati pratiṣṭhitasya_pratiṣṭhā

baladevaḥ_baladeva na_na kevalam_kevala svadharmasya_svadharma kīrteḥ_kīrti ca_ca kṣati--_kṣati mātram_mātra yuddhe_yuddha samārabdhe_samārabh arjunaḥ_arjuna palāyate_palāy iti_iti avyayām_avyaya śāśvatīm_śāśvata akīrtim_akīrti ca_ca tava_tvad bhūtāni_bhūta sarve_sarva lokāḥ_loka kathayiṣyanti_kathay nanu_nanu maraṇāt_maraṇa bhītena_bhī mayā_mad akīrtiḥ_akīrti soḍhavyā_sah iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah sambhāvitasya_sambhāvay ati_ati pratiṣṭhitasya_pratiṣṭhā atiricyate_atiric adhikā_adhika bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā ca_ca maraṇam_maraṇa eva_eva varam_vara iti_iti

lg.l: bhayāt_bhaya raṇāt_raṇa uparatam_uparam maṃsyante_man tvām_tvad mahā--_mahat rathāḥ_ratha
yeṣām_yad ca_ca tvam_tvad bahu--_bahu mataḥ_man bhūtvā_bhū yāsyasi_yā lāghavam_lāghava

div.p: abhūḥ_bhū manyeran_man yāsyasi_yā
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yeṣām_yad tvam_tvad bahu--_bahu mataḥ_man asmad--_mad śatruḥ_śatru arjunaḥ_arjuna tu_tu mahā--_mahat śūraḥ_śūra iti_iti bahu--_bahu saṃmāna--_sammāna viṣayaḥ_viṣaya bhūtvā_bhū samprati_samprati yuddhāt_yuddha uparame_uparama sati_as lāghavam_lāghava yāsyasi_yā te_tad duryodhana--_duryodhana ādayaḥ_ādi mahā--_mahat rathāḥ_ratha tvām_tvad anvayaḥ_anvaya kṣatriyāṇām_kṣatriya hi_hi bhayam_bhaya vinā_vinā yuddha--_yuddha uparati--_uparati hetuḥ_hetu bandhu--_bandhu sneha--_sneha ādikaḥ_ādika na_na upapadyate_upapad iti_iti matvā_man iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu kula--_kula kṣaya--_kṣaya doṣāt_doṣa kāruṇyāt_kāruṇya ca_ca vinivṛttasya_vinivṛt mama_mad katham_katham akīrtiḥ_akīrti syāt_as iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah bhayāt_bhaya iti_iti mahā--_mahat rathāḥ_ratha duryodhana--_duryodhana ādayaḥ_ādi tvām_tvad karṇa--_karṇa ādi--_ādi bhayāt_bhaya na_na tu_tu bandhu--_bandhu kāruṇyāt_kāruṇya raṇāt_raṇa uparatam_uparam maṃsyante_man na_na hi_hi śūrasya_śūra śatru--_śatru bhayam_bhaya vinā_vinā bandhu--_bandhu snehena_sneha yuddhāt_yuddha uparatiḥ_uparati iti_iti arthaḥ_artha itas_itas pūrvam_pūrvam yeṣām_yad tvam_tvad bahu--_bahu mataḥ_man śūraḥ_śūra vairī_vairin iti_iti bahu--_bahu guṇavat--_guṇavat tayā_tā saṃmataḥ_samman abhūḥ_bhū idānīm_idānīm yuddhe_yuddha samupasthite_samupasthā kātaraḥ_kātara ayam_idam vinivṛttaḥ_vinivṛt iti_iti evam_evam tad--_tad kṛtam_kṛ lāghavam_lāghava duḥsaham_duḥsaha yāsyasi_yā
BhG 2.36

lg.l: avācya--_avācya vādān_vāda ca_ca bahūn_bahu vadiṣyanti_vad tava_tvad ahitāḥ_ahita
nindantaḥ_nind tava_tvad sāmarthyam_sāmarthya tatas_tatas duḥkhataram_duḥkhatara nu_nu kim_ka

div.p: vadiṣyanti_vad

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi mahā--_mahat rathāḥ_ratha na_na bahu_bahu manyantām_man duryodhana--_duryodhana ādayaḥ_ādi tu_tu śatravaḥ_śatru bahu_bahu maṃsyante_man mām_mad yuddha--_yuddha nivṛttyā_nivṛtti tad--_tad upakāri--_upakārin tvāt_tva iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah avācya--_avācya iti_iti tava_tvad asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa yat_yad sāmarthyam_sāmarthya loka--_loka prasiddham_prasidh tat_tad nindantaḥ_nind tava_tvad śatravaḥ_śatru duryodhana--_duryodhana ādayaḥ_ādi avācyān_avācya vādān_vāda vacanān_vacana arhān_arha ṣaṇḍha--_ṣaṇḍha tila--_tila ādi--_ādi rūpān_rūpa eva_eva śabdān_śabda bahūn_bahu aneka--_aneka prakārān_prakāra vadiṣyanti_vad na_na athavā_athavā tava_tvad sāmarthyam_sāmarthya stuti--_stuti yogya--_yogya tvam_tva tava_tvad nindantaḥ_nind ahitāḥ_ahita avācya--_avācya vādān_vāda vadiṣyanti_vad iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya
div.l: nanu_nanu bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādi--_ādi vadha--_vadha prayuktam_prayuj kaṣṭataram_kaṣṭatara duḥkham_duḥkha asahamānaḥ_asahamāna yuddhāt_yuddha nivṛttaḥ_nivṛt śatru--_śatru kṛta--_kṛ sāmarthya--_sāmarthya nindana--_nindana ādi--_ādi duḥkham_duḥkha soḍhum_sah śakṣyāmi_śak iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah tatas_tatas tasmāt_tad nindā--_nindā prāpti--_prāpti duḥkham_duḥkha na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka ca_ca avācyā_avācya iti_iti ahitāḥ_ahita śatravaḥ_śatru dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ_dhārtarāṣṭra tava_tvad sāmarthyam_sāmarthya pūrva--_pūrva siddham_sidh parākramam_parākrama nindantaḥ_nind bahūn_bahu avācya--_avācya vādān_vāda śaṇḍhatila--_śaṇḍhatila ādi--_ādi śabdān_śabda vadiṣyanti_vad tatas_tatas evaṃvidha--_evaṃvidha avācya--_avācya vāda--_vāda śravaṇāt_śravaṇa atiśāyitam_atiśāyita kim_ka duḥkham_duḥkha asti_as ittham_ittham ca_ca ete_etad ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ yuddha--_yuddha vairāgyasya_vairāgya asvarga--_asvarga tvam_tva akīrti--_akīrti kara--_kara tvam_tva ca_ca uktam_vac darśitam_darśay
BhG 2.37

lg.l: hataḥ_han vā_vā prāpsyasi_prāp svargam_svarga jitvā_ji vā_vā bhokṣyase_bhuj mahīm_mahī
tasmāt_tasmāt uttiṣṭha_utthā kaunteya_kaunteya yuddhāya_yuddha kṛta--_kṛ niścayaḥ_niścaya

div.p: āha_ah

āha_ah hataḥ_han vā_vā iti_iti spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa pūrva--_pūrva ardham_ardha yasmāt_yasmāt ubhayathā_ubhayathā api_api te_tvad lābhaḥ_lābha tasmāt_tasmāt jeṣyāmi_ji śatrūn_śatru mariṣyāmi_mṛ vā_vā iti_iti kṛta--_kṛ niścayaḥ_niścaya san_as yuddhāya_yuddha uttiṣṭha_utthā nayatara--_nayatara phala--_phala sandehe_saṃdeha api_api yuddha--_yuddha kartavya--_kṛ tāyāḥ_tā niścita--_niści tvāt_tva etena_etad na_na ca_ca etat_etad vidmaḥ_vid katarat_katara naḥ_mad garīyaḥ_garīyas iti_iti ādi_ādi parihṛtam_parihṛ 37_37

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nanu_nanu yuddhe_yuddha mama_mad jayaḥ_jaya eva_eva bhāvi_bhāvin iti_iti api_api na_na asti_as niścayaḥ_niścaya tatas_tatas ca_ca katham_katham yuddhe_yuddha pravartitavyam_pravṛt iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah hataḥ_han iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu yuddhe_yuddha vijayaḥ_vijaya eva_eva me_mad syāt_as iti_iti niścaya--_niścaya abhāvāt_abhāva tatas_tatas aham_mad nivṛttaḥ_nivṛt asmi_as iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah hataḥ_han vā_vā iti_iti pakṣa--_pakṣa dvaye_dvaya api_api te_tvad lābhaḥ_lābha eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 2.38

lg.l: sukha--_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha same_sama kṛtvā_kṛ lābha--_lābha alābhau_alābha jaya--_jaya ajayau_ajaya
tatas_tatas yuddhāya_yuddha yujyasva_yuj na_na evam_evam pāpam_pāpa avāpsyasi_avāp

div.p: āśrayet_āśri āha_ah sukha--_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha same_sama kṛtvā_kṛ tathā_tathā tayoḥ_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtau_bhū lābha--_lābha alābhau_alābha api_api tayoḥ_tad api_api kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtau_bhū jaya--_jaya ajayau_ajaya api_api samau_sama kṛtvā_kṛ eteṣām_etad samatve_samatva kāraṇam_kāraṇa harṣa--_harṣa viṣāda--_viṣāda rāhityam_rāhitya yujyasva_yuj san_as adhaḥ_adhas bhava_bhū sukha--_sukha ādi--_ādi abhilāsam_abhilāsa hitvā_hā svadharma--_svadharma buddhyā_buddhi yudhyamānaḥ_yudh pāpam_pāpa na_na prāpsyasi_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 38_38

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu evam_evam svargam_svarga uddiśya_uddiś yuddha--_yuddha karaṇe_karaṇa tasya_tad nitya--_nitya tva--_tva vyāghātaḥ_vyāghāta rājyam_rājya uddiśya_uddiś yuddha--_yuddha karaṇe_karaṇa tu_tu artha--_artha śāstra--_śāstra tvāt_tva dharma--_dharma śāstra--_śāstra apekṣayā_apekṣā daurbalyam_daurbalya syāt_as tatas_tatas ca_ca kāmyasya_kāmya akaraṇe_akaraṇa kutas_kutas pāpam_pāpa dṛṣṭārthasya_dṛṣṭārtha guru--_guru brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādi--_ādi vadhasya_vadha kutas_kutas dharma--_dharma tvam_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca atha_atha ced_ced iti_iti śloka--_śloka arthaḥ_artha vyāhataḥ_vyāhan iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah sukha--_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha iti_iti

sama--_sama tā--_tā karaṇam_karaṇa rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa rāhityam_rāhitya sukhe_sukha tad--_tad kāraṇe_kāraṇa lābhe_lābha tad--_tad kāraṇe_kāraṇa lābhe_lābha tad--_tad kāraṇe_kāraṇa jaye_jaya ca_ca rāgam_rāga a_a kṛtvā_kṛ evam_evam duḥkhe_duḥkha tad--_tad hetau_hetu alābhe_alābha tad--_tad hetau_hetu ajaye_ajaya ca_ca dveṣam_dveṣa a_a kṛtvā_kṛ tatas_tatas yuddhāya_yuddha yujyasva_yuj sannadhau_saṃnadhi bhava_bhū evam_evam sukha--_sukha kāmanām_kāmanā duḥkha--_duḥkha nivṛtti--_nivṛtti kāmanām_kāmanā vā_vā vihāya_vihā svadharma--_svadharma buddhyā_buddhi yudhyamānaḥ_yudh guru--_guru brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādi--_ādi vadha--_vadha nimittam_nimitta nitya--_nitya karma--_karman akaraṇa--_akaraṇa nimittam_nimitta ca_ca pāpam_pāpa na_na prāpsyasi_prāp yaḥ_yad tu_tu phala--_phala kāmanayā_kāmanā karoti_kṛ sa_tad guru--_guru brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādi--_ādi vadha--_vadha nimittam_nimitta pāpam_pāpa prāpnoti_prāp yaḥ_yad vā_vā na_na karoti_kṛ sa_tad nitya--_nitya karma--_karman akaraṇa--_akaraṇa nimittam_nimitta atas_atas phala--_phala kāmanām_kāmanā antareṇa_antareṇa kurvan_kṛ ubhaya--_ubhaya vidham_vidha api_api pāpam_pāpa na_na prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti prāk_prāk eva_eva vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya hataḥ_han vā_vā prāpsyasi_prāp svargam_svarga jitvā_ji vā_vā bhokṣyase_bhuj mahīm_mahī iti_iti sva--_sva ānuṣaṅgika--_ānuṣaṅgika phala--_phala kathanam_kathana iti_iti na_na doṣaḥ_doṣa tathā_tathā ca_ca āpastambaḥ_āpastamba smarati_smṛ tat_tad yathā_yathā āmre_āmra phala--_phala arthe_artha nimitte_nimitta chāyā--_chāyā gandhau_gandha anūtpadyete_anūtpad evam_evam dharmam_dharma caryamāṇam_car arthāḥ_artha anūtpadyante_anūtpad na_na u_u ced_ced anūtpadyante_anūtpad na_na dharma--_dharma hāniḥ_hāni bhavati_bhū iti_iti atas_atas yuddha--_yuddha śāstrasya_śāstra artha--_artha śāstra--_śāstra tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva pāpam_pāpa eva_eva āśrayet_āśri asmān_mad iti_iti ādi_ādi nirākṛtam_nirākṛ bhavati_bhū 38_38

āśaṅkase_āśaṅk āha_ah tad--_tad hetuḥ_hetu lābha--_lābha alābhau_alābha rājya--_rājya lābha--_lābha rāja--_rājan cyūtī_cyūti api_api tad--_tad hetuḥ_hetu jaya--_jaya ajayau_ajaya api_api samau_sama kṛtvā_kṛ vivekena_viveka tulyau_tulya vibhāvā_vibhāvan iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatas_tatas ca_ca evaṃ-bhūta--_evaṃbhūta sāmya--_sāmya lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa jñānavataḥ_jñānavat tava_tvad pāpam_pāpa nā_na eva_eva bhavet_bhū yat_yad vakṣyate_vac lipyate_lip na_na sa_tad pāpena_pāpa padma--_padma patram_pattra iva_iva ambhasā_ambhas iti_iti 38_38

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu atha_atha ced_ced tvam_tvad iti_iti ādi--_ādi padya--_padya arthaḥ_artha vyāhṛtaḥ_vyāhṛ rājya--_rājya ādi--_ādi uddeśena_uddeśa kṛtasya_kṛ yuddhasya_yuddha guru--_guru vipra--_vipra ādi--_ādi vināśa--_vināśa hetutvena_hetutva pāpa--_pāpa utpādaka--_utpādaka tvāt_tva iti_iti ced_ced mumukṣu--_mumukṣu vartmanā_vartman tava_tvad tad--_tad vināśa--_vināśa hetukam_hetuka pāpam_pāpa na_na syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah sukha--_sukha iti_iti sāmya--_sāmya karaṇam_karaṇa iha_iha tatra_tatra tatra_tatra nirvikāra--_nirvikāra tvam_tva bodhyam_budh sukhe_sukha tad--_tad hetau_hetu jaye_jaya ca_ca rāgam_rāga a_a kṛtvā_kṛ duḥkhe_duḥkha tad--_tad hetau_hetu alābhe_alābha tad--_tad hetau_hetu parājaye_parājaya ca_ca dveṣam_dveṣa a_a kṛtvā_kṛ tatra_tatra tatra_tatra nirvikāra--_nirvikāra cittaḥ_citta san_as tatas_tatas yuddhāya_yuddha yujyasva_yuj kevala--_kevala svadharma--_svadharma dhiyā_dhī yoddhum_yudh udyuktaḥ_udyuj bhava_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam mumukṣu--_mumukṣu rītyā_rīti yoddhā_yoddhṛ tvam_tvad pāpam_pāpa tad--_tad vināśa--_vināśa hetukam_hetuka na_na avāpsyasi_avāp phala--_phala icchuḥ_icchu san_as yaḥ_yad yudhyate_yudh sa_tad tat_tad pāpam_pāpa vindati_vid vijñāna--_vijñāna arthī_arthin tu_tu purātanam_purātana ananta--_ananta pāpam_pāpa apanudati_apanud iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.l: nanu_nanu phala--_phala rāgam_rāga vinā_vinā duṣkare_duṣkara yuddha--_yuddha dāna--_dāna ādau_ādi katham_katham pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti iti_iti ced_ced ananta--_ananta ātma--_ātman ānanda--_ānanda rāgam_rāga tatra_tatra gṛhāṇa_grah rājya--_rājya ādi--_ādi anurāgam_anurāga iva_iva bhṛgu--_bhṛgu pāte_pāta

div.p: BhG 2.39

lg.l: eṣā_etad te_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā sāṃkhye_sāṃkhya buddhiḥ_buddhi yoge_yoga tu_tu imām_idam śṛṇu_śru
buddhyā_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj yayā_yad pārtha_pārtha karma--_karman bandham_bandha prahāsyasi_prahā

div.p:
prastauti_prastu khyāyate_khyā prakāśyate_prakāśay vastu--_vastu tattvam_tattva anayā_idam saṅkhyā_saṃkhyā jñānam_jñāna tasyām_tad prakāśamānam_prakāś ātma--_ātman tattvam_tattva sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya tasmin_tad karaṇīyā_kṛ buddhiḥ_buddhi eṣā_etad tava_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā evam_evam abhihitāyām_abhidhā api_api tava_tvad ced_ced ātma--_ātman tattvam_tattva aparokṣam_aparokṣa na_na bhavati_bhū tarhi_tarhi antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi dvārā_dvār ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva aparokṣa--_aparokṣa artham_artha karma--_karman yoga_yoga tu_tu imām_idam buddhim_buddhi śṛṇu_śru yayā_yad buddhyā_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj parameśvara--_parameśvara arpita--_arpay karma--_karman yogena_yoga śuddha--_śudh antaḥkaraṇaḥ_antaḥkaraṇa san_as tad--_tad prasāda--_prasāda labdha--_labh aparokṣa--_aparokṣa jñānena_jñāna karma--_karman ātmakam_ātmaka bandham_bandha prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa
hāsyasi_hā tyakṣyasi_tyaj

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu bhavatu_bhū svadharma--_svadharma buddhyā_buddhi yudhyamānasya_yudh pāpa--_pāpa abhāvaḥ_abhāva tathā_tathā api_api na_na mām_mad prati_prati yuddha--_yuddha kartavyatā--_kartavyatā upadeśaḥ_upadeśa tava_tvad ucitaḥ_ucita yaḥ_yad enam_enad vetti_vid hantāram_hantṛ iti_iti ādinā_ādi katham_katham sa_tad puruṣaḥ_puruṣa pārtha_pārtha kam_ka ghātayati_ghātay hanti_han kam_ka iti_iti antena_anta viduṣaḥ_vidvas sarva--_sarva karma--_karman pratikṣepāt_pratikṣepa na_na hi_hi akartṛ--_akartṛ bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ śuddha--_śudh svarūpaḥ_svarūpa aham_mad asmi_as yuddham_yuddha kṛtvā_kṛ tad--_tad phalam_phala bhokṣye_bhuj iti_iti ca_ca jñānam_jñāna sambhavati_sambhū virodhāt_virodha jñāna--_jñāna karmaṇoḥ_karman samuccaya--_samuccaya asambhavāt_asaṃbhava prakāśa--_prakāśa tamasoḥ_tamas iva_iva ayam_idam ca_ca arjuna--_arjuna abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya jyāyasī_jyāyas ced_ced iti_iti atra_atra vyaktaḥ_vyakta bhaviṣyati_bhū tasmāt_tasmāt ekam_eka eva_eva mām_mad prati_prati jñānasya_jñāna karmaṇaḥ_karman ca_ca upadeśaḥ_upadeśa na_na upapadyate_upapad iti_iti ced_ced na_na vidvat--_vidvas avidvat--_avidvas avasthā--_avasthā bhedena_bheda jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman upadeśa--_upadeśa upapatteḥ_upapatti iti_iti āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat eṣā_etad iti_iti

eṣā_etad na_na tu_tu eva_eva aham_mad iti_iti ādi--_ādi eka--_eka viṃśati--_viṃśati ślokaiḥ_śloka te_tvad tubhyam_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā sāṅkhye_sāṃkhya samyak_samyak khyāyate_khyā sarva--_sarva upādhi--_upādhi śūnya--_śūnya tayā_tā pratipādyate_pratipāday paramātma--_paramātman tattvam_tattva anayā_idam iti_iti saṅkhyā--_saṃkhyā upaniṣad_upaniṣad tayā_tad eva_eva aupaniṣadaḥ_aupaniṣada puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tasmin_tad buddhiḥ_buddhi tanmātra--_tanmātra viṣayam_viṣaya jñānam_jñāna sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha nivṛtti--_nivṛtti kāraṇam_kāraṇa tvām_tvad prati_prati mayā_mad uktam_vac na_na etādṛśa--_etādṛśa jñānavataḥ_jñānavat kvacid_kvacid api_api karma_karman ucyate_vac tasya_tad kāryam_kārya na_na vidyate_vid iti_iti vakṣyamāṇa--_vac tvāt_tva

yadi_yadi punar_punar evam_evam mayā_mad ukte_vac api_api tava_tvad eṣā_etad buddhiḥ_buddhi nā_na udeti_udi citta--_citta doṣāt_doṣa tadā_tadā tad--_tad apanayena_apanaya ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva sākṣātkārāya_sākṣātkāra karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva tvayā_tvad anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā tasmin_tad yoge_yoga karma--_karman yoge_yoga tu_tu karaṇīyām_kṛ imām_idam sukha--_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha same_sama kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti atra_atra uktām_vac phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi tyāga--_tyāga lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa buddhim_buddhi vistareṇa_vistara mayā_mad vakṣyamāṇām_vac śṛṇu_śru tathā_tathā ca_ca śuddhāntaḥ_śuddhānta karaṇam_karaṇa prati_prati jñāna--_jñāna upadeśaḥ_upadeśa aśuddhāntaḥ_aśuddhānta karaṇam_karaṇa prati_prati karma--_karman upadeśaḥ_upadeśa iti_iti kutas_kutas samuccaya--_samuccaya śaṅkayā_śaṅkā virodha--_virodha avakāśaḥ_avakāśa iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya yoga--_yoga viṣayām_viṣaya buddhim_buddhi phala--_phala kathanena_kathana stauti_stu yathā_yathā vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikayā_ātmaka buddhyā_buddhi karmasu_karman yuktaḥ_yuj tvam_tvad karma--_karman nimittam_nimitta bandha--_bandha nāśāya_nāśa aśuddhi--_aśuddhi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa jñāna--_jñāna pratibandham_pratibandha prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa punar_punar pratibandha--_pratibandha anutpatti_anutpatti tyakṣyasi_tyaj ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva ---_karman nimittaḥ_nimitta jñāna--_jñāna pratibandhaḥ_pratibandha karmaṇā_karman eva_eva dharma--_dharma ākhyena_ākhyā apanetum_apanī śakyate_śak dharmeṇa_dharma pāpam_pāpa apanudati_apanud iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa vicāraḥ_vicāra tu_tu karma--_karman ātmaka--_ātmaka pratibandha--_pratibandha rahitasya_rahita asambhāvanā--_asaṃbhāvanā ādi--_ādi pratibandham_pratibandha dṛṣṭa--_dṛṣṭa dvāreṇa_dvāra apanayati_apanī iti_iti na_na karma--_karman bandha--_bandha nirākaraṇāya_nirākaraṇa upadeṣṭum_upadiś śakyate_śak atas_atas atyanta--_atyanta malina--_malina antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa tvāt_tva bahis_bahis aṅga--_aṅga sādhanam_sādhana karma_karman eva_eva tvayā_tvad anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā na_na adhunā_adhunā śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi yogyatā_yogyatā api_api tava_tvad jātā_jan dūre_dūra tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna yogya--_yogya tā_tā iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca vakṣyati_vac karmaṇi_karman eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra te_tvad iti_iti etena_etad sāṅkhya--_sāṅkhya buddheḥ_buddhi antaraṅga--_antaraṅga sādhanam_sādhana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi_ādi vihāya_vihā bahiraṅga--_bahiraṅga sādhanam_sādhana karma_karman eva_eva bhagavatā_bhagavant kim_ka iti_iti arjunāya_arjuna upadiśyate_upadiś iti_iti nirastam_niras karma--_karman bandham_bandha saṃsāram_saṃsāra īśvara--_īśvara prasāda--_prasāda nimitta--_nimitta jñāna--_jñāna prāptyā_prāpti prahāsyasi_prahā iti_iti prācām_prāñc vyākhyāne_vyākhyāna tu_tu adhyāhāra--_adhyāhāra doṣaḥ_doṣa karma--_karman pada--_pada vaiyarthyam_vaiyarthya ca_ca parihartavyam_parihṛ 39_39

upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ samyak_samyak khyāyate_khyā prakāśyate_prakāśay vastu--_vastu tattvam_tattva anena_idam iti_iti sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya samyak_samyak jñānam_jñāna tasmin_tad karaṇīyā_kṛ buddhiḥ_buddhi eṣa_etad kathitā_kathay adhunā_adhunā yoge_yoga bhakti--_bhakti yoge_yoga imām_idam vakṣyamāṇām_vac buddhim_buddhi karaṇīyām_kṛ śṛṇu_śru yayā_yad bhakti--_bhakti viṣayiṇyā_viṣayin buddhyā_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj sahitaḥ_sahita karma--_karman bandham_bandha saṃsāram_saṃsāra 39_39

baladevaḥ_baladeva uktam_vac jñāna--_jñāna yogam_yoga upasaṃharan_upasaṃhṛ tad--_tad upāyam_upāya niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogam_yoga vaktum_vac ārabhate_ārabh eṣā_etad iti_iti saṅkhyā--_saṃkhyā upaniṣad_upaniṣad samyak_samyak khyāyate_khyā nirūpyate_nirūpay tattvam_tattva anayā_idam iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti tayā_tad pratipādyam_pratipāday ātma--_ātman yāthātmyam_yāthātmya sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya śaiṣikān_śaiṣika tasmin_tad kartavyā_kṛ eṣā_etad buddhiḥ_buddhi tava_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā tu_tu eva_eva aham_mad iti_iti ādinā_ādi tasmāt_tad sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti antena_anta sā_tad ced_ced tava_tvad citta--_citta tad--_tad doṣān_doṣa na_na abhyudeti_abhyudi tarhi_tarhi yoge_yoga tam_tad etam_etad veda--_veda anuvacanena_anuvacana brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vividiṣanti_vividiṣ yajñena_yajña dānena_dāna tapasā_tapas nāśakena_nāśaka iti_iti ādi_ādi śruti--_śruti ukta--_vac antargata--_antargam jñāne_jñāna niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yoge_yoga phala--_phala uktyā_ukti tām_tad stauti_stu yayā_yad iti_iti karmāṇi_karman kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ tvam_tvad bhagavat--_bhagavant ājñayā_ājñā mahā--_mahat prayāsāni_prayāsa karmāṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ tad--_tad tad--_tad uddeśa--_uddeśa mahimnā_mahiman tvad--_tvad antar_antar abhyuditayā_abhyudi ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhayā_niṣṭhā saṃsāram_saṃsāra tariṣyasi_tṛ iti_iti paśu--_paśu putra--_putra rājya--_rājya ādi--_ādi phalakam_phalaka karma_karman sa_sa kāmam_kāma jñāna--_jñāna phalakam_phalaka tu_tu tat_tad niṣkāmam_niṣkāma iti_iti śāstre_śāstra asmin_idam paribhāṣyate_paribhāṣ 39_39
BhG 2.40

lg.l: na_na iha_iha abhikrama--_abhikrama nāśaḥ_nāśa asti_as pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya na_na vidyate_vid
su_su alpam_alpa api_api asya_idam dharmasya_dharma trāyate_trā mahataḥ_mahat bhayāt_bhaya

div.p: tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na iha_iha iti_iti ādi_ādi iha_iha niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yoge_yoga abhikramasya_abhikrama prārambhasya_prārambha nāśaḥ_nāśa niṣphala--_niṣphala tvam_tva na_na asti_as pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya ca_ca na_na vidyate_vid īśvara--_īśvara uddeśena_uddeśa eva_eva vighna--_vighna vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya ādi--_ādi asambhavāt_asaṃbhava kim_ka ca_ca asya_idam dharmasya_dharma īśvara--_īśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana artha--_artha karma--_karman yogasya_yoga su_su alpam_alpa api_api upakrama--_upakrama mātram_mātra api_api kṛtam_kṛ mahataḥ_mahat bhayāt_bhaya saṃsāra--_saṃsāra lakṣaṇāt_lakṣaṇa trāyate_trā rakṣati_rakṣ na_na tu_tu kāmya--_kāmya karma--_karman vat_vat kiñcid_kaścit aṅga--_aṅga vaikguṇya--_vaikguṇya ādinā_ādi naiṣphalyam_naiṣphalya asya_idam iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu tam_tad etam_etad veda--_veda anuvacanena_anuvacana brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vividiṣanti_vividiṣ yajñena_yajña dānena_dāna tapasā_tapas anāśakena_anāśaka iti_iti śrutyā_śruti vividiṣām_vividiṣā jñānam_jñāna ca_ca uddiśya_uddiś saṃyoga--_saṃyoga pṛthaktva--_pṛthaktva nyāyena_nyāya sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman viniyogāt_viniyoga tatra_tatra ca_ca antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa śuddheḥ_śuddhi dvāra--_dvāra tvāt_tva mām_mad prati_prati karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna vidhīyate_vidhā tatra_tatra tat_tad yathā_yathā iha_iha karma--_karman jitaḥ_ji lokaḥ_loka kṣīyate_kṣi evam_evam eva_eva amutra_amutra puṇya--_puṇya jitaḥ_ji lokaḥ_loka kṣīyate_kṣi iti_iti śruti--_śruti bodhitasya_bodhay phala--_phala nāśasya_nāśa sambhāvāt_sambhāva jñānam_jñāna vividiṣām_vividiṣā ca_ca uddiśya_uddiś kriyamāṇasya_kṛ yajña--_yajña ādeḥ_ādi kāmya--_kāmya sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upasaṃhāreṇa_upasaṃhāra anuṣṭheyasya_anuṣṭhā yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit aṅga--_aṅga asampattau_asaṃpatti api_api vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya āpatteḥ_āpatti yajñena_yajña iti_iti ādi--_ādi vākya--_vākya vihitānām_vidhā ca_ca sarveṣām_sarva karmaṇām_karman ekena_eka puruṣa--_puruṣa āyuṣa--_āyuṣa paryavasāne_paryavasāna api_api kartum_kṛ aśakya--_aśakya pratyāśā_pratyāśā iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat na_na iha_iha iti_iti

abhikramyate_abhikram karmaṇā_karman prārabhyate_prārabh yat_yad phalam_phala saḥ_tad abhikramaḥ_abhikrama tasya_tad nāśaḥ_nāśa tat_tad yathā_yathā iha_iha iti_iti ādinā_ādi pratipāditaḥ_pratipāday iha_iha niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yoge_yoga na_na asti_as vedana--_vedana paryantāyāḥ_paryanta eva_eva vividiṣāyāḥ_vividiṣā karma--_karman phala--_phala tvāt_tva vedanasya_vedana ca_ca avyavadhānena_avyavadhāna ajñāna--_ajñāna nivṛtti--_nivṛtti phala--_phala janakasya_janaka phalam_phala a_a janayitvā_janay nāśa--_nāśa asambhavāt_asaṃbhava iha_iha phala--_phala nāśaḥ_nāśa na_na asti_as iti_iti sādhu_sādhu uktam_vac tat_tad uktam_vac

tat_tad yathā_yathā iha_iha iti_iti yā_yad nindā_nindā sā_tad phale_phala na_na tu_tu karmaṇi_karman phala--_phala icchām_icchā tu_tu parityajya_parityaj kṛtam_kṛ karma_karman viśuddhi--_viśuddhi kṛt_kṛt iti_iti

tathā_tathā pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya aṅga--_aṅga vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya nibandhanam_nibandhana vaiguṇyam_vaiguṇya iha_iha na_na vidyate_vid tam_tad iti_iti vākyena_vākya nityānām_nitya eva_eva upātta--_upadā durita--_durita kṣaya--_kṣaya dvāreṇa_dvāra vividiṣāyām_vividiṣā viniyogāt_viniyoga tatra_tatra ca_ca sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upasaṃhāra--_upasaṃhāra niyama--_niyama abhāvāt_abhāva kāmyānām_kāmya api_api saṃyoga--_saṃyoga pṛthaktva--_pṛthaktva nyāyena_nyāya viniyogaḥ_viniyoga iti_iti pakṣe_pakṣa api_api phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi rahitatvena_rahitatva teṣām_tad nitya--_nitya tulya--_tulya tvāt_tva nahi_nahi kāmya--_kāmya nitya--_nitya agnihotrayoḥ_agnihotra svatas_svatas kaścid_kaścit viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa asti_as phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi tad--_tad abhāṣābhyām_abhāṣā eva_eva tu_tu kāmya--_kāmay tva--_tva nitya--_nitya tva--_tva vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa idam_idam ca_ca pakṣa--_pakṣa dvayam_dvaya uktam_vac vārtike_vārttika

lg.l: veda--_veda anuvacana--_anuvacana ādīnām_ādi aikātmya--_aikātmya jñāna--_jñāna janmane_janman
tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti vākyena_vākya nityānām_nitya vakṣyate_vac vidhiḥ_vidhi

div.p: yat_yad vā_vā vividiṣā--_vividiṣā artha--_artha tvam_tva kāmyānām_kāmya api_api karmaṇām_karman tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti vākyena_vākya saṃyogasya_saṃyoga pṛthaktvataḥ_pṛthaktva iti_iti

tathā_tathā ca_ca phala--_phala abhisandhinā_abhisaṃdhi kriyamāṇe_kṛ eva_eva karmaṇi_karman sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upa_upa saṃhāra--_saṃhāra niyamāt_niyama tad--_tad vilakṣaṇe_vilakṣaṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi arthe_artha karmaṇi_karman pratinidhi--_pratinidhi ādinā_ādi samāpti--_samāpti sambhavāt_sambhava na_na aṅga--_aṅga vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya nimittaḥ_nimitta pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya tathā_tathā asya_idam śuddhi--_śuddhi arthasya_artha dharmasya_dharma tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti ādi--_ādi vākya--_vākya vihitasya_vidhā madhye_madhya su_su alpam_alpa api_api saṅkhyayā_saṃkhyā itikartavyatayā_itikartavyatā vā_vā yathā_yathā śakti--_śakti bhagavat--_bhagavant ārādhana--_ārādhana artham_artha kiṃcid_kaścit api_api anuṣṭhitam_anuṣṭhā sat_as mahataḥ_mahat bhagavat--_bhagavant prasāda--_prasāda sampādanena_sampādana anuṣṭhātāram_anuṣṭhātṛ rakṣati_rakṣ

sarva--_sarva pāpa--_pāpa prasaktaḥ_prasañj api_api dhyāyan_dhyā nimiṣam_nimiṣa acyutam_acyuta bhūyas_bhūyas tapasvī_tapasvin bhavati_bhū paṅki--_paṅki pāvana--_pāvana pāvanaḥ_pāvana iti_iti ādi_ādi smṛteḥ_smṛti
div.l: tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti vākye_vākya samuccaya--_samuccaya vidhāyaka--_vidhāyaka abhāvāt_abhāva ca_ca aśuddhi--_aśuddhi tāratamyāt_tāratamya eva_eva anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna tāratamya--_tāratamya upapatteḥ_upapatti yuktam_yuj uktam_vac karma--_karman bandham_bandha prahāsyasi_prahā
div.p: tatra_tatra karmaṇi_karman eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra iti_iti atas_atas prāk_prāk bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva nirūpyate_nirūpay nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya bhava_bhū arjunaḥ_arjuna iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti bhakteḥ_bhakti eve_eva triguṇa--_triguṇa atīta--_atī tvāt_tva tayā_tad eva_eva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya bhavati_bhū iti_iti ekādaśa--_ekādaśan skandhe_skandha prasiddheḥ_prasiddhi jñāna--_jñāna karmaṇoḥ_karman tu_tu sāttvika--_sāttvika tva--_tva rājasa--_rājasa tvābhyām_tva nistraiguṇya--_nistraiguṇya tva--_tva anupapatteḥ_anupapatti bhagavat--_bhagavant arpita--_arpay lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa bhaktiḥ_bhakti tu_tu karmaṇaḥ_karman vaiphalya--_vaiphalya abhāva--_abhāva mātram_mātra pratipādayati_pratipāday na_na tu_tu svasya_sva bhakti--_bhakti vyapadeśam_vyapadeśa yadi_yadi ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant arpitam_arpay karma_karman api_api bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva iti_iti matam_man tadā_tadā karma_karman kim_ka syāt_as yat_yad bhagavat--_bhagavant anarpita--_anarpita karma_karman tat_tad eva_eva karma_karman iti_iti ced_ced na_na

lg.l: naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya api_api acyuta--_acyuta bhāva--_bhāva varjitam_varjay
na_na śobhate_śubh jñānam_jñāna alam_alam nirañjanam_nirañjana
kutas_kutas punar_punar śaśvat_śaśvat abhadram_abhadra īśvare_īśvara
na_na ca_ca arpitam_arpay karma_karman yat_yad api_api akāraṇam_akāraṇa

div.p: iti_iti nārada--_nārada uktyā_ukti tasya_tad vaiyarthya--_vaiyarthya pratipādanāt_pratipādana tasmāt_tasmāt atra_atra bhagvat--_bhagvant caraṇa--_caraṇa mādhurya--_mādhurya prāpti--_prāpti sādhanībhūtā_sādhanībhū kevala--_kevala śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa eva_eva bhaktiḥ_bhakti nirūpyate_nirūpay yathā_yathā niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yoga_yoga api_api nirūpayitavyaḥ_nirūpay ubhau_ubh api_api etau_etad buddhi--_buddhi yoga--_yoga śabda--_śabda vācyau_vac jñeyau_jñā dadāmi_dā buddhi--_buddhi yogam_yoga tam_tad yena_yad mām_mad upayānti_upayā te_tad dūreṇa_dūra hi_hi avaram_avara karma_karman buddhi--_buddhi yogāt_yoga dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya iti_iti ca_ca ukteḥ_ukti

atha_atha nirguṇa--_nirguṇa śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana ādi--_ādi bhakti--_bhakti yogasya_yoga māhātmyam_māhātmya āha_ah na_na iha_iha iti_iti iha_iha bhakti--_bhakti yoge_yoga abhikrame_abhikrama ārambha--_ārambha mātre_mātra kṛte_kṛ api_api asya_idam bhaktiyogasya_bhaktiyoga nāśaḥ_nāśa nā_na asti_as tatas_tatas pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya ca_ca na_na syāt_as yathā_yathā karma--_karman yoge_yoga ārambham_ārambha kṛtvā_kṛ karma_karman anuṣṭhitavataḥ_anuṣṭhā karma--_karman nāśa--_nāśa pratyavāyau_pratyavāya syātām_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi tasya_tad bhakti--_bhakti anuṣṭhātu--_anuṣṭhātu kāmasya_kāma samucita--_samucita bhakti--_bhakti akaraṇāt_akaraṇa bhakti--_bhakti phalam_phala tu_tu nā_na eva_eva syāt_as tatra_tatra āha_ah su_su alpam_alpa iti_iti asya_idam dharmasya_dharma su_su alpam_alpa api_api ārambha--_ārambha samaye_samaya yā_yad kiñcid--_kaścit mātrī_mātra bhaktiḥ_bhakti abhūt_bhū sā_tad api_api iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mahataḥ_mahat bhayāt_bhaya saṃsārāt_saṃsāra trāyate_trā eva_eva yad--_yad nāma_nāman sakṛt_sakṛt śravaṇāt_śravaṇa pukkaśaḥ_pukkaśa api_api vimucyate_vimuc saṃsārāt_saṃsāra iti_iti ādi--_ādi śravaṇāt_śravaṇa ajāmila--_ajāmila ādau_ādi tathā_tathā darśanāt_darśana ca_ca

lg.l: na_na hi_hi aṅga--_aṅga upakrame_upakrama dhvaṃso_dhvaṃsu
mad--_mad dharmasya_dharma uddhava_uddhava aṇu_aṇu api_api
mayā_mad vyavasitaḥ_vyavasā samyaṅ_samyak
nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvāt_tva an_an āśiṣaḥ_āśis

div.p: iti_iti bhagavataḥ_bhagavant vākyena_vākya saha_saha asya_idam vākyasya_vākya ekārtham_ekārtha eva_eva dṛśyate_dṛś kintu_kiṃtu tatra_tatra nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvāt_tva na_na hi_hi guṇa--_guṇa atītam_atī vastu_vastu kadācid_kadācid dhvastam_dhvaṃs bhavati_bhū iti_iti hetuḥ_hetu upanyastaḥ_upanyas sa_tad ca_ca iha_iha api_api draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś na_na ca_ca niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇaḥ_karman api_api bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇa--_arpaṇa mahimnā_mahiman nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvam_tva eva_eva iti_iti vācyam_vac mad--_mad arpaṇam_arpaṇa niṣphalam_niṣphala vā_vā sāttvikam_sāttvika nija--_nija karma_karman tat_tad

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_vac buddhyā_buddhi yuktam_yuj karma--_karman yogam_yoga stauti_stu na_na iha_iha iti_iti iha_iha tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti ādi_ādi vākya--_vākya ukteḥ_ukti niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yoge_yoga abhikramasya_abhikrama ārambhasya_ārambha phala--_phala utpādaka--_utpādaka tva--_tva nāśaḥ_nāśa na_na asti_as ārambhasya_ārambha asamāptasya_asamāpta vaiphalyam_vaiphalya na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mantra--_mantra ādi--_ādi aṅga--_aṅga vaikalye_vaikalya ca_ca pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya na_na vidyate_vid ātma--_ātman uddeśa--_uddeśa mahimnā_mahiman om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant nāmnā_nāman ca_ca tasya_tad vināśāt_vināśa iha_iha bhagavat--_bhagavant arpitasya_arpay niṣāma--_niṣāman karma--_karman lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa dharmasya_dharma kiñcid_kaścit api_api anuṣṭhitam_anuṣṭhā sat_as mahataḥ_mahat bhayāt_bhaya saṃsārāt_saṃsāra trāyate_trā anuṣṭhātāram_anuṣṭhātṛ rakṣati_rakṣ vakṣyati_vac ca_ca evam_evam pārtha_pārtha na_na eva_eva iha_iha na_na amutra_amutra iti_iti ādinā_ādi kāmya--_kāmya karmāṇi_karman sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upasaṃhāreṇa_upasaṃhāra anuṣṭhitāni_anuṣṭhā ukta--_vac phalāya_phala kalpante_kﾱp mantra--_mantra ādi--_ādi aṅga--_aṅga vaikalye_vaikalya tu_tu pratyavāyam_pratyavāya janayanti_janay iti_iti niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmāṇi_karman tu_tu yathā_yathā śakti--_śakti anuṣṭhitāni_anuṣṭhā jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa phalam_phala janayanti_janay eva_eva ukta--_vac hetutaḥ_hetu pratyavāyam_pratyavāya na_na uptādayanti_uptāday iti_iti
BhG 2.41

lg.l: vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi ekā_eka iha_iha kuru--_kuru nandana_nandana
bahu--_bahu śākhāḥ_śākhā hi_hi anantāḥ_ananta ca_ca buddhayaḥ_buddhi avyavasāyinām_avyavasāyin

div.p: āha_ah iha_iha īśvara--_īśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa karma--_karman yoge_yoga vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka parameśvara--_parameśvara bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva dhruvam_dhruvam tariṣyāmi_tṛ iti_iti niścaya--_niścaya ātmikā_ātmaka ekā_eka eva_eva eka--_eka niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā eva_eva buddhiḥ_buddhi bhavati_bhū avyavasāyinām_avyavasāyin tu_tu īśvara--_īśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana bahirmukhānām_bahirmukha kāminām_kāmin kāmānām_kāma ānantyāt_ānantya anantāḥ_ananta tatra_tatra api_api hi_hi karma--_karman phala--_phala guṇa--_guṇa phala--_phala tva--_tva ādi--_ādi prakāra--_prakāra bhedāt_bheda bahu--_bahu śākhāḥ_śākhā ca_ca buddhayaḥ_buddhi bhavanti_bhū īśvara--_īśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana artham_artha hi_hi nityam_nitya naimittikam_naimittika ca_ca karma_karman kiñcid_kaścit aṅga--_aṅga vaiguṇye_vaiguṇya api_api na_na naśyati_naś yathā_yathā śaknuyāt_śak tathā_tathā kuryāt_kṛ iti_iti hi_hi tat_tad vidhīyate_vidhā na_na ca_ca vaiguṇyam_vaiguṇya api_api īśvara--_īśvara uddeśena_uddeśa eva_eva vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya upaśamāt_upaśama na_na tu_tu tathā_tathā kāmyam_kāmya karma_karman atas_atas mahat_mahat vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etad--_etad upapādanāya_upapādana tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti vākya--_vākya vihitānām_vidhā ekārtha--_ekārtha tvam_tva āha_ah vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka iti_iti he_he kuru--_kuru nandana_nandana iha_iha śreyaḥ--_śreyas mārge_mārga tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti vākye_vākya vā_vā vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmakā_ātmaka ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva niścaya--_niścaya ātmakā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi ekā_eka eva_eva caturṇām_catur āśramāṇām_āśrama sādhyā_sādhay vivakṣitā_vivakṣita veda--_veda anuvacanena_anuvacana iti_iti ādau_ādi tṛtīyā--_tṛtīyā bhinna--_bhid artha--_artha tve_tva hi_hi samuccayaḥ_samuccaya syāt_as eka--_eka artha--_artha tve_tva api_api darśa--_darśa pūrṇamāsābhyām_pūrṇamāsa iti_iti vat_vat dvandva--_dvaṃdva samāsena_samāsa yat_yat agnaye_agni ca_ca prajāpataye_prajāpati ca_ca iti_iti vat_vat ca_ca śabdena_śabda na_na tathā_tathā atra_atra kiṃcid_kaścit pramāṇam_pramāṇa asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sāṅkhya--_sāṅkhya viṣayā_viṣaya yoga--_yoga viṣayā_viṣaya ca_ca buddhiḥ_buddhi eka--_eka phala--_phala tvāt_tva ekā_eka vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka sarva--_sarva viparīta--_viparīta buddhīnām_buddhi bādhikā_bādhaka nirdoṣa--_nirdoṣa veda--_veda vākya--_vākya samuttha--_samuttha tvāt_tva itarāḥ_itara tu_tu avyavasāyinām_avyavasāyin buddhayaḥ_buddhi bādhyāḥ_bādh iti_iti anye_anya tu_tu parameśvara--_parameśvara ārādhanena_ārādhana eva_eva saṃsāram_saṃsāra tariṣyāmi_tṛ iti_iti niścaya--_niścaya ātmikā_ātmaka eka--_eka niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā eva_eva buddhiḥ_buddhi iha_iha karma--_karman yoge_yoga bhavati_bhū iti_iti artham_artha āhuḥ_ah sarvathā_sarvathā api_api tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa anusāreṇa_anusāra su_su alpam_alpa api_api asya_idam dharmasya_dharma trāyate_trā mahataḥ_mahat bhayāt_bhaya iti_iti upapannam_upapad karma--_karman kāṇḍe_kāṇḍa punar_punar bahu--_bahu śākhāḥ_śākhā aneka--_aneka bhedāḥ_bheda kāmānām_kāma aneka--_aneka bheda--_bheda tvāt_tva anantāḥ_ananta ca_ca karma--_karman phala--_phala guṇa--_guṇa phala--_phala ādi--_ādi prakāra--_prakāra upaśākhā--_upaśākhā bhedāt_bheda buddhayaḥ_buddhi bhavanti_bhū avyavasāyinām_avyavasāyin tad--_tad tad--_tad phala--_phala kāmānām_kāma buddhīnām_buddhi ānantya--_ānantya prasiddhi--_prasiddhi dyotana--_dyotana arthaḥ_artha hi_hi śabdaḥ_śabda atas_atas kāmya--_kāmya karma--_karman apekṣayā_apekṣā mahat--_mahat vailakṣaṇya--_vailakṣaṇya śuddhi--_śuddhi artha--_artha karmaṇām_karman iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

āha_ah iha_iha bhakti--_bhakti yoge_yoga vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi ekā_eka eva_eva mama_mad śrīmat--_śrīmat guru--_guru upadiṣṭam_upadiś bhagavat--_bhagavant kīrtana--_kīrtana smaraṇa--_smaraṇa caraṇa--_caraṇa paricarṇa--_paricarṇa ādikam_ādika etat_etad eva_eva mama_mad sādhanam_sādhana etat_etad eva_eva mama_mad sādhyam_sādhay etat_etad eva_eva mama_mad jīvātuḥ_jīvātu sādhana--_sādhana sādhya--_sādhay daśayoḥ_daśā tyaktum_tyaj aśakyam_aśakya etat_etad anyat_anya na_na me_mad kāryam_kārya na_na api_api abhilaṣaṇīyam_abhilaṣ svapne_svapna api_api iti_iti atra_atra sukham_sukha astu_as duḥkham_duḥkha vā_vā astu_as saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra naśyatu_naś vā_vā na_na naśyatu_naś tatra_tatra mama_mad kā_ka api_api na_na kṣatiḥ_kṣati iti_iti evam_evam niścaya--_niścaya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi akaitava--_akaitava bhaktau_bhakti eva_eva sambhavet_sambhū tat_tad uktam_vac tatas_tatas bhajeta_bhaj mām_mad bhaktyā_bhakti śraddhāluḥ_śraddhālu dṛḍha--_dṛḍha niścayaḥ_niścaya iti_iti

tatas_tatas anyatra_anyatra na_na eva_eva buddhiḥ_buddhi ekā_eka iti_iti āha_ah bahu_bahu iti_iti bahavaḥ_bahu śākhāḥ_śākhā yāsām_yad tāḥ_tad tathā_tathā hi_hi karma--_karman yoge_yoga kāmānām_kāma ānantyāt_ānantya buddhayaḥ_buddhi anantāḥ_ananta tathā_tathā eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna yoge_yoga prathamam_prathamam antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇi_karman buddhiḥ_buddhi tatas_tatas tasmin_tad śuddhe_śudh sati_as karma--_karman saṃnyāse_saṃnyāsa buddhiḥ_buddhi jñāne_jñāna buddhiḥ_buddhi jñāna--_jñāna vaiphalya--_vaiphalya abhāva--_abhāva artham_artha bhaktau_bhakti buddhiḥ_buddhi jñānam_jñāna ca_ca mayi_mad saṃnyaset_saṃnyas iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant ukteḥ_ukti jñāna--_jñāna saṃnyāse_saṃnyāsa ca_ca bhaktau_bhakti buddhiḥ_buddhi iti_iti buddhayaḥ_buddhi anantāḥ_ananta

āha_ah he_he kuru--_kuru nandanaḥ_nandana iha_iha vaidikeṣu_vaidika sarveṣu_sarva karmasu_karman vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka bhagavat--_bhagavant arcana--_arcana rūpaiḥ_rūpa niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmabhiḥ_karman viśuddha--_viśudh cittaḥ_citta viṣa--_viṣa ūrṇā--_ūrṇā ādi--_ādi vat_vat tad--_tad antargatena_antargam jñānena_jñāna ātma--_ātman yāthātmyam_yāthātmya aham_mad ekap--_ekap viṣaya--_viṣaya tvāt_tva ekasmai_eka tad--_tad anubhavāya_anubhava teṣām_tad vihita--_vidhā tvāt_tva iti_iti yāvat_yāvat avyavasāyinām_avyavasāyin kāmya--_kāmya karma--_karman anuṣṭhātṝṇām_anuṣṭhātṛ tu_tu buddhayaḥ_buddhi hi_hi anantāḥ_ananta tatra_tatra api_api bahu--_bahu śākhāḥ_śākhā eka--_eka phalake_phalaka api_api darśa--_darśa paurṇamāsa--_paurṇamāsa ādau_ādi āyuḥ--_āyus suprajastā--_suprajastā ādi--_ādi avāntara--_avāntara aneka--_aneka phala--_phala āśaṃsā--_āśaṃsā śravaṇāt_śravaṇa atra_atra hi_hi deha--_deha atirikta--_atiric ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna mātram_mātra apekṣate_apekṣ na_na tu_tu ukta--_vac ātma--_ātman yāthātmyam_yāthātmya tat_tad niścaye_niścaya kāmya--_kāmay karmasu_karman pravṛtteḥ_pravṛtti asambhavāt_asaṃbhava

lg.l: yām_yad imām_idam puṣpitām_puṣpita vācam_vāc pravadanti_pravad a_a vipaścitaḥ_vipaścit
veda--_veda vāda--_vāda ratāḥ_ram pārtha_pārtha na_na anyat_anya asti_as iti_iti vādinaḥ_vādin
kāma--_kāma ātmānaḥ_ātman svarga--_svarga parāḥ_para janma--_janman karma--_karman phala--_phala pradām_prada
kriyā--_kriyā viśeṣa--_viśeṣa bahulām_bahula bhoga--_bhoga aiśvarya--_aiśvarya gatim_gati prati_prati
bhoga--_bhoga aiśvarya--_aiśvarya prasaktānām_prasañj tayā_tad apahṛta--_apahṛ cetasām_cetas
vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi samādhau_samādhi na_na vidhīyate_vidhā

div.p: kurvanti_kṛ tatra_tatra āha_ah yām_yad imām_idam iti_iti ādi_ādi yām_yad imām_idam puṣpitām_puṣpita viṣa--_viṣa latā--_latā vat_vat āpāta--_āpāta ramaṇīyām_ramaṇīya prakṛṣṭām_prakṛṣṭa paramārtha--_paramārtha phala--_phala parām_para eva_eva vadanti_vad vācam_vāc svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi phala--_phala śrutim_śruti teṣām_tad tayā_tad vācā_vāc apahṛta--_apahṛ cetasām_cetas vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi samādhau_samādhi na_na vidhīyate_vidhā iti_iti tṛtīyena_tṛtīya anvayaḥ_anvaya kim_ka vadanti_vad yatas_yatas a_a vipaścitaḥ_vipaścit mūḍhāḥ_muh hetuḥ_hetu veda--_veda vāda--_vāda ratāḥ_ram vede_veda ye_yad vādāḥ_vāda artha--_artha vādāḥ_vāda akṣayyam_akṣayya ha_ha vai_vai cāturmāsya--_cāturmāsya yājinaḥ_yājin sukṛtam_sukṛta bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā apām_ap somam_soma amṛtāḥ_amṛta iti_iti ādyāḥ_ad teṣu_tad eva_eva ratāḥ_ram prītāḥ_prī ataeva_ataeva atas_atas param_param anyat_anya īśvara--_īśvara tattvam_tattva prāpyam_prāp na_na asti_as iti_iti vadana--_vadana śīlāḥ_śīla 42_42

ataeva_ataeva kāma--_kāma ātmānaḥ_ātman iti_iti kāma--_kāma ātmānaḥ_ātman kāma--_kāma ākulita--_ākulita cittāḥ_citta atas_atas svargaḥ_svarga eva_eva paraḥ_para puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha yeṣām_yad te_tad janma_janman karmāṇi_karman tad--_tad phalāni_phala pradadāti_pradā tām_tad bhoga--_bhoga aiśvaryayoḥ_aiśvarya gatim_gati prāptim_prāpti prati_prati sādhana--_sādhana bhūtāḥ_bhū ye_yad kriyā--_kriyā viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa te_tad bahulāḥ_bahula yasyām_yad tām_tad pravadanti_pravad iti_iti anuṣaṅgaḥ_anuṣaṅga

tatas_tatas ca_ca bhoga--_bhoga aiśvarya--_aiśvarya prasaktānām_prasañj iti_iti ādi_ādi bhoga--_bhoga aiśvaryayoḥ_aiśvarya prasaktānām_prasañj abhiniviṣṭānām_abhiniviś tayā_tad puṣpitayā_puṣpita vācā_vāc apahṛtam_apahṛ ākṛṣṭam_ākṛṣ cetaḥ_cetas yeṣām_yad teṣām_tad parameśvara--_parameśvara abhimukha--_abhimukha tvam_tva iti_iti yāvat_yāvat tasmin_tad niścaya--_niścaya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi tu_tu na_na vidhīyate_vidhā karma--_karman kartari_kartṛ prayogaḥ_prayoga sā_tad na_na utpadyate_utpad iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

bhavati_bhū bhavati_bhū āha_ah kutas_kutas evam_evam atas_atas āha_ah bhoga--_bhoga aiśvarya--_aiśvarya gatim_gati prati_prati kriyā--_kriyā viśeṣa--_viśeṣa bahulām_bahula amṛta--_amṛta pāna--_pāna urvaśī--_urvaśī vihāra--_vihāra pārijāta--_pārijāta parimala--_parimala ādi--_ādi nibandhanaḥ_nibandhana yaḥ_yad bhogaḥ_bhoga tad--_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa ca_ca yat_yad aiśvaryam_aiśvarya deva--_deva ādi--_ādi svāmitvam_svāmitva kriyā--_kriyā viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa agnihotra--_agnihotra darśa--_darśa pūrṇamāsa--_pūrṇamāsa jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādayaḥ_ādi taiḥ_tad bahulām_bahula vistṛtām_vistṛ ati_ati bāhulyena_bāhulya bhoga--_bhoga aiśvarya--_aiśvarya sādhana--_sādhana kriyā--_kriyā kalāpa--_kalāpa pratipādikām_pratipādaka iti_iti yāvat_yāvat karma--_karman kāṇḍasya_kāṇḍa hi_hi jñāna--_jñāna kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa apekṣayā_apekṣā sarvatra_sarvatra ati_ati vistṛta--_vistṛ tvam_tva prasiddham_prasidh etādṛśīm_etādṛśa karma--_karman kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa vācam_vāc pravadanti_pravad prakṛṣṭām_prakṛṣ paramārtha--_paramārtha svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi phalām_phala abhyupagacchanti_abhyupagam

ke_ka ye_yad a_a vipaścitaḥ_vipaścit vicāra--_vicāra janya--_jan tātparya--_tātparya parijñāna--_parijñāna śūnyāḥ_śūnya ataeva_ataeva veda--_veda vāda--_vāda ratāḥ_ram vede_veda ye_yad santi_as vādāḥ_vāda artha--_artha vādāḥ_vāda akṣayyam_akṣayya ha_ha vai_vai cāturmāsya--_cāturmāsya yājinaḥ_yājin sukṛtam_sukṛta bhavati_bhū iti_iti evam_evam ādayaḥ_ādi teṣu_tad eva_eva ratāḥ_ram veda--_veda artha--_artha satya--_satya tvena_tva evam_evam eva_eva etat_etad iti_iti mithyā_mithyā he_he pārtha_pārtha ataeva_ataeva na_na anyat_anya asti_as iti_iti vādinaḥ_vādin karma--_karman kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa apekṣayā_apekṣā na_na asti_as anyat_anya jñāna--_jñāna kāṇḍam_kāṇḍa sarvasya_sarva api_api vedasya_veda kārya--_kārya paratvāt_paratva karma--_karman phala--_phala apekṣayā_apekṣā ca_ca na_na asti_as anyat_anya niratiśayam_niratiśaya jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala iti_iti vadana--_vadana śīlāḥ_śīla mahatā_mahat prabandhena_prabandha jñāna--_jñāna kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa viruddha--_virudh artha--_artha bhāṣiṇaḥ_bhāṣin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kutas_kutas mokṣa--_mokṣa dveṣiṇyaḥ_dveṣin te_tad yatas_yatas kāma--_kāma ātmānaḥ_ātman kāmyamāna--_kāmay viṣaya--_viṣaya śata--_śata ākula--_ākula citta--_citta tvena_tva kāma--_kāma mayāḥ_maya evam_evam sati_as mokṣam_mokṣa api_api kutas_kutas na_na kāmayante_kāmay yatas_yatas svarga--_svarga parāḥ_para svargaḥ_svarga eva_eva urvaśī--_urvaśī ādi--_ādi apeta--_ape tvena_tva paraḥ_para utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa yeṣām_yad te_tad tathā_tathā svarga--_svarga atiriktaḥ_atiric puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha nā_na asti_as iti_iti bhrāmyantaḥ_bhram viveka--_viveka vairāgya--_vairāgya abhāvāt_abhāva mokṣa--_mokṣa kathām_kathā api_api soḍhum_sah akṣamāḥ_akṣama iti_iti yāvat_yāvat

teṣām_tad ca_ca pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac bhoga--_bhoga aiśvaryayoḥ_aiśvarya prasaktānām_prasañj kṣayi--_kṣayin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi doṣa--_doṣa adarśanena_adarśana niviṣṭa--_niviś antar_antar karaṇānām_karaṇa tayā_tad kriyā--_kriyā viśeṣa--_viśeṣa bhulayā_bhula vācā_vāc apahṛtam_apahṛ ācchāditam_ācchāday cetaḥ_cetas viveka--_viveka jñānam_jñāna yeṣām_yad tātparya--_tātparya viṣaye_viṣaya pramāṇa--_pramāṇa antara--_antara ābādhite_ābādh vedasya_veda prāmāṇyam_prāmāṇya iti_iti su_su prasiddham_prasidh api_api jñātum_jñā aśaktānām_aśakta samādhau_samādhi antaḥkaraṇe_antaḥkaraṇa vayavasāya--_vayavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi na_na vidhīyate_vidhā na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha samādhi--_samādhi viṣayā_viṣaya vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi teṣām_tad na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti vā_vā adhikaraṇe_adhikaraṇa viṣaye_viṣaya vā_vā sa_sa patamyāḥ_patamī tulya--_tulya tvāt_tva vidhīyate_vidhā iti_iti karma--_karman kartari_kartṛ la--_la kāraḥ_kāra samādhīyate_samādhā asmin_idam sarvam_sarva iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti samādhiḥ_samādhi antar_antar karaṇam_karaṇa vā_vā paramātmā_paramātman vā_vā iti_iti na_na aprasiddha--_aprasiddha artha--_artha kalpanam_kalpana aham_mad brahma_brahman iti_iti avasthānam_avasthāna samādhiḥ_samādhi tad--_tad nimittam_nimitta vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi na_na uptadyate_uptad iti_iti vyākhyāne_vyākhyāna tu_tu rūḍhiḥ_rūḍhi eva_eva ādṛtā_ādṛ

ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva yadi_yadi api_api kāmyāni_kāmya agnihotra--_agnihotra ādīni_ādi śuddhi--_śuddhi arthebhyaḥ_artha na_na viśiṣyante_viśiṣ tathā_tathā api_api phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi doṣān_doṣa na_na āśaya--_āśaya śuddhim_śuddhi sampādayanti_sampāday bhoga--_bhoga anuguṇā_anuguṇa tu_tu śuddhiḥ_śuddhi na_na jñāna--_jñāna upayoginī_upayogin etat_etad eva_eva darśayitum_darśay bhoga--_bhoga aiśvarya--_aiśvarya prasaktānām_prasañj iti_iti punar_punar upāttam_upadā phala--_phala abhisandhim_abhisaṃdhi antareṇa_antareṇa tu_tu kṛtāni_kṛ jñāna--_jñāna upayoginīm_upayogin śuddhim_śuddhi ādadhati_ādhā iti_iti siddham_sidh vipaścit--_vipaścit a_a vipaścitoḥ_vipaścit phala--_phala vailakṣaṇyam_vailakṣaṇya vistareṇa_vistara ca_ca etat_etad agre_agra pratipādayiṣyate_pratipāday

āha_ah puṣpitām_puṣpita vācam_vāc puṣpitām_puṣpita viphala--_viphala tām_tā iva_iva āpātataḥ_āpāta ramaṇīyam_ramaṇīya pravadanti_pravad prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa sarvatas_sarvatas prakṛṣṭāḥ_prakṛṣṭa iyam_idam eva_eva veda--_veda vāc_vāc iti_iti ye_yad vadanti_vad teṣām_tad tayā_tad vācā_vāc apahṛta--_apahṛ cetasām_cetas ca_ca vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi na_na vidhīyate_vidhā iti_iti tṛtīyena_tṛtīya anvayaḥ_anvaya teṣu_tad tasyāḥ_tad asambhavāt_asaṃbhava sā_tad teṣu_tad na_na upadiśyate_upadiś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka iti_iti te_tad tathā_tathā vadanti_vad yatas_yatas a_a vipaścitaḥ_vipaścit mūrkhāḥ_mūrkha tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu vedeṣu_veda ye_yad artha--_artha vādāḥ_vāda akṣayyam_akṣayya vai_vai cāturmāsya--_cāturmāsya yājinaḥ_yājin sukṛtam_sukṛta bhavati_bhū apām_ap somam_soma amṛtāḥ_amṛta iti_iti ādyāḥ_ādya anyat_anya īśvara--_īśvara tattvam_tattva na_na asti_as iti_iti prajalpinaḥ_prajalpin te_tad kīdṛśīm_kīdṛśa vācam_vāc pravadanti_pravad janma--_janman karma--_karman phala--_phala pradāyinīm_pradāyin bhoga--_bhoga aiśvarya--_aiśvarya gatim_gati prati_prati ye_yad kriyā--_kriyā viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa tān_tad bahu_bahu yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā lāti_lā dadāti_dā pratipādayati_pratipāday iti_iti tām_tad

tatas_tatas ca_ca bhoga--_bhoga aiśvaryayoḥ_aiśvarya prasaktānām_prasañj tayā_tad puṣpitayā_puṣpita vācā_vāc apahṛtam_apahṛ ākṛṣṭam_ākṛṣ cetaḥ_cetas yeṣām_yad te_tad tathā_tathā teṣām_tad samādhiḥ_samādhi citta--_citta aikāgryam_aikāgrya parameśvara--_parameśvara eka--_eka unmukha--_unmukha tvam_tva tasmin_tad niścaya--_niścaya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi na_na vidhīyate_vidhā karma--_karman kartari_kartṛ prayogaḥ_prayoga sā_tad utpadyate_utpad bhāvaḥ_bhāva svāmi--_svāmin vacanaiḥ_vacana

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu eṣām_idam vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmakā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi bhavet_bhū śrutyāḥ_śruti taulyāt_taulya iti_iti ced_ced citta--_citta doṣāt_doṣa na_na bhavet_bhū iti_iti āha_ah yām_yad iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri a_a vipaścitaḥ_vipaścit alpa--_alpa jñāḥ_jña yām_yad imām_idam jyotiṣṭomena_jyotiṣṭoma svarga--_svarga kāmaḥ_kāma yajeta_yaj iti_iti ādikām_ādika vācam_vāc pravadanti_pravad iyam_idam eva_eva prakṛṣṭā_prakṛṣṭa veda--_veda vāc_vāc iti_iti kalpayanti_kalpay tayā_tad vācā_vāc apahṛta--_apahṛ cetasām_cetas teṣām_tad samādhau_samādhi manasi_manas vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi na_na vidhīyate_vidhā na_na abhyudeti_abhyudi iti_iti anuṣaṅgaḥ_anuṣaṅga kīdṛśīm_kīdṛśa vācam_vāc iti_iti āha_ah puṣpitām_puṣpita iti_iti kusumita--_kusumita viṣa--_viṣa latā--_latā vat_vat āpāta--_āpāta manojñām_manojña niṣphalām_niṣphala iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam kutas_kutas te_tad vadanti_vad tatra_tatra āha_ah veda_vid iti_iti vedeṣu_veda ye_yad vādāḥ_vāda apām_ap somam_soma amṛtāḥ_amṛta ambhūma_bhū akṣayyam_akṣayya ha_ha vai_vai cāturmāsya--_cāturmāsya yājinaḥ_yājin sukṛtam_sukṛta bhavati_bhū iti_iti ādayaḥ_ādi arthavādāḥ_arthavāda teṣu_tad eva_eva ratāḥ_ram vedasya_veda satya--_satya bhāṣi--_bhāṣin tvāt_tva evam_evam eva_eva etat_etad iti_iti pratītimantaḥ_pratītimat ataeva_ataeva na_na anyat_anya iti_iti karma--_karman phalāt_phala svargāt_svarga anyat_anya jīva--_jīva aṃśi--_aṃśin paramārtha--_paramārtha jñānam_jñāna labhyam_labh mokṣa--_mokṣa lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa niratiśayam_niratiśaya nitya--_nitya sukham_sukha na_na asti_as tad--_tad vedānta--_vedānta vācām_vāc karmāṅga--_karmāṅga kartṛ--_kartṛ devatāt_devatā ekatayā_ekatā tad--_tad śeṣa--_śeṣa tvāt_tva iti_iti vadana--_vadana śīlāḥ_śīla iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 42_42

citta--_citta doṣam_doṣa āha_ah kāma--_kāma ātmānaḥ_ātman vaiṣayika--_vaiṣayika sukha--_sukha vāsanā--_vāsanā grasta--_gras cittāḥ_citta evam_evam ced_ced tādṛśam_tādṛśa mokṣam_mokṣa kutas_kutas na_na icchanti_iṣ tatra_tatra āha_ah svarga--_svarga iti_iti svargaḥ_svarga eva_eva sudhā_sudhā deva--_deva aṅganā--_aṅganā ādi--_ādi upeta--_upe tvena_tva paraḥ_para śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha yeṣām_yad te_tad tādṛś--_tādṛś vāsanā--_vāsanā grasta--_gras tvāt_tva teṣām_tad na_na anyat_anya bhāṣate_bhāṣ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha janma_janman karma_karman iti_iti janma_janman ca_ca deha--_deha indriya--_indriya sambandha--_sambandha laksaṇam_lakṣaṇa tatra_tatra karma_karman ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama vihitam_vidhā phalam_phala ca_ca vināśi--_vināśin paśu--_paśu anna--_anna svarga--_svarga ādi_ādi tāni_tad prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa avicchedena_aviccheda dadāti_dā tām_tad bhoga--_bhoga aiśvaryayoḥ_aiśvarya gatim_gati prāptim_prāpti prati_prati ye_yad kriyā--_kriyā viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa jyotiṣṭpma--_jyotiṣṭpma ādayaḥ_ādi te_tad bahulāḥ_bahula pracurāḥ_pracura yatra_yatra tām_tad vācam_vāc vadanti_vad iti_iti pūrveṇa_pūrva anvayaḥ_anvaya bhogaḥ_bhoga sudhā--_sudhā pāna--_pāna deva--_deva aṅganā--_aṅganā ādiḥ_ādi aiśvaryam_aiśvarya ca_ca deva--_deva ādi--_ādi svāmi--_svāmin tvam_tva tayoḥ_tad gatim_gati iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
baladevaḥ_baladeva samyak_samyak ādhīyate_ādhā asmin_idam ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva yāthātmyam_yāthātmya iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti samādhiḥ_samādhi manaḥ_manas tasmin_tad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 2.45

lg.l: traiguṇya--_traiguṇya viṣayāḥ_viṣaya vedāḥ_veda nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya bhava_bhū arjuna_arjuna
nirdvandvaḥ_nirdvaṃdva nitya--_nitya sattva--_sattva sthaḥ_stha niryoga--_niryoga kṣemaḥ_kṣema ātmavān_ātmavat
