div.p: bhavati_bhū vidhīyante_vidhā tatra_tatra āha_ah traiguṇya--_traiguṇya viṣayāḥ_viṣaya iti_iti triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmakāḥ_ātmaka sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma ye_yad adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin tad--_tad viṣayāḥ_viṣaya teṣām_tad karma--_karman phala--_phala sambandha--_sambandha pratipādakāḥ_pratipādaka vedāḥ_veda tvam_tvad tu_tu nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma bhava_bhū tatra_tatra upāyam_upāya āha_ah nirdvandvaḥ_nirdvaṃdva sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi yugalāni_yugala dvandvāni_dvaṃdva tad--_tad rahitaḥ_rahita bhava_bhū tāni_tad sahasva_sah iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atas_atas āha_ah nitya--_nitya sattva--_sattva sthaḥ_stha san_as dhryam_dhrī avalambya_avalamb iti_iti arthaḥ_artha niryoga--_niryoga kṣemaḥ_kṣema aprāpta--_aprāpta svīkāraḥ_svīkāra yogaḥ_yoga prāpta--_prāp pālanam_pālana kṣemaḥ_kṣema tad--_tad rahitaḥ_rahita ātmavān_ātmavat apramattaḥ_apramatta nahi_nahi dvandva--_dvaṃdva ākulasya_ākula yoga--_yoga kṣema--_kṣema vyāpṛtasya_vyāpṛta ca_ca pramādinaḥ_pramādin traiguṇya--_traiguṇya atikramaḥ_atikrama sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu sa_sa kāmānām_kāma mā_mā bhūt_bhū āśaya--_āśaya doṣāt_doṣa vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi niṣkāmānām_niṣkāma tu_tu vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmaka--_ātmaka buddhyā_buddhi karma_karman kurvatām_kṛ karma--_karman svābhāvyāt_svābhāvya svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi phala--_phala prāptau_prāpti jñāna--_jñāna pratibandhaḥ_pratibandha samānaḥ_samāna iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah traiguṇya--_traiguṇya iti_iti trayāṇām_tri guṇānām_guṇa karma_karman traiguṇyam_traiguṇya kāma--_kāma mūlaḥ_mūla saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra saḥ_tad eva_eva prakāśa--_prakāśa tvena_tva viṣayaḥ_viṣaya yeṣām_yad tādṛśāḥ_tādṛśa vedāḥ_veda karma--_karman kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa ātmakāḥ_ātmaka yaḥ_yad yad--_yad phala--_phala kāmaḥ_kāma tasya_tad eva_eva tat_tad phalam_phala bodhayanti_bodhay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na hi_hi kāmebhyaḥ_kāma darśa--_darśa pūrṇamāsau_pūrṇamāsa iti_iti viniyoge_viniyoga api_api sakṛt_sakṛt anuṣṭhānāt_anuṣṭhāna sarva--_sarva phala--_phala prāptiḥ_prāpti bhavati_bhū tad--_tad tad--_tad kāmanā--_kāmanā virahāt_viraha yad--_yad phala--_phala kāmanayā_kāmanā anutiṣṭhati_anuṣṭhā tat_tad eva_eva phalam_phala tasmin_tad prayoge_prayoga iti_iti sthitam_sthā yogasiddhi--_yogasiddhi adhikaraṇe_adhikaraṇa yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam phala--_phala virahaḥ_viraha tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma bhava_bhū he_he karma--_karman svābhāvyāt_svābhāvya saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra nirastaḥ_niras

nanu_nanu śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi dvandva--_dvaṃdva pratīkārāya_pratīkāra vastra--_vastra ādi--_ādi apekṣaṇāt_apekṣaṇa kutas_kutas niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tvam_tva atas_atas āha_ah nirdvandvaḥ_nirdvaṃdva sarvatra_sarvatra bhava_bhū iti_iti sambadhyate_sambandh mātrā--_mātrā sparśāḥ_sparśa tu_tu iti_iti ukta--_vac nyāyena_nyāya śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi dvandva--_dvaṃdva sahiṣṇuḥ_sahiṣṇu bhava_bhū tasmin_tad tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti tathā_tathā rajaḥ--_rajas tamobhyām_tamas abhibhūta--_abhibhū sattvaḥ_sattva hi_hi śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi pīḍayā_pīḍā mariṣyāmi_mṛ iti_iti manvānaḥ_man dharmāt_dharma vimukhaḥ_vimukha bhavati_bhū tvam_tvad tu_tu rajaḥ_rajas tamasī_tamas abhibhūya_abhibhū sattva--_sattva mātra--_mātra ālambanaḥ_ālambana bhava_bhū

nanu_nanu śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi sahane_sahana api_api kṣudh--_kṣudh pipāsā--_pipāsā ādi--_ādi pratīkāra--_pratīkāra artham_artha kiṃcid_kaścit anupāttam_anupātta upādeyam_upādā upāttam_upadā ca_ca rakṣaṇīyam_rakṣ iti_iti tad--_tad artham_artha yatne_yatna kriyamāṇe_kṛ kutas_kutas sattva--_sattva stha--_stha tvam_tva iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah niryoga--_niryoga alabdha--_alabdha lābhaḥ_lābha yogaḥ_yoga labdha--_labh parirakṣaṇam_parirakṣaṇa kṣemaḥ_kṣema tad--_tad rahitaḥ_rahita bhava_bhū citta--_citta vikṣepa--_vikṣepa kāri--_kārin parigraha--_parigraha rahitaḥ_rahita bhava_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na ca_ca evam_evam cintā_cintā kartavyā_kṛ katham_katham evam_evam sati_as jīviṣyāmi_jīv iti_iti yatas_yatas sarva--_sarva antaryāmī_antaryāmin parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara eva_eva tava_tvad yoga--_yoga kṣema--_kṣema ādi_ādi nirvāhayiṣyati_nirvāhay iti_iti āha_ah ātmavān_ātmavat ātmā_ātman paramātmā_paramātman dhyeya--_dhyā tvena_tva yoga--_yoga kṣema--_kṣema ādi--_ādi nirvāhaka--_nirvāhaka tvena_tva ca_ca vartate_vṛt yasya_yad saḥ_tad ātmavān_ātmavat sarva--_sarva kāmanā--_kāmanā parityāgena_parityāga parameśvaram_parameśvara ārādhayataḥ_ārādhay mama_mad saḥ_tad eva_eva deha--_deha yātrā--_yātrā mātram_mātra apekṣitam_apekṣ sampādayiṣyati_sampāday iti_iti niścitya_niści niścintaḥ_niścinta bhava_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātmavān_ātmavat apramattaḥ_apramatta bhava_bhū iti_iti vā_vā

āśrayasva_āśri āha_ah traiguṇyāḥ_traiguṇya triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmikāḥ_ātmaka karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna ādyāḥ_ādya prakāśya--_prakāśay tvena_tva viṣayāḥ_viṣaya yeṣām_yad te_tad traiguṇya--_traiguṇya viṣayāḥ_viṣaya vedāḥ_veda svārthe_svārtha etat_etad ca_ca bhūmnā_bhūman vyapadeśāḥ_vyapadeśa bhavanti_bhū iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya uktam_vac kintu_kiṃtu bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva enam_enad nayati_nī iti_iti yasya_yad deve_deva parā_para bhaktiḥ_bhakti yathā_yathā deve_deva tathā_tathā gurau_guru iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutayaḥ_śruti pañcarātra--_pañcarātra ādi--_ādi smṛtayaḥ_smṛti ca_ca gīta--_gīta upaniṣad--_upaniṣad gopāla--_gopāla tāpanī--_tāpanī ādi--_ādi upaniṣadaḥ_upaniṣad ca_ca nirguṇām_nirguṇa bhaktim_bhakti api_api viṣayīkurvanti_viṣayīkṛ eva_eva veda--_veda ukta--_vac tva--_tva abhāve_abhāva bhakteḥ_bhakti aprāmāṇyam_aprāmāṇya eva_eva syāt_as tatas_tatas ca_ca veda--_veda uktāḥ_vac ye_yad triguṇa--_triguṇa mayāḥ_maya jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman vidhayaḥ_vidhi tebhyaḥ_tad eva_eva nirgataḥ_nirgam bhava_bhū tān_tad na_na kuru_kṛ ye_yad tu_tu veda--_veda uktāḥ_vac bhakti--_bhakti vidhayaḥ_vidhi tān_tad tu_tu sarvathā_sarvathā eva_eva anutiṣṭha_anuṣṭhā tad--_tad anuṣṭhāne_anuṣṭhāna

lg.l: śruti--_śruti smṛti--_smṛti purāṇa--_purāṇa ādi--_ādi pāñcarātra--_pāñcarātra vidhim_vidhi vinā_vinā
aikāntikī_aikāntika hareḥ_hari bhaktiḥ_bhakti utpātāya_utpāta eva_eva kalpyate_kalpay

div.p: iti_iti doṣaḥ_doṣa durvāraḥ_durvāra eva_eva tena_tena sa_sa guṇānām_guṇa guṇa--_guṇa atītānām_atī api_api vedānā--_vedānā viṣayāḥ_viṣaya traiguṇyāḥ_traiguṇya nistraiguṇyāḥ_nistraiguṇya ca_ca tatra_tatra tvam_tvad tu_tu nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya bhava_bhū nirguṇayā_nirguṇa mad--_mad bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmakebhyaḥ_ātmaka tebhyaḥ_tad niṣkrāntaḥ_niṣkram bhava_bhū tatas_tatas eva_eva nirdvandvaḥ_nirdvaṃdva guṇa--_guṇa maya--_maya māna--_māna apamāna--_apamāna ādi--_ādi rahitaḥ_rahita ataeva_ataeva nityaiḥ_nitya sattvaiḥ_sattva prāṇibhiḥ_prāṇin mad--_mad bhaktaiḥ_bhakta eva_eva saha_saha tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti tathā_tathā saḥ_tad nityam_nityam sattva--_sattva guṇa--_guṇa sthaḥ_stha bhava_bhū iti_iti vyākhyāyām_vyākhyā nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya vyākhyāyām_vyākhyā virodhaḥ_virodha syāt_as alabdha--_alabdha lābhaḥ_lābha yogaḥ_yoga labdhasya_labh rakṣaṇam_rakṣaṇa kṣemaḥ_kṣema tad--_tad rahitaḥ_rahita mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti rasa--_rasa āsvāda--_āsvāda vaśāt_vaśa eva_eva tayoḥ_tad an_an anusandhānāt_anusaṃdhāna yoga--_yoga kṣemam_kṣema vahāmi_vah aham_mad bhakta--_bhakta vatsalena_vatsala mayā_mad eva_eva tad--_tad bhāra--_bhāra vahanāt_vahana ātmavān_ātmavat mad--_mad datta--_dā buddhi--_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj yat_yad uktam_vac ekādaśe_ekādaśa

lg.l: mad--_mad arpaṇam_arpaṇa niṣphalam_niṣphala vā_vā sāttvikam_sāttvika nija--_nija karma_karman yat_yad
rājasam_rājasa phala--_phala saṅkalpam_saṃkalpa hiṃsā--_hiṃsā prāya--_prāya ādi_ādi tāmasam_tāmasa

div.p: niṣphalam_niṣphala vā_vā iti_iti naimittikam_naimittika nija--_nija karma--_karman phala--_phala ākāṅkṣyā--_ākāṅkṣyā rahitam_rahita iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: kaivalyam_kaivalya sāttvikam_sāttvika jñānam_jñāna rajaḥ_rajas vaikalpikam_vaikalpika tu_tu yat_yad
prākṛtam_prākṛta tāmasam_tāmasa jñānam_jñāna mad--_mad niṣṭham_niṣṭhā nirguṇam_nirguṇa smṛtam_smṛ
vanam_vana tu_tu sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika vāsaḥ_vāsa grāmaḥ_grāma rājasaḥ_rājasa ucyate_vac
tāmasam_tāmasa dyuta--_dyuta sadanam_sadana mad--_mad niketam_niketa tu_tu nirguṇam_nirguṇa
sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika kārakaḥ_kāraka asaṅgī_asaṅgin rāga--_rāga andhaḥ_andha rājasaḥ_rājasa smṛtaḥ_smṛ
tāmasaḥ_tāmasa smṛti--_smṛti vibhraṣṭaḥ_vibhraṃś nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa mad--_mad apāśrayaḥ_apāśraya
sāttvikī_sāttvika ādhyātmikī_ādhyātmika śraddhā_śraddhā karma--_karman śraddhā_śraddhā tu_tu rājasī_rājasa
tāmasī_tāmasa adharme_adharma yā_yad śraddhā_śraddhā mad--_mad sevāyām_sevā tu_tu nirguṇā_nirguṇa
pathyam_pathya pūtam_pū anāyastam_anāyasta āhāryam_āhārya sāttvikam_sāttvika smṛtam_smṛ
rājasam_rājasa ca_ca indriya--_indriya preṣṭham_preṣṭha tāmasam_tāmasa ca_ca ārti--_ārti da--_da aśuci_aśuci

div.p:
sāttvikam_sāttvika sukham_sukha ātma--_ātman uttham_uttha viṣaya--_viṣaya uttham_uttha tu_tu rājasam_rājasa
tāmasam_tāmasa moha--_moha dainya--_dainya uttham_uttha nirguṇam_nirguṇa mad--_mad apāśrayam_apāśraya

iti_iti antena_anta granthena_grantha traiguṇya--_traiguṇya vastūni_vastu api_api bhaktyā_bhakti sve_sva kathañcid_kathaṃcid sthitasya_sthā traiguṇyasya_traiguṇya nirjayaḥ_nirjaya api_api uktaḥ_vac tad--_tad anantaram_anantaram eva_eva yathā_yathā

lg.l: dravyam_dravya deśaḥ_deśa tathā_tathā kālaḥ_kāla jñānam_jñāna karma_karman ca_ca kārakaḥ_kāraka
śraddhā--_śraddhā avasthā--_avasthā kṛtiḥ_kṛti niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā traiguṇyaḥ_traiguṇya sarve_sarva eva_eva hi_hi
sarve_sarva guṇa--_guṇa mayāḥ_maya bhāvāḥ_bhāva puruṣa--_puruṣa avyakta--_avyakta dhiṣṭhitāḥ_adhiṣṭhā
dṛṣṭam_dṛś śrutam_śru anudhyātam_anudhyā buddhyā_buddhi vā_vā puruṣa--_puruṣa ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha
etāḥ_etad saṃsṛtayaḥ_saṃsṛti puṃsaḥ_puṃs guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman nibandhanāḥ_nibandhana
yena_yad ime_idam nirjitāḥ_nirji saumya_saumya guṇājīvena_guṇājīva citta--_citta jāḥ_ja
bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga mad--_mad niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭha mad--_mad bhāvāya_bhāva prapadyate_prapad

div.p: tasmāt_tasmāt bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva nirguṇayā_nirguṇa traiguṇya--_traiguṇya jayaḥ_jaya na_na anyathā_anyathā atra_atra api_api agre_agra katham_katham ca_ca etān_etad trīn_tri guṇān_guṇa ativartate_ativṛt iti_iti praśne_praśna vakṣyate_vac

lg.l: mām_mad ca_ca yaḥ_yad avyabhicāreṇa_avyabhicāra bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga sevate_sev
sa_tad guṇān_guṇa samatītya_samatī etān_etad brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp

div.p:
śrī--_śrī svāmi--_svāmin caraṇānām_caraṇa vyākhyā_vyākhyā ca_ca ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra atra_atra avadhāraṇa--_avadhāraṇa arthaḥ_artha mām_mad eva_eva parameśvaram_parameśvara avyabhicāreṇa_avyabhicāra bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga yaḥ_yad sevate_sev iti_iti eṣā_etad
nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya bhava_bhū arjuna_arjuna nirdvandvaḥ_nirdvaṃdva nitya--_nitya sattva--_sattva sthaḥ_stha niryogakṣemaḥ_niryogakṣema ātmavān_ātmavat

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu phala--_phala nairapekṣyeṇa_nairapekṣya karmāṇi_karman kurvāṇān_kṛ api_api tāni_tad sva--_sva phalaiḥ_phala yojayeyuḥ_yojay tad--_tad svābhāvyāt_svābhāvya tatas_tatas katham_katham tad--_tad buddheḥ_buddhi sambhavaḥ_sambhava iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah traiguṇya--_traiguṇya iti_iti trayāṇām_tri guṇānām_guṇa karma_karman traiguṇyam_traiguṇya guṇa--_guṇa vacana--_vacana brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādibhyaḥ_ādi karmaṇi_karman ca_ca iti_iti sūtrāt_sūtra sa_sa kāma--_kāma tvam_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad viṣayāḥ_viṣaya vedāḥ_veda karma--_karman kāṇḍāni_kāṇḍa tvam_tvad tu_tu tad--_tad śiraḥ--_śiras bhūta--_bhū vedānta--_vedānta niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma bhava_bhū

ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad viśrambheṇa_viśrambha tad--_tad pariśīlinaḥ_pariśīlin te_tad tad--_tad mūrdha--_mūrdhan bhūta--_bhū upanisat--_upanis pratīta--_pratī yāthātmya--_yāthātmya niścayena_niścaya tām_tad buddhim_buddhi yānti_yā iti_iti na_na ca_ca a_a kāmitāni_kāmay api_api tāni_tad āpateyuḥ_āpat kāmitānām_kāmay eva_eva teṣām_tad phala--_phala tva--_tva śravaṇāt_śravaṇa na_na ca_ca sarveṣām_sarva vedānām_veda traiguṇya--_traiguṇya viṣaya--_viṣaya tvam_tva nistraiguṇya--_nistraiguṇya tāyāḥ_tā aprāmāṇika--_aprāmāṇika tva--_tva āpatteḥ_āpatti

nanu_nanu śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi nivāraṇāya_nivāraṇa mātrā--_mātrā sparśāḥ_sparśa tu_tu kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti ādi_ādi vimarśena_vimarśa dvandva--_dvaṃdva sahaḥ_saha bhava_bhū tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu nityā_nitya iti_iti nityam_nitya yat_yad sattvam_sattva apariṇāmi--_apariṇāmin tvam_tva jīva--_jīva niṣṭham_niṣṭha tad--_tad sthaḥ_stha tad--_tad vibhāvya_vibhāvay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatas_tatas eva_eva niryogakṣemaḥ_niryogakṣema alabdha--_alabdha lābhaḥ_lābha yogaḥ_yoga labdhasya_labh parirakṣaṇam_parirakṣaṇa kṣemam_kṣema tad--_tad rahitaḥ_rahita bhava_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu kṣudh--_kṣudh pipāse_pipāsā tathā_tathā api_api vā_vā adhike_adhika iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah ātmavān_ātmavat iti_iti ātmā_ātman viśvambharaḥ_viśvambhara paramātmā_paramātman sa_tad yasya_yad dhyeya--_dhyā tayā_tā asti_as tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa bhava_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad te_tvad deha--_deha yātrām_yātrā sampādayet_sampāday iti_iti
BhG 2.46

lg.l: yāvān_yāvat arthaḥ_artha udapāne_udapāna sarvatas_sarvatas saṃpluta--_samplu udake_udaka
tāvān_tāvat sarveṣu_sarva vedeṣu_veda brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa vijānataḥ_vijñā

div.p: āha_ah udakam_udaka pīyate_pā yasmin_yad tat_tad udapānam_udapāna vāpī--_vāpī kūpa--_kūpa taḍāk--_taḍāg ādi_ādi tasmin_tad su_su alpa--_alpa udake_udaka ekatra_ekatra kṛtsna--_kṛtsna arthasya_artha asambhavāt_asaṃbhava tatra_tatra tatra_tatra paribhramaṇena_paribhramaṇa vibhāgaśaḥ_vibhāgaśaḥ yāvān_yāvat snāna--_snāna pāna--_pāna ādiḥ_ādi arthaḥ_artha prayojanam_prayojana bhavati_bhū tāvān_tāvat sarvaḥ_sarva api_api arthaḥ_artha sarvatas_sarvatas saṃpluta--_samplu udake_udaka mahā--_mahat evam_evam yāvān_yāvat sarveṣu_sarva vedeṣu_veda tad--_tad tad--_tad karma--_karman phala--_phala rūpaḥ_rūpa arthaḥ_artha tāvān_tāvat sarvaḥ_sarva api_api vijānataḥ_vijñā vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā--_ātmaka buddhi--_buddhi yuktasya_yuj brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa brahma--_brahman niṣṭhasya_niṣṭhā bhavati_bhū eva_eva brahmānande_brahmānanda kṣudh--_kṣudh ānandānām_ānanda antarbhāvāt_antarbhāva etasya_etad eva_eva ānandasya_ānanda anyāni_anya bhūtāni_bhūta mātrām_mātrā upajīvanti_upajīv iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tasmāt_tasmāt iyam_idam eva_eva su_su buddhiḥ_buddhi iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana na_na ca_ca evam_evam śaṅkanīyam_śaṅk sarva--_sarva kāmanā--_kāmanā parityāgena_parityāga karma_karman kurvan_kṛ aham_mad taiḥ_tad taiḥ_tad karma--_karman janitaiḥ_janay ānandaiḥ_ānanda vañcitaḥ_vañcay syām_as iti_iti yāvān_yāvat udapāne_udapāna kṣudra--_kṣudra jalāśaye_jalāśaya jātau_jāti eka--_eka vacanam_vacana yāvān_yāvat arthaḥ_artha yāvat_yāvat snāna--_snāna pāna--_pāna ādi--_ādi prayojanam_prayojana bhavati_bhū sarvatas_sarvatas saṃpluta--_samplu udake_udaka mahati_mahat jalāśaye_jalāśaya tāvān_tāvat arthaḥ_artha bhavati_bhū eva_eva yathā_yathā hi_hi parvata--_parvata nirjharāḥ_nirjhara sarvatas_sarvatas sravantaḥ_sru kvacid_kvacid upatyakāyām_upatyakā ekatra_ekatra milanti_mil tatra_tatra pratyekam_pratyekam jāyamānam_jan udaka--_udaka prayojanam_prayojana samudite_samudi sutarām_sutarām bhavati_bhū sarveṣām_sarva nirjharāṇām_nirjhara ekatra_ekatra eva_eva kāsāre_kāsāra antarbhāvāt_antarbhāva evam_evam sarveṣu_sarva vedeṣu_veda veda--_veda ukteṣu_vac kāmya--_kāmya karmasu_karman yāvān_yāvat arthaḥ_artha hairaṇyagarbha--_hairaṇyagarbha ānanda--_ānanda paryantaḥ_paryanta tāvān_tāvat vijānataḥ_vijñā brahma--_brahman tattvam_tattva sākṣāt_sākṣāt kṛtavataḥ_kṛ brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa brahma--_brahman bubhūṣoḥ_bubhūṣu bhavati_bhū eva_eva kṣudh--_kṣudh ānandānām_ānanda brahmānanda--_brahmānanda aṃśa--_aṃśa tvāt_tva tatra_tatra kṣudra--_kṣudra ānandānām_ānanda antarbhāvāt_antarbhāva etasya_etad eva_eva ānandasya_ānanda anyāni_anya bhūtāni_bhūta mātrām_mātrā upajīvanti_upajīv iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti ekasya_eka api_api ānandasya_ānanda avidyā--_avidyā kalpita--_kalpay tad--_tad tad--_tad upādhi--_upādhi paricchedam_pariccheda ādāya_ādā aṃśa--_aṃśa aṃśi--_aṃśin vat_vat vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa ākāśasya_ākāśa iva_iva ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādi--_ādi avaccheda--_avaccheda kalpanayā_kalpanā

tathā_tathā ca_ca niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmabhiḥ_karman śuddha--_śuddha antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa tava_tvad ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna udaye_udaya para--_para brahma--_brahman ānanda--_ānanda prāptiḥ_prāpti syāt_as tathā_tathā eva_eva ca_ca sarva--_sarva ānanda--_ānanda prāptau_prāpti na_na kṣudra--_kṣudra ānanda--_ānanda prāpti--_prāpti nibandhana--_nibandhana vaiyagrya--_vaiyagrya avakāśaḥ_avakāśa atas_atas paramānanda--_paramānanda tattva--_tattva jñānāya_jñāna niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya atra_atra yathā_yathā tathā_tathā bhavati_bhū iti_iti pada--_pada traya--_traya adhyāhāraḥ_adhyāhāra yāvān_yāvat tāvān_tāvat iti_iti pada--_pada dvaya--_dvaya anuṣaṅgaḥ_anuṣaṅga ca_ca dārṣṭāntike_dārṣṭāntika draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha hanta_hanta kim_ka vaktavyam_vac niṣkāmasya_niṣkāma nirguṇasya_nirguṇa bhaktiyogasya_bhaktiyoga māhātmyam_māhātmya yasya_yad eva_eva ārambhaṇa--_ārambhaṇa mātre_mātra api_api nāśa--_nāśa pratyavāyau_pratyavāya na_na staḥ_as su_su alpa--_alpa mātreṇa_mātra api_api kṛtārtha--_kṛtārtha tā_tā iti_iti ekādaśe_ekādaśa api_api uddhavāya_uddhava api_api

na_na hi_hi aṅga--_aṅga upakrame_upakrama dhvaṃsaḥ_dhvaṃsa mad--_mad dharmasya_dharma uddhava_uddhava aṇu_aṇu api_api mayā_mad vyavasitaḥ_vyavasā samyak_samyak nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvāt_tva an_an āśiṣaḥ_āśis

kintu_kiṃtu sa_sa kāmaḥ_kāma bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga api_api vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmika--_ātmika buddhi--_buddhi śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac iti_iti dṛṣṭāntena_dṛṣṭānta sādhayati_sādhay yāvān_yāvat iti_iti udapāne_udapāna iti_iti jātyā_jāti eka--_eka vacanam_vacana udapāneṣu_udapāna kūpeṣu_kūpa yāvān_yāvat arthaḥ_artha iti_iti kaścid_kaścit kūpaḥ_kūpa śauca--_śauca karma--_karman arthakaḥ_arthaka kaścid_kaścit dānta--_dam dhāvana--_dhāvana arthakaḥ_arthaka kaścid_kaścit vastra--_vastra dhāvana--_dhāvana ādi--_ādi arthakaḥ_arthaka kaścid_kaścit keśa--_keśa ādi--_ādi mārjana--_mārjana arthakaḥ_arthaka kaścid_kaścit snāna--_snāna arthakaḥ_arthaka kaścid_kaścit pāna--_pāna arthaḥ_artha yāvanti_yāvat prayojanāni_prayojana iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tasmin_tad ekasmin_eka eva_eva śauca--_śauca ādi--_ādi karma--_karman siddheḥ_siddhi kim_ka ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad kūpeṣu_kūpa pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthak_pṛthak paribhramaṇa--_paribhramaṇa śrameṇa_śrama sarovare_sarovara tu_tu tam_tad vinā_vinā eva_eva tathā_tathā kūpeṣu_kūpa virasa--_virasa jalena_jala sarovare_sarovara tu_tu surama--_surama jalena_jala eva_eva iti_iti api_api viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś evam_evam sarveṣu_sarva vedeṣu_veda tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā ārādhanena_ārādhana yāvantaḥ_yāvat arthāḥ_artha tāvantaḥ_tāvat ekasya_eka bhagavat--_bhagavant ārādhanena_ārādhana vijānataḥ_vijñā vijñasya_vijña brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa iti_iti brahma_brahman vedam_veda betti_bid iti_iti brahmaṇaḥ_brahman tasya_tad vijānataḥ_vijñā veda--_veda jña--_jña tve_tva jānataḥ_jñā dvitīya--_dvitīya skandhe_skandha

lg.l: brahma--_brahman varcasa--_varcasa kāmaḥ_kāma tu_tu yajeta_yaj brahmaṇaḥ_brahman patim_pati
indram_indra indriya--_indriya kāmaḥ_kāma tu_tu prajā--_prajā kāmaḥ_kāma prajāpatim_prajāpati

div.p: daivīm_daiva māyām_māyā tu_tu śrī--_śrī kāmaḥ_kāma iti_iti ādi--_ādi uktyā_ukti

lg.l: akāmaḥ_akāma sarva--_sarva kāmaḥ_kāma vā_vā mokṣa--_mokṣa kāmaḥ_kāma udāra--_udāra dhīḥ_dhī
tīvreṇa_tīvra bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga yajeta_yaj puruṣam_puruṣa param_para

div.p: iti_iti megha--_megha ādi--_ādi amiśrasya_amiśra saura--_saura kiraṇasya_kiraṇa tīvra--_tīvra tvam_tva iva_iva bhakti--_bhakti yogasya_yoga jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman ādi--_ādi amiśra--_amiśra tvam_tva tīvra--_tīvra tvam_tva jñeyam_jñā atra_atra bahubhyaḥ_bahu bahu--_bahu kāma--_kāma siddhiḥ_siddhi iti_iti sarvathā_sarvathā bahu--_bahu buddhi--_buddhi tvam_tva eva_eva ekasmāt_eka bhagavataḥ_bhagavant eva_eva sarva--_sarva kāma--_kāma siddhiḥ_siddhi iti_iti aṃśena_aṃśa eka--_eka buddhi--_buddhi tvāt_tva eka--_eka buddhi--_buddhi tvam_tva eva_eva viṣaya--_viṣaya sādguṇyāt_sādguṇya jñeyam_jñā

baladevaḥ_baladeva mami_mad sarvān_sarva vedān_veda adhīyānasya_adhī bahu--_bahu kāla--_kāla vyayāt_vyaya bahu--_bahu vikṣepa--_vikṣepa sambhavāt_sambhava ca_ca katham_katham tad--_tad buddheḥ_buddhi abhudayaḥ_abhudaya tatra_tatra āha_ah yāvān_yāvat iti_iti sarvatas_sarvatas samplutā_samplu udakā_udaka iti_iti vistīrṇe_vistṛ udapāne_udapāna jalāśaye_jalāśaya snāna--_snāna ādi--_ādi arthinaḥ_arthin yāvān_yāvat snāna--_snāna pāna--_pāna ādiḥ_ādi arthaḥ_artha prayojanam_prayojana tāvān_tāvat eva_eva sa_tad tena_tad tasmāt_tad sampadyate_sampad evam_evam sarveṣu_sarva sa_sa upaniṣatsu_upaniṣad vedeṣu_veda brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa veda--_veda adhyāyinaḥ_adhyāyin vijānataḥ_vijñā ātma--_ātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya jñānam_jñāna labdhu--_labdhu kāmasya_kāma yāvān_yāvat tad--_tad jñāna--_jñāna siddhi--_siddhi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa arthaḥ_artha syāt_as tāvān_tāvat eva_eva tena_tad tebhyaḥ_tad sampādyate_sampāday tathā_tathā ca_ca sva--_sva śākhayā_śākhā eva_eva sa_sa upaniṣadā_upaniṣada acireṇa_acireṇa eva_eva tat_tad siddhau_siddhi tat_tad buddhiḥ_buddhi abhudiyāt_abhudi eva_eva iti_iti iha_iha dārṣṭāntike_dārṣṭāntika api_api yāvān_yāvat tāvān_tāvat iti_iti pada--_pada dvayam_dvaya anuṣañjanīyam_anuṣañjay
BhG 2.47

lg.l: karmaṇi_karman eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra te_tvad mā_mā phaleṣu_phala kadācana_kadācana
mā_mā karma--_karman phala--_phala hetuḥ_hetu bhūḥ_bhū mā_mā te_tvad saṅgaḥ_saṅga astu_as akarmaṇi_akarman

div.p: pravarteta_pravṛt kim_ka karmaṇā_karman iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk tat_tad vārayan_vāray āha_ah karmaṇi_karman eva_eva iti_iti te_tad tava_tvad tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna arthinaḥ_arthin karmaṇi_karman eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra tad--_tad phaleṣu_phala adhikāraḥ_adhikāra kāmaḥ_kāma mā_mā astu_as nanu_nanu karmaṇi_karman kṛti_kṛt tad--_tad phalam_phala syāt_as eva_eva bhojane_bhojana kṛte_kṛ tṛpti--_tṛpti vat_vat iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah mā_mā iti_iti mā_mā karma--_karman phala--_phala hetuḥ_hetu bhūḥ_bhū karma--_karman phalam_phala pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetuḥ_hetu yasya_yad sa_tad tathābhūtaḥ_tathābhūta mā_mā bhūḥ_bhū kāmyamānasya_kāmay eva_eva svarga--_svarga ādeḥ_ādi niyojya--_niyojay viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa tvena_tva phala--_phala tvāt_tva akāmitam_akāmita phalam_phala na_na syāt_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ataeva_ataeva phalam_phala bandhakam_bandhaka bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti bhayāt_bhaya akarmaṇi_akarman karma--_karman akaraṇe_akaraṇa api_api tava_tvad saṅgaḥ_saṅga niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā mā_mā astu_as 47_47

āha_ah te_tad tava_tvad aśuddha--_aśuddha antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa tāttvika--_tāttvika jñāna--_jñāna utpatti--_utpatti ayogyasya_ayogya karmaṇi_karman eva_eva antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śodhake_śodhaka adhikāraḥ_adhikāra mayā_mad idam_idam kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti bodhaḥ_bodha astu_as na_na jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā rūpam_rūpa vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya vicāra--_vicāra karma_karman ca_ca kurvataḥ_kṛ tava_tvad tad--_tad phaleṣu_phala svarga--_svarga ādiṣu_ādi kadācana_kadācana kasyāṃcid_kaścit api_api avasthāyām_avasthā karma--_karman anuṣṭhānāt_anuṣṭhāna prāk_prāk ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam tad--_tad kāle_kāla vā_vā adhikāraḥ_adhikāra mayā_mad idam_idam bhoktavyam_bhuj iti_iti bodhaḥ_bodha mā_mā astu_as

nanu_nanu mayā_mad idam_idam bhoktavyam_bhuj iti_iti buddhi--_buddhi abhāve_abhāva api_api karma_karman sva--_sva sāmārthyāt_sāmārthya eva_eva phalam_phala janayiṣyati_janay iti_iti ced_ced na_na iti_iti āha_ah mā_mā karma--_karman phala--_phala hetuḥ_hetu bhūḥ_bhū phala--_phala kāmanayā_kāmanā hi_hi karma_karman kurvan_kṛ phalasya_phala heteḥ_heti utpādakaḥ_utpādaka bhavati_bhū tvam_tvad tu_tu niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma san_as karma--_karman phala--_phala hetuḥ_hetu mā_mā bhūḥ_bhū na_na hi_hi niṣkāmena_niṣkāma bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇa--_arpaṇa buddhyā_buddhi kṛtam_kṛ karma_karman phalāya_phala kalpate_kﾱp iti_iti uktam_vac phala--_phala abhāve_abhāva kim_ka karmaṇā_karman iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah mā_mā te_tvad saṅgaḥ_saṅga astu_as akarmaṇi_akarman yadi_yadi phalam_phala na_na iṣyate_iṣ kim_ka karmaṇā_karman duḥkha--_duḥkha rūpeṇa_rūpa iti_iti akaraṇe_akaraṇa tava_tvad prītiḥ_prīti mā_mā bhūt_bhū 47_47

āha_ah mā_mā phaleṣu_phala iti_iti phala--_phala ākāṅkṣiṇaḥ_ākāṅkṣin api_api atyanta--_atyanta śuddha--_śudh cittāḥ_citta bhavanti_bhū tvam_tvad tu_tu prāyas_prāyas śuddha--_śudh cittaḥ_citta iti_iti mayā_mad jñātvā_jñā eva_eva ucyase_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu karmaṇi_karman kṛte_kṛ phalam_phala avaśyam_avaśyam bhaviṣyati_bhū eva_eva iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah mā_mā karma--_karman phala--_phala hetuḥ_hetu bhūḥ_bhū phala--_phala kāmanayā_kāmanā hi_hi karma_karman kurvan_kṛ phalasya_phala hetuḥ_hetu utpādakaḥ_utpādaka bhavati_bhū tvam_tvad tu_tu tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa mā_mā bhūḥ_bhū iti_iti āśīḥ_āśī mayā_mad dīyate_dā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha akarmaṇi_akarman sva--_sva dharma--_dharma akaraṇe_akaraṇa vikarmaṇi_vikarman pāpe_pāpa vā_vā saṅgaḥ_saṅga tava_tvad mā_mā astu_as kintu_kiṃtu dveṣaḥ_dveṣa eva_eva astu_as iti_iti punar_punar api_api āśīḥ_āśī dīyate_dā iti_iti atra_atra agrima--_agrima adhyāye_adhyāya vyāmiśreṇa_vyāmiśra eva_eva vākyena_vākya buddhim_buddhi mohayasi_mohay iva_iva me_mad iti_iti arjuna--_arjuna ukti--_ukti darśanāt_darśana atra_atra adhyāye_adhyāya pūrva--_pūrva uttara--_uttara vākyānām_vākya avatārikābhiḥ_avatārikā na_na atīva_atīva saṅgatiḥ_saṃgati vidhitsitā_vidhits iti_iti jñeyam_jñā kintu_kiṃtu tvad--_tvad ājñāyām_ājñā sārathi--_sārathi ādau_ādi yathā_yathā aham_mad tiṣṭhāmi_sthā tathā_tathā tvam_tvad api_api mad--_mad ājñāyām_ājñā tiṣṭha_sthā iti_iti kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa arjunayoḥ_arjuna manaḥ_manas anulāpaḥ_anulāpa ayam_idam atra_atra draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś 47_47

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu karmabhiḥ_karman jñāna--_jñāna siddhiḥ_siddhi iṣyate_iṣ ced_ced tarhi_tarhi tasya_tad śama--_śama ādīni_ādi eva_eva antaraṅga--_antaraṅga tvāt_tva anuṣṭheyāni_anuṣṭhā santu_as kim_ka bahu_bahu prayāsaiḥ_prayāsa taiḥ_tad iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah karmaṇi_karman eva_eva iti_iti jātau_jāti eka--_eka vacanam_vacana te_tad tava_tvad sva--_sva dharme_dharma api_api yuddhe_yuddha adharma--_adharma buddheḥ_buddhi aśuddha--_aśuddha cittasya_citta tāvat_tāvat karmasu_karman eva_eva yuddha--_yuddha ādiṣu_ādi adhikāraḥ_adhikāra astu_as mayā_mad etāni_etad bhoktavyāni_bhuj iti_iti tat_tad phaleṣu_phala bandhakeṣu_bandhaka tava_tvad adhikāraḥ_adhikāra mā_mā astu_as mayā_mad etāni_etad

nanu_nanu phala--_phala icchā--_icchā virahe_viraha api_api tāni_tad sva--_sva phaaiḥ_pha yojayeyuḥ_yojay iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah mā_mā karma_kṛ iti_iti karma--_karman phalānām_phala hetuḥ_hetu utpādakaḥ_utpādaka tvam_tvad mā_mā abhūḥ_bhū kāmanayā_kāmanā kṛtāni_kṛ tāni_tad sva--_sva phalaiḥ_phala yojayanti_yojay kāmitānām_kāmay eva_eva phalānām_phala niyojya--_niyojay viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa tvena_tva phala--_phala tva--_tva āmnātāt_āmnāta ataeva_ataeva bandhakāni_bandhaka phalāni_phala āpatiṣyanti_āpat iti_iti bhayāt_bhaya akarmaṇi_akarman karma--_karman akaraṇe_akaraṇa tava_tvad saṅgaḥ_saṅga prītiḥ_prīti mā_mā astu_as kintu_kiṃtu vidveṣaḥ_vidveṣa eva_eva astu_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tayā_tā anuṣṭhitāni_anuṣṭhā karmāṇi_karman yaṣṭidhānya--_yaṣṭidhānya vat_vat antar_antar eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā niṣpādayiṣyanti_niṣpāday śama--_śama ādīni_ādi tu_tu tad--_tad pṛṣṭha--_pṛṣṭha lagnāni_lag eva_eva syuḥ_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 47_47
BhG 2.48

lg.l: yoga--_yoga sthaḥ_stha kuru_kṛ karmāṇi_karman saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj dhanaṃjaya_dhanaṃjaya
siddhi--_siddhi asiddhyoḥ_asiddhi samaḥ_sama bhūtvā_bhū sama--_sama tvam_tva yogaḥ_yoga ucyate_vac

div.p: tatra_tatra sthitaḥ_sthā karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ tathā_tathā saṅgam_saṅga kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa tyaktvā_tyaj kevalam_kevalam īśvara--_īśvara āśrayeṇa_āśraya eva_eva kuru_kṛ tad--_tad phalasya_phala jñānasya_jñāna api_api siddhi--_siddhi asiddhyoḥ_asiddhi samaḥ_sama bhūtvā_bhū kevalam_kevalam īśvara--_īśvara āśrayeṇa_āśraya eva_eva kuru_kṛ yatas_yatas evaṃbhūtam_evaṃbhūta samatvam_samatva eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga ucyate_vac sadbhiḥ_sat citta--_citta samādhāna--_samādhāna rūpatvāt_rūpatva 48_48

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_pūrvokta vivṛṇoti_vivṛ yoga--_yoga sthaḥ_stha he_he dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya tvam_tvad yoga--_yoga sthaḥ_stha san_as saṅgam_saṅga phala--_phala abhilāṣam_abhilāṣa kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa ca_ca tyaktvā_tyaj karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ atra_atra bahu--_bahu vacanāt_vacana karmaṇi_karman eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra te_tvad iti_iti atra_atra jātau_jāti eka--_eka vacanam_vacana saṅga--_saṅga tyāga--_tyāga upāyam_upāya āha_ah siddhi--_siddhi asiddhyoḥ_asiddhi samaḥ_sama bhūtvā_bhū phala--_phala siddhau_siddhi harṣam_harṣa phala--_phala asiddhau_asiddhi ca_ca viṣādam_viṣāda tyaktvā_tyaj kevalam_kevalam īśvara--_īśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana buddhyā_buddhi karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ iti_iti

nanu_nanu yoga--_yoga śabdena_śabda prāk--_prāñc karma_karman uktam_vac atra_atra tu_tu yoga--_yoga sthaḥ_stha karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ iti_iti ucyate_vac atas_atas katham_katham etat_etad boddhyam_budh śakyam_śakya iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah samatvam_samatva yogaḥ_yoga ucyate_vac yat_yad etat_etad siddhi--_siddhi asiddhyoḥ_asiddhi samatvam_samatva idam_idam eva_eva yoga--_yoga sthaḥ_stha iti_iti atra_atra yoga--_yoga śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac na_na tu_tu karma_karman iti_iti na_na kaḥ_ka api_api virodhaḥ_virodha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra pūrva--_pūrva ardhasya_ardha uttara--_uttara ardhena_ardha vyākhyānam_vyākhyāna kriyate_kṛ iti_iti apaunaruktyam_apaunaruktya iti_iti bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kārīyaḥ_kārīya panthāḥ_pathin sukha--_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha same_sama kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti atra_atra jaya--_jaya ajaya--_ajaya sāmyena_sāmya yuddha--_yuddha mātra--_mātra kartavya--_kṛ tā_tā prakṛta--_prakṛ tvāt_tva uktā_vac iha_iha tu_tu dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa sarva--_sarva phala--_phala parityāgena_parityāga sarva--_sarva karma--_karman kartavya--_kṛ tā_tā iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa 48_48

śikṣayati_śikṣay tena_tena jaya--_jaya ajayayoḥ_ajaya tulya--_tulya buddhiḥ_buddhi san_as saṅgrāmam_saṃgrāma eva_eva sva--_sva dharmam_dharma kuru_kṛ iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ayam_idam niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga tvena_tva pariṇamati_pariṇam iti_iti jñāna--_jñāna yogaḥ_yoga api_api evam_evam pūrva--_pūrva uttara--_uttara grantha--_grantha artha--_artha tātparyataḥ_tātparya jñeyaḥ_jñā 48_48

viśadayati_viśaday tvam_tvad saṅgam_saṅga phala--_phala abhilāṣam_abhilāṣa kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa ca_ca tyaktvā_tyaj yoga--_yoga sthaḥ_stha san_as karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ yuddha--_yuddha ādīni_ādi ādyena_ādya māyā--_māyā nimajjanam_nimajjana dvitīyena_dvitīya tu_tu svātantrya--_svātantrya lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa pareśa--_pareśa dharma--_dharma cauryam_caurya tena_tena tad--_tad māyā--_māyā vyākopaḥ_vyākopa atas_atas tayoḥ_tad parityāgaḥ_parityāga iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ tad--_tad anuṣaṅga--_anuṣaṅga phalānām_phala jaya--_jaya ādīnām_ādi siddhau_siddhi asiddhau_asiddhi ca_ca samaḥ_sama bhūtvā_bhū rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa rahitaḥ_rahita san_as kuru_kṛ idam_idam eva_eva samatvam_samatva mayā_mad yoga--_yoga sthaḥ_stha iti_iti atra_atra yoga--_yoga śabdena_śabda uktam_vac citta--_citta samādhi--_samādhi rūpatvāt_rūpatva 48_48
BhG 2.49

lg.l: dūreṇa_dūra hi_hi avaram_avara karma_karman buddhi--_buddhi yogāt_yoga dhanaṃjaya_dhanaṃjaya
buddhau_buddhi śaraṇam_śaraṇa anviccha_anviṣ kṛpaṇāḥ_kṛpaṇa phala--_phala hetavaḥ_hetu

div.p: āha_ah buddhyā_buddhi vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikayā_ātmaka kṛtaḥ_kṛ karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga buddhi--_buddhi yogaḥ_yoga buddhi--_buddhi sādhana--_sādhana bhūtaḥ_bhū vā_vā tasmāt_tad sakāśāt_sakāśa anyat_anya sādhana--_sādhana bhūtam_bhū kāmyam_kāmya karma_karman dūreṇa_dūra avaram_avara atyantam_atyantam apakṛṣṭam_apakṛṣṭa hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt buddhau_buddhi jñāne_jñāna śaraṇam_śaraṇa āśrayam_āśraya karma--_karman yogam_yoga anviccha_anviṣ anutiṣṭha_anuṣṭhā yat_yat vā_vā buddhau_buddhi śaraṇam_śaraṇa trātāram_trātṛ īśvaram_īśvara āśraya_āśri iti_iti arthaḥ_artha phala--_phala hetuḥ_hetu astu_as sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma narāḥ_nara kṛpaṇāḥ_kṛpaṇa dīnāḥ_dīna yaḥ_yad vai_vai etat_etad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī a_a viditvā_vid asmāt_idam lokāt_loka praiti_pre sa_tad kṛpaṇa_kṛpaṇa iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti 49_49

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu kim_ka karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna eva_eva puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha yena_yad niṣphalam_niṣphala eva_eva sadā_sadā kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti ucyate_vac prayojanam_prayojana an_an uddiśya_uddiś na_na mandaḥ_manda api_api pravartate_pravṛt iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya tat_tad varam_vara phala--_phala kāmanayā_kāmanā eva_eva karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna iti_iti ced_ced na_na iti_iti āha_ah dūreṇa_dūra iti_iti buddhi--_buddhi yogāt_yoga ātma--_ātman buddhi--_buddhi sādhana--_sādhana bhūtāt_bhū niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogāt_yoga dūreṇa_dūra ati_ati viprakarṣeṇa_viprakarṣa avaram_avara adhamam_adhama karma_karman phala--_phala abhisandhinā_abhisaṃdhi kriyamāṇam_kṛ janma--_janman maraṇa--_maraṇa hetu--_hetu bhūtam_bhū athavā_athavā paramātma--_paramātman buddhi--_buddhi yogāt_yoga dūreṇa_dūra avaram_avara sarvam_sarva api_api karma_karman yasmāt_yasmāt he_he dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya tasmāt_tasmāt buddhau_buddhi paramātma--_paramātman buddhau_buddhi sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha nivartikāyām_nivartaka śaraṇam_śaraṇa pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka pāpa--_pāpa kṣayeṇa_kṣaya rakṣakam_rakṣaka niṣkāma--_niṣkāma iccha_iṣ ye_yad tu_tu phala--_phala hetavaḥ_hetu phala--_phala kāmāḥ_kāma avaram_avara karma_karman kurvanti_kṛ te_tad kṛpaṇāḥ_kṛpaṇa sarvadā_sarvadā janma--_janman maraṇa--_maraṇa ādi--_ādi ghaṭī--_ghaṭī yantra--_yantra bhramaṇena_bhramaṇa para--_para vaśāḥ_vaśa atyanta--_atyanta dīnāḥ_dīna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yaḥ_yad vai_vai etat_etad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī a_a viditvā_vid asmāt_idam lokāt_loka praiti_pre sa_tad kṛpaṇa_kṛpaṇa iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tathā_tathā ca_ca tvam_tvad api_api kṛpaṇaḥ_kṛpaṇa mā_mā bhūḥ_bhū kintu_kiṃtu sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha nivartaka--_nivartaka ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna utpādakam_utpādaka niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogam_yoga eva_eva anutiṣṭha_anuṣṭhā iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya yathā_yathā hi_hi kṛpaṇāḥ_kṛpaṇa janāḥ_jana ati_ati duḥkhena_duḥkha dhanam_dhana arjayantaḥ_arjay yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit dṛṣṭa--_dṛś sukha--_sukha mātra--_mātra lobhena_lobha dāna--_dāna ādi--_ādi janitam_janay mahat_mahat sukham_sukha anubhavitum_anubhū na_na śaknuvanti_śak iti_iti ātmānam_ātman eva_eva vañcayanti_vañcay tathā_tathā mahatā_mahat kṣudra--_kṣudra phala--_phala mātra--_mātra lobhena_lobha parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda anubhavena_anubhava
vañcitāḥ_vañcay iti_iti aho_aho daurbhāgyam_daurbhāgya mauḍhyam_mauḍhya ca_ca teṣām_tad iti_iti kṛpaṇa--_kṛpaṇa padena_pada dhvanitam_dhvanay
nindati_nind

baladevaḥ_baladeva kāmya--_kāmya karmaṇaḥ_karman nikṛṣṭa--_nikṛṣṭa tvam_tva āha_ah dūreṇa_dūra buddhi--_buddhi yogāt_yoga avaram_avara karma_karman dūreṇa_dūra he_he dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya ātma--_ātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya buddhi--_buddhi sādhana--_sādhana bhūtāt_bhū niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogāt_yoga dūreṇa_dūra ati_ati viprakarṣeṇa_viprakarṣa avaram_avara atyapakṛṣṭam_atyapakṛṣṭa janma--_janman maraṇa--_maraṇa ādi--_ādi anartha--_anartha nimittam_nimitta hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam atas_atas tvam_tvad buddhau_buddhi tad--_tad yāthātmya--_yāthātmya jñāne_jñāna śaraṇam_śaraṇa āśrayam_āśraya niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogam_yoga anviccha_anviṣ kuru_kṛ ye_yad tu_tu phala--_phala hetavaḥ_hetu phala--_phala kāmāḥ_kāma avara--_avara karma--_karman kāriṇaḥ_kārin te_tad kṛpaṇāḥ_kṛpaṇa tad--_tad phala--_phala janma--_janman karma--_karman ādi--_ādi pravāha--_pravāha paravaśāḥ_paravaśa dīnāḥ_dīna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca tvam_tvad kṛpaṇaḥ_kṛpaṇa mā_mā abhūḥ_bhū iti_iti iha_iha kṛpaṇāḥ_kṛpaṇa khalu_khalu kaṣṭa--_kaṣṭa upārjita--_upārjay vitta--_vitta adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa sukha--_sukha lava--_lava lubdhāḥ_lubh vittāni_vitta dātum_dā asamarthāḥ_asamartha mahatā_mahat
dāna--_dāna sukhena_sukha vañcitāḥ_vañcay tathā_tathā kaṣṭa--_kaṣṭa anuṣṭhita--_anuṣṭhā karmāṇaḥ_karman tuccha--_tuccha tad--_tad phala--_phala lubdhāḥ_lubh mahatā_mahat ātma--_ātman sukhena_sukha vañcitāḥ_vañcay bhavanti_bhū iti_iti vyajyate_vyañj
BhG 2.50

lg.l: buddhi--_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj jahāti_hā iha_iha ubhe_ubh sukṛta--_sukṛta duṣkṛte_duṣkṛta
tasmāt_tasmāt yogāya_yoga yujyasva_yuj yogaḥ_yoga karmasu_karman kauśalam_kauśala

div.p: āha_ah sukṛtam_sukṛta svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi prāpakam_prāpaka duṣkṛtam_duṣkṛta niraya--_niraya ādi--_ādi prāpakam_prāpaka te_tad ubhe_ubh iha_iha eva_eva janmani_janman parameśvara--_parameśvara prasādena_prasāda tyajati_tyaj tasmāt_tasmāt yogāya_yoga tad--_tad arthāya_artha karma--_karman yogāya_yoga yujyasva_yuj ghaṭasva_ghaṭ yogaḥ_yoga hi_hi karmasu_karman kauśalam_kauśala sva--_sva dharma--_dharma ākhyeṣu_ākhyā karmasu_karman vartamānasya_vṛt yā_yad siddhi--_siddhi asiddhyoḥ_asiddhi samatva--_samatva buddhiḥ_buddhi īśvara--_īśvara arpita--_arpay cetaḥ--_cetas tayā_tā tat_tad kauśalam_kauśala kuśala--_kuśala bhāvaḥ_bhāva tat_tad hi_hi kauśalam_kauśala yat_yat bandha--_bandha svabhāvāni_svabhāva api_api karmāṇi_karman samatva--_samatva buddhyā_buddhi svabhāvāt_svabhāva nivartante_nivṛt tasmāt_tasmāt samatva--_samatva buddhi--_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj bhava_bhū tvam_tvad

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam buddhi--_buddhi yoga--_yoga abhāve_abhāva doṣam_doṣa uktvā_vac tad--_tad bhāve_bhāva guṇam_guṇa āha_ah buddhi--_buddhi iti_iti iha_iha karmasu_karman buddhi--_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj samatva--_samatva buddhyā_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj jahāti_hā parityajati_parityaj ubhe_ubh sukṛta--_sukṛta duṣkṛte_duṣkṛta puṇya--_puṇya pāpe_pāpa sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi jñāna--_jñāna prāpti--_prāpti dvāreṇa_dvāra yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt samatva--_samatva buddhi--_buddhi yogāya_yoga tvam_tvad yujyasva_yuj ghaṭasva_ghaṭ udyuktaḥ_udyuj bhava_bhū yasmāt_yasmāt īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa samatva--_samatva buddhi--_buddhi yogaḥ_yoga īśvara--_īśvara arpita--_arpay cetasaḥ_cetas karmasu_karman pravartamānasya_pravṛt kauśalam_kauśala kuśala--_kuśala bhāvaḥ_bhāva yad--_yad bandha--_bandha hetūnām_hetu api_api karmaṇām_karman tad--_tad abhāvaḥ_abhāva mokṣa--_mokṣa paryavasāyi--_paryavasāyin tvam_tva ca_ca tat_tad mahat_mahat kauśalam_kauśala

samatva--_samatva buddhi--_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga karma--_karman ātmā_ātman api_api san_as duṣṭa--_duṣ karma--_karman kṣayam_kṣaya karoti_kṛ iti_iti mahā--_mahat kuśalaḥ_kuśala tvam_tvad tu_tu na_na kuśalaḥ_kuśala yatas_yatas cetanaḥ_cetana api_api san_as sajātīya--_sajātīya duṣṭa--_duṣṭa kṣayam_kṣaya na_na karoṣi_kṛ iti_iti vyatirekaḥ_vyatireka atra_atra dhvanitaḥ_dhvanay athavā_athavā iha_iha samatva--_samatva buddhi--_buddhi yukte_yuj karmaṇi_karman kṛte_kṛ sati_as sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi dvāreṇa_dvāra buddhi--_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj paramātma--_paramātman sākṣātkāravān_sākṣātkāravat san_as jahāti_hā ubhe_ubh sukṛta--_sukṛta duṣkṛte_duṣkṛta tasmāt_tasmāt samatva--_samatva buddhi--_buddhi yuktāya_yuj karma--_karman yogāya_yoga yujyasva_yuj yasmāt_yasmāt karmasu_karman madhye_madhya samatva--_samatva buddhi--_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga kauśalam_kauśala kuśalaḥ_kuśala duṣṭa--_duṣ karma--_karman nivāraṇa--_nivāraṇa caturaḥ_catura iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
yujyasva_yuj ghaṭasva_ghaṭ

baladevaḥ_baladeva uktasya_vac buddhi--_buddhi yogasya_yoga prabhāvam_prabhāva āha_ah buddhi--_buddhi iti_iti iha_iha karmasu_karman yaḥ_yad buddhi--_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj pradhāna--_pradhāna phala--_phala tyāga--_tyāga viṣaya--_viṣaya anuṣaṅga--_anuṣaṅga phala--_phala siddhi--_siddhi asiddhi--_asiddhi samatva--_samatva viṣayayā_viṣaya ca_ca buddhyā_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj tāni_tad karoti_kṛ saḥ_tad ubhe_ubh anādi--_anādi kāla--_kāla sañcite_saṃci jñāna--_jñāna pratibandhake_pratibandhaka arthaḥ_artha tasmāt_tasmāt uktāya_vac buddhi--_buddhi yogāya_yoga yujyasva_yuj ghaṭasva_ghaṭ yasmāt_yasmāt karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga tādṛśa--_tādṛśa buddhi--_buddhi sambandhaḥ_sambandha kauśalam_kauśala cāturyam_cāturya bandhakānām_bandhaka eva_eva buddhi--_buddhi samparkāt_samparka viśodhita--_viśodhay viṣa--_viṣa pārada--_pārada nyāyena_nyāya mocaka--_mocaka tvena_tva pariṇāmāt_pariṇāma
BhG 2.51

lg.l: karma--_karman jam_ja buddhi--_buddhi yuktāḥ_yuj hi_hi phalam_phala tyaktvā_tyaj manīṣiṇaḥ_manīṣin
janma--_janman bandha--_bandha vinirmuktāḥ_vinirmuc padam_pada gacchanti_gam anāmayam_anāmaya

div.p: āha_ah karma--_karman jam_ja phalam_phala tyaktvā_tyaj kevalam_kevala īśvara--_īśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana artham_artha karma_karman kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ manīṣiṇaḥ_manīṣin jñāninaḥ_jñānin bhūtvā_bhū janma--_janman rūpeṇa_rūpa bandhena_bandha vinirmuktāḥ_vinirmuc santaḥ_as anāmayam_anāmaya sarva--_sarva upadrava--_upadrava rahitam_rahita viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu padam_pada mokṣa_mokṣa 51_51

āha_ah samatva--_samatva buddhi--_buddhi yuktāḥ_yuj hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt karma--_karman jam_ja phalam_phala tyaktvā_tyaj kevalam_kevalam īśvara--_īśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana artham_artha karmāṇi_karman kurvāṇāḥ_kṛ sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi dvāreṇa_dvāra manīṣiṇaḥ_manīṣin tat_tad tvam_tvad asi_as iti_iti ādi--_ādi vākya--_vākya janya--_jan ātma--_ātman manīṣāvantaḥ_manīṣāvat tādṛśāḥ_tādṛśa ca_ca santaḥ_as janma--_janman ātmakena_ātmaka bandhena_bandha vinirmuktāḥ_vinirmuc viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa ātyantika--_ātyantika tva--_tva lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa niravaśeṣam_niravaśeṣa muktāḥ_muc padam_pada padanīyam_padanīya ātma--_ātman tattvam_tattva ānanda--_ānanda rūpam_rūpa brahma_brahman anāmayam_anāmaya avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya gacchanti_gam abhedena_abheda prāpnuvanti_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam phala--_phala kāmanām_kāmanā tyaktvā_tyaj samatva--_samatva buddhyā_buddhi karmāṇi_karman anutiṣṭhantaḥ_anuṣṭhā taiḥ_tad kṛta--_kṛ antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhayaḥ_śuddhi tat_tad tvam_tvad asi_as ādi--_ādi pramāṇa--_pramāṇa utpanna--_utpad ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna tad--_tad kāryāḥ_kārya santaḥ_as sakala--_sakala mokṣa--_mokṣa ākhyam_ākhyā viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu paramam_parama padam_pada gacchanti_gam tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad api_api yat_yad śreyaḥ_śreyas syāt_as niścitam_niścitam brūhi_brū tat_tad me_mad iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti śreyaḥ--_śreyas jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu evaṃvidham_evaṃvidha karma--_karman yogam_yoga anutiṣṭha_anuṣṭhā iti_iti bhagavataḥ_bhagavant abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya 51_51
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva karma--_karman jam_ja iti_iti buddhi--_buddhi yuktāḥ_yuj tādṛśa--_tādṛśa buddhimantaḥ_buddhimat karma--_karman jam_ja phalam_phala tyaktvā_tyaj karmāṇi_karman anutiṣṭhantaḥ_anuṣṭhā manīṣiṇaḥ_manīṣin karma--_karman antargata--_antargam ātma--_ātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya prajñāvantaḥ_prajñāvat bhūtvā_bhū janma--_janman bandhena_bandha vinirmuktāḥ_vinirmuc santaḥ_as anāmayam_anāmaya kleśa--_kleśa tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad api_api śreyaḥ_śreyas jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu evaṃvidhāni_evaṃvidha karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva svātma--_svātman jñānasya_jñāna paramātma--_paramātman jñāna--_jñāna hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva tasya_tad api_api tad--_tad pada--_pada gati--_gati hetu--_hetu tvam_tva yuktam_yuj 51_51
BhG 2.52

lg.l: yadā_yadā te_tvad moha--_moha kalilam_kalila buddhiḥ_buddhi vyatitariṣyati_vyatitṛ
tadā_tadā gantāsi_gam nirvedam_nirveda śrotavyasya_śru śrutasya_śru ca_ca

div.p: prāpsyāmi_prāp āha_ah mohaḥ_moha deha--_deha ādiṣu_ādi ātma--_ātman buddhiḥ_buddhi tat_tad eva_eva kalilam_kalila gahanam_gahana kalilam_kalila gahanam_gahana viduḥ_vid iti_iti abhidhāna--_abhidhāna koṣa--_koṣa smṛteḥ_smṛti tatas_tatas ca_ca ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha evam_evam parameśvara--_parameśvara ārādhane_ārādhana kriyamāṇe_kṛ yadā_yadā tad--_tad prasādena_prasāda tava_tvad buddhiḥ_buddhi deha--_deha abhimāna--_abhimāna lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa moha--_moha mayam_maya gahanam_gahana durgam_durga viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa atitariṣyati_atit￞ tadā_tadā śrotavyasya_śru śrutasya_śru ca_ca arthasya_artha nirvedam_nirveda vairāgyam_vairāgya tayoḥ_tad anupādeya--_anupādeya tvena_tva jijñāsām_jijñāsā na_na kariṣyasi_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 52_52

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam karmāṇi_karman anutiṣṭhataḥ_anuṣṭhā kadā_kadā me_mad sattva--_sattva śuddhiḥ_śuddhi syāt_as iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah yadā_yadā iti_iti na_na hi_hi etāvatā_etāvat kālena_kāla sattva--_sattva śuddhiḥ_śuddhi bhavati_bhū iti_iti kāla--_kāla niyamaḥ_niyama asti_as kintu_kiṃtu yadā_yadā yasmin_yad kāle_kāla te_tvad tava_tvad buddhiḥ_buddhi antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa moha--_moha kalilam_kalila vyatitariṣyati_vyatitṛ aviveka--_aviveka ātmakam_ātmaka kāluṣam_kāluṣa aham_mad idam_idam mama_mad idam_idam iti_iti ādi--_ādi ajñāna--_ajñāna vilasitam_vilasita ati_ati gahanam_gahana vyatikramiṣyati_vyatikram rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas malam_mala iti_iti yāvat_yāvat tadā_tadā tasmin_tad kāle_kāla śrotavyasya_śru śrutasya_śru ca_ca karma--_karman phalasya_phala nirvedam_nirveda vaitṛṣṇyam_vaitṛṣṇya gantāsi_gam prāptāsi_prāp parīkṣya_parīkṣ lokān_loka karma--_karman citān_ci brāhmaṇaḥ_brāhmaṇa nirvedam_nirveda āyāt_āyā nirvedena_nirveda phalena_phala antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhim_śuddhi jñāsyasi_jñā iti_iti
abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

bhaviṣyati_bhū āha_ah tava_tvad buddhiḥ_buddhi antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa moha--_moha kalilam_kalila moha--_moha rūpam_rūpa gahanam_gahana viśeṣataḥ_viśeṣataḥ atiśayena_atiśaya tariṣyati_tṛ tadā_tadā śrotavyasya_śru śrotavyeṣu_śru artheṣu_artha śrutasya_śru śruteṣu_śru api_api artheṣu_artha nirvedam_nirveda prāpsyasi_prāp asambhāvanā--_asaṃbhāvanā viparīta--_viparīta śāstra--_śāstra upadeśa--_upadeśa vākya--_vākya śravaṇena_śravaṇa sāmpratam_sāṃpratam me_mad sādhaneṣu_sādhana eva_eva pratikṣaṇam_pratikṣaṇam abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa sarvathā_sarvathā ucitaḥ_ucita iti_iti maṃsyase_man iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 52_52

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu niṣkāmāṇi_niṣkāma karmāṇi_karman kurvataḥ_kṛ me_mad kadā_kadā ātma--_ātman viṣayā_viṣaya manīṣā_manīṣā abhyudiyāt_abhyudi iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah yadā_yadā iti_iti yadā_yadā te_tvad buddhiḥ_buddhi antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa moha--_moha kalilam_kalila tuccha--_tuccha phala--_phala abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa hetum_hetu ajñāna--_ajñāna gahanam_gahana vyatitariṣyati_vyatitṛ parityakṣyati_parityaj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tadā_tadā pūrvam_pūrvam śrutasya_śru anantaram_anantaram śrotavyasya_śru ca_ca tasya_tad tuccha--_tuccha phalasya_phala sambandhinam_sambandhin gamiṣyasi_gam parīkṣya_parīkṣ lokān_loka karma--_karman citān_ci brāhmaṇaḥ_brāhmaṇa nirvedam_nirveda āyāt_āyā śravaṇāt_śravaṇa nirvedena_nirveda phalena_phala tad--_tad viṣayām_viṣaya tām_tad pariceṣyati_parici iti_iti na_na asti_as atra_atra kāla--_kāla niyamaḥ_niyama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 52_52
BhG 2.53

lg.l: śruti--_śruti vipratipannā_vipratipad te_tvad yadā_yadā sthāsyati_sthā niścalā_niścala
samādhau_samādhi acalā_acala buddhiḥ_buddhi tadā_tadā yogam_yoga avāpsyasyi_avāp

div.p: śrutibhiḥ_śruti nānā_nānā laukika--_laukika vaidika--_vaidika artha--_artha śravaṇaiḥ_śravaṇa vipratipannā_vipratipad itas_itas pūrvam_pūrvam vikṣiptā_vikṣip satī_as tava_tvad buddhiḥ_buddhi yadā_yadā samādhau_samādhi sthāsyati_sthā samādhīyate_samādhā cittam_citta asmin_idam iti_iti samādhiḥ_samādhi parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara tasmin_tad niścalā_niścala viṣayaiḥ_viṣaya antaraiḥ_antara an_an ākṛṣṭā_ākṛṣ atas_atas eva_eva acalā_acala abhyāsa--_abhyāsa pāṭavena_pāṭava tatra_tatra eva_eva sthirā_sthira ca_ca satī_as yogam_yoga yoga--_yoga phalam_phala tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna avāpsyasi_avāp

āha_ah te_tad tava_tvad buddhiḥ_buddhi śrutibhiḥ_śruti nānā_nānā vidha--_vidha phala--_phala śravaṇaiḥ_śravaṇa avicārita--_avicārita tātparyaiḥ_tātparya vipratipannā_vipratipad aneka--_aneka vidha--_vidha saṃśaya--_saṃśaya viparyāsavat--_viparyāsavat tvena_tva vikṣiptā_vikṣip prāk_prāk yadā_yadā yasmin_yad kāle_kāla śuddhi--_śuddhi ja--_ja viveka--_viveka janitena_janay doṣa--_doṣa darśanena_darśana tam_tad vikṣepam_vikṣepa parityajya_parityaj samādhau_samādhi parma--_parman ātmani_ātman niścalā_niścala jāgrat--_jāgrant svapna--_svapna darśana--_darśana lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa vikṣepa--_vikṣepa rahitā_rahita acalā_acala suṣupti--_suṣupti mūrcchā--_mūrchā satī_satī sthāsyati_sthā laya--_laya vikṣepa--_vikṣepa lakṣaṇau_lakṣaṇa doṣau_doṣa parityajya_parityaj samāhitā_samāhita bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti yāvat_yāvat athavā_athavā niścalā_niścala asambhāvanā--_asambhāvanā viparīta--_viparīta bhāvanā--_bhāvanā rahitā_rahita acalā_acala dīrgha--_dīrgha kāla--_kāla ādara--_ādara nairantarya--_nairantarya satkāra--_satkāra sevanaiḥ_sevana vijātīya--_vijātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya a_a dūṣitā_dūṣay satī_as nirvāta--_nirvāta pradīpa--_pradīpa vat_vat ātmani_ātman sthāsyati_sthā iti_iti yojanā_yojana tadā_tadā tasmin_tad kāle_kāla yogam_yoga jīva--_jīva paramātma--_paramātman aikya--_aikya lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa tat_tad tvam_tvad asi_as iti_iti ādi--_ādi vākya--_vākya janyam_jan akhaṇḍa--_akhaṇḍa sākṣātkāram_sākṣātkāra sarva--_sarva yoga--_yoga phalam_phala avāpsyasi_avāp tadā_tadā punar_punar sādhya--_sādhay antara--_antara abhāvāt_abhāva kṛta--_kṛ kṛtyaḥ_kṛtya sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā bhaviṣyasi_bhū iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatas_tatas ca_ca śrutiṣu_śruti nānā_nānā laukika--_laukika vaidika--_vaidika artha--_artha śravaṇeṣu_śravaṇa vipratipannāḥ_vipratipad asammatāḥ_asammata yāvat_yāvat tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu niścalā_niścala teṣu_tad teṣu_tad artheṣu_artha calitum_cal vimukhībhūtā_vimukhībhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kintu_kiṃtu samādhau_samādhi ṣaṣṭhe_ṣaṣṭha adhyāye_adhyāya vakṣyamāṇa--_vac lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa acalā_acala sthairyavatī_sthairyavat tadā_tadā yogam_yoga aparokṣa--_aparokṣa anubhava--_anubhava prāptyā_prāpti jīvan--_jīv muktaḥ_muc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu karma--_karman phala--_phala nirviṇṇa--_nirviṇṇa tayā_tā karma--_karman anuṣṭhānena_anuṣṭhāna labdha--_labh hṛd--_hṛd viśuddheḥ_viśuddhi abhyudita--_abhyudi ātma--_ātman jñānasya_jñāna me_mad kadā_kadā ātma--_ātman sākṣāt_sākṣāt kṛtiḥ_kṛti iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah śruti--_śruti iti_iti śrutyā_śruti karmaṇām_karman jñāna--_jñāna garbha--_garbha tām_tā prabodhayantyā_prabodhay tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti ādikayā_ādika vipratipannā_vipratipad viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa saṃsiddhā_saṃsidh te_tvad buddhiḥ_buddhi acalā_acala asambhāvanā--_asambhāvanā viparīta--_viparīta bhāvanābhyām_bhāvanā virahitā_virahita yadā_yadā samādhau_samādhi manasi_manas nirvāta--_nirvāta yogam_yoga ātma--_ātman anubhava--_anubhava lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa avāpsyasi_avāp ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha phala--_phala abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa śūnya--_śūnya tayā_tā anuṣṭhitāni_anuṣṭhā karmāṇi_karman sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajña tā--_tā rūpām_rūpa jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā sādhayanti_sādhay jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā rūpā_rūpa sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajña tā_tā tu_tu ātma--_ātman anubhavam_anubhava iti_iti
BhG 2.54

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā kā_ka bhāṣā_bhāṣā samādhi--_samādhi sthasya_stha keśava_keśava
sthita--_sthā dhīḥ_dhī kim_ka prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ kim_kim āsīta_ās vrajeta_vraj kim_kim

div.p: uvāca_vac svābhāvike_svābhāvika samādhau_samādhi sthitasya_sthā ataeva_ataeva sthitā_sthā niścalā_niścala prajñā_prajñā buddhiḥ_buddhi yasya_yad tasya_tad bhāṣā_bhāṣā kā_ka bhāṣyate_bhāṣ anayā_idam iti_iti bhāṣā_bhāṣā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa iti_iti yāvat_yāvat sa_tad kena_ka lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā ucyate_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā sthita--_sthā dhīḥ_dhī kim_ka katham_katham bhāṣaṇam_bhāṣaṇa āsanam_āsana vrajanam_vrajana ca_ca kuryāt_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana labdha--_labh avasaraḥ_avasara sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajña lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa jñātum_jñā arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac yāni_yad eva_eva hi_hi jīvan--_jīv muktānām_muc lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa tāni_tad eva_eva mumukṣūṇām_mumukṣu mokṣa--_mokṣa upāya--_upāya bhūtāni_bhū iti_iti manvānaḥ_man sthitā_sthā niścalā_niścala aham_mad brahma_brahman asmi_as iti_iti prajñā_prajñā yasya_yad sa_tad sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā avasthā--_avasthā dvayavān_dvayavat samādhi--_samādhi sthaḥ_stha vyutthita--_vyutthā cittaḥ_citta ca_ca iti_iti atas_atas viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ samādhi--_samādhi sthasya_stha sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā kā_ka bhāṣā_bhāṣā karmaṇi_karman ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī bhāṣyate_bhāṣ anayā_idam iti_iti bhāṣā_bhāṣā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa samādhi--_samādhi sthaḥ_stha sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā kena_ka lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa anyaiḥ_anya vyavahriyate_vyavahṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

sa_tad ca_ca vyutthita--_vyutthā cittaḥ_citta sthita--_sthā dhīḥ_dhī sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā svayam_svayam kim_ka prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ stuti--_stuti nindā--_nindā ādau_ādi abhinandana--_abhinandana dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa kim_ka katham_katham prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ sarvatra_sarvatra sambhāvanāyām_sambhāvanā liṅ_liṅ tathā_tathā kim_kim āsīta_ās iti_iti vyutthita--_vyutthā citta--_citta nigrahāya_nigraha katham_katham bahis_bahis indriyāṇām_indriya nigraham_nigraha karoti_kṛ tad--_tad nigrāha--_nigrāha abhāva--_abhāva kāle_kāla kim_kim vrajeta_vraj katham_katham viṣayān_viṣaya prāpnoti_prāp tad--_tad kartṛka--_kartṛka bhāṣaṇa--_bhāṣaṇa āsana--_āsana vrajanāni_vrajana mūḍha--_muh jana--_jana arthaḥ_artha

tat_tad evam_evam catvāraḥ_catur praśnāḥ_praśna samādhi--_samādhi sthe_stha sthita--_sthā prajñe_prajñā ekaḥ_eka vyutthite_vyutthā sthita--_sthā prajñe_prajñā trayaḥ_tri iti_iti keśava_keśava iti_iti sambodhayan_sambodhay sarva--_sarva antaryāmi--_antaryāmin tayā_tā tvam_tvad eva_eva etādṛśam_etādṛśa rahasyam_rahasya vaktum_vac samarthaḥ_samartha asi_as iti_iti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha samādhau_samādhi acalā_acala buddhiḥ_buddhi iti_iti śrutvā_śru tattvataḥ_tattva yoginaḥ_yogin lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa pṛcchati_pracch sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā iti_iti sthitā_sthā sthirā_sthira acalā_acala prajña_prajña buddhiḥ_buddhi yasya_yad iti_iti kā_ka bhāṣā_bhāṣā bhāṣyate_bhāṣ anayā_idam iti_iti bhāṣā_bhāṣā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa kim_ka lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kīdṛśasya_kīdṛśa samādhi--_samādhi sthasya_stha iti_iti samādhau_samādhi sthāsyati_sthā iti_iti asya_idam arthaḥ_artha evam_evam ca_ca sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā iti_iti samādhi--_samādhi sthaḥ_stha iti_iti jīvan--_jīv muktasya_muc saṃjñā--_saṃjñā dvayam_dvaya kim_ka prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ iti_iti sukha--_sukha duḥkhayoḥ_duḥkha māna--_māna apamānayoḥ_apamāna stuti--_stuti nindayoḥ_nindā sneha--_sneha dveṣayoḥ_dveṣa vā_vā samupasthitayoḥ_samupasthā kim_ka prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa svagatam_svagata vā_vā kim_ka vadet_vad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka
āsīta_ās tat_tad indriyāṇām_indriya bāhya--_bāhya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya calana--_calana abhāvaḥ_abhāva kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa vrajeta_vraj kim_kim teṣu_tad calanam_calana vā_vā kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam uktaḥ_vac arjunaḥ_arjuna pūrva--_pūrva padya--_padya uktasya_vac sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa jñātum_jñā pṛcchati_pracch sthita--_sthā iti_iti sthita--_sthita prajñe_prajñā atra_atra catvāraḥ_catur praśnāḥ_praśna samādhi--_samādhi sthe_stha ekaḥ_eka vyutthite_vyutthā tu_tu trayaḥ_tri -_sthā sthirā_sthira dhīḥ_dhī yasya_yad tasya_tad samādhi--_samādhi sthasya_stha kā_ka bhāṣā_bhāṣā kim_ka lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa bhāṣyate_bhāṣ anayā_idam vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti kena_ka lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā abhidhīyate_abhidhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā vyutthitaḥ_vyutthā sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā katham_katham bhāṣaṇa--_bhāṣaṇa ādīni_ādi kuryāt_kṛ tatra_tatra kim_ka prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ svayoḥ_sva stuti--_stuti nindayoḥ_nindā sneha--_sneha dveṣayoḥ_dveṣa ca_ca prāptayoḥ_prāp mukhatas_mukhatas svagatam_svagata vā_vā kim_ka brūyāt_brū kim_kim āsīta_ās bāhya--_bāhya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya katham_katham indriyāṇām_indriya nigraham_nigraha kuryāt_kṛ vrajeta_vraj kim_ka kim_ka tad--_tad nigrāha--_nigrāha viṣayān_viṣaya avāpnuyāt_avāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha triṣu_tri sambhāvanāyām_sambhāvanā
BhG 2.55

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
prajahāti_prahā yadā_yadā kāmān_kāma sarvān_sarva pārtha_pārtha manaḥ--_manas gatān_gam
ātmani_ātman eva_eva ātmanā_ātman tuṣṭaḥ_tuṣ sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā tadā_tadā ucyate_vac

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara atra_atra ca_ca yāni_yad sādhakasya_sādhaka jñāna--_jñāna sādhanāni_sādhana tāni_tad eva_eva svābhāvikāni_svābhāvika siddhasya_siddha lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa atas_atas siddhasya_siddha lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa kathayan_kathay eva_eva antaraṅgāni_antaraṅga jñāna--_jñāna sādhanāni_sādhana āha_ah yāvat_yāvat adhyāya--_adhyāya samāpti_samāpti tatra_tatra prathama--_prathama praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah prajahāti_prahā iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi manasi_manas sthitān_sthā kāmān_kāma prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa jahāti_hā tyāge_tyāga hetum_hetu āha_ah ātmani_ātman iti_iti ātmani_ātman eva_eva svasmin_sva eva_eva paramānanda--_paramānanda rūpe_rūpa ātmanā_ātman svayam_svayam eva_eva tuṣṭaḥ_tuṣ iti_iti ātma--_ātman ārāmaḥ_ārāma san_as yadā_yadā kṣudra--_kṣudra viṣaya--_viṣaya abhilāṣān_abhilāṣa tyajati_tyaj tadā_tadā tena_tad lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa muniḥ_muni sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā ucyate_vac 55_55

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana eteṣām_etad catūrṇām_catur praśnānām_praśna krameṇa_krameṇa uttaram_uttara bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac prajahāti_prahā iti_iti yāvat_yāvat kāmān_kāma kāma--_kāma saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ādīn_ādi manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣān_viśeṣa pramāṇa--_pramāṇa viparyaya--_viparyaya vikalpa--_vikalpa nidrā--_nidrā smṛti--_smṛti bhedena_bheda tantra--_tantra antare_antara pañcadhā_pañcadhā prapañcitān_prapañcita sarvān_sarva niravaśeṣān_niravaśeṣa prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bādhena_bādha yadā_yadā jahāti_hā bhavati_bhū sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā tadā_tadā ucyate_vac samādhi--_samādhi sthaḥ_stha iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa kāmānām_kāma anātma--_anātman dharma--_dharma tvena_tva parityāga--_parityāga yogya--_yogya tām_tā āha_ah manaḥ--_manas gatān_gam iti_iti yadi_yadi hi_hi ātma--_ātman dharmāḥ_dharma syuḥ_as tadā_tadā na_na tyaktum_tyaj śakyeran_śak vahni--_vahni auṣṇya--_auṣṇya vat_vat svābhāvika--_svābhāvika tvāt_tva manasaḥ_manas tu_tu dharmāḥ_dharma ete_etad atas_atas tad--_tad parityāgena_parityāga śakyāḥ_śakya eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nanu_nanu sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā mukha--_mukha prasāda--_prasāda liṅga--_liṅga gamyaḥ_gam santoṣa--_saṃtoṣa viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa pratīyate_pratī sa_tad katham_katham sarva--_sarva kāma--_kāma parityāge_parityāga syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah ātmani_ātman eva_eva paramānanda--_paramānanda rūpe_rūpa na_na tu_tu anātmani_anātman tucche_tuccha svaprakāśa--_svaprakāśa cit--_cit vṛttyā_vṛtti tuṣṭaḥ_tuṣ paritṛptaḥ_paritṛp parama--_parama puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha lābhāt_lābha tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti

yadā_yadā sarve_sarva pramucyante_pramuc kāmāḥ_kāma ye_yad asya_idam hṛdi_hṛd śritāḥ_śri
atha_atha martyaḥ_martya amṛtaḥ_amṛta bhavati_bhū atra_atra brahma_brahman samaśnute_samaś iti_iti
div.l: tathā_tathā ca_ca samādhi--_samādhi sthaḥ_stha sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā evaṃvidhaiḥ_evaṃvidha lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa vācibhiḥ_vācin śabdaiḥ_śabda bhāṣyate_bhāṣ iti_iti prathama--_prathama praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha catūrṇām_catur praśnānām_praśna krameṇa_krameṇa uttaram_uttara āha_ah prajahāti_prahā iti_iti yāvat_yāvat adhyāya--_adhyāya samāptiḥ_samāpti sarvān_sarva iti_iti kasmin_ka api_api arthe_artha yasya_yad kiṃcid_kaścit mātraḥ_mātṛ api_api na_na abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha manaḥ--_manas gatān_gam iti_iti kāmānām_kāma ātma--_ātman dharma--_dharma tvena_tva parityāge_parityāga yogya--_yogya tā_tā darśitā_darśay yadi_yadi te_tad hi_hi ātma--_ātman dharmāḥ_dharma syuḥ_as tadā_tadā tān_tad tyaktum_tyaj aśakyeran_śak vahneḥ_vahni auṣṇya--_auṣṇya vat_vat iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu ātmani_ātman pratyāhṛte_pratyāhṛ manasi_manas prāptaḥ_prāp yaḥ_yad ātma--_ātman ānanda--_ānanda rūpaḥ_rūpa tena_tad tuṣṭaḥ_tuṣ tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti
yadā_yadā sarve_sarva pramucyante_pramuc kāmāḥ_kāma ye_yad asya_idam hṛdi_hṛd śritāḥ_śri atha_atha martyaḥ_martya amṛtaḥ_amṛta bhavati_bhū atra_atra brahma_brahman samaśnute_samaś iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch bhagavān_bhagavant krameṇa_krameṇa catūrṇām_catur uttaram_uttara āha_ah yāvat_yāvat adhyāya--_adhyāya pūrtiḥ_pūrti tatra_tatra prathamasya_prathama āha_ah prajahāti_prahā iti_iti ekena_eka he_he pārtha_pārtha yadā_yadā manaḥ--_manas gatān_gam manasi_manas sthitān_sthā kāmān_kāma sarvān_sarva prajahāti_prahā saṃtyajati_saṃtyaj tadā_tadā sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā ucyate_vac kāmānām_kāma manaḥ--_manas dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva parityāgaḥ_parityāga yuktaḥ_yuj ātma--_ātman dharma--_dharma tve_tva duḥśakyaḥ_duḥśakya sa_tad syāt_as vahni--_vahni uṣṇa--_uṣṇa tā--_tā ādīnām_ādi iva_iva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu śuṣka--_śuṣka kāṣṭha--_kāṣṭha vat_vat katham_katham tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah ātmani_ātman eva_eva iti_iti ātmani_ātman pratyāhṛte_pratyāhṛ manasi_manas bhāsamānena_bhās sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa ānanda--_ānanda rūpeṇa_rūpa ātmanā_ātman sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa tuṣṭaḥ_tuṣ paritṛptaḥ_paritṛp kṣudra--_kṣudra viṣaya--_viṣaya abhilāṣān_abhilāṣa saṃtyajya_saṃtyaj ātma--_ātman ānanda--_ānanda ārāmaḥ_ārāma samādhi--_samādhi sthaḥ_stha sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā

ātmā_ātman puṃsi_puṃs svabhāve_svabhāva api_api prayanta--_prayanta manasoḥ_manas api_api dhṛtau_dhṛti api_api manīṣāyām_manīṣā śarīra--_śarīra brahmaṇoḥ_brahman api_api iti_iti medinī--_medinī kāraḥ_kāra
div.l: brahma_brahman ca_ca atra_atra jīva--_jīva īśvara--_īśvara anyatarat_anyatara grāhyam_grah

div.p: BhG 2.56

lg.l: duḥkheṣu_duḥkha anudvigna--_anudvigna manāḥ_manas sukheṣu_sukha vigata--_vigam spṛhaḥ_spṛhā
vīta--_vī rāga--_rāga bhaya--_bhaya krodhaḥ_krodha sthita--_sthā dhīḥ_dhī muniḥ_muni ucyate_vac

div.p: duḥkheṣu_duḥkha prāpteṣu_prāp api_api anudvignam_anudvigna a_a kṣubhitam_kṣubh manaḥ_manas yasya_yad saḥ_tad sukheṣu_sukha vigatā_vigam spṛhā_spṛhā yasya_yad saḥ_tad tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu vītāḥ_vī apagatāḥ_apagam rāga--_rāga bhaya--_bhaya krodhāḥ_krodha yasmāt_yad tatra_tatra rāgaḥ_rāga prītiḥ_prīti sa_tad muniḥ_muni sthita--_sthā dhīḥ_dhī ucyate_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm vyutthitasya_vyutthā sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā bhāṣaṇa--_bhāṣaṇa upaveśana--_upaveśana gamanāni_gamana mūḍha--_muh jana--_jana vilakṣaṇāni_vilakṣaṇa vyākhyeyāni_vyākhyā tatra_tatra kim_ka prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara āha_ah duḥkheṣu_duḥkha iti_iti dvyābhyām_dvi duḥkhāni_duḥkha trividhāni_trividha śoka--_śoka moha--_moha jvara--_jvara śiraḥ--_śiras roga--_roga ādi--_ādi nimittāni_nimitta ādhyātmikāni_ādhyātmika vyāghra--_vyāghra sarpa--_sarpa ādi--_ādi prayuktāni_prayuj ādhibhautikāni_ādhibhautika ati_ati vāta--_vāta ativṛṣṭi--_ativṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi hetukāni_hetuka ādhidaivikāni_ādhidaivika teṣu_tad duḥkheṣu_duḥkha rajaḥ--_rajas prārabdha--_prārabh pāpa--_pāpa karma--_karman prāpiteṣu_prāpay na_na udvignam_udvij duḥkha--_duḥkha parihāra--_parihāra akṣama--_akṣama tayā_tā vyākulam_vyākula na_na bhavati_bhū manaḥ_manas yasya_yad saḥ_tad anudvigna--_anudvigna manāḥ_manas avivekinaḥ_avivekin hi_hi duḥkha--_duḥkha prāptau_prāpti satyām_as aho_aho pāpaḥ_pāpa aham_mad dhik_dhik mām_mad durātmānam_durātman etādṛśa--_etādṛśa duḥkha--_duḥkha bhāginam_bhāgin kaḥ_ka me_mad duḥkham_duḥkha īdṛśam_īdṛśa nirākuryāt_nirākṛ iti_iti anutāpa--_anutāpa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka bhrānti--_bhrānti rūpaḥ_rūpa tāmasaḥ_tāmasa citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti yadi_yadi ayam_idam pāpa--_pāpa anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna samaye_samaya syāt_as tadā_tadā tad--_tad pravṛtti--_pravṛtti pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka tvena_tva saphalaḥ_saphala syāt_as bhoga--_bhoga kāle_kāla tu_tu bhavan_bhū kāraṇe_kāraṇa sati_as kāryasya_kārya ucchettum_ucchid aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva niṣprayojanaḥ_niṣprayojana duḥkha--_duḥkha kāraṇe_kāraṇa sati_as api_api kim_ka iti_iti mama_mad duḥkham_duḥkha jāyate_jan iti_iti aviveka--_aviveka ja--_ja bhrama--_bhrama rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva na_na vivekinaḥ_vivekin sthita--_sthā duḥkha--_duḥkha mātram_mātra hi_hi prārabdha--_prārabh karmaṇā_karman prāpyate_prāp na_na tu_tu tad--_tad uttara--_uttara kālīnaḥ_kālīna bhramaḥ_bhrama api_api

nanu_nanu duḥkha--_duḥkha antara--_antara kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvāt_tva saḥ_tad api_api prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman antareṇa_antara prāpyatām_prāp iti_iti cet_ced na_na yathā_yathā kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid deha--_deha yātrā--_yātrā mātra--_mātra nirvāhaka--_nirvāhaka prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman phalasya_phala bhrama--_bhrama abhāve_abhāva api_api bādhita--_bādh anuvṛttyā_anuvṛtti upapatteḥ_upapatti iti_iti vistareṇa_vistara agre_agra vakṣyate_vac

tathā_tathā sukheṣu_sukha sattva--_sattva pariṇāma--_pariṇāma rūpa--_rūpa prīti--_prīti ātmaka--_ātmaka citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣeṣu_viśeṣa trividheṣu_trividha prārabdha--_prārabh puṇya--_puṇya karma--_karman prāpiteṣu_prāpay vigata--_vigam spṛhaḥ_spṛhā āgāmi--_āgāmin tad--_tad jātīya--_jātīya sukha--_sukha spṛhā--_spṛhā rahitaḥ_rahita spṛhā_spṛhā hi_hi nāma_nāma sukha--_sukha anubhava--_anubhava kāle_kāla tad--_tad jātīya--_jātīya sukhasya_sukha kāraṇam_kāraṇa dharmam_dharma an_an anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā vṛthā_vṛthak eva_eva tad--_tad ākāṅkṣā--_ākāṅkṣā rūpā_rūpa tāmasī_tāmasa citta--_citta vṛttiḥ_vṛtti bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti eva_eva sā_tad ca_ca avivekinaḥ_avivekin eva_eva jāyate_jan na_na hi_hi kāraṇa--_kāraṇa abhāve_abhāva kāryam_kārya bhavitum_bhū arhati_arh atas_atas yathā_yathā sati_as kāraṇe_kāraṇa kāryam_kārya mā_mā bhūt_bhū iti_iti vṛthā_vṛthak ākāṅkṣā--_ākāṅkṣā rūpaḥ_rūpa udvegaḥ_udvega vivekinaḥ_vivekin na_na sambhavati_sambhū tathā_tathā eva_eva asati_asat kāraṇe_kāraṇa kāryam_kārya bhūyāt_bhū iti_iti vṛthā_vṛthak ākāṅkṣā--_ākāṅkṣā rūpā_rūpa tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā ātmikā_ātmaka

harṣa--_harṣa ātmikā_ātmaka vā_vā citta--_citta vṛttiḥ_vṛtti spṛhā--_spṛhā śabdena_śabda uktā_vac sā_tad api_api bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti eva_eva aho_aho dhanyaḥ_dhanya aham_mad yasya_yad mama_mad īdṛśam_īdṛśa sukham_sukha upasthitam_upasthā kaḥ_ka vā_vā mayā_mad tulaḥ_tulā tribhuvane_tribhuvana kena_ka vā_vā upāyena_upāya mama_mad īdṛśam_īdṛśa sukham_sukha na_na vicchidyeta_vicchid iti_iti evam_evam ātmikā--_ātmika utphulla--_utphulla tā--_tā rūpā_rūpa tāmasī_tāmasa citta--_citta vṛttiḥ_vṛtti ataeva_ataeva uktam_vac bhāṣye_bhāṣya na_na agniḥ_agni iva_iva indhana--_indhana ādi--_ādi ādhāne_ādhāna yaḥ_yad sukhāni_sukha anuvivardhate_anuvivṛdh sa_tad vigata--_vigam spṛhaḥ_spṛhā iti_iti vakṣyati_vac ca_ca na_na prahṛṣyet_prahṛṣ priyam_priya prāpya_prāp na_na udvijet_udvij prāpya_prāp ca_ca apriyam_apriya iti_iti sā_tad api_api na_na vivekinaḥ_vivekin sambhavati_sambhū bhrānti--_bhrānti tvāt_tva

tathā_tathā vīta--_vī rāga--_rāga bhaya--_bhaya krodhaḥ_krodha rāgaḥ_rāga śobhana--_śobhana adhyāsa--_adhyāsa nibandhanaḥ_nibandhana viṣayeṣu_viṣaya rañjana--_rañjana ātmakaḥ_ātmaka citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa atyanta--_atyanta abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa rūpaḥ_rūpa rāga--_rāga viṣayasya_viṣaya nāśake_nāśaka samupasthite_samupasthā tad--_tad nivāraṇa--_nivāraṇa asāmarthyam_asāmarthya ātmanaḥ_ātman manyamānasya_man dainya--_dainya ātmakaḥ_ātmaka citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa bhayam_bhaya evam_evam rāga--_rāga viṣaya--_viṣaya vināśake_vināśaka samupasthite_samupasthā tad--_tad nivāraṇa--_nivāraṇa sāmarthyam_sāmarthya ātmanaḥ_ātman manyamānasya_man abhijvalana--_abhijvalana ātmakaḥ_ātmaka citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa krodhaḥ_krodha te_tad sarve_sarva viparyaya--_viparyaya rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva vigatāḥ_vigam yasmāt_yasmāt sa_tad tathā_tathā etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa muniḥ_muni manana--_manana śīlaḥ_śīla saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā ucyate_vac evaṃ-lakṣaṇaḥ_evaṃlakṣaṇa sthita--_sthā dhīḥ_dhī sva--_sva anubhava--_anubhava prakaṭanena_prakaṭana śiṣya--_śiṣya śikṣā--_śikṣā artham_artha anudvega--_anudvega nispṛha--_nispṛha tva--_tva ādi--_ādi vācaḥ_vāc prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya uktaḥ_vac evam_evam ca_ca anyaḥ_anya api_api mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu duḥkhe_duḥkha nā_na udvijet_udvij sukhe_sukha na_na prahṛṣyet_prahṛṣ rāga--_rāga bhaya--_bhaya krodha--_krodha rahitaḥ_rahita ca_ca bhavet_bhū iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kim_ka prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara āha_ah duḥkheṣu_duḥkha kṣudh--_kṣudh pipāsa--_pipāsā jvara--_jvara śiraḥ--_śiras roga--_roga ādiṣu_ādi ādhyātmikeṣu_ādhyātmika sarpa--_sarpa vyāghra--_vyāghra ādi--_ādi utthiteṣu_utthā anudvigna--_anudvigna manāḥ_manas prārabdham_prārabh duḥkham_duḥkha idam_idam mayā_mad san_as spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa ca_ca bruvan_brū na_na duḥkheṣu_duḥkha udvijate_udvij iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tasya_tad tādṛśa--_tādṛśa mukha--_mukha vikriyā--_vikriyā bhāvaḥ_bhāva eva_eva anudvega--_anudvega liṅgam_liṅga sudhiyā_sudhī gamyam_gam kṛtrima--_kṛtrima anudvega--_anudvega liṅgavān_liṅgavat tu_tu kapaṭī_kapaṭin sudhiyā_sudhī paricitaḥ_parici bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś eva_eva ucyate_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva evam_evam sukheṣu_sukha api_api upasthiteṣu_upasthā vigata--_vigam spṛhaḥ_spṛhā iti_iti prārabdham_prārabh idam_idam avaśya--_avaśya bhogyam_bhuj iti_iti svagatam_svagata spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa ca_ca bruvāṇasya_brū tasya_tad sukha--_sukha spṛhā--_spṛhā rāhitya--_rāhitya liṅgam_liṅga sudhiyā_sudhī gamyam_gam eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tad--_tad tad--_tad liṅgam_liṅga eva_eva spaṣṭīkṛtya_spaṣṭīkṛ darśayati_darśay vītaḥ_vī vigataḥ_vigam rāgaḥ_rāga anurāgaḥ_anurāga sukheṣu_sukha bandhu--_bandhu janeṣu_jana yasya_yad saḥ_tad yathā_yathā eva_eva ādi--_ādi bharatasya_bharata devyāḥ_devī pārśvam_pārśva prāpitasya_prāpay sva--_sva cheda--_cheda cikīrṣoḥ_cikīrṣu vṛṣala--_vṛṣala rājāt_rāja na_na bhayam_bhaya na_na api_api tatra_tatra krodhaḥ_krodha abhūt_bhū iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha vyutthitaḥ_vyutthā sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā kim_ka bhāṣeta_bhāṣ iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara āha_ah duḥkheṣu_duḥkha iti_iti dvyābhyām_dvi trividheṣu_trividha adhyātmika--_adhyātmika ādiṣu_ādi duḥkheṣu_duḥkha samutthiteṣu_samutthā satsu_as anudvigna--_anudvigna manāḥ_manas prārabdha--_prārabh phalāni_phala amūni_adas mayā_mad avaśyam_avaśyam bhoktavyāni_bhuj iti_iti kenacid_kaścit pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch svagatam_svagata vā_vā bruvan_brū tebhyaḥ_tad na_na udvijate_udvij iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sukheṣu_sukha ca_ca uttama--_uttama āhāra--_āhāra satkāra--_satkāra ādinā_ādi samupasthiteṣu_samupasthā vigata--_vigam spṛhaḥ_spṛhā tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā śūnyaḥ_śūnya prārabdha--_prārabh ākṛṣṭāni_ākṛṣ amūni_adas mayā_mad avaśya--_avaśya bhoktavyāni_bhuj iti_iti kenacid_kaścit pṛṣṭam_pracch svagatam_svagata vā_vā bruvan_brū taiḥ_tad upasthitaḥ_upasthā vīta--_vī iti_iti vīta--_vī rāgaḥ_rāga kamanīyeṣu_kamanīya prīti--_prīti śūnyaḥ_śūnya vīta--_vī bhayaḥ_bhaya viṣaya--_viṣaya apahartṛṣu_apahartṛ prāpteṣu_prāp durlabhasya_durlabha mama_mad etāni_etad dharmyaiḥ_dharmya bhavadbhiḥ_bhavat hriyante_hṛ iti_iti dainya--_dainya śūnyaḥ_śūnya vīta--_vī krodhaḥ_krodha teṣu_tad eva_eva prabalasya_prabala mama_mad etāni_etad tucchaiḥ_tuccha bhavadbhiḥ_bhavat katham_katham apahartavyāni_apahṛ iti_iti krodha--_krodha śūnyaḥ_śūnya ca_ca evaṃvidhaḥ_evaṃvidha muniḥ_muni ātma--_ātman manana--_manana śīlaḥ_śīla sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ittham_ittham sva--_sva anubhavam_anubhava parān_para prati_prati svagatam_svagata vā_vā vadan_vad na_na audvegaḥ_audvega nispṛha--_nispṛha tā--_tā ādi--_ādi vacaḥ_vacas prabhāṣate_prabhāṣ iti_iti uttaram_uttara
BhG 2.57

lg.l: yaḥ_yad sarvatra_sarvatra anabhisnehaḥ_anabhisneha tat_tad tat_tad prāpya_prāp śubha--_śubha aśubham_aśubha
na_na abhinandati_abhinand na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara katham_katham bhāṣeta_bhāṣ iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara āha_ah ye_yad iti_iti yaḥ_yad sarvatra_sarvatra putra--_putra mitra--_mitra ādiṣu_ādi api_api anabhisnehaḥ_anabhisneha sneha--_sneha varjitaḥ_varjay ataeva_ataeva bādhita--_bādh anuvṛttyā_anuvṛtti tat_tad tat_tad śubham_śubha anukūlam_anukūla prāpya_prāp na_na abhinandati_abhinand aśubham_aśubha pratikūlam_pratikūla prāpya_prāp na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ na_na nindati_nind kintu_kiṃtu kevalam_kevalam udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna eva_eva bhāṣate_bhāṣ tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 57_57

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka ca_ca sarva--_sarva deheṣu_deha jīvana--_jīvana ādiṣu_ādi api_api yaḥ_yad muniḥ_muni anabhisnehaḥ_anabhisneha yasmin_yad sati_as anyadīye_anyadīya hāni--_hāni vṛddhī_vṛddhi svasmin_sva āropyete_āropay sa_tad tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa anya--_anya viṣayaḥ_viṣaya prema--_preman apara--_apara paryāyaḥ_paryāya tāmasaḥ_tāmasa vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa snehaḥ_sneha bhagavati_bhagavant paramātmani_paramātman tu_tu sarvathā_sarvathā abhisnehavān_abhisnehavat bhavet_bhū eva_eva anātman_anātman sneha--_sneha abhāvasya_abhāva tad--_tad artha--_artha tvāt_tva iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś

tad--_tad tad--_tad prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman pariprāpitam_pariprāpay śubham_śubha sukha--_sukha hetum_hetu viṣayam_viṣaya prāpya_prāp na_na abhinandati_abhinand harṣa--_harṣa viśeṣa--_viśeṣa puraḥsaram_puraḥsara na_na praśaṃsati_praśaṃs aśubham_aśubha duḥkha--_duḥkha hetum_hetu viṣayam_viṣaya prāpya_prāp na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ antar_antar asūyā--_asūyā pūrvakam_pūrvaka na_na nindati_nind ajñasya_ajña hi_hi sukha--_sukha hetuḥ_hetu yaḥ_yad sva--_sva kalatra--_kalatra ādiḥ_ādi sa_tad śubhaḥ_śubha viṣayaḥ_viṣaya tad--_tad guṇa--_guṇa kathana--_kathana ādi--_ādi dhī--_dhī vṛttiḥ_vṛtti bhrānti--_bhrānti rūpa--_rūpa abhinandaḥ_abhinanda sa_tad ca_ca tāmasaḥ_tāmasa tad--_tad guṇa--_guṇa kathana--_kathana ādeḥ_ādi para--_para prarocana--_prarocana arthatva--_arthatva abhāvena_abhāva vyartha--_vyartha tvāt_tva evam_evam asūyā--_asūyā utpādanena_utpādana duḥkha--_duḥkha hetuḥ_hetu parakīya--_parakīya vidyā--_vidyā prakarṣa--_prakarṣa ādiḥ_ādi enam_enad prati_prati aśubhaḥ_aśubha viṣayaḥ_viṣaya tad--_tad nindā--_nindā ādi--_ādi bhrānti--_bhrānti rūpā_rūpa dhī--_dhī vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa saḥ_tad api_api tāmasaḥ_tāmasa tau_tad abhinanda--_abhinanda dveṣau_dveṣa bhrānti--_bhrānti rūpau_rūpa tāmasau_tāmasa katham_katham abhrānte_abhrānta śuddha--_śuddha sattve_sattva sthita--_sthā prajñe_prajñā sambhavatām_sambhū tasmāt_tasmāt vicālaka--_vicālaka abhāvāt_abhāva tasya_tad anabhisnehasya_anabhisneha harṣa--_harṣa viṣāda--_viṣāda rahitasya_rahita muneḥ_muni prajñā_prajñā paramātma--_paramātman tattva--_tattva viṣayā_viṣaya pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā phala--_phala paryavasāyinī_paryavasāyin sa_tad sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam anyaḥ_anya api_api mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu sarvatra_sarvatra anabhisnehaḥ_anabhisneha bhavet_bhū śubham_śubha prāpya_prāp na_na praśaṃset_praśaṃs aśubham_aśubha prāpya_prāp na_na nindet_nind iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya atra_atra ca_ca nindā--_nindā praśaṃsā--_praśaṃsā ādi--_ādi rūpāḥ_rūpa vācaḥ_vāc na_na prabhāṣeta_prabhāṣ iti_iti vyatirekaḥ_vyatireka uktaḥ_vac 57_57

tiṣṭhet_sthā tat_tad tat_tad prasiddham_prasidh sammāna--_sammāna bhojana--_bhojana ādibhyaḥ_ādi sva--_sva paricaraṇam_paricaraṇa śubham_śubha prāpya_prāp aśubham_aśubha an_an ādaraṇam_ādaraṇa muṣṭi--_muṣṭi prahāra--_prahāra ādikam_ādika ca_ca prāpya_prāp krameṇa_krameṇa na_na abhinandati_abhinand na_na praśaṃsati_praśaṃs tvam_tvad dhārmikaḥ_dhārmika paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa sevī_sevin sukhī_sukhin bhava_bhū iti_iti na_na brūte_brū na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ tvam_tvad pāpa--_pāpa ātmā_ātman narake_naraka pata_pat iti_iti na_na abhiśapati_abhiśap tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā samādhim_samādhi prati_prati sthitā_sthā susthira--_susthira prajñā_prajñā ucyate_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 57_57

baladevaḥ_baladeva yaḥ_yad sarveṣu_sarva prāṇiṣu_prāṇin anabhisneha_anabhisneha aupādhika--_aupādhika sneha--_sneha śūnyaḥ_śūnya kāruṇika--_kāruṇika tvāt_tva nirupādhiḥ_nirupādhi īṣat_īṣat snehaḥ_sneha tu_tu asti_as eva_eva tat_tad tat_tad prasiddham_prasidh śubham_śubha uttama--_uttama bhojana--_bhojana sraj--_sraj candana--_candana arpaṇa--_arpaṇa rūpam_rūpa prāpya_prāp na_na abhinandati_abhinand tad--_tad arpakam_arpaka prati_prati dharmiṣṭhaḥ_dharmiṣṭha tvam_tvad ciram_ciram jīva_jīv iti_iti na_na vadati_vad aśubham_aśubha apamānam_apamāna yaṣṭi--_yaṣṭi prahāra--_prahāra ādikam_ādika ca_ca prāpya_prāp na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ pāpiṣṭhaḥ_pāpiṣṭha tvam_tvad miryasva_mṛ iti_iti na_na abhiśapati_abhiśap tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā iti_iti sa_tad sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra stuti--_stuti nindā--_nindā rūpam_rūpa vacaḥ_vacas na_na bhāṣate_bhāṣ iti_iti vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka tat_tad lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa 57_57
BhG 2.58

lg.l: yadā_yadā saṃharate_saṃhṛ ca_ca ayam_idam kūrmaḥ_kūrma aṅgāni_aṅga iva_iva sarvaśas_sarvaśas
indriyāṇi_indriya indriya--_indriya arthebhyaḥ_artha tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā

div.p: yadā_yadā ca_ca ayam_idam yogī_yogin indriya--_indriya arthebhyaḥ_artha śabda--_śabda ādibhyaḥ_ādi sakāśāt_sakāśa indriyāṇi_indriya saṃharate_saṃhṛ sarvatas_sarvatas evam_evam jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭha sarva--_sarva viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya upasaṃharate_upasaṃhṛ tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti ukta--_vac artham_artha vākyam_vākya 58_58

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm kim_kim āsīta_ās iti_iti praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara vaktum_vac ārabhate_ārabh bhagavant_bhagavant ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ ślokaiḥ_śloka tatra_tatra prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa vyutthānena_vyutthāna vikṣiptāni_vikṣip indriyāṇi_indriya punar_punar upasaṃhṛtya_upasaṃhṛ samādhi--_samādhi artham_artha eva_eva sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā upaveśanam_upaveśana iti_iti darśayitum_darśay āha_ah yadā_yadā iti_iti ayam_idam vyutthitaḥ_vyutthā sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarvāṇi_sarva indriya--_indriya arthebhyaḥ_artha śabda--_śabda ādibhyaḥ_ādi sarvebhyaḥ_sarva caḥ_ca punar_punar arthe_artha yadā_yadā saṃharate_saṃhṛ punar_punar upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ saṅkocayati_saṃkocay tatra_tatra dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta kūrmaḥ_kūrma aṅgāni_aṅga iva_iva tadā_tadā tasya_tad prajñāḥ_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa adhunā_adhunā tu_tu punar_punar

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kim_kim āsīta_ās iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara āha_ah yadā_yadā iti_iti indriya--_indriya arthebhyaḥ_artha śabda--_śabda ādibhyaḥ_ādi indriyāṇi_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi saṃharate_saṃhṛ sva--_sva adhīnānām_adhīna indriyāṇām_indriya bāhya--_bāhya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya calanam_calana niṣidhya_niṣidh antar_antar eva_eva niścala--_niścala tayā_tā sthāpanam_sthāpana sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā āsanam_āsana iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta kūrmaḥ_kūrma aṅgāni_aṅga mukha--_mukha netra--_netra ādīni_ādi yathā_yathā sva--_sva antar_antar eva_eva sva--_sva icchayā_icchā sthāpayati_sthāpay 58_58

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha kim_kim āsīta_ās iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara āha_ah yadā_yadā iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ ayam_idam yogī_yogin yadā_yadā ca_ca indriyārthebhyaḥ_indriyārtha śabda--_śabda ādibhyaḥ_ādi svādhīnāni_svādhīna indriyāṇi_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi anāyāsena_anāyāsa saṃharati_saṃhṛ samākarṣati_samākṛṣ tadā_tadā tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya atra_atra dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta kūrmaḥ_kūrma aṅgāni_aṅga iva_iva iti_iti mukha--_mukha kara--_kara caraṇāni_caraṇa yathā_yathā anāyasena_anāyasa kamaṭhaḥ_kamaṭha saṃharati_saṃhṛ tadvat_tadvat viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya samākṛṣṭa--_samākṛṣ indriyāṇām_indriya antar_antar sthāpanam_sthāpana sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā āsanam_āsana 58_58
BhG 2.59

lg.l: viṣayāḥ_viṣaya vinivartante_vinivṛt nirāhārasya_nirāhāra dehinaḥ_dehin
rasa--_rasa varjam_varjam rasaḥ_rasa api_api asya_idam param_para dṛṣṭvā_dṛś nivartate_nivṛt

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara nanu_nanu na_na indriyāṇām_indriya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya apravṛttiḥ_apravṛtti sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa bhavitum_bhū arhati_arh jaḍānām_jaḍa āturāṇām_ātura upavāsa--_upavāsa parāṇām_para ca_ca viṣayeṣu_viṣaya pravṛtteḥ_pravṛtti aviśeṣāt_aviśeṣa tatra_tatra āha_ah viṣayāḥ_viṣaya iti_iti viṣayāṇām_viṣaya āharaṇam_āharaṇa grahaṇam_grahaṇa āhāraḥ_āhāra nirāhārasya_nirāhāra viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇam_grahaṇa akurvataḥ_akurvat dehinaḥ_dehin deha--_deha abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin ajñasya_ajña rāgaḥ_rāga abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa tad--_tad varjam_varja abhilāṣasya_abhilāṣa na_na nivartate_nivṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā nirāhārasya_nirāhāra upavāsa--_upavāsa parasya_para viṣayāḥ_viṣaya prāyaśas_prāyaśas nivartante_nivṛt kṣudhā--_kṣudhā santaptasya_saṃtap śabda--_śabda sparśa--_sparśa ādi--_ādi apekṣā--_apekṣā abhāvāt_abhāva kintu_kiṃtu rasa--_rasa varjam_varjam rasa--_rasa apekṣā_apekṣā tu_tu na_na nivartate_nivṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śeṣam_śeṣa samānam_samāna 59_59
