madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu mūḍhasya_muh api_api roga--_roga ādi--_ādi vaśāt_vaśa viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya indriyāṇām_indriya upasaṃharaṇam_upasaṃharaṇa bhavati_bhū tat_tad katham_katham tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti uktam_vac āha_ah nirāhārasya_nirāhāra viṣayān_viṣaya anāharataḥ_anāharat dehinaḥ_dehin deha--_deha abhimānavataḥ_abhimānavat mūḍhasya_muh api_api rogiṇaḥ_rogin kāṣṭha--_kāṣṭha tapasvinaḥ_tapasvin vā_vā viṣayāḥ_viṣaya śabda--_śabda ādayaḥ_ādi vinivartante_vinivṛt kintu_kiṃtu rasa--_rasa varjam_varjam rasa--_rasa tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā tam_tad varjayitvā_varjay ajñasya_ajña viṣayāḥ_viṣaya nivartante_nivṛt tad--_tad viṣayaḥ_viṣaya rāgaḥ_rāga tu_tu na_na nivartate_nivṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha asya_idam tu_tu sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā param_para puruṣa--_puruṣa artham_artha dṛṣṭvā_dṛś tat_tad eva_eva aham_mad asmi_as iti_iti sākṣātkṛtya_sākṣātkṛ sthitasya_sthā rasaḥ_rasa api_api kṣudra--_kṣudra sukha--_sukha rāgaḥ_rāga api_api nivartate_nivṛt api_api śabdāt_śabda viṣayāḥ_viṣaya ca_ca tathā_tathā ca_ca yāvān_yāvat arthaḥ_artha iti_iti ādau_ādi vyākhyātam_vyākhyā evam_evam ca_ca sa_sa rāga--_rāga viṣaya--_viṣaya nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajñā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa iti_iti na_na mūḍhe_muh vyabhicāraḥ_vyabhicāra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yasmāt_yasmāt na_na asati_asat paramātma--_paramātman samyak_samyak darśane_darśana sa_sa rāga--_rāga viṣaya--_viṣaya ucchedaḥ_uccheda tasmāt_tasmāt sa_sa rāga--_rāga viṣaya--_viṣaya ucchedikāyāḥ_ucchedika samyak_samyak darśana--_darśana ātmikāyāḥ_ātmaka prajñāyāḥ_prajñā sthairyam_sthairya mahatā_mahat yatnena_yatna sampādayet_sampāday iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya 59_59

sambhavet_sambhū āha_ah rasa--_rasa varjam_varjam rasaḥ_rasa rāgaḥ_rāga abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa tam_tad varjayitvā_varjay abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa tu_tu viṣayeṣu_viṣaya na_na nivartante_nivṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha asya_idam sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā tu_tu param_para paramātmānam_paramātman dṛṣṭvā_dṛś viṣayeṣu_viṣaya abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa nivartate_nivṛt iti_iti na_na lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa vyabhicāraḥ_vyabhicāra ātma--_ātman sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra samarthasya_samartha tu_tu sādhaka--_sādhaka tvam_tva eva_eva na_na tu_tu siddha--_sidh tvam_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 59_59

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu mūḍhasya_muh āmaya--_āmaya grastasya_gras viṣayeṣu_viṣaya indriya--_indriya apravṛtti--_apravṛtti dṛṣṭā_dṛś tat_tad katham_katham etat_etad sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa tatra_tatra āha_ah viṣayāḥ_viṣaya iti_iti nirāhārasya_nirāhāra roga--_roga bhayāt_bhaya bhojana--_bhojana ādīni_ādi akurvataḥ_akurvat mūḍhasya_muh api_api dehinaḥ_dehin janasya_jana viṣayāḥ_viṣaya tad--_tad anubhavāḥ_anubhava vinivartante_vinivṛt kintu_kiṃtu rasaḥ_rasa rāga--_rāga tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā tad--_tad varjam_varja viṣaya--_viṣaya tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā tu_tu na_na nivartate_nivṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha asya_idam sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā tu_tu rasaḥ_rasa api_api viṣaya--_viṣaya rāgaḥ_rāga api_api viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya param_para sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa ānandam_ānanda ātmānam_ātman dṛṣṭvā_dṛś anubhūya_anubhū nivartate_nivṛt vinaśyati_vinaś iti_iti sa_sa rāga--_rāga viṣaya--_viṣaya nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti tasya_tad lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa iti_iti na_na 59_59
BhG 2.60

lg.l: yatataḥ_yat hi_hi api_api kaunteya_kaunteya puruṣasya_puruṣa vipaścitaḥ_vipaścit
indriyāṇi_indriya pramāthīni_pramāthin haranti_hṛ prasabham_prasabham manaḥ_manas

div.p: sambhavati_sambhū atas_atas sādhaka--_sādhaka avasthāyām_avasthā tatra_tatra mahān_mahat prayatnaḥ_prayatna kartavyaḥ_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah yatataḥ_yat hi_hi api_api iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi yatataḥ_yat mokṣa--_mokṣa artham_artha prayatamānasya_prayat vipaścitaḥ_vipaścit vivekinaḥ_vivekin api_api manaḥ_manas indriyāṇi_indriya prasabham_prasabham balāt_bala haranti_hṛ yatas_yatas pramāthīni_pramāthin pramathana--_pramathana śīlāni_śīla kṣobhakāni_kṣobhaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
āha_ah

yatataḥ_yat bhūyas_bhūyas bhūyas_bhūyas viṣaya--_viṣaya doṣa--_doṣa darśana--_darśana ātmakam_ātmaka yatnam_yatna kurvataḥ_kṛ api_api vipaścitaḥ_vipaścit atyanta--_atyanta vivekinaḥ_vivekin api_api puruṣasya_puruṣa manaḥ_manas kṣaṇa--_kṣaṇa mātram_mātra nirvikāram_nirvikāra kṛtam_kṛ api_api indriyāṇi_indriya haranti_hṛ vikāram_vikāra prāpayanti_prāpay

nanu_nanu virodhinī_virodhin viveke_viveka sati_as kutas_kutas vikāra--_vikāra prāptiḥ_prāpti tatra_tatra āha_ah pramāthīni_pramāthin pramathana--_pramathana śīlāni_śīla ati_ati balīyaḥ--_balīyas tvāt_tva viveka--_viveka upamardana--_upamardana kṣamāṇi_kṣama atas_atas prasabham_prasabham prasahya_prasah balātkāreṇa_balātkāra paśyati_dṛś eva_eva vipaściti_vipaścit svāmini_svāmin viveke_viveka ca_ca rakṣake_rakṣaka sati_as sarva--_sarva pramāthī--_pramāthī tvāt_tva eva_eva indriyāṇi_indriya viveka--_viveka ja--_ja prajñāyām_prajñā praviṣṭam_praviś manaḥ_manas tatas_tatas pracyāvya_pracyāvay sva--_sva viṣaya--_viṣaya āviṣṭa--_āviś hi_hi śabdaḥ_śabda prasiddhim_prasiddhi dyotayati_dyotay prasiddhaḥ_prasidh hi_hi ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha loke_loka yathā_yathā pramāthinaḥ_pramāthin dasyavaḥ_dasyu prasabham_prasabham eva_eva dhaninam_dhanin dhana--_dhana rakṣakam_rakṣaka ca_ca abhibhūya_abhibhū tayoḥ_tad paśyatoḥ_dṛś eva_eva dhanam_dhana haranti_hṛ tathā_tathā indriyāṇi_indriya api_api viṣaya--_viṣaya sannidhāne_saṃnidhāna manaḥ_manas haranti_hṛ iti_iti
āha_ah _

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha asyāḥ_idam jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhayāḥ_niṣṭhā daurlabhyam_daurlabhya āha_ah yatataḥ_yat hi_hi iti_iti vipaścitaḥ_vipaścit viṣaya--_viṣaya ātma--_ātman svarūpa--_svarūpa viveka--_viveka jñasya_jña tatas_tatas indriya--_indriya jaye_jaya prayatamānasya_prayat api_api puruṣasya_puruṣa indriyāṇi_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi kartṝṇi_kartṛ manaḥ_manas parasabham_parasabham balāt_bala iva_iva haranti_hṛ hṛtvā_hṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya pravaṇam_pravaṇa kurvanti_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nanu_nanu virodhini_virodhin viveka--_viveka jñāne_jñāna sthite_sthā katham_katham haranti_hṛ tatra_tatra āha_ah pramāthīni_pramāthin iti_iti ati_ati baliṣṭha--_baliṣṭha tvāt_tva tad--_tad jñāna--_jñāna upamardana--_upamardana kṣamāṇi_kṣama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tasmāt_tasmāt caurebhyaḥ_caura mahā--_mahat nidheḥ_nidhi iva_iva indriyebhyaḥ_indriya jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhāyāḥ_niṣṭhā saṃrakṣaṇam_saṃrakṣaṇa sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā āsanam_āsana iti_iti
BhG 2.61

lg.l: tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva saṃyamya_saṃyam yuktaḥ_yuj āsīta_ās mad--_mad paraḥ_para
vaśe_vaśa hi_hi yasya_yad indriyāṇi_indriya tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā

div.p: san_as āsīta_ās āsīta_ās san_as āsīta_ās

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam tarhi_tarhi tatra_tatra kaḥ_ka pratīkāraḥ_pratīkāra iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah tāni_tad iti_iti tāni_tad indriyāṇi_indriya sarvāṇi_sarva jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman sādhana--_sādhana bhūtāni_bhū saṃyamya_saṃyam vaśīkṛtya_vaśīkṛ yuktaḥ_yuj samāhitaḥ_samāhita nigṛhīta--_nigrah manāḥ_manas san_as āsīta_ās nirvāpa--_nirvāpa araḥ_ara tiṣṭhet_sthā pramāthinām_pramāthin katham_katham sva--_sva vaśīkaraṇam_vaśīkaraṇa iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah mad--_mad paraḥ_para iti_iti aham_mad sarvātmā_sarvātman vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva eva_eva paraḥ_para utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa upādeyaḥ_upādā yasya_yad sa_tad mad--_mad paraḥ_para ekānta--_ekānta mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca uktam_vac na_na vāsudeva--_vāsudeva bhaktānām_bhakta aśubham_aśubha vidyate_vid kvacid_kvacid iti_iti yathā_yathā hi_hi loke_loka balavantam_balavat rājānam_rājan āśritya_āśri dasyavaḥ_dasyu nigṛhyante_nigrah rāja--_rājan āśritaḥ_āśri ayam_idam iti_iti jñātvā_jñā ca_ca svayam_svayam eva_eva tad--_tad vaśyāḥ_vaśya bhavanti_bhū tathā_tathā eva_eva bhagavantam_bhagavant sarva--_sarva antaryāminam_antaryāmin āśritya_āśri tad--_tad prabhāveṇa_prabhāva eva_eva duṣṭāni_duṣ bhagavat--_bhagavant āśritaḥ_āśri ayam_idam iti_iti matvā_man tāni_tad tad--_tad vaśyāni_vaśya eva_eva bhavanti_bhū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva yathā_yathā ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant bhakteḥ_bhakti mahā--_mahat prabhāva--_prabhāva tvam_tva tathā_tathā vistareṇa_vistara agre_agra vyākhyāsyāmaḥ_vyākhyā indriya--_indriya vaśīkāre_vaśīkāra phalam_phala āha_ah vaśe_vaśa hi_hi iti_iti spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa tat_tad etat_etad vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ indriyaḥ_indriya san_as āsīta_ās iti_iti kim_kim āsīta_ās iti_iti praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara uktam_vac bhavati_bhū 61_61

prāyaśas_prāyaśas puṇḍarīkākṣa_puṇḍarīkākṣa yuñjantaḥ_yuj yoginaḥ_yogin manaḥ_manas viṣīdanti_viṣad asamādhānāt_asamādhāna manaḥ--_manas nigraha--_nigraha karśitāḥ_karśay
atha_atha atas_atas ānanda--_ānanda dugham_dugha pada--_pada ambujam_ambuja haṃsāḥ_haṃsa śrayeran_śri
div.l: vaśe_vaśa hi_hi iti_iti sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā indriyāṇi_indriya vaśībhūtāni_vaśībhū bhavanti_bhū iti_iti sādhakāt_sādhaka viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa uktaḥ_vac
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu nirjita--_nirji indriyāṇām_indriya api_api ātma--_ātman anubhavaḥ_anubhava na_na pratītaḥ_pratī tatra_tatra kaḥ_ka abhyupāyaḥ_abhyupāya iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah tāni_tad iti_iti tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva saṃyamya_saṃyam mad--_mad paraḥ_para mad--_mad niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā san_as yuktaḥ_yuj kṛta--_kṛ āma--_āma samādhiḥ_samādhi āsīta_ās tiṣṭheta_sthā mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti prabhāvena_prabhāva sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vijaya--_vijaya pūrvikā_pūrvaka svātma--_svātman dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi sulabhā_sulabha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva evam_evam smaranti_smṛ

yathā_yathā agniḥ_agni uddhata--_uddhan śikhaḥ_śikhā kakṣam_kakṣa dahati_dah sa_sa anilaḥ_anila
tathā_tathā citta--_citta sthitaḥ_sthā viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu yoginām_yogin sarva--_sarva kilbiṣam_kilbiṣa iti_iti ādi_ādi
vaśe_vaśa hi_hi iti_iti spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa ittham_ittham ca_ca vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ indriya--_indriya tayā_tā avasthitiḥ_avasthiti kim_kim āsīta_ās iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara uktam_vac

lg.l: dhyāyataḥ_dhyā viṣayān_viṣaya puṃsaḥ_puṃs saṅgaḥ_saṅga teṣu_tad upajāyate_upajan
saṅgāt_saṅga saṃjāyate_saṃjan kāmaḥ_kāma kāmāt_kāma krodhaḥ_krodha abhijāyate_abhijan
krodhāt_krodha bhavati_bhū saṃmohaḥ_sammoha saṃmohāt_sammoha smṛti--_smṛti vibhramaḥ_vibhrama
smṛti--_smṛti bhraṃśāt_bhraṃśa buddhi--_buddhi nāśaḥ_nāśa buddhi--_buddhi nāśāt_nāśa praṇaśyati_praṇaś

div.p: āha_ah guṇa--_guṇa buddhyā_buddhi viṣayān_viṣaya dhyāyataḥ_dhyā puṃsaḥ_puṃs teṣu_tad saṅgaḥ_saṅga āsaktiḥ_āsakti bhavati_bhū āsaktyā_āsakti ca_ca teṣu_tad adhikaḥ_adhika kāmaḥ_kāma bhavati_bhū kāmāt_kāma ca_ca kenacid_kaścit pratihatāt_pratihan krodhaḥ_krodha bhavati_bhū kim_ka ca_ca krodhāt_krodha iti_iti krodhāt_krodha saṃmohaḥ_sammoha kārya--_kārya akārya--_akārya viveka--_viveka abhāvaḥ_abhāva tatas_tatas śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadiṣṭa--_upadiś smṛteḥ_smṛti vibhramaḥ_vibhrama vicalanam_vicalana bhraṃśaḥ_bhraṃśa tatas_tatas buddheḥ_buddhi cetanāyāḥ_cetanā nāśaḥ_nāśa vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa ādiṣu_ādi iva_iva abhibhavaḥ_abhibhava tatas_tatas praṇaśyati_praṇaś mṛta--_mṛ tulyaḥ_tulya bhavati_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nigṛhīta--_nigrah bāhya--_bāhya indriyasya_indriya api_api śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi viṣayān_viṣaya dhyāyataḥ_dhyā manasā_manas punar_punar punar_punar cintayataḥ_cintay puṃsaḥ_puṃs teṣu_tad viṣayeṣu_viṣaya saṅgaḥ_saṅga āsaṅgaḥ_āsaṅga mama_mad atyantam_atyantam sukha--_sukha hetavaḥ_hetu ete_etad iti_iti evam_evam śobhana--_śobhana sukha--_sukha hetu--_hetu tva--_tva jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇāt_lakṣaṇa saṃjāyate_saṃjan kāmaḥ_kāma mama_mad ete_etad bhavantu_bhū iti_iti tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa tasmāt_tad kāmāt_kāma kutaścid_kutaścid pratihanyamānāt_pratihan tad--_tad pratighāta--_pratighāta viṣayaḥ_viṣaya krodhaḥ_krodha abhijvalana--_abhijvalana ātmā_ātman abhijāyate_abhijan krodhāt_krodha bhavati_bhū saṃmohaḥ_sammoha kārya--_kārya akārya--_akārya viveka--_viveka abhāva--_abhāva rūpaḥ_rūpa saṃmohāt_sammoha smṛti--_smṛti vibhramaḥ_vibhrama smṛteḥ_smṛti śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadiṣṭa--_upadiś artha--_artha anusandhānasya_anusaṃdhāna vibhramaḥ_vibhrama vicalanam_vicalana vibhraṃśaḥ_vibhraṃśa tasmāt_tad ca_ca smṛti--_smṛti bhraṃśāt_bhraṃśa buddheḥ_buddhi aikātmya--_aikātmya ākāra--_ākāra manaḥ--_manas vṛtteḥ_vṛtti nāśaḥ_nāśa viparīta--_viparīta bhāvanā--_bhāvanā upacaya--_upacaya doṣeṇa_doṣa pratibandhāt_pratibandha anutpattiḥ_anutpatti utpannāyāḥ_utpad ca_ca phala--_phala ayogya--_ayogya tvena_tva vilayaḥ_vilaya buddhi--_buddhi nāśāt_nāśa praṇaśyati_praṇaś tasyāḥ_tad ca_ca phala--_phala bhūtāyāḥ_bhū buddheḥ_buddhi vilopāt_vilopa praṇaśyati_praṇaś sarva--_sarva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha ayogyaḥ_ayogya bhavati_bhū yaḥ_yad hi_hi puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha ayogyaḥ_ayogya jātaḥ_jan sa_tad mṛtaḥ_mṛ eva_eva iti_iti loke_loka vyavahriyate_vyavahṛ atas_atas praṇaśyati_praṇaś iti_iti uktam_vac yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam manasaḥ_manas nigraha--_nigraha abhāve_abhāva nigṛhīta--_nigrah bāhya--_bāhya indriyasya_indriya api_api parama--_parama anartha--_anartha prāptiḥ_prāpti taramāt_tarama mahatā_mahat prayatnena_prayatna manaḥ_manas nigṛhṇīyāt_nigrah iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya atas_atas yuktam_yuj uktam_vac tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva saṃyamya_saṃyam yuktaḥ_yuj āsīta_ās iti_iti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā manaḥ--_manas vaśīkāraḥ_vaśīkāra eva_eva bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya vaśīkāra--_vaśīkāra kāraṇam_kāraṇa sarvathā_sarvathā manaḥ--_manas vaśīkāra--_vaśīkāra abhāve_abhāva tu_tu yat_yad syāt_as tat_tad śṛṇu_śru iti_iti āha_ah dhyāyataḥ_dhyā iti_iti saṅgaḥ_saṅga āsaktiḥ_āsakti āsaktyā_āsakti ca_ca teṣu_tad adhikaḥ_adhika kāmaḥ_kāma abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa kāmāt_kāma ca_ca kenacid_kaścit pratihatāt_pratihan krodhaḥ_krodha krodhāt_krodha saṃmohaḥ_sammoha kārya--_kārya akārya--_akārya viveka--_viveka abhāvaḥ_abhāva tasmāt_tad ca_ca śāstra--_śāstra upadiṣṭa--_upadiś sva--_sva arthasya_artha smṛti--_smṛti nāśaḥ_nāśa tasmāt_tasmāt ca_ca buddheḥ_buddhi sat--_as vyavasāyasya_vyavasāya nāśaḥ_nāśa tatas_tatas praṇaśyati_praṇaś saṃsāra--_saṃsāra kūpe_kūpa patati_pat

baladevaḥ_baladeva vijita--_viji indriyasya_indriya api_api mayi_mad aniveśita--_aniveśita manasaḥ_manas punar_punar anarthaḥ_anartha durvāraḥ_durvāra iti_iti āha_ah dhyāyataḥ_dhyā iti_iti dvyābhyām_dvi viṣayān_viṣaya śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi sukha--_sukha hetu--_hetu tva--_tva buddhyā_buddhi dhyāyataḥ_dhyā punar_punar punar_punar cintayataḥ_cintay yoginaḥ_yogin teṣu_tad saṅgaḥ_saṅga āsaktiḥ_āsakti bhavati_bhū saṅgāt_saṅga hetoḥ_hetu teṣu_tad kāma--_kāma tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā jāyate_jan kāmāt_kāma ca_ca kenacid_kaścit pratihatāt_pratihan krodhaḥ_krodha citta--_citta jvālaḥ_jvālā tad--_tad pratighātakaḥ_pratighātaka bhavati_bhū krodhāt_krodha saṃmohaḥ_sammoha kārya--_kārya akārya--_akārya viveka--_viveka vijñāna--_vijñāna vilopaḥ_vilopa saṃmohāt_sammoha smṛteḥ_smṛti indriya--_indriya vijaya--_vijaya ādi--_ādi prayatna--_prayatna anusandheḥ_anusaṃdhi vibhramaḥ_vibhrama vibhraṃśaḥ_vibhraṃśa smṛti--_smṛti bhraṃśāt_bhraṃśa buddheḥ_buddhi ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna arthakasya_arthaka adhyavasāyasya_adhyavasāya nāśaḥ_nāśa buddhi--_buddhi nāśāt_nāśa praṇaśyati_praṇaś punar_punar viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga nimagnaḥ_nimajj bhavati_bhū saṃsarati_saṃsṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha madana--_madana āśrayaṇāt_āśrayaṇa durbalam_durbala manaḥ_manas tāni_tad sva--_sva viṣayaiḥ_viṣaya yojayanti_yojay iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tathā_tathā ca_ca manaḥ--_manas vijigīṣuṇā_vijigīṣu mad--_mad upāsanam_upāsana vidheyam_vidhā
BhG 2.64

lg.l: rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa viyuktaiḥ_viyuj tu_tu viṣayān_viṣaya indriyaiḥ_indriya caran_car
ātma--_ātman vaśyaiḥ_vaśya vidheya--_vidhā ātmā_ātman prasādam_prasāda adhigacchati_adhigam

div.p: syāt_as āha_ah rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa rahitaiḥ_rahita vigata--_vigam darpaiḥ_darpa indriyaiḥ_indriya viṣayān_viṣaya caran_car upabhuñjānaḥ_upabhuj api_api prasādam_prasāda śāntim_śānti prāpnoti_prāp rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa rāhityam_rāhitya eva_eva āha_ah ātmā_ātman iti_iti ātmanaḥ_ātman manasaḥ_manas vaśyaiḥ_vaśya indriyaiḥ_indriya vidheyaḥ_vidhā vaśa--_vaśa vartī_vartin ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas yasya_yad iti_iti anena_idam eva_eva katham_katham vrajeta_vraj iti_iti asya_idam caturtha--_caturtha praśnasya_praśna svādhīnaiḥ_svādhīna indriyaiḥ_indriya viṣayān_viṣaya gacchati_gam iti_iti uttaram_uttara uktam_vac bhavati_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana manasi_manas nigṛhīte_nigrah tu_tu bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya nigraha--_nigraha abhāve_abhāva api_api na_na doṣaḥ_doṣa iti_iti vadan_vad kim_kim vrajeta_vraj iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara āha_ah aṣṭabhiḥ_aṣṭan yaḥ_yad asamāhita--_asamāhita cetāḥ_cetas sa_tad bāhya--_bāhya indriyāṇi_indriya nigṛhya_nigrah api_api rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa duṣṭena_duṣ manasā_manas viṣayān_viṣaya cintayan_cintay puruṣa--_puruṣa arthāt_artha bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś bhavati_bhū vidheya--_vidhā ātmā_ātman tu_tu tu_tu śabdhaḥ_śabdha pūrvasmāt_pūrva vyatireka--_vyatireka arthaḥ_artha vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ antar_antar karaṇaḥ_karaṇa tu_tu ātma--_ātman vaśyaiḥ_vaśya manaḥ_manas adhīnaiḥ_adhīna svādhīnaiḥ_svādhīna iti_iti vā_vā rāga--_rāga dveṣābhyām_dveṣa viyuktaiḥ_viyuj virahitaiḥ_virahita indriyaiḥ_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādibhiḥ_ādi viṣayān_viṣaya śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi a_a niṣiddhān_niṣidh caran_car upalabhamānaḥ_upalabh paramātma--_paramātman sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra yogyatām_yogyatā adhigacchati_adhigam rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa prayuktāni_prayuj indriyāṇi_indriya doṣa--_doṣa hetutām_hetutā pratipadyante_pratipad manasi_manas sva--_sva vaśe_vaśa tu_tu na_na rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa tayoḥ_tad abhāve_abhāva ca_ca na_na tad--_tad adhīna--_adhīna indriya--_indriya pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti avarjanīya--_avarjanīya tayā_tā tu_tu viṣaya--_viṣaya upalambhaḥ_upalambha na_na doṣam_doṣa āvahati_āvah iti_iti na_na śuddhi--_śuddhi vyāghātaḥ_vyāghāta iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

etena_etad viṣayāṇām_viṣaya smaraṇam_smaraṇa api_api ced_ced anartha--_anartha kāraṇam_kāraṇa sutarām_sutarām tarhi_tarhi bhogaḥ_bhoga tena_tad jīvana--_jīvana artham_artha viṣayān_viṣaya bhuñjānaḥ_bhuj katham_katham anartham_anartha na_na pratipadyeta_pratipad iti_iti śaṅkā_śaṅkā nirastā_niras svādhīnaiḥ_svādhīna indriyaiḥ_indriya viṣayān_viṣaya prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti ca_ca kim_ka vrajeta_vraj iti_iti praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara uktam_vac bhavati_bhū

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha mānasa--_mānasa viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇa--_grahaṇa abhāve_abhāva sati_as sva--_sva vaśyaiḥ_vaśya indriyaiḥ_indriya viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇe_grahaṇa api_api na_na doṣaḥ_doṣa iti_iti vadan_vad sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā vrajeta_vraj kim_ka iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara āha_ah rāga--_rāga iti_iti vidheyaḥ_vidhā vacane_vacana
vidheyaḥ_vidhā vinaya--_vinaya grāhī_grāhin vacane_vacana sthitaḥ_sthā āśravaḥ_āśrava vaśyaḥ_vaśya praṇayaḥ_praṇaya nibhṛta--_nibhṛta vinīta--_vinī praśritāḥ_praśrita iti_iti amaraḥ_amara

prasādam_prasāda adhigacchati_adhigam iti_iti etādṛśasya_etādṛśa adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇam_grahaṇa api_api na_na doṣaḥ_doṣa iti_iti kim_ka vaktavyam_vac pratyuta_pratyuta guṇaḥ_guṇa eva_eva iti_iti sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā viṣaya--_viṣaya tyāga--_tyāga svīkārau_svīkāra eva_eva āsana--_āsana vrajane_vrajana te_tad ubhe_ubh api_api

bruvan_brū āha_ah vijita--_viji bahis_bahis indriyaḥ_indriya api_api mad--_mad anarpita--_anarpita manāḥ_manas paramārthāt_paramārtha vicyutaḥ_vicyu iti_iti uktam_vac yaḥ_yad vidheya--_vidhā ātmā_ātman svādhīna--_svādhīna manāḥ_manas mad--_mad arpita--_arpay manāḥ_manas tatas_tatas eva_eva nidagdha--_nidah rāga--_rāga ādi--_ādi manaḥ--_manas malaḥ_mala sa_tad tu_tu ātma--_ātman vaśyaiḥ_vaśya manaḥ_manas adhīnaiḥ_adhīna atas_atas eva_eva rāga--_rāga dveṣābhyām_dveṣa viyuktaiḥ_viyuj indriyaiḥ_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādyaiḥ_ādya prasādam_prasāda viṣaya--_viṣaya āsakti--_āsakti ādi--_ādi mala--_mala anāgamāt_anāgama vimala--_vimala manaḥ_manas tam_tad adhigacchati_adhigam iti_iti prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 2.65

lg.l: prasāde_prasāda sarva--_sarva duḥkhānām_duḥkha hāniḥ_hāni asya_idam upajāyate_upajan
prasanna--_prasad cetasaḥ_cetas hi_hi āśu_āśu buddhiḥ_buddhi paryavatiṣṭhate_paryavasthā

div.p: syāt_as āha_ah bhavati_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana prasādam_prasāda adhigacchati_adhigam iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra prasāde_prasāda sati_as kim_ka syāt_as iti_iti ucyate_vac prasādaḥ_prasāda iti_iti cittasya_citta prasāde_prasāda svaccha--_svaccha tva--_tva rūpe_rūpa sati_as sarva--_sarva duḥkhānām_duḥkha ādhyātmika--_ādhyātmika ādīnām_ādi ajñāna--_ajñāna vilasitānām_vilas hāniḥ_hāni vināśaḥ_vināśa asya_idam yateḥ_yati upajāyate_upajan hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt prasanna--_prasad cetasaḥ_cetas yateḥ_yati āśu_āśu śīghram_śīghram eva_eva buddhiḥ_buddhi brahma--_brahman ātma--_ātman aikya--_aikya ākārā_ākāra paryavatiṣṭhate_paryavasthā pari_pari samantāt_samantāt avatiṣṭhate_avasthā sthirā_sthira bhavati_bhū viparīta--_viparīta bhāvanā--_bhāvanā ādi--_ādi pratibandha--_pratibandha abhāvāt_abhāva tatas_tatas ca_ca prasāde_prasāda sati_as buddhi--_buddhi paryavasthānam_paryavasthāna tatas_tatas tad--_tad virodhi--_virodhin ajñāna--_ajñāna nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha buddhiḥ_buddhi paryavatiṣṭhate_paryavasthā sarvatas_sarvatas bhāvena_bhāva sva--_sva abhīṣṭam_abhīṣ prati_prati sthirībhavati_sthirībhū iti_iti viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇa--_grahaṇa abhāvāt_abhāva api_api samucita--_samucita viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇam_grahaṇa tasya_tad sukham_sukha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva prasanna--_prasad cetasaḥ_cetas iti_iti citta--_citta prasādaḥ_prasāda bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva iti_iti jñeyam_jñā tayā_tad vinā_vinā tu_tu na_na citta--_citta prasādaḥ_prasāda iti_iti prathama--_prathama skandhe_skandha eva_eva prapañcitam_prapañcita kṛta--_kṛ vedānta--_vedānta śāstrasya_śāstra api_api vyāsasya_vyāsa aprasanna--_aprasanna cittasya_citta śrī--_śrī nārada--_nārada upadiṣṭayā_upadiś bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva citta--_citta prasāda--_prasāda dṛṣṭeḥ_dṛṣṭi

baladevaḥ_baladeva prasāde_prasāda sati_as kim_ka syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah asya_idam yoginaḥ_yogin manaḥ--_manas prasāde_prasāda sati_as sarveṣām_sarva prakṛti--_prakṛti saṃsarga--_saṃsarga kṛtānām_kṛ duḥkhānām_duḥkha hāniḥ_hāni upajāyate_upajan prasanna--_prasad cetasaḥ_cetas sva--_sva ātma--_ātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya viṣayā_viṣaya buddhiḥ_buddhi paryavatiṣṭhate_paryavasthā sthirā_sthira bhavati_bhū
BhG 2.66

lg.l: na_na asti_as buddhiḥ_buddhi ayuktasya_ayukta na_na ca_ca ayuktasya_ayukta bhāvanā_bhāvanā
na_na ca_ca abhāvayataḥ_abhāvayat śāntiḥ_śānti aśāntasya_aśānta kutas_kutas sukham_sukha

div.p: upapādayati_upapāday asti_as ayuktasya_ayukta avaśīkṛta--_avaśīkṛ indriyasya_indriya asti_as buddhiḥ_buddhi śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadeśābhyām_upadeśa ātma--_ātman viṣayā_viṣaya buddhiḥ_buddhi prajñā_prajñā eva_eva na_na utpadyate_utpad tasyāḥ_tad pratiṣṭhā--_pratiṣṭhā vārtā_vārttā kutas_kutas iti_iti atra_atra āha_ah na_na ca_ca iti_iti na_na ca_ca ayuktasya_ayukta bhāvanā_bhāvanā dhyānam_dhyāna bhāvanayā_bhāvanā hi_hi buddheḥ_buddhi ātmani_ātman pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā bhavati_bhū sā_tad ca_ca ayuktasya_ayukta yatas_yatas na_na asti_as abhāvayataḥ_abhāvayat ātma--_ātman dhyānam_dhyāna akurvataḥ_akurvat śāntiḥ_śānti ātmani_ātman citta--_citta uparamaḥ_uparama aśāntasya_aśānta kutas_kutas sukham_sukha mokṣa--_mokṣa ānandaḥ_ānanda iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana imam_idam eva_eva artham_artha vyatireka--_vyatireka mukhena_mukha draḍhayati_draḍhay na_na asti_as iti_iti ayuktasya_ayukta ajita--_ajita cittasya_citta buddhiḥ_buddhi ātma--_ātman viṣayā_viṣaya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana ākhya--_ākhya vedānta--_vedānta vicāra--_vicāra janyā_jan na_na asti_as na_na utpadyate_utpad tad--_tad buddhi--_buddhi abhāve_abhāva na_na ca_ca ayuktasya_ayukta bhāvanā_bhāvanā nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana ātmikā_ātmaka vijātīya--_vijātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya anantarita--_anantarita sajātīya--_sajātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya pravāha--_pravāha rūpā_rūpa sarvatra_sarvatra nañaḥ_nañ asti_as iti_iti anena_idam anvayaḥ_anvaya na_na ca_ca a_a bhāvayataḥ_bhāvay ātmānam_ātman śāntiḥ_śānti sa_sa kārya--_kārya avidyā--_avidyā nivṛtti--_nivṛtti rūpā_rūpa vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya janyā_jan brahma--_brahman ātma--_ātman aikya--_aikya sākṣāt_sākṣāt kṛtiḥ_kṛti aśāntasya_aśānta ātma--_ātman sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra śūnyasya_śūnya kutas_kutas sukham_sukha mokṣa--_mokṣa ānandaḥ_ānanda iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

draḍhayati_draḍhay asti_as ayuktasya_ayukta avaśīkṛta--_avaśīkṛta manasaḥ_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi ātma--_ātman viṣayiṇī_viṣayin prajñā_prajñā na_na asti_as ayuktasya_ayukta tādṛśa--_tādṛśa prajñā--_prajñā rahitasya_rahita bhāvanā_bhāvanā parameśvara--_parameśvara dhyānam_dhyāna ca_ca a_a bhāvayataḥ_bhāvay a_a kṛta--_kṛ dhyānasya_dhyāna śāntiḥ_śānti viṣaya--_viṣaya uparamaḥ_uparama na_na asti_as aśāntasya_aśānta sukham_sukha ātma--_ātman ānandaḥ_ānanda

baladevaḥ_baladeva pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac artham_artha vyatireka--_vyatireka mukhena_mukha āha_ah ayuktasya_ayukta ayoginaḥ_ayogin mad--_mad aniveśita--_aniveśita manasaḥ_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi ukta--_vac lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa na_na asti_as na_na bhavati_bhū ataeva_ataeva tasya_tad bhāvanā_bhāvanā tādṛś--_tādṛś ātma--_ātman cintā_cintā api_api nā_na asti_as tādṛśam_tādṛśa ātmānam_ātman abhāvayataḥ_abhāvayat śāntiḥ_śānti viṣaya--_viṣaya tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti na_na asti_as aśāntasya_aśānta tad--_tad tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā ākulasya_ākula sukham_sukha sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa ānanda--_ānanda ātma--_ātman anubhava--_anubhava lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa kutas_kutas syāt_as
BhG 2.67

lg.l: indriyāṇām_indriya hi_hi caratām_car yat_yat manaḥ_manas anuvidhīyate_anuvidhā
tat_tad asya_idam harati_hṛ prajñām_prajñā vāyuḥ_vāyu nāvam_nau iva_iva ambhasi_ambhas

div.p: asti_as āha_ah indriyāṇām_indriya a_a vaśīkṛtānām_vaśīkṛ svairam_svaira viṣayeṣu_viṣaya caratām_car madhye_madhya yadā_yadā eva_eva ekam_eka indriyam_indriya manaḥ_manas anuvidhīyate_anuvidhā vaśīkṛtam_vaśīkṛ sat_as indriyeṇa_indriya saha_saha gacchati_gam tadā_tadā eva_eva ekam_eka indriyasya_indriya manasaḥ_manas puruṣasya_puruṣa vā_vā prajñām_prajñā buddhim_buddhi harati_hṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya vikṣiptām_vikṣip karoti_kṛ kim_ka uta_uta vaktavyam_vac bahūni_bahu prajñām_prajñā haranti_hṛ iti_iti yathā_yathā pramattasya_pramad karṇadhārasya_karṇadhāra nāvam_nau vāyuḥ_vāyu sarvatas_sarvatas paribhramayati_paribhramay tadvat_tadvat iti_iti 67_67

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ayuktasya_ayukta kutas_kutas na_na asti_as buddhiḥ_buddhi iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah indriyāṇām_indriya iti_iti caratām_car sva--_sva viṣayeṣu_viṣaya sva--_sva sva--_sva viṣayeṣu_viṣaya pravartamānānām_pravṛt avaśīkṛtānām_avaśīkṛ indriyāṇām_indriya madhye_madhya yat_yad ekam_eka api_api indriyam_indriya anulakṣyīkṛtya_anulakṣyīkṛ manaḥ_manas vidhīyate_vidhā preryate_preray pravartate_pravṛt iti_iti yāvat_yāvat karma--_karman kartari_kartṛ la--_la kāraḥ_kāra tat_tad indriyam_indriya ekam_eka api_api manasā_manas anusṛtam_anusṛ asya_idam sādhakasya_sādhaka manasaḥ_manas vā_vā prajñām_prajñā ātma--_ātman viṣayām_viṣaya śāstrīyām_śāstrīya harati_hṛ apanayati_apanī manasaḥ_manas tad--_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya āviṣṭa--_āviś tvāt_tva yadā_yadā ekam_eka api_api indriyam_indriya prajñām_prajñā harati_hṛ tadā_tadā sarvāṇi_sarva haranti_hṛ iti_iti kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta tu_tu spaṣṭaḥ_spaṣṭa abhyasya_abhyas iti_iti vāyoḥ_vāyu naukā--_naukā haraṇa--_haraṇa sāmarthyam_sāmarthya na_na bhuvi_bhū iti_iti sūcayitum_sūcay ambhasi_ambhas iti_iti uktam_vac evam_evam dārṣṭāntike_dārṣṭāntika api_api ambhaḥ--_ambhas sthānīye_sthānīya manaḥ_manas cāñcalye_cāñcalya sati_as eva_eva prajñā--_prajñā haraṇa--_haraṇa sāmarthyam_sāmarthya indriyasya_indriya na_na tu_tu bhū--_bhū sthānīye_sthānīya manaḥ--_manas sthairye_sthairya iti_iti sūcitam_sūcay 67_67

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ayuktasya_ayukta buddhiḥ_buddhi na_na asti_as iti_iti upapādayati_upapāday indriyāṇām_indriya sva--_sva sva--_sva viṣayeṣu_viṣaya caratām_car madhye_madhya yat_yad mama_mad ekam_eka indriyam_indriya anuvidhīyate_anuvidhā puṃsām_puṃs sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya anuvartiḥ_anuvarti kriyate_kṛ tat_tad eva_eva manaḥ_manas asya_idam prajñām_prajñā buddhim_buddhi harati_hṛ yathā_yathā ambhasi_ambhas nīyamānām_nī nāvam_nau pratikūlaḥ_pratikūla vāyuḥ_vāyu 67_67

baladevaḥ_baladeva mad--_mad niveśita--_niveśay manaska--_manaska tayā_tā indriya--_indriya niyamana--_niyamana abhāve_abhāva doṣam_doṣa āha_ah indriyāṇām_indriya iti_iti viṣayeṣu_viṣaya caratām_car avijitānām_avijita indriyāṇām_indriya madhye_madhya yat_yad ekam_eka śrotram_śrotra vā_vā cakṣuḥ_cakṣus vā_vā anulakṣyīkṛtya_anulakṣyīkṛ manaḥ_manas vidhīyate_vidhā pravartate_pravṛt tat_tad ekam_eka eva_eva indriyam_indriya manasā_manas anugatam_anugam asya_idam pravartakasya_pravartaka prajñām_prajñā vivikta--_vivic manasasaḥ_manasas tad--_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya ākṛṣṭa--_ākṛṣ tvāt_tva kim_ka punar_punar sarvāṇi_sarva tāni_tad iti_iti pratikūlaḥ_pratikūla vāyuḥ_vāyu yathā_yathā ambhasi_ambhas nīyamānām_nī nāvam_nau tadvat_tadvat 67_67
BhG 2.68

lg.l: tasmāt_tasmāt yasya_yad mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu nigṛhītāni_nigrah sarvaśas_sarvaśas
indriyāṇi_indriya indriya--_indriya arthebhyaḥ_artha tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ sādhana--_sādhana tva--_tva upasaṃhāre_upasaṃhāra tasya_tad prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā jñātavyā_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu iti_iti sambodhayan_sambodhay vairi--_vairin nigrahe_nigraha samarthasya_samartha tava_tvad atra_atra api_api sāmarthyam_sāmarthya bhavet_bhū iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay 68_68

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarvāṇi_sarva samanaskāni_samanaska he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu iti_iti sambodhayan_sambodhay sarva--_sarva śatru--_śatru nivāraṇa--_nivāraṇa kṣama--_kṣama tvāt_tva indriya--_indriya śatru--_śatru nivāraṇe_nivāraṇa api_api tvam_tvad kṣamaḥ_kṣama asi_as iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa anyat_anya tasya_tad iti_iti siddhasya_sidh sādhakasya_sādhaka ca_ca parāmarśaḥ_parāmarśa indriya--_indriya saṃyamasya_saṃyama sthita--_sthā prajñam_prajñā prati_prati lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa tvasya_tva mumukṣum_mumukṣu prati_prati prajñā--_prajñā sādhana--_sādhana tvasya_tva ca_ca upasaṃharaṇīya--_upasaṃhṛ tvāt_tva 68_68

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yasya_yad nigṛhīta--_nigrah manasaḥ_manas he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu iti_iti yathā_yathā śatrūn_śatru nigṛhṇāsi_nigrah tathā_tathā manaḥ_manas api_api nigṛhāṇa_nigrah iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti yasya_yad mad--_mad niṣṭha--_niṣṭha manasaḥ_manas pratiṣṭhita--_pratiṣṭhā ātma--_ātman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā bhavati_bhū he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu iti_iti yathā_yathā ripūn_ripu nigṛhṇāsi_nigrah tathā_tathā indriyāṇi_indriya nigṛhāṇa_nigrah iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ebhiḥ_idam ślokaiḥ_śloka bhagavat--_bhagavant niviṣṭatayā_niviṣṭatā indriya--_indriya vijayaḥ_vijaya sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā siddhasya_siddha svābhāvikaḥ_svābhāvika sādhakasya_sādhaka tu_tu sādhana--_sādhana bhūtaḥ_bhū iti_iti bodhyam_budh 68_68
BhG 2.69

lg.l: yā_yad niśā_niśā sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta tasyām_tad jāgarti_jāgṛ saṃyamī_saṃyamin
yasyām_yad jāgrati_jāgṛ bhūtāni_bhūta sā_tad niśā_niśā paśyataḥ_dṛś muneḥ_muni

div.p: dṛśyate_dṛś atas_atas idam_idam lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah yā_yad niśā_niśā iti_iti sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta yā_yad niśā_niśā niśā_niśā niśā_niśā ātma--_ātman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā ajñāna--_ajñāna dhvānta--_dhvānta āvṛta--_āvṛ matīnām_mati tasyām_tad darśana--_darśana ādi--_ādi vyāpāra--_vyāpāra abhāvāt_abhāva tasyām_tad ātma--_ātman niṣṭhāyām_niṣṭhā saṃyamī_saṃyamin nigṛhīta--_nigrah indriyaḥ_indriya jāgrati_jāgṛ prabudhyante_prabudh sa_sa ātma--_ātman tattvam_tattva paśyataḥ_dṛś muneḥ_muni niśā_niśā tasyām_tad darśana--_darśana ādi--_ādi vyāpāraḥ_vyāpāra tasya_tad na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etat_etad uktam_vac bhavati_bhū yathā_yathā divā_divā andhānām_andha uluka--_uluka ādīnām_ādi rātrau_rātri eva_eva darśanam_darśana na_na tu_tu divase_divasa evam_evam brahma--_brahman jñasya_jña unmīlita--_unmīl akṣasya_akṣa api_api brahmaṇi_brahman eva_eva dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi na_na tu_tu viṣayeṣu_viṣaya atas_atas na_na asambhāvitam_asaṃbhāvita idam_idam lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa iti_iti 69_69

indriya--_indriya indriya--_indriya āha_ah yā_yad vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya janita--_janay sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra rūpā_rūpa aham_mad brahma_brahman asmi_as iti_iti prajñā_prajñā sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta ajñānām_ajña niśā_niśā iva_iva niśā_niśā tān_tad prati_prati aprakāśa--_aprakāśa rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva tasyām_tad brahma--_brahman vidyā--_vidyā lakṣaṇāyām_lakṣaṇa sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta niśāyām_niśā jāgarti_jāgṛ ajñāna--_ajñāna nidrāyāḥ_nidrā prabuddhaḥ_prabudh san_as sa_sa avadhānaḥ_avadhāna vartate_vṛt saṃyami--_saṃyamin indriya--_indriya saṃyamavān_saṃyamavat sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yasyām_yad tu_tu dvaita--_dvaita darśana--_darśana lakṣaṇāyām_lakṣaṇa avidyā--_avidyā nidrāyām_nidrā prasuptāni_prasvap eva_eva bhūtāni_bhūta jāgrati_jāgṛ svapna--_svapna vat_vat vyavaharanti_vyavahṛ sā_tad niśā_niśā na_na prakāśate_prakāś ātma--_ātman tattvam_tattva paśyataḥ_dṛś aparokṣa--_aparokṣa tayā_tā muneḥ_muni sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā yāvat_yāvat hi_hi na_na prabudhyate_prabudh tāvat_tāvat eva_eva svapna--_svapna darśanam_darśana bodhya--_bodhya paryanta--_paryanta tvāt_tva bhramasya_bhrama tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna kāle_kāla tu_tu na_na bhrama--_bhrama nimittaḥ_nimitta kaścid_kaścit vyavahāraḥ_vyavahāra tat_tad uktam_vac vārtika--_vārttika kāraiḥ_kāra

lg.l: kāraka--_kāraka vyavahāre_vyavahāra hi_hi śuddham_śudh vastu_vastu na_na vīkṣyante_vīkṣ
śuddhe_śudh vastuni_vastu siddhe_sidh ca_ca kāraka--_kāraka vyāpṛtiḥ_vyāpṛti tathā_tathā

div.p: kāka--_kāka ulūka--_ulūka niśā_niśā iva_iva ayam_idam saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra ajña--_ajña ātma--_ātman vedinoḥ_vedin yā_yad niśā_niśā sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta iti_iti avocat_vac svayam_svayam hariḥ_hari

tathā_tathā ca_ca yasya_yad viparīta--_viparīta darśanam_darśana tasya_tad na_na vastu--_vastu darśanam_darśana viparīta--_viparīta darśanasya_darśana vastu--_vastu adarśana--_adarśana janya--_jan tvāt_tva yasya_yad ca_ca vastu--_vastu darśanam_darśana tasya_tad na_na viparīta--_viparīta darśanam_darśana viparīta--_viparīta darśana--_darśana kāraṇasya_kāraṇa vastu--_vastu adarśanasya_adarśana vastu--_vastu darśanena_darśana bādhita--_bādh tvāt_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti yatra_yatra vai_vai anyat_anya iva_iva syāt_as tatra_tatra anyaḥ_anya anyat_anya paśyet_paś yatra_yatra svasya_sva sarvam_sarva ātmā_ātman eva_eva abhūt_bhū tat_tad kena_ka kam_ka paśyet_paś iti_iti vidyā--_vidyā avidyayoḥ_avidyā vyavasthām_vyavasthā āha_ah yathā_yathā kākasya_kāka rātri--_rātri andhasya_andha dinam_dina ulūkasya_ulūka divā_divā andhasya_andha niśā_niśā rātrau_rātri paśyataḥ_paś ca_ca ulūkasya_ulūka yat_yad dinam_dina rātriḥ_rātri eva_eva sā_tad kākasya_kāka iti_iti mahat_mahat āścaryam_āścarya etat_etad atas_atas tattva--_tattva darśibhiḥ_darśin katham_katham āvidyaka--_āvidyaka kriyā--_kriyā kāraka--_kāraka ādi--_ādi vyavahāraḥ_vyavahāra syāt_as iti_iti svatas_svatas siddhaḥ_sidh eva_eva tasya_tad indriya--_indriya saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 69_69

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā tu_tu svatas_svatas siddhaḥ_sidh eva_eva sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya nigrahaḥ_nigraha iti_iti āha_ah yā_yad iti_iti buddhiḥ_buddhi hi_hi dvividhā_dvividha bhavati_bhū ātma--_ātman pravaṇā_pravaṇa viṣaya--_viṣaya pravaṇā_pravaṇa ca_ca tatra_tatra yā_yad ātma--_ātman pravaṇā_pravaṇa buddhiḥ_buddhi sā_tad sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta niśā_niśā niśāyām_niśā kim_ka kim_ka syāt_as iti_iti tasyām_tad svapantaḥ_svap janāḥ_jana yathā_yathā na_na jānanti_jñā tathā_tathā eva_eva ātma--_ātman pravaṇa--_pravaṇa buddhau_buddhi prāpyamāṇam_prāp vastu_vastu sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta na_na jānanti_jñā kintu_kiṃtu tasyām_tad saṃyamī_saṃyamin sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā jāgarti_jāgṛ na_na tu_tu svapiti_svap atas_atas ātma--_ātman buddhi--_buddhi niṣṭham_niṣṭhā ānandam_ānanda sākṣāt_sākṣāt anubhavati_anubhū yasyām_yad viṣaya--_viṣaya pravaṇāyām_pravaṇa buddhau_buddhi bhūtāni_bhūta jāgrati_jāgṛ tad--_tad niṣṭham_niṣṭhā viṣaya--_viṣaya sukha--_sukha śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādikam_ādika sākṣāt_sākṣāt anubhavanti_anubhū na_na tu_tu tatra_tatra svapanti_svap sā_tad muneḥ_muni sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā niśā_niśā tad--_tad niṣṭham_niṣṭhā kim_ka api_api na_na anubhavati_anubhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kintu_kiṃtu paśyataḥ_dṛś sāṃsārikānām_sāṃsārika sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha pradān_prada viṣayān_viṣaya tatra_tatra audāsīnyena_audāsīnya avalokayataḥ_avalokay sva--_sva bhogyān_bhuj viṣayān_viṣaya api_api yathocitam_yathocita nirlepam_nirlepa ādadānasya_ādā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 69_69

siddha--_siddha avasthasya_avasthā tu_tu tasya_tad tad--_tad niyamaḥ_niyama svābhāvikaḥ_svābhāvika iti_iti āha_ah yā_yad niśā_niśā iti_iti vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā viṣaya--_viṣaya niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā ca_ca iti_iti buddhiḥ_buddhi dvividhā_dvividha yā_yad ātma--_ātman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā buddhiḥ_buddhi sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta niśā--_niśā rūpakeṇa_rūpaka upamā_upamā atra_atra vyajyate_vyañj rātri--_rātri tulyā_tulya tadvat_tadvat a_a prakāśikā_prakāśaka rātrau_rātri iva_iva ātma--_ātman niṣṭhāyām_niṣṭhā buddhau_buddhi svapantaḥ_svap janāḥ_jana tad--_tad labhyam_labh ātmānam_ātman sarve_sarva na_na anubhavanti_anubhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha saṃyamī_saṃyamin jita--_ji indriyaḥ_indriya tu_tu tasyām_tad jāgarti_jāgṛ na_na tu_tu svapiti_svap tayā_tad labhyam_labh ātmānam_ātman anubhavati_anubhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yasyām_yad viṣya--_viṣya niṣṭhāyām_niṣṭhā buddhau_buddhi jāgrati_jāgṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya bhogān_bhoga anubhavanti_anubhū na_na tu_tu tatra_tatra svapanti_svap sā_tad muneḥ_muni sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā niśā_niśā tasya_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga a_a prakāśakā_prakāśaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kīdṛśasya_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah paśyataḥ_dṛś iti_iti ātmānam_ātman sākṣāt_sākṣāt anubhavataḥ_anubhū prārabdha--_prārabh ākṛṣṭān_ākṛṣ viṣayān_viṣaya api_api audāsīnyena_audāsīnya bhuñjānasya_bhuj ca_ca iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nartakī--_nartakī mūrdha--_mūrdhan ghaṭa--_ghaṭa avadhāna--_avadhāna nyāyena_nyāya ātma--_ātman dṛṣṭeḥ_dṛṣṭi na_na tad--_tad anya--_anya rasa--_rasa grahaḥ_graha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 2.70

lg.l: āpūryamāṇam_āp￞ acala--_acala pratiṣṭham_pratiṣṭhā
samudram_samudra āpaḥ_ap praviśanti_praviś
tadvat_tadvat kāmāḥ_kāma yam_yad praviśanti_praviś sarve_sarva
sa_tad śāntim_śānti āpnoti_āp kāma--_kāma kāmī_kāmin

div.p: bhuṅkte_bhuj āha_ah nānā_nānā nada--_nada nadīnbhiḥ_nadī āpūryamāṇam_āp￞ api_api acala--_acala pratiṣṭham_pratiṣṭhā an_an atikrānta--_atikram maryādam_maryādā eva_eva samudram_samudra punar_punar api_api anyāḥ_anya āpaḥ_ap yathā_yathā praviśanti_praviś tathā_tathā kāmāḥ_kāma viṣayāḥ_viṣaya yam_yad munim_muni antar_antar dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi bhogaiḥ_bhoga a_a vikriyamāṇam_vikṛ santaḥ_as praviśanti_praviś sa_tad śāntim_śānti kaivalyam_kaivalya prāpnoti_prāp na_na tu_tu kāma--_kāma kāmī_kāmin bhoga--_bhoga kāmanā--_kāmanā śīlaḥ_śīla

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etādṛśasya_etādṛśa sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā sarva--_sarva vikṣepa--_vikṣepa śāntiḥ_śānti api_api artha--_artha siddhā_sidh iti_iti sa_sa dṛṣṭāntam_dṛṣṭānta āha_ah āpūryamāṇam_āp￞ iti_iti sarvābhiḥ_sarva nadībhiḥ_nadī āpūryamāṇam_āp￞ santam_as vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi prabhavāḥ_prabhava api_api sarvāḥ_sarva āpaḥ_ap samudram_samudra praviśanti_praviś kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa acala--_acala pratiṣṭham_pratiṣṭhā an_an atikrānta--_atikram maryādam_maryādā acalānām_acala maināka--_maināka ādīnām_ādi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā yasmin_yad iti_iti vā_vā gāmbhīrya--_gāmbhīrya atiśayaḥ_atiśaya uktaḥ_vac yadvat_yadvat yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra nirvikāra--_nirvikāra tvena_tva tadvat_tadvat tena_tad eva_eva nirvikāra--_nirvikāra tva--_tva prakāreṇa_prakāra yam_yad sthita--_sthā prajñam_prajñā nirvikāram_nirvikāra eva_eva santam_as kāmāḥ_kāma ajñaiḥ_ajña lokaiḥ_loka kāmyamānāḥ_kāmay śabda--_śabda ādyāḥ_ādya sarve_sarva viṣayāḥ_viṣaya avarjanīya--_avarjanīya tayā_tā tu_tu vikartum_vikṛ śaknuvanti_śak sa_tad mahā--_mahat samudra--_samudra sthānīyaḥ_sthānīya sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā śāntim_śānti sarva--_sarva laukika--_laukika alaukika--_alaukika karma--_karman vikṣepa--_vikṣepa nivṛttim_nivṛtti bādhita--_bādh anuvṛtta--_anuvṛt avidyā--_avidyā kārya--_kārya nivṛttim_nivṛtti ca_ca āpnoti_āp jñāna--_jñāna balena_bala na_na kāma--_kāma kāmī_kāmin kāmān_kāma viṣayān_viṣaya kāmayitum_kāmay śīlam_śīla yasya_yad sa_tad kāma--_kāma kāmī_kāmin ajñaḥ_ajña śāntim_śānti samākhyātām_samākhyā na_na āpnoti_āp api_api tu_tu sarvadā_sarvadā laukika--_laukika alaukika--_alaukika karma--_karman vikṣepeṇa_vikṣepa mahati_mahat kleśa--_kleśa arṇave_arṇava magnaḥ_majj bhavati_bhū iti_iti vākya--_vākya arthaḥ_artha etena_etad jñāninaḥ_jñānin eva_eva phala--_phala bhūtaḥ_bhū vidvas--_vidvas saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa tasya_tad eva_eva ca_ca sarva--_sarva vikṣepa--_vikṣepa nivṛtti--_nivṛtti rūpā_rūpa jīvan--_jīv muktiḥ_mukti api_api nirvikāra--_nirvikāra tā_tā iti_iti ādikam_ādika uktam_vac veditavyam_vid

āha_ah yathā_yathā varṣāsu_varṣā itas_itas tatas_tatas nādeyāḥ_nādeya āpaḥ_ap samudram_samudra praviśanti_praviś kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa āpūryamāṇam_āp￞ tāvatībhiḥ_tāvat api_api adbhiḥ_ap pūrayitum_pūray śakyam_śakya acala--_acala pratiṣṭham_pratiṣṭhā an_an atikrānta--_atikram maryādam_maryādā tadvat_tadvat eva_eva kāmāḥ_kāma viṣayāḥ_viṣaya yam_yad praviśanti_praviś bhogya--_bhuj tvena_tva āyānti_āyā yathā_yathā apām_ap praveśe_praveśa apraveśe_apraveśa vā_vā samudraḥ_samudra na_na kam_ka api_api viśeṣam_viśeṣa āpadyate_āpad evam_evam eva_eva yaḥ_yad kāmānām_kāma bhoge_bhoga abhoge_abhoga ca_ca kṣobha--_kṣobha rahitaḥ_rahita eva_eva syāt_as sa_tad sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā śāntim_śānti jñānam_jñāna

āha_ah sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa eva_eva āpūryamāṇam_āp￞ tathā_tathā api_api acala--_acala pratiṣṭham_pratiṣṭhā an_an ullaṅghita--_ullaṅghay velam_velā samudram_samudra yathā_yathā apaḥ_ap anyāḥ_anya varṣa--_varṣa udbhavāḥ_udbhava nadyaḥ_nadī praviśanti_praviś na_na tu_tu tatra_tatra kiñcid_kaścit viśeṣam_viśeṣa śaknuvanti_śak kartum_kṛ tadvat_tadvat sarve_sarva praviśanti_praviś na_na tu_tu vikartum_vikṛ prabhavanti_prabhū sa_tad śāntim_śānti āpnoti_āp śabda--_śabda ādiṣu_ādi tat_tad indriya--_indriya gocareṣu_gocara api_api sat_as sva--_sva ātma--_ātman ānanda--_ānanda anubhava--_anubhava tṛptaiḥ_tṛp vikāra--_vikāra leśam_leśa api_api avindān_avindat sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yaḥ_yad kāma--_kāma kāmī_kāmin viṣaya--_viṣaya lipsuḥ_lipsu sa_tad tu_tu ukta--_vac lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa śāntim_śānti na_na āpnoti_āp
BhG 2.71

lg.l: vihāya_vihā kāmān_kāma yaḥ_yad sarvān_sarva pumān_puṃs carati_car niḥspṛhaḥ_niḥspṛha
nirmamaḥ_nirmama nirahaṃkāraḥ_nirahaṃkāra sa_tad śāntim_śānti adhigacchati_adhigam

div.p: prāptān_prāp kāmān_kāma vihāya_vihā tyaktvā_tyaj upekṣya_upekṣ aprāpteṣu_aprāpta ca_ca niḥspṛhaḥ_niḥspṛha yatas_yatas nirahaṅkāraḥ_nirahaṃkāra ataeva_ataeva tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga sādhaneṣu_sādhana nirmamaḥ_nirmama san_as antar_antar dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi bhūtvā_bhū yaḥ_yad carati_car prārabdha--_prārabh vaśena_vaśa bhogān_bhoga bhuṅkte_bhuj yatra_yatra kutra_kutra api_api gacchati_gam vā_vā sa_tad śāntim_śānti prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt vihāya_vihā iti_iti prāptān_prāp api_api sarvān_sarva bāhyān_bāhya gṛha--_gṛha kṣetra--_kṣetra ādīn_ādi āntarān_āntara manaḥ--_manas rājya--_rājya rūpān_rūpa vāsanā--_vāsanā mātra--_mātra rūpān_rūpa ca_ca pathi_pathin gacchan_gam tṛṇa--_tṛṇa sparśa--_sparśa rūpān_rūpa kāmān_kāma trividhān_trividha vihāya_vihā upekṣya_upekṣ śarīra--_śarīra jīvana--_jīvana mātre_mātra api_api yatas_yatas nirahaṅkāra_nirahaṃkāra śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya ādau_ādi ayam_idam aham_mad iti_iti abhimāna--_abhimāna śūnyaḥ_śūnya vidyāvat--_vidyāvat tva--_tva ādi--_ādi nimitta--_nimitta ātma--_ātman sambhāvanā--_sambhāvanā rahitaḥ_rahita iti_iti vā_vā atas_atas nirmamaḥ_nirmama śarīra--_śarīra yātrā--_yātrā mātra--_mātra arthe_artha api_api prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman ākṣipte_ākṣip kaupīna--_kaupīna ācchādana--_ācchādana ādau_ādi mama_mad idam_idam iti_iti abhimāna--_abhimāna varjitaḥ_varjay san_as yaḥ_yad pumān_puṃs carati_car prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman vaśena_vaśa bhogān_bhoga bhuṅkte_bhuj saḥ_tad evaṃbhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā śāntim_śānti sarva--_sarva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra duḥkha--_duḥkha uparama--_uparama lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya nivṛttim_nivṛtti adhigacchati_adhigam jñāna--_jñāna balena_bala prāpnoti_prāp tat_tad etat_etad īdṛśam_īdṛśa vrajanam_vrajana sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā iti_iti caturtha--_caturtha praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara parisamāptam_parisamāp
bhuṅkte_bhuj āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva vihāya_vihā iti_iti prāptān_prāp kāmān_kāma viṣayān_viṣaya sarvān_sarva vihāya_vihā śarīra--_śarīra upajīvana--_upajīvana mātre_mātra api_api nirmamaḥ_nirmama mamtā--_mamtā śūnyaḥ_śūnya nirahaṅkāraḥ_nirahaṃkāra anātmani_anātman śarīre_śarīra ātma--_ātman abhimāna--_abhimāna śūnyaḥ_śūnya carati_car tad--_tad upajīvana--_upajīvana mātram_mātra bhakṣayati_bhakṣay yatra_yatra vrajeta_vraj kim_kim iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara
BhG 2.72

lg.l: eṣā_etad brāhmī_brāhma sthitiḥ_sthiti pārtha_pārtha na_na enām_enad prāpya_prāp vimuhyati_vimuh
sthitvā_sthā asyām_idam anta--_anta kāle_kāla api_api brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa ṛcchati_ṛch

div.p: brāhmī_brāhma sthitiḥ_sthiti brahma--_brahman jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā eṣā_etad evaṃvidhā_evaṃvidha enām_enad parameśvara--_parameśvara ārādhanena_ārādhana viśuddha--_viśudh antaḥkaraṇaḥ_antaḥkaraṇa pumān_puṃs prāpya_prāp na_na vimuhyati_vimuh punar_punar saṃsāra--_saṃsāra moham_moha na_na prāpnoti_prāp yatas_yatas anta--_anta kāle_kāla mṛtyu--_mṛtyu samaye_samaya api_api asyām_idam lakṣa--_lakṣa mātram_mātra api_api sthitvā_sthā brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa brahmaṇi_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa layam_laya ṛcchati_ṛch prāpnoti_prāp kim_ka punar_punar vaktavyam_vac bālyam_bālya ārabhya_ārabh sthitvā_sthā prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti 72_72

lg.l: śoka--_śoka paṅka--_paṅka nimagnam_nimajj yaḥ_yad sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya yoga--_yoga upadeśataḥ_upadeśa
ujjahāra_uddhṛ arjunam_arjuna bhaktam_bhakta sa_tad kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa śaraṇam_śaraṇa mama_mad

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam caturṇām_catur praśnānām_praśna uttara--_uttara vyājena_vyāja sarvāṇi_sarva sthita--_sthita prajña--_prajñā lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa mumukṣu--_mumukṣu kartavya--_kṛ tayā_tā kathitāni_kathay samprati_samprati karma--_karman yoga--_yoga phala--_phala bhūtām_bhū sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā stuvan_stu upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ eṣā_etad iti_iti eṣā_etad sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajñā lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa vyājena_vyāja kathitā_kathay eṣā_etad te_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā sāṅkhye_sāṃkhya buddhiḥ_buddhi iti_iti ca_ca prāk_prāk uktā_vac sthitiḥ_sthiti niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa pūrvaka--_pūrvaka paramātma--_paramātman jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa brāhmī_brāhma brahma--_brahman viṣayā_viṣaya he_he pārtha_pārtha enām_enad sthitim_sthiti prāpya_prāp yaḥ_yad kaścid_kaścit api_api na_na vimuhyati_vimuh na_na hi_hi jñāna--_jñāna bādhitasya_bādh ajñānasya_ajñāna punar_punar sambhavaḥ_sambhava asti_as anādi--_anādi tvena_tva utpatti--_utpatti asambhavāt_asaṃbhava asyām_idam sthitau_sthiti anta--_anta kāle_kāla api_api antye_antya api_api vaayasi_vaayas sthitvā_sthā brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa brahmaṇi_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa nirvṛttim_nirvṛtti brahma--_brahman rūpam_rūpa nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa iti_iti vā_vā ṛcchati_ṛch gacchati_gam abhedena_abheda kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac yaḥ_yad bramacaryāt_bramacarya eva_eva saṃnyasya_saṃnyas yāvajjīvam_yāvajjīvam asyām_idam brāhmyām_brāhma sthitau_sthiti avatiṣṭhate_avasthā sa_tad brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa ṛcchati_ṛch iti_iti api_api śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha 72_72

iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍha--_guh artha--_artha dīpikāyām_dīpikā sarva--_sarva gītārtha--_gītārtha sūtraṇam_sūtraṇa
dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

lg.l: jñānam_jñāna karma_karman ca_ca vispaṣṭam_vispaṣṭa aspaṣṭam_aspaṣṭa bhaktim_bhakti uktavān_vac
ataeva_ataeva ayam_idam adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya śrī--_śrī gītā--_gītā sūtram_sūtra ucyate_vac
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha varṣiṇyām_varṣin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
śrī--_śrī gītāsu_gītā dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya ayam_idam saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajña tām_tā stauti_stu eṣā_etad iti_iti anta--_anta kāle_kāla carame_carama vayasi_vayas kim_ka punar_punar ākaumāram_ākaumāra brahma_brahman ṛcchati_ṛch labhate_labh nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa amṛta--_amṛta rūpam_rūpa tat_tad pradam_prada iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nanu_nanu tasyām_tad sthitaḥ_sthā katham_katham brahma_brahman prāpnoti_prāp tad--_tad prāpteḥ_prāpti tad--_tad bhakti--_bhakti hetuka--_hetuka tvāt_tva iti_iti ced_ced ucyate_vac tasyāḥ_tad tad--_tad bhakti--_bhakti hetuka--_hetuka tvāt_tva tad--_tad bhakti--_bhakti hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva ca_ca tad--_tad prāpaka--_prāpaka tā_tā iti_iti 72_72

lg.l: niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmabhiḥ_karman jñānī_jñānin harim_hari eva_eva smaran_smṛ bhavet_bhū
anyathā_anyathā vighnaḥ_vighna eva_eva iti_iti dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya adhyāya--_adhyāya nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
Bhagavadgita 3
BhG 3.1

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
jyāyasī_jyāyas ced_ced karmaṇaḥ_karman te_tvad matā_man buddhiḥ_buddhi janārdana_janārdana
tat_tad kim_ka karmaṇi_karman ghore_ghora mām_mad niyojayasi_niyojay keśava_keśava
sāṅkhye_sāṃkhya yoge_yoga ca_ca vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya matvā_man mugdhāya_muh jiṣṇave_jiṣṇu
tayoḥ_tad bheda--_bheda nirāsāya_nirāsa karma--_karman yoge_yoga udīryate_udīray

div.p:
evam_evam tāvat_tāvat aśocyān_aśocya anvaśocaḥ_anuśuc tvam_tvad iti_iti ādinā_ādi prathamam_prathamam mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanatvena_sādhanatva deha--_deha ātma--_ātman viveka--_viveka buddhiḥ_buddhi uktā_vac tad--_tad anantaram_anantaram eṣā_etad te_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā sāṅkhye_sāṃkhya buddhiḥ_buddhi yoge_yoga tu_tu imām_idam śṛṇu_śru iti_iti ādinā_ādi karma_karman ca_ca uktam_vac na_na ca_ca tayoḥ_tad guṇa--_guṇa pradhāna--_pradhāna bhāvaḥ_bhāva spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa darśitaḥ_darśay tatra_tatra buddhi--_buddhi yuktasya_yuj sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tva--_tva niyata--_niyam indriya--_indriya tva--_tva nirahaṅkāra--_nirahaṃkāra tva--_tva ādi--_ādi abhidhānāt_abhidhāna eṣā_etad brāhmī_brāhma sthitiḥ_sthiti pārtha_pārtha iti_iti sa_sa praśaṃsam_praśaṃsā upasaṃhārāt_upasaṃhāra ca_ca buddhi--_buddhi karmaṇoḥ_karman madhye_madhya buddheḥ_buddhi abhipretam_abhipre manvānaḥ_man arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac jyāyasī_jyāyas ced_ced iti_iti karmaṇaḥ_karman sakāśāt_sakāśāt mokṣa--_mokṣa antaraṅga--_antaraṅga tvena_tva buddhiḥ_buddhi jyāyasī_jyāyas adhikatarā_adhikatara śreṣṭhā_śreṣṭha
ced_ced tava_tvad saṃmatā_samman tarhi_tarhi kim_ka artham_artha tasmāt_tasmāt yudhyasva_yudh iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt uttiṣṭa_utthā iti_iti ca_ca vāram_vāra vāram_vāra vadan_vad ghore_ghora hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ātmake_ātmaka karmaṇi_karman mām_mad niyojayasi_niyojay pravartayasi_pravartay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam tāvat_tāvat prathamena_prathama adhyāyena_adhyāya upodghātitaḥ_upodghātay dvitīyena_dvitīya adhyāyena_adhyāya kṛtsnaḥ_kṛtsna śāstra--_śāstra arthaḥ_artha sūtritaḥ_sūtray ādau_ādi niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā tatas_tatas śama--_śama dama--_dama ādi--_ādi sādhana--_sādhana puraḥsaraḥ_puraḥsara sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa tatas_tatas vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya vicāra--_vicāra sahitā_sahita bhagavat--_bhagavant bhakti--_bhakti niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā tatas_tatas tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā tasyāḥ_tad phalam_phala ca_ca triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmaka--_ātmaka avidyā--_avidyā nivṛttyā_nivṛtti jīvan--_jīv muktiḥ_mukti prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman phala--_phala bhoga--_bhoga paryantam_paryanta tad--_tad ante_anta ca_ca videha--_videha muktiḥ_mukti jīvan--_jīv mukti--_mukti daśāyām_daśā ca_ca parama--_parama puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha ālambanena_ālambana para--_para vairāgya--_vairāgya prāptiḥ_prāpti daiva--_daiva sampad--_sampad ākhyā_ākhyā ca_ca śubha--_śubha vāsanā_vāsanā tad--_tad upakāriṇī_upakārin ādeyā_ādā āsura--_āsura sampadaḥ_sampad tu_tu rājasī_rājasa tāmasī_tāmasa ca_ca iti_iti heya--_hā upādeya--_upādā vibhāgena_vibhāga kṛtsna--_kṛtsna śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha parisamāptiḥ_parisamāpti

tatra_tatra yoga--_yoga sthaḥ_stha kuru_kṛ karmāṇi_karman ityādinā_ityādi sūtritā_sūtrita sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi sādhana--_sādhana bhūtā_bhū niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sāmānya--_sāmānya viśeṣa--_viśeṣa rūpeṇa_rūpa tṛtīya--_tṛtīya caturthābhyām_caturtha prapañcyate_prapañcay tatas_tatas śuddha--_śudh antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa śama--_śama dama--_dama ādi--_ādi sādhana--_sādhana sampatti--_sampatti puraḥsarā_puraḥsara vihāya_vihā kāmān_kāma yaḥ_yad sarvān_sarva iti_iti ādinā_ādi sūtritā_sūtray sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā saṅkṣepa--_saṃkṣepa vistara--_vistara rūpeṇa_rūpa pañcama--_pañcama ṣaṣṭhābhyām_ṣaṣṭha etāvatā_etāvat ca_ca tvam_tvad padārthaḥ_padārtha api_api nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay tatas_tatas vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya vicāra--_vicāra sahitā_sahita yuktaḥ_yuj āsīta_ās mad--_mad paraḥ_para iti_iti ādinā_ādi sūtritā_sūtrita aneka--_aneka prakārā_prakāra bhagavat--_bhagavant bhakti--_bhakti niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā adhyāya--_adhyāya ṣaṭkena_ṣaṭka pratipādyate_pratipāday tāvatā_tāvat ca_ca tad--_tad padārthaḥ_padārtha api_api nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay prati_prati adhyāyam_adhyāya ca_ca avāntara--_avāntara saṅgatim_saṃgati avāntara--_avāntara prayojana--_prayojana bhedam_bheda ca_ca tatra_tatra tatra_tatra pradarśayiṣyāmaḥ_pradarśay jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhāyām_niṣṭhā ca_ca phalam_phala traiguṇya--_traiguṇya viṣayāḥ_viṣaya vedāḥ_veda nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya bhava_bhū arjuna_arjuna iti_iti ādinā_ādi sūtritā_sūtray traiguṇya--_traiguṇya nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti caturdaśe_caturdaśa sā_tad eva_eva jīvan--_jīv muktiḥ_mukti iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa kathanena_kathana tadā_tadā gantāsi_gam nirvedam_nirveda iti_iti ādinā_ādi sūtritā_sūtray para--_para vairāgya--_vairāgya niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa cheda--_cheda dvāreṇa_dvāra pañcadaśe_pañcadaśa duḥkheṣu_duḥkha anudvigna--_anudvigna manāḥ_manas iti_iti ādinā_ādi sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajñā lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa sūtritā_sūtrita para--_para vairāgya--_vairāgya upakāriṇī_upakārin daivī_daiva sampad_sampad ādeyā_ādā yām_yad imām_idam puṣpitām_puṣpita vācam_vāc Gītā--_Gītā 2.42_2.43 iti_iti ādinā_ādi sūtritā_sūtrita tad--_tad virodhinī_virodhin āsurī_āsura daiva--_daiva sampadaḥ_sampad asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa kāraṇam_kāraṇa ca_ca sāttvikī_sāttvika śraddhā_śraddhā nirdvandvaḥ_nirdvaṃdva nitya--_nitya sattva--_sattva sthaḥ_stha iti_iti ādinā_ādi sūtritā_sūtray tad--_tad virodhi--_virodhin parihāreṇa_parihāra saptadaśe_saptadaśa evam_evam saphalā_saphala jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā adhyāya--_adhyāya pañcakena_pañcaka pratipāditā_pratipāday aṣṭādaśena_aṣṭādaśa ca_ca pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac sarva--_sarva upasaṃhāraḥ_upasaṃhāra iti_iti kṛtsna--_kṛtsna gīta--_gīta artha--_artha saṅgatiḥ_saṃgati

tatra_tatra pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya buddhim_buddhi āśritya_āśri jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā bhagavatā_bhagavant uktā_vac eṣā_etad te_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā sāṅkhye_sāṃkhya buddhiḥ_buddhi iti_iti tathā_tathā yoga--_yoga buddhim_buddhi āśritya_āśri karma--_karman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā uktā_vac yoge_yoga tu_tu imām_idam śṛṇu_śru iti_iti ārabhya_ārabh karmaṇi_karman eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra te_tvad mā_mā te_tvad saṅgaḥ_saṅga astu_as akarmaṇi_akarman na_na ca_ca anayoḥ_idam niṣṭhayoḥ_niṣṭhā adhikāri--_adhikārin bhedaḥ_bheda spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa upadiṣṭaḥ_upadiś bhagavatā_bhagavant na_na ca_ca aika--_aika ādhikārika--_ādhikārika tvam_tva eva_eva ubhayoḥ_ubhaya samuccayasya_samuccaya vivakṣita--_vivakṣita tvāt_tva iti_iti vācyam_vac dūreṇa_dūra hi_hi avaram_avara karam_kara buddhi--_buddhi yogāt_yoga dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya iti_iti karma--_karman niṣṭhāyāḥ_niṣṭhā buddhi--_buddhi niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā apekṣayā_apekṣā nikṛṣṭa--_nikṛṣṭa tva--_tva abhidhānāt_abhidhāna yāvān_yāvat arthaḥ_artha udapāne_udapāna iti_iti atra_atra ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna phale_phala sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala antarbhāvasya_antarbhāva darśita--_darśay tvāt_tva sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajñā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa uktvā_vac ca_ca eṣā_etad brāhmī_brāhma sthitiḥ_sthiti pārtha_pārtha iti_iti sa_sa praśaṃsam_praśaṃsā jñāna--_jñāna phala--_phala upasaṃhārāt_upasaṃhāra yā_yad niśā_niśā sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta iti_iti ādau_ādi jñāninaḥ_jñānin dvaita--_dvaita darśana--_darśana abhāvena_abhāva karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna asaṃbhavasya_asaṃbhava ca_ca ukta--_vac tvāt_tva avidyā--_avidyā nivṛtti--_nivṛtti lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa mokṣa--_mokṣa phale_phala jñāna--_jñāna mātrasya_mātra eva_eva loka--_loka anusāreṇa_anusāra sādhanatva--_sādhanatva kalpanāt_kalpana tam_tad eva_eva viditvā_vid atimṛtyum_atimṛtyu eti_i na_na anyaḥ_anya panthāḥ_pathin vidyate_vid a_a nayanāya_nayana iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca

nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi tejaḥ--_tejas timirayoḥ_timira iva_iva virodhinoḥ_virodhin jñāna--_jñāna karmaṇoḥ_karman samuccaya--_samuccaya asambhavāt_asaṃbhava bhinna--_bhid ādhikārika--_ādhikārika tvam_tva eva_eva astu_as satyam_satya na_na evam_evam sambhavati_sambhū ekam_eka arjunam_arjuna prati_prati tu_tu ubhaya--_ubhaya upadeśaḥ_upadeśa na_na yuktaḥ_yuj nahi_nahi karma--_karman adhikāriṇam_adhikārin prati_prati jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā upadeṣṭum_upadiś ucitā_ucita na_na vā_vā jñāna--_jñāna adhikāriṇam_adhikārin prati_prati karma--_karman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā ekam_eka eva_eva prati_prati vikalpena_vikalpa ubhaya--_ubhaya upadeśaḥ_upadeśa iti_iti ced_ced na_na tasmāt_tasmāt jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman niṣṭhayoḥ_niṣṭhā bhinna--_bhid ādhikārika--_ādhikārika tve_tva ekam_eka pratyupadeśa--_pratyupadeśa ayogāt_ayoga eka--_eka ādhikārika--_ādhikārika tve_tva ca_ca viruddhayoḥ_virudh samuccaya--_samuccaya asambhavāt_asaṃbhava karma--_karman apekṣayā_apekṣā jñāna--_jñāna praśastyāḥ_praśasti anupapatteḥ_anupapatti ca_ca vikalpa--_vikalpa nikṛṣṭam_nikṛṣṭa aneka--_aneka āyāsa--_āyāsa bahulam_bahula karma_karman anuṣṭhātum_anuṣṭhā ayogyam_ayogya iti_iti matvā_man paryākulībhūta--_paryākulībhū buddhiḥ_buddhi arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac jyāyasī_jyāyas ced_ced iti_iti

he_he janārdana_janārdana sarvaiḥ_sarva janaiḥ_jana ardyate_arday yācyate_yāc sva--_sva abhilaṣita--_abhilaṣ siddhaye_siddhi iti_iti tvam_tvad tathābhūtaḥ_tathābhūta mayā_mad api_api śreyaḥ_śreyas aniścaya--_aniścaya artham_artha yācyase_yāc iti_iti na_na eva_eva anucitam_anucita iti_iti sambodhana--_sambodhana abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya karmaṇaḥ_karman niṣkāmāt_niṣkāma api_api buddhiḥ_buddhi ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva viṣayā_viṣaya jyāyasī_jyāyas praśastatarā_praśastatara ced_ced yadi_yadi te_tvad tava_tvad matā_man tat_tad tadā_tadā kim_ka karmaṇi_karman ghore_ghora hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādi--_ādi aneka--_aneka āyāsa--_āyāsa bahule_bahula mām_mad atibhaktam_atibhakta niyojayasi_niyojay karmaṇi_karman he_he keśava_keśava sarva--_sarva īśvara_īśvara sarveśvarasya_sarveśvara sarva--_sarva iṣṭa--_iṣ dāyinaḥ_dāyin tava_tvad mām_mad bhaktam_bhakta śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya te_tvad aham_mad śādhi_śās mām_mad iti_iti ādinā_ādi tvad--_tvad eka--_eka śaraṇa--_śaraṇa tayā_tā upasannam_upasad prati_prati pratāraṇā_pratāraṇa na_na uicitā_uicita iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha

lg.l: niṣkāmam_niṣkāma arpitam_arpay karma_karman tṛtīye_tṛtīya tu_tu prapañcyate_prapañcay
kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha jigīṣāyām_jigīṣā vivekaḥ_viveka api_api pradarśyate_pradarśay

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva vākyeṣu_vākya jñāna--_jñāna yogāt_yoga niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogāt_yoga ca_ca nistraiguṇya--_nistraiguṇya prāpakasya_prāpaka guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī bhakti--_bhakti yogasya_yoga utkarṣam_utkarṣa ākalayya_ākalay tatra_tatra eva_eva sva--_sva autsukyam_autsukya abhivyañjan_abhivyañj sva--_sva dharme_dharma saṃgrāme_saṃgrāma pravartakam_pravartaka bhagavantam_bhagavant jyāyasī_jyāyas śreṣṭhā_śreṣṭha buddhiḥ_buddhi vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka guṇa--_guṇa atītā_atī bhaktiḥ_bhakti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ghore_ghora yuddha--_yuddha rūpe_rūpa karmaṇi_karman kim_ka niyojayasi_niyojay pravartayasi_pravartay he_he janārdana_janārdana janān_jana sva--_sva janān_jana sva--_sva ājñayā_ājñā pīḍayasi_pīḍay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na ca_ca tava_tvad ājñā_ājñā kena_ka api_api anyathā_anyathā kartum_kṛ śakyate_śak iti_iti āha_ah he_he keśava_keśava kaḥ_ka brahmā_brahman īśaḥ_īśa mahādevaḥ_mahādeva tau_tad api_api vayase_vayas vaśīkaroṣi_vaśīkṛ
baladevaḥ_baladeva

lg.l: tṛtīye_tṛtīya karma--_karman niṣkāmam_niṣkāma vistareṇa_vistara upavarṇitam_upavarṇay
kāma--_kāma ādeḥ_ādi vijaya--_vijaya upāyaḥ_upāya durjayasya_durjaya api_api darśitaḥ_darśay

div.p: pūrvatra_pūrvatra kṛpāluḥ_kṛpālu pārthasārathiḥ_pārthasārathi ajñāna--_ajñāna kardama--_kardama nimagnam_nimajj jagat_jagant sva--_sva ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna upāsana--_upāsana upadeśena_upadeśa samuddidhīrṣuḥ_samuddidhīrṣu tad--_tad aṅga--_aṅga bhūtām_bhū jīvātma--_jīvātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya buddhim_buddhi upadiśya_upadiś tad--_tad upāya--_upāya tayā_tā niṣkāmakam_niṣkāmaka ayam_idam eva_eva arthaḥ_artha viniścayāya_viniścaya caturbhiḥ_catur adhyāyaiḥ_adhyāya vidhā--_vidhā antaraiḥ_antara varṇyate_varṇay tatra_tatra karma--_karman buddhi--_buddhi niṣpādya--_niṣpāday tvāt_tva jīvātma--_jīvātman buddheḥ_buddhi śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha sthitam_sthā tatra_tatra arjunaḥ_arjuna pṛcchati_pracch jyāyasī_jyāyas iti_iti karmaṇā_karman niṣkāmāt_niṣkāma api_api ced_ced tava_tvad tad--_tad sādhya--_sādhay tvāt_tva jīvātma--_jīvātman buddhiḥ_buddhi jyāyasī_jyāyas śreṣṭhā_śreṣṭha matā_man tarhi_tarhi tad--_tad siddhaye_siddhi mām_mad ghore_ghora hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādi--_ādi aneka--_aneka āyāse_āyāsa karmaṇi_karman kim_kim niyojayasi_niyojay tasmāt_tasmāt ādinā_ādi katham_katham prerayasi_preray ātma--_ātman anubhava--_anubhava hetu--_hetu bhūtā_bhū khalu_khalu sā_tad buddhiḥ_buddhi nikhila--_nikhila indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra virati--_virati sādhyā_sādhay tad--_tad artham_artha tad--_tad sva--_sva jātīyāḥ_jātīya śama--_śama ādayaḥ_ādi eva_eva yujyeran_yuj na_na tu_tu sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra rūpāṇi_rūpa tad--_tad vijātīyāni_vijātīya karmāṇi_karman he_he janārdana_janārdana śreyaḥ--_śreyas arthi--_arthin jana--_jana yācanīya_yāc he_he keśava_keśava vidhi--_vidhi rudra--_rudra vaśa--_vaśa kārin_kārin

lg.l: kaḥ_ka iti_iti brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma_nāman īśaḥ_īśa aham_mad sarva--_sarva dehinām_dehin
āvām_mad tava_tvad aṅga--_aṅga sambhūtau_sambhū tasmāt_tasmāt keśava--_keśava nāma--_nāman bhāj_bhāj

div.p: iti_iti hari--_hari vaṃśe_vaṃśa kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa prati_prati rudra--_rudra uktiḥ_ukti durlaṅghya--_durlaṅghya ājñaḥ_ājñā tvam_tvad śreyaḥ_śreyas arthinā_arthin mayā_mad abhyarthitaḥ_abhyarthay mama_mad śreyaḥ_śreyas niścitya_niści brūhi_brū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 3.2

lg.l: vyāmiśreṇa_vyāmiśra eva_eva vākyena_vākya buddhim_buddhi mohayasi_mohay iva_iva me_mad
tat_tad ekam_eka vada_vad niścitya_niści yena_yad śreyaḥ_śreyas aham_mad āpnuyām_āp

div.p: vidyate_vid āha_ah kvacid_kvacid karma--_karman praśaṃsā_praśaṃsā kvacid_kvacid jñāna--_jñāna praśaṃsā_praśaṃsā iti_iti evam_evam vyāmiśram_vyāmiśra sandehaḥ_saṃdeha a_a pādakam_pādaka iva_iva yat_yad vākyam_vākya tena_tad me_mad mama_mad buddhim_buddhi matim_mati ubhayatra_ubhayatra dolāyitām_dolāyita kurvat_kṛ mohayasi_mohay iva_iva atas_atas ubhayoḥ_ubhaya madhye_madhya yat_yad bhadram_bhadra tat_tad ekam_eka niścitya_niści vada_vad iti_iti yat_yat vā_vā idam_idam eva_eva śreyaḥ--_śreyas sādhanam_sādhana iti_iti niścitya_niści yena_yad anuṣṭhitena_anuṣṭhā śreyaḥ_śreyas mokṣam_mokṣa aham_mad āpnuyām_āp prāpsyāmi_prāp tat_tad eva_eva ekam_eka niścitya_niści vada_vad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu na_na aham_mad kaṃcid_kaścit api_api pratārayāmi_pratāray kim_kim punar_punar tvām_tvad ati_ati priyam_priya tvam_tvad tu_tu kim_ka me_mad pratāraṇā--_pratāraṇā cihnam_cihna paśyasi_dṛś iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah vyāmiśreṇa_vyāmiśra iti_iti tava_tvad vacanam_vacana vyāmiśram_vyāmiśra na_na bhavati_bhū eva_eva mama_mad tu_tu eka--_eka ādhikārika--_ādhikārika tva--_tva bhinna--_bhid ādhikārika--_ādhikārika tva--_tva sandehāt_saṃdeha vyāmiśram_vyāmiśra saṅkīrṇa--_saṃkṛ artham_artha iva_iva te_tvad yat_yad vākyam_vākya mām_mad prati_prati jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā dvaya--_dvaya pratipādakam_pratipādaka vākya--_vākya tātparya--_tātparya aparijñānāt_aparijñāna buddhim_buddhi antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa mohayasi_mohay iva_iva bhrāntyā_bhrānti yojayasi_yojay iva_iva parama--_parama kāruṇika--_kāruṇika tvāt_tva tvam_tvad na_na mohayasi_mohay eva_eva mama_mad tu_tu sva--_sva āśaya--_āśaya doṣāt_doṣa mohaḥ_moha bhavati_bhū iti_iti ivaśa--_ivaśa śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha eka--_eka adhikāri--_adhikārin tve_tva viruddhayoḥ_virudh samuccaya--_samuccaya anupapatteḥ_anupapatti eka--_eka artha--_artha tva--_tva abhāvena_abhāva ca_ca vikalpa--_vikalpa anupapatteḥ_anupapatti prāc--_prāñc ukteḥ_ukti yadi_yadi adhikāri--_adhikārin bhedam_bheda manyase_man tadā_tadā ekam_eka mām_mad prati_prati viruddhayoḥ_virudh niṣṭhayoḥ_niṣṭhā upadeśa--_upadeśa āyogāt_āyoga tat_tad me_mad niścitya_niści vada_vad yena_yad adhikāra--_adhikāra niścaya--_niścaya puraḥsaram_puraḥsara uktena_vac tvayā_tvad mayā_mad ca_ca anuṣṭhitena_anuṣṭhā jñānena_jñāna karmaṇā_karman vā_vā ekena_eka śreyaḥ_śreyas mokṣam_mokṣa aham_mad āpnuyām_āp prāptum_prāp yogyaḥ_yogya syām_as

evam_evam jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman niṣṭhayoḥ_niṣṭhā eka--_eka adhikāri--_adhikārin tve_tva vikalpa--_vikalpa samuccayayoḥ_samuccaya asambhavāt_asaṃbhava adhikāri--_adhikārin bheda--_bheda jñānāya_jñāna arjunasya_arjuna praśnaḥ_praśna iti_iti sthitam_sthā

lg.l: iha_iha itareṣām_itara kumatam_kumata samastam_samasta
śruti--_śruti smṛti--_smṛti nyāya--_nyāya balāt_bala nirastam_niras
punar_punar punar_punar bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kṛta--_kṛt atiyatnāt_atiyatna
atas_atas na_na tat_tad kartum_kṛ aham_mad pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt
bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kāra--_kāra mata--_mata sāra--_sāra darśinā_darśin
grantha--_grantha mātram_mātra yojyate_yojay mayā_mad
āśayaḥ_āśaya bhagavataḥ_bhagavant prakāśyate_prakāśay
kevalam_kevalam sva--_sva vacasaḥ_vacas viśuddhaye_viśuddhi

div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha bho_bho vayasyaiḥ_vayasya arjunaiḥ_arjuna satyam_satya guṇa--_guṇa atītā_atī bhaktiḥ_bhakti sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭā_utkṛṣṭa eva_eva kintu_kiṃtu sā_tad yādṛcchika--_yādṛcchika mad--_mad aikānta--_aikānta eka--_eka mahā--_mahat bhakta--_bhakta kṛpā--_kṛpā eka--_eka labhya--_labh tvāt_tva purusa--_purusa udyama--_udyama sādhyā_sādhay na_na bhavati_bhū ataeva_ataeva nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya bhava_bhū guṇa--_guṇa atītayā_atī mad--_mad bhaktyā_bhakti tvam_tvad nistraiguṇyaḥ_nistraiguṇya bhūyāḥ_bhū iti_iti āśīrvādaḥ_āśīrvāda eva_eva dattaḥ_dā sa_tad ca_ca yadā_yadā phaliṣyati_phal tadā_tadā tādṛśa--_tādṛśa yādṛcchika--_yādṛcchika aikāntika--_aikāntika bhakta--_bhakta kṛpayā_kṛpā prāptām_prāp api_api lapsyase_labh sāmpratam_sāṃpratam tu_tu karmaṇi_karman eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra te_tvad iti_iti mayā_mad uktam_vac ced_ced satyam_satya tarhi_tarhi karma_karman eva_eva niścitya_niści katham_katham na_na brūṣe_brū kim_kim iti_iti sandeha--_saṃdeha sindhau_sindhu mām_mad kṣipasi_kṣip iti_iti āha_ah vyāmiśreṇa_vyāmiśra iti_iti viśeṣataḥ_viśeṣataḥ samyaktayā_samyaktā miśraṇam_miśraṇa nānā_nānā vidha--_vidha artha--_artha milanam_milana yatra_yatra tena_tad vākyena_vākya me_mad buddhim_buddhi mohayasi_mohay tathā_tathā hi_hi karmaṇi_karman eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra te_tvad siddhi--_siddhi asiddhyoḥ_asiddhi samaḥ_sama bhūtvā_bhū sama--_sama tvam_tva yogaḥ_yoga ucyate_vac

lg.l: buddhi--_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj jahāti_hā iha_iha ubhe_ubh sukṛta--_sukṛta duṣkṛte_duṣkṛta
tasmāt_tasmāt yogāya_yoga yujyasva_yuj yogaḥ_yoga karmasu_karman kauśalam_kauśala

div.p: iti_iti yoga--_yoga śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac jñānam_jñāna api_api bravīṣi_brū yadā_yadā te_tvad moha--_moha kalilam_kalila iti_iti anena_idam jñānam_jñāna kevalam_kevala api_api bravīṣi_brū kim_ka ca_ca atra_atra iva_iva śabdena_śabda tvad--_tvad vākyasya_vākya vastutas_vastutas nā_na asti_as nānārtha--_nānārtha miśrita--_miśray tvam_tva nā_na api_api kṛpāloḥ_kṛpālu tava_tvad mad--_mad mohana--_mohana icchā_icchā nā_na api_api mama_mad tad--_tad tad--_tad artha--_artha anabhijña--_anabhijña tvam_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ayam_idam gūḍhaḥ_guh abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya rājasāt_rājasa karmaṇaḥ_karman sakāśāt_sakāśāt sāttvikam_sāttvika karma_karman śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha tat_tad ca_ca sāttvikam_sāttvika eva_eva nirguṇa--_nirguṇa bhaktiḥ_bhakti ca_ca tasmāt_tad ati_ati śreṣṭhā_śreṣṭha eva_eva tatra_tatra sā_tad yadi_yadi mayi_mad na_na sambhavet_sambhū iti_iti brūṣe_brū tadā_tadā sāttvikam_sāttvika jñānam_jñāna eva_eva ekam_eka mām_mad upadiśa_upadiś tatas_tatas eva_eva duḥkha--_duḥkha mayāt_maya saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bandhanāt_bandhana muktaḥ_muc bhaveyam_bhū iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva vyāmiśreṇa_vyāmiśra iti_iti sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya buddhi--_buddhi yoga--_yoga buddhyoḥ_buddhi indriya--_indriya nivṛtti--_nivṛtti rūpayoḥ_rūpa sādhya--_sādhay sādhaka--_sādhaka tva--_tva avarodhi_avarodhin yat_yad vākyam_vākya tat_tad vyāmiśram_vyāmiśra ucyate_vac tena_tena me_mad buddhim_buddhi mohayasi_mohay iva_iva vastutas_vastutas tu_tu sarva--_sarva īśvarasya_īśvara mad--_mad sakhasya_sakha ca_ca me_mad mad--_mad mohaka--_mohaka tā_tā nā_na asti_as eva_eva mad--_mad buddhi--_buddhi doṣāt_doṣa evam_evam prayemi_prayā aham_mad atīva_atīva śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha tat_tad tasmāt_tasmāt ekam_eka avyāmiśram_avyāmiśra vākyam_vākya vada_vad na_na karmaṇā_karman na_na prajayā_prajā dhanena_dhana tyāgena_tyāga ekena_eka amṛta--_amṛta tvam_tva ānaśuḥ_aś na_na asti_as a_a kṛtaḥ_kṛ kṛtena_kṛ iti_iti śruti--_śruti vat_vat yena_yad aham_mad anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā niścitya_niści ātmanaḥ_ātman śreyaḥ_śreyas prāpnuyām_prāp
BhG 3.3

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
loke_loka asmin_idam dvividhā_dvividha niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā purā_purā proktā_pravac mayā_mad anagha_anagha
jñāna--_jñāna yogena_yoga sāṃkhyānām_sāṃkhya karma--_karman yogena_yoga yoginām_yogin

div.p: uvāca_vac ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha yadi_yadi mayā_mad paraspara--_paraspara nirapekṣam_nirapekṣa mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhana--_sādhana tvena_tva karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga rūpam_rūpa niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā dvayam_dvaya uktam_vac syāt_as tarhi_tarhi dvayoḥ_dvi madhye_madhya yat_yad bhadram_bhadra syāt_as tat_tad ekam_eka vada_vad iti_iti tvadīya--_tvadīya praśnaḥ_praśna saṃgacchate_saṃgam na_na tu_tu mayā_mad tathā_tathā uktam_vac dvābhyām_dvi ekā_eka eva_eva brahma--_brahman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā uktā_vac guṇa--_guṇa pradhāna--_pradhāna bhūtayoḥ_bhū tayoḥ_tad svātantrya--_svātantrya anupapatteḥ_anupapatti ekasyāḥ_eka eva_eva tu_tu prakāra--_prakāra bheda--_bheda mātram_mātra adhikāri--_adhikārin bhedena_bheda uktam_vac iti_iti asmin_idam śuddha--_śudh aśuddha--_aśuddha antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa tayā_tā dvividhe_dvividha loke_loka adhikāri--_adhikārin jane_jana dve_dvi vidhe_vidha prakārau_prakāra yasyāḥ_yad sā_tad dvi--_dvi vidhā_vidha niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā mokṣa--_mokṣa para--_para tā_tā pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya mayā_mad sārvajñena_sārvajña proktā_pravac spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa eva_eva uktā_vac prakāra--_prakāra dvayam_dvaya eva_eva nirdiśati_nirdiś jñāna--_jñāna yogena_yoga iti_iti ādi_ādi sāṅkhyānām_sāṃkhya śuddha--_śuddha antaḥkaraṇānām_antaḥkaraṇa jñāna--_jñāna bhūmikām_bhūmikā ārūḍhānām_āruh jñāna--_jñāna paripāka--_paripāka artham_artha jñāna--_jñāna yogena_yoga dhyāna--_dhyāna ādinā_ādi niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā brahma--_brahman para--_para tā_tā uktā_vac tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva saṃyamya_saṃyam yuktaḥ_yuj āsīta_ās mad--_mad paraḥ_para iti_iti ādinā_ādi sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya bhūmikām_bhūmikā ārurukṣūṇām_ārurukṣu tu_tu antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi dvārā_dvār tad--_tad ārohaṇa--_ārohaṇa artham_artha tad--_tad upāya--_upāya bhūta--_bhū karma--_karman yoga--_yoga adhikāriṇām_adhikārin yoginām_yogin karma--_karman yogena_yoga niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā uktā_vac dharmyāt_dharmya hi_hi yuddhāt_yuddha śreyaḥ_śreyas anyat_anya ataeva_ataeva tava_tvad citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi rūpa--_rūpa avasthā--_avasthā bhedena_bheda dvi--_dvi vidhā_vidha api_api niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā uktā_vac eṣā_etad te_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā sāṅkhye_sāṃkhya buddhiḥ_buddhi yoge_yoga tu_tu imām_idam śṛṇu_śru iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam adhikāri--_adhikārin bhede_bheda arjunena_arjuna pṛṣṭe_pracch tad--_tad anurūpam_anurūpa prativacanam_prativacana śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac loke_loka asmin_idam iti_iti asmin_idam adhikāri--_adhikārin tva--_tva abhimate_abhiman loke_loka śuddha--_śuddha aśuddha--_aśuddha antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa bhedena_bheda dvividhe_dvividha jane_jana dvividhā_dvividha dvi--_dvi prakārā_prakāra niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā jñāna--_jñāna para--_para tā_tā karma--_karman para--_para tā_tā ca_ca purā_purā pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya mayā_mad tava_tvad atyanta--_atyanta hita--_hita spaṣṭa--_spaṣṭa tva--_tva lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa uktā_vac tathā_tathā ca_ca adhikāri--_adhikārin aikya--_aikya śaṅkayā_śaṅkā mā_mā glāsīḥ_glā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva he_he anagha_anagha apāpa_apāpa iti_iti sambodhayan_sambodhay upadeśa--_upadeśa yogya--_yogya tām_tā arjunasya_arjuna sūcayati_sūcay ekā_eka eva_eva niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sādhya--_sādhay sādhana--_sādhana avasthā--_avasthā bhedena_bheda dvi--_dvi prakārā_prakāra na_na tu_tu dve_dvi eva_eva svatantre_svatantra niṣṭhe_niṣṭhā iti_iti kathayitum_kathay niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā iti_iti eka--_eka vacanam_vacana tathā_tathā ca_ca vakṣyati_vac ekam_eka sāṃkhyam_sāṃkhya ca_ca yogam_yoga ca_ca yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś sa_tad paśyati_dṛś iti_iti

tām_tad eva_eva niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā dvaividhyena_dvaividhya darśayati_darśay sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya iti_iti saṅkhyā_saṃkhyā samyak_samyak ātma--_ātman buddhiḥ_buddhi tām_tad prāptavatām_prāp brahmacaryāt_brahmacarya eva_eva kṛta--_kṛ saṃnyāsānām_saṃnyāsa vedānta--_vedānta vijñāna--_vijñāna su_su niścita--_niści arthānām_artha jñāna--_jñāna bhūmim_bhūmi ārūḍhānām_āruh śuddha--_śudh antaḥkaraṇānām_antaḥkaraṇa sāṅkhyānām_sāṃkhya jñāna--_jñāna yogena_yoga jñānam_jñāna vyutpattyā_vyutpatti yogaḥ_yoga tena_tad niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā uktā_vac tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva saṃyamya_saṃyam yuktaḥ_yuj āsīta_ās mad--_mad paraḥ_para iti_iti ādinā_ādi aśuddha--_aśuddha antaḥkaraṇānām_antaḥkaraṇa tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna bhūmim_bhūmi an_an ārūḍhānām_āruh yoginām_yogin karma--_karman adhikāra--_adhikāra yoginām_yogin karma--_karman yogena_yoga karma_karman eva_eva yujyate_yuj antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhyā_śuddhi anena_idam iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti yogaḥ_yoga tena_tad niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā ukta--_vac antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa dharmyāt_dharmya hi_hi yuddhāt_yuddha śreyaḥ_śreyas anyat_anya kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya na_na vidyate_vid iti_iti ādinā_ādi

ataeva_ataeva na_na jñāna--_jñāna karmaṇoḥ_karman samuccayaḥ_samuccaya vikalpaḥ_vikalpa vā_vā kintu_kiṃtu niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman śuddha--_śuddha antaḥkaraṇānām_antaḥkaraṇa sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsena_saṃnyāsa eva_eva jñānam_jñāna iti_iti citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi aśuddhi--_aśuddhi rūpa--_rūpa avasthā--_avasthā bhedena_bheda ekam_eka eva_eva tvām_tvad prati_prati dvividhā_dvividha niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā uktā_vac eṣā_etad te_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā sāṃkhye_sāṃkhya buddhiḥ_buddhi yoge_yoga tu_tu imām_idam śṛṇu_śru iti_iti atas_atas bhūmikā--_bhūmikā bhedena_bheda ekam_eka eva_eva prati_prati ubhaya--_ubhaya upayogāt_upayoga na_na adhikāra--_adhikāra bhede_bheda api_api upadeśa--_upadeśa vaiyarthyam_vaiyarthya iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya etat_etad eva_eva darśayitum_darśay aśuddha--_aśuddha cittasya_citta citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi paryantam_paryanta karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna na_na karmaṇām_karman anārambhāt_anārambha iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi mogham_mogha sa_tad jīvati_jīv iti_iti antaiḥ_anta trayodaśabhiḥ_trayodaśan darśayati_darśay śuddha--_śuddha cittasya_citta tu_tu jñāninaḥ_jñānin na_na kiṃcid_kaścit api_api karma_karman apekṣitam_apekṣ iti_iti darśayati_darśay yaḥ_yad tu_tu ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi tasmāt_tasmāt asaktaḥ_asakta iti_iti ārabhya_ārabh tu_tu bandha--_bandha hetoḥ_hetu api_api mokṣa--_mokṣa hetu--_hetu tvam_tva sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi jñāna--_jñāna utpatti--_utpatti dvāreṇa_dvāra sambhavati_sambhū phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi rāhitya--_rāhitya rūpa--_rūpa kauśalena_kauśala iti_iti darśayiṣyati_darśay tatas_tatas param_param tu_tu atha_atha kena_ka iti_iti praśnam_praśna utthāpya_utthāpay kāma--_kāma doṣeṇa_doṣa eva_eva kārya--_kṛ karmaṇaḥ_karman śuddhi--_śuddhi hetu--_hetu tvam_tva na_na asti_as atas_atas kāma--_kāma rāhityena_rāhitya eva_eva karmāṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhyā_śuddhi jñāna--_jñāna adhikārī_adhikārin bhaviṣyasi_bhū iti_iti yāvat_yāvat adhyāya--_adhyāya samāpti_samāpti vadiṣyati_vad bhagavān_bhagavant

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha atra_atra uttaram_uttara yadi_yadi mayā_mad paraspara--_paraspara nirapekṣau_nirapekṣa eva_eva mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhana--_sādhana tvena_tva karma--_karman yoga--_yoga jñāna--_jñāna yogau_yoga uktau_vac syātām_as tadā_tadā tat_tad ekam_eka vada_vad niścitya_niści iti_iti tvad--_tvad praśnaḥ_praśna ghaṭate_ghaṭ mayā_mad tu_tu karma--_karman anuṣṭhā--_anuṣṭhā jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhāvat--_niṣṭhāvat tvena_tva yat_yad dvaividhyam_dvaividhya uktam_vac tat_tad khalu_khalu pūrva--_pūrva uttara--_uttara daśā--_daśā bhedāt_bheda eva_eva na_na tu_tu vastutas_vastutas mokṣam_mokṣa prati_prati adhikāri--_adhikārin dvaidham_dvaidha iti_iti āha_ah loke_loka iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi dvividhā_dvividha dvi--_dvi prakārā_prakāra niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā nitarām_nitarām sthiti--_sthiti maryādā_maryādā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha proktā_pravac pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya kathitā_kathay tām_tad eva_eva āha_ah sāṅkhyānām_sāṃkhya sāṅkham_sāṅkha jñānam_jñāna tad--_tad vatām_vat teṣām_tad śuddha--_śudh antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa tvena_tva jñāna--_jñāna bhūmikām_bhūmikā adhirūḍhānām_adhiruh jñāna--_jñāna yogena_yoga eva_eva niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā tena_tad eva_eva maryādā_maryādā sthāpitā_sthāpay atra_atra loke_loka tu_tu jñāni--_jñānin tvena_tva eva_eva khyāpitāḥ_khyāpay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva saṃyamya_saṃyam yuktaḥ_yuj āsīta_ās mad--_mad paraḥ_para iti_iti ādinā_ādi tathā_tathā śuddha--_śuddha antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa tva--_tva abhāvena_abhāva jñāna--_jñāna bhūmikām_bhūmikā adhiroḍhum_adhiruh asamarthānām_asamartha yoginām_yogin tad--_tad ārohaṇa--_ārohaṇa artham_artha upāyavatām_upāyavat karma--_karman yogena_yoga mad--_mad arpita--_arpay niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā maryādā_maryādā sthāpitā_sthāpay te_tad khalu_khalu karmi--_karmin tvena_tva eva_eva khyāpitā_khyāpay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dharmyāt_dharmya hi_hi yuddhāt_yuddha śreyaḥ_śreyas anyat_anya kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya na_na vidyate_vid iti_iti ādinā_ādi karmiṇaḥ_karmin jñāninaḥ_jñānin nāma--_nāman mātreṇa_mātra dvaividhyam_dvaividhya tu_tu karmiṇaḥ_karmin eva_eva karmibhiḥ_karmin śuddha--_śudh cittāḥ_citta jñāninaḥ_jñānin bhavanti_bhū jñāninaḥ_jñānin eva_eva bhaktyā_bhakti mucyante_muc iti_iti mad--_mad vākya--_vākya samudāya--_samudāya arthaḥ_artha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

jñāninaḥ_jñānin eva_eva bhaktyā_bhakti mucyante_muc iti_iti mad--_mad vākya--_vākya samudāya--_samudāya arthaḥ_artha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac loke_loka asmin_idam iti_iti he_he anagha_anagha nirmala--_nirmala buddhe_buddhi pārtha_pārtha jyāyasī_jyāyas ced_ced iti_iti karma--_karman buddhi--_buddhi sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya buddhyoḥ_buddhi guṇa--_guṇa pradhāna--_pradhāna bhāvam_bhāva jānan_jñā api_api tamaḥ--_tamas tejasoḥ_tejas iva_iva viruddhayoḥ_virudh tayoḥ_tad katham_katham eka--_eka adhikāri--_adhikārin tvam_tva iti_iti śaṅkayā_śaṅkā preritaḥ_preray asmin_idam mumukṣu--_mumukṣu tayā_tā abhimate_abhiman śuddha--_śuddha aśuddha--_aśuddha citta--_citta tayā_tā dvividhe_dvividha loke_loka jane_jana dvividhā_dvividha niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sthitiḥ_sthiti mayā_mad sarveśvareṇa_sarveśvara purā_purā pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya proktā_pravac niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā iti_iti eka--_eka vacanena_vacana eka--_eka ātma--_ātman uddeśya--_uddiś tvāt_tva ekā_eka eva_eva niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sādhya--_sādhya sādhana--_sādhana daśā--_daśā dvaya--_dvaya bhedena_bheda dvi--_dvi
