prakārā_prakāra na_na tu_tu dve_dvi niṣṭhe_niṣṭhā iti_iti sūcyate_sūcay evam_evam eva_eva agre_agra vakṣyati_vac ekam_eka sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya ca_ca yogam_yoga ca_ca iti_iti tām_tad niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā dvaividhyena_dvaividhya darśayati_darśay jñāna--_jñāna iti_iti sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya jñāna--_jñāna arha--_arha ādyac_ādyac tad--_tad vatām_vat jñāninām_jñānin jñāna--_jñāna yogena_yoga niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā sthitiḥ_sthiti uktā_vac prajahāti_prahā yadā_yadā kāmān_kāma iti_iti ādinā_ādi jñānam_jñāna eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga yujyate_yuj ātmanā_ātman anena_idam iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti yoginām_yogin niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmavatām_karmavat karma--_karman yogena_yoga niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sthitiḥ_sthiti uktā_vac karmaṇi_karman eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra te_tvad iti_iti ādinā_ādi karma_karman eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga yujyate_yuj jñāna--_jñāna garbhayā_garbha citta--_citta śuddha--_śuddha yānena_yāna iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti etat_etad uktam_vac bhavati_bhū na_na khalu_khalu mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu janaḥ_jana tadā_tadā eva_eva śama--_śama ādi--_ādi aṅgikām_aṅgika jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā labhate_labh kintu_kintu sa_sa ācāreṇa_ācāra karma--_karman yogena_yoga citta--_citta mālinyam_mālinya nirdhūya_nirdhū eva_eva iti_iti etat_etad eva_eva mayā_mad prāk_prāk abhāṇi_bhaṇ eṣā_etad te_tvad abhihitā_abhidhā sāṅkhye_sāṅkhya iti_iti ādinā_ādi
BhG 3.4

lg.l: na_na karmaṇām_karman anārambhāt_anārambha naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya puruṣaḥ_puruṣa aśnute_aś
na_na ca_ca saṃnyasanāt_saṃnyasana eva_eva siddhim_siddhi samadhigacchati_samadhigam

div.p: anyathā_anyathā citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi abhāvena_abhāva jñāna--_jñāna anutpatteḥ_anutpatti iti_iti āha_ah na_na karmaṇām_karman iti_iti karmaṇām_karman anārambhāt_anārambha ananuṣṭhānāt_ananuṣṭhāna naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya jñānam_jñāna na_na aśnute_aś na_na prāpnoti_prāp nanu_nanu ca_ca etam_etad eva_eva pravrājinaḥ_pravrājin lokam_loka icchantaḥ_iṣ pravrajanti_pravraj iti_iti śrutyā_śruti saṃnyāsasya_saṃnyāsa mokṣāt_mokṣa aṅga--_aṅga tva--_tva śruteḥ_śruti saṃnyasanāt_saṃnyasana eva_eva mokṣaḥ_mokṣa bhaviṣyati_bhū kim_ka karmabhiḥ_karman iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk uktam_vac na_na ca_ca iti_iti citta--_citta śuddhim_śuddhi vinā_vinā kṛtāt_kṛ saṃnyasanāt_saṃnyasana eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna śūnyāt_śūnya siddhim_siddhi mokṣam_mokṣa na_na samadhigacchati_samadhigam na_na prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatra_tatra kāraṇa--_kāraṇa abhāve_abhāva kārya--_kārya anupapatteḥ_anupapatti āha_ah na_na karmaṇām_karman iti_iti karmaṇā_karman tam_tad etam_etad veda--_veda anuvacanena_anuvacana brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vividiṣanti_vividiṣ yajñena_yajña dānena_dāna tapasā_tapas anāśakena_anāśaka iti_iti śrutyā_śruti ātma--_ātman jñāne_jñāna viniyuktānām_viniyuj anārambhāt_anārambha ananuṣṭhānāt_ananuṣṭhāna citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi abhāvena_abhāva jñāna--_jñāna ayogyaḥ_ayogya sarva--_sarva karma--_karman śūnyatvam_śūnyatva jñāna--_jñāna yogena_yoga niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā iti_iti yāvat_yāvat na_na aśnute_aś na_na prāpnoti_prāp

nanu_nanu etam_etad eva_eva pravrājinaḥ_pravrājin lokam_loka icchantaḥ_iṣ pravrajanti_pravraj iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā upapatteḥ_upapatti kṛtam_kṛ karmabhiḥ_karman iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah na_na ca_ca saṃnyasanāt_saṃnyasana eva_eva citta--_citta śuddhim_śuddhi vinā_vinā kṛtāt_kṛ samyak_samyak phala--_phala paryavasāyi--_paryavasāyin tvena_tva adhigacchati_adhigam na_na eva_eva prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha karma--_karman janyām_janya citta--_citta śuddhim_śuddhi antareṇa_antareṇa saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa eva_eva na_na sambhavati_sambhū yathā_yathā kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid autsukya--_autsukya mātreṇa_mātra kṛtaḥ_kṛ api_api na_na phala--_phala paryavasāyī_paryavasāyin iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi abhāve_abhāva jñāna--_jñāna anutpattim_anutpatti āha_ah na_na iti_iti śāstrīya--_śāstrīya karmaṇām_karman anārambhāt_anārambha ananuṣṭhānāt_ananuṣṭhāna naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya jñānam_jñāna na_na prāpnoti_prāp na_na ca_ca aśuddha--_aśuddha cittaḥ_citta saṃnyasanāt_saṃnyasana śāstrīya--_śāstrīya karma--_karman

baladevaḥ_baladeva atas_atas aśuddha--_aśuddha cittena_citta citta--_citta śuddheḥ_śuddhi sva--_sva vihitāni_vidhā karmāṇi_karman eva_eva anuṣṭheyāni_anuṣṭhā iti_iti āha_ah na_na karmaṇām_karman iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi trayodaśabhiḥ_trayodaśan karmaṇām_karman tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti vākyena_vākya jñāna--_jñāna aṅga--_aṅga tayā_tā vihitānām_vidhā anārambhāt_anārambha ananuṣṭhānāt_ananuṣṭhāna aviśuddha--_aviśuddha cittaḥ_citta puruṣaḥ_puruṣa naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya nikhila--_nikhila indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra rūpa--_rūpa karma--_karman viratim_virati jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā iti_iti yāvat_yāvat na_na ca_ca sa_tad teṣām_tad karmaṇām_karman saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa parityāgāt_parityāga siddhim_siddhi muktim_mukti samadhigacchati_samadhigam
BhG 3.5

lg.l: na_na hi_hi kaścid_kaścit kṣaṇam_kṣaṇa api_api jātu_jātu tiṣṭhati_sthā a_a karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt
kāryate_kāray hi_hi avaśaḥ_avaśa karma_karman sarvaḥ_sarva prakṛti--_prakṛti jaiḥ_ja guṇaiḥ_guṇa

div.p: na_na tu_tu svarūpeṇa_svarūpa aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva iti_iti āha_ah na_na hi_hi kaścid_kaścit iti_iti jātu_jātu kasyāṃcid_kaścit api_api avasthāyām_avasthā kṣaṇa--_kṣaṇa mātram_mātra api_api kaścid_kaścit api_api jñānī_jñānin ajñānaḥ_ajñāna vā_vā akarma--_akarman kṛt_kṛt karmāṇi_karman akurvāṇaḥ_akurvāṇa na_na tiṣṭhati_sthā atra_atra hetuḥ_hetu prakṛti--_prakṛti jaiḥ_ja svabhāva--_svabhāva prabhavaiḥ_prabhava rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādibhiḥ_ādi guṇaiḥ_guṇa sarvaḥ_sarva api_api janaḥ_jana karma_karman kāryate_kāray karmaṇi_karman pravartyate_pravartay avaśaḥ_avaśa a_a svatantraḥ_svatantra san_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatra_tatra karma--_karman janya--_jan śuddhi--_śuddhi abhāve_abhāva bahirmukhaḥ_bahirmukha hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt kṣaṇam_kṣaṇa api_api kālam_kāla jātu_jātu kadācid_kadācid kaścid_kaścit api_api ajita--_ajita indriyaḥ_indriya akarma--_akarman kṛt_kṛt san_as na_na tiṣṭhati_sthā api_api tu_tu laukika--_laukika vaidika--_vaidika karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna vyagraḥ_vyagra eva_eva tiṣṭhati_sthā tasmāt_tasmāt aśuddha--_aśuddha cittasya_citta saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa na_na sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

kasmāt_kasmāt punar_punar a_a vidvān_vid karmāṇi_karman a_a kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ na_na tiṣṭhati_sthā yasmāt_yad sarvaḥ_sarva prāṇī_prāṇin citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi rahitaḥ_rahita avaśaḥ_avaśa asvatantraḥ_asvatantra eva_eva san_as prakṛti--_prakṛti jaiḥ_ja prakṛtitaḥ_prakṛti jātaiḥ_jan abhivyaktaiḥ_abhivyañj kārya--_kārya ākāreṇa_ākāra sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamobhiḥ_tamas svabhāva--_svabhāva prabhavaiḥ_prabhava vā_vā rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādibhiḥ_ādi atas_atas karmāṇi_karman akurvāṇaḥ_akurvāṇa na_na kaścid_kaścit api_api tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yatas_yatas svābhāvikāḥ_svābhāvika guṇāḥ_guṇa ca_ca alakāḥ_alaka atas_atas para--_para vaśa--_vaśa tayā_tā sarvadā_sarvadā karmāṇi_karman kurvataḥ_kṛ aśuddha--_aśuddha buddheḥ_buddhi sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa na_na sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti na_na saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa nibandhanā_nibandhana jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kintu_kiṃtu aśuddha--_aśuddha cittaḥ_citta kṛta--_kṛ saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa śāstrīyam_śāstrīya karma_karman parityajya_parityaj vyavahārike_vyavahārika karmaṇi_karman nimajjati_nimajj iti_iti āha_ah na_na hi_hi iti_iti nanu_nanu saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa eva_eva tasya_tad vaidika--_vaidika laukika--_laukika karma--_karman pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti āha_ah kāryataḥ_kārya iti_iti avaśaḥ_avaśa a_a svatantraḥ_svatantra

baladevaḥ_baladeva nimajjati_nimajj āha_ah nanu_nanu saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa eva_eva tasya_tad sarva--_sarva karma--_karman virodhi_virodhin iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah kāryataḥ_kārya iti_iti prakṛti--_prakṛti jaiḥ_ja svabhāva--_svabhāva udbhavaiḥ_udbhava guṇaiḥ_guṇa rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādibhiḥ_ādi kāryate_kāray pravartyate_pravartay avaśaḥ_avaśa para--_para adhīnaḥ_adhīna syāt_as
BhG 3.6

lg.l: karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya saṃyamya_saṃyam yaḥ_yad āste_ās manasā_manas smaran_smṛ
indriya--_indriya arthān_artha vimūḍha--_vimuh ātmā_ātman mithyā_mithyā ācāraḥ_ācāra saḥ_tad ucyate_vac

div.p: nindati_nind vāc--_vāc pāṇi--_pāṇi ādīni_ādi karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya saṃyamya_saṃyam bhagavat--_bhagavant dhyāna--_dhyāna chalena_chala indriya--_indriya arthān_artha viṣayān_viṣaya smaran_smṛ āste_ās aviśuddha--_aviśuddha tayā_tā manasā_manas ātmani_ātman sthairya--_sthairya abhāvāt_abhāva sa_tad mithyā_mithyā ācāraḥ_ācāra kapaṭa--_kapaṭa ācāraḥ_ācāra dāmbhikaḥ_dāmbhika ucyate_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yathā_yathā kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid autsukya--_autsukya mātreṇa_mātra kṛta--_kṛ saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa tu_tu aśuddha--_aśuddha cittaḥ_citta tad--_tad phala--_phala bhāj_bhāj na_na bhavati_bhū yatas_yatas yaḥ_yad vimūḍha--_vimuh ātmā_ātman rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi dūṣita--_dūṣay antaḥkaraṇaḥ_antaḥkaraṇa autsukya--_autsukya mātreṇa_mātra karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya vāc--_vāc pāṇi--_pāṇi ādīni_ādi saṃyamya_saṃyam nigṛhya_nigrah bahis_bahis indriyaiḥ_indriya karmāṇi_karman akurvan_kṛ iti_iti yāvat_yāvat manasā_manas rāga--_rāga ādi--_ādi prerita--_preray indriya--_indriya arthān_artha śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi na_na tu_tu ātma--_ātman tattvam_tattva smaran_smṛ āste_ās kṛta--_kṛ saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa aham_mad iti_iti abhimānena_abhimāna karma--_karman śūnyaḥ_śūnya tiṣṭhati_sthā sa_tad mithyā_mithyā ācāraḥ_ācāra sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi abhāvena_abhāva phala--_phala

lg.l: tvam_tvad padārtha--_padārtha vivekāya_viveka saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman
śrutyā_śruti iha_iha vihitaḥ_vidhā yasmāt_yasmāt tad--_tad tyāgī_tyāgin patitaḥ_pat bhavet_bhū

div.p: iti_iti ādi--_ādi dharma--_dharma śāstreṇa_śāstra atas_atas upapannam_upapad na_na ca_ca saṃnyasanāt_saṃnyasana eva_eva aśuddha--_aśuddha antaḥ_anta karaṇaḥ_karaṇa siddhim_siddhi samadhigacchati_samadhigam iti_iti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nanu_nanu tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa api_api sannyāsī_saṃnyāsin kaścid_kaścit kaścid_kaścit indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra śūnyaḥ_śūnya mudrita--_mudray akṣaḥ_akṣa dṛśyate_dṛś tatra_tatra āha_ah karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya vāc--_vāc pāṇi--_pāṇi ādīni_ādi nigṛhya_nigrah yaḥ_yad manasā_manas dhyāna--_dhyāna chalena_chala viṣayān_viṣaya smaran_smṛ āste_ās sa_tad mithyā_mithyā ācāraḥ_ācāra dāmbhikaḥ_dāmbhika

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu rāga--_rāga di--_di vyāpāra--_vyāpāra śūnyaḥ_śūnya mudrita--_mudray śrotra--_śrotra ādiḥ_ādi kaścid_kaścit kaścid_kaścit yadi_yadi dṛśyate_dṛś tatra_tatra āha_ah karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya iti_iti yaḥ_yad yatiḥ_yati karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya vāc--_vāc ādīni_ādi saṃyamya_saṃyam manasā_manas dhyāna--_dhyāna chadmanā_chadman indriyārthān_indriyārtha śabda--_śabda sparśa--_sparśa ādīn_ādi smaran_smṛ āste_ās sa_tad vimūḍha--_vimuh ātmā_ātman mūrkhaḥ_mūrkha mithyā_mithyā ācāraḥ_ācāra kathyate_kathay sa_tad ca_ca niruddha--_nirudh rāga--_rāga ādeḥ_ādi ajñasya_ajña niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman anuṣṭhānena_anuṣṭhāna manaḥ--_manas śuddheḥ_śuddhi anudayāt_anudaya śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi aprasāre_aprasāra api_api aśuddha--_aśuddha tvāt_tva manasā_manas tad--_tad viṣayāṇām_viṣaya sma_sma raṇāt_raṇa jñānāya_jñāna udyatasya_udyam api_api tasya_tad jñāna--_jñāna dāmbhikaḥ_dāmbhika iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 3.7

yaḥ_yad tu_tu indriyāṇi_indriya manasā_manas niyamya_niyam ārabhate_ārabh arjuna_arjuna
karmendriyaiḥ_karmendriya karma--_karman yogam_yoga asaktaḥ_asakta sa_tad viśiṣyate_viśiṣ

āha_ah yaḥ_yad tu_tu indriyāṇi_indriya manasā_manas niyamyaḥ_niyam īśvara--_īśvara parāṇi_para kṛtvā_kṛ karmendriyaiḥ_karmendriya karma--_karman rūpam_rūpa yogam_yoga upāyam_upāya ārabhate_ārabh anutiṣṭhati_anuṣṭhā asaktaḥ_asakta phala--_phala abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa rahitaḥ_rahita san_as sa_tad viśiṣyate_viśiṣ viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ bhavati_bhū citta--_citta śuddhyā_śuddhi jñānavān_jñānavat bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana autsukya--_autsukya mātreṇa_mātra sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman a_a saṃnyasya_saṃnyas citta--_citta śuddhaye_śuddhi niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmāṇi_karman eva_eva yathā_yathā śāstram_śāstra kuryāt_kṛ tasmāt_tasmāt yaḥ_yad tu_tu iti_iti tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda aśuddha--_aśuddha antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa saṃnyāsi--_saṃnyāsin vyatireka--_vyatireka arthaḥ_artha indriyāṇi_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi manasā_manas saha_saha niyamya_niyam pāpa--_pāpa hetu--_hetu śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya āsakteḥ_āsakti nivartya_nivartay manasā_manas viveka--_viveka yuktena_yuj niyamya_niyam iti_iti vā_vā karmendriyaiḥ_karmendriya vāc--_vāc pāṇi--_pāṇi ādibhiḥ_ādi karma--_karman yogam_yoga śuddhi--_śuddhi hetutayā_hetutā vihitam_vidhā karma_karman ārabhate_ārabh karoti_kṛ asaktaḥ_asakta phala--_phala abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa śūnyaḥ_śūnya san_as yaḥ_yad vivekī_vivekin saḥ_tad itarasmāt_itara mithyā_mithyā ācārāt_ācāra viśiṣyate_viśiṣ pariśrama--_pariśrama sāmye_sāmya api_api phala--_phala atiśaya--_atiśaya bhāktvena_bhāktva śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha bhavati_bhū he_he arjuna_arjuna āścaryam_āścarya idam_idam paśya_paś yat_yat ekaḥ_eka karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya nigṛhṇan_nigrah jñāna--_jñāna indriyāṇi_indriya vyāpārayan_vyāpāray puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha śūnyaḥ_śūnya
aparaḥ_apara tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna indriyāṇi_indriya nigṛhya_nigrah karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya vyāpārayan_vyāpāray parama--_parama puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha bhāj_bhāj bhavati_bhū iti_iti

āha_ah karma--_karman yogam_yoga śāstra--_śāstra vihitam_vidhā asaktaḥ_asakta a_a phala--_phala ākāṅkṣī_ākāṅkṣin viśiṣyate_viśiṣ asambhāvita--_asambhāvita prasādi--_prasādin tvena_tva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhāt_niṣṭhā api_api puruṣāt_puruṣa viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ iti_iti śrī--_śrī rāmānuja--_rāmānuja ācārya--_ācārya caraṇāḥ_caraṇa

baladevaḥ_baladeva etad--_etad vaiparītyena_vaiparītya sva--_sva vihita--_vidhā karma--_karman kartā_kartṛ gṛhasthaḥ_gṛhastha api_api śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha iti_iti āha_ah yaḥ_yad tu_tu iti_iti ātma--_ātman anubhava--_anubhava pravṛttena_pravṛt manasā_manas indriyāṇi_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi niyamya_niyam āsaktaḥ_āsañj phala--_phala abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa śūnyaḥ_śūnya san_as yaḥ_yad karmendriyaiḥ_karmendriya karma--_karman rūpam_rūpa yogam_yoga upāyam_upāya ārabhate_ārabh anutiṣṭhati_anuṣṭhā sa_tad viśiṣyate_viśiṣ sambhāvyamāna--_sambhāvay jñāna--_jñāna tvāt_tva pūrvatas_pūrvatas śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 3.8

lg.l: niyatam_niyam kuru_kṛ karma_karman tvam_tvad karma_karman jyāyaḥ_jyāyas hi_hi akarmaṇaḥ_akarman
śarīra--_śarīra yātrā_yātrā api_api ca_ca te_tvad na_na prasidhyet_prasidh a_a karmaṇaḥ_karman

div.p: yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt niyatam_niyam nityam_nityam karma_karman sandhyā--_saṃdhyā upāsana--_upāsana ādi_ādi kuru_kṛ yasmāt_yad sarva--_sarva karmaṇaḥ_karman akaraṇāt_akaraṇa sakāśāt_sakāśāt karma--_karman karaṇam_karaṇa jyāyaḥ_jyāyas adhikataram_adhikatara anyathā_anyathā karmaṇaḥ_karman sarva--_sarva karma--_karman śūnyasya_śūnya tava_tvad śarīra--_śarīra yātrā_yātrā śarīra--_śarīra nirvāhaḥ_nirvāha api_api na_na prasidhyet_prasidh na_na bhavet_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt manasā_manas jñāna--_jñāna indriyāṇi_indriya nigṛhya_nigrah karmendriyaiḥ_karmendriya tvam_tvad prāk_prāk ananuṣṭhita--_ananuṣṭhita śuddhi--_śuddhi hetu--_hetu karmā_karman niyatam_niyam vidhi--_vidhi uddeśe_uddeśa phala--_phala sambandha--_sambandha śūnyatayā_śūnyatā niyata--_niyam nimittena_nimitta vihitam_vidhā karma_karman iti_iti prasiddham_prasidh kuru_kṛ kuru_kṛ iti_iti madhyama--_madhyama puruṣa--_puruṣa prayogeṇa_prayoga eva_eva tvam_tvad iti_iti labdhe_labh tvam_tvad iti_iti padam_pada artha--_artha antare_antara saṃkramitam_saṃkramay

kasmāt_kasmāt aśuddha--_aśuddha antar_antar karaṇena_karaṇa karma_karman eva_eva kartavyam_kṛ hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt akarmaṇaḥ_akarman akaraṇāt_akaraṇa karma_karman eva_eva jyāyaḥ_jyāyas praśasyataram_praśasyatara na_na kevalam_kevala karma--_karman abhāve_abhāva tava_tvad antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhiḥ_śuddhi eva_eva na_na sidhyet_sidh kintu_kiṃtu akarmaṇaḥ_akarman yuddha--_yuddha ādi--_ādi karma--_karman rahitasya_rahita te_tvad tava_tvad śarīra--_śarīra yātrā_yātrā śarīra--_śarīra sthitiḥ_sthiti api_api na_na prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa kṣātra--_kṣātra vṛtti--_vṛtti kṛtatva--_kṛtatva lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa sidhyet_sidh tathā_tathā ca_ca prāk_prāk uktam_vac api_api ca_ca iti_iti antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha
sidhyet_sidh

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_niyatam iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad aviśuddha--_aviśuddha cittaḥ_citta niyatam_niyatam āvaśyaka--_āvaśyaka karam_kara kuru_kṛ citta--_citta viśuddhaye_viśuddhi niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tayā_tā sva--_sva vihitam_vidhā karma_karman ācara_ācar iti_iti arthaḥ_artha akarmaṇam_akarman autsukya--_autsukya mātreṇa_mātra sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa sakāśāt_sakāśa karma_karman eva_eva jyāyaḥ_jyāyas praśastataram_praśastatara krama--_krama sopāna--_sopāna nyāyena_nyāya jñāna--_jñāna utpādaka--_utpādaka tvāt_tva autsukya--_autsukya mātreṇa_mātra karma_karman tyajatoḥ_tyaj maline_malina hṛdi_hṛd jñāna--_jñāna prakāśāt_prakāśa kim_ka ca_ca akarmaṇaḥ_akarman saṃnyasta--_saṃnyas sarva--_sarva karmaṇaḥ_karman tava_tvad śarīra--_śarīra yātrā_yātrā deha--_deha nirvāhaḥ_nirvāha api_api na_na sidhyet_sidh yāvat_yāvat sādhana--_sādhana pūrti--_pūrti deha--_deha dhāraṇasya_dhāraṇa āvaśyaka--_āvaśyaka tvāt_tva tad--_tad artham_artha jñānī_jñānin bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aṭana--_aṭana ādi--_ādi karma_karman anutiṣṭhati_anuṣṭhā tat_tad ca_ca kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya tava_tvad anucitam_anucita tasmāt_tasmāt sva--_sva vihitena_vidhā yuddha--_yuddha prajā--_prajā pālana--_pālana ādi--_ādi karmaṇā_karman śulkāni_śulka vittāni_vitta upārjya_upārjay taiḥ_tad nirvyūha--_nirvyūha deha--_deha yātraḥ_yātrā sva--_sva ātmānam_ātman anusandhehi_anusaṃdhā iti_iti
BhG 3.9

lg.l: yajña--_yajña arthāt_artha karmaṇaḥ_karman anyatra_anyatra lokaḥ_loka ayam_idam karma--_karman bandhanaḥ_bandhana
tad--_tad artham_artha karma_karman kaunteya_kaunteya mukta--_muc saṅgaḥ_saṅga samācara_samācar

div.p: āhuḥ_ah tat_tad nirākurvan_nirākṛ āha_ah yajña--_yajña arthāt_artha iti_iti yajñaḥ_yajña atra_atra viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu yajñaḥ_yajña vai_vai viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tad--_tad ārādhana--_ārādhana arthāt_artha karmaṇaḥ_karman nyatra_nyatra tat_tad ekam_eka lokaḥ_loka ayam_idam karma--_karman bandhanaḥ_bandhana karmabhiḥ_karman vadhyate_vadh na_na tu_tu īśvara--_īśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana arthena_artha karmaṇā_karman atas_atas tad--_tad artham_artha viṣṇu--_viṣṇu prīti--_prīti artham_artha mukta--_muc saṅgaḥ_saṅga niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma san_as karma_karman samyak_samyak ācara_ācar

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana karmaṇā_karman badhyate_bandh jantuḥ_jantu iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti sarvam_sarva karma_karman bandha--_bandha ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva mumukṣuṇā_mumukṣu na_na kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti matvā_man tasya_tad uttaram_uttara āha_ah yajña--_yajña arthāt_artha iti_iti yajñaḥ_yajña parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara yajñaḥ_yajña vai_vai viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tad--_tad ārādhana--_ārādhana artham_artha yat_yad kriyate_kṛ karma_karman tad--_tad yajña--_yajña artham_artha tasmāt_tad karmaṇaḥ_karman anyatra_anyatra karmaṇi_karman pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt ayam_idam lokaḥ_loka karma--_karman adhikārī_adhikārin karma--_karman bandhanaḥ_bandhana karmaṇā_karman badhyate_bandh na_na tu_tu īśvara--_īśvara ārādhna--_ārādhna arthena_artha atas_atas tad--_tad artham_artha yajña--_yajña artham_artha karma_karman he_he kaunteya_kaunteya tvam_tvad karmaṇi_karman adhikṛtaḥ_adhikṛ mukta--_muc saṅgaḥ_saṅga san_as samācara_samācar samyak_samyak śraddhā--_śraddhā ādi--_ādi puraḥsaram_puraḥsara ācara_ācar

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha karmaṇā_karman badhyate_bandh jantuḥ_jantu smṛteḥ_smṛti karmaṇi_karman kṛte_kṛ bandhaḥ_bandha syāt_as iti_iti ced_ced na_na parameśvara--_parameśvara arpitam_arpay karma_karman na_na bandhakam_bandhaka iti_iti āha_ah yajña--_yajña arthāt_artha iti_iti viṣṇu--_viṣṇu arpitaḥ_arpay niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma dharmaḥ_dharma eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña ucyate_vac yad--_yad artham_artha yat_yad karma_karman tatas_tatas anyatra_anyatra eva_eva ayam_idam lokaḥ_loka karma--_karman bandhanaḥ_bandhana karmaṇā_karman badhyamānaḥ_bandh bhavati_bhū tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad tad--_tad artham_artha tādṛśa--_tādṛśa dharma--_dharma siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha karma_karman samācara_samācar

nanu_nanu viṣṇu--_viṣṇu arpitaḥ_arpay api_api dharmaḥ_dharma kāmanām_kāmanā uddiśya_uddiś kṛtaḥ_kṛ ced_ced bandhakaḥ_bandhaka bhavati_bhū eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah mukta--_muc saṅgaḥ_saṅga phala--_phala ākāṅkṣā--_ākāṅkṣā rahitaḥ_rahita evam_evam eva_eva uddhavam_uddhava prati_prati api_api śrī--_śrī bhagavatā_bhagavant uktam_vac

lg.l: sva--_sva dharma--_dharma sthaḥ_stha yajan_yaj yajñaiḥ_yajña
anāśīḥ_anāśī kāmaḥ_kāma uddhava_uddhava
yāti_yā svarga--_svarga narakau_naraka
yadi_yadi anyat_anya na_na samācaret_samācar

div.p: asmin_idam loke_loka vartamānaḥ_vṛt sva--_sva dharma--_dharma sthaḥ_stha anaghaḥ_anagha śuciḥ_śuci jñānam_jñāna viśuddham_viśudh āpnoti_āp mad--_mad bhaktim_bhakti vā_vā yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu karmaṇi_karman kṛte_kṛ bandhaḥ_bandha bhavet_bhū karmaṇā_karman badhyate_bandh jantuḥ_jantu iti_iti ādi--_ādi smaraṇāt_smaraṇa ca_ca iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah yajña--_yajña arthāt_artha iti_iti yajñaḥ_yajña parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara yajñaḥ_yajña vai_vai viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tad--_tad arthāt_artha tad--_tad toṣa--_toṣa phalāt_phala karmaṇaḥ_karman anyatra_anyatra sva--_sva sukha--_sukha phalaka--_phalaka karmaṇi_karman kriyamāṇe_kṛ ayam_idam lokaḥ_loka prāṇī_prāṇin karma--_karman bandhanaḥ_bandhana karmaṇā_karman badhyate_bandh tasmāt_tasmāt tad--_tad artham_artha viṣṇu--_viṣṇu toṣa--_toṣa artham_artha karma_karman samācara_samācar he_he kaunteya_kaunteya mukta--_muc saṅgaḥ_saṅga tyakta--_tyaj sukha--_sukha abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa san_as nyāya--_nyāya upārjita--_upārjay dravya--_dravya siddhena_sidh yajña--_yajña ādinā_ādi viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu ārādhya_ārādhay tad--_tad śeṣeṇa_śeṣa deha--_deha yātrām_yātrā kurvan_kṛ na_na badhyate_bandh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 3.10

lg.l: yajñāḥ_yajña prajāḥ_prajā sṛṣṭvā_sṛj uvāca_vac prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati
anena_idam prasaviṣyadhvam_prasū eṣa_etad vaḥ_tvad astu_as iṣṭa--_iṣ kāma--_kāma duh_duh

div.p: āha_ah vartante_vṛt sahayajñāḥ_sahayajña yajña--_yajña adhikṛtāḥ_adhikṛ brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādi--_ādi prajāḥ_prajā sarga--_sarga ādau_ādi sṛṣṭvā_sṛj idam_idam uvāca_vac brahmā_brahman anena_idam yajñena_yajña prasaviṣyadhvam_prasū prasavaḥ_prasava hi_hi vṛddhiḥ_vṛddhi uttara--_uttara uttara--_uttara abhivṛddhim_abhivṛddhi labhadhvam_labh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu eṣa_etad yajñaḥ_yajña vaḥ_tvad yuṣmākam_tvad iṣṭa--_yaj kāma--_kāma duh_duh iṣṭān_yaj dogdhi_duh iti_iti tathā_tathā abhīṣṭa--_abhīṣ bhoga--_bhoga pradaḥ_prada astu_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra ca_ca yajña--_yajña grahaṇam_grahaṇa āvaśyaka--_āvaśyaka karma--_karman upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa artham_artha kāmya--_kāmya karma--_karman praśaṃsā_praśaṃsā tu_tu prakaraṇe_prakaraṇa asaṅga--_asaṅga tā_tā api_api sāmānyatas_sāmānyatas akarmaṇaḥ_akarman karma_karman śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha iti_iti etat_etad artham_artha iti_iti adoṣaḥ_adoṣa

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana prajāpati--_prajāpati vacanāt_vacana api_api adhikṛtena_adhikṛ karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah sahayajñāḥ_sahayajña ityādi--_ityādi caturbhiḥ_catur yajñena_yajña vihita--_vidhā karma--_karman kalāpena_kalāpa vartante_vṛt sahayajñā_sahayajña samādhikṛtāḥ_samādhikṛ vā_vā upasarjanasya_upasarjana iti_iti pakṣe_pakṣa sādeśa--_sādeśa abhāvaḥ_abhāva prajāḥ_prajā trīn_tri varṇān_varṇa purā_purā kalpa--_kalpa ādau_ādi sṛṣṭvā_sṛj uvāca_vac prajānām_prajā patiḥ_pati sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ kim_ka uvāca_vac iti_iti āha_ah --anena_idam yajñena_yajña sva--_sva āśrama--_āśrama ucita--_ucita dharmeṇa_dharma prasaviṣyadhvam_prasū prasūyadhvam_prasū prasavaḥ_prasava vṛddhiḥ_vṛddhi uttarottarām_uttarottara abhivṛddhim_abhivṛddhi labhadhvam_labh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha katham_katham anena_idam vṛddhiḥ_vṛddhi syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah eṣa_etad yajña--_yajña ākhyaḥ_ākhyā dharmaḥ_dharma vaḥ_tvad yuṣmākam_tvad iṣṭa--_iṣ kāma--_kāma duh_duh iṣṭān_yaj abhimatān_abhiman kāmān_kāma kāmyāni_kāmay phalāni_phala dogdhi_duh prāpayati_prāpay iti_iti tathā_tathā abhīṣṭa--_abhīṣ bhoga--_bhoga pradaḥ_prada astu_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

atra_atra yadi_yadi api_api yajña--_yajña grahaṇam_grahaṇa āvaśyaka--_āvaśyaka karma--_karman upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa artham_artha akaraṇe_akaraṇa pratyavāyasya_pratyavāya agre_agra kathanāt_kathana kāmya--_kāmya karmaṇām_karman ca_ca prakṛte_prakṛta prastāvaḥ_prastāva na_na asti_as eva_eva mā_mā karma--_karman phala--_phala hetuḥ_hetu bhūḥ_bhū iti_iti anena_idam nirākṛta--_nirākṛ tvāt_tva tathā_tathā āi_āi nitya--_nitya karmaṇām_karman ānuṣaṅgika--_ānuṣaṅgika phala--_phala sadbhāvāt_sadbhāva eṣa_etad vaḥ_tvad astu_as iṣṭa--_iṣ kāma--_kāma duh_duh iti_iti upapadyate_upapad tathā_tathā ca_ca āpastambaḥ_āpastamba smarati_smṛ tat_tad yathā_yathā āmre_āmra phala--_phala arthe_artha nimitte_nimitta chāyā--_chāyā gandhau_gandha anūtpadyete_anūtpad evam_evam dharmam_dharma caryamāṇam_car arthāḥ_artha anūtpadyante_anūtpad na_na u_u ced_ced anūtpadyante_anūtpad na_na dharma--_dharma hāniḥ_hāni bhavati_bhū iti_iti phala--_phala sat--_as bhāve_bhāva api_api tad--_tad abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi anabhisandhibhyām_anabhisaṃdhi kāmya--_kāmya nityayoḥ_nitya viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa anabhisaṃhitasya_anabhisaṃhita api_api vastu--_vastu svabhāvāt_svabhāva utpattau_utpatti na_na viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa vistareṇa_vistara ca_ca agre_agra pratipādayiṣyate_pratipāday

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tat_tad eva_eva aśuddha--_aśuddha cittau_citti niṣkāmam_niṣkāma karma_karman eva_eva kuryāt_kṛ na_na tu_tu sannyāsam_saṃnyāsa iti_iti uktam_vac idānīm_idānīm yadi_yadi ca_ca niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma api_api bhavitum_bhū na_na śaknuyāt_śak tadā_tadā sa_sa kāmam_kāma api_api dharmam_dharma viṣṇu--_viṣṇu arpitam_arpay kuryāt_kṛ na_na tu_tu karma--_karman tyāgam_tyāga iti_iti āha_ah saha_saha iti_iti saptabhiḥ_saptan yajñena_yajña sahitāḥ_sahita saha_saha yajñāḥ_yajña vā_vā upasarjanasya_upasarjana iti_iti sahasya_saha ādeśa--_ādeśa abhāvaḥ_abhāva purā_purā viṣṇu--_viṣṇu arpita--_arpay dharma--_dharma kāriṇīḥ_kārin prajāḥ_prajā sṛṣṭvā_sṛj brahmā_brahman uvāca_vac anena_idam dharmeṇa_dharma prasaviṣyadhvam_prasū prasavaḥ_prasava vṛddhiḥ_vṛddhi uttarottaram_uttarottara ativṛddhim_ativṛddhi labhadhvam_labh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tāsām_tad sa_sa kāma--_kāma tvam_tva abhilakṣya_abhilakṣ āha_ah eṣa_etad yajñaḥ_yajña vaḥ_tvad iṣṭa--_yaj kāma--_kāma duh_duh abhīṣṭa--_abhīṣ bhoga--_bhoga pradaḥ_prada
astu_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva a_a yajña--_yajña śeṣeṇa_śeṣa deha--_deha yātrām_yātrā kurvataḥ_kṛ doṣam_doṣa āha_ah saha_saha iti_iti prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati sarva--_sarva īśvaraḥ_īśvara viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu patim_pati viśvasya_viśva ātma--_ātman īśvaram_īśvara iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti brahma_brahman prajānām_prajā patiḥ_pati acyutaḥ_acyuta asau_adas iti_iti ādi--_ādi smaraṇāt_smaraṇa ca_ca purā_purā ādi--_ādi sarge_sarga saha_saha yajñāḥ_yajña yajñaiḥ_yajña sahitāḥ_sahita deva--_deva mānava--_mānava ādi--_ādi rūpāḥ_rūpa prajāḥ_prajā sṛṣṭvā_sṛj nāma--_nāman rūpa--_rūpa vibhāga--_vibhāga śūnyāḥ_śūnya prakṛti--_prakṛti śaktike_śaktika svasmin_sva vilīnāḥ_vilī puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha ayogyāḥ_ayogya tāḥ_tad tad--_tad sampādaka--_sampādaka nāma_nāman prakāśya_prakāśay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tāḥ_tad prati_prati idam_idam uvāca_vac kāruṇikaḥ_kāruṇika anena_idam veda--_veda uktena_vac mad--_mad arpitena_arpay yajñena_yajña yūyam_tvad prasaviṣyadhvam_prasū prasavaḥ_prasava vṛddhiḥ_vṛddhi sva--_sva vṛddhim_vṛddhi bhajadhvam_bhaj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha eṣa_etad mad--_mad arpitaḥ_arpay yajñaḥ_yajña vaḥ_tvad yuṣmākam_tvad iṣṭa--_iṣ kāma--_kāma dhuk_duh hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhi--_viśuddhi ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna deha--_deha yātrā--_yātrā sampādana--_sampādana dvārā_dvār vāñchita--_vāñch mokṣa--_mokṣa pradaḥ_prada astu_as
BhG 3.11

lg.l: devān_deva bhāvayata_bhāvay anena_idam te_tad devāḥ_deva bhāvayantu_bhāvay vaḥ_tvad
parasparam_paraspara bhāvayantaḥ_bhāvay śreyaḥ_śreyas param_para avāpsyatha_avāp

div.p: bhavet_bhū āha_ah anena_idam yajñena_yajña devān_deva bhāvayata_bhāvay haviḥ_havis bhāgaiḥ_bhāga saṃvardhayata_saṃvardhay te_tad ca_ca devāḥ_deva vaḥ_tvad yuṣmān_tvad saṃvardhayantu_saṃvardhay vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi ādinā_ādi anna--_anna utpatti--_utpatti dvāreṇa_dvāra evam_evam anyonyam_anyonya saṃvardhayantaḥ_saṃvardhay devāḥ_deva ca_ca yūyam_tvad ca_ca parasparam_paraspara śreyaḥ_śreyas abhīṣṇam_abhīṣṇa artham_artha avāpsyatha_avāp prāpsyatha_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana katham_katham iṣṭa--_yaj kāma--_kāma dogdhṛ--_dogdhṛ tvam_tva yajñasya_yajña iti_iti tat_tad āha_ah devān_deva iti_iti anena_idam yajñena_yajña yūyam_tvad yajamānāḥ_yaj devān_deva indra--_indra ādīn_ādi bhāvayata_bhāvay haviḥ--_havis bhogaiḥ_bhoga saṃvardhayata_saṃvardhay tarpayata_tarpay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha te_tad devāḥ_deva yuṣmābhiḥ_tvad bhāvitāḥ_bhāvay santaḥ_as vaḥ_tvad yuṣmān_tvad bhāvayantu_bhāvay vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi ādinā_ādi anna--_anna utpatti--_utpatti dvāreṇa_dvāra saṃvardhayantu_saṃvardhay evam_evam anyonyam_anyonya saṃvardhayantaḥ_saṃvardhay devāḥ_deva ca_ca yūyam_tvad ca_ca varam_vara śreyaḥ_śreyas abhimatam_abhiman artham_artha prāpsyatha_prāp devāḥ_deva tṛptim_tṛpti prāpsyanti_prāp yūyam_tvad ca_ca svarga--_svarga ākhyam_ākhyā param_para śreyaḥ_śreyas prāpsyatha_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
bhavet_bhū āha_ah bhāvayata_bhāvay kuruta_kṛ kuruta_kṛ prīṇayatu_prīṇay

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_idam ca_ca prajāḥ_prajā prayuktāḥ_prayuj anena_idam yajñena_yajña mad--_mad aṅga--_aṅga bhūta--_bhū a_a nindā--_nindā ādīn_ādi bhāvayata_bhāvay tad--_tad tad--_tad haviḥ--_havis dānena_dāna prītān_prī yūyam_tvad kuruta_kṛ te_tad devāḥ_deva vaḥ_tvad yuṣmān_tvad tad--_tad vara--_vara dānena_dāna bhāvayantu_bhāvay prītān_prī kurvantu_kṛ ittham_ittham śuddha--_śudh āhāreṇa_āhāra mithas_mithas te_tad yūyam_tvad param_para mokṣa--_mokṣa lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa śreyaḥ_śreyas prāpsyathaḥ_prāp tatra_tatra āhāra--_āhāra śuddhiḥ_śuddhi hi_hi jñāna--_jñāna nisṭhā--_nisṭhā aṅgam_aṅga tatra_tatra āhāra--_āhāra śuddhau_śuddhi sattva--_sattva śuddhiḥ_śuddhi sattva--_sattva śuddhau_śuddhi dhruvā_dhruva smṛtiḥ_smṛti vipramokṣaḥ_vipramokṣa śruteḥ_śruti
BhG 3.12

lg.l: iṣṭān_yaj bhogān_bhoga hi_hi vaḥ_tvad devāḥ_deva dāsyante_dā yajña--_yajña bhāvitāḥ_bhāvay
taiḥ_tad dattān_dā a_a pradāya_pradā ebhyaḥ_idam yaḥ_yad bhuṅkte_bhuj stenaḥ_stena eva_eva saḥ_tad

div.p: āha_ah yajñaiḥ_yajña bhāvitāḥ_bhāvay santaḥ_as devāḥ_deva vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi dvāreṇa_dvāra vaḥ_tvad yuṣmabhyam_tvad bhogān_bhoga dāsyante_dā hi_hi atas_atas devaiḥ_deva dattān_dā anna--_anna ādīn_ādi ebhyaḥ_idam devebhyaḥ_deva pañca--_pañcan yajña--_yajña ādibhiḥ_ādi a_a dattvā_dā yaḥ_yad bhuṅkte_bhuj sa_tad stenaḥ_stena cauraḥ_caura eva_eva jñeyaḥ_jñā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana na_na kevalam_kevala pāratrikam_pāratrika eva_eva phalam_phala yajñāt_yajña kintu_kiṃtu aihikam_aihika api_api iti_iti āha_ah iṣṭān_yaj iti_iti abhilaṣitān_abhilaṣ bhogān_bhoga paśu--_paśu anna--_anna hiraṇya--_hiraṇya ādīn_ādi vaḥ_tvad yuṣmabhyam_tvad devāḥ_deva dāsyante_dā vitariṣyanti_vitṛ hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt yajñaiḥ_yajña bhāvitāḥ_bhāvay toṣitāḥ_toṣay te_tad yasmāt_yasmāt taiḥ_tad ṛṇa--_ṛṇa vat_vat bhavadbhyaḥ_bhavat dattāḥ_dā bhogāḥ_bhoga tasmāt_tasmāt taiḥ_tad devaiḥ_deva dattān_dā bhogān_bhoga ebhyaḥ_idam devebhyaḥ_deva a_a pradāya_pradā yajñeṣu_yajña yaḥ_yad bhuṅkte_bhuj deha--_deha indriyāṇi_indriya eva_eva tarpayati_tarpay stenaḥ_stena eva_eva taskaraḥ_taskara eva_eva sa_tad deva--_deva sva--_sva deva--_deva arṇapa--_arṇapa ākaraṇāt_ākaraṇa
āha_ah bhuṅkte_bhuj

baladevaḥ_baladeva etat_etad eva_eva viśadayan_viśaday karma--_karman anuṣṭhānena_anuṣṭhāna doṣam_doṣa āha_ah iṣṭān_iṣ iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva bhāvita--_bhāvay mad--_mad aṅga--_aṅga bhūtāḥ_bhū devāḥ_deva vaḥ_tvad yuṣmabhyam_tvad iṣṭān_yaj mumukṣu--_mumukṣu kāmyān_kāmay uttara--_uttara uttara--_uttara yajña--_yajña apekṣān_apekṣa bhogān_bhoga dāsyanti_dā vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi dvārā_dvār vrīhi--_vrīhi ādīn_ādi utpādya_utpāday iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sva--_sva arcana--_arcana artham_artha taiḥ_tad devaiḥ_deva dattān_dā tān_tad bhogān_bhoga ebhyaḥ_idam pañca--_pañcan yajña--_yajña ādibhiḥ_ādi a_a pradāya_pradā kevala--_kevala ātma--_ātman tṛpti--_tṛpti karaḥ_kara yaḥ_yad bhuṅkte_bhuj sa_tad stenaḥ_stena cauraḥ_caura eva_eva devaḥ_deva tāni_tad apahṛtya_apahṛ taiḥ_tad ātmanaḥ_ātman poṣāt_poṣa cauraḥ_caura bhūpāt_bhūpa iva_iva sa_tad yamāt_yama daṇḍam_daṇḍa arhati_arh pumartha--_pumartha anarhaḥ_anarha
BhG 3.13

lg.l: yajña--_yajña śiṣṭa--_śiṣṭa āśinaḥ_āśin santaḥ_sat mucyante_muc sarva--_sarva kilbiṣaiḥ_kilbiṣa
bhuñjate_bhuj te_tad tu_tu agham_agha pāpāḥ_pāpa ye_yad pacanti_pac ātma--_ātman kāraṇāt_kāraṇa

div.p: āha_ah aśnanti_aś mucyante_muc

lg.l: kaṇḍanī_kaṇḍanī peṣaṇī_peṣaṇī cullī_cullī udakumbhī_udakumbhī ca_ca mārjanī_mārjanī
pañca_pañcan sūnāḥ_sūnā gṛhasthasya_gṛhastha tābhiḥ_tad svargam_svarga na_na vindati_vid

div.l: ye_yad ātmanaḥ_ātman bhojana--_bhojana artham_artha eva_eva pacanti_pac na_na tu_tu vaiśvadeva--_vaiśvadeva ādi--_ādi artham_artha te_tad pāpāḥ_pāpa durācārāḥ_durācāra agham_agha eva_eva bhuñjate_bhuj
div.p: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ye_yad tu_tu vaiśvadeva--_vaiśvadeva ādi--_ādi yajña--_yajña avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ amṛtam_amṛta ye_yad aśnanti_aś te_tad santaḥ_sat śiṣṭāḥ_śās veda--_veda ukta--_vac kāri--_kārin tvena_tva deva--_deva ādi--_ādi ṛṇa--_ṛṇa apākaraṇāt_apākaraṇa atas_atas te_tad mucyante_muc sarvaiḥ_sarva vihita--_vidhā akaraṇa--_akaraṇa bhūta--_bhūta bhāvi--_bhāvin pātaka--_pātaka a_a saṃsargiṇaḥ_saṃsargin te_tad bhavanti_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

evam_evam anvaye_anvaya bhūta--_bhū bhāvi--_bhāvin pāpa--_pāpa abhāvām_abhāva uktvā_vac vyatireke_vyatireka doṣam_doṣa āha_ah bhuñjate_bhuj te_tad vaiśvadeva--_vaiśvadeva ādi--_ādi akāriṇaḥ_akārin agham_agha pāpam_pāpa eva_eva tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa ye_yad pāpāḥ_pāpa pañca--_pañcan sūnā--_sūnā nimittam_nimitta pramāda--_pramāda kṛta--_kṛ hiṃsā--_hiṃsā nimittam_nimitta ca_ca kṛta--_kṛ pāpāḥ_pāpa santaḥ_as ātma--_ātman kāraṇāt_kāraṇa eva_eva pacanti_pac na_na tu_tu vaiśvadeva--_vaiśvadeva ādi--_ādi artham_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca pāñca--_pāñcan sūnā--_sūnā ādi--_ādi kṛta--_kṛ pāpe_pāpa vidyamāne_vid eva_eva vaiśvadeva--_vaiśvadeva ādi--_ādi nitya--_nitya karma--_karman akaraṇa--_akaraṇa nimittam_nimitta aparam_apara pāpam_pāpa āpnuvanti_āp iti_iti bhuñjate_bhuj te_tad tu_tu agham_agha pāpāḥ_pāpa iti_iti uktam_vac tathā_tathā ca_ca smṛtiḥ_smṛti
kaṇḍanī_kaṇḍanī peṣaṇī_peṣaṇī cullī_cullī udakumbhī_udakumbhī mārjanī_mārjanī pañca_pañcan sūnāḥ_sūnā gṛhasthasya_gṛhastha tābhiḥ_tad svargam_svarga vindati_vid

pañca--_pañcan sūnā--_sūnā kṛtam_kṛ pāpam_pāpa pañca--_pañcan yajñaiḥ_yajña vyapohati_vyapoh iti_iti ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca idam_idam eva_eva asya_idam tat_tad sādhāraṇam_sādhāraṇa annam_anna yat_yad idam_idam adyate_ad sa_tad yaḥ_yad etat_etad upāste_upās na_na sa_tad pāpnamaḥ_pāpnama vyāvartate_vyāvṛt miśram_miśra hi_hi etat_etad

mogham_mogha annam_anna vindate_vid agra--_agra cetāḥ_cetas satyam_satya bravīmi_brū vadhaḥ_vadha id_id sa_tad tasya_tad na_na aryamāṇam_ar puṣyati_puṣ no_no sakhāyam_sakhi kevala--_kevala adhaḥ_adhas bhavati_bhū kevala--_kevala ādī_ādin

idam_idam ca_ca upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa pañca--_pañcan mahā--_mahat yajñānām_yajña smārtānām_smārta śrautānām_śrauta ca_ca nitya--_nitya karmaṇām_karman adhikṛtena_adhikṛ nityāni_nitya karmāṇi_karman avaśyam_avaśyam anuṣṭheyāni_anuṣṭhā iti_iti prajāpati--_prajāpati vacana--_vacana arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha vaiśvadeva--_vaiśvadeva ādi--_ādi yajña--_yajña avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ annam_anna ye_yad aśnanti_aś te_tad pañca--_pañcan sūnā--_sūnā kṛtaiḥ_kṛ sarvaiḥ_sarva pāpaiḥ_pāpa mucyante_muc pañca--_pañcan sūnāḥ_sūnā ca_ca smṛti--_smṛti uktāḥ_vac
kaṇḍanī_kaṇḍanī peṣaṇī_peṣaṇī cullī_cullī udakumbhī_udakumbhī mārjanī_mārjanī pañca_pañcan sūnāḥ_sūnā gṛhasthasya_gṛhastha tābhiḥ_tad svargam_svarga vindati_vid

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_yad indra--_indra ādi--_ādi aṅga--_aṅga tayā_tā avasthitam_avasthā yajñam_yajña sarveśvaram_sarveśvara viṣṇum_viṣṇu abhyarcya_abhyarc tad--_tad śeṣam_śeṣa aśnanti_aś tena_tad tad--_tad deha--_deha yātrām_yātrā sampādayanti_sampāday te_tad santaḥ_sat sarveśvarasya_sarveśvara yajñapuruṣasya_yajñapuruṣa bhaktāḥ_bhakta sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman anubhava--_anubhava pratibandhakaiḥ_pratibandhaka nikhilaiḥ_nikhila pāpaiḥ_pāpa vimucyante_vimuc te_tad pāpāḥ_pāpa pāpa--_pāpa grastāḥ_gras agham_agha bhuñjate_bhuj ye_yad tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā aṅgatayā_aṅgatā avasthitena_avasthā yajña--_yajña puruṣeṇa_puruṣa sva--_sva arcanāya_arcana dattam_dā vrīhi--_vrīhi ādi--_ādi ātma--_ātman kāraṇāt_kāraṇa pacanti_pac tat_tad vipacya_vipac ātma--_ātman poṣaṇam_poṣaṇa kurvanti_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pakvasya_pakva vrīhi--_vrīhi ādeḥ_ādi agha--_agha rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇāmāt_pariṇāma agha--_agha tvam_tva uktam_vac
BhG 3.14

lg.l: annāt_anna bhavanti_bhū bhūtāni_bhūta parjanyāt_parjanya anna--_anna saṃbhavaḥ_sambhava
yajñāt_yajña bhavati_bhū parjanyaḥ_parjanya yajñaḥ_yajña karma--_karman samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava

div.p: āha_ah annāt_anna śukra--_śukra śoṇita--_śoṇita rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇatāt_pariṇam bhūtāni_bhūta utpadyante_utpad annasya_anna ca_ca sambhavaḥ_sambhava parjanyāt_parjanya vṛṣṭeḥ_vṛṣṭi sa_tad ca_ca parjanyaḥ_parjanya yajñāt_yajña bhavati_bhū sa_tad yajñaḥ_yajña karma--_karman samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava karmaṇā_karman yajamāna--_yaj ādi--_ādi vyāpāreṇa_vyāpāra samyak_samyak sampadyate_sampad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: agnau_agni prāsta--_prās āhutiḥ_āhuti samyak_samyak ādityam_āditya upatiṣṭhate_upasthā
ādityāt_āditya jāyate_jan vṛṣṭiḥ_vṛṣṭi vṛṣṭeḥ_vṛṣṭi annam_anna tatas_tatas prajāḥ_prajā

div.p: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana na_na kevalam_kevala prajāpati--_prajāpati vacanāt_vacana eva_eva karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ api_api tu_tu jagat--_jagant cakra--_cakra pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetutvāt_hetutva api_api iti_iti āha_ah annāt_anna iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri annāt_anna bhuktāt_bhuj retaḥ--_retas lohita--_lohita rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇatāt_pariṇam bhūtāni_bhūta prāṇi--_prāṇin śarīrāṇi_śarīra bhavanti_bhū jāyante_jan annasya_anna sambhavaḥ_sambhava janma_janman anna--_anna sambhavaḥ_sambhava parjanyāt_parjanya vṛṣṭeḥ_vṛṣṭi pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa siddham_sidh eva_eva etat_etad atra_atra karma--_karman upayogam_upayoga āha_ah yajñāt_yajña kārīḥ_kārī ya--_ya ādeḥ_ādi agnihotra--_agnihotra ādeḥ_ādi ca_ca apūrva--_apūrva ākhyāt_ākhyā dharmāt_dharma bhavati_bhū parjanyaḥ_parjanya yathā_yathā ca_ca agnihotra--_agnihotra āhuteḥ_āhuti vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi janaka--_janaka tvam_tva tathā_tathā vyākhyātam_vyākhyā aṣṭa--_aṣṭan adhyāyī--_adhyāyī kāṇḍe_kāṇḍa janaka--_janaka yājñavalkya--_yājñavalkya saṃvāda--_saṃvāda rūpāyām_rūpa ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ praśnyām_praśnī manunā_manu ca_ca uktam_vac

agnau_agni prāsta--_prās āhutiḥ_āhuti samyak_samyak ādityam_āditya upatiṣṭhate_upasthā
ādityāt_āditya jāyate_jan vṛṣtiḥ_vṛṣti vṛṣteḥ_vṛṣti annam_anna tatas_tatas prajāḥ_prajā

sa_tad ca_ca yajñaḥ_yajña dharma--_dharma ākhyaḥ_ākhyā sūkṣmaḥ_sūkṣma karma--_karman samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava ṛtvij--_ṛtvij yajamāna--_yaj vyāpāra--_vyāpāra sādhyaḥ_sādhay yajñasya_yajña hi_hi apūrvasya_apūrva vihitam_vidhā karma_karman kāraṇam_kāraṇa

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha jagat--_jagant cakra--_cakra pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetutvāt_hetutva api_api yajñam_yajña kuryāt_kṛ eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah annāt_anna bhūtāni_bhūta prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin bhavanti_bhū iti_iti bhūtānām_bhūta hetuḥ_hetu annam_anna annāt_anna eva_eva śukra--_śukra śoṇita--_śoṇita rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇatāt_pariṇam prāṇi--_prāṇin śarīra--_śarīra siddheḥ_siddhi tasya_tad annasya_anna hetuḥ_hetu parjanyaḥ_parjanya vṛṣṭibhiḥ_vṛṣṭi eva_eva anna--_anna siddheḥ_siddhi tasya_tad parjanyasya_parjanya hetuḥ_hetu yajñaḥ_yajña lokaiḥ_loka kṛtena_kṛ yajñena_yajña eva_eva samucita--_samucita vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi prada--_prada megha--_megha siddheḥ_siddhi tasya_tad yajñasya_yajña hetuḥ_hetu karma--_karman ṛtvij--_ṛtvij yajamāna--_yaj vyāpāra--_vyāpāra ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva karmaṇaḥ_karman eva_eva yajña--_yajña siddheḥ_siddhi

baladevaḥ_baladeva prajāpatinā_prajāpati para--_para īśena_īśa prajāḥ_prajā sṛṣṭvā_sṛj tad--_tad upajīvanāya_upajīvana tadā_tadā eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña sṛṣṭaḥ_sṛj tatas_tatas pareśa--_pareśa anubartinā_anubartin avaśyam_avaśyam sa_sa kāryaḥ_kārya iti_iti āha_ah annāt_anna iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi bhūtāni_bhūta prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin annāt_anna vrīhi--_vrīhi ādeḥ_ādi bhavanti_bhū śukra--_śukra śoṇita--_śoṇita rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇatāḥ_pariṇam tasmāt_tasmāt tad--_tad dehānām_deha siddheḥ_siddhi tasya_tad annasya_anna sambhavaḥ_sambhava parjanyāt_parjanya vṛṣṭeḥ_vṛṣṭi bhavati_bhū parjanyaḥ_parjanya ca_ca yajñāt_yajña bhavati_bhū sidhyati_sidh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

agnau_agni prāsta--_prās āhutiḥ_āhuti samyak_samyak ādityam_āditya upatiṣṭhate_upasthā ādityāt_āditya jāyate_jan vṛṣṭiḥ_vṛṣṭi vṛṣṭeḥ_vṛṣṭi annam_anna tatas_tatas prajāḥ_prajā iti_iti manu--_manu smṛteḥ_smṛti
BhG 3.15

karma_karman brahma--_brahman udbhavam_udbhava viddhi_vid brahma_brahman akṣara--_akṣara samudbhavam_samudbhava
tasmāt_tasmāt sarva--_sarva gatam_gam brahma_brahman nityam_nityam yajñe_yajña pratiṣṭhitam_pratiṣṭhā

śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tathā_tathā karma_karman iti_iti tat_tad ca_ca yajamāna--_yaj ādi--_ādi vyāpāra--_vyāpāra rūpam_rūpa karma_karman brahma--_brahman udbhavam_udbhava viddhi_vid brahma_brahman vedaḥ_veda tasmāt_tad pravṛttam_pravṛt jānīhi_jñā asya_idam mahataḥ_mahat bhūtasya_bhūta niḥśvasitam_niḥśvasita etat_etad ṛk--_ṛc vedaḥ_veda yajuḥ--_yajus vedaḥ_veda sāma--_sāman vedaḥ_veda thāṅgīrasaḥ_thāṅgīrasa iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti yatas_yatas evam_evam akṣarāt_akṣara eva_eva yajña--_yajña pravṛtteḥ_pravṛtti atyantam_atyantam abhipretaḥ_abhipre yajñaḥ_yajña tasmāt_tasmāt sarva--_sarva gatam_gam api_api akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman nityam_nitya sarvadā_sarvadā yajñe_yajña pratiṣṭhitam_pratiṣṭhā yajñena_yajña upāya--_upāya bhūtena_bhū prāpyate_prāp iti_iti yajñe_yajña pratiṣṭhitam_pratiṣṭhā ucyate_vac iti_iti udyama--_udyama sthā_stha sadā_sadā lakṣmīḥ_lakṣmī itivat_itivat yat_yat vā_vā jagat--_jagant cakrasya_cakra mūlam_mūla karma_karman tasmāt_tasmāt sarva--_sarva gatam_gam mantra--_mantra artha--_artha vādaiḥ_vāda sarveṣu_sarva siddhārtha--_siddhārtha pratipādakeṣu_pratipādaka bhūta--_bhūta artha--_artha ākhyāna--_ākhyāna ādiṣu_ādi gatam_gam sthitam_sthā api_api veda--_veda ākhyam_ākhyā brahma_brahman sarvadā_sarvadā yajñe_yajña tātparya--_tātparya atas_atas yajña--_yajña ādi_ādi karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad ca_ca apūrva--_apūrva utpādakam_utpādaka brahma--_brahman udbhavam_udbhava brahma_brahman vedaḥ_veda saḥ_tad eva_eva udbhavaḥ_udbhava pramāṇam_pramāṇa yasya_yad tat_tad tathā_tathā veda--_veda vihitam_vidhā eva_eva karma_karman apūrva--_apūrva sādhanam_sādhana jānīhi_jñā na_na tu_tu anyat_anya pāṣaṇḍa--_pāṣaṇḍa pratipāditam_pratipāday iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nanu_nanu pāṣaṇḍa--_pāṣaṇḍa śāstra--_śāstra apekṣayā_apekṣā vedasya_veda kim_ka vailakṣaṇyam_vailakṣaṇya yatas_yatas veda--_veda pratipāditaḥ_pratipāday eva_eva dharmaḥ_dharma na_na anyaḥ_anya iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah brahma_brahman veda--_veda ākhyam_ākhyā akṣara--_akṣara samudbhavam_samudbhava akṣarāt_akṣara paramātmanaḥ_paramātman nirdoṣāt_nirdoṣa puruṣa_puruṣa āvirbhāvaḥ_āvirbhāva yasya_yad tat_tad akṣara--_akṣara samudbhavam_samudbhava tathā_tathā ca_ca apauruṣeya--_apauruṣeya tvena_tva nirasta--_niras samasta--_samasta doṣa--_doṣa āśaṅkam_āśaṅkā veda--_veda vākyam_vākya pramiti--_pramiti janakam_janaka iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti asya_idam mahataḥ_mahat bhūtasya_bhūta niḥśvasitam_niḥśvasita etat_etad ṛk--_ṛc vedaḥ_veda yajuḥ--_yajus vedaḥ_veda sāma--_sāman vedaḥ_veda atha_atha āṅgīrasaḥ_āṅgīrasa itihāsaḥ_itihāsa purāṇam_purāṇa vidyāḥ_vidyā upaniṣadaḥ_upaniṣad ślokāḥ_śloka sūtrāṇi_sūtra anuvyākhānāni_anuvyākhāna vyākhyānāni_vyākhyāna

tasmāt_tasmāt sākṣāt_sākṣāt paramātma--_paramātman samudbhava--_samudbhava tayā_tā sarva--_sarva gatam_gam sarva--_sarva prakāśakam_prakāśaka nityam_nitya avināśi_avināśin ca_ca brahma_brahman veda--_veda ākhyam_ākhyā yajñe_yajña dharma--_dharma ākhye_ākhyā atīndriye_atīndriya pratiṣṭhitam_pratiṣṭhā tātparyeṇa_tātparya atas_atas pāṣaṇḍa--_pāṣaṇḍa pratipādita--_pratipāday upadharma--_upadharma parityāgena_parityāga veda--_veda bodhitaḥ_bodhay eva_eva dharmaḥ_dharma anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tasya_tad karmaṇaḥ_karman hetuḥ_hetu brahma_brahman vedaḥ_veda veda--_veda ukta--_vac vidhi--_vidhi vākya--_vākya śravaṇāt_śravaṇa eva_eva yajñam_yajña prati_prati vyāpāra--_vyāpāra utpatteḥ_utpatti tasya_tad vedasya_veda hetuḥ_hetu akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman brahmataḥ_brahman eva_eva veda--_veda utpatteḥ_utpatti tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti asya_idam mahataḥ_mahat bhūtasya_bhūta niḥśvasitam_niḥśvasita etat_etad ṛk--_ṛc vedaḥ_veda yajuḥ--_yajus vedaḥ_veda sāma--_sāman vedaḥ_veda thāṅgīrasaḥ_thāṅgīrasa iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt sarva--_sarva gatam_gam brahma_brahman yajñe_yajña pratiṣṭhitam_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti yajñena_yajña brahma_brahman api_api prāpyate_prāp iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva atra_atra yadi_yadi api_api kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhāvena_bhāva anna--_anna ādyāḥ_ādya brahma--_brahman paryantāḥ_paryanta uktāḥ_vac tat_tad api_api teṣu_tad madhye_madhya yajñaḥ_yajña vidheya--_vidhā tvena_tva śāstreṇa_śāstra ucyate_vac iti_iti saḥ_tad eva_eva prastutaḥ_prastu
agnau_agni prāsta--_prās āhutiḥ_āhuti samyak_samyak ādityam_āditya upatiṣṭhate_upasthā ādityāt_āditya jāyate_jan vṛṣṭiḥ_vṛṣṭi vṛṣṭeḥ_vṛṣṭi annam_anna tatas_tatas prajāḥ_prajā iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad ca_ca ṛtvij--_ṛtvij ādi--_ādi vyāpāra--_vyāpāra rūpa--_rūpa karma--_karman brahma--_brahman udbhavam_udbhava viddhi_vid brahma--_brahman vedaḥ_veda tasmāt_tasmāt tat_tad pravṛttim_pravṛtti jānīhi_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad ca_ca veda--_veda rūpam_rūpa brahma_brahman akṣarāt_akṣara pareśāt_pareśa samudbhavam_samudbhava prakaṭam_prakaṭa viddhi_vid asya_idam mahataḥ_mahat bhūtasya_bhūta niḥśvasitam_niḥśvasita etat_etad ṛk--_ṛc vedaḥ_veda yajuḥ--_yajus vedaḥ_veda sāma--_sāman vedaḥ_veda thāṅgīrasaḥ_thāṅgīrasa iti_iti ādi--_ādi śravaṇāt_śravaṇa yasmāt_yasmāt sva--_sva sṛṣṭa--_sṛj prajā--_prajā upajīvana--_upajīvana ati_ati priyaḥ_priya yajñaḥ_yajña tasmāt_tasmāt sarva--_sarva gatam_gam nikhila--_nikhila vyāpakam_vyāpaka api_api brahma_brahman nityam_nitya sarvadā_sarvadā yajñe_yajña pratiṣṭhitam_pratiṣṭhā tena_tad eva_eva tat_tad prāpyate_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 3.16

lg.l: evam_evam pravartitam_pravartay cakram_cakra na_na anuvartayati_anuvartay iha_iha yaḥ_yad
aghāyuḥ_aghāyu indriya--_indriya ārāmaḥ_ārāma mogham_mogha pārtha_pārtha sa_tad jīvati_jīv

div.p:
āha_ah parameśvara--_parameśvara vākya--_vākya bhūtāt_bhū veda--_veda ākhyāt_ākhyā brahmaṇaḥ_brahman puruṣāṇām_puruṣa karmaṇi_karman pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti karma--_karman niṣpattiḥ_niṣpatti tatas_tatas parjanyaḥ_parjanya tatas_tatas annam_anna tatas_tatas bhūtāni_bhūta bhūtānām_bhūta punar_punar tathā_tathā eva_eva karma--_karman pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti iti_iti evam_evam pravartitam_pravartay cakram_cakra yaḥ_yad na_na anuvartayati_anuvartay na_na anutiṣṭhati_anuṣṭhā saḥ_tad aghāyuḥ_aghāyu agham_agha pāpa--_pāpa rūpam_rūpa āyuḥ_āyus yasya_yad saḥ_tad yatas_yatas indriyaiḥ_indriya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya eva_eva āramati_āram na_na tu_tu īśvara--_īśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana arthe_artha karmaṇi_karman atas_atas mogham_mogha vyartham_vyartha
sa_tad jīvati_jīv

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhavati_bhū evam_evam tatas_tatas kim_ka phalitam_phalita iti_iti āha_ah evam_evam iti_iti tatas_tatas karma--_karman parijñānam_parijñāna tatas_tatas anuṣṭhānāt_anuṣṭhāna dharma--_dharma utpādaḥ_utpāda tatas_tatas parjanyaḥ_parjanya tatas_tatas annam_anna tatas_tatas bhūtāni_bhūta punar_punar tathā_tathā eva_eva bhūtānām_bhūta karma--_karman pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti iti_iti evam_evam parameśvareṇa_parameśvara pravartitam_pravartay cakram_cakra sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant nirvāhakam_nirvāhaka yaḥ_yad na_na anuvartayati_anuvartay na_na anutiṣṭhati_anuṣṭhā saḥ_tad aghāyuḥ_aghāyu pāpa_pāpa jīvati_jīv he_he pārtha_pārtha tasya_tad jīvanāt_jīvana maraṇam_maraṇa eva_eva varam_vara janmāntare_janmāntara dharma--_dharma anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna sambhavāt_sambhava iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti atha_atha u_u ayam_idam vai_vai ātmā_ātman sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta lokaḥ_loka sa_tad yat_yat juhoti_hu yat_yat yajate_yaj tena_tena devānām_deva lokaḥ_loka atha_atha yat_yat anubrūte_anubrū tena_tena ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi atha_atha yat_yat pitṛbhyaḥ_pitṛ nipṛṇāti_nipṛ yat_yat prajām_prajā icchate_iṣ tena_tena yat_yat ebhyaḥ_idam aśanam_aśana dadāti_dā tena_tena manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya atha_atha yat_yat paśubhyaḥ_paśu tṛṇa--_tṛṇa udakam_udaka vindati_vid tena_tena paśūnām_paśu yat_yat asya_idam gṛheṣu_gṛha śvāpadāḥ_śvāpada vayāṃsi_vayas ā_ā pipīlikābhyaḥ_pipīlikā upajīvanti_upajīv tena_tena teṣām_tad lokaḥ_loka iti_iti

brahma--_brahman vidam_vid vyāvartayati_vyāvartay indriya--_indriya ārāmaḥ_ārāma iti_iti yatas_yatas indriyaiḥ_indriya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya āramati_āram atas_atas karma--_karman adhikārī_adhikārin san_as tad--_tad akaraṇāt_akaraṇa pāpam_pāpa eva_eva ācinvan_āci vyartham_vyartha eva_eva jīvati_jīv iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

āha_ah cakram_cakra pūrva--_pūrva paścāt_paścāt bhāgena_bhāga pravartitam_pravartay yajñān_yajña parjanyaḥ_parjanya parjanyāt_parjanya annam_anna annāt_anna puruṣaḥ_puruṣa puruṣāt_puruṣa yajñaḥ_yajña yajñāt_yajña parjanyaḥ_parjanya iti_iti evam_evam cakram_cakra yaḥ_yad na_na anuvartayati_anuvartay yajña--_yajña anuṣṭhānena_anuṣṭhāna na_na parivartayati_parivartay sa_tad agha--_agha āyuḥ_āyus pāpa--_pāpa vyāpta--_vyāp āyuḥ_āyus kaḥ_ka narake_naraka na_na maṅkṣyati_majj iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva yajña--_yajña akaraṇe_akaraṇa doṣam_doṣa āha_ah evam_evam iti_iti parasmāt_para brahmaṇaḥ_brahman veda--_veda āvirbhāvaḥ_āvirbhāva tasmāt_tad brahma--_brahman pratibodhakāt_pratibodhaka yajñaḥ_yajña tatas_tatas parjanyaḥ_parjanya tatas_tatas annam_anna tatas_tatas bhūtāni_bhūta punar_punar tathā_tathā eva_eva bhūtānām_bhūta karma--_karman pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti iti_iti evam_evam nikhila--_nikhila jagat--_jagant nirvāhakam_nirvāhaka pareśena_pareśa yaḥ_yad na_na anuvartayati_anuvartay sa_tad janaḥ_jana pareśa--_pareśa vimukhaḥ_vimukha aghāyuḥ_aghāyu pāpa--_pāpa jīvanaḥ_jīvana mogham_mogha vyartham_vyartha eva_eva jīvati_jīv he_he pārtha_pārtha yat_yat asau_adas indriyaiḥ_indriya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya eva_eva ramate_ram na_na tu_tu para--_para brahma--_brahman abhimate_abhiman yajñe_yajña tad--_tad śeṣa--_śeṣa aśane_aśana ca_ca
BhG 3.17

yaḥ_yad tu_tu ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati eva_eva syāt_as ātma--_ātman tṛptaḥ_tṛp ca_ca mānavaḥ_mānava
ātmani_ātman eva_eva ca_ca saṃtuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ tasya_tad kāryam_kārya na_na vidyate_vid

āha_ah ātmani_ātman eva_eva ratiḥ_rati prītiḥ_prīti yasya_yad saḥ_tad tatas_tatas ca_ca ātmani_ātman eva_eva tṛptaḥ_tṛp sva--_sva ānanda--_ānanda anubhavena_anubhava nirvṛtaḥ_nirvṛta ataeva_ataeva ātmani_ātman eva_eva santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ bhoga--_bhoga apekṣā--_apekṣā rahitaḥ_rahita yaḥ_yad tasya_tad kartavyam_kṛ karma_karman na_na asti_as iti_iti

ṃadhusūdanaḥ_ṃadhusūdana yaḥ_yad tu_tu indriya--_indriya ārāmaḥ_ārāma na_na bhavati_bhū paramārtha--_paramārtha darśī_darśin saḥ_tad evam_evam jagac--_jagant cakra--_cakra prabhṛti--_prabhṛti hetu--_hetu bhūtam_bhū karma_karman an_an anutiṣṭhan_anuṣṭhā api_api na_na pratyavaiti_pratyave kṛtakṛtya--_kṛtakṛtya tvāt_tva iti_iti āha_ah dvābhyām_dvi yaḥ_yad tu_tu indriya--_indriya ārāmaḥ_ārāma hi_hi sraj--_sraj candana--_candana vanitā--_vanitā ādiṣu_ādi ratim_rati anubhavati_anubhū manojña--_manojña anna--_anna pāna--_pāna ādiṣu_ādi tṛptim_tṛpti paśu--_paśu putra--_putra hiraṇya--_hiraṇya ādi--_ādi lābhena_lābha roga--_roga ādi--_ādi abhāvena_abhāva ca_ca tuṣṭim_tuṣṭi ukta--_vac viṣaya--_viṣaya abhāve_abhāva rāgiṇām_rāgin arati--_arati atṛpti--_atṛpti atuṣṭi--_atuṣṭi darśanāt_darśana rati--_rati tṛpti--_tṛpti tuṣṭyau_tuṣṭi manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa sākṣi--_sākṣin siddhāḥ_sidh labdha--_labh paramātma--_paramātman ānanaḥ_ānana tu_tu dvaita--_dvaita darśana--_darśana abhāvāt_abhāva ati_ati phalgu--_phalgu tvāt_tva ca_ca viṣaya--_viṣaya sukham_sukha na_na kāmayate_kāmay iti_iti uktam_vac yāvān_yāvat arthaḥ_artha udapāne_udapāna iti_iti atra_atra atas_atas anātma--_anātman viṣayaka--_viṣayaka rati--_rati tṛpti--_tṛpti tuṣṭi--_tuṣṭi abhāvāt_abhāva ātmānam_ātman paramānandam_paramānanda advayam_advaya sākṣātkurvan_sākṣātkṛ upacārāt_upacāra evam_evam ucyate_vac ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati ātma--_ātman tṛptaḥ_tṛp ātma--_ātman santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti ātma--_ātman krīḍaḥ_krīḍā ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati kriyāvān_kriyāvat eva_eva brahma--_brahman vidām_vid variṣṭhaḥ_variṣṭha iti_iti ātma--_ātman tṛptaḥ_tṛp ca_ca iti_iti cakāraḥ_cakāra eva_eva kāra--_kāra anukarṣaṇa--_anukarṣaṇa arthaḥ_artha mānavaḥ_mānava iti_iti yaḥ_yad kaścid_kaścit api_api manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta saḥ_tad eva_eva kṛtakṛtyaḥ_kṛtakṛtya na_na tu_tu brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa tva--_tva ādi--_ādi prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa iti_iti kathayitum_kathay ātmani_ātman eva_eva ca_ca santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ iti_iti atra_atra ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha yaḥ_yad evambhūtasya_evambhūta adhikāra--_adhikāra hetu--_hetu abhāvāt_abhāva kim_ka api_api kāryam_kārya vaidikam_vaidika laukikam_laukika vā_vā na_na vidyate_vid

kuryāt_kṛ yaḥ_yad tu_tu śuddha--_śuddha antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa tvāt_tva jñāna--_jñāna bhūmikām_bhūmikā ārūḍhaḥ_āruh sa_tad tu_tu nityam_nityam kāmyam_kāmya ca_ca na_na karoti_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah yaḥ_yad tu_tu iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati ātma--_ātman ārāmaḥ_ārāma yatas_yatas ātma--_ātman tṛptaḥ_tṛp ātma--_ātman ānanda--_ānanda anubhavena_anubhava nirvṛtaḥ_nirvṛta na_na sva--_sva ātmani_ātman nirvṛtaḥ_nirvṛta bahis_bahis viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoge_bhoga api_api kiñcid_kaścit nirvṛtaḥ_nirvṛta bhavatu_bhū atra_atra na_na eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah ātmani_ātman eva_eva na_na tu_tu bahis_bahis viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoge_bhoga tasya_tad kāryam_kārya kartavya--_kṛ tvena_tva karma_karman nā_na asti_as

baladevaḥ_baladeva yaḥ_yad tu_tu mad--_mad uktena_vac niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman mad--_mad upāsanena_upāsana ca_ca vimṛṣṭe_vimṛś citta--_citta darpaṇe_darpaṇa sañjātena_saṃjan dharma--_dharma bhūta--_bhū jñānena_jñāna ātmānam_ātman adarśat_dṛś tasya_tad na_na kiñcid_kaścit karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah yaḥ_yad tu_tu iti_iti ātmani_ātman apahata--_apahan pāpma--_pāpman tva--_tva ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa aṣṭaka--_aṣṭaka viśiṣṭe_viśiṣ sva--_sva svarūpe_svarūpa avalokite_avalokay ratiḥ_rati yasya_yad saḥ_tad ātmanā_ātman sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa ānandena_ānanda avalokitena_avalokay tṛptaḥ_tṛp na_na tu_tu anna--_anna pāna--_pāna ādinā_ādi ātmani_ātman eva_eva ca_ca tādṛśe_tādṛśa santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ na_na tu_tu nṛtya--_nṛtya gīta--_gīta ādau_ādi tasya_tad evambhūtasya_evambhūta tad--_tad avalokānāya_avalokāna kiñcid_kaścit karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ na_na vidyate_vid sarvadā_sarvadā avalokita--_avalokay ātma--_ātman svarūpa--_svarūpa tvāt_tva
BhG 3.18

lg.l: na_na eva_eva tasya_tad kṛtena_kṛ arthaḥ_artha na_na akṛtena_akṛta iha_iha kaścana_kaścana
na_na ca_ca asya_idam sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta kaḥ_ka cit_cit artha--_artha vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya

div.p: āha_ah kṛtena_kṛ karmaṇā_karman tasya_tad arthaḥ_artha puṇyam_puṇya na_na eva_eva asti_as na_na ca_ca akṛtena_akṛta kaścana_kaścana kaḥ_ka api_api pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya asti_as nirahaṅkāra--_nirahaṃkāra tvena_tva vidhi--_vidhi niṣedha--_niṣedha atīta--_atī tvāt_tva tathā_tathā api_api tasmāt_tasmāt tat_tad eṣām_idam devānām_deva na_na priyam_priya yat_yad etat_etad manuṣā_manus viduḥ_vid iti_iti mokṣe_mokṣa deva--_deva kṛta--_kṛ vighna--_vighna sambhavāt_sambhava tad--_tad parihāra--_parihāra artham_artha karmabhiḥ_karman devāḥ_deva sevyāḥ_sev iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk uktam_vac sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta brahma--_brahman artha--_artha vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya āśrayaḥ_āśraya vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya arthaḥ_artha mokṣaḥ_mokṣa āśrayaṇīyaḥ_āśri asya_idam na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha vighna--_vighna abhāvasya_abhāva śrutyā_śruti eva_eva ukta--_vac tvāt_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti tasya_tad ha_ha na_na devāḥ_deva ca_ca na_na ābhūtyau_ābhūti īśate_īś ātmā_ātman hi_hi eṣām_idam sa_tad bhavati_bhū iti_iti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa hanā_han iti_iti avyayam_avyaya api_api arthe_artha devāḥ_deva api_api tasya_tad ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva jñasya_jña abhūtyai_abhūti brahma--_brahman bhāva--_bhāva pratibandhāya_pratibandha na_na īśate_īś na_na śaknuvanti_śak iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti arthaḥ_artha deva--_deva kṛtāḥ_kṛ tu_tu vighnāḥ_vighna samyak_samyak jñāna--_jñāna utpatteḥ_utpatti prāk_prāk eva_eva yat_yad etat_etad brahma_brahman manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya viduḥ_vid tat_tad eṣām_idam devānām_deva na_na priyam_priya iti_iti brahma--_brahman jñānasya_jñāna eva_eva apriya--_apriya tva--_tva uktyā_ukti tatra_tatra eva_eva vighna--_vighna kartṛ--_kartṛ tvasya_tva sūcita--_sūcay tvāt_tva

syāt_as āha_ah tasya_tad ātma--_ātman rateḥ_rati kṛtena_kṛ karmaṇā_karman abhyudaya--_abhyudaya lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa niḥśreyasa--_niḥśreyasa lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa vā_vā artham_artha prayojanam_prayojana na_na eva_eva asti_as tasya_tad svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi abhyudaya--_abhyudaya anarthi--_anarthin tvāt_tva niḥśreyasasya_niḥśreyasa ca_ca karma--_karman asādhya--_asādhya tvāt_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti parīkṣya_parīkṣ lokān_loka karma--_karman cittān_cit brāhmaṇaḥ_brāhmaṇa nirvedam_nirveda āyāt_āyā na_na asti_as akṛtaḥ_akṛta kṛtena_kṛ iti_iti akṛtaḥ_akṛta nityaḥ_nitya mokṣaḥ_mokṣa kṛtena_kṛ karmaṇā_karman na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha jñāna--_jñāna sādhyasya_sādhay api_api vyāvṛttiḥ_vyāvṛtti eva_eva kāreṇa_kāra sūcitā_sūcay ātma--_ātman rūpasya_rūpa hi_hi niḥśreyasya_niḥśreyas nitya--_nitya prāptasya_prāp ajñāna--_ajñāna mātram_mātra aprāptiḥ_aprāpti tat_tad ca_ca tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna mātra--_mātra apanodyam_apanud tasmin_tad tattva--_tattva jñānena_jñāna apanunne_apanud tasya_tad ātma--_ātman vidaḥ_vid na_na kiṃcid_kaścit karma--_karman sādhyam_sādhay jñāna--_jñāna sādhyam_sādhay vā_vā prayojanam_prayojana asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

evaṃbhūtena_evaṃbhūta api_api pratyavāya--_pratyavāya parihāra--_parihāra artham_artha karmāṇi_karman anuṣṭheyāni_anuṣṭhā eva_eva iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah na_na akṛtena_akṛta iti_iti bhāve_bhāva niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā nitya--_nitya karma--_karman akaraṇena_akaraṇa iha_iha loke_loka garhita--_garh tva--_tva rūpaḥ_rūpa pratyavāya--_pratyavāya prāpti--_prāpti rūpaḥ_rūpa vā_vā kaścana_kaścana arthaḥ_artha na_na asti_as sarvatra_sarvatra upapattim_upapatti āha_ah uttara--_uttara ardhena_ardha caḥ_c hetau_hetu yasmāt_yasmāt asya_idam ātma--_ātman vidaḥ_vid sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi sthāvara--_sthāvara anteṣu_anta kaḥ_ka api_api artha--_artha vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya prayojana--_prayojana sambandhaḥ_sambandha na_na asti_as kaṃcid_kaścit bhūta--_bhūta viśeṣam_viśeṣa āśritya_āśri kaḥ_ka api_api kriyā--_kriyā sādhyaḥ_sādhay arthaḥ_artha na_na asti_as iti_iti vākya--_vākya arthaḥ_artha atas_atas asya_idam kṛta--_kṛ akṛte_akṛta niṣprayojanam_niṣprayojana na_na eva_eva kṛta--_kṛ akṛte_akṛta tapataḥ_tap iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tasya_tad ha_ha na_na devāḥ_deva cana_cana ābhūtyai_ābhūti īśate_īś ātmā_ātman hi_hi eṣām_idam na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti devāḥ_deva api_api tasya_tad mokṣa--_mokṣa ābhavanāya_ābhavana na_na samarthāḥ_samartha iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti na_na vighna--_vighna abhāva--_abhāva artham_artha api_api deva--_deva ārādhana--_ārādhana rūpa--_rūpa karma--_karman

lg.l: jñāna--_jñāna bhūmiḥ_bhūmi śubha--_śubha icchā--_icchā ākhyā_ākhyā prathamā_prathama parikīrtitā_parikīrtay
vicāraṇā_vicāraṇā dvitīyā_dvitīya syāt_as tṛtīyā_tṛtīya tanu--_tanu mānasā_mānasa

div.p: sattvāpattiḥ_sattvāpatti caturthī_caturtha syāt_as tatas_tatas asaṃsakti--_asaṃsakti nāsikā_nāsikā padārtha--_padārtha abhāvanī_abhāvana ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭha saptamī_saptama turyagā_turyaga smṛtā_smṛ

tatas_tatas gurum_guru upasṛtya_upasṛ vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya vicāraḥ_vicāra śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana ātmakaḥ_ātmaka dvitīyā_dvitīya tatas_tatas nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana abhyāsena_abhyāsa manasaḥ_manas ekāgra--_ekāgra tayā_tā sūkṣma--_sūkṣma vastu--_vastu grahaṇa--_grahaṇa yogya--_yogya tvam_tva tṛtīyā_tṛtīya ucyate_vac bhedena_bheda jagataḥ_jagant bhānāt_bhāna tat_tad uktam_vac
dṛśyate_dṛś

tatas_tatas vedānta--_vedānta vākyāt_vākya nirvikalpakaḥ_nirvikalpaka brahma--_brahman ātma--_ātman aikya--_aikya sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra caturthī_caturtha bhūmikā_bhūmikā phala--_phala rūpā_rūpa sattvāpattiḥ_sattvāpatti svapna--_svapna avasthā_avasthā ucyate_vac sarvasya_sarva api_api jagataḥ_jagant mithyātvena_mithyātva sphuraṇāt_sphuraṇa tat_tad uktam_vac
advaite_advaita sthairyam_sthairya āyāte_āyā dvaite_dvaita praśamam_praśama āgate_āgam paśyanti_paś svapna--_svapna vat_vat lokam_loka caturthīm_caturtha bhūmikām_bhūmikā itāḥ_i iti_iti

saḥ_tad ayam_idam caturtha--_caturtha bhūmim_bhūmi prāptaḥ_prāp yogī_yogin brahma--_brahman vid_vid iti_iti ucyate_vac tatra_tatra savikalpaka--_savikalpaka samādhi--_samādhi abhyāsena_abhyāsa niruddhe_nirudh manasi_manas yā_yad nirvikalpaka--_nirvikalpaka samādhi--_samādhi avasthā_avasthā sā_tad asaṃsaktiḥ_asaṃsakti iti_iti suṣuptiḥ_suṣupti iti_iti ca_ca ucyate_vac tatas_tatas svayam_svayam eva_eva vyutthānāt_vyutthāna saḥ_tad ayam_idam yogī_yogin brahma--_brahman vid--_vid varaḥ_vara tatas_tatas tad--_tad abhyāsa--_abhyāsa paripākeṇa_paripāka cira--_cira kāla--_kāla avasthāyinī_avasthāyin sā_tad padārtha--_padārtha abhāvanī_abhāvana iti_iti gāḍha--_gāḍha suṣuptiḥ_suṣupti iti_iti ca_ca ucyate_vac tatas_tatas svayam_svayam anusthitasya_anuṣṭhā yoginaḥ_yogin para--_para prayatnena_prayatna eva_eva vyutthānāt_vyutthāna saḥ_tad ayam_idam brahma--_brahman vid_vid varīyān_varīyas uktam_vac hi_hi
patati_pat

yasyāḥ_yad tu_tu samādhi--_samādhi avasthāyāḥ_avasthā na_na svatas_svatas na_na vā_vā paratas_paratas vyutthitaḥ_vyutthā bhavati_bhū sarvathā_sarvathā bheda--_bheda darśana--_darśana abhāvāt_abhāva kintu_kiṃtu sarvadā_sarvadā tanmayaḥ_tanmaya eva_eva sva--_sva prayatnam_prayatna antareṇa_antareṇa eva_eva parameśvara--_parameśvara prerita--_preray prāṇa--_prāṇa vāyu--_vāyu vaśāt_vaśa anyaiḥ_anya nirvāhyamāṇa--_nirvāhay daihika--_daihika vyavahāraḥ_vyavahāra paripūrṇa--_paripṛ parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda ghanaḥ_ghana eva_eva sarvatas_sarvatas tiṣṭhati_sthā sā_tad saptamī_saptama turīya--_turīya avasthā_avasthā tām_tad prāptaḥ_prāp brahma--_brahman vid_vid variṣṭhaḥ_variṣṭha iti_iti ucyate_vac uktam_vac hi_hi

lg.l: ṣaṣṭhyām_ṣaṣṭha bhūmām_bhūmi asau_adas sthitvā_sthā saptamīm_saptama bhūmikām_bhūmikā āpnuyāt_āp
kiṃcid_kaścit eva_eva eṣa_etad sampannaḥ_sampad tu_tu athavā_athavā eṣa_etad na_na kiṃcana_kaścana

div.p: videha--_videha mukta--_muc tā_tā tu_tu uktā_vac saptamī_saptama yoga--_yoga bhūmikā_bhūmikā agamyā_agamya vacasām_vacas śāntā_śam sā_tad sīmā_sīmā yoga--_yoga bhūmiṣu_bhūmi
yām_yad adhikṛtya_adhikṛ śrīmat--_śrīmat bhāgavate_bhāgavata smaryate_smṛ

lg.l: deham_deha ca_ca naśvaram_naśvara avasthitam_avasthā utthitam_utthā vā_vā
siddhaḥ_siddha na_na paśyati_paś yatas_yatas adhyagamat_adhigam sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa
daivāt_daiva apetam_ape atha_atha daiva--_daiva vaśāt_vaśa upetam_upe
vāsaḥ_vāsas yathā_yathā parikṛtam_parikṛ madirā--_madirā mada--_mada andhaḥ_andha
dehaḥ_deha api_api daiva--_daiva vaśa--_vaśa gaḥ_ga khalu_khalu karma_karman yāvat_yāvat
sva--_sva ārambhakam_ārambhaka pratisamīkṣate_pratisamīkṣ eva_eva sāsuḥ_sāsu
tam_tad sa_sa prapañcam_prapañca adhirūṭha--_adhiruh samādhi--_samādhi yogaḥ_yoga
svāpnam_svāpna punar_punar na_na bhajate_bhaj pratibuddha--_pratibudh vastuḥ_vastu

div.p: śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca tat_tad yathā_yathā valmīke_valmīka mṛtā_mṛ pratyastā_pratyas śayīta_śī evam_evam eva_eva idam_idam śarīram_śarīra śete_śī atha_atha ayam_idam aśarīraḥ_aśarīra amṛtaḥ_amṛta prāṇaḥ_prāṇa brahma_brahman eva_eva tejaḥ_tejas eva_eva iti_iti
tatra_tatra ayam_idam saṅgrahaḥ_saṃgraha

lg.l: caturthī_caturtha bhūmikā_bhūmikā jñānam_jñāna tisraḥ_tri syuḥ_as sādhanam_sādhana purā_purā
jīvan--_jīv mukteḥ_mukti avasthāḥ_avasthā tu_tu parāḥ_para tisraḥ_tri prakīrtitāḥ_prakīrtay

div.l: atra_atra prathama--_prathama bhūmi--_bhūmi trayam_traya ārūḍhaḥ_āruh ajñaḥ_ajña api_api na_na karma--_karman adhikārī_adhikārin kim_kim punar_punar tattva--_tattva jñānī_jñānin tad--_tad viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ jīvan--_jīv muktaḥ_muc vā_vā iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
div.p: viśvanātha_viśvanātha kṛtena_kṛ anuṣṭhitena_anuṣṭhā karmaṇā_karman na_na arthaḥ_artha na_na phalam_phala akṛtena_akṛta kañcana_kaścana pratavāyaḥ_pratavāya api_api na_na yasmāt_yasmāt asya_idam sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta brahmāṇḍa--_brahmāṇḍa sthāvara--_sthāvara ādiṣu_ādi madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit api_api arthāya_artha sva--_sva prayojana--_prayojana artham_artha vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya āśrayaṇīyaḥ_āśri na_na bhavati_bhū purāṇa--_purāṇa ādiṣu_ādi vyapāśraya--_vyapāśraya śabdena_śabda tathā_tathā eva_eva ucyate_vac yathā_yathā

vāsudeve_vāsudeva bhagavati_bhagavant bhaktim_bhakti udvahatām_udvah nṛṇām_nṛ
jñāna--_jñāna vairāgya--_vairāgya vīryāṇām_vīrya na_na iha_iha kaścid_kaścit vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya

tathā_tathā yad--_yad upāśraya--_upāśraya āśrayāḥ_āśraya iti_iti saṃsthā--_saṃsthā hetuḥ_hetu upāśrayaḥ_upāśraya iti_iti ādau_ādi api_api apa_apa iti_iti upasargasya_upasarga anadhika--_anadhika artham_artha dṛṣṭam_dṛś

baladevaḥ_baladeva kṛtena_kṛ tad--_tad avalokanāya_avalokana anuṣṭhitena_anuṣṭhā karmaṇā_karman arthaḥ_artha phalam_phala na_na eva_eva asti_as akṛtena_akṛta tad--_tad avalokana--_avalokana asādhanena_asādhana karmaṇā_karman kaścana_kaścana anarthaḥ_anartha ca_ca tad--_tad avalokana--_avalokana kṣati--_kṣati lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa iha_iha na_na bhavati_bhū svābhāvika--_svābhāvika ātma--_ātman avalokanāt_avalokana na_na tu_tu īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa api_api deva--_deva kṛtāt_kṛ vighnāt_vighna bibhyat_bhī tad--_tad toṣāya_toṣa tad--_tad pūjā--_pūjā ātmakam_ātmaka karma_karman kuryāt_kṛ śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca devān_deva jñāna--_jñāna dviṣaḥ_dviṣ prāha_prāh tasmāt_tasmāt tat_tad eṣām_idam devānām_deva na_na priyam_priya yat_yad etat_etad manuṣā_manus viduḥ_vid iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na ca_ca iti_iti asya_idam labdha--_labh ātma--_ātman avalokasya_avaloka viduṣaḥ_vidvas sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta deveṣu_deva mānaveṣu_mānava ca_ca madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit api_api arthāya_artha ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati nairvighnāya_nairvighna vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya karmabhiḥ_karman sevyaḥ_sev na_na bhavati_bhū jñāna--_jñāna udayāt_udaya pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva deva--_deva kṛtāḥ_kṛ vighnāḥ_vighna tena_tena ātma--_ātman ratau_rati satyām_as tu_tu na_na tad--_tad kṛtāḥ_kṛ te_tad tad--_tad prabhāveṇa_prabhāva sambhavanti_sambhū tasya_tad ha_ha na_na devāḥ_deva ca_ca na_na ābhūtyai_ābhūti īśate_īś ātmā_ātman hi_hi eṣām_idam sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa hanā_han iti_iti api_api arthe_artha nipātaḥ_nipāta devāḥ_deva api_api tasya_tad ātma--_ātman anubhavinaḥ_anubhavin bhūtyai_bhūti ātma--_ātman rati--_rati kṣataye_kṣati neśate_naś hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt eṣām_idam saḥ_tad ātmā_ātman tadvat_tadvat preṣṭhaḥ_preṣṭha bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 3.19

tasmāt_tasmāt asaktaḥ_asakta satatam_satatam kāryam_kṛ karma_karman samācara_samācar
asaktaḥ_asakta hi_hi ācaran_ācar karma_karman param_para āpnoti_āp pūruṣaḥ_pūruṣa

śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara :yasmāt_yasmāt evambhūtasya_evambhūta jñāninaḥ_jñānin eva_eva karma--_karman anupayogaḥ_anupayoga na_na anyasya_anya tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad karma_karman kuru_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti asaktaḥ_asakta phala--_phala saṅga--_saṅga rahitaḥ_rahita san_as kāryam_kārya avaśya--_avaśya kartavya--_kṛ tayā_tā vihitam_vidhā nityam_nityam naimittikam_naimittika karma_karman samyak_samyak ācara_ācar hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt asaktaḥ_asakta karma_karman ācaran_ācar puruṣaḥ_puruṣa param_para mokṣam_mokṣa citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi jñāna--_jñāna dvārā_dvār prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_yad na_na tvam_tvad evaṃbhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta jñānī_jñānin kintu_kiṃtu karma--_karman adhikṛtaḥ_adhikṛ eva_eva mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu asaktaḥ_asakta phala--_phala kāmanā--_kāmanā rahitaḥ_rahita satatam_satatam sarvadā_sarvadā na_na tu_tu kadācid_kadācid kāryam_kṛ avaśya--_avaśya kartavyam_kṛ yāvat_yāvat jīva--_jīva ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti coditam_coday tam_tad etam_etad veda--_veda anuvacanena_anuvacana brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vividiṣanti_vividiṣ yajñena_yajña dānena_dāna tapasā_tapas anāśakena_anāśaka iti_iti nitya--_nitya naimittika--_naimittika lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa samyak_samyak ācara_ācar yathā_yathā śāstram_śāstra nirvartaya_nirvartay asaktaḥ_asakta hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt ācaran_ācar īśvara--_īśvara artham_artha karma_karman kurvan_kṛ sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi jñāna--_jñāna prāpti--_prāpti dvāreṇa_dvāra param_para mokṣam_mokṣa āpnoti_āp pūruṣaḥ_pūruṣa puruṣaḥ_puruṣa saḥ_tad eva_eva sat--_sat puruṣaḥ_puruṣa na_na anyaḥ_anya iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tasmāt_tasmāt tava_tvad jñāna--_jñāna bhūmikā--_bhūmikā ārohaṇe_ārohaṇa na_na asti_as yogya--_yogya tā_tā kāmya--_kāmya karmaṇi_karman tu_tu sat--_sat vivekavataḥ_vivekavat tava_tvad na_na eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra tasmāt_tasmāt niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmā_karman eva_eva kuru_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti kāryam_kārya avaśya--_avaśya kartavya--_kṛ tvena_tva vihitam_vidhā param_para mokṣam_mokṣa

baladevaḥ_baladeva yasmāt_yasmāt labdha--_labh ātma--_ātman avalokanasya_avalokana eva_eva karma--_karman anupayogaḥ_anupayoga tasmāt_tasmāt etādṛś--_etādṛś tvam_tva kāryam_kṛ kartavya--_kṛ tvena_tva vihitam_vidhā karma_karman samācara_samācar asaktaḥ_asakta phala--_phala icchā--_icchā śūnyaḥ_śūnya san_as param_para deha--_deha ādi--_ādi bhinnam_bhid ātmānam_ātman
BhG 3.20

karmaṇā_karman eva_eva hi_hi saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi āsthitāḥ_āsthā janaka--_janaka ādayaḥ_ādi
loka--_loka saṃgraham_saṃgraha eva_eva api_api saṃpaśyan_saṃpaś kartum_kṛ arhasi_arh

pramāṇayati_pramāṇay karmaṇā_karman eva_eva śuddha--_śuddha sattvāḥ_sattva santaḥ_as saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi samyak_samyak jñānam_jñāna prāptāḥ_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yadi_yadi api_api tvam_tvad samyak_samyak jñāninam_jñānin eva_eva ātmānam_ātman manyase_man tathā_tathā api_api karma--_karman ācaraṇam_ācaraṇa bhadram_bhadra eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah loka--_loka saṅgraham_saṃgraha iti_iti ādi_ādi lokasya_loka saṅgraham_saṃgraha sva--_sva dharme_dharma pravartanam_pravartana mayā_mad karmaṇi_karman kṛte_kṛ janaḥ_jana sarvaḥ_sarva api_api kariṣyati_kṛ anyathā_anyathā jñāni--_jñānin dṛṣṭāntena_dṛṣṭānta ajñaḥ_ajña nija--_nija dharmam_dharma nityam_nityam karma_karman tyajan_tyaj patet_pat iti_iti evam_evam loka--_loka rakṣaṇam_rakṣaṇa api_api tāvat_tāvat prayojanam_prayojana saṃpaśyan_saṃpaś katham_katham kartum_kṛ eva_eva arhasi_arh na_na tyaktum_tyaj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

tathā_tathā ca_ca na_na kevalam_kevala jñāninaḥ_jñānin eva_eva karma--_karman anadhikāraḥ_anadhikāra kintu_kiṃtu jñāna--_jñāna arthinaḥ_arthin api_api viraktasya_virañj tathā_tathā ca_ca mayā_mad api_api viraktena_virañj jñāna--_jñāna arthinā_arthin karmāṇi_karman heyāni_hā eva_eva iti_iti arjuna--_arjuna āśaṅkām_āśaṅkā kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa anadhikāra--_anadhikāra pratipādanena_pratipādana apanudati_apanud bhagavān_bhagavat karmaṇā_karman eva_eva iti_iti

janaka--_janaka ādayaḥ_ādi janakā--_janakā jāta--_jan śatru--_śatru prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti śruti--_śruti smṛti--_smṛti prasiddhāḥ_prasidh kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya vidvāṃsaḥ_vidvas api_api karmaṇā_karman eva_eva saha_saha na_na tu_tu karma--_karman tyāgena_tyāga sa_tad saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi sādhyām_sādhay jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā āsthitāḥ_āsthā hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad api_api kṣatriyaḥ_kṣatriya vividiṣuḥ_vividiṣu vidvān_vid vā_vā karma_karman kartum_kṛ arhasi_arh iti_iti anuṣaṅgaḥ_anuṣaṅga brāhmaṇaḥ_brāhmaṇa putra--_putra eṣaṇāyāḥ_eṣaṇā ca_ca vitta--_vitta ṣaṇāyāḥ_ṣaṇā ca_ca loka--_loka eṣaṇāyāḥ_eṣaṇā ca_ca vyutthāya_vyutthā atha_atha bhikṣā--_bhikṣā caryam_carya caranti_car iti_iti saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa vidhāyake_vidhāyaka vākye_vākya brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa tvasya_tva vivakṣita--_vivakṣita tvāt_tva svārājya--_svārājya kāmaḥ_kāma rājā_rājan rājasūyena_rājasūya yajeta_yaj iti_iti atra_atra kṣatriya--_kṣatriya tvāvat_tvāvat catvāraḥ_catur āśramāḥ_āśrama brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa trayaḥ_tri rājan_rājan yasya_yad dvau_dvi vaiśyasya_vaiśya iti_iti ca_ca smṛteḥ_smṛti purāṇe_purāṇa api_api

lg.l: mukha--_mukha jānām_ja ayam_idam dharmaḥ_dharma yat_yad viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu liṅga--_liṅga dhāraṇam_dhāraṇa
bāhu--_bāhu jāta--_jan ūru--_ūru jātānām_jan na_na ayam_idam dharmaḥ_dharma praśasyate_praśaṃs

div.p: iti_iti kṣatriya--_kṣatriya vaiśyayoḥ_vaiśya saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa abhāvaḥ_abhāva uktaḥ_vac tasmāt_tasmāt yuktam_yukta eva_eva uktam_vac bhagavatā_bhagavant karmaṇā_karman eva_eva hi_hi saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi āsthitāḥ_āsthā janaka--_janaka ādayaḥ_ādi

sarve_sarva rāja--_rājan āśritāḥ_āśri dharmāḥ_dharma rājā_rājan dharmasya_dharma dhārakaḥ_dhāraka iti_iti ādi_ādi smṛteḥ_smṛti varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama pravartaka--_pravartaka tvena_tva api_api kṣatriyaḥ_kṣatriya avaśyam_avaśyam karma_karman kuryāt_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah loka--_loka iti_iti lokānām_loka sve_sva sve_sva dharme_dharma pravartanam_pravartana unmārgāt_unmārga nivartanam_nivartana ca_ca loka--_loka saṅgrahaḥ_saṃgraha tam_tad paśyan_dṛś api_api śabdāt_śabda janaka--_janaka ādi--_ādi śiṣṭa--_śās ācāram_ācāra api_api paśyan_dṛś karma_karman kartum_kṛ arhasi_arh eva_eva iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya kṣatriya--_kṣatriya janma--_janman prāpakeṇa_prāpaka karmaṇā_karman ārabdha--_ārabh śarīraḥ_śarīra tvam_tvad vidvān_vidvas api_api janaka--_janaka ādi--_ādi vat_vat prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman phalena_phala loka--_loka saṅgraha--_saṃgraha artham_artha karma_karman kartum_kṛ yogyaḥ_yogya bhavasi_bhū na_na tu_tu tyaktum_tyaj brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa janma--_janman alābhāt_alābha iti_iti etādṛśa--_etādṛśa bhagavat--_bhagavant abhiprāya--_abhiprāya vidā_vid bhagavatā_bhagavant bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kṛtā_kṛt brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa eva_eva saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa na_na anyasya_anya iti_iti nirṇītam_nirṇī vārtika--_vārttika kṛtā_kṛt tu_tu prauḍhi--_prauḍhi vāda--_vāda mātreṇa_mātra kṣatriya--_kṣatriya vaiśyayoḥ_vaiśya
api_api saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa asti_as iti_iti uktam_vac iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha atra_atra sat--_sat ācāram_ācāra pramāṇayati_pramāṇay karmaṇā_karman iti_iti yadi_yadi vā_vā tvam_tvad ātmānam_ātman jñāna--_jñāna adhikāriṇam_adhikārin manyase_man tat_tad api_api loke_loka śikṣā_śikṣā grahaṇa--_grahaṇa artham_artha karma_karman eva_eva kuru_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah loka--_loka iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva sat--_sat ācāram_ācāra atra_atra pramāṇayati_pramāṇay karmaṇā_karman eva_eva iti_iti karmaṇā_karman eva_eva upāyena_upāya viśuddha--_viśudh cittāḥ_citta santaḥ_as saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi sva--_sva ātma--_ātman avalokana--_avalokana lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa āsthitāḥ_āsthā prāpuḥ_prāp karmaṇā_karman eva_eva iti_iti viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa sambandhe_sambandha eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra tasya_tad ayogam_ayoga vyavacchinnatti_vyavacchid śaṅkha--_śaṅkha pāṇḍuraḥ_pāṇḍura eva_eva itivat_itivat tena_tena śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādeḥ_ādi na_na vyudāsaḥ_vyudāsa karmaṇā_karman yajña--_yajña ādinā_ādi saha_saha eva_eva śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādinā_ādi iti_iti kecid_kaścit

nanu_nanu saniṣṭhasya_saniṣṭha ātma--_ātman avalokane_avalokana karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna na_na asti_as iti_iti uktam_vac mama_mad pariniṣṭhitasya_pariniṣṭhā avalokita--_avalokay sva--_sva para--_para ātmanaḥ_ātman karma--_karman upadeśaḥ_upadeśa kutas_kutas iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah loka--_loka iti_iti satyam_satya tvam_tvad īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa eva_eva tathā_tathā api_api loka--_loka saṅgrahāya_saṃgraha karma_karman kuru_kṛ iti_iti arjune_arjuna mayi_mad karma_karman kurvāṇe_kṛ sarva--_sarva lokaḥ_loka karma_karman kariṣyati_kṛ itarathā_itarathā mad--_mad dṛṣṭāntena_dṛṣṭānta ajñaḥ_ajña api_api lokaḥ_loka karma_karman tyajan_tyaj patiṣyati_pat iti_iti loka--_loka saṃrakṣaṇam_saṃrakṣaṇa tat_tad phalam_phala
BhG 3.21

lg.l: yat_yad yat_yad ācarati_ācar śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha tat_tad tat_tad eva_eva itaraḥ_itara janaḥ_jana
sa_tad yat_yad pramāṇam_pramāṇa kurute_kṛ lokaḥ_loka tat_tad anuvartate_anuvṛt

div.p: syāt_as āha_ah itaraḥ_itara prākṛtaḥ_prākṛta api_api janaḥ_jana tat_tad tat_tad eva_eva ācarati_ācar sa_tad śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha janaḥ_jana karma--_karman śāstram_śāstra tad--_tad nivṛtti--_nivṛtti śāstram_śāstra vā_vā yat_yad pramāṇam_pramāṇa manyate_man tat_tad eva_eva lokaḥ_loka api_api anusarati_anusṛ

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu mayā_mad karmaṇi_karman kriyamāṇe_kṛ api_api lokaḥ_loka kim_kim iti_iti tat_tad saṅgṛhṇīyāt_saṃgrah iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha ācāra--_ācāra anuvidhāyi--_anuvidhāyin tvāt_tva iti_iti āha_ah yat_yad yat_yad iti_iti śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha pradhāna--_pradhāna bhūtaḥ_bhū rāja--_rājan ādiḥ_ādi yat_yad yat_yad karma_karman ācarati_ācar śubham_śubha aśubham_aśubha vā_vā tat_tad tat_tad eva_eva ācarati_ācar itaraḥ_itara prākṛtaḥ_prākṛta tad--_tad anugataḥ_anugam janaḥ_jana na_na tu_tu anyat_anya svātantryeṇa_svātantrya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu śāstram_śāstra avalokya_avalokay a_a śāstrīyam_śāstrīya śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha ācāram_ācāra parityajya_parityaj śāstrīyam_śāstrīya eva_eva kutas_kutas na_na ācarati_ācar lokaḥ_loka iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk ācāra--_ācāra vat_vat pratipattau_pratipatti api_api śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha anusāri--_anusārin tām_tā itarasya_itara darśayati_darśay sa_tad yat_yad iti_iti sa_tad śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha yat_yad laukikam_laukika vaidikam_vaidika vā_vā pramāṇam_pramāṇa kurute_kṛ pramāṇa--_pramāṇa tvena_tva manyate_man tat_tad eva_eva lokaḥ_loka api_api anuvartate_anuvṛt pramāṇam_pramāṇa kurute_kṛ na_na tu_tu svātantryeṇa_svātantrya kiṃcid_kaścit iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca pradhāna--_pradhāna bhūtena_bhū tvayā_tvad rājñā_rājan loka--_loka saṃrakṣaṇa--_saṃrakṣaṇa artham_artha karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ eva_eva pradhāna--_pradhāna anuyāyinaḥ_anuyāyin jana--_jana vyavahārāḥ_vyavahāra bhavanti_bhū iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
div.l: āha_ah
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva loka--_loka saṅgraha--_saṃgraha prakāram_prakāra eva_eva āha_ah yat_yad yat_yad iti_iti śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha mahattamaḥ_mahattama yat_yad karma_karman yathā_yathā ācarati_ācar tat_tad karma_karman tathā_tathā eva_eva itaraḥ_itara kaniṣṭhaḥ_kaniṣṭha api_api ācarati_ācar sa_tad śresṭhaḥ_śresṭha tasmin_tad karmaṇi_karman yat_yad śāstram_śāstra pramāṇam_pramāṇa kurute_kṛ manyate_man lokaḥ_loka kaniṣṭhaḥ_kaniṣṭha api_api tad--_tad anuyāyī_anuyāyin tat_tad eva_eva anuvartate_anuvṛt śāstra--_śāstra upetam_upe śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha ācaraṇam_ācaraṇa kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa lipsunā_lipsu kaniṣṭhena_kaniṣṭha anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ittham_ittham ca_ca tejasvinaḥ_tejasvin śreṣṭhasya_śreṣṭha ca_ca yat_yad kvacid_kvacid svaira--_svaira ācaraṇam_ācaraṇa tad--_tad vyāvṛtam_vyāvṛ tasya_tad śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha kṛta--_kṛ tve_tva api_api śāstra--_śāstra upeta--_upe tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva
BhG 3.22

lg.l: na_na me_mad pārtha_pārtha asti_as kartavyam_kṛ triṣu_tri lokeṣu_loka kiṃcana_kaścana
na_na anavāptam_anavāpta avāptavyam_avāp varte_vṛt eva_eva ca_ca karmaṇi_karman

div.p: āha_ah he_he pārtha_pārtha me_mad kartavyam_kartavya na_na asti_as yatas_yatas triṣu_tri api_api lokeṣu_loka an_an avāptam_avāp a_a prāptam_prāp sadā_sadā āvaptavyam_āvap prāpyam_prāp na_na asti_as tathā_tathā api_api karmaṇi_karman aham_mad varte_vṛt eva_eva karma_karman karomi_kṛ eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana atra_atra ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva dṛṣṭānte_dṛṣṭānta iti_iti āha_ah na_na mama_mad iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri he_he pārtha_pārtha na_na me_mad mama_mad triṣu_tri api_api lokeṣu_loka kim_ka api_api kartavyam_kṛ nā_na asti_as yatas_yatas anavāptam_anavāpta phalam_phala kiṃcid_kaścit mama_mad avāptavyam_avāp nā_na asti_as tathā_tathā api_api varte_vṛt eva_eva karmaṇi_karman aham_mad karma_karman karomi_kṛ eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pārtha_pārtha iti_iti sambodhayan_sambodhay viśuddha--_viśudh kṣatriya--_kṣatriya vaṃśa--_vaṃśa udbhavaḥ_udbhava tvam_tvad śūra--_śūra apatya--_apatya apatya--_apatya tvena_tva ca_ca atyantam_atyantam mad--_mad samaḥ_sama aham_mad iva_iva vartitum_vṛt arhasi_arh iti_iti darśayati_darśay
div.l: āha_ah _
