div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva ācaret_ācar āha_ah sarva--_sarva īśasya_īśa satya--_satya saṅkalpasya_saṃkalpa satya--_satya kāmasya_kāma me_mad kartavyam_kṛ na_na asti_as phala--_phala arthinā_arthin khalu_khalu karma_karman anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā na_na ca_ca nikhila--_nikhila phala--_phala āśrayasya_āśraya svayam_svayam parama--_parama phala--_phala ātmanaḥ_ātman me_mad karma_karman apekṣyam_apekṣ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etat_etad darśayati_darśay triṣu_tri iti_iti yatas_yatas sarveṣu_sarva lokeṣu_loka karmaṇā_karman yat_yad phalam_phala avāptavyam_avāp tad--_tad anavāptam_anavāpta alabdham_alabdha mama_mad na_na asti_as sarvam_sarva tat_tad madīyam_madīya eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā api_api śāstra--_śāstra uktam_vac karma_karman aham_mad karomi_kṛ eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah varte_vṛt iti_iti
BhG 3.23

lg.l: yadi_yadi hi_hi aham_mad na_na varteyam_vṛt jātu_jātu karmaṇi_karman atandritaḥ_atandrita
mama_mad vartma_vartman anuvartante_anuvṛt manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya pārtha_pārtha sarvaśas_sarvaśas

div.p: darśayati_darśay atandritaḥ_atandrita analasaḥ_analasa san_as yadi_yadi karmaṇi_karman na_na varteya_vṛt karma_karman na_na anutiṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā tarhi_tarhi mama_mad eva_eva vartma_vartman mārgam_mārga manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya anuvartante_anuvṛt anuverteran_anuvert iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana loka--_loka saṅgrahaḥ_saṃgraha api_api na_na te_tvad kartavyaḥ_kṛ viphala--_viphala tvāt_tva iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah yadi_yadi hi_hi aham_mad iti_iti yadi_yadi punar_punar aham_mad atandritaḥ_atandrita analasaḥ_analasa san_as karmaṇi_karman jātu_jātu kadācid_kadācid na_na varteya_vṛt na_na anutiṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā karmāṇi_karman tadā_tadā mama_mad śreṣṭhasya_śreṣṭha sataḥ_as vartma_vartman mārgam_mārga he_he pārtha_pārtha manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya karma--_karman adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin santaḥ_as anuvartante_anuvṛt sarva--_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra
div.l: anuvarteran_anuvṛt
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva yadi_yadi iti_iti aham_mad sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara siddha--_sidh sarva--_sarva arthaḥ_artha api_api yadu--_yadu kula--_kula avatīrṇaḥ_avatṛ jātu_jātu kadācid_kadācid tad--_tad kula--_kula ucite_ucita śāstra--_śāstra ukte_vac karmaṇi_karman na_na varteya_vṛt tat_tad na_na kuryām_kṛ atandritaḥ_atandrita sa_sa avadhānaḥ_avadhāna san_as tarhi_tarhi mām_mad dṛṣṭāntam_dṛṣṭānta kṛtvā_kṛ kula--_kula vihita--_vidhā ācāra--_ācāra tyāga--_tyāga rūpam_rūpa anuvarteran_anuvṛt tatas_tatas bhraṃśeran_bhraṃś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 3.24

lg.l: utsīdeyuḥ_utsad ime_idam lokāḥ_loka na_na kuryām_kṛ karma_karman ced_ced aham_mad
saṃkarasya_saṃkara ca_ca kartā_kartṛ syām_as upahanyām_upahan imāḥ_idam prajāḥ_prajā

div.p: āha_ah utsīdeyuḥ_utsad naśyeyuḥ_naś bhavet_bhū syām_as bhaveyam_bhū upahanyām_upahan

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana śreṣṭhasya_śreṣṭha tava_tvad mārga--_mārga anuvarti--_anuvartin tvam_tva manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya ucitam_ucita eva_eva anuvarti--_anuvartin tve_tva kaḥ_ka doṣaḥ_doṣa iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah utsīdeyuḥ_utsad iti_iti aham_mad īśvaraḥ_īśvara ced_ced yadi_yadi karma_karman na_na kuryām_kṛ tadā_tadā mad--_mad anuvartinām_anuvartin manu--_manu ādīnām_ādi api_api karma--_karman anupapatteḥ_anupapatti loka--_loka sthiti--_sthiti hetoḥ_hetu karmaṇaḥ_karman lopena_lopa ime_idam sarve_sarva lokāḥ_loka utsīdeyuḥ_utsad vinaśyeyuḥ_vinaś tatas_tatas ca_ca varṇa--_varṇa saṃkarasya_saṃkara ca_ca kartā_kartṛ aham_mad eva_eva syām_as tena_tad ca_ca imāḥ_idam sarvāḥ_sarva prajāḥ_prajā aham_mad eva_eva upahanyām_upahan dharma--_dharma lopena_lopa vināśayeyam_vināśay katham_katham ca_ca prajānām_prajā anugraha--_anugraha artham_artha pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt īśvaraḥ_īśvara aham_mad tāḥ_tad sarvāḥ_sarva vināśayeyam_vināśay iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

yat_yad yat_yad ācarati_ācar iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi aparā_apara yojanā_yojana na_na kevalam_kevala loka--_loka saṃgraham_saṃgraha sampaśyan_saṃpaś kartum_kṛ arhasi_arh api_api tu_tu śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha ācāra--_ācāra tvāt_tva api_api iti_iti āha_ah yat_yad yat_yad iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca mama_mad śreṣṭhasya_śreṣṭha yādṛśaḥ_yādṛśa eva_eva ācāraḥ_ācāra tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa eva_eva mad--_mad anuvartinā_anuvartin tvayā_tvad anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā na_na svātantryeṇa_svātantrya anyaḥ_anya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa tava_tvad ācāraḥ_ācāra yaḥ_yad mayā_mad anuvartanīyaḥ_anuvṛt iti_iti ākāṅkṣāyām_ākāṅkṣā na_na me_mad pārtha_pārtha iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi tribhiḥ_tri ślokaiḥ_śloka tad--_tad pradarśanam_pradarśana iti_iti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha utsīdeyuḥ_utsad mām_mad dṛṣṭāntīkṛtya_dṛṣṭāntīkṛ dharmam_dharma akurvāṇāḥ_akurvāṇa bhraṃśeyuḥ_bhraṃś tatas_tatas ca_ca varṇa--_varṇa saṅkaraḥ_saṃkara bhavet_bhū tasya_tad api_api aham_mad eva_eva kartā_kartṛ syām_as evam_evam aham_mad eva_eva prajāḥ_prajā hanyām_han malināḥ_malina kuryām_kṛ

baladevaḥ_baladeva tatas_tatas kim_ka syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah utsīdeyuḥ_utsad iti_iti aham_mad sarva--_sarva śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha ced_ced śāstra--_śāstra uktam_vac karma_karman na_na kuryām_kṛ tarhi_tarhi ime_idam lokāḥ_loka utsīdeyuḥ_utsad vibhraṣṭa--_vibhraṃś maryādāḥ_maryādā syuḥ_as tad--_tad vibhraṃśe_vibhraṃśa sati_as yaḥ_yad saṅkaraḥ_saṃkara syāt_as tasya_tad api_api aham_mad eva_eva kartā_kṛ syām_as evam_evam ca_ca prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati aham_mad imāḥ_idam prajāḥ_prajā sāṅkarya--_sāṃkarya doṣeṇa_doṣa upahanyām_upahan malināḥ_malina kuryām_kṛ tathā_tathā ca_ca eṣa_etad setuḥ_setu vidharaṇaḥ_vidharaṇa eṣām_idam lokānām_loka a_a saṃbhedāya_sambheda iti_iti śrutyā_śruti loka--_loka maryādā--_maryādā vidhāraka--_vidhāraka tvena_tva parigītasya_parigā me_mad tad--_tad maryādā--_maryādā bhedaka--_bhedaka tvam_tva syāt_as iti_iti evam_evam upadiśataḥ_upadiś api_api hareḥ_hari yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit sva--_sva bhakta--_bhakta sukha--_sukha icchoḥ_icchu svaiḥ_sva ācaritam_ācar dṛṣṭam_dṛś tat_tad khalu_khalu vidhāyakena_vidhāyaka tad--_tad vacasā_vacas anupeta--_anupeta tvāt_tva īśvarīya--_īśvarīya tvāt_tva ca_ca avaraiḥ_avara nā_na eva_eva ācaraṇīyam_ācar yat_yad uktam_vac śrīmatā_śrīmat śukena_śuka

lg.l: īśvarāṇām_īśvara vacaḥ_vacas satyam_satya
tathā_tathā eva_eva ācaritam_ācar kvacid_kvacid
teṣām_tad yat_yad sva--_sva vacaḥ--_vacas yuktam_yuj
buddhimān_buddhimat tat_tad samācaret_samācar

div.p: na_na etat_etad samācaret_samācar jātu_jātu manasā_manas api_api hi_hi anīśvaraḥ_anīśvara vinaśyati_vinaś ācaran_ācar mauḍhyāt_mauḍhya yathā_yathā a_a rudraḥ_rudra abdhi--_abdhi jam_ja viṣam_viṣa
BhG 3.25

lg.l: saktāḥ_sañj karmaṇi_karman a_a vidvāṃsaḥ_vid yathā_yathā kurvanti_kṛ bhārata_bhārata
kuryāt_kṛ vidvān_vid tathā_tathā asaktaḥ_asakta cikīrṣuḥ_cikīrṣu loka--_loka saṃgraham_saṃgraha

div.p: kāryam_kṛ upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ karmaṇi_karman saktāḥ_sañj abhiniviṣṭāḥ_abhiniviś santaḥ_as yathājñāḥ_yathājña karmāṇi_karman kurvanti_kṛ asaktaḥ_asakta san_as vidvān_vidvas kuryāt_kṛ loka--_loka saṃgraham_saṃgraha kartum_kṛ icchuḥ_icchu 25_25

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu tava_tvad īśvarasya_īśvara loka--_loka saṃgraha--_saṃgraha artham_artha karmāṇi_karman kurvāṇasya_kṛ api_api kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāna--_abhimāna abhāvāt_abhāva na_na kā_ka api_api kṣatiḥ_kṣati mama_mad tu_tu jīvasya_jīva loka--_loka saṃgraha--_saṃgraha artham_artha karmāṇi_karman kurvāṇasya_kṛ kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimānena_abhimāna jñāna--_jñāna abhibhavaḥ_abhibhava syāt_as iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah saktāḥ_sañj iti_iti saktāḥ_sañj kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimānena_abhimāna phala--_phala abhisandhinā_abhisaṃdhi ca_ca karmaṇi_karman abhiniviṣṭāḥ_abhiniviś avidvāṃsaḥ_avidvas ajñāḥ_ajña yathā_yathā kurvanti_kṛ karma_karman loka--_loka saṃgraham_saṃgraha kartum_kṛ icchuḥ_icchu vidvān_vidvas ātma--_ātman vid_vid api_api tathā_tathā eva_eva kuryāt_kṛ kintu_kiṃtu asaktaḥ_asakta san_as kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimānam_abhimāna phala--_phala abhisandhim_abhisaṃdhi ca_ca akurvan_akurvat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhārata_bhārata iti_iti jñānam_jñāna tasyām_tad rata--_ram tvena_tva vā_vā tvam_tvad yathā_yathā ukta--_vac śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha bodha--_bodha yogyaḥ_yogya asi_as iti_iti darśayati_darśay 25_25
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tasmāt_tasmāt pratiṣṭhitena_pratiṣṭhā jñāninā_jñānin api_api karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ saktāḥ_sañj iti_iti
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva tasmāt_tasmāt pratiṣṭhite_pratiṣṭhā api_api tvam_tvad loka--_loka hitāya_hita veda--_veda uktam_vac sva--_sva karma_karman prakuru_prakṛ iti_iti āśayena_āśaya āha_ah saktāḥ_sañj iti_iti ajñāḥ_ajña yathā_yathā karmaṇi_karman saktāḥ_sañj phala--_phala lipsayā_lipsā abhiniviṣṭāḥ_abhiniviś tata_tata kurvanti_kṛ evam_evam vidvān_vid api_api kuryāt_kṛ kintu_kiṃtu asaktaḥ_asakta phala--_phala lipsā--_lipsā śūnyaḥ_śūnya san_as sphuṭam_sphuṭa anyat_anya 25_25
BhG 3.26

lg.l: na_na buddhi--_buddhi bhedam_bheda janayet_janay ajñānām_ajña karma--_karman saṅginām_saṅgin
joṣayet_joṣay sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman vidvān_vidvas yuktaḥ_yuj samācaran_samācar

div.p: na_na iti_iti āha_ah na_na buddhi--_buddhi bhedam_bheda iti_iti ajñānām_ajña ataeva_ataeva karma--_karman saṅginām_saṅgin karma--_karman āsaktānām_āsañj buddheḥ_buddhi bhedam_bheda anyathātvam_anyathātva na_na janayet_janay karmaṇaḥ_karman sakāśāt_sakāśāt buddhi--_buddhi vicālanam_vicālana na_na kuryāt_kṛ joṣayet_joṣay sevayet_sevay ajñān_ajña karmāṇi_karman kārayet_kāray iti_iti arthaḥ_artha katham_katham yuktaḥ_yuj avahitaḥ_avahita bhūtvā_bhū svayam_svayam ācaran_ācar san_as buddhi--_buddhi vicālane_vicālana kṛte_kṛ sati_as karmasu_karman śraddhā--_śraddhā nivṛtteḥ_nivṛtti jñānasya_jñāna ca_ca anutpatteḥ_anutpatti tesām_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya bhraṃśaḥ_bhraṃśa syāt_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 26_26

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu karma--_karman anuṣṭhānena_anuṣṭhāna eva_eva loka--_loka saṃgrahaḥ_saṃgraha kartavyaḥ_kṛ na_na tu_tu tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna upadeśena_upadeśa iti_iti kaḥ_ka hetuḥ_hetu atas_atas āha_ah na_na buddhi--_buddhi iti_iti ajñānām_ajña avivekinām_avivekin kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimānena_abhimāna phala--_phala abhisandhinā_abhisaṃdhi ca_ca karma--_karman saṅginām_saṅgin karmaṇi_karman abhiniviṣṭānām_abhiniviś yā_yad buddhiḥ_buddhi aham_mad etat_etad karma_karman kariṣye_kṛ etad--_etad phalam_phala ca_ca bhokṣye_bhuj iti_iti tasyāḥ_tad bhedam_bheda vicālanam_vicālana akartṛ--_akartṛ kintu_kiṃtu yuktaḥ_yuj avahitaḥ_avahita san_as vidvān_vidvas loka--_loka saṃgraham_saṃgraha cikīrṣuḥ_cikīrṣu avidvat--_avidvas adhikārikāṇi_adhikārika sarva--_sarva karmaṇi_karman samācaran_samācar teṣām_tad śraddhām_śraddhā utpādya_utpāday joṣayet_joṣay prītyā_prīti sevayet_sevay anadhikāriṇām_anadhikārin upadeśena_upadeśa buddhi--_buddhi vicālane_vicālana kṛte_kṛ karmasu_karman śraddhā--_śraddhā nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti jñānasya_jñāna ca_ca anutpatteḥ_anutpatti ubhaya--_ubhaya bhraṣṭa--_bhraṃś tvam_tva syāt_as tathā_tathā ca_ca uktam_vac
ajñasya_ajña ardha--_ardha prabuddhasya_prabudh sarvam_sarva brahma_brahman iti_iti yaḥ_yad vadet_vad mahā--_mahat niraya--_niraya jāleṣu_jāla sa_tad tena_tad viniyojitaḥ_viniyojay iti_iti

tvam_tvad karma--_karman sannyāsam_saṃnyāsa kṛtvā_kṛ jñāna--_jñāna abhyāsena_abhyāsa aham_mad iva_iva kṛtārthībhava_kṛtārthībhū eti_e buddhi--_buddhi bhedam_bheda na_na janayet_janay karma--_karman saṅginam_saṅgin aśuddha--_aśuddha antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa tvena_tva karmasu_karman eva_eva āsaktimatām_āsaktimat kintu_kiṃtu tvam_tvad kṛtārthībhaviṣyan_kṛtārthībhū niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmā_karman eva_eva iti_iti karmāṇi_karman eva_eva yojayet_yojay kārayet_kāray karmāṇi_karman samācaran_samācar dṛṣṭāntībhavet_dṛṣṭāntībhū

lg.l: nanu_nanu
svayam_svayam niḥśreyasam_niḥśreyasa vidvān_vid na_na vakti_vac a_a jñāya_jñā karma_karman hi_hi
na_na rāti_rā rogiṇaḥ_rogin apathyam_apathya vāñchataḥ_vāñch api_api bhiṣaktamaḥ_bhiṣaktama

div.p: iti_iti ajita--_ajita vākyena_vākya etat_etad virudhyate_virudh satyam_satya tat_tad khalu_khalu bhakti--_bhakti upadeṣṭṛka--_upadeṣṭṛka viṣayam_viṣaya idam_idam tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna upadeṣṭṛka--_upadeṣṭṛka viṣayam_viṣaya iti_iti avirodhaḥ_avirodha jñānasya_jñāna antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi adhīna--_adhīna tvāt_tva tat_tad śuddheḥ_śuddhi tu_tu niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman adhīna--_adhīna tvāt_tva bhakteḥ_bhakti tu_tu svatas_svatas prābalyāt_prābalya antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi paryanta--_paryanta anapekṣa--_anapekṣa tvāt_tva yadi_yadi bhaktau_bhakti śraddhām_śraddhā utpādayitum_utpāday śaknuyāt_śak tadā_tadā karmiṇām_karmin buddhi--_buddhi bhedam_bheda api_api janayet_janay bhaktau_bhakti śraddhāvatām_śraddhāvat karma--_karman anadhikārāt_anadhikāra

tāvat_tāvat karmāṇi_karman kurvīta_kṛ na_na nirvidyeta_nirvid yāvatā_yāvat
mad--_mad kathā--_kathā śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādau_ādi vā_vā śraddhā_śraddhā yāvat_yāvat na_na jāyate_jan
dharmān_dharma santyajya_saṃtyaj yaḥ_yad sarvān_sarva mām_mad bhajet_bhaj sa_tad tu_tu sattamaḥ_sattama iti_iti
sarva--_sarva dharmān_dharma parityajya_parityaj mām_mad ekam_eka śaraṇam_śaraṇa vraja_vraj 18.66_18.66 iti_iti

tyaktvā_tyaj sva--_sva dharmam_dharma caraṇa--_caraṇa ambujam_ambuja hareḥ_hari
bhajan_bhaj apakvaḥ_apakva patet_pat tatas_tatas yadi_yadi
div.l: iti_iti ādi--_ādi vacanebhyaḥ_vacana iti_iti vivecanīyam_vivic
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka ca_ca loka--_loka hita--_hita icchuḥ_icchu jñānī_jñānin sa_sa avahitaḥ_avahita syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah na_na buddhi--_buddhi iti_iti vidvān_vid pariniṣṭhitaḥ_pariniṣṭhā api_api karma--_karman saṅginām_saṅgin karma--_karman śraddhā--_śraddhā jāḍya--_jāḍya bhājām_bhāj ajñānām_ajña buddhi--_buddhi bhedam_bheda na_na janayet_janay kim_ka karmabhiḥ_karman hiḥ_hi aham_mad iva_iva jñānena_jñāna eva_eva kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha bhava_bhū iti_iti karma--_karman niṣṭhātaḥ_niṣṭhā tad--_tad buddhim_buddhi na_na apanayet_apanī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kintu_kiṃtu svayam_svayam karmasu_karman yuktaḥ_yuj sāvadhānaḥ_sāvadhāna tāni_tad samyak_samyak sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upasaṃhāreṇa_upasaṃhāra ācaran_ācar sarvāṇi_sarva vihitāni_vidhā karmāṇi_karman yoṣayet_yoṣay prītyā_prīti sevayet_sevay ajñān_ajña karmāṇi_karman kārayet_kāray iti_iti arthaḥ_artha buddhi--_buddhi bhede_bheda sati_as karmasu_karman śraddhā--_śraddhā nivṛtte_nivṛt jñānasya_jñāna ca_ca anudayāt_anudaya ubhaya--_ubhaya vibhraṣṭāḥ_vibhraṃś te_tad syuḥ_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

lg.l: svayam_svayam niḥśreyasam_niḥśreyasa vidvān_vid na_na vakti_vac a_a jñāya_jñā karma_karman hi_hi
na_na rāti_rā rogiṇaḥ_rogin apathyam_apathya vāñchataḥ_vāñch api_api bhiṣaktamaḥ_bhiṣaktama

div.l: iti_iti ajita--_ajita uktiḥ_ukti tu_tu karma--_karman saṅgītara--_saṅgītara para--_para tayā_tā neyā_nī

div.p: BhG 3.27

lg.l: prakṛteḥ_prakṛti kriyamāṇāni_kṛ guṇaiḥ_guṇa karmāṇi_karman sarvaśas_sarvaśas
ahaṃkāra--_ahaṃkāra vimūḍha--_vimuh ātmā_ātman kartāham_kṛ iti_iti manyate_man

div.p: darśayati_darśay prakṛteḥ_prakṛti guṇaiḥ_guṇa prakṛti--_prakṛti kāryaiḥ_kārya indriyaiḥ_indriya sarva--_sarva prakāreṇa_prakāra kriyamāṇāni_kṛ karmāṇi_karman tāni_tad aham_mad eva_eva kartā_kartṛ karomi_kṛ iti_iti manyate_man atra_atra hetuḥ_hetu ahaṃkāreṇa_ahaṃkāra indriya--_indriya ādiṣu_ādi ātma--_ātman adhyāsena_adhyāsa vimūḍha--_vimuh buddhiḥ_buddhi san_as 27_27

darśayan_darśay vivṛṇoti_vivṛ prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti māyā_māyā sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas guṇa--_guṇa mayī_maya mithyā_mithyā jñāna--_jñāna ātmikā_ātmaka pārameśvarī_pārameśvara śaktiḥ_śakti māyām_māyā tu_tu prakṛtim_prakṛti vidyāt_vid māyinam_māyin tu_tu maheśvaram_maheśvara iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tasyāḥ_tad prakṛteḥ_prakṛti guṇaiḥ_guṇa vikāraiḥ_vikāra kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa rūpaiḥ_rūpa kriyamāṇāni_kṛ laukikāni_laukika vaidikāni_vaidika ca_ca karmāṇi_karman sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarva--_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra ahaṅkāreṇa_ahaṃkāra kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa saṃghāta--_saṃghāta ātma--_ātman pratyayena_pratyaya vimūḍhaḥ_vimuh svarūpa--_svarūpa saḥ_tad ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra vimūḍha--_vimuh ātmā_ātman anātmani_anātman ātma--_ātman abhimānī_abhimānin tāni_tad karmāṇi_karman kartāham_kṛ iti_iti karomi_kṛ aham_mad iti_iti manyate_man kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva adhyāsena_adhyāsa kartāham_kṛ tṛn--_tṛn pratyayaḥ_pratyaya tena_tena na_na loka--_loka avyaya--_avyaya niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā khal--_khal artha--_artha tṛṇām_tṛṇa iti_iti ṣaṣṭhī--_ṣaṣṭhī pratiṣedhaḥ_pratiṣedha 27_27

kuryāt_kṛ darśayati_darśay prakṛteḥ_prakṛti guṇaiḥ_guṇa kāryaiḥ_kārya indriyaiḥ_indriya sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarva--_sarva prakāreṇa_prakāra kriyamāṇāni_kṛ yāni_yad karmāṇi_karman tāni_tad aham_mad eva_eva kartā_kartṛ karomi_kṛ iti_iti avidvān_avidvas manyate_man 27_27

baladevaḥ_baladeva :--_karmin tva--_tva sāmye_sāmya api_api vijña--_vijña ajñayoḥ_ajña viśeṣam_viśeṣa āha_ah prakṛteḥ_prakṛti iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi ahaṃkāra--_ahaṃkāra vimūḍha--_vimuh ātmā_ātman janaḥ_jana aham_mad karmāṇi_karman kartā_kartṛ iti_iti manyate_man na_na loka--_loka avyaya--_avyaya niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā iti_iti sūtrāt_sūtra ṣaṣṭhī--_ṣaṣṭhī niṣedhaḥ_niṣedha karmāṇi_karman laukikāni_laukika vaidikāni_vaidika ca_ca tāni_tad kīdṛśāni_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah prakṛteḥ_prakṛti īśa--_īśa māyāyāḥ_māyā guṇaiḥ_guṇa tad--_tad kāryaiḥ_kārya śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya prāṇaiḥ_prāṇa īśvara--_īśvara pravartitaiḥ_pravartay kriyamāṇāni_kṛ iti_iti idam_idam eva_eva veditavyam_vid tādṛśa--_tādṛśa sva--_sva vijñāna--_vijñāna śūnyaḥ_śūnya śarīra--_śarīra ādi--_ādi aham_mad bhāvavān_bhāvavat prākṛtaiḥ_prākṛta śarīra--_śarīra ādibhiḥ_ādi īśena_īśa ca_ca siddhāni_sidh karmāṇi_karman mayā_mad eva_eva ekena_eka kṛtāni_kṛ iti_iti manyate_man kartuḥ_kartṛ ātmanaḥ_ātman yat_yad kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva tat_tad kila_kila deha--_deha ādibhiḥ_ādi tribhiḥ_tri paramātmanā_paramātman ca_ca sarva--_sarva pravartakena_pravartaka ca_ca siddhi--_siddhi ati_ati na_na tu_tu ekena_eka jīvena_jīva eva_eva tat_tad ca_ca mayā_mad eva_eva siddhi--_siddhi ati_ati iti_iti jīvaḥ_jīva yat_yad manyate_man tat_tad ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra vimauḍhyāt_vimauḍhya eva_eva adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna tathā_tathā karthāḥ_kṛ iti_iti ādikāt_ādika carama--_carama adhyāya--_adhyāya vākya--_vākya trayāt_traya kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva hetuḥ_hetu prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti ucyate_vac iti_iti atra_atra śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva prakṛteḥ_prakṛti iti_iti yat_yad varṇayiṣyate_varṇay tatra_tatra api_api kevalāyāḥ_kevala tasyāḥ_tad tat_tad na_na śakyam_śakya mantum_man puruṣa--_puruṣa saṃsargeṇa_saṃsarga eva_eva tad--_tad pravṛtteḥ_pravṛtti aṅgīkārāt_aṅgīkāra tatas_tatas ca_ca puruṣasya_puruṣa kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva avarjanīyam_avarjanīya iti_iti vyākhyāsyate_vyākhyā 27_27
BhG 3.28

lg.l: tattva--_tattva vid_vid tu_tu mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman vibhāgayoḥ_vibhāga
guṇāḥ_guṇa guṇeṣu_guṇa vartante_vṛt iti_iti matvā_man na_na sajjate_sañj

div.p: manyate_man āha_ah na_na aham_mad guṇa--_guṇa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka iti_iti guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa ātmanaḥ_ātman vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga na_na me_mad karmāṇi_karman iti_iti karmabhyaḥ_karman api_api ātmanaḥ_ātman vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga tayoḥ_tad guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman vibhāgayoḥ_vibhāga yaḥ_yad tattvam_tattva vetti_vid sa_tad tu_tu na_na kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa na_na karoti_kṛ tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu guṇāḥ_guṇa iti_iti guṇāḥ_guṇa indriyāṇi_indriya guṇeṣu_guṇa viṣayeṣu_viṣaya vartante_vṛt na_na aham_mad iti_iti matvā_man 28_28

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana vidvān_vidvas tu_tu tathā_tathā na_na manyate_man iti_iti āha_ah tattva--_tattva vid_vid iti_iti tattvam_tattva yāthātmyam_yāthātmya vetti_vid iti_iti tattva--_tattva vid_vid tu_tu śabdena_śabda tasya_tad ājñāt_ājñā vaiśiṣṭyam_vaiśiṣṭya āha_ah kasya_ka tattvam_tattva iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman vibhāgayoḥ_vibhāga guṇāḥ_guṇa deha--_deha indriya--_indriya antaḥkaraṇāni_antaḥkaraṇa ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra āspadāni_āspada karmāṇi_karman ca_ca teṣām_tad vyāpāra--_vyāpāra bhūtāni_bhū mama--_mad kāra--_kāra āspadāni_āspada iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa karma_karman iti_iti dvandva--_dvaṃdva eka--_eka vat_vat bhāvaḥ_bhāva vibhajyate_vibhaj sarveṣām_sarva jaḍānām_jaḍa vikāriṇām_vikārin bhāsaka--_bhāsaka tvena_tva pṛthak_pṛthak bhavati_bhū iti_iti vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa jñāna--_jñāna rūpaḥ_rūpa asaṅgaḥ_asaṅga ātmā_ātman guṇa--_guṇa karma_karman ca_ca vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga ca_ca iti_iti dvandvaḥ_dvaṃdva tayoḥ_tad guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman vibhāgayoḥ_vibhāga bhāsya--_bhās bhāsakayoḥ_bhāsaka jaḍa--_jaḍa caitanyayoḥ_caitanya vikāri--_vikārin nirvikārayoḥ_nirvikāra tattvam_tattva yāthātmyam_yāthātmya yaḥ_yad vetti_vid sa_tad guṇāḥ_guṇa karaṇa--_karaṇa ātmakāḥ_ātmaka guṇeṣu_guṇa viṣayeṣu_viṣaya pravartante_pravṛt vikāri--_vikārin tvāt_tva na_na tu_tu kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa a_a tattva--_tattva vid_vid iva_iva na_na karoti_kṛ he_he mahā--_mahat sambodhayan_sambodhay sāmudrika--_sāmudrika ukta--_vac sat--_sat puruṣa--_puruṣa lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa yogitvāt_yogitva na_na pṛthak_pṛthak jana--_jana sādhāraṇyena_sādhāraṇya tvam_tvad avivekī_avivekin bhavitum_bhū arhasi_arh iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay

guṇa--_guṇa vibhāgasya_vibhāga karma--_karman vibhāgasya_vibhāga ca_ca tattva--_tattva vid_vid iti_iti vā_vā asmin_idam pakṣe_pakṣa guṇa--_guṇa karmaṇoḥ_karman iti_iti etāvatā_etāvat eva_eva nirvāhe_nirvāha vibhāga--_vibhāga padasya_pada prayojanam_prayojana cintyam_cintay

vetti_vid tatra_tatra guṇa--_guṇa vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamāṃsi_tamas karma--_karman vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi kārya--_kārya bhedāḥ_bheda devatā--_devatā indriya--_indriya viṣayāḥ_viṣaya tayoḥ_tad tattvam_tattva svarūpam_svarūpa tad--_tad jñaḥ_jña tu_tu tattva--_tattva vid_vid guṇāḥ_guṇa devatāḥ_devatā prayojyāni_prayuj indriyāṇi_indriya cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādīni_ādi guṇeṣu_guṇa rūpa--_rūpa ādiṣu_ādi viṣayeṣu_viṣaya vartante_vṛt aham_mad tu_tu na_na guṇaḥ_guṇa na_na api_api guṇa--_guṇa kāryaḥ_kārya kaḥ_ka api_api nā_na api_api guṇeṣu_guṇa guṇa--_guṇa kāryeṣu_kārya teṣu_tad me_mad kaḥ_ka api_api sambandhaḥ_sambandha iti_iti matvā_man vidvān_vid tu_tu na_na sajjate_sañj 28_28

baladevaḥ_baladeva vijñaḥ_vijña tu_tu na_na tathā_tathā iti_iti āha_ah tattva--_tattva vid_vid tu_tu iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa vibhāgasya_vibhāga karma--_karman vibhāgasya_vibhāga ca_ca tattva--_tattva vid_vid guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa indriyebhyaḥ_indriya karmabhyaḥ_karman ca_ca tad--_tad kṛtebhyaḥ_kṛ yaḥ_yad svayasaḥ_svayas vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga bhedaḥ_bheda tasya_tad tattvam_tattva svarūpam_svarūpa tad--_tad tad--_tad vaidharmya--_vaidharmya paryālocanayā_paryālocanā yaḥ_yad na_na aham_mad guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman vapuḥ_vapus iti_iti vetti_vid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad hi_hi guṇāḥ_guṇa indriyāṇi_indriya guṇeṣu_guṇa śabda--_śabda ādiṣu_ādi viṣayeṣu_viṣaya tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā preritāni_preray pravartante_pravṛt tān_tad prakāśayanti_prakāśay aham_mad tu_tu asaṅga--_asaṅga vijñāna--_vijñāna ānanda--_ānanda tvāt_tva tad--_tad bhinnaḥ_bhid na_na teṣu_tad tādrūpyeṇa_tādrūpya varte_vṛt na_na tān_tad prakāśayāmi_prakāśay iti_iti matvā_man teṣu_tad na_na sajjante_sañj kintu_kiṃtu ātmani_ātman eva_eva sajjate_sañj atra_atra api_api matvā_man iti_iti anena_idam kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva jīvasya_jīva uktam_vac bodhyam_budh 28_28
BhG 3.29

lg.l: prakṛteḥ_prakṛti guṇa--_guṇa saṃmūḍhāḥ_sammuh sajjante_sañj guṇa--_guṇa karmasu_karman
tān_tad akṛtsna--_akṛtsna vidaḥ_vid mandān_manda kṛtsna--_kṛtsna vid_vid na_na vicālayet_vicālay

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ ye_yad prakṛteḥ_prakṛti guṇaiḥ_guṇa sattva--_sattva ādibhiḥ_ādi saṃmūḍhāḥ_sammuh santaḥ_as guṇeṣu_guṇa indriyeṣu_indriya tad--_tad karmasu_karman ca_ca sajjante_sañj tān_tad akṛtsna--_akṛtsna vidaḥ_vid mandān_manda manda--_manda matīn_mati kṛtsna--_kṛtsna vid_vid sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña na_na vicālayet_vicālay 29_29

kuryāt_kṛ upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ prakṛteḥ_prakṛti pūrva--_pūrva uktāyāḥ_vac māyāyāḥ_māyā guṇaiḥ_guṇa kāryatayā_kāryatā dharmaiḥ_dharma deha--_deha ādibhiḥ_ādi vikāraiḥ_vikāra samyak_samyak mūḍhāḥ_muh svarūpa--_svarūpa āsphuraṇena_āsphuraṇa tān_tad eva_eva ātma--_ātman tvena_tva manyamānāḥ_man teṣām_tad eva_eva guṇānām_guṇa deha--_deha indriya--_indriya antar_antar karaṇānām_karaṇa kurmaḥ_kṛ tad--_tad phalāya_phala iti_iti dṛḍhatarām_dṛḍhatara ātmīya--_ātmīya buddhim_buddhi kurvanti_kṛ ye_yad tān_tad karma--_karman saṅginaḥ_saṅgin akṛtsna--_akṛtsna vidaḥ_vid anātma--_anātman abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin madnān_madna aśuddha--_aśuddha citta--_citta tvena_tva jñāna--_jñāna adhikāram_adhikāra aprāptān_aprāpta kṛtsna--_kṛtsna vid_vid paripūrṇa--_paripṛ na_na pracyāvayet_pracyāvay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ye_yad tu_tu amandāḥ_amanda śuddha--_śudh antaḥkaraṇāḥ_antaḥkaraṇa te_tad svayam_svayam eva_eva viveka--_viveka udayena_udaya vicalanti_vical jñāna--_jñāna adhikāram_adhikāra prāptāḥ_prāp iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
kṛtsna--_kṛtsna akṛtsna--_akṛtsna śabdau_śabda ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman para--_para tayā_tā śruti--_śruti artha--_artha anusāreṇa_anusāra vārtika--_vārttika kṛdbhiḥ_kṛt vyākhyātau_vyākhyā

lg.l: sat_as eva_eva iti_iti ādi--_ādi vākyebhyaḥ_vākya kṛtsnam_kṛtsna vastu_vastu yatas_yatas advayam_advaya
sambhavaḥ_sambhava tad--_tad viruddhasya_virudh kutas_kutas akṛtsnasya_akṛtsna vastunaḥ_vastu

div.p: yasmin_yad dṛṣṭe_dṛś api_api adṛṣṭaḥ_adṛṣṭa arthaḥ_artha sa_tad tat_tad anyaḥ_anya ca_ca śiṣyate_śiṣ tathā_tathā adṛṣṭe_adṛṣṭa api_api dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś syāt_as akṛtsnaḥ_akṛtsna tādṛś_tādṛś ucyate_vac

anātmanaḥ_anātman sāvayava--_sāvayava tvāt_tva aneka--_aneka dharmavattāt_dharmavattā ca_ca kenacid_kaścit dharmeṇa_dharma kenacid_kaścit avayavena_avayava vā_vā viśiṣṭe_viśiṣ tasmin_tad ekasmin_eka ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādau_ādi jñāte_jñā api_api dharma--_dharma antareṇa_antara avayava--_avayava antareṇa_antara vā_vā viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ saḥ_tad eva_eva ajñātaḥ_ajñāta tat_tad anyaḥ_anya ca_ca paṭa--_paṭa ādiḥ_ādi ajñātaḥ_ajñāta a_a vaśiṣyate_avaśiṣ eva_eva tathā_tathā tasmin_tad ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādau_ādi ajñāte_ajñāta api_api paṭa--_paṭa ādiḥ_ādi jñātaḥ_jñā syāt_as iti_iti tad--_tad jñāne_jñāna api_api tasya_tad anyasya_anya ca_ca ajñānāt_ajñāna tad--_tad ajñāne_ajñāna api_api anya--_anya jñānāt_jñāna ca_ca saḥ_tad akṛtsnaḥ_akṛtsna ucyate_vac kṛtsnaḥ_kṛtsna tu_tu advayaḥ_advaya ātmā_ātman eva_eva tad--_tad jñāne_jñāna kasyacid_kaścit avaśeṣasya_avaśeṣa abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti śloka--_śloka dvaya--_dvaya arthaḥ_artha 29_29

dṛśyante_dṛś āha_ah ātmānam_ātman bhūtam_bhū eva_eva manyate_man tathā_tathā eva_eva prakṛti--_prakṛti guṇa--_guṇa āviṣṭāḥ_āviś jīvāḥ_jīva svān_sva guṇān_guṇa eva_eva manyante_man tatas_tatas guṇa--_guṇa karmasu_karman guṇa--_guṇa kāryeṣu_kārya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya sajjante_sañj tān_tad akṛtsna--_akṛtsna vidaḥ_vid manda--_manda matīn_mati kṛtsna--_kṛtsna vid_vid sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña na_na vicālayet_vicālay tvam_tvad guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa pṛthak_pṛthak bhūtaḥ_bhū jīvaḥ_jīva na_na tu_tu guṇaḥ_guṇa iti_iti vicāram_vicāra prāpayitum_prāpay na_na yatate_yat kintu_kiṃtu guṇa--_guṇa āveśa--_āveśa nivartakam_nivartaka niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma_karman eva_eva kārayet_kāray na_na hi_hi bhūta--_bhūta āviṣṭaḥ_āviś manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya
na_na tvam_tvad bhūtaḥ_bhū kintu_kiṃtu manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya eva_eva iti_iti śata--_śata kṛtve_kṛtva api_api upadeśena_upadeśa na_na svāsthyam_svāsthya āpadyate_āpad kintu_kiṃtu tad--_tad nivartaka--_nivartaka auṣudha--_auṣudha maṇi--_maṇi mantra--_mantra ādi--_ādi prayogena_prayoga eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva na_na buddhi--_buddhi bhedam_bheda janayet_janay iti_iti etat_etad upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ prakṛteḥ_prakṛti iti_iti prakṛteḥ_prakṛti guṇena_guṇa tad--_tad kāryeṇa_kārya ahaṅkāreṇa_ahaṃkāra mūḍhāḥ_muh bhūta--_bhūta āveśa--_āveśa nyāyena_nyāya deha--_deha ādikam_ādika eva_eva ātmānam_ātman manyamānāḥ_man janāḥ_jana guṇānām_guṇa deha--_deha indriyāṇām_indriya karmasu_karman vyāpāreṣu_vyāpāra sajjante_sañj tān_tad akṛtsna--_akṛtsna vidaḥ_vid alpa--_alpa jñān_jña mandān_manda ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva grahaṇa--_grahaṇa alasān_alasa kṛtsna--_kṛtsna vid_vid pūrṇa--_pṛ ātma--_ātman jñānaḥ_jñāna na_na vicālayet_vicālay guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman anyaḥ_anya viśuddha--_viśudh caitanya--_caitanya ānandaḥ_ānanda tvam_tvad iti_iti tattvam_tattva grāhayitum_grāhay na_na icchet_iṣ 29_29
BhG 3.30

lg.l: mayi_mad sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman saṃnyasya_saṃnyas adhyātma--_adhyātma cetasā_cetas
nirāśīḥ_nirāśī nirmamaḥ_nirmama bhūtvā_bhū yudhyasva_yudh vigata--_vigam jvaraḥ_jvara

div.p: tvam_tvad tu_tu na_na adya_adya api_api tattva--_tattva vid_vid atas_atas karma_karman eva_eva kuru_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah mayi_mad iti_iti sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman mayi_mad saṃnyasya_saṃnyas samarpya_samarpay adhyātma--_adhyātma cetasā_cetas antaryāmi--_antaryāmin adhīnaḥ_adhīna aham_mad karma_karman karomi_kṛ iti_iti dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi nirāśī_nirāśin niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma ataeva_ataeva mad--_mad phala--_phala sādhanam_sādhana mad--_mad artham_artha idam_idam karma_karman iti_iti evam_evam mamatā--_mamatā śūnyaḥ_śūnya ca_ca bhūtvā_bhū vigata--_vigam jvaraḥ_jvara tyakta--_tyaj śokaḥ_śoka ca_ca bhūtvā_bhū

idānīm_idānīm ajñasya_ajña api_api mumukṣoḥ_mumukṣu amumukṣu--_amumukṣu apekṣayā_apekṣā bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇam_arpaṇa phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi abhāvam_abhāva ca_ca viśeṣam_viśeṣa vadan_vad ajña--_ajña tayā_tā arjunasya_arjuna karma--_karman adhikāram_adhikāra draḍhayati_draḍhay mayi_mad iti_iti mayi_mad bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva parameśvare_parameśvara sarvajñe_sarvajña sarva--_sarva niyantari_niyantṛ sarva--_sarva ātmani_ātman sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman laukikāni_laukika vaidikāni_vaidika ca_ca sarva--_sarva prakārāṇi_prakāra adhyātma--_adhyātma cetasā_cetas aham_mad kartā_kartṛ antaryāmī_antaryāmin adhīnaḥ_adhīna tasmai_tad eva_eva īśvarāya_īśvara anayā_idam buddhyā_buddhi saṃnyasya_saṃnyas samarpya_samarpay nirāśīḥ_nirāśī niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma nirmamaḥ_nirmama deha--_deha putra--_putra bhrātra--_bhrātṛ ādiṣu_ādi svīyeṣu_svīya mamatā--_mamatā śūnyaḥ_śūnya vigata--_vigam jvaraḥ_jvara santāpa--_saṃtāpa hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva śokaḥ_śoka eva_eva jvara--_jvara śabdena_śabda uktaḥ_vac aihika--_aihika pāratrika--_pāratrika duryaśaḥ--_duryaśas naraka--_naraka pāta--_pāta ādi--_ādi nimitta--_nimitta śoka--_śoka rahitaḥ_rahita ca_ca bhūtvā_bhū tvam_tvad mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu yudhyasva_yudh vihitāni_vidhā karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya atra_atra bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇam_arpaṇa niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tvam_tva ca_ca sarva--_sarva karma--_karman sādhāraṇam_sādhāraṇa mumukṣoḥ_mumukṣu nirmamatvam_nirmamatva tyakta--_tyaj śoka--_śoka tvam_tva ca_ca yuddha--_yuddha mātre_mātra prakṛte_prakṛ iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś anyatra_anyatra mamatā--_mamatā śokayoḥ_śoka aprasakta--_aprasakta tvāt_tva

adhyātmam_adhyātma avyayībhāva--_avyayībhāva samāsāt_samāsa tatas_tatas ca_ca ātmani_ātman yat_yad cetaḥ_cetas tat_tad adhyātma--_adhyātma cetaḥ_cetas tena_tad ātma--_ātman niṣṭhena_niṣṭhā eva_eva cetasā_cetas na_na tu_tu viṣaya--_viṣaya niṣṭhena_niṣṭhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mayi_mad karmāṇi_karman saṃnyasya_saṃnyas samarpya_samarpay nirāśīḥ_nirāśī niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma nirmamaḥ_nirmama sarvatra_sarvatra mamatā--_mamatā śūnyaḥ_śūnya yudhyasva_yudh

baladevaḥ_baladeva mayi_mad iti_iti yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt pariniṣṭhitaḥ_pariniṣṭhā tvam_tvad adhyātma--_adhyātma cetaḥ_cetas sva--_sva ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva viṣayaka--_viṣayaka jñānena_jñāna sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman rājñi_rājñī bhṛtyaḥ_bhṛtya iva_iva mayi_mad pareśe_pareśa saṃnyasya_saṃnyas samarpayitvā_samarpay yudhyasva_yudh yathā_yathā rāja--_rājan tantraḥ_tantra bhṛtyaḥ_bhṛtya tad--_tad ājñayā_ājñā karmāṇi_karman karoti_kṛ tathā_tathā mad--_mad tantraḥ_tantra tvam_tvad mad--_mad ājñayā_ājñā tāni_tad kuru_kṛ lokān_loka saṃjighṛkṣuḥ_saṃjighṛkṣu ātmani_ātman yat_yad cetaḥ_cetas tat_tad adhyātma--_adhyātma cetaḥ_cetas tena_tad vibhakti--_vibhakti arthe_artha avyayībhāvaḥ_avyayībhāva nirāśīḥ_nirāśī svāmi--_svāmin ājñayā_ājñā karomi_kṛ iti_iti tad--_tad phala--_phala icchā--_icchā śūnyaḥ_śūnya ataeva_ataeva mad--_mad phala--_phala sādhanāni_sādhana mad--_mad artham_artha amūni_adas karmāṇi_karman iti_iti evam_evam mamatva--_mamatva varjjitaḥ_varjay vigata--_vigam jvaraḥ_jvara tyakta--_tyaj bandhu--_bandhu vadha--_vadha nimittaka--_nimittaka santāpaḥ_saṃtāpa ca_ca bhūtvā_bhū iti_iti arjunasya_arjuna kṣatriya--_kṣatriya tvāt_tva yudhyasva_yudh iti_iti uktam_vac sva--_sva āśrama--_āśrama vihitāni_vidhā
karmāṇi_karman mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu kāryāṇi_kṛ iti_iti vākya--_vākya arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: BhG 3.31
ye_yad me_mad matam_mata idam_idam nityam_nityam anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā mānavāḥ_mānava
śraddhāvantaḥ_śraddhāvat anasūyantaḥ_anasūyat mucyante_muc te_tad api_api karmabhiḥ_karman

div.p: āha_ah mad--_mad vākye_vākya śraddhāvantaḥ_śraddhāvat nasūyantaḥ_nasūy duḥkha--_duḥkha ātmake_ātmaka karmaṇi_karman pravartayati_pravartay iti_iti doṣa--_doṣa dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi akurvantaḥ_akurvat ca_ca me_mad madīyam_madīya idam_idam matam_mata anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā te_tad api_api śanais_śanais karma_karman kurvāṇāḥ_kṛ samyak_samyak jñāni--_jñānin vat_vat karmabhiḥ_karman mucyante_muc

āha_ah idam_idam phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi rāhityena_rāhitya vihita--_vidhā karma--_karman ācaraṇa--_ācaraṇa rūpam_rūpa mama_mad matam_man nityam_nitya nitya--_nitya veda--_veda bodhita--_bodhay tvena_tva anādi--_anādi paramparā--_paramparā gatam_gam āvaśyakam_āvaśyaka iti_iti vā_vā sarvadā_sarvadā iti_iti vā_vā mānavāḥ_mānava manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya ye_yad kecid_kaścit manuṣya--_manuṣya adhikāri--_adhikārin tvāt_tva karmaṇām_karman śraddhāvantaḥ_śraddhāvat śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadiṣṭe_upadiś arthe_artha ananubhūte_ananubhūta api_api evam_evam eva_eva etat_etad iti_iti viśvāsaḥ_viśvāsa śraddhā_śraddhā tadvantaḥ_tadvat an_an asūyantaḥ_asūy guṇeṣu_guṇa doṣa--_doṣa āviṣkaraṇam_āviṣkaraṇa asūyā_asūyā sā_tad ca_ca duḥkha--_duḥkha ātmake_ātmaka karmaṇi_karman mām_mad pravartayan_pravartay akāruṇikaḥ_akāruṇika ayam_idam iti_iti evaṃrūpā_evaṃrūpa prakṛte_prakṛta prasaktā_prasañj
tām_tad asūyām_asūyā mayi_mad gurau_guru vāsudeve_vāsudeva sarva--_sarva suhṛdi_suhṛd akurvantaḥ_akurvat ye_yad anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā te_tad api_api sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi jñāna--_jñāna prāpti--_prāpti dvāreṇa_dvāra samyak_samyak jñāni--_jñānin vat_vat karmabhiḥ_karman dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma ākhyaiḥ_ākhyā
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sva--_sva kṛta--_kṛ upadeśe_upadeśa pravartayitum_pravartay āha_ah ye_yad me_mad iti_iti
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva śruti--_śruti rahasye_rahasya sva--_sva mate_mata anuvartinām_anuvartin phalam_phala vadan_vad tasya_tad śraiṣṭhyam_śraiṣṭhya vyañjayati_vyañjay ye_yad me_mad iti_iti nityam_nitya sarvadā_sarvadā śruti--_śruti bodhita--_bodhay tvena_tva anādi--_anādi prāptam_prāp vā_vā śraddhāvantaḥ_śraddhāvat dṛḍha--_dṛḍha viśvastāḥ_viśvas anasūyantaḥ_anasūyat mocaka--_mocaka tva--_tva guṇavati_guṇavat tasmin_tad kim_ka amunā_adas śrama--_śrama bahulena_bahula niṣphalena_niṣphala karmaṇā_karman iti_iti evam_evam doṣa--_doṣa āropa--_āropa śūnyāḥ_śūnya te_tad api_api iti_iti apiḥ_api avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa yat_yat vā_vā ye_yad mama_mad idam_idam matam_mata anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā ye_yad ca_ca anuṣṭhātum_anuṣṭhā a_a śaknuvantaḥ_śak api_api tatra_tatra śraddhālavaḥ_śraddhālu ye_yad ca_ca śraddhālavaḥ_śraddhālu api_api tat_tad na_na asūyante_asūy te_tad api_api iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sāmprata--_sāmprata anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna abhāve_abhāva api_api tasmin_tad śraddhayā_śraddhā anasūyayā_anasūyā ca_ca kṣīṇa--_kṣi doṣāḥ_doṣa te_tad kiṃcid_kaścit prānte_prānta tat_tad anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā mucyante_muc iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 3.32

lg.l: ye_yad tu_tu etat_etad abhyasūyantaḥ_abhyasūy na_na anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā me_mad matam_mata
sarva--_sarva jñāna--_jñāna vimūḍhān_vimuh tān_tad viddhi_vid naṣṭān_naś acetasaḥ_acetas

div.p: āha_ah anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā viddhi_vid

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam anvaye_anvaya guṇam_guṇa uktvā_vac vyatireke_vyatireka doṣam_doṣa āha_ah ye_yad tu_tu iti_iti tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda śraddāvat--_śraddāvat vaidharymyam_vaidharymya aśraddhām_aśraddhā sūcayati_sūcay tena_tena ye_yad nāstikyāt_nāstikya aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna abhyasūyantaḥ_abhyasūy doṣam_doṣa udbhāvayantaḥ_udbhāvay etat_etad mama_mad matam_mata na_na anuvartante_anuvṛt tān_tad acetasaḥ_acetas duṣṭa--_duṣ cittān_citta ataeva_ataeva sarva--_sarva jñāna--_jñāna vimūḍhān_vimuh sarvatra_sarvatra karmaṇi_karman brahmaṇi_brahman sa_sa guṇe_guṇa pramāṇataḥ_pramāṇa prameyataḥ_prameya prayojanataḥ_prayojana ca_ca mūḍhān_muh sarva--_sarva prakāreṇa_prakāra ayogyān_ayogya naṣṭān_naś sarva--_sarva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha bhraṣṭān_bhraṃś viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā 32_32
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha vipakṣe_vipakṣa doṣam_doṣa āha_ah ye_yad tu_tu iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva vipakṣe_vipakṣa doṣam_doṣa āha_ah ye_yad tu_tu etat_etad iti_iti ye_yad tu_tu na_na anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā tān_tad acetasaḥ_acetas viveka--_viveka śūnyān_śūnya ataeva_ataeva sarvasmin_sarva karmaṇi_karman brahma--_brahman viṣaye_viṣaya ca_ca yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tatra_tatra vimūḍhān_vimuh naṣṭān_naś viddhi_vid
BhG 3.33

lg.l: sadṛśam_sadṛśa ceṣṭate_ceṣṭ svasyāḥ_sva prakṛteḥ_prakṛti jñānavān_jñānavat api_api
prakṛtim_prakṛti yānti_yā bhūtāni_bhūta nigrahaḥ_nigraha kim_ka kariṣyati_kṛ

div.p: anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā āha_ah svasyāḥ_sva svakīyāyāḥ_svakīya prakṛteḥ_prakṛti svabhāvasya_svabhāva sadṛśam_sadṛśa anurūpam_anurūpa eva_eva guṇa--_guṇa doṣa--_doṣa jñānavān_jñānavat api_api ceṣṭate_ceṣṭ kim_ka punar_punar vaktavyam_vac ajñaḥ_ajña ceṣṭate_ceṣṭ iti_iti yasmāt_yasmāt bhūtāni_bhūta sarve_sarva api_api prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin prakṛtim_prakṛti yānti_yā anuvartante_anuvṛt evam_evam ca_ca sati_as indriya--_indriya nigrahaḥ_nigraha kim_ka kariṣyati_kṛ prakṛteḥ_prakṛti balīyaḥ--_balīyas tvāt_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 33_33

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu rājñaḥ_rājan iva_iva tava_tvad śāsana--_śāsana atikrame_atikrama bhayam_bhaya paśyantaḥ_dṛś katham_katham asūyantaḥ_asūy tava_tvad matam_mata na_na anuvartante_anuvṛt katham_katham vā_vā sarva--_sarva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha sādhane_sādhana pratikūlāḥ_pratikūla bhavanti_bhū iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah sadṛśam_sadṛśa iti_iti prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti nāma_nāma prāc--_prāñc janma--_janman kṛta--_kṛ dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma jñāna--_jñāna icchā--_icchā ādi--_ādi saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra vartamāna--_vartamāna janmani_janman abhivyaktaḥ_abhivyañj sarvatas_sarvatas balavān_balavat tam_tad vidyā--_vidyā karmaṇī_karman samanvārabhete_samanvārabh pūrva--_pūrva prajñā_prajñā ca_ca iti_iti śruti--_śruti tasyāḥ_tad svakīyāyāḥ_svakīya prakṛteḥ_prakṛti sadṛśam_sadṛśa anurūpam_anurūpa eva_eva sarvaḥ_sarva jantuḥ_jantu jñānavān_jñānavat brahma--_brahman vid_vid api_api paśu--_paśu ādibhiḥ_ādi ca_ca aviśeṣāt_aviśeṣa iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya guṇa--_guṇa doṣa--_doṣa jñānavān_jñānavat vā_vā ceṣṭate_ceṣṭ kim_kim punar_punar mūrkhaḥ_mūrkha tasmāt_tasmāt bhūtāni_bhūta sarve_sarva prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin prakṛtim_prakṛti yānti_yā anuvartante_anuvṛt puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha bhraṃśa--_bhraṃśa hetu--_hetu bhūtām_bhū api_api tatra_tatra mama_mad vā_vā rājñaḥ_rājan vā_vā nigrahaḥ_nigraha kim_ka kariṣyati_kṛ rāga--_rāga autkaṭyena_autkaṭya duritān_durita nivartayitum_nivartay na_na śaknoti_śak iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mahā--_mahat naraka--_naraka sādhanatvam_sādhanatva jñātvā_jñā api_api durvāsanā--_durvāsanā prābalyāt_prābalya pāpeṣu_pāpa pravartamānāḥ_pravṛt na_na mad--_mad śvāsana--_śvāsana atikrama--_atikrama doṣāt_doṣa bibhyati_bhī iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

vibhāti_vibhā ye_yad khalu_khalu indriyāṇi_indriya cārayantaḥ_cāray vartante_vṛt te_tad vivvekinaḥ_vivvekin api_api rājñaḥ_rājan parameśvarasya_parameśvara ca_ca śāsanam_śāsana mantum_man na_na śaknuvanti_śak tathā_tathā eva_eva teṣām_tad svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva abhūt_bhū iti_iti āha_ah sadṛśam_sadṛśa iti_iti jñānavān_jñānavat api_api evam_evam pāpe_pāpa kṛte_kṛ sati_as evam_evam narakaḥ_naraka bhaviṣyati_bhū evam_evam rāja--_rājan daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa bhaviṣyati_bhū evam_evam duryaśaḥ_duryaśas ca_ca bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti vivekavān_vivekavat api_api svasyāḥ_sva prakṛteḥ_prakṛti cirantana--_cirantana pāpa--_pāpa abhyāsa--_abhyāsa uttha--_uttha duḥkha--_duḥkha bhārasya_bhāra sadṛśam_sadṛśa anurūpam_anurūpa eva_eva ceṣṭate_ceṣṭ tasmāt_tasmāt prakṛtim_prakṛti svabhāvam_svabhāva yānti_yā anusaranti_anusṛ tatra_tatra nigrahaḥ_nigraha tad--_tad śāstra--_śāstra dvārā_dvār mad--_mad kṛtaḥ_kṛ rāja--_rājan kṛtaḥ_kṛ vā_vā tena_tad aśuddha--_aśuddha cittān_citta ukta--_vac lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga śuddha--_śuddha cittān_citta jñāna--_jñāna yogaḥ_yoga ca_ca saṃskartum_saṃskṛ prabodhayitum_prabodhay ca_ca śaknoti_śak na_na tu_tu atyanta_atyanta yat_yad uktam_vac skānde_skānda

lg.l: aho_aho dhanyaḥ_dhanya asi_as deva--_deva ṛṣe_ṛṣi kṛpayā_kṛpā yasya_yad te_tvad kṣaṇāt_kṣaṇa
nīcaḥ_nīca api_api utpulakaḥ_utpulaka lebhe_labh lubdhakaḥ_lubdhaka ratim_rati ucyate_vac

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu sarveśvarasya_sarveśvara te_tvad matam_mata atikramatām_atikram daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa śāstreṇa_śāstra ucyate_vac tasmāt_tasmāt te_tad kim_kim u_u na_na bibhyati_bhī iti_iti āha_ah sadṛśam_sadṛśa iti_iti prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti anādi--_anādi kāla--_kāla pravṛttyā_pravṛtti sva--_sva durvāsanā_durvāsana tasyāḥ_tad svīyāyāḥ_svīya sadṛśam_sadṛśa anurūpam_anurūpa eva_eva jñānavān_jñānavat śāstra--_śāstra uktam_vac daṇḍam_daṇḍa jānan_jñā api_api janaḥ_jana ceṣṭate_ceṣṭ pravartate_pravṛt kim_kim uta_uta ajñaḥ_ajña tatas_tatas bhūtāni_bhūta sarve_sarva janāḥ_jana prakṛtim_prakṛti puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha vibhraṃśa--_vibhraṃśa hetu--_hetu bhūtām_bhū api_api tām_tad yānti_yā anusaranti_anusṛ tatra_tatra nigrahaḥ_nigraha śāstra--_śāstra jñānaḥ_jñāna api_api daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa sat--_sat prasaṅga--_prasaṅga śūnyasya_śūnya kim_ka kariṣyati_kṛ śakṣyati_śak sat--_sat prasaṅga--_prasaṅga sahitasya_sahita tu_tu tām_tad prabalām_prabala api_api nihanti_nihan santaḥ_sat eva_eva asya_idam chindanti_chid manaḥ--_manas vyasanam_vyasana uktibhiḥ_ukti iti_iti ādi_ādi smṛtibhyaḥ_smṛti 33_33
BhG 3.34

lg.l: indriyasya_indriya indriyasya_indriya arthe_artha rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa vyavasthitau_vyavasthā
tayoḥ_tad na_na vaśam_vaśa āgacchet_āgam tau_tad hi_hi asya_idam paripanthinau_paripanthin

div.p: āha_ah indriyasya_indriya indriyasya_indriya iti_iti vīpsayā_vīpsā sarveṣām_sarva indriyāṇām_indriya prati_prati ekam_eka iti_iti uktam_vac arthe_artha sva--_sva sva--_sva viṣaye_viṣaya anukūle_anukūla rāgaḥ_rāga pratikūle_pratikūla dveṣaḥ_dveṣa iti_iti evam_evam rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa vyavasthitau_vyavasthā avaśyam_avaśyam bhāvinau_bhāvin tatas_tatas ca_ca tad--_tad anurūpā_anurūpa pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti iti_iti bhūtānām_bhūta prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti tathā_tathā api_api tayoḥ_tad vaśa--_vaśa vartī_vartin na_na bhavet_bhū iti_iti śāstreṇa_śāstra niyamyate_niyam hi_hi yasmāt_yad asya_idam mumukṣoḥ_mumukṣu tau_tad parinpanthinau_parinpanthin pratipakṣau_pratipakṣa ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva pravartayati_pravartay śāstram_śāstra tu_tu tatas_tatas prāk_prāk eva_eva viṣayeṣu_viṣaya rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa pratibandhake_pratibandhaka parameśvara--_parameśvara bhajana--_bhajana ādau_ādi tam_tad pravartayati_pravartay tatas_tatas ca_ca gambhīra--_gambhīra srotaḥ--_srotas pātāt_pāta pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva nāvam_nau āśritaḥ_āśri iva_iva na_na anartham_anartha prāpnoti_prāp tat_tad evam_evam svābhāvikī_svābhāvika paśu--_paśu ādi--_ādi sadṛśīm_sadṛśa pravṛttim_pravṛtti tyaktvā_tyaj dharme_dharma pravartitavyam_pravṛt iti_iti uktam_vac

asti_as syāt_as āha_ah indriyasya_indriya indriyasya_indriya arthe_artha iti_iti indriyasya_indriya indriyasya_indriya iti_iti vīpsayā_vīpsā sarveṣām_sarva indriyāṇām_indriya arthe_artha viṣaye_viṣaya śabde_śabda sparśe_sparśa rūpe_rūpa gandhe_gandha ca_ca evam_evam karmendriya--_karmendriya viṣaye_viṣaya api_api vacana--_vacana ādau_ādi anukūle_anukūla śāstra--_śāstra niṣiddhe_niṣidh api_api rāgaḥ_rāga pratikūle_pratikūla śāstra--_śāstra vihite_vidhā api_api dveṣaḥ_dveṣa iti_iti evam_evam prati_prati indriya--_indriya artham_artha rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa vyavasthitau_vyavasthā ānukūlya--_ānukūlya prātikūlya--_prātikūlya sarvatra_sarvatra tau_tad bhavataḥ_bhū tatra_tatra puruṣakārasya_puruṣakāra śāstrasya_śāstra ca_ca ayam_idam viṣayaḥ_viṣaya yat_yat tayoḥ_tad vaśam_vaśa na_na āgacchet_āgam iti_iti katham_katham yā_yad hi_hi puruṣasya_puruṣa prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti sā_tad balavat_balavat aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa anubandhi--_anubandhin tva--_tva jñāna--_jñāna abhāva--_abhāva sahakṛta--_sahakṛ iṣṭa--_iṣ sādhana--_sādhana tva--_tva jñāna--_jñāna nibandhanam_nibandhana rāgam_rāga puraskṛtya_puraskṛ eva_eva śāstra--_śāstra niṣiddhe_niṣidh kalañja--_kalañja bhakṣaṇa--_bhakṣaṇa ādau_ādi tathā_tathā balavat--_balavat aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa anubandhi--_anubandhin tva--_tva jñāna--_jñāna abhāva--_abhāva sahakṛta--_sahakṛ iṣṭa--_iṣ sādhanatva--_sādhanatva jñāna--_jñāna nibandhanam_nibandhana rāgam_rāga puraskṛtya_puraskṛ eva_eva śāstra--_śāstra niṣiddhe_niṣidh kalañja--_kalañja bhakṣaṇa--_bhakṣaṇa ādau_ādi pravartayati_pravartay tatra_tatra śāstreṇa_śāstra pratiṣiddhasya_pratiṣidh balavat_balavat aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa anubandhi--_anubandhin tve_tva jñāpite_jñāpay sahakārya--_sahakārya bhāvāt_bhāva kevalam_kevala dṛṣṭa--_dṛś iṣṭa--_iṣ sādhana--_sādhana tā--_tā jñānam_jñāna madhu--_madhu viṣa--_viṣa saṃpṛkta--_sampṛc anna--_anna bhojane_bhojana iva_iva tatra_tatra na_na rāgam_rāga janayitum_janay evam_evam vihitasya_vidhā śāstreṇa_śāstra balavat_balavat iṣṭa--_iṣ anubandhi--_anubandhin tve_tva bodhite_bodhay sahakārya--_sahakārya bhāvāt_bhāva kevalam_kevala aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa sādhanatva--_sādhanatva jñānam_jñāna bhojana--_bhojana ādau_ādi iva_iva tatra_tatra na_na dveṣam_dveṣa janayitum_janay śaknoti_śak tatas_tatas ca_ca apratibaddham_apratibaddha śāstram_śāstra vihite_vidhā puruṣam_puruṣa pravartayati_pravartay niṣiddhāt_niṣidh ca_ca nivartayati_nivartay iti_iti śāstrīya--_śāstrīya viveka--_viveka vijñāna--_vijñāna prābalyena_prābalya svābhāvika--_svābhāvika rāga--_rāga dveṣayoḥ_dveṣa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa upamardena_upamarda upamardāt_upamarda na_na prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti pravartayitum_pravartay śaknoti_śak iti_iti na_na śāstrasya_śāstra puruṣakārasya_puruṣakāra ca_ca vaiyarthya--_vaiyarthya porasaṅgaḥ_porasaṅga

tayoḥ_tad rāga--_rāga dveṣayoḥ_dveṣa vaśam_vaśa nā_na āgacchet_āgam tad--_tad adhīnaḥ_adhīna na_na pravarteta_pravṛt nivarteta_nivṛt vā_vā kintu_kiṃtu śāstrīya--_śāstrīya tad--_tad vipakṣa--_vipakṣa jñānena_jñāna tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa vighaṭana--_vighaṭana dvārā_dvār tau_tad nāśayet_nāśay hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt tau_tad rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa svābhāvika--_svābhāvika doṣa--_doṣa prayuktau_prayuj asya_idam puruṣasya_puruṣa śreyaḥ_śreyas arhtinaḥ_arhtin paripanthinau_paripanthin śatrū_śatru śreyaḥ--_śreyas mārgasya_mārga vighna--_vighna kartārau_kartṛ dasyū_dasyu iva_iva pathikasya_pathika idam_idam ca_ca dvayāḥ_dvaya ha_ha prājāpatyāḥ_prājāpatya devāḥ_deva ca_ca asurāḥ_asura ca_ca tatas_tatas kānīyasāḥ_kānīyas eva_eva devāḥ_deva jyāyasaḥ_jyāyas asurāḥ_asura te_tad eṣu_idam lokeṣu_loka aspardhanta_spṛdh iti_iti ādi--_ādi śrutau_śruti svābhāvika--_svābhāvika rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa nimitta--_nimitta śāstra--_śāstra viparīta--_viparīta pravṛttim_pravṛtti deva--_deva tvena_tva nirūpya_nirūpay vyākhyātam_vyākhyā ati_ati vistareṇa_vistara iti_iti uparamyate_uparam

prabhavati_prabhū abhūt_bhū cārayet_cāray āha_ah sarva--_sarva indriyāṇām_indriya arthe_artha sva--_sva sva--_sva viṣaye_viṣaya para--_para strī--_strī mātra--_mātra gātra--_gātra darśana--_darśana sparśana--_sparśana tad--_tad sampradānaka--_sampradānaka dravya--_dravya dāna--_dāna ādau_ādi śāstra--_śāstra niṣiddhe_niṣidh api_api rāgaḥ_rāga tathā_tathā guru--_guru vipra--_vipra tīrtha--_tīrtha atithi--_atithi darśana--_darśana sparśana--_sparśana paricaraṇa--_paricaraṇa tad--_tad sampradānaka--_sampradānaka dhana--_dhana vitaraṇa--_vitaraṇa ādau_ādi śāstra--_śāstra vihite_vidhā api_api dveṣaḥ_dveṣa iti_iti etau_etad viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa avasthitau_avasthā vartete_vṛt tayoḥ_tad vaśam_vaśa adhīna--_adhīna tvam_tva na_na prāpnuyāt_prāp yat_yat vā_vā indriyārthe_indriyārtha strī--_strī darśana--_darśana ādau_ādi rāgaḥ_rāga tad--_tad pratighāte_pratighāta kenacid_kaścit kṛte_kṛ sati_as dveṣaḥ_dveṣa iti_iti asya_idam puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha sādhakasya_sādhaka kvacid_kvacid tu_tu manaḥ_manas anukūle_anukūla arthe_artha surasa--_surasa snigdha--_snigdha anna--_anna ādau_ādi rāgaḥ_rāga manaḥ_manas sva--_sva putra--_putra ādi--_ādi darśana--_darśana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādau_ādi rāgaḥ_rāga vairi--_vairin putra--_putra ādi--_ādi darśana--_darśana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādau_ādi dveṣaḥ_dveṣa tayoḥ_tad vaśam_vaśa na_na gacchet_gam iti_iti vyācakṣate_vyācakṣ

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu prakṛti--_prakṛti adhīnā_adhīna ced_ced puṃsām_puṃs pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti tarhi_tarhi vidhi--_vidhi niṣedha--_niṣedha śāstre_śāstra vyarthaḥ_vyartha iti_iti ced_ced indriyasya_indriya indriyasya_indriya iti_iti vīpsayā_vīpsā sarveṣām_sarva iti_iti uktam_vac tatas_tatas ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna indriyāṇām_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīnām_ādi arthe_artha viṣaye_viṣaya śabda--_śabda ādau_ādi karmendriyāṇām_karmendriya ca_ca vāc--_vāc ādīnām_ādi arthe_artha vacana--_vacana ādau_ādi rāgaḥ_rāga pratikūle_pratikūla śāstra--_śāstra vihite_vidhā api_api sat--_sat sambhāṣaṇa--_sambhāṣaṇa sat--_sat sevana--_sevana sat--_sat tīrtha--_tīrtha vyavasthitau_vyavasthā ca_ca ānukūlya--_ānukūlya prātikūlye_prātikūlya vyavasthayā_vyavasthā sthitau_sthā bhavataḥ_bhū na_na tu_tu aniyamena_aniyama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yadi_yadi api_api tad--_tad anuguṇā_anuguṇa prāṇinām_prāṇin pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti tathā_tathā api_api śreyaḥ--_śreyas lipsuḥ_lipsu janaḥ_jana tayoḥ_tad rāga--_rāga dveṣayoḥ_dveṣa vaśam_vaśa na_na āgacchet_āgam hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt tau_tad asya_idam paripanthinau_paripanthin vighna--_vighna kartārau_kartṛ bhavataḥ_bhū pānthasya_pāntha iva_iva dasyū_dasyu etat_etad uktam_vac bhavati_bhū anādi--_anādi kāla--_kāla pravṛttā_pravṛt hi_hi vāsanā_vāsanā niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā anubandhi--_anubandhin tva--_tva jñāna--_jñāna abhāva--_abhāva sahakṛtena_sahakṛ iṣṭa--_iṣ sādhanatva--_sādhanatva jñānena_jñāna niṣiddhe_niṣidh api_api para--_para dāra--_dāra sambhāṣaṇa--_sambhāṣaṇa ādau_ādi rāgam_rāga utpādya_utpāday puṃsaḥ_puṃs tathā_tathā iṣṭa--_iṣ sādhanatva--_sādhanatva jñāna--_jñāna abhāva--_abhāva sahakṛtena_sahakṛ aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa sādhanatva--_sādhanatva jñānena_jñāna vihite_vidhā api_api sat--_sat sambhāṣaṇa--_sambhāṣaṇa ādau_ādi dveṣam_dveṣa utpādya_utpāday tatas_tatas tān_tad nivartayati_nivartay śāstram_śāstra kila_kila sat--_sat prasaṅga--_prasaṅga śrutam_śru aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa anubhandhi--_anubhandhin tva--_tva bodhanena_bodhana niṣiddhāt_niṣidh manaḥ_manas anukūlāt_anukūla api_api nivartayati_nivartay dveṣam_dveṣa utpādya_utpāday iṣṭa--_iṣ anubandhi--_anubandhin tva--_tva bodhanena_bodhana vihite_vidhā manaḥ--_manas pratikūle_pratikūla api_api rāgam_rāga utpādya_utpāday pravartayati_pravartay iti_iti na_na vidhi--_vidhi niṣedha--_niṣedha śāstrayoḥ_śāstra vaiyarthyam_vaiyarthya iti_iti
BhG 3.35

lg.l: śreyān_śreyas sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma viguṇaḥ_viguṇa para--_para dharmāt_dharma su_su anuṣṭhitāt_anuṣṭhā
sva--_sva dharme_dharma nidhanam_nidhana śreyaḥ_śreyas para--_para dharmaḥ_dharma bhaya--_bhaya āvahaḥ_āvaha

div.p: āha_ah kiṃcid_kaścit aṅga--_aṅga hīnaḥ_hā api_api sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma śreyān_śreyas praśasyataraḥ_praśasyatara su_su anuṣṭhitāt_anuṣṭhā sakala--_sakala aṅga--_aṅga sampūrtyā_sampūrti kṛtāt_kṛ api_api para--_para dharmāt_dharma sakāśāt_sakāśāt tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu sva--_sva dharme_dharma yuddha--_yuddha ādau_ādi pravartamānasya_pravṛt nidhanam_nidhana maraṇam_maraṇa api_api śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi prāpaka--_prāpaka tvāt_tva para--_para dharmaḥ_dharma tu_tu bhaya--_bhaya āvahaḥ_āvaha niṣiddha--_niṣidh tvena_tva naraka--_naraka prāpaka--_prāpaka tvāt_tva

kriyatām_kṛ āha_ah iti_iti śreyān_śreyas praśasyataraḥ_praśasyatara sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma yam_yad varṇa--_varṇa āśramam_āśrama vā_vā prati_prati yaḥ_yad vihitaḥ_vidhā sa_tad tasya_tad sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma viguṇaḥ_viguṇa api_api sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upasaṃhāram_upasaṃhāra antareṇa_antareṇa kṛtaḥ_kṛ api_api para--_para dharmāt_dharma svam_sva prati_prati avihitāt_avihita su_su na_na hi_hi veda--_veda atirikta--_atiric māna--_māna gamyaḥ_gam dharmaḥ_dharma yena_yad para--_para dharme_dharma api_api anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva sva--_sva dharma--_dharma vat_vat iti_iti anumānam_anumāna tatra_tatra mānam_māna syāt_as codana--_codana lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa arthaḥ_artha dharmaḥ_dharma iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya atas_atas sva--_sva dharme_dharma kiṃcid_kaścit aṅga--_aṅga hīne_hā api_api sthitasya_sthā nidhanam_nidhana maraṇam_maraṇa api_api śreyaḥ_śreyas praśasyataram_praśasyatara para--_para dharma--_dharma sthasya_stha jīvitāt_jīvita api_api sva--_sva dharma--_dharma sthasya_stha nidhanam_nidhana hi_hi iha_iha loke_loka kīrtyā_kīrti āvaham_āvaha para--_para loke_loka ca_ca svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi prāpakam_prāpaka para--_para dharmaḥ_dharma tu_tu iha_iha akīrti--_akīrti kara--_kara tvena_tva paratra_paratra naraka--_naraka prada--_prada tvena_tva ca_ca bhaya--_bhaya āvahaḥ_āvaha yatas_yatas atas_atas rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi prayukta--_prayuj svābhāvika--_svābhāvika pravṛtti--_pravṛtti vat_vat para--_para dharmaḥ_dharma api_api heyaḥ_hā eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

evam_evam tāvat_tāvat bhagavat--_bhagavant mata--_mata aṅgīkāriṇām_aṅgīkārin śreyaḥ--_śreyas prāptiḥ_prāpti tad--_tad anaṅgīkāriṇām_anaṅgīkārin ca_ca śreyaḥ--_śreyas mārga--_mārga bhraṣṭa--_bhraṃś tvam_tva uktam_vac śreyaḥ--_śreyas mārga--_mārga bhraṃśena_bhraṃśa phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi pūrvaka--_pūrvaka kāmya--_kāmay karma--_karman ācaraṇe_ācaraṇa ca_ca kevala--_kevala pāpa--_pāpa mātra--_mātra ācaraṇe_ācaraṇa ca_ca bahūni_bahu kāraṇāni_kāraṇa kathitāni_kathay ye_yad tu_tu etat_etad abhyasūyantaḥ_abhyasūy iti_iti ādinā_ādi tatra_tatra ayam_idam saṅgraha--_saṃgraha ślokaḥ_śloka

śraddhā--_śraddhā hāniḥ_hāni tathā_tathā asūyā_asūyā duṣṭa--_duṣ citta--_citta tvam_tva ūḍhate_ūḍhatā prakṛteḥ_prakṛti vaśa--_vaśa varti--_vartin tvam_tva rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa ca_ca puṣkalau_puṣkala
para--_para dharma--_dharma ruci--_ruci tvam_tva ca_ca iti_iti uktāḥ_vac durmārga--_durmārga vāhakāḥ_vāhaka

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatas_tatas ca_ca yuddha--_yuddha rūpasya_rūpa yathāvat_yathāvat rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi rāhityena_rāhitya kartum_kṛ aśakyatvāt_aśakyatva para--_para dharmasya_dharma ca_ca ahiṃsā--_ahiṃsā ādeḥ_ādi sukaratvāt_sukaratva dharma--_dharma tva--_tva aviśeṣāt_aviśeṣa ca_ca tatra_tatra pravartitum_pravṛt icchantam_iṣ prati_prati āha_ah śreyān_śreyas viguṇaḥ_viguṇa kiṃcid_kaścit doṣa--_doṣa viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ api_api samyak_samyak anuṣṭhātum_anuṣṭhā aśakyaḥ_aśakya api_api para--_para dharmāt_dharma su_su anuṣṭhitāt_anuṣṭhā sādhu_sādhu eva_eva anuṣṭhātum_anuṣṭhā śakyāt_śakya api_api sarva--_sarva guṇa--_guṇa pūrṇāt_pṛ api_api sakāśāt_sakāśa śreyān_śreyas tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu svadharmaḥ_svadharma iti_iti ādi_ādi

vidharmaḥ_vidharma para--_para dharmaḥ_dharma ca_ca ābhāsaḥ_ābhāsa upamā_upamā chalaḥ_chala adharma--_adharma śākhāḥ_śākhā pañca_pañcan imāḥ_idam dharma--_dharma jñaḥ_jña adharma--_adharma vat_vat tyajet_tyaj iti_iti saptama--_saptama ukteḥ_ukti

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu sva--_sva prakṛti--_prakṛti nirmitām_nirmā rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa mayīm_maya paśu--_paśu ādi--_ādi sādhāraṇīm_sādhāraṇa pravṛttim_pravṛtti vihāya_vihā śāstra--_śāstra ukteṣu_vac dharmeṣu_dharma vartitavyam_vṛt iti_iti uktam_vac dharma--_dharma hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhau_viśuddhi tādṛśa--_tādṛśa pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti nivartena_nivarta dharmāḥ_dharma ca_ca yuddha--_yuddha ādi--_ādi vat_vat ahiṃsā--_ahiṃsā ādayaḥ_ādi api_api śāstreṇa_śāstra uktāḥ_vac tasmāt_tasmāt rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa rāhityena_rāhitya kartum_kṛ aśakyāt_aśakya yuddha--_yuddha ādeḥ_ādi ahiṃsā--_ahiṃsā śilā--_śilā uñcha--_uñcha vṛtti--_vṛtti lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa dharmaḥ_dharma uttamaḥ_uttama iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah śreyān_śreyas iti_iti

yasya_yad varṇasya_varṇa āśramasya_āśrama ca_ca yaḥ_yad dharmaḥ_dharma vedena_veda vihitaḥ_vidhā sa_tad ca_ca viguṇaḥ_viguṇa kiṃcid_kaścit aṅga--_aṅga vikalaḥ_vikala api_api su_su anuṣṭhitā_anuṣṭhitṛ sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upasaṃhāreṇa_upasaṃhāra ācaritāt_ācar api_api para--_para dharmāt_dharma śreyān_śreyas yathā_yathā brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa ahiṃsā--_ahiṃsā ādiḥ_ādi sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya ca_ca yuddha--_yuddha ādiḥ_ādi na_na hi_hi dharmaḥ_dharma veda--_veda atiriktena_atiric pramāṇena_pramāṇa gamyate_gam cakṣuḥ_cakṣus bhinna--_bhid indriyeṇa_indriya iva_iva rūpam_rūpa yathā_yathā āha_ah jaiminiḥ_jaimini codanā--_codanā lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa dharmaḥ_dharma iti_iti tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu svadharme_svadharma nidhanam_nidhana maraṇam_maraṇa śreyaḥ_śreyas pratyavāya--_pratyavāya abhāvāt_abhāva para--_para janmani_janman dharma--_dharma ācaraṇa--_ācaraṇa sambhavāt_sambhava ca_ca iṣṭa--_iṣṭa sādhakam_sādhaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha para--_para dharmaḥ_dharma tu_tu bhaya--_bhaya āvahaḥ_āvaha aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa janakaḥ_janaka tam_tad prati_prati avihita--_avihita tvena_tva pratyavāya--_pratyavāya sambhavāt_sambhava na_na ca_ca paraśurāme_paraśurāma viśvāmitre_viśvāmitra ca_ca vyabhicāraḥ_vyabhicāra tayoḥ_tad tad--_tad tad--_tad kula--_kula utpannau_utpad api_api tat_tad tad--_tad ca_ca uru--_uru mahimnā_mahiman tad--_tad karma--_karman udayāt_udaya tathā_tathā api_api vigānam_vigāna kaṣṭam_kaṣṭa ca_ca tayoḥ_tad smaryate_smṛ ataeva_ataeva droṇa--_droṇa ādeḥ_ādi kṣātra--_kṣātra dharmaḥ_dharma asakṛt_asakṛt vigītaḥ_vigā

nanu_nanu daiva--_daiva rāti--_rāti ādeḥ_ādi kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya pārivrājyam_pārivrājya śrūyate_śru tatas_tatas katham_katham ahiṃsā--_ahiṃsā ādeḥ_ādi para--_para dharma--_dharma tvam_tva iti_iti ced_ced satyam_satya pūrva--_pūrva pūrva--_pūrva āśrama--_āśrama dharmaiḥ_dharma kṣīṇa--_kṣi vāsanayā_vāsanā pārivrājya--_pārivrājya adhikāre_adhikāra sati_as tam_tad prati_prati ataeva_ataeva sva--_sva dharme_dharma sthitasya_sthā iti_iti yojyate_yojay
BhG 3.36

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
atha_atha kena_ka prayuktaḥ_prayuj ayam_idam pāpam_pāpa carati_car pūruṣaḥ_pūruṣa
an_an icchan_iṣ api_api vārṣṇeya_vārṣṇeya balāt_bala iva_iva niyojitaḥ_niyojay

div.p: āgacchet_āgam tat_tad etat_etad aśakyam_aśakya manvānaḥ_man arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac atha_atha iti_iti vṛṣṇeḥ_vṛṣṇi vaṃśe_vaṃśa avatīrṇaḥ_avatṛ vārṣṇeyaḥ_vārṣṇeya he_he vārṣṇeya_vārṣṇeya anartha--_anartha rūpam_rūpa pāpam_pāpa kartum_kṛ icchan_iṣ api_api kena_ka prayuktaḥ_prayuj preritaḥ_preray ayam_idam puruṣaḥ_puruṣa pāpam_pāpa carati_car kāma--_kāma krodhau_krodha viveka--_viveka balena_bala api_api puruṣasya_puruṣa punar_punar pāpe_pāpa pravṛtti--_pravṛtti darśanāt_darśana anyaḥ_anya api_api tayoḥ_tad mūla--_mūla bhūtaḥ_bhū kaścid_kaścit pravartakaḥ_pravartaka bhavet_bhū iti_iti sambhāvanayā_sambhāvanā praśnaḥ_praśna

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatra_tatra kāmya--_kāmya pratiṣiddha--_pratiṣidh karma--_karman pravṛtti--_pravṛtti kāraṇam_kāraṇa apanudya_apanud bhagavat--_bhagavant matam_mata anuvartitum_anuvṛt tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa avadhāraṇāya_avadhāraṇa arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac atha_atha iti_iti dhyāyataḥ_dhyā viṣayān_viṣaya puṃsaḥ_puṃs iti_iti ādinā_ādi pūrvam_pūrva anartha--_anartha mūlam_mūla uktam_vac sāmpratam_sāṃpratam ca_ca prakṛteḥ_prakṛti guṇa--_guṇa saṃmūḍhāḥ_sammuh iti_iti ādinā_ādi bahu--_bahu vistaram_vistara kathitam_kathay tatra_tatra kim_kim sarvāṇi_sarva api_api sama--_sama prādhānyena_prādhānya kāraṇāni_kāraṇa athavā_athavā ekam_eka eva_eva mukhyam_mukhya kāraṇam_kāraṇa itarāṇi_itara tu_tu tad--_tad sahakārīṇi_sahakārin kevalam_kevalam tatra_tatra ādye_ādya sarveṣām_sarva pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthak_pṛthak nivāraṇe_nivāraṇa mahān_mahat prayāsaḥ_prayāsa syāt_as antye_antya tu_tu ekasmin_eka eva_eva nirākṛte_nirākṛ kṛta--_kṛ kṛtya--_kṛtya tā_tā syāt_as iti_iti atas_atas brūhi_brū me_mad kena_ka hetunā_hetu prayuktaḥ_prayuj preritaḥ_preray ayam_idam tvad--_tvad mata--_mata ananuvartī_ananuvartin sarva--_sarva jñāna--_jñāna vimūḍhaḥ_vimuh puruṣaḥ_puruṣa pāpam_pāpa anartha--_anartha anubandhi_anubandhin sarvam_sarva śatru--_śatru vadha--_vadha sādhanam_sādhana ca_ca śyana--_śyana ādi_ādi pratiṣiddham_pratiṣidh ca_ca kalañja--_kalañja bhakṣaṇa--_bhakṣaṇa ādi_ādi bahu--_bahu vidham_vidha karma_karman ācarati_ācar svayam_svayam kartum_kṛ an_an icchan_iṣ api_api na_na tu_tu nivṛtti--_nivṛtti lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa parama--_parama puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha anubandhi_anubandhin tvad--_tvad na_na ca_ca pāratantryam_pāratantrya vinā_vinā ittham_ittham sambhavati_sambhū atas_atas yena_yad balāt_bala iva_iva niyojitaḥ_niyojay rājñā_rājan iva_iva bhṛtyaḥ_bhṛtya tvad--_tvad mata--_mata viruddham_virudh sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha anubandhi--_anubandhin tvam_tva jānan_jñā api_api tādṛśam_tādṛśa karma_karman ācarati_ācar tam_tad anartha--_anartha mārga--_mārga pravartakam_pravartaka mām_mad prati_prati brūhi_brū jñātvā_jñā he_he vārṣṇeya_vārṣṇeya vṛṣṇi--_vṛṣṇi vaṃśe_vaṃśa mad--_mad mātāmaha--_mātāmaha kule_kula
kṛpayā_kṛpā avatīrṇā_avatṛ iti_iti sambodhanena_sambodhana vārṣṇeyī--_vārṣṇeyī sutaḥ_suta aham_mad tvayā_tvad nipekṣaṇīyaḥ_nipekṣ iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay

rāgaḥ_rāga iti_iti atra_atra pṛcchati_pracch atha_atha iti_iti kena_ka prayojaka--_prayojaka kartrā_kartṛ an_an icchan_iṣ api_api vidhi--_vidhi niṣedha--_niṣedha śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha jñānavat--_jñānavat tvāt_tva pāpe_pāpa pravartitum_pravṛt icchā--_icchā rahitaḥ_rahita api_api balāt_bala iva_iva iti_iti prayojaka--_prayojaka preraṇa--_preraṇa vaśāt_vaśa prayojyasya_prayuj api_api icchā_icchā samyak_samyak utpadyate_utpad iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva indriyasya_indriya iti_iti ādau_ādi śāstra--_śāstra niṣiddhe_niṣidh api_api para--_para dāra--_dāra sambhāṣaṇa--_sambhāṣaṇa ādau_ādi rāgaḥ_rāga vyavasthitaḥ_vyavasthā iti_iti yat_yad uktam_vac tatra_tatra arjunaḥ_arjuna pṛcchati_pracch atha_atha kena_ka iti_iti he_he vārṣṇeya_vārṣṇeya vṛṣṇi--_vṛṣṇi vaṃśa--_vaṃśa udbhava_udbhava śubha--_śubha ādibhyaḥ_ādi ca_ca iti_iti prayuktaḥ_prayuj preritaḥ_preray pāpam_pāpa carati_car niṣedha--_niṣedha śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha jñānāt_jñāna tad--_tad caritam_carita an_an icchan_iṣ api_api balāt_bala iva_iva iti_iti prayojaka--_prayojaka icchā--_icchā āpanna--_āpad tayā_tā prayojye_prayuj api_api icchā_icchā prajāyate_prajan sa_tad kim_kim īśvaraḥ_īśvara pūrva--_pūrva saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra vā_vā tatra_tatra ādyaḥ_ādya sākṣi--_sākṣin tvāt_tva kāruṇika--_kāruṇika tvāt_tva ca_ca na_na pāpe_pāpa prerakaḥ_preraka na_na ca_ca paraḥ_para jaḍa--_jaḍa tvāt_tva iti_iti praśna--_praśna arthaḥ_artha
BhG 3.37

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
kāmaḥ_kāma eṣa_etad krodhaḥ_krodha eṣa_etad rajaḥ--_rajas guṇa--_guṇa samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava
mahā--_mahat aśanaḥ_aśana mahā--_mahat pāpmā_pāpman viddhi_vid enam_enad iha_iha vairiṇam_vairin

div.p: uvāca_vac yaḥ_yad tvayā_tvad pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch hetuḥ_hetu eva_eva kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva nanu_nanu krodhaḥ_krodha api_api pūrvam_pūrvam tvayā_tvad uktam_vac indriyasya_indriya indriyasya_indriya arthaḥ_artha iti_iti atra_atra satyam_satya na_na asau_adas tatas_tatas pṛthak_pṛthak kintu_kiṃtu krodhaḥ_krodha api_api eṣaḥ_etad kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva hi_hi kenacid_kaścit pratihataḥ_pratihan krodha--_krodha ātmanā_ātman pariṇamate_pariṇam pūrvam_pūrvam pṛthaktvena_pṛthaktva uktaḥ_vac api_api krodha--_krodha kāma--_kāma jaḥ_ja eva_eva iti_iti abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya ekīkṛtya_ekīkṛ ucyate_vac rajaḥ--_rajas guṇāt_guṇa samudbhavati_samudbhū iti_iti tathā_tathā anena_idam sattva--_sattva vṛddhyā_vṛddhi rajasi_rajas kṣayam_kṣaya nīte_nī sati_as kāmaḥ_kāma na_na jāyate_jan iti_iti sūcitam_sūcay enam_enad kāmam_kāma iha_iha mokṣa--_mokṣa mārge_mārga vairiṇam_vairin viddhi_vid ayam_idam ca_ca vakṣyamāṇa--_vac krameṇa_krama hantavyaḥ_han eva_eva yatas_yatas na_na asau_adas dānena_dāna sandhātum_saṃdhā śakyaḥ_śakya iti_iti āha_ah mahā--_mahat aśanaḥ_aśana mahat_mahat aśanam_aśana yasya_yad saḥ_tad duṣpūraḥ_duṣpūra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na ca_ca sāmnā_sāman sandhātum_saṃdhā śakyaḥ_śakya yatas_yatas mahā--_mahat pāpmā_pāpman ati_ati ugraḥ_ugra 37_37

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam arjunena_arjuna pṛṣṭe_pracch atha_atha u_u khalu_khalu āhuḥ_ah kāma--_kāma mayaḥ_maya eva_eva ayam_idam puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti ātmā_ātman eva_eva idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as ekaḥ_eka eva_eva saḥ_tad akāmayata_kāmay jāyā_jāyā me_mad syāt_as atha_atha prajāyeya_prajan atha_atha vittam_vitta me_mad syāt_as atha_atha śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac kāma_kāma yaḥ_yad tvayā_tvad pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch hetuḥ_hetu balāt_bala anartha--_anartha mārge_mārga pravartakaḥ_pravartaka saḥ_tad eṣa_etad kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva mahān_mahat śatruḥ_śatru yad--_yad nimittā_nimitta sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha prāptiḥ_prāpti prāṇinām_prāṇin

nanu_nanu krodhaḥ_krodha api_api abhicāra--_abhicāra ādau_ādi pravartakaḥ_pravartaka dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah krodhaḥ_krodha eṣaḥ_etad kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva kenacid_kaścit hetunā_hetu pratihataḥ_pratihan krodha--_krodha tvena_tva pariṇamate_pariṇam atas_atas krodhaḥ_krodha api_api eṣa_etad kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva etasmin_etad eva_eva mahā--_mahat vairiṇi_vairin nivārite_nivāray sarva--_sarva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha prāptiḥ_prāpti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad nivāraṇa--_nivāraṇa upāya--_upāya jñānāya_jñāna tad--_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa āha_ah rajaḥ--_rajas guṇa--_guṇa samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava duḥkha--_duḥkha pravṛtti--_pravṛtti bala--_bala ātmakaḥ_ātmaka rajaḥ--_rajas guṇaḥ_guṇa eva_eva samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava kāraṇam_kāraṇa yasya_yad atas_atas kāraṇa--_kāraṇa anuvidhāyi--_anuvidhāyin tvāt_tva kāryasya_kārya saḥ_tad api_api tathā_tathā yadi_yadi api_api tamaḥ--_tamas guṇaḥ_guṇa api_api tasya_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa tathā_tathā api_api duḥkhe_duḥkha pravṛttau_pravṛtti ca_ca rajasaḥ_rajas eva_eva prādhānyāt_prādhānya tasya_tad eva_eva nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa etena_etad sāttvikyā_sāttvika vṛttyā_vṛtti rajasi_rajas kṣīṇe_kṣi saḥ_tad api_api kṣīyate_kṣi iti_iti uktam_vac

athavā_athavā tasya_tad katham_katham anartha--_anartha mārge_mārga pravartaka--_pravartaka tvam_tva iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah rajaḥ--_rajas guṇasya_guṇa pravṛtti--_pravṛtti ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava yasmāt_yad kāmaḥ_kāma hi_hi viṣaya--_viṣaya abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka svayam_svayam udbhūtaḥ_udbhū rajaḥ_rajas pravartayan_pravartay puruṣam_puruṣa duḥkha--_duḥkha ātmake_ātmaka karmaṇi_karman pravartayati_pravartay tena_tad ayam_idam avaśyam_avaśyam hantavyaḥ_han iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

nanu_nanu sāma--_sāman dāna--_dāna bheda--_bheda daṇḍāḥ_daṇḍa catvāraḥ_catur upāyāḥ_upāya tatra_tatra prathama--_prathama trikasya_trika asambhave_asaṃbhava caturthaḥ_caturtha daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa prayoktavyaḥ_prayuj na_na tu_tu haṭhāt_haṭha eva_eva iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk trayāṇām_tri asambhavam_asaṃbhava vaktum_vac viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ mahā--_mahat aśanaḥ_aśana mahā--_mahat mahat_mahat aśanam_aśana asya_idam iti_iti mahā--_mahat aśanaḥ_aśana

yat_yad pṛthivyām_pṛthivī vrīhi--_vrīhi yavam_yava hiraṇyam_hiraṇya paśavaḥ_paśu striyaḥ_strī na_na alam_alam ekasya_eka tat_tad sarvam_sarva iti_iti matvā_man śamam_śama vrajet_vraj iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti

atas_atas na_na dānena_dāna sandhātum_saṃdhā śakyaḥ_śakya nā_na api_api sāma--_sāman bhedābhyām_bheda yatas_yatas mahā--_mahat pāpmā_pāpman ati_ati ugraḥ_ugra tena_tad hi_hi balāt_bala preritaḥ_preray aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa phalam_phala api_api jānan_jñā pāpam_pāpa karoti_kṛ atas_atas viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā enam_enad kāmam_kāma iha_iha saṃsāre_saṃsāra
tat_tad etat_etad sarvam_sarva vivṛtam_vivṛ vārtika--_vārttika kāraiḥ_kāra ātmā_ātman eva_eva idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as iti_iti śruti--_śruti vyākhyāne_vyākhyāna

lg.l: pravṛttau_pravṛtti ca_ca nivṛttau_nivṛtti ca_ca yathā_yathā uktasya_vac adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin
svātantrye_svātantrya sati_as saṃsāra--_saṃsāra sṛtau_sṛti kasmāt_kasmāt pravartate_pravṛt
na_na tu_tu niḥśeṣa--_niḥśeṣa vidhvasta--_vidhvaṃs saṃsāra--_saṃsāra anartha--_anartha vartmani_vartman
nivṛtti--_nivṛtti lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa vācyam_vac kena_ka ayam_idam preryate_preray avaśaḥ_avaśa
anartha--_anartha paripāka--_paripāka tvam_tva jānan_jñā pravartate_pravṛt
pāratantryam_pāratantrya ṛte_ṛte dṛṣṭā_dṛś pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti nā_na īdṛśī_īdṛśa kvacid_kvacid
tasmāt_tasmāt śreyaḥ--_śreyas arthinaḥ_arthin puṃsaḥ_puṃs prerakaḥ_preraka aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa karmaṇi_karman
vaktavyaḥ_vac tad--_tad nirāsa--_nirāsa artham_artha iti_iti arthā_artha syāt_as parā_para śrutiḥ_śruti
an_an āpta--_āpta puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha ayam_idam niḥśeṣa--_niḥśeṣa anartha--_anartha saṅkulaḥ_saṃkula
iti_iti akāmayata_kāmay an_an āptān_āpta pumarthān_pumartha sādhanaiḥ_sādhana jaḍaḥ_jaḍa
jihāsati_jihās tathā_tathā anarthān_anartha avidvān_avidvas ātmani_ātman śritān_śri
avidyā--_avidyā udbhūta--_udbhū kāmaḥ_kāma san_as atho_atho khalu_khalu iti_iti ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti
akāmataḥ_akāmatas kriyāḥ_kriyā kāścid_kaścit dṛśyante_dṛś na_na iha_iha kasyacid_kaścit
yat_yad yat_yad hi_hi kurute_kṛ jantuḥ_jantu tad--_tad tad--_tad kāmasya_kāma ceṣṭitam_ceṣṭita

div.p: kāmaḥ_kāma eṣa_etad krodhaḥ_krodha eṣaḥ_etad iti_iti ādi--_ādi vacanam_vacana smṛteḥ_smṛti pravartakaḥ_pravartaka na_na aparaḥ_apara atas_atas kāmāt_kāma anyaḥ_anya pratīyate_pratī
akāmatas_akāmatas iti_iti manu--_manu vacanam_vacana anyat_anya spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha eṣa_etad kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva viṣaya--_viṣaya abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka puruṣam_puruṣa pāpe_pāpa pravartayati_pravartay tena_tad eva_eva prayuktaḥ_prayuj puruṣaḥ_puruṣa pāpam_pāpa carati_car iti_iti arthaḥ_artha eṣa_etad kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva pṛthaktvena_pṛthaktva dṛśyamānaḥ_dṛś eṣa_etad pratyakṣaḥ_pratyakṣa krodhaḥ_krodha bhavati_bhū kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva kenacid_kaścit pratihataḥ_pratihan bhūtvā_bhū krodha--_krodha ākāreṇa_ākāra pariṇamati_pariṇam iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kāmaḥ_kāma rajaḥ--_rajas guṇa--_guṇa samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava iti_iti rājasāt_rājasa kāmāt_kāma eva_eva tāmasaḥ_tāmasa krodhaḥ_krodha jāyate_jan iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kāmasya_kāma apekṣita--_apekṣ pūraṇena_pūraṇa nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti syāt_as iti_iti ced_ced na_na iti_iti āha_ah mahā--_mahat aśanaḥ_aśana mahat_mahat aśanam_aśana yasya_yad saḥ_tad

yat_yad pṛthivyām_pṛthivī vrīhi--_vrīhi yavam_yava hiraṇyam_hiraṇya paśavaḥ_paśu striyaḥ_strī na_na alam_alam ekasya_eka tat_tad sarvam_sarva iti_iti matvā_man śamam_śama vrajet_vraj iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti

kāmasya_kāma apekṣitam_apekṣ pūrayitum_pūray aśakyam_aśakya eva_eva nanu_nanu dānena_dāna sandhātum_saṃdhā aśakyaḥ_aśakya ced_ced sāma--_sāman bhedābhyām_bheda sa_tad sva--_sva vaśīkartavyaḥ_vaśīkṛ tatra_tatra āha_ah mahā--_mahat pāpmā_pāpman ati_ati ugraḥ_ugra

baladevaḥ_baladeva tatra_tatra āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat kāmaḥ_kāma iti_iti kāmaḥ_kāma prāktana--_prāktana vāsanā--_vāsanā hetukaḥ_hetuka śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣayakaḥ_viṣayaka abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa puruṣam_puruṣa pāpe_pāpa prerayati_preray tat_tad anicchum_anicchu api_api saḥ_tad asya_idam prerakaḥ_preraka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nanu_nanu abhicāra--_abhicāra ādau_ādi krodhaḥ_krodha api_api prerakaḥ_preraka dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś sa_tad ca_ca indriyasya_indriya iti_iti ādau_ādi bhavatā_bhū api_api pṛthak_pṛthak uktaḥ_vac iti_iti ced_ced satyam_satya na_na sa_tad tasmāt_tad pṛthak_pṛthak kintu_kiṃtu eṣa_etad kāmaḥ_kāma eva_eva kenacid_kaścit cetanena_cetana pratihataḥ_pratihan krodhaḥ_krodha bhavati_bhū dugdham_dugdha iva_iva amlena_amla yuktam_yuj dadhi_dadhi kāma--_kāma jayaḥ_jaya eva_eva krodha--_krodha jayaḥ_jaya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa kāmaḥ_kāma iti_iti āha_ah rajaḥ--_rajas guṇa--_guṇa iti_iti sattva--_sattva vṛddhyā_vṛddhi rajasi_rajas nirjite_nirji kāmaḥ_kāma nirjitaḥ_nirji syāt_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na ca_ca apekṣita--_apekṣ pradānena_pradāna kāmasya_kāma nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti iti_iti āha_ah mahā--_mahat aśanaḥ_aśana iti_iti

yat_yad pṛthivyām_pṛthivī vrīhi--_vrīhi yavam_yava hiraṇyam_hiraṇya paśavaḥ_paśu striyaḥ_strī na_na alam_alam ekasya_eka tat_tad sarvam_sarva iti_iti matvā_man śamam_śama vrajet_vraj iti_iti smaraṇāt_smaraṇa

na_na ca_ca sāmnā_sāman bhedena_bheda vā_vā sa_tad vaśībhavet_vaśībhū iti_iti āha_ah mahā--_mahat pāpmā_pāpman iti_iti yaḥ_yad ati_ati ugraḥ_ugra viveka--_viveka jñāna--_jñāna vilopena_vilopa niṣiddhe_niṣidh api_api pravartayati_pravartay tasmāt_tasmāt iha_iha dāna--_dāna yoge_yoga enam_enad vairiṇam_vairin viddhi_vid tathā_tathā ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna ādibhiḥ_ādi tribhiḥ_tri upāyaiḥ_upāya sandhātum_saṃdhā aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva vakṣyamāṇena_vac daṇḍena_daṇḍa sa_tad īśvaraḥ_īśvara karma--_karman antaritaḥ_antari parjanya--_parjanya vat_vat sarvatra_sarvatra prerakaḥ_preraka kāmaḥ_kāma tu_tu svayam_svayam eva_eva pāpmā_pāpman agre_agra iti_iti tathā_tathā uktam_vac 37_37
BhG 3.38

lg.l: dhūmena_dhūma āvriyate_āvṛ vahniḥ_vahni yathā_yathā darśaḥ_darśa malena_mala ca_ca
yathā_yathā ulbena_ulba āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ garbhaḥ_garbha tathā_tathā tena_tad idam_idam āvṛtam_āvṛ

div.p: darśayati_darśay dhūmena_dhūma sahajena_sahaja yathā_yathā vahniḥ_vahni āvriyate_āvṛ ācchādyate_ācchāday yathā_yathā ca_ca ādarśaḥ_ādarśa malena_mala āgantukena_āgantuka yathā_yathā ca_ca ulbena_ulba garbhaveṣṭana--_garbhaveṣṭana carmaṇā_carman garbhaḥ_garbha sarvatas_sarvatas niruddhaḥ_nirudh āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ tathā_tathā prakāra--_prakāra trayeṇa_traya api_api tena_tad kāmena_kāma āvṛtam_āvṛ idam_idam 38_38

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tasya_tad mahā--_mahat pāpma--_pāpman tvena_tva vaira--_vaira tvam_tva eva_eva dṛṣṭāntaiḥ_dṛṣṭānta spaṣṭayati_spaṣṭay dhūmena_dhūma iti_iti tatra_tatra śarīra--_śarīra ārambhāt_ārambha prāk_prāk antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa sthā--_sthā labdha--_labh vṛttika--_vṛttika tvāt_tva sūkṣmaḥ_sūkṣma kāmaḥ_kāma śarīra--_śarīra ārambhakeṇa_ārambhaka karmaṇā_karman sthūla--_sthūla śarīra--_śarīra avacchinne_avacchid labdha--_labh vṛttike_vṛttika antaḥkaraṇe_antaḥkaraṇa kṛta--_kṛ abhivyaktiḥ_abhivyakti san_as saḥ_tad eva_eva viṣayasya_viṣaya cintyamāna--_cintay tā--_tā avasthāyām_avasthā punar_punar punar_punar udricyamānaḥ_udric sthūlataraḥ_sthūlatara bhavati_bhū saḥ_tad eva_eva punar_punar viṣayasya_viṣaya bhujyamāna--_bhuj tā--_tā avasthāyām_avasthā atyanta--_atyanta udrekam_udreka prāptaḥ_prāp sthūlatamaḥ_sthūlatama bhavati_bhū tatra_tatra prathama--_prathama avasthāyām_avasthā dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta yathā_yathā dhūmena_dhūma sahajena_sahaja aprakāśa--_aprakāśa ātmakena_ātmaka prakāśa--_prakāśa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka vahniḥ_vahni āvriyate_āvṛ dvitīya--_dvitīya avasthāyām_avasthā dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta yathā_yathā ādarśaḥ_ādarśa malena_mala asahajena_asahaja ādarśa--_ādarśa utpatti--_utpatti anantaram_anantara udriktena_udric ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra avāntara--_avāntara vaidharmya--_vaidharmya sūcana--_sūcana arthaḥ_artha āvriyate_āvṛ iti_iti kriyā--_kriyā anukarṣaṇa--_anukarṣaṇa arthaḥ_artha ca_ca tṛtīya--_tṛtīya avasthāyām_avasthā dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta yathā_yathā ulbena_ulba jarāyuṇā_jarāyu garbha--_garbha veṣṭana--_veṣṭana carmaṇā_carman ati_ati sthūlena_sthūla sarvatas_sarvatas nirudhya_nirudh āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ tathā_tathā prakāra--_prakāra trayeṇa_traya api_api tena_tad kāmena_kāma idam_idam āvṛtam_āvṛ

atra_atra dhūmena_dhūma āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ api_api vahniḥ_vahni dāha--_dāha ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sva--_sva kāryam_kārya karoti_kṛ malena_mala āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ tu_tu ādarśaḥ_ādarśa pratibimba--_pratibimba grahaṇa--_grahaṇa lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sva--_sva kāryam_kārya na_na karoti_kṛ svaccha--_svaccha tā--_tā dharma--_dharma mātra--_mātra tirodhānāt_tirodhāna svarūpataḥ_svarūpa tu_tu upalabhyate_upalabh eva_eva ulbena_ulba āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ tu_tu garbhaḥ_garbha na_na hasta--_hasta pāda--_pāda ādi--_ādi prasāraṇa--_prasāraṇa rūpam_rūpa sva--_sva kāryam_kārya karoti_kṛ na_na vā_vā svarūpataḥ_svarūpa upalabhyate_upalabh iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa 38_38

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha na_na ca_ca kasyacid_kaścit eva_eva ayam_idam vairī_vairin api_api tu_tu sarvasya_sarva eva_eva iti_iti sa_sa dṛṣṭāntam_dṛṣṭānta āha_ah dhūmena_dhūma iti_iti kāmasya_kāma agāḍha--_agāḍha tve_tva gāḍha--_gāḍha tve_tva ati_ati gāḍha--_gāḍha tve_tva ca_ca krameṇa_krameṇa dṛṣṭāntāḥ_dṛṣṭānta dhūmena_dhūma āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ api_api malinaḥ_malina vahniḥ_vahni dāha--_dāha ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sva--_sva kāryam_kārya tu_tu karoti_kṛ malena_mala āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ darpaṇam_darpaṇa tu_tu svaccha--_svaccha tā--_tā dharma--_dharma tirodhānāt_tirodhāna bimba--_bimba grahaṇam_grahaṇa sva--_sva kāryam_kārya na_na karoti_kṛ svarūpataḥ_svarūpa tu_tu upalabhyate_upalabh ulbena_ulba jarāyūṇā_jarāyu āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ garbhaḥ_garbha tu_tu sva--_sva kāryam_kārya kara--_kara caraṇa--_caraṇa ādi--_ādi prasāraṇam_prasāraṇa na_na karoti_kṛ na_na vā_vā svarūpataḥ_svarūpa upalabhyate_upalabh iti_iti evam_evam kāmasya_kāma agāḍha--_agāḍha tve_tva paramārtha--_paramārtha smaraṇam_smaraṇa kartum_kṛ śaknoti_śak gāḍha--_gāḍha tve_tva na_na śaknoti_śak iti_iti gāḍha--_gāḍha tve_tva tu_tu acetanam_acetana eva_eva syāt_as idam_idam jagat_jagant eva_eva 38_38

baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah yathā_yathā dhūmena_dhūma āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ anujjvalaḥ_anujjvala api_api vahniḥ_vahni auṣṇa--_auṣṇa ādikam_ādika kiṃcid_kaścit karoti_kṛ malena_mala āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ darpaṇaḥ_darpaṇa svaccha--_svaccha tā--_tā tirodhānāt_tirodhāna pratibimbam_pratibimba na_na śaknoti_śak grahītum_grah ulbena_ulba jarā--_jarā guṇa--_guṇa āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ garbhaḥ_garbha tu_tu tathā_tathā mṛdunā_mṛdu kāmena_kāma āvṛtam_āvṛ jñānam_jñāna kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid tattva--_tattva artham_artha grahītum_grah śaknoti_śak madhyena_madhya āvṛtam_āvṛ na_na śaknoti_śak tīvreṇa_tīvra āvṛtam_āvṛ tu_tu prasartum_prasṛ api_api na_na śaknoti_śak na_na ca_ca pratīyate_pratī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 38_38
BhG 3.39

lg.l: āvṛtam_āvṛ jñānam_jñāna etena_etad jñāninaḥ_jñānin nitya--_nitya vairiṇā_vairin
kāma--_kāma rūpeṇa_rūpa kaunteya_kaunteya duṣpūreṇa_duṣpūra analena_anala ca_ca

div.p: darśayan_darśay sphuṭayati_sphuṭay idam_idam viveka--_viveka jñānam_jñāna etena_etad āvṛtam_āvṛ ajñasya_ajña khalu_khalu bhoga--_bhoga samaye_samaya kāmaḥ_kāma sukha--_sukha hetuḥ_hetu eva_eva pariṇāme_pariṇāma tu_tu vairi--_vairin tvam_tva pratipadyate_pratipad jñāninaḥ_jñānin punar_punar tad--_tad kālam_kāla api_api anartha--_anartha anusandhānāt_anusaṃdhāna duḥkha--_duḥkha hetuḥ_hetu eva_eva iti_iti nitgya--_nitgya vairiṇā_vairin iti_iti uktam_vac kim_kim ca_ca viṣayaiḥ_viṣaya pūryamāṇaḥ_pṛ api_api yaḥ_yad duṣpūraḥ_duṣpūra āpūryamāṇam_āp￞ tu_tu śoka--_śoka santāpa--_saṃtāpa hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva anala--_anala tulyaḥ_tulya anena_idam sarvān_sarva prati_prati nitya--_nitya vairi--_vairin tvam_tva uktam_vac 39_39

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tathā_tathā tena_tad idam_idam āvṛtam_āvṛ iti_iti saṅgraha--_saṃgraha vākyam_vākya vivṛṇoti_vivṛ āvṛtam_āvṛ iti_iti jñāyate_jñā anena_idam iti_iti jñānam_jñāna antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa viveka--_viveka vijñānam_vijñāna veda--_veda śabda--_śabda nirdiṣṭam_nirdiś etena_etad kāmena_kāma āvṛtam_āvṛ tathā_tathā api_api āpātataḥ_āpāta sukha--_sukha hetutvāt_hetutva upādeyaḥ_upādā syāt_as iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah jñāninaḥ_jñānin nitya--_nitya vairiṇā_vairin ajñaḥ_ajña hi_hi viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga kāle_kāla kāmam_kāma mitram_mitra iva_iva paśyan_dṛś tad--_tad kārye_kārya duḥkhe_duḥkha prāpte_prāp vairi--_vairin tvam_tva jānāti_jñā kāmena_kāma aham_mad duḥkhi--_duḥkhin tvam_tva āpāditaḥ_āpāday iti_iti jñānī_jñānin tu_tu bhoga--_bhoga kāle_kāla api_api jānāti_jñā anena_idam aham_mad anarthe_anartha praveśitaḥ_praveśay iti_iti atas_atas vivekī_vivekin duḥkhī_duḥkhin bhavati_bhū bhoga--_bhoga kāle_kāla ca_ca tad--_tad pariṇāme_pariṇāma ca_ca anena_idam iti_iti jñāninaḥ_jñānin asau_adas nitya--_nitya vairī_vairin iti_iti sarvathā_sarvathā tena_tad hantavyaḥ_han eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

tarhi_tarhi kim_ka svarūpaḥ_svarūpa asau_adas iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah kāma--_kāma rūpeṇa_rūpa kāmaḥ_kāma icchā_icchā tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā sā_tad eva_eva rūpam_rūpa yasya_yad tena_tad he_he kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti sambandha--_sambandha āviṣkāreṇa_āviṣkāra premāṇam_preman sūcayati_sūcay nanu_nanu vivekinaḥ_vivekin hantavyaḥ_han api_api avivekinaḥ_avivekin upādeyaḥ_upādā syāt_as iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah duṣpūreṇa_duṣpūra analena_anala ca_ca ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra upamā--_upamā arthaḥ_artha na_na vidyate_vid alam_alam paryāptiḥ_paryāpti yasya_yad iti_iti analaḥ_anala vahniḥ_vahni sa_tad yathā_yathā haviṣā_havis pūrayitum_pūray aśakyaḥ_aśakya tathā_tathā ayam_idam api_api bhogena_bhoga iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atas_atas nirantaram_nirantaram santāpa--_saṃtāpa hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva vivekinaḥ_vivekin iva_iva avivekinaḥ_avivekin api_api heyaḥ_hā eva_eva asau_adas tathā_tathā ca_ca smṛtiḥ_smṛti

na_na jātu_jātu kāmaḥ_kāma kāmānām_kāma upabhogena_upabhoga śāṃyati_śam
haviṣā_havis kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa vartmā_vartman iva_iva bhūyas_bhūyas eva_eva abhivardhate_abhivṛdh
