athavā_athavā icchāyāḥ_icchā viṣaya--_viṣaya siddhi--_siddhi nivartya--_nivartay tvāt_tva icchā--_icchā rūpaḥ_rūpa kāmaḥ_kāma viṣaya--_viṣaya bhogena_bhoga svayam_svayam eva_eva nivartiṣyate_nivṛt kim_ka tatra_tatra ati_ati nirbandhena_nirbandha iti_iti atas_atas uktam_vac duṣpūreṇa_duṣpūra analena_anala ca_ca iti_iti viṣaya--_viṣaya siddhyā_siddhi tad--_tad kālam_kāla icchā--_icchā tirodhāne_tirodhāna api_api punar_punar prādurbhāvāt_prādurbhāva na_na viṣaya--_viṣaya siddhiḥ_siddhi icchā--_icchā nivartikā_nivartaka kintu_kiṃtu viṣaya--_viṣaya doṣa--_doṣa dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi eva_eva tathā_tathā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 39_39

āha_ah nitya--_nitya vairiṇī_vairin atas_atas asau_adas sarva--_sarva prakāreṇa_prakāra hantavyaḥ_han iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva kāma--_kāma rūpeṇa_rūpa kāma--_kāma ākāreṇa_ākāra ajñānena_ajñāna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra iva_iva arthe_artha analaḥ_anala yathā_yathā haviṣā_havis pūrayitum_pūray a_a cakyaḥ_cakya tathā_tathā kāmaḥ_kāma api_api bhogena_bhoga iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad uktam_vac na_na jātu_jātu kāmaḥ_kāma kāmānām_kāma upabhogena_upabhoga śāṃyati_śam haviṣā_havis kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa vartmā_vartman iva_iva bhūyas_bhūyas eva_eva abhivardhate_abhivṛdh iti_iti 39_39

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_vac artham_artha sphuṭayati_sphuṭay āvṛtam_āvṛ iti_iti anena_idam kāma--_kāma rūpeṇa_rūpa nitya--_nitya vairiṇā_vairin jñāninaḥ_jñānin jīvasya_jīva jñānam_jñāna āvṛtam_āvṛ iti_iti sambandhaḥ_sambandha ajñasya_ajña viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga samaye_samaya sukha--_sukha tvāt_tva suhṛd_suhṛd api_api kāmaḥ_kāma tad--_tad kārye_kārya duḥkhe_duḥkha sati_as vairaḥ_vaira syāt_as vijñasya_vijña tu_tu tad--_tad samaye_samaya api_api duḥkha--_duḥkha anusandhānāt_anusaṃdhāna duḥkha--_duḥkha hetuḥ_hetu eva_eva iti_iti nitya--_nitya vairiṇā_vairin iti_iti uktiḥ_ukti tasmāt_tasmāt sarvathā_sarvathā hantavyaḥ_han iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva kim_ka ca_ca duṣpūreṇa_duṣpūra iti_iti ca_ca śabdaḥ_śabda iva_iva arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra analaḥ_anala yathā_yathā haviṣā_havis pūrayitum_pūray aśakyaḥ_aśakya tathā_tathā bhogena_bhoga kāmaḥ_kāma iti_iti arthaḥ_artha smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah

na_na jātu_jātu kāmaḥ_kāma kāmānām_kāma upabhogena_upabhoga śāṃyati_śam
haviṣā_havis kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa vartmā_vartman iva_iva bhūyas_bhūyas eva_eva abhivardhate_abhivṛdh
div.l: tasmāt_tasmāt sarveṣām_sarva sa_tad nitya--_nitya vairī_vairin iti_iti

div.p: BhG 3.40

lg.l: indriyāṇi_indriya manaḥ_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi asya_idam adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna ucyate_vac
etaiḥ_etad vimohayati_vimohay eṣa_etad jñānam_jñāna āvṛtya_āvṛ dehinam_dehin

div.p: āha_ah viṣaya--_viṣaya darśana--_darśana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi saṃkalpena_saṃkalpa adhyavasāyena_adhyavasāya ca_ca kāmasya_kāma āvirbhāvāt_āvirbhāva indriyāṇi_indriya ca_ca manaḥ_manas ca_ca buddhiḥ_buddhi ca_ca asya_idam adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna ucyate_vac etaiḥ_etad indriya--_indriya ādibhiḥ_ādi darśana--_darśana ādi--_ādi vyāpāravadbhiḥ_vyāpāravat āśraya--_āśraya bhūtaiḥ_bhū viveka--_viveka jñānam_jñāna āvṛtya_āvṛ dehinam_dehin vimohayati_vimohay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana jñāte_jñā hi_hi śatroḥ_śatru adhiṣṭhāne_adhiṣṭhāna sukhena_sukha sa_tad jetum_ji śakyate_śak iti_iti tad--_tad adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna āha_ah indriyāṇi_indriya iti_iti indriyāṇi_indriya śabda--_śabda sparśa--_sparśa rūpa--_rūpa rasa--_rasa gandha--_gandha grāhakāṇi_grāhaka śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi vacana--_vacana ādāna--_ādāna gamana--_gamana visarga--_visarga ānanda--_ānanda janakāni_janaka vāc--_vāc ādīni_ādi ca_ca manaḥ_manas saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ātmakam_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi adhyavasāya--_adhyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka ca_ca asya_idam kāmasya_kāma adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna āśrayaḥ_āśraya ucyate_vac yatas_yatas etaiḥ_etad indriya--_indriya ādibhiḥ_ādi sva--_sva sva--_sva vyāpāravadbhiḥ_vyāpāravat āśrayaiḥ_āśraya vimohayati_vimohay vividham_vividha mohayati_mohay eṣa_etad kāmaḥ_kāma jñānam_jñāna viveka--_viveka jñānam_jñāna āvṛtya_āvṛ ācchādya_ācchāday dehinam_dehin deha--_deha abhimāninam_abhimānin

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kva_kva asau_adas tiṣṭhati_sthā atas_atas āha_ah indriyāṇi_indriya iti_iti asya_idam vairiṇaḥ_vairin kāmasya_kāma adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna mahā--_mahat durga--_durga rājadhānyaḥ_rājadhānī śabda--_śabda ādayaḥ_ādi viṣayāḥ_viṣaya tu_tu tasya_tad rājñaḥ_rājan deśāḥ_deśa iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva etaiḥ_etad indriya--_indriya

baladevaḥ_baladeva vairiṇaḥ_vairin kāmasya_kāma durgeṣu_durga nirjiteṣu_nirji tasya_tad jayaḥ_jaya sukaraḥ_sukara iti_iti tāni_tad āha_ah indriyāṇi_indriya iti_iti viṣaya--_viṣaya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādinā_ādi saṅkalpena_saṃkalpa adhyavasāyena_adhyavasāya ca_ca kāmasya_kāma abhivyakteḥ_abhivyakti śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi ca_ca manaḥ_manas ca_ca buddhiḥ_buddhi ca_ca tasya_tad adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna mahā--_mahat durga--_durga rājadhānī--_rājadhānī rūpam_rūpa bhavati_bhū viṣayāḥ_viṣaya tu_tu tasya_tad tasya_tad janapadāḥ_janapada etaiḥ_etad viṣaya--_viṣaya saṃcāribhiḥ_saṃcārin indriya--_indriya ādibhiḥ_ādi dehinam_dehin prakṛti--_prakṛti sṛṣṭa--_sṛj dehavantam_dehavat jīvam_jīva ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna udyatam_udyam eṣa_etad kāmaḥ_kāma vimohayati_vimohay ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna vimukham_vimukha viṣaya--_viṣaya rasa--_rasa pravaṇam_pravaṇa ca_ca karoti_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 3.41

lg.l: tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad indriyāṇi_indriya ādau_ādau niyamya_niyam bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha
pāpmānam_pāpman prajahihi_prahā enam_enad jñāna--_jñāna vijñāna--_vijñāna nāśanam_nāśana

div.p: tasmāt_tasmāt ādau_ādi vimohāt_vimoha pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva indriyāṇi_indriya manaḥ_manas buddhim_buddhi ca_ca niyamya_niyam pāpmānam_pāpman pāpa--_pāpa rūpam_rūpa enam_enad kāmam_kāma hi_hi sphuṭam_sphuṭa prajahi_prahā ghātaya_ghātay yat_yat vā_vā prajahihi_prahā parityaja_parityaj jñānam_jñāna ātma--_ātman viṣayam_viṣaya vijñānam_vijñāna nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana jam_ja tam_tad eva_eva dhīraḥ_dhīra vijñāya_vijñā prajñām_prajñā kurvīta_kṛ iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam yasmāt_yasmāt indriya--_indriya adhiṣṭhānaḥ_adhiṣṭhāna kāmaḥ_kāma dehinam_dehin mohayati_mohay tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad ādau_ādau mohanāt_mohana pūrvam_pūrvam kāma--_kāma nirodhāt_nirodha pūrvam_pūrvam iti_iti vā_vā indriyāṇi_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi niyamya_niyam vaśīkṛtya_vaśīkṛ teṣu_tad hi_hi vaśīkṛteṣu_vaśīkṛ manaḥ--_manas buddhyoḥ_buddhi api_api vaśīkaraṇam_vaśīkaraṇa sidhyati_sidh saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa adhyavasāyayoḥ_adhyavasāya bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya pravṛtti--_pravṛtti dvārā_dvār eva_eva anartha--_anartha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva atas_atas indriyāṇi_indriya manaḥ_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi iti_iti pūrvam_pūrvam pṛthak_pṛthak nirdiśya_nirdiś api_api iha_iha indriyāṇi_indriya iti_iti etāvat_etāvat uktam_vac indriya--_indriya tvena_tva tayoḥ_tad api_api saṅgrahaḥ_saṃgraha vā_vā he_he bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha mahā--_mahat vaṃśa--_vaṃśa prabhūta--_prabhū tvena_tva samarthaḥ_samartha asi_as pāpmānam_pāpman sarva--_sarva pāpa--_pāpa mūla--_mūla bhūtam_bhū enam_enad kāmam_kāma vairiṇam_vairin prajahihi_prahā parityaja_parityaj hi_hi sphuṭam_sphuṭa prajahi_prahā prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa māraya_māray iti_iti vā_vā jahi_han śatrum_śatru iti_iti upasaṃhārāt_upasaṃhāra ca_ca jñānam_jñāna śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadeśa--_upadeśa jam_ja parokṣam_parokṣa vijñānam_vijñāna aparokṣam_aparokṣa tad--_tad phalam_phala tayoḥ_tad jñāna--_jñāna vijñānayoḥ_vijñāna śreyaḥ--_śreyas prāpti--_prāpti hetvoḥ_hetu nāśanam_nāśana

jīyate_ji atas_atas prathama--_prathama prāptāni_prāp indriyāṇi_indriya durjayāni_durjaya api_api uttara--_uttara apekṣayā_apekṣā sujayāni_sujaya prathamam_prathamam te_tad jīyantām_ji iti_iti āha_ah tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti indriyāṇi_indriya niyamyena_niyam yadi_yadi api_api para--_para strī--_strī para--_para dravya--_dravya ādi--_ādi apaharaṇe_apaharaṇa durnivāram_durnivāra manaḥ_manas gacchati_gam eva_eva tat_tad api_api tatra_tatra tatra_tatra netra--_netra śrotra--_śrotra kara--_kara caraṇa--_caraṇa ādi--_ādi indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra stha--_stha gaṇanāt_gaṇana indriyāṇi_indriya na_na gamaya_gamay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pāpmānam_pāpman ati_ati ugram_ugra kāmam_kāma jahi_hā iti_iti indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra stha--_stha gaṇanam_gaṇana atikālena_atikāla manaḥ_manas api_api kāmāt_kāma vicyutam_vicyu bhavati_bhū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva yasmāt_yasmāt ayam_idam kāma--_kāma rūpaḥ_rūpa vairī_vairin nikhila--_nikhila indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra virati--_virati rūpāya_rūpa ātma--_ātman jñānāya_jñāna udyatasya_udyam viṣaya--_viṣaya rasa--_rasa pravaṇaiḥ_pravaṇa indriyaiḥ_indriya jñānam_jñāna āvṛṇoti_āvṛ tasmāt_tasmāt prakṛti--_prakṛti sṛṣṭa--_sṛj deha--_deha ādimān_ādimat eva_eva indriyāṇi_indriya sarvāṇi_sarva tad--_tad vyāpāra--_vyāpāra rūpe_rūpa niṣkāme_niṣkāma karma--_karman yoge_yoga niyamya_niyam pravaṇāni_pravaṇa kṛtvā_kṛ enam_enad pāpmānam_pāpman kāmam_kāma śatrum_śatru prajahi_prahā vināśaya_vināśay hi_hi yasmāt_yad jñānasya_jñāna śāstrīyasya_śāstrīya deha--_deha ādi--_ādi vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman viṣayakasya_viṣayaka vijñānasya_vijñāna ca_ca tādṛś--_tādṛś ātma--_ātman anubhavasya_anubhava nāśanam_nāśana āvarakam_āvaraka
BhG 3.42

lg.l: indriyāṇi_indriya parāṇi_para āhuḥ_ah indriyebhyaḥ_indriya param_para manaḥ_manas
manasaḥ_manas tu_tu parā_para buddhiḥ_buddhi yaḥ_yad buddheḥ_buddhi paratas_paratas tu_tu saḥ_tad

div.p: darśayati_darśay indriyāṇi_indriya deha--_deha ādibhyaḥ_ādi grāhyebhyaḥ_grāhya parāṇi_para śreṣṭhāni_śreṣṭha āhuḥ_ah sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tvāt_tva prakāśaka--_prakāśaka tvāt_tva ca_ca ataeva_ataeva tad--_tad vyatirikta--_vyatiric tvam_tva api_api arthāt_artha uktam_vac bhavati_bhū indriyebhyaḥ_indriya ca_ca saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ātmakam_ātmaka manaḥ_manas param_para tad--_tad pravartaka--_pravartaka tvāt_tva manasaḥ_manas tu_tu niścaya--_niścaya ātmikā_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi parā_para niścaya--_niścaya pūrvaka--_pūrvaka tvāt_tva saṅkalpasya_saṃkalpa yaḥ_yad tu_tu buddheḥ_buddhi paratas_paratas tad--_tad sākṣi--_sākṣin tvena_tva avasthitaḥ_avasthā sarva--_sarva antaraḥ_antara saḥ_tad ātmā_ātman tam_tad vimohayati_vimohay dehinam_dehin iti_iti dehi--_dehin śabda--_śabda uktaḥ_vac ātmā_ātman saḥ_tad iti_iti parāmṛśyate_parāmṛś 42_42

rasaḥ_rasa api_api asya_idam param_para dṛṣṭvā_dṛś nivartate_nivṛt iti_iti atra_atra para--_para darśanasya_darśana rasa--_rasa abhidhānīyaka--_abhidhānīyaka tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā tyāga--_tyāga sādhanasya_sādhana prāk_prāk ukteḥ_ukti tarhi_tarhi kaḥ_ka asau_adas paraḥ_para yad--_yad darśanāt_darśana tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk śuddham_śudh ātmānam_ātman para--_para śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac deha--_deha ādibhyaḥ_ādi vivicya_vivic darśayati_darśay indriyāṇi_indriya iti_iti śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi jñāna--_jñāna indriyāṇi_indriya pañca_pañcan sthūlam_sthūla jaḍam_jaḍa paricchinnam_paricchid bāhyam_bāhya ca_ca deham_deha apekṣya_apekṣ parāṇi_para sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tvāt_tva prakāśaka--_prakāśaka tvāt_tva vyāpaka--_vyāpaka tvāt_tva antaḥstha--_antaḥstha tvāt_tva ca_ca prakṛṣṭāni_prakṛṣṭa āhuḥ_ah paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita tathā_tathā indriyebhyaḥ_indriya param_para manaḥ_manas saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa vikalpa--_vikalpa ātmakam_ātmaka tad--_tad pravartaka--_pravartaka tvāt_tva tathā_tathā manasaḥ_manas tu_tu parā_para buddhiḥ_buddhi adhyavasāya--_adhyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka adhyavasāyaḥ_adhyavasāya hi_hi niścayaḥ_niścaya tad--_tad pūrvakaḥ_pūrvaka eva_eva saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ādiḥ_ādi manaḥ--_manas dharmaḥ_dharma yaḥ_yad tu_tu buddheḥ_buddhi paratas_paratas tad--_tad bhāsaka--_bhāsaka tvena_tva avasthitaḥ_avasthā yam_yad dehinam_dehin indriya--_indriya ādibhiḥ_ādi āśrayaiḥ_āśraya yuktaḥ_yuj kāmaḥ_kāma jñāna--_jñāna āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa dvāreṇa_dvāra mohayati_mohay iti_iti uktam_vac sa_tad buddheḥ_buddhi draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ paraḥ_para ātmā_ātman saḥ_tad eṣaḥ_etad iha_iha praviṣṭaḥ_praviś iti_iti vat_vat dvi--_dvi avahitasya_avadhā api_api dehinaḥ_dehin tadā_tadā parāmarśaḥ_parāmarśa atra_atra arthe_artha śrutiḥ_śruti

lg.l: indriyebhyaḥ_indriya parāḥ_para hi_hi arthāḥ_artha arthebhyaḥ_artha ca_ca param_para manaḥ_manas
manasaḥ_manas tu_tu parā_para buddhiḥ_buddhi buddheḥ_buddhi ātmā_ātman mahān_mahant paraḥ_para

div.p:
mahataḥ_mahant parama--_parama vyaktam_vyakta avyaktāt_avyakta puruṣaḥ_puruṣa paraḥ_para
puruṣāt_puruṣa na_na param_para kiṃcid_kaścit sā_tad kāṣṭhā_kāṣṭhā sā_tad parā_para gatiḥ_gati

atra_atra ātmanaḥ_ātman paratvasya_paratva eva_eva vākya--_vākya tātparya--_tātparya viṣayatvāt_viṣayatva indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi paratvasya_paratva avivakṣita--_avivakṣita tvāt_tva indriyebhyaḥ_indriya parāḥ_para arthāḥ_artha iti_iti sthāne_sthāna arthebhyaḥ_artha parāṇi_para indriyāṇi_indriya iti_iti vivakṣā--_vivakṣā bhedena_bheda bhagavat--_bhagavant uktam_vac na_na buddheḥ_buddhi asmad--_mad ādi--_ādi vyaṣṭi--_vyaṣṭi buddheḥ_buddhi sakāśāt_sakāśa mahān_mahant ātmā_ātman samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi buddhi--_buddhi rūpaḥ_rūpa paraḥ_para manaḥ_manas mahān_mahant matiḥ_mati brahma_brahman pūḥ_pur buddhiḥ_buddhi khyātiḥ_khyāti īśvaraḥ_īśvara iti_iti vāyu--_vāyu purāṇa--_purāṇa vacanāt_vacana mahataḥ_mahant hairaṇyagarbhyāḥ_hairaṇyagarbha buddheḥ_buddhi param_para avyaktam_avyakta avyākṛtam_avyākṛta sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant bījam_bīja māyā--_māyā ākhyam_ākhyā māyām_māyā tu_tu prakṛtim_prakṛti vidyāt_vid iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tat_tad ha_ha idam_idam tarhi_tarhi a_a vyākṛtam_vyākṛ āsīt_as iti_iti ca_ca avyaktāt_avyakta sakāśāt_sakāśāt sakala--_sakala jaḍa--_jaḍa varga--_varga prakāśakaḥ_prakāśaka puruṣaḥ_puruṣa pūrṇaḥ_pṛ ātmā_ātman paraḥ_para tasmāt_tad api_api kaścid_kaścit anyaḥ_anya paraḥ_para syāt_as iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah puruṣāt_puruṣa na_na param_para kiṃcid_kaścit iti_iti kutas_kutas evam_evam yasmāt_yasmāt sā_tad kāṣṭhā_kāṣṭhā samāptiḥ_samāpti sarva--_sarva adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tvāt_tva sā_tad parā_para gatiḥ_gati saḥ_tad adhvanaḥ_adhvan pāram_pāra āpnoti_āp tat_tad viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu paramam_parama padam_pada iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti prasiddhā_prasidh parā_para gatiḥ_gati api_api sā_tad eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad etat_etad sarvam_sarva yaḥ_yad buddheḥ_buddhi paratas_paratas tu_tu saḥ_tad iti_iti anena_idam uktam_vac 42_42

āha_ah daśa--_daśan diś--_diś vijayibhiḥ_vijayin api_api vīraiḥ_vīra durjaya--_durjaya tvāt_tva ati_ati bala--_bala tvena_tva śreṣṭhāni_śreṣṭha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha indriyebhyaḥ_indriya sakāśāt_sakāśāt api_api prabala--_prabala tvāt_tva manaḥ_manas param_para svapne_svapna khalu_khalu indriyeṣu_indriya api_api naṣṭeṣu_naś anaśvara--_anaśvara tvāt_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva manasaḥ_manas sakāśāt_sakāśāt api_api parā_para prabalā_prabala buddhiḥ_buddhi vijñāna--_vijñāna rūpā_rūpa suṣuptau_suṣupti manasi_manas api_api naṣṭe_naś tasyāḥ_tad sāmānya--_sāmānya ākārāyāḥ_ākāra anaśvara--_anaśvara a_a tvāt_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tasya_tad buddheḥ_buddhi sakāśāt_sakāśāt api_api paratas_paratas bala--_bala ādhikyena_ādhikya yaḥ_yad vartate_vṛt api_api jñāna--_jñāna abhyāsena_abhyāsa naṣṭāyām_naś satyām_as yaḥ_yad virājate_virāj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad tu_tu prasiddhaḥ_prasidh jīvātmā_jīvātman kāmasya_kāma jetā_jetṛ tena_tena vastutas_vastutas sarvatas_sarvatas
api_api ati_ati prabalena_prabala jīvātmanā_jīvātman indriya--_indriya ādīn_ādi vijitya_viji kāmaḥ_kāma vijetum_viji śakyaḥ_śakya eva_eva iti_iti na_na atra_atra asambhāvanā_asaṃbhāvanā kāryā_kṛ iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
div.l: baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu mudrita--_mudray yantra--_yantra ambu--_ambu nyāyena_nyāya niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman pravaṇa--_pravaṇa tayā_tā indriya--_indriya niyamane_niyamana kāma--_kāma kṣatiḥ_kṣati iti_iti tvayā_tvad pradarśitam_pradarśay atha_atha daihika--_daihika karma--_karman kāle_kāla mukta--_muc yantra--_yantra ambu--_ambu nyāyena_nyāya indriya--_indriya vṛtti--_vṛtti prasāre_prasāra kāmasya_kāma punar_punar ujjīva--_ujjīva tā--_tā āpattiḥ_āpatti syāt_as iti_iti tatra_tatra rasaḥ_rasa api_api asya_idam param_para dṛṣṭvā_dṛś iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva upadiṣṭena_upadiś vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman anubhavena_anubhava darśayati_darśay indriyāṇi_indriya iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi
div.p: pāñcabhautikāt_pāñcabhautika dehāt_deha indriyāṇi_indriya parāṇi_para āhuḥ_ah paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita tat_tad ca_ca alīka--_alīka tvāt_tva tatas_tatas ati_ati sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tvāt_tva tad--_tad vināśe_vināśa avināśāt_avināśa ca_ca indriyebhyaḥ_indriya manaḥ_manas param_para jāgare_jāgara teṣām_tad pravartaka--_pravartaka tvāt_tva svapne_svapna teṣu_tad svasmin_sva vilīneṣu_vilī rājya--_rājya kartṛ--_kartṛ tvena_tva sthita--_sthā tvāt_tva ca_ca manasaḥ_manas tu_tu buddhiḥ_buddhi parā_para niścaya--_niścaya ātmaka--_ātmaka buddhi--_buddhi vṛttyā_vṛtti eva_eva saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ātmaka--_ātmaka manaḥ--_manas vṛtteḥ_vṛtti prasarāt_prasara yaḥ_yad tu_tu buddheḥ_buddhi api_api paratas_paratas asti_as sa_tad dehī_dehin jīvātmā_jīvātman cit--_cit svarūpaḥ_svarūpa deha--_deha ādi--_ādi buddhi--_buddhi antar_antar viviktayā_vivic anubhūtaḥ_anubhū san_as niḥśeṣa--_niḥśeṣa kāma--_kāma kṣati--_kṣati hetuḥ_hetu bhavati_bhū iti_iti kaṭhāḥ_kaṭha ca_ca evam_evam paṭhanti_paṭh

indriyebhyaḥ_indriya parāḥ_para hi_hi arthāḥ_artha arthebhyaḥ_artha ca_ca param_para manaḥ_manas manasaḥ_manas tu_tu parā_para buddhiḥ_buddhi buddheḥ_buddhi ātmā_ātman mahān_mahant paraḥ_para iti_iti ādi_ādi

asya_idam arthaḥ_artha indriyebhyaḥ_indriya arthāḥ_artha viṣayāḥ_viṣaya tad--_tad ākarsikta--_ākarsic tvāt_tva parāḥ_para pradhāna--_pradhāna bhūtāḥ_bhū viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya vyavahārasya_vyavahāra manaḥ--_manas mūla--_mūla tvāt_tva arthebhyaḥ_artha manaḥ_manas param_para viṣaya--_viṣaya bhogasya_bhoga niścaya--_niścaya pūrvaka--_pūrvaka tvāt_tva saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmakāt_ātmaka manasaḥ_manas manaḥ_manas param_para viṣaya--_viṣaya bhogasya_bhoga niścaya--_niścaya pūrvaka--_pūrvaka tvāt_tva saṃśaya--_saṃśaya buddheḥ_buddhi bhoga--_bhoga upakaraṇa--_upakaraṇa tvāt_tva tasyāḥ_tad sakāśāt_sakāśāt bhoktā_bhoktṛ ātmā_ātman jīvaḥ_jīva paraḥ_para sa_tad ca_ca ātmā_ātman mahān_mahant deha--_deha indriya--_indriya antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa svāmī_svāmin iti_iti daihikam_daihika karma_karman tu_tu pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vaśāt_vaśa cakra--_cakra bhrami--_bhrami tvat_tva setsyati_sidh 42_42
BhG 3.43

lg.l: evam_evam buddheḥ_buddhi param_para buddhvā_budh saṃstabhya_saṃstambh ātmānam_ātman ātmanā_ātman
jahi_hā śatrum_śatru mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu kāma--_kāma rūpam_rūpa durāsadam_durāsada

div.p: buddheḥ_buddhi eva_eva viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi janyāḥ_jan kāma--_kāma ādi--_ādi vikriyāḥ_vikriyā ātmā_ātman tu_tu nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra tad--_tad sākṣī_sākṣin iti_iti evam_evam buddheḥ_buddhi paramātmānam_paramātman buddhvā_budh ātmanā_ātman evam_evam tṛtayā_tṛ buddhyā_buddhi ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas saṃstabhya_saṃstambh niścalam_niścala kṛtvā_kṛ kāma--_kāma rūpiṇam_rūpin śatrum_śatru jahi_hā māraya_māray durāsadam_durāsada duḥkhena_duḥkha āsādanīyam_āsāday durvijñeyam_durvijñeya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: sva--_sva dharmeṇa_dharma yam_yad ārādhya_ārādhay bhaktyā_bhakti muktim_mukti itāḥ_i budhāḥ_budha
tat_tad kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa parama--_parama ānandam_ānanda toṣayet_toṣay sarva--_sarva karmabhiḥ_karman

div.p:
iti_iti śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī
karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana phalitam_phalita āha_ah rasaḥ_rasa api_api asya_idam param_para dṛṣṭvā_dṛś nivartate_nivṛt iti_iti atra_atra yaḥ_yad para--_para śabdena_śabda uktaḥ_vac tam_tad evambhūtam_evambhūta pūrṇam_pṛ ātmānam_ātman buddheḥ_buddhi param_para buddhvā_budh sākṣātkṛtya_sākṣātkṛ saṃstabhya_saṃstambh sthirītkṛtya_sthirītkṛ ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas ātmanā_ātman etādṛśa--_etādṛśa śatrum_śatru sarva--_sarva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha śātanam_śātana he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu mahā--_mahat bāhoḥ_bāhu hi_hi śatru--_śatru māraṇam_māraṇa sukaram_sukara iti_iti yogyam_yogya sambodhanam_sambodhana kāma--_kāma rūpam_rūpa tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā rūpam_rūpa durāsadam_durāsada duḥkhena_duḥkha āsādanīyam_āsāday durvijñeya--_durvijñeya aneka--_aneka viśeṣam_viśeṣa iti_iti yatna--_yatna ādhikyāya_ādhikya viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa

iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍhārtha--_gūḍhārtha dīpikāyām_dīpikā karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma
tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ evam_evam iti_iti buddhyāḥ_buddhi param_para jīvātmānam_jīvātman buddhvā_budh sarva--_sarva upādhibhyaḥ_upādhi pṛthak_pṛthak bhūtam_bhū jñātvā_jñā ātmanā_ātman svena_sva eva_eva āmānam_āman svam_sva saṃstabhya_saṃstambh niścalam_niścala kṛtvā_kṛ durāsadam_durāsada durjayam_durjaya api_api kāmam_kāma jahi_hā

lg.l: adhyāye_adhyāya asmin_idam sādhanasya_sādhana niṣkāmasya_niṣkāma eva_eva karmaṇaḥ_karman
prādhānyam_prādhānya ūce_vac tad--_tad sādhya--_sādhay jñānasya_jñāna guṇatām_guṇatā vadan_vad
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha darśinyām_darśin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya khalu_khalu gītāsu_gītā saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam mad--_mad upadeśa--_upadeśa vidhayā_vidhā buddheḥ_buddhi ca_ca param_para deha--_deha ādi--_ādi nikhila--_nikhila jaḍa--_jaḍa varga--_varga pravartaka--_pravartaka tvāt_tva viviktam_vivic sukha--_sukha cit--_cit ghanam_ghana jīvātmānam_jīvātman buddhvā_budh anubhūya_anubhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātmanā_ātman īdṛśa--_īdṛśa niścaya--_niścaya ātmikayā_ātmaka buddhyā_buddhi ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas saṃstabhya_saṃstambh tādṛśi_tādṛś ātmani_ātman sthiram_sthira kṛtvā_kṛ kāma--_kāma rūpam_rūpa śatrum_śatru jahi_hā nāśaya_nāśay durāsadam_durāsada durdharṣam_durdharṣa api_api mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu

lg.l: niṣkāmam_niṣkāma karma_karman mukhyam_mukhya syāt_as gauṇam_gauṇa jñānam_jñāna tad--_tad udbhavam_udbhava
jīvātma--_jīvātman dṛṣṭau_dṛṣṭi iti_iti eṣa_etad tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya adhyāya--_adhyāya nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga
Bhagavadgita 4
BhG 4.1

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
imam_idam vivasvate_vivasvant yogam_yoga proktavān_pravac aham_mad avyayam_avyaya
vivasvān_vivasvant manave_manu prāha_prāh manuḥ_manu ikṣvākave_ikṣvāku abravīt_brū
āvirbhāva--_āvirbhāva tirobhāvau_tirobhāva āviṣkartum_āviṣkṛ svayam_svayam hariḥ_hari
tattvam_tattva pada--_pada viveka--_viveka artham_artha karma--_karman yogam_yoga praśaṃsati_praśaṃs

div.p: evam_evam tāvat_tāvat adhyāya--_adhyāya dvayena_dvaya karma--_karman yoga--_yoga upāyaka--_upāyaka jñāna--_jñāna yogaḥ_yoga mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhana--_sādhana tvena_tva uktaḥ_vac tat_tad evam_evam brahma--_brahman arpaṇa--_arpaṇa ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa vidhānena_vidhāna tattvam_tattva padārtha--_padārtha viveka--_viveka ādinā_ādi ca_ca prapañciṣyan_prapañciṣ prathamam_prathamam tāvat_tāvat paraspara--_paraspara aprāptatvena_aprāptatva stuvan_stu bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac imam_idam iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri avyaya--_avyaya phala--_phala tvāt_tva avyayam_avyaya imam_idam yogam_yoga purā_purā aham_mad vivasvate_vivasvant ādityāya_āditya kathitavān_kathay sa_tad ca_ca sva--_sva putrāya_putra manave_manu śrāddhadevāya_śrāddhadeva sa_tad ca_ca manuḥ_manu sva--_sva putrāya_putra ikṣvākave_ikṣvāku abravīt_brū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana paśyati_dṛś paśyati_dṛś upacarya_upacar sādhana--_sādhana bhūtam_bhū karma--_karman yogam_yoga sādhya--_sādhya bhūtam_bhū ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna yogam_yoga aneka--_aneka vidha--_vidha guṇa--_guṇa vidhānāya_vidhāna stauti_stu vaṃśa--_vaṃśa kathanena_kathana bhagavān_bhagavant

imam_idam adhyāya--_adhyāya dvayena_dvaya uktam_vac yogam_yoga jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa karma--_karman niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā upāya--_upāya labhyam_labh vivasvate_vivasvant sarva--_sarva kṣatriya--_kṣatriya vaṃśa--_vaṃśa bīja--_bīja bhūtāya_bhū ādityāya_āditya proktavān_pravac prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa sarva--_sarva sandeha--_saṃdeha uccheda--_uccheda ādi--_ādi sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant paripālakaḥ_paripālaka sarga--_sarga ādi--_ādi kāle_kāla rājñām_rājan bala--_bala ādhānena_ādhāna tad--_tad adhīnam_adhīna sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant pālayitum_pālay katham_katham anena_idam bala--_bala ādhānam_ādhāna iti_iti darśayati_darśay avyayam_avyaya avyaya--_avyaya veda--_veda mūla--_mūla tvāt_tva avyaya--_avyaya phala--_phala tvāt_tva ca_ca na_na vyeti_vī sva--_sva phalāt_phala iti_iti avyayam_avyaya avyabhicāri--_avyabhicārin phalam_phala tathā_tathā ca_ca etādṛśena_etādṛśa bala--_bala ādhānam_ādhāna śakyam_śakya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

sa_tad ca_ca mama_mad śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya vivasvān_vivasvant manave_manu vaivasvatāya_vaivasvata sva--_sva putrāya_putra prāha_prāh sa_tad ca_ca manuḥ_manu ikṣvākave_ikṣvāku sva--_sva putrāya_putra ādi--_ādi rājāya_rāja abravīt_brū yadi_yadi api_api prati_prati manvantaram_manvantara svāyambhuva--_svāyambhuva ādi--_ādi sādhāraṇaḥ_sādhāraṇa ayam_idam bhāgavat--_bhāgavant updeśaḥ_updeśa tathā_tathā api_api sāmpratika--_sāmpratika vaivasvata--_vaivasvata manvantara--_manvantara abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya ādityam_āditya ārabhya_ārabh sampradāyaḥ_sampradāya gaṇitaḥ_gaṇay

lg.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha
turye_turya sva--_sva āvirbhāva--_āvirbhāva hetoḥ_hetu nitya--_nitya tvam_tva janma--_janman karmaṇoḥ_karman
svasya_sva uktim_ukti brahma--_brahman yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi jñāna--_jñāna utkarṣa--_utkarṣa prapañcam_prapañca

div.l: adhyāya--_adhyāya dvayena_dvaya uktam_vac niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman sādhyam_sādhay jñāna--_jñāna yogam_yoga stauti_stu imam_idam iti_iti
div.p:
baladevaḥ_baladeva
turye_turya sva--_sva abhivyakti--_abhivyakti hetum_hetu sva--_sva līlā--_līlā
nitya--_nitya tvam_tva sat--_sat karmasu_karman jñāna--_jñāna yogam_yoga
jñānasya_jñāna api_api yat_yad māhātmyam_māhātmya uccais_uccais
prākhyat_prakhyā devaḥ_deva devakīnandanaḥ_devakīnandana asau_adas

pūrva--_pūrva adhyāyābhyām_adhyāya uktam_vac jñāna--_jñāna yogam_yoga karma--_karman yogam_yoga ca_ca eka--_eka phalatvāt_phalatva ekīkṛtya_ekīkṛ tad--_tad vaṃśam_vaṃśa kīrtayan_kīrtay stauti_stu imam_idam iti_iti imam_idam tvām_tvad sūryāya_sūrya aham_mad proktavān_pravac avyayam_avyaya nityam_nitya veda_vid ārta--_ārta htvāt_htva sva--_sva phalāt_phala iti_iti avyabhicāri--_avyabhicārin phala--_phala tvāt_tva ca_ca sa_tad ca_ca mad--_mad śiṣyaḥ_śiṣya vivasvān_vivasvant sva--_sva putrāya_putra manave_manu vaivasvatāya_vaivasvata prāha_prāh sa_tad ca_ca manuḥ_manu ikṣvākave_ikṣvāku sva--_sva putrāya_putra abravīt_brū
BhG 4.2

lg.l: evam_evam paramparā--_paramparā prāptam_prāp imam_idam rājarṣayaḥ_rājarṣi viduḥ_vid
sa_tad kālena_kāla iha_iha mahatā_mahat yogaḥ_yoga naṣṭaḥ_naś parantapa_paraṃtapa

div.p: evam_evam rājānaḥ_rājan ca_ca te_tad ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi ca_ca iti_iti anye_anya api_api rājarṣayaḥ_rājarṣi nimi--_nimi pramukhāḥ_pramukha sva--_sva pitṛ--_pitṛ ādibhiḥ_ādi ikṣvāku--_ikṣvāku pramukhaiḥ_pramukha protkam_protka imam_idam yogam_yoga viduḥ_vid jānanti_jñā sma_sma adyatanānām_adyatana ajñāne_ajñāna kāraṇam_kāraṇa āha_ah he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa śatru--_śatru pātana_pātana sa_tad yogaḥ_yoga kāla--_kāla vaśāt_vaśa iha_iha loke_loka naṣṭaḥ_naś vicchinnaḥ_vicchid

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam ādityam_āditya ārabhya_ārabh guru--_guru śiṣya--_śiṣya paramparayā_paramparā prāptam_prāp imam_idam yogam_yoga rājānaḥ_rājan ca_ca te_tad ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi ca_ca iti_iti rājarṣayaḥ_rājarṣi prabhu--_prabhu tve_tva sati_as sūkṣma--_sūkṣma artha--_artha nirīkṣaṇa--_nirīkṣaṇa kṣamāḥ_kṣama nimi--_nimi pramukhāḥ_pramukha sva--_sva tasmāt_tasmāt anādi--_anādi veda--_veda mūla--_mūla tvena_tva ananta--_ananta phalatvena_phalatva anādi--_anādi guru--_guru śiṣya--_śiṣya paramparā--_paramparā prāptatvena_prāptatva ca_ca kṛtrimatva--_kṛtrimatva śaṅkā--_śaṅkā anāspada--_anāspada tvāt_tva mahā--_mahat prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ayam_idam yogaḥ_yoga iti_iti śraddhā--_śraddhā atiśayāya_atiśaya stūyate_stu

saḥ_tad evam_evam mahā--_mahat prayojanaḥ_prayojana api_api yogaḥ_yoga kālena_kāla mahatā_mahat dīrgheṇa_dīrgha dharma--_dharma hrāsa--_hrāsa kareṇa_kara iha_iha idānīm_idānīm āvayoḥ_mad vyavahāra--_vyavahāra kāle_kāla dvāpara--_dvāpara ante_anta durbalān_durbala ajita--_ajita indriyān_indriya anadhikāriṇaḥ_anadhikārin prāpya_prāp kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha ādibhiḥ_ādi jātaḥ_jan tam_tad vinā_vinā puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha aprāpteḥ_aprāpti aho_aho daurbhāgyam_daurbhāgya lokasya_loka iti_iti śocati_śuc bhagavān_bhagavant he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa param_para kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa śatru--_śatru gaṇam_gaṇa śauryeṇa_śaurya balavatā_balavat vivekena_viveka tapasā_tapas ca_ca bhānuḥ_bhānu iva_iva tāpayati_tāpay iti_iti parantapaḥ_paraṃtapa śatru--_śatru tāpanaḥ_tāpana jita--_ji indriyaḥ_indriya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha urvaśī--_urvaśī upekṣaṇa--_upekṣaṇa ādi--_ādi adbhuta--_adbhuta karma--_karman darśanāt_darśana tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad jita--_ji indriya--_indriya tvāt_tva atra_atra adhikārī_adhikārin iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam vivasvantam_vivasvant ārabhya_ārabh guru--_guru śiṣya--_śiṣya paramparayā_paramparā prāptam_prāp yogam_yoga rājarṣayaḥ_rājarṣi sva--_sva pitṛ--_pitṛ ādibhiḥ_ādi ikṣvāku--_ikṣvāku prabhṛtibhiḥ_prabhṛti upadiṣṭam_upadiś viduḥ_vid iha_iha loke_loka naṣṭaḥ_naś vicchinna--_vicchid sampradāyaḥ_sampradāya
BhG 4.3

lg.l: saḥ_tad eva_eva ayam_idam mayā_mad te_tvad adya_adya yogaḥ_yoga proktaḥ_pravac purātanaḥ_purātana
bhaktaḥ_bhakta asi_as me_mad sakhā_sakhi ca_ca iti_iti rahasyam_rahasya hi_hi etat_etad uttamam_uttama

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara saḥ_tad eva_eva ayam_idam iti_iti saḥ_tad eva_eva ayam_idam yogaḥ_yoga adya_adya vicchinne_vicchid sampradāye_sampradāya sati_as punar_punar ca_ca te_tvad tubhyam_tvad uktaḥ_vac yatas_yatas tvam_tvad mama_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta asi_as sakhā_sakhi ca_ca anyasmai_anya mayā_mad na_na ucyate_vac hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt etat_etad uttamam_uttama

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yaḥ_yad evam_evam pūrvam_pūrvam upadiṣṭaḥ_upadiś api_api adhikārya--_adhikārya bhāvāt_bhāva vicchinna--_vicchid sampradāyaḥ_sampradāya abhūt_bhū yam_yad vinā_vinā ca_ca puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha na_na labhyate_labh saḥ_tad eva_eva ayam_idam purātanaḥ_purātana anādi--_anādi guru--_guru paramparā--_paramparā gataḥ_gam yogaḥ_yoga adya_adya sampradāya--_sampradāya viccheda--_viccheda kāle_kāla mayā_mad ati_ati snigdhena_snigdha te_tvad tubhyam_tvad prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa uktaḥ_vac na_na tu_tu anyasmai_anya kasmaicid_kaścit kasmāt_kasmāt bhaktaḥ_bhakta asi_as me_mad sakhā_sakhi ca_ca iti_iti iti_iti śabdaḥ_śabda hetau_hetu yasmāt_yasmāt tvam_tvad mama_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgata--_āgam tve_tva sati_as atyanta--_atyanta prītimān_prītimat sakhā_sakhi ca_ca samāna--_samāna vayāḥ_vayas snigdha--_snigdha sahāyaḥ_sahāya asi_as sarvadā_sarvadā bhavasi_bhū atas_atas tubhyam_tvad uktaḥ_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha anyasmai_anya kutas_kutas na_na ucyate_vac tatra_tatra āha_ah hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt etat_etad jñānam_jñāna uttamam_uttama rahasyam_rahasya ati_ati gopyam_gup

baladevaḥ_baladeva saḥ_tad eva_eva tad--_tad ānupūrvika--_ānupūrvika vacana--_vacana vācyaḥ_vac yogaḥ_yoga mayā_mad tvad--_tvad sakhena_sakha ati_ati snigdhena_snigdha te_tvad tubhyam_tvad mad--_mad sakhāya_sakhi iti_iti snigdhāya_snigdha proktaḥ_pravac tvam_tvad me_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta prapannaḥ_prapad sakhā_sakhi ca_ca asi_as iti_iti hetoḥ_hetu na_na tu_tu anyasmai_anya hetuḥ_hetu rahasyam_rahasya hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt uttamam_uttama rahasyam_rahasya iti_iti gopyam_gup etat_etad
BhG 4.4

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
aparam_apara bhavataḥ_bhavat janma_janman param_para janma_janman vivasvataḥ_vivasvant
katham_katham etat_etad vijānīyām_vijñā tvam_tvad ādau_ādau proktavān_pravac iti_iti

div.p: uvāca_vac aparam_apara arvācīnam_arvācīna tava_tvad janma_janman param_para prāk_prāñc kālīnam_kālīna vivasvataḥ_vivasvant janma_janman tasmāt_tasmāt tava_tvad adhunātana--_adhunātana tvāt_tva cirantanāya_cirantana vivasvate_vivasvant tvam_tvad ādau_ādau yogam_yoga proktavān_pravac iti_iti etat_etad katham_katham aham_mad jānīyām_jñā jñātum_jñā śaknuyām_śak

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yā_yad bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva manuṣya--_manuṣya tvena_tva asarvajña--_asarvajña tva--_tva anitya--_anitya tva--_tva āśaṅkā_āśaṅkā mūrkhāṇām_mūrkha tām_tad apanetum_apanī anuvadan_anuvad arjunaḥ_arjuna āśaṅkate_āśaṅk aparam_apara iti_iti aparam_apara alpa--_alpa kālīnam_kālīna idānantanam_idānantana vasudeva--_vasudeva gṛhe_gṛha bhavataḥ_bhavat janma_janman śarīra--_śarīra grahaṇam_grahaṇa vihīnam_vihā ca_ca manuṣya--_manuṣya tvāt_tva param_para bahu--_bahu kālīnam_kālīna sarga--_sarga ādi--_ādi bhavam_bhava utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa ca_ca deva--_deva tvāt_tva vivasvataḥ_vivasvant janma_janman atra_atra ātmanaḥ_ātman janma--_janman abhāvasya_abhāva prāk_prāk vyutpādita--_vyutpāday tvāt_tva deha--_deha abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya eva_eva arjunasya_arjuna praśnaḥ_praśna atas_atas katham_katham etat_etad vijānīyām_vijñā a_a viruddha--_virudh artha--_artha tayā_tā etat_etad śabda--_śabda artham_artha eva_eva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ tvam_tvad ādau_ādau yogam_yoga proktavān_pravac iti_iti tvam_tvad idānīṃtanaḥ_idānīṃtana manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya a_a sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña sarga--_sarga ādau_ādi pūrvatanāya_pūrvatana sarvajñāya_sarvajña ādityāya_āditya proktavān_pravac iti_iti viruddha--_virudh artham_artha etat_etad iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

atra_atra ayam_idam nirgalitaḥ_nirgal arthaḥ_artha etat_etad deha--_deha anavacchinnasya_anavacchinna tava_tvad deha--_deha antara--_antara avacchedena_avaccheda vā_vā ādityam_āditya pratyupadeṣṭṛ--_pratyupadeṣṭṛ tvam_tva etad--_etad dehena_deha vā_vā na_na ādyaḥ_ādya janma--_janman antara--_antara anubhūtasya_anubhū a_a sarvajñena_sarvajña smartum_smṛ aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva anyathā_anyathā mama_mad api_api janma--_janman antara--_antara anubhūta--_anubhū smaraṇa--_smaraṇa prasaṅgaḥ_prasaṅga tava_tvad mama_mad ca_ca manuṣya--_manuṣya tvena_tva a_a sarvajña--_sarvajña tva--_tva aviśeṣāt_aviśeṣa tat_tad uktam_vac abhiyuktaiḥ_abhiyuj janma--_janman antara--_antara anubhūtam_anubhū ca_ca na_na smaryate_smṛ iti_iti nā_na api_api dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya sarga--_sarga ādau_ādi idānīṃtanasya_idānīṃtana dehasya_deha asat--_asat bhāvāt_bhāva tat_tad evam_evam deha--_deha antareṇa_antara sarga--_sarga ādau_ādi sad--_sat bhāva--_bhāva anupappattiḥ_anupappatti iti_iti asarvajña--_asarvajña tva--_tva anitya--_anitya tvābhyām_tva dvau_dvi arjunasya_arjuna pūrva--_pūrva pakṣau_pakṣa

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha uktam_vac artham_artha asaṃbhavam_asaṃbhava pṛcchati_pracch aparam_apara idānīntanam_idānīntana param_para purātanam_purātana atas_atas katham_katham etat_etad pratyemi_pratī iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa sanātana--_sanātana tve_tva sārvajñe_sārvajña ca_ca śaṅkamānān_śaṅk anabhijñān_anabhijña nirākartum_nirākṛ arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac aparam_apara iti_iti aparam_apara arvācīnam_arvācīna param_para parācīnam_parācīna tasmāt_tasmāt ādhunikaḥ_ādhunika tvam_tvad prācīnāya_prācīna vivasvate_vivasvant yogam_yoga uktavān_vac iti_iti etat_etad katham_katham aham_mad vijānīyām_vijñā pratīyām_pratī ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha na_na khalu_khalu sarva--_sarva īśvara--_īśvara tvena_tva kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa arjunaḥ_arjuna na_na vetti_vid tasya_tad nara--_nara ākhya--_ākhya tad--_tad avatāra--_avatāra tvena_tva tādrūpyāt_tādrūpya param_para dhāma_dhāman param_para dhāma_dhāman iti_iti ādi_ādi tad--_tad ukteḥ_ukti ca_ca na_na tu_tu a_a tad--_tad sarvajña--_sarvajña viṣayām_viṣaya ajña--_ajña śaṅkām_śaṅkā apākartum_apākṛ aparam_apara iti_iti ādi_ādi pṛcchati_pracch sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara sa_tad yathā_yathā sva--_sva tattvam_tattva vetti_vid na_na tathā_tathā anyaḥ_anya tatas_tatas tad--_tad mukha--_mukha ambujāt_ambuja eva_eva tad--_tad rūpa--_rūpa tad--_tad janma--_janman ādi_ādi loka--_loka maṅgalāya_maṅgala tad--_tad artham_artha sva--_sva mahimānam_mahiman pravadan_pravad vikatthana--_vikatthana tayā_tā sa_tad nā_na ākṣepyaḥ_ākṣip kintu_kintu stavanīyaḥ_stu eva_eva kṛpālu--_kṛpālu tayā_tā tat_tad ca_ca manuṣa--_manuṣa ākṛti--_ākṛti para--_para brahmaṇaḥ_brahman tava_tvad rūpam_rūpa janma--_janman ādi_ādi ca_ca loka--_loka vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa kiṃvidham_kiṃvidha kim_ka arthakam_arthaka kiṃkālam_kiṃkāla iti_iti vijñasya_vijña api_api ājña--_ājña vat_vat praśnaḥ_praśna ayam_idam ajña--_ajña śaṅkā--_śaṅkā nirāsaka--_nirāsaka prativacana--_prativacana
BhG 4.5

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
bahūni_bahu me_mad vyatītāni_vyatī janmāni_janman tava_tvad ca_ca arjuna_arjuna
tāni_tad aham_mad veda_vid sarvāṇi_sarva na_na tvam_tvad vettha_vid parantapa_paraṃtapa

div.p: uvāca_vac veda_vid vedmi_vid vettha_vid vetsi_vid

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatra_tatra sarvajña--_sarvajña tvena_tva prathamasya_prathama parihāram_parihāra āha_ah bahūni_bahu iti_iti janmāni_janman līlā--_līlā deha--_deha grahaṇāni_grahaṇa loka--_loka dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya ādityasya_āditya udaya--_udaya vat_vat me_mad mama_mad bahūni_bahu vyatītāni_vyatī tava_tvad ca_ca ajñāninaḥ_ajñānin karma--_karman arjitāni_arjay deha--_deha grahaṇāni_grahaṇa tava_tvad ca_ca iti_iti upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa itareṣām_itara api_api jīvānām_jīva jīva--_jīva aikya--_aikya abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya vā_vā he_he arjuna_arjuna ślokena_śloka arjuna--_arjuna vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa nāmnā_nāman sambodhayan_sambodhay āvṛta--_āvṛ jñāna--_jñāna tvam_tva sūcayati_sūcay tāni_tad janmāni_janman aham_mad sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña sarva--_sarva śaktiḥ_śakti īśvaraḥ_īśvara veda_vid jānāmi_jñā sarvāṇi_sarva madīyāni_madīya tvadīyāni_tvadīya anyadīyāni_anyadīya ca_ca na_na tvam_tvad ajñaḥ_ajña jīvaḥ_jīva tirobhūta--_tirobhū jñāna--_jñāna śaktiḥ_śakti vettha_vid na_na jānāsi_jñā svīyāni_svīya api_api kim_kim punar_punar parakīyāṇi_parakīya he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa param_para śatrum_śatru bheda--_bheda dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi parikalpya_parikalpay hantum_han pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt asi_as iti_iti viparīta--_viparīta darśita--_darśay tvāt_tva bhrāntaḥ_bhram asi_as iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay tat_tad anena_idam sambodhana--_sambodhana dvayena_dvaya āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa vikṣepau_vikṣepa dvau_dvi api_api ajñāna--_ajñāna dharmau_dharma darśitau_darśay

āha_ah tava_tvad ca_ca iti_iti yadā_yadā yadā_yadā eva_eva mama_mad avatāraḥ_avatāra tadā_tadā mad--_mad pārṣada--_pārṣada tvāt_tva tava_tvad api_api āvirbhāvaḥ_āvirbhāva abhūt_bhū eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha veda_vid vedmi_vid sarva--_sarva īśvara--_īśvara tvena_tva sarvajña--_sarvajña tvāt_tva tvam_tvad na_na vettha_vid mayā_mad eva_eva sva--_sva līlā--_līlā siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha tvad--_tvad jñāna--_jñāna āvaraṇāt_āvaraṇa iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ataeva_ataeva he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa sāmpratika--_sāmpratika kuntī--_kuntī putra--_putra tva--_tva abhimāna--_abhimāna mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva parān_para śatrūn_śatru tāpayasi_tāpay

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_eka eva_eva aham_mad ekaḥ_eka api_api san_as bahudhā_bahudhā yaḥ_yad avabhāti_avabhā iti_iti ādi_ādi śruti--_śruti uktāni_vac nitya--_nitya siddhāni_sidh bahūni_bahu rūpāṇi_rūpa vaidūrya--_vaiḍūrya vat_vat ātmani_ātman dadhānaḥ_dhā purā_purā rūpa--_rūpa antareṇa_antara tam_tad pratyupadiṣṭavān_pratyupadiś iti_iti bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah tava_tvad ca_ca iti_iti mad--_mad sakha--_sakha tvāt_tva tāvanti_tāvat janmāni_janman tava_tvad api_api abhūvan_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na tvam_tvad vettha_vid iti_iti idānīm_idānīm mayā_mad eva_eva acintya--_acintya śaktyā_śakti sva--_sva līlā--_līlā siddhaye_siddhi tvad--_tvad jñāna--_jñāna ācchādanāt_ācchādana iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva etena_etad sārvajñyam_sārvajñya svasya_sva darśitam_darśay atra_atra bhagavat--_bhagavant janmanām_janman vāstava--_vāstava tvam_tva bodhyam_budh bahūni_bahu ityādi_ityādi śrī--_śrī mukha--_mukha ukteḥ_ukti tava_tvad ca_ca iti_iti dṛṣṭāntāt_dṛṣṭānta ca_ca na_na ca_ca janma--_janman ākhyaḥ_ākhyā vikāraḥ_vikāra tasya_tad agrima--_agrima vyākhyayā_vyākhyā pratyākhyānāt_pratyākhyāna
BhG 4.6

lg.l: ajaḥ_aja api_api san_as avyaya--_avyaya ātmā_ātman bhūtānām_bhūta īśvaraḥ_īśvara api_api san_as
prakṛtim_prakṛti svām_sva adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā saṃbhavāmi_sambhū ātma--_ātman māyayā_māyā

div.p: ucyate_vac īśvarasya_īśvara tava_tvad puṇya--_puṇya pāpa--_pāpa vihīnasya_vihā katham_katham jīva--_jīva vat_vat janma_janman iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah ajaḥ_aja api_api iti_iti satyam_satya evam_evam tathā_tathā api_api ajaḥ_aja api_api janma--_janman śūnyaḥ_śūnya api_api san_as aham_mad tathā_tathā avyaya--_avyaya ātmā_ātman api_api anaśvara--_anaśvara svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva api_api san_as tathā_tathā sva--_sva māyayā_māyā sambhavāmi_sambhū samyak_samyak apracyuta--_apracyuta jñāna--_jñāna bala--_bala vīrya--_vīrya ādi--_ādi śaktyā_śakti eva_eva bhavāmi_bhū

nanu_nanu tathā_tathā api_api ṣoḍaśa--_ṣoḍaśan kalā--_kalā tamka--_tamka liṅga--_liṅga deha--_deha śūnyasya_śūnya ca_ca tava_tvad kutas_kutas janma_janman iti_iti atas_atas uktam_vac svām_sva śuddha--_śuddha sattva--_sattva ātmikām_ātmaka prakṛtim_prakṛti adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā svīkṛtya_svīkṛ viśuddha--_viśudh ūrjita--_ūrjay sattva--_sattva mūrtyā_mūrti sva--_sva icchayā_icchā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu atīta--_atī aneka--_aneka janma--_janman vattvam_vattva ātmanaḥ_ātman smarasi_smṛ ced_ced tarhi_tarhi jāti--_jāti smaraḥ_smara jīvaḥ_jīva tvam_tvad para--_para janma--_janman jñānam_jñāna api_api yoginaḥ_yogin sārvātmya--_sārvātmya abhimānena_abhimāna śāstra--_śāstra dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi tu_tu upadeśaḥ_upadeśa vāmadeva--_vāmadeva vat_vat iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca āha_ah vāmadevaḥ_vāmadeva jīvaḥ_jīva api_api aham_mad manuḥ_manu abhavam_bhū sūryaḥ_sūrya ca_ca aham_mad kakṣīvān_kakṣīvant ṛpiḥ_ṛpi asmi_as vipraḥ_vipra iti_iti ādi_ādi dāśatayyām_dāśatayī ataeva_ataeva na_na mukhyaḥ_mukhya sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña tvam_tvad tathā_tathā ca_ca katham_katham ādityam_āditya sarvajñam_sarvajña upadiṣṭavān_upadiś asi_as anīśvaraḥ_anīśvara san_as na_na hi_hi jīvasya_jīva mukhyam_mukhya sārvajñyam_sārvajñya sambhavati_sambhū vyaṣṭi--_vyaṣṭi upādheḥ_upādhi paricchinna--_paricchid tvena_tva sarva--_sarva sambandhi--_sambandhin tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi upādheḥ_upādhi api_api virājaḥ_virāj sthūla--_sthūla bhūta--_bhūta upādhi--_upādhi tvena_tva sūkṣma--_sūkṣma bhūta--_bhūta pariṇāma--_pariṇāma viṣayam_viṣaya māyā--_māyā pariṇāma--_pariṇāma viṣayam_viṣaya ca_ca jñānam_jñāna na_na sambhavati_sambhū evam_evam sūkṣma--_sūkṣma bhūta--_bhūta upādheḥ_upādhi api_api hiraṇyagarbhasya_hiraṇyagarbha tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa māyā--_māyā pariṇāma--_pariṇāma ākāśa--_ākāśa ādi--_ādi sarga--_sarga krama--_krama ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya jñāna--_jñāna abhāvaḥ_abhāva siddhaḥ_sidh eva_eva tasmāt_tasmāt īśvaraḥ_īśvara eva_eva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa upādi--_upādi tvāt_tva atītān_atī āgata--_āgam vartamāna--_vṛt sarva--_sarva artha--_artha viṣaya--_viṣaya jñānavān_jñānavat mukhyaḥ_mukhya sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña atītān_atī āgata--_āgam vartamāna--_vartamāna viṣayam_viṣaya māyā--_māyā vṛtti--_vṛtti trayam_traya ekā_eka eva_eva vā_vā sarva--_sarva viṣayā_viṣaya māyā--_māyā vṛttiḥ_vṛtti iti_iti anyat_anya tasya_tad ca_ca nityeśvarasya_nityeśvara sarvajñasya_sarvajña dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma ādi--_ādi abhāvena_abhāva janma_janman eva_eva anupapannam_anupapanna atīta--_atī aneka--_aneka janmavat--_janmavat tvam_tva tu_tu dūra--_dūra utsāritam_utsāray eva_eva tathā_tathā ca_ca jīva--_jīva tve_tva sārvajñya--_sārvajñya anupapattiḥ_anupapatti īśvara--_īśvara tve_tva ca_ca deha--_deha grahaṇa--_grahaṇa anupapattiḥ_anupapatti iti_iti śaṅkā--_śaṅkā dvayam_dvaya pariharan_parihṛ anitya--_anitya tva--_tva pakṣasya_pakṣa api_api parihāram_parihāra āha_ah ajaḥ_aja api_api iti_iti

apūrva--_apūrva deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi grahaṇam_grahaṇa janma_janman pūrva--_pūrva ghīta--_ghā deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi viyogaḥ_viyoga vyayaḥ_vyaya yat_yad ubhayam_ubhaya tārkikaiḥ_tārkika pra_pra iti_iti abhāvaḥ_abhāva iti_iti ucyate_vac tat_tad uktam_vac jātasya_jan hi_hi dhruvaḥ_dhruva mṛtyuḥ_mṛtyu dhruvam_dhruva janma_janman mṛtasya_mṛ ca_ca iti_iti tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya ca_ca dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma vaśāt_vaśa bhavati_bhū dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma vaśa--_vaśa tvam_tva ca_ca ajñasya_ajña deha--_deha abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin karma--_karman adhikāri--_adhikārin tvāt_tva bhavati_bhū tatra_tatra yat_yad ucyate_vac sarvajñasya_sarvajña īśvarasya_īśvara sarva--_sarva kāraṇasya_kāraṇa īdṛś--_īdṛś deha--_deha grahaṇam_grahaṇa na_na upapadyate_upapad iti_iti tat_tad tathā_tathā eva_eva katham_katham yadi_yadi tasya_tad śarīram_śarīra sthūla--_sthūla bhūta--_bhūta kāryam_kārya syāt_as tadā_tadā vyaṣṭi--_vyaṣṭi rūpatve_rūpatva jāgrat--_jāgrant avasthā--_avasthā asmad--_mad ādi--_ādi tulyatvam_tulyatva samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi rūpa--_rūpa tve_tva ca_ca virāj--_virāj jīva--_jīva tvam_tva tasya_tad tad--_tad upādhi--_upādhi tvāt_tva atha_atha sūkṣma--_sūkṣma bhūta--_bhūta kāryam_kārya tadā_tadā vyaṣṭi--_vyaṣṭi rūpatve_rūpatva svapna--_svapna avasthā--_avasthā asmad--_mad ādi--_ādi tulya--_tulya tvam_tva samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi rūpa--_rūpa tve_tva ca_ca hiraṇya--_hiraṇya garbha--_garbha jīva--_jīva tvam_tva tasya_tad tad--_tad upādhi--_upādhi tvāt_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca bhautikam_bhautika śarīram_śarīra jīva--_jīva an_an āviṣṭam_āviś parameśvarasya_parameśvara na_na sambhavati_sambhū eva_eva iti_iti siddham_sidh na_na ca_ca jīva--_jīva āviṣṭe_āviś eva_eva tādṛśe_tādṛśa śarīre_śarīra tasya_tad bhūta--_bhūta āveśa--_āveśa vat_vat praveśaḥ_praveśa iti_iti vācyam_vac tad--_tad śarīra--_śarīra avacchedena_avaccheda tad--_tad jīvasya_jīva bhoga--_bhoga abhyupagame_abhyupagama antaryāmi--_antaryāmin rūpeṇa_rūpa sarva--_sarva śarīra--_śarīra praveśasya_praveśa vidyamāna--_vid tvena_tva śarīra--_śarīra viśeṣa--_viśeṣa abhyupagama--_abhyupagama vaiyarthyāt_vaiyarthya bhoga--_bhoga abhāve_abhāva ca_ca jīva--_jīva śarīra--_śarīra tva--_tva anupapatteḥ_anupapatti atas_atas na_na bhautikam_bhautika śarīram_śarīra īśvarasya_īśvara iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva ardhena_ardha aṅgīkaroti_aṅgīkṛ ajaḥ_aja api_api san_as avyaya--_avyaya ātmā_ātman bhūtānām_bhūta īśvaraḥ_īśvara api_api san_as iti_iti ajaḥ_aja api_api san_as iti_iti apūrva--_apūrva deha--_deha grahaṇam_grahaṇa avyaya--_avyaya ātmā_ātman api_api san_as iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva deha--_deha vicchedam_viccheda bhūtānām_bhūta bhagava--_bhagavant dharmāṇām_dharma sarveṣām_sarva brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi stamba--_stamba paryantānām_paryanta īśvaraḥ_īśvara api_api san_as iti_iti dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma vaśatvam_vaśatva katham_katham tarhi_tarhi deha--_deha grahaṇam_grahaṇa iti_iti uttara--_uttara ardhena_ardha āha_ah prakṛtim_prakṛti svām_sva adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā sambhavāmi_sambhū prakṛtim_prakṛti māyā--_māyā ākhyām_ākhyā vicitra--_vicitra aneka--_aneka śaktim_śakti a_a ghaṭamāna--_ghaṭ ghaṭana--_ghaṭana a_a paṭīyasīm_paṭīyas svām_sva sva--_sva upa--_upa ādi--_ādi bhūtām_bhū adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā cit--_cit ābhāsena_ābhāsa vaśīkṛtya_vaśīkṛ sambhavāmi_sambhū tad--_tad pariṇāma--_pariṇāma viśeṣaiḥ_viśeṣa eva_eva jagat--_jagant viśuddha--_viśudh sattva--_sattva maya--_maya tvena_tva mama_mad mūrtiḥ_mūrti tad--_tad viśiṣṭasya_viśiṣ ca_ca aja--_aja tvam_tva avyaya--_avyaya tvam_tva īśvara--_īśvara tvam_tva ca_ca upapannam_upapad atas_atas anena_idam nityena_nitya eva_eva dehena_deha vivasvantam_vivasvant ca_ca tvām_tvad ca_ca prati_prati imam_idam yogam_yoga upadiṣṭavān_upadiś aham_mad iti_iti upapannam_upapad śrutiḥ_śruti ākāśa--_ākāśa śarīram_śarīra brahma_brahman ākāśaḥ_ākāśa anna_anna avyākṛtam_avyākṛta ākāśe_ākāśa eva_eva tat_tad otam_āve ca_ca protam_prave ca_ca iti_iti ādau_ādi tathā_tathā darśanāt_darśana ākāśaḥ_ākāśa tad--_tad liṅgāt_liṅga iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya ca_ca

tarhi_tarhi bhautika--_bhautika vigraha--_vigraha abhāvāt_abhāva tad--_tad dharma--_dharma manuṣya--_manuṣya tva--_tva ādi--_ādi pratītiḥ_pratīti katham_katham iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah ātma--_ātman māyayā_māyā iti_iti mad--_mad māyayā_māyā eva_eva mayi_mad manuṣya--_manuṣya tva--_tva ādi--_ādi pratītiḥ_pratīti loka--_loka anugrahāya_anugraha na_na tu_tu vastu--_vastu vṛttyā_vṛtti iti_iti

māyā_māyā hi_hi eṣā_etad mayā_mad sṛṣṭā_sṛj yat_yat mām_mad paśyasi_dṛś nārada_nārada
sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta guṇaiḥ_guṇa yuktam_yuj na_na tu_tu mām_mad draṣṭum_dṛś arhasi_arh

sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta guṇaiḥ_guṇa yuktam_yuj kāraṇa--_kāraṇa upādhim_upādhi mām_mad carma--_carman cakṣuṣā_cakṣus draṣṭum_dṛś na_na arhasi_arh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha uktam_vac ca_ca bhagavatā_bhagavat bhāṣyakāreṇa_bhāṣyakāra sa_tad ca_ca bhagavān_bhagavant jñāna--_jñāna aiśvarya--_aiśvarya śakti--_śakti bala--_bala vīrya--_vīrya tejobhiḥ_tejas sadā_sadā sampannaḥ_sampad triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmikām_ātmaka vaiṣṇavīm_vaiṣṇava svām_sva māyām_māyā prakṛtim_prakṛti vaśīkṛtya_vaśīkṛ ajaḥ_aja avyayaḥ_avyaya bhūtānām_bhūta san_as sva--_sva māyayā_māyā dehavān_dehavat iva_iva jātaḥ_jan iva_iva ca_ca loka--_loka anugraham_anugraha kurvan_kṛ lakṣyate_lakṣay sva--_sva prayojana--_prayojana abhāve_abhāva api_api bhūta--_bhūta anujighṛkṣayā_anujighṛkṣā iti_iti vyākhyātṛbhiḥ_vyākhyātṛ ca_ca uktam_vac sva--_sva icchā--_icchā vinirmitena_vinirmā māyā--_māyā mayena_maya divyena_divya rūpeṇa_rūpa sambabhūva_sambhū iti_iti

lg.l: nityaḥ_nitya yaḥ_yad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa upādhiḥ_upādhi māyā--_māyā ākhyaḥ_ākhyā aneka--_aneka śaktimān_śaktimat
saḥ_tad eva_eva bhagavat--_bhagavant dehaḥ_deha iti_iti bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kṛtām_kṛt matam_mata

div.p: anye_anya tu_tu parameśvare_parameśvara deha--_deha dehi--_dehin bhāvam_bhāva na_na manyante_man kim_kim yaḥ_yad ca_ca nityaḥ_nitya vibhuḥ_vibhu sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghanaḥ_ghana bhagavān_bhagavant vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva paripūrṇaḥ_paripṛ nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa paramātmā_paramātman saḥ_tad eva_eva tad--_tad vigrahaḥ_vigraha na_na anyaḥ_anya kaścid_kaścit bhautikaḥ_bhautika māyikaḥ_māyika vā_vā iti_iti asmin_idam pakṣe_pakṣa yojanā_yojana ākāśa--_ākāśa vat_vat sarva--_sarva gataḥ_gam ca_ca nityaḥ_nitya avināśī_avināśin vai_vai are_are ayam_idam ātmā_ātman an_an ucchitti--_ucchitti dharmā_dharman iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti asaṃbhavaḥ_asaṃbhava tu_tu sataḥ_as anupaptteḥ_anupapti na_na ātmā_ātman aśruteḥ_aśruti nitya--_nitya tvāt_tva ca_ca tābhyaḥ_tad vastu--_vastu gatyā_gati janma--_janman vināśa--_vināśa rahitaḥ_rahita sarva--_sarva bhāsakaḥ_bhāsaka sarva--_sarva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa māyā--_māyā adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tvena_tva sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta īśvaraḥ_īśvara api_api san_as aham_mad prakṛtim_prakṛti svabhāvam_svabhāva sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghana--_ghana eka--_eka rasam_rasa

māyām_māyā vyāvartayati_vyāvartay svām_sva iti_iti nija--_nija svarūpam_svarūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad bhagavaḥ_bhagavat kasmin_ka pratiṣṭhitaḥ_pratiṣṭhā sve_sva mahimni_mahiman iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti sva--_sva svarūpam_svarūpa adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa avasthitaḥ_avasthā eva_eva san_as sambhavāmi_sambhū deha--_deha dehi--_dehin bhāvam_bhāva antareṇa_antareṇa eva_eva dehi--_dehin vat_vat vyavaharāmi_vyavahṛ katham_katham tarhi_tarhi adehe_adeha sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghane_ghana deha--_deha tva--_tva pratītiḥ_pratīti atas_atas āha_ah ātma--_ātman māyayā_māyā iti_iti nirguṇe_nirguṇa śuddhe_śudh sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghane_ghana mayi_mad bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva deha--_deha dehi--_dehin bhāva--_bhāva śūnye_śūnya tad--_tad rūpeṇa_rūpa pratītiḥ_pratīti māyā--_māyā mātram_mātra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad uktam_vac

lg.l: kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa enam_enad avehi_ave tvam_tvad ātmānam_ātman akhila--_akhila ātmanām_ātman
jagat--_jagant hitāya_hita saḥ_tad api_api atra_atra dehī_dehin iva_iva ābhāti_ābhā māyayā_māyā

div.p:
aho_aho bhāgyam_bhāgya aho_aho bhāgyam_bhāgya nanda--_nanda gopa--_gopa vraja--_vraja okasām_oka
yat_yad mitram_mitra parama--_parama ānandam_ānanda pūrṇam_pṛ brahma_brahman sanātanam_sanātana iti_iti ca_ca

kecid_kaścit tu_tu nityasya_nitya niravayavasya_niravayava nirvikārasya_nirvikāra api_api paramānandasya_paramānanda avayavāya_avayava vibhāvam_vibhāva vāstavam_vāstava eva_eva icchanti_iṣ te_tad niryuktikam_niryuktika bruvāṇaḥ_brū tu_tu na_na asmābhiḥ_mad vinivāryate_vinivāray iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya na_na apavādyāḥ_apavāday yadi_yadi sambhavet_sambhū tathā_tathā eva_eva astu_as kim_ka ati_ati pallavitena_pallavay iti_iti uparamyate_uparam

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha svasya_sva janma--_janman prakāram_prakāra āha_ah ajaḥ_aja api_api janma--_janman rahitaḥ_rahita api_api san_as sambhavāmi_sambhū deva--_deva manuṣya--_manuṣya tiryak--_tiryañc ādiṣu_ādi āvirbhavāmi_āvirbhū nanu_nanu kim_ka atra_atra citram_citra jīvaḥ_jīva api_api vastutas_vastutas ajaḥ_aja eva_eva sthūla--_sthūla deha--_deha nāśa--_nāśa anantaram_anantaram jāyate_jan eva_eva tatra_tatra āha_ah savyaya--_savyaya ātmā_ātman anaśvara--_anaśvara śarīraḥ_śarīra kim_ka ca_ca jīvasya_jīva sva--_sva deha--_deha bhinna--_bhid sva--_sva svarūpeṇa_svarūpa ajatvam_ajatva eva_eva āvidyakena_āvidyaka deha--_deha sambandhena_sambandha eva_eva tasya_tad janmavat--_janmavat tvam_tva mama_mad tu_tu īśvara--_īśvara tvāt_tva sva--_sva deha--_deha abhinnasya_abhinna ajatvam_ajatva janmavat--_janmavat tvam_tva iti_iti ubhayam_ubhaya api_api svarūpa--_svarūpa siddham_sidh tat_tad ca_ca durghaṭa--_durghaṭa tvāt_tva citram_citra atarkyam_atarkya eva_eva atas_atas puṇya--_puṇya pāpa--_pāpa ādimataḥ_ādimat jīvasya_jīva iva_iva sat--_as asat--_asat yoniṣu_yoni na_na me_mad janma--_janman āśaṅkā_āśaṅkā iti_iti āha_ah bhūtānām_bhūta īśvaraḥ_īśvara api_api san_as karma--_karman pāratantrya--_pāratantrya rahitaḥ_rahita api_api bhūtvā_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu jīvaḥ_jīva hi_hi liṅga--_liṅga śarīreṇa_śarīra sva--_sva bandhakena_bandhaka karma--_karman prāpyān_prāp deva--_deva ādi--_ādi dehān_deha prāpnoti_prāp tvam_tvad parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara liṅga--_liṅga rahitaḥ_rahita sarva--_sarva vyāpakaḥ_vyāpaka karma--_karman kāla--_kāla ādi--_ādi niyantā_niyantṛ bahu_bahu syām_as iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant rūpaḥ_rūpa bhavati_bhū eva_eva tat_tad api_api yat_yat viśeṣataḥ_viśeṣataḥ evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta api_api aham_mad sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti brūṣe_brū tat_tad manye_man sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant vilakṣaṇān_vilakṣaṇa deha--_deha viśeṣān_viśeṣa nityān_nitya eva_eva loke_loka prakāśayitum_prakāśay tvad--_tvad janma_janman iti_iti avagamyate_avagam tat_tad khalu_khalu katham_katham iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah prakṛtim_prakṛti svām_sva adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā iti_iti atra_atra prakṛti--_prakṛti śabdena_śabda yadi_yadi bahiraṅgā_bahiraṅga māyā--_māyā śaktiḥ_śakti ucyate_vac tadā_tadā tad--_tad adhiṣṭhātā_adhiṣṭhātṛ parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara tad--_tad dvārā_dvār jagat--_jagant rūpaḥ_rūpa bhavati_bhū eva_eva iti_iti na_na viśeṣa--_viśeṣa upalabdhiḥ_upalabdhi tasmāt_tasmāt saṃsiddhi--_saṃsiddhi prakṛtī_prakṛti tu_tu ime_idam svarūpam_svarūpa ca_ca svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva ca_ca iti_iti abhidhānāt_abhidhāna atra_atra prakṛti--_prakṛti śabdena_śabda svarūpam_svarūpa eva_eva ucyate_vac na_na tat_tad svarūpa--_svarūpa bhūtā_bhū māyā--_māyā śaktiḥ_śakti svarūpam_svarūpa ca_ca tasya_tad sat--_sat cit--_cit ānandaḥ_ānanda eva_eva tvām_tvad śuddha--_śuddha sattva--_sattva ātmikām_ātmaka prakṛtim_prakṛti iti_iti śrī--_śrī svāmi--_svāmin caraṇāḥ_caraṇa prakṛtim_prakṛti svabhāvam_svabhāva svam_sva eva_eva svabhāvam_svabhāva adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa sva--_sva icchayā_icchā sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha iti_iti śrī--_śrī rāmānuja--_rāmānuja ācārya--_ācārya caraṇāḥ_caraṇa māyām_māyā vyāvartayati_vyāvartay svām_sva iti_iti nija--_nija svarūpam_svarūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad bhagavan_bhagavat kasmin_ka pratiṣṭhitaḥ_pratiṣṭhā sva--_sva mahimni_mahiman śruteḥ_śruti sva--_sva svarūpam_svarūpa adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa avasthitaḥ_avasthā eva_eva sambhavāmi_sambhū deha--_deha dehi--_dehin bhāvam_bhāva antareṇa_antareṇa eva_eva dehi--_dehin vat_vat vyavaharāmi_vyavahṛ iti_iti śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda

nanu_nanu yadi_yadi avyaya--_avyaya ātmā_ātman anaśvara--_anaśvara matsya--_matsya kūrma--_kūrma ādi--_ādi svarūpaḥ_svarūpa eva_eva bhavasi_bhū tarhi_tarhi tava_tvad prādurbhavat--_prādurbhū svarūpam_svarūpa pūrva--_pūrva prādurbhūta--_prādurbhū svarūpāṇi_svarūpa ca_ca yugapad_yugapad eva_eva kim_kim na_na upalabhyanta_upalabh tatra_tatra āha_ah ātma--_ātman bhūtā_bhū yā_yad māyā_māyā sva--_sva svarūpa--_svarūpa āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa prakāśana--_prakāśana karma_karman ca_ca yayā_yad cic--_cit śakti--_śakti vṛttyā_vṛtti ayoga--_ayoga māyayā_māyā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tayā_tad hi_hi pūrva--_pūrva kāla--_kāla avatīrṇa--_avatṛ svarūpāṇi_svarūpa pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva āvṛtya_āvṛ vartamāna--_vṛt svarūpam_svarūpa prakāśya_prakāśay sambhavāmi_sambhū ātma--_ātman māyayā_māyā samyak_samyak apracyuta--_apracyuta jñāna--_jñāna bala--_bala vīrya--_vīrya ādi--_ādi śaktyā_śakti eva_eva bhavāmi_bhū iti_iti śrī--_śrī svāmi--_svāmin caraṇāḥ_caraṇa ātma--_ātman māyayā_māyā ātma--_ātman jñānena_jñāna māyā_māyā vayunam_vayuna jñānam_jñāna iti_iti jñāna--_jñāna paryāyaḥ_paryāya atra_atra māyā--_māyā śabdaḥ_śabda tathā_tathā ca_ca abhiyukta--_abhiyuj prayogaḥ_prayoga māyayā_māyā satatam_satatam vetti_vid prācīnānām_prācīna śubha--_śubha aśubham_aśubha iti_iti śrī--_śrī rāmānuja--_rāmānuja ācārya--_ācārya caraṇāḥ_caraṇa mayi_mad bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva deha--_deha dehi--_dehin bhāva--_bhāva śūnye_śūnya tad--_tad rūpeṇa_rūpa pratītiḥ_pratīti
māyā--_māyā mātram_mātra iti_iti śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda

baladevaḥ_baladeva loka--_loka vilakṣaṇa--_vilakṣaṇa tayā_tā svarūpam_svarūpa sva--_sva janma_janman ca_ca vadan_vad sanātana--_sanātana tvam_tva svasya_sva āha_ah ajaḥ_aja api_api iti_iti atra_atra svarūpa--_svarūpa svabhāva--_svabhāva paryāyaḥ_paryāya prakṛti--_prakṛti śabdaḥ_śabda svām_sva prakṛtim_prakṛti svam_sva svarūpam_svarūpa adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā ālambya_ālamb sambhavāmi_sambhū āvirbhavāmi_āvirbhū saṃsiddhi--_saṃsiddhi prakṛtī_prakṛti tu_tu ime_idam svarūpam_svarūpa ca_ca svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva ca_ca iti_iti amaraḥ_amara sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa eva_eva sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti etam_etad artham_artha vicaritum_vicar viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ ajaḥ_aja api_api iti_iti ādinā_ādi avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa apūrva--_apūrva deha--_deha yogaḥ_yoga janma_janman tad--_tad rahitaḥ_rahita eva_eva san_as avyaya--_avyaya ātmā_ātman api_api san_as avyayaḥ_avyaya pariṇāma--_pariṇāma śūnyaḥ_śūnya ātmā_ātman buddhi--_buddhi ādiḥ_ādi yasya_yad tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa eva_eva san_as ātmā_ātman puṃsi_puṃs iti_iti ādi_ādi ukteḥ_ukti bhūtānām_bhūta īśvaraḥ_īśvara api_api san_as sva--_sva itareṣām_itara jīvānām_jīva niyantā_niyantṛ eva_eva san_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha aja--_aja tva--_tva ādi--_ādi guṇakam_guṇaka yat_yad vibhu--_vibhu jñāna--_jñāna sukha--_sukha ghanam_ghana rūpam_rūpa tena_tad eva_eva avatarāmi_avatṛ iti_iti sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa eva_eva sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti asya_idam vivaraṇam_vivaraṇa tādṛśasya_tādṛśa sva--_sva rūpasya_rūpa raveḥ_ravi iva_iva abhiyakti--_abhiyakti mātram_mātra eva_eva janma_janman iti_iti tad--_tad tena_tad sanātana--_sanātana tvam_tva ca_ca vyaktam_vyakta karma--_karman tantra--_tantra tvam_tva nirastam_niras śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah a_a jāyamānaḥ_jan bahudhā_bahudhā vijāyate_vijan iti_iti smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca pratyakṣam_pratyakṣa ca_ca hareḥ_hari janma_janman na_na vikāraḥ_vikāra kathaṃcana_kathaṃcana iti_iti ādyā_ādya ataeva_ataeva sūtikā--_sūtikā gṛhe_gṛha divya--_divya āyudha--_āyudha bhūṣaṇasya_bhūṣaṇa divya--_divya rūpasya_rūpa ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ aiśvarya--_aiśvarya sampannasya_sampad tasya_tad vīkṣaṇam_vīkṣaṇa smaryate_smṛ prayojanam_prayojana āha_ah ātma--_ātman māyayā_māyā iti_iti bhajat--_bhaj jīva--_jīva anukampayā_anukampā hetunā_hetu tad--_tad uddhārāya_uddhāra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha māyā_māyā dambhe_dambha kṛpāyām_kṛpā ca_ca iti_iti viśvaḥ_viśva ātma--_ātman māyayā_māyā sva--_sva sārvajñena_sārvajña sva--_sva saṅkalpena_saṃkalpa iti_iti kecid_kaścit māyā_māyā vayunam_vayuna jñānam_jñāna nirghaṇṭu--_nirghaṇṭu koṣāt_koṣa lokaḥ_loka khalu_khalu rāja--_rājan ādiḥ_ādi pūrva--_pūrva deha--_deha ādīni_ādi vihāya_vihā apūrva--_apūrva deha--_deha ādīni_ādi bhajan_bhaj niranusandhiḥ_niranusandhi ajñaḥ_ajña janmībhavati_janmībhū tad--_tad vailakṣaṇyam_vailakṣaṇya hareḥ_hari janminaḥ_janmin prasphuṭam_prasphuṭa bhūtānām_bhūta īśvaraḥ_īśvara api_api san_as iti_iti anena_idam labdha--_labh siddhayaḥ_siddhi yogi--_yogin prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti api_api vyāvṛttāḥ_vyāvṛt āsīt_as
BhG 4.7

lg.l: yadā_yadā yadā_yadā hi_hi dharmasya_dharma glāniḥ_glāni bhavati_bhū bhārata_bhārata
abhyutthānam_abhyutthāna adharmasya_adharma tadā_tadā ātmānam_ātman sṛjāmi_sṛj aham_mad

div.p: āha_ah āha_ah

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghanasya_ghana tava_tvad kadā_kadā kim_ka artham_artha vā_vā dehi--_dehin vat_vat vyavahāraḥ_vyavahāra iti_iti tatra_tatra ucyate_vac yadā_yadā yadā_yadā iti_iti dharmasya_dharma veda--_veda vihitasya_vidhā prāṇinām_prāṇin abhyudaya--_abhyudaya niḥśreyasa--_niḥśreyasa sādhanasya_sādhana pravṛtti--_pravṛtti nivṛtti--_nivṛtti lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama tad--_tad ācāra--_ācāra vyaṅgyasya_vyaṅgya yadā_yadā yadā_yadā glāniḥ_glāni hāniḥ_hāni bhavati_bhū he_he bhārata_bhārata bharata--_bharata vaṃśa--_vaṃśa vā_vā tvam_tvad na_na dharma--_dharma hānim_hāni soḍhum_sah śaknoṣi_śak iti_iti sambodhana--_sambodhana arthaḥ_artha evam_evam yadā_yadā yadā_yadā abhyutthānam_abhyutthāna udbhavaḥ_udbhava adharmasya_adharma veda--_veda niṣiddhasya_niṣidh nānā_nānā vidha--_vidha duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhanasya_sādhana dharma--_dharma virodhinaḥ_virodhin tadā_tadā tadā_tadā ātmānam_ātman deham_deha sṛjāmi_sṛj nitya--_nitya siddham_sidh eva_eva sṛṣṭam_sṛj iva_iva darśayāmi_darśay māyayā_māyā

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kadā_kadā sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah yadā_yadā iti_iti dharmasya_dharma glāniḥ_glāni hāniḥ_hāni adharmasya_adharma abhyutthānam_abhyutthāna vṛddhiḥ_vṛddhi te_tad dve_dvi soḍhum_sah aśaknuvan_śak tayoḥ_tad vaiparītyam_vaiparītya kartum_kṛ iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ātmānam_ātman deham_deha sṛjāmi_sṛj niti_niti siddham_sidh eva_eva tam_tad sṛṣṭam_sṛj iva_iva darśayāmi_darśay māyayā_māyā iti_iti śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda

baladevaḥ_baladeva sambhava--_sambhava kālam_kāla āha_ah dharmasya_dharma veda--_veda uktasya_vac glāniḥ_glāni vināśaḥ_vināśa adharmasya_adharma tad--_tad viruddhasya_virudh abhyutthānam_abhyutthāna abhuyudayaḥ_abhuyudaya tadā_tadā aham_mad ātmānam_ātman sṛjāmi_sṛj prakaṭayāmi_prakaṭay na_na tu_tu nirmame_nirmā tasya_tad pūrva--_pūrva siddha--_sidh tvāt_tva iti_iti nā_na asti_as mad--_mad sambhava--_sambhava kāla--_kāla niyamaḥ_niyama
BhG 4.8

lg.l: paritrāṇāya_paritrāṇa sādhūnām_sādhu vināśāya_vināśa ca_ca duṣkṛtām_duṣkṛt
dharma--_dharma saṃsthāpana--_saṃsthāpana arthāya_artha saṃbhavāmi_sambhū yuge_yuga yuge_yuga

div.p: āha_ah sādhūnām_sādhu sva--_sva dharma--_dharma vartinām_vartin rakṣaṇāya_rakṣaṇa duṣṭam_duṣ karma_karman kurvanti_kṛ iti_iti duṣkṛtaḥ_duṣkṛt teṣām_tad vadhāya_vadha ca_ca evam_evam dharma--_dharma saṃsthāpana--_saṃsthāpana arthāya_artha sādhu--_sādhu rakṣaṇena_rakṣaṇa duṣṭa--_duṣṭa vadhena_vadha ca_ca dharmam_dharma sthirīkartum_sthirīkṛ yuge_yuga yuge_yuga tad--_tad tad--_tad avasare_avasara sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na ca_ca evam_evam duṣṭa--_duṣ nigraham_nigraha kurvataḥ_kṛ api_api nairghṛṇyam_nairghṛṇya śaṅkanīyam_śaṅk yathā_yathā āhuḥ_ah lālane_lālana tāḍane_tāḍana mātuḥ_mātṛ na_na akāruṇyam_akāruṇya yathā_yathā arbhake_arbhaka tat_tad tat_tad eva_eva maheśasya_maheśa niyantuḥ_niyantṛ guṇa--_guṇa doṣayoḥ_doṣa

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad kim_ka dharmasya_dharma hāniḥ_hāni adharmasya_adharma ca_ca vṛddhiḥ_vṛddhi tava_tvad paritoṣa--_paritoṣa kāraṇam_kāraṇa yena_yad tasmin_tad eva_eva kāle_kāla āvirbhavasi_āvirbhū iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca anartha--_anartha āvahaḥ_āvaha eva_eva tava_tvad avatāraḥ_avatāra syāt_as iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah paritrāṇāya_paritrāṇa dharma--_dharma hānyāḥ_hāni hīyamānānām_hā sādhūnām_sādhu puṇya--_puṇya kāriṇām_kārin veda--_veda mārga--_mārga sthānām_stha paritrāṇāya_paritrāṇa paritas_paritas sarvatas_sarvatas rakṣaṇāya_rakṣaṇa tathā_tathā adharma--_adharma vṛddhyā_vṛddhi vardhamānānām_vṛdh duṣkṛtām_duṣkṛt pāpa--_pāpa kāriṇām_kārin veda--_veda mārga--_mārga virodhinām_virodhin vināśāya_vināśa ca_ca tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya katham_katham syāt_as iti_iti tat_tad āha_ah dharma--_dharma saṃsthāpana--_saṃsthāpana arthāya_artha dharmasya_dharma samyak_samyak adharma--_adharma nivāraṇena_nivāraṇa sthāpanam_sthāpana veda--_veda mārga--_mārga parirakṣaṇam_parirakṣaṇa dharma--_dharma saṃsthāpanam_saṃsthāpana tad--_tad artham_artha sambhavāmi_sambhū pūrvavat_pūrvavat yuge_yuga yuge_yuga pratiyugam_pratiyugam

etāvat_etāvat artham_artha eva_eva kim_ka tava_tvad avatāreṇa_avatāra iti_iti ced_ced satyam_satya anyat_anya api_api anya--_anya duṣkaram_duṣkara karma_karman kartum_kṛ sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti āha_ah pari_pari iti_iti sādhūnām_sādhu paritrāṇāya_paritrāṇa mad--_mad ekānta--_ekānta bhaktānām_bhakta mad--_mad darśana--_darśana utkaṇṭhā--_utkaṇṭhā sphuṭa--_sphuṭa cittānām_citta yat_yad vaiyāgrya--_vaiyāgrya rūpam_rūpa duḥkham_duḥkha tasmāt_tasmāt trāṇāya_trāṇa tathā_tathā duṣkṛtām_duṣkṛt mad--_mad bhakta--_bhakta loka--_loka duḥkha--_duḥkha dāyinām_dāyin mad--_mad anyaiḥ_anya avadhyānām_avadhya rāvaṇa--_rāvaṇa kaṃsa--_kaṃsa keśī--_keśin ādīnām_ādi vināśāya_vināśa tathā_tathā dharma--_dharma saṃsthāpana--_saṃsthāpana arthāya_artha madīya--_madīya dhyāna--_dhyāna yajana--_yajana paricaryā--_paricaryā saṅkīrtana--_saṃkīrtana lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa parama--_parama dharmam_dharma mad--_mad anyaiḥ_anya pravartayitum_pravartay aśakyam_aśakya samyak_samyak prakāreṇa_prakāra sthāpayitum_sthāpay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yuge_yuga yuge_yuga prati_prati yugam_yugam pratikalpam_pratikalpam vā_vā na_na ca_ca evam_evam duṣṭa--_duṣ nigraha--_nigraha kṛtaḥ_kṛt bhagavataḥ_bhagavant vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya āśaṅkanīyam_āśaṅk duṣṭānām_duṣ api_api asurāṇām_asura sva--_sva kartṛ--_kartṛ vadhena_vadha vividha--_vividha duṣkṛta--_duṣkṛta phalāt_phala naraka--_naraka saha_saha praṇipātāt_praṇipāta saṃsārāt_saṃsāra ca_ca paritrāṇataḥ_paritrāṇa tasya_tad sa_tad khalu_khalu nigrahaḥ_nigraha api_api anugrahaḥ_anugraha eva_eva nirṇītaḥ_nirṇī

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu tvad--_tvad bhaktāḥ_bhakta rājarṣayaḥ_rājarṣi api_api dharma--_dharma glānim_glāni adharma--_adharma abhyutthānam_abhyutthāna ca_ca apanetum_apanī prabhavanti_prabhū tāvate_tāvat arthāya_artha kim_kim sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti āha_ah pari_pari iti_iti sādhūnām_sādhu mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa guṇa--_guṇa niratānām_niram mad--_mad sākṣāt-kāram_sākṣāt-kāra ākāṅkṣyatām_ākāṅkṣ tena_tad vinā_vinā ati_ati vyagrāṇām_vyagra tad--_tad vaiyagrya--_vaiyagrya rūpāt_rūpa duḥkhāt_duḥkha paritrāṇāya_paritrāṇa ati_ati manojña--_manojña sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa sākṣāt-kāreṇa_sākṣāt-kāra tathā_tathā duṣkṛtām_duṣkṛt duṣṭa--_duṣ karma--_karman kāriṇām_kārin mad--_mad anyaiḥ_anya avadhyānām_avadhya daśagrīva--_daśagrīva kaṃsa--_kaṃsa ādīnām_ādi tādṛś--_tādṛś bhakta--_bhakta drohiṇām_drohin vināśāya_vināśa dharmasya_dharma mad--_mad eka--_eka arcana--_arcana dhyāna--_dhyāna ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa śuddha--_śuddha bhakti--_bhakti yogasya_yoga vaidikasya_vaidika aśakyasya_aśakya saṃsthāpana--_saṃsthāpana arthāya_artha sampracārāya_sampracāra iti_iti etat_etad trayam_traya mad--_mad sambhavasya_sambhava kāraṇam_kāraṇa iti_iti yuge_yuga yuge_yuga tad--_tad tad--_tad samayena_samaya ca_ca duṣṭa--_duṣṭa vadhena_vadha harau_hari vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya tena_tad duṣṭānām_duṣṭa mokṣa--_mokṣa ānanda--_ānanda lābhe_lābha sati_as tasya_tad anugraha--_anugraha rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva pariṇāmāt_pariṇāma
BhG 4.9

lg.l: janma_janman karma_karman ca_ca me_mad divyam_divya evam_evam yaḥ_yad vetti_vid tattvataḥ_tattva
tyaktvā_tyaj deham_deha punar_punar janma_janman na_na eti_i mām_mad eti_i saḥ_tad arjuna_arjuna

div.p: āha_ah sva--_sva icchayā_icchā kṛtam_kṛ mama_mad janma_janman karma_karman ca_ca dharma--_dharma pālana--_pālana rūpam_rūpa divyam_divya alaukikam_alaukika tattvataḥ_tattva para--_para anugraha--_anugraha artham_artha eva_eva iti_iti yaḥ_yad vetti_vid sa_tad deha--_deha abhimānam_abhimāna tyaktvā_tyaj punar_punar janma_janman saṃsāram_saṃsāra na_na eti_i na_na prāpnoti_prāp mām_mad prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana janma_janman nitya--_nitya siddhasya_sidh eva_eva mama_mad sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghanasya_ghana līlayā_līlā tathā_tathā anukaraṇam_anukaraṇa karma_karman ca_ca dharma--_dharma saṃsthāpanena_saṃsthāpana jagat--_jagant paripālanam_paripālana me_mad mama_mad nitya--_nitya siddheśvarasya_siddheśvara divyam_divya aprākṛtam_aprākṛta anyaiḥ_anya kartum_kṛ aśakyam_aśakya īśvarasya_īśvara eva_eva a_a sādharaṇam_sādharaṇa evam_evam ajaḥ_aja api_api san_as iti_iti ādinā_ādi pratipāditam_pratipāday yaḥ_yad vetti_vid tattvataḥ_tattva bhrama--_bhrama nivartanena_nivartana mūḍhaiḥ_muh hi_hi mauṣya--_mauṣya tva--_tva bhrāntyā_bhrānti bhagavataḥ_bhagavant api_api garbha--_garbha vāsa--_vāsa ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa eva_eva janma_janman sva--_sva bhoga--_bhoga artham_artha eva_eva karma_karman iti_iti āropitam_āropay paramārthataḥ_paramārtha śuddha--_śuddha sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda rūpa--_rūpa tva--_tva jñānena_jñāna tad--_tad apanudya_apanud ajasya_aja api_api māyayā_māyā janma--_janman anukaraṇam_anukaraṇa akartuḥ_akartṛ api_api para--_para anugrahāya_anugraha karma--_karman anukaraṇam_anukaraṇa evam_evam yaḥ_yad vetti_vid saḥ_tad ātmanaḥ_ātman api_api tattva--_tattva sphuraṇāt_sphuraṇa kintu_kiṃtu mām_mad bhagavantam_bhagavant vāsudevam_vāsudeva eva_eva sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana eti_i saṃsārān_saṃsāra
mucyate_muc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ukta--_vac lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa mad--_mad janmanaḥ_janman tathā_tathā janma--_janman anantaram_anantaram mad--_mad karmaṇaḥ_karman ca_ca tattvāt_tattva jñāna--_jñāna mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah janma_janman iti_iti divyam_divya aprākṛtam_aprākṛta iti_iti śrī--_śrī rāmānuja--_rāmānuja ācārya--_ācārya caraṇāḥ_caraṇa śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda ca_ca divyam_divya alaukikam_alaukika iti_iti śrī--_śrī svāmi--_svāmin caraṇāḥ_caraṇa lokānām_loka prakṛti--_prakṛti sṛṣṭa--_sṛj tvāt_tva alaukika--_alaukika śabdasya_śabda aprākṛta--_aprākṛta tvam_tva eva_eva arthaḥ_artha teṣām_tad api_api abhipretaḥ_abhipre ataeva_ataeva aprākṛta--_aprākṛta tvena_tva guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī tvāt_tva bhagavat--_bhagavant janma--_janman karmaṇaḥ_karman nitya--_nitya tvam_tva tat_tad ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant sandarbhe_saṃdarbha na_na vidyate_vid yasya_yad ca_ca janma_janman karma_karman vā_vā iti_iti atra_atra śloke_śloka śrī--_śrī jīva--_jīva gosvāmi--_gosvāmin caraṇaiḥ_caraṇa upapāditam_upapāday yat_yat vā_vā yukti--_yukti anupapannam_anupapanna api_api śruti--_śruti smṛti--_smṛti vākya--_vākya balāt_bala atarkam_atarka evā_eva idam_idam mantavyam_man tatra_tatra pippalāda--_pippalāda śākhāyām_śākhā puruṣa--_puruṣa bodhinī--_bodhinī śrutiḥ_śruti ekaḥ_eka devaḥ_deva nitya--_nitya līlā--_līlā anuraktaḥ_anurañj bhakta--_bhakta vyāpī_vyāpin bhakta--_bhakta hṛdaya--_hṛdaya antarātmā_antarātman iti_iti tathā_tathā janma--_janman karmaṇaḥ_karman nitya--_nitya tvam_tva śrī--_śrī bhāgavatāmṛte_bhāgavatāmṛta bahuśas_bahuśas eva_eva prapañcitam_prapañcita evam_evam yaḥ_yad vetti_vid tattvataḥ_tattva iti_iti ajaḥ_aja api_api san_as avyaya--_avyaya tā--_tā ātmā_ātman iti_iti asmin_idam tathā_tathā janma_janman karma_karman ca_ca me_mad divyam_divya iti_iti asmin_idam ca_ca mad--_mad vākye_vākya eva_eva āstika--_āstika tayā_tā mad--_mad janma--_janman karmaṇoḥ_karman nitya--_nitya tvam_tva eva_eva yaḥ_yad jānāti_jñā na_na apekṣamāṇaḥ_apekṣ bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad vā_vā tattvataḥ_tattva om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as iti_iti nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman trividhaḥ_trividha smṛtaḥ_smṛ iti_iti agrima--_agrima ukteḥ_ukti tad--_tad śabdena_śabda brahma_brahman ucyate_vac tasya_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva tattvam_tattva tena_tad brahma--_brahman svarūpa--_svarūpa tvena_tva yaḥ_yad vetti_vid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad vartamānam_vṛt deham_deha tyaktvā_tyaj punar_punar janma_janman na_na eti_i kintu_kiṃtu mām_mad eva_eva eti_i atra_atra deham_deha tyaktvā_tyaj iti_iti asya_idam ādhikyāt_ādhikya evam_evam vyācakṣate_vyācakṣ sma_sma sa_tad deham_deha tyaktvā_tyaj punar_punar janma_janman na_na eti_i kintu_kiṃtu deham_deha a_a tyaktvā_tyaj eva_eva mām_mad eti_i madīya--_madīya divya--_divya janma--_janman ceṣṭita--_ceṣṭita yāthātmya--_yāthātmya vijñānena_vijñāna vidhvasta--_vidhvaṃs samasta--_samasta mad--_mad samāśrayaṇa--_samāśrayaṇa virodhi--_virodhin pāpmā_pāpman asmin_idam eva_eva janmani_janman yathā_yathā udita--_vad prakāreṇa_prakāra mām_mad āśritya_āśri mad--_mad eka--_eka priyaḥ_priya mad--_mad eka--_eka cittaḥ_citta mām_mad eva_eva

baladevaḥ_baladeva bahula--_bahula āyāsaiḥ_āyāsa sādhana--_sādhana sahasraiḥ_sahasra api_api durlabhaḥ_durlabha mokṣaḥ_mokṣa mad--_mad janma--_janman carita--_carita śravaṇena_śravaṇa mad--_mad ekānti--_ekāntin patha--_patha anuvartinām_anuvartin sulabhaḥ_sulabha astu_as iti_iti etat_etad artham_artha ca_ca sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti āśayā_āśā bhagavān_bhagavant āha_ah mama_mad sarveśvarasya_sarveśvara satya--_satya icchasya_icchā vaidūrya--_vaiḍūrya vat_vat nitya--_nitya siddha--_siddha nṛsiṃha--_nṛsiṃha raghunātha--_raghunātha ādi--_ādi bahula--_bahula rūpasya_rūpa tatra_tatra tatra_tatra ukta--_vac lakṣṇam_lakṣṇa janma_janman tathā_tathā karma_karman ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad bhakta--_bhakta sambandham_sambandha caritam_carita tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya divyam_divya evam_evam eva_eva etat_etad iti_iti yaḥ_yad tattvataḥ_tattva vetti_vid yat_yad gatam_gam bhavat_bhū ca_ca bhaviṣyat_bhū ca_ca ekaḥ_eka devaḥ_deva nitya--_nitya līlā--_līlā anuraktaḥ_anurañj bhakta--_bhakta vyāpī_vyāpin bhakta--_bhakta hṛdi_hṛd antarātmā_antarātman iti_iti śrutyā_śruti divyam_divya iti_iti mad--_mad uktyā_ukti ca_ca dṛḍha--_dṛḍha he_he arjuna_arjuna sa_tad vartamānam_vṛt deham_deha tyaktvā_tyaj punar_punar prāpañcikam_prāpañcika janma_janman na_na eti_i kintu_kiṃtu mām_mad eva_eva tad--_tad tad--_tad karma--_karman manojñam_manojña eti_i muktaḥ_muc bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā mocaka--_mocaka tva--_tva liṅgena_liṅga tat_tad tvam_tvad asi_as iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca me_mad janma--_janman karmaṇī_karman tattvataḥ_tattva brahmatvena_brahmatva yaḥ_yad vetti_vid iti_iti vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā itarathā_itarathā tam_tad eva_eva viditvā_vid atimṛtyum_atimṛtyu eti_i na_na anyaḥ_anya panthāḥ_pathin vidyate_vid ayanāya_ayana iti_iti śrutiḥ_śruti vyākupyet_vyākup samānam_samāna anyat_anya janma--_janman ādi--_ādi nityatāyām_nityatā yuktayaḥ_yukti tu_tu anyatra_anyatra vistṛtāḥ_vistṛ draṣṭavyāḥ_dṛś
BhG 4.10

lg.l: vīta--_vī rāga--_rāga bhaya--_bhaya krodhāḥ_krodha mad--_mad mayāḥ_maya mām_mad upāśritāḥ_upāśri
bahavaḥ_bahu jñāna--_jñāna tapasā_tapas pūtāḥ_pū mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva āgatāḥ_āgam

div.p:
syāt_as āha_ah aham_mad śuddha--_śuddha sattva--_sattva avatāraiḥ_avatāra dharma--_dharma pālanam_pālana karomi_kṛ iti_iti madīyam_madīya parama--_parama kāruṇika--_kāruṇika tvam_tva jñātvā_jñā mām_mad eva_eva upāśritāḥ_upāśri santaḥ_as mad--_mad prasāda--_prasāda labdham_labh yat_yad ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna ca_ca tapaḥ_tapas ca_ca tad--_tad paripāka--_paripāka hetuḥ_hetu sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma tayoḥ_tad dvandva--_dvaṃdva eka--_eka vat_vat bhāvaḥ_bhāva tena_tad jñāna--_jñāna tapasā_tapas pūtāḥ_pū śuddhāḥ_śudh nirasta--_niras ajñāna--_ajñāna tad--_tad kārya--_kārya malāḥ_mala mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva mad--_mad sāyujyam_sāyujya prāptāḥ_prāp bahavaḥ_bahu na_na tu_tu adhunā_adhunā eva_eva pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt ayam_idam mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti mārgaḥ_mārga iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad evam_evam tāni_tad aham_mad veda_vid sarvāṇi_sarva iti_iti ādinā_ādi vidyā--_vidyā avidyā--_avidyā upādhibhyām_upādhi tad--_tad tvam--_tvad padārthau_padārtha
īśvara--_īśvara jīvau_jīva pradarśya_pradarśay īśvarasya_īśvara ca_ca avidyā--_avidyā bhāvena_bhāva nitya--_nitya śuddha--_śudh tvāt_tva jīvasya_jīva ca_ca īśvara--_īśvara prasāda--_prasāda labdha--_labh jñānena_jñāna ajñāna--_ajñāna nivṛtteḥ_nivṛtti śuddhasya_śuddha sataḥ_as cit--_cit aṃśena_aṃśa tad--_tad aikyam_aikya uktam_vac iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana mām_mad eti_i saḥ_tad arjuna_arjuna iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra svasya_sva sarva--_sarva mukta--_muc prāpya--_prāp tayā_tā puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha tvam_tva asya_idam mokṣa--_mokṣa mārgasya_mārga anādi--_anādi paraspara--_paraspara āgata--_āgam tvam_tva ca_ca darśayati_darśay vīta--_vī rāga--_rāga iti_iti rāgaḥ_rāga tad--_tad tad--_tad phala--_phala tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā sarvān_sarva viṣayān_viṣaya parityajya_parityaj jñāna--_jñāna mārge_mārga katham_katham jīvitavyam_jīv iti_iti trāsaḥ_trāsa bhayam_bhaya sarva--_sarva viṣaya--_viṣaya ucchedakaḥ_ucchedaka ayam_idam jñāna--_jñāna mārgaḥ_mārga katham_katham hitaḥ_hita syāt_as iti_iti dveṣaḥ_dveṣa krodhaḥ_krodha te_tad ete_etad rāga--_rāga bhaya--_bhaya krodhāḥ_krodha vītāḥ_vī vivekena_viveka vigatāḥ_vigam yebhyaḥ_yad te_tad vīta--_vī rāga--_rāga bhaya--_bhaya krodhāḥ_krodha śuddha--_śuddha sattvāḥ_sattva mad--_mad mayāḥ_maya mām_mad paramātmānam_paramātman tad--_tad padārtha--_padārtha tvam_tva gatāḥ_gam bahavaḥ_bahu aneke_aneka jñāna--_jñāna tapasā_tapas jñānam_jñāna eva_eva tapaḥ_tapas sarva--_sarva karma--_karman kṣaya--_kṣaya hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva na_na hi_hi jñānena_jñāna sadṛśam_sadṛśa pavitram_pavitra iha_iha vidyate_vid iti_iti hi_hi vakṣyati_vac tena_tad pūtāḥ_pū kṣīṇa--_kṣi sarva--_sarva pāpāḥ_pāpa santaḥ_as nirasta--_niras ajñāna--_ajñāna tad--_tad kārya--_kārya malāḥ_mala mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa tvam_tva viśuddha--_viśudh sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana mokṣam_mokṣa āgatāḥ_āgam ajñāna--_ajñāna mātra--_mātra apanayena_apanaya mokṣam_mokṣa prāptāḥ_prāp

jñāna--_jñāna tapasā_tapas pūtāḥ_pū jīvan--_jīv muktāḥ_muc santaḥ_as mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva mad--_mad viṣayam_viṣaya bhāvam_bhāva rati--_rati ākhyam_ākhyā premāṇam_preman āgatāḥ_āgam iti_iti vā_vā teṣām_tad jñānī_jñānin nitya--_nitya yuktā_yuj eka--_eka bhaktiḥ_bhakti viśiṣyate_viśiṣ iti_iti hi_hi vakṣyati_vac

prāpnoti_prāp āpuḥ_āp āha_ah jñānam_jñāna ukta--_vac lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa mad--_mad janma--_janman karmaṇoḥ_karman tattvataḥ_tattva anubhava--_anubhava rūpam_rūpa eva_eva tapaḥ_tapas tena_tad pūtāḥ_pū iti_iti śrī--_śrī rāmānuja--_rāmānuja ācārya--_ācārya caraṇāḥ_caraṇa

yat_yad vā_vā jñāne_jñāna mad--_mad janma--_janman karmaṇoḥ_karman nitya--_nitya tva--_tva niścaya--_niścaya anubhave_anubhava yat_yad nānā_nānā kumata--_kumata kutarka--_kutarka yukti--_yukti sarpī--_sarpī viṣa--_viṣa dāha--_dāha sahana--_sahana rūpam_rūpa tapaḥ_tapas tena_tad pūtāḥ_pū tathā_tathā ca_ca śrī--_śrī rāmānuja--_rāmānuja dhṛta--_dhṛ śrutiḥ_śruti tasya_tad dhīrāḥ_dhīra parijānanti_parijñā yonim_yoni iti_iti dhīrāḥ_dhīra dhīmantaḥ_dhīmat eva_eva tasya_tad yonim_yoni janma--_janman prakāram_prakāra jānanti_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha vītāḥ_vī tyaktāḥ_tyaj kumata--_kumata prajalpiteṣu_prajalp janeṣu_jana rāga--_rāga ādyāḥ_ādya yaiḥ_yad te_tad na_na teṣu_tad rāgaḥ_rāga prītiḥ_prīti na_na api_api tebhyaḥ_tad bhayam_bhaya na_na api_api teṣu_tad krodhaḥ_krodha mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kutas_kutas mad--_mad mayāḥ_maya mad--_mad janma--_janman karma--_karman anudhyāna--_anudhyāna manana--_manana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana ādi--_ādi pracurāḥ_pracura mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva mayi_mad premāṇam_preman
