baladevaḥ_baladeva :_idānīm iva_iva purā_purā api_api mad--_mad janma--_janman ādi--_ādi nitya--_nitya tā--_tā jñānena_jñāna bahūnām_bahu vimuktiḥ_vimukti abhūt_bhū iti_iti tad--_tad nityatām_nityatā draḍhayitum_draḍhay āha_ah vīta--_vī iti_iti bahavaḥ_bahu janāḥ_jana jñāna--_jñāna tapasā_tapas pūtāḥ_pū santaḥ_as purā_purā mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva āgatāḥ_āgam iti_iti anuṣaṅgaḥ_anuṣaṅga mad--_mad janma--_janman ādi--_ādi nitya--_nitya tva--_tva viṣayakam_viṣayaka yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tat_tad eva_eva duradhigama--_duradhigama śruti--_śruti yukti--_yukti sampādya--_sampāday tvāt_tva tapaḥ_tapas tasmin_tad jñāne_jñāna vā_vā yat_yad vividha--_vividha kumata--_kumata kutarka--_kutarka ādi--_ādi nivāraṇa--_nivāraṇa rūpam_rūpa tapaḥ_tapas tena_tad pūtā_pū nirdhūta_nirdhū mayi_mad bhāvam_bhāva premāṇam_preman vidyamānatām_vidyamānatā vā_vā mad--_mad sākṣāt_sākṣāt kṛtim_kṛti kīdṛśāḥ_kīdṛśa te_tad iti_iti āha_ah vīta--_vī iti_iti vītāḥ_vī parityaktāḥ_parityaj tad--_tad nitya--_nitya tva--_tva virodhiṣu_virodhin rāga--_rāga ādayaḥ_ādi yaiḥ_yad te_tad na_na teṣu_tad rāgam_rāga na_na bhayam_bhaya na_na ca_ca krodham_krodha prakāśayanti_prakāśay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu mad--_mad mayāḥ_maya mad--_mad eka--_eka niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā upāśritāḥ_upāśri saṃsevamānāḥ_saṃsev
BhG 4.11

lg.l: ye_yad yathā_yathā mām_mad prapadyante_prapad tān_tad tathā_tathā eva_eva bhajāmi_bhaj aham_mad
mama_mad vartma_vartman anuvartante_anuvṛt manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya pārtha_pārtha sarvaśas_sarvaśas

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi kim_ka tvayi_tvad api_api vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya asti_as yat_yat evam_evam tvad--_tvad eka--_eka śaraṇānām_śaraṇa eva_eva ātma--_ātman abhāvam_abhāva dadāsi_dā na_na anyeṣām_anya sa_sa kāmānām_kāma iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah yaḥ_yad iti_iti yathā_yathā yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra sa_sa kāmatayā_kāmatā niṣkāmatayā_niṣkāmatā vā_vā ye_yad mām_mad bhajante_bhaj tān_tad aham_mad tathā_tathā eva_eva tad--_tad apekṣita--_apekṣ phala--_phala dānena_dāna bhajāmi_bhaj anugṛhṇāmi_anugrah na_na tu_tu sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma mām_mad vihāya_vihā indra--_indra ādīn_ādi eva_eva ye_yad bhajante_bhaj tān_tad aham_mad yatas_yatas sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarva--_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra indra--_indra ādi--_ādi sevakāḥ_sevaka api_api mama_mad eva_eva vartma_vartman bhajana--_bhajana mārgam_mārga anuvartante_anuvṛt indra--_indra ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa api_api mama_mad eva_eva sevya--_sev tvāt_tva

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu ye_yad jñāna--_jñāna tapasā_tapas pūtāḥ_pū niṣkāmāḥ_niṣkāma te_tad tvad--_tvad bhāvam_bhāva gacchanti_gam ye_yad tu_tu a_a pūtāḥ_pū sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma te_tad na_na gacchanti_gam iti_iti phala--_phala dātuḥ_dātṛ tava_tvad vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya nairghṛṇye_nairghṛṇya syātām_as iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah ye_yad ye_yad ārtāḥ_ārta artha--_artha arthinaḥ_arthin jijñāsavaḥ_jijñāsu jñāninaḥ_jñānin ca_ca yathā_yathā yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra sa_sa kāmatayā_kāmatā niṣkāmatayā_niṣkāmatā ca_ca mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara sarva--_sarva phala--_phala dātāram_dātṛ prapadyante_prapad bhajanti_bhaj tān_tad tathā_tathā eva_eva tad--_tad apekṣita--_apekṣ phala--_phala dānena_dāna eva_eva viparyayeṇa_viparyaya tatra_tatra amumukṣūn_amumukṣu ārtān_ārta artha--_artha arthinaḥ_arthin ca_ca ārti--_ārti haraṇena_haraṇa artha--_artha dānena_dāna ca_ca anugṛhṇāmi_anugrah jiijñāsūn_jiijñāsu vividiṣanti_vividiṣ yajñena_yajña iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti vihita--_vidhā niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman anuṣṭhātṝn_anuṣṭhātṛ jñāna--_jñāna dānena_dāna jñāninaḥ_jñānin ca_ca mumukṣūn_mumukṣu mokṣa--_mokṣa dānena_dāna na_na tu_tu anya--_anya kāmāya_kāma anyat_anya dadāmi_dā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu tathā_tathā api_api sva--_sva bhaktānām_bhakta eva_eva phalam_phala dadāsi_dā na_na tu_tu anya--_anya deva--_deva bhaktānām_bhakta iti_iti vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya sthitam_sthā eva_eva iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah mama_mad sarvātmanaḥ_sarvātman vāsudevasya_vāsudeva vartma_vartman bhajana--_bhajana mārgam_mārga karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa anuvartante_anuvṛt he_he sarva--_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra indra--_indra ādīn_ādi api_api anuvartamānāḥ_anuvṛt manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya iti_iti karma--_karman adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin indram_indra mitram_mitra varuṇam_varuṇa agnim_agni āhuḥ_ah iti_iti ādi--_ādi mantra--_mantra varṇāt_varṇa phalam_phala atas_atas upapatteḥ_upapatti iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya ca_ca sarva--_sarva rūpeṇa_rūpa api_api phala--_phala dātā_dātṛ bhagavān_bhagavant ekaḥ_eka eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca vakṣyati_vac ye_yad api_api anya--_anya devatā--_devatā bhaktāḥ_bhakta iti_iti ādi_ādi

manyante_man kecid_kaścit tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha tvām_tvad prapannāḥ_prapad jñāni--_jñānin prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti tvad--_tvad janma--_janman karmaṇoḥ_karman nitya--_nitya tvam_tva na_na api_api manyante_man iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah ye_yad iti_iti yathā_yathā yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra mām_mad prapadyante_prapad bhajante_bhaj aham_mad api_api tān_tad tena_tad eva_eva prakāreṇa_prakāra bhajāmi_bhaj bhajana--_bhajana phalam_phala dadāmi_dā

ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha ye_yad mad--_mad prabhoḥ_prabhu janma--_janman karmaṇī_karman nitye_nitya eva_eva iti_iti manasi_manas kurvāṇāḥ_kṛ tad--_tad tad--_tad līlāyām_līlā eva_eva kṛta--_kṛ manoratha--_manoratha viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa mām_mad bhajantaḥ_bhaj sukhayanti_sukhay aham_mad api_api īśvara--_īśvara tvāt_tva kartum_kṛ a_a kartum_kṛ anyathā_anyathā kartum_kṛ janma--_janman karmaṇoḥ_karman nitya--_nitya tvam_tva kartum_kṛ tān_tad sva--_sva pārṣadīkṛtya_pārṣadīkṛ taiḥ_tad sārdham_sārdham eva_eva yathā_yathā samayam_samaya avataran_avatṛ antar_antar dadhānaḥ_dhā ca_ca tān_tad pratikṣaṇam_pratikṣaṇam anugṛhṇan_anugrah eva_eva tad--_tad bhajana--_bhajana phalam_phala premāṇam_preman eva_eva dadāmi_dā ye_yad jñāni--_jñānin prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti mad--_mad janma--_janman karmaṇoḥ_karman naśvara--_naśvara tvam_tva mad--_mad vigrahasya_vigraha māyā--_māyā maya--_maya tvam_tva ca_ca manyamānāḥ_man mām_mad prapadyante_prapad aham_mad api_api tān_tad punar_punar punar_punar naśvara--_naśvara janma--_janman karmavataḥ_karmavat māyā--_māyā pāśa--_pāśa patitān_pat eva_eva kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ janma--_janman mṛtyu--_mṛtyu duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva dadāmi_dā ye_yad tu_tu mad--_mad janma--_janman karmaṇoḥ_karman nitya--_nitya tvam_tva mad--_mad vigrahasya_vigraha ca_ca sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda tvam_tva manyamānāḥ_man jñāninaḥ_jñānin sva--_sva jñāna--_jñāna siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha mām_mad prapadyante_prapad teṣām_tad sva--_sva deha--_deha dvaya--_dvaya bhaṅgam_bhaṅga eva_eva icchatām_iṣ mumukṣūṇām_mumukṣu bhajana--_bhajana phalam_phala āvidyaka--_āvidyaka janma--_janman mṛtyu--_mṛtyu dhvaṃsam_dhvaṃsa eva_eva dadāmi_dā tasmāt_tasmāt na_na kevalam_kevala mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta eva_eva mām_mad prapadyante_prapad api_api tu_tu sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarve_sarva api_api manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya jñāninaḥ_jñānin karmiṇaḥ_karmin yoginaḥ_yogin ca_ca devatā--_devatā antara--_antara upāsakāḥ_upāsaka ca_ca mama_mad vartma_vartman anuvartante_anuvṛt mama_mad sarva--_sarva svarūpa--_svarūpa tvāt_tva jñāna--_jñāna vartma_vartman iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu nitya--_nitya janma--_janman ādi--_ādi manojñaḥ_manojña sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara tvam_tvad mayā_mad avagata--_avagam kvacid_kvacid tu_tu aṅguṣṭha--_aṅguṣṭha mātra--_mātra ādiḥ_ādi api_api īśvaraḥ_īśvara janma--_janman ādi--_ādi śūnyaḥ_śūnya śrūyate_śru tat_tad kim_ka tava_tvad tvad--_tvad upāsanasya_upāsana ca_ca vaividhyam_vaividhya bhavet_bhū iti_iti ced_ced om_oṃ iti_iti āha_ah ye_yad yathā_yathā iti_iti ye_yad bhaktāḥ_bhakta mām_mad ekam_eka vaidūryam_vaiḍūrya iva_iva bahu--_bahu rūpam_rūpa sarveśvaram_sarveśvara yathā_yathā yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra bhāvena_bhāva iti_iti yāvat_yāvat prapadyante_prapad bhajanti_bhaj tān_tad aham_mad tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa tathā_tathā eva_eva tad--_tad bhāva--_bhāva anusāriṇā_anusārin rūpeṇa_rūpa bhāvena_bhāva ca_ca bhajāmi_bhaj nūnatām_nūnatā eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra nivartayati_nivartay atas_atas mama_mad ekasya_eka eva_eva bahu--_bahu rūpasya_rūpa vartma--_vartman bahu--_bahu vidham_vidha upāsana--_upāsana mārgam_mārga anādi--_anādi pravṛtta--_pravṛt tad--_tad upāsaka--_upāsaka paramparā--_paramparā anukampitāḥ_anukamp manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya sarve_sarva anuvartante_anuvṛt anusaranti_anusṛ
BhG 4.12

lg.l: kāṅkṣantaḥ_kāṅkṣ karmaṇām_karman siddhim_siddhi yajantaḥ_yaj iha_iha devatāḥ_devatā
kṣipram_kṣipram hi_hi mānuṣe_mānuṣa loke_loka siddhiḥ_siddhi bhavati_bhū karma--_karman jā_ja

div.p: bhajanti_bhaj atas_atas āha_ah kāṅkṣante_kāṅkṣ iti_iti karmaṇām_karman siddhim_siddhi karma--_karman phalam_phala kāṅkṣantaḥ_kāṅkṣ prāyena_prāyena iha_iha mānuṣya--_mānuṣya loke_loka indra--_indra ādi--_ādi devatāḥ_devatā eva_eva yajante_yaj na_na tu_tu sākṣāt_sākṣāt mām_mad eva_eva hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt karma--_karman jā_ja siddhiḥ_siddhi karma--_karman jam_ja phalam_phala śīghram_śīghram bhavati_bhū na_na tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala kaivalyam_kaivalya duṣprāpya--_duṣprāpya tvāt_tva jñānasya_jñāna

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu tvām_tvad eva_eva bhagavantam_bhagavant vāsudevam_vāsudeva kim_ka iti_iti sarve_sarva na_na prapadyante_prapad iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah kāṅkṣantaḥ_kāṅkṣ iti_iti karmaṇām_karman siddhim_siddhi phala--_phala niṣpattim_niṣpatti kāṅkṣantaḥ_kāṅkṣ iha_iha loke_loka devatāḥ_devatā devān_deva indra--_indra agni--_agni ādyān_ādya yajante_yaj pūjayanti_pūjay ajñāna--_ajñāna pratihata--_pratihan tvāt_tva na_na tu_tu niṣkāmāḥ_niṣkāma santaḥ_as mām_mad bhagavantam_bhagavant vāsudevam_vāsudeva iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa kasmāt_kasmāt hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt indra--_indra ādi--_ādi devatā--_devatā yājinām_yājin tad--_tad phala--_phala kāṅkṣiṇām_kāṅkṣin karma--_karman jā_ja siddhiḥ_siddhi karma--_karman janyam_jan phalam_phala kṣipram_kṣipram śīghram_śīghram eva_eva bhavati_bhū mānuṣe_mānuṣa loke_loka jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala tu_tu antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi sāpekṣa--_sāpekṣa tvāt_tva na_na kṣipram_kṣipram bhavati_bhū

mānuṣe_mānuṣa loke_loka karma--_karman phalam_phala śīghram_śīghram bhavati_bhū iti_iti viśeṣaṇāt_viśeṣaṇa anya--_anya loke_loka api_api varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama dharma--_dharma vyatirikta--_vyatiric karma--_karman phala--_phala siddhiḥ_siddhi bhagavatā_bhagavant sūcitā_sūcay yatas_yatas tat_tad tat_tad kṣudra--_kṣudra phala--_phala siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma mokṣa--_mokṣa vimukhāḥ_vimukha anyāḥ_anya devatāḥ_devatā yajante_yaj atas_atas na_na mumukṣavaḥ_mumukṣu iva_iva mām_mad vāsudevam_vāsudeva sākṣāt_sākṣāt te_tad prapadyante_prapad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
anuvartante_anuvṛt āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam prāsaṅgikam_prāsaṅgika procya_pravac prakṛtasya_prakṛ niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇaḥ_karman jñāna--_jñāna ākāra--_ākāra tvam_tva vadiṣyan_vad tat_tad anuṣṭhātum_anuṣṭhā virala--_virala tvam_tva āha_ah kāṅkṣantaḥ_kāṅkṣ iti_iti iha_iha loke_loka anādi--_anādi bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā niyantritāḥ_niyantray prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin karmaṇām_karman siddhim_siddhi paśu--_paśu putra--_putra ādi--_ādi phala--_phala niṣpattim_niṣpatti kāṅkṣantaḥ_kāṅkṣ anitya--_anitya alpa--_alpa dān_da api_api indra--_indra ādi--_ādi devān_deva yajante_yaj sa_sa kāmaiḥ_kāma karmabhiḥ_karman na_na tu_tu sarva--_sarva deva--_deva niṣkāmaiḥ_niṣkāma taiḥ_tad yajante_yaj hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt asmin_idam mānuṣe_mānuṣa loke_loka karma--_karman jā_ja siddhiḥ_siddhi kṣipram_kṣipram bhavati_bhū niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman ārādhitāt_ārādhay mattaḥ_mad jñānataḥ_jñāna mokṣa--_mokṣa lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa siddhiḥ_siddhi tu_tu cireṇa_cireṇa eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti sarve_sarva lokāḥ_loka bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā grasta--_gras sat--_as asat--_asat vivekāḥ_viveka śīghra--_śīghra bhoga--_bhoga icchavaḥ_icchu tad--_tad artham_artha mad--_mad bhṛtyān_bhṛtya devān_deva bhajanti_bhaj na_na tu_tu kaścid_kaścit sat--_as asat--_asat vivekī_vivekin saṃsāra--_saṃsāra duḥkha--_duḥkha vitrasta--_vitras duḥkha--_duḥkha nivṛttaye_nivṛtti niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmabhiḥ_karman sarva--_sarva deva--_deva īśam_īśa mām_mad bhajati_bhaj iti_iti viralaḥ_virala tad--_tad adhikārī_adhikārin iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 4.13

lg.l: cātur--_cātur varṇyam_varṇya mayā_mad sṛṣṭam_sṛj guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman vibhāgaśaḥ_vibhāgaśaḥ
tasya_tad kartāram_kartṛ api_api mām_mad viddhi_vid akartāram_akartṛ avyayam_avyaya

div.p: pravartante_pravṛt tad--_tad kartṛṇā_kartṛ ca_ca brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādīnām_ādi uttama--_uttama madhyama--_madhyama ādi--_ādi vaicitryam_vaicitrya kurvataḥ_kṛ tava_tvad katham_katham vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya na_na asti_as iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah cāturvarṇyam_cāturvarṇya iti_iti catvāraḥ_catur varṇāḥ_varṇa eva_eva iti_iti cāturvarṇyam_cāturvarṇya svārthe_svārtha ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha sattva--_sattva pradhānāḥ_pradhāna brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa teṣām_tad śama--_śama dama--_dama ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya teṣām_tad śaurya--_śaurya yuddha--_yuddha ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna vaiśyāḥ_vaiśya teṣām_tad kṛṣi--_kṛṣi vāṇijya--_vāṇijya ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman tamaḥ--_tamas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna śūdrāḥ_śūdra teṣām_tad traivarṇika--_traivarṇika śuśrūṣā--_śuśrūṣā ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman iti_iti evam_evam guṇānām_guṇa karmaṇām_karman ca_ca vibhāgaiḥ_vibhāga cāturvarṇyam_cāturvarṇya mayā_mad eva_eva sṛṣṭam_sṛj iti_iti satyam_satya tathā_tathā api_api evam_evam tasya_tad kartāram_kartṛ api_api phalataḥ_phala akartāram_akartṛ eva_eva mām_mad viddhi_vid tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu avyayam_avyaya āsakti--_āsakti rāhityena_rāhitya śrama--_śrama rahitam_rahita nāśa--_nāśa ādi--_ādi rahitam_rahita vā_vā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana śarīra--_śarīra ārambhaka--_ārambhaka guṇa--_guṇa vaiṣamyāt_vaiṣamya api_api na_na sarve_sarva samāna--_samāna svabhāvāḥ_svabhāva iti_iti āha_ah cāturvarṇyam_cāturvarṇya iti_iti catvāraḥ_catur varṇāḥ_varṇa eva_eva cāturvarṇyam_cāturvarṇya svārthe_svārtha ṣyañ_ṣyañ mayā_mad īśvareṇa_īśvara sṛṣṭam_sṛj utpāditam_utpāday guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman vibhāgaśaḥ_vibhāgaśaḥ guṇa--_guṇa vibhāgaśaḥ_vibhāgaśaḥ karma--_karman vibhāgaśaḥ_vibhāgaśaḥ ca_ca tathā_tathā hi_hi sattva--_sattva pradhānāḥ_pradhāna brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa teṣām_tad ca_ca sāttvikāni_sāttvika śama--_śama dama--_dama ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman sattva--_sattva upasarjana--_upasarjana rajaḥ--_rajas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya teṣām_tad ca_ca tādṛśāni_tādṛśa śaurya--_śaurya tejaḥ--_tejas prabhṛtīni_prabhṛti karmāṇi_karman tamaḥ--_tamas upasarjana--_upasarjana rajaḥ--_rajas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna vaiśyāḥ_vaiśya teṣām_tad ca_ca kṛṣi--_kṛṣi ādīni_ādi tādṛśāni_tādṛśa karmāṇi_karman tamaḥ--_tamas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna śūdrāḥ_śūdra teṣām_tad ca_ca tāmasāni_tāmasa traivarṇika--_traivarṇika śuśrūṣā--_śuśrūṣā ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman iti_iti mānuṣe_mānuṣa loke_loka vyavasthitāni_vyavasthā
div.l: evam_evam tarhi_tarhi viṣama--_viṣama svabhāva--_svabhāva cāturvarṇya--_cāturvarṇya sraṣṭṛ--_sraṣṭṛ tena_tā tava_tvad vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya durvāram_durvāra iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk na_na iti_iti āha_ah tasya_tad viṣama--_viṣama svabhāvasya_svabhāva cāturvarṇyasya_cāturvarṇya vyavahāra--_vyavahāra dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi kartāram_kartṛ api_api mām_mad paramārtha--_paramārtha
div.p: tatra_tatra nahi_nahi nahi_nahi iti_iti āha_ah cāturvarṇyam_cāturvarṇya iti_iti catvāraḥ_catur varṇāḥ_varṇa eva_eva cāturvarṇyam_cāturvarṇya svārthe_svārtha ṣyañ_ṣyañ atra_atra sattva--_sattva pradhānāḥ_pradhāna brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa teṣām_tad śama--_śama dama--_dama ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman rajaḥ--_rajas sattva--_sattva pradhānāḥ_pradhāna kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya teṣām_tad śaurya--_śaurya yuddha--_yuddha ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman tamaḥ--_tamas rajaḥ--_rajas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna vaiśyāḥ_vaiśya teṣām_tad kṛṣi--_kṛṣi go--_go rakṣā--_rakṣā ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman tamaḥ--_tamas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna śūdrāḥ_śūdra teṣām_tad paricaryā--_paricaryā ātmakam_ātmaka karma_karman iti_iti evam_evam guṇa--_guṇa karma--_karman vibhāgaśas_vibhāgaśas guṇānām_guṇa karmaṇām_karman ca_ca vibhāgaiḥ_vibhāga catvāraḥ_catur varṇāḥ_varṇa mayā_mad dharma--_dharma mārga--_mārga āśrita--_āśri tvena_tva sṛṣṭāḥ_sṛj kintu_kiṃtu teṣām_tad kartāram_kartṛ sraṣṭāram_sraṣṭṛ api_api mām_mad a_a kartāram_kartṛ a_a sraṣṭāram_sraṣṭṛ eva_eva viddhi_vid teṣām_tad prakṛti--_prakṛti guṇa--_guṇa sṛṣṭa--_sṛj tvāt_tva prakṛteḥ_prakṛti ca_ca mad--_mad śakti--_śakti tvāt_tva sraṣṭāram_sraṣṭṛ api_api mām_mad vastutas_vastutas tu_tu a_a sraṣṭāram_sraṣṭṛ mama_mad prakṛti--_prakṛti guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī svarūpa--_svarūpa tvāt_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva atas_atas eva_eva avyayam_avyaya sraṣṭṛ--_sraṣṭṛ tve_tva api_api na_na sāmyam_sāmya kiṃcid_kaścit eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna virodhi--_virodhin bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā vināśa--_vināśa hetum_hetu āha_ah cāturvarṇyam_cāturvarṇya iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi catvāraḥ_catur varṇāḥ_varṇa cāturvarṇyam_cāturvarṇya svārthikaḥ_svārthika ṣyañ_ṣyañ sattva--_sattva pradhānāḥ_pradhāna viprāḥ_vipra teṣām_tad śama--_śama ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman rajaḥ--_rajas sattva--_sattva pradhānāḥ_pradhāna kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya teṣām_tad yuddha--_yuddha ādīni_ādi tamaḥ--_tamas rajaḥ--_rajas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna vaiśyāḥ_vaiśya teṣām_tad kṛṣi--_kṛṣi ādīni_ādi tamaḥ--_tamas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna śūdrāḥ_śūdra teṣām_tad vipra--_vipra ādi--_ādi trika--_trika paricaryā--_paricaryā ādīni_ādi iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa vibhāgaiḥ_vibhāga karma--_karman vibhāgaiḥ_vibhāga ca_ca vibhaktāḥ_vibhaj catvāraḥ_catur varṇāḥ_varṇa sarveśvareṇa_sarveśvara mayā_mad sṛṣṭāḥ_sṛj sthiti--_sthiti saṃhṛtyoḥ_saṃhṛti upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi stamba--_stamba antasya_anta prapañcasya_prapañca aham_mad eva_eva sarga--_sarga ādi--_ādi kartā_kartṛ iti_iti yat_yad āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra janma--_janman ādi_ādi asya_idam yatas_yatas iti_iti tasya_tad sarga--_sarga ādeḥ_ādi kartāram_kartṛ api_api mām_mad tat_tad tat_tad karma--_karman antarita--_antari tvāt_tva akartāram_akartṛ viddhi_vid iti_iti svasmin_sva vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya ādikam_ādika parihṛtam_parihṛ etat_etad prāha_prāh avyayam_avyaya iti_iti sraṣṭṛ--_sraṣṭṛ tve_tva api_api sāmyāt_sāmya na_na vyemi_vī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 4.14

lg.l: na_na mām_mad karmāṇi_karman limpanti_lip na_na me_mad karma--_karman phale_phala spṛhā_spṛhā
iti_iti mām_mad yaḥ_yad abhijānāti_abhijñā karmabhiḥ_karman na_na sa_tad badhyate_bandh

div.p: āha_ah karmāṇi_karman viśva--_viśva sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādīni_ādi api_api mām_mad na_na limpanti_lip āsaktam_āsañj na_na kurvanti_kṛ nirahaṅkāra--_nirahaṃkāra tvāt_tva mama_mad karma--_karman phale_phala spṛhā--_spṛhā abhāvāt_abhāva ca_ca mām_mad limpanti_lip iti_iti kim_ka kartavyam_kṛ yatas_yatas karma--_karman lepa--_lepa rahita--_rahita tvena_tva mām_mad yaḥ_yad abhijānāti_abhijñā saḥ_tad api_api karmabhiḥ_karman na_na badhyate_bandh mama_mad nirlepa--_nirlepa tve_tva kāraṇam_kāraṇa nirahaṅkāra--_nirahaṃkāra tva--_tva niḥspṛha--_niḥspṛha tva--_tva ādikam_ādika jānataḥ_jñā tasya_tad api_api ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra ādi--_ādi śaithilyāt_śaithilya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_karman viśva--_viśva sarga--_sarga ādīni_ādi mām_mad nirahaṅkāra--_nirahaṃkāra tvena_tva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvena_tva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāna--_abhimāna hīnam_hā bhagavantam_bhagavant na_na limpanti_lip deha--_deha ārambhaka--_ārambhaka tvena_tva na_na badhnanti_bandh evam_evam kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva nirākṛtya_nirākṛ bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvam_tva nirākaroti_nirākṛ na_na me_mad mama_mad āpta--_āp kāmasya_kāma karma--_karman phale_phala spṛhā_spṛhā tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā āpta--_āp kāmasya_kāma kā_ka spṛhā_spṛhā iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāna--_abhimāna phala--_phala spṛhābhyām_spṛhā hi_hi karmāṇi_karman limpanti_lip tad--_tad abhāvāt_abhāva na_na mām_mad karmāṇi_karman limpanti_lip iti_iti evam_evam yaḥ_yad anyaḥ_anya api_api mām_mad akartāram_akartṛ abhoktāram_abhoktṛ ca_ca ātmatvena_ātmatva abhijānāti_abhijñā karmabhiḥ_karman na_na sa_tad badhyate_bandh akartrā_akartṛ ātma--_ātman jñānena_jñāna mucyate_muc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āstām_ās kṣatriya--_kṣatriya jāti--_jāti ucitāni_ucita karmāṇi_karman pratyaham_pratyaham karoṣi_kṛ eva_eva tatra_tatra kā_ka vārtā_vārttā iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah na_na mām_mad iti_iti limpanti_lip jīvam_jīva liptīkurvanti_liptīkṛ nā_na api_api jīvasya_jīva iva_iva karma--_karman phale_phala svarga--_svarga ādau_ādi spṛhā_spṛhā mām_mad yaḥ_yad tu_tu na_na jānāti_jñā sa_tad karmabhiḥ_karman badhyate_bandh iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva etat_etad viśadayati_viśaday na_na mām_mad iti_iti karmāṇi_karman viśva--_viśva sarga--_sarga ādīni_ādi mām_mad na_na limpanti_lip vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya ādi--_ādi doṣeṇa_doṣa jīvam_jīva iva_iva liptam_lip na_na kurvanti_kṛ yat_yat tāni_tad sṛjya--_sṛj jīva--_jīva karma--_karman prayuktāni_prayuj na_na ca_ca mad--_mad prayuktāni_prayuj na_na ca_ca sarga--_sarga ādi--_ādi karma--_karman phale_phala mama_mad spṛhā_spṛhā asti_as phala--_phala spṛhayā_spṛhā yaḥ_yad karmāṇi_karman karoti_kṛ sa_tad tad--_tad phalaiḥ_phala lipyate_lip aham_mad tu_tu svarūpa--_svarūpa ānanda--_ānanda pūrṇaḥ_pṛ prakṛti--_prakṛti vilīna--_vilī kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña bubhukṣā--_bubhukṣā abhyudita--_abhyudi dayaḥ_dayā parjanya--_parjanya vat_vat nimitta--_nimitta mātraḥ_mātra san_as tad--_tad karmāṇi_karman pravartayāmi_pravartay iti_iti smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca
nimitta--_nimitta mātram_mātra eva_eva asau_adas sṛjyānām_sṛj sarga--_sarga karmaṇi_karman pradhāna--_pradhāna kāraṇībhūtāḥ_kāraṇībhū yatas_yatas vai_vai sṛjya--_sṛj śaktayaḥ_śakti iti_iti ādyā_ādya

sṛjyānām_sṛj deva--_deva mānava--_mānava ādi--_ādi bhāva--_bhāva bhājām_bhāj kṣetrajñānām_kṣetrajña sarga--_sarga kriyāyām_kriyā asau_adas pareśaḥ_pareśa nimitta--_nimitta mātram_mātra eva_eva deva--_deva ādi--_ādi bhāva--_bhāva vaicitryām_vaicitrī kāraṇībhūtāḥ_kāraṇībhū tu_tu sṛjyānām_sṛj teṣām_tad prācīna--_prācīna karma--_karman śaktayaḥ_śakti eva_eva bhavanti_bhū evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakṛt_sūtrakṛt vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya nairghṛṇyena_nairghṛṇya iti_iti ādinā_ādi evam_evam jñānasya_jñāna phalam_phala āha_ah iti_iti mām_mad iti_iti itthambhūtam_itthambhūta mām_mad yaḥ_yad abhijānāti_abhijñā sa_tad tad--_tad virodhibhiḥ_virodhin tad--_tad hetubhiḥ_hetu prācīna--_prācīna karmabhiḥ_karman na_na badhyate_bandh taiḥ_tad vimucyate_vimuc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 4.15

lg.l: evam_evam jñātvā_jñā kṛtam_kṛ karma_karman pūrvaiḥ_pūrva api_api mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu
kuru_kṛ karma_karman eva_eva tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad pūrvaiḥ_pūrva pūrvataram_pūrvatara kṛtam_kṛ

div.p: ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra ādi--_ādi rāhityena_rāhitya kṛtam_kṛ karma_karman bandhakam_bandhaka na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti evam_evam jñātvā_jñā pūrvaiḥ_pūrva janaka--_janaka ādibhiḥ_ādi api_api mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha pūrvataram_pūrvatara yuga--_yuga antareṣu_antara api_api kṛtam_kṛ tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad api_api prathamam_prathama karma_karman eva_eva kuru_kṛ

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_yatas na_na aham_mad kartā_kartṛ na_na me_mad karma--_karman phala--_phala spṛhā_spṛhā iti_iti jñānāt_jñāna karmabhiḥ_karman na_na badhyate_bandh atas_atas āha_ah evam_evam iti_iti evam_evam ātmanaḥ_ātman akartuḥ_akartṛ karma--_karman ālepam_ālepa jñātvā_jñā kṛtam_kṛ karma_karman pūrvaiḥ_pūrva atikrāntaiḥ_atikram api_api asmin_idam yuge_yuga yayāti--_yayāti yadu--_yadu prabhṛtibhiḥ_prabhṛti mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad api_api karma_karman eva_eva kuru_kṛ na_na tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm āsanam_āsana na_na api_api saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa yadi_yadi a_a tattva--_tattva vid_vid tadā_tadā ātma--_ātman śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha tattva--_tattva vid_vid ced_ced loka--_loka saṅgraha--_saṃgraha artham_artha pūrvaiḥ_pūrva janaka--_janaka ādibhiḥ_ādi pūrvataram_pūrvatara ati_ati pūrvam_pūrva yuga--_yuga antare_antara kṛtam_kṛ etena_etad asmin_idam yuge_yuga anya--_anya yuge_yuga ca_ca pūrva--_pūrva pūrvataraiḥ_pūrvatara kṛta--_kṛ tvāt_tva avaśyam_avaśyam tvayā_tvad kartavyam_kṛ karma_karman iti_iti darśayati_darśay
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha evambhūtam_evambhūta eva_eva mām_mad jñātvā_jñā pūrvaiḥ_pūrva janaka--_janaka ādibhiḥ_ādi api_api loka--_loka pravartana--_pravartana artham_artha eva_eva karma_karman kṛtam_kṛ
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva mām_mad eva_eva jñātvā_jñā tad--_tad anusāribhiḥ_anusārin mad--_mad śiṣyaiḥ_śiṣya pūrvaiḥ_pūrva vivasvat--_vivasvant ādibhiḥ_ādi mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu niṣkāmam_niṣkāma karma_karman kṛtam_kṛ tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad api_api karma_karman eva_eva tat_tad kuru_kṛ karma--_karman saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa aśuddha--_aśuddha cittaḥ_citta ced_ced jñāna--_jñāna garbhāyai_garbha citta--_citta śuddhyai_śuddhi śuddha--_śudh cittaḥ_citta ced_ced loka--_loka saṅgrahāya_saṃgraha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa pūrvaiḥ_pūrva taiḥ_tad kṛtam_kṛ pūrvataram_pūrvatara ati_ati prācīnam_prācīna
BhG 4.16

lg.l: kim_ka karma_karman kim_ka akarma_kṛ iti_iti kavayaḥ_kavi api_api atra_atra mohitāḥ_mohay
tat_tad te_tvad karma_karman pravakṣyāmi_pravac yat_yad jñātvā_jñā mokṣyase_muc aśubhāt_aśubha

div.p: na_na loka--_loka paramparā--_paramparā mātreṇa_mātra iti_iti āha_ah kim_ka karma_karman iti_iti kim_ka karma_karman kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa karma--_karman karaṇam_karaṇa kim_ka akarma_kṛ kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa karma_karman akaraṇam_akaraṇa iti_iti asmin_idam arthe_artha vivekinaḥ_vivekin api_api mohitāḥ_mohay atas_atas yat_yad jñātā_jñātṛ yat_yad anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā aśubhāt_aśubha saṃsārāt_saṃsāra mokṣyase_muc muktaḥ_muc bhaviṣyasi_bhū tat_tad karma_karman akarma_akarman ca_ca tubhyam_tvad aham_mad pravakṣyāmi_pravac tat_tad śṛṇu_śru

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu karma--_karman viṣaye_viṣaya kim_ka kaścid_kaścit saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya api_api asti_as yena_yad pūrvaiḥ_pūrva pūrvataram_pūrvatara kṛtam_kṛ iti_iti ati_ati nirbadhnāsi_nirbandh asti_as eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah kim_ka karma_karman iti_iti nau--_nau sthasya_stha niṣkriyeṣu_niṣkriya api_api taṭastha--_taṭastha vṛkṣeṣu_vṛkṣa gamana--_gamana bhrama--_bhrama darśanāt_darśana tathā_tathā dūrāt_dūrāt cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus saṃnikṛṣṭeṣu_saṃnikṛṣṭa gacchatsu_gam api_api puruṣeṣu_puruṣa agamana--_agamana bhrama--_bhrama darśanāt_darśana paramārthataḥ_paramārtha kim_ka karma_karman kim_ka vā_vā paramārthataḥ_paramārtha atra_atra asmin_idam viṣaye_viṣaya mohitāḥ_mohay moham_moha nirṇaya--_nirṇaya asāmarthyam_asāmarthya prāptāḥ_prāp atyanta--_atyanta durnirūpa--_durnirūpa tvāt_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad tasmāt_tasmāt te_tvad tubhyam_tvad aham_mad karma_karman a_a kāra--_kāra praśleṣeṇa_praśleṣa chedāt_cheda akarma_karman ca_ca pravakṣyāmi_pravac prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa sandeha--_saṃdeha ucchedena_uccheda vakṣyāmi_vac yat_yad karma--_karman akarma--_akarman svarūpam_svarūpa jñātvā_jñā mokṣyase_muc muktaḥ_muc bhaviṣyasi_bhū aśubhāt_aśubha saṃsārāt_saṃsāra
āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu kim_kim karma--_karman viṣayakaḥ_viṣayaka kaścid_kaścit sandehaḥ_saṃdeha api_api asti_as yatas_yatas pūrvaiḥ_pūrva pūrvataram_pūrvatara kṛtam_kṛ iti_iti ati_ati nirbandhāt_nirbandha bravīṣi_brū iti_iti ced_ced asti_as eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah kim_ka karma_karman iti_iti mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā karma_karman kim_ka rūpam_rūpa syāt_as akarma_akarman ca_ca karma_karman anyat_anya tad--_tad antargatam_antargam jñānam_jñāna ca_ca kim_ka rūpam_rūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad anya--_anya tve_tva enam_enad ca_ca atra_atra arthe_artha kavayaḥ_kavi dhīmantaḥ_dhīmat api_api mohitāḥ_mohay tad--_tad yāthātmya--_yāthātmya nirṇaya--_nirṇaya asāmarthyāt_asāmarthya moham_moha prāpuḥ_prāp aham_mad sarva--_sarva īśaḥ_īśa sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña te_tvad tubhyam_tvad tat_tad karma_karman a_a kāra--_kāra praśleṣāt_praśleṣa akarma_kṛ ca_ca pravakṣyāmi_pravac yat_yad jñātvā_jñā anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā prāpya_prāp ca_ca aśubhāt_aśubha saṃsārān_saṃsāra
mokṣyase_muc
BhG 4.17

lg.l: karmaṇaḥ_karman hi_hi api_api boddhavyam_budh boddhavyam_budh ca_ca vikarmaṇaḥ_vikarman
akarmaṇaḥ_akarman ca_ca boddhavyam_budh gahanā_gahana karmaṇaḥ_karman gatiḥ_gati

div.p: akarma_akarman tat_tad a_a vyāpāra--_vyāpāra ātmakam_ātmaka atas_atas katham_katham ucyate_vac kavayaḥ_kavi api_api atra_atra moham_moha prāptāḥ_prāp iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti karmaṇaḥ_karman vihita--_vidhā vyāpārasya_vyāpāra api_api tattvam_tattva boddhavyam_budh asti_as loka--_loka prasiddha--_prasidh mātram_mātra akarmaṇaḥ_akarman avihita--_avihita vyāpārasya_vyāpāra api_api tattvam_tattva boddhavyam_budh asti_as vikarmaṇaḥ_vikarman niṣiddha--_niṣidh vyāpārasya_vyāpāra api_api tattvam_tattva boddhavyam_budh asti_as yatas_yatas karmaṇaḥ_karman gatiḥ_gati gahanā_gahana karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa artham_artha karma--_karman akarma--_akarman vikarmaṇām_vikarman tattvam_tattva durvijñeyam_durvijñeya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu sarva--_sarva loka--_loka prasiddha--_prasidh tvāt_tva aham_mad eva_eva etat_etad jānāmi_jñā deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi vyāpāraḥ_vyāpāra karma_karman tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm āsanam_āsana akarma_kṛ iti_iti tatra_tatra kim_ka tvayā_tvad vaktavyam_vac iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt karmaṇaḥ_karman śāstra--_śāstra vihitasya_vidhā api_api tattvam_tattva boddhavyam_budh asti_as vikarmaṇaḥ_vikarman ca_ca pratiṣiddhasya_pratiṣidh akarmaṇaḥ_akarman ca_ca tūṣṇīmbhāvasya_tūṣṇīmbhāva atra_atra vākya--_vākya traye_traya api_api tat_tad tvam_tvad asi_as iti_iti adhyāhāraḥ_adhyāhāra yasmāt_yasmāt gahanā_gahana durjñānā_durjñāna karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa karma--_karman akarma--_akarman vikarmaṇām_vikarman gatiḥ_gati tattvam_tattva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

tathā_tathā akarmaṇaḥ_akarman karma--_karman akaraṇasya_akaraṇa api_api sannyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa karma--_karman akaraṇam_akaraṇa śubha--_śubha dam_da iti_iti anyathā_anyathā niḥśreyasam_niḥśreyasa katham_katham hasta--_hasta gatam_gam syāt_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa karma--_karman akarma--_akarman vikarmaṇām_vikarman gatiḥ_gati tattvam_tattva gahanā_gahana durgamā_durgama

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu kavayaḥ_kavi api_api moham_moha prāpuḥ_prāp iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah karmaṇaḥ_karman hi_hi iti_iti karmaṇaḥ_karman niṣkāmasya_niṣkāma mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu anuṣṭhātavyasya_anuṣṭhā svarūpam_svarūpa boddhavyam_budh vikarmaṇaḥ_vikarman jñāna--_jñāna viruddhasya_virudh kāmya--_kāmya karmaṇaḥ_karman svarūpam_svarūpa boddhavyam_budh akarmaṇaḥ_akarman ca_ca karma--_karman bhinnasya_bhid jñānasya_jñāna ca_ca svarūpam_svarūpa boddhavyam_budh tad--_tad tad--_tad svarūpa--_svarūpa vidbhiḥ_vid sārdham_sārdham vicāryam_vicāray iti_iti arthaḥ_artha karmaṇaḥ_karman akarmaṇaḥ_akarman ca_ca gatiḥ_gati gahanā_gahana durgamā_durgama atas_atas kavayaḥ_kavi api_api tatra_tatra mohitāḥ_mohay
BhG 4.18

lg.l: karmaṇi_karman a_a karma_karman yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś a_a karmaṇi_karman ca_ca karma_karman yaḥ_yad
sa_tad buddhimān_buddhimat manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya sa_tad yuktaḥ_yuj kṛtsna--_kṛtsna karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt

div.p: āha_ah parameśvara--_parameśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa karmaṇi_karman karma--_karman viṣaye_viṣaya akarma_kṛ karma_karman idam_idam na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś tasya_tad jñāna--_jñāna hetu--_hetu tvena_tva bandhaka--_bandhaka tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva akarmaṇi_akarman ca_ca vihita--_vidhā akaraṇe_akaraṇa karma_karman yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś pratyavāya--_pratyavāya utpādaka--_utpādaka tvena_tva bandha--_bandha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya karma_karman kurvāṇeṣu_kṛ sa_tad buddhimān_buddhimat vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmaka--_ātmaka buddhimat--_buddhimat tvāt_tva śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha tam_tad stauti_stu sa_tad yuktaḥ_yuj yogī_yogin tena_tad karmaṇā_karman jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga avāpteḥ_avāpti saḥ_tad eva_eva kṛtsna--_kṛtsna karma--_karman kartā_kartṛ ca_ca sarvatas_sarvatas sampluta--_samplu udaka--_udaka sthānīye_sthānīya ca_ca tasmin_tad karmaṇi_karman sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phalānām_phala antarbhāvāt_antarbhāva tat_tad evam_evam ārurukṣoḥ_ārurukṣu karma--_karman yoga--_yoga adhikāra--_adhikāra avasthāyām_avasthā na_na karmaṇām_karman anārambhāt_anārambha iti_iti ādinā_ādi uktaḥ_vac eva_eva karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga tad--_tad prapañca--_prapañca rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva ca_ca asya_idam prakaraṇasya_prakaraṇa na_na paunaruktya--_paunaruktya doṣaḥ_doṣa anena_idam eva_eva yoga--_yoga ārūḍha--_āruh avasthāyām_avasthā yaḥ_yad tu_tu ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati eva_eva syāt_as iti_iti ādinā_ādi yaḥ_yad karma--_karman anupayogaḥ_anupayoga uktaḥ_vac tasya_tad api_api arthāt_artha prapañcaḥ_prapañca kṛtaḥ_kṛ veditavyaḥ_vid yat_yad ārurukṣoḥ_ārurukṣu api_api karma_karman bandhakam_bandhaka na_na bhavati_bhū tad--_tad ārūḍhasya_āruh kutas_kutas bandhakam_bandhaka syāt_as iti_iti atra_atra api_api ślokaḥ_śloka yujyate_yuj

yat_yat vā_vā karmaṇi_karman deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi vyāpāre_vyāpāra vartamāne_vṛt api_api ātmanaḥ_ātman deha--_deha ādi--_ādi vyatireka--_vyatireka anubhavena_anubhava akarma_akarman svābhāvikam_svābhāvika niaṣkarmyam_niaṣkarmya eva_eva yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś tathā_tathā akarmaṇi_akarman ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna rahite_rahita duḥkha--_duḥkha buddhyā_buddhi karmaṇām_karman tat_tad uktam_vac karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya saṃyamya_saṃyam iti_iti ādinā_ādi yaḥ_yad evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta sa_tad tu_tu sarveṣu_sarva manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya buddhimān_buddhimat paṇḍitaḥ_paṇḍita tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu yatas_yatas kṛtsnāni_kṛtsna sarvāṇi_sarva yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā prāptāni_prāp āhāra--_āhāra ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ api_api sa_tad yuktaḥ_yuj eva_eva akartrā_akartṛ ātma--_ātman jñānena_jñāna samādhi--_samādhi sthaḥ_stha eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha anenanā_anenas eva_eva jñāninaḥ_jñānin svabhāvāt_svabhāva āpannam_āpad kalañja--_kalañja bhakṣaṇa--_bhakṣaṇa ādikam_ādika na_na doṣāya_doṣa ajñasya_ajña tu_tu
rāgataḥ_rāga kṛtam_kṛ doṣāya_doṣa iti_iti vikarmaṇaḥ_vikarman api_api tattvam_tattva nirūpitam_nirūpay draṣṭavyam_dṛś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa tarhi_tarhi karma--_karman ādīnām_ādi tattvam_tattva iti_iti tat_tad āha_ah karmaṇi_karman iti_iti karmaṇi_karman deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi vyāpāre_vyāpāra vihite_vidhā pratiṣiddhe_pratiṣidh ca_ca aham_mad karomi_kṛ iti_iti dharmi--_dharmin adhyāsena_adhyāsa ātmani_ātman āropita--_āropay nau--_nau sthena_stha acalatsu_acalat taṭastha--_taṭastha vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa ādiṣu_ādi samāropite_samāropay calane_calana iva_iva akartā_akartṛ ātma--_ātman svarūpa--_svarūpa ālocanena_ālocana vastutas_vastutas karma--_karman abhāvam_abhāva taṭastha--_taṭastha vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa ādiṣu_ādi iva_iva yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś paśyati_paś tathā_tathā deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādiṣu_ādi triguṇa--_triguṇa māyā--_māyā pariṇāma--_pariṇāma tvena_tva sarvadā_sarvadā sa_sa vyāpāreṣu_vyāpāra nirvyāpāraḥ_nirvyāpāra tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm sukham_sukham āsaḥ_as iti_iti abhimānena_abhimāna samāropite_samāropay akarmaṇi_akarman vyāpāra--_vyāpāra uparame_uparama dūra--_dūra stha--_stha cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus sa_sa vyāpāra--_vyāpāra deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi svarūpa--_svarūpa paryālocanena_paryālocana vastu--_vastu gatyā_gati karma_karman nivṛtti--_nivṛtti ākhya--_ākhya prayatna--_prayatna rūpam_rūpa vyāpāram_vyāpāra yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś udāhṛta--_udāhṛ puruṣeṣu_puruṣa gamanam_gamana iva_iva audāsīnya--_audāsīnya avasthāyām_avasthā api_api udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna aham_mad āse_as iti_iti abhimānaḥ_abhimāna eva_eva karma_karman stūyate_stu

atra_atra prathama--_prathama pādena_pāda karma--_karman vikarmaṇoḥ_vikarman tattvam_tattva karma--_karman śabdasya_śabda vihita--_vidhā pratiṣiddha--_pratiṣidh paratvāt_paratva dvitīya--_dvitīya pādena_pāda ca_ca akarmaṇaḥ_akarman tattvam_tattva darśitam_darśay iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś tatra_tatra yat_yad tvam_tvad manyase_man karmaṇaḥ_karman bandha--_bandha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm eva_eva mayā_mad sukhena_sukhena sthātavyam_sthā iti_iti tat_tad mṛṣā_mṛṣā asati_asat kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāne_abhimāna vihitasya_vidhā pratiṣiddhasya_pratiṣidh vā_vā karmaṇaḥ_karman bandha--_bandha hetu--_hetu tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva tathā_tathā ca_ca vyākhyātam_vyākhyā na_na mām_mad karmāṇi_karman limpanti_lip iti_iti ādinā_ādi sati_as ca_ca kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāne_abhimāna tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm aham_mad āse_as iti_iti audāsīnya--_audāsīnya abhimāna--_abhimāna ātmakam_ātmaka yat_yad karma_karman tat_tad api_api bandha--_bandha hetuḥ_hetu eva_eva vastu--_vastu tattva--_tattva aparijñānāt_aparijñāna tasmāt_tasmāt karma--_karman vikarma--_vikarman akarmaṇām_akarman tattvam_tattva īdṛśam_īdṛśa jñātvā_jñā vikarma--_vikarman akarmaṇī_akarman parityajya_parityaj kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāna--_abhimāna phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi hānena_hāna vihitam_vidhā karma_karman eva_eva kuru_kṛ iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

aparā_apara vyākhyā_vyākhyā karmaṇi_karman jñāna--_jñāna karmaṇi_karman dṛśye_dṛś jaḍe_jaḍa sat--_as rūpeṇa_rūpa sphuraṇa--_sphuraṇa rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca anusyūtam_anusīv sarva--_sarva bhrama--_bhrama adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna akarma--_akarman avedyam_avedya sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa caitanyam_caitanya paramārtha--_paramārtha dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś tathā_tathā akarmaṇi_akarman ca_ca sva--_sva prakāśe_prakāśa dṛś--_dṛś vastuni_vastu kalpitam_kalpay karma_karman dṛśyam_dṛś māyā--_māyā mayam_maya na_na paramārtha--_paramārtha sat_as dṛś--_dṛś dṛśyayoḥ_dṛśya sambandha--_sambandha anupapatteḥ_anupapatti

yaḥ_yad tu_tu sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta ātmani_ātman eva_eva anupaśyati_anupaś
sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta ca_ca ātmānam_ātman tatas_tatas na_na vijugupsate_vijugups iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

evam_evam paraspara--_paraspara adhyāse_adhyāsa api_api śuddham_śuddha vastu_vastu yaḥ_yad paśyati_paś manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya madhye_madhya saḥ_tad eva_eva buddhimān_buddhimat nā_na anyaḥ_anya asya_idam paramārtha--_paramārtha darśi--_darśin tvāt_tva anyasya_anya ca_ca aparamārtha--_aparamārtha darśi--_darśin tvāt_tva sa_tad ca_ca buddhi--_buddhi sādhana--_sādhana yogya--_yogya yuktaḥ_yuj antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi aikāgra--_aikāgra cittaḥ_citta atas_atas saḥ_tad eva_eva antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi sādhana--_sādhana kṛtsna--_kṛtsna karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt iti_iti vāstava--_vāstava dharmaiḥ_dharma eva_eva stūyate_stu yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad api_api paramārtha--_paramārtha darśī_darśin bhava_bhū tāvatā_tāvat eva_eva kṛtsna--_kṛtsna karma--_karman kāri--_kārin tva--_tva upapatteḥ_upapatti iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

atas_atas yat_yad uktam_vac yat_yad jñātvā_jñā mokṣyase_muc aśubhāt_aśubha iti_iti yat_yad ca_ca uktam_vac karma--_karman ādīnām_ādi tattvam_tattva boddhavyam_budh asti_as iti_iti sa_tad buddhimān_buddhimat iti_iti ādi--_ādi stutiḥ_stuti ca_ca tat_tad sarvam_sarva parama--_parama artha--_artha darśane_darśana saṃgacchate_saṃgam anya--_anya jñānāt_jñāna aśubhāt_aśubha saṃsārāt_saṃsāra mokṣa--_mokṣa anupapatteḥ_anupapatti atattvam_atattva ca_ca anyat_anya na_na boddhavyam_budh na_na vā_vā yat_yad jñāne_jñāna buddhimat--_buddhimat tvam_tva iti_iti yuktā_yuj eva_eva parama--_parama artha--_artha darśinām_darśin vyākhyā_vyākhyā

yat_yad tu_tu vyākhyānam_vyākhyāna karmaṇi_karman nitye_nitya parameśvara--_parameśvara arthe_artha anuṣṭhīyamāne_anuṣṭhā bandha--_bandha hetu--_hetu tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva akarma_kṛ idam_idam iti_iti yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś tathā_tathā akarmaṇi_akarman ca_ca nitya--_nitya karma--_karman akaraṇe_akaraṇa pratyavāya--_pratyavāya hetu--_hetu tvena_tva karma_karman idam_idam iti_iti yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś sa_tad buddhimān_buddhimat iti_iti ādi_ādi tat_tad asaṅgatam_asaṅgata eva_eva nitya--_nitya karmaṇi_karman akarma_kṛ idam_idam iti_iti jñānasya_jñāna aśubha--_aśubha mokṣa--_mokṣa hetu--_hetu tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva mithyājñāna--_mithyājñāna tvena_tva tasya_tad iva_iva aśubha--_aśubha tvāt_tva ca_ca na_na ca_ca etādṛśam_etādṛśa mithyā_mithyā jñānam_jñāna boddhavyam_budh tattvam_tattva nā_na api_api etādṛśa--_etādṛśa jñāne_jñāna buddhimat--_buddhimat tva--_tva ādi--_ādi stuti--_stuti upapattiḥ_upapatti bhrānti--_bhrānti tvāt_tva nitya--_nitya karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna hi_hi svarūpataḥ_svarūpa antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi dvārā_dvār upayujyate_upayuj na_na tatra_tatra akarma--_akarman buddhiḥ_buddhi kutra_kutra api_api upayujyate_upayuj śāstreṇa_śāstra nāma--_nāman ādiṣu_ādi brahma--_brahman dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi vat_vat avihita--_avihita tvāt_tva nā_na api_api idam_idam eva_eva vākyam_vākya tad--_tad vidhāyakam_vidhāyaka upakrama--_upakrama ādi--_ādi virodhasya_virodha ukteḥ_ukti evam_evam nitya--_nitya karma--_karman akaraṇam_akaraṇa api_api svarūpataḥ_svarūpa nitya--_nitya karma--_karman viruddha--_virudh karma--_karman lakṣaka--_lakṣaka tayā_tā upayujyate_upayuj na_na tu_tu tatra_tatra karma--_karman dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi kvāpi_kvāpi upayujyate_upayuj na_na api_api nitya--_nitya karma--_karman akaraṇāt_akaraṇa pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya abhāvāt_abhāva bhāva--_bhāva utpatti--_utpatti ayogāt_ayoga anyathā_anyathā tad--_tad aviśeṣeṇa_aviśeṣa sarvadā_sarvadā kārya--_kārya utpatti--_utpatti prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga bhāva--_bhāva arthāḥ_artha karma--_karman śabdāḥ_śabda tebhyaḥ_tad kriyā_kriyā pratīyeta_pratī eṣa_etad hi_hi arthaḥ_artha vidhīyate_vidhā iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya bhāva--_bhāva arthasya_artha eva_eva apūrva--_apūrva janaka--_janaka tvāt_tva atirātre_atirātra ṣoḍaśinam_ṣoḍaśin na_na gṛhṇāti_grah iti_iti ādau_ādi api_api saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa viśeṣasya_viśeṣa eva_eva apūrva--_apūrva janaka--_janaka tva--_tva abhyupagamāt_abhyupagama na_na īkṣeta_īkṣ udyantam_udi ādityam_āditya iti_iti ādi--_ādi prajāpati--_prajāpati vrata--_vrata vat_vat atas_atas nitya--_nitya karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna arhe_arha kāle_kāla tad--_tad viruddha--_virudh tayā_tā yat_yad upaveśana--_upaveśana ādi_ādi karma_karman tat_tad eva_eva nitya--_nitya karma--_karman akaraṇa--_akaraṇa upalakṣitam_upalakṣay pratyavāya--_pratyavāya hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti vaidikānām_vaidika siddhāntaḥ_siddhānta ataeva_ataeva akurvan_kṛ vihitam_vidhā karma_karman iti_iti atra_atra lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa arthe_artha śatā_śata vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa hetvoḥ_hetu kriyāyāḥ_kriyā iti_iti aviśeṣa--_aviśeṣa smaraṇe_smaraṇa api_api atra_atra hetu--_hetu tva--_tva anupapatteḥ_anupapatti tasmāt_tasmāt mithyā_mithyā darśana--_darśana apanode_apanoda prastute_prastu mithyā_mithyā darśana--_darśana vyākhyānam_vyākhyāna na_na śobhatetarām_śubh nā_na api_api nitya--_nitya anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna param_para eva_eva etat_etad vākyam_vākya nityāni_nitya kuryāt_kṛ iti_iti arthe_artha karmaṇi_karman akarma_kṛ yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś iti_iti ādi_ādi tad--_tad abodha--_abodha karam_kara vākyam_vākya prayuñjānasya_prayuj bhagavataḥ_bhagavant pratāraka--_pratāraka tva--_tva āpatteḥ_āpatti iti_iti ādi_ādi

āha_ah śuddha--_śudh antar_antar karaṇasya_karaṇa jñānavat--_jñānavat tve_tva api_api janaka--_janaka ādeḥ_ādi iva_iva akṛta--_akṛta sannyāsasya_saṃnyāsa karmaṇi_karman anuṣṭhīyamāne_anuṣṭhā niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yoge_yoga akarma_akarman karma_karman idam_idam na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś tad--_tad karmaṇaḥ_karman bandhaka--_bandhaka tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tathā_tathā aśuddha--_aśuddha antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa jñāna--_jñāna abhāve_abhāva api_api śāstra--_śāstra jña--_jña tvāt_tva jñāna--_jñāna vāvadūkasya_vāvadūka sannyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin akarmaṇi_akarman karma--_karman akaraṇe_akaraṇa karma_karman paśyet_paś durgati--_durgati prāpakam_prāpaka karma--_karman bandham_bandha eva_eva upalabhate_upalabh saḥ_tad eva_eva buddhimān_buddhimat sa_tad tu_tu kṛtsna--_kṛtsna karmāṇi_karman eva_eva karoti_kṛ na_na tu_tu tasya_tad jñāna--_jñāna vāvadūkasya_vāvadūka jñāni--_jñānin māninaḥ_mānin saṅgena_saṅga api_api tad--_tad vacasā_vacas api_api sannyāsam_saṃnyāsa na_na karoti_kṛ iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tathā_tathā ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant vākyam_vākya

lg.l: yaḥ_yad tu_tu asaṃyata--_asaṃyata ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ vargaḥ_varga pracaṇḍa--_pracaṇḍa indriya--_indriya sārathiḥ_sārathi
jñāna--_jñāna vairāgya--_vairāgya rahitaḥ_rahita tri--_tri daṇḍam_daṇḍa upajīvati_upajīv

div.p: surān_sura ātmānam_ātman ātma--_ātman stham_stha nihnute_nihnu mām_mad ca_ca dharma--_dharma hā_han avipakva--_avipakva kaṣāyaḥ_kaṣāya asmāt_idam amuṣmāt_adas ca_ca vihīyate_vihā

baladevaḥ_baladeva karma--_karman akarmaṇoḥ_akarman boddhavyam_budh svarūpam_svarūpa āha_ah karmaṇi_karman iti_iti anuṣṭhīyamāne_anuṣṭhā niṣkāme_niṣkāma karmaṇi_karman yaḥ_yad akarma_akarman prastuta--_prastu tvāt_tva karmaṇi_karman ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna paśyet_paś akarmaṇi_akarman ātma--_ātman jñāne_jñāna yaḥ_yad karma_karman paśyet_paś etat_etad uktam_vac bhavati_bhū yaḥ_yad mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhaye_viśuddhi kriyamāṇam_kṛ karma_karman ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna anusandhi--_anusaṃdhi garbha--_garbha tvāt_tva jñāna--_jñāna ākāram_ākāra tat_tad ca_ca jñānam_jñāna karma--_karman dvāraka--_dvāraka tvāt_tva karma--_karman ākāram_ākāra paśyet_paś ubhayoḥ_ubhaya eka--_eka ātma--_ātman uddeśya--_uddiś tvāt_tva ubhayam_ubhaya ekam_eka vidyāt_vid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam eva_eva vakṣyate_vac sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya yogau_yoga pṛthak_pṛthak bālāḥ_bāla iti_iti ādinā_ādi iti_iti evam_evam anuṣṭhīyamāne_anuṣṭhā karmaṇi_karman ātma--_ātman yāthātmyam_yāthātmya yaḥ_yad anusandhatte_anusaṃdhā sa_tad manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya buddhimān_buddhimat paṇḍitaḥ_paṇḍita yuktaḥ_yuj mokṣa--_mokṣa yogyaḥ_yogya kṛtsna--_kṛtsna karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt sarveṣām_sarva karma--_karman phalānām_phala ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna sukha--_sukha antarbhūta--_antarbhū tvāt_tva
BhG 4.19

lg.l: yasya_yad sarve_sarva samārambhāḥ_samārambha kāma--_kāma saṃkalpa--_saṃkalpa varjitāḥ_varjay
jñāna--_jñāna agni--_agni dagdha--_dah karmāṇam_karman tam_tad āhuḥ_ah paṇḍitam_paṇḍita budhāḥ_budha

div.p: akarma_kṛ paśyet_paś samyak_samyak ārabhyante_ārabh iti_iti samārambhāḥ_samārambha karmāṇi_karman kāmyate_kāmay iti_iti kāmaḥ_kāma phalam_phala tad--_tad saṅkalpena_saṃkalpa varjitāḥ_varjay yasya_yad bhavanti_bhū tam_tad paṇḍitam_paṇḍita āhuḥ_ah tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu yatas_yatas taiḥ_tad samārambhaiḥ_samārambha śuddhe_śudh citte_citta sati_as jātena_jan jñāna--_jñāna agninā_agni dagdhāni_dah akarma--_akarman tām_tā nītāni_nī karmāṇi_karman yasya_yad tam_tad ārūḍha--_āruh avasthāyām_avasthā tu_tu kāmaḥ_kāma phala--_phala hetu--_hetu viṣayaḥ_viṣaya tad--_tad artham_artha idam_idam kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti kartavya--_kṛ viṣayaḥ_viṣaya saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa tābhyām_tad varjitāḥ_varjay śeṣam_śeṣa spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad etat_etad paramārtha--_paramārtha darśiṇaḥ_darśin kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāna--_abhimāna abhāvena_abhāva karma--_karman ālipta--_ālip tvam_tva prapañcyate_prapañcay yasya_yad sarve_sarva iti_iti ādi_ādi brahma--_brahman karma--_karman samādhinā_samādhi iti_iti antena_anta yasya_yad pūrvokta--_pūrvokta parama--_parama artha--_artha darśinaḥ_darśin sarve_sarva yāvantaḥ_yāvat vaidikāḥ_vaidika laukikāḥ_laukika vā_vā samārambhāḥ_samārambha samārabhyante_samārabh iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti karmāṇi_karman kāma--_kāma saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa varjitāḥ_varjay kāmaḥ_kāma phala--_phala tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā saṅkalpaḥ_saṅkalpa aham_mad karomi_kṛ iti_iti loka--_loka saṅgraha--_saṃgraha atham_atha vā_vā jīvana--_jīvana mātrā--_mātrā artham_artha vā_vā prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman vegāt_vega vṛthā_vṛthak ceṣṭā--_ceṣṭā rūpāḥ_rūpa bhavanti_bhū tam_tad karma--_karman ādau_ādi akarma--_akarman ādi--_ādi darśanam_darśana jñānam_jñāna tat_tad eva_eva agniḥ_agni tena_tad dagdhāni_dah śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa karmāṇi_karman yasya_yad tad--_tad adhigamaḥ_adhigama uttara--_uttara pūrva--_pūrva ardhayoḥ_ardha aśleṣa--_aśleṣa vināśau_vināśa tad--_tad vyapadeśāt_vyapadeśa iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya jñāna--_jñāna agni--_agni dagdha--_dah karmāṇam_karman tam_tad budhāḥ_budha brahma--_brahman vidaḥ_vid paramārthataḥ_paramārtha paṇḍitam_paṇḍita āhuḥ_ah samyak_samyak darśī_darśin hi_hi paṇḍitaḥ_paṇḍita ucyate_vac na_na tu_tu bhrāntaḥ_bhram iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

vivṛṇoti_vivṛ samyak_samyak ārabhyante_ārabh iti_iti samārambhāḥ_samārambha karmāṇi_karman kāmaḥ_kāma phalam_phala tad--_tad saṅkalpena_saṃkalpa varjitāḥ_varjay jñānam_jñāna eva_eva agniḥ_agni tena_tad dagdhāni_dah karmāṇi_karman kriyamāṇāni_kṛ vihitāni_vidhā niṣiddhāni_niṣidh ca_ca yasya_yad saḥ_tad etena_etad vikarmaṇaḥ_vikarman ca_ca boddhavyam_budh iti_iti api_api vivṛtam_vivṛ etādṛśa--_etādṛśa adhikāriṇi_adhikārin karma_karman yathā_yathā akarma_akarman paśyet_paś tathā_tathā eva_eva vikarma_vikarman api_api akarma_akarman eva_eva paśyet_paś iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva ślokasya_śloka eva_eva saṅgatiḥ_saṃgati yat_yad agre_agra vakṣyate_vac

lg.l: asi_as pāpebhyaḥ_pāpa sarvebhyaḥ_sarva pāpa--_pāpa kṛttamaḥ_kṛttama
sarvam_sarva jñāna--_jñāna plavena_plava eva_eva vṛjinam_vṛjina santariṣyasi_saṃtṛ

div.p: yathā_yathā edhāṃsi_edhas samiddhaḥ_samindh agniḥ_agni bhasmasāt_bhasmasāt kurute_kṛ arjuna_arjuna jñāna--_jñāna agniḥ_agni sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman bhasmasāt_bhasmasāt kurute_kṛ tathā_tathā iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva karmaṇaḥ_karman jñāna--_jñāna ākāram_ākāra āha_ah yasya_yad iti_iti pañcabhiḥ_pañcan samārambhāḥ_samārambha karmāṇi_karman kāmyante_kāmay iti_iti kāmāḥ_kāma phalāni_phala tad--_tad saṅkalpena_saṃkalpa varjitāḥ_varjay śūnyāḥ_śūnya yasya_yad karmabhiḥ_karman ātma--_ātman uddeśinaḥ_uddeśin bhavanti_bhū tam_tad budhāḥ_budha paṇḍitam_paṇḍita ātma--_ātman jñam_jña āhuḥ_ah tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu jñāna--_jñāna iti_iti taiḥ_tad samārambhaiḥ_samārambha hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhau_viśuddhi satyām_as āvirbhūtena_āvirbhū ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna agninā_agni dagdhāni_dah saṃcitāni_saṃci karmāṇi_karman yasya_yad tam_tad
BhG 4.20

lg.l: tyaktvā_tyaj karma--_karman phala--_phala āsaṅgam_āsaṅga nitya--_nitya tṛptaḥ_tṛp nirāśrayaḥ_nirāśraya
karmaṇi_karman abhipravṛttaḥ_abhipravṛt api_api nā_na eva_eva kiṃcid_kaścit karoti_kṛ saḥ_tad

div.p: karmaṇi_karman tad--_tad phale_phala ca_ca āsaktim_āsakti tyaktvā_tyaj nityena_nitya nija--_nija ānandena_ānanda tṛptaḥ_tṛp ataeva_ataeva yoga--_yoga kṣema--_kṣema artham_artha āśrayaṇīya--_āśri rahitaḥ_rahita evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta yaḥ_yad svābhāvike_svābhāvika vihite_vidhā vā_vā karmaṇi_karman abhitas_abhitas pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt api_api kiṃcid_kaścit eva_eva nā_na eva_eva karoti_kṛ tasya_tad karma_karman akarma--_akarman tām_tā āpadyate_āpad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhavatu_bhū jñāna--_jñāna agninā_agni prāktanānām_prāktana aprārabdha--_aprārabdha karmaṇām_karman dāhaḥ_dāha āgāminām_āgāmin ca_ca anutpattiḥ_anutpatti jñāna--_jñāna utpatti--_utpatti kāle_kāla kriyamāṇam_kṛ tu_tu pūrva--_pūrva uttarayoḥ_uttara anantar_anantar bhāvāt_bhāva phalāya_phala bhavet_bhū iti_iti bhavet_bhū kasyacid_kaścit āśaṅkā_āśaṅkā tām_tad apanudati_apanud āha_ah tyaktvā_tyaj iti_iti karmaṇi_karman phale_phala ca_ca asaṅgam_asaṅga kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimānam_abhimāna bhoga--_bhoga abhilāṣam_abhilāṣa ca_ca tyaktvā_tyaj akartṛ--_akartṛ abhoktṛ--_abhoktṛ ātma--_ātman samyak_samyak darśanena_darśana bādhitvā_bādh nitya--_nitya tṛptaḥ_tṛp paramānanda--_paramānanda svarūpa--_svarūpa lābhena_lābha sarvatra_sarvatra nirākāṅkṣaḥ_nirākāṅkṣa nirāśrayaḥ_nirāśraya āśrayaḥ_āśraya deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādiḥ_ādi advaita--_advaita darśanena_darśana nirgataḥ_nirgam yasmāt_yad sa_tad nirāśrayaḥ_nirāśraya deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi abhimāna--_abhimāna śūnyaḥ_śūnya phala--_phala kāmanāyāḥ_kāmanā kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimānasya_abhimāna ca_ca nivṛttau_nivṛtti hetu--_hetu garbham_garbha krameṇa_krameṇa viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa dvayam_dvaya evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta jīvanmuktaḥ_jīvanmukta vyutthāna--_vyutthāna daśāyām_daśā
karmaṇi_karman vaidike_vaidika laukike_laukika vā_vā abhipravṛttaḥ_abhipravṛt api_api prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa loka--_loka dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi abhitas_abhitas sa_sa aṅga--_aṅga upāṅga--_upāṅga anuṣṭhānāya_anuṣṭhāna pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt api_api sva--_sva dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi na_na eva_eva kiṃcid_kaścit karoti_kṛ sa_tad niṣkriya--_niṣkriya ātma--_ātman
āśrayate_āśri

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_vac artham_artha viśadayati_viśaday tyaktvā_tyaj iti_iti karma--_karman phale_phala saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj nityena_nitya ātmanā_ātman anubhūtena_anubhū tṛptaḥ_tṛp nirāśrayaḥ_nirāśraya api_api āśraya--_āśraya rahitaḥ_rahita īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa yaḥ_yad adhikārī_adhikārin sa_tad karmaṇi_karman abhitas_abhitas pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt api_api na_na eva_eva kiṃcid_kaścit karoti_kṛ karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna apadeśena_apadeśa jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā eva_eva sampādayati_sampāday iti_iti ārurukṣoḥ_ārurukṣu daśā_daśā iyam_idam etena_etad vikarmaṇaḥ_vikarman svarūpam_svarūpa bandhaka--_bandhaka tvam_tva boddhavyam_budh iti_iti uktam_vac bhavati_bhū
BhG 4.21

lg.l: nirāśīḥ_nirāśī yata--_yam citta--_citta ātmā_ātman tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva parigrahaḥ_parigraha
śārīram_śārīra kevalam_kevala karma_karman kurvan_kṛ na_na āpnoti_āp kilbiṣam_kilbiṣa

div.p: nirgatāḥ_nirgam āśiṣaḥ_āśis kāmanāḥ_kāmanā yasmāt_yad yatam_yam niyatam_niyam cittam_citta ātmā_ātman śarīram_śarīra ca_ca yasya_yad tyaktāḥ_tyaj sarve_sarva parigrahaḥ_parigraha yena_yad sa_tad śarīram_śarīra śarīra--_śarīra mātra--_mātra nirvartyam_nirvṛt kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa rahitam_rahita kurvan_kṛ api_api kilbiṣam_kilbiṣa bandhanam_bandhana na_na prāpnoti_prāp yoga--_yoga ārūḍha--_āruh pakṣe_pakṣa śārīra--_śārīra nirvāha--_nirvāha mātra--_mātra upayogi_upayogin svābhāvikam_svābhāvika bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aṭana--_aṭana ādi_ādi kurvan_kṛ api_api kilbiṣam_kilbiṣa vihita--_vidhā akaraṇa--_akaraṇa nimitta--_nimitta doṣam_doṣa na_na prāpnoti_prāp

asti_as āha_ah nirāśīḥ_nirāśī gata--_gam tṛṣṇaḥ_tṛṣṇā yata--_yam citta--_citta ātmā_ātman cittam_citta antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa ātmā_ātman bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya sahitaḥ_sahita dehaḥ_deha tau_tad saṃyatau_saṃyam pratyāhāreṇa_pratyāhāra nigṛhītau_nigrah yena_yad saḥ_tad yatas_yatas jita--_ji indriyaḥ_indriya atas_atas vigata--_vigam tṛṣṇa--_tṛṣṇā tvāt_tva tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva parigrahaḥ_parigraha tyaktāḥ_tyaj sarve_sarva parigrahāḥ_parigraha bhoga--_bhoga upakaraṇāni_upakaraṇa yena_yad saḥ_tad etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa api_api prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa śārīram_śārīra śarīra--_śarīra sthiti--_sthiti mātra--_mātra prayojanam_prayojana kaupīna--_kaupīna ācchādana--_ācchādana ādi--_ādi grahaṇa--_grahaṇa bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aṭana--_aṭana ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa yatim_yati prati_prati śāstra--_śāstra abhyanujñātam_abhyanujñā karma_karman kāyikam_kāyika vācikam_vācika kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāna--_abhimāna śūnyam_śūnya para--_para adhyāropita--_adhyāropay kartṛ--_kartṛ tvena_tva kurvan_kṛ paramārthataḥ_paramārtha akartṛ--_akartṛ ātma--_ātman darśanāt_darśana na_na āpnoti_āp na_na prāpnoti_prāp kilbiṣam_kilbiṣa dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma phala--_phala bhūtam_bhū aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa saṃsāram_saṃsāra pāpa--_pāpa vat_vat

ye_yad tu_tu śarīra--_śarīra nirvartyam_nirvṛt śārīram_śārīra iti_iti vyācakṣate_vyācakṣ tad--_tad mate_mata kevalam_kevala karma_karman kurvan_kṛ iti_iti atas_atas adhika--_adhika artha--_artha alābhāt_alābha avyāvartaka--_avyāvartaka tvena_tva śārīra--_śārīra padasya_pada vaiyarthyam_vaiyarthya atha_atha vācika--_vācika mānasika--_mānasika vyāvartana--_vyāvartana atham_atham iti_iti brūyāt_brū tadā_tadā karma--_karman padasya_pada vihita--_vidhā mātra--_mātra paratvena_paratva śārīram_śārīra vihitam_vidhā karma_karman kurvan_kṛ na_na āpnoti_āp kilbiṣam_kilbiṣa iti_iti aprasakta--_aprasakta pratiṣedhaḥ_pratiṣedha anarthakaḥ_anarthaka
āpnoti_āp

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha ārūḍhasya_āruh daśām_daśā āha_ah nirāśīḥ_nirāśī iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri nirgatā_nirgam āśīḥ_āśī phala--_phala icchā_icchā yasmāt_yad sa_tad yata--_yam citta--_citta ātmā_ātman vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ citta--_citta dehaḥ_deha tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva parigrahaḥ_parigraha ātma--_ātman eka--_eka avalokana--_avalokana artha--_artha tvāt_tva prākṛteṣu_prākṛta vastuṣu_vastu mamatva--_mamatva varjitaḥ_varjay śārīram_śārīra karma_karman śarīra--_śarīra nirvāha--_nirvāha artham_artha karma_karman asat--_asat parigraha--_parigraha ādi_ādi kurvan_kṛ api_api kilbiṣam_kilbiṣa pāpam_pāpa na_na āpnoti_āp
BhG 4.22

lg.l: yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā lābha--_lābha santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ dvandva--_dvaṃdva atītaḥ_atī vimatsaraḥ_vimatsara
samaḥ_sama siddhau_siddhi asiddhau_asiddhi ca_ca kṛtvā_kṛ api_api na_na nibadhyate_nibandh

div.p: a_a prārthita--_prārthay upasthitaḥ_upasthā lābhaḥ_lābha yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā lābhaḥ_lābha tena_tad santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ dvandvāni_dvaṃdva śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādīni_ādi atītaḥ_atī atikrāntaḥ_atikram tad--_tad sahana--_sahana śīlaḥ_śīla iti_iti arthaḥ_artha vimatsaraḥ_vimatsara nirvairaḥ_nirvaira yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā lābhasya_lābha api_api siddhau_siddhi asiddhau_asiddhi ca_ca samaḥ_sama harṣa--_harṣa viṣāda--_viṣāda rahitaḥ_rahita yaḥ_yad evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta sa_tad pūrva--_pūrva uttara--_uttara bhūmikayoḥ_bhūmikā yathāyatham_yathāyatham vihitam_vidhā svābhāvikam_svābhāvika vā_vā karma_karman kṛtvā_kṛ api_api bandham_bandha na_na prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva parigrahasya_parigraha yateḥ_yati śarīra--_śarīra sthiti--_sthiti mātra--_mātra prayojanam_prayojana karma_karman abhyanujñātam_abhyanujñā tatra_tatra anna--_anna ācchādana--_ācchādana ādi--_ādi vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka śarīra--_śarīra sthiteḥ_sthiti asaṃbhavāt_asaṃbhava yācñā--_yācñā ādinā_ādi api_api sva--_sva prayatnena_prayatna anna--_anna yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā lābhā_lābha iti_iti śāstra--_śāstra ananumata--_ananumata prayatna--_prayatna vyatirekaḥ_vyatireka yadṛcchā_yadṛcchā tayā_tad eva_eva yaḥ_yad lābhaḥ_lābha anna--_anna ācchādana--_ācchādana ādeḥ_ādi śāstra--_śāstra anumatasya_anuman sa_tad yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā lābhaḥ_lābha tena_tad santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ tad--_tad adhika--_adhika tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā rahitaḥ_rahita śāstram_śāstra bhaikṣam_bhaikṣa caret_car yācitam_yāc upapannam_upapad yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā yācñā--_yācñā saṃkalpa--_saṃkalpa ādi--_ādi prayatnam_prayatna vārayati_vāray manuḥ_manu api_api

na_na ca_ca utpāta--_utpāta nimittābhyām_nimitta na_na nakṣatra--_nakṣatra aṅga--_aṅga vidyayā_vidyā
na_na anuśāsana--_anuśāsana vādābhyām_vāda bhikṣām_bhikṣā lipseta_lips karhicit_karhicit

yatayaḥ_yati bhikṣā--_bhikṣā artham_artha grāmam_grāma viśanti_viś iti_iti ādi--_ādi śāstra--_śāstra anumataḥ_anuman tu_tu prayatnaḥ_prayatna kartavyaḥ_kṛ eva_eva evam_evam labdhavyam_labh api_api śāstra--_śāstra niyatam_niyam eva_eva
kaupīna--_kaupīna yugalam_yugala vāsaḥ_vāsas kanthām_kanthā śīta--_śīta nivāriṇīm_nivārin pāduke_pādukā ca_ca api_api gṛhṇīyāt_grah kuryāt_kṛ na_na anyasya_anya saṅgraham_saṃgraha iti_iti ādi_ādi

evam_evam anyat_anya api_api vidhi--_vidhi niṣedha--_niṣedha rūpam_rūpa śāstram_śāstra ūhyam_ūh nanu_nanu sva--_sva prayatnam_prayatna antareṇa_antareṇa alābhe_alābha śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi pīḍitaḥ_pīḍay katham_katham jīvet_jīv atas_atas āha_ah dvandva--_dvaṃdva atīta_atī dvandvāni_dvaṃdva kṣudh--_kṣudh pipāsā--_pipāsā śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa varṣa--_varṣa ādīni_ādi atītaḥ_atī atikrāntaḥ_atikram samādhi--_samādhi daśāyām_daśā teṣām_tad vyutthāna--_vyutthāna daśāyām_daśā sphuraṇe_sphuraṇa api_api paramānanda--_paramānanda advitīya--_advitīya akartṛ--_akartṛ abhoktṛ--_abhoktṛ ātma--_ātman pratyayena_pratyaya bādhāt_bādha taiḥ_tad dvandvaiḥ_dvaṃdva upahanyamānaḥ_upahan api_api akṣubhita--_akṣubhita cittaḥ_citta ataeva_ataeva parasya_para lābhe_lābha svasya_sva alābhe_alābha ca_ca vimatsaraḥ_vimatsara para--_para utkarṣa--_utkarṣa asahana--_asahana pūrvikā_pūrvaka sva--_sva utkarṣa--_utkarṣa vāñchā_vāñchā matsaraḥ_matsara tad--_tad rahitaḥ_rahita advitīya--_advitīya ātma--_ātman darśanena_darśana nirvaira--_nirvaira buddhiḥ_buddhi ataeva_ataeva samaḥ_sama tulyaḥ_tulya yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā lābhasya_lābha siddhau_siddhi asiddhau_asiddhi ca_ca siddhau_siddhi na_na hṛṣṭaḥ_hṛṣ na_na api_api asiddhau_asiddhi viṣaṇṇaḥ_viṣad sa_tad sva--_sva anubhavena_anubhava akartā_akartṛ eva_eva paraiḥ_para āropita--_āropay kartṛ--_kartṛ tvaḥ_tva
śarīra--_śarīra sthiti--_sthiti mātra--_mātra prayojanam_prayojana bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aṭana--_aṭana ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa karma_karman kṛtvā_kṛ api_api na_na nibadhyate_nibandh bandha--_bandha hetoḥ_hetu sa_sa hetukasya_hetuka karmaṇaḥ_karman jñāna--_jñāna agninā_agni dagdha--_dah tvāt_tva iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac anuvādaḥ_anuvāda
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha śarīra--_śarīra nirvāha--_nirvāha artham_artha anna--_anna ācchādana--_ācchādana ādikam_ādika sva--_sva prayatnena_prayatna na_na sampādyam_sampāday iti_iti āha_ah yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā iti_iti yācñām_yācñā vinā_vinā eva_eva lābhaḥ_lābha yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā lābhaḥ_lābha tena_tad santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ tṛptaḥ_tṛp dvandvāni_dvaṃdva śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādīni_ādi atītaḥ_atī tad--_tad sahiṣṇuḥ_sahiṣṇu vimatsaraḥ_vimatsara anyaiḥ_anya upadrutaḥ_upadru api_api taiḥ_tad saha_saha vairam_vaira akurvan_akurvat yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā lābha--_lābha siddhau_siddhi harṣasya_harṣa tad--_tad asiddhau_asiddhi viṣādasya_viṣāda ca_ca abhāvāt_abhāva samaḥ_sama evaṃbhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta śārīram_śārīra karma_karman kṛtvā_kṛ api_api tena_tad tena_tad na_na badhyate_bandh
BhG 4.23

lg.l: gata--_gam saṅgasya_saṅga muktasya_muc jñāna--_jñāna avasthita--_avasthā cetasaḥ_cetas
yajñāya_yajña ācarataḥ_ācar karma_karman samagram_samagra pravilīyate_pravilī

div.p: gata--_gam saṅgasya_saṅga niṣkāmasya_niṣkāma rāga--_rāga ādibhiḥ_ādi muktasya_muc jñāne_jñāna avasthitam_avasthā cetaḥ_cetas yasya_yad tasya_tad yajñāya_yajña parameśvara--_parameśvara artham_artha karma_karman ācarataḥ_ācar sataḥ_as samagram_samagra sa_sa vāsanam_vāsanā karma_karman pravilīyate_pravilī akarma--_akarman bhāvam_bhāva āpadyate_āpad arūḍha--_arūḍha yoga--_yoga pakṣe_pakṣa yajñāya_yajña iti_iti yajñāya_yajña yajña--_yajña rakṣaṇa--_rakṣaṇa artham_artha loka--_loka saṃgraha--_saṃgraha artham_artha eva_eva karma_karman kurvataḥ_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva parigrahasya_parigraha yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā lābha--_lābha santuṣṭasya_saṃtuṣ yateḥ_yati yat_yad śarīra--_śarīra sthiti--_sthiti mātra--_mātra prayojanam_prayojana bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aṭana--_aṭana ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa karma_karman tat_tad kṛtvā_kṛ na_na nibadhyate_nibandh iti_iti ukte_vac gṛhasthasya_gṛhastha brahma--_brahman karma_karman tad--_tad bandha--_bandha hetuḥ_hetu syāt_as iti_iti bhavet_bhū kasyacid_kaścit āśaṅkā_āśaṅkā tām_tad apanetum_apanī tyaktvā_tyaj karma--_karman phala--_phala āsaṅgam_āsaṅga iti_iti ādinā_ādi uktam_vac vivṛṇoti_vivṛ gata--_gam saṅgasya_saṅga iti_iti gata--_gam saṅgasya_saṅga phala--_phala āsaṅga--_āsaṅga śūnyasya_śūnya muktasya_muc kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tva--_tva ādi--_ādi adhyāsa--_adhyāsa śūnyasya_śūnya jñāna--_jñāna avasthita--_avasthā cetasaḥ_cetas nirvikalpaka--_nirvikalpaka brahma--_brahman ātma--_ātman aikya--_aikya bodhe_bodha eva_eva sthitam_sthā cittam_citta yasya_yad tasya_tad sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā uttara--_uttara uttara--_uttara viśeṣaṇasya_viśeṣaṇa pūrva--_pūrva pūrva--_pūrva hetutvena_hetutva anvayaḥ_anvaya draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś gata--_gam saṅga--_saṅga tvam_tva kutas_kutas yatas_yatas adhyāsa--_adhyāsa hīna--_hā tvam_tva tat_tad kutas_kutas yatas_yatas sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajña tvam_tva iti_iti īdṛśasya_īdṛśa api_api prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa yajñāya_yajña yajña--_yajña saṃrakṣaṇa--_saṃrakṣaṇa artham_artha jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādi--_ādi yajñe_yajña śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha ācāra--_ācāra tvena_tva loka--_loka pravṛtti--_pravṛtti artham_artha yajñāya_yajña viṣṇave_viṣṇu tad--_tad prīti--_prīti artham_artha iti_iti vā_vā ācarataḥ_ācar karma_karman yajña--_yajña dāna--_dāna ādikam_ādika samagram_samagra saha_saha agreṇa_agra phalena_phala vidyate_vid iti_iti samagram_samagra pravilīyate_pravilī prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ucchedena_uccheda tattva--_tattva darśanāt_darśana vilīyate_vilī vinaśyati_vinaś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.l: ācarataḥ_ācar pravilīyate_pravilī āpadyate_āpad _

baladevaḥ_baladeva gata--_gam saṅgasya_saṅga niṣkāmasya_niṣkāma rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādibhiḥ_ādi muktasya_muc sva--_sva ātma--_ātman viṣayaka--_viṣayaka jñāna--_jñāna niviṣṭa--_niviś manasaḥ_manas yajñāya_yajña viṣṇum_viṣṇu prasādayitum_prasāday tad--_tad cintanam_cintana ācarataḥ_ācar prācīnam_prācīna bandhakam_bandhaka karma_karman samagram_samagra

div.p: BhG 4.24

lg.l: brahma_brahman arpaṇam_arpaṇa brahma_brahman haviḥ_havis brahma_brahman agnau_agni brahmaṇā_brahman hutam_hu
brahma_brahman eva_eva tena_tad gantavyam_gam brahma--_brahman karma--_karman samādhinā_samādhi

div.p: āruḍha--_āruh avasthāyām_avasthā tu_tu akartṛ--_akartṛ ātma--_ātman jñānena_jñāna bādhita--_bādh tvāt_tva svābhāvikam_svābhāvika api_api karma--_karman karma_karman eva_eva iti_iti karmaṇi_karman akarma_akarman yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś iti_iti anena_idam uktaḥ_vac karma--_karman pravilayaḥ_pravilaya prapañcitaḥ_prapañcita idānīm_idānīm karmaṇi_karman tad--_tad aṅgeṣu_aṅga ca_ca brahma_brahman eva_eva anusyūtam_anusīv paśyataḥ_dṛś karma--_karman pravilayam_pravilaya āha_ah brahmārpaṇam_brahmārpaṇa iti_iti arpyate_arpay anena_idam iti_iti arpaṇam_arpaṇa sruv--_sruva ādi_ādi tat_tad api_api brahma_brahman eva_eva arpyamāṇam_arpay haviḥ_havis api_api ghṛta--_ghṛta ādikam_ādika brahmā_brahman eva_eva brahma_brahman eva_eva agniḥ_agni tasmin_tad brahmaṇā_brahman kartrā_kartṛ hutam_hu homaḥ_homa agniḥ_agni ca_ca kartā_kartṛ ca_ca kriyā_kriyā ca_ca brahmā_brahman eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam brahmaṇi_brahman eva_eva karma--_karman ātmake_ātmaka samādhiḥ_samādhi citta--_citta aikāgryam_aikāgrya yasya_yad tena_tad brahma_brahman eva_eva gantavyam_gam prāpyam_prāp na_na tu_tu phala--_phala antaram_antara iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu kriyamāṇam_kṛ karma_karman phalam_phala a_a janayitvā_janay eva_eva kutas_kutas naśyati_naś brahma--_brahman bodhe_bodha tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ucchedāt_uccheda iti_iti āha_ah brahma--_brahman arpaṇam_arpaṇa iti_iti aneka--_aneka kāraka--_kāraka sādhyā_sādhay hi_hi yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi kriyā_kriyā bhavati_bhū devatā--_devatā uddeśena_uddeśa hi_hi dravya--_dravya tyāgaḥ_tyāga yāgaḥ_yāga saḥ_tad eva_eva tyajyamāna--_tyaj dravyasya_dravya agnau_agni prakṣepāt_prakṣepa dhomaḥ_dhoma iti_iti ucyate_vac tatra_tatra uddeśyā_uddiś devatā_devatā sampradānam_sampradāna tyajyamānam_tyaj dravyam_dravya haviḥ--_havis śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac sākṣāt_sākṣāt dhātu--_dhātu artha--_artha karma_karman tat_tad phalam_phala tu_tu svarga--_svarga ādi_ādi vyavahitam_vyavadhā bhāvanā--_bhāvanā karma_karman evam_evam dhāraka--_dhāraka tvena_tva haviṣaḥ_havis agnau_agni prakṣepe_prakṣepa sādhakatama--_sādhakatama tayā_tā juhū--_juhū ādi_ādi karaṇam_karaṇa prakāśaka--_prakāśaka tayā_tā mantra--_mantra ādi_ādi iti_iti karaṇam_karaṇa api_api kāraka--_kāraka jñāpaka--_jñāpaka bhedena_bheda dvividham_dvividha evam_evam tyāgaḥ_tyāga agnau_agni prakṣepaḥ_prakṣepa ca_ca dve_dvi kriye_kriyā tatra_tatra adyāyām_adya yajamānaḥ_yaj kartā_kartṛ prakṣepe_prakṣepa tu_tu yajamāna--_yaj parikrītaḥ_parikrī adhvaryuḥ_adhvaryu prakṣepa--_prakṣepa adhikaraṇam_adhikaraṇa ca_ca agniḥ_agni evam_evam deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla ādikam_ādika api_api adhikaraṇam_adhikaraṇa sarva--_sarva kriyā--_kriyā sādhāraṇam_sādhāraṇa draṣṭavyam_dṛś

tat_tad evam_evam sarveṣām_sarva kriyā--_kriyā kāraka--_kāraka ādi--_ādi vyavahārāṇām_vyavahāra brahma--_brahman jñāna--_jñāna kalpitānām_kalpay rajju--_rajju ajñāna--_ajñāna kalpitānām_kalpay sarpa--_sarpa dhārā--_dhārā daṇḍa--_daṇḍa ādīnām_ādi rajju--_rajju tattva--_tattva jñānena_jñāna iva_iva brahma--_brahman tattva--_tattva jñānena_jñāna bādhe_bādha badhita--_bandh dṛśyamānaḥ_dṛś api_api dagdha--_dah paṭa--_paṭa nyāyena_nyāya na_na phalāya_phala kalpate_kﾱp iti_iti anena_idam ślokena_śloka pratipādyate_pratipāday brahma--_brahman dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi eva_eva ca_ca sarva--_sarva yajña--_yajña ātmikā_ātmaka iti_iti stūyate_stu

tathā_tathā hi_hi arpyate_arpay anena_idam iti_iti karaṇa--_karaṇa vyutpattyā_vyutpatti arpaṇam_arpaṇa juhū--_juhū ādi_ādi mantra--_mantra ādi_ādi ca_ca evam_evam arpyate_arpay asmai_idam iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti arpaṇam_arpaṇa devatā--_devatā rūpam_rūpa sampradānam_sampradāna evam_evam arpyate_arpay asmin_idam iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti arpaṇam_arpaṇa adhikaraṇam_adhikaraṇa deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla ādi_ādi tat_tad sarvam_sarva brahmaṇi_brahman kalpita--_kalpay tvāt_tva brahmā_brahman eva_eva rajju--_rajju kalpita--_kalpay bhujaṅga--_bhujaṃga vat_vat adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka asat_asat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam haviḥ--_havis tyāga--_tyāga prakṣepa--_prakṣepa kriyayoḥ_kriyā sākṣāt_sākṣāt karma_karman kārakam_kāraka tat_tad api_api brahmā_brahman eva_eva evam_evam yatra_yatra prakṣipyate_prakṣip agnau_agni saḥ_tad api_api brahmā_brahman eva_eva brahma--_brahman agnau_agni iti_iti samastam_samasta padam_pada tathā_tathā yena_yad kartrā_kartṛ yajamānena_yaj adhvaryuṇā_adhvaryu ca_ca tyajyate_tyaj prakṣipyate_prakṣip ca_ca tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya api_api kartṛ--_kartṛ kārakam_kāraka kartari_kartṛ vihitayā_vidhā tṛtīyayā_tṛtīyā anūdya_anuvad brahma_brahman iti_iti brahmaṇā_brahman iti_iti evam_evam hutam_hu iti_iti havanam_havana tyāga--_tyāga kriyā_kriyā prakṣepa--_prakṣepa kriyā_kriyā ca_ca tat_tad api_api brahma_brahman eva_eva tathā_tathā yena_yad havanena_havana yat_yad gantavyam_gam svarga--_svarga ādi_ādi vyavahitam_vyavadhā karma_karman tat_tad api_api brahmā_brahman eva_eva atratyaḥ_atratya eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra sarvatra_sarvatra sambadhyate_sambandh hutam_hu iti_iti atra_atra api_api itas_itas eva_eva brahma_brahman iti_iti anuṣajyate_anuṣañj vyavadhāna--_vyavadhāna abhāvāt_abhāva sākāṅkṣa--_sākāṅkṣa tvāt_tva ca_ca cit--_cit patiḥ_pati tvā_tvad punātu_pū iti_iti ādau_ādi acchidreṇa_acchidra ityādi--_ityādi para--_para vākya--_vākya śeṣa--_śeṣa vat_vat

anena_idam rūpeṇa_rūpa karmaṇi_karman samādhiḥ_samādhi brahma--_brahman jñānam_jñāna yasya_yad sa_tad karma--_karman samādhiḥ_samādhi tena_tad brahma--_brahman vidā_vid karma--_karman anuṣṭhātrā_anuṣṭhātṛ api_api brahma_brahman paramānanda--_paramānanda advayam_advaya gantavyam_gam iti_iti anuṣajyate_anuṣañj sākāṅkṣa--_sākāṅkṣa tvāt_tva avyavadhānāt_avyavadhāna ca_ca yā_yad te_tvad agne_agni rajā--_rajā śayā_śaya iti_iti ādau_ādi tanūḥ_tanū varṣiṣṭhā_varṣiṣṭha iyādi--_iyādi pūrva--_pūrva vākya--_vākya śeṣa--_śeṣa vat_vat

athavā_athavā arpyate_arpay asmai_idam phalāya_phala iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti arpaṇa--_arpaṇa padena_pada eva_eva svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi phalam_phala api_api grāhyam_grah tathā_tathā ca_ca brahma_brahman eva_eva tena_tad gantavyam_gam brahma--_brahman karma--_karman samādhinā_samādhi iti_iti uttara--_uttara ardham_ardha jñāna--_jñāna phala--_phala kathanāya_kathana eva_eva iti_iti samañjasam_samañjasa asmin_idam pakṣe_pakṣa brahma--_brahman karma--_karman samādhinā_samādhi iti_iti ekam_eka vā_vā padam_pada pūrvam_pūrva brahma--_brahman padam_pada hutam_hu iti_iti anena_idam sambadhyate_sambandh caramam_carama gantavya--_gam padena_pada iti_iti bhinnam_bhid vā_vā padam_pada evam_evam ca_ca na_na anuṣaṅga--_anuṣaṅga dvaya--_dvaya kleśaḥ_kleśa iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś brahma_brahman gantavyam_gam iti_iti abhedena_abheda eva_eva tad--_tad prāptiḥ_prāpti upacārāt_upacāra ataeva_ataeva na_na svarga--_svarga ādi_ādi tuccha--_tuccha phalam_phala tena_tad gantavyam_gam vidyayā_vidyā avidyaka--_avidyaka kāraka--_kāraka vyavahāra--_vyavahāra ucchedāt_uccheda tat_tad uktam_vac vārtika--_vārttika kṛdbhiḥ_kṛt
kāraka--_kāraka vyavahāre_vyavahāra hi_hi śuddham_śudh vastu_vastu na_na vīkṣyate_vīkṣ śuddhe_śudh vastuni_vastu siddhe_sidh ca_ca kāraka--_kāraka vyāvṛttiḥ_vyāvṛtti kutas_kutas
div.l: arpaṇa--_arpaṇa ādi--_ādi kāraka--_kāraka sva--_sva rupa--_rupa an_an upamardena_upamarda eva_eva tatra_tatra nāma--_nāman ādau_ādi iva_iva brahma--_brahman dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi kṣipyate_kṣip sampad--_sampad mātreṇa_mātra phala--_phala viśeṣāya_viśeṣa iti_iti keṣāṃcid_kaścit vyākhyānam_vyākhyāna bhāṣyakṛdbhiḥ_bhāṣyakṛt eva_eva nirākṛtam_nirākṛ upakrama--_upakrama ādi--_ādi sampad--_sampad mātrasya_mātra aprasakta--_aprasakta tvāt_tva iti_iti ādi_ādi yuktibhiḥ_yukti
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sa_tad yajñaḥ_yajña eva_eva kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah brahma_brahman iti_iti arpyate_arpay anena_idam iti_iti arpaṇam_arpaṇa juhū--_juhū ādi_ādi tat_tad api_api brahma_brahman eva_eva arpyamāṇam_arpay haviḥ_havis api_api brahmā_brahman eva_eva brahma_brahman eva_eva agnau_agni iti_iti havana--_havana adhikaraṇam_adhikaraṇa agniḥ_agni api_api brahmā_brahman eva_eva evam_evam vivekatavatā_vivekatavat puṃsā_puṃs brahma_brahman eva_eva gantavyam_gam na_na tu_tu phala--_phala antaram_antara kutas_kutas brahma--_brahman ātmakam_ātmaka yat_yad karma_karman tatra_tatra eva_eva samādhiḥ_samādhi citta--_citta aikāgryam_aikāgrya yasya_yad tena_tad

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam vivikta--_vivic jīvātma--_jīvātman anusandhi--_anusaṃdhi garbha--_garbha tayā_tā sva--_sva vihitasya_vidhā karmaṇaḥ_karman jñāna--_jñāna ākāra--_ākāra tām_tā abhidhāya_abhidhā sa_sa aṅgasya_aṅga tasya_tad parātma--_parātman rūpa--_rūpa tā--_tā anusandhinā_anusaṃdhi tad--_tad ākāra--_ākāra tām_tā āha_ah brahma--_brahman arpaṇam_arpaṇa iti_iti arpyate_arpay anena_idam ātmā_ātman eva_eva iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti arpaṇam_arpaṇa sruvam_sruva mantra--_mantra adhidaivatam_adhidaivata ca_ca indra--_indra ādi_ādi tat_tad tat_tad ca_ca brahmā_brahman eva_eva arpyamāṇam_arpay haviḥ_havis ca_ca ājya--_ājya ādi_ādi tat_tad api_api brahmā_brahman eva_eva tat_tad ca_ca haviḥ_havis homa--_homa ādhāre_ādhāra agnau_agni brahmaṇi_brahman yajamānena_yaj adhvaryuṇā_adhvaryu ca_ca brahmaṇā_brahman hutam_hu tyaktam_tyaj prakṣiptam_prakṣip ca_ca agniḥ_agni yajamānaḥ_yaj adhvaryuḥ_adhvaryu ca_ca brahmā_brahman eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha brahma--_brahman agnau_agni iti_iti atra_atra ṇi--_ṇi kāra--_kāra lopaḥ_lopa chāndasaḥ_chāndasa na_na ca_ca samastam_samasta padam_pada iti_iti vācyam_vac agnau_agni brahma--_brahman dṛṣṭeḥ_dṛṣṭi vidheya--_vidhā tvāt_tva ittham_ittham ca_ca brahma--_brahman rūpe_rūpa sa_sa aṅge_aṅga karmaṇi_karman samādhiḥ_samādhi citta--_citta aikāgryam_aikāgrya yasya_yad tena_tad mumukṣuṇā_mumukṣu brahma_brahman eva_eva gantavyam_gam sva--_sva svarūpam_svarūpa para--_para svarūpam_svarūpa ca_ca labhyam_labh avalokyam_avalokay iti_iti vijñānam_vijñāna brahma_brahman ced_ced veda_vid iti_iti ādau_ādi jīve_jīva brahma--_brahman śabdaḥ_śabda vijñānam_vijñāna ānandam_ānanda brahma_brahman iti_iti ādau_ādi paramātmani_paramātman ca_ca brahma--_brahman arpaṇa--_arpaṇa tva--_tva ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa yogāt_yoga na_na asya_idam prakaraṇasya_prakaraṇa paunaruktam_paunarukta sruva--_sruva ādīnām_ādi brahmatvam_brahmatva tad--_tad āyatta--_āyat vṛttika--_vṛttika tvāt_tva tad--_tad vāpya--_vāpay tvāt_tva ca_ca iti_iti vyākhyātāraḥ_vyākhyātṛ tādṛśa--_tādṛśa tayā_tā anusandhitam_anusaṃdhā karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna ākāram_ākāra sat_as tat_tad avalokanāya_avalokana kalpyate_kalpay
BhG 4.25

lg.l: daivam_daiva eva_eva apare_apara yajñam_yajña yoginaḥ_yogin paryupāsate_paryupās
brahma--_brahman agnau_agni apare_apara yajñam_yajña yajñena_yajña eva_eva upajuhvati_upahu

div.p: āha_ah ādibhiḥ_ādi aṣṭabhiḥ_aṣṭan devāḥ_deva indra--_indra varuṇa--_varuṇa ādayaḥ_ādi ijyante_yaj yasmin_yad eva_eva kāreṇa_kāra indra--_indra ādiṣu_ādi brahma--_brahman buddhi--_buddhi rāhityam_rāhitya darśitam_darśay tam_tad daivam_daiva eva_eva yajñam_yajña apare_apara karma--_karman yoginaḥ_yogin paryupāsate_paryupās śraddhayā_śraddhā anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā apare_apara tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna yoginaḥ_yogin brahma--_brahman rūpe_rūpa agnau_agni apare_apara yajñena_yajña eva_eva upāyena_upāya brahma--_brahman arpaṇam_arpaṇa iti_iti ādi_ādi ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra yajñam_yajña upajuhvati_upahu yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman pravilāpayanti_pravilāpay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha saḥ_tad ayam_idam jñāna--_jñāna yajñaḥ_yajña 25_25

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_adhunā samyak_samyak darśanasya_darśana yajña--_yajña rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva stāvaka--_stāvaka tayā_tā brahmārpaṇa--_brahmārpaṇa mantre_mantra sthite_sthā punar_punar api_api tasya_tad stuti--_stuti artham_artha itarāni_itara ajñān_ajña upanyasyati_upanyas daivam_daiva iti_iti devāḥ_deva indra--_indra agni--_agni ādayaḥ_ādi ijyante_yaj yena_yad sa_tad daivaḥ_daiva tam_tad eva_eva yajñam_yajña darśa--_darśa pūrṇamāsa--_pūrṇamāsa jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa apare_apara yoginaḥ_yogin paryupāsate_paryupās sarvadā_sarvadā kurvanti_kṛ na_na jñāna--_jñāna yajñam_yajña evam_evam karma--_karman yajñam_yajña uktvā_vac antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi dvāreṇa_dvāra tad--_tad phala--_phala bhūtam_bhū jñāna--_jñāna yajñam_yajña āha_ah brahma--_brahman agnau_agni satya--_satya jñāna--_jñāna ananta--_ananta ānanda--_ānanda rūpam_rūpa nirasta--_niras samasta--_samasta viśeṣam_viśeṣa brahma_brahman tad--_tad padārthaḥ_padārtha tasmin_tad agnau_agni yajñena_yajña eva_eva yajña--_yajña śabdaḥ_śabda ātma--_ātman nāmasu_nāman yāskena_yāska paṭhitaḥ_paṭh itthambhūta--_itthambhūta lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa tṛtīyā_tṛtīyā tvam_tvad padārtha--_padārtha abhedena_abheda eva_eva upajuhvati_upahu tad--_tad svarūpa--_svarūpa tayā_tā paśyanti_paś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha apare_apara pūrva--_pūrva vilakṣaṇāḥ_vilakṣaṇa tattva--_tattva darśana--_darśana niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭha saṃnyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.l: jīva--_jīva brahma--_brahman abheda--_abheda darśanam_darśana yajña--_yajña tvena_tva sampādya_sampāday tad--_tad sādhana--_sādhana yajña--_yajña madhye_madhya paṭhyate_paṭh śreyān_śreyas dravya--_dravya mayāt_maya yajñāt_yajña jñāna--_jñāna yajñaḥ_yajña iti_iti ādinā_ādi stotum_stu
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha vartante_vṛt tān_tad tvam_tvad śṛṇu_śru iti_iti āha_ah daivam_daiva eva_eva iti_iti aṣṭabhiḥ_aṣṭan devāḥ_deva indra--_indra varuṇa--_varuṇa ādayaḥ_ādi ijyante_yaj yasmin_yad tam_tad daivam_daiva iti_iti indra--_indra ādiṣu_ādi brahma--_brahman buddhi--_buddhi rāhityam_rāhitya darśitam_darśay sā_tad asya_idam devatā_devatā iti_iti aṇ_aṇ yoginaḥ_yogin karma--_karman yoginaḥ_yogin apare_apara jñāna--_jñāna yoginaḥ_yogin tu_tu brahma_brahman paramātmā_paramātman eva_eva agniḥ_agni tasmin_tad tad--_tad padārthe_padārtha yajñam_yajña haviḥ--_havis sthānīyam_sthānīya tvam_tvad padārtham_padārtha jīvam_jīva yajñena_yajña praṇava--_praṇava rūpeṇa_rūpa mantreṇa_mantra eva_eva juhvati_hu ayam_idam eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna yajñaḥ_yajña agre_agra stoṣyate_stu atra_atra yajñam_yajña yajñena_yajña iti_iti śabdau_śabda karma--_karman karaṇa--_karaṇa sādhanau_sādhana prathama--_prathama atiśayoktyā_atiśayokti śuddha--_śuddha jīva--_jīva praṇavau_praṇava āhatuḥ_ah 25_25

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam brahma--_brahman anusandhi--_anusaṃdhi garbha--_garbha tayā_tā ca_ca karmaṇaḥ_karman jñāna--_jñāna ākāra--_ākāra tām_tā nirūpya_nirūpay karma--_karman yoga--_yoga bhedān_bheda āha_ah daivam_daiva iti_iti daivam_daiva indra--_indra ādi--_ādi deva--_deva arcana--_arcana rūpam_rūpa yajñam_yajña apare_apara yoginaḥ_yogin paryupāsate_paryupās tatra_tatra eva_eva niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā kurvanti_kṛ apare_apara brahma--_brahman arpaṇam_arpaṇa iti_iti ādi--_ādi nyāyena_nyāya brahma--_brahman bhūta--_bhū agnau_agni yajñena_yajña sruva--_sruva ādinā_ādi yajñam_yajña ghṛta--_ghṛta ādi--_ādi havī--_havis rūpam_rūpa juhvati_hu home_homa eva_eva niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā kurvati_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 25_25
BhG 4.26

lg.l: śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi indriyāṇi_indriya anye_anya saṃyama--_saṃyama agniṣu_agni juhvati_hu
śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi viṣayān_viṣaya anye_anya indriya--_indriya agniṣu_agni juhvati_hu

div.p: anye_anya naiṣṭhikīḥ_naiṣṭhikin brahmacāriṇaḥ_brahmacārin tad--_tad tad--_tad indriya--_indriya saṃyama--_saṃyama rūpeṣu_rūpa agniṣu_agni śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi juhvati_hu pravilāpayanti_pravilāpay indriyāṇi_indriya nirudhya_nirudh saṃyama--_saṃyama pradhānāḥ_pradhāna tiṣṭhanti_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha indriyāṇi_indriya eva_eva agnayaḥ_agni teṣu_tad śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi anye_anya gṛhasthāḥ_gṛhastha juhvati_hu viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga samaye_samaya api_api anāsaktāḥ_anāsakta santaḥ_as agni--_agni tvena_tva bhāviteṣu_bhāvay indriyeṣu_indriya haviḥ--_havis tvena_tva bhāvitān_bhāvay śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi prakṣipanti_prakṣip iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 26_26
div.l: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi indriyāṇi_indriya anye_anya saṃyama--_saṃyama agniṣu_agni juhvati_hu śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi viṣayān_viṣaya anye_anya indriya--_indriya agniṣu_agni juhvati_hu
