div.p: saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama saṃyatam_saṃyam manaḥ_manas eva_eva agnayaḥ_agni teṣu_tad juhvati_hu śuddhe_śudh manasi_manas indriyāṇi_indriya pravlāpayanti_pravlāpay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha anye_anya tatas_tatas nyūnāḥ_nyūna brahmacāriṇaḥ_brahmacārin śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi viṣayāni_viṣaya indriya--_indriya agniṣu_agni indriyāṇi_indriya eva_eva agnayaḥ_agni teṣu_tad juhvati_hu śabda--_śabda ādīni_ādi indriyeṣu_indriya pravilāpayanti_pravilāpay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 26_26

baladevaḥ_baladeva śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi iti_iti anye_anya naiṣṭhika--_naiṣṭhika brahmacāriṇaḥ_brahmacārin saṃyama--_saṃyama agniṣu_agni tad--_tad tad--_tad indriya--_indriya saṃyama--_saṃyama rūpeṣu_rūpa agniṣu_agni śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi juhvati_hu tāni_tad nirudhya_nirudh saṃyama--_saṃyama pradhānāḥ_pradhāna tiṣṭhanti_sthā anye_anya gṛhiṇaḥ_gṛhin indriya--_indriya agniṣu_agni agni--_agni tvena_tva bhāviteṣu_bhāvay śrotra--_śrotra ādiṣu_ādi śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi upajuhvati_upahu anāsaktyā_anāsakti tān_tad bhuñjānāḥ_bhuj tāni_tad tad--_tad pravaṇāni_pravaṇa kurvanti_kṛ 26_26
BhG 4.27

lg.l: sarvāṇi_sarva indriya--_indriya karmāṇi_karman prāṇa--_prāṇa karmāṇi_karman ca_ca apare_apara
ātma--_ātman saṃyama--_saṃyama yoga--_yoga agnau_agni juhvati_hu jñāna--_jñāna dīpite_dīpay

div.p: apare_apara dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā buddhīndriyāṇām_buddhīndriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīnām_ādi karmāṇi_karman śravaṇa--_śravaṇa darśana--_darśana ādīni_ādi karmendriyāṇām_karmendriya vāc--_vāc pāṇi--_pāṇi ādīnām_ādi karmāṇi_karman vacana--_vacana upādāna--_upādāna ādīni_ādi prāṇānām_prāṇa ca_ca daśānām_daśan karmāṇi_karman prāṇasya_prāṇa bahis_bahis gamanam_gamana apānasya_apāna adhas_adhas nayanam_nayana vyānasya_vyāna vyānayanam_vyānayana ākuñcana--_ākuñcana prasāraṇa--_prasāraṇa ādi_ādi samānasya_samāna aśita--_aś pīta--_pā ādīnām_ādi samunnayanam_samunnayana udānasya_udāna ūrdhva--_ūrdhva nayanam_nayana

udgāre_udgāra nāgaḥ_nāga ākhyātaḥ_ākhyā kūrmaḥ_kūrma tu_tu unmīlane_unmīlana smṛtaḥ_smṛ kṛkaraḥ_kṛkara kṣudh--_kṣudh karaḥ_kara jñeyaḥ_jñā devadattaḥ_devadatta vijṛmbhaṇe_vijṛmbhaṇa
na_na jahāti_hā mṛte_mṛ kvāpi_kvāpi sarvavyāpī_sarvavyāpin dhanaṃjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya

iti_iti evam_evam rūpāṇi_rūpa juhvati_hu saḥ_tad eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga saḥ_tad eva_eva agniḥ_agni tasmin_tad jñānena_jñāna dhyeya--_dhyā viṣayeṇa_viṣaya dīpite_dīpay prajvalite_prajval dhyeyam_dhyā samyak_samyak jñātvā_jñā tasmin_tad manaḥ_manas saṃyamya_saṃyam tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman uparamayanti_uparamay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 27_27

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad ananyatvam_ananyatva ārambhaṇa--_ārambhaṇa śabda--_śabda ādibhyaḥ_ādi sarvāṇi_sarva indriyāṇi_indriya tad--_tad karmāṇi_karman śravaṇa--_śravaṇa darśanāni_darśana sarvāṇi_sarva indriya--_indriya karmāṇi_karman prāṇa--_prāṇa karmāṇi_karman ca_ca apare_apara ātma--_ātman saṃyama--_saṃyama yoga--_yoga agnau_agni juhvati_hu jñāna--_jñāna dīpite_dīpay 27_27

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha apare_apara śuddha--_śudh tvam_tva padārtha--_padārtha vijñāḥ_vijña sarvāṇi_sarva indriyāṇi_indriya tad--_tad karmāṇi_karman śravaṇa--_śravaṇa darśana--_darśana ādīni_ādi ca_ca prāṇa--_prāṇa karmāṇi_karman daśa--_daśan prāṇāḥ_prāṇa tad--_tad karmāṇi_karman ca_ca prāṇasya_prāṇa bahis_bahis gamanam_gamana apānasya_apāna adhas_adhas nayanam_nayana samānasya_samāna bhukta--_bhuj pīta--_pā ādīnām_ādi samīkaraṇam_samīkaraṇa udānasya_udāna uccais_uccais nayanam_nayana vyānasya_vyāna viṣvak--_viṣvañc nayanam_nayana

udgāre_udgāra nāgaḥ_nāga ākhyātaḥ_ākhyā kūrmaḥ_kūrma tu_tu unmīlane_unmīlana smṛtaḥ_smṛ kṛkaraḥ_kṛkara kṣudh--_kṣudh karaḥ_kara jñeyaḥ_jñā devadattaḥ_devadatta vijṛmbhaṇe_vijṛmbhaṇa
na_na jahāti_hā mṛte_mṛ kvāpi_kvāpi sarvavyāpī_sarvavyāpin dhanaṃjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya

iti_iti evam_evam daśa--_daśan prāṇāḥ_prāṇa tad--_tad karmāṇi_karman ātmanaḥ_ātman tvam_tvad padārthasya_padārtha saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama śuddhiḥ_śuddhi eva_eva agniḥ_agni tasmin_tad juhvati_hu manaḥ--_manas buddhi--_buddhi ādi--_ādi indriyāṇi_indriya daśa--_daśan prāṇān_prāṇa ca_ca pravilāpayanti_pravilāpay ekaḥ_eka pratyak_pratyañc ātmā_ātman eva_eva asti_as na_na anye_anya manaḥ_manas ādāya_ādā iti_iti bhāvayanti_bhāvay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 27_27

baladevaḥ_baladeva sarvāṇi_sarva iti_iti apare_apara indriya--_indriya karmāṇi_karman prāṇa--_prāṇa karmāṇi_karman ca_ca ātma--_ātman saṃyama--_saṃyama yoga--_yoga agnau_agni ca_ca juhvati_hu ātmanaḥ_ātman manasaḥ_manas saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama saḥ_tad eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga tasmin_tad agni--_agni tvena_tva bhāvite_bhāvay juhvati_hu manasā_manas indriyāṇām_indriya prāṇānām_prāṇa ca_ca karma--_karman pravaṇa--_pravaṇa tām_tā nivārayitum_nivāray prayatante_prayat indriyāṇām_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīnām_ādi karmāṇi_karman śabda--_śabda grahaṇa--_grahaṇa ādīni_ādi prāṇa--_prāṇa karmāṇi_karman prāṇasya_prāṇa bahis_bahis gamanam_gamana karma_karman apānasya_apāna adhas_adhas gamanam_gamana vyānasya_vyāna nikhila--_nikhila deha--_deha vyāpanam_vyāpana ākuñcana--_ākuñcana prasāraṇa--_prasāraṇa ādi_ādi samānasya_samāna aśita--_aś udānasya_udāna ūrdhva--_ūrdhva nayanam_nayana ca_ca iti_iti evam_evam bodhyāni_budh sarvāṇi_sarva sāmastyena_sāmastya jñāna--_jñāna dīpite_dīpay ātma--_ātman anusandhāna--_anusaṃdhāna ujjvalite_ujjval 27_27
BhG 4.28

lg.l: dravya--_dravya yajñāḥ_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas yajñāḥ_yajña yoga--_yoga yajñāḥ_yajña tathā_tathā apare_apara
svādhyāya--_svādhyāya jñāna--_jñāna yajñāḥ_yajña ca_ca yatayaḥ_yati saṃśita--_saṃśita vratāḥ_vrata

div.p: dravya--_dravya dānam_dāna eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña yeṣām_yad te_tad dravya--_dravya yajñāḥ_yajña kṛcchra--_kṛcchra cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādi_ādi tapaḥ_tapas eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña yeṣām_yad te_tad eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña yeṣām_yad te_tad tapaḥ--_tapas yajñāḥ_yajña yogaḥ_yoga aṣṭa--_aṣṭan aṅgaḥ_aṅga eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña yeṣām_yad te_tad yoga--_yoga yajñāḥ_yajña svādhyāyena_svādhyāya vedena_veda śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana ādinā_ādi yat_yad tat_tad artha--_artha jñānam_jñāna tat_tad eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña yeṣām_yad te_tad svādhyāya--_svādhyāya jñāna--_jñāna yajñāḥ_yajña yat_yat vā_vā veda--_veda pāṭha--_pāṭha yajñāḥ_yajña tad--_tad artha--_artha jñāna--_jñāna yajñāḥ_yajña ca_ca iti_iti dvividhāḥ_dvividha yatayaḥ_yati prayatna--_prayatna śīlāḥ_śīla samyak_samyak śitam_śā tīkṣṇīkṛtam_tīkṣṇīkṛ vratam_vrata yeṣām_yad te_tad 28_28
div.l: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana dravya--_dravya yajñāḥ_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas yajñāḥ_yajña yoga--_yoga yajñāḥ_yajña tathā_tathā apare_apara svādhyāya--_svādhyāya jñāna--_jñāna yajñāḥ_yajña ca_ca yatayaḥ_yati saṃśita--_saṃśita vratāḥ_vrata
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha dravya--_dravya dānam_dāna eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña yeṣām_yad te_tad dravya--_dravya yajñāḥ_yajña tapaḥ_tapas kṛcchra--_kṛcchra cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādi_ādi eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña yeṣām_yad te_tad tapaḥ--_tapas yajñāḥ_yajña yogaḥ_yoga aṣṭa--_aṣṭan aṅgaḥ_aṅga eva_eva yajñaḥ_yajña yeṣām_yad te_tad yoga--_yoga yajñāḥ_yajña svādhyāyaḥ_svādhyāya vedasya_veda pāṭhaḥ_pāṭha tad--_tad arthasya_artha jñānam_jñāna ca_ca yajñaḥ_yajña yeṣām_yad te_tad yatayaḥ_yati yatna--_yatna parāḥ_para sarve_sarva ete_etad samyak_samyak śitam_śā tīkṣṇīkṛtam_tīkṣṇīkṛ vratam_vrata yeṣām_yad te_tad 28_28

baladevaḥ_baladeva dravya--_dravya iti_iti kecid_kaścit karma--_karman yoginaḥ_yogin dravya--_dravya yajñāḥ_yajña anna--_anna ādi--_ādi dāna--_dāna parāḥ_para kecid_kaścit tapaḥ--_tapas yajñāḥ_yajña kṛcchra--_kṛcchra cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādi--_ādi vrata--_vrata parāḥ_para kecid_kaścit svādhyāya--_svādhyāya jñāna--_jñāna yajñāḥ_yajña veda--_veda abhyāsa--_abhyāsa parāḥ_para tad--_tad artha--_artha abhyāsa--_abhyāsa parāḥ_para ca_ca yatayaḥ_yati tatra_tatra prayatna--_prayatna śīlāḥ_śīla saṃśita--_saṃśita vratāḥ_vrata tīkṣṇa--_tīkṣṇa tad--_tad tad--_tad ācaraṇāḥ_ācaraṇa 28_28
BhG 4.29

lg.l: apāne_apāna juhvati_hu prāṇam_prāṇa prāṇe_prāṇa apānam_apāna tathā_tathā apare_apara
prāṇa--_prāṇa apāna--_apāna gatīḥ_gati ruddhvā_rudh prāṇāyāma--_prāṇāyāma parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa

div.p: apāne_apāna adhas_adhas vṛttau_vṛtti prāṇam_prāṇa ūrdhva--_ūrdhva vṛttim_vṛtti pūrakeṇa_pūraka juhvati_hu pūraka--_pūraka kāle_kāla prāṇam_prāṇa apānena_apāna ekīkurvanti_ekīkṛ tathā_tathā kumbhakena_kumbhaka prāṇa--_prāṇa apānayoḥ_apāna ūrdhva--_ūrdhva adhas_adhas gatī_gati ruddhvā_rudh recaka--_recaka kāle_kāla apānam_apāna prāṇe_prāṇa juhvati_hu evam_evam pūraka--_pūraka kumbhaka--_kumbhaka recakaiḥ_recaka prāṇāyāma--_prāṇāyāma parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa apare_apara iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka ca_ca apare_apara iti_iti apare_apara tu_tu āhāra--_āhāra saṅkocam_saṃkoca abhyasyantaḥ_abhyas svayam_svayam eva_eva jīryamāṇeṣu_jṛ indriyeṣu_indriya tad--_tad tad--_tad indriya--_indriya vṛtti--_vṛtti layam_laya bhāvayanti_bhāvay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

yat_yat vā_vā apāne_apāna juhvati_hu prāṇam_prāṇa prāṇe_prāṇa apānam_apāna tathā_tathā apare_apara iti_iti anena_idam pūraka--_pūraka recakayoḥ_recaka āvartamānayoḥ_āvṛt haṃsaḥ_haṃsa saḥ_tad aham_mad iti_iti anulomataḥ_anuloma pratilomataḥ_pratiloma ca_ca abhivyajyamānena_abhivyañj ajapā--_ajapā mantreṇa_mantra tad--_tad ttvam_ttva padārtha--_padārtha arthaḥ_artha tat_tad uktam_vac yoga--_yoga śāstre_śāstra sa-kāreṇa_sa-kāra bahis_bahis yāti_yā haṃ-kāreṇa_haṃkāra viśet_viś punar_punar prāṇaḥ_prāṇa tatra_tatra saḥ_tad eva_eva aham_mad haṃsaḥ_haṃsa iti_iti anucintayet_anucintay iti_iti

prāṇa--_prāṇa apāna--_apāna gatīḥ_gati ruddhvā_rudh iti_iti anena_idam tu_tu ślokena_śloka prāṇāyāma--_prāṇāyāma yajñāḥ_yajña aparaiḥ_apara kathyante_kathay tatra_tatra ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha dvau_dvi bhāgau_bhāga pūrayet_pūray annaiḥ_anna jalena_jala ekam_eka prapūrayet_prapūray pracāra--_pracāra artham_artha caturtham_caturtha avaśeṣayet_avaśeṣay iti_iti evam_evam ādi--_ādi vacana--_vacana uktaḥ_vac niyataḥ_niyam āhāraḥ_āhāra yeṣām_yad te_tad kumbhakena_kumbhaka prāṇa--_prāṇa apāna--_apāna gatīḥ_gati ruddhvā_rudh prāṇāyāma--_prāṇāyāma parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa santaḥ_as prāṇān_prāṇa indriyāṇi_indriya prāṇeṣu_prāṇa juhvati_hu kumbhake_kumbhaka hi_hi sarve_sarva prāṇāḥ_prāṇa ekībhavanti_ekībhū iti_iti tatra_tatra eva_eva layamāneṣu_lī indriyeṣu_indriya homam_homa bhāvayanti_bhāvay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad uktam_vac yoga--_yoga śāstre_śāstra
yathā_yathā yathā_yathā sadā_sadā abhyāsāt_abhyāsa manasaḥ_manas sthira--_sthira tā_tā bhavet_bhū vāyu--_vāyu vāc--_vāc kāya--_kāya dṛṣṭīnām_dṛṣṭi sthira--_sthira tā_tā ca_ca tathā_tathā tathā_tathā
div.l: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana apāne_apāna juhvati_hu prāṇam_prāṇa prāṇe_prāṇa apānam_apāna tathā_tathā apare_apara prāṇa--_prāṇa apāna--_apāna gatī_gati ruddhvā_rudh prāṇāyāma--_prāṇāyāma parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa
div.p: juhvati_hu ekīkurvanti_ekīkṛ tathā_tathā recaka--_recaka kāle_kāla apānam_apāna prāṇe_prāṇa juhvati_hu kumbhaka--_kumbhaka kāle_kāla prāṇa--_prāṇa apānayoḥ_apāna gatī_gati ruddhvā_rudh prāṇāyāma--_prāṇāyāma parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa bhavanti_bhū apare_apara indriya--_indriya jaya--_jaya kāmāḥ_kāma niyata--_niyam āhārāḥ_āhāra alpa--_alpa āhārāḥ_āhāra prāṇeṣu_prāṇa āhāra--_āhāra saṅkocanena_saṃkocana eva_eva jīvyamāneṣu_jīv prāṇān_prāṇa indriyāṇi_indriya juhvati_hu indriyāṇām_indriya prāṇa--_prāṇa adhīna--_adhīna vṛtti--_vṛtti tvāt_tva prāṇa--_prāṇa daurbalye_daurbalya sati_as svayam_svayam eva_eva sva--_sva sva--_sva viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇa--_grahaṇa asamarthāni_asamartha indriyāṇi_indriya prāṇeṣu_prāṇa eva_eva alpīyante_alpīy iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 29_29

baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka ca_ca apāne_apāna iti_iti tathā_tathā apare_apara prāṇāyāma--_prāṇāyāma parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa te_tad tridhā_tridhā adhas_adhas vṛttau_vṛtti apāne_apāna prāṇam_prāṇa ūrdhva--_ūrdhva vṛttim_vṛtti juhvati_hu pūrakeṇa_pūraka prāṇam_prāṇa apānena_apāna saha_saha ekīkurvanti_ekīkṛ tathā_tathā prāṇe_prāṇa apānam_apāna juhvati_hu recakena_recaka apānam_apāna prāṇena_prāṇa saha_saha ekīkṛtya_ekīkṛ bahis_bahis nirgamayanti_nirgamay yathā_yathā prāṇa--_prāṇa apānayoḥ_apāna gatī_gati śvāsa--_śvāsa praśvāsau_praśvāsa kumbhakena_kumbhaka ruddhvā_rudh vartante_vṛt iti_iti āntarasya_āntara vāyoḥ_vāyu nāsā--_nāsā āsyena_āsya bahis_bahis nirgamaḥ_nirgama śvāsaḥ_śvāsa prāṇasya_prāṇa gatiḥ_gati vinirgatasya_vinirgam tasya_tad antar_antar praveśaḥ_praveśa praśvāsaḥ_praśvāsa apānasya_apāna gatiḥ_gati tayoḥ_tad nirodhaḥ_nirodha kumbhakaḥ_kumbhaka sa_tad dvividhaḥ_dvividha vāyum_vāyu āpūrya_āpūray śvāsa--_śvāsa praśvāsayoḥ_praśvāsa nirodhaḥ_nirodha antar_antar kumbhakaḥ_kumbhaka apare_apara nityatā--_nityatā āhārāḥ_āhāra bhojana--_bhojana saṅkocaam_saṃkoca abhyasyantaḥ_abhyas prāṇān_prāṇa indriyāṇi_indriya prāṇeṣu_prāṇa juhvati_hu teṣu_tad alpa--_alpa āhāreṇa_āhāra jīryamāṇeṣu_jṛ tad--_tad āyatta--_āyat vṛttikāni_vṛttika tāni_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇa--_grahaṇa akṣamāṇi_akṣama tapta--_tap ayaḥ--_ayas niṣikta--_niṣic uda--_uda bindu--_bindu vat_vat teṣu_tad eva_eva vilīyante_vilī 29_29
BhG 4.30

lg.l: apare_apara niyata--_niyam āhārāḥ_āhāra prāṇān_prāṇa prāṇeṣu_prāṇa juhvati_hu
sarve_sarva api_api ete_etad yajña--_yajña vidaḥ_vid yajña--_yajña kṣapita--_kṣapay kalmaṣāḥ_kalmaṣa

div.p: āha_ah vindanti_vid labhante_labh

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam uktānām_vac dvādaśadhā_dvādaśadhā yajña--_yajña vidām_vid phalam_phala āha_ah sarve_sarva api_api iti_iti yajñān_yajña vidanti_vid jānanti_jñā vindanti_vid labhante_labh vā_vā iti_iti yajña--_yajña vidaḥ_vid yajñānām_yajña jñātāraḥ_jñātṛ kartāraḥ_kartṛ ca_ca yajñaiḥ_yajña pūrva--_pūrva uktaiḥ_vac kṣapitam_kṣapay nāśitam_nāśay kalmaṣam_kalmaṣa pāpam_pāpa yeṣām_yad te_tad yajña--_yajña kṣapita--_kṣapay kalmaṣāḥ_kalmaṣa yajñān_yajña kṛtvā_kṛ avaśiṣṭe_avaśiṣ kāle_kāla annam_anna amṛta--_amṛta śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac bhuñjate_bhuj iti_iti yajña--_yajña śiṣṭa--_śās amṛta--_amṛta bhujaḥ_bhuj te_tad sarve_sarva api_api sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi jñāna--_jñāna prāpti--_prāpti dvāreṇa_dvāra yānti_yā brahma_brahman sanātanam_sanātana nityam_nityam saṃsārāt_saṃsāra mucyante_muc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
yānti_yā āha_ah bhuñjate_bhuj

baladevaḥ_baladeva ete_etad khalu_khalu indirya--_indirya vijaya--_vijaya kāmāḥ_kāma sarve_sarva api_api iti_iti yajña--_yajña vidaḥ_vid pūrva--_pūrva uktān_vac deva--_deva ādi--_ādi yajñān_yajña vindamānā_vid taiḥ_tad eva_eva yajñaiḥ_yajña kṣapita--_kṣapay kalmaṣāḥ_kalmaṣa
BhG 4.31

lg.l: yajña--_yajña śiṣṭa--_śās amṛta--_amṛta bhujaḥ_bhuj yānti_yā brahma_brahman sanātanam_sanātana
na_na ayam_idam lokaḥ_loka asti_as ayajñasya_ayajña kutas_kutas anyaḥ_anya kurusattama_kurusattama

div.p: yajñān_yajña kṛtvā_kṛ avaśiṣṭe_avaśiṣ kāle_kāla a_a niṣiddham_niṣidh annam_anna amṛta--_amṛta rūpam_rūpa bhuñjate_bhuj iti_iti tathā_tathā te_tad sanātanam_sanātana nityam_nitya brahma_brahman jñāna--_jñāna dvāreṇa_dvāra prāpnuvanti_prāp tad--_tad akaraṇe_akaraṇa doṣam_doṣa āha_ah na_na ayam_idam iti_iti ayam_idam alpa--_alpa sukhaḥ_sukha api_api manuṣya--_manuṣya lokaḥ_loka ayajñasya_ayajña yajña--_yajña anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna rahitasya_rahita na_na asti_as kutas_kutas anyaḥ_anya bahu--_bahu sukhaḥ_sukha para--_para lokaḥ_loka atas_atas yajñāḥ_yajña sarvathā_sarvathā kartavyāḥ_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam anvaye_anvaya guṇam_guṇa uktvā_vac vyatireke_vyatireka doṣam_doṣa āha_ah ardhena_ardha uktānām_vac yajñānām_yajña madhye_madhya anyatamaḥ_anyatama api_api yajñaḥ_yajña yasya_yad na_na asti_as saḥ_tad ayajñaḥ_ayajña tasya_tad ayam_idam alpa--_alpa sukhaḥ_sukha api_api manuṣya--_manuṣya lokaḥ_loka nā_na asti_as sarva--_sarva nindya--_nind tvāt_tva kutas_kutas anyaḥ_anya viśiṣṭa--_viśiṣ sādhana--_sādhana sādhyaḥ_sādhay para--_para lokaḥ_loka he_he kuru--_kuru sattama_sattama

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tathā_tathā anusaṃhitam_anusaṃdhā phalam_phala āha_ah brahma_brahman yānti_yā iti_iti tad--_tad akaraṇe_akaraṇa pratyavāyam_pratyavāya āha_ah na_na ayam_idam iti_iti ayam_idam alpa--_alpa sukhaḥ_sukha manuṣa--_manuṣa lokaḥ_loka api_api na_na asti_as kutas_kutas anyaḥ_anya deva--_deva ādi--_ādi lokaḥ_loka tena_tad prāptavyaḥ_prāp
āha_ah āha_ah
BhG 4.32

lg.l: evam_evam bahu--_bahu vidhāḥ_vidha yajñāḥ_yajña vitatāḥ_vitan brahmaṇaḥ_brahman mukhe_mukha
karma--_karman jān_ja viddhi_vid tān_tad sarvān_sarva evam_evam jñātvā_jñā vimokṣyase_vimuc

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ brahmaṇaḥ_brahman vedasya_veda mukhe_mukha vitatāḥ_vitan vedena_veda sākṣāt_sākṣāt vihitāḥ_vidhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā api_api tān_tad sarvān_sarva vāc--_vāc manaḥ--_manas kāya--_kāya karma--_karman janitān_janay ātma--_ātman svarūpa--_svarūpa saṃsparśa--_saṃsparśa rahitān_rahita viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā ātmanaḥ_ātman karma--_karman agocara--_agocara tvāt_tva evam_evam jñātvā_jñā jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā san_as saṃsārāt_saṃsāra vimuktaḥ_vimuc bhaviṣyasi_bhū 32_32

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka tvayā_tvad sva--_sva utprekṣā--_utprekṣā mātreṇa_mātra evam_evam ucyate_vac na_na hi_hi vedaḥ_veda eva_eva atra_atra pramāṇam_pramāṇa iti_iti āha_ah evam_evam iti_iti evam_evam yathā_yathā uktāḥ_vac bahu--_bahu vidhāḥ_vidha bahu--_bahu prakārāḥ_prakāra yajñāḥ_yajña sarva--_sarva vaidika--_vaidika śreyaḥ--_śreyas sādhana--_sādhana rūpāḥ_rūpa vitatāḥ_vitan vistṛtāḥ_vistṛ brahmaṇaḥ_brahman vedasya_veda mukhe_mukha dvāre_dvāra veda--_veda dvāreṇa_dvāra eva_eva ete_etad avagatāḥ_avagam iti_iti arthaḥ_artha veda--_veda vākyāni_vākya tu_tu pratyekam_pratyekam vistara--_vistara bhayāt_bhaya na_na udāhriyante_udāhṛ karma--_karman jān_ja kāyika--_kāyika vācika--_vācika mānasa--_mānasa karma--_karman udbhavān_udbhava viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā tān_tad sarvān_sarva yajñān_yajña na_na ātmajān_ātmaja nirvyāpāraḥ_nirvyāpāra hi_hi ātmā_ātman na_na tad--_tad vyāpārāḥ_vyāpāra ete_etad kintu_kiṃtu nirvyāpāraḥ_nirvyāpāra aham_mad udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna iti_iti evam_evam jñātvā_jñā vimokṣyase_vimuc asmāt_idam saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bandhanāt_bandhana iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa 32_32

baladevaḥ_baladeva brahmaṇaḥ_brahman vedasya_veda mukhe_mukha vitatāḥ_vitan vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman prāpti--_prāpti upāya--_upāya tayā_tā sva--_sva mukhena_mukha eva_eva tena_tad sphuṭam_sphuṭa uktāḥ_vac karma--_karman jān_ja vāc--_vāc manaḥ--_manas kāya--_kāya karma--_karman janitān_janay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam jñātvā_jñā tad--_tad upāya--_upāya tayā_tā tena_tad uktān_vac tān_tad avabudhya_avabudh anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā tad--_tad utpanna--_utpad vijñānena_vijñāna avalokita--_avalokay ātma--_ātman dvayaḥ_dvaya saṃsārāt_saṃsāra vimokṣyase_vimuc 32_32
BhG 4.33

lg.l: śreyān_śreyas dravya--_dravya mayāt_maya yajñāt_yajña jñāna--_jñāna yajñaḥ_yajña parantapa_paraṃtapa
sarvam_sarva karma_karman akhilam_akhila pārtha_pārtha jñāne_jñāna parisamāpyate_parisamāp

div.p: āha_ah dravya--_dravya mayāt_maya anātma--_anātman vyāpāra--_vyāpāra janyāt_jan daiva--_daiva ādi--_ādi yajñāt_yajña jñāna--_jñāna yajñaḥ_yajña śreyān_śreyas śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha yadi_yadi api_api jñāna--_jñāna yajñasya_yajña api_api manaḥ--_manas vyāpāra--_vyāpāra adhīna--_adhīna tvam_tva asti_as eva_eva tathā_tathā api_api ātma--_ātman svarūpasya_svarūpa jñānasya_jñāna manaḥ_manas pariṇāme_pariṇāma abhivyakti--_abhivyakti mātram_mātra na_na tad--_tad janya--_jan tvam_tva iti_iti dravya--_dravya mayāt_maya viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tve_tva hetuḥ_hetu sarvam_sarva karma_karman akhilam_akhila phala--_phala sahitam_sahita jñāne_jñāna parisamāpyate_parisamāp antarbhavati_antarbhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sarvam_sarva tat_tad abhisameti_abhisami yat_yad kim_ka ca_ca prajāḥ_prajā sādhu_sādhu kurvanti_kṛ iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti 33_33

āha_ah śreyān_śreyas praśasyataraḥ_praśasyatara sākṣāt_sākṣāt mokṣa--_mokṣa phalatvāt_phalatva dravya--_dravya mayāt_maya tad--_tad upalakṣitāt_upalakṣay jñāna--_jñāna śūnyāt_śūnya sarvasmāt_sarva api_api yajñāt_yajña saṃsāra--_saṃsāra phalāt_phala jñāna--_jñāna yajñaḥ_yajña ekaḥ_eka eva_eva he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa kasmāt_kasmāt evam_evam yasmāt_yasmāt sarvam_sarva karma_karman iṣṭi--_iṣṭi paśu--_paśu soma--_soma cayana--_cayana rūpam_rūpa śrautam_śrauta akhilam_akhila niravaśeṣam_niravaśeṣa smārtam_smārta upāsana--_upāsana ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa ca_ca yat_yad karma_karman tad--_tad jñāne_jñāna brahma--_brahman ātma--_ātman aikya--_aikya sākṣātkāre_sākṣātkāra paryavasyati_paryavasā tam_tad etam_etad veda--_veda anuvacanena_anuvacana brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vividiṣanti_vividiṣ yajñena_yajña dāne_dāna tapasā_tapas anāśakena_anāśaka iti_iti dharmena_dharma pāpam_pāpa apanudati_apanud iti_iti ca_ca śruteḥ_śruti sarva--_sarva apekṣā_apekṣā ca_ca yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti aśva--_aśva vat_vat iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya ca_ca iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 33_33

kutas_kutas jñāne_jñāna sati_as sarvam_sarva karma_karman akhilam_akhila avyartham_avyartha sat_as parisamāpyate_parisamāp samāptībhavati_samāptībhū jñāna--_jñāna anantaram_anantaram karma_karman na_na tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 33_33

baladevaḥ_baladeva uktāḥ_vac karma--_karman yogāḥ_yoga vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman anusandhi--_anusaṃdhi garbha--_garbha tvāt_tva araṇyāt_araṇya iva_iva ubhaya--_ubhaya rūpāḥ_rūpa teṣu_tad jñāna--_jñāna rūpam_rūpa saṃstauti_saṃstu śreyān_śreyas iti_iti dvirūpe_dvirūpa karmaṇi_karman karma--_karman dravya--_dravya bhayāt_bhaya aṃśāt_aṃśa jñāna--_jñāna mayaḥ_maya aṃśaḥ_aṃśa śreyān_śreyas praśastaraḥ_praśastara dravya--_dravya mayāt_maya iti_iti upalakṣaṇām_upalakṣaṇa indirya--_indirya saṃyama--_saṃyama ādīnām_ādi teṣām_tad tad--_tad upāya--_upāya tvāt_tva etat_etad vivṛṇoti_vivṛ he_he pārtha_pārtha jñāne_jñāna sati_as sarvam_sarva karma_karman akhilam_akhila sa_sa aṅgam_aṅga parisamāpyate_parisamāp nivṛttim_nivṛtti eti_i phale_phala jāte_jan sādhana--_sādhana nivṛtteḥ_nivṛtti darśanāt_darśana 33_33
BhG 4.34

lg.l: tat_tad viddhi_vid praṇipātena_praṇipāta paripraśnena_paripraśna sevayā_sevā
upadekṣyanti_upadiś te_tvad jñānam_jñāna jñāninaḥ_jñānin tattva--_tattva darśinaḥ_darśin

div.p: āha_ah tat_tad tat_tad jñānam_jñāna viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā prāpnuhi_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha jñāninām_jñānin praṇipātena_praṇipāta daṇḍa--_daṇḍa vat_vat namaskāreṇa_namaskāra tatas_tatas paripraśnena_paripraśna kutas_kutas ayam_idam me_mad saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra katham_katham vā_vā nivarteta_nivṛt iti_iti paripraśnena_paripraśna sevayā_sevā guru--_guru śuśrūṣayā_śuśrūṣā ca_ca jñāninaḥ_jñānin śāstra--_śāstra jñāḥ_jña tattva--_tattva darśinaḥ_darśin aparokṣa--_aparokṣa anubhava--_anubhava sampannāḥ_sampad ca_ca te_tad tubhyam_tvad jñānam_jñāna upadeśena_upadeśa sampādayiṣyanti_sampāday

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etādṛśa--_etādṛśa jñāna--_jñāna prāptau_prāpti kaḥ_ka atipratyāsannaḥ_atipratyāsanna upāyaḥ_upāya iti_iti ucyate_vac tat_tad viddhi_vid iti_iti tat_tad sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala bhūtam_bhū jñānam_jñāna viddhi_vid labhasva_labh ācāryān_ācārya abhigamya_abhigam teṣām_tad praṇipātena_praṇipāta prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa nīcaiḥ_nīca patanam_patana praṇipātaḥ_praṇipāta dīrgha--_dīrgha namaskāraḥ_namaskāra tena_tad kaḥ_ka aham_mad katham_katham baddhaḥ_bandh asmi_as kena_ka upāyena_upāya bahu--_bahu viṣayeṇa_viṣaya praśnena_praśna sevayā_sevā sarva--_sarva bhāvena_bhāva tad--_tad anukūla--_anukūla kāri--_kārin tayā_tā evam_evam bhakti--_bhakti śraddhā--_śraddhā atiśaya--_atiśaya pūrvakeṇa_pūrvaka avanati--_avanati viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa abhimukhāḥ_abhimukha santaḥ_as upadekṣyanti_upadiś upadeśena_upadeśa sampādayiṣyanti_sampāday te_tad tubhyam_tvad jñānam_jñāna paramātma--_paramātman viṣayam_viṣaya sākṣāt_sākṣāt mokṣa--_mokṣa phalam_phala jñāninaḥ_jñānin pada--_pada vākya--_vākya kṛta--_kṛ sākṣātkārāḥ_sākṣātkāra sākṣātkāravadbhiḥ_sākṣātkāravat upadiṣṭam_upadiś eva_eva jñānam_jñāna phala--_phala paryavasāyi_paryavasāyin na_na tu_tu tad--_tad rahitaiḥ_rahita pada--_pada vākya--_vākya nyāya--_nyāya ādi--_ādi māna--_māna nipuṇaiḥ_nipuṇa api_api iti_iti bhagavataḥ_bhagavant matam_man tat_tad vijñāna--_vijñāna artham_artha sa_tad gurum_guru eva_eva abhigacchet_abhigam samidh--_samidh pāṇiḥ_pāṇi śrotriyam_śrotriya brahma--_brahman niṣṭham_niṣṭhā iti_iti śruti--_śruti saṃvādi_saṃvādin tatra_tatra api_api śrotriyam_śrotriya adhīta--_adhī vedam_veda brahma--_brahman niṣṭham_niṣṭhā kṛta--_kṛ brahma--_brahman sākṣātkāram_sākṣātkāra iti_iti vyākhyānāt_vyākhyāna bahu--_bahu vacanam_vacana ca_ca idam_idam ācārya--_ācārya viṣayam_viṣaya ekasmin_eka api_api gaurava--_gaurava atiśaya--_atiśaya artham_artha na_na tu_tu bahutva--_bahutva vivakṣayā_vivakṣā ekasmāt_eka eva_eva tattva--_tattva sākṣātkāravataḥ_sākṣātkāravat ācāryāt_ācārya tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna udaye_udaya sati_as ācārya--_ācārya antara--_antara gamanasya_gamana tad--_tad artham_artha ayogāt_ayoga iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś

āha_ah praṇipātena_praṇipāta jñāna--_jñāna upadeṣṭari_upadeṣṭṛ gurau_guru daṇḍa--_daṇḍa vat_vat namaskāreṇa_namaskāra bhagavan_bhagavat kutas_kutas ayam_idam me_mad saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra katham_katham nivartiṣyate_nivṛt iti_iti paripraśnena_paripraśna ca_ca sevayā_sevā tad--_tad paricaryayā_paricaryā ca_ca tat_tad vijñāna--_vijñāna artham_artha sa_tad gurum_guru eva_eva abhigacchet_abhigam samidh--_samidh pāṇiḥ_pāṇi śrotriyam_śrotriya brahma--_brahman niṣṭham_niṣṭhā iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam jīva--_jīva svarūpa--_svarūpa jñānam_jñāna tad--_tad sādhanam_sādhana ca_ca sāṅgam_sāṅga upadiśya_upadiś para--_para svarūpa--_svarūpa upāsana--_upāsana jñānam_jñāna sat--_sat prasaṅga--_prasaṅga labhya--_labh tvam_tva tasya_tad āha_ah tat_tad iti_iti yat_yad artham_artha tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya mayā_mad tava_tvad upadiṣṭam_upadiś avināśi_avināśin tu_tu tat_tad viddhi_vid iti_iti ādinā_ādi tat_tad parātma--_parātman sambandhi--_sambandhin jñānam_jñāna praṇipāta--_praṇipāta ādibhiḥ_ādi prasāditebhyaḥ_prasāday jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin sadbhyaḥ_sat tvam_tvad avagata--_avagam sva--_sva svarūpaḥ_svarūpa viddhi_vid tatra_tatra praṇipātaḥ_praṇipāta daṇḍa--_daṇḍa vat_vat praṇatiḥ_praṇati sevā_sevā bhṛtya--_bhṛtya vat_vat teṣām_tad paricaryā_paricaryā

nanu_nanu udāsīnāḥ_udāsīna te_tad na_na vakṣyanti_vac iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah upa_upa iti_iti te_tad jñāninaḥ_jñānin adhigata--_adhigam sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa ātmānaḥ_ātman praṇipāta--_praṇipāta ādinā_ādi tad--_tad jijñāsu--_jijñāsu tām_tā ālakṣya_ālakṣay te_tad tubhyam_tvad tādṛśāya_tādṛśa tad--_tad sambandhi_sambandhin jñānam_jñāna upadekṣyanti_upadiś tattva--_tattva darśinaḥ_darśin tad--_tad jñāna--_jñāna pracārakāḥ_pracāraka kāruṇikāḥ_kāruṇika

nanu_nanu atra_atra tat_tad iti_iti jīva--_jīva jñānam_jñāna vācyam_vac prakṛta--_prakṛta tvāt_tva iti_iti ced_ced na_na na_na tu_tu eva_eva aham_mad jātu_jātu na_na āsam_as āsīta_ās _ evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra anya--_anya arthaḥ_artha ca_ca parāmarśaḥ_parāmarśa iti_iti anyathā_anyathā śruti--_śruti sūtra--_sūtra artha--_artha saṃvādinaḥ_saṃvādin agrimasya_agrima jñāna--_jñāna mahimnaḥ_mahiman virodhaḥ_virodha syāt_as uktam_vac eva_eva suṣṭhu_suṣṭhu
BhG 4.35

lg.l: yat_yad jñātvā_jñā na_na punar_punar moham_moha evam_evam yāsyasi_yā pāṇḍava_pāṇḍava
yena_yad bhūtāni_bhūta aśeṣeṇa_aśeṣa drakṣyasi_dṛś ātmani_ātman atha_atha u_u mayi_mad

div.p: āha_ah yat_yad jñānam_jñāna jñātvā_jñā prāpya_prāp punar_punar bandhu--_bandhu vadha--_vadha ādi--_ādi nimittam_nimitta moham_moha na_na prāpsyasi_prāp tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu yena_yad jñānena_jñāna bhūtāni_bhūta pitāputra--_pitāputra ādīni_ādi sva--_sva avidyā--_avidyā vijṛmbhitāni_vijṛmbh sva--_sva ātmani_ātman eva_eva abhedena_abheda drakṣyasi_dṛś atha_atha u_u anantaram_anantaram ātmānam_ātman mayi_mad paramātmani_paramātman abhedena_abheda drakṣyasi_dṛś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam ati_ati nirbandhena_nirbandha jñāna--_jñāna utpādane_utpādana kim_ka syāt_as atas_atas āha_ah yat_yad jñātvā_jñā iti_iti yat_yad pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac jñānam_jñāna ācāryaiḥ_ācārya upadiṣṭam_upadiś jñātvā_jñā prāpya_prāp odana--_odana pākam_pāka pacati_pac iti_iti vat_vat tasya_tad eva_eva dhātoḥ_dhātu sāmānya--_sāmānya vivakṣayā_vivakṣā prayogaḥ_prayoga na_na punar_punar moham_moha evam_evam bandhu--_bandhu vadha--_vadha ādi--_ādi nimittam_nimitta bhramam_bhrama yāsyasi_yā he_he parantapa_parantapa

kasmāt_kasmāt evam_evam yasmāt_yad eva_eva jñānena_jñāna bhūtāni_bhūta pitṛ--_pitṛ putra--_putra ādīni_ādi aśeṣeṇa_aśeṣeṇa brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi stamba--_stamba paryantāni_paryanta sva--_sva avidyā--_avidyā vijṛmbhitāni_vijṛmbh ātmani_ātman tvayi_tvad tvaṃ_tvaṃ padārthe_padārtha atho_atho api_api mayi_mad bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva tad--_tad padārthe_padārtha adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna bhūte_bhū drakṣyasi_dṛś abhedena_abheda eva_eva adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna atirekeṇa_atireka kalpitasya_kalpay abhāvāt_abhāva mām_mad bhagavantam_bhagavant vāsudevam_vāsudeva ātmatvena_ātmatva sākṣātkṛtya_sākṣātkṛ sarva--_sarva ajñāna--_ajñāna nāśe_nāśa tad--_tad kāryāṇi_kārya bhūtāni_bhūta na_na sthāsyanti_sthā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

āha_ah yat_yad jñānam_jñāna dehāt_deha atiiktaḥ_atiiñj eva_eva ātmā_ātman iti_iti lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa jñātvā_jñā evam_evam moham_moha antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa dharmam_dharma na_na prāpsyasi_prāp yena_yad ca_ca moha--_moha vigamena_vigama svābhāvika--_svābhāvika nitya--_nitya siddha--_siddha ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna lābhāt_lābha aśeṣāṇi_aśeṣa bhūtāni_bhūta manuṣya--_manuṣya tiryak--_tiryañc ādīni_ādi ātmani_ātman jīvātmani_jīvātman upādhi--_upādhi tvena_tva sthitāni_sthā pṛthak_pṛthak drakṣyasi_dṛś atho_atho mayi_mad parama--_parama kāraṇe_kāraṇa ca_ca kārya--_kārya tvena_tva sthitāni_sthā drakṣyasi_dṛś

baladevaḥ_baladeva ukta--_vac jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala āha_ah yat_yad iti_iti yat_yad jīva--_jīva jñāna--_jñāna pūrvakam_pūrvaka paramātma--_paramātman sambandhi--_sambandhin jñānam_jñāna jñātvā_jñā upalabhya_upalabh punar_punar evam_evam bandhu--_bandhu vadha--_vadha ādi--_ādi hetukam_hetuka moham_moha na_na yāsyasi_yā katham_katham na_na yāsyāmi_yā iti_iti atra_atra āha_ah yena_yad iti_iti yena_yad jñānena_jñāna bhūtāni_bhūta deva--_deva mānava--_mānava ādi--_ādi śarīrāṇi_śarīra aśeṣeṇa_aśeṣa sāmastyena_sāmastya sarvāṇi_sarva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātmani_ātman sva--_sva svarūpe_svarūpa upādhi--_upādhi tvena_tva sthitāni_sthā tāni_tad drakṣyasi_dṛś atho_atho mayi_mad sarveśvare_sarveśvara sarva--_sarva hetau_hetu kārya--_kārya tvena_tva sthitāni_sthā tāni_tad drakṣyasi_dṛś iti_iti etat_etad uktam_vac bhavati_bhū deha--_deha dvaya--_dvaya viviktāḥ_vivic jīvātmānaḥ_jīvātman teṣām_tad hari--_hari vimukhānām_vimukha hari--_hari māyayā_māyā eva_eva deheṣu_deha daihikteṣu_daihikta ca_ca mamatvāni_mamatva racitāni_racay hantṛ--_hantṛ hantavya--_han bhāva--_bhāva avabhāsaḥ_avabhāsa ca_ca tayā_tad eva_eva śuddha--_śuddha svarūpāṇām_svarūpa na_na tad--_tad tad--_tad sambaddhaḥ_sambandh paramātmā_paramātman khalu_khalu sarva--_sarva īśvaraḥ_īśvara sva--_sva āśritānām_āśri jīvānām_jīva tad--_tad tad--_tad karma--_karman anuguṇa--_anuguṇa tayā_tā tad--_tad tad--_tad deha--_deha indriyāṇi_indriya tad--_tad tad--_tad deha--_deha yātrām_yātrā loka--_loka antareṣu_antara tad--_tad tad--_tad sukha--_sukha bhogān_bhoga ca_ca sampādayati_sampāday upāsitaḥ_upās tu_tu muktim_mukti
BhG 4.36

lg.l: asi_as pāpebhyaḥ_pāpa sarvebhyaḥ_sarva pāpa--_pāpa kṛttamaḥ_kṛttama
sarvam_sarva jñāna--_jñāna plavena_plava eva_eva vṛjinam_vṛjina santariṣyasi_saṃtṛ

div.p: asi_as tariṣyasi_tṛ

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka ca_ca śṛṇu_śru jñānasya_jñāna māhātmyam_māhātmya api_api ced_ced iti_iti api_api ced_ced iti_iti asambhāvita--_asambhāvita abhyupagama--_abhyupagama pradarśana--_pradarśana arthau_artha nipātau_nipāta yadi_yadi api_api ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha na_na sambhavati_sambhū eva_eva tathā_tathā api_api jñāna--_jñāna phala--_phala kathanāya_kathana abhyupetya_abhyupe ucyate_vac yadi_yadi api_api tvam_tvad pāpa--_pāpa kāribhyaḥ_kārin sarvebhyaḥ_sarva api_api atiśayena_atiśaya pāpa--_pāpa kārī_kārin pāpa--_pāpa kṛttamaḥ_kṛttama syāḥ_as tathā_tathā api_api sarvam_sarva vṛjinam_vṛjina pāpam_pāpa atidustara--_atidustara tvena_tva arṇava--_arṇava sadṛśam_sadṛśa jñāna--_jñāna plavena_plava eva_eva na_na anyena_anya jñānam_jñāna eva_eva plavam_plava anāyāsena_anāyāsa āvṛtti--_āvṛtti varjita--_varjay tvena_tva tariṣyasi_tṛ atikramiṣyasi_atikram vṛjina--_vṛjina śabdena_śabda atra_atra dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma rūpam_rūpa karma_karman saṃsāra--_saṃsāra phalam_phala abhipretam_abhipre mumukṣoḥ_mumukṣu pāpa--_pāpa vat_vat puṇyasya_puṇya api_api aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa tvāt_tva

āha_ah pāpibhyaḥ_pāpin pāpa--_pāpa kṛdbhyaḥ_kṛt api_api sakāśāt_sakāśa yadi_yadi api_api atiśayena_atiśaya pāpa--_pāpa kārī_kārin tvam_tvad asi_as tathā_tathā api_api atra_atra etāvat_etāvat pāpa--_pāpa sattve_sattva katham_katham antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhiḥ_śuddhi tad--_tad abhāve_abhāva ca_ca katham_katham jñāna--_jñāna utpattiḥ_utpatti nā_na api_api utpanna--_utpad atas_atas atra_atra vyākhyā_vyākhyā śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādānām_pāda api_api ced_ced iti_iti asambhāvita--_asambhāvita abhyupagama--_abhyupagama pradarśana--_pradarśana arthau_artha nipātau_nipāta yadi_yadi api_api ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha na_na sambhavati_sambhū eva_eva tathā_tathā api_api jñāna--_jñāna phala--_phala kathanāya_kathana abhyupetya_abhyupe ucyate_vac iti_iti eṣā_etad

baladevaḥ_baladeva jñāna--_jñāna prabhāvam_prabhāva āha_ah api_api ced_ced iti_iti yadi_yadi api_api sarvebhyaḥ_sarva pāpa--_pāpa kartṛbhyaḥ_kartṛ tvam_tvad atiśayena_atiśaya pāpa--_pāpa kṛt_kṛt asi_as tathā_tathā api_api sarvam_sarva vṛjinam_vṛjina nikhilam_nikhila pāpam_pāpa dustara--_dustara tvena_tva arṇava--_arṇava tulyam_tulya ukta--_vac lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa
BhG 4.37

lg.l: yathā_yathā edhāṃsi_edhas samiddhaḥ_samindh agniḥ_agni bhasmasāt_bhasmasāt kurute_kṛ arjuna_arjuna
jñāna--_jñāna agniḥ_agni sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman bhasmasāt_bhasmasāt kurute_kṛ tathā_tathā

div.p: iti_iti bhrāntim_bhrānti dṛṣṭāntena_dṛṣṭānta vārayan_vāray āha_ah yathā_yathā edhāṃsi_edhas iti_iti edhāṃsi_edhas kāṣṭhāni_kāṣṭha pradīptaḥ_pradīp agniḥ_agni yathā_yathā bhasmībhāvam_bhasmībhāva nayati_nī tathā_tathā ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna āpannaḥ_āpad mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu kālena_kāla mahatā_mahat ātmani_ātman vindati_vid labhate_labh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 37_37

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu samudra--_samudra vat_vat taraṇe_taraṇa karmaṇām_karman nāśaḥ_nāśa na_na syāt_as iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk dṛṣṭāntaram_dṛṣṭāntara āha_ah yathā_yathā edhāṃsi_edhas iti_iti yathā_yathā edhāṃsi_edhas kāṣṭhāni_kāṣṭha samiddhaḥ_samindh prajvalitaḥ_prajval agniḥ_agni bhasmasāt_bhasmasāt kurute_kṛ bhasmībhāvam_bhasmībhāva nayati_nī he_he arjuna_arjuna jñāna--_jñāna agniḥ_agni sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman pāpāni_pāpa puṇyāni_puṇya ca_ca aviśeṣeṇa_aviśeṣa prārabdha--_prārabh phala--_phala bhinnāni_bhid bhasmasāt_bhasmasāt kurute_kṛ vināśayati_vināśay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti

bhidyate_bhid hṛdaya--_hṛdaya granthiḥ_granthi chidyante_chid sarva--_sarva saṃśayāḥ_saṃśaya
kṣīyante_kṣi ca_ca asya_idam karmāṇi_karman tasmin_tad dṛṣṭe_dṛś parāvare_parāvara

tad--_tad adhigamaḥ_adhigama uttara--_uttara pūrva--_pūrva ardhayoḥ_ardha aśleṣa--_aśleṣa vināśau_vināśa tad--_tad vyapadeśāt_vyapadeśa itarasya_itara api_api evam_evam asaṃśleṣaḥ_asaṃśleṣa pāte_pāta tu_tu iti_iti ca_ca sūtre_sūtra anārabdhe_anārabdha puṇya--_puṇya pāpe_pāpa naśyataḥ_naś eva_eva iti_iti atra_atra sūtram_sūtra anārabdha--_anārabdha kārye_kārya eva_eva tu_tu pūrve_pūrva tad--_tad avadheḥ_avadhi iti_iti jñāna--_jñāna utpādaka--_utpādaka deha--_deha ārambhakāṇām_ārambhaka tu_tu tad--_tad dehānte_dehānta eva_eva vināśaḥ_vināśa tasya_tad tāvat_tāvat eva_eva ciram_ciram yāvat_yāvat na_na vimokṣye_vimuc iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti bhogena_bhoga tu_tu itare_itara kṣapayitvā_kṣapay sampadyate_sampad iti_iti sūtrāt_sūtra ca_ca ādhikārikāṇām_ādhikārika tu_tu yāni_yad eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna utpādaka--_utpādaka deha--_deha ārambhakāṇi_ārambhaka tāni_tad eva_eva deha--_deha antara--_antara ārambhakāṇi_ārambhaka api_api yathā_yathā vasiṣṭa--_vasiṣṭa apāntara--_apāntara tamaḥ--_tamas prabhṛtīnām_prabhṛti tathā_tathā ca_ca sūtram_sūtra yāvad-adhikāram_yāvad-adhikāram avasthitiḥ_avasthiti ādhikārikāṇām_ādhikārika iti_iti adhikāraḥ_adhikāra aneka--_aneka deha--_deha ārambhakam_ārambhaka balavat--_balavat prārabdha--_prārabh phalam_phala karma_karman tat_tad ca_ca upāsakānām_upāsaka eva_eva na_na anyeṣām_anya anārabdha--_anārabdha phalāni_phala naśyanti_naś ārabdha--_ārabh phalāni_phala tu_tu yāvad_yāvat bhoga--_bhoga samāpti_samāpti tiṣṭhanti_sthā bhogaḥ_bhoga ca_ca ekena_eka dehena_deha anekena_aneka vā_vā iti_iti na_na viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa vistaraḥ_vistara tu_tu ākara_ākara draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś 37_37
vināśayati_vināśay āha_ah _

baladevaḥ_baladeva brahma--_brahman vidyayā_vidyā pāpa--_pāpa karmāṇi_karman naśyanti_naś iti_iti uktam_vac idānīm_idānīm puṇya--_puṇya karmāṇi_karman api_api naśyanti_naś iti_iti āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti edhāṃsi_edhas kāṣṭhāni_kāṣṭha samiddhaḥ_samindh prajvalitaḥ_prajval agniḥ_agni yathā_yathā bhasmasāt_bhasmasāt kurute_kṛ tathā_tathā jñāna--_jñāna agniḥ_agni sva--_sva parātma--_parātman anubhava--_anubhava vahniḥ_vahni sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman puṇyāni_puṇya pāpāni_pāpa ca_ca prārabdha--_prārabh itarāṇi_itara bhasmasāt_bhasmasāt kurute_kṛ tatra_tatra sañcitāni_saṃci nirdahati_nirdah kriyamāṇāni_kṛ padma--_padma patra--_pattra ambu--_ambu bindu--_bindu vat_vat viśeṣayati_viśeṣay prārabdhāni_prārabh tu_tu tad--_tad prabhāvena_prabhāva ati_ati jīrṇāni_jīrṇa api_api sat--_sat patha--_patha pracāra--_pracāra arthayā_artha hareḥ_hari icchayā_icchā eva_eva ātma--_ātman anubhavinī_anubhavin avasthāpayati_avasthāpay iti_iti śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca -ubhe_ubh uha_uha eva_eva eṣa_etad ete_etad tarati_tṛ amṛtaḥ_amṛta sādhu--_sādhu asādhunī_asādhu iti_iti eṣa_etad brahma--_brahman anubhavī_anubhavin ubhe_ubh saṃcitya_saṃci kriyamāṇe_kṛ ete_etad sādhu--_sādhu asādhunī_asādhu puṇya--_puṇya pāpe_pāpa karmaṇī_karman tarati_tṛ krāmati_kram iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra tad--_tad adhigame_adhigama uttara--_uttara pūrva--_pūrva ardhayoḥ_ardha aśleṣa--_aśleṣa vināśau_vināśa tad--_tad vyapadeśāt_vyapadeśa iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi 37_37
BhG 4.38

lg.l: na_na hi_hi jñānena_jñāna sadṛśam_sadṛśa pavitram_pavitra iha_iha vidyate_vid
tat_tad svayam_svayam yoga--_yoga saṃsiddhaḥ_saṃsidh kālena_kāla ātmani_ātman vindati_vid

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tatra_tatra hetum_hetu āha_ah na_na hi_hi iti_iti pavitram_pavitra śuddhi--_śuddhi karam_kara iha_iha tapaḥ--_tapas yoga--_yoga ādiṣu_ādi madhye_madhya jñāna--_jñāna tulyam_tulya na_na asti_as eva_eva tarhi_tarhi sarve_sarva api_api kim_ka iti_iti ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna eva_eva na_na abhyasantaḥ_abhyas iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah tat_tad svayam_svayam iti_iti sārdhena_sārdha tat_tad ātmani_ātman viṣaye_viṣaya jñānam_jñāna kālena_kāla mahatā_mahat karma--_karman yogena_yoga saṃsiddhaḥ_saṃsidh yogyatām_yogyatā prāptaḥ_prāp san_as svayam_svayam eva_eva anāyāsena_anāyāsa labhate_labh na_na tu_tu karma--_karman yogam_yoga vinā_vinā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 38_38

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt na_na hi_hi iti_iti na_na hi_hi jñānena_jñāna sadṛśam_sadṛśa pavitram_pavitra pāvanam_pāvana śuddhi--_śuddhi karam_kara anyat_anya iha_iha vede_veda loka--_loka vyavahāre_vyavahāra vā_vā vidyate_vid jñāna--_jñāna bhinnasya_bhid ajñāna--_ajñāna anivartaka--_anivartaka tvena_tva samūla--_samūla pāpa--_pāpa nivartaka--_nivartaka tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa sat--_as bhāvena_bhāva punar_punar jñānena_jñāna tu_tu ajñāna--_ajñāna nivṛttyā_nivṛtti sa_sa mūla--_mūla pāpa--_pāpa nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti iti_iti tad--_tad samam_sama anyat_anya ca_ca vidyate_vid
div.l: tat_tad ātma--_ātman viṣayam_viṣaya jñānam_jñāna sarveṣām_sarva kim_ka iti_iti jhaṭiti_jhaṭiti nā_na utpadyate_utpad tatra_tatra āha_ah tat_tad jñānam_jñāna kālena_kāla mahatā_mahat yoga--_yoga saṃsiddhaḥ_saṃsidh yogena_yoga pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac karma--_karman yogena_yoga saṃsiddhaḥ_saṃsidh saṃskṛtaḥ_saṃskṛ yogyatām_yogyatā āpannaḥ_āpad na_na tu_tu yogayatām_yogayatā āpannaḥ_āpad anya--_anya dattam_dā sva--_sva niṣṭhatayā_niṣṭhatā na_na vā_vā para--_para niṣṭham_niṣṭha svīyatayā_svīyatā vindati_vid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 38_38
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha iha_iha tapaḥ--_tapas yoga--_yoga ādi--_ādi yukteṣu_yuj madhye_madhya jñānena_jñāna sadṛśam_sadṛśa pavitram_pavitra kim_ka api_api na_na asti_as tat_tad jñānam_jñāna na_na sarva--_sarva sulabham_sulabha kintu_kiṃtu yogena_yoga niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogena_yoga samyak_samyak siddhaḥ_sidh eva_eva na_na tu_tu aparipakvaḥ_aparipakva saḥ_tad api_api kālena_kāla eva_eva na_na tu_tu sadyas_sadyas ātmani_ātman svasmin_sva svayam_svayam prāptam_prāp vindati_vid na_na tu_tu sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa grahaṇa--_grahaṇa mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 38_38

baladevaḥ_baladeva na_na hi_hi iti_iti hi_hi yatas_yatas jñānena_jñāna sadṛśam_sadṛśa pavitram_pavitra śuddhi--_śuddhi karam_kara tapaḥ_tapas tīrtha--_tīrtha aṭana--_aṭana ādikam_ādika na_na asti_as atas_atas tat_tad sarva--_sarva pāpa--_pāpa nāśakam_nāśaka tat_tad jñānam_jñāna na_na sarva--_sarva sulabham_sulabha kintu_kiṃtu yogena_yoga niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman saṃsiddhaḥ_saṃsidh paripakvaḥ_paripakva eva_eva kālena_kāla eva_eva na_na tu_tu sadyas_sadyas ātmani_ātman svasmin_sva svayam_svayam labdham_labh vindati_vid na_na tu_tu pārivrājya--_pārivrājya grahaṇa--_grahaṇa mātreṇa_mātra iti_iti 38_38
BhG 4.39

lg.l: śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat labhate_labh jñānam_jñāna tad--_tad paraḥ_para saṃyata--_saṃyam indriyaḥ_indriya
jñānam_jñāna labdhvā_labh parām_para śāntim_śānti acireṇa_acireṇa adhigacchati_adhigam

div.p: śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat guru--_guru upadiṣṭe_upadiś arthe_artha āstikya--_āstikya buddhimān_buddhimat tad--_tad paraḥ_para tad--_tad eka--_eka niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā saṃyata--_saṃyam indriyaḥ_indriya ca_ca tat_tad jñānam_jñāna labhate_labh na_na anyaḥ_anya atas_atas śraddhā--_śraddhā ādi--_ādi sampattyā_sampatti jñāna--_jñāna lābhāt_lābha prāk_prāk karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā jñāna--_jñāna lābha--_lābha anantaram_anantaram tu_tu na_na tasya_tad kiṃcid_kaścit kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah jñānam_jñāna labdhvā_labh tu_tu mokṣam_mokṣa acireṇa_acireṇa prāpnoti_prāp 39_39

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yena_yad ekāntena_ekānta jñāna--_jñāna prāptiḥ_prāpti bhavati_bhū saḥ_tad upāyaḥ_upāya pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac praṇipāta--_praṇipāta ādi--_ādi apekṣayā_apekṣā api_api āsannataraḥ_āsannatara ucyate_vac śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat iti_iti guru--_guru vedānta--_vedānta vākyeṣu_vākya idam_idam ittham_ittham vā_vā iti_iti pramā--_pramā rūpa--_rūpa āstikya--_āstikya buddhiḥ_buddhi śraddhā_śraddhā tadvān_tadvat puruṣaḥ_puruṣa labhate_labh jñānam_jñāna etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa api_api kaścid_kaścit alasaḥ_alasa syāt_as tatra_tatra āha_ah tad--_tad paraḥ_para guru--_guru upāsana--_upāsana ādau_ādi jñāna--_jñāna upāye_upāya atyanta--_atyanta abhiyuktaḥ_abhiyuj śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat tad--_tad paraḥ_para api_api kaścid_kaścit ajita--_ajita indriyaḥ_indriya syāt_as atas_atas āha_ah saṃyata--_saṃyam indriyaḥ_indriya saṃyatāni_saṃyam viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya nivartitāni_nivartay indriyāṇi_indriya yena_yad sa_tad saṃyata--_saṃyam indriyaḥ_indriya yaḥ_yad evam_evam viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa traya--_traya yuktaḥ_yuj saḥ_tad avaśyam_avaśyam jñānam_jñāna labhate_labh praṇipāta--_praṇipāta ādiḥ_ādi tu_tu bāhyaḥ_bāhya māyāvi--_māyāvin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi sambhavāt_sambhava anaikāntikaḥ_anaikāntika api_api śraddhāvat--_śraddhāvat tva--_tva ādiḥ_ādi tu_tu aikāntikaḥ_aikāntika upāyaḥ_upāya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

īdṛśena_īdṛśa upāyena_upāya jñānam_jñāna labdhvā_labh parām_para caramām_carama śāntim_śānti avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya nivṛtti--_nivṛtti rūpām_rūpa muktim_mukti acireṇa_acira tad--_tad avyavadhānena_avyavadhāna eva_eva adhigacchati_adhigam labhate_labh yathā_yathā hi_hi dīpaḥ_dīpa sva--_sva utpatti--_utpatti mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva andhakāra--_andhakāra nivṛttim_nivṛtti karoti_kṛ na_na tu_tu kaṃcid_kaścit sahakāriṇam_sahakārin apekṣate_apekṣ tathā_tathā jñānam_jñāna api_api sva--_sva utpatti--_utpatti mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva ajñāna--_ajñāna nivṛttim_nivṛtti karoti_kṛ na_na tu_tu kiṃcid_kaścit prasaṅkhyāna--_prasaṅkhyāna 39_39

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tarhi_tarhi kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa san_as kadā_kadā prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat iti_iti śraddhā_śraddhā niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman eva_eva antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhyā_śuddhi eva_eva jñānam_jñāna syāt_as iti_iti śāstra--_śāstra artham_artha āstikya--_āstikya buddhiḥ_buddhi tadvān_tadvat eva_eva tad--_tad paraḥ_para tad--_tad anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa api_api yadā_yadā saṃyata--_saṃyam indriyaḥ_indriya syāt_as tadā_tadā parām_para śāntim_śānti saṃsāra--_saṃsāra nāśam_nāśa 39_39

baladevaḥ_baladeva kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa san_as kadā_kadā vindati_vid iti_iti āha_ah śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat iti_iti niṣkāmena_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhau_viśuddhi jñānam_jñāna syāt_as iti_iti dṛḍha--_dṛḍha viśvāsaḥ_viśvāsa śraddhā--_śraddhā tadvān_tadvat tad--_tad paraḥ_para tad--_tad anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā tādṛś_tādṛś api_api yadā_yadā saṃyata--_saṃyam indriyaḥ_indriya tadā_tadā parām_para śāntim_śānti muktim_mukti 39_39
BhG 4.40

lg.l: ajñaḥ_ajña ca_ca aśraddadhānaḥ_aśraddadhāna ca_ca saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmā_ātman vinaśyati_vinaś
na_na ayam_idam lokaḥ_loka asti_as na_na paraḥ_para na_na sukham_sukha saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmanaḥ_ātman

div.p: āha_ah ajñaḥ_ajña guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś artha--_artha anabhijñaḥ_anabhijña kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid jñāne_jñāna jāte_jan api_api tatra_tatra a_a śraddadhānaḥ_śraddhā ca_ca jātāyām_jan api_api śraddhāyām_śraddhā mama_mad idam_idam na_na vā_vā iti_iti aṃśaya--_aṃśaya ākrānta--_ākram cittaḥ_citta ca_ca vinaśyate_vinaś sva--_sva arthāt_artha bhraśyati_bhraṃś eteṣu_etad triṣu_tri api_api saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmā_ātman sarvathā_sarvathā naśyati_naś yatas_yatas tasya_tad ayam_idam lokaḥ_loka nā_na asti_as dhana--_dhana arjana--_arjana vivāha--_vivāha ādi--_ādi asiddheḥ_asiddhi na_na ca_ca para--_para lokaḥ_loka dharmasya_dharma aniṣpatteḥ_aniṣpatti na_na ca_ca sukham_sukha saṃśayena_saṃśaya ā_ā eva_eva bhogasya_bhoga api_api asambhavāt_asaṃbhava

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana atra_atra ca_ca saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya na_na kartavyaḥ_kṛ kasmāt_kasmāt ajñaḥ_ajña iti_iti guru--_guru vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya arthaḥ_artha idam_idam evam_evam na_na bhavati_bhū eva_eva iti_iti viparyaya--_viparyaya rūpā_rūpa nāstikya--_nāstikya buddhiḥ_buddhi aśraddhā_aśraddhā tadvān_tadvat aśraddadhānaḥ_aśraddadhāna idam_idam evam_evam bhavati_bhū na_na vā_vā iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ākrānta--_ākram cittaḥ_citta saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmā_ātman vinaśyati_vinaś svārthāt_svārtha bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś bhavati_bhū ajñaḥ_ajña ca_ca aśraddadhānaḥ_aśraddadhāna ca_ca vinaśyati_vinaś iti_iti saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātma--_ātman apekṣayā_apekṣā nyūnatva--_nyūnatva kathana--_kathana artham_artha cakārābhyām_cakāra tayoḥ_tad prayogaḥ_prayoga kutas_kutas saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmā_ātman hi_hi sarvatas_sarvatas pāpīyān_pāpīyas yatas_yatas na_na ayam_idam manuṣya--_manuṣya lokaḥ_loka asti_as vitta--_vitta arjana--_arjana ādi--_ādi abhāvāt_abhāva na_na paraḥ_para lokaḥ_loka svarga--_svarga mokṣa--_mokṣa ādi--_ādi dharma--_dharma jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi abhāvāt_abhāva na_na sukham_sukha bhojana--_bhojana ādi--_ādi kṛtam_kṛ saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmanaḥ_ātman sarvatra_sarvatra sandeha--_saṃdeha ākrānta--_ākram cittasya_citta ajñaḥ_ajña ca_ca aśraddadhānaḥ_aśraddadhāna ca_ca paraḥ_para lokaḥ_loka na_na asti_as manuṣya--_manuṣya lokaḥ_loka bhojana--_bhojana ādi--_ādi sukham_sukha ca_ca vartate_vṛt saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmā_ātman tu_tu tritaya--_tritaya hīna--_hā tvena_tva sarvatas_sarvatas pāpīyān_pāpīyas iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah ajñaḥ_ajña paśu--_paśu ādi--_ādi vat_vat mūḍhaḥ_muh aśraddadhānaḥ_aśraddadhāna śāstra--_śāstra jñānavat--_jñānavat tve_tva api_api nānā_nānā vādinām_vādin paraspara--_paraspara vipratipattim_vipratipatti dṛṣṭvā_dṛś na_na kvāpi_kvāpi viśvastaḥ_viśvas śraddhāvat--_śraddhāvat tve_tva api_api saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmā_ātman mama_mad etat_etad sidhyet_sidh na_na vā_vā iti_iti sandeha--_saṃdeha ākrānt_ākram matiḥ_mati teṣu_tad api_api madhye_madhya saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmānam_ātman viśeṣataḥ_viśeṣataḥ nindati_nind na_na ayam_idam iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva jñāna--_jñāna adhikāriṇam_adhikārin tad--_tad phalam_phala ca_ca abhidhāya_abhidhā tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta tad--_tad phalam_phala ca_ca āha_ah ajñaḥ_ajña ca_ca iti_iti ajñaḥ_ajña paśu--_paśu ādi--_ādi vat_vat śāstra--_śāstra jñāna--_jñāna hīnaḥ_hā aśraddadhānaḥ_aśraddadhāna śāstra--_śāstra jñāne_jñāna sati_as api_api vivādi--_vivādin pratipattibhiḥ_pratipatti na_na kvāpi_kvāpi viśvastaḥ_viśvas śraddadhāna--_śraddhā tve_tva api_api saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmā_ātman mama_mad etat_etad siddhyet_sidh na_na vā_vā iti_iti sandihāna--_saṃdih manāḥ_manas vinaśyati_vinaś svārthāt_svārtha vicyavate_vicyu teṣu_tad api_api madhye_madhya saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmānam_ātman vinindati_vinind na_na ayam_idam iti_iti ayam_idam prākṛtaḥ_prākṛta lokaḥ_loka paraḥ_para aprākṛtaḥ_aprākṛta saṃśaya--_saṃśaya ātmanaḥ_ātman kiṃcid_kaścit api_api sukham_sukha na_na asti_as śāstrīya--_śāstrīya karma--_karman janyam_jan hi_hi sukham_sukha tat_tad ca_ca karma_karman vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna pūrvakam_pūrvaka tatra_tatra sandihānasya_saṃdih kutas_kutas tat_tad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 4.41

lg.l: yoga--_yoga saṃnyasta--_saṃnyas karmāṇam_karman jñāna--_jñāna saṃchinna--_saṃchid saṃśayam_saṃśaya
ātmavantam_ātmavat na_na karmāṇi_karman nibadhnanti_nibandh dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya

div.p: yogena_yoga parameśvara--_parameśvara ārādhana--_ārādhana rūpeṇa_rūpa tasmin_tad saṃnyastāni_saṃnyas karmāṇi_karman yena_yad tam_tad karmāṇi_karman sva--_sva phalaiḥ_phala na_na nibadhnanti_nibandh tatas_tatas ca_ca jñānena_jñāna ātma--_ātman bodhena_bodha kartrā_kartṛ saṃchinnaḥ_saṃchid saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra deha--_deha ādi--_ādi atimāna--_atimāna lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa yasya_yad tam_tad ātmavantam_ātmavat apramādinam_apramādin karmāṇi_karman loka--_loka saṅgraha--_saṃgraha arthāni_artha svātāvikāni_svātāvika vā_vā na_na nibadhnanti_nibandh

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha mūlasya_mūla saṃśayasya_saṃśaya nirākaraṇāya_nirākaraṇa ātma--_ātman niścayam_niścaya upāyam_upāya vadan_vad adhyāya--_adhyāya dvaya--_dvaya uktām_vac pūrva--_pūrva apara--_apara bhūmikā--_bhūmikā bhedena_bheda karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna mayīm_maya dvividhām_dvividha brahma--_brahman niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ yogena_yoga bhagavat--_bhagavant ārādhana--_ārādhana lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa samatva--_samatva buddhi--_buddhi rūpeṇa_rūpa saṃnyastāni_saṃnyas bhagavati_bhagavant samarpitāni_samarpay karmāṇi_karman yena_yad yat_yat vā_vā paramārtha--_paramārtha darśana--_darśana lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa yogena_yoga saṃnyastāni_saṃnyas tyaktāni_tyaj karmāṇi_karman yena_yad tam_tad yoga--_yoga saṃnyasta--_saṃnyas karmāṇam_karman saṃśaye_saṃśaya sati_as katham_katham yoga--_yoga saṃnyasta--_saṃnyas karma--_karman tvam_tva atas_atas āha_ah jñāna--_jñāna saṃchinna--_saṃchid saṃśayam_saṃśaya jñānena_jñāna ātma--_ātman niścaya--_niścaya lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa chinnaḥ_chid saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya yena_yad tam_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya para--_para vaśa--_vaśa tva--_tva svarūpa--_svarūpa prasāde_prasāda sati_as kutas_kutas jñāna--_jñāna utpattiḥ_utpatti iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah ātmavantam_ātmavat apramādinam_apramādin sarvadā_sarvadā sāvadhānam_sāvadhāna etādṛśam_etādṛśa apramādi--_apramādin tvena_tva jñānavantam_jñānavat jñāna--_jñāna saṃchinna--_saṃchid saṃśaya--_saṃśaya tvena_tva yoga--_yoga saṃnyasta--_saṃnyas karmāṇam_karman karmāṇi_karman loka--_loka saṅgraha--_saṃgraha arthāni_artha vṛthā_vṛthak ceṣṭā--_ceṣṭā rūpāṇi_rūpa vā_vā na_na nibadhnanti_nibandh aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa iṣṭam_iṣ miśram_miśra

syāt_as āha_ah tatas_tatas ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna abhyāsa--_abhyāsa anantaram_anantaram chinna--_chid saṃśayam_saṃśaya ātmavantam_ātmavat prāpta--_prāp pratyak--_pratyañc ātmānam_ātman karmāṇi_karman na_na nibadhnanti_nibandh

baladevaḥ_baladeva īdṛśasya_īdṛśa naiṣkarmya--_naiṣkarmya lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa siddhiḥ_siddhi syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah yoga--_yoga iti_iti yogena_yoga yoga--_yoga sthaḥ_stha kuru_kṛ karmāṇi_karman iti_iti atra_atra uktena_vac saṃnyastāni_saṃnyas jñāna--_jñāna ākāra--_ākāra tā--_tā āpannāni_āpad karmāṇi_karman yasya_yad tam_tad mad--_mad upadiṣṭena_upadiś jñānena_jñāna chinna--_chid saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya yasya_yad tam_tad ātmavantam_ātmavat avalokita--_avalokay ātmānam_ātman karmāṇi_karman na_na nibadhnanti_nibandh teṣām_tad jñānena_jñāna vigamāt_vigama 42_42
BhG 4.42

lg.l: tasmāt_tasmāt ajñāna--_ajñāna saṃbhūtam_sambhū hṛd--_hṛd stham_stha jñāna--_jñāna asinā_asi ātmanaḥ_ātman
chittvā_chid enam_enad saṃśayam_saṃśaya yogam_yoga ātiṣṭha_āsthā uttiṣṭha_utthā bhārata_bhārata

div.p: yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt ātmanaḥ_ātman ajñānena_ajñāna saṃbhūtam_sambhū hṛdi_hṛd sthitam_sthā enam_enad saṃśayam_saṃśaya śoka--_śoka ādi--_ādi nimittam_nimitta deha--_deha ātma--_ātman viveka--_viveka khaḍgena_khaḍga chittvā_chid paramātma--_paramātman jñāna--_jñāna upāya--_upāya bhūtam_bhū karma--_karman yogam_yoga ātiṣṭha_āsthā āśraya_āśri tatra_tatra ca_ca prathamam_prathamam prastutāya_prastu yuddhāya_yuddha uttiṣṭha_utthā he_he bhārata_bhārata iti_iti kṣatriya--_kṣatriya tvena_tva yuddhasya_yuddha dharma--_dharma tvam_tva darśitam_darśay 42_42

lg.l: pum_puṃs avasthā--_avasthā ādi--_ādi bhedena_bheda karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna mayī_maya dvidhā_dvidhā
niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā uktā_vac yena_yad tam_tad vande_vand śaurim_śauri saṃśaya--_saṃśaya saṃchidam_saṃchid

div.p:
iti_iti śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī
jñāna--_jñāna yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma caturthaḥ_caturtha adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
div.l: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tasmāt_tasmāt ajñāna--_ajñāna saṃbhūtam_sambhū hṛd--_hṛd stham_stha jñāna--_jñāna asinā_asi ātmanaḥ_ātman chittvā_chid enam_enad saṃśayam_saṃśaya yogam_yoga ātiṣṭha_āsthā uttiṣṭha_utthā bhārata_bhārata
div.p:
iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍhārtha--_gūḍhārtha dīpikāyām_dīpikā jñāna--_jñāna yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma
caturthaḥ_caturtha adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
ātiṣṭha_āsthā āśraya_āśri

lg.l: ukteṣu_vac mukti--_mukti upāyeṣu_upāya jñānam_jñāna atra_atra praśasyate_praśaṃs
jñāna--_jñāna upāyam_upāya tu_tu karma_karman eva_eva iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha darśinyām_darśin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
gītāsu_gītā ayam_idam caturthaḥ_caturtha hi_hi saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

jñānataḥ_jñāna karmaṇaḥ_karman śraiṣṭhyam_śraiṣṭhya sukara--_sukara tva--_tva ādinā_ādi hariḥ_hari
śuddhasya_śudh tad--_tad akartṛ--_akartṛ tvam_tva tvā_tvad iti_iti ādi_ādi prāha_prāh pañcame_pañcama

div.p: dvitīye_dvitīya mumukṣum_mumukṣu prati_prati ātma--_ātman vijñānam_vijñāna mocakam_mocaka abhidhāya_abhidhā tad--_tad upāyayā_upāya niṣkāmam_niṣkāma karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ abhyadhāt_abhidhā labdha--_labh vijñānasya_vijñāna na_na kiṃcid_kaścit karma_karman asti_as iti_iti yaḥ_yad tu_tu ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati eva_eva syāt_as iti_iti tṛtīye_tṛtīya sarvam_sarva karma_karman akhilam_akhila pārtha_pārtha iti_iti caturthe_caturtha ca_ca avādīt_vad ante_anta tu_tu tasmāt_tad ajñāna--_ajñāna saṃbhūtam_sambhū iti_iti ādinā_ādi tasya_tad eva_eva punar_punar karma--_karman yogam_yoga prāvocat_pravac tatra_tatra arjunaḥ_arjuna pṛcchati_pracch saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa iti_iti he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa karmaṇām_karman sannyāsam_saṃnyāsa sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra virati--_virati rūpam_rūpa jñāna--_jñāna yogam_yoga iti_iti arthaḥ_artha punar_punar yogam_yoga karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna ca_ca sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra rūpam_rūpa śaṃsasi_śaṃs na_na ca_ca ekasya_eka yugapad_yugapad tau_tad sambhavetām_sambhū sthiti--_sthiti gati--_gati vat_vat tamaḥ--_tamas tejaḥ--_tejas vat_vat ca_ca viruddha--_virudh svarūpa--_svarūpa tvāt_tva tasmāt_tasmāt labdha--_labh jñānaḥ_jñāna karma_karman sannyaset_sannyas anutiṣṭhet_anuṣṭhā vā_vā iti_iti bhavat--_bhavat abhimatam_abhiman vettum_vid aśaktaḥ_aśakta aham_mad pṛcchāmi_pracch etayoḥ_etad karma--_karman sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa karma--_karman anuṣṭhānayoḥ_anuṣṭhāna yat_yad ekam_eka śreyaḥ_śreyas tvayā_tvad su_su niścitam_niści tattvam_tattva me_mad brūhi_brū iti_iti
BhG 5.2

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga ca_ca niḥśreyasa--_niḥśreyasa karau_kara ubhau_ubh
tayoḥ_tad tu_tu karma--_karman saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga viśiṣyate_viśiṣ

div.p: uvāca_vac ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na hi_hi vedānta--_vedānta vedya--_vid ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva jñam_jña prati_prati karma--_karman yogam_yoga aham_mad bravīmi_brū yatas_yatas pūrva--_pūrva uktena_vac saṃnyāsena_saṃnyāsa virodhaḥ_virodha syāt_as api_api tu_tu deha--_deha ātma--_ātman abhimāninam_abhimānin tvām_tvad bandhu--_bandhu vadha--_vadha ādi--_ādi nimitta--_nimitta śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādi--_ādi kṛtam_kṛ enam_enad saṃśayam_saṃśaya deha--_deha ātma--_ātman viveka--_viveka jñāna--_jñāna asinā_asi chittvā_chid paramātma--_paramātman jñāna--_jñāna upāya--_upāya bhūtam_bhū karma--_karman yogam_yoga ātiṣṭha_āsthā iti_iti karma--_karman yogena_yoga śuddha--_śuddha cittasya_citta ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna jāte_jan sati_as tad--_tad paripāka--_paripāka artham_artha jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā aṅga--_aṅga tvena_tva saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa pūrvam_pūrvam uktaḥ_vac evam_evam sati_as aṅga--_aṅga pradhānayoḥ_pradhāna vikalpa--_vikalpa yogāt_yoga saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga ca_ca iti_iti etau_etad ubhau_ubh api_api bhūmikā--_bhūmikā bhedena_bheda samuccitau_samucci eva_eva niḥśreyasam_niḥśreyasa sādhayataḥ_sādhay tathā_tathā api_api tu_tu tayoḥ_tad madhye_madhya tu_tu karma--_karman saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa sakāśāt_sakāśāt karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ bhavati_bhū iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana arjunasya_arjuna praśne_praśna tad--_tad uttaram_uttara śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa niḥśreyasa--_niḥśreyasa karau_kara jñāna--_jñāna utpatti--_utpatti hetu--_hetu tvena_tva mokṣa--_mokṣa upayoginau_upayogin tayoḥ_tad tu_tu karma--_karman saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa anadhikāri--_anadhikārin kṛtāt_kṛ karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga viśiṣyate_viśiṣ śreyān_śreyas adhikāra--_adhikāra sampādaka--_sampādaka tvena_tva

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga viśiṣyate_viśiṣ iti_iti jñāninaḥ_jñānin karma--_karman karaṇe_karaṇa na_na kaḥ_ka api_api doṣaḥ_doṣa pratyuta_pratyuta niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi dārḍhyāt_dārḍhya jñāna--_jñāna dārḍhyam_dārḍhya eva_eva syāt_as saṃnyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin tu_tu kadācid_kadācid citta--_citta vaiguṇye_vaiguṇya sati_as tad--_tad upaśamana--_upaśamana artham_artha kim_ka karma_karman niṣiddham_niṣidh jñāna--_jñāna abhyāsa--_abhyāsa pratibandhakam_pratibandhaka tu_tu citta--_citta vaiguṇyam_vaiguṇya eva_eva viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇe_grahaṇa tu_tu vānta--_vam āśi--_āśin tvam_tva eva_eva syāt_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa niḥśreyasa--_niḥśreyasa karau_kara mukti--_mukti hetū_hetu karma--_karman saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa jñāna--_jñāna yogāt_yoga viśiṣyate_viśiṣ śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha bhavati_bhū ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na khalu_khalu labdha--_labh jñānasya_jñāna api_api karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga doṣa--_doṣa āvahaḥ_āvaha kintu_kiṃtu jñāna--_jñāna garbha--_garbha tvāt_tva jñāna--_jñāna dārḍhya--_dārḍhya kṛt_kṛt eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭha--_niṣṭha tayā_tā karma--_karman sannyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin tu_tu citta--_citta doṣe_doṣa sati_as tad--_tad doṣa--_doṣa vināśāya_vināśa karma_karman anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā pratiṣedhaka--_pratiṣedhaka śāstrāt_śāstra karma--_karman tyāga--_tyāga vākyāni_vākya tu_tu ātmani_ātman ratau_rati satyām_as karmāṇi_karman tam_tad svayam_svayam tjayanti_tji iti_iti āhuḥ_ah tasmāt_tasmāt sukara--_sukara tvāt_tva apramāda--_apramāda tvāt_tva jñāna--_jñāna garbha--_garbha tvāt_tva ca_ca karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga śreyān_śreyas iti_iti
BhG 5.3

lg.l: jñeyaḥ_jñā sa_tad nitya--_nitya saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin yaḥ_yad na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ
nirdvandvaḥ_nirdvaṃdva hi_hi mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu sukham_sukham bandhāt_bandha pramucyate_pramuc

div.p: darśayati_darśay rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi rāhityena_rāhitya parameśvara--_parameśvara artham_artha karmāṇi_karman yaḥ_yad anutiṣṭhati_anuṣṭhā sa_tad nityam_nityam karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna kāle_kāla api_api saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin iti_iti evam_evam jñeyaḥ_jñā tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu nirdvandvaḥ_nirdvaṃdva rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi dvandva--_dvaṃdva śūnyaḥ_śūnya hi_hi śuddha--_śuddha cittaḥ_citta jñāna--_jñāna dvārā_dvār sukham_sukham anāyāsena_anāyāsa eva_eva bandhāt_bandha saṃsārāt_saṃsāra pramucyate_pramuc

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tam_tad eva_eva karma--_karman yogam_yoga stauti_stu jñeyaḥ_jñā iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri sa_tad karmaṇi_karman pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt api_api nityam_nityam saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin iti_iti jñeyaḥ_jñā kaḥ_ka asau_adas yaḥ_yad na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇa--_arpaṇa buddhyā_buddhi kriyamāṇam_kṛ karma_karman niṣphala--_niṣphala tva--_tva śaṅkayā_śaṅkā na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ svarga--_svarga ādikam_ādika nirdvandvaḥ_nirdvaṃdva rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa rahitaḥ_rahita hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt sukham_sukha anāyāsena_anāyāsa he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu bandhāt_bandha antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa aśuddhi--_aśuddhi rūpāt_rūpa jñāna--_jñāna pratibandhāt_pratibandha pramucyate_pramuc nitya--_nitya anitya--_anitya vastu--_vastu viveka--_viveka ādi--_ādi prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa muktaḥ_muc bhavati_bhū

āha_ah sa_tad śuddha--_śudh cittaḥ_citta karmī_karmin nitya--_nitya saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin jñeyaḥ_jñā he_he mahābāho_mahābāhu iti_iti mukti--_mukti nagarīm_nagarī jetum_ji saḥ_tad eva_eva mahāvīraḥ_mahāvīra iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva kutas_kutas viśiṣyate_viśiṣ tatra_tatra āha_ah jñeyaḥ_jñā iti_iti sa_tad viśuddha--_viśudh cittaḥ_citta karma--_karman yogī_yogin nitya--_nitya saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin sa_tad sarvadā_sarvadā jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā jñeyaḥ_jñā yaḥ_yad karma--_karman antargata--_antargam ātma--_ātman anubhava--_anubhava ānanda--_ānanda paritṛptaḥ_paritṛp tatas_tatas anyat_anya kiṃcid_kaścit na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ na_na ca_ca dveṣṭi_dviṣ
BhG 5.4

lg.l: sāṃkhya--_sāṃkhya yogau_yoga pṛthak_pṛthak bālāḥ_bāla pravadanti_pravad na_na paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita
ekam_eka api_api āsthitaḥ_āsthā samyak_samyak ubhayoḥ_ubhaya vindate_vid phalam_phala

div.p:
atas_atas vikalpam_vikalpa aṅgīkṛtya_aṅgīkṛ ubhayoḥ_ubhaya kaḥ_ka śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha iti_iti praśnaḥ_praśna ajñāninām_ajñānin eva_eva ucitaḥ_ucita na_na vivekinām_vivekin iti_iti āha_ah sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya yogau_yoga iti_iti sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya śabdena_śabda jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā vācinā_vācin tad--_tad aṅgam_aṅga saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa lakṣayati_lakṣay saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa karma--_karman yogau_yoga eka--_eka phalau_phala santau_as pṛthak_pṛthak svatantrau_svatantra iti_iti bālāḥ_bāla ajñāḥ_ajña eva_eva pravadanti_pravad na_na tu_tu paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu anayoḥ_idam ekam_eka api_api samyak_samyak āsthitaḥ_āsthā āśritavān_āśri ubhayoḥ_ubhaya api_api phalam_phala āpnoti_āp tathā_tathā hi_hi karma--_karman yogam_yoga samyak_samyak anutiṣṭhan_anuṣṭhā śuddha--_śudh cittaḥ_citta san_as jñāna--_jñāna dvārā_dvār yat_yad ubhayoḥ_ubhaya phalam_phala kaivalyam_kaivalya tat_tad vindati_vid saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa samyak_samyak
āsthitaḥ_āsthā api_api pūrvam_pūrvam anuṣṭhitasya_anuṣṭhā karma--_karman yogasya_yoga api_api paramparayā_paramparā jñāna--_jñāna dvārā_dvār yat_yad ubhayoḥ_ubhaya phalam_phala kaivalyam_kaivalya tat_tad vindati_vid iti_iti na_na pṛthak_pṛthak phala--_phala tvam_tva anayoḥ_idam iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

svarūpataḥ_svarūpa viruddhayoḥ_virudh phale_phala api_api virodhasya_virodha aucityāt_aucitya tathā_tathā ca_ca niḥśreyasa--_niḥśreyasa karau_kara ubhau_ubh iti_iti anupapannam_anupapanna iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah sāṃkhya--_sāṃkhya yogau_yoga iti_iti saṃkhyā_saṃkhyā samyak_samyak ātma--_ātman buddhiḥ_buddhi tām_tad vahati_vah iti_iti jñāna--_jñāna antaraṅga--_antaraṅga sādhanatayā_sādhanatā sāṅkhyaḥ_sāṃkhya saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa yogaḥ_yoga pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga tau_tad pṛthak_pṛthak viruddha--_virudh phalau_phala bālāḥ_bāla śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha viveka--_viveka jñāna--_jñāna śūnyāḥ_śūnya pravadanti_pravad na_na paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita kim_ka tarhi_tarhi paṇḍitānām_paṇḍita matam_mata ucyate_vac ekam_eka api_api saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa karmaṇoḥ_karman madhye_madhya samyak_samyak āsthitaḥ_āsthā
sva--_sva adhikāra--_adhikāra anurūpeṇa_anurūpa samyak_samyak yathā_yathā śāstram_śāstra kṛtavān_kṛ san_as ubhayoḥ_ubhaya vindate_vid phalam_phala jñāna--_jñāna utpatti--_utpatti dvāreṇa_dvāra niḥśreyasam_niḥśreyasa ekam_eka eva_eva

ghaṭate_ghaṭ vivekibhiḥ_vivekin ubhayoḥ_ubhaya pārthakya--_pārthakya abhāvasya_abhāva dṛṣṭa--_dṛś tvāt_tva iti_iti āha_ah sāṃkhya--_sāṃkhya yogau_yoga iti_iti sāṃkhya--_sāṃkhya śabdena_śabda jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā vācinā_vācin tad--_tad aṅgaḥ_aṅga saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa lakṣyate_lakṣay saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa karma--_karman yogau_yoga pṛthak_pṛthak svatantrau_svatantra iti_iti bālāḥ_bāla vadanti_vad vijñāḥ_vijña jñeyaḥ_jñā sa_tad nitya--_nitya saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin pūrvokteḥ_pūrvokti atas_atas ekam_eka api_api iti_iti ādi_ādi

baladevaḥ_baladeva yaḥ_yad śreyaḥ_śreyas etayoḥ_etad ekam_eka iti_iti tvad--_tvad vākyam_vākya ca_ca na_na ghaṭate_ghaṭ iti_iti āha_ah sāṃkhya--_sāṃkhya iti_iti jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga karma--_karman yogau_yoga phala--_phala bhedāt_bheda pṛthak_pṛthak bhūtau_bhū iti_iti bālāḥ_bāla pravadanti_pravad na_na tu_tu paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita ataeva_ataeva ekam_eka iti_iti ādi_ādi phalam_phala ātma--_ātman avaloka--_avaloka lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa
BhG 5.5

lg.l: yat_yad sāṃkhyaiḥ_sāṃkhya prāpyate_prāp sthānam_sthāna tat_tad yogaiḥ_yoga api_api gamyate_gam
ekam_eka sāṃkhyam_sāṃkhya ca_ca yogam_yoga ca_ca yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś sa_tad paśyati_paś

div.p: sāṃkhyaiḥ_sāṃkhya jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhaiḥ_niṣṭha saṃnyāsibhiḥ_saṃnyāsin yat_yad sthānam_sthāna mokṣa--_mokṣa ākhyam_ākhyā prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa sākṣāt_sākṣāt avāpyate_avāp yogaiḥ_yoga iti_iti ārśaḥ_ārśas ādi--_ādi tvāt_tva matu--_matu arthīyaḥ_arthīya a_a c--_c pratyayaḥ_pratyaya draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś tena_tena karma--_karman yogibhiḥ_yogin api_api tat_tad eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna dvāreṇa_dvāra gamyate_gam avāpyate_avāp atas_atas sāṃkhyam_sāṃkhya ca_ca yogam_yoga ca_ca eka--_eka phala--_phala tvena_tva ekam_eka yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś saḥ_tad eva_eva samyak_samyak paśyati_dṛś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ekasya_eka anuṣṭhānāt_anuṣṭhāna katham_katham ubhayoḥ_ubhaya phalam_phala vindate_vid tathā_tathā āha_ah yat_yad sāṃkhyaiḥ_sāṃkhya iti_iti sāṅkhyaiḥ_sāṃkhya jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhaiḥ_niṣṭha saṃnyāsibhiḥ_saṃnyāsin aihika--_aihika karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna śūnya--_śūnya tve_tva api_api prāc--_prāñc bhavīya--_bhavīya karmabhiḥ_karman eva_eva saṃskṛta--_saṃskṛ antar_antar karaṇaiḥ_karaṇa śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi pūrvikayā_pūrvika jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhayā_niṣṭhā yat_yad prasiddham_prasidh vyutpattyā_vyutpatti mokṣa--_mokṣa ākhyam_ākhyā prāpyate_prāp āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa abhāva--_abhāva mātreṇa_mātra labhyate_labh iva_iva nitya--_nitya prāptatvāt_prāptatva yogaiḥ_yoga api_api bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇa--_arpaṇa buddhyā_buddhi phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi rāhityena_rāhitya kṛtāni_kṛ karmāṇi_karman śāstrīyāṇi_śāstrīya yogāḥ_yoga te_tad arśas--_arśas ādi--_ādi tvāt_tva matu--_matu arthīyaḥ_arthīya a_a c--_c pratyayaḥ_pratyaya taiḥ_tad yogibhiḥ_yogin api_api sattva--_sattva śuddhyā_śuddhi saṃhyāsa--_saṃhyāsa pūrvaka--_pūrvaka śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi puraḥsarayā_puraḥsara jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhayā_niṣṭhā vartamāne_vṛt bhaviṣyati_bhū vā_vā janmani_janman sampatsyamānayā_sampad tat_tad sthānam_sthāna gamyate_gam atas_atas eka--_eka phala--_phala tvāt_tva ekam_eka sāṃkhyam_sāṃkhya ca_ca yogam_yoga ca_ca yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś saḥ_tad eva_eva samyak_samyak paśyati_dṛś na_na anyaḥ_anya

ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva yeṣām_yad saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa pūrvikā_pūrvaka jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā dṛśyate_dṛś teṣām_tad tayā_tad eva_eva liṅgena_liṅga prāc--_prāñc janmasu_janman bhagavat--_bhagavant arpita--_arpay karma--_karman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā anumīyate_anumā kāraṇam_kāraṇa antareṇa_antareṇa kārya--_kārya utpatti--_utpatti ayogāt_ayoga tat_tad
yāni_yad atas_atas anyāni_anya janmāni_janman teṣu_tad nūnam_nūnam kṛtam_kṛ bhavet_bhū yat_yad kṛtyam_kṛtya puruṣeṇa_puruṣa iha_iha na_na anyathā_anyathā brahmaṇi_brahman sthitiḥ_sthiti

evam_evam yeṣām_yad bhagavat--_bhagavant arpita--_arpay karma--_karman niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā dṛśyate_dṛś teṣām_tad tayā_tad eva_eva liṅgena_liṅga bhāvinī_bhāvin saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa pūrva--_pūrva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā anumīyate_anumā sāmagryāḥ_sāmagrī kārya--_kārya avyabhicāri--_avyabhicārin tvāt_tva tasmāt_tasmāt ajñena_ajña mumukṣuṇā_mumukṣu antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhaye_śuddhi prathamam_prathamam karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā na_na tu_tu saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa sa_tad tu_tu vairāgya--_vairāgya tīvra--_tīvra tāyām_tā svayam_svayam eva_eva bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti

sāṃkhyaiḥ_sāṃkhya sannyāsena_saṃnyāsa yogaiḥ_yoga niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman bahu--_bahu vacanam_vacana gauraveṇa_gaurava ataeva_ataeva tat_tad dvayam_dvaya pṛthak_pṛthak bhūtam_bhū api_api yaḥ_yad vivekena_viveka ekam_eka eva_eva paśyati_dṛś sa_tad paśyati_dṛś cakṣuṣmān_cakṣuṣmat paṇḍitaḥ_paṇḍita iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva etat_etad viśadayati_viśaday yat_yad iti_iti sāṃkhyaiḥ_sāṃkhya jñāna--_jñāna yogibhiḥ_yogin yogaiḥ_yoga niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmabhiḥ_karman arśaḥ_arśas ādi_ādi ac_ac sthānam_sthāna ātma--_ātman avaloka--_avaloka lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa ataeva_ataeva tat_tad dvayam_dvaya nivṛtti--_nivṛtti pravṛtti--_pravṛtti rūpatayā_rūpatā bhinna--_bhid rūpam_rūpa api_api phala--_phala aikyāt_aikya ekam_eka yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś vetti_vid sa_tad paśyati_dṛś sa_tad cakṣuṣmān_cakṣuṣmat paṇḍitaḥ_paṇḍita iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 5.6

lg.l: saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa tu_tu mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu duḥkham_duḥkham āptum_āp a_a yogataḥ_yoga
yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj muniḥ_muni brahma_brahman nacireṇa_nacireṇa adhigacchati_adhigam

div.p: āha_ah ayogataḥ_ayoga karma--_karman yogam_yoga vinā_vinā saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa duḥkham_duḥkha āptum_āp duḥkha--_duḥkha hetuḥ_hetu aśakyaḥ_aśakya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi abhāvena_abhāva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhāyāḥ_niṣṭhā asambhavāt_asaṃbhava yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj tu_tu śuddha--_śudh citta--_citta tayā_tā muniḥ_muni saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin bhūtvā_bhū acireṇa_acireṇa eva_eva brahma_brahman adhigacchati_adhigam a_a parokṣam_parokṣa jānāti_jñā atas_atas citta--_citta śuddheḥ_śuddhi prāk_prāk karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa viśiṣyate_viśiṣ iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac siddham_sidh tat_tad uktam_vac vārttika--_vārttika kṛdbhiḥ_kṛt
pramādinaḥ_pramādin bahis_bahis cittāḥ_citta piśunāḥ_piśuna kalaha--_kalaha utsukāḥ_utsuka sannyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin api_api dṛśyante_dṛś daiva--_daiva sandūṣita--_saṃdūṣay āśrayāḥ_āśraya

kriyate_kṛ āha_ah ayogataḥ_ayoga yogam_yoga antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śodhakam_śodhaka śāstrīyam_śāstrīya karma--_karman antareṇa_antara haṭhāt_haṭha eva_eva yaḥ_yad kṛtaḥ_kṛ saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa sa_tad tu_tu duḥkham_duḥkha āptum_āp eva_eva bhavati_bhū aśuddha--_aśuddha antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa tvena_tva tad--_tad phalasya_phala jñāna--_jñāna nisṭhāyāḥ_nisṭhā śodhake_śodhaka ca_ca karmaṇi_karman anadhikārāt_anadhikāra karma--_karman brahma--_brahman ubhaya--_ubhaya bhraṣṭa--_bhraṃś tvena_tva parama--_parama saṅkaṭa--_saṃkaṭa āpatteḥ_āpatti karma--_karman yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj tu_tu śuddha--_śudh antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa tvāt_tva muniḥ_muni manana--_manana śīlaḥ_śīla saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin bhūtvā_bhū brahma_brahman satya--_satya jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa ātmānam_ātman na_na cireṇa_cireṇa śīghram_śīghram eva_eva adhigacchati_adhigam sākṣātkaroti_sākṣātkṛ pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka etat_etad ca_ca uktam_vac prāk_prāk eva_eva

na_na karmaṇām_karman anārambhāt_anārambha naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya puruṣaḥ_puruṣa aśnute_aś
na_na ca_ca saṃnyasanāt_saṃnyasana eva_eva siddhim_siddhi samadhigacchati_samadhigam iti_iti
div.l: atas_atas eka--_eka phala--_phala tve_tva api_api karma--_karman saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga viśiṣyate_viśiṣ iti_iti yat_yad prāk_prāk uktam_vac tat_tad upapannam_upapad
div.p: āha_ah citta--_citta vaiguṇye_vaiguṇya sati_as iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa ayogataḥ_ayoga karma--_karman yoga--_yoga abhāvāt_abhāva citta--_citta vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya praśāmaka--_praśāmaka karma--_karman yogasya_yoga saṃnyāsini_saṃnyāsin abhāvāt_abhāva tatra_tatra anadhikārāt_anadhikāra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva prāptum_prāp bhavati_bhū tat_tad uktam_vac vārttika--_vārttika kṛdbhiḥ_kṛt
pramādinaḥ_pramādin bahis_bahis cittāḥ_citta piśunāḥ_piśuna kalaha--_kalaha utsukāḥ_utsuka sannyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin api_api dṛśyante_dṛś daiva--_daiva sandūṣita--_saṃdūṣay āśrayāḥ_āśraya iti_iti

śrutiḥ_śruti api_api -_yadi na_na samuddharanti_samuddhṛ yatayaḥ_yati hṛdi_hṛd kāma--_kāma jaṭāḥ_jaṭā iti_iti bhagavatā_bhagavant api_api yaḥ_yad tva_tvad saṃyata--_saṃyam ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ vargaḥ_varga iti_iti ādi_ādi uktam_vac tasmāt_tasmāt yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmavān_karmavat muniḥ_muni jñānī_jñānin san_as brahma_brahman

baladevaḥ_baladeva jñāna--_jñāna yogasya_yoga duṣkara--_duṣkara tvāt_tva sukara--_sukara karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga śreyān_śreyas iti_iti āha_ah saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa tu_tu iti_iti ayogataḥ_ayoga karma--_karman yogam_yoga vinā_vinā duḥkham_duḥkha prāptum_prāp bhavati_bhū duṣkara--_duṣkara tvāt_tva sa_sa pramāda--_pramāda tvāt_tva ca_ca duḥkha--_duḥkha hetuḥ_hetu eva_eva syāt_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmī_karmin tu_tu muniḥ_muni ātma--_ātman manana--_manana śīlaḥ_śīla san_as acireṇa_acireṇa śīghram_śīghram eva_eva brahma_brahman adhigacchati_adhigam
BhG 5.7

lg.l: yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj viśuddha--_viśudh ātmā_ātman vijita--_viji ātmā_ātman jita--_ji indriyaḥ_indriya
sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta ātma--_ātman bhūta--_bhū ātmā_ātman kurvan_kṛ api_api na_na lipyate_lip

div.p: syāt_as āha_ah yogena_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj ataeva_ataeva viśuddhaḥ_viśudh ātmā_ātman cittam_citta yasya_yad saḥ_tad ataeva_ataeva vijitaḥ_viji ātmā_ātman śarīram_śarīra yena_yad atas_atas eva_eva jitāni_ji indriyāṇi_indriya yena_yad tatas_tatas ca_ca sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta ātma--_ātman bhūtaḥ_bhū ātmā_ātman yasya_yad sa_tad loka--_loka saṅgraha--_saṃgraha artham_artha svābhāvikam_svābhāvika vā_vā karma_karman kurvan_kṛ api_api na_na lipyate_lip

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu karmaṇaḥ_karman bandha--_bandha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj muniḥ_muni brahma_brahman adhigacchati_adhigam iti_iti anupapannam_anupapanna iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇa--_arpaṇa phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi rāhitya--_rāhitya ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa yuktam_yuj śāstrīyam_śāstrīya karma_karman yogaḥ_yoga iti_iti ucyate_vac tena_tad yogena_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj puruṣaḥ_puruṣa prathamam_prathama viśuddha--_viśudh ātmā_ātman viśuddhaḥ_viśudh rajaḥ--_rajas tamobhyām_tamas akaluṣitaḥ_akaluṣita ātma--_ātman antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa rūpam_rūpa sattvam_sattva yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā nirmala--_nirmala antaḥkaraṇaḥ_antaḥkaraṇa san_as vijita--_viji ātmā_ātman sva--_sva vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ dehaḥ_deha tatas_tatas jita--_ji indriyaḥ_indriya sva--_sva vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ sarva--_sarva bāhya--_bāhya indriyaḥ_indriya etena_etad manu--_manu uktaḥ_vac tridaṇḍī_tridaṇḍin kathitaḥ_kathay

vāc--_vāc daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa atha_atha manaḥ--_manas daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa kāya--_kāya daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa tathā_tathā eva_eva ca_ca yasya_yad ete_etad nitya--_nitya tā_tā daṇḍāḥ_daṇḍa sa_tad tridaṇḍī_tridaṇḍin iti_iti kathyata_kathay

vāc_vāc iti_iti bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etādṛśasya_etādṛśa tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna avaśyam_avaśyam bhavati_bhū iti_iti āha_ah sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta ātma--_ātman bhūta--_bhū ātmā_ātman sarva--_sarva bhūtaḥ_bhū ātma--_ātman bhūtaḥ_bhū ca_ca ātmā_ātman svarūpam_svarūpa yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā jaḍa--_jaḍa ajaḍa--_ajaḍa ātmakam_ātmaka sarvaḥ_sarva ātma--_ātman mātram_mātra paśyan_dṛś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta ātma--_ātman bhūtaḥ_bhū ātmā_ātman yasya_yad iti_iti vyākhyāne_vyākhyāna tu_tu sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta ātmā_ātman iti_iti ātma--_ātman bhūtā_bhū iti_iti adhikam_adhika syāt_as sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman padayoḥ_pada jaḍa--_jaḍa ajaḍa--_ajaḍa paratve_paratva tu_tu samañjasam_samañjasa etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa paramārtha--_paramārtha darśī_darśin kurvan_kṛ api_api karmāṇi_karman para--_para dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi na_na lipyate_lip taiḥ_tad karmabhiḥ_karman sva--_sva dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi tad--_tad abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj jñānī_jñānin trividhaḥ_trividha viśuddha--_viśudh ātmā_ātman vijita--_viji buddhiḥ_buddhi ekaḥ_eka vijita--_viji ātmā_ātman viśuddha--_viśudh cittaḥ_citta dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya jita--_ji indriyaḥ_indriya tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva pūrveṣām_pūrva sādhana--_sādhana tāratamyāt_tāratamya utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa etādṛśe_etādṛśa gṛhasthe_gṛhastha tu_tu sarve_sarva api_api jīvāḥ_jīva anurajyanti_anurañj iti_iti āha_ah sarveṣām_sarva api_api bhūtānām_bhūta ātma--_ātman bhūtaḥ_bhū prema--_preman āspadībhūtaḥ_āspadībhū ātmā_ātman dehaḥ_deha yasya_yad saḥ_tad

baladevaḥ_baladeva īdṛśī_īdṛśa mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu sarveṣām_sarva preyān_preyas iti_iti āha_ah yoga--_yoga iti_iti yoge_yoga niṣkāme_niṣkāma karmaṇi_karman yuktaḥ_yuj nirataḥ_niram viśuddha--_viśudh ātmā_ātman nirmala--_nirmala buddhiḥ_buddhi ataeva_ataeva vijita--_viji ātmā_ātman vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ manāḥ_manas ataeva_ataeva jita--_ji indriyaḥ_indriya śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya rāga--_rāga śūnyaḥ_śūnya ataeva_ataeva sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta jīvānām_jīva ātma--_ātman bhūtaḥ_bhū prema--_preman āspada--_āspada tām_tā gataḥ_gam ātmā_ātman dehaḥ_deha yasya_yad saḥ_tad na_na ca_ca atra_atra pārtha--_pārtha sārathinā_sārathi sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman aikyam_aikya abhimatam_abhiman na_na tu_tu eva_eva aham_mad iti_iti ādinā_ādi sarva--_sarva ātmanām_ātman mithas_mithas bhedasya_bheda tena_tad abhidhānāt_abhidhāna tad--_tad vādinā_vādin api_api vijñā--_vijñā ajñā--_ajñā bhedasya_bheda vaktum_vac ca_ca evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta kurvan_kṛ api_api vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman anusandhānāt_anusaṃdhāna anātmani_anātman ātma--_ātman abhimānena_abhimāna na_na lipyate_lip acireṇa_acireṇa ātmānam_ātman adhigacchati_adhigam karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga
śreyān_śreyas
BhG 5.8

lg.l: na_na eva_eva kim_ka cit_cit karomi_kṛ iti_iti yuktaḥ_yuj manyeta_man tattva--_tattva vid_vid
paśyan_dṛś śṛṇvan_śru spṛśan_spṛś jighran_ghrā aśnan_aś gacchan_gam svapan_svap śvasan_śvas
pralapan_pralap visṛjan_visṛj gṛhṇan_grah unmiṣan_unmiṣ nimiṣan_nimiṣ api_api
indriyāṇi_indriya indriya--_indriya artheṣu_artha vartante_vṛt iti_iti dhārayan_dhāray

div.p: āha_ah karma--_karman yogena_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj krameṇa_krameṇa tattva--_tattva vid_vid bhūtvā_bhū darśana--_darśana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādīni_ādi kurvan_kṛ api_api indriyāṇi_indriya indriyārtheṣu_indriyārtha vartante_vṛt iti_iti dhārayan_dhāray buddhyā_buddhi niścinvan_niści kiṃcid_kaścit api_api aham_mad na_na karomi_kṛ iti_iti manyeta_man manyate_man tatra_tatra darśana--_darśana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa sparśana--_sparśana āghrāna--_āghrāna aśanāni_aśana cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādi--_ādi jñāna--_jñāna indriya--_indriya vyāpārāḥ_vyāpāra gatiḥ_gati pādayoḥ_pāda svāpaḥ_svāpa buddheḥ_buddhi śvāsaḥ_śvāsa prāṇasya_prāṇa pralapanam_pralapana vāc_vāc indriyasya_indriya visargaḥ_visarga pāyu--_pāyu upasthayoḥ_upastha grahaṇam_grahaṇa hastayoḥ_hasta unmeṣaṇa--_unmeṣaṇa nimeṣaṇe_nimeṣaṇa kūrma--_kūrma ākhya--_ākhya prāṇasya_prāṇa iti_iti vivekaḥ_viveka etāni_etad karmāṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ api_api abhimāna--_abhimāna abhāvāt_abhāva brahma--_brahman vid_vid na_na lipyate_lip tathā_tathā ca_ca parāmarṣam_parāmarṣa sūtram_sūtra tad--_tad adhigame_adhigama uttara--_uttara pūrva--_pūrva aghayoḥ_agha aśleṣa--_aśleṣa vināśau_vināśa tad--_tad vyapadeśāt_vyapadeśa iti_iti
