madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etat_etad eva_eva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ na_na eva_eva iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādi--_ādi jñāna--_jñāna indriyaiḥ_indriya vāc--_vāc ādi--_ādi karmendriyaiḥ_karmendriya prāṇa--_prāṇa ādi--_ādi vāyu--_vāyu bhedaiḥ_bheda antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa catuṣṭayena_catuṣṭaya ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad ceṣṭāsu_ceṣṭā kriyamāṇāsu_kṛ indriyāṇi_indriya indriya--_indriya ādīni_ādi eva_eva indriya--_indriya artheṣu_artha sva--_sva sva--_sva dhārayan_dhāray avadhārayan_avadhāray na_na eva_eva kiṃcid_kaścit karomi_kṛ iti_iti manyeta_man manyate_man tattva--_tattva vid_vid parama--_parama artha--_artha darśī_darśin yuktaḥ_yuj samāhita--_samāhita cittaḥ_citta athavā_athavā ādau_ādi yuktaḥ_yuj karma--_karman yogena_yoga paścāt_paścāt antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi dvāreṇa_dvāra tattva--_tattva vid_vid bhūtvā_bhū na_na eva_eva kiṃcid_kaścit karomi_kṛ iti_iti manyate_man iti_iti sambandhaḥ_sambandha

tatra_tatra darśana--_darśana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa sparśana--_sparśana ghrāṇa--_ghrāṇa aśanāni_aśana cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus śrotra--_śrotra tvac--_tvac ghrāṇa--_ghrāṇa rasanānām_rasana pañca--_pañcan jñāna--_jñāna indriyāṇām_indriya vyāpārāḥ_vyāpāra paśyan_dṛś śṛṇvan_śru spṛśan_spṛś jighran_ghrā aśnan_aś iti_iti uktāḥ_vac gatiḥ_gati pādayoḥ_pāda pralāpaḥ_pralāpa vācaḥ_vāc visargaḥ_visarga pāyu--_pāyu upasthayoḥ_upastha grahaṇam_grahaṇa hastayoḥ_hasta iti_iti pañca_pañcan karmendriya--_karmendriya vyāpārāḥ_vyāpāra gacchan_gam pralapan_pralap visṛjan_visṛj gṛhṇan_grah iti_iti uktāḥ_vac śvasan_śvas iti_iti prāṇa--_prāṇa ādi--_ādi pañcakasya_pañcaka vyāpāra--_vyāpāra upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa unmiṣan_unmiṣ nimiṣan_nimiṣ iti_iti nāga--_nāga kūrma--_kūrma ādi--_ādi pañcakasya_pañcaka svapan_svap iti_iti antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa catuṣṭayasya_catuṣṭaya artha--_artha krama--_krama vaśāt_vaśa pāṭha--_pāṭha kramam_krama bhaṅktvā_bhañj vyākhyātau_vyākhyā imau_idam ślokau_śloka yasmāt_yasmāt sarva--_sarva vyāpāreṣu_vyāpāra api_api ātmanaḥ_ātman akartṛ--_akartṛ tvam_tva eva_eva paśyati_dṛś atas_atas kurvan_kṛ api_api na_na lipyata_lip
iti_iti yuktam_yuj eva_eva uktam_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yena_yad karmaṇā_karman ālepaḥ_ālepa tam_tad prakāram_prakāra śikṣayati_śikṣay na_na eva_eva iti_iti yuktaḥ_yuj karma--_karman yogī_yogin darśana--_darśana ādīni_ādi kurvan_kṛ api_api indriyāṇi_indriya indriyārtheṣu_indriyārtha vartante_vṛt iti_iti dhārayan_dhāray buddhyā_buddhi niścinvan_niści nirabhimānaḥ_nirabhimāna kiṃcid_kaścit api_api aham_mad na_na eva_eva karomi_kṛ iti_iti manyate_man

baladevaḥ_baladeva śuddhasya_śuddha ātmanaḥ_ātman adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna ādi--_ādi pañca--_pañcan apekṣita--_apekṣ karma--_karman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na asti_as iti_iti upadiśati_upadiś na_na eva_eva iti_iti yuktaḥ_yuj niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmī_karmin prādhānika--_prādhānika deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi saṃsargāt_saṃsarga darśana--_darśana ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ api_api tattva--_tattva vid_vid viviktam_vivic ātma--_ātman tattvam_tattva anubhavan_anubhū indriyārtheṣu_indriyārtha rūpa--_rūpa ādiṣu_ādi indriyāṇi_indriya cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādīni_ādi mad_mad iti_iti dhārayan_dhāray niścinvan_niści aham_mad kiṃcid_kaścit api_api na_na karomi_kṛ iti_iti manyate_man paśyan_dṛś śṛṇvan_śru spṛśan_spṛś jighran_ghrā aśnan_aś iti_iti cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus śrotra--_śrotra tvac--_tvac ghrāṇa--_ghrāṇa rasanānām_rasana jñāna--_jñāna indriyāṇām_indriya darśana--_darśana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa sparśana--_sparśana āghrāna--_āghrāna aśanāni_aśana vyāpārāḥ_vyāpāra tatra_tatra gamanam_gamana pādayoḥ_pāda pralāpaḥ_pralāpa vācaḥ_vāc grahaṇam_grahaṇa hastayoḥ_hasta iti_iti bodhyam_budh śvasan_śvas iti_iti prāṇa--_prāṇa ādīnām_ādi unmiṣan_unmiṣ nimiṣan_nimiṣ iti_iti nāga--_nāga ādīnām_ādi prāṇa--_prāṇa bhedānām_bheda svapan_svap iti_iti antaḥkaraṇānām_antaḥkaraṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kramāt_kramāt vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā vijñāna--_vijñāna sukha--_sukha eka--_eka rasasya_rasa mama_mad anādi--_anādi vāsanā--_vāsanā hetuka--_hetuka prādhānika--_prādhānika deha--_deha ādi--_ādi sambandha--_sambandha nimittam_nimitta tat_tad īdṛśa--_īdṛśa karma--_karman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na tu_tu svarūpa--_svarūpa eka--_eka nimittam_nimitta iti_iti manyate_man iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na svarūpa--_svarūpa prayuktam_prayuj ātmanaḥ_ātman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva kiṃcid_kaścit api_api na_na asti_as iti_iti śakyam_śakya abhidhātum_abhidhā nirdhāraṇe_nirdhāraṇa manane_manana ca_ca tasya_tad abhidhānāt_abhidhāna tat_tad tat_tad ca_ca jñānam_jñāna eva_eva tat_tad ca_ca ātmanaḥ_ātman nityam_nitya na_na hi_hi vijñātuḥ_vijñātṛ vijñāteḥ_vijñāti viparilāpaḥ_viparilāpa vidyate_vid iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tad--_tad siddhiḥ_siddhi ca_ca hariṇā_hari dharma--_dharma bhūtena_bhū jñānena_jñāna ca_ca iti_iti āhuḥ_ah
BhG 5.10

lg.l: brahmaṇi_brahman ādhāya_ādhā karmāṇi_karman saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj karoti_kṛ yaḥ_yad
lipyate_lip na_na sa_tad pāpena_pāpa padma--_padma patram_pattra iva_iva ambhasā_ambhas

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tarhi_tarhi yasya_yad karomi_kṛ iti_iti abhimānaḥ_abhimāna asti_as tasya_tad karma--_karman lepaḥ_lepa durvāraḥ_durvāra tathā_tathā aviśuddha--_aviśuddha citta--_citta tvāt_tva saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa api_api na_na asti_as iti_iti mahat_mahat saṅkaṭam_saṃkaṭa āpannam_āpad iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah brahmaṇi_brahman iti_iti brahmaṇi_brahman ādhāya_ādhā parameśvare_parameśvara samarpya_samarpay tad--_tad phale_phala ca_ca saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj yaḥ_yad karmāṇi_karman karoti_kṛ asau_adas pāpena_pāpa bandhu--_bandhu hetutayā_hetutā pāpiṣṭhena_pāpiṣṭha puṇya--_puṇya pāpa--_pāpa ātmakena_ātmaka karmaṇā_karman na_na lipyate_lip yathā_yathā padma--_padma patram_pattra ambhasi_ambhas sthitam_sthā api_api tena_tad ambhasā_ambhas na_na lipyate_lip tadvat_tadvat

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tarhi_tarhi avidvān_avidvas kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimānāt_abhimāna lipyeta_lip eva_eva tathā_tathā ca_ca tasya_tad saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa pūrvikā_pūrvaka jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā syāt_as iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah brahmaṇi_brahman iti_iti brahmaṇi_brahman parameśvare_parameśvara ādhāya_ādhā samarpya_samarpay saṅgam_saṅga phala--_phala abhilāṣam_abhilāṣa tyaktvā_tyaj īśvara--_īśvara artham_artha bhṛtyaḥ_bhṛtya iva_iva svāmi--_svāmin artham_artha sva--_sva phala--_phala nirapekṣa--_nirapekṣa tayā_tā karomi_kṛ iti_iti abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya karmāṇi_karman laukikāni_laukika vaidikāni_vaidika ca_ca karoti_kṛ pāpa--_pāpa puṇya--_puṇya ātmakena_ātmaka karmaṇā_karman iti_iti yāvat_yāvat yathā_yathā padma--_padma patram_pattra upari_upari prakṣiptena_prakṣip ambhasā_ambhas na_na lipyate_lip tadvat_tadvat bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇa--_arpaṇa buddhyā_buddhi anuṣṭhitam_anuṣṭhā karma_karman buddhi--_buddhi śuddhi--_śuddhi phalam_phala eva_eva syāt_as
karoti_kṛ lipyate_lip

baladevaḥ_baladeva uktam_ukta viśadayan_viśaday āha_ah brahmaṇi_brahman iti_iti brahma--_brahman śabdena_śabda atra_atra triguṇa--_triguṇa avastham_avasthā pradhānam_pradhāna uktam_vac tasmāt_tasmāt etat_etad brahma_brahman nāma--_nāman rūpam_rūpa annam_anna ca_ca jñāyate_jñā iti_iti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa mama_mad yoniḥ_yoni mahat_mahat brahma_brahman iti_iti vakṣyamāṇāt_vac ca_ca deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādīni_ādi pradhāna--_pradhāna pariṇāma--_pariṇāma viśeṣāṇi_viśeṣa bhavanti_bhū tad--_tad rūpa--_rūpa tayā_tā pariṇate_pariṇam pradhāne_pradhāna darśana--_darśana ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman ādhāya_ādhā tasya_tad eva_eva etāni_etad na_na tu_tu tad--_tad viviktasya_vivic śuddhasya_śuddha mama_mad iti_iti nirdhārya_nirdhāray iti_iti arthaḥ_artha saṅgam_saṅga tad--_tad phala--_phala abhilāṣam_abhilāṣa tad--_tad kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa ca_ca tyaktvā_tyaj yaḥ_yad tāni_tad karoti_kṛ sa_tad tādṛś_tādṛś deha--_deha ādimattayā_ādimattā san_as api_api deha--_deha ādi--_ādi ātma--_ātman abhimānena_abhimāna pāpena_pāpa na_na lipyate_lip tathā_tathā upari_upari nikṣiptena_nikṣip ambhasā_ambhas spṛṣṭam_spṛś api_api padma--_padma patram_pattra tadvat_tadvat mayi_mad saṃnyasya_saṃnyas karmāṇi_karman pūrva--_pūrva svārasyāt_svārasya brahmaṇi_brahman paramātmani_paramātman vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā prādhānika--_prādhānika deha--_deha ādi--_ādi saṃsṛṣṭasya_saṃsṛj eva_eva jīvasya_jīva darśana--_darśana ādi--_ādi karma--_karman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na tu_tu tad--_tad viviktasya_vivic iti_iti arthasya_artha prakṛta--_prakṛta tvāt_tva
BhG 5.11

lg.l: kāyena_kāya manasā_manas buddhyā_buddhi kevalaiḥ_kevala indriyaiḥ_indriya api_api
yoginaḥ_yogin karma_karman kurvanti_kṛ saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj ātma--_ātman śuddhaye_śuddhi

div.p: syāt_as kāyena_kāya dehena_deha manasā_manas buddhyā_buddhi ca_ca yoginaḥ_yogin saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj kāyena_kāya manasā_manas buddhyā_buddhi kevalaiḥ_kevala indriyaiḥ_indriya api_api kevala--_kevala śabdaḥ_śabda kāya--_kāya ādibhiḥ_ādi api_api pratyekam_pratyekam sambadhyate_sambandh sarva--_sarva vyāpāreṣu_vyāpāra mamatā--_mamatā varjanāya_varjana yoginaḥ_yogin karmiṇaḥ_karmin karma_karman kurvanti_kṛ saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj phala--_phala viṣayam_viṣaya ātma--_ātman śuddhaye_śuddhi sattva--_sattva śuddhaye_śuddhi iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tasmāt_tasmāt tatra_tatra eva_eva tava_tvad adhikāraḥ_adhikāra iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad eva_eva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ kāyena_kāya iti_iti kāyena_kāya manasā_manas buddhyā_buddhi indriyaiḥ_indriya api_api yoginaḥ_yogin karmiṇaḥ_karmin phala--_phala saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj karma_karman kurvanti_kṛ kāya--_kāya ādīnām_ādi sarveṣām_sarva viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa kevalaiḥ_kevala iti_iti īśvarāya_īśvara eva_eva karomi_kṛ na_na mama_mad phalāya_phala iti_iti mamatā--_mamatā śūnyaiḥ_śūnya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātma--_ātman śuddhaye_śuddhi citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kevalaiḥ_kevala indriyaiḥ_indriya iti_iti indrāya_indra svāhā_svāhā iti_iti ādinā_ādi haviḥ--_havis ādi--_ādi arpaṇa--_arpaṇa kāle_kāla yadi_yadi api_api manaḥ_manas kvāpi_kvāpi anyatra_anyatra tat_tad api_api iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātma--_ātman viśuddhaye_viśuddhi manaḥ--_manas śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva sat--_sat ācāram_ācāra pramāṇayan_pramāṇay etat_etad vivṛṇoti_vivṛ kāyena_kāya iti_iti kāya--_kāya ādibhiḥ_ādi sādhyam_sādhay karma_karman kāya--_kāya ādi--_ādi ahaṃbhāva--_ahambhāva śūnyāḥ_śūnya yoginaḥ_yogin kurvanti_kṛ kevalaiḥ_kevala viśuddhaiḥ_viśudh saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj iti_iti prāgvat_prāgvat ātma--_ātman śuddhaye_śuddhi anādi--_anādi deha--_deha ātma--_ātman abhimāna--_abhimāna nivṛttaye_nivṛtti
BhG 5.12

lg.l: yuktaḥ_yuj karma--_karman phalam_phala tyaktvā_tyaj śāntim_śānti āpnoti_āp naiṣṭhikīm_naiṣṭhika
ayuktaḥ_ayukta kāma--_kāma kāreṇa_kāra phale_phala saktaḥ_sañj nibadhyate_nibandh

div.p: āha_ah yuktaḥ_yuj parameśvara--_parameśvara eka--_eka niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā san_as karmaṇaḥ_karman phalam_phala tyaktvā_tyaj karmaṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ ātyantikīm_ātyantika śāntim_śānti mokṣam_mokṣa prāpnoti_prāp ayuktaḥ_ayukta tu_tu bahirmukhaḥ_bahirmukha kāma--_kāma kāreṇa_kāra kāmataḥ_kāma pravṛttyā_pravṛtti phale_phala āsaktaḥ_āsañj nitarām_nitarām bandham_bandha prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāna--_abhimāna sāmye_sāmya api_api tena_tad eva_eva karmaṇā_karman kaścid_kaścit mucyate_muc kaścid_kaścit tu_tu badhyate_bandh iti_iti vaiṣamye_vaiṣamya kaḥ_ka hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah yuktaḥ_yuj iti_iti yuktaḥ_yuj īśvarāya_īśvara eva_eva etāni_etad karmāṇi_karman na_na mama_mad phalāya_phala iti_iti evam_evam abhiprāyavān_abhiprāyavat karma--_karman phalam_phala tyaktvā_tyaj karmāṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ śāntim_śānti mokṣa--_mokṣa ākhyām_ākhyā āpnoti_āp naiṣṭhikīm_naiṣṭhika sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi nitya--_nitya vastu--_vastu viveka--_viveka saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa yaḥ_yad tu_tu punar_punar ayuktaḥ_ayukta īśvarāya_īśvara eva_eva etāni_etad karmāṇi_karman na_na mama_mad phalāya_phala iti_iti abhiprāya--_abhiprāya śūnyaḥ_śūnya sa_tad kāma--_kāma kāreṇa_kāra kāmataḥ_kāma pravṛttyā_pravṛtti mama_mad phalāya_phala eva_eva idam_idam karma_karman karomi_kṛ iti_iti phale_phala saktaḥ_sañj nibadhyate_nibandh karmabhiḥ_karman yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad api_api yuktaḥ_yuj san_as karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ iti_iti vākya--_vākya śeṣaḥ_śeṣa

āha_ah naiṣṭhikīm_naiṣṭhika niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā prāptām_prāp śāntim_śānti mokṣam_mokṣa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ayuktaḥ_ayukta sa_sa kāma--_kāma karmī_karmin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kāma--_kāma kāreṇa_kāra kāma--_kāma pravṛttyā_pravṛtti

baladevaḥ_baladeva yuktaḥ_yuj ātma--_ātman arpita--_arpay manāḥ_manas karma--_karman phalam_phala tyaktvā_tyaj kurvan_kṛ naiṣṭhikīm_naiṣṭhika sthirām_sthira śāntim_śānti ātma--_ātman avaloka--_avaloka lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa āpnoti_āp ayuktaḥ_ayukta ātmā_ātman anarpita--_anarpita manāḥ_manas karma--_karman phale_phala saktaḥ_sañj kāma--_kāma kāreṇa_kāra kāmataḥ_kāma karmaṇi_karman pravṛttyā_pravṛtti nibadhyate_nibandh saṃsarati_saṃsṛ
BhG 5.13

lg.l: sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman manasā_manas saṃnyasya_saṃnyas āste_ās sukham_sukham vaśī_vaśin
nava--_navan dvāre_dvāra pure_pura dehī_dehin na_na eva_eva kurvan_kṛ na_na kārayan_kāray

div.p: idānīm_idānīm śuddha--_śuddha cittasya_citta saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha iti_iti āha_ah sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman iti_iti vaśī_vaśin yata--_yam cittaḥ_citta sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman vikṣepakāni_vikṣepaka manasā_manas viveka--_viveka yuktena_yuj saṃnyasya_saṃnyas sukham_sukha yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evam_evam jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā san_as āste_ās kva_kva āste_ās iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah nava--_navan dvāraḥ_dvāra iti_iti netre_netra nāsike_nāsikā karṇau_karṇa mukham_mukha ca_ca iti_iti sapta_saptan śiraḥ--_śiras gatāni_gam adhogate_adhogata dve_dvi pāyu--_pāyu upastha--_upastha rūpe_rūpa iti_iti evam_evam nava_navan dvārāṇi_dvāra yasmin_yad tasmin_tad pure_pura pura--_pura vat_vat ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra śūnye_śūnya dehe_deha dehī_dehin avatiṣṭhate_avasthā ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra abhāvāt_abhāva eva_eva svyam_svya tena_tad dehena_deha nā_na eva_eva kurvan_kṛ mamakāra--_mamakāra abhāvāt_abhāva ca_ca na_na kārayan_kāray iti_iti aviśuddha--_aviśuddha cittāt_citta vyavṛttiḥ_vyavṛtti uktā_vac aśuddha--_aśuddha cittaḥ_citta hi_hi saṃnyasya_saṃnyas punar_punar karoti_kṛ kārayati_kāray ca_ca na_na tu_tu ayam_idam tathā_tathā antar_antar sukham_sukham āste_ās iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana aśuddha--_aśuddha cittasya_citta kevalāt_kevala saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga śreyān_śreyas iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac prapañcya_prapañcay adhunā_adhunā śuddha--_śuddha cittasya_citta sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa eva_eva śreyān_śreyas iti_iti āha_ah sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman iti_iti nityam_nitya naimittikam_naimittika kāmyam_kāmya pratiṣiddham_pratiṣidh ca_ca iti_iti sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman manasā_manas karmaṇi_karman akarma_kṛ yaḥ_yad paśyet_paś iti_iti atra_atra uktena_vac akartṛ--_akartṛ ātma--_ātman sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa samyak_samyak darśanena_darśana saṃnyasya_saṃnyas parityajya_parityaj prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa kim_ka duḥkhena_duḥkha na_na iti_iti āha_ah sukham_sukha anāyāsena_anāyāsa āyāsa--_āyāsa hetu--_hetu kāya--_kāya vāc--_vāc manaḥ--_manas vyāpāra--_vyāpāra śūnya--_śūnya tvāt_tva kāya--_kāya vāc--_vāc manāṃsi_manas svacchandāni_svacchanda kutas_kutas na_na vyāpriyante_vyāprī tatra_tatra āha_ah vaśī_vaśin sva--_sva vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ kārya--_kārya karaṇa--_karaṇa saṅghātaḥ_saṃghāta kva_kva āste_ās nava--_navan dvāre_dvāra pure_pura dve_dvi śrotre_śrotra dve_dvi cakṣuṣī_cakṣus dve_dvi nāsike_nāsikā vāc_vāc ekā_eka iti_iti śirasi_śiras sapta_saptan dve_dvi pāyu--_pāyu upastha--_upastha ākhye_ākhyā adhas_adhas iti_iti nava--_navan dvāra--_dvāra viśiṣṭe_viśiṣ dehe_deha dehī_dehin deha--_deha bhinna--_bhid ātma--_ātman darśī_darśin pravāsī_pravāsin iva_iva para--_para gehe_geha tad--_tad pūjā--_pūjā paribhava--_paribhava ādibhiḥ_ādi a_a prahṛṣyan_prahṛṣ a_a viṣīdan_viṣad ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra mamakāra--_mamakāra śūnyaḥ_śūnya tiṣṭhati_sthā ajñaḥ_ajña hi_hi deha--_deha tādātmya--_tādātmya abhimānāt_abhimāna dehe_deha eva_eva na_na tu_tu dehī_dehin sa_tad ca_ca deha--_deha adhikaraṇam_adhikaraṇa eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman adhikaraṇam_adhikaraṇa manyamānaḥ_man gṛhe_gṛha bhūma--_bhūman avasāne_avasāna vā_vā aham_mad āse_as iti_iti abhimanyate_abhiman na_na tu_tu dehe_deha aham_mad āse_as iti_iti bheda--_bheda darśana--_darśana abhāvāt_abhāva saṃghāta--_saṃghāta vyatirikta--_vyatiric ātma--_ātman darśī_darśin tu_tu sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin bheda--_bheda darśanāt_darśana dehe_deha aham_mad āse_as iti_iti pratipadyate_pratipad ataeva_ataeva deha--_deha ādi--_ādi vyāpārāṇām_vyāpāra avidyayā_avidyā ātmani_ātman akriye_akriya samāropitānām_samāropay vidyayā_vidyā bādhaḥ_bādha eva_eva sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa iti_iti ucyate_vac etasmāt_etad eva_eva ajña--_ajña vailakṣaṇya--_vailakṣaṇya ādi--_ādi uktam_vac viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa nava--_navan dvāre_dvāra pure_pura āste_ās iti_iti

nanu_nanu deha--_deha ādi--_ādi vyāpārāṇām_vyāpāra ātmani_ātman āropitānām_āropay nau--_nau vyāpārāṇām_vyāpāra tīra--_tīra stha--_stha vṛkṣe_vṛkṣa iva_iva vidyayā_vidyā bādhe_bādha api_api sva--_sva vyāpāreṇa_vyāpāra ātmanaḥ_ātman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva deha--_deha ādi--_ādi vyāpāreṣu_vyāpāra kārayitṛ--_kārayitṛ tvam_tva ca_ca syāt_as iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah āste_ās iti_iti sambandhaḥ_sambandha

ucyate_vac āha_ah āste_ās kutra_kutra nava--_navan dvāre_dvāra pure_pura aham_mad bhāva--_bhāva śūnye_śūnya dehe_deha dehī_dehin utpanna--_utpad jñānaḥ_jñāna jīvaḥ_jīva na_na eva_eva kurvan_kṛ iti_iti karma--_karman sukhasya_sukha vastutas_vastutas kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na eva_eva asti_as iti_iti jānan_jñā na_na kārayan_kāray iti_iti na_na api_api teṣu_tad prayojana--_prayojana kartṛ_kartṛ

baladevaḥ_baladeva sarva--_sarva iti_iti vivekatā_vivekatā manasā_manas tādṛśi_tādṛś pradhāne_pradhāna sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman saṃnyasya_saṃnyas arpayitvā_arpay deha--_deha ādinā_ādi bahis_bahis tāni_tad kurvan_kṛ api_api vaśī_vaśin jita--_ji indriyaḥ_indriya sukham_sukham āste_ās nava--_navan dvāre_dvāra pure_pura pura--_pura vat_vat ahaṃ_mad bhāva--_bhāva varjite_varjay dehe_deha dve_dvi netre_netra dve_dvi nāsike_nāsikā dve_dvi śrotre_śrotra mukham_mukha ca_ca iti_iti śirasi_śiras sapta_saptan dvārāṇi_dvāra adhastāt_adhastāt tu_tu pāyu--_pāyu upastha--_upastha ākhye_ākhyā dve_dvi iti_iti nava--_navan dvārāṇi_dvāra dehī_dehin labdha_labh na_na eva_eva iti_iti deha--_deha ādi--_ādi viviktasya_vivic ātmanaḥ_ātman karmasu_karman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva kārayitṛ--_kārayitṛ tvam_tva ca_ca na_na asti_as iti_iti vijānan_vijñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 5.14

lg.l: na_na kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na karmāṇi_karman lokasya_loka sṛjati_sṛj prabhuḥ_prabhu
na_na karma--_karman phala--_phala saṃyogam_saṃyoga svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva tu_tu pravartate_pravṛt

div.p: kārayati_kāray eṣa_etad asādhu_asādhu karma_karman kārayati_kāray tam_tad yam_yad adhas_adhas ninīṣate_ninīṣ iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti parameśvareṇa_parameśvara eva_eva śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha phaleṣu_phala karmasu_karman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvena_tva prayujyamānaḥ_prayuj asvatantraḥ_asvatantra puruṣaḥ_puruṣa katham_katham tāni_tad karmāṇi_karman tyajet_tyaj ca_ca tyakṣyati_tyaj iti_iti ced_ced evam_evam sati_as vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya nairghṛṇyābhyām_nairghṛṇya īśvarasya_īśvara api_api prayojaka--_prayojaka kartṛ--_kartṛ tvāt_tva puṇya--_puṇya pāpa--_pāpa sambandhaḥ_sambandha syāt_as iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah na_na kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi prabhuḥ_prabhu īśvaraḥ_īśvara jīva--_jīva lokasya_loka kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva ādikam_ādika na_na sṛjati_sṛj kintu_kintu jīvasya_jīva svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva avidyā_avidyā eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa pravartate_pravṛt anādi--_anādi avidyā--_avidyā kāma--_kāma vaśāt_vaśa pravṛtti--_pravṛtti svabhāvam_svabhāva jīva--_jīva lokam_loka īśvaraḥ_īśvara karmasu_karman niyuṅkte_niyuj na_na tu_tu svayam_svayam eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva ādikam_ādika utpādayati_utpāday iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhavati_bhū bhavati_bhū asti_as eva_eva iti_iti sandeha--_saṃdeha apohāya_apoha āha_ah na_na kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva iti_iti lokasya_loka deha--_deha ādeḥ_ādi kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva prabhuḥ_prabhu ātmā_ātman svāmī_svāmin na_na sṛjati_sṛj tvam_tvad kuru_kṛ iti_iti niyogena_niyoga tasya_tad kārayitā_kārayitṛ na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nā_na api_api lokasya_loka karmāṇi_karman īpsitatamāni_īpsitatama ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādīni_ādi svayam_svayam sṛjati_sṛj kartā_kartṛ api_api na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nā_na api_api lokasya_loka karma_karman kṛtavataḥ_kṛ tad--_tad phala--_phala sambandham_sambandha sṛjati_sṛj bhojayitā_bhojayitṛ api_api bhoktā_bhoktṛ api_api na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na samānaḥ_samāna san_as ubhau_ubh lokau_loka anusaṃcarati_anusaṃcar dhyāyati_dhyā iva_iva lelāyati_lelāy iva_iva sa_sa dhīḥ_dhī iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti atra_atra api_api śarīra--_śarīra sthaḥ_stha api_api kaunteya_kaunteya na_na karoti_kṛ na_na lipyate_lip iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti

yadi_yadi kiṃcid_kaścit api_api svatas_svatas na_na kārayati_kāray na_na karoti_kṛ ca_ca ātmā_ātman kaḥ_ka tarhi_tarhi kārayan_kāray kurvan_kṛ ca_ca pravartate_pravṛt iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva tu_tu iti_iti ajñāna--_ajñāna ātmikā_ātmaka daivī_daiva māyā_māyā prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti pravartate_pravṛt

asti_as manye_man tathā_tathā sati_as tasmin_tad vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya nairghṛṇye_nairghṛṇya prasakte_prasañj tatra_tatra na_na hi_hi nahi_nahi iti_iti āha_ah na_na kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva iti_iti nā_na api_api tad--_tad kartṛ--_kartṛ tvena_tva karmāṇi_karman api_api na_na ca_ca karma--_karman phalaiḥ_phala bhogaiḥ_bhoga saṃyogam_saṃyoga api_api kintu_kiṃtu jīvasya_jīva svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva anādi--_anādi avidyā_avidyā eva_eva pravartate_pravṛt tam_tad jīvam_jīva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva ādi--_ādi abhimānam_abhimāna ārohayitum_ārohay iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva etat_etad dvayam_dvaya śuddhasya_śuddha na_na asti_as iti_iti viśadayati_viśaday na_na iti_iti prabhuḥ_prabhu deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādīnām_ādi svāmī_svāmin jīvaḥ_jīva lokasya_loka janasya_jana kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na sṛjati_sṛj iti_iti tvam_tvad kuru_kṛ iti_iti kārayitā_kārayitṛ na_na bhavati_bhū nā_na api_api tasya_tad īpsitatamāni_īpsitatama karmāṇi_karman mālya--_mālya ambara--_ambara ādīni_ādi sṛjati_sṛj iti_iti svayam_svayam kartā_kartṛ api_api na_na bhavati_bhū na_na ca_ca karma--_karman phalena_phala sukhena_sukha duḥkhena_duḥkha ca_ca saṃyogam_saṃyoga sambandham_sambandha sṛjati_sṛj iti_iti bhojayitā_bhojayitṛ bhoktā_bhoktṛ ca_ca na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yadi_yadi evam_evam tarhi_tarhi kaḥ_ka kārayan_kāray kurvan_kṛ ca_ca pratīyate_pratī tatra_tatra āha_ah svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva tu_tu iti_iti anādi--_anādi pravṛttā_pravṛt pradhāna--_pradhāna vāsanā_vāsanā atra_atra svabhāva--_svabhāva śabdena_śabda ukta--_vac prādhānika--_prādhānika deha--_deha ādimān_ādimat jīvaḥ_jīva kārayitā_kārayitṛ kartā_kartṛ ca_ca iti_iti na_na viviktasya_vivic tattvam_tattva iti_iti śuddhe_śuddha api_api kiṃcid_kaścit kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva asti_as eva_eva pūrvatra_pūrvatra sukha--_sukha āsane_āsana tattvasya_tattva ukteḥ_ukti bhāna--_bhāna ādau_ādi iva_iva etat_etad bodhyam_budh
dhātu--_dhātu arthaḥ_artha khalu_khalu kriyā_kriyā tad--_tad mukhya--_mukhya tvam_tva hi_hi kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva uktam_vac
BhG 5.15

lg.l: na_na ādatte_ādā kasya_ka cit_cit pāpam_pāpa na_na ca_ca eva_eva sukṛtam_sukṛta vibhuḥ_vibhu
ajñānena_ajñāna āvṛtam_āvṛ jñānam_jñāna tena_tena muhyanti_muh jantavaḥ_jantu

div.p: ādatte_ādā prayojakaḥ_prayojaka api_api san_as prabhuḥ_prabhu kasyacid_kaścit pāpam_pāpa sukṛtam_sukṛta ca_ca nā_na eva_eva ādatte_ādā na_na bhajate_bhaj tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu vibhuḥ_vibhu paripūrṇaḥ_paripṛ āpta--_āp kāmaḥ_kāma iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yadi_yadi hi_hi sva--_sva artha--_artha kāmanayā_kāmanā kārayet_kāray tarhi_tarhi tathā_tathā syāt_as na_na tu_tu etat_etad asti_as āpta--_āpta kāmasya_kāma eva_eva acintya--_acintya nija--_nija māyayā_māyā tad--_tad tad--_tad pūrva--_pūrva karma--_karman anusāreṇa_anusāra pravartaka--_pravartaka tvāt_tva

nanu_nanu bhaktān_bhakta anugṛhṇataḥ_anugrah abhaktān_abhakta nigṛhṇataḥ_nigrah ca_ca vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya upalambhāt_upalambha katham_katham āpta--_āpta kāma--_kāma tvam_tva iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah ajñānena_ajñāna iti_iti nigrahaḥ_nigraha api_api daṇḍa--_daṇḍa rūpaḥ_rūpa anugrahaḥ_anugraha eva_eva iti_iti evam_evam ajñānena_ajñāna sarvatra_sarvatra samaḥ_sama parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara iti_iti evaṃbhūtam_evaṃbhūta jñānam_jñāna āvṛtam_āvṛ tena_tad hetunā_hetu jantavaḥ_jantu jīvāḥ_jīva muhyanti_muh bhagavati_bhagavant vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya manyante_man iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu īśvaraḥ_īśvara kārayitā_kārayitṛ jīvaḥ_jīva kartā_kartṛ tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti eṣaḥ_etad u_u hi_hi eva_eva sādhu_sādhu karma_karman kārayati_kāray tam_tad yam_yad unninīyate_unninī eṣaḥ_etad u_u eva_eva asādhu_asādhu karma_karman kārayati_kāray tam_tad yam_yad adhas_adhas ninīṣate_ninīṣ iti_iti
ajñaḥ_ajña jantuḥ_jantu anīśaḥ_anīśa ayam_idam ātmanaḥ_ātman sukha--_sukha duḥkhayoḥ_duḥkha īśvara--_īśvara preritaḥ_preray gacchet_gam svargam_svarga vā_vā aśvabhram_aśvabhra eva_eva ca_ca

tathā_tathā ca_ca jīva--_jīva īśvarayoḥ_īśvara kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva kārayitṛ--_kārayitṛ tvābhyām_tva bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tva--_tva bhojayitṛ--_bhojayitṛ tvābhyām_tva ca_ca pāpa--_pāpa puṇya--_puṇya lepa--_lepa sambhavāt_sambhava katham_katham uktam_vac svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva tu_tu pravartate_pravṛt iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na ādatte_ādā iti_iti paramārthataḥ_paramārtha vibhuḥ_vibhu parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara kasyacid_kaścit jīvasya_jīva pāpam_pāpa sukṛtam_sukṛta ca_ca na_na eva_eva ādatte_ādā paramārthataḥ_paramārtha jīvasya_jīva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva parameśvarasya_parameśvara ca_ca kārayitṛ--_kārayitṛ tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva katham_katham tarhi_tarhi śrutiḥ_śruti smṛtiḥ_smṛti loka--_loka vyavahāraḥ_vyavahāra ca_ca tatra_tatra āha_ah ajñānena_ajñāna āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa vikṣepa--_vikṣepa a_a śaktimatā_śaktimat māyā--_māyā ākhyena_ākhyā anṛtena_anṛta tamasā_tamas āvṛtam_āvṛ ācchāditam_ācchāday jñānam_jñāna jīva--_jīva īśvara--_īśvara jagat--_jagant bheda--_bheda bhrama--_bhrama advitīyam_advitīya paramārtha--_paramārtha satyam_satya tena_tad svarūpa--_svarūpa āvaraṇena_āvaraṇa muhyanti_muh pramātṛ--_pramātṛ prameya--_pramā pramāṇa--_pramāṇa kartṛ--_kartṛ karma--_karman karaṇa--_karaṇa bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ bhogya--_bhuj bhoga--_bhoga ākhya--_ākhya nava--_navan vidha--_vidha saṃsāra--_saṃsāra rūpam_rūpa moham_moha a_a tasmin_tad tad--_tad avabhāsa--_avabhāsa rūpam_rūpa janana--_janana śīlāḥ_śīla saṃsāriṇaḥ_saṃsārin vastu--_vastu svarūpa--_svarūpa ādarśinaḥ_ādarśin vartate_vṛt tasyām_tad ca_ca avasthāyām_avasthā mūḍha--_muh pratyaya--_pratyaya anuvādinyau_anuvādin ete_etad śruti--_śruti smṛtī_smṛti vāstava--_vāstava advaita--_advaita bodhi--_bodhin vākya--_vākya śeṣa--_śeṣa bhūte_bhū iti_iti na_na doṣaḥ_doṣa

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yasmāt_yasmāt asādhu--_asādhu sādhu--_sādhu karmaṇām_karman īśvaraḥ_īśvara na_na kārayitā_kārayitṛ tasmāt_tasmāt eva_eva na_na tasya_tad pāpa--_pāpa puṇya--_puṇya bhāgi--_bhāgin tvam_tva iti_iti āha_ah na_na ādatte_ādā iti_iti na_na ādatte_ādā na_na gṛhṇāti_grah kintu_kiṃtu tadīyā_tadīya khalu_khalu yā_yad śaktiḥ_śakti avidyā_avidyā sā_tad eva_eva jīva--_jīva jñānam_jñāna āvṛṇoti_āvṛ iti_iti āha_ah ajñānena_ajñāna avidyayā_avidyā jñānam_jñāna jīvasya_jīva svābhāvikam_svābhāvika tena_tad hetunā_hetu

asti_as brūṣe_brū āpadyate_āpad yuktam_yuj ca_ca etat_etad anyathā_anyathā eṣaḥ_etad u_u hi_hi eva_eva sādhu_sādhu karma_karman kārayati_kāray tam_tad yam_yad ebhyaḥ_idam lokebhyaḥ_loka unninīṣate_unninīṣ eṣaḥ_etad u_u eva_eva asādhu_asādhu karma_karman kārayati_kāray tam_tad yam_yad adhas_adhas ninīṣate_ninīṣ iti_iti śrutiḥ_śruti

lg.l: ajñaḥ_ajña jantuḥ_jantu anīśaḥ_anīśa ayam_idam ātmanaḥ_ātman sukha--_sukha duḥkhayoḥ_duḥkha
īśvara--_īśvara preritaḥ_preray gacchet_gam svargam_svarga vā_vā āśu_āśu abhram_abhra eva_eva ca_ca

div.p: iti_iti smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca vyākupyet_vyākup tathā_tathā ca_ca pāpa--_pāpa puṇya--_puṇya mayīm_maya avasthām_avasthā nayati_nī tasmin_tad vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya ādikam_ādika pāpa--_pāpa ādi--_ādi bhāgi--_bhāgin tvam_tva ca_ca syāt_as iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na ādatte_ādā iti_iti

vibhuḥ_vibhu aparimita--_aparimita vijñāna--_vijñāna ānandaḥ_ānanda ananta--_ananta śakti--_śakti pūrṇaḥ_pṛ sva--_sva ānanda--_ānanda eka--_eka rasikaḥ_rasika tatas_tatas anyatra_anyatra udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna paramātma--_paramātman anādi--_anādi pradhāna--_pradhāna vāsanā--_vāsanā nibandham_nibandha bubhukṣum_bubhukṣu sva--_sva sannidhi--_saṃnidhi mātra--_mātra pariṇata--_pariṇam pradhāna--_pradhāna maya_maya karmāṇi_karman kārayan_kāray kasyacid_kaścit jīvasya_jīva pāpam_pāpa sukṛtam_sukṛta ca_ca na_na ādatte_ādā na_na gṛhṇāti_grah uktam_vac śrī--_śrī vaiṣṇave_vaiṣṇava

lg.l: sannidhi--_saṃnidhi mātreṇa_mātra gandhaḥ_gandha kṣobhāya_kṣobha jāyate_jan
manasaḥ_manas na_na upakartṛ--_upakartṛ tvāt_tva tathā_tathā asau_adas parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara

div.p: sannidhānāt_saṃnidhāna yathā_yathā ākāśa--_ākāśa kāla--_kāla ādyāḥ_ādya kāraṇam_kāraṇa taroḥ_taru

audāsīnya--_audāsīnya mātre_mātra ayam_idam gandha--_gandha ādi--_ādi dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta na_na tu_tu icchāyāḥ_icchā abhāve_abhāva tasyāḥ_tad saḥ_tad akāmayata_kāmay iti_iti śruta--_śru tvāt_tva tarhi_tarhi jīvāḥ_jīva tam_tad viṣamam_viṣama kutas_kutas vadanti_vad tatra_tatra āha_ah ajñānena_ajñāna iti_iti anādi--_anādi tad--_tad vaimukhyena_vaimukhya ajñānena_ajñāna jīvānām_jīva nityam_nitya api_api jñānam_jñāna āvṛtam_āvṛ tirohitam_tirodhā tena_tad hetunā_hetu jantavaḥ_jantu jīvāḥ_jīva muhyanti_muh samam_sama api_api tam_tad vimūḍhāḥ_vimuh viṣamam_viṣama vadanti_vad na_na vijñāḥ_vijña iti_iti arthaḥ_artha āha_ah ca_ca evam_evam sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya nairghṛṇye_nairghṛṇya na_na sāpekṣa--_sāpekṣa tvāt_tva tathā_tathā hi_hi darśayati_darśay na_na karma--_karman avibhāgāt_avibhāga iti_iti ced_ced na_na anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva iti_iti
BhG 5.16

lg.l: jñānena_jñāna tu_tu tat_tad ajñānam_ajñāna yeṣām_yad nāśitam_nāśay ātmanaḥ_ātman
teṣām_tad āditya--_āditya vat_vat jñānam_jñāna prakāśayati_prakāśay tat_tad param_para

div.p: muhyanti_muh āha_ah bhagavataḥ_bhagavant jñānena_jñāna yeṣām_yad tad--_tad vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya upalambhakam_upalambhaka ajñānam_ajñāna nāśitam_nāśay tat_tad jñānam_jñāna teṣām_tad ajñānam_ajñāna nāśayitvā_nāśay tat_tad param_para paripūrṇam_paripṛ īśvara--_īśvara svarūpam_svarūpa prakāśayati_prakāśay yathā_yathā ādityaḥ_āditya tamaḥ_tamas nirasya_niras samastam_samasta vastu--_vastu jātam_jāta prakāśayati_prakāśay tadvat_tadvat

syāt_as āha_ah tad--_tad āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa vikṣepa--_vikṣepa śakti--_śakti madana--_madana ādi--_ādi anirvācyam_anirvācya anṛtam_anṛta anartha--_anartha vāta--_vāta mūlam_mūla ajñānam_ajñāna ātma--_ātman āśraya--_āśraya viṣayam_viṣaya avidyā--_avidyā māyā--_māyā ādi--_ādi śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac ātmanaḥ_ātman jñānena_jñāna guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś vedānta--_vedānta mahā--_mahat śravana--_śravana manana--_manana nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana paripāka--_paripāka nirmala--_nirmala antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa vṛtti--_vṛtti rūpeṇa_rūpa nirvikalpaka--_nirvikalpaka sākṣātkāreṇa_sākṣātkāra śodhita--_śodhay tad--_tad tvam--_tvad padārtha--_padārtha abheda--_abheda rūpa--_rūpa śuddha--_śuddha sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda akhaṇḍa--_akhaṇḍa eka--_eka rasa--_rasa vastu--_vastu mātra--_mātra asat_asat eva_eva asat--_asat tayā_tā jñātam_jñā adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna caitanya--_caitanya mātra--_mātra tām_tā prāpitam_prāpay śuktau_śukti iva_iva rajatam_rajata śukti--_śukti jñānena_jñāna śravana--_śravana manana--_manana nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana ādi--_ādi sādhana--_sādhana sampannānām_sampad bhagavat--_bhagavant anugṛhītānām_anugrah mumukṣūṇām_mumukṣu teṣām_tad āditya--_āditya vat_vat yathā_yathā ādityaḥ_āditya sva--_sva udaya--_udaya mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva tamaḥ_tamas niravaśeṣam_niravaśeṣa nivartayati_nivartay na_na tu_tu kaṃcid_kaścit sahāyam_sahāya apekṣate_apekṣ tathā_tathā brahma--_brahman jñānam_jñāna api_api śuddha--_śuddha sattva--_sattva pariṇāma--_pariṇāma tvāt_tva vyāpaka--_vyāpaka prakāśa--_prakāśa rūpam_rūpa sva--_sva sahakāri--_sahakārin antara--_antara nirapekṣa--_nirapekṣa tayā_tā sa_sa kāryam_kārya ajñānam_ajñāna nivartayat_nivartay param_para satya--_satya jñāna--_jñāna ananta--_ananta ānanda--_ānanda rūpam_rūpa ekam_eka eva_eva advitīyam_advitīya paramātma--_paramātman tattvam_tattva prakāśayati_prakāśay praticchāyā--_praticchāyā grahaṇa--_grahaṇa mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva karmatām_karmatā

atra_atra ajñānena_ajñāna āvṛtam_āvṛ jñānena_jñāna nāśitam_nāśay iti_iti jñāna--_jñāna abhāva--_abhāva rūpa--_rūpa tvam_tva vyāvartitam_vyāvartay nahi_nahi abhāvaḥ_abhāva kiṃcid_kaścit āvṛṇoti_āvṛ na_na vā_vā jñāna--_jñāna abhāvaḥ_abhāva jñānena_jñāna nāśyate_nāśay svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva nāśa--_nāśa rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva tasya_tad tasmāt_tasmāt aham_mad ajñaḥ_ajña mām_mad anyam_anya ca_ca na_na jānāmi_jñā iti_iti ādi--_ādi sākṣi--_sākṣin pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa siddham_sidh bhāva--_bhāva rūpam_rūpa eva_eva ajñānam_ajñāna iti_iti bhagavataḥ_bhagavant matam_man vistaraḥ_vistara tu_tu advaita--_advaita siddhau_siddhi draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś

yeṣām_yad iti_iti bahu--_bahu vacanena_vacana aniyamaḥ_aniyama darśitaḥ_darśay tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti tat_tad yaḥ_yad yaḥ_yad devānām_deva pratyabudhyata_pratibudh saḥ_tad eva_eva tat_tad abhavat_bhū tathā_tathā ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi tathā_tathā manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya tat_tad idam_idam api_api etarhi_etarhi yaḥ_yad evam_evam veda_vid aham_mad brahma_brahman asmi_as iti_iti saḥ_tad idam_idam sarvam_sarva bhavati_bhū iti_iti tad--_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya tad--_tad āśraya--_āśraya pramāṇa--_pramāṇa jñānāt_jñāna tad--_tad nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti iti_iti nyāya--_nyāya prāptam_prāp aniyamam_aniyama darśayati_darśay tatra_tatra ajñāna--_ajñāna gatam_gam āvaraṇam_āvaraṇa dvividham_dvividha ekam_eka sataḥ_as api_api asattva--_asattva āpādakam_āpādaka anyat_anya tu_tu bhātaḥ_bhā api_api abhāna--_abhāna āpādakam_āpādaka tatra_tatra ādyam_ādya parokṣa--_parokṣa aparokṣa--_aparokṣa sādhāraṇa--_sādhāraṇa pramāṇa--_pramāṇa jñāna--_jñāna mātrāt_mātra nivartate_nivṛt anumite_anumā api_api vahni--_vahni ādau_ādi parvate_parvata vahniḥ_vahni na_na asti_as iti_iti ādi--_ādi bhrama--_bhrama adarśanāt_adarśana tathā_tathā satyam_satya jñānam_jñāna anantam_ananta brahma_brahman asti_as iti_iti vākyāt_vākya parokṣa--_parokṣa niścaye_niścaya api_api brahma_brahman na_na asti_as iti_iti bhramaḥ_bhrama nivartate_nivṛt eva_eva asti_as eva_eva brahma_brahman kintu_kiṃtu mama_mad na_na bhāti_bhā iti_iti ekam_eka bhrama--_bhrama janakam_janaka dvitīyam_dvitīya abhā--_abhā anāvaraṇam_anāvaraṇa sākṣātkārāt_sākṣātkāra eva_eva nivartate_nivṛt sa_tad ca_ca sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra vedānta--_vedānta vākyena_vākya eva_eva janyate_jan nirvikalpakaḥ_nirvikalpaka iti_iti ādi_ādi advaita--_advaita siddhau_siddhi anusandheyam_anusaṃdhā

āvṛṇoti_āvṛ prakāśayati_prakāśay jñānena_jñāna vidyā--_vidyā śaktyā_śakti ajñānam_ajñāna avidyām_avidyā teṣām_tad jīvānām_jīva jñānam_jñāna eva_eva kartṛ_kartṛ āditya--_āditya vat_vat iti_iti āditya--_āditya prabhā_prabhā yathā_yathā andhakāram_andhakāra vināśya_vināśay ghaṭa--_ghaṭa paṭa--_paṭa ādikam_ādika prakāśayati_prakāśay tathā_tathā eva_eva vidyayā_vidyā eva_eva avidyām_avidyā vināśya_vināśay tad--_tad jīva--_jīva niṣṭham_niṣṭhā jñānam_jñāna param_para tena_tena parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara na_na kam_ka api_api badhnāti_bandh na_na api_api kam_ka api_api mocayati_mocay kintu_kiṃtu ajñāna--_ajñāna jñāne_jñāna prakṛteḥ_prakṛti eva_eva dharmaḥ_dharma krameṇa_krameṇa badhnāti_bandh mocayati_mocay ca_ca anāsakti--_anāsakti śānti--_śānti ādayaḥ_ādi mocakāḥ_mocaka ca_ca prakṛteḥ_prakṛti eva_eva dharmāḥ_dharma kintu_kiṃtu parameśvarasya_parameśvara antaryāmi--_antaryāmin tve_tva eva_eva prakṛteḥ_prakṛti
te_tad te_tad dharmāḥ_dharma udbudhyante_udbudh iti_iti etad--_etad aṃśena_aṃśa eva_eva tasya_tad prayojaka--_prayojaka tvam_tva iti_iti na_na tasya_tad vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya nairghṛṇye_nairghṛṇya

baladevaḥ_baladeva vijñāḥ_vijña na_na muhyanti_muh iti_iti etat_etad āha_ah jñānena_jñāna iti_iti sarvam_sarva jñāna--_jñāna plavena_plava eva_eva iti_iti jñāna--_jñāna agniḥ_agni sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman na_na hi_hi jñānena_jñāna sadṛśam_sadṛśa iti_iti ca_ca ukta--_vac mahimnā_mahiman sat--_sat guru--_guru prasāda--_prasāda labdhena_labh sva--_sva para--_para ātma--_ātman viṣayakena_viṣayaka jñānena_jñāna yeṣām_yad sat--_sat prasaṅginām_prasaṅgin tad--_tad vaimukhyam_vaimukhya ajñānam_ajñāna nāśitam_nāśay tat_tad jñānam_jñāna kartṛ_kartṛ param_para prakāśayati_prakāśay deha--_deha ādeḥ_ādi param_para jīvam_jīva vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya ādi--_ādi doṣāt_doṣa param_para īśvaram_īśvara ca_ca bodhayati_bodhay āditya--_āditya vat_vat yathā_yathā raviḥ_ravi uditaḥ_udi eva_eva tamaḥ_tamas nirasyan_niras yathāvat_yathāvat vastu_vastu pradarśayati_pradarśay tathā_tathā sat--_sat guru--_guru upadeśa--_upadeśa labdham_labh ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna yathāvat_yathāvat ātma--_ātman vastu_vastu iti_iti atra_atra vinaṣṭa--_vinaś ajñānānām_ajñāna
jīvānām_jīva bahu--_bahu tvam_tva nigadatā_nigad pārtha--_pārtha sārathinā_sārathi mokṣe_mokṣa teṣām_tad tad--_tad darśitam_darśay aupādhika--_aupādhika tvam_tva tasya_tad prati_prati uktam_vac na_na ime_idam janādhipāḥ_janādhipa iti_iti upakrama--_upakrama uktam_vac ca_ca tat_tad sa_sa upapattikam_upapattika abhūt_bhū
BhG 5.17

lg.l: tad--_tad buddhayaḥ_buddhi tad--_tad ātmānaḥ_ātman tad--_tad niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā tad--_tad parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa
gacchanti_gam apunar_apunar āvṛttim_āvṛtti jñāna--_jñāna nirdhūta--_nirdhū kalmaṣāḥ_kalmaṣa

div.p: āha_ah tasmin_tad eva_eva buddhiḥ_buddhi niścaya--_niścaya ātmikā_ātmaka yeṣām_yad tasmin_tad manaḥ_manas yeṣām_yad tasmin_tad eva_eva niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā tātparyam_tātparya yeṣām_yad tat_tad eva_eva param_para āśrayaḥ_āśraya yeṣām_yad tatas_tatas ca_ca tad--_tad prasāda--_prasāda labdhena_labh ātma--_ātman jñānena_jñāna nirdhūtam_nirdhū nirastam_niras kalmaṣam_kalmaṣa yeṣām_yad te_tad apunar_apunar āvṛttim_āvṛtti muktim_mukti yānti_yā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana jñānena_jñāna paramātma--_paramātman tattva--_tattva prakāśe_prakāśa sati_as tad--_tad buddhayaḥ_buddhi iti_iti tasmin_tad jñāna--_jñāna prakāśite_prakāśay paramātma--_paramātman tattve_tattva sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghane_ghana eva_eva bāhya--_bāhya sarva--_sarva viṣaya--_viṣaya parityāgena_parityāga sādhana--_sādhana paripākāt_paripāka paryavasitā_paryavasā buddhiḥ_buddhi antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa vṛttiḥ_vṛtti sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa yeṣām_yad te_tad tat_tad kim_ka boddhāraḥ_boddhṛ jīvāḥ_jīva boddhavyam_budh brahma_brahman tattvam_tattva iti_iti boddhṛ--_boddhṛ boddhavya--_budh bhāvaḥ_bhāva hi_hi māyā--_māyā vijṛmbhitaḥ_vijṛmbh na_na vāstava--_vāstava abheda--_abheda virodhi_virodhin iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu tad--_tad ātmānaḥ_ātman iti_iti viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa vyartham_vyartha a_a vidvat--_vid vyavartakam_vyavartaka hi_hi vidvat--_vid viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa ajñāḥ_ajña api_api hi_hi vastu--_vastu gatyā_gati tad--_tad ātmānaḥ_ātman iti_iti katham_katham tad--_tad vyāvṛttiḥ_vyāvṛtti iti_iti ced_ced na_na ajñāḥ_ajña hi_hi anātma--_anātman bhūte_bhū deha--_deha ādau_ādi ātma--_ātman abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin iti_iti na_na tad--_tad ātmānaḥ_ātman iti_iti vyapadiśyante_vyapadiś vijñāḥ_vijña tu_tu nivṛtta--_nivṛt deha--_deha ādi--_ādi abhimānāḥ_abhimāna iti_iti virodhi--_virodhin nivṛttyā_nivṛtti tad--_tad ātmānaḥ_ātman iti_iti vyapadiśyante_vyapadiś iti_iti yuktam_yuj viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa

nanu_nanu karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna vikṣepe_vikṣepa sati_as katham_katham deha--_deha ādi--_ādi abhimāna--_abhimāna nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah tad--_tad niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā iti_iti tasmin_tad eva_eva brahmaṇi_brahman sarva--_sarva karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna vikṣepa--_vikṣepa nivṛttyā_nivṛtti niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sthitiḥ_sthiti yeṣām_yad te_tad tad--_tad niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā phala--_phala rāge_rāga sati_as katham_katham tad--_tad sādhana--_sādhana bhūta--_bhū karma--_karman tyāgaḥ_tyāga iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah tad--_tad parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa tat_tad eva_eva param_para ayanam_ayana prāptavyam_prāp yeṣām_yad te_tad tad--_tad parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa sarvatas_sarvatas viraktāḥ_virañj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

atra_atra tad--_tad buddhayaḥ_buddhi iti_iti anena_idam sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra uktaḥ_vac tad--_tad ātmānaḥ_ātman iti_iti anātma--_anātman abhimā--_abhimā rūpa--_rūpa viparīta--_viparīta bhāva--_bhāva nivṛtti--_nivṛtti phalakaḥ_phalaka vedānta--_vedānta vicāraḥ_vicāra śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana paripāka--_paripāka rūpaḥ_rūpa tad--_tad parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa iti_iti anena_idam vairāgya--_vairāgya prakarṣam_prakarṣa iti_iti uttarottarasya_uttarottara pūrva--_pūrva pūrva--_pūrva hetu--_hetu tvam_tva draṣṭavyam_dṛś ukta--_vac viśeṣaṇāḥ_viśeṣaṇa yatayaḥ_yati gacchanti_gam apunar_apunar āvṛttim_āvṛtti punar_punar deha--_deha sambandha--_sambandha abhāva--_abhāva rūpām_rūpa muktim_mukti prāpnuvanti_prāp sakṛt_sakṛt muktānām_muc api_api punar_punar deha--_deha sambandhaḥ_sambandha kutas_kutas na_na syāt_as iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah jñāna--_jñāna nirdhūta--_nirdhū kalmaṣāḥ_kalmaṣa jñānena_jñāna nirdhūtam_nirdhū samūlam_samūla unmūlitam_unmūlay punar_punar deha--_deha sambandha--_sambandha kāraṇam_kāraṇa kalmaṣam_kalmaṣa puṇya--_puṇya pāpa--_pāpa ātmakam_ātmaka karma_karman jñānena_jñāna anādi--_anādi ajñāna--_ajñāna nivṛttyā_nivṛtti
tad--_tad kārya--_kārya karma--_karman kṣaye_kṣaya tad--_tad mūlakam_mūlaka punar_punar deha--_deha grahaṇam_grahaṇa katham_katham bhavet_bhū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

prakāśayati_prakāśay tasmāt_tasmāt paramātma--_paramātman jñāna--_jñāna artham_artha jñānibhiḥ_jñānin api_api punar_punar viśeṣataḥ_viśeṣataḥ bhaktiḥ_bhakti kāryā_kṛ iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah tad--_tad buddhayaḥ_buddhi iti_iti tad--_tad padena_pada pūrvam_pūrvam upakrāntaḥ_upakram vibhuḥ_vibhu parāmṛśyate_parāmṛś tasmin_tad parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara eva_eva buddhiḥ_buddhi yeṣām_yad te_tad tam_tad manana--_manana parāḥ_para iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad ātmānaḥ_ātman tad--_tad manaskāḥ_manaska tam_tad eva_eva dhyāyantaḥ_dhyā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā jñānam_jñāna mayi_mad saṃnyaset_saṃnyas iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant ukteḥ_ukti deha--_deha ādi--_ādi atirikta--_atiric ātmma--_ātman jñāne_jñāna api_api sāttvike_sāttvika niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā parityajya_parityaj tad--_tad eka--_eka niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā tad--_tad parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa tadīya--_tadīya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana parāḥ_para yat_yad vakṣyate_vac

bhaktyā_bhakti mām_mad abhijānāti_abhijñā yāvān_yāvat yaḥ_yad ca_ca asmi_as tattvataḥ_tattva
tatas_tatas mām_mad tattvataḥ_tattva jñātvā_jñā viśate_viś tad--_tad anantaram_anantaram
div.l: jñāna--_jñāna nirdhūta--_nirdhū kalmaṣāḥ_kalmaṣa jñānena_jñāna vidyāya_vidyā eva_eva pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva dhvasta--_dhvaṃs samasta--_samasta avidyāḥ_avidyā
div.p: āha_ah tasmin_tad tad--_tad avaiṣamya--_avaiṣamya ādike_ādika guṇa--_guṇa gaṇe_gaṇa buddhiḥ_buddhi niścaya--_niścaya ātmikā_ātmaka yeṣām_yad te_tad tad--_tad ātmānaḥ_ātman tasmin_tad niviṣṭa--_niviś manasaḥ_manas tad--_tad niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā tad--_tad tātparyavantaḥ_tātparyavat tad--_tad parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa tad--_tad samāśrayāḥ_samāśraya evam_evam abhyastena_abhyas tad--_tad vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa jñānena_jñāna nirdhūta--_nirdhū kalmaṣāḥ_kalmaṣa vinaṣṭa--_vinaś tad--_tad vaimukhyāḥ_vaimukhya santa_as apunar_apunar āvṛttim_āvṛtti muktim_mukti gacchanti_gam iti_iti
BhG 5.18

lg.l: vidyā--_vidyā vinaya--_vinaya saṃpanne_sampad brāhmaṇe_brāhmaṇa gavi_go hastini_hastin
śuni_śvan śvapāke_śvapāka paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita sama--_sama darśinaḥ_darśin

div.p: āha_ah viṣameṣu_viṣama api_api samam_sama brahma_brahman eva_eva draṣṭum_dṛś śīlam_śīla yeṣām_yad te_tad paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita jñāninaḥ_jñānin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra vidyā--_vidyā vinayābhyām_vinaya yukte_yuj brāhmaṇe_brāhmaṇa ca_ca śunaḥ_śvan yaḥ_yad pacati_pac tasmin_tad śvapāke_śvapāka ca_ca iti_iti karmaṇā_karman vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya gavi_go hastini_hastin śuni_śvan ca_ca iti_iti jātitaḥ_jāti vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya darśitam_darśay

āha_ah vidyā_vidyā veda--_veda artha--_artha parijñānam_parijñāna brahma--_brahman vidyā_vidyā vā_vā vinayaḥ_vinaya nirahaṅkāra--_nirahaṃkāra tvam_tva anauddhatyam_anauddhatya iti_iti yāvat_yāvat tābhyām_tad saṃpanne_sampad brahma--_brahman vidi_vid vinīte_vinī ca_ca brāhmaṇe_brāhmaṇa sāttvike_sāttvika sarva--_sarva uttame_uttama tathā_tathā gavi_go saṃskāra--_saṃskāra hīnāyām_hā rājasyām_rājasa madhyamāyām_madhyama tathā_tathā hastini_hastin śuni_śvan śvapāke_śvapāka ca_ca atyanta--_atyanta tāmase_tāmasa sarva--_sarva adhame_adhama api_api sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi guṇaiḥ_guṇa tad--_tad jaiḥ_ja ca_ca saṃskāraiḥ_saṃskāra a_a spṛṣṭam_spṛś eva_eva samam_sama brahma_brahman draṣṭum_dṛś śīlam_śīla yeṣām_yad te_tad sama--_sama darśinaḥ_darśin paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita jñāninaḥ_jñānin yathā_yathā gaṅgā--_gaṅgā toye_toya taḍāge_taḍāga surāyām_surā
mūtre_mūtra vā_vā pratibimbitasya_pratibimb ādityasya_āditya na_na tad--_tad guṇa--_guṇa doṣa--_doṣa sambandhaḥ_sambandha tathā_tathā brahmaṇaḥ_brahman api_api cit--_cit ābhāsa--_ābhāsa dvārā_dvār pratibimbitasya_pratibimb na_na upādhi--_upādhi gata--_gam guṇa--_guṇa doṣa--_doṣa sambandhaḥ_sambandha iti_iti pratisandadhānāḥ_pratisaṃdhā sarvatra_sarvatra sama--_sama dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi anubhavanti_anubhū

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatas_tatas ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa atītānām_atī teṣām_tad guṇa--_guṇa maye_maya vastu--_vastu mātre_mātra eva_eva tāratamya--_tāratamya mayam_maya viśeṣam_viśeṣa ajighṛkṣūṇām_ajighṛkṣu sama--_sama buddhiḥ_buddhi eva_eva syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah vidyā--_vidyā iti_iti brāhmaṇe_brāhmaṇa gavi_go iti_iti sāttvika--_sāttvika jāti--_jāti tvāt_tva hastini_hastin madhyame_madhyama śuni_śvan ca_ca śvapāke_śvapāka ca_ca iti_iti tāmas--_tāmas jāti--_jāti tvāt_tva adhame_adhama api_api tad--_tad tad--_tad viśeṣa--_viśeṣa agrahaṇāt_agrahaṇa sama--_sama darśinaḥ_darśin paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita guṇa--_guṇa atītāḥ_atī viśeṣa--_viśeṣa agrahaṇam_agrahaṇa eva_eva samam_sama guṇa--_guṇa atītam_atī brahma_brahman tat_tad draṣṭum_dṛś śīlam_śīla yeṣām_yad te_tad

baladevaḥ_baladeva tān_tad stauti_stu vidyā_vidyā iti_iti tādṛśe_tādṛśa brāhmaṇe_brāhmaṇa śvapāke_śvapāka ca_ca iti_iti karmaṇā_karman etau_etad viṣamau_viṣama gavi_go hastini_hastin śuni_śvan ca_ca iti_iti jātyā_jāti ete_etad viṣamāḥ_viṣama evam_evam viṣama--_viṣama tayā_tā sṛṣṭeṣu_sṛj brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādiṣu_ādi ye_yad paramātmānam_paramātman samam_sama paśyanti_dṛś te_tad eva_eva paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita tad--_tad karma--_karman anusāriṇī_anusārin tena_tena teṣām_tad tathā_tathā tathā_tathā sṛṣṭiḥ_sṛṣṭi na_na tu_tu rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa anusāriṇī_anusārin iti_iti parjanya--_parjanya vat_vat sarvatra_sarvatra samaḥ_sama paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti
BhG 5.19

lg.l: iha_iha eva_eva taiḥ_tad jitaḥ_ji sargaḥ_sarga yeṣām_yad sāmye_sāmya sthitam_sthā manaḥ_manas
nirdoṣam_nirdoṣa hi_hi samam_sama brahma_brahman tasmāt_tasmāt brahmaṇi_brahman te_tad sthitāḥ_sthā

div.p: kurvantaḥ_kṛ āha_ah asya_idam arthaḥ_artha samāya_sama pūjayā_pūjā viṣame_viṣama prakāre_prakāra kṛte_kṛ sati_as viṣamāya_viṣama ca_ca same_sama prakāre_prakāra kṛte_kṛ sati_as sa_tad pūjakaḥ_pūjaka iha_iha lokāt_loka para--_para lokāt_loka ca_ca hīyate_hā iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah iha_iha eva_eva iti_iti iha_iha eva_eva jīvadbhiḥ_jīv eva_eva taiḥ_tad sṛjyate_sṛj sargaḥ_sarga saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra jitaḥ_ji nirastaḥ_niras kaiḥ_ka yeṣām_yad manaḥ_manas sāmye_sāmya samatve_samatva sthitam_sthā tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt brahma_brahman samam_sama nirdoṣam_nirdoṣa ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt te_tad sama--_sama darśinaḥ_darśin brahmaṇi_brahman eva_eva sthitāḥ_sthā brahma--_brahman bhāvam_bhāva prāptāḥ_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha gautama--_gautama uktaḥ_vac tu_tu doṣaḥ_doṣa brahma--_brahman bhāva--_bhāva prāpteḥ_prāpti pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva pūjātaḥ_pūjā iti_iti pūjaka--_pūjaka avasthā--_avasthā śravaṇāt_śravaṇa

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu sāttvika--_sāttvika rājasa--_rājasa tāmaseṣu_tāmasa svabhāva--_svabhāva viṣameṣu_viṣama prāṇiṣu_prāṇin samatva--_samatva darśanam_darśana dharma--_dharma śāstra--_śāstra niṣiddham_niṣidh tathā_tathā ca_ca tasya_tad annam_anna abhojyam_abhojya iti_iti upakramya_upakram gautamaḥ_gautama smarati_smṛ samāsam_samāsa ābhyām_idam viṣama--_viṣama same_sama pūjātaḥ_pūjā iti_iti samāsam_samāsa ābhyām_idam caturthī--_caturthī dvi--_dvi vacanam_vacana viṣama--_viṣama samaḥ_sama iti_iti dvandva--_dvaṃdva eka--_eka vat_vat bhāvena_bhāva saptamī--_saptamī eka--_eka vacanam_vacana catur--_catur veda--_veda pāragāṇām_pāraga atyanta--_atyanta sat--_sat ācārāṇām_ācāra yādṛśaḥ_yādṛśa vastra--_vastra alaṅkāra--_alaṃkāra anna--_anna ādi--_ādi dāna--_dāna puraḥsaraḥ_puraḥsara pūjā--_pūjā viśesaḥ_viśeṣa kriyate_kṛ tad--_tad samāya_sama eva_eva anyasmai_anya catur--_catur veda--_veda pāragāya_pāraga sat--_sat ācārāya_ācāra viṣame_viṣama tad--_tad tathā_tathā alpa--_alpa vedānām_veda hīna--_hā ācārāṇām_ācāra yādṛśaḥ_yādṛśa hīna--_hā sādhanaḥ_sādhana pūjā--_pūjā prakāraḥ_prakāra kriyate_kṛ tādṛśāya_tādṛśa eva_eva asamāya_asama pūrvokta--_pūrvokta veda--_veda pāraga--_pāraga sat--_sat ācāra--_ācāra brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa apekṣayā_apekṣā hīnāya_hā tādṛśa--_tādṛśa hīna--_hā pūjā--_pūjā adhike_adhika hīnasya_hā uttama--_uttama tayā_tā pūjātaḥ_pūjā hetoḥ_hetu tasya_tad pūjayituḥ_pūjayitṛ annam_anna abhojyam_abhojya bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pūjayitā_pūjayitṛ pratipatti--_pratipatti viśesam_viśesa akurvan_kṛ dhanāt_dhana dharmāt_dharma ca_ca hīyate_hā iti_iti ca_ca doṣa--_doṣa antaram_antara yadi_yadi api_api yatīnām_yati niṣparigrahāṇām_niṣparigraha pāka--_pāka abhāvāt_abhāva dhana--_dhana abhāvāt_abhāva ca_ca abhojya--_abhojya anna--_anna tvam_tva dhana--_dhana hīna--_hā tvam_tva ca_ca svatas_svatas eva_eva vidyate_vid tathā_tathā api_api dharma--_dharma hāniḥ_hāni dosaḥ_dosa bhavati_bhū eva_eva abhojya--_abhojya anna--_anna tvam_tva ca_ca aśuci--_aśuci tvena_tva upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa tapaḥ--_tapas dhanānām_dhana ca_ca tapaḥ_tapas eva_eva dhanam_dhana iti_iti tad--_tad hāniḥ_hāni api_api dūṣaṇam_dūṣaṇa bhavati_bhū eva_eva iti_iti katham_katham sama--_sama darśinaḥ_darśin paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita jīvan--_jīv muktāḥ_muc iti_iti prāpte_prāp pariharati_parihṛ iha_iha eva_eva iti_iti

taiḥ_tad sama--_sama darśibhiḥ_darśin paṇḍitaiḥ_paṇḍita iha_iha eva_eva jīvana--_jīvana daśāyām_daśā eva_eva jitaḥ_ji atikrāntaḥ_atikram sargaḥ_sarga sṛjyate_sṛj iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti dvaita--_dvaita prapañcaḥ_prapañca deha--_deha pātāt_pāta ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam atikramitavyaḥ_atikram iti_iti kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac kaiḥ_ka yeṣām_yad sāmye_sāmya sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta viṣameṣu_viṣama api_api vartamānasya_vṛt brahmaṇaḥ_brahman sama--_sama bhāve_bhāva sthitam_sthā niścalam_niścala manaḥ_manas hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt nirdoṣam_nirdoṣa samam_sama sarva--_sarva vikāra--_vikāra śūnyam_śūnya kūṭastha--_kūṭastha nityam_nitya ekam_eka ca_ca brahma_brahman tasmāt_tasmāt te_tad brahmaṇi_brahman eva_eva sthitāḥ_sthā

ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva duṣṭa--_duṣ tvam_tva hi_hi dvedhā_dvedhā bhavati_bhū aduṣṭasya_aduṣṭa api_api duṣṭa--_duṣ sambandhāt_sambandha svatas_svatas duṣṭa--_duṣ tvāt_tva vā_vā yathā_yathā gaṅgā--_gaṅgā udakasya_udaka mūtra--_mūtra garta--_garta pātāt_pāta svatas_svatas eva_eva vā_vā yathā_yathā mūtra--_mūtra ādeḥ_ādi tatra_tatra doṣavatsu_doṣavat śvapāka--_śvapāka ādiṣu_ādi sthitam_sthā doṣaiḥ_doṣa duṣyati_duṣ brahma_brahman iti_iti mūḍhaiḥ_muh vibhāvyamānam_vibhāvay api_api sarva--_sarva doṣa--_doṣa asaṃsṛṣṭam_asaṃsṛṣṭa eva_eva brahma_brahman vyoma--_vyoman vat_vat asaṅga--_asaṅga tvāt_tva a_a saṅgaḥ_saṅga hi_hi ayam_idam puruṣaḥ_puruṣa

sūryaḥ_sūrya yathā_yathā sarva--_sarva lokasya_loka cakṣuḥ_cakṣus na_na lipyate_lip cākṣuṣaiḥ_cākṣuṣa bāhya--_bāhya doṣaiḥ_doṣa ekaḥ_eka tathā_tathā sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta antarātmā_antarātman na_na lipyate_lip loka--_loka duḥkhena_duḥkha bāhyaḥ_bāhya iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

nā_na api_api kāma--_kāma ādi--_ādi dharmavat--_dharmavat tayā_tā svatas_svatas eva_eva kaluṣitam_kaluṣita kāma--_kāma ādeḥ_ādi antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa dharma--_dharma tvasya_tva śruti--_śruti smṛti--_smṛti siddha--_sidh tvāt_tva tasmāt_tasmāt nirdoṣa--_nirdoṣa brahma--_brahman rūpāḥ_rūpa yatayaḥ_yati jīvan--_jīv muktāḥ_muc abhojya--_abhojya anna--_anna ādi--_ādi doṣa--_doṣa duṣṭāḥ_duṣ ca_ca iti_iti vyāhṛtam_vyāhṛ smṛtiḥ_smṛti tu_tu avidvat--_avidvas gṛhastha--_gṛhastha viṣayā_viṣaya eva_eva tasya_tad anna--_anna bhojyam_bhojya iti_iti upakramāt_upakrama pūjātaḥ_pūjā iti_iti madhye_madhya nirdeśāt_nirdeśa dhanāt_dhana dharmāt_dharma ca_ca hīyate_hā iti_iti upasaṃhārāt_upasaṃhāra ca_ca iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sama--_sama dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi tvam_tva stauti_stu iha_iha eva_eva iha_iha loke_loka eva_eva sṛjyate_sṛj iti_iti sargaḥ_sarga saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra jitaḥ_ji parābhūtaḥ_parābhū

baladevaḥ_baladeva iha_iha iti_iti iha_iha sādhana--_sādhana daśāyām_daśā eva_eva taiḥ_tad sargaḥ_sarga saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra jitaḥ_ji parābhūtaḥ_parābhū kaiḥ_ka yeṣām_yad manaḥ_manas sāmye_sāmya avaiṣamya--_avaiṣamya ākhye_ākhyā brahma--_brahman dharme_dharma sthitam_sthā niviṣṭam_niviś kutas_kutas brahma_brahman aviṣamam_aviṣama tatra_tatra āha_ah nirdoṣam_nirdoṣa hi_hi iti_iti hi_hi yatas_yatas brahmaṇi_brahman avaiṣamya--_avaiṣamya ādikam_ādika niścikyuḥ_niści tasmāt_tasmāt prapañce_prapañca tiṣṭhantaḥ_sthā api_api te_tad brahmaṇi_brahman eva_eva sthitāḥ_sthā muktiḥ_mukti teṣām_tad sulabhā_sulabha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 5.20

lg.l: na_na prahṛṣyet_prahṛṣ priyam_priya prāpya_prāp na_na udvijet_udvij prāpya_prāp ca_ca apriyam_apriya
sthira--_sthira buddhiḥ_buddhi asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha brahma--_brahman vid_vid brahmaṇi_brahman sthitaḥ_sthā

div.p: āha_ah prahṛṣyet_prahṛṣ brahma--_brahman vid_vid bhūtvā_bhū brahmaṇi_brahman eva_eva yaḥ_yad sthitaḥ_sthā sa_tad priyam_priya prāpya_prāp na_na prahṛṣyet_prahṛṣ prakṛṣṭa--_prakṛṣṭa harṣavān_harṣavat syāt_as apriyam_apriya prāpya_prāp ca_ca na_na udvijet_udvij na_na viṣīdati_viṣad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yatas_yatas sthira--_sthira buddhiḥ_buddhi sthirā_sthira niścalā_niścala buddhiḥ_buddhi yasya_yad tat_tad kutas_kutas yatas_yatas asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha nivṛtta--_nivṛt mohaḥ_moha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yasmāt_yasmāt nirdoṣam_nirdoṣa samam_sama brahma_brahman tasmāt_tasmāt tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa ātmānam_ātman sākṣātkurvan_sākṣātkṛ āha_ah na_na prahṛṣyet_prahṛṣ iti_iti duḥkheṣu_duḥkha anudvigna--_anudvigna manāḥ_manas sukheṣu_sukha vigata--_vigam spṛhaḥ_spṛhā iti_iti atra_atra vyākhyātam_vyākhyā pūrva--_pūrva ardham_ardha jīvan--_jīv muktānām_muc svābhāvikam_svābhāvika caritam_carita eva_eva mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu prayatna--_prayatna pūrvakam_pūrvaka anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā iti_iti vaditum_vad liṅga--_liṅga pratyayau_pratyaya advitīya--_advitīya ātma--_ātman darśana--_darśana śīlasya_śīla vyatirikta--_vyatiric priya--_priya apriya--_apriya prāpti--_prāpti ayogyāt_ayogya ca_ca tad--_tad nimittau_nimitta harṣa--_harṣa viṣādau_viṣāda iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

advitīya--_advitīya ātma--_ātman darśanam_darśana eva_eva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ sthira--_sthira buddhiḥ_buddhi sthirā_sthira niścalā_niścala saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa pūrvaka--_pūrvaka vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya vicāra--_vicāra paripākeṇa_paripāka sarva--_sarva saṃśaya--_saṃśaya śūnya--_śūnya tvena_tva nirvicikitsā_nirvicikitsa niścitā_niści brahmaṇi_brahman buddhiḥ_buddhi yasya_yad sa_tad iti_iti yāvat_yāvat etādṛśasya_etādṛśa sarva--_sarva asaṃbhāvanā--_asaṃbhāvanā śūnya--_śūnya tve_tva api_api viparīta--_viparīta bhāva--_bhāva pratibandhāt_pratibandha sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra na_na udeti_udi iti_iti nididhyāsanam_nididhyāsana āha_ah asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha nididhyāsanasya_nididhyāsana vijātīya--_vijātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya anantarita--_anantarita sajātīya--_sajātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya pravāhasya_pravāha paripākeṇa_paripāka viparīta--_viparīta bhāvanā--_bhāvanā ākhya--_ākhya saṃmoha--_sammoha rahitaḥ_rahita tatas_tatas sarva--_sarva pratibandha--_pratibandha apagamāt_apagama brahma--_brahman vid_vid brahma--_brahman sākṣātkāravān_sākṣātkāravat tatas_tatas ca_ca samādhi--_samādhi paripākeṇa_paripāka nirdoṣe_nirdoṣa same_sama brahmaṇi_brahman eva_eva sthitaḥ_sthā na_na anyatra_anyatra iti_iti brahmaṇi_brahman sthitaḥ_sthā jīvan--_jīv muktaḥ_muc sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etādṛśasya_etādṛśa dvaita--_dvaita darśana--_darśana abhāvāt_abhāva praharṣa--_praharṣa udvegau_udvega na_na bhavataḥ_bhū iti_iti ucitam_ucita eva_eva sādhakena_sādhaka tu_tu dvaita--_dvaita darśane_darśana vidyamāne_vid api_api viṣaya--_viṣaya doṣa--_doṣa darśana--_darśana ādinā_ādi praharṣa--_praharṣa viṣādau_viṣāda tyājyau_tyaj iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

āha_ah prahṛṣyet_prahṛṣ prahṛṣyet_prahṛṣ prahṛṣyati_prahṛṣ na_na udvijet_udvij na_na udvijate_udvij sādhana--_sādhana daśāyām_daśā evam_evam abhyaset_abhyas iti_iti vivakṣayā_vivakṣā vā_vā liṅ_liṅ asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha harṣa--_harṣa śoka--_śoka ādīnām_ādi abhimāna--_abhimāna nibandhana--_nibandhana tvena_tva saṃmoha--_sammoha mātra--_mātra tvāt_tva

baladevaḥ_baladeva brahmaṇi_brahman sthitasya_sthā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa āha_ah na_na iti_iti vartamāne_vṛt dehe_deha sthitaḥ_sthā prārabdha--_prārabh ākṛṣṭam_ākṛṣ priyam_priya apriyam_apriya ca_ca prāpya_prāp na_na prahṛṣyet_prahṛṣ na_na ca_ca udvijet_udvij kutas_kutas sthirā_sthira sva--_sva ātmani_ātman buddhiḥ_buddhi yasya_yad saḥ_tad asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha anityena_anitya dehena_deha nityam_nitya ātmānam_ātman ekīkṛtya_ekīkṛ moham_moha na_na labdhaḥ_labh brahma--_brahman vid_vid tādṛśam_tādṛśa brahma_brahman anubhavan_anubhū evaṃlakṣaṇaḥ_evaṃlakṣaṇa brahmaṇi_brahman sthitaḥ_sthā bodhyaḥ_budh
BhG 5.21

lg.l: bāhya--_bāhya sparśeṣu_sparśa asakta--_asakta ātmā_ātman vindati_vid ātmani_ātman yat_yad sukham_sukha
sa_tad brahma--_brahman yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman sukham_sukha akṣayam_akṣaya aśnute_aś

div.p: āha_ah indriyaiḥ_indriya spṛśyante_spṛś iti_iti sparśāḥ_sparśa viṣayāḥ_viṣaya bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya asakta--_asakta ātmā_ātman anāsakta--_anāsakta cittaḥ_citta ātmani_ātman antaḥkaraṇe_antaḥkaraṇa yat_yad upaśama--_upaśama ātmakam_ātmaka sāttvikam_sāttvika sukham_sukha tat_tad vindati_vid labhate_labh sa_tad ca_ca upaśamam_upaśama sukham_sukha labdhvā_labh brahmaṇi_brahman yogena_yoga samādhinā_samādhi yuktaḥ_yuj tad--_tad aikyam_aikya prāptaḥ_prāp ātmā_ātman yasya_yad saḥ_tad akṣayam_akṣaya sukham_sukha aśnute_aś prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu bāhya--_bāhya viṣaya--_viṣaya prītyāḥ_prīti aneka--_aneka janma--_janman anubhūta--_anubhū tvena_tva ati_ati pracala--_pracala tvāt_tva tad--_tad āsakta--_āsañj cittasya_citta katham_katham alaukike_alaukika brahmaṇi_brahman dṛṣṭa--_dṛś sarva--_sarva sukha--_sukha rahite_rahita sthitiḥ_sthiti syāt_as tat_tad uktam_vac vārttike_vārttika
api_api ānandaḥ_ānanda śrutaḥ_śru sākṣāt_sākṣāt mānena_māna a_a viṣayīkṛtaḥ_viṣayīkṛ dṛṣṭa--_dṛś ānanda--_ānanda abhilāṣam_abhilāṣa sa_tad na_na mandīkartum_mandīkṛ api_api alam_alam

tatra_tatra āha_ah bāhya--_bāhya iti_iti indriyaiḥ_indriya spṛśyante_spṛś iti_iti sparśāḥ_sparśa śabda--_śabda ādayaḥ_ādi te_tad bāhyāḥ_bāhya anātma--_anātman dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva teṣu_tad asakta--_asakta ātmā_ātman anāsakta--_anāsakta cittaḥ_citta tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā śūnyatayā_śūnyatā viraktaḥ_virañj san_as ātmani_ātman antaḥkaraṇe_antaḥkaraṇa eva_eva bāhya--_bāhya viṣaya--_viṣaya nirapekṣam_nirapekṣa yat_yad upaśama--_upaśama ātmakam_ātmaka sukham_sukha tat_tad vindati_vid labhate_labh nirmala--_nirmala sattva--_sattva vṛttyā_vṛtti tat_tad uktam_vac bhārate_bhārata

yat_yad ca_ca kāma--_kāma sukham_sukha loke_loka yat_yad ca_ca divyam_divya mahat_mahat sukham_sukha tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā kṣaya--_kṣaya sukhasya_sukha ete_etad na_na arhataḥ_arh ṣoḍaśīm_ṣoḍaśa kalām_kalā iti_iti

athavā_athavā pratyak--_pratyañc ātmani_ātman tvam_tvad padārthe_padārtha yat_yad sukham_sukha svarūpa--_svarūpa bhūtam_bhū suṣuptau_suṣupti anubhūyamānam_anubhū bāhya--_bāhya viṣaya--_viṣaya āsakti--_āsakti pratibandhāt_pratibandha a_a lambhamānam_labh tat_tad eva_eva tad--_tad abhāvāt_abhāva labhate_labh

na_na kevalam_kevala tvam_tvad padārtha--_padārtha sukham_sukha eva_eva labhate_labh kintu_kiṃtu tad--_tad padārtha--_padārtha aikya--_aikya anubhavena_anubhava pūrṇa--_pṛ sukham_sukha api_api iti_iti āha_ah sa_tad tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā śūnyaḥ_śūnya brahmaṇi_brahman paramātmani_paramātman yogaḥ_yoga samādhiḥ_samādhi tena_tad yuktaḥ_yuj tasmin_tad vyāpṛtaḥ_vyāpṛta brahma--_brahman yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman athavā_athavā brahmaṇi_brahman tad--_tad padārthe_padārtha yogena_yoga vākya--_vākya artha--_artha anubhava--_anubhava rūpeṇa_rūpa samādhinā_samādhi yuktaḥ_yuj aikyam_aikya prāptaḥ_prāp ātmā_ātman tvam_tvad padārtha--_padārtha svarūpam_svarūpa yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā sukham_sukha akṣayam_akṣaya anantam_ananta sva--_sva svarūpa--_svarūpa bhūtam_bhū aśnute_aś vyāpnoti_vyāp sukha--_sukha anubhava--_anubhava rūpaḥ_rūpa eva_eva sarvadā_sarvadā bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nitye_nitya api_api vastuni_vastu avidyā--_avidyā nivṛtti--_nivṛtti abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya dhātu--_dhātu artha--_artha yogaḥ_yoga aupacārikaḥ_aupacārika tasmāt_tasmāt ātmani_ātman akṣaya--_akṣaya sukha--_sukha anubhava--_anubhava arthī_arthin san_as bāhya--_bāhya viṣaya--_viṣaya prīteḥ_prīti kṣaṇikāyāḥ_kṣaṇika mahā--_mahat naraka--_naraka anubandhinyāḥ_anubandhin
sakāśāt_sakāśa indriyāṇi_indriya nivartayet_nivartay tāvatā_tāvat eva_eva ca_ca brahmaṇi_brahman sthitiḥ_sthiti bhavati_bhū iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sa_tad ca_ca bāhya--_bāhya sparśeṣu_sparśa viṣaya--_viṣaya sukheṣu_sukha asakta--_asakta ātmā_ātman anāsakta--_anāsakta manāḥ_manas tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu ātmani_ātman jīvātmani_jīvātman paramātmānam_paramātman vindati_vid sati_as prāpte_prāp yat_yad sukham_sukha tat_tad akṣayam_akṣaya sukham_sukha saḥ_tad eva_eva aśnute_aś prāpnoti_prāp na_na hi_hi nirantaram_nirantaram amṛta--_amṛta āsvādine_āsvādin mṛttikā_mṛttikā rocate_ruc iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

anubhavati_anubhū āha_ah bāhya--_bāhya sparśeṣu_sparśa śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya anubhaveṣu_anubhava asakta--_asakta ātmā_ātman san_as yad--_yad ātmani_ātman sva--_sva svarūpe_svarūpa anubhūyamāne_anubhū sukham_sukha tad--_tad ādau_ādi vindati_vid tat_tad uttaram_uttara brahmaṇi_brahman paramātmani_paramātman yogaḥ_yoga samādhiḥ_samādhi tad--_tad yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman san_as tat_tad aśnute_aś labhate_labh
BhG 5.22

lg.l: ye_yad hi_hi saṃsparśa--_saṃsparśa jāḥ_ja bhogāḥ_bhoga duḥkha--_duḥkha yonayaḥ_yoni eva_eva te_tad
ādi--_ādi anta--_anta vantaḥ_vat kaunteya_kaunteya na_na teṣu_tad ramate_ram budhaḥ_budha

div.p: syāt_as tatra_tatra āha_ah ye_yad hi_hi iti_iti saṃsparśāḥ_saṃsparśa viṣayāḥ_viṣaya tebhyaḥ_tad jātāḥ_jan ye_yad bhogāḥ_bhoga sukhāni_sukha te_tad hi_hi vartamāna--_vartamāna kāle_kāla api_api spardhā--_spardhā asūyā--_asūyā ādi--_ādi vyāpta--_vyāp tvāt_tva duḥkhasya_duḥkha eva_eva yonayaḥ_yoni kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtāḥ_bhū tathā_tathā ādimantaḥ_ādimat antavantaḥ_antavat ca_ca atas_atas vivekī_vivekin teṣu_tad na_na ramate_ram

viṣaya--_viṣaya doṣa--_doṣa darśana--_darśana abhyāsena_abhyāsa eva_eva tad--_tad prīti--_prīti nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti bhavati_bhū iti_iti parihāram_parihāra āha_ah ye_yad hi_hi iti_iti hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt ye_yad saṃsparśa--_saṃsparśa jāḥ_ja viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya sambandha--_sambandha jāḥ_ja bhogāḥ_bhoga kṣudra--_kṣudra sukha--_sukha lava--_lava anubhavāḥ_anubhava iha_iha vā_vā paratra_paratra vā_vā rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi vyāpta--_vyāp tvena_tva duḥkha--_duḥkha yonayaḥ_yoni eva_eva te_tad te_tad sarve_sarva api_api brahma--_brahman loka--_loka paryantam_paryanta duḥkha--_duḥkha hetavaḥ_hetu eva_eva tat_tad uktam_vac viṣṇu--_viṣṇu purāṇe_purāṇa
yāvataḥ_yāvat kurute_kṛ jantuḥ_jantu saṃbandhān_sambandha manasaḥ_manas priyān_priya tāvantaḥ_tāvat asya_idam nisvanyante_nisvan hṛdaye_hṛdaya śoka--_śoka śaṅkavaḥ_śaṅku iti_iti

etādṛśāḥ_etādṛśa aḥ_aḥ na_na sthirāḥ_sthira kintu_kiṃtu ādi--_ādi anta--_anta vantaḥ_vat ādiḥ_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya saṃyogaḥ_saṃyoga antaḥ_anta ca_ca tad--_tad viyogaḥ_viyoga evam_evam tau_tad vidyete_vid yeṣām_yad te_tad pūrva--_pūrva aparayoḥ_apara asattvāt_asattva madhye_madhya svapna--_svapna vat_vat āvirbhūtāḥ_āvirbhūta kṣaṇikāḥ_kṣaṇika mithyā_mithyā bhūtāḥ_bhū tat_tad uktam_vac gauḍapāda--_gauḍapāda ācāryaiḥ_ācārya ādau_ādi ante_anta ca_ca yat_yad tu_tu asti_as vartamāne_vartamāna api_api tat_tad tathā_tathā iti_iti

yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt teṣu_tad budhaḥ_budha vivekī_vivekin na_na ramate_ram pratikūla--_pratikūla vedanīya--_vid tvāt_tva ca_ca prītim_prīti anubhavati_anubhū tat_tad uktam_vac bhagavatā_bhagavat patañjalinā_patañjali pariṇāma--_pariṇāma tāpa--_tāpa saṃskāra--_saṃskāra duḥkhaiḥ_duḥkha guṇa--_guṇa vṛtti--_vṛtti virodhāt_virodha ca_ca duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva sarvam_sarva vivekinaḥ_vivekin iti_iti sarvam_sarva api_api viṣaya--_viṣaya sukham_sukha dṛṣṭam_dṛś ānuśravikam_ānuśravika ca_ca duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva pratikūla--_pratikūla vedanīya--_vid tvāt_tva vivekinaḥ_vivekin parijñāta--_parijñā kleśa--_kleśa ādi--_ādi svarūpasya_svarūpa na_na tu_tu avivekinaḥ_avivekin akṣi--_akṣi pātra--_pātra kalpaḥ_kalpa hi_hi vidvān_vidvas ati_ati alpa--_alpa duḥkha--_duḥkha leśena_leśa api_api udvijate_udvij yathā_yathā ūrṇa--_ūrṇa tantuḥ_tantu ati_ati su_su kumāraḥ_kumāra api_api akṣi--_akṣi pātre_pātra nyastaḥ_nyas sparśena_sparśa duḥkhayati_duḥkhay na_na itareṣu_itara aṅgeṣu_aṅga tadvat_tadvat vivekinaḥ_vivekin eva_eva madhu--_madhu viṣa--_viṣa bhoga--_bhoga sādhanam_sādhana kāla--_kāla traye_traya api_api kleśa--_kleśa anubiddha--_anubidh tvāt_tva duḥkham_duḥkha na_na mūḍhasya_muh bahuvidha--_bahuvidha duḥkha--_duḥkha sahiṣṇoḥ_sahiṣṇu iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra pariṇāma--_pariṇāma tāpa--_tāpa saṃskāra--_saṃskāra duḥkhaiḥ_duḥkha iti_iti bhūta--_bhū vartamāna--_vartamāna bhaviṣyat--_bhū kāle_kāla api_api duḥkha--_duḥkha anubiddha--_anubidh tvāt_tva aupādhikam_aupādhika duḥkha--_duḥkha tvam_tva viṣaya--_viṣaya sukhasya_sukha uktam_vac guṇa--_guṇa vṛtti--_vṛtti virodhāt_virodha ca_ca iti_iti anena_idam svarūpataḥ_svarūpa tatra_tatra pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma ca_ca tāpaḥ_tāpa ca_ca saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra ca_ca te_tad eva_eva duḥkhāni_duḥkha taiḥ_tad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ittham_ittham bhūta--_bhū lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa tṛtīyā_tṛtīyā tathā_tathā hi_hi rāga--_rāga anubiddhaḥ_anubidh eva_eva sarvaḥ_sarva api_api sukha--_sukha anubhavaḥ_anubhava na_na hi_hi tatra_tatra na_na rajyati_rañj tena_tena sukhī_sukhin ca_ca iti_iti sambhavati_sambhū rāgaḥ_rāga eva_eva ca_ca pūrvam_pūrvam udbhūtaḥ_udbhū san_as viṣaya--_viṣaya prāptyā_prāpti sukha--_sukha rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇamate_pariṇam tasya_tad ca_ca pratikṣaṇam_pratikṣaṇam vardhamāna--_vṛdh tvena_tva sva--_sva viṣaya--_viṣaya aprāpti--_aprāpti nibandhana--_nibandhana duḥkhasya_duḥkha aparihārya--_aparihārya tvāt_tva duḥkha--_duḥkha rūpa--_rūpa tā_tā eva_eva yā_yad hi_hi bhogeṣu_bhoga indriyāṇām_indriya upaśāntiḥ_upaśānti paritṛpta--_paritṛp tvāt_tva tat_tad sukham_sukha yā_yad laulyāt_laulya anupaśāntiḥ_anupaśānti tat_tad duḥkham_duḥkha na_na ca_ca indriyāṇām_indriya bhoga--_bhoga abhyāsena_abhyāsa vaitṛṣṇyam_vaitṛṣṇya kartum_kṛ śakyam_śakya yatas_yatas bhoga--_bhoga abhyāsam_abhyāsa anu_anu vivardhante_vivṛdh rāgāḥ_rāga kauśalāni_kauśala ca_ca indriyāṇām_indriya smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca
na_na jātu_jātu kāmaḥ_kāma kāmānām_kāma upabhogena_upabhoga śāmyati_śam haviṣā_havis kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa vartmā_vartman eva_eva bhūyas_bhūyas eva_eva abhivardhate_abhivṛdh iti_iti

tasmāt_tasmāt duḥkha--_duḥkha ātmaka--_ātmaka rāga--_rāga pariṇāma--_pariṇāma tvāt_tva viṣaya--_viṣaya sukham_sukha api_api duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva kārya--_kārya kāraṇayoḥ_kāraṇa abhedāt_abheda iti_iti pariṇāma--_pariṇāma duḥkha--_duḥkha tvam_tva

tathā_tathā sukha--_sukha anubhava--_anubhava kāle_kāla tad--_tad pratikūlāni_pratikūla duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhanāni_sādhana dveṣṭi_dviṣ na_na an_an upahatya_upahan bhūtāni_bhūta upabhogaḥ_upabhoga sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti bhūtāni_bhūta ca_ca hinasti_hiṃs dveṣaḥ_dveṣa ca_ca sarvāṇi_sarva duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhanāni_sādhana me_mad mā_mā bhūvan_bhū iti_iti saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa na_na ca_ca tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva kaścid_kaścit api_api parihartum_parihṛ śaknoti_śak atas_atas sukha--_sukha anubhava--_anubhava kāle_kāla api_api tad--_tad paripanthinam_paripanthin prati_prati dveṣasya_dveṣa sarvadā_sarvadā eva_eva avasthita--_avasthā tvāt_tva tāpa--_tāpa duḥkham_duḥkha duṣparihāram_duṣparihāra eva_eva tāpaḥ_tāpa hi_hi dveṣaḥ_dveṣas evam_evam duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhanāni_sādhana parihartum_parihṛ aśaktaḥ_aśakta muhyati_muh ca_ca iti_iti moha--_moha duḥkha--_duḥkha tā_tā api_api vyākhyeyā_vyākhyā tathā_tathā ca_ca uktam_vac yoga--_yoga bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kāraiḥ_kāra sarvasya_sarva dveṣa--_dveṣa anubiddhaḥ_anubidh cetana--_cetana acetana--_acetana sādhana--_sādhana adhīnaḥ_adhīna tāpa--_tāpa anubhavaḥ_anubhava iti_iti tatra_tatra asti_as dveṣa--_dveṣa jaḥ_ja karma--_karman āśayaḥ_āśaya sukha--_sukha sādhanāni_sādhana prārthayamānaḥ_prārthay kāyena_kāya vācā_vāc manasā_manas parispandate_parispand tatas_tatas param_param anugṛṇāti_anugṛ upahanti_upahan ca_ca iti_iti para--_para anuraha--_anuraha pīḍābhyām_pīḍā dharma--_dharma adharmau_adharma upacinoti_upaci na_na karma--_karman āśayaḥ_āśaya lobhāt_lobha mohāt_moha ca_ca bhavati_bhū iti_iti eṣā_etad tāpa--_tāpa duḥkha--_duḥkha tā_tā ucyate_vac tathā_tathā vartamānaḥ_vṛt sukha--_sukha anubhavaḥ_anubhava sva--_sva vināśa--_vināśa kāle_kāla saṃskāram_saṃskāra ādhatte_ādhā sa_tad ca_ca sukha--_sukha smaraṇam_smaraṇa tat_tad ca_ca rāgam_rāga sa_tad ca_ca manaḥ--_manas kāya--_kāya vacana--_vacana ceṣṭām_ceṣṭā sā_tad ca_ca puṇya--_puṇya apuṇya--_apuṇya karma--_karman āśayau_āśaya tau_tad ca_ca janma--_janman ādi_ādi iti_iti saṃskāra--_saṃskāra duḥkha--_duḥkha tā_tā evam_evam tāpa--_tāpa mohayoḥ_moha api_api saṃskārau_saṃskāra vyākhyeyau_vyākhyā

evam_evam kāla--_kāla traye_traya api_api duḥkha--_duḥkha anuvedhāt_anuvedha viṣaya--_viṣaya sukham_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva iti_iti uktvā_vac svarūpataḥ_svarūpa api_api duḥkhatām_duḥkhatā āha_ah guṇa--_guṇa vṛtti--_vṛtti virodhāt_virodha ca_ca guṇāḥ_guṇa sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamāṃsi_tamas sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha ātmakāḥ_ātmaka paraspara--_paraspara viruddha--_virudh svabhāvāḥ_svabhāva api_api taila--_taila varti--_vartī agnayaḥ_agni iva_iva dīpam_dīpa puruṣa--_puruṣa bhoga--_bhoga upayukta--_upayuj tvena_tva tri--_tri ātmakam_ātmaka ekam_eka kāryam_kārya ārabhante_ārabh tatra_tatra ekasya_eka pradhāna--_pradhāna mātra--_mātra vyapadeśena_vyapadeśa sāttvikam_sāttvika rājasam_rājasa tāmasam_tāmasa iti_iti triguṇam_triguṇa api_api kāryam_kārya ekena_eka guṇena_guṇa vyapadiśyate_vyapadiś tatra_tatra sukha--_sukha upabhoga--_upabhoga rūpaḥ_rūpa api_api pratyayaḥ_pratyaya udbhūta--_udbhū sattva--_sattva kārya--_kārya tve_tva api_api anudbhūta--_anudbhūta rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas kārya--_kārya tvāt_tva triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka eva_eva tathā_tathā ca_ca sukha--_sukha ātmaka--_ātmaka tva--_tva vat_vat duḥkha--_duḥkha ātmaka--_ātmaka tvam_tva viṣāda--_viṣāda ātmaka--_ātmaka tvam_tva ca_ca tasya_tad dhruvam_dhruva iti_iti duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva sarvam_sarva vivekinaḥ_vivekin na_na ca_ca etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa api_api pratyayaḥ_pratyaya sthiraḥ_sthira yasmāt_yasmāt calam_cala ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa vṛttam_vṛt iti_iti kṣipra--_kṣipra pariṇāmi_pariṇāmin cittam_citta uktam_vac nanu_nanu ekaḥ_eka pratyayaḥ_pratyaya katham_katham paraspara--_paraspara viruddha--_virudh sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha tvāni_tva ekadā_ekadā pratipadyate_pratipad iti_iti ced_ced na_na udbhūta--_udbhū an_an udbhūtayoḥ_udbhū virodha--_virodha abhāvāt_abhāva sama--_sama vṛttikānām_vṛttika eva_eva hi_hi guṇānām_guṇa yugapad_yugapad virodhaḥ_virodha na_na viṣama--_viṣama vṛttikānām_vṛttika yathā_yathā dharma--_dharma jñāna--_jñāna vairāgya--_vairāgya aiśvaryāṇi_aiśvarya labdha--_labh vṛttikāni_vṛttika labdha--_labh vṛttikaiḥ_vṛttika eva_eva adharma--_adharma ajñāna--_ajñāna avairāgya--_avairāgya anaiśvaryaiḥ_anaiśvarya saha_saha virudhyante_virudh na_na tu_tu svarūpa--_svarūpa sadbhiḥ_sat pradhānasya_pradhāna pradhānena_pradhāna saha_saha virodhaḥ_virodha na_na tu_tu durbalena_durbala iti_iti hi_hi nyāyaḥ_nyāya evam_evam sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamāṃsi_tamas api_api parasparam_paraspara prādhānya--_prādhānya mātram_mātra yugapad_yugapad na_na sahante_sah na_na tu_tu sat--_as bhāvam_bhāva api_api

etena_etad pariṇāma--_pariṇāma tāpa--_tāpa saṃskāra--_saṃskāra duḥkheṣu_duḥkha api_api rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa mohānām_moha yugapad_yugapad sat--_as bhāvaḥ_bhāva vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā prasupta--_prasvap tanu--_tanu vicchinna--_vicchid udāra--_udāra rūpeṇa_rūpa kleśānām_kleśa catur--_catur avastha--_avasthā tvāt_tva tathā_tathā hi_hi ---_avidyā asmitā--_asmitā rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa abhiniveśāḥ_abhiniveśa pañca_pañcan kleśāḥ_kleśa avidyā_avidyā kṣetram_kṣetra uttareṣām_uttara prasupta--_prasvap tanu--_tanu vicchinna--_vicchid udārāṇām_udāra anitya--_anitya aśuci--_aśuci duḥkha--_duḥkha anātmasu_anātman nitya--_nitya śuci--_śuci sukha--_sukha ātma--_ātman khyātiḥ_khyāti avidyā_avidyā dṛś--_dṛś darśana--_darśana śaktyoḥ_śakti eka--_eka ātma--_ātman tā_tā eva_eva asmitā_asmitā rāgaḥ_rāga duḥkha--_duḥkha anuśayī_anuśayin dveṣaḥ_dveṣa sva--_sva rasa--_rasa vāhī_vāhin viduṣaḥ_vidvas api_api tathā_tathā ārūḍhaḥ_āruh abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa te_tad pratiprasava--_pratiprasava heyāḥ_hā sūkṣmāḥ_sūkṣma dhyāna--_dhyāna heyāḥ_hā tad--_tad vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti sati_as mūle_mūla tad--_tad vipākaḥ_vipāka jāti--_jāti āyuḥ_āyus bhogāḥ_bhoga iti_iti pātañjalāni_pātañjala sūtrāṇi_sūtra tatra_tatra a_a tasmin_tad tad--_tad buddhiḥ_buddhi viparyayaḥ_viparyaya mithyā_mithyā jñānam_jñāna avidyā_avidyā iti_iti paryāyāḥ_paryāya tasyāḥ_tad viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa saṃsāra--_saṃsāra nidānam_nidāna tatra_tatra anitye_anitya nitya--_nitya buddhiḥ_buddhi yathā_yathā -_dhruva pṛthivī_pṛthivī dhruvā_dhruva sa_sa candra--_candra tārakā_tārakā dyauḥ_div amṛtāḥ_amṛta divaukasaḥ_divaukas iti_iti aśucau_aśuci parama--_parama bībhatse_bībhatsa kāye_kāya śuci--_śuci buddhiḥ_buddhi yathā_yathā navā_nava iva_iva śaśāṅka--_śaśāṅka lekhā_lekhā kamanīyā_kam iyam_idam kanyā_kanyā madhu--_madhu amṛta--_amṛta avayava--_avayava nirmitā_nirmā iva_iva candram_candra bhittvā_bhid niḥsṛtā_niḥsṛ iva_iva jñāyate_jñā nīlotpala--_nīlotpala patra--_pattra āyata--_āyam akṣī_akṣa āśvāsayati_āśvāsay iva_iva iti_iti kasya_ka kena_ka sambandhaḥ_sambandha

sthānāt_sthāna bījāt_bīja upaṣṭambhāt_upaṣṭambha nisyandāt_nisyanda nidhanāt_nidhana api_api kāyam_kāya ādheya--_ādhā śauca--_śauca tvāt_tva paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita hi_hi aśucim_aśuci viduḥ_vid iti_iti ca_ca vaiyāsaki--_vaiyāsaki ślokaḥ_śloka

etena_etad apuṇye_apuṇya puṇya--_puṇya pratyayaḥ_pratyaya anarthe_anartha ca_ca artha--_artha pratyayaḥ_pratyaya vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā duḥkhe_duḥkha sukha--_sukha khyātiḥ_khyāti udāhṛtā_udāhṛ pariṇāma--_pariṇāma tāpa--_tāpa saṃskāra--_saṃskāra duḥkhaiḥ_duḥkha guṇa--_guṇa vṛtti--_vṛtti virodhāt_virodha ca_ca duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva sarvam_sarva vivekinaḥ_vivekin iti_iti anātmani_anātman ātma--_ātman khyātiḥ_khyāti yathā_yathā śarīre_śarīra manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya aham_mad iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi iyam_idam ca_ca avidyā_avidyā sarva--_sarva kleśa--_kleśa mūla--_mūla bhūtā_bhū tamaḥ_tamas iti_iti ucyate_vac buddhi--_buddhi puruṣayoḥ_puruṣa abheda--_abheda abhimānaḥ_abhimāna asmitā_asmitā mohaḥ_moha sādhana--_sādhana rahitasya_rahita api_api sarvam_sarva sukha--_sukha jātīyam_jātīya me_mad bhūyāt_bhū iti_iti viparyaya--_viparyaya viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa rāgaḥ_rāga saḥ_tad eva_eva mahā--_mahat mohaḥ_moha duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhane_sādhana vidyamāne_vid api_api kim_ka api_api duḥkham_duḥkha me_mad mā_mā bhūt_bhū iti_iti viparyaya--_viparyaya viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa dveṣaḥ_dveṣa sa_tad tāmisraḥ_tāmisra āyuḥ--_āyus abhāve_abhāva api_api etaiḥ_etad śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya ādibhiḥ_ādi anityaiḥ_anitya api_api viyogaḥ_viyoga me_mad mā_mā bhūt_bhū iti_iti āvid--_āvid vat_vat aṅganā--_aṅganā bālam_bāla svābhāvikaḥ_svābhāvika sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin sādhāraṇaḥ_sādhāraṇa maraṇa--_maraṇa trāsa--_trāsa rūpaḥ_rūpa viparyaya--_viparyaya viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa saḥ_tad andha--_andha tāmisraḥ_tāmisra tat_tad uktam_vac purāṇe_purāṇa
tamaḥ_tamas mohaḥ_moha mahā--_mahat mohaḥ_moha tāmisraḥ_tāmisra hi_hi andha--_andha saṃjñitaḥ_saṃjñita avidyā_avidyā pañca--_pañcan parvā_parvan eṣā_etad prādurbhūtā_prādurbhū mahātmanaḥ_mahātman

ete_etad ca_ca kleśāḥ_kleśa catuḥ_catur avasthāḥ_avasthā bhavanti_bhū tatra_tatra asataḥ_asat anutpatteḥ_anutpatti anabhivyakta--_anabhivyakta rūpeṇa_rūpa avasthānam_avasthāna suptāvasthā_suptāvasthā abhivyaktasya_abhivyañj api_api saha_saha kārya--_kārya lābhāt_lābha kārya--_kārya ajanaka--_ajanaka tvam_tva tanu--_tanu avasthā_avasthā abhivyaktasya_abhivyañj janita--_janay kāryasya_kārya api_api kenacid_kaścit balavatā_balavat abhibhavaḥ_abhibhava viccheda--_viccheda avasthā_avasthā abhivyaktasya_abhivyañj prāpta--_prāp sahakāri--_sahakārin sampatteḥ_sampatti apratibandhena_apratibandha sva--_sva kārya--_kārya kara--_kara tvam_tva udāra--_udāra avasthā_avasthā etādṛś_etādṛś avasthā--_avasthā catuṣṭaya--_catuṣṭaya viśiṣṭānām_viśiṣ asmitā--_asmitā ādīnām_ādi caturṇām_catur viparyaya--_viparyaya rūpāṇām_rūpa kleśānām_kleśa avidyā_avidyā eva_eva sāmānya--_sāmānya rūpā_rūpa kṣetram_kṣetra prasava--_prasava bhūmiḥ_bhūmi sarveṣām_sarva viparyaya--_viparyaya rūpa--_rūpa tvasya_tva darśita--_darśay tvāt_tva tena_tena avidyā--_avidyā nivṛttyā_nivṛtti eva_eva kleśānām_kleśa nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha te_tad ca_ca kleśāḥ_kleśa prasuptāḥ_prasvap yathā_yathā prakṛti--_prakṛti līnānām_lī tanavaḥ_tanu pratipakṣa--_pratipakṣa bhāvanayā_bhāvanā tanūkṛtāḥ_tanūkṛta yathā_yathā yoginām_yogin te_tad ubhaye_ubhaya api_api sūkṣmāḥ_sūkṣma pratiprasavena_pratiprasava manaḥ--_manas nirodhena_nirodha eva_eva nirbīja--_nirbīja samādhinā_samādhi heyāḥ_hā ye_yad tu_tu sūkṣma--_sūkṣma vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti tad--_tad kārya--_kārya bhūtāḥ_bhū sthūlāḥ_sthūla vicchinnāḥ_vicchid udāhārāḥ_udāhāra ca_ca vicchidya_vicchid vicchidya_vicchid tena_tad tena_tad ātmanā_ātman punar_punar prādurbhavanti_prādurbhū iti_iti vicchinnāḥ_vicchid yathā_yathā rāga--_rāga kāle_kāla krodhaḥ_krodha vidyamānaḥ_vid api_api na_na prādurbhūtaḥ_prādurbhū iti_iti vicchinnaḥ_vicchid ucyate_vac evam_evam ekasyām_eka striyām_strī caitraḥ_caitra raktaḥ_rañj iti_iti na_na anyāsu_anya viraktaḥ_virañj kintu_kiṃtu ekasyām_eka rāgaḥ_rāga labdha--_labh vṛttiḥ_vṛtti anyāsu_anya ca_ca bhaviṣyat--_bhū vṛttiḥ_vṛtti iti_iti sa_tad tadā_tadā vicchinnaḥ_vicchid ucyate_vac ye_yad yadā_yadā viṣayeṣu_viṣaya labdha--_labh vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti te_tad tadā_tadā ucyante_vac te_tad ubhaye_ubhaya api_api ati_ati sthūla--_sthūla tvāt_tva śuddha--_śuddha sattva--_sattva bhavena_bhava bhagavat--_bhagavant dhyānena_dhyāna heyāḥ_hā na_na manaḥ--_manas niodham_niodha apekṣante_apekṣ nirodha--_nirodha heyāḥ_hā tu_tu sūkṣmāḥ_sūkṣma eva_eva tathā_tathā ca_ca pariṇāma--_pariṇāma tāpa--_tāpa saṃskāra--_saṃskāra duḥkheṣu_duḥkha prasupta--_prasvap tanu--_tanu vicchinna--_vicchid rūpeṇa_rūpa sarve_sarva kleśāḥ_kleśa sarvadā_sarvadā santi_as udāra--_udāra tā_tā tu_tu kadācid_kadācid kasyacid_kaścit iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa ete_etad ca_ca bādhanā--_bādhanā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa duḥkham_duḥkha upajanayantaḥ_upajanay kleśa--_kleśa śabda--_śabda vācyāḥ_vac bhavanti_bhū yatas_yatas karma--_karman āśayaḥ_āśaya dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma ākhyaḥ_ākhyā kleśa--_kleśa mūlakaḥ_mūlaka eva_eva sati_as ca_ca mūla--_mūla bhūte_bhū kleśe_kleśa tasya_tad karma--_karman āśayasya_āśaya vipākaḥ_vipāka phalam_phala janma_janman āyuḥ_āyus bhogaḥ_bhoga ca_ca iti_iti sa_tad ca_ca karma--_karman āśayaḥ_āśaya iha_iha paratra_paratra ca_ca sva--_sva vipāka--_vipāka ārambhaka--_ārambhaka tvena_tva dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa janma--_janman vedanīyaḥ_vid evam_evam kleśa--_kleśa santatiḥ_saṃtati ghaṭī--_ghaṭī yantra--_yantra vat_vat aniśam_aniśam āvartate_āvṛt atas_atas samīcīnam_samīcīna uktam_vac ye_yad hi_hi saṃsparśa--_saṃsparśa jāḥ_ja bhogāḥ_bhoga duḥkha--_duḥkha yonayaḥ_yoni eva_eva te_tad ādi--_ādi antavantaḥ_antavat iti_iti duḥkha--_duḥkha yoni--_yoni tvam_tva pariṇāma--_pariṇāma ādibhiḥ_ādi guṇa--_guṇa vṛtti--_vṛtti virodhāt_virodha ca_ca ādi--_ādi antavat--_antavat tvam_tva guṇa--_guṇa vṛttasya_vṛtta cala--_cala tvāt_tva iti_iti yoga--_yoga mate_mata vyākhyā_vyākhyā
