aupaniṣadānām_aupaniṣada tu_tu anādi_anādi bhāva--_bhāva rūpam_rūpa ajñānam_ajñāna avidyā_avidyā ahaṃkāra--_ahaṃkāra dharmī_dharmin adhyāsaḥ_adhyāsa asmitā_asmitā rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa abhiniveśāḥ_abhiniveśa tad--_tad vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa iti_iti avidyā--_avidyā mūla--_mūla tvāt_tva sarve_sarva api_api avidyā--_avidyā ātmaka--_ātmaka tvena_tva mithyā_mithyā bhūtāḥ_bhū rajju--_rajju bhujaṅga--_bhujaṃga adhyāsa--_adhyāsa vat_vat mithyātve_mithyātva api_api duḥkha--_duḥkha yonayaḥ_yoni svapna--_svapna ādi--_ādi vat_vat dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna sākṣātkāreṇa_sākṣātkāra nivṛtta--_nivṛt bhramaḥ_bhrama teṣu_tad na_na ramate_ram mṛga--_mṛga tṛṣṇikā--_tṛṣṇikā sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa jñānavān_jñānavat iva_iva tatra_tatra udaka--_udaka arthī_arthin na_na pravartate_pravṛt na_na saṃsāre_saṃsāra sukhasya_sukha gandha--_gandha mātram_mātra api_api asti_as iti_iti buddhvā_budh tatas_tatas sarvāṇi_sarva indriyāṇi_indriya nivartayet_nivartay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.l: āha_ah
div.p: āha_ah
BhG 5.23

lg.l: śaknoti_śak iha_iha eva_eva yaḥ_yad soḍhum_sah prāk_prāk śarīra--_śarīra vimokṣaṇāt_vimokṣaṇa
kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha udbhavam_udbhava vegam_vega sa_tad yuktaḥ_yuj sa_tad sukhī_sukhin naraḥ_nara

div.p: tasya_tad ca_ca kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha vegaḥ_vega atipratipakṣaḥ_atipratipakṣa atas_atas tad--_tad sahana--_sahana samarthaḥ_samartha eva_eva mokṣa--_mokṣa bhāj_bhāj iti_iti āha_ah śaknoti_śak iti_iti kāmāt_kāma ca_ca udbhavati_udbhū yaḥ_yad vegaḥ_vega manaḥ--_manas netra--_netra ādi--_ādi kṣobha--_kṣobha ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa tam_tad iha_iha eva_eva tad--_tad uttara--_uttara samaye_samaya eva_eva yaḥ_yad naraḥ_nara soḍhum_sah pratiroddhum_pratirudh śaknoti_śak tat_tad api_api na_na kṣaṇa--_kṣaṇa mātram_mātra kintu_kiṃtu śarīra--_śarīra vimokṣaṇāt_vimokṣaṇa prāk_prāk yāvat_yāvat deha--_deha pātam_pāta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yaḥ_yad evaṃbhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta saḥ_tad eva_eva yuktaḥ_yuj samāhitaḥ_samāhita sukhī_sukhin ca_ca bhavati_bhū na_na anyaḥ_anya yat_yat vā_vā maraṇāt_maraṇa ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam vilapantībhiḥ_vilap yuvatībhiḥ_yuvatī āliṅgyamānaḥ_āliṅgay api_api putra--_putra ādibhiḥ_ādi dahyamānaḥ_dah api_api yathā_yathā prāṇa--_prāṇa śūnyaḥ_śūnya kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha vegam_vega sahate_sah tathā_tathā maraṇāt_maraṇa prāk_prāk api_api jīvan_jīv eva_eva yaḥ_yad sahate_sah saḥ_tad eva_eva tat_tad uktam_vac vaśiṣṭhena_vaśiṣṭha

prāṇe_prāṇa gate_gam yathā_yathā dehaḥ_deha sukham_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha na_na vindati_vid tathā_tathā ced_ced prāṇa--_prāṇa yuktaḥ_yuj api_api sa_tad kaivalya--_kaivalya āśrayaḥ_āśraya bhavet_bhū iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha prāpti--_prāpti hetuḥ_hetu durnivāraḥ_durnivāra ayam_idam śreyaḥ--_śreyas mārga--_mārga pratipakṣaḥ_pratipakṣa kaṣṭatamaḥ_kaṣṭatama doṣaḥ_doṣa mahatā_mahat yatnena_yatna mumukṣuṇā_mumukṣu nivāraṇīyaḥ_nivāray iti_iti yatna--_yatna ādhikya--_ādhikya vidhānāya_vidhāna punar_punar āha_ah śaknoti_śak iti_iti ātmanaḥ_ātman anukūleṣu_anukūla sukha--_sukha hetuṣu_hetu dṛśyamāneṣu_dṛś smaryamāṇeṣu_smṛ vā_vā tad--_tad guṇa--_guṇa anusandhāna--_anusaṃdhāna abhyāsena_abhyāsa yaḥ_yad rati--_rati ātmakaḥ_ātmaka gardhaḥ_gardha abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā lobhaḥ_lobha sa_tad kāmaḥ_kāma strī--_strī puṃsayoḥ_puṃsa paraspara--_paraspara vyatikara--_vyatikara abhilāṣe_abhilāṣa tu_tu atyanta--_atyanta nirūḍhaḥ_niruh kāma--_kāma śabdaḥ_śabda etad--_etad abhilāṣeṇa_abhilāṣa kāmaḥ_kāma krodhaḥ_krodha tathā_tathā lobhaḥ_lobha iti_iti atra_atra dhana--_dhana tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā lobhaḥ_lobha strī--_strī vyatikara--_vyatikara tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā kāmaḥ_kāma iti_iti kāma--_kāma lobhau_lobha pṛthak_pṛthak uktau_vac iha_iha tu_tu tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā sāmānya--_sāmānya abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya kāma--_kāma śabdaḥ_śabda prayuktaḥ_prayuj iti_iti lobhaḥ_lobha pṛthak_pṛthak na_na uktaḥ_vac evam_evam ātmanaḥ_ātman pratikūleṣu_pratikūla duḥkha--_duḥkha hetuṣu_hetu dṛśyamāneṣu_dṛś śrūyamāṇeṣu_śru vā_vā tad--_tad doṣa--_doṣa anusandhāna--_anusaṃdhāna abhyāsena_abhyāsa yaḥ_yad prajvalana--_prajvalana ātmakaḥ_ātmaka dveṣaḥ_dveṣa manyuḥ_manyu sa_tad krodhaḥ_krodha ucyate_vac yathā_yathā hi_hi nadyāḥ_nadī vegaḥ_vega varṣāsu_varṣā ati_ati prabala--_prabala tayā_tā loka--_loka veda--_veda virodha--_virodha pratisandhānena_pratisaṃdhāna an_an icchantam_iṣ api_api garte_garta pātayitvā_pātay majjayati_majjay ca_ca adhas_adhas nayati_nī ca_ca tathā_tathā kāma--_kāma krodhayoḥ_krodha vegaḥ_vega viṣaya--_viṣaya abhidhyāna--_abhidhyāna abhyāsena_abhyāsa loka--_loka veda--_veda virodha--_virodha pratisandhānena_pratisaṃdhāna an_an icchantam_iṣ api_api viṣaya--_viṣaya garte_garta pātayitvā_pātay saṃsāra--_saṃsāra samudre_samudra majjayati_majjay ca_ca adhas_adhas mahā--_mahat narakān_naraka nayati_nī ca_ca iti_iti vega--_vega pada--_pada prayogeṇa_prayoga sūcitam_sūcay etat_etad ca_ca atha_atha kena_ka prayuktaḥ_prayuj ayam_idam iti_iti atra_atra nivṛttam_nivṛt

tam_tad etādṛśam_etādṛśa kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha udbhavam_udbhava vegam_vega antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa prakṣobha--_prakṣobha rūpam_rūpa stambha--_stambha sveda--_sveda ādi--_ādi aneka--_aneka bāhya--_bāhya vikāra--_vikāra liṅgam_liṅga ā_ā śarīra--_śarīra vimokṣaṇāt_vimokṣaṇa śarīra--_śarīra vimokṣaṇa--_vimokṣaṇa paryantam_paryanta aneka--_aneka nimitta--_nimitta vaśāt_vaśa antar_antar utpanna--_utpad doṣa--_doṣa darśana--_darśana abhyāsa--_abhyāsa jena_ja vaśīkāra--_vaśīkāra saṃjñaka--_saṃjñaka vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya soḍhum_sah tad--_tad anurūpa--_anurūpa kārya--_kārya asampādanena_asampādana anarthakam_anarthaka kartum_kṛ śaknoti_śak samarthaḥ_samartha bhavati_bhū saḥ_tad eva_eva yuktaḥ_yuj yogī_yogin saḥ_tad eva_eva sukhī_sukhin saḥ_tad eva_eva tad--_tad itaraḥ_itara tu_tu āhāra--_āhāra nidrā--_nidrā bhaya--_bhaya maithuna--_maithuna ādi--_ādi paśu--_paśu dharma--_dharma mātra--_mātra rata--_ram tvena_tva manuṣya--_manuṣya ākāraḥ_ākāra paśuḥ_paśu eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

ā_ā śarīra--_śarīra vimokṣaṇāt_vimokṣaṇa iti_iti atra_atra anyat_anya vyākhyānam_vyākhyāna yathā_yathā maraṇāt_maraṇa ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam vilapantībhiḥ_vilap yuvatībhiḥ_yuvatī āliṅgyamānaḥ_āliṅgay api_api putra--_putra ādibhiḥ_ādi dahyamānaḥ_dah api_api prāṇa--_prāṇa śūnya--_śūnya tvāt_tva kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha vegam_vega sahate_sah tathā_tathā sahate_sah sa_tad yuktaḥ_yuj iti_iti ādi_ādi atra_atra yadi_yadi maraṇa--_maraṇa vat_vat jīvane_jīvana api_api kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha anutpatti--_anutpatti mātram_mātra brūyāt_brū tadā_tadā etat_etad yujyate_yuj yathā_yathā uktam_vac vaśiṣṭhena_vaśiṣṭha

prāṇe_prāṇa gate_gam yathā_yathā dehaḥ_deha sukham_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha na_na vindati_vid tathā_tathā ced_ced prāṇa--_prāṇa yuktaḥ_yuj api_api sa_tad kaivalya--_kaivalya āśrame_āśrama vaset_vas iti_iti
div.l: iha_iha tu_tu upannayoḥ_upadhā kāma--_kāma krodhayoḥ_krodha vega--_vega sahane_sahana prastute_prastu tayoḥ_tad anutpatti--_anutpatti mātram_mātra na_na dārṣṭānte_dārṣṭānta iti_iti kim_ka ati_ati nirbandhena_nirbandha
āha_ah
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva śaknoti_śak iha_iha eva_eva yaḥ_yad soḍhum_sah prāk_prāk śarīra--_śarīra vimokṣaṇāt_vimokṣaṇa kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha udbhavam_udbhava vegam_vega sa_tad yuktaḥ_yuj sa_tad sukhī_sukhin naraḥ_nara
BhG 5.24

lg.l: yaḥ_yad antar_antar sukhaḥ_sukha antara--_antara ārāmaḥ_ārāma tathā_tathā antar_antar jyotiḥ_jyotis eva_eva yaḥ_yad
sa_tad yogī_yogin brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa brahma--_brahman bhūtaḥ_bhū adhigacchati_adhigam

div.p: prāpnoti_prāp api_api tu_tu yaḥ_yad antar_antar sukhaḥ_sukha iti_iti antarātmani_antarātman eva_eva sukham_sukha yasya_yad na_na viṣayeṣu_viṣaya antar_antar eva_eva ārāmaḥ_ārāma ākrīḍā_ākrīḍā yasya_yad na_na bahis_bahis antar_antar eva_eva jyotiḥ_jyotis dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi yasya_yad na_na gīta--_gīta nṛtya--_nṛtya ādiṣu_ādi saḥ_tad evam_evam brahmaṇi_brahman bhūtaḥ_bhū sthitaḥ_sthā san_as brahmaṇi_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa layam_laya adhigacchati_adhigam prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha vega--_vega sahana--_sahana mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva mucyante_muc iti_iti na_na kintu_kiṃtu yaḥ_yad antar_antar iti_iti antar_antar bāhya--_bāhya viṣaya--_viṣaya nirapekṣam_nirapekṣa eva_eva svarūpa--_svarūpa bhūtam_bhū sukham_sukha yasya_yad saḥ_tad antar_antar sukhaḥ_sukha bāhya--_bāhya viṣaya--_viṣaya janita--_janay sukha--_sukha śūnyaḥ_śūnya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kutas_kutas bāhya--_bāhya sukha--_sukha abhāvaḥ_abhāva tatra_tatra āha_ah antar_antar ātmani_ātman eva_eva na_na tu_tu strī--_strī ādi--_ādi viṣaye_viṣaya bāhya--_bāhya sukha--_sukha sādhanaḥ_sādhana ārāmaḥ_ārāma āramaṇam_āramaṇa krīḍā_krīḍā yasya_yad saḥ_tad antar_antar ārāmaḥ_ārāma tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva parigraha--_parigraha tvena_tva bāhya--_bāhya sukha--_sukha

nanu_nanu tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva parigrahasya_parigraha api_api yateḥ_yati yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā upanataiḥ_upanam kokila--_kokila ādi--_ādi madhura--_madhura śabda--_śabda śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manda--_manda pavana--_pavana sparśana--_sparśana candra--_candra udaya--_udaya mayūra--_mayūra nṛtya--_nṛtya ādi--_ādi darśana--_darśana ati_ati madhura--_madhura śītala--_śītala gaṅgā--_gaṅgā udaka--_udaka pāna--_pāna grāmyaiḥ_grāmya sukha--_sukha utpatti--_utpatti sambhavāt_sambhava katham_katham bāhya--_bāhya sukha--_sukha tad--_tad sādhana--_sādhana śūnyatvam_śūnyatva iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah tathā_tathā antar_antar jyotiḥ_jyotis eva_eva yaḥ_yad yathā_yathā antar_antar eva_eva sukham_sukha na_na bāhyaiḥ_bāhya viṣayaiḥ_viṣaya tathā_tathā antar_antar eva_eva ātmani_ātman jyotiḥ_jyotis vijñānam_vijñāna na_na bāhyaiḥ_bāhya indriyaiḥ_indriya yasya_yad saḥ_tad antar_antar jyotiḥ_jyotis śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi janya--_jan śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya vijñāna--_vijñāna rahitaḥ_rahita eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa traye_traya api_api sambadhyate_sambandh

yaḥ_yad evam_evam yathā_yathā ukta--_vac viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa sampannaḥ_sampad sa_tad yogī_yogin samāhitaḥ_samāhita brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa brahma_brahman paramānanda--_paramānanda rūpam_rūpa kalpita--_kalpay dvaita--_dvaita upaśama--_upaśama rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa tat_tad eva_eva kalpita--_kalpay bhāvasya_bhāva adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna ātmaka--_ātmaka avidyā--_avidyā āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa nivṛttyā_nivṛtti adhigacchati_adhigam nitya--_nitya prāptam_prāp eva_eva prāpnoti_prāp yatas_yatas sarvadā_sarvadā eva_eva brahma--_brahman bhūtaḥ_bhū na_na anyaḥ_anya brahma_brahman eva_eva san_as brahma_brahman api_api eti_i iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti avasthiteḥ_avasthiti iti_iti kāśa--_kāśa kṛtsnaḥ_kṛtsna iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya ca_ca
āha_ah

baladeva_baladeva yat_yat prītyā_prīti tam_tad soḍhum_sah śaktaḥ_śak tat_tad āha_ah yaḥ_yad antar_antar iti_iti antarvartinā_antarvartin anubhūtena_anubhū ātmanā_ātman sukham_sukha yasya_yad saḥ_tad tena_tad eva_eva ārāmaḥ_ārāma krīḍā_krīḍā yasya_yad saḥ_tad tasmin_tad eva_eva jyotiḥ_jyotis dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi yasya_yad saḥ_tad īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa yogī_yogin niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmī_karmin brahma_brahman bhūtaḥ_bhū labdha--_labh śuddha--_śuddha jaiva--_jaiva svarūpaḥ_svarūpa brahma_brahman adhigacchati_adhigam paramātmānam_paramātman labhate_labh nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa mokṣa--_mokṣa rūpam_rūpa tena_tad eva_eva tad--_tad lābhāt_lābha
BhG 5.25

lg.l: labhante_labh brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi kṣīṇa--_kṣi kalmaṣāḥ_kalmaṣa
chinna--_chid dvaidhāḥ_dvaidha yata--_yam ātmānaḥ_ātman sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta hite_hita ratāḥ_ram

div.p: labhante_labh

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana mukti--_mukti hetoḥ_hetu jñānasya_jñāna sādhana--_sādhana antarāṇi_antara vivṛṇvan_vivṛ āha_ah labhante_labh iti_iti prathamam_prathamam yajña--_yajña ādibhiḥ_ādi kṣīṇa--_kṣi kalmaṣāḥ_kalmaṣa tatas_tatas antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhayā_śuddhi ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi sūkṣma--_sūkṣma vastu--_vastu vivecana--_vivecana samarthāḥ_samartha saṃnyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin tatas_tatas śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi paripākeṇa_paripāka chinna--_chid dvaidhāḥ_dvaidha nivṛtta--_nivṛt sarva--_sarva saṃśayāḥ_saṃśaya tatas_tatas nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana paripākeṇa_paripāka saṃyata--_saṃyam ātmānaḥ_ātman paramātmani_paramātman eva_eva ekāgra--_ekāgra cittāḥ_citta etādṛśāḥ_etādṛśa ca_ca dvaita--_dvaita ādarśi--_ādarśin tvena_tva sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta hite_hita ratāḥ_ram hiṃsā--_hiṃsā śūnyāḥ_śūnya brahma--_brahman vidaḥ_vid brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa labhante_labh
yasmin_yad sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta ātmā_ātman eva_eva abhūt_bhū vijānataḥ_vijñā tatra_tatra kaḥ_ka mohaḥ_moha kaḥ_ka śokaḥ_śoka eka--_eka tvam_tva anupaśyataḥ_anupaś iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti
div.l: bahu--_bahu vacanam_vacana tat_tad yaḥ_yad devānām_deva iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti ukta--_vac aniyama--_aniyama pradarśana--_pradarśana artham_artha
bhavanti_bhū āha_ah
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam sādhana--_sādhana siddhāḥ_sidh bahavaḥ_bahu bhavanti_bhū iti_iti āha_ah labhantaḥ_labh iti_iti ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi tattva--_tattva draṣṭāraḥ_draṣṭṛ chinna--_chid dvaidhāḥ_dvaidha vinaṣṭ--_vinaś saṃśayāḥ_saṃśaya sphuṭam_sphuṭa anyat_anya
BhG 5.26

lg.l: kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha viyuktānām_viyuj yatīnām_yati yata--_yam cetasām_cetas
abhitas_abhitas brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa vartate_vṛt vidita--_vid ātmanām_ātman

div.p: kāma--_kāma krodhābhyām_krodha viyuktānām_viyuj yatīnām_yati saṃnyāsinām_saṃnyāsin saṃyata--_saṃyam cittānām_citta jñāta--_jñā ātma--_ātman tattvānām_tattva abhitas_abhitas ubhayatas_ubhayatas jīvatām_jīv mṛtānām_mṛ ca_ca na_na dehānte_dehānta eva_eva teṣām_tad brahmaṇi_brahman layaḥ_laya api_api tu_tu jīvatām_jīv api_api vartate_vṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 26_26

āha_ah kāma--_kāma krodhayoḥ_krodha viyogaḥ_viyoga tad--_tad anutpattiḥ_anutpatti eva_eva tad--_tad yuktānām_yuj kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha viyuktānām_viyuj ataeva_ataeva yata--_yam cetasām_cetas saṃyata--_saṃyam cittānām_citta yatīnām_yati yatna--_yatna śīlānām_śīla saṃnyāsinām_saṃnyāsin vidita--_vid ātmanām_ātman sākṣāt_sākṣāt kṛta--_kṛ paramātmanām_paramātman abhitas_abhitas ubhayatas_ubhayatas jīvatām_jīv mṛtānām_mṛ ca_ca teṣām_tad brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa mokṣaḥ_mokṣa vartate_vṛt nitya--_nitya sādhya--_sādhya tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva 26_26

syāt_as āha_ah yata--_yam cetasām_cetas uparata--_uparam manasām_manas kṣīṇa--_kṣi liṅga--_liṅga śarīrāṇām_śarīra iti_iti yāvat_yāvat abhitas_abhitas sarvatas_sarvatas bhāvena_bhāva eva_eva vartate_vṛt eva_eva iti_iti brahma--_brahman nirvāṇe_nirvāṇa tasya_tad na_na eva_eva ati_ati vilambam_vilamba iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 26_26

baladevaḥ_baladeva īdṛśān_īdṛśa paramātmā_paramātman api_api anuvartate_anuvṛt iti_iti āha_ah kāma--_kāma iti_iti yatīnām_yati prayatnavatām_prayatnavat tān_tad abhitas_abhitas brahma_brahman vartate_vṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad uktam_vac
darśana--_darśana dhyāna--_dhyāna saṃsparśaiḥ_saṃsparśa matsya--_matsya kūrma--_kūrma vihaṅgamāḥ_vihaṃgama svāni_sva apatyāni_apatya puṣṇanti_puṣ tathā_tathā aham_mad api_api padmaja_padmaja

lg.l: sparśān_sparśa kṛtvā_kṛ bahis_bahis bāhyān_bāhya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus ca_ca eva_eva antare_antara bhruvoḥ_bhrū
prāṇa--_prāṇa apānau_apāna samau_sama kṛtvā_kṛ nāsā--_nāsā abhyantara--_abhyantara cāriṇau_cārin
yata--_yam indriya--_indriya manaḥ--_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi muniḥ_muni mokṣa--_mokṣa parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa
vigata--_vigam icchā--_icchā bhaya--_bhaya krodhaḥ_krodha yaḥ_yad sadā_sadā muktaḥ_muc eva_eva saḥ_tad

div.p:
avāpnoti_avāp tam_tad eva_eva yogam_yoga saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa āha_ah sparśān_sparśa iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi bāhyāḥ_bāhya eva_eva sparśāḥ_sparśa rūpa--_rūpa rasa--_rasa ādayaḥ_ādi viṣayāḥ_viṣaya cintitāḥ_cintay santaḥ_as antar_antar praviśanti_praviś tān_tad tad--_tad cintā--_cintā tyāgena_tyāga bahis_bahis eva_eva kṛtvā_kṛ cakṣuḥ_cakṣus bhruvoḥ_bhrū antare_antara bhrū--_bhrū madhye_madhya eva_eva kṛtvā_kṛ atyantam_atyantam netrayoḥ_netra nimīlane_nimīlana hi_hi nidrayā_nidrā manaḥ_manas līyate_lī unmīlane_unmīlana ca_ca bahis_bahis prasarati_prasṛ tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya doṣa--_doṣa parihāra--_parihāra artham_artha ardha--_ardha nimīlanena_nimīlana bhrū--_bhrū madhye_madhya dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi nidhāya_nidhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ucchvāsa--_ucchvāsa niḥśvāsa--_niḥśvāsa rūpeṇa_rūpa nāsikayoḥ_nāsikā abhyantare_abhyantara carantau_car prāṇa--_prāṇa apānau_apāna ūrdhva--_ūrdhva adhas_adhas gati--_gati rodhena_rodha samau_sama kṛtvā_kṛ kumbhakam_kumbhaka kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā prāṇaḥ_prāṇa ayam_idam yathā_yathā na_na
niryāti_niryā yathā_yathā ca_ca apānaḥ_apāna antar_antar na_na praviśati_praviś kintu_kiṃtu nāsā--_nāsā madhye_madhya eva_eva dvau_dvi api_api yathā_yathā carataḥ_car tathā_tathā mandābhyām_manda ucchvāsa--_ucchvāsa niḥśvāsābhyām_niḥśvāsa samau_sama kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti

yata--_yam iti_iti anena_idam upāyena_upāya yatāḥ_yam saṃyatāḥ_saṃyam indriya--_indriya manaḥ--_manas buddhayaḥ_buddhi yasya_yad mokṣaḥ_mokṣa eva_eva param_para ayanam_ayana prāpyam_prāp yasya_yad ataeva_ataeva vigatāḥ_vigam icchā--_icchā bhaya--_bhaya krodhāḥ_krodha yasya_yad evaṃbhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta yaḥ_yad muniḥ_muni sa_tad sadā_sadā jīvan_jīv

udeti_udi adhunā_adhunā sa_tad yogī_yogin brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa iti_iti atra_atra sūcitam_sūcay dhyāna--_dhyāna yogam_yoga samyak_samyak darśana_darśana sya--_sya antaraṅga--_antaraṅga sādhanam_sādhana vistareṇa_vistara vaktum_vac sūtra--_sūtra sthānīyān_sthānīya trīn_tri ślokān_śloka āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavant eteṣām_etad eva_eva vṛtti--_vṛtti sthānīyaḥ_sthānīya kṛtsnaḥ_kṛtsna ṣaṣṭhaḥ_ṣaṣṭha adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya bhaviṣyati_bhū tatra_tatra api_api dvābhyām_dvi saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa yogaḥ_yoga ucyate_vac tṛtīyena_tṛtīya tu_tu tat_tad phalam_phala paramātma--_paramātman jñānam_jñāna iti_iti vivekaḥ_viveka

sparśān_sparśa śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi bāhyān_bāhya bahis_bahis bhavān_bhū api_api śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi dvārā_dvār tad--_tad tad--_tad ākāra--_ākāra antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa vṛttibhiḥ_vṛtti antar_antar praviṣṭān_praviś punar_punar bahis_bahis eva_eva kṛtvā_kṛ para--_para vairāgya--_vairāgya vaśena_vaśa tad--_tad tad--_tad ākārām_ākāra vṛttim_vṛtti an_an utpādya_utpāday yadi_yadi ete_etad āntarāḥ_āntara bhaveyuḥ_bhū tadā_tadā upāya--_upāya sahasreṇa_sahasra api_api bahis_bahis na_na syuḥ_as svabhāva--_svabhāva bhaṅga--_bhaṅga prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga bāhyānām_bāhya tu_tu rāga--_rāga vaśāt_vaśa antar_antar praviṣṭānām_praviś vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya bahis_bahis gamanam_gamana sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti vaditum_vad bāhyān_bāhya iti_iti viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa tat_tad anena_idam vairāgyam_vairāgya uktvā_vac abhyāsam_abhyāsa āha_ah cakṣuḥ_cakṣus ca_ca eva_eva antare_antara bhruvoḥ_bhrū kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti anuṣajyate_anuṣañj atyanta--_atyanta nimīlane_nimīlana hi_hi nidrā--_nidrā ākhyā_ākhyā laya--_laya ātmikā_ātmaka vṛttiḥ_vṛtti ekā_eka bhavet_bhū prasāreṇa_prasāra tu_tu pramāṇa--_pramāṇa viparyaya--_viparyaya viveka--_viveka vikalpa--_vikalpa smṛtayaḥ_smṛti catasraḥ_catur vikṣepa--_vikṣepa ātmikāḥ_ātmaka vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti bhaveyuḥ_bhū pañca_pañcan api_api tu_tu vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti niroddhavyāḥ_nirudh iti_iti ardha--_ardha nimīlanena_nimīlana bhrū--_bhrū madhye_madhya cakṣuṣaḥ_cakṣus nidhānam_nidhāna tathā_tathā prāṇa--_prāṇa apānau_apāna samau_sama tulyau_tulya ūrdhva--_ūrdhva adhas_adhas gati--_gati vicchedena_viccheda nāsā--_nāsā abhyantara--_abhyantara cāriṇau_cārin kumbhakeṇa_kumbhaka kṛtvā_kṛ anena_idam upāyena_upāya yatāḥ_yam saṃyatāḥ_saṃyam indriya--_indriya manaḥ--_manas buddhayaḥ_buddhi yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā mokṣa--_mokṣa parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa sarva--_sarva viṣaya--_viṣaya viraktaḥ_virañj muniḥ_muni manana--_manana śīlaḥ_śīla bhavet_bhū vigata--_vigam icchā--_icchā bhaya--_bhaya krodhaḥ_krodha iti_iti vīrta--_vīrta rāga--_rāga bhaya--_bhaya krodhaḥ_krodha iti_iti atra_atra vyākhyātam_vyākhyā etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa yaḥ_yad saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin sadā_sadā bhavati_bhū muktaḥ_muc eva_eva saḥ_tad na_na tu_tu tasya_tad mokṣaḥ_mokṣa kartavyaḥ_kṛ asti_as athavā_athavā yaḥ_yad etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa sa_tad sadā_sadā jīvan_jīv api_api muktaḥ_muc eva_eva

tatas_tatas jñānam_jñāna tvam_tvad padārtha--_padārtha viṣayakam_viṣayaka tad--_tad uttha--_uttha jñānena_jñāna guṇa--_guṇa atītena_atī brahma--_brahman anubhavaḥ_anubhava iti_iti uktam_vac idānīm_idānīm niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogena_yoga śuddha--_śuddha antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yogam_yoga brahma--_brahman anubhava--_anubhava sādhanam_sādhana jñāna--_jñāna yogāt_yoga api_api utkṛṣṭatvena_utkṛṣṭatva ṣaṣṭha--_ṣaṣṭha adhyāye_adhyāya vaktum_vac tad--_tad sūtra--_sūtra rūpam_rūpa śloka--_śloka trayam_traya āha_ah sparśān_sparśa bāhyāḥ_bāhya eva_eva śabda--_śabda sparśa--_sparśa rūpa--_rūpa rasa--_rasa gandhāḥ_gandha sparśa--_sparśa śabda--_śabda vācyāḥ_vac manasi_manas praviśya_praviś ye_yad vartante_vṛt tān_tad tasmāt_tad manasaḥ_manas sakāśāt_sakāśa bahiṣkṛtya_bahiṣkṛ viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya manaḥ_manas pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha cakṣuṣī_cakṣus ca_ca bhruvoḥ_bhrū antare_antara madhye_madhya kṭvā_kṛ netrayoḥ_netra sampūrṇa--_sampṛ nimīlane_nimīlana nidrayā_nidrā manaḥ_manas līyate_lī unmīlanena_unmīlana bahis_bahis prasarati_prasṛ tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya doṣa--_doṣa parihāra--_parihāra artham_artha ardha--_ardha nimīlanena_nimīlana bhrū--_bhrū madhye_madhya dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi nidhāya_nidhā ucchvāsa--_ucchvāsa niśvāsa--_niśvāsa rūpeṇa_rūpa nāsikayoḥ_nāsikā abhyantare_abhyantara carantau_car prāṇa--_prāṇa apānau_apāna ūrdhva--_ūrdhva adhas_adhas gati--_gati nirodhena_nirodha samau_sama kṛtvā_kṛ yatāḥ_yam vaśīkṛtāḥ_vaśīkṛ indriya--_indriya ādayaḥ_ādi yena_yad saḥ_tad

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha karmaṇā_karman niṣkāmeṇa_niṣkāma viśuddha--_viśudh manāḥ_manas samudita--_samudi ātma--_ātman jñānaḥ_jñāna tad--_tad darśanāya_darśana samādhim_samādhi kuryāt_kṛ iti_iti sāṅgam_sāṅga yogam_yoga sūcayan_sūcay āha_ah sparśān_sparśa iti_iti sparśā_sparśa śabda--_śabda ādayaḥ_ādi viṣayāḥ_viṣaya te_tad bāhyāḥ_bāhya eva_eva smṛtāḥ_smṛ santaḥ_as manasi_manas praviśanti_praviś tān_tad tad--_tad smṛti--_smṛti parityāgena_parityāga bahiṣkṛtya_bahiṣkṛ viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya manaḥ_manas pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhruvoḥ_bhrū antare_antara madhye_madhya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus ca_ca kṭvā_kṭvā netrayoḥ_netra saṃnimīlane_saṃnimīlana nidrayā_nidrā manasaḥ_manas layaḥ_laya pronmīlane_pronmīlana ca_ca bahis_bahis tasya_tad prasāraḥ_prasāra syāt_as tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya vinivṛttaye_vinivṛtti ardha--_ardha nimīlanena_nimīlana bhrū--_bhrū madhye_madhya dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi nidhāya_nidhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā nāsā--_nāsā abhyantara--_abhyantara cāriṇau_cārin prāṇa--_prāṇa apānau_apāna ūrdhva--_ūrdhva adhas_adhas gati--_gati nirodhena_nirodha samau_sama tulyau_tulya kṛtvā_kṛ kumbhayitvā_kumbhay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etena_etad upāyena_upāya yatāḥ_yam ātma--_ātman avalokanāya_avalokana sthāpitāḥ_sthāpay indriya--_indriya ādayaḥ_ādi yena_yad saḥ_tad muniḥ_muni ātma--_ātman manana--_manana śīlaḥ_śīla a_a taḥ_t vigata--_vigam icchā--_icchā ādiḥ_ādi īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa yaḥ_yad sarvadā_sarvadā phala--_phala kāla--_kāla vat_vat sādhana--_sādhana kāle_kāla api_api muktaḥ_muc eva_eva
BhG 5.29

lg.l: bhoktāram_bhoktṛ yajña--_yajña tapasām_tapas sarva--_sarva loka--_loka mahā--_mahat īśvaram_īśvara
suhṛdam_suhṛd sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta jñātvā_jñā mām_mad śāntim_śānti ṛcchati_ṛch

div.p: syāt_as āha_ah yajñānām_yajña tapasām_tapas ca_ca eva_eva mama_mad bhaktaiḥ_bhakta samarpitānām_samarpay yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā bhoktāram_bhoktṛ pālakam_pālaka iti_iti vā_vā sarveṣām_sarva lokānām_loka mahāntam_mahat īśvaram_īśvara sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta suhṛdam_suhṛd nirapekṣa--_nirapekṣa upakāriṇam_upakārin antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin mām_mad jñātvā_jñā mad--_mad prasādena_prasāda śāntim_śānti mokṣam_mokṣa ṛcchati_ṛch prāpnoti_prāp 29_29

lg.l: vikalpa--_vikalpa śaṅkā--_śaṅkā apohena_apoha yena_yad evam_evam sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya yogayoḥ_yoga
samuccayaḥ_samuccaya krameṇa_krameṇa uktaḥ_vac sarvajñam_sarvajña naumi_nū tam_tad harim_hari

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma pañcamaḥ_pañcama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj kim_ka jñātvā_jñā mucyate_muc iti_iti tat_tad āha_ah bhoktāram_bhoktṛ iti_iti sarveṣām_sarva yajñānām_yajña tapasām_tapas ca_ca kartṛ--_kartṛ rūpeṇa_rūpa devatā--_devatā rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca bhoktāram_bhoktṛ bhoga--_bhoga kartāram_kartṛ pālakam_pālaka iti_iti vā_vā bhuja--_bhuja pālana--_pālana abhyavahārayoḥ_abhyavahāra dhātuḥ_dhātu sarveṣām_sarva lokānām_loka mahāntam_mahat īśvaram_īśvara hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ādīnām_ādi api_api niyantāram_niyantṛ sarveṣām_sarva prāṇinām_prāṇin suhṛdam_suhṛd pratyupakāra--_pratyupakāra nirapekṣa--_nirapekṣa tayā_tā upakāriṇam_upakārin sarvāntgaryāmiṇam_sarvāntgaryāmin sarva--_sarva bhāsakam_bhāsaka paripūrṇa--_paripṛ sat--_sat cit--_cit ānana--_ānana da--_da eka--_eka rasam_rasa paramārtha--_paramārtha satyam_satya sarva--_sarva ātmānam_ātman nārāyaṇam_nārāyaṇa mām_mad jñātvā_jñā sarva--_sarva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra uparatim_uparati muktim_mukti ṛcchati_ṛch prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tvām_tvad paśyan_dṛś api_api katham_katham na_na aham_mad muktaḥ_muc iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk a_a nirākaraṇāya_nirākaraṇa viśeṣaṇāni_viśeṣaṇa ukta--_vac rūpeṇa_rūpa eva_eva mama_mad jñānam_jñāna mukti--_mukti kāraṇam_kāraṇa iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 29_29

lg.l: aneka--_aneka sādhana--_sādhana abhyāsa--_abhyāsa niṣpannam_niṣpad hariṇā_hari īritam_īray
sva--_sva svarūpa--_svarūpa parijñānam_parijñāna sarveṣām_sarva mukti--_mukti sādhanam_sādhana

div.p:
iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍha--_guh artha--_artha dīpikāyām_dīpikā sva--_sva svarūpa--_svarūpa parijñānam_parijñāna nāma_nāma
pañcamaḥ_pañcama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha evambhūtasya_evambhūta yoginaḥ_yogin api_api jñāninaḥ_jñānin iva_iva bhakti--_bhakti utthena_uttha paramātma--_paramātman jñānena_jñāna eva_eva mokṣaḥ_mokṣa iti_iti āha_ah bhoktāram_bhoktṛ iti_iti yajñānām_yajña karmi--_karmin kṛtānām_kṛ tapasām_tapas ca_ca jñāni--_jñānin kṛtānām_kṛ bhoktāram_bhoktṛ pālayitāram_pālayitṛ iti_iti karmiṇām_karmin jñāninām_jñānin ca_ca upāsyam_upās sarva--_sarva lokānām_loka maheśvaram_maheśvara mahā--_mahat niyantāram_niyantṛ antaryāminam_antaryāmin yoginām_yogin upāsyam_upās sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta suhṛdam_suhṛd kṛpayā_kṛpā sva--_sva bhakta--_bhakta dvārā_dvār sva--_sva bhakti--_bhakti upadeśena_upadeśa hita--_hita kāriṇam_kārin iti_iti bhaktānām_bhakta upāsyam_upās mām_mad jñātvā_jñā iti_iti sattva--_sattva guṇa--_guṇa maya--_maya jñānena_jñāna nirguṇasya_nirguṇa mama_mad anubhava--_anubhava asambhavāt_asaṃbhava bhaktyā_bhakti aham_mad ekayā_eka nirguṇayā_nirguṇa bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva yogī_yogin sva--_sva upāsyam_upās paramātmānam_paramātman mām_mad aparokṣa--_aparokṣa anubhava--_anubhava gocarīkṛtya_gocarīkṛ
śāntim_śānti mokṣam_mokṣa ṛcchati_ṛch prāpnoti_prāp

lg.l: niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman jñānī_jñānin yogī_yogin ca_ca atra_atra vimucyate_vimuc
jñātvā_jñā ātma--_ātman paramātmānau_paramātman iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha īritaḥ_īray
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha darśinyām_darśin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
gītāsu_gītā pañcamaḥ_pañcama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya saṃgataḥ_saṃgam saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam samādhi--_samādhi sthaḥ_stha kṛta--_kṛ sva--_sva ātma--_ātman avalokanaḥ_avalokana paramātmānam_paramātman upāsyam_upās ucyate_vac iti_iti āha_ah bhoktāram_bhoktṛ iti_iti yajñānām_yajña tapasām_tapas ca_ca bhoktāram_bhoktṛ pālakam_pālaka sarveṣām_sarva lokānām_loka vidhi--_vidhi rudra--_rudra ādīnām_ādi api_api maheśvaram_maheśvara tam_tad īśvarāṇām_īśvara paramam_parama maheśvaram_maheśvara iti_iti ādi_ādi śravaṇāt_śravaṇa sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta suhṛdam_suhṛd nirapekṣa--_nirapekṣa upakārakam_upakāraka īdṛśam_īdṛśa mām_mad jñātvā_jñā sva--_sva ārādhya--_ārādhay tayā_tā anubhūya_anubhū śāntim_śānti saṃsāra--_saṃsāra nivṛttim_nivṛtti ṛcchati_ṛch labhate_labh sarveśvarasya_sarveśvara suhṛdaḥ_suhṛd ca_ca samārādhanam_samārādhana khalu_khalu sukha--_sukha āvaham_āvaha sukha--_sukha sādhanam_sādhana iti_iti 29_29

lg.l: niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman yoga--_yoga śiraskena_śiraska vimucyate_vimuc
sa--_tad niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā jñāna--_jñāna garbheṇa_garbha iti_iti eṣa_etad pañcama--_pañcama nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya pañcamaḥ_pañcama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
pañcamaḥ_pañcama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa yogaḥ_yoga

BhG 6.1

lg.l: anāśritaḥ_anāśrita karma--_karman phalam_phala kāryam_kṛ karma_karman karoti_kṛ yaḥ_yad
sa_tad saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin ca_ca yogī_yogin ca_ca na_na niragniḥ_niragni na_na ca_ca akriyaḥ_akriya
citte_citta śuddhe_śudh api_api na_na dhyānam_dhyāna vinā_vinā saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa mātrataḥ_mātra
muktiḥ_mukti syāt_as iti_iti ṣaṣṭhe_ṣaṣṭha asmin_idam dhyāna--_dhyāna yogaḥ_yoga vitanvate_vitan

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya saṃkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa uktam_vac yogam_yoga prapañcayitum_prapañcay ṣaṣṭha--_ṣaṣṭha adhyāya--_adhyāya ārambhaḥ_ārambha tatra_tatra tāvat_tāvat sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman manasā_manas saṃnyasya_saṃnyas iti_iti ārabhya_ārabh saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa pūrvikāyāḥ_pūrvaka jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhāyāḥ_niṣṭhā tātparyena_tātparya abhidhānāt_abhidhāna duḥkha--_duḥkha rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva ca_ca karmaṇaḥ_karman sahasā_sahas saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa atiprasaṅgam_atiprasaṅga prāptam_prāp vārayitum_vāray śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvena_tva karma--_karman yogam_yoga stauti_stu anāśritaḥ_anāśrita iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi karma--_karman phalam_phala anāśritaḥ_anāśrita an_an apekṣamāṇaḥ_apekṣ san_as avaśya--_avaśya kārya--_kṛ tayā_tā vihitam_vidhā karma_karman yaḥ_yad karoti_kṛ saḥ_tad eva_eva saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin yogī_yogin ca_ca na_na tu_tu niragniḥ_niragni agni--_agni sādhya--_sādhay iṣṭa--_iṣ ākhya--_ākhya karma--_karman tyāgī_tyāgin na_na ca_ca akriyaḥ_akriya anagni--_anagni sādhya--_sādhay pūrta--_pūrta ākhya--_ākhya karma--_karman tyāgī_tyāgin

lg.l: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana
yoga--_yoga sūtram_sūtra tribhiḥ_tri ślokaiḥ_śloka pañcama--_pañcama ante_anta yat_yad īritam_īray
ṣaṣṭhaḥ_ṣaṣṭha tu_tu ārabhyate_ārabh adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya tad--_tad vyākhyānāya_vyākhyāna vistarāt_vistara

div.p: tatra_tatra sarva--_sarva karma--_karman tyāgena_tyāga yogam_yoga vidhāsyan_vidhā tyājya--_tyaj tvena_tva hīna--_hā tvam_tva āśaṅkya_āśaṅk karma--_karman yogam_yoga stauti_stu anāśritaḥ_anāśrita iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi karmaṇām_karman phalam_phala āśritaḥ_āśri an_an apekṣamāṇaḥ_apekṣ phala--_phala abhisaṃdhi--_abhisaṃdhi rahitaḥ_rahita san_as kāryam_kārya kartavyatayā_kartavyatā śāstreṇa_śāstra vihitam_vidhā nityam_nityam agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi_ādi karma_karman karoti_kṛ yaḥ_yad sa_tad karmī_karmin api_api san_as saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin ca_ca yogī_yogin ca_ca

sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa hi_hi thyāgaḥ_thyāga citta--_citta gata--_gam vikṣepa--_vikṣepa abhāvaḥ_abhāva ca_ca yogaḥ_yoga tau_tad ca_ca asya_idam vidyete_vid phala--_phala tyāgāt_tyāga phala--_phala tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā rūpa--_rūpa citta--_citta vikṣepa--_vikṣepa abhāvāt_abhāva ca_ca karma--_karman phala--_phala tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā tyāgaḥ_tyāga eva_eva atra_atra gauṇyā_gauṇa vṛttyā_vṛtti saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa yoga--_yoga śabdābhyām_śabda abhidhīyate_abhidhā sa_sa kāmān_kāma apekṣya_apekṣ prāśastya--_prāśastya kathanāya_kathana avaśyambhāvinau_avaśyambhāvin hi_hi niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman anuṣṭhātuḥ_anuṣṭhātṛ mukhyau_mukhya saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa yogau_yoga tasmāt_tasmāt ayam_idam yadi_yadi api_api na_na niragniḥ_niragni agni--_agni sādhya--_sādhay śrauta--_śrauta karma--_karman tyāgī_tyāgin na_na bhavati_bhū na_na ca_ca akriyaḥ_akriya agni--_agni nirapekṣa--_nirapekṣa smārta--_smārta kriyā--_kriyā tyāgī_tyāgin ca_ca na_na bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā api_api saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin yogī_yogin ca_ca iti_iti mantavyaḥ_man

athavā_athavā na_na niragniḥ_niragni na_na ca_ca akriyaḥ_akriya saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin yogī_yogin ca_ca iti_iti mantavyaḥ_man kintu_kiṃtu sa_sa agniḥ_agni sa_sa kriyaḥ_kriyā ca_ca niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman anuṣṭhāyī_anuṣṭhāyin saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin yogī_yogin ca_ca iti_iti mantavyaḥ_man iti_iti stūyate_stu a_a paśavaḥ_paśu vai_vai anye_anya go--_go aśvebhyaḥ_aśva paśavaḥ_paśu go--_go aśvān_aśva iti_iti atra_atra iva_iva praśaṃsā--_praśaṃsā lakṣaṇayā_lakṣaṇā nañ--_nañ anvaya--_anvaya upapattiḥ_upapatti atra_atra ca_ca akriyaḥ_akriya iti_iti anena_idam eva_eva sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsini_saṃnyāsin labdhe_labh niragniḥ_niragni iti_iti vyartham_vyartha syāt_as iti_iti agni--_agni śabdena_śabda sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman upalakṣya_upalakṣay niragniḥ_niragni iti_iti saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin kriyā--_kriyā śabdena_śabda citta--_citta vṛttīḥ_vṛtti upalakṣya_upalakṣay kathyate_kathay tena_tena na_na niragniḥ_niragni saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin mantavyaḥ_man na_na ca_ca akriyaḥ_akriya yogī_yogin mantavyaḥ_man iti_iti yathā_yathā saṅkhyam_saṃkhya ubhaya--_ubhaya vyatirekaḥ_vyatireka darśanīyaḥ_dṛś evam_evam sati_as nañ--_nañ dvayam_dvaya api_api upapannam_upapad
iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś

lg.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha
ṣaṣṭheṣu_ṣaṣṭha yoginaḥ_yogin yoga--_yoga prakāra--_prakāra vijita--_viji ātmanaḥ_ātman
manasaḥ_manas cañcalasya_cañcala api_api naiścalya--_naiścalya upāyaḥ_upāya ucyate_vac

div.p: aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yoga--_yoga abhyāse_abhyāsa pravṛttena_pravṛt api_api citta--_citta śodhakam_śodhaka niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma_karman na_na tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti āha_ah karma--_karman phalam_phala āśritaḥ_āśri an_an apekṣamāṇaḥ_apekṣ kāryam_kārya avaśya--_avaśya kartavya--_kṛ tvena_tva śāstra--_śāstra vihitam_vidhā karma_karman yaḥ_yad karoti_kṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya bhogeṣu_bhoga citta--_citta abhāvāt_abhāva yogī_yogin ca_ca ucyate_vac na_na ca_ca niragniḥ_niragni agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi--_ādi karma--_karman mātra--_mātra tyāgavān_tyāgavat eva_eva sannyāsī_saṃnyāsin ucyate_vac na_na ca_ca akriyaḥ_akriya na_na daihika--_daihika ceṣṭā--_ceṣṭā śūnyaḥ_śūnya ardha--_ardha nimīlita--_nimīlay netraḥ_netra eva_eva yogī_yogin ca_ca ucyate_vac

lg.l: baladevaḥ_baladeva
ṣaṣṭhe_ṣaṣṭha yoga--_yoga vidhiḥ_vidhi karma--_karman śuddhasya_śudh vijita--_viji ātmanaḥ_ātman
sthairya--_sthairya upāyaḥ_upāya ca_ca manasaḥ_manas asthirasya_asthira api_api iti_iti kīrtyate_kīrtay

div.p: proktam_pravac karma--_karman yogam_yoga aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yoga--_yoga śiraskam_śiraska upadekṣyan_upadiś ādau_ādau tau_tad tad--_tad upāya--_upāya tvāt_tva tam_tad karma--_karman yogam_yoga stauti_stu bhagavān_bhagavant anāśritaḥ_anāśrita iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi karma--_karman phalam_phala paśu--_paśu anna--_anna putra--_putra svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi kāmanā--_kāmanā āśritaḥ_āśri an_an icchan_iṣ kāryam_kārya avaśya--_avaśya kartavya--_kṛ tayā_tā vihitam_vidhā karma_karman yaḥ_yad karoti_kṛ sa_tad saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭha yogī_yogin ca_ca aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yoga--_yoga karma--_karman yogena_yoga eva_eva tayoḥ_tad siddhiḥ_siddhi iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na niragniḥ_niragni agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi--_ādi karma--_karman tyāgī_tyāgin yati--_yati veśaḥ_veśa sannyāsī_saṃnyāsin na_na ca_ca akriyaḥ_akriya śarīra--_śarīra karma--_karman tyāgī_tyāgin ardha--_ardha mudrita--_mudray netraḥ_netra yogī_yogin atra_atra yogam_yoga aṣṭāṅgam_aṣṭāṅga cikīrṣūṇām_cikīrṣu sahasā_sahas karma_karman na_na tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti matam_man
BhG 6.2

lg.l: yam_yad saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa iti_iti prāhuḥ_prāh yogam_yoga tam_tad viddhi_vid pāṇḍava_pāṇḍava
na_na hi_hi asaṃnyasta--_asaṃnyasta saṃkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa yogī_yogin bhavati_bhū kaścana_kaścana

div.p: pratipādayan_pratipāday āha_ah saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa iti_iti prāhuḥ_prāh prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvena_tva āhuḥ_ah nyāsaḥ_nyāsa eva_eva ati_ati arecayat_recay iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti kevalāt_kevala phala--_phala saṃnyasanāt_saṃnyasana hetoḥ_hetu yogam_yoga eva_eva tam_tad jānīhi_jñā kutas_kutas iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā iti_iti śabda--_śabda uktaḥ_vac hetuḥ_hetu yoge_yoga api_api asti_as iti_iti āha_ah na_na hi_hi iti_iti na_na saṃnyastaḥ_saṃnyas phala--_phala saṃkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa yena_yad sa_tad karma--_karman niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā vā_vā kaścid_kaścit api_api na_na hi_hi yogī_yogin bhavati_bhū atas_atas phala--_phala saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa tyāga--_tyāga sāmyāt_sāmya saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin ca_ca phala--_phala saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa tyāgāt_tyāga eva_eva citta--_citta vikṣepa--_vikṣepa abhāvāt_abhāva yogī_yogin ca_ca bhavati_bhū eva_eva saḥ_tad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana asaṃnyāse_asaṃnyāsa api_api saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa śabda--_śabda prayoge_prayoga nimitta--_nimitta bhūtam_bhū guṇa--_guṇa yogam_yoga darśayitum_darśay āha_ah yam_yad saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa iti_iti yam_yad sarva--_sarva karma--_karman tad--_tad phala--_phala parityāgam_parityāga saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa iti_iti prāhuḥ_prāh śrutayaḥ_śruti nyāsaḥ_nyāsa eva_eva ati_ati arecayat_recay brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa puatra--_puatra eṣaṇāyāḥ_eṣaṇā ca_ca vitta--_vitta eṣaṇāyāḥ_eṣaṇā ca_ca loka--_loka eṣaṇāyāḥ_eṣaṇā ca_ca vyutthāya_vyutthā atha_atha bhikṣā--_bhikṣā caryam_carya yogam_yoga phala--_phala tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimānayoḥ_abhimāna parityāgena_parityāga vihita--_vidhā karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna tam_tad saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa viddhi_vid he_he pāṇḍava_pāṇḍava a_a brahma--_brahman dattam_dā brahma--_brahman dattam_dā iti_iti āha_ah tam_tad vayam_mad manyāmahe_man brahma--_brahman datta--_dā sadṛśaḥ_sadṛśa ayam_idam iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya para--_para śabdaḥ_śabda paratra_paratra prayujyamānaḥ_prayuj sādṛśyam_sādṛśya bodhayati_bodhay gauṇyā_gauṇa vṛttyā_vṛtti tad--_tad bhāva--_bhāva āropeṇa_āropa vā_vā prakṛte_prakṛta tu_tu kim_ka sādṛśyam_sādṛśya iti_iti tat_tad āha_ah nahi_nahi iti_iti hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt asaṃnyasta--_asaṃnyasta saṃkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa atyakta--_atyakta phala--_phala saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa kaścana_kaścana kaścid_kaścit api_api yogī_yogin na_na bhavati_bhū api_api tu_tu sarvaḥ_sarva yogī_yogin tyakta--_tyaj phala--_phala saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti phala--_phala tyāga--_tyāga sāmyāt_sāmya tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā rūpa--_rūpa vitta--_vitta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodha--_nirodha sāmyāt_sāmya ca_ca gauṇyā_gauṇa vṛttyā_vṛtti karmī_karmin eva_eva saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin ca_ca yogī_yogin ca_ca bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā hi_hi yogaḥ_yoga citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhaḥ_nirodha pramāṇa--_pramāṇa viparyaya--_viparyaya vikalpa--_vikalpa nidrā--_nidrā smṛtayaḥ_smṛti iti_iti vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti pañcavidhāḥ_pañcavidha tatra_tatra pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa anumāna--_anumāna śāstra--_śāstra upamāna--_upamāna arthāpatti--_arthāpatti abhāva--_abhāva ākhyāni_ākhyā pramāṇāni_pramāṇa ṣaḍ_ṣaṣ iti_iti vaidikāḥ_vaidika pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa anumāna--_anumāna āgamāḥ_āgama pramāṇāni_pramāṇa trīṇi_tri iti_iti yogāḥ_yoga antarbhāva--_antarbhāva bahis_bahis bhāvābhyām_bhāva saṅkoca--_saṃkoca vikāsau_vikāsa draṣṭavyau_dṛś ataeva_ataeva tārkika--_tārkika ādīnām_ādi mata--_mata bhedāḥ_bheda viparyayaḥ_viparyaya mithyā_mithyā jñānam_jñāna tasya_tad pañca_pañcan bhedāḥ_bheda avidyā--_avidyā asmitā--_asmitā rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa te_tad eva_eva ca_ca kleśāḥ_kleśa śabda--_śabda jñāna--_jñāna anupātī_anupātin vastu--_vastu śūnyaḥ_śūnya vikalpaḥ_vikalpa pramā--_pramā bhrama--_bhrama vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa asat--_asat artha--_artha vyavahāraḥ_vyavahāra śaśa--_śaśa viṣāṇam_viṣāṇa asat--_asat puruṣasya_puruṣa catanyam_catanya iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi anubhūta--_anubhū viṣaya--_viṣaya asaṃpramoṣaḥ_asaṃpramoṣa smṛtiḥ_smṛti pūrva--_pūrva anubhava--_anubhava saṃskāra--_saṃskāra jam_ja jñānam_jñāna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti janya--_jan tvāt_tva ante_anta kathanam_kathana lajjā--_lajjā ādi--_ādi vṛttīnām_vṛtti api_api āñcasu_āñc eva_eva antarbhāvaḥ_antarbhāva draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś etādṛśām_etādṛś sarvāsām_sarva citta--_citta vṛttīnām_vṛtti norodhaḥ_norodha yogaḥ_yoga iti_iti ca_ca samādhiḥ_samādhi iti_iti ca_ca kathyate_kathay phala--_phala saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa tu_tu rāga--_rāga ākhyaḥ_ākhyā tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya viparyaya--_viparyaya bhedaḥ_bheda tad--_tad nirodha--_nirodha mātram_mātra api_api gauṇyā_gauṇa vṛttyā_vṛtti yogaḥ_yoga iti_iti saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa iti_iti ca_ca ucyate_vac iti_iti na_na virodhaḥ_virodha

vastutas_vastutas tathā_tathā viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya citta--_citta naiścalyam_naiścalya eva_eva yoga--_yoga śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha tasmāt_tasmāt saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa yoga--_yoga śabdayoḥ_śabda aikya--_aikya artham_artha eva_eva āgatam_āgam iti_iti āha_ah yam_yad iti_iti asaṃnyastaḥ_asaṃnyasta na_na saṃnyastaḥ_saṃnyas tyaktaḥ_tyaj saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa phala--_phala ākāṅkṣā_ākāṅkṣā viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga spṛhā_spṛhā yena_yad saḥ_tad

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vṛtti--_vṛtti virati--_virati rūpāyām_rūpa jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhāyām_niṣṭhā saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa śabdaḥ_śabda citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhe_nirodha yoga--_yoga śabdaḥ_śabda ca_ca paṭhyate_paṭh sa_tad ca_ca sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra ātmake_ātmaka karma--_karman yoge_yoga sa_tad saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin ca_ca yogī_yogin ca_ca iti_iti bruvatā_brū bhavatā_bhavat kayā_ka vṛttyā_vṛtti nīyate_nī iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah yam_yad iti_iti yam_yad karma--_karman yogam_yoga artha--_artha tātparya--_tātparya jñāḥ_jña saṃnyāsmam_saṃnyāsa prāhuḥ_prāh tam_tad eva_eva tam_tad yogam_yoga aṣṭāṅgam_aṣṭāṅga viddhi_vid he_he pāṇḍava_pāṇḍava

nanu_nanu siṃhaḥ_siṃha mānavakaḥ_mānavaka iti_iti ādau_ādi śaurya--_śaurya ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa sādṛśyena_sādṛśya tathā_tathā prayogaḥ_prayoga prakṛteḥ_prakṛti kim_ka sādṛśyam_sādṛśya iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na hi_hi iti_iti asaṃnyasta--_asaṃnyasta saṃkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa kaścana_kaścana kaścid_kaścit jñāna--_jñāna yogī_yogin aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yogī_yogin ca_ca na_na bhavati_bhū api_api tu_tu saṃnyasta--_saṃnyas saṃkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha saṃnyastaḥ_saṃnyas parityaktaḥ_parityaj saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa phala--_phala icchā_icchā ca_ca yena_yad saḥ_tad tathā_tathā phala--_phala tyāga--_tyāga sādṛśyāt_sādṛśya tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā rūpa--_rūpa citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodha--_nirodha sādṛśyāt_sādṛśya ca_ca karma--_karman yoginaḥ_yogin tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya tvena_tva prayogaḥ_prayoga gauṇa--_gauṇa vṛttyā_vṛtti iti_iti
BhG 6.3

lg.l: ārurukṣoḥ_ārurukṣu muneḥ_muni yogam_yoga karma_karman kāraṇam_kāraṇa ucyate_vac
yoga--_yoga ārūḍhasya_āruh tasya_tad eva_eva śamaḥ_śama kāraṇam_kāraṇa ucyate_vac

div.p: āha_ah jñāna--_jñāna yogam_yoga āroḍhum_āruh prātum_prā icchoḥ_iṣ puṃsaḥ_puṃs tad--_tad ārohe_āroha kāraṇam_kāraṇa karma_karman ucyate_vac citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi kara--_kara tvāt_tva jñāna--_jñāna yogam_yoga ārūḍhasya_āruh tu_tu tasya_tad eva_eva dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhasya_niṣṭha śamaḥ_śama samādhiḥ_samādhi citta--_citta vikṣepaka--_vikṣepaka karma--_karman uparamaḥ_uparama jñāna--_jñāna paripāke_paripāka kāraṇam_kāraṇa ucyate_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad kim_ka praśasta--_praśaṃs tvāt_tva karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva yāvajjīvam_yāvajjīvam anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah ārurukṣoḥ_ārurukṣu iti_iti yogam_yoga antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi rūpam_rūpa vairāgyam_vairāgya ārurukṣoḥ_ārurukṣu āroḍhum_āruh icchoḥ_icchu na_na tu_tu ārūḍhasya_āruh muneḥ_muni bhaviṣyataḥ_bhū karma--_karman phala--_phala tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā tyāginaḥ_tyāgin karma_karman śāstra--_śāstra vihitam_vidhā agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi_ādi nityam_nityam bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇa--_arpaṇa sādhanam_sādhana anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā ucyate_vac veda--_veda mukhena_mukha mayā_mad yoga--_yoga ārūḍhasya_āruh yogam_yoga antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi rūpam_rūpa vairāgyam_vairāgya prāptavataḥ_prāp tu_tu tasya_tad eva_eva pūrvam_pūrvam karmiṇaḥ_karmin api_api sataḥ_as śamaḥ_śama sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa eva_eva kāraṇam_kāraṇa anuṣṭheya--_anuṣṭhā tayā_tā jñāna--_jñāna paripāka--_paripāka sādhanam_sādhana

āha_ah muneḥ_muni yoga--_yoga abhyāsinaḥ_abhyāsin yogam_yoga niścala--_niścala dhyāna--_dhyāna yogam_yoga āroḍhum_āruh icchoḥ_icchu tad--_tad ārohe_āroha kāraṇam_kāraṇa karma_karman ca_ca ucyate_vac citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi kara--_kara tvāt_tva tatas_tatas tasya_tad yogam_yoga dhyāna--_dhyāna yogam_yoga ārūḍhasya_āruh dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā prāptaḥ_prāp śamaḥ_śama vikṣepaka--_vikṣepaka sarva--_sarva karma--_karman uparamaḥ_uparama kāraṇam_kāraṇa tat_tad evam_evam samyak_samyak citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi rahitaḥ_rahita yoga--_yoga ārurukṣuḥ_ārurukṣu

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu evam_evam aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yoginaḥ_yogin yāvat_yāvat jīvam_jīva karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna prāptam_prāp iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah ārurukṣoḥ_ārurukṣu iti_iti muneḥ_muni yoga--_yoga abhyāsinaḥ_abhyāsin yogam_yoga dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā ārurukṣoḥ_ārurukṣu tad--_tad ārohe_āroha karma_karman kāraṇam_kāraṇa hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhi--_viśuddhi kṛt--_kṛt tvāt_tva tasya_tad eva_eva yoga--_yoga ārūḍhasya_āruh dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhasya_niṣṭha tad--_tad dāḍhye_dāḍhya śamaḥ_śama vikṣepaka--_vikṣepaka karma--_karman uparatiḥ_uparati kāraṇam_kāraṇa
BhG 6.4

lg.l: yadā_yadā hi_hi na_na indriya--_indriya artheṣu_artha na_na karmasu_karman anuṣajjate_anuṣañj
sarva--_sarva saṃkalpa--_saṃkalpa saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh tadā_tadā ucyate_vac

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa ayam_idam yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh yasya_yad śamaḥ_śama kāraṇam_kāraṇa ucyate_vac iti_iti atra_atra āha_ah yadā_yadā iti_iti indriyārtheṣu_indriyārtha indriya--_indriya bhogyeṣu_bhuj śabda--_śabda ādiśu_ādiś tad--_tad sādhaneṣu_sādhana ca_ca karmasu_karman yadā_yadā na_na anuṣajjate_anuṣañj āsaktim_āsakti na_na karoti_kṛ tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu āsakti--_āsakti mūla--_mūla bhūtān_bhū sarvāḥ_sarva bhoga--_bhoga viṣayān_viṣaya karma--_karman viṣayān_viṣaya ca_ca saṅkalpān_saṃkalpa saṃnyasitum_saṃnyas tyaktum_tyaj śīlam_śīla yasya_yad saḥ_tad tadā_tadā yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh ucyate_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kadā_kadā yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh bhavati_bhū iti_iti ucyate_vac yadā_yadā iti_iti yadā_yadā yasmin_yad citta--_citta samādhāna--_samādhāna kāle_kāla indriyārtheṣu_indriyārtha śabda--_śabda ādiṣu_ādi karmasu_karman ca_ca nitya--_nitya naimittika--_naimittika kāmya--_kāmya laukika--_laukika pratiṣiddheṣu_pratiṣidh na_na anuṣajjate_anuṣañj teṣām_tad mithyātva--_mithyātva darśanena_darśana ātmanaḥ_ātman akartṛ--_akartṛ abhoktṛ--_abhoktṛ parama--_parama ānana--_ānana da--_da prayojana--_prayojana abhāva--_abhāva buddhyā_buddhi aham_mad eteṣām_etad kartā_kartṛ mama_mad ete_etad bhogyāḥ_bhuj iti_iti abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa rūpam_rūpa anuṣaṅgam_anuṣaṅga na_na karoti_kṛ hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt tasmāt_tasmāt sarva--_sarva saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin sarveṣām_sarva saṅkalpānām_saṃkalpa idam_idam mayā_mad kartavyam_kṛ etat_etad phalam_phala bhoktavyam_bhuj iti_iti evam_evam rūpāṇām_rūpa manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣāṇām_viśeṣa tad--_tad viṣayāṇām_viṣaya ca_ca kāmānām_kāma tad--_tad sādhanānām_sādhana ca_ca tadā_tadā śabda--_śabda ādiṣu_ādi karmasu_karman ca_ca anuṣaṅgasya_anuṣaṅga tad--_tad hetoḥ_hetu ca_ca saṅkalpasya_saṃkalpa yoga--_yoga ārohaṇa--_ārohaṇa pratibandhakasya_pratibandhaka abhāvāt_abhāva yogam_yoga samādhim_samādhi ārūḍhaḥ_āruh yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh iti_iti ucyate_vac
āha_ah

āha_ah indriyārtheṣu_indriyārtha śabda--_śabda ādiṣu_ādi tad--_tad sādhaneṣu_sādhana karmasu_karman ca_ca yadā_yadā ātma--_ātman ānanda--_ānanda rasikaḥ_rasika san_as na_na sajjate_sañj tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu sarvā_sarva iti_iti sarvān_sarva bhoga--_bhoga viṣayān_viṣaya karma--_karman viṣayāḥ_viṣaya ca_ca saṅkalpān_saṃkalpa āsatti--_āsatti mūla--_mūla bhūtān_bhū saṃnyasitum_saṃnyas parityaktum_parityaj śīlam_śīla yasya_yad saḥ_tad
BhG 6.5

lg.l: uddharet_uddhṛ ātmanā_ātman ātmānam_ātman na_na ātmānam_ātman avasādayet_avasāday
ātmā_ātman eva_eva hi_hi ātmanaḥ_ātman bandhuḥ_bandhu ātmā_ātman eva_eva ripuḥ_ripu ātmanaḥ_ātman

div.p: tyajet_tyaj āha_ah ātmanā_ātman viveka--_viveka yuktena_yuj ātmānam_ātman saṃsārāt_saṃsāra uddharet_uddhṛ na_na tu_tu avasādayet_avasāday adhas_adhas na_na nayet_nī hi_hi yatas_yatas ātmā_ātman eva_eva manaḥ--_manas saṅga--_saṅga ādi--_ādi uparataḥ_uparam ātmanaḥ_ātman svasya_sva bandhuḥ_bandhu upakārakaḥ_upakāraka ripuḥ_ripu apakārakaḥ_apakāraka ca_ca

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yaḥ_yad yadā_yadā evam_evam yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh bhavati_bhū tadā_tadā tena_tad ātmanā_ātman eva_eva ātma--_ātman uddhṛtaḥ_uddhṛ bhavati_bhū saṃsāra--_saṃsāra anartha--_anartha vrātāt_vrāta atas_atas uddharet_uddhṛ iti_iti ātmanā_ātman viveka--_viveka yuktena_yuj manasā_manas ātmānam_ātman svam_sva jīvam_jīva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra samudre_samudra nimagnam_nimajj tatas_tatas uddharet_uddhṛ ud_ud ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam haret_hṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya āsaṅga--_āsaṅga parityāgena_parityāga yoga--_yoga ārūḍha--_āruh tām_tā āpādayet_āpāday iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na tu_tu viṣaya--_viṣaya āsaṅgena_āsaṅga ātmānam_ātman avasādayet_avasāday saṃsāra--_saṃsāra samudre_samudra majjayet_majjay hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt ātmā_ātman eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman bandhuḥ_bandhu hita--_hita kārī_kārin saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bandhanāt_bandhana mocana--_mocana hetuḥ_hetu na_na anyaḥ_anya kaścid_kaścit laukikasya_laukika bandhoḥ_bandhu api_api sneha--_sneha anubandhena_anubandha bandha--_bandha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva ātmā_ātman eva_eva na_na anyaḥ_anya kaścid_kaścit ripuḥ_ripu śatru--_śatru rahita--_rahita kāri--_kārin viṣaya--_viṣaya bandhanāgāra--_bandhanāgāra praveśāt_praveśa kośakāraḥ_kośakāra iva_iva ātmanaḥ_ātman svasya_sva bāhyasya_bāhya api_api ripoḥ_ripu
ātma--_ātman prayukta--_prayuj tvāt_tva yuktam_yuj avadhāraṇam_avadhāraṇa ātmā_ātman eva_eva ripuḥ_ripu ātmanaḥ_ātman iti_iti

ātmanā_ātman viṣaya--_viṣaya āsakti--_āsakti rahitena_rahita manasā_manas ātmānam_ātman jīvam_jīva uddharet_uddhṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya āsakti--_āsakti sahitena_sahita manasā_manas tu_tu ātmānam_ātman na_na avasādayet_avasāday na_na saṃsāra--_saṃsāra kūpe_kūpa pātayet_pātay tasmāt_tasmāt ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas eva_eva bandhuḥ_bandhu manaḥ_manas eva_eva ripuḥ_ripu

baladevaḥ_baladeva indriyārtha--_indriyārtha ādi--_ādi anāsaktau_anāsakti hetu--_hetu bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah uddharet_uddhṛ iti_iti viṣaya--_viṣaya ādi--_ādi āsakta--_āsañj manaska--_manaska tayā_tā saṃsāra--_saṃsāra kūpe_kūpa nimagnam_nimajj ātmānam_ātman jīvam_jīva ātmanā_ātman viṣaya--_viṣaya āsakti--_āsakti rahitena_rahita manasā_manas tasmāt_tad uddharet_uddhṛ ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam haret_hṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya āsaktena_āsañj manasā_manas ātmānam_ātman na_na avasādayet_avasāday tatra_tatra na_na nimajjayet_nimajjay hi_hi niścaye_niścaya nā_na evam_evam ātmā_ātman eva_eva manaḥ_manas eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman svasya_sva bandhuḥ_bandhu tat_tad eva_eva ripuḥ_ripu smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca
manaḥ_manas eva_eva manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya kāraṇam_kāraṇa bandha--_bandha mokṣayoḥ_mokṣa bandhāya_bandha viṣaya--_viṣaya āsaṅgaḥ_āsaṅga muktyai_mukti nirviṣayam_nirviṣaya manaḥ_manas
BhG 6.6

lg.l: bandhuḥ_bandhu ātmā_ātman ātmanaḥ_ātman tasya_tad yena_yad ātmā_ātman eva_eva ātmanā_ātman jitaḥ_ji
anātmanaḥ_anātman tu_tu śatru--_śatru tve_tva varteta_vṛt ātmā_ātman eva_eva śatru--_śatru vat_vat

div.p: āha_ah yena_yad ātmanā_ātman eva_eva ātmā_ātman kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa saṅghāta--_saṃghāta rūpaḥ_rūpa jitaḥ_ji vaśīkṛtasya_vaśīkṛ tathābhūtasya_tathābhūta ātmanaḥ_ātman ātmā_ātman eva_eva bandhuḥ_bandhu anātmanaḥ_anātman ajita--_ajita ātmanaḥ_ātman tu_tu ātmā_ātman eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman śatru--_śatru tve_tva śatru--_śatru vat_vat apakāra--_apakāra kāri--_kārin tve_tva varteta_vṛt

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm kim_ka lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa ātmā_ātman ātmanaḥ_ātman bandhuḥ_bandhu kim_ka lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa vā_vā ātmanaḥ_ātman ripuḥ_ripu iti_iti ucyate_vac bandhuḥ_bandhu iti_iti ātmā_ātman kārya--_kārya karaṇa--_karaṇa saṃghātaḥ_saṃghāta yena_yad jitaḥ_ji sva--_sva vaśīkṛtaḥ_vaśīkṛ ātmanā_ātman eva_eva viveka--_viveka yuktena_yuj manasā_manas eva_eva na_na tu_tu śastra--_śastra ādinā_ādi tasya_tad ātmā_ātman svarūpam_svarūpa ātmanaḥ_ātman bandhuḥ_bandhu ucchṛṅkhala--_ucchṛṅkhala sva--_sva pravṛtti--_pravṛtti abhāvena_abhāva sva--_sva hita--_hita karaṇāt_karaṇa anātmanaḥ_anātman tu_tu ajita--_ajita ātmanaḥ_ātman iti_iti etat_etad śatru--_śatru tve_tva śatru--_śatru bhāve_bhāva varteta_vṛt ātmā_ātman eva_eva śatru--_śatru vat_vat bāhya--_bāhya śatruḥ_śatru iva_iva ucchṛṅkhala--_ucchṛṅkhala pravṛttyā_pravṛtti svasya_sva svena_sva aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa ācaraṇāt_ācaraṇa

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kasya_ka sa_tad bandhuḥ_bandhu kasya_ka sa_tad ripuḥ_ripu iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah bandhuḥ_bandhu iti_iti yena_yad ātmanā_ātman jīvena_jīva ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas jitaḥ_ji tasya_tad jīvasya_jīva saḥ_tad ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas bandhuḥ_bandhu anātmanaḥ_anātman ajita--_ajita manasaḥ_manas tu_tu ātmā_ātman eva_eva manaḥ_manas eva_eva śatru--_śatru vat_vat śatru--_śatru tve_tva apakāraka--_apakāraka tve_tva varteta_vṛt

baladevaḥ_baladeva kīdṛśasya_kīdṛśa sa_tad bandhuḥ_bandhu kīdṛśasya_kīdṛśa sa_tad ripuḥ_ripu iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah bandhuḥ_bandhu iti_iti yena_yad ātmanā_ātman jīvena_jīva ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas eva_eva jitaḥ_ji tasya_tad jīvasya_jīva saḥ_tad ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas bandhuḥ_bandhu tad--_tad upakārī_upakārin anātmanaḥ_anātman ajita--_ajita manasaḥ_manas tu_tu jīvasya_jīva ātmā_ātman eva_eva manaḥ_manas eva_eva śatru--_śatru vat_vat śatru--_śatru tve_tva apakāraka--_apakāraka tve_tva varteta_vṛt
BhG 6.7

lg.l: jita--_ji ātmanaḥ_ātman praśāntasya_praśam paramātmā_paramātman samāhitaḥ_samādhā
śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkheṣu_duḥkha tathā_tathā māna--_māna apamānayoḥ_apamāna

div.p: sphuṭayati_sphuṭay jitaḥ_ji ātmā_ātman yena_yad tasya_tad praśāntasya_praśam rāga--_rāga ādi--_ādi rahitasya_rahita eva_eva param_para kevalam_kevala ātmā_ātman śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādiṣu_ādi satsu_as api_api samāhitaḥ_samāhita svātma--_svātman niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭha bhavati_bhū na_na anyasya_anya yat_yat vā_vā tasya_tad hṛdi_hṛd paramātmā_paramātman samāhitaḥ_samādhā sthitaḥ_sthā bhavati_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana jita--_ji ātmanaḥ_ātman sva--_sva bandhu--_bandhu tvam_tva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ jita--_ji ātmanaḥ_ātman iti_iti śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkheṣu_duḥkha citta--_citta vikṣepa--_vikṣepa kareṣu_kara satsu_as api_api tathā_tathā māna--_māna apamānayoḥ_apamāna pūjā--_pūjā paribhavayoḥ_paribhava citta--_citta vikṣepa--_vikṣepa hetvoḥ_hetu satoḥ_as iti_iti teṣu_tad samatvena_samatva iti_iti vā_vā jita--_ji ātmanaḥ_ātman prāc--_prāñc uktasya_vac jita--_ji indriyasya_indriya praśāntasya_praśam sarvatra_sarvatra sama--_sama buddhayā_buddhi rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa śūnyasya_śūnya paramātmā_paramātman sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa jñāna--_jñāna svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva ātmā_ātman samāhitaḥ_samāhita samādhi--_samādhi viṣayaḥ_viṣaya yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh bhavati_bhū param_para iti_iti vā_vā chedaḥ_cheda jita--_ji ātmanaḥ_ātman praśāntasya_praśam eva_eva param_param kevalam_kevalam ātmā_ātman samāhitaḥ_samādhā bhavati_bhū na_na anyasya_anya tasmāt_tasmāt jita--_ji ātmā_ātman praśāntaḥ_praśam ca_ca bhavet_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha atha_atha yoga--_yoga ārūḍhasya_āruh cihnāni_cihna darśayati_darśay tribhiḥ_tri jita--_ji ātmanaḥ_ātman jita--_ji manasaḥ_manas praśāntasya_praśam rāga--_rāga ādi--_ādi rahitasya_rahita yoginaḥ_yogin param_param atiśayena_atiśaya samāhitaḥ_samāhita samādhi--_samādhi sthaḥ_stha ātmā_ātman bhavet_bhū śīta--_śīta ādiṣu_ādi satsu_as api_api māna--_māna apamānayoḥ_apamāna prāptayoḥ_prāp api_api

baladevaḥ_baladeva yoga--_yoga ārambha--_ārambha yogyām_yogya avasthām_avasthā āha_ah jita--_ji iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādiṣu_ādi māna--_māna apamānayoḥ_apamāna ca_ca jita--_ji ātmanaḥ_ātman avikṛta--_avikṛta manasaḥ_manas praśāntasya_praśam rāga--_rāga ādi--_ādi śūnyasya_śūnya ātmā_ātman param_param atyartham_atyartham samāhitaḥ_samāhita
BhG 6.8

lg.l: jñāna--_jñāna vijñāna--_vijñāna tṛpta--_tṛp ātmā_ātman kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha vijita--_viji indriyaḥ_indriya
yuktaḥ_yuj iti_iti ucyate_vac yogī_yogin sama--_sama loṣṭa--_loṣṭa aśma--_aśman kāñcanaḥ_kāñcana

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ jñānam_jñāna aupadeśikam_aupadeśika vijñānam_vijñāna a_a parokṣa--_parokṣa anubhavaḥ_anubhava tābhyām_tad tṛptaḥ_tṛp nirākāṅkṣaḥ_nirākāṅkṣa ātmā_ātman cittam_citta yasya_yad atas_atas kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra atas_atas eva_eva vijitāni_viji indriyāṇi_indriya yena_yad ataeva_ataeva samāni_sama loṣṭa--_loṣṭa ādīni_ādi yasya_yad mṛd--_mṛd piṇḍa--_piṇḍa pāṣāṇa--_pāṣāṇa suvarṇeṣu_suvarṇa heya--_hā upādeya--_upādā buddhi--_buddhi śūnyaḥ_śūnya sa_tad yuktaḥ_yuj yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh iti_iti ucyate_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna iti_iti jñānam_jñāna śāstra--_śāstra uktānām_vac padārthānām_padārtha aupadeśikam_aupadeśika jñānam_jñāna vijñānam_vijñāna tad--_tad aprāmāṇya--_aprāmāṇya śaṅkā--_śaṅkā nirākaraṇa--_nirākaraṇa phalena_phala vicāreṇa_vicāra tathā_tathā eva_eva teṣām_tad sva--_sva anubhavena_anubhava aparokṣīkaraṇam_aparokṣīkaraṇa tābhyāḥ_tad tṛptaḥ_tṛp saṃjāta--_saṃjan alam_alam kūṭāsthaḥ_kūṭāstha viṣaya--_viṣaya saṃnidhau_saṃnidhi api_api vikāra--_vikāra śūnyaḥ_śūnya ataeva_ataeva vijitāni_viji rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa pūrvakāt_pūrvaka viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇāt_grahaṇa vayāvartitāni_vayāvartay indriyāṇi_indriya yena_yad saḥ_tad ataeva_ataeva heya--_hā upādeya--_upādā buddhi--_buddhi śūnya--_śūnya tvena_tva samāni_sama mṛd--_mṛd piṇḍa--_piṇḍa pāṣāṇa--_pāṣāṇa kāñcanāni_kāñcana yasya_yad saḥ_tad yogī_yogin paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājakaḥ_parivrājaka para--_para vairāgya--_vairāgya yuktaḥ_yuj yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh iti_iti
ucyate_vac

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha jñānam_jñāna aupadeśikam_aupadeśika vijñānam_vijñāna aparokṣa--_aparokṣa anubhavaḥ_anubhava tābhyām_tad tṛptaḥ_tṛp nirākāṅkṣaḥ_nirākāṅkṣa ātmā_ātman cittam_citta yasya_yad saḥ_tad kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha ekena_eka eva_eva svabhāvena_svabhāva sarva--_sarva kālam_kāla vyāpya_vyāp sthitaḥ_sthā sarva--_sarva vastuṣu_vastu anāsakta--_anāsakta tvāt_tva samāni_sama loṣṭa--_loṣṭa ādīni_ādi yasya_yad saḥ_tad loṣṭam_loṣṭa mṛd--_mṛd piṇḍaḥ_piṇḍa

baladevaḥ_baladeva jñāna--_jñāna iti_iti jñānam_jñāna śāstra--_śāstra jam_ja vijñānam_vijñāna vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman anubhavaḥ_anubhava tābhyām_tad tṛpta--_tṛp ātmā_ātman pūrṇa--_pṛ manāḥ_manas kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha eka--_eka svabhāva--_svabhāva tayā_tā sarva--_sarva kālam_kāla sthitaḥ_sthā atas_atas vijita--_viji indriyaḥ_indriya prakṛti--_prakṛti vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman mātra--_mātra niṣṭha--_niṣṭha tvāt_tva prākṛteṣu_prākṛta loṣṭra--_loṣṭra ādiṣu_ādi loṣṭam_loṣṭa mṛd--_mṛd piṇḍaḥ_piṇḍa īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa yogī_yogin niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmī_karmin yuktaḥ_yuj ātma--_ātman darśana--_darśana rūpa--_rūpa yoga--_yoga abhyāsa--_abhyāsa yogyaḥ_yogya ucyate_vac
BhG 6.9

lg.l: suhṛd--_suhṛd mitra--_mitra āri--_āri udāsīna--_udāsīna madhyastha--_madhyastha dveṣya--_dviṣ bandhuṣu_bandhu
sādhuṣu_sādhu api_api ca_ca pāpeṣu_pāpa sama--_sama buddhiḥ_buddhi viśiṣyate_viśiṣ

div.p: āha_ah suhṛd_suhṛd svabhāvena_svabhāva eva_eva hita--_hita āśaṃsī_āśaṃsin mitram_mitra sneha--_sneha vaśena_vaśa upakārakaḥ_upakāraka ariḥ_ari ghātakaḥ_ghātaka udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna vivadamānayoḥ_vivad api_api upekṣakaḥ_upekṣaka madhya--_madhya sthaḥ_stha vivadamānayoḥ_vivad ubhayoḥ_ubhaya api_api hita--_hita āśaṃsī_āśaṃsin dveṣyaḥ_dviṣ dveṣa--_dveṣa viṣayaḥ_viṣaya bandhuḥ_bandhu saṃbandhī_sambandhin sādhavaḥ_sādhu sat--_sat ācārāḥ_ācāra pāpāḥ_pāpa durācārāḥ_durācāra eteṣu_etad samā_sama rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi śūnyā_śūnya buddhiḥ_buddhi yasya_yad sa_tad tu_tu viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ

āha_ah suhṛd_suhṛd pratyupakāram_pratyupakāra an_an apekṣya_apekṣ pūrva--_pūrva sneham_sneha sambandham_sambandha ca_ca vinā_vinā eva_eva upakartā_upakartṛ mitram_mitra snehena_sneha upakārakaḥ_upakāraka ariḥ_ari sva--_sva kṛta--_kṛ apakāram_apakāra an_an apekṣya_apekṣ svabhāva--_svabhāva krauryeṇa_kraurya apakartā_apakartṛ udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna vivadamānayoḥ_vivad ubhayoḥ_ubhaya api_api upekṣakaḥ_upekṣaka madhya--_madhya sthaḥ_stha vivadamānayoḥ_vivad ubhayoḥ_ubhaya api_api hita--_hita eṣī_eṣin dveṣyaḥ_dviṣ sva--_sva kṛta--_kṛ apakāram_apakāra apekṣya_apekṣ apakartā_apakartṛ bandhuḥ_bandhu saṃbandhena_sambandha upakartā_upakartṛ eteṣu_etad sādhuṣu_sādhu śāstra--_śāstra vihita--_vidhā kāriṣu_kārin pāpeṣu_pāpa śāstra--_śāstra pratiṣiddha--_pratiṣidh kāriṣu_kārin api_api ca-kārāt_ca-kāra anyeṣu_anya ca_ca sarveṣu_sarva sama--_sama buddhiḥ_buddhi kaḥ_ka kīdṛś--_kīdṛś karmā_karman iti_iti avyāpṛta--_avyāpṛta buddhiḥ_buddhi sarvatra_sarvatra rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa śūnyaḥ_śūnya viśiṣyate_viśiṣ sarvatra_sarvatra utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa bhavati_bhū vimucyate_vimuc pāṭhaḥ_pāṭha

mitram_mitra kena_ka api_api snehena_sneha hita--_hita kārī_kārin ariḥ_ari ghātakaḥ_ghātaka udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna vivadamānayoḥ_vivad upekṣakaḥ_upekṣaka madhya--_madhya sthaḥ_stha vivadamānayoḥ_vivad vivāda--_vivāda apahāra--_apahāra arthī_arthin dveṣyaḥ_dviṣ apakāraka--_apakāraka tvāt_tva dveṣa--_dveṣa arhaḥ_arha bandhuḥ_bandhu saṃbandhī_sambandhin sādhavaḥ_sādhu dhārmikāḥ_dhārmika pāpāḥ_pāpa adhārmikāḥ_adhārmika eteṣu_etad sama--_sama buddhiḥ_buddhi tu_tu viśiṣyate_viśiṣ sama--_sama loṣṭa--_loṣṭa aśma--_aśman kāñcanāt_kāñcana sakāśāt_sakāśāt api_api śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha

baladevaḥ_baladeva suhṛd_suhṛd iti_iti yaḥ_yad suhṛd--_suhṛd ādiṣu_ādi sama--_sama buddhiḥ_buddhi sa_tad sama--_sama loṣṭa--_loṣṭa aśma--_aśman kāñcanāt_kāñcana api_api yoginaḥ_yogin sakāśāt_sakāśāt viśiṣyate_viśiṣ śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha bhavati_bhū tatra_tatra suhṛd_suhṛd svabhāvena_svabhāva hita--_hita icchuḥ_icchu mitram_mitra kena_ka api_api snehena_sneha hita--_hita kṛt_kṛt ariḥ_ari nirmitrataḥ_nirmitra anartha--_anartha icchuḥ_icchu udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna vivadamānayoḥ_vivad anapekṣakaḥ_anapekṣaka madhya--_madhya sthaḥ_stha tayoḥ_tad vivāda--_vivāda apahāra--_apahāra arthī_arthin dveṣaḥ_dveṣa apakārika--_apakārika tvāt_tva dveṣa--_dveṣa arhaḥ_arha bandhuḥ_bandhu saṃbandhena_sambandha hita--_hita icchuḥ_icchu sādhavaḥ_sādhu dhārmikāḥ_dhārmika pāpāḥ_pāpa adhārmikāḥ_adhārmika
BhG 6.10

lg.l: yogī_yogin yuñjīta_yuj satatam_satatam ātmānam_ātman rahasi_rahas sthitaḥ_sthā
ekākī_ekākin yata--_yam citta--_citta ātmā_ātman nirāśīḥ_nirāśī aparigrahaḥ_aparigraha

div.p: vidhatte_vidhā yogī_yogin yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas yuñjīta_yuj samāhitam_samādhā kuryāt_kṛ satatam_satatam nirantaram_nirantaram rahasi_rahas ekānte_ekānta sthitaḥ_sthā san_as ekākī_ekākin saṅga--_saṅga śūnyaḥ_śūnya yatam_yam saṃyatam_saṃyam cittam_citta ātmā_ātman dehaḥ_deha ca_ca yasya_yad nirāśīḥ_nirāśī nirākāṅkṣaḥ_nirākāṅkṣa aparigrahaḥ_aparigraha parigraha--_parigraha śūnyaḥ_śūnya ca_ca

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam yoga--_yoga ārūḍhasya_āruh lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa phalam_phala ca_ca uktvā_vac tasya_tad sa_sa aṅgam_aṅga yogam_yoga vidhatte_vidhā yogī_yogin iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi sa_tad yogī_yogin paramaḥ_parama mataḥ_man iti_iti antaiḥ_anta trayoviṃśatyā_trayoviṃśati ślokaiḥ_śloka tatra_tatra evam_evam uttama--_uttama phala--_phala prāptaye_prāpti yogī_yogin iti_iti yogī_yogin yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh ātmānam_ātman cittam_citta satatam_satatam nirantaram_nirantaram yuñjīta_yuj kṣiptam_kṣip ūḍha--_vah vikṣipta--_vikṣip bhūmi--_bhūmi parityāgena_parityāga ekāgra--_ekāgra nirodha--_nirodha bhūmibhyām_bhūmi samāhitam_samādhā kuryāt_kṛ rahasi_rahas giri--_giri guhā--_guhā ādau_ādi yoga--_yoga pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka durjana--_durjana ādi--_ādi varjite_varjay deśe_deśa sthitaḥ_sthā ekākī_ekākin tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva gṛha--_gṛha parijanaḥ_parijana saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin cittam_citta antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa ātmā_ātman dehaḥ_deha ca_ca saṃyatau_saṃyam yoga--_yoga pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka vyāpāra--_vyāpāra śūnyau_śūnya yasya_yad sa_tad yata--_yam citta--_citta ātmā_ātman yatas_yatas nirāśīḥ_nirāśī vairāgya--_vairāgya dārḍhyena_dārḍhya vigata--_vigam tṛṣṇaḥ_tṛṣṇā ataeva_ataeva ca_ca aparigrahaḥ_aparigraha śāstra--_śāstra abhyanujñātena_abhyanujñā api_api yoga--_yoga pratibandhakena_pratibandhaka parigraheṇa_parigraha śūnyaḥ_śūnya
vidhatte_vidhā yuñjīta_yuj kuryāt_kṛ

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha tasya_tad sa_sa aṅgam_aṅga yogam_yoga upadiśati_upadiś yogī_yogin iti_iti ādi_ādi trayoviṃśatyā_trayoviṃśati yogī_yogin niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmī_karmin ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas satatam_satatam ahar_ahar ahar_ahar yuñjīta_yuj samādhi--_samādhi yuktam_yuj kuryāt_kṛ rahasi_rahas nirjane_nirjana niḥśabde_niḥśabda deśe_deśa sthitaḥ_sthā tatra_tatra api_api ekākī_ekākin dvitīya--_dvitīya śūnyaḥ_śūnya tatra_tatra api_api yata--_yam citta--_citta ātmā_ātman yatau_yam yoga--_yoga pratikūla--_pratikūla vyāpāra--_vyāpāra varjitau_varjay citta--_citta dehau_deha yasya_yad saḥ_tad yatas_yatas nirāśīḥ_nirāśī dṛḍha--_dṛḍha vairāgya--_vairāgya tayā_tā itaratra_itaratra nispṛhaḥ_nispṛha aparigrahaḥ_aparigraha nirāhāraḥ_nirāhāra

lg.l: śucau_śuci deśe_deśa pratiṣṭhāpya_pratiṣṭhāpay sthiram_sthira āsanam_āsana ātmanaḥ_ātman
na_na ati_ati ucchritam_ucchri na_na ati_ati nīcam_nīca caila--_caila ajina--_ajina kuśa--_kuśa uttaram_uttara
tatra_tatra ekāgram_ekāgra manaḥ_manas kṛtvā_kṛ yata--_yam citta--_citta indriya--_indriya kriyaḥ_kriyā
upaviśya_upaviś āsane_āsana yuñjyāt_yuj yogam_yoga ātma--_ātman viśuddhaye_viśuddhi

div.p: darśayan_darśay āha_ah śuddhe_śudh sthāne_sthāna ātmanaḥ_ātman svasya_sva āsanam_āsana sthāpayitvā_sthāpay kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa sthiram_sthira acalam_acala na_na ati_ati ucchritam_ucchri na_na atīva_atīva unnatam_unnam na_na ca_ca ati_ati nīcam_nīca celam_cela vastram_vastra ajinam_ajina vyāghra--_vyāghra ādi--_ādi carma_carman cela--_cela ajine_ajina kuśebhyaḥ_kuśa uttare_uttara yasya_yad kuśānām_kuśa upari_upari carma_carman tat_tad upari_upari vastram_vastra āstīryeta_āstṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

tatra_tatra iti_iti tatra_tatra tasmin_tad āsane_āsana upaviśya_upaviś ekāgram_ekāgra vikṣepa--_vikṣepa rahitam_rahita manaḥ_manas kṛtvā_kṛ yogam_yoga yuñjyāt_yuj abhyaset_abhyas yatāḥ_yam saṃyatāḥ_saṃyam cittasya_citta indriyāṇām_indriya ca_ca kriyāḥ_kriyā yasya_yad saḥ_tad ātmanaḥ_ātman manasaḥ_manas viśuddhaye_viśuddhi upaśāntaye_upaśānti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatra_tatra āsana--_āsana niyamam_niyama darśayan_darśay āha_ah śucau_śuci deśe_deśa iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi śucau_śuci svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva saṃskārataḥ_saṃskāra vā_vā śuddhe_śudh jana--_jana samudāya--_samudāya rahite_rahita nirbhaye_nirbhaya gaṅgā--_gaṅgā taṭa--_taṭa guhā--_guhā ādau_ādi deśe_deśa sthāne_sthāna pratiṣṭhāpya_pratiṣṭhāpay sthiram_sthira niścalam_niścala na_na ati_ati ucchritam_ucchri na_na ati_ati uccam_ucca na_na api_api ati_ati nīcam_nīca caila--_caila ajina--_ajina mṛdu--_mṛdu vyāghra--_vyāghra ādi--_ādi carma_carman te_tad kuśebhyaḥ_kuśa uttare_uttara uparitane_uparitana yasmin_yad tat_tad āsyate_ās asmin_idam iti_iti āsanam_āsana kuśa--_kuśa maya--_maya vṛṣi--_vṛṣi upari_upari mṛdu--_mṛdu carma_carman tad--_tad upari_upari mṛdu--_mṛdu vastra--_vastra rūpam_rūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat patañjaliḥ_patañjali sthira--_sthira sukham_sukha āsanam_āsana iti_iti ātmanaḥ_ātman iti_iti para--_para āsana--_āsana vyāvṛtti--_vyāvṛtti artham_artha tasya_tad api_api para--_para icchā--_icchā niyama--_niyama abhāvena_abhāva yoga--_yoga vikṣepa--_vikṣepa paratvāt_paratva

evam_evam āsanam_āsana pratiṣṭhāpya_pratiṣṭhāpay kim_ka kuryāt_kṛ iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah tatra_tatra ekāgram_ekāgra iti_iti tatra_tatra tasmin_tad āsane_āsana upaviśya_upaviś eva_eva na_na tu_tu śayānaḥ_śī tiṣṭhan_sthā vā_vā āsīnaḥ_ās sambhavāt_sambhava nyāyena_nyāya yatāḥ_yam saṃyatāḥ_saṃyam uparatāḥ_uparam cittasya_citta indriyāṇām_indriya ca_ca kriyāḥ_kriyā vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti yena_yad sa_tad yata--_yam citta--_citta indriya--_indriya kriyaḥ_kriyā san_as yogam_yoga samādhim_samādhi yuñjīta_yuj abhyaset_abhyas kim_ka artham_artha dṛśyate_dṛś tu_tu agryayā_agrya buddhyā_buddhi sūkṣmayā_sūkṣma sūkṣma--_sūkṣma darśibhiḥ_darśin iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

kim_ka kṛtvā_kṛ yogam_yoga abhyaset_abhyas iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah ekāgram_ekāgra rājasa--_rājasa tāmasa--_tāmasa vyutthāna--_vyutthāna ākhya--_ākhya prāc--_prāñc ukta--_vac bhūmi--_bhūmi traya--_traya parityāgena_parityāga eka--_eka viṣayaka--_viṣayaka dhārāvāhika--_dhārāvāhika aneka--_aneka vṛtti--_vṛtti yuktam_yuj udrikta--_udric sattvam_sattva manaḥ_manas kṛtvā_kṛ sampādya_sampāday ekāgra--_ekāgra tā--_tā vivṛddhi--_vivṛddhi artham_artha yogam_yoga samprajñāta--_samprajñā samādhim_samādhi abhyaset_abhyas sa_tad ca_ca brahma--_brahman ākāra--_ākāra manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti pravāhaḥ_pravāha eva_eva nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana ākhyaḥ_ākhyā tat_tad uktam_vac

brahma--_brahman ākāra--_ākāra manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti pravāhaḥ_pravāha ahaṅkṛtim_ahaṃkṛti vinā_vinā saṃprajñāta--_saṃprajñā samādhiḥ_samādhi syāt_as dhyāna--_dhyāna abhyāsa--_abhyāsa prakarṣataḥ_prakarṣa

etat_etad eva_eva abhipretya_abhipre dhyāna--_dhyāna abhyāsa--_abhyāsa prakarṣam_prakarṣa vidadhe_vidhā bhagavān_bhagavant yogī_yogin yuñjīta_yuj satatam_satatam yuñjyāt_yuj yogam_yoga ātma--_ātman viśuddhaye_viśuddhi yuktaḥ_yuj āsīta_ās mad--_mad para_para iti_iti ādi_ādi bahu--_bahu kṛtvas_kṛtvas

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha pratiṣṭhāpya_pratiṣṭhāpay stthāpayitvā_sthāpay cela--_cela ajina--_ajina kuśa--_kuśa uttaram_uttara iti_iti kuśa--_kuśa āsana--_āsana upari_upari mṛga--_mṛga carma--_carman āsanam_āsana tat_tad upari_upari vastra--_vastra āsanam_āsana nidhāya_nidhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātmanaḥ_ātman antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa viśuddha--_viśudh tve_tva vikṣepa--_vikṣepa śūnya--_śūnya tvena_tva ati_ati sūkṣmatayā_sūkṣmatā brahma--_brahman sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra yogya--_yogya tāyai_tā dṛśyate_dṛś tu_tu agryayā_agrya buddhyā_buddhi iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

baladevaḥ_baladeva āsanam_āsana āha_ah śucau_śuci iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi śucau_śuci svatas_svatas saṃskārataḥ_saṃskāra ca_ca śuddhe_śudh gaṅgā--_gaṅgā taṭa--_taṭa giri--_giri guhā--_guhā ādau_ādi deśe_deśa sthiram_sthira niścalam_niścala na_na ati_ati ucchritam_ucchri na_na ati_ati uccam_ucca na_na ati_ati nīcam_nīca dārva--_dārva ādi--_ādi nirmitam_nirmā āsanam_āsana pratiṣṭhāpya_pratiṣṭhāpay saṃsthāpya_saṃsthāpay caila--_caila ajine_ajina kuśebhyaḥ_kuśa uttare_uttara yatra_yatra tat_tad cailam_caila mṛdu--_mṛdu vastram_vastra ajinam_ajina mṛdu--_mṛdu mṛga--_mṛga ādi--_ādi carma_carman kuśa--_kuśa upari_upari vastram_vastra āstīryeta_āstṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātmanaḥ_ātman iti_iti parāsanasya_parāsana vyāvṛttaye_vyāvṛtti para--_para icchāyau_icchā aniyata--_aniyata tvena_tva tasya_tad yoga--_yoga pratikūla--_pratikūla tvāt_tva tatra_tatra iti_iti tasmin_tad pratiṣṭhāpite_pratiṣṭhāpay āsane_āsana upaviśya_upaviś na_na tu_tu tiṣṭhan_sthā śayānaḥ_śī vā_vā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra āsīnaḥ_ās sambhavāt_sambhava iti_iti yatāḥ_yam niruddhāḥ_nirudh citta--_citta ādi--_ādi kriyāḥ_kriyā yasya_yad saḥ_tad manaḥ_manas ekāgram_ekāgra avyākulam_avyākula kṛtvā_kṛ yogam_yoga yuñjīta_yuj samādhim_samādhi abhyaset_abhyas ātmanaḥ_ātman antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa viśuddhaye_viśuddhi ati_ati nairmalyena_nairmalya saukṣmyeṇa_saukṣmya ātma--_ātman darśana--_darśana yogya--_yogya tāyai_tā dṛśyate_dṛś tu_tu agryayā_agrya buddhyā_buddhi sūkṣmayā_sūkṣma sūkṣma--_sūkṣma darśibhiḥ_darśin iti_iti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa

lg.l: samam_sama kāya--_kāya śiraḥ--_śiras grīvam_grīvā dhārayan_dhāray acalam_acala sthiraḥ_sthira
saṃprekṣya_saṃprekṣ nāsikā--_nāsikā agram_agra svam_sva diśaḥ_diś ca_ca anavalokayān_anavalokayat
praśānta--_praśam ātmā_ātman vigata--_vigam bhīḥ_bhī brahmacāri--_brahmacārin vrate_vrata sthitaḥ_sthā
manaḥ_manas saṃyamya_saṃyam mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta yuktaḥ_yuj āsīta_ās mad--_mad paraḥ_para

div.p: āha_ah kāyaḥ_kāya iti_iti dehasya_deha madhya--_madhya bhāgaḥ_bhāga vivakṣitaḥ_vivakṣita kāyaḥ_kāya ca_ca śiraḥ_śiras ca_ca grīvā_grīvā ca_ca kāya--_kāya śiraḥ--_śiras grīvam_grīvā mūlādhārāt_mūlādhāra ārabhya_ārabh mūrdha--_mūrdhan agra--_agra paryantam_paryanta samam_sama avakram_avakra acalam_acala niścalam_niścala dhārayan_dhāray sthiraḥ_sthira dṛḍha--_dṛḍha prayatnaḥ_prayatna bhūtvā_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha svīyam_svīya nāsikā--_nāsikā agram_agra samprekṣya_samprekṣ iti_iti ardha--_ardha nimīlita--_nimīlay netraḥ_netra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha itas_itas tatas_tatas diśaḥ_diś ca_ca an_an avalokayan_avalokay āsīta_ās iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara anvayaḥ_anvaya

praśāntā_praśam iti_iti praśāntaḥ_praśam ātmā_ātman cittam_citta yasya_yad vigatā_vigam bhīḥ_bhī bhayam_bhaya yasya_yad brahmacāri--_brahmacārin vrate_vrata brahmacarye_brahmacarya sthitaḥ_sthā san_as manaḥ_manas saṃyamya_saṃyam pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ mayi_mad eva_eva cittam_citta yasya_yad aham_mad eva_eva param_para puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha yasya_yad sa_tad mad--_mad paraḥ_para evam_evam yuktaḥ_yuj bhūtvā_bhū āsīta_ās tiṣṭhet_sthā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tad--_tad artham_artha bāhyam_bāhya āsanam_āsana uktvā_vac adhunā_adhunā tatra_tatra katham_katham śarīra--_śarīra dhāraṇam_dhāraṇa iti_iti ucyate_vac samam_sama iti_iti kāyaḥ_kāya śarīra--_śarīra madhyam_madhya sa_tad ca_ca śiraḥ_śiras ca_ca grīvā_grīvā ca_ca kāya--_kāya śiraḥ--_śiras grīvam_grīvā mūlādhārāt_mūlādhāra ārabhya_ārabh mūrdha--_mūrdhan anta--_anta paryantam_paryanta samam_sama avakram_avakra acalam_acala akampam_akampa dhārayan_dhāray eka--_eka tattva--_tattva abhyāsena_abhyāsa vikṣepa--_vikṣepa saha_saha bhāvya--_bhū dṛḍha--_dṛḍha prayatnaḥ_prayatna bhūtvā_bhū kim_ka ca_ca svam_sva svīyam_svīya nāsikā--_nāsikā agram_agra saṃprekṣya_saṃprekṣ eva_eva laya--_laya vikṣepa--_vikṣepa rāhityāya_rāhitya viṣaya--_viṣaya pravṛtti--_pravṛtti rahitaḥ_rahita animīlita--_animīlita netraḥ_netra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha diśaḥ_diś ca_ca an_an avalokayan_avalokay antarā_antarā antarā_antarā diśām_diś ca_ca avalokanam_avalokana akurvan_kṛ yoga--_yoga pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka tvāt_tva tasya_tad evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta san_as āsīna_ās iti_iti uttareṇa_uttareṇa
sambandhaḥ_sambandha

kim_kim ca_ca praśānta--_praśam ātmā_ātman iti_iti nidāna--_nidāna nivṛtti--_nivṛtti rūpeṇa_rūpa prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa śāntaḥ_śam rāga--_rāga ādi--_ādi doṣa--_doṣa rahitaḥ_rahita ātmā_ātman antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa yasya_yad sa_tad praśānta--_praśam ātmā_ātman śāstrīya--_śāstrīya niścaya--_niścaya dārḍhyāt_dārḍhya vigatā_vigam bhīḥ_bhī sarva--_sarva karma--_karman parityāgena_parityāga yukta--_yuj vā_vā ayukta--_ayukta tva--_tva śaṅkā_śaṅkā yasya_yad sa_tad vigata--_vigam bhīḥ_bhī brahmacāri--_brahmacārin vrate_vrata brahmacarya--_brahmacarya guru--_guru śuśrūṣā--_śuśrūṣā bhikṣā--_bhikṣā anna--_anna bhojana--_bhojana ādau_ādi sthitaḥ_sthā san_as manaḥ_manas saṃyamya_saṃyam viṣaya--_viṣaya ākāra--_ākāra vṛtti--_vṛtti śūnyam_śūnya kṛtvā_kṛ mayi_mad parameśvare_parameśvara pratyak--_pratyañc citi_cit sa_sa guṇe_guṇa nirguṇe_nirguṇa vā_vā cittam_citta yasya_yad sa_tad mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta mad--_mad viṣayaka--_viṣayaka dhārāvāhika--_dhārāvāhika citta--_citta vṛttimān_vṛttimat putra--_putra ādau_ādi priye_priya cintanīye_cintay sati_as katham_katham evam_evam syāt_as atas_atas āha_ah mad--_mad paraḥ_para aham_mad eva_eva paramānanda--_paramānanda rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva paraḥ_para puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha priyaḥ_priya yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā tat_tad etat_etad preyaḥ_preyas putrāt_putra preyaḥ_preyas vittāt_vitta preyaḥ_preyas anyasmāt_anya sarvasmāt_sarva antarataram_antaratara yat_yad ayam_idam ātmā_ātman iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti evam_evam viṣaya--_viṣaya ākāra--_ākāra sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhena_nirodha bhagavat--_bhagavant eka--_eka ākāra--_ākāra citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti yuktaḥ_yuj samprajñāta--_samprajñā samādhimān_samādhimat āsīta_ās upaviśet_upaviś yathā_yathā śakti_śakti na_na tu_tu sva--_sva icchayā_icchā vyuttiṣṭhet_vyutthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

bhavati_bhū kaścid_kaścit rāgī_rāgin strī--_strī cittaḥ_citta na_na tu_tu striyam_strī eva_eva paratvena_paratva ārādhya--_ārādhay tvena_tva gṛhṇāti_grah kim_ka tarhi_tarhi rājānam_rājan vā_vā devam_deva vā_vā ayam_idam tu_tu mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta mad--_mad paraḥ_para ca_ca sarva--_sarva ārādhya--_ārādhay tvena_tva mām_mad eva_eva manyate_man iti_iti

lg.l: vyākhyātṛ--_vyākhyātṛ tve_tva api_api me_mad na_na atra_atra bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kāreṇa_kāra tulya--_tulya tā_tā
guñjāyāḥ_guñjā kim_ka nu_nu hemnā_heman eka--_eka tulā--_tulā ārohe_āroha api_api tulya--_tulya tā_tā

div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kāyaḥ_kāya deha--_deha madhya--_madhya bhāgaḥ_bhāga samam_sama avakram_avakra acalam_acala niścalam_niścala dhārayan_dhāray kurvan_kṛ manaḥ_manas saṃyamya_saṃyam pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta mām_mad caturbhujam_caturbhuja sundara--_sundara ākāram_ākāra cintayan_cintay mad--_mad paraḥ_para mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_āsana tasmin_tad upaviṣṭasya_upaviś śarīra--_śarīra dhāraṇa--_dhāraṇa vidhim_vidhi āha_ah samam_sama iti_iti kāyaḥ_kāya deha--_deha madhya--_madhya bhāgaḥ_bhāga kāyaḥ_kāya ca_ca śiraḥ_śiras ca_ca grīvā_grīvā ca_ca teṣām_tad samāhāraḥ_samāhāra prāṇi--_prāṇin aṅga--_aṅga tvāt_tva samam_sama avakram_avakra acalam_acala akampam_akampa dhārayan_dhāray kurvan_kṛ sthiraḥ_sthira dṛḍha--_dṛḍha prayatnaḥ_prayatna bhūtvā_bhū sva--_sva nāsikā--_nāsikā agram_agra samprekṣya_samprekṣ sampaśyan_saṃpaś manaḥ--_manas laya--_laya vikṣepa--_vikṣepa nivṛttaye_nivṛtti bhrū--_bhrū madhya--_madhya dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi san_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha antarā_antarā antarāḥ_antarā diśaḥ_diś ca_ca an_an avalokayan_avalokay evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta san_as āsīta_ās iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara sambandhaḥ_sambandha praśānta--_praśam ātmā_ātman akṣubdha--_akṣubdha manāḥ_manas vigatā_vigam bhīḥ_bhī nirbhayaḥ_nirbhaya brahmacāri--_brahmacārin vrate_vrata brahmacarye_brahmacarya sthitaḥ_sthā manaḥ_manas saṃyamya_saṃyam viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta catur--_catur bhujam_bhuja sundara--_sundara aṅgam_aṅga mām_mad cintayan_cintay mad--_mad paraḥ_para mad--_mad eka--_eka puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha yuktaḥ_yuj yogī_yogin
BhG 6.15

lg.l: yuñjan_yuj evam_evam sadā_sadā ātmānam_ātman yogī_yogin niyata--_niyam mānasaḥ_mānasa
śāntim_śānti nirvāṇa--_nirvāṇa paramām_parama mad--_mad saṃsthām_saṃsthā adhigacchati_adhigam

div.p: āha_ah evam_evam ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra sat--_sat ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas yuñjan_yuj samāhitam_samāhita kurvan_kṛ niyatam_niyam niruddham_nirudh mānasam_mānasa cittam_citta yasya_yad saḥ_tad śāntim_śānti saṃsāra--_saṃsāra uparamam_uparama prāpnoti_prāp kathambhūtam_kathambhūta nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa paramam_parama prāpyam_prāp yasyām_yad tām_tad mad--_mad saṃsthām_saṃsthā mad--_mad rūpeṇa_rūpa avasthitām_avasthā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam saṃprajñāta--_samprajñā samādhinā_samādhi āsīnasya_ās kim_ka syāt_as iti_iti ucyate_vac yuñjan_yuj iti_iti evam_evam rahaḥ_rahas avasthāna--_avasthāna ādi--_ādi pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac niyamena_niyama ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas yuñjan_yuj abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya samāhitam_samāhita kurvan_kṛ yogī_yogin sadā_sadā yoga--_yoga abhyāsa--_abhyāsa paraḥ_para abhāysa--_abhāysa atiśayena_atiśaya niyatam_niyam niruddham_nirudh mānasam_mānasa manaḥ_manas yena_yad vikārāḥ_vikāra yena_yad iti_iti vā_vā niyata--_niyam mānasaḥ_mānasa san_as śāntim_śānti sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti uparati--_uparati rūpām_rūpa praśānta--_praśam vāhitām_vāhay nirvāṇa--_nirvāṇa paramām_parama tattva--_tattva sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra utpatti--_utpatti dvāreṇa_dvāra sa_sa kārya--_kārya avidyā--_avidyā nivṛtti--_nivṛtti rūpa--_rūpa mukti--_mukti mad--_mad svarūpa--_svarūpa paramānanda--_paramānanda rūpām_rūpa niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā adhigacchati_adhigam na_na tu_tu sāṃsārikāṇi_sāṃsārika aiśvaryāṇi_aiśvarya anātma--_anātman viṣaya--_viṣaya samādhi--_samādhi phalāni_phala adhigacchati_adhigam teṣām_tad apavarga--_apavarga upayogi--_upayogin samādhi--_samādhi upasarga--_upasarga tvāt_tva

tathā_tathā ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad samādhi--_samādhi phalāni_phala uktvā_vac āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat patañjaliḥ_patañjali te_tad samādhau_samādhi upasargāḥ_upasarga vyutthāne_vyutthāna siddhayaḥ_siddhi iti_iti sthāni--_sthāni upanimantraṇe_upanimantraṇa saṅga--_saṅga smayākaraṇam_smayākaraṇa punar_punar aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga sthāninaḥ_sthānin devāḥ_deva tathā_tathā ca_ca uddālakaḥ_uddālaka devaiḥ_deva āmantritaḥ_āmantray api_api tatra_tatra saṅgam_saṅga ādaram_ādara smayam_smaya garvam_garva ca_ca a_a kṛtvā_kṛ devān_deva avajñāya_avajñā punar_punar aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa prasaṅga--_prasaṅga nivāraṇāya_nivāraṇa nirvikalpakam_nirvikalpaka eva_eva samādhim_samādhi akarot_kṛ iti_iti vasiṣṭhena_vasiṣṭha upākhyāyate_upākhyā

mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu heyaḥ_hā ca_ca samādhiḥ_samādhi sūtritaḥ_sūtray patañjalinā_patañjali vitarka--_vitarka vicāra--_vicāra ānanda--_ānanda asmitā--_asmitā rūpa--_rūpa anugamāt_anugama
