saṃprajñātaḥ_samprajñā samyak_samyak saṃśaya--_saṃśaya viparyaya--_viparyaya anadhyavasāya--_anadhyavasāya rahita--_rahita tvena_tva prajñāyate_prajñā prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa viśeṣa--_viśeṣa rūpeṇa_rūpa jñāyate_jñā bhāvyasya_bhāvay rūpam_rūpa yena_yad sa_tad samprajñātaḥ_samprajñā samādhiḥ_samādhi bhāvanā--_bhāvanā viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa bhāvanā_bhāvanā hi_hi bhāvyasya_bhāvay viṣaya--_viṣaya antara--_antara parihāreṇa_parihāra cetasi_cetas punar_punar punar_punar niveśanam_niveśana bhāvyam_bhāvya ca_ca trividham_trividha grāhya--_grah grahaṇa--_grahaṇa grahītṛ--_grahītṛ bhedāt_bheda grāhyam_grah api_api dvividham_dvividha sthūla--_sthūla sūkṣma--_sūkṣma bhedāt_bheda tat_tad uktam_vac kṣīṇa--_kṣi vṛtteḥ_vṛtti abhijātasya_abhijan iva_iva maṇeḥ_maṇi grahītṛ--_grahītṛ grahaṇa--_grahaṇa grāhyeṣu_grāhya tad--_tad stha--_stha tad--_tad añjana--_añjana tā--_tā samāpattiḥ_samāpatti kṣīṇāḥ_kṣi rājasa--_rājasa tāmasa--_tāmasa vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti yasya_yad tasya_tad cittasya_citta grahītṛ--_grahītṛ grahaṇa--_grahaṇa grāhyeṣu_grah ātma--_ātman indriya--_indriya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya tad--_tad stha--_stha tā_tā tatra_tatra eva_eva ekāgra--_ekāgra tā_tā tad--_tad añjana--_añjana tā_tā tad--_tad maya--_maya tā_tā nyak--_nyāñc bhūte_bhū citte_citta bhāvyamānasya_bhāvay eva_eva utkarṣam_utkarṣa iti_iti yāvat_yāvat tathāvidhā_tathāvidha samāpattiḥ_samāpatti tad--_tad rūpaḥ_rūpa pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma bhavati_bhū yathā_yathā abhijātasya_abhijan nirmalasya_nirmala sphaṭika--_sphaṭika maṇeḥ_maṇi tad--_tad tad--_tad upāśraya--_upāśraya vaśāt_vaśa tad--_tad tad--_tad rūpa--_rūpa āpattiḥ_āpatti evam_evam nirmalasya_nirmala cittasya_citta tad--_tad tad--_tad bhāvanīya--_bhāvay vastu--_vastu uparāgāt_uparāga tad--_tad tad--_tad rūpa--_rūpa āpattiḥ_āpatti samāpattiḥ_samāpatti samādhiḥ_samādhi iti_iti ca_ca yadi_yadi api_api garhītṛ--_garhītṛ grahaṇa--_grahaṇa grāhyeṣu_grāhya iti_iti uktam_vac tathā_tathā api_api bhūmikā--_bhūmikā krama--_krama vaśāt_vaśa grāhya--_grah grahaṇa--_grahaṇa grahītṛṣu_grahītṛ iti_iti boddhavyam_budh yatas_yatas prathamam_prathamam grāhya--_grah niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā eva_eva samādhiḥ_samādhi bhavati_bhū tatas_tatas grahaṇa--_grahaṇa niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā tatas_tatas grahītṛ--_grahītṛ niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā iti_iti grahītṛ--_grahītṛ ādi--_ādi kramaḥ_krama api_api agre_agra vyākhyāsyate_vyākhyā

tatra_tatra yadā_yadā sthūlam_sthūla mahā--_mahat bhūta--_bhūta indriya--_indriya ātmaka--_ātmaka ṣoḍaśa--_ṣoḍaśan vikāra--_vikāra rūpam_rūpa viṣayam_viṣaya ādāya_ādā pūrva--_pūrva apara--_apara anusandhānena_anusaṃdhāna śabda--_śabda artha--_artha ullekhena_ullekha ca_ca bhāvanā_bhāvanā kriyate_kṛ tadā_tadā sa_sa vitarkaḥ_vitarka samādhiḥ_samādhi asmin_idam eva_eva ālambate_ālamb pūrva--_pūrva apara--_apara anusandhāna--_anusaṃdhāna śabda--_śabda artha--_artha ullekha--_ullekha śūnya--_śūnya tvena_tva yadā_yadā bhāvanā_bhāvanā pravartate_pravṛt tadā_tadā nirvitarkaḥ_nirvitarka etau_etad ubhau_ubh api_api atra_atra vitarka--_vitarka śabdena_śabda uktau_vac tad--_tad mātra--_mātra antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sūkṣmam_sūkṣma viṣayam_viṣaya ālambya_ālamb tasya_tad deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla dharma--_dharma avacchedena_avaccheda yadā_yadā bhāvanā_bhāvanā pravartate_pravṛt tadā_tadā sa_sa vicāraḥ_vicāra asmin_idam eva_eva ālambane_ālambana deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla dharma--_dharma avacchedam_avaccheda vinā_vinā dharmi--_dharmin mātra--_mātra avabhāsi--_avabhāsin tvena_tva yadā_yadā bhāvanā_bhāvanā pravartate_pravṛt tadā_tadā nirvicāraḥ_nirvicāra etau_etad uabhau_uabha api_api atra_atra vicāra--_vicāra śabdena_śabda uktau_vac tathā_tathā ca_ca bhāṣyam_bhāṣya vitarkaḥ_vitarka cittasya_citta sthūlaḥ_sthūla ālambanaḥ_ālambana ābhogaḥ_ābhoga sūkṣme_sūkṣma vicāraḥ_vicāra iti_iti iyam_idam grāhya--_grah samāpattiḥ_samāpatti iti_iti vyapadiśyate_vyapadiś yadā_yadā rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas leśa--_leśa anubiddham_anubindh antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa sattvam_sattva bhāvyate_bhāvay tadā_tadā guṇa--_guṇa bhāvāt_bhāva cic--_cit śakteḥ_śakti sukha--_sukha prakāśa--_prakāśa mayasya_maya sattvasya_sattva bhāvayamānasya_bhāvay udreka--_udreka ātma--_ātman ānana--_ānana daḥ_da samādhiḥ_samādhi bhavati_bhū asmin_idam eva_eva samādhau_samādhi ye_yad baddha--_bandh dhṛtayaḥ_dhṛti tattva--_tattva antaram_antara pradhāna--_pradhāna puruṣa--_puruṣa rūpam_rūpa na_na paśyanti_dṛś te_tad vigata--_vigam deha--_deha ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra tvāt_tva videha--_videha śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac iyam_idam grahaṇa--_grahaṇa sampattiḥ_sampatti tatas_tatas param_param rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas leśa--_leśa anabhibhūtam_anabhibhūta śuddham_śuddha sattvam_sattva ālambanīkṛtya_ālambanīkṛ yā_yad bhāvanā_bhāvanā pravartate_pravṛt tasyām_tad grāhyasya_grah sattvasya_sattva nyak--_nyañc bhāvāt_bhāva citi--_citi śakteḥ_śakti udrekāt_udreka sattā--_sattā mātra--_mātra avaśeṣa--_avaśeṣa tvena_tva samādhiḥ_samādhi sa_sa na_na ca_ca ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra asmitayoḥ_asmitā abhedaḥ_abheda śaṅkanīyaḥ_śaṅk yatas_yatas yatra_yatra antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa ahim_ahi iti_iti ullekhena_ullekha viṣayān_viṣaya vedayate_veday saḥ_tad ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra yatra_yatra tu_tu antarmukha--_antarmukha tayā_tā pratiloma--_pratiloma pariṇāmena_pariṇāma prakṛti--_prakṛti līne_lī cetasi_cetas sattā--_sattā mātram_mātra avabhāti_avabhā saḥ_tad asmitā_asmitā asmin_idam eva_eva samādhau_samādhi ye_yad kṛta--_kṛ paritoṣāḥ_paritoṣa te_tad param_para puruṣam_puruṣa a_a paśyantaḥ_paś cetasaḥ_cetas prakṛtau_prakṛti līna--_lī tvāt_tva prakṛti--_prakṛti layāḥ_laya iti_iti ucyante_vac sā_tad iyam_idam grahītṛ--_grahītṛ samāpattiḥ_samāpatti asmitā--_asmitā mātra--_mātra rūpa--_rūpa grahītṛ--_grahītṛ niṣṭha--_niṣṭha tvāt_tva ye_yad tu_tu param_para puruṣam_puruṣa vivicya_vivic bhāvanāyām_bhāvanā pravartante_pravṛt teṣām_tad api_api kevala--_kevala puruṣa--_puruṣa viṣayā_viṣaya viveka--_viveka khyātiḥ_khyāti grahītṛ--_grahītṛ samāpattiḥ_samāpatti api_api na_na sa_sa asmitaḥ_asmitā samādhiḥ_samādhi vivekena_viveka asmitāyāḥ_asmitā tyāgāt_tyāga

tatra_tatra grahītṛ--_grahītṛ bhāna--_bhāna pūrvakam_pūrvaka eva_eva grahaṇa--_grahaṇa bhānam_bhāna tad--_tad pūrvakam_pūrvaka ca_ca sūkṣma--_sūkṣma grāhya--_grāhya bhānam_bhāna tad--_tad pūrvakam_pūrvaka ca_ca sthūla--_sthūla grāhya--_grah bhānam_bhāna iti_iti sthūla--_sthūla viṣayaḥ_viṣaya dvi--_dvi vidhaḥ_vidha api_api vitarkaḥ_vitarka catuṣṭaya--_catuṣṭaya anugataḥ_anugam caturthaḥ_caturtha vitarka--_vitarka vicāra--_vicāra ānandaiḥ_ānanda vikalaḥ_vikala asmitā--_asmitā mātraḥ_mātra iti_iti catur--_catur avasthaḥ_avasthā ayam_idam samprajñātaḥ_samprajñā iti_iti evam_evam sa_sa vitarkaḥ_vitarka sa_sa vicāraḥ_vicāra sa_sa ānandaḥ_ānanda sa_sa asmitaḥ_asmitā ca_ca samādhiḥ_samādhi antardhāna--_antardhāna ādi--_ādi siddhi--_siddhi hetutayā_hetutā mukti--_mukti hetu--_hetu samādhi--_samādhi virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva dheyaḥ_dhā eva_eva mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu grahītṛ--_grahītṛ grahaṇayoḥ_grahaṇa api_api citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viṣaya--_viṣaya tā--_tā daśāyām_daśā grāhya--_grāhya koṭau_koṭi nikṣepāt_nikṣepa dheya--_dhā upādeya--_upādā vibhāga--_vibhāga kathanāya_kathana grāhya--_grah samāpattiḥ_samāpatti eva_eva vivṛtā_vivṛ sūtra--_sūtra kāreṇa_kāra catur--_catur vidhā_vidha hi_hi grāhya--_grāhya samāpattiḥ_samāpatti sthūla--_sthūla grāhya--_grāhya gocarā_gocara dvividhā_dvividha sa_sa vitarkā_vitarka nirvitarkā_nirvitarka ca_ca sūkṣma--_sūkṣma grāhya--_grah gocarā_gocara api_api sa_sa vicārā_vicāra nirvikārā_nirvikāra ca_ca tatra_tatra śabda--_śabda artha--_artha jñāna--_jñāna vikalpaiḥ_vikalpa saṃkīrṇā_saṃkṛ sa_sa vitarkā_vitarka samāpattiḥ_samāpatti śabda--_śabda artha--_artha jñāna--_jñāna vikalpa--_vikalpa sambhinnā_sambhid sthūla--_sthūla artha--_artha avabhāsa--_avabhāsa rūpā_rūpa sa_sa vitarkā_vitarka samāpattiḥ_samāpatti sthūla--_sthūla gocarā_gocara savikalpaka--_savikalpaka vṛttiḥ_vṛtti iti_iti

smṛti--_smṛti pariśuddhau_pariśuddhi sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa śūnyā_śūnya iva_iva artha--_artha mātra--_mātra nirbhāsā_nirbhāsa nirvitarkā_nirvitarka tasmin_tad eva_eva sthūle_sthūla ālambane_ālambana śabda--_śabda artha--_artha smṛti--_smṛti pravilaye_pravilaya pratyudita--_pratyudi spaṣṭa--_paś grāhya--_grah ākāra--_ākāra pratibhāsi--_pratibhāsay tayā_tā nyak--_nyāñc bhūta--_bhū jñāna_jñāna etayā_etad eva_eva sa_sa vicārā_vicāra nirvicārā_nirvicāra ca_ca sūkṣma--_sūkṣma viṣayā_viṣaya vyākhyātā_vyākhyā sūkṣmaḥ_sūkṣma tad--_tad mātra--_mātra ādiḥ_ādi viṣayaḥ_viṣaya yasyāḥ_yad sā_tad sūkṣma--_sūkṣma viṣayā_viṣaya samāpattiḥ_samāpatti dvividhā_dvividha sa_sa vicārā_vicāra nirvicārā_nirvicāra ca_ca savikalpaka--_savikalpaka nirvikalpaka--_nirvikalpaka etayā_etad eva_eva sa_sa vitarkayā_vitarka nirvitarkayā_nirvitarka ca_ca sthūla--_sthūla viṣayayā_viṣaya samāpattyā_samāpatti vyākhyātā_vyākhyā śabda--_śabda artha--_artha jñāna--_jñāna vikalpa--_vikalpa sahita--_sahita tvena_tva deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla dharma--_dharma ādi--_ādi avacchinnaḥ_avacchid sūkṣmaḥ_sūkṣma arthaḥ_artha pratibhāti_pratibhā yasyām_yad sā_tad sa_sa vicārā_vicāra sa_sa vicāra--_vicāra nirvicārayoḥ_nirvicāra sūkṣma--_sūkṣma viṣaya--_viṣaya tva--_tva viśeṣaṇāt_viśeṣaṇa sa_sa vitarka--_vitarka nirvitarkayoḥ_nirvitarka sthūla--_sthūla viṣaya--_viṣaya tvam_tva arthāt_artha vyākhyātam_vyākhyā sūkṣma--_sūkṣma viṣaya--_viṣaya tvam_tva ca_ca aliṅga--_aliṅga paryavasānam_paryavasāna sa_sa vicārāyāḥ_vicāra nirvicārāyāḥ_nirvicāra ca_ca samāpatteḥ_samāpatti yat_yad sūkṣma--_sūkṣma viṣaya--_viṣaya tvam_tva uktam_vac tad--_tad aliṅga--_aliṅga paryantam_paryanta draṣṭavyam_dṛś tena_tena sa_sa ānanda--_ānanda sa_sa asmitayoḥ_asmitā grahitṛ--_grahitṛ grahaṇa--_grahaṇa samāpattyoḥ_samāpatti api_api grāhya--_grah samāpattau_samāpatti eva_eva antar_antar bhāvaḥ_bhāva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā hi_hi pārthivasya_pārthiva aṇoḥ_aṇu gandha--_gandha tanmātram_tanmātra sūkṣmaḥ_sūkṣma viṣayaḥ_viṣaya āpasya_āpa api_api rasa--_rasa tanmātram_tanmātra taijasasya_taijasa rūpa--_rūpa tanmātram_tanmātra vāyavīyasya_vāyavīya sparśa--_sparśa tanmātram_tanmātra nabhasaḥ_nabhas śabda--_śabda tanmātram_tanmātra teṣām_tad ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra tasya_tad liṅga--_liṅga mātram_mātra mahat--_mahant tattvam_tattva tasya_tad api_api aliṅgam_aliṅga pradhānam_pradhāna sūkṣmaḥ_sūkṣma saptānām_saptan api_api prakṛtīnām_prakṛti pradhāne_pradhāna eva_eva sūkṣmatā--_sūkṣmatā viśrānteḥ_viśrānti tad--_tad paryantam_paryanta eva_eva sūkṣma--_sūkṣma viṣaya--_viṣaya tvam_tva uktam_vac yadi_yadi api_api pradhānāt_pradhāna api_api puruṣaḥ_puruṣa sūkṣmaḥ_sūkṣma asti_as tathā_tathā api_api anvayi--_anvayin kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva tasya_tad sarva--_sarva anvayi--_anvayin kāraṇe_kāraṇa pradhāne_pradhāna eva_eva niratiśayam_niratiśaya saukṣmyam_saukṣmya vyākhyātam_vyākhyā puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tu_tu nimitta--_nimitta kāraṇam_kāraṇa sat_as api_api na_na ananvayi--_ananvayin kāraṇatvena_kāraṇatva sūkṣmatām_sūkṣmatā arhati_arh anvayi--_anvayin kāraṇatva--_kāraṇatva vivakṣāyām_vivakṣā tu_tu puruṣaḥ_puruṣa api_api sūkṣmaḥ_sūkṣma bhavati_bhū eva_eva iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś tāḥ_tad eva_eva sa_sa bījaḥ_bīja samādhiḥ_samādhi tāḥ_tad catasraḥ_catur samāpattayaḥ_samāpatti grāhyeṇa_grah bījena_bīja saha_saha vartante_vṛt iti_iti sa_sa bījaḥ_bīja samādhiḥ_samādhi vitarka--_vitarka vicāra--_vicāra ānanda--_ānanda asmitā--_asmitā anugamāt_anugama samprajñātaḥ_samprajñā iti_iti prāk_prāk uktaḥ_vac sthūle_sthūla arthe_artha sa_sa vitarkaḥ_vitarka nirvitarkaḥ_nirvitarka sūkṣme_sūkṣma arthe_artha sa_sa vicāraḥ_vicāra nirvicāraḥ_nirvicāra iti_iti

tatra_tatra antimasya_antima phalam_phala ucyate_vac --nirvicāra--_nirvicāra vaiśāradye_vaiśāradya adhyātma--_adhyātma prasādaḥ_prasāda sthūla--_sthūla viṣaya--_viṣaya tve_tva tulye_tulya api_api sa_sa vitarkam_vitarka śabda--_śabda artha--_artha jñāna--_jñāna vikalpa--_vikalpa saṅkīrṇam_saṃkṛ apekṣya_apekṣ tad--_tad rahitasya_rahita nirvikalpaka--_nirvikalpaka rūpasya_rūpa prādhānyam_prādhānya tatas_tatas sūkṣma--_sūkṣma viṣayasya_viṣaya sa_sa vikalpaka--_vikalpaka pratibhāsa--_pratibhāsa rūpasya_rūpa sa_sa vicārasya_vicāra tatas_tatas api_api sūkṣma--_sūkṣma viṣayasya_viṣaya nirvikalpaka--_nirvikalpaka pratibhāsa--_pratibhāsa rūpasya_rūpa nirvicārasya_nirvicāra prādhānyam_prādhānya tatra_tatra pūrveṣām_pūrva trayāṇām_tri nirvicāra--_nirvicāra artha--_artha tvāt_tva nirvicāra--_nirvicāra phalena_phala eva_eva phalavat--_phalavat tvam_tva nirvicārasya_nirvicāra tu_tu prakṛṣṭa--_prakṛṣṭa abhyāsa--_abhyāsa balāt_bala vaiśāradye_vaiśāradya rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas nabhibhūta--_nabhibhū sattva--_sattva udreke_udreka sati_as adhyātma--_adhyātma prasādaḥ_prasāda kleśa--_kleśa vāsanā--_vāsanā rahitasya_rahita cittasya_citta bhūta--_bhū artha--_artha viṣayaḥ_viṣaya krama--_krama ananurodhī_ananurodhin sphuṭaḥ_sphuṭa tathā_tathā ca_ca bhāṣyam_bhāṣya
prajñā--_prajñā prasādam_prasāda āruhya_āruh aśocyaḥ_aśocya śocataḥ_śuc janān_jana bhūmiṣṭhān_bhūmiṣṭha iva_iva śaila--_śaila sthaḥ_stha sarvān_sarva prājñaḥ_prājña anupaśyati_anupaś

ṛtaṃbharā_ṛtaṃbhara tatra_tatra prajñā_prajñā tatra_tatra tasmin_tad prajñā--_prajñā prasāde_prasāda sati_as samāhita--_samāhita cittasya_citta yoginaḥ_yogin yā_yad prajñā_prajñā jāyate_jan sā_tad ṛtam_ṛta bharā_bhara ṛtam_ṛta satyam_satya eva_eva bibharti_bhṛ na_na tatra_tatra viparyāsa--_viparyāsa gandhaḥ_gandha api_api asti_as iti_iti yogikī_yogika eva_eva iyam_idam samākhyā_samākhyā sā_tad ca_ca uttamaḥ_uttama yogaḥ_yoga tathā_tathā ca_ca bhāṣyam_bhāṣya
āgamena_āgama anumānena_anumāna dhyāna--_dhyāna abhyāsa--_abhyāsa rasena_rasa ca_ca tridhā_tridhā prakalpayan_prakalpay prajñām_prajñā labhate_labh yogam_yoga uttamam_uttama

sā_tad tu_tu śruta--_śruta anumāna--_anumāna prajñābhyām_prajñā anya--_anya viṣayā_viṣaya viśeṣa--_viśeṣa artha--_artha tvāt_tva śrutam_śruta āgama--_āgama vijñānānam_vijñānāna tad--_tad sāmānya--_sāmānya viṣayam_viṣaya eva_eva na_na hi_hi viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa saha_saha kasyacid_kaścit śabdasya_śabda saṅgatiḥ_saṃgati grahītum_grah śakyate_śak tathā_tathā anumānam_anumāna sāmānya--_sāmānya viṣayam_viṣaya eva_eva na_na hi_hi viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa saha_saha kasyacid_kaścit vyāptiḥ_vyāpti grahītum_grah śakyate_śak tasmāt_tasmāt śruta--_śru anumāna--_anumāna viṣayaḥ_viṣaya na_na viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa kaścid_kaścit asti_as na_na ca_ca asya_idam sūkṣma--_sūkṣma vyavahita--_vyavadhā viprakṛṣṭasya_viprakṛṣṭa vastunaḥ_vastu loka--_loka pratyakṣeṇa_pratyakṣa grahaṇam_grahaṇa asti_as kim_kim tu_tu samādhi--_samādhi prajñā--_prajñā nirgrāhyaḥ_nirgrah eva_eva sa_tad viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa bhavati_bhū bhūta--_bhūta sūkṣma--_sūkṣma gataḥ_gam vā_vā puruṣa--_puruṣa gataḥ_gam vā_vā tasmāt_tasmāt nirvicāra--_nirvicāra vaiśāradya--_vaiśāradya samudbhavāyām_samudbhava śruta--_śru anumāna--_anumāna vilakṣaṇāyām_vilakṣaṇa sūkṣma--_sūkṣma vyavahita--_vyavadhā prakṛṣṭa--_prakṛṣ sarva--_sarva viśeṣa--_viśeṣa viṣayāyām_viṣaya amṛtaṃbharāyām_amṛtaṃbhara eva_eva prajñāyām_prajñā yoginā_yogin mahān_mahat prayatnaḥ_prayatna āstheyaḥ_āsthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu kṣipta--_kṣip mūḍha--_muh vikṣipta--_vikṣip ākhya--_ākhya vyutthāna--_vyutthāna saṃskārāṇām_saṃskāra ekāgra--_ekāgra tāyām_tā api_api sa_sa vitarka--_vitarka nirvitarka--_nirvitarka sa_sa vicāra--_vicāra janānām_jana saṃskārāṇām_saṃskāra sat--_as bhāvāt_bhāva taiḥ_tad cālyamānasya_cālay cittasya_citta katham_katham nirvicāra--_nirvicāra vaiśāradya--_vaiśāradya pūrvaka--_pūrvaka adhyātma--_adhyātma prasāda--_prasāda labhya--_labh ṛtambharā_ṛtambharā prajñā_prajñā pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā syāt_as atas_atas āha_ah tad--_tad jaḥ_ja saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra anya--_anya saṃskāra--_saṃskāra pratibandhī_pratibandhin tayā_tad ṛtambharayā_ṛtambharā prajñayā_prajñā janitaḥ_janay yaḥ_yad prajñayā_prajñā janita--_janay tvena_tva balavat--_balavat tvāt_tva anyān_anya vyutthāna--_vyutthāna jān_ja samādhi--_samādhi jān_ja ca_ca saṃskārān_saṃskāra atattva--_atattva viṣaya--_viṣaya prajñā--_prajñā janita--_janay tvena_tva durbalān_durbala pratibadhnāti_pratibandh sva--_sva kārya--_kārya akṣamān_akṣama karoti_kṛ nāśyati_nāś iti_iti vā_vā teṣām_tad saṃskārāṇām_saṃskāra abhibhavāt_abhibhava tad--_tad prabhavāḥ_prabhava pratyayāḥ_pratyaya na_na bhavanti_bhū tatas_tatas samādhiḥ_samādhi upatiṣṭhate_upasthā tatas_tatas samādhi--_samādhi jā_ja prajñā_prajñā tatas_tatas prajñā--_prajñā kṛtāḥ_kṛ saṃskārāḥ_saṃskāra iti_iti navaḥ_nava navaḥ_nava saṃskāra--_saṃskāra āśayaḥ_āśaya vardhate_vṛdh tatas_tatas ca_ca prajñā_prajñā ca_ca saṃskārāḥ_saṃskāra iti_iti

nanu_nanu bhavatu_bhū vyutthāna--_vyutthāna saṃskārāṇām_saṃskāra atattva--_atattva viṣaya--_viṣaya prajñā--_prajñā janitānām_janay tattva--_tattva mātra--_mātra viṣaya--_viṣaya samprajñāta--_samprajñā samādhi--_samādhi prajñā--_prajñā prabhavaiḥ_prabhava saṃskāraiḥ_saṃskāra pratibandhaḥ_pratibandha teṣām_tad tu_tu saṃskārāṇām_saṃskāra pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka abhāvāt_abhāva samādhiḥ_samādhi syāt_as na_na tu_tu nirbījaḥ_nirbīja nirodha--_nirodha bhūmau_bhūmi iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah tasya_tad api_api nirodhe_nirodha sarva--_sarva nirodhāt_nirodha nirbījaḥ_nirbīja samādhiḥ_samādhi tasya_tad samprajñātasya_samprajñā samādheḥ_samādhi ekāgra--_ekāgra bhūmi--_bhūmi jasya_ja api_api śabdāt_śabda kṣipta--_kṣip mūḍha--_muh vikṣiptānām_vikṣip api_api nirodhe_nirodha yogi--_yogin prayatna--_prayatna viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa vilaye_vilaya sati_as sarva--_sarva nirodhāt_nirodha samādheḥ_samādhi samādhi--_samādhi jasya_ja saṃskārasya_saṃskāra api_api nirodhāt_nirodha nirbījaḥ_nirbīja nirālambanaḥ_nirālambana asaṃprajñāta--_asaṃprajñāta samādhiḥ_samādhi sa_tad ca_ca sa_sa upāyaḥ_upāya prāk_prāk sūtritaḥ_sūtray virāma--_virāma pratyaya--_pratyaya abhyāsa--_abhyāsa pūrvaḥ_pūrva saṃskāra--_saṃskāra śeṣaḥ_śeṣa anyaḥ_anya iti_iti viramyate_viram anena_idam iti_iti virāmaḥ_virāma vitarka--_vitarka vicāra--_vicāra ānanda--_ānanda asmitā--_asmitā ādi--_ādi rūpa--_rūpa cintā--_cintā tyāgaḥ_tyāga tasya_tad pratyayaḥ_pratyaya kāraṇam_kāraṇa param_para vairāgyam_vairāgya iti_iti yāvat_yāvat virāmaḥ_virāma ca_ca asau_adas pratyayaḥ_pratyaya citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa iti_iti vā_vā tasya_tad abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa paunaḥpunyena_paunaḥpunya cetasi_cetas niveśanam_niveśana tat_tad eva_eva pūrvam_pūrva kāraṇam_kāraṇa yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā saṃskāra--_saṃskāra mātra--_mātra śeṣaḥ_śeṣa sarvathā_sarvathā nivṛttikaḥ_nivṛttika anyaḥ_anya pūrva--_pūrva uktāt_vac sa_sa bījāt_bīja vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa nirbījaḥ_nirbīja asamprajñātasya_asamprajñāta hi_hi samādheḥ_samādhi dvau_dvi upāyau_upāya uktau_vac abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa vairāgyam_vairāgya ca_ca tatra_tatra sālambana--_sālambana tvāt_tva abhyāsasya_abhyāsa na_na nirālambana--_nirālambana samādhi--_samādhi hetutvam_hetutva ghaṭate_ghaṭ iti_iti nirālambanam_nirālambana param_para vairāgyam_vairāgya eva_eva hetutvena_hetutva ucyate_vac abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa tu_tu samprajñāta--_samprajñā samādhi--_samādhi dvārā_dvār praṇāḍyā_praṇāḍī upayujyate_upayuj sādhana--_sādhana koṭau_koṭi ca_ca samādhi--_samādhi śabdena_śabda abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa eva_eva ucyate_vac mukhyasya_mukhya samādheḥ_samādhi sādhya--_sādhay tvāt_tva tat_tad api_api bahiraṅgam_bahiraṅga nirbījasya_nirbīja nirbījasya_nirbīja tu_tu samādheḥ_samādhi tat_tad api_api trayam_traya bahiraṅgam_bahiraṅga paramparayā_paramparā upakāri_upakārin tasya_tad tu_tu param_para vairāgyam_vairāgya eva_eva antaraṅgam_antaraṅga iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

ayam_idam api_api dvividhaḥ_dvividha bhava--_bhava pratyayaḥ_pratyaya upāya--_upāya pratyayaḥ_pratyaya ca_ca bhava--_bhava pratyayaḥ_pratyaya videha--_videha prakṛti--_prakṛti layānām_laya videhānām_videha sa_sa ānandānām_ānanda prakṛti--_prakṛti layānām_laya ca_ca sa_sa asmitānām_asmita daivānām_daiva prāc--_prāñc vyākhyātānām_vyākhyā janma--_janman viśeṣāt_viśeṣa auṣadhi--_auṣadhi viśeṣāt_viśeṣa mantra--_mantra viśeṣāt_viśeṣa tapaḥ--_tapas viśeṣāt_viśeṣa vā_vā yaḥ_yad samādhiḥ_samādhi sa_tad bhava--_bhava pratyayaḥ_pratyaya bhavaḥ_bhava saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman viveka--_viveka abhāva--_abhāva rūpaḥ_rūpa pratyayaḥ_pratyaya kāraṇam_kāraṇa yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā janma--_janman mātra--_mātra hetukaḥ_hetuka vā_vā pakṣiṇām_pakṣin ākāśa--_ākāśa gamana--_gamana vat_vat punar_punar saṃsāra--_saṃsāra hetutvāt_hetutva mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu heyaḥ_hā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śraddhā--_śraddhā vīrya--_vīrya smṛti--_smṛti samādhi--_samādhi prajñā--_prajñā pūrvakaḥ_pūrvaka itareṣām_itara janma--_janman auṣadhi--_auṣadhi mantra--_mantra tapaḥ--_tapas siddha--_siddha vyatiriktānām_vyatiric ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman viveka--_viveka darśinām_darśin tu_tu yaḥ_yad samādhiḥ_samādhi sa_tad śraddhā--_śraddhā pūrvakaḥ_pūrvaka śraddhā--_śraddhā ādayaḥ_ādi pūrve_pūrva upāyāḥ_upāya yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā upāya--_upāya pratyayaḥ_pratyaya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

teṣu_tad śraddhā_śraddhā yoga--_yoga viṣaye_viṣaya cetasaḥ_cetas prasādaḥ_prasāda sā_tad hi_hi jananī_jananī iva_iva yoginam_yogin pāti_pā tatas_tatas śraddadhānasya_śraddhā viveka--_viveka arthinaḥ_arthin vīryam_vīrya utsāhaḥ_utsāha upajāyate_upajan samupajāta--_samupajan vīryasya_vīrya pāścātyāsu_pāścātya bhūmiṣu_bhūmi smṛtiḥ_smṛti utpadyate_utpad tad--_tad smaraṇāt_smaraṇa ca_ca cittam_citta an_an ākulam_ākula sat_as samādhīyate_samādhā samādhiḥ_samādhi atra_atra ekāgra--_ekāgra tā_tā samāhita--_samāhita cittasya_citta prajñā_prajñā bhāvya--_bhū gocarā_gocara vivekena_viveka jāyate_jan tad--_tad abhyāsāt_abhyāsa parāt_para ca_ca vairāgyāt_vairāgya bhavati_bhū asamprajñātaḥ_asamprajñāta samādhiḥ_samādhi mumukṣūṇām_mumukṣu iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pratikṣaṇa--_pratikṣaṇa pariṇāminaḥ_pariṇāmin hi_hi bhāvāḥ_bhāva ṛte_ṛte citi--_citi śakteḥ_śakti iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya tasyām_tad api_api sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodha--_nirodha avasthāyām_avasthā citta--_citta pariṇāma--_pariṇāma pravāhaḥ_pravāha tad--_tad janya--_jan saṃskāra--_saṃskāra pravāhaḥ_pravāha ca_ca bhavati_bhū eva_eva iti_iti abhipretya_abhipre

tasya_tad ca_ca saṃskārasya_saṃskāra prayojanam_prayojana uktam_vac tatas_tatas praśānta--_praśam vāhi--_vāhin tā_tā saṃskārāt_saṃskāra iti_iti praśānta--_praśam vāhi--_vāhin tā_tā nāma_nāma avṛttikasya_avṛttika cittasya_citta nirindhana--_nirindhana agni--_agni vat_vat pratiloma--_pratiloma pariṇāmena_pariṇāma upaśamaḥ_upaśama yathā_yathā samidh--_samidh ājya--_ājya ādi--_ādi āhuti--_āhuti prakṣepe_prakṣepa vahniḥ_vahni uttarottara--_uttarottara vṛddhyā_vṛddhi prajvalati_prajval samidh--_samidh ādi--_ādi kṣaye_kṣaya tu_tu prathama--_prathama kṣaṇe_kṣaṇa kiṃcid_kaścit śāmyati_śam uttara--_uttara uttara--_uttara kṣaṇeṣu_kṣaṇa tu_tu adhikam_adhika adhikam_adhika śāmyati_śam iti_iti krameṇa_krameṇa śāntiḥ_śānti vardhate_vṛdh tathā_tathā niruddha--_nirudh cittasya_citta uttarottara--_uttarottara adhikaḥ_adhika praśamaḥ_praśama pravahati_pravah tatra_tatra pūrva--_pūrva praśama--_praśama janitaḥ_janay saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra eva_eva uttarottara--_uttarottara praśamasya_praśama kāraṇam_kāraṇa tadā_tadā ca_ca nirindhana--_nirindhana agni--_agni vat_vat cittam_citta krameṇa_krameṇa upaśāmyat--_upaśam vyutthāna--_vyutthāna samādhi--_samādhi nirodha--_nirodha saṃskāraiḥ_saṃskāra saha_saha svasyām_sva prakṛtau_prakṛti līyate_lī tadā_tadā ca_ca samādhi--_samādhi paripāka--_paripāka prabhavena_prabhava vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya jena_ja samyak_samyak darśanena_darśana avidyāyām_avidyā nivṛttāyām_nivṛt tad--_tad hetuka--_hetuka dṛś--_dṛś dṛśya--_dṛś saṃyoga--_saṃyoga abhāvāt_abhāva vṛttau_vṛtti pañcavidhāyām_pañcavidha api_api nivṛttāyām_nivṛt svarūpa--_svarūpa pratiṣṭhaḥ_pratiṣṭhā ucyate_vac

sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhe_nirodha vṛtti--_vṛtti daśāyām_daśā tu_tu nitya--_nitya apariṇāmi--_apariṇāmin caitanya--_caitanya rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva tasya_tad sarva--_sarva dām_da śuddha--_śuddha tve_tva api_api anādinā_anādi dṛśya--_dṛś saṃyogena_saṃyoga āvidyakena_āvidyaka antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa tādātmya--_tādātmya adhyāsāt_adhyāsa antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa vṛtti--_vṛtti sārūpyam_sārūpya prāpnuvan_prāp

vṛtti--_vṛtti prādurbhāve_prādurbhāva etat_etad eva_eva vivṛttam_vivṛt draṣṭṛ--_draṣṭṛ dṛśya--_dṛśya uparaktam_uparañj cittam_citta sarva--_sarva artham_artha cittam_citta eva_eva draṣṭṛ--_draṣṭṛ dṛśya--_dṛśya uparaktam_uparañj viṣayi--_viṣayin viṣaya--_viṣaya nirbhāsam_nirbhāsa cetana--_cetana acetana--_acetana svarūpa--_svarūpa āpannam_āpad viṣaya--_viṣaya ātmakam_ātmaka api_api a_a viṣaya--_viṣaya sphaṭika--_sphaṭika maṇi--_maṇi kalpam_kalpa sarva--_sarva artham_artha iti_iti ucyate_vac tat_tad anena_idam citta--_citta sārūpyeṇa_sārūpya bhrāntāḥ_bhram kecid_kaścit tat_tad eva_eva cetanam_cetana iti_iti āhuḥ_ah tat_tad asaṃkhyeya--_asaṃkhyeya vāsanā--_vāsanā citram_citra api_api parārtham_parārtha saṃhatya_saṃhan kāri--_kārin tvāt_tva yasya_yad bhoga--_bhoga apavarga--_apavarga artham_artha tat_tad saḥ_tad eva_eva paraḥ_para cetanaḥ_cetana asaṃhataḥ_asaṃhata puruṣaḥ_puruṣa na_na tu_tu ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādi--_ādi vat_vat saṃhatya_saṃhan kāri_kārin cittam_citta cetanam_cetana iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam ca_ca viśeṣa--_viśeṣa darśiṇaḥ_darśin ātma--_ātman bhāva--_bhāva bhāvanā--_bhāvanā vinivṛttiḥ_vinivṛtti evam_evam yaḥ_yad antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa puruṣayoḥ_puruṣa viśeṣa--_viśeṣa darśī_darśin tasya_tad yā_yad antaḥkaraṇe_antaḥkaraṇa prāk_prāk aviveka--_aviveka vaśāt_vaśa ātma--_ātman bhāva--_bhāva bhāvanā_bhāvanā āsīt_as sā_tad nivartate_nivṛt bheda--_bheda darśane_darśana sati_as abheda--_abheda bhrama--_bhrama anupapatteḥ_anupapatti

sattva--_sattva puruṣayoḥ_puruṣa viśeṣa--_viśeṣa darśanam_darśana ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant arpita--_arpay niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman sādhyam_sādhay tad--_tad liṅgam_liṅga ca_ca yoga--_yoga bhāṣye_bhāṣya darśitam_darśay yathā_yathā prāvṛṣi_prāvṛṣ tṛṇa--_tṛṇa aṅkurasya_aṅkura udbhedena_udbheda tad--_tad bīja--_bīja sattā_sattā anumīyate_anumā mokṣa--_mokṣa mārga--_mārga śravaṇena_śravaṇa siddhānta--_siddhānta ruci--_ruci vaśāt_vaśa yasya_yad loma--_loman harṣa--_harṣa aśru--_aśru pātau_pāta dṛśyete_dṛś tatra_tatra api_api asti_as viśeṣa--_viśeṣa darśana--_darśana bījam_bīja anumīyate_anumā yasya_yad tu_tu tādṛśam_tādṛśa karma--_karman bījam_bīja na_na asti_as tasya_tad mokṣa--_mokṣa mārga--_mārga śravaṇe_śravaṇa pūrva--_pūrva pakṣa--_pakṣa yuktiṣu_yukti ruciḥ_ruci bhavati_bhū aruciḥ_aruci ca_ca siddhānta--_siddhānta yuktiṣu_yukti tasya_tad kaḥ_ka aham_mad āsam_as katham_katham aham_mad āsam_as iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi ātma--_ātman bhāva--_bhāva bhāvanā_bhāvanā svābhāvikī_svābhāvika pravartate_pravṛt sā_tad tu_tu viśeṣa--_viśeṣa darśinaḥ_darśin nivartate_nivṛt iti_iti

evam_evam sati_as kim_ka syāt_as iti_iti tat_tad āha_ah tadā_tadā viveka--_viveka nimnam_nimna kaivalya--_kaivalya prāc--_prāñc bhāram_bhāra cittam_citta nimnam_nimna jala--_jala pravahaṇa--_pravahaṇa yogyaḥ_yogya nīca--_nīca deśaḥ_deśa prāc--_prāñc bhāraḥ_bhāra tad--_tad ayogyaḥ_ayogya ucca--_ucca pradeśaḥ_pradeśa cittam_citta ca_ca sarvadā_sarvadā pravartamāna--_pravṛt vṛtti--_vṛtti pravāheṇa_pravāha pravahat--_pravah jala--_jala tulyam_tulya tat_tad prāk_prāk ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman aviveka--_aviveka rūpa--_rūpa vimārga--_vimārga vāhi--_vāhin viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga paryantam_paryanta asya_idam āsīt_as adhunā_adhunā tu_tu ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman viveka--_viveka mārga--_mārga vāhi--_vāhin kaivalya--_kaivalya paryantam_paryanta sampadyate_sampad iti_iti asmin_idam ca_ca viveka--_viveka vāhini_vāhin citte_citta ye_yad antarāyāḥ_antarāya te_tad sa_sa hetukāḥ_hetuka nivartanīyāḥ_nivṛt iti_iti āha_ah sūtrābhyām_sūtra tad--_tad chidreṣu_chidra pratyaya--_pratyaya antarāṇi_antara saṃskārebhyaḥ_saṃskāra hānam_hāna eṣām_idam kleśa--_kleśa vat_vat uktam_vac tasmin_tad viveka--_viveka vāhini_vāhin citte_citta chidreṣu_chidra antarāleṣu_antarāla pratyaya--_pratyaya antarāṇi_antara vyutthāna--_vyutthāna rūpāṇi_rūpa aham_mad mama_mad iti_iti evaṃrūpāṇi_evaṃrūpa vyutthāna--_vyutthāna anubhava--_anubhava jebhyaḥ_ja saṃskārebhyaḥ_saṃskāra kṣīyamāṇbhyaḥ_kṣi api_api prādurbhavanti_prādurbhū eṣām_idam ca_ca saṃskārāṇām_saṃskāra kleśānām_kleśa iva_iva hānam_hāna uktam_vac yathā_yathā kleśāḥ_kleśa avidyā--_avidyā ādayaḥ_ādi jñāna--_jñāna agninā_agni dagdha--_dah bīja--_bīja bhāvā_bhāva ca_ca punar_punar citta--_citta bhūmau_bhūmi praroham_praroha prāpnuvanti_prāp tathā_tathā jñāna--_jñāna agninā_agni dagdha--_dah bīja--_bīja bhāvāḥ_bhāva saṃskārāḥ_saṃskāra pratyaya--_pratyaya antarāṇi_antara na_na praroḍhum_praruh arhanti_arh jñāna--_jñāna agni--_agni saṃskārāḥ_saṃskāra tu_tu yāvat_yāvat cittam_citta anuśerate_anuśī iti_iti

evam_evam ca_ca pratyaya--_pratyaya antara--_antara anudayena_anudaya viveka--_viveka vāhini_vāhin citte_citta sthirībhūte_sthirībhū sati_as prasaṃkhyāne_prasaṃkhyāna api_api akusīdasya_akusīda sarvathā_sarvathā viveka--_viveka khyāteḥ_khyāti dharma--_dharma meghaḥ_megha samādhiḥ_samādhi prasaṅkhyānam_prasaṅkhyāna sattva--_sattva puruṣa--_puruṣa anya--_anya tā--_tā khyātiḥ_khyāti yāvat_yāvat tatra_tatra buddheḥ_buddhi sāttvike_sāttvika pariṇāme_pariṇāma kṛta--_kṛ saṃyamasya_saṃyama sarveṣām_sarva guṇa--_guṇa pariṇāmānām_pariṇāma svāmi--_svāmin vat_vat ākramaṇam_ākramaṇa sarva--_sarva adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ tvam_tva teṣām_tad eva_eva ca_ca śānta--_śam udita--_udi avyapadeśya--_avyapadeśya dharmi--_dharmin tvena_tva sthitānām_sthā yathāvat_yathāvat tat_tad etat_etad ucyate_vac tasmin_tad prasaṅkhyāne_prasaṅkhyāna sati_as api_api akusīdasya_akusīda phalam_phala alipsoḥ_alipsu pratyaya--_pratyaya antarāṇām_antara anudaye_anudaya sarva--_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra viveka--_viveka khyāteḥ_khyāti paripoṣāt_paripoṣa dharma--_dharma meghaḥ_megha samādhiḥ_samādhi bhavati_bhū

lg.l: ijyā--_ijyā ācāra--_ācāra dama--_dama ahiṃsā--_ahiṃsā dāna--_dāna svādhyāya--_svādhyāya karmaṇām_karman
ayam_idam tu_tu paramaḥ_parama dharmaḥ_dharma yat_yad yogena_yoga ātma--_ātman darśanam_darśana iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti

div.p: dharmam_dharma pratyak--_pratyañc brahma--_brahman aikya--_aikya sākṣātkāram_sākṣātkāra mehati_mih siñcati_sic iti_iti dharma--_dharma meghaḥ_megha tattva--_tattva sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatas_tatas dharma--_dharma meghāt_megha samādheḥ_samādhi dharmāt_dharma vā_vā kleśānām_kleśa pañca--_pañcan vidhānām_vidha avidyā--_avidyā asmitā--_asmitā rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa abhiniveśānām_abhiniveśa karmaṇām_karman ca_ca kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa śukla--_śukla kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa śukla--_śukla bhedena_bheda trividhānām_trividha avidyā--_avidyā mūlānām_mūla avidyā--_avidyā kṣaye_kṣaya kaivalyam_kaivalya bhavati_bhū kāraṇa--_kāraṇa nivṛttyā_nivṛtti kārya--_kārya nivṛtteḥ_nivṛtti ātyantikāyāḥ_ātyantika ucitatvāt_ucitatva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

evam_evam sthite_sthā yuñjan_yuj eva_eva sat--_sat ātmānam_ātman iti_iti anena_idam samprajñātaḥ_samprajñā samādhiḥ_samādhi ekāgra--_ekāgra bhūmau_bhūmi uktaḥ_vac niyata--_niyam mānasaḥ_mānasa iti_iti anena_idam tad--_tad phala--_phala bhūtaḥ_bhū asamprajñāta--_asamprajñāta samādhiḥ_samādhi nirodha--_nirodha bhūmau_bhūmi uktaḥ_vac śāntim_śānti iti_iti nirodha--_nirodha samādhi--_samādhi ja--_ja saṃskāra--_saṃskāra phala--_phala bhūtā_bhū praśānta--_praśam vāhitā_vāhitā nirvāṇa--_nirvāṇa paramam_parama iti_iti dharma--_dharma meghasya_megha samādheḥ_samādhi tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna dvārā_dvār kaivalya--_kaivalya hetutvam_hetutva mad--_mad saṃsthām_saṃsthā iti_iti anena_idam aupaniṣada--_aupaniṣada abhimatam_abhiman kaivalyam_kaivalya darśitam_darśay yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam mahā--_mahat phalaḥ_phala yogaḥ_yoga tasmāt_tasmāt tam_tad mahatā_mahat prayatnena_prayatna sampādayet_sampāday iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

yatas_yatas niyata--_niyam mānasaḥ_mānasa viṣaya--_viṣaya uparata--_uparam cittaḥ_citta nirvāṇaḥ_nirvāṇa mokṣaḥ_mokṣa eva_eva paramaḥ_parama prāpyaḥ_prāp yasyām_yad mayi_mad eva_eva nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa brahmaṇi_brahman samyak_samyak sthā_sthā sthitiḥ_sthiti yasyām_yad tām_tad śāntim_śānti saṃsāra--_saṃsāra uparatim_uparati prāpnoti_prāp

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam āsīnasya_ās kim_ka syāt_as tat_tad āha_ah yuñjan_yuj iti_iti yogī_yogin sadā_sadā pratidinam_pratidinam ātmānam_ātman yuñjan_yuj arpayan_arpay niyata--_niyam mānasaḥ_mānasa mad--_mad sparśa--_sparśa pariśuddha--_pariśudh tayā_tā niyatam_niyam niścalam_niścala mānasam_mānasa cittam_citta yasya_yad sa_tad mad--_mad saṃsthām_saṃsthā mad--_mad adhīnām_adhīna nirvāṇa--_nirvāṇa paramām_parama śāntim_śānti adhigacchati_adhigam labhate_labh tam_tad eva_eva viditvā_vid atimṛtyum_atimṛtyu eti_i iti_iti ādi_ādi śravaṇāt_śravaṇa nirvāṇa--_nirvāṇa paramām_parama mokṣa--_mokṣa avadhikām_avadhika iti_iti siddhayaḥ_siddhi api_api yoga--_yoga phalāni_phala iti_iti uktam_vac
BhG 6.16

lg.l: na_na atyaśnataḥ_atyaś tu_tu yogaḥ_yoga asti_as na_na ca_ca ekāntam_ekāntam an_an aśnataḥ_aś
na_na ca_ca ati_ati svapna--_svapna śīlasya_śīla jāgrataḥ_jāgṛ na_na eva_eva ca_ca arjuna_arjuna

div.p: āha_ah atyantam_atyantam adhikam_adhika bhuñjānasya_bhuj ekāntam_ekāntam atyantam_atyantam abhuñjānasya_abhuñjāna api_api yogaḥ_yoga samādhiḥ_samādhi na_na bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā ati_ati nidrā--_nidrā śīlasya_śīla ati_ati jāgrataḥ_jāgṛ ca_ca yogaḥ_yoga na_na eva_eva asti_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam yoga--_yoga abhyāsa--_abhyāsa niṣṭhasya_niṣṭha āhāra--_āhāra ādi--_ādi niyamam_niyama āha_ah na_na ati_ati aśanataḥ_aśana iti_iti dvyābhyām_dvi yat_yad bhuktam_bhuj sat_as jīryati_jṛ śarīrasya_śarīra ca_ca kārya--_kārya kṣamatām_kṣamatā sampādayati_sampāday tad--_tad ātma--_ātman saṃmitam_saṃmā annam_anna tat_tad atikramya_atikram lobhena_lobha adhikam_adhika aśnataḥ_aś na_na yogaḥ_yoga asti_as ajīrṇa--_ajīrṇa doṣeṇa_doṣa vyādhi--_vyādhi pīḍita--_pīḍay tvāt_tva na_na ca_ca ekāntam_ekāntam an_an aśnataḥ_aś yogaḥ_yoga asti_as anāhārāt_anāhāra ati_ati alpa--_alpa āhārāt_āhāra vā_vā rasa--_rasa poṣaṇa--_poṣaṇa abhāvena_abhāva śarīrasya_śarīra kārya--_kārya akṣama--_akṣama tvāt_tva yat_yad u_u ha_ha vai_vai ātma--_ātman saṃmitam_saṃmā annam_anna tat_tad avati_av tat_tad na_na hinasti_hiṃs yat_yad bhūyas_bhūyas hinasti_hiṃs tat_tad yat_yad kanīyaḥ_kanīyas annam_anna na_na tat_tad avati_av iti_iti śatapatha--_śatapatha śruteḥ_śruti tasmāt_tasmāt yogī_yogin na_na ātma--_ātman saṃmitāt_saṃmā annāt_anna adhikam_adhika nyūnam_nyūna vā_vā aśnīyāt_aś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: pūrayet_pūray aśanena_aśana ardham_ardha tṛtīyam_tṛtīya udakena_udaka tu_tu
vāyoḥ_vāyu saṅcaraṇa--_saṃcaraṇa artham_artha tu_tu caturtham_caturtha avaśeṣayet_avaśeṣay

div.p: iti_iti ādi_ādi yoga--_yoga śāstra--_śāstra ukta--_vac parimāṇāt_parimāṇa adhikam_adhika nyūnam_nyūna vā_vā aśnataḥ_aś yogaḥ_yoga na_na sampadyate_sampad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā atinidrā--_atinidrā śīlasya_śīla atijāgrataḥ_atijāgṛ ca_ca yogaḥ_yoga na_na eva_eva asti_as he_he arjuna_arjuna sa_sa avadhāḥ_avadhā bhava_bhū iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

lg.l: na_na ādhmātaḥ_ādham kṣudhitaḥ_kṣudh śrāntaḥ_śram na_na ca_ca vyākula--_vyākula cetanaḥ_cetanā
yuñjīta_yuj yogam_yoga rāja--_rājan indra_indra yogī_yogin siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha ātmanaḥ_ātman

div.p: na_na ati_ati śīte_śīta na_na ca_ca eva_eva uṣṇe_uṣṇa na_na dvandve_dvaṃdva na_na anila--_anila anvite_anvita kāleṣu_kāla eteṣu_etad yuñjīta_yuj na_na yogam_yoga dhyāna--_dhyāna tad--_tad paraḥ_para iti_iti ādi_ādi
āha_ah atyaśanataḥ_atyaśana _
pūrayet_pūray aśanena_aśana ardham_ardha tṛtīyam_tṛtīya udakena_udaka tu_tu vāyoḥ_vāyu saṅcaraṇa--_saṃcaraṇa artham_artha tu_tu caturtham_caturtha avaśeṣayet_avaśeṣay iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva yogam_yoga abhyasyataḥ_abhyas bhojana--_bhojana ādi--_ādi niyamam_niyama āha_ah na_na ati_ati iti_iti dvyābhyām_dvi atyaśanam_atyaśana anatyaśanam_anatyaśana ca_ca ati_ati svāpaḥ_svāpa ati_ati jāgaraḥ_jāgara ca_ca yoga--_yoga virodhi--_virodhin ati_ati vihāra--_vihāra ādi_ādi ca_ca uttarāt_uttarāt
BhG 6.17

lg.l: yukta--_yuj āhāra--_āhāra vihārasya_vihāra yukta--_yukta ceṣṭasya_ceṣṭā karmasu_karman
yukta--_yuj svapna--_svapna avabodhasya_avabodha yogaḥ_yoga bhavati_bhū duḥkha--_duḥkha hā_han

div.p: bhavati_bhū āha_ah yuktaḥ_yuj niyataḥ_niyam āhāraḥ_āhāra vihāraḥ_vihāra ca_ca gatiḥ_gati yasya_yad karmasu_karman kāryeṣu_kārya yuktā_yuj niyatā_niyam ceṣṭā_ceṣṭā yasya_yad yuktau_yuj niyatau_niyam svapna--_svapna avabodhau_avabodha nidrā--_nidrā jāgarau_jāgara yasya_yad tasya_tad duḥkha--_duḥkha nivartakaḥ_nivartaka yogaḥ_yoga bhavati_bhū sidhyati_sidh

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam āhāra--_āhāra ādi--_ādi niyama--_niyama virahinaḥ_virahin yoga--_yoga vyatirekam_vyatireka uktvā_vac tad--_tad niyamavataḥ_niyamavat yoga--_yoga anvayam_anvaya āha_ah yukta--_yuj āhāraḥ_āhāra iti_iti āhriyate_āhṛ iti_iti āhāraḥ_āhāra annam_anna viharaṇam_viharaṇa vihāraḥ_vihāra pāda--_pāda kramaḥ_krama tau_tad yuktau_yuj niyata--_niyam parimāṇau_parimāṇa yasya_yad tathā_tathā anyeṣu_anya api_api praṇava--_praṇava japa--_japa upaniṣad--_upaniṣad āvartana--_āvartana ādiṣu_ādi karmasu_karman yuktā_yuj niyata--_niyam kālā_kāla ceṣṭā_ceṣṭā yasya_yad tathā_tathā svapnaḥ_svapna nidrā_nidrā avabodhaḥ_avabodha jāgaraṇam_jāgaraṇa tau_tad yuktau_yuj niyata--_niyam kālau_kāla yasya_yad tasya_tad yogaḥ_yoga bhavati_bhū sādhana--_sādhana pāṭavāt_pāṭava ātma--_ātman samādhiḥ_samādhi sidhyati_sidh na_na anyasya_anya evam_evam sampāditaḥ_sampāday yogaḥ_yoga kiṃphalaḥ_kiṃphala iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah duḥkha--_duḥkha hā_han iti_iti atra_atra āhārasya_āhāra niyata--_niyam tvam_tva

lg.l: ardham_ardha aśanasya_aśana vyañjanasya_vyañjana tṛtīyam_tṛtīya udakasya_udaka
vāyoḥ_vāyu saṃcāraṇa--_saṃcāraṇa artham_artha tu_tu caturtham_caturtha avaśeṣayet_avaśeṣay

div.p: iti_iti ādi_ādi prāk_prāk uktam_vac vihārasya_vihāra niyata--_niyam tvam_tva yoganāt_yogana na_na param_param gacchet_gam iti_iti ādi_ādi karmasu_karman ceṣṭāyāḥ_ceṣṭā niyata--_niyam tvam_tva vāc--_vāc ādi--_ādi cāpala--_cāpala parityāgaḥ_parityāga rātreḥ_rātri vibhāga--_vibhāga trayam_traya kṛtvā_kṛ prathama--_prathama anyayoḥ_anya jāgaraṇam_jāgaraṇa madhye_madhya svapanam_svapana iti_iti svapna--_svapna avabodhayoḥ_avabodha niyata--_niyam kāla--_kāla tvam_tva evam_evam anye_anya api_api yoga--_yoga śāstra--_śāstra uktāḥ_vac niyamāḥ_niyama draṣṭavyāḥ_dṛś

baladevaḥ_baladeva yukta--_yuj iti_iti mita--_mita āhāra--_āhāra vihārasya_vihāra karmasu_karman laukika--_laukika pāramārthika--_pāramārthika kṛtyeṣu_kṛtya mita--_mita vāc--_vāc ādi--_ādi vyāpārasya_vyāpāra mita--_mita svāpa--_svāpa jāgarasya_jāgara ca_ca sarva--_sarva duḥkha--_duḥkha nāśakaḥ_nāśaka yogaḥ_yoga bhavati_bhū tasmāt_tasmāt yogī_yogin tathā_tathā tathā_tathā vartate_vṛt
BhG 6.18

lg.l: yadā_yadā viniyatam_viniyam cittam_citta ātmani_ātman eva_eva avatiṣṭhate_avasthā
niḥspṛhaḥ_niḥspṛha sarva--_sarva kāmebhyaḥ_kāma yuktaḥ_yuj iti_iti ucyate_vac tadā_tadā

div.p: bhavati_bhū āha_ah viniyatam_viniyam viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa niruddham_nirudh sat--_sat cittam_citta ātmani_ātman eva_eva yadā_yadā niścalam_niścala tiṣṭhati_sthā kim_kim ca_ca sarva--_sarva kāmebhyaḥ_kāma aihika--_aihika āmuṣmika--_āmuṣmika bhogebhyaḥ_bhoga niḥspṛhaḥ_niḥspṛha vigata--_vigam tṛṣṇaḥ_tṛṣṇā bhavati_bhū tadā_tadā muktaḥ_muc prāpta--_prāp yogaḥ_yoga iti_iti ucyate_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam ekāgra--_ekāgra bhūmau_bhūmi samprajñātam_samprajñā samādhim_samādhi abhidhāya_abhidhā nirodha--_nirodha bhūmau_bhūmi asamprajñātam_asamprajñāta samādhim_samādhi vaktum_vac upakramate_upakram yadā_yadā iti_iti yadā_yadā yasmin_yad kāle_kāla para--_para vairāgya--_vairāgya vaśāt_vaśa viniyatam_viniyam viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa niyatam_niyam sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti śūnyatām_śūnyatā āpāditam_āpāday cittam_citta vigata--_vigam rajaḥ--_rajas tamaskam_tamaska antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa sattvam_sattva svaccha--_svaccha tvāt_tva sarva--_sarva viṣaya--_viṣaya ākāra--_ākāra grahaṇa--_grahaṇa sarvatas_sarvatas niruddha--_nirudh vṛttika--_vṛttika tvāt_tva ātmani_ātman eva_eva pratyak_pratyañc citi_cit anātma--_anātman anuparakte_anuparakta vṛtti--_vṛtti rāhitye_rāhitya api_api svatas_svatas siddhasya_sidh ātma--_ātman ākārasya_ākāra vārayitum_vāray aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva citeḥ_citi eva_eva prādhānyāt_prādhānya nyak--_nyāñc bhūtam_bhū sat_as avatiṣṭhate_avasthā tadā_tadā tasmin_tad sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodha--_nirodha kāle_kāla yuktaḥ_yuj samāhitaḥ_samāhita iti_iti ucyate_vac kaḥ_ka yaḥ_yad sarva--_sarva kāmebhyaḥ_kāma niḥspṛhaḥ_niḥspṛha nirgatā_nirgam doṣa--_doṣa darśanena_darśana sarvebhyaḥ_sarva dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya kāmebhyaḥ_kāma spṛhā_spṛhā tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā yasya_yad iti_iti param_para vairāgyam_vairāgya asamprajñāta--_asamprajñāta samādheḥ_samādhi antaraṅgam_antaraṅga sādhanam_sādhana uktam_vac tathā_tathā ca_ca vyākhyātam_vyākhyā prāk_prāk
bhavet_bhū āha_ah avatiṣṭhate_avasthā _

baladevaḥ_baladeva yogī_yogin niṣpanna--_niṣpad yogaḥ_yoga kadā_kadā syāt_as iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah yadā_yadā iti_iti yogam_yoga abhyasyataḥ_abhyas yoginaḥ_yogin cittam_citta yadā_yadā viniyatam_viniyam niruddham_nirudh sat--_sat ātmani_ātman eva_eva svasmin_sva eva_eva avasthitam_avasthā sthiram_sthira bhavati_bhū tad--_tad ātma--_ātman itara--_itara sarva--_sarva spṛhā--_spṛhā śūnyaḥ_śūnya yuktaḥ_yuj niṣpanna--_niṣpad yogaḥ_yoga kathyate_kathay
BhG 6.19

lg.l: yathā_yathā dīpaḥ_dīpa nivāta--_nivāta sthaḥ_stha na_na iṅgate_iṅg sā_tad upamā_upama smṛtā_smṛ
yoginaḥ_yogin yata--_yam cittasya_citta yuñjataḥ_yuj yogam_yoga ātmanaḥ_ātman

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara ātma--_ātman aikya--_aikya ākāra--_ākāra tayā_tā avasthitasya_avasthā cittasya_citta upamānam_upamāna āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti vāta--_vāta śūnye_śūnya deśe_deśa sthitaḥ_sthā dīpaḥ_dīpa yathā_yathā na_na iṅgate_iṅg na_na vicalati_vical sa_sa upamā_upamā dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta kasya_ka ātma--_ātman viṣayam_viṣaya yogam_yoga yuñjataḥ_yuj abhyasyataḥ_abhyas yoginaḥ_yogin yatam_yam niyatam_niyam cittam_citta yasya_yad tasya_tad niṣkampa--_niṣkampa tayā_tā prakāśaka--_prakāśaka tayā_tā ca_ca acañcalam_acañcala tat_tad cittam_citta tadvat_tadvat tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana samādhau_samādhi nivṛttikasya_nivṛttika cittasya_citta upamānam_upamāna āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti dīpa--_dīpa calana--_calana hetunā_hetu vātena_vāta rahite_rahita deśe_deśa sthitaḥ_sthā dīpaḥ_dīpa yathā_yathā calana--_calana hetu--_hetu abhāvāt_abhāva na_na iṅgate_iṅg na_na calati_cal sā_tad upamā_upamā smṛtā_smṛ sa_tad dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta cintitaḥ_cintay yoga--_yoga jñaiḥ_jña kasya_ka yoginaḥ_yogin ekāgra--_ekāgra bhūmau_bhūmi samprajñāta--_samprajñā samādhi--_samādhi mataḥ_man abhyāsa--_abhyāsa pāṭavāt_pāṭava yata--_yam cittasya_citta niruddha--_nirudh sarva--_sarva citta--_citta vṛtteḥ_vṛtti asamprajñāta--_asamprajñāta samādhi--_samādhi rūpam_rūpa yogam_yoga nirodha--_nirodha bhūmau_bhūmi yuñjataḥ_yuj anutiṣṭhataḥ_anuṣṭhā yaḥ_yad sattva--_sattva udrekeṇa_udreka prakāśaka--_prakāśaka tayā_tā ca_ca niścalaḥ_niścala dīpaḥ_dīpa dṛṣṭānte_dṛṣṭānta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

ātmanaḥ_ātman yogam_yoga yuñjate_yuj iti_iti vyākhyāne_vyākhyāna dārṣṭāntika--_dārṣṭāntika alābhaḥ_alābha sarva--_sarva avasthasya_avasthā api_api cittasya_citta sarvadā_sarvadā ātma--_ātman ākāra--_ākāra tayā_tā ātma--_ātman pada--_pada vaiyarthyam_vaiyarthya ca_ca na_na hi_hi yogena_yoga ātma--_ātman ākāra--_ākāra tā_tā cittasya_citta sampādyate_sampāday kintu_kintu svatas_svatas eva_eva ātma--_ātman ākārasya_ākāra sataḥ_as anātma--_anātman ākāra--_ākāra tā_tā nivartyate_nivartay iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt dārṣṭāntika--_dārṣṭāntika pratipādana--_pratipādana artham_artha eva_eva ātma--_ātman padam_pada yata--_yam cittasya_citta iti_iti bhāva--_bhāva paraḥ_para nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa karma--_karman dhārayaḥ_dhāraya vā_vā yatasya_yam cittasya_citta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nivāta--_nivāta sthaḥ_stha nirvāta--_nirvāta deśa--_deśa sthitaḥ_sthā dīpaḥ_dīpa na_na iṅgate_iṅg na_na calati_cal yaḥ_yad saḥ_tad eva_eva dīpaḥ_dīpa upamā_upamā yathā_yathā yathāvat_yathāvat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha saḥ_tad a_a ci_c lope_lopa ced_ced pāda--_pāda pūraṇam_pūraṇa iti_iti sandhiḥ_saṃdhi kasya_ka upamā_upamā iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva tadā_tadā yogī_yogin kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa bhavati_bhū iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti nirvāta--_nirvāta deśa--_deśa sthaḥ_stha dīpaḥ_dīpa na_na iṅgate_iṅg na_na calati_cal niścalaḥ_niścala sa_sa prabhaḥ_prabhā tiṣṭhati_sthā sa_tad dīpaḥ_dīpa yathā_yathā yathāvat_yathāvat upamā_upamā yoga--_yoga jñaiḥ_jña smṛtā_smṛ cintitā_cintay sā_tad upamā_upamā iti_iti atra_atra saḥ_tad a_a ci_c lope_lopa ced_ced pāda--_pāda pūraṇam_pūraṇa iti_iti sūtrāt_sūtra sandhiḥ_saṃdhi upamā--_upamā śabdena_śabda upamānam_upamāna bodhyam_budh kasya_ka iti_iti āha_ah yoginaḥ_yogin iti_iti yata--_yam cittasya_citta niruddha--_nirudh sarva--_sarva citta--_citta vṛtteḥ_vṛtti ātmanaḥ_ātman yogam_yoga dhyānam_dhyāna yuñjataḥ_yuj anutiṣṭhataḥ_anuṣṭhā nivṛtta--_nivṛt sakala--_sakala itara--_itara citta--_citta vṛttiḥ_vṛtti abhyudita--_abhyudi jñāna--_jñāna yogī_yogin niścala--_niścala sa_sa pradīpa--_pradīpa sadṛśaḥ_sadṛśa bhavati_bhū iti_iti

yatra_yatra uparamate_uparam cittam_citta niruddham_nirudh yoga--_yoga sevayā_sevā
yatra_yatra ca_ca eva_eva ātmanā_ātman ātmānam_ātman paśyan_dṛś ātmani_ātman tuṣyati_tuṣ
sukham_sukha ātyantikam_ātyantika yat_yad tat_tad buddhi--_buddhi grāhyam_grah atīndriyam_atīndriya
vetti_vid yatra_yatra na_na ca_ca eva_eva ayam_idam sthitaḥ_sthā calati_cal tattvataḥ_tattva

lg.l: yam_yad labdhvā_labh ca_ca aparam_apara lābham_lābha manyate_man na_na adhikam_adhika tatas_tatas
yasmin_yad sthitaḥ_sthā na_na duḥkhena_duḥkha guruṇā_guru api_api vicālyate_vicālay
tam_tad vidyāt_vid duḥkha--_duḥkha saṃyoga--_saṃyoga viyogam_viyoga yoga--_yoga saṃjñitam_saṃjñita
sa_tad niścayena_niścaya yoktavyaḥ_yuj yogaḥ_yoga anirviṇṇa--_anirviṇṇa cetasā_cetas

div.p: viddhi_vid na_na atyaśnataḥ_atyaś tu_tu yogaḥ_yoga asti_as iti_iti ādau_ādi tu_tu samādhiḥ_samādhi yoga--_yoga śabdena_śabda uktaḥ_vac tatra_tatra mukhyaḥ_mukhya yogaḥ_yoga kaḥ_ka iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā samādhim_samādhi eva_eva svarūpataḥ_svarūpa phalataḥ_phala ca_ca lakṣayan_lakṣay saḥ_tad eva_eva mukhyaḥ_mukhya yogaḥ_yoga iti_iti āha_ah yatra_yatra iti_iti sārdhaiḥ_sārdha tribhiḥ_tri yatra_yatra yasmin_yad avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣe_viśeṣa yoga--_yoga abhyāsena_abhyāsa niruddham_nirudh cittam_citta uparatam_uparam bhavati_bhū iti_iti yogasya_yoga svarūpa--_svarūpa lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa uktam_vac tathā_tathā ca_ca pātañjalam_pātañjala sūtram_sūtra yogaḥ_yoga citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhaḥ_nirodha iti_iti iṣṭa--_iṣ prāpti--_prāpti lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa phalena_phala tam_tad eva_eva lakṣayati_lakṣay yatra_yatra ca_ca yasmin_yad avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣe_viśeṣa ātmanā_ātman śuddhena_śudh manasā_manas ātmānam_ātman eva_eva paśyati_dṛś deha--_deha ādi_ādi paśyan_paś ca_ca ātmani_ātman eva_eva tuṣyati_tuṣ na_na tu_tu viṣayeṣu_viṣaya yatra_yatra iti_iti ādīnām_ādi yad--_yad chandānām_chanda tam_tad yoga--_yoga saṃjñitam_saṃjñita vidyāt_vid iti_iti caturthena_caturtha ślokena_śloka anvayaḥ_anvaya

ātmani_ātman eva_eva toṣe_toṣa hetum_hetu āha_ah sukham_sukha iti_iti yatra_yatra yasmin_yad avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣe_viśeṣa yat_yad tat_tad kim_ka api_api niratiśayam_niratiśaya ātyantikam_ātyantika nityam_nitya sukham_sukha vetti_vid nanu_nanu tadā_tadā viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya sambandha--_sambandha abhāvāt_abhāva kutas_kutas sukham_sukha syāt_as tatra_tatra āha_ah atīndriyam_atīndriya viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya sambandha--_sambandha atītam_atī kevalam_kevalam buddhyā_buddhi eva_eva ātma--_ātman ākāra--_ākāra tayā_tā grāhyam_grah ataeva_ataeva ca_ca yatra_yatra sthitaḥ_sthā san_as tattvataḥ_tattva ātma--_ātman svarūpāt_svarūpa na_na eva_eva calati_cal

acala--_acala tvam_tva eva_eva upapādayati_upapāday yam_yad iti_iti yam_yad ātma--_ātman sukha--_sukha rūpam_rūpa lābham_lābha labdhvā_labh tatas_tatas adhikam_adhika aparam_apara lābham_lābha na_na manyate_man tasya_tad eva_eva niratiśaya--_niratiśaya sukha--_sukha tvāt_tva yasmin_yad ca_ca sthitaḥ_sthā mahatā_mahat api_api śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi duḥkhena_duḥkha na_na vicālyate_vicālay na_na abhibhūyate_abhibhū etena_etad aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa nivṛtti--_nivṛtti phalena_phala api_api yogasya_yoga lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa uktam_vac draṣṭavyam_dṛś

tam_tad iti_iti yaḥ_yad evaṃ-bhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa tam_tad duḥkha--_duḥkha saṃyoga--_saṃyoga viyogam_viyoga yoga--_yoga saṃjñitam_saṃjñita vidyāt_vid duḥkha--_duḥkha śabdena_śabda duḥkha--_duḥkha miśritam_miśray vaiṣayikam_vaiṣayika sukham_sukha api_api gṛhyate_grah duḥkhasya_duḥkha saṃyogena_saṃyoga saṃsparśa--_saṃsparśa mātreṇa_mātra api_api viyogaḥ_viyoga yasmin_yad tam_tad avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣam_viśeṣa yoga--_yoga saṃjñitam_saṃjñita yoga--_yoga śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac jānīyāt_jñā paramātmānā_paramātman kṣetrajñasya_kṣetrajña yojanam_yojana yogaḥ_yoga yat_yat vā_vā duḥkha--_duḥkha saṃyogena_saṃyoga viyoge_viyoga eva_eva śūre_śūra kātara--_kātara śabda--_śabda vat_vat viruddha--_virudh lakṣaṇayā_lakṣaṇā yogaḥ_yoga ucyate_vac karmaṇi_karman tu_tu yoga--_yoga śabdaḥ_śabda tad--_tad upāya--_upāya tvāt_tva aupacārikaḥ_aupacārika eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam mahā--_mahat phalaḥ_phala yogaḥ_yoga tasmāt_tasmāt saḥ_tad eva_eva yatnataḥ_yatna abhyasanīyaḥ_abhyas iti_iti āha_ah tam_tad iti_iti sārdhena_sārdha sa_tad yogaḥ_yoga niścayena_niścaya śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadeśa--_upadeśa janitena_janay nirveda--_nirveda rahitena_rahita cetasā_cetas yoktavyaḥ_yuj duḥkha--_duḥkha buddhyā_buddhi prayatna--_prayatna śaithilyam_śaithilya nirvedaḥ_nirveda

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yatra_yatra yasmin_yad pariṇāma--_pariṇāma viśeṣe_viśeṣa yoga--_yoga sevayā_sevā yoga--_yoga abhyāsa--_abhyāsa pāṭavena_pāṭava jāte_jan sati_as niruddham_nirudh eka--_eka viṣayaka--_viṣayaka vṛtti--_vṛtti pravāha--_pravāha rūpām_rūpa ekāgra--_ekāgra tām_tā tyaktvā_tyaj nirindhana--_nirindhana agni--_agni vat_vat upaśāmyan_upaśam nirvṛttikatayā_nirvṛttikatā sarva--_sarva yatra_yatra ca_ca yasmin_yad ca_ca pariṇāme_pariṇāma sati_as ātmanā_ātman rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ_tamas anabhibhūta--_anabhibhūta śuddha--_śuddha sattva--_sattva mātreṇa_mātra antaḥkaraṇena_antaḥkaraṇa ātmānam_ātman pratyak--_pratyañc caitanyam_caitanya paramātma--_paramātman abhinnam_abhinna sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana anantam_ananta advitīyam_advitīya paśyan_dṛś sākṣātkurvan_sākṣātkṛ ātmani_ātman eva_eva parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda ghane_ghana tuṣyati_tuṣ na_na deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṃghāte_saṃghāta na_na vā_vā tad--_tad bhogye_bhogya anyatra_anyatra paramātma--_paramātman darśane_darśana sati_as atuṣṭi--_atuṣṭi hetu--_hetu abhāvāt_abhāva tuṣyati_tuṣ eva_eva iti_iti vā_vā tam_tad antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa pariṇāmam_pariṇāma sarva--_sarva citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodha--_nirodha rūpam_rūpa yogam_yoga vidyāt_vid iti_iti pareṇa_para anvayaḥ_anvaya yatra_yatra kālaḥ_kāla iti_iti tu_tu vyākhyānam_vyākhyāna asādhu_asādhu tad--_tad śabda--_śabda ananvayāt_ananvaya

ātmani_ātman eva_eva toṣe_toṣa hetum_hetu āha_ah sukham_sukha iti_iti yatra_yatra yasmin_yad avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣe_viśeṣa ātyantikam_ātyantika anantam_ananta niratiśayam_niratiśaya brahma--_brahman svarūpam_svarūpa atīndriyam_atīndriya viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya saṃyoga--_saṃyoga anabhivyaṅgyam_anabhivyaṅgya buddhi--_buddhi grāhyam_grah buddhyā_buddhi eva_eva rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas mala--_mala rahitayā_rahita sattva--_sattva mātra--_mātra vāhinyā_vāhin anubhavati_anubhū yatra_yatra ca_ca sthitaḥ_sthā ayam_idam vidvān_vidvas tattvataḥ_tattva ātma--_ātman svarūpāt_svarūpa na_na eva_eva calati_cal tam_tad yoga--_yoga saṃjñitam_saṃjñita vidyāt_vid iti_iti pareṇa_para anvayaḥ_anvaya samānaḥ_samāna

atra_atra ātyantikam_ātyantika iti_iti brahma--_brahman sukha--_sukha svarūpa--_svarūpa kathanam_kathana tasya_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya saṃyoga--_saṃyoga sāpekṣa--_sāpekṣa tvāt_tva buddhi--_buddhi grāhyam_grah iti_iti sauṣupta--_sauṣupta sukha--_sukha vyāvṛttiḥ_vyāvṛtti suṣuptau_suṣupti buddheḥ_buddhi līna--_lī tvāt_tva samādhau_samādhi nirvṛttikāyāḥ_nirvṛttika tasyāḥ_tad sattvāt_sattva tat_tad uktam_vac gauḍa--_gauḍa pādaiḥ_pāda līyate_lī tu_tu suṣuptau_suṣupti tat_tad nigṛhītam_nigrah na_na līyate_lī iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca śrūyate_śru

samādhi--_samādhi nirdhūta--_nirdhū malasya_mala cetasaḥ_cetas niveśitasya_niveśay ātmani_ātman yat_yad sukham_sukha bhavet_bhū na_na śakyate_śak varṇayitum_varṇay girā_gir tadā_tadā yat_yad etat_etad antaḥkaraṇena_antaḥkaraṇa gṛhyate_grah iti_iti

antaḥkaraṇena_antaḥkaraṇa niruddha--_nirudh sarva--_sarva vṛttikena_vṛttikā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha vṛttyā_vṛtti tu_tu sukha--_sukha āsvādanam_āsvādana gauḍa--_gauḍa ācāryaiḥ_ācārya tatra_tatra pratiṣiddham_pratiṣidh na_na āsvādayet_āsvāday sukham_sukha tatra_tatra niḥsaṅgam_niḥsaṅga prajñayā_prajñā bhavet_bhū iti_iti mahat_mahat idam_idam samādhau_samādhi sukham_sukha anubhavāmi_anubhū iti_iti sa_sa vikalpa--_vikalpa vṛtti--_vṛtti rūpā_rūpa prajñā_prajñā sukha--_sukha āsvādaḥ_āsvāda tam_tad vyutthāna--_vyutthāna rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva samādhi--_samādhi virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva yogī_yogin na_na kuryāt_kṛ ataeva_ataeva etādṛśyā_etādṛśa prajñayā_prajñā saha_saha saṅgam_saṅga parityajet_parityaj tām_tad nirundhyāt_nirudh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nirvṛttikena_nirvṛttika tu_tu cittena_citta sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa sukha--_sukha anubhavaḥ_anubhava taiḥ_tad pratipāditaḥ_pratipāday svastham_svastha śāntam_śam sa_sa nirvāṇa--_nirvāṇa kathyam_kathay sukham_sukha uttamam_uttama iti_iti spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa ca_ca etat_etad upariṣṭhāt_upariṣṭhāt kariṣyate_kṛ

yatra_yatra na_na ca_ca eva_eva ayam_idam sthitaḥ_sthā calati_cal tattvataḥ_tattva iti_iti uktam_vac upapādayati_upapāday yam_yad labdhvā_labh iti_iti yam_yad ca_ca niratiśaya--_niratiśaya ātmaka--_ātmaka sukha--_sukha vyañjakam_vyañjaka nirvṛttika--_nirvṛttika citta--_citta avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣam_viśeṣa labdhvā_labh santata--_saṃtata abhyāsa--_abhyāsa paripākena_paripāka sampādya_sampāday aparam_apara lābham_lābha tatas_tatas adhikam_adhika na_na manyate_man kṛtam_kṛ kṛtyam_kṛtya prāptam_prāp prāpaṇīyam_prāp iti_iti ātma--_ātman lābhāt_lābha ca_ca param_para vidyate_vid iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti evam_evam viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga vāsanayā_vāsanā samādheḥ_samādhi vicalanam_vicalana nā_na asti_as iti_iti uktvā_vac śīta--_śīta vāta--_vāta maśaka--_maśaka ādi--_ādi upadrava--_upadrava nivāraṇa--_nivāraṇa artham_artha api_api tat_tad nā_na asti_as iti_iti āha_ah yasmin_yad paramātma--_paramātman sukha--_sukha maye_maya nirvṛttika--_nirvṛttika citta--_citta avasthā--_avasthā śastra--_śastra nipāta--_nipāta ādi--_ādi nimittena_nimitta mahatā_mahat api_api duḥkhena_duḥkha na_na vicālyate_vicālay kim_kim uta_uta kṣudreṇa_kṣudra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

yatra_yatra uparamate_uparam iti_iti ārabhya_ārabh bahubhiḥ_bahu viśeṣaṇaiḥ_viśeṣaṇa yaḥ_yad nivṛttikaḥ_nivṛttika paramānanda--_paramānanda abhivyañjakaḥ_abhivyañjaka citta--_citta avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa uktaḥ_vac tam_tad citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodham_nirodha citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti maya--_maya sarva--_sarva duḥkha--_duḥkha virodhi--_virodhin tvena_tva viyoga--_viyoga śabda--_śabda artham_artha api_api virodhi--_virodhin lakṣaṇayā_lakṣaṇā yoga--_yoga śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac vidyāt_vid jānīyāt_jñā ca_ca tu_tu yoga--_yoga śabda--_śabda anurodhāt_anurodha kaṃcid_kaścit sambandham_sambandha pratipadyeta_pratipad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca bhagavān_bhagavat patañjaliḥ_patañjali asūtrayat_sūtray yogaḥ_yoga citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhaḥ_nirodha iti_iti yogaḥ_yoga bhavati_bhū duḥkha--_duḥkha hā_han iti_iti yat_yad prāk_prāk uktam_vac tat_tad etat_etad upasaṃhṛtam_upasaṃhṛ
evaṃbhūte_evaṃbhūta yoge_yoga niścaya--_niścaya anirvedayoḥ_anirveda sādhana--_sādhana tva--_tva vidhānāya_vidhāna āha_ah sa_tad niścayena_niścaya iti_iti sa_tad

yathā_yathā ukta--_vac phalaḥ_phala yogaḥ_yoga niścayena_niścaya śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya vacana--_vacana tātparya--_tātparya viṣayaḥ_viṣaya arthaḥ_artha satyaḥ_satya eva_eva iti_iti adhvayasāyena_adhvayasāya yoktavyaḥ_yuj abhyasanīyaḥ_abhyas anirviṇṇa--_anirviṇṇa cetasā_cetas etāvatā_etāvat api_api kālena_kāla yogaḥ_yoga na_na siddhaḥ_sidh kim_ka atas_atas param_para kaṣṭam_kaṣṭa iti_iti anutāpaḥ_anutāpa nirvedaḥ_nirveda tad--_tad rahitena_rahita cetasā_cetas iha_iha janmani_janman janmāntare_janmāntara vā_vā setsyati_sidh kim_ka tvarayā_tvarā iti_iti evam_evam dhairyam_dhairya uktena_vac manasā_manas iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad etat_etad gauḍa--_gauḍa pādāḥ_pāda udājahruḥ_udāhṛ
utsekaḥ_utseka udadheḥ_udadhi yadvat_yadvat kuśa--_kuśa agreāika--_agreāika bindunā_bindu manasaḥ_manas nigrahaḥ_nigraha tadvat_tadvat bhavet_bhū a_a parikhedataḥ_parikheda

utsekaḥ_utseka utsecanam_utsecana jala--_jala uddharaṇam_uddharaṇa iti_iti yāvat_yāvat sampradāya--_sampradāya vidaḥ_vid ākhyāyikām_ākhyāyikā ācakṣate_ācakṣ kasyacid_kaścit kila_kila pakṣiṇaḥ_pakṣin aṇḍāni_aṇḍa tīra--_tīra sthāni_stha taraṅga--_taraṃga vegena_vega sumudraḥ_sumudra apajahāra_apahṛ sa_tad ca_ca samudram_samudra śoṣayiṣāmi_śoṣay eva_eva iti_iti pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt sva--_sva mukha--_mukha agreṇa_agra ekaikam_ekaika jala--_jala bindum_bindu upari_upari pracikṣepa_prakṣip tadā_tadā ca_ca bahubhiḥ_bahu pakṣibhiḥ_pakṣin bandhu--_bandhu vargaiḥ_varga vāryamāṇaḥ_vāray api_api na_na eva_eva upararāma_uparam yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā ca_ca tatra_tatra āgatena_āgam nāradena_nārada nivāritaḥ_nivāray api_api asmin_idam janmani_janman janmāntare_janmāntara vā_vā yena_yad kena_ka api_api upāyena_upāya samudram_samudra śoṣayiṣyāmi_śoṣay eva_eva iti_iti pratijajñe_pratijñā tatas_tatas ca_ca daiva--_daiva ānukūlyāt_ānukūlya kṛpāluḥ_kṛpālu nāradaḥ_nārada garuḍam_garuḍa tad--_tad sāhāyyāya_sāhāyya preṣayāmāsa_preṣay samudraḥ_samudra tvad--_tvad jñāti--_jñāti droheṇa_droha tvām_tvad avamanyate_avaman iti_iti vacanena_vacana tatas_tatas garuḍa--_garuḍa pakṣa--_pakṣa vātena_vāta śuṣyan_śuṣ samudraḥ_samudra bhītaḥ_bhī tāni_tad aṇḍāni_aṇḍa tasmai_tad pakṣiṇe_pakṣin pradadau_pradā iti_iti evam_evam akhedena_akheda manaḥ--_manas nirodhe_nirodha parama--_parama dharme_dharma pravartamānam_pravṛt yoginam_yogin īśvaraḥ_īśvara anugṛhṇāti_anugrah tatas_tatas ca_ca pakṣiṇaḥ_pakṣin iva_iva tasya_tad abhimatam_abhimata sidhyati_sidh iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

atyaśnataḥ_atyaś asti_as sa_tad ca_ca saṃprajñātaḥ_samprajñā a_a saṃprajñātaḥ_samprajñā ca_ca sa_sa vitarka--_vitarka sa_sa vicāra--_vicāra bhedāt_bheda saṃprajñātaḥ_samprajñā bahu--_bahu vidhaḥ_vidha asaṃprajñāta--_asaṃprajñāta samādhi--_samādhi rūpaḥ_rūpa yogaḥ_yoga kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah yatra_yatra ityādi--_ityādi sārdhaiḥ_sārdha tribhiḥ_tri yatra_yatra samādhau_samādhi sati_as cittam_citta uparamate_uparam vastu--_vastu mātram_mātra eva_eva na_na spṛśati_spṛś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha hetuḥ_hetu niruddham_nirudh tathā_tathā ca_ca pātañjala--_pātañjala sūtram_sūtra yogaḥ_yoga citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhaḥ_nirodha iti_iti yatra_yatra ity-ādi--_ityādi padānām_pada yoga--_yoga saṃjñitam_saṃjñita vidyāt_vid iti_iti caturthena_caturtha anvayaḥ_anvaya ātmanā_ātman paramātma--_paramātman ākāra--_ākāra antaḥkaraṇena_antaḥkaraṇa ātmānam_ātman paśyan_dṛś tasmin_tad tuṣyati_tuṣ tatratyam_tatratya sukham_sukha prāpnoti_prāp yat_yad ātyantikam_ātyantika sukham_sukha prasiddham_prasidh ataeva_ataeva yatra_yatra sthitaḥ_sthā san_as tattvataḥ_tattva ātma--_ātman svarūpāt_svarūpa na_na eva_eva calati_cal ataeva_ataeva yam_yad lābham_lābha labdhvā_labh tatas_tatas sakāśāt_sakāśāt aparam_apara lābham_lābha adhikam_adhika na_na manyate_man duḥkhasya_duḥkha saṃyogena_saṃyoga sparśa--_sparśa mātreṇa_mātra api_api viyogaḥ_viyoga yasmin_yad tam_tad yoga--_yoga saṃjñtam_saṃjñā yoga--_yoga saṃjñām_saṃjñā prāptam_prāp samādhim_samādhi vidyāt_vid yadi_yadi api_api śīghram_śīghram na_na sidhyati_sidh tat_tad api_api ayam_idam me_mad yogaḥ_yoga saṃsetsyati_saṃsidh eva_eva iti_iti yaḥ_yad niścayaḥ_niścaya tena_tad anirviṇṇa--_anirviṇṇa cetasā_cetas etāvatā_etāvat api_api kālena_kāla yogaḥ_yoga na_na siddhaḥ_sidh kim_ka atas_atas param_para kaṣṭena_kaṣṭa iti_iti anutāpaḥ_anutāpa nirvedaḥ_nirveda tad--_tad rahitena_rahita cetasā_cetas iha_iha janmani_janman janmāntare_janmāntara vā_vā sidhyatu_sidh kim_ka me_mad tvarayā_tvarā iti_iti dhairya--_dhairya yuktena_yuj manasā_manas iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad etat_etad gauḍa--_gauḍa pādāḥ_pāda udājahruḥ_udāhṛ
utsekaḥ_utseka udadheḥ_udadhi yadvat_yadvat kuśa--_kuśa agreāika--_agreāika bindunā_bindu manasaḥ_manas nigrahaḥ_nigraha tadvat_tadvat bhavet_bhū a_a parikhedataḥ_parikheda

utsekaḥ_utseka utsecanam_utsecana śoṣaṇa--_śoṣaṇa adhyavasāyena_adhyavasāya jala--_jala uddharaṇam_uddharaṇa iti_iti yāvat_yāvat atra_atra kācid_kaścit ākhyāyikā_ākhyāyikā asti_as kasyacid_kaścit kila_kila pakṣiṇaḥ_pakṣin aṇḍāni_aṇḍa tīra--_tīra sthitāni_sthā taraṅga--_taraṃga vegena_vega sumudraḥ_sumudra jahāra_hṛ sa_tad ca_ca samudram_samudra śoṣayiṣāmi_śoṣay iti_iti eva_eva iti_iti pratijñāya_pratijñā sva--_sva mukha--_mukha agreṇa_agra ekaikam_ekaika jala--_jala bindum_bindu upari_upari pracikṣepa_prakṣip tam_tad ca_ca bahubhiḥ_bahu pakṣibhiḥ_pakṣin bandhubhiḥ_bandhu yuktyā_yukti vāryamāṇaḥ_vāray api_api nā_na evā_eva upararāma_uparam yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā ca_ca tatra_tatra āgatena_āgam nāradena_nārada nivāritaḥ_nivāray api_api asmin_idam janmani_janman janmāntare_janmāntara vā_vā samudram_samudra śoṣayiṣyāmi_śoṣay eva_eva iti_iti tad--_tad agre_agra api_api punar_punar pratijajñe_pratijñā tatas_tatas ca_ca daiva--_daiva ānukūlyāt_ānukūlya kṛpāluḥ_kṛpālu nāradaḥ_nārada garuḍam_garuḍa tad--_tad sāhāyyāya_sāhāyya preṣayāmāsa_preṣay samudraḥ_samudra tvadīya--_tvadīya jñāti--_jñāti droheṇa_droha tvām_tvad avamanyate_avaman iti_iti vākyena_vākya tatas_tatas garuḍa--_garuḍa pakṣa--_pakṣa vātena_vāta śuṣyan_śuṣ samudraḥ_samudra
ati_ati bhītaḥ_bhī tāni_tad aṇḍāni_aṇḍa tasmai_tad pakṣiṇe_pakṣin dadau_dā iti_iti
evam_evam eva_eva śāstra--_śāstra vacana--_vacana āstikyena_āstikya yoge_yoga jñāne_jñāna bhaktau_bhakti vā_vā pravartamānam_pravṛt utsāhavantam_utsāhavat adhyavasāyinam_adhyavasāyin janam_jana bhagavān_bhagavant eva_eva anugṛhṇāti_anugrah iti_iti niścetavyam_niści

lakṣayati_lakṣay yad--_yad śabdānām_śabda tam_tad vidyāt_vid yoga--_yoga saṃjñitam_saṃjñita iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara anvayaḥ_anvaya sevayā_sevā abhyāsena_abhyāsa niruddham_nirudh nivṛtta--_nivṛt itara--_itara vṛttikam_vṛttikā cittam_citta yatra_yatra uparamate_uparam mahat_mahat sukham_sukha etat_etad iti_iti sajjati_sañj na_na tu_tu deha--_deha ādi_ādi paśyan_dṛś viṣayeṣu_viṣaya iti_iti citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhena_nirodha svarūpeṇa_svarūpa iṣṭa--_iṣ prāpti--_prāpti lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa phalena_phala ca_ca yogaḥ_yoga darśitaḥ_darśay sukham_sukha iti_iti yatra_yatra samādhau_samādhi yat_yad tat_tad prasiddham_prasidh ātyantikam_ātyantika nityam_nitya sukham_sukha vetti_vid anubhavati_anubhū atīndriyam_atīndriya viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya sambandha--_sambandha rahitam_rahita buddhi--_buddhi ātma--_ātman ākārayā_ākāra grāhyam_grah ataeva_ataeva yatra_yatra sthitaḥ_sthā tattvataḥ_tattva ātma--_ātman svarūpāt_svarūpa nā_na eva_eva calati_cal yam_yad yogam_yoga labdhvā_labh eva_eva tatas_tatas aparam_apara lābham_lābha adhikam_adhika na_na manyate_man guruṇā_guru guṇavat_guṇavat putra--_putra viccheda--_viccheda ādinā_ādi na_na vicāyate_vicāy tam_tad iti_iti duḥkha--_duḥkha saṃyogasya_saṃyoga viyogaḥ_viyoga pradhvaṃsaḥ_pradhvaṃsa yatra_yatra tam_tad yoga--_yoga saṃjñtam_saṃjñā samādhim_samādhi
BhG 6.24

lg.l: saṃkalpa--_saṃkalpa prabhavān_prabhava kāmān_kāma tyaktvā_tyaj sarvān_sarva aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas
manasā_manas eva_eva indriya--_indriya grāmam_grāma viniyamya_viniyam samantataḥ_samantataḥ

div.p: saṃkalpāt_saṃkalpa prabhavaḥ_prabhava yeṣām_yad tān_tad yoga--_yoga pratikūlān_pratikūla sarvān_sarva kāmān_kāma aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas sa_sa vāsanān_vāsanā tyaktvā_tyaj manasā_manas eva_eva viṣaya--_viṣaya doṣa--_doṣa darśinā_darśin sarvatas_sarvatas prasarantam_prasṛ indriya--_indriya samūham_samūha viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa niyamya_niyam yogaḥ_yoga yoktavyaḥ_yuj iti_iti pūrveṇa_pūrva anvayaḥ_anvaya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka ca_ca kṛtvā_kṛ yogaḥ_yoga abhyasnīyaḥ_abhyas saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa duṣṭeṣu_duṣ api_api viṣayeṣu_viṣaya aśobhana--_aśobhana tva--_tva adarśanena_adarśana śobhana--_śobhana adhyāsaḥ_adhyāsa tasmāt_tad ca_ca saṅkalpāt_saṃkalpa idam_idam me_mad syāt_as idam_idam me_mad syāt_as iti_iti evaṃrūpāḥ_evaṃrūpa kāmāḥ_kāma prabhavanti_prabhū tān_tad śobhana--_śobhana adhyāsa--_adhyāsa prabhavān_prabhava viṣaya--_viṣaya abhilāṣān_abhilāṣa vicāra--_vicāra janya--_jan aśobhana--_aśobhana tva--_tva niścayena_niścaya śobhana--_śobhana adhyāsa--_adhyāsa bādhāt_bādha dṛṣṭeṣu_dṛś srak--_sraj candana--_candana vanitā--_vanitā ādiṣu_ādi adṛṣṭeṣu_adṛṣṭa ca_ca indra--_indra loka--_loka pārijāta--_pārijāta apsaraḥ--_apsaras brahma--_brahman loka--_loka paryantān_paryanta aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas niravaśeṣān_niravaśeṣa sa_sa vāsanān_vāsanā tyaktvā_tyaj ataeva_ataeva kāma--_kāma pūrvaka--_pūrvaka tvāt_tva indirya--_indirya pravṛtteḥ_pravṛtti tad--_tad apāye_apāya sati_as viveka--_viveka yuktena_yuj
manasā_manas eva_eva indriya--_indriya prāptam_prāp cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādi--_ādi karaṇa--_karaṇa samūham_samūha viniyamya_viniyam samantataḥ_samantataḥ sarvebhyaḥ_sarva viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ śanais_śanais śanais_śanais uparamet_uparam iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya
āha_ah cintayet_cintay

baladevaḥ_baladeva sa_tad yogaḥ_yoga prārambha--_prārambha daśāyām_daśā niścayena_niścaya prayatne_prayatna kṛte_kṛ saṃsetsyati_saṃsidh eva_eva iti_iti adhyavasāyena_adhyavasāya yoktavyaḥ_yuj anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā ātmani_ātman ayoga--_ayoga tva--_tva mananam_manana nirvedaḥ_nirveda tad--_tad rahitena_rahita cetasā_cetas hṛta--_hṛ aṇḍa--_aṇḍa arṇava--_arṇava śoṣakat--_śoṣakat pakṣi--_pakṣin vat_vat sa_sa utsāhena_utsāha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etādṛśam_etādṛśa yogam_yoga ārabhamāṇasya_ārabh prāthamikam_prāthamika kṛtyam_kṛtya āha_ah saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa iti_iti saṅkalpāt_saṃkalpa prabhavaḥ_prabhava yeṣām_yad tān_tad yoga--_yoga virodhinaḥ_virodhin kāmān_kāma viṣayān_viṣaya aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas sa_sa vāsanān_vāsanā tyaktvā_tyaj sphuṭam_sphuṭa anyat_anya manasā_manas viṣaya--_viṣaya doṣa--_doṣa darśinā_darśin
BhG 6.25

lg.l: śanais_śanais śanais_śanais uparamet_uparam buddhyā_buddhi dhṛti--_dhṛti gṛhītayā_grah
ātma--_ātman saṃstham_saṃstha manaḥ_manas kṛtvā_kṛ na_na kiṃcid_kaścit api_api cintayet_cintay

div.p: vicalet_vical āha_ah dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti dhāraṇā_dhāraṇā tayā_tad gṛhītayā_grah vaśīkṛtayā_vaśīkṛ buddhyā_buddhi ātma--_ātman saṃstham_saṃstha ātmani_ātman eva_eva samyak_samyak sthitam_sthā niścalam_niścala manaḥ_manas kṛtvā_kṛ uparamet_uparam tat_tad ca_ca śanais_śanais śanais_śanais abhyāsa--_abhyāsa krameṇa_krama na_na tu_tu sahasā_sahas uparama--_uparama svarūpam_svarūpa āha_ah kiṃcid_kaścit cintayet_cintay niścale_niścala manasi_manas svayam_svayam eva_eva prakāśamāna--_prakāś paramānanda--_paramānanda svarūpaḥ_svarūpa bhūtvā_bhū ātma--_ātman dhyānāt_dhyāna api_api nivarteta_nivṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 25_25

uparamet_uparam dhṛti--_dhṛti dhairyam_dhairya akhinna--_akhinna tā_tā tayā_tad gṛhītā_grah yā_yad buddhiḥ_buddhi avaśya--_avaśya kartavya--_kṛ tā--_tā niścaya--_niścaya rūpā_rūpa tayā_tad yadā_yadā kadācid_kadācid avaśyam_avaśyam bhaviṣyati_bhū eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga kim_ka tvarayā_tvarā iti_iti evaṃrūpayā_evaṃrūpa śanais_śanais śanais_śanais guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś mārgeṇa_mārga etena_etad anirveda--_anirveda niścayau_niścaya prāk_prāk uktau_vac darśitau_darśay tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti

yacchet_yam vāc--_vāc manasī_manas prājñaḥ_prājña tat_tad yacchet_yam jñāne_jñāna ātmani_ātman jñānam_jñāna ātmani_ātman mahati_mahat niyacchet_niyam
tat_tad yacchet_yam śānte_śam ātmani_ātman

vāc_vāc iti_iti vācam_vāc laukikīm_laukika vaidikīm_vaidika ca_ca manasi_manas vyāpāravati_vyāpāravat niyacchet_niyam na_na anudhyāyāt_anudhyā bahūn_bahu śabdān_śabda vācaḥ_vāc viglāpanam_viglāpana hi_hi tat_tad iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti vāc--_vāc vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhena_nirodha manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti mātra--_mātra śeṣaḥ_śeṣa bhavet_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādi--_ādi nirodhaḥ_nirodha api_api etasyām_etad bhūmau_bhūmi draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś manasi_manas iti_iti chāndasam_chāndasa dairghyam_dairghya tat_tad manaḥ_manas karmedriya--_karmedriya jñānendriya--_jñānendriya sahakāri_sahakārin nana--_nana vidha--_vidha vikalpa--_vikalpa sādhanam_sādhana karaṇam_karaṇa jñāne_jñāna jānāti_jñā iti_iti jñānam_jñāna iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti jñātari_jñātṛ ātmani_ātman jñātṛ--_jñātṛ tva--_tva upādhau_upādhi ahaṅkāre_ahaṃkāra niyacchet_niyam manaḥ--_manas vyāpārān_vyāpāra parityajya_parityaj ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra mātram_mātra pariśeṣayet_pariśeṣay tat_tad ca_ca jñānam_jñāna jñātṛ--_jñātṛ tva--_tva upādhim_upādhi ahaṅkāram_ahaṃkāra ātmani_ātman mahati_mahat mahat--_mahant tattve_tattva sarva--_sarva vyāpake_vyāpaka niyacchet_niyam dvividhaḥ_dvividha hi_hi ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra viśeṣa--_viśeṣa rūpaḥ_rūpa sāmānya--_sāmānya rūpaḥ_rūpa ca_ca iti_iti ayam_idam aham_mad etasya_etad putraḥ_putra iti_iti evam_evam vyaktam_vyakta abhimanyamānaḥ_abhiman viśeṣa--_viśeṣa rūpaḥ_rūpa vyaṣṭi--_vyaṣṭi ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra asmi_as iti_iti etāvat--_etāvat mātram_mātra abhimanyamānaḥ_abhiman sāmānya--_sāmānya rūpaḥ_rūpa samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra sa_tad ca_ca hiraṇya--_hiraṇya garbhaḥ_garbha mahān_mahat ātmā_ātman iti_iti ca_ca sarva--_sarva anusyūta--_anusīv tvāt_tva ucyate_vac tābhyām_tad ahaṅkārābhyām_ahaṃkāra viviktaḥ_vivic nirupādhikaḥ_nirupādhika śānta--_śam ātmā_ātman sarva--_sarva antaḥ_anta cit--_cit eka--_eka rasaḥ_rasa tasmin_tad mahāntam_mahant ātmānam_ātman samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi buddhim_buddhi niyacchet_niyam evam_evam tad--_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa avyaktam_avyakta api_api niyacchet_niyam tatas_tatas nirupādhikaḥ_nirupādhika tvam_tvad pada--_pada lakṣyaḥ_lakṣay śuddhaḥ_śuddha ātmā_ātman sākṣātkṛtau_sākṣātkṛti bhavati_bhū

śuddhe_śudh hi_hi cit--_cit eka--_eka rase_rasa pratyag-ātmani_pratyag-ātman jaḍa--_jaḍa śakti--_śakti rūpam_rūpa anirvācyam_anirvācya avyaktam_avyakta prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti upādhiḥ_upādhi sā_tad ca_ca prathamam_prathamam sāmānya--_sāmānya ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra rūpam_rūpa mahat_mahant tattvam_tattva nāma_nāma dhṛtvā_dhṛ vyaktībhavati_vyaktībhū tatas_tatas bahis_bahis viśeṣa--_viśeṣa ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra rūpeṇa_rūpa tatas_tatas bahis_bahis manaḥ--_manas rūpeṇa_rūpa tatas_tatas bahis_bahis vāc--_vāc ādīn_ādi indriya--_indriya rūpeṇa_rūpa tat_tad etat_etad śrutyā_śruti abhihitam_abhidhā

lg.l: indriyebhyaḥ_indriya parāḥ_para hi_hi arthāḥ_artha arthebhyaḥ_artha ca_ca param_para manaḥ_manas
manasaḥ_manas tu_tu parā_para buddhiḥ_buddhi buddheḥ_buddhi ātmā_ātman mahān_mahant paraḥ_para

div.p:
mahataḥ_mahant parama--_parama vyaktam_vyakta avyaktāt_avyakta puruṣaḥ_puruṣa paraḥ_para
puruṣāt_puruṣa na_na param_para kiṃcid_kaścit sā_tad kāṣṭhā_kāṣṭhā sā_tad parā_para gatiḥ_gati

tatra_tatra gavādiṣu--_go ādiṣu_ādi iva_iva vāc--_vāc nirodhaḥ_nirodha prathamā_prathama bhūmiḥ_bhūmi bāla--_bāla mugdha--_muh ādiṣu_ādi iva_iva nirmanaḥ--_nirmanas tvam_tva dvitīyā_dvitīya tandryām_tandrā iva_iva ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra rāhityam_rāhitya tṛtīyā_tṛtīya suṣuptau_suṣupti iva_iva mahat--_mahant tattva--_tattva śānta--_śam ātmanoḥ_ātman madhye_madhya mahat--_mahant tattva--_tattva upādānam_upādāna avyākṛta--_avyākṛta ākhyam_ākhyā tattvam_tattva śrutyā_śruti udāhāri_udāhṛ tathā_tathā api_api tatra_tatra mahat--_mahant tattvasya_tattva niyamanam_niyamana na_na abhyadhāyi_abhidhā suṣuptau_suṣupti iva_iva sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa laya--_laya prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga tasya_tad ca_ca karma--_karman kṣaye_kṣaya sati_as puruṣa--_puruṣa prayatnam_prayatna antareṇa_antareṇa svatas_svatas eva_eva siddha--_siddha tvāt_tva tattva--_tattva darśana--_darśana anupayogi--_anupayogin tvāt_tva ca_ca dṛśyate_dṛś tvam_tvad agrayā_agra buddhyā_buddhi sūkṣmayā_sūkṣma sūkṣma--_sūkṣma darśibhiḥ_darśin iti_iti pūrvam_pūrvam abhidhāya_abhidhā sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tva--_tva siddhaye_siddhi nirodha--_nirodha samādheḥ_samādhi abhidhānāt_abhidhāna sa_tad ca_ca tattva--_tattva didṛkṣoḥ_didṛkṣu darśana--_darśana sādhana--_sādhana tvena_tva dṛṣṭa--_dṛś tattvasya_tattva ca_ca jīvan--_jīv mukti--_mukti rūpa--_rūpa kleśa--_kleśa kṣayāya_kṣaya apekṣitaḥ_apekṣ

nanu_nanu śānta--_śam ātmani_ātman avaruddhasya_avarudh cittasya_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti rahita--_rahita tvena_tva suṣupti--_suṣupti vat_vat na_na darśana--_darśana hetutvam_hetutva iti_iti ced_ced na_na svatas_svatas siddhasya_sidh darśanasya_darśana nivārayitum_nivāray aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva tat_tad uktam_vac

lg.l: ātma--_ātman an_an ātma--_ātman ākāram_ākāra svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva asthitam_asthita sadā_sadā cittam_citta
ātma--_ātman eka--_eka ākāra--_ākāra tayā_tā tiraskṛta--_tiraskṛ anātma--_anātman dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi vidadhīta_vidhā

div.p: yathā_yathā ghaṭaḥ_ghaṭa utpadyamānaḥ_utpad svatas_svatas viyat--_viyant pūrṇam_pṛ eva_eva utpadyate_utpad jala--_jala taṇḍula--_taṇḍula ādi--_ādi pūraṇam_pūraṇa tu_tu utpanne_utpad ghaṭe_ghaṭa paścāt_paścāt puruṣa--_puruṣa prayatnena_prayatna bhavati_bhū tatra_tatra jala--_jala ādau_ādi niḥsārite_niḥsāray api_api viyat_viyant niḥsārayitum_niḥsāray na_na śakyate_śak mukha--_mukha pidhāne_pidhāna api_api antar_antar viyat_viyant avatiṣṭhate_avasthā eva_eva tathā_tathā cittam_citta utpadyamānam_utpad caitanya--_caitanya pūrṇam_pṛ eva_eva utpadyate_utpad utpanne_utpad tu_tu tasmin_tad mūṣā--_mūṣā niṣikta--_niṣic druta--_dru tāmra--_tāmra vat_vat ghaṭa--_ghaṭa duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi rūpa--_rūpa tvam_tva bhoga--_bhoga hetu--_hetu dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma sahakṛta--_sahakṛ sāmagrī--_sāmagrī vaśāt_vaśa bhavati_bhū tatra_tatra ghaṭa--_ghaṭa duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi anātma--_anātman ākāre_ākāra virāma--_virāma pratyaya--_pratyaya abhyāsena_abhyāsa nivārite_nivāray api_api nirnimittaḥ_nirnimitta cit--_cit ākāraḥ_ākāra vārayitum_vāray na_na śakyate_śak tatas_tatas nirodha--_nirodha samādhinā_samādhi nirvṛttikena_nirvṛttika cittena_citta saṃskāra--_saṃskāra mātra--_mātra śeṣatayā_śeṣatā ati_ati sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tvena_tva nirupādhika--_nirupādhika cit--_cit ātma--_ātman mātra--_mātra abhimukha--_abhimukha tvāt_tva vṛttim_vṛtti vinā_vinā eva_eva nirvighnam_nirvighna ātmā_ātman anubhūyate_anubhū tat_tad etat_etad āha_ah ātma--_ātman saṃstham_saṃstha manaḥ_manas kṛtvā_kṛ na_na kiṃcid_kaścit api_api cintayet_cintay iti_iti ātmani_ātman nirupādhike_nirupādhika pratīci_pratyañc saṃsthā_saṃsthā samāptiḥ_samāpti yasya_yad tad--_tad ātma--_ātman saṃstham_saṃstha sarva--_sarva prakāra--_prakāra vṛtti--_vṛtti śūnyam_śūnya svabhāva--_svabhāva siddha--_sidh ātma--_ātman ākāra--_ākāra mātra--_mātra viśiṣṭam_viśiṣ manaḥ_manas kṛtvā_kṛ dhṛti--_dhṛti gṛhītayā_grah viveka--_viveka buddhyā_buddhi api_api anātmānam_anātman ātmānam_ātman vā_vā na_na cintayet_cintay na_na vṛttyā_vṛtti viṣayīkuryāt_viṣayīkṛ anātma--_anātman ākāra--_ākāra vṛttau_vṛtti hi_hi vyutthānam_vyutthāna eva_eva syāt_as ātma--_ātman ākāra--_ākāra vṛttau_vṛtti ca_ca samprajñātaḥ_samprajñā samādhiḥ_samādhi iti_iti asamprajñāta--_asamprajñāta samādhi--_samādhi sthairyāya_sthairya kām_ka api_api citta--_citta vṛttim_vṛtti na_na utpādayet_utpāday iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 25_25
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha

baladevaḥ_baladeva antimam_antima kṛtyam_kṛtya āha_ah dhṛti--_dhṛti gṛhītayā_grah dhāraṇā--_dhāraṇā vaśīkṛtyā_vaśīkṛ buddhyā_buddhi manaḥ_manas ātma--_ātman saṃstham_saṃstha kṛtvā_kṛ ātmānam_ātman dhyātvā_dhyā samādhau_samādhi uparameta_uparam tiṣṭhet_sthā ātmanaḥ_ātman anyat_anya kiṃcid_kaścit api_api na_na cintayet_cintay etat_etad ca_ca śanais_śanais śanais_śanais abhyāsa--_abhyāsa krameṇa_krama na_na tu_tu haṭhena_haṭha 25_25
BhG 6.26

lg.l: yatas_yatas yatas_yatas niścarati_niścar manaḥ_manas cañcalam_cañcala asthiram_asthira
tatas_tatas tatas_tatas niyamya_niyam etat_etad ātmani_ātman eva_eva vaśam_vaśa nayet_nī

div.p: pracalet_pracal āha_ah svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva cañcalam_cañcala dhāryamāṇam_dhāray api_api asthiram_asthira manaḥ_manas yam_yad yam_yad viṣayam_viṣaya prati_prati nirgacchati_nirgam tatas_tatas tatas_tatas pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ ātmani_ātman eva_eva sthiram_sthira kuryāt_kṛ 26_26

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam nirodha--_nirodha samādhim_samādhi kurvan_kṛ yogī_yogin śabda--_śabda ādīnām_ādi citta--_citta vikṣepa--_vikṣepa hetūnām_hetu madhye_madhya yatas_yatas yatas_yatas yasmāt_yad yasmāt_yad nimittāt_nimitta śabda--_śabda ādeḥ_ādi viṣayāt_viṣaya rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādeḥ_ādi ca_ca cañcalam_cañcala vikṣepa--_vikṣepa abhimukham_abhimukha viṣaya--_viṣaya abhimukhīm_abhimukha pramāṇa--_pramāṇa viparyaya--_viparyaya vikalpa--_vikalpa smṛtīnām_smṛti anyatamām_anyatama api_api samādhi--_samādhi virodhinīm_virodhin vṛttim_vṛtti utpādayati_utpāday tathā_tathā laya--_laya hetūnām_hetu nidrā--_nidrā śeṣa--_śeṣa bahu--_bahu aśana--_aśana śrama--_śrama ādīnām_ādi madhye_madhya yatas_yatas yatas_yatas nimittāt_nimitta asthiram_asthira niścarati_niścar līnam_lī sat_as samādhi--_samādhi virodhinīm_virodhin nidrā--_nidrā ākhyām_ākhyā vṛttim_vṛtti utpādayati_utpāday tatas_tatas tatas_tatas vikṣepa--_vikṣepa nimittāt_nimitta laya--_laya nimittāt_nimitta ca_ca niyamya_niyam etat_etad manaḥ_manas nirvṛttikam_nirvṛttika kṛtvā_kṛ ātmani_ātman eva_eva sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda yathā_yathā na_na vikṣipyeta_vikṣip na_na vā_vā līyeta_lī iti_iti eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra anātma--_anātman gocara--_gocara tvam_tva samādheḥ_samādhi vārayati_vāray

lg.l: upāyena_upāya nigṛhṇīyāt_nigrah vikṣiptam_vikṣip kāma--_kāma bhogayoḥ_bhoga
su_su prasannam_prasad laye_laya ca_ca eva_eva yathā_yathā kāmaḥ_kāma layaḥ_laya tathā_tathā
duḥkham_duḥkha sarvam_sarva anusmṛtya_anusmṛ kāma--_kāma bhogān_bhoga nivartayet_nivartay
ajam_aja sarvam_sarva anusmṛtya_anusmṛ jātam_jan na_na eva_eva tu_tu paśyati_dṛś
sambodhayet_sambodhay śamayet_śamay
sakaṣāyam_sakaṣāya vijānīyāt_vijñā sama--_sama prāptam_prāp na_na cālayet_cālay
na_na āsvādayet_āsvāday sukham_sukha tatra_tatra niḥsaṅgaḥ_niḥsaṅga prajñayā_prajñā bhavet_bhū
niścalam_niścala cittam_citta ekīkuryāt_ekīkṛ prayatnataḥ_prayatna

div.p: yadā_yadā na_na līyate_lī cittam_citta na_na ca_ca vikṣipyate_vikṣip punar_punar an_an iṅganam_iṅgana an_an ābhāsam_ābhāsa niṣpannam_niṣpad brahma_brahman tat_tad tadā_tadā iti_iti pañcabhiḥ_pañcan ślokaiḥ_śloka

upāyena_upāya vakṣyamāṇena_vac vairāgya--_vairāgya abhyāsena_abhyāsa kāma--_kāma bhogayoḥ_bhoga vikṣiptam_vikṣip pramāṇa--_pramāṇa viparyaya--_viparyaya vikalpa--_vikalpa smṛtīnām_smṛti anyatamayā_anyatama api_api vṛttyā_vṛtti pariṇatam_pariṇam manaḥ_manas nigṛhṇīyāt_nigrah nirundhyāt_nirudh ātmani_ātman eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kāma--_kāma bhogayoḥ_bhoga iti_iti cintyamāna--_cintay avasthā--_avasthā bhujyamāna--_bhuj avasthā--_avasthā bhedena_bheda dvi--_dvi vacanam_vacana tathā_tathā līyate_lī asmin_idam iti_iti layaḥ_laya suṣuptam_suṣupta tasmin_tad su_su prasannam_prasad āyāsa--_āyāsa varjitam_varjay api_api manaḥ_manas nigṛhṇīyāt_nigrah eva_eva su_su prasannam_prasad ced_ced kutas_kutas nigṛhyate_nigrah tatra_tatra āha_ah yathā_yathā kāmaḥ_kāma viṣaya--_viṣaya gocara--_gocara pramāṇa--_pramāṇa ādi--_ādi vṛtti--_vṛtti utpādanena_utpādana samādhi--_samādhi virodhī_virodhin tathā_tathā layaḥ_laya api_api nidrā--_nidrā ākhya--_ākhya vṛtti--_vṛtti utpādanena_utpādana samādhi--_samādhi virodhī_virodhin sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhaḥ_nirodha hi_hi samādhiḥ_samādhi atas_atas kāma--_kāma ādi--_ādi kṛta--_kṛ vikṣepāt_vikṣepa iva_iva śrama--_śrama ādi--_ādi kṛta--_kṛ layāt_laya api_api manaḥ_manas niroddhavyam_nirudh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

upāyena_upāya nigṛhṇīyāt_nigrah kena_ka iti_iti ucyate_vac sarvam_sarva dvaitam_dvaita avidyā--_avidyā vijṛmbhitam_vijṛmbh alpam_alpa duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva iti_iti anusmṛtya_anusmṛ yaḥ_yad vai_vai bhūmā_bhūman tat_tad sukham_sukha na_na alpe_alpa sukham_sukha asti_as atha_atha yat_yad alpam_alpa tat_tad martyam_martya tat_tad duḥkham_duḥkha iti_iti śruti--_śruti artham_artha guru--_guru upadeśāt_upadeśa anu_anu paścāt_paścāt paryālocya_paryālocay kāmān_kāma cintyamāna--_cintay avasthān_avasthā viṣayān_viṣaya bhogān_bhoga bhujyamāna--_bhuj avasthān_avasthā ca_ca viṣayān_viṣaya nivartayet_nivartay manasaḥ_manas sakāśāt_sakāśāt iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa kāmaḥ_kāma ca_ca bhogaḥ_bhoga ca_ca kāma--_kāma bhogam_bhoga tasmāt_tad manaḥ_manas nivartayet_nivartay iti_iti vā_vā evam_evam dvaita--_dvaita smaraṇa--_smaraṇa kāle_kāla vairāgya--_vairāgya bhāvanā--_bhāvanā upāyaḥ_upāya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dvaita--_dvaita vismaraṇam_vismaraṇa tu_tu parama--_parama upāyaḥ_upāya iti_iti āha_ah ajam_aja brahma_brahman sarvam_sarva na_na tatas_tatas atiriktam_atiric kiṃcid_kaścit asti_as iti_iti śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadeśāt_upadeśa anantaram_anantaram anusmṛtya_anusmṛ tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta dvaita--_dvaita jātam_jāta na_na paśyati_dṛś eva_eva adhiṣṭhāne_adhiṣṭhāna jñāne_jñāna kalpitasya_kalpay abhāvāt_abhāva
