evam_evam vairāgya--_vairāgya bhāvanā--_bhāvanā tattva--_tattva darśanābhyām_darśana viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya nivartyamānam_nivartay cittam_citta yadi_yadi laya--_laya abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vaśāt_vaśa laya--_laya abhimukham_abhimukha bhavet_bhū tadā_tadā nidrā--_nidrā śeṣa--_śeṣa ajīrṇa--_ajīrṇa bahu--_bahu aśana--_aśana śramāṇām_śrama laya--_laya kāraṇānām_kāraṇa nirodhena_nirodha utthāna--_utthāna prayatnena_prayatna yadi_yadi punar_punar evam_evam prabodhyamānam_prabodhay kāma--_kāma bhogayoḥ_bhoga vikṣiptam_vikṣip syāt_as tadā_tadā vairāgya--_vairāgya bhāvanayā_bhāvanā tattva--_tattva sākṣātkāreṇa_sākṣātkāra ca_ca punar_punar śamayet_śamay evam_evam punar_punar punar_punar abhyasyataḥ_abhyas layāt_laya sambodhitam_sambodhay viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya ca_ca vyāvartitam_vyāvartay nā_na api_api sama--_sama prāptam_prāp antarāla--_antarāla avastham_avasthā cittam_citta stabdhībhūtam_stabdhībhū sa_sa kaṣāyam_kaṣāya rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi prabala--_prabala vāsanā--_vāsanā vaśena_vaśa stabdhībhāva--_stabdhībhāva ākhyena_ākhyā kaṣāyeṇa_kaṣāya doṣeṇa_doṣa yuktam_yuj vijānīyāt_vijñā samāhitāt_samādhā cittāt_citta vivekena_viveka

tatas_tatas ca_ca na_na idam_idam samāhitam_samādhā iti_iti avagamya_avagam laya--_laya vikṣepābhyām_vikṣepa iva_iva kaṣāyāt_kaṣāya api_api cittam_citta nirundhyāt_nirudh tatas_tatas ca_ca laya--_laya vikṣepa--_vikṣepa kaṣāyeṣu_kaṣāya parihṛteṣu_parihṛ pariśeṣāt_pariśeṣa cittena_citta samam_sama brahma_brahman prāpyate_prāp tat_tad ca_ca sama--_sama prāptam_prāp cittam_citta kaṣāya--_kaṣāya laya--_laya bhrāntyā_bhrānti na_na cālayet_cālay viṣaya--_viṣaya abhimukham_abhimukha na_na kuryāt_kṛ kintu_kiṃtu dhṛti--_dhṛti gṛhītayā_grah buddhyā_buddhi laya--_laya kaṣāya--_kaṣāya prāpteḥ_prāpti vivicya_vivic tasyām_tad eva_eva sama--_sama prāptau_prāpti atiyatnena_atiyatna sthāpayet_sthāpay tatra_tatra samādhau_samādhi parama--_parama sukha--_sukha vyañjake_vyañjaka api_api sukham_sukha na_na āsvādayet_āsvāday etāvantam_etāvat kālam_kāla aham_mad sukhī_sukhin iti_iti sukha--_sukha āsvāda--_āsvāda rūpām_rūpa vṛttim_vṛtti na_na kuryāt_kṛ samādhi--_samādhi bhaṅga--_bhaṅga prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga iti_iti prāk_prāk eva_eva kṛta--_kṛ vyākhyānam_vyākhyāna prajñayā_prajñā yat_yad upalabhyate_upalabh sukham_sukha tat_tad api_api avidyā--_avidyā parikalpitam_parikalpay mṛṣā_mṛṣā eva_eva iti_iti evam_evam bhāvanayā_bhāvanā niḥsaṅgaḥ_niḥsaṅga nispṛhaḥ_nispṛha sarva--_sarva sukheṣu_sukha bhavet_bhū

athavā_athavā prajñayā_prajñā sa_sa vikalpa--_vikalpa sukha--_sukha ākāra--_ākāra vṛtti--_vṛtti rūpayā_rūpa saha_saha saṅgam_saṅga parityajet_parityaj na_na tu_tu svarūpa--_svarūpa sukham_sukha api_api nirvṛttikena_nirvṛttika cittena_citta nā_na anubhavet_anubhū svabhāva--_svabhāva prāptasya_prāp tasya_tad vārayitum_vāray aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva evam_evam sarvatas_sarvatas nivartya_nivartay niścalam_niścala prayatna--_prayatna vaśena_vaśa kṛtam_kṛ cittam_citta svabhāva--_svabhāva cāñcalyāt_cāñcalya viṣaya--_viṣaya abhimukha--_abhimukha tayā_tā niścarat_niścar bahis_bahis nirgacchat_nirgam ekīkuryāt_ekīkṛ prayatnataḥ_prayatna nirodha--_nirodha prayatnena_prayatna same_sama brahmaṇi_brahman ekatām_ekatā nayet_nī

sama--_sama prāptam_prāp cittam_citta kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa iti_iti ucyate_vac yadā_yadā na_na līyate_lī na_na api_api stabdhībhavati_stabdhībhū tāmasa--_tāmasa tva--_tva sāmyena_sāmya laya--_laya śabdena_śabda eva_eva stabdhībhāvasya_stabdhībhāva upalakṣaṇāt_upalakṣaṇa na_na ca_ca vikṣipyate_vikṣip punar_punar na_na śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi ākāra--_ākāra vṛttim_vṛtti anubhavati_anubhū na_na api_api sukham_sukha āsvādayati_āsvāday rājasa--_rājasa tva--_tva sāmyena_sāmya sukha--_sukha āsvādasya_āsvāda api_api vikṣepa--_vikṣepa śabdena_śabda upalakṣaṇāt_upalakṣaṇa pūrvam_pūrvam bheda--_bheda nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa tu_tu pṛthak_pṛthak prayatna--_prayatna karaṇāya_karaṇa evam_evam laya--_laya kaṣāyābhyām_kaṣāya vikṣepa--_vikṣepa sukha--_sukha āsvādābhyām_āsvāda ca_ca rahitam_rahita aniṅganam_aniṅgana iṅganam_iṅgana calanam_calana sa_sa vāta--_vāta pradīpa--_pradīpa vat_vat laya--_laya ābhimukhya--_ābhimukhya rūpam_rūpa tad--_tad rahitam_rahita nivāta--_nivāta pradīpa--_pradīpa kalpam_kalpa anābhāsam_anābhāsa na_na kenacid_kaścit viṣaya--_viṣaya ākāreṇa_ākāra ābhāsate_ābhās iti_iti etat_etad yadā_yadā evam_evam doṣa--_doṣa catuṣṭaya--_catuṣṭaya rahitam_rahita cittam_citta bhavati_bhū tadā_tadā tat_tad cittam_citta brahma_brahman niṣpannam_niṣpad samam_sama brahma_brahman prāptam_prāp bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa ca_ca yogaḥ_yoga śrutyā_śruti pratipāditaḥ_pratipāday

lg.l: yadā_yadā pañca_pañcan avatiṣṭhante_avasthā jñānāni_jñāna manasā_manas saha_saha
buddhiḥ_buddhi ca_ca na_na viceṣṭeta_viceṣṭ tām_tad āhuḥ_ah paramām_parama gatim_gati

div.p:
tām_tad yogam_yoga iti_iti manyante_man sthirām_sthira indriya--_indriya dhāraṇām_dhāraṇā
apramattaḥ_apramatta tadā_tadā bhavati_bhū yogaḥ_yoga hi_hi prabhava--_prabhava apyayau_apyaya iti_iti

etad--_etad mūlakam_mūlaka eva_eva ca_ca yogaḥ_yoga citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhaḥ_nirodha iti_iti sūtram_sūtra tasmāt_tasmāt yuktam_yuj tatas_tatas tatas_tatas niyamya_niyam etat_etad ātmani_ātman evam_evam vaśam_vaśa nayet_nī iti_iti
div.l: syāt_as abhyaset_abhyas āha_ah
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva :_yadi kadācid_kadācid prāktana--_prāktana sūkṣma--_sūkṣma doṣāt_doṣa manaḥ_manas pracalet_pracal tadā_tadā tat_tad pratyāharet_pratyāhṛ iti_iti āha_ah yatas_yatas iti_iti yam_yad yam_yad viṣayam_viṣaya prati_prati manaḥ_manas nirgacchati_nirgam tatas_tatas tatas_tatas etat_etad manaḥ_manas niyamya_niyam pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ ātmani_ātman eva_eva niratiśaya--_niratiśaya sukha--_sukha tva--_tva bhāvanayā_bhāvanā vaśam_vaśa kuryāt_kṛ 26_26
BhG 6.27

lg.l: praśānta--_praśam manasam_manas hi_hi enam_enad yoginam_yogin sukham_sukha uttamam_uttama
upaiti_upe śānta--_śam rajasam_rajas brahma--_brahman bhūtam_bhū akalmaṣam_akalmaṣa

div.p: prāpnoti_prāp āha_ah evam_evam ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra śāntam_śam rajaḥ_rajas yasya_yad tam_tad ataeva_ataeva praśāntam_praśam manaḥ_manas yasya_yad tam_tad enam_enad niṣkalmaṣam_niṣkalmaṣa brahmatvam_brahmatva prāptam_prāp yoginam_yogin uttamam_uttama sukham_sukha samādhi--_samādhi sukham_sukha svayam_svayam eva_eva upaiti_upe prāpnoti_prāp 27_27

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam yoga--_yoga abhyāsa--_abhyāsa balāt_bala ātmani_ātman eva_eva yoginaḥ_yogin praśāmyati_praśam manaḥ_manas tatas_tatas ca_ca praśāntā_praśam iti_iti prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa śāntam_śam nirvṛttikatayā_nirvṛttikatā niruddham_nirudh saṃskāra--_saṃskāra mātra--_mātra śeṣam_śeṣa manaḥ_manas yasya_yad tam_tad praśānta--_praśam manasam_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti śūnya--_śūnya tayā_tā nirmanaskam_nirmanaska śāntam_śam vikṣepakam_vikṣepaka rajaḥ_rajas yasya_yad tam_tad vikṣepa--_vikṣepa śūnyam_śūnya tathā_tathā na_na vidyate_vid kalmaṣam_kalmaṣa laya--_laya hetuḥ_hetu tamaḥ_tamas yasya_yad tam_tad akalmaṣam_akalmaṣa laya--_laya śūnyam_śūnya śānta--_śam rajasam_rajas iti_iti anena_idam eva_eva tamaḥ--_tamas guṇa--_guṇa upalakṣaṇe_upalakṣaṇa a_a kalmaṣam_kalmaṣa saṃsāra--_saṃsāra hetu--_hetu dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma ādi--_ādi varjitam_varjay iti_iti vā_vā brahma--_brahman bhūtam_bhū brahma_brahman eva_eva sarvam_sarva iti_iti niścayena_niścaya samam_sama brahma_brahman prāptam_prāp jīvan--_jīv muktam_muc enam_enad yoginam_yogin evam_evam uktena_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra iti_iti śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara uttamam_uttama niratiśayam_niratiśaya sukham_sukha upaiti_upe upagacchati_upagam manaḥ_manas tad--_tad vṛttyoḥ_vṛtti abhāve_abhāva suṣuptau_suṣupti svarūpa--_svarūpa sukha--_sukha āvirbhāva--_āvirbhāva prasiddhim_prasiddhi dyotayati_dyotay hi_hi śabdaḥ_śabda tathā_tathā ca_ca prāk--_prāñc vyākhyātam_vyākhyā sukham_sukha ātyantikam_ātyantika yat_yad tat_tad iti_iti atra_atra 27_27

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatas_tatas ca_ca pūrvavat_pūrvavat eva_eva tasya_tad samādhi--_samādhi sukham_sukha syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah praśānta--_praśam iti_iti sukham_sukha kartṛ_kartṛ yoginam_yogin upaiti_upe prāpnoti_prāp

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam prayatamānasya_prayat pūrvavat_pūrvavat eva_eva samādhi--_samādhi sukham_sukha syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah praśānta--_praśam iti_iti praśāntam_praśam ātmani_ātman acalam_acala manaḥ_manas yasya_yad tam_tad ataeva_ataeva akalmaṣam_akalmaṣa dagdha--_dah prāktana--_prāktana sūkṣma--_sūkṣma doṣam_doṣa śānta--_śam rajasam_rajas brahma--_brahman bhūtam_bhū sākṣāt_sākṣāt kṛta--_kṛ vivikta--_vivic āvirbhāvita--_āvirbhāvay aṣṭa--_aṣṭan guṇaka--_guṇaka ātma--_ātman svarūpam_svarūpa yoginam_yogin prati_prati uttamam_uttama ātma--_ātman anubhava--_anubhava rūpam_rūpa mahat_mahat sukham_sukha kartā_kartṛ svayam_svayam eva_eva upaiti_upe 27_27
BhG 6.28

lg.l: yuñjan_yuj evam_evam sadā_sadā ātmānam_ātman yogī_yogin vigata--_vigam kalmaṣaḥ_kalmaṣa
sukhena_sukhena brahma--_brahman saṃsparśam_saṃsparśa atyantam_atyanta sukham_sukha aśnute_aś

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tatas_tatas ca_ca kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha bhavati_bhū iti_iti āha_ah yuñjan_yuj iti_iti evam_evam anena_idam prakāreṇa_prakāra sarvadā_sarvadā ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas yuñjan_yuj vaśīkurvan_vaśīkṛ viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa sarva--_sarva ātmanā_ātman vigatam_vigam kalmaṣam_kalmaṣa yasya_yad saḥ_tad aśnute_aś jīvanmuktaḥ_jīvanmukta bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 28_28

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana uktam_vac sukham_sukha yoginaḥ_yogin sphuṭīkaroti_sphuṭīkṛ yuñjan_yuj iti_iti evam_evam manasā_manas eva_eva indriya--_indriya grāmam_grāma iti_iti ādi--_ādi ukta--_vac krameṇa_krama ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas sadā_sadā yuñjan_yuj samādadhat_samādhā yogī_yogin yogena_yoga nitya--_nitya sambandhī_sambandhin vigata--_vigam kalmaṣaḥ_kalmaṣa vigata--_vigam malaḥ_mala saṃsāra--_saṃsāra hetu--_hetu dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma rahitaḥ_rahita sukhena_sukha sarva--_sarva antarāya--_antarāya nivṛttyā_nivṛtti brahma--_brahman saṃsparśam_saṃsparśa samyaktvena_samyaktva viṣaya--_viṣaya asparśena_asparśa saha_saha brahmaṇaḥ_brahman sparśaḥ_sparśa tādātmyam_tādātmya yasmin_yad tad--_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya asaṃsparśi_asaṃsparśin brahma--_brahman svarūpam_svarūpa iti_iti etat_etad atyantam_atyanta sarva--_sarva anantān_ananta paricchedān_pariccheda atikrāntam_atikram niratiśayam_niratiśaya sukham_sukha ānandam_ānanda aśnute_aś vyāpnoti_vyāp sarvatas_sarvatas nirvṛttikena_nirvṛttika cittena_citta laya--_laya vikṣepa--_vikṣepa vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa anubhavati_anubhū vikṣepe_vikṣepa vṛtti--_vṛtti sattvāt_sattva laye_laya ca_ca manasaḥ_manas api_api sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti śūnyena_śūnya sūkṣmeṇa_sūkṣma manasā_manas sukha--_sukha anubhavaḥ_anubhava samādhau_samādhi eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

atra_atra ca_ca anāyāsena_anāyāsa iti_iti antarāya--_antarāya nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti uktā_vac te_tad ca_ca antarāyāḥ_antarāya darśitāḥ_darśay yoga--_yoga sūtreṇa_sūtra vyādhi--_vyādhi styāna--_styāna saṃśaya--_saṃśaya pramāda--_pramāda ālasya--_ālasya avirati--_avirati bhrānti--_bhrānti darśana--_darśana alabdha--_alabdha bhūmika--_bhūmika tva--_tva anavasthita--_anavasthita tvāni_tva citta--_citta vikṣepāḥ_vikṣepa te_tad antarāyāḥ_antarāya cittam_citta vikṣipanti_vikṣip yogāt_yoga apanayanti_apanī iti_iti citta--_citta vikṣepāḥ_vikṣepa yoga--_yoga pratipakṣāḥ_pratipakṣa saṃśaya--_saṃśaya bhrānti--_bhrānti darśane_darśana tāvat_tāvat vṛtti--_vṛtti rūpa--_rūpa tayā_tā vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhasya_nirodha sākṣāt_sākṣāt pratipakṣau_pratipakṣa vyādhi--_vyādhi ādayaḥ_ādi tu_tu sapta_saptan vṛtti--_vṛtti sahacaritatayā_sahacaritatā tad--_tad pratipakṣāḥ_pratipakṣa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha styānam_styāna akarmaṇya--_akarmaṇya tā_tā guruṇā_guru śikṣyamāṇasya_śikṣ api_api āsana--_āsana ādi--_ādi karma--_karman anarha--_anarha tā_tā iti_iti yāvat_yāvat yogaḥ_yoga sādhanīyaḥ_sādh na_na vā_vā iti_iti ubhaya--_ubhaya koṭi--_koṭi spṛś--_spṛś vijñānam_vijñāna saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya sa_tad ca_ca a_a tad--_tad rūpa--_rūpa pratiṣṭha--_pratiṣṭha tvena_tva viparyaya--_viparyaya antargataḥ_antargam api_api san_as ubhaya--_ubhaya koṭi--_koṭi sparśi--_sparśin tva--_tva eka--_eka koṭi--_koṭi sparśi--_sparśin tva--_tva rūpa--_rūpa avāntara--_avāntara viśeṣa--_viśeṣa vivakṣayā_vivakṣā atra_atra viparyayāt_viparyaya bhedena_bheda uktaḥ_vac pramādaḥ_pramāda samādhi--_samādhi sādhanānām_sādhana anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna sāmarthye_sāmarthya api_api ananuṣṭhāna--_ananuṣṭhāna śīla--_śīla tā_tā viṣaya--_viṣaya antara--_antara vyāprata--_vyāprata tayā_tā yoga--_yoga sādhaneṣu_sādhana audāsīnyam_audāsīnya iti_iti yāvat_yāvat ālasyam_ālasya satyām_as api_api audāsīnya--_audāsīnya pracyutau_pracyuti kapha--_kapha ādinā_ādi tamasā_tamas ca_ca kāya--_kāya cittayoḥ_citta guru--_guru tvam_tva tat_tad ca_ca vyādhi--_vyādhi tvena_tva aprasiddham_aprasiddha api_api yoga--_yoga viṣaye_viṣaya pravṛtti--_pravṛtti virodhi_virodhin bhrānti--_bhrānti darśanam_darśana yoga--_yoga asādhane_asādhana api_api tad--_tad sādhana--_sādhana tva--_tva buddhiḥ_buddhi tathā_tathā tad--_tad sādhane_sādhana asādhana--_asādhana tva--_tva buddhiḥ_buddhi alabdha--_alabdha bhūmika--_bhūmika tvam_tva samādhi--_samādhi bhūmeḥ_bhūmi ekāgra--_ekāgra tāyāḥ_tā alābhaḥ_alābha kṣipta--_kṣip mūḍha--_muh vikṣipta--_vikṣip rūpa--_rūpa tvam_tva iti_iti yāvat_yāvat anavasthita--_anavasthita tvam_tva labdhāyām_labh api_api samādhi--_samādhi bhūmau_bhūmi prayatna--_prayatna śaithilyāt_śaithilya cittasya_citta tatra_tatra apratiṣṭhita--_apratiṣṭhita tvam_tva te_tad ete_etad citta--_citta vikṣepāḥ_vikṣepa nava_navan yoga--_yoga malāḥ_mala yoga--_yoga pratipakṣāḥ_pratipakṣa yoga--_yoga antarāyāḥ_antarāya iti_iti ca_ca abhidhīyante_abhidhā

duḥkha--_duḥkha daurmanasya--_daurmanasya aṅgam_aṅga ejayatva--_ejayatva śvāsa--_śvāsa praśvāsāḥ_praśvāsa vikṣepa--_vikṣepa saha_saha bhuvaḥ_bhū duḥkham_duḥkha cittasya_citta rājasaḥ_rājasa pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma bādhanā--_bādhanā lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa tat_tad ca_ca ādhyātmikam_ādhyātmika śārīram_śārīra mānasam_mānasa ca_ca vyādhi--_vyādhi vaśāt_vaśa kāma--_kāma ādi--_ādi vaśāt_vaśa ca_ca bhavati_bhū ādhibhautikam_ādhibhautika graha--_graha pīḍā--_pīḍā ādi--_ādi janitam_janay dveṣa--_dveṣa ākhya--_ākhya viparyaya--_viparyaya hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva samādhi--_samādhi virodhi_virodhin daurmanasyam_daurmanasya icchā--_icchā vighāta--_vighāta ādi--_ādi balavat_balavat duḥkha--_duḥkha anubhava--_anubhava janitaḥ_janay cittasya_citta tāmasaḥ_tāmasa pariṇāma--_pariṇāma viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa kṣobhā--_kṣobhā para--_para paryāyaḥ_paryāya stabdhībhāvaḥ_stabdhībhāva sa_tad tu_tu kaṣāya--_kaṣāya tvāt_tva laya--_laya vat_vat samādhi--_samādhi virodhī_virodhin aṅgam_aṅga ejayatvam_ejayatva aṅga--_aṅga kampanam_kampana āsana--_āsana sthairya--_sthairya virodhi_virodhin samāhita--_samāhita cittasya_citta ete_etad na_na bhavanti_bhū vikṣipta--_vikṣip cittasya_citta eva_eva bhavanti_bhū iti_iti vikṣepa--_vikṣepa sahabhuvaḥ_sahabhū antarāyāḥ_antarāya eva_eva ete_etad abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya niroddhavyāḥ_nirudh īśvara--_īśvara praṇidhānena_praṇidhāna tīvra--_tīvra saṃvegānām_saṃvega āsanne_āsad samādhi--_samādhi lābhe_lābha prastute_prastu īśvara--_īśvara praṇidhānāt_praṇidhāna vā_vā iti_iti pakṣa--_pakṣa antaram_antara uktvā_vac praṇidheyam_praṇidhā īśvaram_īśvara kleśa--_kleśa karma--_karman vipāka--_vipāka āśayaiḥ_āśaya aparāmṛṣṭaḥ_aparāmṛṣṭa puruṣa--_puruṣa viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa īśvaraḥ_īśvara sa_tad pūrveṣām_pūrva api_api guruḥ_guru kālena_kāla anavacchedāt_anavaccheda iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri sūtraiḥ_sūtra pratipādya_pratipāday tad--_tad praṇidhānam_praṇidhāna dvābhyām_dvi asūtrayat_sūtray tasya_tad vācakaḥ_vācaka praṇavaḥ_praṇava tad--_tad japaḥ_japa tad--_tad artha--_artha bhāvanam_bhāvanā iti_iti tatas_tatas pratyak--_pratyañc cetanā--_cetanā adhigamaḥ_adhigama api_api antarāya--_antarāya abhāvaḥ_abhāva ca_ca tatas_tatas praṇava--_praṇava japa--_japa rūpāt_rūpa tad--_tad artha--_artha dhyāna--_dhyāna rūpāt_rūpa ca_ca īśvara--_īśvara praṇidhānāt_praṇidhāna pratyak--_pratyañc cetanasya_cetana puruṣasya_puruṣa prakṛti--_prakṛti vivekena_viveka adhigamaḥ_adhigama sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra uktānām_vac antarāyāṇām_antarāya abhāvaḥ_abhāva api_api bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya antarāya--_antarāya nivṛttau_nivṛtti kartavyāyām_kṛ abhyāsa--_abhyāsa dārḍhya--_dārḍhya artham_artha āha_ah tad--_tad pratiṣedha--_pratiṣedha artham_artha eka--_eka tattva--_tattva abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa teṣām_tad antarāyāṇām_antarāya ekasmin_eka kasmiṃścid_kaścit abhimate_abhiman tattve_tattva abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa cetasaḥ_cetas punar_punar punar_punar niveśanam_niveśana kāryam_kṛ tathā_tathā --maitrī--_maitrī karuṇā--_karuṇā muditā--_muditā upekṣaṇām_upekṣaṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha puṇya--_puṇya apuṇya--_apuṇya viṣayāṇām_viṣaya bhāvanātaḥ_bhāvanā citta--_citta prasādanam_prasādana maitrī_maitrī sauhārdam_sauhārda karuṇā_karuṇā kṛpā_kṛpā muditā_muditā harṣaḥ_harṣa upekṣā_upekṣā audāsīnyam_audāsīnya sukha--_sukha ādi--_ādi śabdaiḥ_śabda tadvantaḥ_tadvat pratipādyante_pratipāday sarva--_sarva prāṇiṣu_prāṇin sukha--_sukha sambhoga--_sambhoga āpanneṣu_āpad sādhu_sādhu etat_etad mama_mad mitrāṇām_mitra sukhi--_sukhin tvam_tva iti_iti maitrīm_maitrī bhāvayet_bhāvay na_na tu_tu īrṣyām_īrṣyā duḥkhiteṣu_duḥkhita katham_katham nu_nu nāma_nāma eṣā_etad duḥkha--_duḥkha nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti syāt_as iti_iti kṛpām_kṛpā eva_eva bhāvayet_bhāvay na_na upekṣām_upekṣā na_na vā_vā harṣam_harṣa puṇyavatsu_puṇyavat puṇya--_puṇya anumodanena_anumodana harṣam_harṣa kuryāt_kṛ na_na tu_tu vidveṣam_vidveṣa na_na ca_ca upekṣām_upekṣā apuṇyavatsu_apuṇyavat ca_ca audāsīnyam_audāsīnya eva_eva bhāvayet_bhāvay na_na anumodanam_anumodana na_na vā_vā dveṣam_dveṣa evam_evam asya_idam bhāvayataḥ_bhāvay śuklaḥ_śukla dharmaḥ_dharma upajāyate_upajan tatas_tatas ca_ca vigata--_vigam rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi malam_mala cittam_citta prasannam_prasad sat_as ekāgra--_ekāgra tā--_tā yogyam_yogya bhavati_bhū maitrī--_maitrī ādi--_ādi catuṣṭayam_catuṣṭaya ca_ca upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa abhayam_abhaya sattva--_sattva saṃśuddhiḥ_saṃśuddhi iti_iti ādīnām_ādi amāni--_amānin tvam_tva adambhi--_adambhin tvam_tva iti_iti ādīnām_ādi ca_ca dharmāṇām_dharma sarveṣām_sarva eteṣām_etad śubha--_śubha vāsanā--_vāsanā rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva malina--_malina vāsanā--_vāsanā nivartaka--_nivartaka rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa mahā--_mahat śatrū_śatru sarva--_sarva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha pratibandhakau_pratibandhaka mahatā_mahat prayatnena_prayatna parihartavyau_parihṛ iti_iti etad--_etad sūtra--_sūtra arthaḥ_artha

evam_evam anye_anya api_api prāṇāyāma--_prāṇāyāma ādayaḥ_ādi upāyāḥ_upāya citta--_citta prasādanāya_prasādana darśitāḥ_darśay tat_tad etat_etad citta--_citta prasādanam_prasādana bhagavat--_bhagavant anugraheṇa_anugraha yasya_yad jātam_jan tam_tad prati_prati eva_eva etat_etad vacanam_vacana sukhena_sukhena iti_iti anyathā_anyathā manaḥ--_manas praśama--_praśama
bhavati_bhū āha_ah aśnute_aś bhavati_bhū _

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam sva--_sva ātma--_ātman sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra anantaram_anantaram paramātma--_paramātman sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra ca_ca labhate_labh iti_iti āha_ah yuñjan_yuj iti_iti evam_evam ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra ātmānam_ātman svam_sva yuñjan_yuj yogena_yoga anubhavata_anubhū tena_tad eva_eva vigata--_vigam kalmaṣaḥ_kalmaṣa dagdha--_dah sarva--_sarva doṣaḥ_doṣa yogī_yogin sukhena_sukha anāyāsena_anāyāsa brahma--_brahman saṃsparśam_saṃsparśa paramātma--_paramātman anubhavam_anubhava atyantam_atyanta aparimitam_aparimita sukham_sukha aśnute_aś 28_28
BhG 6.29

lg.l: sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta stham_stha ātmānam_ātman sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta ca_ca ātmani_ātman
īkṣate_īkṣ yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman sarvatra_sarvatra sama--_sama darśanaḥ_darśana

div.p: darśayati_darśay yogena_yoga abhyasyamānena_abhyas yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman samāhita--_samādhā cittaḥ_citta sarvatra_sarvatra samam_sama brahma_brahman eva_eva paśyati_dṛś iti_iti sama--_sama darśanaḥ_darśana tathā_tathā sa_tad svam_sva ātmānam_ātman avidyā--_avidyā kṛta--_kṛ deha--_deha ādi--_ādi pariccheda--_pariccheda śūnyam_śūnya sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi sthāvara--_sthāvara anteṣu_anta avasthitam_avasthā paśyati_paś tāni_tad ca_ca ātmani_ātman abhedena_abheda paśyati_paś 29_29

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam nirodha--_nirodha samādhinā_samādhi tvaṃ_tvad pada--_pada lakṣye_lakṣya tad--_tad pada--_pada lakṣye_lakṣya ca_ca śuddhe_śudh sākṣātkṛte_sākṣātkṛ tad--_tad aikya--_aikya gocarā_gocara tattvam_tattva asi_as iti_iti vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya janyā_jan nirvikalpaka--_nirvikalpaka sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra rūpā_rūpa vṛttiḥ_vṛtti tatas_tatas ca_ca kṛtsna--_kṛtsna avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya nivṛttyā_nivṛtti brahma--_brahman sukham_sukha atyantam_atyanta aśnute_aś iti_iti upapādayati_upapāday tribhiḥ_tri ślokaiḥ_śloka āha_ah

sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgameṣu_jaṅgama śarīreṣu_śarīra bhoktṛtayā_bhoktṛtā sthitam_sthā ekam_eka eva_eva vibhum_vibhu ātmānam_ātman pratyak--_pratyañc cetanam_cetana sākṣiṇam_sākṣin paramārtha--_paramārtha satyam_satya ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana sākṣyebhyaḥ_sākṣya anṛta--_anṛta jaḍa--_jaḍa paricchinna--_paricchid duḥkha--_duḥkha tasmin_tad ca_ca ātmani_ātman sākṣiṇi_sākṣin sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta sākṣyāṇi_sākṣya ādhyāsikena_ādhyāsika sambandhena_sambandha bhogya--_bhuj tayā_tā kalpitāni_kalpay sākṣi--_sākṣin sākṣyayoḥ_sākṣya sambandha--_sambandha antara--_antara anupapatteḥ_anupapatti mithyā_mithyā bhūtāni_bhū paricchinnāni_paricchid jaḍāni_jaḍa duḥkha--_duḥkha ātmakāni_ātmaka

kaḥ_ka yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman yogena_yoga nirvic--_nirvic cāra--_cāra vaiśāradya--_vaiśāradya rūpeṇa_rūpa yuktam_yuj prasādam_prasāda prāptaḥ_prāp ātma--_ātman antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā tathā_tathā ca_ca prāk_prāk eva_eva uktam_vac nirvicāra--_nirvicāra vaiśāradye_vaiśāradya adhyātma--_adhyātma prasādaḥ_prasāda tathā_tathā ca_ca śabda--_śabda anumāna--_anumāna agocara--_agocara yathārtha--_yathārtha viśeṣa--_viśeṣa vastu--_vastu gocara--_gocara yoga--_yoga pratyakṣeṇa_pratyakṣa ṛtaṃbhara--_ṛtambhara saṃjñena_saṃjñā yugapad_yugapad sūkṣmam_sūkṣma vyavahitam_vyavadhā viprakṛṣṭam_viprakṛṣṭa ca_ca sarvam_sarva tulyam_tulya eva_eva paśyati_dṛś iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra samam_sama darśanam_darśana san_as ātmānam_ātman anātmānam_anātman ca_ca yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman yathā_yathā sthitam_sthā īkṣate_īkṣ iti_iti yuktam_yuj

athavā_athavā yaḥ_yad yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman yaḥ_yad vā_vā sarvatra_sarvatra sama--_sama darśanaḥ_darśana saḥ_tad ātmānam_ātman īkṣate_īkṣ iti_iti yogi--_yogin sama--_sama darśinau_darśin ātma--_ātman īkṣaṇa--_īkṣaṇa adhikāriṇau_adhikārin uktau_vac yathā_yathā hi_hi citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhaḥ_nirodha sākṣi--_sākṣin sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra hetuḥ_hetu tathā_tathā jaḍa--_jaḍa vivekena_viveka sarva--_sarva anusyūta--_anusīv caitanya--_caitanya pṛthak_pṛthak karaṇam_karaṇa api_api na_na avaśyam_avaśyam yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva apekṣitaḥ_apekṣ atas_atas eva_eva āha_ah vasiṣṭhaḥ_vasiṣṭha

lg.l: dvau_dvi kramau_krama citta--_citta nāśasya_nāśa yogaḥ_yoga jñānam_jñāna ca_ca rāghava_rāghava
yogaḥ_yoga vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhaḥ_nirodha hi_hi jñānam_jñāna samyak_samyak avekṣaṇam_avekṣaṇa

div.p: asādhyaḥ_asādhya kasyacid_kaścit yogaḥ_yoga kasyacid_kaścit tattva--_tattva niścayaḥ_niścaya prakārau_prakāra dvau_dvi tatas_tatas devaḥ_deva jagāda_gad paramaḥ_parama śivaḥ_śiva iti_iti

citta--_citta nāśasya_nāśa sākṣiṇaḥ_sākṣin sakāśāt_sakāśa tad--_tad upādhi--_upādhi bhūta--_bhū cittasya_citta pṛthak_pṛthak karaṇāt_karaṇa tad--_tad adarśanasya_adarśana tasya_tad upāya--_upāya dvayam_dvaya ekaḥ_eka asamprajñāta--_asamprajñāta samādhiḥ_samādhi samprajñāta--_samprajñā samādhau_samādhi hi_hi ātma--_ātman eka--_eka ākāra--_ākāra vṛtti--_vṛtti pravāha--_pravāha yuktam_yuj antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa sattvam_sattva sākṣiṇā_sākṣin anubhūyate_anubhū niruddha--_nirudh sarva--_sarva vṛttikam_vṛttika tu_tu upaśānta--_upaśam tvāt_tva na_na anubhūyate_anubhū iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya tu_tu sākṣiṇi_sākṣin kalpitam_kalpay sākṣyam_sākṣya anṛta--_anṛta tvāt_tva na_na asti_as eva_eva sākṣī_sākṣin eva_eva tu_tu paramārtha--_paramārtha satyaḥ_satya kevalaḥ_kevala vidyate_vid iti_iti vicāraḥ_vicāra tatra_tatra pratamam_pratamam upāyam_upāya prapañca--_prapañca parama--_parama artha--_artha tā--_tā vādinaḥ_vādin hairaṇyagarbha--_hairaṇyagarbha ādayaḥ_ādi prapedire_prapad teṣām_tad parama--_parama arthasya_artha cittasya_citta adarśanena_adarśana sākṣi--_sākṣin darśane_darśana nirodha--_nirodha atirikta--_atiric upāya--_upāya sambhavāt_sambhava śrīmat--_śrīmat śaṅkara--_śaṃkara bhagavat--_bhagavat pūjya--_pūjay pāda--_pāda mata--_mata upajīvinaḥ_upajīvin tu_tu aupaniṣadāḥ_aupaniṣada prapañca--_prapañca anṛta--_anṛta tva--_tva vādinaḥ_vādin dvitīyam_dvitīya eva_eva upāyam_upāya upeyuḥ_upe teṣām_tad hi_hi adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna jñāna--_jñāna dārḍhye_dārḍhya sati_as tatra_tatra kalpitasya_kalpay bādhitasya_bādh cittasya_citta tad--_tad dṛśyasya_dṛś ca_ca adarśanam_adarśana anāyāsena_anāyāsa eva_eva upapadyate_upapad ataeva_ataeva bhagavat--_bhagavant pūjya--_pūjay pādāḥ_pāda kutra_kutra api_api brahma--_brahman vidām_vid yoga--_yoga apekṣām_apekṣā na_na babhūva_bhū ataeva_ataeva ca_ca aupaniṣadāḥ_aupaniṣada paramahaṃsāḥ_paramahaṃsa śraute_śrauta vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya vicāre_vicāra eva_eva gurum_guru upasṛtya_upasṛ pravartante_pravṛt brahma--_brahman sākṣātkārāya_sākṣātkāra na_na tu_tu yoge_yoga vicāreṇa_vicāra eva_eva citta--_citta doṣa--_doṣa nirākaraṇena_nirākaraṇa tasya_tad anyathā_anyathā siddha--_sidh tvāt_tva iti_iti kṛtam_kṛ adhikena_adhika 29_29

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha jīvan--_jīv muktasya_muc tasya_tad brahma--_brahman sākṣātkāram_sākṣātkāra darśayati_darśay sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta stham_stha ātmānam_ātman iti_iti paramātmanaḥ_paramātman sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ tvam_tva ātmani_ātman iti_iti paramātmanaḥ_paramātman sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna ca_ca īkṣate_īkṣ aparokṣa--_aparokṣa tayā_tā anubhavati_anubhū yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman brahma--_brahman ākāra--_ākāra antaḥkaraṇaḥ_antaḥkaraṇa samam_sama brahma_brahman eva_eva paśyati_paś iti_iti sama--_sama darśanaḥ_darśana 29_29

baladevaḥ_baladeva anubhavati_anubhū āha_ah yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman siddha--_sidh samādhiḥ_samādhi tat_tad ātmānam_ātman ātata--_ātan tvāt_tva ca_ca mātṛ--_mātṛ tvāt_tva ātmā_ātman hi_hi paramaḥ_parama hariḥ_hari iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti yaḥ_yad mām_mad iti_iti vivaraṇāt_vivaraṇa ca_ca paramātmānam_paramātman sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta stham_stha nikhilam_nikhila jīva--_jīva antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin īkṣate_īkṣ ātmani_ātman tasmin_tad āśraya--_āśraya bhūte_bhū sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta ca_ca tam_tad eva_eva sarva--_sarva jīva--_jīva āśrayam_āśraya ca_ca īkṣate_īkṣ saḥ_tad iti_iti āha_ah sarvatra_sarvatra iti_iti tat_tad tad--_tad karma--_karman ānuguṇyena_ānuguṇya uccāvaca--_uccāvaca tayā_tā sṛṣṭeṣu_sṛj sarveṣu_sarva jīveṣu_jīva
samam_sama vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya śūnyam_śūnya parātmānam_parātman paśyati_dṛś iti_iti tathā_tathā
BhG 6.30

lg.l: yaḥ_yad mām_mad paśyati_paś sarvatra_sarvatra sarvam_sarva ca_ca mayi_mad paśyati_dṛś
tasya_tad aham_mad na_na praṇaśyāmi_praṇaś sa_tad ca_ca me_mad na_na praṇaśyati_praṇaś

div.p: āha_ah mām_mad parameśvaram_parameśvara sarvatra_sarvatra bhūta--_bhūta mātre_mātra yaḥ_yad paśyati_paś sarvam_sarva ca_ca prāṇi--_prāṇin mātram_mātra mayi_mad yaḥ_yad paśyati_paś tasya_tad aham_mad na_na praṇaśyāmi_praṇaś adṛśyaḥ_adṛśya na_na bhavāmi_bhū sa_tad ca_ca mama_mad adṛśyaḥ_adṛśya na_na bhavati_bhū pratyakṣaḥ_pratyakṣa bhūtvā_bhū kṛpā--_kṛpā dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi tam_tad vilokya_vilokay anugṛhṇāmi_anugrah iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nirūpayati_nirūpay yaḥ_yad yogī_yogin mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara tad--_tad padārtham_padārtha aśeṣa--_aśeṣa prapañca--_prapañca kāraṇa--_kāraṇa māyā--_māyā upādhikam_upādhika upādhi--_upādhi vivekena_viveka sarvatra_sarvatra prapañce_prapañca sat--_as rūpeṇa_rūpa sphuraṇa--_sphuraṇa rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca anusyūtam_anusīv sarva--_sarva upādhi--_upādhi vinirmuktam_vinirmuc paramārtha--_paramārtha satyaam_satyaa yoga--_yoga jena_ja pratyakṣeṇa_pratyakṣa aparokṣīkaroti_aparokṣīkṛ tathā_tathā sarvam_sarva ca_ca prapañca--_prapañca jātam_jāta māyayā_māyā mayi_mad āropitam_āropay mad--_mad bhinna--_bhid tayā_tā mṛṣātvena_mṛṣātva eva_eva paśyati_dṛś tasya_tad evam_evam viveka--_viveka darśinaḥ_darśin aham_mad tad--_tad padārthaḥ_padārtha bhagavān_bhagavant na_na praṇaśyāmi_praṇaś īśvaraḥ_īśvara kaścid_kaścit mad--_mad bhinnaḥ_bhid asti_as iti_iti parokṣa--_parokṣa jñāna--_jñāna viṣayaḥ_viṣaya na_na bhavāmi_bhū kintu_kiṃtu yogaja--_yogaja aparokṣa--_aparokṣa jñāna--_jñāna viṣayaḥ_viṣaya bhavāmi_bhū vākya--_vākya ja--_ja aparokṣa--_aparokṣa jñāna--_jñāna viṣaya--_viṣaya tvam_tva tvam_tvad padārtha--_padārtha abhedena_abheda eva_eva tathā_tathā api_api kevalasya_kevala api_api tad--_tad padārthasya_padārtha yoga--_yoga ja--_ja aparokṣa--_aparokṣa jñāna--_jñāna viṣaya--_viṣaya tvam_tva upapadyate_upapad eva_eva evam_evam yoga--_yoga jena_ja pratyakṣeṇa_pratyakṣa mām_mad a_a parokṣīkurvan_parokṣīkṛ sa_tad ca_ca me_mad na_na praṇaśyati_praṇaś parokṣaḥ_parokṣa na_na bhavati_bhū svātmā_svātman hi_hi mama_mad sa_tad vidvān_vid atipriya--_atipriya tvāt_tva sarvadā_sarvadā mad--_mad aparokṣa--_aparokṣa jñāna--_jñāna gocaraḥ_gocara bhavati_bhū ye_yad yathā_yathā mām_mad prapadyante_prapad tān_tad tathā_tathā eva_eva bhajāmi_bhaj aham_mad iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti śara--_śara śayyā--_śayyā stha--_stha bhīṣma--_bhīṣma dhyānasya_dhyāna yudhiṣṭhiram_yudhiṣṭhira prati_prati bhagavatā_bhagavant ukteḥ_ukti a_a vidvān_vid tu_tu sva--_sva ātmānam_ātman api_api santam_as bhagavantam_bhagavat na_na parśyati_parś atas_atas bhagavān_bhagavant paśyan_dṛś api_api tam_tad na_na paśyati_dṛś saḥ_tad enam_enad a_a viditaḥ_vid na_na bhunakti_bhuj iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti vidvān_vidvas tu_tu sadā_sadā eva_eva saṃnihitaḥ_saṃnidhā bhagavataḥ_bhagavant anugraha--_anugraha bhājanam_bhājana iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah tasya_tad aham_mad brahma_brahman na_na praṇaśyāmi_praṇaś na_na a_a pratyakṣībhavāmi_pratyakṣībhū tathā_tathā mad--_mad pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa tāyām_tā śāśvatikyām_śāśvatika satyām_as sa_tad yogī_yogin me_mad mad--_mad upāsakaḥ_upāsaka na_na praṇaśyati_praṇaś na_na kadācid_kadācid api_api bhraśyati_bhraṃś

baladevaḥ_baladeva etat_etad vivṛṇvan_vivṛ tathātva--_tathātva darśiṇaḥ_darśin phalam_phala āha_ah yaḥ_yad mām_mad iti_iti tasya_tad tādṛśasya_tādṛśa yoginaḥ_yogin aham_mad paramātmā_paramātman na_na praṇaśyāmi_praṇaś na_na adṛśyaḥ_adṛśya bhavāmi_bhū sa_tad ca_ca yogī_yogin me_mad na_na praṇaśyati_praṇaś na_na adṛśyaḥ_adṛśya bhavati_bhū āvayoḥ_mad mithas_mithas sākṣātkṛtiḥ_sākṣātkṛti sarvadā_sarvadā bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 6.31

lg.l: sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta sthitam_sthā yaḥ_yad mām_mad bhajati_bhaj ekatvam_ekatva āsthitaḥ_āsthā
sarvathā_sarvathā vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api sa_tad yogī_yogin mayi_mad vartate_vṛt

div.p: syāt_as āha_ah sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta sthitam_sthā mām_mad abhedam_abheda āsthitaḥ_āsthā āśritaḥ_āśri yaḥ_yad bhajati_bhaj sa_tad yogī_yogin jñānī_jñānin sarvathā_sarvathā karma--_karman parityāgena_parityāga api_api vartamānaḥ_vṛt mayi_mad eva_eva vartate_vṛt mucyate_muc na_na tu_tu bhraśyati_bhraṃś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam tvam_tvad padārtham_padārtha tad--_tad padārtham_padārtha ca_ca śuddham_śuddha nirūpya_nirūpay tattvam_tattva asi_as iti_iti vākya--_vākya artham_artha nirūpayati_nirūpay sarva--_sarva bhūtam_bhū iti_iti sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tayā_tā sthitam_sthā sarva--_sarva anusyūta--_anusīv sat--_as mātram_mātra mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara tad--_tad pada--_pada lakṣyam_lakṣya svena_sva tvam_tvad pada--_pada lakṣyeṇa_lakṣya saha_saha ekatvam_ekatva atyanta--_atyanta abhedam_abheda āsthitaḥ_āsthā ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ākāśaḥ_ākāśa mahā--_mahat ākāśaḥ_ākāśa bhajati_bhaj aham_mad brahma_brahman asmi_as iti_iti vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya jena_ja sākṣātkāreṇa_sākṣātkāra aparokṣīkaroti_aparokṣīkṛ saḥ_tad avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya nivṛttyā_nivṛtti jīvanmuktaḥ_jīvanmukta kṛta--_kṛ kṛtyaḥ_kṛtya eva_eva bhavati_bhū yāvat_yāvat tu_tu tasya_tad bādhita--_bādh anuvṛttyā_anuvṛtti śarīra--_śarīra ādi--_ādi darśanam_darśana anuvartate_anuvṛt tāvat_tāvat prārabhda--_prārabhda karma--_karman prābalyāt_prābalya sarva--_sarva karma--_karman tyāgena_tyāga vā_vā yājñavalkya--_yājñavalkya ādi--_ādi vat_vat vihitena_vidhā karmaṇā_karman vā_vā janaka--_janaka ādi--_ādi vat_vat pratiṣiddhena_pratiṣidh karmaṇā_karman vā_vā dattātreya--_dattātreya ādi--_ādi vat_vat sarvathā_sarvathā yena_yad kena_ka api_api rūpeṇa_rūpa vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api vyavaharan_vyavahṛ sa_tad yogī_yogin brahmā_brahman aham_mad asamī_asamin iti_iti vidvān_vid mayi_mad paramātmani_paramātman eva_eva abhedena_abheda vartate_vṛt sarvathā_sarvathā tasya_tad mokṣam_mokṣa prati_prati nā_na asti_as pratibandha--_pratibandha śaṅkā_śaṅkā tasya_tad ha_ha na_na devāḥ_deva cana_cana ābhūtyai_ābhūti īśate_īś ātmā_ātman hi_hi eṣām_idam sa_tad bhavati_bhū iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti devāḥ_deva mahā--_mahat prabhāvāḥ_prabhāva api_api tasya_tad mokṣa--_mokṣa ābhavanāya_ābhavana na_na īśate_īś kim_kim uta_uta anye_anya kṣudrāḥ_kṣudra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha brahma--_brahman vidaḥ_vid niṣiddha--_niṣidh karmaṇi_karman pravartakayoḥ_pravartaka rāga--_rāga dveṣayoḥ_dveṣa asambhavena_asaṃbhava niṣiddha--_niṣidh karma--_karman asambhave_asaṃbhava api_api tat_tad aṅgīkṛtya_aṅgīkṛ jñāna--_jñāna stuti--_stuti artham_artha idam_idam uktam_vac sarvathā_sarvathā vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api iti_iti hatvā_han api_api saḥ_tad imān_idam itivat_itivat

āha_ah paramātmā_paramātman eva_eva sarva--_sarva karaṇa--_karaṇa tvāt_tva ekaḥ_eka asti_as iti_iti ekatvam_ekatva āsthitaḥ_āsthā san_as yaḥ_yad bhajati_bhaj śravaṇa--_śravaṇa smaraṇa--_smaraṇa ādi--_ādi bhajana--_bhajana yuktaḥ_yuj bhavati_bhū sa_tad sarvathā_sarvathā śāstra--_śāstra uktam_vac karma_karman kurvan_kṛ akurvān_akurvat vā_vā vartamānaḥ_vṛt

baladevaḥ_baladeva sa_tad yogī_yogin mama_mad acintya--_acintya svarūpa--_svarūpa śaktim_śakti anubhavan_anubhū atipriyaḥ_atipriya bhavati_bhū iti_iti āśayavān_āśayavat āha_ah sarva--_sarva iti_iti sarveṣām_sarva jīvānām_jīva hṛdayeṣu_hṛdaya prādeśa--_prādeśa mātraḥ_mātra catur--_catur bāhuḥ_bāhu atasī--_atasī puṣpa--_puṣpa prabhaḥ_prabhā cakra--_cakra ādi--_ādi dharaḥ_dhara aham_mad pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthak_pṛthak nivasāmi_nivas teṣu_tad bahūnām_bahu mad--_mad vigrahāṇām_vigraha eka--_eka tvam_tva abhedam_abheda āśritaḥ_āśri yaḥ_yad mām_mad bhajati_bhaj dhyāyati_dhyā saḥ_tad yogī_yogin sarvathā_sarvathā vartamānaḥ_vṛt vyutthāna--_vyutthāna kāle_kāla sva--_sva vihitam_vidhā karma_karman kurvan_kṛ akurvan_akurvat vā_vā mayi_mad vartate_vṛt mama_mad acintya--_acintya nirdagdha--_nirdah kāma--_kāma cāra--_cāra doṣaḥ_doṣa mad--_mad sāmīpya--_sāmīpya lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa mokṣam_mokṣa vindati_vid na_na tu_tu saṃsāram_saṃsāra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca hareḥ_hari acintya--_acintya śatkikatām_śatkikatā āha_ah ekaḥ_eka api_api san_as bahudhā_bahudhā yaḥ_yad avabhāti_avabhā iti_iti smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca
ekaḥ_eka eva_eva paraḥ_para viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu sarva--_sarva vyāpī_vyāpin na_na saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya aiśvaryāt_aiśvarya rūpam_rūpa ekam_eka ca_ca sūrya--_sūrya vat_vat bahudhā_bahudhā iyate_i iti_iti
BhG 6.32

lg.l: ātma--_ātman aupamyena_aupamya sarvatra_sarvatra samam_sama paśyati_dṛś yaḥ_yad arjuna_arjuna
sukham_sukha vā_vā yadi_yadi vā_vā duḥkham_duḥkha sa_tad yogī_yogin paramaḥ_parama mataḥ_man

div.p: bhajatām_bhaj āha_ah ātma--_ātman aupamyena_aupamya sva--_sva sādṛśyena_sādṛśya yathā_yathā mama_mad sukham_sukha priyam_priya duḥkham_duḥkha ca_ca apriyam_apriya tathā_tathā anyeṣām_anya api_api iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra samam_sama paśyan_dṛś sukham_sukha eva_eva sarveṣām_sarva yaḥ_yad vāñchati_vāñch na_na tu_tu kasya_ka api_api duḥkham_duḥkha sa_tad yogī_yogin śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha mama_mad abhimataḥ_abhiman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 32_32

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam utpanne_utpad api_api tatva--_tatva bodhe_bodha kaścid_kaścit manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayayoḥ_kṣaya abhāvāt_abhāva jīvanmukti--_jīvanmukti sukham_sukha na_na anubhavati_anubhū citta--_citta vikṣepeṇa_vikṣepa ca_ca dṛṣṭa--_dṛś duḥkham_duḥkha anubhavati_anubhū saḥ_tad aparamaḥ_aparama yogī_yogin deha--_deha pāte_pāta deha--_deha sat--_as bhāva--_bhāva paryantam_paryanta ca_ca dṛṣṭa--_dṛś duḥkha--_duḥkha anubhavāt_anubhava tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayāṇām_kṣaya tu_tu yugapad_yugapad abhyāsāt_abhyāsa dṛṣṭa--_dṛś duḥkha--_duḥkha nivṛtti--_nivṛtti pūrvakam_pūrvaka jīvanmukti--_jīvanmukti sukham_sukha anubhavan_anubhū prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa samādheḥ_samādhi vyutthāna--_vyutthāna kāle_kāla kim_ka syāt_as iti_iti ucyate_vac

ātmā_ātman eva_eva aupamyam_aupamya upamā_upamā tena_tad ātma--_ātman dṛṣṭāntena_dṛṣṭānta sarvatra_sarvatra prāṇi--_prāṇin jāte_jāta sukham_sukha vā_vā yadi_yadi vā_vā duḥkham_duḥkha samam_sama tulyam_tulya yaḥ_yad paśyati_paś svasya_sva aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa yathā_yathā na_na sampādayati_sampāday evam_evam parasya_para api_api aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa yaḥ_yad nirvāsana--_nirvāsana tayā_tā upaśānta--_upaśam manāḥ_manas yogī_yogin brahma--_brahman vid_vid paramaḥ_parama śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha mataḥ_man pūrvasmāt_pūrva he_he arjuna_arjuna atas_atas tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayāṇām_kṣaya akramam_akrama abhyāsāya_abhyāsa mahān_mahat prayatnaḥ_prayatna āstheyaḥ_āsthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

tatra_tatra idam_idam sarvam_sarva dvaita--_dvaita jātam_jan advitīye_advitīya cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ātmani_ātman māyayā_māyā kalpita--_kalpay tvāt_tva mṛṣā_mṛṣā eva_eva ātmā_ātman eva_eva ekaḥ_eka paramārtha--_paramārtha satyaḥ_satya sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda advayaḥ_advaya aham_mad asmi_as iti_iti jñānam_jñāna tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna pradīpa--_pradīpa pariṇamamānam_pariṇam antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa dravyam_dravya manana--_manana ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva manaḥ_manas iti_iti ucyate_vac tasya_tad nāśe_nāśa nāma_nāma vṛtti--_vṛtti rūpa--_rūpa pariṇāmam_pariṇāma parityajya_parityaj sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhinā_nirodhin nirodha--_nirodha ākāreṇa_ākāra pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma pūrva--_pūrva apara--_apara parāmarśam_parāmarśa antareṇa_antareṇa sahasā_sahas utpadyamānasya_utpad krodha--_krodha ādi--_ādi vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣasya_viśeṣa hetuḥ_hetu citta--_citta gataḥ_gam saṃskāra--_saṃskāra viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa vāsanā_vāsanā pūrva--_pūrva pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsena_abhyāsa citte_citta vāsyamāna--_vāsay tvāt_tva tasyāḥ_tad kṣayaḥ_kṣaya nāma_nāma viveka--_viveka janyāyām_jan citta--_citta praśama--_praśama vāsanāyām_vāsanā dṛḍhāyām_dṛḍha sati_as api_api bāhye_bāhya nimitte_nimitta krodha--_krodha ādi--_ādi anutpattiḥ_anutpatti tatra_tatra tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna sati_as mithyā_mithyā bhūte_bhū jagati_jagant nara--_nara viṣāṇa--_viṣāṇa ādau_ādi iva_iva dhī--_dhī vṛtti--_vṛtti anudayāt_anudaya ātmanaḥ_ātman ca_ca dṛṣṭa--_dṛś tvena_tva punar_punar vṛtti--_vṛtti anupayogāt_anupayoga nirandhana--_nirandhana agni--_agni vat_vat manaḥ_manas naśyati_naś naṣṭe_naś ca_ca manasi_manas saṃskāra--_saṃskāra udbodhakasya_udbodhaka bāhyasya_bāhya nimittasya_nimitta apratītau_apratīti vāsanā_vāsanā kṣīyate_kṣi kṣīṇāyām_kṣi vāsanāyām_vāsanā hetu--_hetu abhāvena_abhāva krodha--_krodha ādi--_ādi vṛtti--_vṛtti anudayāt_anudaya manaḥ_manas naśyati_naś naṣṭe_naś ca_ca manasi_manas śama--_śama dama--_dama ādi--_ādi sampattyā_sampatti tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna udeti_udi evam_evam utpanne_utpad tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi rūpā_rūpa vāsanā_vāsanā kṣīyate_kṣi kṣīṇāyām_kṣi ca_ca vāsanāyām_vāsanā pratibandha--_pratibandha abhāvāt_abhāva tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna udayaḥ_udaya iti_iti paraspara--_paraspara kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvam_tva darśanīyam_dṛś

lg.l: ataeva_ataeva bhagavān_bhagavat vasiṣṭhaḥ_vasiṣṭha āha_ah
tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna manaḥ--_manas nāśaḥ_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayaḥ_kṣaya eva_eva ca_ca
mithas_mithas kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tām_tā gatvā_gam duḥsādhyāni_duḥsādhya sthitāni_sthā hi_hi

div.p: tasmāt_tasmāt rāghava_rāghava yatnena_yatna pauruṣeṇa_pauruṣa vivekinā_vivekin bhoga--_bhoga icchām_icchā dūratas_dūratas tyaktvā_tyaj trayam_traya etat_etad samāśraya_samāśri iti_iti pauruṣaḥ_pauruṣa yatnaḥ_yatna kena_ka api_api upāyena_upāya avaśyam_avaśyam sampādayiṣyāmi_sampāday iti_iti evaṃvidha--_evaṃvidha utsāha--_utsāha rūpaḥ_rūpa nirbandhaḥ_nirbandha vivekaḥ_viveka nāma_nāma vivicya_vivic niścayaḥ_niścaya tattva--_tattva jñānasya_jñāna śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādikam_ādika sādhanam_sādhana manaḥ--_manas nāśasya_nāśa yogaḥ_yoga vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayasya_kṣaya pratikūla--_pratikūla vāsanā--_vāsanā utpādanam_utpādana iti_iti etādṛśa--_etādṛśa viveka--_viveka yuktena_yuj pauruṣeṇa_pauruṣa prayatnena_prayatna bhoga--_bhoga icchāyāḥ_icchā su_su alpāyāḥ_alpa api_api haviṣā_havis kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa vartmā_vartman iva_iva iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya vāsanā--_vāsanā vṛddhi--_vṛddhi hetutvāt_hetutva dūratas_dūratas iti_iti uktam_vac

dvividhaḥ_dvividha hi_hi vidyā--_vidyā adhikārī_adhikārin kṛta--_kṛ upāstiḥ_upāsti a_a kṛta--_kṛ upāstiḥ_upāsti ca_ca tatra_tatra yaḥ_yad upāsya--_upās sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra paryantām_paryanta upāstim_upāsti kṛtvā_kṛ tattva--_tattva jñānāya_jñāna pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt tasya_tad vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣaya--_kṣaya manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa ayoḥ_aya dṛḍhatara--_dṛḍhatara tvena_tva jñānāt_jñāna ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam jīvan--_jīv muktiḥ_mukti svatas_svatas eva_eva sidhyati_sidh idānīṃtanaḥ_idānīṃtana tu_tu prāyeṇa_prāyeṇa akṛta--_akṛta upāstiḥ_upāsti eva_eva mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu autsukya--_autsukya mātrāt_mātra sahasā_sahas vidyāyām_vidyā pravartate_pravṛt yogam_yoga vinā_vinā cit--_cit jaḍa--_jaḍa viveka--_viveka mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva ca_ca manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayau_kṣaya tātkālikau_tātkālika sampādya_sampāday śama--_śama dama--_dama ādi--_ādi sampattyā_sampatti śravana--_śravana manana--_manana nididhyāsanāni_nididhyāsana sampādayati_sampāday taiḥ_tad ca_ca dṛḍha--_dṛḍha abhyastaiḥ_abhyas sarva--_sarva bandha--_bandha vicchedi_vicchedin tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna udeti_udi avidyā--_avidyā granthi--_granthi brahmatvam_brahmatva hṛdaya--_hṛdaya granthiḥ_granthi saṃśayāḥ_saṃśaya karmāṇi_karman asarva--_asarva kāma--_kāma tvam_tva mṛtyuḥ_mṛtyu punar_punar janma_janman ca_ca iti_iti aneka--_aneka vidhaḥ_vidha bandhaḥ_bandha jñānāt_jñāna nivartate_nivṛt tathā_tathā ca_ca śrūyate_śru yaḥ_yad veda_vid nihitam_nidhā guhāyām_guhā saḥ_tad avidyā--_avidyā granthim_granthi vikirati_vikṛ iha_iha somya_somya brahma_brahman veda_vid brahmā_brahman eva_eva bhavati_bhū

lg.l: bhidyate_bhid hṛdaya--_hṛdaya granthiḥ_granthi chidyante_chid sarva--_sarva saṃśayāḥ_saṃśaya
kṣīyante_kṣi ca_ca asya_idam karmāṇi_karman tasmin_tad dṛṣṭe_dṛś parāvare_parāvara

div.p: satyam_satya jñānam_jñāna anantam_ananta brahma_brahman yaḥ_yad veda_vid nihitam_nidhā guhāyām_guhā parame_parama vyoman_vyoman saḥ_tad aśnute_aś sarvān_sarva kāmān_kāma saha_saha tam_tad eva_eva viditvā_vid atimṛtyum_atimṛtyu eti_i

lg.l: yaḥ_yad tu_tu vijñānavān_vijñānavat bhavati_bhū sa_sa manaskaḥ_manaska sadā_sadā śuciḥ_śuci
sa_tad tu_tu tat_tad padam_pada āpnoti_āp yasmāt_yad bhūyas_bhūyas na_na jāyate_jan

div.p: yaḥ_yad evam_evam veda_vid aham_mad brahma_brahman asmi_as iti_iti saḥ_tad idam_idam sarvam_sarva bhavati_bhū iti_iti asarvatva--_asarvatva nivṛtti--_nivṛtti phalam_phala udāhāryam_udāhṛ sā_tad iyam_idam videha--_videha muktiḥ_mukti satī_as api_api dehe_deha jñāna--_jñāna utpatti--_utpatti sama--_sama kālīnā_kālīna jñeyā_jñā brahmaṇi_brahman avidyā--_avidyā adhyāropitānām_adhyāropay eteṣām_etad bandhānām_bandha avidyā--_avidyā nāśe_nāśa sati_as nivṛttau_nivṛtti punar_punar utpatti--_utpatti asambhavāt_asaṃbhava atas_atas śaithilya--_śaithilya hetu--_hetu abhāvāt_abhāva tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna tasya_tad anuvartate_anuvṛt manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayau_kṣaya tu_tu dṛḍha--_dṛḍha abhyāsa--_abhyāsa abhāvāt_abhāva bhoga--_bhoga pradena_prada prārabdhena_prārabh karmaṇā_karman bādhyamāna--_bādh tvāt_tva ca_ca sa_sa vāta--_vāta pradeśa--_pradeśa pradīpa--_pradīpa vat_vat sahasā_sahas nivartete_nivṛt atas_atas idānīṃtanasya_idānīṃtana tattva--_tattva jñāninaḥ_jñānin prāc--_prāñc siddhe_sidh tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna na_na prayatna--_prayatna apekṣā_apekṣā kim_ka tu_tu manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayau_kṣaya prayatna--_prayatna sādhyau_sādhay iti_iti tatra_tatra manaḥ--_manas nāśaḥ_nāśa asamprajñāta--_asamprajñāta samādhi--_samādhi nirūpaṇena_nirūpaṇa nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay prāk_prāk vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayaḥ_kṣaya tu_tu idānīm_idānīm nirūpyate_nirūpay
āha_ah

lg.l: dṛḍha--_dṛḍha bhāvanayā_bhāvanā tyakta--_tyaj pūrva--_pūrva apara--_apara vicāraṇam_vicāraṇa
yat_yad ādānam_ādāna padārthasya_padārtha vāsanā_vāsanā sā_tad prakīrtitā_prakīrtay

div.p: atra_atra ca_ca sva--_sva sva--_sva deśa--_deśa ācāra--_ācāra kula--_kula dharma--_dharma svabhāva--_svabhāva bheda--_bheda tad--_tad gata--_gam apaśabda--_apaśabda su_su śabda--_śabda ādiṣu_ādi prāṇinām_prāṇin abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa sāmānyena_sāmānya udāharaṇam_udāharaṇa sā_tad ca_ca vāsanā_vāsanā dvividhā_dvividha malinā_malina śuddhā_śuddha ca_ca śuddhā_śudh daivī_daiva sampad_sampad śāstra--_śāstra saṃskāra--_saṃskāra prābalyāt_prābalya tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna sādhana--_sādhana tvena_tva eka--_eka rūpā_rūpa eva_eva malinā_malina tu_tu trividhā_trividha loka--_loka vāsanā_vāsanā śāstra--_śāstra vāsanā_vāsanā deha--_deha vāsanā_vāsanā ca_ca iti_iti sarve_sarva janāḥ_jana yathā_yathā na_na nindanti_nind tathā_tathā eva_eva ācariṣyāmi_ācar iti_iti aśakya--_aśakya artha--_artha abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa loka--_loka vāsanā_vāsanā tasyāḥ_tad ca_ca kaḥ_ka lokam_loka ārādhayitum_ārādhay samarthaḥ_samartha iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya sampādayitum_sampāday aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha anupayogi--_anupayogin tvāt_tva ca_ca malina--_malina tvam_tva śāstra--_śāstra vāsanā_vāsanā tu_tu trividhā_trividha pāṭha--_pāṭha vyasanam_vyasana bahu--_bahu śāstra--_śāstra vyasanam_vyasana anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna vyasanam_vyasana ca_ca iti_iti krameṇa_krameṇa bharadvājasya_bharadvāja durvāsasaḥ_durvāsas nidāghasya_nidāgha ca_ca prasiddhā_prasidh malina--_malina tvam_tva ca_ca asyāḥ_idam kleśa--_kleśa āvaha--_āvaha tvāt_tva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha anupayogi--_anupayogin tvāt_tva darpa--_darpa hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva janma--_janman hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva ca_ca deha--_deha vāsanā_vāsanā api_api trividhā_trividha ātmatva--_ātmatva bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti guṇa--_guṇa ādhāna--_ādhāna bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti guṇa--_guṇa ādhāna--_ādhāna bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti doṣa--_doṣa apanayana--_apanayana bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti ca_ca iti_iti tatra_tatra ātmatva--_ātmatva bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti virocana--_virocana ādiṣu_ādi prasiddhā_prasidh sārvalaukikī_sārvalaukika guṇa--_guṇa ādhānam_ādhāna dvividham_dvividha laukikam_laukika śāstrīyam_śāstrīya ca_ca samīcīna--_samīcīna śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya sampādanam_sampādana laukikam_laukika gaṅgā--_gaṅgā snāna--_snāna śālagrāma--_śālagrāma tīrtha--_tīrtha ādi--_ādi sampādanam_sampādana śāstrīyam_śāstrīya doṣa--_doṣa apanayanam_apanayana api_api dvividham_dvividha laukikam_laukika śāstrīyam_śāstrīya ca_ca cikitsaka--_cikitsaka uktaiḥ_vac auṣadhaiḥ_auṣadha vyādhi--_vyādhi ādi--_ādi apanayanam_apanayana laukikam_laukika vaidika--_vaidika snāna--_snāna ācamana--_ācamana ādibhiḥ_ādi aśauca--_aśauca ādi--_ādi apanayanam_apanayana vaidikam_vaidika etasyāḥ_etad ca_ca sarva--_sarva prakārāyāḥ_prakāra malina--_malina tvam_tva a_a prāmāṇika--_prāmāṇika tvāt_tva aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha anupayogi--_anupayogin tvāt_tva punar_punar janma--_janman hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva ca_ca tat_tad etat_etad loka--_loka śāstra--_śāstra deha--_deha vāsanā--_vāsanā trayam_traya avivekanām_avivekana upādeya--_upādā tvena_tva pratibhāsamānam_pratibhās api_api vividiṣoḥ_vividiṣu vedanā--_vedanā utpatti--_utpatti virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva viduṣaḥ_vidvas jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva ca_ca vivekibhiḥ_vivekin heyam_hā

tat_tad evam_evam bāhya--_bāhya viṣaya--_viṣaya vāsanā_vāsanā trividhā_trividha nirūpitā_nirūpay ābhyantara--_ābhyantara vāsanā_vāsanā tu_tu kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha dambha--_dambha darpa--_darpa ādi--_ādi āsura--_āsura sampad--_sampad rūpā_rūpa sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha mūlam_mūla mānasī_mānasa vāsanā_vāsanā iti_iti ucyate_vac tat_tad evam_evam bāhya--_bāhya ābhyantara--_ābhyantara vāsanā--_vāsanā catuṣṭayasya_catuṣṭaya śuddha--_śuddha vāsanayā_vāsanā kṣayaḥ_kṣaya sampādanīyaḥ_sampāday tat_tad uktam_vac vasiṣṭhena_vasiṣṭha
mānasīḥ_mānasa vāsanāḥ_vāsanā pūrvam_pūrvam tyaktvā_tyaj viṣaya--_viṣaya vāsanāḥ_vāsanā maitrī--_maitrī ādi--_ādi vāsanāḥ_vāsanā rāma_rāma gṛhāṇa_gṛha amala--_amala vāsanāḥ_vāsanā

tatra_tatra viṣaya--_viṣaya vāsanā--_vāsanā śabdena_śabda pūrvoktāḥ_pūrvokta tisraḥ_tri loka--_loka śāstra--_śāstra veda--_veda vāsanāḥ_vāsanā vivakṣitāḥ_vivakṣita yat_yat vā_vā śabda--_śabda sparśa--_sparśa rūpa--_rūpa rasa--_rasa gandhāḥ_gandha viṣayāḥ_viṣaya teṣām_tad bhujyamāna--_bhuj tva--_tva daśā--_daśā janyaḥ_jan saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra viṣaya--_viṣaya vāsanā_vāsanā asmin_idam pakṣe_pakṣa pūrvoktānām_pūrvokta catasṛṇām_catur anayoḥ_idam eva_eva antarbhāvaḥ_antarbhāva vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka vāsanā--_vāsanā antara--_antara asambhavāt_asaṃbhava tāsām_tad vāsanānām_vāsanā parityāgaḥ_parityāga nāma_nāma tad--_tad viruddha--_virudh maitrī--_maitrī ādi--_ādi vāsanā--_vāsanā utpādanam_utpādana tāḥ_tad ca_ca maitrī--_maitrī ādi--_ādi vāsanāḥ_vāsanā bhagavatā_bhagavat patañjalinā_patañjali sūtritāḥ_sūtray prāk_prāk saṃkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa vyākhyātāḥ_vyākhyā api_api punar_punar vyākhyāyante_vyākhyā

cittam_citta hi_hi rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa puṇya--_puṇya pāpaiḥ_pāpa kaluṣīkriyate_kaluṣīkṛ tatra_tatra sukha--_sukha anuśayī_anuśayin rāgaḥ_rāga mohāt_moha anubhūyamānam_anubhū sukham_sukha anuśete_anuśī kaścid_kaścit dhī--_dhī vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa rājasaḥ_rājasa sarvam_sarva sukha--_sukha jātīyam_jātīya me_mad bhūyāt_bhū iti_iti tat_tad ca_ca dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa sāmagrī--_sāmagrī abhāvāt_abhāva sampādayitum_sampāday aśakyam_aśakya atas_atas sa_tad rāgaḥ_rāga cittam_citta kaluṣīkaroti_kaluṣīkṛ yadā_yadā tu_tu prāṇiṣu_prāṇin ayam_idam maitrīm_maitrī bhāvayet_bhāvay sarve_sarva api_api ete_etad sukhinaḥ_sukhin madīyāḥ_madīya iti_iti tadā_tadā tat_tad sukham_sukha svakīyam_svakīya eva_eva sampannam_sampad iti_iti bhāvayataḥ_bhāvay tatra_tatra rāgaḥ_rāga nivartate_nivṛt yathā_yathā svasya_sva rājya--_rājya nivṛttau_nivṛtti api_api putra--_putra ādi--_ādi rājyam_rājya eva_eva svakīyam_svakīya rājyam_rājya tadvat_tadvat nivṛtte_nivṛt ca_ca rāge_rāga varṣā--_varṣā vyapāye_vyapāya jalam_jala iva_iva cittam_citta prasīdati_prasad tathā_tathā duḥkha--_duḥkha anuśayī_anuśayin dveṣaḥ_dveṣa duḥkham_duḥkha anuśete_anuśī kaścd_kaścd dhī--_dhī vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa tamaḥ_tamas anugata--_anugam rajaḥ--_rajas pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma īdṛśam_īdṛśa sarvam_sarva duḥkham_duḥkha sarvadā_sarvadā me_mad mā_mā bhūt_bhū iti_iti tat_tad ca_ca śatru--_śatru vyāghra--_vyāghra ādiṣu_ādi satsya_satsya na_na nivārayitum_nivāray śakyam_śakya na_na ca_ca sarve_sarva te_tad duḥkha--_duḥkha hetavaḥ_hetu hantum_han śakyante_śak atas_atas sa_tad dveṣaḥ_dveṣa sadā_sadā hṛdayam_hṛdaya dahati_dah yadā_yadā tu_tu svasya_sva iva_iva pareṣām_para sarveṣām_sarva api_api duḥkham_duḥkha mā_mā bhūt_bhū iti_iti karuṇām_karuṇā duḥkhiṣu_duḥkhin bhāvayet_bhāvay tadā_tadā vairya--_vairya ādi--_ādi dveṣa--_dveṣa nivṛttau_nivṛtti cittam_citta prasīdati_prasad tathā_tathā ca_ca smaryate_smṛ
prāṇāḥ_prāṇa yathā_yathā ātmanaḥ_ātman abhīṣṭāḥ_abhīṣ bhūtānām_bhūta api_api te_tad tathā_tathā ātma--_ātman aupamyena_aupamya bhūteṣu_bhūta dayām_dayā kurvanti_kṛ sādhavaḥ_sādhu iti_iti

etat_etad eva_eva iha_iha api_api uktam_vac ātma--_ātman aupamyena_aupamya sarvatra_sarvatra iti_iti ādi_ādi tathā_tathā prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva eva_eva puṇyam_puṇya na_na anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā pāpam_pāpa tu_tu anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā tat_tad āhuḥ_ah
puṇyasya_puṇya phalam_phala icchanti_iṣ puṇyam_puṇya na_na icchanti_iṣ mānavāḥ_mānava na_na pāpa--_pāpa phalam_phala icchanti_iṣ pāpam_pāpa kurvanti_kṛ yatnataḥ_yatna

te_tad ca_ca puṇya--_puṇya pāpe_pāpa a_a kriyamāṇa--_kṛ kriyamāṇe_kṛ paścāt_paścāt tāpam_tāpa janayataḥ_janay sa_tad ca_ca śrutyā_śruti anūditaḥ_anuvad kim_kim aham_mad sādhu_sādhu na_na akaravam_kṛ kim_kim aham_mad pāpam_pāpa akaravam_kṛ iti_iti yadi_yadi asau_adas puṇya--_puṇya puruṣeṣu_puruṣa muditām_muditā bhāvayet_bhāvay tadā_tadā tad--_tad vāsanāvān_vāsanāvat svayam_svayam eva_eva apramattaḥ_apramatta a_a śukla--_śukla kṛṣṇe_kṛṣṇa puṇye_puṇya pravartate_pravṛt tat_tad uktam_vac karma_karman aśukla--_aśukla kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa yoginaḥ_yogin trividham_trividha itareṣām_itara ayoginām_ayogin trividham_trividha śuklam_śukla śubham_śubha kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa aśubham_aśubha śukla--_śukla kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa śubha--_śubha aśubham_aśubha iti_iti tathā_tathā pāpa--_pāpa puruṣeṣu_puruṣa upekṣām_upekṣā bhāvayan_bhāvay svayam_svayam api_api tad--_tad vāsanāvān_vāsanāvat pāpāt_pāpa nivartate_nivṛt

tatas_tatas ca_ca puṇya--_puṇya akaraṇa--_akaraṇa pāpa--_pāpa karaṇa--_karaṇa nimittasya_nimitta paścāttāpasya_paścāttāpa abhāve_abhāva cittam_citta prasīdati_prasad evam_evam sukhiṣu_sukhin maitrīm_maitrī bhāvayataḥ_bhāvay na_na kevalam_kevala rāgaḥ_rāga nivartate_nivṛt kiṃtu_kiṃtu asūyā--_asūyā īrṣyā--_īrṣyā ādayaḥ_ādi api_api nivartante_nivṛt para--_para guṇeṣu_guṇa doṣa--_doṣa āviṣkaraṇam_āviṣkaraṇa asūyā_asūyā para--_para guṇānām_guṇa asahanam_asahana īrṣyā_īrṣyā yadā_yadā maitrī--_maitrī vaśāt_vaśa para--_para sukham_sukha svīyam_svīya eva_eva sampannam_sampad tadā_tadā para--_para guṇeṣu_guṇa katham_katham asūyā--_asūyā ādikam_ādika sambhavet_sambhū tathā_tathā duḥkhiṣu_duḥkhin karuṇām_karuṇā bhāvayataḥ_bhāvay śatru--_śatru vadha--_vadha ādi--_ādi karaḥ_kara dveṣaḥ_dveṣa yadā_yadā nivartate_nivṛt tadā_tadā duḥkhi--_duḥkhin tva--_tva pratiyogika--_pratiyogika sva--_sva sukhi--_sukhin tva--_tva prayukta--_prayuj darpaḥ_darpa api_api nivartate_nivṛt evam_evam doṣa--_doṣa antara--_antara nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti api_api ūhanīyā_ūh vāsiṣṭha--_vāsiṣṭha rāmāyaṇa--_rāmāyaṇa ādiṣu_ādi

tat_tad evam_evam tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna manaḥ--_manas nāśaḥ_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayaḥ_kṣaya ca_ca iti_iti trayam_traya abhyasanīyam_abhyas tatra_tatra kena_ka api_api dvāreṇa_dvāra punar_punar punar_punar tattva--_tattva anusmaraṇam_anusmaraṇa tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa tat_tad uktam_vac

lg.l: tad--_tad cintanam_cintana tad--_tad kathanam_kathana anyonyam_anyonya tad--_tad prabodhanam_prabodhana
etat_etad eka--_eka para--_para tvam_tva ca_ca brahma--_brahman abhyāsam_abhyāsa viduḥ_vid budhāḥ_budha

div.p: sarga--_sarga ādau_ādi eva_eva na_na utpannam_utpad dṛśyam_dṛś na_na asti_as eva_eva tat_tad sadā_sadā idam_idam jagat_jagant aham_mad ca_ca iti_iti bodha--_bodha abhyāsam_abhyāsa viduḥ_vid param_para
atyanta--_atyanta abhāva--_abhāva sampattau_sampatti jñātuḥ_jñātṛ jñeyasya_jñā vastunaḥ_vastu yuktyā_yukti śāstraiḥ_śāstra yatante_yat ye_yad te_tad api_api atra_atra abhyāsinaḥ_abhyāsin sthitāḥ_sthā

lg.l: dṛśya--_dṛś asambhava--_asaṃbhava bodhena_bodha rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi tānave_tānava
ratiḥ_rati ghana--_ghana uditā_vad yā_yad asau_adas brahma--_brahman abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa saḥ_tad ucyate_vac

div.p: iti_iti rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi kṣīṇa--_kṣi tā--_tā rūpa--_rūpa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣaya--_kṣaya abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa uktaḥ_vac tasmāt_tasmāt upapannam_upapad etat_etad tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna abhyāsena_abhyāsa manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa abhyāsena_abhyāsa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣaya--_kṣaya abhyāsena_abhyāsa ca_ca rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa śūnyatayā_śūnyatā yaḥ_yad sva--_sva para--_para sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādiṣu_ādi sama--_sama dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi sa_tad paramaḥ_parama yogī_yogin mataḥ_man yogī_yogin iti_iti 32_32

syāt_as tatra_tatra mukhyam_mukhya sāmyam_sāmya vyacaṣṭe_vicakṣ ātma--_ātman aupamyena_aupamya iti_iti sukham_sukha vā_vā duḥkham_duḥkha vā_vā iti_iti yathā_yathā mama_mad sukham_sukha priyam_priya duḥkham_duḥkha apriyam_apriya tathā_tathā eva_eva anyeṣām_anya api_api iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra samam_sama paśyan_dṛś sukham_sukha eva_eva sarveṣām_sarva yaḥ_yad vāñchati_vāñch na_na tu_tu kasya_ka api_api duḥkham_duḥkha sa_tad yogī_yogin śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha 32_32

baladevaḥ_baladeva sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta hite_hita rataḥ_ram iti_iti yat_yad prāk_prāk uktam_vac tat_tad viśadayati_viśaday ātma--_ātman aupamyena_aupamya iti_iti vyutthāna--_vyutthāna daśāyām_daśā ātma--_ātman aupamyena_aupamya sva--_sva sādṛśyena_sādṛśya sukham_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha ca_ca yaḥ_yad sarvatra_sarvatra samam_sama paśyati_dṛś svasya_sva iva_iva parasya_para sukham_sukha eva_eva icchati_iṣ na_na tu_tu duḥkham_duḥkha sa_tad sva--_sva para--_para sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha sama--_sama dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi sarva--_sarva anukampī_anukampin yogī_yogin mama_mad paramaḥ_parama śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha abhimataḥ_abhiman tad--_tad viṣama--_viṣama dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi tu_tu tattva--_tattva jñaḥ_jña api_api aparama--_aparama yogī_yogin iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 32_32
BhG 6.33

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
yaḥ_yad ayam_idam yogaḥ_yoga tvayā_tvad proktaḥ_pravac sāmyena_sāmya madhusūdana_madhusūdana
etasya_etad aham_mad na_na paśyāmi_dṛś cañcala--_cañcala tvāt_tva sthitim_sthiti sthirām_sthira

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara ukta--_vac lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa yogasya_yoga asaṃbhavam_asaṃbhava manvānaḥ_man arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac yaḥ_yad ayam_idam iti_iti sāmyena_sāmya manasaḥ_manas laya--_laya vikṣepa--_vikṣepa śūnya--_śūnya tayā_tā kevala--_kevala ātma--_ātman ākāra--_ākāra avasthānena_avasthāna yaḥ_yad ayam_idam yogaḥ_yoga tvayā_tvad proktaḥ_pravac etasya_etad sthirām_sthira dīrgha--_dīrgha kālām_kāla sthitim_sthiti na_na paśyāmi_paś manasaḥ_manas cañcala--_cañcala tvāt_tva 33_33

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana uktam_vac artham_artha ākṣipan_ākṣip arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac yaḥ_yad ayam_idam iti_iti yaḥ_yad ayam_idam sarvatra_sarvatra samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa paramaḥ_parama yogaḥ_yoga sāmyena_sāmya samatvena_samatva citta--_citta gatānām_gam rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādīnām_ādi viṣama--_viṣama dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi hetūnām_hetu nirākaraṇena_nirākaraṇa tvayā_tvad sarvajñena_sarvajña īśvareṇa_īśvara uktaḥ_vac he_he madhusūdana_madhusūdana sarva--_sarva vaidika--_vaidika sampradāya--_sampradāya pravartaka_pravartaka etasya_etad tvad--_tvad uktasya_vac sarva--_sarva manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodha--_nirodha lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa yogasya_yoga sthitim_sthiti vidyamānatām_vidyamānatā sthirām_sthira dīrgha--_dīrgha kāla--_kāla anuvartinīm_anuvartin na_na paśyāmi_dṛś na_na sambhāvayāmi_sambhāvay aham_mad vā_vā yoga--_yoga abhyāsa--_abhyāsa nipuṇaḥ_nipuṇa kasmāt_kasmāt na_na sambhāvayasi_sambhāvay tatra_tatra āha_ah cañcala--_cañcala tvāt_tva manasaḥ_manas iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa 33_33

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha bhagavat--_bhagavant ukta--_vac lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa sāmyasya_sāmya duṣkara--_duṣkara tvam_tva ālakṣya_ālakṣay uvāca_vac yaḥ_yad ayam_idam iti_iti etasya_etad sāmyena_sāmya prāptasya_prāp yogasya_yoga sthirām_sthira sārvadikīm_sārvadika sthitim_sthiti na_na paśyāmi_paś eṣa_etad yogaḥ_yoga sarvadā_sarvadā na_na tiṣṭhati_sthā kintu_kiṃtu tri--_tri catura--_catura dināni_dina eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kutas_kutas cañcala--_cañcala tvāt_tva tathā_tathā hi_hi ātma--_ātman duḥkha--_duḥkha sukha--_sukha samam_sama eva_eva sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant varti--_vartin janānām_jana sukha--_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha paśyet_paś iti_iti sāmyam_sāmya uktam_vac tatra_tatra ye_yad bandhavaḥ_bandhu taṭasthāḥ_taṭastha ca_ca teṣu_tad sāmyam_sāmya bhavet_bhū api_api ye_yad ripavaḥ_ripu ghātakāḥ_ghātaka dveṣṭāraḥ_dveṣṭṛ nindakāḥ_nindaka ca_ca teṣu_tad na_na sambhavet_sambhū eva_eva na_na hi_hi mayā_mad svasya_sva yudhiṣṭhirasya_yudhiṣṭhira duryodhanasya_duryodhana ca_ca sukha--_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha sarvathā_sarvathā tulye_tulya draṣṭum_dṛś śakyete_śak yadi_yadi ca_ca svasya_sva sva--_sva ripūṇām_ripu ca_ca jīvātma--_jīvātman paramātma--_paramātman prāṇa--_prāṇa indriya--_indriya daihika--_daihika bhūtāni_bhūta samāni_sama eva_eva iti_iti vivekena_viveka prabalasya_prabala ati_ati cañcalasya_cañcala manasaḥ_manas nigrahaṇa--_nigrahaṇa aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva pratyuta_pratyuta viṣaya--_viṣaya āsaktena_āsañj tena_tad manasā_manas eva_eva vivekasya_viveka grasyamāna--_gras tva--_tva darśanāt_darśana iti_iti 33_33

baladevaḥ_baladeva uktam_vac ākṣipan_ākṣip arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac yaḥ_yad ayam_idam iti_iti sāmyena_sāmya sva--_sva para--_para sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha taulyena_taulya yaḥ_yad ayam_idam yogaḥ_yoga tvayā_tvad sarvajñena_sarvajña proktaḥ_pravac tasya_tad sthirām_sthira sārvadikīm_sārvadika sthitim_sthiti niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā api_api aham_mad na_na paśyāmi_dṛś kintu_kiṃtu dvi--_dvi trāṇi_tra eva_eva dināni_dina iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kutas_kutas cañcala--_cañcala tvāt_tva ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha bandhuṣu_bandhu udāsīneṣu_udāsīna ca_ca tat_tad sāmyam_sāmya kadācid_kadācid syāt_as na_na ca_ca śatruṣu_śatru nindakeṣu_nindaka ca_ca kadācid_kadācid api_api yadi_yadi paramātma--_paramātman adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tvam_tva sarvatra_sarvatra aviśeṣam_aviśeṣa iti_iti vivekena_viveka tat_tad grāhyam_grah tarhi_tarhi na_na tat_tad sārvadikam_sārvadika ati_ati capalasya_capala baliṣṭhasya_baliṣṭha ca_ca manasaḥ_manas tena_tad vivekena_viveka nigrahītum_nigrah aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva iti_iti 33_33
BhG 6.34

lg.l: cañcalam_cañcala hi_hi manaḥ_manas kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa pramāthi_pramāthin balavat_balavat dṛḍham_dṛḍham
tasya_tad aham_mad nigraham_nigraha manye_man vāyoḥ_vāyu iva_iva su_su duṣkaram_duṣkara

div.p: cañcalam_cañcala svabhāvena_svabhāva eva_eva capalam_capala kim_ka ca_ca pramāthi_pramāthin pramathana--_pramathana śīlam_śīla deha--_deha indriya--_indriya kṣobha--_kṣobha karam_kara iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka ca_ca balavat_balavat vicāreṇa_vicāra api_api jetum_ji aśakyam_aśakya kim_ka ca_ca dṛḍham_dṛḍha viṣaya--_viṣaya vāsanā--_vāsanā anubaddha--_anubandh tayā_tā durbhedam_durbheda atas_atas yathā_yathā ākāśe_ākāśa dodhūyamānasya_dodhūy vāyoḥ_vāyu kumbha--_kumbha ādiṣu_ādi nirodhanam_nirodhana aśakyam_aśakya tathā_tathā aham_mad tasya_tad manasaḥ_manas nigraham_nigraha nirodham_nirodha su_su duṣkaram_duṣkara sarvathā_sarvathā kartum_kṛ aśakyam_aśakya manye_man

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sarva--_sarva loka--_loka prasiddha--_prasidh tvena_tva tat_tad eva_eva cañcalatvam_cañcalatva upapādayati_upapāday cañcalam_cañcala hi_hi iti_iti cañcalam_cañcala atyartham_atyartham calam_cala sadā_sadā calana--_calana svabhāvam_svabhāva manaḥ_manas hi_hi prasiddham_prasidh eva_eva etat_etad bhaktānām_bhakta pāpa--_pāpa ādi--_ādi doṣān_doṣa sarvathā_sarvathā nivārayitum_nivāray aśakyān_aśakya api_api kṛṣati_kṛṣ nivārayati_nivāray teṣām_tad eva_eva sarvathā_sarvathā prāptum_prāp aśayān_aśaya api_api puruṣa--_puruṣa arthān_artha ākarṣati_ākṛṣ prāpayati_prāpay iti_iti vā_vā kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa tena_tad rūpeṇa_rūpa sambodhayan_sambodhay durnivāram_durnivāra api_api citta--_citta cāñcalyam_cāñcalya nivārya_nivāray duṣprāpam_duṣprāpa api_api samādhi--_samādhi sukham_sukha tvam_tvad eva_eva prāpayitum_prāpay śaknoṣi_śak iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay na_na kevalam_kevalam atyartham_atyartham cañcalam_cañcala kintu_kintu pramāthi_pramāthin śarīram_śarīra indriyāṇi_indriya ca_ca pramathitum_pramath kṣobhayitum_kṣobhay śīlam_śīla yasya_yad tat_tad kṣobhaka--_kṣobhaka tayā_tā śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya saṃghātasya_saṃghāta vivaśa--_vivaśa tā--_tā hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka ca_ca balavat_balavat abhipretāt_abhipre viṣayāt_viṣaya kena_ka api_api upāyena_upāya nivārayitum_nivāray aśakyam_aśakya kim_ka ca_ca dṛḍham_dṛḍha viṣaya--_viṣaya vāsanā--_vāsanā sahasra--_sahasra anusyūta--_anusīv tayā_tā bhettum_bhid aśakyam_aśakya tantu--_tantu nāga--_nāga vat_vat acchedyam_acchedya iti_iti bhāṣye_bhāṣya tāntanī_tāntanī iti_iti gurjara--_gurjara ādau_ādi prasiddhaḥ_prasidh mahā--_mahat hrada--_hrada nivāsī_nivāsin jantu--_jantu viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa vā_vā tasya_tad ati_ati dṛḍha--_dṛḍha tayā_tā balavataḥ_balavat balavat--_balavat tayā_tā pramāthinaḥ_pramāthin pramāthi--_pramāthin tayā_tā ati_ati cañcalasya_cañcala mahā--_mahat matta--_mad vana--_vana gajasya_gaja nigraham_nigraha nirodham_nirodha nirvṛttika--_nirvṛttika tayā_tā avasthānam_avasthāna su_su duṣkaram_duṣkara sarvathā_sarvathā kartum_kṛ aśakyam_aśakya aham_mad manye_man vāyoḥ_vāyu iva_iva yathā_yathā ākāśe_ākāśa dodhūyamānasya_dodhūy vāyoḥ_vāyu niścala--_niścala tvam_tva sampādya_sampāday nirodhanam_nirodhana aśakyam_aśakya tadvat_tadvat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva jāte_jan api_api tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman bhogāya_bhoga jīvataḥ_jīv puruṣasya_puruṣa kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tva--_tva sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa citta--_citta dharmaḥ_dharma kleśa--_kleśa hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva bādhita--_bādh anuvṛttyā_anuvṛtti api_api bandhaḥ_bandha citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodha--_nirodha rūpeṇa_rūpa tu_tu yogena_yoga tasya_tad nivāraṇam_nivāraṇa jīvanmuktiḥ_jīvanmukti iti_iti ucyate_vac yasyāḥ_yad sampādanena_sampādana sa_tad yogī_yogin paramaḥ_parama mataḥ_man iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra idam_idam ucyate_vac bandhaḥ_bandha kim_ka sākṣiṇaḥ_sākṣin nivāryate_nivāray kim_ka vā_vā cittāt_citta na_na ādyaḥ_ādya tattva--_tattva jñānena_jñāna eva_eva sākṣiṇaḥ_sākṣin bandhasya_bandha nivārita--_nivāray tvāt_tva na_na dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya svabhāva--_svabhāva viparyaya--_viparyaya ayogāt_ayoga virodhi--_virodhin sat--_as bhāvāt_bhāva ca_ca na_na hi_hi jalāt_jala ārdra--_ārdra tvam_tva agneḥ_agni vā_vā uṣṇa--_uṣṇa tvam_tva nivārayitum_nivāray śakyate_śak pratikṣaṇa--_pratikṣaṇa pariṇaminaḥ_pariṇamin hi_hi bhāvāḥ_bhāva ṛte_ṛte citi--_citi śakteḥ_śakti iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya pratikṣaṇa--_pratikṣaṇa pariṇama--_pariṇama svabhāva--_svabhāva tvāt_tva cittasya_citta prārabdha--_prārabh bhogena_bhoga ca_ca pravṛttasya_pravṛt tattva--_tattva jñānasya_jñāna api_api pratibandham_pratibandha kṛtvā_kṛ sva--_sva phala--_phala dānāya_dāna deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādikam_ādika avasthāpitam_avasthāpay na_na ca_ca karmaṇā_karman sva--_sva phala--_phala sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi bhogaḥ_bhoga citta--_citta vṛttibhiḥ_vṛtti vinā_vinā sampādayitum_sampāday śakyate_śak tasmāt_tasmāt yadi_yadi api_api svābhāvikānām_svābhāvika api_api citta--_citta pariṇāmānām_pariṇāma kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid yogena_yoga abhibhavaḥ_abhibhava śakyeta_śak kartum_kṛ tathā_tathā api_api tattva--_tattva jñānāt_jñāna iva_iva yogāt_yoga api_api prārabdha--_prārabh phalasya_phala karmaṇaḥ_karman prābalyāt_prābalya avaśyambhāvini_avaśyambhāvin cittasya_citta cāñcalye_cāñcalya aśakyam_aśakya aham_mad sva--_sva bodhāt_bodha eva_eva manye_man tasmāt_tasmāt anupapannam_anupapanna etat_etad ātma--_ātman aupamyena_aupamya sarvatra_sarvatra sama--_sama darśī_darśin paramaḥ_parama yogī_yogin mataḥ_man iti_iti arjunasya_arjuna ākṣepaḥ_ākṣepa
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha etat_etad eva_eva āha_ah cañcalam_cañcala iti_iti nanu_nanu ātmānam_ātman rathinam_rathin viddhi_vid śarīram_śarīra ratham_ratha eva_eva ca_ca iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti
div.p: āhuḥ_ah śarīram_śarīra ratham_ratha indriyāṇi_indriya hayān_haya abhīṣūn_abhīṣu manaḥ_manas indriya--_indriya īśam_īśa vartmāni_vartman mātrāḥ_mātrā dhiṣaṇam_dhiṣaṇa ca_ca sūtam_sūta iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca

buddheḥ_buddhi manaḥ_manas niyantṛ--_niyantṛ tva--_tva darśanāt_darśana vivekavatyā_vivekavat buddhyā_buddhi manaḥ_manas vaśīkartum_vaśīkṛ eva_eva iti_iti ced_ced atas_atas āha_ah balavat_balavat sva--_sva praśamakam_praśamaka auṣudham_auṣudha api_api balavān_balavat rogaḥ_roga yathā_yathā na_na gaṇayati_gaṇay tathā_tathā eva_eva svabhāvāt_svabhāva eva_eva baliṣṭham_baliṣṭha manaḥ_manas vivekavatīm_vivekavat api_api buddhim_buddhi kim_ka ca_ca dṛḍham_dṛḍha ati_ati sūkṣma--_sūkṣma buddhi--_buddhi sūcyā_sūci api_api loham_loha iva_iva sahasā_sahas bhettum_bhid aśakyam_aśakya vāyoḥ_vāyu iti_iti ākāśe_ākāśa dodhūyamānasya_dodhūy vāyoḥ_vāyu nigraham_nigraha kumbhaka--_kumbhaka ādinā_ādi nirodham_nirodha iva_iva yogena_yoga aṣṭāṅgena_aṣṭāṅga manasaḥ_manas api_api nirodham_nirodha duṣkaram_duṣkara manye_man
baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad eva_eva āha_ah cañcalam_cañcala hi_hi iti_iti manaḥ_manas svabhāvena_svabhāva cañcalam_cañcala nanu_nanu

lg.l: ātmānam_ātman rathinam_rathin viddhi_vid śarīram_śarīra ratham_ratha eva_eva ca_ca
buddhim_buddhi tu_tu sārathim_sārathi viddhi_vid manaḥ_manas pragraham_pragraha eva_eva ca_ca
indriyāṇi_indriya hayān_haya āhuḥ_ah viṣayān_viṣaya teṣu_tad gocarān_gocara
ātma--_ātman indriya--_indriya manaḥ--_manas yuktaḥ_yuj bhoktā_bhoktṛ iti_iti āhuḥ_ah manīṣiṇaḥ_manīṣin

div.p: iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti buddhi--_buddhi niyamyam_niyam manaḥ_manas śrūyate_śru tatas_tatas vivekinyām_vivekin buddhyām_buddhi śakyam_śakya tat_tad vaśīkartum_vaśīkṛ iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah pramāthi--_pramāthin iti_iti tādṛśīm_tādṛśa api_api buddhim_buddhi pramathati_pramath kutas_kutas balavat_balavat sva--_sva praśamakam_praśamaka api_api auṣadham_auṣadha yathā_yathā balavān_balavat rogaḥ_roga na_na gaṇayati_gaṇay tadvat_tadvat kim_ka ca_ca dṛḍham_dṛḍha sūcyā_sūci lauham_lauha iva_iva tādṛśyā_tādṛśa api_api buddhyā_buddhi bhettum_bhid aśakyam_aśakya atas_atas yogena_yoga api_api tasya_tad nigraham_nigraha aham_mad vāyoḥ_vāyu iva_iva su_su duṣkaram_duṣkara manye_man na_na hi_hi vāyoḥ_vāyu muṣṭinā_muṣṭi dhartum_dhṛ śakyate_śak atas_atas tatra_tatra upāyam_upāya brūhi_brū iti_iti
BhG 6.35

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
asaṃśayam_asaṃśayam mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu manaḥ_manas durṇigraham_durṇigraha calam_cala
abhyāsena_abhyāsa tu_tu kaunteya_kaunteya vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya ca_ca gṛhyate_grah

div.p: uvāca_vac cañcala--_cañcala tva--_tva ādinā_ādi manaḥ_manas niroddhum_nirudh aśakyam_aśakya iti_iti yat_yad vadasi_vad etat_etad niḥsaṃśayam_niḥsaṃśaya eva_eva tathā_tathā api_api tu_tu abhyāsena_abhyāsa paramātma--_paramātman ākāra--_ākāra pratyayā_pratyaya vṛttyā_vṛtti viṣaya--_viṣaya vaitṛṣṇyena_vaitṛṣṇya ca_ca gṛhyate_grah abhyāsena_abhyāsa laya--_laya pratibandhāt_pratibandha vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya ca_ca vikṣepa--_vikṣepa pratibandhāt_pratibandha uparata--_uparam vṛttikam_vṛttikā sat_as paramātma--_paramātman ākāreṇa_ākāra tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad uktam_vac yoga--_yoga śāstre_śāstra
manasaḥ_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti śūnyasya_śūnya brahma--_brahman ākāra--_ākāra tayā_tā sthitiḥ_sthiti yā_yad asamprajñāta--_asamprajñāta nāmā_nāman asau_adas samādhiḥ_samādhi abhidhīyate_abhidhā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tam_tad imam_idam ākṣepam_ākṣepa pariharan_parihṛ śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac asaṃśayam_asaṃśayam iti_iti samyak_samyak viditam_vid te_tvad citta--_citta ceṣṭitam_ceṣṭ manaḥ_manas nigrahītum_nigrah śakṣyasi_śak iti_iti santoṣeṇa_saṃtoṣa sambodhayati_sambodhay he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu mahāntau_mahat sākṣāt_sākṣāt mahādevena_mahādeva api_api saha_saha kṛta--_kṛ praharaṇau_praharaṇa bāhū_bāhu yasya_yad iti_iti niratiśayam_niratiśaya utkarṣam_utkarṣa sūcayati_sūcay prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman prābalyāt_prābalya asaṃyata--_asaṃyata ātmanā_ātman durnigraham_durnigraha duḥkhena_duḥkha api_api nigrahītum_nigrah aśakyam_aśakya pramāthi_pramāthin balavat_balavat dṛḍham_dṛḍha iti_iti viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa trayam_traya piṇḍīkṛtya_piṇḍīkṛ etat_etad uktam_vac calam_cala svabhāva--_svabhāva cañcalam_cañcala manaḥ_manas iti_iti asaṃśayam_asaṃśayam na_na asti_as eva_eva saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya atra_atra satyam_satya eva_eva etat_etad bravīṣi_brū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam sati_as api_api saṃyata--_saṃyam ātmanā_ātman samādhi--_samādhi mātra--_mātra upāyena_upāya yoginā_yogin abhyāsena_abhyāsa vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya ca_ca gṛhyate_grah nigṛhyate_nigrah sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti śūnyam_śūnya kriyate_kṛ tat_tad manaḥ_manas iti_iti arthaḥ_artha a_a nigrahītuḥ_nigrahītṛ a_a saṃyata--_saṃyam ātmanaḥ_ātman sakāśāt_sakāśa saṃyata--_saṃyam ātmanaḥ_ātman nigrahītuḥ_nigrahītṛ viśeṣa--_viśeṣa dyotanāya_dyotana tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda manaḥ--_manas nigrahe_nigraha abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyayoḥ_vairāgya samuccaya--_samuccaya bodhanāya_bodhana ca_ca śabdaḥ_śabda he_he kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti pitṛ--_pitṛ ṣvasṛ--_ṣvasṛ putraḥ_putra tvam_tvad avaśyam_avaśyam mayā_mad sukhī_sukhin kartavyaḥ_kṛ iti_iti sneha--_sneha sambandha--_sambandha sūcanena_sūcana āśvāsayati_āśvāsay atra_atra prathama--_prathama ardhena_ardha cittasya_citta haṭha--_haṭha nigrahaḥ_nigraha na_na sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti dvitīya--_dvitīya ardhena_ardha tu_tu krama--_krama nigrahaḥ_nigraha sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti uktam_vac

dvividhaḥ_dvividha hi_hi manasaḥ_manas nigrahaḥ_nigraha haṭhena_haṭha krameṇa_krama ca_ca tatra_tatra cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi jñāna--_jñāna indriyāṇi_indriya vāc--_vāc pāṇi--_pāṇi ādīni_ādi karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya ca_ca tad--_tad golaka--_golaka mātra--_mātra uparodhena_uparodha haṭhāt_haṭha nigṛhyante_nigrah tad--_tad dṛṣṭāntena_dṛṣṭānta manaḥ_manas api_api haṭhena_haṭha nigrahīṣyāmi_nigrah iti_iti mūḍhasya_muh bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti bhavati_bhū na_na ca_ca tathā_tathā nigrahītum_nigrah śakyate_śak tad--_tad golakasya_golaka hṛdaya--_hṛdaya kamalasya_kamala niroddhum_nirudh aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva ataeva_ataeva ca_ca krama--_krama nigrahaḥ_nigraha eva_eva yuktaḥ_yuj tat_tad etat_etad bhagavān_bhagavat vasiṣṭhaḥ_vasiṣṭha āha_ah

lg.l: upaviśya_upaviś upaviśya_upaviś eva_eva citta--_citta jñena_jña muhur_muhur muhur_muhur
na_na śakyate_śak manaḥ_manas jetum_ji vinā_vinā yuktim_yukti aninditām_anindita
aṅkuśena_aṅkuśa vinā_vinā mattaḥ_mad yathā_yathā duṣṭa--_duṣ mataṅga--_mataṃga jaḥ_ja
adhyātma--_adhyātma vidyā--_vidyā adhigamaḥ_adhigama sādhu--_sādhu saṅgamaḥ_saṃgama eva_eva ca_ca
vāsanā--_vāsanā samparityāgaḥ_samparityāga prāṇa--_prāṇa spanda--_spanda nirodhanam_nirodhana
etāḥ_etad tāḥ_tad yuktayaḥ_yukti puṣṭāḥ_puṣ santi_as citta--_citta jaye_jaya kila_kila

div.p: satīṣu_as yuktiṣu_yukti etāsu_etad haṭhāt_haṭha niyamayanti_niyamay ye_yad cetaḥ_cetas te_tad dīpam_dīpa utsṛjya_utsṛj vinighnanti_vinihan tamaḥ_tamas añjanaiḥ_añjana

krama--_krama nigrahe_nigraha ca_ca adhyātma--_adhyātma vidyā--_vidyā adhigamaḥ_adhigama ekaḥ_eka upāyaḥ_upāya sā_tad hi_hi dṛśyasya_dṛś mithyātvam_mithyātva dṛś--_dṛś vastunaḥ_vastu ca_ca paramārtha--_paramārtha satya--_satya parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa tavam_tava bodhayati_bodhay tathā_tathā ca_ca sati_as etat_etad manaḥ_manas sva--_sva gocareṣu_gocara buddhvā_budh nirindhana--_nirindhana agni--_agni vat_vat svayam_svayam eva_eva upaśāmyati_upaśam yaḥ_yad tu_tu bodhitam_bodhay api_api tattvam_tattva na_na samyak_samyak budhyate_budh yaḥ_yad vā_vā vismarati_vismṛ tayoḥ_tad sādhu--_sādhu saṅgamaḥ_saṃgama eva_eva upāyaḥ_upāya sādhavaḥ_sādhu hi_hi punar_punar punar_punar bodhayanti_bodhay smārayanti_smāray ca_ca yaḥ_yad tu_tu vidyā--_vidyā mada--_mada ādi--_ādi durvāsanayā_durvāsanā pīḍyamānaḥ_pīḍay na_na sādhūn_sādhu anuvartitum_anuvṛt utsahate_utsah tasya_tad pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac vivekena_viveka vāsanā--_vāsanā parityāgaḥ_parityāga eva_eva upāyaḥ_upāya yaḥ_yad tu_tu vāsanānām_vāsanā ati_ati prābalyāt_prābalya tāḥ_tad tyaktum_tyaj na_na śaknoti_śak tasya_tad prāṇa--_prāṇa spanda--_spanda nirodhaḥ_nirodha eva_eva upāyaḥ_upāya prāṇa--_prāṇa spanda--_spanda vāsanayoḥ_vāsanā citta--_citta preraka--_preraka tvāt_tva tayoḥ_tad nirodhe_nirodha citta--_citta śāntiḥ_śānti upapadyate_upapad tat_tad etat_etad āha_ah saḥ_tad eva_eva

lg.l: dve_dvi bīje_bīja citta--_citta vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa prāṇa--_prāṇa spandana--_spandana vāsane_vāsanā
ekasmin_eka ca_ca tayoḥ_tad kṣīṇe_kṣi kṣipram_kṣipram dve_dvi api_api naśyataḥ_naś
prāṇāyāma--_prāṇāyāma dṛḍha--_dṛḍha abhyāsaiḥ_abhyāsa yuktyā_yukti ca_ca guru--_guru dattayā_dā
āsana--_āsana aśana--_aśana yogena_yoga prāṇa--_prāṇa spandaḥ_spanda nirudhyate_nirudh
asaṅga--_asaṅga vyavahāri--_vyavahārin tvāt_tva bhava--_bhava bhāvana--_bhāvanā varjanāt_varjana
śarīra--_śarīra nāśa--_nāśa darśi--_darśin tvāt_tva vāsanā_vāsanā na_na pravartate_pravṛt
vāsanā--_vāsanā samparityāgāt_samparityāga cittam_citta gacchati_gam acitta--_acitta tām_tā
prāṇa--_prāṇa spanda--_spanda nirodhāt_nirodha ca_ca yathā_yathā icchasi_iṣ tathā_tathā kuru_kṛ
etāvat_etāvat mātrakam_mātraka manye_man rūpam_rūpa cittasya_citta rāghava_rāghava
yat_yad bhāvanam_bhāvanā vastunaḥ_vastu antar_antar vastu--_vastu tvena_tva rasena_rasa ca_ca
yadā_yadā na_na bhāvyate_bhāvay kiṃcid_kaścit dheya--_dhā upādeya--_upādā rūpi_rūpin yat_yad
sthīyate_sthā sakalam_sakala tyaktvā_tyaj tadā_tadā cittam_citta na_na jāyate_jan

div.p: avāsana--_avāsana tvāt_tva satatam_satatam yadā_yadā na_na manute_man manaḥ_manas amanaḥ--_amanas tā_tā tadā_tadā udeti_udi paramātma--_paramātman pada--_pada pradā_prada

atra_atra dvau_dvi eva_eva upāyau_upāya paryavasitau_paryavasā prāṇa--_prāṇa spanda--_spanda nirodha--_nirodha artham_artha abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa vāsanā--_vāsanā parityāga--_parityāga artham_artha ca_ca vairāgyam_vairāgya iti_iti sādhu--_sādhu saṅgama--_saṃgama adhyātma--_adhyātma vidyā--_vidyā adhigamau_adhigama tu_tu abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgya--_vairāgya upapādaka--_upapādaka tayā_tā anyathā_anyathā siddhau_sidh tayoḥ_tad eva_eva antarbhavataḥ_antarbhū atas_atas eva_eva bhagavatā_bhagavant abhyāsena_abhyāsa vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya ca_ca iti_iti dvayam_dvaya eva_eva uktam_vac ataeva_ataeva bhagavān_bhagavat patañjaliḥ_patañjali asūtrayat_sūtray abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya tad--_tad nirodhaḥ_nirodha iti_iti tāsām_tad prāc--_prāñc uktānām_vac pramāṇa--_pramāṇa viparyaya--_viparyaya vikalpa--_vikalpa nidrā--_nidrā smṛti--_smṛti rūpeṇa_rūpa pañcavidhānām_pañcavidha anantānām_ananta āsura--_āsura tvena_tva kliṣṭānām_kliś daiva--_daiva tvena_tva akliṣṭānām_akliṣṭa api_api vṛttīnām_vṛtti sarvāssām_sarva api_api nirodhaḥ_nirodha nirindhana--_nirindhana agni--_agni vat_vat upaśama--_upaśama vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya ca_ca samuccitena_samucci bhavati_bhū tat_tad uktam_vac yoga--_yoga bhāṣye_bhāṣya citta--_citta nadī_nadī nāma_nāma ubhayatas_ubhayatas vāhinī_vāhin vahati_vah kalyāṇāya_kalyāṇa vahati_vah pāpāya_pāpa ca_ca tatra_tatra yā_yad kaivalya--_kaivalya prāc--_prāñc bhārā_bhāra viveka--_viveka nimnā_nimna sā_tad kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa vahā_vaha yā_yad tu_tu aviveka--_aviveka nimnā_nimna saṃsāra--_saṃsāra prāc--_prāñc bhārā_bhāra sā_tad pāpa--_pāpa vahā_vaha vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya viṣaya--_viṣaya srotaḥ_srotas khilīkriyate_khilīkṛ viveka--_viveka darśana--_darśana abhyāsena_abhyāsa ca_ca kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa srotaḥ_srotas udghāṭyate_udghāṭay iti_iti ubhaya--_ubhaya adhīnaḥ_adhīna citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodhaḥ_nirodha iti_iti yathā_yathā tīvra--_tīvra vega--_vega upetam_upe nadī--_nadī pravāham_pravāha setu--_setu bandhanena_bandhana nivārya_nivāray kulyā--_kulyā praṇayena_praṇaya kṣetra--_kṣetra abhimukham_abhimukha tiryak--_tiryañc pravāha--_pravāha antaram_antara utpādyate_utpāday tathā_tathā vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya citta--_citta nadyāḥ_nadī viṣaya--_viṣaya pravāham_pravāha nivārya_nivāray samādhi--_samādhi dvāra--_dvāra bhedāt_bheda samuccayaḥ_samuccaya eka--_eka dvāra--_dvāra tve_tva hi_hi brīhi--_brīhi yava--_yava dvi--_dvi kalpaḥ_kalpa syāt_as iti_iti
