mantra--_mantra japa--_japa devatā--_devatā dhyāna--_dhyāna ādīnām_ādi kriyā--_kriyā rūpāṇām_rūpa āvṛtti--_āvṛtti lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa sambhavāt_sambhava sarva--_sarva vyāpāra--_vyāpāra uparamasya_uparama tu_tu samādheḥ_samādhi kaḥ_ka nāma_nāma abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa iti_iti śaṅkām_śaṅkā nivārayitum_nivāray abhyāsam_abhyāsa sūtrayati_sūtray sma_sma tatra_tatra sthitau_sthiti yatnaḥ_yatna abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa iti_iti tatra_tatra sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa avasthite_avasthā draṣṭari_draṣṭṛ śuddhe_śuddha cit--_cit ātmani_ātman cittasya_citta avṛttikasya_avṛttika praśānta--_praśam vāhi--_vāhin tā--_tā rūpā_rūpa niścala--_niścala tā--_tā sthitiḥ_sthiti tad--_tad artham_artha yatnaḥ_yatna mānasaḥ_mānasa utsāhaḥ_utsāha svabhāva--_svabhāva cāñcalyāt_cāñcalya bahiṣpravāha--_bahiṣpravāha śīlam_śīla saḥ_tad āvartyamānaḥ_āvartay abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa ucyate_vac sa_tad tu_tu dīrgha--_dīrgha kāla--_kāla nairantarya--_nairantarya satkāra--_satkāra āsevitaḥ_āsev dṛḍha--_dṛḍha bhūmiḥ_bhūmi anirvedena_anirveda dīrgha--_dīrgha kāla--_kāla sevitaḥ_sev viccheda--_viccheda abhāvena_abhāva nirantara--_nirantara āsevitaḥ_āsev sat--_sat kāreṇa_kāra śraddhā--_śraddhā atiśayena_atiśaya ca_ca āsevitaḥ_āsev saḥ_tad abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa dṛḍha--_dṛḍha bhūmiḥ_bhūmi viṣaya--_viṣaya sukha--_sukha vāsanayā_vāsanā cālayitum_cālay aśakyaḥ_aśakya bhavati_bhū adīrgha--_adīrgha kāla--_kāla tve_tva dīrgha--_dīrgha kāla--_kāla tve_tva api_api vicchidya_vicchid vicchidya_vicchid sevane_sevana śraddhā--_śraddhā atiśaya--_atiśaya abhāve_abhāva ca_ca laya--_laya vikṣepa--_vikṣepa kaṣāya--_kaṣāya sukha--_sukha āsvādānām_āsvāda aparihāre_aparihāra vyutthāna--_vyutthāna saṃskāra--_saṃskāra prābalyāt_prābalya adṛḍha--_adṛḍha bhūmiḥ_bhūmi abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa

vairāgyam_vairāgya tu_tu dvividham_dvividha aparam_apara param_para ca_ca yat_yad māna--_māna saṃjñā--_saṃjñā vyatireka--_vyatireka saṃjñā--_saṃjñā eka--_eka indriya--_indriya saṃjñā--_saṃjñā vaśīkāra--_vaśīkāra saṃjñā--_saṃjñā bhedaiḥ_bheda aparam_apara caturdhā_caturdhā tatra_tatra pūrva--_pūrva bhūmi--_bhūmi jayena_jaya uttara--_uttara bhūmi--_bhūmi sampādana--_sampādana vivakṣayā_vivakṣā caturtham_caturtha eva_eva asūtrayat_sūtray dṛṣṭa--_dṛś ānuśravika--_ānuśravika viṣaya--_viṣaya vitṛṣṇasya_vitṛṣṇa vaśīkāra--_vaśīkāra saṃjñā_saṃjñā vairāgyam_vairāgya iti_iti striyaḥ_strī annam_anna pānam_pāna aiśvaryam_aiśvarya iti_iti ādayaḥ_ādi dṛṣṭāḥ_dṛś viṣayāḥ_viṣaya svargaḥ_svarga videhatā_videhatā prakṛti--_prakṛti layaḥ_laya iti_iti ādayaḥ_ādi vaidika--_vaidika tvena_tva ānuśravikāḥ_ānuśravika viṣayāḥ_viṣaya teṣu_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya vidheṣu_vidha api_api satyām_as eva_eva tṛṣṇāyām_tṛṣṇā viveka--_viveka tāratamyena_tāratamya yatamāna--_yat ādi--_ādi trayam_traya bhavati_bhū atra_atra jagati_jagant kim_ka sāram_sāra kim_ka asāram_asāra iti_iti guru--_guru śāstrābhyām_śāstra jñāsāmi_jñā iti_iti udyogaḥ_udyoga yatamānam_yat sva--_sva citte_citta pūrva--_pūrva vidyamāna--_vid doṣāṇām_doṣa madhye_madhya abhyasyamāna--_abhyas vivekena_viveka ete_etad pakvāḥ_pakva ete_etad avaśiṣṭāḥ_avaśiṣ iti_iti cikitsaka--_cikitsaka vat_vat vivecanam_vivecana vyatirekaḥ_vyatireka dṛṣṭa--_dṛś ānuśravika--_ānuśravika viṣaya--_viṣaya pravṛtteḥ_pravṛtti duḥkha--_duḥkha ātma--_ātman tva--_tva bodhena_bodha bhaiḥ_bhī indriya--_indriya pravṛttim_pravṛtti a_a janayantyāḥ_janay api_api tṛṣṇāyāḥ_tṛṣṇā autsukya--_autsukya mātreṇa_mātra manasi_manas avasthānam_avasthāna eka--_eka indriyam_indriya manasi_manas api_api tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā śūnya--_śūnya tvena_tva sarvathā_sarvathā vaitṛṣṇyam_vaitṛṣṇya tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā virodhinī_virodhin citta--_citta vṛttiḥ_vṛtti jñāna--_jñāna prasāda--_prasāda rūpā_rūpa vaśīkāra--_vaśīkāra saṃjñā_saṃjñā vairāgyam_vairāgya samprajñātasya_samprajñā samādheḥ_samādhi antaraṅgam_antaraṅga sādhanam_sādhana tasya_tad tu_tu antaraṅga--_antaraṅga sādhanam_sādhana param_para evam_evam vairāgyam_vairāgya tat_tad ca_ca asūtrayat_sūtray tad--_tad param_para puruṣa--_puruṣa khyāteḥ_khyāti guṇa--_guṇa vaitṛṣṇyam_vaitṛṣṇya iti_iti samprajñāta--_samprajñā samādhi--_samādhi pāṭavena_pāṭava guṇa--_guṇa traya--_traya ātmakāt_ātmaka pradhānāt_pradhāna viviktasya_vivic puruṣasya_puruṣa khyātiḥ_khyāti sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra utpadyate_utpad tatas_tatas ca_ca aśeṣa--_aśeṣa guṇa--_guṇa traya--_traya vyavahāreṣu_vyavahāra vaitṛṣṇyam_vaitṛṣṇya yat_yad bhavati_bhū tad--_tad param_para śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha phala--_phala bhūtam_bhū vairāgyam_vairāgya tad--_tad paripāka--_paripāka nimittāt_nimitta ca_ca citta--_citta upaśama--_upaśama paripākāt_paripāka avilambena_avilamba kaivalyam_kaivalya iti_iti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha uktam_vac artham_artha aṅgīkṛtya_aṅgīkṛ samadadhāti_saṃdhā aśaṃśayam_śaṃśaya iti_iti tvayā_tvad uktam_vac satyam_satya eva_eva kintu_kiṃtu balavān_balavat api_api rogaḥ_roga tad--_tad praśamaka--_praśamaka auṣadha--_auṣadha sevayā_sevā sat--_sat vaidya--_vaidya prayukta--_prayuj prakārayā_prakāra muhur_muhur abhyastayā_abhyas yathā_yathā cira--_cira kālena_kāla śāmyati_śam eva_eva tathā_tathā durnigraham_durnigraha api_api manaḥ_manas abhyāsena_abhyāsa sat--_sat guru--_guru parameśvara--_parameśvara dhyāna--_dhyāna yogasya_yoga muhur_muhur anuśīlanena_anuśīlana vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya anāsaṅgena_anāsaṅga ca_ca gṛhyate_grah sva--_sva hasta--_hasta vaśīkartum_vaśīkṛ śakyate_śak iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca pātañjala--_pātañjala sūtram_sūtra abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya tad--_tad nirodhaḥ_nirodha iti_iti mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu iti_iti saṅgrāme_saṃgrāma tvayā_tvad yat_yat mahāvīrāḥ_mahāvīra api_api vijīyante_viji sa_tad ca_ca pināka--_pināka pāṇiḥ_pāṇi api_api vaśīkṛtaḥ_vaśīkṛ tena_tad api_api kim_ka yadi_yadi mahā--_mahat vīra--_vīra śiraḥ--_śiras maṇiḥ_maṇi manaḥ_manas nāmā_nāman prādhānikaḥ_prādhānika bhaṭaḥ_bhaṭa mahā--_mahat yoga--_yoga astra--_astra bhāvaḥ_bhāva he_he kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti tatra_tatra tvam_tvad mā_mā bhaiṣīḥ_bhī mad--_mad pituḥ_pitṛ svasuḥ_svasṛ kuntyāḥ_kuntī putre_putra tvayi_tvad mayā_mad sāhāyyam_sāhāyya vidheyam_vidhā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva uktam_vac artham_artha svīkṛtya_svīkṛ bhagavān_bhagavat uvāca_vac aśaṃśayam_aśaṃśaya tathā_tathā api_api sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa sukha--_sukha ekatāna--_ekatāna tva--_tva ātma--_ātman guṇa--_guṇa ābhimukhya--_ābhimukhya abhyāsena_abhyāsa ātma--_ātman vyatirikteṣu_vyatiric viṣayeṣu_viṣaya doṣa--_doṣa dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi janitena_janay vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya ca_ca manaḥ_manas nigrahītum_nigrah śakyate_śak tathā_tathā ca_ca ātma--_ātman ānanda--_ānanda asvādha--_asvādha abhyāsena_abhyāsa laya--_laya pratibandhāt_pratibandha viṣaya--_viṣaya vaitṛṣṇyena_vaitṛṣṇya ca_ca vikṣepa--_vikṣepa pratibandhāt_pratibandha nivṛtta--_nivṛt cāpalyam_cāpalya manaḥ_manas sugraham_sugraha yathā_yathā sat--_sat auṣadha--_auṣadha sevayā_sevā sat--_sat vaidya--_vaidya prayukta--_prayuj prakārayā_prakāra muhur_muhur śāmyati_śam eva_eva tathā_tathā durnigraham_durnigraha api_api manaḥ_manas abhyāsena_abhyāsa sat--_sat guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś prakāreṇa_prakāra parameśvara--_parameśvara dhyāna--_dhyāna yogasya_yoga muhur_muhur anuśīlanena_anuśīlana vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya viṣayeṣu_viṣaya anāsaṅgena_anāsaṅga ca_ca gṛhyate_grah sva--_sva hasta--_hasta vaśīkartum_vaśīkṛ śakyate_śak iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca pātañjala--_pātañjala sūtram_sūtra abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya tad--_tad nirodhaḥ_nirodha iti_iti mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu iti_iti saṅgrāme_saṃgrāma tvayā_tvad yat_yat mahāvīrāḥ_mahāvīra api_api vijīyante_viji sa_tad ca_ca pināka--_pināka pāṇiḥ_pāṇi api_api vaśīkṛtaḥ_vaśīkṛ tena_tad api_api kim_ka yadi_yadi mahā--_mahat vīra--_vīra śiraḥ--_śiras maṇiḥ_maṇi manaḥ_manas nāmā_nāman prādhānikaḥ_prādhānika bhaṭaḥ_bhaṭa mahā--_mahat yoga--_yoga astra--_astra bhāvaḥ_bhāva he_he kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti tatra_tatra tvam_tvad mā_mā bhaiṣīḥ_bhī mad--_mad pituḥ_pitṛ svasuḥ_svasṛ kuntyāḥ_kuntī putre_putra tvayi_tvad mayā_mad sāhāyyam_sāhāyya vidheyam_vidhā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 6.36

lg.l: asaṃyata--_asaṃyata ātmanā_ātman yogaḥ_yoga duṣprāpaḥ_duṣprāpa iti_iti me_mad matiḥ_mati
vaśya--_vaśya ātmanā_ātman tu_tu yatatā_yat śakyaḥ_śakya avāptum_avāp upāyataḥ_upāya

div.p: āha_ah ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya asaṃyataḥ_asaṃyata ātmā_ātman cittam_citta yasya_yad tena_tad yogaḥ_yoga duṣprāpa_duṣprāpa prāptum_prāp aśakyaḥ_aśakya abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya vaśyaḥ_vaśya vaśa--_vaśa vartī_vartin ātmā_ātman cittam_citta yasya_yad tena_tad puruṣeṇa_puruṣa punar_punar ca_ca anena_idam eva_eva upāyena_upāya prayatnam_prayatna kurvatā_kṛ yogaḥ_yoga prāptum_prāp śakyaḥ_śakya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yat_yad tu_tu tvam_tvad avocaḥ_vac prārabdha--_prārabh bhogena_bhoga karmaṇā_karman tattva--_tattva jñānāt_jñāna api_api prabalena_prabala sva--_sva phala--_phala dānāya_dāna manasaḥ_manas vṛttiṣu_vṛtti utpādyamānāsu_utpāday katham_katham tāsām_tad nirodhaḥ_nirodha kartum_kṛ śakyam_śakya iti_iti tatra_tatra ucyate_vac asaṃśaya_asaṃśaya
tathā_tathā ca_ca āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat vasiṣṭhaḥ_vasiṣṭha

lg.l: sarvam_sarva evā_eva iha_iha hi_hi sadā_sadā saṃsāre_saṃsāra raghunandana_raghunandana
samyak_samyak prayuktāt_prayuj sarveṇa_sarva pauruṣāt_pauruṣa samavāpyate_samavāp
ucchāstram_ucchāstra śāstritam_śāstrita ca_ca iti_iti pauruṣam_pauruṣa dvividham_dvividha smṛtam_smṛ
tatra_tatra ucchāstram_ucchāstra anarthāya_anartha parama--_parama arthāya_artha śāstritam_śāstray

div.p: ucchāstram_ucchāstra śāstra--_śāstra pratiṣiddham_pratiṣidh anarthāya_anartha narakāya_naraka śāstritam_śāstray śāstra--_śāstra vihitam_vidhā antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi dvārā_dvār paramārthāya_paramārtha caturṣu_catur artheṣu_artha paramāya_parama mokṣāya_mokṣa

lg.l: śubha--_śubha aśubhābhyām_aśubha mārgābhyām_mārga vahantī_vah vāsanā_vāsanā sarit_sarit
pauruṣeṇa_pauruṣa prayatnena_prayatna yojanīyā_yuj śubhe_śubha pathi_pathin
aśubheṣu_aśubha samāviṣṭam_samāviś śubheṣu_śubha eva_eva avatāraya_avatāray
sva--_sva manaḥ_manas puruṣa--_puruṣa arthena_artha balena_bala balinām_balin vara_vara
drāk_drāk abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vaśāt_vaśa yāti_yā yadā_yadā te_tvad vāsanā--_vāsanā udayam_udaya
tadā_tadā abhyāsasya_abhyāsa sāphalyam_sāphalya viddhi_vid tvam_tvad ari--_ari mardana_mardana

div.p: vāsanā_vāsanā śubhā_śubha id_id ti_ti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa

lg.l: sandigdhāyām_saṃdih api_api bhṛśam_bhṛśam śubhām_śubha eva_eva samāhara_samāhṛ
śubhāyām_śubha vāsanā--_vāsanā vṛddhau_vṛddhi tāta_tāta doṣaḥ_doṣa na_na kaścana_kaścana
avyutpanna--_avyutpanna manāḥ_manas yāvat_yāvat bhavān_bhavat ajñāta--_ajñāta tad--_tad padaḥ_pada
guru--_guru śāstra--_śāstra pramāṇaiḥ_pramāṇa tvam_tvad nirṇītam_nirṇī tāvat_tāvat ācara_ācar

div.p: tatas_tatas pakva--_pakva kaṣāyeṇa_kaṣāya nūnam_nūnam vijñāta--_vijñā vastunā_vastu śubhaḥ_śubha api_api asau_adas tvayā_tvad tyājyaḥ_tyaj vāsanā--_vāsanā oghaḥ_ogha nirodhinā_nirodhin

tasmāt_tasmāt sākṣi--_sākṣin gatasya_gam saṃsārasya_saṃsāra aviveka--_aviveka nibandhanasya_nibandhana viveka--_viveka sākṣātkārāt_sākṣātkāra apanaye_apanaya api_api prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman paryavasthāpitasya_paryavasthāpay cittasya_citta svābhāvikīnām_svābhāvika api_api vṛttīnām_vṛtti yoga--_yoga abhyāsa--_abhyāsa prayatnena_prayatna apanaye_apanaya sati_as citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodha--_nirodha abhāve_abhāva tu_tu tattva--_tattva jñānavān_jñānavat api_api aparamaḥ_aparama yogī_yogin iti_iti siddham_sidh avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ jīvanmukti--_jīvanmukti viveke_viveka sa_sa vistaram_vistara anusandheyam_anusaṃdhā

āha_ah tābhyām_tad tu_tu vaśya--_vaśya ātmanā_ātman vaśībhūta--_vaśībhū manasā_manas api_api puṃsā_puṃs yatatā_yat ciram_ciram yatnavatā_yatnavat eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga manaḥ--_manas nirodha--_nirodha lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa samādhiḥ_samādhi upāyataḥ_upāya sādhana--_sādhana bhūyastvāt_bhūyastva prāptum_prāp śakyaḥ_śakya

baladevaḥ_baladeva a_a saṃyata--_saṃyam iti_iti uktābhyām_vac abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya na_na saṃyataḥ_saṃyam ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas yasya_yad tena_tad vijñena_vijña api_api puṃsā_puṃs citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti nirodha--_nirodha lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa yogaḥ_yoga duṣprāpaḥ_duṣprāpa prāptum_prāp aśakyaḥ_aśakya tābhyām_tad vaśyaḥ_vaśya adhīnaḥ_adhīna ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas yasya_yad tena_tad puṃsā_puṃs tathā_tathā api_api yatatā_yat tādṛśa--_tādṛśa prayatnavatā_prayatnavat sa_tad yogaḥ_yoga prāptum_prāp śakyaḥ_śakya upāyatas_upāyatas mad--_mad ārādhana--_ārādhana lakṣaṇāt_lakṣaṇa jñāna--_jñāna ākārāt_ākāra niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogāt_yoga ca_ca iti_iti me_mad matiḥ_mati
BhG 6.37

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
ayatiḥ_ayati śraddhayā_śraddhā upetaḥ_upe yogāt_yoga calita--_cal mānasaḥ_mānasa
a_a prāpya_prāp yoga--_yoga saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi kām_ka gatim_gati kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa gacchati_gam

div.p: prāpnoti_prāp uvāca_vac prathamam_prathama śraddhayā_śraddhā upetaḥ_upe eva_eva yoge_yoga pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt na_na tu_tu mithyā_mithyā ācāra--_ācāra tayā_tā tatas_tatas param_param tu_tu ayatiḥ_ayati samyak_samyak na_na yatate_yat śithila--_śithila abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgya--_vairāgya śaithilyāt_śaithilya yogasya_yoga saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi phalam_phala jñānam_jñāna a_a prāpya_prāp kām_ka gatim_gati prāpnoti_prāp 37_37

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_evam prāktanena_prāktana granthena_grantha utpanna--_utpad tattva--_tattva jñānaḥ_jñāna anutpanna--_anutpanna jīvan--_jīv mukti--_mukti paramaḥ_parama yogī_yogin mataḥ_man utpanna--_utpad tattva--_tattva jñānaḥ_jñāna utpanna--_utpad jīvan--_jīv muktiḥ_mukti tu_tu paramaḥ_parama yogī_yogin mataḥ_man iti_iti uktam_vac tayoḥ_tad ubhayoḥ_ubhaya api_api jñānāt_jñāna jñāna--_jñāna nāśe_nāśa api_api yāvat_yāvat prārabdha--_prārabh bhogam_bhoga karma_karman deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṅghāta--_saṃghāta avasthānāt_avasthāna prārabdha--_prārabh bhoga--_bhoga karma--_karman apāye_apāya ca_ca vartamāna--_vṛt deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṅghāta--_saṃghāta apāyāt_apāya punar_punar utpādaka--_utpādaka āśaṅkā_āśaṅkā yaḥ_yad tu_tu prāk--_prāñc kṛta--_kṛ karmabhiḥ_karman labdha--_labh vividiṣā--_vividiṣā paryanta--_paryanta citta--_citta śuddhiḥ_śuddhi kṛta--_kṛ kārya--_kārya tvāt_tva sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman parityajya_parityaj prāpta--_prāp paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka bhāvaḥ_bhāva paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājakam_parivrājaka ātma--_ātman para--_para prabodhana--_prabodhana dakṣam_dakṣa gurum_guru upasṛtya_upasṛ tatas_tatas vedānta--_vedānta mahā--_mahat vākya--_vākya upadeśam_upadeśa prāpya_prāp tatra_tatra asambhāvanā--_asaṃbhāvanā viparīta--_viparīta bhāvanā--_bhāvanā ākhya--_ākhya pratibandha--_pratibandha nirāsāya_nirāsa atha_atha atas_atas brahma--_brahman jijñāsā_jijñāsā iti_iti ādi_ādi anāvṛttiḥ_anāvṛtti śabdāt_śabda iti_iti catur--_catur lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa mīmāṃsayā_mīmāṃsā śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana nididhyāsanāni_nididhyāsana guru--_guru prasādāt_prasāda kartum_kṛ ārabhate_ārabh sa_tad śraddadhānaḥ_śraddhā api_api san_as āyuṣaḥ_āyus alpatvena_alpatva alpa--_alpa prayatna--_prayatna tvāt_tva alabdha--_alabdha jñāna--_jñāna paripākaḥ_paripāka śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana vyāpadyate_vyāpad sa_tad jñāna--_jñāna paripāka--_paripāka śūnya--_śūnya tvena_tva anaṣṭa--_anaṣṭa ajñānaḥ_ajñāna na_na mucyate_muc na_na api_api upāsanā--_upāsanā sahita--_sahita karma--_karman phalam_phala deva--_deva lokam_loka anubhavati_anubhū arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi mārgeṇa_mārga nā_na api_api kevala--_kevala karma--_karman phalam_phala pitṛ--_pitṛ lokam_loka anubhavati_anubhū dhūma--_dhūma ādi--_ādi mārgeṇa_mārga karmaṇām_karman upāsanānām_upāsana ca_ca tyakta--_tyaj tvāt_tva atas_atas etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś kīṭa--_kīṭa ādi--_ādi bhāvena_bhāva kaṣṭām_kaṣṭa gatim_gati iyāt_i ajña--_ajña tve_tva sati_as deva--_deva yāna--_yāna pitṛ--_pitṛ yāna--_yāna mārga--_mārga asambandhi--_asambandhin tvāt_tva varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama ācāra--_ācāra bhraṣṭa--_bhraṃś vat_vat athavā_athavā kaṣṭām_kaṣṭa gatim_gati śāstra--_śāstra ninidta--_ninid karma--_karman śūnya--_śūnya tvāt_tva vāmadeva--_vāmadeva vat_vat iti_iti saṃśaya--_saṃśaya paryākula--_paryākula manāḥ_manas arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac ayatiḥ_ayati iti_iti yatiḥ_yati yatna--_yatna śīlaḥ_śīla alpa--_alpa arthe_artha nañ_nañ a_a lavaṇā_lavaṇa yavāgūḥ_yavāgū iti_iti ādi--_ādi vat_vat ayatiḥ_ayati alpa--_alpa yatnaḥ_yatna śraddhayā_śraddhā guru--_guru vedānta--_vedānta vākyeṣu_vākya viśvāsa--_viśvāsa buddhi--_buddhi rūpayā_rūpa upetaḥ_upe yuktaḥ_yuj śraddhā_śraddhā ca_ca sva--_sva sahacaritānām_sahacarita śama--_śama ādīnām_ādi upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa śāntaḥ_śam dāntaḥ_dam uparataḥ_uparam titikṣuḥ_titikṣu śraddhā--_śraddhā anvitaḥ_anvita bhūtvā_bhū ātmani_ātman eva_eva ātmānam_ātman paśyati_paś iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tena_tena nitya--_nitya anitya--_anitya vastu--_vastu vivekaḥ_viveka iha_iha amutra_amutra bhoga--_bhoga virāgaḥ_virāga śama--_śama dama--_dama uparati--_uparati titikṣā--_titikṣā śraddhā--_śraddhā ādi--_ādi sampad--_sampad mumukṣu--_mumukṣu tā_tā ca_ca iti_iti sādhana--_sādhana catuṣṭaya--_catuṣṭaya sampannaḥ_sampad gurum_guru upasṛtya_upasṛ vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi_ādi ca_ca indriyāṇām_indriya vyākula--_vyākula tvena_tva sādhana--_sādhana anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna asambhavāt_asaṃbhava yogāt_yoga calita--_cal mānasaḥ_mānasa yogāt_yoga śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi paripāka--_paripāka labdha--_labh janmanaḥ_janman tattva--_tattva sākṣātkārāt_sākṣātkāra
calitam_cal tad--_tad phalam_phala aprāptam_aprāpta mānasam_mānasa yasya_yad sa_tad yoga--_yoga aniṣpattyā_aniṣpatti eva_eva a_a prāpya_prāp yoga--_yoga saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna nimittām_nimitta ajñāna--_ajñāna tad--_tad kārya--_kārya nivṛttim_nivṛtti apunar_apunar āvṛtti--_āvṛtti sahitām_sahita a_a prāpya_prāp atattva--_atattva jñaḥ_jña eva_eva mṛtaḥ_mṛ sugatim_sugati durgatim_durgati vā_vā karmaṇām_karman parityāgāt_parityāga jñānasya_jñāna ca_ca anutpatteḥ_anutpatti śāstra--_śāstra ukta--_vac mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhana--_sādhana anuṣṭhāyi--_anuṣṭhāyin tvāt_tva śāstra--_śāstra garhita--_garh karma--_karman śūnya--_śūnya tvāt_tva ca_ca 37_37

labhyate_labh yasya_yad etat_etad tritayam_tritaya api_api na_na dṛśyate_dṛś tasya_tad kā_ka gatiḥ_gati iti_iti pṛcchati_pracch ayatiḥ_ayati alpa--_alpa yatnaḥ_yatna anavarṇāya_anavarṇa vāguḥ_vāgu iti_iti vat_vat alpa--_alpa arthe_artha nañ_nañ atha_atha ca_ca śraddhayā_śraddhā upetaḥ_upe yoga--_yoga śāstra--_śāstra āstikyena_āstikya tatra_tatra śraddhayā_śraddhā upetaḥ_upe yoga--_yoga abhyāsa_abhyāsa pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt eva_eva na_na tu_tu loka--_loka vañcaka--_vañcaka tvena_tva mithyā_mithyā ācāraḥ_ācāra kintu_kiṃtu abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyayoḥ_vairāgya abhāvena_abhāva yogāt_yoga calitam_cal viṣaya--_viṣaya pravaṇī--_pravaṇī bhūtam_bhū mānasam_mānasa yasya_yad saḥ_tad ataeva_ataeva yogasya_yoga saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi samyak_samyak siddhim_siddhi a_a prāpya_prāp iti_iti yat_yad kiñcid_kaścit siddhim_siddhi tu_tu prāptaḥ_prāp eva_eva iti_iti yoga--_yoga ārurukṣā--_ārurukṣā bhūmikātaḥ_bhūmikā agrimām_agrima yoga--_yoga āroha--_āroha bhūmikāyāḥ_bhūmikā prathamām_prathama kakṣām_kakṣā gataḥ_gam iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 37_37

bhavati_bhū tasya_tad ca_ca tādṛśasya_tādṛśa na_na iha_iha abhikrama--_abhikrama nāśaḥ_nāśa asti_as iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac mahimnaḥ_mahiman tad--_tad mahimānam_mahiman śrotum_śru arjunaḥ_arjuna pṛcchati_pracch ayatiḥ_ayati iti_iti abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya prayatnena_prayatna ca_ca yogam_yoga pumān_puṃs labheta_labh eva_eva yaḥ_yad tu_tu prathamam_prathama śraddhayā_śraddhā tādṛśa--_tādṛśa yoga--_yoga nirūpaka--_nirūpaka śruti--_śruti viśvāsena_viśvāsa upetaḥ_upe kintu_kiṃtu ayatiḥ_ayati alpa--_alpa svadharma--_svadharma anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna yatnavān_yatnavat anudārā_anudāra yuvatiḥ_yuvati iti_iti vat_vat alpa--_alpa arthe_artha atra_atra nañ_nañ śithila--_śithila prayatna--_prayatna tvāt_tva eva_eva yogāt_yoga aṣṭāṅgāt_aṣṭāṅga calitam_cal viṣaya--_viṣaya pravaṇam_pravaṇa mānasam_mānasa yasya_yad saḥ_tad evam_evam ca_ca svadharma--_svadharma anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgya--_vairāgya śaithilyāt_śaithilya vividhasya_vividha yogasya_yoga samyak_samyak siddhim_siddhi hṛd--_hṛd viśuddh--_viśudh lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa ātma--_ātman avalokana--_avalokana lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa ca_ca aprāptaḥ_aprāpta kiṃcid_kaścit siddhim_siddhi tu_tu prāptaḥ_prāp eva_eva śraddhāluḥ_śraddhālu kiṃcid_kaścit anuṣṭhita--_anuṣṭhā svadharmaḥ_svadharma prārabdha--_prārabh yogaḥ_yoga aprāpta--_aprāpta yoga--_yoga phalaḥ_phala dehānte_dehānta kām_ka gatim_gati gacchati_gam he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa 37_37
BhG 6.38

lg.l: kaccit_kaccit nā_na ubhaya--_ubhaya vibhraṣṭaḥ_vibhraṃś chinna--_chid abhram_abhra iva_iva naśyati_naś
apratiṣṭhaḥ_apratiṣṭha mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu vimūḍhaḥ_vimuh brahmaṇaḥ_brahman pathi_pathin

div.p: vivṛṇoti_vivṛ karmaṇām_karman īśvare_īśvara arpita--_arpay tvāt_tva ananuṣṭhānāt_ananuṣṭhāna ca_ca tāvat_tāvat karma--_karman phalam_phala svarga--_svarga ādikam_ādika na_na prāpnoti_prāp yoga--_yoga aniṣpatteḥ_aniṣpatti ca_ca mokṣam_mokṣa na_na prāpnoti_prāp evam_evam ubhayasmāt_ubhaya bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś apratiṣṭhaḥ_apratiṣṭha nirāśrayaḥ_nirāśraya ataeva_ataeva brahmaṇaḥ_brahman prāpti--_prāpti upāye_upāya pathi_pathin mārge_mārga vimūḍhaḥ_vimuh san_as kaccit_kaścit kim_ka naśyati_naś kim_ka vā_vā na_na naśyati_naś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nāśe_nāśa dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta yathā_yathā chinnam_chid abhram_abhra pūrvasmāt_pūrva abhrāt_abhra viśliṣṭam_viśliṣ abhra--_abhra antaram_antara ca_ca aprāptam_aprāpta sat_as madhye_madhya eva_eva vilīyate_vilī tadvat_tadvat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 38_38

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etat_etad eva_eva saṃśaya--_saṃśaya bījam_bīja vivṛṇoti_vivṛ kaccit_kaścit iti_iti kaccit_kaccit iti_iti sa_sa abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa praśne_praśna he_he mahābāho_mahābāhu mahāntaḥ_mahat sarveṣām_sarva bhaktānām_bhakta sarva--_sarva upadrava--_upadrava nivāraṇa--_nivāraṇa samarthāḥ_samartha vā_vā catvāraḥ_catur bāhavaḥ_bāhu yasya_yad iti_iti praśna--_praśna nimitta--_nimitta krodha--_krodha abhāvaḥ_abhāva tad--_tad uttara--_uttara dāna--_dāna sahiṣṇu--_sahiṣṇu tvam_tva ca_ca sūcitam_sūcay brahmaṇaḥ_brahman pathi_pathin brahma--_brahman prāpti--_prāpti mārge_mārga jñāne_jñāna vimūḍhaḥ_vimuh vicittaḥ_vicitta anutpanna--_anutpanna brahma--_brahman ātma--_ātman aikya--_aikya sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra iti_iti yāvat_yāvat apratiṣṭhaḥ_apratiṣṭha deva--_deva yāna--_yāna pitṛ--_pitṛ yāna--_yāna mārga--_mārga gamana--_gamana hetubhyām_hetu upāsanā--_upāsanā karmabhyām_karman pratiṣṭhābhyām_pratiṣṭhā sādhanābhyām_sādhana rahitaḥ_rahita sa_sa upāsanānām_upāsana sarveṣām_sarva karmaṇām_karman parityāgāt_parityāga etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa ubhaya--_ubhaya vibhraṣṭaḥ_vibhraṃś karma--_karman mārgāt_mārga jñāna--_jñāna mārgāt_mārga ca_ca vibhraṣṭaḥ_vibhraṃś chinna--_chid abhram_abhra iva_iva vāyunā_vāyu chinnam_chid viśakalitam_viśakalay pūrvasmāt_pūrva meghāt_megha bhraṣṭam_bhraṃś uttaram_uttara megham_megha aprāptam_aprāpta abhram_abhra yathā_yathā vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś api_api pūrvasmāt_pūrva karma--_karman mārgāt_mārga vicchinnaḥ_vicchid uttaram_uttara ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna mārgam_mārga aprāptaḥ_aprāpta antarāle_antarāla eva_eva naśyati_naś karma--_karman phalam_phala jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala ca_ca labdhum_labh ayogyaḥ_ayogya na_na kim_ka iti_iti praśna--_praśna arthaḥ_artha etena_etad jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman samuccayaḥ_samuccaya nirākṛtaḥ_nirākṛ etasmin_etad hi_hi pakṣe_pakṣa jñāna--_jñāna phala--_phala lābhe_lābha api_api karma--_karman phala--_phala lābha--_lābha sambhavena_sambhava ubhaya--_ubhaya vibhraṣṭa--_vibhraṃś tva--_tva asambhavāt_asaṃbhava na_na ca_ca tasya_tad karma--_karman sambhave_sambhava api_api phala--_phala kāmanā--_kāmanā tyāgāt_tyāga phala--_phala bhraṃśa--_bhraṃśa vacanam_vacana avakalpate_avakﾱp iti_iti vācyam_vac niṣkāmānām_niṣkāma api_api karmaṇām_karman phala--_phala sad-bhāvasya_sad-bhāva āpastamba--_āpastamba vacana--_vacana āndī--_āndī udāharaṇena_udāharaṇa bahuśas_bahuśas pratipādita--_pratipāday tvāt_tva tasmāt_tasmāt sarva--_sarva karma--_karman tyāginam_tyāgin prati_prati eva_eva ayam_idam praśnaḥ_praśna anartha--_anartha prāpti--_prāpti śaṅkāyāḥ_śaṅkā tatra_tatra eva_eva sambhavāt_sambhava 38_38

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kaccit_kaccit iti_iti praśne_praśna ubhaya--_ubhaya vibhraṣṭaḥ_vibhraṃś karma--_karman mārgāt_mārga cyutaḥ_cyu yoga--_yoga mārgam_mārga ca_ca samyak_samyak aprāptaḥ_aprāpta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha chinna--_chid abhram_abhra iva_iva iti_iti yathā_yathā chinnam_chid abhram_abhra meghaḥ_megha pūrvasmāt_pūrva abhrāt_abhra viśliṣṭam_viśliṣ abhra--_abhra antaram_antara ca_ca aprāptam_aprāpta sat_as madhye_madhya vilīyate_vilī tena_tena asya_idam iha_iha loke_loka yoga--_yoga mārge_mārga praveśāt_praveśa viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga tyāga--_tyāga icchā_icchā kaṣṭam_kaṣṭa para--_para loke_loka ca_ca svarga--_svarga sādhanasya_sādhana karmaṇaḥ_karman abhāvāt_abhāva mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanasya_sādhana yogasya_yoga api_api aparipākāt_aparipāka na_na svarga--_svarga mokṣau_mokṣa iti_iti ubhaya--_ubhaya lokaḥ_loka eva_eva asya_idam vināśaḥ_vināśa iti_iti dyotitam_dyotay atas_atas brahma--_brahman prāpti--_prāpti upāye_upāya pathi_pathin mārge_mārga vimūḍhaḥ_vimuh ayam_idam apratiṣṭhaḥ_apratiṣṭha pratiṣṭhām_pratiṣṭhā āspadam_āspada aprāptaḥ_aprāpta san_as kaccit_kaścit kim_ka naśyati_naś
na_na naśyati_naś tvam_tvad pṛcchyase_pracch

baladevaḥ_baladeva viśadayati_viśaday niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tayā_tā karmaṇaḥ_karman anuṣṭhānāt_anuṣṭhāna na_na svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi phalam_phala yoga--_yoga asiddheḥ_asiddhi na_na ātma--_ātman avalokanam_avalokana ca_ca tasya_tad abhūt_bhū evam_evam ubhayasmāt_ubhaya vibhraṣṭaḥ_vibhraṃś apratiṣṭhaḥ_apratiṣṭha nirālambaḥ_nirālamba san_as kim_ka naśyati_naś kim_ka vā_vā na_na naśyati_naś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha chinna--_chid abhram_abhra iva_iva iti_iti abhram_abhra meghaḥ_megha yathā_yathā pūrvasmāt_pūrva abhrāt_abhra vicchinnam_vicchid param_para abhram_abhra ca_ca aprāptam_aprāpta antarāle_antarāla vilīyate_vilī tadvat_tadvat eva_eva iti_iti nāśe_nāśa dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta katham_katham evam_evam śaṅkā_śaṅkā tatra_tatra āha_ah brahmaṇaḥ_brahman pathi_pathin prāpti--_prāpti upāye_upāya yat_yat asau_adas vimūḍhaḥ_vimuh 38_38
BhG 6.39

lg.l: etat_etad me_mad saṃśayam_saṃśaya kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa chettum_chid arhasi_arh aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas
tvad--_tvad anyaḥ_anya saṃśayasya_saṃśaya asya_idam chettā_chettṛ na_na hi_hi upapadyate_upapad

div.p: asti_as āha_ah

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yathā_yathā upadarśita--_upadarśay saṃśaya--_saṃśaya apākaraṇāya_apākaraṇa bhagavantam_bhagavat antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin arthayate_arthay pārthaḥ_pārtha etat_etad me_mad iti_iti etat_etad evam_evam pūrva--_pūrva upadarśitam_upadarśay me_mad mama_mad saṃśayam_saṃśaya he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa chettum_chid apanetum_apanī arhasi_arh aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas saṃśaya--_saṃśaya mūla--_mūla adharma--_adharma ādi--_ādi ucchedena_uccheda mad--_mad anyaḥ_anya kaścid_kaścit ṛṣiḥ_ṛṣi vā_vā devaḥ_deva vā_vā tvadīyam_tvadīya imam_idam saṃśayam_saṃśaya ucchetsyati_ucchid iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah tvad--_tvad anyaḥ_anya iti_iti tvat_tvad parameśvarāt_parameśvara sarvajñāt_sarvajña śāstra--_śāstra kṛtaḥ_kṛt parama--_parama guroḥ_guru kāruṇikāt_kāruṇika anyaḥ_anya anīśvara--_anīśvara tvena_tva asarvajñaḥ_asarvajña kaścid_kaścit ṛṣiḥ_ṛṣi vā_vā devaḥ_deva vā_vā asya_idam yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭa--_bhraṃś para--_para loka--_loka gati--_gati viṣayasya_viṣaya saṃśayasya_saṃśaya chettā_chettṛ na_na upapadyate_upapad na_na sambhavati_sambhū tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad
eva_eva pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa darśī_darśin sarvasya_sarva parama--_parama guruḥ_guru saṃśayam_saṃśaya etam_etad mama_mad chettum_chid arhasi_arh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha etat_etad etam_etad
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva etat_etad iti_iti klība--_klība tvam_tva ārṣam_ārṣa tvat_tvad iti_iti sarva--_sarva īśvarāt_īśvara sarvajña--_sarvajña tvattaḥ_tva anyaḥ_anya anīśvaraḥ_anīśvara alpa--_alpa jñaḥ_jña kaścid_kaścit ṛṣiḥ_ṛṣi
BhG 6.40

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
pārtha_pārtha na_na evā_eva iha_iha na_na amutra_amutra vināśaḥ_vināśa tasya_tad vidyate_vid
na_na hi_hi kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa kṛt_kṛt kaścid_kaścit durgatim_durgati tāta_tāta gacchati_gam

div.p: uvāca_vac iha_iha loke_loka nāśaḥ_nāśa ubhaya--_ubhaya bhraṣṭāt_bhraṃś pātityam_pātitya amutra_amutra para--_para loke_loka nāśaḥ_nāśa naraka--_naraka prāptiḥ_prāpti tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya tasya_tad na_na asti_as eva_eva yatas_yatas kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa kṛt_kṛt cubha--_cubha kārī_kārin kaścid_kaścit api_api durgatim_durgati na_na gacchati_gam ayam_idam ca_ca śubha--_śubha kārī_kārin śraddayā_śraddhā yoge_yoga pravṛtta--_pravṛt tvāt_tva tāta_tāta iti_iti loka--_loka rītyā_rīti upalālayan_upalālay sambodhayati_sambodhay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam arjunasya_arjuna yoginam_yogin prati_prati nāśa--_nāśa āśaṅkām_āśaṅkā pariharan_parihṛ uttaram_uttara śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac pārtha_pārtha iti_iti ubhaya--_ubhaya vibhraṣṭaḥ_vibhraṃś yogī_yogin naśyati_naś iti_iti kaḥ_ka arthaḥ_artha kim_kim iha_iha loke_loka śiṣṭa--_śās garhaṇīyaḥ_garh bhavati_bhū veda--_veda vihita--_vidhā karma--_karman tyāgāt_tyāga yathā_yathā kaścid_kaścit ucchṛṅkhalaḥ_ucchṛṅkhala kim_kim vā_vā paratra_paratra nikṛṣṭām_nikṛṣṭa gatim_gati prāpnoti_prāp yathā_yathā uktam_vac śrutyā_śruti atha_atha etayoḥ_etad pathoḥ_pathin na_na katareṇa_katara cana_cana te_tad kīṭāḥ_kīṭa pataṅgāḥ_pataṃga yadi_yadi dandaśūkam_dandaśūka iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca uktam_vac manunā_manu vāntāśī_vāntāśin ulkā--_ulkā mukhaḥ_mukha pretaḥ_preta vipraḥ_vipra dharmāt_dharma svakāt_svaka cyutaḥ_cyu iti_iti ādi_ādi tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya api_api na_na iti_iti āha_ah he_he pārtha_pārtha pārtha_pārtha na_na eva_eva iha_iha na_na amutra_amutra vināśaḥ_vināśa tasya_tad yathā_yathā śāstram_śāstra kṛta--_kṛ sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsasya_saṃnyāsa sarvatas_sarvatas viraktasya_virañj gurum_guru upasṛtya_upasṛ vedānta--_vedānta śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi_ādi kurvataḥ_kṛ antarāle_antarāla

ubhayatra_ubhayatra api_api tasya_tad vināśaḥ_vināśa na_na asti_as iti_iti atra_atra hetum_hetu āha_ah hi_hi yasmāt_yad kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa kṛt_kṛt śāstra--_śāstra vihita--_vidhā kārī_kārin kaścid_kaścit api_api durgatim_durgati iha_iha akīrtim_akīrti paratra_paratra ca_ca kīṭa--_kīṭa ādi--_ādi rūpa--_rūpa tām_tā na_na gacchati_gam ayam_idam tu_tu sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa eva_eva san_as durgatim_durgati na_na gacchati_gam iti_iti kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tanoti_tan ātmānam_ātman putra--_putra rūpeṇa_rūpa iti_iti pitā_pitṛ tatas_tatas ucyate_vac svārthike_svārthika aṇi_aṇ tatas_tatas eva_eva tātaḥ_tāta rākṣasa--_rākṣasa vāyasa--_vāyasa ādi--_ādi vat_vat pitā_pitṛ eva_eva ca_ca putra--_putra rūpeṇa_rūpa bhajati_bhaj iti_iti putra--_putra sthānīyasya_sthānīya śiṣyasya_śiṣya tāta_tāta iti_iti sambodhanam_sambodhana kṛpā--_kṛpā atiśaya--_atiśaya sūcana--_sūcana artham_artha yat_yad uktam_vac yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś kaṣṭām_kaṣṭa gatim_gati gacchati_gam ajña--_ajña tve_tva sati_as deva--_deva yāna--_yāna pitṛ--_pitṛ yāna--_yāna mārga--_mārga anyatara--_anyatara asambandhi--_asaṃbandhin tvāt_tva svadharma--_svadharma bhraṣṭa--_bhraṃś vat_vat iti_iti tat_tad ayuktam_ayukta etasya_etad deva--_deva yāna--_yāna mārga--_mārga sambandhi--_sambandhin tvena_tva hetoḥ_hetu asiddha--_asiddha tvāt_tva pañcāgni--_pañcāgni vidyāyām_vidyā ye_yad ittham_ittham viduḥ_vid ye_yad ca_ca amī_adas araṇye_araṇya śraddhām_śraddhā satyam_satya upāsate_upās te_tad arciḥ_arcis abhisambhavanti_abhisambhū iti_iti aviśeṣeṇa_aviśeṣa pañcāgni--_pañcāgni vidām_vid iva_iva a_a taskratūnām_taskratu śraddhā--_śraddhā satyavatām_satyavat mumukṣūṇām_mumukṣu api_api deva--_deva yāna_yāna śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi parāyaṇasya_parāyaṇa ca_ca yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭasya_bhraṃś śraddhā--_śraddhā anvitaḥ_anvita bhūtvā_bhū iti_iti anena_idam śraddhāyāḥ_śraddhā prāpta--_prāp tvāt_tva śāntaḥ_śam dāntaḥ_dam iti_iti anena_idam ca_ca anṛta--_anṛta bhāṣaṇa--_bhāṣaṇa rūpa--_rūpa vāc--_vāc vyāpāra--_vyāpāra nirodha--_nirodha rūpasya_rūpa satyasya_satya labdha--_labh tvāt_tva bahis_bahis indiryāṇām_indirya ucchṛṅkhala--_ucchṛṅkhala vyāpāra--_vyāpāra nirodhaḥ_nirodha hi_hi damaḥ_dama yoga--_yoga śāstre_śāstra ca_ca ahiṃsā--_ahiṃsā satya--_satya asteya--_asteya brahmacarya--_brahmacarya aparigrahāḥ_aparigraha yamāḥ_yama iti_iti yogāṅga--_yogāṅga svena_sva ukta--_vac tvāt_tva yadi_yadi tu_tu satya--_satya śabdena_śabda brahma_brahman eva_eva ucyate_vac tadā_tadā api_api na_na kṣatiḥ_kṣati vedānta--_vedānta śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādeḥ_ādi api_api satya--_satya brahma--_brahman cintana--_cintana rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva a_a tad--_tad kratu--_kratu tve_tva api_api ca_ca pañcāgni--_pañcāgni vidām_vid iva_iva brahma--_brahman loka--_loka prāpti--_prāpti sambhavāt_sambhava tathā_tathā ca_ca smṛtiḥ_smṛti saṃnyāsāt_saṃnyāsa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman sthānam_sthāna iti_iti tathā_tathā prātyahika--_prātyahika vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya vicārasya_vicāra api_api brahma--_brahman loka--_loka prāpti--_prāpti sādhanatvāt_sādhanatva samuditānām_samudi teṣām_tad tad--_tad sādhanatvam_sādhanatva kim_ka citram_citra ataeva_ataeva sarva--_sarva sukṛta--_sukṛta rūpa--_rūpa tvam_tva yogi--_yogin caritasya_carita taittirīyāḥ_taittirīya āmananti_āmnā tasya_tad evam_evam viduṣaḥ_vid yajñasya_yajña iti_iti ādinā_ādi smaryate_smṛ ca_ca -_snā tena_tad samasta--_samasta tīrtha--_tīrtha salile_salila sarvā_sarva api_api dattā_dā avaniḥ_avani yajñānām_yajña ca_ca kṛtam_kṛ sahasram_sahasra akhilāḥ_akhila devāḥ_deva ca_ca sampūjitāḥ_sampūjay saṃsārāt_saṃsāra ca_ca samuddhṛtāḥ_samuddhṛ sva--_sva pitaraḥ_pitṛ trailokya--_trailokya pūjyaḥ_pūjay api_api asau_adas yasya_yad brahma--_brahman vicāraṇe_vicāraṇa kṣaṇam_kṣaṇa api_api sthairyam_sthairya manaḥ_manas prāpnuyāt_prāp iti_iti
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha iha_iha loke_loka amutra_amutra para--_para loke_loka api_api kalyāṇam_kalyāṇa kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa yogam_yoga karoti_kṛ iti_iti saḥ_tad
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac pārtha_pārtha iti_iti tasya_tad ukta--_vac lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa yoginaḥ_yogin iha_iha prākṛtike_prākṛtika loke_loka amutra_amutra aprākṛtike_aprākṛtika ca_ca loke_loka vināśaḥ_vināśa svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi sukha--_sukha vibhraṃśa--_vibhraṃśa lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa paramātma--_paramātman avalokana--_avalokana vibhraṃśa--_vibhraṃśa lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa ca_ca na_na vidyate_vid na_na bhavati_bhū kim_ka ca_ca uttaratra_uttaratra tad--_tad prāptiḥ_prāpti bhavet_bhū eva_eva hi_hi yatas_yatas kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa kṛt_kṛt niḥśreyasa--_niḥśreyasa upāya--_upāya bhūta--_bhū sat--_sat dharma--_dharma yoga--_yoga ārambhī_ārambhin durgatim_durgati tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya abhāva--_abhāva rūpām_rūpa daridra--_daridra tām_tā na_na gacchati_gam he_he tāta_tāta iti_iti ati_ati vātsalyāt_vātsalya saṃbodhanam_sambodhana tena_tad ati_ati ātmānam_ātman putra--_putra rūpeṇa_rūpa iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti tatas_tatas pitā_pitṛ svārthike_svārthika aṇi_aṇ tatas_tatas eva_eva tātaḥ_tāta putram_putra śiṣyam_śiṣya ca_ca ati_ati kṛpayā_kṛpā jyeṣṭaḥ_jyeṣṭa tathā_tathā sambodhayati_sambodhay
BhG 6.41

lg.l: prāpya_prāp puṇya--_puṇya kṛtām_kṛt lokān_loka uṣitvā_vas śāśvatīḥ_śāśvata samāḥ_samā
śucīnām_śuci śrīmatām_śrīmat gehe_geha yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś abhijāyate_abhijan

div.p: prāpnoti_prāp āha_ah puṇya--_puṇya kṛtām_kṛt puṇya--_puṇya kāriṇām_kārin aśvamedha--_aśvamedha ādi--_ādi yājinām_yājin lokān_loka prāpya_prāp tatra_tatra śāśvatīḥ_śāśvata samāḥ_samā bahūn_bahu saṃvatsarān_saṃvatsara uṣitvā_vas vāsa--_vāsa sukham_sukha anubhūya_anubhū śucīnām_śuci sat--_sat ācārāṇām_ācāra śrīmatām_śrīmat dhaninām_dhanin gehe_geha sa_tad yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś abhijāyate_abhijan janma_janman prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭasya_bhraṃś śubha--_śubha kṛt--_kṛt tvena_tva loka--_loka dvaye_dvaya api_api nāśa--_nāśa abhāve_abhāva kim_ka bhavati_bhū iti_iti ucyate_vac prāpya_prāp iti_iti yoga--_yoga mārga--_mārga pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin vedānta--_vedānta śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi_ādi kurvan_kṛ antarāle_antarāla mriyamāṇaḥ_mṛ kaścid_kaścit pūrva--_pūrva upacita--_upaci bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā prādurbhāvāt_prādurbhāva viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya spṛhayati_spṛhay kaścid_kaścit tu_tu vairāgya--_vairāgya bhāvanā--_bhāvanā dāḍhyāt_dāḍhya na_na spṛhayati_spṛhay tayoḥ_tad prathamaḥ_prathama prāpya_prāp puṇya--_puṇya kṛtām_kṛt aśvamedha--_aśvamedha yājinām_yājin lokān_loka arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi mārgeṇa_mārga brahma--_brahman lokān_loka ekasmin_eka api_api bhoga--_bhoga bhūmi--_bhūmi bheda--_bheda apekṣayā_apekṣā bahu--_bahu vacanam_vacana tatra_tatra ca_ca uṣitvā_vas vāsam_vāsa anubhūya_anubhū śāśvatīḥ_śāśvata brahma--_brahman parimāṇena_parimāṇa akṣāyāḥ_akṣāya samāḥ_samā saṃvatsarān_saṃvatsara tad--_tad ante_anta śucīnām_śuci śuddhānām_śuddha śrīmatām_śrīmat vibhūtimatām_vibhūtimat mahā--_mahat rāja--_rājan cakravartinām_cakravartin gehe_geha kule_kula bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā śoṣa--_śoṣa yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś abhijāyate_abhijan bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā prābalyāt_prābalya brahma--_brahman loka--_loka ante_anta sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa ayogyaḥ_ayogya mahā--_mahat rājaḥ_rāja bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tarhi_tarhi kām_ka gatim_gati asau_adas prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah prāpya_prāp iti_iti puṇya--_puṇya kṛtām_kṛt aśvamedha--_aśvamedha ādi--_ādi yājinām_yājin lokān_loka iti_iti yogasya_yoga phalam_phala mokṣaḥ_mokṣa bhogaḥ_bhoga ca_ca bhavati_bhū tatra_tatra apakva--_apakva yoginaḥ_yogin bhoga--_bhoga icchāyām_icchā satyām_as yoga--_yoga bhraṃśe_bhraṃśa sati_as bhogaḥ_bhoga eva_eva paripakva--_paripakva yoginaḥ_yogin tu_tu bhoga--_bhoga icchāyāḥ_icchā asambhavāt_asaṃbhava mokṣaḥ_mokṣa eva_eva kecid_kaścit tu_tu paripakva--_paripakva yoginaḥ_yogin api_api daivāt_daiva bhoga--_bhoga icchāyām_icchā satyām_as kardama--_kardama saubhari--_saubhari ādi--_ādi dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi bhoagam_bhoaga api_api āhuḥ_ah iti_iti śucīnām_śuci sat--_sat ācārāṇām_ācāra śrīmatām_śrīmat dhanika--_dhanika vaṇij--_vaṇij ādīnām_ādi rājñām_rājan vā_vā

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_aihika sukha--_sukha sampattim_sampatti tāvat_tāvat āha_ah prāpya_prāp iti_iti yādṛśa--_yādṛśa viṣaya--_viṣaya spṛhayā_spṛhā sva--_sva dharme_dharma śithilaḥ_śithila yogāt_yoga ca_ca vicyutaḥ_vicyu ayam_idam tādṛśān_tādṛśa viṣayān_viṣaya ātma--_ātman uddeśyaka--_uddeśyaka niṣkāma--_niṣkāma svadharma--_svadharma yoga--_yoga ārambha--_ārambha māhātmyena_māhātmya puṇya--_puṇya kṛtām_kṛt aśvamedha--_aśvamedha ādi--_ādi yājinām_yājin lokān_loka tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā vinivṛttiḥ_vinivṛtti tāvatīḥ_tāvat śāśvatīḥ_śāśvata bahvīḥ_bahu samāḥ_samā saṃvatsarān_saṃvatsara teṣu_tad lokeṣu_loka uṣitvā_vas sthitvā_sthā tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga vitṛṣṇaḥ_vitṛṣṇa tebhyaḥ_tad lokebhyaḥ_loka śucīnām_śuci sat--_sat dharma--_dharma niratānām_niram yoga--_yoga arhāṇām_arha śrīmatām_śrīmat sa_tad yoga--_yoga śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha abhijāyata_abhijan
iti_iti alpa--_alpa kāla--_kāla ārabdha--_ārabh yogāt_yoga bhraṣṭasya_bhraṃś gatiḥ_gati iyam_idam darśitā_darśay
BhG 6.42

lg.l: atha_atha vā_vā yoginām_yogin eva_eva kule_kula bhavati_bhū dhīmatām_dhīmat
etat_etad hi_hi durlabhataram_durlabhatara loke_loka janma_janman yat_yad īdṛśam_īdṛśa

div.p: cira--_cira abhyasta--_abhyas yoga--_yoga bhraṃśe_bhraṃśa tu_tu pakṣa--_pakṣa antaram_antara āha_ah athavā_athavā iti_iti yoga--_yoga niṣṭhānām_niṣṭhā dhīmatām_dhīmat jñāninām_jñānin eva_eva kule_kula jāyate_jan na_na tu_tu pūrvoktānām_pūrvokta ārūḍha--_āruh yogānām_yoga kule_kula etat_etad janma_janman stauti_stu īdṛśam_īdṛśa yat_yad janma_janman etat_etad hi_hi loke_loka durlabhataram_durlabhatara mokṣa--_mokṣa hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva 42_42

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana dvitīyam_dvitīya prati_prati pakṣa--_pakṣa antaram_antara āha_ah athavā_athavā iti_iti śraddhā--_śraddhā vairāgya--_vairāgya ādi--_ādi kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa ādhikye_ādhikya tu_tu bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā virahāt_viraha puṇya--_puṇya kṛtām_kṛt lokān_loka a_a prāpya_prāp eva_eva yoginām_yogin eva_eva daridrāṇām_daridra brāhmaṇānām_brāhmaṇa na_na tu_tu śrīmatām_śrīmat rājñām_rājan gṛhe_gṛha yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭa--_bhraṃś janma_janman tat_tad mokṣa--_mokṣa paryavasāyi--_paryavasāyin tvāt_tva yat_yad tu_tu śucīnām_śuci daridrāṇām_daridra brāhmaṇānām_brāhmaṇa brahma--_brahman vidyāvatām_vidyāvat kule_kula janma_janman etat_etad hi_hi prasiddham_prasidh śuka--_śuka ādi--_ādi vat_vat durlabhataram_durlabhatara durlabhāt_durlabha api_api durlabham_durlabha loke_loka yat_yad īdṛśam_īdṛśa sarva--_sarva pramāda--_pramāda kāraṇa--_kāraṇa śūnyam_śūnya janma_janman iti_iti dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya stūyate_stu bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā śūnya--_śūnya tvena_tva sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa arha--_arha tvāt_tva 42_42
āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva cira--_cira arābdhāt_arābdha yogāt_yoga bhraṣṭasya_bhraṃś gatim_gati āha_ah athavā_athavā iti_iti yoginām_yogin yogam_yoga abhyasatām_abhyas dhīmatām_dhīmat yoga--_yoga deśikānām_deśika kule_kula bhavati_bhū utpadyate_utpad dvividham_dvividha janma_janman stauti_stu etat_etad iti_iti yoga--_yoga arhāṇām_arha yogam_yoga abhyasatām_abhyas ca_ca kule_kula pūrva--_pūrva yoga--_yoga saṃskāra--_saṃskāra bala--_bala kṛtam_kṛ etat_etad janma_janman prākṛtānām_prākṛta ati_ati durlabham_durlabha 42_42
BhG 6.43

tatra_tatra tam_tad buddhi--_buddhi saṃyogam_saṃyoga labhate_labh paurvadehikam_paurvadehika
yatate_yat ca_ca tatas_tatas bhūyas_bhūyas saṃsiddhau_saṃsiddhi kuru--_kuru nandana_nandana

āha_ah sa_tad tatra_tatra dvi--_dvi prakāre_prakāra api_api janmani_janman pūrva--_pūrva dehe_deha bhavam_bhava paurvadehikam_paurvadehika tam_tad eva_eva brahma--_brahman viṣayayā_viṣaya buddhyā_buddhi saṃyogam_saṃyoga labhate_labh tatas_tatas ca_ca bhūyas_bhūyas adhikam_adhika saṃsiddhau_saṃsiddhi mokṣe_mokṣa prayatnam_prayatna karoti_kṛ

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etādṛśa--_etādṛśa janma--_janman dvayasya_dvaya durlabha--_durlabha tvam_tva kasmāt_kasmāt yasmāt_yasmāt tatra_tatra tam_tad iti_iti tatra_tatra dvi--_dvi prakāre_prakāra api_api janmani_janman pūrva--_pūrva dehe_deha bhavam_bhava paurvadehikam_paurvadehika sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa guru--_guru upasadana--_upasadana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana nididhyāsanānām_nididhyāsana madhye_madhya yāvat--_yāvat paryantam_paryanta anuṣṭhitam_anuṣṭhā tāvat--_tāvat paryantam_paryanta eva_eva tam_tad brahma--_brahman saṃyogam_saṃyoga tad--_tad sādhana--_sādhana kalāpam_kalāpa iti_iti yāvat_yāvat labhate_labh prāpnoti_prāp na_na kevalam_kevalam labhate_labh eva_eva kintu_kiṃtu tatas_tatas tad--_tad lābha--_lābha anantaram_anantaram bhūyaḥ_bhūyas adhikam_adhika labdhāyāḥ_labh bhūmeḥ_bhūmi agrimām_agrima bhūmim_bhūmi sampādayitum_sampāday saṃsiddhau_saṃsiddhi saṃsiddhiḥ_saṃsiddhi mokṣaḥ_mokṣa tad--_tad nimittam_nimitta yatate_yat ca_ca prayatnam_prayatna karoti_kṛ ca_ca yāvat_yāvat mokṣam_mokṣa bhūmikāḥ_bhūmikā sampādayati_sampāday iti_iti arthaḥ_artha he_he kuru--_kuru nandana_nandana tava_tvad api_api śucīnām_śuci śrīmatām_śrīmat kule_kula yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭa--_bhraṃś janama_janama jātam_jan iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva vāsanā--_vāsanā vaśāt_vaśa anāyāsena_anāyāsa eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna lābhaḥ_lābha bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti sūcayitum_sūcay mahā--_mahat prabhāvasya_prabhāva kuroḥ_kuru kīrtanam_kīrtana
ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha bhagavat--_bhagavat vaśiṣṭha--_vaśiṣṭha vacane_vacana vyaktaḥ_vyakta yathā_yathā śrī--_śrī rāmaḥ_rāma

lg.l: ekām_eka atha_atha dvitīyām_dvitīya vā_vā tṛtīyām_tṛtīya bhūmikām_bhūmikā uta_uta
ārūḍhasya_āruh mṛtakasya_mṛtaka atha_atha kīdṛśī_kīdṛśa bhagavan_bhagavat gatiḥ_gati

div.p: pūrvam_pūrvam hi_hi sapta_saptan bhūmayaḥ_bhūmi vyākhyātāḥ_vyākhyā tatra_tatra nitya--_nitya anitya--_anitya vastu--_vastu viveka--_viveka pūrvakāt_pūrvaka iha_iha amutra_amutra artha--_artha bhoga--_bhoga vairāgyāt_vairāgya śama--_śama dama--_dama śraddhā--_śraddhā titikṣā--_titikṣā sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa ādi--_ādi puraḥsarā_puraḥsara mumukṣā_mumukṣā śubha--_śubha icchā--_icchā ākhyā_ākhyā prathamā_prathama bhūmikā_bhūmikā sādhana--_sādhana catuṣṭaya--_catuṣṭaya sampad_sampad iti_iti tāvat_tāvat tatas_tatas śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana pariniṣpannasya_pariniṣpad tattva--_tattva jñānasya_jñāna nirvicikitsanā--_nirvicikitsana rūpā_rūpa tanumānasā_tanumānasā nāma_nāma tṛtīyā_tṛtīya bhūmikā_bhūmikā nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana sampad_sampad iti_iti yāvat_yāvat caturthī_caturtha bhūmikā_bhūmikā tattva--_tattva sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra tatra_tatra caturthīm_caturtha bhūmim_bhūmi prāptasya_prāp mṛtasya_mṛ jīvan--_jīv mukti--_mukti abhāve_abhāva api_api videha--_videha kaivalyam_kaivalya prati_prati na_na asti_as eva_eva saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya tad--_tad uttara--_uttara bhūmi--_bhūmi trayam_traya prāptaḥ_prāp tu_tu jīvan_jīv api_api muktaḥ_muc kim_kim videhaḥ_videha iti_iti nā_na asti_as eva_eva bhūmikā--_bhūmikā catuṣṭaye_catuṣṭaya śaṅkā_śaṅkā bhavati_bhū
śrī--_śrī vaśiṣṭhaḥ_vaśiṣṭha

lg.l: yoga--_yoga bhūmikayā_bhūmikā utkrānta--_utkram jīvitasya_jīvita śarīriṇaḥ_śarīrin
kṣīyate_kṣi
tatas_tatas sura--_sura vimāneṣu_vimāna loka--_loka pāla--_pāla pureṣu_pura ca_ca
meru--_meru upavana--_upavana kuñjeṣu_kuñja ramate_ram ramaṇī--_ramaṇī sakhaḥ_sakha
tatas_tatas sukṛta--_sukṛta saṃbhāre_sambhāra duṣkṛte_duṣkṛta ca_ca purākṛte_purākṛta
bhoga--_bhoga kṣayāt_kṣaya parikṣīṇe_parikṣi jāyante_jan yoginaḥ_yogin bhuvi_bhū
śucīnām_śuci śrīmatām_śrīmat gehe_geha gupte_gup guṇavatām_guṇavat satām_sat
janitvā_jan yogam_yoga eva_eva ete_etad sevante_sev yoga--_yoga vāsitāḥ_vāsay

div.p: tatra_tatra pāc--_pāñc bhavana--_bhavana abhyastam_abhyas yoga--_yoga bhūmi--_bhūmi kramam_krama budhāḥ_budha dṛṣṭvā_dṛś paripatanti_paripat uccais_uccais uttaram_uttara bhūmikā--_bhūmikā kramam_krama

atra_atra prāk_prāk upacita--_upaci bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā prābalyāt_prābalya alpa--_alpa kāla--_kāla abhyasta--_abhyas vairāgya--_vairāgya vāsanā--_vāsanā daurbalyena_daurbalya prāṇa--_prāṇa utkrānti--_utkrānti samaye_samaya prādurbhūta--_prādurbhū bhoga--_bhoga spṛhaḥ_spṛhā sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin yaḥ_yad saḥ_tad eva_eva uktaḥ_vac yaḥ_yad tu_tu vairāgya--_vairāgya vāsanā--_vāsanā prābalyāt_prābalya prakṛṣṭa--_prakṛṣṭa puṇya--_puṇya prakaṭita--_prakaṭay parameśvara--_parameśvara prasāda--_prasāda vaśena_vaśa prāṇa--_prāṇa utkrānti--_utkrānti samaye_samaya anudbhūta--_anudbhūta bhoga--_bhoga spṛhaḥ_spṛhā saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin bhoga--_bhoga vyavadhānam_vyavadhāna vinā_vinā eva_eva brāhmaṇānām_brāhmaṇa eva_eva kule_kula samutpannaḥ_samutpad tasya_tad prāktana--_prāktana saṃskāra--_saṃskāra abhivyaktena_abhivyañj āyāsena_āyāsa eva_eva sambhavāt_sambhava nā_na asti_as pūrvasya_pūrva eva_eva mokṣam_mokṣa prati_prati āśaṅkā_āśaṅkā iti_iti sa_tad vasiṣṭhena_vasiṣṭha nā_na uktaḥ_vac bhagavatā_bhagavant tu_tu parama--_parama kāruṇikena_kāruṇika athavā_athavā iti_iti pakṣa--_pakṣa spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa anyat_anya

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_āmutrika sukha--_sukha sampattim_sampatti vaktum_vac pūrva--_pūrva saṃskāra--_saṃskāra hetukam_hetuka sādhanam_sādhana āha_ah tatra_tatra iti_iti dvividhe_dvividha janmani_janman paurvadaihikam_paurvadaihika pūrva--_pūrva dehe_deha bhavam_bhava buddhyā_buddhi svadharma--_svadharma sva--_sva ātma--_ātman paramātma--_paramātman viṣayā_viṣaya saṃyogam_saṃyoga sambandham_sambandha labhate_labh tatas_tatas ca_ca hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhi--_viśuddhi sva--_sva paramātma--_paramātman avaloka--_avaloka rūpāyām_rūpa saṃsiddhau_saṃsiddhi nimitte_nimitta svāpa--_svāpa utthita--_utthā vat_vat bhūyas_bhūyas bahutaram_bahutara yatate_yat yathā_yathā punar_punar vighna--_vighna hataḥ_han na_na syāt_as
BhG 6.44

lg.l: pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsena_abhyāsa tena_tad eva_eva hriyate_hṛ hi_hi avaśaḥ_avaśa api_api saḥ_tad
jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu api_api yogasya_yoga śabda--_śabda brahma_brahman ativartate_ativṛt

div.p: tena_tad eva_eva pūrva--_pūrva deha--_deha kṛta--_kṛ abhyāsena_abhyāsa avaśaḥ_avaśa api_api kutaścid_kutaścid an_an icchan_iṣ api_api saṃhriyate_saṃhṛ viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya purā_purā āvṛtya_āvṛ brahma--_brahman niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā kriyate_kṛ tat_tad evam_evam pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsa--_abhyāsa balena_bala prayatnam_prayatna kurvan_kṛ śanais_śanais mucyate_muc iti_iti imam_idam artham_artha kaimutya--_kaimutya nyāyena_nyāya sphuṭayati_sphuṭay jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu iti_iti sārdhena_sārdha yogasya_yoga svarūpam_svarūpa jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu eva_eva kevalam_kevalam na_na tu_tu prāpta--_prāp yogaḥ_yoga evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta yoge_yoga praviṣṭa--_praviś mātraḥ_mātra api_api pāpa--_pāpa vaśāt_vaśa yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś api_api śabda--_śabda brahma_brahman vedam_veda ativartate_ativṛt veda--_veda ukta--_vac karma--_karman phalāni_phala atikrāmati_atikram tebhyaḥ_tad adhikam_adhika phalam_phala prāpya_prāp mucyate_muc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu yaḥ_yad brahma--_brahman vidām_vid brāhmaṇānām_brāhmaṇa sarva--_sarva pramāda--_pramāda kāraṇa--_kāraṇa śūnye_śūnya kule_kula samutpannaḥ_samutpad tasya_tad madhye_madhya viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga vyavadhāna--_vyavadhāna abhāvāt_abhāva avyavahita--_avyavahita prāc--_prāñc bhavīya--_bhavīya saṃskāra--_saṃskāra udbodhāt_udbodha punar_punar api_api jñāna--_jñāna sādhana--_sādhana lābhaḥ_lābha bhavatu_bhū nāma_nāma yaḥ_yad tu_tu śrīmatām_śrīmat mahā--_mahat rāja--_rājan cakravartinām_cakravartin kule_kula bahuvidha--_bahuvidha viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga vyavadhānena_vyavadhāna utpannaḥ_utpad tasya_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā prābalyāt_prābalya pramāda--_pramāda kāraṇa--_kāraṇa sambhavāt_sambhava ca_ca katham_katham ati_ati vyavahita--_vyavadhā jñāna--_jñāna saṃskāra--_saṃskāra sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa anarhasya_anarha katham_katham vā_vā jñāna--_jñāna sādhana--_sādhana lābhaḥ_lābha iti_iti tathā_tathā ucyate_vac pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsena_abhyāsa iti_iti ati_ati cira--_cira vyavahita--_vyavadhā janma--_janman upacitena_upaci api_api tena_tad eva_eva pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsena_abhyāsa prāc--_prāñc arjita--_arjay jñāna--_jñāna saṃskāreṇa_saṃskāra avaśaḥ_avaśa api_api mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanāya_sādhana aprayatamānaḥ_aprayatamāna api_api hriyate_hṛ svavaśīkriyate_svavaśīkṛ akasmāt_akasmāt eva_eva bhoga--_bhoga vāsanābhyaḥ_vāsanā vyutthāpya_vyutthāpay mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhana--_sādhana unmukhaḥ_unmukha kriyate_kṛ jñāna--_jñāna vāsanāyāḥ_vāsanā eva_eva alpa--_alpa kāla--_kāla abhyastāyāḥ_abhyas api_api vastu--_vastu viṣaya--_viṣaya tvena_tva avastu--_avastu viṣayābhyaḥ_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga vāsanābhyaḥ_vāsanā prābalyāt_prābalya paśya_paś yathā_yathā tvam_tvad eva_eva yuddhe_yuddha pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt jñānāya_jñāna apratayamānaḥ_apratayamāna api_api pūrva--_pūrva saṃskāra--_saṃskāra prābalyāt_prābalya akasmāt_akasmāt eva_eva raṇa--_raṇa bhūmau_bhūmi jñāna--_jñāna unmukhaḥ_unmukha abhūḥ_bhū iti_iti ataeva_ataeva prāk_prāk uktam_vac na_na iha_iha abhikrama--_abhikrama nāśaḥ_nāśa asti_as iti_iti aneka--_aneka janma--_janman sahasra--_sahasra vyavahitaḥ_vyavadhā api_api jñāna--_jñāna saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra sva--_sva kāryam_kārya karoti_kṛ eva_eva sarva--_sarva virodhi--_virodhin upamardena_upamarda iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa abhāve_abhāva api_api hi_hi kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya jñāna--_jñāna adhikāraḥ_adhikāra sthitaḥ_sthā eva_eva yathā_yathā pāṭac--_pāṭac careṇa_cara bahūnām_bahu rakṣiṇām_rakṣin madhye_madhya vidyamānam_vid api_api aśva--_aśva ādi--_ādi dravyam_dravya svayam_svayam an_an icchat_iṣ api_api tān_tad sarvān_sarva abhibhūya_abhibhū sva--_sva sāmarthya--_sāmarthya viśeṣāt_viśeṣa eva_eva apahriyate_apahṛ paścāt_paścāt tu_tu kadā_kadā apahṛtam_apahṛ iti_iti vimarśaḥ_vimarśa bhavati_bhū evam_evam bahūnām_bahu jñāna--_jñāna pratibandhakānām_pratibandhaka madhye_madhya vidyamānaḥ_vid api_api yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś svayam_svayam an_an icchan_iṣ api_api jñāna--_jñāna saṃskāreṇa_saṃskāra balavatā_balavat eva_eva sarvān_sarva pratibandhakān_pratibandhaka abhibhūya_abhibhū ātma--_ātman vaśī_vaśin kriyate_kṛ iti_iti hṛñaḥ_hṛñ prayogena_prayoga ataeva_ataeva saṃskāra--_saṃskāra prābalyāt_prābalya jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu jñātum_jñā icchuḥ_icchu api_api yogasya_yoga mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhana--_sādhana jñānasya_jñāna viṣayam_viṣaya brahma_brahman prathama--_prathama bhūmikāyām_bhūmikā sthitaḥ_sthā saṃnyāsī_saṃnyāsin iti_iti yāvat_yāvat saḥ_tad api_api tasyām_tad eva_eva bhūmikāyām_bhūmikā mṛtaḥ_mṛ antarāle_antarāla bahūn_bahu viṣayān_viṣaya bhuktvā_bhuj mahā--_mahat rāja--_rājan cakravartinām_cakravartin kule_kula samutpannaḥ_samutpad api_api yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś prāc--_prāñc upacita--_upaci jñāna--_jñāna saṃskāra--_saṃskāra prābalyāt_prābalya tasmin_tad janmani_janman śabda--_śabda ativartate_ativṛt atikramya_atikram tiṣṭhati_sthā karma--_karman adhikāra--_adhikāra atikrameṇa_atikrama jñāna--_jñāna adhikārī_adhikārin bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etena_etad api_api jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman samuccayaḥ_samuccaya nirākṛtaḥ_nirākṛ iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś samuccaye_samuccaya hi_hi jñāninaḥ_jñānin api_api karma--_karman kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa atikrama--_atikrama abhāvāt_abhāva
ākṛṣyate_ākṛṣ bhavati_bhū ativartate_ativṛt vartate_vṛt tiṣṭhati_sthā

baladevaḥ_baladeva tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu tena_tad eva_eva yoga--_yoga viṣayakeṇa_viṣayaka pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsena_abhyāsa sa_tad yogī_yogin hriyate_hṛ ākṛṣyate_ākṛṣ avaśaḥ_avaśa api_api kenacid_kaścit vighnena_vighna an_an icchan_iṣ api_api iti_iti arthaḥ_artha hi_hi iti_iti prasiddhaḥ_prasidh ayam_idam yoga--_yoga mahimā_mahiman yogasya_yoga jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu api_api tu_tu yogam_yoga abhyasitum_abhyas pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt śabda--_śabda brahma_brahman sa_sa kāma--_kāma karma--_karman nirūpakam_nirūpaka vedam_veda ativartate_ativṛt tam_tad na_na śabda--_śabda ghāti_ghātin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 6.45

lg.l: prayatnāt_prayatna yat_yat tu_tu yogī_yogin saṃśuddha--_saṃśudh kilbiṣaḥ_kilbiṣa
aneka--_aneka janma--_janman saṃsiddhaḥ_saṃsidh tatas_tatas yāti_yā parām_para gatim_gati

div.p: yadā_yadā evam_evam manda--_manda prayatnaḥ_prayatna api_api yogī_yogin parām_para gaitṃ_gaitṛ yāti_yā tadā_tadā yaḥ_yad tu_tu yogī_yogin prayatnāt_prayatna uttarottaram_uttarottara adhikam_adhika yoge_yoga yatamānaḥ_yat yatnam_yatna kurvan_kṛ yogena_yoga eva_eva saṃśuddha--_saṃśudh kilbiṣaḥ_kilbiṣa vidhūta--_vidhū pāpaḥ_pāpa saḥ_tad anekeṣu_aneka jñānī_jñānin bhūtvā_bhū tatas_tatas śreṣṭhām_śreṣṭha gatim_gati yāti_yā iti_iti kim_ka vaktavyam_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_yadā ca_ca evam_evam prathama--_prathama bhūmikāyām_bhūmikā mṛtaḥ_mṛ api_api aneka--_aneka bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā vyavahitam_vyavadhā api_api vividha--_vividha pramāda--_pramāda kāraṇavati_kāraṇavat mahā--_mahat rāja--_rājan kule_kula api_api janma_janman labdhvā_labh api_api yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś pūrva--_pūrva upacita--_upaci jñāna--_jñāna atikramya_atikram jñāna--_jñāna adhikārī_adhikārin bhavati_bhū tadā_tadā kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac dvitīyāyām_dvitīya tṛtīyāyām_tṛtīya vā_vā bhūmikāyām_bhūmikā mṛtaḥ_mṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga ante_anta labdha--_labh mahārāja--_mahārājan kula--_kula janmā_janman yadi_yadi vā_vā bhogam_bhoga a_a kṛtvā_kṛ eva_eva labdha--_labh brahma--_brahman vid_vid karma--_karman adhikāra--_adhikāra atikrameṇa_atikrama jñāna--_jñāna adhikārī_adhikārin bhūtvā_bhū tad--_tad sādhanāni_sādhana sampādya_sampāday tad--_tad phala--_phala lābhena_lābha saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bandhanāt_bandhana mucyate_muc iti_iti tat_tad etat_etad āh_ah prayatnāt_prayatna iti_iti prayatnāt_prayatna pūrva--_pūrva kṛtāt_kṛ api_api adhikam_adhika adhikam_adhika yatamānaḥ_yat prayatna--_prayatna atirekam_atireka kurvan_kṛ yogī_yogin pūrva--_pūrva upacita--_upaci saṃskāravān_saṃskāravat tena_tad eva_eva yoga--_yoga prayatna--_prayatna puṇyena_puṇya saṃśuddha--_saṃśudh kilbiṣaḥ_kilbiṣa dhauta--_dhāv jñāna--_jñāna pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka pāpa--_pāpa ataeva_ataeva saṃskāra--_saṃskāra upacayāt_upacaya puṇya--_puṇya upacayāt_upacaya ca_ca anekaiḥ_aneka janmabhiḥ_janman saṃsiddhaḥ_saṃsidh saṃskāra--_saṃskāra atirekeṇa_atireka puṇya--_puṇya atirekeṇa_atireka ca_ca prāpta--_prāp carama--_carama janmā_janman tatas_tatas sādhana--_sādhana paripākāt_paripāka yāti_yā parām_para prakṛṣṭām_prakṛṣṭa gatim_gati muktim_mukti na_na asti_as eva_eva atra_atra kaścid_kaścit saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

tasya_tad ca_ca yatna--_yatna śaithilyavataḥ_śaithilyavat yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭasya_bhraṃś janmāntare_janmāntara punar_punar yoga--_yoga prāptiḥ_prāpti evā_eva uktā_vac na_na tu_tu saṃsiddhiḥ_saṃsiddhi saṃsiddhiḥ_saṃsiddhi tu_tu yāvadbhiḥ_yāvat janmabhiḥ_janman tasya_tad yogasya_yoga paripākaḥ_paripāka syāt_as tāvadbhiḥ_tāvat eva_eva iti_iti avasīyate_avasā yaḥ_yad tu_tu na_na kadācid_kadācid api_api yoge_yoga śaithilya--_śaithilya prayatnaḥ_prayatna sa_tad na_na yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭa--_bhraṃś śabda--_śabda vācyaḥ_vac

lg.l: bahu--_bahu janma--_janman vipakvena_vipakva samyak_samyak yoga--_yoga samādhinā_samādhi
draṣṭum_dṛś yatante_yat yatayaḥ_yati śūnya--_śūnya āgāreṣu_āgāra yat_yad padam_pada

div.p: iti_iti kardama--_kardama ukteḥ_ukti saḥ_tad api_api na_na ekena_eka janmanā_janman sidhyati_sidh iti_iti āha_ah prayatnāt_prayatna yatamānaḥ_yat prakṛṣṭa--_prakṛṣṭa yatnāt_yatna api_api yatnavān_yatnavat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tu-kāraḥ_tu-kāra pūrva--_pūrva uktāt_vac yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭāt_bhraṃś asya_idam bhedam_bheda bodhayati_bodhay saṃśuddha--_saṃśudh kilbiṣaḥ_kilbiṣa samyak_samyak paripakva--_paripakva kaṣāyaḥ_kaṣāya saḥ_tad api_api na_na ekena_eka janmanā_janman sidhyati_sidh iti_iti saḥ_tad parām_para gatim_gati mokṣam_mokṣa

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha āmutrikīm_āmutrika sukha--_sukha sampattim_sampatti āha_ah prayatnāt_prayatna iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva kṛtāt_kṛ api_api prayatnāt_prayatna adhikam_adhika adhikam_adhika yatamānaḥ_yat pūrva--_pūrva vighna--_vighna bhayāt_bhaya prayatna--_prayatna ādhikyam_ādhikya kurvan_kṛ yogī_yogin tena_tad upacitena_upaci prayatnena_prayatna saṃśuddha--_saṃśudh kilbiṣaḥ_kilbiṣa nidhauta--_nidhāv nikhila--_nikhila anya--_anya vāsanaḥ_vāsanā evam_evam anekaiḥ_aneka janmabhiḥ_janman saṃsiddhaḥ_saṃsidh paripakva--_paripakva yogaḥ_yoga yoga--_yoga paripākāt_paripāka eva_eva hetoḥ_hetu parām_para sva--_sva parātma--_parātman avaloka--_avaloka lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa gatim_gati muktim_mukti yāti_yā
BhG 6.46

lg.l: tapasvibhyaḥ_tapasvin adhikaḥ_adhika yogī_yogin jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin api_api mataḥ_man adhikaḥ_adhika
karmibhyaḥ_karmin ca_ca adhikaḥ_adhika yogī_yogin tasmāt_tasmāt yogī_yogin bhava_bhū arjuna_arjuna

div.p: tapasvibhyaḥ_tapasvin kṛcchra--_kṛcchra cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādi--_ādi tapaḥ--_tapas niṣṭhebhyaḥ_niṣṭha jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin śāstra--_śāstra jñāna--_jñāna vidbhyaḥ_vid api_api karmibhyaḥ_karmin iṣṭa--_iṣṭa pūrta--_pūrta ādi--_ādi karma--_karman kāribhyaḥ_kārin api_api yogī_yogin śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha mama_mad abhimataḥ_abhiman tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad yogī_yogin bhava_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_idānīm yogī_yogin stūyate_stu arjunam_arjuna prati_prati śraddhā--_śraddhā atiśaya--_atiśaya utpādana--_utpādana pūrvakam_pūrvaka yogam_yoga vidhātum_vidhā tapasvibhyaḥ_tapasvin iti_iti tapasvibhyaḥ_tapasvin kṛcchra--_kṛcchra cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādi--_ādi tapaḥ--_tapas parāyaṇebhyaḥ_parāyaṇa api_api adhikaḥ_adhika utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa yogī_yogin tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna utpatti--_utpatti anantaram_anantara manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣaya--_kṣaya kārī_kārin
vidyayā_vidyā te_tad ārohanti_āruh yatra_yatra kāmāḥ_kāma parāgatāḥ_parāgam na_na tatra_tatra dakṣiṇā_dakṣiṇā yānti_yā na_na avadvāṃsaḥ_avadvas tapasvinaḥ_tapasvin iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

ataeva_ataeva karmibhyaḥ_karmin dakṣiṇā--_dakṣiṇā sahita--_sahita jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādi--_ādi karma--_karman anuṣṭhānebhyaḥ_anuṣṭhāna ca_ca adhikaḥ_adhika yogī_yogin karmiṇām_karmin tapasvinām_tapasvin ca_ca ajña--_ajña tvena_tva mokṣa--_mokṣa anarha--_anarha tvāt_tva

jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin api_api parokṣa--_parokṣa jñānavadbhyaḥ_jñānavat api_api aparokṣa--_aparokṣa jñānavān_jñānavat adhikaḥ_adhika mataḥ_man yogī_yogin evam_evam aparokṣa--_aparokṣa jñānavadbhyaḥ_jñānavat api_api manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣaya--_kṣaya abhāvāt_abhāva ajīvan--_ajīvan muktebhyaḥ_muc manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣaya--_kṣaya vat_vat tvena_tva jīvan--_jīv muktaḥ_muc yogī_yogin adhikaḥ_adhika mataḥ_man mama_mad saṃyataḥ_saṃyam yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt adhika--_adhika adhika--_adhika prayatna--_prayatna balāt_bala tvam_tvad yoga--_yoga bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś idānīm_idānīm tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣayaiḥ_kṣaya yugapad_yugapad saṃpāditaiḥ_sampāday yogī_yogin jīva--_jīva muktaḥ_muc yaḥ_yad sa_tad yogī_yogin paramaḥ_parama mataḥ_man iti_iti prāc_prāñc he_he arjuna_arjuna iti_iti śuddha--_śudh iti_iti sa_sa bodhana--_bodhana arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin brahma--_brahman upāsakebhyaḥ_upāsaka api_api yogī_yogin paramātma--_paramātman upāsakaḥ_upāsaka adhikaḥ_adhika mataḥ_man iti_iti mama_mad idam_idam eva_eva matam_man iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva yadi_yadi jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin api_api adhikaḥ_adhika tadā_tadā kim_ka uta_uta karmibhyaḥ_karmin iti_iti āha_ah karmibhyaḥ_karmin ca_ca iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam jñāna--_jñāna garbhaḥ_garbha niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yoga--_yoga śiraskaḥ_śiraska mokṣa--_mokṣa hetuḥ_hetu tādṛśāt_tādṛśa yogāt_yoga tad--_tad phalam_phala bhavet_bhū iti_iti abhidhāya_abhidhā yoginam_yogin stauti_stu tapasvibhyaḥ_tapasvin iti_iti tapasvibhyaḥ_tapasvin kṛcchra--_kṛcchra ādi--_ādi tapaḥ--_tapas parebhyaḥ_para jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin artha--_artha śāstra--_śāstra vidbhyaḥ_vid karmibhyaḥ_karmin sa_sa kāma--_kāma iṣṭā--_iṣṭā pūrti--_pūrti ādi--_ādi kṛdbhyaḥ_kṛt ca_ca yogī_yogin mad--_mad ukta--_vac yoga--_yoga anuṣṭhātā_anuṣṭhātṛ adhikaḥ_adhika śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha mataḥ_man ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna vaidhuryeṇa_vaidhurya mokṣa--_mokṣa anarhebhyaḥ_anarha tapasvi--_tapasvin ādibhyaḥ_ādi mad--_mad uktaḥ_vac yogī_yogin samudita--_samudi ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna tvena_tva mokṣa--_mokṣa arha--_arha tvāt_tva śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha
BhG 6.47

lg.l: yoginām_yogin api_api sarveṣām_sarva mad--_mad gatena_gam antarātmanā_antarātman
śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat bhajate_bhaj yaḥ_yad mām_mad sa_tad me_mad yuktatamaḥ_yuktatama mataḥ_man

div.p: āha_ah mad--_mad gatena_gam mayi_mad āsaktena_āsañj antarātmanā_antarātman manasā_manas yaḥ_yad mām_mad parameśvaram_parameśvara vāsudevam_vāsudeva śraddā--_śraddā yuktaḥ_yuj san_as bhajate_bhaj sa_tad yoga--_yoga yukteṣu_yuj śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha mama_mad saṃmataḥ_samman atas_atas mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhava_bhū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 47_47

lg.l: ātma--_ātman yogam_yoga avocat_vac yaḥ_yad bhakti--_bhakti yoga--_yoga śiromaṇim_śiromaṇi
tam_tad vande_vand parama--_parama ānandam_ānanda mādhavam_mādhava bhakta--_bhakta sevadhim_sevadhi

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī dhyāna--_dhyāna yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma ṣaṣṭhaḥ_ṣaṣṭha adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm sarva--_sarva yogi--_yogin śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha yoginam_yogin vadan_vad adhyāyam_adhyāya upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ yoginām_yogin iti_iti yoginām_yogin vasu--_vasu rudra--_rudra āditya--_āditya ādi--_ādi kṣudra--_kṣudra devatā--_devatā bhaktānām_bhakta sarveṣām_sarva api_api madhye_madhya mayi_mad bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva puṇya--_puṇya paripāka--_paripāka viśeṣāt_viśeṣa gatena_gam prīti--_prīti vaśāt_vaśa niviṣṭena_niviś mad--_mad gatena_gam antarātmanā_antarātman antaḥkaraṇena_antaḥkaraṇa prāc_prāñc sādhu--_sādhu saṅgāt_saṅga ca_ca mad--_mad bhajane_bhajana evam_evam śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat atiśayena_atiśaya śraddadhānaḥ_śraddhā sambhajante_sambhaj sevata_sev satatam_satatam cintayati_cintay yaḥ_yad mām_mad nārāyaṇam_nārāyaṇa īśvara--_īśvara īśvaram_īśvara sa_sa guṇam_guṇa nirguṇam_nirguṇa vā_vā manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya ayam_idam īśvara--_īśvara antara--_antara eva_eva mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta yogī_yogin yuktatamaḥ_yuktatama sarvebhyaḥ_sarva samāhita--_samāhita cittebhyaḥ_citta yuktebhyaḥ_yuj śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha me_mad mama_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara sarvajñasya_sarvajña mataḥ_man niścitaḥ_niści samāne_samāna api_api yoga--_yoga abhyāsa--_abhyāsa kleśe_kleśa samāne_samāna api_api bhajana--_bhajana āyāse_āyāsa mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti śūnyebhyaḥ_śūnya mad--_mad bhaktasya_bhakta eva_eva śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvāt_tva tvam_tvad mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta paramaḥ_parama yuktatamaḥ_yuktatama anāyāsena_anāyāsa bhavitum_bhū śakṣyasi_śak iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
div.l: tat_tad anena_idam adhyāyena_adhyāya karma--_karman yogasya_yoga buddhi--_buddhi śuddhi--_śuddhi hetoḥ_hetu maryādām_maryādā darśayatā_darśay tatas_tatas ca_ca kṛta--_kṛ sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsasya_saṃnyāsa sa_sa aṅgam_aṅga yogam_yoga vivṛṇvatā_vivṛ manaḥ--_manas nigraha--_nigraha upāyam_upāya ca_ca ākṣepa--_ākṣepa nirāsa--_nirāsa pūrvakam_pūrvaka upadiśatā_upadiś puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha śūnyatā--_śūnyatā āśaṅkām_āśaṅkā ca_ca śithila--_śithila tayā_tā karma--_karman kāṇḍam_kāṇḍa bhajanīyam_bhaj ca_ca bhagavantam_bhagavant vāsudevam_vāsudeva tad--_tad padārtham_padārtha nirūpayitum_nirūpay agrima--_agrima madhyāya--_madhyāya ṣaṭkam_ṣaṭka ārabhyate_ārabh iti_iti śivam_śiva 47_47
div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍhārtha--_gūḍhārtha dīpikāyām_dīpikā adhyātma--_adhyātma yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma

asti_as avasīyate_avasā tatra_tatra mā_mā evam_evam vācyam_vac iti_iti āha_ah yoginām_yogin api_api pañcamī--_pañcamī arthe_artha ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī nirdhāraṇa--_nirdhāraṇa yogāt_yoga tapasvibhyaḥ_tapasvin jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin api_api adhikaḥ_adhika iti_iti pañcamī--_pañcamī artha--_artha kramāt_krama ca_ca yogibhyaḥ_yogin sakāśāt_sakāśāt api_api iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na kevalam_kevalam yogibhyaḥ_yogin ekavidhebhyaḥ_ekavidha sakāśāt_sakāśāt api_api tu_tu yogibhyaḥ_yogin sarvebhyaḥ_sarva nānā_nānā vidhebhyaḥ_vidha yoga--_yoga ārūḍhebhyaḥ_āruh samprajñāta--_samprajñā samādhi--_samādhi asamprajñāta--_asamprajñāta samādhimadbhyaḥ_samādhimat api_api iti_iti yat_yat vā_vā yogāḥ_yoga upāyāḥ_upāya karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna tapaḥ--_tapas yoga--_yoga bhakti--_bhakti ādayaḥ_ādi tadvatām_tadvat madhye_madhya yaḥ_yad mām_mad bhajeta_bhaj mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhavati_bhū sa_tad yuktatamaḥ_yuktatama upāyavattamaḥ_upāyavattama karmī_karmin tapasvī_tapasvin jñānī_jñānin ca_ca yogī_yogin mataḥ_man śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana ādi--_ādi bhaktimān_bhaktimat tu_tu yogitamaḥ_yogitama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad uktam_vac śrī--_śrī bhāgavate_bhāgavata
muktānām_muc api_api siddhānām_siddha nārāyaṇa--_nārāyaṇa parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha praśānta--_praśam ātmā_ātman koṭiṣu_koṭi api_api mahā--_mahat mune_muni

lg.l: tasya_tad sūtra--_sūtra mayam_maya ślokāḥ_śloka bhakta--_bhakta kaṇṭha--_kaṇṭha vibhūṣaṇam_vibhūṣaṇa
prathamena_prathama kathā--_kathā sūtram_sūtra gītā--_gītā śāstra--_śāstra śiromaṇiḥ_śiromaṇi
dvitīyena_dvitīya tṛtīyena_tṛtīya tūryeṇa_tūrya a_a kāma--_kāma karma_karman ca_ca
jñānam_jñāna ca_ca pañcamena_pañcama uktam_vac yogaḥ_yoga ṣaṣṭhena_ṣaṣṭha kīrtitaḥ_kīrtay
prādhānyena_prādhānya tat_tad api_api etam_etad ṣaṭkam_ṣaṭka karma--_karman nirūpakam_nirūpaka
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha darśinyām_darśin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
gītāsu_gītā ṣaṣṭhaḥ_ṣaṣṭha adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya ayam_idam saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad ittham_ittham ādyena_ādya ṣaṭkena_ṣaṭka saniṣṭhasya_saniṣṭha sādhanāni_sādhana jñāna--_jñāna garbhāni_garbha niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmāṇi_karman yoga--_yoga śiraskāni_śiraska abhidhāya_abhidhā madhyena_madhya pariniṣṭhita--_pariniṣṭhā ādeḥ_ādi bhagavat--_bhagavant śaraṇa--_śaraṇa ādīni_ādi sādhanāni_sādhana abhidhāsyan_abhidhā tat_tad sūtram_sūtra abhidhatte_abhidhā yoginām_yogin pañcamī--_pañcamī arthe_artha ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī iyam_idam tapasvibhyaḥ_tapasvin iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva upakramāt_upakrama na_na ca_ca nirdhāraṇe_nirdhāraṇa ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī iyam_idam astu_as vakṣyamāṇasya_vac yoginaḥ_yogin tapasvi--_tapasvin ādi--_ādi vilakṣaṇa--_vilakṣaṇa kriyatvena_kriyatva teṣu_tad anantar_anantar bhāvāt_bhāva yadi_yadi api_api tapasvi--_tapasvin ādīnām_ādi mithas_mithas nyūnādhikatā--_nyūnādhikatā bhāvaḥ_bhāva asti_as tathā_tathā api_api avara--_avara tvam_tva tasmāt_tasmāt samānam_samāna svarṇa--_svarṇa gireḥ_giri iva_iva tat_tad anyeṣām_anya uccāvacānām_uccāvaca girīṇām_giri iti_iti yaḥ_yad śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti nirūpakeṣu_nirūpaka śruti--_śruti ādi--_ādi vākyeṣu_vākya dṛḍha--_dṛḍha viśvāsaḥ_viśvāsa san_as mām_mad nīlotpala--_nīlotpala śyāmalam_śyāmala ājānu_ājānu pīvara--_pīvara bāhum_bāhu savitṛ--_savitṛ kara--_kara vikasita--_vikas aravinda--_aravinda īkṣaṇam_īkṣaṇa vidyut--_vidyut ujjvala--_ujjvala vāsasam_vāsas kirīṭa--_kirīṭa kuṇḍala--_kuṇḍala kaṭaka--_kaṭaka keyūra--_keyūra hāra--_hāra kaustubha--_kaustubha nūpuraiḥ_nūpura vanamālayā_vanamālā ca_ca vibhrājamānam_vibhrāj sva--_sva prabhayā_prabhā diśaḥ_diś vitamisrāḥ_vitamisra kurvāṇam_kṛ nitya--_nitya siddha--_siddha nṛsiṃha--_nṛsiṃha raghu--_raghu varya--_varya ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa sarveśvaram_sarveśvara svayam_svayam bhagavantam_bhagavant manuṣya--_manuṣya saṃniveśi--_saṃniveśin vibhu--_vibhu vijñānanda--_vijñānanda mayam_maya yaśodā--_yaśodā stanandhayam_stanaṃdhaya kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa ādi--_ādi śabdaiḥ_śabda abhidhīyamānam_abhidhā sārvajña--_sārvajña sarva--_sarva aiśvarya--_aiśvarya satya--_satya saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa āśrita--_āśri vātsalya--_vātsalya ādibhiḥ_ādi saundarya--_saundarya mādhurya--_mādhurya lāvaṇya--_lāvaṇya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi sevate_sev mad--_mad gatena_gam mad--_mad eka--_eka āsaktena_āsañj antarātmanā_antarātman manasā_manas viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ tila--_tila mātram_mātra api_api mad--_mad viyoga--_viyoga asahaḥ_asaha san_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta sarvebhyaḥ_sarva tapasvi--_tapasvin ādibhyaḥ_ādi yogibhyaḥ_yogin mad--_mad eka--_eka bhaktaḥ_bhakta yuktatamaḥ_yuktatama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

atra_atra vyācaṣṭe_vyācakṣ nanu_nanu yoginaḥ_yogin sakāśāt_sakāśa na_na kaḥ_ka api_api adhikaḥ_adhika asti_as iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah yoginām_yogin iti_iti yoga--_yoga āroha--_āroha tāratamyāt_tāratamya karma--_karman yoginaḥ_yogin bahavaḥ_bahu tebhyaḥ_tad sarvebhyaḥ_sarva api_api iti_iti dhyāna--_dhyāna ārūḍhaḥ_āruh yuktaḥ_yuj samādhi--_samādhi ārūḍhaḥ_āruh yuktataraḥ_yuktatara śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi bhaktimān_bhaktimat tu_tu yuktatamaḥ_yuktatama iti_iti bhakti--_bhakti śabdaḥ_śabda sevā--_sevā abhidhāyī_abhidhāyin bhaja_bhaj iti_iti eṣa_etad vai_vai dhātuḥ_dhātu sevāyām_sevā parikīrtitaḥ_parikīrtay sevā_sevā budhaiḥ_budha proktā_pravac bhakti--_bhakti śabdena_śabda bhūyasī_bhūyas iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti

tam_tad viditvā_vid atimṛtyum_atimṛtyu eti_i śruteḥ_śruti jñānam_jñāna vinā_vinā kevalayā_kevala bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva katham_katham mokṣaḥ_mokṣa brūṣe_brū atyeti_atī śruteḥ_śruti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra sita--_sita śarkarā--_śarkarā rasa--_rasa grahaṇe_grahaṇa yathā_yathā rasanā_rasanā eva_eva kāraṇam_kāraṇa na_na tu_tu cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus śrotra--_śrotra ādikam_ādika tathā_tathā eva_eva guṇa--_guṇa atītasya_atī brahmaṇe_brahman grahaṇam_grahaṇa sambhavet_sambhū na_na tu_tu deha--_deha ādi--_ādi atirikta--_atiric ātma--_ātman jñānena_jñāna sāttvikena_sāttvika bhaktyā_bhakti aham_mad ekayā_eka grāhyaḥ_grah iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant ukteḥ_ukti iti_iti bhaktyā_bhakti mām_mad abhijānāti_abhijñā yāvān_yāvat yaḥ_yad ca_ca asmi_as tattvataḥ_tattva iti_iti atra_atra sa_sa viśeṣam_viśeṣa pratipādayiṣyāmaḥ_pratipāday tayā_tad vinā_vinā tayoḥ_tad akiñcitkara--_akiñcitkara tvasya_tva bahuśas_bahuśas śravaṇāt_śravaṇa

kim_ka ca_ca asyām_idam śrutau_śruti viditvā_vid iti_iti anantaram_anantaram eva_eva kārasya_kāra a_a prayogāt_prayoga eva_eva yoga--_yoga vyavaccheda--_vyavaccheda abhāve_abhāva jñāpite_jñāpay sati_as tasmāt_tad eva_eva paramātmanaḥ_paramātman viditāt_vid kvacid_kvacid aviditāt_avidita api_api mokṣaḥ_mokṣa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha labhyate_labh tatas_tatas ca_ca bhakti--_bhakti utthena_uttha nirguṇena_nirguṇa paramātma--_paramātman jñānena_jñāna mokṣaḥ_mokṣa kvacid_kvacid tu_tu bhakti--_bhakti uttham_uttha tad--_tad jñānam_jñāna vinā_vinā api_api kevalena_kevala bhakti--_bhakti mātreṇa_mātra mokṣaḥ_mokṣa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha paryavasyati_paryavasā yathā_yathā matsyaṇḍikā--_matsyaṇḍikā piṇḍāt_piṇḍa rasanā--_rasanā doṣeṇa_doṣa alabdha--_alabdha svādāt_svāda api_api bhuktāt_bhuj tad--_tad eka--_eka nāśyaḥ_nāśay vyādhiḥ_vyādhi naśyati_naś eva_eva atra_atra na_na sandehaḥ_saṃdeha śrīmat--_śrīmat uddhavena_uddhava uktam_vac

saptame_saptama bhajanīyasya_bhaj svasya_sva aiśvaryam_aiśvarya prakīrtyate_prakīrtay
cāturvidhyam_cāturvidhya ca_ca bhajatām_bhaj tathā_tathā eva_eva abhajatām_abhajat api_api

div.p: ādyena_ādya ṣaṭkena_ṣaṭka upāsakasya_upāsaka jīvasya_jīva svarūpam_svarūpa tad--_tad prāpti--_prāpti sādhanam_sādhana ca_ca prādhānyena_prādhānya uktam_vac madhyena_madhya tu_tu upāsyasya_upās svasya_sva tat_tad tat_tad ca_ca tathā_tathā ucyate_vac tatra_tatra ṣaṣṭha--_ṣaṣṭha anta--_anta nirdiṣṭam_nirdiś tava_tvad bhajanīyam_bhaj rūpam_rūpa kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa katham_katham vā_vā bhajataḥ_bhaj antarātmā_antarātman tad--_tad gataḥ_gam syāt_as iti_iti etat_etad pārthena_pārtha āpṛṣṭam_āpracch api_api kṛpālu--_kṛpālu tvena_tva svayam_svayam eva_eva vivakṣuḥ_vivakṣu bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac vyākhyāta--_vyākhyā lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa sva--_sva upāsye_upās mayi_mad āsaktam_āsañj atimātra--_atimātra niratam_niram manaḥ_manas yasya_yad sa_tad tvam_tvad anyaḥ_anya vā_vā tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa mad--_mad āśrayaḥ_āśraya mad--_mad dāsya--_dāsya sakhī--_sakhī ādi--_ādi ekatamena_ekatama bhāvena_bhāva mām_mad śaraṇam_śaraṇa gataḥ_gam yogam_yoga mad--_mad asaṃśayam_asaṃśayam yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa eva_eva param_para tattvam_tattva atas_atas anyat_anya vā_vā iti_iti sandeha--_saṃdeha śūnyaḥ_śūnya mad--_mad pāramya--_pāramya niścayavān_niścayavat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha samagram_samagra sa_sa adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna sa_sa vibhūtim_vibhūti sa_sa parikaram_parikara ca_ca mām_mad sarveśvaram_sarveśvara yena_yad jñānena_jñāna jñāsyasi_jñā tat_tad mayā_mad ucyamānam_vac avahita--_avadhā manāḥ_manas śṛṇu_śru he_he pārtha_pārtha na_na ca_ca samagram_samagra iti_iti kārtsnyena_kārtsnya sa_tad jñānam_jñāna ādiśati_ādiś iti_iti vācyam_vac anantasya_ananta tasya_tad tathā_tathā jñāna--_jñāna asambhavāt_asaṃbhava smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca kārtsnyena_kārtsnya na_na ajaḥ_aja api_api abhidhātum_abhidhā īśaḥ_īś iti_iti
BhG 7.2

lg.l: jñānam_jñāna te_tvad aham_mad sa_sa vijñānam_vijñāna idam_idam vakṣyāmi_vac aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas
yat_yad jñātvā_jñā na_na iha_iha bhūyas_bhūyas anyat_anya jñātavyam_jñā avaśiṣyate_avaśiṣ

div.p: aṇu--_aṇu stauti_stu jñānam_jñāna śāstrīyam_śāstrīya vijñānam_vijñāna anubhavaḥ_anubhava tad--_tad sahitam_sahita idam_idam mad--_mad viṣayam_viṣaya aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas sākalyena_sākalya vakṣyāmi_vac yat_yad jñātvā_jñā iha_iha śreyaḥ--_śreyas mārge_mārga vartamānasya_vṛt punar_punar anyat_anya jñātavyam_jñā avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ na_na bhavati_bhū tena_tena eva_eva kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana jñāsyasi_jñā iti_iti ukte_vac parokṣam_parokṣa eva_eva tat_tad jñānam_jñāna syāt_as iti_iti śaṅkām_śaṅkā vyāvartayan_vyāvartay stauti_stu śrotuḥ_śrotṛ ābhimukhyāya_ābhimukhya jñānam_jñāna iti_iti idam_idam mad--_mad viṣayam_viṣaya svatas_svatas aparokṣa--_aparokṣa jñānam_jñāna asambhāvanā--_asambhāvanā ādi--_ādi pratibandhena_pratibandha phalam_phala ajanayat_janay parokṣam_parokṣa iti_iti upacaryate_upacar asambhāvanā--_asambhāvanā ādi--_ādi nirāse_nirāsa tu_tu vicāra--_vicāra paripāka--_paripāka ante_anta tena_tad eva_eva pramāṇena_pramāṇa janitam_janay jñānam_jñāna pratibandha--_pratibandha abhāvāt_abhāva phalam_phala janayat_janay aparokṣam_aparokṣa vicāra--_vicāra paripāka--_paripāka niṣpanna--_niṣpad tvāt_tva ca_ca tat_tad eva_eva vijñānam_vijñāna tena_tad vijñānena_vijñāna sahitam_sahita idam_idam aparokṣam_aparokṣa eva_eva jñānam_jñāna śāstra--_śāstra janyam_jan te_tvad tubhyam_tvad aham_mad param_para āptaḥ_āpta vakṣyāmi_vac aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas sādhana--_sādhana phala--_phala ādi--_ādi sahita--_sahita tvena_tva śrautīm_śrauta eka--_eka vijñānena_vijñāna sarva--_sarva vijñāna--_vijñāna pratijñām_pratijñā anusaran_anusṛ āha_ah yat_yad jñānam_jñāna nitya--_nitya caitanya--_caitanya rūpam_rūpa jñātvā_jñā vedānta--_vedānta janya--_jan manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti viṣayīkṛtya_viṣayīkṛ iha_iha vyavahāra--_vyavahāra bhūmau_bhūmi bhūyas_bhūyas punar_punar api_api anyat_anya kiṃcid_kaścit sarva--_sarva adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna sat--_sat mātra--_mātra jñānena_jñāna kalpitānām_kalpay sarveṣām_sarva bādhe_bādha sat--_sat mātra--_mātra pariśeṣāt_pariśeṣa tad--_tad mātra--_mātra jñānena_jñāna eva_eva tvam_tvad kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha bhaviṣyasi_bhū iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

bhavet_bhū tat_tad uttaram_uttara vijñānam_vijñāna mādhurya--_mādhurya anubhava--_anubhava mayam_maya bhavet_bhū tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya api_api tvam_tvad śṛṇu_śru iti_iti āha_ah jñānam_jñāna iti_iti anyat_anya jñātavyam_jñā na_na a_a viśiṣyate_viśiṣ iti_iti mad--_mad nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa brahma--_brahman jñāna--_jñāna vijñāne_vijñāna api_api etad--_etad antarbhūte_antarbhū eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva vakṣyamāṇam_vac jñānam_jñāna stauti_stu jñānam_jñāna iti_iti tat_tad vijñānam_vijñāna vakṣyāmi_vac tad--_tad śakti--_śakti dvaya--_dvaya vivikta--_vivic svarūpa--_svarūpa viṣayakam_viṣayaka jñānam_jñāna vijñānam_vijñāna tena_tad sahitam_sahita te_tvad tubhyam_tvad prapannāya_prapad aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas sāmagryeṇa_sāmagrya upadekṣyāmi_upadiś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad svarūpam_svarūpa sarva--_sarva kāraṇam_kāraṇa yat_yad ca_ca dhyeyam_dhyā tat_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya viṣayakam_viṣayaka jñānam_jñāna atra_atra vaktum_vac pratijñātam_pratijñā yat_yad jñānam_jñāna jñātvā_jñā iha_iha śreyaḥ--_śreyas vartmani_vartman niviṣṭasya_niviś jijñāsoḥ_jijñāsu tava_tvad anyat_anya jñātavyam_jñā na_na avaśiṣyate_avaśiṣ sarvasya_sarva tad--_tad antarbhāvāt_antarbhāva
BhG 7.3

lg.l: manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya sahasreṣu_sahasra kaḥ_ka cit_cit yatati_yat siddhaye_siddhi
yatatām_yat api_api siddhānām_sidh kaḥ_ka cit_cit mām_mad vetti_vid tattvataḥ_tattva

div.p: āha_ah asaṅkhyātānām_asaṃkhyāta jīvānām_jīva madhye_madhya manuṣya--_manuṣya vyatiriktānām_vyatiric śreyasi_śreyas pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti eva_eva na_na asti_as manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya tu_tu sahasreṣu_sahasra madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit eva_eva puṇya--_puṇya vaśāt_vaśa siddhaye_siddhi ātma--_ātman jñānāya_jñāna prayatate_prayat prayatnam_prayatna kurvatām_kṛ api_api sahasreṣu_sahasra kaścid_kaścit eva_eva prakṛṣṭa--_prakṛṣṭa puṇya--_puṇya vaśāt_vaśa ātmānam_ātman vetti_vid tādṛśānām_tādṛśa ca_ca ātma--_ātman jñānām_jña sahasreṣu_sahasra kaścid_kaścit eva_eva mām_mad paramātmānam_paramātman mad--_mad prasādena_prasāda tattvataḥ_tattva vetti_vid tat_tad evam_evam ati_ati durlabham_durlabha api_api yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tubhyam_tvad aham_mad vakṣyāmi_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ati_ati durlabham_durlabha ca_ca etat_etad mad--_mad anugraham_anugraha antareṇa_antareṇa mahā--_mahat phalam_phala jñānam_jñāna yatas_yatas manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya iti_iti manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya śāstrīya--_śāstrīya jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman yogyānām_yogya sahasreṣu_sahasra madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit ekaḥ_eka aneka--_aneka janma--_janman kṛta--_kṛ sukṛta--_sukṛta samāsādita--_samāsāday nitya--_nitya anitya--_anitya vastu--_vastu vivekaḥ_viveka san_as yatati_yat yatate_yat siddhaye_siddhi sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi dvārā_dvār jñāna--_jñāna yatatām_yat yatamānānām_yat jñānāya_jñāna siddhānām_siddha prāc--_prāñc arjita--_arjay su_su kṛtānām_kṛ sādhakānām_sādhaka api_api madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit ekaḥ_eka śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana paripāka--_paripāka ante_anta mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara vetti_vid sākṣātkaroti_sākṣātkṛ tattvataḥ_tattva pratyak--_pratyañc ādi--_ādi guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś mahā--_mahat vākyebhyaḥ_vākya anekeṣu_aneka manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna sādhana--_sādhana anuṣṭhāyī_anuṣṭhāyin parama--_parama durlabhaḥ_durlabha sādhana--_sādhana anuṣṭhāyiṣu_anuṣṭhāyin api_api madhye_madhya phala--_phala bhāgī_bhāgin parama--_parama durlabhaḥ_durlabha iti_iti kim_ka vaktavyam_vac asya_idam jñānasya_jñāna māhātmyam_māhātmya iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
