āha_ah asaṅkhyātānām_asaṃkhyāta jīvānām_jīva madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit eve_eva manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya bhavati_bhū manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya sahasreṣu_sahasra madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit eva_eva śreyase_śreyas yatate_yat tādṛśānām_tādṛśa api_api manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya sahasreṣu_sahasra kaścid_kaścit eva_eva mām_mad śyāma--_śyāma sundara--_sundara ākāram_ākāra tattvataḥ_tattva vetti_vid sākṣāt_sākṣāt anubhavati_anubhū iti_iti nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa brahma--_brahman anubhava--_anubhava ānandāt_ānanda sahasra--_sahasra guṇa--_guṇa adhikam_adhika sa_sa viśeṣa--_viśeṣa brahma--_brahman anubhava--_anubhava

baladevaḥ_baladeva sva--_sva jñānasya_jñāna daurlabhyam_daurlabhya āha_ah manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya uccāvaca--_uccāvaca dheātma--_dheātman asaṅkhyātāḥ_asaṃkhyāta jīvāḥ_jīva teṣu_tad katicid_katicid eva_eva manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya teṣām_tad śāstra--_śāstra adhikāra--_adhikāra yogyānām_yogya sahasreṣu_sahasra madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit eva_eva sat--_sat prasaṅga--_prasaṅga vaśāt_vaśa siddhaye_siddhi sva--_sva parātma--_parātman avalokanāya_avalokana yatate_yat na_na tu_tu sarvaḥ_sarva tādṛśānām_tādṛśa yatatām_yat yatamānānām_yat siddhānām_siddha labdha--_labh sva--_sva para--_para ātma--_ātman avalokanānām_avalokana sahasreṣu_sahasra madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit eva_eva ekaḥ_eka mām_mad kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa tattvataḥ_tattva vetti_vid ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha śāstrīya--_śāstrīya artha--_artha anuṣṭhāyinaḥ_anuṣṭhāyin bahavaḥ_bahu manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya paramāṇu--_paramāṇu caitanyam_caitanya sva--_sva ātmānam_ātman prādeśa--_prādeśa mātram_mātra mad--_mad sva--_sva aṃśam_aṃśa paramātmānam_paramātman ca_ca anubhūya_anubhū vimucyante_vimuc mām_mad tu_tu yaśodā--_yaśodā stanandhayam_stanaṃdhaya kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa adhunā_adhunā tvad--_tvad sārathim_sārathi kaścid_kaścit eva_eva tādṛśa--_tādṛśa sat--_sat prasaṅga--_prasaṅga avāpta--_avāp mad--_mad bhaktiḥ_bhakti tattvataḥ_tattva yāthātmyena_yāthātmya vetti_vid a_a vicintya_vicintay ananta--_ananta śaktika--_śaktika tvena_tva nikhila--_nikhila kāraṇatvena_kāraṇatva sārvajñya--_sārvajñya sārvaiśvarya--_sārvaiśvarya sva--_sva bhakta--_bhakta vātsalya--_vātsalya ādi--_ādi asaṅkhyeya--_asaṃkhyeya kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa ratna--_ratna ākara--_ākara tvena_tva pūrṇa--_pūrṇa brahmatvena_brahmatva ca_ca anubhavati_anubhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha vakṣyati_vac ca_ca sa_tad mahātmā_mahātman su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha Gītā_Gītā 7.19_7.19 veda_vid
BhG 7.4

lg.l: bhūmiḥ_bhūmi āpaḥ_ap analaḥ_anala vāyuḥ_vāyu kham_kha manaḥ_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi eva_eva ca_ca
ahaṃkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra iti_iti iyam_idam me_mad bhinnā_bhid prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā

div.p: āha_ah bhūmi--_bhūmi ādi--_ādi śabdaiḥ_śabda pañca--_pañcan gandha--_gandha ādi--_ādi tad--_tad mātrāṇi_mātra ucyante_vac manaḥ--_manas śabdena_śabda tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtaḥ_bhū ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra buddhi--_buddhi śabdena_śabda tad--_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa mahat--_mahant tattvam_tattva ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra śabdena_śabda tad--_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa avidyā_avidyā iti_iti evam_evam aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā bhinnā_bhid yat_yat vā_vā bhūmi--_bhūmi ādi--_ādi śabdaiḥ_śabda pañca--_pañcan mahā--_mahat bhūtāni_bhūta sūkṣmaiḥ_sūkṣma sahikīkṛtya_sahikīkṛ gṛhyante_grah ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra śabdena_śabda eva_eva ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra tena_tad eva_eva tad--_tad kāryāṇi_kārya indriyāṇi_indriya api_api gṛhyante_grah buddhiḥ_buddhi iti_iti mahat--_mahant tattvam_tattva manaḥ--_manas śabdena_śabda tu_tu manasā_manas eva_eva unneyam_unnī avyakta--_avyakta rūpam_rūpa pradhānam_pradhāna iti_iti anena_idam prakāreṇa_prakāra me_mad pakṛtiḥ_pakṛti māyā--_māyā ākhyā_ākhyā śaktiḥ_śakti aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā bhinnā_bhid vibhāgam_vibhāga prāptā_prāp caturviṃśati--_caturviṃśati bheda--_bheda bhinnā_bhid api_api aṣṭa--_aṣṭan svā_sva eva_eva antarbhāva--_antarbhāva vivakṣayā_vivakṣā aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā bhinnā_bhid iti_iti uktam_vac tathā_tathā ca_ca kṣetra--_kṣetra adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya imām_idam eva_eva prakṛtim_prakṛti caturviṃśati--_caturviṃśati tattva--_tattva ātmanā_ātman prapañcayiṣyati_prapañcay
mahābhūtāni_mahābhūta ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra buddhiḥ_buddhi avyaktam_avyakta eva_eva ca_ca indriyāṇi_indriya daśa_daśan ekam_eka ca_ca pañca_pañcan ca_ca indriya--_indriya gocarāḥ_gocara iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam prarocanena_prarocana śrotāram_śrotṛ abhimukhīkṛtya_abhimukhīkṛ ātmanaḥ_ātman sarva--_sarva ātmaka--_ātmaka tvena_tva paripūrṇa--_paripṛ tvam_tva avatārayan_avatāray ādau_ādi aparām_apara prakṛtim_prakṛti upanyasyati_upanyas bhūmiḥ_bhūmi iti_iti sāṅkhyaiḥ_sāṃkhya hi_hi pañca_pañcan tanmātrāṇi_tanmātra ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra mahān_mahant avyaktam_avyakta iti_iti aṣṭau_aṣṭan prakṛtayaḥ_prakṛti pañca_pañcan mahābhūtāni_mahābhūta pañca_pañcan karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya pañca_pañcan jñānendriyāṇi_jñānendriya ubhaya--_ubhaya sādhāraṇam_sādhāraṇa manaḥ_manas ca_ca iti_iti ṣoḍaśa_ṣoḍaśan etāni_etad eva_eva caturviṃśatiḥ_caturviṃśati tattvāni_tattva tatra_tatra bhūmiḥ_bhūmi āpaḥ_ap analaḥ_anala vāyuḥ_vāyu kham_kha iti_iti pṛthvī--_pṛthvī ap--_ap tejaḥ--_tejas vāyu--_vāyu ākāśa--_ākāśa ākhya--_ākhya pañca--_pañcan mahābhūta--_mahābhūta sūkṣma--_sūkṣma avasthā--_avasthā rūpāṇi_rūpa gandha--_gandha rasa--_rasa rūpa--_rūpa sparśa--_sparśa śabda--_śabda ātmakāni_ātmaka pañca--_pañcan tanmātrāṇi_tanmātra lakṣyante_lakṣay buddhi--_buddhi ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra śabdau_śabda tu_tu svārthau_svārtha eva_eva manaḥ--_manas śabdena_śabda ca_ca pariśiṣṭam_pariśiṣ avyaktam_avyakta lakṣyante_lakṣay prakṛti--_prakṛti śabda--_śabda sāmānādhikaraṇyena_sāmānādhikaraṇya sva--_sva artha--_artha hāneḥ_hāni āvaśyaka--_āvaśyaka tvāt_tva

manaḥ--_manas śabdena_śabda vā_vā sva--_sva kāraṇam_kāraṇa ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra lakṣyate_lakṣay pañca--_pañcan tanmātra--_tanmātra saṃnikarṣāt_saṃnikarṣa buddhi--_buddhi śabdaḥ_śabda tu_tu ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra kāraṇe_kāraṇa mahat--_mahant tattve_tattva mukhya--_mukhya vṛttiḥ_vṛtti eva_eva ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra śabdena_śabda ca_ca sarva--_sarva vāsanā--_vāsanā vāsitam_vāsay avidyā--_avidyā ātmakam_ātmaka avyaktam_avyakta lakṣyante_lakṣay pravartaka--_pravartaka tva--_tva ādi--_ādi asādhāraṇa--_asādhāraṇa dharma--_dharma yogāt_yoga ca_ca iti_iti ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra iyam_idam aparokṣā_aparokṣa sākṣi--_sākṣin bhāsya--_bhās tvāt_tva prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti māyā--_māyā ākhyā_ākhyā pārameśvarī_pārameśvara śaktiḥ_śakti anirvacanīya--_anirvacanīya svabhāvā_svabhāva triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmikā_ātmaka aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā bhinnaḥ_bhid aṣṭabhiḥ_aṣṭan prakāraiḥ_prakāra bhedam_bheda āgatā_āgam sarvaḥ_sarva api_api jaḍa--_jaḍa vargaḥ_varga atra_atra eva_eva antarbhavati_antarbhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sva--_sva siddhānte_siddhānta ca_ca īkṣaṇa--_īkṣaṇa saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ātmakau_ātmaka māyā--_māyā pariṇāmau_pariṇāma eva_eva buddhi--_buddhi ahaṅkārau_ahaṃkāra pañca_pañcan tanmātrāṇi_tanmātra ca_ca a_a pañcīkṛta--_pañcīkṛ pañca--_pañcan mahābhūtāni_mahābhūta iti_iti asakṛt_asakṛt avocām_vac

atas_atas svīya--_svīya aiśvarya--_aiśvarya jñānam_jñāna nirūpayan_nirūpay parāpara--_parāpara bhedena_bheda svīya--_svīya prakṛti--_prakṛti dvayam_dvaya āha_ah bhūmiḥ_bhūmi iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi bhūmi--_bhūmi ādi--_ādi śabdaiḥ_śabda pañca--_pañcan mahābhūtāni_mahābhūta sūkṣma--_sūkṣma bhūtaiḥ_bhūta gandha--_gandha ādibhiḥ_ādi saha_saha ekīkṛtya_ekīkṛ saṅgṛhyante_saṃgrah ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra śabdena_śabda tad--_tad kārya--_kārya bhūtāni_bhūta indriyāṇi_indriya tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūta--_bhū mahat--_mahant tattvam_tattva api_api gṛhyate_grah buddhi--_buddhi manasoḥ_manas pṛthak_pṛthak uktiḥ_ukti tattveṣu_tattva tayoḥ_tad prādhānyāt_prādhānya

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam śrotāram_śrotṛ pārtham_pārtha abhimukhīkṛtya_abhimukhīkṛ svasya_sva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa svarūpam_svarūpa cit--_cit acit--_acit śaktimat_śaktimat vaktum_vac te_tad śaktī_śakti prāha_prāh bhūmiḥ_bhūmi iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi caturviṃśatidhā_caturviṃśatidhā prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti bhūmi--_bhūmi ādi--_ādi ātmanā_ātman aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā bhinnā_bhid me_mad madīyā_madīya bodhyā_budh tad--_tad mātra--_mātra ādīnām_ādi bhūmi--_bhūmi ādiṣu_ādi antarbhāvāt_antarbhāva iha_iha api_api caturviṃśatidhā_caturviṃśatidhā eva_eva avaseyā_avasā tatra_tatra bhūmi--_bhūmi ādiṣu_ādi pañcasu_pañcan bhūteṣu_bhūta tad--_tad kāraṇānām_kāraṇa gandhānām_gandha pañcānām_pañcan tanmātrāṇām_tanmātra antar_antar bhāvaḥ_bhāva ahaṅkāre_ahaṃkāra tad--_tad kāryāṇām_kārya ekādaśānām_ekādaśa indriyāṇām_indriya buddhi--_buddhi śabdaḥ_śabda mahat--_mahant tattvam_tattva āha_ah manaḥ--_manas śabdaḥ_śabda tu_tu manaḥ--_manas gamyam_gam avyakta--_avyakta rūpam_rūpa pradhānam_pradhāna iti_iti śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah caturviṃśati--_caturviṃśati saṅkhyānām_saṃkhyā avyaktam_avyakta vyaktam_vyakta ucyate_vac iti_iti svayam_svayam ca_ca kṣetra--_kṣetra adhyāye_adhyāya vakṣyati_vac mahābhūtāni_mahābhūta ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra iti_iti ādinā_ādi
BhG 7.5

lg.l: aparā_apara iyam_idam itas_itas tu_tu anyām_anya prakṛtim_prakṛti viddhi_vid me_mad parām_para
jīva--_jīva bhūtām_bhū mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu yayā_yad idam_idam dhāryate_dhāray jagat_jagant

div.p: āha_ah aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā yā_yad prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti uktā_vac iyam_idam aparā_apara nikṛṣṭā_nikṛṣṭa jaḍa--_jaḍa tvāt_tva parārtha--_parārtha tvāt_tva ca_ca itas_itas sakāśāt_sakāśāt parām_para prakṛṣṭām_prakṛṣṭa anyām_anya jīva--_jīva bhūtām_bhū jīva--_jīva svarūpām_svarūpa me_mad prakṛtim_prakṛti viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā paratve_paratva hetuḥ_hetu yayā_yad cetanayā_cetanā kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña rūpayā_rūpa sva--_sva karma--_karman dvāreṇa_dvāra idam_idam jagat_jagant dhāryate_dhāray

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam kṣetra--_kṣetra lakṣaṇāyāḥ_lakṣaṇa prakṛteḥ_prakṛti aparatvam_aparatva vadan_vad kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa parām_para prakṛtim_prakṛti āha_ah aparā_apara iyam_idam iti_iti yā_yad prāk_prāk aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā uktā_vac prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti sarva--_sarva acetana--_acetana varga--_varga rūpā_rūpa sā_tad iyam_idam aparā_apara nikṛṣṭā_nikṛṣṭa jaḍa--_jaḍa tvāt_tva parārtha--_parārtha tvāt_tva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bandha--_bandha rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva ca_ca itas_itas tu_tu acetana--_acetana varga--_varga rūpāyāḥ_rūpa kṣetra--_kṣetra lakṣaṇāyāḥ_lakṣaṇa prakṛteḥ_prakṛti anyām_anya vilakṣaṇām_vilakṣaṇa tu_tu śabdāt_śabda yathā_yathā kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid api_api abheda--_abheda ayogyām_ayogya jīva--_jīva bhūtām_bhū cetanā--_cetanā ātmikām_ātmaka kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa me_mad mama_mad ātma--_ātman bhūtām_bhū he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu yayā_yad kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña lakṣaṇayā_lakṣaṇa jīva--_jīva bhūtayā_bhū antar_antar anupraviṣṭayā_anupraviś prakṛtyā_prakṛti idam_idam jagat_jagant acetana--_acetana jātam_jan dhāryate_dhāray svatas_svatas viśīrya_viśṛ uttamyate_uttam anena_idam jīvena_jīva ātmanā_ātman anupraviśa_anupraviś nāma--_nāman rūpe_rūpa na_na hi_hi jīva--_jīva rahitam_rahita dhārayitum_dhāray śakyam_śakya iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

itas_itas anyām_anya prakṛtim_prakṛti taṭa--_taṭa sthām_stha śaktim_śakti jīva--_jīva bhūtām_bhū parām_para utkṛṣṭām_utkṛṣṭa viddhi_vid caitanya--_caitanya tvāt_tva asyāḥ_idam utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tve_tva hetuḥ_hetu yayā_yad cetanayā_cetanā idam_idam jagat_jagant acetanam_acetana sva--_sva bhoga--_bhoga artham_artha gṛhyate_grah

baladevaḥ_baladeva eṣā_etad prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti aparā_apara nikṛṣṭā_nikṛṣṭa jaḍa--_jaḍa tvāt_tva bhogya--_bhuj tvāt_tva cetaḥ_cetas jaḍāyāḥ_jaḍa prakṛteḥ_prakṛti anyām_anya parām_para cetana--_cetana tvāt_tva bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvāt_tva ca_ca utkṛṣṭām_utkṛṣṭa jīva--_jīva bhūtām_bhū me_mad madīyām_madīya prakṛtim_prakṛti viddhi_vid he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu pārtha_pārtha paratve_paratva hetuḥ_hetu yayā_yad iti_iti yayā_yad cetanayā_cetanā idam_idam jagat_jagant sva--_sva karma--_karman dvārā_dvār dhāryate_dhāray śayyā--_śayyā āsana--_āsana ādi--_ādi vat_vat sva--_sva bhogāya_bhoga gṛhyate_grah śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca hareḥ_hari eva_eva iyam_idam śaktiḥ_śakti tvayi_tvad iti_iti āha_ah pradhāna--_pradhāna kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña patiḥ_pati guṇa--_guṇa īśaḥ_īśa iti_iti
BhG 7.6

lg.l: etad--_etad yonīni_yoni bhūtāni_bhūta sarvāṇi_sarva iti_iti upadhāraya_upadhāray
aham_mad kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna jagataḥ_jagant prabhavaḥ_prabhava pralayaḥ_pralaya tathā_tathā

div.p: darśayan_darśay āha_ah ete_etad kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña rūpe_rūpa prakṛtī_prakṛti yonī_yoni kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūte_bhū yeṣām_yad tāni_tad etad--_etad yonīni_yoni sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ātmakāni_ātmaka sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti upadhāraya_upadhāray budhyasva_budh tatra_tatra jaḍā_jaḍa prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti deha--_deha rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇamate_pariṇam cetanā_cetanā tu_tu mad--_mad aṃśa--_aṃśa bhūtā_bhū bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvena_tva deheṣu_deha praviśya_praviś sva--_sva karmaṇā_karman tāni_tad dhārayati_dhāray te_tad ca_ca madīye_madīya prakṛtī_prakṛti mattaḥ_mad sambhūte_sambhū atas_atas aham_mad eva_eva kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna sa_sa prakṛtikasya_prakṛtika jagataḥ_jagant prabhavaḥ_prabhava prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa bhavati_bhū asmāt_idam iti_iti prabhavaḥ_prabhava param_para kāraṇam_kāraṇa aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā pralīyate_pralī anena_idam iti_iti pralayaḥ_pralaya saṃhartā_saṃhartṛ api_api aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

pramāṇayan_pramāṇay darśayati_darśay ete_etad aparatvena_aparatva paratvena_paratva ca_ca prāc--_prāñc ukte_vac kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa prakṛtī_prakṛti yoniḥ_yoni yeṣām_yad tāni_tad etad--_etad yonīni_yoni bhūtāni_bhūta bhavana--_bhavana dharmakāṇi_dharmaka sarvāṇi_sarva cetana--_cetana acetana--_acetana ātmakāni_ātmaka janimanti_janimat nikhilāni_nikhila iti_iti evam_evam kāryāṇām_kārya cit--_cit acit--_acit granthi--_granthi rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva kāraṇam_kāraṇa api_api cit--_cit acit--_acit granthi--_granthi rūpam_rūpa anuminu_anumi iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa mama_mad upādhi--_upādhi bhūte_bhū yatas_yatas prakṛtī_prakṛti bhavataḥ_bhū tatas_tatas tad--_tad dvārā_dvāra aham_mad sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara ananta--_ananta śakti--_śakti māyā--_māyā upādhiḥ_upādhi kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna carācara--_carācara ātmakasya_ātmaka jagataḥ_jagant sarvasya_sarva pralayaḥ_pralaya tathā_tathā vināśa--_vināśa kāraṇam_kāraṇa svāpnikasya_svāpnika iva_iva prapañcasya_prapañca māyikasya_māyika māyā--_māyā śaraya--_śaraya tva--_tva viṣaya--_viṣaya tvābhyām_tva māyāvī_māyāvin aham_mad eva_eva upādānam_upādāna draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ ca_ca iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah ete_etad māyā--_māyā śakti--_śakti jīva--_jīva śaktī_śakti kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña rūpe_rūpa yonī_yoni kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūte_bhū yeṣām_yad tāni_tad sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ātmakāni_ātmaka bhūtāni_bhūta jānīhi_jñā atas_atas kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna sarvasya_sarva asya_idam jagataḥ_jagant prabhavaḥ_prabhava mad--_mad śakti--_śakti dvaya--_dvaya prabhūta--_prabhū tvāt_tva aham_mad eva_eva sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ pralayaḥ_pralaya tad--_tad śaktimati_śaktimat mayi_mad eva_eva pralīna--_pralī bhāvi--_bhāvin tvāt_tva aham_mad eva_eva asya_idam saṃhartā_saṃhartṛ

āha_ah sarvāṇi_sarva sthira--_sthira carāṇi_cara bhūtāni_bhūta etad--_etad yonīni_yoni upadhāraya_upadhāray viddhi_vid ete_etad apara--_apara pare_para kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña śabda--_śabda vācye_vac mad--_mad śaktī_śakti yonī_yoni kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūte_bhū yeṣām_yad tāni_tad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha te_tad ca_ca prakṛtī_prakṛti madīye_madīya mattaḥ_mad eva_eva sambhūte_sambhū atas_atas kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna sa_sa prakṛtikasya_prakṛtika jagataḥ_jagant aham_mad eva_eva prabhavaḥ_prabhava utpatti--_utpatti hetuḥ_hetu prabhavati_prabhū asmāt_idam iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti tasya_tad pralaya--_pralaya saṃhartā_saṃhartṛ api_api aham_mad eva_eva pralīyate_pralī anena_idam iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti
BhG 7.7

lg.l: mattaḥ_mad parataram_paratara na_na anyat_anya kiñcid_kaścit asti_as dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya
mayi_mad sarvam_sarva idam_idam protam_prave sūtre_sūtra maṇi--_maṇi gaṇāḥ_gaṇa iva_iva

div.p: mattaḥ_mad sakāśāt_sakāśāt parataram_paratara śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha jagataḥ_jagant sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi saṃhārayoḥ_saṃhāra svatantram_svatantra kāraṇam_kāraṇa kiñcid_kaścit api_api na_na asti_as sthiti--_sthiti hetuḥ_hetu api_api aham_mad evā_eva iti_iti āha_ah mayi_mad iti_iti mayi_mad sarvam_sarva idam_idam jagat_jagant protam_prave grathitam_granth āśritam_āśri iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta spaṣṭaḥ_spaṣṭa

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana -_yasmāt aham_mad eva_eva māyayā_māyā sarvasya_sarva jagataḥ_jagant janma--_janman sthiti--_sthiti bhaṅga--_bhaṅga hetuḥ_hetu tasmāt_tasmāt paramārthataḥ_paramārtha mattaḥ_mad iti_iti nikhila--_nikhila dṛśya--_dṛś ākāra--_ākāra pariṇata--_pariṇam māyā--_māyā adhiṣṭhānāt_adhiṣṭhāna sarva--_sarva bhāsakāt_bhāsaka mattaḥ_mad sat--_as rūpeṇa_rūpa sphuraṇa--_sphuraṇa rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca sarva--_sarva anusyūtān_anusīv sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda caitanya--_caitanya ghanāt_ghana paramārtha--_paramārtha satyāt_satya svapna--_svapna śukti--_śukti śakala--_śakala avacchinna--_avacchid caitanya--_caitanya ādi--_ādi vat_vat tad--_tad ajñāna--_ajñāna kalpitam_kalpay rajatam_rajata parataram_paratara paramārtha--_paramārtha satyam_satya anyat_anya kiṃcid_kaścit api_api nā_na asti_as he_he dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya mayi_mad kalpitam_kalpay paramārthataḥ_paramārtha na_na mattaḥ_mad bhidyate_bhid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad ananyatvam_ananyatva ārambhaṇa--_ārambhaṇa śabda--_śabda ādibhyaḥ_ādi iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya vyavahāra--_vyavahāra dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi tu_tu mayi_mad sat--_as rūpe_rūpa sphuraṇa--_sphuraṇa rūpe_rūpa ca_ca sarvam_sarva idam_idam jaḍa--_jaḍa jātam_jan protam_prave grathitam_granth mad--_mad sattayā_sattā sat_as iva_iva mad--_mad sphuraṇena_sphuraṇa ca_ca sphurat_sphur iva_iva vyavahārāya_vyavahāra māyā--_māyā mayāya_maya kalpate_kﾱp sarvasya_sarva caitanya--_caitanya grathita--_granth tva--_tva mātre_mātra dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta sūtre_sūtra maṇi--_maṇi gaṇāḥ_gaṇa iva_iva iti_iti athavā_athavā sūtre_sūtra taijasa--_taijasa ātmani_ātman hiraṇyagarbhe_hiraṇyagarbha svapna--_svapna dṛśi_dṛś svapna--_svapna protāḥ_prave maṇi--_maṇi gaṇāḥ_gaṇa iva_iva iti_iti sarva--_sarva aṃśe_aṃśa dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta vyākhyeyaḥ_vyākhyā

anye_anya tu_tu param_param atas_atas setūn_setu māna--_māna sambandha--_sambandha bheda--_bheda vyapadeśebhyaḥ_vyapadeśa iti_iti sūtra--_sūtra uktasya_vac pūrva--_pūrva pakṣasya_pakṣa uttara--_uttara tvena_tva ślokam_śloka imam_idam vyācakṣate_vyācakṣ mattaḥ_mad sarvajñāt_sarvajña sarva--_sarva śakteḥ_śakti sarva--_sarva kāraṇāt_kāraṇa parataram_paratara praśasyataram_praśasyatara sarvasya_sarva jagataḥ_jagant sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi saṃhārayoḥ_saṃhāra svatantram_svatantra kāraṇam_kāraṇa anyat_anya na_na asti_as he_he dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt mayi_mad sarva--_sarva kāraṇe_kāraṇa grathitam_granth na_na anyat_anya na_na sūtre_sūtra maṇi--_maṇi gaṇāḥ_gaṇa iva_iva iti_iti dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta tu_tu grathita--_granth tva--_tva mātre_mātra na_na tu_tu kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tve_tva kanake_kanaka kuṇḍala--_kuṇḍala ādi--_ādi vat_vat iti_iti tu_tu yogyaḥ_yogya dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt aham_mad eva_eva sarvam_sarva iti_iti āha_ah mattaḥ_mad parataram_paratara anyat_anya kiñcid_kaścit na_na asti_as kārya--_kārya kāraṇayoḥ_kāraṇa aikyāt_aikya śakti--_śakti śaktimatoḥ_śaktimat aikyāt_aikya ca_ca tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti ekam_eka eva_eva advitīyam_advitīya brahma_brahman na_na iha_iha nānā_nānā asti_as kiñcana_kaścana iti_iti evam_evam svasya_sva sarva--_sarva ātmaka--_ātmaka tvam_tva uktvā_vac sarva--_sarva antaryāmi--_antaryāmin tvam_tva ca_ca āha_ah mayi_mad iti_iti sarvam_sarva idam_idam cit--_cit jaḍa--_jaḍa ātmakam_ātmaka jagat_jagant mad--_mad kāryatvāt_kāryatva mad--_mad ātmakam_ātmaka api_api punar_punar mayi_mad antaryāmiṇi_antaryāmin protam_prota grathitam_granth yathā_yathā sūtre_sūtra maṇi--_maṇi gaṇāḥ_gaṇa protāḥ_prota madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda tu_tu sūtre_sūtra maṇi--_maṇi gaṇāḥ_gaṇa iva_iva iti_iti dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta tu_tu grathita--_granth tva--_tva mātre_mātra na_na tu_tu kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tve_tva kanake_kanaka kuṇḍala--_kuṇḍala ādi--_ādi vat_vat iti_iti tu_tu yogyaḥ_yogya dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta iti_iti āhuḥ_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu sthira--_sthira carayoḥ_cara apara--_apara parayoḥ_para prakṛtyoḥ_prakṛti api_api tvam_tvad eva_eva tad--_tad śaktimān_śaktimat yoniḥ_yoni iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti nikhila--_nikhila jagat--_jagant bīja--_bīja tvam_tva tava_tvad pratītam_pratī na_na tu_tu sarva--_sarva paratvam_paratva tat_tad ca_ca tad--_tad bījāt_bīja tvattaḥ_tvad anyasya_anya eva_eva

tatas_tatas yat_yad uttarataram_uttaratara tat_tad arūpam_arūpa anāmayam_anāmaya ye_yad etat_etad viduḥ_vid amṛtāḥ_amṛta te_tad bhavanti_bhū atha_atha itare_itara
duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva api_api yanti_i iti_iti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah mattaḥ_mad iti_iti

mattaḥ_mad tvad--_tvad sakhāt_sakha kṛṣṇāt_kṛṣṇa parataraḥ_paratara śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha anyat_anya kiñcid_kaścit api_api na_na asti_as aham_mad eva_eva sarva--_sarva śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha vastu_vastu iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nanu_nanu tatas_tatas yat_yad uttarataram_uttaratara iti_iti ādau_ādi anyathā_anyathā śrutim_śruti iti_iti ced_ced mandam_manda etat_etad

lg.l: veda_vid aham_mad etam_etad puruṣam_puruṣa mahāntam_mahat
āditya--_āditya varṇam_varṇa tamasaḥ_tamas parastāt_parastāt
tam_tad eva_eva vidvān_vid amṛtaḥ_amṛta iha_iha bhavati_bhū
na_na anyaḥ_anya panthāḥ_pathin vidyate_vid a_a nayanāya_nayana

div.p: śvetāśvataraiḥ_śvetāśvatara sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant bījasya_bīja mahā--_mahat puruṣasya_puruṣa viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu jñānam_jñāna amṛtasya_amṛta panthāḥ_pathin tatas_tatas na_na asti_as iti_iti upadiśya_upadiś tad--_tad upapādanāya_upapādana

yasmāt_yad param_para na_na aparam_apara asti_as kiñcid_kaścit yasmāt_yad na_na aṇīyaḥ_aṇīyas na_na jyāyaḥ_jyāyas asti_as kiñcid_kaścit iti_iti tasya_tad eva_eva parama--_parama tvam_tva tad--_tad itarasya_itara tad--_tad asambhavam_asaṃbhava ca_ca pratipādya_pratipāday tatas_tatas yat_yad uttarotaram_uttarotara iti_iti ādinā_ādi pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac eva_eva nigamitam_nigamay na_na tu_tu tatas_tatas anyat_anya śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha asti_as iti_iti uktam_vac tathā_tathā sati_as teṣām_tad mṛṣāvādi--_mṛṣāvādin tva--_tva āpatteḥ_āpatti āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra anya--_anya pratiṣedhāt_pratiṣedha mad--_mad anyasya_anya kasyacid_kaścit api_api śraiṣṭhya--_śraiṣṭhya abhāvāt_abhāva aham_mad eva_eva mad--_mad anya--_anya sarva--_sarva āśrayaḥ_āśraya iti_iti āha_ah mayi_mad iti_iti protam_prota grathitam_granth sphuṭam_sphuṭa anyat_anya etena_etad viśva--_viśva pālaka--_pālaka tvam_tva svasya_sva uktam_vac
BhG 7.8

lg.l: rasaḥ_rasa aham_mad apsu_ap kaunteya_kaunteya prabhā_prabhā asmi_as śaśi--_śaśin sūryayoḥ_sūrya
praṇavaḥ_praṇava sarva--_sarva vedeṣu_veda śabdaḥ_śabda khe_kha pauruṣam_pauruṣa nṛṣu_nṛ

div.p: apsu_ap rasaḥ_rasa aham_mad rasa--_rasa tad--_tad mātra--_mātra rūpayā_rūpa vibhūtyā_vibhūti tad--_tad āśrayatena_āśrayata apsu_ap sthitaḥ_sthā aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śaśi--_śaśin sūryayoḥ_sūrya prabhā_prabhā asmi_as candre_candra sūrye_sūrya ca_ca prakāśa--_prakāśa rūpayā_rūpa vibhūtyā_vibhūti tad--_tad āśraya--_āśraya tvena_tva sthitaḥ_sthā aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha uttarā_uttarā atra_atra api_api evam_evam draṣṭavyam_dṛś sarveṣu_sarva vedeṣu_veda vaikharī--_vaikharī rūpeṣu_rūpa tad--_tad mūla--_mūla bhūtaḥ_bhū praṇavaḥ_praṇava oṅkāraḥ_oṃkāra asmi_as khe_kha ākāśe_ākāśa śabda--_śabda tad--_tad mātra--_mātra rūpaḥ_rūpa asmi_as nṛṣu_nṛ puruṣeṣu_puruṣa pauruṣam_pauruṣa udyamam_udyama asmi_as udyame_udyama hi_hi puruṣāḥ_puruṣa tiṣṭhanti_sthā

āha_ah rasaḥ_rasa puṇyaḥ_puṇya madhuraḥ_madhura tad--_tad mātra--_mātra rūpaḥ_rūpa sarvāsām_sarva apām_ap sāraḥ_sāra kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtaḥ_bhū yaḥ_yad apsu_ap sarvāsu_sarva anugataḥ_anugam saḥ_tad aham_mad he_he kaunteya_kaunteya tad--_tad rūpe_rūpa mayi_mad sarvāḥ_sarva āpaḥ_ap protāḥ_prota iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam sarveṣu_sarva paryāyeṣu_paryāya vyākhyātavyam_vyākhyā iyam_idam vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti ādhyānāya_ādhyāna upadiśyate_upadiś iti_iti na_na atīva_atīva abhiniveṣṭavyam_abhiniviś tathā_tathā porabhā_porabhā prakāśaḥ_prakāśa śaśi--_śaśin sūryayoḥ_sūrya aham_mad asmi_as prakāśa--_prakāśa sāmānya--_sāmānya rūpe_rūpa mayi_mad śaśi--_śaśin sūryau_sūrya protau_prota iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā praṇayaḥ_praṇaya oṅkāraḥ_oṃkāra sarva--_sarva vedeṣu_veda anusyūtaḥ_anusīv aham_mad tat_tad yathā_yathā śaṅkunā_śaṅku sarvāṇi_sarva parṇāni_parṇa saṃtṛṇṇāni_saṃtṛd evam_evam oṅkāreṇa_oṃkāra sarvā_sarva vāc_vāc iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti saṃtṛṇṇāni_saṃtṛd grathitāni_granth sarvā_sarva vāc_vāc sarvaḥ_sarva vedaḥ_veda iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śabdaḥ_śabda puṇyaḥ_puṇya tad--_tad mātra--_mātra rūpaḥ_rūpa khe_kha ākāśe_ākāśa anusyūtaḥ_anusīv aham_mad pauruṣam_pauruṣa puruṣa--_puruṣa tva--_tva sāmānyam_sāmānya nṛṣu_nṛ puruṣeṣu_puruṣa yat_yad anusyūtam_anusīv tat_tad aham_mad sāmānya--_sāmānya rūpe_rūpa mayi_mad sarve_sarva viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa protāḥ_prave śrautaiḥ_śrauta dundubhi--_dundubhi ādi--_ādi dṛṣṭāntaiḥ_dṛṣṭānta iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra draṣṭavyam_dṛś

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sva--_sva kārye_kārya jagati_jagant atra_atra yathā_yathā aham_mad antaryāmi--_antaryāmin rūpeṇa_rūpa praviṣṭaḥ_praviś varte_vṛt tathā_tathā kvacid_kvacid kāraṇa--_kāraṇa rūpeṇa_rūpa kvacid_kvacid kāryeṣu_kārya manuṣya--_manuṣya ādiṣu_ādi sāra--_sāra rūpeṇa_rūpa api_api aham_mad varte_vṛt iti_iti āha_ah rasaḥ_rasa aham_mad iti_iti apsu_ap rasa_rasa tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtaḥ_bhū mad--_mad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam sarvatra_sarvatra agre_agra api_api prabhā_prabhā prabhā--_prabhā rūpaḥ_rūpa praṇavaḥ_praṇava oṅkāraḥ_oṃkāra sarva--_sarva veda--_veda kāraṇam_kāraṇa ākāśe_ākāśa śabdaḥ_śabda tad--_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa nṛṣu_nṛ pauruṣam_pauruṣa sakala--_sakala udyama--_udyama viśeṣa_viśeṣa manuṣya--_manuṣya sāraḥ_sāra

baladevaḥ_baladeva darśayati_darśay rasaḥ_rasa aham_mad pañcabhiḥ_pañcan apsu_ap rasaḥ_rasa aham_mad rasa--_rasa tad--_tad mātrayā_mātrā vibhūtyā_vibhūti tāḥ_tad pālayan_pālay tāsu_tad aham_mad vartate_vṛt tām_tad vinā_vinā tāsām_tad asthiteḥ_asthiti śaśini_śaśin sūrye_sūrya ca_ca aham_mad prabhā_prabhā asmi_as prabhayā_prabhā vibhūtyā_vibhūti tau_tad pālayan_pālay tayoḥ_tad aham_mad varte_vṛt evam_evam paratra_paratra draṣṭavyam_dṛś vaikharī--_vaikharī rūpeṣu_rūpa sarva--_sarva vedeṣu_veda tad--_tad mūla--_mūla bhūtaḥ_bhū praṇavaḥ_praṇava aham_mad khe_kha nabhasi_nabhas śabdaḥ_śabda tad--_tad mātra--_mātra lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa aham_mad nṛṣu_nṛ pauruṣam_pauruṣa phalavān_phalavat udyamaḥ_udyama aham_mad tena_tena eva_eva teṣām_tad sthiteḥ_sthiti
BhG 7.9

lg.l: puṇyaḥ_puṇya gandhaḥ_gandha pṛthivyām_pṛthivī ca_ca tejaḥ_tejas ca_ca asmi_as vibhāvasau_vibhāvasu
jīvanam_jīvana sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta tapaḥ_tapas ca_ca asmi_as tapasviṣu_tapasvin

div.p: puṇyaḥ_puṇya a_a vikṛtaḥ_vikṛ gandhaḥ_gandha gandha--_gandha tad--_tad mātram_mātra pṛthivyāḥ_pṛthivī āśraya--_āśraya bhūtaḥ_bhū aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā vibhūti--_vibhūti rūpeṇa_rūpa āśraya--_āśraya tvasya_tva vivakṣita--_vivakṣita tvāt_tva surabhi--_surabhi gandhasya_gandha eva_eva utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tayā_tā vibhūti--_vibhūti tvāt_tva puṇyaḥ_puṇya gandhaḥ_gandha iti_iti uktam_vac tathā_tathā vibhāvasu--_vibhāvasu agnau_agni yat_yad tejaḥ_tejas duḥsahā_duḥsaha sahajā_sahaja dīptiḥ_dīpti tat_tad aham_mad sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta jīvanam_jīvana prāṇa--_prāṇa dhāraṇa--_dhāraṇa vāyuḥ_vāyu aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tapasviṣu_tapasvin vānaprastha--_vānaprastha ādiṣu_ādi dvandva--_dvaṃdva sahana--_sahana rūpam_rūpa tapaḥ_tapas asmi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana puṇyaḥ_puṇya surabhiḥ_surabhi avikṛtaḥ_avikṛta gandhaḥ_gandha sarva--_sarva pṛthivī--_pṛthivī sāmānya--_sāmānya rūpaḥ_rūpa tad--_tad mātra--_mātra ākhyaḥ_ākhyā pṛthivyām_pṛthivī anusyūtaḥ_anusīv aham_mad ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra rasa--_rasa ādīnām_ādi api_api puṇya--_puṇya tva--_tva samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha śabda--_śabda sparśa--_sparśa rūpa--_rūpa rasa--_rasa gandhānām_gandha hi_hi svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva eva_eva puṇya--_puṇya tvam_tva avikṛta--_avikṛta tvam_tva prāṇinām_prāṇin adharma--_adharma viśeṣāt_viśeṣa tu_tu teṣām_tad apuṇya--_apuṇya tvam_tva na_na tu_tu svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś tathā_tathā vibhāvasau_vibhāvasu agnau_agni yat_yad tejaḥ_tejas sarva--_sarva dahana--_dahana prakāśana--_prakāśana sāmarthya--_sāmarthya rūpam_rūpa uṣṇa--_uṣṇa sparśa--_sparśa sahitam_sahita sita--_sita bhāsvaram_bhāsvara rūpam_rūpa puṇyam_puṇya tat_tad aham_mad asmi_as ca-kāra--_ca-kāra ādyaḥ_ādya vāyau_vāyu puṇyaḥ_puṇya uṣṇa--_uṣṇa sparśa--_sparśa āturāṇām_ātura āpyāyakaḥ_āpyāyaka śīta--_śīta sparśaḥ_sparśa saḥ_tad api_api aham_mad iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta sarveṣu_sarva prāṇiṣu_prāṇin jīvanam_jīvana prāṇa--_prāṇa dhāraṇam_dhāraṇa āyuḥ_āyus aham_mad asmi_as tad--_tad rūpe_rūpa mayi_mad sarve_sarva prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin protāḥ_prota iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tapasviṣu_tapasvin nityam_nityam tapaḥ--_tapas yukteṣu_yuj vānaprastha--_vānaprastha ādiṣu_ādi yat_yad tapaḥ_tapas śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa kṣudh--_kṣudh pipāsā--_pipāsā ādi--_ādi dvandva--_dvaṃdva sahana--_sahana sāmarthya--_sāmarthya rūpam_rūpa tat_tad aham_mad asmi_as tad--_tad rūpe_rūpa mayi_mad tapasvinaḥ_tapasvin protāḥ_prota viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa abhāve_abhāva viśiṣṭa--_viśiṣ abhāvāt_abhāva tapaḥ_tapas ca_ca iti_iti ca-kāreṇa_cakāra citta--_citta aikāgryam_aikāgrya āntaram_āntara jihvā--_jihvā upastha--_upastha ādi--_ādi nigraha--_nigraha lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa bāhyam_bāhya ca_ca sarvam_sarva tapaḥ_tapas samuccīyate_samucci

ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra rasa--_rasa ādīnām_ādi api_api puṇya--_puṇya tva--_tva samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha tejaḥ_tejas sarva--_sarva vastu--_vastu pācana--_pācana prakāśana--_prakāśana śīta--_śīta trāṇa--_trāṇa ādi--_ādi sāmarthya--_sāmarthya rūpaḥ_rūpa sāraḥ_sāra jīvanam_jīvana āyuḥ_āyus eva_eva sāraḥ_sāra tapaḥ_tapas dvandva--_dvaṃdva sahana--_sahana ādikam_ādika eva_eva sāraḥ_sāra

baladevaḥ_baladeva puṇyaḥ_puṇya avikṛtaḥ_avikṛta gandhaḥ_gandha tad--_tad mātra--_mātra lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra rasa--_rasa ādīnām_ādi aham_mad api_api puṇya--_puṇya tva--_tva samuccāyakaḥ_samuccāyaka jīvanam_jīvana āyuḥ_āyus tapaḥ_tapas dvandva--_dvaṃdva sahanam_sahana
BhG 7.10

lg.l: bījam_bīja mām_mad sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta viddhi_vid pārtha_pārtha sanātanam_sanātana
buddhiḥ_buddhi buddhimatām_buddhimat asmi_as tejaḥ_tejas tejasvinām_tejasvin aham_mad

div.p: sarveṣām_sarva cara--_cara acarāṇām_acara bhūtānām_bhūta bījam_bīja sajātīya--_sajātīya kārya--_kārya utpādana--_utpādana sāmarthyam_sāmarthya sanātanam_sanātana nityam_nityam uttara--_uttara uttara--_uttara sarva--_sarva kāryeṣu_kārya anusyūtam_anusīv tat_tad eva_eva bījam_bīja mad--_mad vibhūtim_vibhūti viddhi_vid na_na tu_tu prativyakti_prativyakti vinaśyam_vinaś tathā_tathā buddhimatām_buddhimat buddhiḥ_buddhi prajñā_prajñā aham_mad asmi_as tejasvinām_tejasvin pragalbhānām_pragalbha tejaḥ_tejas pragalbhatām_pragalbh

āha_ah yat_yad sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamānām_jaṅgama ekam_eka bījam_bīja kāraṇam_kāraṇa sanātanam_sanātana nityam_nitya bīja--_bīja antara--_antara anapekṣam_anapekṣa na_na tu_tu prati_prati vyakti--_vyakti bhinnam_bhid anityam_anitya vā_vā tad--_tad avyākṛta--_avyākṛta ākhyam_ākhyā sarva--_sarva bījam_bīja mām_mad eva_eva viddhi_vid na_na tu_tu mad--_mad bhinnam_bhid he_he pārtha_pārtha atas_atas yuktam_yuj ekasmin_eka eva_eva mayi_mad sarva--_sarva bīje_bīja prota--_prota tvam_tva sarveṣām_sarva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka ca_ca buddhiḥ_buddhi tattva--_tattva atattva--_atattva viveka--_viveka sāmarthyam_sāmarthya tādṛśa--_tādṛśa buddhimatām_buddhimat aham_mad asmi_as buddhi--_buddhi rūpe_rūpa mayi_mad buddhimantaḥ_buddhimat protāḥ_prota viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa abhāve_abhāva viśiṣṭa--_viśiṣ abhāvasya_abhāva ukta--_vac tvāt_tva tathā_tathā tejaḥ_tejas prāgalbhyam_prāgalbhya
para--_para abhibhava--_abhibhava sāmarthyam_sāmarthya pariḥ_pari ca_ca an_an abhibhāvya--_abhibhāvay tvam_tva tejasvinām_tejasvin tathāvidha--_tathāvidha prāgalbhya--_prāgalbhya yuktānām_yuj yat_yad tat_tad aham_mad asmi_as tejaḥ--_tejas rūpe_rūpa mayi_mad tejasvinaḥ_tejasvin protāḥ_prota iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva viddhi_vid pālayāmi_pālay puṣyante_puṣ buddhiḥ_buddhi sāra--_sāra asāra--_asāra vivekavatī_vivekavat tejaḥ_tejas prāgalbhyam_prāgalbhya para--_para abhibhava--_abhibhava sāmarthyam_sāmarthya parān_para abhibhāvya--_abhibhāvay tvam_tva ca_ca
BhG 7.11

lg.l: balam_bala balavatām_balavat ca_ca aham_mad kāma--_kāma rāga--_rāga vivarjitam_vivarjay
dharma--_dharma aviruddhaḥ_aviruddha bhūteṣu_bhūta kāmaḥ_kāma asmi_as bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha

div.p: kāmaḥ_kāma aprāpte_aprāpta vastuni_vastu abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa rājasaḥ_rājasa rāgaḥ_rāga punar_punar abhilaṣite_abhilaṣ arthe_artha prāpte_prāp api_api punar_punar adhike_adhika arthe_artha citta--_citta rañjana--_rañjana ātmakaḥ_ātmaka tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā para--_para paryāyaḥ_paryāya tāmasaḥ_tāmasa tābhyām_tad vivarjitam_vivarjay balavatām_balavat balam_bala aham_mad asmi_as sāttvikam_sāttvika sva--_sva dharma--_dharma anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna sāmarthyam_sāmarthya aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dharmeṇa_dharma aviruddhaḥ_aviruddha sva--_sva dāreṣu_dāra putra--_putra utpādana--_utpādana mātra--_mātra upayogī_upayogin kāmaḥ_kāma aham_mad iti_iti

prāpyatām_prāp prāptaḥ_prāp viṣayaḥ_viṣaya kṣaya--_kṣaya kāraṇe_kāraṇa sati_as api_api na_na kṣīyatām_kṣi iti_iti evam_evam ākāraḥ_ākāra citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa rañjana--_rañjana ātmā_ātman rāgaḥ_rāga tābhyām_tad viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa varjitam_varjay sarvathā_sarvathā tat_tad akāraṇam_akāraṇa rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas virahitam_virahita deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi dhāraṇa--_dhāraṇa sāmarthyam_sāmarthya sāttvikam_sāttvika balam_bala balavatām_balavat tādṛśa--_tādṛśa sāttvika--_sāttvika bala--_bala yuktānām_yuj saṃsāra--_saṃsāra parāṅmukhānām_parāṅmukha tat_tad aham_mad asmi_as tad--_tad rūpe_rūpa mayi_mad balavantaḥ_balavat protāḥ_prota iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ca_ca śabdaḥ_śabda tu_tu śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha bhinna--_bhid kramaḥ_krama kāma--_kāma rāga--_rāga vivarjitam_vivarjay eva_eva balam_bala mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva dhyeyam_dhyā na_na tu_tu saṃsāriṇām_saṃsārin kāma--_kāma rāga--_rāga kāraṇam_kāraṇa balam_bala iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

krodha--_krodha arthaḥ_artha vā_vā rāga--_rāga śabdaḥ_śabda vyākhyeyaḥ_vyākhyā dharmaḥ_dharma dharma--_dharma śāstram_śāstra tena_tad aviruddhaḥ_aviruddha apratiṣiddhaḥ_apratiṣiddha dharma--_dharma anukūlaḥ_anukūla vā_vā yaḥ_yad bhūteṣu_bhūta prāṇiṣu_prāṇin kāmaḥ_kāma śāstra--_śāstra anumata--_anuman jāyā--_jāyā putra--_putra vitta--_vitta ādi--_ādi viṣayaḥ_viṣaya abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa saḥ_tad aham_mad asmi_as he_he bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha śāstra--_śāstra aviruddha--_aviruddha kāma--_kāma bhūte_bhū mayi_mad tathāvidha--_tathāvidha kāma--_kāma yuktānām_yuj bhūtānām_bhūta prota--_prota tvam_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva kāmaḥ_kāma sva--_sva jīvikā--_jīvikā ādi--_ādi abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa rāgaḥ_rāga tu_tu prāpte_prāp api_api abhilaṣite_abhilaṣ arthe_artha punar_punar tatas_tatas api_api adhike_adhika arthe_artha citta--_citta rañjana--_rañjana ātmakaḥ_ātmaka ati_ati tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā para--_para nāmā_nāman tābhyām_tad vivarjitam_vivarjay balam_bala sva--_sva dharma--_dharma anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna sāmarthyam_sāmarthya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dharma--_dharma aviruddhaḥ_aviruddha sva--_sva patnyām_patnī putra--_putra utpatti--_utpatti mātra--_mātra hetuḥ_hetu
BhG 7.12

lg.l: ye_yad ca_ca eva_eva sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika bhāvāḥ_bhāva rājasāḥ_rājasa tāmasāḥ_tāmasa ca_ca ye_yad
mattaḥ_mad evā_eva iti_iti tān_tad viddhi_vid na_na tu_tu aham_mad teṣu_tad te_tad mayi_mad

div.p: ye_yad ca_ca anye_anya api_api sāttvika--_sāttvika bhāvāḥ_bhāva śama--_śama dama--_dama ādayaḥ_ādi rājasāḥ_rājasa ca_ca harṣa--_harṣa darpa--_darpa ādayaḥ_ādi tāmasāḥ_tāmasa ca_ca śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādayaḥ_ādi prāṇinām_prāṇin sva--_sva karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa jāyante_jan tān_tad mattaḥ_mad eva_eva jātān_jan iti_iti viddhi_vid madīya--_madīya prakṛti--_prakṛti guṇa--_guṇa kārya--_kārya tvāt_tva evam_evam api_api teṣu_tad aham_mad na_na varte_vṛt jīva--_jīva vat_vat tad--_tad adhīnaḥ_adhīna aham_mad na_na bhavāmi_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha te_tad tu_tu mad--_mad adhīnāḥ_adhīna santaḥ_as mayi_mad vartante_vṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka evam_evam parigaṇanena_parigaṇana ye_yad ca_ca eva_eva iti_iti ye_yad ca_ca anye_anya api_api bhāvāḥ_bhāva citta--_citta pariṇāmāḥ_pariṇāma sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika śama--_śama dama--_dama ādayaḥ_ādi ye_yad ca_ca rājasāḥ_rājasa harṣa--_harṣa darpa--_darpa ādayaḥ_ādi ye_yad ca_ca tāmasāḥ_tāmasa śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādayaḥ_ādi prāṇinām_prāṇin avidyā--_avidyā karma--_karman ādi--_ādi vaśāt_vaśa jāyante_jan tān_tad mattaḥ_mad eva_eva jāyamānān_jan iti_iti aham_mad kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna jagataḥ_jagant prabhavaḥ_prabhava iti_iti ādi--_ādi ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra viddhi_vid samastān_samasta eva_eva athavā_athavā sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika rājasāḥ_rājasa tāmasāḥ_tāmasa ca_ca bhāvāḥ_bhāva sarve_sarva api_api jaḍa--_jaḍa vargāḥ_varga vyākhyeyāḥ_vyākhyā viśeṣa--_viśeṣa hetu--_hetu abhāvāt_abhāva eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra ca_ca samasta--_samasta avadhāraṇa--_avadhāraṇa arthaḥ_artha evam_evam api_api na_na tu_tu aham_mad teṣu_tad mattaḥ_mad jāta--_jan tve_tva api_api tad--_tad vaśaḥ_vaśa tad--_tad vikāra--_vikāra rūṣitaḥ_rūṣita rajju--_rajju khaṇḍaḥ_khaṇḍa iva_iva kalpita--_kalpay sarva--_sarva vikāra--_vikāra rūṣitaḥ_rūṣita aham_mad na_na bhavāmi_bhū saṃsārī_saṃsārin iva_iva te_tad tu_tu bhāvāḥ_bhāva mayi_mad rajjvām_rajju
iva_iva sarpa--_sarpa ādayaḥ_ādi kalpitāḥ_kalpay mad--_mad adhīna--_adhīna sattā--_sattā sphūrtikāḥ_sphūrtika mad--_mad adhīnāḥ_adhīna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha evam_evam vastu--_vastu kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtāḥ_bhū vastu--_vastu sāra--_sāra bhūtāḥ_bhū ca_ca rākṣasa--_rākṣasa ādyāḥ_ādya ca_ca vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti kāścid_kaścit uktāḥ_vac kintu_kiṃtu alam_alam ati_ati vistareṇa_vistara mad--_mad adhīnam_adhīna vastu--_vastu mātram_mātra eva_eva mad--_mad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti iti_iti āha_ah ye_yad ca_ca eva_eva iti_iti sāttva--_sāttva bhāvāḥ_bhāva śama--_śama dama--_dama ādayaḥ_ādi deva--_deva ādyāḥ_ādya ca_ca rājasāḥ_rājasa harṣa--_harṣa darpa--_darpa ādayaḥ_ādi asura--_asura ādyāḥ_ādya ca_ca tāmasāḥ_tāmasa śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādayaḥ_ādi rākṣasa--_rākṣasa ādyāḥ_ādya ca_ca tān_tad mattaḥ_mad eva_eva iti_iti madīya--_madīya prakṛti--_prakṛti guṇa--_guṇa kāryatvāt_kāryatva teṣu_tad aham_mad na_na varte_vṛt jīva--_jīva vat_vat tad--_tad adhīnaḥ_adhīna aham_mad na_na bhavāmi_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha te_tad tu_tu mayi_mad mad--_mad adhīnāḥ_adhīna santaḥ_as eva_eva vartante_vṛt

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam kāṃścid_kaścit vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti abhidhāya_abhidhā samāsena_samāsena sarvāḥ_sarva tāḥ_tad prāha_prāh ye_yad ca_ca eva_eva iti_iti ye_yad mithas_mithas vilakṣaṇa--_vilakṣaṇa svabhāvāḥ_svabhāva sāttvika--_sāttvika ādayaḥ_ādi bhāvāḥ_bhāva prāṇinām_prāṇin śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya viṣaya--_viṣaya ātmanā_ātman ca_ca avasthitāḥ_avasthā tān_tad sarvān_sarva tad--_tad tad--_tad śakti--_śakti upetān_upe mattaḥ_mad eva_eva upapannān_upapad viddhi_vid na_na tu_tu aham_mad teṣu_tad varte_vṛt na_na eva_eva aham_mad tad--_tad adhīna--_adhīna sthitiḥ_sthiti te_tad mayi_mad mad--_mad adhīna--_adhīna sthitayaḥ_sthiti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 7.13

lg.l: tribhiḥ_tri guṇa--_guṇa mayaiḥ_maya bhāvaiḥ_bhāva ebhiḥ_idam sarvam_sarva idam_idam jagat_jagant
mohitam_mohay na_na abhijānāti_abhijñā mām_mad ebhyaḥ_idam param_para avyayam_avyaya

div.p: jānāti_jñā āha_ah tribhiḥ_tri trividhaiḥ_trividha ebhiḥ_idam pūrva--_pūrva uktaiḥ_vac guṇa--_guṇa mayaiḥ_maya kāma--_kāma lobha--_lobha ādibhiḥ_ādi guṇa--_guṇa vikāraiḥ_vikāra bhāvaiḥ_bhāva svabhāvaiḥ_svabhāva mohitam_mohay idam_idam jagat_jagant atas_atas māma_māma na_na abhijānāti_abhijñā kathambhūtam_kathaṃbhūta ebhyaḥ_idam bhāvebhyaḥ_bhāva param_para ebhiḥ_idam a_a spṛṣṭam_spṛś eteṣām_etad niyantāram_niyantṛ ataeva_ataeva avyayam_avyaya nirvikāram_nirvikāra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tava_tvad parameśvarasya_parameśvara svātantrye_svātantrya nitya--_nitya śuddha--_śudh buddham_budh ukta--_vac svabhāva--_svabhāva tve_tva ca_ca sati_as kutas_kutas jagataḥ_jagant tvad--_tvad ātmakasya_ātmaka saṃsāri--_saṃsārin tvam_tva evaṃvidha--_evaṃvidha mad--_mad svarūpa--_svarūpa aparijñānāt_aparijñāna iti_iti ced_ced tat_tad eva_eva kutas_kutas iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah tribhiḥ_tri iti_iti ebhiḥ_idam prāc--_prāñc uktaiḥ_vac tribhiḥ_tri trividhaiḥ_trividha guṇa--_guṇa mayaiḥ_maya sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas guṇa--_guṇa vikāraiḥ_vikāra bhāvaiḥ_bhāva sarvaiḥ_sarva api_api bhavana--_bhavana dharmabhiḥ_dharma sarvam_sarva idam_idam jagat_jagant prāṇi--_prāṇin jātam_jan mohitam_mohay viveka--_viveka ayogya--_ayogya tvam_tva āpāditam_āpāday param_para eṣām_idam kalpanā--_kalpanā adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna atyanta--_atyanta vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa avyayam_avyaya sarva--_sarva vikriyā--_vikriyā śūnyam_śūnya aprapañcam_aprapañca ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana ātma--_ātman prakāśam_prakāśa avyavahitam_avyavahita api_api mām_mad na_na abhijānāti_abhijñā tatas_tatas ca_ca sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa aparicayāt_aparicaya saṃsarati_saṃsṛ iva_iva iti_iti aho_aho daurbhāgyam_daurbhāgya aviveki--_avivekin janasya_jana iti_iti
anukrośam_anukrośa darśayati_darśay bhagavān_bhagavant

jānāti_jñā āha_ah guṇa--_guṇa mayaiḥ_maya śama--_śama dama--_dama ādi--_ādi harṣa--_harṣa ādi--_ādi śoka--_śoka ādyaiḥ_ādya bhāvaiḥ_bhāva svābhāvībhūtaiḥ_svābhāvībhū jagat_jagant jagat--_jagant jāta--_jan jīva--_jīva vṛndam_vṛnda mohitam_mohay sat_as mām_mad nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvāt_tva ebhyaḥ_idam param_para avyayam_avyaya nirvikāram_nirvikāra

baladevaḥ_baladeva darśayan_darśay āha_ah ebhiḥ_idam pūrva--_pūrva uditaiḥ_vad guṇa--_guṇa mayaiḥ_maya mad--_mad māyā--_māyā guṇa--_guṇa kāryaiḥ_kārya trividhaiḥ_trividha sāttvika--_sāttvika ādibhiḥ_ādi bhāvaiḥ_bhāva bhavana--_bhavana dharmibhiḥ_dharmin kṣaṇa--_kṣaṇa pariṇāmibhiḥ_pariṇāmin tad--_tad tad--_tad karma--_karman anuguṇa--_anuguṇa śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya viṣaya--_viṣaya ātmanā_ātman jagat_jagant sura--_sura asura--_asura manuṣya--_manuṣya ādi--_ādi ātmanā_ātman avasthitam_avasthā jīva--_jīva vṛndam_vṛnda kartṛ_kartṛ ebhyaḥ_idam sāttvika--_sāttvika ādibhyaḥ_ādi bhāvebhyaḥ_bhāva param_para taiḥ_tad a_a spṛṣṭam_spṛś ananta--_ananta kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa ratna--_ratna ākaram_ākara vijñāna--_vijñāna ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana
na_na abhijānāti_abhijñā pratyāsūyati_pratyāsūy
BhG 7.14

lg.l: daivī_daiva hi_hi eṣā_etad guṇa--_guṇa mayī_maya mama_mad māyā_māyā duratyayā_duratyaya
mām_mad eva_eva ye_yad prapadyante_prapad māyām_māyā etām_etad taranti_tṛ te_tad

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara ke_ka tarhi_tarhi tvām_tvad jānanti_jñā iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah daivī_daiva iti_iti daivī_daiva alaukikī_alaukika atyadbhutā_atyadbhuta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha guṇa--_guṇa mayī_maya sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa vikāra--_vikāra ātmikā_ātmaka mama_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara śaktiḥ_śakti māyā_māyā duratyayā_duratyaya dustarā_dustara hi_hi prasiddhim_prasiddhi etam_etad tathā_tathā api_api mām_mad eva_eva iti_iti eva_eva kāreṇa_kāra avyabhicāriṇyā_avyabhicārin bhaktyā_bhakti ye_yad prapadyante_prapad bhajanti_bhaj māyām_māyā etām_etad su_su dustarām_dustara api_api te_tad taranti_tṛ tatas_tatas mām_mad jānanti_jñā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

syāt_as bhagavat--_bhagavant eka--_eka śaraṇa--_śaraṇa tayā_tā tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna dvāreṇa_dvāra māyā--_māyā atikramaḥ_atikrama sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti āha_ah daivī_daiva iti_iti daivī_daiva ekaḥ_eka sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta gūḍhaḥ_guh iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti pratipādite_pratipāday svatā--_svatā udyotanavati_udyotanavat deve_deva sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa caitanya--_caitanya ānande_ānanda nirvibhāge_nirvibhāga tad--_tad āśraya--_āśraya tayā_tā tad--_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya tayā_tā ca_ca kalpitā_kalpay āśraya--_āśraya tva--_tva viṣaya--_viṣaya tva_tva eva_eva kevalā_kevala iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti eṣā_etad sākṣi--_sākṣin pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa tvena_tva apalāpa--_apalāpa anarhā_anarha hi_hi śabdāt_śabda bhrama--_bhrama upādāna--_upādāna tvāt_tva arthāpatti--_arthāpatti siddhā_sidh ca_ca triguṇa--_triguṇa rajjuḥ_rajju iva_iva ati_ati dṛdha--_dṛdh tvena_tva bandhana--_bandhana hetuḥ_hetu mama_mad māyāvinaḥ_māyāvin parameśvarasya_parameśvara sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant kāraṇasya_kāraṇa sarvajñasya_sarvajña sarva--_sarva śakteḥ_śakti sva--_sva bhūtā_bhū svādhīna--_svādhīna tvena_tva jagat--_jagant sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi nirvāhikā_nirvāhaka vidyāt_vid

atra_atra evam_evam prakriyā_prakriyā jīva--_jīva īśvara--_īśvara jagat--_jagant vibhāga--_vibhāga śūnye_śūnya caitanye_caitanya adhyasta--_adhyas anādiḥ_anādi avidyā_avidyā sattva--_sattva prādhānyena_prādhānya svacchā_svaccha darpaṇaḥ_darpaṇa iva_iva mukha--_mukha bhāsam_bhās cit--_cit ābhāsam_ābhāsa āgṛhṇāti_āgrah tatas_tatas ca_ca bimba--_bimba sthānīyaḥ_sthānīya parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara upādhi--_upādhi doṣa--_doṣa an_an āskanditaḥ_āskanday pratibimba--_pratibimba sthānīyaḥ_sthānīya ca_ca jīvaḥ_jīva upādhi--_upādhi doṣa--_doṣa āskanditaḥ_āskanday īśvarāt_īśvara ca_ca jīva--_jīva bhogāya_bhoga ākāśa--_ākāśa ādi--_ādi krameṇa_krama śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya saṅghātaḥ_saṃghāta tad--_tad bhogyaḥ_bhuj ca_ca kṛtsnaḥ_kṛtsna prapañcaḥ_prapañca jāyate_jan iti_iti kalpanā_kalpanā bhavati_bhū bimba--_bimba pratibimba--_pratibimba mukha--_mukha anugata--_anugam mukha--_mukha vat_vat ca_ca īśa--_īśa jīva--_jīva anugatam_anugam māyā--_māyā upādhi_upādhi caitanyam_caitanya sākṣi_sākṣin iti_iti kalpyate_kalpay tena_tad eva_eva ca_ca sva--_sva adhyastā_adhyas māyā_māyā tad--_tad kāryam_kārya ca_ca kṛtsnam_kṛtsna prakāśyate_prakāśay atas_atas sākṣi--_sākṣin abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya daivī_daiva iti_iti bimbeśvara--_bimbeśvara abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya tu_tu bhagavtā_bhagavant uktam_vac yadi_yadi api_api avidyā--_avidyā pratibimbaḥ_pratibimba ekaḥ_eka eva_eva jīvaḥ_jīva tathā_tathā api_api avidyā--_avidyā gatānām_gam
antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa saṃskārāṇām_saṃskāra bhinna--_bhid tvāt_tva tad--_tad bhedena_bheda antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa upādheḥ_upādhi tasya_tad atra_atra bheda--_bheda vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa mām_mad eva_eva ye_yad prapadyante_prapad duṣkṛtinaḥ_duṣkṛtin mūḍhāḥ_muh na_na prapadyante_prapad caturvidhāḥ_caturvidha bhajante_bhaj mām_mad iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi śrutau_śruti ca_ca tat_tad yaḥ_yad devānām_deva pratyabudhyata_pratibudh saḥ_tad eva_eva tat_tad abhavat_bhū tathā_tathā ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi tathā_tathā manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi

antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa upādhi--_upādhi bheda--_bheda aparyālocane_aparyālocana tu_tu jīva--_jīva tva--_tva prayojaka--_prayojaka upādheḥ_upādhi ekatvāt_ekatva ekatvena_ekatva eva_eva atra_atra vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña ca_ca api_api mām_mad viddhi_vid sarva--_sarva kṣetreṣu_kṣetra prakṛtim_prakṛti puruṣam_puruṣa ca_ca eva_eva viddhi_vid anādī_anādi ubhau_ubh api_api gītā--_gītā 13.19--_19 eva_eva aṃśaḥ_aṃśa jīva--_jīva loke_loka jīva--_jīva bhūtaḥ_bhū sanātanaḥ_sanātana iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutau_śruti ca_ca brahma_brahman vai_vai idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as tat_tad ātmānam_ātman eva_eva avet_vid aham_mad brahma_brahman asmi_as iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt tat_tad sarvam_sarva abhavat_bhū ekaḥ_eka devaḥ_deva sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta gūḍhaḥ_guh anena_idam jīvena_jīva a_a ātmanā_ātman a_a anupraviśya_anupraviś

bālāgra--_bālāgra śata--_śata bhāgasya_bhāga śatadhā_śatadhā kalpitasya_kalpay ca_ca
bhāgaḥ_bhāga jīvaḥ_jīva sa_tad vijñeyaḥ_vijñā sa_tad ca_ca ānantyāya_ānantya kalpate_kﾱp

yadi_yadi api_api darpaṇa--_darpaṇa gataḥ_gam caitra--_caitra pratibimbaḥ_pratibimba svam_sva param_para ca_ca na_na jānāti_jñā acetana--_acetana aṃśasya_aṃśa eva_eva tatra_tatra pratibimbita--_pratibimb tvāt_tva tathā_tathā api_api cit--_cit pratibimbaḥ_pratibimba cit--_cit tvāt_tva eva_eva svam_sva param_para ca_ca jānāti_jñā ābhāsa--_ābhāsa pakṣe_pakṣa tasya_tad anirvacanīya--_anirvacanīya tve_tva api_api jaḍa--_jaḍa vilakṣaṇa--_vilakṣaṇa tvāt_tva sa_tad ca_ca yāvat_yāvat sva--_sva bimba--_bimba aikyam_aikya ātmanaḥ_ātman na_na jānāti_jñā tāvat_tāvat jala--_jala sūryaḥ_sūrya iva_iva jala--_jala gata--_gam kampa--_kampa ādikam_ādika upādhi--_upādhi gatam_gam vikāra--_vikāra sahasram_sahasra anubhavati_anubhū tat_tad etat_etad āha_ah duratyaya--_duratyaya iti_iti bimba--_bimba bhūta--_bhūta īśvara--_īśvara aikya--_aikya sākṣātkāram_sākṣātkāra antareṇa_antara atyetum_atī taritum_tṛ aśakyā_aśakya iti_iti duratyayā_duratyaya ataeva_ataeva jīvaḥ_jīva antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa avacchinna--_avacchid tvāt_tva tad--_tad sambaddham_sambandh eva_eva akṣi--_akṣi ādi--_ādi dvārā_dvār bhāsayan_bhāsay kiṃcid_kaścit jñaḥ_jña bhavati_bhū tatas_tatas ca_ca jānāmi_jñā karomi_kṛ bhuñje_bhuj ca_ca iti_iti anartha--_anartha śata--_śata bhājanam_bhājana bhavati_bhū sa_tad ced_ced bimba--_bimba bhūtam_bhū bhagavantam_bhagavant ananta--_ananta śaktim_śakti māyā--_māyā niyantāram_niyantṛ sarva--_sarva vidam_vid sarva--_sarva phala--_phala dātāram_dātṛ aniśam_aniśam ānanda--_ānanda ghana--_ghana mūrtim_mūrti bhakta--_bhakta anugrahāya_anugraha vidadhatam_vidhā ārādhayati_ārādhay samarpaṇena_samarpaṇa tadā_tadā bimba--_bimba samarpitasya_samarpay pratibimbe_pratibimba pratiphalanāt_pratiphalana sarvān_sarva api_api puruṣa--_puruṣa arthān_artha āsādayati_āsāday etat_etad eva_eva abhipretya_abhipre prahlādena_prahlāda uktam_vac

na_na eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman prabhuḥ_prabhu ayam_idam nija--_nija lābha--_lābha pūrṇaḥ_pṛ mānam_māna janāt_jana a_a viduṣaḥ_vid karuṇaḥ_karuṇa vṛṇīte_vṛ yat_yad yat_yad janaḥ_jana bhagavate_bhagavant vidadhīta_vidhā mānam_māna
tat_tad ca_ca ātmane_ātman prati_prati mukhasya_mukha yathā_yathā mukha--_mukha śrīḥ_śrī iti_iti

darpaṇa--_darpaṇa pratibimbitasya_pratibimbita mukhasya_mukha tilaka--_tilaka ādi--_ādi śrīḥ_śrī apekṣitā_apekṣ ced_ced bimba--_bimba bhūte_bhū mukhe_mukha samarpaṇīyā_samarpay sā_tad svayam_svayam eva_eva tatra_tatra pratiphalati_pratiphal na_na anyaḥ_anya kaścid_kaścit tad--_tad prāptau_prāpti upāyaḥ_upāya asti_as yathā_yathā tathā_tathā bimba--_bimba bhūta--_bhū īśvare_īśvara samarpitam_samarpay eva_eva tad--_tad pratibimba--_pratibimba bhūtaḥ_bhū jīvaḥ_jīva labhate_labh na_na anyaḥ_anya kaścid_kaścit tasya_tad puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha dṛṣṭānta--_dṛṣṭānta dārṣṭānikayoḥ_dārṣṭānika arthaḥ_artha

tasya_tad yadā_yadā bhagavantam_bhagavant anantam_ananta anavaratam_anavarata ārādhayataḥ_ārādhay antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa jñāna--_jñāna pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka pāpena_pāpa rahitam_rahita jñāna--_jñāna anukūla--_anukūla puṇyena_puṇya ca_ca upacitam_upaci bhavati_bhū tadā_tadā ati_ati nirmale_nirmala mukura--_mukura maṇḍale_maṇḍala iva_iva mukham_mukha ati_ati svacche_svaccha sarva--_sarva karma--_karman tyāga--_tyāga śama--_śama dama--_dama ādi--_ādi pūrvaka--_pūrvaka guru--_guru upasadana--_upasadana vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana nididhyāsanaiḥ_nididhyāsana saṃskṛte_saṃskṛ tattvam_tattva asi_as iti_iti guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś vedānnta--_vedānnta vākya--_vākya karaṇikā_karaṇika aham_mad anātma--_anātman ākāra--_ākāra śūnyā_śūnya sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra ātmikā_ātmaka vṛttiḥ_vṛtti udeti_udi tasyām_tad ca_ca caitanyam_caitanya sadyas_sadyas eva_eva sva--_sva viṣaya--_viṣaya āśrayām_āśraya avidyām_avidyā unmūlayati_unmūlay dīpaḥ_dīpa iva_iva tamaḥ_tamas tatas_tatas tasyāḥ_tad nāśāt_nāśa tayā_tad vṛttyā_vṛtti saha_saha akhilasya_akhila kārya--_kārya prapañcasya_prapañca nāśaḥ_nāśa upādāna--_upādāna nāśāt_nāśa upādeya--_upādā nāśasya_nāśa sarva--_sarva tantra--_tantra siddhānta--_siddhānta siddha--_sidh tvāt_tva tat_tad etat_etad āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat mām_mad eva_eva ye_yad prapadyante_prapad māyām_māyā etām_etad taranti_tṛ te_tad iti_iti ātmā_ātman iti_iti eva_eva upāsīta_upās tat_tad ātmānam_ātman eva_eva avet_vid tam_tad eva_eva dhīraḥ_dhīra vijñāya_vijñā tam_tad eva_eva viditvā_vid atimṛtyum_atimṛtyu eti_i iti_iti ādi--_ādi śrutiṣu_śruti iva_iva iha_iha api_api mām_mad eva_eva iti_iti eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra api_api anuparakta--_anuparakta tā--_tā pratipatti--_pratipatti arthaḥ_artha mām_mad eva_eva sarva--_sarva upādhi--_upādhi virahitam_virahita vidānanda--_vidānanda sadātmānam_sadātman akhaṇḍam_akhaṇḍa ye_yad prapadyante_prapad vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya janyayā_jan nirvikalpa--_nirvikalpa sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra rūpayā_rūpa nirvacana--_nirvacana anarha--_anarha śuddha--_śuddha cit--_cit ākāra--_ākāra tva--_tva dharma--_dharma viśiṣṭayā_viśiṣ sarva--_sarva nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana paripāka--_paripāka prasūtayā_prasū cetaḥ--_cetas vṛttyā_vṛtti sarva--_sarva ajñāna--_ajñāna tad--_tad kārya--_kārya virodhinyā_virodhin viṣayīkurvanti_viṣayīkṛ te_tad ye_yad kecid_kaścit etām_etad duratikramaṇīyām_duratikramaṇīya api_api māyām_māyā akhila--_akhila anartha--_anartha janma--_janman bhuvam_bhū anāyāsena_anāyāsa eva_eva taranti_tṛ cana_cana ābhūtyai_ābhūti īśate_īś ātmā_ātman hi_hi eṣā_etad sa_tad bhavati_bhū iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tiṣṭhanti_sthā bahu--_bahu vacana--_vacana prayogaḥ_prayoga deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi saṃghāta--_saṃghāta bheda--_bheda n--_n bandhana--_bandhana ātma--_ātman bheda--_bheda bhrānti--_bhrānti anuvāda--_anuvāda arthaḥ_artha

prapaśyanti_prapaś iti_iti vaktavye_vac prapadyante_prapad iti_iti ukte_vac arthe_artha mad--_mad eka--_eka śaraṇāḥ_śaraṇa santaḥ_as mām_mad eva_eva bhagavantam_bhagavant vāsudevam_vāsudeva īdṛśam_īdṛśa ananta--_ananta saundarya--_saundarya sāra--_sāra sarvasvam_sarvasva akhila--_akhila kalā--_kalā kalāpa--_kalāpa nilayam_nilaya abhinava--_abhinava paṅkaja--_paṅkaja śobhā--_śobhā adhika--_adhika caraṇa--_caraṇa kamala--_kamala yugala--_yugala prabham_prabhā anavarata--_anavarata veṇu--_veṇu vādana--_vādana nirata--_niram vṛndāvana--_vṛndāvana krīḍā--_krīḍā sakta--_sañj mānasa--_mānasa helā--_helā uddhṛta--_uddhṛ govardhana--_govardhana ākhya--_ākhya mahīdharam_mahīdhara gopālam_gopāla niṣūdita--_niṣūday śiśupāla--_śiśupāla abhinava--_abhinava jalada--_jalada śobhā--_śobhā sarva--_sarva sva--_sva haraṇa--_haraṇa caraṇam_caraṇa paramānanda--_paramānanda ghana--_ghana maya--_maya mūrtimati--_mūrtimati vairiñca--_vairiñca prapañcam_prapañca anavaratam_anavarata anucintayantaḥ_anucintay divasān_divasa ativāhayanti_ativāhay te_tad mad--_mad prema--_preman mahā--_mahat ānanda--_ānanda samudra--_samudra magna--_majj manasaḥ_manas tathā_tathā samasta--_samasta māyā--_māyā guṇa--_guṇa vikāraiḥ_vikāra na_na abhibhūyante_abhibhū kintu_kiṃtu mad--_mad vilāsa--_vilāsa vinoda--_vinoda kuśalāḥ_kuśala ete_etad mad--_mad unmūlana--_unmūlana samarthāḥ_samartha iti_iti śaṅkamānā_śaṅk iva_iva māyā_māyā tebhyaḥ_tad apasarati_apasṛ vāravilāsinī_vāravilāsinī iva_iva krodhanebhyaḥ_krodhana tapodhanebhyaḥ_tapodhana tasmāt_tasmāt māyā--_māyā taraṇa--_taraṇa arthī_arthin mām_mad īdṛśam_īdṛśa eva_eva bhagavataḥ_bhagavant śrutayaḥ_śruti smṛtayaḥ_smṛti ca_ca atra_atra arthe_artha pramāṇīkartavyāḥ_pramāṇīkṛ

bhavanti_bhū āha_ah daivī_daiva viṣaya--_viṣaya ānandena_ānanda dīvyanti_dīv iti_iti devāḥ_deva jīvāḥ_jīva tadīyā_tadīya teṣām_tad mohayitrī_mohayitṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mama_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara māyā_māyā bahiraṅgā_bahiraṅga śaktiḥ_śakti duratyayā_duratyaya duratikramā_duratikrama pāśa--_pāśa pakṣe_pakṣa chettum_chid udgranthayitum_udgranthay vā_vā kena_ka api_api aśaktyā_aśakti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kintu_kiṃtu mad--_mad vāci_vāc viśvasihi_viśvas iti_iti sva--_sva vakṣaḥ_vakṣas spṛṣṭvā_spṛś āha_ah mām_mad śyāma--_śyāma sundara--_sundara ākāram_ākāra eva_eva

baladevaḥ_baladeva --nanu_nanu triguṇa--_triguṇa ayaḥ--_ayas tad--_tad māyāyāḥ_māyā nitya--_nitya tvāt_tva tad--_tad hetukasya_hetuka mohasya_moha vinivṛttiḥ_vinivṛtti durghaṭā_durghaṭa iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah daivī_daiva iti_iti mama_mad sarveśvarasya_sarveśvara a_a vitarkya--_vitarkay ati_ati vicitra--_vicitra ananta--_ananta viśva--_viśva sraṣṭuḥ_sraṣṭṛ eṣā_etad māyā_māyā daivī_daiva alaukikī_alaukika ati_ati adbhutā_adbhuta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tādṛś_tādṛś viśva--_viśva sarga--_sarga upakaraṇa--_upakaraṇa tvāt_tva śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah māyām_māyā tu_tu prakṛtim_prakṛti vidyāt_vid māyinam_māyin tu_tu maheśvaram_maheśvara iti_iti ādyā_ādya guṇa--_guṇa mayī_maya sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa traya--_traya ātmikā_ātmaka śleṣeṇa_śleṣa tri--_tri guṇitā_guṇay rajjuḥ_rajju iva_iva ati_ati dṛḍha--_dṛḍha tayā_tā jīvānām_jīva bandhu--_bandhu hetuḥ_hetu atas_atas duratyayā_duratyaya teṣām_tad duratikramā_duratikrama rajju--_rajju pakṣe_pakṣa chettum_chid udgrathitum_udgranth ca_ca taiḥ_tad aśaktyā_aśakti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yadi_yadi api_api etādṛśī_etādṛśa tathā_tathā api_api mad--_mad bhaktyā_bhakti tad--_tad vinivṛttiḥ_vinivṛtti syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah mām_mad iti_iti mām_mad sarveśvaram_sarveśvara māyā--_māyā niyantāram_niyantṛ sva--_sva prapanna--_prapad vātsalya--_vātsalya nīradhim_nīradhi kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa ye_yad tādṛśa--_tādṛśa sat--_sat prasaṄgāt_prasaṅga prapadyate_prapad śaraṇam_śaraṇa gacchanti_gam te_tad etām_etad arṇavam_arṇava iva_iva apārām_apāra māyām_māyā goṣpada--_goṣpada udaka--_udaka añjalim_añjali iva_iva tām_tad tīrtvā_tṛ ānada--_ānada eka--_eka rasam_rasa prasāda--_prasāda abhimukham_abhimukha sva--_sva svāminam_svāmin mām_mad prāpnuvanti_prāp iti_iti mām_mad eva_eva iti_iti eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra mad--_mad anyeṣām_anya vidhi--_vidhi rudra--_rudra ādīnām_ādi prapattyā_prapatti tasyāḥ_tad taraṇam_taraṇa na_na iti_iti āha_ah śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah tam_tad eva_eva viditvā_vid iti_iti ādyāḥ_ādya mucukundam_mucukunda prati_prati devāḥ_deva ca_ca

varam_vara vṛṇīṣva_vṛ bhadram_bhadra te_tvad ṛte_ṛte kaivalyam_kaivalya adya_adya naḥ_mad
ekaḥ_eka eva_eva īśvaraḥ_īśvara tasya_tad bhagavān_bhagavant viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu avyayaḥ_avyaya
div.l: ghaṇṭākarṇam_ghaṇṭākarṇa prati_prati śivaḥ_śiva ca_ca mukti--_mukti pradātā_pradātṛ sarveṣām_sarva viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu eva_eva na_na saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya iti_iti

div.p: BhG 7.15

lg.l: na_na mām_mad duṣkṛtinaḥ_duṣkṛtin mūḍhāḥ_muh prapadyante_prapad nara--_nara adhamāḥ_adhama
māyayā_māyā apahṛta--_apahṛ jñānāḥ_jñāna āsuram_āsura bhāvam_bhāva āśritāḥ_āśri

div.p: bhajanti_bhaj āha_ah nareṣu_nara ye_yad adhamāḥ_adhama te_tad mām_mad na_na prapadyante_prapad na_na bhajanti_bhaj adhama--_adhama tve_tva hetuḥ_hetu -mūḍhāḥ_muh viveka--_viveka śūnyāḥ_śūnya tat_tad kutas_kutas duṣkṛtinaḥ_duṣkṛtin pāpa--_pāpa śīlāḥ_śīla atas_atas māyayā_māyā apahṛtam_apahṛ nirastam_niras śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadeśābhyām_upadeśa jātam_jan api_api jñānam_jñāna yeṣām_yad te_tad tathā_tathā ataeva_ataeva dambhaḥ_dambha darpaḥ_darpa abhimānaḥ_abhimāna ca_ca krodhaḥ_krodha pāruṣyam_pāruṣya eva_eva ca_ca iti_iti ādinā_ādi vakṣyamāṇam_vac āsuram_āsura bhāvam_bhāva svabhāvam_svabhāva prāptāḥ_prāp santaḥ_as na_na mām_mad bhajanti_bhaj

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana -_yadi evam_evam tarhi_tarhi kim_ka iti_iti nikhila--_nikhila anartha--_anartha mūla--_mūla māyā--_māyā unmūlanāya_unmūlana bhagavantam_bhagavant bhavantam_bhavat eva_eva sarve_sarva na_na pratipadyante_pratipad cira--_cira saṃcita--_saṃci durita--_durita pratibandhāt_pratibandha iti_iti āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavant na_na mām_mad iti_iti duṣkṛtinaḥ_duṣkṛtin duṣkṛtena_duṣkṛta pāpena_pāpa saha_saha nitya--_nitya yoginaḥ_yogin ataeva_ataeva nareṣu_nara madhye_madhya adhamāḥ_adhama iha_iha sādhubhiḥ_sādhu garhaṇīyāḥ_garh paratra_paratra ca_ca anartha--_anartha sahasra--_sahasra bhājaḥ_bhāj kutas_kutas duṣkṛtam_duṣkṛta anartha--_anartha hetum_hetu eva_eva sadā_sadā kurvanti_kṛ yatas_yatas mūḍhāḥ_muh idam_idam artha--_artha sādhanam_sādhana idam_idam anartha--_anartha sādhanam_sādhana iti_iti viveka--_viveka śūnyāḥ_śūnya sati_as pramāṇe_pramāṇa kutas_kutas na_na viviñcanti_vivic yatas_yatas māyayā_māyā apahṛta--_apahṛ jñānāḥ_jñāna śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya saṃghāta--_saṃghāta tādāmtya--_tādāmtya bhrānti--_bhrānti rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇatayā_pariṇam māyayā_māyā pūrva--_pūrva uktayā_vac apahṛtam_apahṛ pratibaddham_pratibandh jñānam_jñāna viveka--_viveka sāmarthyam_sāmarthya ataeva_ataeva te_tad dambhaḥ_dambha darpaḥ_darpa abhimānaḥ_abhimāna ca_ca krodhaḥ_krodha pāruṣyam_pāruṣya eva_eva ca_ca iti_iti ādinā_ādi agre_agra vakṣyamānam_vac āsuram_āsura bhāvam_bhāva hiṃsā--_hiṃsā anṛta--_anṛta ādi--_ādi svabhāvam_svabhāva āśritāḥ_āśri mad--_mad pratipatti--_pratipatti ayogyāḥ_ayogya santaḥ_as na_na mām_mad sarveśvaram_sarveśvara aho_aho daurbhāgyam_daurbhāgya teṣām_tad iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita api_api kecid_kaścit kim_ka iti_iti tvām_tvad na_na prapadyante_prapad tatra_tatra ye_yad paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita te_tad mām_mad prapadyante_prapad eva_eva paṇḍita--_paṇḍita māninaḥ_mānin eva_eva na_na mām_mad prapadyante_prapad iti_iti āha_ah na_na mām_mad iti_iti duṣkṛtinaḥ_duṣkṛtin duṣṭāḥ_duṣ ca_ca te_tad kṛtinaḥ_kṛtin paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita ca_ca iti_iti te_tad ku_ku paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita iti_iti arthaḥ_artha te_tad caturvidhāḥ_caturvidha eke_eka mūḍhāḥ_muh paśu--_paśu tulyāḥ_tulya karmiṇaḥ_karmin yat_yad uktam_vac

nūnam_nūnam daivena_daiva nihatāḥ_nihan ye_yad ca_ca acyuta--_acyuta kathā--_kathā sudhām_sudhā
hitvā_hā śṛṇvanti_śru asat--_asat gāthāḥ_gāthā purīṣam_purīṣa iva_iva viṣ--_viṣ bhujaḥ_bhuj
mukundam_mukunda kaḥ_ka vai_vai na_na seveta_sev vinā_vinā naretaraḥ_naretara iti_iti ca_ca

apare_apara nara--_nara adhamāḥ_adhama kañcid_kaścit kālam_kāla bhaktimat--_bhaktimat tvena_tva prāpta--_prāp naratvāḥ_naratva api_api ante_anta phala--_phala prāptau_prāpti na_na sādhana--_sādhana upayogaḥ_upayoga iti_iti matvā_man sva--_sva icchayā_icchā eva_eva bhakti--_bhakti tyāginaḥ_tyāgin apare_apara śāstra--_śāstra adhyāpana--_adhyāpana ādi--_ādi mattve_mattva api_api māyayā_māyā apahṛtam_apahṛ jñānam_jñāna eṣām_idam te_tad vaikuṇṭha--_vaikuṇṭha virājinī_virājin nārāyaṇa--_nārāyaṇa mūrtiḥ_mūrti eva_eva sārvakālikī_sārvakālika bhakti--_bhakti prāpyā_prāp na_na tu_tu kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa rāma--_rāma ādi--_ādi mūrtiḥ_mūrti mānuṣī_mānuṣa iti_iti yat_yad vakṣyate_vac avajānanti_avajñā mām_mad mūḍhāḥ_muh mānuṣīm_mānuṣa tanum_tanu āśritam_āśri iti_iti te_tad khalu_khalu mām_mad prapadyamānāḥ_prapad api_api na_na mām_mad prapadyante_prapad iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva apare_apara āsuram_āsura bhāvam_bhāva āśritāḥ_āśri asurāḥ_asura jarāsandha--_jarāsaṃdha ādayaḥ_ādi mad--_mad vigraham_vigraha lakṣīkṛtya_lakṣīkṛ śaraiḥ_śara vidhyanti_vyadh tathā_tathā eva_eva dṛśya--_dṛś tā--_tā ādi--_ādi hetu--_hetu mad--_mad kutarkaiḥ_kutarka mad--_mad vigraham_vigraha vaikuṇṭha--_vaikuṇṭha stham_stha api_api khaṇḍayanti_khaṇḍay eva_eva na_na tu_tu prapadyante_prapad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu ced_ced tvām_tvad eva_eva prapannāḥ_prapad vimucyante_vimuc tarhi_tarhi paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita api_api kecid_kaścit kim_ka iti_iti tvām_tvad na_na prapadyante_prapad tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na mām_mad iti_iti duṣṭāḥ_duṣ ca_ca te_tad kṛtinaḥ_kṛtin śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha kuśalāḥ_kuśala ca_ca iti_iti duṣkṛtinaḥ_duṣkṛtin ku_ku paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita te_tad mām_mad na_na prapadyante_prapad śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah

lg.l: avidyāyām_avidyā antare_antara vartamānāḥ_vṛt
svayam_svayam dhīrāḥ_dhīra paṇḍitaṃmanyamānāḥ_paṇḍitaṃmanyamāna
dandramyamāṇāḥ_dandram pariyanti_parī mūḍhā_muh
andhena_andha eva_eva nīyamānāḥ_nī yathā_yathā andhāḥ_andha

div.p: te_tad catur--_catur vidhāḥ_vidha eke_eka māyayā_māyā mūḍhāḥ_muh karma--_karman jaḍāḥ_jaḍa indra--_indra ādi--_ādi vat_vat mām_mad api_api viṣṇum_viṣṇu karma--_karman aṅgam_aṅga jīva--_jīva vat_vat karma--_karman adhīnam_adhīna manyamānāḥ_man apare_apara māyayā_māyā nara--_nara adhamāḥ_adhama vipra--_vipra ādi--_ādi kula--_kula janmanā_janman nara--_nara uttama--_uttama tām_tā prāpya_prāp api_api asat_asat kāvya--_kāvya artha--_artha āsattyā_āsatti pāmara--_pāmara tā--_tā bhājaḥ_bhāj yat_yad uktam_vac

nūnam_nūnam daivena_daiva nihatāḥ_nihan ye_yad ca_ca acyuta--_acyuta kathā--_kathā sudhām_sudhā
hitvā_hā śṛṇvanti_śru asat--_asat gāthā_gāthā purīṣam_purīṣa iva_iva viṣ--_viṣ bhujaḥ_bhuj

anye_anya māyayā_māyā apahṛta--_apahṛ jñānāḥ_jñāna sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya ādayaḥ_ādi te_tad hi_hi sārvajña--_sārvajña sārvaiśvarya--_sārvaiśvarya sarva--_sarva sraṣṭṛ--_sraṣṭṛ tva--_tva mukti--_mukti da--_da tva--_tva ādi_ādi dharmaiḥ_dharma śruti--_śruti sahasra--_sahasra prasiddham_prasidh api_api mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara apalapantaḥ_apalap prakṛtim_prakṛti eva_eva sarva--_sarva sraṣṭrīm_sraṣṭṛ mokṣa--_mokṣa dātrīm_dātṛ ca_ca kalpayanti_kalpay tatra_tatra tādṛśa--_tādṛśa kuṭila--_kuṭila kuyukti--_kuyukti śatāni_śata udbhāvayantī_udbhāvay māyayā_māyā eva_eva hetuḥ_hetu kecid_kaścit tu_tu māyayā_māyā eva_eva āsuram_āsura bhāvam_bhāva āśritāḥ_āśri nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa cit--_cit mātra--_mātra vādinaḥ_vādin asurāḥ_asura yathā_yathā nikhila--_nikhila ānanda--_ānanda karam_kara mad--_mad vigraham_vigraha śaraiḥ_śara vidhyanti_vyadh tathā_tathā adṛśya--_adṛśya tva--_tva ādi--_ādi hetubhiḥ_hetu te_tad nitya--_nitya caitanya--_caitanya ātmatayā_ātmatā śruti--_śruti prasiddham_prasidh api_api tam_tad khaṇḍayanti_khaṇḍay iti_iti tatra_tatra api_api tādṛśa--_tādṛśa buddhi--_buddhi utpādanī_utpādana
BhG 7.16

lg.l: catur-vidhāḥ_catur-vidha bhajante_bhaj mām_mad janāḥ_jana sukṛtinaḥ_sukṛtin arjuna_arjuna
ārtaḥ_ārta jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu artha--_artha arthī_arthin jñānī_jñānin ca_ca bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha

div.p: bhajanti_bhaj te_tad sukṛti--_sukṛti tāratamyena_tāratamya catur--_catur vidhāḥ_vidha iti_iti āha_ah catur--_catur vidhāḥ_vidha iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva janmasu_janman ye_yad kṛta--_kṛ puṇyāḥ_puṇya te_tad mām_mad bhajanti_bhaj te_tad caturvidhāḥ_caturvidha ārtaḥ_ārta vega--_vega ādi--_ādi abhibhūtaḥ_abhibhū sa_tad yadi_yadi pūrvam_pūrvam kṛta--_kṛ puṇyaḥ_puṇya tarhi_tarhi mām_mad bhajati_bhaj anyathā_anyathā kṣudra--_kṣudra devatā--_devatā bhajanena_bhajana saṃsarati_saṃsṛ evam_evam uttaratra_uttaratra api_api draṣṭavyam_dṛś jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna icchuḥ_icchu artha--_artha arthī_arthin atra_atra vā_vā paratra_paratra vā_vā bhoga--_bhoga sādhana--_sādhana bhūtaḥ_bhū artha--_artha lipsuḥ_lipsu jñānī_jñānin ca_ca ātma--_ātman vid_vid

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ye_yad tu_tu āsura--_āsura bhāva--_bhāva rahitāḥ_rahita puṇya--_puṇya karmāṇaḥ_karman vivekinaḥ_vivekin te_tad puṇya--_puṇya karma--_karman tāratamyena_tāratamya catur--_catur vidhāḥ_vidha santaḥ_as mām_mad bhajante_bhaj krameṇa_krameṇa ca_ca kāmanā--_kāmanā rāhityena_rāhitya mad--_mad prasādāt_prasāda māyām_māyā taranti_tṛ iti_iti āha_ah ye_yad sukṛtinaḥ_sukṛtin pūrva--_pūrva janma--_janman kṛta--_kṛ puṇya--_puṇya saṃcayāḥ_saṃcaya janāḥ_jana saphala--_saphala janmānaḥ_janman te_tad eva_eva na_na anye_anya te_tad mām_mad bhajante_bhaj sevante_sev he_he ca_ca trayaḥ_tri sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma ekaḥ_eka akāmaḥ_akāma iti_iti evam_evam caturvidhāḥ_caturvidha ārtaḥ_ārta ārtyā_ārti śatru--_śatru vyādhi--_vyādhi ādi--_ādi āpadā_āpad grastaḥ_gras tad--_tad nivṛttim_nivṛtti icchan_iṣ yathā_yathā makha--_makha bhaṅgena_bhaṅga kupitaḥ_kup indre_indra varṣati_vṛṣ vraja--_vraja vāsī_vāsin janaḥ_jana yathā_yathā vā_vā jarāsandha--_jarāsaṃdha kārā--_kārā āgāra--_āgāra vartī_vartin rāja--_rājan nicayaḥ_nicaya dyūta--_dyūta sabhāyām_sabhā vastra--_vastra ākarṣaṇe_ākarṣaṇa draupadī_draupadī ca_ca grāha--_grāha grastaḥ_gras gaja--_gaja indraḥ_indra ca_ca jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna arthī_arthin mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu yathā_yathā mucukundaḥ_mucukunda yathā_yathā vā_vā maithilaḥ_maithila janakaḥ_janaka śrutadevaḥ_śrutadeva ca_ca nivṛtte_nivṛt mausale_mausala yathā_yathā ca_ca uddhavaḥ_uddhava artha--_artha arthī_arthin iha_iha vā_vā paratra_paratra vā_vā yat_yad bhoga--_bhoga upakaraṇam_upakaraṇa tad--_tad lipsuḥ_lipsu tatra_tatra iha_iha yathā_yathā sugrīvaḥ_sugrīva vibhīṣaṇaḥ_vibhīṣaṇa ca_ca yathā_yathā ca_ca upamanyuḥ_upamanyu paratra_paratra yathā_yathā dhruvaḥ_dhruva ete_etad trayaḥ_tri api_api bhagavat--_bhagavant bhajanena_bhajana māyām_māyā taranti_tṛ tatra_tatra jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu jñāna--_jñāna utpattyā_utpatti sākṣāt_sākṣāt eva_eva māyām_māyā tarati_tṛ ārtaḥ_ārta artha--_artha arthī_arthin ca_ca jijñāsu--_jijñāsu tvam_tva prāpya_prāp iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa ārtasya_ārta artha--_artha arthinaḥ_arthin ca_ca jijñāsu--_jijñāsu tva--_tva sambhavāt_sambhava jijñāsoḥ_jijñāsu ca_ca ārta--_ārta tva--_tva jñāna--_jñāna upakaraṇa--_upakaraṇa artha--_artha arthi--_arthin tva--_tva sambhavāt_sambhava ubhayoḥ_ubhaya madhye_madhya jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu uddiṣṭaḥ_uddiś

tat_tad ete_etad trayaḥ_tri sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma vyākhyātāḥ_vyākhyā niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma caturthaḥ_caturtha idānīm_idānīm ucyate_vac jñānī_jñānin ca_ca jñānam_jñāna bhagavat--_bhagavant tattva--_tattva sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra tena_tad nitya--_nitya yuktaḥ_yuj jñānī_jñānin tīrṇa--_tṛ māyaḥ_māyā nivṛtta--_nivṛt sarva--_sarva kāmaḥ_kāma ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra yasya_yad kasya_ka api_api niṣkāma--_niṣkāma prema--_preman bhaktasya_bhakta jñāninī--_jñāninī antar_antar bhāva--_bhāva arthaḥ_artha he_he bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha tvam_tvad api_api jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu vā_vā jñānī_jñānin vā_vā iti_iti katamaḥ_katama aham_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta iti_iti mā_mā śaṅkiṣṭhāḥ_śaṅk iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra niṣkāma--_niṣkāma bhaktaḥ_bhakta jñānī_jñānin yathā_yathā sanakādiḥ_sanakādi yathā_yathā nāradaḥ_nārada yathā_yathā prahlādaḥ_prahlāda yathā_yathā pṛthuḥ_pṛthu yathā_yathā vā_vā śukaḥ_śuka niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma śuddha--_śudh prema--_preman bhaktaḥ_bhakta yathā_yathā gopikā--_gopikā ādiḥ_ādi yathā_yathā vā_vā akrūra--_akrūra yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira ādiḥ_ādi kaṃsa--_kaṃsa śiśupāla--_śiśupāla ādayaḥ_ādi tu_tu bhayāt_bhaya dveṣāt_dveṣa ca_ca santata--_saṃtata bhagavat--_bhagavant cintā--_cintā parāḥ_para api_api na_na bhaktāḥ_bhakta bhagavat--_bhagavant anurakteḥ_anurakti abhāvāt_abhāva bhagavat--_bhagavant anurakti--_anurakti rūpāyāḥ_rūpa tu_tu bhakteḥ_bhakti svarūpam_svarūpa sādhanam_sādhana bhedāḥ_bheda tathā_tathā bhaktānām_bhakta api_api bhagavat--_bhagavant bhakti--_bhakti rasāyane_rasāyana asmābhiḥ_mad sa_sa viśeṣam_viśeṣa prapañcitāḥ_prapañcita iti_iti iha_iha uparamyate_uparam

bhajante_bhaj āha_ah sukṛtam_sukṛta varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama ācāra--_ācāra lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa dharmaḥ_dharma tadvantaḥ_tadvat santaḥ_as mām_mad bhajante_bhaj tatra_tatra ārtaḥ_ārta roga--_roga ādi--_ādi āpad--_āpad grastaḥ_gras tad--_tad nivṛtti--_nivṛtti kāmaḥ_kāma jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna arthī_arthin vyākaraṇa--_vyākaraṇa ādi--_ādi śāstra--_śāstra jñāna--_jñāna arthī_arthin artha--_artha arthī_arthin kṣiti--_kṣiti gaja--_gaja turaga--_turaga kāminī--_kāminī kanaka--_kanaka ādi--_ādi aihika--_aihika pāratrika--_pāratrika bhoga--_bhoga arthī_arthin iti_iti ete_etad trayaḥ_tri sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma gṛhasthāḥ_gṛhastha jñānī_jñānin viśuddha--_viśudh antaḥkaraṇaḥ_antaḥkaraṇa sannyāsī_saṃnyāsin iti_iti caturthaḥ_caturtha ayam_idam niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma iti_iti ete_etad pradhānībhūta--_pradhānībhū bhakti--_bhakti adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin catvāraḥ_catur nirūpitāḥ_nirūpay tatra_tatra ādimeṣu_ādima triṣu_tri karma--_karman miśrā_miśra bhaktiḥ_bhakti antime_antima caturthe_caturtha jñāna--_jñāna miśrā_miśra sarva--_sarva dvārāṇi_dvāra saṃnyasya_saṃnyas iti_iti agrima--_agrima granthe_grantha yoga--_yoga miśrā_miśra api_api vakṣyate_vac jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman ādi--_ādi amiśrā_amiśra kevalā_kevala bhaktiḥ_bhakti yā_yad sā_tad tu_tu saptama--_saptama adhyāya--_adhyāya ārambhe_ārambha eva_eva mayi_mad āsakta--_āsañj manaḥ_manas pārtha_pārtha iti_iti anena_idam uktā_vac punar_punar ca_ca aṣṭame_aṣṭama api_api adhyāye_adhyāya ananya--_ananya cetāḥ_cetas satatam_satatam 8.14_8.14 iti_iti anena_idam navame_navama mahātmānaḥ_mahātman tu_tu mām_mad pārtha_pārtha iti_iti śloka--_śloka dvayena_dvaya ananyāḥ_ananya cintayantaḥ_cintay mām_mad iti_iti anena_idam ca_ca nirūpayitavyā_nirūpay iti_iti

pradhānībhūtā_pradhānībhū kevalā_kevala iti_iti dvividhā_dvividha eva_eva bhaktiḥ_bhakti madhyame_madhyama asmin_idam adhyāya--_adhyāya ṣaṭke_ṣaṭka bhagavatā_bhagavant uktā_vac yā_yad tu_tu tṛtīyā_tṛtīya guṇībhūtā_guṇībhū bhaktiḥ_bhakti karmaṇi_karman jñānini_jñānin yogini_yogin ca_ca karma--_karman ādi--_ādi phala--_phala siddhi--_siddhi arthā_artha dṛśyate_dṛś tasyāḥ_tad prādhānya--_prādhānya abhāvāt_abhāva bhakti--_bhakti tva--_tva vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa karma--_karman ādīnām_ādi prādhānyāt_prādhānya prādhānyena_prādhānya vyapadeśāḥ_vyapadeśa bhavanti_bhū iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya karma--_karman tva--_tva jñāna--_jñāna tva--_tva yoga--_yoga tva--_tva vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa tadvatām_tadvat api_api karmi--_karmin tva--_tva jñāni--_jñānin tva--_tva yogi--_yogin tva--_tva vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa bhakta--_bhakta tva--_tva vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa phalam_phala ca_ca sa_sa kāma--_kāma karmaṇaḥ_karman svargaḥ_svarga niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇaḥ_karman jñāna--_jñāna yogaḥ_yoga jñāna--_jñāna yogayoḥ_yoga nirvāṇa--_nirvāṇa mokṣaḥ_mokṣa iti_iti

atha_atha dvidhāyāḥ_dvidha bhakteḥ_bhakti phalam_phala ucyate_vac tatra_tatra pradhānībhūtāsu_pradhānībhū bhaktiṣu_bhakti madhye_madhya ārta--_ārta ādiṣu_ādi triṣu_tri yāḥ_yad karma--_karman miśrāḥ_miśra tisraḥ_tri sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma bhaktayaḥ_bhakti tāsām_tad phalam_phala tad--_tad tad--_tad kāma--_kāma prāptiḥ_prāpti viṣaya--_viṣaya sādguṇyāt_sādguṇya tad--_tad ante_anta sukha--_sukha aiśvarya--_aiśvarya pradhāna--_pradhāna sālokya--_sālokya mokṣa--_mokṣa prāptiḥ_prāpti ca_ca na_na tu_tu karma--_karman phala--_phala svarga--_svarga bhoga--_bhoga ante_anta iva_iva pātaḥ_pāta yat_yad vakṣyate_vac yānti_yā mad--_mad yājinaḥ_yājin api_api mām_mad iti_iti caturthyā_caturtha jñāna--_jñāna miśrāyāḥ_miśra tatas_tatas utkṛṣṭāyāḥ_utkṛṣṭa tu_tu phalam_phala śānta--_śam ratiḥ_rati sanaka--_sanaka ādiṣu_ādi iva_iva karma--_karman miśrā_miśra bhaktiḥ_bhakti yadi_yadi niṣkāmā_niṣkāma syāt_as tadā_tadā tasyāḥ_tad phalam_phala jñāna--_jñāna miśrā_miśra bhaktiḥ_bhakti tasyāḥ_tad phalam_phala uktam_vac kvacid_kvacid ca_ca svabhāvāt_svabhāva eva_eva dā̆sa--_dāsa ādi--_ādi bhakta--_bhakta saṅga--_saṅga uttha--_uttha vāsanā_vāsanā vaśāt_vaśa vā_vā jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman ādi--_ādi miśra--_miśra bhaktimatām_bhaktimat api_api dāsya--_dāsya ādi--_ādi premā_preman syāt_as kintu_kiṃtu aiśvarya--_aiśvarya pradhānam_pradhāna eva_eva iti_iti

atha_atha jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman ādi--_ādi amiśrāyāḥ_amiśra śuddhāyāḥ_śuddha ananya--_ananya akiñcana--_akiñcana uttama--_uttama ādi--_ādi paryāyāḥ_paryāya bhakteḥ_bhakti bahu--_bahu prabhedāyāḥ_prabheda dāsya--_dāsya sakhī--_sakhī ādi--_ādi prema--_preman vat_vat pārṣada--_pārṣada tvam_tva eva_eva phalam_phala iti_iti ādikam_ādika śrī--_śrī bhāgavata--_bhāgavata ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā atrā_atra api_api prasaṅga--_prasaṅga vaśāt_vaśa sādhya--_sādhay bhakti--_bhakti vivekaḥ_viveka saṃkṣipya_saṃkṣip darśitaḥ_darśay

baladevaḥ_baladeva tarhi_tarhi tvām_tvad ke_ka prapadyante_prapad tatra_tatra āha_ah catur--_catur vidhāḥ_vidha iti_iti su_su kṛtinaḥ_kṛtin su_su paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita sva--_sva varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama ucita--_ucita karmaṇā_karman mad--_mad ekānti--_ekāntin bhāvena_bhāva ca_ca sampannāḥ_sampad janāḥ_jana mām_mad bhajante_bhaj te_tad catur--_catur vidhāḥ_vidha tatra_tatra ārtaḥ_ārta śatru--_śatru kleśa--_kleśa ādi--_ādi āpad--_āpad grastaḥ_gras tad--_tad vināśa--_vināśa icchuḥ_icchu gaja--_gaja indra--_indra ādiḥ_ādi jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman svarūpa--_svarūpa jñāna--_jñāna icchuḥ_icchu śaunaka--_śaunaka ādiḥ_ādi jñānī_jñānin śeṣa--_śeṣa tvena_tva śeṣi--_śeṣin tvena_tva para--_para ātmānam_ātman ca_ca mām_mad jñātavān_jñā śuka--_śuka ādiḥ_ādi eṣu_idam ārta--_ārta ādayaḥ_ādi sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma jñānī_jñānin tu_tu niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma ārta--_ārta artha--_artha arthinoḥ_arthin paratra_paratra jijñāsu--_jijñāsu tā--_tā sampattaye_sampatti tayoḥ_tad antarāle_antarāla jijñāsoḥ_jijñāsu upanyāsaḥ_upanyāsa
BhG 7.17

lg.l: teṣām_tad jñānī_jñānin nitya--_nitya yuktaḥ_yuj eka--_eka bhaktiḥ_bhakti viśiṣyate_viśiṣ
priyaḥ_priya hi_hi jñāninaḥ_jñānin atyartham_atyartham aham_mad sa_tad ca_ca mama_mad priyaḥ_priya

div.p: āha_ah teṣām_tad madhye_madhya jñānī_jñānin viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ hetavaḥ_hetu nitya--_nitya yuktaḥ_yuj mad--_mad niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā ekasmin_eka mayi_mad eva_eva bhaktiḥ_bhakti yasya_yad saḥ_tad jñāninaḥ_jñānin deha--_deha ādi--_ādi abhimāna--_abhimāna abhāvena_abhāva citta--_citta vikṣepa--_vikṣepa abhāvāt_abhāva nitya--_nitya yukta--_yuj tvam_tva ekānta--_ekānta bhakti--_bhakti tvam_tva ca_ca sambhavati_sambhū na_na anyasya_anya ataeva_ataeva hi_hi tasya_tad aham_mad atyantam_atyantam priyaḥ_priya sa_tad ca_ca mama_mad tasmāt_tasmāt etaiḥ_etad nitya--_nitya yukta--_yuj tva--_tva ādibhiḥ_ādi caturbhiḥ_catur hetubhiḥ_hetu saḥ_tad uttamaḥ_uttama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu na_na mām_mad duṣkṛtinaḥ_duṣkṛtin mūḍhāḥ_muh prapadyante_prapad nara--_nara adhamāḥ_adhama iti_iti anena_idam tad--_tad vilakṣaṇāḥ_vilakṣaṇa sukṛtinaḥ_sukṛtin mām_mad bhajante_bhaj iti_iti arthāt_artha prāpte_prāp api_api teṣām_tad cāturvidhyam_cāturvidhya caturvidhāḥ_caturvidha bhajante_bhaj mām_mad iti_iti anena_idam sukṛtinaḥ_sukṛtin eva_eva nirviśeṣāt_nirviśeṣa iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah ca_ca caturvidhānām_caturvidha api_api sukṛti--_sukṛtin tve_tva niyate_niyam api_api sukṛta--_sukṛta ādhikyena_ādhikya niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tayā_tā prema--_preman ādhikyāt_ādhikya tatas_tatas iti_iti

caturvidhānām_caturvidha teṣām_tad madhye_madhya jñānī_jñānin tattva--_tattva jñānavān_jñānavat nivṛtta--_nivṛt sarva--_sarva kāmaḥ_kāma viśiṣyate_viśiṣ sarvatas_sarvatas atiricyate_atiric sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yatas_yatas nitya--_nitya yuktaḥ_yuj bhagavati_bhagavant pratyak--_pratyañc abhinne_abhinna sadā_sadā samāhita--_samāhita cetāḥ_cetas vikṣepaka--_vikṣepaka abhāvāt_abhāva ataeva_ataeva eka--_eka bhaktiḥ_bhakti ekasmin_eka bhagavati_bhagavant eva_eva bhaktiḥ_bhakti anuraktiḥ_anurakti yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā tasya_tad anurakti--_anurakti viṣaya--_viṣaya antara--_antara abhāvāt_abhāva yasmāt_yad priyaḥ_priya nirupādhi--_nirupādhi prema--_preman āspadam_āspada atyartham_atyartham atyanta--_atyanta atiśayena_atiśaya jñāninaḥ_jñānin aham_mad pratyak--_pratyañc abhinnaḥ_abhinna paramātmā_paramātman ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt sa_tad mama_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara priyaḥ_priya ātmā_ātman priyaḥ_priya atiśayena_atiśaya bhavati_bhū iti_iti śruti--_śruti lokayoḥ_loka prasiddham_prasidh eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah teṣām_tad madhye_madhya jñānī_jñānin viśiṣyate_viśiṣ śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha nitya--_nitya yuktaḥ_yuj nityam_nityam mayi_mad yujyate_yuj iti_iti saḥ_tad jñāna--_jñāna abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ citta--_citta tvāt_tva manasi_manas aikāgra--_aikāgra cittaḥ_citta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ārta--_ārta ādyāḥ_ādya trayaḥ_tri tu_tu na_na evambhūtāḥ_evambhūta iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu sarvaḥ_sarva api_api jñānī_jñānin jñāna--_jñāna vaiyarthya--_vaiyarthya bhayāt_bhaya tvām_tvad bhajate_bhaj āha_ah ekā_eka mukhyā_mukhya pradhānībhūtam_pradhānībhū yasya_yad saḥ_tad yat_yat vā_vā ekā_eka bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva tathā_tathā eva_eva asaktimat--_asaktimat tvāt_tva yasya_yad sa_tad nāma--_nāman mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva jñānī_jñānin iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva evambhūtasya_evambhūta jñāninaḥ_jñānin aham_mad śyāma--_śyāma sundara--_sundara ākāraḥ_ākāra atyartham_atyartham atiśayena_atiśaya priyaḥ_priya sādhana--_sādhana sādhya--_sādhay daśayoḥ_daśā parihātum_parihā aśakyaḥ_aśakya ye_yad yathā_yathā mām_mad prapadyante_prapad iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya mama_mad api_api sa_tad priyaḥ_priya

baladevaḥ_baladeva -_catur jñāninaḥ_jñānin śraiṣṭhyam_śraiṣṭhya āha_ah teṣām_tad jñānī_jñānin viśiṣyate_viśiṣ śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha bhavati_bhū yat_yat asau_adas nitya--_nitya yuktaḥ_yuj eka--_eka bhaktiḥ_bhakti ca_ca ārta--_ārta vināśa--_vināśa ādi--_ādi kāmanā--_kāmanā virahāt_viraha nityam_nityam mayā_mad yogavān_yogavat tu_tu yāvat_yāvat kāmita--_kāmay prāptiḥ_prāpti mad--_mad yoge_yoga ekasmin_eka mayi_mad eva_eva jñāninaḥ_jñānin bhaktiḥ_bhakti ārta--_ārta ādeḥ_ādi tu_tu sva--_sva kāmite_kāmay tad--_tad pradātṛ--_pradātṛ tvena_tva mayi_mad ca_ca atas_atas jñānī_jñānin tatas_tatas śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha
