a_a tṛpyan_tṛp āha_ah priyaḥ_priya hi_hi iti_iti jñāninaḥ_jñānin hi_hi aham_mad atyartham_atyartham priyaḥ_priya prema--_preman āspadam_āspada sa_tad hi_hi mad--_mad priya--_priya tā--_tā sudhā--_sudhā sindhu--_sindhu nimagnaḥ_nimajj na_na anyat_anya kiñcid_kaścit anusandhatte_anusaṃdhā tasya_tad mad--_mad priya--_priya tā--_tā parimitā_parimā iti_iti bodhayitum_bodhay atyartha--_atyartha śabdaḥ_śabda sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña ananta--_ananta śaktiḥ_śakti ca_ca aham_mad yām_yad vaktum_vac na_na śaknoti_śak iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad ca_ca jñānī_jñānin ye_yad yathā_yathā mām_mad iti_iti ādi--_ādi nyāyena_nyāya tathā_tathā eva_eva mama_mad priyaḥ_priya mama_mad api_api tad--_tad priya--_priya tā_tā tadvat_tadvat parimitā_parimā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 7.18

lg.l: udārāḥ_udāra sarve_sarva eva_eva ete_etad jñānī_jñānin tu_tu ātmā_ātman eva_eva me_mad matam_man
āsthitaḥ_āsthā sa_tad hi_hi yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman mām_mad eva_eva anuttamām_anuttama gatim_gati

div.p: saṃsaranti_saṃsṛ āha_ah sarve_sarva api_api ete_etad udārāḥ_udāra mahāntaḥ_mahat mokṣa--_mokṣa bhājaḥ_bhāj eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha jñānī_jñānin tu_tu punar_punar ātmā_ātman eva_eva iti_iti me_mad matam_mata niścayaḥ_niścaya hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt sa_tad jñānī_jñānin yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman mad--_mad eka--_eka cittaḥ_citta san_as na_na vidyate_vid uttamā_uttama yasyāḥ_yad tām_tad anuttamām_anuttama gatim_gati mām_mad eva_eva āsthitaḥ_āsthā āśritavān_āśri mad--_mad vyatiriktam_vyatiric anyat_anya phalam_phala na_na manyate_man iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad kim_kim ārta--_ārta ādayaḥ_ādi tava_tvad na_na priyāḥ_priya na_na atyartham_atyartham iti_iti viśeṣaṇāt_viśeṣaṇa iti_iti āha_ah udārāḥ_udāra iti_iti ete_etad ārta--_ārta ādayaḥ_ādi sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma api_api mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta sarve_sarva trayaḥ_tri api_api udārāḥ_udāra eva_eva utkṛṣṭāḥ_utkṛṣṭa eva_eva pūrva--_pūrva janma--_janman arjita--_arjay aneka--_aneka sukṛta--_sukṛta rāśi--_rāśi tvāt_tva anyathā_anyathā hi_hi mām_mad na_na bhajeyuḥ_bhaj eva_eva ārtasya_ārta jijñāsoḥ_jijñāsu artha--_artha arthinaḥ_arthin ca_ca mad--_mad vimukhasya_vimukha kṣudra--_kṣudra devatā--_devatā bhaktasya_bhakta api_api bahulam_bahula upalambhāt_upalambha atas_atas mama_mad priyāḥ_priya eva_eva te_tad na_na hi_hi jñānavān_jñānavat ajñaḥ_ajña vā_vā kaścid_kaścit api_api bhaktaḥ_bhakta mama_mad apriyaḥ_apriya bhavati_bhū kintu_kiṃtu yasya_yad yādṛśī_yādṛśa mayi_mad prītiḥ_prīti mama_mad api_api tatra_tatra tādṛśī_tādṛśa prītiḥ_prīti iti_iti svabhāva--_svabhāva siddham_sidh etat_etad tatra_tatra sa_sa kāmānām_kāma trayāṇām_tri kāmyamānam_kāmay api_api priyam_priya aham_mad api_api priyaḥ_priya jñāninaḥ_jñānin tu_tu priya--_priya antara--_antara śūnyasya_śūnya aham_mad eva_eva niratiśaya--_niratiśaya prīti--_prīti viṣayaḥ_viṣaya atas_atas saḥ_tad api_api mama_mad niratiśaya--_niratiśaya prīti--_prīti viṣayaḥ_viṣaya iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa anyathā_anyathā hi_hi mama_mad kṛtajña--_kṛtajña tā_tā na_na syāt_as kṛtaghna--_kṛtaghna tā_tā ca_ca syāt_as ataeva_ataeva atyartham_atyartham iti_iti viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa upāttam_upadā prāk_prāk yathā_yathā hi_hi yat_yad eva_eva vidyayā_vidyā karoti_kṛ śraddhayā_śraddhā upaniṣadā_upaniṣad tat_tad eva_eva vīryavattaram_vīryavattara bhavati_bhū iti_iti atra_atra tarap--_tarap arthasya_artha vivakṣita--_vivakṣita tvāt_tva vidyā--_vidyā divya--_divya atirekena_atireka kṛtam_kṛ api_api karma_karman vīryavat_vīryavat bhavati_bhū eva_eva tathā_tathā atyartham_atyartham jñānī_jñānin bhaktaḥ_bhakta mama_mad priyaḥ_priya iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti yaḥ_yad jñāna--_jñāna vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka bhaktaḥ_bhakta saḥ_tad api_api priyaḥ_priya iti_iti paryavasyati_paryavasā eva_eva atyartham_atyartham iti_iti viśeṣaṇasya_viśeṣaṇa vivakṣita--_vivakṣita tvāt_tva uktam_vac hi_hi ye_yad yathā_yathā mām_mad prapadyante_prapad tān_tad tathā_tathā eva_eva bhajāmi_bhaj aham_mad iti_iti atas_atas mām_mad ātma--_ātman tvena_tva jñānavān_jñānavat jñānī_jñānin ātmā_ātman eva_eva na_na mattaḥ_mad bhinnaḥ_bhid tu_tu aham_mad eva_eva saḥ_tad iti_iti mama_mad matam_mata niścayaḥ_niścaya tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda sa_sa kāma--_kāma bheda--_bheda darśi--_darśin tritaya--_tritaya apekṣayā_apekṣā niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tva--_tva bheda--_bheda adarśi--_adarśin tva--_tva viśeṣa--_viśeṣa dyotana--_dyotana arthaḥ_artha yasmāt_yad sa_tad jñānī_jñānin yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman sadā_sadā mayi_mad samāhita--_samāhita cittaḥ_citta san_as mām_mad bhagavantam_bhagavat anantam_ananta ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana ātmānam_ātman eva_eva anuttamām_anuttama sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭām_utkṛṣṭa gatim_gati gantavyam_gam paramam_parama phalam_phala āsthitaḥ_āsthā aṅgīkṛtavān_aṅgīkṛ na_na tu_tu mad--_mad arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tarhi_tarhi kim_kim ārta--_ārta ādyāḥ_ādya trayaḥ_tri tava_tvad na_na priyāḥ_priya tatra_tatra na_na hi_hi na_na hi_hi iti_iti āha_ah udārāḥ_udāra iti_iti ye_yad mām_mad bhajante_bhaj mattaḥ_mad kiṃcid_kaścit kāmitam_kāmay mayā_mad api_api ditsitam_dits gṛhṇanti_grah te_tad bhakta--_bhakta vatsalāya_vatsala mahyam_mad bahu--_bahu pradāyinaḥ_pradāyin priyāḥ_priya eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva jñānī_jñānin tu_tu ātmā_ātman evā_eva iti_iti sa_tad hi_hi bhajan_bhaj atha_atha ca_ca mattaḥ_mad kim_ka api_api svarga--_svarga apavarga--_apavarga ādikam_ādika na_na ākaṅkṣate_ākaṅkṣ iti_iti atas_atas tad--_tad adhīnasya_adhīna mama_mad saḥ_tad ātmā_ātman eva_eva iti_iti mama_mad matam_man matiḥ_mati yatas_yatas sa_tad mām_mad śyāma--_śyāma sundara--_sundara ākāram_ākāra eva_eva anuttamām_anuttama sarva--_sarva uttamām_uttama gatim_gati prāpya_prāp āsthitaḥ_āsthā niścitavān_niści mama_mad nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa svarūpa--_svarūpa brahma--_brahman nirvāṇam_nirvāṇa bhāvaḥ_bhāva evam_evam ca_ca niṣkāma--_niṣkāma pradhānībhūta--_pradhānībhū bhaktimān_bhaktimat jñānī_jñānin bhakta--_bhakta vatsalena_vatsala bhagavatā_bhagavant sva--_sva ātmatvena_ātmatva abhimanyate_abhiman kevala--_kevala bhaktimān_bhaktimat ananyaḥ_ananya tu_tu ātmanaḥ_ātman api_api ādhikyena_ādhikya yat_yad uktam_vac na_na tathā_tathā me_mad priyatamaḥ_priyatama ātma--_ātman yoniḥ_yoni na_na śaṅkaraḥ_śaṃkara
na_na ca_ca saṅkarṣaṇaḥ_saṃkarṣaṇa na_na śrīḥ_śrī na_na eva_eva ātmā_ātman ca_ca yathā_yathā bhavān_bhavat
na_na aham_mad ātmānam_ātman āśāse_āśās mad--_mad bhaktaiḥ_bhakta sādhubhiḥ_sādhu vinā_vinā
ātma--_ātman ārāmaḥ_ārāma api_api arīramat_ram iti_iti ādi_ādi

baladevaḥ_baladeva -_nanu ārta--_ārta ādayaḥ_ādi tava_tvad priyāḥ_priya na_na bhavanti_bhū mā_mā evam_evam atyartham_atyartham iti_iti viśeṣaṇāt_viśeṣaṇa iti_iti āha_ah udārāḥ_udāra iti_iti sarve_sarva eva_eva ete_etad ārta--_ārta ādayaḥ_ādi udārāḥ_udāra vadānyāḥ_vadānya udāraḥ_udāra dātṛ--_dātṛ mahatoḥ_mahat iti_iti amaraḥ_amara ye_yad mām_mad bhajantaḥ_bhaj mayā_mad ditsitam_dits kiṃcid_kaścit sva--_sva abhīṣṭam_abhīṣ mattaḥ_mad gṛhṇanti_grah te_tad bhakta--_bhakta vātsalyam_vātsalya mahyam_mad prayacchantaḥ_prayam mama_mad bahu--_bahu pradāḥ_prada priyāḥ_priya eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva jñānī_jñānin tu_tu mama_mad ātmā_ātman eva_eva iti_iti matam_man hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt sa_tad jī̀iānī_jīiānin yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman mad--_mad arpita--_arpay manāḥ_manas mattaḥ_mad anyat_anya kiṃcid_kaścit api_api an_an icchan_iṣ atipriyeṇa_atipriya mayā_mad vinā_vinā lavam_lava api_api sthātum_sthā asamarthaḥ_asamartha mām_mad eva_eva sarva--_sarva uttamām_uttama matim_mati prāpyam_prāp āsthitaḥ_āsthā niścitavān_niści atas_atas sthātum_sthā asamarthasya_asamartha mama_mad ātmā_ātman eva_eva saḥ_tad āha_ah jñāna--_jñāna bhaja--_bhaja tva--_tva asiddheḥ_asiddhi bhajatām_bhaj cāturvidhya--_cāturvidhya asiddheḥ_asiddhi mokṣe_mokṣa bheda--_bheda vākya--_vākya vyākopāt_vyākopa ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt ati_ati priya--_priya tvāt_tva eva_eva tatra_tatra ātmā_ātman iti_iti uktiḥ_ukti mama_mad ātmā_ātman bhadrasenaḥ_bhadrasena itivat_itivat ātmā_ātman eva_eva manaḥ_manas eva_eva matam_man iti_iti apare_apara
BhG 7.19

lg.l: bahūnām_bahu janmanām_janman ante_anta jñānavān_jñānavat mām_mad prapadyate_prapad
vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva sarvam_sarva iti_iti sa_tad mahātmā_mahātman su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha

div.p: āha_ah bahūnām_bahu janmanām_janman kiṃcid_kaścit kiṃcid_kaścit puṇya--_puṇya upacayena_upacaya ante_anta carame_carama janmani_janman jñānavān_jñānavat san_as sarvam_sarva idam_idam carācaram_carācara vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva eva_eva iti_iti sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi mām_mad prapadyate_prapad bhajati_bhaj atas_atas sa_tad mahātmā_mahātman aparicchinna--_aparicchinna dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt bahūnām_bahu iti_iti bahūnām_bahu janmanām_janman kiṃcid_kaścit kiṃcid_kaścit puṇya--_puṇya upacaya--_upacaya hetūnām_hetu ante_anta carame_carama janmani_janman sarva--_sarva sukṛta--_sukṛta vipāka--_vipāka rūpe_rūpa vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva sarvam_sarva iti_iti jñānavān_jñānavat san_as mām_mad nirupādhi--_nirupādhi prema--_preman āspadam_āspada prapadyate_prapad sarvadā_sarvadā samasta--_samasta sakalam_sakala idam_idam aham_mad ca_ca vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva iti_iti dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi sarva--_sarva premṇām_preman mayi_mad eva_eva paryavasāyi--_paryavasāyin tvāt_tva atas_atas saḥ_tad evam_evam jñāna--_jñāna pūrvaka--_pūrvaka mad--_mad bhaktimān_bhaktimat mahātmā_mahātman atyanta--_atyanta śuddha--_śudh antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa tvāt_tva jīvanmuktaḥ_jīvanmukta sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa na_na tad--_tad samaḥ_sama anyaḥ_anya asti_as adhikaḥ_adhika tu_tu na_na asti_as eva_eva atas_atas su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya sahasreṣu_sahasra duḥkhena_duḥkha api_api labdhum_labh aśakyaḥ_aśakya atas_atas sa_tad niratiśaya--_niratiśaya mad--_mad prīti--_prīti viṣayaḥ_viṣaya iti_iti yuktam_yuj eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

brūṣe_brū prāpnoti_prāp kintu_kiṃtu kiyataḥ_kiyat samayāt_samaya anantaram_anantaram sa_tad jñānī_jñānin bhakti--_bhakti adhikārī_adhikārin bhavati_bhū iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah bahūnām_bahu iti_iti vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva sarvam_sarva iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra vāsudeva--_vāsudeva darśī_darśin jñānavān_jñānavat bahūnām_bahu janmanām_janman ante_anta mām_mad prapadyate_prapad tādṛśa--_tādṛśa sādhu--_sādhu yādṛcchika--_yādṛcchika saṅga--_saṅga vaśāt_vaśa mad--_mad prapattim_prapatti prāpnoti_prāp sa_tad ca_ca jñānī_jñānin bhaktaḥ_bhakta mahātmā_mahātman su_su sthira--_sthira cittaḥ_citta su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya sahasreṣu_sahasra iti_iti mad--_mad ukteḥ_ukti aikāntika--_aikāntika bhaktaḥ_bhakta tu_tu kim_kim uta_uta iti_iti sa_tad tu_tu ati_ati su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha evā_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah ārta--_ārta ādiḥ_ādi trividhaḥ_trividha mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta kṛta--_kṛ mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti mahimnā_mahiman bahūni_bahu janmāni_janman uttamān_uttama viṣaya--_viṣaya ānandān_ānanda anubhūya_anubhū teṣu_tad vitṛṣṇaḥ_vitṛṣṇa ante_anta janmani_janman mad--_mad svarūpa--_svarūpa jña--_jña sat--_sat prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga jñānavān_jñānavat prāpta--_prāp mad--_mad tatas_tatas vindati_vid id_id arthaḥ_artha jñāna--_jñāna ākāram_ākāra āha_ah vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva iti_iti vasudeva--_vasudeva sutaḥ_suta kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa eva_eva sarvam_sarva yat_yat hi_hi yat_yat adhīna--_adhīna svarūpa--_svarūpa sthitika--_sthitika tvāt_tva prāṇa--_prāṇa rūpam_rūpa vāc--_vāc ādi--_ādi vyapadiṣṭam_vyapadiś chāndogye_chāndogya na_na vai_vai vācaḥ_vāc na_na cakṣūṃṣi_cakṣus na_na śrotrāṇi_śrotra na_na manāṃsi_manas iti_iti ācakṣate_ācakṣ prāṇāḥ_prāṇa iti_iti eva_eva ācakṣate_ācakṣ prāṇaḥ_prāṇa hi_hi eva_eva iti_iti tatra_tatra āhuḥ_ah sarvam_sarva vastu_vastu vāsudevena_vāsudeva vyāpyam_vyāp atas_atas sarvam_sarva vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sarvam_sarva samāpnoṣi_samāp tatas_tatas asi_as sarvam_sarva iti_iti pārthaḥ_pārtha vakṣyati_vac iti_iti sa_tad hi_hi nikhila--_nikhila spṛhā--_spṛhā nivṛtti--_nivṛtti pūrvakam_pūrvaka mad--_mad spṛhaḥ_spṛhā mad--_mad ātmā_ātman ati_ati udāra--_udāra manāḥ_manas mad--_mad nivedita--_niveday ātmā_ātman jñāni--_jñānin koṭiṣu_koṭi api_api su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha eṣa_etad jñānavān_jñānavat priyaḥ_priya hi_hi jñāninaḥ_jñānin atyartham_atyartham iti_iti ādi--_ādi ukta--_vac lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa bodhyaḥ_budh
BhG 7.20

lg.l: kāmaiḥ_kāma taiḥ_tad taiḥ_tad hṛta--_hṛ jñānāḥ_jñāna prapadyante_prapad anya--_anya devatāḥ_devatā
tam_tad tam_tad niyamam_niyama āsthāya_āsthā prakṛtyā_prakṛti niyatāḥ_niyam svayā_sva

div.p: bhajanti_bhaj ye_yad tu_tu atyantam_atyantam rājasāḥ_rājasa tāmasāḥ_tāmasa ca_ca kāma--_kāma abhibhūtāḥ_abhibhū kṣudra--_kṣudra devatāḥ_devatā sevante_sev te_tad saṃsaranti_saṃsṛ iti_iti āha_ah kāmaiḥ_kāma iti_iti caturbhiḥ_catur ye_yad tu_tu taiḥ_tad taiḥ_tad putra--_putra kīrti--_kīrti śatru--_śatru jaya--_jaya ādi--_ādi viṣayaiḥ_viṣaya kāmaiḥ_kāma apahṛta--_apahṛ vivekā_viveka santaḥ_as anyāḥ_anya kṣudrāḥ_kṣudra bhūta--_bhūta preta--_preta yakṣa--_yakṣa ādyāḥ_ādya devatāḥ_devatā bhajanti_bhaj kim_ka kṛtvā_kṛ tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā ārādhane_ārādhana yaḥ_yad yaḥ_yad niyamaḥ_niyama upavāsa--_upavāsa ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa tam_tad tam_tad niyamam_niyama svīkṛtya_svīkṛ tatra_tatra api_api svayā_sva svīyayā_svīya prakṛtyā_prakṛti pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vāsanayā_vāsanā niyatāḥ_niyam vaśīkṛtāḥ_vaśīkṛ santaḥ_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana mohana--_mohana stambhana--_stambhana ākarṣaṇa--_ākarṣaṇa vaśīkaraṇa--_vaśīkaraṇa māraṇa--_māraṇa uccāṭana--_uccāṭana ādi--_ādi viṣayaiḥ_viṣaya bhagavat--_bhagavant sevayā_sevā labdhum_labh aśakya--_aśakya tvena_tva abhimataiḥ_abhiman taiḥ_tad taiḥ_tad kṣudraiḥ_kṣudra kāmaiḥ_kāma abhilāṣaiḥ_abhilāṣa hṛtam_hṛ apahṛtam_apahṛ tad--_tad tad--_tad phala--_phala dātṛ--_dātṛ tva--_tva abhimata--_abhiman kṣudra--_kṣudra devatā--_devatā ābhimukhyam_ābhimukhya nītam_nī jñānam_jñāna antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa yeṣām_yad te_tad anya--_anya devatāḥ_devatā bhagavataḥ_bhagavant vāsudevāt_vāsudeva anyāḥ_anya kṣudra--_kṣudra devatāḥ_devatā tam_tad tam_tad niyamam_niyama japa--_japa upavāsa--_upavāsa prasiddham_prasidh niyamam_niyama āsthāya_āsthā āśritya_āśri prapadyante_prapad bhajante_bhaj tad--_tad tad--_tad kṣudra--_kṣudra phala--_phala prāpti--_prāpti icchayā_icchā kṣudra--_kṣudra devatā--_devatā madhye_madhya
api_api kecid_kaścit kāṃcid_kaścit eva_eva bhajante_bhaj svayā_sva prakṛtyā_prakṛti niyatāḥ_niyam asādhāraṇayā_asādhāraṇa pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vāsanayā_vāsanā vaśīkṛtāḥ_vaśīkṛ santaḥ_sat

bhajantaḥ_bhaj ye_yad tu_tu ārta--_ārta ādayaḥ_ādi ārti--_ārti hāna--_hāna ādi--_ādi kāmanayā_kāmanā devatā--_devatā antaram_antara bhajante_bhaj teṣām_tad kā_ka gatiḥ_gati iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah kāmaiḥ_kāma iti_iti caturbhiḥ_catur hṛta--_hṛ jñānāḥ_jñāna iti_iti roga--_roga ādi--_ādi ārti--_ārti harāḥ_hara śīghram_śīghram yathā_yathā sūrya--_sūrya ādayaḥ_ādi tathā_tathā na_na viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu iti_iti naṣṭa--_naś buddhayaḥ_buddhi prakṛtyā_prakṛti iti_iti svayā_sva prakṛtyā_prakṛti niyatāḥ_niyam vaśīkṛtāḥ_vaśīkṛ santaḥ_as teṣām_tad duṣṭā_duṣ prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti eva_eva mad--_mad prapattau_prapatti parāṅmukhī_parāṅmukha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad ittham_ittham kāmanayā_kāmanā api_api mām_mad bhajantaḥ_bhaj mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti mahimnā_mahiman te_tad vimucyante_vimuc iti_iti uktam_vac ye_yad tu_tu śīghra--_śīghra sukha--_sukha kāmāḥ_kāma devatā--_devatā antara--_antara bhaktāḥ_bhakta te_tad saṃsaranti_saṃsṛ eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah kāmaiḥ_kāma iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi caturbhiḥ_catur taiḥ_tad taiḥ_tad ārti--_ārti vināśa--_vināśa ādi--_ādi viṣayakaiḥ_viṣayaka kāmaiḥ_kāma hṛta--_hṛ jñānāḥ_jñāna yathā_yathā aditi--_aditi ādayaḥ_ādi śīghram_śīghram eva_eva roga--_roga vināśa--_vināśa ādi--_ādi karāḥ_kara tathā_tathā na_na viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu iti_iti naṣṭa--_naś dhiyaḥ_dhī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tam_tad tam_tad asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa svayā_sva prakṛtyā_prakṛti vāsanayā_vāsanā niyatāḥ_niyam niyantritāḥ_niyantray teṣām_tad prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti eva_eva tādṛśī_tādṛśa yā_yad mad--_mad prapattau_prapatti vaimukhyam_vaimukhya karoti_kṛ iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 7.21

lg.l: yaḥ_yad yaḥ_yad yām_yad yām_yad tanum_tanu bhaktaḥ_bhakta śraddhayā_śraddhā arcitum_arc icchati_iṣ
tasya_tad tasya_tad acalām_acala śraddhām_śraddhā tām_tad eva_eva vidadhāmi_vidhā aham_mad

div.p: bhajanti_bhaj yaḥ_yad yaḥ_yad bhaktaḥ_bhakta yām_yad yām_yad tanum_tanu devatā--_devatā rūpām_rūpa madīyām_madīya eva_eva mūrtim_mūrti śraddhayā_śraddhā arcitum_arc icchati_iṣ pravartate_pravṛt tasya_tad tasya_tad bhaktasya_bhakta tad--_tad tad--_tad mūrti--_mūrti viṣayām_viṣaya tām_tad eva_eva śraddhām_śraddhā acalām_acala dṛḍhām_dṛḍha aham_mad antaryāmī_antaryāmin

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad tat_tad devatā--_devatā prasādāt_prasāda teṣām_tad api_api sarveśvare_sarveśvara bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva bhaktiḥ_bhakti bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti na_na śaṅkanīyam_śaṅk yatas_yatas yaḥ_yad yaḥ_yad iti_iti teṣām_tad madhye_madhya yaḥ_yad yaḥ_yad kāmī_kāmin yām_yad yām_yad tanum_tanu devatā--_devatā mūrtim_mūrti śraddhayā_śraddhā janma--_janman antara--_antara vāsanā--_vāsanā bala--_bala prādurbhūtayā_prādurbhū bhaktyā_bhakti saṃyuktaḥ_saṃyuj san_as arcitum_arc arcayitum_arcay icchati_iṣ pravartate_pravṛt caura--_caura ādikasya_ādika arcayateḥ_arcayati ṇic--_ṇic abhāva--_abhāva pakṣe_pakṣa rūpam_rūpa idam_idam tasya_tad tasya_tad kāminaḥ_kāmin tām_tad eva_eva devatā--_devatā tanum_tanu prati_prati śraddhām_śraddhā pūrva--_pūrva vāsanā--_vāsanā vaśāt_vaśa prāptām_prāp bhaktim_bhakti acalām_acala sthirām_sthira viddadhāmi_vidhā karomi_kṛ aham_mad antaryāmī_antaryāmin na_na tu_tu mad--_mad viṣayām_viṣaya śraddhām_śraddhā tasya_tad tasya_tad karomi_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tām_tad śraddhām_śraddhā vyākhyāne_vyākhyāna
yad--_yad śabda--_śabda ananvayaḥ_ananvaya spaṣṭaḥ_spaṣṭa tasmāt_tasmāt pratiśabdam_pratiśabda adhyāhṛtya_adhyāhṛ vyākhyātam_vyākhyā

utpādayiṣyanti_utpāday yatas_yatas te_tad devāḥ_deva sva--_sva bhaktau_bhakti api_api śraddhām_śraddhā utpādayitum_utpāday aśaktāḥ_aśakta kim_ka punar_punar mad--_mad bhaktau_bhakti iti_iti āha_ah yaḥ_yad yaḥ_yad iti_iti yām_yad yām_yad tanum_tanu sūrya--_sūrya ādi--_ādi deva--_deva rūpām_rūpa madīyām_madīya mūrtim_mūrti vibhūtim_vibhūti arcitum_arc pūjayitum_pūjay tām_tad eva_eva tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā viṣayām_viṣaya eva_eva na_na tu_tu sva--_sva viṣayām_viṣaya śraddhām_śraddhā aham_mad antaryāmi_antaryāmin eva_eva vidadhāmi_vidhā na_na tu_tu sā_tad devatā_devatā

baladevaḥ_baladeva prayacchāmi_prayam asti_as āha_ah yaḥ_yad yaḥ_yad ārta--_ārta ādi--_ādi bhaktaḥ_bhakta yām_yad yām_yad mad--_mad tanum_tanu śraddhayā_śraddhā arcitum_arc vāñchati_vāñch tasya_tad tasya_tad tām_tad eva_eva tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā viṣayām_viṣaya eva_eva na_na tu_tu mad--_mad viṣayām_viṣaya acalām_acala sthirām_sthira vidadhāmi_vidhā utpādayāmi_utpāday aham_mad eva_eva na_na tu_tu sā_tad sā_tad devatā_devatā śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad devatānām_devatā mad--_mad tanu--_tanu tvam_tva āha_ah yaḥ_yad āditye_āditya tiṣṭhati_sthā ādityāt_āditya antaraḥ_antara yam_yad ādityaḥ_āditya na_na veda_vid yasya_yad ādityaḥ_āditya śarīram_śarīra iti_iti ādyā_ad
BhG 7.22

lg.l: sa_tad tayā_tad śraddhayā_śraddhā yuktaḥ_yuj tasyāḥ_tad rādhanam_rādhana īhate_īh
labhate_labh ca_ca tatas_tatas kāmān_kāma mayā_mad eva_eva vihitān_vidhā hi_hi tān_tad

div.p: sa_tad bhaktaḥ_bhakta tayā_tad dṛḍhayā_dṛḍha śraddhayā_śraddhā tasyāḥ_tad tanoḥ_tanu rādhanm_rādhas ārādhanam_ārādhana īhate_īh karoti_kṛ tatas_tatas ca_ca ye_yad saṅkalpitāḥ_saṃkalpay kāmāḥ_kāma tān_tad kāmān_kāma tatas_tatas devatā--_devatā viśeṣān_viśeṣa labhate_labh kintu_kiṃtu mayā_mad eva_eva tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā antaryāminā_antaryāmin vihitān_vidhā nirmitān_nirmā hi_hi sphuṭam_sphuṭa etat_etad tad--_tad tad--_tad devatānām_devatā api_api mad--_mad adhīna--_adhīna tvāt_tva mad--_mad mūrti--_mūrti tvāt_tva ca_ca iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sa_tad kāmī_kāmin tayā_tad mad--_mad vihitayā_vidhā sthirayā_sthira śraddhayā_śraddhā yuktaḥ_yuj tasyāḥ_tad devatā--_devatā tanvāḥ_tanu rādhanam_rādhana ārādhanam_ārādhana pūra--_pūra jam_ja īhate_īh nirvartayati_nirvartay upasarga--_upasarga rahitaḥ_rahita api_api rādhayatiḥ_rādhayati pūjā--_pūjā arthaḥ_artha sa_sa upasarga--_upasarga tve_tva hi_hi ākāraḥ_ākāra śrūyate_śru labhate_labh ca_ca tatas_tatas tasyāḥ_tad devatā--_devatā tanvāḥ_tanū sakāśāt_sakāśa kāmān_kāma īpsitān_īpsay tān_tad pūrva--_pūrva saṅkalpitān_saṃkalpay hi_hi prasiddham_prasidh mayā_mad eva_eva sarvajñena_sarvajña sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala dāyinā_dāyin tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā antaryāmiṇā_antaryāmin vihitān_vidhā tad--_tad tad--_tad phala--_phala vipāka--_vipāka samaye_samaya nirmitān_nirmā hitāt_hita manaḥ--_manas priya--_priya anitya--_anitya aika--_aika padyam_padya vā_vā ahita--_ahita tve_tva api_api hita--_hita tayā_tā pratīyamāna--_pratī anitya--_anitya arthaḥ_artha
karoti_kṛ labhate_labh āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva sa_tad tayā_tad iti_iti īhate_īh karoti_kṛ tatas_tatas mad--_mad tanu--_tanu bhūta--_bhū tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā ārādhanāt_ārādhana kāmān_kāma phalāni_phala tatra_tatra tatra_tatra uktāni_vac mayā_mad eva_eva iti_iti vihitān_vidhā racitān_racay yadi_yadi api_api tasya_tad tasya_tad ārādhakasya_ārādhaka tathā_tathā jñānam_jñāna na_na asti_as tathā_tathā api_api mad--_mad tanu--_tanu viṣayā_viṣaya iyam_idam śraddhā_śraddhā iti_iti anusandhāya_anusaṃdhā aham_mad phalāni_phala arpayāmi_arpay iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 7.23

lg.l: antavat_antavat tu_tu phalam_phala teṣām_tad tat_tad bhavati_bhū alpa--_alpa medhasām_medhas
devān_deva deva--_deva yajaḥ_yaj yānti_yā mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta yānti_yā mām_mad api_api

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tat_tad evam_evam yadi_yadi api_api sarvāḥ_sarva api_api devatāḥ_devatā sarvātmanaḥ_sarvātman mama_mad eva_eva tanavaḥ_tanu atas_atas tad--_tad ārādhanam_ārādhana api_api vastutas_vastutas mad--_mad ārādhanam_ārādhana eva_eva tatra_tatra phala--_phala dātā_dātṛ api_api ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva tathā_tathā api_api sākṣāt_sākṣāt mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta teṣām_tad ca_ca phala--_phala vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya bhavati_bhū iti_iti āha_ah antavat_antavat iti_iti alpa--_alpa medhasām_medhas paricchanna--_paricchad dṛṣṭīnām_dṛṣṭi mayā_mad dattam_dā api_api tat_tad phalam_phala antavat_antavat vināśi_vināśin bhavati_bhū tat_tad eva_eva āha_ah devān_deva yajanti_yaj iti_iti deva--_deva yajaḥ_yaj te_tad devān_deva antavataḥ_antavat yānti_yā mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta tu_tu mām_mad anādi--_anādi anantam_ananta parama--_parama ānandam_ānanda prāpnuvanti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana -_yadi api_api sarvāḥ_sarva api_api devatāḥ_devatā sarvātmanaḥ_sarvātman mama_mad eva_eva tanavaḥ_tanu tad--_tad ārādhanam_ārādhana api_api vastutas_vastutas mad--_mad ārādhanam_ārādhana eva_eva sarvatra_sarvatra api_api ca_ca phala--_phala dātā_dātṛ antaryāmī_antaryāmin aham_mad eva_eva tathā_tathā api_api sākṣāt_sākṣāt mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta ca_ca teṣām_tad phala--_phala vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya bhavati_bhū iti_iti āha_ah antavat_antavat iti_iti alpa--_alpa medhasām_medhas manda--_manda prajña--_prajña tvena_tva vastu--_vastu viveka--_viveka asamarthānām_asamartha teṣām_tad tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā bhaktānām_bhakta tat_tad mayā_mad vihitam_vidhā api_api tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā ārādhana--_ārādhana jam_ja phalam_phala antavat_antavat eva_eva vināśi_vināśin eva_eva na_na tu_tu mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta vivekinām_vivekin arthaḥ_artha kutas_kutas evam_evam yatas_yatas devān_deva indra--_indra ādīn_ādi antavataḥ_antavat eva_eva deva--_deva yajaḥ_yaj mad--_mad anya--_anya devatā--_devatā ārādhana--_ārādhana parāḥ_para yānti_yā prāpnuvanti_prāp mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta tu_tu trayaḥ_tri sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma prathamam_prathama mad--_mad prasādāt_prasāda abhīṣṭān_abhīṣ kāmān_kāma prāpnuvanti_prāp api_api śabda--_śabda prayogāt_prayoga tatas_tatas mad--_mad upāsanā--_upāsanā paripākāt_paripāka mām_mad anantam_ananta ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana īśvaram_īśvara api_api yānti_yā prāpnuvanti_prāp atas_atas samāne_samāna api_api sa_sa kāma--_kāma tve_tva mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta anya--_anya devatā--_devatā bhaktānām_bhakta ca_ca mahat_mahat antaram_antara tasmāt_tasmāt sādhu_sādhu uktam_vac udārāḥ_udāra sarve_sarva eva_eva ete_etad iti_iti

bhavati_bhū nanu_nanu ārādhane_ārādhana śrame_śrama tulyaḥ_tulya api_api devatā--_devatā antara--_antara bhaktānām_bhakta phalam_phala naśvaram_naśvara karoṣi_kṛ sva--_sva bhaktānām_bhakta tu_tu anaśvaram_anaśvara karoṣi_kṛ iti_iti tvayi_tvad parameśvare_parameśvara ayam_idam anyāyaḥ_anyāya tatra_tatra na_na ayam_idam anyāyaḥ_anyāya iti_iti āha_ah deva--_deva yajaḥ_yaj deva--_deva mad--_mad pūjakāḥ_pūjaka mām_mad ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha ye_yad hi_hi yad--_yad pūjakāḥ_pūjaka te_tad tān_tad prāpnuvanti_prāp eva_eva iti_iti nyāyaḥ_nyāya eva_eva tatra_tatra yadi_yadi devāḥ_deva api_api naśvarāḥ_naśvara tadā_tadā tad--_tad bhaktāḥ_bhakta katham_katham anaśvarāḥ_anaśvara bhavantu_bhū kathantarām_kathaṃtarām yā_yad tat_tad bhajana--_bhajana phalam_phala vā_vā na_na naśyatu_naś ataeva_ataeva tad--_tad bhaktāḥ_bhakta alpa--_alpa medhasaḥ_medhas uktāḥ_vac bhagavān_bhagavant tu_tu nityaḥ_nitya tad--_tad bhaktā_bhaktṛ
api_api nityāḥ_nitya tad--_tad bhakti--_bhakti bhakti--_bhakti phalam_phala ca_ca sarvam_sarva nityam_nitya eva_eva iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva syāt_as āha_ah teṣām_tad alpa--_alpa medhasām_medhas āditya--_āditya ādi--_ādi mātra--_mātra buddhyā_buddhi na_na tu_tu mad--_mad tanuvudbhyā_tanuvud ārādhayatām_ārādhay tat_tad tat_tad phalam_phala alpam_alpa antavat_antavat vināśi_vināśin ca_ca bhavati_bhū mad--_mad tanuvudbhyā_tanuvud ārādhayatām_ārādhay tu_tu phalam_phala anantam_ananta avināśi_avināśin ca_ca iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva yasmāt_yasmāt āditya--_āditya ādi--_ādi deva--_deva yājinaḥ_yājin tān_tad sva--_sva ijyān_ijya mita--_mita bhogān_bhoga mita--_mita āyuṣaḥ_āyus yānti_yā iti_iti mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta tu_tu mām_mad eva_eva nitya--_nitya aparimita--_aparimita svarūpa--_svarūpa guṇa--_guṇa vibhūti--_vibhūti mad--_mad ārādhana--_ārādhana phalam_phala anantam_ananta avināśi_avināśin ceid_ceid mahat_mahat
BhG 7.24

lg.l: avyaktam_avyakta vyaktim_vyakti āpannam_āpad manyante_man mām_mad abuddhayaḥ_abuddhi
param_para bhāvam_bhāva a_a jānantaḥ_jñā mama_mad avyayam_avyaya anuttamam_anuttama

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara nau_mad ca_ca samāne_samāna prayāse_prayāsa mahati_mahat ca_ca phala--_phala viśeṣe_viśeṣa sati_as sarve_sarva api_api kim_ka iti_iti devatā--_devatā antaram_antara hitvā_hā tvām_tvad eva_eva na_na bhajanti_bhaj tatra_tatra āha_ah avyaktam_avyakta iti_iti avyaktam_avyakta prapañca--_prapañca atītam_atī mām_mad vyaktim_vyakti manuṣya--_manuṣya matsya--_matsya kūrma--_kūrma ādi--_ādi bhāvam_bhāva prāptam_prāp alpa--_alpa buddhayaḥ_buddhi manyante_man tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu mama_mad param_para bhāvam_bhāva sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa a_a jānantaḥ_jñā katham_katham bhūtam_bhū avyayam_avyaya nityam_nitya na_na vidyate_vid uttamaḥ_uttama bhāvaḥ_bhāva yasmāt_yad tat_tad mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva atas_atas jagat--_jagant rakṣaṇa--_rakṣaṇa artham_artha līlayā_līlā āviṣkṛta--_āviṣkṛ nānā_nānā viśuddha--_viśudh ūrjita--_ūrjay sattva--_sattva mūrtim_mūrti mām_mad parameśvaram_parameśvara ca_ca sva--_sva karma--_karman nirmita--_nirmā bhautika--_bhautika deham_deha ca_ca devatā--_devatā antaram_antara samam_sama paśyantaḥ_dṛś manda--_manda matayaḥ_mati mām_mad na_na atīva_atīva pratyuta_pratyuta kṣipra--_kṣipra phala--_phala dam_da devatā--_devatā antaram_antara eva_eva bhajanti_bhaj te_tad ca_ca ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra anta--_anta vat_vat phalam_phala prāpunvanti_prāpū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam bhagavat--_bhagavant bhajanasya_bhajana sarva--_sarva uttama--_uttama phalatve_phalatva api_api katham_katham prāyeṇa_prāyeṇa prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin bhagavat--_bhagavant vimukhyāḥ_vimukhya iti_iti atra_atra hetum_hetu āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavant avyaktam_avyakta iti_iti avyaktam_avyakta deha--_deha grahaṇāt_grahaṇa prāk_prāk kārya--_kārya akṣama--_akṣama tvena_tva sthitam_sthā idānīm_idānīm vasudeva--_vasudeva gṛhe_gṛha vyaktim_vyakti bhautika--_bhautika deha--_deha avacchedena_avaccheda kārya--_kārya kṣamatām_kṣamatā prāptam_prāp kaṃcid_kaścit jīvam_jīva eva_eva manyante_man mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara api_api abuddhayaḥ_abuddhi viveka--_viveka avyaktam_avyakta sarva--_sarva kāraṇam_kāraṇa api_api mām_mad vyaktim_vyakti kārya--_kārya rūpatām_rūpatā matsya--_matsya kūrma--_kūrma ādi--_ādi aneka--_aneka avatāra--_avatāra rūpeṇa_rūpa prāptam_prāp iti_iti vā_vā

katham_katham te_tad jīvāḥ_jīva tvām_tvad na_na viviñcanti_vivic tatra_tatra abuddhayaḥ_abuddhi iti_iti uktam_vac hetum_hetu vivṛṇoti_vivṛ param_para sarva--_sarva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa rūpam_rūpa avyayam_avyaya nityam_nitya mama_mad bhāvam_bhāva sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa sopādhikam_sopādhika a_a jānantaḥ_jñā tathā_tathā nirupādhikam_nirupādhika api_api anuttamam_anuttama sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa anatiśaya--_anatiśaya advitīya--_advitīya paramānanda--_paramānanda ghanam_ghana anantam_ananta mama_mad sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa jīvam_jīva eva_eva kaṃcid_kaścit mām_mad manyante_man tatas_tatas mām_mad anīśvara--_anīśvara tvena_tva abhimatam_abhiman vihāya_vihā prasiddham_prasidh devatā--_devatā antaram_antara eva_eva bhajante_bhaj tatas_tatas ca_ca anta--_anta vat_vat eva_eva phalam_phala prāpnuvanti_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha agre_agra ca_ca vakṣyate_vac avajānanti_avajñā mām_mad mūḍhāḥ_muh mānuṣīm_mānuṣa tanum_tanu āśritam_āśri iti_iti
āstām_ās jānanti_jñā

lg.l: athā_atha api_api te_tvad deva_deva pada--_pada ambuja--_ambuja dvaya--_dvaya
prasāda--_prasāda leśa--_leśa anugṛhītaḥ_anugrah eva_eva hi_hi
jānāti_jñā tattvam_tattva bhagavat_bhagavat mahimnaḥ_mahiman
na_na ca_ca anyaḥ_anya ekaḥ_eka api_api ciram_ciram vicinvan_vici

div.p: iti_iti brahmaṇā_brahman api_api mām_mad pratyuktam_prativac atas_atas mad--_mad bhaktān_bhakta vinā_vinā mad--_mad tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna sarvatra_sarvatra vā_vā alpa--_alpa buddhayaḥ_buddhi iti_iti āha_ah avyaktam_avyakta prapañca--_prapañca atītam_atī nirākāram_nirākāra brahma_brahman eva_eva mām_mad māyikā--_māyikā ākāra--_ākāra tvena_tva eva_eva vyaktim_vyakti vasudeva--_vasudeva gṛhe_gṛha janma_janman prāptam_prāp iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva yatas_yatas mama_mad param_para bhāvam_bhāva māyā--_māyā atītam_atī svarūpam_svarūpa janma--_janman karma--_karman līlā--_līlā ādikam_ādika a_a jānantaḥ_jñā bhāvam_bhāva kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa avyayam_avyaya nityam_nitya anuttamam_anuttama sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa bhāvaḥ_bhāva sattā_sattā svabhāva--_svabhāva abhiprāya--_abhiprāya ceṣṭā--_ceṣṭā ātma--_ātman janmasu_janman kriyā--_kriyā līlā--_līlā padārtheṣu_padārtha medinī_medinī mama_mad param_para bhāvam_bhāva svarūpam_svarūpa avyayam_avyaya nityam_nitya viśuddha--_viśudh ūrjita--_ūrjay sattva--_sattva mūrti_mūrti iti_iti svāmi--_svāmin caraṇaiḥ_caraṇa ca_ca uktam_vac

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha kā_ka vārtā_vārttā mad--_mad anya--_anya deva--_deva yājinām_yājin alpa--_alpa medhasām_medhas upaniṣad--_upaniṣad niṣṇātānām_niṣṇāta api_api mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti riktānām_ric mad--_mad tattva--_tattva dhīḥ_dhī na_na syāt_as iti_iti āśayena_āśaya āha_ah avyaktam_avyakta iti_iti abuddhayaḥ_abuddhi mad--_mad tattva--_tattva yāthātmya--_yāthātmya buddhi--_buddhi śūnyāḥ_śūnya janāḥ_jana avyaktam_avyakta sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa ātma--_ātman vigraha--_vigraha tvāt_tva indriya--_indriya aviṣayam_aviṣaya mām_mad vyaktim_vyakti āpannam_āpad tad--_tad viṣayām_viṣaya manyante_man devakyām_devakī vasudevāt_vasudeva sattva--_sattva utkṛṣṭena_utkṛṣṭa karmaṇā_karman sañjātam_saṃjan itara--_itara rāja--_rājan putra--_putra tulyam_tulya mām_mad vadanti_vad yatas_yatas te_tad mad--_mad abhijña--_abhijña sat--_sat prasaṅga--_prasaṅga abhāvāt_abhāva mama_mad bhāvam_bhāva param_para avyayam_avyaya anuttamam_anuttama a_a jānantaḥ_jñā

mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti hīnāḥ_hā te_tad mama_mad svarūpa--_svarūpa guṇa--_guṇa janma--_janman līlā--_līlā ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa bhāvam_bhāva māyā--_māyā āditaḥ_ādi paramatas_paramatas avyayam_avyaya nityam_nitya anuttamam_anuttama sarva--_sarva uttamam_uttama na_na kintu_kiṃtu anya--_anya vat_vat māyikam_māyika anityam_anitya sādhāraṇam_sādhāraṇa ca_ca gṛhṇantaḥ_grah sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa hareḥ_hari vijñāna--_vijñāna ānanda--_ānanda eka--_eka rasam_rasa vijñānam_vijñāna ānandam_ānanda brahma_brahman iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi sārvajña--_sārvajña ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa gaṇaḥ_gaṇa tasya_tad svarūpa--_svarūpa anubandhī_anubandhin ananta--_ananta kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka asau_adas iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi abhivyakti--_abhivyakti mātram_mātra janma_janman ajaḥ_aja api_api san_as iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi parantu_parantu avyaktasya_avyakta eva_eva bhajatsu_bhaj prasādena_prasāda eva_eva abhivyakti--_abhivyakti śīlam_śīla
na_na śakyaḥ_śakya sa_tad tvayā_tvad draṣṭum_dṛś asmābhiḥ_mad vā_vā bṛhaspate_bṛhaspati yasya_yad prasādam_prasāda kurute_kṛ sa_tad vai_vai tam_tad draṣṭum_dṛś arhati_arh iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi
BhG 7.25

lg.l: na_na aham_mad prakāśaḥ_prakāśa sarvasya_sarva yoga--_yoga māyā--_māyā samāvṛtaḥ_samāvṛ
mūḍhaḥ_muh ayam_idam na_na abhijānāti_abhijñā lokaḥ_loka mām_mad ajam_aja avyayam_avyaya

div.p: āha_ah sarvasya_sarva lokasya_loka na_na aham_mad prakāśaḥ_prakāśa prakaṭaḥ_prakaṭa na_na bhavāmi_bhū kintu_kiṃtu mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta eva_eva yatas_yatas yoga--_yoga māyayā_māyā samāvṛtaḥ_samāvṛ yogaḥ_yoga yuktiḥ_yukti madīyaḥ_madīya kaḥ_ka api_api acintyaḥ_acintya prajñā--_prajñā vilāsaḥ_vilāsa saḥ_tad eva_eva māyā--_māyā ghaṭana--_ghaṭana ghaṭana--_ghaṭana a_a paṭīyaḥ--_paṭīyas tvāt_tva tayā_tad saṃcchannaḥ_saṃchad ataeva_ataeva mad--_mad sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa jñāne_jñāna mūḍhaḥ_muh san_as ayam_idam lokaḥ_loka ajam_aja avyayam_avyaya ca_ca mām_mad na_na jānāti_jñā iti_iti 25_25

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu janma--_janman kāle_kāla api_api sarva--_sarva yogi--_yogin dhyeyam_dhyā śrī--_śrī vaikuṇṭha--_vaikuṇṭha stham_stha aiśvaram_aiśvara eva_eva rūpam_rūpa āvirbhāvitavati_āvirbhāvay samprati_samprati ca_ca śrīvatsa--_śrīvatsa kaustubha--_kaustubha vanamālā--_vanamālā kirīṭa--_kirīṭa kuṇḍala--_kuṇḍala ādi--_ādi divya--_divya upakaraṇa--_upakaraṇa śālini_śālin sākṣāt_sākṣāt vaikuṇṭha--_vaikuṇṭha nāyake_nāyaka nikhila--_nikhila loka--_loka duḥkha--_duḥkha nistārāya_nistāra bhuvam_bhū avatīrṇe_avatṛ viriñci--_viriñci prapañca--_prapañca asambhavi--_asambhavin niratiśaya--_niratiśaya saundarya--_saundarya sāra--_sāra sarvasva--_sarvasva mūrtau_mūrti bāla--_bāla līlā--_līlā vimohita--_vimohay vidhātari_vidhātṛ taraṇi--_taraṇi kiraṇa--_kiraṇa ujjvala--_ujjvala nirupama--_nirupama śyāma--_śyāma sundare_sundara kara--_kara dīkṛta--_dīkṛ pārijāta--_pārijāta artha--_artha parājita--_parāji purandare_puraṃdara bāṇa--_bāṇa yuddha--_yuddha vijita--_viji śaśāṅka--_śaśāṅka śekhare_śekhara samasta--_samasta sura--_sura asura--_asura vijayi--_vijayin naraka--_naraka prabhṛti--_prabhṛti mahā--_mahat daiteya--_daiteya prakara--_prakara prāṇa--_prāṇa paryanta--_paryanta sarva--_sarva śrīdāma--_śrīdāman ādi--_ādi parama--_parama raṅka--_raṅka mahā--_mahat vaibhava--_vaibhava kāriṇi_kārin ṣoḍaśa--_ṣoḍaśan sahasra--_sahasra divya--_divya rūpa--_rūpa dhāriṇi_dhārin aparimeya--_aparimeya guṇa--_guṇa garimaṇi_gariman mahā--_mahat mahimani_mahiman nārad--_nārad mārkaṇḍeya--_mārkaṇḍeya ādi--_ādi mahā--_mahat muni--_muni gaṇa--_gaṇa stute_stu tvayi_tvad katham_katham avivekinaḥ_avivekin arjuna--_arjuna āśaṅkām_āśaṅkā apaninīṣuḥ_apaninīṣu āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavat na_na aham_mad iti_iti

aham_mad sarvasya_sarva lokasya_loka na_na prakāśaḥ_prakāśa svena_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa prakaṭaḥ_prakaṭa na_na bhavāmi_bhū kintu_kiṃtu keṣāṃcid_kaścit mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta prakaṭaḥ_prakaṭa bhavāmi_bhū iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya katham_katham sarvasya_sarva lokasya_loka na_na prakaṭaḥ_prakaṭa iti_iti atra_atra hetum_hetu āha_ah yoga--_yoga māyā--_māyā samāvṛtaḥ_samāvṛ yogaḥ_yoga mama_mad saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa tad--_tad vaśa--_vaśa vartinī_vartin māyā_māyā yoga--_yoga māyā_māyā tathā_tathā ayam_idam abhaktaḥ_abhakta janaḥ_jana mām_mad sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa na_na jānātu_jñā iti_iti saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa anuvidhāyinyā_anuvidhāyin māyayā_māyā samyak_samyak āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ sati_as api_api jñāna--_jñāna kāraṇe_kāraṇa jñāna--_jñāna atas_atas yat_yad uktam_vac param_para bhāvam_bhāva a_a jānantaḥ_jñā iti_iti tatra_tatra mama_mad saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa eva_eva kāraṇam_kāraṇa iti_iti uktam_vac bhavati_bhū atas_atas mama_mad māyayā_māyā mūḍhaḥ_muh āvṛta--_āvṛ jñānaḥ_jñāna san_as ayam_idam caturvidha--_caturvidha bhakta--_bhakta vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa lokaḥ_loka sati_as api_api jñāna--_jñāna kāraṇe_kāraṇa mām_mad ajam_aja avyayam_avyaya anādi--_anādi anantam_ananta parameśvaram_parameśvara na_na abhijānāti_abhijñā kintu_kintu viparīta--_viparīta vidyamānam_vid vastu--_vastu svarūpam_svarūpa āvṛṇoti_āvṛ a_a vidyamānam_vid ca_ca kiṃcid_kaścit darśayati_darśay iti_iti laukika--_laukika māyām_māyā api_api prasiddham_prasidh etat_etad 25_25

asi_as dṛśyate_dṛś āha_ah aham_mad sarvasya_sarva sarva--_sarva deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla vartinaḥ_vartin janasya_jana na_na prakāśaḥ_prakāśa na_na prakaṭaḥ_prakaṭa yathā_yathā guṇa--_guṇa līlā--_līlā parikaravattvena_parikaravattva sadā_sadā eva_eva virājamānaḥ_virāj api_api dadācid_dadācid eva_eva kaścitsu_kaścit eva_eva bhrama--_bhrama aṇḍeṣu_aṇḍa kim_kim ca_ca sūryaḥ_sūrya yathā_yathā sumeru--_sumeru śaila--_śaila āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa vaśāt_vaśa sarvadā_sarvadā loka--_loka dṛśyaḥ_dṛś na_na bhavati_bhū kintu_kintu kadācid_kadācid eva_eva tathā_tathā eva_eva aham_mad api_api yoga--_yoga māyā--_māyā samāvṛtaḥ_samāvṛ na_na ca_ca jyotiścakra--_jyotiścakra vartamānānām_vṛt prāṇinām_prāṇin jyotiścakra--_jyotiścakra sthaḥ_stha jyotiścakra--_jyotiścakra madhye_madhya sāmastyena_sāmastya sadā_sadā eva_eva virājamānaḥ_virāj api_api sūryaḥ_sūrya sarva--_sarva kāla--_kāla deśa--_deśa varti--_vartin janasya_jana na_na prakaṭaḥ_prakaṭa kintu_kiṃtu kādācitkeṣu_kādācitka ca_ca bhārata--_bhārata ādiṣu_ādi khaṇḍeṣu_khaṇḍa vartamānasya_vṛt janasya_jana eva_eva tathā_tathā eva_eva aham_mad api_api

sva--_sva dhāmasu_dhāman sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa sūryaḥ_sūrya yathā_yathā sadā_sadā eva_eva dṛśyaḥ_dṛś tathā_tathā eva_eva śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa dhāmani_dhāman mathurā--_mathurā dvārakā--_dvārakā ādau_ādi sthitānām_sthā idānīntanānām_idānīntana janānām_jana tatrasthaḥ_tatrastha kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa katham_katham na_na dṛśyaḥ_dṛś bhavati_bhū ucyate_vac tadā_tadā tad--_tad āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ sūryaḥ_sūrya dṛśyaḥ_dṛś na_na abhaviṣyat_bhū tatra_tatra tu_tu mathurā--_mathurā ādi--_ādi kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa dyumaṇi--_dyumaṇi dhāmani_dhāman sumeru--_sumeru sthānīyā_sthānīya yoga--_yoga māyā_māyā eva_eva sadā_sadā vartate_vṛt iti_iti atas_atas tad--_tad āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa arkaḥ_arka sadā_sadā na_na dṛśyate_dṛś kintu_kintu kadācid_kadācid evā_eva iti_iti sarvam_sarva anavadyam_anavadya atas_atas mūḍhaḥ_muh lokaḥ_loka mām_mad śyāma--_śyāma sundara--_sundara ākāram_ākāra vasudeva--_vasudeva ātmajam_ātmaja avyayam_avyaya māyika--_māyika janma--_janman ādi--_ādi śūnyam_śūnya na_na abhijānāti_abhijñā ataeva_ataeva kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa vāridhim_vāridhi mām_mad api_api antatas_antatas tyaktvā_tyaj mad--_mad nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa svarūpam_svarūpa
brahma_brahman eva_eva upāsate_upās iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu bhaktāḥ_bhakta iva_iva abhaktāḥ_abhakta ca_ca tvām_tvad pratyakṣīkurvanti_pratyakṣīkṛ prasādāt_prasāda eva_eva bhajatsu_bhaj abhivyaktiḥ_abhivyakti iti_iti katham_katham tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na aham_mad iti_iti bhaktānām_bhakta eva_eva aham_mad asukha--_asukha ghanaḥ_ghana ananta--_ananta kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa karmā_karman prakāśaḥ_prakāśa abhivyaktaḥ_abhivyañj na_na tu_tu sarveṣām_sarva abhaktānām_abhakta api_api yat_yat aham_mad yogamāyayā_yogamāyā samāvṛtaḥ_samāvṛ mad--_mad vimukha--_vimukha vyāmohaka--_vyāmohaka tva--_tva yoga--_yoga yuktayā_yuj māyayā_māyā samācchanna--_samācchad parisaraḥ_parisara iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad uktam_vac -māyā--_māyā javanikā--_javanikā ācchanna--_ācchad mahimne_mahiman brahmaṇe_brahman namaḥ_namas iti_iti māyā--_māyā mūḍhaḥ_muh ayam_idam lokaḥ_loka atimānuṣa--_atimānuṣa daivata--_daivata prabhāvam_prabhāva vidhi--_vidhi rudra--_rudra ādi--_ādi vanditam_vand api_api mām_mad nā_na abhijānāti_abhijñā kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa ajam_aja janma--_janman śūnyam_śūnya yatas_yatas avyayam_avyaya apracyuta--_apracyuta svarūpa--_svarūpa sāmarthya--_sāmarthya sārvajñya--_sārvajñya ādikam_ādika iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 25_25
BhG 7.26

lg.l: veda_vid aham_mad samatītāni_samatī vartamānāni_vṛt ca_ca arjuna_arjuna
bhaviṣyāṇi_bhaviṣya ca_ca bhūtāni_bhūta mām_mad tu_tu veda_vid na_na kaścana_kaścana

div.p: tat_tad eva_eva svasya_sva sarva--_sarva uttama--_uttama tvam_tva anāvṛta--_anāvṛta jñāna--_jñāna śakti--_śakti tvena_tva darśayan_darśay anyeṣām_anya ajñānam_ajñāna āha_ah veda_vid aham_mad iti_iti samātītāni_samātī vinaṣṭāni_vinaś vartamānāni_vṛt ca_ca bhaviṣyāṇi_bhaviṣya bhāvini_bhāvin ca_ca trikāla--_trikāla vartīni_vartin bhūtāni_bhūta sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamāni_jaṅgama sarvāni_sarva aham_mad veda_vid jānāmi_jñā māyā--_māyā āśraya--_āśraya tvāt_tva mama_mad tasyāḥ_tad sva--_sva āśraya--_āśraya vyāmohaka--_vyāmohaka tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti prasiddham_prasidh mām_mad tu_tu ke_ka api_api na_na vetti_vid mad--_mad māyā--_māyā mohita--_mohay tvāt_tva prasiddham_prasidh hi_hi loke_loka māyāyāḥ_māyā sva--_sva āśraya--_āśraya adhīna--_adhīna tvam_tva anya--_anya mohaka--_mohaka tvam_tva ca_ca iti_iti 26_26

āha_ah aham_mad apratibaddha--_apratibaddha sarva--_sarva vijñātaḥ_vijñā māyayā_māyā sarvān_sarva lokān_loka mohayan_mohay api_api samātītāni_samātī cira--_cira vinaṣṭāni_vinaś vartamānāni_vṛt ca_ca bhaviṣyāṇi_bhaviṣya ca_ca evam_evam kāla--_kāla traya--_traya vartīni_vartin bhūtāni_bhūta sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamāni_jaṅgama sarvāni_sarva veda_vid jānāmi_jñā he_he arjuna_arjuna atas_atas aham_mad sarva--_sarva jñaḥ_jña parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara iti_iti atra_atra na_na asti_as saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mām_mad tu_tu tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda jñāna--_jñāna pratibandha--_pratibandha dyotana--_dyotana arthaḥ_artha mām_mad sarva--_sarva darśinam_darśin api_api māyāvinam_māyāvin iva_iva tad--_tad māyā--_māyā mohitaḥ_mohay kaścana_kaścana kaḥ_ka api_api mad--_mad anugraha--_anugraha bhājanam_bhājana mad--_mad bhaktam_bhakta vinā_vinā na_na veda_vid mad--_mad māyā--_māyā mohita--_mohay tvāt_tva atas_atas mad--_mad tattva--_tattva vedanā--_vedanā abhāvāt_abhāva eva_eva prāyeṇa_prāyeṇa prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin mām_mad na_na bhajante_bhaj iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya 26_26

antaraṅgā_antaraṅga yoga--_yoga māyā_māyā ca_ca mama_mad jñānam_jñāna na_na āvṛṇoti_āvṛ iti_iti āha_ah veda_vid aham_mad iti_iti mām_mad tu_tu kaścana_kaścana prākṛtaḥ_prākṛta aprākṛtaḥ_aprākṛta ca_ca lokaḥ_loka mahā--_mahat rudra--_rudra ādiḥ_ādi mahā--_mahat sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña api_api na_na kārtsnyena_kārtsnya veda_vid yathāyogam_yathāyogam māyayā_māyā yoga--_yoga māyayā_māyā ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna āvaraṇāt_āvaraṇa iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 26_26

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu māyā--_māyā āvṛta--_āvṛ tvāt_tva tava_tvad jīva--_jīva vat_vat ajña--_ajña tā--_tā āpattiḥ_āpatti iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah veda_vid aham_mad iti_iti na_na hi_hi mad--_mad adhīnayā_adhīna mad--_mad tejasā_tejas abhibhūtayā_abhibhū dūratas_dūratas javanikayā_javanikā eva_eva mām_mad sevamānayā_sev māyayā_māyā mama_mad kācid_kaścit vikṛtiḥ_vikṛti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mām_mad tu_tu veda_vid iti_iti mad--_mad jñānī_jñānin koṭiṣu_koṭi api_api su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 26_26
BhG 7.27

lg.l: icchā--_icchā dveṣa--_dveṣa samutthena_samuttha dvandva--_dvaṃdva mohena_moha bhārata_bhārata
sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta saṃmoham_sammoha sarge_sarga yānti_yā parantapa_paraṃtapa

div.p: tasya_tad eva_eva ajñānasya_ajñāna dṛḍha--_dṛḍha tve_tva kāraṇam_kāraṇa āha_ah icchā_icchā iti_iti sṛjyate_sṛj iti_iti sargaḥ_sarga sarge_sarga sthūla--_sthūla deha--_deha utpattau_utpatti satyām_as tad--_tad anukūlaḥ_anukūla icchā_icchā tad--_tad pratikūle_pratikūla dveṣaḥ_dveṣa tābhyām_tad samutthaḥ_samuttha samudbhūtaḥ_samudbhū yaḥ_yad śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi dvandva--_dvaṃdva nimittaḥ_nimitta mohaḥ_moha viveka--_viveka bhraṃśaḥ_bhraṃśa tena_tad sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta saṃmoham_sammoha yānti_yā aham_mad eva_eva sukhī_sukhin duḥkhī_duḥkhin ca_ca iti_iti gāḍhataram_gāḍhatara abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa prāpnuvanti_prāp atas_atas tāni_tad mad--_mad jñāna--_jñāna abhāvāt_abhāva mām_mad na_na bhajanti_bhaj iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 27_27

āha_ah icchā--_icchā dveṣābhyām_dveṣa anukūla--_anukūla pratikūla--_pratikūla viṣayābhyām_viṣaya samutthitena_samutthā śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi dvandva--_dvaṃdva nimittena_nimitta mohena_moha aham_mad sukhī_sukhin aham_mad duḥkhī_duḥkhin iti_iti ādi--_ādi viparyayeṇa_viparyaya sarvāṇi_sarva api_api bhūtāni_bhūta saṃmoham_sammoha viveka--_viveka satyām_satyā yānti_yā he_he bhārata_bhārata he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa iti_iti sambodhana--_sambodhana dvayasya_dvaya kula--_kula mahimnā_mahiman svarūpa--_svarūpa śaktyā_śakti ca_ca tvām_tvad dvandva--_dvaṃdva moha--_moha ākhyaḥ_ākhyā śatruḥ_śatru na_na abhibhavitum_abhibhū alam_alam iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na hi_hi icchā--_icchā dveṣa--_dveṣa rahitam_rahita kiṃcid_kaścit api_api bhūtam_bhūta asti_as na_na ca_ca tābhyām_tad āviṣṭasya_āviś bahis_bahis viṣayam_viṣaya api_api jñānam_jñāna sambhavati_sambhū kim_ka punar_punar ātma--_ātman viṣayam_viṣaya atas_atas rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa vyākula--_vyākula antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa tvāt_tva sarvāṇi_sarva api_api bhūtāni_bhūta mām_mad parameśvaram_parameśvara ātma--_ātman bhūtam_bhū na_na jānanti_jñā atas_atas na_na bhajante_bhaj bhajanīyam_bhaj api_api 27_27

āha_ah sarge_sarga jagat--_jagant sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ārambha--_ārambha kāle_kāla sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta sarve_sarva jīvāḥ_jīva sammohayanti_sammohay kena_ka prācīna--_prācīna karma--_karman udbuddhau_udbudh yau_yad icchā--_icchā dveṣau_dveṣa indriyāṇām_indriya anukūle_anukūla viṣaye_viṣaya icchā--_icchā abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa pratikūle_pratikūla dveṣaḥ_dveṣa tābhyām_tad samutthaḥ_samuttha samudbhūtaḥ_samudbhū yaḥ_yad dvandvaḥ_dvaṃdva māna--_māna apamānayoḥ_apamāna śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādyāḥ_ādya sammānitaḥ_sammānay sukhī_sukhin aham_mad avamānitaḥ_avamānay duḥkhī_duḥkhin mama_mad iyam_idam strī_strī mama_mad ayam_idam purusaḥ_purusa iti_iti ādi--_ādi ākārakaḥ_ākāraka āvidyakaḥ_āvidyaka yaḥ_yad mohaḥ_moha tena_tad saṃmoham_sammoha strī--_strī putra--_putra ādiṣu_ādi atyanta--_atyanta āsaktim_āsakti prāpnuvanti_prāp ataeva_ataeva atyanta--_atyanta āsaktānām_āsañj na_na mad--_mad bhaktau_bhakti adhikāraḥ_adhikāra yat_yad uddhavam_uddhava prati_prati mayā_mad eva_eva vakṣyate_vac

yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā mad--_mad kathā--_kathā ādau_ādi jāta--_jan śraddhaḥ_śraddhā tu_tu yaḥ_yad pumān_puṃs
na_na nirviṇṇaḥ_nirviṇṇa na_na ati_ati saktaḥ_sañj bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga asya_idam siddhi--_siddhi daḥ_da

baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah sarge_sarga sva--_sva utpatti--_utpatti kāle_kāla eva_eva sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta saṃmoham_sammoha yānti_yā kena_ka iti_iti āha_ah dvandva--_dvaṃdva mohena_moha iti_iti māna--_māna apamānayoḥ_apamāna sukha--_sukha duḥkhayoḥ_duḥkha strī--_strī puruṣayoḥ_puruṣa dvandvaiḥ_dvaṃdva yaḥ_yad mohaḥ_moha sat--_sat kṛtaḥ_kṛ aham_mad sukhī_sukhin syām_as asat--_asat kṛtaḥ_kṛ tu_tu duḥkhī_duḥkhin mama_mad iyam_idam patnī_patnī mama_mad ayam_idam patiḥ_pati iti_iti evam_evam abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa tena_tad kīdṛśena_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah icchā--_icchā iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva janmani_janman yatra_yatra yatra_yatra yau_yad icchā--_icchā dveṣau_dveṣa abhūtām_bhū tābhyām_tad saṃskāra--_saṃskāra ātmanā_ātman sthitābhyām_sthā samuttiṣṭhati_samutthā para--_para janmani_janman tatra_tatra tatra_tatra utpadyate_utpad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha icchā_icchā rāgaḥ_rāga evam_evam sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta
saṃmūḍha--_sammuh tvāt_tva mad--_mad jñānī_jñānin su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha
BhG 7.28

lg.l: yeṣām_yad tu_tu anta--_anta gatam_gam pāpam_pāpa janānām_jana puṇya--_puṇya karmaṇām_karman
te_tad dvandva--_dvaṃdva moha--_moha nirmuktāḥ_nirmuc bhajante_bhaj mām_mad dṛḍha--_dṛḍha vratāḥ_vrata

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara kutas_kutas tarhi_tarhi kecana_kaścana tvām_tvad bhajantaḥ_bhaj dṛśyante_dṛś tatra_tatra āha_ah yeṣām_yad iti_iti yeṣām_yad tu_tu puṇya--_puṇya caraṇa--_caraṇa śīlānām_śīla sarva--_sarva pratibandhakam_pratibandhaka pāpam_pāpa anta--_anta gatam_gam naṣṭam_naś te_tad dvandva--_dvaṃdva nimittena_nimitta mohena_moha nirmuktāḥ_nirmuc dṛḍha--_dṛḍha vratāḥ_vrata ekāntinaḥ_ekāntin santaḥ_as bhajante_bhaj 28_28

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yadi_yadi sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta saṃmoham_sammoha yānti_yā katham_katham tarhi_tarhi caturvidhāḥ_caturvidha bhajante_bhaj mām_mad iti_iti uktam_vac satyam_satya sukṛta--_sukṛta atiśayena_atiśaya teṣām_tad kṣīṇa--_kṣi pāpa--_pāpa tvāt_tva iti_iti āha_ah yeṣām_yad iti_iti yeṣām_yad tu_tu itara--_itara loka--_loka vilakṣaṇānām_vilakṣaṇa janānām_jana saphala--_saphala janmanām_janman puṇya--_puṇya karmaṇām_karman aneka--_aneka janmasu_janman puṇya--_puṇya ācaraṇa--_ācaraṇa śīlānām_śīla taiḥ_tad taiḥ_tad puṇyaiḥ_puṇya karmabhiḥ_karman jñāna--_jñāna pratibandhakam_pratibandhaka pāpam_pāpa anta--_anta gatam_gam antam_anta avasānam_avasāna tad--_tad nimittena_nimitta dvandva--_dvaṃdva mohena_moha rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi nibandhana--_nibandhana viparyāsena_viparyāsa svatas_svatas eva_eva nirmuktāḥ_nirmuc punar_punar āvṛtti--_āvṛtti ayogya--_ayogya tvena_tva tyaktāḥ_tyaj dṛḍha--_dṛḍha vratāḥ_vrata acālya--_acālya saṃkalpāḥ_saṃkalpa sarvathā_sarvathā bhagavān_bhagavant eva_eva bhajnīyaḥ_bhaj sa_tad ca_ca pramāṇa--_pramāṇa janita--_janay aprāmāṇya--_aprāmāṇya śaṅkā--_śaṅkā śūnya--_śūnya vijñānāḥ_vijñāna santaḥ_as mām_mad paramātmānam_paramātman bhajante_bhaj ananya--_ananya śaraṇāḥ_śaraṇa santaḥ_as sevante_sev etādṛśāḥ_etādṛśa eva_eva catur--_catur vidhāḥ_vidha bhajante_bhaj mām_mad iti_iti atra_atra sukṛti--_sukṛti śabdena_śabda uktāḥ_vac atas_atas sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta saṃmoham_sammoha yānti_yā iti_iti utsargaḥ_utsarga teṣām_tad madhye_madhya ye_yad sukṛtinaḥ_sukṛtin te_tad saṃmoha--_sammoha śūnyāḥ_śūnya mām_mad bhajante_bhaj iti_iti apavādaḥ_apavāda iti_iti na_na virodhaḥ_virodha ayam_idam eva_eva utsargaḥ_utsarga prāk_prāk api_api pratipāditaḥ_pratipāday tribhiḥ_tri guṇa--_guṇa mayaiḥ_maya bhāvaiḥ_bhāva iti_iti atra_atra tasmāt_tasmāt sarttva--_sarttva śodhaka--_śodhaka puṇya--_puṇya karma--_karman saṃcāya_saṃcāy sarvadā_sarvadā yatanīyam_yat iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 28_28

āha_ah teṣām_tad sattva--_sattva guṇa--_guṇa udreke_udreka sati_as tamaḥ--_tamas guṇa--_guṇa hrāsaḥ_hrāsa tasmin_tad sati_as tad--_tad kāryaḥ_kṛ mohaḥ_moha api_api hrasati_hras moha--_moha hrāse_hrāsa sati_as te_tad khalu_khalu ati_ati āsakti--_āsakti rahitāḥ_rahita yādṛcchika--_yādṛcchika mad--_mad bhakta--_bhakta saṅgena_saṅga bhajante_bhaj mātram_mātra ye_yad tu_tu bhajana--_bhajana ādi--_ādi abhyāsataḥ_abhyāsa samyak_samyak naṣṭa--_naś pāpāḥ_pāpa te_tad mohena_moha niḥśeṣeṇa_niḥśeṣa muktāḥ_muc dṛḍha--_dṛḍha vratāḥ_vrata prāpta--_prāp niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā santaḥ_as mām_mad bhajante_bhaj na_na ca_ca evam_evam puṇya--_puṇya karma_karman eva_eva sarva--_sarva vidhayoḥ_vidha bhakteḥ_bhakti kāraṇam_kāraṇa iti_iti mantavyam_man

lg.l: yam_yad na_na yogena_yoga sāṅkhyena_sāṃkhya dāna--_dāna vrata--_vrata tapaḥ--_tapas adhvaraiḥ_adhvara
vyākhyā--_vyākhyā svādhyāya--_svādhyāya sannyāsaiḥ_saṃnyāsa prāpnuyāt_prāp yatnavān_yatnavat api_api

div.p: iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant ukteḥ_ukti kevala--_kevala bhakti--_bhakti yogasya_yoga puṇya--_puṇya ādi--_ādi karma--_karman āśrayam_āśraya na_na eva_eva kāraṇam_kāraṇa iti_iti bahuśas_bahuśas pratipādanāt_pratipādana

baladevaḥ_baladeva pratīyate_pratī syāt_as sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta sarge_sarga saṃmoham_sammoha yānti_yā iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah yeṣām_yad prāṇinām_prāṇin yādṛcchika--_yādṛcchika mahattama--_mahattama dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi pātāt_pāta pāpam_pāpa anta--_anta gatam_gam nāśam_nāśa prāptam_prāp abhūt_bhū viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu bhūtāni_bhūta bhūtānām_bhūta pāvanāya_pāvana kīdṛśānām_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah puṇya--_puṇya iti_iti puṇyam_puṇya manojñam_manojña karma_karman mahattama--_mahattama vīkṣaṇa--_vīkṣaṇa rūpam_rūpa yeṣām_yad puṇyam_puṇya tu_tu cāru_cāru api_api iti_iti amaraḥ_amara te_tad dṛḍha--_dṛḍha vratāḥ_vrata mahat--_mahat prasaṅga--_prasaṅga prāpta--_prāp niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā dvandva--_dvaṃdva mohena_moha nirmuktāḥ_nirmuc mad--_mad tattva--_tattva jñāḥ_jña santaḥ_as mām_mad bhajante_bhaj 28_28
BhG 7.29

lg.l: jarā--_jarā maraṇa--_maraṇa mokṣāya_mokṣa mām_mad āśritya_āśri yatanti_yat ye_yad
te_tad brahma_brahman tat_tad viduḥ_vid kṛtsnam_kṛtsna adhyātmam_adhyātma karma_karman ca_ca akhilam_akhila

div.p: bhavanti_bhū āha_ah jarā--_jarā maraṇayoḥ_maraṇa mokṣāya_mokṣa nirasana--_nirasana artham_artha mām_mad āśritya_āśri ye_yad prayatante_prayat te_tad tat_tad param_para brahma_brahman viduḥ_vid kṛtsnam_kṛtsna adhyātmam_adhyātma ca_ca viduḥ_vid yena_yad tat_tad prāptavyam_prāp tam_tad deha--_deha ādi--_ādi vyatiriktam_vyatiric śuddham_śuddha ātmānam_ātman ca_ca jānanti_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad sādhana--_sādhana bhūtam_bhū akhilam_akhila sa_sa rahasyam_rahasya karma_karman ca_ca jānanti_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 29_29

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana atha_atha idānīm_idānīm arjunasya_arjuna praśyan_praś utthāpayitum_utthāpay sūtra--_sūtra bhūtau_bhū ślokau_śloka ucyete_vac anayoḥ_idam eva_eva vṛtti--_vṛtti sthānīyaḥ_sthānīya uttaraḥ_uttara adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya bhaviṣyati_bhū jarā_jarā iti_iti ye_yad saṃsāra--_saṃsāra duḥkhāt_duḥkha nirviṇṇāḥ_nirviṇṇa jarā--_jarā maraṇayoḥ_maraṇa mokṣāya_mokṣa jarā--_jarā maraṇa--_maraṇa ādi--_ādi vividha--_vividha duḥsaha--_duḥsaha saṃsāra--_saṃsāra duḥkha--_duḥkha nirāsāya_nirāsa tad--_tad eka--_eka hetum_hetu mām_mad sa_sa guṇam_guṇa bhagavantam_bhagavant āśritya_āśri itara--_itara sarva--_sarva vaimukhyena_vaimukhya phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi śūnyāni_śūnya vihitāni_vidhā karmāṇi_karman kurvanti_kṛ te_tad krameṇa_krameṇa śuddha--_śudh antaḥkaraṇāḥ_antaḥkaraṇa santaḥ_as tad--_tad jagat--_jagant kāraṇam_kāraṇa māyā--_māyā adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna śuddham_śudh param_para brahma_brahman nirguṇam_nirguṇa tad--_tad pada--_pada lakṣyam_lakṣay mām_mad viduḥ_vid karma_karman ca_ca tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya vedana--_vedana sādhanam_sādhana guru--_guru upasadana--_upasadana śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana ādi--_ādi akhilam_akhila niravaśeṣam_niravaśeṣa phala--_phala avyabhicāri_avyabhicārin viduḥ_vid jānanti_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 29_29

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tat_tad evam_evam ārta--_ārta ādyāḥ_ādya trayaḥ_tri sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma mām_mad bhajantaḥ_bhaj kṛtārthāḥ_kṛtārtha bhavanti_bhū iti_iti devatā--_devatā antaram_antara bhajantaḥ_bhaj tu_tu cyavante_cyu iti_iti uktvā_vac svasya_sva abhajane_abhajana api_api adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin ca_ca uktāḥ_vac bhagavatā_bhagavant idānīm_idānīm anyaḥ_anya sa_sa kāmaḥ_kāma caturthaḥ_caturtha api_api mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta asti_as iti_iti āha_ah jarā_jarā iti_iti jarā--_jarā maraṇayoḥ_maraṇa mokṣāya_mokṣa nāśāya_nāśa ye_yad yoginaḥ_yogin yatanti_yat yatante_yat ye_yad mokṣa--_mokṣa kāmāḥ_kāma mām_mad bhajanti_bhaj iti_iti phalitaḥ_phalita arthaḥ_artha te_tad tam_tad prasiddham_prasidh brahma_brahman tathā_tathā kṛtsnam_kṛtsna ātmānam_ātman deham_deha adhikṛtya_adhikṛ bhoktṛtayā_bhoktṛtā vartamānam_vṛt adhyātmam_adhyātma jīvātmānam_jīvātman akhilam_akhila karma_karman ca_ca nānā_nānā vidha--_vidha karma--_karman janyam_jan jīvasya_jīva saṃsāram_saṃsāra ca_ca mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti prabhāvāt_prabhāva eva_eva 29_29

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad evam_evam ārta--_ārta ādayaḥ_ādi sa_sa kāmāḥ_kāma mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta kāmān_kāma anubhūya_anubhū ante_anta mām_mad prapadya_prapad vindanti_vid mad--_mad anya--_anya deva--_deva bhaktāḥ_bhakta tu_tu saṃsaranti_saṃsṛ iti_iti uktam_vac atha_atha tebhyaḥ_tad anyaḥ_anya api_api sa_sa kāmaḥ_kāma mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta asti_as iti_iti ucyate_vac jarā_jarā iti_iti ye_yad jarā--_jarā maraṇābhyām_maraṇa vimokṣāya_vimokṣa tad--_tad mātra--_mātra kāmāḥ_kāma santaḥ_as mām_mad āśritya_āśri mad--_mad arcām_arcā sevitvā_sev yatante_yat tat_tad praṇāma--_praṇāma ādi_ādi kurvanti_kṛ te_tad tat_tad prasiddham_prasidh brahma_brahman kṛtsnam_kṛtsna sa_sa parikaram_parikara viduḥ_vid adhyātmam_adhyātma ca_ca akhilam_akhila karma_karman ca_ca viduḥ_vid brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi śabdānām_śabda adhibhūta--_adhibhūta ādi--_ādi śabdānām_śabda ca_ca arthāḥ_artha parasmin_para adhyāye_adhyāya bhagavatā_bhagavant eva_eva vyākhyāsyante_vyākhyā mad--_mad arcā--_arcā sevayā_sevā vijñeyam_vijñā vijñāya_vijñā muktim_mukti labhante_labh na_na tu_tu mad--_mad vaśya--_vaśya tā--_tā karīm_kara mad--_mad priya--_priya tām_tā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah sakṛt_sakṛt yat_yat aṅga_aṅga mona--_mona mayīm_maya bhāgavatīm_bhāgavata dadau_dā gatim_gati iti_iti ādyā_ādya 29_29
BhG 7.30

lg.l: sa_sa adhibhūta--_adhibhūta adhidaivam_adhidaiva mām_mad sa_sa adhiyajñam_adhiyajña ca_ca ye_yad viduḥ_vid
prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla api_api ca_ca mām_mad te_tad viduḥ_vid yukta--_yuj cetasaḥ_cetas

div.p: āha_ah adhibhūta--_adhibhūta ādi--_ādi śabdānām_śabda artham_artha śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant eva_eva uttara--_uttara adhyāye_adhyāya vyākhyāsyati_vyākhyā adhibhūtena_adhibhūta adhidaivena_adhidaiva ca_ca saha_saha adhiyajñena_adhiyajña ca_ca saha_saha mām_mad ye_yad jānanti_jñā te_tad yukta--_yuj cetasaḥ_cetas mayi_mad āsakta--_āsañj manasaḥ_manas prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla api_api maraṇa--_maraṇa samaye_samaya api_api mām_mad viduḥ_vid jānanti_jñā na_na tu_tu tat_tad api_api vyākulībhūya_vyākulībhū mām_mad vismaranti_vismṛ atas_atas mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta na_na yoga--_yoga bhraṃśa--_bhraṃśa śaṅkā_śaṅkā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

lg.l: kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa bhaktaiḥ_bhakta ayatnena_ayatna brahma--_brahman jñānam_jñāna avāpyate_avāp
iti_iti vijñāna--_vijñāna yoga--_yoga artham_artha saptame_saptama saṃprakāśitam_saṃprakāśay

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī vijñāna--_vijñāna yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma saptamaḥ_saptama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evaṃbhūtānām_evaṃbhūta mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta mṛtyu--_mṛtyu kāle_kāla vivaśa--_vivaśa karaṇatayā_karaṇatā mad--_mad vismaraṇam_vismaraṇa śaṅkanīyam_śaṅk adhibhūta--_adhibhūta adhidaivam_adhidaiva adhibhūta--_adhibhūta ādidaivābhyām_ādidaiva sahitam_sahita tathā_tathā sa_sa adhiyajñam_adhiyajña ca_ca adhiyajñena_adhiyajña cintayanti_cintay te_tad yukta--_yuj cetasaḥ_cetas sarvadā_sarvadā mayi_mad samāhita--_samāhita cetasaḥ_cetas santaḥ_as tad--_tad saṃskāra--_saṃskāra pāṭavāt_pāṭava prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla prāṇa--_prāṇa utkramaṇa--_utkramaṇa kāle_kāla karaṇa--_karaṇa grāmasya_grāma atyanta--_atyanta vyagra--_vyagra tāyām_tā api_api ca-kārāt_ca-kāra ayatnena_ayatna eva_eva mad--_mad kṛpayā_kṛpā mām_mad sarva--_sarva ātmānam_ātman viduḥ_vid jānanti_jñā teṣām_tad mṛti--_mṛti kāle_kāla api_api mad--_mad ākārā_ākāra eva_eva citta--_citta vṛttiḥ_vṛtti pūrva--_pūrva upacita--_upaci saṃskāra--_saṃskāra pāṭavāt_pāṭava bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā ca_ca te_tad mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti yogāt_yoga kṛtārthāḥ_kṛtārtha eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

adhibhūta--_adhibhūta adhidaiva--_adhidaiva adhiyajña--_adhiyajña śabdān_śabda uttare_uttara adhyāye_adhyāya arjuna--_arjuna praśna--_praśna pūrvakam_pūrvaka vyākhyāsyati_vyākhyā bhagavān_bhagavat iti_iti sarvam_sarva anāvilam_anāvila tat_tad atra_atra uttama--_uttama adhikāriṇam_adhikārin prati_prati jñeyam_jñā madhyama--_madhyama adhikāriṇam_adhikārin prati_prati ca_ca dhyeyam_dhyā lakṣaṇayā_lakṣaṇā mukhyayā_mukhya ca_ca vṛttyā_vṛtti tad--_tad pada--_pada pratipādyam_pratipāday brahma_brahman nirūpitam_nirūpay

iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍha--_guh artha--_artha dīpikāyām_dīpikā adhikāri--_adhikārin bhedena_bheda jñeya--_jñā dhyeya--_dhyā nāma_nāman
saptamaḥ_saptama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti prabhāvāt_prabhāva yeṣām_yad īdṛśam_īdṛśa mad--_mad jñānam_jñāna syāt_as teṣām_tad anta--_anta kāle_kāla api_api tat_tad eva_eva jñānam_jñāna syāt_as na_na tu_tu anyeṣām_anya iva_iva karma--_karman upasthāpitā_upasthāpay bhāvi--_bhāvin deha--_deha prāpti--_prāpti anurūpā_anurūpa matiḥ_mati iti_iti āha_ah sādhi--_sādhi bhūtā_bhū iti_iti adhibhūta--_adhibhūta ādayaḥ_ādi agrima--_agrima adhyāye_adhyāya vyākhyāsyante_vyākhyā bhaktāḥ_bhakta eva_eva hareḥ_hari tattva--_tattva vidaḥ_vid māyām_māyā taranti_tṛ te_tad ca_ca uktāḥ_vac ṣaḍvidhāḥ_ṣaḍvidha atrā_atra iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay

lg.l: iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha varṣiṇyām_varṣin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
gītāsu_gītā saptamaḥ_saptama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah adhibhūtena_adhibhūta adhidaivena_adhidaiva adhiyajñena_adhiyajña ca_ca sahitam_sahita mām_mad ye_yad viduḥ_vid sat--_sat prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga jānanti_jñā te_tad prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla mṛtyu--_mṛtyu samaye_samaya api_api mām_mad viduḥ_vid na_na tu_tu tad--_tad anya--_anya vat_vat vyagrāḥ_vyagra santaḥ_as mām_mad vismaranti_vismṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: mām_mad viduḥ_vid tattvataḥ_tattva bhaktāḥ_bhakta mad--_mad māyām_māyā uttaranti_uttṛ te_tad
te_tad punar_punar pañcadhā_pañcadhā iti_iti eṣa_etad saptamasya_saptama vinirṇayaḥ_vinirṇaya

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya saptamaḥ_saptama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
Bhagavadgita 8
BhG 8.1

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
kim_ka tat_tad brahma_brahman kim_ka adhyātmam_adhyātma kim_ka karma_karman puruṣottama_puruṣottama
adhibhūtam_adhibhūta ca_ca kim_ka proktam_pravac adhidaivam_adhidaiva kim_ka ucyate_vac
brahma--_brahman karma--_karman adhibhūta--_adhibhūta ādi_ādi viduḥ_vid kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa eka--_eka cetasaḥ_cetas
iti_iti uktam_vac brahma--_brahman karma--_karman ādi_ādi spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa aṣṭame_aṣṭama ucyate_vac

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta bhagavatā_bhagavant upakṣiptānām_upakṣip brahma--_brahman adhyātma--_adhyātma ādi--_ādi saptānām_saptan padarthānām_padartha tattvam_tattva jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac kim_ka tat_tad brahma_brahman iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi spaṣṭaḥ_spaṣṭa arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta te_tad brahma_brahman tat_tad viduḥ_vid kṛtsnam_kṛtsna adhyātmam_adhyātma karma_karman ca_ca akhilam_akhila iti_iti ādinā_ādi sārdha--_sārdha ślokena_śloka sapta--_saptan padārthāḥ_padārtha jñeya--_jñā tvena_tva bhagavatā_bhagavant sūtritāḥ_sūtray teṣām_tad vṛtti--_vṛtti sthānīyaḥ_sthānīya tatra_tatra sūtritāni_sūtrita sapta--_saptan vastūni_vastu viśeṣataḥ_viśeṣataḥ bubhutsamānaḥ_bubhuts ślokābhyām_śloka tad--_tad jñeya--_jñā tvena_tva uktam_vac brahma_brahman kim_ka sa_sa upādhikam_upādhika nirupādhikam_nirupādhika vā_vā evam_evam ātmānam_ātman deham_deha adhikṛtya_adhikṛ tasmin_tad adhiṣṭhāne_adhiṣṭhāna tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti adhyātmam_adhyātma kim_ka śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi karaṇa--_karaṇa grāmaḥ_grāma vā_vā pratyak--_pratyañc caitanyam_caitanya vā_vā tathā_tathā karma_karman ca_ca akhilam_akhila iti_iti atra_atra kim_ka karma_karman yajña--_yajña rūpam_rūpa anyat_anya vā_vā vijñāntam_vijñā yajñam_yajña tanute_tan karmāṇi_karman tanute_tan api_api ca_ca iti_iti śrutau_śruti dvaividhya--_dvaividhya śravaṇāt_śravaṇa

tava_tvad mama_mad ca_ca sama--_sama tvāt_tva katham_katham tvam_tvad mām_mad pṛcchasi_pracch iti_iti śaṅkām_śaṅkā apanudan_apanud sarva--_sarva puruṣebhyaḥ_puruṣa uttamasya_uttama sarvajñasya_sarvajña tava_tvad na_na kiṃcid_kaścit ajñeyam_ajñeya iti_iti saṃbodhanena_sambodhana sūcayati_sūcay he_he puruṣottama_puruṣottama iti_iti adhibhūtam_adhibhūta ca_ca kim_ka proktam_pravac pṛthivī--_pṛthivī ādi--_ādi bhūtam_bhūta adhikṛtya_adhikṛ yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit kāryam_kārya adhibhūta--_adhibhūta padena_pada vivakṣitam_vivakṣita kim_ka vā_vā samastam_samasta eva_eva kārya--_kārya jātam_jan ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra sarveṣām_sarva praśnānām_praśna samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha adhidaivam_adhidaiva kim_ka ucyate_vac devatā--_devatā viṣayam_viṣaya anudhyānam_anudhyāna vā_vā sarva--_sarva daivateṣu_daivata anusyūtam_anusīv caitanyam_caitanya vā_vā

lg.l: pārtha_pārtha praśna--_praśna uttaram_uttara yogam_yoga miśrām_miśra bhaktim_bhakti prasaṅgataḥ_prasaṅga
śuddhām_śudh ca_ca bhaktim_bhakti provāca_pravac dve_dvi gatī_gati api_api ca_ca asṭame_asṭama

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi sapta--_saptan padārthānām_padārtha jñānam_jñāna bhagavatā_bhagavant uktam_vac atra_atra teṣām_tad tattvam_tattva jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu pṛcchati_pracch dvābhyām_dvi atra_atra dehe_deha kaḥ_ka adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña yajña--_yajña adhiṣṭhātā_adhiṣṭhātṛ sa_tad ca_ca asmin_idam dehe_deha katham_katham

lg.l: baladevaḥ_baladeva
utkān_utka pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch kramāt_kramāt vyākhyat_vyākhyā brahma--_brahman ādīn_ādi hariḥ_hari aṣṭame_aṣṭama
yoga--_yoga miśrām_miśra ca_ca śuddhām_śuddha ca_ca bhakti--_bhakti mārga--_mārga dvayam_dvaya tathā_tathā

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta mumukṣāṇām_mumukṣa jñeya--_jñā tayā_tā uddiṣṭān_uddiś brahma--_brahman ādīn_ādi sapta--_saptan arthān_artha viboddhum_vibudh arjunaḥ_arjuna pṛcchati_pracch kim_ka tat_tad brahma_brahman iti_iti kim_ka paramātma--_paramātman caitanyam_caitanya vā_vā kim_ka jīvātma--_jīvātman caitanyam_caitanya vā_vā tat_tad brahma_brahman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka adhyātmam_adhyātma iti_iti ātmānam_ātman deham_deha adhikṛtya_adhikṛ iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi indriya--_indriya vṛndam_vṛnda vā_vā sūkṣma--_sūkṣma bhūta--_bhūta vṛndam_vṛnda vā_vā tat_tad iti_iti āvayoḥ_mad taulyāt_taulya kim_ka iti_iti mām_mad pṛcchasi_pracch iti_iti śaṅkām_śaṅkā nivartayitum_nivartay sambodhanam_sambodhana he_he puruṣottama_puruṣottama iti_iti pareśa--_pareśa tvāt_tva tava_tvad sarvam_sarva su_su viditam_vid na_na tu_tu bhāvaḥ_bhāva adhibhūtam_adhibhūta ca_ca kim_ka iti_iti bhūtāni_bhūta adhikṛtya_adhikṛ iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti ghaṭi--_ghaṭin ādi--_ādi kāryam_kārya vā_vā sthūla--_sthūla śarīram_śarīra vā_vā tat_tad iti_iti adhidaivam_adhidaiva kim_ka iti_iti devatā--_devatā viṣayakam_viṣayaka anudhyānam_anudhyāna vā_vā samaṣṭiḥ_samaṣṭi virāj_virāj vā_vā tat_tad iti_iti
BhG 8.2

lg.l: adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña katham_katham kaḥ_ka atra_atra dehe_deha asmin_idam madhusūdana_madhusūdana
prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla ca_ca katham_katham jñeyaḥ_jñā asi_as niyata--_niyam ātmabhiḥ_ātman

div.p: atra_atra dehe_deha yaḥ_yad yajñaḥ_yajña nivartate_nivṛt tasmin_tad kaḥ_ka adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña adhiṣṭhātā_adhiṣṭhātṛ prayojakaḥ_prayojaka phala--_phala dātā_dātṛ ca_ca kaḥ_ka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha svarūpam_svarūpa pṛṣṭvā_pracch adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna prakāram_prakāra pṛcchati_pracch katham_katham kena_ka prakāreṇa_prakāra asau_adas asmin_idam dehe_deha sthitaḥ_sthā yajñam_yajña adhitiṣṭhanti_adhiṣṭhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yajña--_yajña grahaṇam_grahaṇa sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa artham_artha anta--_anta kāle_kāla ca_ca niyata--_niyam cittaiḥ_citta puruṣaiḥ_puruṣa katham_katham kena_ka upāyena_upāya jñeyaḥ_jñā asi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña yajñam_yajña adhigataḥ_adhigam devatā--_devatā ātmā_ātman vā_vā para--_para brahma_brahman vā_vā sa_tad ca_ca katham_katham kena_ka prakāreṇa_prakāra cintanīyaḥ_cintay kim_ka tādātmyena_tādātmya kim_ka vā_vā atyanta--_atyanta abhedena_abheda sarvathā_sarvathā api_api sa_tad kim_kim asmin_idam dehe_deha vartate_vṛt tatas_tatas bahis_bahis vā_vā dehe_deha ced_ced sa_tad kaḥ_ka atra_atra buddhi--_buddhi ādiḥ_ādi tad--_tad vyatiriktaḥ_vyatiric vā_vā adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña katham_katham kaḥ_ka atra_atra iti_iti na_na praśna--_praśna dvayam_dvaya kintu_kintu sa_sa prakāraḥ_prakāra ekaḥ_eka eva_eva praśnaḥ_praśna iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś parama--_parama kāruṇika--_kāruṇika tvāt_tva āyāsena_āyāsa api_api sarva--_sarva upadrava--_upadrava nivārakasya_nivāraka bhagavataḥ_bhagavant anāyāsena_anāyāsa mad--_mad saneha--_saneha upadrava--_upadrava nivāraṇam_nivāraṇa īṣatkaram_īṣatkara ucitam_ucita eva_eva iti_iti sūcayan_sūcay sambodhayati_sambodhay he_he madhusūdana_madhusūdana iti_iti

prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla ca_ca sarva--_sarva karaṇa--_karaṇa grāma--_grāma vaiyāgryāt_vaiyāgrya citta--_citta samādhāna--_samādhāna anupapatteḥ_anupapatti katham_katham kena_ka prakāreṇa_prakāra niyata--_niyam ātmabhiḥ_ātman samāhita--_samāhita cittaiḥ_citta jñeyaḥ_jñā asi_as iti_iti ukta--_vac śaṅkā--_śaṅkā sūcana--_sūcana arthaḥ_artha cakāraḥ_cakāra etat_etad sarvam_sarva sarvajña--_sarvajña tvāt_tva parama--_parama kāruṇika--_kāruṇika tvāt_tva ca_ca śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgatam_āgam mām_mad prati_prati kathaya_kathay iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña kaḥ_ka iti_iti yajñam_yajña adhigataḥ_adhigam indra--_indra ādiḥ_ādi vā_vā viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu vā_vā saḥ_tad iti_iti katham_katham iti_iti tasya_tad adhiyajña--_adhiyajña bhāvaḥ_bhāva katham_katham iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etat_etad sarvam_sarva mad--_mad sandeha--_saṃdeha nivāraṇam_nivāraṇa tava_tvad īṣatkaram_īṣatkara iti_iti bodhayitum_bodhay sambodhanam_sambodhana he_he madhusūdana_madhusūdana iti_iti prayāṇa--_prayāṇa iti_iti tadā_tadā sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vyagra--_vyagra tayā_tā citta--_citta samādhāna--_samādhāna asma--_asman bhavāt_bhava iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 8.3

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman paramam_parama svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva adhyātmam_adhyātma ucyate_vac
bhūta--_bhūta bhāva--_bhāva udbhava--_udbhava karaḥ_kara visargaḥ_visarga karma--_karman saṃjñitaḥ_saṃjñita

div.p: uvāca_vac na_na kṣarati_kṣar na_na calati_cal iti_iti akṣaram_akṣara nanu_nanu jīvaḥ_jīva api_api akṣaraḥ_akṣara paramam_parama yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara jagataḥ_jagant mūla--_mūla kāraṇam_kāraṇa tat_tad braham_braha etat_etad vai_vai tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa abhivadanti_abhivad iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti svasya_sva eva_eva brahmaṇaḥ_brahman eva_eva aṃśa--_aṃśa tayā_tā jīva--_jīva rūpeṇa_rūpa bhavanam_bhavana svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva saḥ_tad eva_eva ātmānam_ātman deham_deha adhikṛtya_adhikṛ bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvena_tva vartamānaḥ_vṛt adhyātma--_adhyātma śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhūtānām_bhūta jarāyu--_jarāyu ja--_ja ādīnām_ādi bhāvaḥ_bhāva utpattiḥ_utpatti udbhavaḥ_udbhava ca_ca utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tvena_tva bhavanam_bhavana udbhavaḥ_udbhava

lg.l: agnau_agni prāsta--_prās āhutiḥ_āhuti samyak_samyak ādityam_āditya upatiṣṭhate_upasthā
ādityāt_āditya jāyate_jan vṛṣṭiḥ_vṛṣṭi vṛṣṭeḥ_vṛṣṭi annam_anna tatas_tatas prajā_prajā

div.p: iti_iti krameṇa_krameṇa vṛddhiḥ_vṛddhi tau_tad bhūta--_bhū bhāva--_bhāva udbhavau_udbhava karoti_kṛ yaḥ_yad visargaḥ_visarga devatā--_devatā uddeśena_uddeśa dravya--_dravya tyāga--_tyāga rūpaḥ_rūpa yajñaḥ_yajña sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad sa_tad ca_ca karma--_karman śabda--_śabda vācyaḥ_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam saptānām_saptan praśnānām_praśna krameṇa_krameṇa uttaram_uttara tribhiḥ_tri ślokaiḥ_śloka praśna--_praśna krameṇa_krama hi_hi nirṇaye_nirṇaya praṣṭuḥ_praṣṭṛ abhīṣṭa--_abhīṣ siddhiḥ_siddhi anāyāsena_anāyāsa syāt_as iti_iti abhiprāyavān_abhiprāyavat bhagavān_bhagavat atra_atra śloke_śloka praśna--_praśna trayam_traya krameṇa_krameṇa nirdhāritavān_nirdhāray evam_evam dvitīya--_dvitīya śloke_śloka api_api praśna--_praśna trayam_traya tṛtīya--_tṛtīya śloke_śloka tu_tu ekam_eka iti_iti vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga nirupādhikam_nirupādhika eva_eva brahma_brahman atra_atra vivakṣitam_vivakṣita brahma--_brahman śabdena_śabda na_na tu_tu sopādhikam_sopādhika iti_iti prathama--_prathama praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah akṣaram_akṣara na_na kṣarati_kṣar iti_iti avināśi_avināśin aśnute_aś vā_vā sarvam_sarva iti_iti sarva--_sarva vyāpakam_vyāpaka etat_etad vai_vai tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa abhivadanti_abhivad a_a sthūlam_sthūla an_an aṇu_aṇu iti_iti ādi_ādi upakramya_upakram etasya_etad vai_vai akṣarasya_akṣara praśāsane_praśāsana gārgi_gārgī sūryā--_sūryā candramasau_candramas vidhṛtau_vidhṛ tiṣṭhataḥ_sthā na_na anyat_anya atas_atas asti_as khalu_khalu akṣare_akṣara gārgi_gārgī ākāśaḥ_ākāśa otaḥ_āve ca_ca protaḥ_prave ca_ca iti_iti upasaṃhṛtam_upasaṃhṛ śrutyā_śruti sarva--_sarva upādhi--_upādhi śūnyam_śūnya sarvasya_sarva praśāsitṛ_praśāsitṛ avyākṛta--_avyākṛta ākāśa--_ākāśa antasya_anta kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna prapañcasya_prapañca dhārayitṛ_dhārayitṛ asmin_idam ca_ca śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya saṃghāte_saṃghāta vijñātṛ_vijñātṛ etat_etad eva_eva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ paramam_parama iti_iti paramam_parama sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa paramānanda--_paramānanda rūpam_rūpa praśāsanasya_praśāsana kṛtsna--_kṛtsna jaḍa--_jaḍa varga--_varga dhāraṇasya_dhāraṇa ca_ca liṅgasya_liṅga tatra_tatra eva_eva upapatteḥ_upapatti akṣaram_akṣara ambara--_ambara anta--_anta dhṛteḥ_dhṛti iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya

na_na tu_tu iha_iha akṣara--_akṣara śabdasya_śabda varṇa--_varṇa mātre_mātra rūḍha--_ruh tvāt_tva śruti--_śruti liṅga--_liṅga adhikaraṇa--_adhikaraṇa nyāya--_nyāya mūlakena_mūlaka rūḍhiḥ_rūḍhi yogam_yoga apaharati_apahṛ iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya rathakāra--_rathakāra śabdena_śabda jāti--_jāti viśeṣavat--_viśeṣavat praṇava--_praṇava ākhyam_ākhyā akṣaram_akṣara eva_eva om_oṃ iti_iti ekākṣaram_ekākṣara brahma_brahman iti_iti ca_ca pareṇa_para viśeṣaṇāt_viśeṣaṇa ānaarthakya--_ānaarthakya pratihatānām_pratihan viparītam_viparīta balābalam_balābala iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya varṣāsu_varṣā rathakāraḥ_rathakāra ādadhīta_ādhā iti_iti atra_atra tu_tu jāti--_jāti viśeṣe_viśeṣa na_na asti_as asambhavaḥ_asaṃbhava iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa etāvān_etāvat tu_tu iha_iha viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa ananyathā_ananyathā siddhena_sidh liṅgena_liṅga śruteḥ_śruti bādhe_bādha yatra_yatra yogaḥ_yoga sambhavati_sambhū tatra_tatra saḥ_tad eva_eva gṛhyate_grah mukhya--_mukhya tvāt_tva yathā_yathā ājyaiḥ_ājya stuvate_stu pṛṣṭaiḥ_pracch stuvate_stu iti_iti ādau_ādi yathā_yathā ca_ca atra_atra eva_eva akṣara--_akṣara śabde_śabda yatra_yatra tu_tu yogaḥ_yoga api_api na_na sambhavati_sambhū tatra_tatra gauṇī_gauṇa vṛttiḥ_vṛtti yathā_yathā ākāśa--_ākāśa prāṇa--_prāṇa ādi--_ādi śabdeṣu_śabda ākāśa--_ākāśa śabdasya_śabda api_api brahmaṇi_brahman ā_ā samantāt_samantāt kāśate_kāś iti_iti yogaḥ_yoga sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti ced_ced saḥ_tad eva_eva gṛhyatām_grah iti_iti pañcapādīkṛtaḥ_pañcapādīkṛ tathā_tathā ca_ca parāmarṣam_parāmarṣa sūtram_sūtra prasiddheḥ_prasiddhi ca_ca iti_iti kṛtam_kṛ vistareṇa_vistara

tat_tad evam_evam kim_ka tat_tad brahma_brahman iti_iti nirṇītam_nirṇī kim_ka adhyātmam_adhyātma nirṇīyate_nirṇī yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman iti_iti uktam_vac tasya_tad eva_eva svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva svaḥ_sva bhāvaḥ_bhāva svarūpam_svarūpa pratyak--_pratyañc caitanyam_caitanya na_na tu_tu svasya_sva bhāvaḥ_bhāva iti_iti ṣaṣṭhī--_ṣaṣṭhī samāsaḥ_samāsa lakṣaṇā--_lakṣaṇā prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga ṣaṣṭhī--_ṣaṣṭhī tatpuruṣa--_tatpuruṣa bādhena_bādha karma--_karman dhāraya--_dhāraya parigrahasya_parigraha śruta--_śru padārtha--_padārtha anvayena_anvaya viṣāda--_viṣāda sthapati--_sthapati adhikaraṇa--_adhikaraṇa siddha--_sidh tvāt_tva tasmāt_tasmāt na_na brahmaṇaḥ_brahman saṃbandhi_sambandhin kintu_kiṃtu brahma--_brahman svarūpam_svarūpa eva_eva ātmānam_ātman deham_deha adhikṛtya_adhikṛ bhoktṛtayā_bhoktṛtā vartamānam_vṛt adhyātmam_adhyātma ucyate_vac adhyātma--_adhyātma śabdena_śabda abhidhīyate_abhidhā na_na karaṇa--_karaṇa grāmaḥ_grāma iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

yāga--_yāga dāna--_dāna homa--_homa ātmakam_ātmaka vaidikam_vaidika karma_karman eva_eva atra_atra karma--_karman śabdena_śabda vivikṣitam_vivikṣ iti_iti tṛtīya--_tṛtīya praśna--_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah bhūtānām_bhūta bhavana--_bhavana dharmakāṇām_dharmaka sarveṣām_sarva sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamānām_jaṅgama bhāvam_bhāva utpattim_utpatti udbhavam_udbhava vṛddhim_vṛddhi tyāgaḥ_tyāga tad--_tad tad--_tad śāstra--_śāstra vihitaḥ_vidhā yāga--_yāga dāna--_dāna homa--_homa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka saḥ_tad iha_iha karma--_karman saṃjñitaḥ_saṃjñita karma--_karman śabdena_śabda uktaḥ_vac iti_iti yāvat_yāvat tatra_tatra devatā--_devatā uddeśena_uddeśa dravya--_dravya tyāgaḥ_tyāga yāgaḥ_yāga uttiṣṭhat_utthā homaḥ_homa vaṣaṭkāra--_vaṣaṭkāra prayoga--_prayoga antaḥ_anta saḥ_tad eva_eva upaviṣṭa--_upaviś homaḥ_homa svāhākāra--_svāhākāra prayoga--_prayoga antaḥ_anta āsecana--_āsecana paryantaḥ_paryanta homaḥ_homa sarvatra_sarvatra ca_ca tyāga--_tyāga aṃśaḥ_aṃśa anugataḥ_anugam tasya_tad ca_ca bhā̆ta--_bhā bhāva--_bhāva udbhava--_udbhava kara--_kara tvam_tva
agnau_agni prāsta--_prās āhutiḥ_āhuti samyak_samyak ādityam_āditya upatiṣṭhate_upasthā ādityāt_āditya jāyate_jan vṛṣṭiḥ_vṛṣṭi vṛṣṭeḥ_vṛṣṭi annam_anna tatas_tatas prajāḥ_prajā iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti
div.l: te_tad vai_vai ete_etad āhutī_āhuti hute_hu utkrāmataḥ_utkram iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca
div.p: āha_ah na_na kṣarati_kṣar iti_iti akṣaram_akṣara nityam_nitya yat_yad paramam_parama tat_tad brahma_brahman etat_etad vai_vai tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa abhivadanti_abhivad iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva sva--_sva ātmānam_ātman deha--_deha adhyāsa--_adhyāsa vaśāt_vaśa bhāvayati_bhāvay janayati_janay iti_iti svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva jīvaḥ_jīva yat_yat vā_vā svam_sva bhāvayati_bhāvay paramātmānam_paramātman prāpayati_prāpay iti_iti svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva śuddha--_śuddha jīvaḥ_jīva adhyātmam_adhyātma ucyate_vac adhyātma--_adhyātma śabda--_śabda vācyaḥ_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhūtaiḥ_bhūta eva_eva bhāvānām_bhāva manuṣya--_manuṣya ādi--_ādi dehānām_deha udbhavam_udbhava karoti_kṛ iti_iti sa_tad visargaḥ_visarga jīvasya_jīva saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra karma--_karman janya--_jan tvāt_tva karma--_karman saṃjñaḥ_saṃjñā karma--_karman śabdena_śabda jīvasya_jīva saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra ucyate_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch bhagavān_bhagavant krameṇa_krameṇa saptānām_saptan uttaram_uttara āha_ah akṣaram_akṣara iti_iti na_na kṣarati_kṣar iti_iti nirkteḥ_nirkti akṣaram_akṣara yat_yad paramam_parama deha--_deha ādi--_ādi viviktam_vivic jīvātma--_jīvātman caitanyam_caitanya tat_tad mayā_mad brahma_brahman iti_iti ucyate_vac tasya_tad akṣara--_akṣara śabda--_śabda tvam_tva brahma--_brahman śabda--_śabda tvam_tva ca_ca avyaktam_avyakta akṣare_akṣara līyate_lī akṣaram_akṣara tamasi_tamas līyate_lī tamaḥ_tamas ekībhavati_ekībhū parasmin_para iti_iti vijñānam_vijñāna brahma_brahman ced_ced veda_vid iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva iti_iti svasya_sva jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman sambandhī_sambandhin yaḥ_yad bhāvaḥ_bhāva bhūta--_bhūta sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tad--_tad vāsanā--_vāsanā lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa padārthaḥ_padārtha pañcāgni--_pañcāgni vidyāyām_vidyā paṭhitaḥ_paṭh tad--_tad ātmani_ātman saṃbadhyamāna--_sambandh tvāt_tva mayā_mad adhyātmam_adhyātma ucyate_vac

bhūta--_bhūta iti_iti teṣām_tad sūkṣmāṇām_sūkṣma bhūtānām_bhūta sthūlaiḥ_sthūla taiḥ_tad saṃpṛktānām_sampṛc bhāvaḥ_bhāva manuṣya--_manuṣya ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa tad--_tad udbhava--_udbhava karaḥ_kara tad--_tad utpādakaḥ_utpādaka yaḥ_yad visargaḥ_visarga sa_tad karma_karman saṃjñitaḥ_saṃjñita jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādi--_ādi karmaṇā_karman svargam_svarga āsādya_āsāday tasmin_tad deva--_deva dehena_deha tad--_tad karma--_karman upabhujya_upabhuj bhāṇḍa--_bhāṇḍa saṃkrānta--_saṃkram ghṛta--_ghṛta śeṣavat--_śeṣavat bhoga--_bhoga urvaritaḥ_urvarita yaḥ_yad karma--_karman śeṣaḥ_śeṣa bhuvi_bhū manuṣya--_manuṣya ādi--_ādi deha--_deha lābhāya_lābha visṛṣṭaḥ_visṛj chāndogye_chāndogya dyu--_div parjanya--_parjanya pṛthivī--_pṛthivī puruṣa--_puruṣa yoṣitsu_yoṣit pañcasu_pañcan agniṣu_agni śraddhā--_śraddhā soma--_soma vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi anna--_anna retāṃsi_retas kramāt_kramāt pañca_pañcan āhutayaḥ_āhuti paṭhyante_paṭh tatra_tatra ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha vaidikaḥ_vaidika jīvaḥ_jīva iha_iha loke_loka asmayāni_asmaya dadhi--_dadhi ādīni_ādi śraddhayā_śraddhā juhoti_hu tāḥ_tad dadhi--_dadhi ādi--_ādi mayyaḥ_maya pañcīkṛta--_pañcīkṛ tvāt_tva pañca--_pañcan bhūta--_bhūta rūpāḥ_rūpa āpaḥ_ap śraddhayā_śraddhā huta--_hu tvāt_tva śraddhā--_śraddhā ākhya--_ākhya āhuti--_āhuti svarūpeṇa_svarūpa tasmin_tad jīve_jīva saṃbaddhāḥ_sambandh
