tiṣṭhanti_sthā atha_atha tasmin_tad mṛte_mṛ tad--_tad indriya--_indriya adhiṣṭhātāraḥ_adhiṣṭhātṛ devāḥ_deva tāḥ_tad dyu--_div loka--_loka agnau_agni juhvati_hu tadvantam_tadvat jīvam_jīva divam_div nayanti_nī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha hutāḥ_hu tāḥ_tad soma--_soma rāja--_rājan ākhya--_ākhya divya--_divya deha--_deha tayā_tā pariṇamante_pariṇam tena_tad dehena_deha sa_tad tatra_tatra karma--_karman phalāni_phala bhuṅkte_bhuj tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga avasāne_avasāna asmayaḥ_asmaya jīvavān_jīvavat dehaiḥ_deha taiḥ_tad devaiḥ_deva parjanya--_parjanya agnau_agni hutaḥ_hu vṛṣṭiḥ_vṛṣṭi bhavati_bhū vṛṣṭi--_vṛṣṭi bhūtāḥ_bhū tāḥ_tad sa_sa jīvāḥ_jīva pṛthivī--_pṛthivī agnau_agni taiḥ_tad hutāḥ_hu brīhi--_brīhi ādi--_ādi anna--_anna bhāvam_bhāva labhante_labh anna--_anna bhūtāḥ_bhū sa_sa jīvāḥ_jīva tāḥ_tad puruṣa--_puruṣa agnau_agni hutāḥ_hu retaḥ--_retas bhāvam_bhāva bhajante_bhaj retaḥ--_retas bhūtāḥ_bhū sa_sa jīvāḥ_jīva tāḥ_tad yoṣit--_yoṣit agnau_agni taiḥ_tad hutāḥ_hu garbha--_garbha ātmanā_ātman sthitāḥ_sthā manuṣya--_manuṣya bhāvam_bhāva prayānti_prayā iti_iti tad--_tad bhāva--_bhāva hetuḥ_hetu anuśaya--_anuśaya śabda--_śabda vācyaḥ_vac karma--_karman śeṣaḥ_śeṣa karma_karman iti_iti evam_evam eva_eva uktam_vac sūtrakṛtā_sūtrakṛt tad--_tad antara--_antara pratipattau_pratipatti iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi
BhG 8.4

lg.l: adhibhūtam_adhibhūta kṣaraḥ_kṣara bhāvaḥ_bhāva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa ca_ca adhidaivatam_adhidaivata
adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña aham_mad eva_eva atra_atra dehe_deha dehabhṛtām_dehabhṛt vara_vara

div.p: bhūtam_bhūta prāṇi--_prāṇin mātram_mātra adhikṛtya_adhikṛ bhavati_bhū iti_iti adhibhūtam_adhibhūta ucyate_vac puruṣaḥ_puruṣa vairājaḥ_vairāja sūrya--_sūrya maṇḍala--_maṇḍala madhya--_madhya vartī_vartin sva--_sva aṃśa--_aṃśa bhūta--_bhū sarva--_sarva devatānām_devatā adhipatiḥ_adhipati adhidaivatam_adhidaivata ucyate_vac adhidaivatam_adhidaivata adhiṣṭhātrī_adhiṣṭhātṛ devatā_devatā sa_tad vai_vai śarīrī_śarīrin prathamaḥ_prathama sa_tad vai_vai puruṣaḥ_puruṣa ucyate_vac ādikartā_ādikartṛ sa_tad bhūtānām_bhūta brahma_brahman agre_agre samavartata_saṃvṛt iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

atra_atra asmin_idam dehe_deha antaryāmi--_antaryāmin tvena_tva sthitaḥ_sthā aham_mad eva_eva adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi karma--_karman pravartakaḥ_pravartaka tad--_tad phala--_phala dātā_dātṛ ca_ca katham_katham iti_iti asya_idam api_api uttaram_uttara anena_idam eva_eva uktam_vac bhraṣṭavyam_bhraṃś antaryāmiṇaḥ_antaryāmin asaṅga--_asaṅga tva--_tva ādibhiḥ_ādi guṇaiḥ_guṇa jīva--_jīva vailakṣaṇyena_vailakṣaṇya deha--_deha antar_antar varti--_vartin tvasya_tva prasiddha--_prasidh tvāt_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti

lg.l: dvā_dvi suparṇā_suparṇa sayujā_sayuj sakhāyā_sakhi
samānam_samāna vṛkṣam_vṛkṣa pariṣasvajāte_pariṣvaj
tayoḥ_tad anyaḥ_anya pippalam_pippala svādu_svādu atti_ad
an_an aśnan_aś anyaḥ_anya abhicākaśīti_abhicākaś

div.l: dehabhṛtām_dehabhṛt madhye_madhya śreṣṭha_śreṣṭha iti_iti sambodhayan_sambodhay tvam_tvad api_api evambhūtam_evambhūta antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin para--_para adhīna--_adhīna sva--_sva pravṛtti--_pravṛtti nivṛtti--_nivṛtti anvaya--_anvaya vyatirekābhyām_vyatireka boddhum_budh arhasi_arh iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay
div.p: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana samprati_samprati agrima--_agrima praśna--_praśna trayasya_traya uttaram_uttara āha_ah adhibhūtam_adhibhūta iti_iti kṣarati_kṣar iti_iti kṣaraḥ_kṣara vināśī_vināśin bhāvaḥ_bhāva yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit janimat_janimat vastu_vastu bhūtam_bhūta prāṇi--_prāṇin jātam_jan adhikṛtya_adhikṛ bhavati_bhū iti_iti adhibhūtam_adhibhūta iti_iti ucyate_vac puruṣaḥ_puruṣa hiraṇyagarbhaḥ_hiraṇyagarbha samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi liṅga--_liṅga ātmā_ātman vyaṣṭi--_vyaṣṭi sarva--_sarva karaṇa--_karaṇa anugrāhakaḥ_anugrāhaka ātmā_ātman eva_eva idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as puruṣavidhaḥ_puruṣavidha iti_iti upakramya_upakram sa_tad yat_yat pūrvaḥ_pūrva asmāt_idam sarvasvmāt_sarvasvma sarvān_sarva pāpmanaḥ_pāpman auṣat_uṣ ca_ca kārāt_kāra

lg.l: sa_tad vai_vai śarīrī_śarīrin prathamaḥ_prathama sa_tad vai_vai puruṣaḥ_puruṣa ucyate_vac
ādikartā_ādikartṛ sa_tad bhūtānām_bhūta brahma_brahman agre_agre samavartata_saṃvṛt

div.p: iti_iti ādi--_ādi smṛtyā_smṛti ca_ca pratipāditaḥ_pratipāday adhidaivatam_adhidaivata daivatāni_daivata āditya--_āditya ādīn_ādi adhikṛtya_adhikṛ cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādi--_ādi karaṇāni_karaṇa anugṛhṇāti_anugrah iti_iti tathā_tathā ucyate_vac adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña sarva--_sarva yajña--_yajña adhiṣṭhātā_adhiṣṭhātṛ sarva--_sarva yajña--_yajña phala--_phala dāyakaḥ_dāyaka ca_ca sarva--_sarva yajña--_yajña abhimāninī_abhimānin viṣṇu--_viṣṇu ākhyā_ākhyā devatā_devatā yajñaḥ_yajña vai_vai viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti sa_tad ca_ca viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña aham_mad vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva eva_eva na_na mad--_mad bhinnaḥ_bhid kaścid_kaścit ataeva_ataeva para--_para brahmaṇaḥ_brahman sakāśāt_sakāśāt atyanta--_atyanta abhedena_abheda eva_eva pratipattavyaḥ_pratipad iti_iti katham_katham iti_iti vyākhyātam_vyākhyā sa_tad ca_ca atra_atra asmin_idam manuṣya--_manuṣya dehe_deha yajña--_yajña rūpeṇa_rūpa vartate_vṛt buddhi--_buddhi ādi--_ādi vyatiriktaḥ_vyatiric viṣṇu--_viṣṇu rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva etena_etad sa_tad kim_ka asmin_idam dehe_deha tatas_tatas bahis_bahis vā_vā dehe_deha ced_ced kaḥ_ka atra_atra buddhi--_buddhi ādiḥ_ādi tat_tad vyatiriktaḥ_vyatiric vā_vā iti_iti sandehaḥ_saṃdeha nirastaḥ_niras manuṣya--_manuṣya dehe_deha ca_ca yajñasya_yajña avasthānam_avasthāna yajñasya_yajña manuṣya--_manuṣya deha--_deha nirvartya--_nirvṛt tvāt_tva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa vai_vai yajñaḥ_yajña puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tena_tena yajñaḥ_yajña yat_yat enam_enad puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tanute_tan iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti

he_he dehabhṛtām_dehabhṛt vara_vara sarva--_sarva prāṇinām_prāṇin śreṣṭha_śreṣṭha iti_iti sambodhayan_sambodhay pratikṣaṇam_pratikṣaṇam mad--_mad sambhāṣaṇāt_sambhāṣaṇa kṛtakṛtyaḥ_kṛtakṛtya tvam_tvad etad--_etad bodha--_bodha yogyaḥ_yogya asi_as iti_iti protsāhayati_protsāhay arjunam_arjuna bhagavān_bhagavat arjunasya_arjuna sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvam_tva bhagavat--_bhagavant anugraha--_anugraha atiśaya--_atiśaya bhājana--_bhājana tvāt_tva prasiddham_prasidh eva_eva

adhikṛtya_adhikṛ vartamānāni_vṛt sūrya--_sūrya ādi--_ādi daivatāni_daivata yatra_yatra iti_iti tad--_tad nirukteḥ_nirukti atra_atra dehe_deha adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi karma--_karman pravartakaḥ_pravartaka antaryāmī_antaryāmin aham_mad mad--_mad aṃśaka--_aṃśaka tvāt_tva aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti eva_eva kāreṇa_kāra katham_katham jñeyaḥ_jñā iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara antaryāmi--_antaryāmin tve_tva aham_mad eva_eva mad--_mad abhinnatve_abhinnatva na_na eva_eva jñeyaḥ_jñā na_na tu_tu dehe_deha dehabhṛtām_dehabhṛt vara_vara iti_iti tvam_tvad tu_tu sākṣāt_sākṣāt mad--_mad sakha--_sakha tvāt_tva sarva--_sarva śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha eva_eva bhavasi_bhū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva adhi_adhi iti_iti kṣaraḥ_kṣara pratikṣaṇa--_pratikṣaṇa pariṇāmī_pariṇāmin bhāvaḥ_bhāva sthūlaḥ_sthūla dehaḥ_deha sa_tad mayā_mad adhibhūtam_adhibhūta ucyate_vac bhūtam_bhūta prāṇinam_prāṇin adhikṛtya_adhikṛ bhavati_bhū iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti puruṣaḥ_puruṣa samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi virāj_virāj sa_tad mayā_mad adhidaivam_adhidaiva iti_iti ucyate_vac adhikṛtya_adhikṛ vartamānāni_vṛt āditya--_āditya ādīni_ādi daivatāni_daivata atra_atra iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti atra_atra dehe_deha adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña yajñam_yajña adhikṛtya_adhikṛ vartate_vṛt iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti tad--_tad pravartakaḥ_pravartaka tad--_tad phala--_phala pradaḥ_prada ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva pratyākhyeyāni_pratyākhyā tu_tu svayam_svayam eva_eva uhyāni_vah eva_eva kāreṇa_kāra svasmāt_sva tasya_tad bhedaḥ_bheda nirākṛtaḥ_nirākṛ anena_idam katham_katham iti_iti asya_idam api_api uttaram_uttara uktam_vac prādeśa--_prādeśa mātra--_mātra vapus--_vapus tvena_tva antar_antar niyamayan_niyamay aham_mad yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi pravartakaḥ_pravartaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca mad--_mad arcā--_arcā sevanāt_sevana etān_etad brahma--_brahman ādīn_ādi sapta--_saptan arthān_artha svarūpataḥ_svarūpa a_a śrameṇa_śrama vindati_vid iti_iti tatra_tatra brahma--_brahman adhiyajñau_adhiyajña prāpya--_prāp tayā_tā adhyātma--_adhyātma ādīni_ādi
tu_tu heya--_hā tayā_tā iti_iti
BhG 8.5

lg.l: anta--_anta kāle_kāla mām_mad smaran_smṛ muktvā_muc kalevaram_kalevara
yaḥ_yad prayāti_prayā sa_tad mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva yāti_yā na_na asti_as atra_atra saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya

div.p: asi_as darśayati_darśay mām_mad eva_eva ukta--_vac lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa antaryāmi--_antaryāmin rūpam_rūpa parameśvaram_parameśvara smaran_smṛ deham_deha tyaktvā_tyaj yaḥ_yad prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi mārgeṇa_mārga uttarāyaṇa--_uttarāyaṇa pathā_pathin yāti_yā sa_tad mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa tām_tā yāti_yā atra_atra saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya na_na asti_as smaraṇam_smaraṇa jñāna--_jñāna upāyaḥ_upāya mad--_mad bhāva--_bhāva āpattiḥ_āpatti ca_ca phalam_phala iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla ca_ca katham_katham jñeyaḥ_jñā asi_as iti_iti saptamasya_saptama praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah anta--_anta kāle_kāla ca_ca iti_iti mām_mad eva_eva bhagavantam_bhagavant vāsudevam_vāsudeva adhiyajñam_adhiyajña sa_sa guṇam_guṇa nirguṇam_nirguṇa vā_vā paramam_parama akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman na_na tu_tu adhyātma--_adhyātma ādikam_ādika smaran_smṛ sadā_sadā cintayan_cintay tad--_tad saṃskāra--_saṃskāra pāṭavāt_pāṭava samasta--_samasta karaṇa--_karaṇa grāma--_grāma vaiyagryavati_vaiyagryavat anta--_anta śarīre_śarīra aham_mad mama_mad abhimānam_abhimāna tyaktvā_tyaj prāṇa--_prāṇa viyoga--_viyoga kāle_kāla yaḥ_yad prayāti_prayā sa_sa guṇa--_guṇa dhyāna--_dhyāna pakṣe_pakṣa agni--_agni jyotiḥ--_jyotis ahar--_ahar śuklaḥ_śukla iti_iti ādi--_ādi vacyamāṇena_vac deva--_deva yāna--_yāna mārgeṇa_mārga pitṛ--_pitṛ yāna--_yāna mārgāt_mārga prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa yāti_yā nirguṇa--_nirguṇa brahma--_brahman bhāvam_bhāva hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha loka--_loka bhoga--_bhoga ante_anta yāti_yā prāpnoti_prāp nirguṇa--_nirguṇa brahma--_brahman smaraṇa--_smaraṇa pakṣe_pakṣa tu_tu kalevaram_kalevara tyaktvā_tyaj prayāti_prayā iti_iti loka--_loka dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi abhiprāyam_abhiprāya na_na tasya_tad prāṇāḥ_prāṇa utkrāmanti_utkram atra_atra eva_eva samavanīyante_samavanī iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tasya_tad prāṇa--_prāṇa utkramaṇa--_utkramaṇa abhāvena_abhāva gati--_gati abhāvāt_abhāva sa_tad mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva sākṣāt_sākṣāt eva_eva yāti_yā brahma_brahman eva_eva san_as brahma_brahman api_api eti_i iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti na_na asti_as atra_atra deha--_deha vyatirikte_vyatiric ātmani_ātman mad--_mad bhāva--_bhāva prāptau_prāpti vā_vā saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya ātmā_ātman deha--_deha ādi--_ādi atiriktaḥ_atiric na_na vā_vā deha--_deha vyatireke_vyatireka api_api īśvarāt_īśvara bhinnaḥ_bhid na_na vā_vā iti_iti sandehaḥ_saṃdeha na_na vidyate_vid chidyante_chid sarva--_sarva saṃśayāḥ_saṃśaya iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti atra_atra ca_ca kalevaram_kalevara muktvā_muc prayāti_prayā iti_iti dehāt_deha bhinna--_bhid tvam_tva mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva yāti_yā iti_iti ca_ca īśvarāt_īśvara abhinna--_abhinna tvam_tva jīvasya_jīva uktam_vac iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś

asi_as āha_ah mām_mad eva_eva smaran_smṛ iti_iti mad--_mad smaraṇam_smaraṇa eva_eva mad--_mad jñānam_jñāna na_na tu_tu ghaṭa--_ghaṭa paṭa--_paṭa ādiḥ_ādi iva_iva aham_mad kena_ka api_api tattvataḥ_tattva jñātum_jñā śakyaḥ_śakya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva smaraṇa--_smaraṇa rūpa--_rūpa jñānasya_jñāna prakāraḥ_prakāra tu_tu caturdaśa--_caturdaśan śloke_śloka vakṣyate_vac

baladevaḥ_baladeva prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla katham_katham jñeyaḥ_jñā asi_as iti_iti asya_idam uttaram_uttara āha_ah anta--_anta iti_iti atra_atra smaraṇa--_smaraṇa ātmakena_ātmaka jñānena_jñāna jñeyaḥ_jñā bhavat--_bhavat mad--_mad bhāva--_bhāva upalambhanam_upalambhana ca_ca tat_tad phalam_phala prayacchāmi_prayam iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva mad--_mad svabhāvam_svabhāva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yathā_yathā aham_mad apahata--_apahan pāpma--_pāpman tva--_tva ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa aṣṭaka--_aṣṭaka viśiṣṭa--_viśiṣ svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa sa_tad mad--_mad smartā_smartṛ bhavati_bhū iti_iti
BhG 8.6

lg.l: yam_yad yam_yad vā_vā api_api smaran_smṛ bhāvam_bhāva tyajati_tyaj ante_anta kalevaram_kalevara
tam_tad tam_tad eva_eva eti_i kaunteya_kaunteya sadā_sadā tad--_tad bhāva--_bhāva bhāvitaḥ_bhāvay

div.p: prāpnoti_prāp kim_ka tarhi_tarhi yaṃ_yaṃ yaṃ_yaṃ iti_iti yam_yad yam_yad bhāvam_bhāva devatā--_devatā antaram_antara vā_vā anyam_anya api_api vānta--_vam kāle_kāla smaran_smṛ deham_deha tyajati_tyaj tam_tad tam_tad eva_eva smaryamāṇam_smṛ bhāvam_bhāva prāpnoti_prāp anta--_anta kāle_kāla bhāva--_bhāva viśeṣa--_viśeṣa smaraṇe_smaraṇa hetuḥ_hetu sadā_sadā tad--_tad bhāva--_bhāva bhāvitaḥ_bhāvay iti_iti sarvadā_sarvadā tasya_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva bhāvanā_bhāvanā anucintanam_anucintana tena_tad bhāvitaḥ_bhāvay vāsita--_vāsay cittaḥ_citta

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana anta--_anta kāle_kāla bhagavantam_bhagavant anudhyāyataḥ_anudhyā bhagavat--_bhagavant prāptiḥ_prāpti niyatā_niyam iti_iti vaditum_vad anyat_anya api_api yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit api_api yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit tad--_tad kāle_kāla dhyāyataḥ_dhyā deham_deha tyajataḥ_tyaj tad--_tad prāptiḥ_prāpti avaśyambhāvinī_avaśyambhāvin iti_iti darśayati_darśay na_na kevalam_kevalam mām_mad smaran_smṛ mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva yāti_yā iti_iti niyamaḥ_niyama kim_ka tarhi_tarhi yam_yad yam_yad ca_ca api_api bhāvam_bhāva devatā--_devatā viśeṣam_viśeṣa ca-kārāt_cakāra anyat_anya api_api yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit vā_vā smaran_smṛ cintayan_cintay ante_anta prāṇa--_prāṇa viyoga--_viyoga kāle_kāla kalevaram_kalevara tyajati_tyaj eva_eva na_na anyam_anya eti_i prāpnoti_prāp he_he kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti pitṛ--_pitṛ ṣvasṛ--_ṣvasṛ putra--_putra tvena_tva sneha--_sneha atiśayam_atiśaya sūcayati_sūcay tena_tad ca_ca avaśya--_avaśya anugrāhya--_anugrah tvam_tva tena_tad ca_ca pratāraṇa--_pratāraṇa āśaṅkā--_āśaṅkā śūnyatvam_śūnyatva iti_iti

anta--_anta kāle_kāla smaraṇa--_smaraṇa udyama--_udyama asaṃbhave_asaṃbhava api_api pūrva--_pūrva abhyāsa--_abhyāsa janitā_janay vāsanā_vāsanā eva_eva smṛti--_smṛti hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti āha_ah -_sadā sarvadā_sarvadā tasmin_tad devatā--_devatā viśeṣa--_viśeṣa ādau_ādi bhāvaḥ_bhāva bhāvanā_bhāvanā vāsanā_vāsanā tad--_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva sa_tad bhāvitaḥ_bhāvay ādhitāgni--_ādhitāgni ādeḥ_ādi ākṛti--_ākṛti gaṇa--_gaṇa tvāt_tva bhāvita--_bhāvay padasya_pada para--_para nipātaḥ_nipāta tad--_tad bhāvena_bhāva tad--_tad cintanena_cintana bhāvitaḥ_bhāvay vāsita--_vāsay cittaḥ_citta iti_iti vā_vā
prāpnoti_prāp prāpnoti_prāp āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva yāti_yā kintu_kiṃtu anya--_anya smartā_smartṛ api_api anya--_anya bhāvam_bhāva yāti_yā iti_iti āha_ah yaṃ_yaṃ yam_yaṃ iti_iti bhāvam_bhāva padārtham_padārtha tam_tad tam_tad eva_eva bhāva--_bhāva deha--_deha tyāga--_tyāga uttaram_uttara eva_eva eti_i yathā_yathā bharataḥ_bharata dehānte_dehānta mṛgam_mṛga cintayan_cintay mṛgaḥ_mṛga abhūt_bhū antima--_antima smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca pūrva--_pūrva smṛti--_smṛti viṣayā_viṣaya eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti āha_ah sadā_sadā iti_iti tad--_tad bhāva--_bhāva bhāvitaḥ_bhāvay tad--_tad smṛti--_smṛti vāsita--_vāsay cittaḥ_citta
BhG 8.7

lg.l: sarveṣu_sarva kāleṣu_kāla mām_mad anusmara_anusmṛ yudhya_yudh
mayi_mad arpita--_arpay manaḥ--_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi mām_mad eva_eva eṣyasi_i asaṃśayaḥ_asaṃśaya

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara -_yasmāt pūrva--_pūrva vāsanā_vāsanā eva_eva anta--_anta kāle_kāla smṛti--_smṛti hetuḥ_hetu na_na tu_tu tadā_tadā vivaśasya_vivaśa smaraṇa--_smaraṇa udyamaḥ_udyama sambhavati_sambhū tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti mām_mad anusmara_anusmṛ cintaya_cintay satatam_satatam smaraṇam_smaraṇa ca_ca citta--_citta śuddhim_śuddhi vinā_vinā na_na bhavati_bhū atas_atas yudhya_yudh ca_ca yudhyasva_yudh citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha yuddha--_yuddha ādikam_ādika svadharmam_svadharma anutiṣṭha_anuṣṭhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam mayi_mad arpitam_arpay manaḥ_manas saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ātmakam_ātmaka buddhiḥ_buddhi ca_ca vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikā_ātmaka yena_yad tvayā_tvad sa_tad tvam_tvad prāpsyasi_prāp asaṃśayaḥ_asaṃśaya saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya atra_atra na_na asti_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana -_yad evam_evam pūrva--_pūrva smaraṇa--_smaraṇa abhyāsa--_abhyāsa janita--_janay antyā_antya bhāvanā_bhāvanā eva_eva tadānīm_tadānīm paravaśasya_paravaśa deha--_deha antara--_antara prāptau_prāpti kāraṇam_kāraṇa tasmāt_tad iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt mad--_mad viṣayaka--_viṣayaka antya--_antya bhāvanā--_bhāvanā utpatti--_utpatti artham_artha sarveṣu_sarva kāleṣu_kāla pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva ādareṇa_ādara mām_mad saguṇam_saguṇa īśvaram_īśvara anusmara_anusmṛ cintaya_cintay yadi_yadi antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa aśuddhi--_aśuddhi vaśāt_vaśa na_na śaknoṣi_śak satatam_satatam anusmartum_anusmṛ tatas_tatas antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhaye_śuddhi yudhya_yudh ca_ca antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha yuddha--_yuddha ādikam_ādika svadharmam_svadharma kuru_kṛ yudhya_yudh iti_iti yudhyasva_yudh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam ca_ca nitya--_nitya naimittika--_naimittika karma--_karman anuṣṭhānena_anuṣṭhāna aśuddhi--_aśuddhi kṣayāt_kṣaya mayi_mad bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva arpite_arpay saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa adhyavasāya--_adhyavasāya lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa manaḥ--_manas buddhī_buddhi yena_yad tvayā_tvad sa_tad tvam_tvad īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa sarvadā_sarvadā mad--_mad cintana--_cintana paraḥ_para san_as asaṃśayaḥ_asaṃśaya na_na atra_atra saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya vidyate_vid idam_idam ca_ca saguṇa--_saguṇa brahma--_brahman cintanam_cintana upāsakānām_upāsaka uktam_vac teṣām_tad antya--_antya bhāvanā--_bhāvanā sāpekṣa--_sāpekṣa tvāt_tva nirguṇa--_nirguṇa brahma--_brahman jñāninām_jñānin tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna sama--_sama kālam_kāla eva_eva ajñāna--_ajñāna nivṛtti--_nivṛtti lakṣaṇāyāḥ_lakṣaṇa mukteḥ_mukti siddha--_sidh tvāt_tva na_na asti_as antya--_antya bhāvanā--_bhāvanā apekṣā_apekṣā iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś

baladevaḥ_baladeva yasmāt_yasmāt pūrva--_pūrva smṛtiḥ_smṛti eva_eva antima--_antima smṛti--_smṛti hetuḥ_hetu tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad sarveṣu_sarva kāleṣu_kāla pratikṣaṇam_pratikṣaṇam mām_mad anusmara_anusmṛ yudhyasva_yudh ca_ca loka--_loka saṅgrahāya_saṃgraha yuddha--_yuddha ādīni_ādi sva--_sva ucitāni_ucita karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ evam_evam mayi_mad arpita--_arpay manaḥ--_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi tvam_tvad mām_mad eva_eva eṣyasi_i na_na tu_tu anyat_anya atra_atra sandehaḥ_saṃdeha te_tvad mā_mā abhūt_bhū
BhG 8.8

lg.l: abhyāsa--_abhyāsa yoga--_yoga yuktena_yuj cetasā_cetas na_na anya--_anya gāminā_gāmin
paramam_parama puruṣam_puruṣa divyam_divya yāti_yā pārtha_pārtha anucintayan_anucintay

div.p: darśayan_darśay āha_ah abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa sajātīya--_sajātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya pravāhaḥ_pravāha saḥ_tad eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga upāyaḥ_upāya tena_tad yuktena_yuj ekāgreṇa_ekāgra atas_atas eva_eva na_na anyam_anya viṣayam_viṣaya gantum_gam śīlam_śīla yasya_yad tena_tad cetasā_cetas divyam_divya dyotana--_dyotana ātmakam_ātmaka paramam_parama puruṣam_puruṣa parameśvaram_parameśvara anucintayan_anucintay he_he pārtha_pārtha tam_tad eva_eva yāti_yā iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam saptānām_saptan api_api praśnānām_praśna uttaram_uttara uktvā_vac prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla bhagavat--_bhagavant anusmaraṇasya_anusmaraṇa bhagavat--_bhagavant prāpti--_prāpti lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa phalam_phala vivarītum_vivṛ ārabhate_ārabh abhyāsa--_abhyāsa iti_iti abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa sajātīya--_sajātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya pravāhaḥ_pravāha mayi_mad vijātīya--_vijātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya anantaritaḥ_anantarita ṣaṣṭhe_ṣaṣṭha prāk_prāk vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā saḥ_tad eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga samādhiḥ_samādhi tena_tad yuktam_yuj tatra_tatra eva_eva vyāpṛtam_vyāpṛta ātma--_ātman ākāra--_ākāra vṛtti--_vṛtti śūnyam_śūnya yat_yad cetaḥ_cetas tena_tad cetasā_cetas abhyāsa--_abhyāsa pāṭavena_pāṭava na_na anya--_anya gāminā_gāmin na_na anyatra_anyatra viṣaya--_viṣaya antare_antara nirodha--_nirodha prayatnam_prayatna vinā_vinā api_api puruṣam_puruṣa pūrṇam_pṛ divyam_divya divi_div dyotana--_dyotana ātmani_ātman āditye_āditya bhavam_bhava yaḥ_yad ca_ca asau_adas āditye_āditya iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti yāti_yā gacchati_gam he_he pārtha_pārtha anucintayan_anucintay śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadeśam_upadeśa anudhyāyan_anudhyā

bhavati_bhū tena_tad ca_ca mām_mad prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti atas_atas cetasaḥ_cetas mad--_mad smaraṇam_smaraṇa eva_eva paramaḥ_parama yogaḥ_yoga iti_iti āha_ah abhyāsa--_abhyāsa yogaḥ_yoga iti_iti abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa mad--_mad smaraṇasya_smaraṇa punar_punar punar_punar āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga tad--_tad yuktena_yuj cetasā_cetas ataeva_ataeva na_na anyam_anya viṣayam_viṣaya gantum_gam śīlam_śīla yasya_yad tena_tad smaraṇa--_smaraṇa abhyāsena_abhyāsa cittasya_citta svabhāva--_svabhāva vijayaḥ_vijaya api_api bhavati_bhū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

draḍhayati_draḍhay abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa smaraṇa--_smaraṇa āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga tad--_tad yuktena_yuj ataeva_ataeva ananya--_ananya gāminā_gāmin tatas_tatas anyatra_anyatra acalatā_acala tat_tad ekāgreṇa_ekāgra cetasā_cetas divyam_divya puruṣam_puruṣa paramam_parama sa_sa śrīkam_śrīka nārāyaṇam_nārāyaṇa vāsudevam_vāsudeva anucintayan_anucintay tam_tad eva_eva kīṭa--_kīṭa bhṛṅga--_bhṛṅga nyāyena_nyāya tad--_tad tulāḥ_tulā san_as yāti_yā labhate_labh
BhG 8.9

lg.l: kavim_kavi purāṇam_purāṇa anuśāsitāram_anuśāsitṛ
aṇoḥ_aṇu aṇīyāṃsam_aṇīyas anusmaret_anusmṛ yaḥ_yad
sarvasya_sarva dhātāram_dhātṛ acintya--_acintya rūpam_rūpa
āditya--_āditya varṇam_varṇa tamasaḥ_tamas parastāt_parastāt

div.p: viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ kavim_kavi sarvajñam_sarvajña sarva--_sarva vidyā--_vidyā nirmātāram_nirmātṛ purāṇam_purāṇa man--_man ādi--_ādi siddham_sidh anuśāsitāram_anuśāsitṛ niyantāram_niyantṛ aṇoḥ_aṇu sūkṣmāt_sūkṣma api_api aṇīyāṃsam_aṇīyas ati_ati sūkṣmam_sūkṣma ākāśa--_ākāśa kāla--_kāla digbhyaḥ_diś api_api ati_ati sūkṣmataram_sūkṣmatara sarvasya_sarva dhātāram_dhātṛ poṣakam_poṣaka aparimita--_aparimita mahima--_mahiman tvāt_tva acintya--_acintya rūpam_rūpa malīmasayoḥ_malīmasa manaḥ--_manas buddhyoḥ_buddhi agocaram_agocara veda_vid aham_mad etam_etad puruṣam_puruṣa mahāntam_mahat āditya--_āditya varṇam_varṇa tamasaḥ_tamas parastāt_parastāt iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana punar_punar api_api tam_tad eva_eva anucintayitavyam_anucintay gantavyam_gam ca_ca puruṣam_puruṣa viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ kavim_kavi iti_iti kavim_kavi krānta--_krānta darśinam_darśin tena_tad atīta--_atī anāgata--_anāgata ādi--_ādi aśeṣa--_aśeṣa vastu--_vastu darśi--_darśin tvena_tva sarvajñam_sarvajña purāṇam_purāṇa cirantanam_cirantana sarva--_sarva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvāt_tva anādim_anādi iti_iti yāvat_yāvat anuśāsitāram_anuśāsitṛ sarvasya_sarva jagataḥ_jagant niyantāram_niyantṛ aṇoḥ_aṇu aṇīyāṃsam_aṇīyas sūkṣāt_sūkṣa api_api ākāśa--_ākāśa ādeḥ_ādi sūkṣmataram_sūkṣmatara tad--_tad upādāna--_upādāna tvāt_tva sarvasya_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala jātasya_jāta dhātāram_dhātṛ vicitra--_vicitra tayā_tā prāṇibhyaḥ_prāṇin vibhaktāram_vibhaktṛ phalam_phala atas_atas upapatteḥ_upapatti iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya na_na cintayitum_cintay śakyam_śakya aparimitam_aparimita ahima--_ahiman tvena_tva rūpam_rūpa yasya_yad tam_tad ādityasya_āditya iva_iva sakala--_sakala jagat--_jagant avabhāsakaḥ_avabhāsaka varṇaḥ_varṇa prakāśaḥ_prakāśa yasya_yad tam_tad sarvasya_sarva jagataḥ_jagant avabhāsakam_avabhāsaka iti_iti yāvat_yāvat ataeva_ataeva tamasaḥ_tamas parastāt_parastāt tamasaḥ_tamas moha--_moha andhakārāt_andhakāra ajñāna--_ajñāna lakṣaṇāt_lakṣaṇa parastāt_parastāt prakāśa--_prakāśa rūpatvena_rūpatva tamaḥ--_tamas virodhinam_virodhin iti_iti yāvat_yāvat anusmaret_anusmṛ cintayet_cintay yaḥ_yad kaścid_kaścit api_api sa_tad tam_tad yāti_yā iti_iti pūrveṇa_pūrva eva_eva sambandhaḥ_sambandha sa_tad tam_tad param_para puruṣam_puruṣa upaiti_upe divyam_divya iti_iti pareṇa_para vā_vā sambandhaḥ_sambandha

yat_yad ca_ca vinā_vinā sātatyena_sātatya bhagavat--_bhagavant smaraṇam_smaraṇa api_api durghaṭam_durghaṭa iti_iti yuktam_yuj kenacid_kaścit yoga--_yoga abhyāsena_abhyāsa sahitā_sahita eva_eva bhaktiḥ_bhakti kriyate_kṛ iti_iti tām_tad yoga--_yoga miśrām_miśra bhaktim_bhakti āha_ah kavim_kavi iti_iti pañcabhiḥ_pañcan kavim_kavi sarvajñam_sarvajña sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña api_api anyaḥ_anya sanaka--_sanaka ādiḥ_ādi sārvakālikaḥ_sārvakālika na_na bhavati_bhū atas_atas āha_ah purāṇam_purāṇa anādim_anādi sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña anādiḥ_anādi api_api antaryāmī_antaryāmin sa_tad bhakti--_bhakti upadeṣṭā_upadeṣṭṛ na_na bhavati_bhū atas_atas āha_ah anuśāsitāram_anuśāsitṛ kṛpayā_kṛpā sva--_sva bhakti--_bhakti śikṣakam_śikṣaka kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa rāma--_rāma ādi--_ādi svarūpam_svarūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tādṛśa--_tādṛśa kṛpāluḥ_kṛpālu api_api su_su durvijñeya--_durvijñeya tattvaḥ_tattva eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah aṇoḥ_aṇu sakāśāt_sakāśa api_api aṇīyāṃsam_aṇīyas tarhi_tarhi sa_tad kim_ka jīvaḥ_jīva iva_iva paramāṇu--_paramāṇu pramāṇaḥ_pramāṇa tatra_tatra āha_ah sarvasya_sarva dhātāram_dhātṛ sarva--_sarva vastu--_vastu mātra--_mātra dhāraka--_dhāraka tvena_tva sarva--_sarva vyāpaka--_vyāpaka tvāt_tva param_para mahā--_mahat parimāṇam_parimāṇa api_api iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ataeva_ataeva acintya--_acintya rūpam_rūpa puruṣa--_puruṣa vidha--_vidha tvena_tva madhyama--_madhyama parimāṇam_parimāṇa api_api tasya_tad ananya--_ananya prakāśya--_prakāśay tvam_tva āha_ah āditya--_āditya varṇam_varṇa āditya--_āditya vat_vat sva--_sva para--_para prakāśakaḥ_prakāśaka varṇaḥ_varṇa svarūpam_svarūpa yasya_yad tathā_tathā tamasaḥ_tamas prakṛteḥ_prakṛti parastāt_parastāt vartamānam_vṛt māyā--_māyā śaktimantam_śaktimat api_api māyā--_māyā atīta--_atī svarūpam_svarūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah kavim_kavi sarvajñam_sarvajña anuśāsitāram_anuśāsitṛ raghunātha--_raghunātha ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa hita--_hita upadeṣṭāram_upadeṣṭṛ aṇoḥ_aṇu aṇīyāṃsam_aṇīyas tena_tena ca_ca aṇum_aṇu api_api jīvam_jīva antar_antar praviśati_praviś iti_iti siddham_sidh āha_ah ca_ca evam_evam śrutiḥ_śruti antar_antar praviṣṭaḥ_praviś śāstā_śāstṛ janānām_jana iti_iti aṇīyasaḥ_aṇīyas api_api tasya_tad vyāptim_vyāpti āha_ah sarvasya_sarva iti_iti kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna jagataḥ_jagant dhātāram_dhātṛ dhārakam_dhāraka

nanu_nanu katham_katham evam_evam saṅgacchate_saṃgam tatra_tatra āha_ah acintya--_acintya rūpam_rūpa a_a vitarkya--_vitarkay svarūpam_svarūpa ekam_eka eva_eva brahma_brahman puruṣa--_puruṣa vidha--_vidha tvena_tva madhyama--_madhyama parimāṇam_parimāṇa aṇoḥ_aṇu aṇīyāṃsam_aṇīyas iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti param_para mahā--_mahat parimāṇam_parimāṇa ca_ca iti_iti na_na atra_atra yukteḥ_yukti avakāśaḥ_avakāśa sva--_sva parakāśa--_parakāśa tām_tā āha_ah āditya--_āditya iti_iti sūrya--_sūrya vat_vat sva--_sva para--_para prakāśakam_prakāśaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha māyā--_māyā gandha--_gandha asparśam_asparśa āha_ah tamasaḥ_tamas iti_iti tamasaḥ_tamas māyāyāḥ_māyā parastāt_parastāt sthitam_sthā māyinam_māyin api_api māyā--_māyā atītam_atī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etādṛśam_etādṛśa puruṣam_puruṣa yaḥ_yad anukṣaṇam_anukṣaṇam smaret_smṛ sa_tad tam_tad param_para puruṣam_puruṣa upaiti_upe iti_iti pareṇa_para anvayaḥ_anvaya
BhG 8.10

lg.l: prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla manasā_manas acalena_acala
bhaktyā_bhakti yuktaḥ_yuj yoga--_yoga balena_bala ca_ca eva_eva
bhruvoḥ_bhrū madhye_madhya prāṇam_prāṇa āveśya_āveśay samyak_samyak
sa_tad tam_tad param_para puruṣam_puruṣa upaiti_upe divyam_divya

div.p: sa_sa prapañca--_prapañca prakṛtim_prakṛti bhittvā_bhid yaḥ_yad tiṣṭhāti_sthā evaṃbhūtam_evaṃbhūta puruṣam_puruṣa anta--_anta kāle_kāla bhakti--_bhakti yuktaḥ_yuj niścalena_niścala vikṣepa--_vikṣepa rahitena_rahita manasā_manas yaḥ_yad anusmaret_anusmṛ manaḥ--_manas naiścalye_naiścalya hetuḥ_hetu yoga--_yoga balena_bala samyak_samyak suṣumṇā_suṣumṇā mārgeṇa_mārga bhruvoḥ_bhrū madhye_madhya prāṇam_prāṇa āveśya_āveśay iti_iti sa_tad tam_tad param_para puruṣam_puruṣa paramātma--_paramātman svarūpam_svarūpa divyam_divya dyotana--_dyotana ātmakam_ātmaka prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kadā_kadā tad--_tad anusmaraṇe_anusmaraṇa pratra--_pratra atirekaḥ_atireka abhyavartate_abhivṛt tat_tad āha_ah prayāna--_prayāna iti_iti prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla anta--_anta kāle_kāla acalena_acala ekāgreṇa_ekāgra manasā_manas tam_tad puruṣam_puruṣa yaḥ_yad anusmaret_anusmṛ iti_iti anuvartate_anuvṛt kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa bhaktyā_bhakti parameśvara--_parameśvara viṣayeṇa_viṣaya parameṇa_parama premṇā_preman yuktaḥ_yuj yogasya_yoga samādheḥ_samādhi balena_bala tad--_tad janita--_janay saṃskāra--_saṃskāra samūhena_samūha vyutthāna--_vyutthāna saṃskāra--_saṃskāra virodhinā_virodhin ca_ca yuktaḥ_yuj evam_evam prathamam_prathamam hṛdaya--_hṛdaya puṇḍarīke_puṇḍarīka vaśīkṛtya_vaśīkṛ tatas_tatas ūrdhva--_ūrdhva gāminyā_gāmin suṣumṇayā_suṣumṇā nāḍyā_nāḍī guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś mārgeṇa_mārga bhūmi--_bhūmi jaya--_jaya krameṇa_krama bhruvoḥ_bhrū madhye_madhya ājñā--_ājñā cakre_cakra prāṇam_prāṇa āveśya_āveśay sthāpayitvā_sthāpay samyak_samyak upāsakaḥ_upāsaka tam_tad kavim_kavi purāṇam_purāṇa anuśāsitāram_anuśāsitṛ iti_iti ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa param_para
puruṣam_puruṣa divyam_divya dyotana--_dyotana ātmakam_ātmaka upaiti_upe pratipadyate_pratipad

katham_katham manasaḥ_manas naiścalyam_naiścalya atas_atas āha_ah yogasya_yoga yoga--_yoga abhyāsasya_abhyāsa balena_bala yoga--_yoga prakāram_prakāra darśayati_darśay bhruvoḥ_bhrū madhye_madhya ājñā--_ājñā cakre_cakra

baladevaḥ_baladeva yaḥ_yad janaḥ_jana bhaktyā_bhakti paramātma--_paramātman premṇā_preman yoga--_yoga balena_bala samādhi--_samādhi janita--_janay saṃskāra--_saṃskāra nicayena_nicaya ca_ca yuktaḥ_yuj prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla maraṇa--_maraṇa samaye_samaya acalena_acala ekāgreṇa_ekāgra manasā_manas tam_tad puruṣam_puruṣa anusmaret_anusmṛ yoga--_yoga prakāram_prakāra āha_ah bhruvoḥ_bhrū iti_iti bhruvoḥ_bhrū madhye_madhya ājñā--_ājñā cakre_cakra prāṇam_prāṇa āveśya_āveśay saṃsthāpya_saṃsthāpay samyak_samyak sa_sa avadhānaḥ_avadhāna san_as sa_tad tam_tad puruṣam_puruṣa upaiti_upe

BhG 8.11
yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara veda--_veda vidaḥ_vid vadanti_vad
viśanti_viś yat_yad yatayaḥ_yati vīta--_vī rāgāḥ_rāga
yat_yad icchantaḥ_iṣ brahmacaryam_brahmacarya caranti_car
tat_tad te_tvad padam_pada saṃgraheṇa_saṃgraha pravakṣye_pravac

yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara veda--_veda artha--_artha jñāḥ_jña vadanti_vad etasya_etad vai_vai akṣarasya_akṣara praśāsane_praśāsana gārgi_gārgī sūryācandramasau_sūryācandramas vidhṛtau_vidhṛ tiṣṭhataḥ_sthā iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti vītaḥ_vī rāgaḥ_rāga yebhyaḥ_yad te_tad vīta--_vī rāgāḥ_rāga yatayaḥ_yati prayatnavantaḥ_prayatnavat yat_yad viśanti_viś yat_yad ca_ca jñātum_jñā icchantaḥ_iṣ guru--_guru kule_kula brahmacaryam_brahmacarya caranti_car tat_tad te_tvad tubhyam_tvad padam_pada padyate_pad gamyate_gam iti_iti padam_pada prāpyam_prāp saṅgraheṇa_saṃgraha saṃkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa pravakṣye_pravac tad--_tad prāpti--_prāpti upāyam_upāya kathayiṣyāmi_kathay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana -_idānīm yena_yad kenacid_kaścit abhidhānena_abhidhāna dhyāna--_dhyāna kāle_kāla bhagavat--_bhagavant anusmaraṇe_anusmaraṇa prāpte_prāp

lg.l: sarve_sarva vedāḥ_veda yat_yad padam_pada āmananti_āmnā
tapāṃsi_tapas sarvāṇi_sarva ca_ca yat_yad vadanti_vad
yat_yad icchantaḥ_iṣ brahmacaryam_brahmacarya caranti_car
tat_tad te_tvad padam_pada saṃgraheṇa_saṃgraha bravīmi_brū om_oṃ iti_iti etat_etad

div.p: iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti pratipādita--_pratipāday tvena_tva praṇavena_praṇava eva_eva abhidhānena_abhidhāna tad--_tad anusmaraṇam_anusmaraṇa kartavyam_kṛ na_na anyena_anya mantra--_mantra ādinā_ādi iti_iti niyantum_niyam upakramate_upakram yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara iti_iti yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara avināśi_avināśin oṅkāra--_oṃkāra ākhyam_ākhyā brahma_brahman veda--_veda vidaḥ_vid vadanti_vad etat_etad vai_vai tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa abhivadanti_abhivad a_a sthūlam_sthūla aṇu_aṇu ahrasvam_ahrasva adīrgham_adīrgha iti_iti ādi--_ādi vacanaiḥ_vacana sarva--_sarva viśeṣa--_viśeṣa nivartanena_nivartana pramāṇa--_pramāṇa kuśalaiḥ_kuśala eva_eva pratipannam_pratipad kim_ka tu_tu mukta--_muc upasṛpya--_upasṛp tayā_tā taiḥ_tad api_api anubhūtam_anubhū iti_iti āha_ah viśanti_viś sva--_sva rūpatayā_rūpatā samyak_samyak darśanena_darśana yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara yatayaḥ_yati yatna--_yatna śīlāḥ_śīla saṃnyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin vīta--_vī rāgāḥ_rāga na_na kevalam_kevalam siddhaiḥ_siddha anubhūtam_anubhū sādhakānām_sādhaka api_api sarvaḥ_sarva api_api prayāsaḥ_prayāsa tad--_tad arthe_artha iti_iti āha_ah yat_yad icchantaḥ_iṣ jñātum_jñā naiṣṭhikāḥ_naiṣṭhika brahmacāriṇaḥ_brahmacārin brahmacaryam_brahmacarya guru--_guru kula--_kula vāsa--_vāsa ādi--_ādi tapaḥ_tapas caranti_car yāvajjīvam_yāvajjīvam tat_tad tubhyam_tvad saṅgraheṇa_saṃgraha saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa aham_mad pravakṣye_pravac prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa kathayiṣyāmi_kathay yathā_yathā tava_tvad bodhaḥ_bodha bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā atas_atas tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara katham_katham mayā_mad jñeyam_jñā iti_iti ākulaḥ_ākula mā_mā bhūḥ_bhū iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

atra_atra ca_ca parasya_para brahmaṇaḥ_brahman vācaka--_vācaka rūpeṇa_rūpa pratimāvat--_pratimāvat pratīka--_pratīka rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca yaḥ_yad punar_punar etam_etad tri--_tri mātreṇa_mātra ūm_ūṃ iti_iti param_para puruṣam_puruṣa abhidhyāyīta_abhidhyai sa_tad tam_tad adhigacchati_adhigam iti_iti ādi--_ādi vacanaiḥ_vacana manda--_manda madhyama--_madhyama buddhīnām_buddhi krama--_krama mukti--_mukti phalakam_phalaka upāsanam_upāsana uktam_vac tat_tad evā_eva iha_iha api_api vivakṣitam_vivakṣita bhagavatā_bhagavant atas_atas yoga--_yoga dhāraṇā--_dhāraṇā sahitam_sahita oṅkāra--_oṃkāra upāsanam_upāsana tat_tad phalam_phala sva--_sva svarūpam_svarūpa tatas_tatas apunar_apunar āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti tad--_tad mārgaḥ_mārga ca_ca iti_iti artha--_artha jātam_jan ucyate_vac yāvat_yāvat adhyāya--_adhyāya samāpti_samāpti

jñāyate_jñā brūhi_brū āha_ah yat_yad eva_eva akṣaram_akṣara om_oṃ iti_iti eka--_eka akṣara--_akṣara vācyam_vac brahma_brahman yatayaḥ_yati viśanti_viś tat_tad padam_pada padyate_pad gamyate_gam iti_iti padam_pada prāpyam_prāp samyak_samyak tayā_tā gṛhayte_grah anena_idam iti_iti saṅgrahaḥ_saṃgraha tad--_tad upāyaḥ_upāya tena_tad saha_saha pravakṣye_pravac śṛṇu_śru

baladevaḥ_baladeva --nanu_nanu bhruvoḥ_bhrū madhye_madhya prāṇam_prāṇa āveśya_āveśay etāvatā_etāvat yogaḥ_yoga na_na avagamyate_avagam tasmāt_tasmāt tasya_tad prakāram_prakāra tatra_tatra japyam_jap prāpyam_prāp brūhi_brū iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri ekam_eka brahma_brahman akṣaram_akṣara vācakam_vācaka vadanti_vad vīta--_vī rāgāḥ_rāga vinaṣṭa--_vinaś avidyāḥ_avidyā yatayaḥ_yati yat_yad brahma_brahman tad--_tad vācya--_vac bhūtam_bhū vijñāna--_vijñāna eka--_eka rasam_rasa viśanti_viś prāpnuvanti_prāp tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya r”pam_r”pa brahma_brahman jñātum_jñā icchantaḥ_iṣ naiṣṭhikāḥ_naiṣṭhika guru--_guru kula--_kula vasā--_vasā ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa brahmacaryam_brahmacarya caranti_car tat_tad padam_pada prāpyam_prāp saṅgraheṇa_saṃgraha upāyena_upāya saha_saha pravakṣye_pravac vakṣyāmi_vac yathā_yathā an_an āyasena_āyasa tvam_tvad tad--_tad vidyām_vidyā prāpnuyāḥ_prāp samyak_samyak gṛhyate_grah tattvam_tattva anena_idam iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti
saṅgrahaḥ_saṃgraha upāyaḥ_upāya

lg.l: sarva--_sarva dvārāṇi_dvāra saṃyamya_saṃyam manaḥ_manas hṛdi_hṛd nirudhya_nirudh ca_ca
mūrdhni_mūrdhan ādhāya_ādhā ātmanaḥ_ātman prāṇam_prāṇa āsthitaḥ_āsthā yoga--_yoga dhāraṇām_dhāraṇā
om_oṃ iti_iti ekākṣaram_ekākṣara brahma_brahman vyāharan_vyāhṛ mām_mad anusmaran_anusmṛ
yaḥ_yad prayāti_prayā tyajan_tyaj deham_deha sa_tad yāti_yā paramām_parama gatim_gati

div.p: āha_ah sarvāṇi_sarva indriya--_indriya dvārāṇi_dvāra saṃyamya_saṃyam pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādibhiḥ_ādi bāhya--_bāhya viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇam_grahaṇa akurvan_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha manaḥ_manas ca_ca hṛdi_hṛd nirudhya_nirudh bāhya--_bāhya viṣaya--_viṣaya smaraṇam_smaraṇa akurvan_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mūrdhni_mūrdhan bhruvoḥ_bhrū madhye_madhya prāṇam_prāṇa ādhāya_ādhā yogasya_yoga dhāraṇām_dhāraṇā sthairyam_sthairya āsthitaḥ_āsthā āśritavān_āśri san_as

om_oṃ iti_iti ekam_eka yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara tat_tad eva_eva brahma--_brahman vācaka--_vācaka tvāt_tva vā_vā pratimā--_pratimā ādi--_ādi vat_vat brahma--_brahman pratīka--_pratīka tvāt_tva vā_vā brahma_brahman tad--_tad vyāharan_vyāhṛ uccārayan_uccāray tad--_tad vācyam_vac ca_ca mām_mad anusmaran_anusmṛ eva_eva deham_deha tyajan_tyaj yaḥ_yad prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa yāti_yā arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi mārgeṇa_mārga sa_tad paramām_parama śreṣṭhām_śreṣṭha gatim_gati mad--_mad gatim_gati yāti_yā prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatra_tatra pravakṣye_pravac iti_iti pratijñātam_pratijñā artham_artha sa_sa upakaraṇam_upakaraṇa āha_ah dvābhyām_dvi sarva--_sarva dvārāṇi_dvāra sarvāṇi_sarva indriya--_indriya dvārāṇi_dvāra saṃyamya_saṃyam sva--_sva sva--_sva viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya doṣa--_doṣa darśana--_darśana abhyāsāt_abhyāsa tad--_tad vimukha--_vimukha tām_tā āpāditaiḥ_āpāday śrotra--_śrotra ādibhiḥ_ādi śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇam_grahaṇa akurvan_kṛ bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya nirodhe_nirodha api_api manasaḥ_manas pracāraḥ_pracāra syāt_as iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah manaḥ_manas hṛdi_hṛd nirudhya_nirudh ca_ca abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vairāgyābhyām_vairāgya ṣaṣṭhe_ṣaṣṭha vyākhyātābhyām_vyākhyā hṛdaya--_hṛdaya deśe_deśa manaḥ_manas nirudhya_nirudh nirvṛttikatām_nirvṛttikatā āpādya_āpāday ca_ca antar_antar api_api evam_evam bahis_bahis antar_antar upalabdhi--_upalabdhi dvārāṇi_dvāra sarvāṇi_sarva saṃnirudhya_saṃnirudh kriyā--_kriyā dvāram_dvāra prāṇam_prāṇa api_api sarvatas_sarvatas nigṛhya_nigrah bhūmi--_bhūmi jaya--_jaya krameṇa_krama mūrdhni_mūrdhan ādhāya_ādhā bhruvoḥ_bhrū madhye_madhya tad--_tad upari_upari ca_ca guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś mārgeṇa_mārga āveśya_āveśay ātmanaḥ_ātman ātma--_ātman viṣaya--_viṣaya samādhi--_samādhi rūpām_rūpa dhāraṇām_dhāraṇā āsthitaḥ_āsthā ātmanaḥ_ātman iti_iti devatā--_devatā divya--_divya vṛtti--_vṛtti artham_artha

om_oṃ iti_iti ekam_eka akṣaram_akṣara brahma--_brahman vācaka--_vācaka tvāt_tva pratimā--_pratimā baddha--_bandh brahma--_brahman pratīka--_pratīka tvāt_tva vā_vā brahma_brahman vyāharan_vyāhṛ uccaran_uccar om_oṃ iti_iti vyāharan_vyāhṛ iti_iti etāvatā_etāvat eva_eva nirvāhaḥ_nirvāha eka--_eka akṣaram_akṣara iti_iti anāyāsa--_anāyāsa kathanena_kathana stuti--_stuti artham_artha om_oṃ iti_iti vyāharan_vyāhṛ ekākṣaram_ekākṣara ekam_eka advitīyam_advitīya akṣaram_akṣara avināśi_avināśin sarva--_sarva vyāpakam_vyāpaka brahma_brahman mām_mad om_oṃ iti_iti asya_idam artham_artha smaran_smṛ iti_iti vā_vā tena_tad praṇavam_praṇava japan_jap tad--_tad abhidheya--_abhidhā bhūtam_bhū ca_ca mām_mad cintayan_cintay mūrdhanyayā_mūrdhanya nāḍyā_nāḍī deham_deha tyajan_tyaj yaḥ_yad prayāti_prayā sa_tad yāti_yā deva--_deva yāna--_yāna mārgeṇa_mārga brahma--_brahman lokam_loka gatvā_gam tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga ante_anta paramām_parama prakṛṣṭām_prakṛṣṭa gatim_gati

atra_atra patañjalinā_patañjali tīvra--_tīvra saṃvegānām_saṃvega āsannaḥ_āsad samādhi--_samādhi lābhaḥ_lābha iti_iti uktvā_vac īśvara--_īśvara praṇidhānāt_praṇidhāna vā_vā iti_iti uktam_vac praṇidhānam_praṇidhāna ca_ca vyākhyātam_vyākhyā tasya_tad vācakaḥ_vācaka praṇavaḥ_praṇava tad--_tad japaḥ_japa tad--_tad artha--_artha bhāvanam_bhāvanā iti_iti samādhi--_samādhi siddhiḥ_siddhi īśvara--_īśvara praṇidhānāt_praṇidhāna iti_iti ca_ca iha_iha tu_tu sākṣāt_sākṣāt eva_eva tatas_tatas parama--_parama gati--_gati lābhaḥ_lābha iti_iti uktam_vac tasmāt_tasmāt avirodhayā_avirodha ūm_ūṃ iti_iti ekākṣaram_ekākṣara brahma_brahman vyāharan_vyāhṛ mām_mad anusmaran_anusmṛ ātmanaḥ_ātman yoga--_yoga dhāraṇām_dhāraṇā āsthitaḥ_āsthā iti_iti vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā vicitra--_vicitra phala--_phala tva--_tva upapatteḥ_upapatti vā_vā na_na nirodhyaḥ_nirudh
div.l: āha_ah yoga--_yoga dhāraṇām_dhāraṇā ā_ā nakha--_nakha śikha--_śikhā mad--_mad mūrti--_mūrti bhāvanām_bhāvanā āśritaḥ_āśri san_as om_oṃ iti_iti ekākṣaram_ekākṣara brahma--_brahman svarūpam_svarūpa vyāharan_vyāhṛ uccārayan_uccāray tad--_tad vācyam_vac mām_mad anusmaran_anusmṛ anudhyāyan_anudhyā paramām_parama gatim_gati mad--_mad sālokyam_sālokya
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah sarvāṇi_sarva bahis_bahis jñāna--_jñāna dvārāṇi_dvāra śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi saṃyamya_saṃyam śabda--_śabda ādibhyaḥ_ādi viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ doṣa--_doṣa darśana--_darśana abhyāsena_abhyāsa tad--_tad vimukhaiḥ_vimukha taiḥ_tad tān_tad gṛhṇan_grah śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi saṃyame_saṃyama api_api manaḥ_manas pracaret_pracar iti_iti atas_atas manaḥ_manas nirudhya_nirudh niveśya_niveśay manasā_manas api_api tān_tad smaran_smṛ atha_atha kriyā--_kriyā dvāram_dvāra prāṇam_prāṇa ca_ca mūrdhnā_mūrdhan ādhāya_ādhā ādau_ādi hṛd--_hṛd padme_padma vaśīkṛtya_vaśīkṛ tasmāt_tad ūrdhva--_ūrdhva gatayā_gam suṣumṇayā_suṣumṇā guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś vartmanā_vartman bhūmi--_bhūmi jaya--_jaya krameṇa_krama bhruvoḥ_bhrū madhye_madhya tad--_tad upari_upari brahma--_brahman randhre_randhra ca_ca āāda--_āāda śikham_śikhā mad--_mad bhāvanam_bhāvanā āsthitaḥ_āsthā kurvan_kṛ
div.l: om_oṃ iti_iti brahma_brahman tatra_tatra vyāharan_vyāhṛ antar_antar uccārayan_uccāray tat_tad stauti_stu ekākṣaram_ekākṣara iti_iti ekam_eka pradhānam_pradhāna ca_ca tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara avināśi_avināśin ca_ca iti_iti tathā_tathā tat_tad vācyam_vac mām_mad parma--_parman ātmānam_ātman anusmaran_anusmṛ dhyāyan_dhyā yaḥ_yad deham_deha mad--_mad sālokya--_sālokya tām_tā yāti_yā

div.p: BhG 8.14

lg.l: an_an anya--_anya cetāḥ_cetas satatam_satatam yaḥ_yad mām_mad smarati_smṛ nityaśas_nityaśas
tasya_tad aham_mad sulabhaḥ_sulabha pārtha_pārtha nitya--_nitya yuktasya_yuj yoginaḥ_yogin

div.p: bhavati_bhū na_na anyasya_anya iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac eva_eva anusmārayati_anusmāray ananyā_ananya iti_iti na_na asti_as anyasmin_anya cetaḥ_cetas yasya_yad tathābhūtaḥ_tathābhūta san_as yaḥ_yad mām_mad satatam_satatam nirantaram_nirantaram nityaśas_nityaśas pratidinam_pratidinam smarati_smṛ tasya_tad nitya--_nitya yuktasya_yuj samāhitasya_samāhita aham_mad sukhena_sukha labhyaḥ_labh asmi_as na_na anyasya_anya

śaknoti_śak syāt_as āha_ah na_na vidyate_vid mad--_mad anya--_anya viṣaye_viṣaya cetaḥ_cetas yasya_yad saḥ_tad ananya--_ananya cetāḥ_cetas satatam_satatam nirantaram_nirantaram nityaśas_nityaśas yāvajjīvam_yāvajjīvam yaḥ_yad mām_mad smarati_smṛ tasya_tad sva--_sva vaśa--_vaśa tayā_tā vā_vā deham_deha tyajataḥ_tyaj api_api nitya--_nitya yuktasya_yuj satata--_satata samāhita--_samāhita cittasya_citta aham_mad parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara itareṣām_itara ati_ati durlabhaḥ_durlabha api_api he_he pārtha_pārtha tava_tvad aham_mad ati_ati sulabhaḥ_sulabha mā_mā bhaiṣīḥ_bhī iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

atra_atra tasya_tad iti_iti ṣaṣṭha--_ṣaṣṭha śeṣe_śeṣa sambandha--_sambandha sāmānye_sāmānya kartari_kartṛ na_na loka--_loka iti_iti ādinā_ādi niṣedhāt_niṣedha atra_atra ca_ca ananya--_ananya cetas--_cetas tvena_tva sat--_sat kāraḥ_kāra ati_ati ādaram_ādara satatam_satatam iti_iti nairantaryam_nairantarya nityaśas_nityaśas iti_iti dīrgha--_dīrgha kāla--_kāla tvam_tva smaraṇasya_smaraṇa uktam_vac tena_tena sa_tad tu_tu dīrgha--_dīrgha kāla--_kāla nairantarya--_nairantarya satkāra--_satkāra āsevitaḥ_āsev dṛḍha--_dṛḍha bhūmiḥ_bhūmi iti_iti pātañjalam_pātañjala matam_mata anusṛtam_anusṛ bhavati_bhū tatra_tatra saḥ_tad iti_iti abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa uktaḥ_vac api_api smaraṇa--_smaraṇa paryavasāyī_paryavasāyin tena_tena yāvajjīvam_yāvajjīvam pratikṣaṇam_pratikṣaṇam vikṣepa--_vikṣepa antara--_antara śūnyatayā_śūnyatā bhagavat--_bhagavant anucintanam_anucintana eva_eva parama--_parama gati--_gati hetuḥ_hetu mūrdhanyayā_mūrdhanya nāḍyā_nāḍī tu_tu sva--_sva icchayā_icchā prāṇa--_prāṇa utkramaṇam_utkramaṇa bhavatu_bhū na_na vā_vā iti_iti na_na atīva_atīva āgrahaḥ_āgraha

bhaktim_bhakti āha_ah ananya--_ananya cetāḥ_cetas na_na vidyate_vid anyasmin_anya karmaṇi_karman jñāna--_jñāna yoge_yoga vā_vā anuṣṭheya--_anuṣṭhā tvena_tva tathā_tathā devatā--_devatā antare_antara vā_vā ārādhya--_ārādhay tvena_tva tathā_tathā svarga--_svarga aparga--_aparga ādau_ādi api_api prāpya--_prāp tvena_tva cetaḥ_cetas yasya_yad satatam_satatam sadā_sadā iti_iti kāla--_kāla deśa--_deśa pātra--_pātra śuddhi--_śuddhi ādi--_ādi anapekṣa--_anapekṣa tayā_tā eva_eva nityaśas_nityaśas pratidinam_pratidinam eva_eva yaḥ_yad mām_mad smarati_smṛ yasya_yad tena_tad bhaktena_bhakta aham_mad sulabhaḥ_sulabha sukhena_sukhena labhyaḥ_labh nitya--_nitya yuktasya_yuj nitya--_nitya mad--_mad yoga--_yoga ākāṅkṣiṇaḥ_ākāṅkṣin āśaṃsāyām_āśaṃsā bhūtavat_bhūtavat ca_ca iti_iti bhāvini_bhāvin api_api yoge_yoga āśāṃsite_āśāṃs kta--_kta pratyayaḥ_pratyaya yoginaḥ_yogin bhakti--_bhakti yogavataḥ_yogavat yat_yat vā_vā yoga--_yoga sambandhaḥ_sambandha dāsya--_dāsya sakhya--_sakhya ādiḥ_ādi tadvataḥ_tadvat

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam mokṣa--_mokṣa mātra--_mātra kāṅkṣiṇām_kāṅkṣin yoga--_yoga miśrām_miśra bhaktim_bhakti upadiśya_upadiś sva--_sva jñāninām_jñānin svam_sva eva_eva ākāṅkṣatām_ākāṅkṣ eka--_eka bhaktiḥ_bhakti iti_iti uktām_vac śuddhām_śudh bhaktim_bhakti upadiśati_upadiś ananyā_ananya iti_iti yaḥ_yad janaḥ_jana ananya--_ananya cetāḥ_cetas na_na mattaḥ_mad anyasmin_anya karma--_karman yoga--_yoga ādike_ādika sādhane_sādhana svarga--_svarga mokṣa--_mokṣa ādike_ādika sādhye_sādhay vā_vā cetaḥ_cetas yasya_yad sa_tad mad--_mad eka--_eka abhilāṣavān_abhilāṣavat satatam_satatam sarvadā_sarvadā deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla ādi--_ādi viśuddhi--_viśuddhi nairapekṣeṇa_nairapekṣa nṛsiṃha--_nṛsiṃha raghunātha--_raghunātha ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa bahudhā_bahudhā āvirbhūtam_āvirbhū sarveśvaram_sarveśvara atimātra--_atimātra priyam_priya smarati_smṛ arcana--_arcana japa--_japa ādiṣu_ādi anusandhatte_anusaṃdhā tasya_tad aham_mad tad--_tad prīti--_prīti jñaḥ_jña sulabhaḥ_sulabha sukhena_sukha labhyaḥ_labh karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna yoga--_yoga tasya_tad iti_iti sambandha--_sambandha sāmānye_sāmānya ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī na_na loka--_loka avyaye_avyaya iti_iti ādinā_ādi kartari_kartṛ tasyāḥ_tad pratiṣedhāt_pratiṣedha tādṛśasya_tādṛśa tasya_tad viyogam_viyoga asahiṣṇuḥ_asahiṣṇu aham_mad eva_eva tam_tad ātmānam_ātman darśayāmi_darśay tad--_tad sādhana--_sādhana paripākam_paripāka tad--_tad pratikūla--_pratikūla nirāsam_nirāsa ca_ca kurvan_kṛ śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah yam_yad eva_eva eṣa_etad vṛnute_vṛ tena_tad labhyaḥ_labh tasya_tad eṣaḥ_etad ātmā_ātman viviṛṇute_vivṛ tanūm_tanū svām_sva iti_iti svayam_svayam ca_ca vakṣyati_vac dadāmi_dā buddhi--_buddhi yogam_yoga tam_tad yena_yad mām_mad upayānti_upayā te_tad iti_iti ādinā_ādi kīdṛśasya_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah nitya--_nitya iti_iti sarvadā_sarvadā mad--_mad yogam_yoga vāñchataḥ_vāñch āśaṃsāyām_āśaṃsā bhūtavat_bhūtavat ca_ca iti_iti sūtrāt_sūtra āśāṃsite_āśāṃs yoge_yoga bhaviṣyati_bhū api_api kta--_kta pratyayaḥ_pratyaya yoginaḥ_yogin mad--_mad dāsya--_dāsya sakhī--_sakhī ādi--_ādi sambandhavataḥ_sambandhavat
BhG 8.15

lg.l: mām_mad upetya_upe punar_punar janma_janman duḥkha--_duḥkha ālayam_ālaya aśāśvatam_aśāśvata
na_na āpnuvanti_āp mahātmānaḥ_mahātman saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi paramām_parama gatāḥ_gam

div.p: asi_as āha_ah ukta--_vac lakṣaṇāḥ_lakṣaṇa mahātmānaḥ_mahātman mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta mām_mad prāpya_prāp punar_punar duḥkha--_duḥkha āśrayam_āśraya antiyam_antiya ca_ca janma_janman na_na prāpnuvanti_prāp yatas_yatas te_tad paramām_parama samyak_samyak siddhim_siddhi mokṣam_mokṣa eva_eva prāptāḥ_prāp punar_punar janmanaḥ_janman duḥkhānām_duḥkha ca_ca ālayam_ālaya sthānam_sthāna te_tad mām_mad upetya_upe na_na prāpnuvanti_prāp iti_iti vā_vā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhagavantam_bhagavant prāptāḥ_prāp punar_punar āvartante_āvṛt na_na vā_vā iti_iti sandehe_saṃdeha na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti āha_ah mām_mad iti_iti mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara prāpya_prāp punar_punar janma_janman manuṣya--_manuṣya ādi--_ādi deha--_deha sambandham_sambandha kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa duḥkha--_duḥkha ālayam_ālaya garbha--_garbha vāsa--_vāsa yoni--_yoni dvāra--_dvāra nirgamana--_nirgamana ādi--_ādi aneka--_aneka duḥkha--_duḥkha sthānam_sthāna aśāśvatam_aśāśvata asthiram_asthira dṛṣṭa--_dṛś naṣṭa--_naś prāyam_prāya na_na āpnuvanti_āp punar_punar na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yatas_yatas śuddha--_śuddha sattvāḥ_sattva samutpanna--_samutpad samyak_samyak darśanāḥ_darśana mad--_mad loka--_loka bhoga--_bhoga ante_anta paramām_parama sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭām_utkṛṣṭa saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi muktim_mukti gatāḥ_gam te_tad atra_atra mām_mad prāpya_prāp siddhim_siddhi gatāḥ_gam iti_iti vadatā_vad upāsakānām_upāsaka
krama--_krama muktiḥ_mukti darśitā_darśay

syāt_as āha_ah duḥkha--_duḥkha ālayam_ālaya duḥkha--_duḥkha pūrṇam_pṛ aśāśvatam_aśāśvata anityam_anitya ca_ca janma_janman na_na āpnuvanti_āp kintu_kiṃtu sukha--_sukha pūrṇam_pṛ janma_janman mad--_mad janma--_janman tulyam_tulya prāpnuvanti_prāp śāśvataḥ_śāśvata tu_tu dhruvaḥ_dhruva nityaḥ_nitya sadānanaḥ_sadānana sanātanaḥ_sanātana iti_iti amaraḥ_amara yadā_yadā vasudeva--_vasudeva gṛhe_gṛha sukha--_sukha pūrṇam_pṛ nitya--_nitya bhūtam_bhū aprākṛtam_aprākṛta mad--_mad janma_janman bhavet_bhū tat_tad eva_eva teṣām_tad mad--_mad bhaktānām_bhakta api_api mad--_mad nitya--_nitya saṅginām_saṅgin janma_janman syāt_as na_na anyadā_anyadā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva paramām_parama iti_iti anye_anya bhaktāḥ_bhakta saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi prāpnuvanti_prāp ananya--_ananya cetasaḥ_cetas tu_tu paramām_parama saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi mad--_mad līlā--_līlā parikaratām_parikaratā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
tena_tad ukta--_vac lakṣaṇebhyaḥ_lakṣaṇa sarva--_sarva bhaktebhyaḥ_bhakta dṛśya--_dṛś śraiṣṭhyam_śraiṣṭhya dyotitam_dyotay

baladevaḥ_baladeva tām_tad labdhavataḥ_labh kim_ka phalam_phala syāt_as iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah mām_mad iti_iti mām_mad ukta--_vac lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa upetya_upe prāpya_prāp punar_punar prapañce_prapañca janma_janman na_na āpnuvanti_āp na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa janma_janman iti_iti āha_ah duḥkha--_duḥkha ālayam_ālaya garbha--_garbha vāsa--_vāsa ādi--_ādi bahu--_bahu kleśa--_kleśa pūrṇam_pṛ aśāśvatam_aśāśvata anityam_anitya dṛṣṭa--_dṛś naṣṭa--_naś prāyam_prāya śāśvataḥ_śāśvata tu_tu dhruvaḥ_dhruva nityaḥ_nitya iti_iti amaraḥ_amara yatas_yatas te_tad paramām_parama sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭām_utkṛṣṭa saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi gatim_gati mām_mad eva_eva gatāḥ_gam labdhavantaḥ_labh avyaktaḥ_avyakta akṣaraḥ_akṣara iti_iti uktaḥ_vac tam_tad āhuḥ_ah paramām_parama gatim_gati iti_iti vakṣyati_vac kīdṛśāḥ_kīdṛśa te_tad mahātmānaḥ_mahātman ati_ati udāra--_udāra mnanasaḥ_mnanas vijñāna--_vijñāna ānanda--_ānanda nidhim_nidhi bhakta--_bhakta prasāda--_prasāda abhimukham_abhimukha bhakta--_bhakta āyatta--_āyat sarvasvam_sarvasva mām_mad vinā_vinā anyat_anya sārṣṭya--_sārṣṭya ādikam_ādika agaṇayantaḥ_agaṇayat made_mada eka--_eka jīvātavaḥ_jīvātu bhavanti_bhū atas_atas te_tad atra_atra ananya--_ananya cetasaḥ_cetas asya_idam sva--_sva ekāntinaḥ_ekāntin sva--_sva niṣṭhebhyaḥ_niṣṭhā sva--_sva bhaktebhyaḥ_bhakta śraiṣṭhyam_śraiṣṭhya ucyate_vac
BhG 8.16

lg.l: ā_ā brahma--_brahman bhuvanāt_bhuvana lokāḥ_loka punar_punar āvartinaḥ_āvartin arjuna_arjuna
mām_mad upetya_upe tu_tu kaunteya_kaunteya punar_punar janma_janman na_na vidyate_vid

div.p: jāyante_jan jāyante_jan āha_ah

āha_ah ābrahma_ābrahma bhuvanāt_bhuvana bhavanti_bhū atra_atra bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti bhuvanam_bhuvana lokaḥ_loka abhividhau_abhividhi ā_ā kāraḥ_kāra brahma--_brahman lokena_loka saha_saha sarve_sarva api_api lokāḥ_loka mad--_mad vimukhānām_vimukha asamyak_asamyak darśinām_darśin bhoga--_bhoga bhūtayaḥ_bhūti punar_punar āvartinaḥ_āvartin punar_punar āvartana--_āvartana śīlāḥ_śīla brahma--_brahman bhavanāt_bhavana iti_iti pāṭhe_pāṭha bhavanam_bhavana vāsa--_vāsa sthānam_sthāna iti_iti saḥ_tad eva_eva arthaḥ_artha he_he arjuna_arjuna svatas_svatas prasiddha--_prasidh mahā--_mahat puruṣa_puruṣa

kim_kim tadvat_tadvat eva_eva tvām_tvad prāptānām_prāp api_api punar_punar āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti na_na iti_iti āha_ah mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara ekam_eka upetya_upe tu_tu tuḥ_tṛ loka--_loka antara--_antara vailakṣaṇya--_vailakṣaṇya dyotana--_dyotana arthaḥ_artha avadhāraṇa--_avadhāraṇa arthaḥ_artha vā_vā mām_mad eva_eva prāpya_prāp nirvṛttānām_nirvṛt he_he kaunteya_kaunteya mātṛtaḥ_mātṛ api_api prasiddha--_prasidh mahā--_mahat anubhāva_anubhāva punar_punar janma_janman na_na vidyate_vid punar_punar āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atrā_atra arjuna_arjuna kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti sambodhana--_sambodhana dvayena_dvaya svarūpataḥ_svarūpa kāraṇataḥ_kāraṇa ca_ca śuddhiḥ_śuddhi jñāna--_jñāna saṃpattaye_sampatti sūcitā_sūcay

atra_atra iyam_idam vyavasthā_vyavasthā ye_yad krama--_krama mukti--_mukti phalābhiḥ_phala upāsanābhiḥ_upāsana brahma--_brahman lokam_loka prāptāḥ_prāp teṣām_tad eva_eva tatra_tatra utpanna--_utpad samyak_samyak darśanānām_darśana brahmaṇā_brahman saha_saha mokṣaḥ_mokṣa ye_yad tu_tu pañcāgni--_pañcāgni vidyā--_vidyā ādibhiḥ_ādi a_a tad--_tad kratavaḥ_kratu api_api tatra_tatra gatāḥ_gam teṣām_tad avaśyambhāvi_avaśyambhāvin punar-janma_punarjanman ataeva_ataeva krama--_krama mukti--_mukti abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya brahma--_brahman lokam_loka abhisampadyate_abhisampad na_na ca_ca punar_punar āvartate_āvṛt anāvṛttiḥ_anāvṛtti śabdāt_śabda iti_iti śruti--_śruti sūtrayoḥ_sūtra upapattiḥ_upapatti itaratra_itaratra teṣām_tad iha_iha na_na punar_punar āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti imam_idam mānavam_mānava āvartam_āvarta na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti iha_iha imam_idam iti_iti ca_ca viśeṣaṇāt_viśeṣaṇa gamana--_gamana adhikaraṇa--_adhikaraṇa kalpāt_kalpa anyatra_anyatra punar_punar āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti pratīyate_pratī
jāyante_jan jāyante_jan āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva mad--_mad vimukhāḥ_vimukha tu_tu karma--_karman viśeṣaiḥ_viśeṣa svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi lokān_loka prāptāḥ_prāp api_api tebhyaḥ_tad patanti_pat iti_iti āha_ah ābrahma_ābrahma iti_iti abhividhau_abhividhi ākāraḥ_ākāra brahma_brahman bhuvanam_bhuvana vyāpya_vyāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha brahma--_brahman lokena_loka saha_saha sarve_sarva svarga--_svarga ādayaḥ_ādi lokāḥ_loka tad--_tad tad--_tad vartinaḥ_vartin jīvāḥ_jīva tad--_tad tad--_tad karma--_karman kṣaye_kṣaya sati_as punar_punar āvartinaḥ_āvartin bhūmau_bhūmi punar_punar janma_janman labhante_labh mām_mad upetya_upe iti_iti punar_punar kathanam_kathana dṛḍhīkaraṇa--_dṛḍhīkaraṇa artham_artha atra_atra idam_idam bodhyam_budh pañcāgni--_pañcāgni vidyayā_vidyā mahā--_mahat āhava--_āhava maraṇa--_maraṇa ādinā_ādi ye_yad brahma--_brahman lokam_loka gatāḥ_gam teṣām_tad bhoga--_bhoga ante_anta pātaḥ_pāta syāt_as ye_yad tu_tu sa_sa niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā pareśa--_pareśa bhaktāḥ_bhakta svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi lokān_loka krameṇa_krameṇa anubhavantaḥ_anubhū tatra_tatra gatāḥ_gam teṣām_tad tu_tu na_na tasmāt_tad pātaḥ_pāta kintu_kiṃtu tad--_tad loka--_loka vināśe_vināśa tad--_tad patinā_pati saha_saha pareśa--_pareśa loka--_loka prāptiḥ_prāpti eva_eva

brahmaṇā_brahman saha_saha te_tad sarve_sarva samprāpte_samprāp pratisañcare_pratisaṃcara parasya_para ante_anta kṛtātmānaḥ_kṛtātman praviśanti_praviś param_para padam_pada iti_iti smaraṇāt_smaraṇa iti_iti
BhG 8.17

lg.l: sahasra--_sahasra yuga--_yuga paryantam_paryanta ahar_ahar yat_yad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman viduḥ_vid
rātrim_rātri yuga--_yuga sahasra--_sahasra antām_anta te_tad ahorātra--_ahorātra vidaḥ_vid janāḥ_jana

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara nanu_nanu ca_ca tapasvinaḥ_tapasvin dāna--_dāna śīlāḥ_śīla vīta--_vī rāgāḥ_rāga titikṣavaḥ_titikṣu trailokya--_trailokya sa_sa upari_upari sthānam_sthāna labhante_labh loka--_loka varjitam_varjay iti_iti ādi_ādi purāṇa--_purāṇa vākyaiḥ_vākya trailokyasya_trailokya sakāśāt_sakāśāt mahar_mahar loka--_loka ādīnām_ādi utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tvam_tva gamyate_gam vināśi--_vināśin tve_tva ca_ca sarveṣām_sarva avaśiṣṭe_avaśiṣ katham_katham asau_adas viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa syāt_as iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk bahu--_bahu alpa--_alpa kāla--_kāla sthāyi--_sthāyin tva--_tva nimittaḥ_nimitta asau_adas viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa iti_iti āśayena_āśaya sva--_sva mānena_māna śata--_śata varṣa--_varṣa āyuṣaḥ_āyus brahmaṇaḥ_brahman ahani_ahar ahani_ahar darśayiṣyan_darśay brahmaṇaḥ_brahman ahar--_ahar rātrayoḥ_rātra pramāṇam_pramāṇa āha_ah sahasra--_sahasra iti_iti

sahasram_sahasra yugāni_yuga paryantaḥ_paryanta avasānam_avasāna ysya_yad tat_tad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman yat_yad ahar_ahar tat_tad ye_yad viduḥ_vid yuga--_yuga sahasram_sahasra antaḥ_anta yasyāḥ_yad tām_tad rātrim_rātri ca_ca yoga--_yoga balena_bala ye_yad viduḥ_vid te_tad eva_eva sarvajñāḥ_sarvajña janāḥ_jana ahar--_ahar rātra--_rātra vidaḥ_vid yeṣām_yad tu_tu kevalam_kevala candra--_candra āditya--_āditya gatyā_gati eva_eva jñānam_jñāna te_tad tathā_tathā ahorātra--_ahorātra vidaḥ_vid na_na bhavanti_bhū alpa--_alpa darśi--_darśin tvāt_tva yuga--_yuga śabdena_śabda atra_atra caturyugam_caturyuga abhipretam_abhipre caturyuga--_caturyuga sahasram_sahasra tu_tu brahmaṇaḥ_brahman dinam_dina ucyate_vac iti_iti viṣṇu--_viṣṇu purāṇa--_purāṇa ukteḥ_ukti brahmaṇaḥ_brahman iti_iti ca_ca mahar_mahar loka--_loka ādi--_ādi vāsinām_vāsin upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa artham_artha tatra_tatra ayam_idam kāla--_kāla gaṇanā--_gaṇanā prakāraḥ_prakāra manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya yat_yad varṣam_varṣa tat_tad devānām_deva ahar--_ahar rātram_rātra tādṛśaiḥ_tādṛśa ahar--_ahar rātraiḥ_rātra pakṣa--_pakṣa māsa--_māsa ādi--_ādi kalpanayā_kalpanā dvādaśabhiḥ_dvādaśan varṣa--_varṣa sahasraiḥ_sahasra catur--_catur yugam_yuga bhavati_bhū catur--_catur yuga--_yuga sahasram_sahasra tu_tu brahmaṇaḥ_brahman dinam_dina tāvat--_tāvat parimāṇā_parimāṇa eva_eva rātriḥ_rātri tādṛśaiḥ_tādṛśa ahar--_ahar rātraiḥ_rātra pakṣa--_pakṣa māsa--_māsa ādi--_ādi krameṇa_krama varṣa--_varṣa śatam_śata brahmaṇaḥ_brahman parama--_parama āyuḥ_āyus iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana brahma--_brahman loka--_loka sahitāḥ_sahita sarve_sarva lokāḥ_loka punar_punar āvartinaḥ_āvartin kasmāt_kasmāt kāla--_kāla paricchinna--_paricchid tvāt_tva iti_iti āha_ah sahasra--_sahasra iti_iti manuṣya--_manuṣya parimāṇena_parimāṇa sahasra--_sahasra yuga--_yuga paryantam_paryanta sahasram_sahasra yugāni_yuga catur--_catur yugāni_yuga paryantaḥ_paryanta avasānam_avasāna yasya_yad tat_tad caturyuga--_caturyuga sahasram_sahasra tu_tu brahmaṇaḥ_brahman dinam_dina ucyate_vac iti_iti hi_hi paurāṇikam_paurāṇika vacanam_vacana tādṛśam_tādṛśa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman prajāpateḥ_prajāpati ahar--_ahar dinam_dina yat_yad ye_yad viduḥ_vid tathā_tathā rātrim_rātri yuga--_yuga sahasra--_sahasra antām_anta caturyuga--_caturyuga sahasra--_sahasra paryantām_paryanta ye_yad viduḥ_vid iti_iti anuvartate_anuvṛt te_tad ahorātra--_ahorātra vidaḥ_vid te_tad eva_eva ahorātra--_ahorātra vidaḥ_vid yoginaḥ_yogin ye_yad tu_tu candra--_candra arka--_arka gatyā_gati eva_eva viduḥ_vid te_tad na_na ahorātra--_ahorātra vidaḥ_vid su_su alpa--_alpa darśi--_darśin tvāt_tva iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

sannyāsibhiḥ_saṃnyāsin api_api jagamiṣita--_jagamiṣ tvāt_tva tatratyānām_tatratya pātaḥ_pāta na_na sambhāvyate_sambhāvay mā_mā evam_evam tad--_tad loka--_loka svāminaḥ_svāmin brahmaṇaḥ_brahman api_api pātaḥ_pāta syāt_as kim_ka uta_uta anyeṣām_anya iti_iti vyañjayan_vyañjay āha_ah sahasre_sahasra iti_iti sahasram_sahasra yugāni_yuga paryantaḥ_paryanta avasānam_avasāna yasya_yad tat_tad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman ahar_ahar dinam_dina yat_yad ye_yad śāstra--_śāstra abhijñāḥ_abhijña viduḥ_vid jānanti_jñā te_tad ahar--_ahar rātra--_rātra vidaḥ_vid janāḥ_jana rātrim_rātri api_api tasya_tad yuga--_yuga sahasra--_sahasra antām_anta viduḥ_vid tena_tena tādṛśa--_tādṛśa ahar--_ahar rātraiḥ_rātra pakṣam_pakṣa āsa--_āsa ādi--_ādi krameṇa_krama varṣa--_varṣa śatam_śata brahmaṇaḥ_brahman parama--_parama āyuḥ_āyus iti_iti etad--_etad ante_anta tasya_tad api_api pātaḥ_pāta na_na kasyacid_kaścit vaiṣṇavasya_vaiṣṇava
tasya_tad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman mokṣaḥ_mokṣa ca_ca iti_iti vyañjitam_vyañjay

baladevaḥ_baladeva svarga--_svarga ādayaḥ_ādi satya--_satya antāḥ_anta sarve_sarva lokāḥ_loka kāla--_kāla paricchinna--_paricchid tvāt_tva vinaśyanti_vinaś iti_iti bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah sahasra--_sahasra iti_iti yat_yad ye_yad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman caturmukhasya_caturmukha ahar_ahar dinam_dina nṛ--_nṛ māṇena_māṇa sahasra--_sahasra yuga--_yuga paryantam_paryanta viduḥ_vid catur--_catur yuga--_yuga sahasram_sahasra tu_tu brahmaṇaḥ_brahman dinam_dina ucyate_vac iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti sahasram_sahasra catur--_catur yugāni_yuga paryantaḥ_paryanta avasānam_avasāna yasya_yad tat_tad tasya_tad rātrim_rātri ca_ca caturyuga--_caturyuga sahasra--_sahasra antām_anta viduḥ_vid te_tad eva_eva yoginaḥ_yogin janāḥ_jana ahar--_ahar rātra--_rātra vidaḥ_vid bhavanti_bhū na_na tu_tu anye_anya candra--_candra arka--_arka gati--_gati vidaḥ_vid mahar_mahar loka--_loka ādi--_ādi sthitānām_sthā upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha nṝṇām_nṛ varṣam_varṣa devānām_deva ahar--_ahar rātram_rātra tādṛśaiḥ_tādṛśa ahar--_ahar rātraiḥ_rātra pakṣam_pakṣa āsa--_āsa ādi--_ādi gaṇanayā_gaṇanā varṣa--_varṣa sahasraiḥ_sahasra catur--_catur yugam_yuga catur--_catur yugānām_yuga sahasram_sahasra tu_tu brahmaṇaḥ_brahman dinam_dina rātriḥ_rātri ca_ca tāvatī_tāvat eva_eva pakṣa--_pakṣa ādi--_ādi gaṇanayā_gaṇanā varṣa--_varṣa śatam_śata tasya_tad parama--_parama āyuḥ_āyus iti_iti tad--_tad ante_anta tad--_tad lokasya_loka tad--_tad vartinām_vartin ca_ca vināśāt_vināśa āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti siddhā_sidh iti_iti
BhG 8.18

lg.l: avyaktāt_avyakta vyaktayaḥ_vyakti sarvāḥ_sarva prabhavanti_prabhū ahar--_ahar āgame_āgama
rātri--_rātri āgame_āgama pralīyante_pralī tatra_tatra eva_eva avyakta--_avyakta saṃjñake_saṃjñaka

div.p: āha_ah kāryasya_kārya avyaktam_avyakta rūpam_rūpa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ātmakam_ātmaka tasmāt_tad avyaktāt_avyakta kāraṇa--_kāraṇa rūpāt_rūpa vyajyante_vyañj iti_iti vyaktayaḥ_vyakti carācarāṇi_carācara bhūtāni_bhūta prādurbhavanti_prādurbhū kadā_kadā ahar--_ahar āgame_āgama brahmaṇaḥ_brahman dinasya_dina upakrame_upakrama tathā_tathā rātreḥ_rātri āgame_āgama brahma--_brahman śayane_śayana tasmin_tad eva_eva avyakta--_avyakta saṃjñake_saṃjñaka kāraṇa--_kāraṇa rūpe_rūpa pralayam_pralaya yānti_yā yat_yat vā_vā te_tad ahar--_ahar rātra--_rātra vidaḥ_vid iti_iti etat_etad na_na vidhīyante_vidhā kintu_kiṃtu te_tad prasiddhāḥ_prasidh ahorātra--_ahorātra vidaḥ_vid janāḥ_jana brahmaṇaḥ_brahman yat_yad ahar_ahar viduḥ_vid tasya_tad ahnaḥ_ahar āgame_āgama avyaktāt_avyakta vyaktayaḥ_vyakti prabhavanti_prabhū yām_yad ca_ca rātrim_rātri viduḥ_vid tasyāḥ_tad rātreḥ_rātri āgame_āgama pralīyante_pralī iti_iti dvayoḥ_dvi anvayaḥ_anvaya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yathā_yathā uktaiḥ_vac ahar--_ahar rātraiḥ_rātra pakṣam_pakṣa āsa--_āsa ādi--_ādi gaṇanayā_gaṇanā pūrṇam_pṛ varṣa--_varṣa śatam_śata prajāpateḥ_prajāpati parama--_parama āyuḥ_āyus iti_iti kāla--_kāla paricchinna--_paricchid tvena_tva anityaḥ_anitya asau_adas tena_tena tad--_tad lokāt_loka punar_punar āvṛtti--_āvṛtti yuktā_yuj eva_eva ye_yad tu_tu tatas_tatas arvācīnāḥ_arvācīna teṣām_tad tat_tad ahar--_ahar mātra--_mātra paricchinna--_paricchid tvāt_tva tad--_tad tad--_tad lokebhyaḥ_loka punar_punar āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti iti_iti kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac iti_iti āha_ah avyaktāt_avyakta iti_iti atra_atra dainandina--_dainandina sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi pralayoḥ_pralaya eva_eva vaktum_vac upakrānta--_upakram tvāt_tva tatra_tatra ca_ca ākāśa--_ākāśa ādīnām_ādi sattvāt_sattva avyakta--_avyakta śabdena_śabda ākhyā--_ākhyā kṛta--_kṛ avasthā_avasthā nā_na ucyate_vac kintu_kiṃtu prajāpateḥ_prajāpati svāpa--_svāpa avasthā_avasthā eva_eva svāpa--_svāpa avasthaḥ_avasthā prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati iti_iti yāvat_yāvat ahar--_ahar āgame_āgama prajāpateḥ_prajāpati prabodha--_prabodha samaye_samaya avyaktāt_avyakta tad--_tad svāpa--_svāpa avasthā--_avasthā rūpāt_rūpa vyaktayaḥ_vyakti śarīra--_śarīra viṣaya--_viṣaya ādi--_ādi rūpāḥ_rūpa bhoga--_bhoga bhūtayaḥ_bhūti prabhavanti_prabhū vyavahāra--_vyavahāra kṣamatayā_kṣamatā abhivyajyante_abhivyañj rātri--_rātri āgame_āgama tasya_tad svāpa--_svāpa kāle_kāla pūrvoktāḥ_pūrvokta sarvāḥ_sarva api_api vyaktayaḥ_vyakti pralīyante_pralī tiras_tiras bhavanti_bhū yatas_yatas āvirbhūtāḥ_āvirbhūta tatra_tatra eva_eva avyakta--_avyakta saṃjñake_saṃjñaka kāraṇe_kāraṇa prāc--_prāñc ukte_vac svāpa--_svāpa avasthe_avasthā prajāpatau_prajāpati

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ye_yad tu_tu tatas_tatas arvācīnāḥ_arvācīna triloka--_triloka sthāḥ_stha teṣām_tad tu_tu tasya_tad ahani_ahar ahani_ahar api_api pātaḥ_pāta iti_iti āha_ah avyaktāt_avyakta iti_iti atra_atra dainandina--_dainandina sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi pralayayoḥ_pralaya ākāśa--_ākāśa ādīnām_ādi sattvāt_sattva avyakta--_avyakta śabdena_śabda svāpa--_svāpa avasthaḥ_avasthā prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati eva_eva ucyate_vac iti_iti madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda tatas_tatas ca_ca avyaktāt_avyakta svāpa--_svāpa avasthāt_avasthā prajāpateḥ_prajāpati sakāśāt_sakāśa vyaktayaḥ_vyakti śarīra--_śarīra viṣaya--_viṣaya ādi--_ādi rūpāḥ_rūpa bhoga--_bhoga bhūmayaḥ_bhūmi bhavanti_bhū vyavahāra--_vyavahāra kṣamāḥ_kṣama syuḥ_as rātri--_rātri āgame_āgama tasya_tad svāpa--_svāpa kāle_kāla pralīyante_pralī tasmin_tad eva_eva tirobhavanti_tirobhū

baladevaḥ_baladeva ye_yad tu_tu tasmāt_tad arvācīnāḥ_arvācīna trilokī--_trilokī vartinaḥ_vartin teṣām_tad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman dine_dina pātaḥ_pāta syāt_as iti_iti āha_ah avyaktāt_avyakta iti_iti ahar--_ahar āgame_āgama brahmaṇaḥ_brahman jāgara--_jāgara samaye_samaya avyaktāt_avyakta svāpa--_svāpa avasthāt_avasthā tasmāt_tad sarvā_sarva śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya bhogya--_bhogya bhoga--_bhoga sthāna--_sthāna rūpāḥ_rūpa vyaktayaḥ_vyakti prabhavanti_prabhū utpadyante_utpad rātri--_rātri āgame_āgama tasya_tad svāpa--_svāpa samaye_samaya tatra_tatra eva_eva brahmaṇi_brahman avyakta--_avyakta saṃjñake_saṃjñaka svāpa--_svāpa avasthe_avasthā kāraṇe_kāraṇa tāḥ_tad pralīyante_pralī tirobhavanti_tirobhū atra_atra avyakta--_avyakta śabdena_śabda pradhānam_pradhāna na_na abhidheyam_abhidhā tadā_tadā viyat--_viyant ādīnām_ādi sthita--_sthā tvāt_tva ca_ca kintu_kiṃtu svāpa--_svāpa avasthaḥ_avasthā brahma_brahman eva_eva tasya_tad arthaḥ_artha
BhG 8.19

lg.l: bhūta--_bhūta grāmaḥ_grāma saḥ_tad eva_eva ayam_idam bhūtvā_bhū bhūtvā_bhū pralīyate_pralī
rātri--_rātri āgame_āgama avaśaḥ_avaśa pārtha_pārtha prabhavati_prabhū ahar--_ahar āgame_āgama

div.p: darśayati_darśay bhūtānām_bhūta carācara--_carācara prāṇinām_prāṇin grāmaḥ_grāma samūhaḥ_samūha yaḥ_yad prāk_prāk āsīt_as saḥ_tad eva_eva ayam_idam ahar--_ahar āgame_āgama bhūtvā_bhū bhūtvā_bhū rātreḥ_rātri āgame_āgama pralīyante_pralī pralīya_pralī pralīya_pralī punar_punar api_api ahar--_ahar āgame_āgama avaśaḥ_avaśa karma--_karman ādi--_ādi paratantraḥ_paratantra san_as prabhavati_prabhū na_na anyaḥ_anya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam āśu--_āśu vināśi--_vināśin tve_tva api_api saṃsāra--_saṃsāra stha_stha na_na nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti kleśa--_kleśa karma--_karman ādibhiḥ_ādi avaśa--_avaśa tayā_tā punar_punar punar_punar prādurbhāvāt_prādurbhāva prādurbhūtasya_prādurbhū ca_ca punar_punar kleśa--_kleśa ādi--_ādi vaśena_vaśa eva_eva tirobhāvāt_tirobhāva saṃsāre_saṃsāra viparivartamānānām_viparivṛt sarveṣām_sarva api_api prāṇinām_prāṇin asvātantryāt_asvātantrya avaśānām_avaśa eva_eva janma--_janman maraṇa--_maraṇa ādi--_ādi duḥkha--_duḥkha prabandha--_prabandha sambandhāt_sambandha alam_alam anena_idam saṃsāreṇa_saṃsāra iti_iti vairāgya--_vairāgya utpatti--_utpatti artham_artha samāna--_samāna nāma--_nāman rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva ca_ca kṛta--_kṛ nāśa--_nāśa akṛta--_akṛta abhyāgama--_abhyāgama parihāra--_parihāra artham_artha ca_ca āha_ah bhūta--_bhūta grāmaḥ_grāma iti_iti bhūta--_bhūta grāmaḥ_grāma bhūta--_bhūta samudāyaḥ_samudāya sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa yaḥ_yad pūrvasmin_pūrva kalpe_kalpa sthitaḥ_sthā saḥ_tad eva_eva ayam_idam etasmin_etad kalpe_kalpa jāyamānaḥ_jan api_api na_na tu_tu pratikalpam_pratikalpam anyaḥ_anya anyat_anya ca_ca asat--_asat kārya--_kārya vāda--_vāda anabhyupagamāt_anabhyupagama
sūryā--_sūryā candramasau_candramas dhātā_dhātṛ yathā_yathā pūrvam_pūrvam akalpayat_kalpay divam_div ca_ca pṛthivīm_pṛthivī ca_ca antarikṣam_antarikṣa atho_atho suvar_svar

samāna--_samāna nāma--_nāman rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva āvṛttau_āvṛtti api_api avirodhau_avirodha darśanāt_darśana smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya ca_ca avaśaḥ_avaśa iti_iti avidyā--_avidyā kāma--_kāma karma--_karman ādi--_ādi paratantraḥ_paratantra he_he pārtha_pārtha spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa itarat_itara

baladevaḥ_baladeva ye_yad pralīnāḥ_pralī te_tad punar_punar na_na bhaviṣyanti_bhū iti_iti kṛta--_kṛ hāni--_hāni akṛta--_akṛta abhyāgama--_abhyāgama śaṅkā_śaṅkā syāt_as tām_tad nirasyan_niras āha_ah bhūta--_bhūta iti_iti bhūta--_bhūta grāmaḥ_grāma sthira--_sthira cara--_cara prāṇi--_prāṇin samūhaḥ_samūha avaśaḥ_avaśa karma--_karman adhīnaḥ_adhīna san_as tathā_tathā ca_ca īdṛśa--_īdṛśa janma--_janman mṛtyu--_mṛtyu pravāha--_pravāha saṅkule_saṃkula prapañce_prapañca asmin_idam vivekinām_vivekin vairāgyam_vairāgya yuktam_yuj iti_iti uktam_vac
BhG 8.20

lg.l: paraḥ_para tasmāt_tad tu_tu bhāvaḥ_bhāva anyaḥ_anya avyaktaḥ_avyakta avyaktāt_avyakta sanātanaḥ_sanātana
yaḥ_yad sa_tad sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta naśyatsu_naś na_na vinaśyati_vinaś

div.p: prapañcayati_prapañcay tasmāt_tad carācara--_carācara kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtāt_bhū avyaktāt_avyakta paraḥ_para tasya_tad api_api kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtaḥ_bhū yaḥ_yad anyaḥ_anya tad--_tad vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa avyaktaḥ_avyakta cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādi--_ādi agocaraḥ_agocara bhāvaḥ_bhāva sanātanaḥ_sanātana anādiḥ_anādi sa_tad tu_tu sarveṣu_sarva kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa lakṣaṇeṣu_lakṣaṇa bhūteṣu_bhūta naśyatu_naś api_api na_na vinaśyati_vinaś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana avaśānām_avaśa utpatti--_utpatti vināśa--_vināśa pradarśanena_pradarśana abrahma--_abrahman bhuvanāt_bhuvana lokāḥ_loka punar_punar āvartinaḥ_āvartin iti_iti etat_etad vyākhyātam_vyākhyā adhunā_adhunā mām_mad upetya_upe punar_punar janma_janman na_na vidyate_vid iti_iti etat_etad vyācaṣṭe_vyācakṣ dvābhyām_dvi paraḥ_para tasmāt_tad iti_iti tasmāt_tad carācara--_carācara sthūla--_sthūla prapañca--_prapañca kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtāt_bhū hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ākhyāt_ākhyā avyaktāt_avyakta paraḥ_para vyatiriktaḥ_vyatiric śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha vā_vā tasya_tad api_api kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtaḥ_bhū vyatireke_vyatireka api_api sālakṣaṇyam_sālakṣaṇya syāt_as iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah anyaḥ_anya atyanta--_atyanta vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa na_na tasya_tad pratimā_pratimā asti_as iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti avyaktaḥ_avyakta rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi hīna--_hā tayā_tā cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādi--_ādi agocaraḥ_agocara bhāvaḥ_bhāva kalpiteṣu_kalpay sarveṣu_sarva kāryeṣu_kārya sat--_as rūpeṇa_rūpa anugataḥ_anugam ataeva_ataeva sanātanaḥ_sanātana nityaḥ_nitya tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda heyāt_hā anityāt_anitya avyaktāt_avyakta upādeya--_upādā tvam_tva ntiyasya_ntiya avyaktasya_avyakta vailakṣaṇyam_vailakṣaṇya sūcayati_sūcay etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa yaḥ_yad bhāvaḥ_bhāva sa_tad hiraṇyagarbhaḥ_hiraṇyagarbha iva_iva sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta naśyatsu_naś api_api na_na vinaśyati_vinaś utpadyamāneṣu_utpad api_api na_na utpadyate_utpad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha hiraṇyagarbhasya_hiraṇyagarbha tu_tu kāryasya_kārya bhūta--_bhūta abhimāni--_abhimānin tvāt_tva tad--_tad utpatti--_utpatti vināśābhyām_vināśa yuktau_yuj eva_eva utpatti--_utpatti vināśau_vināśa na_na tu_tu tad--_tad anabhimāninaḥ_anabhimānin akāryasya_akārya parameśvarasya_parameśvara iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tasmāt_tad ukta--_vac lakṣaṇāt_lakṣaṇa avyaktāt_avyakta prajāpateḥ_prajāpati hiraṇyagarbhāt_hiraṇyagarbha sakāśāt_sakāśāt paraḥ_para śreṣṭaḥ_śreṣṭa hiraṇyagarbhasya_hiraṇyagarbha api_api kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtaḥ_bhū yaḥ_yad anyaḥ_anya khalu_khalu avyaktaḥ_avyakta bhāvaḥ_bhāva sanātanaḥ_sanātana anādiḥ_anādi

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad evam_evam karma--_karman tantrāṇām_tantra janma--_janman vināśa--_vināśa darśanena_darśana ābrahma_ābrahma bhuvanāt_bhuvana iti_iti etat_etad vivṛtam_vivṛ atha_atha mām_mad upetya_upe etat_etad vivṛṇoti_vivṛ paras_paras tasmāt_tad iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt utka--_utka rūpāt_rūpa avyaktāt_avyakta brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hiraṇyagarbhāt_hiraṇyagarbha anyaḥ_anya yaḥ_yad bhāvaḥ_bhāva padārthaḥ_padārtha paraḥ_para śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha tatas_tatas atyanta--_atyanta vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa tasya_tad upāsyaḥ_upās iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ati_ati vailakṣaṇyam_vailakṣaṇya āha_ah avyakte_avyakta iti_iti vigraha--_vigraha tvāt_tva pratyak_pratyañc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha prasāditaḥ_prasāday tu_tu pratyakṣaḥ_pratyakṣa api_api bhavati_bhū iti_iti uktam_vac prāk_prāñc sanātanaḥ_sanātana anādiḥ_anādi sa_tad khalu_khalu hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha paryanteṣu_paryanta sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta na_na vinaśyati_vinaś
BhG 8.21

lg.l: avyaktaḥ_avyakta akṣaraḥ_akṣara iti_iti uktaḥ_vac tam_tad āhuḥ_ah paramām_parama gatim_gati
yam_yad prāpya_prāp na_na nivartante_nivṛt tat_tad dhāma_dhāman paramam_parama mama_mad

div.p: darśayan_darśay āha_ah yaḥ_yad bhāvaḥ_bhāva avyaktaḥ_avyakta atīndriyaḥ_atīndriya akṣaraḥ_akṣara praveśa--_praveśa nāśa--_nāśa śūnyaḥ_śūnya iti_iti tathā_tathā akṣarāt_akṣara saṃbhavati_sambhū iha_iha viśvam_viśva iti_iti ādi--_ādi śrutiṣu_śruti akṣaraḥ_akṣara iti_iti uktaḥ_vac tam_tad paramām_parama gatim_gati gamyam_gam puruṣa--_puruṣa artham_artha āhuḥ_ah puruṣāt_puruṣa na_na param_para kiṃcid_kaścit sā_tad kāṣṭhā_kāṣṭhā sā_tad parā_para gatiḥ_gati iti_iti ādi--_ādi śrutayaḥ_śruti parama--_parama gati--_gati tvam_tva eva_eva āha_ah yam_yad prāpya_prāp na_na nivartante_nivṛt iti_iti tat_tad ca_ca mama_mad eva_eva dhāma_dhāman svarūpam_svarūpa mama_mad iti_iti upacāre_upacāra ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī rāhoḥ_rāhu śiraḥ_śiras itivat_itivat atas_atas aham_mad eva_eva paramā_parama gatiḥ_gati iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yaḥ_yad bhāvaḥ_bhāva iha_iha avyaktaḥ_avyakta iti_iti akṣaraḥ_akṣara iti_iti ca_ca uktaḥ_vac anyatra_anyatra api_api śrutiṣu_śruti smṛtiṣu_smṛti ca_ca tam_tad bhāvam_bhāva āhuḥ_ah śrutayaḥ_śruti smṛtayaḥ_smṛti ca_ca puruṣāt_puruṣa na_na param_para kiṃcid_kaścit sā_tad kāṣṭhā_kāṣṭhā paramā_parama gatiḥ_gati iti_iti paramām_parama utpatti--_utpatti vināśa--_vināśa śūnya--_śūnya sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa paramānanda--_paramānanda rūpām_rūpa gatim_gati puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha viśrāntim_viśrānti yam_yad bhāvam_bhāva prāpya_prāp na_na punar_punar nivartante_nivṛt saṃsārāya_saṃsāra tat_tad dhāma_dhāman svarūpam_svarūpa mama_mad viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu paramam_parama sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa mama_mad dhāma_dhāman iti_iti rāhoḥ_rāhu śiraḥ_śiras iti_iti vat_vat bheda--_bheda kalpanayā_kalpanā ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭha atas_atas aham_mad eva_eva paramā_parama gatiḥ_gati iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

na_na kṣarati_kṣar iti_iti akṣaraḥ_akṣara nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa ekaḥ_eka nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa āsīt_as na_na brahmā_brahman na_na ca_ca śaṅkaraḥ_śaṃkara iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti mama_mad paramam_parama dhāma_dhāman nityam_nitya svarūpam_svarūpa yat_yad vai_vai akṣaraḥ_akṣara param_para dhāma_dhāman brahma_brahman eva_eva mad--_mad dhāma_dhāman mad--_mad tejaḥ--_tejas rūpam_rūpa

baladevaḥ_baladeva yaḥ_yad bhāvaḥ_bhāva mayā_mad iha_iha avyaktaḥ_avyakta iti_iti akṣaraḥ_akṣara iti_iti ca_ca ucyate_vac tam_tad vedāntāḥ_vedānta paramām_parama gatim_gati āhuḥ_ah puruṣāt_puruṣa na_na param_para kiṃcid_kaścit sā_tad kāṣṭhā_kāṣṭhā paramā_parama gatiḥ_gati iti_iti ādau_ādi yam_yad bhāvam_bhāva prāpya_prāp upetya_upe janāḥ_jana punar_punar na_na nivartante_nivṛt janma_janman na_na āpnuvanti_āp sa_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah tat_tad iti_iti tat_tad mama_mad eva_eva dhāma_dhāman svarūpam_svarūpa paramam_parama śrīmat_śrīmat ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭha iyam_idam caitanyam_caitanya ātmanaḥ_ātman svarūpam_svarūpa iti_iti vat_vat avagantavyā_avagam
BhG 8.22

lg.l: puruṣaḥ_puruṣa sa_tad paraḥ_para pārtha_pārtha bhaktyā_bhakti labhyaḥ_labh tu_tu ananyayā_ananya
yasya_yad antar_antar sthāni_stha bhūtāni_bhūta yena_yad sarvam_sarva idam_idam tatam_tan

div.p: āha_ah sa_tad ca_ca aham_mad paraḥ_para puruṣaḥ_puruṣa ananyayā_ananya na_na vidyate_vid anyaḥ_anya śaraṇa--_śaraṇa tvena_tva yasyām_yad tayā_tad ekānta--_ekānta bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva labhyaḥ_labh na_na anyathā_anyathā paratvam_paratva eva_eva āha_ah yasya_yad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtasya_bhū antar_antar madhye_madhya bhūtāni_bhūta sthitāni_sthā yena_yad ca_ca kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtena_bhū idam_idam sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana -_idānīm ananya--_ananya cetāḥ_cetas satatam_satatam yaḥ_yad mām_mad smarati_smṛ nityaśas_nityaśas tasya_tad aham_mad sulabhaḥ_sulabha iti_iti prāk_prāk uktam_vac bhakti--_bhakti yogam_yoga eva_eva tad--_tad prāpti--_prāpti upāyam_upāya āha_ah puruṣa_puruṣa saḥ_tad iti_iti sa_tad paraḥ_para niratiśayaḥ_niratiśaya puruṣaḥ_puruṣa paramātmā_paramātman aham_mad eva_eva ananyayā_ananya na_na vidyate_vid viṣayaḥ_viṣaya yasyām_yad tayā_tad prema--_preman lakṣaṇayā_lakṣaṇa bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva labhyaḥ_labh na_na anyathā_anyathā sa_tad kaḥ_ka iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah yasya_yad purusasya_purusa antar_antar sthāni_stha antarvartīni_antarvartin bhūtāni_bhūta sarvāṇi_sarva kāryāṇi_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa antarvarti--_antarvartin tvāt_tva kāryasya_kārya ataeva_ataeva yena_yad puruṣeṇa_puruṣa sarvam_sarva idam_idam kārya--_kārya jātam_jāta tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp

lg.l: yasmāt_yad param_para na_na aparam_apara asti_as kiṃcid_kaścit yasmāt_yad na_na aṇīyaḥ_aṇīyas na_na jyāyaḥ_jyāyas asti_as kaścid_kaścit
vṛkṣaḥ_vṛkṣa eva_eva stabdhaḥ_stambh divi_div tisṭhati_sthā ekaḥ_eka tena_tad idam_idam pūrṇam_pṛ puruṣeṇa_puruṣa sarvam_sarva
yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit jagat_jagant sarvam_sarva dṛśyate_dṛś śrūyate_śru api_api vā_vā
antar_antar bahis_bahis ca_ca tat_tad sarvam_sarva vyāpya_vyāp nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa sthitaḥ_sthā

div.l: sa_tad paryagāt_parigā śukram_śukra iti_iti ādi--_ādi śrutibhyaḥ_śruti ca_ca
div.p: vidyate_vid

baladevaḥ_baladeva at_at prāptau_prāpti bhaktyāḥ_bhakti sūpāya--_sūpāya tvam_tva āha_ah puruṣaḥ_puruṣa saḥ_tad iti_iti sa_tad mad--_mad lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa puruṣaḥ_puruṣa ananyayā_ananya tad--_tad ekāntayā_ekānta ananya--_ananya cetāḥ_cetas satatam_satatam iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva uditayā_vad bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva labhyaḥ_labh labdhum_labh śakyaḥ_śakya yoga--_yoga bhaktyā_bhakti tu_tu duḥśakyā_duḥśakya tad--_tad prāptiḥ_prāpti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa āha_ah yasya_yad iti_iti sarvam_sarva idam_idam jagat_jagant yena_yad tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah

ekaḥ_eka vaśī_vaśin sarva--_sarva gaḥ_ga kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa īḍyaḥ_īḍ ekaḥ_eka api_api san_as bahudhā_bahudhā yaḥ_yad avabhāti_avabhā vṛkṣaḥ_vṛkṣa iva_iva stabdhaḥ_stambh divi_div tiṣṭhati_sthā ekaḥ_eka tena_tad idam_idam pūrṇam_pṛ puruṣeṇa_puruṣa sarvam_sarva iti_iti ādyā_ādya
BhG 8.23

lg.l: yatra_yatra kāle_kāla tu_tu anāvṛttim_anāvṛtti āvṛttim_āvṛtti ca_ca eva_eva yoginaḥ_yogin
prayātāḥ_prayā yānti_yā tam_tad kālam_kāla vakṣyāmi_vac bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha

div.p: nivartante_nivṛt anye_anya tu_tu āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra kena_ka mārgeṇa_mārga gatāḥ_gam na_na āvartante_āvṛt kena_ka vā_vā gatāḥ_gam ca_ca āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah yatra_yatra iti_iti yatra_yatra yasmin_yad kāle_kāla prayātāḥ_prayā yoginaḥ_yogin anāvṛttim_anāvṛtti yānti_yā yasmin_yad ca_ca kāle_kāla prayātāḥ_prayā āvṛttim_āvṛtti yānti_yā tam_tad kālam_kāla vakṣyāmi_vac iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya atra_atra ca_ca raśmi--_raśmi anusārī_anusārin atas_atas ca_ca ayane_ayana api_api dakṣiṇe_dakṣiṇa iti_iti sūcita--_sūcay nyāyena_nyāya uttarāya--_uttarāya ādi--_ādi kāla--_kāla viśeṣa--_viśeṣa maraṇam_maraṇa ca_ca tu_tu avivakṣita--_avivakṣita tvāt_tva kāla--_kāla śabdena_śabda kāla--_kāla abhimāninībhiḥ_abhimānin ātivāhikībhiḥ_ātivāhika devatābhiḥ_devatā prāpyaḥ_prāp atas_atas ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha yasmin_yad kāla--_kāla abhimāni--_abhimānin devatā--_devatā upalakṣite_upalakṣay mārge_mārga prayātāḥ_prayā yoginaḥ_yogin upāsakāḥ_upāsaka karmiṇaḥ_karmin ca_ca yathākramam_yathākramam anāvṛttim_anāvṛtti āvṛttim_āvṛtti ca_ca yānti_yā tam_tad kāla--_kāla abhimāni--_abhimānin devatā--_devatā upalakṣitam_upalakṣay mārgam_mārga kathayiṣyāmi_kathay iti_iti agni--_agni jyotiṣoḥ_jyotis kāla--_kāla abhimāni--_abhimānin tva--_tva abhāve_abhāva api_api bhūyasām_bhūyas ahar--_ahar ādi--_ādi śabda--_śabda uktānām_vac kāla--_kāla abhimāni--_abhimānin tvāt_tva tad--_tad sāhacaryāt_sāhacarya āmra--_āmra vanam_vana iti_iti ādi--_ādi vat_vat kāla--_kāla śabdena_śabda upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa aviruddham_aviruddha
