nivartante_nivṛt tatra_tatra tad--_tad loka--_loka bhogāt_bhoga prāk_prāk anutpanna--_anutpanna samyak_samyak darśanānām_darśana tesām_tad mārga--_mārga apekṣā_apekṣā vidyate_vid na_na tu_tu samyak_samyak darśinām_darśin iva_iva tad--_tad anapekṣā_anapekṣā iti_iti upāsakānām_upāsaka tad--_tad loka--_loka prāptaye_prāpti deva--_deva yāna--_yāna mārgaḥ_mārga upadiśyate_upadiś pitṛ--_pitṛ yāna--_yāna mārga--_mārga upanyāsaḥ_upanyāsa tu_tu tasya_tad stutaye_stuti yatra_yatra iti_iti

prāṇa--_prāṇa utkramaṇa--_utkramaṇa anantaram_anantaram yatra_yatra yasmin_yad kāle_kāla kāla--_kāla abhimāni--_abhimānin devatā--_devatā upalakṣite_upalakṣay mārge_mārga prayātāḥ_prayā yoginaḥ_yogin dhyāyinaḥ_dhyāyin karmiṇaḥ_karmin ca_ca anāvṛttim_anāvṛtti āvṛttim_āvṛtti ca_ca yānti_yā deva--_deva yāne_yāna pathi_pathin prayātāḥ_prayā ca_ca karmiṇaḥ_karmin āvṛttim_āvṛtti yānti_yā yadi_yadi api_api deva--_deva yāne_yāna api_api pathi_pathin prayātāḥ_prayā punar_punar āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti uktam_vac ābrahma_ābrahma bhuvanāḥ_bhuvana lokāḥ_loka punar_punar āvartinaḥ_āvartin iti_iti atra_atra tathā_tathā api_api pitṛ--_pitṛ yāne_yāna pathi_pathin gatāḥ_gam āvartante_āvṛt eva_eva na_na ke_ka api_api tatra_tatra krama--_krama mukti--_mukti bhājaḥ_bhāj deva--_deva yāne_yāna pathi_pathin gatāḥ_gam tu_tu yadi_yadi api_api kecid_kaścit āvartante_āvṛt pratīka--_pratīka upāsakāḥ_upāsaka taḍit--_taḍit loka--_loka paryantam_paryanta gatāḥ_gam hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha paryantam_paryanta amānava--_amānava puruṣa--_puruṣa nītāḥ_nī api_api pañcāgni--_pañcāgni vidyā--_vidyā ādi--_ādi upāsakāḥ_upāsaka a_a tad--_tad kratavaḥ_kratu dahara--_dahara ādi--_ādi upāsakāḥ_upāsaka krameṇa_krameṇa mucyante_muc bhoga--_bhoga ante_anta iti_iti na_na sarve_sarva eva_eva āvartante_āvṛt ataeva_ataeva pitṛ--_pitṛ yānaḥ_yāna panthāḥ_pathin niyamena_niyama āvṛtti--_āvṛtti phalatvāt_phalatva nikṛṣṭaḥ_nikṛṣṭa ayam_idam tu_tu deva--_deva yānaḥ_yāna panthāḥ_pathin anāvṛtti--_anāvṛtti phala--_phala tvāt_tva ati_ati praśastaḥ_praśaṃs iti_iti stutiḥ_stuti upapadyate_upapad keṣāṃcid_kaścit āvṛttau_āvṛtti api_api anāvṛtti--_anāvṛtti phala--_phala tvasya_tva anapāyāt_anapāya

tam_tad deva--_deva yānam_yāna pitṛ--_pitṛ yānam_yāna ca_ca kālam_kāla kāla--_kāla abhimāni--_abhimānin devatā--_devatā upalakṣitam_upalakṣay mārgam_mārga vakṣyāmi_vac he_he bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha atra_atra kāla--_kāla śabdasya_śabda mukhya--_mukhya artha--_artha tve_tva agniḥ_agni jyotiḥ--_jyotis dhūma--_dhūma śabdānām_śabda upapattiḥ_upapatti gati--_gati sṛti--_sṛti śabdayoḥ_śabda ca_ca iti_iti tad--_tad anurodhena_anurodha ekasmin_eka kāla--_kāla pade_pada eva_eva lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa āśritā_āśri kāla--_kāla abhimāni--_abhimānin agni--_agni dhūmayoḥ_dhūma tad--_tad itarayoḥ_itara satoḥ_as api_api agnihotra--_agnihotra śabda--_śabda vat_vat eka--_eka deśena_deśa api_api upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa kāla--_kāla śabdena_śabda anyathā_anyathā prātar_prātar agni--_agni devatāyāḥ_devatā abhāvāt_abhāva tad--_tad prakhyam_prakhyā ca_ca anya--_anya śāstram_śāstra iti_iti anena_idam tasya_tad nāma--_nāman dheya--_dheya tayā_tā na_na syāt_as āmra--_āmra vanam_vana iti_iti ca_ca laukikaḥ_laukika dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta nivartante_nivṛt prāptāḥ_prāp āvartante_āvṛt na_na tatra_tatra tva--_tva prāntau_prānti kaścid_kaścit mārga--_mārga niyamaḥ_niyama iti_iti uktaḥ_vac tvad--_tvad bhaktānām_bhakta ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī tvāt_tva tad--_tad mārgaḥ_mārga api_api guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī eva_eva avasīyate_avasā na_na tu_tu sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika arciḥ--_arcis ādiḥ_ādi yaḥ_yad tu_tu mārgaḥ_mārga yoginaḥ_yogin jñāninaḥ_jñānin karmiṇaḥ_karmin ca_ca asti_as tam_tad aham_mad jijñāse_jijñās iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah yatra_yatra iti_iti prāṇa--_prāṇa utkramaṇa--_utkramaṇa anantaram_anantaram tatra_tatra kāla--_kāla upalakṣite_upalakṣay mārge_mārga prayātāḥ_prayā anāvṛttim_anāvṛtti āvṛttim_āvṛtti ca_ca yānti_yā tam_tad kālam_kāla mārgam_mārga vakṣye_vac iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya

baladevaḥ_baladeva sva--_sva bhaktānām_bhakta āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti sva--_sva vimukhānām_vimukha tu_tu āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti uktā_vac sā_tad sā_tad ca_ca kena_ka pathā_pathin gatānām_gam bhavet_bhū iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah yatra_yatra iti_iti yoginaḥ_yogin bhaktāḥ_bhakta kāmya--_kāmya karmiṇaḥ_karmin ca_ca atra_atra kāla--_kāla śabdena_śabda kāla--_kāla abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin devatā--_devatā uktāḥ_vac agni--_agni dhūmayoḥ_dhūma kāla--_kāla tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva kāla--_kāla śabdena_śabda uktiḥ_ukti tu_tu bhūyasā_bhūyas mahat--_mahant ādi--_ādi śabdānām_śabda rātri--_rātri ādi--_ādi śabdānām_śabda ca_ca kāla--_kāla vāci--_vācin tvāt_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca arciḥ--_arcis ādibhiḥ_ādi dhūma--_dhūma ādibhiḥ_ādi ca_ca devaiḥ_deva pālitaḥ_pālay panthāḥ_pathin kāla--_kāla
BhG 8.24

lg.l: agniḥ_agni jyotiḥ_jyotis ahar_ahar śuklaḥ_śukla ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ māsāḥ_māsa uttarāyaṇam_uttarāyaṇa
tatra_tatra prayātāḥ_prayā gacchanti_gam brahma_brahman brahma--_brahman vidaḥ_vid janāḥ_jana

div.p:
āha_ah agni--_agni jyotiḥ--_jyotis śabdābhyām_śabda te_tad arciḥ_arcis abhisambhavanti_abhisambhū iti_iti śruti--_śruti ukta--_vac arciḥ--_arcis abhimāninī_abhimānin devatā_devatā upalakṣyate_upalakṣay ahar_ahar iti_iti divasa--_divasa abhimāninī_abhimānin śuklaḥ_śukla iti_iti śukla--_śukla pakṣa--_pakṣa abhimāninī_abhimānin uttarāyaṇa--_uttarāyaṇa rūpāḥ_rūpa ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ māsāḥ_māsa iti_iti uttarāyaṇa--_uttarāyaṇa abhimāninī_abhimānin etat_etad ca_ca anyāsām_anya api_api śruti--_śruti uktānām_vac upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa artham_artha evam_evam bhūtaḥ_bhū yaḥ_yad mārgaḥ_mārga tatra_tatra prayātāḥ_prayā gatāḥ_gam bhagavat--_bhagavant upāsakāḥ_upāsaka janāḥ_jana brahma_brahman prāpnuvanti_prāp te_tad brahma--_brahman vidaḥ_vid tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti te_tad arciṣam_arcis abhi_abhi sambhavanti_sambhū arciṣaḥ_arcis āpūryamāṇa--_āp￞ pakṣam_pakṣa āpūryamāṇa--_āp￞ pakṣāt_pakṣa yān_i ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ māsān_māsa udaṅ_udañc ādityaḥ_āditya eti_i māsebhyaḥ_māsa deva--_deva lokam_loka iti_iti mukti--_mukti bhājām_bhāj
samyak_samyak darśana--_darśana niṣṭhānām_niṣṭhā gatiḥ_gati vā_vā kvacid_kvacid asti_as na_na tasya_tad prāṇāḥ_prāṇa utkrāmanti_utkram

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatra_tatra upāsakānām_upāsaka deva--_deva yānam_yāna panthānam_pathin āha_ah agniḥ_agni iti_iti agniḥ_agni jyotiḥ_jyotis iti_iti arciḥ_arcis abhimāninī_abhimānin devatā_devatā lakṣyate_lakṣay ahar_ahar iti_iti ahar--_ahar abhimāninī_abhimānin śukla--_śukla pakṣaḥ_pakṣa iti_iti śukla--_śukla pakṣa--_pakṣa abhimāninī_abhimānin ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ māsāḥ_māsa uttarāyaṇam_uttarāyaṇa iti_iti uttarāyaṇa--_uttarāyaṇa rūpa--_rūpa ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ māsa--_māsa abhimāninī_abhimānin devatā_devatā eva_eva lakṣyate_lakṣay ātivāhikāḥ_ātivāhika tad--_tad liṅgāt_liṅga iti_iti etat_etad ca_ca anyāsām_anya api_api śruti--_śruti uktānām_vac upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa artham_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti te_tad arciṣam_arcis abhi_abhi sambhavanti_sambhū arciṣaḥ_arcis āpūryamāṇa--_āp￞ pakṣam_pakṣa āpūryamāṇa--_āp￞ pakṣāt_pakṣa yān_yad ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ uṅ_uṅ ā_ā iti_iti māsān_māsa tān_tad māsebhyaḥ_māsa saṃvatsaram_saṃvatsara saṃvatsarāt_saṃvatsara ādityam_āditya ādityāt_āditya candramasam_candramas amānavaḥ_amānava saḥ_tad enān_enad brahma_brahman gamayati_gamay eṣa_etad deva--_deva pathaḥ_patha brahma--_brahman pathaḥ_patha etena_etad pratipadyamānāḥ_pratipad imam_idam mānavam_mānava āvartam_āvṛt na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti

atra_atra śruti--_śruti antara--_antara anusārāt_anusāra saṃvatsara--_saṃvatsara anantaram_anantaram deva--_deva loka--_loka devatā_devatā tatas_tatas vāyu--_vāyu devatā_devatā tatas_tatas ādityaḥ_āditya iti_iti ākare_ākara nirṇītam_nirṇī evam_evam vidyutaḥ_vidyut anantaram_anantaram varuṇa--_varuṇa indra--_indra prajāpatayaḥ_prajāpati tāvatā_tāvat mārga--_mārga parva--_parvan pūrtiḥ_pūrti tatra_tatra arciḥ--_arcis ahar--_ahar śukla--_śukla pakṣa--_pakṣa uttarāyaṇa--_uttarāyaṇa devatāḥ_devatā iha_iha uktāḥ_vac saṃvatsaraḥ_saṃvatsara deva--_deva lokaḥ_loka vāyuḥ_vāyu ādityaḥ_āditya candramāḥ_candramas vidyut--_vidyut varuṇaḥ_varuṇa indraḥ_indra prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati ca_ca iti_iti anuktāḥ_anukta api_api draṣṭavyāḥ_dṛś tatra_tatra deva--_deva yāna--_yāna mārge_mārga prayātāḥ_prayā gacchanti_gam brahma_brahman kārya--_kārya upādhikam_upādhika kāryam_kārya vādariḥ_vādari asya_idam gati--_gati upapatteḥ_upapatti iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya brahma--_brahman vidaḥ_vid saguṇa--_saguṇa brahma--_brahman upāsakāḥ_upāsaka janāḥ_jana atra_atra etena_etad pratipadyamānāḥ_pratipad imam_idam mānavam_mānava āvartam_āvarta na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti śrutau_śruti imam_idam iti_iti viśeṣaṇāt_viśeṣaṇa kalpa--_kalpa antare_antara kecid_kaścit āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti pratīyate_pratī ataeva_ataeva atra_atra bhagavatā_bhagavant udāsitam_udās śrauta--_śrauta mārga--_mārga kathanena_kathana eva_eva vyākhyānāt_vyākhyāna

āha_ah agni--_agni jyotiḥ--_jyotis śabdābhyām_śabda te_tad arciṣam_arcis abhisambhavanti_abhisambhū iti_iti śruti--_śruti uktyā_ukti arciḥ--_arcis abhimāninī_abhimānin devatā_devatā upalakṣyate_upalakṣay ahar_ahar iti_iti ahar--_ahar abhimāninī_abhimānin śuklaḥ_śukla iti_iti śukla--_śukla pakṣa--_pakṣa abhimāninī_abhimānin uttarāyaṇa--_uttarāyaṇa rūpāḥ_rūpa ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ māsāḥ_māsa iti_iti uttarāyaṇa--_uttarāyaṇa abhimāninī_abhimānin devatā_devatā etad--_etad rūpaḥ_rūpa yaḥ_yad mārgaḥ_mārga tatra_tatra prayātāḥ_prayā brahma--_brahman vidaḥ_vid jñāninaḥ_jñānin brahma_brahman prāpnuvanti_prāp tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti te_tad arciṣam_arcis abhi_abhi sambhavanti_sambhū arciṣaḥ_arcis āpūryamāṇa--_āp￞ pakṣam_pakṣa āpūryamāṇa--_āp￞ pakṣāt_pakṣa yān_i ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ māsān_māsa udaṅ_udañc ādityaḥ_āditya eti_i mālebhyaḥ_māla deva--_deva lokam_loka iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva --tatra_tatra anāvṛtti--_anāvṛtti patham_patha āha_ah agniḥ_agni iti_iti agni--_agni jyotiḥ--_jyotis śabdābhyām_śabda śruti--_śruti uktaḥ_vac arciḥ--_arcis abhimānī_abhimānin devaḥ_deva upalakṣyate_upalakṣay ahar_ahar iti_iti divasa--_divasa abhimānī_abhimānin śuklaḥ_śukla iti_iti śukla--_śukla pakṣa--_pakṣa abhimāninī_abhimānin ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ māsāḥ_māsa iti_iti uttarāyaṇam_uttarāyaṇa iti_iti ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ māsa--_māsa ātmaka--_ātmaka uttarāyaṇa--_uttarāyaṇa ābha--_ābha abhimānī_abhimānin etat_etad ca_ca anyeṣām_anya saṃvatsara--_saṃvatsara ādīnām_ādi śruti--_śruti uktānām_vac upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa chāndogyāḥ_chāndogya paṭhanti_paṭh atha_atha yat_yat u_u ca_ca eva_eva asmin_idam śavyam_śavya kurvanti_kṛ yadi_yadi ca_ca na_na arciṣam_arcis eva_eva abhisaṃbhavanti_abhisambhū arciṣaḥ_arcis ahar_ahar ahar_ahar āpūryamāṇa--_āp￞ pakṣam_pakṣa āpūryamāṇa--_āp￞ pakṣāt_pakṣa yān_yad ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ udaṇṇā_udañc iti_iti māsān_māsa tān_tad ādityāt_āditya candramasam_candramas
candramasaḥ_candramas vidyutam_vidyut tat_tad puruṣaḥ_puruṣa amānavaḥ_amānava saḥ_tad enān_enad brahma_brahman gamayati_gamay eṣa_etad deva--_deva pathaḥ_patha brahma--_brahman pathaḥ_patha etena_etad pratipadyamānāḥ_pratipad imam_idam mānavam_mānava āvartam_āvṛt na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti

asya_idam arthaḥ_artha asmin_idam akṣi--_akṣi stha--_stha brahma--_brahman upāsaka--_upāsaka gaṇe_gaṇa mṛte_mṛ sati_as yadi_yadi putra--_putra śiṣya--_śiṣya ādayaḥ_ādi śabyam_śabya śaba--_śaba sambandhi_sambandhin karma_karman dāha--_dāha ādi_ādi kurvanti_kṛ yadi_yadi ca_ca na_na kurvanti_kṛ ubhayathā_ubhayathā api_api akṣata--_akṣata upāsti--_upāsti phalāḥ_phala te_tad tad--_tad upāsakāḥ_upāsaka arciḥ--_arcis ādibhiḥ_ādi devaiḥ_deva tam_tad upāsyam_upās prayānti_prayā iti_iti sphuṭam_sphuṭa anyat_anya atra_atra saṃvatsara--_saṃvatsara ādityayoḥ_āditya madhye_madhya vāyu--_vāyu lokaḥ_loka niveśyaḥ_niveśay vidyutaḥ_vidyut paratra_paratra kramāt_kramāt varuṇa--_varuṇa indra--_indra prajāpatayaḥ_prajāpati bodhyāḥ_budh śruti--_śruti antarāt_antara iti_iti ākare_ākara vistaraḥ_vistara ete_etad arciḥ--_arcis ādayaḥ_ādi devāḥ_deva iti_iti āha_ah sūtra--_sūtra kāraḥ_kāra ātivāhikāḥ_ātivāhika tad--_tad liṅgāt_liṅga iti_iti tathā_tathā arciḥ--_arcis ādibhiḥ_ādi bhagavat--_bhagavant nideśa--_nideśa sthaiḥ_stha dvādaśabhiḥ_dvādaśan devaiḥ_deva sevyamānena_sev pathā_pathin bhagavantam_bhagavant tad--_tad bhaktāḥ_bhakta prayānti_prayā tatas_tatas punar_punar na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti evam_evam uktam_vac nirṇetṛbhiḥ_nirṇetṛ

arciḥ_arcis dina--_dina sita--_sita pakṣaiḥ_pakṣa iha_iha uttarāyaṇa--_uttarāyaṇa śarad--_śarad marut--_marut ravibhiḥ_ravi vidhu--_vidhu vidyut--_vidyut varuṇa--_varuṇa indra--_indra druhiṇaiḥ_druhiṇa ca_ca agāt_gā padam_pada hareḥ_hari muktaḥ_muc
BhG 8.25

lg.l: dhūmaḥ_dhūma rātriḥ_rātri tathā_tathā kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ māsāḥ_māsa dakṣiṇāyanam_dakṣiṇāyana
tatra_tatra cāndramasam_cāndramasa jyotiḥ_jyotis yogī_yogin prāpya_prāp nivartate_nivṛt

div.p: āha_ah dhūmaḥ_dhūma dhūma--_dhūma abhimāninī_abhimānin devatā_devatā rātri--_rātri ādi--_ādi śabdaiḥ_śabda ca_ca pūrvavat_pūrvavat eva_eva rātri--_rātri kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa pakṣa--_pakṣa dakṣiṇāyana--_dakṣiṇāyana rūpa--_rūpa ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ māsa--_māsa abhimāninyaḥ_abhimānin tisraḥ_tri devatāḥ_devatā upalakṣyante_upalakṣay etābhiḥ_etad devatābhiḥ_devatā upalakṣitaḥ_upalakṣay yaḥ_yad mārgaḥ_mārga tatra_tatra prayātaḥ_prayā karma--_karman yogī_yogin cāndramasam_cāndramasa jyotiḥ_jyotis tad--_tad upalakṣitam_upalakṣay svarga--_svarga lokam_loka prāpya_prāp tatra_tatra iṣṭāpūrta--_iṣṭāpūrta karma--_karman phalam_phala bhuktvā_bhuj punar_punar āvartate_āvṛt tatra_tatra api_api śrutiḥ_śruti te_tad dhūmam_dhūma abhi_abhi sambhavanti_sambhū dhūmāt_dhūma rātrim_rātri rātreḥ_rātri apakṣīyamāṇa--_apakṣi pakṣam_pakṣa apakṣīyamāṇa--_apakṣi pakṣāt_pakṣa yān_yad ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ māsān_māsa dakṣiṇā_dakṣiṇā ādityaḥ_āditya eti_i māsebhyaḥ_māsa pitṛ--_pitṛ lokam_loka pitṛ--_pitṛ lokāt_loka candram_candra tat_tad evam_evam nivṛtti--_nivṛtti karma--_karman sahita--_sahita upāsanayā_upāsana krama--_krama muktiḥ_mukti kāmya--_kāmya karmabhiḥ_karman ca_ca svarga--_svarga bhoga--_bhoga anantaram_anantaram āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti niṣiddha--_niṣidh karmabhiḥ_karman tu_tu āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti kṣudra--_kṣudra karmaṇām_karman tu_tu jantūnām_jantu atra_atra eva_eva punar_punar punar_punar janma_janman iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś 25_25

āha_ah atra_atra api_api dhūmaḥ_dhūma iti_iti dhūma--_dhūma abhimāninī_abhimānin devatā_devatā rātriḥ_rātri iti_iti rātri--_rātri abhimāninī_abhimānin kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa iti_iti kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa pakṣa--_pakṣa abhimāninī_abhimānin ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ māsāḥ_māsa dakṣiṇāyanam_dakṣiṇāyana iti_iti dakṣiṇāyana--_dakṣiṇāyana abhimāninī_abhimānin lakṣyate_lakṣay etat_etad api_api anyāsām_anya śruti--_śruti uktānām_vac upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa tathā_tathā hi_hi śrutiḥ_śruti te_tad dhūmam_dhūma abhi_abhi sambhavanti_sambhū dhūmāt_dhūma rātrim_rātri rātreḥ_rātri apara--_apara pakṣam_pakṣa apara--_apara kṣīyamāṇa--_kṣi pakṣāt_pakṣa yān_yad ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ dakṣiṇā_dakṣiṇā eti_i māsān_māsa tān_tad anite_anita saṃvatsaram_saṃvatsara abhiprāpnuvanti_abhiprāp māsebhyaḥ_māsa pitṛ--_pitṛ candramasam_candramas eṣa_etad somaḥ_soma rājā_rājan tat_tad devānām_deva annam_anna tam_tad devāḥ_deva bhakṣayanti_bhakṣay tasmin_tad yāvat_yāvat saṃpātam_sampāta uṣitvā_vas atha_atha etam_etad eva_eva adhvyānam_adhvyāna punar_punar nivartante_nivṛt iti_iti tatra_tatra tasmin_tad pathi_pathin prayātāḥ_prayā cāndramasam_cāndramasa jyotiḥ_jyotis phalam_phala yogī_yogin karma--_karman yogī_yogin iṣṭāpūrta--_iṣṭāpūrta datta--_dā kārī_kārin prāpya_prāp yāvat_yāvat sampātam_sampāta uṣitvā_vas nivartate_nivṛt sampatati_sampat anena_idam iti_iti sampātaḥ_sampāta karma_karman tasmāt_tad etasmāt_etad āvṛtti--_āvṛtti mārgāt_mārga anāvṛtti--_anāvṛtti mārgaḥ_mārga śreyān_śreyas iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 25_25

āha_ah dhūma--_dhūma abhimāninī_abhimānin devatā_devatā rātri--_rātri ādi--_ādi śabdaiḥ_śabda ca_ca pūrvavat_pūrvavat eva_eva tad--_tad tad--_tad abhimāninyaḥ_abhimānin tisraḥ_tri devatāḥ_devatā lakṣyante_lakṣay etābhiḥ_etad devatābhiḥ_devatā upalakṣitaḥ_upalakṣay yaḥ_yad mārgaḥ_mārga tatra_tatra prayātaḥ_prayā karma--_karman yogī_yogin cāndramasam_cāndramasa jyotiḥ_jyotis tad--_tad upalakṣitam_upalakṣay svarga--_svarga lokam_loka prāpya_prāp karma--_karman phalam_phala bhuktvā_bhuj nivartate_nivṛt 25_25

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha āvṛtti--_āvṛtti patham_patha āha_ah dhūmaḥ_dhūma rātriḥ_rātri iti_iti tatra_tatra api_api pūrvavat_pūrvavat dhūma--_dhūma rātri--_rātri kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa pakṣa--_pakṣa ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ māsa--_māsa ātmaka--_ātmaka dakṣiṇāyanānām_dakṣiṇāyana abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin devāḥ_deva lakṣyāḥ_lakṣya saṃvatsara--_saṃvatsara pitṛ--_pitṛ loka--_loka ākāśa--_ākāśa candramasām_candramas śruti--_śruti uktānām_vac upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad chāndogyāḥ_chāndogya paṭhanti_paṭh atha_atha ye_yad ime_idam grāme_grāma iṣṭā--_iṣṭā pūrte_pūrta dattam_dā iti_iti upāsate_upās te_tad dhūmam_dhūma abhisambhavanti_abhisambhū dhūmāt_dhūma rātrim_rātri rātreḥ_rātri apara--_apara pakṣam_pakṣa apara--_apara pakṣāt_pakṣa yān_yad ṣaṭ_ṣaṣ dakṣiṇā_dakṣiṇā eti_i māsān_māsa tān_tad na_na ete_etad saṃvatsaram_saṃvatsara abhiprāpnuvanti_abhiprāp māsebhyaḥ_māsa pitṛ--_pitṛ lokam_loka pitṛ--_pitṛ lokāt_loka ākāśam_ākāśa ākāśāt_ākāśa candramasam_candramas eṣa_etad somaḥ_soma rājā_rājan tat_tad devānām_deva annam_anna tam_tad devāḥ_deva bhakṣayanti_bhakṣay tasmin_tad yavāt_yava saṃpātam_sampāta uṣitvā_vas atha_atha etam_etad eva_eva adhvānam_adhvan punar_punar nivartante_nivṛt iti_iti
div.l: tathā_tathā ca_ca dhūma--_dhūma ādibhiḥ_ādi pareśa--_pareśa nideśa--_nideśa sthaiḥ_stha aṣṭabhiḥ_aṣṭan devaiḥ_deva pālitena_pālay pathā_pathin kāmya--_kāmya karmiṇaḥ_karmin candra--_candra lokam_loka bhoga--_bhoga kṣaye_kṣaya sati_as tasmāt_tad punar_punar nivartante_nivṛt iti_iti

div.p: BhG 8.26

lg.l: śukla--_śukla kṛṣṇe_kṛṣṇa gatī_gati hi_hi ete_etad jagataḥ_jagant śāśvate_śāśvata mate_man
ekayā_eka yāti_yā anāvṛttim_anāvṛtti anyayā_anya āvartate_āvṛt punar_punar

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ śuklā_śukla arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi gatiḥ_gati prakāśa--_prakāśa maya--_maya tvāt_tva kṛṣṇā_kṛṣṇa dhūma--_dhūma ādi--_ādi gatiḥ_gati tamaḥ--_tamas maya--_maya tvāt_tva ete_etad gatī_gati mārgau_mārga jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin jagataḥ_jagant śāśvate_śāśvata anādī_anādi saṃmate_samman saṃsārasya_saṃsāra anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva tayoḥ_tad ekayā_eka śuklayā_śukla anāvṛttim_anāvṛtti mokṣam_mokṣa yāti_yā anyayā_anya kṛṣṇayā_kṛṣṇa tu_tu punar_punar āvartate_āvṛt 26_26

upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ śukla--_śukla arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi gatiḥ_gati jñāna--_jñāna prakāśa--_prakāśa maya--_maya tvāt_tva te_tad ete_etad śukla--_śukla kṛṣṇe_kṛṣṇa gatī_gati mārgau_mārga hi_hi prasiddhe_prasidh sa_sa guṇa--_guṇa vidyā--_vidyā karma--_karman adhikāriṇoḥ_adhikārin jagataḥ_jagant sarvasya_sarva api_api śāstra--_śāstra jñasya_jña śāśvate_śāśvata anādī_anādi mate_man saṃsārasya_saṃsāra anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva tayoḥ_tad ekayā_eka śuklayā_śukla yāti_yā anāvṛttim_anāvṛtti kaścid_kaścit anyayā_anya kṛṣṇayā_kṛṣṇa punar_punar āvartate_āvṛt sarvaḥ_sarva api_api 26_26
upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ jāyate_jan

baladevaḥ_baladeva uktau_vac panthānau_pathin upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ śukla--_śukla iti_iti arciḥ--_arcis ādiḥ_ādi gatiḥ_gati śuklā_śukla prakāśa--_prakāśa maya--_maya tvāt_tva dhūma--_dhūma ādikā_ādika gatiḥ_gati kṛṣṇā_kṛṣṇa prakāśa--_prakāśa śūnya--_śūnya tvāt_tva gatiḥ_gati panthāḥ_pathin ete_etad gatāḥ_gam jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin jagataḥ_jagant śāśvate_śāśvata anādī_anādi sammate_samman tasya_tad anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva sphuṭam_sphuṭa anyat_anya 26_26
BhG 8.27

lg.l: na_na ete_etad sṛtī_sṛti pārtha_pārtha jānan_jñā yogī_yogin muhyati_muh kaścana_kaścana
tasmāt_tasmāt sarveṣu_sarva kāleṣu_kāla yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj bhava_bhū arjuna_arjuna

div.p: darśayan_darśay upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ ete_etad sṛtī_sṛti mārgau_mārga mokṣa--_mokṣa saṃsāra--_saṃsāra prāpakau_prāpaka jānan_jñā kaścid_kaścit api_api yogī_yogin na_na muhyati_muh sukha--_sukha buddhyā_buddhi svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi phalam_phala na_na kāmayate_kāmay kintu_kiṃtu parameśvara--_parameśvara niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa anyat_anya 27_27

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana gateḥ_gati upāsya--_upās tvāya_tva tad--_tad vijñānam_vijñāna stauti_stu na_na ete_etad iti_iti ete_etad sṛtī_sṛti mārgau_mārga he_he pārtha_pārtha jana_jana krama--_krama mokṣāya_mokṣa ekā_eka punar_punar saṃsārāya_saṃsāra aparā_apara iti_iti niścinvan_niści yogī_yogin dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭha na_na muhyati_muh kevalam_kevala karma_karman dhūma--_dhūma ādi--_ādi mārga--_mārga prāpakam_prāpaka kartavya--_kṛ tvena_tva na_na pratyeti_pratī tasmāt_tasmāt yoga--_yoga stha--_stha apunar_apunar āvṛtti--_āvṛtti phalatvāt_phalatva sarveṣu_sarva kāleṣu_kāla yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj samāhita--_samāhita cittaḥ_citta bhava_bhū apunar_apunar āvṛttaye_āvṛtti he_he arjuna_arjuna 27_27
stauti_stu bhava_bhū

baladevaḥ_baladeva etayoḥ_etad pathoḥ_pathin bodhaḥ_bodha viveka--_viveka hetuḥ_hetu bhavati_bhū iti_iti tam_tad stauti_stu na_na ete_etad iti_iti sṛtī_sṛti panthānaḥ_pathin jānan_jñā arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi mokṣāya_mokṣa dhūma--_dhūma ādiḥ_ādi saṃsārāya_saṃsāra iti_iti smaran_smṛ kaścid_kaścit api_api yogī_yogin mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta na_na muhyati_muh dhūma--_dhūma ādi--_ādi karma_karman kartavya--_kṛ tvena_tva na_na niścinoti_niści iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj samādhi--_samādhi niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā bhava_bhū apunar_apunar āvṛttaye_āvṛtti 27_27
BhG 8.28

lg.l: vedeṣu_veda yajñeṣu_yajña tapaḥsu_tapas ca_ca eva_eva
dāneṣu_dāna yat_yad puṇya--_puṇya phalam_phala
atyeti_atī tat_tad sarvam_sarva idam_idam viditvā_vid
yogī_yogin param_para sthānam_sthāna upaiti_upe ca_ca ādyam_ādya

div.p:
upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ vedeṣu_veda adhyayana--_adhyayana ādibhḥ_ādi yajñeṣu_yajña anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna ādibhiḥ_ādi tapaḥsu_tapas kāya--_kāya śoṣaṇa--_śoṣaṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi dāneṣu_dāna sat--_sat pātre_pātra arpaṇa--_arpaṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi yat_yad puṇya--_puṇya phalam_phala upadiṣṭam_upadiś śāstreṣu_śāstra tat_tad sarvam_sarva atyeti_atī tatas_tatas api_api śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha yoga--_yoga aiśvaryam_aiśvarya prāpnoti_prāp kim_ka kṛtvā_kṛ idam_idam aṣṭa--_aṣṭan praśna--_praśna artha--_artha nirṇayena_nirṇaya uktam_vac tattvam_tattva viditvā_vid tatas_tatas ca_ca yogī_yogin jñānī_jñānin bhūtvā_bhū param_para utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa ādyam_ādya jagat_jagant mūla--_mūla bhūtam_bhū sthānam_sthāna viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu paramam_parama
padam_pada prāpnoti_prāp

lg.l: aṣṭame_aṣṭama aṣṭa--_aṣṭan viśiṣṭe_viśiṣ aṣṭa--_aṣṭan saṃpṛṣṭa--_sampracch artha--_artha vinirṇayaiḥ_vinirṇaya
akliṣṭam_akliṣṭa iṣṭa--_iṣ dhāma--_dhāman āptiḥ_āpti spaṣṭita--_spaṣṭita utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa vartmanā_vartman

div.p:
iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī
tāraka--_tāraka brahma--_brahman yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma aṣṭamaḥ_aṣṭama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana punar_punar śraddhā--_śraddhā anu_anu vṛddhi--_vṛddhi artham_artha yogam_yoga stauti_stu vedeṣu_veda iti_iti vedeṣu_veda darbha--_darbha pavitra--_pavitra pāṇi--_pāṇi tva--_tva prāc--_prāñc mukha--_mukha tva--_tva guru--_guru adhīna--_adhīna tva--_tva ādibhiḥ_ādi samyak_samyak adhīteṣu_adhī yajñeṣu_yajña aṅga--_aṅga upāṅga--_upāṅga sāhityena_sāhitya śraddhayā_śraddhā samyak_samyak anuṣṭhiteṣu_anuṣṭhā tapaḥsu_tapas śāstra--_śāstra ukteṣu_vac manaḥ--_manas buddhi--_buddhi ādi--_ādi aikāgryeṇa_aikāgrya śraddhayā_śraddhā su_su tapteṣu_tap dāneṣu_dāna tulā--_tulā puruṣa--_puruṣa ādiṣu_ādi deśe_deśa kāle_kāla pātre_pātra ca_ca śraddhayā_śraddhā samyak_samyak dattesu_dā yat_yad puṇya--_puṇya phalam_phala puṇyasya_puṇya dharmasya_dharma phalam_phala svarga--_svarga svārājya--_svārājya ādi_ādi pradiṣṭam_pradiś śāstreṇa_śāstra atyeti_atī atikrāmati_atikram tat_tad sarvam_sarva idam_idam pūrvokta--_pūrvokta sapta--_saptan praśna--_praśna nirūpaṇa--_nirūpaṇa dvāreṇa_dvāra uktam_vac viditvā_vid samyak_samyak anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna prayantam_pre avadhārya_avadhāray anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā ca_ca yogī_yogin dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭha na_na kevalam_kevalam tat_tad atikrāmati_atikram param_para sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa aiśvaram_aiśvara sthānam_sthāna ādyam_ādya sarva--_sarva kāraṇam_kāraṇa upaiti_upe ca_ca pratipadyate_pratipad ca_ca sarva--_sarva kāraṇam_kāraṇa brahma_brahman eva_eva prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad anena_idam adhyāyena_adhyāya dhyeya--_dhyā tvena_tva tad--_tad padārthaḥ_padārtha vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā 28_28
div.l: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍha--_guh artha--_artha dīpikāyām_dīpikā adhikāri--_adhikārin bhedena_bheda akṣara--_akṣara para--_para
div.p: āha_ah atyeti_atī prāpnoti_prāp

lg.l: bhaktānām_bhakta sarvatas_sarvatas śraiṣṭhyam_śraiṣṭhya pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac teṣu_tad api_api sphuṭam_sphuṭa
an_an anya--_anya bhaktasya_bhaj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra adhyāye_adhyāya vyañjitaḥ_vyañjay abhavat_bhū
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha varṣiṇyām_varṣin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
śrī--_śrī gītāsu_gītā asṭamaḥ_asṭama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p:
baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah vedeṣu_veda brahmacarya--_brahmacarya guru--_guru śuśrūṣaṇa--_śuśrūṣaṇa ādi--_ādi vidhinā_vidhi samyak_samyak adhīteṣu_adhī sarva--_sarva aṅgoaa--_aṅgoaa saṃhāreṇa_saṃhāra samyak_samyak anuṣṭhiteṣu_anuṣṭhā tapaḥsu_tapas śāstra--_śāstra uktena_vac vidhinā_vidhi samyak_samyak cariteṣu_car dāneṣu_dāna deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla pātra--_pātra parīkṣayā_parīkṣā śraddhayā_śraddhā ca_ca samyak_samyak datteṣu_dā yat_yad puṇya--_puṇya phalam_phala svarga--_svarga rājya--_rājya ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa pradiṣṭam_pradiś uktam_vac tat_tad sarvam_sarva abhyeti_abhī atikramati_atikram kim_ka kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah idam_idam iti_iti idam_idam adhyāya--_adhyāya dvaya--_dvaya uktam_vac bhagavataḥ_bhagavant mama_mad mad--_mad bhakteḥ_bhakti ca_ca māhātmyam_māhātmya sat--_sat prasaṅgena_prasaṅga viditvā_vid tad--_tad vedana--_vedana sukha--_sukha atiriktam_atiric tat_tad sarvam_sarva tṛṇāya_tṛṇa manyate_man iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatas_tatas
yogī_yogin mad--_mad bhaktimān_bhaktimat bhūtvā_bhū ādyam_ādya anādi--_anādi parama--_parama māyikam_māyika mad--_mad sthānam_sthāna upaiti_upe
iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya aṣṭamaḥ_aṣṭama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
Bhagavadgita 9
BhG 9.1

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
idam_idam tu_tu te_tvad guhyatamam_guhyatama pravakṣyāmi_pravac anasūyave_anasūyu
jñānam_jñāna vijñāna--_vijñāna sahitam_sahita yat_yad jñātvā_jñā mokṣyase_muc aśubhāt_aśubha
pareśaḥ_pareśa prāpyate_prāp śuddha--_śuddha bhaktyā_bhakti iti_iti sthitam_sthā aṣṭame_aṣṭama
navame_navama tu_tu tat_tad aiśvaryam_aiśvarya ati_ati āścaryam_āścarya prapañcyate_prapañcay

div.p: evam_evam tāvat_tāvat saptama--_saptama aṣṭamayoḥ_aṣṭama svīyam_svīya pārameśvaram_pārameśvara tattvam_tattva bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva sulabham_sulabha na_na anyathā_anyathā iti_iti uktvā_vac idānīm_idānīm acintyam_acintya svakīyam_svakīya aiśvaryam_aiśvarya bhakteḥ_bhakti ca_ca asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac idam_idam iti_iti viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa jñāyate_jñā anena_idam iti_iti vijñānam_vijñāna upāsanam_upāsana tad--_tad sahitam_sahita jñānam_jñāna īśvara--_īśvara viṣayam_viṣaya idam_idam tu_tu anusūyave_anusūyu punar_punar punar_punar sva--_sva māhātmyam_māhātmya eva_eva upadiśati_upadiś iti_iti evam_evam parama--_parama kāruṇike_kāruṇika mayi_mad doṣa--_doṣa dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi rahitāya_rahita tubhyam_tvad vakṣyāmi_vac tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda vaiśiṣṭye_vaiśiṣṭya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya mūrdhani_mūrdhan anāḍī--_anāḍī dvārakeṇa_dvāraka hṛdaya--_hṛdaya kaṇṭha--_kaṇṭha bhrū--_bhrū madhya--_madhya ādi--_ādi dhāraṇā--_dhāraṇā sahitena_sahita sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya dvāra--_dvāra saṃyama--_saṃyama guṇakena_guṇaka yogena_yoga sva--_sva icchayā_icchā utkrānta--_utkram prāṇasya_prāṇa arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi tatra_tatra ca_ca anena_idam eva_eva prakāreṇa_prakāra muktiḥ_mukti labhyate_labh na_na anayathā_anayathā iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk ananya--_ananya cetāḥ_cetas satatam_satatam yaḥ_yad mām_mad smarati_smṛ nityaśas_nityaśas tasya_tad aham_mad sulabhaḥ_sulabha iti_iti ādinā_ādi bhagavat--_bhagavant tattva--_tattva vijñānāt_vijñāna sākṣāt_sākṣāt mokṣa--_mokṣa prāptiḥ_prāpti abhihitā_abhidhā tatra_tatra ca_ca ananyā_ananya bhaktiḥ_bhakti asādhāraṇaḥ_asādhāraṇa hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti uktam_vac puruṣaḥ_puruṣa sa_tad paraḥ_para pārtha_pārtha bhaktyā_bhakti labhyaḥ_labh tu_tu ananyayā_ananya iti_iti tatra_tatra pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac yoga--_yoga dhāraṇā--_dhāraṇā pūrva--_pūrva prāṇa--_prāṇa utkramaṇa--_utkramaṇa arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi mārga--_mārga gamana--_gamana kāla--_kāla vilamba--_vilamba ādi--_ādi kleśam_kleśa antareṇa_antareṇa eva_eva sākṣāt_sākṣāt mokṣa--_mokṣa prāptaye_prāpti bhagavat--_bhagavant tattvasya_tattva tad--_tad bhakteḥ_bhakti ca_ca vistareṇa_vistara jñāpanāya_jñāpana aṣṭame_aṣṭama dhyeya--_dhyā brahma--_brahman nirūpaṇena_nirūpaṇa tad--_tad dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhasya_niṣṭha gatiḥ_gati uktā_vac navame_navama tu_tu jñeya--_jñā brahma--_brahman nirūpaṇena_nirūpaṇa jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhasya_niṣṭha gatiḥ_gati ucyate_vac iti_iti saṅkṣepaḥ_saṃkṣepa tatra_tatra vakṣyamāṇa--_vac jñāna--_jñāna stuti--_stuti arthāḥ_artha trīn_tri ślokān_śloka

idam_idam prāk_prāk bahudhā_bahudhā uktam_vac agre_agra ca_ca vakṣyamāṇam_vac adhunā_adhunā ucyamānam_vac jñānam_jñāna śabda--_śabda pramāṇakam_pramāṇaka brahma--_brahman tattva--_tattva viṣayakam_viṣayaka te_tvad tubhyam_tvad pravakṣyāmi_pravac tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya uktāt_vac dhyānāt_dhyāna jñānasya_jñāna vailakṣaṇyam_vailakṣaṇya āha_ah idam_idam eva_eva samyak_samyak jñānam_jñāna sākṣāt_sākṣāt mokṣa--_mokṣa prāpti--_prāpti sādhanam_sādhana na_na tu_tu dhyānam_dhyāna tasya_tad ajñāna--_ajñāna anivartaka--_anivartaka tvāt_tva tat_tad tu_tu antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi dvārā_dvār idam_idam eva_eva jñānam_jñāna sampādya_sampāday krameṇa_krameṇa mokṣam_mokṣa janayati_janay iti_iti uktam_vac

kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa jñānam_jñāna guhyatamam_guhyatama gopanīyatamam_gopanīyatama ati_ati rahasya--_rahasya tvāt_tva yatas_yatas vijñāna--_vijñāna sahitam_sahita brahma_brahman anubhava--_anubhava paryantam_paryanta īdṛśam_īdṛśa ati_ati rahasyam_rahasya api_api aham_mad śiṣya--_śiṣya guṇa--_guṇa ādhikyāt_ādhikya vakṣyāmi_vac tubhyam_tvad anasūyave_anasūyu sarvadā_sarvadā ayam_idam ātma--_ātman aiśvarya--_aiśvarya khyāpanena_khyāpana ātmānam_ātman praśaṃsati_praśaṃs mad--_mad purastāt_purastāt iti_iti evaṃ_evam rūpā_rūpa tad--_tad rahitāya_rahita anena_idam ārjuava--_ārjuava saṃyamau_saṃyama api_api śiṣya--_śiṣya guṇau_guṇa vyākhyātau_vyākhyā punar_punar kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa jñānam_jñāna yat_yad jñātvā_jñā prāpya_prāp mokṣyase_muc sadyas_sadyas eva_eva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bandhanāt_bandhana aśubhāt_aśubha sarva--_sarva duḥkha--_duḥkha hetoḥ_hetu

lg.l: ārādhya--_ārādhay tve_tva prabhoḥ_prabhu dāsaiḥ_dāsa aiśvaryam_aiśvarya yat_yad apekṣitam_apekṣ
tat_tad śuddha--_śuddha bhakteḥ_bhakti utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa ca_ca ucyate_vac navame_navama sphuṭam_sphuṭa

div.p: karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga ādibhyaḥ_ādi sakāśāt_sakāśāt bhakteḥ_bhakti eve_eva utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa sā_tad ca_ca bhaktiḥ_bhakti pradhānībhūtā_pradhānībhū kevalā_kevala ca_ca iti_iti saptama--_saptama aṣṭamayoḥ_aṣṭama uktam_vac tatra_tatra api_api kevalāyāḥ_kevala ati_ati prabalāyāḥ_prabala jñāna--_jñāna vat_vat antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi ādi--_ādi anapekṣinyāḥ_anapekṣin bhakteḥ_bhakti spaṣṭa--_paś tayā_tā eva_eva sarva--_sarva utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa tasyām_tad apekṣitam_apekṣ aiśvaryam_aiśvarya ca_ca vaktum_vac navamaḥ_navama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya ārabhyate_ārabh sarva--_sarva śāstra--_śāstra sāra--_sāra bhūtasya_bhū gītā--_gītā śāstrasya_śāstra api_api madhyam_madhya adhyāya--_adhyāya ṣaṭkam_ṣaṭka eva_eva sāram_sāra tasya_tad api_api madhyamau_madhyama navama--_navama daśamau_daśama eva_eva sārau_sāra iti_iti atas_atas atra_atra nirūpayiṣyamāṇam_nirūpay artham_artha stauti_stu idam_idam tu_tu iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri

dvitīya--_dvitīya tṛtīya--_tṛtīya adhyāya--_adhyāya ādiṣu_ādi yat_yad uktam_vac mokṣa--_mokṣa upayogi--_upayogin jñānam_jñāna guhyam_guhya saptama--_saptama aṣṭamayoḥ_aṣṭama mad--_mad prāpti--_prāpti upayogi--_upayogin jñānam_jñāna jñāyate_jñā anena_idam bhagavat--_bhagavant tattvam_tattva iti_iti jñānam_jñāna bhakti--_bhakti tattvam_tattva guhyataram_guhyatara atra_atra tu_tu kevala--_kevala śuddha--_śuddha bhakti--_bhakti lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa jñānam_jñāna guhyatamam_guhyatama prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa eva_eva tubhyam_tvad vakṣyāmi_vac atra_atra tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna śabdena_śabda bhaktiḥ_bhakti avaśyam_avaśyam vyākhyeyā_vyākhyā na_na tu_tu prathama--_prathama ṣaṭka--_ṣaṭka uktam_vac prasiddham_prasidh jñānam_jñāna na_na tu_tu jñānam_jñāna tasya_tad sāttvika--_sāttvika tvāt_tva aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna puruṣāḥ_puruṣa dharmasya_dharma asya_idam iti_iti agrima--_agrima śloke_śloka dharma--_dharma śabdena_śabda api_api bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva ucyate_vac anasūyave_anasūyu a_a matsarāya_matsara iti_iti anyaḥ_anya api_api idam_idam amatsarāya_amatsara eva_eva upadiśet_upadiś iti_iti vidhiḥ_vidhi vyañjitaḥ_vyañjay vijñāna--_vijñāna sahitam_sahita mad--_mad aparokṣa--_aparokṣa anubhava--_anubhava paryantam_paryanta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha aśubhāt_aśubha saṃsārāt_saṃsāra bhakti--_bhakti pratibandhakāt_pratibandhaka antarāyāt_antarāya vā_vā
baladevaḥ_baladeva

lg.l: bhakti--_bhakti uddīpti--_uddīpti karam_kara svasya_sva pāramaiśvaryam_pāramaiśvarya adbhutam_adbhuta
sva--_sva bhakteḥ_bhakti ca_ca mahā--_mahat utkarṣam_utkarṣa navame_navama hariḥ_hari ūcivān_vac

div.p: vijñāna--_vijñāna ānanda--_ānanda ghanaḥ_ghana asaṅkhyeya--_asaṃkhyeya kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa ratna--_ratna ālayaḥ_ālaya sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara aham_mad śuddha--_śuddha bhakti--_bhakti sulabhaḥ_sulabha iti_iti saptama--_saptama ādibhyām_ādi abhidhāya_abhidhā idānīm_idānīm bhakteḥ_bhakti uddīpakam_uddīpaka nija--_nija aiśvaryam_aiśvarya tasyāḥ_tad ādau_ādi tām_tad stauti_stu idam_idam jñānam_jñāna mad--_mad kīrtana--_kīrtana ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa bhakti--_bhakti rūpam_rūpa paratra_paratra dharmasya_dharma asya_idam iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti kīrtana--_kīrtana ādeḥ_ādi cit--_cit śakti--_śakti vṛtti--_vṛtti tvāt_tva jñāyate_jñā anena_idam iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti ca_ca tat_tad kila_kila guhyatamam_guhyatama tat_tad ca_ca vijñāna--_vijñāna sahitam_sahita mad--_mad anubhava--_anubhava avasānam_avasāna te_tvad vakṣyāmi_vac kīdṛśāya_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah anasūyave_anasūyu iti_iti mad--_mad guṇeṣu_guṇa doṣa--_doṣa āropa--_āropa rahitāya_rahita durgamasya_durgama sva--_sva rahasyasya_rahasya anukampayā_anukampā upadeṣṭari_upadeṣṭṛ mayi_mad nija--_nija aiśvarya--_aiśvarya prakhyāpanena_prakhyāpana ātmānam_ātman praśaṃsasi_praśaṃs iti_iti doṣa--_doṣa dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi śūnyāya_śūnya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tena_tena anyaḥ_anya api_api etat_etad anasūyam_anasūya prati_prati brūyāt_brū iti_iti darśitam_darśay yat_yad jñātvā_jñā tvam_tvad aśubhāt_aśubha saṃsārāt_saṃsāra mokṣyase_muc
BhG 9.2

lg.l: rāja--_rājan vidyā_vidyā rāja--_rājan guhyam_guhya pavitram_pavitra idam_idam uttamam_uttama
pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa avagamam_avagama dharmyam_dharmya su_su sukham_sukha kartum_kṛ avyayam_avyaya

div.p: idam_idam jñānam_jñāna rāja--_rājan vidyā_vidyā vidyānām_vidyā rājā_rājan rāja--_rājan guhyam_guhya guhyānām_guhya ca_ca rājā_rājan vidyāsu_vidyā gopyeṣu_gup ca_ca ati_ati rahasyam_rahasya śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha rāja--_rājan danta--_danta ādi--_ādi tvāt_tva upasarjanasya_upasarjana para--_para tvam_tva rājñām_rājan vidyā_vidyā rājñām_rājan guhyam_guhya iti_iti vā_vā uttamam_uttama pavitram_pavitra idam_idam atyanta--_atyanta pāvanam_pāvana jñāninām_jñānin pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa avagamam_avagama ca_ca pratyakṣaḥ_pratyakṣa spaṣṭaḥ_spaṣṭa avagamaḥ_avagama avabodhaḥ_avabodha yasya_yad tat_tad pratyakṣāvagamam_pratyakṣāvagama dṛṣṭa--_dṛś phalam_phala iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dharmyam_dharmya dharmāt_dharma an_an apetam_ape veda--_veda ukta--_vac sarva--_sarva dharma--_dharma phalatvāt_phalatva kartum_kṛ ca_ca su_su sukham_sukha kartum_kṛ śakyam_śakya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha avyayam_avyaya ca_ca akṣaya--_akṣaya phala--_phala tvāt_tva

stauti_stu rāja--_rājan vidyā_vidyā sarvāsām_sarva vidyānām_vidyā rājā_rājan sarva--_sarva avidyā--_avidyā anāśaka--_anāśaka tvāt_tva vidyā--_vidyā antarasya_antara avidyā--_avidyā eka--_eka deśa--_deśa virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva tathā_tathā rāja--_rājan guhyam_guhya sarveṣām_sarva guhyānām_guhya rājā_rājan aneka--_aneka janma--_janman kṛta--_kṛ sukṛta--_sukṛta sādhya--_sādhay tvena_tva bahubhiḥ_bahu ajñāta--_ajñāta tvāt_tva rāja--_rājan danta--_danta ādi--_ādi tvāt_tva upasarjanasya_upasarjana para--_para nipātaḥ_nipāta pavitram_pavitra idam_idam uttamam_uttama prāyaścittaiḥ_prāyaścitta hi_hi kiṃcid_kaścit ekam_eka eva_eva pāpam_pāpa nivartyate_nivartay nivṛttam_nivṛt ca_ca tat_tad sva--_sva kāraṇe_kāraṇa sūkṣma--_sūkṣma rūpeṇa_rūpa tiṣṭhati_sthā eva_eva yatas_yatas punar_punar tat_tad pāpam_pāpa upacinoti_upaci puruṣaḥ_puruṣa idam_idam tu_tu aneka--_aneka janma--_janman sahasra--_sahasra sañcitānām_saṃci sarveṣām_sarva api_api pāpānām_pāpa sthūla--_sthūla sūkṣma--_sūkṣma avasthānām_avasthā tad--_tad kāraṇasya_kāraṇa ca_ca ajñānasya_ajñāna ca_ca sadyas_sadyas eva_eva ucchedakam_ucchedaka atas_atas sarva--_sarva uttamam_uttama pāvanam_pāvana idam_idam eva_eva

na_na ca_ca atīndriye_atīndriya dharme_dharma iva_iva atra_atra kasyacid_kaścit sandehaḥ_saṃdeha svarūpataḥ_svarūpa phalataḥ_phala ca_ca pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa tāt_tā iti_iti āha_ah pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa avagamam_avagama avagamyate_avagam nena_na iti_iti avagamaḥ_avagama mānam_māna avagamyate_avagam prāpyate_prāp iti_iti avagamaḥ_avagama phalam_phala pratyakṣa_pratyakṣa mayā_mad idam_idam atas_atas naṣṭam_naś idānīm_idānīm atra_atra mama_mad ajñānam_ajñāna iti_iti hi_hi sārvalaukikaḥ_sārvalaukika sākṣī_sākṣin anubhavaḥ_anubhava

evam_evam loka--_loka anubhava--_anubhava siddha--_sidh tve_tva api_api tat_tad jñānam_jñāna dharmyam_dharmya dharmāt_dharma an_an apetam_ape aneka--_aneka janma--_janman saṃcita--_saṃci niṣkāma--_niṣkāma dharma--_dharma phalam_phala tarhi_tarhi duḥsampādam_duḥsampāda syāt_as na_na iti_iti āha_ah su_su sukham_sukha kartum_kṛ guru--_guru upadarśita--_upadarśay vicāra--_vicāra sahakṛtena_sahakṛta vedānta--_vedānta vākyena_vākya sukhena_sukha kartum_kṛ śakyam_śakya na_na deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla ādi--_ādi vyavadhānam_vyavadhāna apekṣate_apekṣ pramāṇa--_pramāṇa vastu--_vastu paratantra--_paratantra tvāt_tva jñānasya_jñāna evam_evam anāyāsa--_anāyāsa sādhya--_sādhay tve_tva su_su alpa--_alpa phala--_phala tvam_tva syāt_as atyāyāsa--_atyāyāsa sādhyānām_sādhay eva_eva karmaṇām_karman mahā--_mahat phala--_phala tva--_tva darśanāt_darśana iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah avyayam_avyaya evam_evam anāyāsa--_anāyāsa sādhyasya_sādhay api_api asya_idam phalataḥ_phala na_na asti_as iti_iti avyayam_avyaya akṣaya--_akṣaya phalam_phala iti_iti arthaḥ_artha karmaṇā_karman tu_tu ati_ati mahatām_mahat api_api kṣayi--_kṣayin phala--_phala tvam_tva eva_eva yaḥ_yad vai_vai etat_etad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī a_a viditvā_vid asmin_idam loke_loka juhoti_hu yajate_yaj tapaḥ_tapas tapyate_tap bahūni_bahu varṣa--_varṣa sahasrāṇi_sahasra antavat_antavat eva_eva asya_idam tat_tad bhavati_bhū iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tasmāt_tasmāt sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tvāt_tva śraddheyam_śraddhā eva_eva ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kim_ka ca_ca idam_idam jñānam_jñāna rāja--_rājan vidyā_vidyā vidyā_vidyā upāsanāḥ_upāsana vividhāḥ_vividha eva_eva bhaktayaḥ_bhakti tāsām_tad rājā_rājan rāja--_rājan danta--_danta ādi--_ādi tvāt_tva para--_para nipātaḥ_nipāta guhyānām_guhya rājā_rājan iti_iti bhakti--_bhakti mātram_mātra eva_eva ati_ati guhyam_guhya tasya_tad bahuvidhasya_bahuvidha api_api rājā_rājan iti_iti ati_ati guhyatamam_guhyatama pavitram_pavitra idam_idam iti_iti sarva--_sarva pāpa--_pāpa prāyaścitta--_prāyaścitta tvāt_tva tvam_tvad ca_ca sakāśāt_sakāśa api_api pāvitrya--_pāvitrya karam_kara aneka--_aneka janma--_janman sahasra--_sahasra sañcitānām_saṃci sarveṣām_sarva api_api pāpānām_pāpa sthūla--_sthūla sūkṣma--_sūkṣma avasthānām_avasthā tad--_tad kāraṇasya_kāraṇa ca_ca ajñānasya_ajñāna ca_ca sadyas_sadyas eva_eva ucchedakam_ucchedaka sarva--_sarva uttamam_uttama pāvanam_pāvana idam_idam madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda pratyakṣaḥ_pratyakṣa eva_eva avagamaḥ_avagama anubhavaḥ_anubhava yasya_yad tat_tad

lg.l: anyatra_anyatra ca_ca eṣa_etad trikaḥ_trika eka--_eka kālaḥ_kāla
prapadyamānasya_prapad yathā_yathā aśnataḥ_aś syuḥ_as
tuṣṭiḥ_tuṣṭi puṣṭiḥ_puṣṭi kṣudh--_kṣudh apāyaḥ_apāya anu_anu ghāsam_ghāsa

div.p: iti_iti pratipadam_pratipad eva_eva bhajana--_bhajana anurūpa--_anurūpa bhagavat--_bhagavant anubhava--_anubhava lābhāt_lābha dharmyam_dharmya dharmāt_dharma an_an apetam_ape sarva--_sarva dharma--_dharma akaraṇe_akaraṇa api_api sarva--_sarva dharma--_dharma siddheḥ_siddhi

yathā_yathā taroḥ_taru mūla--_mūla niṣecanena_niṣecana tṛpyanti_tṛp tad--_tad skandha--_skandha bhuja--_bhuja upaśākhāḥ_upaśākhā prāṇa--_prāṇa upahārāt_upahāra ca_ca yathā_yathā indriyāṇām_indriya
tathā_tathā eva_eva sarva--_sarva arhaṇam_arhaṇa acyuta--_acyuta ijyā_ijyā iti_iti nāradokteḥ_nāradokti

kartum_kṛ su_su sukham_sukha iti_iti karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna ādau_ādi iva_iva na_na atra_atra kaḥ_ka api_api kāra--_kāra vāc--_vāc mānasa--_mānasa kleśa--_kleśa atiśayaḥ_atiśaya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana ādi--_ādi bhakteḥ_bhakti śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra mātra--_mātra tvāt_tva avyayam_avyaya karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi vat_vat na_na

baladevaḥ_baladeva rāja--_rājan vidyā_vidyā iti_iti vidyānām_vidyā śāṇḍilya--_śāṇḍilya vaiśvānara--_vaiśvānara dahara--_dahara ādi--_ādi śabda--_śabda pūrvāṇām_pūrva rājā_rājan rāja--_rājan vidyā_vidyā guhyānām_guhya jīvātma--_jīvātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya ādi--_ādi rahasyānām_rahasya rājā_rājan rāja--_rājan guhyam_guhya idam_idam bhakti--_bhakti rūpam_rūpa jñānam_jñāna rāja--_rājan danta--_danta ādi--_ādi tvāt_tva upasarjanasya_upasarjana para--_para nipātaḥ_nipāta tathātve_tathātva pratipādayitum_pratipāday viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ uttamam_uttama pavitram_pavitra liṅga--_liṅga deha--_deha paryanta--_paryanta sarva--_sarva pāpa--_pāpa praśamanāt_praśamana yat_yad uktam_vac pādme_pādma
a_a prārabdha--_prārabh phalam_phala pāpam_pāpa kūṭam_kūṭa bījam_bīja phala--_phala unmukham_unmukha krameṇa_krameṇa eva_eva pralīyante_pralī viṣṇu--_viṣṇu bhakti--_bhakti rata--_ram ātmanām_ātman

kramaḥ_krama atra_atra parṇa--_parṇa śataka--_śataka vedha--_vedha vat_vat bodhyaḥ_budh pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa avagamam_avagama avagamyate_avagam iti_iti avagamaḥ_avagama viṣayaḥ_viṣaya sa_tad yasmin_yad pratyakṣe_pratyakṣa asti_as śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādike_ādika abhyastyamāne_abhyas tasmin_tad tad--_tad viṣayaḥ_viṣaya puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama aham_mad āvirbhavāmi_āvirbhū evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra prakāśaḥ_prakāśa ca_ca karmaṇi_karman abhyāsāt_abhyāsa iti_iti dharmyam_dharmya dharmāt_dharma an_an apetam_ape guru--_guru śuśrūṣā--_śuśrūṣā ādi--_ādi dharmaiḥ_dharma nityam_nityam puṣyamāṇam_puṣ śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca ācāryavān_ācāryavat puruṣaḥ_puruṣa veda_vid iti_iti ādyā_ādya

kartum_kṛ su_su sukham_sukha sukha--_sukha sādhyam_sādhay śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi vyāpāra--_vyāpāra mātra--_mātra tvāt_tva tulasī--_tulasī pātra--_pātra ambu--_ambu culuka--_culuka mātra--_mātra upakaraṇa--_upakaraṇa tvāt_tva ca_ca avyayam_avyaya avināśi_avināśin mokṣe_mokṣa api_api tasya_tad anuvṛtteḥ_anuvṛtti evam_evam vakṣyati_vac bhaktyā_bhakti mām_mad abhijānāti_abhijñā iti_iti ādinā_ādi karma--_karman yoga--_yoga ādikam_ādika tu_tu nā_na īdṛśam_īdṛśa atas_atas asya_idam rāja--_rājan vidyā--_vidyā tvam_tva tatra_tatra āhuḥ_ah rājñām_rājan vidyā_vidyā rājñām_rājan guhyam_guhya iti_iti rājñām_rājan iva_iva udāra--_udāra cetasām_cetas kāruṇikānām_kāruṇika iva_iva divam_div api_api tucchīkurvatām_tucchīkṛ iyaḥ_iyas vidyā_vidyā na_na tu_tu śīghram_śīghram putra--_putra ādi--_ādi lipsayā_lipsā devān_deva abhyarcatām_abhyarc dīna--_dīna cetasām_cetas karmiṇām_karmin rājānaḥ_rājan hi_hi mahā--_mahat ratna--_ratna ādi--_ādi sampad_sampad api_api a_a nihnuvānāḥ_nihnu sva--_sva mantram_mantra yathā_yathā atiyatnāt_atiyatna nihnūyate_nihnu tathā_tathā anyām_anya vidyām_vidyā a_a nihnuvānāḥ_nihnu mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta etām_etad atiyatnāt_atiyatna nihnuvīran_nihnu iti_iti samānam_samāna anyat_anya
BhG 9.3

lg.l: aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna puruṣāḥ_puruṣa dharmasya_dharma asya_idam paraṃtapa_paraṃtapa
a_a prāpya_prāp mām_mad nivartante_nivṛt mṛtyu--_mṛtyu saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vartmani_vartman

div.p: syuḥ_as tatra_tatra āha_ah aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna iti_iti asya_idam bhakti--_bhakti sahita--_sahita jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa dharmasya_dharma iti_iti karmaṇi_karman ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī imam_idam dharmam_dharma aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna āstikyena_āstikya asvīkurvantaḥ_asvīkṛ upāya--_upāya antaraiḥ_antara mad--_mad prāptaye_prāpti kṛta--_kṛ prayatnāḥ_prayatna api_api mām_mad a_a prāpya_prāp mṛtyu--_mṛtyu yukte_yuj saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vartmani_vartman nimitte_nimitta nivartante_nivṛt mṛtyu--_mṛtyu vyāpte_vyāp saṃsāra--_saṃsāra mārge_mārga paribhramanti_paribhram iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam asya_idam sukara--_sukara tve_tva sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tve_tva ca_ca sarve_sarva api_api kutas_kutas atra_atra na_na pravartante_pravṛt tathā_tathā ca_ca na_na kaḥ_ka api_api saṃsārī_saṃsārin syāt_as iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna iti_iti asya_idam ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna ākhyasya_ākhyā dharmasya_dharma svarūpe_svarūpa sādhane_sādhana phale_phala ca_ca śāstra--_śāstra pratipādite_pratipāday api_api aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna veda--_veda virodhi--_virodhin kuhetu--_kuhetu darśana--_darśana dūṣita--_dūṣay antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa tayā_tā prāmāṇyam_prāmāṇya a_a manyamānāḥ_man pāpa--_pāpa kāriṇaḥ_kārin sva--_sva mati--_mati kalpitena_kalpay upāyena_upāya kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid yatamānāḥ_yat api_api śāstra--_śāstra vihita--_vidhā upāya--_upāya abhāvāt_abhāva a_a prāpya_prāp mām_mad mad--_mad prāpti--_prāpti sādhanam_sādhana api_api a_a labdhvā_labh nivartante_nivṛt niścayena_niścaya vartante_vṛt kva_kva mṛtyu--_mṛtyu yukte_yuj saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vartmani_vartman sarvadā_sarvadā janana--_janana maraṇa--_maraṇa prabandhena_prabandha nāraki--_nārakin tiryak--_tiryañc ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni eva_eva bhramanti_bhram iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

syāt_as tatra_tatra āha_ah aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna iti_iti asya_idam iti_iti karmaṇi_karman ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī ārṣī_ārṣa imam_idam dharmam_dharma aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna śāstra--_śāstra vākyaiḥ_vākya pratipāditam_pratipāday bhakteḥ_bhakti sarva--_sarva utkarṣam_utkarṣa stuti--_stuti artha--_artha vādam_vāda eva_eva manyamānāḥ_man āstikyena_āstikya na_na svīkurvanti_svīkṛ ye_yad te_tad upāya--_upāya antaraiḥ_antara mad--_mad prāptaye_prāpti kṛta--_kṛ prayatnāḥ_prayatna api_api mām_mad saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vartmani_vartman atiśayena_atiśaya vartante_vṛt

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu evam_evam sukare_sukara dharme_dharma sthite_sthā na_na kaḥ_ka api_api saṃsāret_saṃsṛ iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna iti_iti dharmasya_dharma iti_iti karmaṇi_karman ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī imam_idam mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa dharmam_dharma śruti--_śruti ādi--_ādi prasiddha--_prasidh prabhāvam_prabhāva api_api aśraddadhānāḥ_aśraddadhāna dṛḍha--_dṛḍha viśvāsena_viśvāsa tam_tad agṛhṇataḥ_agṛhṇat stuti--_stuti mātram_mātra eva_eva etat_etad iti_iti ye_yad manyante_man te_tad mad--_mad prāptaye_prāpti sādhana--_sādhana antarāṇi_antara prāpya_prāp mṛtyu--_mṛtyu yukte_yuj saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vartmani_vartman vartante_vṛt
BhG 9.4

lg.l: mayā_mad tatam_tan idam_idam sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant avyakta--_avyakta mūrtinā_mūrti
mad--_mad sthāni_stha sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta na_na ca_ca aham_mad teṣu_tad avasthitaḥ_avasthā

div.p: kathayati_kathay avyaktā_avyakta atīndriyā_atīndriya mūrtiḥ_mūrti svarūpam_svarūpa yasya_yad tādṛśena_tādṛśa mayā_mad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtena_bhū sarvam_sarva idam_idam jagat_jagant tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp tat_tad sṛṣṭvā_sṛj tat_tad eva_eva anuprāviśat_anupraviś iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti ataeva_ataeva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūte_bhū mayi_mad tiṣṭhanti_sthā iti_iti mad--_mad sthāni_stha sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta carācarāṇi_carācara evam_evam api_api ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādiṣu_ādi kāryeṣu_kārya mṛttikā_mṛttikā iva_iva teṣu_tad bhūteṣu_bhūta na_na aham_mad avasthitaḥ_avasthā ākāśa--_ākāśa vat_vat a_a saṅga--_saṅga tvāt_tva

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam vaktavyatayā_vaktavyatā pratijñātasya_pratijñā jñānasya_jñāna vidhi--_vidhi mukhena_mukha itara--_itara niṣedha--_niṣedha mukhena_mukha ca_ca stutya_stu abhimukhīkṛtam_abhimukhīkṛ arjunam_arjuna prati_prati tat_tad eva_eva āha_ah dvābhyām_dvi mayā_mad iti_iti idam_idam jagat_jagant sarvam_sarva bhūta--_bhūta bhautika--_bhautika tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa rūpam_rūpa dṛśya--_dṛś jātam_jan mad--_mad ajñāna--_ajñāna kalpitam_kalpay māyā--_māyā adhiṣṭhānena_adhiṣṭhāna paramārtha--_paramārtha satā_as sat--_as rūpeṇa_rūpa sphuraṇa--_sphuraṇa rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp rajju--_rajju khaṇḍena_khaṇḍa tvayā_tvad vāsudevena_vāsudeva paricchinnena_paricchid sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant katham_katham vyāptam_vyāp pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa virodhāt_virodha iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah avyaktā_avyakta sarva--_sarva karaṇa--_karaṇa a_a gocarībhūtā_gocarībhū sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa advaya--_advaya caitanya--_caitanya sat--_as ānanda--_ānanda rūpā_rūpa mūrtiḥ_mūrti yasya_yad tena_tad mayā_mad dehena_deha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atas_atas eva_eva santi_as iva_iva sphuranti_sphur iva_iva mad--_mad rūpeṇa_rūpa sthitāni_sthā mad--_mad sthāni_stha sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta sthāvarāṇi_sthāvara jaṅgamāni_jaṅgama ca_ca paramārthataḥ_paramārtha tu_tu na_na ca_ca nā_na eva_eva aham_mad teṣu_tad kalpiteṣu_kalpay bhūtesu_bhūti avasthitaḥ_avasthā kalpita--_kalpay a_a kalpitayoḥ_kalpay sambandha--_sambandha ayogāt_ayoga ataeva_ataeva uktam_vac yatra_yatra yat_yad adhyastam_adhyas tad--_tad kṛtena_kṛ guṇena_guṇa doṣeṇa_doṣa vā_vā aṇu--_aṇu mātreṇa_mātra api_api na_na sa_tad sambadhyate_sambandh iti_iti

āha_ah avyaktā_avyakta atīndriyā_atīndriya mūrtiḥ_mūrti svarūpam_svarūpa yasya_yad tena_tad mayā_mad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtena_bhū sarvam_sarva idam_idam jagat_jagant tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp ataeva_ataeva mad--_mad sthāni_stha mayi_mad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūte_bhū pūrṇa--_pṛ caitanya--_caitanya svarūpe_svarūpa sthitāni_sthā sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta carācarāṇi_carācara santi_as evam_evam api_api ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādiṣu_ādi sva--_sva kāryeṣu_kārya mṛga--_mṛga ādi--_ādi vat_vat teṣu_tad bhūteṣu_bhūta na_na aham_mad avasthitaḥ_avasthā asaṅga--_asaṅga tvāt_tva

baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah avyaktā_avyakta indriya--_indriya agrāhyā_agrāhya mūrtiḥ_mūrti svarūpam_svarūpa yasya_yad tena_tad mayā_mad sarvam_sarva idam_idam jagat_jagant tatam_tan dhartum_dhṛ niyantum_niyam ca_ca vyāptam_vyāp ataeva_ataeva sarvāṇi_sarva carācarāṇi_carācara bhūtāni_bhūta vyāpake_vyāpaka dhārake_dhāraka niyāmake_niyāmaka ca_ca mayi_mad sthitāni_sthā bhavanti_bhū iti_iti teṣām_tad sthitiḥ_sthiti tad--_tad adhīnā_adhīna na_na iti_iti arthaḥ_artha iha_iha nikhila--_nikhila jagat--_jagant antaryāmiṇā_antaryāmin sva--_sva aṃśena_aṃśa antar_antar praviśya_praviś niyacchāmi_niyam dadhāmi_dhā ca_ca iti_iti uktam_vac āha_ah ca_ca evam_evam śrutiḥ_śruti yaḥ_yad pṛthivyām_pṛthivī tiṣṭhat_sthā iti_iti ādinā_ādi iha_iha api_api vakṣyati_vac viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh aham_mad idam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna iti_iti ādi_ādi
BhG 9.5

lg.l: na_na ca_ca mad--_mad sthāni_stha bhūtāni_bhūta paśya_paś me_mad yogam_yoga aiśvaram_aiśvara
bhūta--_bhūta bhṛt_bhṛt na_na ca_ca bhūta--_bhūta sthaḥ_stha mama_mad ātmā_ātman bhūta--_bhūta bhāvanaḥ_bhāvana

div.p: na_na ca_ca mayi_mad sthitāni_sthā bhūtāni_bhūta a_a saṅga--_saṅga tvāt_tva eva_eva mama_mad nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi vyāpaka--_vyāpaka tvam_tva āśraya--_āśraya tvam_tva ca_ca pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac viruddham_virudh iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah paśya_paś iti_iti me_mad mama_mad aiśvaryam_aiśvarya asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa yogam_yoga yuktim_yukti aghaṭana--_aghaṭana ghaṭanā--_ghaṭanā cāturyam_cāturya paśya_paś madīya--_madīya yoga--_yoga māyā--_māyā vaibhavasya_vaibhava āvis_āvis tarkya--_tarkay tvāt_tva na_na kiñcid_kaścit viruddham_virudh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha anyat_anya api_api āścaryam_āścarya paśya_paś iti_iti āha_ah bhūta--_bhūta iti_iti bhūtāni_bhūta bibharti_bhṛ dhārayati_dhāray iti_iti bhūta--_bhūta bhṛt_bhṛt bhūtāni_bhūta bhāvayati_bhāvay pālayati_pālay bhūta--_bhūta bhāvanaḥ_bhāvana evam_evam bhūtaḥ_bhū api_api mama_mad ātmā_ātman param_para svarūpam_svarūpa bhūta--_bhūta sthaḥ_stha na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva -_yathā deham_deha bibhrat_bhṛ pālayan_pālay ca_ca jīvaḥ_jīva ahaṅkāreṇa_ahaṃkāra tad--_tad saṃśliṣṭaḥ_saṃśliṣ tiṣṭhati_sthā evam_evam aham_mad bhūtāni_bhūta dhārayan_dhāray pālayan_pālay api_api teṣu_tad na_na tiṣṭhāmi_sthā nirahaṅkāra--_nirahaṃkāra tvāt_tva iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ataeva_ataeva na_na ca_ca iti_iti diviṣṭhe_diviṣṭha iva_iva āditye_āditya kalpitāni_kalpay jala--_jala calana--_calana ādīni_ādi mayi_mad kalpitāni_kalpay bhūtāni_bhūta paramārthataḥ_paramārtha mayi_mad na_na santi_as tvam_tvad arjunaḥ_arjuna prākṛtīm_prākṛta manuṣya--_manuṣya buddhim_buddhi hitvā_hā paśya_paś paryālocaya_paryālocay me_mad yogam_yoga prabhāvam_prabhāva aiśvaram_aiśvara aghaṭana--_aghaṭana ghaṭanā--_ghaṭana cāturyam_cāturya māyāvinaḥ_māyāvin iva_iva mama_mad avalokaya_avalokay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na aham_mad kasyacid_kaścit ādheyaḥ_ādhā na_na api_api kasyacid_kaścit ādhāraḥ_ādhāra tathā_tathā api_api aham_mad sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta mayi_mad ca_ca sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti mahatī_mahat iyam_idam māyā_māyā yatas_yatas bhūtāni_bhūta sarvāṇi_sarva kāryāṇi_kārya upādāna--_upādāna tayā_tā bibharti_bhṛ dhārayati_dhāray poṣayati_poṣay iti_iti ca_ca bhūta--_bhūta bhṛt_bhṛt bhūtāni_bhūta sarvāṇi_sarva kartṛtayā_kartṛtā utpādayati_utpāday iti_iti bhūta--_bhūta bhāvanaḥ_bhāvana evam_evam abhinna--_abhinna nimitta--_nimitta upādāna--_upādāna bhūtaḥ_bhū api_api mama_mad ātmā_ātman mama_mad sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghanaḥ_ghana asaṅga--_asaṅga advitīya--_advitīya svarūpa--_svarūpa tvāt_tva ca_ca bhūta--_bhūta sthaḥ_stha paramārthataḥ_paramārtha na_na bhūta--_bhūta sambandhī_sambandhin svapna--_svapna dṛś_dṛś iva_iva na_na paramārthataḥ_paramārtha sva--_sva kalpita--_kalpay sambandhi_sambandhin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mama_mad ātmā_ātman iti_iti rāhoḥ_rāhu śiraḥ_śiras iti_iti vat_vat kalpanayā_kalpanā ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ---_tatas eva_eva mayi_mad sthitāni_sthā api_api bhūtāni_bhūta na_na mad--_mad sthāni_stha mama_mad asaṅga--_asaṅga tvāt_tva eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi tava_tvad jagat--_jagant vyāpaka--_vyāpaka tvam_tva jagat--_jagant āśraya--_āśraya tvam_tva ca_ca pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac viruddham_virudh iti_iti āha_ah paśya_paś me_mad yogam_yoga aiśvaram_aiśvara asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa yoga--_yoga aiśvaryam_aiśvarya aghaṭita--_aghaṭita ghaṭanā--_ghaṭanā cāturya--_cāturya mayam_maya anyat_anya api_api āścaryam_āścarya paśya_paś iti_iti āha_ah bhūtāni_bhūta bibharti_bhṛ dhārayati_dhāray iti_iti bhūta--_bhūta bhṛt_bhṛt bhūtāni_bhūta bhāvayati_bhāvay pālayati_pālay bhūta--_bhūta bhāvanaḥ_bhāvana evam_evam bhūtaḥ_bhū api_api mama_mad ātmā_ātman bhūta--_bhūta sthaḥ_stha na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti mama_mad iti_iti bhagavati_bhagavant deha--_deha dehi--_dehin vibhāga--_vibhāga abhāvāt_abhāva rāhoḥ_rāhu śiraḥ_śiras iti_iti vat_vat abhede_abheda api_api ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva -_yathā jīvaḥ_jīva deham_deha dadhat_dhā pālayan_pālay api_api tasmin_tad āsaktyā_āsakti deha--_deha sthaḥ_stha eva_eva bhavati_bhū evam_evam aham_mad bhūtāni_bhūta dadhat_dhā pālayan_pālay api_api māyika--_māyika sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta śarīraḥ_śarīra api_api
na_na tatrasthaḥ_tatrastha niḥsaṅga--_niḥsaṅga tvāt_tva iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu ati_ati gurum_guru bhāram_bhāra vahataḥ_vah te_tvad mahān_mahat khedaḥ_kheda syāt_as iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na ca_ca iti_iti ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādau_ādi udaka--_udaka ādīni_ādi iva_iva bhāra--_bhāra bhūtāni_bhū ca_ca bhūtāni_bhū saṃsṛṣṭāni_saṃsṛj mayi_mad na_na santi_as tarhi_tarhi mad--_mad sthāni_stha saarva--_saarva bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti ukti--_ukti mayi_mad na_na santi_as tarhi_tarhi mad--_mad sthāni_stha sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti uktiḥ_ukti viruddhā_virudh ita_i iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra ha_ha paśya_paś iti_iti mama_mad aiśvaram_aiśvara mad--_mad asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa yogam_yoga paśya_paś jānīhi_jñā yujyate_yuj anena_idam durghaṭeṣu_durghaṭa kāryeṣu_kārya iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti yogaḥ_yoga avicintya--_avicintya śakti--_śakti vapuḥ_vapus satya--_satya saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa tā--_tā lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa dharamaḥ_dharama tam_tad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etat_etad eva_eva visphuṭayati_visphuṭay bhūta--_bhūta bhṛt_bhṛt iti_iti bhūta--_bhūta bhṛt_bhṛt bhūtānām_bhūta dhārakaḥ_dhāraka pālakaḥ_pālaka ca_ca aham_mad bhūta--_bhūta sthaḥ_stha bhūta--_bhūta saṃpṛktaḥ_sampṛc na_na eva_eva bhavāmi_bhū yatas_yatas mām_mad ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas eva_eva bhūta--_bhūta bhāvanaḥ_bhāvana satya--_satya saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa tā--_tā lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa aiśvareṇa_aiśvara yogena_yoga eva_eva aham_mad bhūtānām_bhūta dhāraṇam_dhāraṇa pālanam_pālana ca_ca karomi_kṛ na_na tu_tu sva--_sva mūrti--_mūrti vyāpāreṇa_vyāpāra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah etasya_etad vai_vai akṣarasya_akṣara praśāsane_praśāsana gārgi_gārgī sūryācandram_sūryācandra asau_adas vidhṛtau_vidhṛti tiṣṭhataḥ_sthā etasya_etad vai_vai akṣarasya_akṣara praśāsane_praśāsana gārgi_gārgī dyau_div āpṛthivyau_āpṛthivya vidhṛte_vidhṛ tiṣṭhataḥ_sthā iti_iti ādinā_ādi yadi_yadi api_api svarūpāt_svarūpa na_na manaḥ_manas bhinnam_bhid tathā_tathā api_api sattā_sattā satī_as iti_iti ādi--_ādi vat_vat viśeṣāt_viśeṣāt vāstavam_vāstava bheda--_bheda kāryam_kārya ādāya_ādā eva_eva tathā_tathā uktam_vac bodhyam_budh
BhG 9.6

lg.l: yathā_yathā ākāśa--_ākāśa sthitaḥ_sthā nityam_nityam vāyuḥ_vāyu sarvatra_sarvatra gaḥ_ga mahān_mahat
tathā_tathā sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta mad--_mad sthāni_stha iti_iti upadhāraya_upadhāray

div.p: āha_ah avakāśam_avakāśa vinā_vinā avasthāna--_avasthāna anupapatteḥ_anupapatti nityam_nityam ākāśe_ākāśa sthitaḥ_sthā vāyuḥ_vāyu sarvatra_sarvatra gaḥ_ga api_api mahān_mahat api_api na_na ākāśena_ākāśa saṃśliṣyate_saṃśliṣ niravayava--_niravayava tvena_tva saṃśleṣa--_saṃśleṣa ayogāt_ayoga tathā_tathā sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta mayi_mad sthitāni_sthā iti_iti jānīhi_jñā

āha_ah yathā_yathā eva_eva asaṅga--_asaṅga svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva ākāśe_ākāśa sthitaḥ_sthā nityam_nityam sarvadā_sarvadā utpatti--_utpatti sthiti--_sthiti saṃhāra--_saṃhāra kāleṣu_kāla vāti_vā iti_iti vāyuḥ_vāyu sarvadā_sarvadā calana--_calana svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva ataeva_ataeva sarvatra_sarvatra gacchati_gam iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra gaḥ_ga mahān_mahat parimāṇataḥ_parimāṇa etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa api_api na_na na_na kadāpi_kadāpi ākāśena_ākāśa saha_saha saṃsṛjyate_saṃsṛj tathā_tathā eva_eva asaṅga--_asaṅga svabhāve_svabhāva mayi_mad saṃśleṣam_saṃśleṣa antareṇa_antareṇa eva_eva sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta ākāśa--_ākāśa ādīni_ādi mahānti_mahat sarvatragāni_sarvatraga ca_ca sthitāni_sthā na_na api_api sthitāni_sthā iti_iti upadhāraya_upadhāray vimṛśya_vimṛś avadhāraya_avadhāray

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha asaṅge_asaṅga mayi_mad bhūtāni_bhūta sthitāni_sthā api_api na_na sthitāni_sthā teṣu_tad api_api aham_mad sthitaḥ_sthā api_api na_na sthitaḥ_sthā iti_iti atra_atra dṛṣṭāntam_dṛṣṭānta āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti yathā_yathā eva_eva asaṅga--_asaṅga svabhāve_svabhāva ākāśe_ākāśa nityam_nityam vāti_vā iti_iti vāyuḥ_vāyu sarvadā_sarvadā calana--_calana svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva ataeva_ataeva sarvatra_sarvatra gacchati_gam iti_iti sarvatrago_sarvatragu mahān_mahat parimāṇataḥ_parimāṇa yathā_yathā su_su ākāśasya_ākāśa asaṅga--_asaṅga tvāt_tva tatra_tatra sthitaḥ_sthā api_api na_na sthitaḥ_sthā ākāśaḥ_ākāśa api_api vāyau_vāyu sthitaḥ_sthā api_api na_na sthitaḥ_sthā asaṅga--_asaṅga tvāt_tva eva_eva tathā_tathā eva_eva asaṅga--_asaṅga svabhāve_svabhāva mayi_mad sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta ākāśa--_ākāśa ādīni_ādi mahānti_mahat sarvatragāni_sarvatraga sthitāni_sthā na_na api_api sthitāni_sthā iti_iti upadhāraya_upadhāray vimṛśya_vimṛś niścinu_niści nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi paśya_paś me_mad yogam_yoga aiśvaram_aiśvara iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant uktam_vac yoga--_yoga aiśvaryasya_aiśvarya atarkya--_atarkya tvam_tva katham_katham siddham_sidh abhūt_bhū dṛṣṭānta--_dṛṣṭānta lābhāt_lābha ucyate_vac -_ākāśa jaḍa--_jaḍa tvāt_tva eva_eva asaṅga--_asaṅga tvam_tva cetanasya_cetana tu_tu asaṅga--_asaṅga tvam_tva jagat--_jagant adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ tve_tva parameśvaram_parameśvara vinā_vinā na_na anyatra_anyatra asti_as iti_iti atarkya--_atarkya tvam_tva siddham_sidh eva_eva tat_tad api_api ākāśa--_ākāśa dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta loka--_loka buddhi--_buddhi praveśa--_praveśa arthaḥ_artha eva_eva jñeyaḥ_jñā

baladevaḥ_baladeva cara--_cara acarāṇām_acara sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta mad--_mad saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa āyattā_āyat sthitiḥ_sthiti vṛttiḥ_vṛtti ca_ca iti_iti atra_atra dṛṣṭāntam_dṛṣṭānta āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti yathā_yathā nirālambe_nirālamba mahati_mahat ākāśe_ākāśa nirālambaḥ_nirālamba mahān_mahat vāyuḥ_vāyu sthitaḥ_sthā sarvatra_sarvatra gacchati_gam tasya_tad tasya_tad ca_ca nirālamba--_nirālamba tayā_tā sthitiḥ_sthiti mad--_mad saṅkalpāt_saṃkalpa eva_eva pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti ca_ca iti_iti antaryāmi--_antaryāmin brāhmaṇāt_brāhmaṇa yat_yat bhīṣā_bhīṣā vātaḥ_vāta pavate_pū iti_iti śruti--_śruti antarāt_antara ca_ca upadhāraya_upadhāray iti_iti tathā_tathā sarvāṇi_sarva sthira--_sthira carāṇi_cara bhūtāni_bhūta sthitāni_sthā mayā_mad eva_eva saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa mātreṇa_mātra dhṛtāni_dhṛ nitya--_nitya mitāni_mā ca_ca iti_iti upadhāraya_upadhāray anyathā_anyathā ākāśa--_ākāśa ādīni_ādi vibhraṃśeran_vibhraṃś iti_iti
BhG 9.7

lg.l: sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta kaunteya_kaunteya prakṛtim_prakṛti yānti_yā māmikām_māmaka
kalpa--_kalpa kṣaye_kṣaya punar_punar tāni_tad kalpa--_kalpa ādau_ādi visṛjāmi_visṛj aham_mad

div.p: tayā_tad eva_eva sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi prayala--_prayala hetutvam_hetutva ca_ca āha_ah sarva--_sarva iti_iti kalpa--_kalpa kṣaye_kṣaya pralaya--_pralaya kāle_kāla sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta prakṛtim_prakṛti yānti_yā triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmikāyām_ātmaka māyāyām_māyā līyante_lī kalpa--_kalpa ādau_ādi sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi kāle_kāla tāni_tad visṛjāmi_visṛj sṛjāmi_sṛj

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam utpatti--_utpatti kāle_kāla sthiti--_sthiti kāle_kāla ca_ca kalpitena_kalpay prapañcena_prapañca asaṅgasya_asaṅga ātmanaḥ_ātman asaṃśleṣam_asaṃśleṣa uktvā_vac pralaye_pralaya api_api tam_tad āha_ah sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta kalpa--_kalpa kṣaye_kṣaya pralaya--_pralaya kāle_kāla māmikām_māmaka mad--_mad śakti--_śakti tvena_tva kalpitām_kalpay prakṛtim_prakṛti triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmikām_ātmaka māyām_māyā sva--_sva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtām_bhū yānti_yā tatra_tatra eva_eva sūkṣma--_sūkṣma rūpeṇa_rūpa līyante_lī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha he_he kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti ukta--_vac artham_artha punar_punar tāni_tad kalpa--_kalpa ādau_ādi sarga--_sarga kāle_kāla visṛjāmi_visṛj prakṛtau_prakṛti avibhāga--_avibhāga āpannāni_āpad vyanajmi_vyañj aham_mad sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña sarva--_sarva śaktiḥ_śakti īśvaraḥ_īśvara

avagamyate_avagam mahā--_mahat pralaye_pralaya kva_kva yāsyanti_yā iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah sarvā_sarva iti_iti māmikām_māmaka madīyām_madīya mama_mad triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmikāyām_ātmaka māyā--_māyā śaktau_śakti līyante_lī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha punar_punar kalpa--_kalpa kṣaye_kṣaya pralaya--_pralaya ante_anta sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi kāle_kāla tāni_tad viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa sṛjāmi_sṛj

baladevaḥ_baladeva sva--_sva saṅkalpāt_saṃkalpa eva_eva bhūtānām_bhūta sthitiḥ_sthiti uktā_vac atha_atha tasmāt_tad eva_eva teṣām_tad sarga--_sarga pralayau_pralaya āha_ah sarva--_sarva iti_iti he_he kaunteya_kaunteya kalpa--_kalpa kṣaye_kṣaya caturmukha--_caturmukha avasāna--_avasāna kāle_kāla sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta mad--_mad saṅkalpāt_saṃkalpa eva_eva māmikām_māmaka prakṛtim_prakṛti prakṛti--_prakṛti śaktike_śaktika mayi_mad vilīyante_vilī kalpa--_kalpa ādau_ādi punar_punar tāni_tad aham_mad eva_eva bahu_bahu syām_as iti_iti saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa mātreṇa_mātra vaividhyena_vaividhya sṛjāmi_sṛj
BhG 9.8

lg.l: prakṛtim_prakṛti svām_sva avaṣṭabhya_avaṣṭambh visṛjāmi_visṛj punar_punar punar_punar
bhūta--_bhūta grāmam_grāma imam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna avaśam_avaśa prakṛteḥ_prakṛti vaśāt_vaśa

div.p: sṛjasi_sṛj āha_ah svām_sva svīyām_svīya svādhīnām_svādhīna prakṛtim_prakṛti avaṣṭabhya_avaṣṭambh adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā pralaye_pralaya līnam_lī santam_as caturvidham_caturvidha imam_idam sarvam_sarva bhūta--_bhūta grāmam_grāma karma--_karman ādi--_ādi paravaśam_paravaśa punar_punar punar_punar vividham_vividha sṛjāmi_sṛj sṛjāmi_sṛj katham_katham prakṛteḥ_prakṛti vaśāt_vaśa prācīna--_prācīna karma--_karman nimitta--_nimitta tad--_tad tad--_tad svabhāva--_svabhāva vaśāt_vaśa

na_na api_api anyaḥ_anya bhoktā_bhoktṛ yat_yad arthā_artha iyam_idam sṛṣṭiḥ_sṛṣṭi cetanā--_cetanā antara--_antara abhāvāt_abhāva īśvarasya_īśvara eva_eva sarvatra_sarvatra jīva--_jīva rūpeṇa_rūpa sthita--_sthā tvāt_tva acetanasya_acetana ca_ca abhoktṛ--_abhoktṛ tvāt_tva ataeva_ataeva na_na apavarga--_apavarga arthā_artha api_api sṛṣṭiḥ_sṛṣṭi bandha--_bandha abhāvāt_abhāva apavarga--_apavarga virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva ca_ca iti_iti ādi--_ādi anupapattiḥ_anupapatti sṛṣṭeḥ_sṛṣṭi māyā--_māyā maya--_maya tvam_tva sādhayantī_sādhay na_na asmākam_mad pratikūlā_pratikūla iti_iti na_na parihartavyā_parihṛ iti_iti abhipretya_abhipre māyā--_māyā maya--_maya tvāt_tva mithyātvam_mithyātva prapañcasya_prapañca vaktum_vac
div.l: prakṛtim_prakṛti māyā--_māyā ākhyām_ākhyā anirvacanīyām_anirvacanīya svām_sva svasmin_sva kalpitām_kalpay avaṣṭabhya_avaṣṭambh sva--_sva sattā--_sattā sphūrtibhyām_sphūrti dṛḍhīkṛtya_dṛḍhīkṛ tasyāḥ_tad prakṛteḥ_prakṛti māyāyāḥ_māyā vaśāt_vaśa avidyā--_avidyā asmitā--_asmitā rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa sarva--_sarva pramāṇa--_pramāṇa saṃnidhāpitam_saṃnidhāpay bhūta--_bhūta grāmam_grāma ākāśa--_ākāśa ādi--_ādi bhūta--_bhūta samudāyam_samudāya aham_mad māyāvī_māyāvin iva_iva punar_punar punar_punar visṛjāmi_visṛj vividham_vividha sṛjāmi_sṛj kalpanā--_kalpanā mātreṇa_mātra svapna--_svapna dṛś_dṛś iva_iva ca_ca svapna--_svapna prapañcam_prapañca
div.p: sṛjasi_sṛj āha_ah svām_sva svīyām_svīya avaṣṭabhya_avaṣṭambh adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā prakṛteḥ_prakṛti vaśāt_vaśa svīya--_svīya svabhāva--_svabhāva vaśāt_vaśa prācīna--_prācīna karma--_karman nimittāt_nimitta iti_iti yāvat_yāvat avaśam_avaśa karma--_karman ādi--_ādi paratantram_paratantra

baladevaḥ_baladeva prakṛtim_prakṛti iti_iti svām_sva ātmīyām_ātmīya tri--_tri guṇām_guṇa prakṛtim_prakṛti avaṣṭabhya_avaṣṭambh adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa mātreṇa_mātra mahat--_mahant ādyān_ādya manā_manā pariṇamayya_pariṇamay imam_idam caturvidham_caturvidha bhūta--_bhūta grāmam_grāma visṛjāmi_visṛj punar_punar punar_punar kāle_kāla kāle_kāla kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah prakṛteḥ_prakṛti prācīna--_prācīna karma--_karman vāsanāyāḥ_vāsanā vaśāt_vaśa prabhāvāt_prabhāva avaśam_avaśa paratantram_paratantra tathā_tathā ca_ca acintya--_acintya śakteḥ_śakti asaṅga--_asaṅga svabhāvasya_svabhāva mama_mad saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa mātreṇa_mātra tat_tad tat_tad kurvataḥ_kṛ na_na tad--_tad saṃsarga--_saṃsarga
BhG 9.9

lg.l: na_na ca_ca mām_mad tāni_tad karmāṇi_karman nibadhnanti_nibandh dhanaṃjaya_dhanaṃjaya
udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat āsīnam_ās asaktam_asakta teṣu_tad karmasu_karman

div.p: syāt_as āha_ah tāni_tad viśva--_viśva sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman mām_mad na_na nibadhnanti_nibandh karma--_karman āsaktiḥ_āsakti hi_hi baddha--_bandh hetuḥ_hetu sā_tad ca_ca āpta--_āp kāma--_kāma tvāt_tva mama_mad nā_na asti_as atas_atas udāsīna--_udāsīna tva--_tva anupapatteḥ_anupapatti udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat sthitam_sthā iti_iti uktam_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana atas_atas na_na ca_ca iti_iti na_na ca_ca nā_na eva_eva sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi sthiti--_sthiti pralaya--_pralaya ākhyāni_ākhyā tāni_tad māyāvinā_māyāvin iva_iva svapna--_svapna dṛśā_dṛś iva_iva ca_ca mayā_mad kriyamāṇāni_kṛ mām_mad nibandhnanti_nibandh anugraha--_anugraha nigrahābhyām_nigraha na_na sukṛta--_sukṛta duṣkṛta--_duṣkṛta bhāginam_bhāgin kurvanti_kṛ mithyā_mithyā bhūta--_bhū tvāt_tva he_he dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira rājasūya--_rājasūya artham_artha sarvān_sarva rājñaḥ_rājan jitvā_ji dhanam_dhana āhṛtavān_āhṛ iti_iti mahān_mahat prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva sūcitaḥ_sūcay protsāhana--_protsāhana artham_artha

tāni_tad karmāṇi_karman kutas_kutas na_na badhnanti_bandh tatra_tatra āha_ah udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat āsīnam_ās yathā_yathā kaścid_kaścit upekṣakaḥ_upekṣaka dvayoḥ_dvi vivadamānayoḥ_vivad jaya--_jaya parājaya--_parājaya asaṃsargī_asaṃsargin tad--_tad kṛta--_kṛ harṣa--_harṣa viṣādābhyām_viṣāda asaṃsṛṣṭaḥ_asaṃsṛṣṭa nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra āste_ās tadvat_tadvat nirvikāra--_nirvikāra tayā_tā āsīnam_ās dvayoḥ_dvi vivadamānayoḥ_vivad iha_iha abhāvāt_abhāva upekṣaka--_upekṣaka tva--_tva mātra--_mātra sādharmyeṇa_sādharmya vati--_vati pratyayaḥ_pratyaya ataeva_ataeva nirvikāra--_nirvikāra tvāt_tva teṣu_tad sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi karmasu_karman asaktam_asakta aham_mad karomi_kṛ iti_iti abhimāna--_abhimāna lakṣeṇa_lakṣa saṅgena_saṅga rahitam_rahita mām_mad na_na karmāṇi_karman iti_iti yuktam_yuj eva_eva anyasya_anya api_api hi_hi kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhāve_abhāva phala--_phala saṅga--_saṅga abhāve_abhāva ca_ca karmāṇi_karman na_na bandha--_bandha kāraṇāni_kāraṇa iti_iti uktam_vac anena_idam tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya sattve_sattva tu_tu kośa--_kośa kāraḥ_kāra iva_iva karmabhiḥ_karman badhyate_bandh mūḍhaḥ_muh iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

syāt_as āha_ah tāni_tad sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādīni_ādi karma--_karman āsaktiḥ_āsakti hi_hi baddha--_bandh hetuḥ_hetu sā_tad ca_ca āpta--_āp kāma--_kāma tvāt_tva mama_mad nā_na asti_as udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat iti_iti anyaḥ_anya udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna yathā_yathā vivadamānānām_vivad duḥkha--_duḥkha śoka--_śoka ādi--_ādi saṃsṛṣṭaḥ_saṃsṛj na_na bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā eva_eva aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva --nanu_nanu viṣamāṇi_viṣama sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi poālana--_poālana lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya ādinā_ādi tvām_tvad badhnīyuḥ_bandh iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na ca_ca iti_iti tāni_tad viṣama--_viṣama sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman na_na mayi_mad vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya ādi_ādi prasañjayanti_prasañjay tatra_tatra hetu--_hetu garbha--_garbha viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat iti_iti jīvānām_jīva deva--_deva mānava--_mānava tiryak--_tiryañc ādi--_ādi bhāve_bhāva tad--_tad tad--_tad abhyudaya--_abhyudaya tāratamye_tāratamya ca_ca teṣām_tad pūrva--_pūrva arjitāni_arjay karmāṇi_karman eva_eva kāraṇāni_kāraṇa aham_mad tu_tu teṣu_tad viṣameṣu_viṣama karmasu_karman audāīnyena_audāīnya sthitaḥ_sthā asaktaḥ_asakta iti_iti na_na mayi_mad vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya ādi--_ādi doṣa--_doṣa gandhaḥ_gandha evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya nairghṛṇye_nairghṛṇya na_na iti_iti ādinā_ādi udāsīna--_udāsīna tve_tva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na siddhyet_sidh atas_atas uktam_vac udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat iti_iti
BhG 9.10

lg.l: mayā_mad adhyakṣeṇa_adhyakṣa prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti sūyate_sū sa_sa carācaram_carācara
hetunā_hetu anena_idam kaunteya_kaunteya jagat_jagant viparivartate_viparivṛt

div.p: mayā_mad adhyakṣeṇa_adhyakṣa adhiṣṭhātrā_adhiṣṭhātṛ nimitta--_nimitta bhūtena_bhū prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti sa_sa carācaram_carācara viśvam_viśva sūyate_sū janayati_janay anena_idam mad--_mad adhiṣṭhānena_adhiṣṭhāna hetunā_hetu idam_idam jagat_jagant viparivartate_viparivṛt punar_punar punar_punar jāyate_jan sannidhi--_saṃnidhi mātreṇa_mātra adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ tvāt_tva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva udāsīna--_udāsīna tvam_tva ca_ca aviruddham_aviruddha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhūta--_bhūta grāmam_grāma imam_idam visṛjāmi_visṛj udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat āsīnam_ās iti_iti ca_ca paraspara--_paraspara viruddham_virudh iti_iti śaṅkā--_śaṅkā parihāra--_parihāra artham_artha punar_punar māyā--_māyā maya--_maya tvam_tva eva_eva prakaṭayati_prakaṭay mayā_mad iti_iti mayā_mad sarvatas_sarvatas dṛśi--_dṛśi mātra--_mātra svarūpeṇa_svarūpa avikriyeṇa_avikriya adhyakṣeṇa_adhyakṣa niyantrā_niyantṛ bhāsakena_bhāsaka avabhāsitā_avabhāsay prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmikā_ātmaka sattva--_sattva asattva--_asattva ādibhiḥ_ādi anirvācyā_anirvācya māyā_māyā sūyate_sū utpādayati_utpāday sa_sa carācaram_carācara jagat_jagant kalpita--_kalpay gaja--_gaja turaga--_turaga ādikam_ādika na_na tu_tu aham_mad sva--_sva kārya--_kārya māyā--_māyā bhāsanam_bhāsana antareṇa_antareṇa karomi_kṛ vyāpāra--_vyāpāra antaram_antara hetunā_hetu nimittena_nimitta anena_idam adhyakṣa--_adhyakṣa tvena_tva he_he kaunteya_kaunteya jagat_jagant sa_sa carācaram_carācara viparivartate_viparivṛt vividham_vividha parivartate_parivṛt janma--_janman ādi--_ādi vināśa--_vināśa antam_anta diti--_diti ādeḥ_ādi iva_iva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat āsīnam_ās iti_iti uktam_vac iti_iti na_na tat_tad uktam_vac
asya_idam dvaita--_dvaita indra--_indra jālasya_jāla yat_yad upādāna--_upādāna kāraṇam_kāraṇa ajñānam_ajñāna tat_tad upāśritya_upāśri brahma_brahman kāraṇam_kāraṇa ucyate_vac iti_iti
div.l: śruti--_śruti smṛti--_smṛti vādāḥ_vāda ca_ca atra_atra arthe_artha sahasraśas_sahasraśas udāhāryāḥ_udāhṛ
div.p:
pratyemi_pratī āha_ah adhyakṣeṇa_adhyakṣa mayā_mad nimitta--_nimitta bhūtena_bhū prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti sa_sa carācaram_carācara jagat_jagant sūyate_sū prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti eva_eva jagat_jagant janayati_janay mama_mad atra_atra adhyakṣa--_adhyakṣa tā--_tā mātram_mātra yathā_yathā kasyacid_kaścit ambarīṣa--_ambarīṣa ādeḥ_ādi iva_iva bhūpateḥ_bhūpati prakṛtibhiḥ_prakṛti eva_eva rājya--_rājya kṛtyam_kṛtya nirvāhyate_nirvāhay atra_atra udāsīnasya_udāsīna bhūpateḥ_bhūpati sattā--_sattā mātram_mātra iti_iti yathā_yathā tasya_tad rāja--_rājan siṃhāsane_siṃhāsana sattā--_sattā mātreṇa_mātra vinā_vinā prakṛtibhiḥ_prakṛti kim_ka api_api na_na śakyate_śak kartum_kṛ tathā_tathā eva_eva mama_mad adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa adhyakṣa--_adhyakṣa tvam_tva vinā_vinā prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti api_api jaḍā_jaḍa kim_ka api_api kartum_kṛ na_na śaknoti_śak iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva anena_idam mad--_mad adhiṣṭhānena_adhiṣṭhāna hetunā_hetu idam_idam jagat_jagant viparivartate_viparivṛt punar_punar punar_punar
jāyate_jan

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad pratipādayati_pratipāday mayā_mad iti_iti satya--_satya saṅkalpena_saṃkalpa prakṛti--_prakṛti adhyakṣeṇa_adhyakṣa mayā_mad sarveśvareṇa_sarveśvara jīva--_jīva pūrva--_pūrva pūrva--_pūrva karma--_karman anuguṇa--_anuguṇa tayā_tā vīkṣitā_vīkṣ prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti sa_sa carācaram_carācara jagat_jagant sūyate_sū janayati_janay viṣama--_viṣama guṇā_guṇa satī_as anena_idam jīva--_jīva pūrva--_pūrva karma--_karman anuguṇena_anuguṇa mad--_mad vīkṣaṇena_vīkṣaṇa hetunā_hetu tat_tad jagat_jagant viparivartate_viparivṛt punar_punar punar_punar udbhavati_udbhū he_he kaunteya_kaunteya śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah
vikāra--_vikāra jananīm_jananī ajñām_ajña aṣṭa--_aṣṭan rūpām_rūpa ajām_ajā dhruvām_dhruva
dhyāyate_dhyā adhyāsitā_adhyās tena_tad tanyate_tan preritā_preray punar_punar
sūyate_sū puruṣa--_puruṣa artham_artha ca_ca tena_tad eva_eva adhiṣṭhitā_adhiṣṭhā jagat_jagant

iti_iti sannidhi--_saṃnidhi mātreṇa_mātra adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ tvāt_tva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva udāsanim_udāsani ca_ca na_na viruddham_virudh yathā_yathā sannidhi--_saṃnidhi mātreṇa_mātra gandhaḥ_gandha kṣobhāya_kṣobha jāyate_jan iti_iti ādi_ādi smaraṇāt_smaraṇa ca_ca etat_etad evam_evam mad--_mad adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ mātram_mātra khalu_khalu prekṛteḥ_prekṛti apekṣyam_apekṣ mat_mad vinā_vinā kim_ka api_api kartum_kṛ na_na sā_tad prabhavet_prabhū na_na hi_hi asati_asat rājñaḥ_rājan siṃhāsana--_siṃhāsana adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ tve_tva tad--_tad amātyāḥ_amātya kārye_kārya prabhavaḥ_prabhu
BhG 9.11

lg.l: avajānanti_avajñā mām_mad mūḍhāḥ_muh mānuṣīm_mānuṣa tanum_tanu āśritam_āśri
param_para bhāvam_bhāva a_a jānantaḥ_jñā mama_mad bhūta--_bhūta maheśvaram_maheśvara

div.p: ādriyante_ādṛ āha_ah sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta maheśvara--_maheśvara rūpam_rūpa madīyam_madīya param_para bhāvam_bhāva tattvam_tattva a_a jānantaḥ_jñā mūḍhāḥ_muh mūrkhāḥ_mūrkha mām_mad avajānanti_avajñā mām_mad avamanyante_avaman avajñāne_avajñāna hetuḥ_hetu śuddha--_śuddha sattva--_sattva mayīm_maya api_api tanum_tanu bhakta--_bhakta icchā--_icchā vaśāt_vaśa manuṣya--_manuṣya ākārām_ākāra āśritavantam_āśri iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam nitya--_nitya śuddha--_śudh buddha--_budh mukta--_muc svabhāvam_svabhāva sarva--_sarva jantūnām_jantu ātmānam_ātman ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana anantam_ananta api_api santam_as avajānanti_avajñā iti_iti avajānanti_avajñā mām_mad sākṣāt_sākṣāt īśvaraḥ_īśvara ayam_idam iti_iti na_na ādriyante_ādṛ nindanti_nind vā_vā mūḍhāḥ_muh avivekinaḥ_avivekin janāḥ_jana teṣām_tad avajñā--_avajñā hetum_hetu bhramam_bhrama sūcayati_sūcay mānuṣīm_mānuṣa tanum_tanu āśritam_āśri manuṣya--_manuṣya tayā_tā pratīyamānām_pratī mūrtim_mūrti ātma--_ātman icchayā_icchā bhakta--_bhakta anugraha--_anugraha artham_artha gṛhītavantam_grah manuṣya--_manuṣya tayā_tā pratīyamānena_pratī dehena_deha vyavaharantam_vyavahṛ iti_iti yāvat_yāvat tatas_tatas ca_ca manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya ayam_idam iti_iti bhrāntyā_bhrānti ācchādita--_ācchāday antaḥkaraṇā_antaḥkaraṇa mama_mad param_para bhāvam_bhāva prakṛṣṭam_prakṛṣ tattvam_tattva sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta
īśvaram_īśvara a_a jānantaḥ_jñā yat_yat na_na ādriyante_ādṛ nindanti_nind vā_vā tat_tad anurūpam_anurūpa eva_eva mūḍha--_muh tvasya_tva

sṛjati_sṛj saḥ_tad eva_eva hi_hi bhavān_bhavat kintu_kiṃtu vasudeva--_vasudeva sūnoḥ_sūnu tava_tvad iyam_idam mānuṣī_mānuṣa tanuḥ_tanu iti_iti etad--_etad aṃśena_aṃśa eva_eva kecid_kaścit tava_tvad nikarṣam_nikarṣa vadanti_vad iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah avajānanti_avajñā iti_iti mama_mad mānuṣyāḥ_mānuṣa tanoḥ_tanu param_para bhāvam_bhāva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa arṇava--_arṇava śāyi--_śāyin mahā--_mahat puruṣa--_puruṣa ādibhyaḥ_ādi api_api utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa svarūpam_svarūpa a_a jānantaḥ_jñā eva_eva te_tad kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa bhūtam_bhū satyam_satya yat_yad brahma_brahman tat_tad ca_ca tat_tad maheśvaram_maheśvara ca_ca iti_iti tat_tad maheśvara--_maheśvara padam_pada satya--_satya antara--_antara vyāvartakam_vyāvartaka atra_atra jñeyam_jñā yukte_yuj kṣmāt_kṣmā āvṛte_āvṛ bhūtam_bhū iti_iti amaraḥ_amara

tam_tad ekam_eka govindam_govinda sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda vigraham_vigraha vṛndāvana--_vṛndāvana sura--_sura bhūruha--_bhūruha bhāvanā--_bhāvanā āsīnam_ās satatam_satatam sa_sa marut--_marut gaṇaḥ_gaṇa aham_mad paramayā_parama stutyā_stuti toṣayāmi_toṣay iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti
nara--_nara ākṛti_ākṛti para--_para brahma_brahman iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca

mama_mad asyāḥ_idam mānuṣyāḥ_mānuṣa tanvaḥ_tanu saccid--_saccid ānanda--_ānanda maya--_maya tvam_tva mad--_mad abhijṇa--_abhijṇa bhaktaiḥ_bhakta ucyate_vac eva_eva tathā_tathā sarva--_sarva brahmāṇḍa--_brahmāṇḍa vyāpi--_vyāpin tvam_tva ca_ca bālye_bālya yad--_yad mātrā_mātṛ śrī--_śrī yaśodayā_yaśodā dṛṣṭam_dṛś eva_eva yat_yat vā_vā mānuṣīm_mānuṣa tanum_tanu eva_eva viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ param_para utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa bhāvam_bhāva sattām_sattā viśuddham_viśudh sattvam_sattva saccidānanda--_saccidānanda svarūpam_svarūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhāvaḥ_bhāva sattā_sattā svabhāva--_svabhāva abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya iti_iti amaraḥ_amara param_para bhāvam_bhāva api_api viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ mama_mad bhūta--_bhūta maheśvaram_maheśvara mama_mad sṛjyāni_sṛj bhūtāni_bhūta ye_yad brahma--_brahman ādyāḥ_ādya teṣām_tad api_api mahāntam_mahat īśvaram_īśvara tasmāt_tasmāt jīvasya_jīva iva_iva mama_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara tanuḥ_tanu na_na bhinnā_bhid tanuḥ_tanu eva_eva aham_mad aham_mad eva_eva tanuḥ_tanu sākṣāt_sākṣāt brahma_brahman eva_eva śābdam_śābda brahma_brahman dadhat_dhā vapuḥ_vapus iti_iti mad--_mad abhijña--_abhijña śuka--_śuka ukteḥ_ukti iti_iti bhavādṛśaiḥ_bhavādṛśa tu_tu viśvasyatām_viśvas iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
