div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara kim_ka tarhi_tarhi yat_yad karoṣi_kṛ iti_iti svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva śāstrataḥ_śāstra vā_vā yat_yad kiñcid_kaścit karma_karman karoṣi_kṛ tathā_tathā yat_yat aśnāsi_aś juhoṣi_hu yat_yad dadāsi_dā yat_yat tapasyasi_tapasy tapaḥ_tapas karoṣi_kṛ tat_tad sarvam_sarva mayi_mad arpitam_arpay yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evam_evam kuruṣva_kṛ 27_27

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa te_tvad bhajanam_bhajana tat_tad āha_ah yat_yad karoṣi_kṛ iti_iti yat_yad karoṣi_kṛ śāstrāt_śāstra ṛte_ṛte api_api rāgāt_rāga prāptam_prāp gamana--_gamana ādi_ādi yat_yad aśnāsi_aś svayam_svayam tṛpti--_tṛpti artham_artha karma--_karman siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha vā_vā tathā_tathā yat_yat juhoṣi_hu śāstra--_śāstra balāt_bala nityam_nityam agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi--_ādi homam_homa nirvartayasi_nirvartay śrauta--_śrauta smārta--_smārta sarva--_sarva homa--_homa upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad tathā_tathā yat_yad dadāsi_dā atithi--_atithi brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādibhyaḥ_ādi anna--_anna hiraṇya--_hiraṇya ādi_ādi tathā_tathā yat_yat tapasyasi_tapasy pratisaṃvatsaram_pratisaṃvatsaram ajñāta--_ajñāta prāmādika--_prāmādika pāpa--_pāpa nivṛttaye_nivṛtti cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādi_ādi carasi_car ucchṛṅkhala--_ucchṛṅkhala pravṛtti--_pravṛtti nirāsāya_nirāsa śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya saṃghātam_saṃghāta saṃyamayasi_saṃyamay iti_iti vā_vā etat_etad ca_ca sarveṣām_sarva nitya--_nitya naimittika--_naimittika karmaṇām_karman upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa tena_tena yat_yad tava_tvad prāṇi--_prāṇin svabhāva--_svabhāva vaśāt_vaśa vinā_vinā api_api śāstram_śāstra avaśyambhāvi_avaśyambhāvin gamana--_gamana aśana--_aśana ādi_ādi yat_yad ca_ca śāstra--_śāstra vaśāt_vaśa avaśyambhāvi_avaśyambhāvin homa--_homa dāna--_dāna ādi_ādi he_he kaunteya_kaunteya tat_tad sarvam_sarva laukikam_laukika vaidikam_vaidika ca_ca karma_karman anyena_anya arpitam_arpay yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā kuruṣva_kṛ ātmanepadena_ātmanepada samarpaka--_samarpaka niṣṭham_niṣṭha eva_eva samarpaṇa--_samarpaṇa phalam_phala na_na tu_tu mayi_mad kiṃcid_kaścit iti_iti darśayati_darśay avaśyambhāvinām_avaśyambhāvin karmaṇām_karman mayi_mad parama--_parama gurau_guru samarpaṇam_samarpaṇa eva_eva mad--_mad bhajanam_bhajana na_na tu_tu tad--_tad artham_artha pṛthak_pṛthak vyāpāraḥ_vyāpāra kaścid_kaścit kartavyaḥ_kṛ iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya 27_27

karavai_kṛ sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭāyām_utkṛṣṭa kevalāyām_kevala ananya--_ananya bhaktau_bhakti na_na adhikāraḥ_adhikāra na_na api_api nikṛṣṭāyām_nikṛṣṭa sa_sa kāma--_kāma bhaktau_bhakti tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad niṣkāmām_niṣkāma karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna miśrām_miśra pradhānī--_pradhānī bhūtām_bhū eva_eva bhaktim_bhakti kuru_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah yat_yad karoṣi_kṛ iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi laukikam_laukika vaidikam_vaidika vā_vā yat_yad karma_karman tvam_tvad karoṣi_kṛ yat_yad aśnāsi_aś vyavahārataḥ_vyavahāra bhojana--_bhojana pāna--_pāna ādikam_ādika yat_yad karoṣi_kṛ tat_tad tapasyasi_tapasy tapaḥ_tapas karoṣi_kṛ tat_tad sarvam_sarva mayi_mad eva_eva āpaṇam_āpaṇa yasya_yad tat_tad yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā kuru_kṛ na_na ca_ca ayam_idam niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yyogaḥ_yyoga eva_eva na_na tu_tu bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga iti_iti vācyam_vac niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmibhiḥ_karmin śāstra--_śāstra vihitam_vidhā karma_karman eva_eva bhagavati_bhagavant arpyate_arpay na_na tu_tu vyavahārikam_vyavahārika kim_ka api_api kṛtam_kṛ tathā_tathā eva_eva sarvatra_sarvatra dṛṣṭeḥ_dṛṣṭi bhaktaiḥ_bhakta tu_tu sva--_sva ātma--_ātman manaḥ--_manas prāṇa--_prāṇa indriya--_indriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra mātram_mātra eva_eva sva--_sva iṣṭa--_iṣ deve_deva bhagavati_bhagavant arpyate_arpay yat_yad uktam_vac bhakti--_bhakti prakaraṇe_prakaraṇa eva_eva

kāyena_kāya vācā_vāc manasā_manas indriyaiḥ_indriya vā_vā buddhi--_buddhi ātmanā_ātman vā_vā anusṛta--_anusṛ svabhāvāt_svabhāva karoti_kṛ yat_yad yat_yad sakalam_sakala parasmai_para
nārāyaṇāya_nārāyaṇa iti_iti samarpayet_samarpay tam_tad

nanu_nanu ca_ca juhoṣi_hu iti_iti havanam_havana idam_idam arcana--_arcana bhakti--_bhakti aṅga--_aṅga bhūtam_bhū viṣṇu--_viṣṇu uddeśayakam_uddeśayaka eva_eva tapasyasi_tapasy iti_iti tapaḥ_tapas api_api etat_etad ekādaśī--_ekādaśī ādi--_ādi vrata--_vrata rūpam_rūpa eva_eva atas_atas iyam_idam ananyā_ananya eva_eva bhaktiḥ_bhakti kim_ka iti_iti nā_na ucyate_vac satyam_satya ananyā_ananya bhaktiḥ_bhakti hi_hi kṛtvā_kṛ api_api na_na bhagavati_bhagavant arpyate_arpay kintu_kintu bhagavati_bhagavant arpitā_arpay eva_eva jñāyate_jñā yat_yad uktam_vac śrī--_śrī prahlādena_prahlāda śravaṇam_śravaṇa kīrtanam_kīrtana viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu smaraṇam_smaraṇa iti_iti atra_atra iti_iti puṃsā_puṃs arpitā_arpay viṣṇau_viṣṇu bhaktiḥ_bhakti ced_ced nava--_navan lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa kriyeta_kṛ iti_iti asya_idam vyākhyā_vyākhyā ca_ca śrī--_śrī svāmi--_svāmin caraṇānām_caraṇa bhagavati_bhagavant ca_ca arpitā_arpay eva_eva satī_satī yadi_yadi kriyeta_kṛ na_na tu_tu kṛtā_kṛ satī_as paścāt_paścāt arpyate_arpay iti_iti atas_atas padyam_padya idam_idam na_na kevalāyām_kevala paryavaset_paryavasā iti_iti 27_27

baladevaḥ_baladeva satatam_satatam iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi nirapekṣāṇām_nirapekṣa bhaktiḥ_bhakti mayā_mad tvām_tvad prati_prati uktā_vac tvayā_tvad tu_tu pariniṣṭhitena_pariniṣṭhā kīrtana--_kīrtana ādikām_ādika bhaktim_bhakti kurvatā_kṛ api_api loka--_loka saṅgrahāya_saṃgraha nikhila--_nikhila karma--_karman arpaṇāt_arpaṇa mama_mad api_api bhaktiḥ_bhakti kāryā_kṛ iti_iti bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah yat_yad iti_iti yat_yad tvam_tvad deha--_deha yātrā--_yātrā sādhakam_sādhaka laukikam_laukika karma_karman karoṣi_kṛ yat_yat ca_ca deha--_deha dhāraṇa--_dhāraṇa artham_artha anna--_anna ādikam_ādika aśnāsi_aś tathā_tathā yat_yat juhoṣi_hu vaidikam_vaidika agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi--_ādi homam_homa anutiṣṭhasi_anuṣṭhā yat_yat ca_ca sat--_sat pātrebhyaḥ_pātra anna--_anna hiraṇya--_hiraṇya ajñāta--_ajñāta durita--_durita kṣataye_kṣati cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādi_ādi ācarasi_ācar tat_tad sarvam_sarva mad--_mad arpaṇam_arpaṇa yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā kuruṣva_kṛ tena_tena mad--_mad nimittasya_nimitta asya_idam lokasya_loka saṅkgrahāt_saṃgraha tvayi_tvad mad--_mad prasādaḥ_prasāda bhūyān_bhūyas bhāvi_bhāvin iti_iti na_na ca_ca iyam_idam sarva--_sarva karma--_karman arpaṇa--_arpaṇa rūypā_rūypa bhaktiḥ_bhakti sa_sa niṣṭhānām_niṣṭhā iti_iti vācyam_vac taiḥ_tad vaidikānām_vaidika eva_eva tatra_tatra arpyamāṇāt_arpay kintu_kiṃtu pariniṣṭhitānām_pariniṣṭhā eva_eva iyam_idam taiḥ_tad yat_yad karoṣi_kṛ iti_iti ādi_ādi svāmi--_svāmin nirdeśena_nirdeśa sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman tatra_tatra arpaṇāt_arpaṇa te_tad hi_hi svāminaḥ_svāmin loka--_loka saṅgraham_saṃgraha prayāsam_prayāsa apaninīṣavaḥ_apaninīṣu tathā_tathā tāni_tad ācarantaḥ_ācar tam_tad prasādayanti_prasāday iti_iti 27_27
BhG 9.28

lg.l: śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha phalaiḥ_phala evam_evam mokṣyase_muc karma--_karman bandhanaiḥ_bandhana
saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman vimuktaḥ_vimuc mām_mad upaiṣyasi_upe

div.p: prāpsyasi_prāp śṛṇu_śru evam_evam kurvan_kṛ karma--_karman bandhanaiḥ_bandhana karma--_karman nimittaiḥ_nimitta iṣṭa--_iṣ aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa phalaiḥ_phala muktaḥ_muc bhaviṣyasi_bhū karmaṇām_karman mayi_mad samarpita--_samarpay tvena_tva tava_tvad tad--_tad phala--_phala sambandha--_sambandha anupapatteḥ_anupapatti taiḥ_tad ca_ca vimuktaḥ_vimuc san_as saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa karmaṇām_karman mad--_mad arpaṇam_arpaṇa saḥ_tad eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga tena_tad yuktaḥ_yuj ātmā_ātman cittam_citta yasya_yad tathābhūtaḥ_tathābhūta tvam_tvad mām_mad prāpsyasi_prāp 28_28

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etādṛśasya_etādṛśa bhajanasya_bhajana phalam_phala āha_ah śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha iti_iti evam_evam anāyāsa--_anāyāsa siddhe_sidh api_api sarva--_sarva karma--_karman samarpaṇa--_samarpaṇa rūpe_rūpa mad--_mad bhajane_bhajana sati_as śubha--_śubha aśubhe_aśubha iṣṭa--_iṣ aniṣṭhe_aniṣṭha phale_phala yeṣām_yad taiḥ_tad karma--_karman bandhanaiḥ_bandhana bandha--_bandha rūpaiḥ_rūpa karmabhiḥ_karman mokṣyase_muc mayi_mad tad--_tad sambandha--_sambandha tad--_tad phalaiḥ_phala ca_ca na_na saṃsrakṣyase_saṃsṛj tatas_tatas ca_ca saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa yoga--_yoga yukta--_yuj ātmā_ātman saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman bhagavati_bhagavant samarpaṇam_samarpaṇa saḥ_tad eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga iva_iva citta--_citta śodhaka--_śodhaka tvāt_tva yogaḥ_yoga tena_tad yuktaḥ_yuj śodhitaḥ_śodhay ātmā_ātman antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa yasya_yad sa_tad tvam_tvad tyakta--_tyaj vimuktaḥ_vimuc san_as samyak_samyak darśanena_darśana ajñāna--_ajñāna āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa nivṛttyā_nivṛtti mām_mad upaiṣyasi_upe sākṣāt_sākṣāt kariṣyasi_kṛ aham_mad brahma_brahman asmi_as iti_iti tatas_tatas prārabdha--_prārabh karma--_karman kṣayāt_kṣaya patite_pat asmin_idam śarīre_śarīra videha--_videha kaivalya--_kaivalya rūpam_rūpa mām_mad upaiṣyasi_upe idānīm_idānīm api_api mad--_mad rūpaḥ_rūpa san_as sarva--_sarva upādhi--_upādhi nivṛttyā_nivṛtti māyika--_māyika bheda--_bheda vyavahāra--_vyavahāra viṣayaḥ_viṣaya na_na bhaviṣyasi_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 28_28

vimokṣyase_vimuc bhaktiḥ_bhakti asya_idam bhajanam_bhajana tat_tad iha_iha amutra_amutra upādhi--_upādhi nairāsyena_nairāsya eva_eva amuṣmin_adas manaḥ--_manas kalpanam_kalpana etat_etad eva_eva ca_ca naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgaḥ_tyāga saḥ_tad eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga tena_tad yuktaḥ_yuj ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas yasya_yad saḥ_tad na_na kevalam_kevalam muktaḥ_muc eva_eva bhaviṣyasi_bhū api_api tu_tu vimuktaḥ_vimuc mukteṣu_muc api_api viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ san_as mām_mad upaiṣyasi_upe sākṣāt_sākṣāt paricaritum_paricar mad--_mad nikaṭam_nikaṭa eṣyasi_i

muktānām_muc api_api siddhānām_siddha nārāyaṇa--_nārāyaṇa parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa
su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha praśānta--_praśam ātmā_ātman koṭiṣu_koṭi api_api mahā--_mahat mune_muni
muktim_mukti dadāti_dā karhicit_karhicit sma_sma na_na bhakti--_bhakti yogam_yoga iti_iti śuka--_śuka ukteḥ_ukti
div.l: mukteḥ_mukti sakāśāt_sakāśāt api_api sākṣāt_sākṣāt mad--_mad prema--_preman sevāyāḥ_sevā utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa ayam_idam eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
div.p:
baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah evam_evam mad--_mad nideśa--_nideśa kṛtāyām_kṛ sarva--_sarva karma--_karman arpaṇa--_arpaṇa lakṣaṇāyām_lakṣaṇa bhaktau_bhakti satyām_as karma--_karman rūpaiḥ_rūpa bandhanaiḥ_bandhana tvam_tvad mokṣyase_muc kīdṛśaiḥ_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah śubha--_śubha iti_iti iṣṭa--_iṣ aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa phalaiḥ_phala tad--_tad prāpti--_prāpti pratīpaiḥ_pratīpa prācīnaiḥ_prācīna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa tvam_tvad iti_iti āha_ah saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa iti_iti mayi_mad karma--_karman arpaṇam_arpaṇa saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa saḥ_tad eva_eva citta--_citta viśodhaka--_viśodhaka tvāt_tva yogaḥ_yoga tad--_tad yuktaḥ_yuj ātmā_ātman manaḥ_manas yasya_yad saḥ_tad na_na kevalam_kevala muktaḥ_muc eva_eva karmabhiḥ_karman bhaviṣyasi_bhū api_api tu_tu vimuktaḥ_vimuc san_as mām_mad upaiṣyasi_upe mukteṣu_muc viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ san_as mām_mad sākṣāt_sākṣāt sevitum_sev mad--_mad antikam_antika
prāpsyasi_prāp
BhG 9.29

lg.l: samaḥ_sama aham_mad sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta na_na me_mad dveṣyaḥ_dviṣ asti_as na_na priyaḥ_priya
ye_yad bhajanti_bhaj tu_tu mām_mad bhaktyā_bhakti mayi_mad te_tad teṣu_tad ca_ca api_api aham_mad

div.p: dadāsi_dā asti_as āha_ah samaḥ_sama aham_mad sarveṣu_sarva api_api bhūteṣu_bhūta atas_atas me_mad mama_mad priyaḥ_priya ca_ca dveṣyaḥ_dviṣ ca_ca na_na asti_as eva_eva evam_evam sati_as api_api ye_yad mām_mad bhajanti_bhaj te_tad bhaktāḥ_bhakta mayi_mad vartante_vṛt aham_mad api_api teṣu_tad anugrāhaka--_anugrāhaka tayā_tā varte_vṛt ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva yathā_yathā agneḥ_agni sva--_sva levakeṣu_levaka eva_eva tamaḥ--_tamas śīta--_śīta ādi--_ādi duḥkham_duḥkha apākurvataḥ_apākṛ api_api na_na vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya kalpa--_kalpa vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa tathā_tathā eva_eva bhakta--_bhakta pakṣa--_pakṣa pātinaḥ_pātin api_api mama_mad vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya nā_na asti_as eva_eva kintu_kiṃtu mad--_mad bhakteḥ_bhakti eva_eva ayam_idam mahimā_mahiman iti_iti 29_29

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yadi_yadi bhaktān_bhakta eva_eva anugṛhṇāsi_anugrah na_na abhaktān_abhakta tatas_tatas rāga--_rāga dveṣavat--_dveṣavat tvena_tva katham_katham parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara syāḥ_as iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah samaḥ_sama aham_mad iti_iti sarveṣu_sarva prāṇiṣu_prāṇin samaḥ_sama tulyaḥ_tulya aham_mad sat--_sat rūpeṇa_rūpa sphuraṇa--_sphuraṇa rūpeṇa_rūpa ānanda--_ānanda rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca svābhāvikena_svābhāvika aupādhikena_aupādhika ca_ca antaryāmi--_antaryāmin tvena_tva atas_atas na_na mama_mad dveṣa--_dveṣa viṣayaḥ_viṣaya prīti--_prīti viṣayaḥ_viṣaya vā_vā kaścid_kaścit asti_as sāvitrasya_sāvitra iva_iva gagana--_gagana maṇḍala--_maṇḍala vyāpinaḥ_vyāpin prakāśā_prakāśa asya_idam tarhi_tarhi katham_katham bhakta--_bhaj abhaktayoḥ_abhakta phala--_phala vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya tatra_tatra āha_ah ye_yad bhajanti_bhaj tu_tu ye_yad tu_tu bhajanti_bhaj sevante_sev mām_mad sarva--_sarva karma--_karman samarpaṇa--_samarpaṇa rūpayā_rūpa bhaktyā_bhakti abhakta--_abhakta apekṣayā_apekṣā bhaktānām_bhakta viśeṣa--_viśeṣa dyotana--_dyotana arthaḥ_artha tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda kaḥ_ka asau_adas mayi_mad te_tad ye_yad mad--_mad arpitaiḥ_arpay niṣkāmaiḥ_niṣkāma karmabhiḥ_karman śodhita--_śodhay antaḥkaraṇāḥ_antaḥkaraṇa te_tad nirasta--_niras samasta--_samasta rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas malasya_mala sattva--_sattva udrekeṇa_udreka ati_ati svacchasya_svaccha antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa sadā_sadā mad--_mad ākārāḥ_ākāra vṛttim_vṛtti mayi_mad aham_mad api_api ati_ati svacchāyām_svaccha tadīya--_tadīya citta--_citta vṛttau_vṛtti pratibimbitaḥ_pratibimbita teṣu_tad varte_vṛt ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra avadhāraṇa--_avadhāraṇa arthaḥ_artha te_tad eva_eva mayi_mad teṣu_tad eva_eva aham_mad iti_iti

svacchasya_svaccha hi_hi dravyasya_dravya ayam_idam eva_eva svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva yena_yad sambadhyate_sambandh tad--_tad ākāram_ākāra gṛhṇāti_grah iti_iti svaccha--_svaccha dravya--_dravya sambaddhasya_sambandh ca_ca vastunaḥ_vastu eṣaḥ_etad eva_eva svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva yat_yad tatra_tatra pratiphalati_pratiphal iti_iti tathā_tathā asvaccha--_asvaccha dravyasya_dravya api_api eṣaḥ_etad eva_eva svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva yat_yat sva--_sva sambaddhasya_sambandh ākāram_ākāra na_na gṛhṇāti_grah iti_iti asvaccha--_asvaccha dravya--_dravya sambaddhasya_sambandh ca_ca vastunaḥ_vastu eṣaḥ_etad eva_eva svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva yat_yad tatra_tatra na_na pratiphalati_pratiphal iti_iti yathā_yathā hi_hi sarvatra_sarvatra vidyamānaḥ_vid api_api sāvitraḥ_sāvitra prakāśaḥ_prakāśa svacche_svaccha darpaṇa--_darpaṇa ādau_ādi eva_eva abhivyajyate_abhivyañj na_na tu_tu asvacche_asvaccha ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ādau_ādi tāvatā_tāvat na_na darpaṇe_darpaṇa rajyati_rañj na_na vā_vā dveṣṭi_dviṣ ghaṭam_ghaṭa evam_evam sarvatra_sarvatra samaḥ_sama api_api svacche_svaccha bhakta--_bhakta citte_citta abhivyajyamānaḥ_abhivyañj asvacche_asvaccha ca_ca abhakti--_abhakti citte_citta an_an abhivyajya--_abhivyañj mānaḥ_māna aham_mad na_na rajyāmi_rañj kutracid_kutracid dveṣmi_dviṣ kaṃcid_kaścit sāmagrī--_sāmagrī maryādayā_maryādā jāyamānasya_jan vahni--_vahni vat_vat kalpa--_kalpa taru--_taru vat_vat ca_ca avaiṣamyam_avaiṣamya
vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā

prāpayasi_prāpay na_na tu_tu abhaktān_abhakta iti_iti ced_ced tarhi_tarhi tava_tvad api_api kim_ka rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi kṛtam_kṛ vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya asti_as āha_ah te_tad bhaktāḥ_bhakta mayi_mad vartante_vṛt aham_mad api_api teṣu_tad varte_vṛt iti_iti vyākhyāne_vyākhyāna bhagavati_bhagavant eva_eva sarva--_sarva jagat_jagant vartate_vṛt eva_eva bhagavān_bhagavant sarva--_sarva jagatsu_jagant vartate_vṛt asti_as viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa tasmāt_tasmāt ye_yad yathā_yathā mām_mad prapadyante_prapad tān_tad tathā_tathā eva_eva bhajāmi_bhaj aham_mad iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya mayi_mad te_tad āsaktāḥ_āsañj bhaktāḥ_bhakta vartante_vṛt yathā_yathā tathā_tathā aham_mad api_api teṣu_tad āsaktaḥ_āsañj iti_iti vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā atra_atra kalpa--_kalpa vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa ādi--_ādi dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta tu_tu eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa eva_eva jñeyaḥ_jñā na_na hi_hi kalpa--_kalpa vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa phala--_phala ākāṅkṣayā_ākāṅkṣā tat_tad āśritāḥ_āśri āsajjanti_āsañj nā_na api_api kalpa--_kalpa vṛkṣaḥ_vṛkṣa sva--_sva āśriteṣu_āśri āsaktaḥ_āsañj na_na api_api saḥ_tad āśritasya_āśri vairiṇaḥ_vairin dveṣṭi_dviṣ bhagavān_bhagavant tu_tu sva--_sva bhakta--_bhakta vairiṇam_vairin sva--_sva hastena_hasta eva_eva hinasti_hiṃs yat_yad uktam_vac prahrādāya_prahrāda yadā_yadā druhyet_druh dhaniṣye_dhaniṣya api_api vara--_vara ūrjitam_ūrjita iti_iti kecid_kaścit tu_tu tu_tu kārasya_kāra bhinna--_bhid upakrama--_upakrama artha--_artha tvam_tva ākhyāya_ākhyā bhakta--_bhakta vātsalya--_vātsalya lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa tu_tu vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya mayi_mad vidyate_vid eva_eva iti_iti tat_tad ca_ca bhagavataḥ_bhagavant dūṣaṇam_dūṣaṇa iti_iti vyācakṣate_vyācakṣ tathā_tathā hi_hi bhagavataḥ_bhagavant bhakta--_bhakta vātsalyam_vātsalya eva_eva prasiddham_prasidh na_na tu_tu jñāni--_jñānin vātsalyam_vātsalya yogi--_yogin vātsalyam_vātsalya vā_vā yathā_yathā hi_hi anyaḥ_anya janaḥ_jana sva--_sva dāseṣu_dāsa eva_eva vatsalaḥ_vatsala na_na anya--_anya dāseṣu_dāsa tathā_tathā eva_eva bhagavān_bhagavant api_api sva--_sva bhakteṣu_bhakta eva_eva vatsalaḥ_vatsala na_na rudra--_rudra bhakteṣu_bhakta na_na api_api devī--_devī bhakteṣu_bhakta iti_iti 29_29

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu bhaktān_bhakta eva_eva vimocya_vimocay antikam_antika nayasi_nī na_na abhaktān_abhakta iti_iti tava_tvad api_api kim_ka sarveśvarasya_sarveśvara rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa kṛtam_kṛ vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya asti_as āha_ah deva--_deva manuṣya--_manuṣya tiryak--_tiryañc sthāvara--_sthāvara ādiṣu_ādi jāti--_jāti ākṛti--_ākṛti svabhāvaiḥ_svabhāva viṣameṣu_viṣama sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta tad--_tad tad--_tad karma--_karman ānuguṇyena_ānuguṇya sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi pālana--_pālana kṛt_kṛt sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara aham_mad samaḥ_sama parjanyaḥ_parjanya iva_iva nānā_nānā vidheṣu_vidha tad--_tad arthaḥ_artha bhaktānām_bhaj abhaktebhyaḥ_abhakta viśesam_viśeṣa bodhayitum_bodhay iha_iha tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda ye_yad tu_tu mām_mad bhajanti_bhaj śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi bhaktibhiḥ_bhakti anukūlayanti_anukūlay te_tad bhaktyā_bhakti anuraktyā_anurakti mayi_mad vartante_vṛt teṣu_tad aham_mad ca_ca sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara api_api bhaktyā_bhakti varte_vṛt maṇi--_maṇi suvarṇa--_suvarṇa nyāyena_nyāya bhagavataḥ_bhagavant api_api bhakteṣu_bhakta bhaktiḥ_bhakti asti_as bahgavān_bahgavant bhakta--_bhakta bhaktimān_bhaktimat iti_iti ādi_ādi śrī--_śrī śuka--_śuka vākyāt_vākya iti_iti premṇā_preman mithas_mithas vartana--_vartana viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa darśitaḥ_darśay tasya_tad pratijñā_pratijñā tu_tu īdṛśī_īdṛśa eva_eva avagamyate_avagam ye_yad yathā_yathā mām_mad iti_iti ādinā_ādi kalpa--_kalpa druma--_druma dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta api_api atra_atra āṃśikaḥ_āṃśika eva_eva tatra_tatra mithas_mithas prīti--_prīti a_a pratīteḥ_pratīti pakṣapāta--_pakṣapāta apratīteḥ_apratīti ca_ca tathā_tathā ca_ca sarvatra_sarvatra aviṣame_aviṣama api_api mayi_mad sva--_sva āśrita--_āśri vātsalya--_vātsalya lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya asti_as iti_iti uktam_vac evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra upapadyate_upapad ca_ca abhyupalabhyate_abhyupalabh ca_ca iti_iti

nanu_nanu bhakteḥ_bhakti api_api karmatva--_karmatva anusāreṇa_anusāra teṣu_tad tad--_tad vātsalyāt_vātsalya na_na tad--_tad lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa tat_tad iti_iti ced_ced mā_mā evam_evam etat_etad śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda eka--_eka rase_rasa bhakti--_bhakti yoge_yoga tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti na_na ca_ca sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa prayukta--_prayuj tvāt_tva dūṣaṇam_dūṣaṇa etat_etad iti_iti vācyam_vac guṇa--_guṇa śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvena_tva stūyamāna--_stu tvāt_tva 29_29
BhG 9.30

lg.l: api_api ced_ced su_su durācāraḥ_durācāra bhajate_bhaj mām_mad ananya--_ananya bhāj_bhāj
sādhuḥ_sādhu eva_eva sa_tad mantavyaḥ_man samyak_samyak vyavasitaḥ_vyavasā hi_hi saḥ_tad

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara api_api ca_ca mad--_mad bhaktyāḥ_bhakti eva_eva ayam_idam avitarkyam_avitarkya prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva iti_iti darśayan_darśay āha_ah api_api ced_ced iti_iti atyantam_atyantam durācāraḥ_durācāra api_api naraḥ_nara apṛthaktvena_apṛthaktva pṛthak_pṛthak devatā_devatā api_api vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva eva_eva iti_iti buddhyā_buddhi devatā--_devatā antara--_antara bhaktim_bhakti akurvan_kṛ mām_mad eva_eva parameśvaram_parameśvara bhajate_bhaj tarhi_tarhi sādhuḥ_sādhu śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha eva_eva sa_tad mantavyaḥ_man yatas_yatas asau_adas samyak_samyak vyavasitaḥ_vyavasā parameśvara--_parameśvara bhajanena_bhajana eva_eva kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha bhaviṣyāmi_bhū iti_iti śobhanam_śobhana adhyavasāyam_adhyavasāya kṛtavān_kṛ

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana -kim_ka ca_ca mad--_mad bhakteḥ_bhakti eva_eva ayam_idam mahimā_mahiman yat_yad same_sama api_api vaiṣamyam_vaiṣamya āpādayati_āpāday śṛṇu_śru tad--_tad mahimānam_mahiman api_api ced_ced iti_iti yaḥ_yad kaścid_kaścit su_su durācāraḥ_durācāra api_api ced_ced ajāmila--_ajāmila ādiḥ_ādi iva_iva ananya--_ananya bhāj_bhāj san_as mām_mad bhajate_bhaj kutaścid_kutaścid bhāgya--_bhāgya udayāt_udaya sevate_sev sa_tad prāk_prāk asādhuḥ_asādhu api_api sādhuḥ_sādhu eva_eva mantavyaḥ_man hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt samyak_samyak vyavasitaḥ_vyavasā sādhu--_sādhu niścayavān_niścayavat saḥ_tad

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sva--_sva bhakteṣu_bhakta āsaktiḥ_āsakti mama_mad svābhāvikī_svābhāvika eva_eva bhavati_bhū sā_tad durācāre_durācāra api_api bhakte_bhakta na_na apayāti_apayā tam_tad api_api utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa eva_eva karomi_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah api_api ced_ced iti_iti su_su durācāraḥ_durācāra para--_para hiṃsā_hiṃsā para--_para dāra--_dāra para--_para dravya--_dravya ādi--_ādi grahaṇa--_grahaṇa parāyaṇe_parāyaṇa api_api mām_mad bhajate_bhaj ced_ced kīdṛś--_kīdṛś bhajanavān_bhajanavat iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah ananya--_ananya bhāj_bhāj mattaḥ_mad anya--_anya devatā--_devatā antaram_antara mad--_mad bhakteḥ_bhakti anyat_anya karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna ādikam_ādika mad--_mad kāmanātaḥ_kāmanā anyām_anya rājya--_rājya ādi--_ādi kāmanām_kāmanā na_na bhajate_bhaj sa_tad sādhuḥ_sādhu

nanu_nanu etādṛśe_etādṛśa kadācāre_kadācāra dṛṣṭe_dṛś sati_as katham_katham sādhu--_sādhu tvam_tva tatra_tatra āha_ah mantavyaḥ_man mananīyaḥ_man sādhu--_sādhu tvena_tva eva_eva sa_tad jñeyaḥ_jñā iti_iti yāvat_yāvat mantavyam_man iti_iti vidhi--_vidhi vākyam_vākya anyathā_anyathā pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya syāt_as atra_atra mad--_mad ājñā_ājñā

nanu_nanu tvām_tvad bhajate_bhaj iti_iti etad--_etad aṃśena_aṃśa sādhuḥ_sādhu para--_para dāra--_dāra ādi--_ādi grahaṇa--_grahaṇa aṃśena_aṃśa asādhuḥ_asādhu ca_ca sa_tad mantavyaḥ_man tatra_tatra āha_ah eva_eva iti_iti sarveṇa_sarva api_api aṃśena_aṃśa sādhuḥ_sādhu eva_eva mantavyaḥ_man kadāpi_kadāpi tasya_tad asādhu--_asādhu tvam_tva na_na draṣṭavyam_dṛś iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva samyak_samyak vyavasitam_vyavasā niścayaḥ_niścaya yasya_yad saḥ_tad dustyajena_dustyaja sva--_sva pāpena_pāpa narakam_naraka tiryag--_tiryañc yoniḥ_yoni vā_vā yāmi_yā aikāntikam_aikāntika śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa bhajanam_bhajana tu_tu na_na eva_eva jihāsāmi_jihās iti_iti sa_tad śobhanam_śobhana adhyavasāyam_adhyavasāya kṛtavān_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva -_mad śuddha--_śudh bhakti--_bhakti vaśyatā--_vaśyatā lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva dustyajaḥ_dustyaja eva_eva yat_yad aham_mad jugupsita--_jugups karmaṇi_karman api_api bhakte_bhakta anurajyan_anurañj tam_tad utkarṣayāmi_utkarṣay iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva artham_artha puṣṇan_puṣ āha_ah api_api ced_ced iti_iti ananya--_ananya bhāj_bhāj janaḥ_jana ced_ced su_su durācāraḥ_durācāra ati_ati vigarhita--_vigarh karmā_karman api_api san_as mām_mad bhajate_bhaj mad--_mad kīrtana--_kīrtana ādibhiḥ_ādi mām_mad sevate_sev tat_tad api_api sa_tad sādhuḥ_sādhu eva_eva mantavyaḥ_man mattaḥ_mad anyām_anya devatām_devatā na_na bhajti_bhaj āśrayati_āśri iti_iti mad--_mad ekāntī_ekāntin mām_mad eva_eva svāminam_svāmin parama--_parama pumartham_pumartha ca_ca jānan_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ubhayathā_ubhayathā vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api sādhu--_sādhu tvena_tva sa_tad pūjyaḥ_pūjay iti_iti bodhayitum_bodhay eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra tasya_tad tathātve_tathātva manane_manana mantavyaḥ_man iti_iti sva--_sva nideśa--_nideśa rūpaḥ_rūpa vidhiḥ_vidhi ca_ca darśitaḥ_darśay itarathā_itarathā pratyavāyāt_pratyavāya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ubhayathā_ubhayathā api_api vartamānasya_vṛt sādhu--_sādhu tvam_tva eva_eva iti_iti atra_atra uktam_vac hetum_hetu puṣṇan_puṣ āha_ah samyak_samyak iti_iti yat_yat asau_adas samyak_samyak vyavasitaḥ_vyavasā mad--_mad ekānta--_ekānta niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā rūpa--_rūpa śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha niścayavān_niścayavat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam uktam_vac nārasiṃhe_nārasiṃha

bhagavati_bhagavant ca_ca harau_hari ananya--_ananya cetāḥ_cetas bhṛśam_bhṛśam alinaḥ_alina api_api virājate_virāj manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya na_na hi_hi śaśa--_śaśa kaluṣa--_kaluṣa chaviḥ_chavi kadācid_kadācid timira--_timira parābhava--_parābhava tām_tā upaiti_upe candraḥ_candra iti_iti
BhG 9.31

lg.l: kṣipram_kṣipram bhavati_bhū dharma--_dharma ātmā_ātman śaśvat_śaśvat śāntim_śānti nigacchati_nigam
kaunteya_kaunteya pratijānīhi_pratijñā na_na me_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta praṇaśyati_praṇaś

div.p:
āha_ah su_su durācāraḥ_durācāra api_api mām_mad bhajan_bhaj śīghram_śīghram dharma--_dharma cittaḥ_citta bhavati_bhū tatas_tatas ca_ca śaśvat_śaśvat śāntim_śānti citta--_citta upaplava--_upaplava uparama--_uparama rūpām_rūpa parameśvara--_parameśvara niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā nitarām_nitarām gacchati_gam prāpnoti_prāp kutarka--_kutarka karkaśa--_karkaśa vādinaḥ_vādin iti_iti śaṅkā--_śaṅkā ākulam_ākula arjunam_arjuna protsāhayati_protsāhay he_he kaunteya_kaunteya paṭaha--_paṭaha ādi--_ādi mahā--_mahat ghoṣa--_ghoṣa pūrvakam_pūrvaka vivadamānānām_vivad sabhām_sabhā gatvā_gam bāhum_bāhu utkṣipya_utkṣip niḥśaṅkam_niḥśaṅka pratijānīhi_pratijñā pratijñām_pratijñā kuru_kṛ katham_katham me_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara bhaktaḥ_bhakta su_su durācāraḥ_durācāra api_api na_na praṇaśyati_praṇaś api_api tu_tu kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti tatas_tatas ca_ca te_tad tam_tad
prauḍhi--_prauḍhi vijṛmbha--_vijṛmbha vidhvaṃsita--_vidhvaṃsay kutarkāḥ_kutarka santaḥ_as niḥsaṃśayam_niḥsaṃśaya tvām_tvad eva_eva guru--_guru tvena_tva āśrayeran_āśri

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana asmāt_idam eva_eva samyak_samyak vyavasāyāt_vyavasāya sa_tad hitvā_hā durācāra--_durācāra tām_tā kṣipram_kṣipram iti_iti cira--_cira kālam_kāla adharma--_adharma ātmā_ātman api_api mad--_mad bhajana--_bhajana mahimnā_mahiman kṣipram_kṣipram śīghram_śīghram eva_eva bhavati_bhū dharma--_dharma ātmā_ātman dharma--_dharma anugat--_anugam cittaḥ_citta durācāra--_durācāra tvam_tva jhaṭiti_jhaṭiti eva_eva tyaktvā_tyaj sat--_sat ācāraḥ_ācāra bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_kim ca_ca śaśvat_śaśvat nityam_nityam śāntim_śānti viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga spṛhā--_spṛhā nivṛttim_nivṛtti nigacchati_nigam nitarām_nitarām prāpnoti_prāp ati_ati nirvedāt_nirveda

kaścid_kaścit tvad--_tvad bhaktaḥ_bhakta prāk_prāk abhyastam_abhyas durācāra--_durācāra tvam_tva atyajan_atyajat na_na bhavet_bhū api_api dharma--_dharma ātmā_ātman tathā_tathā ca_ca sa_tad naśyet_naś evā_eva iti_iti nā_na iti_iti āha_ah bhakta--_bhakta anukampā--_anukampā paravaśa--_paravaśa tayā_tā kupitaḥ_kup iva_iva bhagavān_bhagavant na_na etat_etad āścaryam_āścarya manvīthāḥ_man he_he kaunteya_kaunteya niścitam_niści evā_eva īdṛśam_īdṛśa mad--_mad bhakteḥ_bhakti māhātmyam_māhātmya atas_atas vipratipannānām_vipratipad purastāt_purastāt api_api tvam_tvad pratijānīhi_pratijñā sa_sa avajñam_avajñā sa_sa garvam_garva ca_ca pratijñām_pratijñā kuru_kṛ na_na me_mad vāsudevasya_vāsudeva ati_ati durācāraḥ_durācāra api_api prāṇa--_prāṇa saṅkaṭam_saṃkaṭa āpannaḥ_āpad api_api su_su durlabham_durlabha ayogyaḥ_ayogya san_as api_api ati_ati mūḍhaḥ_muh aśaraṇaḥ_aśaraṇa api_api na_na praṇaśyati_praṇaś kim_kim tu_tu kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti dṛṣṭāntāḥ_dṛṣṭānta ca_ca ajāmila--_ajāmila prahlāda--_prahlāda dhruva--_dhruva gajendra--_gajendra ādayaḥ_ādi prasiddhāḥ_prasidh eva_eva śāstram_śāstra ca_ca na_na vāsudeva--_vāsudeva bhaktānām_bhakta aśubham_aśubha vidyate_vid kvacid_kvacid iti_iti

gṛhṇāsi_grah aśnāsi_aś āha_ah bhavati_bhū atra_atra kṣipram_kṣipram bhāvī_bhāvin sa_tad dharma--_dharma ātmā_ātman śaśvat_śaśvat śāntim_śānti gamiṣyati_gam iti_iti a_a prayujya_prayuj bhavati_bhū gacchati_gam iti_iti vartamāna--_vṛt prayogāt_prayoga adharma--_adharma karaṇa--_karaṇa anantaram_anantaram eva_eva mām_mad anusmṛtya_anusmṛ kṛta--_kṛ anutāpaḥ_anutāpa kṣipram_kṣipram eva_eva dharma--_dharma ātmā_ātman hanta_hanta hanta_hanta mad--_mad tulyaḥ_tulya kaḥ_ka api_api bhakta--_bhakta lokam_loka kalaṅkayan_kalaṅkay adhamaḥ_adhama nā_na asti_as tat_tad vidyām_vid iti_iti śaśvat_śaśvat punar_punar punar_punar api_api śāntim_śānti nirvedam_nirveda nitarām_nitarām gacchati_gam yat_yat vā_vā kiyataḥ_kiyat samayāt_samaya anantaram_anantaram tasya_tad bhāvi_bhāvin dharma--_dharma ātmatvam_ātmatva tadānīm_tadānīm api_api sūkṣma--_sūkṣma rūpeṇa_rūpa vartate_vṛt evam_evam tat_tad manasi_manas bhakteḥ_bhakti preveśāt_preveśa yathā_yathā pīte_pīta mahauṣadhi_mahauṣadhī sati_as tadānīm_tadānīm kiyat--_kiyat kāla--_kāla paryantam_paryanta naśyat--_naś vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api na_na gaṇyate_gaṇay iti_iti dhvaniḥ_dhvani

tatas_tatas ca_ca tasya_tad bhaktasya_bhakta durācāra--_durācāra tva--_tva gamakāḥ_gamaka kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha ādyāḥ_ādya utkhāta--_utkhan daṃṣṭra--_daṃṣṭra uraga--_uraga daṃśa--_daṃśa vat_vat akiñcitkarāḥ_akiñcitkara eva_eva jñeyāḥ_jñā iti_iti anudhvaniḥ_anudhvani ataeva_ataeva śaśvat_śaśvat sarvadā_sarvadā eva_eva śāntim_śānti kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha ādi--_ādi upaśamam_upaśama nitarām_nitarām gacchati_gam atiśayena_atiśaya prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti durācāra--_durācāra tva--_tva daśāyām_daśā api_api sa_tad śuddha--_śudh antaḥkaraṇaḥ_antaḥkaraṇa eva_eva ucyate_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu yadi_yadi sa_tad dharma--_dharma ātmā_ātman syāt_as tadā_tadā na_na asti_as kaḥ_ka api_api vivādaḥ_vivāda kintu_kiṃtu kaścid_kaścit durācāra--_durācāra bhaktaḥ_bhakta maraṇa--_maraṇa paryantam_paryanta api_api durācāra--_durācāra tvam_tva na_na jahāti_hā tasya_tad kā_ka vārtā_vārttā iti_iti atas_atas bhakta--_bhakta vatsalaḥ_vatsala bhagavān_bhagavant sa_sa prauḍhi_prauḍhi sa_sa kopam_kopa iva_iva āha_ah kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti mama_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta na_na praṇaśyati_praṇaś tat_tad api_api prāṇa--_prāṇa nāśe_nāśa adhaḥpātam_adhaḥpāta na_na yāti_yā kutarka--_kutarka karkaśa--_karkaśa vādinaḥ_vādin na_na etat_etad manyeran_man iti_iti śoka--_śoka śaṅkā--_śaṅkā vyākulam_vyākula arjunam_arjuna protsāhayati_protsāhay he_he kaunteya_kaunteya paṭaha--_paṭaha kāhala--_kāhala ādi--_ādi mahā--_mahat ghoṣa--_ghoṣa pūrvakam_pūrvaka vivadamānānām_vivad sabhām_sabhā gatvā_gam bāhum_bāhu utkṣipya_utkṣip niḥśaṅkam_niḥśaṅka katham_katham me_mad mama_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara bhaktaḥ_bhakta durācāraḥ_durācāra api_api na_na api_api tu_tu kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha eva_eva bhavati_bhū tatas_tatas ca_ca te_tad tam_tad prauḍhi--_prauḍhi vijṛmbhita--_vijṛmbh vidhvaṃsita--_vidhvaṃsay kutarkāḥ_kutarka santaḥ_as niḥsaṃśayam_niḥsaṃśaya tvām_tvad eva_eva guru--_guru tvena_tva āśrayeran_āśri iti_iti svāmi--_svāmin caraṇāḥ_caraṇa

nanu_nanu katham_katham bhagavān_bhagavat svayam_svayam a_a pratijñāya_pratijñā pratijñātum_pratijñā arjunam_arjuna eva_eva atidideśa_atidiś yathā_yathā eva_eva agre_agra mām_mad eva_eva eṣyasi_i satyam_satya te_tvad pratijāne_pratijñā priyaḥ_priya asi_as me_mad iti_iti vakṣyate_vac tathā_tathā eva_eva atra_atra api_api kaunteya_kaunteya pratijāne_pratijñā aham_mad na_na me_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta praṇaśyati_praṇaś iti_iti katham_katham na_na uktam_vac ucyate_vac -_bhagavant tadānīm_tadānīm eva_eva vicāritam_vicāray bhakta--_bhakta vatsalena_vatsala mayā_mad sva--_sva bhakta--_bhakta apakarṣa--_apakarṣa leśam_leśa api_api asahiṣṇunā_asahiṣṇu sva--_sva sva--_sva apa--_apa karṣam_karṣa aṅgīkṛtya_aṅgīkṛ api_api bhakta--_bhakta pratijñā_pratijñā eva_eva rakṣitā_rakṣ bahutra_bahutra yathā_yathā tatra_tatra eva_eva bhīṣma--_bhīṣma yuddhe_yuddha sva--_sva pratijñām_pratijñā api_api apākṛtya_apākṛ bhīṣma--_bhīṣma pratijñā_pratijñā eva_eva rakṣiṣyate_rakṣ bahirmukhāḥ_bahirmukha vādinaḥ_vādin vaitaṇḍikāḥ_vaitaṇḍika mad--_mad pratijñām_pratijñā śrutvā_śru hasiṣyanti_has arjuna--_arjuna pratijñā_pratijñā tu_tu pāṣāṇa--_pāṣāṇa rekhā_rekhā eva_eva atas_atas arjunam_arjuna eva_eva pratijñām_pratijñā kārayāmi_kāray iti_iti atra_atra etādṛśa--_etādṛśa durācārasya_durācāra api_api ananya--_ananya bhakti--_bhakti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa ananya--_ananya bhakta--_bhakta abhidhāyaka--_abhidhāyaka vākyeṣu_vākya sarvatra_sarvatra na_na vidyate_vid anyat_anya strī--_strī putra--_putra ādi--_ādi āsakti--_āsakti vidharma--_vidharma śoka--_śoka moha--_moha kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha ādikam_ādika yatra_yatra iti_iti kupaṇḍita--_kupaṇḍita

baladevaḥ_baladeva iti_iti su_su durācāraḥ_durācāra api_api mām_mad bhajan_bhaj śīghram_śīghram dharma--_dharma cittaḥ_citta bhavati_bhū tatas_tatas ca_ca śaśvat_śaśvat śāntim_śānti citta--_citta upaplava--_upaplava uparama--_uparama rūpām_rūpa parameśvara--_parameśvara niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā nitarām_nitarām gacchati_gam prāpnoti_prāp kutarka--_kutarka karkaśa--_karkaśa vādinaḥ_vādin iti_iti śaṅkā--_śaṅkā ākulam_ākula arjunam_arjuna protsāhayati_protsāhay he_he kaunteya_kaunteya paṭaha--_paṭaha ādi--_ādi mahā--_mahat ghoṣa--_ghoṣa pūrvakam_pūrvaka vivadamānānām_vivad sabhām_sabhā gatvā_gam bāhum_bāhu utkṣipya_utkṣip niḥśaṅkam_niḥśaṅka pratijānīhi_pratijñā pratijñām_pratijñā kuru_kṛ katham_katham me_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara bhaktaḥ_bhakta su_su durācāraḥ_durācāra api_api na_na praṇaśyati_praṇaś api_api tu_tu kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti tatas_tatas ca_ca te_tad tvat_tvad prauḍhi--_prauḍhi vijṛmbha--_vijṛmbha vidhvaṃsita--_vidhvaṃsay kutarkāḥ_kutarka santaḥ_as niḥsaṃśayam_niḥsaṃśaya tvām_tvad eva_eva guru--_guru tvena_tva āśrayeran_āśri
BhG 9.32

lg.l: mām_mad hi_hi pārtha_pārtha vyapāśritya_vyapāśri ye_yad api_api syuḥ_as pāpa--_pāpa yonayaḥ_yoni
striyaḥ_strī vaiśyāḥ_vaiśyā tathā_tathā śūdrāḥ_śūdra te_tad api_api yānti_yā parām_para gatim_gati

div.p: pavitrīkaroti_pavitrīkṛ āha_ah ye_yad api_api pāpa--_pāpa yonayaḥ_yoni syuḥ_as nikṛṣṭa--_nikṛṣṭa janmānaḥ_janman antyaja--_antyaja ādayaḥ_ādi bhaveyuḥ_bhū ye_yad api_api vaiśyāḥ_vaiśya kevalam_kevalam kṛṣi--_kṛṣi ādi--_ādi niratāḥ_niram striyaḥ_strī śūdrāḥ_śūdra ca_ca api_api adhyayana--_adhyayana ādi--_ādi rahitāḥ_rahita te_tad api_api mām_mad saṃsevya_saṃsev parām_para gatim_gati yānti_yā 32_32

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam āgantuka--_āgantuka doṣeṇa_doṣa duṣṭānām_duṣ bhagavat--_bhagavant bhakti--_bhakti prabhāvāt_prabhāva nistāram_nistāra uktvā_vac svābhāvika--_svābhāvika doṣeṇa_doṣa duṣṭānām_duṣ api_api tam_tad āha_ah mām_mad hi_hi iti_iti hi_hi niścitam_niścitam he_he pārtha_pārtha mām_mad vyapāścitya_vyapāści śaraṇam_śaraṇa āgatya_āgam ye_yad api_api syuḥ_as pāpa--_pāpa yonayaḥ_yoni antyajāḥ_antyaja tiryañcaḥ_tiryañc vā_vā jāti--_jāti doṣeṇa_doṣa duṣṭāḥ_duṣ veda--_veda adhyayana--_adhyayana ādi--_ādi śūnya--_śūnya tayā_tā nikṛṣṭāḥ_nikṛṣṭa striyaḥ_strī vaiśyāḥ_vaiśya kṛṣi--_kṛṣi ādi--_ādi mātra--_mātra ratāḥ_ram tathā_tathā śūdrāḥ_śūdra jātitaḥ_jāti adhyayana--_adhyayana ādi--_ādi abhāvena_abhāva ca_ca parama--_parama gati--_gati ayogyāḥ_ayogya te_tad api_api yānti_yā parām_para gatim_gati api_api śabdāt_śabda prāc--_prāñc ukta--_vac durācārāḥ_durācāra api_api 32_32
gaṇayati_gaṇay gaṇayati_gaṇay āha_ah pāpa--_pāpa yonayaḥ_yoni antyajāḥ_antyaja mlecchāḥ_mleccha api_api yat_yad uktam_vac

kirāta--_kirāta hūṇa--_hūṇa andhra--_andhra pulinda--_pulinda pulkaśāḥ_pulkasa ābhīra--_ābhīra śumbhāḥ_śumbha yavanāḥ_yavana khasa--_khasa ādayaḥ_ādi ye_yad anye_anya ca_ca pāpāḥ_pāpa yad--_yad apāśraya--_apāśraya āśrayāḥ_āśraya
śudhyanti_śudh tasmai_tad prabhaviṣṇave_prabhaviṣṇu namaḥ_namas

lg.l: aho_aho bata_bata śva--_śvan pacaḥ_paca atas_atas garīyān_garīyas
yat_yad jihvā_jihvā agre_agra vartate_vṛt nāma_nāman tubhyam_tvad
tepuḥ_tap tapaḥ_tapas te_tad juhuvuḥ_hu sasnuḥ_snā āryā_ārya
brahma_brahman anūcuḥ_anuvac nāma_nāman gṛṇanti_gṛ ye_yad te_tad

div.l: kim_ka punar_punar strī--_strī vaiśya--_vaiśya ādyāḥ_ādya aśuddhi--_aśuddhi alīka--_alīka ādimantaḥ_ādimat
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva mahā--_mahat ghoṣa--_ghoṣa pūrvakam_pūrvaka vivadamānānām_vivad sabhām_sabhā gatvā_gam bāhum_bāhu utkṣipya_utkṣip niḥśaṅkam_niḥśaṅka pratijānīhi_pratijñā pratijñām_pratijñā kuru_kṛ sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara aham_mad mad--_mad ekāntinām_ekāntin āgantuka--_āgantuka doṣān_doṣa vidhunomi_vidhū iti_iti kim_ka citram_citra yat_yat ati_ati vidhūta--_vidhū avidyāḥ_avidyā vimucyante_vimuc iti_iti āha_ah māṃhi_māṃhi iti_iti ye_yad pāpa--_pāpa yonayaḥ_yoni antyajāḥ_antyaja sahaja--_sahaja durācārāḥ_durācāra syuḥ_as te_tad api_api mad--_mad bhakta--_bhakta prasaṅgena_prasaṅga mām_mad sarva--_sarva īśam_īśa vasudeva--_vasudeva sutam_suta vyapāśritya_vyapāśri śaraṇam_śaraṇa āgatya_āgam parām_para yogi--_yogin durlabhām_durlabha gatim_gati mad--_mad prāptim_prāpti yānti_yā hi_hi niścitam_niścitam āha_ah śrīmān_śrīmat śukaḥ_śuka

kirāta--_kirāta hūṇa--_hūṇa andhra--_andhra pulinda--_pulinda pulkaśāḥ_pulkasa ābhīra--_ābhīra śumbhāḥ_śumbha yavanāḥ_yavana khasa--_khasa ādayaḥ_ādi ye_yad anye_anya ca_ca pāpāḥ_pāpa yad--_yad apāśraya--_apāśraya āśrayāḥ_āśraya
śudhyanti_śudh tasmai_tad prabhaviṣṇave_prabhaviṣṇu namaḥ_namas
div.l: atrā_atra asya_idam lokasya_loka anitya--_anitya tvam_tva kaṇṭhataḥ_kaṇṭha bruvan_brū hariḥ_hari mithyātvam_mithyātva tasya_tad nirāsāt_nirāsa

div.p: BhG 9.33

lg.l: kim_ka punar_punar brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa puṇyāḥ_puṇya bhaktāḥ_bhakta rājarṣayaḥ_rājarṣi tathā_tathā
anityam_anitya asukham_asukha lokam_loka imam_idam prāpya_prāp bhajasva_bhaj mām_mad

div.p:
śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara -_yadā evam_evam tadā_tadā sat--_sat kulāḥ_kula sat--_sat ācārāḥ_ācāra ca_ca mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta parām_para gatim_gati yānti_yā iti_iti kim_ka vaktavyam_vac iti_iti āha_ah kim_ka punar_punar iti_iti puṇyāḥ_puṇya sukṛtinaḥ_sukṛtin brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa tathā_tathā rājānaḥ_rājan ca_ca te_tad ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi ca_ca kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya evam_evam bhūtāḥ_bhū parām_para gatim_gati yānti_yā iti_iti kim_ka punar_punar vaktavyam_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atas_atas tvam_tvad imam_idam rājarṣi--_rājarṣi rūpam_rūpa deham_deha prāpya_prāp labdhvā_labh mām_mad bhajasva_bhaj kiṃca_kiṃca anityam_anitya adhruvam_adhruva asukham_asukha sukha--_sukha rahitam_rahita ca_ca imam_idam martya--_martya lokam_loka prāpya_prāp anitya--_anitya tvāt_tva vilambam_vilamba akurvan_kṛ asukha--_asukha tvāt_tva ca_ca sukha--_sukha artham_artha udyamam_udyama hitvā_hā mām_mad eva_eva bhajasva_bhaj iti_iti
arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam ced_ced puṇyāḥ_puṇya sat--_sat ācārāḥ_ācāra uttama--_uttama yonayaḥ_yoni ca_ca brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa tathā_tathā rājarṣayaḥ_rājarṣi sūkṣma--_sūkṣma vastu--_vastu vivekinaḥ_vivekin kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya mama_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta parām_para gatim_gati yānti_yā iti_iti kim_ka punar_punar vācyam_vac atra_atra kasyacid_kaścit api_api yatas_yatas mad--_mad bhakteḥ_bhakti īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa mahimā_mahiman atas_atas mahatā_mahat pratnena_pratna imam_idam lokam_loka sarva--_sarva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha sādhana--_sādhana yogyam_yogya ati_ati durlabham_durlabha ca_ca mauṣya--_mauṣya deham_deha anityam_anitya āśu--_āśu vināśinam_vināśin asukham_asukha garbha--_garbha vāsa--_vāsa ādi--_ādi aneka--_aneka duḥkha--_duḥkha bahulam_bahula ati_ati śīghram_śīghram eva_eva bhajasva_bhaj mām_mad śaraṇam_śaraṇa āśrayasva_āśri anitya--_anitya tvāt_tva aukha--_aukha tvāt_tva ca_ca asya_idam vilambam_vilamba sukha--_sukha artham_artha udyamam_udyama ca_ca mā_mā kārṣīḥ_kṛ tvam_tvad ca_ca rājarṣiḥ_rājarṣi atas_atas mad--_mad bhajanena_bhajana ātmānam_ātman saphalam_saphala kuru_kṛ anyathā_anyathā hi_hi etādṛśam_etādṛśa janma_janman niṣphalam_niṣphala eva_eva te_tvad syāt_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 33_33

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ---_tatas api_api kim_ka punar_punar brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa puṇyāḥ_puṇya sat--_sat kulāḥ_kula sat--_sat ācārāḥ_ācāra ca_ca ye_yad bhaktāḥ_bhakta tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad mām_mad bhajasva_bhaj

baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka iti_iti yadi_yadi evam_evam tarhi_tarhi brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa rājarṣayaḥ_rājarṣi kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya ca_ca sat--_sat kulāḥ_kula puṇyāḥ_puṇya sat--_sat ācāriṇaḥ_ācārin bhaktāḥ_bhakta santaḥ_sat parām_para gatim_gati yānti_yā iti_iti kim_ka punar_punar vācyam_vac na_na asti_as atra_atra saṃśaya--_saṃśaya leśaḥ_leśa api_api tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad api_api rājarṣiḥ_rājarṣi imam_idam lokam_loka prāpya_prāp mām_mad bhajasva_bhaj anityam_anitya naśvaram_naśvara asukham_asukha īṣat_īṣat sukham_sukha vināśini_vināśin alpa--_alpa sukhe_sukha asmin_idam loke_loka rājya--_rājya spṛhām_spṛhā vihāya_vihā nityam_nityam ananta--_ananta ānandam_ānanda mām_mad upāsya_upās prāpnuhi_prāp iti_iti tvarā_tvarā atrā_atra asya_idam lokasya_loka anitya--_anitya tvam_tva kaṇṭhataḥ_kaṇṭha bruvan_brū hariḥ_hari mithyātvam_mithyātva tasya_tad nirāsāt_nirāsa 33_33
BhG 9.34

lg.l: mad--_mad manāḥ_manas bhava_bhū mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta mad--_mad yājī_yājin mām_mad namaskuru_namaskṛ
mām_mad eva_eva eṣyasi_i yuktvā_yuj evam_evam ātmānam_ātman mad--_mad parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ mayi_mad eva_eva manaḥ_manas yasya_yad sa_tad mad--_mad manāḥ_manas tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa tvam_tvad bhava_bhū tathā_tathā mama_mad eva_eva bhaktaḥ_bhakta sevakaḥ_sevaka bhava_bhū mad--_mad yājī_yājin mad--_mad pūjana--_pūjana śīlaḥ_śīla bhava_bhū mām_mad namaskuru_namaskṛ evam_evam ebhiḥ_idam prakāraiḥ_prakāra mad--_mad parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa san_as ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas mayi_mad yuktvā_yuj samādhāya_samādhā mām_mad eva_eva parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda rūpam_rūpa eṣyasi_i prāpsyasi_prāp

lg.l: nijam_nija aiśvaryam_aiśvarya āścaryam_āścarya bhakteḥ_bhakti ca_ca adbhuta--_adbhuta vaibhavam_vaibhava
navame_navama rāja--_rājan guhya--_guhya ākhye_ākhyā kṛpayā_kṛpā avocat_vac acyutaḥ_acyuta

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī rāja--_rājan vidyā--_vidyā rāja--_rājan guhya--_guhya yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma navamaḥ_navama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhajana--_bhajana prakāram_prakāra darśayan_darśay upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ mad--_mad manāḥ_manas bhava_bhū iti_iti rāja--_rājan bhaktasya_bhakta api_api rāja--_rājan bhṛtyasya_bhṛtya putra--_putra ādau_ādi manaḥ_manas tathā_tathā sa_tad tad--_tad manāḥ_manas api_api na_na tad--_tad bhaktaḥ_bhakta iti_iti atas_atas uktam_vac mad--_mad manāḥ_manas bhava_bhū mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta iti_iti tathā_tathā mad--_mad yājī_yājin mad--_mad pūjana--_pūjana śīlaḥ_śīla mām_mad namaskuru_namaskṛ manaḥ--_manas vāc--_vāc kāyaiḥ_kāya evam_evam ebhiḥ_idam prakāraiḥ_prakāra mad--_mad parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa mad--_mad eka--_eka śaraṇaḥ_śaraṇa san_as ātmānam_ātman antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa yuktvā_yuj mayi_mad samādhāya_samādhā mām_mad eva_eva parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana sva--_sva prakāśam_prakāśa sarva--_sarva upadrava--_upadrava śūnyam_śūnya abhayam_abhaya eṣyasi_i prāpsyasi_prāp

lg.l: saṃsāra--_saṃsāra ambudhim_ambudhi uttaranti_uttṛ sahasā_sahas paśyanti_paś pūrṇam_pṛ mahaḥ_mahas
vedāntaiḥ_vedānta avadhārayanti_avadhāray paramam_parama śreyaḥ_śreyas tyajanti_tyaj bhramam_bhrama
dvaitam_dvaita svapna--_svapna samam_sama vidanti_vid vimalām_vimala vindanti_vid ca_ca ānanda--_ānanda tām_tā

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍha--_guh artha--_artha dīpikāyām_dīpikā adhikāri--_adhikārin bhedena_bheda rāja--_rājan vidyā--_vidyā

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha -----_bhajana prakāram_prakāra darśayan_darśay upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ mad--_mad manāḥ_manas iti_iti evam_evam ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas deham_deha ca_ca yuktvā_yuj mayi_mad niyojya_niyojay

iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha varṣiṇyām_varṣin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
gītāsu_gītā navamaḥ_navama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha pariniṣṭhitasya_pariniṣṭhā arjunasya_arjuna abhīṣṭām_abhīṣ śuddhām_śuddha bhaktim_bhakti upadiśan_upadiś upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ mad--_mad manāḥ_manas iti_iti rāja--_rājan bhaktaḥ_bhakta api_api rāja--_rājan bhṛtyaḥ_bhṛtya patnī--_patnī ādi--_ādi manāḥ_manas tathā_tathā sa_tad tad--_tad manāḥ_manas api_api na_na tad--_tad bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhavati_bhū tvam_tvad tu_tu tad--_tad vilakṣaṇa--_vilakṣaṇa bhāvena_bhāva mad--_mad manāḥ_manas mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhava_bhū mayi_mad nīlotpala--_nīlotpala śyāmala--_śyāmala tva--_tva ādi--_ādi guṇavati_guṇavat vasudeva--_vasudeva sūnau_sūnu sva--_sva svāmitva--_svāmitva sva--_sva pumartha--_pumartha tva--_tva buddhyā_buddhi anavacchinna--_anavacchinna madhu--_madhu dhārāvat_dhārāvat satatam_satatam manaḥ_manas yasya_yad saḥ_tad tathā_tathā mad--_mad yājī_yājin tādṛśasya_tādṛśa atimātra--_atimātra priyasya_priya mama_mad arcane_arcana nirataḥ_niram bhava_bhū tādṛśam_tādṛśa mām_mad ati_ati premṇā_preman namaskuru_namaskṛ daṇḍa--_daṇḍa vat_vat praṇama_praṇam evam_evam ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas deham_deha ca_ca yuktāḥ_yuj mayi_mad nivedya_niveday mad--_mad parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa mad--_mad ekāśrayaḥ_ekāśraya san_as mām_mad upaiṣyasi_upe eṣā_etad bhaktiḥ_bhakti arpitā_arpay eva_eva kriyeta_kṛ iti_iti bodhyam_budh

lg.l: pātra--_pātra apātra--_apātra dhiyā_dhī śūnyā_śūnya sparśāt_sparśa sarva--_sarva agha--_agha nāśinī_nāśin

tam_tad ekam_eka govindam_govinda sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda vigraham_vigraha pañca--_pañcan padam_pada vṛndāvana--_vṛndāvana sura--_sura bhūruha--_bhūruha tala--_tala āsīnam_ās satatam_satatam sa_sa marut--_marut gaṇaḥ_gaṇa aham_mad paramayā_parama stutyā_stuti toṣayāmi_toṣay

BhG 10.1

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
bhūyas_bhūyas eva_eva mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu śṛṇu_śru me_mad paramam_parama vacaḥ_vacas
yat_yad te_tvad aham_mad prīyamāṇāya_prī vakṣyāmi_vac hita--_hita kāmyayā_kāmyā
uktāḥ_vac saṅkṣepataḥ_saṃkṣepa pūrvam_pūrvam saptama--_saptama ādau_ādi vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti
daśame_daśama tāḥ_tad vitanyante_vitan sarvatra_sarvatra īśvara--_īśvara dṛṣṭaye_dṛṣṭi

div.p:
evam_evam tāvat_tāvat saptama--_saptama ādibhiḥ_ādi adhyāyaiḥ_adhyāya bhajanīyam_bhaj parameśvara--_parameśvara tattvam_tattva nirūpitam_nirūpay tad--_tad vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti ca_ca saptame_saptama rasaḥ_rasa aham_mad apsu_ap kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti ādinā_ādi saṅkṣepataḥ_saṃkṣepa darśitāḥ_darśay aṣṭame_aṣṭama ca_ca adhiyajñaḥ_adhiyajña aham_mad eva_eva atra_atra iti_iti ādinā_ādi navame_navama ca_ca aham_mad kratuḥ_kratu aham_mad yajñaḥ_yajña iti_iti ādinā_ādi idānīm_idānīm tāḥ_tad eva_eva vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti prapañcayiṣyan_prapañcay sva--_sva bhakteḥ_bhakti ca_ca avaśya--_avaśya karaṇīya--_kṛ tvam_tva varṇayiṣyan_varṇay bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac bhūyas_bhūyas eva_eva iti_iti mahāntau_mahat yuddha--_yuddha ādi--_ādi svadharma--_svadharma anuṣṭhāne_anuṣṭhāna mahat--_mahat paricaryāyām_paricaryā vā_vā kuśalau_kuśala bāhū_bāhu yasya_yad tathā_tathā he_he mahā--_mahat eva_eva punar_punar api_api me_mad vacaḥ_vacas śṛṇu_śru kathambhūtam_kathaṃbhūta paramam_parama paramātma--_paramātman niṣṭham_niṣṭhā mad--_mad vacana--_vacana amṛtena_amṛta eva_eva prītim_prīti prāpunvate_prapū te_tad tubhyam_tvad
hita--_hita kāmyayā_kāmyā hita--_hita icchayā_icchā yat_yad aham_mad vakṣyāmi_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam saptama--_saptama aṣṭama--_aṣṭama navamaiḥ_navama tad--_tad padārthasya_padārtha bhagavataḥ_bhagavant tattvam_tattva sopādhikam_sopādhika nirupādhikam_nirupādhika ca_ca darśitam_darśay tasya_tad ca_ca vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti sopādhikasya_sopādhika dhyāne_dhyāna nirupādhikasya_nirupādhika jñāne_jñāna ca_ca upāya--_upāya bhūtāḥ_bhū rasaḥ_rasa aham_mad apsu_ap kaunteya_kaunteya iti_iti ādinā_ādi saptame_saptama aham_mad kratuḥ_kratu aham_mad yajña_yajña iti_iti ādinā_ādi navame_navama ca_ca saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa uktāḥ_vac atha_atha idānīm_idānīm tāsām_tad vistaraḥ_vistara vaktavyaḥ_vac bhagavataḥ_bhagavant dhyānāya_dhyāna tattvam_tattva api_api punar_punar tasya_tad vaktavyam_vac jñānāya_jñāna iti_iti daśamaḥ_daśama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya ārabhyate_ārabh tatra_tatra prathamam_prathamam arjunam_arjuna protsāhayitum_protsāhay bhūyas_bhūyas eva_eva iti_iti bhūyas_bhūyas eva_eva punar_punar api_api he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu śṛṇu_śru me_mad mama_mad paramam_parama prakṛṣṭam_prakṛṣṭa vacaḥ_vacas yat_yad te_tvad tubhyam_tvad prīyamāṇāya_prī mad--_mad vacanāt_vacana
amṛta--_amṛta pānāt_pāna iva_iva prītam_prī anubhavate_anubhū vakṣyāmi_vac aham_mad parama--_parama āptaḥ_āp tava_tvad hita--_hita kāmyayā_kāmyā iṣṭa--_iṣ prāpti--_prāpti icchayā_icchā

lg.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha
aiśvaram_aiśvara jñāpayitvā_jñāpay ūce_vac bhaktim_bhakti yat_yat saptama--_saptama ādiṣu_ādi
sa_sa rahasyam_rahasya tat_tad eva_eva uktam_vac daśame_daśama sa_sa vibhūtikam_vibhūtika

div.p: ārādhya--_ārādhay tva--_tva jñāna--_jñāna kāraṇam_kāraṇa aiśvaryam_aiśvarya yat_yad eva_eva pūrvatra_pūrvatra saptama--_saptama ādiṣu_ādi uktam_vac tat_tad eva_eva sa_sa viśeṣam_viśeṣa bhakti--_bhakti matām_mat ānanda--_ānanda artham_artha prapañcayiṣyan_prapañcay parokṣa--_parokṣa vādāḥ_vāda ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi parokṣam_parokṣa ca_ca mama_mad priyam_priya iti_iti nyāyena_nyāya kiñcid_kaścit durbodhatayā_durbodhatā eva_eva āha_ah bhūyas_bhūyas iti_iti punar_punar api_api rāja--_rājan vidyā--_vidyā rāja--_rājan guhyam_guhya idam_idam ucyate_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha he_he mahā--_mahat yathā_yathā bāhu--_bāhu balaḥ_bala sarva--_sarva ādhikyena_ādhikya tvayā_tvad prakāśitam_prakāśay tathā_tathā eva_eva etat_etad buddhyā_buddhi buddhi--_buddhi balam_bala api_api sa_sa vārdhikyena_vārdhikya prakāśayitavyam_prakāśay iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva śṛṇu_śru iti_iti śṛṇvantam_śru api_api tam_tad vakṣyamāṇe_vac arthe_artha samyak_samyak avadhāraṇa--_avadhāraṇa artham_artha paramam_parama pūrva--_pūrva uktāt_vac api_api utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa te_tad tvām_tvad ati_ati vismitīkartum_vismitīkṛ kriyā--_kriyā artha--_artha upapadasya_upapada ca_ca iti_iti caturthī_caturthī yatas_yatas prīyamāṇāya_prī premavate_premavat

lg.l: baladevaḥ_baladeva
saptama--_saptama ādau_ādi nija--_nija aiśvaryam_aiśvarya bhakti--_bhakti hetum_hetu yat_yad īritam_īray
vibhūti--_vibhūti kathanena_kathana atra_atra daśame_daśama tat_tad prapuṣyate_prapuṣ

div.p:
pūrva--_pūrva pūrvatra_pūrvatra sva--_sva aiśvarya--_aiśvarya nirūpaṇa--_nirūpaṇa saṃbhinnā_sambhid sa_sa parikarā_parikara sva--_sva bhaktiḥ_bhakti upadiṣṭā_upadiś idānīm_idānīm tasyāḥ_tad utpattaye_utpatti vivṛddhaye_vivṛddhi ca_ca sva--_sva asādharaṇīḥ_asādharaṇa prāk_prāk saṃkṣipya_saṃkṣip uktāḥ_vac sva--_sva vibhūti--_vibhūti vistareṇa_vistara varṇayiṣyan_varṇay bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac bhūyas_bhūyas iti_iti he_he mahā--_mahat eva_eva punar_punar api_api me_mad paramam_parama vacaḥ_vacas śṛṇu_śru śṛṇvantam_śru prati_prati śṛṇu_śru iti_iti uktiḥ_ukti upadeśye_upadiś arthe_artha samavadhānāya_samavadhāna paramam_parama śrīmat_śrīmat mad--_mad divya--_divya vibhūti--_vibhūti viṣayakam_viṣayaka yat_yad vacaḥ_vacas te_tvad tubhyam_tvad aham_mad hita--_hita kāmyayā_kāmyā vakṣyāmi_vac kriyā--_kriyā artha--_artha upapade_upapada iti_iti ādi_ādi sūtrāt_sūtra caturthī_caturthī vijñam_vijña api_api tvām_tvad vismitam_vismi kartum_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha hita--_hita kāmyayā_kāmyā mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti utpatti--_utpatti tad--_tad vṛddhi--_vṛddhi rūpa--_rūpa tvad--_tvad kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa vāñchā_vāñchā te_tad kīdṛśāya_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah prīyamāṇāya_prī iti_iti pīyūṣa--_pīyūṣa pānāt_pāna
iva_iva mad--_mad vākyāt_vākya prītim_prīti vindate_vid
BhG 10.2

na_na me_mad viduḥ_vid sura--_sura gaṇāḥ_gaṇa prabhavam_prabhava na_na mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi
aham_mad ādiḥ_ādi hi_hi devānām_deva mahā--_mahat ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi ca_ca sarvaśas_sarvaśas

āha_ah viduḥ_vid me_mad mama_mad prakṛṣṭam_prakṛṣṭa bhavam_bhava janma--_janman rahitasya_rahita api_api nānā_nānā vibhūtibhiḥ_vibhūti āvirbhāvam_āvirbhāva sura--_sura gaṇāḥ_gaṇa api_api mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi api_api bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādayaḥ_ādi na_na jānanti_jñā tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu aham_mad hi_hi sarva--_sarva devānām_deva mahā--_mahat ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi ca_ca ādiḥ_ādi kāraṇam_kāraṇa sarvaiḥ_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra utpādaka--_utpādaka tvena_tva buddhi--_buddhi ādi--_ādi pravartaka--_pravartaka tvena_tva atas_atas mad--_mad anugraham_anugraha vinā_vinā mām_mad ke_ka api_api na_na jānanti_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana prāk_prāk bahudhā_bahudhā uktam_vac eva_eva kim_ka artham_artha punar_punar vakṣyasi_vac iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah na_na me_mad viduḥ_vid iti_iti prabhavam_prabhava prabhāvam_prabhāva prabhu--_prabhu śakti--_śakti atiśayam_atiśaya prabhavanam_prabhavana utpattim_utpatti aneka--_aneka vibhūtibhiḥ_vibhūti āvirbhāvam_āvirbhāva vā_vā sura--_sura gaṇāḥ_gaṇa indra--_indra ādayaḥ_ādi mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi ca_ca bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādayaḥ_ādi sarvajñāḥ_sarvajña api_api na_na me_mad viduḥ_vid teṣām_tad tad--_tad ajñāne_ajñāna hetum_hetu āha_ah aham_mad hi_hi yasmāt_yad sarveṣām_sarva devānām_deva mahā--_mahat ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi ca_ca sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarvaiḥ_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra utpādaka--_utpādaka tvena_tva buddhi--_buddhi ādi--_ādi pravartaka--_pravartaka tvena_tva ca_ca nimitta--_nimitta tvena_tva upādāna--_upādāna tvena_tva ca_ca iti_iti vādiḥ_vādi atas_atas mad--_mad vikārāḥ_vikāra te_tad mad--_mad prabhāvam_prabhāva na_na jānanti_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah mama_mad prabhavam_prabhava prakṛṣṭam_prakṛṣṭa sarvam_sarva vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa bhavam_bhava devakyām_devakī janma_janman deva--_deva gaṇāḥ_gaṇa na_na jānanti_jñā te_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya āviṣṭa--_āviś tvāt_tva na_na jānantu_jñā ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi tu_tu jānīyuḥ_jñā tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi api_api tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu aham_mad ādiḥ_ādi kāraṇam_kāraṇa sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarvaiḥ_sarva eva_eva prakāraiḥ_prakāra na_na hi_hi pituḥ_pitṛ janma--_janman tattvam_tattva putrāḥ_putra jānanti_jñā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na hi_hi te_tvad bhagavan_bhagavant vyaktim_vyakti viduḥ_vid devāḥ_deva na_na dānavāḥ_dānava iti_iti agrima--_agrima anuvādāt_anuvāda atra_atra prabhava--_prabhava śabdasya_śabda anya--_anya artha--_artha tā_tā na_na kalpyā_kalpay

baladevaḥ_baladeva etat_etad ca_ca mad--_mad bhakta--_bhakta anukampām_anukampā vinā_vinā durvijñānam_durvijñāna iti_iti bhāvavān_bhāvavat āha_ah na_na me_mad iti_iti sura--_sura gaṇāḥ_gaṇa brahma--_brahman ādayaḥ_ādi mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi ca_ca sanaka--_sanaka ādayaḥ_ādi me_mad prabhavam_prabhava prabhu--_prabhu tvena_tva bhavam_bhava anādi--_anādi divya--_divya svarūpa--_svarūpa guṇa--_guṇa vibhūti--_vibhūti mattayā_mad āvartanam_āvartana iti_iti yāvat_yāvat na_na viduḥ_vid na_na jānanti_jñā kutas_kutas iti_iti āha_ah aham_mad ādiḥ_ādi iti_iti yat_yad aham_mad teṣām_tad ādiḥ_ādi pūrva--_pūrva kāraṇam_kāraṇa sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarvaiḥ_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra utpādaka--_utpādaka tayā_tā buddhi--_buddhi ādi--_ādi dātṛ--_dātṛ tayā_tā ca_ca iti_iti arthaḥ_artha deva--_deva tva--_tva ādikam_ādika aiśvarya--_aiśvarya ādikam_ādika ca_ca mayā_mad eva_eva tebhyaḥ_tad tad--_tad tad--_tad ārādhana--_ārādhana tuṣṭena_tuṣ datta--_dā mataḥ_mata sva--_sva pūrva--_pūrva siddham_sidh mām_mad mad--_mad aiśvaryam_aiśvarya ca_ca te_tad na_na viduḥ_vid śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah

kaḥ_ka addhā_addhā veda_vid kaḥ_ka iha_iha prāvocat_pravac kutas_kutas ā_ā jātā_jan kutas_kutas iyam_idam visṛṣṭiḥ_visṛṣṭi arvāk_arvāk devāḥ_deva asya_idam visarjanāya_visarjana athā_atha kaḥ_ka veda_vid yatas_yatas ābabhūva_ābhū iti_iti
div.l: na_na etat_etad devāḥ_deva āpnuvan_āp pūrvam_pūrva arśat_arśas iti_iti ca_ca evam_evam ādyā_ad

div.p: BhG 10.3

yaḥ_yad mām_mad ajam_aja anādim_anādi ca_ca vetti_vid loka--_loka mahā--_mahat īśvaram_īśvara
asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha sa_tad martyeṣu_martya sarva--_sarva pāpaiḥ_pāpa pramucyate_pramuc

āha_ah sarva--_sarva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvāt_tva eva_eva na_na vidyate_vid ādiḥ_ādi kāraṇam_kāraṇa yasya_yad tam_tad anādim_anādi ataeva_ataeva ajam_aja janma--_janman śūnyam_śūnya lokānām_loka maheśvaram_maheśvara ca_ca mām_mad yaḥ_yad vetti_vid sa_tad manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha saṃmoha--_sammoha rahitaḥ_rahita san_as sarva--_sarva pāpaiḥ_pāpa pramucyate_pramuc

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana mahā--_mahat phala--_phala tvāt_tva ca_ca kaścid_kaścit eva_eva bhagavataḥ_bhagavant prabhāvam_prabhāva vetti_vid iti_iti āha_ah yaḥ_yad mām_mad iti_iti sarva--_sarva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvāt_tva na_na vidyate_vid ādiḥ_ādi kāraṇam_kāraṇa yasya_yad tam_tad anādim_anādi anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva ajam_aja janma--_janman śūnyam_śūnya lokānām_loka mahāntam_mahat īśvaram_īśvara ca_ca mām_mad yaḥ_yad vetti_vid sa_tad martyeṣu_martya madhye_madhya asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha saṃmoha--_sammoha varjitaḥ_varjay pramucyate_pramuc prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ucchedāt_uccheda tad--_tad saṃskāra--_saṃskāra abhāva--_abhāva rūpeṇa_rūpa mucyate_muc muktaḥ_muc bhavati_bhū

jānanti_jñā tatra_tatra sva--_sva tarjanyā_tarjanī sva--_sva vakṣaḥ_vakṣas spṛṣṭvā_spṛś āha_ah yaḥ_yad mām_mad iti_iti yaḥ_yad mām_mad ajam_aja vetti_vid kim_kim parameṣṭhinam_parameṣṭhin na_na anādim_anādi satyam_satya tarhi_tarhi anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva ajam_aja ajanyam_ajanya parma_parman ātmānam_ātman tvām_tvad vetti_vid eva_eva tatra_tatra āha_ah ca_ca iti_iti ajam_aja ajanyam_ajanya vasudeva--_vasudeva janyam_jan ca_ca mām_mad anādim_anādi eva_eva yaḥ_yad vetti_vid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mām_mad iti_iti padena_pada vasudeva--_vasudeva janya--_jan tvam_tva budhyate_budh janma_janman karma_karman ca_ca me_mad divyam_divya iti_iti mad--_mad ukteḥ_ukti mama_mad janmavat--_janmavat tvam_tva paramātma--_paramātman tvāt_tva sadā_sadā eva_eva aja--_aja tvam_tva ca_ca iti_iti ubhayam_ubhaya api_api me_mad paramam_parama satyam_satya acintya--_acintya śakti--_śakti siddham_sidh eva_eva yat_yad uktam_vac ajaḥ_aja api_api san_as avyaya--_avyaya ātmā_ātman sambhavāmi_sambhū iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca uddhava--_uddhava vākyam_vākya karmāṇi_karman anīhasya_anīha bhavaḥ_bhava abhavasya_abhava te_tvad iti_iti ādi--_ādi anantaram_anantara khidyati_khid dhīḥ_dhī vidām_vid iha_iha iti_iti atra_atra śrī--_śrī bhāgavatāmṛta--_bhāgavatāmṛta kārikā_kārikā ca_ca

lg.l: tat_tad tat_tad na_na vāstavam_vāstava ced_ced syāt_as vidām_vid buddhi--_buddhi bhramaḥ_bhrama tadā_tadā
na_na syāt_as eva_eva iti_iti atas_atas acintyā_acintya śaktiḥ_śakti līlāsu_līlā kāraṇam_kāraṇa

div.p: tasmāt_tasmāt yathā_yathā mama_mad bālye_bālya dāmodara--_dāmodara tva--_tva līlāyām_līlā ekadā_ekadā eva_eva kiṅkiṇyāḥ_kiṅkiṇī bandhanāt_bandhana paricchinna--_paricchid tvam_tva dāmnā_dāman sva--_sva ābandhāt_ābandha aparicchinna--_aparicchinna tvam_tva ca_ca atarkyam_atarkya eva_eva tathā_tathā eva_eva mama_mad aja--_aja tva--_tva janmavat--_janmavat tve_tva ca_ca atarkye_atarkya eva_eva durbodham_durbodha aiśvaryam_aiśvarya ca_ca āha_ah loka--_loka mahā--_mahat īśvaram_īśvara tava_tvad sārathim_sārathi api_api sarveṣām_sarva lokānām_loka mahāntam_mahat īśvaram_īśvara yaḥ_yad veda_vid saḥ_tad eva_eva martyeṣu_martya madhye_madhya asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha sarva--_sarva pāpaiḥ_pāpa bhakti--_bhakti virodhibhiḥ_virodhin yaḥ_yad tu_tu ajatva--_ajatva anāditva--_anāditva sarva--_sarva īśvara--_īśvara tvāni_tva eva_eva vāstavāni_vāstava syuḥ_as janmavat--_janmavat tva--_tva ādīni_ādi tu_tu anukaraṇa--_anukaraṇa mātra--_mātra siddhāni_sidh iti_iti vyācaṣṭe_vyācakṣ sa_tad saṃmūḍhaḥ_sammuh eva_eva sarva--_sarva pāpaiḥ_pāpa na_na pramucyate_pramuc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva idam_idam tādṛśa--_tādṛśa mad--_mad viṣayakam_viṣayaka jñānam_jñāna kasyacid_kaścit eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah yaḥ_yad mām_mad iti_iti martyeṣu_martya yatamāneṣu_yat api_api sahasreṣu_sahasra madhye_madhya yaḥ_yad yādṛcchika--_yādṛcchika mattatva--_mattatva vid_vid sat--_sat prasaṅgī_prasaṅgin kaścid_kaścit janaḥ_jana mām_mad anādim_anādi ajam_aja loka--_loka mahā--_mahat īśvaram_īśvara ca_ca vetti_vid saḥ_tad asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha sarva--_sarva pāpaiḥ_pāpa pramucyate_pramuc iti_iti sambandhaḥ_sambandha atra_atra ajam_aja iti_iti anena_idam pradhānāt_pradhāna acit--_acit vargāt_varga saṃsāri--_saṃsārin vargāt_varga ca_ca bhedaḥ_bheda ādyasya_ādya sva--_sva pariṇāmena_pariṇāma antasya_anta deha--_deha janmanā_janman ca_ca janmi--_janmin tvāt_tva anādim_anādi iti_iti anena_idam tu_tu mukta--_muc cit--_cit vargāt_varga ca_ca bhedaḥ_bheda tasya_tad aja--_aja tvam_tva ādima--_ādima deva--_deva deha--_deha sambandhena_sambandha janmi--_janmin tvasya_tva pūrva--_pūrva vṛtti--_vṛtti tvāt_tva loka--_loka maheśvaram_maheśvara iti_iti anena_idam nitya--_nitya mukta--_muc cit--_cit vargāt_varga prakṛti--_prakṛti kālābhyām_kāla ca_ca bhedaḥ_bheda sati_as api_api loka--_loka maheśvara--_maheśvara tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva punar_punar anādimaḥ_anādima iti_iti anena_idam viśeṣite_viśeṣay vidhi--_vidhi rudra--_rudra ādibhyām_ādi ca_ca bhedaḥ_bheda tayoḥ_tad loka--_loka maheśvara--_maheśvara tāyāḥ_tā sādi--_sādin tvāt_tva sarva--_sarva aiśvareṇa_aiśvara eva_eva tayoḥ_tad sā_tad iti_iti anyatra_anyatra vistaraḥ_vistara ittham_ittham ca_ca sarvadā_sarvadā heya--_hā sambandha--_sambandha abhāvāt_abhāva nitya--_nitya siddha--_sidh sārvaiśvaryāt_sārvaiśvarya ca_ca sarva--_sarva itara--_itara vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa yaḥ_yad vetti_vid sa_tad mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti utpatti--_utpatti pratīpaiḥ_pratīpa nikhilaiḥ_nikhila karmabhiḥ_karman vimuktaḥ_vimuc mad--_mad bhaktim_bhakti vindati_vid asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha anya--_anya sajātīya--_sajātīya tayā_tā mad--_mad jñānam_jñāna sa_sa amohaḥ_amoha tena_tad vivarjitaḥ_vivarjay na_na ca_ca devakyām_devakī jātasya_jan te_tvad katham_katham aja--_aja tvam_tva tasyām_tad aja--_aja tvam_tva a_a vihāya_vihā eva_eva jāta--_jan tvāt_tva

buddhiḥ_buddhi jñānam_jñāna asaṃmohaḥ_asaṃmoha kṣamā_kṣamā satyam_satya damaḥ_dama śamaḥ_śama
sukham_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha bhavaḥ_bhava abhāvaḥ_abhāva bhayam_bhaya ca_ca abhayam_abhaya eva_eva ca_ca

lg.l: ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā sama--_sama tā_tā tuṣṭiḥ_tuṣṭi tapaḥ_tapas dānam_dāna yaśaḥ_yaśas ayaśaḥ_ayaśas
bhavanti_bhū bhāvāḥ_bhāva bhūtānām_bhūta mattaḥ_mad eva_eva pṛthagvidhāḥ_pṛthagvidha

div.p: sphuṭayati_sphuṭay buddhiḥ_buddhi sāra--_sāra asāra--_asāra viveka--_viveka naipuṇyam_naipuṇya jñānam_jñāna ātma--_ātman viṣayam_viṣaya asaṃmohaḥ_asaṃmoha vyākula--_vyākula tva--_tva abhāvaḥ_abhāva kṣamā_kṣamā sahiṣṇu--_sahiṣṇu tvam_tva satyam_satya yathārtha--_yathārtha bhāṣaṇam_bhāṣaṇa sukham_sukha manaḥ_manas anukūla--_anukūla saṃvedanīyam_saṃvid duḥkham_duḥkha ca_ca tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta bhavaḥ_bhava udbhavaḥ_udbhava abhāvaḥ_abhāva tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta bhayam_bhaya trāsaḥ_trāsa abhayam_abhaya tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta asya_idam ślokasya_śloka mattaḥ_mad eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara anvayaḥ_anvaya

kim_ka ca_ca ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā iti_iti tuṣṭiḥ_tuṣṭi daiva--_daiva labdhena_labh santoṣaḥ_saṃtoṣa tapaḥ_tapas śāstrīya--_śāstrīya ādi--_ādi vakṣyamāṇam_vac dānam_dāna nyāya--_nyāya arjitasya_arjay dhana--_dhana ādeḥ_ādi pātre_pātra arpaṇam_arpaṇa yaśaḥ_yaśas sat--_sat kīrtiḥ_kīrti ayaśaḥ_ayaśas duṣkīrtiḥ_duṣkīrti ete_etad buddhiḥ_buddhi jñānam_jñāna iti_iti ādayaḥ_ādi tad--_tad viparītāḥ_viparīta ca_ca abuddhi--_abuddhi ādayaḥ_ādi nānā_nānā vidhāḥ_vidha bhāvāḥ_bhāva prāṇinām_prāṇin mattaḥ_mad mad--_mad sakāśāt_sakāśa eva_eva bhavanti_bhū

prapañcayati_prapañcay buddhiḥ_buddhi antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa jñānam_jñāna ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman sarva--_sarva padārtha--_padārtha avabodhaḥ_avabodha asaṃmohaḥ_asaṃmoha pratyutpanneṣu_pratyutpad bodhavyeṣu_budh kartavyeṣu_kṛ vyākula--_vyākula tayā_tā vivekena_viveka pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti kṣamā_kṣamā ākruṣṭasya_ākruś tāḍitasya_tāḍay vā_vā nirvikāra--_nirvikāra citta--_citta tā_tā satyam_satya pramāṇena_pramāṇa avabuddhasya_avabudh arthasya_artha tathā_tathā eva_eva bhāṣaṇam_bhāṣaṇa damaḥ_dama bāhya--_bāhya indriyāṇām_indriya sva--_sva viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti śamaḥ_śama antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa śama--_śama tā_tā sukham_sukha dharma--_dharma asādhāraṇa--_asādhāraṇa kāraṇakam_kāraṇaka anukūla--_anukūla vedanīyam_vid duḥkham_duḥkha adharma--_adharma asādhāraṇa--_asādhāraṇa kāraṇakam_kāraṇaka pratikūla--_pratikūla vedanīyam_vid bhavaḥ_bhava utpattiḥ_utpatti bhāvaḥ_bhāva sattā_sattā abhāvaḥ_abhāva asattā_asattā iti_iti vā_vā bhayam_bhaya ca_ca trāsaḥ_trāsa tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta abhayam_abhaya eva_eva ca_ca ekaḥ_eka ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra ukta--_vac samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha eva_eva iti_iti ete_etad sarva--_sarva loka--_loka prasiddhāḥ_prasidh eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mattaḥ_mad eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara anvayaḥ_anvaya

ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā prāṇinām_prāṇin pīḍāyāḥ_pīḍā niviṛttiḥ_niviṛtti tuṣṭiḥ_tuṣṭi bhogyeṣu_bhuj etāvatā_etāvat alam_alam iti_iti buddhiḥ_buddhi tapaḥ_tapas śāstrīya--_śāstrīya mārgeṇa_mārga kāya--_kāya indriya--_indriya śoṣaṇam_śoṣaṇa dānam_dāna deśe_deśa kāle_kāla śraddhayā_śraddhā yathā_yathā śakti--_śakti arthānām_artha sat--_sat pātre_pātra samarpaṇam_samarpaṇa yaśaḥ_yaśas dharma--_dharma nimittā_nimitta loka--_loka ślāghā--_ślāghā rūpā_rūpa prasiddhiḥ_prasiddhi ayaśaḥ_ayaśas tu_tu adharma--_adharma nimittā_nimitta loka--_loka nindā--_nindā rūpā_rūpa prasiddhiḥ_prasiddhi ete_etad buddhi--_buddhi ādayaḥ_ādi bhāvāḥ_bhāva kārya--_kārya viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa sa_sa kāraṇakāḥ_kāraṇaka pṛthag_pṛthag vidhāḥ_vidha dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma ādi--_ādi sādhana--_sādhana vaicitryeṇa_vaicitrya nānā_nānā vidhāḥ_vidha bhūtānām_bhūta sarveṣām_sarva prāṇinām_prāṇin mattaḥ_mad parameśvarāt_parameśvara eva_eva bhavanti_bhū na_na anyasmāt_anya
loka--_loka maheśvara--_maheśvara tvam_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha na_na ca_ca śāstra--_śāstra jñāḥ_jña sva--_sva buddhi--_buddhi ādibhiḥ_ādi mattatvam_mattatva jñātum_jñā śaknuvanti_śak yatas_yatas buddhi--_buddhi ādīnām_ādi sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi vat_vat māyā--_māyā guṇa--_guṇa janya--_jan tvāt_tva mattaḥ_mad eva_eva jātānām_jan api_api guṇa--_guṇa atīte_atī mayi_mad na_na asti_as svatas_svatas praveśa_praveśa sūkṣma--_sūkṣma artha--_artha niścaya--_niścaya sāmarthyam_sāmarthya jñānam_jñāna ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman vivekaḥ_viveka asaṃmohaḥ_asaṃmoha vaiyagrya--_vaiyagrya abhāvaḥ_abhāva ete_etad trayaḥ_tri bhāvāḥ_bhāva mad--_mad tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna hetu--_hetu tvena_tva sambhāvyamānāḥ_sambhāvay iva_iva na_na tu_tu hetavaḥ_hetu prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga anyān_anya api_api bhāvān_bhāva lokeṣu_loka dṛṣṭān_dṛś na_na svatas_svatas evā_eva udbhūtān_udbhū āha_ah kṣamā_kṣamā sahiṣṇu--_sahiṣṇu tvam_tva satyam_satya yathārtha--_yathārtha bhāṣaṇam_bhāṣaṇa ete_etad sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika sukham_sukha sāttvikam_sāttvika duḥkham_duḥkha tāmasam_tāmasa bhava--_bhava abhāvau_abhāva janma--_janman mṛtyu--_mṛtyu duḥkha--_duḥkha viśeṣau_viśeṣa bhayam_bhaya tāmasam_tāmasa abhayam_abhaya jñāna--_jñāna uttham_uttha sāttvikam_sāttvika samatā--_samatā ātma--_ātman aupamyena_aupamya sarvatra_sarvatra sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi darśanam_darśana ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā samate_samatā sāttvikyau_sāttvika tuṣṭiḥ_tuṣṭi santuṣṭiḥ_santuṣṭi sā_tad nirupādhiḥ_nirupādhi sāttvikī_sāttvika sa_sa upādhiḥ_upādhi tu_tu rājasī_rājasa tapaḥ--_tapas dāne_dāna api_api sa_sa upādhi--_upādhi nirupādi--_nirupādi tvābhyām_tva sāttvika--_sāttvika rājase_rājasa yaśaḥ_yaśas ayaśasi_ayaśas api_api tathā_tathā mattaḥ_mad iti_iti ete_etad mad--_mad māyātaḥ_māyā bhavantaḥ_bhū api_api śakti--_śakti śaktimatoḥ_śaktimat aikyāt_aikya mattaḥ_mad eva_eva

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha ātmanaḥ_ātman sarva--_sarva ādi--_ādi tvam_tva sarva--_sarva īśvara--_īśvara tvam_tva ca_ca prapañcayati_prapañcay buddhiḥ_buddhi iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi buddhiḥ_buddhi sūkṣma--_sūkṣma artha--_artha vivecana--_vivecana sāmarthyam_sāmarthya jñānam_jñāna cit--_cit acit--_acit vastu--_vastu vivecanam_vivecana asaṃmohaḥ_asaṃmoha vyagra--_vyagra tva--_tva abhāvaḥ_abhāva kṣamā_kṣamā sahiṣṇu--_sahiṣṇu tā_tā satyam_satya yathā_yathā dṛṣṭa--_dṛś artha--_artha viṣayam_viṣaya para--_para hita--_hita bhāṣaṇam_bhāṣaṇa damaḥ_dama anartha--_anartha viṣayāt_viṣaya śoka--_śoka ādeḥ_ādi niyamanam_niyamana śamaḥ_śama tasmāt_tad manasaḥ_manas sukham_sukha ānukūlyena_ānukūlya vedyam_vid duḥkham_duḥkha tu_tu prātikūlyena_prātikūlya vedyam_vid bhavaḥ_bhava janma_janman abhāvaḥ_abhāva mṛtyuḥ_mṛtyu bhayam_bhaya āgāmi--_āgāmin duḥkha--_duḥkha kāraṇa--_kāraṇa vīkṣaṇāt_vīkṣaṇa vitrāsaḥ_vitrāsa san_as nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti abhayam_abhaya ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā para--_para pīḍana--_pīḍana ajanaka--_ajanaka tā_tā sama--_sama tā_tā rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa śūnya--_śūnya tā_tā tuṣṭiḥ_tuṣṭi adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa labdhena_labh santoṣaḥ_saṃtoṣa tapaḥ_tapas veda--_veda ukta--_vac kāya--_kāya kleśaḥ_kleśa dānam_dāna sva--_sva bhogyasya_bhuj sat--_sat pātre_pātra arpaṇam_arpaṇa yaśaḥ_yaśas sādguṇya--_sādguṇya khyātiḥ_khyāti tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta ayaśaḥ_ayaśas evam_evam ādayaḥ_ādi bhāvāḥ_bhāva bhūtānām_bhūta deva--_deva mānava--_mānava ādīnām_ādi mattaḥ_mad mad--_mad saṅkalpāt_saṃkalpa eva_eva bhavanti_bhū iti_iti aham_mad eva_eva teṣām_tad hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pṛthag-vidhā_pṛthagvidha bhinna--_bhid lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa
BhG 10.6

mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi sapta_saptan pūrve_pūrva catvāraḥ_catur manavaḥ_manu tathā_tathā
mānasāḥ_mānasa jātāḥ_jan yeṣām_yad loke_loka imāḥ_idam prajāḥ_prajā

sapta_saptan mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādayaḥ_ādi sapta_saptan brahmāṇaḥ_brahman iti_iti ete_etad purāṇe_purāṇa niścayam_niścaya gatāḥ_gam iti_iti ādi_ādi purāṇa--_purāṇa prasiddhāḥ_prasidh tebhyaḥ_tad api_api pūrve_pūrva anye_anya catvāraḥ_catur mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi sanaka--_sanaka ādayaḥ_ādi tathā_tathā manavaḥ_manu svāyambhuva--_svāyambhuva ādayaḥ_ādi mad--_mad bhāvāḥ_bhāva madīyaḥ_madīya bhāvaḥ_bhāva prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva yeṣu_yad te_tad hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ātmanaḥ_ātman mama_mad eva_eva manasaḥ_manas saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa mātrāt_mātra jātāḥ_jan prabhāvam_prabhāva eva_eva āha_ah yeṣām_yad iti_iti yeṣām_yad bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādīnām_ādi sanaka--_sanaka ādīnām_ādi manūnām_manu ca_ca imāḥ_idam brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādyāḥ_ādya loke_loka vardhamānāḥ_vṛdh yathāyatham_yathāyatham putra--_putra pautra--_pautra ādi--_ādi rūpāḥ_rūpa śiṣa--_śiṣa praśiṣya--_praśiṣya ādi--_ādi rūpāḥ_rūpa
ca_ca prajāḥ_prajā jātāḥ_jan pravartante_pravṛt

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana itas_itas ca_ca etat_etad evam_evam mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi iti_iti mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi veda--_veda tad--_tad artha--_artha draṣṭāraḥ_draṣṭṛ sarvajñāḥ_sarvajña vidyā--_vidyā sampradāya--_sampradāya pravartakāḥ_pravartaka bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādyāḥ_ādya sapta_saptan pūrve_pūrva sarga--_sarga ādya--_ādya kāla--_kāla āvirbhūtāḥ_āvirbhū

bhṛgum_bhṛgu marīcim_marīci atrim_atri ca_ca pulastyam_pulastya pulaham_pulaha kratum_kratu vasiṣṭham_vasiṣṭha ca_ca mahā--_mahat tejāḥ_tejas saḥ_tad asṛjat_sṛj manasā_manas sutān_suta sapta_saptan brahmaṇaḥ_brahman iti_iti ete_etad purāṇe_purāṇa niścayam_niścaya gatāḥ_gam

tathā_tathā catvāraḥ_catur manavaḥ_manu sāvarṇāḥ_sāvarṇa iti_iti prasiddhāḥ_prasidh athavā_athavā mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi sapta_saptan bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādyāḥ_ādya tebhyaḥ_tad api_api pūrve_pūrva prathamāḥ_prathama catvāraḥ_catur sanaka--_sanaka ādyāḥ_ādya mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi manavaḥ_manu tathā_tathā svāyambhuva--_svāyambhuva ādayaḥ_ādi caturdaśa_caturdaśan mayi_mad parameśvare_parameśvara bhāvaḥ_bhāva bhāvanā_bhāvanā yeṣām_yad te_tad mad--_mad bhāvāḥ_bhāva mad--_mad cintana--_cintana parāḥ_para mad--_mad bhāvanā--_bhāvanā vaśāt_vaśa āvīri--_āvīrin bhūta--_bhū madīya--_madīya jñāna--_jñāna aiśvarya--_aiśvarya śaktayaḥ_śakti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mānasāḥ_mānasa manasaḥ_manas saṅkalpāt_saṃkalpa evā_eva utpannāḥ_utpad na_na tu_tu yoni--_yoni jāḥ_ja atas_atas viśuddha--_viśudh janma--_janman tvena_tva sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin śreṣṭhāḥ_śreṣṭha mattaḥ_mad eva_eva hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ātmanaḥ_ātman jātāḥ_jan sarga--_sarga ādya--_ādya kāle_kāla prādurbhūtāḥ_prādurbhū yeṣām_yad mahā--_mahat ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi saptānām_saptan bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādīnām_ādi catūrṇām_catur ca_ca sanaka--_sanaka ādīnām_ādi
manūnām_manu ca_ca caturdaśānām_caturdaśa asmin_idam loke_loka janmanā_janman ca_ca vidyayā_vidyā ca_ca santati--_saṃtati bhūtāḥ_bhū imāḥ_idam brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādyāḥ_ādya sarvāḥ_sarva prajāḥ_prajā
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha buddhi--_buddhi jñāna--_jñāna asaṃmohān_asaṃmoha sva--_sva tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna asamarthān_asamartha uktvā_vac tattvāt_tattva api_api tatra_tatra asamarthān_asamartha āha_ah mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi sapta_saptan marīci--_marīci ādayaḥ_ādi tebhyaḥ_tad api_api pūrve_pūrva anye_anya catvāraḥ_catur sanaka--_sanaka ādayaḥ_ādi manavaḥ_manu hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ātmanaḥ_ātman sakāśāt_sakāśa bhavaḥ_bhava janma_janman yeṣām_yad marīci--_marīci ādīnām_ādi sanaka--_sanaka ādīnām_ādi ca_ca imāḥ_idam brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādyāḥ_ādya loke_loka vartamānāḥ_vṛt prajāḥ_prajā putra--_putra pautra--_pautra ādi--_ādi rūpāḥ_rūpa śiṣya--_śiṣya praśiṣya--_praśiṣya rūpāḥ_rūpa ca_ca
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva itas_itas ca_ca etat_etad evam_evam iti_iti āha_ah mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi iti_iti sapta_saptan bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādayaḥ_ādi tebhyaḥ_tad api_api pūrve_pūrva prathamāḥ_prathama catvāraḥ_catur sanaka--_sanaka ādayaḥ_ādi ekādaśā_ekādaśan ete_etad mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi tathā_tathā manavaḥ_manu caturdaśa_caturdaśan svāyambhuva--_svāyambhuva ādayaḥ_ādi evam_evam pañcaviṃśatiḥ_pañcaviṃśati ete_etad mānasāḥ_mānasa hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha mad--_mad cintana--_cintana parāḥ_para tad--_tad prabhāvena_prabhāva upalabdha--_upalabh mad--_mad jñāna--_jñāna aiśvarya--_aiśvarya śaktayaḥ_śakti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yeṣām_yad bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādīnām_ādi pañcaviṃśateḥ_pañcaviṃśati imāḥ_idam brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa kṣatriya--_kṣatriya ādayaḥ_ādi prajāḥ_prajā janmanā_janman vidyayā_vidyā ca_ca santati--_saṃtati rūpāḥ_rūpa bhavanti_bhū
BhG 10.7

lg.l: etām_etad vibhūtim_vibhūti yogam_yoga ca_ca mama_mad yaḥ_yad vetti_vid tattvataḥ_tattva
saḥ_tad avikampena_avikampa yogena_yoga yujyate_yuj na_na atra_atra saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya

div.p: āha_ah etām_etad bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa mama_mad vibhūtim_vibhūti yogam_yoga ca_ca aiśvarya--_aiśvarya lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa tattvataḥ_tattva yaḥ_yad vetti_vid saḥ_tad avikalpena_avikalpa niḥsaṃśayena_niḥsaṃśaya yogena_yoga samyak_samyak darśanena_darśana yuktaḥ_yuj bhavati_bhū na_na asti_as atra_atra saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam sopādhikasya_sopādhika bhagavataḥ_bhagavant prabhāvam_prabhāva uktvā_vac tad--_tad jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala āha_ah etām_etad iti_iti etām_etad prāk_prāk uktām_vac buddhi--_buddhi ādi--_ādi mahā--_mahat ṛṣi--_ṛṣi ādi--_ādi rūpām_rūpa vibhūtim_vibhūti vividha--_vividha bhāvam_bhāva tad--_tad tad--_tad rūpeṇa_rūpa avasthitim_avasthiti yogam_yoga ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad artha--_artha nirmāṇa--_nirmāṇa sāmarthyam_sāmarthya parama--_parama aiśvaryam_aiśvarya iti_iti yāvat_yāvat mama_mad yaḥ_yad vetti_vid tattvataḥ_tattva yathāvat_yathāvat saḥ_tad avikampena_avikampa apracalitena_apracalita yogena_yoga samyak_samyak jñāna--_jñāna sthairya--_sthairya lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa samādhinā_samādhi yujyate_yuj na_na atra_atra saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya pratibandhaḥ_pratibandha kaścid_kaścit

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kintu_kiṃtu bhaktyā_bhakti aham_mad ekayā_eka grāhyaḥ_grah iti_iti mad--_mad ukteḥ_ukti mad--_mad ananya--_ananya bhaktaḥ_bhakta eva_eva mad--_mad prasādāt_prasāda mad--_mad vāci_vāc dṛḍham_dṛḍha āstikyam_āstikya dadhānaḥ_dhā mad--_mad tattvam_tattva vetti_vid iti_iti āha_ah etām_etad saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa eva_eva vakṣyamāṇām_vac bhakti--_bhakti yogam_yoga ca_ca yaḥ_yad tattvataḥ_tattva vetti_vid mad--_mad prabhoḥ_prabhu śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa vākya--_vākya tvāt_tva idam_idam eva_eva paramam_parama tattvam_tattva iti_iti dṛḍhatara--_dṛḍhatara āstikyavān_āstikyavat eva_eva yaḥ_yad vetti_vid saḥ_tad avikalpena_avikalpa niścalena_niścala yogena_yoga mad--_mad tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa yujyate_yuj yuktaḥ_yuj bhavet_bhū atra_atra na_na asti_as kaḥ_ka api_api sandehaḥ_saṃdeha

baladevaḥ_baladeva :--_vac artha--_artha jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala āha_ah etām_etad iti_iti etām_etad vidhi--_vidhi rudra--_rudra ādi--_ādi devatā--_devatā sanaka--_sanaka ādi--_ādi mahā--_mahat ṛṣi--_ṛṣi svāyambhuva--_svāyambhuva ādi--_ādi manu--_manu pramukhaḥ_pramukha kṛtsn--_kṛtsna prapañcaḥ_prapañca mad--_mad adhīna--_adhīna sthiti--_sthiti pravṛtti--_pravṛtti jñāna--_jñāna aiśvarya--_aiśvarya śaktikaḥ_śaktika bhavati_bhū iti_iti evam_evam pāramaiśvarya--_pāramaiśvarya lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa yogam_yoga anādi--_anādi aja--_aja tva--_tva ādibhiḥ_ādi kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa ratnaiḥ_ratna mama_mad sambandham_sambandha ca_ca yaḥ_yad vetti_vid sarveśvareṇa_sarveśvara sarvajñena_sarvajña vāsudevena_vāsudeva upadiṣṭam_upadiś idam_idam tāttvikam_tāttvika bhavati_bhū iti_iti dṛḍha--_dṛḍha viśvāsena_viśvāsa yaḥ_yad gṛhṇāti_grah sa_tad yujyate_yuj sampannaḥ_sampad bhavati_bhū etādṛśa--_etādṛśa tayā_tā mad--_mad jñānam_jñāna mad--_mad bhakteḥ_bhakti utpādakam_utpādaka vivardhakam_vivardhaka ca_ca iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 10.8

lg.l: aham_mad sarvasya_sarva prabhavaḥ_prabhava mattaḥ_mad sarvam_sarva pravartate_pravṛt
matvā_man bhajante_bhaj mām_mad budhāḥ_budha bhāva--_bhāva samanvitāḥ_samanvita

div.p: darśayati_darśay aham_mad sarvasya_sarva jagataḥ_jagant prabhavaḥ_prabhava bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādi--_ādi manu--_manu ādi--_ādi rūpa--_rūpa vibhūti--_vibhūti dvāreṇa_dvāra utpatti--_utpatti hetuḥ_hetu mattaḥ_mad eva_eva ca_ca sarvasya_sarva buddhiḥ_buddhi jñānam_jñāna asaṃmohaḥ_asaṃmoha iti_iti ādi_ādi sarvam_sarva pravartate_pravṛt iti_iti evam_evam matvā_man avabudhya_avabudh budhāḥ_budha vivekinaḥ_vivekin bhāva--_bhāva samanvitāḥ_samanvita prīti--_prīti yuktāḥ_yuj mām_mad bhajante_bhaj

darśayati_darśay aham_mad param_para brahma_brahman vāsudeva--_vāsudeva ākhyam_ākhyā sarvasya_sarva jagataḥ_jagant prabhavaḥ_prabhava utpatti--_utpatti kāraṇam_kāraṇa upādānam_upādāna nimittam_nimitta ca_ca sthiti--_sthiti nāśa--_nāśa ādi_ādi ca_ca sarvam_sarva sattaḥ_sattṛ eva_eva pravartate_pravṛt bhavati_bhū mayā_mad eva_eva antaryāmiṇā_antaryāmin sarvajñena_sarvajña sarva--_sarva śaktinā_śakti preryamāṇam_preray sva--_sva sva--_sva maryādām_maryādā an_an atikramya_atikram sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant pravartate_pravṛt ceṣṭate_ceṣṭ iti_iti vā_vā iti_iti evam_evam matvā_man budhāḥ_budha vivekena_viveka avagata--_avagam tattva--_tattva bhāvena_bhāva paramārtha--_paramārtha tattva--_tattva grahaṇa--_grahaṇa a_a rūpeṇa_rūpa premṇā_preman samanvitāḥ_samanvita santaḥ_as mām_mad bhajante_bhaj

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatra_tatra mahā--_mahat aiśvarya--_aiśvarya lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa vibhūtim_vibhūti āha_ah aham_mad sarvasya_sarva prākṛta--_prākṛta aprākṛta--_aprākṛta vastu--_vastu mātrasya_mātra prabhavaḥ_prabhava utpatti--_utpatti prādurbhāvayoḥ_prādurbhāva hetuḥ_hetu mattaḥ_mad eva_eva antaryāmi--_antaryāmin svarūpāt_svarūpa sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant pravartate_pravṛt ca_ca īsṭate_īsṭ tathā_tathā mattaḥ_mad eva_eva nārada--_nārada ādi--_ādi avatara--_avatara ātmakāt_ātmaka sarvam_sarva bhakti--_bhakti jñāna--_jñāna tapaḥ--_tapas karma--_karman ādikam_ādika sādhanam_sādhana tat_tad tat_tad sādhyam_sādhay ca_ca pravṛttam_pravṛt bhavati_bhū aikāntika--_aikāntika bhakti--_bhakti lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa yogam_yoga āha_ah iti_iti matvā_man āstikyataḥ_āstikya jñānena_jñāna niścitya_niści iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhāvaḥ_bhāva dāsya--_dāsya sakhya--_sakhya ādiḥ_ādi tad--_tad yuktāḥ_yuj

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha catuḥślokyā_catuḥślokī parama--_parama ekāntinām_ekāntin bhaktim_bhakti bruvan_brū tasyāḥ_tad janakam_janaka poṣakam_poṣaka ca_ca ātma--_ātman yāthātmyam_yāthātmya tāvat_tāvat āha_ah aham_mad iti_iti svayam_svayam bhagavān_bhagavant kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa aham_mad sarvasya_sarva asya_idam vidhi--_vidhi rudra--_rudra pramukhasya_pramukha prapañcasya_prapañca prabhavaḥ_prabhava hetuḥ_hetu evam_evam eva_eva atharvasu_atharvan paṭhyate_paṭh yaḥ_yad brahmāṇam_brahman vidadhāti_vidhā pūrvam_pūrvam yaḥ_yad vai_vai vedān_veda ca_ca gāpayati_gāpay sma_sma kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa iti_iti atha_atha puruṣaḥ_puruṣa ha_ha vai_vai nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa akāmayata_kāmay prajāḥ_prajā sṛjaye_sṛj iti_iti upakramya_upakram nārāyaṇāt_nārāyaṇa brahmā_brahman jāyate_jan nārāyaṇāt_nārāyaṇa prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati prajāyate_prajan nārāyaṇāt_nārāyaṇa indraḥ_indra jāyate_jan nārāyaṇāt_nārāyaṇa aṣṭau_aṣṭan vasavaḥ_vasu jāyante_jan dvādaśa_dvādaśan ādityāḥ_āditya iti_iti ādi_ādi eṣa_etad nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa bodhyaḥ_bodhya brahmaṇyaḥ_brahmaṇya devakī--_devakī putraḥ_putra iti_iti ādi--_ādi uttara--_uttara pāṭhāt_pāṭha tat_tad āhuḥ_ah ekaḥ_eka vai_vai
