nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa āsīt_as na_na brahmā_brahman na_na īśānaḥ_īśāna na_na apaḥ_ap nāgī_nāgī samau_sama na_na ime_idam dyau_div āpṛthivī_āpṛthivī na_na nakṣatrāṇi_nakṣatra na_na sūryaḥ_sūrya saḥ_tad ekākī_ekākin na_na ramate_ram tasya_tad dhyāna--_dhyāna antaḥsthasya_antaḥstha yatra_yatra ucyate_vac iti_iti ādi_ādi upakramya_upakram pradhāna--_pradhāna ādi--_ādi sṛṣṭim_sṛṣṭi abhidhāya_abhidhā atha_atha punar_punar eva_eva nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa saḥ_tad anyat_anya kāmaḥ_kāma manasā_manas dhyāyata_dhyā tasya_tad dhyāna--_dhyāna atas_atas sthasya_stha śūlapāṇiḥ_śūlapāṇi puruṣaḥ_puruṣa ajāyata_jan bibhrat_bhṛ śriyam_śrī satyam_satya tapaḥ_tapas vairāgyam_vairāgya iti_iti tatra_tatra catur--_catur mukhaḥ_mukha jāyate_jan iti_iti ādi_ādi ca_ca ṛkṣu_ṛc ca_ca yam_yad kāmaye_kāmay tam_tad tam_tad ugram_ugra kṛṣṇomi_kṛṣ tam_tad brahmāṇam_brahman tam_tad ṛṣim_ṛṣi tam_tad sumedhasam_sumedhas iti_iti ādi_ādi mokṣa--_mokṣa dharme_dharma
prajāpatim_prajāpati ca_ca rudram_rudra ca_ca api_api aham_mad eva_eva sṛjāmi_sṛj vai_vai tau_tad hi_hi mām_mad vijānītaḥ_vijñā mama_mad māyā--_māyā vimohitau_vimohay

vārāhe_vārāha ca_ca nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa paraḥ_para devaḥ_deva tasmāt_tad jātaḥ_jan caturmukhaḥ_caturmukha tasmāt_tad rudraḥ_rudra abhavat_bhū devaḥ_deva sa_tad ca_ca sarvajña--_sarvajña tām_tā gataḥ_gam

mad--_mad anya--_anya nikhila--_nikhila niyantā_niyantṛ ca_ca aham_mad iti_iti uktam_vac iti_iti matvā_man mama_mad īdṛśa--_īdṛśa tvam_tva sat--_sat guru--_guru mukhāt_mukha niścitya_niści bhāvena_bhāva premṇā_preman samanvitāḥ_samanvita santaḥ_sat budhāḥ_budha mām_mad bhajante_bhaj
BhG 10.9

lg.l: mad--_mad cittāḥ_citta mad--_mad gata--_gam prāṇāḥ_prāṇa bodhayantaḥ_bodhay parasparam_paraspara
kathayantaḥ_kathay ca_ca mām_mad nityam_nityam tuṣyanti_tuṣ ca_ca ramanti_ram ca_ca

div.p: āha_ah mayi_mad eva_eva cittam_citta yeṣām_yad te_tad mad--_mad cittāḥ_citta mām_mad eva_eva gatāḥ_gam prāptāḥ_prāp prāṇāḥ_prāṇa indriyāṇi_indriya yeṣām_yad te_tad mad--_mad gata--_gam prāṇāḥ_prāṇa mad--_mad arpita--_arpay jīvanāḥ_jīvana iti_iti vā_vā evaṃbhūtāḥ_evaṃbhūta te_tad budhāḥ_budha anyonyam_anyonya mām_mad nyāya--_nyāya upetaiḥ_upe śruti--_śruti ādi--_ādi pramāṇaiḥ_pramāṇa bodhayantaḥ_bodhay buddhyā_buddhi ca_ca mām_mad kathayantaḥ_kathay saṅkīrtayantaḥ_saṃkīrtay santaḥ_as te_tad nityam_nityam tuṣyanti_tuṣ anumodanena_anumodana tuṣṭim_tuṣṭi yānti_yā ramanti_ram ca_ca nirvṛtim_nirvṛti yānti_yā

vivṛṇoti_vivṛ mayi_mad bhagavati_bhagavant cittam_citta yeṣām_yad te_tad mad--_mad cittāḥ_citta tathā_tathā mad--_mad gatāḥ_gam mām_mad prāptāḥ_prāp prāṇāḥ_prāṇa cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādayaḥ_ādi yeṣām_yad te_tad mad--_mad gata--_gam prāṇāḥ_prāṇa mad--_mad bhajana--_bhajana nimitta--_nimitta cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādi--_ādi vyāpārāḥ_vyāpāra mayi_mad upasaṃhṛta--_upasaṃhṛ sarva--_sarva karaṇāḥ_karaṇa vā_vā athavā_athavā mad--_mad gata--_gam prāṇāḥ_prāṇa mad--_mad bhajana--_bhajana artha--_artha jīvanāḥ_jīvana mad--_mad bhajana--_bhajana atirikta--_atiric prayojana--_prayojana śūnya--_śūnya jīvanāḥ_jīvana iti_iti yāvat_yāvat vidvas--_vidvas goṣṭhīṣu_goṣṭhī parasparam_paraspara anyonyam_anyonya śrutibhiḥ_śruti yuktibhiḥ_yukti ca_ca mām_mad eva_eva bodhayantaḥ_bodhay tattva--_tattva bubhutsu--_bubhutsu kathayā_kathā jñāpayantaḥ_jñāpay tathā_tathā sva--_sva śiṣyebhyaḥ_śiṣya ca_ca mām_mad eva_eva kathayantaḥ_kathay upadiśantaḥ_upadiś ca_ca mayi_mad citta--_citta arpaṇam_arpaṇa tathā_tathā bāhya--_bāhya karaṇa--_karaṇa arpaṇam_arpaṇa tathā_tathā jīvana--_jīvana arpaṇam_arpaṇa evam_evam samānām_sama anyonyam_anyonya mad--_mad bodhanam_bodhana sva--_sva nyūnebhyaḥ_nyūna ca_ca mad--_mad upadeśanam_upadeśana iti_iti evam_evam rūpam_rūpa yat_yad mad--_mad bhajanam_bhajana tena_tad eva_eva tuṣyanti_tuṣ ca_ca etāvatā_etāvat eva_eva labdha--_labh sarvāthāḥ_sarvātha vayam_mad alam_alam anyena_anya labdhavyena_labh iti_iti evam_evam pratyaya--_pratyaya rūpam_rūpa santoṣam_saṃtoṣa prāpnuvanti_prāp ca_ca tena_tad santoṣeṇa_saṃtoṣa ramanti_ram ca_ca ca_ca priya--_priya saṃgamena_saṃgama iva_iva uttamam_uttama sukham_sukha anubhavanti_anubhū ca_ca tat_tad uktam_vac patañjalinā_patañjali santoṣāt_saṃtoṣa anuttamaḥ_anuttama sukha--_sukha lābhaḥ_lābha iti_iti uktam_vac ca_ca purāṇe_purāṇa

lg.l: yat_yad ca_ca kāma--_kāma sukham_sukha loke_loka yat_yad ca_ca divyam_divya mahat_mahat sukham_sukha
tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā kṣaya--_kṣaya sukhāya_sukha ete_etad na_na arhataḥ_arh ṣoḍaśīm_ṣoḍaśa kalām_kalā

div.l: tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā kṣayaḥ_kṣaya santoṣaḥ_saṃtoṣa
div.p: prāpnuvanti_prāp āha_ah mad--_mad gata--_gam prāṇāḥ_prāṇa mām_mad vinā_vinā prāṇān_prāṇa dhartum_dhṛ asamarthāḥ_asamartha anna--_anna gata--_gam prāṇāḥ_prāṇa narāḥ_nara itivat_itivat bodhayantaḥ_bodhay bhakti--_bhakti svarūpa--_svarūpa prakāra--_prakāra ādikam_ādika sauhārdena_sauhārda jñāpayantaḥ_jñāpay mām_mad mahā--_mahat madhura--_madhura rūpa--_rūpa guṇa--_guṇa līlā--_līlā mahā--_mahat udadhim_udadhi kathayantaḥ_kathay mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi vyākhyānena_vyākhyāna ud_ud kīrtana--_kīrtana ādikam_ādika kurvantaḥ_kṛ iti_iti evam_evam sarva--_sarva bhaktiṣu_bhakti atiśraiṣṭhyāt_atiśraiṣṭhya smaraṇa--_smaraṇa śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtanāni_kīrtana uktāni_vac tuṣyanti_tuṣ ca_ca ramanti_ram ca_ca iti_iti bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva santoṣaḥ_saṃtoṣa ca_ca ramaṇam_ramaṇa ca_ca iti_iti rahasyam_rahasya yat_yat vā_vā sādhana--_sādhana daśāyām_daśā api_api bhāgya--_bhāgya vaśāt_vaśa bhajane_bhajana nirvighne_nirvighna sampadyamāne_sampad sati_as tuṣyanti_tuṣ tadā_tadā eva_eva bhāvi--_bhāvin svīya--_svīya sādhya--_sādhay daśām_daśā anusmṛtya_anusmṛ ramanti_ram ca_ca manasā_manas sva--_sva prabhuṇā_prabhu saha_saha ramanti_ram ca_ca iti_iti rāga--_rāga anugā_anuga bhaktiḥ_bhakti dyotitā_dyotay

baladevaḥ_baladeva bhaktiḥ_bhakti prakāram_prakāra āha_ah mad--_mad cittā_citta mad--_mad cittāḥ_citta mad--_mad smṛti--_smṛti parāḥ_para mad--_mad gata--_gam prāṇāḥ_prāṇa mām_mad vinā_vinā prāṇān_prāṇa dhartum_dhṛ akṣamāḥ_akṣama mīnāḥ_mīna vinā_vinā ambhaḥ_ambhas parasparam_paraspara mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa guṇa--_guṇa lāvaṇya--_lāvaṇya ādi_ādi bodhayantaḥ_bodhay tathā_tathā mām_mad sva--_sva bhakta--_bhakta vātsalya--_vātsalya nīradhim_nīradhi ati_ati vicitra--_vicitra caritam_carita kathayantaḥ_kathay ca_ca iti_iti evam_evam smaraṇa--_smaraṇa śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana lakṣaṇaiḥ_lakṣaṇa bhajanaiḥ_bhajana sudhā--_sudhā pānaiḥ_pāna tathā_tathā eva_eva teṣu_tad eva_eva ramante_ram ca_ca yuvati--_yuvati smita--_smita kaṭākṣāni_kaṭākṣa uktāni_vac tuṣyanti_tuṣ ca_ca ramanti_ram ca_ca iti_iti bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva santoṣaḥ_saṃtoṣa ca_ca ramaṇam_ramaṇa ca_ca iti_iti rahasyam_rahasya yat_yat vā_vā sādhana--_sādhana daśāyām_daśā api_api bhāgya--_bhāgya vaśāt_vaśa bhajane_bhajana nirvighne_nirvighna sampadyamāne_sampad sati_as tuṣyanti_tuṣ tadā_tadā eva_eva bhāvi--_bhāvin svīya--_svīya sādhya--_sādhay daśām_daśā anusmṛtya_anusmṛ ramanti_ram ca_ca manasā_manas sva--_sva prabhuṇā_prabhu saha_saha ramanti_ram
ca_ca iti_iti rāga--_rāga anugā_anuga bhaktiḥ_bhakti dyotitā_dyotay

lg.l: teṣām_tad satata--_satata yuktānām_yuj bhajatām_bhaj prīti--_prīti pūrvakam_pūrvaka
dadāmi_dā buddhi--_buddhi yogam_yoga tam_tad yena_yad mām_mad upayānti_upayā te_tad

div.p: dadāmi_dā āha_ah evam_evam satata--_satata yuktānām_yuj mayi_mad āsakta--_āsañj cittānām_citta prīti--_prīti pūrvakam_pūrvaka bhajatām_bhaj teṣām_tad tam_tad buddhi--_buddhi rūpam_rūpa yogam_yoga upāyam_upāya dadāmi_dā tam_tad iti_iti kam_ka yena_yad upāyena_upāya te_tad mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta mām_mad prāpnuvanti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ye_yad yathā_yathā uktena_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra bhajante_bhaj mām_mad teṣām_tad iti_iti satatam_satatam sarvadā_sarvadā yuktānām_yuj bhagavati_bhagavant ekāgra--_ekāgra buddhīnām_buddhi ataeva_ataeva lābha--_lābha pūjā--_pūjā khyāti--_khyāti ādi_ādi an_an abhisandhāya_abhisaṃdhā prīti--_prīti pūrvakam_pūrvaka eva_eva bhajatām_bhaj sevamānānām_sev teṣām_tad avikampena_avikampa yogena_yoga iti_iti yaḥ_yad prāk_prāk uktaḥ_vac tam_tad buddhi--_buddhi yogam_yoga mattatva--_mattatva viṣayam_viṣaya samyak_samyak darśanam_darśana dadāmi_dā utpādayāmi_utpāday yena_yad buddhi--_buddhi yogena_yoga mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara ātmatvena_ātmatva upayānti_upayā ye_yad mad--_mad citta--_citta tva--_tva ādi--_ādi prakāraiḥ_prakāra mām_mad bhajante_bhaj te_tad

āha_ah teṣām_tad iti_iti satata--_satata yuktānām_yuj nityam_nityam eva_eva mad--_mad saṃyoga--_saṃyoga ākāṅkṣaṇām_ākāṅkṣaṇa tam_tad buddhi--_buddhi yogam_yoga dadāmi_dā teṣām_tad hṛd--_hṛd vṛttiṣu_vṛtti aham_mad eva_eva udbhāvayāmi_udbhāvay iti_iti sa_tad buddhi--_buddhi yogaḥ_yoga svatas_svatas anyasmāt_anya ca_ca kutaścid_kutaścid api_api adhigantum_adhigam aśakyaḥ_aśakya kintu_kiṃtu mad--_mad eka--_eka deyaḥ_dā tad--_tad eka--_eka grāhyaḥ_grah iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva mām_mad upayānti_upayā mām_mad upalabhante_upalabh sākṣāt_sākṣāt mad--_mad nikaṭam_nikaṭa prāpnuvanti_prāp

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa guṇaiḥ_guṇa vibhūtibhiḥ_vibhūti ca_ca anantam_ananta tvām_tvad katham_katham guru--_guru upadeśa--_upadeśa mātreṇa_mātra te_tad grahītum_grah kṣameran_kṣam iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah teṣām_tad iti_iti satata--_satata yuktānām_yuj nityam_nityam mad--_mad yogam_yoga vāñchatām_vāñch prīti--_prīti pūrvakam_pūrvaka mama_mad yāthātmya--_yāthātmya jñāna--_jñāna jena_ja ruci--_ruci bhareṇa_bhara bhajatām_bhaj tam_tad buddhi--_buddhi yogam_yoga sva--_sva bhakti--_bhakti rasikaḥ_rasika dadāmi_dā arpayāmi_arpay yena_yena te_tad mām_mad upayānti_upayā tad--_tad buddhim_buddhi tathā_tathā aham_mad udbhāvayāmi_udbhāvay yathā_yathā ananta--_ananta guṇa--_guṇa vibhūtim_vibhūti mām_mad gṛhītvā_grah upāsya_upās ca_ca prāpnuvanti_prāp

lg.l: teṣām_tad eva_eva anukampā--_anukampā artham_artha aham_mad ajñāna--_ajñāna jam_ja tamaḥ_tamas
nāśayāmi_nāśay ātma--_ātman bhāva--_bhāva sthaḥ_stha jñāna--_jñāna dīpena_dīpa bhāsvatā_bhāsvat

div.p: nāśayāmi_nāśay āha_ah teṣām_tad anukampā--_anukampā artham_artha anugraha--_anugraha artham_artha eva_eva ajñānāt_ajñāna jātam_jan tamaḥ_tamas saṃsāra--_saṃsāra ākhyam_ākhyā nāśayāmi_nāśay kutra_kutra sthitaḥ_sthā san_as kena_ka vā_vā sādhanena_sādhana tamaḥ_tamas nāśayasi_nāśay atas_atas āha_ah ātma--_ātman bhāva--_bhāva sthaḥ_stha buddhi--_buddhi vṛttau_vṛtti sthitaḥ_sthā san_as bhāsvatā_bhāsvat visphuratā_visphur jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa dīpena_dīpa nāśayāmi_nāśay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana dīyamānasya_dā buddhi--_buddhi yogasya_yoga ātma--_ātman prāptau_prāpti phalam_phala madhya--_madhya vartinam_vartin vyāpāram_vyāpāra āha_ah teṣām_tad iti_iti teṣām_tad eva_eva katham_katham śreyaḥ_śreyas syāt_as iti_iti anugraha--_anugraha artham_artha ātma--_ātman bhāvasya_bhāva ātma--_ātman ākāra--_ākāra antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa vṛttau_vṛtti viṣaya--_viṣaya tvena_tva sthitaḥ_sthā aham_mad sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa caitanya--_caitanya ānanda--_ānanda advaya--_advaya lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa ātmā_ātman tena_tad eva_eva mad--_mad dīpa--_dīpa sadṛśena_sadṛśa jñānena_jñāna bhāsvatā_bhāsvat cit--_cit ābhāsa--_ābhāsa yuktena_yuj apratibaddhena_apratibaddha ajñāna--_ajñāna jam_ja ajñāna--_ajñāna upādānakam_upādānaka tamaḥ_tamas mithyā_mithyā pratyaya--_pratyaya lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sva--_sva viṣaya--_viṣaya āvaraṇam_āvaraṇa andhakāram_andhakāra tad--_tad upādāna--_upādāna ajñāna--_ajñāna nāśena_nāśa jñāna--_jñāna nivartya--_nivartay tvāt_tva upādāna--_upādāna nāśa--_nāśa nivartya--_nivartay tvāt_tva ca_ca upādeyasya_upādā

yathā_yathā dīpena_dīpa andhakāre_andhakāra nivartanīye_nivṛt dīpa--_dīpa utpattim_utpatti antareṇa_antareṇa na_na karmaṇaḥ_karman abhyāsasya_abhyāsa vā_vā apekṣā_apekṣā vidyamānasya_vid eva_eva ca_ca vastunaḥ_vastu abhivyaktiḥ_abhivyakti tatas_tatas na_na anutpannasya_anutpanna kasyacid_kaścit utpattiḥ_utpatti tathā_tathā jñānena_jñāna ajñāne_ajñāna nivartanīye_nivṛt antareṇa_antareṇa anyasya_anya karmaṇaḥ_karman abhyāsasya_abhyāsa vā_vā apekṣā_apekṣā vidyamānasya_vid eva_eva ca_ca brahma--_brahman bhāvasya_bhāva mokṣasya_mokṣa abhivyaktiḥ_abhivyakti tatas_tatas na_na anutpannasya_anutpanna utpattiḥ_utpatti yena_yad kṣayi--_kṣayin tvam_tva karma--_karman ādi--_ādi sāpekṣa--_sāpekṣa tvam_tva vā_vā bhavet_bhū iti_iti rūpaka--_rūpaka bhāsvatā_bhāsvant iti_iti anena_idam tīvra--_tīvra pavana--_pavana ādeḥ_ādi iva_iva asaṃbhāvanā--_asaṃbhāvanā ādeḥ_ādi pratibandhakasya_pratibandhaka abhāvaḥ_abhāva sūcitaḥ_sūcay jñānasya_jñāna ca_ca dīpa--_dīpa sādharmyam_sādharmya sva--_sva viṣaya--_viṣaya āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa nivartaka--_nivartaka tvam_tva sva--_sva vyavahāre_vyavahāra sajātīya--_sajātīya para--_para anapekṣa--_anapekṣa tvam_tva sva--_sva utpatti--_utpatti atirikta--_atiric sahakāri--_sahakārin anapekṣa--_anapekṣa tvam_tva iti_iti
ādi_ādi rūpaka--_rūpaka bījam_bīja draṣṭavyam_dṛś

āha_ah syāt_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha taiḥ_tad mad--_mad anukampā--_anukampā prāptau_prāpti kā_ka api_api cintā_cintā na_na kāryā_kṛ yatas_yatas teṣām_tad mad--_mad anukampā--_anukampā prāpti--_prāpti artham_artha aham_mad eva_eva yatamānaḥ_yat varte_vṛt eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ātma--_ātman bhāva--_bhāva sthaḥ_stha teṣām_tad buddhi--_buddhi vṛttaau_vṛtti sthitaḥ_sthā jñānam_jñāna mad--_mad eka--_eka prakāśya--_prakāśay tvāt_tva na_na sāttvikam_sāttvika nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tve_tva api_api bhakti--_bhakti uttha--_uttha jñānataḥ_jñāna api_api vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa yat_yad tat_tad eva_eva dīpaḥ_dīpa tena_tad aham_mad eva_eva nāśayāmi_nāśay iti_iti taiḥ_tad katham_katham tad--_tad artham_artha prayatanīyam_prayat teṣām_tad nitya--_nitya abhiyuktānām_abhiyuj yoga--_yoga kṣemam_kṣema vahāmi_vah aham_mad iti_iti mad--_mad ukteḥ_ukti teṣām_tad vyavahārikaḥ_vyavahārika pāramārthikaḥ_pāramārthika ca_ca sarvaḥ_sarva api_api bhāraḥ_bhāra mayā_mad voḍham_vah

lg.l: catuḥ--_catur ślokīyam_ślokīya ākhyātā_ākhyā khyātā_khyā sarva--_sarva niśarma--_niśarman kṛt_kṛt

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu cirantanasya_cirantana avidyā--_avidyā timirasya_timira sattvāt_sattva teṣām_tad hṛdi_hṛd katham_katham tad--_tad prakāśaḥ_prakāśa syāt_as iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah teṣām_tad eva_eva iti_iti teṣām_tad eva_eva mām_mad vinā_vinā prāṇān_prāṇa dhartum_dhṛ asamarthānām_asamartha mad--_mad ekāntinām_ekāntin eva_eva na_na tu_tu sa_sa niṣṭhānām_niṣṭhā anukampā--_anukampā artham_artha mad--_mad kṛpā--_kṛpā pātra--_pātra tva--_tva artham_artha aham_mad eva_eva ātma--_ātman bhāva--_bhāva sthaḥ_stha aravinda--_aravinda koṣe_kośa bhṛṅgaḥ_bhṛṅga iva_iva tad--_tad bhāve_bhāva sthitaḥ_sthā divya--_divya svarūpa--_svarūpa guṇān_guṇa tatra_tatra prakāśayan_prakāśay tad--_tad viṣayaka--_viṣayaka jñāna--_jñāna rūpeṇa_rūpa bhāsvatā_bhāsvat dīpena_dīpa jñāna--_jñāna virodhi--_virodhin anādi--_anādi karma--_karman rūpa--_rūpa nāśayāmi_nāśay teṣām_tad ekānta--_ekānta bhāvena_bhāva prasāditaḥ_prasāday aham_mad yoga--_yoga kṣema--_kṣema vat_vat buddhi--_buddhi vṛtteḥ_vṛtti udbhāvanam_udbhāvana tad--_tad varti--_vartin tamaḥ--_tamas vināśam_vināśa ca_ca karomi_kṛ iti_iti tad--_tad sarva--_sarva nirvāha--_nirvāha bhāraḥ_bhāra mama_mad eva_eva iti_iti na_na taiḥ_tad kutra_kutra api_api arthe_artha prayatitavyam_prayat iti_iti

lg.l: navama--_navama ādi--_ādi dvaye_dvaya gītā--_gītā garbhe_garbha asmin_idam yat_yad prakīrtitam_prakīrtay
tat_tad eva_eva gītā--_gītā śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha sāram_sāra bodhyam_budh vicakṣaṇaiḥ_vicakṣaṇa
arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
param_para brahma_brahman param_para dhāma_dhāman pavitram_pavitra paramam_parama bhavān_bhavat
puruṣam_puruṣa śāśvatam_śāśvata divyam_divya ādidevam_ādideva ajam_aja vibhum_vibhu
āhuḥ_ah tvām_tvad ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi sarve_sarva deva--_deva ṛṣiḥ_ṛṣi nāradaḥ_nārada tathā_tathā
asitaḥ_asita devalaḥ_devala vyāsaḥ_vyāsa svayam_svayam ca_ca eva_eva bravīṣi_brū me_mad

div.p:
uvāca_vac param_para dhāma_dhāman ca_ca āśrayaḥ_āśraya paramam_parama ca_ca pavitram_pavitra ca_ca bhavān_bhavat eva_eva kutas_kutas iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah yatas_yatas śāśvatam_śāśvata nityam_nitya puruṣam_puruṣa tathā_tathā divyam_divya dyotana--_dyotana ātmakam_ātmaka svayam_svayam prakāśam_prakāśa ādiḥ_ādi ca_ca asau_adas devaḥ_deva ca_ca iti_iti tam_tad devānām_deva ādi--_ādi bhūtam_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ajam_aja a_a janmānam_janman vibhum_vibhu ca_ca vyāpakam_vyāpaka tvām_tvad eva_eva āhuḥ_ah ke_ka te_tad iti_iti āha_ah āhuḥ_ah iti_iti ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi bhṛgu--_bhṛgu ādayaḥ_ādi sarve_sarva deva--_deva ṛṣiḥ_ṛṣi ca_ca nāradaḥ_nārada asitaḥ_asita ca_ca devalaḥ_devala ca_ca vyāsaḥ_vyāsa ca_ca svayam_svayam tvam_tvad eva_eva
ca_ca sākṣāt_sākṣāt me_mad mahyam_mad bravīṣi_brū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam bhagavataḥ_bhagavant vibhūtim_vibhūti yogam_yoga ca_ca śrutvā_śru parama--_parama utkaṇṭhitaḥ_utkaṇṭh arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac param_para brahma_brahman iti_iti saptabhiḥ_saptan param_para brahma_brahman param_para dhāma_dhāman āśrayaḥ_āśraya prakāśaḥ_prakāśa vā_vā paramam_parama pavitram_pavitra pāvanam_pāvana ca_ca bhavān_bhavat eva_eva yatas_yatas puruṣam_puruṣa paramātmānam_paramātman śāśvatam_śāśvata sadā_sadā eka--_eka rūpam_rūpa divi_div parame_parama vyomni_vyoman sva--_sva svarūpe_svarūpa bhavam_bhava divyam_divya sva--_sva prapañca--_prapañca atītam_atī ādim_ādi ca_ca sarva--_sarva kāraṇam_kāraṇa devam_deva ca_ca dyotana--_dyotana ātmakam_ātmaka sva--_sva prakāśam_prakāśa ādi--_ādi devam_deva atas_atas iti_iti sambandhaḥ_sambandha

āhuḥ_ah kathayanti_kathay tvām_tvad ananta--_ananta mahimānam_mahiman ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā sarve_sarva bhṛgu--_bhṛgu vaśiṣṭha--_vaśiṣṭha ādayaḥ_ādi tathā_tathā deva--_deva ṛṣi--_ṛṣi nāradaḥ_nārada asitaḥ_asita devalaḥ_devala ca_ca dhaumyasya_dhaumya jyeṣṭhaḥ_jyeṣṭha bhrātā_bhrātṛ vyāsaḥ_vyāsa ca_ca bhagavān_bhagavat kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa dvaipāyanaḥ_dvaipāyana ete_etad api_api tvām_tvad pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa me_mad mahyam_mad āhuḥ_ah sākṣāt_sākṣāt kim_ka anyaiḥ_anya vaktṛbhiḥ_vaktṛ svayam_svayam eva_eva tvam_tvad ca_ca mahyam_mad bravīṣi_brū atra_atra ṛṣi--_ṛṣi tve_tva api_api sākṣāt_sākṣāt vaktṝṇām_vaktṛ nārada--_nārada ādīnām_ādi ati_ati viśiṣṭa--_viśiṣ tvāt_tva pṛthak_pṛthak grahaṇam_grahaṇa

icchan_iṣ āha_ah param_para sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa dhāma_dhāman śyāma--_śyāma sundaram_sundara vapuḥ_vapus eva_eva param_para brahma_brahman tat_tad dhāma_dhāman eva_eva bhavān_bhavat bhavati_bhū jīvasya_jīva iva_iva tava_tvad deha--_deha dehi--_dehin vibhāgaḥ_vibhāga na_na asti_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva dhāma_dhāman kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa param_para pavitram_pavitra draṣṭṝṇām_draṣṭṛ avidyā--_avidyā mālinya--_mālinya haram_hara ataeva_ataeva ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi api_api tvām_tvad śāśvatam_śāśvata puruṣam_puruṣa āhuḥ_ah puruṣa--_puruṣa ākārasya_ākāra asya_idam nitya--_nitya tvam_tva vadanti_vad

baladevaḥ_baladeva saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa śrutām_śru vibhūtim_vibhūti vistareṇa_vistara śrotum_śru icchan_iṣ arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac param_para iti_iti bhavān_bhavat eva_eva satyam_satya jñānam_jñāna anantam_ananta brahma_brahman iti_iti śrūyamāṇam_śru param_para brahma_brahman bhavān_bhavat eva_eva tasmin_tad eva_eva āśritāḥ_āśri sarve_sarva tat_tad u_u na_na atyeti_atī kaścana_kaścana iti_iti śrūyamāṇam_śru param_para dhāma_dhāman nikhila--_nikhila āśraya--_āśraya bhūtam_bhū vastu_vastu bhavān_bhavat eva_eva paramam_parama pavitram_pavitra jñātvā_jñā devam_deva mucyate_muc sarva--_sarva pāpaiḥ_pāpa sarvam_sarva pāpmānam_pāpman tarati_tṛ na_na enam_enad pāpmā_pāpman tarati_tṛ iti_iti ādi_ādi śrūyamāṇam_śru smartuḥ_smartṛ akhila--_akhila pāpa--_pāpa haram_hara vastu_vastu iti_iti aham_mad vedmi_vid tathā_tathā sarve_sarva tad--_tad anukampitāḥ_anukamp ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi teṣu_tad pradhāna--_pradhāna bhūtāḥ_bhū nārada--_nārada ādayaḥ_ādi ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa eva_eva paraḥ_para devaḥ_deva tam_tad dhyāyet_dhyā tam_tad raset_ras tam_tad bhajet_bhaj tam_tad yajet_yaj iti_iti om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as iti_iti janma--_janman jarābhyām_jarā bhinnaḥ_bhid sthāṇuḥ_sthāṇu ayam_idam acchedyaḥ_acchedya ayam_idam iti_iti śruti--_śruti artha--_artha vidaḥ_vid tvām_tvad divyam_divya puruṣam_puruṣa ādidevam_ādideva ajam_aja vibhum_vibhu āhuḥ_ah tad--_tad kathā--_kathā saṃvādeṣu_saṃvāda purāṇeṣu_purāṇa itihāseṣu_itihāsa ca_ca svayam_svayam ajaḥ_aja api_api san_as avyaya--_avyaya ātmā_ātman

lg.l: sarvam_sarva etat_etad ṛtam_ṛta manye_man yat_yad mām_mad vadasi_vad keśava_keśava
na_na hi_hi te_tvad bhagavan_bhagavat vyaktim_vyakti viduḥ_vid devāḥ_deva na_na dānavāḥ_dānava

div.p: āha_ah etad--_etad bhāvena_bhāva param_para brahma_brahman iti_iti ādi_ādi sarvam_sarva api_api ṛtam_ṛta satyam_satya manye_man yat_yad mām_mad prati_prati tvam_tvad kathayasi_kathay na_na me_mad viduḥ_vid sura--_sura gaṇāḥ_gaṇa iti_iti ādi_ādi tat_tad api_api satyam_satya eva_eva manye_man iti_iti āha_ah na_na hi_hi iti_iti he_he bhagavan_bhagavant tava_tvad vyaktim_vyakti devāḥ_deva na_na viduḥ_vid asmad--_mad anugraha--_anugraha artham_artha iyam_idam abhivyaktiḥ_abhivyakti iti_iti na_na jānanti_jñā dānavāḥ_dānava ca_ca asmin_idam nigraha--_nigraha artham_artha iti_iti na_na viduḥ_vid eva_eva iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sarvam_sarva etat_etad uktam_vac ṛṣibhiḥ_ṛṣi ca_ca tvayā_tvad ca_ca tat_tad ṛtam_ṛta satyam_satya eva_eva aham_mad manye_man yat_yad mām_mad prati_prati vadasi_vad keśava_keśava nahi_nahi tvad--_tvad vacasi_vacas mama_mad kutra_kutra api_api a_a prāmāṇya--_prāmāṇya śaṅkā_śaṅkā tat_tad ca_ca sarvajña--_sarvajña tvāt_tva tvam_tvad jānāsi_jñā iti_iti keśau_keśa brahma--_brahman rudrau_rudra sarva--_sarva īśau_īśa api_api anukampyayā_anukamp vā_vā ati_ati avagacchati_avagam iti_iti vyutpattim_vyutpatti āśritya_āśri niratiśaya--_niratiśaya aiśvarya--_aiśvarya pratipādakena_pratipādaka keśava--_keśava padena_pada sūcitam_sūcay atas_atas yat_yad uktam_vac na_na me_mad viduḥ_vid sura--_sura gaṇāḥ_gaṇa prabhavam_prabhava na_na mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi iti_iti ādi_ādi tat_tad tathā_tathā eva_eva yasmāt_yad he_he bhagavan_bhagavant samagra--_samagra aiśvarya--_aiśvarya ādi--_ādi sampanna_sampad te_tvad tava_tvad vyaktim_vyakti prabhāvam_prabhāva jñāna--_jñāna atiśaya--_atiśaya śālinaḥ_śālin api_api devāḥ_deva na_na viduḥ_vid na_na api_api dānavāḥ_dānava na_na mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi iti_iti api_api draṣṭavyam_dṛś

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha na_na atra_atra mama_mad kaḥ_ka api_api aviśvāsaḥ_aviśvāsa iti_iti āha_ah sarvam_sarva iti_iti kim_ka ca_ca te_tvad ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi param_para brahma--_brahman dhāmānam_dhāman tvām_tvad ajam_aja āhuḥ_ah eva_eva na_na tu_tu te_tad vyaktim_vyakti janma_janman viduḥ_vid para--_para brahma--_brahman svarūpasya_svarūpa tava_tvad aja--_aja tvam_tva janmavat--_janmavat tvam_tva ca_ca kim_ka prakāram_prakāra iti_iti tu_tu na_na viduḥ_vid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ataeva_ataeva na_na me_mad viduḥ_vid sura--_sura gaṇāḥ_gaṇa prabhavam_prabhava na_na mahā--_mahat ṛṣayaḥ_ṛṣi iti_iti yat_yad tvayā_tvad uktam_vac tam_tad sarvam_sarva ṛtam_ṛta satyam_satya eva_eva manye_man he_he keśava_keśava kaḥ_ka brahmā_brahman īśaḥ_īśa rudraḥ_rudra ca_ca tau_tad api_api vayase_vayas sva--_sva tattva--_tattva ajñānena_ajñāna badhnāsi_bandh kim_kim punar_punar deva--_deva dānava--_dānava ādyāḥ_ādya tvām_tvad na_na vidanti_vid iti_iti vācyam_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva sarvam_sarva iti_iti etat_etad sarvam_sarva aham_mad ṛtam_ṛta satyam_satya eva_eva praśaṃsā--_praśaṃsā mātram_mātra manye_man he_he keśava_keśava iti_iti keśau_keśa vidhi--_vidhi rudrau_rudra vayase_vayas sva--_sva tattva--_tattva aparijñānena_aparijñāna nibadhnāsi_nibandh prajāpatim_prajāpati ca_ca rudram_rudra ca_ca iti_iti ādi_ādi tvad--_tvad uktaḥ_vac he_he sarveśvara_sarveśvara he_he bhagavan_bhagavant niravadhika--_niravadhika atiśaya--_atiśaya ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ aiśvarya--_aiśvarya nidhe_nidhi te_tvad vyaktim_vyakti para--_para brahmatva--_brahmatva ādi--_ādi guṇām_guṇa śrī--_śrī mūrtim_mūrti deva--_deva dānavāḥ_dānava ca_ca na_na viduḥ_vid yat_yat te_tad anya--_anya sva--_sva jātīya--_jātīya tva--_tva buddhyā_buddhi tvām_tvad avajānanti_avajñā

lg.l: svayam_svayam eva_eva ātmanā_ātman ātmānam_ātman vettha_vid tvam_tvad puruṣottama_puruṣottama
bhūta--_bhūta bhāvana_bhāvana bhūteśa_bhūteśa deva--_deva deva_deva jagat--_jagant pate_pati

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara kim_ka tarhi_tarhi svayam_svayam iti_iti svayam_svayam eva_eva tvam_tvad ātmānam_ātman vettha_vid jānāsi_jñā na_na anyaḥ_anya tat_tad api_api ātmanā_ātman svena_sva eva_eva vettha_vid na_na sādhana--_sādhana antareṇa_antara atyādareṇa_atyādara bahudhā_bahudhā sambodhayati_sambodhay he_he puruṣottama_puruṣottama puruṣottama--_puruṣottama tve_tva hetu--_hetu garbhāṇi_garbha viśeṣaṇāni_viśeṣaṇa sambodhanāni_sambodhana he_he bhūta--_bhūta bhāvana_bhāvana bhūta--_bhūta utpādaka_utpādaka bhūtānām_bhūta īśa_īśa niyantaḥ_niyantṛ devānām_deva āditya--_āditya ādīnām_ādi deva_deva prakāśaka_prakāśaka jagat--_jagant pate_pati viśva--_viśva pālaka_pālaka

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yatas_yatas tvam_tvad teṣām_tad sarveṣām_sarva ādiḥ_ādi aśakya--_aśakya jñānaḥ_jñāna ca_ca atas_atas svayam_svayam iti_iti svayam_svayam eva_eva anyonya--_anyonya apadeśa--_apadeśa ādikam_ādika antareṇa_antareṇa eva_eva tvam_tvad eva_eva ātmānā_ātman svarūpeṇa_svarūpa ātmānam_ātman nirupādhikam_nirupādhika sa_sa upādhikam_upādhika ca_ca nirupādhikam_nirupādhika pratyaktvena_pratyaktva aviṣayatayā_aviṣayatā sopādhikam_sopādhika ca_ca niratiśaya--_niratiśaya jñāna--_jñāna aiśvarya--_aiśvarya ādi--_ādi śaktimattvena_śaktimattva vettha_vid jānāsi_jñā na_na anyaḥ_anya kaścid_kaścit anyaiḥ_anya jñātum_jñā aśakyam_aśakya aham_mad katham_katham jānīyām_jñā iti_iti āśaṅkām_āśaṅkā apanudan_apanud prema--_preman autkaṇṭhyena_autkaṇṭhya bahudhā_bahudhā sambodhayati_sambodhay he_he puruṣottama_puruṣottama tvad--_tvad apekṣayā_apekṣā sarve_sarva api_api puruṣāḥ_puruṣa apakṛṣṭāḥ_apakṛṣṭa eva_eva atas_atas teṣām_tad aśakyam_aśakya sarva--_sarva uttamasya_uttama tava_tvad śakyam_śakya eva_eva iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya puruṣottama--_puruṣottama tvam_tva eva_eva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ punar_punar caturbhiḥ_catur sambodhanaiḥ_sambodhana bhūtāni_bhūta sarvāṇi_sarva bhāvayati_bhāvay utpādayati_utpāday iti_iti he_he bhūta--_bhūta bhāvana_bhāvana sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta pitar_pitṛ pitā_pitṛ api_api kaścid_kaścit na_na iṣṭaḥ_iṣ tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he bhūteśa_bhūteśa sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta niyantar_niyantṛ niyantā_niyantṛ api_api kaścid_kaścit nā_na ārādhyaḥ_ārādhay tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he deva--_deva deva_deva devānām_deva sarva--_sarva ārādhyānām_ārādhay api_api ārādhyaḥ_ārādhay ārādhyaḥ_ārādhay api_api kaścid_kaścit na_na pālayitṛ--_pālayitṛ tvena_tva patiḥ_pati tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he jagat--_jagant pate_pati hita--_hita ahita--_ahita upadeśaka--_upadeśaka veda--_veda praṇatṛ--_praṇatṛ tvena_tva sarvasya_sarva jagataḥ_jagant pālayitaḥ_pālay etādṛśa--_etādṛśa sarva--_sarva viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ tvam_tvad sarveṣām_sarva pitā_pitṛ sarveṣām_sarva guruḥ_guru sarveṣām_sarva rājā_rājan atas_atas sarvaiḥ_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra sarveṣām_sarva ārādhyaḥ_ārādhay iti_iti kim_ka vācyam_vac puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama tvam_tvad
tava_tvad iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

vetti_vid vetti_vid tat_tad api_api ātmanā_ātman svena_sva eva_eva vettha_vid na_na sādhana--_sādhana antareṇa_antara ataeva_ataeva tvam_tvad puruṣeṣu_puruṣa mahat--_mahant sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ ādiṣu_ādi api_api madhye_madhya uttamaḥ_uttama uttamaḥ_uttama bhūta--_bhūta bhāvanaḥ_bhāvana bhūtāḥ_bhū bhūta--_bhūta bhāvana--_bhāvanā rūpāḥ_rūpa ye_yad tad--_tad ādayaḥ_ādi parameṣṭhī--_parameṣṭhin antāḥ_anta teṣām_tad īśaḥ_īśa na_na kevalam_kevalam īśaḥ_īśa eva_eva yatas_yatas devaiḥ_deva taiḥ_tad eva_eva devaḥ_deva krīḍā_krīḍā yasya_yad iti_iti tvad--_tvad krīḍā--_krīḍā upakāra--_upakāra bhūtāḥ_bhū eva_eva te_tad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad api_api apāra--_apāra kāruṇya--_kāruṇya vaśāt_vaśa jagat--_jagant vartinā_vartin mat_mad mādṛśānām_mādṛśa api_api tvam_tvad eva_eva patiḥ_pati bhavasi_bhū iti_iti catūrṇām_catur sambodhana--_sambodhana padānām_pada arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā puruṣottama--_puruṣottama tvam_tva eva_eva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ he_he bhūta--_bhūta bhāvana_bhāvana sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta pitar_pitṛ pitā_pitṛ api_api kaścid_kaścit na_na īṣṭe_īś tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he bhūteśa_bhūteśa bhūteśaḥ_bhūteśa api_api kaścid_kaścit na_na ārādhyaḥ_ārādhay tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he devadeva_devadeva deva--_deva jagat--_jagant pate_pati

baladevaḥ_baladeva svayam_svayam eva_eva tvam_tvad ātmānā_ātman svena_sva eva_eva jñānena_jñāna ātmānam_ātman saṃvettha_saṃvid idam_idam ittham_ittham iti_iti jānāsi_jñā ye_yad deveṣu_deva dānaveṣu_dānava ca_ca tvad--_tvad bhaktāḥ_bhakta te_tad tādṛśīm_tādṛśa tvad--_tvad mūrtim_mūrti vastu--_vastu bhūtām_bhū jānanti_jñā eva_eva tasyāḥ_tad tathātve_tathātva katham_katham tām_tad na_na jānanti_jñā iti_iti eva_eva kārāt_kāra he_he puruṣottama_puruṣottama sarva--_sarva puruṣa--_puruṣa īśvara_īśvara puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama tvam_tvad vivṛṇvan_vivṛ sambodhayati_sambodhay he_he bhūta--_bhūta bhāvana_bhāvana sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin janaka_janaka bhūta--_bhūta bhāvanaḥ_bhāvana api_api kaścid_kaścit tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he bhūteśa_bhūteśa sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin niyantaḥ_niyantṛ tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he devadeva_devadeva sarva--_sarva ārādhyānām_ārādhay api_api devānām_deva ārādhya_ārādhay devadevaḥ_devadeva api_api kaścid_kaścit na_na rakṣakaḥ_rakṣaka tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he jagatpate_jagatpati hita--_hita ahita--_ahita upadeśena_upadeśa jīvikā--_jīvikā arpaṇena_arpaṇa ca_ca viśva--_viśva pālaka_pālaka īdṛśasya_īdṛśa te_tvad tattvam_tattva su_su

vaktum_vac arhasi_arh aśeṣeṇa_aśeṣeṇa divyāḥ_divya hi_hi ātma--_ātman vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti
yābhiḥ_yad vibhūtibhiḥ_vibhūti lokān_loka imān_idam tvam_tvad vyāpya_vyāp tiṣṭhasi_sthā
vetsi_vid arhasi_arh asi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yasmāt_yasmāt anyeṣām_anya sarveṣām_sarva jñātum_jñā aśakyāḥ_aśakya avaśyam_avaśyam jñātavyāḥ_jñā ca_ca tava_tvad vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti tasmāt_tasmāt vaktum_vac iti_iti yābhiḥ_yad vibhūtibhiḥ_vibhūti imān_idam sarvān_sarva lokān_loka vyāpya_vyāp tvam_tvad tiṣṭhasi_sthā tāḥ_tad tava_tvad asādhāraṇāḥ_asādhāraṇa vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti divyāḥ_divya asarvajñaiḥ_asarvajña jñātum_jñā aśakyāḥ_aśakya hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt tasmāt_tasmāt sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña tvam_tvad eva_eva tāḥ_tad aśeṣeṇa_aśeṣeṇa vaktum_vac arhasi_arh

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tava_tvad tattvam_tattva durgamam_durgama tava_tvad vibhūtiṣu_vibhūti eva_eva mama_mad jijñāsā_jijñāsā jāyate_jan iti_iti dyotayan_dyotay āha_ah vaktum_vac iti_iti divyāḥ_divya utkṛṣṭāḥ_utkṛṣṭa yāḥ_yad ātma--_ātman vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti tāvat_tāvat vaktum_vac arhasi_arh iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya nanu_nanu aśeṣeṇa_aśeṣeṇa mad--_mad vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti sarvāḥ_sarva vaktum_vac aśakyāḥ_aśakya eva_eva tatra_tatra āha_ah yābhiḥ_yad iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva tvad--_tvad svarūpa--_svarūpa yāthātmyam_yāthātmya khalu_khalu katham_katham tathā_tathā durgamā_durgama iva_iva atas_atas tvad--_tvad vibhūtiṣu_vibhūti eva_eva mad--_mad jijñāsā_jijñāsā upajāyate_upajan iti_iti sūcayan_sūcay āha_ah vaktum_vac iti_iti divyāḥ_divya utkṛṣṭāḥ_utkṛṣṭa tad--_tad asādhāraṇīya--_asādhāraṇīya ātmanaḥ_ātman vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti aśeṣeṇa_aśeṣeṇa vaktum_vac arhasi_arh dvitīyā--_dvitīyā arthe_artha prathamā_prathamā yābhiḥ_yad viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ tvam_tvad imān_idam lokān_loka vyāpya_vyāp niyamya_niyam tiṣṭhasi_sthā

lg.l: katham_katham vidyām_vid aham_mad yogin_yogin tvām_tvad sadā_sadā paricintayan_paricintay
keṣu_ka keṣu_ka ca_ca bhāveṣu_bhāva cintyaḥ_cintay asi_as bhagavat_bhagavat mayā_mad

div.p: darśayan_darśay prārthayate_prārthay he_he yogin_yogin katham_katham kaiḥ_ka vibhūti--_vibhūti bhedaiḥ_bheda sadā_sadā paricintayan_paricintay aham_mad tvām_tvad vidyām_vid jānīyām_jñā vibhūti--_vibhūti bhedena_bheda cintyaḥ_cintay api_api tvam_tvad keṣu_ka keṣu_ka padārtheṣu_padārtha mayā_mad cintanīyaḥ_cintay asi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka prayojanam_prayojana tad--_tad kathanasya_kathana tat_tad āha_ah katham_katham iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi yogaḥ_yoga niratiśaya--_niratiśaya aiśvarya--_aiśvarya ādi--_ādi śaktiḥ_śakti saḥ_tad asya_idam asti_as iti_iti he_he yogin_yogin niratiśa--_niratiśa aiśvarya--_aiśvarya ādi--_ādi śakti--_śakti śālin_śālin aham_mad ati_ati sthūla--_sthūla matiḥ_mati tvām_tvad deva--_deva ādibhiḥ_ādi api_api jñātum_jñā aśakyam_aśakya katham_katham vidyām_vid jānīyām_jñā sadā_sadā nanu_nanu mad--_mad vibhūtiṣu_vibhūti mām_mad dhyāyan_dhyā jñāsyasi_jñā tatra_tatra āha_ah keṣu_ka keṣu_ka ca_ca bhāveṣu_bhāva cetana--_cetana acetana--_acetana ātmakeṣu_ātmaka vastuṣu_vastu tvad--_tvad vibhūti--_vibhūti bhūteṣu_bhū mayā_mad cintyaḥ_cintay asi_as he_he bhagavan_bhagavat

vartate_vṛt tvām_tvad aham_mad katham_katham paricintayan_paricintay san_as tvām_tvad sadā_sadā vidyām_vid jānīyām_jñā bhaktyā_bhakti mām_mad abhijānāti_abhijñā yāvān_yāvat yaḥ_yad ca_ca asmi_as tattvataḥ_tattva tathā_tathā keṣu_ka bhāveṣu_bhāva padārtheṣu_padārtha tvam_tvad cintyaḥ_cintay tvad--_tvad cintana--_cintana bhaktiḥ_bhakti mayā_mad kartavyā_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu kimartham_kimartham tat_tad tatra_tatra āha_ah katham_katham iti_iti yogaḥ_yoga yoga--_yoga māyā--_māyā śaktiḥ_śakti asti_as asya_idam iti_iti he_he yogin_yogin tvām_tvad sadā_sadā paricintayan_paricintay saṃsmaran_saṃsmṛ aham_mad kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa ananta--_ananta guṇa--_guṇa yoginam_yogin katham_katham vidyām_vidyā jānīyām_jñā keṣu_ka keṣu_ka ca_ca bhāveṣu_bhāva padārtheṣu_padārtha prakāśamānaḥ_prakāś tvam_tvad ubhayam_ubhaya vada_vad tat_tad ca_ca vibhūti--_vibhūti uddeśena_uddeśa eva_eva setsyati_sidh iti_iti tām_tad upadiśa_upadiś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: vistareṇa_vistara ātmanaḥ_ātman yogam_yoga vibhūtim_vibhūti ca_ca janārdana_janārdana
bhūyas_bhūyas kathaya_kathay tṛptiḥ_tṛpti hi_hi śṛṇvataḥ_śru nā_na asti_as me_mad amṛtam_amṛta

div.p: bhavet_bhū kathayati_kathay āha_ah ātmanaḥ_ātman tava_tvad yogam_yoga sarvajña--_sarvajña tva--_tva sarva--_sarva śakti--_śakti tva--_tva ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa yoga--_yoga aiśvaryam_aiśvarya vibhūtim_vibhūti ca_ca vistareṇa_vistara punar_punar kathaya_kathay hi_hi yatas_yatas tava_tvad vākyam_vākya amṛta--_amṛta rūpam_rūpa śṛṇvataḥ_śru mama_mad tṛptiḥ_tṛpti alam_alam buddhiḥ_buddhi nā_na asti_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana atas_atas vistareṇa_vistara iti_iti ātmanaḥ_ātman tava_tvad yogam_yoga sarvajña--_sarvajña tva--_tva sarva--_sarva śakti--_śakti tva--_tva ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa aiśvarya--_aiśvarya atiśayam_atiśaya vibhūtim_vibhūti ca_ca dhyāna--_dhyāna ālambanam_ālambana vistareṇa_vistara saṃkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa saptame_saptama navame_navama ca_ca uktam_vac api_api bhūyas_bhūyas kathaya_kathay sarvaiḥ_sarva janaiḥ_jana he_he mama_mad api_api yācñā_yācñā tvayi_tvad ucitā_ucita eva_eva uktasya_vac punar_punar kathanam_kathana kutas_kutas yācase_yāc tatra_tatra āha_ah tṛptiḥ_tṛpti alam_alam pratyayena_pratyaya icchā--_icchā vicchittiḥ_vicchitti na_na asti_as hi_hi yasmāt_yad śṛṇvataḥ_śru śravaṇena_śravaṇa pibataḥ_pā tvad--_tvad vākyam_vākya amṛtam_amṛta amṛta--_amṛta vat_vat pade_pada pade_pada svādu_svādu svādu_svādu atra_atra tvad--_tvad vākyam_vākya iti_iti anukteḥ_anukti apahnuti--_apahnuti atiśayokti--_atiśayokti rūpaka--_rūpaka saṅkaraḥ_saṃkara ayam_idam mādhurya--_mādhurya atiśaya--_atiśaya anubhavena_anubhava utkaṇṭhā--_utkaṇṭhā atiśayam_atiśaya vyanakti_vyañj

pravartate_pravṛt bhajante_bhaj tatra_tatra āha_ah vistareṇa_vistara iti_iti he_he janārdana_janārdana iti_iti mādṛśa--_mādṛśa janānām_jana tvam_tvad eva_eva hita--_hita upadeśa--_upadeśa mādhuryeṇa_mādhurya lobham_lobha utpādya_utpāday ardayase_arday yācayasi_yācay iti_iti vayam_mad kim_ka kurmaḥ_kṛ iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tvad--_tvad upadeśa--_upadeśa rūpam_rūpa amṛtam_amṛta śṛṇvataḥ_śru śruti--_śruti rasanayā_rasanā svādayataḥ_svāday

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu pūrva--_pūrva pūrvatra_pūrvatra ajaḥ_aja api_api san_as tva--_tva ādi--_ādi kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa yogaḥ_yoga rasaḥ_rasa aham_mad iti_iti ādinā_ādi vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti ca_ca asakṛt_asakṛt kathitāḥ_kathay kim_ka punar_punar pṛcchasi_pracch iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah vistareṇa_vistara iti_iti sphuṭa--_sphuṭa artham_artha padyam_padya janārdana_janārdana iti_iti prāgvat_prāgvat tvad--_tvad vākyam_vākya amṛtam_amṛta śṛṇvataḥ_śru śrotra--_śrotra rasanayā_rasanā āsvādayataḥ_āsvāday mama_mad tṛptiḥ_tṛpti nā_na asti_as atra_atra tvad--_tvad vākyam_vākya iti_iti anukteḥ_anukti apahnutiḥ_apahnuti prathama--_prathama atiśayoktiḥ_atiśayokti vā_vā tayoḥ_tad saṅkaraḥ_saṃkara vā_vā alaṅkāraḥ_alaṃkāra

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
hanta_hanta te_tvad kathayiṣyāmi_kathay divyāḥ_divya hi_hi ātma--_ātman vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti
prādhānyataḥ_prādhānya kuru--_kuru śreṣṭha_śreṣṭha na_na asti_as antaḥ_anta vistarasya_vistara me_mad

div.p: san_as uvāca_vac hantā_hantṛ iti_iti anukampya_anukamp sambodhanam_sambodhana divyāḥ_divya yāḥ_yad mad--_mad vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti tāḥ_tad prādhānyena_prādhānya te_tvad tubhyam_tvad kathayiṣyāmi_kathay yatas_yatas avāntarasya_avāntara vibhūti--_vibhūti vistarasya_vistara madīyasya_madīya antaḥ_anta na_na asti_as pradhāna--_pradhāna bhūtāḥ_bhū varṇayiṣyāmi_varṇay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana atra_atra uttaram_uttara hantā_hantṛ iti_iti anumatau_anumati yat_yad tvayā_tvad prārthitam_prārthay tat_tad kariṣyāmi_kṛ mā_mā vyākulaḥ_vyākula bhūḥ_bhū iti_iti arjunam_arjuna samāśvāsya_samāśvāsay tat_tad eva_eva kartum_kṛ ārabhate_ārabh kathayiṣyāmi_kathay prādhānyataḥ_prādhānya tāḥ_tad vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti yāḥ_yad divyāḥ_divya hi_hi prasiddhāḥ_prasidh ātmanaḥ_ātman mama_mad asādhāraṇāḥ_asādhāraṇa vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti he_he kuru--_kuru śreṣṭha_śreṣṭha vistareṇa_vistara tu_tu kathanam_kathana aśakyam_aśakya yatas_yatas na_na asti_as antyaḥ_antya vistarasya_vistara me_mad vibhūtīnām_vibhūti atas_atas pradhāna--_pradhāna bhūtāḥ_bhū kāścid_kaścit eva_eva vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti vakṣyāmi_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

asti_as vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti divyāḥ_divya uttamāḥ_uttama eva_eva na_na tu_tu tṛṇa--_tṛṇa iṣṭakā--_iṣṭakā ādyāḥ_ādya atra_atra vibhūti--_vibhūti śabdena_śabda prākṛta--_prākṛta aprākṛta--_aprākṛta vastūni_vastu eva_eva ucyate_vac tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva eva_eva bhagavat--_bhagavant śakti--_śakti samudbhūta--_samudbhū tvāt_tva bhagavat--_bhagavant rūpeṇa_rūpa eva_eva tāratamyena_tāratamya dhyeya--_dhyā tvena_tva abhimatāni_abhiman jñeyāni_jñā

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac hantā_hantṛ iti_iti hantā_hantṛ iti_iti anukampā--_anukampā arthakam_arthaka divyāḥ_divya utkṛṣṭāḥ_utkṛṣṭa na_na tu_tu tṛṇa--_tṛṇa iṣṭakā--_iṣṭakā ādyāḥ_ādya vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti iti_iti prāgvat_prāgvat prādhānyataḥ_prādhānya prādhānyena_prādhānya yatas_yatas tāsām_tad vistarasya_vistara antaḥ_anta na_na asti_as iha_iha vibhūti--_vibhūti śabdena_śabda niyāmaka--_niyāmaka tva--_tva rūpāṇi_rūpa aiśvaryāṇi_aiśvarya bodhyāni_budh vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti bhūtiḥ_bhūti aiśvaryam_aiśvarya iti_iti amara--_amara koṣāt_koṣa prākṛta--_prākṛta aprākṛtāni_aprākṛta ca_ca vastūni_vastu bhūti--_bhūti tvena_tva varṇyāni_varṇay tāni_tad sarvāṇi_sarva sarva--_sarva īśa--_īśa śakti--_śakti vyaṅga--_vyaṅga tvāt_tva sarva--_sarva īśa--_īśa ātmnaā_ātman tāratamyena_tāratamya bhāvyāni_bhū matāni_man yāni_yad sākṣāt_sākṣāt īśvara--_īśvara rūpāṇi_rūpa tattvena_tattva uktāni_vac tāni_tad tu_tu tena_tad rūpeṇa_rūpa bhāvanā--_bhāvanā arthāni_artha eva_eva na_na tu_tu anya--_anya vat_vat tad--_tad śakti--_śakti eka--_eka deśa--_deśa rūpāṇi_rūpa iti_iti bodhyam_budh saṅgateḥ_saṃgati iti_iti

lg.l: aham_mad ātmā_ātman guḍākeśa_guḍākeśa sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta āśaya--_āśaya sthitaḥ_sthā
aham_mad ādiḥ_ādi ca_ca madhyam_madhya ca_ca bhūtānām_bhūta antaḥ_anta eva_eva ca_ca

div.p: kathayati_kathay ādiḥ_ādi janma_janman madhyam_madhya sthitiḥ_sthiti antaḥ_anta saṃhāraḥ_saṃhāra sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta janma--_janman ādi--_ādi hetuḥ_hetu ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatra_tatra prathamam_prathamam tāvat_tāvat mukhyam_mukhya cintanīyam_cintay śṛṇu_śru aham_mad iti_iti sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta āśaye_āśaya hṛd--_hṛd deśe_deśa antaryāmi--_antaryāmin rūpeṇa_rūpa pratyag-ātma--_pratyag-ātman rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca sthitaḥ_sthā ātmā_ātman caitanya--_caitanya ānanda--_ānanda ghanaḥ_ghana tvayā_tvad aham_mad vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva eva_eva iti_iti dhyeyaḥ_dhyā he_he guḍākeśa_guḍākeśa jita--_ji nidrā_nidrā iti_iti dhyāma--_dhyāma sāmarthyam_sāmarthya sūcayati_sūcay evam_evam dhyāna--_dhyāna asāmarthye_asāmarthya tu_tu vakṣyamāṇāni_vac dhyānāni_dhyāna kāryāṇi_kṛ tatra_tatra api_api ādau_ādi dhyeyam_dhyā āha_ah aham_mad eva_eva ādiḥ_ādi ca_ca utpattiḥ_utpatti bhūtānām_bhūta prāṇinām_prāṇin cetana--_cetana tvena_tva loke_loka vyavahriyamāṇānām_vyavahṛ madhyam_madhya ca_ca sthitiḥ_sthiti antaḥ_anta ca_ca nāśaḥ_nāśa sarva--_sarva cetana--_cetana vargāṇām_varga utpatti--_utpatti sthita--_sthā nāśa--_nāśa rūpeṇa_rūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

bhāvaya_bhāvay āha_ah ātmā_ātman prakṛti--_prakṛti antaryāmī_antaryāmin mahat--_mahant sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ puruṣaḥ_puruṣa paramātmā_paramātman he_he guḍākeśa_guḍākeśa jita--_ji nidraḥ_nidrā iti_iti dhyāna--_dhyāna sāmarthyam_sāmarthya sūcayati_sūcay sarva--_sarva bhūtaḥ_bhū yaḥ_yad vairājaḥ_vairāja tasya_tad āśaye_āśaya sthitaḥ_sthā iti_iti samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi virāj_virāj antaryāmī_antaryāmin tathā_tathā sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta āśaye_āśaya sthitaḥ_sthā iti_iti vyaṣṭi--_vyaṣṭi virāj_virāj antaryāmī_antaryāmin ca_ca bhūtānām_bhūta ādiḥ_ādi janma_janman madhyam_madhya sthitiḥ_sthiti antaḥ_anta saṃhāraḥ_saṃhāra tad--_tad tad--_tad hetuḥ_hetu aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah he_he guḍākeśa_guḍākeśa iti_iti vijita--_viji nidrasya_nidrā tad--_tad vicintana--_vicintana kṣama--_kṣama tvam_tva vyajyate_vyañj ātmā_ātman vibhūti--_vibhūti vijñāna--_vijñāna ānandaḥ_ānanda mahat--_mahant sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ ādi--_ādi tri--_tri rūpaḥ_rūpa paramātmā_paramātman aham_mad asmad--_mad śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta āśaya--_āśaya sthitaḥ_sthā tvayā_tvad vicintyaḥ_vicintay sarva--_sarva bhūtā_bhū pradhāna--_pradhāna ādi--_ādi pṛthivī--_pṛthivī anta--_anta tattva--_tattva rūpā_rūpa yā_yad mūla--_mūla prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti tasyāḥ_tad āśaye_āśaya antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa udaśaya--_udaśaya rūpeṇa_rūpa aham_mad eva_eva prakṛti--_prakṛti antaryāmī_antaryāmin sthitaḥ_sthā tathā_tathā sarva--_sarva bhūtaḥ_bhū sarva--_sarva jīva--_jīva abhimānī_abhimānin yaḥ_yad vairājaḥ_vairāja tasya_tad āśaye_āśaya garbha--_garbha uda--_uda śaya--_śaya rūpeṇa_rūpa aham_mad eva_eva samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi virāj--_virāj antaryāmī_antaryāmin sthitaḥ_sthā sarveṣām_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta jīvānām_jīva āśaye_āśaya kṣīroda--_kṣīroda śaya--_śaya rūpeṇa_rūpa aham_mad eva_eva vyaṣṭi--_vyaṣṭi virāj_virāj antaryāmī_antaryāmin sthitaḥ_sthā iti_iti tāni_tad trīṇi_tri rūpāṇi_rūpa mad--_mad vibhūti--_vibhūti tvena_tva tvayā_tvad vincintyāni_vicintay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha subālopaniṣadi_subālopaniṣad prakṛti--_prakṛti ādi--_ādi sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta antaryāmī_antaryāmin sarva--_sarva śeṣī_śeṣin ca_ca nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa paṭhyate_paṭh sātvata--_sātvata tantre_tantra trayaḥ_tri puruṣa--_puruṣa avatārāḥ_avatāra smṛtāḥ_smṛ

viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu tu_tu trīṇi_tri rūpāṇi_rūpa puruṣa--_puruṣa ākhyāni_ākhyā atho_atho viduḥ_vid ekam_eka tu_tu mahataḥ_mahant dvitīyam_dvitīya tantu--_tantu saṃsthitam_saṃsthā tṛtīyam_tṛtīya sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta stham_stha tāni_tad jñātvā_jñā vimucyate_vimuc
te_tad ca_ca vāsudevasya_vāsudeva kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa avatārāḥ_avatāra

yaḥ_yad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa arṇava--_arṇava jale_jala bhajati_bhaj sma_sma yoga--_yoga
nidrām_nidrā iti_iti ādikā_ādika brahma--_brahman saṃhitā--_saṃhitā padya--_padya trayāt_traya
div.l: bhūtānām_bhūta ādiḥ_ādi utpattiḥ_utpatti madhyam_madhya pālanam_pālana antaḥ_anta ca_ca saṃhāraḥ_saṃhāra tad--_tad tad--_tad hetuḥ_hetu aham_mad eva_eva ukta--_vac puruṣa--_puruṣa lakṣyaḥ_lakṣay tvayā_tvad bhāvyaḥ_bhāvay

lg.l: ādityānām_āditya aham_mad viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu jyotiṣām_jyotis raviḥ_ravi aṃśumān_aṃśumant
marīciḥ_marīci marutām_marut asmi_as nakṣatrāṇām_nakṣatra aham_mad śaśī_śaśin

div.p: kathayati_kathay ādityānām_āditya dvādaśānām_dvādaśa madhye_madhya viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu nāma_nāma ādityaḥ_āditya aham_mad jyotiṣām_jyotis prakāśakānām_prakāśaka madhye_madhya aṃśumān_aṃśumant viśva--_viśva vyāpi--_vyāpin raśmi--_raśmi yuktaḥ_yuj raviḥ_ravi sūryaḥ_sūrya aham_mad marutām_marut deva--_deva viśeṣāṇām_viśeṣa madhye_madhya marīci--_marīci nāmā_nāman aham_mad asmi_as yat_yat vā_vā sapta_saptan marut--_marut gaṇāḥ_gaṇa vāyavaḥ_vāyu teṣām_tad madhye_madhya iti_iti te_tad avahaḥ_avaha pravahaḥ_pravaha vivahaḥ_vivaha parāvahaḥ_parāvaha udvahaḥ_udvaha saṃvaha_saṃvaha parivaha_parivaha spata_spata marut--_marut gaṇāḥ_gaṇa nakṣatrāṇām_nakṣatra madhye_madhya candraḥ_candra aham_mad

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etad--_etad aśaktena_aśakta bāhyāni_bāhya dhyānāni_dhyāna kāryāṇi_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah yāvat_yāvat adhyāya--_adhyāya samāptiḥ_samāpti ādityānām_āditya dvādaśānām_dvādaśa madhye_madhya viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu visṇu--_visṇu nāma--_nāman ādityaḥ_āditya aham_mad vāmana--_vāmana avatāraḥ_avatāra vā_vā jyotiṣām_jyotis prakāśakānām_prakāśaka madhye_madhya aham_mad raviḥ_ravi ṃśumān_ṃśumant viśva--_viśva vyāpī_vyāpin prakāśakaḥ_prakāśaka marutām_marut sapta--_saptan saptakānām_saptaka madhye_madhya marīci--_marīci nāmā_nāman aham_mad nakṣatrāṇām_nakṣatra adhipatiḥ_adhipati aham_mad śaśī_śaśin candramāḥ_candramas nirdhāraṇe_nirdhāraṇa ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī atra_atra prāyeṇa_prāyeṇa nirdhāraṇe_nirdhāraṇa ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī kvacid_kvacid sambandhe_sambandha api_api yathā_yathā bhūtānām_bhūta asmi_as cetanā_cetanā iti_iti ādau_ādi vāmana--_vāmana rāma--_rāma ādayaḥ_ādi ca_ca avatārāḥ_avatāra sarva--_sarva aiśvarya--_aiśvarya śālinaḥ_śālin api_api anena_idam rūpeṇa_rūpa dhyāna--_dhyāna vivakṣayā_vivakṣā vibhūtiṣu_vibhūti paṭhyante_paṭh vṛṣṇīnām_vṛṣṇi vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva asmi_as iti_iti tena_tad rūpeṇa_rūpa dhyāna--_dhyāna vivakṣayā_vivakṣā savasya_sava api_api sva--_sva vibhūti--_vibhūti madhye_madhya pāṭha--_pāṭha vat_vat atas_atas param_param ca_ca prāyeṇa_prāyeṇa ayam_idam adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya spaṣṭa--_spaṣṭa arthaḥ_artha iti_iti kvacid_kvacid kvacid_kvacid vyākhyāsyāmaḥ_vyākhyā

āha_ah ādityānām_āditya dvādaśānām_dvādaśa madhye_madhya viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu aham_mad iti_iti tad--_tad nāmā_nāman sūryaḥ_sūrya mad--_mad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam sarvatra_sarvatra prakāśakānām_prakāśaka jyotiṣām_jyotis madhye_madhya aṃśumān_aṃśumant mahā--_mahat kiraṇa--_kiraṇa mālī_mālin raviḥ_ravi aham_mad marīciḥ_marīci pavana--_pavana viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa

baladevaḥ_baladeva ādityānām_āditya dvādaśānām_dvādaśa madhye_madhya viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu vāmanaḥ_vāmana aham_mad jyotiṣām_jyotis prakāśānām_prakāśa madhye_madhya aṃśumān_aṃśumant viśva--_viśva vyāpi--_vyāpin raśmī_raśmi raviḥ_ravi aham_mad marutām_marut ūna--_ūna pañcāśat--_pañcāśat saṅkhyakānām_saṃkhyaka madhye_madhya marīciḥ_marīci aham_mad nakṣatrāṇām_nakṣatra adhipatiḥ_adhipati śaśī_śaśin sudhā--_sudhā varṣī_varṣin candraḥ_candra aham_mad atra_atra nirdhāraṇe_nirdhāraṇa ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī prāyeṇa_prāyeṇa kvacid_kvacid sambandhe_sambandha api_api iti_iti bodhyam_budh

lg.l: vedānām_veda sāmavedaḥ_sāmaveda asmi_as devānām_deva asmi_as vāsavaḥ_vāsava
indriyāṇām_indriya manaḥ_manas ca_ca asmi_as bhūtānām_bhūta asmi_as cetanā_cetanā

div.p: asmi_as asmi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana catūrṇām_catur vedānām_veda madhye_madhya gāna--_gāna mādhuryeṇa_mādhurya ati_ati ramaṇīyaḥ_ramaṇīya sāmavedaḥ_sāmaveda aham_mad asmi_as vāsavaḥ_vāsava indraḥ_indra sarva--_sarva deva--_deva adhipatiḥ_adhipati indriyāṇām_indriya ekādaśānām_ekādaśa pravartakam_pravartaka manaḥ_manas bhūtānām_bhūta sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin sambandhinām_sambandhin pariṇāmānām_pariṇāma madhye_madhya cit--_cit abhivyañjikā_abhivyañjaka buddheḥ_buddhi vṛttiḥ_vṛtti cetanā_cetanā aham_mad asmi_as

baladevaḥ_baladeva vedānām_veda madhye_madhya gīta--_gīta mādhuryeṇa_mādhurya utkarṣāt_utkarṣa sāmavedaḥ_sāmaveda aham_mad devānām_deva madhye_madhya vāsavaḥ_vāsava teṣām_tad rājā_rājan indraḥ_indra aham_mad indriyāṇām_indriya madhye_madhya durjayam_durjaya teṣām_tad pravartakam_pravartaka ca_ca manaḥ_manas aham_mad bhūtānām_bhūta sambandhinī_sambandhin cetanā_cetanā jñāna--_jñāna śaktiḥ_śakti aham_mad

lg.l: rudrāṇām_rudra śaṃkaraḥ_śaṃkara ca_ca asmi_as vitteśaḥ_vitteśa yakṣa--_yakṣa rakṣasām_rakṣas
vasūnām_vasu pāvakaḥ_pāvaka ca_ca asmi_as meruḥ_meru śikhariṇām_śikharin aham_mad

div.p: asmi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana rudrāṇām_rudra ekādaśānām_ekādaśa madhye_madhya śaṅkaraḥ_śaṃkara vitteśaḥ_vitteśa dhana--_dhana adhyakṣaḥ_adhyakṣa kuberaḥ_kubera yakṣa--_yakṣa rakṣasām_rakṣas yakṣānām_yakṣa rākṣasānām_rākṣasa ca_ca vasūnām_vasu aṣṭānām_aṣṭan pāvakaḥ_pāvaka asmi_as meruḥ_meru sumeruḥ_sumeru śikhariṇām_śikharin śikharavatām_śikharavat ati_ati ucchritānām_ucchri parvatānām_parvata

baladevaḥ_baladeva rudrāṇām_rudra ekādaśānām_ekādaśa madhye_madhya śaṅkara--_śaṃkara ākhyaḥ_ākhyā rudraḥ_rudra aham_mad yakṣa--_yakṣa rakṣasām_rakṣas ādhipaḥ_ādhipa vitteśaḥ_vitteśa kuveraḥ_kuvera aham_mad vasūnām_vasu aṣṭānām_aṣṭan madhye_madhya pāvakaḥ_pāvaka agniḥ_agni aham_mad śikhariṇām_śikharin ati_ati ucchritānām_ucchri madhye_madhya

lg.l: purodhasām_purodhas ca_ca mukhyam_mukhya mām_mad viddhi_vid pārtha_pārtha bṛhaspatim_bṛhaspati
senā--_senā nīnām_nī aham_mad skandaḥ_skanda sarasām_saras asmi_as sāgaraḥ_sāgara

div.p: viddhi_vid asmi_as asmi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana indrasya_indra sarva--_sarva rāja--_rājan śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvāt_tva tad--_tad purodhasam_purodhas bṛhaspatim_bṛhaspati sarveṣām_sarva purodhasām_purodhas rāja--_rājan purohitānām_purohita madhye_madhya mukhyam_mukhya śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha mām_mad eva_eva he_he pārtha_pārtha viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā senā--_senā nīnām_nī senāpatīnām_senāpati madhye_madhya deva--_deva senāpatiḥ_senāpati skandaḥ_skanda guhaḥ_guha aham_mad asmi_as sarasām_saras deva--_deva khāta--_khāta jalāśayānām_jalāśaya madhye_madhya sāgaraḥ_sāgara sagara--_sagara putraiḥ_putra khātaḥ_khan jalāśayaḥ_jalāśaya aham_mad asmi_as
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha senā--_senā nīnām_nī iti_iti ārṣam_ārṣa skandhaḥ_skandha kārtikeyaḥ_kārttikeya

baladevaḥ_baladeva indrasya_indra sarva--_sarva rāja--_rājan mukhya--_mukhya tvāt_tva tad--_tad purohitam_purohita bṛhaspatim_bṛhaspati sarva--_sarva patim_pati rāja--_rājan purohitānām_purohita mukhyam_mukhya mām_mad viddhi_vid iti_iti saḥ_tad aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha senā--_senā nīnām_nī iti_iti nuṭ--_nuṭ āgamanaḥ_āgamana tu_tu ārṣaḥ_ārṣa sarva--_sarva rāja--_rājan senānām_senā madhye_madhya skandaḥ_skanda kārttikeyaḥ_kārttikeya aham_mad sarasām_saras sthira--_sthira jalānām_jala madhye_madhya sāgaraḥ_sāgara aham_mad

lg.l: mahā--_mahat ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi bhṛguḥ_bhṛgu aham_mad girām_gir asmi_as ekam_eka akṣaram_akṣara
yajñānām_yajña japa--_japa yajñaḥ_yajña asmi_as sthāvarāṇām_sthāvara himālayaḥ_himālaya

div.p: asmi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana mahā--_mahat ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi sapta--_saptan brahmaṇām_brahman madhye_madhya bhṛguḥ_bhṛgu ati_ati tejasvi--_tejasvin tvāt_tva aham_mad girām_gir vācām_vāc pada--_pada lakṣaṇānām_lakṣaṇa madhye_madhya ekam_eka akṣaram_akṣara padam_pada oṃkāraḥ_oṃkāra aham_mad asmi_as yajñānām_yajña madhye_madhya japa--_japa yajñaḥ_yajña hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādi--_ādi doṣa--_doṣa śūnya--_śūnya tvena_tva atyanta--_atyanta śodhakaḥ_śodhaka aham_mad asmi_as sthāvarāṇām_sthāvara sthitimatām_sthitimat madhye_madhya himālayaḥ_himālaya aham_mad śikharavatām_śikharavat madhye_madhya hi_hi meruḥ_meru aham_mad iti_iti uktam_vac atas_atas sthāvara--_sthāvara tvena_tva śikhara--_śikhara tvena_tva ca_ca artha--_artha bhedau_bheda adoṣaḥ_adoṣa 25_25
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ekam_eka akṣaram_akṣara praṇavaḥ_praṇava
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva mahā--_mahat ṛṣīṇām_ṛṣi brahma--_brahman putrāṇām_putra madhye_madhya ati_ati tejasvī_tejasvin bhṛguḥ_bhṛgu aham_mad girām_gir pada--_pada lakṣaṇānām_lakṣaṇa vācām_vāc madhye_madhya ekam_eka akṣaram_akṣara praṇavaḥ_praṇava aham_mad asmi_as yajñānām_yajña madhye_madhya japa_jap yajñaḥ_yajña asmi_as tasya_tad ahiṃsā--_ahiṃsā ātmaka--_ātmaka tvena_tva utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tvāt_tva sthāvarāṇām_sthāvara sthitimatām_sthitimat madhye_madhya himācalaḥ_himācala aham_mad atyucca--_atyucca tvena_tva ati_ati sthairyeṇa_sthairya ca_ca artha--_artha bhedāt_bheda meru--_meru himālayayoḥ_himālaya vibhūtyoḥ_vibhūti bhedaḥ_bheda 25_25

lg.l: aśvatthaḥ_aśvattha sarva--_sarva vṛkṣāṇām_vṛkṣa devarṣīṇām_devarṣi ca_ca nāradaḥ_nārada
gandharvāṇām_gandharva citrarathaḥ_citraratha siddhānām_siddha kapilaḥ_kapila muniḥ_muni

div.p: prāptāḥ_prāp asmi_as asmi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sarva--_sarva eṣām_idam vṛkṣāṇām_vṛkṣa vanaspatīnām_vanaspati anyeṣām_anya ca_ca devāḥ_deva eva_eva santaḥ_as ye_yad mantra--_mantra darśi--_darśin tvena_tva ṛṣi--_ṛṣi tvam_tva prāptāḥ_prāp te_tad devarṣayaḥ_devarṣi teṣām_tad madhye_madhya nāradaḥ_nārada aham_mad asmi_as gandharvāṇām_gandharva gāna--_gāna dharmaṇām_dharman deva--_deva gāyakānām_gāyaka madhye_madhya citrarathaḥ_citraratha aham_mad asmi_as siddhānām_siddha janmanā_janman eva_eva vinā_vinā prayatnam_prayatna dharma--_dharma jñāna--_jñāna vairāgya--_vairāgya aiśvarya--_aiśvarya atiśayam_atiśaya prāptānām_prāp adhigata--_adhigam parama--_parama arthānām_artha madhye_madhya kapilaḥ_kapila muniḥ_muni aham_mad 26_26
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva pūjya--_pūjay tvena_tva sarva--_sarva vṛkṣāṇām_vṛkṣa madhye_madhya śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha aśvatthaḥ_aśvattha aham_mad devarṣīṇām_devarṣi madhye_madhya parama--_parama bhakta--_bhakta tvena_tva utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa nāradaḥ_nārada aham_mad gandharvāṇām_gandharva madhye_madhya atigāyaka--_atigāyaka tvena_tva utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tvāt_tva citrarathaḥ_citraratha aham_mad siddhānām_siddha svābhāvika--_svābhāvika aṇima--_aṇiman ādimatām_ādimat kapilaḥ_kapila kārdamiḥ_kārdami muniḥ_muni aham_mad 26_26

lg.l: uccaiḥśravasam_uccaiḥśravas aśvānām_aśva viddhi_vid mām_mad amṛta--_amṛta udbhavam_udbhava
airāvatam_airāvata gaja--_gaja indrāṇām_indra narāṇām_nara ca_ca narādhipam_narādhipa

div.p: viddhi_vid sambadhyate_sambandh viddhi_vid

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana aśvānām_aśva madhye_madhya uccaiḥśravasam_uccaiḥśravas amṛta--_amṛta mathana--_mathana udbhavam_udbhava aśvam_aśva mām_mad viddhi_vid airāvatam_airāvata gajam_gaja amṛta--_amṛta mathana--_mathana udbhavam_udbhava gaja--_gaja indrāṇām_indra madhye_madhya mām_mad viddhi_vid narāṇām_nara ca_ca madhye_madhya narādhipam_narādhipa rājānam_rājan mām_mad viddhi_vid iti_iti anuṣajyate_anuṣañj 27_27

baladevaḥ_baladeva aśvānām_aśva madhye_madhya uccaiḥśravasam_uccaiḥśravas gaja--_gaja indrāṇām_indra madhye_madhya airāvatam_airāvata ca_ca mām_mad viddhi_vid amṛta--_amṛta udbhavam_udbhava amṛta--_amṛta arthakāt_arthaka kṣīrābdhi--_kṣīrābdhi mathanāt_mathana jātam_jan iti_iti dvayoḥ_dvi viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa narādhipam_narādhipa rājānam_rājan asahya--_asahya

lg.l: āyudhānām_āyudha aham_mad vajram_vajra dhenūnām_dhenu asmi_as kāmadhuk_kāmaduh
prajanaḥ_prajana ca_ca asmi_as kandarpaḥ_kandarpa sarpāṇām_sarpa asmi_as vāsukiḥ_vāsuki

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara āyudhānām_āyudha iti_iti āyudhānām_āyudha madhye_madhya vajram_vajra asmi_as kāmān_kāma dogdhi_duh iti_iti kāma--_kāma duh_duh prajanaḥ_prajana prajā--_prajā utpatti--_utpatti hetuḥ_hetu kandarpaḥ_kandarpa kāmaḥ_kāma asmi_as na_na kevalam_kevalam sambhoga--_sambhoga mātra--_mātra pradhānaḥ_pradhāna kāmaḥ_kāma mad--_mad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti aśāstrīya--_aśāstrīya tvāt_tva sarpāṇām_sarpa savidhānām_savidha rājā_rājan vāsukiḥ_vāsuki asmi_as 28_28

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana āyudhānām_āyudha astrāṇām_astra madhye_madhya vajram_vajra dadhīceḥ_dadhīci asth--_asthi sambhavam_sambhava astram_astra aham_mad asmi_as dhenūnām_dhenu dogdhrīṇām_dogdhṛ madhye_madhya kāmam_kāma dogdhi_duh iti_iti kāma--_kāma duh_duh samudra--_samudra mathana--_mathana udbhavā_udbhava vasiṣṭhasya_vasiṣṭha kāma--_kāma dhenuḥ_dhenu aham_mad asmi_as kāmānām_kāma madhye_madhya prajanaḥ_prajana prajanayitā_prajanayitṛ putra--_putra utpatti--_utpatti arthaḥ_artha yaḥ_yad kandarpaḥ_kandarpa kāmaḥ_kāma saḥ_tad aham_mad asmi_as sarpāḥ_sarpa ca_ca nāgāḥ_nāga ca_ca jāti--_jāti bhedāt_bheda bhidyante_bhid tatra_tatra sarpāṇām_sarpa madhye_madhya teṣām_tad rājā_rājan vāsukiḥ_vāsuki aham_mad asmi_as 28_28

baladevaḥ_baladeva āyudhānām_āyudha madhye_madhya vajram_vajra paviḥ_pavi aham_mad kāma--_kāma duh_duh vāñchita--_vāñchita pūrayitrī_pūrayitṛ kāma--_kāma dhenuḥ_dhenu aham_mad prajanaḥ_prajana santāna--_saṃtāna utpādakaḥ_utpādaka kandarpaḥ_kandarpa kāmaḥ_kāma aham_mad rati--_rati sukha--_sukha mātra--_mātra hetuḥ_hetu sa_tad na_na aham_mad iti_iti ca_ca śabdāt_śabda sarpāṇām_sarpa eka--_eka śirasām_śiras madhye_madhya vāsukiḥ_vāsuki aham_mad 28_28

lg.l: anantaḥ_ananta ca_ca asmi_as nāgānām_nāga varuṇaḥ_varuṇa yādasām_yādas aham_mad
pitṝṇām_pitṛ aryamā_aryaman ca_ca asmi_as yamaḥ_yama saṃyamatām_saṃyam aham_mad

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara anantaḥ_ananta iti_iti nāgānām_nāga nirviṣāṇām_nirviṣa rājā_rājan anantaḥ_ananta śeṣaḥ_śeṣa aham_mad yādasām_yādas jala--_jala carāṇām_cara rājā_rājan varuṇaḥ_varuṇa aham_mad pitṝṇām_pitṛ rājā_rājan aryamā_aryaman asmi_as saṃyamatām_saṃyam niyamanam_niyamana kurvatām_kṛ madhye_madhya yamaḥ_yama asmi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nāgānām_nāga jāti--_jāti bhedānām_bheda madhye_madhya teṣām_tad rājā_rājan anantaḥ_ananta ca_ca śeṣa--_śeṣa ākhyaḥ_ākhyā aham_mad asmi_as yādasām_yādas jala--_jala carāṇām_cara madhye_madhya teṣām_tad rājā_rājan varuṇaḥ_varuṇa aham_mad asmi_as pitṝṇām_pitṛ madhye_madhya aryamā_aryaman nāma_nāma pitṛ--_pitṛ rājaḥ_rāja ca_ca aham_mad asmi_as saṃyamatām_saṃyam saṃyamam_saṃyama dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma phala--_phala dānena_dāna anugraham_anugraha nigraham_nigraha ca_ca kurvatām_kṛ madhye_madhya yamaḥ_yama aham_mad smi_as 29_29
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yādasām_yādas jala--_jala carāṇām_cara saṃyamatām_saṃyam daṇḍayatām_daṇḍay

baladevaḥ_baladeva nāgānām_nāga aneka--_aneka śirasām_śiras madhye_madhya anantaḥ_ananta śeṣaḥ_śeṣa aham_mad yādasām_yādas jala--_jala jantūnām_jantu adhipaḥ_adhipa varuṇaḥ_varuṇa aham_mad pitṝṇām_pitṛ rājā_rājan aryama--_aryaman ākhyaḥ_ākhyā pitṛ--_pitṛ devaḥ_deva aham_mad saṃyamatām_saṃyam daṇḍayatām_daṇḍay madhye_madhya nyāya--_nyāya daṇḍa--_daṇḍa kṛt_kṛt yamaḥ_yama aham_mad chādeśa--_chādeśa abhāvaḥ_abhāva ārṣaḥ_ārṣa 29_29

lg.l: prahlādaḥ_prahlāda ca_ca asmi_as daityānām_daitya kālaḥ_kāla kalayatām_kalay aham_mad
mṛgāṇām_mṛga ca_ca mṛgendraḥ_mṛgendra aham_mad vainateyaḥ_vainateya ca_ca pakṣiṇām_pakṣin

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara prahlādaḥ_prahlāda iti_iti kalayatām_kalay vaśīkurvatām_vaśīkṛ gaṇayatām_gaṇay vā_vā madhye_madhya kālaḥ_kāla aham_mad asmi_as mṛgendraḥ_mṛgendra siṃhaḥ_siṃha pakṣiṇām_pakṣin madhye_madhya vainateyaḥ_vainateya garuḍaḥ_garuḍa asmi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana daityānām_daitya diti--_diti vaṃśyānām_vaṃśya madhye_madhya prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa hlādayati_hlāday ānandayati_ānanday parama--_parama sāttvika--_sāttvika tvena_tva sarvān_sarva iti_iti prahlādaḥ_prahlāda ca_ca asmi_as kalayatām_kalay saṅkhyānam_saṃkhyāna gaṇanam_gaṇana kurvatām_kṛ madhye_madhya kālaḥ_kāla aham_mad mṛgendraḥ_mṛgendra siṃhaḥ_siṃha mṛgāṇām_mṛga paśūnām_paśu madhye_madhya aham_mad vainateyaḥ_vainateya ca_ca pakṣiṇām_pakṣin vinatā--_vinatā putraḥ_putra garuḍaḥ_garuḍa
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kalayatām_kalay vaśīkurvatām_vaśīkṛ mṛgendraḥ_mṛgendra siṃhaḥ_siṃha vainateyaḥ_vainateya garuḍaḥ_garuḍa

baladevaḥ_baladeva daityānām_daitya diti--_diti vaṃśyānām_vaṃśya madhye_madhya teṣām_tad adhipatiḥ_adhipati bhagavat--_bhagavant niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā atiśayāt_atiśaya varīyān_varīyas prahlādaḥ_prahlāda aham_mad kalayatām_kalay vaśīkurvatām_vaśīkṛ madhye_madhya kālaḥ_kāla aham_mad mṛgāṇām_mṛga paśūnām_paśu madhye_madhya ati_ati vikrameṇa_vikrama utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa mṛgendraḥ_mṛgendra siṃhaḥ_siṃha aham_mad pakṣiṇām_pakṣin madhye_madhya viṣṇu--_viṣṇu ratha--_ratha tvena_tva ati_ati śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha vainateyaḥ_vainateya garuḍaḥ_garuḍa aham_mad

lg.l: pavanaḥ_pavana pavatām_pū asmi_as rāmaḥ_rāma śastrabhṛtām_śastrabhṛt aham_mad
jhaṣāṇām_jhaṣa makaraḥ_makara ca_ca asmi_as srotasām_srotas asmi_as jāhnavī_jāhnavī

div.p: pavatām_pū pāvayitṝṇām_pāvayitṛ vegavatām_vegavat vā_vā madhye_madhya vāyuḥ_vāyu aham_mad asmi_as śastra--_śastra bhṛtām_bhṛt vīrāṇām_vīra rāmaḥ_rāma dāśarathiḥ_dāśarathi yat_yat vā_vā rāmaḥ_rāma paraśurāmaḥ_paraśurāma jhaṣāṇām_jhaṣa matsyānām_matsya madhye_madhya makaraḥ_makara nāma_nāma matsya--_matsya jāti--_jāti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa aham_mad srotasām_srotas pravāha--_pravāha udakānām_udaka madhye_madhya bhāgīrathī_bhāgīrathī

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana pavatām_pū pāvayitṝṇām_pāvayitṛ vegavatām_vegavat vā_vā madhye_madhya pavanaḥ_pavana vāyuḥ_vāyu aham_mad asmi_as śastrabhṛtām_śastrabhṛt śastra--_śastra dhāriṇām_dhārin yuddha--_yuddha kuśalānām_kuśala madhye_madhya rāmaḥ_rāma dāśarathiḥ_dāśarathi akhila--_akhila rākṣasa--_rākṣasa kula--_kula kṣaya--_kṣaya karaḥ_kara parama--_parama vīraḥ_vīra aham_mad asmi_as sākṣāt_sākṣāt sva--_sva rūpasya_rūpa api_api anena_idam rūpeṇa_rūpa cintana--_cintana artham_artha vṛṣṇīnām_vṛṣṇi vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva asmi_as iti_iti vat_vat atra_atra pāṭhaḥ_pāṭha iti_iti prāk_prāk uktam_vac jhaṣāṇām_jhaṣa matsyānām_matsya madhye_madhya makaraḥ_makara nāma_nāma tad--_tad jāti--_jāti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa srotasām_srotas vegena_vega calat--_cal jalānām_jala nadīnām_nadī madhye_madhya sarva--_sarva nadī--_nadī śreṣṭhā_śreṣṭha jāhnavī_jāhnavī gaṅgā_gaṅgā aham_mad asmi_as

lg.l: etat_etad te_tvad kathitam_kathay devi_devī jāmadagneḥ_jāmadagni mahātmanaḥ_mahātman
śakti--_śakti āveśa--_āveśa avatārasya_avatāra caritam_carita śārṅgiṇaḥ_śārṅgin prabhoḥ_prabhu

div.p: āviṣṭaḥ_āviś bhārgave_bhārgava ca_ca abhūt_bhū iti_iti ca_ca
āveśa--_āveśa avatāra--_avatāra lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa ca_ca tatra_tatra eva_eva bhāgavatāmṛte_bhāgavatāmṛta yathā_yathā

jñāna--_jñāna śakti--_śakti ādi--_ādi kalayā_kalā yatra_yatra āviṣṭaḥ_āviś janārdanaḥ_janārdana
te_tad āveśāḥ_āveśa nigadyante_nigad jīvāḥ_jīva eva_eva mahattamāḥ_mahattama iti_iti
jhaṣāṇām_jhaṣa matsyānām_matsya makaraḥ_makara matsya--_matsya jāti--_jāti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa srotasām_srotas srotasvatīnām_srotasvat

baladevaḥ_baladeva pavatām_pū pāvanānām_pāvana vegavatām_vegavat ca_ca madhye_madhya pavanaḥ_pavana vāyuḥ_vāyu aham_mad rāmaḥ_rāma paraśurāmaḥ_paraśurāma jhaṣāṇām_jhaṣa matsyānām_matsya madhye_madhya makaraḥ_makara tad--_tad jāti--_jāti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa aham_mad srotasām_srotas pravahat--_pravah jalānām_jala madhye_madhya jāhnavī_jāhnavī

lg.l: sargāṇām_sarga ādiḥ_ādi antaḥ_anta ca_ca madhyam_madhya ca_ca eva_eva aham_mad arjuna_arjuna
adhyātma--_adhyātma vidyā_vidyā vidyānām_vidyā vādaḥ_vāda pravadatām_pravad aham_mad

div.p: sṛjyante_sṛj iti_iti sargāḥ_sarga ākāśa--_ākāśa ādayaḥ_ādi teṣām_tad ādivantaḥ_ādivat ca_ca madhyam_madhya ca_ca eva_eva aham_mad aham_mad ādiḥ_ādi ca_ca madhyam_madhya ca_ca iti_iti atra_atra sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva pāramaiśvaryam_pāramaiśvarya uktam_vac atra_atra tu_tu utpatti--_utpatti sthiti--_sthiti pralayāḥ_pralaya mad--_mad vibhūti--_vibhūti tvena_tva dhyeyāḥ_dhyā iti_iti ucyate_vac iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa adhyātma--_adhyātma vidyā_vidyā ātma--_ātman vidyā_vidyā pravadatām_pravad vādinām_vādin sambandhinyaḥ_sambandhin vāda--_vāda jalpa--_jalpa vitaṇḍā--_vitaṇḍā ākhyāḥ_ākhyā tisraḥ_tri kathāḥ_kathā prasiddhāḥ_prasidh tāsām_tad madhye_madhya vādaḥ_vāda aham_mad yatra_yatra dvābhyām_dvi api_api pramāṇataḥ_pramāṇa tarkataḥ_tarka ca_ca sva--_sva pakṣaḥ_pakṣa sthāpyate_sthāpay para--_para pakṣaḥ_pakṣa ca_ca chala--_chala jāti--_jāti nigraha--_nigraha sthānaiḥ_sthāna tad--_tad pakṣam_pakṣa dūṣayati_dūṣay na_na tu_tu sva--_sva pakṣam_pakṣa sthāpayati_sthāpay sā_tad vitaṇḍā_vitaṇḍā nāma_nāma kathā_kathā tatra_tatra jalpa--_jalpa vitaṇḍe_vitaṇḍā vijigīṣamāṇayoḥ_vijigīṣ vādinoḥ_vādin śakti--_śakti parīkṣā--_parīkṣā mātra--_mātra phale_phala vādaḥ_vāda tu_tu vīta--_vī rāgayoḥ_rāga śiṣya--_śiṣya ācāryayoḥ_ācārya anyayoḥ_anya vā_vā tattva--_tattva nirūpaṇa--_nirūpaṇa phalaḥ_phala atas_atas asau_adas śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvāt_tva mad--_mad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 32_32

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sargāṇām_sarga acetana--_acetana sṛṣṭīnām_sṛṣṭi ādiḥ_ādi antaḥ_anta ca_ca madhyam_madhya ca_ca utpatti--_utpatti sthiti--_sthiti layāḥ_laya aham_mad eva_eva he_he arjuna_arjuna bhūtānām_bhūta jīva--_jīva āviṣṭānām_āviś cetana--_cetana tvena_tva prasiddhānām_prasidh eva_eva ādiḥ_ādi antaḥ_anta ca_ca madhyam_madhya ca_ca iti_iti uktam_vac upakrame_upakrama iha_iha tu_tu acetana--_acetana sargāṇām_sarga iti_iti na_na paunaruktyam_paunaruktya vidyānām_vidyā madhye_madhya adhyātma--_adhyātma vidyā_vidyā mokṣa--_mokṣa hetuḥ_hetu ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva vidyā_vidyā aham_mad pravadatām_pravad pravadat--_pravad sambandhinām_sambandhin kathā--_kathā bhedānām_bheda vāda--_vāda jalpa--_jalpa vitaṇḍā--_vitaṇḍā ātmakānām_ātmaka madhye_madhya vādaḥ_vāda aham_mad bhūtānām_bhūta asmi_as cetanā_cetanā iti_iti atra_atra yathā_yathā bhūta--_bhūta śabdena_śabda tad--_tad sambandhinaḥ_sambandhin pariṇāmāḥ_pariṇāma lakṣitāḥ_lakṣay tathā_tathā iha_iha pravadat--_pravad śabdena_śabda tad--_tad sambandhinaḥ_sambandhin kathā--_kathā bhedāḥ_bheda lakṣyante_lakṣay atas_atas nirdhāraṇa--_nirdhāraṇa upapattiḥ_upapatti yathā_yathā śrute_śru tu_tu ubhayatra_ubhayatra api_api sambandhe_sambandha ṣaṣṭhī_ṣaṣṭhī tatra_tatra tattva--_tattva bubhutsvoḥ_bubhutsu vīta--_vī rāgayoḥ_rāga sa_sa brahmacāriṇoḥ_brahmacārin guru--_guru śiṣyayoḥ_śiṣya vā_vā pramāṇena_pramāṇa tarkeṇa_tarka ca_ca sādhana--_sādhana dūṣaṇa--_dūṣaṇa ātmā_ātman sa_sa pakṣa--_pakṣa pratipakṣa--_pratipakṣa parigrahaḥ_parigraha tattva--_tattva nirṇaya--_nirṇaya paryantaḥ_paryanta vādaḥ_vāda tat_tad uktam_vac pramāṇa--_pramāṇa tarka--_tarka sādhana--_sādhana upālambhaḥ_upālambha siddhānta--_siddhānta aviruddhaḥ_aviruddha pañcāvayava--_pañcāvayava upapannaḥ_upapad pakṣa--_pakṣa pratipakṣa--_pratipakṣa parigrahaḥ_parigraha vādaḥ_vāda iti_iti tattva--_tattva nirṇayasya_nirṇaya tattva--_tattva nirṇayasya_nirṇaya saṃrakṣaṇa--_saṃrakṣaṇa artham_artha vijigīṣu--_vijigīṣu kathe_kathā jalpa--_jalpa vitaṇḍe_vitaṇḍā jaya--_jaya parāya--_parāya ja--_ja mātra--_mātra paryante_paryanta tat_tad uktam_vac tattva--_tattva adhyavasāya--_adhyavasāya saṃrakṣaṇa--_saṃrakṣaṇa artham_artha jalpa--_jalpa vitaṇḍe_vitaṇḍā bīja--_bīja praroha--_praroha saṃrakṣaṇa--_saṃrakṣaṇa artham_artha kaṇṭaka--_kaṇṭaka śākhā--_śākhā prāvaraṇa--_prāvaraṇa vat_vat iti_iti chala--_chala jāti--_jāti nigraha--_nigraha sthānaiḥ_sthāna para--_para pakṣaḥ_pakṣa dūṣyate_dūṣay iti_iti jalpe_jalpa vitaṇḍāyām_vitaṇḍā ca_ca samānam_samāna vitaṇḍāyām_vitaṇḍā ekena_eka sva--_sva pakṣaḥ_pakṣa sthāpyate_sthāpay anyena_anya sa_tad dūṣyate_dūṣay jalpe_jalpa tu_tu ubhābhyām_ubh api_api sva--_sva pakṣaḥ_pakṣa sthāpyate_sthāpay ubhābhyām_ubh api_api para--_para pakṣaḥ_pakṣa dūṣyate_dūṣay iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa tat_tad uktam_vac yathā_yathā ukta--_vac upapanna--_upapad chala--_chala jāti--_jāti nigraha--_nigraha sthāna--_sthāna sādhana--_sādhana upalambhaḥ_upalambha jalpaḥ_jalpa sa_tad pratipakṣa--_pratipakṣa sthāpanā--_sthāpanā hīnaḥ_hā vitaṇḍā_vitaṇḍā iti_iti atas_atas vitaṇḍā--_vitaṇḍā dvaya--_dvaya śarīra--_śarīra tvāt_tva jalpaḥ_jalpa nāma_nāma na_na ekā_eka kathā_kathā kintu_kiṃtu śakti--_śakti atiśaya--_atiśaya jñāna--_jñāna artham_artha samaya--_samaya bandha--_bandha mātreṇa_mātra pravartate_pravṛt iti_iti khaṇḍana--_khaṇḍana kārāḥ_kāra tattva--_tattva adhyvasāya--_adhyvasāya paryavasāyi--_paryavasāyin tvena_tva tu_tu vādasya_vāda śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvam_tva uktam_vac eva_eva 32_32

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sṛjyante_sṛj iti_iti sargāḥ_sarga ākāśa--_ākāśa ādayaḥ_ādi teṣām_tad ādiḥ_ādi sṛṣṭiḥ_sṛṣṭi antaḥ_anta saṃhāraḥ_saṃhāra madhyam_madhya pālanam_pālana ca_ca iti_iti sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi sthiti--_sthiti pralayāḥ_pralaya mad--_mad vibhūti--_vibhūti tvena_tva dhyeyāḥ_dhyā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha aham_mad ādiḥ_ādi ca_ca madhyam_madhya ca_ca iti_iti atra_atra sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi kartā_kartṛ parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara eva_eva uktaḥ_vac vidyānām_vidyā jñānānām_jñāna madhye_madhya aham_mad ātma--_ātman vidyā_vidyā ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna pravadatām_pravad sva--_sva pakṣam_pakṣa sthāpana--_sthāpana para--_para pakṣa--_pakṣa dūṣaṇa--_dūṣaṇa ādi--_ādi rūpa--_rūpa jalpa--_jalpa vitaṇḍā--_vitaṇḍā ādi--_ādi kurvatām_kṛ vādaḥ_vāda tattva--_tattva nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya pravṛtti--_pravṛtti siddhānte_siddhānta yaḥ_yad saḥ_tad aham_mad 32_32

baladevaḥ_baladeva sargāṇām_sarga mahat--_mahant ādīnām_ādi jaḍa--_jaḍa sṛṣṭīnām_sṛṣṭi ādiḥ_ādi antaḥ_anta madhyam_madhya ca_ca aham_mad iti_iti teṣām_tad sarga--_sarga saṃhāra--_saṃhāra pālanāni_pālana mad--_mad vibhūti--_vibhūti tayā_tā bhāvyāni_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha aham_mad ādiḥ_ādi ca_ca iti_iti ādau_ādi mad--_mad sva--_sva aṃśa--_aṃśa cetanānām_cetana bhūtānām_bhūta sarga--_sarga ādi--_ādi hetuḥ_hetu mad--_mad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti iti_iti uktam_vac atas_atas na_na punar_punar punar_punar uktiḥ_ukti

lg.l: aṅgāni_aṅga vedāḥ_veda catvāraḥ_catur mīmāṃsā_mīmāṃsā nyāya--_nyāya vistaraḥ_vistara
dharma--_dharma śāstram_śāstra purāṇam_purāṇa ca_ca vidyāḥ_vidyā hi_hi etāḥ_etad caturdaśa_caturdaśan

div.p: iti_iti uktānām_vac vidyānām_vidyā madhye_madhya adhyātma--_adhyātma vidyā_vidyā sa_sa parikara--_parikara paramātma--_paramātman nirṇetrī_nirṇetṛ catur--_catur lakṣaṇī_lakṣaṇa vedānta--_vedānta vidyā_vidyā aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pravadatām_pravad sambandhī_sambandhin yaḥ_yad vādaḥ_vāda saḥ_tad aham_mad teṣām_tad khalu_khalu vāda--_vāda jalpa--_jalpa vitaṇḍāḥ_vitaṇḍā tisraḥ_tri kathāḥ_kathā prasiddhāḥ_prasidh tatra_tatra ubhaya--_ubhaya sādhanavatī_sādhanavat vijigīṣu--_vijigīṣu kathā_kathā jalpaḥ_jalpa yatra_yatra ubhābhyām_ubh pramāṇena_pramāṇa sva--_sva pakṣaḥ_pakṣa sthāpyate_sthāpay chala--_chala jāti--_jāti nigraha--_nigraha sthānaiḥ_sthāna para--_para pakṣaḥ_pakṣa dūṣyate_dūṣay sva--_sva pakṣa--_pakṣa sthāpana--_sthāpana hanā_han para--_para pakṣa--_pakṣa dūṣaṇa--_dūṣaṇa avasānā_avasāna kathā_kathā vitaṇḍā_vitaṇḍā ete_etad pravadatoḥ_pravad vijigīṣvoḥ_vijigīṣu śakti--_śakti mātra--_mātra parīkṣake_parīkṣaka niṣphale_niṣphala tattva--_tattva bubhutsu--_bubhutsu kathā_kathā vādaḥ_vāda sa_tad ca_ca tattva--_tattva nirṇaya--_nirṇaya phalaka--_phalaka tvena_tva utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tvāt_tva mad--_mad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti iti_iti 32_32

lg.l: akṣarāṇām_akṣara akāraḥ_akāra asmi_as dvandvaḥ_dvaṃdva sāmāsikasya_sāmāsika ca_ca
aham_mad eva_eva akṣayaḥ_akṣaya kālaḥ_kāla dhātā_dhātṛ aham_mad viśvatomukhaḥ_viśvatomukha

div.p: akṣarāṇām_akṣara varṇānām_varṇa madhye_madhya akāraḥ_akāra asmi_as tasya_tad sarva--_sarva vāc--_vāc maya--_maya tvena_tva śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvāt_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti akāraḥ_akāra vai_vai sarvā_sarva vāc_vāc sā_tad eṣā_etad sparśa--_sparśa ūṣambhiḥ_ūṣam vyajyamānā_vyañj bahvī_bahu nānā_nānā rūpā_rūpa bhavati_bhū iti_iti sāmāsikasya_sāmāsika samāsa--_samāsa samūhasya_samūha madhye_madhya dvandvaḥ_dvaṃdva rāma--_rāma kṛṣṇau_kṛṣṇa iti_iti ādi--_ādi sāmāsaḥ_sāmāsa asmi_as ubhaya--_ubhaya pada--_pada pradhāna--_pradhāna tvena_tva śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvāt_tva akṣayaḥ_akṣaya pravāha--_pravāha rūpaḥ_rūpa kālaḥ_kāla aham_mad eva_eva kālaḥ_kāla kalayatām_kalay aham_mad iti_iti atra_atra āyuḥ_āyus gaṇanā--_gaṇanā ātmakaḥ_ātmaka saṃvatsara--_saṃvatsara śata--_śata ādi--_ādi āyuḥ--_āyus svarūpaḥ_svarūpa kālaḥ_kāla uktaḥ_vac sa_tad ca_ca tasmin_tad āyuṣi_āyus kṣīṇe_kṣi sati_as kṣīyate_kṣi atra_atra tu_tu pravāha--_pravāha ātmakaḥ_ātmaka akṣayaḥ_akṣaya kālaḥ_kāla ucyate_vac iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa karma--_karman phala--_phala vidhātṝṇām_vidhātṛ madhye_madhya viśvatomukhaḥ_viśvatomukha dhātā_dhātṛ sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala vidhātā_vidhātṛ aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 33_33

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana akṣarāṇām_akṣara sarveṣām_sarva varṇānām_varṇa madhye_madhya akāraḥ_akāra aham_mad asmi_as a-kāraḥ_a-kāra vai_vai sarvā_sarva vāc_vāc iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tasya_tad śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvam_tva prasiddham_prasidh dvandvaḥ_dvaṃdva samāsaḥ_samāsa ubhaya--_ubhaya padārtha--_padārtha pradhānaḥ_pradhāna sāmāsikasya_sāmāsika samāsa--_samāsa samūhasya_samūha madhye_madhya aham_mad asmi_as pūrva--_pūrva padārtha--_padārtha pradhānaḥ_pradhāna avyayībhāvaḥ_avyayībhāva uttara--_uttara padārtha--_padārtha pradhānaḥ_pradhāna tatpuruṣaḥ_tatpuruṣa anya--_anya padārtha--_padārtha pradhānaḥ_pradhāna bahuvrīhiḥ_bahuvrīhi iti_iti teṣām_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya padārtha--_padārtha sāmya--_sāmya abhāvena_abhāva apakṛṣṭa--_apakṛṣṭa tvāt_tva kṣayi--_kṣayin kāla--_kāla abhimānī_abhimānin akṣayaḥ_akṣaya kālaḥ_kāla jñaḥ_jña kāla--_kāla kālaḥ_kāla guṇī_guṇin sarva--_sarva vidyaḥ_vidyā iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti prasiddhaḥ_prasidh aham_mad eva_eva kālaḥ_kāla kalayatām_kalay aham_mad iti_iti atra_atra tu_tu kṣayī_kṣayin kālaḥ_kāla uktaḥ_vac iti_iti bhedaḥ_bheda karma--_karman phala--_phala vidhātṝṇām_vidhātṛ
madhye_madhya viśvatomukhaḥ_viśvatomukha sarvatas_sarvatas mukhaḥ_mukha dhātā_dhātṛ sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala dātā_dātṛ īśvaraḥ_īśvara aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sāmāsikasya_sāmāsika samāsa--_samāsa samūhasya_samūha madhye_madhya dvandvaḥ_dvaṃdva ubhaya--_ubhaya padārtha--_padārtha pradhāna--_pradhāna tvena_tva tasya_tad samāseṣu_samāsa śraiṣṭhyāt_śraiṣṭhya akṣayaḥ_akṣaya kālaḥ_kāla saṃhartṝṇām_saṃhartṛ madhye_madhya mahākālaḥ_mahākāla rudraḥ_rudra viśvatomukhaḥ_viśvatomukha caturbhyaḥ_catur aham_mad dhātā_dhātṛ sraṣṭṝṇām_sraṣṭṛ madhye_madhya brahmā_brahman 33_33

baladevaḥ_baladeva akṣarāṇām_akṣara varṇānām_varṇa madhye_madhya aham_mad a-kāraḥ_a asmi_as a-kāraḥ_a-kāra vai_vai sarvā_sarva vāc_vāc iti_iti śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca sāmāsikasya_sāmāsika samāsa--_samāsa samūhasya_samūha madhye_madhya dvandvaḥ_dvaṃdva aham_mad avyayībhāva--_avyayībhāva tatpuruṣa--_tatpuruṣa bahuvrīhiṣu_bahuvrīhi ubhaya--_ubhaya padārtha--_padārtha pradhāna--_pradhāna tā--_tā virahiṣu_virahin madhye_madhya tasya_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya padārtha--_padārtha pradhāna--_pradhāna tayā_tā utkṛṣṭ--_utkṛṣṭ tatvāt_tatva saṃhartṝṇām_saṃhartṛ madhye_madhya akṣayaḥ_akṣaya sraṣṭṝṇām_sraṣṭṛ madhye_madhya viśvatomukhaḥ_viśvatomukha catur--_catur vaktraḥ_vaktra dhātā_dhātṛ vidhiḥ_vidhi aham_mad 33_33

lg.l: mṛtyuḥ_mṛtyu sarva--_sarva haraḥ_hara ca_ca aham_mad udbhavaḥ_udbhava ca_ca bhaviṣyatām_bhū
kīrtiḥ_kīrti śrīḥ_śrī vāc_vāc ca_ca nārīṇām_nārī smṛtiḥ_smṛti medhā_medhā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti kṣamā_kṣamā

div.p: saṃhārakānām_saṃhāraka madhye_madhya sarva--_sarva haraḥ_hara mṛtyuḥ_mṛtyu aham_mad bhaviṣyatām_bhū bhāvi--_bhāvin kalyāṇānām_kalyāṇa prāṇinām_prāṇin udbhavaḥ_udbhava abhudayaḥ_abhudaya aham_mad nārīṇām_nārī madhye_madhya kīrti--_kīrti ādyāḥ_ādya spata--_spata devatā--_devatā rūpāḥ_rūpa striyaḥ_strī aham_mad yāsām_yad ābhāsa--_ābhāsa mātra--_mātra yogena_yoga prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin ślāghyāḥ_ślāgh bhavanti_bhū tāḥ_tad kīrti--_kīrti ādyāḥ_ādya striyaḥ_strī mad--_mad vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana saṃhāra--_saṃhāra kāriṇām_kārin madhye_madhya sarva--_sarva haraḥ_hara sarva--_sarva saṃhāra--_saṃhāra kārī_kārin mṛtyuḥ_mṛtyu aham_mad bhaviṣyatām_bhū bhāvi--_bhāvin kalyāṇānām_kalyāṇa yaḥ_yad udbhavaḥ_udbhava utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa sa_tad ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva nārīṇām_nārī madhye_madhya kīrtiḥ_kīrti śrīḥ_śrī vāc_vāc smṛtiḥ_smṛti medhā_medhā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti kṣamā_kṣamā iti_iti ca_ca sapta_saptan dharma--_dharma patnyaḥ_patnī aham_mad eva_eva tatra_tatra kīrtiḥ_kīrti dhārmika--_dhārmika tva--_tva nimittā_nimitta praśasta--_praśaṃs tvena_tva nānā_nānā diś--_diś deśīya--_deśīya loka--_loka jñāna--_jñāna viṣaya--_viṣaya tā--_tā rūpā_rūpa khyātiḥ_khyāti śrīḥ_śrī dharma--_dharma artha--_artha kāma--_kāma sampad_sampad śarīra--_śarīra śobhā_śobhā vā_vā kāntiḥ_kānti vā_vā vāc_vāc sarasvatī_sarasvatī sarvasya_sarva arthasya_artha prakāśikā_prakāśaka saṃskṛtā_saṃskṛta vāṇī_vāṇī ca-kārāt_ca-kāra mūrti--_mūrti ādayaḥ_ādi api_api dharma--_dharma patnyaḥ_patnī gṛhyante_grah ucchṛṅkhala--_ucchṛṅkhala pravṛtti--_pravṛtti kāraṇena_kāraṇa cāpala--_cāpala prāptau_prāpti tad--_tad nivartana--_nivartana śaktiḥ_śakti vā_vā kṣamā_kṣamā harṣa--_harṣa viṣādayoḥ_viṣāda avikṛta--_avikṛta citta--_citta tā_tā yāsām_yad ābhāsa--_ābhāsa mātra--_mātra sambandhena_sambandha api_api janaḥ_jana sarva--_sarva loka--_loka ādaraṇīyaḥ_ādṛ bhavati_bhū tāsām_tad sarva--_sarva strīṣu_strī uttama--_uttama tvam_tva ati_ati prasiddham_prasidh eva_eva

bhaviṣyatām_bhū bhāvinām_bhāvin prāṇi--_prāṇin vikārāṇām_vikāra madhye_madhya udbhavaḥ_udbhava prathama--_prathama vikāraḥ_vikāra jagma_gam aham_mad nārīṇām_nārī madhye_madhya kīrtiḥ_kīrti khyātiḥ_khyāti śrīḥ_śrī kāntiḥ_kānti vāc_vāc saṃsmṛtā_saṃsmṛ vāṇī_vāṇī iti_iti tisraḥ_tri tathā_tathā smṛti--_smṛti ādayaḥ_ādi catasraḥ_catur ca-kārāt_ca-kāra mūrti--_mūrti ādayaḥ_ādi ca_ca anyāḥ_anya dharma--_dharma patnyaḥ_patnī ca_ca aham_mad

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_prātikṣaṇika mṛtyūnām_mṛtyu madhye_madhya sarva--_sarva smṛti--_smṛti haraḥ_hara mṛtyuḥ_mṛtyu aham_mad bhaviṣyatām_bhū bhāvinām_bhāvin prāṇi--_prāṇin vikārāṇām_vikāra udbhavaḥ_udbhava janma--_janman ākhyaḥ_ākhyā prathama--_prathama vikāraḥ_vikāra aham_mad nārīṇām_nārī madhye_madhya kīrti--_kīrti ādayaḥ_ādi sapta_saptan mad--_mad vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti daivatāḥ_daivata hi_hi etāḥ_etad yāsām_yad ābhāsena_ābhāsa api_api narāḥ_nara ślāghyāḥ_ślāgh bhavanti_bhū tatra_tatra kīrtiḥ_kīrti dhārmika--_dhārmika tva--_tva ādi--_ādi sādguṇya--_sādguṇya khyātiḥ_khyāti śrīḥ_śrī tri--_tri varga--_varga sampad_sampad kāya--_kāya dyutiḥ_dyuti vā_vā vāc_vāc sarva--_sarva artha--_artha vyañjakā_vyañjaka saṃskṛta--_saṃskṛta bhāṣā_bhāṣā medhā_medhā bahu--_bahu śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha avadhāraṇa--_avadhāraṇa śaktiḥ_śakti kṣamā_kṣamā harṣe_harṣa viṣāde_viṣāda ca_ca prāpte_prāp nirvikāra--_nirvikāra citta--_citta tā_tā

lg.l: bṛhat_bṛhant sāma_sāman tathā_tathā sāmnām_sāman gāyatrī_gāyatrī chandasām_chandas aham_mad
māsānām_māsa mārgaśīrṣaḥ_mārgaśīrṣa aham_mad ṛtūnām_ṛtu kusumākaraḥ_kusumākara

div.p: tvām_tvad id_id hi_hi havāmahe_hvā iti_iti asyām_idam ṛci_ṛc gīyamānam_gā bṛhat--_bṛhant sāma_sāman tena_tena ca_ca indram_indra sarva--_sarva īśvara--_īśvara tvena_tva sthūyate_sthā iti_iti śraiṣṭhyam_śraiṣṭhya chanda--_chanda viśiṣṭānām_viśiṣ mantrāṇām_mantra madhye_madhya gāyatrī_gāyatrī mantraḥ_mantra aham_mad dvija--_dvija tva--_tva āpādaka--_āpādaka tvena_tva soma--_soma āharaṇe_āharaṇa ca_ca śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvāt_tva kusumākaraḥ_kusumākara vasantaḥ_vasanta

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana vedānām_veda sāmavedaḥ_sāmaveda asmi_as iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra ayam_idam anyaḥ_anya viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa sāmnām_sāman ṛc--_ṛc akṣara--_akṣara ārūḍhānām_āruh gīti--_gīti viśeṣāṇām_viśeṣa madhye_madhya tvām_tvad id_id hi_hi havāmahe_hvā iti_iti asyām_idam ṛci_ṛc gīti--_gīti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa bṛhat--_bṛhant sāma_sāman tat_tad ca_ca atirātre_atirātra pṛṣṭha--_pṛṣṭha stotram_stotra sarva--_sarva īśvara--_īśvara tvena_tva indra--_indra stuti--_stuti rūpam_rūpa anyatas_anyatas śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvāt_tva aham_mad chandasām_chandas niyata--_niyam akṣara--_akṣara pāda--_pāda tva--_tva rūpa--_rūpa chandaḥ--_chandas viśiṣṭānām_viśiṣ ṛcām_ṛc madhye_madhya dvijāteḥ_dvijāti dvitīya--_dvitīya janma--_janman hetutvena_hetutva prātaḥsavana--_prātaḥsavana ādi--_ādi savana--_savana traya--_traya vyāpi--_vyāpin tvena_tva tirṣṭubh--_tirṣṭubh jagatībhyām_jagatī soma--_soma āharaṇa--_āharaṇa artham_artha hāritāni_hāray jagatyā_jagatī trīṇi_tri triṣṭubhā_triṣṭubh ekam_eka iti_iti catvāri_catur taiḥ_tad akṣaraiḥ_akṣara saha_saha somasya_soma āharaṇena_āharaṇa ca_ca sarva--_sarva śreṣṭhā_śreṣṭha gāyatrī_gāyatrī ṛc_ṛc aham_mad catur--_catur akṣarāṇi_akṣara ha_ha vai_vai agre_agra chandāṃsi_chandas āsu_āsū tatas_tatas jagatī_jagatī somam_soma acchātpat_chātp sā_tad trīṇi_tri akṣarāṇi_akṣara hitvā_hā jagām_gā tatas_tatas triṣṭubh_triṣṭubh somam_soma acchāpatat_acchāpat sā_tad ekam_eka akṣaram_akṣara hitvā_hā apatat_pat tatas_tatas gāyatrī_gāyatrī somam_soma somam_soma ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt aṣṭa--_aṣṭan akṣarā_akṣara gāyatrī_gāyatrī iti_iti upakramya_upakram tat_tad āhuḥ_ah gāyatrāṇi_gāyatra vai_vai sarvāṇi_sarva savanāni_savana gāyatrī_gāyatrī hi_hi eva_eva etat_etad upasṛjamānaiḥ_upasṛj iti_iti śatapatha--_śatapatha śruteḥ_śruti gāyatrī_gāyatrī vai_vai idam_idam sarvam_sarva bhūtam_bhū iti_iti ādi--_ādi chāndogya--_chāndogya śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca
