māsānām_māsa dvādaśānām_dvādaśa madhye_madhya śīrta--_śṛ ātapa--_ātapa śūnyatvena_śūnyatva ca_ca sukha--_sukha hetuḥ_hetu mārgaśīrṣaḥ_mārgaśīrṣa aham_mad ṛtūnām_ṛtu ṣaṇṇām_ṣaṣ madhye_madhya kusuma--_kusuma ākaraḥ_ākara sarva--_sarva sugandhi--_sugandhi kusumānām_kusuma ākaraḥ_ākara ati_ati ramaṇīyaḥ_ramaṇīya vasantaḥ_vasanta vasante_vasanta brāhmaṇam_brāhmaṇa upanayīta_upanī vasante_vasanta brāhmaṇaḥ_brāhmaṇa agnīnāt_agnīna adhīta_adhī vasante_vasanta vasante_vasanta jyotiṣā_jyotis yajeta_yaj tat_tad vai_vai vasante_vasanta eva_eva abhyārabheta_abhyārabh vasantaḥ_vasanta vai_vai brāhamasya_brāhama ṛtuḥ_ṛtu iti_iti ādi--_ādi śāstra--_śāstra prasiddhaḥ_prasidh aham_mad asmi_as

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha vedānām_veda sāmavedaḥ_sāmaveda asmi_as iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra sāmnām_sāman api_api madhye_madhya bṛhat--_bṛhant sāma_sāman tvām_tvad id_id hi_hi havāmahe_hvā iti_iti asyām_idam ṛci_ṛc vigīyamānam_vigā bṛhat--_bṛhant sāma_sāman chandasām_chandas madhye_madhya gāyatrī_gāyatrī nāma_nāma chandaḥ_chandas

baladevaḥ_baladeva vedānām_veda sāmavedaḥ_sāmaveda asmi_as iti_iti uktam_vac prāk_prāk tatra_tatra anyam_anya viśeṣam_viśeṣa āha_ah bṛhat_bṛhat iti_iti sāmnām_sāman ṛk--_ṛc akṣara--_akṣara rūḍhānām_ruh gīti--_gīti viśeṣāṇām_viśeṣa madhye_madhya tvām_tvad id_id hi_hi havāmahe_hvā iti_iti asyām_idam ṛci_ṛc gītim_gīti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa bṛhat--_bṛhant sāma_sāman tat_tad ca_ca atirātre_atirātra pṛṣṭha--_pṛṣṭha stotram_stotra sarva--_sarva īśvara--_īśvara tva--_tva indra--_indra stuti--_stuti rūpam_rūpa chandasām_chandas niyata--_niyam akṣara--_akṣara pāda--_pāda tva--_tva rūpa--_rūpa chandaḥ--_chandas viśiṣṭānām_viśiṣ ṛcām_ṛc madhye_madhya gāyatrī_gāyatrī ṛc_ṛc aham_mad dvijāteḥ_dvijāti dvitīya--_dvitīya janma--_janman hetutvena_hetutva tasyāḥ_tad śraiṣṭhyāt_śraiṣṭhya gāyatrī_gāyatrī vai_vai idam_idam sarvam_sarva bhūtam_bhū yat_yad idam_idam kim_ka ca_ca iti_iti brahma--_brahman avatāra--_avatāra tva--_tva śravaṇāt_śravaṇa ca_ca mārgaśīrṣaḥ_mārgaśīrṣa aham_mad iti_iti abhinava--_abhinava dhānāydi--_dhānāydi sampattyā_sampatti tasya_tad anyebhyaḥ_anya śraiṣṭhyāt_śraiṣṭhya kusumākaraḥ_kusumākara vasantaḥ_vasanta aham_mad iti_iti śīta--_śīta ātapa--_ātapa abhāvena_abhāva vividha--_vividha sugandhi--_sugandhi puṣpa--_puṣpa maya--_maya tvena_tva mad--_mad utsava--_utsava hetu--_hetu tvena_tva ca_ca tasya_tad anyebhyaḥ_anya śraiṣṭhyāt_śraiṣṭhya

lg.l: dyūtam_dyūta chalayatām_chalay asmi_as tejaḥ_tejas tejasvinām_tejasvin aham_mad
jayaḥ_jaya asmi_as vyavasāyaḥ_vyavasāya asmi_as sattvam_sattva sattvavatām_sattvavat aham_mad

div.p: chalayatām_chalay anyonya--_anyonya vañcana--_vañcana parāṇām_para sambandhi_sambandhin dyūtam_dyūta asmi_as tejasvinām_tejasvin prabhāvavatām_prabhāvavat tejaḥ_tejas prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva asmi_as jetṝṇām_jetṛ jayaḥ_jaya asmi_as vyavasāyinām_vyavasāyin udyamavatām_udyamavat vyavasāyaḥ_vyavasāya udyamaḥ_udyama asmi_as sattvavatām_sattvavat sāttvikānām_sāttvika sattvam_sattva aham_mad

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana chalayatām_chalay chalasya_chala para--_para vañcanasya_vañcana kartṝṇām_kartṛ sambandhi_sambandhin dyūtam_dyūta akṣa--_akṣa devana--_devana ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sarva--_sarva sva--_sva apahāra--_apahāra kāraṇam_kāraṇa aham_mad asmi_as tejasvinām_tejasvin ati_ati ugra--_ugra prabhāvavatām_prabhāvavat sambandhi_sambandhin tejaḥ_tejas apratihata--_apratihata ajña--_ajña tvam_tva aham_mad asmi_as jetṝṇām_jetṛ parājita--_parāji apekṣayā_apekṣā utkarṣa--_utkarṣa lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa jayaḥ_jaya asmi_as vyavasāyinām_vyavasāyin vyavasāyaḥ_vyavasāya phala--_phala avyabhicārī_avyabhicārin udyamaḥ_udyama aham_mad asmi_as sattvavatām_sattvavat sāttvikānām_sāttvika dharma--_dharma jñāna--_jñāna vairāgya--_vairāgya aiśvarya--_aiśvarya lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sattva--_sattva kāryam_kārya eva_eva atra_atra sattvam_sattva aham_mad
asmi_as asmi_as asmi_as asmi_as

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_chal mithas_mithas vañcanām_vañcana kurvatām_kṛ sambandhi_sambandhin dyūtam_dyūta sarva--_sarva sva--_sva haram_hara akṣa--_akṣa devana--_devana ādi_ādi aham_mad tejasvinām_tejasvin prabhāvatām_prabhāvat sambandhi_sambandhin tejaḥ_tejas prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva aham_mad asmi_as jetṝṇām_jetṛ parājita--_parāji apekṣayā_apekṣā utkarṣa--_utkarṣa lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa jayaḥ_jaya asmi_as jetṝṇām_jetṛ sambandhi_sambandhin jayaḥ_jaya aham_mad vyavasāyinām_vyavasāyin udyaminām_udyamin sambandhī_sambandhin vyavasāyaḥ_vyavasāya phalavān_phalavat udyamaḥ_udyama aham_mad sattvavatām_sattvavat balinām_balin sambandhī_sambandhin sattvam_sattva balam_bala aham_mad

lg.l: vṛṣṇīnām_vṛṣṇi vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva asmi_as pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava dhanaṃjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya
munīnām_muni api_api aham_mad vyāsaḥ_vyāsa kavīnām_kavi uśanā_uśanas kaviḥ_kavi

div.p: upadiśāmi_upadiś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sākṣāt_sākṣāt īśvarasya_īśvara api_api vibhūti--_vibhūti madhye_madhya pāṭhaḥ_pāṭha tena_tad rūpeṇa_rūpa cintana--_cintana arthaḥ_artha iti_iti prāk_prāk eva_eva uktam_vac vṛṣṇīnām_vṛṣṇi madhye_madhya vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva vasudeva--_vasudeva putra--_putra tvena_tva prasiddhaḥ_prasidh tvad--_tvad upadeṣṭā_upadeṣṭṛ ayam_idam aham_mad tathā_tathā pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava madhye_madhya dhanañjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya tvam_tvad eva_eva aham_mad munīnām_muni manana--_manana śīlānām_śīla api_api madhye_madhya veda--_veda vyāsaḥ_vyāsa aham_mad kavīnām_kavi krānta--_krānta darśinām_darśin sūkṣma--_sūkṣma artha--_artha vivekinām_vivekin madhye_madhya uśanā_uśanas kaviḥ_kavi iti_iti khyātaḥ_khyā śukraḥ_śukra aham_mad 37_37

baladevaḥ_baladeva vṛṣṇīnām_vṛṣṇi madhye_madhya vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva vasudeva--_vasudeva putraḥ_putra saṅkarṣaṇaḥ_saṃkarṣaṇa aham_mad na_na ca_ca vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa aham_mad iti_iti vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā tasya_tad svayam_svayam rūpasya_rūpa vibhūti--_vibhūti tva--_tva ayogāt_ayoga mahat--_mahant sraṣṭā--_sraṣṭṛ ādīnām_ādi vāmana--_vāmana kapila--_kapila ādīnām_ādi ca_ca sākṣāt_sākṣāt īśvara--_īśvara tve_tva api_api vibhūti--_vibhūti tvena_tva uktiḥ_ukti sva--_sva aṃśa--_aṃśa avatāra--_avatāra tvāt_tva tena_tad rūpeṇa_rūpa cintya--_cintay tva--_tva vivakṣayā_vivakṣā vā_vā yujyate_yuj pāṇḍavānām_pāṇḍava madhye_madhya dhanañjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya tvam_tvad aham_mad asmi_as na_na avatāra--_avatāra tvena_tva anyebhyaḥ_anya śraiṣṭhyāt_śraiṣṭhya munīnām_muni deva--_deva artha--_artha manana--_manana parāṇām_para madhye_madhya vyāsaḥ_vyāsa bādarāyaṇaḥ_bādarāyaṇa aham_mad mad--_mad avatāra--_avatāra tvena_tva tasya_tad anyebhyaḥ_anya śraiṣṭhyāt_śraiṣṭhya kavīnām_kavi sūkṣma--_sūkṣma artha--_artha vivecakānām_vivecaka madhye_madhya uśanāḥ_uśanas śukraḥ_śukra aham_mad yaḥ_yad kaviḥ_kavi iti_iti khyātaḥ_khyā 37_37

lg.l: daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa damayatām_damay asmi_as nītiḥ_nīti asmi_as jigīṣatām_jigīṣ
maunam_mauna ca_ca eva_eva asmi_as guhyānām_guhya jñānam_jñāna jñānavatām_jñānavat aham_mad

div.p: damayatām_damay damana--_damana kartṝṇām_kartṛ sambandhī_sambandhin daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa asmi_as yena_yad a_a saṃyatāḥ_saṃyam api_api saṃyatāḥ_saṃyam bhavanti_bhū sa_tad daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa mad--_mad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti jetum_ji icchatām_iṣ sambandhinī_sambandhin sāmāt_sāma api_api upāya--_upāya rūpā_rūpa nītiḥ_nīti asmi_as guhyānām_guh gopyānām_gup gopana--_gopana hetu--_hetu maunam_mauna avacanam_avacana aham_mad asmi_as na_na hi_hi tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm sthitasya_sthā abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya jñāyate_jñā jñānavatām_jñānavat tattva--_tattva jñāninām_jñānin yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tat_tad aham_mad asmi_as 38_38

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana damayatām_damay a_a dāntān_dam utpathān_utpatha pathi_pathin pravartayatām_pravartay utpatha--_utpatha pravṛttau_pravṛtti nigraha--_nigraha hetuḥ_hetu daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa aham_mad asmi_as jigīṣatām_jigīṣ jetum_ji icchatām_iṣ nītiḥ_nīti nyāyaḥ_nyāya jaya--_jaya upāyasya_upāya prakāśakaḥ_prakāśaka aham_mad asmi_as guhyānām_guhya gopyānām_gup gopana--_gopana hetuḥ_hetu maunam_mauna vācaṃyama--_vācaṃyama tvam_tva aham_mad asmi_as nahi_nahi tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm sthitasya_sthā abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya jñāyate_jñā guhyānām_guhya gopyānām_gup madhye_madhya sa_sa saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana pūrvakam_pūrvaka ātmanaḥ_ātman nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa maunam_mauna vā_vā aham_mad asmi_as jñānavatām_jñānavat jñāninām_jñānin yat_yad śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana paripāka--_paripāka prabhavam_prabhava advitīya--_advitīya ātma--_ātman sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra rūpam_rūpa sarva--_sarva ajñāna--_ajñāna virodhi_virodhin jñānam_jñāna tat_tad aham_mad asmi_as 38_38
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha damana--_damana kartṝṇām_kartṛ sambandhī_sambandhin daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa aham_mad
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva damayatām_damay daṇḍa--_daṇḍa kartṝṇām_kartṛ sambandhī_sambandhin daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa aham_mad yena_yad utpathagāḥ_utpathaga sat--_sat pathe_patha caranti_car sa_tad daṇḍaḥ_daṇḍa mad--_mad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha jigīṣatām_jigīṣ jetum_ji icchatām_iṣ sambandhinī_sambandhin nītiḥ_nīti nyāyaḥ_nyāya aham_mad guhyānām_guhya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādibhyām_ādi tasya_tad śraiṣṭhyāt_śraiṣṭhya 38_38

na_na tat_tad asti_as vinā_vinā yat_yad syāt_as mayā_mad bhūtam_bhū carācaram_carācara

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara yat_yad ca_ca api_api iti_iti yat_yad api_api ca_ca sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta bījam_bīja praroha--_praroha kāraṇam_kāraṇa tat_tad aham_mad tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu -_mad vinā_vinā yat_yad syāt_as bhavet_bhū tat_tad caram_cara acaram_acara vā_vā bhūtam_bhūta na_na asti_as eva_eva iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yat_yad api_api ca_ca sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta praroha--_praroha kāraṇam_kāraṇa bījam_bīja tad--_tad māyā--_māyā upādhikam_upādhika caitanyam_caitanya aham_mad eva_eva he_he arjuna_arjuna mayā_mad vinā_vinā yat_yad syāt_as bhave_bhava caram_cara acaram_acara vā_vā bhūtam_bhū vastu_vastu tat_tad na_na asti_as eva_eva yatas_yatas sarvam_sarva mad--_mad kāryam_kṛ eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 39_39

div.p: kathayati_kathay vibhūtimat_vibhūtimat aiśvarya--_aiśvarya yuktam_yuj śrīmat_śrīmat sampatti--_sampatti yuktam_yuj ūrjitam_ūrjay kena_ka api_api prabhāva--_prabhāva bala--_bala ādinā_ādi guṇena_guṇa atiśayitam_atiśī yat_yad yat_yad sattvam_sattva vastu--_vastu mātram_mātra bhavet_bhū tat_tad tat_tad eva_eva mama_mad tejasaḥ_tejas prabhāvasya_prabhāva aṃśena_aṃśa sambhūtam_sambhū jānīhi_jñā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana anuktāḥ_anukta api_api bhagavataḥ_bhagavant vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti saṅgrahītum_saṃgrah upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa idam_idam ucyate_vac yat_yad yat_yad iti_iti yat_yad yat_yad sattvam_sattva prāṇi--_prāṇin vibhūtimat_vibhūtimat aiśvarya--_aiśvarya yuktam_yuj tathā_tathā śrīmat_śrīmat śrīḥ_śrī lakṣmīḥ_lakṣmī sampad_sampad śobhā_śobhā kāntiḥ_kānti vā_vā tayā_tad yuktam_yuj tayā_tad ūrjitam_ūrjay bala--_bala ādi--_ādi atiśayena_atiśaya yuktam_yuj tat_tad tat_tad eva_eva mama_mad tejasaḥ_tejas śakteḥ_śakti aṃśena_aṃśa sambhūtam_sambhū tvam_tvad avagaccha_avagam jānīhi_jñā

baladevaḥ_baladeva anuktāḥ_anukta vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti saṅgrahītum_saṃgrah āha_ah yat_yad yat_yad iti_iti vibhūtimat_vibhūtimat aiśvarya--_aiśvarya yuktam_yuj śrīmat_śrīmat saundaryeṇa_saundarya sampattyā_sampatti vā_vā yuktam_yuj ūrjitam_ūrjay balena_bala yuktam_yuj vā_vā yat_yad yat_yad sattvam_sattva vastu_vastu bhavati_bhū tat_tad tat_tad eva_eva mama_mad tejaḥ_tejas aṃśena_aṃśa śakti--_śakti leśena_leśa sambhavam_sambhava siddham_sidh avagaccha_avagam pratīhi_pratī iti_iti sva--_sva āyatta--_āyat abheda--_abheda nirdeśāḥ_nirdeśa nītāḥ_nī vāmana--_vāmana ādīnām_ādi tad--_tad nirdeśāḥ_nirdeśa tu_tu saṅgamitāḥ_saṃgamay santi_as

viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh aham_mad idam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa sthitaḥ_sthā jagat_jagant

div.p: kuru_kṛ āha_ah bahunā_bahu pṛthak_pṛthak jñātena_jñā kim_ka tava_tvad kāryam_kṛ yasmāt_yasmāt idam_idam sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa eka--_eka deśa--_deśa mātreṇa_mātra viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh dhṛtvā_dhṛ vyāpya_vyāp iti_iti vā_vā aham_mad eva_eva sthitaḥ_sthā mad--_mad vyatiriktam_vyatiric kiṃcid_kaścit asti_as pādaḥ_pāda asya_idam viśvā_viśva bhūtāni_bhūta tri--_tri pādayā_pāda amṛtam_amṛta divi_div tasmāt_tasmāt kim_kim anena_idam paricchinna--_paricchid darśanena_darśana sarvatra_sarvatra mad--_mad dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi eva_eva kuru_kṛ iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya 42_42

lg.l: indriya--_indriya dvārataḥ_dvāra citte_citta bahis_bahis dhāvati_dhāv sati_as api_api
īśa--_īśa dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi vidhānāya_vidhāna vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti daśame_daśama abravīt_brū

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī vibhūti--_vibhūti yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma daśamaḥ_daśama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam avayavaśas_avayavaśas vibhūtim_vibhūti uktvā_vac sākalyena_sākalya tām_tad āha_ah athavā_athavā iti_iti athavā_athavā iti_iti pakṣa--_pakṣa antare_antara bahunā_bahu etena_etad sa_sa avaśeṣeṇa_avaśeṣa jñātena_jñā kim_ka tava_tvad syāt_as he_he arjuna_arjuna idam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant ekāṃśena_ekāṃśa eka--_eka deśa--_deśa mātreṇa_mātra viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh vidhṛtya_vidhṛ vyāpya_vyāp vā_vā aham_mad eva_eva sthitaḥ_sthā na_na mad--_mad vyatiriktam_vyatiric kiṃcid_kaścit asti_as pādaḥ_pāda asya_idam viśvā_viśva bhūtāni_bhūta tripādayā_tripāda amṛtam_amṛta tasmāt_tasmāt kim_kim anena_idam paricchinna--_paricchid darśanena_darśana sarvatra_sarvatra mad--_mad dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi eva_eva kuru_kṛ iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya 42_42

āsvādya_āsvāday mādyati_mad muhur_muhur madhu--_madhu bhid_bhid manaḥ_manas me_mad

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍhārtha--_gūḍhārtha dīpikāyām_dīpikā adhikāri--_adhikārin bhedena_bheda vibhūti--_vibhūti yogaḥ_yoga

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha bahunā_bahu pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthak_pṛthak jñātena_jñā kim_ka phalam_phala samuditam_samudi eva_eva jānīhi_jñā iti_iti āha_ah viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh iti_iti eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa ekena_eka eva_eva aṃśena_aṃśa prakṛti--_prakṛti antaryāminā_antaryāmin puruṣa--_puruṣa rūpeṇa_rūpa eva_eva idam_idam sṛṣṭam_sṛj jagat_jagant viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tvāt_tva vidhṛtya_vidhṛ adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ tvāt_tva adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā niyantṛ--_niyantṛ tvāt_tva niyamya_niyam vyāpaka--_vyāpaka tvāt_tva vyāpya_vyāp kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvāt_tva sṛṣṭvā_sṛj sthitaḥ_sthā asmi_as 42_42

lg.l: viśvam_viśva śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa eva_eva atas_atas sevaḥ_seva tad--_tad dattayā_dā dhiyā_dhī
saḥ_tad eva_eva āsvādya--_āsvāday mādhuryaḥ_mādhurya iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha īritaḥ_īray

gītāsu_gītā daśamaḥ_daśama adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam avayavaśas_avayavaśas vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti apavarṇya_apavarṇay sāmsatyena_sāmsatya tāḥ_tad prāha_prāh athavā_athavā iti_iti bahunā_bahu pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthak_pṛthak upadiśyamānena_upadiś vibhūti--_vibhūti viṣayakeṇa_viṣayaka jñānena_jñāna tava_tvad kim_ka prayojanam_prayojana he_he arjuna_arjuna cit--_cit acit--_acit ātmakam_ātmaka hara--_hara viriñci--_viriñci pramukham_pramukha kṛtsnam_kṛtsna jagat_jagant aham_mad ekena_eka eva_eva prakṛti--_prakṛti ādi--_ādi antaryāmiṇā_antaryāmin puruṣa--_puruṣa ākhyena_ākhyā aṃśena_aṃśa viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh sraṣṭṛ--_sraṣṭṛ tvāt_tva sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ dhāraka--_dhāraka tvāt_tva dhṛtvā_dhṛ asmi_as iti_iti sarjana--_sarjana ādīni_ādi mad--_mad vibhūtayaḥ_vibhūti mad--_mad vyāpteṣu_vyāp sarveṣu_sarva aiśvarya--_aiśvarya ādi--_ādi sarvāṇi_sarva vastūni_vastu mad--_mad vibhūti--_vibhūti tayā_tā bodhyāni_budh iti_iti 42_42

pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh aham_mad idam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa sthitaḥ_sthā jagat_jagant iti_iti viśva--_viśva ātmakam_ātmaka pārameśvaram_pārameśvara rūpam_rūpa utkṣiptam_utkṣip tad--_tad didṛkṣuḥ_didṛkṣu pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac abhinandan_abhinand arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac mad--_mad anugrahāya_anugraha iti_iti caturbhiḥ_catur mad--_mad anugrahāya_anugraha śoka--_śoka nivṛttaye_nivṛtti paramam_parama paramātma--_paramātman niṣṭham_niṣṭhā guhyam_guh gopyam_gup api_api adhyātma--_adhyātma saṃjñitam_saṃjñita ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman viveka--_viveka viṣayam_viṣaya yat_yad tvayā_tvad uktam_vac vacaḥ_vacas aśocyān_aśocya anvaśocaḥ_anuśuc tvam_tvad iti_iti ādi_ādi ṣaṣṭha--_ṣaṣṭha adhyāya--_adhyāya paryantam_paryanta yat_yad vākyam_vākya tena_tena mama_mad ayam_idam mohaḥ_moha aham_mad hantā_hantṛ ete_etad hanyante_han iti_iti ādi_ādi lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa bhramaḥ_bhrama vigataḥ_vigam vinaṣṭaḥ_vinaś ātmanaḥ_ātman

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya nānā_nānā vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti uktvā_vac viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh aham_mad idam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa sthitaḥ_sthā jagat_jagant iti_iti viśva--_viśva ātmakam_ātmaka pārameśvaram_pārameśvara rūpam_rūpa bhagavatā_bhagavant abhihitam_abhidhā śrutvā_śru parama--_parama utkaṇṭhitaḥ_utkaṇṭh iti_iti mad--_mad anugrahāya_anugraha śoka--_śoka nivṛtti--_nivṛtti upakārāya_upakāra paramam_parama niratiśaya--_niratiśaya puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha paryavasāyi_paryavasāyin guhyam_guhya gopyam_gup yasmai_yad kasmaicid_kaścit vaktum_vac anarham_anarha api_api adhyātma--_adhyātma saṃjñitam_saṃjñita adhyātmam_adhyātma iti_iti śabditam_śabday ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman viveka--_viveka viṣayam_viṣaya aśocyān_aśocya anvaśocaḥ_anuśuc tvam_tvad iti_iti ādi--_ādi ṣaṣṭha--_ṣaṣṭha adhyāya--_adhyāya paryantam_paryanta tu_tu a_a padārtha--_padārtha pradhānam_pradhāna yat_yad tvayā_tvad parama--_parama kāruṇikena_kāruṇika sarvajñena_sarvajña hantā_hantṛ mayā_mad ete_etad hanyante_han iti_iti ādi--_ādi vividha--_vividha viparyāsa--_viparyāsa lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa mohaḥ_moha ayam_idam anubhava--_anubhava sākṣikaḥ_sākṣika vigataḥ_vigam vinaṣṭaḥ_vinaś mama_mad tatra_tatra asakṛt_asakṛt ātmanaḥ_ātman sarva--_sarva vikriyā--_vikriyā śūnyatva--_śūnyatva ukteḥ_ukti

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh aham_mad idam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa sthitaḥ_sthā jagat_jagant iti_iti sarva--_sarva vibhūti--_vibhūti āśrayam_āśraya ādi--_ādi puruṣam_puruṣa sva--_sva priya--_priya sakhasya_sakha aṃśam_aṃśa śrutvā_śru parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda nimagnaḥ_nimajj tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa tribhiḥ_tri adhyātmam_adhyātma iti_iti saptamī--_saptamī arthe_artha avyayībhāvāt_avyayībhāva ātmani_ātman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātmani_ātman yā_yad yā_yad saṃjñā_saṃjñā vibhūti--_vibhūti lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa sā_tad saṃjātā_saṃjan yasya_yad tat_tad vacaḥ_vacas

div.p: pūrvatra_pūrvatra aham_mad ātmā_ātman guḍākeśa_guḍākeśa sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta āśaya--_āśaya sthitaḥ_sthā iti_iti vibhūti--_vibhūti kathana--_kathana upakrame_upakrama viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh aham_mad idam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna iti_iti tad--_tad upasaṃhāre_upasaṃhāra ca_ca nikhila--_nikhila vibhūti--_vibhūti āśrayaḥ_āśraya mahat--_mahant sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ puruṣaḥ_puruṣa svasya_sva mahat--_mahant sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ ādi--_ādi sarva--_sarva avatārī_avatārin iti_iti tad--_tad mukhāt_mukha pratītya_pratī sakhi--_sakhi ānanda--_ānanda sindhu--_sindhu nimagnaḥ_nimajj arjunaḥ_arjuna tad--_tad puruṣa--_puruṣa rūpam_rūpa didṛkṣuḥ_didṛkṣu kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa uktam_vac anuvadati_anuvad mat_mad iti_iti mad--_mad anugrahāya_anugraha adhyātma--_adhyātma saṃjñitam_saṃjñita vibhūti--_vibhūti viṣayakam_viṣayaka yat_yad vacaḥ_vacas tvayā_tvad uktam_vac tena_tad mama_mad mohaḥ_moha katham_katham vidyām_vid ity--_ity ādi--_ādi uktaḥ_vac vigataḥ_vigam naṣṭaḥ_naś adhyātmam_adhyātma ātmani_ātman paramātmani_paramātman tvayi_tvad yā_yad vibhūti--_vibhūti lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa saṃjñā_saṃjñā sā_tad jātā_jan yasya_yad tad--_tad vacaḥ_vacas vibhakti--_vibhakti arthe_artha avyayībhāvaḥ_avyayībhāva paramam_parama guhyam_guhya ati_ati rahasyam_rahasya tvad--_tvad anya--_anya agamyam_agamya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: bhava--_bhava apyayau_apyaya hi_hi bhūtānām_bhūta śrutau_śru vistaraśaḥ_vistaraśaḥ mayā_mad
tvattaḥ_tvad kamala--_kamala patra--_pattra akṣa_akṣa māhātmyam_māhātmya api_api ca_ca avyayam_avyaya

div.p: bhūtānām_bhūta bhava--_bhava apyayau_apyaya sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi pralayau_pralaya tvattaḥ_tvad sakāśāt_sakāśa eva_eva bhavataḥ_bhū iti_iti śrutam_śru mayā_mad aham_mad kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna jagataḥ_jagant prabhavaḥ_prabhava pralayaḥ_pralaya tathā_tathā iti_iti ādau_ādi vistaraśaḥ_vistaraśaḥ punar_punar punar_punar kamalasya_kamala patre_pattra iva_iva su_su prasanne_prasad viśāle_viśāla akṣiṇī_akṣi yasya_yad tava_tvad he_he kamala--_kamala patra--_pattra akṣa_akṣa māhātmyam_māhātmya api_api ca_ca avyayam_avyaya akṣayam_akṣaya śrutam_śru viśva--_viśva sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva api_api sarva--_sarva niyantṛ--_niyantṛ tve_tva api_api śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha karma--_karman kārayitṛ--_kārayitṛ tve_tva api_api bandha--_bandha mokṣa--_mokṣa ādi--_ādi vicitra--_vicitra phala--_phala dātṛ--_dātṛ tve_tva api_api avikāra--_avikāra avaidharmya--_avaidharmya asaṅga--_asaṅga audāsīnya--_audāsīnya ādi--_ādi āpannam_āpad manyante_man mām_mad abuddhayaḥ_abuddhi iti_iti mayā_mad tatam_tan idam_idam sarvam_sarva iti_iti na_na ca_ca mām_mad tāni_tad karmāṇi_karman nibadhnanti_nibandh iti_iti samaḥ_sama aham_mad sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta iti_iti ādinā_ādi atas_atas tvad--_tvad paratantra--_paratantra tvāt_tva api_api jīvānām_jīva aham_mad kartā_kartṛ iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi madīyaḥ_madīya mohaḥ_moha vigataḥ_vigam iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tathā_tathā saptamāt_saptama ārabhya_ārabh daśama--_daśama paryantam_paryanta tad--_tad padārtha--_padārtha nirṇaya--_nirṇaya pradhānam_pradhāna api_api bhagavataḥ_bhagavant vacanam_vacana mayā_mad śrutam_śru iti_iti āha_ah bhava--_bhava apyayau_apyaya iti_iti bhūtānām_bhūta bhava--_bhava apyayau_apyaya utpatti--_utpatti pralayau_pralaya tvattaḥ_tvad eva_eva bhavantau_bhū tvattaḥ_tvad eva_eva vistaraśaḥ_vistaraśaḥ mayā_mad śrutau_śru na_na tu_tu saṃkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa asakṛt_asakṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kamalasya_kamala patre_pattra iva_iva dīrghe_dīrgha rakta--_rakta ante_anta parama--_parama manorame_manorama akṣiṇī_akṣi yasya_yad tava_tvad sa_tad tvam_tvad he_he kamala--_kamala patra--_pattra akṣa_akṣa ati_ati saundarya--_saundarya atiśaya--_atiśaya ullekhaḥ_ullekha ayam_idam prema--_preman atiśayāt_atiśaya na_na kevalam_kevala bhava--_bhava apyayau_apyaya tvattaḥ_tvad śrutau_śru mahātmanaḥ_mahātman tava_tvad bhāvaḥ_bhāva māhātmyam_māhātmya atiśaya--_atiśaya aiśvaryam_aiśvarya viśva--_viśva sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādi--_ādi kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva api_api avikāre_avikāra tvam_tvad śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha karma--_karman kārayitṛ--_kārayitṛ tve_tva api_api avaiṣamyam_avaiṣamya
api_api asaṅga--_asaṅga audāsīnyam_audāsīnya anyat_anya api_api sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman tva--_tva ādi_ādi sa_sa upādhikam_upādhika nirupādhikam_nirupādhika api_api ca_ca avyayam_avyaya akṣayam_akṣaya mayā_mad śrutam_śru iti_iti pariṇatam_pariṇam anuvartate_anuvṛt ca_ca kārāt_kāra

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka ca_ca bhava_bhū iti_iti he_he kamala--_kamala patra--_pattra akṣa_akṣa kamala--_kamala patre_pattra iva_iva ati_ati ramye_ramya dīrgha--_dīrgha rakta--_rakta ante_anta ca_ca akṣiṇī_akṣi yasya_yad iti_iti prema--_preman atiśayāt_atiśaya saundarya--_saundarya atiśaya--_atiśaya ullekhaḥ_ullekha tvattaḥ_tvad tvad--_tvad hetukau_hetuka bhūtānām_bhūta bhava--_bhava apyayau_apyaya sarga--_sarga pralayau_pralaya mayā_mad tvattaḥ_tvad sakāśāt_sakāśa vistaraśaḥ_vistaraśaḥ asakṛt_asakṛt śrutau_śru aham_mad kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna jagataḥ_jagant prabhavaḥ_prabhava pralayaḥ_pralaya tathā_tathā iti_iti ādinā_ādi avyayam_avyaya nityam_nitya māhātmyam_māhātmya aiśvaryam_aiśvarya nirvikāra--_nirvikāra tvam_tva sarva--_sarva niyantṛ--_niyantṛ te_tā api_api asaṅga--_asaṅga tvam_tva iti_iti evam_evam ādi_ādi tvattaḥ_tvad eva_eva mayā_mad vistaraśaḥ_vistaraśaḥ śrutam_śru mayā_mad tatam_tan idam_idam sarvam_sarva iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi

lg.l: evam_evam etat_etad yathā_yathā āttha_ah tvam_tvad ātmānam_ātman parameśvara_parameśvara

div.p: bhava--_bhava apyayau_apyaya hi_hi bhūtānām_bhūta iti_iti ādi_ādi mayā_mad śrutam_śru yathā_yathā ca_ca idānīm_idānīm ātmānam_ātman tvam_tvad āttha_ah viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh aham_mad idam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa sthitaḥ_sthā jagat_jagant iti_iti evam_evam kathayasi_kathay he_he parameśvara_parameśvara tat_tad atrā_atra api_api aviśvāsaḥ_aviśvāsa mama_mad nā_na asti_as tathā_tathā api_api he_he puruṣottama_puruṣottama tava_tvad aiśvarya--_aiśvarya śakti--_śakti vīrya--_vīrya tejobhiḥ_tejas sampannam_sampad tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa kautūhalāt_kautūhala aham_mad draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana he_he parameśvara_parameśvara yathā_yathā yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra sopādhikena_sopādhika nirupādhikena_nirupādhika ca_ca niratiśaiśvaryeṇa_niratiśaiśvarya ātmānam_ātman tvam_tvad āttha_ah kathayasi_kathay tvam_tvad evam_evam etat_etad na_na anyathā_anyathā tvad--_tvad vacasi_vacas kutra_kutra api_api mama_mad aviśvāsa--_aviśvāsa śaṅkā_śaṅkā na_na asti_as eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yadi_yadi api_api evam_evam tathā_tathā api_api kṛtārthī--_kṛtārthin bubhūṣayā_bubhūṣā draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ te_tvad tava_tvad rūpam_rūpa aiśvaram_aiśvara jñāna--_jñāna aiśvarya--_aiśvarya śakti--_śakti bala--_bala vīrya--_vīrya tejobhiḥ_tejas sampannam_sampad adbhutam_adbhuta he_he puruṣottama_puruṣottama sambodhanena_sambodhana tvad--_tvad vacasi_vacas aviśvāsaḥ_aviśvāsa mama_mad nā_na asti_as didṛkṣā_didṛkṣā ca_ca mahatī_mahat vartate_vṛt iti_iti sarvajña--_sarvajña tvāt_tva tvam_tvad jānāsi_jñā sarva--_sarva antaryāmi--_antaryāmin tvāt_tva ca_ca iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha idānīm_idānīm ātmānam_ātman tvam_tvad yathā_yathā āttha_ah viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh aham_mad idam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa sthitaḥ_sthā jagat_jagant iti_iti tat_tad ca_ca evam_evam eva_eva mama_mad na_na atra_atra kaḥ_ka api_api aviśvāsaḥ_aviśvāsa asti_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva kintu_kiṃtu tat_tad api_api saṃhṛta--_saṃhṛ arthaḥ_artha bubhūṣayā_bubhūṣā tava_tvad aiśvaram_aiśvara tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ yena_yad eka--_eka aṃśena_aṃśa īśvara--_īśvara rūpeṇa_rūpa tvam_tvad jagat_jagant viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh vartase_vṛt tasya_tad eva_eva te_tvad rūpam_rūpa aham_mad idānīm_idānīm cakṣurbhyām_cakṣus draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam iti_iti viṣṭabhya_viṣṭambh aham_mad idam_idam iti_iti ādinā_ādi yathā_yathā tam_tad ātmānam_ātman svam_sva āttha_ah bravīṣi_brū tat_tad etat_etad evam_evam eva_eva na_na tava_tvad me_mad saṃśaya--_saṃśaya leśaḥ_leśa api_api tathā_tathā api_api tava_tvad aiśvaram_aiśvara sarva--_sarva praśāstṛ_praśāstṛ tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa aham_mad he_he parameśvara_parameśvara he_he puruṣottama_puruṣottama iti_iti sambodhayan_sambodhay mama_mad tad--_tad didṛkṣām_didṛkṣā jānāsi_jñā eva_eva tām_tad pūraya_pūray iti_iti vyañjayati_vyañjay madhura--_madhura rasa--_rasa āsvādinaḥ_āsvādin kaṭu--_kaṭu rasa--_rasa jighṛkṣāvat--_jighṛkṣāvat tvad--_tvad mādhurya--_mādhurya anubhavinaḥ_anubhavin me_mad tvad--_tvad aiśvarya--_aiśvarya anu_anu bubhīuṣā_bubhīuṣā abhyudeti_abhyudi iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
BhG 11.4

lg.l: manyase_man yadi_yadi tat_tad śakyam_śakya mayā_mad draṣṭum_dṛś iti_iti prabho_prabhu
yogeśvara_yogeśvara tatas_tatas me_mad tvam_tvad darśaya_darśay ātmānam_ātman avyayam_avyaya

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara na_na ca_ca aham_mad draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ iti_iti etāvatā_etāvat eva_eva tvayā_tvad tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa darśayitavyam_darśay kim_ka tarhi_tarhi manyase_man iti_iti yoginaḥ_yogin eva_eva yogāḥ_yoga teṣām_tad īśvaraḥ_īśvara mayā_mad arjunena_arjuna tat_tad rūpam_rūpa draṣṭum_dṛś śaktyam_śaktya iti_iti yadi_yadi manyase_man tatas_tatas tarhi_tarhi tad--_tad rūpavantam_rūpavat ātmānam_ātman avyayam_avyaya nityam_nitya mama_mad darśaya_darśay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana draṣṭum_dṛś ayogye_ayogya kutas_kutas te_tvad didṛkṣā_didṛkṣā iti_iti āsaṅkayā_āsaṅkā āha_ah manyase_man iti_iti prabhavati_prabhū sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi sthiti--_sthiti saṃhāra--_saṃhāra praveśa--_praveśa praśāsaneṣu_praśāsana iti_iti prabhuḥ_prabhu he_he prabho_prabhu sarva--_sarva svāmin_svāmin tat_tad tava_tvad aiśvaram_aiśvara rūpam_rūpa mayā_mad arjunena_arjuna draṣṭum_dṛś śakyam_śakya iti_iti yadi_yadi manyase_man jānāsi_jñā icchasi_iṣ vā_vā he_he yogeśvara_yogeśvara sarveṣām_sarva aṇima--_aṇiman ādi--_ādi siddhi--_siddhi śālinām_śālin yogānām_yoga yoginām_yogin īśvara_īśvara tatas_tatas tvad--_tvad icchā--_icchā vaśāt_vaśa eva_eva me_mad mahyam_mad atyartham_atyartham arthite_arthay tvam_tvad parama--_parama kāruṇikaḥ_kāruṇika darśaya_darśay cākṣuṣa--_cākṣuṣa jñāna--_jñāna viṣayīkāraya_viṣayīkāray akṣayam_akṣaya
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yogeśvara--_yogeśvara iti_iti ayogyasya_ayogya api_api mama_mad tad--_tad darśana--_darśana yogyatāyām_yogyatā tava_tvad yoga--_yoga aiśvaryam_aiśvarya eva_eva kāraṇam_kāraṇa iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva :--_aiśvarya darśane_darśana bhagavat--_bhagavant saṃmatim_sammati gṛhṇāti_grah manyase_man yadi_yadi iti_iti jānāsi_jñā icchasi_iṣ vā_vā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha he_he prabho_prabhu sarva--_sarva svāmin_svāmin yogeśvara--_yogeśvara iti_iti sambodhayan_sambodhay ayogyasya_ayogya me_mad tvad--_tvad darśane_darśana tvad--_tvad śaktiḥ_śakti eva_eva hetuḥ_hetu
BhG 11.5

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
paśya_paś me_mad pārtha_pārtha rūpāṇi_rūpa śataśas_śataśas atha_atha sahasraśas_sahasraśas
nānā_nānā vidhāni_vidha divyāni_divya nānā_nānā varṇa--_varṇa ākṛtīni_ākṛti ca_ca

div.p: san_as bhava_bhū uvāca_vac rūpasya_rūpa eka--_eka tve_tva api_api nānā_nānā vidha--_vidha tvāt_tva rūpāṇi_rūpa iti_iti bahu--_bahu vacanam_vacana aparimitāni_aparimita aneka--_aneka prakārāṇi_prakāra divyāni_divya alaukikāni_alaukika mama_mad rūpāṇi_rūpa paśya_paś varṇāḥ_varṇa śukla--_śukla kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa ādayaḥ_ādi ākṛtayaḥ_ākṛti avayava--_avayava viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa nānā_nānā aneke_aneka varṇāḥ_varṇa ākṛtayaḥ_ākṛti ca_ca yeṣām_yad tāni_tad nānā_nānā varṇa--_varṇa ākṛtīni_ākṛti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam atyanta--_atyanta bhaktena_bhakta arjunena_arjuna prārthitaḥ_prārthay san_as śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac paśya_paś iti_iti atra_atra krameṇa_krameṇa śloka--_śloka catuṣṭaye_catuṣṭaya api_api paśya_paś iti_iti āvṛttyā_āvṛtti atyadbhuta--_atyadbhuta rūpāṇi_rūpa darśayiṣyāmi_darśay tvam_tvad sa_sa avadhānaḥ_avadhāna bhava_bhū iti_iti arjunam_arjuna abhimukhīkaroti_abhimukhīkṛ bhagavān_bhagavat śataśas_śataśas atha_atha sahasraśas_sahasraśas iti_iti aparimitāni_aparimita tāni_tad ca_ca nānā_nānā vidhāni_vidha aneka--_aneka prakārāṇi_prakāra divyāni_divya atyadbhutāni_atyadbhuta nānā_nānā vilakṣaṇāḥ_vilakṣaṇa varṇāḥ_varṇa nīla--_nīla pīta--_pīta divya--_divya prakārāḥ_prakāra tathā_tathā ākṛtayaḥ_ākṛti ca_ca avayava--_avayava saṃsthāna--_saṃsthāna viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa rūpāṇi_rūpa paśya_paś arhe_arha loṭ_loṭ draṣṭum_dṛś arhaḥ_arha bhava_bhū he_he pārtha_pārtha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatas_tatas ca_ca sva--_sva aṃśasya_aṃśa prakṛti--_prakṛti antaryāmiṇaḥ_antaryāmin prathama--_prathama puruṣasya_puruṣa sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣā_śīrṣan puruṣaḥ_puruṣa sahasra--_sahasra akṣaḥ_akṣa sahasrapād_sahasrapād iti_iti puruṣa--_puruṣa sūkta--_sūkta proktam_pravac rūpam_rūpa prathamam_prathama idam_idam darśayāmi_darśay paścāt_paścāt prastuta--_prastu upayogi--_upayogin tvena_tva tasya_tad eva_eva kāla--_kāla rūpa--_rūpa tvam_tva api_api jñāpayiṣyāmi_jñāpay iti_iti manasi_manas vimṛṣya_vimṛṣ arjunam_arjuna prati_prati sa_sa avadhānaḥ_avadhāna bhava_bhū iti_iti abhimukhīkaroti_abhimukhīkṛ paśyaḥ_paśya iti_iti rūpāṇi_rūpa iti_iti ekasmin_eka api_api mad--_mad sva--_sva rūpe_rūpa śataśas_śataśas mad--_mad svarūpāṇi_svarūpa mad--_mad vibhūtīḥ_vibhūti

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam abhyarthitaḥ_abhyarthay bhagavant_bhagavant prakṛti--_prakṛti antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin sahasra--_sahasra śirasam_śiras praśāstṛ--_praśāstṛ tva--_tva pradhānam_pradhāna deva--_deva ākāram_ākāra sva--_sva aṃśam_aṃśa pradarśayitum_pradarśay prakṛta--_prakṛ upayogi--_upayogin tvāt_tva tatra_tatra eva_eva kāla--_kāla ātmaka--_ātmaka tām_tā ca_ca bodhayitum_bodhay caturṣu_catur paśya_paś iti_iti pada--_pada āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti darśanīyānām_dṛś rūpāṇām_rūpa ati_ati adbhuta--_adbhuta tva--_tva dyotana--_dyotana arthā_artha ca_ca bodhyā_budh me_mad mama_mad sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣa--_śīrṣan ākāreṇa_ākāra bhāsamānasya_bhās ekasya_eka eva_eva śatāni_śata sahasrāṇi_sahasra ca_ca vibhūti--_vibhūti bhūtāni_bhū rūpāṇi_rūpa paśya_paś arhe_arha tāni_tad praṣṭum_pracch arhaḥ_arha bhava_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 11.6

lg.l: paśya_paś ādityān_āditya vasūn_vasu rudrān_rudra aśvinau_aśvin marutaḥ_marut tathā_tathā
bahūni_bahu adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa pūrvāṇi_pūrva paśya_paś āścaryāṇi_āścarya bhārata_bhārata

div.p: paśya_paś paśya_paś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana divyāni_divya rūpāṇi_rūpa paśya_paś iti_iti uktvā_vac tāni_tad eva_eva leśataḥ_leśa anukrāmati_anukram dvābhyām_dvi paśya_paś iti_iti paśya_paś ādityān_āditya dvādaśa_dvādaśan vasūn_vasu aṣṭau_aṣṭan rudrān_rudra ekādaśa_ekādaśan aśvinau_aśvin dvau_dvi marutaḥ_marut sapta--_saptan saptakān_saptaka ekonapañcāśat_ekonapañcāśat tathā_tathā anyān_anya api_api devān_deva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bahūni_bahu anyāni_anya adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa pūrvāṇi_pūrva pūrvam_pūrvam adṛṣṭāni_adṛṣṭa manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka tvayā_tvad tvattaḥ_tvad anyena_anya vā_vā kenacid_kaścit paśya_paś āścaryāṇi_āścarya adbhutāni_adbhuta he_he bhārata_bhārata atra_atra śataśas_śataśas atha_atha sahasraśas_sahasraśas nānā_nānā vidhāni_vidha iti_iti asya_idam vivaraṇam_vivaraṇa bahūni_bahu iti_iti iti_iti ādi_ādi ca_ca adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa pūrvāṇi_pūrva iti_iti divyāni_divya iti_iti asya_idam āścaryāṇi_āścarya iti_iti nānā_nānā varṇa--_varṇa ākṛtīni_ākṛti iti_iti asya_idam iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka ca_ca idha_idha mama_mad dehe_deha ekastham_ekastha eka--_eka deśa--_deśa sthitam_sthā sa_sa carācaram_carācara kṛtsnam_kṛtsna jagattvam_jagattva adya_adya adhunā_adhunā eva_eva paśya_paś yat_yad tatra_tatra tatra_tatra paribhramatā_paribhram tvayā_tvad varṣa--_varṣa ayutaiḥ_ayuta api_api draṣṭum_dṛś aśakyam_aśakya tadā_tadā ekadā_ekadā evā_eva ekatra_ekatra eva_eva mad--_mad anugrahāt_anugraha avalokasva_avalok iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad ca_ca jagat--_jagant āśraya--_āśraya bhūtam_bhū pradhāna--_pradhāna mahat--_mahant ādi--_ādi kāraṇa--_kāraṇa svarūpam_svarūpa sva--_sva jaya--_jaya parājaya--_parājaya ādikam_ādika ca_ca anyat_anya draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ tat_tad api_api paśya_paś
BhG 11.7

lg.l: iha_iha ekastham_ekastha jagat_jagant kṛtsnam_kṛtsna paśya_paś adya_adya sa_sa carācaram_carācara
mama_mad dehe_deha guḍākeśa_guḍākeśa yat_yad ca_ca anyat_anya draṣṭum_dṛś icchasi_iṣ

div.p: tatra_tatra tatra_tatra paribhramatā_paribhram varṣa--_varṣa koṭibhiḥ_koṭi api_api draṣṭum_dṛś aśakyam_aśakya kṛtsnam_kṛtsna api_api carācara--_carācara sahitam_sahita jagat_jagant iha_iha asmin_idam mama_mad dehe_deha avayava--_avayava rūpeṇa_rūpa ekatra_ekatra eva_eva svitam_svita adya_adya adhunā_adhunā eva_eva paśya_paś yat_yad ca_ca anyat_anya jagat--_jagant āśraya--_āśraya bhūtam_bhū kāraṇa--_kāraṇa svarūpam_svarūpa jagataḥ_jagant ca_ca avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣa--_viśeṣa ādikam_ādika jaya--_jaya parājaya--_parājaya ādikam_ādika ca_ca yat_yad api_api anyat_anya draṣṭum_dṛś icchasi_iṣ tat_tad sarvam_sarva paśya_paś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana na_na kevalam_kevala etāvat_etāvat eva_eva samastam_samasta jagat_jagant api_api mad--_mad deha--_deha stham_stha draṣṭum_dṛś arhasi_arh iti_iti āha_ah iha_iha ekastham_ekastha iti_iti iha_iha asmin_idam mama_mad dehe_deha eka--_eka stham_stha ekasmin_eka eva_eva avayava--_avayava rūpeṇa_rūpa sthitam_sthā jagat_jagant kṛtsnam_kṛtsna samastam_samasta sa_sa carācaram_carācara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama sthāvara--_sthāvara sahitam_sahita tatra_tatra tatra_tatra pariśramatā_pariśram varṣa--_varṣa koṭi--_koṭi sahasreṇa_sahasra api_api draṣṭum_dṛś aśakyam_aśakya adya_adya yat_yad ca_ca anyat_anya jaya--_jaya parājaya--_parājaya ādikam_ādika draṣṭum_dṛś icchasi_iṣ tat_tad api_api sandeha--_saṃdeha ucchedāya_uccheda paśya_paś

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha paribhramatā_paribhram tvayā_tvad varṣa--_varṣa koṭibhiḥ_koṭi api_api draṣṭum_dṛś aśakyam_aśakya kṛtsnam_kṛtsna api_api jagat_jagant iha_iha prastāve_prastāva ekasmin_eka api_api mad--_mad deha--_deha avayave_avayava tiṣṭhati_sthā ekastham_ekastha yat_yad ca_ca anyat_anya sva--_sva jaya--_jaya parājaya--_parājaya ādikam_ādika ca_ca mama_mad asmin_idam dehe_deha jagat--_jagant āśraya--_āśraya bhūta--_bhūta kāraṇa--_kāraṇa rūpe_rūpa

baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka ca_ca iha_iha mama_mad dehe_deha eka--_eka stham_stha eka--_eka deśa--_deśa sthitam_sthā sa_sa carācaram_carācara kṛtsnam_kṛtsna jagat_jagant tvam_tvad adya_adya adhunā_adhunā eva_eva paśya_paś yat_yat tatra_tatra tatra_tatra paribhramatā_paribhram tvayā_tvad varṣa--_varṣa ayutaiḥ_ayuta api_api draṣṭum_dṛś aśakyam_aśakya tadā_tadā ekadā_ekadā evā_eva ekatra_ekatra eva_eva mad--_mad anugrahāt_anugraha avalokaḥ_avaloka tvā_tvad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad ca_ca jagat--_jagant āśraya--_āśraya bhūtam_bhū pradhāna--_pradhāna mahat--_mahant ādi--_ādi kāraṇa--_kāraṇa svarūpam_svarūpa sva--_sva jaya--_jaya parājaya--_parājaya ādikam_ādika ca_ca anyat_anya draṣṭum_dṛś icchasi_iṣ tat_tad api_api paśya_paś
BhG 11.8

lg.l: na_na tu_tu mām_mad śakyase_śak draṣṭum_dṛś anena_idam eva_eva sva--_sva cakṣuṣā_cakṣus
divyam_divya dadāmi_dā te_tvad cakṣuḥ_cakṣus paśya_paś me_mad yogam_yoga aiśvaram_aiśvara

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara yat_yad uktam_vac arjunena_arjuna manyase_man yadi_yadi tat_tad śakyam_śakya iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na tu_tu mām_mad iti_iti anena_idam eva_eva tu_tu svīyena_svīya carma--_carman cakṣuṣā_cakṣus mām_mad draṣṭum_dṛś na_na śakyase_śak śaktaḥ_śak na_na bhaviṣyasi_bhū atas_atas aham_mad divyam_divya alaukikam_alaukika jñāna--_jñāna ātmakam_ātmaka cakṣuḥ_cakṣus tubhyam_tvad dadāmi_dā mama_mad aiśvaram_aiśvara asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa yogam_yoga yuktim_yukti aghaṭana--_aghaṭana ghaṭanā--_ghaṭanā sāmarthyam_sāmarthya paśya_paś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yat_yad tu_tu uktam_vac manyase_man yadi_yadi tat_tad śakyam_śakya mayā_mad draṣṭum_dṛś iti_iti viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa āha_ah na_na tu_tu mām_mad iti_iti anena_idam eva_eva prākṛtena_prākṛta sva--_sva cakṣuṣā_cakṣus svabhāva--_svabhāva siddhena_sidh cakṣuṣā_cakṣus mām_mad divya--_divya rūpam_rūpa draṣṭum_dṛś na_na tu_tu śakyase_śak na_na śaknoṣi_śak tu_tu eva_eva śakyase_śak iti_iti pāṭhe_pāṭha śaktaḥ_śak na_na bhaviṣyasi_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sauvādikasya_sauvādika api_api śaknoteḥ_śaknoti daivādikaḥ_daivādika śyan_śyat chāndaḥ_chāndas iti_iti vā_vā divā_divā ādau_ādi pāṭhaḥ_pāṭha vā_vā iti_iti eva_eva sāpradāyikam_sāpradāyika
div.l: tarhi_tarhi tvām_tvad draṣṭum_dṛś katham_katham śaknuyām_śak atas_atas āha_ah divyam_divya aprākṛtam_aprākṛta mama_mad divya--_divya rūpa--_rūpa darśana--_darśana kṣamam_kṣama dadāmi_dā te_tvad tubhyam_tvad cakṣuḥ_cakṣus tena_tad divyena_divya cakṣuṣā_cakṣus paśya_paś me_mad yogam_yoga aghaṭana--_aghaṭana ghaṭanā--_ghaṭanā sāmarthya--_sāmarthya
div.p:
āha_ah anena_idam eva_eva prākṛtena_prākṛta sva--_sva cakṣuṣā_cakṣus mām_mad cit--_cit ghana--_ghana ākāram_ākāra draṣṭum_dṛś na_na śakyase_śak na_na śaknoṣi_śak iti_iti atas_atas tubhyam_tvad divyam_divya aprākṛtam_aprākṛta cakṣuḥ_cakṣus dadāmi_dā tena_tena eva_eva paśyete_paś prākṛta--_prākṛta nara--_nara māninam_mānin arjunam_arjuna kam_ka api_api camatkāram_camatkāra prāpayitum_prāpay eva_eva yatas_yatas hi_hi arjunaḥ_arjuna bhagavat--_bhagavant pārṣada--_pārṣada mukhya--_mukhya tvāt_tva nara--_nara avatāra--_avatāra tvāt_tva ca_ca prākṛta--_prākṛta naraḥ_nara iva_iva na_na carma--_carman cakṣukaḥ_cakṣuka kim_ka ca_ca sākṣāt_sākṣāt bhagavat--_bhagavant mādhuryam_mādhurya eva_eva sa_tad sva--_sva cakṣuṣā_cakṣus sākṣāt_sākṣāt anubhavati_anubhū saḥ_tad arjunaḥ_arjuna bhagavat--_bhagavant aṃśam_aṃśa draṣṭum_dṛś tena_tad aśaknuvan_aśaknuvat divyam_divya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus gṛhṇīyāt_grah iti_iti kaḥ_ka khalu_khalu nyāyaḥ_nyāya eke_eka tu_tu evam_evam bhavati_bhū tat_tad cakṣuḥ_cakṣus ananya--_ananya bhaktaḥ_bhakta iva_iva bhagavataḥ_bhagavant deva--_deva līlā--_līlā tva--_tva sampadam_sampad nā_na eva_eva gṛhṇāti_grah na_na hi_hi sitopala--_sitopala rasa--_rasa āsvādinī_āsvādin rasanā_rasanā khaṇḍam_khaṇḍa guḍam_guḍa vā_vā svādayitum_svāday śaknoti_śak tasmāt_tasmāt arjunāya_arjuna tat_tad prārthita--_prārthay camatkāra--_camatkāra viśeṣam_viśeṣa dātum_dā deva--_deva līla--_līlā tvam_tva aiśvaryam_aiśvarya jigrāhayiṣuḥ_jigrāhayiṣu bhagavān_bhagavant prema--_preman rasān_rasa anukūlam_anukūla divyam_divya amānuṣam_amānuṣa eva_eva cakṣuḥ_cakṣus dadau_dā iti_iti divya--_divya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus
dāna--_dāna abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta vyaktībhaviṣyati_vyaktībhū iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva manyase_man yadi_yadi tat_tad śakyam_śakya iti_iti arjuna--_arjuna prārthitam_prārthay sampādayan_sampāday niratam_niram vismitam_vismi kartum_kṛ tasmai_tad sva--_sva deva--_deva ākāra--_ākāra grāhi_grāhin divyam_divya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus bhagavān_bhagavant dadau_dā iti_iti āha_ah na_na tu_tu mām_mad iti_iti anena_idam eva_eva mad--_mad mādhurya--_mādhurya ekāntena_ekānta sva--_sva cakṣuṣā_cakṣus yugapad_yugapad vibhāta--_vibhā sahasra--_sahasra sūrya--_sūrya prakhyam_prakhyā sahasra--_sahasra śiraskam_śiraska mām_mad draṣṭum_dṛś na_na śakyase_śak na_na śaknoṣi_śak atas_atas te_tvad divyam_divya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus dadāmi_dā yathā_yathā aham_mad ātmānam_ātman ati_ati pravāha--_pravāha ākrāntam_ākram vyanadmi_vyanad tathā_tathā tvad--_tvad cakṣuḥ_cakṣus ca_ca iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tena_tena mama_mad aiśvaram_aiśvara yogam_yoga rūpam_rūpa paśya_paś yujyate_yuj anena_idam iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti yogaḥ_yoga rūpam_rūpa paramam_parama rūpam_rūpa aiśvaram_aiśvara iti_iti agrimāt_agrima ca_ca atra_atra divyam_divya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus eva_eva dattam_dā na_na tu_tu divyam_divya manaḥ_manas api_api iti_iti bodhyam_budh tādṛśe_tādṛśa manasi_manas datte_dā tasya_tad tad--_tad rūpe_rūpa ruci--_ruci prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga iha_iha divya--_divya dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi dānena_dāna liṅgena_liṅga pārtha--_pārtha sārathi--_sārathi rūpāt_rūpa sahasra--_sahasra śirasaḥ_śiras viśva--_viśva rūpasya_rūpa ādhikyam_ādhikya iti_iti yat_yad vadanti_vad tat_tad tu_tu agre_agra nirasyam_niras
BhG 11.9

lg.l: saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac
evam_evam uktvā_vac tatas_tatas rājan_rājan mahā--_mahat yogeśvaraḥ_yogeśvara hariḥ_hari
darśayām_darśay āsa_as pārthāya_pārtha paramam_parama rūpam_rūpa aiśvaram_aiśvara

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara evam_evam uktvā_vac bhagavān_bhagavat arjunāya_arjuna sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa darśitavān_darśay tat_tad ca_ca rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś arjunaḥ_arjuna śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa vijñāpitavān_vijñāpay iti_iti imam_idam artham_artha ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ ślokaiḥ_śloka dhṛtarāṣṭram_dhṛtarāṣṭra prati_prati sañjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac evam_evam uktvā_vac iti_iti he_he rājan_rājan dhṛtarāṣṭra_dhṛtarāṣṭra mahān_mahat ca_ca asau_adas yoga--_yoga īśvaraḥ_īśvara ca_ca hariḥ_hari paramam_parama aiśvaram_aiśvara rūpam_rūpa darśitavān_darśay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhagavān_bhagavant arjunāya_arjuna divyam_divya rūpam_rūpa darśitavān_darśay sa_tad ca_ca tat_tad dṛṣṭvā_dṛś vismaya--_vismaya āviṣṭaḥ_āviś bhagavantam_bhagavat vijñāpitavān_vijñāpay iti_iti imam_idam vṛttāntam_vṛttānta evam_evam uktvā_vac iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ ślokaiḥ_śloka dhṛtarāṣṭram_dhṛtarāṣṭra prati_prati saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac iti_iti evam_evam na_na tu_tu mām_mad śakyase_śak draṣṭum_dṛś anena_idam cakṣuṣā_cakṣus divyam_divya dadāmi_dā te_tvad cakṣuḥ_cakṣus iti_iti uktvā_vac tatas_tatas divya--_divya cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus pradānāt_pradāna anantaram_anantaram he_he rājan_rājan dhṛtarāṣṭra_dhṛtarāṣṭra sthiraḥ_sthira bhava_bhū śravaṇāya_śravaṇa mahān_mahat sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa ca_ca asau_adas yogeśvaraḥ_yogeśvara ca_ca iti_iti mahā--_mahat yogeśvaraḥ_yogeśvara hariḥ_hari bhaktānām_bhakta sarva--_sarva kleśa--_kleśa apahārī_apahārin bhagavān_bhagavant darśana--_darśana ayogyam_ayogya api_api darśayāmāsa_darśay pārthāya_pārtha ekānta--_ekānta bhaktāya_bhakta
paramam_parama divyam_divya rūpam_rūpa aiśvaram_aiśvara
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam uktvā_vac hariḥ_hari pārthāya_pārtha viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa darśitavān_darśay tat_tad ca_ca rūpam_rūpa vīkṣya_vīkṣ pārthaḥ_pārtha harim_hari evam_evam vijñāpitavān_vijñāpay iti_iti imam_idam artham_artha sañjayaḥ_saṃjaya prāha_prāh evam_evam ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ tatas_tatas divya--_divya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus dāna--_dāna anantaram_anantaram he_he rājan_rājan dhṛtarāṣṭra_dhṛtarāṣṭra mahān_mahat ca_ca asau_adas yoga--_yoga īśvaraḥ_īśvara ca_ca hariḥ_hari

lg.l: aneka--_aneka vaktra--_vaktra nayanam_nayana aneka--_aneka adbhuta--_adbhuta darśanam_darśana
aneka--_aneka divya--_divya ābharaṇam_ābharaṇa divya--_divya aneka--_aneka udyata--_udyam āyudham_āyudha
divya--_divya mālya--_mālya ambara--_ambara dharam_dhara divya--_divya gandha--_gandha anulepanam_anulepana
sarva--_sarva āścarya--_āścarya mayam_maya devam_deva anantam_ananta viśvatomukham_viśvatomukha

div.p: āha_ah anekāni_aneka vaktrāṇi_vaktra nayanāni_nayana ca_ca yasmin_yad tat_tad anekānām_aneka adbhutānām_adbhuta darśanam_darśana yasmin_yad tat_tad anekāni_aneka divya--_divya ābharaṇāni_ābharaṇa yasmin_yad tat_tad divyāni_divya anekāni_aneka udyatāni_udyam āyudhāni_āyudha yasmin_yad tat_tad

kim_ka ca_ca divyā_divya iti_iti divyāni_divya mālyāni_mālya ambarāṇi_ambara ca_ca dhārayati_dhāray iti_iti tat_tad tathā_tathā divyaḥ_divya gandhaḥ_gandha yasya_yad tādṛśam_tādṛśa anulepanam_anulepana yasya_yad tat_tad sarva--_sarva āścarya--_āścarya mayam_maya aneka--_aneka āścarya--_āścarya prāyam_prāya devam_deva dyotana--_dyotana ātmakam_ātmaka anantam_ananta aparicchinnam_aparicchinna viśvatas_viśvatas sarvatas_sarvatas mukhāni_mukha yasmin_yad tat_tad

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad eva_eva rūpam_rūpa viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ aneka--_aneka iti_iti anekāni_aneka vaktrāṇi_vaktra nayanāni_nayana yasmin_yad rūpe_rūpa anekānām_aneka adbhutānām_adbhuta vismaya--_vismaya hetūnām_hetu darśanam_darśana yasmin_yad anekāni_aneka divyāni_divya ābharaṇāni_ābharaṇa bhūṣaṇāni_bhūṣaṇa yasmin_yad divyāni_divya anekāni_aneka udyatāni_udyam āyudhāni_āyudha astrāṇi_astra yasmin_yad tat_tad tathārūpam_tathārūpa divyāni_divya mālyāni_mālya puṣpa--_puṣpa mayāni_maya ratna--_ratna mayāni_maya ca_ca tathā_tathā divya--_divya ambarāṇi_ambara vastrāṇi_vastra ca_ca dhriyante_dhṛ yena_yad tat_tad divya--_divya mālya--_mālya ambara--_ambara dharam_dhara divyaḥ_divya gandhaḥ_gandha asya_idam iti_iti divya--_divya gandhaḥ_gandha tad--_tad anulepanam_anulepana yasya_yad tat_tad sarva--_sarva āścarya--_āścarya mayam_maya aneka--_aneka adbhuta--_adbhuta pracuram_pracura devam_deva dyotana--_dyotana ātmakam_ātmaka anantam_ananta aparicchinnam_aparicchinna viśvatas_viśvatas sarvatas_sarvatas mukhāni_mukha yasmin_yad tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa darśayāmāsa_darśay iti_iti pūrveṇa_pūrva sambandhaḥ_sambandha arjunaḥ_arjuna dadarśa_dṛś iti_iti adhyāhāraḥ_adhyāhāra vā_vā 10-10_10
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha viśvatas_viśvatas sarvatas_sarvatas mukhāni_mukha yasya_yad tat_tad
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva aneka--_aneka iti_iti anekāni_aneka sahasrāṇi_sahasra vaktrāṇi_vaktra nayanāni_nayana ca_ca yasya_yad tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa sahasra--_sahasra bāho_bāhu bhava_bhū viśva--_viśva mūrte_mūrti iti_iti agrima--_agrima vākyāt_vākya iha_iha aneka--_aneka bahu--_bahu sahasra--_sahasra śabdāḥ_śabda asaṅkhyeya--_asaṃkhyeya artha--_artha vācinaḥ_vācin viśvatas_viśvatas cakṣuḥ_cakṣus uta_uta viśvatomukhaḥ_viśvatomukha iti_iti ādi--_ādi jñāpakāt_jñāpaka anekānām_aneka adbhutānām_adbhuta darśanam_darśana yatra_yatra tat_tad divyaḥ_divya gandhaḥ_gandha yatra_yatra tādṛś_tādṛś anulepanam_anulepana yasya_yad tat_tad devam_deva dyotamānam_dyut anantam_ananta apāram_apāra viśvatas_viśvatas sarvatas_sarvatas mukhāni_mukha yasya_yad tat_tad 10-10_10

lg.l: divi_div sūrya--_sūrya sahasrasya_sahasra bhavet_bhū yugapad_yugapad utthitā_utthā
yadi_yadi bhās_bhās sadṛśī_sadṛśa sā_tad syāt_as bhāsaḥ_bhās tasya_tad mahātmanaḥ_mahātman

div.p: āha_ah divi_div ākāśe_ākāśa sūrya--_sūrya sahasrasya_sahasra yugapad_yugapad utthitasya_utthā yadi_yadi yugapad_yugapad utthitā_utthā bhās_bhās prabhā_prabhā bhavet_bhū tarhi_tarhi sā_tad tadā_tadā mahātmanaḥ_mahātman viśvarūpasya_viśvarūpa bhāsaḥ_bhās prabhāyā_prabhā kathañcid_kathaṃcid sadṛśī_sadṛśa syāt_as anya--_anya upamā_upamā na_na asti_as eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā adbhutam_adbhuta rūpam_rūpa darśayāmāsa_darśay iti_iti pūrveṇa_pūrva eva_eva anvayaḥ_anvaya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana devam_deva iti_iti uktam_vac vivṛṇoti_vivṛ divi_div iti_iti divi_div antarikṣe_antarikṣa sūryāṇām_sūrya sahasrasya_sahasra aparimita--_aparimita sūrya--_sūrya samūhasya_samūha yugapad_yugapad uditasya_udi yugapad_yugapad utthitā_utthā bhās_bhās prabhā_prabhā yadi_yadi bhavet_bhū tadā_tadā sā_tad tasya_tad mahātmanaḥ_mahātman viśvarūpasya_viśvarūpa bhāsaḥ_bhās dīpteḥ_dīpti sadṛśī_sadṛśa tulyā_tulya yadi_yadi syāt_as viśvarūpasya_viśvarūpa eva_eva bhās_bhās atiricyeta_atiric iti_iti aham_mad manye_man anyā_anya tu_tu upamā_upamā na_na asti_as eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra avidyamāna--_avidyamāna adhyavasāyāt_adhyavasāya tad--_tad abhāvena_abhāva upamā--_upamā bhāva--_bhāva parāt_para bhūta--_bhū upamā--_upamā rūpam_rūpa ārūpā_ārūpā iyam_idam atiśayoktiḥ_atiśayokti utprekṣā_utprekṣā vyañjayantī_vyañjay sarvathā_sarvathā nirupama--_nirupama tvam_tva eva_eva vyanakti_vyañj ubhau_ubh yadi_yadi vyomni_vyoman pṛthak_pṛthak pravāhau_pravāha
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ekadā_ekadā eva_eva yadi_yadi bhās_bhās kāntiḥ_kānti utthitā_utthā bhavet_bhū tadā_tadā tasya_tad mahātmanaḥ_mahātman viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa puruṣasya_puruṣa bhāsaḥ_bhās prabhāyāḥ_prabhā kānteḥ_kānti kathañcid_kathaṃcid sadṛśī_sadṛśa bhavet_bhū
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva tad--_tad dīpteḥ_dīpti nairupamyam_nairupamya āha_ah divi_div iti_iti divi_div ākāśe_ākāśa yugapad_yugapad utthitasya_utthā sūrya--_sūrya sahasrasya_sahasra bhās_bhās kāntiḥ_kānti ced_ced yugapad_yugapad utthitā_utthā bhavet_bhū tarhi_tarhi sā_tad tasya_tad mahātmanaḥ_mahātman viśva--_viśva rūpasya_rūpa hareḥ_hari bhāsaḥ_bhās ekasyāḥ_eka kānteḥ_kānti sadṛśī_sadṛśa syāt_as tadā_tadā iti_iti sambhāvanāyām_sambhāvanā laṭ_laṭ adbhūta--_adbhūta upameyam_upameya ucyate_vac tayā_tad utprekṣā_utprekṣā vyaṅgā_vyaṅga satī_as sarvathā_sarvathā tad--_tad kānteḥ_kānti nairupamyam_nairupamya vyañjayati_vyañjay tādṛś--_tādṛś rūpam_rūpa darśayāmāsa_darśay iti_iti pūrveṇa_pūrva anvayaḥ_anvaya

lg.l: tatra_tatra ekastham_ekastha jagat_jagant kṛtsnam_kṛtsna pravibhaktam_pravibhaj anekadhā_anekadhā
apaśyat_paś deva--_deva devasya_deva śarīre_śarīra pāṇḍavaḥ_pāṇḍava tadā_tadā

div.p: āha_ah anekadhā_anekadhā pravibhaktam_pravibhaj nānā_nānā vibhāgena_vibhāga avasthitam_avasthā kṛtsnam_kṛtsna jagat_jagant devadevasya_devadeva śarīre_śarīra tad--_tad avayava--_avayava tvena_tva ekatra_ekatra eva_eva pṛthak_pṛthak avasthitam_avasthā tadā_tadā pāṇḍavaḥ_pāṇḍava arjunaḥ_arjuna apaśyat_paś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana iha_iha ekastham_ekastha jagat_jagant kṛtsnam_kṛtsna paśya_paś adya_adya sa_sa carācaram_carācara iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant ājñaptam_ājñapay api_api anubhūtavān_anubhū arjunaḥ_arjuna iti_iti āha_ah tatra_tatra ekastham_ekastha iti_iti ekastham_ekastha ekatra_ekatra sthitam_sthā jagat_jagant kṛtsnam_kṛtsna pravibhaktam_pravibhaj anekadhā_anekadhā deva--_deva pitṛ--_pitṛ manuṣya--_manuṣya ādi--_ādi nānā_nānā prakāraiḥ_prakāra apaśyat_paś devadevasya_devadeva bhagavataḥ_bhagavant tatra_tatra viśva--_viśva rūpe_rūpa śarīre_śarīra pāṇḍavaḥ_pāṇḍava arjunaḥ_arjuna tadā_tadā viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa āścarya--_āścarya darśana--_darśana daśāyām_daśā

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatra_tatra tasmin_tad yuddha--_yuddha bhumau_bhumi eva_eva devadevasya_devadeva śarīre_śarīra jagat_jagant brahmāṇḍam_brahmāṇḍa kṛtsnam_kṛtsna sarvam_sarva eva_eva gaṇayitum_gaṇay aśakyam_aśakya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pravibhaktam_pravibhaj pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthaktayā_pṛthaktā sthitam_sthā ekastham_ekastha eka--_eka deśa--_deśa stham_stha prati_prati romakūpa--_romakūpa stham_stha prati_prati kukṣi--_kukṣi stham_stha vā_vā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha anekadhā_anekadhā mṛd--_mṛd mayam_maya hiraṇmayam_hiraṇmaya maṇi--_maṇi mayam_maya vā_vā pañcāśat--_pañcāśat koṭi--_koṭi yojana--_yojana pramāṇam_pramāṇa śata--_śata koṭi--_koṭi yojana--_yojana pramāṇam_pramāṇa lakṣa--_lakṣa koṭi--_koṭi ādi--_ādi yojana--_yojana pramāṇam_pramāṇa vā_vā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva tatas_tatas kim_ka abhūt_bhū iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah tatra_tatra iti_iti tatra_tatra yuddha--_yuddha bhūmau_bhūmi devadevasya_devadeva kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa vyañjita--_vyañjay sahasra--_sahasra śiraske_śiraska śarīre_śarīra śrī--_śrī vigrahe_vigraha kṛtsnam_kṛtsna nikhilam_nikhila jagat_jagant brahmāṇḍam_brahmāṇḍa tadā_tadā pāṇḍavaḥ_pāṇḍava apaśyat_paś pravibhaktam_pravibhaj pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthak_pṛthak bhūtam_bhū ekastham_ekastha iti_iti prāgvat_prāgvat anekadhā_anekadhā iti_iti mṛṇmayam_mṛṇmaya svarṇa--_svarṇa mayam_maya ratna--_ratna mayam_maya vā_vā laghu--_laghu madhye_madhya bṛhat--_bṛhat bhūtam_bhū vā_vā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: tatas_tatas sa_tad vismaya--_vismaya āviṣṭaḥ_āviś hṛṣṭa--_hṛṣ romā_roman dhanaṃjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya
praṇamya_praṇam śirasā_śiras devam_deva kṛtāñjaliḥ_kṛtāñjali abhāṣata_bhāṣ

div.p: āha_ah tatas_tatas darśana--_darśana antaram_antara visamyena_visamya āviṣṭaḥ_āviś vyāptaḥ_vyāp san_as hṛṣṭāni_hṛṣ utpulakitāni_utpulakay romāṇi_roman yasya_yad sa_tad dhanañjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya tam_tad eva_eva devam_deva śirasā_śiras praṇamya_praṇam kṛtāñjaliḥ_kṛtāñjali sampuṭa--_sampuṭa ākṛta--_ākṛ hastaḥ_hasta bhūtvā_bhū abhāṣata_bhāṣ uktavān_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam adbhuta--_adbhuta darśane_darśana api_api arjunaḥ_arjuna na_na vibhayāṃcakāra_vibhī na_na api_api netre_netra saṃcacāra_saṃcar na_na api_api saṃbhramāt_sambhrama kartavyam_kartavya visasmāra_vismṛ na_na api_api tasmāt_tad deśāt_deśa apasasāra_apasṛ kintu_kiṃtu ati_ati dhīra--_dhīra tvāt_tva tad--_tad kāla--_kāla ucitam_ucita eva_eva citta--_citta kṣobhe_kṣobha api_api iti_iti āha_ah tatas_tatas iti_iti tatas_tatas tad--_tad darśanāt_darśana anantaram_anantaram vismayena_vismaya adbhuta--_adbhuta darśana--_darśana prabhāvena_prabhāva alaukika--_alaukika citta--_citta camatkāra--_camatkāra viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa āviṣṭaḥ_āviś vyāptaḥ_vyāp ataeva_ataeva hṛṣṭa--_hṛṣ romā_roman pulakitaḥ_pulakay san_as sa_tad prakhyāta--_prakhyā mahādeva--_mahādeva saṅgrāma--_saṃgrāma ādi--_ādi prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva dhanaṃjayaḥ_dhanaṃjaya yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira rājasūye_rājasūya uttara--_uttara go--_go grahe_graha ca_ca sarvātra_sarvātra ajñaḥ_ajña jitvā_ji dhanam_dhana āhṛtavān_āhṛ iti_iti prathita--_prath mahā--_mahat mahā--_mahat tejasvi--_tejasvin tvāt_tva devam_deva tam_tad eva_eva viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa dharam_dhara nārāyaṇam_nārāyaṇa śirasā_śiras bhūmi--_bhūmi lagnena_lag praṇamya_praṇam prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa bhakti--_bhakti śraddhā--_śraddhā atiśayena_atiśaya natvā_nam namaskṛtya_namaskṛ kṛtāñjaliḥ_kṛtāñjali sampuṭīkṛta--_sampuṭīkṛ hasta--_hasta yugaḥ_yuga san_as abhāṣata_bhāṣ uktavān_vac
div.l: atra_atra vismaya--_vismaya ākhya--_ākhya sthāyi--_sthāyin bhāvasya_bhāva arjuna--_arjuna gatasya_gam ālambana--_ālambana vibhāvena_vibhāva bhagavatā_bhagavant viśvarūpeṇa_viśvarūpa uddīpana--_uddīpana vibhāvena_vibhāva asakṛt_asakṛt tad--_tad darśanena_darśana anubhāvena_anubhāva sāttvika--_sāttvika romaharṣeṇa_romaharṣa namaskāreṇa_namaskāra añjali--_añjali kareṇa_kara ca_ca dhṛti--_dhṛti mati--_mati harṣa--_harṣa vitarka--_vitarka ādinā_ādi paripoṣāt_paripoṣa sa_sa vāsanānām_vāsanā śrotṝṇām_śrotṛ tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa citta--_citta camatkāraḥ_camatkāra api_api tad--_tad bheda--_bheda anadhyavasāyāt_anadhyavasāya paripoṣam_paripoṣa gataḥ_gam paramānanda--_paramānanda āsvāda--_āsvāda rūpeṇa_rūpa adbhuta--_adbhuta rasaḥ_rasa bhavati_bhū iti_iti
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_evam kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa tattva--_tattva vid_vid arjunaḥ_arjuna tasmin_tad sattvena_sattva jñātam_jñā sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣa--_śīrṣan tvam_tva adhunā_adhunā vīkṣya_vīkṣ adbhutam_adbhuta rasam_rasa anvabhūt_anubhū iti_iti āha_ah tatas_tatas iti_iti tam_tad vyañjalita--_vyañjalita tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa vilokya_vilokay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dhanaṃjaya_dhanaṃjaya iti_iti dhīraḥ_dhīra api_api vismayena_vismaya āviṣṭaḥ_āviś hṛṣṭa--_hṛṣ romā_roman pulakitaḥ_pulakay devam_deva śirasā_śiras bhū--_bhū lagnena_lag praṇamya_praṇam kṛtāñjaliḥ_kṛtāñjali san_as abhāṣata_bhāṣ atra_atra bhaya--_bhaya netra--_netra saṃvaraṇa--_saṃvaraṇa ādikam_ādika tasya_tad na_na abhūt_bhū kintu_kiṃtu adbhutaḥ_adbhuta rasaḥ_rasa abhyudait_abhyudi iti_iti vyañjate_vyañj iha_iha tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa hariḥ_hari ālambanaḥ_ālambana muhur_muhur muhur_muhur tad--_tad vīkṣaṇam_vīkṣaṇa uddīpanam_uddīpana praṇati--_praṇati pāṇi--_pāṇi yogau_yoga anubhāvau_anubhāva romāñcaḥ_romāñca sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika taiḥ_tad ākṣiptā_ākṣip matiḥ_mati dhṛti--_dhṛti harṣa--_harṣa ādayaḥ_ādi sañcāriṇaḥ_saṃcārin

arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
paśyāmi_paś devān_deva tava_tvad deva_deva dehe_deha
sarvān_sarva tathā_tathā bhūta--_bhūta viśeṣa--_viśeṣa saṃghān_saṃgha
brahmāṇam_brahman īśam_īśa kamalāsana--_kamalāsana stham_stha
ṛṣīn_ṛṣi ca_ca sarvān_sarva uragān_uraga ca_ca divyān_divya

āha_ah he_he deva_deva tava_tvad dehe_deha devānām_deva āditya--_āditya ādīn_ādi paśyāmi_paś tathā_tathā sarvān_sarva bhūta--_bhūta viśeṣāṇām_viśeṣa sthāvarāṇām_sthāvara jaṅgamānām_jaṅgama ca_ca nānā_nānā saṃsthānānām_saṃsthāna saṃghān_saṃgha samūhān_samūha tathā_tathā brahmāṇam_brahman caturmukham_caturmukha īśam_īśa īśitāram_īśitṛ sarveṣām_sarva kamalāsana--_kamalāsana stham_stha pṛthvī--_pṛthvī padma--_padma madhye_madhya meru--_meru karṇikā--_karṇikā āsana--_āsana stham_stha bhagavat--_bhagavant nābhi--_nābhi kamalāsana--_kamalāsana stham_stha iti_iti vā_vā tathā_tathā ṛṣīn_ṛṣi ca_ca sarvān_sarva vasiṣṭa--_vasiṣṭha ādīn_ādi brahma--_brahman putrān_putra uragān_uraga ca_ca divyān_divya prākṛtān_prākṛta vāsuki--_vāsuki prabhṛtīn_prabhṛti paśyāmi_paś iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra anvayaḥ_anvaya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yat_yad bhagavatā_bhagavant darśitam_darśay viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa tat_tad bhagavat--_bhagavant dattena_dā divyena_divya cakṣuṣā_cakṣus sarva--_sarva loka--_loka adṛśyam_adṛśya api_api paśyāmi_dṛś aho_aho mama_mad bhāgya--_bhāgya prakarṣaḥ_prakarṣa iti_iti sva--_sva anubhavam_anubhava āviṣkurvan_āviṣkṛ arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac paśyāmi_dṛś cākṣuṣa--_cākṣuṣa jñāna--_jñāna viṣayīkaromi_viṣayīkṛ he_he deva_deva tava_tvad dehe_deha viśvarūpe_viśvarūpa devān_deva vasu--_vasu ādīn_ādi sarvān_sarva tathā_tathā bhūta--_bhūta viśeṣāṇām_viśeṣa sthāvarāṇām_sthāvara jaṅgamānām_jaṅgama ca_ca nānā_nānā saṃsthānānām_saṃsthāna saṃghān_saṃgha samūhān_samūha tathā_tathā brahmāṇam_brahman caturmukham_caturmukha īśam_īśa īśitāram_īśitṛ sarveṣām_sarva kamalāsana--_kamalāsana stham_stha pṛthvī--_pṛthvī padma--_padma madhye_madhya meru--_meru karṇikā--_karṇikā āsana--_āsana stham_stha bhagavat--_bhagavant nābhi--_nābhi kamalāsana--_kamalāsana stham_stha iti_iti vā_vā tathā_tathā ṛṣīn_ṛṣi ca_ca sarvān_sarva vasiṣṭa--_vasiṣṭha ādīn_ādi brahma--_brahman putrān_putra uragān_uraga ca_ca divyān_divya prākṛtān_prākṛta vāsuki--_vāsuki prabhṛtīn_prabhṛti paśyāmi_paś iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra anvayaḥ_anvaya

baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka abhāṣata_bhāṣ tat_tad āha_ah paśyāmi_dṛś iti_iti saptadaśabhiḥ_saptadaśan tathā_tathā bhūta--_bhūta viśeṣāṇām_viśeṣa jarāyu--_jarāyu ja--_ja ādīnām_ādi saṃghān_saṃgha paśyāmi_paś brahmāṇam_brahman caturmukham_caturmukha kamalāsane_kamalāsana caturmukhe_caturmukha sthitam_sthā tad--_tad antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin īśam_īśa garbha--_garbha udaka--_udaka śayam_śaya urugān_uruga vāsuki--_vāsuki ādīn_ādi sarpān_sarpa

lg.l: aneka--_aneka bāhu--_bāhu udara--_udara vaktra--_vaktra netram_netra
paśyāmi_paś tvā_tvad sarvatas_sarvatas ananta--_ananta rūpam_rūpa
na_na antam_anta na_na madhyam_madhya na_na punar_punar tava_tvad ādim_ādi
paśyāmi_paś viśveśvara_viśveśvara viśvarūpa_viśvarūpa

div.p: paśyāmi_dṛś paśyāmi_dṛś paśyāmi_dṛś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bāhavaḥ_bāhu udarāṇi_udara vaktrāṇi_vaktra netrāṇi_netra ca_ca anekāni_aneka yasya_yad tam_tad aneka--_aneka bāhu--_bāhu udara--_udara vaktra--_vaktra netram_netra paśyāmi_paś tvā_tvad tvām_tvad sarvatas_sarvatas sarvatra_sarvatra anantāni_ananta rūpāṇi_rūpa yasya_yad iti_iti tam_tad tava_tvad tu_tu punar_punar na_na antam_anta avasānam_avasāna na_na madhyam_madhya na_na api_api ādim_ādi paśyāmi_paś sarva--_sarva gata--_gam tvāt_tva he_he viśveśvara_viśveśvara he_he viśva--_viśva rūpa_rūpa sambodhana--_sambodhana dvayam_dvaya ati_ati sambhramāt_sambhrama
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha viśveśvara_viśveśvara ādi--_ādi puruṣa_puruṣa
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva yatra_yatra dehe_deha deva--_deva ādīn_ādi dṛṣṭavan_dṛś tam_tad viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ aneka--_aneka iti_iti he_he viśvarūpa_viśvarūpa prathama--_prathama puruṣa_puruṣa

lg.l: kirīṭinam_kirīṭin gadinam_gadin cakriṇam_cakrin ca_ca
tejaḥ--_tejas rāśim_rāśi sarvatas_sarvatas dīptimantam_dīptimat
paśyāmi_paś tvām_tvad durnirīkṣyam_durnirīkṣya samantāt_samantāt
dīpta--_dīp anala--_anala arka--_arka dyutim_dyuti aprameyam_aprameya

div.p: kirīṭinam_kirīṭin mukuṭavantam_mukuṭavat gadinam_gadin gadāvantam_gadāvat cakriṇam_cakrin cakravantam_cakravat ca_ca sarvatas_sarvatas dīptimantam_dīptimat tejaḥ--_tejas puñja--_puñja rūpam_rūpa tathā_tathā durnirīkṣyam_durnirīkṣya draṣṭum_dṛś aśakyam_aśakya tatra_tatra hetuḥ_hetu dīptayoḥ_dīp anala--_anala arkayoḥ_arka dyutiḥ_dyuti iva_iva dyutiḥ_dyuti tejaḥ_tejas yasya_yad tam_tad ataeva_ataeva aprameyam_aprameya evaṃbhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta iti_iti niścetum_niści aśakyam_aśakya tvām_tvad samantataḥ_samantataḥ paśyāmi_paś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tam_tad eva_eva viśvarūpam_viśvarūpa bhagavantam_bhagavant prakāra--_prakāra anantaram_anantara viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ kirīṭinam_kirīṭin iti_iti kirīṭa--_kirīṭa gadā--_gadā cakra--_cakra dhāriṇam_dhārin ca_ca sarvatas_sarvatas dīptimantam_dīptimat tejaḥ--_tejas rāśim_rāśi ca_ca ataeva_ataeva durnirīkṣyam_durnirīkṣya divyena_divya cakṣuṣā_cakṣus vinā_vinā nirīkṣitum_nirīkṣ aśakyam_aśakya sa_sa yakāra--_yakāra pāṭhe_pāṭha duḥśabdaḥ_duḥśabda apahnava--_apahnava vacanaḥ_vacana a_a nirīkṣyam_nirīkṣ iti_iti yāvat_yāvat dīptayoḥ_dīp anala--_anala arkayoḥ_arka dyutiḥ_dyuti iva_iva dyutiḥ_dyuti yasya_yad tam_tad aprameyam_aprameya iti_iti paricchettum_paricchid aśakyam_aśakya samantāt_samantāt sarvatas_sarvatas paśyāmi_paś divyena_divya cakṣuṣā_cakṣus atas_atas adhikāri--_adhikārin bhedāt_bheda durnirīkṣam_durnirīkṣa paśyāmi_dṛś iti_iti na_na virodhaḥ_virodha
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva vidhā--_vidhā antareṇa_antara tam_tad eva_eva viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ kirīṭinam_kirīṭin iti_iti durnirīkṣyam_durnirīkṣya api_api tvām_tvad aham_mad paśyāmi_dṛś tad--_tad prasādāt_prasāda divya--_divya cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus lābhāt_lābha durnirīkṣyāyām_durnirīkṣya hetuḥ_hetu samantāt_samantāt dīpta--_dīp anala--_anala iti_iti aprameyam_aprameya idam_idam ittham_ittham iti_iti pramātum_pramā aśakyam_aśakya

lg.l: tvam_tvad akṣaram_akṣara paramam_parama veditavyam_vid
tvam_tvad asya_idam viśvasya_viśva param_para nidhānam_nidhāna
tvam_tvad avyayaḥ_avyaya śāśvata--_śāśvata dharma--_dharma goptā_goptṛ
sanātanaḥ_sanātana tvam_tvad puruṣaḥ_puruṣa mataḥ_man me_mad

div.p: tvam_tvad eva_eva akṣaram_akṣara paramam_parama brahma_brahman kathambhūtam_kathambhūta veditavyam_vid mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu jñātavyam_jñā tvam_tvad eva_eva asya_idam viśvasya_viśva param_para nidhānam_nidhāna nidhīyate_nidhā asmin_idam iti_iti nidhānam_nidhāna prakṛṣṭa--_prakṛṣṭa āśrayaḥ_āśraya ataeva_ataeva tvam_tvad avyayaḥ_avyaya nityaḥ_nitya śāśvatasya_śāśvata nityasya_nitya dharmasya_dharma goptā_goptṛ pālakaḥ_pālaka sanātanaḥ_sanātana cirantanaḥ_cirantana puruṣaḥ_puruṣa mataḥ_man me_mad saṃmataḥ_samman asi_as mama_mad

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam tava_tvad atarkya--_atarkya niratiśayi--_niratiśayin śvarya--_śvarya darśanāt_darśana anuminomi_anumi tvam_tvad iti_iti tvam_tvad eva_eva akṣaram_akṣara paramam_parama brahma_brahman veditavyam_vid mumukṣubhiḥ_mumukṣu vedānta--_vedānta śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādinā_ādi tvam_tvad eva_eva asya_idam viśvasya_viśva param_para prakṛṣṭam_prakṛṣ nidhīyate_nidhā asmin_idam iti_iti nidhānam_nidhāna āśrayaḥ_āśraya ataeva_ataeva tvam_tvad avyayaḥ_avyaya nityaḥ_nitya śāśvatasya_śāśvata nitya--_nitya veda--_veda pratipādya--_pratipāday tayā_tā asya_idam dharmasya_dharma goptā_goptṛ pālayitā_pālayitṛ śāśvatā_śāśvata iti_iti sambodhanam_sambodhana vā_vā tasmin_tad pakṣe_pakṣa avyayaḥ_avyaya vināśa--_vināśa rahitaḥ_rahita ataeva_ataeva sanātanaḥ_sanātana cirantanaḥ_cirantana puruṣaḥ_puruṣa yaḥ_yad paramātmā_paramātman saḥ_tad eva_eva tvam_tvad me_mad mataḥ_man viditaḥ_vid asi_as

baladevaḥ_baladeva acintya--_acintya mahā--_mahat aiśvarya--_aiśvarya vīkṣaṇāt_vīkṣaṇa tvam_tvad aham_mad evam_evam niścinomi_niści iti_iti āha_ah tvam_tvad iti_iti atha_atha parā_para yayā_yad tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara adhigamyate_adhigam yat_yad tat_tad adṛśyam_adṛśya iti_iti ādi--_ādi vedānta--_vedānta vākyaiḥ_vākya veditavyam_vid yat_yad paramam_parama sa_sa śrīkam_śrīka akṣaram_akṣara tattvam_tattva eva_eva nidhānam_nidhāna āśrayaḥ_āśraya avyayaḥ_avyaya tvam_tvad avināśī_avināśin śāśvata--_śāśvata dharma--_dharma veda--_veda ukta--_vac dharma--_dharma pālakaḥ_pālaka tvam_tvad sa_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa adhipa--_adhipa adhipaḥ_adhipa na_na ca_ca asya_idam kaścid_kaścit janitā_janitṛ na_na ca_ca adhipaḥ_adhipa iti_iti mantra--_mantra varṇa--_varṇa uktaḥ_vac sanātanaḥ_sanātana purāṇaḥ_purāṇa puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tvam_tvad eva_eva

lg.l: anādi--_anādi madhya--_madhya antam_anta ananta--_ananta vīryam_vīrya
ananta--_ananta bāhum_bāhu śaśi--_śaśin sūrya--_sūrya netram_netra
paśyāmi_dṛś tvām_tvad dīpta--_dīp hutāśa--_hutāśa vaktram_vaktra
sva--_sva tejasā_tejas viśvam_viśva idam_idam tapantam_tap

div.p: ananta--_ananta vīryam_vīrya anantam_ananta vīryam_vīrya prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva yasya_yad tam_tad anantāḥ_ananta vīryavantaḥ_vīryavat bāhavaḥ_bāhu yasya_yad tam_tad śaśi--_śaśin sūryau_sūrya netre_netra yasya_yad tādṛśam_tādṛśa tvām_tvad paśyāmi_dṛś tathā_tathā dīptaḥ_dīp hutāśaḥ_hutāśa agniḥ_agni vaktreṣu_vaktra yasya_yad tam_tad sva--_sva tejasā_tejas idam_idam viśvam_viśva viśvam_viśva santapantam_saṃtap paśyāmi_paś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka ca_ca anādi_anādi iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi utpattiḥ_utpatti madhyam_madhya sthitiḥ_sthiti antaḥ_anta vināśaḥ_vināśa tad--_tad rahitam_rahita anādi--_anādi madhya--_madhya antam_anta anantam_ananta vīryam_vīrya prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva yasya_yad tam_tad anantāḥ_ananta bāhavaḥ_bāhu yasya_yad tam_tad upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad mukha--_mukha ādīnām_ādi api_api śaśi--_śaśin sūryau_sūrya netre_netra yasya_yad tam_tad dīptaḥ_dīp hutāśaḥ_hutāśa vaktram_vaktra yasya_yad vaktreṣu_vaktra yasya_yad iti_iti vā_vā tam_tad sva--_sva tejasā_tejas viśvam_viśva idam_idam tapantam_tap santāpayantam_saṃtāpay tvā_tvad tvām_tvad paśyāmi_paś
duṣyati_duṣ

baladevaḥ_baladeva anādi_anādi iti_iti ādi--_ādi madhya--_madhya avasāna--_avasāna śūnyam_śūnya anantāni_ananta vīryāṇi_vīrya tad--_tad upalakṣaṇāni_upalakṣaṇa samagrāṇi_samagra aiśvaryāṇi_aiśvarya ṣaḍ_ṣaṣ yasya_yad tam_tad ananta--_ananta bāhum_bāhu sahasra--_sahasra bhujam_bhuja śaśi--_śaśin sūrya--_sūrya upamāni_upama netrāṇi_netra yasya_yad tam_tad deva--_deva ādiṣu_ādi praṇateṣu_praṇam prasanna--_prasad netram_netra tad--_tad viparīteṣu_viparīta asura--_asura ādiṣu_ādi krūra--_krūra netram_netra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dīpta--_dīp hutāśa--_hutāśa upamāni_upama saṃhāra--_saṃhāra anuguṇāni_anuguṇa vaktrāṇi_vaktra yasya_yad tam_tad arjunasya_arjuna vākye_vākya kvacid_kvacid punar_punar uktiḥ_ukti tasya_tad vismaya--_vismaya āviṣṭa--_āviś tvāt_tva na_na doṣāya_doṣa yat_yad uktam_vac prasāde_prasāda vismaye_vismaya harṣe_harṣa dvi--_dvi tris_tris uktam_vac na_na duṣyati_duṣ iti_iti

dṛṣṭvā_dṛś adbhutam_adbhuta rūpam_rūpa idam_idam tava_tvad ugram_ugra
loka--_loka trayam_traya pravyathitam_pravyathay mahātman_mahātman

div.p: dyāv--_div ā_ā pṛthivyoḥ_pṛthivī idam_idam antaram_antara antarīkṣam_antarīkṣa tvayā_tvad eva_eva ekena_eka vyāptam_vyāp diśaḥ_diś ca_ca sarvāḥ_sarva vyāptāḥ_vyāp adbhutam_adbhuta adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa pūrvam_pūrva tvadīyam_tvadīya idam_idam ugram_ugra ghoram_ghora rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś loka--_loka trayam_traya pravyathitam_pravyathay ati_ati bhītam_bhī paśyāmi_paś iti_iti pūrvasya_pūrva eva_eva anuṣaṅgaḥ_anuṣaṅga

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana prakṛtasya_prakṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant rūpasya_rūpa vyāptim_vyāpti āha_ah dyāv--_div āpṛthivyoḥ_āpṛthivī iti_iti dyāv--_div ā_ā pṛthivyoḥ_pṛthivī idam_idam antaram_antara antarīkṣam_antarīkṣa hi_hi tvayā_tvad eva_eva ekena_eka vyāptam_vyāp diśaḥ_diś ca_ca sarvāḥ_sarva vyāptāḥ_vyāp dṛṣṭvā_dṛś adbhutam_adbhuta atyanta--_atyanta vismaya--_vismaya karam_kara idam_idam ugram_ugra duradhigamam_duradhigama mahā--_mahat tejasvi--_tejasvin tvāt_tva tava_tvad rūpam_rūpa upalabhya_upalabh loka--_loka trayam_traya pravyathitam_pravyathay atyanta--_atyanta bhītam_bhī jātam_jan he_he mahātman_mahātman sādhūnām_sādhu abhaya--_abhaya dāyaka_dāyaka itas_itas param_param idam_idam upasaṃhara_upasaṃhṛ iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha atha_atha prastā--_prastā upayogi--_upayogin tvāt_tva tasya_tad eva_eva rūpasya_rūpa kāla--_kāla rūpa--_rūpa tvam_tva darśayāmāsa_darśay dyāvā_div iti_iti ādi_ādi daśabhiḥ_daśan
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha tasya_tad eva_eva rūpasya_rūpa prakṛtyā_prakṛti upayogi--_upayogin tvena_tva kāla--_kāla rūpa--_rūpa tām_tā darśitavān_darśay iti_iti āha_ah dyāvā_div iti_iti daśabhiḥ_daśan dyāv--_div ā_ā pṛthivyoḥ_pṛthivī antaram_antara antarīkṣam_antarīkṣa tathā_tathā sarvāḥ_sarva diśaḥ_diś ca_ca ekena_eka tvayā_tvad vyāptam_vyāp tava_tvad idam_idam aparimitam_aparimita adbhutam_adbhuta ugram_ugra ca_ca rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś loka--_loka trayam_traya pravyathitam_pravyathay bhītam_bhī saṃcalanam_saṃcalana ca_ca bhavati_bhū he_he mahātman_mahātman sarva--_sarva āśraya_āśraya atrā_atra idam_idam avagamyate_avagam tadā_tadā yuddha--_yuddha darśanāya_darśana ye_yad trailokya--_trailokya sthāḥ_stha mitra--_mitra udāsīnāḥ_udāsīna deva--_deva asurāḥ_asura gandharva--_gandharva kinnara--_kiṃnara ādayaḥ_ādi samāgatāḥ_samāgam taiḥ_tad api_api bhaktimadbhiḥ_bhaktimat bhagavat--_bhagavant datta--_dā divya--_divya ekena_eka eva_eva arjunena_arjuna svapatā_svap iva_iva svāpnika--_svāpnika ratha--_ratha ādīni_ādi nija--_nija aiśvaryasya_aiśvarya bahu--_bahu sākṣikatā--_sākṣikatā artham_artha etat_etad

lg.l: amī_adas tvā_tvad sura--_sura saṃghāḥ_saṃgha viśanti_viś
kecid_kaścit bhītāḥ_bhī prāñjalayaḥ_prāñjali gṛṇanti_gṛ
svasti_svasti iti_iti uktvā_vac mahā--_mahat ṛṣi--_ṛṣi siddha--_siddha saṃghāḥ_saṃgha
stuvanti_stu tvām_tvad stutibhiḥ_stuti puṣkalābhiḥ_puṣkala

div.p: amī_adas sura--_sura saṃghāḥ_saṃgha bhītāḥ_bhī santaḥ_as tvām_tvad viśanti_viś śaraṇam_śaraṇa praviśanti_praviś teṣām_tad madhye_madhya kecid_kaścit ati_ati bhītāḥ_bhī dūratas_dūratas eva_eva sthitvā_sthā kṛta--_kṛ sampuṭa--_sampuṭa kara--_kara yugalāḥ_yugala santaḥ_as gṛṇanti_gṛ jaya_ji jaya_ji rakṣa_rakṣ rakṣa_rakṣ iti_iti prārthayante_prārthay spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa anyat_anya

paśyan_paś āha_ah amī_adas hi_hi sura--_sura saṃghāḥ_saṃgha vasu--_vasu ādi--_ādi deva--_deva gaṇāḥ_gaṇa bhū--_bhū bhāra--_bhāra avatāra--_avatāra artham_artha manuṣya--_manuṣya rūpeṇa_rūpa avatīrṇāḥ_avatṛ yudhyamānāḥ_yudh santaḥ_as tvā_tvad tvām_tvad viśanti_viś praviśantaḥ_praviś dṛśyante_dṛś evam_evam asura--_asura saṅghāḥ_saṃgha iti_iti pada--_pada chedena_cheda bhū--_bhū bhāra--_bhāra bhūtāḥ_bhū duryodhana--_duryodhana ādayaḥ_ādi tvām_tvad viśanti_viś iti_iti api_api vaktavyam_vac evam_evam ubhayoḥ_ubhaya api_api senayoḥ_senā kecid_kaścit bhītāḥ_bhī palāyane_palāyana api_api aśaktāḥ_aśakta santaḥ_as prāñjalayaḥ_prāñjali gṛṇanti_gṛ stuvanti_stu tvām_tvad evam_evam pratyupasthite_pratyupasthā yuddhe_yuddha utpāta--_utpāta ādi--_ādi nimittāni_nimitta upalakṣya_upalakṣay svasti_svasti astu_as sarvasya_sarva jagataḥ_jagant iti_iti uktvā_vac mahā--_mahat ṛṣi--_ṛṣi siddha--_siddha saṅghāḥ_saṃgha nārada--_nārada prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti yuddha--_yuddha darśana--_darśana artham_artha āgatāḥ_āgam viśva--_viśva vināśa--_vināśa
tvām_tvad stutibhiḥ_stuti guṇa--_guṇa utkarṣa--_utkarṣa pratipādikābhiḥ_pratipādaka vāgbhiḥ_vāc puṣkalābhiḥ_puṣkala paripūrṇa--_paripṛ arthābhiḥ_artha
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tvā_tvad tvām_tvad
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva amī_adas sura--_sura saṅghāḥ_saṃgha tvām_tvad śaraṇam_śaraṇa viśanti_viś teṣu_tad kecid_kaścit bhītāḥ_bhī dūratas_dūratas sthitvā_sthā prāñjalayaḥ_prāñjali santaḥ_as gṛṇanti_gṛ pāhi_pā pāhi_pā prabho_prabhu asmān_mad iti_iti prārthayante_prārthay mahatīm_mahat bhītim_bhīti ālakṣya_ālakṣay mahā--_mahat ṛṣi--_ṛṣi saṅghāḥ_saṃgha siddha--_siddha saṅghāḥ_saṃgha ca_ca viśvasya_viśva svasti_svasti astu_as iti_iti uktvā_vac stuvanti_stu

gandharva--_gandharva yakṣa--_yakṣa asura--_asura siddha--_siddha saṃghā_saṃgha
vīkṣante_vīkṣ tvām_tvad vismitāḥ_vismi ca_ca eva_eva sarve_sarva

div.p: rudra--_rudra ādityāḥ_āditya vasavaḥ_vasu ye_yad ca_ca sādhyāḥ_sādhya rudra--_rudra ādayaḥ_ādi gaṇāḥ_gaṇa viśve_viśva aśvinau_aśvin viśve_viśva devāḥ_deva aśvinau_aśvin ca_ca devau_deva marutaḥ_marut ca_ca vāyavaḥ_vāyu ūṣma--_ūṣman pāḥ_pa ca_ca pitaraḥ_pitṛ uṣmabhāgāḥ_uṣmabhāga pitaraḥ_pitṛ śruteḥ_śruti smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca yāvat_yāvat uṣṇam_uṣṇa bhavet_bhū annam_anna tāvat_tāvat aśnanti_aś vāgvatāḥ_vāgvata tāvat_tāvat aśnanti_aś pitaraḥ_pitṛ yāvat_yāvat na_na uktāḥ_vac haviḥ_havis guṇāḥ_guṇa iti_iti gandharvāḥ_gandharva ca_ca yakṣāḥ_yakṣa ca_ca asurāḥ_asura ca_ca virocana--_virocana ādayaḥ_ādi siddha--_siddha saṅghāḥ_saṃgha siddhānām_siddha saṅghāḥ_saṃgha ca_ca sarve_sarva eva_eva vismitāḥ_vismi santa_as tvām_tvad vīkṣante_vīkṣ iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka ca_ca anyat_anya rudra_rudra iti_iti rudrāḥ_rudra ca_ca ādityāḥ_āditya ca_ca vasavaḥ_vasu ye_yad ca_ca sādhyāḥ_sādhya nāma_nāma deva--_deva gaṇāḥ_gaṇa viśve_viśva tulya--_tulya vibhaktika--_vibhaktika viśvadeva--_viśvadeva śabdābhyām_śabda ucyamānāḥ_vac deva--_deva gaṇāḥ_gaṇa aśvinau_aśvin nāsatya--_nāsatya damrau_damra marutaḥ_marut ekonapañcāśat--_ekonapañcāśat deva--_deva gaṇāḥ_gaṇa siddhānām_siddha ca_ca saṃghāḥ_saṃgha samūhāḥ_samūha vīkṣante_vīkṣ paśyanti_dṛś tvā_tvad tvām_tvad tādṛśa--_tādṛśa adbhuta--_adbhuta darśanāt_darśana te_tad sarve_sarva eva_eva vismitāḥ_vismi ca_ca vismayam_vismaya alaukika--_alaukika camatkāra--_camatkāra viśeṣam_viśeṣa āpadyante_āpad ca_ca
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha uṣmāṇam_uṣman pibanti_pā iti_iti uṣmapāḥ_uṣmapa pitaraḥ_pitṛ uṣma--_uṣman bhāgāḥ_bhāga hi_hi pitaraḥ_pitṛ iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

baladevaḥ_baladeva rudra_rudra iti_iti sphuṭam_sphuṭa uṣmapāḥ_uṣmapa pitaraḥ_pitṛ uṣmāṇam_uṣman pibanti_pā iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti uṣma--_uṣman bhāgāḥ_bhāga hi_hi pitaraḥ_pitṛ iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca

lg.l: rūpam_rūpa mahat_mahat te_tvad bahu--_bahu vaktra--_vaktra netram_netra
mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu bahu--_bahu bāhu--_bāhu ūru--_ūru pādam_pāda
bahu--_bahu udaram_udara bahu--_bahu daṃṣṭrā--_daṃṣṭra karālam_karāla
dṛṣṭvā_dṛś lokāḥ_loka pravyathitāḥ_pravyathay tathā_tathā aham_mad

div.p: he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu mahat_mahat ati_ati ūrjitam_ūrjay tava_tvad rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś lokāḥ_loka sarve_sarva pravyathitāḥ_pravyathay ati_ati bhītāḥ_bhī tathā_tathā aham_mad ca_ca pravyathitaḥ_pravyathay asmi_as kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś bahūni_bahu vaktrāṇi_vaktra netrāṇi_netra ca_ca yasmin_yad tat_tad bahavaḥ_bahu bāhavaḥ_bāhu ūravaḥ_ūru pādāḥ_pāda ca_ca yasmin_yad tat_tad bahūni_bahu udarāṇi_udara yasmin_yad tat_tad bahvībhiḥ_bahu daṃṣṭrābhiḥ_daṃṣṭra karālam_karāla vikṛtam_vikṛ raudram_raudra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana loka--_loka trayam_traya pravyathitam_pravyathay iti_iti uktam_vac upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ rūpam_rūpa iti_iti he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu te_tad tava_tvad rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś lokāḥ_loka sarve_sarva api_api prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin pravyathitāḥ_pravyathay tathā_tathā aham_mad pravyathitaḥ_pravyathay bhayena_bhaya kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa te_tvad rūpam_rūpa mahat_mahat atipramāṇam_atipramāṇa bahūni_bahu vaktrāṇi_vaktra netrāṇi_netra ca_ca yasmin_yad tat_tad bahavaḥ_bahu bāhavaḥ_bāhu ūravaḥ_ūru pādāḥ_pāda ca_ca yasmin_yad tat_tad bahūni_bahu udarāṇi_udara yasmin_yad tat_tad bahubhiḥ_bahu daṃṣṭrābhiḥ_daṃṣṭra karālam_karāla ati_ati bhayānakam_bhayānaka dṛṣṭvā_dṛś eva_eva mad--_mad sahitāḥ_sahita sarve_sarva lokāḥ_loka bhayena_bhaya pīḍitāḥ_pīḍay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva loka--_loka trayam_traya pravyathitam_pravyathay iti_iti uktam_vac upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ rūpam_rūpa mahat_mahat iti_iti bahubhiḥ_bahu daṃṣṭrābhiḥ_daṃṣṭra karālam_karāla raudram_raudra sphuṭam_sphuṭa anyat_anya tathā_tathā aham_mad iti_iti asya_idam uttareṇa_uttara sambandhaḥ_sambandha

lg.l: nabhaḥ--_nabhas spṛśam_spṛś dīptam_dīp aneka--_aneka varṇam_varṇa
vyātta--_vyātta ānanam_ānana dīpta--_dīp viśāla--_viśāla netram_netra
dṛṣṭvā_dṛś hi_hi tvām_tvad pravyathita--_pravyathay antarātmā_antarātman
dhṛtim_dhṛti na_na vindāmi_vid śamam_śama ca_ca viṣṇo_viṣṇu

div.p: nabhaḥ--_nabhas spṛśam_spṛś nabhaḥ_nabhas spṛśati_spṛś iti_iti nabhaḥ--_nabhas spṛś_spṛś tam_tad antarīkṣa--_antarīkṣa vyāpinam_vyāpin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dīptam_dīp tejaḥ--_tejas yuktam_yuj aneke_aneka varṇāḥ_varṇa yasya_yad tam_tad vyaktāni_vyakta vivṛtāni_vivṛ ānanāni_ānana yasya_yad tam_tad dīptāni_dīp viśālāni_viśāla netrāṇi_netra yasya_yad tam_tad evambhūtam_evambhūta hi_hi tvām_tvad dṛṣṭvā_dṛś pravyathita--_pravyathay antarātmā_antarātman manaḥ_manas yasya_yad saḥ_tad aham_mad dhṛtim_dhṛti dhairyam_dhairya upaśamam_upaśama na_na labhe_labh

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhayānaka--_bhayānaka tvam_tva eva_eva prapañcayati_prapañcay nabhaḥ_nabhas iti_iti na_na kevalam_kevala pravyathitaḥ_pravyathay eva_eva aham_mad tvām_tvad dṛṣṭvā_dṛś kintu_kiṃtu pravyathitaḥ_pravyathay antarātmā_antarātman manaḥ_manas yasya_yad saḥ_tad aham_mad dhṛtim_dhṛti dhairyam_dhairya deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi dhāraṇa--_dhāraṇa sāmarthyam_sāmarthya śamam_śama ca_ca manaḥ--_manas prasādam_prasāda na_na vindāmi_vid na_na labhe_labh he_he viṣṇo_viṣṇu tvām_tvad kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa nabhaḥ--_nabhas spṛśam_spṛś antarīkṣa--_antarīkṣa vyāpinam_vyāpin dīptam_dīp prajvalitam_prajval aneka--_aneka varṇam_varṇa bhayaṅkara--_bhayaṃkara nānā_nānā saṃsthāna--_saṃsthāna yuktam_yuj vyātta--_vyātta ānanam_ānana vivṛtta--_vivṛt mukham_mukha dīpta--_dīp viśāla--_viśāla netram_netra prajvalita--_prajval vistīrṇa--_vistṛ cakṣuṣam_cakṣus tvām_tvad dṛṣṭvā_dṛś pravyathita--_pravyathay antarātmā_antarātman aham_mad
dhṛtim_dhṛti śamam_śama ca_ca na_na vvindāmi_vid iti_iti anvayaḥ_anvaya

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva tathā_tathā etad--_etad rūpa--_rūpa upasaṃhāra--_upasaṃhāra phalakam_phalaka dainyam_dainya prakāśayan_prakāśay āha_ah nabhaḥ--_nabhas spṛśam_spṛś iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi aham_mad ca_ca tvām_tvad dṛṣṭvā_dṛś pravyathita--_pravyathay antarātmā_antarātman bhīta--_bhī udvigna--_udvij manāḥ_manas san_as dhṛtim_dhṛti upaśamam_upaśama ca_ca na_na vindāmi_vid na_na labhe_labh he_he viṣṇo_viṣṇu kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa nabhaḥ--_nabhas spṛśam_spṛś antarīkṣa--_antarīkṣa vyāpinam_vyāpin vyātta--_vyātta ānanam_ānana visṛta--_visṛ āsyam_āsya vyakta--_vyakta artham_artha anyat_anya atra_atra kāla--_kāla rūpa--_rūpa tva--_tva darśana--_darśana hetukaḥ_hetuka bhayānaka--_bhayānaka rasaḥ_rasa svasya_sva uktaḥ_vac

lg.l: daṃṣṭrā--_daṃṣṭra karālāni_karāla te_tvad mukhāni_mukha
