diśaḥ_diś na_na jāne_jñā na_na labhe_labh ca_ca śarma_śarman
prasīda_prasad deveśa_deveśa jagan--_jagant nivāsa_nivāsa

div.p: he_he deveśa_deveśa tava_tvad mukhāni_mukha dṛṣṭvā_dṛś bhaya--_bhaya āveśena_āveśa diśaḥ_diś na_na jānāmi_jñā śarma_śarman sukham_sukha ca_ca na_na labhe_labh bho_bho jagan--_jagant nivāsa_nivāsa prasannaḥ_prasad bhava_bhū kīdṛśāni_kīdṛśa mukhāni_mukha dṛṣṭvā_dṛś daṃṣṭrābhiḥ_daṃṣṭra karālāni_karāla kāla--_kāla analaḥ_anala vikṛta--_vikṛ tvena_tva pralaya--_pralaya agniḥ_agni tad--_tad sadṛśāni_sadṛśa 25_25

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana daṃṣṭrābhiḥ_daṃṣṭra karālāni_karāla vikṛta--_vikṛ tvena_tva bhayaṅkarāṇi_bhayaṃkara pralaya--_pralaya kāla--_kāla anala--_anala sadṛśāni_sadṛśa ca_ca te_tvad mukhāni_mukha dṛṣṭvā_dṛś eva_eva na_na tu_tu tāni_tad prāpya_prāp bhaya--_bhaya vaśena_vaśa diśaḥ_diś pūrva--_pūrva apara--_apara ādi--_ādi vivekena_viveka na_na jāne_jñā atas_atas na_na labhe_labh ca_ca śarma_śarman sukham_sukha tvad--_tvad rūpa--_rūpa darśane_darśana api_api atas_atas he_he deveśa_deveśa he_he jagannivāsa_jagannivāsa prasīda_prasad prasannaḥ_prasad bhava_bhū mām_mad prati_prati yathā_yathā bhava--_bhava abhāvena_abhāva tvad--_tvad darśana--_darśana jam_ja sukham_sukha prāpnuyām_prāp iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa 25_25

baladevaḥ_baladeva daṃṣṭra--_daṃṣṭra iti_iti kāla--_kāla analaḥ_anala pralaya--_pralaya agniḥ_agni tad--_tad sannibhāni_saṃnibha tad--_tad tulyāni_tulya śarma_śarman sukham_sukha

div.p: icchasi_iṣ paśya_paś āha_ah amī_adas dhṛtarāṣṭrasya_dhṛtarāṣṭra putrāḥ_putra duryodhana--_duryodhana ādayaḥ_ādi sarve_sarva avani--_avani pālānām_pāla jayadratha--_jayadratha ādīnām_ādi rājñām_rājan saṅghaiḥ_saṃgha samūhaiḥ_samūha saha_saha eva_eva tava_tvad vaktrāṇi_vaktra viśanti_viś iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara anvayaḥ_anvaya tathā_tathā bhīṣmaḥ_bhīṣma ca_ca droṇaḥ_droṇa ca_ca asau_adas sūta--_sūta putraḥ_putra karṇaḥ_karṇa ca_ca na_na kevalam_kevalam te_tad eva_eva viśanti_viś api_api tu_tu pratiyoddhāraḥ_pratiyoddhṛ asmadīyāḥ_asmadīya ye_yad yodha--_yodha mukhyāḥ_mukhya śikhaṇḍi--_śikhaṇḍin dhṛṣṭadyumna--_dhṛṣṭadyumna ādayaḥ_ādi taiḥ_tad saha_saha 26_26
div.l: vakrāṇi_vakra iti_iti ye_yad ete_etad sarve_sarva tvaramāṇāḥ_tvar dhāvantaḥ_dhāv tava_tvad daṃṣṭrābhiḥ_daṃṣṭra karālāni_karāla vikṛtāni_vikṛ bhayṅkarāṇi_bhayṃkara vaktrāṇi_vaktra viśanti_viś teṣām_tad madhye_madhya kecid_kaścit cūrṇīkṛtaiḥ_cūrṇīkṛ uttamāṅgaiḥ_uttamāṅga śirobhiḥ_śiras upalakṣitāḥ_upalakṣay danta_danta
div.p:
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana asmākam_mad jayam_jaya pareṣām_para parājayam_parājaya ca_ca sarvadā_sarvadā draṣṭum_dṛś iṣṭam_iṣ paśya_paś mama_mad dehe_deha guḍākeśa_guḍākeśa yat_yad ca_ca anyat_anya draṣṭum_dṛś icchasi_iṣ iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant ādiṣṭam_ādiś adhunā_adhunā paśyāmi_dṛś iti_iti āha_ah amī_adas iti_iti pañcabhiḥ_pañcan amī_adas ca_ca dhṛtarāṣṭrasya_dhṛtarāṣṭra putrāḥ_putra duryodhana--_duryodhana prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti śatam_śata sodarāḥ_sodara yuyutsum_yuyutsu vinā_vinā sarve_sarva tvām_tvad tvaramāṇāḥ_tvar viśanti_viś iti_iti agretanena_agretana anvayaḥ_anvaya saha_saha eva_eva avanipālānām_avanipāla khalu_khalu ādīnām_ādi rājñām_rājan saṃghaiḥ_saṃgha tvām_tvad viśanti_viś na_na kevalam_kevalam duryodhana--_duryodhana ādayaḥ_ādi eva_eva viśanti_viś kintu_kiṃtu ajaya--_ajaya tvena_tva sarvaiḥ_sarva sambhāvitaḥ_sambhāvay api_api bhīṣmaḥ_bhīṣma
droṇaḥ_droṇa sūta--_sūta putraḥ_putra karṇaḥ_karṇa tathā_tathā asau_adas sarvadā_sarvadā mama_mad vidveṣṭā_vidveṣṭṛ saha_saha asmadīyaiḥ_asmadīya api_api parakīyaiḥ_parakīya iva_iva dhṛṣṭadyumna--_dhṛṣṭadyumna prabhṛtibhiḥ_prabhṛti yodha--_yodha mukhyaiḥ_mukhya tvām_tvad viśanti_viś iti_iti sambandhaḥ_sambandha

amī_adas dhṛtarāṣṭra--_dhṛtarāṣṭra putra--_putra prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti sarve_sarva api_api te_tad tava_tvad daṃṣṭrā--_daṃṣṭra karālāni_karāla bhayānakāni_bhayānaka vaktrāṇi_vaktra te_tad tvaramāṇāḥ_tvar viśanti_viś tatra_tatra ca_ca kecid_kaścit cūrṇitaiḥ_cūrṇay uttamāṅgaiḥ_uttamāṅga śirobhiḥ_śiras viśiṣṭāḥ_viśiṣ daśana--_daśana antareṣu_antara vilagnāḥ_vilag viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa saṃlagnāḥ_saṃlag dṛśyante_dṛś mayā_mad samyak_samyak asandehena_asaṃdeha 27_27

baladevaḥ_baladeva yat_yad ca_ca anyat_anya draṣṭum_dṛś icchasi_iṣ iti_iti anena_idam asmin_idam yuddhe_yuddha bhaviṣyat--_bhū jaya--_jaya parājaya--_parājaya ādikam_ādika ca_ca mad--_mad dehe_deha paśya_paś iti_iti yat_yad bhagavatā_bhagavant uktam_vac tat_tad adhunā_adhunā paśyan_paś āha_ah amī_adas ca_ca iti_iti pañcabhiḥ_pañcan amī_adas dhṛtarāṣṭrasya_dhṛtarāṣṭra putrāḥ_putra duryodhana--_duryodhana ādayaḥ_ādi sarve_sarva avanipāla--_avanipāla saṃghaiḥ_saṃgha śalya--_śalya jayadratha--_jayadratha ādi--_ādi bhūpa--_bhūpa vṛndaiḥ_vṛnda saha_saha tvaramāṇāḥ_tvar santaḥ_as te_tvad vaktrāṇi_vaktra viśanti_viś iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara anvayaḥ_anvaya ajeya--_ajeya tvena_tva khyātāḥ_khyā ye_yad bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi te_tad api_api asau_adas iti_iti sarvadā_sarvadā eva_eva mad--_mad vidveṣī_vidveṣin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sūta--_sūta putraḥ_putra karṇaḥ_karṇa na_na kevalam_kevala te_tad eva_eva kintu_kiṃtu asmadīyāḥ_asmadīya ye_yad yodha--_yodha mukhyāḥ_mukhya dhṛṣṭadyumna--_dhṛṣṭadyumna ādayaḥ_ādi taiḥ_tad saha_saha iti_iti te_tad api_api praviśanti_praviś iti_iti sahoktiḥ_sahokti alaṅkāraḥ_alaṃkāra kecid_kaścit iti_iti teṣām_tad
madhye_madhya kecid_kaścit cūrṇitaiḥ_cūrṇay uttamāṅgaiḥ_uttamāṅga mastakaiḥ_mastaka sahitāḥ_sahita daśana--_daśana antareṣu_antara danta--_danta sandhiṣu_saṃdhi vilagnāḥ_vilag saṃdṛśyante_saṃdṛś mayā_mad

div.p: āha_ah nadīnām_nadī aneka--_aneka mārga--_mārga pravṛttānām_pravṛt bahavaḥ_bahu ambūnām_ambu vārīṇām_vāri vegāḥ_vega pravāhāḥ_pravāha samudra--_samudra abhimukhāḥ_abhimukha santaḥ_as yathā_yathā samudram_samudra eva_eva dravanti_dru viśanti_viś tathā_tathā amī_adas ye_yad nara--_nara loka--_loka vīrāḥ_vīra te_tad viśanti_viś tathā_tathā eva_eva lokāḥ_loka ete_etad janāḥ_jana api_api tava_tvad mukhāni_mukha praviśanti_praviś 28_28

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana rājñām_rājan bhagavat--_bhagavant mukha--_mukha praveśane_praveśana nidarśanam_nidarśana āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti yathā_yathā nadīnām_nadī aneka--_aneka mārga--_mārga pravṛttānām_pravṛt bahavaḥ_bahu ambūnām_ambu jalānām_jala vegāḥ_vega vegavantaḥ_vegavat pravāhāḥ_pravāha samudra--_samudra abhimukhāḥ_abhimukha santaḥ_as samudram_samudra eva_eva dravanti_dru viśanti_viś tathā_tathā tava_tvad amī_adas nara--_nara loka--_loka vīrāḥ_vīra viśanti_viś vaktrāṇi_vaktra abhivijvalanti_abhivijval iti_iti vā_vā pāṭhaḥ_pāṭha 28_28

div.p: buddhi--_buddhi pūrvaka--_pūrvaka praveśe_praveśa dṛṣṭāntam_dṛṣṭānta āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti pradīptam_pradīp jvalanam_jvalana agnim_agni pataṅgāḥ_pataṃga śalabhāḥ_śalabha buddhi--_buddhi pūrvakam_pūrvaka samṛddhaḥ_samṛdh vegaḥ_vega yeṣām_yad te_tad yathā_yathā nāśāya_nāśa maraṇāya_maraṇa eva_eva viśanti_viś tathā_tathā eva_eva lokāḥ_loka ete_etad janāḥ_jana api_api tava_tvad mukhāni_mukha praviśanti_praviś 29_29

bhāsaḥ_bhās tava_tvad ugrāḥ_ugra pratapanti_pratap viṣṇo_viṣṇu

div.p: āha_ah grasamānaḥ_gras gilam_gila samagrān_samagra lokān_loka sarvān_sarva etān_etad vīrān_vīra samantāt_samantāt sarvatas_sarvatas lelihyase_lelih atiśayena_atiśaya bhakṣayasi_bhakṣay kaiḥ_ka jvaladbhiḥ_jval vadanaiḥ_vadana kim_kim ca_ca he_he viṣṇo_viṣṇu tava_tvad bhāsaḥ_bhās dīptayaḥ_dīpti tejobhiḥ_tejas visphūraṇaiḥ_visphūraṇa samagram_samagra jagat_jagant vyāpya_vyāp tīvrāḥ_tīvra satyaḥ_satī pratapanti_pratap santāpayanti_saṃtāpay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yoddhu--_yoddhu kāmānām_kāma rājñām_rājan bhagavat--_bhagavant mukha--_mukha praveśa--_praveśa prakāram_prakāra uktvā_vac tadā_tadā bhagavataḥ_bhagavant tad--_tad bhāsām_bhās ca_ca pravṛtti--_pravṛtti prakāram_prakāra āha_ah lelihyase_lelih iti_iti evam_evam vegena_vega praviśataḥ_praviś lokān_loka duryodhana--_duryodhana ādīn_ādi samagrān_samagra sarvān_sarva grasamānaḥ_gras antar_antar praveśayat_praveśay jvaladbhiḥ_jval vadanaiḥ_vadana samantāt_samantāt sarvatas_sarvatas tvam_tvad lelihyase_lelih āsvādayasi_āsvāday tejobhiḥ_tejas bhābhiḥ_bhā āpūrya_āpūray jagat_jagant samagram_samagra yasmāt_yasmāt tvam_tvad āpūrayasi_āpūray tasmāt_tasmāt tava_tvad ugrāḥ_ugra tīvrāḥ_tīvra bhāsaḥ_bhās dīptayaḥ_dīpti prajvalataḥ_prajval jvalanasya_jvalana iva_iva pratapanti_pratap santāpam_saṃtāpa janayanti_janay viṣṇo_viṣṇu vyāpana--_vyāpana śīla_śīla
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_yoddhṛ tad--_tad mukha--_mukha praveśe_praveśa prakāram_prakāra uktvā_vac tasya_tad tad--_tad bhāsām_bhās ca_ca tatra_tatra pravṛtti--_pravṛtti prakāram_prakāra āha_ah lelihyase_lelih iti_iti vegena_vega praviśataḥ_praviś samagrān_samagra lokān_loka duryodhana--_duryodhana ādīn_ādi jvaladbhiḥ_jval vadanaiḥ_vadana grasamānaḥ_gras gilan_gṛ samantāt_samantāt roṣa--_roṣa āveśena_āveśa lelihasye_lelihasya tat_tad rudhira--_rudhira ukṣitam_ukṣ oṣṭha--_oṣṭha ādikam_ādika muhur_muhur muhur_muhur lekṣi_lih tava_tvad ugrāḥ_ugra bhāsaḥ_bhās dīptayaḥ_dīpti asahyaiḥ_asahya tejobhiḥ_tejas samagram_samagra jagat_jagant āpūrya_āpūray pratapanti_pratap he_he viṣṇo_viṣṇu viśva--_viśva vyāpin_vyāpin tvattaḥ_tvad palāyanam_palāyana durghaṭam_durghaṭa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: ākhyāhi_ākhyā me_mad kaḥ_ka bhavān_bhavat ugra--_ugra rūpa_rūpa
namaḥ_namas astu_as te_tvad deva--_deva vara_vara prasīda_prasad
vijñātum_vijñā icchāmi_iṣ bhavantam_bhavat ādyam_ādya
prajānāmi_prajñā tava_tvad pravṛttim_pravṛtti

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara yatas_yatas evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt ākhyāhi_ākhyā iti_iti bhavān_bhavat ugra--_ugra rūpaḥ_rūpa kaḥ_ka iti_iti ākhyāhi_ākhyā ākhyāhi_ākhyā kathaya_kathay te_tvad tubhyam_tvad namaḥ_namas astu_as he_he deva--_deva vara_vara prasīda_prasad prasannaḥ_prasad bhava_bhū bhavantam_bhavat ādyam_ādya puruṣam_puruṣa viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa jñātum_jñā icchāmi_iṣ yatas_yatas tava_tvad pravṛttim_pravṛtti ceṣṭām_ceṣṭā kim_ka artham_artha evam_evam pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt asi_as iti_iti na_na jānāmi_jñā evam_evam bhūtasya_bhū tava_tvad pravṛttim_pravṛtti vārtām_vārttā api_api na_na jānāmi_jñā iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt ākhyāhi_ākhyā iti_iti evam_evam ugra--_ugra rūpaḥ_rūpa krūra--_krūra ākāraḥ_ākāra kaḥ_ka bhavān_bhavat iti_iti ākhyāhi_ākhyā kathaya_kathay me_mad mahyam_mad atyanta--_atyanta anugrāhyāya_anugrah ataeva_ataeva namaḥ_namas astu_as te_tvad tubhyam_tvad sarva--_sarva gurave_guru he_he deva--_deva vara_vara prasīda_prasad prasādam_prasāda kraurya--_kraurya tyāgam_tyāga kuru_kṛ vijñātum_vijñā jñātum_jñā icchāmi_iṣ bhavantam_bhavat ādyam_ādya sarva--_sarva kāraṇam_kāraṇa tava_tvad sakhā_sakhi san_as prajānāmi_prajñā tava_tvad pravṛttim_pravṛtti ceṣṭām_ceṣṭā
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa vyañjita--_vyañjay kāla--_kāla śaktim_śakti bhagavantam_bhagavant upavarṇya_upavarṇay tad--_tad tattva--_tattva vid_vid api_api arjunaḥ_arjuna sva--_sva jñāna--_jñāna dārḍhyāya_dārḍhya pṛcchati_pracch ākhyāhi_ākhyā iti_iti darśaya_darśay ātmānam_ātman avyayam_avyaya iti_iti sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣa--_śīrṣan ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa aiśvaram_aiśvara rūpam_rūpa darśayitum_darśay arthitena_arthay bhagavatā_bhagavant tad--_tad rūpam_rūpa pradarśya_pradarśay tasya_tad punar_punar ati_ati ghorā_ghora saṃhartṛ--_saṃhartṛ tā_tā pradarśyate_pradarśay tatra_tatra ugra--_ugra rūpaḥ_rūpa bhavān_bhavat kaḥ_ka iti_iti ākhyāhi_ākhyā kathaya_kathay he_he deva--_deva vara_vara te_tvad namaḥ_namas astu_as prasīda_prasad tyaja_tyaj ugra--_ugra rūpa--_rūpa tām_tā ādyam_ādya bhavantam_bhavat aham_mad viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa jñātum_jñā icchāmi_iṣ tava_tvad pravṛttim_pravṛtti ca_ca iṣṭām_iṣṭā ca_ca na_na hi_hi prajānāmi_prajñā kim_ka artham_artha evam_evam pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt asi_as iti_iti tad--_tad prayojanam_prayojana ca_ca ākhyāhi_ākhyā iti_iti

śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
kālaḥ_kāla asmi_as loka--_loka kṣaya--_kṣaya kṛt_kṛt pravṛddhaḥ_pravṛdh
lokān_loka samāhartum_samāhṛ pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt
ṛte_ṛte api_api tvā_tvad na_na bhaviṣyanti_bhū sarve_sarva
ye_yad avasthitāḥ_avasthā pratyanīkeṣu_pratyanīka yodhāḥ_yodha

śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara prārthitaḥ_prārthay san_as bhagavān_bhagavat uvāca_vac kālaḥ_kāla tribhiḥ_tri lokānām_loka kṣaya--_kṣaya kartā_kartṛ pravṛddhaḥ_pravṛdh ati_ati utkaṭaḥ_utkaṭa kālaḥ_kāla asmi_as lokān_loka prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin saṃhartum_saṃhṛ iha_iha loke_loka pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt asmi_as atas_atas ṛte_ṛte api_api tvām_tvad hantāram_hantṛ vinā_vinā api_api na_na bhaviṣyanti_bhū na_na jīviṣyanti_jīv yadi_yadi api_api tvayā_tvad na_na hantavyāḥ_han ete_etad tathā_tathā api_api mayā_mad kāla--_kāla ātmanā_ātman grastāḥ_gras santaḥ_as mariṣyanti_mṛ eva_eva ke_ka te_tad pratyanīkeṣu_pratyanīka anīkāni_anīka anīkāni_anīka bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādīnām_ādi sarvāsu_sarva senāsu_senā ye_yad yodhāraḥ_yodhan avasthitāḥ_avasthā te_tad sarve_sarva api_api 32_32

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam arjunena_arjuna prārthitaḥ_prārthay yaḥ_yad svayam_svayam yad--_yad arthā_artha ca_ca sva--_sva pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti tat_tad sarvam_sarva tribhiḥ_tri ślokaiḥ_śloka kālaḥ_kāla asmi_as iti_iti kālaḥ_kāla kriyā--_kriyā śakti--_śakti upahitaḥ_upadhā sarvasya_sarva saṃhartā_saṃhartṛ parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara asmi_as bhavāmi_bhū idānīm_idānīm pravṛddhaḥ_pravṛdh vṛddhim_vṛddhi gataḥ_gam yad--_yad artham_artha pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt tat_tad śṛṇu_śru lokān_loka samāhartum_samāhṛ bhakṣayitum_bhakṣay pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt aham_mad iha_iha asmin_idam kāle_kāla mad--_mad pravṛttim_pravṛtti vinā_vinā katham_katham evam_evam syāt_as iti_iti ced_ced na_na iti_iti āha_ah ṛte_ṛte api_api tvā_tvad tvām_tvad arjunam_arjuna yoddhāram_yoddhṛ vinā_vinā api_api tvad--_tvad vyāpāram_vyāpāra vinā_vinā api_api mad--_mad vyāpāreṇa_vyāpāra eva_eva na_na bhaviṣyanti_bhū vinaṅkṣyanti_vinaś sarve_sarva bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa karṇa--_karṇa prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti yoddhum_yudh anarha--_anarha tvena_tva sambhāvitāḥ_sambhāvay anye_anya api_api ye_yad pratipakṣa--_pratipakṣa sainyeṣu_sainya yodhāḥ_yodha yodhāraḥ_yodhan sarve_sarva api_api mayā_mad hata--_han tvāt_tva eva_eva na_na bhaviṣyanti_bhū tatra_tatra tava_tvad vyāpāraḥ_vyāpāra akiṃcitkaraḥ_akiṃcitkara iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 32_32
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing
baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam arthitaḥ_arthay bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac kālaḥ_kāla asmi_as iti_iti pravṛddhaḥ_pravṛdh vyāpī_vyāpin

lg.l: yasya_yad brahma_brahman ca_ca kṣatram_kṣatra ca_ca ubhe_ubh bhavataḥ_bhū odanaḥ_odana
mṛtyuḥ_mṛtyu yasya_yad upasecanam_upasecana kaḥ_ka itthā_itthā veda_vid yatra_yatra saḥ_tad

div.p: iti_iti śrutyā_śruti yaḥ_yad kīrtyate_kīrtay sa_tad kālaḥ_kāla aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha iha_iha samaye_samaya lokān_loka duryodhana--_duryodhana ādīn_ādi samāhartum_samāhṛ grasitum_gras pravṛttam_pravṛt mām_mad mad--_mad pravṛtti--_pravṛtti phalam_phala ca_ca jānīhi_jñā tvām_tvad api_api yudhiṣṭhira--_yudhiṣṭhira ādīn_ādi ca_ca ṛte_ṛte sarve_sarva na_na bhaviṣyanti_bhū na_na jīviṣyanti_jīv yat_yat vā_vā nanu_nanu raṇāt_raṇa nivṛtte_nivṛt mayi_mad teṣām_tad katham_katham kṣayaḥ_kṣaya syāt_as iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah ṛte_ṛte api_api iti_iti tvām_tvad yodhāram_yodhṛ ṛte_ṛte tvad--_tvad yuddha--_yuddha vyāpāram_vyāpāra vinā_vinā api_api sarve_sarva na_na bhaviṣyanti_bhū mariṣyanti_mṛ eva_eva kāla--_kāla ātmanā_ātman mayā_mad teṣām_tad āyuḥ--_āyus haraṇāt_haraṇa ke_ka te_tad sarve_sarva iti_iti āha_ah pratyanīkeṣu_pratyanīka paramparayoḥ_paramparā ye_yad bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi avasthitāḥ_avasthā yuddhāt_yuddha nivṛttasya_nivṛt tava_tvad tu_tu svadharma--_svadharma cyutiḥ_cyuti eva_eva bhavet_bhū iti_iti 32_32

lg.l: tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad uttiṣṭha_utthā yaśaḥ_yaśas labhasva_labh
jitvā_ji śatrūn_śatru bhuṅkṣva_bhuj rājyam_rājya samṛddham_samṛdh
mayā_mad eva_eva ete_etad nihatāḥ_nihan pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva
nimitta--_nimitta mātram_mātra bhava_bhū savyasācin_savyasācin

div.p: yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad yuddhāya_yuddha uttiṣṭha_utthā devaiḥ_deva api_api durjayāḥ_durjaya bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi arjunena_arjuna nirjitāḥ_nirji iti_iti evam_evam bhūtam_bhū yaśaḥ_yaśas labhasva_labh prāpnuhi_prāp ayatnataḥ_ayatna ca_ca śatrūn_śatru jitvā_ji samṛddham_samṛdh rājyam_rājya bhuṅkṣva_bhuj ete_etad ca_ca tava_tvad śatravaḥ_śatru tvadīya--_tvadīya yuddhāt_yuddha pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva mayā_mad eva_eva kāla--_kāla ātmanā_ātman nihata--_nihan prāyāḥ_prāya tathā_tathā api_api tvam_tvad nimitta--_nimitta mātram_mātra bhava_bhū he_he savyasācin_savyasācin savyena_savya hastena_hasta sācitum_sac śarān_śara saṃdhātum_saṃdhā śīlam_śīla yasya_yad iti_iti vyutpattyā_vyutpatti vāmena_vāma api_api vāṇa--_vāṇa kṣepāt_kṣepa savyasācī_savyasācin iti_iti ucyate_vac 33_33

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt tvad--_tvad vyāpāram_vyāpāra antareṇa_antareṇa api_api yasmāt_yasmāt ete_etad vinaṅkṣanti_vinaṅkṣ eva_eva tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad uttiṣṭha_utthā udyuktaḥ_udyuj bhava_bhū yuddhāya_yuddha devaiḥ_deva api_api durjayāḥ_durjaya bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādayaḥ_ādi atirathāḥ_atiratha jhaṭiti_jhaṭiti eva_eva arjunena_arjuna nirjitāḥ_nirji iti_iti mahadbhiḥ_mahat puṇyaiḥ_puṇya eva_eva hi_hi yaśaḥ_yaśas labhyate_labh ayatnataḥ_ayatna ca_ca jitvā_ji śatrūn_śatru duryodhana--_duryodhana ādīn_ādi bhuṅkṣva_bhuj rājyam_rājya sva--_sva upasarjana--_upasarjana tvena_tva bhogya--_bhuj tām_tā prāpaya_prāpay samṛddham_samṛdh rājyam_rājya akaṇṭakam_akaṇṭaka ete_etad ca_ca tava_tvad śatravaḥ_śatru mayā_mad eva_eva kāla--_kāla ātmanā_ātman nihatāḥ_nihan saṃhṛta--_saṃhṛ āyuṣaḥ_āyus tvadīya--_tvadīya yuddhāt_yuddha pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva kevalam_kevalam tava_tvad yaśaḥ--_yaśas lābhāya_lābha rathāt_ratha na_na pātitāḥ_pātay atas_atas tvam_tvad nimitta--_nimitta mātram_mātra arjunena_arjuna ete_etad nirjitāḥ_nirji iti_iti sārvalaukika--_sārvalaukika kavi--_kavi apadeśa--_apadeśa āspadam_āspada bhava_bhū he_he savyasācin_savyasācin
savyena_savya vāmena_vāma hastena_hasta api_api śarān_śara sacitum_sac saṃdhātum_saṃdhā śīlam_śīla yasya_yad tādṛśasya_tādṛśa tava_tvad bhīṣma--_bhīṣma droṇa--_droṇa ādi--_ādi jayaḥ_jaya na_na asambhāvitaḥ_asaṃbhāvita tasmāt_tasmāt tvad--_tvad vyāpāra--_vyāpāra anantaram_anantaram mayā_mad rathāt_ratha pātyamāneṣu_pātay eteṣu_etad tava_tvad eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ 33_33
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad uttiṣṭha_utthā svadharmāya_svadharma yuddhāya_yuddha yaśaḥ_yaśas labhasva_labh sura--_sura durjayāḥ_durjaya bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi arjunena_arjuna helayā_helā eva_eva nirjitāḥ_nirji iti_iti durlabhām_durlabha kīrtim_kīrti prāpnuhi_prāp pūrvam_pūrvam draupadyām_draupadī aparādha--_aparādha samaye_samaya eva_eva mayā_mad ete_etad nihatāḥ_nihan tvad--_tvad yaśase_yaśas yantra--_yantra pratimā--_pratimā vat_vat pravartante_pravṛt tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad nimitta--_nimitta mātram_mātra bhava_bhū he_he savyasācin_savyasācin savyena_savya api_api hastena_hasta bāṇān_bāṇa sacitum_sac saṃdhātum_saṃdhā śīlam_śīla asya_idam iti_iti yuddha--_yuddha nirbhare_nirbhara prāpte_prāp hastābhyām_hasta iṣu--_iṣu varṣin_varṣin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 33_33

lg.l: droṇam_droṇa ca_ca bhīṣmam_bhīṣma ca_ca jayadratham_jayadratha ca_ca
karṇam_karṇa tathā_tathā anyān_anya api_api yodha--_yodha vīrān_vīra
mayā_mad hatān_han tvam_tvad jahi_han mā_mā vyathiṣṭhāḥ_vyath
yudhyasva_yudh jetāsi_ji raṇe_raṇa sapatnān_sapatna

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara na_na ca_ca ete_etad vidmaḥ_vid katarat_katara naḥ_mad garīyaḥ_garīyas yat_yat vā_vā jayema_ji yadi_yadi vā_vā no_no jayeyuḥ_ji iti_iti āśaṅkā_āśaṅkā sā_tad api_api na_na kāryā_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah droṇam_droṇa iti_iti yebhyaḥ_yad tvam_tvad śaṅkase_śaṅk tān_tad droṇa--_droṇa ādīn_ādi mayā_mad eva_eva hatān_han tvam_tvad jahi_hā ghātaya_ghātay mā_mā vyathiṣṭhāḥ_vyath bhayam_bhaya mā_mā kārṣīḥ_kṛ sapatnān_sapatna śatrūn_śatru raṇe_raṇa yuddhe_yuddha niścitam_niścitam jetāsi_ji jeṣyasi_ji

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu droṇaḥ_droṇa brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa uttamaḥ_uttama dhanurveda--_dhanurveda ācāryaḥ_ācārya mama_mad guru_guru viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa ca_ca divya--_divya astra--_astra sampannaḥ_sampad tathā_tathā bhīṣmaḥ_bhīṣma svacchanda--_svacchanda mṛtyuḥ_mṛtyu divya--_divya astra--_astra sampannaḥ_sampad ca_ca parāśurāmeṇa_parāśurāma dvandva--_dvaṃdva yuddham_yuddha pitā_pitṛ vṛddha--_vṛddha kṣatraḥ_kṣatra tapaḥ_tapas carati_car mama_mad putrasya_putra śiraḥ_śiras yaḥ_yad bhūmau_bhūmi pātayiṣyati_pātay tasya_tad api_api śiraḥ_śiras tad--_tad kālam_kāla bhūmau_bhūmi patiṣyati_pat iti_iti sa_tad jayadrathaḥ_jayadratha api_api jetum_ji aśakyaḥ_aśakya svayam_svayam api_api mahādeva--_mahādeva ārādhana--_ārādhana paraḥ_para svayam_svayam sūrya--_sūrya samaḥ_sama tad--_tad ārādhanena_ārādhana divya--_divya astra--_astra sampannaḥ_sampad ca_ca vāsava--_vāsava dattayā_dā ca_ca eka--_eka puruṣa--_puruṣa ghātinyā_ghātin moghīkartum_moghīkṛ aśakyayā_aśakya śaktyā_śakti śaktyā_śakti viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ tathā_tathā kṛpā--_kṛpā aśvatthāma--_aśvatthāman bhūriśravaḥ--_bhūriśravas prabhṛtayaḥ_prabhṛti satsu_sat katham_katham jitvā_ji śatrūn_śatru rājyam_rājya bhokṣye_bhuj katham_katham vā_vā yaśaḥ_yaśas lapsye_labh iti_iti āśaṅkām_āśaṅkā arjunasya_arjuna apanetum_apanī āha_ah tat_tad āśaṅkā--_āśaṅkā viṣayān_viṣaya nāmabhiḥ_nāman kathayan_kathay droṇam_droṇa iti_iti

droṇa--_droṇa ādīn_ādi tvad--_tvad āśaṅkā--_āśaṅkā viṣayībhūtān_viṣayībhū sarvān_sarva eva_eva yodha--_yodha vīrān_vīra kāla--_kāla ātmanā_ātman mayā_mad hatān_han eva_eva tvam_tvad jahi_hā hatānām_han hanane_hanana kaḥ_ka vā_vā pariśramaḥ_pariśrama atas_atas mā_mā vyathiṣṭhāḥ_vyath katham_katham evam_evam śakṣyāmi_śak iti_iti vyathām_vyathā bhaya--_bhaya nimittām_nimitta pīḍām_pīḍā mā_mā gāḥ_gā bhayam_bhaya tyaktvā_tyaj yudhyasva_yudh jetāsi_ji jeṣyasi_ji acireṇa_acireṇa eva_eva raṇe_raṇa saṅgrāme_saṃgrāma sapatnān_sapatna sarvān_sarva api_api śatrūn_śatru

atra_atra droṇam_droṇa ca_ca bhīṣmam_bhīṣma ca_ca jayadratham_jayadratha ca_ca iti_iti ca-kāra--_cakāra trayeṇa_traya pūrvokta--_pūrvokta ajeya--_ajeya tva--_tva śaṅkā_śaṅkā anūdyate_anūday tathā_tathā śabdena_śabda karṇe_karṇa api_api anyān_anya api_api yodha--_yodha vīrān_vīra iti_iti atra_atra api_api śabdena_śabda tasmāt_tasmāt kutas_kutas api_api svasya_sva parājayam_parājaya vadha--_vadha nimittam_nimitta pāpam_pāpa ca_ca mā_mā śaṅkiṣṭhāḥ_śaṅk iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

katham_katham bhīṣmam_bhīṣma aham_mad saṅkhye_saṃkhya droṇam_droṇa ca_ca madhusūdana_madhusūdana iṣubhiḥ_iṣu pratiyotsyāmi_pratiyudh pūjā--_pūjā arhau_arha iti_iti atra_atra iva_iva atra_atra api_api samudāya--_samudāya anvayān_anvaya antaram_antara pratyeka--_pratyeka anvayaḥ_anvaya draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva yat_yat vā_vā jayema_ji yadi_yadi vā_vā no_no jayeyuḥ_ji iti_iti sva--_sva vijaye_vijaya saṃśayam_saṃśaya ākārṣīḥ_ākṛ iti_iti āśayena_āśaya āha_ah droṇam_droṇa ca_ca iti_iti mayā_mad hatān_han hata--_han āyuṣaḥ_āyus droṇa--_droṇa ādīn_ādi tvam_tvad jahi_hā māraya_māray vyatiṣṭhāḥ_vyas katham_katham etān_etad divya--_divya astra--_astra sampannān_sampad ekaḥ_eka śaknomi_śak aham_mad vijetum_viji iti_iti bhayam_bhaya mā_mā gāḥ_gā mṛtānām_mṛ māraṇe_māraṇa kaḥ_ka śramaḥ_śrama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhayam_bhaya hitvā_hā yudhyasva_yudh raṇa_raṇa sapatnān_sapatna ripūn_ripu jetāsi_ji jeṣyasi_ji

saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac
etat_etad śrutvā_śru vacanam_vacana keśavasya_keśava
kṛtāñjaliḥ_kṛtāñjali vepamānaḥ_vip kirīṭī_kirīṭin
namaskṛtvā_namaskṛ bhūyas_bhūyas eva_eva āha_ah kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa
sa_sa gadgadam_gadgada bhīta--_bhī bhītaḥ_bhī praṇamya_praṇam

śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tatas_tatas yat_yad vṛttam_vṛt tat_tad eva_eva dhṛtarāṣṭram_dhṛtarāṣṭra prati_prati saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac etat_etad iti_iti etat_etad pūrva--_pūrva śloka--_śloka traya--_traya ātmakam_ātmaka keśavasya_keśava vacanam_vacana śrutvā_śru vepamānaḥ_vip kampamānaḥ_kamp kirīṭī_kirīṭin arjunaḥ_arjuna kṛtāñjaliḥ_kṛtāñjali sampuṭīkṛta--_sampuṭīkṛ hastaḥ_hasta kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa namaskṛtya_namaskṛ punar_punar api_api āha_ah uktavān_vac katham_katham āha_ah harṣa--_harṣa bhaya--_bhaya ādi--_ādi āveśa--_āveśa vaśāt_vaśa gadgadena_gadgada kaṇṭha--_kaṇṭha kampanena_kampana saha_saha vartate_vṛt iti_iti sa_sa gadgadam_gadgada yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā kim_kim ca_ca bhītāt_bhī api_api bhītaḥ_bhī san_as praṇamya_praṇam avanataḥ_avanam bhūtvā_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana droṇa--_droṇa bhīṣma--_bhīṣma jayadratha--_jayadratha karṇeṣu_karṇa jaya--_jaya āśā--_āśā viṣayeṣu_viṣaya hateṣu_han nirāśrayaḥ_nirāśraya duryodhanaḥ_duryodhana hataḥ_han eva_eva iti_iti anusandhāya_anusandhā jaya--_jaya āśām_āśā parityajya_parityaj yadi_yadi dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ_dhṛtarāṣṭra sandhim_saṃdhi kuryāt_kṛ tadā_tadā śāntiḥ_śānti kim_ka vṛttam_vṛt iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac etat_etad iti_iti etat_etad pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac keśavasya_keśava vacanam_vacana śrutvā_śru kṛtāñjaliḥ_kṛtāñjali kirīṭī_kirīṭin indra--_indra datta--_dā kirīṭaḥ_kirīṭa parama--_parama vīra--_vīra tvena_tva prasiddhaḥ_prasidh vepamānaḥ_vip parama--_parama āścarya--_āścarya darśana--_darśana janitena_janay sambhrameṇa_sambhrama kampamānaḥ_kamp arjunaḥ_arjuna kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa namaskṛtvā_namaskṛ namaskṛtya_namaskṛ bhūyas_bhūyas punar_punar api_api āha_ah uktavān_vac sa_sa gadgadam_gadgada bhayena_bhaya harṣeṇa_harṣa ca_ca aśru--_aśru pūrṇa--_pṛ netra--_netra tve_tva sati_as kapha--_kapha ruddha--_rudh kaṇṭha--_kaṇṭha tayā_tā vācaḥ_vāc mandatva--_mandatva sa_sa kampa--_kampa tva--_tva ādiḥ_ādi vikāraḥ_vikāra sa_sa gadgadaḥ_gadgada tad--_tad bhīta--_bhī bhītaḥ_bhī atiśayena_atiśaya bhītaḥ_bhī san_as pūrvam_pūrvam namaskṛtya_namaskṛ punar_punar api_api praṇamya_praṇam atyanta--_atyanta namraḥ_namra bhūtvā_bhū āha_ah iti_iti sambandhaḥ_sambandha
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha namaskṛtvā_namaskṛ iti_iti ārṣam_ārṣa
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva tatas_tatas yat_yad abhūt_bhū tat_tad saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac etat_etad iti_iti keśavasya_keśava etat_etad padya--_padya traya--_traya ātmakam_ātmaka vacanam_vacana śrutvā_śru kirīṭī_kirīṭin pārthaḥ_pārtha vepamānaḥ_vip atyadbhuta--_atyadbhuta ati_ati ugra--_ugra rūpa--_rūpa darśana--_darśana jena_ja sambhrameṇa_sambhrama sa_sa kampaḥ_kampa namakṣṭvā_namas iti_iti ārṣam_ārṣa kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa namaskṛtya_namaskṛ punar_punar praṇamya_praṇam bhīta--_bhī bhītaḥ_bhī ati_ati bhaya--_bhaya ākulaḥ_ākula san_as bhūyas_bhūyas punar_punar api_api āha_ah sa_sa gadgadam_gadgada gadgadena_gadgada kaṇṭha--_kaṇṭha kampena_kampa sahitam_sahita yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā

arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
sthāne_sthāna hṛṣīkeśa_hṛṣīkeśa tava_tvad prakīrtyā_prakīrti
jagat_jagant prahṛṣyati_prahṛṣ anurajyate_anurañj ca_ca
rakṣāṃsi_rakṣas bhītāni_bhī diśaḥ_diś dravanti_dru
sarve_sarva namasyanti_namasy siddha--_siddha saṃghāḥ_saṃgha

śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara sthāne_sthāna iti_iti ekādaśabhiḥ_ekādaśan arjunasya_arjuna uktiḥ_ukti sthāne_sthāna iti_iti avyayam_avyaya yuktam_yuj iti_iti asmin_idam arthe_artha he_he hṛṣīkeśa_hṛṣīkeśa yatas_yatas evam_evam tvam_tvad adbhuta--_adbhuta prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva bhakta--_bhakta vatsalaḥ_vatsala ca_ca atas_atas tava_tvad prakīrtyā_prakīrti māhātmya--_māhātmya saṅkīrtanena_saṃkīrtana na_na kevalam_kevalam aham_mad eva_eva prahṛṣyāmi_prahṛṣ iti_iti kintu_kiṃtu jagat_jagant sarvam_sarva prahṛṣyati_prahṛṣ prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa harṣam_harṣa prāpnoti_prāp etat_etad tu_tu sthāne_sthāna yuktam_yuj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā jagat_jagant anurajyate_anurañj ca_ca anurāgam_anurāga upaiti_upe iti_iti yat_yat tathā_tathā rakṣāṃsi_rakṣas bhītāni_bhī santi_as diśaḥ_diś dravanti_dru palāyante_palāy sarve_sarva yoga--_yoga tapaḥ--_tapas mantra--_mantra ādi--_ādi siddhānām_siddha saṅghāḥ_saṃgha namasyanti_namasy praṇamanti_praṇam iti_iti yat_yat etat_etad ca_ca sthāne_sthāna yuktam_yuj eva_eva na_na citram_citra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ekādaśabhiḥ_ekādaśan arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac sthāne_sthāna iti_iti sthāne_sthāna iti_iti avyayam_avyaya yuktam_yuj iti_iti arthe_artha he_he hṛṣīkeśa_hṛṣīkeśa sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya pravartaka_pravartaka yatas_yatas tvam_tvad evam_evam atyanta--_atyanta adbhuta--_adbhuta prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva bhakta--_bhakta vatsalaḥ_vatsala ca_ca tatas_tatas tava_tvad prakīrtyā_prakīrti prakṛṣṭayā_prakṛṣ kīrtyā_kīrti niratiśaya--_niratiśaya prāśastyasya_prāśastya kīrtanena_kīrtana śravaṇena_śravaṇa ca_ca na_na kevalam_kevalam aham_mad sarvam_sarva eva_eva jagat_jagant cetana--_cetana mātram_mātra rakṣaḥ--_rakṣas virodhi_virodhin prahṛṣyati_prahṛṣ prakṛṣṭam_prakṛṣ harṣam_harṣa āpnoti_āp iti_iti yat_yad tat_tad sthāne_sthāna yuktam_yuj eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant anurajyate_anurañj ca_ca tad--_tad viṣayam_viṣaya anurāgam_anurāga upaiti_upe iti_iti ca_ca yat_yad tat_tad api_api yuktam_yuj eva_eva tathā_tathā rakṣāṃsi_rakṣas bhītāni_bhī bhaya--_bhaya āviṣṭāni_āviś santi_as diśaḥ_diś dravanti_dru gacchanti_gam sarvāsu_sarva dikṣu_diś palāyantaḥ_palāy iti_iti yat_yad tat_tad api_api yuktam_yuj eva_eva tathā_tathā sarve_sarva siddhānām_siddha kapila--_kapila ādīnām_ādi saṃghāḥ_saṃgha namasyanti_namasy ca_ca iti_iti yat_yad tat_tad api_api yuktam_yuj eva_eva sarvatra_sarvatra tava_tvad prakīrtyā_prakīrti iti_iti asya_idam anvayaḥ_anvaya sthāne_sthāna iti_iti asya_idam ca_ca ayam_idam ślokaḥ_śloka rakṣoghna--_rakṣoghna mantra--_mantra tvena_tva mantra--_mantra śāstre_śāstra prasiddhaḥ_prasidh sa_tad ca_ca nārāyaṇa--_nārāyaṇa aṣṭa--_aṣṭan akṣara--_akṣara sudarśana--_sudarśana astra--_astra mantrābhyām_mantra sampuṭitaḥ_sampuṭ jñeyaḥ_jñā iti_iti rahasyam_rahasya

stauti_stu sthāne_sthāna iti_iti avyayam_avyaya yuktam_yuj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha he_he hṛṣīkeśa_hṛṣīkeśa sva--_sva bhakta--_bhakta indriyānām_indriya ca_ca sva--_sva ābhimukhye_ābhimukhya sva--_sva mukhye_mukhya ca_ca pravartaka_pravartaka tava_tvad prakīrtyā_prakīrti prakṛṣṭayā_prakṛṣ tvad--_tvad māhātmya--_māhātmya saṅkīrtanena_saṃkīrtana jagat_jagant idam_idam anurajyate_anurañj anuraktam_anurañj bhavati_bhū iti_iti yuktam_yuj eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tathā_tathā rakṣāṃsi_rakṣas rakṣaḥ_rakṣas asura--_asura dānava--_dānava piśāca--_piśāca ādīni_ādi bhītāni_bhī bhūtvā_bhū diśaḥ_diś dravanti_dru diśaḥ_diś prati_prati palāyante_palāy iti_iti etat_etad api_api sthāne_sthāna yuktam_yuj eva_eva teṣām_tad tvad--_tvad vaimukhyāt_vaimukhya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tathā_tathā tvad--_tvad bhaktyā_bhakti ye_yad siddhāḥ_siddha teṣām_tad saṅghāḥ_saṃgha sarve_sarva namasyanti_namasy ca_ca iti_iti api_api yuktam_yuj eva_eva teṣām_tad tvad--_tvad bhakta--_bhakta tvāt_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ślokaḥ_śloka ayam_idam rakṣoghna--_rakṣoghna mantra--_mantra tvena_tva mantra--_mantra śāstre_śāstra prasiddhaḥ_prasidh

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_pareśa sakhyuḥ_sakhi kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa ati_ati ramya--_ramya tvam_tva ati_ati ugra--_ugra tvam_tva ca_ca tatra_tatra raṅga--_raṅga vat_vat yugapad_yugapad eva_eva vīkṣya_vīkṣ tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya sva--_sva saṃmukha--_sammukha sva--_sva vimukha--_vimukha viṣayam_viṣaya iti_iti vidvān_vidvas arjunaḥ_arjuna tad--_tad anurūpam_anurūpa stauti_stu sthāne_sthāna iti_iti yuktam_yuj iti_iti arthakam_arthaka sthāne_sthāna iti_iti e_e t--_t antam_anta avyayam_avyaya he_he hṛṣīkeśa_hṛṣīkeśa iti_iti saṃmukha--_sammukha vimukha--_vimukha indriyāṇām_indriya sāṃmukhye_sāmmukhya vaimukhye_vaimukhya ca_ca pravaraka_pravaraka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yuddha--_yuddha darśanāya_darśana āgatam_āgam deva--_deva gandharva--_gandharva siddha--_siddha vidyādhara--_vidyādhara pramukham_pramukha tvad--_tvad saṃmukham_sammukha jagat_jagant tava_tvad duṣṭa--_duṣ saṃharta--_saṃhartṛ tva--_tva rūpayā_rūpa prakīrtyā_prakīrti prahṛṣyati_prahṛṣ anurajyate_anurañj ca_ca iti_iti yuktam_yuj etat_etad duṣṭa--_duṣ svabhāvāni_svabhāva tvad--_tvad vimukhāni_vimukha rakṣāṃsi_rakṣas rākṣasa--_rākṣasa asura--_asura dānava--_dānava ādīni_ādi deva--_deva ādi--_ādi udgītayā_udgā tad--_tad prakīrtyā_prakīrti bhītāni_bhī bhūtvā_bhū diśaḥ_diś prati_prati dravanti_dru palāyante_palāy iti_iti ca_ca yuktam_yuj tava_tvad prāṇi--_prāṇin bhāva--_bhāva anusāri--_anusārin rūpa--_rūpa prakāśi--_prakāśin tvāt_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tat_tad ittham_ittham śiṣṭa--_śās a_a śiṣṭa--_śās anugraha--_anugraha kāri--_kārin tām_tā tava_tvad vīkṣya_vīkṣ tvad--_tvad bhaktāḥ_bhakta siddha--_siddha saṅghāḥ_saṃgha sarve_sarva sanaka--_sanaka ādayaḥ_ādi namasyanti_namasy jaya_ji jaya_ji bhagavān_bhagavant iti_iti udīrayantaḥ_udīray praṇamanti_praṇam ca_ca yuktam_yukta tava_tvad bhakta--_bhakta manaḥ--_manas

lg.l: kasmāt_kasmāt ca_ca te_tvad na_na nameran_nam mahātman_mahātman
garīyase_garīyas brahmaṇaḥ_brahman api_api ādi--_ādi kartre_kartṛ
ananta_ananta deveśa_deveśa jagannivāsa_jagannivāsa
tvam_tvad akṣaram_akṣara sat_as asat_asat tat_tad param_para yat_yad

div.p: āha_ah he_he mahātman_mahātman he_he ananta_ananta he_he deveśa_deveśa he_he jagannivāsa_jagannivāsa kasmāt_ka hetoḥ_hetu te_tad tubhyam_tvad na_na nameran_nam na_na namaskāram_namaskāra kuryuḥ_kṛ kathambhūtāya_kathambhūta brahmaṇaḥ_brahman api_api garīyase_garīyas gurutarāya_gurutara ādi--_ādi kartre_kartṛ ca_ca brahmaṇaḥ_brahman api_api janakāya_janaka kim_ka ca_ca sat_as vyaktam_vyakta asat--_asat vyaktam_vyakta tābhyām_tad param_para mūla--_mūla kāraṇam_kāraṇa yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman tat_tad ca_ca tvam_tvad eva_eva etaiḥ_etad navabhiḥ_navan hetubhiḥ_hetu tvām_tvad sarve_sarva namasyanti_namasy iti_iti na_na citram_citra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 37_37

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhagavataḥ_bhagavant harṣa--_harṣa ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya tve_tva hetum_hetu āha_ah kasmāt_kasmāt ca_ca iti_iti kasmāt_ka ca_ca hetoḥ_hetu te_tad tubhyam_tvad na_na nameran_nam na_na namaskuryuḥ_namaskṛ siddha--_siddha saṅghāḥ_saṃgha sarve_sarva api_api he_he mahātman_mahātman parama--_parama udāra--_udāra citta_citta he_he ananta_ananta sarva--_sarva pariccheda--_pariccheda śūnya_śūnya he_he deveśa_deveśa hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ādīnām_ādi api_api devānām_deva niyantar_niyantṛ he_he jagat--_jagant nivāsa_nivāsa sarva--_sarva āśraya_āśraya tubhyam_tvad kīdṛśāya_kīdṛśa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman api_api garīyase_garīyas gurutarāya_gurutara api_api janakāya_janaka niyantṛ--_niyantṛ tvam_tva upadeṣṭṛ--_upadeṣṭṛ tvam_tva janaka--_janaka tvam_tva iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi ekaikaḥ_ekaika api_api hetuḥ_hetu namaskārya--_namaskṛ tā--_tā prayojakaḥ_prayojaka kim_ka punar_punar mahātmatva--_mahātmatva ananta--_ananta tva--_tva jagat--_jagant nivāsa--_nivāsa tva--_tva ādi--_ādi nānā_nānā kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa samuccitaḥ_samucci iti_iti anāścarya--_anāścarya vā_vā śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha ca_ca kāraḥ_kāra kim_ka ca_ca sat_as vidhi--_vidhi mukhena_mukha pratīyamānam_pratī asat_asat niṣedha--_niṣedha mukhena_mukha pratīyamānam_pratī na_na asti_as iti_iti athavā_athavā sat--_as vyaktam_vyakta asat--_asat vyaktam_vyakta tvam_tvad eva_eva tathā_tathā tat_tad param_para tābhyām_tad sat--_as asadbhyām_asat param_para mūla--_mūla kāraṇam_kāraṇa yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman tat_tad api_api tvam_tvad eva_eva tvad--_tvad bhinnam_bhid kim_ka api_api na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad param_para yat_yad iti_iti atra_atra yad--_yad śabdāt_śabda prāk_prāk ca-kāram_ca-kāra api_api kecid_kaścit paṭhanti_paṭh etaiḥ_etad hetubhiḥ_hetu tvām_tvad sarve_sarva namasyanti_namasy iti_iti na_na kim_ka api_api citram_citra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 37_37

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha te_tad kasmāt_kasmāt na_na nameran_nam api_api tu_tu nameran_nam eva_eva ātmanepadam_ātmanepada ārṣam_ārṣa sat--_as kāryam_kārya asat--_asat kāraṇam_kāraṇa ca_ca tābhyām_tad param_para yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman tat_tad tvam_tvad

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha bhagavataḥ_bhagavant sarva--_sarva namasya--_namasya tvam_tva abhidadhat_abhidhā sarva--_sarva vyāpi--_vyāpin tvāt_tva sarva--_sarva ātmaka--_ātmaka tām_tā pratipādayati_pratipāday kasmāt_kasmāt ca_ca iti_iti caturbhiḥ_catur he_he mahātman_mahātman udāra--_udāra mate_mati he_he ananta_ananta sarva--_sarva vyāpin_vyāpin he_he deveśa_deveśa sarva--_sarva deva--_deva niyantar_niyantṛ he_he jagannivāsa_jagannivāsa sarva--_sarva āśraya_āśraya te_tad siddha--_siddha saṅghāḥ_saṃgha te_tad tubhyam_tvad kasmāt_ka hetoḥ_hetu na_na nameran_nam ātmanepadam_ātmanepada chāndasam_chāndasa api_api tu_tu praṇameyuḥ_praṇam eva_eva te_tad kīdṛśāya_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah brahmaṇaḥ_brahman api_api garīyase_garīyas gurutarāya_gurutara yasmāt_yad ādi--_ādi kartre_kartṛ tattva--_tattva sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi karāya_kara iti_iti namasya--_namasya tve_tva aneke_aneka hetavaḥ_hetu santi_as iti_iti samuccaya--_samuccaya alaṅkāraḥ_alaṃkāra kim_ka ca_ca yat_yad akṣaram_akṣara prakṛti--_prakṛti tattvam_tattva tad--_tad param_para yat_yad iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt prakṛti--_prakṛti saṃsṛṣṭāt_saṃsṛj jīvātma--_jīvātman tattvāt_tattva prakṛti--_prakṛti tattvāt_tattva ca_ca ukta--_vac rūpāt_rūpa param_para utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa bhinnam_bhid
ca_ca yat_yad mukta--_muc jīvātma--_jīvātman tattvam_tattva tat_tad ca_ca tvam_tvad eva_eva sarva--_sarva rūpaḥ_rūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: tvam_tvad ādi--_ādi devaḥ_deva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa purāṇas_purāṇa
tvam_tvad asya_idam viśvasya_viśva param_para nidhānam_nidhāna
vettāsi_vid vedyam_vid ca_ca param_para ca_ca dhāma_dhāman
tvayā_tvad tatam_tan viśvam_viśva ananta--_ananta rūpa_rūpa

div.p: tvam_tvad ādi--_ādi devaḥ_deva devānām_deva ādiḥ_ādi yatas_yatas purāṇaḥ_purāṇa anādiḥ_anādi puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tvam_tvad tvam_tvad asya_idam param_para nidhānam_nidhāna laya--_laya sthānam_sthāna viśvasya_viśva jñātā_jñātṛ tvam_tvad yat_yad ca_ca vedyam_vid vastu--_vastu jātam_jan param_para ca_ca dhāma_dhāman vaiṣṇavam_vaiṣṇava padam_pada tat_tad api_api tvam_tvad eva_eva asi_as ataeva_ataeva he_he ananta--_ananta rūpa_rūpa tvayā_tvad eva_eva idam_idam viśvam_viśva tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp etaiḥ_etad ca_ca saptabhiḥ_saptan hetubhiḥ_hetu tvam_tvad eva_eva namaskāryaḥ_namaskṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 38_38

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhakti--_bhakti udrekāt_udreka punar_punar api_api stauti_stu tvam_tvad iti_iti tvam_tvad ādi--_ādi devaḥ_deva jagataḥ_jagant sarga--_sarga hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa pūrayitā_pūrayitṛ purāṇaḥ_purāṇa anādiḥ_anādi tvam_tvad asya_idam viśvasya_viśva param_para nidhānam_nidhāna laya--_laya sthāna--_sthāna tvāt_tva nidhīyate_nidhā sarvam_sarva asmin_idam iti_iti evam_evam sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi pralaya--_pralaya sthāna--_sthāna tvena_tva upādāna--_upādāna tvam_tva uktvā_vac sarvajña--_sarvajña tvena_tva pradhānam_pradhāna vyāvartayan_vyāvartay nimitta--_nimitta tām_tā āha_ah vettā_vettṛ veditā_veditṛ sarvasya_sarva asi_as dvaita--_dvaita āpattim_āpatti vārayati_vāray yat_yad ca_ca vedyam_vid tat_tad api_api tvam_tvad eva_eva asi_as vedana--_vedana rūpe_rūpa veditari_veditṛ paramārtha--_paramārtha sambandha--_sambandha abhāvena_abhāva sarvasya_sarva vedyasya_vid kalpita--_kalpay tvāt_tva ataeva_ataeva param_para ca_ca dhāma_dhāman yat_yad sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya nirmuktam_nirmuc viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu paramam_parama padam_pada tat_tad api_api tvam_tvad eva_eva asi_as tvayā_tvad sat--_sat rūpeṇa_rūpa sphūraṇa--_sphūraṇa rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca kāraṇena_kāraṇa tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp
idam_idam svatas_svatas sattā--_sattā sphūrti--_sphūrti śūnyam_śūnya viśvam_viśva kāryam_kārya māyika--_māyika sambandhena_sambandha eva_eva sthiti--_sthiti kāla_kāla he_he ananta--_ananta rūpa--_rūpa aparicchinna--_aparicchinna svarūpa_svarūpa

baladevaḥ_baladeva tvam_tvad iti_iti param_para nidhānam_nidhāna parama--_parama āśrayaḥ_āśraya nidhīyate_nidhā asmin_idam iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti jagati_jagant yaḥ_yad vettā_vettṛ yat_yad ca_ca vedyam_vid tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya tvam_tvad eva_eva kutas_kutas evam_evam iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah yat_yat tvayā_tvad viśvam_viśva idam_idam tatam_tan tad--_tad vyāpi--_vyāpin tvāt_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad ca_ca param_para dhāma_dhāman parama--_parama vyoma--_vyoman ākhyam_ākhyā prāpya--_prāp sthānam_sthāna tat_tad api_api tvam_tvad eva_eva para--_para ākhya--_ākhyā tvad--_tvad śakti--_śakti vaibhava--_vaibhava tvāt_tva tasya_tad dhāmnaḥ_dhāman 38_38

lg.l: vāyuḥ_vāyu yamaḥ_yama agniḥ_agni varuṇaḥ_varuṇa śaśāṅkaḥ_śaśāṅka
prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati tvam_tvad prapitāmahaḥ_prapitāmaha ca_ca
namaḥ_namas namaḥ_namas te_tvad astu_as sahasra--_sahasra kṛtvas_kṛtvas
punar_punar ca_ca bhūyas_bhūyas api_api namaḥ_namas namaḥ_namas te_tvad

div.p: vāyu--_vāyu ādi--_ādi rūpaḥ_rūpa tvam_tvad iti_iti sarva--_sarva deva--_deva ātmaka--_ātmaka tva--_tva upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa artham_artha uktam_vac prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati pitāmahaḥ_pitāmaha tasya_tad api_api janaka--_janaka tvāt_tva prapitāmahaḥ_prapitāmaha tvam_tvad atas_atas te_tvad tubhyam_tvad sahasraśas_sahasraśas namaḥ_namas astu_as punar_punar sahasra--_sahasra kṛtvas_kṛtvas namaḥ_namas astu_as bhūyas_bhūyas api_api punar_punar api_api sahasra--_sahasra kṛtvas_kṛtvas namaḥ_namas namaḥ_namas iti_iti 39_39

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana vāyuḥ_vāyu yamaḥ_yama agniḥ_agni varuṇaḥ_varuṇa śaśāṅkaḥ_śaśāṅka sūrya--_sūrya ādīnām_ādi api_api upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati virāj_virāj hiraṇya--_hiraṇya garbhaḥ_garbha ca_ca prapitāmahaḥ_prapitāmaha pitāmahasya_pitāmaha hiraṇya--_hiraṇya garbhasya_garbha api_api pitā_pitṛ ca_ca tvam_tvad yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam sarva--_sarva deva--_deva ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva tvam_tvad eva_eva sarvaiḥ_sarva namaskāryaḥ_namaskṛ asi_as tasmāt_tasmāt mama_mad api_api varākasya_varāka namaḥ_namas namaḥ_namas namaḥ_namas te_tvad tubhyam_tvad astu_as sahasra--_sahasra kṛtvas_kṛtvas punar_punar ca_ca bhūyas_bhūyas api_api punar_punar api_api ca_ca namaḥ_namas namaḥ_namas te_tvad bhakti--_bhakti śraddhā--_śraddhā atiśayena_atiśaya namaskāreṣu_namaskāra alam_alam pratyaya--_pratyaya abhāvaḥ_abhāva anayā_idam namaskāra--_namaskāra āvṛttyā_āvṛtti sūcyate_sūcay 39_39
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva atas_atas sarva--_sarva śabda--_śabda vācyaḥ_vac tvam_tvad iti_iti āha_ah vāyuḥ_vāyu iti_iti sarva--_sarva deva--_deva upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa vāyu--_vāyu ādi--_ādi sarva--_sarva deva--_deva rūpaḥ_rūpa tvam_tvad prajāpatiḥ_prajāpati catur--_catur āsyaḥ_āsya pitāmahaḥ_pitāmaha tvam_tvad tad--_tad pitṛ--_pitṛ tvāt_tva prapitāmahaḥ_prapitāmaha tvam_tvad bhavasi_bhū kaṅkaṇa--_kaṅkaṇa ādiṣu_ādi kanakasya_kanaka iva_iva cit--_cit acit--_acit śaktimataḥ_śaktimat tava_tvad sarva--_sarva rūpaḥ_rūpa tvam_tvad atas_atas sarva--_sarva namasyaḥ_namasya asi_as iti_iti mayā_mad tvam_tvad namasyase_namasy iti_iti āha_ah namaḥ_namas namaḥ_namas 39_39

namaḥ_namas purastāt_purastāt atha_atha pṛṣṭhatas_pṛṣṭhatas te_tvad
namaḥ_namas astu_as te_tvad sarvatas_sarvatas eva_eva sarva_sarva
ananta--_ananta vīrya--_vīrya amita--_amita vikramaḥ_vikrama tvam_tvad
sarvam_sarva samāpnoṣi_samāp tatas_tatas asi_as sarvaḥ_sarva

praṇamati_praṇam he_he sarva_sarva sarva--_sarva ātman_ātman sarvāsu_sarva dikṣu_diś tubhyam_tvad namaḥ_namas astu_as sarvātmakam_sarvātmaka upapādayan_upapāday āha_ah anantam_ananta vīryam_vīrya sāmarthyam_sāmarthya yasya_yad tathā_tathā amitaḥ_amita vikramaḥ_vikrama parākramaḥ_parākrama yasya_yad saḥ_tad evam_evam bhūtaḥ_bhū tvam_tvad sarvam_sarva viśvam_viśva samyak_samyak antar_antar bahis_bahis ca_ca samāpnoṣi_samāp vyāpnoṣi_vyāp suvarṇam_suvarṇa iva_iva kaṭaka--_kaṭaka kuṇḍala--_kuṇḍala ādi_ādi sva--_sva kāryam_kārya vyāpya_vyāp vartase_vṛt tatas_tatas sarva--_sarva svarūpaḥ_svarūpa asi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tubhyam_tvad purastāt_purastāt agra--_agra bhāge_bhāga namaḥ_namas astu_as tubhyam_tvad puras_puras namaḥ_namas syāt_as iti_iti vā_vā atha_atha śabdaḥ_śabda samuccaye_samuccaya pṛṣṭhatas_pṛṣṭhatas api_api tubhyam_tvad namaḥ_namas syāt_as namaḥ_namas astu_as te_tvad tubhyam_tvad sarvatas_sarvatas eva_eva sarvāsu_sarva dikṣu_diś sthitāya_sthā he_he sarva_sarva vīryam_vīrya śarīra--_śarīra balam_bala vikramaḥ_vikrama śikṣā_śikṣā śastra--_śastra prayoga--_prayoga kauśalam_kauśala ekam_eka vīrya--_vīrya adhikam_adhika manye_man śikṣayā_śikṣā adhikam_adhika iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti bhīma--_bhīma duryodhanayoḥ_duryodhana anyeṣu_anya ca_ca ekaikam_ekaika vyavasthitam_vyavasthā tvam_tvad tu_tu ananta--_ananta vīryaḥ_vīrya ca_ca amita--_amita vikramaḥ_vikrama ca_ca iti_iti samastam_samasta ekam_eka padam_pada ananta--_ananta vīrya_vīrya iti_iti sambodhanam_sambodhana vā_vā sarvam_sarva samastam_samasta jagat_jagant samāpnoṣi_samāp samyak_samyak ekena_eka sat--_as rūpeṇa_rūpa āpnoṣi_āp
sarva--_sarva ātmanā_ātman vyāpnoṣi_vyāp tatas_tatas tasmāt_tasmāt sarvaḥ_sarva asi_as tvad--_tvad atiriktam_atiric kim_ka api_api na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sarvam_sarva sva--_sva kāryam_kārya jagat_jagant āpnoṣi_āp vyāpnoṣi_vyāp svarṇam_svarṇa iva_iva kaṭaka--_kaṭaka kuṇḍala--_kuṇḍala ādikam_ādika atas_atas tvam_tvad eva_eva sarvaḥ_sarva
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva bhakti--_bhakti atiśayena_atiśaya namaskāreṣu_namaskāra alam_alam bhāvam_bhāva a_a vidan_vid bahu--_bahu kṛtvas_kṛtvas praṇamati_praṇam namaḥ_namas purastāt_purastāt iti_iti he_he sarva_sarva purastāt_purastāt pṛṣṭhatas_pṛṣṭhatas sarvatas_sarvatas ca_ca sthitāya_sthā te_tvad namaḥ_namas namaḥ_namas astu_as ananta--_ananta iti_iti karma--_karman dhārayaḥ_dhāraya vīryam_vīrya deha--_deha balam_bala vikramaḥ_vikrama tu_tu dhī--_dhī balam_bala śastra--_śastra prayoga--_prayoga ādi--_ādi prāvīṇya--_prāvīṇya rūpam_rūpa ekam_eka vīrya--_vīrya adhikam_adhika manyata_man ekam_eka śikṣayā_śikṣā adhikam_adhika iti_iti bhīma--_bhīma duryodhanau_duryodhana uddiśya_uddiś ukteḥ_ukti sarva--_sarva rūpa--_rūpa tva--_tva ihe_iha tum_tu āha_ah sarvam_sarva samāpnoṣi_samāp iti_iti evam_evam eva_eva uktam_vac śrī--_śrī vaiṣṇave_vaiṣṇava
yaḥ_yad ayam_idam tava_tvad āgataḥ_āgam deva_deva samīpam_samīpa devatā--_devatā gaṇaḥ_gaṇa sa_tad tvam_tvad eva_eva jagat--_jagant sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ yatas_yatas sarva--_sarva gataḥ_gam bhavān_bhavat

lg.l: sakhā_sakhi iti_iti matvā_man prasabham_prasabham yat_yad uktam_vac
he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa he_he yādava_yādava he_he sakhā_sakhi iti_iti
a_a jānatā_jñā mahimānam_mahiman tava_tvad idam_idam
mayā_mad pramādāt_pramāda praṇayena_praṇaya vā_vā api_api
yat_yat ca_ca avahāsa--_avahāsa artham_artha asatkṛtaḥ_asatkṛ asi_as
vihāra--_vihāra śayyā--_śayyā āsana--_āsana bhojaneṣu_bhojana
ekaḥ_eka atha_atha vā_vā api_api acyuta_acyuta tad--_tad samakṣam_samakṣa
tat_tad kṣāmaye_kṣāmay tvām_tvad aham_mad aprameyam_aprameya

div.p: tvam_tvad prākṛteḥ_prākṛti sakhā_sakhi iti_iti evam_evam matvā_man prasabham_prasabham haṭhāt_haṭha tiraskāreṇa_tiraskāra yat_yad uktam_vac tat_tad kṣāmaye_kṣāmay tvām_tvad iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara anvayaḥ_anvaya kim_ka tat_tad he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa he_he yādava_yādava he_he sakhā_sakhi iti_iti ca_ca sandhiḥ_saṃdhi ārṣam_ārṣa prasabha--_prasabha uktau_ukti hetuḥ_hetu tava_tvad mahimānam_mahiman idam_idam ca_ca viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa a_a jānatā_jñā ca_ca mayā_mad pramādāt_pramāda praṇayena_praṇaya snehena_sneha yat_yad uktam_vac iti_iti

kim_ka ca_ca yat_yad ca_ca iti_iti he_he acyuta_acyuta yat_yat ca_ca parihāsa--_parihāsa artham_artha krīḍā--_krīḍā ādiṣu_ādi tiraskṛtaḥ_tiraskṛ asi_as ekatraḥ_ekatra ekalaḥ_ekala sakhīn_sakhi vinā_vinā rahasi_rahas sthitaḥ_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha athavā_athavā tad--_tad samakṣam_samakṣa teṣām_tad parihasatām_parihas sakhīnām_sakhī samakṣam_samakṣa puratas_puratas api_api tat_tad sarvam_sarva aparādha--_aparādha jātam_jan tvām_tvad aprameyam_aprameya acintya--_acintya prabhāvam_prabhāva kṣāmaye_kṣāmay kṣamām_kṣamā kārayāmi_kāray 42_42

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_yatas aham_mad tvad--_tvad māhātmya--_māhātmya aparijñānāt_aparijñāna aparādhān_aparādha ajasrām_ajasra akārṣam_kṛ tatas_tatas parama--_parama kāruṇikam_kāruṇika tvām_tvad praṇamya_praṇam aparādha--_aparādha kṣamām_kṣama kāryāmi_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah sakhi_sakhi iti_iti iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi tvam_tvad mama_mad sakhā_sakhi samāna--_samāna vayāḥ_vayas iti_iti matvā_man prasabham_prasabham sva--_sva utkarṣa--_utkarṣa khyāpana--_khyāpana rūpeṇa_rūpa abhibhavena_abhibhava yat_yad uktam_vac mayā_mad tava_tvad idam_idam viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa tathā_tathā mahimānam_mahiman aiśvarya--_aiśvarya atiśayam_atiśaya a_a jānatā_jñā pum_puṃs liṅga--_liṅga pāṭhe_pāṭha imam_idam viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa ātmakam_ātmaka mahimānam_mahiman a_a jānatā_jñā pramādāt_pramāda citta--_citta vikṣepāt_vikṣepa praṇayena_praṇaya snehena_sneha vā_vā api_api kim_ka uktam_vac iti_iti āha_ah he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa he_he yādava_yādava he_he sakhā_sakhi iti_iti

yat_yad ca_ca avahāsa--_avahāsa artham_artha parihāsa--_parihāsa artham_artha vihāra--_vihāra śayyā--_śayyā āsana--_āsana bhojaneṣu_bhojana vihāraḥ_vihāra krīḍā_krīḍā vyāyāmaḥ_vyāyāma vā_vā śayyā_śayyā tūlikā--_tūlikā ādi--_ādi āstaraṇa--_āstaraṇa viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa āsanam_āsana siṃhāsana--_siṃhāsana ādi_ādi bhojanam_bhojana bahūnām_bahu paṅkau_paṅka aśanam_aśana teṣu_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya bhūteṣu_bhū asatkṛtaḥ_asatkṛ asi_as mayā_mad paribhūtaḥ_paribhū asi_as ekaḥ_eka sakhīn_sakhi vihāya_vihā rahasi_rahas sthitaḥ_sthā vā_vā tvam_tvad athavā_athavā tad--_tad samakṣam_samakṣa teṣām_tad sakhīnām_sakhī samakṣam_samakṣa vā_vā he_he acyuta_acyuta sarvadā_sarvadā nirvikāra_nirvikāra tat_tad sarvam_sarva vacana--_vacana rūpam_rūpa asat--_asat karaṇa--_karaṇa rūpam_rūpa ca_ca aparādha--_aparādha jātam_jan kṣāmaye_kṣāmay kṣāmayāmi_kṣāmay tvām_tvad aprameyam_aprameya acintya--_acintya prabhāveṇa_prabhāva parama--_parama kāruṇikena_kāruṇika bhagavatā_bhagavant tvad--_tvad māhātmya--_māhātmya anabhijñasya_anabhijña
mama_mad aparādhāḥ_aparādha kṣantavyāḥ_kṣam iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

asmi_as āha_ah he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa iti_iti tvam_tvad vasudeva--_vasudeva nāmnaḥ_nāman narasya_nara ardharatha--_ardharatha tvena_tva api_api aprasiddhasya_aprasiddha putraḥ_putra kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa iti_iti prasiddhaḥ_prasidh he_he yādava_yādava iti_iti yadu--_yadu vaṃśasya_vaṃśa tava_tvad nā_na asti_as rāja--_rājan tvam_tva mama_mad tu_tu puru--_puru vaṃśasya_vaṃśa asti_as eva_eva rāja--_rājan tvam_tva he_he sakha_sakhi iti_iti sandhiḥ_saṃdhi ārṣaḥ_ārṣa tat_tad api_api tvayā_tvad saha_saha mama_mad yat_yad sakhyam_sakhya tatra_tatra tava_tvad paitrika--_paitrika prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva na_na hetuḥ_hetu na_na api_api kaulikaḥ_kaulika kintu_kintu tāvakaḥ_tāvaka evā_eva iti_iti abhiprāyataḥ_abhiprāya prasabham_prasabham sa_sa tiraskāram_tiraskāra uktam_vac mayā_mad tat_tad kṣāmaye_kṣāmay kṣamayāmi_kṣamay iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara anvayaḥ_anvaya tava_tvad idam_idam viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa ātmakam_ātmaka sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa eva_eva mahimānam_mahiman pramādāt_pramāda vā_vā praṇayena_praṇaya snehena_sneha vā_vā parihāsa--_parihāsa artham_artha vihāra--_vihāra ādiṣu_ādi asatkṛtaḥ_asatkṛ asi_as tvam_tvad satya--_satya vādī_vādin niṣkapaṭaḥ_niṣkapaṭa parama--_parama saralaḥ_sarala iti_iti ādi--_ādi vakroktyā_vakrokti tvam_tvad ekaḥ_eka sakhīn_sakhi vinā_vinā eva_eva rahasi_rahas athavā_athavā tat_tad samakṣam_samakṣa teṣām_tad parihasatām_parihas sakhīnām_sakhī samakṣam_samakṣa puratas_puratas asi_as yadā_yadā sthitaḥ_sthā tadā_tadā jātam_jan tat_tad sarvam_sarva aparādha--_aparādha sahasram_sahasra kṣāmaye_kṣāmay he_he prabho_prabhu kṣamasva_kṣam iti_iti anunayāmi_anunī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam arjunaḥ_arjuna sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣa--_śīrṣan ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sva--_sva sakham_sakha kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa vilokya_vilokay saṃstutya_saṃstu praṇamya_praṇam ca_ca sva--_sva sakhyasya_sakhya aiśvarya--_aiśvarya jñāna--_jñāna saṃmiśra--_sammiśra tvāt_tva tad--_tad anurūpam_anurūpa anunayati_anunī sakhā_sakhi iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa bhagavān_bhagavant me_mad sakhā_sakhi mitram_mitra iti_iti matvā_man niścitya_niści tava_tvad idam_idam sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣa--_śīrṣan tva--_tva ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa mahimānam_mahiman a_a jānatā_jñā an_an anubhavatā_anubhū mayā_mad pramādāt_pramāda anavadhānataḥ_anavadhāna praṇayena_praṇaya sakhya--_sakhya premṇā_preman vā_vā yat_yad tat_tad idānīm_idānīm kṣāmaye_kṣāmay kṣamayāmi_kṣamay kim_ka tat_tad iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa iti_iti ādi_ādi sakhā_sakhi iti_iti iti_iti atra_atra sandhiḥ_saṃdhi chāndasaḥ_chāndasa etāni_etad trīṇi_tri sambodhanāni_sambodhana anādara--_anādara garbhāṇi_garbha he_he kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa iti_iti atra_atra śrī--_śrī pūrvakatva--_pūrvakatva abhāvāt_abhāva he_he yādava_yādava iti_iti atra_atra rājya--_rājya vaṃśya--_vaṃśya tva--_tva abhāva--_abhāva āvedanāt_āvedana he_he sakhā_sakhi iti_iti atra_atra savayas--_savayas tva--_tva mātra--_mātra sūcanāt_sūcana kim_ka ca_ca vihāra--_vihāra ādiṣu_ādi avahāsa--_avahāsa artham_artha parihāsāya_parihāsa asatkṛtaḥ_asatkṛ asi_as satya--_satya vāc_vāc saralaḥ_sarala niṣkapaṭaḥ_niṣkapaṭa tvam_tvad iti_iti evam_evam vyañjaka--_vyañjaka śabdaiḥ_śabda avajñātaḥ_avajñā asi_as ekaḥ_eka sakhīn_sakhi vinā_vinā vijane_vijana sthitaḥ_sthā tat_tad samakṣam_samakṣa vā_vā teṣām_tad parihasatām_parihas sakhīnām_sakhī puratas_puratas vā_vā sthitaḥ_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad sarva--_sarva vacana--_vacana rūpam_rūpa asatkāra--_asatkāra rūpam_rūpa vā_vā aparādha--_aparādha jātam_jan kṣāmaye_kṣāmay kṣamasva_kṣam prabho_prabhu bhagavan_bhagavat iti_iti anunayāmi_anunī he_he acyuta_acyuta iti_iti sati_as api_api aparādhe_aparādha avicyuta--_avicyuta sakha_sakha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha aprameyam_aprameya atarkya--_atarkya prabhāvam_prabhāva

lg.l: pitā_pitṛ asi_as lokasya_loka carācarasya_carācara
tvam_tvad asya_idam pūjyaḥ_pūjay ca_ca guruḥ_guru garīyān_garīyas
na_na tvad--_tvad samaḥ_sama asti_as abhyadhikaḥ_abhyadhika kutas_kutas
loka--_loka traye_traya api_api apratima--_apratima prabhāva_prabhāva

div.p: āha_ah na_na vidyate_vid pratimā_pratimā upamā_upamā yasya_yad saḥ_tad apratimaḥ_apratima tathāvidhaḥ_tathāvidha prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva yasya_yad tava_tvad he_he apratima--_apratima prabhāva_prabhāva tvam_tvad asya_idam carācarasya_carācara lokasya_loka pitā_pitṛ janakaḥ_janaka asi_as ataeva_ataeva pūjyaḥ_pūjay ca_ca guruḥ_guru ca_ca guroḥ_guru api_api garīyān_garīyas gurutaraḥ_gurutara atas_atas loka--_loka traye_traya api_api na_na tvad--_tvad samaḥ_sama eva_eva tāvat--_tāvat anyaḥ_anya nā_na asti_as parameśvarasya_parameśvara anyasya_anya abhāvāt_abhāva tvattaḥ_tvad abhyadhikaḥ_abhyadhika punar_punar kutas_kutas syāt_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana acintya--_acintya prabhāvatām_prabhāvatā eva_eva prapañcayati_prapañcay pitā_pitṛ asi_as iti_iti asya_idam carācarasya_carācara lokasya_loka pitā_pitṛ janakaḥ_janaka tvam_tvad asi_as pūjyaḥ_pūjay ca_ca asi_as sarva--_sarva īśvara--_īśvara tvāt_tva guruḥ_guru ca_ca asi_as śāstra--_śāstra upadeṣṭā_upadeṣṭṛ atas_atas sarvaiḥ_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra garīyān_garīyas gurutaraḥ_gurutara asi_as ataeva_ataeva na_na tvad--_tvad samaḥ_sama asti_as abhyadhikaḥ_abhyadhika kutas_kutas anyaḥ_anya loka--_loka traye_traya api_api he_he apratima--_apratima prabhāva_prabhāva yasya_yad samaḥ_sama api_api na_na asti_as dvitīyasya_dvitīya parameśvarasya_parameśvara abhāvāt_abhāva tasya_tad adhikaḥ_adhika anyaḥ_anya kutas_kutas syāt_as sarvathā_sarvathā na_na sambhāvyate_sambhāvay eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva aprameya--_aprameya tām_tā āha_ah pitā_pitṛ asi_as iti_iti asya_idam lokasya_loka pitā_pitṛ pūjyaḥ_pūjay guruḥ_guru śāstra--_śāstra upadeṣṭā_upadeṣṭṛ ca_ca tvam_tvad asi_as atas_atas sarvaiḥ_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra garīyān_garīyas gurutaraḥ_gurutara tvam_tvad he_he apratima--_apratima asmin_idam loka--_loka traye_traya nikhile_nikhila api_api jagati_jagant tvad--_tvad samaḥ_sama eva_eva nā_na asti_as dvitīyasya_dvitīya pareśasya_pareśa abhāvāt_abhāva eva_eva tvad--_tvad adhikaḥ_adhika anyaḥ_anya kutas_kutas syāt_as śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah na_na tad--_tad samaḥ_sama ca_ca abhyadhikaḥ_abhyadhika ca_ca dṛśyate_dṛś iti_iti

lg.l: tasmāt_tasmāt praṇamya_praṇam praṇidhāya_praṇidhā kāyam_kāya
prasādaye_prasāday tvām_tvad aham_mad īśam_īśa īḍyam_īḍ
pitā_pitṛ iva_iva putrasya_putra sakhā_sakhi iva_iva sakhyuḥ_sakhi
priyaḥ_priya priyāya_priya arhasi_arh deva_deva soḍhum_sah

div.p: tasmāt_tasmāt tvām_tvad īśam_īśa jagataḥ_jagant svāminam_svāmin īḍyam_īḍ tubhyam_tvad prasādaye_prasāday prasādayāmi_prasāday katham_katham kāyam_kāya praṇidhāya_praṇidhā danta--_danta vat_vat nipātya_nipātay praṇamya_praṇam prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa natvā_nam atas_atas tvam_tvad mahā--_mahat aparādham_aparādha soḍhum_sah kṣantum_kṣam arhati_arh kasya_ka kva_kva iva_iva putrasya_putra aparādham_aparādha kṛpayā_kṛpā pitā_pitṛ yathā_yathā sahate_sah sakhuḥ_sakhi mitrasya_mitra aparādham_aparādha sakhā_sakhi nirupādhi--_nirupādhi bandhuḥ_bandhu sahate_sah priyaḥ_priya ca_ca priyāyāḥ_priya aparādham_aparādha tad--_tad priya--_priya artham_artha yathā_yathā sahate_sah tadvat_tadvat

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti tasmāt_tasmāt praṇamya_praṇam namaskṛtya_namaskṛ tvām_tvad praṇidhāya_praṇidhā prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa nīcais_nīca dhṛtvā_dhṛ kāyam_kāya daṇḍa--_daṇḍa vat_vat bhūmau_bhūmi patitvā_pat iti_iti yāvat_yāvat prasādaye_prasāday tvām_tvad īśam_īśa īḍyam_īḍ sarva--_sarva stutyam_stu aham_mad aparādhī_aparādhin atas_atas he_he deva_deva pitā_pitṛ iva_iva putrasya_putra aparādham_aparādha sakhā_sakhi iva_iva sakhyuḥ_sakhi aparādham_aparādha priyaḥ_priya priyāyāḥ_priya pativratāyāḥ_pativratā aparādham_aparādha mama_mad aparādham_aparādha tvam_tvad soḍhum_sah kṣantum_kṣam arhasi_arh ananya--_ananya śaraṇa--_śaraṇa tvāt_tva mama_mad priyāya_priya arhasi_arh iti_iti atra_atra iva_iva śabda--_śabda lopaḥ_lopa sandhiḥ_saṃdhi ca_ca chāndasaḥ_chāndasa
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kāyam_kāya praṇidhāya_praṇidhā bhūmau_bhūmi daṇḍa--_daṇḍa vat_vat nipātya_nipātay priyāya_priya arhasi_arh iti_iti sandhiḥ_saṃdhi ārṣaḥ_ārṣa
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti kāyam_kāya bhūmau_bhūmi praṇidhāya_praṇidhā praṇamya_praṇam iti_iti sa_sa aṣṭāṅgam_aṣṭāṅga praṇatim_praṇati kṛtvā_kṛ he_he deva_deva mama_mad aparādham_aparādha soḍhum_sah arhasi_arh kaḥ_ka kasya_ka iva_iva iti_iti āha_ah pitā_pitṛ iva_iva iti_iti sakhā_sakhi iva_iva sakhyuḥ_sakhi iti_iti tu_tu tadā_tadā mahā--_mahat aiśvaryam_aiśvarya vīkṣya_vīkṣ svasmin_sva dāsa--_dāsa tva--_tva mananāt_manana priyāya_priya arhasi_arh iti_iti visarga--_visarga lopaḥ_lopa sandhiḥ_saṃdhi ca_ca ārṣaḥ_ārṣa

lg.l: adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa pūrvam_pūrvam hṛṣitaḥ_hṛṣ asmi_as dṛṣṭvā_dṛś
bhayena_bhaya ca_ca pravyathitam_pravyathay manaḥ_manas me_mad
tat_tad eva_eva me_mad darśaya_darśay deva_deva rūpam_rūpa
prasīda_prasad deveśa_deveśa jagan--_jagant nivāsa_nivāsa

div.p: prārthayate_prārthay he_he deva_deva pūrvam_pūrvam adṛṣṭam_adṛṣṭa tava_tvad rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś hṛṣitaḥ_hṛṣ hṛṣṭaḥ_hṛṣ asmi_as tathā_tathā bhayena_bhaya ca_ca me_mad manaḥ_manas pravyathitam_pravyathay pracalitam_pracal tasmāt_tasmāt mama_mad vyathā--_vyathā nivṛntaye_nivṛnti tat_tad eva_eva rūpam_rūpa darśaya_darśay he_he devaśa_devaśa he_he jagannivāsa_jagannivāsa prasannaḥ_prasad bhava_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam aparādha--_aparādha kṣamām_kṣamā prārthya_prārthay punar_punar prāk_prāk rūpa--_rūpa darśanam_darśana viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa upasaṃhareṇa_upasaṃhara prārthayate_prārthay adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa pūrvam_pūrva iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi kadāpi_kadāpi adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa pūrvam_pūrva pūrvam_pūrvam adṛṣṭam_adṛṣṭa viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś hṛṣitaḥ_hṛṣ hṛṣṭaḥ_hṛṣ asmi_as tad--_tad vikṛta--_vikṛ rūpa--_rūpa darśana--_darśana jena_ja bhayena_bhaya ca_ca pravyathitam_pravyathay vyākulīkṛtam_vyākulīkṛ manaḥ_manas me_mad atas_atas tat_tad eva_eva prācīnam_prācīna eva_eva mama_mad prāṇa--_prāṇa apekṣayā_apekṣā api_api priyam_priya rūpam_rūpa me_mad darśaya_darśay he_he deva_deva he_he deveśa_deveśa he_he jagan--_jagant nivāsa_nivāsa prasīda_prasad prāk--_prāñc rūpa--_rūpa darśana--_darśana rūpam_rūpa prasādam_prasāda me_mad kuru_kṛ

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yadi_yadi api_api adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa pūrvam_pūrva idam_idam te_tvad viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa ātmakam_ātmaka vapuḥ_vapus dṛṣṭvā_dṛś hṛṣitaḥ_hṛṣ asmi_as tat_tad api_api asya_idam ghora--_ghora tvāt_tva bhayena_bhaya manaḥ_manas pravyathitam_pravyathay abhūt_bhū tasmāt_tasmāt tat_tad eva_eva mānuṣam_mānuṣa rūpam_rūpa mad--_mad prāṇa--_prāṇa koṭi--_koṭi adhika--_adhika priyam_priya mādhurya--_mādhurya pārāvāram_pārāvāra vasudeva--_vasudeva nandana--_nandana ākāram_ākāra me_mad darśaya_darśay prasīda_prasad iti_iti alam_alam tava_tvad etādṛśa--_etādṛśa aiśvaryasya_aiśvarya darśanāya_darśana iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva deveśa_deveśa iti_iti tvam_tvad sarvedvānām_sarvedva īśvaraḥ_īśvara sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant nivāsaḥ_nivāsa bhavasi_bhū eva_eva iti_iti mayā_mad pratītam_pratī iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva atra_atra viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa darśana--_darśana kāle_kāla sarva--_sarva sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa mūla--_mūla bhūtam_bhū nara--_nara ākāram_ākāra kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa vapuḥ_vapus tatra_tatra eva_eva sthitam_sthā api_api yogamāyā--_yogamāyā ācchādita--_ācchāday tvāt_tva arjunena_arjuna na_na dṛṣṭam_dṛś iti_iti gamyate_gam

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha kim_ka vakṣi_vac kim_ka ca_ca icchasi_iṣ iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa iti_iti tvayi_tvad kṛṣṇe_kṛṣṇa sattvena_sattva jñātam_jñā api_api idam_idam aiśvaram_aiśvara rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś aham_mad harṣitaḥ_harṣay asmi_as mad--_mad sakhasya_sakha idam_idam asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa rūpam_rūpa iti_iti muditaḥ_mud asmi_as manaḥ_manas ca_ca mama_mad tad--_tad ghora--_ghora tva--_tva darśana--_darśana jena_ja bhayena_bhaya atas_atas idam_idam prārthayet_prārthay eva_eva ity_ity ādi_ādi sarva--_sarva deva--_deva niyantā_niyantṛ tad--_tad sarva--_sarva ādhāraḥ_ādhāra pareśaḥ_pareśa tvam_tvad asi_as iti_iti mayā_mad pratyakṣīkṛtam_pratyakṣīkṛ atas_atas param_param tad--_tad antarbhāvya_antarbhāvay tat_tad eva_eva mad--_mad abhīṣṭam_abhīṣ kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa rūpam_rūpa darśaya_darśay

lg.l: kirīṭinam_kirīṭin gadinam_gadin cakra--_cakra hastam_hasta
icchāmi_iṣ tvām_tvad draṣṭum_dṛś aham_mad tathā_tathā eva_eva
tena_tad eva_eva rūpeṇa_rūpa catur--_catur bhujena_bhuja
sahasra--_sahasra bāho_bāhu bhava_bhū viśva--_viśva mūrte_mūrti

div.p:
āha_ah kirīṭavantam_kirīṭavat gadāvantam_gadāvat cakra--_cakra hastam_hasta ca_ca tvām_tvad draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ pūrvam_pūrvam yathā_yathā dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś asi_as tathā_tathā eva_eva ataeva_ataeva he_he sahasra--_sahasra bāho_bāhu he_he viśva--_viśva mūrte_mūrti idam_idam viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa upasaṃhṛtya_upasaṃhṛ tena_tad eva_eva kirīṭa--_kirīṭa ādi--_ādi yuktena_yuj caturbhujena_caturbhuja bhava_bhū āvirbhava_āvirbhū tat_tad anena_idam śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa arjunaḥ_arjuna pūrvam_pūrvam api_api kirīṭa--_kirīṭa ādi--_ādi yuktam_yuj eva_eva paśyati_paś iti_iti gamyate_gam yat_yad tu_tu pūrvam_pūrvam uktam_vac viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa darśane_darśana kirīṭinam_kirīṭin gadinam_gadin cakriṇam_cakrin ca_ca paśyāmi_paś iti_iti tad--_tad bahu--_bahu kirīṭa--_kirīṭa ādi--_ādi abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya yat_yat vai_vai etāvantam_etāvat kālam_kāla yam_yad tvām_tvad kirīṭinam_kirīṭin gadinam_gadin cakriṇam_cakrin ca_ca su_su prasannam_prasad apaśyam_paś
tam_tad eva_eva idānīm_idānīm tejaḥ--_tejas rāśim_rāśi durnirīkṣyam_durnirīkṣya evam_evam atra_atra vacanasya_vacana vyaktiḥ_vyakti iti_iti avirodhaḥ_avirodha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad eva_eva rūpam_rūpa vivṛṇoti_vivṛ kirīṭinam_kirīṭin iti_iti kirīṭavantam_kirīṭavat gadāvantam_gadāvat cakra--_cakra hastam_hasta ca_ca tvām_tvad draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ aham_mad tathā_tathā eva_eva pūrvavat_pūrvavat eva_eva atas_atas tena_tad eva_eva rūpeṇa_rūpa catur--_catur bhujena_bhuja vasudeva--_vasudeva ātmaja--_ātmaja tvena_tva bhava_bhū he_he idānīm_idānīm sahasra--_sahasra bāho_bāhu he_he viśva--_viśva mūrte_mūrti upasaṃhṛtya_upasaṃhṛ viśvarūpam_viśvarūpa pūrva--_pūrva rūpeṇa_rūpa eva_eva prakaṭaḥ_prakaṭa bhava_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etena_etad sarvadā_sarvadā caturbhuja--_caturbhuja ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa arjunena_arjuna bhagavataḥ_bhagavant dṛśyate_dṛś iti_iti uktam_vac

āha_ah kirīṭavantam_kirīṭavat gadāvantam_gadāvat cakra--_cakra hastam_hasta ca_ca tvām_tvad draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ pūrvam_pūrvam yathā_yathā dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś asi_as tathā_tathā eva_eva ataeva_ataeva he_he sahasra--_sahasra bāho_bāhu he_he viśva--_viśva mūrte_mūrti idam_idam viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa upasaṃhṛtya_upasaṃhṛ tena_tad eva_eva kirīṭa--_kirīṭa ādi--_ādi yuktena_yuj caturbhujena_caturbhuja bhava_bhū āvirbhava_āvirbhū tat_tad anena_idam śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa arjunaḥ_arjuna pūrvam_pūrvam api_api kirīṭa--_kirīṭa ādi--_ādi yuktam_yuj eva_eva paśyati_paś iti_iti gamyate_gam yat_yad tu_tu pūrvam_pūrvam uktam_vac viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa darśane_darśana kirīṭinam_kirīṭin gadinam_gadin cakriṇam_cakrin ca_ca paśyāmi_paś iti_iti tad--_tad bahu--_bahu kirīṭa--_kirīṭa ādi--_ādi abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya yat_yat vai_vai etāvantam_etāvat kālam_kāla yam_yad tvām_tvad kirīṭinam_kirīṭin gadinam_gadin cakriṇam_cakrin ca_ca su_su prasannam_prasad apaśyam_paś tam_tad eva_eva idānīm_idānīm
tejaḥ--_tejas rāśim_rāśi durnirīkṣyam_durnirīkṣya evam_evam atra_atra vacanasya_vacana vyaktiḥ_vyakti iti_iti avirodhaḥ_avirodha

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad kīdṛś_kīdṛś iti_iti āha_ah kirīṭinam_kirīṭin iti_iti he_he samprati_samprati sahasra--_sahasra bāho_bāhu he_he viśva--_viśva mūrte_mūrti idam_idam rūpam_rūpa antarbhāvya_antarbhāvay divya--_divya abhinetṛ--_abhinetṛ naṭa--_naṭa vat_vat tena_tad eva_eva caturbhujena_caturbhuja rūpeṇa_rūpa viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ san_as prādurbhava_prādurbhū

śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
mayā_mad prasannena_prasad tava_tvad arjuna_arjuna idam_idam
rūpam_rūpa param_para darśitam_darśay ātma--_ātman yogāt_yoga
tejaḥ--_tejas mayam_maya viśvam_viśva anantam_ananta
ādyam_ādya yat_yad me_mad tvad--_tvad anyena_anya na_na dṛṣṭa--_dṛś pūrvam_pūrva

śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara evam_evam prārthitaḥ_prārthay tam_tad āśvāsayan_āśvāsay bhagavant_bhagavant uvāca_vac mayā_mad iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri he_he arjuna_arjuna kim_kim iti_iti tvam_tvad bibheṣi_bhī yatas_yatas mayā_mad prasannena_prasad kṛpayā_kṛpā tava_tvad idam_idam param_para uttamam_uttama rūpam_rūpa darśitam_darśay ātmanaḥ_ātman mama_mad yogāt_yoga yoga--_yoga māyā--_māyā sāmārthyāt_sāmārthya paratvam_paratva eva_eva āha_ah tejaḥ--_tejas mayam_maya viśvam_viśva viśvātmakam_viśvātmaka anantam_ananta ādyam_ādya ca_ca yat_yad mama_mad rūpam_rūpa tvad--_tvad anyena_anya tvādṛśāt_tvādṛśa bhaktāt_bhakta anyena_anya pūrvam_pūrvam na_na dṛṣṭam_dṛś tat_tad 47_47

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam arjunena_arjuna prasāditaḥ_prasāday bhaya--_bhaya vādhitam_vādhay arjunam_arjuna upalabhya_upalabh upasaṃhṛtya_upasaṃhṛ viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa ucitena_ucita vacanena_vacana tam_tad āśvāsayan_āśvāsay śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac mayā_mad iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri he_he arjuna_arjuna mā_mā bhaiṣīḥ_bhī yatas_yatas mayā_mad prasannena_prasad tvad--_tvad viṣaya--_viṣaya kṛpā--_kṛpā atiśayavatā_atiśayavat idam_idam viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa ātmakam_ātmaka param_para śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha rūpam_rūpa tava_tvad darśitam_darśay ātma--_ātman yogāt_yoga asādhāraṇāt_asādhāraṇa nija--_nija sāmarthyāt_sāmarthya paratvam_paratva vivṛṇoti_vivṛ tejaḥ--_tejas mayam_maya tejaḥ--_tejas pracuram_pracura viśvam_viśva samastam_samasta anantam_ananta ādyam_ādya ca_ca yat_yad mama_mad rūpam_rūpa tvad--_tvad anyena_anya kena_ka api_api na_na dṛṣṭa--_dṛś pūrvam_pūrva pūrvam_pūrvam na_na dṛṣṭam_dṛś 47_47

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha bho_bho arjuna_arjuna draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ te_tvad rūpam_rūpa aiśvaram_aiśvara puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama iti_iti tvad--_tvad prārthanayā_prārthanā eva_eva idam_idam mayā_mad mad--_mad aṃśasya_aṃśa viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa puruṣasya_puruṣa rūpam_rūpa darśitam_darśay katham_katham atra_atra te_tvad manaḥ_manas pravyathitam_pravyathay abhūt_bhū yatas_yatas prasīda_prasad prasīda_prasad iti_iti uktyā_ukti tat_tad mānuṣam_mānuṣa eva_eva rūpam_rūpa me_mad didṛkṣase_didṛkṣ tasmāt_tasmāt kim_ka idam_idam āścaryam_āścarya brūṣe_brū iti_iti āha_ah mayā_mad iti_iti prasannena_prasad eva_eva mayā_mad tava_tvad tubhyam_tvad eva_eva idam_idam rūpam_rūpa darśitam_darśay na_na anyasmai_anya yatas_yatas tvattaḥ_tvad anyena_anya kena_ka api_api etat_etad na_na pūrvam_pūrvam dṛṣṭam_dṛś tat_tad api_api tvam_tvad etat_etad na_na spṛhayasi_spṛhay kim_kim iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 47_47

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam prārthitaḥ_prārthay bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac mayā_mad iti_iti he_he arjuna_arjuna draṣṭum_dṛś icchāmi_iṣ te_tvad rūpam_rūpa iti_iti ādi_ādi tvad--_tvad prārthitam_prārthay prasannena_prasad mayā_mad idam_idam tejaḥ--_tejas mayam_maya parama--_parama aiśvaram_aiśvara rūpam_rūpa vaidūrya--_vaiḍūrya vat_vat abhinetṛ--_abhinetṛ naṭa--_naṭa vat_vat ca_ca tvad--_tvad abhīṣṭe_abhīṣ kṛṣṇe_kṛṣṇa mayi_mad sthitam_sthā eva_eva ātma--_ātman yogāt_yoga nija--_nija acintya--_acintya śaktyā_śakti me_mad mama_mad yat_yad rūpam_rūpa tvad--_tvad anyena_anya janena_jana pūrvam_pūrvam na_na dṛṣṭam_dṛś tad--_tad prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga idānīm_idānīm tu_tu anyaiḥ_anya api_api deva--_deva ādibhiḥ_ādi dṛṣṭam_dṛś bhakti--_bhakti dṛśyam_dṛś mama_mad tad--_tad svarūpam_svarūpa bhaktam_bhaj tvām_tvad prati_prati pradarśayatā_pradarśay mayā_mad tvad--_tvad dṛṣṭasya_dṛṣṭa bahu--_bahu sākṣika--_sākṣika tvāya_tva deva--_deva ādibhyaḥ_ādi api_api bhaktimadbhyaḥ_bhaktimat yat_yad tu_tu gaja--_gaja sāhvaye_sāhvaya duryodhana--_duryodhana ādibhiḥ_ādi
api_api viśvarūpam_viśvarūpa dṛṣṭam_dṛś tat_tad na_na īdṛgvidham_īdṛgvidha iti_iti tvad--_tvad anyena_anya na_na dṛṣṭa--_dṛś pūrvam_pūrva iti_iti uktam_vac

lg.l: na_na veda--_veda yajña--_yajña adhyayanaiḥ_adhyayana na_na dānaiḥ_dāna
na_na ca_ca kriyābhiḥ_kriyā na_na tapobhiḥ_tapas ugraiḥ_ugra
evaṃrūpaḥ_evaṃrūpa śakya_śakya aham_mad nṛ--_nṛ loke_loka
draṣṭum_dṛś tvad--_tvad anyena_anya kuru--_kuru pravīra_pravīra

div.p: asi_as āha_ah veda_vid veda--_veda adhyayanam_adhyayana a_a vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka yajña--_yajña adhyayanasya_adhyayana abhāvāt_abhāva yajña--_yajña śabdena_śabda yajña--_yajña vidyāḥ_vidyā kalpa--_kalpa sūtra--_sūtra ādyāḥ_ādya lakṣyante_lakṣay vedānām_veda yajña--_yajña vidyānām_vidyā ca_ca adhyayanaiḥ_adhyayana iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na ca_ca dānaiḥ_dāna na_na ca_ca kriyābhiḥ_kriyā agnihotra--_agnihotra ādibhiḥ_ādi na_na ca_ca ugraiḥ_ugra tapobhiḥ_tapas cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi evaṃrūpaḥ_evaṃrūpa aham_mad tvattaḥ_tvad anyena_anya manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka draṣṭum_dṛś śakyaḥ_śakya api_api tu_tu tvam_tvad eva_eva kevalam_kevalam mad--_mad prasādena_prasāda dṛṣṭvā_dṛś kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha asi_as 48_48

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etad--_etad rūpa--_rūpa darśana--_darśana ātmakam_ātmaka ati_ati durlabham_durlabha mad--_mad prasādam_prasāda labdhvā_labh kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha eva_eva asi_as tvam_tvad iti_iti āha_ah na_na veda_vid iti_iti vedānām_veda caturṇām_catur api_api adhyayanaiḥ_adhyayana akṣara--_akṣara grahaṇa--_grahaṇa rūpaiḥ_rūpa tathā_tathā mīmāṃsā--_mīmāṃsā kalpa--_kalpa sūtra--_sūtra ādi--_ādi dvārā_dvār yajñānām_yajña veda--_veda bodhita--_bodhay karmaṇām_karman adhayayanaiḥ_adhayayana artha--_artha vicāra--_vicāra rūpaiḥ_rūpa veda--_veda yajña--_yajña adhyayanaiḥ_adhyayana dānaiḥ_dāna tulī--_tulī puruṣa--_puruṣa ādibhiḥ_ādi kriyābhiḥ_kriyā agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi--_ādi śrauta--_śrauta karmabhiḥ_karman tapobhiḥ_tapas kṛcchra--_kṛcchra cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi ugraiḥ_ugra kāya--_kāya indriya--_indriya śoṣaka--_śoṣaka tvena_tva duṣkaraiḥ_duṣkara evaṃrūpaḥ_evaṃrūpa aham_mad na_na śakyaḥ_śakya nṛ--_nṛ loke_loka manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka draṣṭum_dṛś tvad--_tvad anyena_anya mad--_mad anugraha--_anugraha hīnena_hā he_he kuru--_kuru pravīra_pravīra chāndasaḥ_chāndasa pratyekam_pratyekam na_na kāra--_kāra abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa niṣedha--_niṣedha dāḍhyāya_dāḍhya na_na ca_ca kriyābhiḥ_kriyā iti_iti atra_atra ca-kārāt_ca-kāra anukta--_anukta sādhana--_sādhana antara--_antara samuccayaḥ_samuccaya 48_48

āha_ah tvattaḥ_tvad anyena_anya na_na kena_ka api_api aham_mad evaṃrūpaḥ_evaṃrūpa draṣṭum_dṛś śakyaḥ_śakya śakyaḥ_śakya aham_mad iti_iti yad--_yad dvaya--_dvaya lopau_lopa ārṣau_ārṣa tasmāt_tasmāt alabhya--_alabhya lābham_lābha ātmanaḥ_ātman matvā_man tvam_tvad asmin_idam eva_eva īśvare_īśvara sarva--_sarva durlabhe_durlabha rūpe_rūpa manaḥ--_manas niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā kuru_kṛ etad--_etad rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś api_api alam_alam te_tvad punar_punar me_mad mānuṣa--_mānuṣa rūpeṇa_rūpa didṛkṣitena_didṛkṣita iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 48_48

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣa--_śīrṣan ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa aiśvara--_aiśvara rūpasya_rūpa pumartha--_pumartha tām_tā āha_ah na_na veda_vid iti_iti vedānām_veda adhyayanaiḥ_adhyayana akṣara--_akṣara grahaṇaiḥ_grahaṇa yajñānām_yajña adhayayanaiḥ_adhayayana mīmāṃśā--_mīmāṃśā kalpa--_kalpa sūtrebhyaḥ_sūtra arpaṇaiḥ_arpaṇa kriyābhiḥ_kriyā agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi--_ādi karmabhiḥ_karman tapobhiḥ_tapas kṛcchra--_kṛcchra ādibhiḥ_ādi ugraiḥ_ugra deha--_deha śoṣaka--_śoṣaka tvena_tva duṣkaraiḥ_duṣkara ebhiḥ_idam kevalaiḥ_kevala veda--_veda adhyayana--_adhyayana ādibhiḥ_ādi bhakti--_bhakti yuktāt_yuj tvattaḥ_tvad anyena_anya bhakti--_bhakti riktena_ric kena_ka api_api puṃsā_puṃs evaṃrūpaḥ_evaṃrūpa aham_mad draṣṭum_dṛś na_na śakyaḥ_śakya bhaktim_bhakti vinā_vinā bhūtāni_bhū veda--_veda adhyayana--_adhyayana ādīni_ādi mad--_mad darśana--_darśana sādhanāni_sādhana na_na yat_yad uktam_vac
dharmaḥ_dharma satya--_satya ādayaḥ_ādi upetaḥ_upe vidyā_vidyā vā_vā tapasā_tapas anvitā_anvita mad--_mad bhaktyā_bhakti apetam_ape ātmānam_ātman na_na samyak_samyak prapunāti_prapū hi_hi

tvayā_tvad tu_tu bhaktimatā_bhaktimat dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś eva_eva aham_mad anyaiḥ_anya ca_ca bhaktimadbhiḥ_bhaktimat deva--_deva ādibhiḥ_ādi śakyaḥ_śakya aham_mad iti_iti vaktavye_vac visarga--_visarga lopaḥ_lopa chāndasaḥ_chāndasa nṛ--_nṛ loke_loka iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti tad--_tad loke_loka tad--_tad bhaktāḥ_bhakta devāḥ_deva bahavaḥ_bahu tat_tad draṣṭum_dṛś śaknuvanti_śak iti_iti uktam_vac 48_48

lg.l: te_tvad vyathā_vyathā vimūḍha--_vimuh bhāvo_bhāva
dṛṣṭvā_dṛś rūpam_rūpa ghoram_ghora īdṛś_īdṛś mama_mad idam_idam
vyapeta--_vyape bhīḥ_bhī prīta--_prī manāḥ_manas punar_punar tvam_tvad
tat_tad eva_eva me_mad rūpam_rūpa idam_idam prapaśya_prapaś

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara evam_evam api_api ced_ced tava_tvad idam_idam ghoram_ghora rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś vyathā_vyathā bhavati_bhū tarhi_tarhi tat_tad eva_eva rūpam_rūpa darśayāmi_darśay iti_iti āha_ah mā_mā te_tvad iti_iti īdṛś_īdṛś īdṛśam_īdṛśa ghoram_ghora madīyam_madīya rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś te_tvad ā_ā te_tvad vyathā_vyathā mā_mā astu_as vimūḍha--_vimuh bhāvaḥ_bhāva vimūḍha--_vimuh tvam_tva ca_ca mā_mā astu_as vigata--_vigam bhayaḥ_bhaya prīta--_prī manāḥ_manas ca_ca san_as punar_punar tvam_tvad tat_tad eva_eva idam_idam mama_mad rūpam_rūpa prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa paśya_paś 49_49

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam ghoram_ghora īdṛś_īdṛś aneka--_aneka bāhu--_bāhu ādi--_ādi yuktatvena_yuktatva bhayaṅkaram_bhayaṃkara mama_mad rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś sthitasya_sthā te_tvad tava_tvad yā_yad vyathā_vyathā bhaya--_bhaya nimittā_nimitta pīḍā_pīḍā sā_tad mā_mā bhūt_bhū tathā_tathā mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa darśane_darśana api_api yaḥ_yad vimūḍha--_vimuh bhāvaḥ_bhāva vyākula--_vyākula citta--_citta tvam_tva aparitoṣaḥ_aparitoṣa saḥ_tad api_api mā_mā bhūt_bhū kintu_kiṃtu vyapeta--_vyape bhīḥ_bhī apagata--_apagam bhayaḥ_bhaya prīta--_prī manāḥ_manas ca_ca san_as punar_punar tvam_tvad tat_tad eva_eva caturbhujam_caturbhuja vāsudeva--_vāsudeva tva--_tva ādi--_ādi viśiṣṭam_viśiṣ tvayā_tvad sadā_sadā pūrva--_pūrva dṛṣṭam_dṛś rūpam_rūpa idam_idam viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa upasaṃhāreṇa_upasaṃhāra santoṣeṇa_saṃtoṣa ca_ca paśya_paś 49_49

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha bhoḥ_bhoḥ parameśvara_parameśvara mām_mad tvam_tvad kim_kim na_na gṛhṇāsi_grah yat_yat an_an icchate_iṣ api_api mahyam_mad punar_punar idam_idam eva_eva balāt_bala ditsasi_dits dṛṣṭvā_dṛś idam_idam tava_tvad aiśvaryam_aiśvarya mama_mad gātrāṇi_gātra vyathante_vyath manaḥ_manas me_mad vyākulībhavati_vyākulībhū muhur_muhur aham_mad mūrcchāmi_mūrch tava_tvad asmai_idam parama--_parama aiśvaryāya_aiśvarya dūratas_dūratas eva_eva mama_mad namaḥ_namas namaḥ_namas astu_as na_na kadāpi_kadāpi aham_mad evam_evam draṣṭum_dṛś prārthayiṣye_prārthay kṣamasva_kṣam kṣamasva_kṣam tat_tad eva_eva mānuṣa--_mānuṣa ākāram_ākāra vapuḥ_vapus apūrva--_apūrva mādhurya--_mādhurya dhurya--_dhurya smita--_smita hasita--_hasita sudhā--_sudhā sāra--_sāra varṣi--_varṣin mukha--_mukha candram_candra me_mad darśaya_darśay darśaya_darśay iti_iti vyākulam_vyākula arjunam_arjuna prati_prati sa_sa āśvāsam_āśvāsa āha_ah mā_mā te_tvad iti_iti 49_49

baladevaḥ_baladeva yat_yad ca_ca tasmin_tad eva_eva mad--_mad rūpe_rūpa saṃhartṛ--_saṃhartṛ tvam_tva mayā_mad pradarśitam_pradarśay tat_tad khalu_khalu drapadī--_drapadī pragharṣaṇam_pragharṣaṇa vīkṣya_vīkṣ api_api tuṣṇīm_tuṣṇīm sthitāḥ_sthā bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādayaḥ_ādi sarve_sarva tad--_tad pragharṣaṇa--_pragharṣaṇa kupitena_kup mayā_mad eva_eva bodhayitum_bodhay atas_atas tena_tad tvam_tvad vyathitaḥ_vyath mā_mā abhūḥ_bhū iti_iti āha_ah mā_mā te_tvad vyathā_vyathā iti_iti tat_tad eva_eva catur--_catur bhujam_bhuja prārthita--_prārthay rūpam_rūpa 49_49

saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac
iti_iti arjunam_arjuna vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva tathā_tathā uktvā_vac
svakam_svaka rūpam_rūpa darśayām_darśay āsa_as bhūyas_bhūyas
āśvāsayām_āśvāsay āsa_as ca_ca bhītam_bhī enam_enad
bhūtvā_bhū punar_punar saumya--_saumya vapuḥ_vapus mahātmā_mahātman

śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara evam_evam uktvā_vac prāktanam_prāktana eva_eva rūpam_rūpa mad--_mad sakham_sakha prasannam_prasad tava_tvad saumyam_saumya janārdanaḥ_janārdana idānīm_idānīm adhunā_adhunā asmi_as saṃvṛttaḥ_saṃvṛt saṃjātaḥ_saṃjan kim_ka sa_sa cetāḥ_cetas prasanna--_prasad cittaḥ_citta prakṛtim_prakṛti svabhāvam_svabhāva gataḥ_gam ca_ca asmi_as
div.l: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva arjunam_arjuna iti_iti prāc--_prāñc uktam_vac uktvā_vac yathā_yathā pūrvam_pūrvam āsīt_as tathā_tathā svakam_svaka rūpam_rūpa kirīṭa--_kirīṭa makara--_makara kuṇḍala--_kuṇḍala gadā--_gadā cakra--_cakra ādi--_ādi yuktam_yuj caturbhujam_caturbhuja śrīvatsa--_śrīvatsa kaustubha--_kaustubha vanamālā--_vanamālā pīta--_pīta ambara--_ambara ādi--_ādi āśvāsayāmāsa_āśvāsay ca_ca bhītam_bhī enam_enad arjunam_arjuna bhūtvā_bhū punar_punar pūrvavat_pūrvavat saumya--_saumya vapuḥ_vapus anugra--_anugra śarīraḥ_śarīra mahātmā_mahātman parama--_parama kāruṇikaḥ_kāruṇika sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña iti_iti ādi--_ādi kalyāṇa--_kalyāṇa guṇa--_guṇa ākaraḥ_ākara
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yathā_yathā sva--_sva aṃśasya_aṃśa mahā--_mahat ugra--_ugra rūpam_rūpa darśayāmāsa_darśay tathā_tathā mahā--_mahat madhuram_madhura svakam_svaka rūpam_rūpa caturbhujam_caturbhuja kirīṭa--_kirīṭa gadā--_gadā cakra--_cakra ādi--_ādi yuktam_yuj tad--_tad prārthitam_prārthay madhura--_madhura aiśvarya--_aiśvarya mayam_maya bhūyas_bhūyas darśayāmāsa_darśay tatas_tatas punar_punar sa_tad mahātmā_mahātman somya--_somya vapuḥ_vapus kaṭaka--_kaṭaka kuṇḍala--_kuṇḍala uṣṇīṣa--_uṣṇīṣa pīta--_pīta ambara--_ambara dharaḥ_dhara dvi--_dvi bhujaḥ_bhuja bhūtvā_bhū bhītam_bhī enam_enad āśvāsayāmāsa_āśvāsay

baladevaḥ_baladeva tatas_tatas yat_yad abhūt_bhū tat_tad saṃjayaḥ_saṃjaya uvāca_vac iti_iti arjunam_arjuna iti_iti vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva arjunam_arjuna prati_prati pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac uktvā_vac yathā_yathā saṅkalpena_saṃkalpa eva_eva sahasra--_sahasra śiraskam_śiraska rūpam_rūpa darśitavān_darśay tathā_tathā eva_eva svakam_svaka nīlotpala--_nīlotpala śyāmala--_śyāmala tva--_tva ādi--_ādi guṇakam_guṇaka devakī--_devakī putra--_putra lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa catur--_catur bhujam_bhuja rūpam_rūpa sundara--_sundara vigrahaḥ_vigraha bhūtvā_bhū bhītam_bhī enam_enad arjunam_arjuna punar_punar āśvāsayāmāsa_āśvāsay mahātmā_mahātman udāra--_udāra manā_manas

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
dṛṣṭvā_dṛś idam_idam mānuṣam_mānuṣa rūpam_rūpa tava_tvad saumyam_saumya janārdana_janārdana
idānīm_idānīm asmi_as saṃvṛttaḥ_saṃvṛt sa_sa cetāḥ_cetas prakṛtim_prakṛti gataḥ_gam

div.p: uvāca_vac asmi_as asmi_as

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatas_tatas nirbhayaḥ_nirbhaya san_as arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac dṛṣṭvā_dṛś idam_idam iti_iti idānīm_idānīm sa_sa cetāḥ_cetas bhaya--_bhaya kṛta--_kṛ vyāmoha--_vyāmoha abhāvena_abhāva avyākula--_avyākula cittaḥ_citta saṃvṛttaḥ_saṃvṛt asmi_as tathā_tathā prakṛtim_prakṛti bhaya--_bhaya kṛta--_kṛ vyathā--_vyathā rāhityena_rāhitya
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatas_tatas ca_ca mahā--_mahat madhura--_madhura mūrtim_mūrti kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa ālokya_ālokay ānanda--_ānanda sindhu--_sindhu snātaḥ_snā san_as āha_ah idānīm_idānīm eva_eva aham_mad sa_sa cetāḥ_cetas saṃvṛttaḥ_saṃvṛt sa_sa cetaḥ_cetas abhuvam_bhū prakṛtim_prakṛti gataḥ_gam svāsthyam_svāsthya prāptaḥ_prāp asmi_as
div.p:
