baladevaḥ_baladeva tatas_tatas nirvyathaḥ_nirvyatha prasanna--_prasad manāḥ_manas san_as arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac dṛṣṭvā_dṛś idam_idam iti_iti he_he janārdana_janārdana tava_tvad idam_idam saumyam_saumya manojñam_manojña catur--_catur bhujam_bhuja rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭvā_dṛś aham_mad idānīm_idānīm sa_sa cetāḥ_cetas prasanna--_prasad cittaḥ_citta prakṛtim_prakṛti vyathā--_vyathā ādi--_ādi abhāvena_abhāva svāsthyam_svāsthya ca_ca gataḥ_gam saṃvṛttaḥ_saṃvṛt jātaḥ_jan asmi_as kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa rūpam_rūpa iti_iti āha_ah mānuṣam_mānuṣa iti_iti sa_tad hi_hi yaduṣu_yadu pāṇḍaveṣu_pāṇḍava dvi--_dvi bhujaḥ_bhuja kadācid_kadācid catur--_catur bhujaḥ_bhuja ca_ca krīḍati_krīḍ tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya rūpasya_rūpa asya_idam mānuṣa--_mānuṣa vat_vat saṃsthānāt_saṃsthāna ceṣṭitāt_ceṣṭita ca_ca mānuṣa--_mānuṣa bhāvena_bhāva eva_eva
vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa iti_iti prāk_prāk abhāṣi_bhāṣ

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
su_su durdarśam_durdarśa idam_idam rūpam_rūpa dṛṣṭavān_dṛś asi_as yat_yad mama_mad
devāḥ_deva api_api asya_idam rūpasya_rūpa nityam_nityam darśana--_darśana kāṅkṣiṇaḥ_kāṅkṣin

div.p: darśayana_darśay uvāca_vac yat_yad mama_mad viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa tvam_tvad dṛṣṭavān_dṛś asi_as idam_idam su_su durdarśam_durdarśa atyantam_atyantam draṣṭum_dṛś aśakyam_aśakya yatas_yatas devāḥ_deva api_api asya_idam rūpasya_rūpa nityam_nitya sarvadā_sarvadā darśanam_darśana icchanti_iṣ kevalam_kevala na_na punar_punar idam_idam paśyanti_paś 52_52

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sva--_sva kṛtasya_kṛ anugrahasya_anugraha ati_ati durlabha--_durlabha tvam_tva darśayan_darśay śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac su_su durdarśam_durdarśa iti_iti caturbhiḥ_catur mama_mad yat_yad rūpam_rūpa idānīm_idānīm tvam_tvad dṛṣṭavān_dṛś asi_as idam_idam viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa su_su durdarśam_durdarśa atyantam_atyantam draṣṭum_dṛś aśakyam_aśakya yatas_yatas devāḥ_deva api_api asya_idam rūpasya_rūpa nityam_nityam sarvadā_sarvadā darśana--_darśana kāṅkṣiṇaḥ_kāṅkṣin na_na tu_tu tvam_tvad iva_iva pūrvam_pūrvam dṛṣṭavantaḥ_dṛś na_na vā_vā agre_agre drakṣyanti_dṛś iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya darśana--_darśana ākāṅkṣāyāḥ_ākāṅkṣā nitya--_nitya tva--_tva ukteḥ_ukti 52_52

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha darśitasya_darśay sva--_sva rūpasya_rūpa māhātmyam_māhātmya āha_ah su_su durdarśam_durdarśa iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri devatāḥ_devatā api_api asya_idam darśana--_darśana ākāṅkṣiṇaḥ_ākāṅkṣin eva_eva na_na tu_tu darśanam_darśana labhante_labh tvam_tvad tu_tu na_na eva_eva idam_idam api_api spṛhayasi_spṛhay mad--_mad mūla--_mūla svarūpa--_svarūpa nara--_nara ākāra--_ākāra mahā--_mahat mādhurya--_mādhurya nitya--_nitya āsvādine_āsvādin tvad--_tvad cakṣuse_cakṣus katham_katham etat_etad cora--_cora tām_tā ataeva_ataeva mayā_mad divyam_divya dadāmi_dā te_tvad cakṣuḥ_cakṣus iti_iti divyam_divya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus dattam_dā kintu_kiṃtu divya--_divya cakṣuḥ_cakṣus iva_iva divyam_divya manaḥ_manas na_na dattam_dā ataeva_ataeva divya--_divya cakṣuṣā_cakṣus api_api tvayā_tvad na_na samyak_samyak tayā_tā rocitam_rocay mad--_mad mānuṣa--_mānuṣa rūpa--_rūpa mahā--_mahat mādhurya--_mādhurya eka--_eka grāhi--_grāhin manaska--_manaska tvāt_tva yadi_yadi divyam_divya manaḥ_manas api_api tubhyam_tvad adāsyam_dā tadā_tadā deva--_deva lokaḥ_loka iva_iva bhavān_bhavat api_api etat_etad viśvarūpa_viśvarūpa pūruṣa--_pūruṣa svarūpam_svarūpa arocayiṣyat_rocay eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 52_52

baladevaḥ_baladeva mayā_mad pradarśitam_pradarśay na_na veda--_veda yajña--_yajña adhyayaniḥ_adhyayani iti_iti ādinā_ādi ślāghitam_ślāgh ca_ca sahasra--_sahasra śiraskam_śiraska mad--_mad rūpam_rūpa śraddadhānaḥ_śraddhā mad--_mad priya--_priya sakhaḥ_sakha arjunaḥ_arjuna manuṣya--_manuṣya bhāva--_bhāva bhāvite_bhāvay śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇe_kṛṣṇa mayi_mad kadācid_kadācid svaka--_svaka rūpasya_rūpa parama--_parama puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha tām_tā upadiśati_upadiś su_su durdarśam_durdarśa iti_iti sahasra--_sahasra śiraskam_śiraska mad--_mad rūpam_rūpa durdarśam_durdarśa eva_eva idam_idam ca_ca mama_mad kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa rūpam_rūpa su_su durdarśam_durdarśa na_na aham_mad prakāśaḥ_prakāśa sarvasya_sarva iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti yat_yad tvam_tvad sucirāt_sucirāt dṛṣṭavān_dṛś asi_as katham_katham evam_evam prati_prati emi_i iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah devāḥ_deva api_api asya_idam iti_iti etat_etad ca_ca daśama--_daśama ādau_ādi garbha--_garbha stuti--_stuti ādinā_ādi prasiddham_prasidh eva_eva 52_52

lg.l: na_na aham_mad vedaiḥ_veda na_na tapasā_tapas na_na dānena_dāna na_na ca_ca ijyayā_ijyā
śakyaḥ_śakya evaṃvidhaḥ_evaṃvidha draṣṭum_dṛś dṛṣṭavān_dṛś asi_as mām_mad yathā_yathā

div.p: āha_ah _ _ _

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kasmāt_kasmāt devāḥ_deva etad--_etad rūpam_rūpa na_na dṛṣṭavantaḥ_dṛś na_na vā_vā drakṣyanti_dṛś mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti śūnyatvāt_śūnyatva iti_iti āha_ah na_na aham_mad iti_iti na_na veda--_veda yajña--_yajña adhyayanaiḥ_adhyayana iti_iti ādinā_ādi gatārthaḥ_gatārtha ślokaḥ_śloka parama--_parama durlabha--_durlabha tva--_tva khyāpanāya_khyāpana
div.l: spṛhayanti_spṛhay pratīhi_pratī āha_ah
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva su_su durlabha--_durlabha tām_tā āha_ah na_na aham_mad iti_iti evaṃvidhaḥ_evaṃvidha devakī--_devakī sūnuḥ_sūnu caturbhujaḥ_caturbhuja tvad--_tvad sakhaḥ_sakha aham_mad veda--_veda ādibhiḥ_ādi api_api sādhanaiḥ_sādhana kena_ka api_api puṃsā_puṃs bhakti--_bhakti śūnyena_śūnya draṣṭum_dṛś na_na śakyaḥ_śakya yathā_yathā tvam_tvad mām_mad

lg.l: bhaktyā_bhakti tu_tu an_an anyayā_anya śakya_śakya aham_mad evaṃvidhaḥ_evaṃvidha arjuna_arjuna
jñātum_jñā draṣṭum_dṛś ca_ca tattvena_tattva praveṣṭum_praviś ca_ca paraṃtapa_paraṃtapa

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tarhi_tarhi kena_ka upāyena_upāya tvam_tvad draṣṭum_dṛś śakyaḥ_śakya iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah bhaktyā_bhakti tu_tu iti_iti ananyayā_ananya mad--_mad eka--_eka niṣṭhayā_niṣṭhā bhaktyā_bhakti tu_tu evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta viśvarūpaḥ_viśvarūpa aham_mad tattvena_tattva paramārthataḥ_paramārtha jñātum_jñā śakyaḥ_śakya śāstrataḥ_śāstra draṣṭum_dṛś pratyakṣataḥ_pratyakṣa praveṣṭum_praviś ca_ca tādātmyena_tādātmya śakyaḥ_śakya na_na anyaiḥ_anya upāyaiḥ_upāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yadi_yadi veda--_veda tapaḥ--_tapas dāna--_dāna ijyābhiḥ_ijyā draṣṭum_dṛś aśakyaḥ_aśakya tvam_tvad tarhi_tarhi kena_ka upāyena_upāya draṣṭum_dṛś śakyaḥ_śakya asi_as iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah bhaktyā_bhakti iti_iti sādhana--_sādhana anantara--_anantara vyāvṛtti--_vyāvṛtti arthaḥ_artha śabdaḥ_śabda bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva ananyayā_ananya mad--_mad eka--_eka niṣṭhayā_niṣṭhā niratiśaya--_niratiśaya prītyā_prīti evaṃvidhaḥ_evaṃvidha divya--_divya rūpa--_rūpa dharaḥ_dhara aham_mad jñātum_jñā śakyaḥ_śakya ananyayā_ananya bhaktyā_bhakti kintu_kiṃtu tattvena_tattva draṣṭum_dṛś ca_ca svarūpeṇa_svarūpa sākṣātkartum_sākṣātkṛ ca_ca śakyaḥ_śakya vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana paripākeṇa_paripāka tatas_tatas ca_ca svarūpa--_svarūpa sākṣātkārāt_sākṣātkāra avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya nivṛttau_nivṛtti tattvena_tattva praveṣṭum_praviś ca_ca mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa tayā_tā eva_eva asum_asu ca_ca aham_mad śakyaḥ_śakya he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa ajñāna--_ajñāna śatru--_śatru damana--_damana iti_iti praveśa--_praveśa yogyatā_yogyatā sūcayati_sūcay

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tarhi_tarhi kena_ka sādhanena_sādhana evam_evam prāpyate_prāp iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah bhaktyā_bhakti tu_tu iti_iti śakyaḥ_śakya aham_mad iti_iti ca_ca yat_yat yadi_yadi nirvāṇa--_nirvāṇa mokṣa--_mokṣa icchā_icchā bhavet_bhū tadā_tadā tattvena_tattva brahma--_brahman svarūpa--_svarūpa tvena_tva praveṣṭum_praviś api_api ananyayā_ananya bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva śakyaḥ_śakya na_na anyathā_anyathā jñāninām_jñānin guṇībhūtā_guṇībhū api_api bhaktiḥ_bhakti antima--_antima samaye_samaya jñāna--_jñāna saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa an_an antaram_antara urvaritā--_urvaritā allīyasī_allīyas ananyā_ananya eva_eva bhavet_bhū tayā_tad eva_eva teṣām_tad sāyujyam_sāyujya bhavet_bhū iti_iti tatas_tatas mām_mad tattvataḥ_tattva jñātvā_jñā viśate_viś tad--_tad anantaram_anantaram iti_iti

āha_ah evaṃvidhaḥ_evaṃvidha devakī--_devakī sūnuḥ_sūnu caturbhujaḥ_caturbhuja aham_mad ananyayā_ananya mad--_mad ekāntayā_ekānta bhaktyā_bhakti tu_tu veda--_veda ādibhiḥ_ādi tattvataḥ_tattva jñātum_jñā śakyaḥ_śakya draṣṭum_dṛś pratyakṣam_pratyakṣa kartum_kṛ tattvataḥ_tattva praveṣṭum_praviś saṃyoktum_saṃyuj ca_ca śakyaḥ_śakya puram_pura praviśati_praviś iti_iti atra_atra pura--_pura saṃyogaḥ_saṃyoga eva_eva pratīyate_pratī tatra_tatra vedaḥ_veda gopāla--_gopāla upaniṣad_upaniṣad tapaḥ_tapas mad--_mad janma_janman aṣṭamī--_aṣṭamī ekādaśī--_ekādaśī ādi--_ādi upoṣaṇam_upoṣaṇa dānam_dāna mad--_mad bhakta--_bhakta sampradānakam_sampradānaka sva--_sva bhogyānām_bhogya arpaṇam_arpaṇa ijyā_ijyā mad--_mad mūrti--_mūrti pūjā_pūjā śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah yasya_yad deve_deva parā_para bhaktiḥ_bhakti iti_iti ādyā_ādya tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda atra_atra bhinna--_bhid upakrama--_upakrama arthaḥ_artha na_na ca_ca su_su durdarśam_durdarśa iti_iti ādi--_ādi trayam_traya sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣa--_śīrṣa rūpa--_rūpa param_para iti_iti vācyam_vac iti_iti arjunam_arjuna iti_iti ādi--_ādi dvayasya_dvaya nara--_nara ākṛti--_ākṛti caturbhuja--_caturbhuja svarūpa--_svarūpa parasya_para avyavahita--_avyavahita pūrva--_pūrva tvāt_tva tad--_tad dvayena_dvaya sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣa--_śīrṣa rūpasya_rūpa vyavadhānāt_vyavadhāna ca_ca tatra_tatra yasya_yad tad--_tad eka--_eka vākya--_vākya tāyām_tā na_na aham_mad vedaiḥ_veda iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi paunaruktya--_paunaruktya āpatteḥ_āpatti ca_ca

yat_yad tu_tu divya--_divya dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi dānena_dāna liṅgena_liṅga nara--_nara ākārāt_ākāra catur--_catur bhujāt_bhuja sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣṇaḥ_śīrṣan deva--_deva ākārasya_ākāra utkarṣam_utkarṣa āha_ah tat_tad avicārita--_avicārita abhidhānam_abhidhāna eva_eva deva--_deva ākārasya_ākāra tasya_tad catur--_catur bhuja--_bhuja nara--_nara ākāra--_ākāra adhīna--_adhīna tattvam_tattva ca_ca tasya_tad yuktam_yuj eva_eva yaḥ_yad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa arṇava--_arṇava jale_jala bhajati_bhaj sma_sma yoga--_yoga nidrām_nidrā iti_iti smaraṇāt_smaraṇa idam_idam nara--_nara ākṛti--_ākṛti kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa rūpam_rūpa saccidānandam_saccidānanda sarva--_sarva vedānta--_vedānta vedyam_vid vibhum_vibhu sarvāvatāri_sarvāvatārin iti_iti pratyetavyam_pratī

lg.l: sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda rūpāya_rūpa kṛṣṇāya_kṛṣṇa akliṣṭa--_akliṣṭa kāriṇe_kārin
namaḥ_namas vedānta--_vedānta vedyāya_vid gurave_guru buddhi--_buddhi sākṣiṇe_sākṣin

div.p: kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa vai_vai paramam_parama daivatam_daivata ekaḥ_eka vaśī_vaśin sarva--_sarva gaḥ_ga kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa īḍyaḥ_īḍ ekaḥ_eka api_api san_as bahudhā_bahudhā yaḥ_yad avabhāti_avabhā iti_iti ādi_ādi śravaṇāt_śravaṇa

lg.l: anādiḥ_anādi ādiḥ_ādi govindaḥ_govinda sarva--_sarva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa kāraṇam_kāraṇa

div.p: yatra_yatra avatīrṇam_avatṛ kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa ākhyam_ākhyā param_para brahma_brahman nara--_nara ākṛti_ākṛti ete_etad ca_ca aṃśa--_aṃśa kalāḥ_kalā puṃsaḥ_puṃs kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa tu_tu bhagavān_bhagavant svayam_svayam iti_iti ādi_ādi smaraṇāt_smaraṇa ca_ca

atra_atra api_api svayam_svayam eva_eva uktam_vac mattaḥ_mad parataram_paratara na_na anyat_anya iti_iti aham_mad ādiḥ_ādi hi_hi devānām_deva iti_iti ādi_ādi ca_ca arjunena_arjuna ca_ca param_para brahma_brahman param_para dhāma_dhāman iti_iti ādi_ādi tasmāt_tasmāt ati_ati prabhāveṇa_prabhāva saṃkrānte_saṃkram sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣṇi_śīrṣan rūpe_rūpa tena_tena saṃkrāntā_saṃkram eva_eva dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi grāhiṇī_grāhin yuktā_yuj na_na tu_tu ati_ati saundarya--_saundarya lāvaṇya--_lāvaṇya nidhi--_nidhi nara--_nara ākṛti--_ākṛti kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa rūpān_rūpa bhāvinī_bhāvin dṛṣṭiḥ_dṛṣṭi tatra_tatra arjuna--_arjuna cakṣuṣi_cakṣus tādṛś--_tādṛś rūpa--_rūpa grāhi_grāhin tejaḥ--_tejas tvam_tva eva_eva saṃkramitam_saṃkramay iti_iti mantavyam_man na_na tu_tu yukti--_yukti ābhāsa--_ābhāsa lābhena_lābha haituka--_haituka tvam_tva svīkāryam_svīkṛ na_na ca_ca arjunaḥ_arjuna api_api anya--_anya manuṣya--_manuṣya vat_vat carma--_carman cakṣuṣkaḥ_cakṣuṣka karma--_karman udbhūtayā_udbhū vidyayā_vidyā sa_sa niṣṭhaiḥ_niṣṭhā sahasra--_sahasra śiraskam_śiraska rūpam_rūpa labhyam_labh iti_iti durdarśam_durdarśa tat_tad nara--_nara ākṛti--_ākṛti kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa rūpam_rūpa tu_tu ananyayā_ananya bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva iti_iti su_su durdarśam_durdarśa tat_tad uktam_vac

lg.l: mad--_mad karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt mad--_mad paramaḥ_parama mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta saṅga--_saṅga varjitaḥ_varjay
nirvairaḥ_nirvaira sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta yaḥ_yad sa_tad mām_mad eti_i pāṇḍava_pāṇḍava

div.p: śṛṇu_śru āha_ah mad--_mad artham_artha karma_karman karoti_kṛ iti_iti mad--_mad karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt aham_mad eva_eva paramaḥ_parama puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha yasya_yad saḥ_tad mama_mad eva_eva bhaktaḥ_bhakta āśritaḥ_āśri putra--_putra ādiṣu_ādi saṅga--_saṅga varjitaḥ_varjay nirvairaḥ_nirvaira ca_ca sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta evam_evam bhūtaḥ_bhū yaḥ_yad sa_tad mām_mad prāpnoti_prāp na_na anyaḥ_anya iti_iti 55_55

lg.l: devaiḥ_deva api_api su_su durdarśam_durdarśa tapaḥ--_tapas yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi koṭibhiḥ_koṭi
bhaktāya_bhakta bhagavān_bhagavant evam_evam viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa adarśayat_darśay

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa darśam_darśa nāma_nāma ekādaśaḥ_ekādaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_adhunā sarvasya_sarva gītā--_gītā śāstrasya_śāstra sāra--_sāra bhūtaḥ_bhū arthaḥ_artha niḥśreyasa--_niḥśreyasa arthinām_arthin anuṣṭhānāya_anuṣṭhāna puñjīkṛtya_puñjīkṛ ucyate_vac mat_mad iti_iti mad--_mad artham_artha karma_karman veda--_veda vihitam_vidhā karoti_kṛ iti_iti mad--_mad karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi kāmanāyām_kāmanā satyām_as katham_katham evam_evam iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah mad--_mad paramaḥ_parama aham_mad eva_eva paramaḥ_parama prāptavya--_prāp tvena_tva niścitaḥ_niści na_na tu_tu svarga--_svarga ādiḥ_ādi yasya_yad saḥ_tad ataeva_ataeva mad--_mad prāpti--_prāpti āśayā_āśā mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta sarvaiḥ_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra mama_mad bhajana--_bhajana paraḥ_para putra--_putra ādiṣu_ādi snehe_sneha sati_as katham_katham evam_evam syāt_as iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah saṅga--_saṅga varjitaḥ_varjay bāhya--_bāhya vastu--_vastu spṛhā--_spṛhā śūnyaḥ_śūnya śatruṣu_śatru dveṣe_dveṣa sati_as katham_katham evam_evam syāt_as iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah nivairaḥ_nivaira sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta apakāriṣu_apakārin api_api dveṣa--_dveṣa śūnyaḥ_śūnya yaḥ_yad sa_tad mām_mad eti_i abhedena_abheda he_he pāṇḍava_pāṇḍava ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha tvayā_tvad jñātum_jñā iṣṭaḥ_iṣ mayā_mad upadiṣṭaḥ_upadiś na_na atas_atas param_param kiṃcid_kaścit kartavyam_kṛ asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 55_55

śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍha--_guh artha--_artha dīpikāyām_dīpikā viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa darśana--_darśana nirūpaṇam_nirūpaṇa nāma_nāma ekādaśaḥ_ekādaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
āha_ah

lg.l: kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa eva_eva mahā--_mahat aiśvaryam_aiśvarya mama_mad eva_eva asmin_idam raṇe_raṇa jayaḥ_jaya
iti_iti arjunaḥ_arjuna niścikāya_niści iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha varṣiṇyām_varṣin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
gītāsu_gītā ekādaśaḥ_ekādaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva upadiśan_upadiś upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ mad--_mad sambandhinī_sambandhin mad--_mad mandira--_mandira nirmāṇa--_nirmāṇa tad--_tad vimārjana--_vimārjana mad--_mad puṣpa--_puṣpa bāṭī--_bāṭī tulasī--_tulasī kānana--_kānana saṃskāra--_saṃskāra tad--_tad sevana--_sevana ādīni_ādi karma--_karman ādīni_ādi karoti_kṛ iti_iti mad--_mad karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt mad--_mad paramaḥ_parama mām_mad eva_eva na_na tu_tu svarga--_svarga ādikam_ādika sva--_sva pumartham_pumartha jānan_jñā saṅga--_saṅga varjitaḥ_varjay mad--_mad vimukha--_vimukha saṃsargam_saṃsarga asahamānaḥ_asahamāna sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta nirvairaḥ_nirvaira teṣu_tad api_api mad--_mad vimukheṣu_vimukha pratikūleṣu_pratikūla satsu_sat vaira--_vaira śūnyaḥ_śūnya sva--_sva kleśasya_kleśa sva--_sva pūrva--_pūrva karma--_karman nimittaka--_nimittaka tva--_tva vimarśena_vimarśa teṣu_tad vaira--_vaira nimitta--_nimitta abhāvāt_abhāva evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta yaḥ_yad mām_mad nara--_nara ākāram_ākāra kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa eti_i labhate_labh na_na anyaḥ_anya 55_55

lg.l: pūrṇaḥ_pṛ kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa avatāri--_avatārin tvāt_tva tad--_tad bhaktānām_bhakta jayaḥ_jaya raṇe_raṇa
bhārate_bhārata pāṇḍu--_pāṇḍu putrāṇām_putra iti_iti ekādaśa--_ekādaśan nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya ekādaśaḥ_ekādaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

BhG 12.1

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
evam_evam satata--_satata yuktāḥ_yuj ye_yad bhaktāḥ_bhakta tvām_tvad paryupāsate_paryupās
ye_yad ca_ca api_api akṣaram_akṣara avyaktam_avyakta teṣām_tad ke_ka yoga--_yoga vittamāḥ_vittama
nirguṇa--_nirguṇa upāsanasya_upāsana evam_evam sa_sa guṇa--_guṇa upāsanasya_upāsana ca_ca
śreyaḥ_śreyas katarat_katara iti_iti etat_etad nirṇetum_nirṇī dvādaśa--_dvādaśan udyamaḥ_udyama

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta mad--_mad karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt mad--_mad parama_parama iti_iti evam_evam bhakti--_bhakti niṣṭhasya_niṣṭha śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvam_tva uktam_vac kaunteya_kaunteya pratijānīhi_pratijñā iti_iti tathā_tathā teṣām_tad jñānī_jñānin nitya--_nitya yuktaḥ_yuj eka--_eka bhaktiḥ_bhakti viśiṣyata_viśiṣ santariṣyasi_saṃtṛ evam_evam ubhayoḥ_ubhaya śraiṣṭhye_śraiṣṭhya api_api viśeṣa--_viśeṣa jijñāsayā_jijñāsā śrī--_śrī bhagavantam_bhagavant prati_prati arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac evam_evam iti_iti evam_evam sarva--_sarva karma--_karman arpaṇa--_arpaṇa ādinā_ādi satata--_satata yuktāḥ_yuj tvad--_tvad niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā santaḥ_as ye_yad bhaktāḥ_bhakta tvām_tvad viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa sarvajñam_sarvajña sarva--_sarva śaktim_śakti paryupāsate_paryupās dhyāyanti_dhyā ye_yad ca_ca api_api akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman avyaktam_avyakta nirviśeṣam_nirviśeṣa upāsate_upās teṣām_tad ubhayeṣām_ubhaya madhye_madhya ke_ka atiśayena_atiśaya yoga--_yoga vidaḥ_vid atiśreṣṭhāḥ_atiśreṣṭha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta

mad--_mad karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt mad--_mad paramaḥ_parama mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta saṅga--_saṅga varjitaḥ_varjay
nirvairaḥ_nirvaira sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta yaḥ_yad sa_tad mām_mad eti_i pāṇḍava_pāṇḍava

tatra_tatra mad--_mad śabda--_śabda arthe_artha sandehaḥ_saṃdeha kim_kim nirākāram_nirākāra eva_eva sarva--_sarva svarūpam_svarūpa vastu_vastu mad--_mad chabdena_chabda uktam_vac bhagavatā_bhagavant kim_ka vā_vā sa_sa ākāram_ākāra iti_iti ubhayatra_ubhayatra api_api prayoga--_prayoga darśanāt_darśana

lg.l: bahūnām_bahu janmanām_janman ante_anta jñānavān_jñānavat mām_mad prapadyate_prapad
vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva sarvam_sarva iti_iti sa_tad mahātmā_mahātman su_su durlabhaḥ_durlabha

div.p: iti_iti ādau_ādi nirākāram_nirākāra vastu_vastu vyapadiṣṭam_vyapadiś viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa darśana--_darśana anantaram_anantaram ca_ca

lg.l: na_na aham_mad vedaiḥ_veda na_na tapasā_tapas na_na dānena_dāna na_na ca_ca ijyayā_ijyā
śakyaḥ_śakya evaṃvidhaḥ_evaṃvidha draṣṭum_dṛś dṛṣṭavān_dṛś asi_as mām_mad yathā_yathā

div.p: iti_iti sa_sa ākāram_ākāra vastu_vastu ubhayoḥ_ubhaya ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant upadeśayoḥ_upadeśa adhikāri--_adhikārin bhedena_bheda eva_eva vyavasthayā_vyavasthā bhavitavyam_bhū anyathā_anyathā virodhāt_virodha tatra_tatra evam_evam sati_as mayā_mad mumukṣuṇā_mumukṣu kim_ka nirākāram_nirākāra eva_eva vastu_vastu cintanīyam_cintay kim_ka vā_vā sa_sa ākāram_ākāra iti_iti sva--_sva adhikāra--_adhikāra niścayāya_niścaya sa_sa guṇa--_guṇa nirguṇa--_nirguṇa vidyayoḥ_vidyā viśeṣa--_viśeṣa bubhutsayā_bubhutsā arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac evam_evam iti_iti

evam_evam mad--_mad karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt iti_iti ādi--_ādi anantara--_anantara ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra satata--_satata yuktāḥ_yuj nairantaryeṇa_nairantarya bhagavat--_bhagavant karma--_karman ādau_ādi sāvadhāna--_sāvadhāna tayā_tā pravṛttāḥ_pravṛt bhaktāḥ_bhakta sa_sa ākāra--_ākāra vastu--_vastu eka--_eka śaraṇāḥ_śaraṇa santaḥ_as tvām_tvad evaṃvidham_evaṃvidha sa_sa cintayanti_cintay ye_yad ca_ca api_api sarvatas_sarvatas viraktāḥ_virañj tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva karmāṇaḥ_karman akṣaram_akṣara na_na kṣarati_kṣar aśnute_aś vā_vā iti_iti akṣaram_akṣara etat_etad vai_vai tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa abhivadanti_abhivad a_a sthūlam_sthūla an_an aṇu_aṇu a_a hrasvam_hrasva a_a dīrgham_dīrgha iti_iti ādi--_ādi nirguṇam_nirguṇa brahma_brahman ataeva_ataeva avyaktam_avyakta sarva--_sarva karaṇa--_karaṇa agocaram_agocara nirākāram_nirākāra tvām_tvad paryupāsate_paryupās teṣām_tad ubhayeṣām_ubhaya madhye_madhya ke_ka yoga--_yoga vittamāḥ_vittama atiśayena_atiśaya yoga--_yoga vidaḥ_vid yogam_yoga samādhim_samādhi vindanti_vid vidanti_vid iti_iti vā_vā yoga--_yoga vidaḥ_vid ubhaye_ubhaya api_api teṣām_tad madhye_madhya ke_ka śreṣṭhāḥ_śreṣṭha yoginaḥ_yogin keṣām_ka jñānam_jñāna mayā_mad anusaraṇīyam_anusṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: dvādaśe_dvādaśa sarva--_sarva bhaktānām_bhakta jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin śraiṣṭhyam_śraiṣṭhya ucyate_vac
bhakteṣu_bhakta api_api praśasyante_praśaṃs ye_yad a_a dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa anvitāḥ_anvita

div.p: bhakti--_bhakti prakaraṇasya_prakaraṇa upakrame_upakrama

lg.l: yoginām_yogin api_api sarveṣām_sarva mad--_mad gatena_gam antarātmanā_antarātman
śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat bhajate_bhaj yaḥ_yad mām_mad sa_tad me_mad yuktatamaḥ_yuktatama mataḥ_man

div.p:
iti_iti bhakteḥ_bhakti sarva--_sarva utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa yathā_yathā śruteḥ_śruti tathā_tathā eva_eva upasaṃhāre_upasaṃhāra api_api tasyāḥ_tad evam_evam sarva--_sarva utkarṣam_utkarṣa śrotu--_śrotu kāmaḥ_kāma pṛcchati_pracch evam_evam satata--_satata yuktāḥ_yuj mad--_mad karma--_karman kṛt_kṛt mad--_mad paramaḥ_parama iti_iti tvad--_tvad ukta--_vac lakṣaṇāḥ_lakṣaṇa bhaktāḥ_bhakta tvām_tvad śyāma--_śyāma sundara--_sundara ākāram_ākāra ye_yad ca_ca avyaktam_avyakta nirviśeṣam_nirviśeṣa akṣaram_akṣara etat_etad vai_vai tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti vaktam_vac brahma_brahman upāsate_upās teṣām_tad ubhayeṣām_ubhaya yoga--_yoga vidām_vid madhye_madhya ke_ka atiśayena_atiśaya yoga--_yoga vidaḥ_vid ca_ca tva--_tva prāntau_prānti śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha upāyam_upāya jānanti_jñā na_na labhante_labh vā_vā te_tad yoga--_yoga vittarāḥ_vittara iti_iti vaktavye_vac yoga--_yoga vittamāḥ_vittama iti_iti uktiḥ_ukti
yoga--_yoga vittarāṇām_vittara api_api bahūnām_bahu madhye_madhya ke_ka yoga--_yoga vittamāḥ_vittama iti_iti artham_artha bodhayati_bodhay

lg.l: baladevaḥ_baladeva
upāyeṣu_upāya samasteṣu_samasta śuddhā_śudh bhaktiḥ_bhakti mahā--_mahat balā_bala
prāpayet_prāpay tvarayā_tvarā yat_yat mām_mad iti_iti āha_ah dvādaśe_dvādaśa hariḥ_hari

div.p: jīvātmānam_jīvātman yathāvat_yathāvat jñātvā_jñā vijñāya_vijñā ca_ca tad--_tad aṃśī_aṃśin hariḥ_hari dhyeyaḥ_dhyā iti_iti avināśi_avināśin tu_tu tat_tad viddhi_vid iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi dvitīya--_dvitīya ādiṣu_ādi ekaḥ_eka panthāḥ_pathin varṇitaḥ_varṇay jīvātmānam_jīvātman hareḥ_hari aṃśam_aṃśa jñātvā_jñā eva_eva tad--_tad aṃśī_aṃśin hariḥ_hari tad--_tad śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi bhaktibhiḥ_bhakti dhyeyaḥ_dhyā iti_iti mayi_mad āsakta--_āsañj manāḥ_manas pārtha_pārtha iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi saptama--_saptama ādiṣu_ādi dvitīya--_dvitīya panthāḥ_pathin pradarśitaḥ_pradarśay teṣu_tad eva_eva prayāṇa--_prayāṇa kāle_kāla iti_iti ādinā_ādi yoga--_yoga upasṛṣṭā_upasṛj jñāna--_jñāna yajñena_yajña ca_ca api_api anye_anya iti_iti anena_idam jñāna--_jñāna upasṛṣṭā_upasṛj ca_ca bhaktiḥ_bhakti uktā_vac bhakti--_bhakti ṣaṭkāt_ṣaṭka prāk_prāk ṣaṣṭha--_ṣaṣṭha ante_anta kevalām_kevala bhaktim_bhakti upadekṣyatā_upadiś yoginām_yogin api_api sarveṣām_sarva iti_iti ādi--_ādi padyena_padya sva--_sva ekāntinām_ekāntin yuktatama--_yuktatama tām_tā ca_ca abhihitā_abhidhā tatra_tatra arjunaḥ_arjuna pṛcchati_pracch evam_evam iti_iti evam_evam mayi_mad āsakta--_āsañj manāḥ_manas pārtha_pārtha iti_iti ādi--_ādi tvad--_tvad ukta--_vac vidhayā_vidhā satata--_satata yuktāḥ_yuj ye_yad tvām_tvad śyāma--_śyāma sundaram_sundara kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa paritas_paritas kāya--_kāya ādi--_ādi vyāpāraiḥ_vyāpāra upāsate_upās ye_yad ca_ca akṣaram_akṣara jīva--_jīva svarūpam_svarūpa cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādibhiḥ_ādi dhāraṇā--_dhāraṇā dhyāna--_dhyāna samādhibhiḥ_samādhi sākṣāt_sākṣāt kartum_kṛ īhante_īh paramātma--_paramātman kāmāḥ_kāma teṣām_tad ubhayeṣām_ubhaya madhye_madhya yoga--_yoga vittamāḥ_vittama śīghra--_śīghra upāyinaḥ_upāyin ke_ka bhavanti_bhū sva--_sva anubhava--_anubhava pūrvakasya_pūrvaka hari--_hari dhyānasya_dhyāna bandha--_bandha mūla--_mūla tvāt_tva tena_tena nirvighnā_nirvighna tad--_tad prāptiḥ_prāpti iti_iti eke_eka nīrūpasya_nīrūpa ati_ati sūkṣmasya_sūkṣma jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman durdhyāna--_durdhyāna tvāt_tva kim_ka tad--_tad dhyānena_dhyāna kintu_kiṃtu hari--_hari bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva sarva--_sarva vighna--_vighna vimardinī_vimardin hari--_hari prāpaṇī_prāpaṇa iti_iti eke_eka tasyām_tad eva_eva niratāḥ_niram teṣām_tad ubhayeṣām_ubhaya upāyeṣu_upāya kaḥ_ka śreyān_śreyas upāyaḥ_upāya iti_iti tam_tad bhaṇa_bhaṇ iti_iti
BhG 12.2

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
mayi_mad āveśya_āveśay manaḥ_manas ye_yad mām_mad nitya--_nitya yuktāḥ_yuj upāsate_upās
śraddhayā_śraddhā parayā_para upetāḥ_upe te_tad me_mad yuktatamāḥ_yuktatama matāḥ_man

div.p: uvāca_vac mayi_mad parameśvare_parameśvara sarvajña--_sarvajña ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa viśiṣṭe_viśiṣ manaḥ_manas āveśya_āveśay ekāgram_ekāgra kṛtvā_kṛ nitya--_nitya yuktāḥ_yuj mad--_mad artha--_artha karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna ādinā_ādi mad--_mad niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā santaḥ_as śreṣṭhayā_śreṣṭha śraddhayā_śraddhā yuktāḥ_yuj ye_yad mām_mad ārādhayanti_ārādhay te_tad yuktatamāḥ_yuktatama mama_mad abhimatāḥ_abhiman
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana
āha_ah

sāttvikī_sāttvika ādhyātmikī_ādhyātmika śraddhā_śraddhā karma--_karman śraddhā_śraddhā tu_tu rājasī_rājasa
tāmasī_tāmasa adharme_adharma yā_yad śraddhā_śraddhā mad--_mad sevāyām_sevā tu_tu nirguṇā_nirguṇa

te_tad me_mad madīyāḥ_madīya ananya--_ananya bhaktāḥ_bhakta yuktatamāḥ_yuktatama yoga--_yoga vittamāḥ_vittama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tena_tena ananya--_ananya bhaktebhyaḥ_bhakta nyūnāḥ_nyūna anye_anya jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman ādi--_ādi miśra--_miśra bhaktimantaḥ_bhaktimat yoga--_yoga vittarāḥ_vittara iti_iti arthaḥ_artha abhivyañjitaḥ_abhivyañjay bhavati_bhū tatas_tatas ca_ca jñānāt_jñāna bhaktiḥ_bhakti śreṣṭhā_śreṣṭha bhaktau_bhakti api_api ananya--_ananya bhaktiḥ_bhakti śreṣṭhā_śreṣṭha iti_iti upapāditam_upapāday

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam pṛṣṭhaḥ_pracch bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac mayi_mad iti_iti ye_yad bhaktāḥ_bhakta mayi_mad nīlotpala--_nīlotpala śyāmala--_śyāmala tva--_tva ādi--_ādi dharmiṇi_dharmin svayam_svayam bhagavati_bhagavant devakī--_devakī sūnau_sūnu manaḥ_manas āveśya_āveśay niratam_niram kṛtvā_kṛ parayā_para dṛḍhayā_dṛḍha śraddhayā_śraddhā upetāḥ_upe santaḥ_as mām_mad ukta--_vac lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa upāsate_upās śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa upāsanām_upāsana mama_mad kurvanti_kṛ nitya--_nitya yuktāḥ_yuj nityam_nityam mad--_mad yogam_yoga icchantaḥ_iṣ te_tad mama_mad matena_mata yuktatamāḥ_yuktatama matāḥ_man śīghra--_śīghra mad--_mad prāpaka--_prāpaka upāyinaḥ_upāyin te_tad

lg.l: ye_yad tu_tu akṣaram_akṣara anirdeśyam_anirdeśya avyaktam_avyakta paryupāsate_paryupās
sarvatra_sarvatra gam_ga acintyam_acintya ca_ca kūṭastham_kūṭastha acalam_acala dhruvam_dhruva
saṃniyamya_saṃniyam indriya--_indriya grāmam_grāma sarvatra_sarvatra sama--_sama buddhayaḥ_buddhi
te_tad prāpnuvanti_prāp mām_mad eva_eva sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta hite_hita ratāḥ_ram

div.p: āha_ah ye_yad tu_tu akṣaram_akṣara paryupāsate_paryupās dhyāyanti_dhyā te_tad api_api mām_mad eva_eva prāpnuvanti_prāp iti_iti dvayoḥ_dvi anvayaḥ_anvaya akṣarasya_akṣara lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa anirdeśyam_anirdeśya iti_iti ādi_ādi anirdeśyam_anirdeśya śabdena_śabda nirdeṣṭum_nirdiś aśakyam_aśakya yatas_yatas avyaktam_avyakta rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi hīnam_hā sarvatra_sarvatra gam_ga sarva--_sarva vyāpi_vyāpin avyakta--_avyakta tvāt_tva eva_eva acintyam_acintya kūṭastham_kūṭastha kūṭe_kūṭa māyā--_māyā prapañce_prapañca adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tvena_tva avasthitam_avasthā acalam_acala spandana--_spandana rahitam_rahita ataeva_ataeva dhruvam_dhruva nityam_nitya vṛddhi--_vṛddhi ādi--_ādi rahitam_rahita spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa anyat_anya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nirguṇa--_nirguṇa brahma--_brahman vid--_vid apekṣayā_apekṣā saguṇa--_saguṇa brahma--_brahman vidām_vid kaḥ_ka atiśayaḥ_atiśaya yena_yad te_tad eva_eva tava_tvad abhimatāḥ_abhiman iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā tam_tad atiśayam_atiśaya vaktum_vac tat_tad nirūpakān_nirūpaka nirguṇa--_nirguṇa brahma--_brahman vidaḥ_vid prastauti_prastu ye_yad tu_tu iti_iti ye_yad akṣaram_akṣara mām_mad upāsate_upās te_tad api_api mām_mad eva_eva prāpnuvanti_prāp iti_iti dvitīya--_dvitīya gatena_gata anvayaḥ_anvaya pūrvebhyaḥ_pūrva vailakṣaṇya--_vailakṣaṇya dyotanāya_dyotana tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda akṣaram_akṣara nirviśeṣam_nirviśeṣa brahma_brahman vācaknavī--_vācaknavī brāhmaṇe_brāhmaṇa prasiddham_prasidh tasya_tad samarpaṇāya_samarpaṇa sapta_saptan viśeṣaṇāni_viśeṣaṇa anirdeśyam_anirdeśya śabdena_śabda vyapadeṣṭum_vyapadiś aśakyam_aśakya yatas_yatas avyaktam_avyakta śabda--_śabda pravṛtteḥ_pravṛtti nirviśeṣe_nirviśeṣa pravṛtti--_pravṛtti ayogāt_ayoga kutas_kutas jāti--_jāti ādi--_ādi rāhityam_rāhitya atas_atas āha_ah sarvatra_sarvatra gam_ga sarva--_sarva vyāpi_vyāpin sarva--_sarva kāraṇam_kāraṇa atas_atas jāti--_jāti ādi--_ādi śūnyam_śūnya paricchinnasya_paricchid kāryasya_kārya eva_eva jāti--_jāti ādi--_ādi yoga--_yoga darśanāt_darśana ākāśa--_ākāśa ādīnām_ādi api_api kārya--_kārya tva--_tva abhyupagamāt_abhyupagama ca_ca ataeva_ataeva acintyam_acintya śabda--_śabda vṛtteḥ_vṛtti iva_iva manaḥ--_manas vṛtteḥ_vṛtti api_api na_na viṣayaḥ_viṣaya tasyāḥ_tad paricchinna--_paricchid viṣaya--_viṣaya tvāt_tva yatas_yatas vācaḥ_vāc nivartante_nivṛt a_a prāpya_prāp manasā_manas saha_saha iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

tarhi_tarhi katham_katham tam_tad tu_tu aupaniṣadam_aupaniṣada puruṣam_puruṣa pṛcchāmi_pracch iti_iti dṛśyate_dṛś tu_tu agryayā_agrya buddhyā_buddhi iti_iti ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti śāstra--_śāstra yoni--_yoni tvāt_tva iti_iti sūtram_sūtra ca_ca ucyate_vac avidyā--_avidyā kalpita--_kalpay sambandhena_sambandha śabda--_śabda janyāyām_jan buddhi--_buddhi vṛttau_vṛtti caramāyām_carama paramānanda--_paramānanda bodha--_bodha rūpe_rūpa śuddhe_śuddha vastuni_vastu pratibimbite_pratibimb avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kāryayoḥ_kārya kalpitayoḥ_kalpay nivṛtti--_nivṛtti upapatteḥ_upapatti upacāreṇa_upacāra viṣaya--_viṣaya tva--_tva atas_atas tatra_tatra kalpitam_kalpay aivdyā--_aivdyā sambandham_sambandha pratipādayitum_pratipāday āha_ah kūṭastham_kūṭastha yat_yad mithyā_mithyā bhūtam_bhū satya--_satya tayā_tā pratīyate_pratī tat_tad kūṭam_kūṭa iti_iti lokaiḥ_loka ucyate_vac yathā_yathā kūṭa--_kūṭa kārṣā--_kārṣā paṇaḥ_paṇa kūṭa--_kūṭa sākṣi--_sākṣin tvam_tva iti_iti ādau_ādi ajñānam_ajñāna api_api māyā--_māyā ākhyam_ākhyā saha_saha kārya--_kārya prapañcena_prapañca mithyā_mithyā bhūtam_bhū api_api laukikaiḥ_laukika satya--_satya tayā_tā pratīyamānam_pratī kūṭam_kūṭa tasmin_tad ādhyāsikena_ādhyāsika sambandhena_sambandha adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tayā_tā tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti kūṭastham_kūṭastha ajñāna--_ajñāna tad--_tad kārya_kārya etena_etad sarva--_sarva anupapatti--_anupapatti parihāraḥ_parihāra kṛtaḥ_kṛ ataeva_ataeva sarva--_sarva vikārāṇām_vikāra avidyā--_avidyā kalpita--_kalpay tvāt_tva tad--_tad adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna sākṣi--_sākṣin caitanyam_caitanya nirvikāram_nirvikāra iti_iti āha_ah acalam_acala calanam_calana vikāraḥ_vikāra acala--_acala tvāt_tva eva_eva dhruvam_dhruva apariṇāmi_apariṇāmin nityam_nitya etādṛśam_etādṛśa śuddham_śuddha brahma_brahman mām_mad paryupāsate_paryupās śravaṇena_śravaṇa pramāṇa--_pramāṇa gatām_gam asambhāvanām_asaṃbhāvanā apohya_apoh mananena_manana ca_ca prameya--_prameya gatām_gam anantaram_anantara viparīta--_viparīta bhāvanā--_bhāvanā nivṛttaye_nivṛtti dhyāyanti_dhyā vijātīya--_vijātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya tiraskāreṇa_tiraskāra taila--_taila avicchinna--_avicchinna samāna--_samāna pratyaya--_pratyaya tiraskāreṇa_tiraskāra taila--_taila dhārā--_dhārā vat_vat avicchinna--_avicchinna samāna--_samāna pratyaya--_pratyaya pravāheṇa_pravāha nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana saṃjñakena_saṃjñaka
dhyānena_dhyāna viṣayīkurvanti_viṣayīkṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

katham_katham punar_punar viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya saṃyoge_saṃyoga sati_as vijātīya--_vijātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya tiraskāraḥ_tiraskāra atas_atas āha_ah saṃniyamya_saṃniyam sva--_sva viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya upasaṃhṛtya_upasaṃhṛ indriya--_indriya grāmam_grāma karaṇa--_karaṇa samudāyam_samudāya etena_etad śama--_śama dama--_dama ādi--_ādi sampattiḥ_sampatti uktā_vac

viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga vāsanāyām_vāsanā satyām_as kutas_kutas indriyāṇām_indriya tatas_tatas nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti tatra_tatra āha_ah sarvatra_sarvatra viṣaye_viṣaya samā_sama tulyā_tulya harṣa--_harṣa viṣādābhyām_viṣāda rāga--_rāga dveṣābhyām_dveṣa ca_ca rahitā_rahita matiḥ_mati yeṣām_yad samyak_samyak jñānena_jñāna tad--_tad kāraṇasya_kāraṇa doṣa--_doṣa darśana--_darśana abhyāsena_abhyāsa spṛhāyāḥ_spṛhā nirasanāt_nirasana ca_ca te_tad sarvatra_sarvatra sama--_sama buddhayaḥ_buddhi etena_etad vaśīkāra--_vaśīkāra saṃjñā_saṃjñā vairāgyam_vairāgya uktam_vac ataeva_ataeva sarvatra_sarvatra ātma--_ātman dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi hiṃsā--_hiṃsā kāraṇa--_kāraṇa dveṣa--_dveṣa rahita--_rahita tvāt_tva sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta hite_hita ratāḥ_ram abhayam_abhaya sarva--_sarva bhūtebhyaḥ_bhūta mattaḥ_mad svahā_svahā iti_iti mantreṇa_mantra datta--_dā sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta abhaya--_abhaya dakṣiṇāḥ_dakṣiṇā kṛta--_kṛ saṃnyāsāḥ_saṃnyāsa saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa ācaret_ācar smṛteḥ_smṛti evaṃvidhāḥ_evaṃvidha sarva--_sarva sādhana--_sādhana sampannāḥ_sampad santaḥ_as svayam_svayam brahma--_brahman bhūtāḥ_bhū nirvicikitsena_nirvicikitsa sākṣātkāreṇa_sākṣātkāra sarva--_sarva sādhana--_sādhana phala--_phala bhūtena_bhū mām_mad akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman eva_eva te_tad prāpnuvanti_prāp pūrvam_pūrvam api_api mad--_mad rūpāḥ_rūpa eva_eva santaḥ_as avidyā--_avidyā nivṛttyā_nivṛtti mad--_mad rūpāḥ_rūpa eva_eva tiṣṭhanti_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha brahma_brahman eva_eva san_as brahma_brahman api_api eti_i brahma_brahman veda_vid brahmā_brahman eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti ādi--_ādi śrutibhyaḥ_śruti iha_iha api_api ca_ca jñānī_jñānin tu_tu ātmā_ātman eva_eva me_mad matam_man iti_iti uktam_vac

āha_ah akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman anirdeśya--_anirdeśya śabdena_śabda vyapadeṣṭum_vyapadiś aśakyam_aśakya yatas_yatas avyaktam_avyakta rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi hīnam_hā sarvatra_sarvatra gam_ga sarva--_sarva deśa--_deśa vyāpi_vyāpin acintyam_acintya tarka--_tarka agamyam_agamya kūṭastham_kūṭastha sarva--_sarva kāla--_kāla vyāpi_vyāpin eka--_eka rūpa--_rūpa tayā_tā tu_tu yaḥ_yad kāla--_kāla vyāpi_vyāpin sa_tad kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha iti_iti amaraḥ_amara acalam_acala vṛddhi--_vṛddhi ādi--_ādi rahitam_rahita dhruvam_dhruva nityam_nitya mām_mad eva_eva iti_iti akṣarasya_akṣara tasya_tad mattaḥ_mad bheda--_bheda abhāvāt_abhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva -_yad tu_tu sva--_sva sākṣāt_sākṣāt kṛti--_kṛti pūrvikām_pūrvaka mad--_mad upāsanām_upāsana na_na kurvanti_kṛ teṣām_tad api_api mad--_mad prāptiḥ_prāpti syāt_as eva_eva kintu_kiṃtu ati_ati kleśena_kleśa ati_ati cireṇa_cireṇa eva_eva antar_antar tebhyaḥ_tad apakṛṣṭāḥ_apakṛṣṭa te_tad iti_iti āha_ah ye_yad tu_tu iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri ye_yad tu_tu akṣara--_akṣara sva--_sva ātma--_ātman caitanyam_caitanya eva_eva pūrvam_pūrvam upāsate_upās teṣām_tad adhikataraḥ_adhikatara kleśaḥ_kleśa iti_iti sambandhaḥ_sambandha akṣaram_akṣara viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ anirdeśyam_anirdeśya dehāt_deha bhinna--_bhid tvena_tva deha--_deha abhidhāyibhiḥ_abhidhāyin deva--_deva mānava--_mānava ādi--_ādi śabdaiḥ_śabda nirdeṣṭum_nirdiś aśakyam_aśakya acintyam_acintya tarka--_tarka agamyam_agamya śruti--_śruti mātra--_mātra vedyam_vid jñāna--_jñāna svarūpam_svarūpa eva_eva jñātṛ--_jñātṛ svarūpam_svarūpa acalam_acala jñāna--_jñāna tvāt_tva api_api calana--_calana rahitam_rahita dhruvam_dhruva paramātma--_paramātman eka--_eka śeṣa--_śeṣa tāyām_tā sarvadā_sarvadā sthiram_sthira akṣara--_akṣara upāsane_upāsana vidhim_vidhi āha_ah saṃniyamya_saṃniyam iti_iti karaṇa--_karaṇa grāmam_grāma śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi indriya--_indriya vṛndam_vṛnda saṃniyamya_saṃniyam śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi saṃcārebhyaḥ_saṃcāra tad--_tad vyāpārebhyaḥ_vyāpāra pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ sarvatra_sarvatra suhṛd--_suhṛd mitra--_mitra āri--_āri udāsīna--_udāsīna ādiṣu_ādi sama--_sama buddhayaḥ_buddhi tulya--_tulya dṛṣṭayaḥ_dṛṣṭi yat_yat vā_vā sarveṣu_sarva cetana--_cetana acetaneṣu_acetana vastubhiḥ_vastu sthite_sthā same_sama brahmaṇi_brahman buddhiḥ_buddhi yeṣām_yad bhūtānām_bhūta hite_hita upakāre_upakāra ratāḥ_ram sarveṣām_sarva śam_śam bhūyāt_bhū iti_iti yathāyatham_yathāyatham yatamānāḥ_yat evam_evam sva--_sva ātma--_ātman sākṣātkṛti--_sākṣātkṛti pūrvikāyām_pūrvaka mad--_mad mad--_mad arpita--_arpay karma--_karman lakṣaṇāyām_lakṣaṇa
ye_yad pravartante_pravṛt te_tad api_api mām_mad eva_eva pāramaiśvarya--_pāramaiśvarya pradhānam_pradhāna prāpunuvanti_prapū iti_iti na_na asti_as saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya
BhG 12.5

lg.l: kleśaḥ_kleśa adhikataraḥ_adhikatara teṣām_tad avyakta--_avyakta āsakta--_āsañj cetasām_cetas
avyaktā_avyakta hi_hi gatiḥ_gati duḥkham_duḥkham dehavadbhiḥ_dehavat avāpyate_avāp

div.p: āha_ah avyakte_avyakta nirviśeṣe_nirviśeṣa akṣare_akṣara āsaktam_āsañj cetaḥ_cetas yeṣām_yad teṣām_tad kleśaḥ_kleśa adhikataraḥ_adhikatara hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt avyakta--_avyakta viṣayā_viṣaya gatiḥ_gati niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā deha--_deha abhimānibhiḥ_abhimānin duḥkham_duḥkha yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evam_evam avāpyate_avāp deha--_deha abhimāninām_abhimānin nityam_nityam pratyak--_pratyañc pravaṇa--_pravaṇa tvasya_tva durghaṭa--_durghaṭa tvāt_tva iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm etebhyaḥ_etad pūrveṣām_pūrva atiśayam_atiśaya darśayan_darśay āha_ah kleśaḥ_kleśa iti_iti pūrveṣām_pūrva api_api viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya āhṛtya_āhṛ saguṇe_saguṇa manaḥ--_manas āveśe_āveśa satatam_satatam tad--_tad karma--_karman parāyaṇa--_parāyaṇa tve_tva ca_ca para--_para śraddhā--_śraddhā upeta--_upe tve_tva ca_ca kleśaḥ_kleśa adhikaḥ_adhika bhavati_bhū eva_eva kintu_kiṃtu avyakta--_avyakta āsakta--_āsañj cetasām_cetas nirguṇa--_nirguṇa brahma--_brahman cintana--_cintana parāṇām_para teṣām_tad pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac sādhanavatām_sādhanavat kleśaḥ_kleśa āyāsaḥ_āyāsa adhikataraḥ_adhikatara atiśayena_atiśaya adhikaḥ_adhika

atra_atra svayam_svayam eva_eva hetum_hetu āha_ah bhagavān_bhagavant avyaktā_avyakta hi_hi gatiḥ_gati hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt akṣara--_akṣara ātmakam_ātmaka gantavyam_gam phala--_phala bhūtam_bhū brahma_brahman duḥkham_duḥkha yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā kṛcchreṇa_kṛcchra dehavadbhiḥ_dehavat deha--_deha mānibhiḥ_mānin avāpyate_avāp sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa kṛtvā_kṛ gurum_guru upasṛtya_upasṛ vedānta--_vedānta vākyānām_vākya tena_tad tena_tad vicāreṇa_vicāra tad--_tad tad--_tad bhrama--_bhrama nirākaraṇe_nirākaraṇa mahān_mahat prayāsaḥ_prayāsa pratyakṣa--_pratyakṣa siddhaḥ_sidh tatas_tatas kleśaḥ_kleśa adhikataraḥ_adhikatara teṣām_tad iti_iti uktam_vac yadi_yadi api_api ekam_eka eva_eva phalam_phala tathā_tathā api_api ye_yad duṣkareṇa_duṣkara upāyena_upāya prāpnuvantaḥ_prāp bhavanti_bhū śreṣṭhāḥ_śreṣṭha iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

āha_ah na_na kena_ka api_api vyajyate_vyañj iti_iti avyaktam_avyakta brahma_brahman tatra_tatra eva_eva āsakta--_āsañj cetasām_cetas tat_tad eva_eva anububhūṣūṇām_anububhūṣu teṣām_tad tad--_tad prāntau_prānti kleśaḥ_kleśa adhikataraḥ_adhikatara hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt avyaktā_avyakta gatiḥ_gati kena_ka api_api prakāreṇa_prakāra vyaktībhavati_vyaktībhū sā_tad gatiḥ_gati dehavadbhiḥ_dehavat jīvaiḥ_jīva duḥkham_duḥkha yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evam_evam avāpyate_avāp tathā_tathā hi_hi indriyāṇām_indriya śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi jñāna--_jñāna viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa eva_eva śaktiḥ_śakti viśeṣatara--_viśeṣatara jñānam_jñāna atas_atas indriya--_indriya nirodhaḥ_nirodha teṣām_tad nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa jñānam_jñāna icchatām_iṣ avaśya--_avaśya kartavyaḥ_kṛ eva_eva indriyāṇām_indriya nirodhaḥ_nirodha tu_tu srotasvatīnām_srotasvatī iva_iva srotaḥ--_srotas nirodhaḥ_nirodha duṣkaraḥ_duṣkara eva_eva yat_yad uktam_vac sanatkumāreṇa_sanatkumāra

yad--_yad pāda--_pāda paṅkaja--_paṅkaja palāśa--_palāśa vilāsa--_vilāsa bhaktyā_bhakti karma--_karman āśayam_āśaya grathitam_granth udgrathayanti_udgrathay santaḥ_sat tadvat_tadvat na_na rikta--_ric matayaḥ_mati yatayaḥ_yati ruddha--_rudh as_as
srotaḥ--_srotas gaṇāḥ_gaṇa tam_tad araṇam_araṇa bhaja_bhaj vāsudevam_vāsudeva

kleśaḥ_kleśa mahān_mahat iha_iha bhava--_bhava arṇavam_arṇava a_a plava--_plava īśām_īśa ṣaḍvarga--_ṣaḍvarga nakram_nakra asukhena_asukha titīrṣanti_titīrṣ tat_tad tvam_tvad hareḥ_hari bhagavataḥ_bhagavant bhajanīyam_bhaj aṅghrim_aṅghri
kṛtvā_kṛ uḍupam_uḍupa vyasanam_vyasana uttara_uttṛ dustara--_dustara arṇam_arṇa

tāvatā_tāvat kleśena_kleśa api_api sā_tad gatiḥ_gati yadi_yadi api_api avāpyate_avāp tat_tad api_api bhakti--_bhakti miśreṇa_miśra eva_eva bhagavati_bhagavant bhaktim_bhakti vinā_vinā kevala--_kevala brahma--_brahman upāsakānām_upāsaka tu_tu kevala--_kevala kleśaḥ_kleśa eva_eva lābhaḥ_lābha na_na tu_tu brahma--_brahman prāptiḥ_prāpti yat_yad uktam_vac brahmaṇā_brahman
teṣām_tad asau_adas kleśalaḥ_kleśala eva_eva śiṣyate_śiṣ na_na anyat_anya yathā_yathā sthūla--_sthūla tuṣa--_tuṣa avaghātinām_avaghātin iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu te_tad api_api ced_ced tvām_tvad eva_eva prāpnuyuḥ_prāp tarhi_tarhi pūrveṣām_pūrva yuktatama--_yuktatama tvam_tva kim_ka nibandhanam_nibandhana tatra_tatra āha_ah kleśaḥ_kleśa adhika--_adhika iti_iti avyakta--_avyakta āsakta--_āsañj cetasām_cetas ati_ati sūkṣma--_sūkṣma nīrūpa--_nīrūpa jīvātma--_jīvātman samādhi--_samādhi nirata--_niram manasām_manas teṣām_tad adhikataraḥ_adhikatara kleśaḥ_kleśa yadi_yadi api_api pūrveṣām_pūrva api_api tad--_tad tad--_tad mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti asaṅga--_asaṅga samācāraḥ_samācāra mad--_mad anya--_anya viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya karaṇānām_karaṇa pratyāhāraḥ_pratyāhāra ca_ca kleśaḥ_kleśa asti_as eva_eva tathā_tathā ai_ai tatra_tatra ānanda--_ānanda mūrteḥ_mūrti mama_mad sphuraṇāt_sphuraṇa na_na kleśa--_kleśa tayā_tā vibhāti_vibhā kutas_kutas adhikatara--_adhikatara tvam_tva su_su durāpāstam_durāpāsta hi_hi yasmāt_yad avyaktā_avyakta gatiḥ_gati avyaktā_avyakta akṣara--_akṣara viṣayā_viṣaya manaḥ--_manas vṛttiḥ_vṛtti dehavadbhiḥ_dehavat deha--_deha abhimānibhiḥ_abhimānin janaiḥ_jana duḥkham_duḥkha yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā avāpyate_avāp dehavantaḥ_dehavant khalu_khalu sthūla--_sthūla deham_deha eva_eva su_su cirāt_cirāt ātma--_ātman tvena_tva anuśīlitavantaḥ_anuśīlay katham_katham aṇu--_aṇu caitanyam_caitanya su_su cira--_cira ujjhita--_ujjhita vimarśam_vimarśa ātma--_ātman tvena_tva anuśīlitum_anuśīl prabhaveyuḥ_prabhū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

yat_yad tu_tu atra_atra vyācakṣate_vyācakṣ sa_sa guṇam_guṇa nirguṇam_nirguṇa ca_ca iti_iti dvirūpam_dvirūpa brahma_brahman tatra_tatra sa_sa guṇa--_guṇa upāsanam_upāsana ākāravat--_ākāravat viṣaya--_viṣaya tvāt_tva sukaram_sukara apramādam_apramāda ca_ca nirguṇa--_nirguṇa upāsanam_upāsana tu_tu tattva--_tattva abhāvāt_abhāva duḥkha--_duḥkha karam_kara sa_sa pramādam_pramāda ca_ca tat_tad ca_ca nirguṇam_nirguṇa brahma_brahman akṣara--_akṣara śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac nairguṇya--_nairguṇya pratipattaye_pratipatti sapta_saptan viśeṣaṇāni_viśeṣaṇa anirdeśyam_anirdeśya veda--_veda agocaram_agocara yatas_yatas avyaktam_avyakta jāti--_jāti ādi--_ādi śūnyam_śūnya sarvatra_sarvatra gam_ga vyāpi_vyāpin acintyam_acintya manasā_manas api_api agamyam_agamya śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca yatas_yatas vācaḥ_vāc nivartante_nivṛt a_a prāpya_prāp manasā_manas saha_saha iti_iti ādyā_ādya kūṭastham_kūṭastha mithā_mithā bhūtam_bhū api_api satya--_satya vat_vat pratītam_pratī jagat_jagant kūṭam_kūṭa ucyate_vac yathā_yathā kūta--_kūta kārṣāpaṇa--_kārṣāpaṇa ādi_ādi tasmin_tad ādhyāsika--_ādhyāsika sambandhena_sambandha adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tayā_tā sthitam_sthā acaram_acara avikāram_avikāra atas_atas dhruvam_dhruva nityam_nitya iti_iti tad--_tad vidām_vid khalu_khalu guru--_guru upasatti--_upasatti pūrvaka--_pūrvaka upaniṣad--_upaniṣad vicāra--_vicāra tad--_tad artha--_artha manana--_manana tad--_tad nididhyāsanaiḥ_nididhyāsana mahān_mahat kleśaḥ_kleśa

pūrveṣām_pūrva tu_tu taiḥ_tad vinā_vinā eva_eva guru--_guru ukta--_vac bhagavat--_bhagavant prasāda--_prasāda āvirbhūtena_āvirbhū ajñāna--_ajñāna tad--_tad kārya--_kārya vimardinā_vimardin vijñānena_vijñāna bhagavat--_bhagavant svarūpa--_svarūpa bhūta--_bhū nirguṇa--_nirguṇa akṣara--_akṣara ātma--_ātman aikya--_aikya lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa muktiḥ_mukti iti_iti phala--_phala aikye_aikya api_api tat_tad idam_idam mandam_manda gati--_gati sāmānyāt_sāmānya iti_iti sūtre_sūtra brahmaṇaḥ_brahman dvairūpya--_dvairūpya nirāsāt_nirāsa yathā_yathā tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara adhigamyate_adhigam iti_iti tasya_tad veda--_veda vedya--_vid tva--_tva śravaṇāt_śravaṇa yatas_yatas vācaḥ_vāc iti_iti āde_ādi kārtsnya--_kārtsnya agocara--_agocara tva--_tva artha--_artha tvāt_tva pravṛtti--_pravṛtti nimitta--_nimitta abhāvena_abhāva nirguṇasya_nirguṇa apramāṇa--_apramāṇa tvāt_tva taucchyāt_taucchya ca_ca lakṣyatvam_lakṣyatva tu_tu na_na sarva--_sarva śabda--_śabda vācyatva--_vācyatva svīkārāt_svīkāra sadā_sadā eka--_eka avasthasya_avasthā vastunaḥ_vastu kūṭastha--_kūṭastha tvena_tva abhidhānāt_abhidhāna na_na ca_ca jagat_jagant kūṭam_kūṭa
kaviḥ_kavi manīṣī_manīṣin paribhūḥ_paribhū svayambhuḥ_svayambhu yāthātathyataḥ_yāthātathya arthān_artha vyadadhāt_vidhā śāśvatībhyaḥ_śāśvata samābhyaḥ_samā

iti_iti ādau_ādi tasya_tad satya--_satya tva--_tva śravaṇāt_śravaṇa yaśodā--_yaśodā stanandhaya--_stanaṃdhaya vibhu--_vibhu cit--_cit vigrahasya_vigraha para--_para brahma--_brahman tva--_tva śravaṇena_śravaṇa tad--_tad anta--_anta stha--_stha nirguṇa--_nirguṇa akṣara--_akṣara kalpanasya_kalpana śraddhā--_śraddhā jāḍya--_jāḍya kṛta--_kṛ tvāt_tva

lg.l: ye_yad tu_tu sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman mayi_mad saṃnyasya_saṃnyas mad--_mad parāḥ_para
ananyena_ananya eva_eva yogena_yoga mām_mad dhyāyantaḥ_dhyā upāsate_upās
teṣām_tad aham_mad samuddhartā_samuddhartṛ mṛtyu--_mṛtyu saṃsāra--_saṃsāra sāgarāt_sāgara
bhavāmi_bhū na_na cirāt_cirāt pārtha_pārtha mayi_mad āveśita--_āveśay cetasām_cetas

div.p: bhavati_bhū āha_ah ye_yad mayi_mad parameśvare_parameśvara sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman saṃnyasya_saṃnyas samarpya_samarpay mad--_mad parāḥ_para bhūtvā_bhū mām_mad dhyāyantaḥ_dhyā an_an anyena_anya na_na vidyate_vid anyaḥ_anya bhajanīyaḥ_bhaj yasmin_yad tena_tad eva_eva ekānta--_ekānta bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga upāsate_upās iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

teṣām_tad iti_iti evam_evam mayi_mad āveśitam_āveśay cetaḥ_cetas yaiḥ_yad teṣām_tad mṛtyu--_mṛtyu yuktāt_yuj saṃsāra--_saṃsāra sāgarāt_sāgara aham_mad samyak_samyak uddhartā_uddhartṛ acireṇa_acireṇa bhavāmi_bhū

syātām_as asti_as saguṇa--_saguṇa brahma--_brahman vidām_vid tu_tu adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna pramāyāḥ_pramā abhāvena_abhāva avidyā--_avidyā nivṛtti--_nivṛtti abhāvāt_abhāva aiśvarya--_aiśvarya viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa kārya--_kārya brahma--_brahman loka--_loka gatānām_gam phalam_phala atas_atas phala--_phala ādhikya--_ādhikya artham_artha āyāsa--_āyāsa ādhikyam_ādhikya na_na nyūna--_nyūna tām_tā āpādayati_āpāday ced_ced na_na suguṇa--_suguṇa upāsanayā_upāsana nirasta--_niras sarva--_sarva pratibandhānām_pratibandha vinā_vinā guru--_guru upadeśam_upadeśa vinā_vinā ca_ca śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana ādi--_ādi āvṛtti--_āvṛtti kleśam_kleśa saḥ_tad etasmāt_etad jīva--_jīva ghanāt_ghana parātparam_parātpara puriśayam_puriśaya puruṣam_puruṣa īkṣate_īkṣ iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti sa_tad prāpta--_prāp hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha aiśvaryaḥ_aiśvarya bhogānte_bhogānta etasmāt_etad jīva--_jīva ghanāt_ghana sarva--_sarva jīva--_jīva samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi rūpāt_rūpa parāt_para śreṣṭhāt_śreṣṭha puriśayam_puriśaya sva--_sva hṛdaya--_hṛdaya guhā--_guhā niviṣṭam_niviś puruṣam_puruṣa pūrṇam_pṛ pratyak--_pratyañc abhinnam_abhinna advitīyam_advitīya paramātmānam_paramātman īkṣate_īkṣ svayam_svayam āvirbhūtena_āvirbhū vedānta--_vedānta pramāṇena_pramāṇa sākṣātkaroti_sākṣātkṛ tāvatā_tāvat ca_ca muktaḥ_muc bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca vinā_vinā api_api prāc--_prāñc ukta--_vac kleśena_kleśa saguṇa--_saguṇa brahma--_brahman vidām_vid īśvara--_īśvara prasādena_prasāda nirguṇa--_nirguṇa brahma--_brahman vidyā--_vidyā phala--_phala prāptiḥ_prāpti iti_iti imam_idam artham_artha āha_ah ye_yad tu_tu iti_iti dvyābhyām_dvi

tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda ukta--_vac āśaṅkā--_āśaṅkā nivṛtti--_nivṛtti arthaḥ_artha ye_yad sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman mayi_mad saṃnyasya_saṃnyas saguṇe_saguṇa vāsudeve_vāsudeva samarpya_samarpay mad--_mad parāḥ_para aham_mad bhagavān_bhagavant vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva eva_eva paraḥ_para prakṛṣṭaḥ_prakṛṣṭa prīti--_prīti viṣayaḥ_viṣaya yeṣām_yad te_tad tathā_tathā santaḥ_as ananyena_ananya eva_eva yogena_yoga na_na vidyate_vid mām_mad tādṛśena_tādṛśa eva_eva yogena_yoga samādhinā_samādhi ekānta--_ekānta bhakti--_bhakti yoga--_yoga apara--_apara nāmnā_nāman mām_mad bhagavantam_bhagavant vāsudevam_vāsudeva sakala--_sakala saundarya--_saundarya sāra--_sāra nidhānam_nidhāna ānanda--_ānanda ghana--_ghana vigraham_vigraha dvi--_dvi bhujam_bhuja catur--_catur bhujam_bhuja vā_vā samasta--_samasta jana--_jana manaḥ--_manas mohinīm_mohin svaraiḥ_svara āpūrayantam_āpūray vā_vā dara--_dara kamala--_kamala kaumodakī--_kaumodakī rathāṅga--_rathāṅga saṅgi--_saṅgin pāṇi--_pāṇi pallavam_pallava vā_vā narasiṃha--_narasiṃha rāghava--_rāghava ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa vā_vā yathā_yathā darśita--_darśay viśva--_viśva rūpam_rūpa vā_vā dhyāyantaḥ_dhyā upāsate_upās samāna--_samāna ākāram_ākāra avicchinnam_avicchinna citta--_citta samīpa--_samīpa varti--_vartin tayā_tā vā_vā tesām_tad mayi_mad āveśita--_āveśay cetasām_cetas mayi_mad yathā_yathā ukte_vac āveśitam_āveśay ekāgra--_ekāgra tayā_tā praveśitam_praveśay cetaḥ_cetas yaiḥ_yad teṣām_tad aham_mad satata--_satata upāsitaḥ_upās bhagavān_bhagavant mṛtyu--_mṛtyu saṃsāra--_saṃsāra sāgarām_sāgara mṛtyu--_mṛtyu yuktaḥ_yuj yaḥ_yad mithyā_mithyā jñāna--_jñāna tad--_tad kārya--_kārya prapañcaḥ_prapañca saḥ_tad eva_eva sāgarāḥ_sāgara iva_iva duruttaraḥ_duruttara tasmāt_tasmāt samuddhartā_samuddhartṛ samyak_samyak anāyasena_anāyasa ūrdhve_ūrdhva sarva--_sarva bādhau_bādhi adhibhūte_adhibhūta śuddhe_śuddha brahmaṇi_brahman dhartā_dhartṛ dhārayitā_dhārayitṛ jñāna--_jñāna avaṣṭambha--_avaṣṭambha dānena_dāna eva_eva janmani_janman he_he pārtha_pārtha iti_iti sambodhanam_sambodhana āśvāsa--_āśvāsa artham_artha

āha_ah mayi_mad yat_yat prānti_prānti artham_artha saṃnyasya_saṃnyas tyaktvā_tyaj saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa śabdasya_śabda tyāga--_tyāga artha--_artha tvāt_tva ananyena_ananya eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman tapasya--_tapasya ādi--_ādi rahitena_rahita eva_eva yogena_yoga bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga yat_yad uktam_vac yat_yad karmabhiḥ_karman yat_yad tapasā_tapas jñāna--_jñāna vairāgyataḥ_vairāgyatā ca_ca yat_yad iti_iti anantaram_anantaram

sarvam_sarva mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta labhate_labh añjasā_añjasā
svarga--_svarga apavargam_apavarga mad--_mad dhāma_dhāman kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid yadi_yadi vāñchati_vāñch

nanu_nanu tat_tad api_api teṣām_tad saṃsāra--_saṃsāra taraṇe_taraṇa kaḥ_ka prakāraḥ_prakāra iti_iti ced_ced satyam_satya teṣām_tad saṃsāra--_saṃsāra taraṇa--_taraṇa prakāre_prakāra jijñāsā_jijñāsā na_na eva_eva jñāyate_jñā yatas_yatas tad--_tad prakāram_prakāra vinā_vinā eva_eva aham_mad eva_eva tān_tad tārayiṣyāmi_tāray iti_iti āha_ah teṣām_tad iti_iti tena_tena bhagavataḥ_bhagavant bhakteṣu_bhakta eva_eva vātsalyam_vātsalya na_na tu_tu jñāniṣu_jñānin iti_iti dhvaniḥ_dhvani

baladevaḥ_baladeva tathā_tathā ātma--_ātman yāthātmyam_yāthātmya śrutvā_śru eva_eva ātma--_ātman aṃśinaḥ_aṃśin mama_mad kevalām_kevala bhaktim_bhakti ye_yad kurvanti_kṛ na_na tu_tu ātma--_ātman sākṣātkṛtaye_sākṣātkṛti prayatante_prayat teṣām_tad tu_tu kevalayā_kevala mad--_mad bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva mad--_mad prāptiḥ_prāpti acireṇa_acireṇa eva_eva syāt_as iti_iti ye_yad mad--_mad ekāntinaḥ_ekāntin mayi_mad mad--_mad prāpti--_prāpti artham_artha sarvāṇi_sarva sva--_sva vihitāni_vidhā api_api karmāṇi_karman saṃnyasya_saṃnyas bhakti--_bhakti vikṣepaka--_vikṣepaka tva--_tva buddhyā_buddhi parityajya_parityaj mad--_mad parāḥ_para mad--_mad eka--_eka puruṣa--_puruṣa arthāḥ_artha santaḥ_as ananyena_ananya kevalena_kevala mad--_mad śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa upāsate_upās tad--_tad lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa mad--_mad upāsanām_upāsana kurvanti_kṛ dhyāyantaḥ_dhyā śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi kāle_kāla api_api mad--_mad niviṣṭa--_niviś manasaḥ_manas teṣām_tad mayi_mad āveśita--_āveśay cetasām_cetas mad--_mad eka--_eka anurakta--_anurañj manasām_manas bhaktānām_bhakta aham_mad eva_eva mṛtyu--_mṛtyu yuktāt_yuj saṃsārāt_saṃsāra sāgara--_sāgara vat_vat dustarāt_dustara samuddhartā_samuddhartṛ bhavāmi_bhū na_na cirāt_cirāt tvarayā_tvarā tad--_tad prāpti--_prāpti vilamba--_vilamba a_a sahamānaḥ_sah tān_tad aham_mad garuḍa--_garuḍa skandham_skandha āropya_āropay sva--_sva dhāma_dhāman prāpayāmi_prāpay iti_iti arciḥ--_arcis ādi--_ādi nirapekṣā_nirapekṣa teṣām_tad mad--_mad dhāma--_dhāman prāptiḥ_prāpti

nayāmi_nī paramam_parama sthānam_sthāna arciḥ_arcis ādi--_ādi gatim_gati vinā_vinā garuḍa--_garuḍa skandham_skandha āropya_āropay yatheccham_yatheccha anivāritaḥ_anivārita iti_iti vārāha--_vārāha vacanāt_vacana

yā_yad vai_vai sādhana--_sādhana sampattiḥ_sampatti puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha catuṣṭaye_catuṣṭaya tayā_tad vinā_vinā tat_tad āpnoti_āp naraḥ_nara nārāyaṇa--_nārāyaṇa āśrayaḥ_āśraya iti_iti nārāyaṇīyāt_nārāyaṇīya

sarva--_sarva dharma--_dharma ujjhitāḥ_ujjhita viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu nāma--_nāman mātra--_mātra eka--_eka jalpakāḥ_jalpaka sukhena_sukha yām_yad gatim_gati yānti_yā na_na tām_tad sarve_sarva api_api dhārmikāḥ_dhārmika iti_iti pādmāt_pādma ca_ca
BhG 12.8

lg.l: mayi_mad eva_eva manaḥ_manas ādhatsva_ādhā mayi_mad buddhim_buddhi niveśaya_niveśay
nivasiṣyasi_nivas mayi_mad eva_eva atas_atas ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam na_na saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya

div.p: mayi_mad eva_eva saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa vikalpa--_vikalpa ātmakam_ātmaka manaḥ_manas ādhatsva_ādhā sthirīkuru_sthirīkṛ buddhim_buddhi api_api vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikām_ātmaka mayi_mad eva_eva niveśaya_niveśay evam_evam kurvat_kṛ mad--_mad prasādena_prasāda labdha--_labh jñānaḥ_jñāna san_as atas_atas atas_atas ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam dehānte_dehānta mayi_mad eva_eva nivasiṣyasi_nivas nivatsyasi_nivas yat_yat ātmanā_ātman vāsam_vāsa kariṣyasi_kṛ na_na atra_atra saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya yathā_yathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti dehānte_dehānta devaḥ_deva param_para brahmā_brahman tārakam_tāraka vyacaṣṭe_vicakṣ iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam iyatā_iyat prabandhena_prabandha saguṇa--_saguṇa upāsanām_upāsana stutvā_stu idānīm_idānīm vidhatte_vidhā mayi_mad eva_eva iti_iti mayi_mad eva_eva saguṇe_saguṇa brahmaṇi_brahman manaḥ_manas saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa vikalpa--_vikalpa ātmakam_ātmaka ādhatsva_ādhā sthāpaya_sthāpay sarvāḥ_sarva manaḥ--_manas vṛttīḥ_vṛtti mad--_mad viṣayāḥ_viṣaya eva_eva kuru_kṛ eva_eva kāra--_kāra anuṣaṅgena_anuṣaṅga mayi_mad eva_eva buddhim_buddhi adhyavasāya--_adhyavasāya lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa niveśaya_niveśay sarvāḥ_sarva buddhi--_buddhi vṛttīḥ_vṛtti mad--_mad viṣayāḥ_viṣaya eva_eva kuru_kṛ viṣaya--_viṣaya antara--_antara parityāgena_parityāga sarvadā_sarvadā mām_mad cintaya_cintay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatas_tatas kim_ka syāt_as iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah nivasiṣyasi_nivas nivatsyasi_nivas labdha--_labh jñānaḥ_jñāna san_as mad--_mad ātmanā_ātman mayi_mad eva_eva śuddha_śudh atas_atas ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam etad--_etad dehānte_dehānta na_na saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya na_na atra_atra pratibandha--_pratibandha śaṅkā_śaṅkā kartavyā_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha eva_eva atas_atas ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam iti_iti atra_atra sandhi--_saṃdhi abhāvaḥ_abhāva śloka--_śloka pūraṇa--_pūraṇa arthaḥ_artha

kuru_kṛ upadiśati_upadiś kāreṇa_kāra nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa vyāvṛttiḥ_vyāvṛtti mayi_mad śyāma--_śyāma sundare_sundara pīta--_pīta ambare_ambara vanamālini_vanamālin manaḥ_manas ādhatsva_ādhā mad--_mad smaraṇam_smaraṇa kuru_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā buddhim_buddhi vivekavatīm_vivekavat niveśaya_niveśay mad--_mad mananam_manana kuru_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad ca_ca mananam_manana dhyāna--_dhyāna pratipādaka--_pratipādaka śāstra--_śāstra vākya--_vākya anuśīlanam_anuśīlana tatas_tatas ca_ca mayi_mad eva_eva nivasiṣyasi_nivas iti_iti chāndasam_chāndasa mad--_mad samīpe_samīpa eva_eva nivāsam_nivāsa prāpnoṣi_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt tvam_tvad mayi_mad eva_eva na_na tu_tu svātmani_svātman manaḥ_manas ādhatsva_ādhā samāhitam_samādhā kuru_kṛ buddhim_buddhi mayi_mad niveśaya_niveśay arpaya_arpay evam_evam kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ tvam_tvad mayi_mad eva_eva mama_mad kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa sannidhau_saṃnidhi eva_eva nivatsyasi_nivas na_na tu_tu sa_sa niṣṭha--_niṣṭha vat_vat sarga--_sarga ādikam_ādika anubhavan_anubhū aiśvarya--_aiśvarya pradhānam_pradhāna mām_mad prāpsyasi_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 12.9

lg.l: atha_atha cittam_citta samādhātum_samādhā na_na śaknoṣi_śak mayi_mad sthiram_sthira
abhyāsa--_abhyāsa yogena_yoga tatas_tatas mām_mad iccha_iṣ āptum_āp dhanaṃjaya_dhanaṃjaya

div.p: āha_ah sthiram_sthira yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evam_evam mayi_mad cittam_citta dhārayitum_dhāray yadi_yadi śaktaḥ_śak na_na bhavasi_bhū tarhi_tarhi vikṣiptam_vikṣip cittam_citta punar_punar punar_punar pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ mad--_mad anusmaraṇa--_anusmaraṇa lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa yaḥ_yad abhyāsa--_abhyāsa yogaḥ_yoga tena_tad mām_mad prāptum_prāp iccha_iṣ prayatnam_prayatna kuru_kṛ

tribhiḥ_tri ślokaiḥ_śloka vidhatte_vidhā atha_atha iti_iti atha_atha pakṣa--_pakṣa antare_antara sthiram_sthira yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā cittam_citta samādhātum_samādhā sthāpayitum_sthāpay mayi_mad na_na śaknoṣi_śak ced_ced tatas_tatas ekasmin_eka pratimā--_pratimā ādau_ādi ālambane_ālambana sarvatas_sarvatas samāhṛtya_samāhṛ cetasaḥ_cetas punar_punar punar_punar sthāpanam_sthāpana abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa tad--_tad pūrvakaḥ_pūrvaka tena_tad abhyāsa--_abhyāsa yogena_yoga mām_mad āptum_āp iccha_iṣ yatasva_yat he_he dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya bahūn_bahu śatrūn_śatru jitvā_ji dhanam_dhana āhṛtavān_āhṛ asi_as rājasūya--_rājasūya ādi--_ādi artham_artha ekam_eka manaḥ--_manas śatrum_śatru jitvā_ji
āhariṣyasi_āhṛ iti_iti na_na tava_tvad āścaryam_āścarya iti_iti sambodhana--_sambodhana arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah abhyāsa--_abhyāsa yogena_yoga anyatra_anyatra anyatra_anyatra gatam_gam api_api manaḥ_manas punar_punar pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ mad--_mad rūpe_rūpa eva_eva sthāpanam_sthāpana abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa saḥ_tad eva_eva yogaḥ_yoga tena_tad prākṛta--_prākṛta tvāt_tva iti_iti kutsita--_kutsay rūpa--_rūpa rasa--_rasa ādiṣu_ādi calantyāḥ_cal manaḥ--_manas nadyāḥ_nadī teṣu_tad calanam_calana nirudhya_nirudh ati_ati su_su bhadreṣu_bhadra madīya--_madīya rūpa--_rūpa rasa--_rasa ādiṣu_ādi tad--_tad calanam_calana śanais_śanais śanais_śanais sampādaya_sampāday iti_iti arthaḥ_artha he_he dhanañjaya_dhanaṃjaya iti_iti bahūn_bahu śatrūn_śatru jitvā_ji dhanam_dhana āhṛtavatā_āhṛ tvayā_tvad manaḥ_manas api_api jitvā_ji dhyāna--_dhyāna dhanam_dhana grahītum_grah śakyam_śakya eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu gaṅgā_gaṅgā iva_iva yeṣām_yad manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti rodhavatī_rodhavat teṣām_tad tvad--_tvad prāptiḥ_prāpti tvarayā_tvarā syāt_as mama_mad tu_tu tādṛśī_tādṛśa na_na tad--_tad vṛttiḥ_vṛtti tatas_tatas katham_katham sā_tad iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah atha_atha iti_iti sthiram_sthira yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā mayi_mad cittam_citta samyak_samyak anāyāsena_anāyāsa ādhātum_ādhā arpayitum_arpay na_na śaknoṣi_śak ced_ced tatas_tatas abhyāsa--_abhyāsa yogena_yoga mām_mad āptum_āp iccha_iṣ yatasva_yat tatas_tatas anyatra_anyatra gatasya_gam manasaḥ_manas pratyāhṛtya_pratyāhṛ śanais_śanais śanais_śanais mayi_mad sthāpanam_sthāpana abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa tena_tad manasi_manas mad--_mad pravaṇe_pravaṇa sati_as mad--_mad prāptiḥ_prāpti sulabhā_sulabha syāt_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

lg.l: abhyāse_abhyāsa api_api asamarthaḥ_asamartha asi_as mad--_mad karma--_karman paramaḥ_parama bhava_bhū
mad--_mad artham_artha api_api karmāṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ siddhim_siddhi avāpsyasi_avāp

div.p: āha_ah yadi_yadi punar_punar abhyāse_abhyāsa api_api aśaktaḥ_aśakta asi_as tarhi_tarhi mad--_mad prīti--_prīti arthāni_artha yāni_yad karmāṇi_karman ekādaśī--_ekādaśī upavāsa--_upavāsa vrata--_vrata caryā--_caryā pūjā--_pūjā nāma--_nāman saṅkīrtana--_saṃkīrtana ādīni_ādi tad--_tad anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna eva_eva paramam_parama yasya_yad tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa bhava_bhū evaṃbhūtāni_evaṃbhūta karmāṇi_karman api_api mad--_mad artham_artha kurvan_kṛ mokṣam_mokṣa prāpsyasi_prāp

bhava_bhū abhyāsa--_abhyāsa asamarthye_asamarthya mad--_mad artham_artha bhāgavata--_bhāgavata dharma--_dharma saṃjñakāni_saṃjñaka karmāṇi_karman api_api kurvan_kṛ siddhim_siddhi brahma--_brahman bhāva--_bhāva lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi jñāna--_jñāna utpatti--_utpatti dvāreṇa_dvāra avāpsyasi_avāp

icchati_iṣ tathā_tathā eva_eva avidyā--_avidyā dūṣitam_dūṣay manaḥ_manas tad--_tad rūpa--_rūpa ādikam_ādika madhuram_madhura api_api na_na gṛhṇāti_grah iti_iti atas_atas tena_tad durgraheṇa_durgraha mahā--_mahat prabalena_prabala manasā_manas saha_saha yoddhum_yudh mayā_mad nā_na eva_eva śakyate_śak iti_iti manyase_man ced_ced iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva mad--_mad karmāṇi_karman paramāṇi_parama yasya_yad saḥ_tad karmāṇi_karman madīya--_madīya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana vandana--_vandana arcana--_arcana mad--_mad mandira--_mandira mārjana--_mārjana abhyukṣaṇa--_abhyukṣaṇa puṣpa--_puṣpa āharaṇa--_āharaṇa ādi--_ādi paricaraṇa--_paricaraṇa ādi_ādi kurvan_kṛ vinā_vinā api_api mad--_mad smaraṇam_smaraṇa siddhim_siddhi premavat--_premavat pārṣada--_pārṣada tva--_tva lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa prāpsyati_prāp

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu vāyoḥ_vāyu iva_iva manasaḥ_manas ati_ati cāpalyāt_cāpalya tasya_tad pratyāhāre_pratyāhāra mama_mad na_na śaktiḥ_śakti iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah abhyāse_abhyāsa api_api iti_iti ukta--_vac lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa abhyāse_abhyāsa api_api ced_ced tvam_tvad asamarthaḥ_asamartha tarhi_tarhi mad--_mad karmāṇi_karman paramāṇi_parama pumartha--_pumartha bhūtāni_bhū yasya_yad tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa bhava_bhū tāni_tad ca_ca mad--_mad niketa--_niketa nirmāṇa--_nirmāṇa mad--_mad puṣpa--_puṣpa bāṭī--_bāṭī secana--_secana ādīni_ādi pūrvam_pūrvam uktāni_vac evam_evam sukarāṇi_sukara mad--_mad arthāni_artha karmāṇi_karman kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ tvam_tvad tatra_tatra tara_tṛ ati_ati manojña--_manojña mad--_mad mūrti--_mūrti uddeśa--_uddeśa mahimnā_mahiman tādṛśe_tādṛśa mayi_mad nirata--_niram manāḥ_manas saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi mad--_mad sāmīpya--_sāmīpya lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa avāpsyasi_avāp iti_iti ati_ati sugamaḥ_sugama ayam_idam

lg.l: athā_atha etat_etad api_api aśaktaḥ_aśakta asi_as kartum_kṛ mad--_mad yogam_yoga āśritaḥ_āśri
sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgam_tyāga tatas_tatas kuru_kṛ yata--_yam ātmavān_ātmavat

div.p: āha_ah yadi_yadi etat_etad api_api kartum_kṛ na_na śaknoṣi_śak tarhi_tarhi mad--_mad ayogam_ayoga mad--_mad eka--_eka śaraṇa--_śaraṇa tvam_tva āśritaḥ_āśri san_as sarveṣām_sarva dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa arthānām_artha āvaśyakānām_āvaśyaka ca_ca agnihotra--_agnihotra ādi--_ādi karmaṇām_karman phalāni_phala niyata--_niyam cittam_citta bhūḥ_bhū tvā_tvad etat_etad uktam_vac bhavati_bhū mayā_mad tāvat_tāvat īśvara--_īśvara ājñayā_ājñā yathā_yathā śakti_śakti karmāṇi_karman kartavyāni_kṛ phalam_phala tāvat_tāvat dṛṣṭam_dṛś adṛṣṭam_adṛṣṭa vā_vā parameśvara--_parameśvara adhīnam_adhīna iti_iti evam_evam mayi_mad bhāram_bhāra āropya_āropay phala--_phala āsaktim_āsakti parityajya_parityaj vartamānaḥ_vṛt mad--_mad prasādena_prasāda kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha bhaviṣyasi_bhū iti_iti
div.l: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana atha_atha bahis_bahis viṣaya--_viṣaya ākṛṣṭa--_ākṛṣ cetas--_cetas tvāt_tva etat_etad mad--_mad karma--_karman paratvam_paratva api_api kartum_kṛ na_na śaknoṣi_śak tatas_tatas mad--_mad yogam_yoga mad--_mad eka--_eka śaraṇa--_śaraṇa tvam_tva āśritaḥ_āśri mayi_mad sarva--_sarva karma--_karman samarpaṇam_samarpaṇa mad--_mad yogaḥ_yoga tam_tad vā_vā saṃyata--_saṃyam sarva--_sarva indriyaḥ_indriya ātmavān_ātmavat vivekī_vivekin ca_ca san_as sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgam_tyāga kuru_kṛ phala--_phala abhisandhim_abhisaṃdhi tyaja_tyaj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha etat_etad api_api kartum_kṛ aśaktaḥ_aśakta ced_ced tarhi_tarhi mad--_mad yogam_yoga āśritaḥ_āśri mayi_mad sarva--_sarva karma--_karman samarpaṇam_samarpaṇa mad--_mad yogaḥ_yoga tam_tad āśritaḥ_āśri san_as sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgam_tyāga prathama--_prathama ṣaṭka--_ṣaṭka uktam_vac kuru_kṛ ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha prathama--_prathama ṣaṭke_ṣaṭka bhagavat--_bhagavant arpita--_arpay niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva mokṣa--_mokṣa upāyaḥ_upāya uktaḥ_vac dvitīya--_dvitīya ṣaṭke_ṣaṭka asmin_idam bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva bhagavat--_bhagavant prāpti--_prāpti upāyaḥ_upāya uktaḥ_vac sa_tad ca_ca bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga dvividhaḥ_dvividha bhagavat--_bhagavant niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭha antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa vyāpāraḥ_vyāpāra bahiṣkaraṇa--_bahiṣkaraṇa vyāpāraḥ_vyāpāra ca_ca tatra_tatra prathamaḥ_prathama trividhaḥ_trividha smaraṇa--_smaraṇa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka manana--_manana ātmakaḥ_ātmaka ca_ca akhaṇḍa--_akhaṇḍa smaraṇa--_smaraṇa asāmarthye_asāmarthya tad--_tad anurāginām_anurāgin tad--_tad abhyāsa--_abhyāsa rūpam_rūpa ca_ca iti_iti trikaḥ_trika eva_eva ayam_idam manda--_manda dhiyām_dhī durgamaḥ_durgama sudhiyām_sudhī niraparādhānām_niraparādha tu_tu sugamaḥ_sugama eva_eva dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana ātmakam_ātmaka tu_tu sarveṣām_sarva sugamaḥ_sugama eva_eva upāyaḥ_upāya evam_evam ubhaya--_ubhaya upāya--_upāya vantaḥ_vat adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin sarvatas_sarvatas prakṛṣṭāḥ_prakṛṣṭa dvitīya--_dvitīya ṣaṭke_ṣaṭka asmin_idam uktāḥ_vac etad--_etad kṛtya--_kṛtya samarthāḥ_samartha indriyāṇām_indriya bhagavat--_bhagavant niṣṭhīkṛtau_niṣṭhīkṛti aśraddhālavaḥ_aśraddhālu ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant arpita--_arpay niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmiṇaḥ_karmin prathama--_prathama ṣaṭka--_ṣaṭka uta--_ve adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin asmāt_idam nikṛṣṭāḥ_nikṛṣṭa eva_eva iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva asi_as sarveṣām_sarva anuṣṭhīyamānānām_anuṣṭhā karmaṇām_karman phala--_phala tyāgam_tyāga kuru_kṛ yata--_yam ātmavān_ātmavat vijita--_viji manāḥ_manas bhūtvā_bhū tathā_tathā ca_ca phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi śūnyaiḥ_śūnya agnihotra--_agnihotra darśa--_darśa paurṇamāsī--_paurṇamāsī ādibhiḥ_ādi mad--_mad ārādhana--_ārādhana rūpaiḥ_rūpa karmabhiḥ_karman sva--_sva para--_para ātmanoḥ_ātman śeṣa--_śeṣa śeṣi--_śeṣin bhāve_bhāva abhyudite_abhivad sva--_sva śeṣiṇi_śeṣin sarva--_sarva uttama--_uttama tvena_tva vidite_vid śanais_śanais śanais_śanais parā_para api_api bhaktiḥ_bhakti syāt_as iti_iti evam_evam eva_eva vakṣyati_vac yatas_yatas pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti bhūtānām_bhūta iti_iti ādinā_ādi
mad--_mad bhaktim_bhakti labhate_labh parām_para iti_iti anena_idam

lg.l: śreyaḥ_śreyas hi_hi jñānam_jñāna abhyāsāt_abhyāsa jñānāt_jñāna dhyānam_dhyāna viśiṣyate_viśiṣ
dhyānāt_dhyāna karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgaḥ_tyāga tyāgāt_tyāga śāntiḥ_śānti anantaram_anantaram

div.p: stauti_stu tasmāt_tasmāt api_api tad--_tad pūrvam_pūrva dhyānam_dhyāna viśiṣṭam_viśiṣ tatas_tatas tu_tu tam_tad paśyati_paś niṣkalam_niṣkala dhyāyamānaḥ_dhyā iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tasmāt_tasmāt api_api ukta--_vac lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgaḥ_tyāga śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha tasmāt_tad evaṃbhūtāt_evaṃbhūta karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgāt_tyāga karmasu_karman tad--_tad phaleṣu_phala ca_ca āsakti--_āsakti nivṛttyā_nivṛtti mad--_mad prasādena_prasāda ca_ca samanantaram_samanantara eva_eva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra śāntiḥ_śānti bhavati_bhū

stauti_stu śreyaḥ_śreyas praśasyataram_praśasyatara hi_hi eva_eva jñānam_jñāna śabda--_śabda yuktibhyām_yukti ātma--_ātman niścayaḥ_niścaya abhyāsāḥ_abhyāsa jñāna--_jñāna artha--_artha śravaṇa--_śravaṇa abhyāsāt_abhyāsa jñānāt_jñāna śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana pariniṣpannāt_pariniṣpad api_api dhyānam_dhyāna nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana saṃjñam_saṃjñā viśiṣyate_viśiṣ atiśayitam_atiśī bhavati_bhū sākṣātkāra--_sākṣātkāra avyavahita--_avyavahita hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva tat_tad evam_evam sarva--_sarva sādhana--_sādhana śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha dhyānam_dhyāna tatas_tatas api_api atiśayita--_atiśī tvena_tva ajña--_ajña kṛtaḥ_kṛ karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgaḥ_tyāga stūyate_stu

dhyānāt_dhyāna karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgaḥ_tyāga viśiṣyate_viśiṣ iti_iti anuṣajyate_anuṣañj tyāgāt_tyāga niyata--_niyam cittena_citta puṃsā_puṃs kṛtāt_kṛ sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgāt_tyāga śāntiḥ_śānti upaśamaḥ_upaśama sa_sa hetukasya_hetuka saṃsārasya_saṃsāra anantaram_anantaram api_api avadhānena_avadhāna na_na tu_tu kāla--_kāla

lg.l: yadā_yadā sarve_sarva pramucyante_pramuc kāmāḥ_kāma ye_yad asya_idam hṛdi_hṛd sthitāḥ_sthā
atha_atha martyaḥ_martya amṛtaḥ_amṛta bhavati_bhū atra_atra brahma_brahman samaśnute_samaś

div.p: iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutiṣu_śruti prajahāti_prahā yadā_yadā kāmān_kāma sarvān_sarva iti_iti ādi--_ādi sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajñā lakṣaṇeṣu_lakṣaṇa ca_ca sarva--_sarva kāma--_kāma tyāgasya_tyāga amṛta--_amṛta tva--_tva sādhana--_sādhana tvam_tva avagatam_avagam karma--_karman phalāni_phala ca_ca kāmāḥ_kāma tad--_tad tyāgaḥ_tyāga api_api kāma--_kāma tyāga--_tyāga tva--_tva sāmānyāt_sāmānya sarva--_sarva kāma--_kāma tyāga--_tyāga phalena_phala stūyate_stu yathā_yathā agastyena_agastya brāhmaṇena_brāhmaṇa samudraḥ_samudra pītaḥ_pā iti_iti yathā_yathā vā_vā jāmadagnyena_jāmadagnya brāhmaṇena_brāhmaṇa niḥkṣatrā_niḥkṣatra pṛthivī_pṛthivī kṛtā_kṛ iti_iti bāhmaṇa--_bāhmaṇa tva--_tva sāmānyāt_sāmānya idānīntanāḥ_idānīntana api_api brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa aparimeya--_aparimeya parākrama--_parākrama tvena_tva stūyante_stu

āha_ah abhyāsāt_abhyāsa jñānam_jñāna mayi_mad buddhim_buddhi niveśaya_niveśay iti_iti uktam_vac mad--_mad mananam_manana śreyaḥ_śreyas śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha abhyāse_abhyāsa sati_as āyāsataḥ_āyāsa eva_eva dhyānam_dhyāna syāt_as manane_manana sati_as tu_tu anāyāsataḥ_anāyāsa eva_eva dhyānam_dhyāna iti_iti viśeṣāt_viśeṣa tasmāt_tasmāt jñānāt_jñāna api_api dhyānam_dhyāna viśiṣyate_viśiṣ śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kutas_kutas iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah dhyānāt_dhyāna karma--_karman phalānām_phala svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi sukhānām_sukha niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman phalasya_phala mokṣasya_mokṣa ca_ca tyāgaḥ_tyāga tad--_tad spṛhā--_spṛhā rāhityam_rāhitya syāt_as svatas_svatas prāptasya_prāp api_api tasya_tad upekṣā_upekṣā niścala--_niścala dhyānāt_dhyāna pūrvam_pūrvam tu_tu bhaktānām_bhakta ajāta--_ajāta ratīnām_rati mokṣa--_mokṣa tyāga--_tyāga icchā_icchā eva_eva bhavet_bhū niścala--_niścala dhyānavatām_dhyānavat tu_tu mokṣa--_mokṣa upekṣā_upekṣā sā_tad eva_eva mokṣa--_mokṣa laghutā--_laghutā kāriṇī_kārin yat_yad uktam_vac bhakti--_bhakti rasāmṛta--_rasāmṛta sindhau_sindhu kleśa--_kleśa ghnī_ghna śubha--_śubha dā_da iti_iti atra_atra ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ padaiḥ_pada etat_etad māhātmyam_māhātmya kīrtitam_kīrtay iti_iti yat_yad uktam_vac

na_na pārameṣṭhyam_pārameṣṭhya na_na mahendra--_mahendra dhiṣṇyam_dhiṣṇya na_na sārvabhaumam_sārvabhauma na_na rasa--_rasa ādhipatyam_ādhipatya na_na yoga--_yoga siddhīḥ_siddhi apunar_apunar bhavam_bhava vā_vā
mayi_mad arpita--_arpay ātmā_ātman icchati_iṣ mat_mad vinā_vinā anyat_anya

mayi_mad arpita--_arpay ātmā_ātman mad--_mad dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā tyāgāt_tyāga vaitṛṣṇyāt_vaitṛṣṇya anantaram_anantaram eva_eva śāntiḥ_śānti mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa guṇa--_guṇa ādikam_ādika vinā_vinā sarva--_sarva viṣayeṣu_viṣaya eva_eva indriyāṇām_indriya uparatiḥ_uparati atra_atra pūrva--_pūrva ardhe_ardha śreyaḥ_śreyas iti_iti viśiṣyate_viśiṣ iti_iti pada--_pada dvayena_dvaya anvayāt_anvaya uttara--_uttara ardhe_ardha tu_tu anantaram_anantaram iti_iti anena_idam eva_eva anvayāt_anvaya eṣā_etad eva_eva vyākhyā_vyākhyā samyak_samyak upapadyate_upapad na_na anyā_anya iti_iti avadheyam_avadhā

baladevaḥ_baladeva sukara--_sukara tvāt_tva apramāda--_apramāda tvāt_tva jñāna--_jñāna garbha--_garbha tvāt_tva ca_ca an_an ibhisaṃhitam_abhisaṃdhā phalam_phala karma--_karman yogam_yoga stauti_stu śreyaḥ_śreyas hi_hi iti_iti abhyāsāt_abhyāsa mad--_mad smṛti--_smṛti sātatya--_sātatya rūpāt_rūpa aniṣpannāt_aniṣpanna jñānam_jñāna svātma--_svātman sākṣātkṛti--_sākṣātkṛti rūpam_rūpa śreyaḥ_śreyas praśastataram_praśastatara paramātma--_paramātman upalabdhi--_upalabdhi dvāra--_dvāra tvāt_tva jñānāt_jñāna ca_ca tasmāt_tad aniṣpannāt_aniṣpanna sādhana--_sādhana bhūtam_bhū dhyānam_dhyāna sva--_sva ātma--_ātman cintana--_cintana lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa viśiṣyate_viśiṣ sva--_sva hita--_hita tve_tva śreyaḥ_śreyas bhavati_bhū dhyānāt_dhyāna ca_ca tasmāt_tad aniṣpannāt_aniṣpanna karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgāt_tyāga anantaram_anantaram śāntiḥ_śānti tyakta--_tyaj phalāt_phala anuṣṭhitā_anuṣṭhā karmaṇaḥ_karman anantaram_anantaram manaḥ--_manas śuddhiḥ_śuddhi iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca śuddhe_śudh manasi_manas dhyānam_dhyāna niṣpadyate_niṣpad niṣpanne_niṣpad dhyāne_dhyāna sva--_sva sākṣātkṛti--_sākṣātkṛti rūpam_rūpa jñānam_jñāna jñāne_jñāna niṣpanne_niṣpad tad--_tad phala--_phala bhūtam_bhū paramātma--_paramātman jñānam_jñāna tena_tena parā_para bhaktiḥ_bhakti tad--_tad yiśvarya--_yiśvarya pradhānasya_pradhāna mama_mad prāptiḥ_prāpti iti_iti durgamaḥ_durgama ayam_idam upāyaḥ_upāya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na ca_ca ayam_idam arjunam_arjuna prati_prati upadeśaḥ_upadeśa tasya_tad ekānti--_ekāntin tvāt_tva sat--_sat niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman ratāḥ_ram hari--_hari dhyāyinaḥ_dhyāyin ca_ca sva--_sva ātmānam_ātman anubhūya_anubhū tatas_tatas abhyuditayā_abhyudi pāramaiśvarya--_pāramaiśvarya guṇayā_guṇa parayā_para bhaktyā_bhakti harim_hari prema--_preman āspadam_āspada anubhavantaḥ_anubhū vimucyante_vimuc iti_iti gītā--_gītā śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha kintu_kiṃtu ekānti--_ekāntin tva--_tva āsaktam_āsañj pratīti--_pratīti bodhyam_budh

lg.l: a_a dveṣṭā_dveṣṭṛ sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta maitraḥ_maitra karuṇaḥ_karuṇa eva_eva ca_ca
nirmamaḥ_nirmama nirahaṃkāraḥ_nirahaṃkāra sama--_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhaḥ_sukha kṣamī_kṣamin
saṃtuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ satatam_satatam yogī_yogin yata--_yam ātmā_ātman dṛḍha--_dṛḍha niścayaḥ_niścaya
mayi_mad arpita--_arpay manaḥ--_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi yaḥ_yad mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya

div.p: āha_ah sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta yathāyatham_yathāyatham a_a dveṣṭā_dveṣṭṛ maitraḥ_maitra karuṇaḥ_karuṇa ca_ca uttameṣu_uttama dveṣa--_dveṣa śūnyaḥ_śūnya sameṣu_sama mitra--_mitra tayā_tā vartate_vṛt iti_iti maitraḥ_maitra hīneṣu_hā kṛpāluḥ_kṛpālu iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nirmamaḥ_nirmama nirahaṃkāraḥ_nirahaṃkāra ca_ca kṛpālu--_kṛpālu tvāt_tva eva_eva anyaiḥ_anya saha_saha same_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhe_sukha yasya_yad saḥ_tad kṣamī_kṣamin kṣamā--_kṣamā śīlaḥ_śīla

saṃtuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ iti_iti satatam_satatam lābhe_lābha alābhe_alābha ca_ca saṃtuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ su_su prasanna--_prasad cittaḥ_citta yogī_yogin apramattaḥ_apramatta yata--_yam ātmā_ātman saṃyata--_saṃyam svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva dṛḍhaḥ_dṛḍha mad--_mad viṣayaḥ_viṣaya yasya_yad mayi_mad arpite_arpay manaḥ--_manas buddhī_buddhi yena_yad

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam mandam_manda adhikāriṇam_adhikārin prati_prati ati_ati duṣkara--_duṣkara tvena_tva akṣara--_akṣara upāsana--_upāsana nindayā_nindā sukaram_sukara saguṇa--_saguṇa upāsanam_upāsana vidhāya_vidhā aśakti--_aśakti tāratamya--_tāratamya anuvādena_anuvāda anyāni_anya api_api sādhanāni_sādhana vidadhau_vidhā bhagavān_bhagavant vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva sarva--_sarva pratibandha--_pratibandha rahitaḥ_rahita san_as uttama--_uttama adhikāri--_adhikārin tayā_tā phala--_phala bhūtāyām_bhū akṣara--_akṣara vidyāyām_vidyā avataret_avatṛ iti_iti abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya sādhana--_sādhana vidhānasya_vidhāna phala--_phala artha--_artha tvāt_tva tat_tad uktam_vac

lg.l: nirviśeṣam_nirviśeṣa param_para brahma_brahman sākṣātkartum_sākṣātkṛ anīśvarāḥ_anīśvara
ye_yad mandāḥ_manda te_tad anukampyante_anukamp sa_sa viśeṣa--_viśeṣa nirūpaṇaiḥ_nirūpaṇa

div.p: vaśīkṛte_vaśīkṛ manasi_manas eṣām_idam sa_sa guṇa--_guṇa brahma--_brahman śīlanāt_śīlana tat_tad eva_eva āvirbhavet_āvirbhū sākṣāt_sākṣāt apeta--_ape upādhi--_upādhi kalpanam_kalpanā

bhagavatā_bhagavat patañjalinā_patañjali ca_ca uktam_vac samādhi--_samādhi siddhiḥ_siddhi īśvara--_īśvara praṇidhānāt_praṇidhāna iti_iti tatas_tatas pratyak--_pratyañc cetanā--_cetanā adhigamaḥ_adhigama api_api antarāya--_antarāya abhāvaḥ_abhāva ca_ca iti_iti ca_ca tatas_tatas iti_iti īśvara--_īśvara praṇidhānāt_praṇidhāna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad evam_evam akṣara--_akṣara upāsana--_upāsana nindā_nindā sa_sa guṇa--_guṇa upāsana--_upāsana stutaye_stuti na_na tu_tu heya--_hā tayā_tā udita--_vad homa--_homa vidhau_vidhi anudita--_anudita homa--_homa nindā--_nindā vat_vat na_na hi_hi nindā_nindā nindyam_nind ninditum_nind pravartate_pravṛt api_api tu_tu vidheyam_vidhā stotum_stu iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya tasmāt_tasmāt akṣara--_akṣara upāsakāḥ_upāsaka eva_eva paramārthataḥ_paramārtha yoga--_yoga vittamāḥ_vittama

lg.l: priyaḥ_priya hi_hi jñāninaḥ_jñānin atyartham_atyartham aham_mad sa_tad ca_ca mama_mad priyaḥ_priya
udārāḥ_udāra sarve_sarva eva_eva ete_etad jñānī_jñānin tu_tu ātmā_ātman eva_eva me_mad matam_man

div.p: iti_iti ādinā_ādi punar_punar punar_punar praśastatama--_praśastatama tayā_tā uktāḥ_vac teṣām_tad eva_eva jñānam_jñāna dharma--_dharma jātam_jāta ca_ca anusaraṇīyam_anusṛ adhikāram_adhikāra āsādya_āsāday tvayā_tvad iti_iti arjunam_arjuna bubodhayiṣuḥ_bubodhayiṣu parama--_parama hita--_hita eṣī_eṣin bhagavān_bhagavant abheda--_abheda darśinaḥ_darśin kṛta--_kṛ kṛtyān_kṛtya saptabhiḥ_saptan

sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta ātmatvena_ātmatva paśyan_dṛś ātmanaḥ_ātman duḥkha--_duḥkha hetau_hetu api_api pratikūla--_pratikūla buddhi--_buddhi abhāvāt_abhāva na_na dveṣṭā_dveṣṭṛ sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta kintu_kiṃtu maitrī_maitrī snigdha--_snigdha tā_tā tadvān_tadvat yatas_yatas karuṇaḥ_karuṇa karuṇā_karuṇā duḥkhiteṣu_duḥkhita dayā_dayā tadvān_tadvat sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta abhaya--_abhaya dātā_dātṛ paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājakaḥ_parivrājaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nirmamaḥ_nirmama dehe_deha api_api mama_mad iti_iti pratyaya--_pratyaya rahitaḥ_rahita nirahaṅkāraḥ_nirahaṃkāra vṛtta--_vṛtta svādhyāya--_svādhyāya ādi--_ādi kṛta--_kṛ ahaṅkārāt_ahaṃkāra niṣkrāntaḥ_niṣkram dveṣa--_dveṣa rāgayoḥ_rāga apravartaka--_apravartaka tvena_tva same_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhe_sukha yasya_yad saḥ_tad ataeva_ataeva kṣamī_kṣamin ākrośana--_ākrośana tāḍana--_tāḍana ādinā_ādi api_api na_na vikriyām_vikriyā āpadyate_āpad

tasya_tad eva_eva viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa antarāṇi_antara santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ iti_iti satatam_satatam śarīra--_śarīra sthiti--_sthiti kāraṇasya_kāraṇa lābhe_lābha alābhe_alābha ca_ca saṃtuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ utpanna--_utpad alam_alam pratyayaḥ_pratyaya tathā_tathā guṇavat--_guṇavat lābhe_lābha viparyaye_viparyaya ca_ca satatam_satatam iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra sambadhyate_sambandh yogī_yogin samāhita--_samāhita cittaḥ_citta yata--_yam ātmā_ātman saṃyata--_saṃyam śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi saṃghātaḥ_saṃghāta dṛḍhaḥ_dṛḍha ku_ku tārkikaiḥ_tārkika abhibhavitum_abhibhū aśakya--_aśakya tayā_tā sthiraḥ_sthira niścayaḥ_niścaya aham_mad asmi_as brahma_brahman iti_iti adhyavasāyaḥ_adhyavasāya yasya_yad sa_tad dṛḍha--_dṛḍha niścayaḥ_niścaya sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mayi_mad bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva śuddhe_śuddha brahmaṇi_brahman arpita--_arpay manaḥ--_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi samarpita--_samarpay antar_antar karaṇaḥ_karaṇa īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa yaḥ_yad mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta śuddha--_śuddha akṣara--_akṣara brahma--_brahman vid_vid sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya mad--_mad ātma--_ātman tvāt_tva
