bhavati_bhū āha_ah a_a dveṣṭā_dveṣṭṛ dviṣatsu_dviṣ api_api dveṣam_dveṣa na_na karoti_kṛ pratyuta_pratyuta mitraḥ_mitra mitra--_mitra tayā_tā vartate_vṛt karuṇaḥ_karuṇa eṣām_idam asat--_asat gatiḥ_gati mā_mā bhavatu_bhū iti_iti buddhyā_buddhi teṣu_tad kṛpāluḥ_kṛpālu nanu_nanu kīdṛśena_kīdṛśa vivekena_viveka dviṣatsu_dviṣ api_api maitrī--_maitrī kāruṇye_kāruṇya syātām_as tatra_tatra vivekam_viveka vinā_vinā eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah nirmamaḥ_nirmama nirahaṃkāraḥ_nirahaṃkāra iti_iti putra--_putra kalatra--_kalatra ādiṣu_ādi mamatva--_mamatva abhāvāt_abhāva dehe_deha ca_ca ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra abhāvāt_abhāva tasya_tad mad--_mad bhaktasya_bhakta kvāpi_kvāpi dveṣaḥ_dveṣa eva_eva nā_na eva_eva phalati_phal kutas_kutas punar_punar dveṣa--_dveṣa janita--_janay duḥkha--_duḥkha śānti--_śānti artham_artha tena_tad vivekaḥ_viveka svīkartavyaḥ_svīkṛ iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu tat_tad api_api anya--_anya kṛta--_kṛ pāduka--_pāduka muṣṭi--_muṣṭi prahāra--_prahāra ādibhiḥ_ādi deha--_deha vyathā--_vyathā dīnam_dīna duḥkham_duḥkha kiṃcid_kaścit bhavati_bhū eva_eva tatra_tatra āha_ah sama--_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukham_sukha yat_yad uktam_vac bhagavatā_bhagavat candra--_candra ardha--_ardha śekhareṇa_śekhara

nārāyaṇa--_nārāyaṇa parāḥ_para sarve_sarva bibhyati_bhī
svarga--_svarga apavarga--_apavarga narakeṣu_naraka api_api tulya--_tulya artha--_artha darśiṇaḥ_darśin

sukha--_sukha duḥkhayoḥ_duḥkha sāmyam_sāmya sama--_sama darśi--_darśin tvam_tva tat_tad ca_ca mama_mad prārabdha--_prārabh phalam_phala idam_idam avśya--_avśya bhogyam_bhuj iti_iti bhāvanā--_bhāvanā mayam_maya sāmye_sāmya api_api sahiṣṇuvā_sahiṣṇu eva_eva duḥkham_duḥkha sahyate_sah iti_iti āha_ah kṣamī_kṣamin kṣamavān_kṣamavat kṣam_kṣam sahane_sahana

nanu_nanu etādṛśasya_etādṛśa bhaktasya_bhakta jīvikā_jīvikā katham_katham sidhyet_sidh tatra_tatra āha_ah santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā upasthite_upasthā kiṃcid_kaścit yatna--_yatna upasthite_upasthā vā_vā bhakṣya--_bhakṣya vastuni_vastu santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ

nanu_nanu sama--_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukham_sukha iti_iti uktam_vac tat_tad katham_katham sva--_sva bhakṣam_bhakṣa ālakṣya_ālakṣay santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah satatam_satatam yogī_yogin bhakti--_bhakti yoga--_yoga yuktaḥ_yuj bhakti--_bhakti siddhārtham_siddhārtha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva yat_yad uktam_vac
āhāra--_āhāra artham_artha yatatā_yat eva_eva yuktam_yuj tat_tad prāṇa--_prāṇa dhāraṇam_dhāraṇa tattvam_tattva vimṛśyate_vimṛś tena_tena tat_tad vijñāya_vijñā param_para vrajet_vraj iti_iti

kim_ka ca_ca aprāpta--_aprāpta bhaikṣyaḥ_bhaikṣya api_api yata--_yam ātmā_ātman saṃyata--_saṃyam cittaḥ_citta kṣobha--_kṣobha rahitaḥ_rahita iti_iti arthaḥ_artha daivāt_daiva citta--_citta kṣobhe_kṣobha sati_as api_api tad--_tad upaśama--_upaśama artham_artha aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yoga--_yoga abhyāsa--_abhyāsa ādikam_ādika na_na eva_eva karoti_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah dṛḍha--_dṛḍha niścayaḥ_niścaya ananya--_ananya bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva me_mad kartavyā_kṛ iti_iti niścayaḥ_niścaya tasya_tad na_na śithilībhavati_śithilībhū iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra hetuḥ_hetu mayi_mad arpita--_arpay manaḥ--_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi mad--_mad smaraṇa--_smaraṇa manana--_manana parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa bhaktaḥ_bhakta tu_tu me_mad priyaḥ_priya mām_mad atiprīṇayati_atiprīṇay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam ekānti--_ekāntin bhaktān_bhaj pariniṣṭhita--_pariniṣṭhā ādīn_ādi anekānti--_anekāntin bhaktān_bhaj saniṣṭhān_saniṣṭha ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad sādhana--_sādhana bhedaiḥ_bheda upavarṇya_upavarṇay teṣām_tad sarva--_sarva uparañjakān_uparañjaka guṇān_guṇa vidadhāti_vidhā a_a dveṣṭā_dviṣ iti_iti saptabhiḥ_saptan sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta a_a dveṣṭā_dveṣṭṛ dveṣam_dveṣa kurvatsu_kṛ api_api teṣu_tad mad--_mad prārabhda--_prārabhda anuguṇa--_anuguṇa pareśa--_pareśa preritāni_preray amūni_adas mahyam_mad dviṣanti_dviṣ iti_iti dveṣa--_dveṣa śūnyaḥ_śūnya pareśa--_pareśa adhiṣṭhānāni_adhiṣṭhāna amūni_adas iti_iti teṣu_tad maitraḥ_maitra snigdhaḥ_snigdha kenacid_kaścit nimittena_nimitta khinneṣu_khid mā_mā abhūt_bhū eṣām_idam khedaḥ_kheda iti_iti karuṇaḥ_karuṇa deha--_deha ādiṣu_ādi nirmamaḥ_nirmama prakṛteḥ_prakṛti amī_adas vikārāḥ_vikāra na_na mama_mad iti_iti teṣu_tad mamatā--_mamatā śūnyaḥ_śūnya nirahaṅkāraḥ_nirahaṃkāra teṣu_tad ātma--_ātman abhimāna--_abhimāna rahitaḥ_rahita sama--_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhaḥ_sukha sukhe_sukha sati_as harṣeṇa_harṣa duḥkhe_duḥkha sati_as udvegena_udvega ca_ca avyākulaḥ_avyākula satatam_satatam santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ lābhe_lābha alābhe_alābha ca_ca prasanna--_prasad cittaḥ_citta yatas_yatas yogī_yogin guru--_guru upadiṣṭa--_upadiś upāya--_upāya niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā yata--_yam ātmā_ātman vijita--_viji indriya--_indriya vargaḥ_varga dṛḍha--_dṛḍha niścayaḥ_niścaya dṛḍhaḥ_dṛḍha kutarkaiḥ_kutarka abhibhavitum_abhibhū aśakya--_aśakya tayā_tā sthiraḥ_sthira niścayaḥ_niścaya hareḥ_hari kiṅkaraḥ_kiṃkara asmi_as iti_iti adhyavasāyaḥ_adhyavasāya yasya_yad saḥ_tad atas_atas mayi_mad arpita--_arpay manaḥ--_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi evaṃ-bhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta yaḥ_yad mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya prīti--_prīti kartā_kartṛ

lg.l: yasmāt_yad na_na udvijate_udvij lokaḥ_loka lokāt_loka na_na udvijate_udvij ca_ca yaḥ_yad
harṣa--_harṣa amarṣa--_amarṣa bhaya--_bhaya udvegaiḥ_udvega muktaḥ_muc yaḥ_yad sa_tad ca_ca me_mad priyaḥ_priya

div.p: yasmāt_yad sakāśāt_sakāśa lokaḥ_loka janaḥ_jana na_na udvijate_udvij bhaya--_bhaya śaṅkayā_śaṅkā saṃkṣobham_saṃkṣobha na_na prāpnoti_prāp yaḥ_yad ca_ca lokān_loka na_na udvijate_udvij yaḥ_yad ca_ca svābhāvikaiḥ_svābhāvika harṣa--_harṣa ādibhiḥ_ādi yuktaḥ_yuj tatra_tatra harṣaḥ_harṣa svasya_sva iṣṭa--_iṣ lābhaḥ_lābha utsāhaḥ_utsāha amarṣaḥ_amarṣa parasya_para lābhe_lābha asahanam_asahana bhayam_bhaya trāsaḥ_trāsa udvegaḥ_udvega bhaya--_bhaya ādi--_ādi nimittaḥ_nimitta citta--_citta kṣobhaḥ_kṣobha etaiḥ_etad vimuktaḥ_vimuc yaḥ_yad mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta sa_tad ca_ca me_mad priyaḥ_priya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana -_punar tasya_tad eva_eva viśeṣaṇāni_viśeṣaṇa yasmāt_yad iti_iti yasmāt_yad sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta abhaya--_abhaya dāyinaḥ_dāyin saṃnyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin hetoḥ_hetu na_na udvijate_udvij na_na santapyate_saṃtap lokaḥ_loka yaḥ_yad kaścid_kaścit api_api janaḥ_jana tathā_tathā lokān_loka niraparādha--_niraparādha udvejana--_udvejana eka--_eka vratāt_vrata khala--_khala janāt_jana nā_na udvijate_udvij ca_ca yaḥ_yad advaita--_advaita darśi--_darśin tvāt_tva parama--_parama kāruṇika--_kāruṇika tvena_tva kṣamā--_kṣamā śīla--_śīla tvāt_tva ca_ca kim_ka ca_ca harṣaḥ_harṣa svasya_sva priya--_priya lābhe_lābha romāñca--_romāñca aśru--_aśru pāta--_pāta ādi--_ādi hetuḥ_hetu ānanda--_ānanda abhivyañjakaḥ_abhivyañjaka citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa bhayam_bhaya vyāghra--_vyāghra ādi--_ādi darśana--_darśana adhīnaḥ_adhīna citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa trāsaḥ_trāsa udvegaḥ_udvega ekākī_ekākin katham_katham vijane_vijana sarva--_sarva parigraha--_parigraha śūnyaḥ_śūnya jīviṣyāmi_jīv iti_iti evaṃvidhaḥ_evaṃvidha vyākulatā--_vyākulatā rūpaḥ_rūpa citta--_citta vṛtti--_vṛtti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa taiḥ_tad harṣa--_harṣa amarṣa--_amarṣa bhaya--_bhaya udvegaiḥ_udvega muktaḥ_muc yaḥ_yad advaita--_advaita darśi--_darśin tayā_tā tad--_tad ayogya--_ayogya tvena_tva taiḥ_tad eva_eva svayam_svayam parityaktaḥ_parityaj na_na tu_tu teṣām_tad tyāgāya_tyāga svayam_svayam vyāpṛtaḥ_vyāpṛta iti_iti yāvat_yāvat tena_tena mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta iti_iti anukṛṣyate_anukṛṣ īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta yaḥ_yad sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya iti_iti pūrvavat_pūrvavat

asti_as samāsate_samās utpadyante_utpad śṛṇu_śru iti_iti āha_ah yasmāt_yad iti_iti pañcabhiḥ_pañcan harṣa--_harṣa ādibhiḥ_ādi prākṛtaiḥ_prākṛta harṣa--_harṣa amarṣa--_amarṣa bhaya--_bhaya udvegaiḥ_udvega muktaḥ_muc iti_iti ādinā_ādi uktān_vac api_api kāṃścid_kaścit guṇān_guṇa durlabha--_durlabha tva--_tva jñāpana--_jñāpana artham_artha punar_punar āha_ah yaḥ_yad na_na hṛṣyati_hṛṣ iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva yasmāt_yad lokaḥ_loka kaḥ_ka api_api janaḥ_jana na_na udvijate_udvij bhaya--_bhaya śaṅkayā_śaṅkā kṣobham_kṣobha na_na labhate_labh yaḥ_yad kāruṇika--_kāruṇika tvāt_tva jana--_jana udvejakam_udvejaka karma_karman na_na karoti_kṛ lokāt_loka ca_ca yaḥ_yad nā_na udvijate_udvij sarva--_sarva avirodhi--_avirodhin tva--_tva viniścayāt_viniścaya yat_yad udvejakam_udvejaka karma_karman lokaḥ_loka na_na karoti_kṛ yaḥ_yad ca_ca harṣa--_harṣa ādibhiḥ_ādi kartṛbhiḥ_kartṛ muktaḥ_muc na_na tu_tu teṣām_tad mocane_mocana svayam_svayam vyāpārī_vyāpārin ati_ati gambhīra--_gambhīra ātma--_ātman rati--_rati nimagna--_nimajj tvāt_tva tad--_tad sparśena_sparśa api_api rahitaḥ_rahita iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra sva--_sva bhogya--_bhuj āgama--_āgama utsāhaḥ_utsāha harṣaḥ_harṣa para--_para bhogya--_bhuj āgama--_āgama asahanam_asahana amarṣaḥ_amarṣa duṣṭa--_duṣ sattva--_sattva darśana--_darśana adhīnaḥ_adhīna vitrāsaḥ_vitrāsa bhayam_bhaya katham_katham nirudyamasya_nirudyama mama_mad jīvanam_jīvana iti_iti vikṣobhaḥ_vikṣobha tu_tu udvegaḥ_udvega etāḥ_etad catasraḥ_catur citta--_citta vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti

lg.l: anapekṣaḥ_anapekṣa śuciḥ_śuci dakṣaḥ_dakṣa udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna gata--_gam vyathaḥ_vyathā
sarva--_sarva ārambha--_ārambha parityāgī_parityāgin yaḥ_yad mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya

div.p: anapekṣaḥ_anapekṣa yadṛcchayā_yadṛcchā upasthite_upasthā api_api arthe_artha nispṛhaḥ_nispṛha śuciḥ_śuci bāhya--_bāhya abhyantara--_abhyantara śauca--_śauca sampannaḥ_sampad dakṣaḥ_dakṣa an_an alasaḥ_alas udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna pakṣapāta--_pakṣapāta rahitaḥ_rahita gata--_gam vyathaḥ_vyathā ādhi--_ādhi śūnyaḥ_śūnya sarvān_sarva dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa arthān_artha ārambhān_ārambha udyamān_udyama parityaktum_parityaj śīlam_śīla yasya_yad saḥ_tad evaṃ-bhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta san_as yaḥ_yad mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_kim ca_ca anapekṣaḥ_anapekṣa iti_iti nirapekṣaḥ_nirapekṣa sarveṣu_sarva bhoga--_bhoga upakaraṇeṣu_upakaraṇa yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā upanīteṣu_upanī api_api niḥspṛhaḥ_niḥspṛha dakṣaḥ_dakṣa upasthiteṣu_upasthā jñātavyeṣu_jñā kartavyeṣu_kṛ ca_ca sadyas_sadyas eva_eva jñātum_jñā kartum_kṛ ca_ca samarthaḥ_samartha udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna na_na kasyacid_kaścit mitra--_mitra ādeḥ_ādi pakṣam_pakṣa bhajate_bhaj yaḥ_yad gata--_gam vyathaḥ_vyathā paraiḥ_para tāḍyamānasya_tāḍay api_api gatā_gam nā_na utpannā_utpad vyathā_vyathā pīḍā_pīḍā yasya_yad saḥ_tad utpannāyām_utpad api_api vyathāyām_vyathā apakarṛṣu_apakarṛ anapakartṛ--_anapakartṛ tvam_tva kṣami--_kṣamin tvam_tva vyathā--_vyathā kāraṇeṣu_kāraṇa satsu_as api_api anutpanna--_anutpanna vyatha--_vyathā tvam_tva gata--_gam gata--_gam vyatha--_vyathā tvam_tva iti_iti bhedaḥ_bheda aihika--_aihika āmuṣmika--_āmuṣmika phalāni_phala sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman sarva--_sarva ārambhāḥ_ārambha tān_tad parityaktum_parityaj śīlam_śīla yasya_yad sa_tad sarva--_sarva ārambha--_ārambha parityāgī_parityāgin sannyāsī_saṃnyāsin yaḥ_yad mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya

sarvān_sarva vyavahārikān_vyavahārika dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa arthān_artha tathā_tathā pāramārthikān_pāramārthika api_api kāṃścid_kaścit śāstra--_śāstra adhyāpana--_adhyāpana ādīn_ādi ārambhān_ārambha udyamān_udyama parihartum_parihṛ śīlam_śīla yasya_yad saḥ_tad

baladevaḥ_baladeva anapekṣaḥ_anapekṣa svayam_svayam āgate_āgam api_api bhogye_bhogya nispṛhaḥ_nispṛha śuciḥ_śuci bāhya--_bāhya abhyantara--_abhyantara pāvitryavān_pāvitryavat para--_para pakṣa--_pakṣa agrāhī_agrāhin gata--_gam vyathaḥ_vyathā apakṛtaḥ_apakṛ api_api ādhi--_ādhi śūnyaḥ_śūnya

lg.l: yaḥ_yad na_na hṛṣyati_hṛṣ na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ na_na śocati_śuc na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ
śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha parityāgī_parityāgin bhaktimān_bhaktimat yaḥ_yad sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya

div.p: priyam_priya prāpya_prāp yaḥ_yad na_na hṛṣyati_hṛṣ apriyam_apriya prāpya_prāp yaḥ_yad na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ iṣṭa--_iṣ artha--_artha nāśe_nāśa sati_as yaḥ_yad na_na śocati_śuc a_a prāptam_prāp artham_artha yaḥ_yad na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ śubha--_śubha aśubhe_aśubha puṇya--_puṇya pāpe_pāpa parityaktum_parityaj śīlam_śīla yasya_yad saḥ_tad evaṃ-bhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta bhūtvā_bhū yaḥ_yad mad--_mad bhaktimān_bhaktimat sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka ca_ca yaḥ_yad iti_iti sama--_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhaḥ_sukha iti_iti etat_etad vivṛṇoti_vivṛ yaḥ_yad na_na hṛṣyati_hṛṣ iṣṭa--_iṣ prāptau_prāpti na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa prāptau_prāpti na_na śocati_śuc prāpta--_prāp iṣṭa--_iṣ viyoge_viyoga kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ aprāpta--_aprāpta iṣṭa--_iṣ yoge_yoga sarva--_sarva ārambha--_ārambha parityāgī_parityāgin iti_iti etat_etad vivṛṇoti_vivṛ śubha--_śubha aśubhe_aśubha sukha--_sukha sādhana--_sādhana duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhane_sādhana karmaṇī_karman parityaktum_parityaj śīlam_śīla asya_idam iti_iti śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha parityāgī_parityāgin bhaktimān_bhaktimat yaḥ_yad sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha

baladevaḥ_baladeva yaḥ_yad priyam_priya putra--_putra śiṣya--_śiṣya ādi_ādi prāpya_prāp na_na hṛṣyati_hṛṣ apriyam_apriya tat_tad prāpya_prāp tatra_tatra na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ priye_priya tasmin_tad vinaṣṭe_vinaś na_na śocati_śuc a_a prāptam_prāp tat_tad na_na ākāṅkṣati_ākāṅkṣ śubham_śubha puṇyam_puṇya aśubham_aśubha pāpam_pāpa tat_tad ubhayam_ubhaya pratibandhaka--_pratibandhaka tva--_tva sāmyāt_sāmya parityaktum_parityaj śīlam_śīla yasya_yad saḥ_tad

lg.l: samaḥ_sama śatrau_śatru ca_ca mitre_mitra ca_ca tathā_tathā māna--_māna apamānayoḥ_apamāna
śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkheṣu_duḥkha samaḥ_sama saṅga--_saṅga vivarjitaḥ_vivarjay
tulya--_tulya nindā--_nindā stutiḥ_stuti maunī_maunin saṃtuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ yena_yad kenacid_kaścit
aniketaḥ_aniketa sthira--_sthira matiḥ_mati bhaktimān_bhaktimat me_mad priyaḥ_priya naraḥ_nara

div.p: kim_ka ca_ca tulya--_tulya nindā--_nindā stutiḥ_stuti iti_iti tulyā_tulya nindā--_nindā stutiḥ_stuti ca_ca yasya_yad saḥ_tad maunī_maunin saṃyata--_saṃyam vāc_vāc yena_yad kenacid_kaścit labdhena_labh saṃtuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ sthira--_sthira matiḥ_mati vyavasthita--_vyavasthā cittaḥ_citta evaṃ_evam bhūtaḥ_bhū bhaktimān_bhaktimat yaḥ_yad sa_tad naraḥ_nara mama_mad priyaḥ_priya
cetana--_cetana acetana--_acetana sarva--_sarva viṣaya--_viṣaya śobhana--_śobhana adhyāsa--_adhyāsa rahitaḥ_rahita

kim_ka ca_ca tulya--_tulya nindā--_nindā stutiḥ_stuti iti_iti nindā--_nindā doṣa--_doṣa kathanam_kathana stutiḥ_stuti guṇa--_guṇa kathanam_kathana te_tad duḥkha--_duḥkha sukha--_sukha ajanaka--_ajanaka tayā_tā tulye_tulya yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā maunī_maunin saṃyata--_saṃyam vāc_vāc nanu_nanu śarīra--_śarīra yātrā--_yātrā nirvāhāya_nirvāha vāc--_vāc vyāpāraḥ_vyāpāra apekṣitaḥ_apekṣ eva_eva na_na iti_iti āha_ah saṃtuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ nivṛtta--_nivṛt spṛhaḥ_spṛhā kim_ka ca_ca aniketaḥ_aniketa niyata--_niyam nivāsa--_nivāsa rahitaḥ_rahita sthirā_sthira paramārtha--_paramārtha vastu--_vastu viṣayā_viṣaya matiḥ_mati yasya_yad sa_tad sthira--_sthira matiḥ_mati īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa yaḥ_yad bhaktimān_bhaktimat sa_tad me_mad priyaḥ_priya naraḥ_nara atra_atra punar_punar punar_punar bhakteḥ_bhakti upādānam_upādāna bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva apavargasya_apavarga puṣkalam_puṣkala kāraṇam_kāraṇa iti_iti draḍhayitum_draḍhay

baladevaḥ_baladeva samaḥ_sama śatrau_śatru ca_ca iti_iti sphuṭa--_sphuṭa arthaḥ_artha saṅga--_saṅga varjitaḥ_varjay kusaṅga--_kusaṅga śūnyaḥ_śūnya tulyā_tulya iti_iti nindayā_nindā duḥkham_duḥkha stutyā_stuti sukham_sukha ca_ca yaḥ_yad na_na vindati_vid maunī_maunin yata--_yam vāc_vāc sva--_sva iṣṭa--_iṣ manana--_manana śīlaḥ_śīla vā_vā yena_yad kenacid_kaścit adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa ākṛṣṭena_ākṛṣ rukṣeṇa_rukṣa snigdhena_snigdha vā_vā annādinā_annādi santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ aniketaḥ_aniketa niyata--_niyam nivāsa--_nivāsa rahitaḥ_rahita niketa--_niketa moha--_moha śūnyaḥ_śūnya vā_vā sthira--_sthira matiḥ_mati niścita--_niści jñānaḥ_jñāna eṣu_idam a_a dveṣṭā_dviṣ iti_iti ādiṣu_ādi saptasu_saptan yeṣu_yad guṇānām_guṇa punar_punar api_api abhidhānam_abhidhāna tat_tad teṣām_tad ati_ati daurlabhya--_daurlabhya jñāpana--_jñāpana artham_artha iti_iti adoṣaḥ_adoṣa sat--_as niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā ādīnām_ādi tri--_tri vidhānām_vidha bhaktānām_bhakta sambhūya_sambhū sthitāḥ_sthā ete_etad a_a dveṣṭṛ--_dveṣṭṛ tva--_tva ādayaḥ_ādi
dharmāḥ_dharma yathā_yathā sambhava--_sambhava tāratamyena_tāratamya eva_eva sudhībhiḥ_sudhī saṅgamanīyāḥ_saṃgam

lg.l: ye_yad tu_tu dharmya--_dharmya amṛtam_amṛta idam_idam yathā_yathā uktam_vac paryupāsate_paryupās
śraddadhānāḥ_śraddhā mad--_mad paramāḥ_parama bhaktāḥ_bhakta te_tad atīva_atīva me_mad priyāḥ_priya

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ yathā_yathā uktam_vac ukta--_vac prakāram_prakāra dharmaḥ_dharma eva_eva amṛtam_amṛta amṛta--_amṛta tva--_tva sādhana--_sādhana tvāt_tva dharmya--_dharmya amṛtam_amṛta iti_iti kecid_kaścit paṭhanti_paṭh ye_yad tat_tad upāsate_upās anutiṣṭhanti_anuṣṭhā śraddhām_śraddhā kurvantaḥ_kṛ mad--_mad parāḥ_para ca_ca santaḥ_as mad--_mad bhaktāḥ_bhakta te_tad atīva_atīva me_mad priyāḥ_priya iti_iti

lg.l: duḥkham_duḥkha avyakta--_avyakta vartmā_vartman eva_eva tad--_tad bahu--_bahu vighnam_vighna atas_atas budhaḥ_budha
sukham_sukha kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa pada--_pada ambhojam_ambhoja bhakti--_bhakti sat--_sat pathavān_pathavat bhajet_bhaj

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma dvādaśaḥ_dvādaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana adveṣṭa_dviṣ iti_iti ādinā_ādi akṣara--_akṣara upāsaka--_upāsaka ādīnām_ādi jīvanmuktānām_jīvanmukta saṃnyāsinām_saṃnyāsin lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa bhūtam_bhū svabhāva--_svabhāva siddham_sidh dharma--_dharma jāta--_jāta muktam_muc yathā_yathā uktam_vac vārtike_vārttika
utpanna--_utpad ātma--_ātman avabodhasya_avabodha hi_hi a_a dveṣṭṛ--_dveṣṭṛ tva--_tva ādayaḥ_ādi guṇāḥ_guṇa ayatnataḥ_ayatna bhavanti_bhū eva_eva na_na tu_tu sādhana--_sādhana rūpiṇaḥ_rūpin iti_iti

etat_etad eva_eva ca_ca purā_purā sthita--_sthā prajña--_prajña lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa rūpeṇa_rūpa abhihitam_abhidhā tat_tad idam_idam dharma--_dharma jātam_jāta prayatnena_prayatna sampādyamānam_sampāday mumukṣoḥ_mumukṣu mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanam_sādhana bhavati_bhū iti_iti pratipādayan_pratipāday upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ ye_yad tu_tu iti_iti ye_yad tu_tu saṃnyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin mumukṣavaḥ_mumukṣu dharma--_dharma amṛtam_amṛta dharma--_dharma rūpam_rūpa amṛta--_amṛta sādhana--_sādhana tvāt_tva amṛta--_amṛta vat_vat āsvādya--_āsvāday tvāt_tva vedam_veda yathā_yathā uktam_vac a_a dveṣṭā_dveṣṭṛ sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta iti_iti ādinā_ādi pratipāditam_pratipāday paryupāsate_paryupās aham_mad bhagavān_bhagavant akṣara--_akṣara ātmā_ātman vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva eva_eva paramaḥ_parama prāptavyaḥ_prāp niratiśayā_niratiśaya gatiḥ_gati yeṣām_yad te_tad mad--_mad paramāḥ_parama bhaktāḥ_bhakta mām_mad nirupādhikam_nirupādhika brahma_brahman bhajamānāḥ_bhaj te_tad atīva_atīva me_mad priyāḥ_priya priyaḥ_priya hi_hi jñāninaḥ_jñānin atyartham_atyartham aham_mad sa_tad ca_ca mama_mad priyaḥ_priya iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva sūcitasya_sūcay ayam_idam upasaṃhāraḥ_upasaṃhāra

yasmāt_yasmāt dharma--_dharma amṛtam_amṛta idam_idam śraddhayā_śraddhā anutiṣṭhan_anuṣṭhā bhagavataḥ_bhagavant viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu parameśvarasya_parameśvara atīva_atīva priyaḥ_priya bhavati_bhū tasmāt_tasmāt idam_idam jñānavataḥ_jñānavat svabhāva--_svabhāva siddhatayā_siddhatā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa api_api mumukṣuṇā_mumukṣu ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva jijñāsunā_jijñāsu viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu paramam_parama padam_pada jigamiṣuṇā_jigamiṣu iti_iti vākya--_vākya arthaḥ_artha tat_tad evam_evam sa_sa upādhika--_upādhika brahma--_brahman abhidhyāna--_abhidhyāna paripākāt_paripāka nirupādhikam_nirupādhika brahma_brahman anusandadhānasya_anusaṃdhā a_a dveṣṭṛ--_dveṣṭṛ tva--_tva ādi--_ādi dharma--_dharma viśiṣṭasya_viśiṣ mukhyasya_mukhya adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana nididhyāsanāni_nididhyāsana āvartayataḥ_āvartay vedānta--_vedānta
anusandheyaḥ_anusaṃdhā iti_iti madhyamena_madhyama ṣaṭkena_ṣaṭka siddham_sidh

iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍhārtha--_gūḍhārtha dīpikāyām_dīpikā bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma dvādaśaḥ_dvādaśa

āha_ah ete_etad bhakti--_bhakti uttha--_uttha śānti--_śānti uttha--_uttha dharmāḥ_dharma na_na prākṛtāḥ_prākṛta guṇāḥ_guṇa bhaktyā_bhakti tuṣyati_tuṣ kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa na_na guṇaiḥ_guṇa iti_iti ukta--_vac koṭitaḥ_koṭi tu_tu bhinna--_bhid upakrame_upakrama ukta--_vac lakṣaṇāḥ_lakṣaṇa bhaktāḥ_bhakta ekaika--_ekaika susvabhāva--_susvabhāva niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā ete_etad tu_tu tad--_tad tad--_tad sarva--_sarva sat--_as lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa īpsavaḥ_īpsu sādhakāḥ_sādhaka api_api tebhyaḥ_tad siddhebhyaḥ_siddha api_api śreṣṭhāḥ_śreṣṭha padam_pada

lg.l: bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva adbhuta--_adbhuta guṇā_guṇa iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay
nimba--_nimba drākṣe_drākṣā iva_iva jñāna--_jñāna bhaktī_bhakti yadi_yadi api_api darśite_darśay
ādīyete_ādā tat_tad api_api ete_etad tad--_tad tad--_tad āsvāda--_āsvāda lobhibhiḥ_lobhin
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha varṣiṇyām_varṣin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
gītāsu_gītā dvādaśaḥ_dvādaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva ukta--_vac bhakti--_bhakti yogam_yoga upasaṃharan_upasaṃhṛ tasmin_tad niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā phalam_phala āha_ah ye_yad tu_tu iti_iti ye_yad bhaktāḥ_bhakta yathoktam_yathoktam mayi_mad āveśya_āveśay manaḥ_manas ye_yad mām_mad iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi yathā_yathā gatam_gam idam_idam dharma--_dharma amṛtam_amṛta paryupāsate_paryupās prāpyam_prāp mām_mad iva_iva prāpakam_prāpaka tat_tad samāśrayanti_samāśri śraddadhānāḥ_śraddhā bhakti--_bhakti śraddhā--_śraddhā lavaḥ_lava mad--_mad paramāḥ_parama mad--_mad niratāḥ_niram te_tad mama_mad atīva_atīva priyāḥ_priya bhavanti_bhū

lg.l: vaśaḥ_vaśa sva--_sva eka--_eka juṣām_juṣ kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa sva--_sva bhakti--_bhakti eka--_eka juṣām_juṣ tu_tu saḥ_tad
prītyā_prīti eva_eva ati_ati vaśaḥ_vaśa śrīmān_śrīmat iti_iti dvādaśa--_dvādaśan nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya ekādaśaḥ_ekādaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
Bhagavadgita 13
BhG 13.1

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
idam_idam śarīram_śarīra kaunteya_kaunteya kṣetram_kṣetra iti_iti abhidhīyate_abhidhā
etat_etad yaḥ_yad vetti_vid tam_tad prāhuḥ_prāh kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña iti_iti tad--_tad vidaḥ_vid
bhaktānām_bhakta aham_mad uddhartā_uddhartṛ saṃsārāt_saṃsāra iti_iti avādi_avad yat_yad
atha_atha tad--_tad siddhyai_siddhi tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna udīryate_udīray

div.p: teṣām_tad aham_mad samuddhartā_samuddhartṛ mṛtyu--_mṛtyu saṃsāra--_saṃsāra sāgarāt_sāgara bhavāmi_bhū na_na cirāt_cirāt pārtha_pārtha iti_iti pūrvam_pūrvam pratijñātam_pratijñā na_na ca_ca ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna vinā_vinā saṃsārāt_saṃsāra uddharaṇam_uddharaṇa sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna upadeśa--_upadeśa artham_artha prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣa--_puruṣa viveka--_viveka adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya ārabhyate_ārabh tatra_tatra yat_yad saptame_saptama adhyāye_adhyāya aparā_apara parā_para ca_ca iti_iti prakṛti--_prakṛti dvayam_dvaya uktam_vac tayoḥ_tad avivekāt_aviveka jīva--_jīva bhāvam_bhāva āpannasya_āpad cit--_cit aṃśasya_aṃśa ayam_idam saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra yābhyām_yad ca_ca jīva--_jīva upabhoga--_upabhoga artham_artha īśvarasya_īśvara sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādiṣu_ādi pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti tat_tad eva_eva prakṛti--_prakṛti dvayam_dvaya kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac parasparam_paraspara viviktam_vivic tattvataḥ_tattva nirūpayiṣyan_nirūpay bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac idam_idam iti_iti idam_idam bhoga--_bhoga āyatanam_āyatana śarīram_śarīra kṣetram_kṣetra iti_iti abhidhīyate_abhidhā saṃsārasya_saṃsāra praroha--_praroha bhūmi--_bhūmi tvāt_tva etat_etad yaḥ_yad vetti_vid aham_mad mama_mad iti_iti manyate_man tam_tad kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña iti_iti prāhuḥ_prāh kṛṣībala--_kṛṣībala vat_vat tad--_tad phala--_phala bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvāt_tva tad--_tad vidaḥ_vid kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña viveka--_viveka jñāḥ_jña

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana
dhyāna--_dhyāna abhyāsa--_abhyāsa vaśīkṛtena_vaśīkṛ manasā_manas tat_tad nirguṇam_nirguṇa niṣkriyam_niṣkriya
jyotiḥ_jyotis kiṃcana_kaścana yoginaḥ_yogin yadi_yadi param_para paśyanti_paś paśyantu_paś te_tad
asmākam_mad tu_tu tat_tad eva_eva locana--_locana camatkārāya_camatkāra bhūyāt_bhū ciram_ciram
kālindī--_kālindī pulineṣu_pulina yat_yad kim_ka api_api tat_tad nīlam_nīla mahaḥ_mahas dhāvati_dhāv

prathama--_prathama madhyama--_madhyama ṣaṭkayoḥ_ṣaṭka tad--_tad tvam_tvad padārthau_padārtha uktau_vac uttaraḥ_uttara tu_tu ṣaṭkaḥ_ṣaṭka vākya--_vākya artha--_artha niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭha samyak_samyak dhī--_dhī pradhānaḥ_pradhāna adhunā_adhunā ārabhyate_ārabh tatra_tatra -_tad aham_mad samuddhartā_samuddhartṛ mṛtyu--_mṛtyu saṃsāra--_saṃsāra sāgarāt_sāgara bhavāmi_bhū iti_iti prāk_prāk uktam_vac na_na ca_ca ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇāt_lakṣaṇa mṛtyoḥ_mṛtyu ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna vinā_vinā uddharaṇam_uddharaṇa sambhavati_sambhū atas_atas yādṛśena_yādṛśa ātma--_ātman jñānena_jñāna mṛtyu--_mṛtyu saṃsāra--_saṃsāra nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti yena_yad ca_ca tattva--_tattva jñānena_jñāna yuktāḥ_yuj a_a dveṣṭṛ--_dveṣṭṛ tva--_tva ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa śālinaḥ_śālin saṃnyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin prāk_prāk vyākhyātāḥ_vyākhyā tat_tad ātma--_ātman tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna vaktavyam_vac tat_tad ca_ca advitīyena_advitīya paramātmanā_paramātman saha_saha jīvasya_jīva abhedam_abheda eva_eva viṣayīkaroti_viṣayīkṛ tad--_tad bheda--_bheda bhrama--_bhrama hetuka--_hetuka tvāt_tva sarva--_sarva anarthasya_anartha

tatra_tatra jīvānām_jīva saṃsāriṇām_saṃsārin pratikṣetram_pratikṣetram bhinnānām_bhid asaṃsāriṇā_asaṃsārin ekena_eka paramātmanā_paramātman katham_katham abhedaḥ_abheda syāt_as iti_iti āśaṅkāyām_āśaṅkā saṃsārasya_saṃsāra bhinna--_bhid tvasya_tva ca_ca avidyā--_avidyā kalpita--_kalpay anātma--_anātman dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva na_na jīvasya_jīva saṃsāri--_saṃsārin tad--_tad artham_artha deha--_deha indriya--_indriya antaḥkaraṇebhyaḥ_antaḥkaraṇa kṣetrebhyaḥ_kṣetra vivekena_viveka kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña puruṣaḥ_puruṣa jīvaḥ_jīva pratikṣetram_pratikṣetram ekaḥ_eka eva_eva nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra iti_iti pratipādanāya_pratipādana kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña vivekaḥ_viveka kriyate_kṛ asmin_idam adhyāye_adhyāya tatra_tatra ye_yad dve_dvi prakṛtī_prakṛti bhūmi--_bhūmi ādi--_ādi kṣetra--_kṣetra rūpatayā_rūpatā jīva--_jīva rūpa--_rūpa kṣetrajñatayā_kṣetrajñatā ca_ca apara--_apara para--_para śabda--_śabda vācye_vac sūcite_sūcay tad--_tad vivekena_viveka tattvam_tattva nirūpayiṣyan_nirūpay śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac idam_idam śarīram_śarīra iti_iti

idam_idam indriya--_indriya antar_antar karaṇa--_karaṇa sahitam_sahita bhoga--_bhoga āyatanam_āyatana śarīram_śarīra he_he kaunteya_kaunteya kṣetram_kṣetra iti_iti abhidhīyate_abhidhā sasyasya_sasya iva_iva asmin_idam asakṛt_asakṛt karmaṇaḥ_karman phalasya_phala nirvṛtteḥ_nirvṛtti etat_etad yaḥ_yad vetti_vid aham_mad mama_mad iti_iti abhimanyate_abhiman tam_tad kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña iti_iti prāhuḥ_prāh kṛṣībala--_kṛṣībala vat_vat tad--_tad phala--_phala bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvāt_tva tad--_tad vidaḥ_vid kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña viveka--_viveka vidaḥ_vid atra_atra ca_ca abhidhīyate_abhidhā iti_iti karmaṇi_karman prayogeṇa_prayoga kṣetrasya_kṣetra jaḍa--_jaḍa tvāt_tva karma--_karman tvam_tva kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña śabde_śabda ca_ca dvityām_dvitīya vinava--_vinava iti_iti śabdam_śabda āharan_āhṛ sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa tvāt_tva karma--_karman tva--_tva abhāvam_abhāva avivekinaḥ_avivekin eva_eva āhuḥ_ah sthūla--_sthūla vilakṣaṇa--_vilakṣaṇa vacana--_vacana vyaktyā_vyakti ekatra_ekatra kartṛ--_kartṛ pada--_pada upādānena_upādāna ca_ca nirdiśati_nirdiś bhagavān_bhagavant

lg.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha
namaḥ_namas astu_as bhagavat--_bhagavant bhaktyai_bhakti kṛpayā_kṛpā sva--_sva aṃśa--_aṃśa leśataḥ_leśa
jñāna--_jñāna ādiṣu_ādi api_api tiṣṭhet_sthā tat_tad sārthakī_sārthaka karaṇā_karaṇa yayā_yad
ṣaṭke_ṣaṭka tṛtīye_tṛtīya atra_atra bhakt--_bhakt miśram_miśra jñānam_jñāna nirūpyate_nirūpay
tad--_tad madhye_madhye kevalā_kevala bhaktiḥ_bhakti api_api bhaṅgyā_bhaṅgī prakṛṣyate_prakṛṣ
trayodaśe_trayodaśa śarīram_śarīra ca_ca jīvātma--_jīvātman paramātmanoḥ_paramātman
jñānasya_jñāna sādhanam_sādhana jīvaḥ_jīva prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti ca_ca viśiṣyate_viśiṣ

div.p: tat_tad evam_evam dvitīyena_dvitīya ṣaṭkena_ṣaṭka kevalayā_kevala bhaktyā_bhakti bhagavat--_bhagavant prāptiḥ_prāpti tatas_tatas anyāḥ_anya ahaṃgraha--_ahaṃgraha upāsana--_upāsana ādyāḥ_ādya tisraḥ_tri upāsanāḥ_upāsana ca_ca uktāḥ_vac atha_atha prathama--_prathama ṣatka--_ṣatka uditānām_vad niṣkāmakarma--_niṣkāmakarman yoginām_yogin bhakti--_bhakti miśra--_miśra jñāṇāt_jñāṇa eva_eva mokṣaḥ_mokṣa tat_tad ca_ca jñānam_jñāna saṅkṣepāt_saṃkṣepa uktam_vac api_api punar_punar kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña ādi--_ādi vivecanena_vivecana tṛitīyam_tṛitīya ṣaṭkam_ṣaṭka ārabhate_ārabh

tatra_tatra kim_ka kṣetram_kṣetra kaḥ_ka kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah idam_idam iti_iti idam_idam sa_sa indriyam_indriya bhogāyatanam_bhogāyatana śarīram_śarīra kṣetram_kṣetra saṃsārasya_saṃsāra praroha--_praroha bhūmi--_bhūmi tvāt_tva tat_tad yaḥ_yad vetti_vid bandha--_bandha daśāyām_daśā aham_mad mama_mad iti_iti abhimanyamānam_abhiman sva--_sva sambandhi--_sambandhin tvena_tva eva_eva jānāti_jñā mokṣa--_mokṣa daśāyām_daśā aham_mad mama_mad iti_iti abhimāna--_abhimāna rahitaḥ_rahita sva--_sva sambandha--_sambandha rahitam_rahita evayaḥ_evaya jānāti_jñā tam_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya avastham_avasthā jīvam_jīva kṛṣī--_kṛṣī bala--_bala vat_vat saḥ_tad eva_eva kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña tad--_tad phala--_phala bhoktā_bhoktṛ ca_ca yat_yad uktam_vac bhagavatā_bhagavant

adanti_ad ca_ca ekam_eka phalam_phala asya_idam gṛdhnāḥ_gṛdhna grāmecarāḥ_grāmecara ekam_eka araṇya--_araṇya vāsāḥ_vāsa haṃsāḥ_haṃsa ye_yad ekam_eka bahu--_bahu rūpam_rūpa ijyaiḥ_ijya māyā--_māyā mayam_maya veda_vid sa_tad veda_vid vedam_veda

asya_idam arthaḥ_artha gṛdhnanti_gṛdh iti_iti gṛdhrāḥ_gṛdhra grāmecarāḥ_grāmecara baddha--_bandh jīvāḥ_jīva asya_idam phalam_phala duḥkham_duḥkha adanti_ad pariṇāmataḥ_pariṇāma svarga--_svarga ādeḥ_ādi api_api duḥkha--_duḥkha rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva araṇya--_araṇya vāsāḥ_vāsa haṃsāḥ_haṃsa mukta--_muc jīvāḥ_jīva eka--_eka phalam_phala sukham_sukha adanti_ad sarvathā_sarvathā sukha--_sukha rūpasya_rūpa apavargasya_apavarga api_api etad--_etad janya--_jan tvāt_tva evam_evam ekam_eka api_api saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣam_vṛkṣa bahuvidha--_bahuvidha naraka--_naraka svarga--_svarga apavarga--_apavarga prāpaka--_prāpaka tvāt_tva bahu--_bahu rūpam_rūpa māyā--_māyā śakti--_śakti samudbhūta--_samudbhū tvāt_tva māyā--_māyā mayam_maya ijyaiḥ_yaj pūjyaiḥ_pūjay gurubhiḥ_guru kṛtvā_kṛ yaḥ_yad veda_vid iti_iti tad--_tad vidaḥ_vid kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña veditāraḥ_veditṛ
baladevaḥ_baladeva

lg.l: kathitāḥ_kathay pūrva--_pūrva ṣaṭkābhyām_ṣaṭka arthāt_artha jīva--_jīva ādayaḥ_ādi atra_atra ye_yad
svarūpāṇi_svarūpa viśodhyante_viśodhay teṣām_tad ṣaṭke_ṣaṭka antime_antima sphuṭam_sphuṭa
bhaktau_bhakti pūrva--_pūrva upadiṣṭāyām_upadiś jñānam_jñāna dvāram_dvāra bhavati_bhū atas_atas
deha--_deha jīva--_jīva īśa--_īśa vijñānam_vijñāna tat_tad vaktavyam_vac trayodaśe_trayodaśa

div.p: ādya--_ādya ṣaṭke_ṣaṭka niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman sādhyam_sādhay darśitam_darśay madhya--_madhya ṣatke_ṣatka tu_tu bhakti--_bhakti śabditam_śabday paramātma--_paramātman upāsanam_upāsana tad--_tad mahima--_mahiman nigada--_nigada pūrvakam_pūrvaka upadiṣṭam_upadiś tat_tad ca_ca kevalam_kevala tad--_tad vaśyatā--_vaśyatā karam_kara sat_as tad--_tad prāpakam_prāpaka ārta--_ārta ādīnām_ādi tu_tu tam_tad upāsīnānām_upās ārti--_ārti vināśa--_vināśa ādi--_ādi karam_kara tad--_tad ekānti--_ekāntin prasaṅgena_prasaṅga kevalam_kevala sat_as tad--_tad prāpakam_prāpaka ca_ca

tathā_tathā asmin_idam antya--_antya ṣatke_ṣatka prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣa--_puruṣa tad--_tad saṃyoga--_saṃyoga hetuka--_hetuka jagat_jagant tad--_tad īśvara--_īśvara svarūpāṇi_svarūpa karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna bhakti--_bhakti svarūpāṇi_svarūpa ca_ca vivicyante_vivic jñāna--_jñāna vaiśadyāya_vaiśadya etāvat_etāvat trayogaśe_trayogaśa asmin_idam adhyāye_adhyāya deha--_deha jīva--_jīva pareśa--_pareśa svarūpāṇi_svarūpa vivecanīyāni_vivecay deha--_deha ādi--_ādi viviktasya_vivic api_api jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman deha--_deha sambandha--_sambandha hetuḥ_hetu tad--_tad viveka--_viveka anusandhi--_anusaṃdhi prakāraḥ_prakāra ca_ca vimarśanīyaḥ_vimṛś tat_tad idam_idam artha--_artha jātam_jāta abhidhātum_abhidhā bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac idam_idam iti_iti he_he kaunteya_kaunteya idam_idam sa_sa indriya--_indriya prāṇam_prāṇa śarīram_śarīra bhoktuḥ_bhoktṛ jīvasya_jīva bhogya--_bhuj sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi prarohaka--_prarohaka tvāt_tva kṣetram_kṣetra iti_iti abhidhīyate_abhidhā tattva--_tattva jñaiḥ_jña etat_etad śarīram_śarīra devaḥ_deva aham_mad mānavaḥ_mānava aham_mad sthūlaḥ_sthūla aham_mad iti_iti ajñaiḥ_ajña ātma--_ātman bhedena_bheda pratīyamānam_pratī api_api yaḥ_yad śayyā--_śayyā āsana--_āsana ādi--_ādi vat_vat ātmanaḥ_ātman bhannam_bhañj ātma--_ātman bhoga--_bhoga mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanam_sādhana ca_ca vetti_vid tam_tad vedyāt_vid śarīrāt_śarīra kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña svarūpa--_svarūpa jñāḥ_jña kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña iti_iti prāhuḥ_prāh bhoga--_bhoga mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhana--_sādhana tvam_tva śarīrasya_śarīra uktam_vac śrī--_śrī bhagavate_bhagavata

adanti_ad ca_ca ekam_eka phalam_phala asya_idam gṛdhnāḥ_gṛdhna grāmecarāḥ_grāmecara ekam_eka araṇya--_araṇya vāsāḥ_vāsa haṃsāḥ_haṃsa ye_yad ekam_eka bahu--_bahu rūpam_rūpa ijyaiḥ_ijya māyā--_māyā mayam_maya veda_vid sa_tad veda_vid vedam_veda
div.l: śarīra--_śarīra ātma--_ātman vādī_vādin tu_tu kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña na_na tad--_tad jñāna--_jñāna abhāvāt_abhāva

div.p: BhG 13.2

lg.l: kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña ca_ca api_api mām_mad viddhi_vid sarva--_sarva kṣetreṣu_kṣetra bhārata_bhārata
kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña jñānam_jñāna yat_yad tat_tad jñānam_jñāna matam_man mama_mad

div.p: idānīm_idānīm tasya_tad eva_eva pāramārthikam_pāramārthika asaṃsāri--_asaṃsārin svarūpam_svarūpa āha_ah kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña iti_iti ca_ca kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña saṃsāriṇam_saṃsārin jīvam_jīva vastutas_vastutas sarva--_sarva kṣetreṣu_kṣetra anugatam_anugam mām_mad eva_eva viddhi_vid tat_tad tvam_tvad asi_as iti_iti śrutyā_śruti lakṣitena_lakṣay cit--_cit aṃśena_aṃśa mad--_mad rūpasya_rūpa ukta--_vac tvāt_tva ādara--_ādara artham_artha eva_eva tad--_tad jñānam_jñāna stauti_stu kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña yat_yad evam_evam jñānam_jñāna tat_tad eva_eva mokṣa--_mokṣa hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva mama_mad jñanam_jñana matam_man anyat_anya tu_tu vṛthā_vṛthak pāṇḍityam_pāṇḍitya bandha--_bandha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad uktam_vac
tat_tad karma_karman yat_yad na_na bandhāya_bandha sā_tad vidyā_vidyā yā_yad vimuktaye_vimukti āyāsāya_āyāsa aparam_apara karma_karman vidyā_vidyā anyā_anya śilpa--_śilpa naipuṇam_naipuṇa

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa sva--_sva prakāśam_prakāśa kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña abhidhāya_abhidhā tasya_tad pāramārthikam_pāramārthika tattvam_tattva asaṃsāri--_asaṃsārin paramātmanā_paramātman aikyam_aikya āha_ah kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña api_api iti_iti

sarva--_sarva kṣetreṣu_kṣetra yaḥ_yad ekaḥ_eka kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa caitanya--_caitanya rūpaḥ_rūpa nityaḥ_nitya vibhuḥ_vibhu ca_ca tam_tad avidyā--_avidyā adhyāropita--_adhyāropay kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tva--_tva ādi--_ādi saṃsāra--_saṃsāra dharmam_dharma kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña avidyaka--_avidyaka rūpa--_rūpa parityāgena_parityāga mām_mad viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā he_he bhārata_bhārata evam_evam ca_ca kṣetram_kṣetra māyā--_māyā kalpitam_kalpay mithyā_mithyā kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña ca_ca paramārtha--_paramārtha satyaḥ_satya tad--_tad bhrama--_bhrama adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna iti_iti kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tat_tad eva_eva mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanatvāt_sādhanatva jñānam_jñāna avidyā--_avidyā virodhi--_virodhin prakāśa--_prakāśa rūpam_rūpa mama_mad matam_man anyat_anya tu_tu ajñānam_ajñāna eva_eva

atra_atra jīva--_jīva īśvarayoḥ_īśvara āvidyakaḥ_āvidyaka bhedaḥ_bheda pāramārthikaḥ_pāramārthika tu_tu abhedaḥ_abheda iti_iti atra_atra yuktayaḥ_yukti bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kṛdbhiḥ_kṛt varṇitāḥ_varṇay asmābhiḥ_mad tu_tu grantha--_grantha vistara--_vistara bhayāt_bhaya prāk_prāk eva_eva bahudhā_bahudhā ukta--_vac tvāt_tva ca_ca na_na upanyastāḥ_upanyas

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha evam_evam kṣetra--_kṣetra jñānāt_jñāna jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña tvam_tva uktam_vac paramātmanaḥ_paramātman tu_tu tatas_tatas api_api kārtsnyena_kārtsnya sarva--_sarva kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña tvāt_tva kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña tvam_tva āha_ah kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña iti_iti sarva--_sarva kṣetreṣu_kṣetra niyantṛ--_niyantṛ tvena_tva sthitam_sthā mām_mad paramātmānam_paramātman kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña viddhi_vid jīvānām_jīva pratyekam_pratyekam a_a kaika--_kaika kṣetra--_kṣetra jñnānām_jñā tat_tad api_api na_na kṛtsnam_kṛtsna mama_mad tu_tu ekasya_eka eva_eva sarva--_sarva kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña tvam_tva kṛtsnam_kṛtsna eva_eva iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa jñeyaḥ_jñā kim_ka jñānam_jñāna iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah kṣetreṇa_kṣetra saha_saha kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña jīvātma--_jīvātman paramātanoḥ_paramātanu yat_yad jñānam_jñāna kṣetra--_kṣetra jīvātma--_jīvātman paramātmanām_paramātman yat_yad jñānam_jñāna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad eva_eva jñānam_jñāna mama_mad matam_man sammatam_samman ca_ca tatra_tatra anukartavyaḥ_anukṛ

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha paramātmanaḥ_paramātman tat_tad āha_ah kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña ca_ca api_api mām_mad iti_iti he_he bhārat_bhārat sarva--_sarva kṣetreṣu_kṣetra mām_mad ca_ca kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña viddhi_vid apiḥ_api avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa jīvāḥ_jīva svam_sva svam_sva kṣetram_kṣetra sva--_sva bhoga--_bhoga mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanam_sādhana jānantaḥ_jñā kṣetrajñāḥ_kṣetrajña prajā--_prajā vat_vat aham_mad tu_tu sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara ekaḥ_eka eva_eva sarvāṇi_sarva tāni_tad bhartavyāni_bhṛ ca_ca jānan_jñā tad--_tad sarva--_sarva kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña rāja--_rājan vat_vat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sarva--_sarva īśvarasya_īśvara api_api kṣetra--_kṣetra īśvarasya_īśvara api_api kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña tvam_tva

kṣetrāṇi_kṣetra hi_hi śarīrāṇi_śarīra bījam_bīja ca_ca api_api śubha--_śubha aśubhe_aśubha tāni_tad vetti_vid sa_tad yoga--_yoga ātmā_ātman tatas_tatas kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña ucyate_vac iti_iti ādi_ādi smṛtibhyaḥ_smṛti

kim_ka jñānam_jñāna iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah kṣetra--_kṣetra iti_iti kṣetreṇa_kṣetra sahitau_sahita kṣetrajñau_kṣetrajña jīva--_jīva parau_para kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñau_kṣetrajña tad--_tad sahitayoḥ_sahita tayoḥ_tad mithas_mithas vivekena_viveka yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tat_tad eva_eva jñānam_jñāna mama_mad matam_man tatas_tatas

idam_idam atra_atra bodhyam_budh --prakṛti--_prakṛti jīva--_jīva īśvarāṇām_īśvara bhogyatva--_bhogyatva bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tva--_tva niyantṛ--_niyantṛ tva--_tva dharmaka--_dharmaka tvāt_tva mithas_mithas sampṛktānām_sampṛc api_api teṣām_tad na_na tat_tad tad--_tad dharma--_dharma sāṅkaryam_sāṃkarya citra--_citra ambara--_ambara rūpa--_rūpa vat_vat iti_iti evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra śrutayaḥ_śruti ca_ca prakṛti--_prakṛti ādīnām_ādi vivikta--_vivic tad--_tad dharmaka--_dharmaka tām_tā āhuḥ_ah

pṛthak_pṛthak ātmānam_ātman preritāram_preritṛ ca_ca matvā_man
juṣṭaḥ_juṣ tatas_tatas tena_tad amṛta--_amṛta tvam_tva eti_i

jña--_jña ajñau_ajña dvau_dvi ajau_aja īśāna--_īśāna īśānau_īśāna ajā_ajā
hi_hi ekā_eka bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ bhoga--_bhoga artha--_artha yuktau_yuj

kṣaram_kṣara pradhānam_pradhāna amṛta--_amṛta akṣaram_akṣara haraḥ_hara
kṣara--_kṣara ātmānau_ātman īśate_īś devaḥ_deva ekaḥ_eka

bhoktā_bhoktṛ bhogyam_bhogya preritāram_preritṛ ca_ca matvā_man
sarvam_sarva proktam_pravac trividham_trividha brahmam_brahma etat_etad

lg.l: ajām_ajā ekām_eka lohita--_lohita śukla--_śukla kṛṣṇāṃ_kṛṣṇa
bahvīḥ_bahu prajāḥ_prajā sṛjamānām_sṛj sarūpāḥ_sarūpa
ajaḥ_aja hi_hi ekaḥ_eka juṣamāṇaḥ_juṣ anuśete_anuśī
jahāti_hā enām_enad bhukta--_bhuj bhogām_bhoga ajaḥ_aja anyaḥ_anya

div.p: atra_atra api_api kṣara--_kṣara akṣara--_akṣara śabda--_śabda bodhyāt_budh kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña rūpāt_rūpa yugalāt_yugala svasya_sva puruṣottamasya_puruṣottama anyatvam_anyatva vakṣyati_vac dvau_dvi imau_idam puruṣau_puruṣa iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi tasmāt_tasmāt mithas_mithas sampṛktānām_sampṛc api_api prakṛti--_prakṛti ādīnām_ādi vivikta--_vivic tayā_tā

yat_yad tu_tu eka--_eka ātma--_ātman vādinaḥ_vādin kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña ca_ca api_api mām_mad viddhi_vid iti_iti atra_atra sāmānādhikaraṇya--_sāmānādhikaraṇya pratītyā_pratīti sarveśvarasya_sarveśvara eva_eva sataḥ_as asyāḥ_idam vidyayā_vidyā eva_eva kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña bhāvaḥ_bhāva rajjoḥ_rajju iva_iva bhujaṅgama--_bhujaṃgama tvam_tva tad--_tad nivṛttaye_nivṛtti hareḥ_hari āptatamasya_āptatama idam_idam vākyam_vākya kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña ca_ca api_api mām_mad iti_iti rajjuḥ_rajju iyam_idam na_na bhujaṅgaḥ_bhujaṃga iti_iti āpta--_āpta vākyāt_vākya bhujaṅga--_bhujaṃga tva--_tva bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti iva_iva kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña tva--_tva bhrāntiḥ_bhrānti asmāt_idam vākyāt_vākya vinaśyati_vinaś iti_iti iti_iti dehinaḥ_dehin asmin_idam iti_iti asya_idam bhāṣye_bhāṣya draṣṭavyam_dṛś evam_evam tu_tu vyākhyātam_vyākhyā yujyate_yuj ca_ca śabdaḥ_śabda kṣetra--_kṣetra samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha kṣetram_kṣetra kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña ca_ca mām_mad eva_eva viddhi_vid mad--_mad adhīna--_adhīna sthiti--_sthiti pravṛttika--_pravṛttika tvāt_tva mad--_mad vyāpya--_vyāp tvāt_tva ca_ca mad--_mad ātmakam_ātmaka jānīhi_jñā iti_iti evam_evam eva_eva uktam_vac kṣetra--_kṣetra ksetrajñayoḥ_ksetrajña iti_iti tayoḥ_tad mad--_mad adhīna--_adhīna pravṛttika--_pravṛttika tva--_tva ādibhiḥ_ādi mad--_mad ātmaka--_ātmaka tayā_tā yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tat_tad jñānam_jñāna mama_mad matam_man itas_itas anyathā_anyathā tu_tu amatam_amata iti_iti
BhG 13.3

lg.l: tat_tad kṣetram_kṣetra yat_yad ca_ca yādṛś_yādṛś ca_ca yad--_yad vikāri_vikārin yatas_yatas ca_ca yat_yad
sa_tad ca_ca yaḥ_yad yad--_yad prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ca_ca tat_tad samāsena_samāsena me_mad śṛṇu_śru

div.p:
tad--_tad viveka--_viveka artham_artha idam_idam śarīram_śarīra kṣetram_kṣetra iti_iti ādi_ādi uktam_vac tat_tad etat_etad prapañcayiṣyan_prapañcay pratijānīte_pratijñā tat_tad iti_iti yat_yad uktam_vac mayā_mad kṣetram_kṣetra tat_tad kṣetram_kṣetra yat_yad svarūpataḥ_svarūpa jaḍam_jaḍa dṛśya--_dṛś ādi--_ādi svabhāvām_svabhāva yādṛś_yādṛś yādṛśam_yādṛśa ca_ca icchā--_icchā ādi--_ādi dharmakam_dharmaka yad--_yad vikāri_vikārin yaiḥ_yad indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi vikāraiḥ_vikāra yuktam_yuj yatas_yatas ca_ca prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣa--_puruṣa saṃyogāt_saṃyoga bhavati_bhū yat_yad iti_iti yaiḥ_yad prakāraiḥ_prakāra sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ādi--_ādi bhedaiḥ_bheda bhinnam_bhid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad ca_ca kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña yad--_yad svarūpaḥ_svarūpa
yad--_yad prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ca_ca acintya--_acintya aiśvarya--_aiśvarya yogena_yoga yaiḥ_yad prabhāvaiḥ_prabhāva sampannaḥ_sampad tam_tad sarvam_sarva saṅkṣepa--_saṃkṣepa itas_itas mattaḥ_mad śṛṇu_śru

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana saṃkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa uktam_vac artham_artha vivarītum_vivṛ ārabhate_ārabh tat_tad kṣetram_kṣetra iti_iti tat_tad idam_idam śarīram_śarīra iti_iti prāk_prāk uktam_vac jaḍa--_jaḍa varga--_varga rūpam_rūpa kṣetram_kṣetra yat_yad ca_ca svarūpeṇa_svarūpa jaḍa--_jaḍa dṛśya--_dṛś paricchinna--_paricchid ādi--_ādi svabhāvam_svabhāva yādṛś_yādṛś ca_ca icchā--_icchā ādi--_ādi dharmakam_dharmaka yad--_yad vikāri_vikārin yaiḥ_yad indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi vikāraiḥ_vikāra yatas_yatas ca_ca kāraṇāt_kāraṇa yat_yad kāryam_kārya utpadyate_utpad iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa athavā_athavā yatas_yatas prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣa--_puruṣa saṃyogāt_saṃyoga bhavati_bhū yat_yad iti_iti yaiḥ_yad sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ādi--_ādi bhedaiḥ_bheda bhinnam_bhid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra aniyamena_aniyama ca-kāra--_ca-kāra prayogāt_prayoga sarva--_sarva samuccayaḥ_samuccaya draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś sa_tad ca_ca kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña yaḥ_yad svarūpataḥ_svarūpa sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa caitanya--_caitanya ānanda--_ānanda svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva yad--_yad prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ca_ca ye_yad prabhāvāḥ_prabhāva upādhi--_upādhi kṛtāḥ_kṛ śaktayaḥ_śakti yasya_yad tat_tad kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña yāthātmyam_yāthātmya sarva--_sarva viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa viśiṣṭam_viśiṣ samāsena_samāsena saṃkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa me_mad mama_mad vacanāt_vacana śṛṇu_śru śrutvā_śru avadhāraya_avadhāray iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

yādṛś_yādṛś yādṛśa--_yādṛśa icchā--_icchā ādi--_ādi dharmakam_dharmaka yat_yad vikāri_vikārin vairi--_vairin priya--_priya ādi--_ādi vikāraiḥ_vikāra yuktam_yuj yatas_yatas ca_ca prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣa--_puruṣa saṃyogāt_saṃyoga udbhūtam_udbhū yat_yad iti_iti yaiḥ_yad sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ādi--_ādi bhedaiḥ_bheda bhinnam_bhid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña jīvātmā_jīvātman paramātmā_paramātman ca_ca yat_yad tat_tad iti_iti napuṃsakam_napuṃsaka ca_ca iti_iti eka--_eka śeṣaḥ_śeṣa samāsena_samāsa saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa

āha_ah tat_tad kṣetram_kṣetra śarīram_śarīra yat_yad ca_ca yat_yad dravyam_dravya yādṛś_yādṛś yad--_yad āśraya--_āśraya bhūtam_bhū yad--_yad vikāri_vikārin yaiḥ_yad vikāraiḥ_vikāra upetam_upe yatas_yatas ca_ca hetoḥ_hetu udbhūtam_udbhū yat_yad prayojanakam_prayojanaka ca_ca yat_yad iti_iti yat_yad svarūpam_svarūpa sa_tad ca_ca kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña jīva--_jīva lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa pareśa--_pareśa lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa ca_ca yaḥ_yad yad--_yad svarūpaḥ_svarūpa yad--_yad prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva yad--_yad śaktikaḥ_śaktika ca_ca napuṃsakam_napuṃsaka ca_ca asya_idam anyatra_anyatra asyām_idam iti_iti sūtrāt_sūtra
BhG 13.4

lg.l: ṛṣibhiḥ_ṛṣi bahudhā_bahudhā gītam_gā chandobhiḥ_chandas vividhaiḥ_vividha pṛthak_pṛthak
brahma--_brahman sūtra--_sūtra padaiḥ_pada ca_ca eva_eva hetumadbhiḥ_hetumat viniścitaiḥ_viniści

div.p: āha_ah ṛṣibhiḥ_ṛṣi vasiṣṭha--_vasiṣṭha ādibhiḥ_ādi yoga--_yoga śāstreṣu_śāstra dhyāna--_dhyāna dhāraṇa--_dhāraṇa ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya tvena_tva virāj--_virāj ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa bahudhā_bahudhā gītam_gīta nirūpitam_nirūpay vividhaiḥ_vividha vicitraiḥ_vicitra nitya--_nitya naimitta--_naimitta eka--_eka kāmya--_kāmya karma--_karman ādi--_ādi viṣayaiḥ_viṣaya chandobhiḥ_chandas vedaiḥ_veda nānā_nānā yajanīya--_yaj devatā--_devatā ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa bahudhā_bahudhā gītam_gā brahmaṇaḥ_brahman sūtraiḥ_sūtra padaiḥ_pada ca_ca brahma_brahman sūtryate_sūtray sūcyate_sūcay ebhiḥ_idam iti_iti brahma--_brahman sūtrāṇi_sūtra yatas_yatas vai_vai imāni_idam bhūtāni_bhūta jāyante_jan iti_iti ādīni_ādi taṭastha--_taṭastha lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa parāṇi_para upaniṣad--_upaniṣad vākyāni_vākya tathā_tathā ca_ca brahma_brahman padyate_pad gamyate_gam sākṣāt_sākṣāt jñāyate_jñā ebhiḥ_idam iti_iti padāni_pada svarūpa--_svarūpa lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa parāṇi_para satyam_satya jñānam_jñāna anantam_ananta brahma_brahman iti_iti ādīni_ādi taiḥ_tad ca_ca bahudhā_bahudhā gītam_gā kim_ka ca_ca hetumadbhiḥ_hetumat sat_as eva_eva saumya_saumya idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as katham_katham asataḥ_asat sat_as jāyeta_jan iti_iti tathā_tathā kaḥ_ka hi_hi eva_eva anyāt_an kaḥ_ka prāṇyāt_prāṇ yat_yat eṣaḥ_etad ākāśaḥ_ākāśa ānandaḥ_ānanda na_na syāt_as eṣa_etad hi_hi eva_eva ānandayati_ānanday iti_iti ādi_ādi yuktimadbhiḥ_yuktimat anyāt_anya apāna--_apāna ceṣṭām_ceṣṭā kaḥ_ka kuryāt_kṛ prāṇyāt_prāṇ prāṇa--_prāṇa vyāpāram_vyāpāra vā_vā kaḥ_ka kuryāt_kṛ iti_iti śruti--_śruti padayoḥ_pada arthaḥ_artha viniścitaiḥ_viniści upakrama--_upakrama upasaṃhāra--_upasaṃhāra eka--_eka vākya--_vākya tayā_tā asandigdha--_asaṃdigdha artha--_artha pratipādakaiḥ_pratipādaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad evam_evam etaiḥ_etad vistareṇa_vistara uktam_vac duḥsaṅgraham_duḥsaṃgraha saṅkṣepataḥ_saṃkṣepa tubhyam_tvad kathayiṣyāmi_kathay tat_tad śṛṇu_śru iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad vai_vai atha_atha atas_atas brahma--_brahman jijñāsā_jijñāsā iti_iti ādīni_ādi brahma--_brahman sūtrāṇi_sūtra gṛhyante_grah tāni_tad eva_eva brahma_brahman padyate_pad niścīyate_niści ebhiḥ_idam iti_iti padāni_pada taiḥ_tad hetumadbhiḥ_hetumat īkṣateḥ_īkṣati na_na aśabdam_aśabda ānanda--_ānanda mayaḥ_maya abhyāsāt_abhyāsa iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi yuktimadbhiḥ_yuktimat viniścitaiḥ_viniści iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śeṣam_śeṣa samānam_samāna

āha_ah ṛṣibhiḥ_ṛṣi vasiṣṭha--_vasiṣṭha ādibhiḥ_ādi yoga--_yoga śāstreṣu_śāstra dhāraṇā--_dhāraṇā dhyāna--_dhyāna viṣaya--_viṣaya tvena_tva bahudhā_bahudhā gītam_gīta nirūpitam_nirūpay etena_etad yoga--_yoga śāstra--_śāstra pratipādya--_pratipāday tvam_tva uktam_vac vividhaiḥ_vividha nitya--_nitya naimittika--_naimittika kāmya--_kāmya karma--_karman ādi--_ādi viṣayaiḥ_viṣaya chandobhiḥ_chandas ṛc--_ṛc ādi--_ādi mantraiḥ_mantra brāhmaṇaiḥ_brāhmaṇa ca_ca pṛthak_pṛthak vivekataḥ_viveka gītam_gā etena_etad karma--_karman kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa pratipādya--_pratipāday tvam_tva uktam_vac brahma--_brahman sūtra--_sūtra padaiḥ_pada ca_ca brahma_brahman sūtryate_sūtray sūcyate_sūcay kiṃcid_kaścit vyavadhānena_vyavadhāna pratipādyate_pratipāday ebhiḥ_idam iti_iti brahma--_brahman sūtrāṇi_sūtra yatas_yatas vai_vai imāni_idam bhūtāni_bhūta jāyante_jan yena_yad jātāni_jan jīvanti_jīv yat_yat prayanti_pre abhisaṃviśanti_abhisaṃviś iti_iti ādīni_ādi taṭastha--_taṭastha lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa parāṇi_para upaniṣad--_upaniṣad vākyāni_vākya tathā_tathā padyate_pad brahma_brahman sākṣāt_sākṣāt pratipādyate_pratipāday ebhiḥ_idam iti_iti padāni_pada svarūpa--_svarūpa lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa parāṇi_para satyam_satya jñānam_jñāna anantam_ananta brahma_brahman iti_iti ādīni_ādi taiḥ_tad brahma--_brahman hetumadbhiḥ_hetumat sat_as eva_eva saumya_saumya idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as ekam_eka eva_eva advitīyam_advitīya iti_iti upakramya_upakram tat_tad dha_ha eke_eka āhuḥ_ah asat_asat eva_eva idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as ekam_eka eva_eva advitīyam_advitīya tasmāt_tasmāt asataḥ_asat sat_as jāyate_jan iti_iti nāstika--_nāstika matam_mata upanyasya_upanyas syāt_as iti_iti ha_ha uvāca_vac katham_katham asataḥ_asat sat_as jāyate_jan iti_iti ādi--_ādi yuktīḥ_yukti pratipādayadbhiḥ_pratipāday viniścitaiḥ_viniści upakrama--_upakrama upasaṃhāra--_upasaṃhāra eka--_eka vākya--_vākya tayā_tā sandeha--_saṃdeha śūnya--_śūnya artha--_artha pratipādakaiḥ_pratipādaka bahudhā_bahudhā gītam_gā ca_ca etena_etad jñāna--_jñāna kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa pratipādya--_pratipāday tvam_tva uktam_vac evam_evam etaiḥ_etad ati_ati vastareṇa_vastara uktam_vac kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña yāthātmyam_yāthātmya saṃkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa tubhyam_tvad kathayiṣyāmi_kathay tat_tad śṛṇu_śru iti_iti arthaḥ_artha athavā_athavā brahma--_brahman sūtrāṇi_sūtra tāni_tad padāni_pada ca_ca iti_iti karma--_karman dhārayaḥ_dhāraya tatra_tatra vidyā--_vidyā sūtrāṇi_sūtra ātmā_ātman iti_iti eva_eva upāsīta_upās iti_iti ādīni_ādi avidyā--_avidyā sūtrāṇi_sūtra na_na sa_tad veda_vid yathā_yathā paśuḥ_paśu iti_iti ādīni_ādi taiḥ_tad gītam_gā iti_iti

āha_ah chandobhiḥ_chandas vedaiḥ_veda brahma--_brahman sūtrāṇi_sūtra atha_atha atas_atas brahma--_brahman jijñāsā_jijñāsā iti_iti ādīni_ādi tāni_tad eva_eva sūtrāṇi_sūtra brahma_brahman padyate_pad jñāyate_jñā ebhiḥ_idam iti_iti tāni_tad tathā_tathā taiḥ_tad kīdṛśaiḥ_kīdṛśa hetumadbhiḥ_hetumat īkṣateḥ_īkṣati na_na aśabdam_aśabda ānanda--_ānanda mayaḥ_maya abhyāsāt_abhyāsa iti_iti yuktimadbhiḥ_yuktimat viniścitaiḥ_viniści viśeṣataḥ_viśeṣataḥ niścita--_niści arthaiḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva idam_idam kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña yāthātmyam_yāthātmya kaiḥ_ka vistareṇa_vistara uktam_vac yat_yad samāsena_samāsena brūṣe_brū iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah ṛṣibhiḥ_ṛṣi iti_iti ṛṣibhiḥ_ṛṣi parāśara--_parāśara ādibhiḥ_ādi etat_etad kṣetra--_kṣetra ādi--_ādi svarūpam_svarūpa bahudhā_bahudhā gītam_gā

lg.l: aham_mad tvam_tvad ca_ca tathā_tathā anye_anya bhūtaiḥ_bhūta uhyāma_vah pārthiva_pārthiva
guṇa--_guṇa pravāha--_pravāha patitaḥ_pat bhūta--_bhūta vargaḥ_varga api_api yāti_yā ayam_idam
karma--_karman vaśyāḥ_vaśya guṇāḥ_guṇa hi_hi ete_etad sattva--_sattva ādyāḥ_ādya pṛthivī--_pṛthivī pate_pati
avidyā--_avidyā sañcitam_saṃci karma_karman tat_tad ca_ca aśeṣeṣu_aśeṣa jantuṣu_jantu
ātmā_ātman śuddhaḥ_śudh akṣaraḥ_akṣara śāntaḥ_śam nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa prakṛteḥ_prakṛti paraḥ_para
pravṛddhi--_pravṛddhi apacayau_apacaya na_na asya_idam ekasya_eka akhila--_akhila jantuṣu_jantu

div.p: iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi tathā_tathā chandobhiḥ_chandas vedaiḥ_veda vividhaiḥ_vividha sarvaiḥ_sarva bahudhā_bahudhā tat_tad gītam_gā yajuḥ--_yajus śākhāyām_śākhā tasmāt_tad vai_vai etasmāt_etad ātmanaḥ_ātman ākāśaḥ_ākāśa sambhūtaḥ_sambhū iti_iti ādinā_ādi brahma_brahman puccham_puccha pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti antena_anta anna--_anna maya--_maya prāṇa--_prāṇa maya--_maya manaḥ--_manas maya--_maya vijñāna--_vijñāna maya--_maya ānanda--_ānanda mayāḥ_maya pañca_pañcan puruṣāḥ_puruṣa paṭhitāḥ_paṭh teṣu_tad anna--_anna maya--_maya ādi--_ādi trayam_traya jaḍam_jaḍa kṣetra--_kṣetra svarūpam_svarūpa tatas_tatas bhinnaḥ_bhid vijñāna--_vijñāna mayaḥ_maya jīvaḥ_jīva tasya_tad tasmāt_tasmāt ca_ca bhinnaḥ_bhid sarva--_sarva antaraḥ_antara ānanda--_ānanda mayaḥ_maya iti_iti īśvara--_īśvara kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña svarūpam_svarūpa uktam_vac evam_evam veda--_veda antareṣu_antara mṛgyam_mṛgay brahma--_brahman sūtra--_sūtra rūpaiḥ_rūpa padaiḥ_pada vākyaiḥ_vākya ca_ca tad--_tad yāthātmyam_yāthātmya gītam_gā teṣu_tad na_na viyat_viyant aśruteḥ_aśruti iti_iti ādinā_ādi kṣetra--_kṣetra svarūpam_svarūpa na_na ātmā_ātman śruteḥ_śruti iti_iti ādinā_ādi jīva--_jīva svarūpam_svarūpa parāt_para tu_tu tat_tad śruteḥ_śruti iti_iti ādinā_ādi īśvara--_īśvara svarūpam_svarūpa sphuṭam_sphuṭa anyat_anya

lg.l: mahā--_mahat bhūtāni_bhūta ahaṃkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra buddhiḥ_buddhi avyaktam_avyakta eva_eva ca_ca
indriyāṇi_indriya daśa_daśan ekam_eka ca_ca pañca_pañcan ca_ca indriya--_indriya gocarāḥ_gocara
icchā_icchā dveṣaḥ_dveṣa sukham_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha saṃghātaḥ_saṃghāta cetanā_cetanā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti
etat_etad kṣetram_kṣetra samāsena_samāsena sa_sa vikāram_vikāra udāhṛtam_udāhṛ

div.p: āha_ah mahābhūtāni_mahābhūta bhūmi--_bhūmi ādīni_ādi pañca_pañcan ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtaḥ_bhū buddhiḥ_buddhi vijñāna--_vijñāna ātmakam_ātmaka mahat_mahant tattvam_tattva avyaktam_avyakta mūla--_mūla prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti indriyāṇi_indriya daśa_daśan bāhyāni_bāhya jñāna--_jñāna karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya ekam_eka ca_ca manaḥ_manas ca_ca pañca_pañcan tan--_tad mātra--_mātra rūpāḥ_rūpa eva_eva śabda--_śabda ādayaḥ_ādi ākāśa--_ākāśa ādi--_ādi viśeṣa--_viśeṣa guṇatayā_guṇatā vyaktāḥ_vyakta santaḥ_as indriya--_indriya viṣayāḥ_viṣaya pañca_pañcan tat_tad evam_evam caturviṃśati--_caturviṃśati tattvāni_tattva uktāni_vac

iccha_iṣ iti_iti icchā--_icchā ādayaḥ_ādi prasiddhāḥ_prasidh saṅghātaḥ_saṃghāta śarīram_śarīra cetanā_cetanā jñāna--_jñāna ātmikā_ātmaka manaḥ--_manas vṛttiḥ_vṛtti dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti dhairyam_dhairya ete_etad ced_ced ha_ha ādayaḥ_ādi dṛśya--_dṛś tvāt_tva na_na ātma--_ātman dharmāḥ_dharma api_api tu_tu manaḥ--_manas dharmāḥ_dharma eva_eva atas_atas kṣetra--_kṣetra antaḥpātinaḥ_antaḥpātin eva_eva upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa ca_ca etat_etad saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ādīnām_ādi tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti kāmaḥ_kāma saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa vicikitsā_vicikitsā śraddhā_śraddhā aśraddhā_aśraddhā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti adhṛtiḥ_adhṛti hrīḥ_hrī dhīḥ_dhī bhīḥ_bhī iti_iti etat_etad sarvam_sarva manaḥ_manas eva_eva iti_iti anena_idam ca_ca yādṛś_yādṛś iti_iti pratijñātāḥ_pratijñā kṣetra--_kṣetra dharmāḥ_dharma darśitāḥ_darśay etat_etad kṣetram_kṣetra sa_sa vikāram_vikāra indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi vikāra--_vikāra sahitam_sahita saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa tubhyam_tvad mayā_mad uktam_vac iti_iti kṣetra--_kṣetra upasaṃhāraḥ_upasaṃhāra

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam prarocitāya_prarocay arjunāya_arjuna kṣetra--_kṣetra svarūpam_svarūpa tāvat_tāvat āha_ah dvābhyām_dvi mahānti_mahat bhūtāni_bhūta bhūmi--_bhūmi ādīni_ādi pañca_pañcan ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra tad--_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtaḥ_bhū abhimāna--_abhimāna lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa buddhiḥ_buddhi ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra kāraṇam_kāraṇa mahat_mahant tattvam_tattva adhyavasāya--_adhyavasāya lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa avyaktam_avyakta tad--_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas guṇa--_guṇa ātmakam_ātmaka pradhānam_pradhāna sarva--_sarva kāraṇam_kāraṇa na_na kasya_ka api_api kāryam_kṛ etāvatī_etāvat eva_eva aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti ca-śabdaḥ_ca-śabda bheda--_bheda samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha tat_tad evam_evam sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya matena_mata vyākhyātam_vyākhyā aupaniṣadānām_aupaniṣada tu_tu avyaktam_avyakta avyākṛtam_avyākṛta anirvacanīyam_anirvacanīya māyā--_māyā ākhyā_ākhyā pārameśvarī_pārameśvara śaktiḥ_śakti mama_mad māyā_māyā duratyayā_duratyaya iti_iti uktam_vac buddhiḥ_buddhi sarga--_sarga ādau_ādi tad--_tad viṣayam_viṣaya īkṣaṇam_īkṣaṇa ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra īkṣaṇa--_īkṣaṇa anantaram_anantaram aham_mad bahu_bahu syām_as iti_iti saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa tatas_tatas ākāśa--_ākāśa ādi--_ādi krameṇa_krama pañca--_pañcan bhūta--_bhūta utpattiḥ_utpatti iti_iti na_na hi_hi avyakta--_avyakta mahat--_mahant ahaṅkārāḥ_ahaṃkāra sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya siddhāḥ_siddha aupaniṣadaiḥ_aupaniṣada upagamyante_upagam aśabda--_aśabda tva--_tva ādi--_ādi hetubhiḥ_hetu iti_iti sthitam_sthā māyām_māyā tu_tu prakṛtim_prakṛti vidyāt_vid māyinam_māyin tu_tu maheśvaram_maheśvara te_tad dhyāna--_dhyāna yoga--_yoga anugatāḥ_anugam apaśyan_paś deva--_deva ātma--_ātman śaktim_śakti sva--_sva guṇaiḥ_guṇa nigūḍhām_niguh iti_iti śruti--_śruti pratipāditam_pratipāday avyaktam_avyakta tat_tad aikṣata_īkṣ iti_iti īkṣaṇa--_īkṣaṇa rūpā_rūpa buddhiḥ_buddhi bahu_bahu syām_as prajāyeya_prajan iti_iti bahu--_bahu bhavana--_bhavana saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa rūpaḥ_rūpa ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra tasmāt_tad vai_vai etasmāt_etad ātmanaḥ_ātman ākāśaḥ_ākāśa sambhūtaḥ_sambhū ākāśāt_ākāśa vāyuḥ_vāyu vāyoḥ_vāyu agniḥ_agni agneḥ_agni āpaḥ_ap adbhyaḥ_ap pṛthivī_pṛthivī pañca_pañcan bhūtāni_bhūta śrautāni_śrauta ayam_idam pakṣaḥ_pakṣa sādhīyān_sādhīyas

indriyāṇi_indriya daśa_daśan ekam_eka ca_ca śrotra--_śrotra tvac--_tvac cakṣū--_cakṣus rasana--_rasana ghrāṇa--_ghrāṇa ākhyāni_ākhyā pañca_pañcan buddhīndriyāṇi_buddhīndriya vāc--_vāc pāṇi--_pāṇi pāda--_pāda pāyu--_pāyu upastha--_upastha ākhyāni_ākhyā pañca_pañcan karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya iti_iti tāni_tad ekam_eka ca_ca manaḥ_manas saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa vikalpa--_vikalpa ātmakam_ātmaka pañca_pañcan ca_ca indriya--_indriya goccarāḥ_goccara śabda--_śabda sparśa--_sparśa rūpa--_rūpa rasa--_rasa gandhāḥ_gandha te_tad buddhīndriyāṇām_buddhīndriya jñāpya--_jñāpay tvena_tva viṣayāḥ_viṣaya karmendriyāṇām_karmendriya tu_tu kārya--_kṛ tvena_tva tāni_tad etāni_etad sāṅkhyāḥ_sāṃkhya caturviṃśati--_caturviṃśati tattvāni_tattva ācakṣante_ācakṣ

icchā_icchā sukhe_sukha tad--_tad sādhane_sādhana ca_ca idam_idam me_mad bhūyāt_bhū iti_iti spṛhā_spṛhā ātmā_ātman citta--_citta vṛttiḥ_vṛtti kāmaḥ_kāma iti_iti rāgaḥ_rāga iti_iti ca_ca ucyate_vac dveṣaḥ_dveṣa duḥkhe_duḥkha tad--_tad sādhane_sādhana ca_ca idam_idam me_mad mā_mā bhūt_bhū iti_iti spṛhā--_spṛhā virodhinī_virodhin citta--_citta vṛttiḥ_vṛtti krodhaḥ_krodha iti_iti īrṣyā_īrṣyā iti_iti ca_ca ucyate_vac saṃghātaḥ_saṃghāta pañca--_pañcan mahā--_mahat bhūta--_bhūta pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma sa_sa indriyam_indriya śarīram_śarīra dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti avasannānām_avasad deha--_deha indriyāṇām_indriya avaṣṭambha--_avaṣṭambha hetuḥ_hetu prayatnaḥ_prayatna upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad icchā--_icchā ādi--_ādi grahaṇam_grahaṇa sarva--_sarva antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa dharmāṇām_dharma tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti kāmaḥ_kāma saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa vicikitsā_vicikitsā śraddhā_śraddhā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti hrīḥ_hrī dhīḥ_dhī bhīḥ_bhī iti_iti etat_etad sarvam_sarva manaḥ_manas eva_eva iti_iti mṛd--_mṛd ghaṭaḥ_ghaṭa iti_iti vat_vat upādāna--_upādāna abhedena_abheda kāryāṇām_kārya kāma--_kāma ādīnām_ādi manaḥ--_manas dharma--_dharma tvam_tva āha_ah etat_etad paridṛśyamānam_paridṛś sarvam_sarva mahābhūta--_mahābhūta ādi--_ādi dhṛti--_dhṛti antam_anta jaḍam_jaḍa kṣetrajñena_kṣetrajña sākṣiṇā_sākṣin avabhāsyamāna--_avabhāsay tvāt_tva tad--_tad anātmakam_anātmaka kṣetram_kṣetra bhāsyam_bhās acetanam_acetana samāsena_samāsena udāhṛtam_udāhṛ uktam_vac

nanu_nanu śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya saṃghātaḥ_saṃghāta eva_eva cetanaḥ_cetana kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña iti_iti lokāyatikāḥ_lokāyatika cetanā_cetanā kṣaṇikam_kṣaṇika jñānam_jñāna eva_eva ātmā_ātman iti_iti sugatāḥ_sugata icchā--_icchā dveṣa--_dveṣa prayatna--_prayatna sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha jñānāni_jñāna ātmanaḥ_ātman liṅgam_liṅga iti_iti naiyāyikāḥ_naiyāyika tat_tad katham_katham kṣetram_kṣetra eva_eva etat_etad sarvam_sarva iti_iti tatra_tatra āha_ah sa_sa vikāram_vikāra iti_iti vikāraḥ_vikāra janma--_janman ādiḥ_ādi nāśa--_nāśa antaḥ_anta pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma nairuktaiḥ_nairukta paṭhitaḥ_paṭh tad--_tad sahitam_sahita sa_sa vikāram_vikāra idam_idam mahā--_mahat bhūta--_bhūta ādi--_ādi dhṛti--_dhṛti antam_anta atas_atas na_na vikāra--_vikāra sākṣi_sākṣin sva--_sva utpatti--_utpatti vināśayoḥ_vināśa svena_sva draṣṭum_dṛś aśakya--_aśakya tvāt_tva anyeṣām_anya api_api sva--_sva dharmāṇām_dharma sva--_sva darśanam_darśana antareṇa_antareṇa darśana--_darśana anupapatteḥ_anupapatti svena_sva eva_eva sva--_sva darśane_darśana ca_ca kartṛ--_kartṛ karma--_karman virodhāt_virodha nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra eva_eva sarva--_sarva vikāra--_vikāra sākṣī_sākṣin tat_tad uktam_vac
na_na syāt_as vikriyām_vikriyā duḥkhī_duḥkhin sākṣi--_sākṣin tā_tā kā_ka vikāriṇaḥ_vikārin dhī--_dhī vikriyā--_vikriyā sahasrāṇām_sahasra sākṣyataḥ_sākṣya aham_mad avikriyaḥ_avikriya
div.l: tena_tena vikāri--_vikārin tvam_tva eva_eva kṣetra--_kṣetra cihnam_cihna na_na tu_tu parigaṇanam_parigaṇana iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatra_tatra kṣetrasya_kṣetra svarūpam_svarūpa āha_ah mahābhūtāni_mahābhūta ākāśa--_ākāśa ādīni_ādi ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra tad--_tad kāraṇam_kāraṇa buddhiḥ_buddhi vijñāna--_vijñāna ātmakam_ātmaka mahat--_mahant tattva_tattva ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra kāraṇam_kāraṇa avyaktam_avyakta prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti mahat--_mahant tattva--_tattva kāraṇam_kāraṇa indriyāṇi_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi daśa--_daśan ekam_eka ca_ca manaḥ_manas indriya--_indriya gocarāḥ_gocara pañca_pañcan śabda--_śabda ādayaḥ_ādi viṣayāḥ_viṣaya tat_tad evam_evam caturviṃśati--_caturviṃśati tattva--_tattva ātmakam_ātmaka iti_iti icchā--_icchā ādayaḥ_ādi prasiddhāḥ_prasidh saṅghātaḥ_saṃghāta pañca--_pañcan mahābhūta--_mahābhūta pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma dehaḥ_deha cetanā_cetanā jñāna--_jñāna ātmikā_ātmaka manaḥ--_manas vṛttiḥ_vṛtti dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti dhairyam_dhairya icchā--_icchā ādayaḥ_ādi ca_ca ete_etad manaḥ--_manas dharmāḥ_dharma eva_eva na_na tu_tu ātma--_ātman dharmāḥ_dharma atas_atas kṣetra--_kṣetra antaḥpātinaḥ_antaḥpātin eva_eva upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa ca_ca etat_etad saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ādīnām_ādi tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti kāmaḥ_kāma saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa vicikitsā_vicikitsā śraddhā_śraddhā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti hrīḥ_hrī dhīḥ_dhī bhīḥ_bhī iti_iti etat_etad sarvam_sarva manaḥ_manas eva_eva iti_iti anena_idam yādṛś_yādṛś iti_iti pratijñātāḥ_pratijñā kṣetra--_kṣetra dharmāḥ_dharma darśitāḥ_darśay etat_etad kṣetram_kṣetra sa_sa vikāram_vikāra janma--_janman ādi--_ādi ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ vikāra--_vikāra sahitam_sahita

āha_ah mahābhūtāni_mahābhūta pañca_pañcan kha--_kha ādīni_ādi ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra tad--_tad hetuḥ_hetu tāmasaḥ_tāmasa bhūtādi--_bhūtādi saṃjñaḥ_saṃjñā buddhiḥ_buddhi tad--_tad heutr_heutṛ jñāna--_jñāna pradhānaḥ_pradhāna mahān_mahant avyaktam_avyakta tad--_tad hetuḥ_hetu triguṇa--_triguṇa avastham_avasthā pradhānam_pradhāna indriyāṇi_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi pañca_pañcan vāc--_vāc ādīni_ādi ca_ca pañca_pañcan iti_iti bhūta--_bhūta ādi--_ādi kha--_kha ādi--_ādi antarālikāḥ_antarālika sūkṣmāḥ_sūkṣma śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi tanmātrāḥ_tanmātra kha--_kha ādi--_ādi viśeṣa--_viśeṣa guṇatayā_guṇatā vyaktāḥ_vyakta santaḥ_as evam_evam caturviṃśati--_caturviṃśati tattva--_tattva ātmakam_ātmaka kṣetram_kṣetra jñeyam_jñā icchā--_icchā ādayaḥ_ādi catvāraḥ_catur prasiddhāḥ_prasidh saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa ādīnām_ādi upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad ete_etad manaḥ--_manas dharmāḥ_dharma kāmaḥ_kāma saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa vicikitsā_vicikitsā śraddhā_śraddhā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti hrīḥ_hrī dhīḥ_dhī bhīḥ_bhī iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti yadi_yadi api_api ātma--_ātman dharmāḥ_dharma icchā--_icchā ādayaḥ_ādi yaḥ_yad ātmā_ātman iti_iti ādau_ādi satya--_satya kāmaḥ_kāma satya--_satya saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa iti_iti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa paṭhet_paṭh yaḥ_yad icchet_iṣ puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti sahasranāma--_sahasranāman stotrāt_stotra puruṣaḥ_puruṣa sukha--_sukha duḥkhānām_duḥkha bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tve_tva manaḥ--_manas dvāra--_dvāra abhivyakteḥ_abhivyakti manaḥ--_manas dharma--_dharma tvam_tva atas_atas kṣetra--_kṣetra antaḥpātaḥ_antaḥpāta saṅghātaḥ_saṃghāta bhūta--_bhūta pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma dehaḥ_deha sa_tad ca_ca cetanā_cetanā dhṛitr_dhṛitṛ bhogāya_bhoga mokṣāya_mokṣa ca_ca yatamānasya_yat cetanasya_cetana jīvasya_jīva ādhāra--_ādhāra tayā_tā utpannaḥ_utpad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra pradhāna--_pradhāna ādi--_ādi dravyāṇi_dravya kṣetra--_kṣetra ārambhakāṇi_ārambhaka iti_iti ca_ca iti_iti asya_idam śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi indiriyāṇi_indiriya śrotra--_śrotra āśritāni_āśri iti_iti yādṛś_yādṛś iti_iti asya_idam inchā--_inchā ādīni_ādi kṣetra--_kṣetra kāryāṇi_kārya iti_iti yad--_yad vikāri_vikārin iti_iti asya_idam cetanā_cetanā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti iti_iti yatas_yatas ca_ca iti_iti asya_idam saṅghātaḥ_saṃghāta iti_iti yat_yad iti_iti asau_asat uttaram_uttara uktam_vac etat_etad kṣetram_kṣetra sa_sa vikāram_vikāra janma--_janman ādi--_ādi ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ vikāra--_vikāra upetam_upe udāhṛtam_udāhṛ uktam_vac

lg.l: amāni--_amānin tvam_tva adambhi--_adambhin tvam_tva ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā kṣāntiḥ_kṣānti ārjavam_ārjava
ācārya--_ācārya upāsanam_upāsana śaucam_śauca sthairyam_sthairya ātma--_ātman vinigrahaḥ_vinigraha
indriya--_indriya artheṣu_artha vairāgyam_vairāgya anahaṃkāraḥ_anahaṃkāra eva_eva ca_ca
janma--_janman mṛtyu--_mṛtyu jarā--_jarā vyādhi--_vyādhi duḥkha--_duḥkha doṣa--_doṣa anudarśanam_anudarśana
asaktiḥ_asakti anabhiṣvaṅgaḥ_anabhiṣvaṅga putra--_putra dāra--_dāra gṛha--_gṛha ādiṣu_ādi
nityam_nitya ca_ca sama--_sama citta--_citta tvam_tva iṣṭa--_iṣ aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa upapattiṣu_upapatti
mayi_mad ca_ca an_an anya--_anya yogena_yoga bhaktiḥ_bhakti avyabhicāriṇī_avyabhicārin
vivikta--_vivic deśa--_deśa sevi--_sevin tvam_tva aratiḥ_arati jana--_jana saṃsadi_saṃsad
adhyātma--_adhyātma jñāna--_jñāna nitya--_nitya tvam_tva tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna artha--_artha darśanam_darśana
etat_etad jñānam_jñāna iti_iti proktam_pravac ajñānam_ajñāna yat_yad atas_atas anyathā_anyathā

div.p: āha_ah amāni--_amānin tvam_tva sva--_sva guṇa--_guṇa ślāghā--_ślāghā rāhityam_rāhitya adambhi--_adambhin tvam_tva dambha--_dambha rāhityam_rāhitya ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā para--_para pīḍā--_pīḍā varjanam_varjana kṣāntiḥ_kṣānti sahiṣṇu--_sahiṣṇu tvam_tva ārjavam_ārjava avakra--_avakra tā_tā ācārya--_ācārya upāsanam_upāsana sat--_sat guru--_guru sevā_sevā śaucam_śauca bāhma_bāhma ābhyantaram_ābhyantara ca_ca tatra_tatra bāhyam_bāhya mṛd--_mṛd jala--_jala ādinā_ādi ābhyantaram_ābhyantara ca_ca rāga--_rāga ādi--_ādi mala--_mala kṣālanam_kṣālana tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti

śaucam_śauca ca_ca dvividham_dvividha proktam_pravac bāhyam_bāhya abhyantaram_abhyantara tathā_tathā mṛd--_mṛd jalābhyām_jala smṛtam_smṛ bāhyam_bāhya bhāva--_bhāva śuddhiḥ_śuddhi tathā_tathā āntaram_āntara

dhairyam_dhairya sat--_sat mārge_mārga pravṛttasya_pravṛt tad--_tad eka--_eka niṣṭha--_niṣṭha tā_tā ātma--_ātman vinigrahaḥ_vinigraha śarīra--_śarīra saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama etat_etad jñānam_jñāna iti_iti proktam_pravac iti_iti pañcamena_pañcama anvayaḥ_anvaya kim_ka ca_ca mayi_mad iti_iti mayi_mad parameśvare_parameśvara ananya--_ananya yogena_yoga sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi avyābhicāriṇī_avyābhicārin ekāntā_ekānta bhaktiḥ_bhakti tam_tad deśam_deśa sevitum_sev śīlam_śīla yasya_yad tasya_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva tattvam_tattva prākṛtānām_prākṛta janānām_jana saṃsadi_saṃsad sabhāyām_sabhā aratiḥ_arati rati--_rati abhāvaḥ_abhāva kim_ka ca_ca adhyātma_adhyātma iti_iti ātmānam_ātman adhikṛtya_adhikṛ vartamānam_vṛt jñānam_jñāna adhyātma--_adhyātma jñānam_jñāna tasmin_tad nitya--_nitya tvam_tva nitya--_nitya bhāvaḥ_bhāva tattva--_tattva jñānasya_jñāna arthaḥ_artha prayojanam_prayojana mokṣaḥ_mokṣa tasya_tad darśanam_darśana mokṣasya_mokṣa sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tva--_tva ālocanam_ālocanā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etat_etad amāni--_amānin tvam_tva adambhi--_adambhin tvam_tva iti_iti ādi_ādi viṃśati--_viṃśati saṅkhyakam_saṃkhyaka yat_yad uktam_vac etat_etad jñānam_jñāna iti_iti proktam_pravac vasiṣṭha--_vasiṣṭha ādibhiḥ_ādi jñāna--_jñāna sādhana--_sādhana tvāt_tva atas_atas anyathā_anyathā asmāt_idam viparītam_viparīta māni--_mānin tva--_tva ādi_ādi yat_yad tat_tad ajñānam_ajñāna iti_iti proktam_pravac jñāna--_jñāna virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva atas_atas sarvathā_sarvathā tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam kṣetram_kṣetra pratipādya_pratipāday tad--_tad sākṣiṇam_sākṣin kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña kṣetrāt_kṣetra vivekena_viveka vistarāt_vistara pratipādayitum_pratipāday tad--_tad jñāna--_jñāna yogyatvāya_yogyatva amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi sādhanāni_sādhana āha_ah jñeyam_jñā yat_yad tat_tad iti_iti atas_atas prāktanaiḥ_prāktana vidyamānaiḥ_vid a_a vidyamānaiḥ_vid vā_vā guṇaiḥ_guṇa ātmanaḥ_ātman ślāghanam_ślāghana māni--_mānin tvam_tva lābha--_lābha pūjā--_pūjā ākhyāti--_ākhyāti artham_artha svadharma--_svadharma prakaṭī--_prakaṭī karaṇam_karaṇa dāmbhi--_dāmbhin tvam_tva kāya--_kāya vāc--_vāc manobhiḥ_manas prāṇinām_prāṇin pīḍanam_pīḍana hiṃsā_hiṃsā teṣām_tad ārjavam_ārjava akauṭilyam_akauṭilya yathā_yathā hṛdayam_hṛdaya vyavaharaṇam_vyavaharaṇa para--_para pratāraṇā--_pratāraṇā rāhityam_rāhitya iti_iti yāvat_yāvat ācāryaḥ_ācārya mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanasya_sādhana upadeṣṭā_upadeṣṭṛ atra_atra vivakṣitaḥ_vivakṣita na_na tu_tu manu--_manu uktaḥ_vac upanīya_upanī adhyāpakaḥ_adhyāpaka tasya_tad śuśrūṣā--_śuśrūṣā namaskāra--_namaskāra ādi--_ādi prayogeṇa_prayoga sevanam_sevana ācārya--_ācārya upāsanam_upāsana śaucam_śauca bāhyam_bāhya kāya--_kāya malānām_mala mṛd--_mṛd jalābhyām_jala kṣālanam_kṣālana ābhyantaram_ābhyantara ca_ca manaḥ--_manas malānām_mala rāga--_rāga ādīnām_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya doṣa--_doṣa darśana--_darśana rūpa--_rūpa pratipakṣa--_pratipakṣa bhāvanayā_bhāvanā apanayanam_apanayana sthairyam_sthairya mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhane_sādhana pravṛttasya_pravṛt aneka--_aneka vidha--_vidha vighna--_vighna prāptau_prāpti api_api tad--_tad aparityāgena_aparityāga punar_punar punar_punar yatra_yatra ādhikyam_ādhikya ātma--_ātman vinigrahaḥ_vinigraha ātmanaḥ_ātman deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṃghātasya_saṃghāta
svabhāva--_svabhāva prāptām_prāp mokṣa--_mokṣa pratikūle_pratikūla pravṛttim_pravṛtti nirudhya_nirudh mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhane_sādhana eva_eva vyavasthāpanam_vyavasthāpana

kim_ka ca_ca -_indriyārtha śabda--_śabda ādiṣu_ādi dṛṣṭeṣu_dṛś ānuśravikeṣu_ānuśravika vā_vā bhogeṣu_bhoga rāga--_rāga virodhinī_virodhin aspṛhā--_aspṛhā ātmakā_ātmaka citta--_citta vṛttiḥ_vṛtti vairāgyam_vairāgya ātma--_ātman ślāghana--_ślāghana abhāve_abhāva api_api manasi_manas prādurbhūtaḥ_prādurbhū aham_mad sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa iti_iti garvaḥ_garva ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra tad--_tad abhāvaḥ_abhāva anahaṅkāraḥ_anahaṃkāra ayoga--_ayoga vyavaccheda--_vyavaccheda artham_artha eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra tena_tena amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādīnām_ādi viṃśati--_viṃśati saṅkhyākānām_saṃkhyāka samucitaḥ_samucita yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva jñānam_jñāna iti_iti proktam_pravac na_na tu_tu ekasya_eka api_api abhāvaḥ_abhāva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha janmanaḥ_janman garbha--_garbha vāsa--_vāsa yoni--_yoni dvāra--_dvāra niḥsaraṇa--_niḥsaraṇa rūpasya_rūpa mṛtyoḥ_mṛtyu sarva--_sarva marma--_marman chedana--_chedana rūpasya_rūpa jarāyāḥ_jarā prajñā--_prajñā śakti--_śakti tejaḥ--_tejas nirodha--_nirodha para--_para paribhava--_paribhava ādi--_ādi rūpāyāḥ_rūpa vyādhīnām_vyādhi jvara--_jvara atisāra--_atisāra ādi--_ādi rūpāṇām_rūpa iṣṭa--_iṣ viyoga--_viyoga aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa saṃyoga--_saṃyoga aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa saṃyoga--_saṃyoga aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa saṃyoga--_saṃyoga jānām_ja adhyātma--_adhyātma adhibhūta--_adhibhūta adhidaiva--_adhidaiva nimittānām_nimitta doṣasya_doṣa vāta--_vāta pitta--_pitta śleṣma--_śleṣman mala--_mala mūtra--_mūtra ādi--_ādi paripūrṇa--_paripṛ tvena_tva kāya--_kāya jugupsita--_jugups tvasya_tva janma--_janman ādi--_ādi duḥkha--_duḥkha anteṣu_anta doṣasya_doṣa anudarśanam_anudarśana janma--_janman ādi--_ādi vyādhi--_vyādhi anteṣu_anta duḥkha--_duḥkha rūpa--_rūpa doṣasya_doṣa anudarśanam_anudarśana iti_iti vā_vā idam_idam ca_ca viṣaya--_viṣaya vairāgya--_vairāgya hetu--_hetu tvena_tva ātma--_ātman darśanasya_darśana upakaroti_upakṛ

kim_ka ca_ca saktiḥ_sakti mama_mad idam_idam iti_iti etāvat--_etāvat mātreṇa_mātra prītiḥ_prīti abhiṣvaṅgaḥ_abhiṣvaṅga tu_tu aham_mad eva_eva ayam_idam iti_iti ananyatva--_ananyatva bhāvanayā_bhāvanā prīti--_prīti atiśayaḥ_atiśaya anyasmin_anya sukhini_sukhin duḥkhini_duḥkhin vā_vā aham_mad eva_eva sukhī_sukhin duḥkhī_duḥkhin ca_ca iti_iti tad--_tad rāhityam_rāhitya asaktiḥ_asakti anabhiṣvaṅgaḥ_anabhiṣvaṅga iti_iti ca_ca uktam_vac kutra_kutra sakti--_sakti abhiṣvaṅgau_abhiṣvaṅga varjanīyau_varjay atas_atas āha_ah putra--_putra dāra--_dāra gṛha--_gṛha ādiṣu_ādi putreṣu_putra dāreṣu_dāra gṛheṣu_gṛha ādi--_ādi grahaṇāt_grahaṇa anyeṣu_anya api_api bhṛtya--_bhṛtya ādiṣu_ādi sarveṣu_sarva sneha--_sneha viṣayeṣu_viṣaya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha nityam_nityam ca_ca sarvadā_sarvadā ca_ca sama--_sama citta--_citta tvam_tva harṣa--_harṣa viṣāda--_viṣāda śūnya--_śūnya manaḥ--_manas tvam_tva iṣṭa--_iṣ aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa upapattiṣu_upapatti upapattiḥ_upapatti prāptiḥ_prāpti iṣṭa--_iṣ upapattiṣu_upapatti harṣa--_harṣa abhāvaḥ_abhāva aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa upapattiṣu_upapatti viṣāda--_viṣāda abhāvaḥ_abhāva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha caḥ_ca samuccaye_samuccaya

kim_ka ca_ca mayi_mad ca_ca bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva parameśvare_parameśvara bhaktiḥ_bhakti sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa tva--_tva jñāna--_jñāna pūrvikā_pūrvaka prītiḥ_prīti ananya--_ananya yogena_yoga na_na anyaḥ_anya bhagavataḥ_bhagavant vāsudevāt_vāsudeva paraḥ_para asti_as atas_atas saḥ_tad eva_eva naḥ_mad gatiḥ_gati iti_iti evam_evam niścayena_niścaya api_api avyabhicāriṇī_avyabhicārin kena_ka api_api pratikūlena_pratikūla hetunā_hetu nivārayitum_nivāray aśakyā_aśakya sā_tad api_api jñāna--_jñāna hetuḥ_hetu prītiḥ_prīti na_na yāvat_yāvat mayi_mad vāsudeva_vāsudeva na_na mucyate_muc deha--_deha yogena_yoga tāvat_tāvat iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti

viviktaḥ_vivic svabhāvataḥ_svabhāva saṃskārataḥ_saṃskāra vā_vā śuddhaḥ_śudh aśucibhiḥ_aśuci sarpa--_sarpa vyāghra--_vyāghra ādibhiḥ_ādi ca_ca rahitaḥ_rahita suradhunī--_suradhunī pulina--_pulina ādi--_ādi śrita--_śri prasāda--_prasāda karaḥ_kara deśaḥ_deśa tad--_tad sevana--_sevana śīla--_śīla tvam_tva vivikta--_vivic deśa--_deśa sevi--_sevin tvam_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca

same_sama śucau_śuci śarkarā--_śarkarā vahni--_vahni bālukā--_bālukā vivarjite_vivarjay śabda--_śabda jala--_jala āśraya--_āśraya ādibhiḥ_ādi manaḥ_manas anukūle_anukūla na_na tu_tu cakṣu--_cakṣu pīḍane_pīḍana
guhā--_guhā nivāta--_nivāta āśrayaṇe_āśrayaṇa prayojayet_prayojay

janānām_jana ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna vimukhānām_vimukha viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga lampaṭa--_lampaṭa tā--_tā upadeśakānām_upadeśaka saṃsadi_saṃsad samavāye_samavāya tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna pratikūlāyām_pratikūla aratiḥ_arati aramaṇam_aramaṇa sādhūnām_sādhu tu_tu saṃsadi_saṃsad tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna anukūlāyām_anukūla ratiḥ_rati ucitā_ucita eva_eva
saṅgaḥ_saṅga sarva--_sarva ātmanā_ātman heyaḥ_hā sa_tad ca_ca iti_iti uktam_vac na_na śakyate_śak sa_tad sadbhiḥ_sat saha_saha kartavyaḥ_kṛ sataḥ_as saṅgaḥ_saṅga hi_hi bheṣajam_bheṣaja

kim_ka ca_ca adhyātma--_adhyātma jñānam_jñāna ātmānam_ātman adhikṛtya_adhikṛ pravṛttam_pravṛt ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman viveka--_viveka jñānam_jñāna adhyātma--_adhyātma jñānam_jñāna tasmin_tad nitya--_nitya tvam_tva tatra_tatra eva_eva niṣṭhāvat--_niṣṭhāvat tvam_tva viveka--_viveka niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā hi_hi vākya--_vākya artha--_artha jñāna--_jñāna samarthaḥ_samartha bhavati_bhū tattva--_tattva jñānasya_jñāna aham_mad brahma_brahman asmi_as iti_iti sākṣātkārasya_sākṣātkāra vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya karaṇakasya_karaṇaka āma--_āma anitya--_anitya tva--_tva ādi--_ādi sarva--_sarva sādhana--_sādhana paripāka--_paripāka phalasya_phala arthaḥ_artha prayojanam_prayojana avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya ātmaka--_ātmaka nikhila--_nikhila duḥkha--_duḥkha nivṛtti--_nivṛtti tasya_tad darśanam_darśana ālocanam_ālocana tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna phala--_phala ālocane_ālocana hi_hi tad--_tad sādhane_sādhana pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti syāt_as atas_atas anyathā_anyathā asmāt_idam viparītam_viparīta māni--_mānin tva--_tva ādi_ādi yat_yad tat_tad ajñānam_ajñāna iti_iti proktam_pravac jñāna--_jñāna virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva tasmāt_tasmāt ajñāna--_ajñāna parityāgena_parityāga jñānam_jñāna eva_eva upādeyam_upādā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ukta--_vac lakṣaṇāt_lakṣaṇa kṣetrāt_kṣetra viviktatayā_viviktatā jñeyau_jñā jīvātma--_jīvātman paramātmānau_paramātman kṣetrajñau_kṣetrajña vistareṇa_vistara varṇayiṣyan_varṇay tad--_tad jñānasya_jñāna sādhanāni_sādhana amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādīni_ādi viṃśatim_viṃśati āha_ah pañcabhiḥ_pañcan atra_atra aṣṭadaśa_aṣṭadaśan bhaktānām_bhakta jñāninām_jñānin ca_ca sādhāraṇāni_sādhāraṇa kintu_kiṃtu bhaktaiḥ_bhakta mayi_mad ca_ca ananya--_ananya yogena_yoga bhaktiḥ_bhakti avyabhicāriṇī_avyabhicārin iti_iti ekam_eka eva_eva bhagavat--_bhagavant anubhava--_anubhava sādhanatvena_sādhanatva yatnataḥ_yatna kriyate_kṛ anyāni_anya spata--_spata daśa--_daśan ukta--_vac abhyāsavatām_abhyāsavat teṣām_tad svatas_svatas eva_eva utpadyante_utpad na_na tu_tu teṣu_tad yatnaḥ_yatna iti_iti sāmpradāyikāḥ_sāmpradāyika antime_antima dve_dvi tu_tu jñāninām_jñānin asādhāraṇe_asādhāraṇa eva_eva
atra_atra amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādīni_ādi vispaṣṭa--_vispaṣṭa arthāni_artha śaucam_śauca bāhyam_bāhya abhyantaram_abhyantara ca_ca tathā_tathā ca_ca smṛtiḥ_smṛti

śaucam_śauca ca_ca dvividham_dvividha proktam_pravac bāhyam_bāhya abhyantaram_abhyantara tathā_tathā mṛd--_mṛd jalābhyām_jala smṛtam_smṛ bāhyam_bāhya bhāva--_bhāva śuddhiḥ_śuddhi tathā_tathā āntaram_āntara

ātma--_ātman vinigrahaḥ_vinigraha śarīra--_śarīra saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama janma--_janman ādiṣu_ādi duḥkha--_duḥkha rūpasya_rūpa doṣasya_doṣa anudarśanam_anudarśana punar_punar punar_punar paryālocanam_paryālocana asaktiḥ_asakti putra--_putra ādiṣu_ādi prīt--_prīt tyāgaḥ_tyāga anabhiṣvaṅgaḥ_anabhiṣvaṅga putra--_putra ādīnām_ādi sukhe_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva sukhī_sukhin duḥkhī_duḥkhin iti_iti adhyāsa--_adhyāsa abhāvaḥ_abhāva iṣṭa--_iṣ aniṣṭayoḥ_aniṣṭa vyavahārikayoḥ_vyavahārika upapattiṣu_upapatti prāptiṣu_prāpti nityam_nitya sarvadā_sarvadā mayi_mad śyāma--_śyāma sundara--_sundara ākāre_ākāra ananya--_ananya yogena_yoga jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman tapaḥ--_tapas yoga--_yoga ādi--_ādi amiśraṇena_amiśraṇa bhaktiḥ_bhakti ca-kārāt_cakāra jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi miśraṇa--_miśraṇa prādhānyena_prādhānya ca_ca ādyā_ādya bhaktaiḥ_bhakta anuṣṭheyā_anuṣṭhā dvitīyā_dvitīya jñānibhiḥ_jñānin iti_iti kecid_kaścit anye_anya tu_tu ananyā_ananya bhaktiḥ_bhakti yathā_yathā premṇaḥ_preman sādhanam_sādhana tathā_tathā paramātma--_paramātman anubhavasya_anubhava api_api iti_iti jñāpana--_jñāpana artham_artha atra_atra ṣaṭke_ṣaṭka api_api uktiḥ_ukti iti_iti bhaktāḥ_bhakta jñāninaḥ_jñānin tu_tu ananyena_ananya eva_eva yogena_yoga sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi iti_iti avyabhicāriṇī_avyabhicārin pratidinam_pratidinam eva_eva kartavyā_kṛ kena_ka api_api nivārayitum_nivāray aśakyāḥ_aśakya iti_iti madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda ātmānam_ātman adhikṛtya_adhikṛ vartamāṇam_vṛt jñānam_jñāna adhyātma--_adhyātma jñānam_jñāna tattva--_tattva jñānasya_jñāna arthaḥ_artha prayojanam_prayojana mokṣaḥ_mokṣa tasya_tad darśanam_darśana sva--_sva abhīṣṭa--_abhīṣ tvena_tva ālocanam_ālocanā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa paramātma--_paramātman jñānam_jñāna tu_tu agre_agra vaktavyam_vac tatas_tatas anyathā_anyathā asmāt_idam viparītam_viparīta
māni--_mānin tva--_tva ādikam_ādika
