baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha uktāt_vac kṣetrāt_kṣetra vibhinna--_vibhid tvena_tva jñeyam_jñā kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña dvayam_dvaya vistareṇa_vistara nirūpayiṣyan_nirūpay tad--_tad jñāna--_jñāna sādhanāni_sādhana amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādīni_ādi viṃśatim_viṃśati āha_ah pañcabhiḥ_pañcan ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā para--_para āpīḍanam_āpīḍana kṣāntiḥ_kṣānti apamāna--_apamāna sahiṣṇu--_sahiṣṇu tā_tā ārjavam_ārjava chadmiṣu_chadmin api_api sāralyam_sāralya ācārya--_ācārya upāsanam_upāsana jñāna--_jñāna pradasya_prada guroḥ_guru akaitavena_akaitava saṃsevanam_saṃsevana

śaucam_śauca ca_ca dvividham_dvividha proktam_pravac bāhyam_bāhya abhyantaram_abhyantara tathā_tathā mṛd--_mṛd jalābhyām_jala smṛtam_smṛ bāhyam_bāhya bhāva--_bhāva śuddhiḥ_śuddhi tathā_tathā āntaram_āntara

ātma--_ātman vinigrahaḥ_vinigraha ātma--_ātman anusandhi--_anusaṃdhi pratīpāt_pratīpa viṣayāt_viṣaya manasaḥ_manas niyamanam_niyamana indriyārtheṣu_indriyārtha śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣayeṣu_viṣaya pratīpeṣu_pratīpa vairāgyam_vairāgya ruci--_ruci abhāvaḥ_abhāva janma--_janman ādiṣu_ādi duḥkha--_duḥkha rūpasya_rūpa doṣasya_doṣa anudarśanam_anudarśana punar_punar punar_punar cintanam_cintana anabhiṣvaṅgaḥ_anabhiṣvaṅga teṣu_tad sukhiṣu_sukhin duḥkhiṣu_duḥkhin ca_ca satsu_sat tad--_tad sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha anabhiniveśaḥ_anabhiniveśa iṣṭa--_iṣ aniṣṭānām_aniṣṭa anukūla--_anukūla pratikūlānām_pratikūla arthānām_artha upapattiṣu_upapatti prāptiṣu_prāpti sama--_sama citta--_citta tvam_tva harṣa--_harṣa viṣāda--_viṣāda virahaḥ_viraha nityam_nityam sarvadā_sarvadā

mayi_mad parameśe_parameśa avyābhicāriṇī_avyābhicārin sthirā_sthira bhaktiḥ_bhakti śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādyā_ādya tathā_tathā vivikta--_vivikta deśa--_deśa sevi--_sevin tvam_tva nirjana--_nirjana sthāna--_sthāna priya--_priya tā_tā janānām_jana grāmyāṇām_grāmya saṃsadi_saṃsad rati--_rati tyāgaḥ_tyāga adhyātmam_adhyātma ātmani_ātman yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tasya_tad nitya--_nitya tvam_tva sarvadā_sarvadā vimṛśya--_vimṛś tvam_tva tattvam_tattva tu_tu aham_mad param_para brahma_brahman vadanti_vad tattva--_tattva vidaḥ_vid tattvam_tattva yat_yad jñānam_jñāna advayam_advaya iti_iti ādi_ādi smṛteḥ_smṛti tat_tad jñānasya_jñāna yaḥ_yad arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad prāpti--_prāpti lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa tasya_tad darśanam_darśana hṛdi_hṛd smaraṇam_smaraṇa jñāyate_jñā upalabhyate_upalabh anena_idam iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti yat_yad tatas_tatas anyathā_anyathā viparītam_viparīta māni--_mānin tva--_tva ādi_ādi tat_tad ajñānam_ajñāna
tad--_tad upalabdhi--_upalabdhi virodhi_virodhin iti_iti

lg.l: jñeyam_jñā yat_yad tat_tad pravakṣyāmi_pravac yat_yad jñātvā_jñā amṛtam_amṛta aśnute_aś
anādimat_anādimat param_para brahma_brahman na_na sat_as tat_tad na_na asat_asat ucyate_vac

div.p: āha_ah yat_yad jñeyam_jñā tat_tad pravakṣyāmi_pravac śrotuḥ_śrotṛ ādara--_ādara siddhaye_siddhi jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala darśayati_darśay yat_yad vakṣyamāṇam_vac jñātvā_jñā amṛtam_amṛta mokṣam_mokṣa prāpnoti_prāp kim_ka tat_tad anādimat_anādimat ādimat_ādimat bhavati_bhū anādimat_anādimat param_para niratiśayam_niratiśaya brahma_brahman anādi_anādi iti_iti etāvatā_etāvat eva_eva bahuvrīhiṇā_bahuvrīhi anādimat--_anādimat tve_tva siddhe_sidh api_api punar_punar matupaḥ_matup prayogaḥ_prayoga chāndasaḥ_chāndasa yat_yat vā_vā anādi_anādi iti_iti mad--_mad param_para iti_iti ca_ca pada--_pada dvayam_dvaya mam_mad viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu param_para nirviśeṣam_nirviśeṣa rūpam_rūpa brahma_brahman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad eva_eva āha_ah na_na sat_as tat_tad na_na asat_asat ucyate_vac vidhi--_vidhi mukhena_mukha pramāṇasya_pramāṇa viṣayaḥ_viṣaya sat--_sat śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac viṣayaḥ_viṣaya tu_tu asat--_asat śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac idam_idam tu_tu tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa aviṣaya--_aviṣaya tvāt_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ebhiḥ_idam sādhanaiḥ_sādhana jñāna--_jñāna śabditaiḥ_śabday kim_ka jñeyam_jñā iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah jñeyam_jñā yat_yad tat_tad iti_iti ādi_ādi ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ yat_yad jñeyam_jñā mumukṣuṇā_mumukṣu tat_tad pravakṣyāmi_pravac prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa spaṣṭa--_spaṣṭa tayā_tā vakṣyāmi_vac śrotuḥ_śrotṛ abhimukhīkaraṇāya_abhimukhīkaraṇa phalena_phala stuvan_stu āha_ah yat_yad vakṣyamāṇam_vac jñeyam_jñā jñātvā_jñā amṛtam_amṛta amṛta--_amṛta tvam_tva aśnute_aś saṃsārāt_saṃsāra mucyate_muc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka tat_tad anādimat_anādimat ādimat_ādimat na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti anādimat_anādimat param_para niratiśayam_niratiśaya brahma_brahman sarvatas_sarvatas anavacchinnam_anavacchinna paramātma--_paramātman vastu_vastu atra_atra anādi_anādi iti_iti etāvatā_etāvat eva_eva bahu--_bahu vrīhiṇā_vrīhi artha--_artha lābhe_lābha api_api atiśāyane_atiśāyana nitya--_nitya yoge_yoga vā_vā matupaḥ_matup prayogaḥ_prayoga anādi_anādi iti_iti ca_ca mad--_mad param_para iti_iti ca_ca padam_pada kecid_kaścit icchanti_iṣ mat_mad sa_sa guṇāt_guṇa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman param_para nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa rūpam_rūpa brahma_brahman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha aham_mad vāsudeva--_vāsudeva ākhyā_ākhyā parā_para śaktiḥ_śakti yasya_yad iti_iti tu_tu apavyākhyānam_apavyākhyāna nirviśeṣasya_nirviśeṣa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman pratipādya--_pratipāday tvena_tva tatra_tatra śaktimat--_śaktimat tvasya_tva avaktavya--_avaktavya tvāt_tva

nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa tvam_tva eva_eva āha_ah na_na sat_as tat_tad na_na asat_asat ucyate_vac vidhi--_vidhi mukhena_mukha pramāṇasya_pramāṇa viṣayaḥ_viṣaya sat--_sat śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac niṣedha--_niṣedha mukhena_mukha pramāṇasya_pramāṇa viṣayaḥ_viṣaya tu_tu asat--_asat śabdena_śabda idam_idam tu_tu tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa nirviśeṣa--_nirviśeṣa tvāt_tva sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa caitanya--_caitanya rūpatvāt_rūpatva ca_ca yatas_yatas vācaḥ_vāc nivartante_nivṛt a_a prāpya_prāp manasā_manas saha_saha iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti yasmāt_yasmāt tat_tad brahma_brahman na_na sat--_as bhāva--_bhāva tva--_tva āśrayaḥ_āśraya atas_atas nā_na ucyate_vac kena_ka api_api śabdena_śabda mukhyayā_mukhya vṛttyā_vṛtti śabda--_śabda pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetūnām_hetu tatra_tatra asambhavāt_asaṃbhava tat_tad yathā_yathā gauraḥ_gaura ca_ca iti_iti vā_vā jātitaḥ_jāti pacati_pac paṭhati_paṭh iti_iti vā_vā kriyātaḥ_kriyā śuklaḥ_śukla kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa iti_iti vā_vā guṇataḥ_guṇa dhanī_dhanin gomān_gomat iti_iti vā_vā saṃbandhataḥ_sambandha artham_artha pratyāyati_pratye śabdaḥ_śabda atra_atra kriyā--_kriyā guṇa--_guṇa sambandhebhyaḥ_sambandha vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa sarvaḥ_sarva api_api dharmaḥ_dharma jāti--_jāti rūpaḥ_rūpa upādhi--_upādhi rūpaḥ_rūpa vā_vā jāti--_jāti padena_pada saṃgṛhītaḥ_saṃgrah yadṛcchā--_yadṛcchā śabdaḥ_śabda api_api ḍittha--_ḍittha ḍapittha--_ḍapittha ādiḥ_ādi yam_yad kaṃcid_kaścit dharmam_dharma sva--_sva ātmānam_ātman vā_vā pravṛttim_pravṛtti nimittīkṛtya_nimittīkṛ pravartate_pravṛt iti_iti saḥ_tad api_api jāti--_jāti śabdaḥ_śabda evam_evam ākāśa--_ākāśa śabdaḥ_śabda api_api tārkikāṇām_tārkika śabda--_śabda āśraya--_āśraya tva--_tva ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa yam_yad kaṃcid_kaścit dharmam_dharma puraskṛtya_puraskṛ pravartate_pravṛt sva--_sva mate_mata tu_tu pṛthivī--_pṛthivī ādi--_ādi vat_vat ākāśa--_ākāśa vyaktīnām_vyakti janyānām_jan aneka--_aneka tvāt_tva ākāśa--_ākāśa tvam_tva api_api jātiḥ_jāti eva_eva iti_iti saḥ_tad api_api jāti--_jāti śabdaḥ_śabda ākāśa--_ākāśa atiriktā_atiric ca_ca diś_diś na_na asti_as eva_eva kālaḥ_kāla ca_ca na_na īśvarāt_īśvara atiricyate_atiric atireke_atireka vā_vā diś--_diś kāla--_kāla śabdau_śabda api_api upādhi--_upādhi viśeṣa--_viśeṣa pravṛtti--_pravṛtti nimittakau_nimittaka iti_iti jāti--_jāti śabdau_śabda eva_eva tasmāt_tasmāt pravṛtti--_pravṛtti nimitta--_nimitta cāturvidhyāt_cāturvidhya caturvidhaḥ_caturvidha eva_eva śabdaḥ_śabda tatra_tatra na_na sat_as tat_tad na_na asat_asat iti_iti jāti--_jāti niṣedhaḥ_niṣedha kriyā--_kriyā guṇa--_guṇa sambandhānām_sambandha api_api niṣedha--_niṣedha upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa arthaḥ_artha ekam_eka eva_eva advitīyam_advitīya iti_iti jāti--_jāti niṣedhaḥ_niṣedha tasyāḥ_tad aneka--_aneka vyakti--_vyakti vṛtteḥ_vṛtti ekasmin_eka asambhavāt_asaṃbhava nirguṇam_nirguṇa niṣkriyam_niṣkriya śāntam_śam iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa kriyā--_kriyā sambandhānām_sambandha krameṇa_krameṇa niṣedhaḥ_niṣedha a_a saṅgaḥ_saṅga hi_hi ayam_idam puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti ca_ca atha_atha atas_atas ādeśaḥ_ādeśa na_na iti_iti na_na iti_iti iti_iti ca_ca sarva--_sarva niṣedhaḥ_niṣedha tasmāt_tasmāt brahma_brahman na_na kenacid_kaścit śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac iti_iti yuktam_yuj tarhi_tarhi katham_katham pravakṣyāmi_pravac iti_iti uktam_vac katham_katham vā_vā śāstra--_śāstra yoni--_yoni tvāt_tva iti_iti sūtram_sūtra yathā_yathā kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid lakṣaṇayā_lakṣaṇā śabdena_śabda pratipādanāt_pratipādana iii_iii gṛhāṇa_grah pratipādana--_pratipādana prakāraḥ_prakāra ca_ca āścarya--_āścarya vat_vat paśyati_dṛś kaścid_kaścit enam_enad iti_iti atra_atra vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā vistaraḥ_vistara tu_tu bhāṣye_bhāṣya draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha evam_evam sādhanaiḥ_sādhana jñeyaḥ_jñā jīvātmā_jīvātman paramātmā_paramātman ca_ca tatra_tatra paramātmā_paramātman eva_eva sarva--_sarva gataḥ_gam brahma--_brahman śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac tat_tad ca_ca brahma_brahman nirviśeṣam_nirviśeṣa saviśeṣam_saviśeṣa ca_ca krameṇa_krameṇa jñāni--_jñānin bhaktayoḥ_bhakta upāsyam_upās deha--_deha gataḥ_gam api_api catur--_catur bhuja--_bhuja tvena_tva dhyeyaḥ_dhyā paramātma--_paramātman śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac tatra_tatra prathamam_prathama brahma_brahman āha_ah jñeyam_jñā iti_iti anādi_anādi na_na vidyate_vid ādiḥ_ādi yasya_yad mad--_mad svarūpa--_svarūpa tvāt_tva nityam_nitya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha mad--_mad param_para aham_mad eva_eva paraḥ_para utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa āśrayaḥ_āśraya yasya_yad tat_tad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad iti_iti mad--_mad agrima--_agrima ukteḥ_ukti tat_tad eva_eva kim_ka iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah tat_tad brahma_brahman na_na sat_as na_na api_api asat_asat kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa atītam_atī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam jñāna--_jñāna sādhanāni_sādhana upadiśya_upadiś taiḥ_tad jñeyam_jñā upadiśati_upadiś jñeyam_jñā yat_yad tat_tad iti_iti uktaiḥ_vac sādhanaiḥ_sādhana yat_yad jñeyam_jñā upalabhyam_upalabh jīvātma--_jīvātman vastu_vastu ca_ca tat_tad aham_mad prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa su_su bodhatayā_bodhatā vakṣyāmi_vac yat_yad jñātvā_jñā janaḥ_jana amṛtam_amṛta mokṣam_mokṣa aśnute_aś labhate_labh tatra_tatra jīvātma--_jīvātman vastu_vastu upadiśati_upadiś anādi_anādi iti_iti ardhakena_ardhaka na_na asti_as ādiḥ_ādi yasya_yad tat_tad jīvasya_jīva ādi--_ādi utpattiḥ_utpatti na_na asti_as atas_atas api_api na_na iti_iti nityā_nitya asau_adas iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam āha_ah śrutiḥ_śruti na_na jāyate_jan mriyate_mṛ vā_vā vipaścit_vipaścit iti_iti ādyā_ādya aham_mad eva_eva paraḥ_para svāmī_svāmin yasya_yad tat_tad pradhāna--_pradhāna kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña patiḥ_pati guṇa--_guṇa īśaḥ_īśa iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti dāsa--_dāsa bhūtaḥ_bhū hareḥ_hari eva_eva na_na anyasya_anya eva_eva kadācana_kadācana iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca apahata--_apahan pāpma--_pāpman tva--_tva ādinā_ādi brahma_brahman bṛhatā_bṛhat guṇa--_guṇa aṣṭakena_aṣṭaka viśiṣṭam_viśiṣ śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah yaḥ_yad ātmā_ātman apahata--_apahan pāpmā_pāpman vijaraḥ_vijara vimṛtyuḥ_vimṛtyu viśokaḥ_viśoka vijghitsaḥ_vijghitsa apipāsaḥ_apipāsā satya--_satya saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa saḥ_tad anveṣṭavyaḥ_anviṣ sa_tad vijijñāsitavyaḥ_vijijiñās iti_iti jīve_jīva brahma--_brahman śabdaḥ_śabda tu_tu vijñānam_vijñāna brahma_brahman ced_ced veda_vid iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti sa_tad guṇān_guṇa samatītya_samatī etān_etad brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp brahma--_brahman bhūtaḥ_bhū prasanna--_prasad ātmā_ātman na_na śocati_śuc na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ iti_iti vakṣyamāṇāt_vac ca_ca na_na sat_as iti_iti tat_tad viśuddham_viśudh jīvātma--_jīvātman vastu_vastu kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ātmaka--_ātmaka avasthā--_avasthā dvaya--_dvaya virahāt_viraha sat_as ca_ca asat_asat ca_ca nā_na ucyate_vac kintu_kiṃtu paramāṇu--_paramāṇu caitanyam_caitanya guṇa--_guṇa aṣṭaka--_aṣṭaka viśiṣṭam_viśiṣ ucyate_vac vibhakta--_vibhaj nāma--_nāman rūpam_rūpa kārya--_kārya avastham_avasthā sat--_as upamṛdita--_upamṛd nāma--_nāman rūpam_rūpa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa avastham_avasthā tu_tu asat_asat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: sarvatas_sarvatas pāṇi--_pāṇi pādam_pāda tat_tad sarvatas_sarvatas akṣi--_akṣi śiraḥ--_śiras mukham_mukha
sarvatas_sarvatas śrutimat_śrutimat loke_loka sarvam_sarva āvṛtya_āvṛ tiṣṭhati_sthā

div.p: śruti--_śruti prasiddhayā_prasidh acintya--_acintya śaktyā_śakti sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman tām_tā tasya_tad darśayan_darśay āha_ah sarvatas_sarvatas iti_iti pañcabhiḥ_pañcan sarvatas_sarvatas sarvatra_sarvatra pāṇayaḥ_pāṇi pādāḥ_pāda ca_ca yasya_yad tat_tad sarvatas_sarvatas akṣīṇi_akṣi śirāṃsi_śiras mukhāni_mukha ca_ca yasya_yad tat_tad sarvatas_sarvatas śrutimat_śrutimat śravaṇa--_śravaṇa indriyaiḥ_indriya yuktam_yuj sat_as loke_loka sarvam_sarva āvṛtya_āvṛ vyāpya_vyāp tiṣṭhati_sthā sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin vṛttibhiḥ_vṛtti pāṇi--_pāṇi ādibhiḥ_ādi upādhibhiḥ_upādhi sarva--_sarva vyavahāra--_vyavahāra āspada--_āspada tvena_tva tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
tad--_tad astitvam_astitva pratipādayan_pratipāday āha_ah sarvatas_sarvatas iti_iti

sarvatas_sarvatas sarveṣu_sarva deheṣu_deha pāṇayaḥ_pāṇi pādāḥ_pāda ca_ca acetanāḥ_acetana sva--_sva sva--_sva vyāpāreṣu_vyāpāra pravartanīyāḥ_pravṛt cetanasya_cetana kṣetrajṇasya_kṣetrajṇa tat_tad sarvatas_sarvatas pāṇi--_pāṇi pādam_pāda jñeyam_jñā brahma_brahman sarva--_sarva acetana--_acetana pravṛttīnām_pravṛtti cetana--_cetana adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna pūrvaka--_pūrvaka tvāt_tva tasmin_tad kṣetrajñe_kṣetrajña cetane_cetana brahmaṇi_brahman jñeye_jñā sarva--_sarva acetana--_acetana varga--_varga pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetau_hetu na_na asti_as nāstitā--_nāstitā āśaṅkā_āśaṅkā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam sarvatas_sarvatas akṣīṇi_akṣi śirāṃsi_śiras mukhāni_mukha ca_ca yasya_yad pravartanīyāni_pravṛt santi_as tat_tad sarvatas_sarvatas akṣi--_akṣi śiraḥ--_śiras mukham_mukha evam_evam sarvatas_sarvatas śrutayaḥ_śruti śravaṇa--_śravaṇa indriyāṇi_indriya yasya_yad pravartanīya--_pravṛt tvena_tva tat_tad sarvatas_sarvatas śrutimat_śrutimat loke_loka sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin nikāye_nikāya ekam_eka eva_eva nityam_nitya vibhu_vibhu ca_ca sarvam_sarva acetana--_acetana vargam_varga āvṛtya_āvṛ sva--_sva sattayā_sattā sphūrtyā_sphūrti ca_ca ādhyāsikena_ādhyāsika sambandhena_sambandha vyāpya_vyāp tiṣṭhati_sthā nirvikāram_nirvikāra eva_eva sthitim_sthiti labhate_labh na_na tu_tu sva--_sva adhyastasya_adhyas jaḍa--_jaḍa prapañcasya_prapañca doṣeṇa_doṣa guṇena_guṇa sambadhyate_sambandh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yathā_yathā ca_ca sarveṣu_sarva deheṣu_deha ekam_eka eva_eva cetanam_cetana nityam_nitya vibhu_vibhu ca_ca na_na pratideham_pratideham bhinnam_bhid tathā_tathā prapañcitam_prapañcita prāk_prāk

sati_as kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ātmakam_ātmaka api_api tat_tad iti_iti āha_ah sarvatas_sarvatas eva_eva pāṇayaḥ_pāṇi pādāḥ_pāda ca_ca yasya_yad tat_tad brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi pipīlika--_pipīlika antānām_anta pāṇi--_pāṇi pāda--_pāda vṛndaiḥ_vṛnda sarvatra_sarvatra dṛṣṭaiḥ_dṛś eva_eva tat_tad brahma_brahman eva_eva asaṅkhya--_asaṃkhya pāṇi--_pāṇi pādaiḥ_pāda iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam eva_eva sarvatas_sarvatas akṣi_akṣi iti_iti ādi_ādi

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha paramātma--_paramātman vastu_vastu upadiśati_upadiś sarvatas_sarvatas pāṇi--_pāṇi iti_iti tat_tad paramātma--_paramātman vastu_vastu sarvatas_sarvatas pāṇi--_pāṇi pādam_pāda iti_iti ādi_ādi visphuṭa--_visphuṭa artham_artha

lg.l: sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya guṇa--_guṇa ābhāsam_ābhāsa sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vivarjitam_vivarjay
asaktam_asakta sarva--_sarva bhṛt_bhṛt ca_ca eva_eva nirguṇam_nirguṇa guṇa--_guṇa bhoktṛ_bhoktṛ ca_ca

div.p: sarveṣām_sarva cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus ādīnām_ādi guṇeṣu_guṇa rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi ākārāsu_ākāra vṛttiṣu_vṛtti tad--_tad tad--_tad ākāreṇa_ākāra bhāsate_bhās iti_iti tathā_tathā sarva--_sarva indriyāṇi_indriya guṇān_guṇa ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad viṣayān_viṣaya ābhāsayati_ābhāsay iti_iti vā_vā sarvaiḥ_sarva indriyaiḥ_indriya vivarjitam_vivarjay ca_ca tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti a_a pāṇi--_pāṇi pādaḥ_pāda javanaḥ_javana grahītā_grahītṛ paśyati_paś a_a cakṣuḥ_cakṣus sa_tad śṛṇoti_śru a_a karṇaḥ_karṇa iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi asaktam_asakta saṅga--_saṅga śūnyam_śūnya tathā_tathā api_api sarvam_sarva bibharti_bhṛ iti_iti sarvasya_sarva ādhāra--_ādhāra bhūtam_bhū tat_tad eva_eva nirguṇam_nirguṇa sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa rahitam_rahita guṇa--_guṇa bhoktṛ_bhoktṛ ca_ca guṇānām_guṇa sattva--_sattva ādīnām_ādi bhoktṛ_bhoktṛ pālakam_pālaka

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana adhyāropa--_adhyāropa apavādābhyām_apavāda niṣprapañcam_niṣprapañca prapañcyate_prapañcay iti_iti nyāyam_nyāya anusṛtya_anusṛ sarva--_sarva prapañca--_prapañca adhyāropeṇa_adhyāropa anādi--_anādi mat_mat param_para brahma_brahman iti_iti vyākhyātam_vyākhyā adhunā_adhunā tad--_tad apavādena_apavāda na_na sat_as tat_tad na_na asat_asat ucyate_vac paramārthataḥ_paramārtha sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vivarjitam_vivarjay tad--_tad māyayā_māyā sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya guṇa--_guṇa ābhāsam_ābhāsa sarveṣām_sarva bahiṣkaraṇānām_bahiṣkaraṇa śrotra--_śrotra ādīnām_ādi antaḥkaraṇayoḥ_antaḥkaraṇa ca_ca buddhi--_buddhi manasoḥ_manas guṇaiḥ_guṇa adhyavasāya--_adhyavasāya saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa śravaṇa--_śravaṇa vacana--_vacana tad--_tad tad--_tad viṣaya--_viṣaya rūpa--_rūpa tayā_tā avabhāsate_avabhās iva_iva sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vyāpāraiḥ_vyāpāra vyāpṛtam_vyāpṛta iva_iva tat_tad jñeyam_jñā brahma_brahman dhyāyati_dhyā iva_iva lelāyati_lelāy iva_iva iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti atra_atra dhyānam_dhyāna buddhīndriya--_buddhīndriya vyāpāra--_vyāpāra upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa

tathā_tathā paramārthataḥ_paramārtha asaktam_asakta sarva--_sarva sambandha--_sambandha śūnyam_śūnya eva_eva māyayā_māyā sarva--_sarva bhṛt_bhṛt ca_ca sat--_as ātmanā_ātman sarvam_sarva kalpitam_kalpay dhārayati_dhāray iva_iva poṣayati_poṣay iti_iti ca_ca sarva--_sarva bhṛt_bhṛt niradhiṣṭhāna--_niradhiṣṭhāna bhrama--_bhrama ayogāt_ayoga tathā_tathā paramārthataḥ_paramārtha nirguṇam_nirguṇa sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas guṇa--_guṇa rahitam_rahita eva_eva guṇa--_guṇa bhoktṛ_bhoktṛ ca_ca guṇānām_guṇa sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamasām_tamas śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi dvārā_dvār sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha ākāreṇa_ākāra pariṇatānām_pariṇam bhoktṛ_bhoktṛ upalabdhṛ_upalabdhṛ ca_ca tat_tad jñeyam_jñā brahma_brahman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

ābhāsayati_ābhāsay yat_yat vā_vā sarva--_sarva indriyaiḥ_indriya guṇaiḥ_guṇa śabda--_śabda ādibhiḥ_ādi ca_ca ābhāsate_ābhās virājati_virāj iti_iti tat_tad tat_tad api_api sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya vivarjitam_vivarjay prākṛta--_prākṛta indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi rahitam_rahita tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti a_a pāṇi--_pāṇi pādaḥ_pāda javanaḥ_javana grahītā_grahītṛ paśyati_paś a_a cakṣuḥ_cakṣus sa_tad śṛṇoti_śru a_a karṇaḥ_karṇa iti_iti ādi_ādi parā_para asya_idam śaktiḥ_śakti bahudhā_bahudhā eva_eva śrūyate_śru svābhāvikī_svābhāvika jñāna--_jñāna bala--_bala kriyā_kriyā ca_ca iti_iti śruti--_śruti prasiddha--_prasidh svarūpa--_svarūpa śakti--_śakti āspada--_āspada tvāt_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva kim_ka ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa bhoktṛ_bhoktṛ triguṇa--_triguṇa atīta--_atī bhaga--_bhaga śabda--_śabda vācā_vāc ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ guṇa--_guṇa āsvādakam_āsvādaka

baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka ca_ca sarva--_sarva iti_iti sarvaiḥ_sarva indriyaiḥ_indriya guṇaiḥ_guṇa ca_ca tad--_tad vṛttibhiḥ_vṛtti ābhāsate_ābhās dīpyate_dīp iti_iti tathā_tathā sarvaiḥ_sarva indriyaiḥ_indriya jīva--_jīva indriya--_indriya vat_vat sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa bhinnaiḥ_bhid vivarjitam_vivarjay san_as tyaktam_tyaj prākṛtaiḥ_prākṛta karaṇaiḥ_karaṇa viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ hariḥ_hari iti_iti svīkāryam_svīkṛ a_a pāṇi--_pāṇi pādaḥ_pāda javanaḥ_javana grahītā_grahītṛ paśyati_paś a_a cakṣuḥ_cakṣus sa_tad śṛṇoti_śru a_a karṇaḥ_karṇa yad--_yad ātmakaḥ_ātmaka bhagavān_bhagavant tad--_tad ātmikā_ātmaka vyaktiḥ_vyakti kim_ka ātmakaḥ_ātmaka bhagavān_bhagavant jñāna--_jñāna ātmakaḥ_ātmaka aiśvarya--_aiśvarya ātmakaḥ_ātmaka śakti--_śakti ātmakaḥ_ātmaka ca_ca iti_iti buddhi--_buddhi manaḥ--_manas aṅga--_aṅga pratyaṅgavat--_pratyaṅgavat tām_tā bhagavataḥ_bhagavant lakṣayāmahe_lakṣay buddhimān_buddhimat manaḥ--_manas sarva--_sarva bhṛt_bhṛt sarva--_sarva tattva--_tattva dhārakam_dhāraka api_api asaktam_asakta saṅkalpena_saṃkalpa eva_eva tad--_tad dhāraṇāt_dhāraṇa tad--_tad sparśa--_sparśa rahitam_rahita nirguṇam_nirguṇa sākṣī_sākṣin cetāḥ_cetas kevalaḥ_kevala nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa ca_ca iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti māyā--_māyā guṇa--_guṇa spṛṣṭam_spṛś eva_eva sat--_as guṇa--_guṇa ajñām_ajña iti_iti ārabhya_ārabh

ekaḥ_eka tu_tu pibate_pā devaḥ_deva svacchandaḥ_svacchanda atra_atra vaśa--_vaśa anugām_anuga dhyāna--_dhyāna kriyābhyām_kriyā bhagavān_bhagavant bhuṅkte_bhuj asau_adas prasabham_prasabham vibhuḥ_vibhu iti_iti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa

lg.l: bahis_bahis antar_antar ca_ca bhūtānām_bhūta acaram_acara caram_cara eva_eva ca_ca
sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tvāt_tva tat_tad avijñeyam_avijñeya dūra--_dūra stham_stha ca_ca antike_antika ca_ca tat_tad

div.p: bhūtānām_bhūta cara--_cara acarāṇām_acara sva--_sva kāryāṇām_kārya bahis_bahis ca_ca antar_antar ca_ca tat_tad eva_eva suvarṇam_suvarṇa iva_iva kaṭaka--_kaṭaka kuntala--_kuntala ādīnām_ādi jala--_jala taraṅgāṇām_taraṃga antar_antar bahis_bahis ca_ca jalam_jala iva_iva acaram_acara sthāvaram_sthāvara caram_cara jaṅgamam_jaṅgama ca_ca bhūta--_bhūta jātam_jan tat_tad eva_eva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ātma--_ātman tvāt_tva kāryasya_kārya evam_evam api_api sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tvāt_tva rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi hīna--_hā tvāt_tva tat_tad avijñeyam_avijñeya idam_idam tat_tad iti_iti spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa jñāna--_jñāna arham_arha na_na bhavati_bhū ataeva_ataeva aviduṣām_avidvas yojana--_yojana lakṣa--_lakṣa antaritam_antari iva_iva dūra--_dūra stham_stha ca_ca sa_sa vikārāyāḥ_vikāra prakṛteḥ_prakṛti para--_para tvāt_tva viduṣām_vid punar_punar pratyak--_pratyañc ātma--_ātman tvāt_tva antike_antika ca_ca tat_tad nityam_nityam sannihitam_saṃnidhā tathā_tathā ca_ca mantraḥ_mantra

tat_tad ejati_ej tat_tad na_na ejati_ej tad--_tad dūre_dūra tat_tad vā_vā antike_antika tad--_tad antarasya_antara sarvasya_sarva
tat_tad u_u sarvasya_sarva asya_idam bāhyatas_bāhyatas
ejati_ej calati_cal na_na ejati_ej na_na calati_cal tat_tad u_u antike_antika iti_iti chedaḥ_cheda

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana bhūtānām_bhūta bhavana--_bhavana dharmāṇām_dharma sarveṣām_sarva kāryāṇām_kārya kalpitānām_kalpay akalpitam_akalpita adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna ekam_eka eva_eva bahis_bahis antar_antar ca_ca rajjuḥ_rajju iva_iva sva--_sva kalpitānām_kalpay sarpa--_sarpa dhārā--_dhārā ādīnām_ādi sarva--_sarva ātmanā_ātman vyāpakam_vyāpaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atas_atas eva_eva acaram_acara sthāvaram_sthāvara caram_cara ca_ca jañgamam_jañgama bhūta--_bhūta jātam_jan tat_tad eva_eva adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva kalpitānām_kalpay na_na tatas_tatas kiṃcid_kaścit vyatiricyate_vyatiric iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam sarva--_sarva ātmak--_ātmaka tve_tva api_api sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tvāt_tva rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi hīna--_hā tvāt_tva tat_tad avijñeyam_avijñeya idam_idam evam_evam iti_iti spaṣṭa--_spaṣṭa jñāna--_jñāna arham_arha na_na bhavati_bhū atas_atas eva_eva ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna sādhana--_sādhana śūnyānām_śūnya varṣa--_varṣa sahasra--_sahasra koṭyā_koṭi api_api a_a prāpya--_prāp tvāt_tva dūra--_dūra stham_stha ca_ca yojana--_yojana lakṣa--_lakṣa koṭi--_koṭi antaritam_antari iva_iva tat_tad jñāna--_jñāna sādhana--_sādhana sampannānām_sampad tu_tu antike_antika ca_ca tat_tad ati_ati avyavahitam_avyavahita eva_eva ātma--_ātman tvāt_tva dūrāt_dūrāt su_su dūre_dūra tat_tad iha_iha antike_antika paśatsu_paśu iha_iha eva_eva nihitam_nidhā guhāyām_guhā iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutibhyaḥ_śruti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha bhūtānām_bhūta sva--_sva kāryāṇām_kārya bahis_bahis ca_ca antar_antar ca_ca yathā_yathā dehānām_deha ākāśa--_ākāśa ādikam_ādika acaram_acara sthāvaram_sthāvara caram_cara jaṅgamam_jaṅgama ca_ca bhūta--_bhūta jātam_jan tat_tad eva_eva kāryasya_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva evam_evam api_api rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi bhinna--_bhid tvāt_tva tat_tad avijñeyam_avijñeya idam_idam tat_tad iti_iti spaṣṭam_paś jñāna--_jñāna arham_arha na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti atas_atas eva_eva aviduṣām_avidvas yojana--_yojana koṭi--_koṭi antaram_antara iva_iva dūra--_dūra stham_stha viduṣām_vidvas punar_punar sva--_sva gṛha--_gṛha sthitam_sthā eva_eva antike_antika ca_ca iha_iha antike_antika ca_ca paśyatsu_paś iha_iha eva_eva nihitam_nidhā guhāyām_guhā iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutibhyaḥ_śruti

baladevaḥ_baladeva bahis_bahis iti_iti bhūtānām_bhūta cit--_cit jaḍa--_jaḍa ātmakānām_ātmaka tattvānām_tattva bahis_bahis antar_antar ca_ca sthitam_sthā antar_antar bahis_bahis ca_ca tat_tad sarvam_sarva vyāpya_vyāp nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa sthitaḥ_sthā iti_iti śravaṇāt_śravaṇa acaram_acara acalam_acala caram_cara calam_cala ca_ca āsīnaḥ_ās dūram_dūram vrajati_vraj śayānaḥ_śī yāti_yā sarvatas_sarvatas iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti sūkṣma--_sūkṣma tvāt_tva pratyak--_pratyañc tvāt_tva cit--_cit sukha--_sukha mūrti--_mūrti tvāt_tva avijñeyam_avijñeya devatā--_devatā antara--_antara vat_vat jñātum_jñā aśakyam_aśakya atas_atas dūra--_dūra stham_stha ca_ca iti_iti yat_yat manasā_manas na_na manute_man na_na cakṣuṣā_cakṣus paśyati_paś kaścana_kaścana enam_enad iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti gāndharva--_gāndharva vāsitena_vāsay śrotreṇa_śrotra ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ ja--_ja ādi--_ādi vat_vat bhakti--_bhakti bhāvitena_bhāvay karaṇena_karaṇa tu_tu śakyam_śakya tat_tad jñātum_jñā iti_iti āha_ah antike_antika ca_ca tat_tad iti_iti manasi_manas iva_iva anudraṣṭavyam_anudṛś kaścid_kaścit dhīraḥ_dhīra pratyak--_pratyañc ātmānam_ātman aikṣata_īkṣ bhakti--_bhakti yoge_yoga hi_hi tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti ādi_ādi śravaṇāt_śravaṇa bhaktyā_bhakti tu_tu ananyayā_ananya śakyaḥ_śakya iti_iti ādi_ādi smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca

lg.l: avibhaktam_avibhakta ca_ca bhūteṣu_bhūta vibhaktam_vibhaj iva_iva ca_ca sthitam_sthā
bhūta--_bhūta bhartṛ_bhartṛ ca_ca tat_tad jñeyam_jñā grasiṣṇu_grasiṣṇu prabhaviṣṇu_prabhaviṣṇu ca_ca

div.p: bhūteṣu_bhūta sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ātmakeṣu_ātmaka avibhaktam_avibhakta kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ātmanā_ātman abhinnam_abhinna kārya--_kārya ātmanā_ātman vibhaktam_vibhaj bhinnam_bhid iva_iva avasthitam_avasthā ca_ca samudrāt_samudra jātam_jan phena--_phena ādi_ādi samudrāt_samudra anyat_anya na_na bhavati_bhū tad--_tad svarūpam_svarūpa eva_eva uktam_vac jñeyam_jñā bhūtānām_bhūta bhartṛ_bhartṛ ca_ca poṣakam_poṣaka sthiti--_sthiti kāle_kāla pralaya--_pralaya kāle_kāla ca_ca grasiṣṇu_grasiṣṇu grasana--_grasana śīlam_śīla sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi kāle_kāla ca_ca prabhaviṣṇu_prabhaviṣṇu nānā_nānā kārya--_kārya ātmanā_ātman prabhavana--_prabhavana śīlam_śīla

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yat_yad uktam_vac ekam_eka eva_eva sarvam_sarva āvṛtya_āvṛ tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti tat_tad vivṛṇoti_vivṛ pratideham_pratideham ātma--_ātman bheda--_bheda vādinām_vādin nirāsāya_nirāsa avibhaktam_avibhakta iti_iti bhūteṣu_bhūta sarva--_sarva prāṇiṣu_prāṇin avibhaktam_avibhakta abhinnam_abhinna ekam_eka tat_tad na_na tu_tu pratideham_pratideham bhinnam_bhid vyoma--_vyoman vat_vat sarva--_sarva vyāpaka--_vyāpaka tvāt_tva tathā_tathā api_api deha--_deha tādātmyena_tādātmya pratīyamāna--_pratī tvāt_tva pratideham_pratideham vibhaktam_vibhaj iva_iva ca_ca sthitam_sthā aupādika--_aupādika tvena_tva apāramārthikaḥ_apāramārthika vyomni_vyoman iva_iva tatra_tatra bheda--_bheda avabhāsaḥ_avabhāsa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

nanu_nanu bhavatu_bhū kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña sarva--_sarva vyāpakaḥ_vyāpaka ekaḥ_eka brahma_brahman tu_tu jagat--_jagant kāraṇam_kāraṇa tatas_tatas bhinnam_bhid eva_eva iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah bhūta--_bhūta bhartṛ_bhartṛ ca_ca bhūtāni_bhūta sarvāṇi_sarva sthiti--_sthiti kāle_kāla bibharti_bhṛ iti_iti tathā_tathā pralaya--_pralaya kāle_kāla grasiṣṇu_grasiṣṇu grasana--_grasana śīlam_śīla utpatti--_utpatti kāle_kāla prabhaviṣṇu_prabhaviṣṇu ca_ca prabhavana--_prabhavana śīlam_śīla sarvasya_sarva yathā_yathā rajju--_rajju ādiḥ_ādi sarpa--_sarpa ādeḥ_ādi māyā--_māyā kalpitasya_kalpay tasmāt_tasmāt yat_yad jagataḥ_jagant sthiti--_sthiti laya--_laya utpatti--_utpatti kāraṇam_kāraṇa brahma_brahman tat_tad eva_eva kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña pratideham_pratideham ekam_eka jñeyam_jñā na_na tatas_tatas anyat_anya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha bhūteṣu_bhūta sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ātmakeṣu_ātmaka avibhaktam_avibhakta kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ātmanā_ātman abhinnam_abhinna kārya--_kārya ātmanā_ātman vibhaktam_vibhaj bhinnam_bhid iva_iva ā_ā sthitam_sthā tat_tad eva_eva śrī--_śrī nārāyaṇa--_nārāyaṇa svarūpam_svarūpa sat_as bhūtānām_bhūta bhartṛ_bhartṛ sthiti--_sthiti kāle_kāla pālakam_pālaka pralaya--_pralaya kāle_kāla grasiṣṇu_grasiṣṇu saṃhārakam_saṃhāraka sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi kāle_kāla prabhaviṣṇu_prabhaviṣṇu ca_ca nānā_nānā kārya--_kārya ātmanā_ātman prabhavana--_prabhavana śīlam_śīla

baladevaḥ_baladeva avibhaktam_avibhakta iti_iti vibhakteṣu_vibhaj mithas_mithas bhinneṣu_bhid jīveṣu_jīva avibhaktam_avibhakta ekam_eka tat_tad brahma_brahman vibhaktam_vibhaj iva_iva prati_prati jīvam_jīva bhinnam_bhid iva_iva sthitam_sthā ekam_eka santam_as bahudhā_bahudhā dṛśyamānam_dṛś iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

ekaḥ_eka eva_eva paraḥ_para viṣṇuḥ_viṣṇu sarvatra_sarvatra api_api na_na saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya aiśvaryāt_aiśvarya rūpam_rūpa ekam_eka ca_ca sūrya--_sūrya vat_vat bahudhā_bahudhā īyate_i iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca

tat_tad ca_ca bhūta--_bhūta bhartṛ--_bhartṛ sthitau_sthiti bhūtānām_bhūta pālakam_pālaka pralaye_pralaya teṣām_tad grasiṣṇu_grasiṣṇu kāla--_kāla śaktyā_śakti saṃhārakam_saṃhāraka sarge_sarga prabhaviṣṇu_prabhaviṣṇu pradhāna--_pradhāna jīva--_jīva śaktibhyām_śakti nānā_nānā kārya--_kārya ātmanā_ātman prabhavana--_prabhavana śīlam_śīla śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca yatas_yatas vai_vai imāni_idam bhūtāni_bhūta jāyante_jan yena_yad jātāni_jan jīvanti_jīv yat_yad prayanti_pre abhisaṃviśanti_abhisaṃviś tat_tad brahma_brahman tat_tad vijijñāsasva_vijijiñās iti_iti

lg.l: jyotiṣām_jyotis api_api tat_tad jyotiḥ_jyotis tamasaḥ_tamas param_para ucyate_vac
jñānam_jñāna jñeyam_jñā jñāna--_jñāna gamyam_gam hṛdi_hṛd sarvasya_sarva viṣṭhitam_viṣṭhā

div.p:
na_na tatra_tatra sūryaḥ_sūrya bhāti_bhā na_na candra--_candra tārakam_tāraka na_na imāḥ_idam vidyutaḥ_vidyut bhānti_bhā kutas_kutas ayam_idam agniḥ_agni tat_tad eva_eva anubhāti_anubhā sarvam_sarva
tasya_tad bhāsā_bhās sarvam_sarva idam_idam vibhāti_vibhā iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti

ataeva_ataeva tamasaḥ_tamas ajñānāt_ajñāna param_para tena_tad asaṃsṛṣṭam_asaṃsṛṣṭa ucyate_vac āditya--_āditya varṇam_varṇa tamsasaḥ_tamsas parastāt_parastāt iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti jñānam_jñāna ca_ca tat_tad eva_eva buddhi--_buddhi vṛttau_vṛtti abhivyaktam_abhivyañj tat_tad eva_eva rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi ākāreṇa_ākāra jñeyam_jñā ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna gamyam_gam ca_ca amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac jñāna--_jñāna sādhanena_sādhana prāpyam_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha jñāna--_jñāna gamyam_gam viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ sarvasya_sarva prāṇimātrasya_prāṇimātra hṛdi_hṛd viṣṭhitam_viṣṭhā viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa apracyuta--_apracyuta svarūpeṇa_svarūpa niyantṛ--_niyantṛ tayā_tā sthitam_sthā dhiṣṭhitam_adhiṣṭhā iti_iti pāṭhe_pāṭha adhiṣṭāya_adhiṣṭhā sthitim_sthiti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana upalabhyate_upalabh syāt_as syāt_as āha_ah tat_tad jñeyam_jñā brahma_brahman jyotiṣām_jyotis avabhāsakānām_avabhāsaka āditya--_āditya ādīnām_ādi buddhi--_buddhi ādīnām_ādi ca_ca bāhyānām_bāhya āntarāṇām_āntara api_api jyotiḥ_jyotis avabhāsakam_avabhāsaka ca_ca eti_i anya--_anya jyotiṣaḥ_jyotis jaḍa--_jaḍa jyotiḥ--_jyotis avabhāsaka--_avabhāsaka tva--_tva upapatteḥ_upapatti yena_yad sūryaḥ_sūrya tapati_tap tejasā_tejas indhaḥ_indhas tasya_tad bhāsā_bhās sarvam_sarva idam_idam vibhāti_vibhā iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca vakṣyati_vac ca_ca yat_yad āditya--_āditya gatam_gam tejaḥ_tejas iti_iti ādi_ādi

svayam_svayam jaḍa--_jaḍa tva--_tva abhāve_abhāva api_api jaḍa--_jaḍa saṃsṛṣṭam_saṃsṛj syāt_as iti_iti na_na iti_iti āha_ah tamasaḥ_tamas jaḍa--_jaḍa vargāt_varga param_para avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kāryābhyām_kārya apāramārthikābhyām_apāramārthika a_a saṃspṛṣṭam_saṃspṛś pāramārthikam_pāramārthika tat_tad brahma_brahman sat--_as asatoḥ_asat ucyate_vac akṣarāt_akṣara paratas_paratas paraḥ_para iti_iti ādi--_ādi śrutibhiḥ_śruti brahma--_brahman vādibhiḥ_vādin ca_ca tat_tad uktam_vac

lg.l: niḥsaṅgasya_niḥsaṅga sa_sa saṅgena_saṅga kūṭasthasya_kūṭastha vikāriṇā_vikārin
ātmanaḥ_ātman anātmanā_anātman yogaḥ_yoga vāstavaḥ_vāstava na_na upapadyate_upapad

div.p: āditya--_āditya varṇam_varṇa tamasaḥ_tamas parastāt_parastāt iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca āditya--_āditya varṇam_varṇa iti_iti sva--_sva bhāne_bhāna prakāśa--_prakāśa antara--_antara anapekṣam_anapekṣa sarvasya_sarva prakāśakam_prakāśaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yasmāt_yasmāt tat_tad svayam_svayam jyotiḥ_jyotis jaḍa--_jaḍa a_a saṃspṛṣṭam_saṃspṛś atas_atas eva_eva tat_tad jñānam_jñāna pramāṇa--_pramāṇa janya--_jan cetaḥ--_cetas vṛtti--_vṛtti abhivyakta--_abhivyañj saṃvid--_saṃvid rūpam_rūpa atas_atas eva_eva tat_tad eva_eva jñeyam_jñā jātum_jā arham_arha ajñāta--_ajñāta tvāt_tva jaḍasya_jaḍa ajñāta--_ajñāta tva--_tva abhāvena_abhāva jñātum_jñā anarha--_anarha tvāt_tva katham_katham tarhi_tarhi sarvaiḥ_sarva na_na jñāyate_jñā tatra_tatra āha_ah jñāna--_jñāna gamyam_gam pūrvoktena_pūrvokta amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādinā_ādi tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna artha--_artha darśana--_darśana antena_anta sādhana--_sādhana kalāpena_kalāpa jñāna--_jñāna hetutayā_hetutā jñāna--_jñāna śabditena_śabday gamyam_gam prāpyam_prāp na_na tu_tu tat_tad

nanu_nanu sādhanena_sādhana gamyam_gam ced_ced tat_tad kim_ka deśa--_deśa antara--_antara vyavahitam_vyavadhā na_na iti_iti āha_ah hṛdi_hṛd sarvasya_sarva viṣṭhitam_viṣṭhā sarvasya_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin jātasya_jāta hṛdi_hṛd buddhau_buddhi viṣṭhitam_viṣṭhā sarvatra_sarvatra sāmānyena_sāmānya sthitam_sthā api_api viśeṣa--_viśeṣa rūpeṇa_rūpa jīva--_jīva rūpeṇa_rūpa antaryāmi--_antaryāmin rūpeṇa_rūpa ca_ca sauram_saura tejaḥ_tejas iva_iva ādarśa--_ādarśa sūrya--_sūrya kāntā--_kāntā ādau_ādi avyavahitam_avyavahita eva_eva vastutas_vastutas bhrāntyā_bhrānti vyavahitam_vyavadhā iva_iva sarva--_sarva bhrama--_bhrama kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ajñāna--_ajñāna nivṛttyā_nivṛtti prāpyate_prāp iva_iva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha jyotiṣām_jyotis candra--_candra ādityānām_āditya api_api tat_tad jyotiḥ_jyotis prakāśakam_prakāśaka yena_yad sūryaḥ_sūrya tapati_tap tejasā_tejas indhaḥ_indha

na_na tatra_tatra sūryaḥ_sūrya bhāti_bhā na_na candra--_candra tārakam_tāraka na_na imāḥ_idam vidyutaḥ_vidyut bhānti_bhā kutas_kutas ayam_idam agniḥ_agni tat_tad eva_eva anubhāti_anubhā sarvam_sarva
tasya_tad bhāsā_bhās sarvam_sarva idam_idam vibhāti_vibhā iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti

atas_atas eva_eva tamasaḥ_tamas ajñānāt_ajñāna param_para tena_tad asaṃsṛṣṭam_asaṃsṛṣṭa ucyate_vac āditya--_āditya varṇam_varṇa tamsasaḥ_tamsas parastāt_parastāt iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti jñānam_jñāna tat_tad eva_eva buddhi--_buddhi vṛttau_vṛtti abhivyaktam_abhivyañj sat_as jñānam_jñāna ucyate_vac tat_tad eva_eva rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi ākāreṇa_ākāra pariṇatam_pariṇam jñeyam_jñā ca_ca tat_tad eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna gamyam_gam pūrvoktena_pūrvokta amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi jñāna--_jñāna sādhanena_sādhana prāpyam_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad eva_eva paramātma--_paramātman svarūpam_svarūpa sat_as sarvasya_sarva prāṇimātrasya_prāṇimātra hṛdi_hṛd dhiṣṭhitam_adhiṣṭhā niyantṛtayā_niyantṛtā adhbiṣṭhāya_adhbiṣṭha sthitam_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
baladevaḥ_baladeva jyotiṣām_jyotis api_api tat_tad brahma_brahman jyotiḥ_jyotis prakāśakam_prakāśaka

lg.l: na_na tatra_tatra sūryaḥ_sūrya bhāti_bhā na_na candra--_candra tārakam_tāraka
na_na imāḥ_idam vidyutaḥ_vidyut bhānti_bhā kutas_kutas ayam_idam agniḥ_agni
tat_tad eva_eva anubhāti_anubhā sarvam_sarva
tasya_tad bhāsā_bhās sarvam_sarva idam_idam vibhāti_vibhā

div.p: iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti tat_tad brahma_brahman tat_tad brahma_brahman tamasaḥ_tamas prakṛteḥ_prakṛti param_para tena_tad a_a spṛṣṭam_spṛś ucyate_vac āditya--_āditya varṇam_varṇa tamasaḥ_tamas parastāt_parastāt iti_iti śrutyā_śruti jñānam_jñāna cit--_cit eka--_eka rasam_rasa ucyate_vac vijñānam_vijñāna ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana brahma_brahman iti_iti śrutyā_śruti jñānam_jñāna mumukṣoḥ_mumukṣu śaraṇa--_śaraṇa tvena_tva jñātum_jñā arham_arha ucyate_vac tam_tad ha_ha devam_deva ātma--_ātman buddhi--_buddhi prakāśam_prakāśa mumukṣuḥ_mumukṣu vai_vai śaraṇam_śaraṇa aham_mad prapadye_prapad iti_iti śrutyā_śruti jñāna--_jñāna gamyam_gam ucyate_vac tam_tad eva_eva viditvā_vid atimṛtyum_atimṛtyu eti_i iti_iti śrutyā_śruti sarvasya_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin mātrasya_mātra hṛdi_hṛd dhiṣṭhitam_adhiṣṭhā niyantṛtayā_niyantṛtā adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā sthitam_sthā iti_iti ucyate_vac antar_antar praviṣṭaḥ_praviś śāstā_śāstṛ janānām_jana iti_iti śrutyā_śruti na_na ca_ca sarvatas_sarvatas pāṇi--_pāṇi iti_iti ādi_ādi pañcakam_pañcaka jīva--_jīva para--_para tayā_tā eva_eva neyam_nī tad--_tad prakaraṇa--_prakaraṇa tva--_tva ādi--_ādi vācyam_vac jīva--_jīva vat_vat īśvarasya_īśvara api_api kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña tvena_tva prakṛta--_prakṛta tvāt_tva sarvatas_sarvatas pāṇi_pāṇi iti_iti ādi--_ādi sārdhakasya_sārdhaka brahma_brahman eva_eva upakramya_upakram śvetāśvataraiḥ_śvetāśvatara paṭhitvāt_paṭh prakaraṇa--_prakaraṇa śāvalyasya_śāvalya upaniṣatsu_upaniṣad vīkṣaṇāt_vīkṣaṇa ca_ca

lg.l: iti_iti kṣetram_kṣetra tathā_tathā jñānam_jñāna jñeyam_jñā ca_ca uktam_vac samāsatas_samāsatas
mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta etat_etad vijñāya_vijñā mad--_mad bhāvāya_bhāva upapadyate_upapad

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ iti_iti enam_enad kṣetram_kṣetra mahā--_mahat bhūta--_bhūta ādi--_ādi dhṛti--_dhṛti antam_anta tathā_tathā jñānam_jñāna ca_ca amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna artha--_artha darśana--_darśana antam_anta jñeyam_jñā ca_ca anādimat_anādimat param_para brahma_brahman iti_iti ādi_ādi viṣṭhitam_viṣṭhā iti_iti antam_anta vasiṣṭha--_vasiṣṭha ādibhiḥ_ādi vistareṇa_vistara uktam_vac sarvam_sarva api_api mayā_mad saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa uktam_vac etat_etad ca_ca katham_katham pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ukta--_vac lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta vijñāya_vijñā mad--_mad bhāvāya_bhāva brahmatvāya_brahmatva upapadyate_upapad yogyaḥ_yogya bhavati_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana uktam_vac kṣetra--_kṣetra ādikam_ādika adhikāriṇam_adhikārin phalam_phala ca_ca vadan_vad upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ iti_iti iti_iti iti_iti anena_idam pūrva--_pūrva uktena_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra kṣetram_kṣetra mahābhūta--_mahābhūta ādi--_ādi dhṛti--_dhṛti antam_anta tathā_tathā jñānam_jñāna amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādi_ādi tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna artha--_artha darśana--_darśana paryantam_paryanta jñeyam_jñā ca_ca anādimat_anādimat param_para brahma_brahman viṣṭhitam_viṣṭhā iti_iti antam_anta manda--_manda buddhi--_buddhi anugrahāya_anugraha mayā_mad saṃkṣepena_saṃkṣepa uktam_vac etāvān_etāvat eva_eva hi_hi sarvaḥ_sarva veda--_veda arthaḥ_artha gīta--_gīta arthaḥ_artha ca_ca asmin_idam ca_ca pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya ukta--_vac lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta eva_eva adhikārī_adhikārin iti_iti āha_ah mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta mayi_mad bhagavati_bhagavant vāsudeve_vāsudeva parama--_parama gurau_guru samarpita--_samarpay sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman bhāvaḥ_bhāva mad--_mad eka--_eka śaraṇaḥ_śaraṇa saḥ_tad etat_etad yathoktam_yathoktam viditvā_vid mad--_mad bhāvāya_bhāva sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha śūnya--_śūnya paramānanda--_paramānanda bhāvāya_bhāva mokṣāya_mokṣa upapadyate_upapad mokṣam_mokṣa prāptum_prāp yogyaḥ_yogya bhavati_bhū

yasya_yad deve_deva parā_para bhaktiḥ_bhakti deve_deva gurau_guru
tasya_tad ete_etad kathitāḥ_kathay hi_hi arthāḥ_artha prakāśante_prakāś mahātmanaḥ_mahātman
div.l: tasmāt_tasmāt sarvadā_sarvadā mad--_mad eka--_eka śaraṇaḥ_śaraṇa san_as ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna sādhanāni_sādhana eva_eva parama--_parama puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha lipsuḥ_lipsu anuvartate_anuvṛt tuccha--_tuccha viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga spṛhām_spṛhā hitvā_hā iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ kṣetram_kṣetra mahā--_mahat bhūta--_bhūta ādi_ādi dhṛti--_dhṛti antam_anta jñānam_jñāna amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna artha--_artha darśana--_darśana antam_anta jñeyam_jñā jñāna--_jñāna gamyam_gam ca_ca anādi_anādi iti_iti ādi_ādi dhiṣṭhitam_adhiṣṭhā iti_iti antam_anta ekam_eka eva_eva tattvam_tattva brahma_brahman bhagavat--_bhagavant paramātma--_paramātman śabda--_śabda vācyam_vac ca_ca saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa uktam_vac mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhaktimat_bhaktimat jñānī_jñānin mad--_mad bhāvāya_bhāva mad--_mad sāyujyāya_sāyujya yat_yat vā_vā mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta mama_mad aikāntikaḥ_aikāntika dāsaḥ_dāsa etat_etad vijñāya_vijñā mad--_mad prabhoḥ_prabhu etāvat_etāvat aiśvaryam_aiśvarya iti_iti jñātvā_jñā mayi_mad bhāvāya_bhāva premṇe_preman upapadyate_upapad upapannaḥ_upapad bhavati_bhū

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_vac kṣetra--_kṣetra ādikam_ādika tad--_tad jñāna--_jñāna phala--_phala sahitam_sahita upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ iti_iti kṣetram_kṣetra iti_iti mahā--_mahat bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti ādinā_ādi cetanā_cetanā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti iti_iti antena_anta kṣetra--_kṣetra svarūpam_svarūpa uktam_vac amāni--_amānin tvam_tva iti_iti ādinā_ādi tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna artha--_artha darśanam_darśana iti_iti antena_anta jñeyasya_jñā kṣetra--_kṣetra dvayasya_dvaya jñānam_jñāna tad--_tad sādhanam_sādhana uktam_vac anādi_anādi mat_mad param_para iti_iti ādinā_ādi hṛdi_hṛd sarvasya_sarva viṣṭhitam_viṣṭhā iti_iti antena_anta jñeyam_jñā kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña dvayam_dvaya ca_ca uktam_vac mayā_mad etat_etad trayam_traya vijñāya_vijñā mithas_mithas vivekena_viveka avagatya_avagam mad--_mad bhāvāya_bhāva mad--_mad premṇe_preman mad--_mad svabhāvāya_svabhāva vā_vā asaṃsāri--_asaṃsārin tvāya_tva kalpate_kﾱp yogye_yogya bhavati_bhū mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta

lg.l: prakṛtim_prakṛti puruṣam_puruṣa ca_ca eva_eva viddhi_vid anādī_anādi ubhau_ubh api_api
vikārān_vikāra ca_ca guṇān_guṇa ca_ca eva_eva viddhi_vid prakṛti--_prakṛti saṃbhavān_sambhava

div.p:
idānīm_idānīm tu_tu yat_yad vikāri_vikārin yatas_yatas ca_ca yat_yad sa_tad ca_ca yaḥ_yad yad--_yad prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ca_ca iti_iti etat_etad pūrvam_pūrvam pratijñātam_pratijñā eva_eva prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣayoḥ_puruṣa saṃsāra--_saṃsāra hetuka--_hetuka tva--_tva kathanena_kathana prapañcayati_prapañcay prakṛtim_prakṛti iti_iti pañcabhiḥ_pañcan tatra_tatra prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣayoḥ_puruṣa ādima--_ādima tve_tva tayoḥ_tad api_api prakṛti--_prakṛti antareṇa_antara bhāvyam_bhū iti_iti anavasthā--_anavasthā āpattiḥ_āpatti syāt_as atas_atas tau_tad ubhau_ubh anādī_anādi viddhi_vid anādeḥ_anādi īśvarasya_īśvara śakti--_śakti tvāt_tva prakṛteḥ_prakṛti anādi--_anādi tvam_tva puruṣe_puruṣa api_api tad--_tad aṃśa--_aṃśa tvāt_tva anādiḥ_anādi eva_eva atra_atra ca_ca parameśvarasya_parameśvara tad--_tad śaktīnām_śakti anādi--_anādi tvam_tva nitya--_nitya tvam_tva ca_ca śrīmat--_śrīmat śaṅkara--_śaṃkara bhagavat--_bhagavant bhāṣya--_bhāṣya kṛdbhiḥ_kṛt ati_ati prabandhena_prabandha upapāditam_upapāday iti_iti grantha--_grantha bāhulyāt_bāhulya na_na asmābhiḥ_mad pratanyate_pratan vikārān_vikāra ca_ca deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādīn_ādi
guṇān_guṇa ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa pariṇāmān_pariṇāma sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha ādīn_ādi prakṛteḥ_prakṛti sambhūtān_sambhū viddhi_vid

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad anena_idam granthena_grantha tat_tad kṣetram_kṣetra yat_yad ca_ca yādṛś_yādṛś ca_ca iti_iti etat_etad vyākhyātam_vyākhyā idānīm_idānīm yad--_yad vikāri_vikārin yatas_yatas ca_ca yat_yad sa_tad ca_ca yaḥ_yad yad--_yad prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ca_ca iti_iti etāvat_etāvat vyākhyātavyam_vyākhyā tatra_tatra prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣayoḥ_puruṣa saṃsāra--_saṃsāra hetu--_hetu tva--_tva kathanena_kathana yat_yad vikāri_vikārin yatas_yatas ca_ca yat_yad iti_iti prakṛtim_prakṛti iti_iti ādi_ādi dvābhyām_dvi prapañcyate_prapañcay sa_tad ca_ca yaḥ_yad yat_yad prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ca_ca iti_iti tu_tu puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti ādi_ādi dvyābhyām_dvi iti_iti vivekaḥ_viveka tatra_tatra saptame_saptama īśvarasya_īśvara dve_dvi prakṛtī_prakṛti parāpare_parāpara kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña lakṣaṇe_lakṣaṇa upanyasya_upanyas etad--_etad yonīni_yoni bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra aparā_apara prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti kṣetra--_kṣetra lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa parā_para tu_tu jīva--_jīva lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa iti_iti tayoḥ_tad anādi--_anādi tvam_tva uktvā_vac tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya yoni--_yoni tvam_tva bhūtānām_bhūta ucyate_vac prakṛtim_prakṛti iti_iti

prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti māyā--_māyā ākhyā_ākhyā triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmikā_ātmaka pārameśvarī_pārameśvara śaktiḥ_śakti kṣetra--_kṣetra lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa yā_yad prāk_prāk aparā_apara prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti iti_iti uktā_vac yā_yad tu_tu parā_para prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti jīva--_jīva ākhyā_ākhyā prāk_prāk uktā_vac saḥ_tad iha_iha puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti uktaḥ_vac iti_iti na_na pūrva--_pūrva apara--_apara virodhaḥ_virodha prakṛtim_prakṛti puruṣam_puruṣa ca_ca ubhau_ubh api_api anādī_anādi eva_eva viddhi_vid na_na vidyate_vid ādiḥ_ādi kāraṇam_kāraṇa yayoḥ_yad tau_tad tathā_tathā prakṛteḥ_prakṛti anādi--_anādi tvam_tva sarva--_sarva jagat--_jagant kāraṇatvāt_kāraṇatva tasyāḥ_tad api_api kāraṇa--_kāraṇa sāpekṣa--_sāpekṣa tve_tva anavasthā--_anavasthā prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga puruṣasya_puruṣa anādi--_anādi tvam_tva tad--_tad dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma prayukta--_prayuj tvāt_tva kṛtsnasya_kṛtsna jagataḥ_jagant jātasya_jan harṣa--_harṣa śoka--_śoka bhaya--_bhaya sampratipatteḥ_sampratipatti anyathā_anyathā kṛta--_kṛta hānya--_hānya kṛta--_kṛ abhyāgama--_abhyāgama prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga yatas_yatas prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti anādiḥ_anādi atas_atas tasyāḥ_tad bhūta--_bhūta yoni--_yoni tvam_tva uktam_vac prāk_prāk upapadyate_upapad iti_iti āha_ah vikārān_vikāra ca_ca ṣoḍaśa_ṣoḍaśan
pañca_pañcan mahābhūtāni_mahābhūta ekādaśa_ekādaśan indriyāṇi_indriya ca_ca guṇān_guṇa ca_ca sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas rūpān_rūpa sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha mohān_moha prakṛti--_prakṛti saṃbhavān_sambhava eva_eva prakṛti--_prakṛti kāraṇakān_kāraṇaka eva_eva viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā

lg.l: āha_ah vidyate_vid tathābhūtau_tathābhūta viddhi_vid anādeḥ_anādi īśvarasya_īśvara mama_mad śakti--_śakti tvāt_tva
bhūmiḥ_bhūmi āpaḥ_ap analaḥ_anala vāyuḥ_vāyu kham_kha manaḥ_manas buddhiḥ_buddhi eva_eva ca_ca
ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra iti_iti iyam_idam me_mad bhinnā_bhid prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti aṣṭadhā_aṣṭadhā
aparā_apara iyam_idam itas_itas tu_tu anyām_anya prakṛtim_prakṛti viddhi_vid me_mad parām_para
jīva--_jīva bhūtām_bhū mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu yayā_yad idam_idam dhāryate_dhāray jagat_jagant

div.p: iti_iti mad--_mad ukteḥ_ukti māyā--_māyā jīvayoḥ_jīva api_api mad--_mad śakti--_śakti tvena_tva anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva tayoḥ_tad saṃśleṣaḥ_saṃśleṣa api_api anādiḥ_anādi iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tatra_tatra mithas_mithas saṃśliṣṭayoḥ_saṃśliṣ api_api tayoḥ_tad vastutas_vastutas pārthakyam_pārthakya asti_as eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah vikārān_vikāra ca_ca deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādīn_ādi guṇān_guṇa ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa pariṇāmān_pariṇāma sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha śoka--_śoka moha--_moha ādīn_ādi prakṛti--_prakṛti sambhūtān_sambhū prakṛti--_prakṛti prakṛteḥ_prakṛti sakāśāt_sakāśāt bhinnam_bhid eva_eva jīvam_jīva viddhi_vid iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam mithas_mithas vivikta--_vivic svabhāvayoḥ_svabhāva anādyoḥ_anādi prakṛti--_prakṛti jīvayoḥ_jīva saṃsargasya_saṃsarga anādi--_anādi kālika--_kālika tvam_tva saṃsṛṣṭayoḥ_saṃsṛj tayoḥ_tad kārya--_kārya bhedaḥ_bheda tad--_tad saṃsargasya_saṃsarga anādi--_anādi kālikasya_kālika hetuḥ_hetu ca_ca nirūpyate_nirūpay prakṛtim_prakṛti iti_iti apiḥ_api avadhṛtau_avadhṛti mithas_mithas sampṛktau_sampṛc prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣau_puruṣa ubhau_ubh anādyā_anādya iva_iva viddhi_vid madīya--_madīya śakti--_śakti tvāt_tva nityau_nitya eva_eva jānīhi_jñā tayoḥ_tad mad--_mad śakti--_śakti tvam_tva tu_tu purā_purā eva_eva uktam_vac bhūmiḥ_bhūmi āpaḥ_ap iti_iti ādinā_ādi anādi--_anādi saṃsṛṣṭayoḥ_saṃsṛj api_api tayoḥ_tad svarūpa--_svarūpa bhedaḥ_bheda asti_as iti_iti āśayena_āśaya āha_ah vikārān_vikāra deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādīn_ādi guṇān_guṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkhāni_duḥkha prakṛti--_prakṛti sambhavān_sambhava prākṛtān_prākṛta na_na tu_tu jaivān_jaiva viddhi_vid iti_iti kṣetra--_kṣetra ātmanā_ātman pariṇatāyāḥ_pariṇam prakṛteḥ_prakṛti anyaḥ_anya jīvaḥ_jīva iti_iti darśitam_darśay

lg.l: kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva hetuḥ_hetu prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti ucyate_vac
puruṣaḥ_puruṣa sukha--_sukha duḥkhānām_duḥkha bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tve_tva hetuḥ_hetu ucyate_vac

div.p: darśayan_darśay darśayati_darśay kāryam_kārya śarīram_śarīra kāraṇāni_kāraṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhanāni_sādhana indriyāṇi_indriya teṣām_tad kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva tad--_tad ākāra--_ākāra pariṇāme_pariṇāma prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti hetuḥ_hetu ucyate_vac kapila--_kapila ādibhiḥ_ādi puruṣaḥ_puruṣa jīvaḥ_jīva tu_tu tad--_tad kṛta--_kṛ sukha--_sukha duḥkhānām_duḥkha bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tve_tva hetuḥ_hetu ucyate_vac ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva yadi_yadi api_api acetanāyāḥ_acetana prakṛteḥ_prakṛti svatas_svatas kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na sambhavati_sambhū tathā_tathā puruṣasya_puruṣa api_api avikāriṇaḥ_avikārin bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvam_tva na_na sambhavati_sambhū tathā_tathā api_api kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva nāma_nāma kriyā--_kriyā nirvartaka--_nirvartaka tvam_tva tat_tad ca_ca acetanasya_acetana api_api cetanā--_cetanā adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa vaśāt_vaśa caitanya--_caitanya adhiṣṭhita--_adhiṣṭhā tvāt_tva sambhavati_sambhū yathā_yathā vahneḥ_vahni ūrdhva--_ūrdhva jvalanam_jvalana vayoḥ_tvad tiryak_tiryañc gamanam_gamana vatsa--_vatsa adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa vaśāt_vaśa go--_go stanya--_stanya payasaḥ_payas kṣaraṇam_kṣaraṇa iti_iti ādi_ādi atas_atas puruṣa--_puruṣa sannidhānāt_saṃnidhāna prakṛteḥ_prakṛti kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva ucyate_vac bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvam_tva ca_ca sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha saṃvedanam_saṃvedana tat_tad ca_ca cetana--_cetana dharmaḥ_dharma eva_eva iti_iti prakṛti--_prakṛti sannidhānāt_saṃnidhāna puruṣasya_puruṣa bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvam_tva ucyate_vac iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana vikārāṇām_vikāra prakṛti--_prakṛti sambhavat--_sambhū tvam_tva vivecayan_vivecay puruṣasya_puruṣa saṃsāra--_saṃsāra hetutvam_hetutva darśayati_darśay kārya--_kārya iti_iti kāryam_kārya śarīram_śarīra karaṇāni_karaṇa indriyāṇi_indriya tad--_tad sthāni_stha trayodaśa_trayodaśan deha--_deha ārambhakāṇi_ārambhaka bhūtāni_bhūta viṣayāḥ_viṣaya ca_ca iha_iha kārya--_kārya grahaṇena_grahaṇa gṛhyante_grah guṇāḥ_guṇa ca_ca sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha ātmakāḥ_ātmaka karaṇa--_karaṇa āśraya--_āśraya tvāt_tva karaṇa--_karaṇa grahaṇena_grahaṇa gṛhyante_grah teṣām_tad kārya--_kārya karaṇānām_karaṇa kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva tad--_tad ākāra--_ākāra pariṇāme_pariṇāma hetuḥ_hetu kāraṇam_kāraṇa prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti ucyate_vac mahā--_mahat ṛṣibhiḥ_ṛṣi kārya--_kārya karaṇa--_karaṇa iti_iti dīrgha--_dīrgha pāṭhe_pāṭha api_api saḥ_tad eva_eva arthaḥ_artha evam_evam prakṛteḥ_prakṛti saṃsāra--_saṃsāra kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvam_tva vyākhyāya_vyākhyā puruṣasya_puruṣa api_api yādṛśam_yādṛśa tat_tad tat_tad āha_ah kṣetrajñaḥ_kṣetrajña parā_para prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti iti_iti prāk_prāk vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā sa_tad sukha--_sukha duḥkhānām_duḥkha sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha mohānām_moha bhogyānām_bhogya sarveṣām_sarva api_api bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tve_tva vṛtti--_vṛtti uparakta--_uparañj upalambhe_upalambha hetuḥ_hetu ucyate_vac

darśayati_darśay kāryam_kārya śarīram_śarīra kāraṇāni_kāraṇa sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhanāni_sādhana indriyāṇi_indriya kartāraḥ_kartṛ indriya--_indriya adhiṣṭhātāraḥ_adhiṣṭhātṛ devāḥ_deva tatra_tatra tathā_tathā adhyāsena_adhyāsa puruṣa--_puruṣa saṃsargāt_saṃsarga kārya--_kārya ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇatā_pariṇam syāt_as avidyā--_avidyā ākhyayā_ākhyā sva--_sva vṛttyā_vṛtti tad--_tad adhyāsa--_adhyāsa pradā_prada ca_ca syāt_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad kṛta--_kṛ sukha--_sukha duḥkhānām_duḥkha bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tve_tva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa jīvaḥ_jīva eva_eva hetuḥ_hetu ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva yadi_yadi api_api kāryatva--_kāryatva kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tva--_tva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvāni_tva prakṛti--_prakṛti dharmāḥ_dharma eva_eva syuḥ_as tat_tad api_api kāryatva--_kāryatva ādiṣu_ādi jaḍa--_jaḍa aṃśa--_aṃśa prādhānyāt_prādhānya sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha saṃvedana--_saṃvedana rūpe_rūpa bhoge_bhoga tu_tu caitanya--_caitanya prādhānyena_prādhānya vyapadeśāḥ_vyapadeśa bhavanti_bhū iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya kārya--_kārya tva--_tva ādiṣu_ādi prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti hetuḥ_hetu bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tve_tva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti ucyate_vac iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha saṃsṛṣṭayoḥ_saṃsṛj tayoḥ_tad kārya--_kārya bhedam_bheda āha_ah kārya--_kārya iti_iti śarīram_śarīra kāryam_kārya jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman sādhaka--_sādhaka tvāt_tva indriyāṇi_indriya kāraṇāni_kāraṇa teṣām_tad kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva tad--_tad tad--_tad ākāra--_ākāra sva--_sva pariṇāme_pariṇāma prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti hetuḥ_hetu puruṣaḥ_puruṣa prakṛti--_prakṛti sthaḥ_stha hi_hi iti_iti agrimāt_agrima sva--_sva saṃsargeṇa_saṃsarga sa_sa cetanām_cetanā prakṛtim_prakṛti puruṣaḥ_puruṣa adhitiṣṭhati_adhiṣṭhā tad--_tad adhiṣṭhitā_adhiṣṭhā tu_tu sā_tad tad--_tad karma--_karman aṇu--_aṇu guṇyena_guṇya pariṇamamānā_pariṇam tad--_tad tad--_tad deha--_deha ādīnām_ādi sraṣṭrī_sraṣṭṛ iti_iti prakṛtyā_prakṛti arpitānām_arpay sukha--_sukha ādīnām_ādi bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tve_tva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa hetuḥ_hetu teṣām_tad bhoge_bhoga saḥ_tad eva_eva kartā_kartṛ iti_iti prakṛti--_prakṛti adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ tvam_tva sukha--_sukha ādi--_ādi bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvam_tva ca_ca puruṣasya_puruṣa kāryam_kārya tat_tad ca_ca śarīra--_śarīra ādi--_ādi kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva tu_tu tad--_tad adhiṣṭhātāyāḥ_adhiṣṭhātṛ prakṛteḥ_prakṛti iti_iti puruṣasya_puruṣa eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva mukhyam_mukhya evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra kartā_kartṛ śāstra--_śāstra arthavat--_arthavat tvāt_tva iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi pareśasya_pareśa hareḥ_hari adhiṣṭhātṛ--_adhiṣṭhātṛ tvam_tva tu_tu sarvatra_sarvatra avarjanīyam_avarjanīya iti_iti uktam_vac vakṣyate_vac ca_ca

lg.l: puruṣaḥ_puruṣa prakṛti--_prakṛti sthaḥ_stha hi_hi bhuṅkte_bhuj prakṛti--_prakṛti jān_ja guṇān_guṇa
kāraṇam_kāraṇa guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga asya_idam sat--_as asat--_asat yoni--_yoni janmasu_janman

div.p: atas_atas āha_ah puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti yasmāt_yad prakṛti--_prakṛti sthaḥ_stha tad--_tad kārye_kārya dehe_deha tādātmyena_tādātmya sthitaḥ_sthā puruṣaḥ_puruṣa atas_atas tad--_tad janitān_janay sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādīn_ādi bhuṅkte_bhuj asya_idam ca_ca puruṣasya_puruṣa satīṣu_as deva--_deva ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni asatīṣu_asat tiryak--_tiryañc ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni yāni_yad janmāni_janman teṣu_tad guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga guṇaiḥ_guṇa śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha karma--_karman kāribhiḥ_kārin indriyaiḥ_indriya saṅgaḥ_saṅga kāraṇam_kāraṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yat_yad puruṣasya_puruṣa sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvam_tva tādātmyena_tādātmya upagataḥ_upagam prakṛti--_prakṛti sthaḥ_stha hi_hi eva_eva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa bhuṅkte_bhuj upalabhate_upalabh prakṛti--_prakṛti jān_ja guṇān_guṇa atas_atas prakṛti--_prakṛti ja--_ja guṇa--_guṇa upalambha--_upalambha hetuṣu_hetu sat--_as asat--_asat yoni--_yoni janmasu_janman sat--_as yonayaḥ_yoni deva--_deva ādyāḥ_ādya teṣu_tad hi_hi sāttvikam_sāttvika phalam_phala bhujyate_bhuj asat--_asat yonayaḥ_yoni paśu--_paśu ādyāḥ_ādya teṣu_tad hi_hi tāmasam_tāmasa aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa phalam_phala bhujyate_bhuj atas_atas tat_tad na_na asya_idam puruṣasya_puruṣa guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas guṇa--_guṇa ātmaka--_ātmaka prakṛti--_prakṛti tādātmya--_tādātmya abhimānaḥ_abhimāna eva_eva kāraṇam_kāraṇa na_na tu_tu asaṅgasya_asaṅga tasya_tad svatas_svatas saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha athavā_athavā guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga guṇeṣu_guṇa śabda--_śabda ādiṣu_ādi sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha ātmakeṣu_ātmaka saṅgaḥ_saṅga abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa kāmaḥ_kāma iti_iti yāvat_yāvat saḥ_tad eva_eva asya_idam sat--_as asat--_asat yoni--_yoni janmasu_janman kāraṇam_kāraṇa sa_tad yathā_yathā kāmaḥ_kāma bhavati_bhū tat_tad kratuḥ_kratu bhavati_bhū yat_yat kratuḥ_kratu bhavati_bhū tat_tad karma_karman kurute_kṛ yat_yat karma_karman kurute_kṛ tat_tad abhisampadyate_abhisampad iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti asmin_idam api_api pakṣe_pakṣa mūla--_mūla kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvena_tva prakṛti--_prakṛti tādātmya--_tādātmya abhimānaḥ_abhimāna draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś

manyate_man tatas_tatas eva_eva asya_idam saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra iti_iti āha_ah puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti prakṛti--_prakṛti sthaḥ_stha prakṛti--_prakṛti kārya--_kārya dehe_deha tādātmyena_tādātmya hi_hi sthitaḥ_sthā prakṛti--_prakṛti jān_ja antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa dharmān_dharma śoka--_śoka moha--_moha sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādīn_ādi guṇān_guṇa svīyān_svīya eva_eva abhimanyamānaḥ_abhiman bhuṅkte_bhuj tatra_tatra kāraṇam_kāraṇa guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga guṇa--_guṇa maya--_maya deheṣu_deha asya_idam asaṅgasya_asaṅga api_api ātmanaḥ_ātman saṅgaḥ_saṅga avidyā--_avidyā kalpitaḥ_kalpay kva_kva bhuṅkte_bhuj iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah satīṣu_as deva--_deva ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni asatīṣu_asat tiryak--_tiryañc ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha karma--_karman kṛtāsu_kṛ yāni_yad janmāni_janman teṣu_tad

baladevaḥ_baladeva prakṛti--_prakṛti adhiṣṭhāne_adhiṣṭhāna sikha--_sikha ādi--_ādi bhoge_bhoga ca_ca puruṣasya_puruṣa eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva iti_iti etat_etad sphuṭayati_sphuṭay tasya_tad prakṛti--_prakṛti saṃsarge_saṃsarga hetum_hetu ca_ca darśayati_darśay puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti cit--_cit sukha--_sukha eka--_eka rasaḥ_rasa api_api puruṣaḥ_puruṣa anādi--_anādi karma--_karman vāsanayā_vāsanā prakṛti--_prakṛti sthaḥ_stha tām_tad adhiṣṭhita--_adhiṣṭhā tad--_tad kṛta--_kṛ deha--_deha indriyaḥ_indriya prāna--_prāna viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ san_as eva_eva tad--_tad kṛtān_kṛ guṇān_guṇa sukha--_sukha ādīn_ādi bhuṅkte_bhuj anubhavati_anubhū kva_kva satīṣu_as deva--_deva mānava--_mānava ādiṣu_ādi asatīṣu_asat paśu--_paśu pakṣi--_pakṣin ādiṣu_ādi ca_ca sādhu--_sādhu asādhu--_asādhu racitāsu_racay yoniṣu_yoni yāni_yad janma--_janman ādīni_ādi teṣu_tad iti_iti tatra_tatra tatra_tatra puruṣasya_puruṣa eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva

tad--_tad saṃsarge_saṃsarga hetum_hetu āha_ah kāraṇam_kāraṇa guṇaḥ_guṇa asaṅgaḥ_asaṅga anādi--_anādi guṇa--_guṇa maya--_maya visaya--_visaya spṛhā_spṛhā ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha anādiḥ_anādi jīvaḥ_jīva sa_tad ca_ca bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ tvāt_tva bhogyān_bhuj viṣayān_viṣaya spṛhayan_spṛhay tad--_tad arpita--_arpay kāmanā--_kāmanā ādi--_ādi sannihitām_saṃnidhā prakṛtim_prakṛti āśrayiṣyati_āśri yāvat_yāvat sat--_sat prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga tad--_tad tad--_tad vāsanā_vāsanā kṣīyate_kṣi tad--_tad kṣaye_kṣaya tu_tu parātma--_parātman dhāma--_dhāman sukhāni_sukha bhuṅkte_bhuj saḥ_tad aśnute_aś sarvān_sarva kāmān_kāma saha_saha brahmaṇā_brahman vipaścitā_vipaścit iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutibhyaḥ_śruti iti_iti yat_yad tu_tu prakṛteḥ_prakṛti iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva ca_ca iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi na_na anyam_anya guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi ca_ca āpātata--_āpātata artha--_artha grāhibhiḥ_grāhin sāṅkhyaiḥ_sāṃkhya prakṛteḥ_prakṛti eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva uktam_vac tat_tad kila_kila rabhasa--_rabhasa tattva--_tattva sambhāvāt_sambhāva āha_ah tanute_tan tanute_tan eṣa_etad hi_hi draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ spraṣṭā_spraṣṭṛ śrotā_śrotṛ rasayitā_rasayitṛ ghrātā_ghrātṛ mantā_mantṛ boddhā_boddhṛ kartā_kartṛ nijñāna--_nijñāna ātmā_ātman puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti ādikam_ādika

yat_yad ca_ca puruṣa--_puruṣa sannidhānāt_saṃnidhāna caitanya--_caitanya adhyāsāt_adhyāsa tasyāḥ_tad tattvam_tattva iti_iti āhuḥ_ah tat_tad na_na yat_yad sannidhi--_saṃnidhi adhasta--_adhasta caitanyāt_caitanya tasyāḥ_tad kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva tat_tad tasya_tad eva_eva sannihitasya_saṃnidhā iti_iti suvaca--_suvaca tvāt_tva na_na khalu_khalu tapāyasaḥ_tapāyas dagdhṛ--_dagdhṛ tvam_tva ayaḥ--_ayas hetukam_hetuka api_api tu_tu vahni--_vahni hetukam_hetuka eva_eva dṛṣṭam_dṛś na_na ca_ca calati_cal jalam_jala phalati_phal taruḥ_taru iti_iti vat_vat jaḍāyāḥ_jaḍa tasyāḥ_tad tattva--_tattva siddhiḥ_siddhi jala--_jala ādiṣu_ādi antaryāmi--_antaryāmin adhiṣṭhita--_adhiṣṭhā tvena_tva iṣṭa--_iṣ asiddheḥ_asiddhi vidhāyaka--_vidhāyaka śruti--_śruti vyākopāt_vyākopa ca_ca etā_etad id_id evam_evam na_na hi_hi jaḍa--_jaḍa prakṛtim_prakṛti uddiśya_uddiś svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi phalakam_phalaka jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādi--_ādi mokṣa--_mokṣa phalakam_phalaka dhyānam_dhyāna ca_ca smṛtiḥ_smṛti vidhatte_vidhā api_api tu_tu cetanam_cetana eva_eva bhoktāram_bhoktṛ uddiśya_uddiś iti_iti puruṣasya_puruṣa eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva tat_tad ca_ca prakṛteḥ_prakṛti iti_iti yat_yad uktam_vac tat_tad tu_tu tad--_tad vṛtti--_vṛtti prācuryāt_prācurya eva_eva yathā_yathā kareṇa_kara bibhrati_bhṛ puruṣe_puruṣa karaḥ_kara bibharti_bhṛ iti_iti vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa tathā_tathā prakṛtyā_prakṛti
kurvati_kṛ puruṣe_puruṣa prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti karoti_kṛ iti_iti sa_tad bhavet_bhū iti_iti eke_eka prākṛtaiḥ_prākṛta deha--_deha ādibhiḥ_ādi yuktasya_yuj eva_eva puruṣasya_puruṣa yajña--_yajña yuddha--_yuddha ādi--_ādi karma--_karman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na tu_tu taiḥ_tad viyuktasya_viyuj śuddhasya_śudh iti_iti atas_atas prakṛteḥ_prakṛti tat_tad iti_iti

lg.l: upadraṣṭā_upadraṣṭṛ anumantā_anumantṛ ca_ca bhartā_bhartṛ bhoktā_bhoktṛ maheśvaraḥ_maheśvara
paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti ca_ca api_api uktaḥ_vac dehe_deha asmin_idam puruṣaḥ_puruṣa paraḥ_para

div.p: na_na tu_tu svarūpataḥ_svarūpa iti_iti āśayena_āśaya tasya_tad svarūpam_svarūpa āha_ah upadraṣṭā_upadraṣṭṛ iti_iti asmin_idam prakṛti--_prakṛti kārye_kārya dehe_deha vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api puruṣaḥ_puruṣa paras_paras bhinnaḥ_bhid eva_eva na_na tad--_tad guṇaiḥ_guṇa yujyate_yuj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra hetavaḥ_hetu yasmāt_yad upadraṣṭā_upadraṣṭṛ pṛthak_pṛthak bhūtaḥ_bhū eva_eva samīpe_samīpa sthitvā_sthā draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ sākṣī_sākṣin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā anumantā_anumantṛ anumoditā_anumoditṛ eva_eva sannidhi--_saṃnidhi mātreṇa_mātra anugrāhakaḥ_anugrāhaka sākṣī_sākṣin cetāḥ_cetas kevalaḥ_kevala nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa ca_ca iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti tathā_tathā aiśvaryeṇa_aiśvarya rūpeṇa_rūpa bhartā_bhartṛ vidhāyakaḥ_vidhāyaka iti_iti ca_ca uktaḥ_vac bhoktā_bhoktṛ pālakaḥ_pālaka iti_iti ca_ca mahān_mahant ca_ca asau_adas īśvaraḥ_īśvara ca_ca sa_tad brahma--_brahman ādīnām_ādi api_api patiḥ_pati iti_iti ca_ca paramātmā_paramātman vā_vā antaryāmī_antaryāmin iti_iti ca_ca uktaḥ_vac śrutyā_śruti tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti eṣa_etad sarva--_sarva īśvaraḥ_īśvara eva_eva sa_tad bhūta--_bhūta adhipatiḥ_adhipati loka--_loka pālaḥ_pāla iti_iti ādi_ādi

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam prakṛti--_prakṛti mithyā_mithyā tādātmyāt_tādātmya puruṣasya_puruṣa saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra na_na svarūpeṇa_svarūpa iti_iti uktam_vac kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa punar_punar tasya_tad sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa yatra_yatra na_na sambhavati_sambhū saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra iti_iti ākāṅkṣāyām_ākāṅkṣā tasya_tad sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa sākṣāt_sākṣāt nirdiśan_nirdiś āha_ah upadraṣṭā_upadraṣṭṛ iti_iti asmin_idam prakṛti--_prakṛti pariṇāme_pariṇāma dehe_deha jīva--_jīva rūpeṇa_rūpa vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api puruṣaḥ_puruṣa paraḥ_para prakṛti--_prakṛti guṇa--_guṇa asaṃsṛṣṭaḥ_asaṃsṛṣṭa paramārthataḥ_paramārtha asaṃsārī_asaṃsārin svena_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa iti_iti artahṛ_artahṛ yatas_yatas upadraṣṭā_upadraṣṭṛ yathā_yathā ṛtvij--_ṛtvij yajamāneṣu_yajamāna yajña--_yajña karma--_karman vyāpṛteṣu_vyāpṛta tad--_tad samīpa--_samīpa sthaḥ_stha anyaḥ_anya svayam_svayam avyāpṛtaḥ_avyāpṛta yajña--_yajña vidyā--_vidyā kuśala--_kuśala tvāt_tva ṛtvij--_ṛtvij yajamāna--_yajamāna vyāpāra--_vyāpāra guṇa--_guṇa doṣāṇām_doṣa īkṣitā_īkṣitṛ
tadvat_tadvat kārya--_kārya karaṇa--_karaṇa vyāpāreṣu_vyāpāra svayam_svayam avyāpṛtaḥ_avyāpṛta vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa teṣām_tad kārya--_kārya karaṇānām_karaṇa sa_sa vyāparāṇām_vyāpara samīpa--_samīpa sthaḥ_stha draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ na_na tu_tu kartā_kartṛ puruṣaḥ_puruṣa sa_tad yat_yad tatra_tatra kiṃcid_kaścit paśyati_paś an_an anvāc_anvāñc atas_atas tena_tad bhavati_bhū a_a saṅgaḥ_saṅga hi_hi ayam_idam puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

athavā_athavā deha--_deha cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus manaḥ--_manas buddhi--_buddhi ātmānaḥ_ātman draṣṭṛṣu_draṣṭṛ madhye_madhya bāhyān_bāhya deha--_deha ādīn_ādi apekṣya_apekṣ atyavyavahitaḥ_atyavyavahita draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ ātmā_ātman puruṣaḥ_puruṣa upadraṣṭā_upadraṣṭṛ upa_upa śabdasya_śabda sāmīpya--_sāmīpya artha--_artha tvāt_tva tasya_tad ca_ca avyavadhāna--_avyavadhāna

anumantā_anumantṛ ca_ca kārya--_kārya karaṇa--_karaṇa pravṛttiṣu_pravṛtti svayam_svayam apravṛttaḥ_apravṛtta api_api pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt iva_iva saṃnidhi--_saṃnidhi mātreṇa_mātra tad--_tad anukūla--_anukūla tvāt_tva anumantā_anumantṛ athavā_athavā sva--_sva vyāpāreṣu_vyāpāra pravṛttān_pravṛt deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādīn_ādi na_na nivārayati_nivāray kadācid_kadācid api_api tad--_tad sākṣi--_sākṣin bhūtaḥ_bhū puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti anumantā_anumantṛ sākṣī_sākṣin cetā_cetṛ iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti bhartā_bhartṛ

bhartā_bhartṛ deha--_deha indriya--_indriya manaḥ--_manas buddhīnām_buddhi saṃhatānām_saṃhan caitanya--_caitanya ābhāsa--_ābhāsa viśiṣṭānām_viśiṣ sva--_sva sattayā_sattā sphuraṇena_sphuraṇa ca_ca dhārayitā_dhārayitṛ poṣayitā_poṣayitṛ ca_ca bhoktā_bhoktṛ buddheḥ_buddhi sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha ātmakān_ātmaka pratyayān_pratyaya svarūpa--_svarūpa caitanyena_caitanya prakāśayati_prakāśay iti_iti nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra eva_eva upalabdhā_upalabh maheśvaraḥ_maheśvara sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman tvāt_tva svatantra--_svatantra tvāt_tva ca_ca mahān_mahant īśvaraḥ_īśvara ca_ca iti_iti maheśvaraḥ_maheśvara iti_iti anena_idam śabdena_śabda api_api uktaḥ_vac kathitaḥ_kathay śrutau_śruti ca-kārāt_ca-kāra upadraṣṭā_upadraṣṭṛ iti_iti ādi--_ādi śabdaiḥ_śabda api_api saḥ_tad eva_eva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa paraḥ_para uttamaḥ_uttama puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tu_tu anyaḥ_anya paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti udāhṛtaḥ_udāhṛ iti_iti agre_agra vakṣyate_vac

āha_ah yadi_yadi api_api anādi_anādi mat_mad param_para brahma_brahman iti_iti ādinā_ādi hṛdi_hṛd sarvasya_sarva viṣṭhitam_viṣṭhā iti_iti anena_idam ca_ca sāmānyatas_sāmānyatas paśeṣatas_paśeṣatas ca_ca paramātmā_paramātman proktaḥ_pravac eva_eva tat_tad api_api tasya_tad jīvātma--_jīvātman sāhityena_sāhitya api_api pṛthak_pṛthak eva_eva spaṣṭa--_spaṣṭa tayā_tā deha--_deha jñeyā_jñā asmin_idam dehe_deha paraḥ_para anyaḥ_anya puruṣaḥ_puruṣa yaḥ_yad maheśvarḥ_maheśvara sa_tad paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti ca_ca api_api uktaḥ_vac paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti ca_ca nāmnā_nāman api_api uktaḥ_vac bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra parama--_parama śabdaḥ_śabda ekātma--_ekātman vāda--_vāda pakṣe_pakṣa sva--_sva aṃśaḥ_aṃśa iti_iti dyotana--_dyotana arthaḥ_artha jīvasya_jīva upa_upa samīpe_samīpa pṛthak_pṛthak sthitaḥ_sthā eva_eva draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ sākṣī_sākṣin anumantā_anumantṛ anumodana--_anumodana kartā_kartṛ sannidhi--_saṃnidhi mātreṇa_mātra anugrāhakaḥ_anugrāhaka sākṣī_sākṣin cetāḥ_cetas kevalaḥ_kevala nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa ca_ca iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tathā_tathā bhartā_bhartṛ dhārakaḥ_dhāraka bhoktā_bhoktṛ pālakaḥ_pālaka

baladevaḥ_baladeva dehe_deha sukha--_sukha ādi--_ādi bhokṭrayā_bhokṭrī avasthitam_avasthā jīvam_jīva uktvā_vac niyantṛ--_niyantṛ tayā_tā tatra_tatra avasthitam_avasthā īśvaram_īśvara āha_ah upadraṣṭā_upadraṣṭṛ iti_iti asmin_idam dehe_deha paraḥ_para jīvāt_jīva anyaḥ_anya puruṣaḥ_puruṣa asti_as yaḥ_yad maheśvaraḥ_maheśvara paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti proktaḥ_pravac upadraṣṭā_upadraṣṭṛ sannidhau_saṃnidhi pṛthak_pṛthak sthitaḥ_sthā eva_eva sākṣī_sākṣin anumantā_anumantṛ anumati--_anumati dātā_dātṛ tad--_tad anumatim_anumati vinā_vinā jīvaḥ_jīva kiñcid_kaścit api_api kartum_kṛ na_na kṣamaḥ_kṣama iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhartā_bhartṛ dhārakaḥ_dhāraka bhoktā_bhoktṛ pālakaḥ_pālaka sarvatas_sarvatas pāṇi_pāṇi iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi uktasya_vac api_api īśasya_īśa jīvena_jīva saha_saha sthitim_sthiti vaktum_vac punar_punar uktiḥ_ukti

lg.l: yaḥ_yad evam_evam vetti_vid puruṣam_puruṣa prakṛtim_prakṛti ca_ca guṇaiḥ_guṇa saha_saha
sarvathā_sarvathā vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api na_na sa_tad bhūyas_bhūyas abhijāyate_abhijan

div.p: stauti_stu evam_evam upadraṣṭṛ--_upadraṣṭṛ tva--_tva ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa puruṣam_puruṣa yaḥ_yad vetti_vid prakṛtim_prakṛti ca_ca guṇaiḥ_guṇa saha_saha sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi pariṇāmaiḥ_pariṇāma sahitām_sahita yaḥ_yad vetti_vid sa_tad puruṣaḥ_puruṣa sarvathā_sarvathā vidhim_vidhi atilaṅghya_atilaṅgh iha_iha vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api punar_punar na_na mucyate_muc eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam sa_tad ca_ca yaḥ_yad yat_yad prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ca_ca iti_iti vyākhyātam_vyākhyā idānīm_idānīm yat_yad jñātvā_jñā amṛtam_amṛta aśnute_aś iti_iti uktam_vac upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ yaḥ_yad evam_evam iti_iti yaḥ_yad evam_evam uktena_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra vetti_vid puruṣam_puruṣa ayam_idam aham_mad asmi_as iti_iti sākṣātkaroti_sākṣātkṛ prakṛtim_prakṛti ca_ca avidyām_avidyā guṇaiḥ_guṇa sva--_sva vikāraiḥ_vikāra saha_saha mithyā_mithyā bhūtām_bhū ātma--_ātman vidyayā_vidyā bādhitām_bādh vetti_vid nivṛtte_nivṛt mama_mad ajñāna--_ajñāna tāt--_tāt indra--_indra vat_vat vidhim_vidhi atikramya_atikram vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api bhūyas_bhūyas na_na jāyate_jan patite_pat asmin_idam vidvas--_vidvas śarīre_śarīra punar_punar deha--_deha grahaṇam_grahaṇa na_na karoti_kṛ avidyāyām_avidyā vidyayā_vidyā nāśitāyām_nāśay tad--_tad kārya--_kārya asaṃbhavasya_asaṃbhava bahudhā_bahudhā ukta--_vac tvāt_tva tad--_tad adhigamaḥ_adhigama uttara--_uttara pūrva--_pūrva ardhayoḥ_ardha aśleṣa--_aśleṣa vināśau_vināśa tad--_tad vyapadeśāt_vyapadeśa iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya api_api śabdāt_śabda vidhim_vidhi an_an atikramya_atikram vartamānaḥ_vṛt
sva--_sva vṛtta--_vṛtta sthaḥ_stha bhūyas_bhūyas na_na jāyate_jan iti_iti kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya
āha_ah _

baladevaḥ_baladeva etad--_etad jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala āha_ah yaḥ_yad iti_iti evam_evam mad--_mad ukta--_vac vidhayā_vidhā mithas_mithas viviktatayā_viviktatā yaḥ_yad puruṣam_puruṣa maheśvara--_maheśvara prakṛtim_prakṛti ca_ca jīvam_jīva ca_ca vetti_vid sarvathā_sarvathā vyavahāra--_vyavahāra samparkeṇa_samparka vartamānaḥ_vṛt api_api bhūyas_bhūyas na_na abhijāyate_abhijan dehānte_dehānta vimucyate_vimuc iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: dhyānena_dhyāna ātmani_ātman paśyanti_dṛś ke_ka cit_cit ātmānam_ātman ātmanā_ātman
anye_anya sāṃkhyena_sāṃkhya yogena_yoga karma--_karman yogena_yoga ca_ca apare_apara

div.p: āha_ah dhyānena_dhyāna ātma--_ātman ākāra--_ākāra pratyaya--_pratyaya āvṛttyā_āvṛtti ātmani_ātman dehe_deha eva_eva ātmanā_ātman manasā_manas evam_evam ātmānam_ātman kecid_kaścit paśyanti_dṛś anye_anya tu_tu sāṅkhyena_sāṅkhya prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣa--_puruṣa vailakṣaṇya--_vailakṣaṇya ālocanena_ālocana yogena_yoga aṣṭāṅgena_aṣṭāṅga apare_apara karma--_karman yogena_yoga paśyanti_paś iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra anuṣaṅgaḥ_anuṣaṅga eteṣām_etad ca_ca dhyāna--_dhyāna ādīnām_ādi yathā_yathā yogyam_yogya krama--_krama samuccaye_samuccaya sati_as api_api tad--_tad tad--_tad niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā bheda--_bheda abhiprāyeṇa_abhiprāya vikalpa--_vikalpa uktiḥ_ukti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana atra_atra ātma--_ātman darśane_darśana sādhana--_sādhana vikalpāḥ_vikalpa ime_idam kathyante_kathay dhyānena_dhyāna iti_iti iha_iha hi_hi caturvidhāḥ_caturvidha janāḥ_jana kecid_kaścit uttamāḥ_uttama kecid_kaścit madhyamāḥ_madhyama kecid_kaścit mandāḥ_manda kecid_kaścit mandatarāḥ_mandatara iti_iti tatra_tatra uttamānām_uttama ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna sādhanam_sādhana āha_ah dhyānena_dhyāna vijātīya--_vijātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya anantaritena_anantarita sajātīya--_sajātīya pratyaya--_pratyaya pravāheṇa_pravāha śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana phala--_phala bhūtena_bhū ātma--_ātman cintanena_cintana nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana śabdena_śabda uditena_udi ātmani_ātman buddhau_buddhi paśyanti_dṛś sākṣātkurvanti_sākṣātkṛ ātmānam_ātman pratyak--_pratyañc dhyāna--_dhyāna saṃskṛtena_saṃskṛ antaḥkaraṇena_antaḥkaraṇa kecid_kaścit uttamāḥ_uttama yoginaḥ_yogin

madhyamānām_madhyama ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna sādhanam_sādhana āha_ah ---anye_anya madhyamāḥ_madhyama sāṃkhyena_sāṃkhya yogena_yoga nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana pūrva--_pūrva bhāvinā_bhāvin śravaṇa--_śravaṇa manana--_manana rūpeṇa_rūpa nitya--_nitya anitya--_anitya viveka--_viveka ādi--_ādi pūrvakeṇa_pūrvaka ime_idam guṇa--_guṇa traya--_traya pariṇāmāḥ_pariṇāma anātmanaḥ_anātman nityaḥ_nitya vibhuḥ_vibhu nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra satyaḥ_satya samasta--_samasta jaḍa--_jaḍa sambandha--_sambandha śūnyaḥ_śūnya ātmā_ātman aham_mad iti_iti evam_evam vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya vicāra--_vicāra janyena_jan cintanena_cintana paśyanti_dṛś ātmānam_ātman ātman_ātman iti_iti vartate_vṛt dhyānena_dhyāna utpatti--_utpatti dvāreṇa_dvāra iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

mandānām_manda jñāna--_jñāna sādhanam_sādhana āha_ah ---karma--_karman yogena_yoga īśvara--_īśvara arpaṇa--_arpaṇa buddhyā_buddhi kriyamāṇena_kṛ phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi rahitena_rahita tad--_tad tad--_tad varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama ucitena_ucita veda--_veda vihitena_vidhā karma--_karman kalāpena_kalāpa ca_ca apare_apara mandāḥ_manda paśyanti_dṛś ātmānam_ātman

āha_ah kecid_kaścit bhaktāḥ_bhakta dhyānena_dhyāna bhagavat--_bhagavant cintanena_cintana eva_eva bhaktyā_bhakti mām_mad abhijānāti_abhijñā iti_iti agrima--_agrima ukteḥ_ukti ātmani_ātman mansi_man ātmanā_ātman svayam_svayam eva_eva na_na tu_tu anyena_anya kena_ka api_api upakārekeṇa_upakāreka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha anye_anya jñāninaḥ_jñānin sāṅkhyam_sāṅkhya ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman vivekaḥ_viveka tena_tad apare_apara yoginaḥ_yogin yogena_yoga aṣṭāṅgena_aṣṭāṅga karma--_karman yogena_yoga niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman ca_ca atra_atra sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yoga--_yoga niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman yogāḥ_yoga paramātma--_paramātman darśane_darśana parasparayā_parasparā eva_eva hetavaḥ_hetu na_na tu_tu sākṣāt_sākṣāt hetavaḥ_hetu teṣām_tad sāttvika--_sāttvika tvāt_tva paramātmanaḥ_paramātman tu_tu guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī tvāt_tva kim_ka ca_ca jñānam_jñāna ca_ca mayi_mad sannyaset_saṃnyas iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant ukteḥ_ukti jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa anantaram_anantaram eva_eva bhaktyā_bhakti aham_mad ekayā_eka grāhyaḥ_grah iti_iti ukteḥ_ukti jñānam_jñāna vimucya_vimuc tayā_tad bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva
paśyanti_paś

baladevaḥ_baladeva maheśvarasya_maheśvara prāptau_prāpti sādhana--_sādhana vikalpān_vikalpa āha_ah dhyānena_dhyāna dvābhyām_dvi kecid_kaścit viśuddha--_viśudh cittāḥ_citta ātmani_ātman manasi_manas sthitam_sthā ātmānam_ātman maheśvaram_maheśvara mām_mad dhyānena_dhyāna upasarjanī--_upasarjanī bhūta--_bhū jñānena_jñāna paśyanti_dṛś sākṣāt_sākṣāt kurvanti_kṛ ātmanā_ātman svayam_svayam eva_eva na_na tu_tu anyena_anya upakārakeṇa_upakāraka anye_anya sāṅkhyena_sāṃkhya upasarjanī--_upasarjanī bhūta--_bhūta dhyānena_dhyāna jñānena_jñāna paśyanti_paś anya--_anya yogena_yoga upasarjanī--_upasarjanī bhūta--_bhūta jñānena_jñāna aṣṭāṅgena_aṣṭāṅga paśyanti_paś apare_apara tu_tu karma--_karman yogena_yoga antargata--_antargam dhyāna--_dhyāna jñānena_jñāna niṣkāmeṇa_niṣkāma karmaṇā_karman

lg.l: anye_anya tu_tu evam_evam a_a jānantaḥ_jñā śrutvā_śru anyebhyaḥ_anya upāsate_upās
te_tad api_api ca_ca atitaranti_atit￞ eva_eva mṛtyum_mṛtyu śruti--_śruti parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa

div.p: āha_ah anye_anya sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya yoga--_yoga ādi--_ādi mārgeṇa_mārga evambhūtam_evambhūta upadraṣṭṛ--_upadraṣṭṛ tva--_tva ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa ātmānam_ātman sākṣātkartum_sākṣātkṛ a_a jānantaḥ_jñā anyebhyaḥ_anya ācāryebhyaḥ_ācārya upadeśataḥ_upadeśa śrutvā_śru upāsante_upās dhyāyanti_dhyā te_tad api_api ca_ca śraddhayā_śraddhā upadeśa--_upadeśa śravaṇa--_śravaṇa parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa santaḥ_as mṛtyum_mṛtyu saṃsāram_saṃsāra śanais_śanais atitaranti_atit￞ eva_eva 25_25

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana mandatarāṇām_mandatara jñāna--_jñāna sādhanam_sādhana āha_ah anye_anya iti_iti anye_anya tu_tu mandatarāḥ_mandatara tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda pūrva--_pūrva śloka--_śloka ukta--_vac trividha--_trividha adhikāri--_adhikārin vailakṣaṇya--_vailakṣaṇya dyotana--_dyotana arthaḥ_artha eṣu_idam upāyeṣu_upāya anyatareṇa_anyatara api_api evam_evam yathoktam_yathoktam ātmānam_ātman a_a jānantaḥ_jñā anyebhyaḥ_anya kāruṇikebhyaḥ_kāruṇika ācāryebhyaḥ_ācārya śrutvā_śru "idam_idam eva_eva cintayata_cintay iti_iti uktāḥ_vac upāsate_upās śraddadhānāḥ_śraddhā santaḥ_as cintayanti_cintay te_tad api_api ca_ca atitaranti_atit￞ eva_eva mṛtyum_mṛtyu saṃsāram_saṃsāra śruti--_śruti parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa svayam_svayam vicāra--_vicāra asamarthāḥ_asamartha api_api śraddadhāna--_śraddhā tayā_tā guru--_guru upadeśa--_upadeśa śravaṇa--_śravaṇa mātra--_mātra parāyaṇāḥ_parāyaṇa te_tad api_api iti_iti api_api śabdāt_śabda ye_yad svayam_svayam vicāra--_vicāra samarthāḥ_samartha te_tad mṛtyum_mṛtyu atitaranti_atit￞ iti_iti kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya 25_25
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha anye_anya itas_itas tatas_tatas kathā--_kathā śrotāraḥ_śrotṛ
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva upāsate_upās te_tad api_api ta--_tad saṅginaḥ_saṅgin ca_ca krameṇa_krameṇa tān_tad upalabhya_upalabh anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā ca_ca mṛtyum_mṛtyu atitaranti_atit￞ eva_eva iti_iti tad--_tad kathā--_kathā śruti--_śruti mahima--_mahiman atiśayaḥ_atiśaya darśitaḥ_darśay 25_25

lg.l: yāvat_yāvat saṃjāyate_saṃjan kiṃcid_kaścit sattvam_sattva sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamam_jaṅgama
kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña saṃyogāt_saṃyoga tat_tad viddhi_vid bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha

div.p: āha_ah adhyāya--_adhyāya antam_anta yāvat_yāvat kiñcid_kaścit vastu--_vastu mātram_mātra sattvam_sattva utpadyate_utpad tat_tad sarvam_sarva kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña yogāt_yoga aviveka--_aviveka kṛta--_kṛ tādātmya--_tādātmya adhyāsāt_adhyāsa bhavati_bhū iti_iti jānīhi_jñā 26_26

upapadyate_upapad kriyate_kṛ tatra_tatra kāraṇam_kāraṇa guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga asya_idam sat--_as asat--_asat yoni--_yoni janmasu_janman iti_iti etat_etad prāk_prāk uktam_vac vivṛṇoti_vivṛ yāvat_yāvat iti_iti yāvat_yāvat kim_ka api_api sattvam_sattva vastu_vastu saṃjāyate_saṃjan sthāvaram_sthāvara jaṅgamam_jaṅgama vā_vā tat_tad sarvam_sarva kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña saṃyogāt_saṃyoga avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya ātmakam_ātmaka jaḍam_jaḍa anirvacanīyam_anirvacanīya sat--_as asattvam_asattva dṛśya--_dṛś jātam_jan kṣetram_kṣetra tad--_tad sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa paramārtha--_paramārtha sat--_as caitanyam_caitanya asaṅga--_asaṅga udāsīnam_udāsīna nirdharmakam_nirdharmaka advitīyam_advitīya kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña tayoḥ_tad saṃyogaḥ_saṃyoga māyā--_māyā vaśā_vaśa itaretara--_itaretara aviveka--_aviveka nimittaḥ_nimitta mithyā_mithyā tādātmya--_tādātmya adhyāsaḥ_adhyāsa satya--_satya anṛta--_anṛta mithunīkaraṇa--_mithunīkaraṇa tasmāt_tad eva_eva saṃjāyate_saṃjan tat_tad sarvam_sarva kārya--_kārya jātam_jan iti_iti viddhi_vid he_he bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha atas_atas svarūpa--_svarūpa ajñāna--_ajñāna nibandhanaḥ_nibandhana saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra svarūpa--_svarūpa jñānāt_jñāna vinaṃṣṭum_vinaś arhati_arh svapna--_svapna ādi--_ādi vat_vat iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya 26_26
prapañcayati_prapañcay

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha anādi--_anādi saṃyuktayoḥ_saṃyuj prakṛti--_prakṛti jīvayoḥ_jīva yoga--_yoga anusandhānāya_anusaṃdhāna tayoḥ_tad saṃyogena_saṃyoga sṛṣṭim_sṛṣṭi tāvat_tāvat āha_ah yāvat_yāvat iti_iti sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamam_jaṅgama kiñcid_kaścit sattvam_sattva prāṇi--_prāṇin jātam_jan yāvat_yāvat yad--_yad pramāṇakam_pramāṇaka utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa apakṛṣṭam_apakṛṣṭa ca_ca sañjāyate_saṃjan tat_tad kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña saṃyogāt_saṃyoga viddhi_vid kṣetreṇa_kṣetra prakṛtyā_prakṛti saha_saha kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña sambandhāt_sambandha jānīhi_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha īśvaraḥ_īśvara prakṛti--_prakṛti jīvau_jīva niyamayan_niyamay pravartayati_pravartay tau_tad sambadhnīta_sambandh tatas_tatas deha--_deha utpatti--_utpatti dvārā_dvār prāṇi--_prāṇin sṛṣṭiḥ_sṛṣṭi iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 26_26

lg.l: samam_sama sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta tiṣṭhantam_sthā parameśvaram_parameśvara
vinaśyatsu_vinaś a_a vinaśyantam_vinaś yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś sa_tad paśyati_dṛś
