div.p: āha_ah sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ātmakeṣu_ātmaka bhūteṣu_bhūta nirviśeṣam_nirviśeṣa sat--_as rūpeṇa_rūpa samam_sama yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evam_evam tiṣṭhantam_sthā paramātmānam_paramātman yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś ataeva_ataeva teṣu_tad vinaśyatsu_vinaś api_api a_a vinaśyantam_vinaś yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś saḥ_tad eva_eva samyak_samyak paśyati_dṛś 27_27

vetti_vid vivṛṇoti_vivṛ sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta bhavana--_bhavana dharmakeṣu_dharmaka sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ātmakeṣu_ātmaka prāṇiṣu_prāṇin aneka--_aneka vidha--_vidha janma--_janman ādi--_ādi pariṇāma--_pariṇāma śīla--_śīla tayā_tā guṇa--_guṇa pradhāna--_pradhāna bhāva--_bhāva āpattyā_āpatti ca_ca viṣameṣu_viṣama ataeva_ataeva cañcaleṣu_cañcala pratikṣaṇa--_pratikṣaṇa sthātum_sthā īśate_īś atas_atas eva_eva paraspara--_paraspara bādhya--_bādh bādhaka--_bādhaka bhāva--_bhāva āpanneṣu_āpad evam_evam api_api vinaśyatsu_vinaś dṛṣṭa--_dṛś naṣṭa--_naś svabhāveṣu_svabhāva māyā--_māyā gandharva--_gandharva nagara--_nagara ādi--_ādi prāyeṣu_prāya samam_sama sarvatra_sarvatra eka--_eka rūpam_rūpa pratideham_pratideham ekam_eka janma--_janman ādi--_ādi pariṇāma--_pariṇāma parameśvaram_parameśvara sarva--_sarva jaḍa--_jaḍa varga--_varga sattā--_sattā sphūrti--_sphūrti prada--_prada tvena_tva bādhya--_bādh bādhaka--_bādhaka bhāva--_bhāva śūnyam_śūnya sarva--_sarva dopa--_dopa an_an āskanditam_āskanday avinaśyantam_avinaśyat dṛṣṭa--_dṛś naṣṭa--_naś prāya--_prāya sarva--_sarva dvaita--_dvaita bādhe_bādha api_api abādhitam_abādhita evam_evam sarva--_sarva prakāreṇa_prakāra jaḍa--_jaḍa prapañca--_prapañca vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa ātmānam_ātman vivekena_viveka yaḥ_yad śāstra--_śāstra cakṣuṣā_cakṣus paśyati_dṛś saḥ_tad eva_eva paśyati_dṛś ātmānam_ātman jāgrat--_jāgrant bodhena_bodha svapna--_svapna bhramam_bhrama bādhamānaḥ_bādh iva_iva

ajñaḥ_ajña tu_tu svapna--_svapna darśī_darśin iva_iva bhrāntyā_bhrānti viparītam_viparīta paśyan_dṛś na_na paśyati_paś eva_eva adarśana--_adarśana ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva bhramasya_bhrama na_na hi_hi rajjum_rajju sarpa--_sarpa tayā_tā paśyan_paś paśyati_paś iti_iti vyapadiśyate_vyapadiś rajju--_rajju adarśana--_adarśana ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva sarpa--_sarpa darśanasya_darśana evam_evam bhūtāni_bhū ānuparakta--_ānuparakta śuddha--_śuddha ātma--_ātman darśanāt_darśana tad--_tad darśarna--_darśarna ātmikāyāḥ_ātmaka avidyāyāḥ_avidyā nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti tatas_tatas tad--_tad kārya--_kārya saṃsāra--_saṃsāra nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya atra_atra ātmānam_ātman iti_iti viśeṣya--_viśeṣya lābhaḥ_lābha viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa maryādayā_maryādā parameśvaram_parameśvara iti_iti eva_eva vā_vā viśeṣya--_viśeṣay padam_pada viṣamatva--_viṣamatva cañcalatva--_cañcalatva bādhya--_bādh bādhaka--_bādhaka rūpatva--_rūpatva lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa jaḍa--_jaḍa gatam_gam vaidharmyam_vaidharmya samatva--_samatva tiṣṭhattva--_sthā tva--_tva parameśvaratva--_parameśvaratva rūpa--_rūpa ātma--_ātman viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa vaśāt_vaśa arthāt_artha prāptam_prāp anyat_anya kaṇṭha--_kaṇṭha uktam_vac iti_iti vivekaḥ_viveka 27_27
jānīyāt_jñā āha_ah paśyati_dṛś _

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha prakṛtau_prakṛti tad--_tad saṃyukteṣu_saṃyuj ca_ca jīveṣu_jīva sthitam_sthā api_api īśvaram_īśvara tebhyaḥ_tad viviktam_vivic paśyet_paś iti_iti āha_ah samam_sama iti_iti yaḥ_yad tu_tu atattva--_atattva vid_vid prasaṅgī_prasaṅgin sarveṣu_sarva sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama dehavatsu_dehavat bhūteṣu_bhūta jīveṣu_jīva samam_sama ekarasam_ekarasa yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā tiṣṭhantam_sthā parameśvaram_parameśvara vinaśyatsu_vinaś tad--_tad tad--_tad deha--_deha vimardena_vimarda vināśam_vināśa gacchatsu_gam teṣu_tad paśyati_paś saḥ_tad eva_eva paśyati_paś tad--_tad yāthātmya--_yāthātmya darśī_darśin bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā ca_ca vaividhya--_vaividhya vināśa--_vināśa dharmibhyaḥ_dharmin prakṛti--_prakṛti saṃyogibhyaḥ_saṃyogin jīvebhyaḥ_jīva aikarasya--_aikarasya avināśa--_avināśa dharmā_dharman pareśaḥ_pareśa viviktaḥ_vivic iti_iti 27_27

lg.l: samam_sama paśyan_dṛś hi_hi sarvatra_sarvatra samavasthitam_samavasthā īśvaram_īśvara
na_na hinasti_hiṃs ātmanā_ātman ātmānam_ātman tatas_tatas yāti_yā parām_para gatim_gati

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara kutas_kutas iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah samam_sama iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra bhūtamātre_bhūtamātra samam_sama samyak_samyak apracyuta--_apracyuta sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa avasthitam_avasthā paramātmānam_paramātman paśyan_dṛś hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt ātmanā_ātman svena_sva eva_eva ātmānam_ātman na_na hinasti_hiṃs avidyayā_avidyā sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda rūpam_rūpa ātmānam_ātman tiraskṛtya_tiraskṛ na_na vināśayati_vināśay tatas_tatas ca_ca parām_para gatim_gati mokṣam_mokṣa prāpnoti_prāp yat_yat tu_tu evam_evam na_na paśyati_dṛś sa_tad hi_hi deha--_deha ātma--_ātman darśī_darśin dehena_deha saha_saha ātmānam_ātman hinasti_hiṃs tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti
asūryāḥ_asūrya nāma_nāma te_tad lokāḥ_loka andhena_andha tamasā_tamas āvṛtāḥ_āvṛ tān_tad te_tad pretya_pre abhigacchanti_abhigam ye_yad ke_ka ca_ca ātma--_ātman hanaḥ_han janāḥ_jana iti_iti

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad etat_etad ātma--_ātman darśanam_darśana phalena_phala stauti_stu ruci--_ruci utpattaye_utpatti samam_sama iti_iti anyat_anya prāk_prāk vyākhyātam_vyākhyā evam_evam pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa ātmānam_ātman paśyan_dṛś ayam_idam aham_mad asmi_as iti_iti śāstra--_śāstra dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi sākṣātkurvan_sākṣātkṛ na_na hinasti_hiṃs ātmanā_ātman ātmānam_ātman sarvaḥ_sarva hi_hi ajñaḥ_ajña paramārtha--_paramārtha santam_as ekam_eka akartṛ--_akartṛ abhoktṛ--_abhoktṛ paramānanda--_paramānanda rūpam_rūpa ātmānam_ātman avidyayā_avidyā sati_as bhāti_bhā api_api vastuni_vastu na_na asti_as na_na bhāti_bhā iti_iti pratīti--_pratīti janana--_janana samarthayā_samartha svayam_svayam eva_eva tiraskurvan_tiraskṛ asantam_asat iva_iva tathā_tathā avidyayā_avidyā ātma--_ātman tvena_tva deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṃghātam_saṃghāta ātmānam_ātman purātanam_purātana hatvā_han navam_nava ādatte_ādā karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa iti_iti hinasti_hiṃs eva_eva tam_tad atas_atas ubhayathā_ubhayathā api_api ātma--_ātman hā_han eva_eva sarvaḥ_sarva api_api ajñaḥ_ajña yam_yad adhikṛtya_adhikṛ iyam_idam śakuntalā--_śakuntalā vacana--_vacana rūpā_rūpa smṛtiḥ_smṛti
kim_ka tena_tad na_na kṛtam_kṛ pāpam_pāpa coreṇa_cora ātma--_ātman apahāriṇā_apahārin yaḥ_yad anyathā_anyathā santam_as ātmānam_ātman anyathā_anyathā pratipadyate_pratipad
śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca

lg.l: asūryāḥ_asūrya nāma_nāma te_tad lokāḥ_loka andhena_andha tamasā_tamas āvṛtāḥ_āvṛ
tān_tad te_tad pretya_pre abhigacchanti_abhigam ye_yad ke_ka ca_ca ātma--_ātman hanaḥ_han janāḥ_jana iti_iti

div.p: asūryā_asūryā asurasya_asura sva--_sva bhūtā_bhū āsuryā_āsura saṃpadā_sampad bhogyā_bhuj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātma--_ātman hanaḥ_han iti_iti anātmani_anātman ātma--_ātman abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atas_atas yaḥ_yad ātma--_ātman jñaḥ_jña saḥ_tad anātmani_anātman ātma--_ātman abhimānam_abhimāna śuddha--_śuddha ātma--_ātman darśanena_darśana bādhate_bādh atas_atas sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa lābhāt_lābha ca_ca hinasti_hiṃs ātmanā_ātman ātmānam_ātman tatas_tatas yāti_yā parām_para gatim_gati tatas_tatas ātma--_ātman hanana--_hanana abhāvāt_abhāva avidyā--_avidyā tad--_tad kārya--_kārya nivṛtti--_nivṛtti lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa muktim_mukti adhigacchati_adhigam iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 28_28
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ātmanā_ātman manasā_manas kupatha--_kupatha gāminā_gāmin ātmānam_ātman jīvam_jīva na_na hinasti_hiṃs na_na adhas_adhas pātayati_pātay
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha ukta--_vac viṣayā_viṣaya tebhyaḥ_tad viviktam_vivic īśvaram_īśvara paśyan_dṛś tad--_tad darśana--_darśana mahimnā_mahiman ca_ca prakṛti--_prakṛti vikārebhyaḥ_vikāra sva--_sva vivekam_viveka ca_ca labhate_labh iti_iti āśayena_āśaya āha_ah samam_sama paśyan_dṛś hi_hi iti_iti sarvatra_sarvatra bhūteṣu_bhūta samam_sama yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evam_evam samyak_samyak apracyuta--_apracyuta svarūpa--_svarūpa guṇatayā_guṇatā avasthitam_avasthā īśvaram_īśvara paśyan_dṛś ātmānam_ātman svam_sva ātmanā_ātman prakṛti--_prakṛti vikāra--_vikāra viveka--_viveka grāhiṇā_grāhin viṣaya--_viṣaya rasa--_rasa gṛdhnunā_gṛdhnu manasā_manas na_na hinasti_hiṃs tad--_tad rasa--_rasa viraktena_virañj tena_tad parām_para utkṛṣṭām_utkṛṣṭa gatim_gati tad--_tad vikārebhyaḥ_vikāra sva--_sva eveka--_eveka khyātim_khyāti yāti_yā 28_28

lg.l: prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva ca_ca karmāṇi_karman kriyamāṇāni_kṛ sarvaśas_sarvaśas
yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś tathā_tathā ātmānam_ātman akartāram_akartṛ sa_tad paśyati_dṛś

div.p: āha_ah prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ākāreṇa_ākāra pariṇatayā_pariṇam sarvaśas_sarvaśas prakāraiḥ_prakāra kriyamāṇāni_kṛ karmāṇi_karman yaḥ_yad paśyati_paś tathā_tathā ātmānam_ātman ca_ca akartāram_akartṛ deha--_deha abhimānena_abhimāna eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na svatas_svatas iti_iti evam_evam yaḥ_yad paśyati_paś saḥ_tad eva_eva samyak_samyak paśyati_paś na_na anyaḥ_anya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

hinasti_hiṃs āha_ah prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva iti_iti karmāṇi_karman vāc--_vāc manaḥ--_manas kāya--_kāya ārabhyāṇi_ārabh sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarvaiḥ_sarva prakāraiḥ_prakāra prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṅghāta--_saṃghāta ākāra--_ākāra pariṇatayā_pariṇam sarva--_sarva vikāra--_vikāra kāraṇa--_kāraṇa bhūtayā_bhū triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmikayā_ātmaka bhagavat--_bhagavant māyayā_māyā eva_eva kriyamāṇāni_kṛ vivekī_vivekin paśyati_dṛś evam_evam kṣetreṇa_kṣetra kriyamāṇeṣu_kṛ api_api karmasu_karman ātmānam_ātman kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña akartāram_akartṛ sarva--_sarva upādhi--_upādhi vivarjitam_vivarjay asaṅgam_asaṅga ekam_eka sarvatra_sarvatra samam_sama yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś tathā_tathā śabdaḥ_śabda paśyati_dṛś iti_iti kriyā--_kriyā karṣaṇa--_karṣaṇa parama--_parama artha--_artha darśī_darśin iti_iti pūrvavat_pūrvavat sa_sa vikārasya_vikāra kṣetrasya_kṣetra tad--_tad tad--_tad vicitra--_vicitra karma--_karman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvena_tva prati_prati deham_deha bhede_bheda api_api vaiṣamye_vaiṣamya api_api na_na nirviśeṣasya_nirviśeṣa akartuḥ_akartṛ ākāśasya_ākāśa iva_iva na_na bhede_bheda pramāṇam_pramāṇa kiṃcid_kaścit ātmanaḥ_ātman iti_iti upapāditam_upapāday prāk_prāñc 29_29

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi ākāreṇa_ākāra pariṇatayā_pariṇam sarvaśas_sarvaśas sarvāṇi_sarva ātmānam_ātman jīvam_jīva deha--_deha abhimānena_abhimāna eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na tu_tu svatas_svatas iti_iti evam_evam yaḥ_yad paśyati_dṛś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

yāti_yā āha_ah yaḥ_yad sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva mad--_mad adhiṣṭhitayā_adhiṣṭhā īśvara--_īśvara preritayā_preray kriyamāṇāni_kṛ paśyati_paś tathā_tathā ātmānam_ātman teṣām_tad karmaṇām_karman akartāram_akartṛ paśyati_paś saḥ_tad eva_eva paśyati_dṛś sva--_sva yāthāṭmya--_yāthāṭmya darśī_darśin bhavati_bhū ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha na_na khalu_khalu vijñāna--_vijñāna ānanda--_ānanda svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva aham_mad yuddha--_yuddha yajña--_yajña ādīni_ādi duḥkha--_duḥkha mayāni_maya karmāṇi_karman karomi_kṛ kintu_kiṃtu anādi--_anādi bhoga--_bhoga vāsanena_vāsanā avivekinā_avivekin mayā_mad adhiṣṭhitā_adhiṣṭhā mad--_mad bhoga--_bhoga siddhaye_siddhi mad--_mad deha--_deha ādi--_ādi dvārā_dvār tad--_tad kartṛī_kartṛ iti_iti karam_kara kāriṇyāḥ_kārin prakṛteḥ_prakṛti tad--_tad akartā_akartṛ śuddhaḥ_śuddha jīvaḥ_jīva viviktaḥ_vivic śuddhasya_śuddha api_api kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva tu_tu paśyati_dṛś iti_iti anena_idam vyaktam_vyakta iti_iti

lg.l: yadā_yadā bhūta--_bhūta pṛthag-bhāvam_pṛthagbhāva ekastham_ekastha anupaśyati_anupaś
tatas_tatas eva_eva ca_ca vistāram_vistāra brahma_brahman saṃpadyate_sampad tadā_tadā

div.p: upaiti_upe āha_ah yadā_yadā bhūtānām_bhūta sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamānām_jaṅgama pṛthak_pṛthak bhāvam_bhāva bhedam_bheda pṛthaktvam_pṛthaktva ekastham_ekastha ekasyām_eka eva_eva īśra--_īśra śakti--_śakti rūpāyām_rūpa prakṛtau_prakṛti pralaye_pralaya sthitam_sthā anupaśyati_anupaś ālocayati_ālocay ataeva_ataeva tasyāḥ_tad eva_eva prakṛteḥ_prakṛti sakāśāt_sakāśāt bhūtānām_bhūta vistāram_vistāra sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi samaye_samaya anupaśyati_anupaś tadā_tadā prakṛti--_prakṛti tāvat--_tāvat mātra--_mātra tvena_tva bhūtānām_bhūta api_api abhedam_abheda paśyan_paś paripūrṇam_paripṛ brahma_brahman sampadyate_sampad brahmā_brahman eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam āpātataḥ_āpāta kṣetra--_kṣetra bheda--_bheda darśanam_darśana an_an abhyanujñāya_abhyanujñā kṣetra--_kṣetra bheda--_bheda darśanam_darśana apākṛtam_apākṛ idānīm_idānīm tu_tu kṣetra--_kṣetra bheda--_bheda darśanam_darśana api_api māyika--_māyika tvena_tva apākaroti_apākṛ yadā_yadā iti_iti yadā_yadā yasmin_yad kāle_kāla bhūtānām_bhūta sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamānām_jaṅgama sarveṣām_sarva api_api jaḍa--_jaḍa vargāṇām_varga pṛthak_pṛthak bhāvam_bhāva pṛthaktvam_pṛthaktva paraspara--_paraspara bhinnatvam_bhinnatva eka--_eka stham_stha ekasmin_eka eva_eva ātmani_ātman sat--_as rūpe_rūpa sthitam_sthā kalpitam_kalpay kalpitasya_kalpay sat--_as rūpa--_rūpa ātma--_ātman svarūpāt_svarūpa anatiriktam_anatirikta anupaśyati_anupaś śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadeśam_upadeśa anu_anu svayam_svayam ālocayati_ālocay ātmā_ātman eva_eva idam_idam sarvam_sarva iti_iti evam_evam api_api māyā--_māyā v--_v vaśāt_vaśa tatas_tatas ekasmāt_eka ātmanaḥ_ātman eva_eva vistāram_vistāra bhūtānām_bhūta pṛthak_pṛthak bhāvam_bhāva ca_ca svapna--_svapna māyā--_māyā vat_vat anupaśyati_anupaś brahma_brahman saṃpadyate_sampad tadā_tadā sajātīya--_sajātīya vijātīya--_vijātīya bheda--_bheda darśana--_darśana abhāvāt_abhāva brahma_brahman eva_eva sarva--_sarva

yasmin_yad sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta ātmā_ātman eva_eva abhūt_bhū vijānataḥ_vijñā
tatra_tatra kaḥ_ka mohaḥ_moha kaḥ_ka śokaḥ_śoka eka--_eka tvam_tva anupaśyataḥ_anupaś iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva ca_ca iti_iti atra_atra ātma--_ātman bhedaḥ_bheda nirākṛtaḥ_nirākṛ yadā_yadā bhūta--_bhūta pṛthak_pṛthak bhāvam_bhāva iti_iti atra_atra tu_tu anātma--_anātman bhedaḥ_bheda api_api iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yadā_yadā bhūtānām_bhūta sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamānām_jaṅgama pṛthak_pṛthak bhāvam_bhāva tad--_tad tad--_tad ākāra--_ākāra gatam_gam pārthakyam_pārthakya ekastham_ekastha ekasyām_eka prakṛtau_prakṛti eva_eva sthitam_sthā pralaya--_pralaya kāle_kāla anupaśyati_anupaś ālocayati_ālocay tatas_tatas prakṛteḥ_prakṛti sakāśāt_sakāśāt eva_eva bhūtānām_bhūta vistāram_vistāra sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi samaye_samaya anupaśyati_anupaś tadā_tadā brahma_brahman sampadyate_sampad brahmā_brahman eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva yadā_yadā iti_iti ayam_idam jīvaḥ_jīva yadā_yadā bhūtānām_bhūta deva--_deva mānava--_mānava ādīnām_ādi pṛthak_pṛthak bhāvam_bhāva tad--_tad tad--_tad ākāra--_ākāra gatam_gam deva--_deva tva--_tva mānava--_mānava tva--_tva dīrgha--_dīrgha tva--_tva hrasva--_hrasva tva--_tva ādi--_ādi rūpa--_rūpa pārthakyam_pārthakya ekastham_ekastha prakṛti--_prakṛti gatam_gam eva_eva pralaye_pralaya anupaśyati_anupaś deva--_deva tva--_tva ādīnām_ādi vistāram_vistāra ca_ca paśyati_paś na_na tu_tu ātma--_ātman stham_stha tat_tad pṛthak_pṛthak bhāvam_bhāva na_na tad--_tad vistāram_vistāra ca_ca paśyati_paś sva--_sva prakṛti--_prakṛti vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman darśī_darśin tadā_tadā tat_tad brahma_brahman sampadyate_sampad tad--_tad viviktam_vivic abhivyakta--_abhivyañj apahata--_apahan pāpma--_pāpman tva--_tva ādi--_ādi bṛhat--_bṛhat guṇa--_guṇa aṣṭakam_aṣṭaka svam_sva anubhavati_anubhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvāt_tva paramātmā_paramātman ayam_idam avyayaḥ_avyaya
śarīra--_śarīra sthaḥ_stha api_api kaunteya_kaunteya na_na karoti_kṛ na_na lipyate_lip

div.p: tatra_tatra āha_ah anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva iti_iti yat_yad utpattimat_utpattimat tat_tad eva_eva hi_hi vyeti_vī vināśam_vināśa eti_i yat_yad ca_ca guṇavat_guṇavat vastu_vastu tasya_tad hi_hi guṇa--_guṇa nāśe_nāśa vyayaḥ_vyaya bhavati_bhū ayam_idam tu_tu paramātmā_paramātman anādi_anādi nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa ca_ca atas_atas avyayaḥ_avyaya avikārī_avikārin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tasmāt_tasmāt śarīre_śarīra sthitaḥ_sthā api_api na_na kiñcid_kaścit karoti_kṛ na_na ca_ca karma--_karman phalaiḥ_phala lipyate_lip

syāt_as apanudan_apanud paśyati_dṛś paśyati_dṛś ayam_idam aparokṣaḥ_aparokṣa paramātmā_paramātman parameśvara--_parameśvara abhinnaḥ_abhinna pratyak--_pratyañc ātmā_ātman avyayaḥ_avyaya na_na vyeti_vī iti_iti avyayaḥ_avyaya sarva--_sarva vikāra--_vikāra śūnyaḥ_śūnya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra vyayaḥ_vyaya dvedhā_dvedhā dharmi--_dharmin svarūpasya_svarūpa eva_eva utpattimat--_utpattimat tayā_tā vā_vā dharmi--_dharmin svarūpasya_svarūpa anutpādya--_anutpādya tve_tva api_api dharmāṇām_dharma eva_eva utpatti--_utpatti ādimat--_ādimat tayā_tā vā_vā tatra_tatra ādyam_ādya apākaroti_apākṛ anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva iti_iti ādiḥ_ādi prāk_prāk asattva--_asattva avasthā_avasthā sā_tad ca_ca na_na asti_as sarvadā_sarvadā sataḥ_as ātmanaḥ_ātman atas_atas tasya_tad kāraṇa--_kāraṇa abhāvāt_abhāva janma--_janman abhāvaḥ_abhāva na_na hi_hi anādeḥ_anādi janma_janman sambhavati_sambhū tad--_tad abhāve_abhāva ca_ca tad--_tad uttara--_uttara bhāvinaḥ_bhāvin bhāva--_bhāva vikārāḥ_vikāra na_na sambhavanti_sambhū eva_eva atas_atas na_na sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa vyeti_vī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

dvitīyam_dvitīya nirākaroti_nirākṛ nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvāt_tva iti_iti nirdharmaka--_nirdharmaka tvāt_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha na_na hi_hi dharmiṇam_dharmin a_a vikṛtya_vikṛ kaścid_kaścit dharmaḥ_dharma upaiti_upe apaiti_ape vā_vā dharma--_dharma dharmiṇoḥ_dharmin tādātmyāt_tādātmya ayam_idam tu_tu nirdharmakaḥ_nirdharmaka atas_atas na_na dharma--_dharma dvārā_dvār api_api vyeti_vī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha avināśī_avināśin vai_vai are_are ayam_idam ātmā_ātman an_an ucchitti--_ucchitti dharmā_dharman iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti yasmāt_yasmāt eṣa_etad jāyate_jan asti_as vardhate_vṛdh vipariṇamate_vipariṇam apakṣīyate_apakṣi vinaśyati_vinaś iti_iti evam_evam ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ bhāva--_bhāva vikāra--_vikāra śūnyaḥ_śūnya ādhyāsikena_ādhyāsika sambandhena_sambandha śarīra--_śarīra sthaḥ_stha api_api tasmin_tad kurvati_kṛ ayam_idam ātmā_ātman na_na karoti_kṛ yathā_yathā ādhyāsikena_ādhyāsika sambandhena_sambandha jala--_jala sthaḥ_stha savitā_savitṛ tasmin_tad calati_cal api_api na_na calati_cal eva_eva tadvat_tadvat yatas_yatas na_na lipyate_lip na_na tu_tu ayam_idam akartṛ--_akartṛ tvāt_tva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha icchā_icchā dveṣaḥ_dveṣa sukham_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha iti_iti ādīnām_ādi kṣetra--_kṣetra dharma--_dharma tva--_tva kathanāt_kathana prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva ca_ca karmāṇi_karman kriyamāṇāni_kṛ iti_iti māyā--_māyā kāryatva--_kāryatva vyapadeśāt_vyapadeśa ca_ca ataeva_ataeva parama--_parama artha--_artha darśinām_darśin sarva--_sarva karma--_karman adhikāra--_adhikāra nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti iti_iti prāc--_prāñc vyākhyātam_vyākhyā etena_etad ātmanaḥ_ātman nirdharmaka--_nirdharmaka tva--_tva kathanāt_kathana svagata--_svagata bhedaḥ_bheda api_api nirastaḥ_niras prakṛtyā_prakṛti eva_eva ca_ca karmāṇi_karman iti_iti atra_atra sajātīya--_sajātīya bhedaḥ_bheda nivāritaḥ_nivāray yadā_yadā bhūta--_bhūta pṛthak_pṛthak bhāvam_bhāva iti_iti atra_atra vijātīya--_vijātīya bhedaḥ_bheda anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvāt_tva iti_iti atra_atra svagataḥ_svagata bhedaḥ_bheda iti_iti advitīyam_advitīya brahma_brahman eva_eva ātmā_ātman iti_iti siddham_sidh

tatra_tatra deha--_deha gata--_gam tvena_tva tulya--_tulya tve_tva api_api jīvātmā_jīvātman eva_eva guṇa--_guṇa liptaḥ_lip saṃsarati_saṃsṛ na_na tu_tu paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti kutas_kutas iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva iti_iti na_na vidyate_vid ādiḥ_ādi kāraṇam_kāraṇa yatas_yatas sa_tad anādiḥ_anādi yathā_yathā pañcamī--_pañcamī anta--_anta padārthena_padārtha anuttama--_anuttama śabdena_śabda parama--_parama uttamaḥ_uttama ucyate_vac tathā_tathā eva_eva anādi--_anādi śabdena_śabda parama--_parama kāraṇam_kāraṇa ucyate_vac tatas_tatas ca_ca anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva parama--_parama kāraṇatvāt_kāraṇatva nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvāt_tva nirgatāḥ_nirgam guṇaḥ_guṇa sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādayaḥ_ādi yatas_yatas tasya_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva tattvam_tattva tasmāt_tad ca_ca jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa ayam_idam paramātmā_paramātman avyayaḥ_avyaya sarvadā_sarvadā eva_eva sarvathā_sarvathā eva_eva svīya--_svīya jñāna--_jñāna ānanda--_ānanda ādi--_ādi vyaya--_vyaya rahitaḥ_rahita śarīra--_śarīra sthaḥ_stha api_api tad--_tad dharma--_dharma agrahaṇāt_agrahaṇa na_na karoti_kṛ jīva--_jīva vat_vat na_na kartā_kartṛ na_na bhoktā_bhoktṛ bhavati_bhū na_na ca_ca lipyate_lip śarīra--_śarīra guṇa--_guṇa liptaḥ_lip ca_ca na_na bhavati_bhū

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_nanu para--_para īśam_īśa ātmānam_ātman ca_ca viviktam_vivic paśyati_dṛś kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha bhavati_bhū iti_iti uktiḥ_ukti ayuktā_ayukta etebhyaḥ_etad eva_eva bhūtebhyaḥ_bhūta samutthāya_samutthā tāni_tad eva_eva anu_anu vinaśyati_vinaś na_na pra_pra iti_iti asaṃjñā_asaṃjñā asti_as iti_iti jīvasya_jīva dehena_deha saha_saha utpatti--_utpatti tatra_tatra āha_ah anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva iti_iti ayam_idam ātmā_ātman jīvaḥ_jīva śarīra--_śarīra sthaḥ_stha api_api anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva param_para avyayaḥ_avyaya avyaya--_avyaya tva--_tva pradhāna--_pradhāna dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva vināśa--_vināśa śūnyaḥ_śūnya nirguṇa--_nirguṇa tvāt_tva viśuddha--_viśudh jñāna--_jñāna ānanda--_ānanda tvāt_tva na_na yuddha--_yuddha yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi karma_karman karoti_kṛ atas_atas śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya svabhāvena_svabhāva utpatti--_utpatti vināśa--_vināśa lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa na_na lipyate_lip śruti--_śruti arthaḥ_artha tu_tu aupacārika--_aupacārika tayā_tā neyaḥ_nī

lg.l: yathā_yathā sarva--_sarva gatam_gam saukṣmyāt_saukṣmya ākāśam_ākāśa na_na upalipyate_upalip
sarvatra_sarvatra avasthitaḥ_avasthā dehe_deha tathā_tathā ātmā_ātman na_na upalipyate_upalip

div.p: āha_ah yathā_yathā sarva--_sarva gatam_gam paṅka--_paṅka ādiṣu_ādi api_api sthitam_sthā ākāśam_ākāśa saukṣmyāt_saukṣmya asaṅga--_asaṅga tvāt_tva paṅka--_paṅka ādibhiḥ_ādi na_na upalipyate_upalip tathā_tathā sarvatra_sarvatra uttame_uttama madhyame_madhyama adhame_adhama vā_vā dehe_deha avasthitaḥ_avasthā api_api ātmā_ātman na_na upalipyate_upalip 32_32

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana śarīra--_śarīra sthaḥ_stha api_api tad--_tad karmaṇā_karman na_na lipyate_lip svayam_svayam asaṅga--_asaṅga tvāt_tva iti_iti atra_atra dṛṣṭāntam_dṛṣṭānta āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti saukṣmyāt_saukṣmya asaṅga--_asaṅga svabhāva--_svabhāva tvāt_tva ākāśam_ākāśa sarva--_sarva gatam_gam api_api na_na upalipyate_upalip paṅka--_paṅka ādibhiḥ_ādi yathā_yathā iti_iti dṛṣṭānta--_dṛṣṭānta arthaḥ_artha spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa itarat_itara 32_32
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha atha_atha dṛṣṭāntam_dṛṣṭānta āha_ah yathā_yathā sarvatra_sarvatra paṅka--_paṅka ādiṣu_ādi api_api sthitam_sthā api_api ākāśam_ākāśa saukṣmyāt_saukṣmya asaṅga--_asaṅga tvāt_tva paṅka--_paṅka ādibhiḥ_ādi na_na lipyate_lip tathā_tathā eva_eva paramātmā_paramātman daihikaiḥ_daihika guṇaiḥ_guṇa doṣaiḥ_doṣa ca_ca na_na yujyate_yuj
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu śarīre_śarīra sthitaḥ_sthā tad--_tad dharmaiḥ_dharma kutas_kutas na_na lipyate_lip iti_iti atra_atra āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti yathā_yathā sarvatra_sarvatra paṅka--_paṅka ādau_ādi gatam_gam praviṣṭam_praviś api_api ākāśam_ākāśa saukṣmyāt_saukṣmya tad--_tad tad--_tad dharmaiḥ_dharma na_na lipyate_lip tathā_tathā ātmā_ātman jīvaḥ_jīva sarvatra_sarvatra deva--_deva mānava--_mānava ādau_ādi uccāvace_uccāvaca dehe_deha sthitaḥ_sthā api_api tad--_tad dharmaiḥ_dharma na_na lipyate_lip 32_32

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana na_na kevalam_kevala asaṅga--_asaṅga svabhāvāt_svabhāva ātmā_ātman na_na upalipyate_upalip prakāśaka--_prakāśaka tvāt_tva api_api parkāśya--_parkāśay dharmaiḥ_dharma na_na lipyate_lip iti_iti sa_sa dṛṣṭāntam_dṛṣṭānta āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti yathā_yathā raviḥ_ravi ekaḥ_eka eva_eva kṛtsnam_kṛtsna sarvam_sarva imam_idam lokam_loka deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṃghātam_saṃghāta rūpavat_rūpavat vastu--_vastu mātram_mātra iti_iti yāvat_yāvat prakāśayati_prakāśay na_na ca_ca prakāśya--_prakāśay dharmaiḥ_dharma lipyate_lip na_na vā_vā prakāśya--_prakāśay bhedāt_bheda bhidyate_bhid tathā_tathā kṣetrī_kṣetrin prakāśayati_prakāśay he_he bhārata_bhārata ataeva_ataeva na_na prakāśya--_prakāśay dharmaiḥ_dharma lipyate_lip na_na vā_vā prakāśya--_prakāśay bhedāt_bheda bhidyate_bhid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

na_na lipyate_lip śoka--_śoka duḥkhena_duḥkha bāhyaḥ_bāhya

div.l: baladevaḥ_baladeva deha--_deha dharmeṇa_dharma āliptaḥ_ālip eva_eva ātmā_ātman sva--_sva dharmeṇa_dharma deham_deha puṣṇāti_puṣ iti_iti āha_ah yathā_yathā iti_iti yathā_yathā ekaḥ_eka raviḥ_ravi imam_idam kṛtsnam_kṛtsna lokam_loka prakāśayati_prakāśay prabhayā_prabhā tathā_tathā ekaḥ_eka kṣetrī_kṣetrin jīvaḥ_jīva kṛtsnam_kṛtsna āpāda--_āpāda mastakam_mastaka idam_idam kṣetram_kṣetra deham_deha prakāśayati_prakāśay cetayati_cetay cetanayā_cetanā iti_iti evam_evam āha_ah guṇāt_guṇa vā_vā loka--_loka vat_vat

lg.l: kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña evam_evam antaram_antara jñāna--_jñāna cakṣuṣā_cakṣus
bhūta--_bhūta prakṛti--_prakṛti mokṣam_mokṣa ca_ca ye_yad viduḥ_vid yānti_yā te_tad param_para

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ evam_evam ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra kṣetra--_kṣetra ksetrajñayoḥ_ksetrajña antaram_antara bhedam_bheda viveka--_viveka jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa cakṣuṣā_cakṣus ye_yad viduḥ_vid tathā_tathā uktā_vac bhūtānām_bhūta prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti tasyāḥ_tad sakāśāt_sakāśa mokṣam_mokṣa mokṣa--_mokṣa upāyam_upāya dhyāna--_dhyāna ādikam_ādika ca_ca ye_yad

tam_tad vande_vand parama--_parama ānandam_ānanda nanda--_nanda nandanam_nandana īśvaram_īśvara

div.p:
iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī
prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣa--_puruṣa viveka--_viveka yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma trayodaśaḥ_trayodaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm adhyāya--_adhyāya artham_artha saphalam_saphala upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ kṣetra--_kṣetra iti_iti kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña prāc--_prāñc vyākhyātayoḥ_vyākhyā evam_evam uktena_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra antaram_antara paraspara--_paraspara vailakṣaṇyam_vailakṣaṇya jāḍya--_jāḍya caitanya--_caitanya vikāri--_vikārin tva--_tva nirvikāri--_nirvikārin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi rūpam_rūpa jñāna--_jñāna cakṣuṣā_cakṣus śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadeśa--_upadeśa janita--_janay bhūta--_bhūta prakṛti--_prakṛti mokṣam_mokṣa ca_ca bhūtānām_bhūta sarveṣām_sarva prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti avidyā_avidyā māyā--_māyā ākhyā_ākhyā tasyāḥ_tad paramārtha--_paramārtha ātma--_ātman vidyayā_vidyā mokṣam_mokṣa abhāva--_abhāva gamanam_gamana ca_ca ye_yad viduḥ_vid jānanti_jñā yānti_yā te_tad param_para paramārtha--_paramārtha ātma--_ātman vastu--_vastu arthaḥ_artha tat_tad evam_evam
amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi sādhana--_sādhana niṣṭhasya_niṣṭha kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña viveka--_viveka vijñānavataḥ_vijñānavat sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha nivṛttyā_nivṛtti parama--_parama puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha siddhiḥ_siddhi iti_iti siddham_sidh

iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍha--_guh artha--_artha dīpikāyām_dīpikā kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña vivekaḥ_viveka

lg.l: dvayoḥ_dvi kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña madhye_madhya jīvātmā_jīvātman kṣetra--_kṣetra dharma--_dharma bhāj_bhāj
badhyate_bandh mucyate_muc jñānāt_jñāna iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha īritaḥ_īray

trayodaśaḥ_trayodaśa ayam_idam gītāsu_gītā saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva adhyāya--_adhyāya artham_artha upasaṃharan_upasaṃhṛ tad--_tad jñāna--_jñāna phalam_phala āha_ah kṣetra--_kṣetra iti_iti kṣetreṇa_kṣetra sahitayoḥ_sahita kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña jīva--_jīva īśayoḥ_īśa evam_evam mad--_mad ukti--_ukti vidhayā_vidhā antaram_antara bhedam_bheda jñāna--_jñāna cakṣuṣā_cakṣus vaidharmya--_vaidharmya viṣayaka--_viṣayaka prajñā--_prajñā netreṇa_netra ye_yad viduḥ_vid tathābhūtānām_tathābhūta prakṛteḥ_prakṛti sakāśāt_sakāśa mokṣam_mokṣa ca_ca tad--_tad prakṛteḥ_prakṛti param_para sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa para--_para vyoma--_vyoman ākhyam_ākhyā mad--_mad padam_pada yānti_yā iti_iti

prāhuḥ_prāh saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vaicitryam_vaicitrya vistareṇa_vistara caturdaśe_caturdaśa

div.p: yāvat_yāvat sañjāyate_saṃjan kiñcid_kaścit sattvam_sattva sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamam_jaṅgama kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña saṃyogāt_saṃyoga tat_tad viddhi_vid bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha iti_iti uktam_vac sa_tad ca_ca kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajñayoḥ_kṣetrajña saṃyogaḥ_saṃyoga nirīśvara--_nirīśvara sāṅkhyānām_sāṃkhya iva_iva na_na svātantryeṇa_svātantrya kintu_kiṃtu īśvara--_īśvara icchayivā_icchā iti_iti kathana--_kathana pūrvakam_pūrvaka kāraṇam_kāraṇa guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga asya_idam sat--_as asat--_asat yoni--_yoni janmasu_janman iti_iti anena_idam uktam_vac sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi guṇīkṛtam_guṇīkṛ saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vaicitryam_vaicitrya prapañcayiṣyan_prapañcay evambhūtam_evambhūta vakṣyamānam_vac artham_artha dvābhyām_dvi jñāyate_jñā anena_idam iti_iti jñānam_jñāna upadeśaḥ_upadeśa tat_tad jñānam_jñāna bhūyas_bhūyas api_api tubhyam_tvad prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa vakṣyāmi_vac kathambhūtam_kathaṃbhūta jñānānām_jñāna tapaḥ--_tapas karma--_karman ādi--_ādi viṣayāṇām_viṣaya madhye_madhya uttamam_uttama mokṣa--_mokṣa hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva tat_tad eva_eva āha_ah yat_yad jñātvā_jñā munayaḥ_muni manana--_manana śīlāḥ_śīla sarve_sarva itas_itas deha--_deha bandhanāt_bandhana parām_para siddhim_siddhi mokṣam_mokṣa gatāḥ_gam prāptāḥ_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya yāvat_yāvat saṃjāyate_saṃjan kiṃcid_kaścit sattvam_sattva sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgamam_jaṅgama kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña saṃyogāt_saṃyoga tat_tad viddhi_vid iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra nirīśvara--_nirīśvara sāṅkhyam_sāṅkhya ati_ati nirākaraṇena_nirākaraṇa kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña saṃyogasya_saṃyoga īśvara--_īśvara adhīna--_adhīna tvam_tva vaktavyam_vac evam_evam kāraṇam_kāraṇa guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga asya_idam sat--_as asat--_asat yoni--_yoni janmasu_janman iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra kasmin_ka guṇa_guṇa katham_katham saṅgaḥ_saṅga ke_ka vā_vā guṇāḥ_guṇa katham_katham vā_vā te_tad badhnanti_bandh iti_iti vaktavyam_vac tathā_tathā bhūta--_bhūta prakṛti--_prakṛti mokṣam_mokṣa ca_ca ye_yad viduḥ_vid yānti_yā te_tad param_para iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra bhūta--_bhūta prakṛti--_prakṛti śabditebhyaḥ_śabday guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa katham_katham mokṣaṇam_mokṣaṇa syāt_as muktasya_muc ca_ca kim_ka lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa iti_iti vaktavyam_vac tat_tad etat_etad sarvam_sarva ārabhyate_ārabh tatra_tatra vakṣyamāṇam_vac artham_artha dvābhyām_dvi stuvan_stu śrotṝṇām_śrotṛ ruci--_ruci utpattaye_utpatti śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac param_para iti_iti jñāyate_jñā anena_idam jñānam_jñāna paramātma--_paramātman jñāna--_jñāna sādhanam_sādhana param_para śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha para--_para vastu--_vastu viṣaya--_viṣaya tvāt_tva kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa tat_tad jñānānām_jñāna jñāna--_jñāna sādhanānām_sādhana bahiraṅgāṇām_bahiraṅga yajña--_yajña ādīnām_ādi madhye_madhya uttamam_uttama uttama--_uttama phala--_phala tvāt_tva na_na tvam_tva āni--_ānin tva--_tva ādīnām_ādi teṣām_tad antaraṅga--_antaraṅga tvena_tva uttama--_uttama phala--_phala tvāt_tva param_param iti_iti anena_idam utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa viṣaya--_viṣaya tvam_tva uktam_vac uttamam_uttama iti_iti anena_idam tu_tu utkṛṣṭa--_utkṛṣṭa phala--_phala tvam_tva iti_iti bhedaḥ_bheda īdṛśam_īdṛśa
jñānam_jñāna aham_mad pravakṣyāmi_pravac bhūyas_bhūyas punar_punar pūrveṣu_pūrva adhyāyeṣu_adhyāya asakṛt_asakṛt uktam_vac api_api yat_yad jñānam_jñāna jñātvā_jñā anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā munayaḥ_muni manana--_manana śīlāḥ_śīla saṃnyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin sarve_sarva parām_para siddhim_siddhi mokṣa--_mokṣa ākhyām_ākhyā itas_itas deha--_deha bandhanāt_bandhana
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha

lg.l: guṇāḥ_guṇa syuḥ_as bandhakāḥ_bandhaka te_tad tu_tu phalaiḥ_phala jñeyāḥ_jñā caturdaśe_caturdaśa
guṇa--_guṇa atyaye_atyaya ciha--_ciha tatiḥ_tati hetuḥ_hetu bhaktiḥ_bhakti ca_ca varṇitā_varṇay

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya kāraṇam_kāraṇa guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga asya_idam sat--_as asat--_asat yoni--_yoni janmasu_janman iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra ke_ka guṇāḥ_guṇa kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga kasya_ka guṇasya_guṇa saṅgāt_saṅga kim_ka phalam_phala syāt_as guṇa--_guṇa yuktasya_yuj kiṃvā_kiṃvā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa katham_katham vā_vā guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa mocanam_mocana iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā vakṣyamānam_vac artham_artha stuvānaḥ_stu vaktum_vac pratijānīte_pratijñā param_para iti_iti jñāyate_jñā ænena_idam iti_iti jñānam_jñāna upadeśaḥ_upadeśa param_para atyuttamam_atyuttama

lg.l: baladevaḥ_baladeva
guṇāḥ_guṇa syuḥ_as bandhakāḥ_bandhaka te_tad tu_tu pariceyāḥ_parici phalaiḥ_phala trayaḥ_tri
mad--_mad bhaktyā_bhakti tad--_tad nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti syāt_as iti_iti proktam_pravac caturdaśe_caturdaśa

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya mithas_mithas sampṛktānām_sampṛc prakṛti--_prakṛti jīva--_jīva īśvarāṇām_īśvara svarūpāṇi_svarūpa vivicya_vivic jānan_jñā amāni--_amānin tva--_tva ādi--_ādi dharmaiḥ_dharma viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ prakṛti--_prakṛti bandhāt_bandha vimucyate_vimuc bandha--_bandha hetuḥ_hetu ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra ke_ka guṇāḥ_guṇa kasmin_ka guṇe_guṇa katham_katham saṅgaḥ_saṅga kasya_ka guṇasya_guṇa saṅgāt_saṅga kim_ka phalam_phala guṇa--_guṇa saṅginaḥ_saṅgin kiṃvā_kiṃvā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa katham_katham vā_vā guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa muktiḥ_mukti iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā vakṣyamāṇam_vac artham_artha ātma--_ātman ruci--_ruci utpattaye_utpatti

param_para pūrva--_pūrva uktāt_vac anyam_anya prakṛti--_prakṛti jīva--_jīva antargatam_antargam eva_eva guṇa--_guṇa viṣayakam_viṣayaka jñānam_jñāna bhūyas_bhūyas vakṣyāmi_vac yat_yad jñānānām_jñāna prakṛti--_prakṛti jīva--_jīva viṣayakāṇām_viṣayaka uttamam_uttama śreṣṭham_śreṣṭha navanīta--_navanīta vat_vat uddhṛta--_uddhṛ tvāt_tva yat_yad jñātvā_jñā upalabhya_upalabh sarve_sarva munayaḥ_muni tad--_tad manana--_manana śīlāḥ_śīla itas_itas loke_loka param_para ātma--_ātman yāthātmya--_yāthātmya upalabdhi--_upalabdhi lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa siddhim_siddhi gatāḥ_gam yat_yat vā_vā jñāyate_jñā anena_idam iti_iti jñānam_jñāna upadeśam_upadeśa tat_tad ca_ca prāk_prāk uktam_vac api_api bhūyas_bhūyas punar_punar vidhā--_vidhā antareṇa_antara vakṣyāmi_vac tat_tad ca_ca jñānānām_jñāna tapaḥ--_tapas prabhṛtīnām_prabhṛti jñāna--_jñāna sādhanānām_sādhana madhye_madhya param_para uttamam_uttama atyuttamam_atyuttama tad--_tad antaraṅga--_antaraṅga sādhana--_sādhana tvāt_tva yat_yad jñātvā_jñā sarve_sarva munayaḥ_muni itas_itas lokāt_loka parām_para mokṣa--_mokṣa lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa
siddhim_siddhi gatāḥ_gam
BhG 14.2

lg.l: idam_idam jñānam_jñāna upāśritya_upāśri mama_mad sādharmyam_sādharmya āgatāḥ_āgam
sarge_sarga api_api nā_na upajāyante_upajan pralaye_pralaya na_na vyathanti_vyath ca_ca

div.p: idam_idam vakṣyamāṇam_vac jñānam_jñāna upāśritya_upāśri idam_idam jñāna--_jñāna sādhanam_sādhana anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā mama_mad sādharmyam_sādharmya mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa tvam_tva prāptāḥ_prāp santaḥ_as sarge_sarga api_api brahma--_brahman ādiṣu_ādi utpādyamāneṣu_utpāday api_api na_na utpadyante_utpad tathā_tathā pralaye_pralaya api_api na_na vyathanti_vyath pralaye_pralaya duḥkham_duḥkha na_na anubhavanti_anubhū punar_punar na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tasyāḥ_tad siddhaiḥ_siddha aikāntika--_aikāntika tvam_tva darśayati_darśay idam_idam iti_iti idam_idam yathā_yathā uktam_vac jñānam_jñāna jñāna--_jñāna sādhanam_sādhana upāśritya_upāśri anuṣṭhāya_anuṣṭhā mama_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara sādharmyam_sādharmya mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa tām_tā atyanta--_atyanta abhedena_abheda āgatāḥ_āgam prāptāḥ_prāp santaḥ_as sarge_sarga api_api hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ādiṣu_ādi utpadyamāneṣu_utpad api_api na_na pralaye_pralaya brahmaṇaḥ_brahman api_api vināśa--_vināśa kāle_kāla na_na vyathanti_vyath ca_ca vyathante_vyath na_na ca_ca līyante_lī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sādharmyam_sādharmya sārūpya--_sārūpya lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa muktim_mukti na_na vyathanti_vyath na_na vyathante_vyath

baladevaḥ_baladeva idam_idam iti_iti guru--_guru upāsanayā_upāsana idam_idam vakṣyamāṇam_vac jñānam_jñāna upāśritya_upāśri prāpya_prāp janāḥ_jana sarveśasya_sarveśa mama_mad nitya--_nitya āvirbhūta--_āvirbhū guṇa--_guṇa aṣṭakasya_aṣṭaka sādharmyam_sādharmya sādhana--_sādhana āvirbhāvitena_āvirbhāvay tad--_tad aṣṭakena_aṣṭaka sāmyam_sāmya āgatāḥ_āgam santaḥ_as sarge_sarga nā_na vyathante_vyath mṛti--_mṛti karma--_karman tām_tā ca_ca na_na yānti_yā iti_iti janma--_janman mṛtyubhyām_mṛtyu rahitāḥ_rahita muktāḥ_muc bhavanti_bhū iti_iti mokṣe_mokṣa jīva--_jīva bahutvam_bahutva uktam_vac tat_tad viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu paramam_parama padam_pada sadā_sadā paśyanti_paś sūrayaḥ_sūri iti_iti ādi--_ādi śrutibhyaḥ_śruti ca_ca etat_etad avagatam_avagam
BhG 14.3

lg.l: mama_mad yoniḥ_yoni mahat_mahat brahma_brahman tasmin_tad garbham_garbha dadhāmi_dhā aham_mad
saṃbhavaḥ_sambhava sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta tatas_tatas bhavati_bhū bhārata_bhārata

div.p: kathayati_kathay deśataḥ_deśa kālataḥ_kāla ca_ca a_a paricchinna--_paricchid tvāt_tva mahat_mahat bṛṃhita--_bṛṃhay tvāt_tva sva--_sva kāryāṇām_kārya vṛddhi--_vṛddhi hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva vā_vā brahma_brahman prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad mahat_mahat brahma_brahman mama_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara yoniḥ_yoni garbhādhāna--_garbhādhāna sthānam_sthāna tasmin_tad aham_mad garbham_garbha jagat--_jagant vistāra--_vistāra hetum_hetu cit--_cit ābhāsam_ābhāsa dadhāmi_dhā nikṣipāmi_nikṣip pralaye_pralaya mayi_mad līnam_lī santam_as avidyā--_avidyā kāma--_kāma karma--_karman anuśaya--_anuśaya vantam_vat kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi samaye_samaya bhoga--_bhoga yogyena_yogya kṣetreṇa_kṣetra saṃyojayāmi_saṃyojay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatas_tatas garbhādhānāt_garbhādhāna sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta brahma--_brahman ādīnām_ādi sambhavaḥ_sambhava utpattiḥ_utpatti bhavati_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad evam_evam praśaṃśayā_praśaṃśā śrotāram_śrotṛ abhimukhīkṛtya_abhimukhīkṛ parameśvara--_parameśvara adhīnayoḥ_adhīna prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣayoḥ_puruṣa sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta utpattim_utpatti prati_prati hetutvam_hetutva na_na tu_tu sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya siddhānta--_siddhānta vat_vat svatantrayoḥ_svatantra iti_iti imam_idam vivakṣitam_vivakṣita dvābhyām_dvi

sarva--_sarva kārya--_kārya apekṣayā_apekṣā adhika--_adhika tvāt_tva kāraṇam_kāraṇa mahat_mahat sarva--_sarva kāryāṇām_kārya vṛddhi--_vṛddhi hetu--_hetu tva--_tva rūpāt_rūpa bṛṃhaṇa--_bṛṃhaṇa tvāt_tva brahma_brahman avyākṛtam_avyākṛta prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti māyā_māyā mahat_mahat brahma_brahman tat_tad ca_ca mama_mad īśvarasya_īśvara yoniḥ_yoni garbhādhāna--_garbhādhāna sthānam_sthāna tasmin_tad mahati_mahat brahmaṇi_brahman yonau_yoni garbham_garbha sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta janma--_janman kāraṇam_kāraṇa aham_mad bahu_bahu syām_as prajāyeya_prajan iti_iti īkṣaṇa--_īkṣaṇa rūpam_rūpa saṃkalpam_saṃkalpa dadhāmi_dhā dhārayāmi_dhāray tad--_tad yathā_yathā hi_hi kaścid_kaścit pitā_pitṛ putram_putra anuśayinam_anuśayin vrīhi--_vrīhi ādi--_ādi āhāra--_āhāra rūpeṇa_rūpa svasmin_sva līnam_lī śarīreṇa_śarīra yojayitum_yojay yonau_yoni retaḥ--_retas seka--_seka pūrvakam_pūrvaka garbham_garbha ādhatte_ādhā tasmāt_tasmāt ca_ca garbhādhānāt_garbhādhāna sa_tad putraḥ_putra śarīreṇa_śarīra yujyate_yuj tad--_tad artham_artha ca_ca madhye_madhya kalala--_kalala ādi--_ādi avasthāḥ_avasthā bhavanti_bhū tathā_tathā pralaye_pralaya mayi_mad līnam_lī avidiyā--_avidiyā kāma--_kāma karma--_karman anuśayavantam_anuśayavat kṣetrajñam_kṣetrajña sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi samaye_samaya bhogyena_bhuj kṣetreṇa_kṣetra kārya--_kārya kāraīṃa--_kāraīṃa saṃghātena_saṃghāta yojayitum_yojay cit--_cit ābhāsa--_ābhāsa ākhya--_ākhya retaḥ--_retas seka--_seka pūrvakam_pūrvaka māyā--_māyā vṛtti--_vṛtti tad--_tad artham_artha hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ādīnām_ādi bhavati_bhū he_he bhārata_bhārata na_na tu_tu īśvara--_īśvara kṛta--_kṛ garbhādhānam_garbhādhāna vinā_vinā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah bṛṃhaṇāt_bṛṃhaṇa kārya--_kārya rūpeṇa_rūpa vṛddheḥ_vṛddhi hetoḥ_hetu brahma_brahman prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śrutau_śruti api_api kvacid_kvacid prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti brahma_brahman iti_iti nirdiśyate_nirdiś tasmin_tad aham_mad garbham_garbha dadhāmi_dhā ādadhāmi_ādhā itas_itas tu_tu anyām_anya prakṛtim_prakṛti viddhi_vid me_mad parām_para jīva--_jīva bhūtām_bhū iti_iti anena_idam cetana--_cetana puñja--_puñja rūpā_rūpa yā_yad jīva--_jīva prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti taṭastha--_taṭastha śakti--_śakti rūpā_rūpa nirdiṣṭā_nirdiś sā_tad sakala--_sakala prāṇi--_prāṇin jīvatayā_jīvatā garbha--_garbha śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac tatas_tatas mad--_mad kṛtāt_kṛ garbhādhānāt_garbhādhāna sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta brahma--_brahman ādīnām_ādi sambhavaḥ_sambhava utpattiḥ_utpatti

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad evam_evam vaktavya--_vac artha--_artha stutyā_stuti tasmin_tad rucim_ruci śrotuḥ_śrotṛ utpādya_utpāday bhūmiḥ_bhūmi āpaḥ_ap iti_iti ādi--_ādi dvaya--_dvaya artha--_artha anusārāt_anusāra yāvat_yāvat sañjāyate_saṃjan kiñcid_kaścit iti_iti ādau_ādi prakṛti--_prakṛti jīva--_jīva saṃyogam_saṃyoga pareśa--_pareśa hetukam_hetuka abhimatam_abhiman iha_iha mahat_mahant sarvasya_sarva prapañcasya_prapañca kāraṇam_kāraṇa brahma_brahman abhivyakta--_abhivyañj sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi guṇakam_guṇaka pradhānam_pradhāna mama_mad sarveśvarsya_sarveśvara aṇḍa--_aṇḍa koṭi--_koṭi sraṣṭuḥ_sraṣṭṛ yoniḥ_yoni garbha--_garbha dhāraṇa--_dhāraṇa sthānam_sthāna bhavati_bhū pradhāne_pradhāna brahma--_brahman śabdaḥ_śabda ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt etat_etad brahma_brahman nāma--_nāman rūpam_rūpa annam_anna ca_ca jāyate_jan iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tasmin_tad mahati_mahat brahmaṇi_brahman yoni--_yoni bhūte_bhū garbham_garbha paramāṇu--_paramāṇu caitanya--_caitanya rāśim_rāśi aham_mad dadhāmi_dhā arpayāmi_arpay bhūmiḥ_bhūmi āpaḥ_ap iti_iti ādinā_ādi yā_yad jaḍā_jaḍa prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti uktā_vac sā_tad iha_iha mahat_mahat brahma_brahman iti_iti ucyate_vac itas_itas tu_tu anyām_anya iti_iti ādinā_ādi yā_yad cetanā_cetanā prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti uktā_vac sā_tad iha_iha sarva--_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin bīja--_bīja tvāt_tva garbha--_garbha śabdena_śabda iti_iti bhoga--_bhoga kṣetra--_kṣetra bhūtayā_bhū jaḍayā_jaḍa prakṛtyā_prakṛti saha_saha cetana--_cetana bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ vargam_varga saṃyojayāmi_saṃyojay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatas_tatas mahat--_mahat hetukāt_hetuka prakṛti--_prakṛti dvaya--_dvaya saṃyogāt_saṃyoga garbhādhānāt_garbhādhāna vā_vā sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi stamba--_stamba antānām_anta sambhavaḥ_sambhava janiḥ_jani bhavati_bhū
BhG 14.4

lg.l: sarva--_sarva yoniṣu_yoni kaunteya_kaunteya mūrtayaḥ_mūrti saṃbhavanti_sambhū yāḥ_yad
tāsām_tad brahma_brahman mahat_mahat yoniḥ_yoni aham_mad bīja--_bīja pradaḥ_prada pitā_pitṛ

div.p: api_api tu_tu sarvadā_sarvadā eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah sarva--_sarva iti_iti sarvāsu_sarva yoniṣu_yoni manuṣya--_manuṣya ādyāsu_ādya yāḥ_yad mūrtayaḥ_mūrti sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgama--_jaṅgama ātmikāḥ_ātmaka utpadyante_utpad tāsām_tad mūrtīnām_mūrti mahat_mahat brahma_brahman prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti yoniḥ_yoni mātṛ--_mātṛ sthānīyā_sthānīya aham_mad ca_ca bīja--_bīja pradaḥ_prada pitā_pitṛ garbhādhāna--_garbhādhāna kartā_kartṛ pitā_pitṛ

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana nanu_nanu katham_katham sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta tatas_tatas sambhavaḥ_sambhava deva--_deva ādi--_ādi deha--_deha viśeṣāṇām_viśeṣa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa antara--_antara sambhavāt_sambhava iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah sarva--_sarva yoniṣu_yoni iti_iti deva--_deva pitṛ--_pitṛ manuṣya--_manuṣya paśu--_paśu mṛga--_mṛga ādi--_ādi sarva--_sarva yoniṣu_yoni yāḥ_yad mūrtayaḥ_mūrti jarāyu--_jarāyu ja--_ja aṇḍa--_aṇḍa udbhid--_udbhid ja--_ja ādi--_ādi bhedena_bheda vilakṣaṇāḥ_vilakṣaṇa vividha--_vividha saṃsthānāḥ_saṃsthāna tanavaḥ_tanu saṃbhavanti_sambhū he_he kaunteya_kaunteya tāsām_tad mūrtīnām_mūrti tat_tad tat_tad mātṛ--_mātṛ sthānīyā_sthānīya aham_mad parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara bīja--_bīja pradaḥ_prada garbhādhānasya_garbhādhāna kartā_kartṛ pitā_pitṛ tena_tena mahataḥ_mahant brahmaṇaḥ_brahman eva_eva avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa antarāṇi_antara iti_iti yuktam_yuj uktam_vac sambhavaḥ_sambhava sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta tatas_tatas bhavati_bhū iti_iti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha na_na kevalam_kevala sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi utpatti--_utpatti samaye_samaya eva_eva sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti mātā_mātṛ aham_mad pitā_pitṛ api_api tu_tu sarvadā_sarvadā eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah sarvāsu_sarva yoniṣu_yoni deva--_deva ādyāsu_ādya stamba--_stamba paryantāsu_paryanta yāḥ_yad mūrtayaḥ_mūrti jaṅgama--_jaṅgama sthāvara--_sthāvara brahma_brahman prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti yoniḥ_yoni utpatti--_utpatti sthānam_sthāna mātā_mātṛ aham_mad bīja--_bīja pradaḥ_prada garbhādhāna--_garbhādhāna kartā_kartṛ pitā_pitṛ

baladevaḥ_baladeva sarva--_sarva iti_iti he_he kaunteya_kaunteya sarva--_sarva yoniṣu_yoni deva--_deva ādi--_ādi sthāvara--_sthāvara antāsu_anta yoniṣu_yoni yāḥ_yad mūrtayaḥ_mūrti tanavaḥ_tanu sambhavanti_sambhū tāsām_tad mahat_mahat brahma_brahman pradhānam_pradhāna yoniḥ_yoni utpatti--_utpatti hetuḥ_hetu mātā_mātṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha bhavāmi_bhū
BhG 14.5

lg.l: sattvam_sattva rajaḥ_rajas tamaḥ_tamas iti_iti guṇāḥ_guṇa prakṛti--_prakṛti saṃbhavāḥ_sambhava
nibadhnanti_nibandh mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu dehe_deha dehinam_dehin avyayam_avyaya

div.p:
prapañcayati_prapañcay sattvam_sattva iti_iti ādi_ādi caturdaśabhiḥ_caturdaśan sattvam_sattva rajaḥ_rajas tamaḥ_tamas iti_iti evam_evam saṃjñakāḥ_saṃjñaka trayaḥ_tri guṇāḥ_guṇa prakṛti--_prakṛti sambhavāḥ_sambhava prakṛteḥ_prakṛti sambhavaḥ_sambhava udbhavaḥ_udbhava yeṣām_yad te_tad tathā_tathā uktāḥ_vac gūna--_gūna sāmyam_sāmya prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti tasyāḥ_tad sakāśāt_sakāśa santaḥ_as prakṛti--_prakṛti kārye_kārya dehe_deha tādātmyena_tādātmya sthitam_sthā dehinam_dehin cit--_cit aṃśam_aṃśa vastutas_vastutas avyayam_avyaya nirvikāram_nirvikāra eva_eva santam_as
nibadhnanti_nibandh sva--_sva kāryaiḥ_kārya sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha ādibhiḥ_ādi saṃyojayanti_saṃyojay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

idānīm_idānīm kasmin_ka guṇe_guṇa saṅgaḥ_saṅga ke_ka vā_vā guṇāḥ_guṇa katham_katham vā_vā te_tad badhnanti_bandh iti_iti ucyate_vac sattvam_sattva iti_iti ādinā_ādi anyam_anya iti_iti atas_atas prāk_prāk caturdaśabhiḥ_caturdaśan sattvam_sattva rajaḥ_rajas tamaḥ_tamas iti_iti evaṃ_evaṃ nāmānaḥ_nāman guṇāḥ_guṇa nitya--_nitya paratantrāḥ_paratantra puruṣam_puruṣa prati_prati sarveṣām_sarva acetanānām_acetana cetanā--_cetanā artha--_artha tvāt_tva na_na tu_tu vaiśeṣikāṇām_vaiśeṣika rūpa--_rūpa ādi--_ādi vat_vat dravya--_dravya āśritāḥ_āśri guṇa--_guṇa guṇinoḥ_guṇin anya--_anya tvam_tva vivakṣitam_vivakṣita guṇa--_guṇa traya--_traya ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva prakṛteḥ_prakṛti tarhi_tarhi katham_katham prakṛti--_prakṛti sambhavāḥ_sambhava iti_iti ucyate_vac trayāṇām_tri guṇānām_guṇa sāmya--_sāmya avasthā_avasthā prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti māyā_māyā bhagavataḥ_bhagavant tasyāḥ_tad sakāśāt_sakāśāt paraspara--_paraspara aṅgāṅgi--_aṅgāṅgin bhāvena_bhāva vaiṣamyeṇa_vaiṣamya pariṇatāḥ_pariṇam prakṛti--_prakṛti sambhavāḥ_sambhava iti_iti ucyante_vac te_tad ca_ca dehe_deha prakṛti--_prakṛti kārye_kārya śarīra--_śarīra indriya--_indriya saṃghāte_saṃghāta dehinam_dehin deha--_deha tādātmya--_tādātmya adhyāsa--_adhyāsa āpannam_āpad jīvam_jīva paramārthataḥ_paramārtha sarva--_sarva vikāra--_vikāra śūnyatvena_śūnyatva avyayam_avyaya nibadhnanti_nibandh nirvikāram_nirvikāra eva_eva santam_as sva--_sva vikāravattayā_vikāravattā divi_div sthitam_sthā ādityam_āditya pratibimba--_pratibimba adhyāsena_adhyāsa sva--_sva kampa--_kampa ādimat--_ādimat tayā_tā yathā_yathā ca_ca pāramarthikaḥ_pāramarthika bandhaḥ_bandha na_na asti_as tathā_tathā vyākhyātam_vyākhyā prāk_prāñc śarīra--_śarīra sthaḥ_stha api_api kaunteya_kaunteya na_na karoti_kṛ na_na lipyate_lip iti_iti

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tat_tad eva_eva prakṛti--_prakṛti puruṣābhyām_puruṣa sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta utpattim_utpatti ke_ka guṇāḥ_guṇa ucyante_vac teṣu_tad saṅgāt_saṅga jīvasya_jīva kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa bandhaḥ_bandha iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah sattvam_sattva iti_iti dehe_deha prakṛti--_prakṛti kārye_kārya tādātmyena_tādātmya sthitam_sthā dehinam_dehin jīvam_jīva vastutas_vastutas avyayam_avyaya nirvikāram_nirvikāra asaṅginam_asaṅgin api_api anādi--_anādi avidyayā_avidyā kṛtāt_kṛ guṇa--_guṇa saṅgāt_saṅga eva_eva hetoḥ_hetu guṇāḥ_guṇa nibadhnanti_nibandh

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha ke_ka guṇāḥ_guṇa katham_katham teṣu_tad puruṣasya_puruṣa saṅgaḥ_saṅga katham_katham vā_vā te_tad tam_tad nibadhnanti_nibandh iti_iti āha_ah sattvam_sattva iti_iti caturbhiḥ_catur sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi saṃjñakāḥ_saṃjñaka trayaḥ_tri guṇāḥ_guṇa prakṛti--_prakṛti sambhavāḥ_sambhava prakṛteḥ_prakṛti abhivyaktāḥ_abhivyañj te_tad sva--_sva kārye_kārya dehe_deha sthitam_sthā puruṣam_puruṣa avyayam_avyaya vastutas_vastutas nirvikāram_nirvikāra api_api nibadhnanti_nibandh aviveka--_aviveka gṛhītaiḥ_grah sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha mohaiḥ_moha
BhG 14.6

lg.l: tatra_tatra sattvam_sattva nirmala--_nirmala tvāt_tva prakāśakam_prakāśaka anāmayam_anāmaya
sukha--_sukha saṅgena_saṅga badhnāti_bandh jñāna--_jñāna saṅgena_saṅga ca_ca anagha_anagha

div.p: āha_ah tatra_tatra teṣām_tad guṇānām_guṇa madhye_madhya sattvam_sattva nirmala--_nirmala tvāt_tva svaccha--_svaccha tvāt_tva sphaṭika--_sphaṭika maṇiḥ_maṇi iva_iva prakāśakam_prakāśaka bhāsvaram_bhāsvara anāmayam_anāmaya ca_ca nirupadravam_nirupadrava śāntam_śam iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atas_atas śānta--_śam tvāt_tva sva--_sva kāryeṇa_kārya sukhena_sukha yaḥ_yad saṅgaḥ_saṅga tena_tad badhnāti_bandh prakāśaka--_prakāśaka tvāt_tva ca_ca sva--_sva kāryeṇa_kārya jñānena_jñāna yaḥ_yad saṅgaḥ_saṅga tena_tad ca_ca badhnāti_bandh he_he anagha_anagha niṣpāpa_niṣpāpa aham_mad sukhī_sukhin jñānī_jñānin ca_ca iti_iti manaḥ--_manas dharmān_dharma tad--_tad abhimānini_abhimānin kṣetrajñe_kṣetrajña saṃyojayati_saṃyojay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tatra_tatra kaḥ_ka guṇaḥ_guṇa kena_ka saṅgena_saṅga badhnāti_bandh ucyate_vac tatra_tatra iti_iti tatra_tatra teṣu_tad guṇeṣu_guṇa madhye_madhya sattvam_sattva prakāśakam_prakāśaka caitanyasya_caitanya tamaḥ_tamas guṇa--_guṇa kṛta--_kṛ āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa tirodhāyakam_tirodhāyaka nirmala--_nirmala tvāt_tva svaccha--_svaccha tvāt_tva cit--_cit bimba--_bimba grahaṇa--_grahaṇa yogya--_yogya tvāt_tva iti_iti yāvat_yāvat na_na kevalam_kevala caitanya--_caitanya abhivyañjakam_abhivyañjaka kintu_kiṃtu anāmayam_anāmaya āmayaḥ_āmaya duḥkham_duḥkha tad--_tad virodhi_virodhin sukhasya_sukha api_api vyañjakam_vyañjaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad badhnāti_bandh sukha--_sukha saṅgena_saṅga dehinam_dehin anagha_anagha avyasana_avyasana sambodhanānām_sambodhana abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya uktaḥ_vac smartavyaḥ_smṛ atra_atra sukha--_sukha jñāna--_jñāna śabdābhyām_śabda antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa pariṇāmau_pariṇāma tad--_tad vyañjakau_vyañjaka ucyete_vac icchā_icchā dveṣaḥ_dveṣa sukham_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha saṃghātaḥ_saṃghāta cetanā_cetanā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti iti_iti sukha--_sukha cetanayoḥ_cetanā api_api icchā--_icchā ādi--_ādi vat_vat kṣetra--_kṣetra dharma--_dharma tvena_tva pāṭhāt_pāṭha tatra_tatra antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa dharmasya_dharma sukhasya_sukha jñānasya_jñāna ca_ca ātmani_ātman adhyāsaḥ_adhyāsa saṅgaḥ_saṅga aham_mad jāne_jñā iti_iti ca_ca na_na hi_hi viṣaya--_viṣaya dharmaḥ_dharma viṣayiṇaḥ_viṣayin bhavati_bhū tasmāt_tasmāt avidyā--_avidyā mātram_mātra etat_etad iti_iti śataśas_śataśas uktam_vac prāk_prāk

āha_ah anāmayam_anāmaya nirupadravam_nirupadrava śāntam_śam iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śānta--_śam tvāt_tva sva--_sva kāryeṇa_kārya sukhena_sukha yaḥ_yad saṅgaḥ_saṅga prakāśaka--_prakāśaka tvāt_tva sva--_sva kāryeṇa_kārya jñānena_jñāna ca_ca yaḥ_yad saṅgaḥ_saṅga aham_mad sukhī_sukhin jñānī_jñānin ca_ca iti_iti upādhi--_upādhi dharmayoḥ_dharma avidyayā_avidyā eva_eva jīvasya_jīva abhimānaḥ_abhimāna tena_tad tam_tad badhnāti_bandh he_he anagha_anagha iti_iti tvam_tvad tu_tu aham_mad sukhī_sukhin aham_mad jñānī_jñānin iti_iti abhimāna--_abhimāna lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa agham_agha mā_mā svīkuḥ_svīkṛ iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha sattva--_sattva ādīnām_ādi trayāṇām_tri lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa bandhaka--_bandhaka tva--_tva prakārān_prakāra ca_ca āha_ah tatra_tatra iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri tatra_tatra teṣu_tad triṣu_tri madhye_madhya prakāśakam_prakāśaka jñāna--_jñāna vyañjakam_vyañjaka anāmayam_anāmaya arogam_aroga duḥkha--_duḥkha virodhi--_virodhin sukha--_sukha vyañjakam_vyañjaka iti_iti yāvat_yāvat kutas_kutas nirmala--_nirmala tvāt_tva svaccha--_svaccha tvāt_tva tathā_tathā ca_ca prakāśa--_prakāśa sukha--_sukha kāraṇam_kāraṇa sattvam_sattva iti_iti tat_tad ca_ca sattvam_sattva sva--_sva kārye_kārya jñāne_jñāna sukhe_sukha ca_ca yaḥ_yad saṃyogaḥ_saṃyoga jñānī_jñānin aham_mad sukhī_sukhin aham_mad iti_iti abhimānaḥ_abhimāna tena_tad puruṣam_puruṣa nibadhnāti_nibandh jñānam_jñāna ca_ca idam_idam laukika--_laukika vastu--_vastu yāthātmya--_yāthātmya viṣayam_viṣaya sukham_sukha ca_ca deha--_deha indriya--_indriya prasada--_prasada rūpam_rūpa bodhyam_budh tatra_tatra tatra_tatra saṅge_saṅga sati_as tad--_tad upāyeṣu_upāya karmasu_karman pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti tad--_tad phala--_phala anubhava--_anubhava upāyeṣu_upāya deheṣu_deha utpattiḥ_utpatti punar_punar ca_ca tatra_tatra tatra_tatra saṅgaḥ_saṅga iti_iti na_na sattvāt_sattva vimuktiḥ_vimukti
BhG 14.7

lg.l: rajaḥ_rajas rāga--_rāga ātmakam_ātmaka viddhi_vid tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā saṅga--_saṅga samudbhavam_samudbhava
tat_tad nibadhnāti_nibandh kaunteya_kaunteya karma--_karman saṅgena_saṅga dehinam_dehin

div.p: āha_ah rajaḥ--_rajas saṃjñakam_saṃjñaka guṇam_guṇa rāga--_rāga ātmakam_ātmaka anurañjana--_anurañjana rūpam_rūpa viddhi_vid ataeva_ataeva tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā saṅga--_saṅga samudbhavam_samudbhava tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā prāpteḥ_prāpti arthe_artha abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa sagagaḥ_sagaga prāpte_prāp arthe_artha prītiḥ_prīti viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa āsaktiḥ_āsakti tayoḥ_tad tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā saṅgayoḥ_saṅga samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava yasmāt_yasmāt tat_tad rajaḥ_rajas dehinam_dehin dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa artheṣu_artha karmasu_karman saṅgena_saṅga āsaktyā_āsakti nitarām_nitarām badhnāti_bandh tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā saṅgābhyām_saṅga hi_hi karmasu_karman āsaktiḥ_āsakti bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana rajyate_rañj viṣayeṣu_viṣaya puruṣaḥ_puruṣa anena_idam iti_iti rāgaḥ_rāga kāmaḥ_kāma gardhaḥ_gardha saḥ_tad eva_eva ātmā_ātman svarūpam_svarūpa yasya_yad dharma--_dharma dharmitṇoḥ_dharmitṛ tādātmyāt_tādātmya tat_tad rāga--_rāga ātmakam_ātmaka rajaḥ_rajas viddhi_vid atas_atas eva_eva aprāpta--_aprāpta abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā prāptasya_prāp upasthite_upasthā api_api vināśe_vināśa saṃrakṣaṇa--_saṃrakṣaṇa abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa āsaṅgaḥ_āsaṅga tayoḥ_tad tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā āsaṅgayoḥ_āsaṅga sambhavaḥ_sambhava yasmāt_yasmāt tat_tad rajaḥ_rajas nibadhnāti_nibandh he_he kaunteya_kaunteya karma--_karman saṅgena_saṅga karmasu_karman dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa artheṣu_artha aham_mad karomi_kṛ etat_etad phalam_phala bhokṣye_bhuj iti_iti abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa dehinam_dehin vastutas_vastutas akartāram_akartṛ eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāninam_abhimānin rajasaḥ_rajas pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha rajaḥ--_rajas guṇam_guṇa rāga--_rāga ātmakam_ātmaka anurañjana--_anurañjana rūpam_rūpa viddhi_vid tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā a_a prāpte_prāp arthe_artha abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa saṅgaḥ_saṅga prāpte_prāp arthe_artha āsaktiḥ_āsakti tayoḥ_tad samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava yasmāt_yasmāt tat_tad rajaḥ_rajas dehinam_dehin dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa artheṣu_artha karmasu_karman saṅgena_saṅga āsaktyā_āsakti badhnāti_bandh tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā saṅgābhyām_saṅga karmasu_karman āsaktiḥ_āsakti bhavati_bhū

tat_tad ca_ca tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā ādi--_ādi samudbhavam_samudbhava śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa tṛṣṇā_tṛṣṇā putra--_putra mitra--_mitra ādi--_ādi saṃyogaḥ_saṃyoga abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa saṅgaḥ_saṅga tayoḥ_tad sambhavaḥ_sambhava yasmāt_yad tat_tad tathā_tathā ca_ca rāga--_rāga tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā saṅga--_saṅga kāraṇam_kāraṇa rajaḥ_rajas iti_iti tat_tad rajaḥ_rajas strī--_strī viṣaya--_viṣaya putra--_putra ādi--_ādi karmasu_karman saṅgena_saṅga abhilāṣeṇa_abhilāṣa dehinam_dehin puruṣam_puruṣa nibadhnāti_nibandh strī--_strī ādi--_ādi spṛhayā_spṛhā karmāṇi_karman karoti_kṛ tāni_tad tad--_tad phala--_phala anubhava--_anubhava upāya--_upāya bhūtān_bhū strī--_strī ādīn_ādi prāpayanti_prāpay punar_punar api_api evam_evam iti_iti rajasaḥ_rajas na_na vimuktiḥ_vimukti
BhG 14.8

lg.l: tamaḥ_tamas tu_tu ajñāna--_ajñāna jam_ja viddhi_vid mohanam_mohana sarva--_sarva dehinām_dehin
pramāda--_pramāda ālasya--_ālasya nidrābhiḥ_nidrā tat_tad nibadhnāti_nibandh bhārata_bhārata

div.p: āha_ah tamaḥ_tamas tu_tu ajñānāt_ajñāna jātam_jan āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa śakti--_śakti pradhānāt_pradhāna prakṛti--_prakṛti aṃśāt_aṃśa udbhutam_udbhuta viddhi_vid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atas_atas sarveṣām_sarva dehinām_dehin mohanam_mohana bhrānti--_bhrānti janakam_janaka ataeva_ataeva pramādena_pramāda ālasyena_ālasya nidrayā_nidrā ca_ca tat_tad tamaḥ_tamas dehinam_dehin nibadhnāti_nibandh tatra_tatra pramādaḥ_pramāda anavadhānam_anavadhāna ālasyam_ālasya anudyamaḥ_anudyama nidrā_nidrā cittasya_citta avasādāt_avasāda layaḥ_laya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda sattva--_sattva raja--_raja upekṣayā_upekṣā viśeṣa--_viśeṣa dyotana--_dyotana arthaḥ_artha ajñānāt_ajñāna āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa śakti--_śakti rūpāt_rūpa udbhūtam_udbhū ajñāna--_ajñāna jam_ja tamaḥ_tamas viddhi_vid atas_atas sarveṣām_sarva dehinām_dehin mohanam_mohana aviveka--_aviveka rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva bhrānti--_bhrānti janakam_janaka pramādena_pramāda ālasyena_ālasya nidrayā_nidrā ca_ca tat_tad tamaḥ_tamas nibadhnāti_nibandh dehinam_dehin iti_iti anuṣajyate_anuṣañj he_he bhārata_bhārata
pratītam_pratī anumitam_anumā bhavati_bhū _

baladevaḥ_baladeva tamaḥ_tamas tu_tu iti_iti tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda pūrva--_pūrva dvitīyāt_dvitīya viśeṣa--_viśeṣa dyotakaḥ_dyotaka tasmāt_tad jātam_jan tamaḥ_tamas sarva--_sarva dehinām_dehin mohanam_mohana viparyaya--_viparyaya jñāna--_jñāna janakam_janaka tathā_tathā ca_ca vastu--_vastu yāthātmya--_yāthātmya jñāna--_jñāna āvarakam_āvaraka viparyaya--_viparyaya jñāna--_jñāna janakam_janaka tamaḥ_tamas iti_iti tat_tad tamaḥ_tamas pramāda--_pramāda ādibhiḥ_ādi sva--_sva kāryaiḥ_kārya puruṣam_puruṣa nibadhnāti_nibandh tatra_tatra pramādaḥ_pramāda anavadhānam_anavadhāna akārye_akārya karmaṇi_karman pravṛtti--_pravṛtti rūpam_rūpa sattva--_sattva kārya--_kārya prakāśa--_prakāśa virodhī_virodhin ālasyam_ālasya anudyamaḥ_anudyama rajaḥ--_rajas kārya--_kārya pravṛtti--_pravṛtti virodhi_virodhin tad--_tad ubhaya--_ubhaya virodhinī_virodhin tu_tu nidrā_nidrā cittasya_citta avasāda--_avasāda ātmā_ātman iti_iti
BhG 14.9

lg.l: sattvam_sattva sukhe_sukha saṃjayati_saṃji rajaḥ_rajas karmaṇi_karman bhārata_bhārata
jñānam_jñāna āvṛtya_āvṛ tu_tu tamaḥ_tamas pramāde_pramāda saṃjayati_saṃji uta_uta

div.p: āha_ah sattvam_sattva sukhe_sukha sañjayati_sañjay saṃśleṣayati_saṃśleṣay duḥkha--_duḥkha śoka--_śoka ādi--_ādi kāraṇe_kāraṇa sabhā_sabhā api_api sukha--_sukha abhimukham_abhimukha eva_eva dehinam_dehin karoti_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam sukha--_sukha ādi--_ādi kāraṇe_kāraṇa sati_as api_api rajaḥ_rajas karmaṇi_karman eva_eva sañjayati_sañjay tamaḥ_tamas tu_tu mahat--_mahat saṅgena_saṅga utpādyamānam_utpāday api_api jñānam_jñāna āvṛtya_āvṛ ācchādya_ācchāday pramāde_pramāda sañjayati_sañjay mahadbhiḥ_mahat upadiśyamānasya_upadiś arthasya_artha anavadhāne_anavadhāna yojayati_yojay uta_uta api_api ālasya--_ālasya ādau_ādi api_api saṃyojayati_saṃyojay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha uktam_vac eva_eva artham_artha saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa punar_punar darśayati_darśay sattvam_sattva kartṛ_kartṛ sukhe_sukha svīya--_svīya phale_phala āsaktam_āsañj jīvam_jīva sañjayati_sañjay vaśīkaroti_vaśīkṛ nibadhnāti_nibandh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha rajaḥ--_rajas kartṛ--_kartṛ karmāṇi_karman āsaktam_āsañj jīvam_jīva badhnāti_bandh tamaḥ_tamas kartṛ_kartṛ pramāde_pramāda abhiratam_abhiram tam_tad jñānam_jñāna āvṛtya_āvṛ ajñānam_ajñāna utpādya_utpāday iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva guṇāḥ_guṇa svāni_sva advaya--_advaya utkṛṣṭāḥ_utkṛṣṭa santaḥ_as sva--_sva kārye_kārya tanvanti_tan iti_iti āha_ah sattvam_sattva iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi sattvam_sattva utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa sat_as sva--_sva kārye_kārya sukhe_sukha puruṣam_puruṣa sañjayati_sañjay āsaktam_āsañj karoti_kṛ rajaḥ_rajas utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa sat_as karmāṇi_karman tam_tad sañjayati_sañjay tamaḥ_tamas utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa sat_as pramāde_pramāda tam_tad sañjayati_sañjay jñānam_jñāna āvṛtya_āvṛ ācchādya_ācchāday ajñānam_ajñāna utpādya_utpāday iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: rajaḥ_rajas tamaḥ_tamas ca_ca abhibhūya_abhibhū sattvam_sattva bhavati_bhū bhārata_bhārata
rajaḥ_rajas sattvam_sattva tamaḥ_tamas ca_ca eva_eva tamaḥ_tamas sattvam_sattva rajaḥ_rajas tathā_tathā

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tatra_tatra hetum_hetu āha_ah rajaḥ_rajas iti_iti rajaḥ_rajas tamaḥ_tamas ca_ca iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa dvayam_dvaya abhibhūya_abhibhū tiraskṛtya_tiraskṛ sattvam_sattva bhavati_bhū adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa vaśāt_vaśa udbhavati_udbhū tatas_tatas sva--_sva kārye_kārya sukha--_sukha jñāna--_jñāna ādau_ādi sañjayati_sañjay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha evam_evam rajaḥ_rajas api_api sattvam_sattva tamaḥ_tamas ca_ca iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa dvayam_dvaya abhibhūya_abhibhū udbhavati_udbhū tatas_tatas sva--_sva kārye_kārya tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā karma--_karman ādau_ādi sañjayati_sañjay evam_evam tamaḥ_tamas api_api sattvam_sattva rajaḥ_rajas ca_ca ubhau_ubh api_api guṇau_guṇa abhibhūya_abhibhū udbhavati_udbhū tatas_tatas ca_ca sva--_sva kārye_kārya pramāda--_pramāda ālasya--_ālasya ādau_ādi sañjayati_sañjay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana uktam_vac kāryam_kārya kadā_kadā kurvanti_kṛ guṇāḥ_guṇa ucyate_vac rajaḥ_rajas tamaḥ_tamas ca_ca yugapad_yugapad ubhau_ubh api_api guṇau_guṇa abhibhūya_abhibhū sattvam_sattva bhavati_bhū udbhavati_udbhū vardhate_vṛdh yadā_yadā tadā_tadā sva--_sva kāryam_kārya prāc--_prāñc uktam_vac asādhāraṇyena_asādhāraṇya karoti_kṛ iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa evam_evam rajaḥ_rajas api_api sattvam_sattva tamaḥ_tamas ca_ca iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa dvayam_dvaya abhibhūya_abhibhū udbhavati_udbhū yadā_yadā tadā_tadā sva--_sva kāryam_kārya prāc--_prāñc uktam_vac karoti_kṛ tathā_tathā tadvat_tadvat eva_eva tamaḥ_tamas api_api sattvam_sattva rajaḥ_rajas ca_ca iti_iti ubhau_ubh api_api guṇau_guṇa abhibhūya_abhibhū udbhavati_udbhū yadā_yadā tadā_tadā sva--_sva kāryam_kārya prāc--_prāñc uktam_vac karoti_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

prabhavanti_prabhū āha_ah bhavati_bhū udbhavati_udbhū evam_evam rajaḥ_rajas api_api sattvam_sattva tamaḥ_tamas ca_ca iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa dvaya--_dvaya abhibhūya_abhibhū tādṛśa--_tādṛśa adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa vaśāt_vaśa udbhavati_udbhū tamaḥ_tamas api_api sattvam_sattva rajaḥ_rajas ca_ca ubhau_ubh api_api guṇau_guṇa abhibhūya_abhibhū udbhavati_udbhū

baladevaḥ_baladeva sameṣu_sama triṣu_tri katham_katham akasmāt_akasmāt ekasya_eka utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa iti_iti ced_ced prācīna--_prācīna tādṛśa--_tādṛśa karma--_karman udayāt_udaya tādṛśa--_tādṛśa āhārāt_āhāra ca_ca bhavavān_bhavavat āha_ah rajaḥ_rajas iti_iti sattvam_sattva kartṛ_kartṛ rajaḥ_rajas tamaḥ_tamas ca_ca abhibhūya_abhibhū u_u tiraskṛtya_tiraskṛ utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa bhavati_bhū rajaḥ_rajas kartṛ_kartṛ sattvam_sattva tamaḥ_tamas ca_ca abhibhūya_abhibhū utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa bhavati_bhū tamaḥ_tamas kartṛ_kartṛ sattvam_sattva rajaḥ_rajas ca_ca abhibhūya_abhibhū utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa bhavati_bhū yadā_yadā utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa bhavati_bhū tadā_tadā pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa kāryam_kārya karoti_kṛ iti_iti śeṣaḥ_śeṣa

lg.l: sarva--_sarva dvāreṣu_dvāra dehe_deha asmin_idam prakāśaḥ_prakāśa upajāyate_upajan
jñānam_jñāna yadā_yadā tadā_tadā vidyāt_vid vivṛddham_vivṛdh sattvam_sattva iti_iti uta_uta

div.p: āha_ah asmin_idam ātmanaḥ_ātman bhogāyatane_bhogāyatana dehe_deha sarveṣu_sarva api_api dvāreṣu_dvāra śrotra--_śrotra ādiṣu_ādi yadā_yadā śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi jñāna--_jñāna ātmakaḥ_ātmaka prakāśaḥ_prakāśa upajāyate_upajan utpadyate_utpad tadā_tadā anena_idam prakāśa--_prakāśa liṅgena_liṅga sattvam_sattva vivṛddham_vivṛdh vidyāt_vid jānīyāt_jñā uta_uta śabdāt_śabda sukha--_sukha ādi--_ādi liṅgena_liṅga api_api jānīyāt_jñā iti_iti uktam_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm udbhūtānām_udbhū teṣām_tad liṅgāni_liṅga āha_ah tribhiḥ_tri sarva--_sarva dvāreṣu_dvāra iti_iti asmin_idam ātmanaḥ_ātman bhogāyatane_bhogāyatana dehe_deha sarveṣu_sarva api_api dvāreṣu_dvāra upalabdhi--_upalabdhi sādhaneṣu_sādhana śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi karaṇeṣu_karaṇa yadā_yadā prakāśaḥ_prakāśa buddhi--_buddhi pariṇāma--_pariṇāma viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa viṣaya--_viṣaya ākāraḥ_ākāra sva--_sva viṣaya--_viṣaya āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa virodhī_virodhin dīpa--_dīpa vat_vat tat_tad śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi viṣaya--_viṣaya jñāna--_jñāna ākhya--_ākhya prakāśena_prakāśa liṅgena_liṅga prakāśa--_prakāśa ātmakam_ātmaka sattvam_sattva vivṛddham_vivṛdh udbhūtam_udbhū iti_iti vidyāt_vid jānīyāt_jñā uta_uta api_api sukha--_sukha ādi--_ādi liṅgena_liṅga api_api jānīyāt_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

itarau_itara abhivaati_abhivan atas_atas teṣām_tad vṛddhi--_vṛddhi liṅgāni_liṅga āha_ah sarvā_sarva iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri sarva--_sarva dvāreṣu_dvāra śrotra--_śrotra ādiṣu_ādi prakāśaḥ_prakāśa syāt_as kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa jñānam_jñāna vaidika--_vaidika śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi yathārtha--_yathārtha jñāna--_jñāna ātmakam_ātmaka tadā_tadā tādṛśa--_tādṛśa jñāna--_jñāna liṅgena_liṅga eva_eva sattvam_sattva vivṛddham_vivṛdh iti_iti jānīyāt_jñā ud_ud śabdāt_śabda ātma--_ātman uttha--_uttha sukhāt_sukha ātmakaḥ_ātmaka prakāśaḥ_prakāśa ca_ca yadā_yadā iti_iti

baladevaḥ_baladeva utkṛṣṭānām_utkṛṣṭa sattva--_sattva ādīnām_ādi liṅgāni_liṅga āha_ah sarva--_sarva iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri yadā_yadā sarveṣu_sarva jñāna--_jñāna dvāreṣu_dvāra śrotra--_śrotra ādiṣu_ādi śabda--_śabda ādi--_ādi yāthātmya--_yāthātmya prakāśa--_prakāśa rūpam_rūpa jñānam_jñāna upajāyate_upajan tadā_tadā tādṛśa--_tādṛśa jñāna--_jñāna liṅgena_liṅga asmin_idam dehe_deha sattvam_sattva vivṛddham_vivṛdh vidyāt_vid uta_uta iti_iti api_api arthe_artha sukha--_sukha liṅgena_liṅga api_api tat_tad vidyāt_vid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: lobhaḥ_lobha pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti ārambhaḥ_ārambha karmaṇām_karman aśamaḥ_aśama spṛhā_spṛhā
rajasi_rajas etāni_etad jāyante_jan vivṛddhe_vivṛdh bharata--_bharata ṛṣabha_ṛṣabha

div.p: lobhaḥ_lobha dhana--_dhana ādi--_ādi āgame_āgama jāyamāne_jan api_api punar_punar punar_punar vardhamānaḥ_vṛdh abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti nityam_nityam kurvat--_kṛ rūpa--_rūpa tā_tā karmaṇām_karman ārambhaḥ_ārambha mahā--_mahat gṛha--_gṛha ādi--_ādi nirmāṇa--_nirmāṇa udyamaḥ_udyama kariṣyāmi_kṛ spṛhā_spṛhā uccāvaceṣu_uccāvaca dṛṣṭa--_dṛś mātreṣu_mātra vastuṣu_vastu itas_itas tatas_tatas jighṛkṣā_jighṛkṣā rajasi_rajas vivṛddhe_vivṛdh sati_as etāni_etad liṅgāni_liṅga jāyante_jan etaiḥ_etad tamasaḥ_tamas vivṛddhiḥ_vivṛddhi iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana mahati_mahat dhana--_dhana āgame_āgama jāyamāne_jan api_api anukṣaṇam_anukṣaṇam vardhamānaḥ_vṛdh tad--_tad abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa lobhaḥ_lobha sva--_sva viṣaya--_viṣaya prāpsya--_prāp nivartyaḥ_nivṛt icchā--_icchā viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa iti_iti yāvat_yāvat pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti nirantaram_nirantaram prayata--_prayam mānasā_mānasa ārambhaḥ_ārambha karmaṇām_karman bahu--_bahu vitta--_vitta vyaya--_vyaya āyāsa--_āyāsa karāṇām_kara kāmya--_kāmya niṣiddha--_niṣidh laukika--_laukika mahā--_mahat gṛha--_gṛha ādi--_ādi viṣayāṇām_viṣaya vyāpārāṇām_vyāpāra udyamaḥ_udyama aśamaḥ_aśama idam_idam kṛtvā_kṛ idam_idam kariṣyāmi_kṛ iti_iti saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa pravāha--_pravāha anuparamaḥ_anuparama spṛhā_spṛhā uccāvaceṣu_uccāvaca para--_para dhaneṣu_dhana dṛṣṭa--_dṛś mātreṣu_mātra yena_yad kena_ka api_api upāyena_upāya upāditsā_upāditsā rajasi_rajas rāga--_rāga ātmake_ātmaka vivṛddhe_vivṛdh etāni_etad rāga--_rāga ātmakāni_ātmaka liṅgāni_liṅga jāyante_jan he_he bharata--_bharata liṅgaiḥ_liṅga vivṛddham_vivṛdh
rajaḥ_rajas jānīyāt_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva lobhaḥ_lobha sva--_sva dravya--_dravya atyāga--_atyāga para--_para tā_tā karmaṇām_karman gṛha--_gṛha nirmāṇa--_nirmāṇa ādīnām_ādi ārambhaḥ_ārambha spṛhā_spṛhā viṣaya--_viṣaya lipsā_lipsā etaiḥ_etad liṅgaiḥ_liṅga rajaḥ_rajas vivṛddham_vivṛdh vidyāt_vid

lg.l: aprakāśaḥ_aprakāśa apravṛttiḥ_apravṛtti ca_ca pramādaḥ_pramāda mohaḥ_moha eva_eva ca_ca
tamasi_tamas etāni_etad jāyante_jan vivṛddhe_vivṛdh kuru--_kuru nandana_nandana

div.p: apravṛttiḥ_apravṛtti anudyamaḥ_anudyama mohaḥ_moha mithyā_mithyā abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa tamasi_tamas vivṛddhe_vivṛdh sati_as etāni_etad liṅgāni_liṅga jāyante_jan etaiḥ_etad tamasaḥ_tamas vivṛddhim_vivṛddhi jānīyāt_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sati_as apravṛttiḥ_apravṛtti ca_ca sati_as api_api agnihotram_agnihotra juhuyāt_hu iti_iti ādau_ādi pravṛtti--_pravṛtti kāraṇam_kāraṇa janita--_janay bodhe_bodha api_api śāstre_śāstra sarvathā_sarvathā tad--_tad pravṛtti--_pravṛtti ayogya--_ayogya tvam_tva pramādaḥ_pramāda tad--_tad kāla--_kāla kartavya--_kṛ tvena_tva prāptasya_prāp arthasya_artha anusandhāna--_anusaṃdhāna abhāvaḥ_abhāva mohaḥ_moha eva_eva ca_ca mohaḥ_moha nidrā_nidrā viparyayaḥ_viparyaya vā_vā cau_cu samuccaye_samuccaya tamasi_tamas eva_eva vivṛddhe_vivṛdh etāni_etad liṅgāni_liṅga jāyante_jan he_he kuru--_kuru nandana_nandana atas_atas etaiḥ_etad liṅgaiḥ_liṅga avayabhicāribhiḥ_avayabhicārin vivṛddham_vivṛdh tamaḥ_tamas jānīyāt_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
asti_as _

baladevaḥ_baladeva aprakāśaḥ_aprakāśa jñāna--_jñāna abhāvaḥ_abhāva śāstra--_śāstra avihita--_avihita viṣaya--_viṣaya graha--_graha rūpaḥ_rūpa apravṛttiḥ_apravṛtti kriyā--_kriyā vimukha--_vimukha tā_tā pramādaḥ_pramāda kara--_kara ādi--_ādi sthe_stha api_api arthe_artha na_na asti_as iti_iti pratyayaḥ_pratyaya mohaḥ_moha mithyā_mithyā abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa etaiḥ_etad

lg.l: yadā_yadā sattve_sattva pravṛddhe_pravṛdh tu_tu pralayam_pralaya yāti_yā dehabhṛt_dehabhṛt
tadā_tadā uttama--_uttama vidām_vid lokān_loka amalān_amala pratipadyate_pratipad

div.p: āha_ah pravṛddhe_pravṛdh sati_as yadā_yadā jīvaḥ_jīva mṛtyum_mṛtyu prāpnoti_prāp tadā_tadā uttamān_uttama hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ādīn_ādi vidanti_vid upāsate_upās iti_iti uttama--_uttama vidaḥ_vid teṣām_tad ye_yad amalāḥ_amala prakāśa--_prakāśa mayāḥ_maya lokāḥ_loka sukha--_sukha upabhoga--_upabhoga sthāna--_sthāna viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa tān_tad

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm maraṇa--_maraṇa samaye_samaya vivṛddhānām_vivṛdh sattva--_sattva ādīnām_ādi phala--_phala viśeṣam_viśeṣa āha_ah yadā_yadā iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi sattve_sattva pravṛddhe_pravṛdh sati_as yadā_yadā pralayam_pralaya mṛtyum_mṛtyu yāti_yā prāpnoti_prāp deha--_deha bhṛt_bhṛt deha--_deha abhimānī_abhimānin jīvaḥ_jīva tadā_tadā uttamāḥ_uttama ye_yad hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ādayaḥ_ādi tad--_tad vidām_vid tad--_tad upāsakānām_upāsaka lokān_loka deva--_deva sukha--_sukha upabhoga--_upabhoga sthāna--_sthāna pratipadyate_pratipad prāpnoti_prāp
yāti_yā prāpnoti_prāp vindanti_vid labhante_labh

baladevaḥ_baladeva mṛti--_mṛti kāle_kāla vivṛddhānām_vivṛdh guṇānām_guṇa phala--_phala viśeṣān_viśeṣa āha_ah yat_yad ā_ā iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi sattve_sattva pravṛddhe_pravṛdh sati_as yadā_yadā deha--_deha bhṛt_bhṛt jīvaḥ_jīva pralayam_pralaya yāti_yā mriyate_mṛ tadā_tadā uttama--_uttama vidām_vid hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ādi--_ādi upāsakānām_upāsaka lokān_loka divya--_divya bhoga--_bhoga upetān_upe pratipadyate_pratipad labhate_labh amalān_amala rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas mala--_mala hīnān_hā

lg.l: rajasi_rajas pralayam_pralaya gatvā_gam karma--_karman saṅgiṣu_saṅgin jāyate_jan
tathā_tathā pralīnaḥ_pralī tam_tad asi_as mūḍha--_muh yoniṣu_yoni jāyata_jan

div.p: jāyate_jan sati_as jāyate_jan

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana rajasi_rajas pravṛddhe_pravṛdh sati_as pralayam_pralaya mṛtyum_mṛtyu gatvā_gam prāpya_prāp karma--_karman saṅgiṣu_saṅgin śruti--_śruti smṛti--_smṛti vihita--_vidhā pratiṣiddha--_pratiṣidh karma--_karman phala--_phala adhikāriṣu_adhikārin manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya jāyate_jan tathā_tathā tadvat_tadvat eva_eva tamasi_tamas pravṛddhe_pravṛdh pralīnaḥ_pralī mṛtaḥ_mṛ mūḍha--_muh yoniṣu_yoni paśu--_paśu ādiṣu_ādi jāyate_jan

baladevaḥ_baladeva rajasi_rajas pravṛddhe_pravṛdh pralayam_pralaya maraṇam_maraṇa gatvā_gam janaḥ_jana karma--_karman saṅgiṣu_saṅgin kāmya--_kāmay karma--_karman āsakteṣu_āsañj nṛṣu_nṛ madhye_madhya jāyate_jan tathā_tathā tamasi_tamas pravṛddhe_pravṛdh pralīnaḥ_pralī mṛtaḥ_mṛ janaḥ_jana mūḍha--_muh yoniṣu_yoni paśu--_paśu ādiṣu_ādi

lg.l: karmaṇaḥ_karman su_su kṛtasya_kṛ āhuḥ_ah sāttvikam_sāttvika nirmalam_nirmala phalam_phala
rajasaḥ_rajas tu_tu phalam_phala duḥkham_duḥkha ajñānam_ajñāna tamasaḥ_tamas phalam_phala

div.p: āha_ah su_su kṛtasya_kṛ sāttvikasya_sāttvika karmaṇaḥ_karman sāttvikam_sāttvika sattva--_sattva pradhānam_pradhāna nirmalam_nirmala prakāśa--_prakāśa bahulam_bahula sukham_sukha phalam_phala āhuḥ_ah kapila--_kapila ādayaḥ_ādi rajasaḥ_rajas iti_iti rājasasya_rājasa karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha karma--_karman phala--_phala kathanasya_kathana prakṛta--_prakṛ tvāt_tva tasya_tad duḥkham_duḥkha phalam_phala āhuḥ_ah tamasaḥ_tamas iti_iti tāmasasya_tāmasa karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tasya_tad ajñānam_ajñāna mūḍha--_muh tvam_tva phalam_phala āhuḥ_ah sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi karma--_karman lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa ca_ca niyatam_niyam saṅga--_saṅga rahitam_rahita iti_iti ādinā_ādi aṣṭādaśe_aṣṭādaśa adhyāye_adhyāya vakṣyati_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm sva--_sva anurūpa--_anurūpa karma--_karman dvārā_dvār sattva--_sattva ādīnām_ādi vicitra--_vicitra phalatām_phalatā saṃkṣipya_saṃkṣip āha_ah karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti su_su kṛtasya_kṛ sāttvikasya_sāttvika karmaṇaḥ_karman dharmasya_dharma sāttvikam_sāttvika sattvena_sattva nirvṛttam_nirvṛt nirmalam_nirmala rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas mala--_mala āmiśritam_āmiśray sukham_sukha phalam_phala āhuḥ_ah parama--_parama ṛṣayau_ṛṣi rajasaḥ_rajas rājasasya_rājasa tu_tu karmaṇaḥ_karman pāpa--_pāpa miśrasya_miśra puṇyasya_puṇya phalam_phala rājasam_rājasa duḥkham_duḥkha duḥkha--_duḥkha bahulam_bahula alpam_alpa sukham_sukha kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ānurūpyāt_ānurūpya kāryasya_kārya ajñānam_ajñāna aviveka--_aviveka prāyam_prāya duḥkham_duḥkha tāmasam_tāmasa tamasaḥ_tamas tāmasasya_tāmasa karmaṇaḥ_karman adharmasya_adharma phalam_phala āhuḥ_ah iti_iti anuṣajyate_anuṣañj sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi karma--_karman lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa ca_ca niyatam_niyam saṅga--_saṅga rahitam_rahita iti_iti ādinā_ādi aṣṭādaśe_aṣṭādaśa vakṣyati_vac atra_atra rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas śabdau_śabda tad--_tad kārye_kārya prayuktau_prayuj kārya--_kārya kāraṇayoḥ_kāraṇa abheda--_abheda upacārāt_upacāra gobhiḥ_go śrīṇīta_śrī matsaram_matsara iti_iti atra_atra yathā_yathā go--_go śabdaḥ_śabda tad--_tad prabhave_prabhava payasi_payas yathā_yathā vā_vā dhānyam_dhānya asi_as dhinuhi_dhi devān_deva iti_iti atra_atra taṇḍule_taṇḍula tatra_tatra payaḥ_payas taṇḍulayoḥ_taṇḍula iva_iva atra_atra api_api karmaṇaḥ_karman prakṛta--_prakṛ tvāt_tva
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha su_su kṛtasya_kṛ sāttvikasya_sāttvika karmaṇaḥ_karman sāttvikam_sāttvika eva_eva nirmalam_nirmala nirupadravam_nirupadrava ajñānam_ajñāna acetana--_acetana tā_tā

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha guṇānām_guṇa sva--_sva anurūpa--_anurūpa karma--_karman dvārā_dvār āha_ah karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti su_su kṛtasya_kṛ sāttvikasya_sāttvika karmaṇaḥ_karman nirmalam_nirmala phalam_phala āhuḥ_ah guṇa--_guṇa svabhāva--_svabhāva vidaḥ_vid munayaḥ_muni mala--_mala duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha rūpa--_rūpa rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas phala--_phala lakṣaṇāt_lakṣaṇa nirgatam_nirgam sukham_sukha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad ca_ca sāttvikam_sāttvika sattvena_sattva nirvṛttam_nirvṛt rajasaḥ_rajas rājasasya_rājasa karmaṇaḥ_karman phalam_phala duḥkham_duḥkha kāryasya_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ānurūpyāt_ānurūpya duḥkha--_duḥkha pracuram_pracura kiñcid_kaścit sukham_sukha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tamaḥ_tamas tāmasasya_tāmasa karmaṇaḥ_karman hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādeḥ_ādi phalam_phala ajñāna--_ajñāna caitanya--_caitanya prāyam_prāya duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra rajaḥ--_rajas tamah--_tamas śabdābhyām_śabda rājasa--_rājasa tāmasa--_tāmasa karmaṇī_karman lakṣye_lakṣay gobhiḥ_go prīṇita--_prīṇay matsaram_matsara iti_iti atra_atra yathā_yathā go--_go śabdena_śabda go--_go payaḥ_payas lakṣyate_lakṣay sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi karmaṇām_karman lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa aṣṭādaśe_aṣṭādaśa vakṣyante_vac niyatam_niyam saṅga--_saṅga rahitam_rahita iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi

lg.l: sattvāt_sattva saṃjāyate_saṃjan jñānam_jñāna rajasaḥ_rajas lobhaḥ_lobha eva_eva ca_ca
pramāda--_pramāda mohau_moha tamasaḥ_tamas bhavataḥ_bhū ajñānam_ajñāna eva_eva ca_ca

div.p: āha_ah sattvāt_sattva jñānam_jñāna sañjāyate_saṃjan sāttvikasya_sāttvika karmaṇaḥ_karman prakāśa--_prakāśa bahulam_bahula sukham_sukha phalam_phala bhavati_bhū rajasaḥ_rajas lobhaḥ_lobha jāyate_jan tasya_tad ca_ca duḥkha--_duḥkha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva tad--_tad pūrvakasya_pūrvaka karmaṇaḥ_karman duḥkham_duḥkha phalam_phala bhavati_bhū tamasaḥ_tamas tu_tu pramāda--_pramāda moha--_moha ajñānāni_ajñāna bhavanti_bhū tatas_tatas tāmasasya_tāmasa karmaṇaḥ_karman ajñāna--_ajñāna prāpakam_prāpaka phalam_phala bhavati_bhū iti_iti yuktam_yuj eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etādṛśa--_etādṛśa phala--_phala vaicitrye_vaicitrya pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac eva_eva hetum_hetu āha_ah sattvāt_sattva iti_iti sarva--_sarva karaṇa--_karaṇa dvārakam_dvāraka prakāśa--_prakāśa rūpam_rūpa jñānam_jñāna sattvāt_sattva saṃjāyate_saṃjan atas_atas tad--_tad anurūpam_anurūpa sāttvikasya_sāttvika karmaṇaḥ_karman prakāśa--_prakāśa bahulam_bahula sukham_sukha phalam_phala bhavati_bhū rajasaḥ_rajas lobhaḥ_lobha viṣaya--_viṣaya koṭi--_koṭi prāptyā_prāpti api_api nivartayitum_nivartay aśakyaḥ_aśakya abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa jāyate_jan tasya_tad ca_ca nirantaram_nirantaram upacīyamānasya_upaci pūrayitum_pūray aśakyasya_aśakya sarvadā_sarvadā duḥkha--_duḥkha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva tad--_tad pūrvakasya_pūrvaka rājasasya_rājasa karmaṇaḥ_karman duḥkham_duḥkha phalam_phala bhavati_bhū evam_evam pramāda--_pramāda mohau_moha tamasaḥ_tamas sakāśāt_sakāśāt bhavataḥ_bhū jāyete_jan ajñānam_ajñāna bhavati_bhū atas_atas tāmasasya_tāmasa karmaṇaḥ_karman tāmasam_tāmasa ajñāna--_ajñāna ādi--_ādi prāyam_prāya eva_eva phalam_phala bhavati_bhū iti_iti yuktam_yuj eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha atra_atra ca_ca ajñānam_ajñāna aprakāśaḥ_aprakāśa pramādaḥ_pramāda mohaḥ_moha ca_ca aprakāśaḥ_aprakāśa apravṛttiḥ_apravṛtti ca_ca iti_iti atra_atra vyākhyātau_vyākhyā
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva īdṛś--_īdṛś phala--_phala vaicitrye_vaicitrya prāk_prāk uktam_vac eva_eva hetum_hetu āha_ah sattvāt_sattva iti_iti sattvāt_sattva prakāśa--_prakāśa lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa jñānam_jñāna jāyate_jan atas_atas sāttvikasya_sāttvika karmaṇaḥ_karman prakāśa--_prakāśa pracuram_pracura sukham_sukha phalam_phala rajasaḥ_rajas lobhaḥ_lobha tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa yaḥ_yad viṣaya--_viṣaya koṭibhiḥ_koṭi api_api abhisevitaiḥ_abhisev duṣpūraḥ_duṣpūra tasya_tad ca_ca duḥkha--_duḥkha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva tad--_tad pūrvakasya_pūrvaka karmaṇaḥ_karman duḥkha--_duḥkha pracuram_pracura kiñcid_kaścit sukham_sukha phalam_phala tamasaḥ_tamas tu_tu pramāda--_pramāda ādīni_ādi bhavanti_bhū atas_atas tad--_tad pūrvakasya_pūrvaka karmaṇaḥ_karman acaitanya--_acaitanya pracuram_pracura duḥkham_duḥkha eva_eva phalam_phala

lg.l: ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam gacchanti_gam sattva--_sattva sthāḥ_stha madhye_madhya tiṣṭhanti_sthā rājasāḥ_rājasa
jaghanya--_jaghanya guṇa--_guṇa vṛtta--_vṛtta sthāḥ_stha adhas_adhas gacchanti_gam tāmasāḥ_tāmasa
