div.p: āha_ah sattva--_sattva sthāḥ_stha sattva--_sattva vṛtti--_vṛtti pradhānāḥ_pradhāna ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam gacchanti_gam sattva--_sattva utkarṣa--_utkarṣa tāratamyāt_tāratamya manuṣya--_manuṣya gandharva--_gandharva pitṛ--_pitṛ deva--_deva ādi--_ādi lokān_loka satya--_satya loka--_loka paryantān_paryanta prāpnuvanti_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha rājasāḥ_rājasa tu_tu tṛṣṇā--_tṛṣṇā ādi--_ādi ākulāḥ_ākula madhye_madhya tiṣṭhanti_sthā manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka utpadyante_utpad jaghanyaḥ_jaghanya nikṛṣṭaḥ_nikṛṣṭa tamaḥ--_tamas guṇaḥ_guṇa tasya_tad vṛttiḥ_vṛtti pramāda--_pramāda moha--_moha ādiḥ_ādi atra_atra sthitāḥ_sthā adhas_adhas gacchanti_gam tamasaḥ_tamas vṛtti--_vṛtti tāratamyāt_tāratamya tāmisra--_tāmisra ādiṣu_ādi nirayeṣu_niraya utpadyante_utpad

āha_ah atra_atra tṛtīye_tṛtīya guṇe_guṇa vṛtta--_vṛtta śabda--_śabda yogāt_yoga ādyayoḥ_ādya api_api vṛttam_vṛtta eva_eva vivakṣitam_vivakṣita tena_tena sattvasthāḥ_sattvastha sattva--_sattva vṛtte_vṛtta śāstrīye_śāstrīya jñāne_jñāna karmaṇi_karman ca_ca niratāḥ_niram ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam satya--_satya loka--_loka paryantam_paryanta deva--_deva lokam_loka gacchanti_gam te_tad deveṣu_deva utpadyante_utpad jñāna--_jñāna karma--_karman tāratamyena_tāratamya tathā_tathā madhye_madhya manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka puṇya--_puṇya pāpa--_pāpa miśre_miśra tiṣṭhanti_sthā na_na tu_tu ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam gacchanti_gam adhas_adhas vā_vā manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya utpadyante_utpad rājasāḥ_rājasa rajaḥ--_rajas guṇa--_guṇa vṛtte_vṛt lobha--_lobha ādi--_ādi pūrvake_pūrvaka rājase_rājasa karmaṇi_karman niratāḥ_niram jaghanya--_jaghanya guṇa--_guṇa vṛtta--_vṛtta sthāḥ_stha jaghanyasya_jaghanya guṇa--_guṇa dvaya--_dvaya apekṣayā_apekṣā paścāt_paścāt bhāvinaḥ_bhāvin nikṛṣṭasya_nikṛṣṭa tamasaḥ_tamas guṇasya_guṇa vṛtte_vṛtta nidrā--_nidrā ālasya--_ālasya ādau_ādi sthitāḥ_sthā adhas_adhas gacchanti_gam paścāt_paścāt iṣu_idam utpadyante_utpad kadācid_kadācid jaghanya--_jaghanya guṇa--_guṇa vṛtta--_vṛtta sthāḥ_stha sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika rājasāḥ_rājasa ca_ca bhavanti_bhū atas_atas āha_ah tāmasāḥ_tāmasa sarvadā_sarvadā tamaḥ--_tamas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna itareṣām_itara kadācid_kadācid tad--_tad vṛtta--_vṛtta stha--_stha tve_tva api_api na_na tad--_tad pradhāna--_pradhāna tā_tā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
gacchanti_gam yānti_yā

āha_ah tamasi_tamas vṛtti--_vṛtti śabdāt_śabda itarayoḥ_itara ca_ca vṛttiḥ_vṛtti vivakṣitā_vivakṣita sattva--_sattva sthāḥ_stha sattva--_sattva vṛtti--_vṛtti niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā sattva--_sattva tāratamyena_tāratamya ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam satya--_satya loka--_loka paryantam_paryanta gacchanti_gam rājasāḥ_rājasa rajaḥ--_rajas vṛtti--_vṛtti niṣṭhāḥ_niṣṭhā madhye_madhya puṇya--_puṇya pāpa--_pāpa miśrite_miśray manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka tiṣṭhanti_sthā manuṣyāḥ_manuṣya eva_eva bhavanti_bhū rajaḥ--_rajas tāratamyena_tāratamya jaghanyaḥ_jaghanya sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas apekṣayā_apekṣā nikṛṣṭaḥ_nikṛṣṭa yaḥ_yad guṇaḥ_guṇa tamaḥ--_tamas saṃjñaḥ_saṃjñā tad--_tad vṛttau_vṛtti pramāda--_pramāda ādau_ādi sthitāḥ_sthā tu_tu adhas_adhas gacchanti_gam tamaḥ--_tamas tāratamyena_tāratamya paśu--_paśu pakṣi--_pakṣin sthāvara--_sthāvara ādi--_ādi yonim_yoni labhante_labh tāmasāḥ_tāmasa iti_iti uktiḥ_ukti teṣām_tad sarvadā_sarvadā tamasi_tamas sthitim_sthiti vyanakti_vyañj

lg.l: na_na anyam_anya guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa kartāram_kartṛ yadā_yadā drṣṭā_drṣṭṛ anupaśyati_anupaś
guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa ca_ca param_para vetti_vid mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva saḥ_tad adhigacchati_adhigam

div.p: darśayati_darśay yadā_yadā tu_tu draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ vivekī_vivekin bhūtvā_bhū buddhi--_buddhi ādi--_ādi ākāra--_ākāra pariṇatebhyaḥ_pariṇam guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa anyam_anya kartāram_kartṛ na_na anupaśyati_anupaś api_api tu_tu guṇe_guṇa eva_eva karmāṇi_karman kurvanti_kṛ iti_iti paśyati_paś guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa ca_ca param_para vyatiriktam_vyatiric tad--_tad sākṣiṇam_sākṣin ātmānam_ātman vetti_vid sa_tad tu_tu mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva brahmatvam_brahmatva adhigacchati_adhigam prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana asmin_idam adhyāye_adhyāya vaktavya--_vac tvena_tva prastutam_prastu artha--_artha trayam_traya tatra_tatra kṣetra--_kṣetra kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña saṃyogasya_saṃyoga īśvara--_īśvara adhīna--_adhīna tvam_tva ke_ka vā_vā guṇāḥ_guṇa katham_katham vā_vā te_tad badhnanti_bandh iti_iti artha--_artha dvayam_dvaya uktam_vac adhunā_adhunā tu_tu guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa katham_katham mokṣaṇam_mokṣaṇa muktasya_muc ca_ca kim_ka lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa iti_iti vaktavyam_vac avaśiṣyate_avaśiṣ tatra_tatra mithyā_mithyā jñāna--_jñāna ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva guṇānām_guṇa samyak_samyak jñānāt_jñāna tebhyaḥ_tad mokṣaṇam_mokṣaṇa iti_iti āha_ah na_na anyam_anya iti_iti guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa viṣaya--_viṣaya ākāra--_ākāra pariṇatebhyaḥ_pariṇam anyam_anya kartāram_kartṛ yadā_yadā draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ vicāra--_vicāra kuśalaḥ_kuśala san_as anupaśyati_anupaś vicāram_vicāra anu_anu na_na paśyati_dṛś guṇāḥ_guṇa eva_eva antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa bahiṣkaraṇa--_bahiṣkaraṇa śarīra--_śarīra viṣaya--_viṣaya guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad avasthā--_avasthā viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣa pariṇatebhyaḥ_pariṇam param_para guṇa--_guṇa tad--_tad kārya--_kārya a_a saṃspṛṣṭam_saṃspṛś tad--_tad bhāsakam_bhāsaka ādityam_āditya iva_iva jala--_jala tad--_tad kampa--_kampa ādi--_ādi a_a saṃspṛṣṭam_saṃspṛś nirvikāram_nirvikāra sarva--_sarva sākṣiṇam_sākṣin sarvatra_sarvatra samam_sama mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa tām_tā sa_tad draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ adhigacchati_adhigam

guṇa--_guṇa kṛtam_kṛ saṃsāram_saṃsāra darśayitvā_darśay guṇa--_guṇa atītam_atī mokṣam_mokṣa darśayati_darśay na_na anyam_anya iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa kartṛ--_kartṛ karaṇ--_karaṇ viṣaya--_viṣaya ākāreṇa_ākāra pariṇatebhyaḥ_pariṇam anyam_anya kartāram_kartṛ draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ jīvaḥ_jīva yadā_yadā na_na anupaśyati_anupaś kintu_kiṃtu guṇāḥ_guṇa eva_eva sadā_sadā eva_eva kartāraḥ_kartṛ iti_iti evam_evam anupaśyati_anupaś anubhavati_anubhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa param_para vyatirikam_vyatirikta eva_eva ātmānam_ātman vetti_vid tadā_tadā sa_tad draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva mayi_mad sāyujyam_sāyujya adhigacchati_adhigam prāpnoti_prāp tatra_tatra tādṛśa--_tādṛśa jñāna--_jñāna anantaram_anantaram api_api mayi_mad parām_para bhaktim_bhakti kṛtvā_kṛ eva_eva iti_iti upānta--_upānta śloka--_śloka artha--_artha dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi jñeyam_jñā

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_evam guṇa--_guṇa vivekāt_viveka saṃsāram_saṃsāra uktvā_vac tad--_tad vivekāt_viveka mokṣam_mokṣa āha_ah na_na anyam_anya iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ tattva--_tattva yāthātmya--_yāthātmya darśī_darśin jīvaḥ_jīva yadā_yadā deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ātmanā_ātman pariṇatebhyaḥ_pariṇam guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa anyam_anya kartāram_kartṛ na_na anupaśyati_anupaś guṇān_guṇa kartīn_kartṛ paśyati_dṛś ātmānam_ātman guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa parama--_parama kartāram_kartṛ vetti_vid tadā_tadā sa_tad mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva adhigacchati_adhigam ayam_idam āśayaḥ_āśaya na_na khalu_khalu vijñānānandaḥ_vijñānānanda viśuddhaḥ_viśuddha jīvaḥ_jīva yuddha--_yuddha yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi duḥkha--_duḥkha maya--_maya karmaṇām_karman kartā_kartṛ kintu_kiṃtu guṇa--_guṇa maya--_maya deha--_deha indriyavān_indriyavat eva_eva san_as tathā_tathā iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa hetuka--_hetuka tvāt_tva guṇa--_guṇa niṣṭham_niṣṭha tad--_tad yadā_yadā anupaśyati_anupaś tadā_tadā mad--_mad bhāvam_bhāva asaṃsāri--_asaṃsārin tvam_tva mad--_mad para--_para bhaktim_bhakti vā_vā labhate_labh iti_iti purā_purā api_api etat_etad abhāṣi_bhāṣ iha_iha guṇa--_guṇa hetukam_hetuka kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva śuddhasya_śuddha niṣiddham_niṣidh na_na tu_tu śuddha--_śuddha niṣṭham_niṣṭha iti_iti tasya_tad draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ iti_iti ādinā_ādi uktam_vac

lg.l: guṇān_guṇa etān_etad atītya_atī trīn_tri dehī_dehin deha--_deha samudbhavān_samudbhava
janma--_janman mṛtyu--_mṛtyu jarā--_jarā duḥkhaiḥ_duḥkha vimuktaḥ_vimuc amṛtam_amṛta aśnute_aś

div.p: bhavati_bhū āha_ah deha--_deha ādi--_ādi ākāraḥ_ākāra samudbhavaḥ_samudbhava pariṇāmaḥ_pariṇāma yeṣām_yad te_tad deha--_deha samudbhavāḥ_samudbhava tān_tad etām_etad trīn_tri api_api guṇān_guṇa atītya_atī atikramya_atikram tad--_tad kṛtaiḥ_kṛ janma--_janman ādibhiḥ_ādi vimuktaḥ_vimuc san_as amṛtam_amṛta aśnute_aś parama--_parama ānandam_ānanda prāpnoti_prāp

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana katham_katham adhigacchati_adhigam iti_iti ucyate_vac guṇān_guṇa iti_iti guṇān_guṇa etān_etad māyā--_māyā ātmakāḥ_ātmaka trīn_tri sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas nāmnaḥ_nāman deha--_deha samudbhavān_samudbhava deha--_deha utpatti--_utpatti bīja--_bīja bhūtān_bhū atītya_atī jīvan_jīv eva_eva tattva--_tattva jñānena_jñāna bādhitvā_bādh janma--_janman mṛtyu--_mṛtyu jarā--_jarā duḥkhaiḥ_duḥkha janmanā_janman mṛtyunā_mṛtyu jarayā_jarā vimuktaḥ_vimuc jīvan_jīv eva_eva tad--_tad sambandha--_sambandha śūnyaḥ_śūnya san_as vidvān_vid amṛtam_amṛta mokṣam_mokṣa aśnute_aś prāpnoti_prāp
div.l: āha_ah
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva mad--_mad bhāva--_bhāva padena_pada uktam_vac artham_artha sphuṭayati_sphuṭay guṇān_guṇa iti_iti dehī_dehin deha--_deha madhya--_madhya sthaḥ_stha api_api jīvaḥ_jīva guṇa--_guṇa puruṣa--_puruṣa viveka--_viveka balena_bala etān_etad deha--_deha samudbhavān_samudbhava deha--_deha utpādaān_utpādaa trīn_tri guṇān_guṇa atītya_atī ullaṅghya_ullaṅghay janma--_janman ādibhiḥ_ādi vimuktaḥ_vimuc amṛtam_amṛta ātmānam_ātman aśnute_aś anubhavati_anubhū saḥ_tad ayam_idam asaṃsāri--_asaṃsārin tva--_tva lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa mad--_mad bhāvaḥ_bhāva mad--_mad para--_para bhakti--_bhakti pātratā--_pātratā lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa vā_vā evam_evam vakṣyati_vac brahma--_brahman bhūtaḥ_bhū prasanna--_prasad ātmā_ātman iti_iti ādi_ādi

lg.l: kaiḥ_ka liṅgaiḥ_liṅga trīn_tri guṇān_guṇa etān_etad atītaḥ_atī bhavati_bhū prabho_prabhu
kim_ka ācāraḥ_ācāra katham_katham ca_ca etān_etad trīn_tri guṇān_guṇa ativartate_ativṛt

div.p: aśnute_aś uvāca_vac he_he prabho_prabhu kaiḥ_ka liṅgaiḥ_liṅga kīdṛśaiḥ_kīdṛśa ātma--_ātman vyutpannaiḥ_vyutpad cihnaiḥ_cihna guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī dehī_dehin bhavati_bhū iti_iti lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa praśnaḥ_praśna kaḥ_ka ācāraḥ_ācāra asya_idam iti_iti kim_ka ācāraḥ_ācāra katham_katham vartate_vṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha katham_katham ca_ca kena_ka upāyena_upāya etān_etad trīn_tri api_api guṇān_guṇa atītya_atī vartate_vṛt tat_tad kathaya_kathay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana guṇān_guṇa etān_etad atītya_atī jīvan_jīv eva_eva amṛtam_amṛta aśnute_aś iti_iti etat_etad śrutvā_śru guṇa--_guṇa atītasya_atī lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa ca_ca ācāram_ācāra ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa atyaya--_atyaya upāyam_upāya ca_ca samyak_samyak bubhutsuḥ_bubhutsu arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac kaiḥ_ka iti_iti etān_etad guṇān_guṇa atītaḥ_atī yaḥ_yad sa_tad kaiḥ_ka liṅgaiḥ_liṅga viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ bhavati_bhū yaiḥ_yad liṅgaiḥ_liṅga sa_tad jñātum_jñā śakyaḥ_śakya tāni_tad me_mad brūhi_brū iti_iti ekaḥ_eka praśnaḥ_praśna prabhu--_prabhu tvāt_tva bhṛtya--_bhṛtya duḥkham_duḥkha bhagavatā_bhagavant eva_eva nivāraṇīyam_nivāray iti_iti sūcayan_sūcay sambodhayati_sambodhay prabho_prabhu iti_iti kaḥ_ka ācāraḥ_ācāra asya_idam iti_iti kim_ka ācāraḥ_ācāra kim_kim yathā_yathā iṣṭa--_iṣ ceṣṭaḥ_ceṣṭā kim_kim vā_vā niyantritaḥ_niyantray iti_iti dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya praśnaḥ_praśna katham_katham vā_vā kena_ka ca_ca prakāreṇa_prakāra etān_etad trīn_tri guṇān_guṇa ativartate_ativṛt atikrāmati_atikram iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī tva--_tva upāyaḥ_upāya kaḥ_ka iti_iti tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya praśnaḥ_praśna

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā kā_ka bhāṣā_bhāṣā iti_iti ādinā_ādi dvitīya--_dvitīya adhyāye_adhyāya pṛṣṭam_pracch api_api artham_artha punar_punar tatas_tatas api_api viśeṣa--_viśeṣa bubhūtsayā_bubhūtsā pṛcchati_pracch kaiḥ_ka liṅgaiḥ_liṅga iti_iti ekaḥ_eka praśnaḥ_praśna kaiḥ_ka cihnaiḥ_cihna triguṇa--_triguṇa atītaḥ_atī sa_tad jñeyaḥ_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka ācāraḥ_ācāra dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya katham_katham ca_ca etān_etad iti_iti tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī tva--_tva prāpteḥ_prāpti kim_ka sādhanam_sādhana iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā kā_ka bhāṣā_bhāṣā iti_iti ādau_ādi sthita--_sthā prajñaḥ_prajñā guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī katham_katham syāt_as iti_iti tadānīm_tadānīm na_na pṛṣṭam_pracch idānīm_idānīm tu_tu pṛṣṭam_pracch iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa

baladevaḥ_baladeva guṇa--_guṇa atītasya_atī lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa ācāram_ācāra ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa atyaya--_atyaya sādhanam_sādhana ca_ca arjunaḥ_arjuna pṛcchati_pracch kaiḥ_ka iti_iti ardhakena_ardhaka prathamaḥ_prathama praśnaḥ_praśna kaiḥ_ka cihnaiḥ_cihna guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī jñātum_jñā śakyaḥ_śakya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka ācāraḥ_ācāra iti_iti dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya sa_tad kim_kim yathā_yathā iṣṭa--_iṣ ācāraḥ_ācāra niyata--_niyam ācāraḥ_ācāra vā_vā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha katham_katham ca_ca etān_etad iti_iti tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya kena_ka sādhanena_sādhana guṇān_guṇa atyeti_atī iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: prakāśam_prakāśa ca_ca pravṛttim_pravṛtti ca_ca moham_moha eva_eva ca_ca pāṇḍava_pāṇḍava
na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ saṃpravṛttāni_saṃpravṛt na_na nivṛttāni_nivṛt kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ

div.p:
pṛcchati_pracch uvāca_vac ṣaḍbhiḥ_ṣaṣ tatra_tatra ekena_eka lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa āha_ah prakāśam_prakāśa iti_iti prakāśam_prakāśa ca_ca sarva--_sarva dvāreṣu_dvāra dehe_deha asmin_idam iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac sattva--_sattva kāryam_kārya pravṛttim_pravṛtti ca_ca rajaḥ--_rajas kāryam_kārya moham_moha ca_ca tamaḥ--_tamas kāryam_kārya upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad sattva--_sattva ādīnām_ādi sarvāṇi_sarva api_api yathāyatham_yathāyatham sampravṛttāni_sampravṛt svatas_svatas prāptāni_prāp santi_as duḥkha--_duḥkha buddhyā_buddhi yaḥ_yad na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ nivṛttāni_nivṛt ca_ca santi_as sukha--_sukha buddhyā_buddhi yaḥ_yad na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī
saḥ_tad ucyate_vac iti_iti caturthena_caturtha anvayaḥ_anvaya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā kā_ka bhāṣā_bhāṣā 2.54_2.54 iti_iti ādinā_ādi pṛṣṭam_pracch api_api prajahāti_prahā yadā_yadā kāmān_kāma iti_iti ādinā_ādi datta--_dā uttaram_uttara api_api punar_punar prakāra--_prakāra antareṇa_antara bubhūtsamānaḥ_bubhūts pṛcchati_pracch iti_iti avadhāya_avadhā prakāra--_prakāra antareṇa_antara lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa ādikam_ādika śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac prakāśam_prakāśa ca_ca iti_iti ādi_ādi pañcabhiḥ_pañcan ślokaiḥ_śloka yaḥ_yad tāvat_tāvat kaiḥ_ka liṅgaiḥ_liṅga yuktaḥ_yuj guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī bhavati_bhū iti_iti praśnaḥ_praśna tasya_tad uttaram_uttara śṛṇu_śru prakāśam_prakāśa ca_ca sarva--_sarva kāryam_kārya pravṛttim_pravṛtti ca_ca rajaḥ--_rajas kāryam_kārya moham_moha ca_ca tamaḥ--_tamas kāryam_kārya upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad sarvāṇi_sarva api_api guṇa--_guṇa kāryāṇi_kārya yathāyatham_yathāyatham sampravṛttāni_sampravṛt sva--_sva sāmagrī--_sāmagrī vaśāt_vaśa udbhūtāni_udbhū santi_as duḥkha--_duḥkha rūpāṇi_rūpa api_api duḥkha--_duḥkha buddhyā_buddhi yaḥ_yad na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ tathā_tathā vināśa--_vināśa sāmagrī--_sāmagrī vaśāt_vaśa nivṛttāni_nivṛt tāni_tad sukha--_sukha rūpāṇi_rūpa api_api santi_as sukha--_sukha buddhyā_buddhi yaḥ_yad na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ na_na kāmayate_kāmay svapna--_svapna vat_vat mithyātva--_mithyātva niścayāt_niścaya etādṛśa--_etādṛśa dveṣa--_dveṣa rāga--_rāga śūnyaḥ_śūnya yaḥ_yad sa_tad guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī ucyate_vac iti_iti caturtha--_caturtha śloka--_śloka gatena_gam anvayaḥ_anvaya idam_idam ca_ca sva--_sva ātma--_ātman pratyakṣam_pratyakṣa lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sva--_sva artham_artha eva_eva na_na para--_para artham_artha na_na hi_hi sva--_sva āśritau_āśri dveṣa--_dveṣa tad--_tad abhāvau_abhāva rāga--_rāga tad--_tad abhāvau_abhāva ca_ca paraḥ_para pratyetum_pratī arhati_arh

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatra_tatra kaiḥ_ka liṅgaiḥ_liṅga guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī bhavati_bhū iti_iti prathama--_prathama praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah prakāśam_prakāśa ca_ca sarva--_sarva dvāreṣu_dvāra dehe_deha asmin_idam prakāśaḥ_prakāśa upajāyate_upajan iti_iti sattva--_sattva kāryam_kārya pravṛttim_pravṛtti ca_ca rajaḥ--_rajas kāryam_kārya moham_moha ca_ca tamaḥ--_tamas kāryam_kārya upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa etat_etad sattva--_sattva ādīnām_ādi sarvāṇi_sarva api_api yathāyatham_yathāyatham sampravṛttāni_sampravṛt svatas_svatas prāptāni_prāp duḥkha--_duḥkha buddhyā_buddhi yaḥ_yad na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ guṇa--_guṇa kāryāṇi_kārya etāni_etad nivṛttāni_nivṛt ca_ca sukha--_sukha buddhyā_buddhi yaḥ_yad na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ sa_tad guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī ucyate_vac iti_iti caturthena_caturtha anvayaḥ_anvaya sampravṛttāni_sampravṛt iti_iti klīb--_klīb antam_anta ārṣam_ārṣa

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_yadi api_api sthita--_sthā prajñasya_prajñā kā_ka bhāṣā_bhāṣā iti_iti ādinā_ādi pṛṣṭam_pracch idam_idam prajahāti_prahā yadā_yadā kāmān_kāma iti_iti ādinā_ādi uttaritam_uttaray ca_ca tathā_tathā api_api viśeṣa--_viśeṣa jijñāsayā_jijñāsā pṛcchati_pracch iti_iti vidhā--_vidhā antareṇa_antara tasya_tad lakṣāṇa--_lakṣāṇa ādīni_ādi tatra_tatra ekena_eka lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa sva--_sva saṃvedyam_saṃvid āha_ah prakāśam_prakāśa sattva--_sattva kāryam_kārya pravṛttim_pravṛtti rajaḥ--_rajas kāryam_kārya moham_moha tamaḥ--_tamas kāryam_kārya etāni_etad trīṇi_tri sampravṛttāni_sampravṛt utpādaka--_utpādaka sāmagrī--_sāmagrī vaśāt_vaśa prāptāni_prāp duḥkha--_duḥkha rūpāṇi_rūpa api_api vināśaka--_vināśaka sāmagrī--_sāmagrī vaśāt_vaśa nivṛttāni_nivṛt vinaṣṭāni_vinaś tāni_tad sukha--_sukha rūpāni_rūpa api_api sukha--_sukha buddhyā_buddhi yaḥ_yad na_na ākāṅkṣati_ākāṅkṣ etādṛśa--_etādṛśa dveṣa--_dveṣa rāga--_rāga śūnyaḥ_śūnya guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī saḥ_tad ucyate_vac iti_iti caturthena_caturtha anvayaḥ_anvaya svagatau_svagata dveṣa--_dveṣa tad--_tad abhāvau_abhāva rāga--_rāga tad--_tad abhāvau_abhāva ca_ca paraḥ_para na_na veditum_vid arhati_arh iti_iti sva--_sva saṃvedyam_saṃvid idam_idam lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa

lg.l: udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat āsīnaḥ_ās guṇaiḥ_guṇa yaḥ_yad na_na vicālyate_vicālay
guṇāḥ_guṇa vartante_vṛt iti_iti eva_eva yaḥ_yad avatiṣṭhati_avasthā na_na iṅgate_iṅg

div.p: āha_ah udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat sākṣi--_sākṣin tayā_tā āsīnaḥ_ās sthitaḥ_sthā san_as guṇaiḥ_guṇa guṇa--_guṇa kāryaiḥ_kārya sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādibhiḥ_ādi na_na yaḥ_yad vicālyate_vicālay svarūpāt_svarūpa na_na pracyavate_pracyu api_api tu_tu guṇāḥ_guṇa eva_eva sva--_sva kāryeṣu_kārya vartante_vṛt etaiḥ_etad mama_mad sambandhaḥ_sambandha eva_eva na_na asti_as iti_iti viveka--_viveka jñānena_jñāna yaḥ_yad tuṣṇīm_tuṣṇīm avatiṣṭhati_avasthā parasmaipadam_parasmaipada ārṣam_ārṣa na_na iṅgate_iṅg na_na calati_cal
madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kim_ka ācāraḥ_ācāra iti_iti dvitīya--_dvitīya praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri guṇa--_guṇa kāryaiḥ_kārya sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādibhiḥ_ādi yaḥ_yad na_na vicālyate_vicālay svarūpa--_svarūpa avasthāt_avasthā na_na cyavate_cyu api_api tu_tu guṇaḥ_guṇa eva_eva sva--_sva sva--_sva kāryeṣu_kārya vartante_vṛt iti_iti eva_eva iti_iti ebhiḥ_idam mama_mad sambandhaḥ_sambandha eva_eva na_na asti_as iti_iti viveka--_viveka jñānena_jñāna yaḥ_yad na_na iṅgate_iṅg na_na kvāpi_kvāpi daihika--_daihika kṛtye_kṛtya yatate_yat guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī saḥ_tad ucyate_vac iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa atītasya_atī etāni_etad cihnāni_cihna etān_etad ācārān_ācāra ca_ca dṛṣṭvā_dṛś eva_eva guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī vaktavyaḥ_vac na_na tu_tu guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī tva--_tva upapatti--_upapatti vāvadūkaḥ_vāvadūka guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī vaktavyaḥ_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha para--_para saṃvedya--_saṃvid lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa vaktum_vac kim_ka ācāraḥ_ācāra iti_iti dvitīya--_dvitīya praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah udāsīna--_udāsīna iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna madhyasthaḥ_madhyastha yathā_yathā vivādinoḥ_vivādin pakṣa--_pakṣa grahaiḥ_graha sva--_sva mādhyasthyāt_mādhyasthya na_na vicālyate_vicālay tayā_tad sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi bhāvena_bhāva guṇaiḥ_guṇa yaḥ_yad na_na ātma--_ātman avasthitaiḥ_avasthā vicālyate_vicālay kintu_kintu guṇāḥ_guṇa sva--_sva kāryeṣu_kārya prakāśa--_prakāśa mama_mad taiḥ_tad na_na sambandhaḥ_sambandha iti_iti niścitya_niści tūṣṇīm_tūṣṇīm avatiṣṭhate_avasthā na_na iṅgate_iṅg guṇa--_guṇa kārya--_kārya anurūpeṇa_anurūpa na_na ceṣṭate_ceṣṭ guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī saḥ_tad ucyate_vac iti_iti tṛtīyena_tṛtīya anvayaḥ_anvaya

lg.l: sama--_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhaḥ_sukha svasthaḥ_svastha sama--_sama loṣṭa--_loṣṭa aśma--_aśman kāñcanaḥ_kāñcana
tulya--_tulya priya--_priya apriyaḥ_apriya dhīraḥ_dhīra tulya--_tulya nindā--_nindā ātma--_ātman saṃstutiḥ_saṃstuti

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara api_api ca_ca sameti_sami same_sama sukha--_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha yasya_yad yatas_yatas svasthaḥ_svastha sva--_sva rūpe_rūpa eva_eva sthitaḥ_sthā ataeva_ataeva samāni_sama loṣṭa--_loṣṭa aśma--_aśman kājcanāni_kājcana yasya_yad tulye_tulya pirya--_pirya apriye_apriya sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha hetu--_hetu bhūte_bhū yasya_yad dhīraḥ_dhīra dhīmān_dhīmat tulyaḥ_tulya nindā_nindā ca_ca ātmanaḥ_ātman saṃstutiḥ_saṃstuti ca_ca yasya_yad

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana same_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhe_sukha dveṣa--_dveṣa rāga--_rāga śūnyatayā_śūnyatā anātma--_anātman dharmatayā_dharmatā anṛta--_anṛta tayā_tā ca_ca yasya_yad sa_tad sama--_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhaḥ_sukha kasmāt_kasmāt evam_evam yasmāt_yasmāt svasthaḥ_svastha svasmin_sva ātmani_ātman eva_eva sthitaḥ_sthā dvaita--_dvaita darśana--_darśana śūnya--_śūnya tvāt_tva atas_atas eva_eva samāni_sama heya--_hā upādeya--_upādā bhāva--_bhāva rahitāni_rahita loṣṭa--_loṣṭa aśma--_aśman kāñcanāni_kāñcana yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā loṣṭaḥ_loṣṭa pāṃsu--_pāṃsu piṇḍaḥ_piṇḍa atas_atas eva_eva tulye_tulya priya--_priya apriye_apriya sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhane_sādhana yasya_yad hita--_hita sādhana--_sādhana tva--_tva buddhi--_buddhi viṣaya--_viṣaya tva--_tva abhāvena_abhāva upekṣaṇīya--_upekṣ tvāt_tva dhīraḥ_dhīra dhīmān_dhīmat dhṛtimān_dhṛtimat vā_vā atas_atas eva_eva tulye_tulya nindā--_nindā ātma--_ātman saṃstutī_saṃstuti doṣa--_doṣa kīrtana--_kīrtana guṇa--_guṇa kīrtane_kīrtana yasya_yad sa_tad guṇātītaḥ_guṇātīta ucyate_vac iti_iti dvitīya--_dvitīya gatena_gata anvayaḥ_anvaya
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka ca_ca sameti_sami yatas_yatas ayam_idam svasthaḥ_svastha svarūpa--_svarūpa niṣṭhaḥ_niṣṭhā ataeva_ataeva sama--_sama duḥkha--_duḥkha sukhaḥ_sukha same_sama anātma--_anātman dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva tulye_tulya sukha--_sukha duḥkhe_duḥkha yasya_yad saḥ_tad samāni_sama anupādeya--_anupādeya tayā_tā tulyāni_tulya losṭra--_losṭra ādīni_ādi yasya_yad saḥ_tad loṣṭra--_loṣṭra mṛd--_mṛd piṇḍa--_piṇḍa tulye_tulya priya--_priya apriye_apriya sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha sādhane_sādhana vastunī_vastu yasya_yad saḥ_tad tulye_tulya nindā--_nindā ātma--_ātman saṃstutī_saṃstuti yasya_yad saḥ_tad tad--_tad prayojakayoḥ_prayojaka doṣa--_doṣa guṇayoḥ_guṇa ātma--_ātman gata--_gam tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yaḥ_yad īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa guṇatītaḥ_guṇatīta saḥ_tad ucyate_vac iti_iti dvitīyena_dvitīya anvayaḥ_anvaya

lg.l: māna--_māna apamānayoḥ_apamāna tulyaḥ_tulya tulyaḥ_tulya mitra--_mitra ari--_ari pakṣayoḥ_pakṣa
sarva--_sarva ārambha--_ārambha parityāgī_parityāgin guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī saḥ_tad ucyate_vac

div.p: ucyate_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana mānaḥ_māna sat--_sat kāraḥ_kāra ādara--_ādara apara--_apara paryāyaḥ_paryāya apamānaḥ_apamāna tiraskāraḥ_tiraskāra anādara--_anādara apara--_apara paryāyaḥ_paryāya tayoḥ_tad tulyaḥ_tulya harṣa--_harṣa viṣāda--_viṣāda śūnyaḥ_śūnya nindā--_nindā stutī_stuti śabda--_śabda rūpe_rūpa māna--_māna apamānau_apamāna tu_tu śabdam_śabda antareṇa_antareṇa api_api kāya--_kāya manaḥ--_manas vyāpāra--_vyāpāra viśeṣau_viśeṣa iti_iti bhedaḥ_bheda atra_atra pa-kāra--_pa-kāra va-kārayoḥ_va-kāra pāṭha--_pāṭha vikalpe_vikalpa api_api arthaḥ_artha saḥ_tad eva_eva tulyaḥ_tulya mitra--_mitra ari--_ari pakṣayoḥ_pakṣa mitra--_mitra pakṣasya_pakṣa iva_iva ari--_ari pakṣasya_pakṣa api_api dveṣa--_dveṣa aviṣayaḥ_aviṣaya svayam_svayam tayoḥ_tad anugraha--_anugraha nigraha--_nigraha śūnyaḥ_śūnya iti_iti vā_vā sarva--_sarva ārambha--_ārambha parityāgī_parityāgin ārabhyante_ārabh iti_iti ārambhāḥ_ārambha karmāṇi_karman tān_tad sarvān_sarva parityaktum_parityaj śīlam_śīla yasya_yad sa_tad tathā_tathā deha--_deha yātrā--_yātrā mātra--_mātra vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka sarva--_sarva karma--_karman parityāgī_parityāgin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha udāsīna--_udāsīna vat_vat āsīnaḥ_ās iti_iti ādi--_ādi ukta--_vac prakāra--_prakāra ācāraḥ_ācāra guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī saḥ_tad ucyate_vac yat_yad uktam_vac upekṣaka--_upekṣaka tva--_tva ādi_ādi tad--_tad vidyā--_vidyā udayāt_udaya pūrvam_pūrvam yatna--_yatna sādhyam_sādhay vidyā--_vidyā adhikāriṇā_adhikārin sādhana--_sādhana tvena_tva anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā utpannāyām_utpad tu_tu vidyāyām_vidyā jīvan--_jīv muktasya_muc guṇa--_guṇa atītasya_atī uktam_vac dharma--_dharma jātam_jāta ayatna--_ayatna 25_25
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva māna--_māna iti_iti sphuṭa--_sphuṭa arthaḥ_artha nindā--_nindā stutī_stuti vāc--_vāc vyāpāreṇa_vyāpāra sādhye_sādhay māna--_māna apamānau_apamāna tu_tu kāya--_kāya manaḥ--_manas vyāpāreṇa_vyāpāra api_api syātām_as iti_iti bhedaḥ_bheda sarvā_sarva iti_iti deha--_deha yātrā--_yātrā mātrāt_mātra anyat_anya sarva--_sarva karma_karman grāhyam_grah yaḥ_yad īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī unda--_unda āsīna--_āsīna vat_vat iti_iti ādi_ādi uktāḥ_vac yasya_yad ācārḥ_ācār paraiḥ_para api_api saṃvedyāḥ_saṃvid sa_tad guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī bodhyaḥ_budh na_na tu_tu tad--_tad upapatti--_upapatti vāvadūkaḥ_vāvadūka iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 25_25

lg.l: mām_mad ca_ca yaḥ_yad avyabhicāreṇa_avyabhicāra bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga sevate_sev
sa_tad guṇān_guṇa samatītya_samatī etān_etad brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp

div.p: ativartate_ativṛt asya_idam praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah mām_mad ca_ca iti_iti ca_ca śabdaḥ_śabda avadhāraṇa--_avadhāraṇa arthaḥ_artha mām_mad parameśvaram_parameśvara avyabhicāreṇa_avyabhicāra ekāntena_ekānta bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga yaḥ_yad sevate_sev saḥ_tad etān_etad guṇān_guṇa samatītya_samatī atikramya_atikram brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya brahma--_brahman bhāvāya_bhāva mokṣāya_mokṣa kalpate_kﾱp samarthaḥ_samartha bhavati_bhū 26_26

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana etān_etad guṇān_guṇa ativartate_ativṛt tṛtīya--_tṛtīya praśnasya_praśna prativacanam_prativacana āha_ah mām_mad caḥ_ca tu_tu arthaḥ_artha mām_mad eva_eva īśvaram_īśvara nārāyaṇam_nārāyaṇa sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin māyayā_māyā kṣetrajña--_kṣetrajña tām_tā āgatam_āgam parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda ghanam_ghana bhagavantam_bhagavant vāsudevam_vāsudeva avyabhicāreṇa_avyabhicāra parama--_parama prema--_preman lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga dvādaśa--_dvādaśan adhyāya--_adhyāya uktena_vac mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta etān_etad prāc--_prāñc uktān_vac guṇān_guṇa samatītya_samatī samyak_samyak atikramya_atikram advaita--_advaita darśanena_darśana bādhitvā_bādh brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya brahma--_brahman bhavanāya_bhavana mokṣāya_mokṣa kalpate_kﾱp samarthaḥ_samartha bhavati_bhū sarvadā_sarvadā bhagavat--_bhagavant cintanam_cintana eva_eva guṇa--_guṇa atīta--_atī tva--_tva upāyaḥ_upāya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 26_26

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha katham_katham ca_ca etān_etad trīn_tri guṇān_guṇa ativartate_ativṛt iti_iti tṛtīya--_tṛtīya praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah mām_mad ca_ca iti_iti caḥ_ca eva_eva arthe_artha mām_mad eva_eva śyāma--_śyāma sundara--_sundara ākāram_ākāra parameśvaram_parameśvara bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga yaḥ_yad sevate_sev saḥ_tad eva_eva brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya brahmatvāya_brahmatva brahma--_brahman anubhavāya_anubhava yāvat_yāvat bhaktyā_bhakti aham_mad ekayā_eka grāhyaḥ_grah iti_iti mad--_mad vākye_vākya ekayā_eka iti_iti viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa upanyāsāt_upanyāsa taranti_tṛ te_tad iti_iti atra_atra api_api eva_eva kāra--_kāra prayogāt_prayoga bhaktyā_bhakti vinā_vinā prakāra--_prakāra antareṇa_antara brahma--_brahman anubhavaḥ_anubhava na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti niścayāt_niścaya bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga kīdṛśena_kīdṛśa avyabhicāreṇa_avyabhicāra karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi amiśreṇa_amiśra niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmaṇaḥ_karman nyāsa--_nyāsa śravaṇāt_śravaṇa jñānam_jñāna ca_ca mayi_mad san_as nyaset_nyas iti_iti jñāninām_jñānin carama--_carama daśāyām_daśā jñānasya_jñāna api_api nyāsa--_nyāsa śravaṇāt_śravaṇa bhakti--_bhakti yogasya_yoga tu_tu kvāpi_kvāpi nyāsa--_nyāsa aśravaṇāt_aśravaṇa bhakti--_bhakti yogaḥ_yoga eva_eva saḥ_tad avyabhicāraḥ_avyabhicāra tena_tena karma--_karman yogam_yoga iva_iva jñāna--_jñāna yogam_yoga api_api parityājya_parityājay yadi_yadi avyabhicāreṇa_avyabhicāra kevalena_kevala eva_eva bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga sevate_sev tarhi_tarhi jñānī_jñānin api_api guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī bhavati_bhū na_na anyathā_anyathā an_an anya--_anya bhaktaḥ_bhakta tu_tu nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa mad--_mad apāśrayaḥ_apāśraya iti_iti ekādaśa--_ekādaśan ukteḥ_ukti guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī bhavati_bhū eva_eva atra_atra idam_idam tattvam_tattva iti_iti atra_atra asaṅginaḥ_asaṅgin karmiṇaḥ_karmin jñāninaḥ_jñānin vā_vā sāttvika--_sāttvika tvena_tva eva_eva sādhaka--_sādhaka tva--_tva avagateḥ_avagati tad--_tad sāhacaryāt_sāhacarya nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa mad--_mad apāśrayaḥ_apāśraya iti_iti bhaktaḥ_bhakta sādhakaḥ_sādhaka eva_eva avagamyate_avagam tatas_tatas ca_ca jñānī_jñānin jñāna--_jñāna siddhaḥ_sidh san_as eva_eva sāttvika--_sāttvika tvam_tva parityajya_parityaj guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī bhavati_bhū bhaktaḥ_bhakta tu_tu sādhaka--_sādhaka daśām_daśā ārabhya_ārabh eva_eva guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha labhyate_labh atra_atra ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra avadhāraṇa--_avadhāraṇa arthaḥ_artha iti_iti svāmi--_svāmin caraṇāḥ_caraṇa mām_mad eva_eva īśvaram_īśvara nārāyaṇam_nārāyaṇa avyabhicāreṇa_avyabhicāra bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga dvādaśa--_dvādaśan ādyāya--_ādya uktena_vac yaḥ_yad sevate_sev iti_iti madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda ca_ca vyācakṣate_vyācakṣ 26_26

baladevaḥ_baladeva katham_katham ca_ca etān_etad trīn_tri guṇān_guṇa ativartate_ativṛt iti_iti tṛtīya--_tṛtīya praśnasya_praśna uttaram_uttara āha_ah mām_mad ca_ca iti_iti caḥ_c avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa na_na anyam_anya guṇebhyaḥ_guṇa kara--_kara aram_ara iti_iti ādi--_ādi uktyā_ukti yaḥ_yad guṇa--_guṇa puruṣa--_puruṣa viveka--_viveka khyātim_khyāti avāpa_avāp tayā_tad eva_eva tasyāḥ_tad guṇa--_guṇa atyayaḥ_atyaya na_na saṃsidhyati_saṃsidh kintu_kiṃtu tadvān_tadvat api_api yaḥ_yad mām_mad kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa eva_eva māyā--_māyā guṇa--_guṇa āspṛṣṭam_āspṛś sevate_sev kalpate_kﾱp bhavati_bhū tam_tad dharmam_dharma labhate_labh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha jīve_jīva brahma--_brahman śabdaḥ_śabda tu_tu uktaḥ_vac eva_eva prak_prak tathā_tathā ca_ca bhakti--_bhakti śiraskayā_śiraska eva_eva tad--_tad viveka--_viveka khyātyā_khyāti jīvasya_jīva svarūpa--_svarūpa lābhaḥ_lābha na_na tu_tu kevalayā_kevala tayā_tad iti_iti uktam_vac yat_yad tu_tu brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya iti_iti anena_idam mad--_mad rūpa--_rūpa tām_tā sa_tad yāti_yā iti_iti pārtha--_pārtha sārathinā_sārathi upadiṣṭam_upadiś iti_iti vyācaṣṭe_vyācakṣ svarūpa--_svarūpa bhedasya_bheda abhihita--_abhidhā tvāt_tva nirañjanaḥ_nirañjana paramam_parama sāmyam_sāmya upaiti_upe iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutiṣu_śruti api_api tatra_tatra tasya_tad dṛṣṭa--_dṛś tvāt_tva aṇu--_aṇu tva--_tva vibhu--_vibhu tva--_tva ādi--_ādi nitya--_nitya dharma--_dharma kṛtatvena_kṛtatva nitya--_nitya tvāt_tva ca_ca tad--_tad bhedasya_bheda tasmāt_tasmāt guṇa--_guṇa brahma_brahman api_api eti_i iti_iti śrutyau_śrutya tu_tu brahma--_brahman sadṛśaḥ_sadṛśa san_as bramā_bramā api_api eti_i prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha eva_eva aupamye_aupamya avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa iti_iti viśva--_viśva prakāśāt_prakāśa yathā_yathā tathā_tathā eva_eva ivam_ivam sāmye_sāmya iti_iti amara--_amara koṣāt_koṣa ca_ca anyathā_anyathā brahma--_brahman bhāva--_bhāva uttaraḥ_uttara
na_na saṅgaccheta_saṃgam

lg.l: brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad amṛtasya_amṛta avyayasya_avyaya ca_ca
śāśvatasya_śāśvata ca_ca dharmasya_dharma sukhasya_sukha aikāntikasya_aikāntika ca_ca

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tatra_tatra hetum_hetu āha_ah brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi iti_iti hi_hi yasmāt_yad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman aham_mad pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā pratimā_pratimā ghanībhūtam_ghanībhū brahma_brahman eva_eva aham_mad yathā_yathā ghanībhūtaḥ_ghanībhū prakāśaḥ_prakāśa eva_eva sūrya--_sūrya maṇḍalam_maṇḍala tadvat_tadvat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā avyayasya_avyaya nityasya_nitya amṛtasya_amṛta mokṣasya_mokṣa ca_ca nitya--_nitya mukta--_muc tvāt_tva tathā_tathā tad--_tad sādhanasya_sādhana śāśvatasya_śāśvata dharmasya_dharma ca_ca śiddhja--_śiddhja sattva--_sattva ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva tathā_tathā aikāntikasya_aikāntika akhaṇḍitasya_akhaṇḍita sukhasya_sukha ca_ca pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad atas_atas mad--_mad sevinaḥ_sevin mad--_mad bhāvasya_bhāva avaśyambhāvi--_avaśyambhāvin tvāt_tva yuktam_yuj eva_eva uktam_vac brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp iti_iti

lg.l: kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa adhīna--_adhīna guṇa--_guṇa āsaṅga--_āsaṅga prasañjita--_prasañjay bhava--_bhava ambudhim_ambudhi
sukham_sukham tarati_tṛ mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta iti_iti abhāṣi_bhaṣ caturdaśe_caturdaśa

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī guṇa--_guṇa traya--_traya vibhāga--_vibhāga yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma caturdaśaḥ_caturdaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana atra_atra hetum_hetu āha_ah brahmaṇaḥ_brahman iti_iti brahmaṇaḥ_brahman tad--_tad pada--_pada vācyasya_vac sa_sa upādhikasya_upādhika jagat--_jagant utpatti--_utpatti sthiti--_sthiti laya--_laya hetoḥ_hetu pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā pāramārthikam_pāramārthika nirvikalpa--_nirvikalpa alpakam_alpaka sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ātmakam_ātmaka nirupādhikam_nirupādhika tad--_tad pada--_pada lakṣyam_lakṣay aham_mad nivikalpakaḥ_nivikalpaka pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā kalpita--_kalpay rūpa--_rūpa rahitam_rahita akalpitam_akalpita rūpam_rūpa atas_atas yaḥ_yad mām_mad upādhikam_upādhika brahma_brahman sevate_sev sa_tad brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp iti_iti yuktam_yuj eva_eva

kīdṛśasya_kīdṛśa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad iti_iti ākāṅkṣāyām_ākāṅkṣā viśeṣaṇāni_viśeṣaṇa amṛtasya_amṛta vināśa--_vināśa rahitasya_rahita avyayasya_avyaya vipariṇāma--_vipariṇāma rahitasya_rahita ca_ca śāśvatasya_śāśvata apakṣaya--_apakṣaya rahitasya_rahita ca_ca dharmasya_dharma jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā lakṣaṇa_lakṣaṇa parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda rūpasya_rūpa sukhasya_sukha viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya saṃyoga--_saṃyoga ja--_ja tvam_tva vārayati_vāray aikāntikasya_aikāntika avyabhicāriṇaḥ_avyabhicārin sarvasmin_sarva deśe_deśa kāle_kāla ca_ca vidyamānasya_vid aikāntika--_aikāntika sukha--_sukha rūpasya_rūpa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etādṛśasya_etādṛśa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman yasmāt_yasmāt aham_mad vāstavam_vāstava svarūpam_svarūpa tasmāt_tasmāt mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta saṃsārāt_saṃsāra mucyate_muc iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tathā_tathā ca_ca uktam_vac brahmaṇā_brahman bhagavantam_bhagavat śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa prati_prati

ekaḥ_eka tvam_tvad ātmā_ātman puruṣaḥ_puruṣa purāṇaḥ_purāṇa satyaḥ_satya svayam_svayam jyotiḥ_jyotis anantaḥ_ananta ādyaḥ_ādya nityaḥ_nitya akṣaraḥ_akṣara ajasra--_ajasra sukhaḥ_sukha nirañjanaḥ_nirañjana
pūrṇaḥ_pṛ advayaḥ_advaya muktaḥ_muc upādhitaḥ_upādhi amṛtaḥ_amṛta
atra_atra sarva--_sarva upādhi--_upādhi śūnyaḥ_śūnya ātmā_ātman brahma_brahman tvam_tvad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha śukena_śuka api_api stutim_stuti antareṇa_antareṇa eva_eva uktam_vac

sarveṣām_sarva api_api vastūnām_vastu bhāva--_bhāva arthaḥ_artha bhavati_bhū sthitaḥ_sthā
tasya_tad api_api bhagavān_bhagavant kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa kim_kim a_a tat_tad vastu_vastu rūpyatām_rūpay

sarveṣām_sarva eva_eva kārya--_kārya vastūnām_vastu bhāvārthaḥ_bhāvārtha sattā--_sattā rūpaḥ_rūpa paramārthaḥ_paramārtha bhavati_bhū kāryākāreṇa_kāryākāra jāyamāne_jan sopādhike_sopādhika brahmaṇi_brahman sthitaḥ_sthā kāraṇa--_kāraṇa sattā--_sattā atiriktāyāḥ_atiric kārya--_kārya sattāyāḥ_sattā anabhyupagamāt_anabhyupagama tasya_tad api_api bhavataḥ_bhū kāraṇasya_kāraṇa sa_sa upādhikasya_upādhika brahmaṇaḥ_brahman bhāva--_bhāva arthaḥ_artha sattā--_sattā rūpaḥ_rūpa arthaḥ_artha bhagavān_bhagavant kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa sopādhikasya_sopādhika nirupādhike_nirupādhika kalpita--_kalpay tvāt_tva kalpitasya_kalpay ca_ca adhiṣṭhānān_adhiṣṭhāna atirekāt_atireka bhagavataḥ_bhagavant atas_atas kim_ka a_a tad--_tad vastu_vastu tasmāt_tad śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇāt_kṛṣṇa anyat_anya vastu_vastu paramārthikam_paramārthika kim_ka nirūpyatām_nirūpay tat_tad eva_eva ekam_eka paramārthikam_paramārthika na_na anyat_anya kim_ka api_api iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad etat_etad iha_iha api_api uktam_vac brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad iti_iti

athavā_athavā tvad--_tvad bhaktaḥ_bhakta tvad--_tvad bhāvam_bhāva āpnotu_āp nāma_nāma katham_katham nu_nu brahma--_brahman bhāvāya_bhāva kalpyate_kalpay brahmaṇaḥ_brahman sakāśāt_sakāśāt tava_tvad anyatvāt_anyatva iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi iti_iti brahmaṇaḥ_brahman paramātmanaḥ_paramātman pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā paryāptiḥ_paryāpti aham_mad eva_eva na_na tu_tu mad--_mad bhinnam_bhid brahma_brahman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā amṛtasya_amṛta amṛta--_amṛta tvasya_tva mokṣasya_mokṣa ca_ca avyayasya_avyaya sarvathā_sarvathā anucchedyasya_anucchedya ca_ca ca_ca pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad eva_eva mayi_mad eva_eva mokṣaḥ_mokṣa paryavastiḥ_paryavasti mad--_mad prāptiḥ_prāpti eva_eva mokṣaḥ_mokṣa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā śāśvatasya_śāśvata nitya--_nitya mokṣa--_mokṣa phalasya_phala dharmasya_dharma jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa ca_ca paryāptiḥ_paryāpti aham_mad eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa dharmaḥ_dharma mayi_mad eva_eva paryavasitaḥ_paryavasā na_na tena_tad mad--_mad bhinnam_bhid kiṃcid_kaścit prāpyam_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā aikāntikasya_aikāntika sukhasya_sukha ca_ca paryāptiḥ_paryāpti aham_mad eva_eva parma--_parman ānanda--_ānanda rūpatvāt_rūpatva na_na mad--_mad bhinnam_bhid kiṃcid_kaścit sukham_sukha prāpyam_prāp asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tasmāt_tasmāt yuktam_yuj eva_eva uktam_vac mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp iti_iti 27_27

lg.l: parākṛtana--_parākṛtana mad--_mad bandham_bandha param_para brahma_brahman nara--_nara ākṛti_ākṛti
vande_vand

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍhārtha--_gūḍhārtha dīpikāyām_dīpikā guṇa--_guṇa traya--_traya vibhāga--_vibhāga yogaḥ_yoga

sambhavet_sambhū tatra_tatra āha_ah brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi iti_iti hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt parama--_parama pratiṣṭhā--_pratiṣṭhā tvena_tva prasiddham_prasidh yat_yad brahma_brahman tasya_tad api_api aham_mad pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā pratiṣṭhīyate_pratiṣṭhā asmin_idam iti_iti pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā āśrayaḥ_āśraya anna--_anna maya--_maya ādiṣu_ādi śrutiṣu_śruti sarvatra_sarvatra eva_eva pratiṣṭhā--_pratiṣṭhā padasya_pada tathārtha_tathārtha tathā_tathā amṛtasya_amṛta pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā kim_ka svargīya--_svargīya sudhāyāḥ_sudhā na_na avyayasya_avyaya nāśa--_nāśa rahitasya_rahita mokṣasya_mokṣa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā śāśvatasya_śāśvata dharmasya_dharma sādhana--_sādhana phala--_phala daśayoḥ_daśā api_api nitya--_nitya sthitasya_sthā bhakti--_bhakti ākhyasya_ākhyā parama--_parama dharmasya_dharma aham_mad pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā tathā_tathā tad--_tad prāpyasya_prāp aikāntika--_aikāntika bhakta--_bhakta sambandhinaḥ_sambandhin sukhasya_sukha premṇaḥ_preman ca_ca aham_mad pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā atas_atas sarvasya_sarva api_api mad--_mad adhīna--_adhīna tvāt_tva kaivalya--_kaivalya kāmanayā_kāmanā kṛtena_kṛ mad--_mad bhajanena_bhajana brahmaṇi_brahman līyamānaḥ_lī brahmatvam_brahmatva api_api prāpnoti_prāp

atra_atra brahmaṇaḥ_brahman aham_mad pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā ghanībhūtam_ghanībhū brahmā_brahman eva_eva aham_mad yathā_yathā ghanībhūta--_ghanībhū prakāśaḥ_prakāśa eva_eva sūrya--_sūrya maṇḍalam_maṇḍala tadvat_tadvat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha iti_iti svāmi--_svāmin caraṇāḥ_caraṇa sūryasya_sūrya tejaḥ--_tejas rūpa--_rūpa tve_tva api_api yathā_yathā tejasaḥ_tejas āśraya--_āśraya tvam_tva api_api ucyate_vac evam_evam me_mad kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa brahma--_brahman rūpa--_rūpa tve_tva api_api brahmaṇaḥ_brahman pratiṣṭhā--_pratiṣṭhā tvam_tva api_api sarvagasya_sarvaga ātmanaḥ_ātman para--_para brahmaṇaḥ_brahman api_api āśrayaḥ_āśraya pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā tat_tad uktam_vac bhagavatā_bhagavant brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad iti_iti tathā_tathā viṣṇu--_viṣṇu dharme_dharma api_api naraka--_naraka dvādaśī--_dvādaśī prasaṅge_prasaṅga
prakṛtau_prakṛti puruṣe_puruṣa ca_ca eva_eva brahmaṇi_brahman api_api sa_tad prabhuḥ_prabhu yathā_yathā ekaḥ_eka eva_eva puruṣaḥ_puruṣa vāsudevaḥ_vāsudeva vyavasthitaḥ_vyavasthā iti_iti
tatra_tatra eva_eva māsa--_māsa ṛkṣa--_ṛkṣa pūjā--_pūjā prasaṅe_prasaṅa
yathā_yathā acyutaḥ_acyuta tvam_tvad paratas_paratas parasmāt_para sa_tad brahma--_brahman bhūtāt_bhūta paratas_paratas parātmā_parātman iti_iti
tathā_tathā hari--_hari vaṃśe_vaṃśa api_api vipra--_vipra kumāra--_kumāra ānayana--_ānayana prasaṅge_prasaṅga arjunam_arjuna prati_prati śrī--_śrī bhagavat--_bhagavant vākyam_vākya

lg.l: tat_tad param_para paramam_parama brahma_brahman sarvam_sarva vibhajate_vibhaj jagat_jagant
mama_mad eva_eva tat_tad ghanam_ghana tejaḥ_tejas jñātum_jñā arhasi_arh bhārata_bhārata

div.p: brahma--_brahman saṃhitāyām_saṃhitā

yasya_yad prabhā_prabhā prabhavataḥ_prabhū jagat--_jagant aṇḍa--_aṇḍa koṭi--_koṭi koṭīṣu_koṭi aśeṣa--_aśeṣa vasudhā--_vasudhā ādi--_ādi vibhūti--_vibhūti bhinnam_bhid tat_tad brahma_brahman niṣkalam_niṣkala anantam_ananta aśeṣa--_aśeṣa bhūtam_bhū govindam_govinda ādi--_ādi puruṣam_puruṣa tam_tad aham_mad bhajāmi_bhaj
aṣṭama--_aṣṭama skandhe_skandha

madīyam_madīya ca_ca para--_para brahma_brahman iti_iti śabditam_śabday vetsyasi_vid anugṛhītam_anugrah me_mad sampraśnaiḥ_sampraśna vivṛtam_vivṛ hṛdi_hṛd iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant uktiḥ_ukti ca_ca

madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pādāḥ_pāda ca_ca vyācakṣate_vyācakṣ sma_sma yathā_yathā nanu_nanu tvad--_tvad bhaktaḥ_bhakta tvad--_tvad bhāvam_bhāva āpnotu_āp nāma_nāma katham_katham brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp brahmaṇaḥ_brahman sakāśāt_sakāśāt tava_tvad anyatvāt_anyatva iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi iti_iti pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā paryāptiḥ_paryāpti aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti paryāptiḥ_paryāpti paripūrṇa--_paripṛ tā_tā iti_iti amaraḥ_amara

parākṛta--_parākṛ manaḥ--_manas dvandvam_dvaṃdva param_para brahma_brahman nara--_nara ākṛti_ākṛti saundarya--_saundarya sāra--_sāra sarvasvam_sarvasva vande_vand nanda--_nanda ātmajam_ātmaja mahaḥ_mahas iti_iti upaślokayāmāsuḥ_upaślokay ca_ca

lg.l: anarthaḥ_anartha eva_eva traiguṇyam_traiguṇya nistraiguṇyam_nistraiguṇya kṛtārtha--_kṛtārtha tā_tā
tat_tad ca_ca bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva bhavati_bhū iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha varṣiṇyām_varṣin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
caturdaśaḥ_caturdaśa ayam_idam gītāsu_gītā saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu tad--_tad viveka--_viveka khyātyā_khyāti tvad--_tvad eka--_eka bhaktyā_bhakti ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī labdha--_labh svarūpaḥ_svarūpa brahma--_brahman śabditaḥ_śabday muktaḥ_muc katham_katham tiṣṭhet_sthā iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi iti_iti hiḥ_hi niścaye_niścaya brahmaṇaḥ_brahman tad--_tad pūrvakayā_pūrvaka tayā_tad sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa atyayāt_atyaya āvirbhāvita--_āvirbhāvay sva--_sva guṇa--_guṇa aṣṭakasya_aṣṭaka amṛtasya_amṛta nirgatasya_nirgam avyayasya_avyaya muktasya_muc mad--_mad atipriyasya_atipriya aham_mad eva_eva vijñāna--_vijñāna ānanda--_ānanda mūrtiḥ_mūrti ananta--_ananta guṇaḥ_guṇa sarva--_sarva īśvaraḥ_īśvara pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā pratiṣṭhīyate_pratiṣṭhā atra_atra iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti parama--_parama āśrayaḥ_āśraya ati_ati priyaḥ_priya bhavāmi_bhū iti_iti tādṛśam_tādṛśa mām_mad parayā_para bhaktyā_bhakti anubhavan_anubhū tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti na_na mattaḥ_mad viśleṣa--_viśleṣa leśaḥ_leśa na_na ca_ca punar_punar āvartate_āvṛt yat_yat gatvā_gam na_na nivartante_nivṛt muktānām_muc paramā_parama gatiḥ_gati iti_iti smṛtibhyaḥ_smṛti

nanu_nanu muktaḥ_muc tvām_tvad katham_katham śrayeta_śri śravaṇa--_śravaṇa phalasya_phala mukteḥ_mukti lābhāt_lābha iti_iti ced_ced asti_as atiśayitam_atiśī phalam_phala iti_iti bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah śāśvatasya_śāśvata sādhāraṇasya_sādhāraṇa sukhasya_sukha ca_ca vicitra--_vicitra līlā--_līlā rasasya_rasa aham_mad eva_eva pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti tīvra--_tīvra ānanda--_ānanda rūpa--_rūpa tad--_tad vibhūti--_vibhūti mad--_mad līlā--_līlā anubhavāya_anubhava mām_mad eva_eva samāśrayati_samāśri iti_iti evam_evam āha_ah śrutiḥ_śruti rasaḥ_rasa vai_vai saḥ_tad rasam_rasa hi_hi eva_eva ayam_idam labdhvā_labh ānandī_ānandin bhavati_bhū iti_iti 27_27

lg.l: saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra guṇa--_guṇa yogaḥ_yoga syāt_as vimokṣaḥ_vimokṣa tu_tu guṇa--_guṇa atyayaḥ_atyaya
tad--_tad siddhiḥ_siddhi hari--_hari bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva iti_iti etat_etad buddham_budh caturdaśāt_caturdaśa

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya caturdaśaḥ_caturdaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

the--_the eight--_eightness atma--_ātman apahata--_apahan papmA_papman vijaraḥ_vijara vimRtyuḥ_vimRtyu vizokaḥ_vizoka vijighatsaḥ_vijighatsa apipasah_apipasa satya--_satya kAmaH_kAma satya--_satya saGkalpa_saGkalpa saḥ_tad anveSTavya_anviṣ

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
ūrdhva--_ūrdhva mūlam_mūla adhas_adhas śākham_śākhā aśvattham_aśvattha prāhuḥ_prāh avyayam_avyaya
chandāṃsi_chandas yasya_yad parṇāni_parṇa yaḥ_yad tam_tad veda_vid sa_tad veda--_veda vid_vid
vairāgyeṇa_vairāgya vinā_vinā jñānam_jñāna na_na ca_ca bhaktiḥ_bhakti atas_atas sphuṭam_sphuṭa
vairāgya--_vairāgya upaskṛtam_upaskṛ jñānam_jñāna īśaḥ_īśa pañcadaśe_pañcadaśa adiśat_diś

div.p: sevate_sev bhavati_bhū na_na ca_ca ekānta--_ekānta bhaktiḥ_bhakti jñānam_jñāna ca_ca aviraktasya_avirakta sambhavati_sambhū iti_iti vairāgya--_vairāgya pūrvakam_pūrvaka jñānam_jñāna upadeṣṭu--_upadeṣṭu kāmaḥ_kāma prathamam_prathamam tāvat_tāvat sārdha--_sārdha ślokābhyām_śloka saṃsāra--_saṃsāra svarūpam_svarūpa vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa rūpaka--_rūpaka alaṅkāreṇa_alaṃkāra varṇayan_varṇay ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam uttamaḥ_uttama kṣara--_kṣara akṣarābhyām_akṣara utkṛṣṭaḥ_utkṛṣṭa puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama mūlam_mūla yasya_yad tam_tad adhas_adhas iti_iti tatas_tatas arvācīnām_arvāñc kārya--_kārya upādhayaḥ_upādhi hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ādayaḥ_ādi gṛhyante_grah te_tad śākhā_śākhā śākhā_śākhā yasya_yad tam_tad vinaśvara--_vinaśvara tvena_tva śvas_śvas prabhāta--_prabhāta paryantam_paryanta api_api na_na sthāsyati_sthā iti_iti viśvāsa--_viśvāsa anarha--_anarha tvāt_tva aśvattham_aśvattha prāhuḥ_prāh pravāha--_pravāha rūpeṇa_rūpa a_a vicchedāt_viccheda avyayam_avyaya ca_ca prāhuḥ_prāh ūrdhva--_ūrdhva mūlaḥ_mūla avāc--_avāñc śākhaḥ_śākhā eṣaḥ_etad aśvatthaḥ_aśvattha sanātana_sanātana iti_iti ādyāḥ_ādya śrutayaḥ_śruti chandāṃsi_chandas vedāḥ_veda yasya_yad parṇāni_parṇa dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma pratipādana--_pratipādana dvāreṇa_dvāra chāyā--_chāyā sthānīyaiḥ_sthānīya karma--_karman phalaiḥ_phala saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa sarva--_sarva jīva--_jīva āśrayaṇīya--_āśri tva--_tva pratipādanāt_pratipādana parṇa--_parṇa sthānīyāḥ_sthānīya vedāḥ_veda yaḥ_yad tam_tad evambhūtam_evambhūta aśvattham_aśvattha veda_vid saḥ_tad eva_eva veda_vid artha--_artha vid_vid saṃsāra--_saṃsāra prapañca--_prapañca vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa mūlam_mūla īśvaraḥ_īśvara brahma--_brahman ādayaḥ_ādi tad--_tad aṃśāḥ_aṃśa śākhā--_śākhā sthānīyāḥ_sthānīya sa_tad ca_ca saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛksaḥ_vṛksa vinaśvaraḥ_vinaśvara pravāha--_pravāha rūpeṇa_rūpa nityaḥ_nitya ca_ca veda--_veda uktaiḥ_vac karmabhiḥ_karman sevyatām_sev āpāditaḥ_āpāday ca_ca iti_iti etāvān_etāvat eva_eva hi_hi veda--_veda arthaḥ_artha atas_atas evam_evam vidvān_vid veda--_veda vid_vid iti_iti stūyate_stu

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana pūrva--_pūrva adhyāye_adhyāya bhagavtā_bhagavant saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bandha--_bandha hetūn_hetu guṇān_guṇa vyākhyāya_vyākhyā teṣām_tad atyayena_atyaya brahma--_brahman bhāvaḥ_bhāva mokṣaḥ_mokṣa mad--_mad bhajanena_bhajana labhyate_labh iti_iti uktam_vac

sa_tad guṇān_guṇa samatītya_samatī etān_etad brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp

tatra_tatra manuṣyasya_manuṣya tava_tvad bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga katham_katham brahma--_brahman bhāvaḥ_bhāva iti_iti āśaṅkāyām_āśaṅkā svasya_sva brahma--_brahman rūpa--_rūpa tā--_tā jñāpanāya_jñāpana sūtra--_sūtra bhūtaḥ_bhū ayam_idam ślokaḥ_śloka bhagavatā_bhagavant uktaḥ_vac

brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad amṛtasya_amṛta avyayasya_avyaya ca_ca
śāśvatasya_śāśvata ca_ca dharmasya_dharma sukhasya_sukha aikāntikasya_aikāntika ca_ca

asya_idam sūtrasya_sūtra vṛtti--_vṛtti sthānīyaḥ_sthānīya ayam_idam pañcadaśaḥ_pañcadaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya ārabhyate_ārabh bhagavataḥ_bhagavant śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa hi_hi tattvam_tattva jñātvā_jñā tad--_tad prema--_preman bhajanena_bhajana guṇa--_guṇa atītaḥ_atī san_as brahma--_brahman bhāvam_bhāva katham_katham āpnuyāt_āp loke_loka iti_iti tatra_tatra brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad iti_iti ādi_ādi bhagavat--_bhagavant vacanam_vacana ākarṇya_ākarṇay mama_mad tulyaḥ_tulya manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya ayam_idam katham_katham evam_evam vadati_vad iti_iti vismaya--_vismaya āviṣṭam_āviś apratibhayā_apratibhā lajjayā_lajjā ca_ca kiṃcid_kaścit api_api praṣṭum_pracch aśaknuvan_aśaknuvat tam_tad vivakṣuḥ_vivakṣu śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac ūrdhva--_ūrdhva

tatra_tatra viraktasya_virañj eva_eva saṃsārāt_saṃsāra bhagavat--_bhagavant tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna adhikāraḥ_adhikāra na_na anyathā_anyathā iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva adhyāya--_adhyāya uktam_vac utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa mūlam_mūla kāraṇam_kāraṇa sva--_sva prakāśa--_prakāśa paramānanda--_paramānanda rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva nitya--_nitya tvena_tva ca_ca brahma_brahman a_a tahva--_tahva ūrdhvam_ūrdhva sarva--_sarva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bādhe_bādha api_api a_a bādhitam_bādh sarva--_sarva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bhrama--_bhrama adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna brahma_brahman tat_tad eva_eva māyayā_māyā mūlam_mūla asya_idam iti_iti ūrdhva--_ūrdhva mūlam_mūla adhas_adhas iti_iti arvācīnāḥ_arvācīna kārya--_kārya upādhayaḥ_upādhi hiraṇyagrabha--_hiraṇyagrabha ādyāḥ_ādya gṛhyante_grah te_tad nānā_nānā diś--_diś prasṛta--_prasṛ tvāt_tva śākhāḥ_śākhā iva_iva śākhāḥ_śākhā asya_idam iti_iti adhaḥśākham_adhaḥśākham āśu--_āśu vināśi--_vināśin tvena_tva na_na śvas_śvas api_api sthātā_sthā iti_iti viśvāsa--_viśvāsa anarham_anarha aśvattham_aśvattha māyā--_māyā mayam_maya saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣam_vṛkṣa avyayam_avyaya anādi--_anādi ananta--_ananta deha--_deha ādi--_ādi santāna--_saṃtāna āśrayam_āśraya ātma--_ātman adhas_adhas ca_ca mūlāni_mūla anusaṃtatāni_anusaṃtan
karma--_karman anubandhīni_anubandhin manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka

div.p: teṣu_tad ca_ca ye_yad duṣkṛtinaḥ_duṣkṛtin te_tad adhas_adhas paśu--_paśu ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni prasṛtāḥ_prasṛ tasya_tad saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa śākhāḥ_śākhā kim_ka ca_ca guṇaiḥ_guṇa sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi vṛttibhiḥ_vṛtti jala--_jala secanaiḥ_secana iva_iva yathāyatham_yathāyatham pravṛddhāḥ_pravṛdh vṛddhim_vṛddhi prāptāḥ_prāp kim_ka ca_ca viṣayāḥ_viṣaya rūpa--_rūpa ādayaḥ_ādi pravālāḥ_pravāla pallava--_pallava sthānīyāḥ_sthānīya yāsām_yad tāḥ_tad śākhā--_śākhā agra--_agra sthānīyābhiḥ_sthānīya indriya--_indriya vṛttibhiḥ_vṛtti saṃyukta--_saṃyuj tvāt_tva kim_ka ca_ca adhas_adhas ca_ca ca_ca śabdāt_śabda ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam ca_ca mūlāni_mūla anusantatāni_anusaṃtan virūḍhāni_viruh mukhyam_mukhya mūlam_mūla īśvaraḥ_īśvara eva_eva imāni_idam tu_tu antarālāni_antarāla mūlāni_mūla tad--_tad tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa teṣām_tad kāryam_kārya āha_ah manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka karma--_karman anubandhīni_anubandhin iti_iti karma_karman eva_eva anubandhi_anubandhin uttara--_uttara kāla--_kāla bhāvi_bhāvin yeṣām_yad tāni_tad ūrdhva--_ūrdhva adhas_adhas lokeṣu_loka upabhukta--_upabhuj tad--_tad tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā ādibhiḥ_ādi hi_hi karma--_karman kṣaye_kṣaya manuṣya--_manuṣya lokam_loka prāptānām_prāp tad--_tad tad--_tad anurūpeṣu_anurūpa karmasu_karman pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti bhavati_bhū tasmin_tad eva_eva hi_hi karma--_karman adhikāraḥ_adhikāra na_na anyeṣu_anya lokeṣu_loka atas_atas manuṣya--_manuṣya lokaḥ_loka iti_iti uktam_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tasya_tad eva_eva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa avayava--_avayava sambandhinī_sambandhin aparā_apara kalpanā_kalpanā ucyate_vac adhas_adhas ca_ca iti_iti pūrvam_pūrvam hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha ādayaḥ_ādi kārya--_kārya upādhayaḥ_upādhi jīvāḥ_jīva śākhā--_śākhā sthānīya--_sthānīya tvena_tva uktāḥ_vac idānīm_idānīm tu_tu tad--_tad gataḥ_gam viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa ucyate_vac teṣu_tad ye_yad kapūya--_kapūya caraṇāḥ_caraṇa duṣkṛtinaḥ_duṣkṛtin te_tad adhas_adhas paśu--_paśu ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni prasṛtāḥ_prasṛ vistāram_vistāra gatāḥ_gam ye_yad tu_tu ramaṇīya--_ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ_caraṇa sukṛtinaḥ_sukṛtin te_tad ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam deva--_deva ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni prasṛtāḥ_prasṛ atas_atas adhas_adhas ca_ca manuṣya--_manuṣya tvāt_tva ārabhya_ārabh viriñci--_viriñci paryantam_paryanta ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam ca_ca tasmāt_tad eva_eva ārabhya_ārabh satya--_satya loka--_loka paryantam_paryanta prasṛtāḥ_prasṛ tasya_tad kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa tāḥ_tad guṇaiḥ_guṇa sattva--_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamobhiḥ_tamas deha--_deha indriya--_indriya viṣaya--_viṣaya ākāra--_ākāra pariṇataiḥ_pariṇam jala--_jala secanaiḥ_secana iva_iva pravṛddhāḥ_pravṛdh sthūlībhūtāḥ_sthūlībhū kim_ka ca_ca viṣayāḥ_viṣaya śabda--_śabda ādayaḥ_ādi pravālāḥ_pravāla pallavāḥ_pallava iva_iva yāsām_yad saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa śākhānām_śākhā tāḥ_tad tathā_tathā śākhā--_śākhā agra--_agra sthānīyābhiḥ_sthānīya indriya--_indriya vṛttibhiḥ_vṛtti sambandhāt_sambandha rāga--_rāga adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tvāt_tva ca_ca saṃyukta--_saṃyuj tvāt_tva kim_ka ca_ca adhas_adhas ca_ca ca_ca śabdāt_śabda ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam ca_ca mūlāni_mūla avāntarāṇi_avāntara tad--_tad tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga janita--_janay rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi vāsanā--_vāsanā lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa mūlāni_mūla iva_iva dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma pravṛtti--_pravṛtti kārakāṇi_kāraka tasya_tad saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa anusantatāni_anusaṃtan mukhyam_mukhya ca_ca mūlam_mūla brahma_brahman eva_eva iti_iti na_na doṣaḥ_doṣa kīdṛśāni_kīdṛśa avāntara--_avāntara mūlāni_mūla karma_karman dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa anubandhum_anubandhu paścāt_paścāt janayitum_janay śīlam_śīla yeṣām_yad tāni_tad karma--_karman anubandhīni_anubandhin kutra_kutra manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya ca_ca asau_adas lokaaḥ_lokaa ca_ca iti_iti adhikṛtaḥ_adhikṛ brāhmaṇya--_brāhmaṇya ādi--_ādi viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ dehaḥ_deha manuṣya--_manuṣya lokaḥ_loka tasmin_tad bāhulyena_bāhulya karma--_karman anubandhīni_anubandhin manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya hi_hi karma--_karman adhikāraḥ_adhikāra prasiddhaḥ_prasidh

viṣayā_viṣaya śabda--_śabda ādayaḥ_ādi pravālāḥ_pravāla pallava--_pallava sthānīyāḥ_sthānīya yāsām_yad tāḥ_tad kim_kim ca_ca tasya_tad mūle_mūla sarva--_sarva lokaiḥ_loka alakṣitaḥ_alakṣita mahā--_mahat nidhiḥ_nidhi kaścid_kaścit asti_as iti_iti anumīyate_anumā yam_yad eva_eva mūla--_mūla jaṭābhiḥ_jaṭā avalambya_avalamb sthitasya_sthā tasya_tad aśvattha--_aśvattha vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa api_api baṭa--_baṭa vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa iva_iva śākhāsu_śākhā api_api bāhyāḥ_bāhya brahma--_brahman loka--_loka mūlasya_mūla api_api tasya_tad adhas_adhas ca_ca manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka karma--_karman anubandhīni_anubandhin karma--_karman anulambīni_anulambin mūlāni_mūla anusantatāni_anusaṃtan nirantaram_nirantaram vistṛtāni_vistṛ bhavanti_bhū karma--_karman phalānām_phala yatas_yatas tatas_tatas bhoga--_bhoga ante_anta punar_punar manuṣya--_manuṣya janmani_janman
eva_eva karmasu_karman pravṛttāni_pravṛt bhavanti_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva kim_ka ca_ca adhas_adhas iti_iti tasya_tad ukta--_vac lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa saṃsāra--_saṃsāra aśvatthasya_aśvattha śākhāḥ_śākhā adhas_adhas ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam ca_ca prasṛtāḥ_prasṛ adhas_adhas manuṣya--_manuṣya paśu--_paśu ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni duṣkṛtaiḥ_duṣkṛta ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam ca_ca deva--_deva gandharva--_gandharva ādi--_ādi yoniṣu_yoni sukṛtaiḥ_sukṛta vistṛtāḥ_vistṛ guṇaiḥ_guṇa sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi vṛttibhiḥ_vṛtti ambu--_ambu niṣekaiḥ_niṣeka iva_iva pravṛddhāḥ_pravṛdh sthaulya--_sthaulya bhājaḥ_bhāj viṣayāḥ_viṣaya śabda--_śabda sparśa--_sparśa ādayaḥ_ādi pravālāḥ_pravāla pallavāḥ_pallava yāsām_yad tāḥ_tad śākhā--_śākhā agra--_agra sthānīyābhiḥ_sthānīya śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi vṛttibhiḥ_vṛtti yogāt_yoga rāga--_rāga adhiṣṭhāna--_adhiṣṭhāna tvāt_tva ca_ca śabda--_śabda ādīnām_ādi pallava--_pallava sthānīya--_sthānīya tvam_tva

tasya_tad aśvatthasya_aśvattha adhas_adhas ca_ca śabdāt_śabda ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam ca_ca avāntarāṇi_avāntara mūlāni_mūla anusantatāni_anusaṃtan vistṛtāni_vistṛ santi_as tāni_tad ca_ca tad--_tad tad--_tad bhoga--_bhoga janita--_janay rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa ādi--_ādi vāsanā--_vāsanā rūpāṇi_rūpa dharma--_dharma adharma--_adharma pravṛtti--_pravṛtti kāri--_kārin tvāt_tva mūla--_mūla tulyāni_tulya ucyante_vac mukhyam_mukhya mūlam_mūla tādṛś_tādṛś caturmukhaḥ_caturmukha tad--_tad tad--_tad vāsanāḥ_vāsanā tu_tu avāntara--_avāntara mūlāni_mūla nyagrodhasya_nyagrodha eva_eva jaṭā--_jaṭā upajaṭā--_upajaṭā vṛndāni_vṛnda iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tāni_tad kīdṛśāni_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka karma--_karman anubandhīni_anubandhin yatas_yatas tatas_tatas karma--_karman phala--_phala bhoga--_bhoga avasāne_avasāna sati_as punar_punar manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka karma--_karman hetu--_hetu bhūtāni_bhū bhavanti_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sa_tad lokaḥ_loka khalu_khalu karma--_karman bhūmiḥ_bhūmi iti_iti prasiddham_prasidh

lg.l: na_na rūpam_rūpa asya_idam iha_iha tathā_tathā upalabhyate_upalabh
na_na antaḥ_anta na_na ca_ca ādiḥ_ādi na_na ca_ca saṃpratiṣṭhā_sampratiṣṭhā
aśvattham_aśvattha enam_enad su_su virūḍha--_viruh mūlam_mūla
asaṅga--_asaṅga śastreṇa_śastra dṛḍhena_dṛḍha chittvā_chid
tatas_tatas padam_pada tat_tad parimārgitavyam_parimārg
yasmin_yad gatāḥ_gam na_na nivartanti_nivṛt bhūyas_bhūyas
tam_tad eva_eva ca_ca ādyam_ādya puruṣam_puruṣa prapadye_prapad
yatas_yatas pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti prasṛtā_prasṛ purāṇī_purāṇa

div.p: iha_iha saṃsāre_saṃsāra sthitaiḥ_sthā prāṇibhiḥ_prāṇin asya_idam saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa tathā_tathā ūrdhva--_ūrdhva mūla--_mūla tva--_tva ādi--_ādi prakāreṇa_prakāra rūpam_rūpa na_na upalabhyate_upalabh na_na ca_ca antaḥ_anta avasānam_avasāna a_a paryapta--_paryap tvāt_tva na_na ca_ca ādiḥ_ādi an_an ādi--_ādi tvāt_tva na_na ca_ca sampratiṣṭhā_sampratiṣṭhā sthitiḥ_sthiti katham_katham tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti na_na upalabhyate_upalabh yasmāt_yasmāt evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta ayam_idam saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣaḥ_vṛkṣa durucchedaḥ_duruccheda anartha--_anartha karaḥ_kara ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt enam_enad dṛḍhena_dṛḍha vairāgyena_vairāgya śastreṇa_śastra chitvā_chid tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna yateta_yat iti_iti āha_ah aśvattham_aśvattha enam_enad iti_iti sārdhena_sārdha enam_enad aśvattham_aśvattha su_su virūḍha--_viruh mūlam_mūla atyanta--_atyanta baddha--_bandh mūlam_mūla santam_as asaṅgaḥ_asaṅga saṅga--_saṅga rāhityam_rāhitya aham_mad mamatā--_mamatā tyāgaḥ_tyāga tena_tad śastreṇa_śastra dṛḍhena_dṛḍha samyak_samyak vicāreṇa_vicāra chittvā_chid pṛthak_pṛthak kṛtya_kṛt

tatas_tatas iti_iti tatas_tatas tasya_tad mūla--_mūla bhūtam_bhū tat_tad padam_pada vastu_vastu parimārgitavyam_parimārg anveṣṭavyam_anviṣ kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa yasmin_yad gatāḥ_gam yat_yad padam_pada prāptāḥ_prāp santaḥ_as bhūyas_bhūyas na_na nivartanti_nivṛt na_na āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha anveṣaṇa--_anveṣaṇa prakāram_prakāra eva_eva āha_ah tam_tad eva_eva iti_iti yatas_yatas eṣā_etad purāṇī_purāṇa cirantanī_cirantana saṃsāra--_saṃsāra pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti prasṛtā_prasṛ vistṛtā_vistṛ tam_tad eva_eva ca_ca ādyam_ādya puruṣam_puruṣa prapadye_prapad śaraṇam_śaraṇa vrajāmi_vraj iti_iti evam_evam ekānta--_ekānta bhaktyā_bhakti anveṣṭavyam_anviṣ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yaḥ_yad tu_tu ayam_idam saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣaḥ_vṛkṣa varṇitaḥ_varṇay iha_iha saṃsāre_saṃsāra sthitaiḥ_sthā prāṇibhiḥ_prāṇin asya_idam saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa tathā_tathā ūrdhva--_ūrdhva mūla--_mūla tva--_tva ādi_ādi tathā_tathā tena_tad prakāreṇa_prakāra rūpam_rūpa na_na upalabhyate_upalabh svapna--_svapna dṛṣṭa--_dṛś naṣṭa--_naś svarūpa--_svarūpa tvāt_tva tasya_tad atas_atas eva_eva tasya_tad antaḥ_anta avasānam_avasāna na_na upalabhyate_upalabh etāvatā_etāvat kālena_kāla samāptim_samāpti gamiṣyati_gam iti_iti a_a paryapta--_paryap tvāt_tva na_na ca_ca asya_idam ādiḥ_ādi upalabhyate_upalabh itas_itas ārabhya_ārabh pravṛttaḥ_pravṛt iti_iti anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva na_na ca_ca sampratiṣṭhā_sampratiṣṭhā sthitiḥ_sthiti madhyama--_madhyama sthā_stha upalabhyate_upalabh ādi--_ādi anta--_anta pratiyogika--_pratiyogika tvāt_tva tasya_tad yasmāt_yasmāt evaṃbhūtaḥ_evaṃbhūta ayam_idam saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣaḥ_vṛkṣa durucchedaḥ_duruccheda sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha karaḥ_kara ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt anādi--_anādi ajñānena_ajñāna su_su virūḍha--_viruh mūlam_mūla atyanta--_atyanta baddha--_bandh mūlam_mūla
prāc--_prāñc uktam_vac aśvattham_aśvattha asaṅga--_asaṅga śastreṇa_śastra saṅgaḥ_saṅga spṛhā_spṛhā asaṅgaḥ_asaṅga saṅga--_saṅga virodhi_virodhin vairāgyam_vairāgya putra--_putra vitta--_vitta loka--_loka eṣaṇā--_eṣaṇā tyāga--_tyāga rūpam_rūpa tat_tad eva_eva śastram_śastra rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa maya--_maya saṃsāra--_saṃsāra virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva tena_tad paramātma--_paramātman jñāna--_jñāna autsukhya--_autsukhya dṛḍhīkṛtena_dṛḍhīkṛ punar_punar punar_punar viveka--_viveka abhyāsa--_abhyāsa niśitena_niśā chittvā_chid sa_sa mūlam_mūla uddhṛtya_uddhṛ vairāgya--_vairāgya śama--_śama dama--_dama ādi--_ādi sampattyā_sampatti sarva--_sarva karma--_karman saṃnyāsam_saṃnyāsa kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti etat_etad

tatas_tatas gurum_guru upasṛtya_upasṛ tatas_tatas aśvatthāt_aśvattha ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam vyavasthitam_vyavasthā tat_tad vaiṣṇavam_vaiṣṇava padam_pada vedānta--_vedānta vākya--_vākya vicāreṇa_vicāra parimārgitavyam_parimārg mārgayitavyam_mārgay anveṣṭavyam_anviṣ saḥ_tad anveṣṭabhyaḥ_anveṣṭṛ sa_tad vijijñāsitavyaḥ_vijijiñās iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tat_tad padam_pada śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādinā_ādi jñātavyam_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kim_ka tat_tad padam_pada yasmin_yad pade_pada gatāḥ_gam praviṣṭāḥ_praviś jñānena_jñāna na_na nivartanti_nivṛt na_na āvartante_āvṛt bhūyas_bhūyas punar_punar saṃsārāya_saṃsāra katham_katham tat_tad parimārgitavyam_parimārg iti_iti āha_ah yaḥ_yad pada--_pada śabdena_śabda uktaḥ_vac tam_tad eva_eva ca_ca ādyam_ādya ādau_ādi bhavam_bhava puruṣam_puruṣa yena_yad idam_idam sarvam_sarva pūrṇam_pṛ tam_tad puruṣu_puru pūrṣu_pur vā_vā śayānam_śī prapadye_prapad śaraṇam_śaraṇa gataḥ_gam asmi_as iti_iti evam_evam arthaḥ_artha tam_tad kam_ka puruṣam_puruṣa yatas_yatas yasmāt_yad puruṣāt_puruṣa pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti māyā--_māyā maya--_maya saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti purāṇī_purāṇa cirantanī_cirantana anādiḥ_anādi eṣā_etad prasṛtā_prasṛ niḥsṛtā_niḥsṛ aindrajālikāt_aindrajālika iva_iva māyā--_māyā hasti--_hastin ādi_ādi tam_tad puruṣam_puruṣa

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha kim_ka ca_ca iha_iha manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka asya_idam rūpam_rūpa sva--_sva rūpam_rūpa tathā_tathā sa_sa niścayam_niścaya na_na upalabhyate_upalabh satyaḥ_satya ayam_idam mithyā_mithyā ayam_idam nityaḥ_nitya ayam_idam iti_iti vādi--_vādin mata--_mata vaividhyāt_vaividhya iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na ca_ca antaḥ_anta aparyanta--_aparyanta tvāt_tva na_na ca_ca ādiḥ_ādi anādi--_anādi tvāt_tva na_na ca_ca sampratiṣṭhā--_sampratiṣṭhā āśrayaḥ_āśraya kim_ka vā_vā ādhāraḥ_ādhāra kaḥ_ka ayam_idam iti_iti api_api nā_na upalabhyate_upalabh tattva--_tattva jñāna--_jñāna abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva yathā_yathā tathā_tathā ayam_idam bhavatu_bhū jīva--_jīva mātra--_mātra duḥkha--_duḥkha eka--_eka nidānasya_nidāna asya_idam chedakam_chedaka śastram_śastra asaṅgam_asaṅga jñātvā_jñā tena_tad etam_etad chittvā_chid eva_eva asya_idam mūla--_mūla tala--_tala sthaḥ_stha mahā--_mahat nidhiḥ_nidhi anveṣṭavyaḥ_anviṣ iti_iti āha_ah aśvattham_aśvattha iti_iti asaṅgaḥ_asaṅga anāsaktiḥ_anāsakti sarvatra_sarvatra vairāgyam_vairāgya iti_iti yāvat_yāvat tena_tad śastreṇa_śastra kuṭhāreṇa_kuṭhāra chitvā_chid svatas_svatas pṛthak_pṛthak kṛtya_kṛt tatas_tatas tasya_tad mūla--_mūla bhūtam_bhū tat_tad padam_pada vastu_vastu mahā--_mahat nidhi--_nidhi rūpam_rūpa brahma_brahman parimārgitavyam_parimārg kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa tat_tad atas_atas āha_ah yasmin_yad gatāḥ_gam yat_yad padam_pada prāptāḥ_prāp santaḥ_as bhūyas_bhūyas na_na nivartante_nivṛt na_na ca_ca āvartante_āvṛt iti_iti arthaḥ_artha anveṣaṇa--_anveṣaṇa prakāram_prakāra āha_ah yatas_yatas eṣā_etad purāṇī_purāṇa cirantanī_cirantana saṃsāra--_saṃsāra pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti prasṛtā_prasṛ vistṛtā_vistṛ tam_tad eva_eva ādyam_ādya puruṣam_puruṣa prapadye_prapad bhajāmi_bhaj iti_iti bhaktyā_bhakti anveṣṭavyam_anviṣ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva na_na rūpam_rūpa iti_iti asya_idam aśvatthasya_aśvattha rūpam_rūpa iha_iha manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka tathā_tathā na_na upalabhyate_upalabh yathā_yathā ūrdhva--_ūrdhva mūla--_mūla tva--_tva ādi--_ādi dharmaka--_dharmaka tayā_tā mayā_mad upavarṇitam_upavarṇay na_na ca_ca asya_idam antaḥ_anta nāśaḥ_nāśa upalalabhyate_upalabh katham_katham ayam_idam anartha--_anartha vrāta--_vrāta jaṭilaḥ_jaṭila vinaśyet_vinaś iti_iti na_na jñāyate_jñā na_na ca_ca asya_idam ādi--_ādi kāraṇam_kāraṇa upalabhyate_upalabh kutas_kutas ayam_idam īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa jātaḥ_jan asti_as iti_iti na_na ca_ca asya_idam sampratiṣṭhā_sampratiṣṭhā samāśrayaḥ_samāśraya api_api upalabhyate_upalabh kim_ka samāśrayaḥ_samāśraya ayam_idam satiṣṭhat_sthā iti_iti

kintu_kiṃtu aham_mad putraḥ_putra yajña--_yajña dattasya_dā pitā_pitṛ ca_ca deva--_deva dattasya_datta tad--_tad anurūpa--_anurūpa karma--_karman kārī_kārin sukhī_sukhin duḥkhī_duḥkhin sa_tad asmin_idam deśe_deśa asmin_idam grāme_grāma nivasāmi_nivas iti_iti etāvat_etāvat eva_eva vijñāyate_vijñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam durbodhaḥ_durbodha anartha--_anartha vrate_vrata hetuḥ_hetu ca_ca ayam_idam aśvatthaḥ_aśvattha tasmāt_tasmāt sat--_sat prasaṅga--_prasaṅga labdha--_labh vastu--_vastu yāthātmya--_yāthātmya jñānena_jñāna enam_enad asaṅga--_asaṅga śastreṇa_śastra vairāgya--_vairāgya kuṭhāreṇa_kuṭhāra dṛḍhena_dṛḍha viveka--_viveka abhyāsa--_abhyāsa niśitena_niśā chitvā_chid parimārgitavyam_parimārg iti_iti pareṇa_para anvayaḥ_anvaya saṅgaḥ_saṅga viṣaya--_viṣaya abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa tad--_tad virodhi_virodhin asaṅgaḥ_asaṅga vairāgyam_vairāgya tat_tad eva_eva śastram_śastra tad--_tad abhilāṣa--_abhilāṣa nāśaka--_nāśaka tvāt_tva su_su virūḍha--_viruh mūlam_mūla pūrvokta--_pūrvokta rītyā_rīti atyantam_atyantam baddha--_bandh mūlam_mūla tatas_tatas saṃsāra--_saṃsāra aśvattha--_aśvattha mūlāt_mūla upari_upari sthitam_sthā tat_tad padam_pada parimārgitavyam_parimārg mad--_mad prasaṅga--_prasaṅga labdhaiḥ_labh śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi sādhanaiḥ_sādhana anveṣṭavyam_anviṣ

tat_tad padam_pada kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa tatra_tatra āha_ah yasmin_yad iti_iti yasmin_yad gatāḥ_gam taiḥ_tad sādhanaiḥ_sādhana yat_yad prāptāḥ_prāp janāḥ_jana tatas_tatas na_na nivartante_nivṛt svargāt_svarga iva_iva na_na patanti_pat mārgaṇa--_mārgaṇa vidhim_vidhi āha_ah tam_tad eva_eva iti_iti yatas_yatas purāṇī_purāṇa cirantanīyam_cirantanīya jagat--_jagant pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti prasṛtā_prasṛ vistṛtā_vistṛ tam_tad eva_eva ca_ca ādyam_ādya puruṣam_puruṣa prapadye_prapad śaraṇam_śaraṇa vrajāmi_vraj iti_iti prapatti--_prapatti pūrvakaiḥ_pūrvaka śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi tad--_tad mārgaṇam_mārgaṇa uktam_vac yaḥ_yad jagat--_jagant hetuḥ_hetu yad--_yad porapattyā_porapatti saṃsāra--_saṃsāra nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti sa_tad khalu_khalu kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa eva_eva aham_mad sarvasya_sarva prabhavaḥ_prabhava iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi daivī_daiva hi_hi eṣā_etad guṇa--_guṇa mayī_maya iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi ca_ca tad--_tad ukteḥ_ukti na_na tat_tad bhāsayate_bhāsay iti_iti ādinā_ādi vyaktībhāvi--_vyaktībhāvin tvāt_tva ca_ca
BhG 15.5

lg.l: nirmāna--_nirmāna mohā_moha jita--_ji saṅga--_saṅga doṣā_doṣa
adhyātma--_adhyātma nityāḥ_nitya vinivṛtta--_vinivṛt kāmāḥ_kāma
dvandvaiḥ_dvaṃdva vimuktāḥ_vimuc sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha saṃjñaiḥ_saṃjñā
gacchanti_gam amūḍhāḥ_amūḍha padam_pada avyayam_avyaya tat_tad

div.p: āha_ah nirgatau_nirgam māna--_māna mohau_moha ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra mithyā_mithyā ati_ati siva--_siva īśau_īśa yebhyaḥ_yad te_tad jitaḥ_ji putra--_putra ādi--_ādi saṅga--_saṅga rūpaḥ_rūpa doṣaḥ_doṣa yaiḥ_yad te_tad adhyātma--_adhyātma ātma--_ātman jñāne_jñāna nityāḥ_nitya pariniṣṭhitāḥ_pariniṣṭhā viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa nivṛttaḥ_nivṛt kāmaḥ_kāma yebhyaḥ_yad te_tad sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha saṃjñāni_saṃjñā śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādīni_ādi dvandvāni_dvaṃdva taiḥ_tad vimuktāḥ_vimuc atas_atas eva_eva amūḍhāḥ_amūḍha nivṛta--_nivṛ avidyāḥ_avidyā santaḥ_as tat_tad avyayam_avyaya padam_pada gacchanti_gam

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana parimārgaṇa--_parimārgaṇa pūrvakam_pūrvaka vaiṣṇavam_vaiṣṇava padam_pada gacchatām_gam aṅga--_aṅga antarāṇi_antara āha_ah nirmāṇa--_nirmāṇa iti_iti mānaḥ_māna ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra garvaḥ_garva mohaḥ_moha tu_tu avivekaḥ_aviveka viparyayaḥ_viparyaya vā_vā tābhyām_tad niṣkrāntāḥ_niṣkram nirmāna--_nirmāna mohāḥ_moha tau_tad nirgatau_nirgam yebhyaḥ_yad te_tad vā_vā tathā_tathā ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra avivekābhyām_aviveka rahitāḥ_rahita iti_iti yāvat_yāvat jita--_ji saṅga--_saṅga doṣāḥ_doṣa priya--_priya apriya--_apriya saṃvidhau_saṃvidhi api_api rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa varjitāḥ_varjay iti_iti yāvat_yāvat adhyātma--_adhyātma nityāḥ_nitya paramātma--_paramātman svarūpa--_svarūpa lokcana--_lokcana tad--_tad parāḥ_para vinivṛtta--_vinivṛt kāmāḥ_kāma viśeṣa--_viśeṣa itas_itas niravaśeṣeṇa_niravaśeṣa nivṛttāḥ_nivṛt kāmāḥ_kāma viṣaya--_viṣaya bhogāḥ_bhoga yeṣām_yad te_tad viveka--_viveka vairāgya--_vairāgya dvārā_dvār tyakta--_tyaj sarva--_sarva karmāṇaḥ_karman iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dvandvaiḥ_dvaṃdva śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi kṣudh--_kṣudh pipāsā--_pipāsā ādibhiḥ_ādi sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha saṃjñaiḥ_saṃjñā sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha nāmakaiḥ_nāmaka sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha saṅgaiḥ_saṅga iti_iti pāṭha--_pāṭha antare_antara sukha--_sukha duḥkhābhyām_duḥkha saṅgaḥ_saṅga vimuktāḥ_vimuc parityaktāḥ_parityaj amūḍhāḥ_amūḍha vedānta--_vedānta pramāṇa--_pramāṇa saṃjāta--_saṃjan samyak_samyak jñāna--_jñāna nivārita--_nivāray ātma--_ātman ājñānāḥ_ājñāna tat_tad avyayam_avyaya yathā_yathā uktam_vac padam_pada gacchanti_gam
prāpnuvanti_prāp āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva tad--_tad prapattau_prapatti satyām_as kīdṛśāḥ_kīdṛśa santaḥ_sat tat_tad padam_pada prāpnuvanti_prāp iti_iti āha_ah nirmāna--_nirmāna iti_iti mohaḥ_moha mithyā_mithyā abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa tābhyām_tad nirgatāḥ_nirgam jitaḥ_ji saṅga--_saṅga doṣaḥ_doṣa priya--_priya bhāryā--_bhāryā ādi--_ādi sneha--_sneha lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa yaiḥ_yad te_tad adhyātmam_adhyātma sva--_sva para--_para ātma--_ātman viṣayakaḥ_viṣayaka vimarśaḥ_vimarśa sa_tad nityaḥ_nitya nitya--_nitya kartavyaḥ_kṛ yeṣām_yad te_tad sukha--_sukha ādi--_ādi hetu--_hetu tvāt_tva tad--_tad saṃjñaiḥ_saṃjñā dvandvaiḥ_dvaṃdva śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādibhiḥ_ādi vimuktāḥ_vimuc tad--_tad sahiṣṇavaḥ_sahiṣṇu amūḍhāḥ_amūḍha prapatti--_prapatti vidhi--_vidhi jñāḥ_jña

lg.l: na_na tat_tad bhāsayate_bhāsay sūryaḥ_sūrya na_na śaśāṅkaḥ_śaśāṅka na_na pāvakaḥ_pāvaka
yat_yad gatvā_gam na_na nivartante_nivṛt tat_tad dhāma_dhāman paramam_parama mama_mad

div.p: tat_tad padam_pada sūrya--_sūrya ādayaḥ_ādi na_na prakāśayanti_prakāśay yat_yad prāpya_prāp na_na nivartante_nivṛt yoginaḥ_yogin tat_tad dhāma_dhāman svarūpam_svarūpa paramam_parama mama_mad anena_idam sūrya--_sūrya ādi--_ādi prakāśa--_prakāśa viṣaya--_viṣaya tvena_tva jaḍa--_jaḍa tva--_tva śīta--_śīta uṣṇa--_uṣṇa ādi--_ādi doṣa--_doṣa prasaṅgaḥ_prasaṅga nirastaḥ_niras

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tat_tad eva_eva gantavyam_gam padam_pada viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ na_na tat_tad iti_iti yat_yad vaiṣṇavam_vaiṣṇava padam_pada gatvā_gam yoginaḥ_yogin na_na nivartante_nivṛt tat_tad padam_pada sarva--_sarva avabhāsana--_avabhāsana śaktimān_śaktimat api_api sūryaḥ_sūrya na_na bhāsayate_bhāsay sūrya--_sūrya asta--_asta maye_maya api_api candraḥ_candra bhāsakaḥ_bhāsaka dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah na_na śaśāṅkaḥ_śaśāṅka sūryācandramasoḥ_sūryācandramas ubhayoḥ_ubhaya api_api asta--_asta maye_maya agniḥ_agni prakāśakaḥ_prakāśaka dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś iti_iti āśaṅkya_āśaṅk āha_ah na_na pāvakaḥ_pāvaka bhāsayate_bhāsay iti_iti ubhayatra_ubhayatra api_api anuṣajyate_anuṣañj kutas_kutas sūrya--_sūrya ādīnām_ādi tatra_tatra prakāśana--_prakāśana asāmarthyam_asāmarthya iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah tat_tad dhāma_dhāman jyotiḥ_jyotis svayam_svayam prakāśam_prakāśa ādiyādi--_ādiyādi sakala--_sakala jaḍa--_jaḍa jyotiḥ--_jyotis avabhāsakam_avabhāsaka paramam_parama prakṛṣṭam_prakṛṣ mama_mad viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu svarūpa--_svarūpa ātmakam_ātmaka padam_pada na_na hi_hi yaḥ_yad yad--_yad bhāsyaḥ_bhās sa_tad sva--_sva bhāsakam_bhāsaka tam_tad bhāsayitum_bhāsay īṣṭe_īś tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti

na_na tatra_tatra sūryaḥ_sūrya bhāti_bhā na_na candra--_candra tārakam_tāraka na_na imāḥ_idam vidyutaḥ_vidyut bhānti_bhā kutas_kutas ayam_idam agniḥ_agni tam_tad eva_eva anubhāti_anubhā sarvam_sarva
tasya_tad bhāsā_bhās sarvam_sarva idam_idam vibhāti_vibhā iti_iti

avedya--_avedya tve_tva sati_as api_api svayam_svayam aparokṣa--_aparokṣa tvāt_tva tatra_tatra avedya--_avedya tvam_tva sūrya--_sūrya ādi--_ādi abhāsya--_abhāsya tvena_tva atra_atra uktam_vac sarva--_sarva bhāsaka--_bhāsaka tvena_tva tu_tu svayam_svayam aparokṣa--_aparokṣa tvam_tva yat_yad āditya--_āditya gatam_gam tejaḥ_tejas iti_iti atra_atra vakṣyati_vac evam_evam ubhābhyām_ubh ślokābhyām_śloka śruteḥ_śruti dalat--_dal vacam_vaca vyākhyātam_vyākhyā iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś

āha_ah auṣṇya--_auṣṇya śaitya--_śaitya ādi--_ādi duḥkha--_duḥkha rahitam_rahita tat_tad sva--_sva prakāśam_prakāśa iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tat_tad mama_mad paramam_parama dhāma_dhāman sarva--_sarva utkṛṣṭam_utkṛṣṭa ajaḍam_ajaḍa atīndriyam_atīndriya tejaḥ_tejas sarva--_sarva prakāśakam_prakāśaka yat_yad uktam_vac hari--_hari vaṃśe_vaṃśa

tat_tad param_para paramam_parama brahma_brahman sarvam_sarva vibhajate_vibhaj jagat_jagant
mama_mad eva_eva tat_tad ghanam_ghana tejaḥ_tejas jñātum_jñā arhasi_arh bhārata_bhārata

na_na tatra_tatra sūryaḥ_sūrya bhāti_bhā na_na candra--_candra tārakam_tāraka na_na imāḥ_idam vidyutaḥ_vidyut bhānti_bhā kutas_kutas ayam_idam agniḥ_agni tam_tad eva_eva anubhāti_anubhā sarvam_sarva tasya_tad bhāsā_bhās sarvam_sarva idam_idam vibhāti_vibhā iti_iti śrutibhyaḥ_śruti ca_ca

baladevaḥ_baladeva gantavyam_gam padam_pada viśiṣyan_viśiṣ paricāyayati_paricāyay na_na tat_tad iti_iti prapannāḥ_prapad yat_yat gatvā_gam yatas_yatas na_na nivartante_nivṛt tat_tad mama_mad eva_eva dhāma_dhāman svarūpam_svarūpa paramam_parama śrīmat_śrīmat sarva--_sarva avabhāsakāḥ_avabhāsaka api_api sūrya--_sūrya ādayaḥ_ādi tat_tad na_na bhāsayanti_bhāsay prakāśayanti_prakāśay na_na tatra_tatra sūryaḥ_sūrya bhāti_bhā iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruteḥ_śruti ca_ca sūrya--_sūrya ādibhiḥ_ādi aprakāśyaḥ_aprakāśya teṣām_tad prakāśakaḥ_prakāśaka sva--_sva prakāśaka--_prakāśaka cit--_cit vigrahaḥ_vigraha lakṣmīpatiḥ_lakṣmīpati aham_mad eva_eva pada--_pada śabda--_śabda bodhyaḥ_budh prapannaiḥ_prapad labhyaḥ_labh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
BhG 15.7

lg.l: mama_mad eva_eva aṃśaḥ_aṃśa jīva--_jīva loke_loka jīva--_jīva bhūtaḥ_bhū sanātanaḥ_sanātana
manaḥ--_manas ṣaṣṭhāni_ṣaṣṭha indriyāṇi_indriya prakṛti--_prakṛti sthāni_stha karṣati_kṛṣ

div.p: viduḥ_vid sampadyāmahe_sampad asti_as syāt_as saṃsāriṇam_saṃsārin darśayati_darśay mama_mad eva_eva iti_iti pañcabhiḥ_pañcan mama_mad eva_eva aṃśaḥ_aṃśa yaḥ_yad ayam_idam avidyayā_avidyā jīva--_jīva bhūtaḥ_bhū sanātanaḥ_sanātana sarvadā_sarvadā saṃsāri--_saṃsārin tvena_tva prasiddhaḥ_prasidh asau_adas suṣupti--_suṣupti pralayayoḥ_pralaya prakṛtau_prakṛti līna--_lī tayā_tā sthitāni_sthā manaḥ_manas ṣaṣṭham_ṣaṣṭha yeṣām_yad tāni_tad indriyāṇi_indriya punar_punar jīva--_jīva loke_loka saṃsāra--_saṃsāra upabhoga--_upabhoga artham_artha ākarṣati_ākṛṣ etat_etad ca_ca karmendriyāṇām_karmendriya prāṇasya_prāṇa ca_ca upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa artham_artha ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva saatyam_saatya suṣupti--_suṣupti pralayayoḥ_pralaya api_api mad--_mad aṃśa--_aṃśa tvāt_tva jīva--_jīva mātrasya_mātra mayi_mad layāt_laya asti_as eva_eva mad--_mad prāptiḥ_prāpti tathā_tathā api_api avidyāya_avidyā āvṛtasya_āvṛ sa_sa anuśayasya_anuśaya sa_sa prakṛtike_prakṛtika mayi_mad layaḥ_laya na_na tu_tu śuddhe_śudh tat_tad uktam_vac avyaktāt_avyakta vyaktayaḥ_vyakti sarve_sarva prabhanti_prabh iti_iti ādinā_ādi atas_atas ca_ca punar_punar saṃsārāya_saṃsāra nirgacchan_nirgam avidvān_avidvas prakṛtau_prakṛti līna--_lī tayā_tā sthitāni_sthā sva--_sva upādhi--_upādhi bhūtāni_bhū indriyāṇi_indriya ākarṣati_ākṛṣ viduṣām_vidvas tu_tu śuddha--_śuddha sva--_sva rūpa--_rūpa prāpteḥ_prāpti na_na avṛttiḥ_avṛtti iti_iti

tat_tad etat_etad sarvam_sarva pratipādyate_pratipāday uttareṇa_uttara granthena_grantha tatra_tatra jīvasya_jīva brahma--_brahman rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva ajñāna--_ajñāna nivṛttyā_nivṛtti tad--_tad svarūpam_svarūpa prāptasya_prāp tatas_tatas na_na pracyutiḥ_pracyuti iti_iti pratipādyate_pratipāday mama_mad eva_eva aṃśaḥ_aṃśa iti_iti śloka--_śloka ardhena_ardha suṣuptau_suṣupti tu_tu sarva--_sarva kārya--_kārya saṃskāra--_saṃskāra sahita--_sahita ajñāna--_ajñāna sattvāt_sattva tatas_tatas punar_punar saṃsāraḥ_saṃsāra jīvasya_jīva iti_iti manaḥ--_manas ṣaṣṭhāni_ṣaṣṭha iti_iti śloka--_śloka ardhena_ardha pratipādyate_pratipāday tatas_tatas tasya_tad vastutas_vastutas asaṃsāriṇaḥ_asaṃsārin api_api māyayā_māyā saṃsāram_saṃsāra prāptasya_prāp manda--_manda matibhiḥ_mati deha--_deha tādātmyam_tādātmya prāpitasya_prāpay dehāt_deha vyatirekaḥ_vyatireka pratipādyate_pratipāday śarīram_śarīra iti_iti ādinā_ādi śloka--_śloka ardhena_ardha śrotram_śrotra cakṣuḥ_cakṣus iti_iti ādinā_ādi tu_tu yathāyatham_yathāyatham sva--_sva viṣayeṣu_viṣaya indriyāṇām_indriya pravartakasya_pravartaka tasya_tad tebhyaḥ_tad vyatirekaḥ_vyatireka pratipādyate_pratipāday evam_evam deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa utkrānti--_utkrānti ādi--_ādi samaye_samaya svātma--_svātman rūpatvāt_rūpatva kim_ka iti_iti sarve_sarva na_na paśyanti_dṛś iti_iti āśaṅkāyām_āśaṅkā viṣaya--_viṣaya vikṣipta--_vikṣip cittāḥ_citta darśana--_darśana yogyam_yogya api_api tam_tad na_na paśyanti_dṛś iti_iti uttaram_uttara ucyate_vac tam_tad jñāna--_jñāna cakṣuṣaḥ_cakṣus paśyanti_paś iti_iti vivṛtam_vivṛ yatantaḥ_yat yoginaḥ_yogin iti_iti śloka--_śloka ardhena_ardha vimūḍhāḥ_vimuh na_na anupaśyanti_anupaś iti_iti etat_etad vivṛtam_vivṛ yatantaḥ_yat api_api iti_iti śloka--_śloka ardhena_ardha iti_iti pañcānām_pañcan ślokānām_śloka saṅgatiḥ_saṃgati idānīm_idānīm akṣarāṇi_akṣara vyākhyāsyāmaḥ_vyākhyā mama_mad iti_iti

mama_mad eva_eva paramātmanaḥ_paramātman aṃśaḥ_aṃśa niraṃśasya_niraṃśa api_api māyayā_māyā kalpitaḥ_kalpay sūryasya_sūrya iva_iva jale_jala nabhasaḥ_nabhas iva_iva ca_ca ghaṭe_ghaṭa mṛṣā_mṛṣā bhedavān_bhedavat aṃśaḥ_aṃśa iva_iva aṃśaḥ_aṃśa jīva--_jīva loke_loka saṃsāre_saṃsāra sa_tad ca_ca prāṇa--_prāṇa dhāraṇa--_dhāraṇa upādhinā_upādhi upāgataḥ_upāgam sanātanaḥ_sanātana nitya--_nitya upādhi--_upādhi paricchede_pariccheda api_api vastutas_vastutas paramātma--_paramātman tva--_tva rūpa--_rūpa tvāt_tva atas_atas jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi jñāna--_jñāna nivṛttyā_nivṛtti sva--_sva svarūpam_svarūpa brahma_brahman prāpya_prāp tatas_tatas na_na nivartante_nivṛt iti_iti yuktam_yuj
