evam_evam bhūtaḥ_bhū api_api suṣuptāt_suṣupta katham_katham āvartate_āvṛt iti_iti āha_ah manaḥ_manas ṣaṣṭham_ṣaṣṭha yeṣām_yad tāni_tad śrotra--_śrotra tvac--_tvac cakṣū--_cakṣus rasana--_rasana ghrāṇa--_ghrāṇa ākhyāni_ākhyā viṣaya--_viṣaya upalabdhi--_upalabdhi karaṇatayā_karaṇatā liṅgāni_liṅga jāgrat--_jāgrant svapna--_svapna bhoga--_bhoga janaka--_janaka prakṛti--_prakṛti sthāni_stha prakṛtau_prakṛti ajñāne_ajñāna sūkṣma--_sūkṣma rūpeṇa_rūpa sthitāni_sthā punar_punar jāgrat--_jāgrant bhoga--_bhoga janaka--_janaka karma--_karman udaye_udaya bhoga--_bhoga artham_artha karṣati_kṛṣ kūrmaḥ_kūrma aṅgāni_aṅga iva_iva prakṛteḥ_prakṛti ajñānāt_ajñāna ākarṣati_ākṛṣ viṣaya--_viṣaya grahaṇa--_grahaṇa yogyatayā_yogyatā atas_atas jñānāt_jñāna anāvṛttau_anāvṛtti api_api ajñānāt_ajñāna āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti na_na anupapannā_anupapanna iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

āha_ah yat_yad uktam_vac vārāhe_vārāha sva--_sva aṃśaḥ_aṃśa ca_ca atha_atha vibhinna--_vibhid aṃśaḥ_aṃśa iti_iti dvedhā_dvedhā ayam_idam iṣyate_iṣ vibhinna--_vibhid aṃśaḥ_aṃśa tu_tu jīvaḥ_jīva syāt_as iti_iti sanātanaḥ_sanātana nityaḥ_nitya sa_tad ca_ca baddha--_bandh daśāyām_daśā manaḥ_manas eva_eva ṣaṣṭham_ṣaṣṭha yeṣām_yad tāni_tad indriyāṇi_indriya prakṛtau_prakṛti upādhau_upādhi sthitāni_sthā karṣati_kṛṣ mama_mad eva_eva etāni_etad iti_iti svīya--_svīya tva--_tva abhimānena_abhimāna gṛhītām_grah pāda--_pāda argala--_argala śṛṅkhalām_śṛṅkhalā iva_iva karṣati_kṛṣ

baladevaḥ_baladeva nanu_nanu tvad--_tvad prapattyā_prapatti yaḥ_yad tat_tad padam_pada yāti_yā sa_tad jīvaḥ_jīva kaḥ_ka iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah mama_mad eva_eva iti_iti jīvaḥ_jīva sarveśvarasya_sarveśvara mama_mad eva_eva aṃśaḥ_aṃśa na_na tu_tu brahma--_brahman rudra--_rudra ādeḥ_ādi īśvarasya_īśvara sa_tad ca_ca sanātanaḥ_sanātana nityaḥ_nitya na_na tu_tu ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ākāśa--_ākāśa ādi--_ādi vat_vat kalpitaḥ_kalpay sa_tad ca_ca jīva--_jīva loke_loka prapañce_prapañca sthitaḥ_sthā manaḥ--_manas ṣaṣṭhāni_ṣaṣṭha indriyāṇi_indriya śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi karṣati_kṛṣ pāda--_pāda ādi--_ādi śṛṅkhalāḥ_śṛṅkhalā iva_iva vahati_vah tāni_tad kīdṛṃśī_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah prakṛti--_prakṛti sthāni_stha prakṛti--_prakṛti vikāra--_vikāra bhūta--_bhūta ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra kāryāṇi_kārya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra manaḥ_manas sāttvika--_sāttvika ahaṅkārasya_ahaṃkāra śrotra--_śrotra ādikam_ādika tu_tu rājasa--_rājasa ahaṅkārasya_ahaṃkāra kāryam_kārya iti_iti bodhyam_budh bhagavat--_bhagavant prapattyā_prapatti prākṛta--_prākṛta karaṇa--_karaṇa hīnaḥ_hā bhagavat--_bhagavant lokam_loka gataḥ_gam tu_tu bhāgavataiḥ_bhāgavata deha--_deha karaṇaiḥ_karaṇa vibhūṣaṇaiḥ_vibhūṣaṇa iva_iva viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ bhagavantam_bhagavant saṃśrayan_saṃśri nivasati_nivas iti_iti sūcyate_sūcay sa_tad vai_vai eṣa_etad brahma--_brahman brahma_brahman abhisampadya_abhisampad brahmaṇā_brahman paśyati_paś brahmaṇā_brahman śṛṇoti_śru brahmaṇā_brahman eva_eva idam_idam sarvam_sarva anubhavati_anubhū iti_iti mādhyandināyana--_mādhyaṃdināyana śruteḥ_śruti vasanti_vas yatra_yatra puruṣāḥ_puruṣa sarve_sarva vaikuṇṭha--_vaikuṇṭha mūrtayaḥ_mūrti iti_iti ādi_ādi smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa siddha--_sidh cit--_cit vigrahaḥ_vigraha tatra_tatra bhavati_bhū iti_iti

yat_yad tu_tu ghaṭa--_ghaṭa ākāśa--_ākāśa vat_vat jala--_jala ākāśa--_ākāśa vat_vat vā_vā jīve_jīva brahmaṇaḥ_brahman aṃśaḥ_aṃśa antaḥkaraṇena_antaḥkaraṇa avacchedāt_avaccheda tasmin_tad pratibimba--_pratibimba nāśāt_nāśa vā_vā ghaṭa--_ghaṭa jala--_jala nāśe_nāśa tad--_tad tad--_tad ākāśasya_ākāśa śuddha--_śudh ākāśa--_ākāśa tva--_tva vat_vat antaḥkaraṇa_antaḥkaraṇa tat_tad sāram_sāra jīva--_jīva bhūtaḥ_bhū mama_mad aṃśaḥ_aṃśa sanātanaḥ_sanātana iti_iti ukti--_ukti vyākopāt_vyākopa pariccheda--_pariccheda ādi--_ādi vāda--_vāda dvayasya_dvaya dehinaḥ_dehin asmin_idam yathā_yathā iti_iti atra_atra pratyākhyānāt_pratyākhyāna ca_ca pratibimba--_pratibimba sādṛśyāt_sādṛśya tu_tu tattvam_tattva mantavyam_man ambu--_ambu vat_vat adhikaraṇa--_adhikaraṇa vinirṇayāt_vinirṇaya tasmāt_tasmāt brahma--_brahman upasarjana--_upasarjana tvam_tva jīvasya_jīva brahma--_brahman aṃśa--_aṃśa tvam_tva vidhu--_vidhu maṇḍalasya_maṇḍala śata--_śata aṃśaḥ_aṃśa śukra--_śukra maṇḍalam_maṇḍala iti_iti ādau_ādi dṛṣṭam_dṛś ca_ca idam_idam eka--_eka vastu--_vastu eka--_eka deśa--_deśa tvam_tva ca_ca aṃśa--_aṃśa tvam_tva āhuḥ_ah brahma_brahman khalu_khalu śaktimat_śaktimat ekam_eka vastu_vastu brahma--_brahman śaktiḥ_śakti itas_itas tu_tu anyām_anya prakṛtim_prakṛti viddhi_vid me_mad parām_para jīva--_jīva bhūtām_bhū iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva ukteḥ_ukti atas_atas tat_tad eka--_eka deśāt_deśa tad--_tad aṃśaḥ_aṃśa jīvaḥ_jīva
BhG 15.8

lg.l: śarīram_śarīra yat_yad avāpnoti_avāp yat_yad ca_ca api_api utkrāmati_utkram īśvaraḥ_īśvara
gṛhītvā_grah etāni_etad saṃyāti_saṃyā vāyuḥ_vāyu gandhān_gandha iva_iva āśayāt_āśaya

div.p: karoti_kṛ atra_atra āha_ah śarīram_śarīra iti_iti yat_yad yadā_yadā śarīra--_śarīra antaram_antara karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa avāpnoti_avāp yatas_yatas ca_ca śarīrāt_śarīra utkrāmati_utkram īśvaraḥ_īśvara deha--_deha ādīnām_ādi svāmī_svāmin tadā_tadā pūrvasmāt_pūrva śarīrāt_śarīra etāni_etad gṛhītvā_grah tat_tad śarīra--_śarīra antaram_antara samyak_samyak yāti_yā śarīre_śarīra sati_as api_api indriya--_indriya grahaṇe_grahaṇa dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta āśayāt_āśaya sva--_sva sthānāt_sthāna kusuma--_kusuma ādeḥ_ādi sakāśāt_sakāśāt gandhān_gandha gandhavataḥ_gandhavat sūkṣmān_sūkṣma aṃśān_aṃśa gṛhītvā_grah vāyuḥ_vāyu yathā_yathā gacchati_gam tadvat_tadvat

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana asmin_idam kāle_kāla karṣati_kṛṣ iti_iti ucyate_vac śarīram_śarīra iti_iti yat_yat yadā_yadā utkrāmati_utkram bahis_bahis nirgacchati_nirgam īśvaraḥ_īśvara deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṃghātasya_saṃghāta svāmī_svāmin jīvaḥ_jīva tadā_tadā yatas_yatas dehāt_deha utkrāmati_utkram tatas_tatas manaḥ--_manas ṣaṣṭhāni_ṣaṣṭha indriyāṇi_indriya karṣati_kṛṣ iti_iti dvitīya--_dvitīya pādasya_pāda prathamam_prathama anvayaḥ_anvaya na_na kevalam_kevalam karṣati_kṛṣ eva_eva kintu_kiṃtu yat_yad yadā_yadā ca_ca pūrvasmāt_pūrva śarīra--_śarīra antaram_antara avāpnoti_avāp tadā_tadā etāni_etad manaḥ--_manas ṣaṣṭhā--_ṣaṣṭhā īndriyāṇi_indriya gṛhītvā_grah saṃyāti_saṃyā api_api samyak_samyak punar_punar āgamana--_āgamana rāhityena_rāhitya gacchati_gam api_api śarīre_śarīra sati_as eva_eva indriya--_indriya grahaṇe_grahaṇa dṛṣṭāntaḥ_dṛṣṭānta āśayāt_āśaya kusuma--_kusuma ādeḥ_ādi sthānāt_sthāna gandhān_gandha gandha--_gandha ātmakān_ātmaka sūkṣmān_sūkṣma aṃśān_aṃśa gṛhītvā_grah yathā_yathā vāyuḥ_vāyu vāti_vā tadvat_tadvat

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tāni_tad a_a kṛṣya_kṛṣ kim_ka karoti_kṛ iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah śarīram_śarīra iti_iti yat_yad sthūla--_sthūla śarīram_śarīra karma--_karman vaśāt_vaśa avāpnoti_avāp yat_yad ca_ca yasmāt_yad ca_ca śarīrāt_śarīra utkrāmati_utkram niṣkrāmati_niṣkram īśvaraḥ_īśvara deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi svāmī_svāmin jīvaḥ_jīva tasmāt_tasmāt tatra_tatra etāni_etad indriyāṇi_indriya bhūta--_bhūta sūkṣmaiḥ_sūkṣma saha_saha gṛhītvā_grah eva_eva yathā_yathā āśayāt_āśaya gandha--_gandha āśrayāt_āśraya sraj--_sraj candana--_candana ādeḥ_ādi sakāśāt_sakāśāt sūkṣma--_sūkṣma avayavaiḥ_avayava saha_saha gandhān_gandha gṛhītvā_grah anyatra_anyatra yāti_yā tadvat_tadvat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva :--_jīva loke_loka sthitaḥ_sthā indriyāṇi_indriya karṣati_kṛṣ iti_iti uktam_vac tat_tad pratipādayati_pratipāday śarīram_śarīra iti_iti īśvaraḥ_īśvara svāmī_svāmin jīvaḥ_jīva yat_yat yadā_yadā pūrva--_pūrva śarīrāt_śarīra anyat_anya śarīram_śarīra avāpnoti_avāp yadā_yadā ca_ca āptāt_āp śarīrāt_śarīra utkrāmati_utkram tadā_tadā etāni_etad indriyāṇi_indriya bhūta--_bhūta sūkṣmaiḥ_sūkṣma saha_saha gṛhṭivā_grah yāti_yā āśayāt_āśaya puṣpa--_puṣpa kośāt_kośa gandhān_gandha yathā_yathā anyatra_anyatra yāti_yā tadvat_tadvat

lg.l: śrotram_śrotra cakṣuḥ_cakṣus sparśanam_sparśana ca_ca rasanam_rasana ghrāṇam_ghrāṇa eva_eva ca_ca
adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā manaḥ_manas ca_ca ayam_idam viṣayān_viṣaya upasevate_upasev

div.p: āha_ah upabhuṅkte_upabhuj

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tāni_tad eva_eva indriyāṇi_indriya darśayan_darśay yat_yad artham_artha gṛhītvā_grah gacchati_gam tat_tad āha_ah śrotram_śrotra iti_iti śrotram_śrotra cakṣuḥ_cakṣus sparśanam_sparśana ca_ca rasanam_rasana ghrāṇam_ghrāṇa eva_eva ca_ca ca-kārāt_ca-kāra karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya prāṇam_prāṇa ca_ca manaḥ_manas ca_ca ṣaṣṭham_ṣaṣṭha adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā eva_eva āśritya_āśri eva_eva viṣayān_viṣaya śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi ayam_idam jīvaḥ_jīva upasevate_upasev bhuṅkte_bhuj

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tatra_tatra gatvā_gam kim_ka karoti_kṛ iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah śrotram_śrotra iti_iti śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi indriyāṇi_indriya manaḥ_manas ca_ca adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā āśritya_āśri viṣayān_viṣaya śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi upabhuṅkte_upabhuj

baladevaḥ_baladeva tāni_tad gṛhītvā_grah kim_ka artham_artha yāti_yā tatra_tatra āha_ah śrotram_śrotra iti_iti śrotra--_śrotra ādīni_ādi sa_sa manaskāni_manaska adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā āśritya_āśri ayam_idam jīvaḥ_jīva viṣayān_viṣaya śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi upabhuṅkte_upabhuj tad--_tad artham_artha tad--_tad grahaṇam_grahaṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ca_ca śabdāt_śabda karmendriyāṇi_karmendriya ca_ca pañca_pañcan prāṇān_prāṇa ca_ca adhiṣṭhāye_adhiṣṭhā iti_iti avagamyam_avagam

lg.l: utkrāmantam_utkram sthitam_sthā vā_vā api_api bhuñjānam_bhuj vā_vā guṇa--_guṇa anvitam_anvita
vimūḍhāḥ_vimuh na_na anupaśyanti_anupaś paśyanti_dṛś jñāna--_jñāna cakṣuṣaḥ_cakṣus

div.p: paśyanti_dṛś tatra_tatra āha_ah utkrāmantam_utkram iti_iti utkrāmantam_utkram dehāt_deha deha--_deha antaram_antara gacchantam_gam tasmin_tad eva_eva dehe_deha sthitam_sthā vā_vā viṣayān_viṣaya bhuñjānam_bhuj vā_vā guṇa--_guṇa anvitam_anvita indriya--_indriya ādi--_ādi yuktam_yuj jīvam_jīva vimūḍhāḥ_vimuh na_na anupaśyanti_anupaś na_na ālokayanti_ālokay jñānam_jñāna eva_eva cakṣuḥ_cakṣus yeṣām_yad te_tad vivekinaḥ_vivekin paśyanti_paś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam deha--_deha gatam_gam darśana--_darśana yogayam_yogaya api_api dehāt_deha utkrāmantam_utkram iti_iti utkrāmantam_utkram deha--_deha antaram_antara gacchantam_gam pūrvasmāt_pūrva sthitam_sthā vā_vā api_api tasmin_tad eva_eva dehe_deha bhuñjānam_bhuj vā_vā śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi viṣayān_viṣaya guṇa--_guṇa anvitam_anvita sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha moha--_moha ātmakaiḥ_ātmaka guṇaiḥ_guṇa anvitam_anvita evam_evam sarvāsu_sarva avasthāsu_avasthā darśana--_darśana yogyam_yogya api_api enam_enad vimūḍhāḥ_vimuh dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga vāsanā--_vāsanā ākṛṣṭa--_ākṛṣ cetas--_cetas tayā_tā ātma--_ātman anātma--_anātman viveka--_viveka ayogyāḥ_ayogya na_na anupaśyanti_anupaś aho_aho kaṣṭam_kaṣṭa vartate_vṛt iti_iti ajñān_ajña anukrośati_anukruś bhagavān_bhagavant ye_yad tu_tu pramāṇa--_pramāṇa janita--_janay jñāna--_jñāna cakṣuṣaḥ_cakṣus vivekinaḥ_vivekin te_tad eva_eva paśyanti_paś

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha nanu_nanu yamāt_yama dehāt_deha niṣkrāmati_niṣkram yasmin_yad dehe_deha vā_vā tiṣṭhati_sthā tatra_tatra sthitvā_sthā vā_vā yathā_yathā bhogān_bhoga bhuṅkte_bhuj iti_iti evam_evam viśeṣam_viśeṣa na_na upalabhāmahe_upalabh tatra_tatra āha_ah utkrāmantam_utkram dehāt_deha niṣkrāmantam_niṣkram sthitam_sthā deha--_deha antare_antara vartamānam_vṛt ca_ca viṣayān_viṣaya bhuñjānam_bhuj ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa anvitam_anvita indirī--_indirī ādi--_ādi sahitam_sahita vimūḍhāḥ_vimuh avivekinaḥ_avivekin jñāna--_jñāna cakṣuṣaḥ_cakṣus vivekinaḥ_vivekin

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam śarīra--_śarīra stha--_stha tvena_tva anubhava--_anubhava yogyam_yogya avivekinaḥ_avivekin tam_tad ātmānam_ātman na_na anubhavanti_anubhū iti_iti āha_ah ud_ud iti_iti śarīrāt_śarīra utkrāmantam_utkram tatra_tatra eva_eva sthitam_sthā vā_vā sthitvā_sthā viṣayān_viṣaya bhuñjānam_bhuj vā_vā guṇa--_guṇa anvitam_anvita sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha mohaiḥ_moha indirya--_indirya ādibhiḥ_ādi vā_vā anvitam_anvita yuktam_yuj anubhava--_anubhava yogyam_yogya api_api ātmānam_ātman vimūḍhāḥ_vimuh cirantana--_cirantana jñāna--_jñāna paśyanti_paś śarīra--_śarīra ādi--_ādi viviktam_vivic anubhavanti_anubhū

lg.l: yatantaḥ_yat yoginaḥ_yogin ca_ca enam_enad paśyanti_dṛś ātmani_ātman avasthitam_avasthā
yatantaḥ_yat api_api akṛtātmānaḥ_akṛtātman na_na enam_enad paśyanti_dṛś acetasaḥ_acetas

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara durjñeyaḥ_durjñeya ca_ca ayam_idam yatas_yatas vivekiṣu_vivekin api_api kecid_kaścit paśyanti_dṛś kecid_kaścit na_na paśyanti_dṛś iti_iti āha_ah yatantaḥ_yat iti_iti yatantaḥ_yat dhyāna--_dhyāna ādibhiḥ_ādi prayatamānāḥ_prayat yoginaḥ_yogin kecid_kaścit enam_enad ātmānam_ātman ātmani_ātman dehe_deha avasthitam_avasthā viviktam_vivic paśyanti_paś śāstra--_śāstra abhyāsa--_abhyāsa ādibhiḥ_ādi prayatnam_prayatna kurvāṇāḥ_kṛ api_api akṛtātmānaḥ_akṛtātman aviśuddha--_aviśuddha cittāḥ_citta atas_atas eva_eva acetasaḥ_acetas manda--_manda matayaḥ_mati enam_enad na_na paśyanti_paś

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana paśyanti_dṛś jñāna--_jñāna cakṣuṣaḥ_cakṣus iti_iti etat_etad vivṛṇoti_vivṛ yatantaḥ_yat iti_iti ātmani_ātman sva--_sva buddhau_buddhi avasthitam_avasthā pratiphalitam_pratiphal enam_enad ātmānam_ātman yatantaḥ_yat dhyāna--_dhyāna ādibhiḥ_ādi prayatamānāḥ_prayat yoginaḥ_yogin eva_eva paśyanti_paś caḥ_c avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa yatamānāḥ_yat api_api akṛtātmānaḥ_akṛtātman yajña--_yajña ādibhiḥ_ādi aśodhita--_aśodhita antaḥkaraṇāḥ_antaḥkaraṇa atas_atas eva_eva acetasaḥ_acetas viveka--_viveka śūnyāḥ_śūnya na_na enam_enad paśyanti_dṛś iti_iti vimūḍhāḥ_vimuh na_na anupaśyanti_anupaś iti_iti etat_etad vivaraṇam_vivaraṇa
āha_ah _

baladevaḥ_baladeva jñāna--_jñāna cakṣuṣaḥ_cakṣus paśyanti_paś iti_iti etat_etad vivṛṇvan_vivṛ durjñāna--_durjñāna tām_tā tasya_tad āh_ah yatantaḥ_yat iti_iti kecid_kaścit yoginaḥ_yogin yatamānāḥ_yat śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādi--_ādi upāyān_upāya anutiṣṭhante_anuṣṭhā ātmani_ātman śarīre_śarīra avasthitam_avasthā enam_enad ātmānam_ātman paśyanti_paś kecid_kaścit yatamānāḥ_yat api_api akṛtātmānaḥ_akṛtātman anirmala--_anirmala cittāḥ_citta atas_atas avacetasaḥ_avacetas anudita--_anudita viveka--_viveka jñānāḥ_jñāna enam_enad na_na paśyanti_dṛś iti_iti durjñeyam_durjñeya ātma--_ātman tattvam_tattva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: yat_yad āditya--_āditya gatam_gam tejaḥ_tejas jagat_jagant bhāsayate_bhāsay akhilam_akhila
yat_yad candramasi_candramas yat_yad ca_ca agnau_agni tat_tad tejaḥ_tejas viddhi_vid māmakam_māmaka

div.p: bhāsayate_bhāsay tad--_tad prāptānām_prāp ca_ca apunar_apunar āvṛttiḥ_āvṛtti uktā_vac tatra_tatra ca_ca saṃsāriṇaḥ_saṃsārin abhāvam_abhāva āśaṅkya_āśaṅk saṃsāri--_saṃsārin svarūpam_svarūpa deha--_deha ādi--_ādi vyatiriktam_vyatiric darśitam_darśay idānīm_idānīm tat_tad eva_eva pārameśvaram_pārameśvara rūpam_rūpa ananta--_ananta śakti--_śakti tvena_tva nirūpayati_nirūpay yat_yad iti_iti ādi--_ādi caturbhiḥ_catur sthitam_sthā yat_yad aneka--_aneka prakāram_prakāra tejaḥ_tejas viśvam_viśva prakāśayati_prakāśay tat_tad sarvam_sarva tejaḥ_tejas madīyam_madīya eva_eva jānīhi_jñā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_idānīm yat_yad padam_pada sarva--_sarva avabhāsana--_avabhāsana kṣamāḥ_kṣama api_api āditya--_āditya ādayaḥ_ādi bhāsayitum_bhāsay na_na kṣamante_kṣam yad--_yad prāptāḥ_prāp ca_ca mumukṣavaḥ_mumukṣu punar_punar saṃsārāya_saṃsāra na_na āvartante_āvṛt yasya_yad ca_ca padasya_pada upa_upa ādi--_ādi bhedam_bheda anu_anu vidhīyamānāḥ_vidhā kalpita--_kalpay aṃśāḥ_aṃśa mṛṣā_mṛṣā eva_eva saṃsāram_saṃsāra anubhavanti_anubhū tasya_tad padasya_pada sarva--_sarva ātmatva--_ātmatva sarva--_sarva vyavahāra--_vyavahāra āspada--_āspada tva--_tva pradarśanena_pradarśana brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad iti_iti prāk_prāk uktam_vac vivarītum_vivṛ caturbhiḥ_catur ślokaiḥ_śloka ātmanaḥ_ātman bhagavān_bhagavat yat_yad iti_iti na_na tatra_tatra sūryaḥ_sūrya bhāti_bhā na_na candra--_candra tārakam_tāraka na_na imāḥ_idam vidyutaḥ_vidyut bhānti_bhā kutas_kutas ayam_idam agniḥ_agni iti_iti ādinā_ādi tam_tad eva_eva anubhāti_anubhā sarvam_sarva tasya_tad bhāsā_bhās sarvam_sarva idam_idam vibhāti_vibhā iti_iti śruti--_śruti artham_artha anena_idam vyākhyāyate_vyākhyā yat_yad āditya--_āditya gatam_gam tejaḥ_tejas caitnī--_caitnī ātmakam_ātmaka jyotiḥ_jyotis yat_yad candramasi_candramas yat_yad ca_ca agnau_agni sthitam_sthā tejaḥ_tejas jagat_jagant akhilam_akhila avabhāsayate_avabhāsay tat_tad tejaḥ_tejas māmakam_māmaka madīyam_madīya viddhi_vid yadi_yadi api_api sthāvara--_sthāvara jaṅgameṣu_jaṅgama samānam_samāna caitanya--_caitanya ātmakam_ātmaka jyotiḥ_jyotis tathā_tathā api_api sattva--_sattva utkarṣeṇa_utkarṣa āditya--_āditya ādīnām_ādi utkarṣāt_utkarṣa tatra_tatra eva_eva avistarām_avistarām caitanya--_caitanya jyotiḥ_jyotis iti_iti taiḥ_tad viśeṣyate_viśeṣay yat_yad āditya--_āditya gatam_gam iti_iti ādi_ādi yathā_yathā tulye_tulya api_api mukha--_mukha saṃnidhāne_saṃnidhāna kāṣṭha--_kāṣṭha kuḍya--_kuḍya ādau_ādi na_na mukham_mukha āvirbhavati_āvirbhū ādarśa--_ādarśa ādau_ādi ca_ca svacche_svaccha svacchatare_svacchatara ca_ca tāratamyena_tāratamya āvirbhavati_āvirbhū tadvat_tadvat yat_yad āditya--_āditya gatam_gam tejaḥ_tejas iti_iti uktvā_vac punar_punar tat_tad tejaḥ_tejas viddhi_vid māmakam_māmaka iti_iti tejaḥ--_tejas grahaṇāt_grahaṇa yat_yad āditya--_āditya ādi--_ādi gatam_gam tejaḥ_tejas prakāśaḥ_prakāśa rūpam_rūpa jagat_jagant akhilam_akhila rūpavat_rūpavat vastu_vastu avabhāsayate_avabhāsay evam_evam yat_yad candramasi_candramas yat_yad ca_ca agnau_agni jagat--_jagant avabhāsakam_avabhāsaka tejaḥ_tejas tat_tad māmākam_mad viddhi_vid iti_iti vibhūti--_vibhūti kathanāya_kathana dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya api_api arthaḥ_artha draṣṭavyaḥ_dṛś anyathā_anyathā tat_tad māmakam_māmaka viddhi_vid iti_iti etāvat_etāvat brūyāt_brū tejaḥ--_tejas grahaṇam_grahaṇa antareṇa_antareṇa eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

san_as upakaromi_upakṛ āha_ah āditya--_āditya sthitam_sthā tejaḥ_tejas eva_eva udaya--_udaya parvate_parvata prātar_prātar uditya_udi jīvasya_jīva dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa bhoga--_bhoga sādhana--_sādhana karma--_karman pravartana--_pravartana artham_artha jagat_jagant bhāsayate_bhāsay evam_evam ca_ca yat_yad candramasi_candramas ca_ca tat_tad tat_tad akhilam_akhila māmakam_māmaka eva_eva sūrya--_sūrya ādi--_ādi saṃjñaḥ_saṃjñā aham_mad eva_eva bhavāmi_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad tejasaḥ_tejas eva_eva tad--_tad tad--_tad vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha mad--_mad aṃśasya_aṃśa jīvasya_jīva saṃsāra--_saṃsāra raktasya_rañj mumukṣoḥ_mumukṣu ca_ca bhoga--_bhoga mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanam_sādhana aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah yat_yad iti_iti caturbhiḥ_catur āditye_āditya sthitam_sthā yat_yad tejaḥ_tejas yat_yad candre_candra agnau_agni ca_ca sthitam_sthā sat_as sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant prakāśayati_prakāśay tat_tad tejaḥ_tejas māmakam_māmaka madīyam_madīya viddhi_vid uditena_udi sūryeṇa_sūrya jvalitena_jval ca_ca vahninā_vahni adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa bhoga--_bhoga sādhanāni_sādhana karmāṇi_karman niṣpadyante_niṣpad timira--_timira jāḍya--_jāḍya nāśa--_nāśa ādayaḥ_ādi ca_ca sukha--_sukha hetavaḥ_hetu bhavanti_bhū uditena_udi candreṇa_candra ca_ca oṣadhi--_oṣadhi poṣa--_poṣa tāpa--_tāpa śānti--_śānti jyotsnāvihārāḥ_jyotsnāvihāra tathābhūtāḥ_tathābhūta bhavanti_bhū iti_iti teṣām_tad tat_tad tat_tad sādhakam_sādhaka tejaḥ_tejas mad--_mad tejaḥ--_tejas vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: gām_go āviśya_āviś ca_ca bhūtāni_bhūta dhārayāmi_dhāray aham_mad ojasā_ojas
puṣṇāmi_puṣ ca_ca oṣadhīḥ_oṣadhi sarvāḥ_sarva somaḥ_soma bhūtvā_bhū rasa--_rasa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka

div.p: dhārayāmi_dhāray saṃvardhayāmi_saṃvardhay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka ca_ca gām_go pṛthivīm_pṛthivī pṛthivī--_pṛthivī devatā--_devatā rūpeṇa_rūpa āviśya_āviś ojasā_ojas nijena_nija balena_bala pṛthivīm_pṛthivī dhūli--_dhūli muṣṭi--_muṣṭi tulyām_tulya dṛḍhīkṛtya_dṛḍhīkṛ bhūtāni_bhūta pṛthivī--_pṛthivī ādheyāni_ādhā vastūni_vastu aham_mad eva_eva dhārayāmi_dhāray anyathā_anyathā pṛthivī_pṛthivī sikatā--_sikatā muṣṭi--_muṣṭi vat_vat viśīryatā_viśṛ adhas_adhas nimajjet_nimajj vā_vā yena_yad dyauḥ_div ugrā_ugra pṛthivī_pṛthivī ca_ca dṛḍhā_dṛḍha sa_tad dādhāra_dhṛ pṛthivīm_pṛthivī iti_iti ca_ca hiraṇyagarbha--_hiraṇyagarbha bhāva--_bhāva āpannam_āpad bhagavantam_bhagavant eva_eva āha_ah kim_ka ca_ca rasa--_rasa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka sarva--_sarva rasa--_rasa svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva somaḥ_soma bhūtvā_bhū oṣadhīḥ_oṣadhi sarvāḥ_sarva brīhi--_brīhi yava--_yava ādyāḥ_ādya pṛthivyām_pṛthivī jātāḥ_jan aham_mad eva_eva puṣṇāmi_puṣ puṣṭimatīḥ_puṣṭimat rasa--_rasa svādumatīḥ_svādumat ca_ca karomi_kṛ

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha gām_go pṛthvīm_pṛthvī ojasā_ojas sva--_sva śaktyā_śakti āviśya_āviś adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā aham_mad eva_eva carācarāṇi_carācara bhūtāni_bhūta dhārayāmi_dhāray tathā_tathā aham_mad eva_eva amṛta--_amṛta rasa--_rasa mayaḥ_maya somaḥ_soma bhūtvā_bhū brīhi--_brīhi ādi--_ādi auṣadhīḥ_auṣadhī sarvāḥ_sarva saṃvardhayāmi_saṃvardhay

baladevaḥ_baladeva gām_go iti_iti pāṃśu--_pāṃśu muṣṭi--_muṣṭi tulyām_tulya gām_go pṛthivīm_pṛthivī ojasā_ojas sva--_sva śaktyā_śakti āviśya_āviś dṛḍhīkṛtya_dṛḍhīkṛ bhūtāni_bhūta sthira--_sthira carāṇi_cara dhārayāmi_dhāray mantra--_mantra varṇaḥ_varṇa ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah yena_yad dyauḥ_div ugrā_ugra pṛthivī_pṛthivī ca_ca dṛḍhā_dṛḍha iti_iti anyathā_anyathā asau_adas sikatā--_sikatā muṣṭi--_muṣṭi vat_vat viśīryeṇa_viśṛ nimajjet_nimajj vā_vā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tathā_tathā aham_mad eva_eva rasa--_rasa ātmakaḥ_ātmaka somaḥ_soma amṛta--_amṛta mayaḥ_maya candraḥ_candra bhūtvā_bhū sarvāḥ_sarva auṣadhīḥ_auṣadhī nikhilāḥ_nikhila brīhi--_brīhi ādyāḥ_ādya puṣṇāmi_puṣ svādu--_svādu vividha--_vividha rasa--_rasa pūrṇāḥ_pṛ karomi_kṛ tathā_tathā ca_ca bhūmi--_bhūmi loke_loka sthitasya_sthā jīvasya_jīva vividha--_vividha prāsāda--_prāsāda bāṭikā--_bāṭikā taḍāga--_taḍāga ādi--_ādi krīḍā--_krīḍā sthānāni_sthāna nirmāya_nirmā nānā_nānā rasān_rasa bhuñjānasya_bhuj tat_tad tat_tad sādhanam_sādhana aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti

lg.l: aham_mad vaiśvānaraḥ_vaiśvānara bhūtvā_bhū prāṇinām_prāṇin deham_deha āśritaḥ_āśri
prāṇa--_prāṇa apāna--_apāna samāyuktaḥ_samāyuj pacāmi_pac annam_anna catur--_catur vidham_vidha

div.p:
śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara kim_ka ca_ca aham_mad iti_iti aham_mad īśvaraḥ_īśvara eva_eva vaiśvānaraḥ_vaiśvānara jaṭhara--_jaṭhara agniḥ_agni bhūtvā_bhū prāṇinām_prāṇin dehasya_deha antar_antar praviśya_praviś prāna--_prāna apānābhyām_apāna ca_ca tad--_tad uddīpakābhyām_uddīpaka sahitaḥ_sahita prāṇibhiḥ_prāṇin bhuktam_bhuj bhakṣyam_bhakṣya bhojyam_bhojya lehyam_lehya coṣyam_cūṣ ca_ca iti_iti caturvidham_caturvidha tatra_tatra yat_yad dantaiḥ_danta avakhaṇḍya_avakhaṇḍay avakhaṇḍya_avakhaṇḍay bhakṣyate_bhakṣay pūpa--_pūpa ādi_ādi tat_tad bhakṣyam_bhakṣ yat_yad tu_tu kevalam_kevalam jihvayā_jihvā viloḍya_viloḍay nigīryate_nigṛ pāyasa--_pāyasa ādi_ādi tat_tad bhojyam_bhojya yat_yad jihvāyām_jihvā nikṣipya_nikṣip rasa--_rasa āsvādena_āsvāda kramaśas_kramaśas nigīryate_nigṛ dravībhūtam_dravībhū guḍa--_guḍa ādi_ādi tat_tad lehyam_lehya yat_yad tu_tu daṃṣṭra--_daṃṣṭra ādibhiḥ_ādi niṣpīḍya_niṣpīḍay sāra--_sāra aṃśam_aṃśa nigīrya_nigṛ avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ
tyajyate_tyaj ikṣu--_ikṣu daṇḍa--_daṇḍa ādi_ādi tat_tad coṣyam_cūṣ iti_iti caturvidhaḥ_caturvidha asya_idam bhedaḥ_bheda

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka aham_mad aham_mad īśvaraḥ_īśvara eva_eva vaiśvānaraḥ_vaiśvānara jaṭharaḥ_jaṭhara agniḥ_agni bhūtvā_bhū ayam_idam agniḥ_agni vaiśvānaraḥ_vaiśvānara yaḥ_yad ayam_idam antar_antar puruṣe_puruṣa yena_yad idam_idam annam_anna pacyate_pac yat_yad idam_idam adyate_ad iti_iti ādi_ādi śruti--_śruti pratipāditaḥ_pratipāday san_as prāṇinām_prāṇin prāna--_prāna apānābhyām_apāna tad--_tad uddīpakābhyām_uddīpaka saṃyuktaḥ_saṃyuj saṃdhukṣitaḥ_saṃdhukṣay san_as pacāmi_pac prāṇibhiḥ_prāṇin bhuktam_bhuj annam_anna caturvidham_caturvidha bhakṣyam_bhakṣya bhojyam_bhojya lehyam_lehya coṣyam_cūṣ ca_ca iti_iti tatra_tatra yat_yad dantaiḥ_danta avakhaṇḍya_avakhaṇḍay avakhaṇḍya_avakhaṇḍay bhakṣyate_bhakṣay pūpa--_pūpa ādi_ādi tat_tad bhakṣyam_bhakṣ yat_yad tu_tu kevalam_kevalam jihvayā_jihvā viloḍya_viloḍay nigīryate_nigṛ sūpa--_sūpa odana--_odana ādi_ādi tat_tad bhojyam_bhojya yat_yad jihvāyām_jihvā nikṣipya_nikṣip rasa--_rasa āsvādena_āsvāda nigīryate_nigṛ kiṃcid_kaścit dravībhūtam_dravībhū guḍa--_guḍa rasālā--_rasālā śikhariṇī--_śikhariṇī ādi_ādi tat_tad lehyam_lehya yat_yad tu_tu dantaiḥ_danta niṣpīḍya_niṣpīḍay rasa--_rasa aṃśam_aṃśa nigīrya_nigṛ avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ tyajyate_tyaj yathā_yathā ikṣu--_ikṣu daṇḍa--_daṇḍa ādi_ādi tat_tad coṣyam_cūṣ iti_iti bhedaḥ_bheda bhoktā_bhoktṛ yaḥ_yad saḥ_tad agnri_agni vaiśvānaraḥ_vaiśvānara yat_yad bhojyam_bhuj annam_anna sa_tad somaḥ_soma tat_tad etat_etad ubhayam_ubhaya agnīṣomau_agnīṣoma sarvam_sarva iti_iti dhyāyataḥ_dhyā anna--_anna doṣa--_doṣa lepaḥ_lepa na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti api_api draṣṭavyam_dṛś
bhakṣyam_bhakṣya danta--_danta chedyam_chedya bhṛṣṭa--_bhṛjj canaka--_canaka ādi_ādi bhojyam_bhojya modaka--_modaka ādi_ādi coṣyam_cūṣ ikṣu--_ikṣu daṇḍa--_daṇḍa ādi_ādi

baladevaḥ_baladeva :_bhuj anna--_anna ādīnām_ādi pāka--_pāka hetuḥ_hetu ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah aham_mad iti_iti vaiśvānaraḥ_vaiśvānara jaṭhara--_jaṭhara agniḥ_agni tad--_tad śarīrakaḥ_śarīraka bhūtvā_bhū prāṇinām_prāṇin sarveṣām_sarva deham_deha udaram_udara āśritaḥ_āśri prāna--_prāna apānābhyām_apāna tad--_tad uddīpakābhyām_uddīpaka samāyuktaḥ_samāyuj ca_ca san_as aham_mad taiḥ_tad bhuktam_bhuj caturvidham_caturvidha annam_anna pacāmi_pac pākam_pāka śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah ayam_idam agniḥ_agni vaiśvānaraḥ_vaiśvānara yaḥ_yad ayam_idam antar_antar puruṣe_puruṣa yena_yad idam_idam annam_anna pacyate_pac iti_iti ādinā_ādi tathā_tathā ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva jāṭhara--_jāṭhara agni--_agni śarīraḥ_śarīra tad--_tad upakārī_upakārin iti_iti evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra śabda--_śabda ādibhyaḥ_ādi antar_antar pratiṣṭhānāt_pratiṣṭhāna ca_ca iti_iti ādinā_ādi annasya_anna cāturvidhyam_cāturvidhya ca_ca bhakṣyam_bhakṣya bhojyam_bhojya lehyam_lehya cūṣyam_cūṣya ca_ca iti_iti bhedāt_bheda danta--_danta chedyam_chid caṇaka--_caṇaka pūpa--_pūpa ādi_ādi bhakṣyam_bhakṣya carvyam_carv iti_iti ca_ca ucyate_vac modaka--_modaka odana--_odana sūpa--_sūpa ādi_ādi bhojyam_bhojya pāyasa--_pāyasa guḍa--_guḍa madhu--_madhu ādi_ādi lehyam_lehya pakva--_pakva āmra--_āmra ikṣu--_ikṣu daṇḍa--_daṇḍa ādi_ādi cūṣyam_cūṣya

lg.l: sarvasya_sarva ca_ca aham_mad hṛdi_hṛd saṃniviṣṭaḥ_saṃniviś
mattaḥ_mad smṛtiḥ_smṛti jñānam_jñāna apohanam_apohana ca_ca
vedaiḥ_veda ca_ca sarvaiḥ_sarva aham_mad eva_eva vedyaḥ_vid
vedānta--_vedānta kṛt_kṛt veda--_veda vid_vid eva_eva ca_ca aham_mad

div.p: atas_atas ca_ca mattaḥ_mad eva_eva hetoḥ_hetu prāṇi--_prāṇin mātrasya_mātra pūrvān_pūrva bhūta--_bhū artha--_artha viṣayā_viṣaya smṛtiḥ_smṛti bhavati_bhū jñānam_jñāna ca_ca bhavati_bhū āpohanam_āpohana ca_ca tayoḥ_tad pramoṣaḥ_pramoṣa bhavati_bhū vedaiḥ_veda ca_ca sarvaiḥ_sarva tad--_tad tad--_tad devatā--_devatā ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa aham_mad eva_eva vedyaḥ_vid vedānta--_vedānta kṛt_kṛt tad--_tad sampradāya--_sampradāya pravartakaḥ_pravartaka ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna daḥ_da guruḥ_guru aham_mad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha veda--_veda vid_vid eva_eva ca_ca veda--_veda artha--_artha vid_vid api_api aham_mad eva_eva

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana kim_ka ca_ca sarvasya_sarva brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi sthāvara--_sthāvara antasya_anta prāṇi--_prāṇin jātasya_jāta aham_mad ātmā_ātman san_as hṛdi_hṛd buddhau_buddhi saṃniviṣtaḥ_saṃniviś saḥ_tad eṣaḥ_etad iha_iha praviṣṭaḥ_praviś iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti anena_idam jīvena_jīva ātmanā_ātman anupraviśya_anupraviś nāma--_nāman rūpe_rūpa vyākaravāṇi_vyākṛ iti_iti ca_ca atas_atas mattaḥ_mad ātmanaḥ_ātman eva_eva hetoḥ_hetu prāṇi--_prāṇin jātasya_jāta yathānurūpam_yathānurūpa smṛtiḥ_smṛti etat_etad janmani_janman pūrva--_pūrva anubhūta--_anubhū artha--_artha viṣayā_viṣaya vṛttiḥ_vṛtti yoginām_yogin ca_ca janmāntara--_janmāntara anubhūta--_anubhū artha--_artha viṣayā_viṣaya api_api tathā_tathā mattaḥ_mad eva_eva jñānam_jñāna viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya saṃyoga--_saṃyoga jam_ja bhavati_bhū yoginām_yogin ca_ca deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla viprakṛṣṭa--_viprakṛṣṭa viṣayam_viṣaya api_api evam_evam kāma--_kāma krodha--_krodha śoka--_śoka ādi--_ādi vyākula--_vyākula cetasām_cetas apohanam_apohana ca_ca smṛti--_smṛti jñānayoḥ_jñāna apāyaḥ_apāya ca_ca mattaḥ_mad eva_eva bhavati_bhū

evam_evam svasya_sva jīva--_jīva rūpa--_rūpa tām_tā uktvā_vac brahma--_brahman rūpa--_rūpa tām_tā āha_ah vedaiḥ_veda ca_ca sarvaiḥ_sarva indra--_indra ādi--_ādi devatā--_devatā prakāśakaiḥ_prakāśaka api_api aham_mad eva_eva vedyaḥ_vid sarva--_sarva ātma--_ātman tvāt_tva

indram_indra mitram_mitra varuṇam_varuṇa agnim_agni āhuḥ_ah atha_atha u_u divyaḥ_divya sa_tad suparṇaḥ_suparṇa garutmān_garutmant ekam_eka sat_as viprāḥ_vipra bahudhā_bahudhā vadanti_vad
agnim_agni yamam_yama mātariśvānam_mātariśvan āhuḥ_ah iti_iti mantra--_mantra varṇāt_varṇa

eṣaḥ_etad u_u hi_hi eva_eva sarve_sarva devāḥ_deva iti_iti ca_ca śruteḥ_śruti na_na kevalam_kevala etāvat_etāvat eva_eva veda--_veda vid_vid eva_eva ca_ca aham_mad karma--_karman kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa upāsanā--_upāsanā kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa jñāna--_jñāna kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa ātmaka--_ātmaka mantra--_mantra brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa rūpa--_rūpa sarva--_sarva veda--_veda artha--_artha vid_vid ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva atas_atas sādhu_sādhu uktam_vac brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad iti_iti ādi_ādi

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha yathā_yathā eva_eva jaṭhare_jaṭhara jaṭhara--_jaṭhara agniḥ_agni aham_mad tathā_tathā eva_eva sarvasya_sarva carācarasya_carācara hṛdi_hṛd sanniviṣṭaḥ_saṃniviś buddhi--_buddhi tattva--_tattva rūpaḥ_rūpa aham_mad eva_eva yatas_yatas mattaḥ_mad buddhi--_buddhi tattvāt_tattva eva_eva pūrva--_pūrva anubhūta--_anubhū artha--_artha viṣaya--_viṣaya anusmṛtiḥ_anusmṛti bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya yoga--_yoga jam_ja jñānam_jñāna ca_ca apohanam_apohana smṛti--_smṛti jñānayoḥ_jñāna apagamaḥ_apagama ca_ca bhavati_bhū iti_iti jīvasya_jīva bandha--_bandha avasthāyām_avasthā svasya_sva upakāraka--_upakāraka tvam_tva uktvā_vac mokṣa--_mokṣa avasthāyām_avasthā yat_yad prāpyam_prāp tatra_tatra api_api upakāra--_upakāra tvam_tva āha_ah vedaiḥ_veda iti_iti veda--_veda vyāsa--_vyāsa dvārā_dvār vedānta--_vedānta kṛt_kṛt aham_mad eva_eva yatas_yatas veda--_veda vid_vid veda--_veda artha--_artha tattva--_tattva jñaḥ_jña aham_mad eva_eva mattaḥ_mad anyaḥ_anya veda--_veda artham_artha na_na jānāti_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva prāṇinām_prāṇin jñāna--_jñāna ajñāna--_ajñāna hetuḥ_hetu ca_ca aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti āha_ah sarvasya_sarva ca_ca iti_iti tayoḥ_tad soma--_soma vaiśvānarayoḥ_vaiśvānara sarvasya_sarva ca_ca prāṇi--_prāṇin vṛndasya_vṛnda hṛdi_hṛd nikhila--_nikhila pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetu--_hetu jñāna--_jñāna udaya--_udaya dehe_deha aham_mad eva_eva niyāmaka--_niyāmaka tvena_tva sanniviṣṭaḥ_saṃniviś praviṣṭaḥ_praviś śāstā_śāstṛ janānām_jana iti_iti ādi--_ādi śravaṇāt_śravaṇa atas_atas mattaḥ_mad eva_eva sarvasya_sarva smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya sannikarṣa--_saṃnikarṣa janyam_jan jāyate_jan tayoḥ_tad apohanam_apohana pramoṣaḥ_pramoṣa ca_ca mattaḥ_mad bhavati_bhū evam_evam uktam_vac uddhavena_uddhava tvattaḥ_tvad jñānam_jñāna hi_hi jīvānām_jīva pramoṣaḥ_pramoṣa tatra_tatra śaktitaḥ_śakti iti_iti

evam_evam sāṃsārika--_sāṃsārika bhoga--_bhoga sādhanatām_sādhanatā svasya_sva uktvā_vac mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanatām_sādhanatā āha_ah vedaiḥ_veda ca_ca iti_iti sarvaiḥ_sarva nikhilaiḥ_nikhila vedaiḥ_veda aham_mad eva_eva sarva--_sarva īśvaraḥ_īśvara sarva--_sarva śaktimān_śaktimat kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa vedyaḥ_vid yaḥ_yad asau_adas sarvaiḥ_sarva vedaiḥ_veda gīyate_gā iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti atra_atra karma--_karman kāṇḍena_kāṇḍa paramparayā_paramparā jñāna--_jñāna kāṇḍena_kāṇḍa tu_tu sākṣāt_sākṣāt iti_iti bodhyam_budh katham_katham evam_evam pratyetavyam_pratī iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah vedānta--_vedānta kṛt_kṛt aham_mad eva_eva iti_iti vedānām_veda antaḥ_anta artha--_artha nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya tad--_tad kṛt_kṛt aham_mad eva_eva bādarāyaṇa--_bādarāyaṇa ātmanā_ātman āha_ah sūtra--_sūtra kāraḥ_kāra ta_tad samanvayāt_samanuyā ādibhiḥ_ādi nanu_nanu anye_anya veda--_veda artham_artha anyathā_anyathā vyācakṣyate_vyācakṣ tatra_tatra āha_ah veda--_veda vid_vid eva_eva ca_ca aham_mad iti_iti aham_mad eva_eva veda--_veda vid_vid iti_iti bādarāyaṇaḥ_bādarāyaṇa san_as yam_yad artham_artha aham_mad niraṇaiṣam_nirṇī saḥ_tad eva_eva veda--_veda arthaḥ_artha tatas_tatas anyathā_anyathā tu_tu bhrānti--_bhrānti vijṛmbhitaḥ_vijṛmbh iti_iti tathā_tathā
ca_ca mokṣa--_mokṣa pradasya_prada sarva--_sarva īśvara--_īśvara tattvasya_tattva vedaiḥ_veda abodhanāt_abodhana aham_mad eva_eva mokṣa--_mokṣa sādhanam_sādhana

lg.l: dvau_dvi imau_idam puruṣau_puruṣa loke_loka kṣaraḥ_kṣara ca_ca akṣaraḥ_akṣara eva_eva ca_ca
kṣaraḥ_kṣara sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha akṣaraḥ_akṣara ucyate_vac

div.p: darśayati_darśay kṣaraḥ_kṣara ca_ca akṣaraḥ_akṣara ca_ca iti_iti dvau_dvi imau_idam puruṣau_puruṣa loke_loka prasiddhau_prasidh tau_tad eva_eva āha_ah tatra_tatra kṣaraḥ_kṣara puruṣaḥ_puruṣa nāma_nāma sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi sthāvara--_sthāvara antāni_anta śarīrāṇi_śarīra aviveki--_avivekin lokasya_loka śarīreṣu_śarīra eva_eva puruṣa--_puruṣa tva--_tva prasiddheḥ_prasiddhi kuṭaḥ_kuṭa rāśiḥ_rāśi śilā--_śilā rāśiḥ_rāśi parvataḥ_parvata iva_iva deheṣu_deha naśyatsu_naś api_api nirvikāra--_nirvikāra tayā_tā tiṣṭhati_sthā iti_iti kūṭashtaḥ_kūṭashta cetanaḥ_cetana bhoktā_bhoktṛ sa_tad tu_tu akṣaraḥ_akṣara puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti ucyate_vac vivekibhiḥ_vivekin

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam sa_sa upādhikam_upādhika ātmānam_ātman uktvā_vac kṣara--_kṣara akṣara--_akṣara śabda--_śabda vācya--_vācya kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa upādhi--_upādhi dvaya--_dvaya viyogena_viyoga nirupādhikam_nirupādhika śuddham_śuddha ātmānam_ātman pratipādayati_pratipāday kṛpayā_kṛpā bhagavān_bhagavat arjunāya_arjuna dvau_dvi imau_idam iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri dvau_dvi imau_idam pṛthak_pṛthak rāśī--_rāśī kṛtau_kṛ puruṣau_puruṣa puruṣa--_puruṣa upādhi--_upādhi tvena_tva puruṣa--_puruṣa śabda--_śabda vyapadeśyau_vyapadiś loke_loka saṃsāre_saṃsāra kau_ka tau_tad iti_iti āha_ah kṣara--_kṣara akṣare_akṣara eva_eva ca_ca kṣarati_kṣar iti_iti kṣaraḥ_kṣara vināśī_vināśin kārya--_kārya rāśiḥ_rāśi ekaḥ_eka puruṣaḥ_puruṣa na_na kṣarati_kṣar iti_iti akṣaraḥ_akṣara vināśa--_vināśa rahitaḥ_rahita kṣara--_kṣara ākhyasya_ākhyā puruṣasya_puruṣa utpatti--_utpatti bījam_bīja bhagavataḥ_bhagavant māyā--_māyā śaktiḥ_śakti dvitīyaḥ_dvitīya puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tau_tad puruṣau_puruṣa vyācaṣṭe_vyācakṣ svayam_svayam eva_eva bhagavān_bhagavant kṣaraḥ_kṣara sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta samastam_samasta kārya--_kārya jātam_jāta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha kūṭaḥ_kūṭa yathārtha--_yathārtha vastu--_vastu ācchādanena_ācchādana a_a yathārtha--_yathārtha vastu--_vastu prakāśanam_prakāśana vañcanam_vañcana māyā_māyā iti_iti anarthāntaram_anarthāntara tena_tad āvaraṇa--_āvaraṇa vikṣepa--_vikṣepa śakti--_śakti dvaya--_dvaya rūpeṇa_rūpa sthitaḥ_sthā kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha bhagavān_bhagavant māyā--_māyā śakti--_śakti rūpaḥ_rūpa kāraṇa--_kāraṇa upādhiḥ_upādhi saṃsāra--_saṃsāra bīja--_bīja tvena_tva ānantyāt_ānantya akṣaraḥ_akṣara ucyate_vac

kecid_kaścit tu_tu kṣara--_kṣara śabdena_śabda acetana--_acetana vargam_varga uktvā_vac kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha akṣaraḥ_akṣara ucyate_vac iti_iti anena_idam jīvam_jīva āhuḥ_ah tat_tad na_na samyak_samyak kṣetrajñasya_kṣetrajña eva_eva iha_iha puruṣottama--_puruṣottama tvena_tva pratipādya--_pratipāday tvāt_tva tasmāt_tasmāt kṣara--_kṣara akṣara--_akṣara śabdābhyām_śabda kārya--_kārya kāraṇa--_kāraṇa upādhī_upādhi ubhau_ubh api_api jaḍau_jaḍa eva_eva ucyete_vac iti_iti eva_eva yuktam_yuj

bravīmi_brū āha_ah loke_loka caturdaśa--_caturdaśan bhuvana--_bhuvana ātmake_ātmaka jaḍa--_jaḍa prapañce_prapañca imau_idam dvau_dvi puruṣau_puruṣa cetanau_cetana staḥ_as kau_ka tau_tad atas_atas āha_ah kṣaram_kṣara sva--_sva svarūpāt_svarūpa kṣarati_kṣar vicyutaḥ_vicyu bhavati_bhū iti_iti kṣaraḥ_kṣara jīvaḥ_jīva sva--_sva svarūpāt_svarūpa na_na kṣarati_kṣar iti_iti akṣara_akṣara brahma_brahman eva_eva etat_etad vai_vai tat_tad akṣaram_akṣara gārgi_gārgī brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vividiṣanti_vividiṣ iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti akṣaram_akṣara brahma_brahman paramam_parama iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti ca_ca akṣara--_akṣara śabdaḥ_śabda brahma--_brahman vācakaḥ_vācaka eva_eva dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś kṣara--_kṣara akṣarayoḥ_akṣara artham_artha punar_punar viśadayati_viśaday sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta ekaḥ_eka jīvaḥ_jīva eva_eva anādi--_anādi avidyayā_avidyā svarūpa--_svarūpa vicyutaḥ_vicyu san_as karma--_karman paratantraḥ_paratantra samaṣṭi--_samaṣṭi ātmakaḥ_ātmaka brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi sthāvara--_sthāvara antāni_anta bhūtāni_bhūta bhavati_bhū iti_iti jātyāḥ_jāti vai_vai ekavacanam_ekavacana dvitīya--_dvitīya puruṣaḥ_puruṣa akṣaraḥ_akṣara tu_tu kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha ekena_eka eva_eva svarūpeṇa_svarūpa avicyutimatā_avicyutimat sarva--_sarva kāla--_kāla vyāpī_vyāpin eka--_eka rūpa--_rūpa tayā_tā tu_tu yaḥ_yad kāla--_kāla vyāpī_vyāpin sa_tad kūṭasthaḥ_kūṭastha iti_iti amaraḥ_amara

baladevaḥ_baladeva bādarāyaṇa--_bādarāyaṇa ātmanā_ātman nirṇītam_nirṇī veda--_veda artham_artha saṅkṣipya_saṃkṣip āha_ah dvau_dvi iti_iti lokyate_lokay tattvam_tattva anena_idam iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti loke_loka vede_veda dvau_dvi puruṣau_puruṣa prathitau_prath imau_idam iti_iti pramāṇa--_pramāṇa siddha--_sidh tā_tā sūcyate_sūcay tau_tad kau_ka iti_iti āha_ah kṣaraḥ_kṣara ca_ca iti_iti śarīra--_śarīra kṣaraṇāt_kṣaraṇa kṣaraḥ_kṣara aneka--_aneka avasthaḥ_avasthā baddhaḥ_bandh acit--_acit saṃsarga--_saṃsarga eka--_eka dharma--_dharma sambandhāt_sambandha ekatvena_ekatva nirdiṣṭaḥ_nirdiś kṣara--_kṣara akṣarau_akṣara sphuṭayati_sphuṭay sarvāṇi_sarva brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi stamba--_stamba antāni_anta bhūtāni_bhūta kṣaraḥ_kṣara kūta--_kūta sthaḥ_stha sadiaka--_sadiaka avasthaḥ_avasthā muktaḥ_muc tu_tu akṣaraḥ_akṣara bahavaḥ_bahu jñāna--_jñāna tapasā_tapas iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi idam_idam jñānam_jñāna upāśritya_upāśri iti_iti ādeḥ_ādi ca_ca bahutva--_bahutva saṅkhyākaḥ_saṃkhyāka saḥ_tad

lg.l: uttamaḥ_uttama puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tu_tu anyaḥ_anya paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti udāhṛtaḥ_udāhṛ
yaḥ_yad loka--_loka trayam_traya āviśya_āviś bibharti_bhṛ avyayaḥ_avyaya īśvaraḥ_īśvara

div.p: āha_ah etābhyām_etad kṣara--_kṣara aksarābhyām_aksara anyaḥ_anya vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa tu_tu uttamaḥ_uttama puruṣaḥ_puruṣa vailakṣaṇyam_vailakṣaṇya eva_eva āha_ah paramaḥ_parama ca_ca asau_adas ātmā_ātman ca_ca iti_iti udāhṛtaḥ_udāhṛ uktaḥ_vac śrutibhiḥ_śruti ātma--_ātman tvena_tva kṣarāt_kṣara acetanāt_acetana vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa parama--_parama tvena_tva akṣarāt_akṣara cetanāt_cetana bhoktuḥ_bhoktṛ vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha paramātma--_paramātman tvam_tva darśayati_darśay yaḥ_yad loka--_loka trayam_traya iti_iti yaḥ_yad īśvaraḥ_īśvara īśana--_īśana śīlaḥ_śīla avyayaḥ_avyaya ca_ca nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra eva_eva san_as loka--_loka trayam_traya kṛsnam_kṛsna āviśya_āviś bibharti_bhṛ pālayati_pālay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_idam kṣara--_kṣara akṣarābhyām_akṣara vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa kṣara--_kṣara akṣara--_akṣara upādhi--_upādhi dvaya--_dvaya doṣeṇa_doṣa a_a spṛṣṭaḥ_spṛś nitya--_nitya śuddha--_śudh buddha--_budh mukta--_muc svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva uttamaḥ_uttama iti_iti uttamaḥ_uttama utkṛṣṭatamaḥ_utkṛṣṭatama puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tu_tu anyonyaḥ_anyonya eva_eva atyanta--_atyanta vilakṣaṇaḥ_vilakṣaṇa ābhyām_idam kṣara--_kṣara akṣarābhyām_akṣara jaḍa--_jaḍa rāśibhyām_rāśi ubhaya--_ubhaya bhāsakaḥ_bhāsaka tṛtīyaḥ_tṛtīya cetana--_cetana rāśiḥ_rāśi iti_iti arthaḥ_artha paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti udāhṛtaḥ_udāhṛ anna--_anna maya--_maya prāṇa--_prāṇa maya--_maya manaḥ--_manas maya--_maya jñāna--_jñāna maya--_maya ānanda--_ānanda mayebhyaḥ_maya pañcabhyaḥ_pañcan avidyā--_avidyā kalpita--_kalpay ātmabhyaḥ_ātman paramaḥ_parama prakṛṣṭaḥ_prakṛṣ akalpitaḥ_akalpita brahma_brahman puccham_puccha pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā iti_iti uktaḥ_vac paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti vedānteṣu_vedānta yaḥ_yad paramātmā_paramātman loka--_loka trayam_traya bhūḥ_bhū bhuvaḥ_bhū svar_svar ākhyam_ākhyā sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant iti_iti yāvat_yāvat āviśya_āviś svakīyayā_svakīya māyā--_māyā śaktyā_śakti adhiṣṭhāya_adhiṣṭhā bibharti_bhṛ sattā--_sattā sphūrti--_sphūrti pradānena_pradāna dhārayati_dhāray poṣayati_poṣay ca_ca kīdṛśaḥ_kīdṛśa udāhṛtaḥ_udāhṛ saḥ_tad uttamaḥ_uttama puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti

āha_ah tu_tu śabdaḥ_śabda pūrva--_pūrva vaiśiṣṭhyāt_vaiśiṣṭhya dyotakaḥ_dyotaka jñānibhyaḥ_jñānin ca_ca adhikaḥ_adhika yogī_yogin iti_iti upāsaka--_upāsaka vaiśiṣṭyāt_vaiśiṣṭya eva_eva upāsya--_upās vaiśiṣṭyam_vaiśiṣṭya ca_ca labhyate_labh paramātma--_paramātman tattvam_tattva eva_eva darśayati_darśay yaḥ_yad īśvaraḥ_īśvara īsana--_īsana śīlaḥ_śīla avyayaḥ_avyaya nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra eva_eva san_as loka--_loka trayam_traya kṛtsnam_kṛtsna āviśya_āviś bibharti_bhṛ dhārayati_dhāray pālayati_pālay ca_ca

baladevaḥ_baladeva yat_yad artham_artha dvau_dvi puruṣau_puruṣa nirūpitau_nirūpay tam_tad āha_ah uttamaḥ_uttama iti_iti anyaḥ_anya kṣara--_kṣara akṣarābhyām_akṣara na_na tu_tu tayoḥ_tad eva_eva ekaḥ_eka saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva śruti--_śruti sammatim_sammati āha_ah paramātmā_paramātman uttama--_uttama tā--_tā prayojakam_prayojaka dharmam_dharma āha_ah yaḥ_yad loka--_loka iti_iti na_na ca_ca etat_etad jagat--_jagant vidhāraṇa--_vidhāraṇa pālana--_pālana rūpam_rūpa īśanam_īśana baddhasya_bandh jīvasya_jīva karma--_karman asambhavāt_asaṃbhava na_na ca_ca muktasya_muc jagat--_jagant vyāpāra--_vyāpāra varjam_varjam iti_iti pratiṣedhāt_pratiṣedha ca_ca

lg.l: yasmāt_yasmāt kṣaram_kṣara atītaḥ_atī aham_mad akṣarāt_akṣara api_api ca_ca uttamaḥ_uttama
atas_atas asmi_as loke_loka vede_veda ca_ca prathitaḥ_prath puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama

div.p: darśayati_darśay yasmāt_yasmāt kṣaram_kṣara jaḍa--_jaḍa vargam_varga atikrāntaḥ_atikram aham_mad nityam_nityam ukta--_vac tvāt_tva akṣarāt_akṣara cetana--_cetana vargāt_varga api_api uttamaḥ_uttama ca_ca niyantṛ--_niyantṛ tvāt_tva atas_atas loke_loka vede_veda ca_ca puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama iti_iti prathitaḥ_prath prakhyātaḥ_prakhyā asmi_as tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti saḥ_tad eva_eva sarvasya_sarva īśānaḥ_īśāna sarvasya_sarva adhipatiḥ_adhipati sarvam_sarva idam_idam praśāsti_praśās iti_iti ādi_ādi

darśayati_darśay paramam_parama mama_mad yasmāt_yasmāt kṣaram_kṣara kārya--_kārya tvena_tva vināśinam_vināśin māyā--_māyā mayam_maya saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛklṣam_vṛklṣa aśvattha--_aśvattha ākhyam_ākhyā atītaḥ_atī atikrāntaḥ_atikram aham_mad parameśvaraḥ_parameśvara akṣarāt_akṣara api_api māyā--_māyā ākhyāt_ākhyā avyākṛtāt_avyākṛta akṣarāt_akṣara paratas_paratas paraḥ_para iti_iti pañcamī_pañcamī saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vṛkṣa--_vṛkṣa bīja--_bīja bhūtāt_bhū sarva--_sarva kāraṇāt_kāraṇa api_api ca_ca uttamaḥ_uttama utkṛṣṭatamaḥ_utkṛṣṭatama atas_atas kṣara--_kṣara akṣarābhyām_akṣara adhyāsena_adhyāsa puruṣa--_puruṣa pada--_pada vyapadūyābhyām_vyapadiś uttama--_uttama tvāt_tva asmi_as bhavāmi_bhū loke_loka vede_veda ca_ca prathitaḥ_prath prakhyātaḥ_prakhyā puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama iti_iti saḥ_tad uttamaḥ_uttama puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti vedaḥ_veda udāhṛtaḥ_udāhṛ eva_eva loke_loka ca_ca kavi_kavi yathā_yathā ekaḥ_eka puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama smṛtaḥ_smṛ iti_iti ādi_ādi prasiddham_prasidh
kāruṇyataḥ_kāruṇya nara--_nara vat_vat ācarataḥ_ācar para--_para arthān_artha
pārthāya_pārtha bodhitavataḥ_bodhay nijam_nija īśvara--_īśvara tvam_tva
sat--_sat cit--_cit ukhā--_ukhā eka--_eka vapuṣaḥ_vapus puruṣottamasya_puruṣottama
nārāyaṇasya_nārāyaṇa mahimā_mahiman na_na hi_hi mānam_māna eti_i

lg.l: kecid_kaścit nigṛhya_nigrah karaṇāni_karaṇa visṛjya_visṛj bhogam_bhoga
āsthāya_āsthā yogam_yoga amala--_amala ātma--_ātman dhiyaḥ_dhī yatante_yat
nārāyaṇasya_nārāyaṇa mahimānam_mahiman ananta--_ananta pāram_pāra
āsvādayan_āsvāday amṛta--_amṛta sāram_sāra aham_mad tu_tu muktaḥ_muc

div.p: vadan_vad āha_ah kṣaram_kṣara puruṣam_puruṣa jīvātmānam_jīvātman atītaḥ_atī akṣarāt_akṣara puruṣāt_puruṣa brahmataḥ_brahman uttamāt_uttama avikārāt_avikāra paramātmanaḥ_paramātman puruṣāt_puruṣa api_api uttamaḥ_uttama

yoginām_yogin api_api sarveṣām_sarva mad--_mad gatena_gam antarātmanā_antarātman śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat bhajate_bhaj yaḥ_yad mām_mad
sa_tad me_mad yuktatamaḥ_yuktatama mataḥ_man iti_iti

upāsaka--_upāsaka vaiśiṣṭyāt_vaiśiṣṭya eva_eva upāsya--_upās vaiśiṣṭya--_vaiśiṣṭya lābhāt_lābha ca-kārāt_ca-kāra bhagavataḥ_bhagavant vaikuṇṭha--_vaikuṇṭha nātha--_nātha ādeḥ_ādi sakāśāt_sakāśāt api_api ete_etad ca_ca aṃśa--_aṃśa kalāḥ_kalā puṃsaḥ_puṃs kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa tu_tu bhagavān_bhagavant svayam_svayam iti_iti sūta--_sūta ukteḥ_ukti aham_mad

atra_atra yadi_yadi api_api ekam_eka eva_eva sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda svarūpam_svarūpa vastu_vastu brahma--_brahman paramātma--_paramātman bhagavat--_bhagavant śabdaiḥ_śabda ucyate_vac na_na tu_tu vastutas_vastutas svarūpataḥ_svarūpa kaḥ_ka api_api bhedaḥ_bheda asti_as svarūpa--_svarūpa dvaya--_dvaya abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti ṣaṣṭha--_ṣaṣṭha skandha--_skandha ukteḥ_ukti tat_tad api_api tad--_tad tad--_tad upāsakānām_upāsaka sādhanataḥ_sādhana phalataḥ_phala ca_ca bheda--_bheda darśanāt_darśana bhedaḥ_bheda iva_iva vyavahriyate_vyavahṛ tathā_tathā hi_hi brahma--_brahman paramātma--_paramātman bhagavat--_bhagavant upāsakānām_upāsaka krameṇa_krameṇa tad--_tad tad--_tad prāpti--_prāpti sādhanam_sādhana jñānam_jñāna yogaḥ_yoga bhaktiḥ_bhakti ca_ca phalam_phala ca_ca jñāna--_jñāna yogayoḥ_yoga vastutas_vastutas mokṣaḥ_mokṣa eva_eva bhakteḥ_bhakti tu_tu prema--_preman vat_vat pārṣada--_pārṣada tvam_tva ca_ca tatra_tatra bhaktyā_bhakti vinā_vinā jñāna--_jñāna yogābhyām_yoga naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya api_api acyuta--_acyuta bhāva--_bhāva varjitam_varjay na_na śobhate_śubh iti_iti purā_purā iha_iha bhūman_bhūman bahavaḥ_bahu api_api yoginaḥ_yogin iti_iti ādi--_ādi darśanāt_darśana na_na mokṣaḥ_mokṣa iti_iti

brahma--_brahman upāsakaiḥ_upāsaka paramātma--_paramātman upāsakaiḥ_upāsaka sva--_sva sādhya--_sādhay phala--_phala siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha bhagavataḥ_bhagavant bhaktiḥ_bhakti avaśyam_avaśyam kartavyā_kṛ eva_eva bhagavat--_bhagavant upāsakaḥ_upāsaka tu_tu sva--_sva sādhya--_sādhay phala--_phala siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha na_na brahma--_brahman upāsanā_upāsana api_api paramātma--_paramātman upāsanā_upāsana kriyate_kṛ na_na jñānam_jñāna na_na ca_ca vairāgyam_vairāgya prāyas_prāyas śreyaḥ_śreyas bhavet_bhū iha_iha iti_iti yat_yad karmabhiḥ_karman yat_yad tapasā_tapas jñāna--_jñāna vairāgyataḥ_vairāgyatā ca_ca yat_yad iti_iti ādau_ādi

sarvam_sarva mad--_mad bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta labhate_labh añjasā_añjasā svarga--_svarga apavargam_apavarga mad--_mad dhāma_dhāman
kathaṃcid_kathaṃcid yadi_yadi vāñchati_vāñch

lg.l: yā_yad sādhana--_sādhana sampattiḥ_sampatti
puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha catuṣṭaye_catuṣṭaya
tayā_tad vinā_vinā tat_tad āpnoti_āp
naraḥ_nara nārāyaṇa--_nārāyaṇa āśrayaḥ_āśraya iti_iti ādi_ādi vacanebhyaḥ_vacana

div.p: ataeva_ataeva bhagavat--_bhagavant upāsanayā_upāsana svarga--_svarga apavarga--_apavarga prema--_preman ādīni_ādi sarva--_sarva phalāni_phala eva_eva labdhum_labh śakyante_śak brahma--_brahman paramātma--_paramātman upāsanayā_upāsana tu_tu na_na prema--_preman ādīni_ādi iti_iti atas_atas eva_eva brahma--_brahman paramātmābhyām_paramātman bhagavat--_bhagavant utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa khalu_khalu abhede_abheda api_api ucyate_vac yathā_yathā tejaḥ--_tejas tvena_tva abhede_abheda api_api jyotiḥ_jyotis dīpa--_dīpa agni--_agni puñjeṣu_puñja madhye_madhya śīta--_śīta ādi--_ādi ārti--_ārti kṣayāt_kṣaya hetoḥ_hetu agni--_agni puñjaḥ_puñja eva_eva śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha ucyate_vac tatra_tatra api_api bhagavataḥ_bhagavant śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇasya_kṛṣṇa tu_tu paramaḥ_parama eva_eva utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa yathā_yathā agni--_agni puñjāt_puñja api_api sūryasya_sūrya yena_yad brahma--_brahman upāsanā--_upāsanā paripākataḥ_paripāka labhyaḥ_labh nirvāṇa--_nirvāṇa mokṣaḥ_mokṣa sva--_sva dveṣṭṛbhyaḥ_dveṣṭṛ api_api agha--_agha bak--_bac jarāsandha--_jarāsaṃdha ādibhyaḥ_ādi mahā--_mahat pāpibhyaḥ_pāpin dattaḥ_dā iti_iti ataeva_ataeva brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad iti_iti atra_atra yathāvat_yathāvat eva_eva vyākhyātam_vyākhyā śrī--_śrī svāmi--_svāmin caraṇaiḥ_caraṇa

cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ākāram_ākāra jalada--_jalada ruci--_ruci sāram_sāra śruti--_śruti girām_gir vraja--_vraja strīṇām_strī hāram_hāra bhava--_bhava jaladhi--_jaladhi pāram_pāra kṛta--_kṛ dhiyām_dhī vihantum_vihan bhū--_bhū bhāram_bhāra vidadhat--_vidhā avatāram_avatāra muhur_muhur aho_aho tatas_tatas vāram_vāra vāram_vāra bhajata_bhaj kuśala--_kuśala ārambha--_ārambha

vaṃśī--_vaṃśī vibhūṣita--_vibhūṣay karāt_kara nava--_nava nīrada--_nīrada ābhāt_ābha pīta--_pīta ambarāt_ambara aruṇa--_aruṇa bimba--_bimba phala--_phala adhara--_adhara oṣṭhāt_oṣṭha pūrṇa--_pūrṇa indu--_indu sundara--_sundara mukhāt_mukha aravinda--_aravinda netrāt_netra kṛṣṇāt_kṛṣṇa param_para kim_ka api_api tattvam_tattva aham_mad na_na jāne_jñā

lg.l: pramāṇataḥ_pramāṇa api_api nirṇīyam_nirṇī
kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa māhātmyam_māhātmya adbhutam_adbhuta
na_na śaknuvanti_śak ye_yad soḍhum_sah
te_tad mūḍhāḥ_muh nirayam_niraya gatāḥ_gam

div.p: iti_iti uktavadbhiḥ_vac kṛṣṇe_kṛṣṇa sarva--_sarva utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa eva_eva vyavasthāpitaḥ_vyavasthāpay iti_iti atas_atas dvau_dvi imau_idam iti_iti ādi_ādi śloka--_śloka trayasya_traya asya_idam vyākhyāyām_vyākhyā asyām_idam abhyasūyā_abhyasūyā na_na āviṣkartavyā_āviṣkṛ namaḥ_namas astu_as kevala--_kevala vidbhyaḥ_vid

baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha puruṣottama--_puruṣottama nāma--_nāman nirvacanam_nirvacana svasya_sva tattvam_tattva āha_ah yasmāt_yasmāt iti_iti uttamaḥ_uttama utkṛṣṭatamaḥ_utkṛṣṭatama loke_loka pauruṣeya--_pauruṣeya āgame_āgama lokyate_lokay veda--_veda arthaḥ_artha anena_idam iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti vede_veda tāvat_tāvat eṣa_etad samprasādaḥ_samprasāda asmāt_idam śarīrāt_śarīra samutthāya_samutthā param_para jyotī--_jyotis rūpam_rūpa sampadya_sampad svena_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa abhiniṣpadyate_abhiniṣpad saḥ_tad uttamaḥ_uttama puruṣaḥ_puruṣa iti_iti ādau_ādi prathitaḥ_prath yat_yad param_para jyotiḥ_jyotis samprasādena_samprasāda upasampannam_upasampad arthaḥ_artha loke_loka ca_ca

taiḥ_tad vijñāpita--_vijñāpay kāryaḥ_kārya tu_tu bhagavān_bhagavant puruṣottamaḥ_puruṣottama avatīrṇaḥ_avatṛ mahā--_mahat yogī_yogin satyavatyām_satyavatī parāśarāt_parāśara iti_iti ādau_ādi prathitaḥ_prath

lg.l: yaḥ_yad mām_mad evam_evam asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha jānāti_jñā puruṣottamam_puruṣottama
sa_tad sarva--_sarva vid_vid bhajati_bhaj mām_mad sarva--_sarva bhāvena_bhāva bhārata_bhārata

div.p: āha_ah evam_evam ukta--_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra asammūḍhaḥ_asammūḍha niścita--_niści matiḥ_mati san_as yaḥ_yad mām_mad puruṣottamam_puruṣottama jānāti_jñā sa_tad sarva--_sarva bhāvena_bhāva sarva--_sarva prakāreṇa_prakāra mām_mad eva_eva bhajati_bhaj tatas_tatas ca_ca sarva--_sarva vid_vid sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña bhavati_bhū

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam nāma--_nāman nirvacana--_nirvacana jñāne_jñāna phalam_phala āha_ah yaḥ_yad mām_mad iti_iti yaḥ_yad mām_mad īśvaram_īśvara evam_evam yathā_yathā ukta--_vac nāma--_nāman nirvacanena_nirvacana asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya eva_eva ayam_idam kaścid_kaścit kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa iti_iti saṃmoha--_sammoha varjitaḥ_varjay jānāti_jñā ayam_idam īśvaraḥ_īśvara eva_eva iti_iti puruṣottamam_puruṣottama prāk_prāk vyākhyātam_vyākhyā sa_tad mām_mad sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña sarva--_sarva bhāvena_bhāva prema--_preman lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga he_he bhārata_bhārata atas_atas yat_yad uktam_vac

mām_mad ca_ca yaḥ_yad avyabhicāreṇa_avyabhicāra bhakti--_bhakti yogena_yoga sevate_sev
sa_tad guṇān_guṇa samatītya_samatī etān_etad brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp iti_iti tat_tad upapannam_upapad
yathā_yathā uktam_vac brahmaṇaḥ_brahman hi_hi pratiṣṭhā_pratiṣṭhā aham_mad iti_iti tat_tad api_api upapannataram_upapannatara

lg.l: vraja--_vraja strīṇām_strī hāram_hāra bhava--_bhava jaladhi--_jaladhi pāram_pāra kṛta--_kṛ dhiyām_dhī
vihantum_vihan bhū--_bhū bhāram_bhāra vidadhat_vidhā avatāram_avatāra muhur_muhur aho_aho
tatas_tatas vāram_vāra vāram_vāra bhajata_bhaj kuśala--_kuśala ārambha--_ārambha kṛtinaḥ_kṛtin

div.p: muhyati_muh āha_ah a_a sammūḍhaḥ_sammuh vādinām_vādin a_a prāpta--_prāp saṃmohaḥ_sammoha saḥ_tad eva_eva sarva--_sarva vid_vid anadhīta--_anadhīta śāstre_śāstra api_api sa_tad sarva--_sarva śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha tattva--_tattva jñaḥ_jña tad--_tad anyaḥ_anya kila_kila adhīta--_adhī adhyāśita--_adhyāśay sarva--_sarva śāstre_śāstra api_api saṃmūḍhaḥ_sammuh samyak_samyak mūrkhaḥ_mūrkha eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tathā_tathā yaḥ_yad evam_evam jānāti_jñā saḥ_tad eva_eva mām_mad sarvatas_sarvatas bhāvena_bhāva bhajati_bhaj tat_tad anye_anya bhajan_bhaj api_api na_na mām_mad bhajati_bhaj iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah evam_evam mad--_mad ukta--_vac niruktyā_nirukti na_na tu_tu aśva--_aśva karṇa--_karṇa ādi--_ādi vat_vat saṃjñā--_saṃjñā mātra--_mātra tvena_tva yaḥ_yad mām_mad puruṣottamam_puruṣottama jānāti_jñā asaṃmūḍhaḥ_asaṃmūḍha prokte_pravac puruṣottama--_puruṣottama tve_tva saṃśaya--_saṃśaya śūnyaḥ_śūnya san_as sa_tad śloka--_śloka trayasya_traya eva_eva artham_artha jānan_jñā sarva--_sarva vid_vid nikhilasya_nikhila vedasya_veda tatra_tatra eva_eva tātparyāt_tātparya puruṣottama--_puruṣottama tva--_tva jñaḥ_jña mām_mad sarva--_sarva bhāvena_bhāva sarva--_sarva prakāreṇa_prakāra bhajati_bhaj upāste_upās sarva--_sarva veda--_veda artha--_artha vettari_vettṛ sarva--_sarva bhakti--_bhakti aṅga--_aṅga anuṣṭhātari_anuṣṭhātṛ ca_ca yaḥ_yad me_mad prasādaḥ_prasāda sa_tad tasmin_tad bhavet_bhū iti_iti me_mad puruṣottama--_puruṣottama tve_tva sandihānaḥ_saṃdih tu_tu adhīta--_adhī sarva--_sarva vedaḥ_veda api_api ajñaḥ_ajña sarvathā_sarvathā bhajan_bhaj api_api abhaktaḥ_abhakta iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

lg.l: iti_iti guhyatamam_guhyatama śāstram_śāstra idam_idam uktam_vac mayā_mad anagha_anagha
etat_etad buddhvā_budh buddhimān_buddhimat syāt_as kṛta--_kṛ kṛtyaḥ_kṛtyā ca_ca bhārata_bhārata

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ iti_iti anena_idam saṃkṣepa--_saṃkṣepa prakāreṇa_prakāra guhyatamam_guhyatama ati_ati rahasyam_rahasya sampūrṇam_sampṛ śāstram_śāstra eva_eva mayā_mad uktam_vac na_na tu_tu punar_punar viṃśati--_viṃśati ślokam_śloka adhyāya--_adhyāya mātram_mātra he_he anagha_anagha vyasana--_vyasana śūnya_śūnya atas_atas etat_etad mad--_mad uktam_vac śāstram_śāstra buddhyā_buddhi buddhimān_buddhimat samyak_samyak jñānī_jñānin syaāt_as ṛta--_ṛta kṛtyaḥ_kṛtyā ca_ca syāt_as yaḥ_yad api_api kaḥ_ka api_api he_he bhārata_bhārata tvam_tvad kṛta--_kṛ kṛtyaḥ_kṛtya asi_as iti_iti kim_ka vaktavyam_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

lg.l: saṃsāra--_saṃsāra śākhinam_śākhin chittvā_chid spaṣṭam_paś pañcadaśe_pañcadaśa vibhuḥ_vibhu
puruṣottama--_puruṣottama yoga--_yoga ākhye_ākhyā param_para padam_pada upādiśat_upadiś

div.p: iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī puruṣottama--_puruṣottama yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma pañcadaśaḥ_pañcadaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana idānīm_idānīm adhyāya--_adhyāya artham_artha stuvan_stu upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ iti_iti iti_iti iti_iti anena_idam prakāreṇa_prakāra guhyatamam_guhyatama rahasyatamam_rahasyatama sampūrṇam_sampṛ śāstram_śāstra eva_eva saṃkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa idam_idam asmin_idam adhyāye_adhyāya mayā_mad uktam_vac he_he anagha--_anagha avyasana_avyasana etat_etad buddhvā_budh anyaḥ_anya api_api yaḥ_yad kaścid_kaścit buddhimān_buddhimat ātma--_ātman jñānavān_jñānavat syāt_as kṛtam_kṛ sarvam_sarva kṛtyam_kṛtya yena_yad na_na punar_punar kṛtyā--_kṛtyā antaram_antara yasya_yad asti_as sa_tad kṛtakṛtyaḥ_kṛtakṛtya ca_ca syāt_as viśiṣṭa--_viśiṣ janma--_janman prasūtena_prasū brāhmaṇena_brāhmaṇa yat_yad kartavyam_kṛ tat_tad sarvam_sarva bhagavat--_bhagavant tattve_tattva vidite_vid kṛtam_kṛ bhavet_bhū na_na tu_tu anyathā_anyathā kartavyam_kṛ parisamāpyate_parisamāp kasyacid_kaścit iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya he_he bhārata_bhārata tvam_tvad tu_tu mahā--_mahat kula--_kula prasūtaḥ_prasū svayam_svayam ca_ca vyasana--_vyasana rahitaḥ_rahita iti_iti kula--_kula guṇena_guṇa
sva--_sva guṇena_guṇa ca_ca etat_etad buddhvā_budh kṛta--_kṛ kṛtyaḥ_kṛtya bhaviṣyasi_bhū iti_iti kim_ka u_u vaktavyam_vac iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

lg.l: vaṃśī--_vaṃśī vibhūṣita--_vibhūṣay karāt_kara nava--_nava nīrada--_nīrada ābhāt_ābha
pīta--_pīta ambarāt_ambara aruṇa--_aruṇa bimba--_bimba phala--_phala adhara--_adhara uṣṭhāt_uṣṭha
pūrṇa--_pṛ indu--_indu sundara--_sundara mukhāt_mukha aravinda--_aravinda netrāt_netra
kṛṣṇāt_kṛṣṇa param_para kim_ka api_api tattvam_tattva aham_mad na_na jāne_jñā
sadā_sadā sadānanda--_sadānanda pade_pada nimagnam_nimajj manaḥ_manas manaḥ--_manas bhāvam_bhāva apākaroti_apākṛ
gata--_gam āgata--_āgam āyāsam_āyāsa apāsya_apās sadyas_sadyas para--_para apara--_apara atītam_atī upaiti_upe tattvam_tattva
śaivāḥ_śaiva saurāḥ_saura ca_ca gāṇeśāḥ_gāṇeśa vaiṣṇavāḥ_vaiṣṇava śakti--_śakti pūjakāḥ_pūjaka
bhavanti_bhū yad--_yad mayāḥ_maya sarve_sarva saḥ_tad aham_mad asmi_as paraḥ_para śivaḥ_śiva
pramāṇataḥ_pramāṇa api_api nirṇīyam_nirṇī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa māhātmyam_māhātmya adbhutam_adbhuta
na_na śaknuvanti_śak ye_yad soḍhum_sah te_tad mūḍhāḥ_muh nirayam_niraya gatāḥ_gam

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍha--_guh artha--_artha dīpikāyām_dīpikā puruṣottam--_puruṣottama yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha adhyāya--_adhyāya artham_artha upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ iti_iti iti_iti viṃśatyā_viṃśati ślokaiḥ_śloka ebhiḥ_idam ati_ati rahasyam_rahasya śāstram_śāstra eva_eva sampūrṇam_sampṛ mayā_mad uktam_vac

lg.l: jaḍa--_jaḍa caitanya--_caitanya vargāṇām_varga vivṛtam_vivṛ kurvatā_kṛ kṛtam_kṛ
kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa eva_eva mahā--_mahat utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha īritaḥ_īray
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha varṣiṇyām_varṣin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
gītāsu_gītā ayam_idam pañcadaśaḥ_pañcadaśa saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha etat_etad apātreṣu_apātra aprakāśyam_aprakāśya iti_iti bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah iti_iti iti_iti iti_iti evam_evam saṃkṣepa--_saṃkṣepa rūpam_rūpa puruṣottama--_puruṣottama tva--_tva nirūpakam_nirūpaka idam_idam triślokī--_triślokī śāstram_śāstra tubhyam_tvad parama--_parama bhaktāya_bhakta mayā_mad uktam_vac he_he anagha_anagha tvaā_tvaā api_api apātreṣu_apātra na_na etat_etad prakāśyam_prakāśay iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva etat_etad buddhvā_budh buddhimān_buddhimat parokṣa--_parokṣa jñānī_jñānin syāt_as kṛtakṛtyaḥ_kṛtakṛtya aparokṣa--_aparokṣa jñānī_jñānin ca_ca iti_iti puruṣottama--_puruṣottama tva--_tva jñānam_jñāna abhyarcyate_abhyarc

lg.l: baddhāt_bandh muktāt_muc ca_ca yaḥ_yad puṃsaḥ_puṃs bhinnaḥ_bhid tad--_tad bhṛt_bhṛt tad--_tad uttamaḥ_uttama
sa_tad pumān_puṃs hariḥ_hari evā_eva iti_iti prāptam_prāp pañcadaśāt_pañcadaśa atas_atas

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya pañcadaśaḥ_pañcadaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
Bhagavadgita 16
BhG 16.1

lg.l: śrī--_śrī bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac
dānam_dāna damaḥ_dama ca_ca yajñaḥ_yajña ca_ca svādhyāyaḥ_svādhyāya tapaḥ_tapas ārjavam_ārjava
ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā satyam_satya akrodhaḥ_akrodha tyāgaḥ_tyāga śāntiḥ_śānti apaiśunam_apaiśuna
dayā_dayā bhūteṣu_bhūta a_a loluptvam_loluptva mārdavam_mārdava hrīḥ_hrī acāpalam_acāpala
tejaḥ_tejas kṣamā_kṣamā dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti śaucam_śauca adrohaḥ_adroha na_na atimāni--_atimānin tā_tā
bhavanti_bhū saṃpadam_sampad daivīm_daiva abhijātasya_abhijan bhārata_bhārata
āsurīm_āsura sampadam_sampad tyaktvā_tyaj daivīm_daiva eva_eva āśritāḥ_āśri narāḥ_nara
mucyante_muc iti_iti nirṇetum_nirṇī tad--_tad vivekaḥ_viveka atha_atha ṣoḍaśe_ṣoḍaśa

div.p: pūrva--_pūrva adhyāyāḥ_adhyāya tu_tu etat_etad buddhvā_budh buddhimān_buddhimat syāt_as kṛta--_kṛ kṛtyaḥ_kṛtya ca_ca bhārata_bhārata iti_iti uktam_vac tatra_tatra kaḥ_ka etat_etad tattvam_tattva budhyate_budh kaḥ_ka vā_vā na_na budhyate_budh iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin anadhikāriṇaḥ_anadhikārin ca_ca viveka--_viveka artham_artha ṣoḍaśa--_ṣoḍaśa adhyāyasya_adhyāya ārambhaḥ_ārambha nirūpite_nirūpay hi_hi kārya--_kārya arthe_artha adhikāri--_adhikārin jijñāsā_jijñāsā bhavati_bhū
bhāraḥ_bhāra yaḥ_yad yena_yad voḍhavyaḥ_vah sa_tad prāk_prāk āndolitā_āndolay yadā_yadā tadā_tadā kaṇḍasya_kaṇḍa voḍhā_voḍhṛ iti_iti śakyam_śakya kartum_kṛ nirūpaṇam_nirūpaṇa

tatra_tatra adhikāri--_adhikārin viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa bhūtām_bhū daivīm_daiva sampadam_sampad āha_ah abharam_bhṛ iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri abhayam_abhaya bhaya--_bhaya abhāvaḥ_abhāva sattvasya_sattva cittasya_citta saṃśuddhiḥ_saṃśuddhi su_su prasanna--_prasad tā_tā jñāna--_jñāna yoge_yoga ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna upāye_upāya vyavasthitiḥ_vyavasthiti pariniṣṭhā_pariniṣṭhā dānam_dāna sva--_sva bhojyasya_bhojya anna--_anna ādeḥ_ādi yathocitam_yathocita saṃvibhāgaḥ_saṃvibhāga yajñaḥ_yajña yathā_yathā adhikāram_adhikāra darśa--_darśa paurṇamāsa--_paurṇamāsa ādiḥ_ādi svādhyāyaḥ_svādhyāya brahma--_brahman yajña--_yajña ādiḥ_ādi japa--_japa yajñaḥ_yajña tapaḥ_tapas uttara--_uttara adhyāye_adhyāya vakṣyamāṇam_vac śārīra--_śārīra ādi_ādi ārjavam_ārjava avakra--_avakra tā_tā

kim_ka ca_ca ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā iti_iti ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā para--_para pīḍā--_pīḍā varjanam_varjana satyam_satya yathā_yathā dṛṣṭa--_dṛś artha--_artha bhāṣaṇam_bhāṣaṇa akrodhaḥ_akrodha tāḍitasya_tāḍay api_api citte_citta kṣobha--_kṣobha anutpattiḥ_anutpatti tyāgaḥ_tyāga audāryam_audārya śāntiḥ_śānti citta--_citta uparatiḥ_uparati paiśunam_paiśuna parokṣe_parokṣa para--_para doṣa--_doṣa prakāśanam_prakāśana tad--_tad varjanam_varjana apaiśunam_apaiśuna bhūteṣu_bhūta dīneṣu_dīna dayā_dayā a_a lolupatam_lolupatā a_a lolupa--_lolupa tvam_tva lobha--_lobha abhāvaḥ_abhāva avarṇa--_avarṇa lopaḥ_lopa ārṣaḥ_ārṣa mārdavam_mārdava mṛdu--_mṛdu tvam_tva akrūra--_akrūra tā_tā hrīḥ_hrī akārya--_akārya pravṛttau_pravṛtti loka--_loka lajjā_lajjā acāpalam_acāpala vyartha--_vyartha kriyā--_kriyā rāhityam_rāhitya

kim_ka ca_ca tejaḥ_tejas iti_iti tejaḥ_tejas prāgalbhyam_prāgalbhya kṣamā--_kṣamā paribhava--_paribhava ādiṣu_ādi utpadyamāneṣu_utpad krodha--_krodha pratibandhaḥ_pratibandha dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti duḥkha--_duḥkha ādibhiḥ_ādi avasīdataḥ_avasad cittasya_citta sthirīkaraṇam_sthirīkaraṇa adrohaḥ_adroha jighāṃsā--_jighāṃsā rāhityam_rāhitya ātimānitā_ātimānitā ātmani_ātman atipūjya--_atipūjay tva--_tva abhimānaḥ_abhimāna tad--_tad abhāvaḥ_abhāva na_na atimāni--_atimānin tā_tā etāni_etad abhaya--_abhaya ādīni_ādi ṣaḍ_ṣaṣ viṃśati--_viṃśati prakārāṇi_prakāra daivīm_daiva sampadam_sampad abhijātasya_abhijan bhavanti_bhū deva--_deva yogyām_yogya sāttvikīm_sāttvika sampadam_sampad abhilakṣya_abhilakṣ tad--_tad ābhimukhyena_ābhimukhya jātasya_jan bhāvi--_bhāvin kalyāṇasya_kalyāṇa puṃsaḥ_puṃs bhavanti_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana anantāra--_anantāra adhyāye_adhyāya adhas_adhas ca_ca mūlāni_mūla anusantatāni_anusaṃtan karma--_karman anubandhīni_anubandhin manuṣya--_manuṣya loke_loka iti_iti atra_atra manuṣya--_manuṣya dehe_deha prāc--_prāñc bhavīya--_bhavīya karma--_karman anusāreṇa_anusāra vyajyamānāḥ_vyañj vāsanāḥ_vāsanā saṃsārasya_saṃsāra avāntara--_avāntara mūla--_mūla tvena_tva rākṣasī_rākṣasa ca_ca iti_iti prāṇinām_prāṇin prakṛtayaḥ_prakṛti navame_navama adhyāye_adhyāya sūcitāḥ_sūcay tatra_tatra veda--_veda bodhita--_bodhay karma--_karman ātma--_ātman jñāna--_jñāna upāya--_upāya ānuṣṭhāna--_ānuṣṭhāna pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetuḥ_hetu sāttvikī_sāttvika śubha--_śubha vāsanā_vāsanā daivī_daiva prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti iti_iti ucyate_vac evam_evam vaidika--_vaidika niṣedha--_niṣedha atikrameṇa_atikrama svabhāva--_svabhāva siddha--_sidh rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa anusāri--_anusārin sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha hetu--_hetu pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetu--_hetu bhūtā_bhū rājasī_rājasa tāmasī_tāmasa ca_ca aśubha--_aśubha vāsanā_vāsanā āsurī_āsura rākṣasī_rākṣasa ca_ca prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti ucyate_vac tatra_tatra ca_ca viṣaya--_viṣaya bhoga--_bhoga prādhānyena_prādhānya rāga--_rāga prābalyāt_prābalya āsurī--_āsurī tvam_tva hiṃsā--_hiṃsā prādhānyena_prādhānya dveṣa--_dveṣa prābalyāt_prābalya rākṣasī--_rākṣasī tvam_tva iti_iti vivekaḥ_viveka samprati_samprati tu_tu śāstra--_śāstra anusāreṇa_anusāra tad--_tad vihita--_vidhā pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetu--_hetu bhūtā_bhū sāttvikī_sāttvika śubha--_śubha vāsanā_vāsanā daivī_daiva sampad_sampad śāstra--_śāstra atikrameṇa_atikrama tad--_tad niṣiddha--_niṣidh viṣaya--_viṣaya pravṛtti--_pravṛtti hetu--_hetu bhūtā_bhū rājasī_rājasa tāmasī_tāmasa ca_ca aśubha--_aśubha vāsanā_vāsanā rākṣasī_rākṣasa āsuryoḥ_āsura ekīkaraṇena_ekīkaraṇa āsurī_āsura sampad_sampad iti_iti dvairāśyena_dvairāśya aśubha--_aśubha aśubha--_aśubha vāsanā--_vāsanā bhedam_bheda dvayāḥ_dvaya ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti prasiddham_prasidh śubhānām_śubha ādānāya_ādāna aśubhānām_aśubha hānāya_hāna ca_ca pratipādayitum_pratipāday ṣoḍaśaḥ_ṣoḍaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya ārabhyate_ārabh tatra_tatra ādau_ādi śloka--_śloka trayā_traya inṇādeyām_inṇādeya daivīm_daiva sampadam_sampad

śāstra--_śāstra upadiṣṭe_upadiś arthe_artha sandeham_saṃdeha vinā_vinā anuṣṭāna--_anuṣṭāna niṣṭhatvam_niṣṭhatva ekākī_ekākin sarva--_sarva parigraha--_parigraha śūnyaḥ_śūnya katham_katham jīviṣyāmi_jīv iti_iti bhaya--_bhaya rāhityam_rāhitya vā_vā abhayam_abhaya sattvasya_sattva antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhiḥ_śuddhi nirmala--_nirmala tā_tā tasyāḥ_tad samyaktā_samyaktā bhagavat--_bhagavant tattva--_tattva sphūrti--_sphūrti yogyatā_yogyatā sattva--_sattva saṃśuddhiḥ_saṃśuddhi para--_para vañcana--_vañcana māyā--_māyā anṛta--_anṛta ādi--_ādi parivarjanam_parivarjana vā_vā parasya_para vyājena_vyāja vaśīkaraṇam_vaśīkaraṇa para--_para vañcanam_vañcana hṛdaye_hṛdaya anyathā_anyathā kṛtvā_kṛ bahis_bahis anyathā_anyathā vyavaharaṇam_vyavaharaṇa māyā_māyā anyathā_anyathā adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa kathanam_kathana anṛtam_anṛta iti_iti ādi_ādi jñānam_jñāna śāstrāt_śāstra ātma--_ātman tattvasya_tattva avagamaḥ_avagama citta--_citta ekāgra--_ekāgra tayā_tā tasya_tad sva--_sva anubhava--_anubhava ārūḍha--_āruh tvam_tva yogaḥ_yoga etat_etad ca_ca anyeṣām_anya api_api paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa dharmāṇām_dharma upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa jñānam_jñāna ātma--_ātman sākṣātkāraḥ_sākṣātkāra yogaḥ_yoga manaḥ--_manas nāśa--_nāśa vāsanā--_vāsanā kṣaya--_kṣaya anukūlaḥ_anukūla puruṣa--_puruṣa prayatnaḥ_prayatna tābhyām_tad viśiṣṭā_viśiṣ saṃsāri--_saṃsārin vilakṣaṇa--_vilakṣaṇa avasthitiḥ_avasthiti jīvan--_jīv muktiḥ_mukti jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga vyavasthitiḥ_vyavasthiti iti_iti evam_evam vyākhyāyate_vyākhyā tadā_tadā phala--_phala mūrtā_mūrch eva_eva bhagavat--_bhagavant bhaktim_bhakti vinā_vinā antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa saṃśuddheḥ_saṃśuddhi ayogāt_ayoga tayā_tad sā_tad api_api kathitā_kathay

lg.l: mahātmānaḥ_mahātman tu_tu mām_mad pārtha_pārtha daivīm_daiva prakṛtim_prakṛti āśritāḥ_āśri
bhajanti_bhaj an_an anya--_anya manasaḥ_manas jñātvā_jñā bhūtādim_bhūtādi avyayam_avyaya

div.p: iti_iti navame_navama daivyām_daiva sampadi_sampad bhagavat--_bhagavant bhakteḥ_bhakti ukta--_vac tvāt_tva ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant bhakteḥ_bhakti ati_ati śreṣṭha--_śreṣṭha tvāt_tva abhaya--_abhaya ādibhiḥ_ādi saha_saha pāṭhaḥ_pāṭha na_na kṛtaḥ_kṛ iti_iti draṣṭavyam_dṛś

mahā--_mahat bhāgyānām_bhāgya paramahaṃsānām_paramahaṃsa phala--_phala bhūtām_bhū daivīm_daiva sampadam_sampad uktvā_vac tatas_tatas nyūnānām_nyūna gṛhastha--_gṛhastha ādīnām_ādi sādhana--_sādhana bhūtām_bhū āha_ah dānam_dāna sva--_sva svatva--_svatva āspadānām_āspada anna--_anna ādīnām_ādi yathā_yathā śakti_śakti śāstra--_śāstra uktaḥ_vac saṃvibhāgaḥ_saṃvibhāga ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra anuktānām_anukta nivṛtti--_nivṛtti lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa dharmāṇām_dharma samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha yajñaḥ_yajña ca_ca śrautaḥ_śrauta agnihotra--_agnihotra darśa--_darśa paurṇamāsa--_paurṇamāsa ādiḥ_ādi smārtaḥ_smārta deva--_deva yajñaḥ_yajña pitṛ--_pitṛ yajñaḥ_yajña bhūta--_bhūta yajñaḥ_yajña manuṣya--_manuṣya yajñaḥ_yajña iti_iti caturvidhaḥ_caturvidha brahma--_brahman yajñasya_yajña svādhyāya--_svādhyāya padena_pada pṛthak_pṛthak ukteḥ_ukti ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra anuktānām_anukta pravṛtti--_pravṛtti lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa dharmāṇām_dharma samuccaya--_samuccaya arthaḥ_artha etat_etad trayam_traya gṛhasthasya_gṛhastha svādhyāyaḥ_svādhyāya brahma--_brahman yajñaḥ_yajña adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa artham_artha ṛk--_ṛc veda--_veda ādi--_ādi adhyayana--_adhyayana rūpaḥ_rūpa tapaḥ_tapas tri--_tri vidham_vidha śārīra--_śārīra ādi_ādi saptadaśe_saptadaśa vakṣyamāṇam_vac vānaprasthasya_vānaprastha asādhāraṇaḥ_asādhāraṇa dharmaḥ_dharma evam_evam caturṇām_catur āśramāṇām_āśrama asādhāraṇān_asādhāraṇa dharmān_dharma uktvā_vac caturṇām_catur varṇānām_varṇa asādhāraṇa--_asādhāraṇa dharmān_dharma āha_ah ārjavam_ārjava avakra--_avakra tvam_tva śraddadhāneṣu_śraddhā śrotṛṣu_śrotṛ sva--_sva jñāta--_jñā artha--_artha asaṃgopanam_asaṃgopana

satyam_satya anartha--_anartha ananubandhi_ananubandhin yathābhūta--_yathābhūta artha--_artha vacanam_vacana paraiḥ_para ākrośe_ākrośa tāḍane_tāḍana vā_vā kṛte_kṛ sati_as prāptaḥ_prāp yaḥ_yad krodhaḥ_krodha tasya_tad tad--_tad kālam_kāla upaśamanam_upaśamana akrodhaḥ_akrodha dānasya_dāna prāk_prāk ukteḥ_ukti tyāgaḥ_tyāga saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa damasya_dama prāk_prāk ukteḥ_ukti śāntiḥ_śānti antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa upaśamaḥ_upaśama parasmai_para parokṣe_parokṣa para--_para doṣa--_doṣa prakāśanam_prakāśana paiśunam_paiśuna tad--_tad abhāvaḥ_abhāva apaiśunam_apaiśuna dayā_dayā bhūteṣu_bhūta duḥkhiteṣu_duḥkhita anukampā_anukampā a_a lolup--_lolupa tvam_tva a_a lolupa--_lolupa tvam_tva indriyāṇām_indriya viṣaya--_viṣaya saṃnidhāne_saṃnidhāna api_api avikriya--_avikriya tvam_tva mārdavam_mārdava akrūra--_akrūra tvam_tva vṛthā_vṛthak pūrva--_pūrva pakṣa--_pakṣa ādi--_ādi kāriṣu_kārin api_api śiṣya--_śiṣya ādiṣu_ādi apriya--_apriya bhāṣaṇa--_bhāṣaṇa ādi--_ādi vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka yodhayitṛ--_yodhayitṛ tvam_tva ārjava--_ārjava ādayaḥ_ādi acāpala--_acāpala antāḥ_anta brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa asādharaṇāḥ_asādharaṇa dharmāḥ_dharma

tejaḥ_tejas prāgalbhyam_prāgalbhya strī--_strī bālaka--_bālaka ādibhiḥ_ādi mūḍhaiḥ_muh an_an abhibhāvya--_abhibhāvay tvam_tva kṣamā_kṣamā sati_as api_api sāmarthye_sāmarthya paribhava--_paribhava hetum_hetu prati_prati krodhasya_krodha anutpattiḥ_anutpatti dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti deha--_deha indriyeṣu_indriya avasādam_avasāda prāpteṣu_prāp api_api tad--_tad uttambhakaḥ_uttambhaka prayana--_prayana viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa yena_yad uttambhitāni_uttambhay karaṇāni_karaṇa śarīram_śarīra ca_ca na_na avasīdanti_avasad etat_etad trayam_traya kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya a_a sādhāraṇam_sādhāraṇa śaucam_śauca ābhyantaram_ābhyantara artha--_artha prayoga--_prayoga ādau_ādi māyā--_māyā anṛta--_anṛta ādi--_ādi rāhityam_rāhitya na_na tu_tu mṛd--_mṛd jala--_jala ādi--_ādi janitam_janay bāhyam_bāhya atra_atra grāhyam_grah tasya_tad śarīra--_śarīra śuddhi--_śuddhi rūpa--_rūpa tayā_tā bāhya--_bāhya tvena_tva antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa vāsanā--_vāsanā tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva tad--_tad vāsanānām_vāsanā eva_eva sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi bheda--_bheda bhinnānām_bhid daivya--_daivya āsurya--_āsurya ādi--_ādi sampad--_sampad rūpa--_rūpa tvena_tva atra_atra svādhyāya--_svādhyāya ādi--_ādi vat_vat kenacid_kaścit rūpeṇa_rūpa vāsanā--_vāsanā rūpa--_rūpa tve_tva tat_tad api_api ādeyam_ādā eva_eva drohaḥ_droha para--_para jighāṃsayā_jighāṃsā śastra--_śastra grahaṇa--_grahaṇa ādi_ādi tad--_tad abhāvaḥ_abhāva adrohaḥ_adroha etat_etad dvayam_dvaya vaiśyasya_vaiśya asādhāraṇam_asādhāraṇa asti_as artham_artha māni--_mānay tā--_tā ātmani_ātman tad--_tad abhāvaḥ_abhāva na_na atimāni--_atimānin tā_tā pūjyeṣu_pūjay namra--_namra tā_tā ayam_idam śūdrasya_śūdra asādhāraṇaḥ_asādhāraṇa dharmaḥ_dharma tam_tad etam_etad veda--_veda anuvacanena_anuvacana brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vividiṣanti_vividiṣ yajñena_yajña dānena_dāna tapasā_tapas anāśakena_anāśaka iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutyā_śruti vividiṣā--_vividiṣā aupayika--_aupayika tayā_tā viniyuktāḥ_viniyuj asādhāraṇāḥ_asādhāraṇa sādhāraṇāḥ_sādhāraṇa ca_ca varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama dharmāḥ_dharma iha_iha ete_etad dharmāḥ_dharma bhavanti_bhū niṣpadyante_niṣpad daivīm_daiva śuddha--_śuddha sattva--_sattva mayīm_maya sampadam_sampad vāsanā--_vāsanā santatim_saṃtati śarīra--_śarīra ārambha--_ārambha kāle_kāla puṇya--_puṇya karmabhiḥ_karman abhivyaktām_abhivyañj abhilakṣya_abhilakṣay jātasya_jan puruṣasya_puruṣa tam_tad vidyā--_vidyā karmaṇī_karman samanvārabhete_samanvārabh puṇyaḥ_puṇya puṇyena_puṇya karmaṇā_karman bhavati_bhū pāpaḥ_pāpa pāpena_pāpa iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutibhyaḥ_śruti he_he bhārata_bhārata iti_iti śuddha--_śuddha vaṃśa--_vaṃśa udbhava--_udbhava tvena_tva pūta--_pū tvāt_tva tvam_tvad etādṛśa--_etādṛśa dharma--_dharma yogyaḥ_yogya asi_as iti_iti sūcayati_sūcay
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha

lg.l: ṣoḍaśe_ṣoḍaśa sampadam_sampad daivīm_daiva āsurīm_āsura api_api avarṇayat_varṇay
sargam_sarga ca_ca dvividham_dvividha daivam_daiva āsuram_āsura prabhuḥ_prabhu akṣayāt_akṣaya

div.p: anantara--_anantara adhyāye_adhyāya ūrdhva--_ūrdhva mūlam_mūla adhas_adhas śākham_śākhā iti_iti ādinā_ādi varṇitasya_varṇay saṃsāra--_saṃsāra aśvattha--_aśvattha vṛkṣasya_vṛkṣa phalāni_phala na_na varṇitāni_varṇay iti_iti anusmṛtya_anusmṛ asmin_idam adhyāye_adhyāya tasya_tad dvividhāni_dvividha bandhakāni_bandhaka ca_ca phalāni_phala varṇayiṣyan_varṇay iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri tyakta--_tyaj putra--_putra kalatra--_kalatra ādikaḥ_ādika ekākī_ekākin nirjane_nirjana vane_vana katham_katham jīviṣyāmi_jīv iti_iti bhaya--_bhaya rāhityam_rāhitya abhayam_abhaya dānam_dāna sva--_sva bhojya--_bhuj anna--_anna ādeḥ_ādi yathocitam_yathocita saṃvibhāgaḥ_saṃvibhāga yajñaḥ_yajña deva--_deva pūjā_pūjā svādhyāyaḥ_svādhyāya veda--_veda pāṭhḥ_pāṭha ādīni_ādi spaṣṭāni_spaṣṭa tyāgaḥ_tyāga putra--_putra kalatra--_kalatra ādiṣu_ādi yama--_yama tā--_tā tyāgaḥ_tyāga a_a loluptvam_loluptva lobha--_lobha abhāvaḥ_abhāva etāni_etad ṣaḍ_ṣaṣ viṃśatiḥ_viṃśati abhayā--_abhayā ādīni_ādi daivīm_daiva sāttvikīm_sāttvika samapdam_samapda abhilakṣya_abhilakṣ jātasya_jan sāttvikyāḥ_sāttvika sampadaḥ_sampad prāpt--_prāp vyañjake_vyañjaka kṣaṇe_kṣaṇa janma_janman labdhavataḥ_labh puṃsaḥ_puṃs bhavanti_bhū
baladevaḥ_baladeva

lg.l: daivīm_daiva tathā_tathā āsurīm_āsura kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa sampadam_sampad ṣoḍaśe_ṣoḍaśa abravīt_brū
pādeya--_pādeya tva--_tva heya--_hā tve_tva bodhayan_bodhay kramatas_kramatas tayoḥ_tad

div.p: pūrvatra_pūrvatra aśvattha--_aśvattha mūlāni_mūla anusantatāni_anusaṃtan iti_iti ādinā_ādi prācīna--_prācīna karma--_karman nimittāḥ_nimitta śubha--_śubha aśubha--_aśubha vāsanāḥ_vāsanā saṃsāra--_saṃsāra taroḥ_taru avāntara--_avāntara mūla--_mūla tvena_tva uktāḥ_vac etāḥ_etad eva_eva navame_navama daivī_daiva āsurī_āsura rākṣasī_rākṣasa prāṇinām_prāṇin prakṛtayaḥ_prakṛti nigaditāḥ_nigad ahetuḥ_ahetu sāttvikī_sāttvika śubha--_śubha vāsanā_vāsanā mokṣa--_mokṣa upāyoginī_upāyogin daivī_daiva prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti sā_tad evā_eva iha_iha daivī_daiva sampad_sampad taroḥ_taru upādeyam_upādā phalam_phala svābhāvika--_svābhāvika rāga--_rāga dveṣa--_dveṣa anusāriṇī_anusārin sarva--_sarva anartha--_anartha hetuḥ_hetu rājasī_rājasa tāmasī_tāmasa ca_ca aśubha--_aśubha vāsanā_vāsanā āsurī_āsura rākṣasī_rākṣasa ca_ca prakṛti--_prakṛti niraya--_niraya nipāta--_nipāta upayoginī_upayogin sā_tad sā_tad ca_ca asura--_asura sampad_sampad tayoḥ_tad heyam_hā phalam_phala iti_iti etat_etad bodhayitum_bodhay ṣoḍaśasya_ṣoḍaśa ārambhaḥ_ārambha

atra_atra daivīm_daiva sampadam_sampad bhagavān_bhagavant uvāca_vac abhayam_abhaya iti_iti ādinā_ādi trikeṇa_trika caturṇām_catur āśramāṇām_āśrama varṇānām_varṇa ca_ca dharmāḥ_dharma kramāt_kramāt iha_iha kathyante_kathay sannyāsinām_saṃnyāsin tāvat_tāvat āha_ah abhayam_abhaya nirudyamaḥ_nirudyama katham_katham ekākī_ekākin jiviṣyāmi_jiviṣ iti_iti bhaya--_bhaya śūnyatvam_śūnyatva jñāna--_jñāna yoge_yoga śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādau_ādi jñāna--_jñāna upāye_upāya vyavasthitiḥ_vyavasthiti pariniṣṭhā_pariniṣṭhā iti_iti trayam_traya

atha_atha brahmacāriṇām_brahmacārin āha_ah svādhyāyaḥ_svādhyāya brahma--_brahman yajñaḥ_yajña śaktimataḥ_śaktimat bhagavataḥ_bhagavat prati_prati pādakaḥ_pādaka ayam_idam apauruṣeyaḥ_apauruṣeya akṣara--_akṣara rāśiḥ_rāśi iti_iti anusandhāya_anusaṃdhā veda--_veda abhyāsa--_abhyāsa niṣṭha--_niṣṭha tā_tā iti_iti ekam_eka
atha_atha vānaprasthānām_vānaprastha āha_ah tapaḥ_tapas iti_iti tat_tad ca_ca śarīra--_śarīra ādi--_ādi tri--_tri bhedam_bheda iti_iti aṣṭādaśe_aṣṭādaśa vakṣyamāṇam_vac bodhyam_budh iti_iti ekam_eka

atha_atha varṇeṣu_varṇa viprāṇām_vipra āha_ah ārjavam_ārjava sāralyam_sāralya tat_tad ca_ca śraddhālu--_śraddhālu śrotṛṣu_śrotṛ sva--_sva jñāta--_jñā artha--_artha āgopanam_āgopana jñeyam_jñā ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā prāṇi--_prāṇin jīvikā--_jīvikā anucchedaka--_anucchedaka tā_tā satyam_satya anrthān_anrtha anubhandi_anubhandin yathā_yathā dṛṣṭa--_dṛś artha--_artha viṣayam_viṣaya vākyam_vākya akrodhaḥ_akrodha durjana--_durjana kṛte_kṛ sva--_sva tiraskāre_tiraskāra abhyuditasya_abhyudi kopasya_kopa nirodhaḥ_nirodha tyāgaḥ_tyāga durukteḥ_durukti api_api tatra_tatra aprakāśaḥ_aprakāśa śāntiḥ_śānti manasaḥ_manas saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama a_a paiśunam_paiśuna parokṣe_parokṣa para--_para anartha--_anartha kāri--_kārin vākya--_vākya aprakāśanam_aprakāśana bhūteṣu_bhūta dayā_dayā tad--_tad duḥkha--_duḥkha a_a sahiṣṇu--_sahiṣṇu tā_tā a_a loluptvam_loluptva nirlobha--_nirlobha tā_tā pa--_pa lopaḥ_lopa chāndasaḥ_chāndasa mārdavam_mārdava komala--_komala tvam_tva sat--_sat pātra--_pātra saṅga--_saṅga viccheda--_viccheda asahanam_asahana hrīḥ_hrī vikarmaṇi_vikarman lajjā_lajjā acāpalam_acāpala vyartha--_vyartha kriyā--_kriyā virahaḥ_viraha iti_iti dvādaśa_dvādaśan

atha_atha kṣatriyāṇām_kṣatriya āha_ah tejaḥ_tejas tuccha--_tuccha jana--_jana an_an abhibhāvya--_abhibhāvay tvam_tva kṣamā_kṣamā satī_as api_api sva--_sva asamānam_asama paribhāvakam_paribhāvaka prati_prati kopa--_kopa anudayaḥ_anudaya dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti śarīra--_śarīra indriyeṣu_indriya api_api tad--_tad uttambhakaḥ_uttambhaka prayatnaḥ_prayatna yena_yad teṣām_tad na_na

atha_atha vaiśyānām_vaiśya āha_ah śaucam_śauca vyāpāre_vyāpāra vāṇijye_vāṇijya māyā--_māyā anṭra--_anṭra ādi--_ādi rāhityam_rāhitya adrohaḥ_adroha para--_para jighāṃsayā_jighāṃsā khaḍga--_khaḍga ādya--_ādya grahaṇam_grahaṇa iti_iti dvayam_dvaya

atha_atha śūdrānām_śūdra āha_ah na_na atimāni--_atimānin tā_tā ātmani_ātman pūjya--_pūjay tva--_tva bhāvanā--_bhāvanā śūnyatā_śūnyatā vipra--_vipra ādiṣu_ādi triṣu_tri namra--_namra tā_tā iti_iti ekam_eka iti_iti ṣaḍ_ṣaṣ viṃśatiḥ_viṃśati

ete_etad tatra_tatra tatra_tatra pradhāna--_pradhāna bhūtāḥ_bhū bodhyāḥ_budh anuktānām_anukta api_api upalakṣaṇa--_upalakṣaṇa arthāḥ_artha deha--_deha ārambha--_ārambha kāla--_kāla unmukhaiḥ_unmukha sukṛtaiḥ_sukṛta vyaktām_vyakta daivīm_daiva śubha--_śubha vāsanām_vāsanā abhilakṣīkṛtya_abhilakṣīkṛ jātasya_jan puruṣasya_puruṣa bhavanti_bhū udayante_udi --puṇyaḥ_puṇya puṇye_puṇya karmaṇā_karman bhavati_bhū pāpaḥ_pāpa pāpena_pāpa iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti devāḥ_deva khalu_khalu pareśa--_pareśa anu_anu vṛtti--_vṛtti śīlāḥ_śīla teṣām_tad iyam_idam sampad_sampad anayā_idam tad--_tad prāpaka--_prāpaka jñāna--_jñāna bhakti--_bhakti sambhavāt_sambhava saṃsāra--_saṃsāra taroḥ_taru upādeyam_upādā phalam_phala etat_etad
BhG 16.4

lg.l: dambhaḥ_dambha darpaḥ_darpa atimānaḥ_atimāna ca_ca krodhaḥ_krodha pāruṣyam_pāruṣya eva_eva ca_ca
ajñānam_ajñāna ca_ca abhijātasya_abhijan pārtha_pārtha saṃpadam_sampad āsurīm_āsura

div.p: āha_ah dambhaḥ_dambha dharma--_dharma dhvaji--_dhvajin tvam_tva darpaḥ_darpa dhana--_dhana vidyā--_vidyā ādi--_ādi nimittaḥ_nimitta cittasya_citta utsekaḥ_utseka abhimānaḥ_abhimāna pūrva--_pūrva uktaḥ_vac krodhaḥ_krodha ca_ca pāruṣyam_pāruṣya paruṣa--_paruṣa vacanam_vacana yathā_yathā kāṇam_kāṇa cakṣuṣmān_cakṣuṣmat virūpam_virūpa rūpavān_rūpavat hīna--_hā abhijanam_abhijana uttama--_uttama abhijanaḥ_abhijana iti_iti ādi_ādi ajñānam_ajñāna ca_ca aviveka--_aviveka jñānam_jñāna mithyā_mithyā pratyayaḥ_pratyaya kartavya--_kṛ akartavya--_akartavya ādi--_ādi viṣayaḥ_viṣaya abhijātasya_abhijan pārtha_pārtha kim_ka abhijātasya_abhijan iti_iti āha_ah āsurānām_āsura sampad_sampad āsurī_āsura tām_tad abhijātasya_abhijan iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ādeya--_ādā tvena_tva daivīm_daiva sampadam_sampad uktvā_vac idānīm_idānīm heya--_hā tvena_tva āsurīm_āsura saṃpadam_sampad ekena_eka ślokena_śloka saṃkṣipya_saṃkṣip āha_ah
