BhG 17.3

lg.l: sattva--_sattva anurūpā_anurūpa sarvasya_sarva śraddhā_śraddhā bhavati_bhū bhārata_bhārata
śraddhā--_śraddhā mayaḥ_maya ayam_idam puruṣaḥ_puruṣa yaḥ_yad yad--_yad śraddhaḥ_śraddhā saḥ_tad eva_eva saḥ_tad
śamaḥ_śama damaḥ_dama titikṣā_titikṣā ijyā_ijyā tapaḥ_tapas satyam_satya dayā_dayā smṛtiḥ_smṛti
tuṣṭiḥ_tuṣṭi tyāgaḥ_tyāga aspṛhā_aspṛhā śraddhā_śraddhā hrīḥ_hrī dayā_dayā nirvṛttiḥ_nirvṛtti dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti

div.p: iti_iti etāḥ_etad sattvasya_sattva vṛttayaḥ_vṛtti iti_iti

atha_atha katham_katham tasyāḥ_tad traividhyam_traividhya ucyate_vac satyam_satya tathā_tathā api_api rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas yukta--_yuj puruṣa--_puruṣa āśraya--_āśraya tvena_tva rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas miśrita--_miśray tvena_tva sattvasya_sattva traividhyāt_traividhya śraddhāya_śraddhā api_api traividhyam_traividhya ghaṭate_ghaṭ iti_iti āha_ah sattva--_sattva anurūpa--_anurūpa iti_iti sattva--_sattva anurūpā_anurūpa sattva--_sattva tāratamya--_tāratamya anusāriṇī_anusārin sarvasya_sarva vivekinaḥ_vivekin avivekinaḥ_avivekin lokasya_loka śraddhā_śraddhā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad eva_eva āha_ah yaḥ_yad yat_yad śraddhaḥ_śraddhā yādṛśī_yādṛśa śraddhā_śraddhā yasya_yad saḥ_tad eva_eva saḥ_tad tādṛśa--_tādṛśa śraddhā--_śraddhā yuktaḥ_yuj eva_eva saḥ_tad yaḥ_yad pūrvam_pūrvam sattva--_sattva utkarṣeṇa_utkarṣa sāttvika--_sāttvika śraddhayā_śraddhā yuktaḥ_yuj puruṣaḥ_puruṣa sa_tad punar_punar tādṛśa--_tādṛśa sva--_sva saṃskāreṇa_saṃskāra sāttvika--_sāttvika śraddhayā_śraddhā ayuktaḥ_ayukta eva_eva bhavati_bhū yaḥ_yad tu_tu rajasaḥ_rajas utkarṣeṇa_utkarṣa rājasa--_rājasa śraddhayā_śraddhā yuktaḥ_yuj sa_tad punar_punar tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa eva_eva bhavati_bhū yaḥ_yad tu_tu tamasaḥ_tamas utkarṣeṇa_utkarṣa tāmasa--_tāmasa śraddhayā_śraddhā yuktaḥ_yuj sa_tad punar_punar tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa eva_eva bhavati_bhū loka--_loka ācāra--_ācāra mātreṇa_mātra pravartamāneṣu_pravṛt evam_evam sāttvika--_sāttvika rājasa--_rājasa tāmasa--_tāmasa śraddhā--_śraddhā vyavasthā_vyavasthā śāstra--_śāstra janita--_janay viveka--_viveka jñāna--_jñāna yuktānām_yuj tu_tu svabhāva--_svabhāva vijayena_vijaya sāttvikī_sāttvika ekā_eka eva_eva śraddhā_śraddhā iti_iti prakaraṇa--_prakaraṇa arthaḥ_artha

āha_ah sattvam_sattva prakāśa--_prakāśa śīla--_śīla tvāt_tva sattva--_sattva pradhāna--_pradhāna triguṇa--_triguṇa āpañcīkṛta--_āpañcīkṛ pañca--_pañcan mahābhūta--_mahābhūta ārabdham_ārabh antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa tat_tad ca_ca kvacid_kvacid udrikta--_udric sattvam_sattva eva_eva yathā_yathā devānām_deva kvacid_kvacid rajasā_rajas abhibhūta--_abhibhū sattvam_sattva yathā_yathā yakṣa--_yakṣa ādīnām_ādi kvacid_kvacid tamasā_tamas abhibhūta--_abhibhū sattvam_sattva yathā_yathā preta--_preta bhūta--_bhūta ādīnām_ādi manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya tu_tu prāyeṇa_prāyeṇa vyāmiśram_vyāmiśra eva_eva tat_tad ca_ca śāstrīya--_śāstrīya viveka--_viveka jñānena_jñāna udbhūta--_udbhū sattvam_sattva rajaḥ--_rajas tamasī_tamas abhibhūya_abhibhū kriyate_kṛ śāstrīya--_śāstrīya viveka--_viveka vijñāna--_vijñāna śūnyasya_śūnya tu_tu sarvasya_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin jātasya_jāta sattva--_sattva anurūpā_anurūpa śraddhā_śraddhā sattva--_sattva vaicitryāt_vaicitrya vicitrā_vicitra bhavati_bhū sattva--_sattva pradhāne_pradhāna antaḥkaraṇe_antaḥkaraṇa sāttvikī_sāttvika rajaḥ--_rajas pradhāne_pradhāna tasmin_tad rājasī_rājasa tamaḥ--_tamas pradhāne_pradhāna tu_tu tasmin_tad tāmasī_tāmasa iti_iti he_he bhārata_bhārata mahā--_mahat kula--_kula prasūta_prasū jñāna--_jñāna nirata_niram iti_iti vā_vā śuddha--_śuddha sāttvika--_sāttvika tvam_tva dyotayati_dyotay yat_yad tvayā_tvad pṛṣṭam_pracch teṣām_tad niṣṭā_niṣṭā kā_ka iti_iti tatra_tatra uttaram_uttara śṛṇu_śru ayam_idam śāstrīya--_śāstrīya jñāna--_jñāna śūnyaḥ_śūnya karma--_karman adhikṛtaḥ_adhikṛ puruṣaḥ_puruṣa triguṇa--_triguṇa antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa sampiṇḍitaḥ_sampiṇḍay śraddhā--_śraddhā mayaḥ_maya prācuryeṇa_prācurya asmin_idam śraddhā_śraddhā prakṛtā_prakṛ iti_iti tad--_tad prastuta--_prastu vacane_vacana mayaṭ_mayaṭ an_an anya--_anya mayaḥ_maya yajñaḥ_yajña itivat_itivat atas_atas yaḥ_yad yat_yad śradhaḥ_śradhas yā_yad sāttvikī_sāttvika rājasī_rājasa tāmasī_tāmasa vā_vā śraddhā_śraddhā yasya_yad saḥ_tad eva_eva śraddhā--_śraddhā anurūpaḥ_anurūpa eva_eva sa_tad sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika rājasaḥ_rājasa tāmasaḥ_tāmasa vā_vā śraddhayā_śraddhā eva_eva niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā vyākhyātā_vyākhyā iti_iti abhiprāyaḥ_abhiprāya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tad--_tad anurūpā_anurūpa sāttvikā_sāttvika antaḥkaraṇānām_antaḥkaraṇa sāttvikī_sāttvika eva_eva śraddhā_śraddhā rājasa--_rājasa antaḥkaraṇānām_antaḥkaraṇa rājasī_rājasa eva_eva tāmasa--_tāmasa antaḥkaraṇānām_antaḥkaraṇa tāmasī_tāmasa eva_eva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yad--_yad śraddhaḥ_śraddhā yasmin_yad yajanīye_yaj deve_deva asure_asura rākṣase_rākṣasa vā_vā śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat yaḥ_yad bhavati_bhū sa_tad saḥ_tad eva_eva bhavati_bhū tat_tad tat_tad śabdena_śabda eva_eva vyapadiśyate_vyapadiś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva yadi_yadi api_api śraddhā_śraddhā sattva--_sattva guṇa--_guṇa vṛttiḥ_vṛtti tathā_tathā api_api antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa dharmasya_dharma svabhāvasya_svabhāva antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa ca_ca dharmiṇaḥ_dharmin traividhyāt_traividhya tad--_tad uditāyāḥ_udi tasyāḥ_tad traividhyam_traividhya siddhyet_sidh iti_iti bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah sattva--_sattva sattvam_sattva antaḥkaraṇam_antaḥkaraṇa triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmakam_ātmaka tad--_tad anurūpā_anurūpa sarvasya_sarva prāṇi--_prāṇin jātasya_jāta śraddhā_śraddhā bhavati_bhū sattva--_sattva pradhāna--_pradhāna antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa śraddhā_śraddhā sāttvikī_sāttvika rajaḥ--_rajas pradhāna--_pradhāna antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa tu_tu rājasī_rājasa tamaḥ--_tamas pradhāna--_pradhāna antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa tu_tu śraddhā_śraddhā tāmasī_tāmasa iti_iti atas_atas ayam_idam pūjya--_pūjay pūjaka--_pūjaka rūpaḥ_rūpa laukikaḥ_laukika puruṣaḥ_puruṣa śraddhā--_śraddhā mayaḥ_maya trividha--_trividha śraddhā--_śraddhā pracuraḥ_pracura yaḥ_yad puruṣaḥ_puruṣa yad--_yad śraddhaḥ_śraddhā yasmin_yad pūjye_pūjay deva--_deva ādau_ādi yakṣa--_yakṣa ādau_ādi preta--_preta ādau_ādi ca_ca śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat bhavati_bhū sa_tad pūjakaḥ_pūjaka api_api saḥ_tad eva_eva tad--_tad tad--_tad śabdena_śabda
vyapadeśya--_vyapadiś pūjya--_pūjay guṇavān_guṇavat pūjakaḥ_pūjaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: yajante_yaj sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika devān_deva yakṣa--_yakṣa rakṣāṃsi_rakṣas rājasāḥ_rājasa
pretān_preta bhūta--_bhūta gaṇān_gaṇa ca_ca anye_anya yajante_yaj tāmasāḥ_tāmasa janāḥ_jana

div.p: prapañcayati_prapañcay sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika janāḥ_jana sattva--_sattva prakṛtīn_prakṛti devān_deva yajante_yaj pūjayanti_pūjay rājasāḥ_rājasa tu_tu rajaḥ--_rajas prakṛtīn_prakṛti yakṣān_yakṣa rakṣasān_rakṣasa ca_ca yajante_yaj etebhyaḥ_etad anye_anya vilakṣaṇāḥ_vilakṣaṇa tāmasāḥ_tāmasa janāḥ_jana tāmasān_tāmasa eva_eva pretān_preta bhūta--_bhūta gaṇān_gaṇa ca_ca yajante_yaj sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi prakṛtīnām_prakṛti tad--_tad tad--_tad deva--_deva ādīnām_ādi pūjā--_pūjā rucibhiḥ_ruci tad--_tad tad--_tad pūjakānām_pūjaka sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi tvam_tva jñātavyam_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana śraddhā_śraddhā jñātā_jñā satī_as niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā jñāpayiṣyati_jñāpay kena_ka upāyena_upāya sā_tad jñāyatām_jñā iti_iti apekṣite_apekṣ deva--_deva pūjā--_pūjā ādi--_ādi kārya--_kārya liṅgena_liṅga anumeyā_anumā iti_iti āha_ah yajantaḥ_yaj iti_iti janāḥ_jana śāstrīya--_śāstrīya viveka--_viveka hīnāḥ_hā ye_yad svābhāvikyā_svābhāvika śraddhayā_śraddhā devān_deva vasu--_vasu rudra--_rudra ādīn_ādi sāttvikān_sāttvika yajante_yaj te_tad anye_anya sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika jñeyāḥ_jñā ye_yad ca_ca yakṣān_yakṣa kuvera--_kuvera ādīn_ādi rakṣāṃsi_rakṣas ca_ca rākṣasān_rākṣasa nirṛti--_nirṛti prabhṛtīn_prabhṛti rājasān_rājasa yajante_yaj te_tad anye_anya rājasāḥ_rājasa jñeyāḥ_jñā ye_yad ca_ca pretān_preta vipra--_vipra ādayaḥ_ādi svadharmāt_svadharma pracyutāḥ_pracyu deha--_deha pātāt_pāta ūrdhvam_ūrdhvam vāyavīyam_vāyavīya deham_deha āpannāḥ_āpad ulkāmukha--_ulkāmukha kaṭa--_kaṭa pūtanā--_pūtanā ādi--_ādi saṃjñāḥ_saṃjñā pretāḥ_preta bhavanti_bhū iti_iti manu--_manu uktān_vac piśāca--_piśāca viśeṣān_viśeṣa vā_vā bhūta--_bhūta anye_anya tāmasāḥ_tāmasa jñeyāḥ_jñā anyaḥ_anya iti_iti padam_pada triṣu_tri api_api vailakṣaṇya--_vailakṣaṇya dyotanāya_dyotana sambadhyate_sambandh

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha uktam_vac artham_artha spaṣṭayati_spaṣṭay sāttvika--_sāttvika antaḥkaraṇāḥ_antaḥkaraṇa sāttvikyā_sāttvika śraddhayā_śraddhā sāttvika--_sāttvika śāstra--_śāstra vidhinā_vidhi sāttvikān_sāttvika devān_deva eva_eva yajante_yaj deveṣu_deva eva_eva śraddhāvat--_śraddhāvat tvāt_tva devāḥ_deva eva_eva ucyante_vac evam_evam rājasāḥ_rājasa rājasa--_rājasa antar_antar karaṇāḥ_karaṇa iti_iti ādi_ādi

baladevaḥ_baladeva prapañcayati_prapañcay śāstrīya--_śāstrīya viveka--_viveka saṃvid--_saṃvid vihīnāḥ_vihā ye_yad janāḥ_jana svabhāva--_svabhāva jayā_ja śraddhayā_śraddhā devān_deva sāttvikān_sāttvika vasu--_vasu rudra--_rudra ādīn_ādi yajante_yaj te_tad anye_anya rājasāḥ_rājasa ye_yad pretān_preta bhūta--_bhūta gaṇān_gaṇa ca_ca tāmasāḥ_tāmasa yajante_yaj te_tad anye_anya tāmasāḥ_tāmasa dvijāḥ_dvija svadharma--_svadharma vibhraṣṭāḥ_vibhraṃś deha--_deha pāta--_pāta uttara--_uttara labdha--_labh vāyavīya--_vāyavīya dehāḥ_deha ulkāmukha--_ulkāmukha kaṭa--_kaṭa pūtanā--_pūtanā ādi--_ādi saṃjñāḥ_saṃjñā pretāḥ_preta manu--_manu uktāḥ_vac piśāca--_piśāca viśeṣāḥ_viśeṣa vā_vā iti_iti vyākhyātāraḥ_vyākhyātṛ sapta--_saptan mātṛkā--_mātṛkā ādayaḥ_ādi evam_evam ālasyāt_ālasya tyakta--_tyaj veda--_veda vidhīnām_vidhi svabhāvān_svabhāva sāttvika--_sāttvika ādyāḥ_ādya nirūpitāḥ_nirūpay ete_etad ca_ca balavat_balavat vaidika--_vaidika sat--_sat prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga svabhāvān_svabhāva vijitya_viji kadācid_kadācid vede_veda api_api adhikṛtaḥ_adhikṛ bhavanti_bhū iti_iti bodhyam_budh

lg.l: a_a śāstra--_śāstra vihitam_vidhā ghoram_ghora tapyante_tap ye_yad tapaḥ_tapas janāḥ_jana
dambha--_dambha ahaṃkāra--_ahaṃkāra saṃyuktāḥ_saṃyuj kāma--_kāma rāga--_rāga bala--_bala anvitāḥ_anvita
karśayantaḥ_karśay śarīra--_śarīra stham_stha bhūta--_bhūta grāmam_grāma acetasaḥ_acetas
mām_mad ca_ca eva_eva antar_antar śarīra--_śarīra stham_stha tān_tad viddhi_vid āsura--_āsura niścayān_niścaya

div.p: āha_ah śāstra--_śāstra vidhim_vidhi a_a jānantaḥ_jñā api_api kecid_kaścit prācīna--_prācīna puṇya--_puṇya saṃskāreṇa_saṃskāra uttamāḥ_uttama sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika eva_eva bhavanti_bhū kecid_kaścit madhyamāḥ_madhyama rājasāḥ_rājasa bhavanti_bhū adhamāḥ_adhama tu_tu tāmasāḥ_tāmasa bhavanti_bhū ye_yad punar_punar atyantam_atyantam manda--_manda bhāgyāḥ_bhāgya te_tad gatānugatyā_gatānugati pāṣaṇḍa--_pāṣaṇḍa saṅgena_saṅga ca_ca tad--_tad ācāra--_ācāra anuvartinaḥ_anuvartin santaḥ_as aśāstra--_aśāstra vihitam_vidhā ghoram_ghora bhūta--_bhūta bhayaṅkaram_bhayaṃkara tapaḥ_tapas tapyante_tap kurvanti_kṛ tatra_tatra hetavaḥ_hetu dambha--_dambha ahaṅkārābhyām_ahaṃkāra saṃyuktāḥ_saṃyuj tathā_tathā kāmaḥ_kāma abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa rāgaḥ_rāga āsaktiḥ_āsakti balam_bala āgrahaḥ_āgraha etaiḥ_etad anvitāḥ_anvita santaḥ_as tān_tad āsura--_āsura niścayān_niścaya vidvī_vidvin iti_iti uttareṇa_uttara anvayaḥ_anvaya

kim_kim ca_ca karśayantaḥ_karśay iti_iti śarīra--_śarīra stham_stha prārambhaka--_prārambhaka tvena_tva dehe_deha sthitam_sthā bhūtānām_bhūta pṛthivī--_pṛthivī ādīnām_ādi grāmam_grāma samūham_samūha karśayantaḥ_karśay vṛthak_vṛthak eva_eva upavāsa--_upavāsa ādibhiḥ_ādi kṛśam_kṛśa kurvantaḥ_kṛ acetasaḥ_acetas avivekinaḥ_avivekin mām_mad ca_ca antaryāmi--_antaryāmin tayā_tā antar_antar śarīra--_śarīra stham_stha deha--_deha madhye_madhya sthitam_sthā mad--_mad ājñā--_ājñā laṅghanena_laṅghana eva_eva karśayantaḥ_karśay evam_evam ye_yad tapaḥ_tapas caranti_car tān_tad āsura--_āsura niścayān_niścaya āsuraḥ_āsura ati_ati krūraḥ_krūra niścayaḥ_niścaya yeṣām_yad tān_tad viddhi_vid

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana evam_evam an_an ādṛta--_ādṛ śāstrāṇām_śāstra sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā kāryataḥ_kārya nirṇītā_nirṇī tatra_tatra kecid_kaścit rājasa--_rājasa tāmasāḥ_tāmasa api_api prāc--_prāñc bhavīya--_bhavīya puṇya--_puṇya paripākāt_paripāka sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika bhūtvā_bhū śāstrīya--_śāstrīya sādhane_sādhana adhikriyante_adhikṛ ye_yad tu_tu durāgraheṇa_durāgraha durdaiva--_durdaiva paripāka--_paripāka prāpta--_prāp durjana--_durjana saṅga--_saṅga ādi--_ādi doṣeṇa_doṣa ca_ca rājasa--_rājasa tāmasa--_tāmasa tām_tā na_na muñcanti_muc te_tad śāstrīya--_śāstrīya mārgāt_mārga bhraṣṭāḥ_bhraṃś asat--_asat mārga--_mārga anusaraṇena_anusaraṇa iha_iha loke_loka paratra_paratra ca_ca duḥkha--_duḥkha bhāginaḥ_bhāgin

a_a śāstra--_śāstra vihitam_vidhā śāstreṇa_śāstra vedena_veda pratyakṣeṇa_pratyakṣa anumitena_anumā vā_vā na_na vihitam_vidhā aśāstreṇa_aśāstra buddha--_buddha ādi--_ādi āgamena_āgama bodhitam_bodhay vā_vā ghoram_ghora parasya_para ātmanaḥ_ātman pīḍā--_pīḍā karam_kara tapaḥ_tapas tapta--_tap śilā--_śilā rohaṇa--_rohaṇa ādi_ādi tapyante_tap dambhaḥ_dambha dhārmika--_dhārmika tva--_tva khyāpanam_khyāpana ahaṃkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra aham_mad eva_eva śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha iti_iti durabhimānaḥ_durabhimāna tābhyām_tad samyak_samyak yuktāḥ_yuj yogasya_yoga samyaktvam_samyaktva anāyāsena_anāyāsa viyoga--_viyoga jananā--_jananā sāmarthyam_sāmarthya kāme_kāma kāmyamāna--_kāmay viṣaye_viṣaya yaḥ_yad rātgaḥ_rātga tad--_tad ati_ati gra--_gra duḥkha--_duḥkha sahana--_sahana sāmarthyam_sāmarthya tena_tad anvitāḥ_anvita kāmaḥ_kāma viṣaye_viṣaya abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa balam_bala avaśyam_avaśyam idam_idam sādhayiṣyāmi_sādhay iti_iti āgrahaḥ_āgraha taiḥ_tad anvitāḥ_anvita iti_iti vā_vā atas_atas eva_eva balad--_balad duḥkha--_duḥkha darśane_darśana api_api anivartamānāḥ_anivartamāna karśayantaḥ_karśay kṛśīkurvantaḥ_kṛśīkṛ vṛthak_vṛthak upavāsa--_upavāsa ādinā_ādi śarīra--_śarīra stham_stha bhūta--_bhūta grāmam_grāma deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṃghāta--_saṃghāta ākāreṇa_ākāra pariṇatam_pariṇam pṛthivī--_pṛthivī ādi--_ādi bhūta--_bhūta ca_ca antar_antar śarīra--_śarīra stham_stha bhoktṛ--_bhoktṛ rūpeṇa_rūpa sthitam_sthā bhogyasya_bhuj śarīrasya_śarīra kṛśīkaraṇena_kṛśīkaraṇa kṛśīkurvantaḥ_kṛśīkṛ eva_eva māma_māma antaryāmi--_antaryāmin tvena_tva śarīra--_śarīra antar_antar sthitam_sthā buddhi--_buddhi tad--_tad vṛtti--_vṛtti sākṣi--_sākṣin bhūtam_bhū īśvaram_īśvara ājñā--_ājñā laṅghanena_laṅghana karśayantaḥ_karśay iti_iti vā_vā tān_tad aihika--_aihika sarva--_sarva bhoga--_bhoga vimukhān_vimukha paratra_paratra ca_ca adhama--_adhama gati--_gati bhāginaḥ_bhāgin sarva--_sarva puruṣa--_puruṣa artha--_artha bhraṣṭān_bhraṃś āsura--_āsura niścayān_niścaya āsuraḥ_āsura viparyāsa--_viparyāsa rūpaḥ_rūpa veda--_veda artha--_artha virodhī_virodhin niścayaḥ_niścaya yeṣām_yad tān_tad manuṣya--_manuṣya tvena_tva viddhi_vid jānīhi_jñā pariharaṇāya_pariharaṇa niścayasya_niścaya āsura--_āsura tvāt_tva tad--_tad pūrvikāṇām_pūrvaka sarvāsām_sarva antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa vṛttīnām_vṛtti āsura--_āsura tvam_tva asura--_asura tva--_tva jāti--_jāti rahitānām_rahita ca_ca manuṣyāṇām_manuṣya karmaṇā_karman eva_eva asura--_asura tvāt_tva tān_tad asurān_asura viddhi_vid iti_iti sākṣāt_sākṣāt na_na uktam_vac iti_iti ca_ca draṣṭavyam_dṛś

tasya_tad uttaram_uttara adhunā_adhunā śṛṇu_śru iti_iti āha_ah aśāstra--_aśāstra iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi ghoram_ghora prāṇi--_prāṇin bhayaṅkaram_bhayaṃkara tapaḥ_tapas tapyante_tap kurvanti_kṛ iti_iti upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa idam_idam japa--_japa yāga--_yāga ādikam_ādika api_api aśāstrīyam_aśāstrīya kurvanti_kṛ kāma--_kāma ācaraṇa--_ācaraṇa rāhityam_rāhitya śraddhā--_śraddhā anvita--_anvita tvam_tva ca_ca svatas_svatas eva_eva labhyate_labh dambha--_dambha ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra saṃyuktāḥ_saṃyuj iti_iti dambha--_dambha ahaṅkārābhyām_ahaṃkāra vinā_vinā śāstra--_śāstra vidhi--_vidhi ullaṅghana--_ullaṅghana anupapatteḥ_anupapatti kāmaḥ_kāma svasya_sva ajara--_ajara amara--_amara tva--_tva rājya--_rājya ādi--_ādi abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa rāgaḥ_rāga tapasi_tapas āsaktiḥ_āsakti balam_bala hiraṇyakaśipu--_hiraṇyakaśipu prabhṛtīnām_prabhṛti iva_iva tapaḥ--_tapas karaṇa--_karaṇa sāmarthyam_sāmarthya taiḥ_tad anvitāḥ_anvita śarīra--_śarīra stham_stha ayambhaka--_ayambhaka tvena_tva deha--_deha sthitam_sthā bhūtānām_bhūta pṛthivī--_pṛthivī ādīnām_ādi grāmam_grāma samūham_samūha karśayantaḥ_karśay kṛśīkurvantaḥ_kṛśīkṛ mām_mad ca_ca mad--_mad aṃśa--_aṃśa bhūtam_bhū jīvam_jīva ca_ca duḥkhayantaḥ_duḥkhay āsūya--_āsūya niścayān_niścaya asurāṇām_asura eva_eva niṣṭhāyām_niṣṭhā sthitām_sthā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

baladevaḥ_baladeva āha_ah a_a śāstreṇa_śāstra veda--_veda viruddhena_virudh su_su āgamena_āgama vihitam_vidhā ghoram_ghora para--_para pīḍakam_pīḍaka tapaḥ_tapas ye_yad tapyante_tap kurvanti_kṛ kāma--_kāma rāgaḥ_rāga viṣaya--_viṣaya spṛhā_spṛhā balam_bala ca_ca mayā_mad śakyam_śakya etat_etad siddhaiḥ_siddha kartum_kṛ iti_iti durāgrahaḥ_durāgraha śarīra--_śarīra stham_stha bhūta--_bhūta grāmam_grāma pṛthivī--_pṛthivī ādi--_ādi saṅghātam_saṃghāta karṣayantaḥ_karṣay vṛthak_vṛthak upavāsa--_upavāsa ādinā_ādi kṛśam_kṛśa kurvantaḥ_kṛ antar_antar śarīra--_śarīra stham_stha śarīra--_śarīra madhya--_madhya gata--_gam antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin mām_mad ca_ca avajñayā_avajñā karṣayantaḥ_karṣay acetasaḥ_acetas śāstrīya--_śāstrīya viveka_viveka niścayena_niścaya asurān_asura viddhi_vid iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva uktānām_vac teṣām_tad durgatiḥ_durgati avarjanīyā_avarjanīya eva_eva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva svabhāva--_svabhāva jayā_ja śraddhayā_śraddhā yakṣa--_yakṣa rakṣaḥ--_rakṣas preta--_preta ādīn_ādi yajatām_yaj balavat--_balavat vaidika--_vaidika sat--_sat anugrahe_anugraha sati_as śāstrīya--_śāstrīya śraddhayā_śraddhā āsura--_āsura bhāva--_bhāva vināśaḥ_vināśa syāt_as eva_eva devān_deva yajatām_yaj tu_tu vastutas_vastutas sāttvika--_sāttvika tvāt_tva tad--_tad anugrahe_anugraha sati_as śāstrīyā_śāstrīya sulabhā_sulabha iti_iti sthitam_sthā
BhG 17.7

lg.l: āhāraḥ_āhāra tu_tu api_api sarvasya_sarva trividhaḥ_trividha bhavati_bhū priyaḥ_priya
yajñaḥ_yajña tapaḥ_tapas tathā_tathā dānam_dāna teṣām_tad bhedam_bheda imam_idam śṛṇu_śru

div.p: āha_ah sarvasya_sarva api_api janasya_jana yaḥ_yad āhāraḥ_āhāra anna--_anna ādi_ādi sa_tad tu_tu yathāyatham_yathāyatham trividhaḥ_trividha priyaḥ_priya bhavati_bhū tathā_tathā yajña--_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas dānāni_dāna ca_ca trividhāni_trividha bhavanti_bhū teṣām_tad vakṣyamānam_vac bhedam_bheda imam_idam śṛṇu_śru etat_etad ca_ca rājasa--_rājasa tāmasa--_tāmasa āhāra--_āhāra yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi parityāgena_parityāga sāttvika--_sāttvika āhāra--_āhāra yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi sevayā_sevā sattva--_sattva vṛddhau_vṛddhi yatna--_yatna kartavyaḥ_kṛ iti_iti etat_etad artham_artha kathyate_kathay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana :_yad sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika te_tad devāḥ_deva ye_yad tu_tu rājasāḥ_rājasa tāmasāḥ_tāmasa ca_ca te_tad viparyasta--_viparyasta tvāt_tva asurāḥ_asura iti_iti sthite_sthā sāttvikānām_sāttvika ādānāya_ādāna rājasa--_rājasa tāmasānām_tāmasa hānāya_hāna ca_ca āhāra--_āhāra yajña--_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas dānānām_dāna traividhyam_traividhya āha_ah na_na kevalam_kevala śraddhā_śraddhā eva_eva trividhā_trividha āhāraḥ_āhāra api_api sarvasya_sarva priyaḥ_priya trividhaḥ_trividha eva_eva bhavati_bhū sarvasya_sarva triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmaka--_ātmaka tvena_tva caturthyām_caturtha vidhāyāḥ_vidhā asaṃbhavāt_asaṃbhava yathā_yathā dṛṣṭa--_dṛś arthaḥ_artha āhāraḥ_āhāra trividhaḥ_trividha tathā_tathā yajña--_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas dānāni_dāna a_a dṛṣṭa--_dṛś arthāni_artha api_api trividhāni_trividha tatra_tatra yajñam_yajña vyākhyāsyāmaḥ_vyākhyā dravya--_dravya devatā--_devatā tyāgaḥ_tyāga iti_iti kalpa--_kalpa kāraiḥ_kāra devatā--_devatā uddeśena_uddeśa dravya--_dravya tyāgaḥ_tyāga yajñaḥ_yajña iti_iti niruktaḥ_nirvac sa_tad ca_ca yajatinā_yajati juhotinā_juhoti ca_ca codita--_coday tvena_tva yāgaḥ_yāga homaḥ_homa ca_ca iti_iti dvividhaḥ_dvividha uttiṣṭhat--_utthā homāḥ_homa vaṣaṭ_vaṣaṭ kāra--_kāra prayoga--_prayoga antāḥ_anta yājyā--_yājyā puraḥ_pur anuvākyāvantaḥ_anuvākyāvat yajatayaḥ_yajati upaviṣṭa--_upaviś homaḥ_homa svāhā--_svāhā kāra--_kāra prayoga--_prayoga antāḥ_anta kalpa--_kalpa kāraiḥ_kāra vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā yajña--_yajña śabdena_śabda uktaḥ_vac tapaḥ_tapas kāya--_kāya indriya--_indriya śoṣaṇam_śoṣaṇa kṛcchra--_kṛcchra cāndrāyaṇa--_cāndrāyaṇa ādi_ādi dānam_dāna para--_para sva--_sva tva--_tva āpatti--_āpatti phalakaḥ_phalaka sva--_sva sva--_sva tva--_tva tyāgaḥ_tyāga teṣām_tad āhāra--_āhāra yajña--_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas dānānām_dāna sāttvika--_sāttvika rājasa--_rājasa tāmasa--_tāmasa bhedam_bheda mayā_mad vyākhyāyamānam_vyākhyā imam_idam śṛṇu_śru

vartante_vṛt kurvanti_kṛ āsura--_āsura sarga--_sarga madhya--_madhya gatāḥ_gam eva_eva bhavanti_bhū iti_iti prakaraṇa--_prakaraṇa arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā api_api āhāra--_āhāra ādīnām_ādi vakṣyamāṇānām_vac traividhyāt_traividhya tadvatām_tadvat yathā_yathā yogam_yoga daivam_daiva āsuram_āsura ca_ca sargam_sarga svayam_svayam eva_eva vivicya_vivic jāni_jñā iti_iti āha_ah āhāraḥ_āhāra tu_tu iti_iti ādi_ādi trayodaśabhiḥ_trayodaśan

baladevaḥ_baladeva evam_evam sthite_sthā tad--_tad āhāra--_āhāra ādīnām_ādi api_api traividhyam_traividhya āha_ah āhāraḥ_āhāra tu_tu iti_iti śraddhāvat_śraddhāvat sarvasya_sarva priyaḥ_priya anna--_anna ādiḥ_ādi āhāraḥ_āhāra api_api trividhaḥ_trividha bhavati_bhū evam_evam yajña--_yajña ādīni_ādi ca_ca trividhāni_trividha teṣām_tad āhāra--_āhāra
BhG 17.8

lg.l: āyuḥ--_āyus sattva--_sattva bala--_bala ārogya--_ārogya sukha--_sukha prīti--_prīti vivardhanāḥ_vivardhana
rasyāḥ_rasya snigdhāḥ_snigdha sthirāḥ_sthira hṛdyāḥ_hṛdya āhārāḥ_āhāra sāttvika--_sāttvika priyāḥ_priya

div.p: āha_ah āyuḥ_āyus jīvitam_jīvita sattvam_sattva utsāhaḥ_utsāha balam_bala śaktiḥ_śakti ārogyam_ārogya roga--_roga rāhityam_rāhitya sukham_sukha citta--_citta prasādaḥ_prasāda prītiḥ_prīti abhiruciḥ_abhiruci āyuḥ--_āyus ādīnām_ādi vivardhanāḥ_vivardhana viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa vṛddhi--_vṛddhi karāḥ_kara te_tad ca_ca rasyāḥ_rasya rasavantaḥ_rasavat snigdhāḥ_snigdha sneha--_sneha yuktāḥ_yuj sthirāḥ_sthira dehe_deha sāra--_sāra aṃśena_aṃśa cira--_cira kālya--_kālya avasthāyinaḥ_avasthāyin hṛdyāḥ_hṛdya dṛṣṭi--_dṛṣṭi mātrāt_mātra eva_eva hṛdayaṅgamāḥ_hṛdayaṃgama evambhūtāḥ_evambhūta āhārāḥ_āhāra bhakṣya--_bhakṣya bhojya--_bhojya ādayaḥ_ādi sāttvika--_sāttvika priyāḥ_priya

tatra_tatra āhāra--_āhāra bhedaḥ_bheda āyuḥ_āyus iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri āyuḥ_āyus cirañjīvanam_ciraṃjīvana sattvam_sattva citta--_citta dhairyam_dhairya balavati_balavat duḥkhe_duḥkha api_api nirvikāra--_nirvikāra tva--_tva āpādakam_āpādaka balam_bala śarīra--_śarīra sāmarthyam_sāmarthya svocite_svocita kārye_kārya śrama--_śrama abhāva--_abhāva prayojakam_prayojaka ārogyam_ārogya vyādhi--_vyādhi abhāvaḥ_abhāva prītiḥ_prīti bhojana--_bhojana kāle_kāla anabhiruci--_anabhiruci rāhityam_rāhitya icchā--_icchā autkaṭyam_autkaṭya teṣām_tad vivardhanā_vivardhana viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa vṛddhi--_vṛddhi hetavaḥ_hetu rasyāḥ_rasya āsvādyāḥ_āsvāday madhura--_madhura rasa--_rasa pradhānāḥ_pradhāna snigdhāḥ_snigdha sahajena_sahaja āgantukena_āgantuka vā_vā snehena_sneha yuktāḥ_yuj sthirāḥ_sthira rasa--_rasa ādi--_ādi aṃśena_aṃśa śarīre_śarīra cira--_cira kāla--_kāla sthāyinaḥ_sthāyin hṛdyāḥ_hṛdya hṛdayaṅgamāḥ_hṛdayaṃgama durgandha--_durgandha aśuci--_aśuci tva--_tva ādi--_ādi dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa doṣa--_doṣa śūnyāḥ_śūnya āhārāḥ_āhāra carvya--_carv coṣya--_cūṣ lehya--_lehay peyāḥ_pā sāttvikānām_sāttvika priyāḥ_priya etaiḥ_etad liṅgaiḥ_liṅga sāttvika_sāttvika jñeyāḥ_jñā sāttvika--_sāttvika tvam_tva abhilaṣadbhiḥ_abhilaṣ ca_ca ete_etad ādeyāḥ_ādā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

vardhate_vṛdh sattvam_sattva utsāhaḥ_utsāha rasyāḥ_rasya kevala--_kevala guḍa--_guḍa ādīnām_ādi rasya--_rasya tve_tva rūkṣa--_rūkṣa tvam_tva āha_ah snigdhāḥ_snigdha dugdha--_dugdha phena--_phena ādīnām_ādi rasya--_rasya tva--_tva snigdha--_snigdha tve_tva api_api asthairyam_asthairya atas_atas āha_ah sthirāḥ_sthira iti_iti āha_ah tena_tena sa_sa gavya--_gavya śarkarā--_śarkarā śāli--_śāli godhūma--_godhūma anna--_anna ādayaḥ_ādi eva_eva rasya--_rasya tva--_tva ādi--_ādi catuṣṭaya--_catuṣṭaya guṇavat--_guṇavat tvāt_tva sāttvika--_sāttvika loka--_loka priyāḥ_priya jñeyāḥ_jñā teṣām_tad priya--_priya tve_tva sati_as eva_eva sāttvika--_sāttvika tvam_tva ca_ca jñeyam_jñā kim_kim ca_ca guṇa--_guṇa catuṣṭayavattve_catuṣṭayavattva api_api apāvitrye_apāvitrya sati_as sāttvika--_sāttvika priya--_priya tā--_tā darśanāt_darśana atra_atra pavitrāḥ_pavitra iti_iti api_api viśeṣaṇam_viśeṣaṇa deyam_dā tāmasa--_tāmasa priyeṣu_priya amedhya--_amedhya pada--_pada darśanāt_darśana

baladevaḥ_baladeva tatra_tatra sāttvika--_sāttvika āhāram_āhāra āha_ah āyuri_āyus iti_iti āyuḥ_āyus cira--_cira jīvitam_jīvita sattvam_sattva citta--_citta dhairyam_dhairya balam_bala deha--_deha sāmarthyam_sāmarthya sukham_sukha tṛptiḥ_tṛpti prītiḥ_prīti abhiruciḥ_abhiruci etāsām_etad vivardhanāḥ_vivardhana ramya--_ramya tva--_tva ādi--_ādi guṇavantaḥ_guṇavat sa_sa gavya--_gavya śarkarāḥ_śarkarā śāli--_śāli godhūma--_godhūma ādayaḥ_ādi sāttvikānām_sāttvika priyāḥ_priya taiḥ_tad upādeyāḥ_upādā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ramyāḥ_ramya iti_iti nīrasānām_nīrasa caṇaka--_caṇaka ādīnām_ādi snigdhāḥ_snigdha iti_iti rukṣāṇām_rukṣa guḍa--_guḍa ādīnām_ādi sthirāḥ_sthira iti_iti asthirāṇām_asthira dugdha--_dugdha phena--_phena ādīnām_ādi hṛdyā_hṛdya iti_iti ahṛdyānām_ahṛdya panasa--_panasa phala--_phala ādīnām_ādi ca_ca vyāvṛttiḥ_vyāvṛtti pavitrāḥ_pavitra jñeyam_jñā tāmasa--_tāmasa priyeṣu_priya amedhya--_amedhya pada--_pada darśanāt_darśana
BhG 17.9

lg.l: āhārāḥ_āhāra rājasasya_rājasa iṣṭāḥ_iṣ duḥkha--_duḥkha śoka--_śoka āmaya--_āmaya pradāḥ_prada

div.p: ati_ati śabdaḥ_śabda kaṭu--_kaṭu ādiṣu_ādi saptasu_saptan api_api sambadhyate_sambandh tena_tena ati_ati kaṭuḥ_kaṭu nimba--_nimba ādiḥ_ādi ati_ati amlaḥ_amla ati_ati lavaṇaḥ_lavaṇa ati_ati uṣṇaḥ_uṣṇa ca_ca prasiddhaḥ_prasidh atividāhī_atividāhin sa_sa ṛṣapādiḥ_ṛṣapādi ati_ati kaṭu--_kaṭu ādayaḥ_ādi āhārāḥ_āhāra rājasasya_rājasa iṣṭāḥ_iṣ priyāḥ_priya duḥkham_duḥkha tātkālikam_tātkālika hṛdaya--_hṛdaya santāpa--_saṃtāpa ādi_ādi śokaḥ_śoka paścāt_paścāt bhāvi--_bhāvin daurmanasyam_daurmanasya āmayaḥ_āmaya rogaḥ_roga etān_etad pradadāti_pradā prayacchanti_prayam iti_iti tathā_tathā

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana ati_ati śabdaḥ_śabda kaṭu--_kaṭu ādiṣu_ādi saptasu_saptan api_api yojanīyaḥ_yuj kaṭuḥ_kaṭu tiktaḥ_tikta tatra_tatra ati_ati kaṭuḥ_kaṭu nimba--_nimba ādiḥ_ādi ati_ati amla--_amla ati_ati lavaṇa--_lavaṇa ati_ati uṣṇāḥ_uṣṇa prasiddhaḥ_prasidh duḥkham_duḥkha tāt-kālikīm_tātkālika pīḍām_pīḍā śokam_śoka paścāt_paścāt bhāvi--_bhāvin daurmanasyam_daurmanasya āmayam_āmaya rogam_roga ca_ca dhātu--_dhātu vaiṣamya--_vaiṣamya dvārā_dvār pradadati_pradā iti_iti tathāvidhāḥ_tathāvidha āhārāḥ_āhāra rājasasya_rājasa iṣṭāḥ_iṣ etaiḥ_etad liṅgaiḥ_liṅga rājasāḥ_rājasa jñeyāḥ_jñā sāttvikaiḥ_sāttvika ca_ca ete_etad upekṣaṇīyāḥ_upekṣ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha ati_ati śabdaḥ_śabda kaṭu--_kaṭu ādiṣu_ādi saptasu_saptan api_api sambadhyate_sambandh ati_ati a_a mlavaṇa--_mlavaṇa uṣṇaḥ_uṣṇa prasiddhaḥ_prasidh eva_eva ete_etad duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi pradāḥ_prada tatra_tatra duḥkham_duḥkha tātkālikaḥ_tātkālika rasanā--_rasanā kaṇṭha--_kaṇṭha ādi--_ādi santāpaḥ_saṃtāpa śokaḥ_śoka paścāt_paścāt bhāvi--_bhāvin daurmanasyam_daurmanasya āmayaḥ_āmaya rogaḥ_roga

baladevaḥ_baladeva rājasa--_rājasa āhāram_āhāra āha_ah kaṭu_kaṭu iti_iti saptasu_saptan ati_ati śabdaḥ_śabda yojyaḥ_yuj ati_ati kaṭuḥ_kaṭu iti_iti tiktaḥ_tikta nimba--_nimba ādiḥ_ādi na_na ca_ca marica--_marica ādiḥ_ādi tasya_tad tīkṣṇa--_tīkṣṇa śabdena_śabda ukteḥ_ukti ati_ati amlaḥ_amla ati_ati lavaṇaḥ_lavaṇa ati_ati uṣṇaḥ_uṣṇa ca_ca khyātaḥ_khyā ati_ati tīkṣṇaḥ_tīkṣṇa marīci--_marīci ādiḥ_ādi ati_ati rukṣaḥ_rukṣa kaṅguka--_kaṅguka ādiḥ_ādi ati_ati dāhī_dāhin rājikā--_rājikā ādiḥ_ādi ete_etad rājasasya_rājasa iṣṭāḥ_iṣ sāttvikānām_sāttvika tu_tu heyāḥ_hā śokaḥ_śoka daurmanasyam_daurmanasya pāścātyam_pāścātya āmayaḥ_āmaya rudhira--_rudhira kopaḥ_kopa

lg.l: yāta--_yā yāmam_yāma gata--_gam rasam_rasa pūti_pūti paryuṣitam_paryuṣita ca_ca yat_yad
ucchiṣṭam_ucchiṣṭa api_api ca_ca amedhyam_amedhya bhojanam_bhojana tāmasa--_tāmasa priyam_priya

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara tathā_tathā yāta--_yā yāmam_yāma iti_iti yātaḥ_yā yāmaḥ_yāma praharaḥ_prahara yasya_yad pakvasya_pakva odana--_odana ādeḥ_ādi tat_tad yāta--_yāta yāmam_yāma śaitya--_śaitya avasthām_avasthā prāptam_prāp iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pūti_pūti durgandham_durgandha ucchiṣṭam_ucchiṣṭa anya--_anya bhukta--_bhuj avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ amedhyam_amedhya abhakṣyam_abhakṣya kalañjī--_kalañjī ādi_ādi evambhūtam_evambhūta bhojanam_bhojana tāmasasya_tāmasa priyam_priya

gata--_gam rasam_rasa virasa--_virasa tām_tā prāptam_prāp śuṣkam_śuṣka gata--_gam rasam_rasa uddhṛta--_uddhṛ sāram_sāra mathita--_math dugdha--_dugdha ādi_ādi iti_iti anye_anya pūti_pūti durgandham_durgandha paryūṣitam_paryūṣ pakvam_pakva sat_as rātri--_rātri antaritam_antari cena_ca tad--_tad kāla--_kāla unmāda--_unmāda karam_kara dhattūra--_dhattūra ādi_ādi samuccīyate_samucci yat_yad ati_ati prasiddham_prasidh duṣṭa--_duṣ tvena_tva ucchiṣṭam_ucchiṣ bhukta--_bhuj avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ amedhyam_amedhya a_a yajña--_yajña arham_arha aśuci_aśuci māṃsa--_māṃsa ādi_ādi api_api ca_ca iti_iti vaidyaka--_vaidyaka śāstra--_śāstra uktam_vac apathyam_apathya samuccīyate_samucci etādṛśam_etādṛśa yat_yad bhojanam_bhojana bhojyam_bhuj tat_tad tāmasasya_tāmasa priyam_priya sāttvikaiḥ_sāttvika ati_ati dūrāt_dūrāt upekṣaṇīyam_upekṣ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha etādṛśa--_etādṛśa bhojanasya_bhojana duḥkha--_duḥkha śoka--_śoka āmaya--_āmaya prada--_prada tvam_tva ati_ati prasiddham_prasidh iti_iti kaṇṭhataḥ_kaṇṭha na_na uktam_vac

atra_atra ca_ca krameṇa_krameṇa rasya--_rasya ādi--_ādi vargaḥ_varga sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika kaṭu--_kaṭu ādi--_ādi vargaḥ_varga rājasaḥ_rājasa tatra_tatra sāttvika--_sāttvika varga--_varga virodhi--_virodhin tvam_tva itara--_itara varga--_varga dvaye_dvaya draṣṭavyam_dṛś tathā_tathā hi_hi ati_ati kaṭu--_kaṭu tva--_tva ādikam_ādika rasya--_rasya tva--_tva virodhi--_virodhin tvāt_tva sthiratva--_sthiratva virodhinī_virodhin āmaya--_āmaya prada--_prada tvam_tva āyuḥ--_āyus sattva--_sattva bala--_bala ārogya--_ārogya virodhi_virodhin duḥkha--_duḥkha śoka--_śoka a_a prada--_prada tvam_tva sukha--_sukha prīti--_prīti virodhi_virodhin evam_evam sāttvika--_sāttvika varga--_varga virodhi--_virodhin tvam_tva rājasa--_rājasa varge_varga spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa tathā_tathā tāmasa--_tāmasa varge_varga api_api gata--_gam rasa--_rasa tva--_tva yātayāma--_yātayāma tva--_tva paryuṣita--_paryuṣita tvāni_tva yathā_yathā sambhavam_sambhava rasya--_rasya tva--_tva snighdha--_snighdha tva--_tva sthira--_sthira tva--_tva virodhīni_virodhin pūti--_pūti tva--_tva ucchiṣṭa--_ucchiṣ tva--_tva amedhya--_amedhya tvāni_tva hṛdya--_hṛdya tva--_tva virodhīni_virodhin āyuḥ--_āyus sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi virodhi--_virodhin tvam_tva tu_tu spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa eva_eva

prāptam_prāp gata--_gam rasam_rasa gata--_gam svābhāvika--_svābhāvika rasam_rasa niṣpīḍita--_niṣpīḍay rasam_rasa pakva--_pakva āmra--_āmra tva--_tva gaṣṭī--_gaṣṭī ādikam_ādika vā_vā pūti_pūti durgandham_durgandha ucchiṣṭam_ucchiṣṭa guru--_guru ādibhyaḥ_ādi anyeṣām_anya bhukta--_bhukta avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ amedhyam_amedhya abhakṣyam_abhakṣya kalajña--_kalajña ādi_ādi tatas_tatas ca_ca evam_evam paryālocya_paryālocay sva--_sva hita--_hita eṣibhiḥ_eṣin sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika āhāraḥ_āhāra sevyaḥ_sev iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva vaiṣṇavaiḥ_vaiṣṇava tu_tu saḥ_tad api_api bhagavat--_bhagavant aniveditaḥ_anivedita tyājyaḥ_tyaj eva_eva bhagavat--_bhagavant niveditam_niveday anna--_anna ādikam_ādika tu_tu nirguṇa--_nirguṇa bhakta--_bhakta loka--_loka priyam_priya iti_iti śrī--_śrī bhāgavatāt_bhāgavata jñeyam_jñā

baladevaḥ_baladeva tāmasa--_tāmasa āhāram_āhāra āha_ah yāta--_yā iti_iti yātaḥ_yā atikrāntaḥ_atikram yāmaḥ_yāma praharaḥ_prahara yasya_yad rāddhasya_rādh annādeḥ_annādi tat_tad yātayāmam_yātayāma gata--_gam rasam_rasa vairasyavat_vairasyavat pūtiḥ_pūti durgandham_durgandha paryuṣitam_paryuṣita pūrve_pūrva ahni_ahar rāddham_rādh ucchiṣṭam_ucchiṣṭa guroḥ_guru anyeṣām_anya bhukta--_bhukta avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ amedhyam_amedhya apavitram_apavitra kalañja--_kalañja ādi_ādi īdṛś--_īdṛś bhojanam_bhojana tāmasānām_tāmasa priyam_priya sāttvikānām_sāttvika tu_tu ati_ati dūratas_dūratas heyam_hā

lg.l: a_a phala--_phala ākāṅkṣibhiḥ_ākāṅkṣin yajñaḥ_yajña vidhi--_vidhi dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś yaḥ_yad ijyate_yaj
yaṣṭavyam_yaj eva_eva iti_iti manaḥ_manas samādhāya_samādhā sa_tad sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika

div.p: tatra_tatra sāttvikam_sāttvika yajñam_yajña āha_ah a_a phala--_phala ākāṅkṣibhiḥ_ākāṅkṣin iti_iti phala--_phala ākāṅkṣā--_ākāṅkṣā rahitaiḥ_rahita puruṣaiḥ_puruṣa vidhinā_vidhi ādiṣṭaḥ_ādiś āvaśyaka--_āvaśyaka tayā_tā vihitaḥ_vidhā yaḥ_yad yajñaḥ_yajña ijyate_yaj anuṣṭhīyate_anuṣṭhā sa_tad sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika yajñaḥ_yajña ijyate_yaj yaṣṭavyam_yaj eva_eva iti_iti yajña--_yajña anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna eva_eva kāryam_kṛ na_na anyat_anya phalam_phala sādhanīyam_sādh iti_iti evam_evam manaḥ_manas samādhāya_samādhā ekāgram_ekāgra kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana āha_ah agnihotra--_agnihotra darśa--_darśa pūrṇamāsa--_pūrṇamāsa cāturmāsya--_cāturmāsya paśu--_paśu bandha--_bandha jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādiḥ_ādi yajñaḥ_yajña dvividhaḥ_dvividha kāmyaḥ_kāmya nityaḥ_nitya ca_ca phala--_phala saṃyogena_saṃyoga coditaḥ_coday kāmyaḥ_kāmya sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upasaṃhāreṇa_upasaṃhāra eva_eva mukhya--_mukhya kalpena_kalpa anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā phala--_phala saṃyogam_saṃyoga vinā_vinā jīvana--_jīvana ādi--_ādi nimitta--_nimitta saṃyogena_saṃyoga coditaḥ_coday sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upasaṃhāra--_upasaṃhāra asaṃbhave_asaṃbhava pratinidhi--_pratinidhi ādi--_ādi upādānena_upādāna āmukhya--_āmukhya kalpena_kalpa api_api anuṣṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā nityaḥ_nitya tatra_tatra sarva--_sarva aṅga--_aṅga upasaṃhāra--_upasaṃhāra asambhave_asaṃbhava api_api pratinidhim_pratinidhi upādāya_upādā avaśyam_avaśyam yaṣṭavyam_yaj eva_eva pratyavāya--_pratyavāya parihārāya_parihāra aya--_aya āvaśyaka--_āvaśyaka jīvana--_jīvana ādi--_ādi nimittena_nimitta codita--_coday tvāt_tva iti_iti manaḥ_manas
samādhāya_samādhā niścitya_niści a_a phala--_phala ākāṅkṣibhiḥ_ākāṅkṣin antaḥ--_anta karaṇa--_karaṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi arthi--_arthin tayā_tā kāmya--_kāmay prayoga--_prayoga vimukhaiḥ_vimukha vidhi--_vidhi dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś yathā_yathā śāstram_śāstra niścitaḥ_niści yaḥ_yad yajñaḥ_yajña ijyate_yaj anuṣṭhīyate_anuṣṭhā sa_tad yathā_yathā śāstram_śāstra nitya--_nitya prayogaḥ_prayoga sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika jñeyaḥ_jñā
āha_ah āha_ah

baladevaḥ_baladeva yajña--_yajña traividhyam_traividhya āha_ah aphala--_aphala tribhiḥ_tri a_a phala--_phala ākāṅkṣibhiḥ_ākāṅkṣin phala--_phala icchā--_icchā śūnyaiḥ_śūnya yaḥ_yad yajñaḥ_yajña ijyate_yaj kriyate_kṛ vidhi--_vidhi dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś vidhi--_vidhi vākyāt_vākya jātaḥ_jan sa_tad sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika nanu_nanu phala--_phala icchām_icchā vinā_vinā tatra_tatra katham_katham pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti tatra_tatra āha_ah yaṣṭavyam_yaj eva_eva iti_iti mām_mad prati_prati vedena_veda ukta--_vac tvāt_tva tat_tad yajanam_yajana eva_eva kāryam_kṛ na_na tu_tu tena_tad phalam_phala sādhyam_sādhay iti_iti manaḥ_manas samādhāya_samādhā ekāgram_ekāgra kṛtvā_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: abhisaṃdhāya_abhisaṃdhā tu_tu phalam_phala dambha--_dambha artham_artha api_api ca_ca eva_eva yat_yad
ijyate_yaj bharata--_bharata śreṣṭha_śreṣṭha tam_tad yajñam_yajña viddhi_vid rājasam_rājasa

div.p: āha_ah ijyate_yaj kriyate_kṛ viddhi_vid

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana phalam_phala kāmyam_kāmya svarga--_svarga ādi_ādi abhisandhāya_abhisaṃdhā uddiśya_uddiś na_na tu_tu antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhiḥ_śuddhi tuḥ_tu nitya--_nitya prayoga--_prayoga vailakṣaṇya--_vailakṣaṇya sūcana--_sūcana arthaḥ_artha dambhaḥ_dambha loke_loka dhārmika--_dhārmika tva--_tva khyāpanam_khyāpana tad--_tad artham_artha api_api ca_ca eva_eva iti_iti vikalpa--_vikalpa samuccayābhyām_samuccaya traividhya--_traividhya sūcana--_sūcana artham_artha pāralaukikam_pāralaukika phalam_phala abhisandhāya_abhisaṃdhā eva_eva a_a dambha--_dambha artha--_artha tve_tva api_api pāralaukika--_pāralaukika phala--_phala anabhisandhāne_anabhisaṃdhāna api_api dambha--_dambha artham_artha eva_eva iti_iti vikalpena_vikalpa dvau_dvi pakṣau_pakṣa pāralaukika--_pāralaukika phala--_phala artham_artha api_api aihalaukika--_aihalaukika dambha--_dambha artham_artha api_api iti_iti samuccayena_samuccaya ekaḥ_eka pakṣaḥ_pakṣa evam_evam dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa phala--_phala abhisandhinā_abhisaṃdhi antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhim_śuddhi an_an uddiśya_uddiś yat_yad ijyate_yaj yathā_yathā śāstram_śāstra yaḥ_yad yajñaḥ_yajña anuṣṭhīyate_anuṣṭhā tam_tad yajñam_yajña rājasam_rājasa viddhi_vid hānāya_hāna he_he bharata--_bharata śreṣṭha_śreṣṭha iti_iti yogyatva--_yogyatva sūcanam_sūcana
div.l: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva phalam_phala svarga--_svarga ādikam_ādika abhisandhāya_abhisaṃdhā yat_yad ijyate_yaj dambha--_dambha arhtam_arh vā_vā sva--_sva mahima--_mahiman khyāpanāya_khyāpana tam_tad yajñam_yajña rājasam_rājasa viddhi_vid

lg.l: vidhi--_vidhi hīnam_hā a_a sṛṣṭa--_sṛj annam_anna mantra--_mantra hīnam_hā adakṣiṇam_adakṣiṇa
śraddhā--_śraddhā virahitam_virahita yajñam_yajña tāmasam_tāmasa paricakṣate_paricakṣ

div.p: āha_ah vidhi--_vidhi hīnam_hā śāstra--_śāstra ukta--_vac vidhi--_vidhi śūnyam_śūnya a_a sṛṣṭa--_sṛj annam_anna brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādibhyaḥ_ādi na_na sṛṣṭam_sṛj na_na niṣpāditam_niṣpāday annam_anna yasmin_yad tam_tad mantraiḥ_mantra hīnam_hā yathā_yathā ukta--_vac dakṣiṇā--_dakṣiṇā rahitam_rahita śraddhā--_śraddhā śūnyam_śūnya ca_ca yajñam_yajña tāmasam_tāmasa paricakṣate_paricakṣ kathayanti_kathay śiṣṭāḥ_śās

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana yathā_yathā śāstra--_śāstra bodhita--_bodhay viparītam_viparīta anna--_anna dāna--_dāna hīnam_hā svarataḥ_svara varṇataḥ_varṇa ca_ca mantra--_mantra hīnam_hā yathā_yathā ukta--_vac dakṣiṇā--_dakṣiṇā hīnam_hā ṛtvij--_ṛtvij dveṣa--_dveṣa ādinā_ādi śraddhā--_śraddhā rahitam_rahita tāmasam_tāmasa yajñam_yajña paricakṣate_paricakṣ vidhi--_vidhi hīna--_hā tva--_tva ādi--_ādi ekaika--_ekaika viśeṣaṇaḥ_viśeṣaṇa pañcavidhaḥ_pañcavidha sarva--_sarva viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa samuccayena_samuccaya ca_ca ekavidhaḥ_ekavidha iti_iti ṣaṣ_ṣaṣ dvi--_dvi tri--_tri catur--_catur viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa samuccayena_samuccaya ca_ca bahavaḥ_bahu bhedāḥ_bheda tāmasa--_tāmasa yajñasya_yajña jñeyāḥ_jñā rājase_rājasa yajñe_yajña antaḥ_anta karaṇa--_karaṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi abhāve_abhāva api_api phala--_phala utpādakam_utpādaka apūrvam_apūrva asti_as yathā_yathā śāstram_śāstra anuṣṭhānāt_anuṣṭhāna tāmase_tāmasa tu_tu ayathā_ayathā śāstra--_śāstra anuṣṭhānāt_anuṣṭhāna na_na kim_ka api_api apūrvam_apūrva asti_as iti_iti atiśayaḥ_atiśaya
div.l: baladevaḥ_baladeva vidhi--_vidhi iti_iti asṛṣṭa--_asṛṣṭa annam_anna anna--_anna dāna--_dāna rahitam_rahita mantra--_mantra hīnam_hā svarataḥ_svara varṇataḥ_varṇa ca_ca hīnena_hā mantraṇa--_mantraṇa upetam_upe śraddhā--_śraddhā virahitam_virahita ṛtvij--_ṛtvij vidveṣāt_vidveṣa

lg.l: deva--_deva dvija--_dvija guru--_guru prājña--_prājña pūjanam_pūjana śaucam_śauca ārjavam_ārjava
brahmacaryam_brahmacarya ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā ca_ca śārīram_śārīra tapaḥ_tapas ucyate_vac

div.p: āha_ah tatra_tatra śārīram_śārīra āha_ah deva_deva iti_iti prājñāḥ_prājña guru--_guru vyakti--_vyakti riktāḥ_ric anye_anya api_api tattva--_tattva vidaḥ_vid deva--_deva brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādi--_ādi pūjanam_pūjana śauca--_śauca ādikam_ādika ca_ca śārīram_śārīra śarīra--_śarīra nirvartyam_nirvṛt tapaḥ_tapas ucyate_vac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana krama--_krama prāptasya_prāp tapasaḥ_tapas sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi bhedam_bheda kathayitum_kathay śārīra--_śārīra vācika--_vācika mānasa--_mānasa bhedena_bheda tasya_tad travidhyam_travidhya āha_ah tribhiḥ_tri deva--_deva iti_iti devāḥ_deva brahma--_brahman viṣṇu--_viṣṇu śiva--_śiva sūrya--_sūrya agni--_agni durga--_durga ādayaḥ_ādi dvijāḥ_dvija dvijottamāḥ_dvijottama brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa guravaḥ_guru pitṛ--_pitṛ mātṛ--_mātṛ ācārya--_ācārya ādayaḥ_ādi prājñāḥ_prājña paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita vidita--_vid veda--_veda tad--_tad upakaraṇa--_upakaraṇa arthāḥ_artha teṣām_tad pūjanam_pūjana praṇāma--_praṇāma śuśrūṣā--_śuśrūṣā ādi_ādi yathā_yathā śāstram_śāstra śaucam_śauca mṛd--_mṛd jalābhyām_jala śarīra--_śarīra śodhanam_śodhana ārjavam_ārjava akauṭilyam_akauṭilya bhāva--_bhāva saṃśuddhi--_saṃśuddhi śabdena_śabda mānase_mānasa tapasi_tapas vakṣyati_vac śārīram_śārīra tu_tu ārjavam_ārjava vihita--_vidhā pratiṣiddhayoḥ_pratiṣidh eka--_eka rūpa--_rūpa pravṛtti--_pravṛtti nivṛtti--_nivṛtti śāli--_śālin tvam_tva ahiṃsā--_ahiṃsā śāstrīya--_śāstrīya prāṇi--_prāṇin pīḍana--_pīḍana abhāvaḥ_abhāva ca-kārāt_ca-kāra asteya--_asteya aparigrahau_aparigraha api_api śārīram_śārīra śarīra--_śarīra pradhānaiḥ_pradhāna kartṛ--_kartṛ ādibhiḥ_ādi sādhyam_sādhay na_na tu_tu kevalena_kevala śarīreṇa_śarīra pañca_pañcan ete_etad tasya_tad hetavaḥ_hetu iti_iti hi_hi vakṣyati_vac ittham_ittham śārīram_śārīra tapaḥ_tapas ucyate_vac
div.l: āha_ah _
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva krama--_krama prāptasya_prāp tapasaḥ_tapas sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi bhedam_bheda vaktum_vac tasya_tad ādau_ādi śārīra--_śārīra ādi--_ādi bhāvena_bhāva traividhyam_traividhya āha_ah deva--_deva iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri devāḥ_deva vasu--_vasu rudra--_rudra ādayaḥ_ādi dvijāḥ_dvija brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa śreṣṭhāḥ_śreṣṭha guravaḥ_guru mātṛ--_mātṛ pitṛ--_pitṛ deśikāḥ_deśika prājñāḥ_prājña vidita--_vid veda--_veda vedāṅgāḥ_vedāṅga pare_para atra_atra teṣām_tad pūjanam_pūjana śaucam_śauca dvividham_dvividha uktam_vac ārjavam_ārjava vihita--_vidhā niṣiddhayoḥ_niṣidh aikya--_aikya rūpyeṇa_rūpya pravṛtti--_pravṛtti nivṛtta--_nivṛt tvam_tva brahmacaryam_brahmacarya vihita--_vidhā maithunam_maithuna ca_ca etat_etad śārīram_śārīra śarīra--_śarīra nirvartyam_nirvṛt tapaḥ_tapas

lg.l: an_an udvega--_udvega karam_kara vākyam_vākya satyam_satya priya--_priya hitam_hita ca_ca yat_yad
svādhyāya--_svādhyāya abhyasanam_abhyasana ca_ca eva_eva vāc--_vāc mayam_maya tapaḥ_tapas ucyate_vac

div.p: āha_ah udvegam_udvega bhayam_bhaya na_na karoti_kṛ iti_iti an_an udvega--_udvega karam_kara vākyam_vākya satyam_satya śrotuḥ_śrotṛ priyam_priya hitam_hita pariṇāme_pariṇāma sukha--_sukha karam_kara svādhyāya--_svādhyāya abhyasanam_abhyasana veda--_veda abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa ca_ca vāc--_vāc mayam_maya vācā_vāc nirvartyam_nirvṛt tapaḥ_tapas

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana anudvega--_anudvega karam_kara na_na kasyacid_kaścit duḥkha--_duḥkha karam_kara satyam_satya pramāṇa--_pramāṇa mūlam_mūla abādhita--_abādhita artham_artha priyam_priya śrotuḥ_śrotṛ tad--_tad kāla--_kāla śruti--_śruti sukham_sukha hitam_hita pariṇāme_pariṇāma sukha--_sukha karam_kara ca-kāraḥ_ca-kāra viśeṣaṇānām_viśeṣaṇa samucchaya--_samucchaya arthaḥ_artha anudvega--_anudvega kara--_kara tva--_tva ādi--_ādi viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa catuṣṭayena_catuṣṭaya viśiṣṭam_viśiṣ na_na tu_tu ekena_eka api_api viśeṣaṇena_viśeṣaṇa nyūnam_nyūna yat_yad vākyam_vākya yathā_yathā śāntaḥ_śam bhava_bhū vatsa_vatsa svādhyāyam_svādhyāya yogam_yoga ca_ca anutiṣṭha_anuṣṭhā tathā_tathā te_tvad śreyaḥ_śreyas bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti ādi_ādi tat_tad vāc--_vāc mayam_maya vācikam_vācika tapaḥ_tapas śārīravat_śārīravat svādhyāya--_svādhyāya abhyasanam_abhyasana ca_ca yathāvidhi_yathāvidhi veda--_veda abhyāsaḥ_abhyāsa ca_ca vāc--_vāc mayam_maya tapaḥ_tapas ucyate_vac eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra
prāk_prāk viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa samuccaya--_samuccaya avadhāraṇe_avadhāraṇa vyākhyātavyaḥ_vyākhyā

baladevaḥ_baladeva anudvega--_anudvega karam_kara udvegam_udvega bhayam_bhaya kasya_ka api_api yat_yat na_na karoti_kṛ satyam_satya pramāṇikam_pramāṇika śrotuḥ_śrotṛ priyam_priya pariṇāme_pariṇāma hitam_hita ca_ca etat_etad viśeṣaṇa--_viśeṣaṇa catuṣṭayavat--_catuṣṭayavat vākyam_vākya tathā_tathā svādhyāyasya_svādhyāya veda--_veda abhyasanam_abhyasana ca_ca vāc--_vāc mayam_maya vācā_vāc nirvartyam_nirvṛt tapaḥ_tapas

lg.l: manaḥ--_manas prasādaḥ_prasāda saumya--_saumya tvam_tva maunam_mauna ātma--_ātman vinigrahaḥ_vinigraha
bhāva--_bhāva saṃśuddhiḥ_saṃśuddhi iti_iti etat_etad tapaḥ_tapas mānasam_mānasa ucyate_vac

div.p: āha_ah manasaḥ_manas prasādaḥ_prasāda svaccha--_svaccha tā_tā sauma--_sauma tvam_tva akrūra--_akrūra tā_tā maunam_mauna muneḥ_muni bhāvaḥ_bhāva mananam_manana iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ātmanaḥ_ātman manasaḥ_manas vinigrahaḥ_vinigraha viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya pratyāhāraḥ_pratyāhāra bhāva--_bhāva saṃśuddhiḥ_saṃśuddhi vyavahāre_vyavahāra māyā--_māyā rāhityam_rāhitya iti_iti etat_etad mānasam_mānasa tapaḥ_tapas

saumya--_saumya tvam_tva saumasyam_saumasya sarva--_sarva loka--_loka hita--_hita eṣi--_eṣin tvam_tva pratiṣiddha--_pratiṣidh a_a cintanam_cintana ca_ca maunam_mauna muni--_muni bhāvaḥ_bhāva ekāgra--_ekāgra tayā_tā ātma--_ātman cintanam_cintana nididhyāsana--_nididhyāsana ākhyam_ākhyā vāc--_vāc saṃyama--_saṃyama hetuḥ_hetu manaḥ--_manas saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama maunam_mauna iti_iti bhāṣyam_bhāṣya ātma--_ātman vinigrahaḥ_vinigraha ātmanaḥ_ātman manasaḥ_manas viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa sarva--_sarva vṛtti--_vṛtti nigrahaḥ_nigraha nirodha--_nirodha samādhiḥ_samādhi asamprajñātaḥ_asamprajñāta punar_punar aśuddhi--_aśuddhi utpāda--_utpāda rāhityena_rāhitya samyaktvena_samyaktva viśiṣṭā_viśiṣ sā_tad bhāva--_bhāva śuddhiḥ_śuddhi paraiḥ_para saha_saha vyavahāra--_vyavahāra kāle_kāla māyā--_māyā rāhityam_rāhitya sā_tad iti_iti bhāṣyam_bhāṣya iti_iti etat_etad evaṃprakāram_evaṃprakāra tapaḥ_tapas mānasam_mānasa ucyate_vac
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha Nothing_nothing

baladevaḥ_baladeva manasaḥ_manas prasādaḥ_prasāda vaimalyam_vaimalya viṣaya--_viṣaya smṛti--_smṛti avaiyagryam_avaiyagrya sauma--_sauma tvam_tva akrauryam_akraurya sarva--_sarva sukha--_sukha icchru--_icchru tvam_tva maunam_mauna ātma--_ātman mananam_manana ātmanaḥ_ātman manasaḥ_manas vinigrahaḥ_vinigraha viṣayebhyaḥ_viṣaya pratyāhāraḥ_pratyāhāra bhāva--_bhāva saṃśuddhiḥ_saṃśuddhi vyavahāre_vyavahāra niṣkapaṭa--_niṣkapaṭa tā_tā iti_iti etat_etad mānasā_mānasa nirvartyam_nirvṛt tapaḥ_tapas

lg.l: śraddhayā_śraddhā parayā_para taptam_tap tapaḥ_tapas tat_tad trividham_trividha naraiḥ_nara
a_a phala--_phala ākāṅkṣibhiḥ_ākāṅkṣin yuktaiḥ_yuj sāttvikam_sāttvika paricakṣate_paricakṣ

div.p: tasya_tad trividhasya_trividha api_api tapasaḥ_tapas sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi bhedena_bheda traividhyam_traividhya āha_ah śraddhayā_śraddhā ityādi--_ityādi tribhiḥ_tri tat_tad trividham_trividha api_api tapaḥ_tapas parayā_para śreṣṭhayā_śreṣṭha śraddhayā_śraddhā phala--_phala ākāṅkṣā--_ākāṅkṣā śūnyaiḥ_śūnya yuktaiḥ_yuj ekāgra--_ekāgra cittaiḥ_citta naraiḥ_nara taptam_tap sāttvikam_sāttvika kathayanti_kathay

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana śārīra--_śārīra vācika--_vācika mānasa--_mānasa bhedena_bheda trividhasya_trividha uktasya_vac tapasaḥ_tapas sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi bhedena_bheda traividhyam_traividhya idānīm_idānīm darśayati_darśay śraddhayā_śraddhā iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri tat_tad pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac trividham_trividha śārīram_śārīra vācikam_vācika mānasam_mānasa ca_ca tapaḥ_tapas śraddhayā_śraddhā āstikya--_āstikya buddhyā_buddhi parayā_para prakṛṣṭayā_prakṛṣṭa a_a prāmāṇya--_prāmāṇya śaṅkā--_śaṅkā kalaṅka--_kalaṅka śūnyayā_śūnya phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi śūnyaiḥ_śūnya yuktaiḥ_yuj samāhitaiḥ_samāhita taptam_tap anuṣṭhitam_anuṣṭhā sāttvikam_sāttvika paricakṣate_paricakṣ śiṣṭāḥ_śās

baladevaḥ_baladeva uktasya_vac tapasaḥ_tapas sāttvika--_sāttvika ādi--_ādi tayā_tā traividhyam_traividhya āha_ah śraddhayā_śraddhā iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri tat_tad uktam_vac trividham_trividha tapaḥ_tapas phala--_phala ākāṅkṣā--_ākāṅkṣā śūnyaiḥ_śūnya yuktaiḥ_yuj ekāgra--_ekāgra cittaiḥ_citta naraiḥ_nara parayā_para śraddhayā_śraddhā taptam_tap

lg.l: satkāra--_satkāra māna--_māna pūjā--_pūjā artham_artha tapaḥ_tapas dambhena_dambha ca_ca eva_eva yat_yad
kriyate_kṛ tat_tad iha_iha proktam_pravac rājasam_rājasa calam_cala adhruvam_adhruva

div.p: āha_ah sat--_sat kāraḥ_kāra sādhuḥ_sādhu ayam_idam iti_iti tāpasaḥ_tāpasa ayam_idam iti_iti ādi_ādi vāc--_vāc pūjā_pūjā mānaḥ_māna daihikī_daihika pūjā_pūjā pūjā--_pūjā artha--_artha lābha--_lābha ādiḥ_ādi etad--_etad artham_artha dambhena_dambha ca_ca yat_yad tapaḥ_tapas kriyate_kṛ ataeva_ataeva calam_cala aniyatam_aniyata adhruvam_adhruva ca_ca kṣaṇikam_kṣaṇika yat_yad evambhūtam_evambhūta tapaḥ_tapas tat_tad iha_iha rājasam_rājasa proktam_pravac

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana satkāraḥ_satkāra sādhuḥ_sādhu ayam_idam tapasvī_tapasvin brāhmaṇaḥ_brāhmaṇa iti_iti evam_evam avivekibhiḥ_avivekin kriyamāṇā_kṛ stutiḥ_stuti mānaḥ_māna pratyutthāna--_pratyutthāna abhivādana--_abhivādana ādiḥ_ādi pūjā_pūjā pāda--_pāda prakṣālana--_prakṣālana arcana--_arcana dhana--_dhana dāna--_dāna ādiḥ_ādi tad--_tad artham_artha dambhena_dambha eva_eva ca_ca kevalam_kevalam dharma--_dharma dhvaji--_dhvajin tvena_tva eva_eva ca_ca na_na tu_tu āstikya--_āstikya buddhyā_buddhi yat_yad tapaḥ_tapas kriyate_kṛ tat_tad rājasam_rājasa proktam_pravac śiṣṭaiḥ_śās iha_iha asmin_idam eva_eva loke_loka phala--_phala dam_da na_na pāralaukikam_pāralaukika calam_cala ati_ati alpa--_alpa kāla--_kāla sthāyi--_sthāyin phalam_phala

mānaḥ_māna pratutthāna--_pratutthāna abhivādana--_abhivādana ādibhiḥ_ādi anyaiḥ_anya kartavyā_kṛ daihikī_daihika pūjā_pūjā pūjāḥ_pūjā anyaiḥ_anya dīyamānaiḥ_dā dhana--_dhana ādibhiḥ_ādi bhāvinī_bhāvin vā_vā mānasī_mānasa pūjā_pūjā tad--_tad artham_artha dambhena_dambha ca_ca yat_yad kriyate_kṛ tat_tad rājasam_rājasa tapaḥ_tapas calam_cala kiñcid_kaścit kālikam_kālika adhruvam_adhruva aniyata--_aniyata satkāra--_satkāra ādi--_ādi phalakam_phalaka

baladevaḥ_baladeva sat--_sat kāraḥ_kāra sādhuḥ_sādhu ayam_idam tapasvī_tapasvin iti_iti stutiḥ_stuti pūjā_pūjā caraṇa--_caraṇa prakṣālana--_prakṣālana dhan--_dhan dānadiḥ_dānadi tad--_tad artham_artha yat_yad tapaḥ_tapas dambhena_dambha ca_ca kriyate_kṛ tat_tad rājasam_rājasa proktam_pravac calam_cala kiñcid_kaścit kālikam_kālika adhruvam_adhruva aniyata--_aniyata satkāra--_satkāra ādi--_ādi phalakam_phalaka

lg.l: mūḍha--_muh grāheṇa_grāha ātmanaḥ_ātman yat_yad pīḍayā_pīḍā kriyate_kṛ tapaḥ_tapas
parasya_para utsādana--_utsādana artham_artha vā_vā tat_tad tāmasam_tāmasa udāhṛtam_udāhṛ

div.p: āha_ah kriyate_kṛ udāhṛtam_udāhṛ
div.l: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana mūḍha--_muh grāheṇa_grāha aviveka--_aviveka atiśaya--_atiśaya kṛtena_kṛ durāgraheṇa_durāgraha ātmanaḥ_ātman deha--_deha indriya--_indriya saṃghātasya_saṃghāta pīḍayā_pīḍā yat_yad tapaḥ_tapas kriyate_kṛ parasya_para utsādana--_utsādana artham_artha vā_vā anyasya_anya vināśa--_vināśa artham_artha abhicāra--_abhicāra rūpam_rūpa vā_vā tat_tad
div.p: viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha mūḍha--_muh grāheṇa_grāha mauḍhya--_mauḍhya grahaṇena_grahaṇa parasya_para utsādana--_utsādana artham_artha vināśa--_vināśa artham_artha
div.l: baladevaḥ_baladeva mūḍha--_muh grāheṇa_grāha aviveka--_aviveka jena_ja durāgraheṇa_durāgraha ātmanā_ātman deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādeḥ_ādi pīḍayā_pīḍā ca_ca yat_yad tapaḥ_tapas parasya_para utsādana--_utsādana artham_artha vināśāya_vināśa vā_vā kriyate_kṛ tat_tad tāmasam_tāmasa

lg.l: dātavyam_dā iti_iti yat_yad dānam_dāna dīyate_dā anupakāriṇe_anupakārin
deśe_deśa kāle_kāla ca_ca pātre_pātra ca_ca tat_tad dānam_dāna sāttvikam_sāttvika smṛtam_smṛ

div.p: āha_ah dātavyam_dā eva_eva iti_iti evam_evam niścayena_niścaya yat_yad dānam_dāna dīyate_dā anupakāriṇe_anupakārin pratyupakāra--_pratyupakāra samarthāya_samartha deśe_deśa kurukṣetra--_kurukṣetra ādau_ādi kāle_kāla grahaṇa--_grahaṇa ādau_ādi pātre_pātra ca_ca iti_iti deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla sāhacaryāt_sāhacarya saptamī_saptamī prayuktā_prayuj pātre_pātra pātra--_pātra bhūtāya_bhū tapaḥ--_tapas śruta--_śruta ādi--_ādi sampannāya_sampad brāhmaṇāya_brāhmaṇa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā pātre_pātra iti_iti tṛc--_tṛc antam_anta rakṣakāya_rakṣaka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha caturthī_caturtha eva_eva eṣā_etad sa_tad hi_hi sarvasmāt_sarva āpad--_āpad gaṇāt_gaṇa dātāram_dātṛ pāti_pā iti_iti pātā_pātṛ tasmai_tad yat_yad evambhūtam_evambhūta dānam_dāna tat_tad sāttvikam_sāttvika

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana darśayati_darśay dātavyam_dā eva_eva śāstra--_śāstra condanā--_condanā vaśāt_vaśa iti_iti evam_evam niścayena_niścaya na_na tu_tu phala--_phala abhisandhinā_abhisaṃdhi yat_yad dānam_dāna tulā--_tulā puruṣa--_puruṣa ādi_ādi dīyate_dā anupakāriṇe_anupakārin pratyupakāra--_pratyupakāra ajanakāya_ajanaka deśe_deśa puṇye_puṇya kurukṣetra--_kurukṣetra ādau_ādi kāle_kāla ca_ca puṇye_puṇya sūrya--_sūrya uparāga--_uparāga ādau_ādi pātre_pātra ca_ca iti_iti caturthī--_caturthī arthe_artha saptamī_saptamī kīdṛśāya_kīdṛśa anupakāriṇe_anupakārin dīyate_dā pātrāya_pātra ca_ca vidyā--_vidyā tapaḥ--_tapas yuktāya_yuj pātra--_pātra rakṣakāya_rakṣaka vidyā--_vidyā tapobhyām_tapas ātmanaḥ_ātman dātuḥ_dātṛ ca_ca pālana--_pālana kṣamaḥ_kṣama eva_eva pratigṛhṇīyāt_pratigrah iti_iti śāstrāt_śāstra tat_tad evaṃ_evam bhūtam_bhū dānam_dāna sāttvikam_sāttvika smṛtam_smṛ

baladevaḥ_baladeva dānasya_dāna traividhyam_traividhya āha_ah dātavyam_dā niścayena_niścaya yat_yad dānam_dāna anupakāriṇe_anupakārin pātre_pātra vidyā--_vidyā tapobhyām_tapas dātuḥ_dātṛ rakṣakāya_rakṣaka brāhmaṇāya_brāhmaṇa yat_yad dīyate_dā tat_tad dānam_dāna sāttvikam_sāttvika anupakāriṇe_anupakārin pratyupakāram_pratyupakāra an_an uddiśya_uddiś iti_iti arthaḥ_artha deśe_deśa tīrthe_tīrtha kāle_kāla ca_ca saṅkrānti--_saṃkrānti ādau_ādi

lg.l: yat_yad tu_tu pratyupakāra--_pratyupakāra artham_artha phalam_phala uddiśya_uddiś vā_vā punar_punar
dīyate_dā ca_ca parikliṣṭam_parikliś tat_tad dānam_dāna rājasam_rājasa smṛtam_smṛ

div.p: āha_ah kāla--_kāla antare_antara ayam_idam mām_mad pratyupakariṣyati_pratyupakṛ iti_iti evam_evam artham_artha phalam_phala vā_vā svarga--_svarga ādikam_ādika uddiśya_uddiś yat_yad punar_punar dānam_dāna dīyate_dā parikliṣṭam_parikliś citta--_citta kleśa--_kleśa yuktam_yuj yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evambhūtam_evambhūta tat_tad dānam_dāna rājasam_rājasa udāhṛtam_udāhṛ
div.l: madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana pratyupakāra--_pratyupakāra artham_artha kāla--_kāla antare_antara mām_mad ayam_idam upakariṣyati_upakṛ iti_iti evam_evam dṛṣṭa--_dṛś artham_artha phalam_phala vā_vā svarga--_svarga ādikam_ādika uddiśya_uddiś yat_yad punar_punar dānam_dāna sāttvika--_sāttvika vilakṣaṇam_vilakṣaṇa dīyate_dā parikliṣṭam_parikliś ca_ca katham_katham etāvat_etāvat yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evam_evam ca_ca yat_yad dīyate_dā tat_tad dānam_dāna rājasam_rājasa udāhṛtam_udāhṛ
div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva yat_yad tu_tu pratupa--_pratupa kāra--_kāra artham_artha dṛṣṭa--_dṛś phala--_phala artham_artha phalam_phala vā_vā svarga--_svarga ādikam_ādika adṛṣṭam_adṛṣṭa uddiśya_uddiś anusandhāya_anusaṃdhā dīyate_dā tat_tad dānam_dāna rājasam_rājasa parikliṣṭam_parikliś katham_katham etāvat_etāvat vyayitavyam_vye iti_iti paścāt_paścāt tāpa--_tāpa yuktam_yuj yathā_yathā syāt_as tathā_tathā guru--_guru vākya--_vākya anurodhāt_anurodha vā_vā yat_yad dīyate_dā tat_tad rājasam_rājasa

lg.l: a_a deśa--_deśa kāle_kāla yat_yad dānam_dāna apātrebhyaḥ_apātra ca_ca dīyate_dā
asatkṛtam_asatkṛ avajñātam_avajñā tat_tad tāmasam_tāmasa udāhṛtam_udāhṛ

div.p: āha_ah adeśe_adeśa aśuci--_aśuci sthāne_sthāna akāle_akāla aśauca--_aśauca ādi--_ādi samaye_samaya apātrebhyaḥ_apātra viṭa--_viṭa naṭa--_naṭa nartaka--_nartaka ādibhyaḥ_ādi yat_yad dānam_dāna dīyate_dā deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla pātra--_pātra sampattau_sampatti api_api asat--_asat kṛtam_kṛ pāda--_pāda prakṣālana--_prakṣālana ādi--_ādi satkāra--_satkāra śūnyam_śūnya avajñātam_avajñā pātra--_pātra tiraskāra--_tiraskāra yuktam_yuj evambhūtam_evambhūta dānam_dāna tāmasam_tāmasa udāhṛtam_udāhṛ

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana adeśe_adeśa svatas_svatas durjana--_durjana saṃsargāt_saṃsarga vā_vā pāpa--_pāpa hetau_hetu aśuci--_aśuci sthāne_sthāna akāle_akāla puṇya--_puṇya hetutvena_hetutva aprasiddhe_aprasiddha yasmin_yad kasmiṃścid_kaścit aśauca--_aśauca kāle_kāla apātrebhyaḥ_apātra ca_ca vidyā--_vidyā tapaḥ--_tapas rahitebhyaḥ_rahita naṭa--_naṭa viṭa--_viṭa ādibhyaḥ_ādi yat_yad dānam_dāna dīyate_dā deśa--_deśa kāla--_kāla pātra--_pātra sampattau_sampatti api_api asat--_asat kṛtam_kṛ priya--_priya bhāṣaṇa--_bhāṣaṇa pāda--_pāda prakṣālana--_prakṣālana pūjā--_pūjā ādi--_ādi satkāra--_satkāra śūnyam_śūnya avajñānam_avajñāna udāhṛtam_udāhṛ

baladevaḥ_baladeva adeśe_adeśa aśuci--_aśuci sthāne_sthāna akāle_akāla aśuci--_aśuci samaye_samaya yat_yad apātrebhyaḥ_apātra naṭa--_naṭa ādibhyaḥ_ādi dīyate_dā deśa--_deśa ādi--_ādi sampattau_sampatti api_api yat_yad asatkṛtam_asatkṛ caraṇa--_caraṇa prakṣālana--_prakṣālana ādi--_ādi satkāra--_satkāra śūnyam_śūnya avajñātam_avajñā tūṅkāra--_tūṅkāra ādi--_ādi anādara--_anādara bhāṣaṇa--_bhāṣaṇa upetam_upe ca_ca yat_yad dānam_dāna tat_tad

lg.l: om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as iti_iti nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman trividhaḥ_trividha smṛtaḥ_smṛ
brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa tena_tad vedāḥ_veda ca_ca yajñāḥ_yajña ca_ca vihitāḥ_vidhā purā_purā
tasmāt_tasmāt om_oṃ iti_iti udāhṛtya_udāhṛ yajña--_yajña dāna--_dāna tapaḥ--_tapas kriyāḥ_kriyā
pravartante_pravṛt vidhāna--_vidhāna uktāḥ_vac satatam_satatam brahma--_brahman vādinām_vādin

div.p: āha_ah om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as iti_iti trividhaḥ_trividha brahmaṇaḥ_brahman paramātmanaḥ_paramātman nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa nāma--_nāman vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa smṛtaḥ_smṛ śiṣṭaiḥ_śās tatra_tatra tāvat_tāvat om_oṃ iti_iti brahma_brahman iti_iti ādi_ādi śruti--_śruti prasiddheḥ_prasiddhi om_oṃ iti_iti brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma_nāman jagat--_jagant kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvena_tva ati_ati prasiddha--_prasidh tvāt_tva aviduṣām_avidvas parokṣa--_parokṣa tvāt_tva ca_ca tad--_tad śabdaḥ_śabda api_api brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma_nāman paramārtha--_paramārtha sattva--_sattva sādhu--_sādhu tva--_tva praśasta--_praśaṃs tva--_tva ādibhiḥ_ādi sat--_sat śabdaḥ_śabda api_api brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma_nāman sat_as eva_eva saumya_saumya idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as iti_iti ādi_ādi śruteḥ_śruti ayam_idam trividhaḥ_trividha api_api nāma_nāma nirdeśena_nirdeśa brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa ca_ca vedāḥ_veda ca_ca yajñāḥ_yajña purā_purā sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi ādau_ādi vihitāḥ_vidhā vidhātrā_vidhātṛ nirmitāḥ_nirmā saguṇīkṛtāḥ_saguṇīkṛta iti_iti vā_vā yathā_yathā yasya_yad ayam_idam trividhaḥ_trividha nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa tena_tad paramātmanā_paramātman brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādayaḥ_ādi pavitratamāḥ_pavitratama sṛṣṭāḥ_sṛj tasmāt_tasmāt tasya_tad ayam_idam trividhaḥ_trividha nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa ati_ati praśastaḥ_praśaṃs iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

idānīm_idānīm pratyekam_pratyeka oṅkāra--_oṃkāra ādīnām_ādi prāśastyam_prāśastya darśayiṣyan_darśay oṅkārasya_oṅkāra tat_tad eva_eva āha_ah tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa praśastaḥ_praśaṃs tasmāt_tasmāt om_oṃ iti_iti udāhṛtya_udāhṛ uccārya_uccāray kṛtāḥ_kṛ veda--_veda vādinām_vādin yajña--_yajña ādyāḥ_ādya śāstra--_śāstra uktāḥ_vac kriyāḥ_kriyā satatam_satatam sarvadā_sarvadā aṅga--_aṅga vaikalye_vaikalya api_api prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa vartante_vṛt sa_sa guṇāḥ_guṇa bhavanti_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

tatra_tatra āhārasya_āhāra dṛṣṭārtha--_dṛṣṭārtha tvena_tva na_na asti_as aṅga--_aṅga vaiguṇyena_vaiguṇya phala--_phala abhāva--_abhāva śaṅkā_śaṅkā yajña--_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas dānānām_dāna tu_tu adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa arthānām_artha aṅga--_aṅga vaiguṇyāt_vaiguṇya apūrva--_apūrva anutpattau_anutpatti phala--_phala abhāvaḥ_abhāva syāt_as iti_iti api_api teṣām_tad ānarthakyam_ānarthakya prāptam_prāp pramāda--_pramāda bahula--_bahula tvāt_tva anuṣṭhātṝṇām_anuṣṭhātṛ atas_atas tad--_tad vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya parihāra--_parihāra bhagavat--_bhagavant nāma--_nāman uccāraṇa--_uccāraṇa rūpam_rūpa sāmānya--_sāmānya prāyaścittam_prāyaścitta parama--_parama kāruṇika--_kāruṇika tayā_tā upadiśati_upadiś bhagavān_bhagavant om_oṃ iti_iti om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as iti_iti evaṃ_evaṃ rūpaḥ_rūpa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman paramātmanaḥ_paramātman nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa nirdiśyate_nirdiś anena_idam iti_iti nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa pratipādaka--_pratipādaka śabdaḥ_śabda nāma_nāman iti_iti yāvat_yāvat trividhaḥ_trividha tisraḥ_tri vidhāḥ_vidhā avayavāḥ_avayava yasya_yad sa_tad trividhaḥ_trividha smṛtaḥ_smṛ vedānta--_vedānta vidbhiḥ_vid eka--_eka vacanāt_vacana tri--_tri avayavam_avayava ekam_eka nāma_nāman praṇava--_praṇava vat_vat yasmāt_yasmāt pūrvaiḥ_pūrva mahā--_mahat ṛṣibhiḥ_ṛṣi ayam_idam brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa smṛtaḥ_smṛ tasmāt_tasmāt idānīntanaiḥ_idānīntana api_api smartavyaḥ_smṛ iti_iti vidhiḥ_vidhi atra_atra kalpyate_kalpay vaṣaṭ_vaṣaṭ kartuḥ_kartṛ prathama--_prathama bhakṣaḥ_bhakṣa iti_iti ādiṣu_ādi iva_iva vacanāni_vacana tu_tu apūrva--_apūrva tvāt_tva iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya yajña--_yajña dāna--_dāna tapaḥ--_tapas kriyā--_kriyā saṃyogāt_saṃyoga ca_ca asya_idam tat_tad avaiguṇyam_avaiguṇya eva_eva phalam_phala paraspara--_paraspara ākāṅkṣayā_ākāṅkṣā kalpyate_kalpay

lg.l: pramādāt_pramāda kurvatām_kṛ karma_karman pracyaveta_pracyu adhvareṣu_adhvara yat_yad
smaraṇāt_smaraṇa eva_eva tat_tad viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu sampūrṇam_sampṛ syāt_as iti_iti śrutiḥ_śruti

div.p: iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti tathā_tathā eva_eva śiṣṭa--_śās ācārāt_ācāra ca_ca brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa stūyate_stu karma--_karman vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya parihāra--_parihāra sāmarthya--_sāmarthya kathanāya_kathana brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa iti_iti traivarṇika--_traivarṇika upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādyāḥ_ādya kartāraḥ_kartṛ vedāḥ_veda karaṇāni_karaṇa yajñāḥ_yajña karmāṇi_karman tena_tad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nirdeśena_nirdeśa karaṇa--_karaṇa bhūtena_bhū purā_purā vihitāḥ_vidhā prajāpatinā_prajāpati tasmāt_tasmāt yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi sṛṣṭi--_sṛṣṭi hetutvena_hetutva tad--_tad vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya parihāra--_parihāra samarthaḥ_samartha mahā--_mahat prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ayam_idam nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

idānīm_idānīm a-kāra--_a-kāra u-kāra--_u-kāra ma-kāra--_ma-kāra vyākhyānena_vyākhyāna tad--_tad samudāya--_samudāya oṃkāra--_oṃkāra vyākhyāna--_vyākhyāna vat_vat oṃkāra--_oṃkāra tad--_tad śabda--_śabda sat--_as śabda--_śabda vyākhyānena_vyākhyāna tad--_tad samudāya--_samudāya rūpam_rūpa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nirdeśam_nirdeśa stuti--_stuti atiśayāya_atiśaya vyākhyātum_vyākhyā ārabhate_ārabh tatra_tatra prathamam_prathamam oṃkāram_oṃkāra vyācaṣṭe_vyācakṣ tasmāt_tasmāt iti_iti yasmāt_yasmāt om_oṃ iti_iti brahma_brahman iti_iti ādiṣu_ādi śrutiṣu_śruti om_oṃ iti_iti brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma_nāman prasiddham_prasidh tasmāt_tasmāt om_oṃ iti_iti udāhṛtya_udāhṛ oṃkāra--_oṃkāra uccāraṇa--_uccāraṇa anantaram_anantaram vidhāna--_vidhāna uktāḥ_vac vidhi--_vidhi śāstra--_śāstra bodhitāḥ_bodhay brahma--_brahman vādinām_vādin veda--_veda vādinām_vādin yajña_yajña prakṛṣṭatayā_prakṛṣṭatā vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya rāhityena_rāhitya vartante_vṛt yasya_yad eka--_eka avayava--_avayava uccāraṇāt_uccāraṇa api_api avaiguṇyam_avaiguṇya kim_ka punar_punar tasya_tad sarvasya_sarva uccāraṇāt_uccāraṇa iti_iti stuti--_stuti atiśayaḥ_atiśaya

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tat_tad evam_evam tapaḥ--_tapas yajña--_yajña ādīnām_ādi traividhyam_traividhya sāmānyatas_sāmānyatas manuṣya--_manuṣya mātram_mātra adhikṛtya_adhikṛ uktam_vac tatra_tatra ye_yad sāttvikeṣu_sāttvika api_api madhye_madhya brahma--_brahman vādinaḥ_vādin teṣām_tad tu_tu brahma--_brahman nirdeśa--_nirdeśa pūrvakāḥ_pūrvaka eva_eva yajña--_yajña ādayaḥ_ādi bhavanti_bhū iti_iti āha_ah om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as iti_iti evam_evam brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa nāmnā_nāman vyapadeśaḥ_vyapadeśa smṛtaḥ_smṛ śiṣṭaiḥ_śās deśitaḥ_deśay sarva--_sarva śrutiṣu_śruti prasiddham_prasidh brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma_nāman jagat--_jagant kāraṇa--_kāraṇa tvena_tva atiprasiddheḥ_atiprasiddhi a_a tad--_tad nirasanena_nirasana ca_ca prasiddheḥ_prasiddhi tat_tad iti_iti ca_ca sat_as eva_eva saumya_saumya idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti sat_as iti_iti ca_ca yasmāt_yasmāt om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as śabda--_śabda vācyena_vac brahmaṇā_brahman eva_eva brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vedāḥ_veda yajñāḥ_yajña ca_ca vihitāḥ_vidhā kṛtāḥ_kṛ tasmāt_tasmāt om_oṃ iti_iti brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma_nāman udāhṛtya_udāhṛ uccārya_uccāray vartamānānām_vṛt brahma--_brahman vādinām_vādin
yajña--_yajña ādayaḥ_ādi pravartante_pravṛt

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad evam_evam tapaḥ--_tapas yajña--_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas dānānām_dāna traividhya--_traividhya kathanena_kathana sāttvikānām_sāttvika teṣām_tad upadeya--_upadā tvam_tva rājasa--_rājasa ādīnām_ādi heya--_hā tvam_tva ca_ca darśitam_darśay atha_atha sāttvika--_sāttvika adhikāriṇām_adhikārin yajña--_yajña ādīni_ādi viṣṇu--_viṣṇu nāma--_nāman pūrvakāṇi_pūrvaka eva_eva bhavanti_bhū iti_iti ucyate_vac om_oṃ iti_iti om_oṃ iti_iti ādikaḥ_ādika trividhaḥ_trividha brahmaṇaḥ_brahman viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa nāma--_nāman dheyam_dheya śiṣṭaiḥ_śās smṛtaḥ_smṛ om_oṃ iti_iti etat_etad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nediṣṭam_nediś nāma_nāman iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti om_oṃ iti_iti ekam_eka nāma_nāman tat_tad tvam_tvad asi_as iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti tat_tad iti_iti dvitīyam_dvitīya nāma_nāman sat_as eva_eva saumyaḥ_saumya iti_iti śruteḥ_śruti sat_as iti_iti tṛtīyam_tṛtīya nāma_nāman upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa idam_idam viṣṇu--_viṣṇu ādi--_ādi nāmnām_nāman tena_tad trividhena_trividha nirdeśena_nirdeśa brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vedāḥ_veda yajñāḥ_yajña ca_ca purā_purā caturmukhena_caturmukha vihitāḥ_vidhā prakaṭitāḥ_prakaṭay tasmāt_tasmāt mahā--_mahat prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva ayam_idam nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa tad--_tad pūrvakāṇām_pūrvaka yajña--_yajña ādīnām_ādi na_na aṅga--_aṅga tena_tena phala--_phala vaiguṇyam_vaiguṇya ca_ca na_na iti_iti

yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt om_oṃ iti_iti nirdeśam_nirdeśa udāhṛtya_udāhṛ uccārya_uccāray anuṣṭhitāḥ_anuṣṭhā brahma--_brahman vādinām_vādin sāttvikānām_sāttvika traivarṇikānām_traivarṇika yajña--_yajña ādyāḥ_ādya kriyāḥ_kriyā pravartante_pravṛt aṅga--_aṅga vaikalye_vaikalya api_api sa_sa aṅga--_aṅga tām_tā bhajanti_bhaj iti_iti

lg.l: tat_tad iti_iti an_an abhisaṃdhāya_abhisaṃdhā phalam_phala yajña--_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas kriyāḥ_kriyā
dāna--_dāna kriyāḥ_kriyā ca_ca vividhāḥ_vividha kriyante_kṛ mokṣa--_mokṣa kāṅkṣibhiḥ_kāṅkṣin

div.p: prastauti_prastu tat_tad iti_iti udāhṛtya_udāhṛ uccārya_uccāray śuddha--_śudh cittaiḥ_citta mokṣa--_mokṣa kāṅkṣibhiḥ_kāṅkṣin puruṣaiḥ_puruṣa phala--_phala abhisandhim_abhisaṃdhi a_a kṛtvā_kṛ yajña--_yajña ādyāḥ_ādya kriyāḥ_kriyā kriyante_kṛ atas_atas citta--_citta śodhana--_śodhana dvāreṇa_dvāra phala--_phala saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa tyajanena_tyajana mumukṣutva--_mumukṣutva sampādaka--_sampādaka tvāt_tva tad--_tad śabda--_śabda nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa praśastaḥ_praśaṃs iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 25_25

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana dvitīyam_dvitīya tad--_tad śabdam_śabda vyācaṣṭe_vyācakṣ tat_tad iti_iti tat_tad tvam_tvad asi_as iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti prasiddham_prasidh tat_tad iti_iti brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma_nāman udāhṛtya_udāhṛ phalam_phala an_an abhisandhāya_abhisaṃdhā antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha yajña--_yajña tapaḥ--_tapas kriyāḥ_kriyā dāna--_dāna kriyāḥ_kriyā ca_ca vividhāḥ_vividha mokṣa--_mokṣa kāṅkṣibhiḥ_kāṅkṣin 25_25
viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha tat_tad iti_iti udāhṛtya_udāhṛ iti_iti pūrvasya_pūrva anuṣaṅgaḥ_anuṣaṅga an_an abhisandhāya_abhisaṃdhā phala--_phala abhisandhim_abhisaṃdhi a_a kṛtvā_kṛ

baladevaḥ_baladeva tat_tad iti_iti nirdeśam_nirdeśa udāhṛtya_udāhṛ phalam_phala an_an abhisandhāya_abhisaṃdhā yajña--_yajña ādī_ādi kriyāḥ_kriyā mokṣa--_mokṣa kāṅkṣibhiḥ_kāṅkṣin taiḥ_tad kriyante_kṛ anuṣṭhīyante_anuṣṭhā niṣkāma--_niṣkāma tayā_tā mumukṣā--_mumukṣā sampādanāt_sampādana mahā--_mahat prabhāvaḥ_prabhāva tad--_tad śabdaḥ_śabda

lg.l: sat--_sat bhāve_bhāva sādhu--_sādhu bhāve_bhāva ca_ca sat_sat iti_iti etat_etad prayujyate_prayuj
praśaste_praśaṃs karmaṇi_karman sat--_sat śabdaḥ_śabda pārtha_pārtha yujyate_yuj
yajñe_yajña tapasi_tapas dāne_dāna ca_ca sthitiḥ_sthiti sat_as iti_iti ca_ca ucyate_vac
karma_karman ca_ca eva_eva tad--_tad arthīyam_arthīya sat_as iti_iti eva_eva abhidhīyate_abhidhā

div.p: āha_ah sat--_as bhāve_bhāva astitve_astitva deva--_deva dattasya_dā putra--_putra ādikam_ādika asti_as iti_iti asmin_idam arthe_artha sādhu--_sādhu bhāve_bhāva ca_ca sādhu--_sādhu tve_tva deva--_deva dattasya_dā putra--_putra ādi_ādi iti_iti asmin_idam arthe_artha sat_as iti_iti etat_etad padam_pada prayujyate_prayuj praśaste_praśaṃs māṅgalike_māṅgalika vivāha--_vivāha ādi--_ādi karmaṇi_karman ca_ca sat_as idam_idam karma_karman iti_iti sat--_as śabdaḥ_śabda yujyate_yuj prayujyate_prayuj saṅgacchate_saṃgam iti_iti vā_vā 26_26

kim_ka ca_ca yajñe_yajña iti_iti yajña--_yajña ādiṣu_ādi ca_ca yā_yad sthitiḥ_sthiti tātparyena_tātparya avasthānam_avasthāna tat_tad api_api sat_as iti_iti ucyate_vac yasya_yad ca_ca idam_idam nāma--_nāman trayam_traya saḥ_tad eva_eva paramātmā_paramātman arthaḥ_artha phalam_phala yasya_yad tad--_tad tad--_tad artham_artha karma--_karman pūjā--_pūjā upahāra--_upahāra gṛha--_gṛha aṅgana--_aṅgana parimārjana--_parimārjana upalepana--_upalepana raṅga--_raṅga māṅgalika--_māṅgalika ādi--_ādi kriyā_kriyā tad--_tad siddhaye_siddhi yat_yad anyat_anya karma_karman udyāna--_udyāna śāli--_śāli kṣetra--_kṣetra dhana--_dhana arjana--_arjana ādi--_ādi viṣayam_viṣaya tat_tad karma_karman tad--_tad arthīyam_arthīya tat_tad ca_ca ativyavahitam_ativyavahita api_api sat_as iti_iti eva_eva abhidhīyate_abhidhā yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam ati_ati praśastam_praśaṃs etat_etad nāma--_nāman trayam_traya tasmāt_tasmāt etat_etad sarva--_sarva karma--_karman sādguṇya--_sādguṇya artham_artha kīrayet_kīray iti_iti tātparyārthaḥ_tātparyārtha atra_atra ca_ca arthavāda--_arthavāda anupapattyā_anupapatti vidhiḥ_vidhi kalpyate_kalpay vidheyam_vidhā stūyate_stu vastu_vastu iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya apare_apara tu_tu pravartante_pravṛt vidhinā_vidhi uktāḥ_vac kriyante_kṛ mokṣa--_mokṣa kāṅkṣibhiḥ_kāṅkṣin iti_iti ādi_ādi vartamāna--_vṛt upadeśaḥ_upadeśa samidhā_samidh yajati_yaj iti_iti ādi--_ādi vat_vat vidhi--_vidhi tayā_tā pariṇamanīyaḥ_pariṇam iti_iti āhuḥ_ah tat_tad tu_tu sat--_sat bhāve_bhāva sādhu--_sādhu bhāve_bhāva ca_ca iti_iti ādiṣu_ādi prāptārtha--_prāptārtha tvāt_tva na_na saṅgacchate_saṃgam iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac krameṇa_krama vidhi--_vidhi kalpanā_kalpanā eva_eva jyāyasī_jyāyas 27_27

madhusūdanaḥ_madhusūdana tṛtīyam_tṛtīya sat--_sat cabdam_śabda vyācaṣṭe_vyācakṣ sat--_as bhāve_bhāva iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi sat_as eva_eva somya_somya idam_idam agre_agra āsīt_as iti_iti ādi--_ādi śruti--_śruti prasiddham_prasidh sat_as iti_iti etat_etad brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma_nāman sat--_as bhāve_bhāva avidyamānatva--_avidyamānatva śaṅkāyām_śaṅkā vidyamānatve_vidyamānatva sādhu--_sādhu bhāve_bhāva ca_ca asādhu--_asādhu tva--_tva śaṅkāyām_śaṅkā sādhu--_sādhu tve_tva ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya parihāreṇa_parihāra yajña--_yajña ādeḥ_ādi sādhu--_sādhu tvam_tva tad--_tad phalasya_phala ca_ca vidyamānatvam_vidyamānatva kartum_kṛ kṣamam_kṣama etat_etad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā sat--_sat bhāva--_bhāva sādhu--_sādhu bhāvayoḥ_bhāva iva_iva praśaste_praśaṃs apratibandhena_apratibandha āśu--_āśu sukha--_sukha janake_janaka māṅgalike_māṅgalika karmaṇi_karman vivāha--_vivāha ādau_ādi sat--_sat śabdaḥ_śabda he_he pārtha_pārtha yujyate_yuj prayujyate_prayuj tasmāt_tasmāt apratibandhena_apratibandha āśu--_āśu phala--_phala janakatvam_janakatva vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya parihāreṇa_parihāra yajña--_yajña ādeḥ_ādi samartham_samartha etat_etad nāma_nāma iti_iti praśastataram_praśastatara etat_etad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 26_26

yajñe_yajña tapasi_tapas dāne_dāna ca_ca yā_yad sthitiḥ_sthiti tad--_tad para--_para tayā_tā avasthitiḥ_avasthiti niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sā_tad api_api sat_as iti_iti ucyate_vac vidvadbhiḥ_vidvas karma_karman ca_ca eva_eva tad--_tad arthīyam_arthīya teṣu_tad yajña--_yajña dāna--_dāna tapaḥ--_tapas rūpeṣu_rūpa artheṣu_artha bhavam_bhava tad--_tad anukūlam_anukūla eva_eva ca_ca karma_karman tad--_tad arthīyam_arthīya bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇa--_arpaṇa buddhyā_buddhi kriyamāṇam_kṛ karma_karman vā_vā tad--_tad arthīyam_arthīya sat_as iti_iti eva_eva abhidhīyate_abhidhā tasmāt_tasmāt sat_as iti_iti nāma_nāman karma--_karman vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya apanodana--_apanodana samartham_samartha praśastataram_praśastatara yasya_yad ekaikaḥ_ekaika avayavaḥ_avayava api_api etādṛśaḥ_etādṛśa kim_ka vaktavyam_vac tad--_tad samudāyasya_samudāya om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as iti_iti nirdeśasya_nirdeśa māhātmyam_māhātmya iti_iti saṃpiṇḍita--_saṃpiṇḍay arthaḥ_artha 27_27

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha brahma--_brahman vācakaḥ_vācaka sat--_sat śabdaḥ_śabda praśasteṣu_praśaṃs api_api vartate_vṛt tasmāt_tasmāt praśasta--_praśaṃs mātre_mātra karmaṇi_karman prākṛte_prākṛta aprākṛte_aprākṛta api_api sat--_sat śabdaḥ_śabda prayoktavyaḥ_prayuj iti_iti āśayena_āśaya āha_ah sat--_as bhāve_bhāva iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi sat--_sat bhāve_bhāva brahmatve_brahmatva sādhu--_sādhu bhāve_bhāva brahma--_brahman vādi--_vādin tve_tva prayujyate_prayuj saṅgacchate_saṃgam iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tad--_tad arthīyam_arthīya karma_karman brahmacarya--_brahmacarya upayogi_upayogin yat_yad karma_karman bhagavat--_bhagavant mandira--_mandira mārjana--_mārjana ādikam_ādika tat_tad api_api

baladevaḥ_baladeva sat_as iti_iti nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa praśasteṣu_praśaṃs artha--_artha antareṣu_antara vartate_vṛt tasmāt_tasmāt praśaste_praśaṃs karma--_karman mātre_mātra sa_tad prayojyaḥ_prayuj iti_iti bhāvena_bhāva āha_ah sat--_as bhāvaḥ_bhāva iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi sat--_sat bhāve_bhāva brahma--_brahman bhāve_bhāva sādhu--_sādhu bhāve_bhāva ca_ca brahma--_brahman jña--_jña tve_tva abhidhāyaka--_abhidhāyaka tayā_tā sat--_sat śabdaḥ_śabda prayujyate_prayuj sat_as eva_eva saumyaḥ_saumya iti_iti ādau_ādi satām_as prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga iti_iti ādau_ādi ca_ca tathā_tathā praśaste_praśaṃs upanayana--_upanayana vivāha--_vivāha ādike_ādika ca_ca māṅgalike_māṅgalika karmaṇi_karman sat--_sat śabdaḥ_śabda yujyate_yuj saṅgacchate_saṃgam yajña--_yajña ādau_ādi yā_yad teṣām_tad sthitiḥ_sthiti tātparyeṇa_tātparya avasthitiḥ_avasthiti tat_tad api_api sat_as iti_iti ucyate_vac yasya_yad idam_idam nāma--_nāman trayam_traya tad--_tad arthīyam_arthīya karma_karman ca_ca tad--_tad mandira--_mandira nirmāṇa--_nirmāṇa tad--_tad vimārjana--_vimārjana ādi_ādi sat_as iti_iti abhidhīyate_abhidhā atra_atra trividhaḥ_trividha ayam_idam nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa smartavyaḥ_smṛ iti_iti vidhiḥ_vidhi kalpyate_kalpay vaṣaṭ_vaṣaṭ kartuḥ_kartṛ prathamam_prathamam bhakṣyaḥ_bhakṣ iti_iti ādau_ādi iva_iva vacanāni_vacana tu_tu apūrva--_apūrva tvāt_tva iti_iti nyāyāt_nyāya yajña--_yajña dāna--_dāna ādi--_ādi saṃyogāt_saṃyoga ca_ca asya_idam tad--_tad vaiguṇyam_vaiguṇya eva_eva phalam_phala

pramādāt_pramāda kurvatām_kṛ karma_karman pracyaveta_pracyu adhvareṣu_adhvara yat_yad smaraṇāt_smaraṇa eva_eva tat_tad viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu sampūrṇam_sampṛ syāt_as iti_iti śrutiḥ_śruti iti_iti smaraṇāt_smaraṇa ca_ca

lg.l: aśraddhayā_aśraddhā hutam_hu dattam_dā tapaḥ_tapas taptam_tap kṛtam_kṛ ca_ca yat_yad
asat_asat iti_iti ucyate_vac pārtha_pārtha na_na ca_ca tat_tad pretya_pre no_no iha_iha

div.p: nindati_nind aśraddhayā_aśraddhā hutam_hu havanam_havana dattam_dā dānam_dāna tapaḥ_tapas taptam_tap nirvartitam_nirvartay yat_yad ca_ca anyat_anya api_api kṛtam_kṛ karma_karman tat_tad sarvam_sarva asat_asat iti_iti ucyate_vac yatas_yatas tat_tad pretya_pre loka--_loka antare_antara na_na phalati_phal viguṇa--_viguṇa tvāt_tva asmin_idam loke_loka phalati_phal ayaśaska--_ayaśaska tvāt_tva

lg.l: rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas mayīm_maya tyaktvā_tyaj śraddhām_śraddhā sattva--_sattva mayīm_maya śritaḥ_śri
tattva--_tattva jñāne_jñāna adhikārī_adhikārin syāt_as iti_iti saptadaśe_saptadaśa sthitam_sthā

div.p:
iti_iti śrī--_śrī śrīdhara--_śrīdhara svāmi--_svāmin kṛtāyām_kṛ bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā ṭīkāyām_ṭīkā subodhinyām_subodhinī
śraddhā--_śraddhā traya--_traya vibhāga--_vibhāga yogaḥ_yoga nāma_nāma saptadaśaḥ_saptadaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya

aśraddadhāna--_aśraddadhāna tayā_tā śāstrīyam_śāstrīya vidhim_vidhi utsṛjya_utsṛj kāma--_kāma kāreṇa_kāra yat_yad kiṃcid_kaścit yajña--_yajña ādi_ādi kurvatām_kṛ asurāṇām_asura api_api tena_tad eva_eva vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya parihāraḥ_parihāra syāt_as iti_iti kṛtam_kṛ śraddhayā_śraddhā sāttvika--_sāttvika tva--_tva hetu--_hetu bhūtayā_bhū iti_iti atas_atas aśraddhayā_aśraddhā yat_yad dhutam_hu havanam_havana kṛtam_kṛ agnau_agni dattam_dā yat_yad brāhmaṇebhyaḥ_brāhmaṇa yat_yad tapaḥ_tapas taptam_tap yat_yad ca_ca anyat_anya karma_karman kṛtam_kṛ stuti--_stuti namaskāra--_namaskāra ādi_ādi tat_tad sarvam_sarva aśraddhayā_aśraddhā kṛtam_kṛ asat_asat asādhu_asādhu iti_iti ucyate_vac atas_atas eva_eva om_oṃ tat_tad sat_as iti_iti nirdeśena_nirdeśa na_na tasya_tad sādhu--_sādhu bhāvaḥ_bhāva śakyate_śak kartum_kṛ sarvathā_sarvathā tad--_tad ayogya--_ayogya tvāt_tva śilāyāḥ_śilā iva_iva aṅkuraḥ_aṅkura

tat_tad kasmāt_kasmāt asat_asat iti_iti ucyate_vac śṛṇu_śru he_he pārtha_pārtha caḥ_c hetau_hetu yasmāt_yasmāt tat_tad aśraddhā--_aśraddhā kṛtam_kṛ na_na pretya_pre para--_para loke_loka phalati_phal viguṇa--_viguṇa tvena_tva apūrva--_apūrva ajanaka--_ajanaka tvāt_tva no_no iha_iha na_na api_api iha_iha loke_loka yaśaḥ_yaśas sādhubhiḥ_sādhu nindita--_nind tvāt_tva atas_atas aihika--_aihika āmuṣmika--_āmuṣmika phala--_phala vikala--_vikala tvāt_tva aśraddhā--_aśraddhā kṛtasya_kṛ sāttvikyā_sāttvika śraddhayā_śraddhā eva_eva sāttvikam_sāttvika yajña--_yajña ādi_ādi kuryāt_kṛ antaḥkaraṇa--_antaḥkaraṇa śuddhaye_śuddhi tādṛśasya_tādṛśa eva_eva śraddhā--_śraddhā pūrvakasya_pūrvaka sāttvikasya_sāttvika yajña--_yajña ādeḥ_ādi daivāt_daiva vaiguṇya--_vaiguṇya śaṅkāyām_śaṅkā brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma--_nāman nirdeśena_nirdeśa sādguṇyam_sādguṇya sampādanīyam_sampāday iti_iti paramārthaḥ_paramārtha śraddhā--_śraddhā pūrvakam_pūrvaka asāttvikam_asāttvika api_api yajña--_yajña ādi_ādi viguṇam_viguṇa brahmaṇaḥ_brahman nāma--_nāman nirdeśena_nirdeśa sāttvikam_sāttvika sa_sa guṇam_guṇa ca_ca sampāditam_sampāday bhavati_bhū iti_iti bhāṣyam_bhāṣya
div.l: tat_tad evam_evam asmin_idam adhyāye_adhyāya ālasya--_ālasya ādinā_ādi an_an ādṛta--_ādṛ śāstrāṇām_śāstra śraddhā--_śraddhā pūrvakam_pūrvaka vṛddha--_vṛddha vyavahāra--_vyavahāra mātreṇa_mātra pravartamānānām_pravṛt śāstra--_śāstra anādareṇa_anādara asura--_asura sādharmyeṇa_sādharmya śraddhā--_śraddhā pūrvaka--_pūrvaka anuṣṭhānena_anuṣṭhāna ca_ca deva--_deva arjuna--_arjuna saṃśaya--_saṃśaya viṣayāṇām_viṣaya rājasa--_rājasa tāmasa--_tāmasa śraddhā--_śraddhā pūrvakam_pūrvaka rājasa--_rājasa tāmasa--_tāmasa yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi kāriṇaḥ_kārin asurāḥ_asura śāstrīya--_śāstrīya jñāna--_jñāna sādhanān_sādhana adhikāriṇaḥ_adhikārin sāttvika--_sāttvika śraddhā--_śraddhā pūrvakam_pūrvaka sāttvika--_sāttvika yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi iti_iti śraddhā--_śraddhā traividhya--_traividhya pradarśana--_pradarśana mukhena_mukha āhāra--_āhāra ādi--_ādi traividhya--_traividhya pradarśanena_pradarśana bhagavatā_bhagavant nirṇayaḥ_nirṇaya kṛtaḥ_kṛ iti_iti siddham_sidh 28_28
div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat paramahaṃsa--_paramahaṃsa parivrājaka--_parivrājaka ācārya--_ācārya śrī--_śrī viśveśvara--_viśveśvara sarasvatī--_sarasvatī pāda--_pāda śiṣya--_śiṣya śrī--_śrī madhusūdana--_madhusūdana sarasvatī--_sarasvatī viracitāyām_viracay śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītā--_gītā gūḍha--_guh artha--_artha dīpikāyām_dīpikā śraddhā--_śraddhā traya--_traya vibhāga--_vibhāga yogaḥ_yoga

viśvanāthaḥ_viśvanātha sat_sat karma_karman śrutam_śruta tathā_tathā asat_asat karma_karman kim_ka iti_iti apekṣāyām_apekṣā āha_ah aśraddayā_aśraddaya iti_iti hutam_hu havanam_havana dattam_dā dānam_dāna tapaḥ_tapas taptam_tap kṛtam_kṛ yat_yad anyat_anya ca_ca api_api karma_karman kṛtam_kṛ tat_tad sarvam_sarva asat_as iti_iti hutam_hu api_api ahutam_ahuta eva_eva dattam_dā api_api a_a dattam_dā eva_eva tapaḥ_tapas api_api a_a taptam_tap eva_eva kṛtam_kṛ api_api a_a kṛtam_kṛ eva_eva yatas_yatas tat_tad na_na pretya_pre na_na para--_para loke_loka phalati_phal na_na api_api iha_iha loke_loka phalati_phal 28_28

lg.l: ukteṣu_vac vividheṣu_vividha eva_eva sāttvikam_sāttvika śraddhayā_śraddhā kṛtam_kṛ
yat_yad syāt_as tat_tad eva_eva mokṣa--_mokṣa arham_arha iti_iti adhyāya--_adhyāya arthaḥ_artha īritaḥ_īray
iti_iti sāra--_sāra artha--_artha varṣiṇyām_varṣin harṣiṇyām_harṣin bhakta--_bhakta cetasām_cetas
gītāsu_gītā ayam_idam saptadaśaḥ_saptadaśa saṅgataḥ_saṅga saṅgataḥ_saṅga satām_sat

div.p: baladevaḥ_baladeva atha_atha sāttvikyā_sāttvika śraddhayā_śraddhā sarveṣu_sarva karmasu_karman pravartitavyam_pravṛt tayā_tad vinā_vinā sarvam_sarva vyartham_vyartha iti_iti nindati_nind aśraddhayā_aśraddhā iti_iti hutam_hu homaḥ_homa dattam_dā dānam_dāna taptam_tap anuṣṭhitam_anuṣṭhā yat_yad ca_ca anyat_anya api_api stuti--_stuti praṇati--_praṇati ādi--_ādi karma_karman kṛtam_kṛ tat_tad sarvam_sarva asat_asat nindyam_nind iti_iti ucyate_vac kutas_kutas iti_iti atra_atra āha_ah na_na ca_ca iti_iti hetau_hetu ca_ca śabdaḥ_śabda yatas_yatas aśraddhayā_aśraddhā kṛtam_kṛ tat_tad pretya_pre para--_para loke_loka na_na phalati_phal viguṇāt_viguṇa tasmāt_tad pūrva--_pūrva anutpatteḥ_anutpatti na_na api_api iha_iha loke_loka kīrtiḥ_kīrti sadbhiḥ_sat nindita--_nind tvāt_tva 28_28
