lg.l: śraddhām_śraddhā svabhāva--_svabhāva jām_ja hitvā_hā śāstra--_śāstra jām_ja tām_tad samāśritaḥ_samāśri
niḥśreyasa--_niḥśreyasa adhikārī_adhikārin syāt_as iti_iti saptadaśī_saptadaśa sthitiḥ_sthiti

div.p: iti_iti śrīmat--_śrīmat bhagavat--_bhagavant gītopaniṣad--_gītopaniṣad bhāṣye_bhāṣya saptadaśaḥ_saptadaśa adhyāyaḥ_adhyāya
Bhagavadgita 18
BhG 18.1

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
saṃnyāsasya_saṃnyāsa mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu tattvam_tattva icchāmi_iṣ veditum_vid
tyāgasya_tyāga ca_ca hṛṣīkeśa_hṛṣīkeśa pṛthak_pṛthak keśiniṣūdana_keśiniṣūdana

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara

lg.l: nyāsa--_nyāsa tyāga--_tyāga vibhāgena_vibhāga sarva--_sarva gīta--_gīta artha--_artha saṅgraham_saṃgraha
spaṣṭam_spaṣṭa aṣṭādaśe_aṣṭādaśa prāha_prāh parama--_parama artha--_artha vinirṇaye_vinirṇaya

div.p: atra_atra ca_ca

sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman manasā_manas
sannyasya_saṃnyas āste_ās sukham_sukham vaśī_vaśin sannyāsa-yoga-yuktātmā (Gītā 9.28)

iti_iti ādiṣu_ādi ca_ca phala--_phala mātra--_mātra tyāgena_tyāga karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna upadiṣṭam_upadiś na_na ca_ca paraspara--_paraspara viruddham_virudh sarvajñaḥ_sarvajña parama--_parama kāruṇikaḥ_kāruṇika bhagavān_bhagavant upadiśet_upadiś atas_atas karma--_karman sannyāsasya_saṃnyāsa tad--_tad anuṣṭhānasya_anuṣṭhāna ca_ca avirodha--_avirodha prakāram_prakāra bubhutsuḥ_bubhutsu arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac sannyāsasya_saṃnyāsa iti_iti bho_bho hṛṣīkeśa_hṛṣīkeśa sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya niyāmaka_niyāmaka he_he keśī--_keśin nisūdana_nisūdana keśī--_keśin nāmnaḥ_nāman mahataḥ_mahat haya--_haya ākṛteḥ_ākṛti daityasya_daitya yuddhe_yuddha mukham_mukha vyādāya_vyādā bhakṣayitum_bhakṣay āgacchataḥ_āgam atyantam_atyantam vyātte_vyādā mukhe_mukha vāma--_vāma bāhum_bāhu praveśya_praveśay tad--_tad kṣaṇam_kṣaṇa eva_eva vivṛddhena_vivṛdh tena_tad eva_eva bāhunā_bāhu nisūditavān_niṣūday ataeva_ataeva he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu iti_iti sambodhanam_sambodhana sannyāsasya_saṃnyāsa tyāgasya_tyāga ca_ca tattvam_tattva pṛthak_pṛthak vivekena_viveka veditum_vid icchāmi_iṣ

div.p: iti_iti atra_atra bhagavat--_bhagavant vākye_vākya mokṣa--_mokṣa kāṅkṣi--_kāṅkṣin śabdena_śabda sannyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin eva_eva ucyante_vac anye_anya vā_vā yadi_yadi anye_anya eva_eva te_tad tarhi_tarhi sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgam_tyāga tatas_tatas kuru_kṛ yata--_yam ātmavān_ātmavat iti_iti (Gītā--_Gītā 12.11_12.11 tvad--_tvad uktānām_vac sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāginām_tyāgin teṣām_tad sa_tad tyāgaḥ_tyāga kaḥ_ka sannyāsinām_saṃnyāsin ca_ca kaḥ_ka sa_tad sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa iti_iti vivekataḥ_viveka jijñāsuḥ_jijñāsu āha_ah sannyāsasya_saṃnyāsa iti_iti pṛthak_pṛthak iti_iti yadi_yadi sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa tyāga--_tyāga śabdau_śabda bhinna--_bhid arthau_artha tadā_tadā sannyāsasya_saṃnyāsa tyāgasya_tyāga ca_ca tattvam_tattva pṛthak_pṛthak veditum_vid icchāmi_iṣ yadi_yadi tu_tu eka--_eka arthau_artha tau_tad api_api tvad--_tvad mate_mata anya--_anya mate_mata vā_vā tayoḥ_tad aikya--_aikya artham_artha arthāt_artha eka--_eka artha--_artha tvam_tva iti_iti pṛthak_pṛthak veditum_vid icchāmi_iṣ he_he hṛṣīkeśa_hṛṣīkeśa iti_iti mad--_mad buddheḥ_buddhi pravartaka--_pravartaka tvāt_tva tvam_tvad eva_eva imam_idam sandeha--_saṃdeha mukhāpayasi_mukhāpay keśi--_keśin nisūdanaḥ_niṣūdana iti_iti tam_tad ca_ca sandeham_saṃdeha tvam_tvad eva_eva keśinam_keśin iva_iva vidārayasi_vidāray iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu iti_iti tvam_tvad mahā--_mahat bāhu--_bāhu bala--_bala anvitaḥ_anvita aham_mad kiñcid_kaścit bāhu--_bāhu bala--_bala anvitaḥ_anvita iti_iti etat_etad aṃśena_aṃśa eva_eva mayā_mad saha_saha sakhyam_sakhya tava_tvad na_na tu_tu sārvajñya--_sārvajñya ādibhiḥ_ādi aṃśaiḥ_aṃśa atas_atas tvad--_tvad datta--_dā kiñcid_kaścit sakhya--_sakhya bhāvāt_bhāva eva_eva praśne_praśna mama_mad niḥśaṅka--_niḥśaṅka tā_tā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
Baladevaḥ_Baladeva

div.p: sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman manasā_manas sannyasya_saṃnyas āste_ās sukham_sukham vaśī_vaśin iti_iti ādau_ādi saṃnyāsa--_saṃnyāsa śabdena_śabda kim_ka uktam_vac /--tyaktvā_tyaj karma--_karman phala--_phala āsaṅgam_āsaṅga ityādau_ityādi tyāga--_tyāga śabdena_śabda ca_ca kim_ka uktam_vac bhagavatā_bhagavat tatra_tatra sandihānaḥ_saṃdih arjunaḥ_arjuna pṛcchati_pracch saṃnyāsasya_saṃnyāsa iti_iti sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa tyāga--_tyāga śabdau_śabda śaila--_śaila taru--_taru śabdau_śabda iva_iva vijātīya--_vijātīya arthau_artha kim_kim vā_vā kuru--_kuru pāṇḍava--_pāṇḍava śabdau_śabda iva_iva sajātīya--_sajātīya arthau_artha yadi_yadi ādyaḥ_ādya tarhi_tarhi sannyāsasya_saṃnyāsa tyāgasya_tyāga ca_ca tattvam_tattva pṛthak_pṛthak veditum_vid icchāmi_iṣ yadi_yadi antar_antar tarhi_tarhi tatra_tatra avāntara--_avāntara upādhi--_upādhi mātram_mātra bhedakam_bhedaka bhāvi_bhāvin tat_tad ca_ca veditum_vid icchāmi_iṣ he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu kṛṣṇa_kṛṣṇa hṛṣīkeśa_hṛṣīkeśa iti_iti dhī--_dhī vṛtti--_vṛtti preraka--_preraka tvāt_tva tvam_tvad eva_eva mad--_mad sandeham_saṃdeha utpādayasi_utpāday keśi--_keśin nisūdana_niṣūdana iti_iti tvam_tvad mad--_mad sandeham_saṃdeha keśinam_keśin iva_iva vināśaya_vināśay iti_iti

div.p: uvāca_vac kāmyānām_kāmya putra--_putra kāmaḥ_kāma yajeta_yaj svarga--_svarga kāmaḥ_kāma yajeta_yaj iti_iti evam_evam ādi_ādi kāma--_kāma upabandhena_upabandha vihitānām_vidhā karmaṇām_karman nyāsam_nyāsa parityāgam_parityāga sat--_sat nyāsam_nyāsa kavayaḥ_kavi viduḥ_vid samyak_samyak phalaiḥ_phala saha_saha sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman api_api nyāsam_nyāsa sannyāsam_sannyāsa paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita viduḥ_vid jānanti_jñā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sarveṣām_sarva kāmyānām_kāmya nitya--_nitya naimittikānām_naimittika ca_ca karmaṇām_karman phala--_phala mātra--_mātra tyāgam_tyāga prāhuḥ_prāh tyāgam_tyāga prāhuḥ_prāh tyāgam_tyāga vicakṣaṇāḥ_vicakṣaṇa nipuṇāḥ_nipuṇa svarūpataḥ_svarūpa karma--_karman tyāgam_tyāga

nanu_nanu nitya--_nitya naimittikānām_naimittika phala--_phala aśravaṇāt_aśravaṇa a_a vidyamānasya_vid phalasya_phala katham_katham tyāgaḥ_tyāga syāt_as nahi_nahi bandhyāyāḥ_bandh putra--_putra tyāgaḥ_tyāga sambhavanti_sambhū

ucyate_vac yadi_yadi api_api svarga--_svarga kāmaḥ_kāma paśu--_paśu kāmaḥ_kāma iti_iti ādi--_ādi vat_vat ahar_ahar ahar_ahar sandhyām_saṃdhyā upāsīta_upās yāvajjīvam_yāvajjīvam agnihotram_agnihotra juhoti_hu iti_iti ādiṣu_ādi phala--_phala viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa na_na śrūyate_śru tathā_tathā api_api a_a puruṣa--_puruṣa arthe_artha vyāpāre_vyāpāra prekṣāvantam_prekṣāvat yajeta_yaj iti_iti ādiṣu_ādi iva_iva sāmānyatas_sāmānyatas kim_ka api_api phalam_phala ākṣipati_ākṣip eva_eva na_na ca_ca atīva_atīva gurum_guru atas_atas śraddhayā_śraddhā sva--_sva siddhiḥ_siddhi eva_eva vidheḥ_vidhi prayojanam_prayojana iti_iti mantavyam_man puruṣa--_puruṣa pravṛtti--_pravṛtti anupapatteḥ_anupapatti duṣparahara--_duṣparahara tvāt_tva śrūyate_śru ca_ca nitya--_nitya ādiṣu_ādi api_api phalam_phala sarve_sarva ete_etad puṇya--_puṇya lokāḥ_loka bhavati_bhū iti_iti karmaṇā_karman pitṛ--_pitṛ lokaḥ_loka iti_iti dharmeṇa_dharma pāpam_pāpa apanudanti_apanud iti_iti evam_evam ādiṣu_ādi tasmāt_tasmāt yuktam_yuj uktam_vac sarva--_sarva karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgam_tyāga prāhuḥ_prāh tyāgam_tyāga vicakṣaṇāḥ_vicakṣaṇa iti_iti

nanu_nanu phala--_phala tyāgena_tyāga punar_punar pai_pai niṣphaleṣu_niṣphala karmasu_karman pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti eva_eva na_na syāt_as tat_tad na_na sarveṣām_sarva api_api karmaṇām_karman saṃyoga--_saṃyoga pṛthaktvena_pṛthaktva vividiṣā--_vividiṣā artha--_artha tayā_tā viniyogāt_viniyoga tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti tam_tad etam_etad veda--_veda anuvacanena_anuvacana brāhmaṇāḥ_brāhmaṇa vividiṣanti_vividiṣ yajñena_yajña dānena_dāna tapasā_tapas anāśakena_anāśaka iti_iti tatas_tatas ca_ca śruti--_śruti pada--_pada uktam_vac sarvam_sarva phalam_phala bandhaka--_bandhaka tvena_tva tyaktvā_tyaj vividiṣā--_vividiṣā artham_artha sarva--_sarva karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna ghaṭate_ghaṭ eva_eva vividiṣā_vividiṣā ca_ca nitya--_nitya anitya--_anitya vastu--_vastu vivekena_viveka nivṛtta--_nivṛt deha--_deha ādi--_ādi abhimāna--_abhimāna tayā_tā buddheḥ_buddhi pratyak--_pratyañc pravaṇa--_pravaṇa tā_tā tāvat--_tāvat paryantam_paryanta ca_ca sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi artham_artha jñāna--_jñāna aviruddham_aviruddha yathocitam_yathocita avaśyakam_avaśyaka karma_karman kurvataḥ_kṛ tad--_tad phala--_phala tyāgaḥ_tyāga eva_eva karma--_karman tyāgaḥ_tyāga nāma_nāma na_na sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa tathā_tathā ca_ca śrutiḥ_śruti kurvan_kṛ eva_eva iha_iha karmāṇi_karman jijīviṣet_jijīviṣ śatām_śata samāḥ_samā iti_iti tatas_tatas parantu_parantu sarva--_sarva karma--_karman nivṛttiḥ_nivṛtti svatas_svatas eva_eva bhavati_bhū tat_tad uktam_vac naiṣkarmya--_naiṣkarmya siddhau_siddhi

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva evam_evam pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch bhagavant_bhagavant uvāca_vac kāmyānām_kāmya iti_iti putra--_putra kāmaḥ_kāma yajeta_yaj svarga--_svarga kāmaḥ_kāma yajeta_yaj iti_iti evam_evam kāma--_kāma upanibandhena_upanibandha vihitānām_vidhā putreṣṭi--_putreṣṭi jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādīnām_ādi karmaṇām_karman nyāsam_nyāsa svarūpeṇa_svarūpa tyāgam_tyāga kavayaḥ_kavi paṇḍitāḥ_paṇḍita sat--_sat nyāsam_nyāsa viduḥ_vid na_na tu_tu nityānām_nitya teṣu_tad vicakṣaṇāḥ_vicakṣaṇa tu_tu sarveṣām_sarva kāmyānām_kāmya nityānām_nitya ca_ca karmaṇām_karman phala--_phala tyāgam_tyāga eva_eva na_na tu_tu svarūpataḥ_svarūpa tyāgam_tyāga sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa tyāgam_tyāga prāhuḥ_prāh nitya--_nitya karmaṇām_karman ca_ca phalam_phala asti_as karmaṇām_karman pitṛ--_pitṛ lokaḥ_loka dharmeṇa_dharma pāpam_pāpa apanudati_apanud iti_iti ādi_ādi śravaṇāt_śravaṇa yadi_yadi api_api ahar_ahar ahar_ahar sandhyām_saṃdhyā upāsīta_upās yāvajjīvanam_yāvajjīvanam agnihotram_agnihotra juhoti_hu iti_iti ādau_ādi putra--_putra kāmaḥ_kāma yajeta_yaj iti_iti ādau_ādi iva_iva phala--_phala viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa na_na śrutayaḥ_śruti tathā_tathā api_api viśvajitā_viśvajit yajeta_yaj iti_iti ādau_ādi iva_iva vidhiḥ_vidhi kiñcid_kaścit phalam_phala itarathā_itarathā puruṣa--_puruṣa pravṛtti--_pravṛtti anupapatteḥ_anupapatti duṣparihara--_duṣparihara tā--_tā āpattiḥ_āpatti tathā_tathā ca_ca kāmya--_kāmya karmaṇām_karman svarūpataḥ_svarūpa tyāgaḥ_tyāga nitya--_nitya karmaṇām_karman tu_tu phala--_phala tyāgaḥ_tyāga sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha sarveṣām_sarva karmaṇām_karman phala--_phala icchām_icchā tyaktvā_tyaj anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna khalu_khalu tyāga--_tyāga śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: tyājyam_tyaj doṣavat_doṣavat iti_iti eke_eka karma_karman prāhuḥ_prāh manīṣiṇaḥ_manīṣin
yajña--_yajña dāna--_dāna tapaḥ--_tapas karma_karman na_na tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti ca_ca apare_apara

div.p: karma--_karman tyāge_tyāga etat_etad eva_eva mata--_mata antara--_antara nirāsena_nirāsa dṛḍhīkartum_dṛḍhīkṛ mata--_mata bhedam_bheda darśayati_darśay tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti doṣavat_doṣavat dhiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādi--_ādi doṣaka--_doṣaka tvena_tva kevalam_kevala bandhakam_bandhaka iti_iti hetoḥ_hetu sarveṣām_sarva api_api karma_karman tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti eke_eka sāṅkhyāḥ_sāṃkhya prāhuḥ_prāh manīṣiṇaḥ_manīṣin iti_iti asya_idam ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva mā_mā hiṃsyāt_hiṃs sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti niṣedhaḥ_niṣedha puruṣasya_puruṣa anartha--_anartha hetuḥ_hetu hiṃsā_hiṃsā iti_iti āha_ah agnīṣomīyam_agnīṣomīya paśum_paśu ālabheta_ālabh iti_iti ādi--_ādi prākaraṇikaḥ_prākaraṇika vidhiḥ_vidhi tu_tu hiṃsāyāḥ_hiṃsā kratu--_kratu upakāraka--_upakāraka tvam_tva āha_ah atas_atas bhinna--_bhid viṣayaka--_viṣayaka tvena_tva sāmānya--_sāmānya viśeṣa--_viśeṣa nyāya--_nyāya agocara--_agocara tvāt_tva vādhya--_vādhya vādhaka--_vādhaka tā_tā nā_na asti_as dravya--_dravya sādhyeṣu_sādhay ca_ca sarveṣu_sarva api_api karmasu_karman hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādeḥ_ādi sambhavāt_sambhava sarvam_sarva api_api karma_karman tyājyam_tyaj eva_eva iti_iti tat_tad uktam_vac dṛṣṭa--_dṛś vat_vat ānuśravikaḥ_ānuśravika sa_tad hi_hi aviśuddhi--_aviśuddhi kṣaya--_kṣaya atiśaya--_atiśaya yuktaḥ_yuj iti_iti asya_idam arthaḥ_artha guru--_guru pāṭhāt_pāṭha anuśrūyate_anuśru iti_iti anuśravaḥ_anuśrava vedaḥ_veda tat_tad bodhitaḥ_bodhay upāyaḥ_upāya jyotiṣṭhoma--_jyotiṣṭhoma ādiḥ_ādi ānuśravikaḥ_ānuśravika tatra_tatra aviśuddhiḥ_aviśuddhi hiṃsā_hiṃsā tathā_tathā kṣayaḥ_kṣaya vināśaḥ_vināśa agnihotra--_agnihotra jyotiṣṭhoma--_jyotiṣṭhoma ādi--_ādi janyeṣu_jan svargeṣu_svarga tāratamyam_tāratamya vartate_vṛt para--_para utkarṣaḥ_utkarṣa tu_tu sarvān_sarva duḥkhīkaroti_duḥkhīkṛ

apare_apara tu_tu mīmāṃsakāḥ_mīmāṃsaka yajña--_yajña ādikam_ādika karma_karman na_na tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti prāhuḥ_prāh ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva kratu--_kratu arthā_artha api_api satī_as iyam_idam hiṃsā_hiṃsā puruṣeṇa_puruṣa kartavyā_kṛ sā_tad ca_ca anya--_anya uddeśena_uddeśa api_api kṛtā_kṛ puruṣasya_puruṣa pratyavāya--_pratyavāya hetuḥ_hetu eva_eva yathā_yathā hi_hi vidhiḥ_vidhi vidheyasya_vidhā tad--_tad uddeśyena_uddiś anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna vidhatte_vidhā tādarthya--_tādarthya lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa tvāt_tva śeṣa--_śeṣa tvasya_tva na_na tu_tu evam_evam niṣedhaḥ_niṣedha niṣedhasya_niṣedha tādarthyam_tādarthya apekṣate_apekṣ prāpti--_prāpti mātra--_mātra apekṣita--_apekṣ tvāt_tva anyathā_anyathā ajñāna--_ajñāna pramāda--_pramāda ādi--_ādi kṛte_kṛ doṣa--_doṣa abhāva--_abhāva prasaṅgāt_prasaṅga tat_tad evam_evam samāna--_samāna viṣayaka--_viṣayaka tvena_tva sāmānya--_sāmānya śāstrasya_śāstra viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa bādhāt_bādha na_na asti_as doṣavat--_doṣavat tvam_tva atas_atas nityam_nitya yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi karma_karman na_na tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti anena_idam vidhi--_vidhi niṣedhayoḥ_niṣedha
samāna--_samāna bala--_bala tā_tā bādhyate_bādh sāmānya--_sāmānya viśeṣa--_viśeṣa nyāyam_nyāya sampādayitum_sampāday
upakṣipati_upakṣip āhuḥ_ah

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva tyāge_tyāga mata--_mata bhedam_bheda āha_ah tyājyam_tyaj eke_eka manīṣiṇaḥ_manīṣin doṣavat_doṣavat na_na hiṃsyāt_hiṃs sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta iti_iti śruti--_śruti nidarśinaḥ_nidarśin kāpilāḥ_kāpila karma--_karman doṣavat_doṣavat paśu--_paśu hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādi--_ādi doṣa--_doṣa yuktam_yuj bhavati_bhū atas_atas tyājyam_tyaj svarūpataḥ_svarūpa heyam_hā iti_iti āhuḥ_ah agnīṣomīyam_agnīṣomīya paśum_paśu ālabheta_ālabh iti_iti śrutiḥ_śruti tu_tu hiṃsāyāḥ_hiṃsā kratu--_kratu aṅga--_aṅga tvam_tva āha_ah tu_tu anartha--_anartha hetu--_hetu tvam_tva tasyāḥ_tad nivārayati_nivāray tathā_tathā ca_ca dravya--_dravya sādhya--_sādhay tvena_tva hiṃsāyāḥ_hiṃsā sambhavāt_sambhava sarvam_sarva karma_karman tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti apare_apara jaiminīyāḥ_jaiminīya tu_tu yajña--_yajña ādi--_ādi karma_karman na_na tyājyam_tyaj tasya_tad veda--_veda vihita--_vidhā tvena_tva nirdoṣa--_nirdoṣa tvāt_tva iti_iti āhuḥ_ah yadi_yadi api_api hiṃsā--_hiṃsā anugraha--_anugraha ātmakam_ātmaka karma_karman tathā_tathā api_api tasya_tad vedena_veda dharma--_dharma tva--_tva abhidhānāt_abhidhāna na_na doṣavat--_doṣavat tvam_tva na_na hiṃsyāt_hiṃs iti_iti sāmānyatas_sāmānyatas niṣedhaḥ_niṣedha tu_tu kratoḥ_kratu anyatra_anyatra tasyāḥ_tad pāpa--_pāpa tām_tā āha_ah iti_iti na_na kiñcid_kaścit avadyam_avadya
BhG 18.4

lg.l: niścayam_niścaya śṛṇu_śru me_mad tatra_tatra tyāge_tyāga bharata--_bharata sattama_sattama
tyāgaḥ_tyāga hi_hi puruṣa--_puruṣa vyāghra_vyāghra trividhaḥ_trividha saṃprakīrtitaḥ_saṃprakīrtay

div.p: āha_ah tatra_tatra evam_evam vipratipanne_vipratipad tyāge_tyāga niścayam_niścaya ye_yad vacanāt_vacana śṛṇu_śru tyāgasya_tyāga loka--_loka prasiddha--_prasidh tvāt_tva kim_ka atra_atra śrotavyam_śru iti_iti mā_mā avamaṃsthāḥ_avaman iti_iti āha_ah he_he puruṣa--_puruṣa vyāghra_vyāghra puruṣa--_puruṣa śreṣṭha_śreṣṭha tyāgaḥ_tyāga ayam_idam durbodhaḥ_durbodha hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt ayam_idam karma--_karman tyāgaḥ_tyāga tāmasa--_tāmasa ādi--_ādi bhedena_bheda trividhaḥ_trividha samyak_samyak vivekena_viveka prakīrtitaḥ_prakīrtay traividhyam_traividhya ca_ca niyatasya_niyam tu_tu sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa karmaṇaḥ_karman iti_iti ādinā_ādi vakṣyati_vac

Viśvanāthaḥ_Viśvanātha sva--_sva matam_mata āha_ah niścayam_niścaya trividhaḥ_trividha sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika rājasaḥ_rājasa tāmasaḥ_tāmasa ca_ca iti_iti atra_atra tyāgasya_tyāga traividhyam_traividhya niyatasya_niyam tu_tu sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa karmaṇaḥ_karman nā_na upapadyate_upapad mohāt_moha tasya_tad parityāgaḥ_parityāga tāmasaḥ_tāmasa parikīrtitaḥ_parikīrtay iti_iti tasya_tad eva_eva tāmasa--_tāmasa bhedaiḥ_bheda sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa śabda--_śabda prayogāt_prayoga bhagavat--_bhagavant mate_mata tyāga--_tyāga sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa śabdayoḥ_śabda aikya--_aikya artham_artha eva_eva iti_iti avagamyate_avagam

āha_ah mata--_mata bheda--_bheda graste_gras tyāge_tyāga me_mad parameśvarasya_parameśvara sarvajñasya_sarvajña niścayam_niścaya śṛṇu_śru nanu_nanu tyāgasya_tyāga khyāta--_khyā tvāt_tva tatra_tatra śrotavyam_śru kim_ka asti_as tatra_tatra āha_ah tyāgaḥ_tyāga hi_hi iti_iti hi_hi yatas_yatas tyāgaḥ_tyāga tāmasa--_tāmasa ādi--_ādi bhedena_bheda vijñaiḥ_vijña trividhaḥ_trividha samprakīrtitaḥ_samprakīrtay vivicya_vivic uktaḥ_vac tathā_tathā ca_ca durbodhaḥ_durbodha asau_adas śrotavyaḥ_śru iti_iti tyāga--_tyāga traividhyam_traividhya niyatasya_niyam tu_tu iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi agre_agra vācyam_vac
BhG 18.5

lg.l: yajña--_yajña dāna--_dāna tapaḥ--_tapas karma_karman na_na tyājyam_tyaj kāryam_kṛ eva_eva tat_tad
yajñaḥ_yajña dānam_dāna tapaḥ_tapas ca_ca eva_eva pāvanāni_pāvana manīṣiṇām_manīṣin

div.p: āha_ah
āha_ah
āha_ah bhavanti_bhū
BhG 18.6

lg.l: etāni_etad api_api tu_tu karmāṇi_karman saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj phalāni_phala ca_ca
kartavyāni_kṛ iti_iti me_mad pārtha_pārtha niścitam_niści matam_mata uttamam_uttama

div.p: bhavanti_bhū darśayan_darśay āha_ah yāni_yad yajña--_yajña ādīni_ādi karmāṇi_karman mayā_mad pāvanāni_pāvana iti_iti uktam_vac etāni_etad api_api eva_eva kartavyāni_kṛ katham_katham saṅgam_saṅga kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa tyaktvā_tyaj kevalam_kevalam īśvara--_īśvara ārādhat--_ārādh tayā_tā kartavyāni_kṛ iti_iti phalāni_phala ca_ca tyaktvā_tyaj kartavyāni_kṛ iti_iti ca_ca me_mad matam_mata niścitam_niści atas_atas eva_eva uttamam_uttama

Viśvanāthaḥ_Viśvanātha yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra kṛtāni_kṛ etāni_etad pāvanāni_pāvana bhavanti_bhū tam_tad prakāram_prakāra darśayati_darśay etāni_etad api_api iti_iti saṅgam_saṅga kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa phala--_phala abhisandhim_abhisaṃdhi ca_ca phala--_phala abhisandhi--_abhisaṃdhi kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśayoḥ_abhiniveśa tyāgaḥ_tyāga eva_eva tyāgaḥ_tyāga sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa ca_ca ucyate_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

āha_ah saṅgam_saṅga kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśam_abhiniveśa phalāni_phala ca_ca pratipa--_pratipa uktāni_vac pitṛ--_pitṛ loka--_loka ādīni_ādi ca_ca sarvāṇi_sarva tyaktvā_tyaj kevalam_kevalam īśvara--_īśvara arcana--_arcana dhiyā_dhī kartavyāni_kṛ iti_iti me_mad mayā_mad niścitam_niści atas_atas uttamam_uttama idam_idam matam_man kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa tyāgasya_tyāga api_api praveśāt_praveśa pārtha--_pārtha sāratheḥ_sārathi matam_mata varīyaḥ_varīyas
BhG 18.7

lg.l: niyatasya_niyam tu_tu saṃnyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa karmaṇaḥ_karman na_na upapadyate_upapad
mohāt_moha tasya_tad parityāgaḥ_parityāga tāmasaḥ_tāmasa parikīrtitaḥ_parikīrtay

div.p: darśayati_darśay kāmyasya_kāmya karmaṇaḥ_karman bandhaka--_bandhaka tvāt_tva sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa yuktam_yukta niyatasya_niyam tu_tu nityasya_nitya punar_punar karmaṇaḥ_karman sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa tyāgaḥ_tyāga na_na upapadyate_upapad atas_atas tasya_tad parityāgaḥ_parityāga upādeya--_upādā tve_tva api_api tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti evam_evam lakṣaṇāt_lakṣaṇa mohāt_moha eva_eva bhavet_bhū sa_tad ca_ca mohasya_moha tāmasa--_tāmasa tvāt_tva tāmasaḥ_tāmasa parikīrtitaḥ_parikīrtay

Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha prakrāntasya_prakram trividha--_trividha tyāgasya_tyāga tāmasam_tāmasa bhedam_bheda āha_ah niyatasya_niyam nityasya_nitya mohāt_moha śāstra--_śāstra tātparya--_tātparya ajñānāt_ajñāna sannyāsī_saṃnyāsin kāmya--_kāmya karmaṇi_karman āvaśyaka--_āvaśyaka tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva parityajatu_parityaj nāma_nāma nityasya_nitya tu_tu karmaṇaḥ_karman tyāgaḥ_tyāga na_na upapadyate_upapad iti_iti tu_tu śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha mohāt_moha ajñānāt_ajñāna tāmasaḥ_tāmasa iti_iti tāmasa--_tāmasa tyāgasya_tyāga phalam_phala ajñāna--_ajñāna prāptiḥ_prāpti eva_eva na_na tu_tu abhīpsita--_abhīps jñāna--_jñāna prāptiḥ_prāpti iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva pratijñātam_pratijñā tyāga--_tyāga traividhyam_traividhya āha_ah niyatasya_niyam iti_iti tribhiḥ_tri kāmyasya_kāmya karmaṇaḥ_karman bandhaka--_bandhaka tvāt_tva tyāgaḥ_tyāga yuktaḥ_yuj niyatasya_niyam nitya--_nitya naimittikasya_naimittika mahā--_mahat yajña--_yajña ādeḥ_ādi karmaṇaḥ_karman sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa tyāgaḥ_tyāga na_na upapadyate_upapad ātma--_ātman uddeśāt_uddeśa viśīrṇa--_viśṛ ādi--_ādi vat_vat antargata--_antargam jñānasya_jñāna tasya_tad mocaka--_mocaka tvāt_tva dehayātrā--_dehayātrā sādhaka--_sādhaka tvāt_tva ca_ca tad--_tad tyāgaḥ_tyāga na_na yuktaḥ_yuj tena_tena hi_hi devatā--_devatā bhagavat--_bhagavant vibhūtiḥ_vibhūti arcatām_arc tad--_tad śeṣaiḥ_śeṣa pūtaiḥ_pū siddhā_sidh deha--_deha yātrā_yātrā tattva--_tattva jñānāya_jñāna sampadyate_sampad vaiparītye_vaiparītya pūrvam_pūrvam abhihitam_abhidhā kuru_kṛ karma_karman tvam_tvad iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi tasya_tad api_api mohāt_moha bandhakam_bandhaka idam_idam iti_iti ajñānāt_ajñāna paritas_paritas sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa tyāgaḥ_tyāga tāmasaḥ_tāmasa bhavati_bhū mohasya_moha tamaḥ--_tamas dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva
BhG 18.8

lg.l: duḥkham_duḥkha iti_iti eva_eva yat_yad karma_karman kāya--_kāya kleśa--_kleśa bhayāt_bhaya tyajet_tyaj
sa_tad kṛtvā_kṛ rājasam_rājasa tyāgam_tyāga na_na eva_eva tyāga--_tyāga phalam_phala labhet_labh

div.p: āha_ah yaḥ_yad kartā_kartṛ ātma--_ātman bodham_bodha vinā_vinā kevalam_kevala duḥkham_duḥkha iti_iti evam_evam matvā_man śarīra--_śarīra āyāsa--_āyāsa bhayāt_bhaya nityam_nityam karma_karman tyajet_tyaj iti_iti yat_yad tādṛśaḥ_tādṛśa tyāgaḥ_tyāga rājasaḥ_rājasa duḥkhasya_duḥkha rājasa--_rājasa tvāt_tva atas_atas tam_tad rājasam_rājasa tyāgam_tyāga kṛtvā_kṛ sa_tad rājasaḥ_rājasa puruṣaḥ_puruṣa tyāgasya_tyāga phalam_phala jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā--_niṣṭhā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa na_na eva_eva labhate_labh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

yadi_yadi api_api nitya--_nitya karmaṇām_karman āvaśyakam_āvaśyaka eva_eva tad--_tad karaṇe_karaṇa guṇaḥ_guṇa eva_eva na_na tu_tu doṣaḥ_doṣa iti_iti jānāmi_jñā eva_eva tat_tad apii_api i_i taiḥ_tad śarīram_śarīra mayā_mad katham_katham vṛthā_vṛthak kleśayitavyam_kleśay iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva tyāga--_tyāga phalam_phala jñānam_jñāna na_na labheta_labh

tyajet_tyaj sa_tad tyāgaḥ_tyāga rājasaḥ_rājasa duḥkhasya_duḥkha rajaḥ--_rajas dharma--_dharma tvāt_tva tam_tad tyāgam_tyāga kṛtvā_kṛ api_api janaḥ_jana tasya_tad phalam_phala jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā na_na labheta_labh
BhG 18.9

lg.l: kāryam_kārya iti_iti eva_eva yat_yad karma_karman niyatam_niyatam kriyate_kṛ irjuna_irjuna
saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj phalam_phala ca_ca eva_eva sa_tad tyāgaḥ_tyāga sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika mataḥ_man

div.p: āha_ah kriyate_kṛ
div.l: labheta_labh
bhavati_bhū kriyate_kṛ

lg.l: na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ akuśalam_akuśala karma_karman kuśale_kuśala na_na anuṣajjate_anuṣañj
tyāgī_tyāgin sattva--_sattva samāviṣṭaḥ_samāviś medhāvī_medhāvin chinna--_chid saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya

div.p:
āha_ah dveṣṭi_dviṣ sattva--_sattva samāviṣṭaḥ_samāviś sattvena_sattva saṃvyāptaḥ_saṃvyāp sāttvika--_sāttvika tyāgī_tyāgin akuśalam_akuśala duḥkha--_duḥkha āvaham_āvaha śiśire_śiśira prātaḥsnāna--_prātaḥsnāna ādikam_ādika karma_karman na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ kuśale_kuśala ca_ca sukha--_sukha kare_kara karmaṇi_karman nidāghe_nidāgha madhyāhna--_madhyāhna snāna--_snāna ādau_ādi na_na anuṣajjate_anuṣañj prītim_prīti na_na karoti_kṛ hetuḥ_hetu medhāvī_medhāvin sthira--_sthira buddhiḥ_buddhi yatra_yatra para--_para paribhava--_paribhava ādi_ādi mahat_mahat api_api duḥkham_duḥkha sahate_sah svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi sukham_sukha ca_ca tyajati_tyaj tatra_tatra kiyat_kiyat etat_etad tātkālikam_tātkālika sukham_sukha duḥkham_duḥkha ca_ca iti_iti evam_evam anusandhānavān_anusandhānavat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ataeva_ataeva chinnaḥ_chid saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya mithyā_mithyā jñānam_jñāna
daihika--_daihika sukha--_sukha duḥkhayoḥ_duḥkha upāditsā--_upāditsā parijihīrṣā--_parijihīrṣā lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa yasya_yad saḥ_tad
āha_ah dveṣṭi_dviṣ dveṣṭi_dviṣ

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva sāttvika--_sāttvika tyāginaḥ_tyāgin lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa āha_ah dveṣṭi_dviṣ iti_iti akuśalam_akuśala duḥkha--_duḥkha dam_da hemanta--_hemanta prātar_prātar snāna--_snāna ādi_ādi na_na dveṣṭi_dviṣ kuśale_kuśala sukha--_sukha de_da nidāgha--_nidāgha madhyāhne_madhyāhna snāna--_snāna ādau_ādi na_na sajjate_sañj yatas_yatas sattva--_sattva samāviṣṭaḥ_samāviś atidhāraḥ_atidhāra medhāvī_medhāvin sthira--_sthira dhīḥ_dhī chinnaḥ_chid vihitāni_vidhā karmāṇi_karman kleśa--_kleśa anuṣṭhitāni_anuṣṭhā jñānam_jñāna janayeyuḥ_janay na_na vā_vā iti_iti evam_evam lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya yena_yad saḥ_tad īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa sāttvika--_sāttvika tyāgī_tyāgin bodhyaḥ_budh

lg.l: na_na hi_hi dehabhṛtā_dehabhṛt śakyam_śakya tyaktum_tyaj karmāṇi_karman aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas
yaḥ_yad tu_tu karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgī_tyāgin sa_tad tyāgī_tyāgin iti_iti abhidhīyate_abhidhā

div.p: tathā_tathā sati_as karma--_karman vikṣepa--_vikṣepa abhāvena_abhāva jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā sukham_sukha sampadyate_sampad tatra_tatra āha_ah na_na hi_hi iti_iti deha--_deha bhṛtā_bhṛt deha--_deha ātma--_ātman abhimānavatā_abhimānavat niḥśeṣeṇa_niḥśeṣa sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman tyaktum_tyaj na_na hi_hi cākyam_cakya tat_tad uktam_vac na_na hi_hi kaścid_kaścit kṣaṇam_kṣaṇa api_api jātu_jātu tiṣṭhati_sthā akarma--_akarman kṛt_kṛt iti_iti ādinā_ādi tasmāt_tasmāt yaḥ_yad tu_tu karmāṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ api_api karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgī_tyāgin saḥ_tad eva_eva mukhaḥ_mukha tyāgī_tyāgin iti_iti abhidhīyate_abhidhā
āha_ah tiṣṭhati_sthā

āha_ah deha--_deha bhṛtā_bhṛt karmāṇi_karman aśeṣatas_aśeṣatas tyaktum_tyaj na_na hi_hi śakyam_śakya na_na śakyāni_śakya yat_yad uktam_vac na_na hi_hi kaścid_kaścit kṣaṇam_kṣaṇa api_api ityādi_ityādi tasmāt_tasmāt yaḥ_yad karmāṇi_karman kurvan_kṛ eva_eva tad--_tad phala--_phala tyāgaḥ_tyāga saḥ_tad eva_eva tyāgī_tyāgin iti_iti ucyate_vac tathā_tathā ca_ca saniṣṭhaḥ_saniṣṭha adhikārī_adhikārin kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa phala--_phala icchā--_icchā śūnyaḥ_śūnya yathā_yathā śakti_śakti sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman jñāna--_jñāna arthī_arthin san_as kuryāt_kṛ iti_iti pārtha--_pārtha sāratheḥ_sārathi matam_mata

lg.l: aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa iṣṭam_iṣ miśram_miśra ca_ca trividham_trividha karmaṇaḥ_karman phalam_phala
bhavati_bhū atyāginām_atyāgin pretya_pre na_na tu_tu saṃnyāsinām_saṃnyāsin kvacid_kvacid

div.p:
āha_ah aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa nāraki--_nārakin tvam_tva iṣṭam_yaj deva--_deva tvam_tva miśram_miśra manuṣya--_manuṣya tvam_tva evam_evam trividham_trividha pāpasya_pāpa puṇyasya_puṇya ca_ca ubhaya--_ubhaya miśrasya_miśra ca_ca karmaṇaḥ_karman yat_yad phalam_phala prasiddham_prasidh tat_tad sarvam_sarva a_a tyāginām_tyāgin sa_sa kāmānām_kāma eva_eva pretya_pre paratra_paratra bhavati_bhū teṣām_tad trividha--_trividha karma--_karman sambhavāt_sambhava na_na tu_tu sannyāsinām_saṃnyāsin kvacid_kvacid api_api bhavati_bhū sannyāsi--_saṃnyāsin śabdena_śabda atra_atra phala--_phala tyāga--_tyāga sāmyāt_sāmya prakṛtāḥ_prakṛ karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāginaḥ_tyāgin api_api gṛhyante_grah anāśritaḥ_anāśrita karma--_karman phalam_phala kāryam_kṛ karma_karman karoti_kṛ yaḥ_yad sa_tad sannyāsī_saṃnyāsin ca_ca yogī_yogin ca_ca iti_iti evam_evam ādau_ādi ca_ca karma--_karman phala--_phala tyāgiṣu_tyāgin sannyāsi--_saṃnyāsin śabda--_śabda yoga--_yoga darśanāt_darśana teṣām_tad sāttvikānām_sāttvika
pāpa--_pāpa asaṃbhavāt_asaṃbhava īśvara--_īśvara arpaṇena_arpaṇa ca_ca puṇya--_puṇya phalasya_phala tyakta--_tyaj tvāt_tva trividham_trividha api_api karma--_karman phalam_phala na_na bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
div.l: āha_ah iṣṭam_iṣ bhavati_bhū
div.p: aha_ah aniṣṭam_aniṣṭa nāraki--_nārakin tvam_tva iṣṭam_yaj svargi--_svargin tvam_tva miśram_miśra manuṣya--_manuṣya tvam_tva duḥkha--_duḥkha sukha--_sukha yogī_yogin iti_iti trividham_trividha karma--_karman phalam_phala atyāginām_atyāgin ukta--_vac tyāga--_tyāga rahitānām_rahita pretya_pre para--_para kāle_kāla bhavati_bhū sannyāsinām_saṃnyāsin ukta--_vac tyāgavatām_tyāgavat teṣām_tad tu_tu karma--_karman antargatena_antargam jñānena_jñāna mokṣaḥ_mokṣa bhavati_bhū iti_iti tyāga--_tyāga phalam_phala uktam_vac

lg.l: pañca_pañcan etāni_etad mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu kāraṇāni_kāraṇa nibodha_nibudh me_mad
sāṃkhye_sāṃkhya kṛtānte_kṛtānta proktāni_pravac siddhaye_siddhi sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman

div.p: kurvataḥ_kṛ bhavet_bhū asti_as āha_ah sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman siddhaye_siddhi niṣpattaye_niṣpatti imāni_idam vakṣyamāṇāni_vac pañca--_pañcan kāraṇāni_kāraṇa me_mad vacanāt_vacana nibodha_nibudh jānīhi_jñā ātmanaḥ_ātman kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhimāna--_abhimāna nivṛtti--_nivṛtti artham_artha avaśyam_avaśyam etāni_etad jñātavyāni_jñā iti_iti evam_evam teṣām_tad stuti--_stuti artham_artha eva_eva āha_ah sāṅkhyaḥ_sāṃkhya iti_iti samyak_samyak khyāyate_khyā jñāyate_jñā paramātmā_paramātman anena_idam iti_iti sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna prakāśamāna--_prakāś ātma--_ātman bodhaḥ_bodha sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya tasmin_tad kṛtam_kṛ karma_karman tasya_tad antaḥ_anta samāptiḥ_samāpti asmin_idam iti_iti sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya kṛtaḥ_kṛ antaḥ_anta nirṇaye_nirṇaya asmin_idam iti_iti kṛta--_kṛ antam_anta sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya śāstram_śāstra eva_eva tasmin_tad proktāni_pravac atas_atas samyak_samyak nibodha_nibudh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

bhavet_bhū sati_as asti_as āha_ah sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman siddhaye_siddhi niṣpattaye_niṣpatti imāni_idam pañca--_pañcan kāraṇāni_kāraṇa me_mad mama_mad vacanāt_vacana nibodha_nibudh jānīhi_jñā samyak_samyak paramātmānam_paramātman khyāti_khyā kathayati_kathay iti_iti saṅkhyam_saṃkhya eva_eva sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya vedānta--_vedānta śāstram_śāstra tasmin_tad kīdṛśe_kīdṛśa kṛtam_kṛ karma_karman tasya_tad antaḥ_anta nāśaḥ_nāśa yasmāt_yasmāt tasmin_tad proktāni_pravac

kurvatām_kṛ syuḥ_as bhavati_bhū āha_ah he_he mahā--_mahat bāho_bāhu sarva--_sarva karmaṇām_karman siddhaye_siddhi niṣpattaye_niṣpatti etāni_etad pañca--_pañcan kāraṇāni_kāraṇa me_mad mattaḥ_mad nibodha_nibudh jānīhi_jñā pramāṇam_pramāṇa āha_ah sāṅkhyaḥ_sāṃkhya iti_iti sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya jñānam_jñāna tad--_tad pratipādakam_pratipādaka vedānta--_vedānta śāstram_śāstra sāṅkhyam_sāṃkhya tasmin_tad kīdṛśī_kīdṛśa iti_iti āha_ah kṛtānte_kṛtānta kṛta--_kṛ nirṇaye_nirṇaya sarveṣām_sarva karma--_karman hetūnām_hetu pravartakaḥ_pravartaka paramātmā_paramātman iti_iti nirṇaya--_nirṇaya kāriṇī_kārin iti_iti arthaḥ_artha antaryāmi--_antaryāmin brahmaṇe_brahman viditam_vid etat_etad iha_iha api_api sarvasya_sarva ca_ca aham_mad hṛdi_hṛd iti_iti ādi_ādi uktam_vac vakṣyate_vac ca_ca īśvaraḥ_īśvara sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta iti_iti ādi_ādi

lg.l: adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna tathā_tathā kartā_kartṛ karaṇam_karaṇa ca_ca pṛthagvidham_pṛthagvidha
vividhāḥ_vividha ca_ca pṛthak_pṛthak ceṣṭāḥ_ceṣṭā daivam_daiva ca_ca eva_eva atra_atra pañcamam_pañcama

div.p: āha_ah adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna śarīram_śarīra kartā_kartṛ cit--_cit acit--_acit granthiḥ_granthi ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra pṛthagvidham_pṛthagvidha aneka--_aneka prakāram_prakāra vividhāḥ_vividha kāryataḥ_kārya svarūpataḥ_svarūpa ca_ca pṛthak_pṛthak bhūta--_bhū ceṣṭā_ceṣṭā prāṇa--_prāṇa apāna--_apāna ādīnām_ādi vyāpārāḥ_vyāpāra atra_atra etat_etad eva_eva pañcamam_pañcama kāraṇam_kāraṇa daivam_daiva

adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna śarīram_śarīra kartā_kartṛ cit--_cit jaḍa--_jaḍa granthiḥ_granthi ahaṅkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra karaṇam_karaṇa cakṣuḥ--_cakṣus śrotra--_śrotra ādi_ādi pṛthagvidham_pṛthagvidha aneka--_aneka prakāram_prakāra pṛthak_pṛthak ceṣṭā_ceṣṭā prāṇa--_prāṇa apāna--_apāna ādīnām_ādi pṛthak_pṛthak vyāpārāḥ_vyāpāra daivam_daiva sarva--_sarva prerakaḥ_preraka antaryāmī_antaryāmin ca_ca

adhiṣṭhīyate_adhiṣṭhā jīvena_jīva iti_iti adhiṣṭhānam_adhiṣṭhāna śarīram_śarīra kartā_kartṛ jīvaḥ_jīva asya_idam jñātṛ--_jñātṛ tva--_tva kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva śrutiḥ_śruti āha_ah eṣa_etad hi_hi draṣṭā_draṣṭṛ sraṣṭā_sraṣṭṛ iti_iti ādinā_ādi sūtra--_sūtra kāraḥ_kāra ca_ca jñaḥ_jña atas_atas eva_eva iti_iti kartā_kartṛ śāstra--_śāstra arthavat--_arthavat tvāt_tva iti_iti ādi_ādi ca_ca karaṇam_karaṇa śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi sa_sa manaskam_manaska pṛthag-vidham_pṛthagvidha karma--_karman niṣpattau_niṣpatti pṛthak_pṛthak vyāpāram_vyāpāra vividhā_vividha ca_ca pṛthak_pṛthak ceṣṭā_ceṣṭā prāṇa--_prāṇa apāna--_apāna ādīnām_ādi nānā_nānā vidhā_vidha pṛthak_pṛthak vyāpārāḥ_vyāpāra daivam_daiva ca_ca iti_iti atra_atra karma--_karman niṣpādake_niṣpādaka hetu--_hetu pracaye_pracaya daivam_daiva sarva--_sarva ārādhyam_ārādhay param_para brahma_brahman pañcamam_pañcama karma--_karman niṣpattau_niṣpatti antaryāmī_antaryāmin hariḥ_hari mukhyaḥ_mukhya hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti arthaḥ_artha deha--_deha indriya--_indriya prāṇa--_prāṇa jīva--_jīva upakaraṇaḥ_upakaraṇa asau_adas karma--_karman pravartakaḥ_pravartaka iti_iti niścayavatām_niścayavat karma_karman tad--_tad phaleṣu_phala kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa spṛhā--_spṛhā virahitānām_virahita karmāṇi_karman na_na bandhakāni_bandhaka iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu jīvasya_jīva kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva pareśa--_pareśa āyatte_āyat sati_as tasya_tad karma_karman sva--_sva niyojya--_niyojay tva--_tva āpattiḥ_āpatti kāṣṭha--_kāṣṭha ādi--_ādi tulya--_tulya tvāt_tva vidhi--_vidhi niṣedha--_niṣedha śāstrāṇi_śāstra vyarthāni_vyartha syuḥ_as sva--_sva dhiyā_dhī pravartitum_pravṛt na_na śaktaḥ_śak niyojyaḥ_niyojay dṛṣṭaḥ_dṛś ucyate_vac --pareśena_pareśa dattaiḥ_dā deha--_deha indriya--_indriya ādibhiḥ_ādi tena_tad eva_eva āhita--_ādhā śaktibhiḥ_śakti tad--_tad ādhāra--_ādhāra bhūtaḥ_bhū jīvaḥ_jīva tad--_tad āhita--_ādhā śaktibhiḥ_śakti tad--_tad ādhāra--_ādhāra bhūtaḥ_bhū jīvaḥ_jīva tad--_tad āhita--_ādhā śaktikaḥ_śaktika san_as karma--_karman siddhaye_siddhi sva--_sva pareśaḥ_pareśa tu_tu tad--_tad sarva--_sarva antar_antar sthaḥ_stha tasmin_tad anumatim_anumati dadānaḥ_dā tam_tad prerayati_preray iti_iti jīvasya_jīva sva--_sva dhiyā_dhī pravṛtti--_pravṛtti nivṛttimat--_nivṛttimat tvam_tva asti_as iti_iti na_na kiñcid_kaścit codyam_codya evam_evam eva_eva sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra niṛṇītavān_niṛch parāt_para tat_tad tat_tad śakteḥ_śakti iti_iti ādinā_ādi nanu_nanu muktasya_muc jīvasya_jīva kartṛ--_kartṛ tvam_tva na_na syāt_as tasya_tad deha--_deha indriya--_indriya prāṇānām_prāṇa
vigamāt_vigama iti_iti ced_ced na_na tadā_tadā saṅkalpa--_saṃkalpa siddhānām_sidh divyānām_divya teṣām_tad sattvāt_sattva

lg.l: śarīra--_śarīra vāc--_vāc manobhiḥ_manas yat_yad karma_karman prārabhate_prārabh naraḥ_nara
nyāyyam_nyāyya vā_vā viparītam_viparīta vā_vā pañca_pañcan ete_etad tasya_tad hetavaḥ_hetu

div.p: āha_ah yathā_yathā uktaiḥ_vac pañcabhiḥ_pañcan prārabhyamānam_prārabh karma_karman triṣu_tri eva_eva antarbhāvyam_antarbhāvay śarīra--_śarīra vāc--_vāc manobhiḥ_manas iti_iti uktam_vac śārīram_śārīra vācikam_vācika mānasam_mānasa ca_ca trividham_trividha karma_karman iti_iti prasiddheḥ_prasiddhi śarīra--_śarīra ādibhiḥ_ādi yat_yad karma_karman dharmyam_dharmya adharmyam_adharmya vā_vā karoti_kṛ naraḥ_nara tasya_tad karmaṇaḥ_karman ete_etad pañca_pañcan hetavaḥ_hetu
div.l: śarīra--_śarīra iti_iti nyāyyam_nyāyya śāstrīyam_śāstrīya viparītam_viparīta aśāstrīyam_aśāstrīya

lg.l: tatra_tatra evam_evam sati_as kartāram_kartṛ ātmānam_ātman kevalam_kevalam tu_tu yaḥ_yad
paśyati_dṛś akṛtabuddhi--_akṛtabuddhi tvāt_tva na_na sa_tad paśyati_dṛś durmatiḥ_durmati

div.p: āha_ah sarvasmin_sarva karmaṇi_karman ete_etad pañca_pañcan hetavaḥ_hetu evam_evam sati_as kevalam_kevala nirupādhim_nirupādhi asaṅgam_asaṅga ātmānam_ātman tu_tu yaḥ_yad kartāram_kartṛ paśyati_paś śāstra--_śāstra ācārya--_ācārya upadeśābhyām_upadeśa asaṃskṛta--_asaṃskṛta buddhi--_buddhi tvāt_tva durmatiḥ_durmati asau_adas samyak_samyak na_na paśyati_dṛś

āha_ah tatra_tatra sarvasmin_sarva karmaṇi_karman ete_etad pañca_pañcan eva_eva hetavaḥ_hetu iti_iti evam_evam sati_as kevalam_kevala vastutas_vastutas niḥsaṅgam_niḥsaṅga eva_eva ātmānam_ātman jīvam_jīva yaḥ_yad kartāram_kartṛ paśyati_dṛś saḥ_tad ahaṅkṛta--_ahaṃkṛta buddhi--_buddhi tvāt_tva asaṃskṛta--_asaṃskṛta buddhi--_buddhi tvāt_tva durmatiḥ_durmati na_na eva_eva saḥ_tad ajñānī_ajñānin andaḥ_anda eva_eva ucyate_vac iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

āha_ah tatra_tatra iti_iti evam_evam sati_as jīvasya_jīva kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva pareśa--_pareśa anumati--_anumati pūrvake_pūrvaka tad--_tad datta--_dā deha--_deha ādi--_ādi sāpekṣe_sāpekṣa ca_ca sati_as tatra_tatra karmaṇi_karman kevalam_kevala eva_eva ātmānam_ātman jīvam_jīva eva_eva yaḥ_yad kartāram_kartṛ paśyati_paś sa_tad durmatiḥ_durmati akṛta--_akṛta buddhi--_buddhi tvāt_tva alabdha--_alabdha jñāna--_jñāna tvāt_tva na_na paśyati_dṛś yathā_yathā andhaḥ_andha

lg.l: yasya_yad na_na ahaṃkṛtaḥ_ahaṃkṛta bhāvaḥ_bhāva buddhiḥ_buddhi yasya_yad na_na lipyate_lip
hatvā_han api_api saḥ_tad imān_idam lokān_loka na_na hanti_han na_na nibadhyate_nibandh

div.p: asti_as āha_ah aham_mad iti_iti kṛtaḥ_kṛ aham_mad kartā_kartṛ iti_iti evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta bhāvaḥ_bhāva yat_yad vai_vai ahaṅkṛtaḥ_ahaṃkṛt ahaṅkārasya_ahaṃkāra bhāvaḥ_bhāva svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa yasya_yad na_na asti_as śarīra--_śarīra ādīnām_ādi eva_eva karma--_karman kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva ālocanāt_ālocanā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ataeva_ataeva yasya_yad buddhiḥ_buddhi na_na lipyate_lip iṣṭa--_iṣ aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa buddhyā_buddhi karmasu_karman na_na sajjate_sañj na_na evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta deha--_deha ādi--_ādi vyatirikta--_vyatiric ātma--_ātman darśī_darśin imān_idam lokān_loka sarvān_sarva api_api prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin loka--_loka dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi hatvā_han api_api viviktatayā_viviktatā sva--_sva dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi na_na hanti_han na_na tad--_tad phalaiḥ_phala nibadhyate_nibandh bandham_bandha na_na prāpnoti_prāp kim_ka punar_punar sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi dvārā_dvār parokṣa--_parokṣa jñāna--_jñāna utpatti--_utpatti hetubhiḥ_hetu karmabhiḥ_karman tasya_tad baddha--_bandh śaṅkā_śaṅkā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad uktam_vac brahmaṇi_brahman ādhāya_ādhā karmāṇi_karman saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj karoti_kṛ yaḥ_yad lipyate_lip na_na sa_tad pāpena_pāpa padma--_padma patram_pattra iva_iva ambhasā_ambhas gītā--_gītā

Viśvanāthaḥ_Viśvanātha kaḥ_ka tarhi_tarhi sumatiḥ_sumati cakṣuṣmān_cakṣuṣmat iti_iti atas_atas āha_ah yasya_yad iti_iti ahaṅkṛtaḥ_ahaṃkṛt ahaṅkārasya_ahaṃkāra bhāvaḥ_bhāva svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa yasya_yad na_na asti_as ataeva_ataeva yasya_yad buddhiḥ_buddhi na_na lipyate_lip iṣṭa--_iṣ aniṣṭa--_aniṣṭa buddhyā_buddhi karmasu_karman na_na āsajjati_āsañj sa_tad hi_hi karma--_karman phalam_phala na_na prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti kim_ka sa_tad hi_hi karma_karman bhadra--_bhadra abhadram_abhadra kurvan_kṛ api_api na_na eva_eva karoti_kṛ iti_iti āha_ah hatvā_han api_api iti_iti saḥ_tad imān_idam sarvān_sarva api_api prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin loka--_loka dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi hatvā_han api_api sva--_sva dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi na_na eva_eva hanti_han nirabhisandhi--_nirabhisandhi tvāt_tva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva atas_atas na_na badhyate_bandh karma--_karman phalam_phala na_na prāpnoti_prāp iti_iti

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva kaḥ_ka tarhi_tarhi cakṣuṣmān_cakṣuṣmat sumatiḥ_sumati tatra_tatra āha_ah yasya_yad iti_iti yasya_yad puruṣasya_puruṣa manaḥ--_manas vṛtti--_vṛtti lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa bhāvaḥ_bhāva na_na ahaṅkṛtaḥ_ahaṃkṛta sva--_sva kartṛ--_kartṛ tve_tva pareśa--_pareśa āyatte_āyat anusandhite_anusaṃdhā sati_as karmāṇi_karman aham_mad eva_eva karomi_kṛ iti_iti abhimāna--_abhimāna kṛtaḥ_kṛ na_na bhavet_bhū yasya_yad ca_ca buddhiḥ_buddhi na_na lipyate_lip karma--_karman phala--_phala spṛhayā_spṛhā saḥ_tad imān_idam lokān_loka na_na kevalam_kevala bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādīn_ādi hatvā_han api_api na_na hanti_han na_na ca_ca tena_tad sarva--_sarva loka--_loka hananena_hanana karmaṇā_karman nibadhyate_nibandh lipyate_lip

lg.l: jñānam_jñāna jñeyam_jñā parijñātā_parijñātṛ trividhā_trividha karma--_karman codanā_codana
karaṇam_karaṇa karma_karman kartā_kartṛ iti_iti trividhaḥ_trividha karma--_karman saṃgrahaḥ_saṃgraha

div.p: hanti_han nibadhyate_nibandh asti_as āha_ah jñānam_jñāna iti_iti jñānam_jñāna iṣṭa--_iṣ sādhanam_sādhana etat_etad iti_iti bodhaḥ_bodha jñeyam_jñā iṣṭa--_iṣ sādhanam_sādhana karma_karman parijñātā_parijñā evambhūta--_evambhūta jñāna--_jñāna āśrayaḥ_āśraya evam_evam trividhā_trividha karma--_karman codanā_codana codyate_coday pravartyate_pravartay anayā_idam iti_iti codanā_codana yat_yat vā_vā codanā_codana iti_iti vidhiḥ_vidhi ucyate_vac tat_tad uktam_vac bhaṭṭaiḥ_bhaṭṭa codanā_codana ca_ca upadeśaḥ_upadeśa ca_ca vidhiḥ_vidhi ca_ca eka--_eka artha--_artha vācinaḥ_vācin iti_iti tatas_tatas ca_ca ayam_idam arthaḥ_artha ukta--_vac lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmakam_ātmaka jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi trayam_traya avalambhya_avalambhay karma--_karman vidhiḥ_vidhi pravartate_pravṛt iti_iti tat_tad uktam_vac traiguṇya--_traiguṇya viṣayāḥ_viṣaya vedāḥ_veda iti_iti tathā_tathā ca_ca karaṇam_karaṇa sādhakatamam_sādhakatama karma_karman ca_ca kartuḥ_kartṛ īpsitatamam_īpsitatama karma_karman saṅgṛhyate_saṃgrah asmin_idam iti_iti karma--_karman saṅgrahaḥ_saṃgraha karaṇa--_karaṇa ādi_ādi trividham_trividha kārakam_kāraka kriyā--_kriyā āśrayaḥ_āśraya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sampradāna--_sampradāna ādi_ādi kāraka--_kāraka trayam_traya tu_tu parasparayā_paraspara kriyā--_kriyā eva_eva kevalam_kevala kriyāyām_kriyā āśrayaḥ_āśraya atas_atas karaṇa--_karaṇa ādi--_ādi trayam_traya eva_eva kriyā--_kriyā āśrayaḥ_āśraya iti_iti uktam_vac
avagamyate_avagam

ājñāya_ājñā eva_eva guṇān_guṇa doṣān_doṣa mayā_mad ādiṣṭān_ādiś api_api svakān_svaka dharmān_dharma santyajya_saṃtyaj yaḥ_yad sarvān_sarva
mām_mad bhajet_bhaj sa_tad ca_ca sattamaḥ_sattama

asya_idam arthaḥ_artha svāmi--_svāmin caraṇaiḥ_caraṇa vyākhyātaḥ_vyākhyā yathā_yathā mayā_mad veda--_veda rūpeṇa_rūpa ādiṣṭān_ādiś api_api svadharmān_svadharma santyajya_saṃtyaj yaḥ_yad mām_mad bhajet_bhaj sa_tad ca_ca sattamaḥ_sattama iti_iti kim_kim ajñānataḥ_ajñāna nāstikyāt_nāstikya vā_vā na_na dharma--_dharma ācaraṇe_ācaraṇa sattva--_sattva śuddhi--_śuddhi ādīn_ādi guṇān_guṇa vipakṣe_vipakṣa doṣān_doṣa pratyavāyān_pratyavāya ca_ca a_a jñāya_jñā jñātvā_jñā api_api mad--_mad dhyāna--_dhyāna vikṣepatayā_vikṣepatā mad--_mad bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva sarvam_sarva bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti dṛḍha--_dṛḍha dharmān_dharma dharma--_dharma phalāni_phala santyajya_saṃtyaj iti_iti tu_tu vyākhyā_vyākhyā na_na ghaṭate_ghaṭ na_na hi_hi dharma--_dharma phala--_phala tyāge_tyāga kaścid_kaścit atra_atra pratyavāyaḥ_pratyavāya bhavet_bhū iti_iti avadheyam_avadhā ayam_idam bhāvaḥ_bhāva bhagavat--_bhagavant vākyānām_vākya tad--_tad vyākhyātṝṇām_vyākhyātṛ ca_ca jñānam_jñāna hi_hi citta--_citta śuddhim_śuddhi avaśyam_avaśyam eva_eva apekṣate_apekṣ niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karmabhiḥ_karman citta--_citta śuddhi--_śuddhi tāratamye_tāratamya vṛtte_vṛt eva_eva jñāna--_jñāna udaya--_udaya tāratamyam_tāratamya bhavet_bhū na_na anyathā_anyathā ataeva_ataeva samyak_samyak jñāna--_jñāna udaya--_udaya siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha sannyāsibhiḥ_saṃnyāsin api_api niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma_karman na_na kartavyam_kṛ eva_eva yat_yad uktam_vac

ārurukṣoḥ_ārurukṣu muneḥ_muni yogam_yoga karma_karman kāraṇam_kāraṇa ucyate_vac yoga--_yoga ārūḍhasya_āruh tasā_tasā eva_eva
śamaḥ_śama kāraṇam_kāraṇa ucyate_vac

yaḥ_yad tu_tu ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati eva_eva syāt_as ātma--_ātman tṛptaḥ_tṛp ca_ca mānavaḥ_mānava ātmani_ātman eva_eva ca_ca santuṣṭaḥ_saṃtuṣ
tasya_tad kāryam_kārya na_na vidyate_vid
bhaktiḥ_bhakti tu_tu paramā_parama svatantrā_svatantra mahā--_mahat prabalā_prabala citta--_citta śuddhim_śuddhi na_na eva_eva apekṣate_apekṣ yat_yad uktam_vac

vikrīḍitam_vikrīḍ vraja--_vraja vadhūbhiḥ_vadhū idam_idam ca_ca viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu śraddhā--_śraddhā anvitaḥ_anvita yaḥ_yad śṛṇuyāt_śru iti_iti ādau_ādi bhaktim_bhakti parām_para bhagavati_bhagavant parilabhya_parilabh kāmam_kāma
hṛd--_hṛd rogam_roga āśu_āśu apahinoti_apahi acireṇa_acireṇa dhīraḥ_dhīra

atra_atra tu_tu ātma--_ātman pratyayeṇa_pratyaya hṛd--_hṛd rogavattve_rogavattva vā_vā adhikāriṇi_adhikārin paramāyāḥ_parama bhakteḥ_bhakti api_api prathamam_prathamam eva_eva praveśaḥ_praveśa tatas_tatas tatra_tatra eva_eva kāma--_kāma ādīnām_ādi apagamaḥ_apagama ca_ca tathā_tathā

lg.l: praviṣṭaḥ_praviś karṇa--_karṇa randhreṇa_randhra
svānām_sva bhāva--_bhāva saroruham_saroruha
dhunoti_dhū śamalam_śamala kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa
salilasya_salila yathā_yathā śarad_śarad

div.p: iti_iti ca_ca iti_iti atas_atas bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva yadi_yadi tādṛśī_tādṛśa citta--_citta śuddhiḥ_śuddhi syāt_as tadā_tadā bhaktaiḥ_bhakta katham_katham karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ iti_iti

atha_atha prakṛam_prakṛ anusarāmaḥ_anusṛ kim_ka ca_ca na_na kevalam_kevala deha--_deha ādi--_ādi vyātiriktasya_vyātiric ātmanaḥ_ātman jñānam_jñāna eva_eva jñānam_jñāna tathā_tathā ātma--_ātman tattvam_tattva api_api jñeyam_jñā tādṛśa--_tādṛśa jñāna--_jñāna āśrayaḥ_āśraya eva_eva jñānī_jñānin kintu_kiṃtu etat_etad trike_trika karma--_karman sambandhaḥ_sambandha tat_tad api_api sannyāsibhiḥ_saṃnyāsin jñeyam_jñā iti_iti āha_ah jñānam_jñāna iti_iti atra_atra codanā_codanā śabdena_śabda vidhiḥ_vidhi ucyate_vac yat_yad uktam_vac bhaṭṭaiḥ_bhaṭṭa codanā_codanā ca_ca upadeśaḥ_upadeśa ca_ca vidhiḥ_vidhi ca_ca eka--_eka artha--_artha vācinaḥ_vācin iti_iti uktam_vac śloka--_śloka ardham_ardha svayam_svayam eva_eva vyācaṣṭe_vyācakṣ karaṇam_karaṇa iti_iti yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tat_tad karaṇa--_karaṇa kārakam_kāraka jñāyate_jñā anena_idam iti_iti jñānam_jñāna iti_iti vyutpatteḥ_vyutpatti yat_yad jñeyam_jñā jīvātma--_jīvātman tattvam_tattva tat_tad eva_eva karma--_karman kārakam_kāraka yaḥ_yad tasya_tad parijñātā_parijñātṛ sa_tad kartā_kartṛ iti_iti trividhaḥ_trividha karaṇam_karaṇa karma_karman kartā_kartṛ iti_iti trividham_trividha kārakam_kāraka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha
saṅgṛhyate_saṃgrah

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva jñāna--_jñāna kāṇḍa--_kāṇḍa vat_vat karma--_karman kāṇḍe_kāṇḍa api_api jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi trayam_traya asti_as tat_tad ca_ca saniṣṭhena_saniṣṭha karmaṭhena_karmaṭha bodhyam_budh iti_iti upadiśati_upadiś jñānam_jñāna iti_iti jñānam_jñāna jñeyam_jñā parijñātā_parijñātṛ iti_iti evam_evam trika--_trika yuktā_yuj karma--_karman codanā_codana jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādi--_ādi karma--_karman vidhiḥ_vidhi codanā_codana ca_ca upadeśaḥ_upadeśa ca_ca vidhiḥ_vidhi ca_ca eka--_eka artha--_artha vācinaḥ_vācin iti_iti abhiyukta--_abhiyuj ukteḥ_ukti tat_tad trikam_trika svayam_svayam eva_eva vyākhyāti_vyākhyā karaṇam_karaṇa iti_iti yat_yad jñānam_jñāna tat_tad karaṇam_karaṇa jñāyate_jñā anena_idam iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti karaṇa--_karaṇa kārakam_kāraka iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad jñeyam_jñā kartavyam_kṛ jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādi_ādi tat_tad karma--_karman kārakam_kāraka yaḥ_yad tu_tu tasya_tad paritas_paritas anuṣṭhānena_anuṣṭhāna jñātā_jñātṛ sa_tad kartā_kartṛ iti_iti kartṛ--_kartṛ kārakam_kāraka evam_evam karma--_karman saṅgrahaḥ_saṃgraha jyotiṣṭoma--_jyotiṣṭoma ādi_ādi karma--_karman vidhiḥ_vidhi trividhaḥ_trividha karaṇa--_karaṇa ādi--_ādi kāraka--_kāraka traya--_traya sādhyaḥ_sādhay codanā--_codana saṅgraha--_saṃgraha śabdayoḥ_śabda aikya--_aikya arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: jñānam_jñāna karma_karman ca_ca kartā_kartṛ ca_ca tridhā_tridhā eva_eva guṇa--_guṇa bhedataḥ_bheda
procyate_pravac guṇa--_guṇa saṃkhyāne_saṃkhyāna yathāvat_yathāvat śṛṇu_śru tāni_tad api_api

div.p: āha_ah guṇāḥ_guṇa samyak_samyak kārya--_kārya bhedena_bheda khyāyate_khyā pratipādyante_pratipāday asmin_idam iti_iti guṇa--_guṇa saṅkhyānam_saṃkhyāna sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya śāstram_śāstra tasmin_tad jñānam_jñāna ca_ca karma_karman ca_ca kartā_kartṛ ca_ca pratyekam_pratyekam sattva--_sattva ādi--_ādi guṇa--_guṇa bhedena_bheda tridhā_tridhā eva_eva ucyate_vac tāni_tad api_api jñāna--_jñāna ādīni_ādi vakṣyamāṇāni_vac yathāvat_yathāvat śṛṇu_śru tridhā_tridhā eva_eva iti_iti eva_eva kāraḥ_kāra guṇa--_guṇa traya--_traya upādhi--_upādhi vyatirekeṇa_vyatireka ātmanaḥ_ātman svatas_svatas karmāṇi_karman pratiṣedha--_pratiṣedha arthaḥ_artha caturdeśe_caturdeśa adhyāye_adhyāya tatra_tatra sattvam_sattva nirmala--_nirmala tvāt_tva iti_iti ādinā_ādi guṇānām_guṇa bandhaka--_bandhaka tva--_tva prakāraḥ_prakāra nirūpitaḥ_nirūpay saptadaśe_saptadaśa adhyāye_adhyāya yajante_yaj sāttvikāḥ_sāttvika devān_deva iti_iti ādinā_ādi guṇa--_guṇa kṛta--_kṛ trividha--_trividha svabhāva--_svabhāva nirūpaṇena_nirūpaṇa rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas svabhāvam_svabhāva parityajya_parityaj sāttvika--_sāttvika āhāra--_āhāra ādi--_ādi sevayā_sevā sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva sampādanīyaḥ_sampāday iti_iti uktam_vac iha_iha tu_tu kriyā--_kriyā kāraka--_kāraka phala--_phala ādīnām_ādi ātma--_ātman sambandhaḥ_sambandha na_na asti_as iti_iti darśayitum_darśay sarveṣām_sarva triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmaka--_ātmaka tvam_tva ucyate_vac iti_iti viśeṣaḥ_viśeṣa jñātavyaḥ_jñā
iha_iha tu_tu guṇa--_guṇa saṃjñānām_saṃjñā jñāna--_jñāna ādīnām_ādi traividhyam_traividhya ucyate_vac iti_iti bodhyam_budh

lg.l: sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta yena_yad ekam_eka bhāvam_bhāva avyayam_avyaya īkṣate_īkṣ
avibhaktam_avibhakta vibhakteṣu_vibhaj tat_tad jñānam_jñāna viddhi_vid sāttvikam_sāttvika

div.p: āha_ah sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi sthāvarāḥ_sthāvara teṣu_tad vibhakteṣu_vibhaj parasparam_paraspara vyavṛtteṣu_vivṛt avibhaktam_avibhakta anusyutam_anuṣyu ekam_eka avyayam_avyaya nirvikāram_nirvikāra bhāvam_bhāva paramātma--_paramātman tattvam_tattva yena_yad jñānena_jñāna īkṣate_īkṣ ālocayati_ālocay tat_tad jñānam_jñāna

āha_ah ekam_eka bhāvam_bhāva ekam_eka eva_eva jīvātmānam_jīvātman nānā_nānā vidha--_vidha phala--_phala bhoga--_bhoga artham_artha krameṇa_krameṇa sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta manuṣya--_manuṣya deva--_deva tiryak--_tiryañc ādiṣu_ādi vartamānam_vṛt avyayam_avyaya naśvareṣu_naśvara api_api teṣu_tad anaśvaram_anaśvara vibhakteṣu_vibhaj parasparam_paraspara vibhinneṣu_vibhid api_api karma--_karman sambandhinā_sambandhin jñānena_jñāna īkṣate_īkṣ tat_tad sāttvikam_sāttvika jñānam_jñāna

aha_ah sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta deva--_deva manuṣya--_manuṣya ādiṣu_ādi deheṣu_deha nānā_nānā karma--_karman phala--_phala bhogāt_bhoga krameṇa_krameṇa vartamāna--_vṛt bhāvam_bhāva jīvātmānam_jīvātman yena_yad ekam_eka vīkṣyate_vīkṣ avyayam_avyaya naśvareṣu_naśvara teṣu_tad anaśvaram_anaśvara vibhakteṣu_vibhaj mithas_mithas bhinneṣu_bhid teṣu_tad avibhaktam_avibhakta eka--_eka rūpam_rūpa ca_ca yena_yad tam_tad vīkṣyate_vīkṣ tat_tad jñānam_jñāna sāttvikam_sāttvika aupaniṣad--_aupaniṣad avivikta--_avivikta ātma--_ātman jñānam_jñāna tat_tad iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: pṛthaktvena_pṛthaktva tu_tu yat_yad jñānam_jñāna nānā_nānā bhāvān_bhāva pṛthagvidhān_pṛthagvidha
vetti_vid sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta tat_tad jñānam_jñāna viddhi_vid rājasam_rājasa

div.p: āha_ah pṛthaktvena_pṛthaktva tu_tu yat_yad jñānam_jñāna iti_iti asya_idam eva_eva vivaraṇam_vivaraṇa sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta nānā_nānā bhāvān_bhāva vastutas_vastutas eva_eva anekān_aneka kṣetrajñān_kṣetrajña pṛthagvidhān_pṛthagvidha sukhitva--_sukhitva duḥkhitva--_duḥkhitva ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa vilakṣaṇān_vilakṣaṇa yena_yad jñānena_jñāna vetti_vid tat_tad jñānam_jñāna rājasam_rājasa viddhi_vid

rājasam_rājasa jñānam_jñāna āha_ah sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman pṛthaktvena_pṛthaktva yat_yad jñānam_jñāna deha--_deha nāśaḥ_nāśa eva_eva ātmanaḥ_ātman nāśaḥ_nāśa iti_iti asurāṇām_asura matam_man ataeva_ataeva pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthak_pṛthak deheṣu_deha pṛthak_pṛthak pṛthak_pṛthak eva_eva ātmā_ātman iti_iti tathā_tathā śāstra--_śāstra karaṇāt_karaṇa pṛthagvidhāt_pṛthagvidha nānābhāvān_nānābhāva nānā_nānā abhiprāyān_abhiprāya ātmā_ātman sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha āśrayaḥ_āśraya iti_iti sukha--_sukha duḥkha--_duḥkha ādi--_ādi anāśrayaḥ_anāśraya jaḍaḥ_jaḍa iti_iti cetanaḥ_cetana iti_iti vyāpakaḥ_vyāpaka iti_iti iti_iti anekaḥ_aneka iti_iti ityādi_ityādi kalpān_kalpa yena_yad ekaḥ_eka ityādi_ityādi veda_vid tat_tad rājasam_rājasa

rājasa--_rājasa jñānam_jñāna āha_ah pṛthaktvena_pṛthaktva iti_iti sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta deva--_deva manuṣya--_manuṣya ādi--_ādi deheṣu_deha jīvātmanaḥ_jīvātman pṛthaktvena_pṛthaktva yat_yad jñānam_jñāna deha--_deha vināśaḥ_vināśa eva_eva ātma--_ātman vināśaḥ_vināśa iti_iti yat_yad jñānam_jñāna iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yena_yad ca_ca nānā_nānā vidhān_vidha bhāvān_bhāva abhiprāyān_abhiprāya vetti_vid dehaḥ_deha eva_eva ātmā_ātman iti_iti dehāt_deha anyaḥ_anya deha--_deha parimāṇaḥ_parimāṇa ātmā_ātman iti_iti kṣaṇika--_kṣaṇika vijñānam_vijñāna ātmā_ātman iti_iti nitya--_nitya avajñāna--_avajñāna mātra--_mātra vibhuḥ_vibhu ātmā_ātman iti_iti dehāt_deha anyaḥ_anya nava--_navan viśeṣa--_viśeṣa guṇa--_guṇa āśrayaḥ_āśraya ajaḍaḥ_ajaḍa vibhuḥ_vibhu ātmā_ātman iti_iti evam_evam lokāyatika--_lokāyatika jaina--_jaina bauddha--_bauddha māyi--_māyin tārkika--_tārkika ādi--_ādi vādān_vāda yena_yad jānāti_jñā tat_tad rājasam_rājasa jñānam_jñāna

lg.l: yat_yad tu_tu kṛtsna--_kṛtsna vat_vat ekasmin_eka kārye_kārya saktam_sañj ahetukam_ahetuka
atattva--_atattva arthavat_arthavat alpam_alpa ca_ca tat_tad tāmasam_tāmasa udāhṛtam_udāhṛ

div.p: āha_ah ekasmin_eka kārye_kārya dehe_deha pratimā--_pratimā ādau_ādi yā_yad kṛtsna--_kṛtsna vat_vat paripūrṇa--_paripṛ vat_vat sattamaḥ_sattama etāvān_etāvat eva_eva ātma--_ātman īśvaraḥ_īśvara yā_yad iti_iti abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa yuktam_yuj ahaitukam_ahaituka nirupapattikam_nirupapattika ataeva_ataeva alpam_alpa tuccham_tuccha alpa--_alpa viṣaya--_viṣaya tvāt_tva alpa--_alpa phala--_phala tvāt_tva yat_yad evambhūtam_evambhūta jñānam_jñāna tat_tad tāmasam_tāmasa udāhṛtam_udāhṛ

Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha tāmasam_tāmasa jñānam_jñāna āha_ah yat_yad tu_tu jñānam_jñāna ahaitukam_ahaituka autpattikam_autpattika eva_eva ataeva_ataeva ekasmin_eka kārye_kārya laukike_laukika eva_eva snāna--_snāna bhojana--_bhojana pāna--_pāna strī--_strī sambhoge_sambhoga tad--_tad sādhane_sādhana ca_ca karmaṇi_karman saktam_sañj vaidike_vaidika karmaṇi_karman yajña--_yajña dāna--_dāna ādau_ādi ataeva_ataeva a_a tattva--_tattva artha--_artha vat_vat tatra_tatra tattva--_tattva rūpaḥ_rūpa arthaḥ_artha kaḥ_ka api_api na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha alpam_alpa paśūnām_paśu iva_iva yat_yad kṣudram_kṣudra tat_tad tāmasam_tāmasa jñānam_jñāna nānā_nānā vāda--_vāda pratipādakam_pratipādaka nyāya--_nyāya ādi--_ādi śāstra--_śāstra jñānam_jñāna rājasam_rājasa snāna--_snāna bhojana--_bhojana ādi--_ādi vyavahārika--_vyavahārika jñānam_jñāna tāmasam_tāmasa iti_iti saṅkṣepaḥ_saṃkṣepa

āha_ah yat_yad tu_tu jñānam_jñāna ahaitukam_ahaituka svābhāvikam_svābhāvika na_na tu_tu śāstrāt_śāstra hetoḥ_hetu jñānam_jñāna ataeva_ataeva ekasmin_eka laukike_laukika snāna--_snāna a_a bhojana--_bhojana yoṣita--_yoṣita prasaṅga--_prasaṅga ādau_ādi kārye_kārya na_na tu_tu vaidike_vaidika yāga--_yāga dāna--_dāna ādau_ādi saktam_sañj kṛtsna--_kṛtsna vat_vat pūrṇam_pṛ na_na atas_atas adhikam_adhika asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha ataeva_ataeva a_a tattva--_tattva artha--_artha vat_vat yatra_yatra tattva--_tattva rūpaḥ_rūpa arthaḥ_artha na_na asti_as alpam_alpa paśu--_paśu ādi--_ādi sādhāraṇyāt_sādhāraṇya tuccham_tuccha tat_tad laukika--_laukika snāna--_snāna bhojana--_bhojana ādi--_ādi jñānam_jñāna tāmasam_tāmasa

lg.l: niyatam_niyam saṅga--_saṅga rahitam_rahita a_a rāga--_rāga dveṣataḥ_dveṣa kṛtam_kṛ
a_a phala--_phala prepsunā_prepsu karma_karman yat_yad tat_tad sāttvikam_sāttvika ucyate_vac

div.p: āha_ah niyatam_niyam nitya--_nitya tayā_tā vihitam_vidhā saṅga--_saṅga rahitam_rahita abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa śūnyam_śūnya a_a rāga--_rāga dveṣataḥ_dveṣa putra--_putra ādi--_ādi prītyā_prīti vā_vā a_a śatru--_śatru dveṣeṇa_dveṣa vā_vā yat_yad kṛtam_kṛ na_na bhavati_bhū phalam_phala prāptum_prāp icchati_iṣ iti_iti phala--_phala prepsuḥ_prepsu tad--_tad vilakṣaṇena_vilakṣaṇa niṣkāmeṇa_niṣkāma kartrā_kartṛ yat_yad kṛtam_kṛ karma_karman tat_tad sāttvikam_sāttvika ucyate_vac
div.l: āha_ah sāttvikam_sāttvika
div.p: karma--_karman traividhyam_traividhya āha_ah tribhiḥ_tri niyatam_niyam sva--_sva varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama vihitam_vidhā saṅga--_saṅga rahitam_rahita kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa varjitam_varjay arāga--_arāga dveṣataḥ_dveṣa kṛtam_kṛ kīrtau_kīrti rāgāt_rāga akīrtau_akīrti dveṣāt_dveṣa ca_ca yat_yad na_na kṛtam_kṛ kintu_kiṃtu phala--_phala icchā--_icchā śūnyena_śūnya yat_yad karma_karman kṛtam_kṛ tat_tad sāttvikam_sāttvika

lg.l: yat_yad tu_tu kāma--_kāma īpsunā_īpsu karma_karman sa_sa ahaṃkāreṇa_ahaṃkāra vā_vā punar_punar
kriyate_kṛ bahula--_bahula āyāsam_āyāsa tat_tad rājasam_rājasa udāhṛtam_udāhṛ

div.p: āha_ah yat_yad tu_tu karma_karman kāma--_kāma īpsunā_īpsu phalam_phala prāptum_prāp icchatā_iṣ sa_sa ahaṅkāreṇa_ahaṃkāra mad--_mad samaḥ_sama kaḥ_ka anyaḥ_anya śrotriyaḥ_śrotriya asti_as iti_iti evam_evam nirūḍha--_nirūh ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra yuktena_yuj ca_ca kriyate_kṛ yat_yad ca_ca punar_punar bahula--_bahula āyāsam_āyāsa ati_ati kleśa--_kleśa yuktam_yuj tat_tad karma_karman rājasam_rājasa udāhṛtam_udāhṛ
div.l: kriyate_kṛ

lg.l: anubandham_anubandha kṣayam_kṣaya hiṃsām_hiṃsā an_an apekṣya_apekṣ ca_ca pauruṣam_pauruṣa
mohāt_moha ārabhyate_ārabh karma_karman yat_yad tat_tad tāmasam_tāmasa ucyate_vac

div.p: āha_ah anubadhyate_anubandh anubandhaḥ_anubandha bhāvi_bhāvin śubha--_śubha aśubham_aśubha kṣayam_kṣaya vitta--_vitta vyayam_vyaya hiṃsām_hiṃsā para--_para pīḍām_pīḍā pauruṣam_pauruṣa ca_ca sva--_sva sāmarthyam_sāmarthya an_an apekṣya_apekṣ a_a paryālocya_paryālocay kevalam_kevalam mohāt_moha eva_eva yat_yad karma_karman ārabhyate_ārabh tat_tad tāmasam_tāmasa ucyate_vac 25_25

kṣayam_kṣaya dharma--_dharma jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi apacayam_apacaya hiṃsām_hiṃsā svasya_sva nāśam_nāśa ca_ca an_an apekṣya_apekṣ a_a paryālocya_paryālocay pauruṣam_pauruṣa vyavahārika--_vyavahārika puruṣa--_puruṣa mātra--_mātra kartavyam_kṛ karma_karman mohāt_moha ajñānāt_ajñāna eva_eva yat_yad ārabhyate_ārabh tat_tad tāmasam_tāmasa 25_25

anu_anu karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna anantaram_anantaram bandham_bandha rāja--_rājan dūta--_dūta yama--_yama dūta--_dūta kṛtam_kṛ kṣayam_kṣaya dharma--_dharma ādi--_ādi vināśam_vināśa hiṃsām_hiṃsā prāṇi--_prāṇin pīḍām_pīḍā pauruṣam_pauruṣa sa_sa balam_bala ca_ca an_an avekṣya_avekṣ yat_yad karma_karman mohāt_moha ārabhyate_ārabh tat_tad

lg.l: mukta--_muc saṅgaḥ_saṅga ūna--_ūna ahaṃvādī_ahaṃvādin dhṛti--_dhṛti utsāha--_utsāha samanvitaḥ_samanvita
siddhi--_siddhi asiddhyoḥ_asiddhi nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra kartā_kartṛ sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika ucyate_vac

div.p: āha_ah mukta--_muc saṅgaḥ_saṅga tyakta--_tyaj abhiniveśaḥ_abhiniveśa dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti dhairyam_dhairya utsāhaḥ_utsāha udyamaḥ_udyama tābhyām_tad samanvitaḥ_samanvita saṃyuktaḥ_saṃyuj ārabdhasya_ārabh karmaṇaḥ_karman siddhau_siddhi asiddhau_asiddhi ca_ca nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra harṣa--_harṣa viṣāda--_viṣāda śūnyaḥ_śūnya evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta kartā_kartṛ sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika ucyate_vac 26_26
āha_ah _

āha_ah mukta--_muc saṅgaḥ_saṅga kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa phala--_phala icchā--_icchā śūnyaḥ_śūnya an_an ahaṃvādī_ahaṃvādin garva--_garva ukti--_ukti śūnyaḥ_śūnya utsāhaḥ_utsāha tad--_tad anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna udyata--_udyam citta--_citta tā_tā tābhyām_tad samanvitaḥ_samanvita ānuṣaṅgika--_ānuṣaṅgika phalasya_phala siddhau_siddhi asiddhau_asiddhi ca_ca nirvikāraḥ_nirvikāra sukhena_sukha duḥkhena_duḥkha ca_ca rahitaḥ_rahita īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa kartā_kartṛ sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika 26_26

lg.l: rāgī_rāgin karma--_karman phala--_phala prepsuḥ_prepsu lubdhaḥ_lubh hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ātmaka--_ātmaka uśuciḥ_uśuci
harṣa--_harṣa śoka--_śoka anvitaḥ_anvita kartā_kartṛ rājasaḥ_rājasa parikīrtitaḥ_parikīrtay

div.p: āha_ah rāgī_rāgin putra--_putra ādiṣu_ādi prītimān_prītimat karma--_karman phala--_phala prepsuḥ_prepsu karma--_karman phala--_phala kāmī_kāmin lubdhaḥ_lubh para--_para sva--_sva abhilāṣī_abhilāṣin lābha--_lābha alābhayoḥ_alābha harṣa--_harṣa śokābhyām_śoka anvitaḥ_anvita saṃyuktaḥ_saṃyuj kartā_kartṛ rājasaḥ_rājasa parikīrtitaḥ_parikīrtay 27_27
rāgī_rāgin karmaṇi_karman āsaktaḥ_āsañj lubdhaḥ_lubh viṣaya--_viṣaya āsaktaḥ_āsañj

karma--_karman phala--_phala prepsuḥ_prepsu paśu--_paśu putra--_putra anna--_anna svarga--_svarga ādiṣu_ādi ati_ati spṛhayāluḥ_spṛhayālu hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ātmakaḥ_ātmaka parān_para prapīḍya_prapīḍay karma_karman kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa kartā_kartṛ rājasaḥ_rājasa 27_27

lg.l: ayuktaḥ_ayukta prākṛtaḥ_prākṛta stabdhaḥ_stambh śaṭhaḥ_śaṭha naiṣkṛtika--_naiṣkṛtika ulasaḥ_ulasa
viṣādī_viṣādin dīrghasūtrī_dīrghasūtrin ca_ca kartā_kartṛ tāmasaḥ_tāmasa ucyate_vac

div.p: āha_ah ayuktaḥ_ayukta anavahitaḥ_anavahita prākṛtaḥ_prākṛta viveka--_viveka śūnyaḥ_śūnya stabdhaḥ_stambh a_a namraḥ_namra śaṭhaḥ_śaṭha śakti--_śakti gūhana--_gūhana kārī_kārin naikṛtikaḥ_naikṛtika para--_para vṛtti--_vṛtti chedana--_chedana paraḥ_para alasaḥ_alasa apravṛtti--_apravṛtti śīlaḥ_śīla viṣādī_viṣādin kartavyeṣu_kartavya api_api sarvadā_sarvadā avasanna--_avasad svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva dīrgha--_dīrgha sūtrī_sūtrin ca_ca kartavyānām_kartavya dīrgha--_dīrgha prasāraṇaḥ_prasāraṇa sarvadā_sarvadā manda--_manda svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva yat_yad adya_adya śvas_śvas vā_vā kartavyam_kṛ tat_tad māsena_māsa api_api na_na karoti_kṛ yaḥ_yad ca_ca evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta sa_tad kartā_kartṛ tāmasaḥ_tāmasa ucyate_vac 28_28

kartṛ--_kartṛ traividhyena_traividhya eva_eva jñātuḥ_jñātṛ api_api traividhyam_traividhya uktam_vac bhavati_bhū karma--_karman traividhyena_traividhya ca_ca jñeyasya_jñā api_api traividhyam_traividhya uktam_vac jñātavyam_jñā buddheḥ_buddhi traividhyena_traividhya karaṇasya_karaṇa api_api traividhyam_traividhya uktam_vac bhaviṣyati_bhū
āyāti_āyā anutiṣṭhati_anuṣṭhā pramāṇayati_pramāṇay

tat_tad evam_evam jñānibhiḥ_jñānin ukta--_vac lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika eva_eva tyāgaḥ_tyāga kartavyaḥ_kṛ sāttvikam_sāttvika eva_eva karma--_karman niṣṭham_niṣṭhā jñānam_jñāna āśrayaṇīyam_āśri sāttvikam_sāttvika eva_eva karma_karman kartavyam_kṛ sāttvikena_sāttvika eva_eva kartrā_kartṛ bhavitavyam_bhū eṣaḥ_etad eva_eva sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa jñāninām_jñānin iti_iti me_mad jñānam_jñāna prakaraṇa--_prakaraṇa artha--_artha niṣkarṣaḥ_niṣkarṣa bhaktānām_bhakta tu_tu triguṇa--_triguṇa atītam_atī eva_eva jñānam_jñāna triguṇa--_triguṇa atītam_atī me_mad karma_karman bhakti--_bhakti yoga--_yoga ākhyam_ākhyā triguṇa--_triguṇa atītāḥ_atī eva_eva kartāraḥ_kartṛ yat_yad uktam_vac bhagavatā_bhagavant eva_eva śrīmat--_śrīmat bhāgavate_bhāgavata

pratijānīte_pratijñā spaṣṭaḥ_spaṣṭa arthaḥ_artha tatra_tatra sāttvikam_sāttvika sukham_sukha āha_ah abhyāsāt_abhyāsa iti_iti sārdhena_sārdha yatra_yatra yasmin_yad ca_ca sukhe_sukha abhyāsāt_abhyāsa atiparicayāt_atiparicaya ramate_ram na_na tu_tu viṣaya--_viṣaya sukhe_sukha iva_iva sahasā_sahas ratim_rati prāpnoti_prāp yasmin_yad ramamāṇaḥ_ram ca_ca duḥkhasya_duḥkha antam_anta avasānam_avasāna nitarām_nitarām gacchati_gam prāpnoti_prāp kīdṛśam_kīdṛśa tat_tad yat_yad tat_tad kim_ka api_api agre_agra prathamam_prathama viṣam_viṣa iva_iva manaḥ--_manas saṃyama--_saṃyama adhīna--_adhīna tvāt_tva duḥkha--_duḥkha āvaham_āvaha iva_iva bhavati_bhū pariṇāme_pariṇāma tu_tu amṛta--_amṛta sadṛśam_sadṛśa ātma--_ātman viṣayā_viṣaya buddhiḥ_buddhi ātma--_ātman buddhiḥ_buddhi tasyāḥ_tad prasādaḥ_prasāda rajaḥ--_rajas tamaḥ--_tamas mala--_mala tyāgena_tyāga svaccha--_svaccha tayā_tā avasthānam_avasthāna tatas_tatas jātam_jan yat_yad sukham_sukha tat_tad sāttvikam_sāttvika

pratījānīte_pratijñā tatra_tatra sāttvikam_sāttvika sukham_sukha āha_ah abhyāsāt_abhyāsa iti_iti sārdhakena_sārdhaka abhyāsāt_abhyāsa punar_punar punar_punar pariśīlanāt_pariśīlana yatra_yatra ramate_ram na_na tu_tu viṣayeṣu_viṣaya iva_iva utpattyā_utpatti yasmin_yad ramamāṇaḥ_ram duḥkha--_duḥkha antam_anta nigacchati_nigam saṃsāram_saṃsāra tarati_tṛ yat_yad ca_ca agre_agra prathamam_prathama viṣam_viṣa iva_iva manaḥ--_manas saṃyama--_saṃyama kleśa--_kleśa sattvāt_sattva vivikta--_vivic ātma--_ātman prakāśāt_prakāśa ca_ca ati_ati duḥkha--_duḥkha āvaham_āvaha iva_iva bhavati_bhū pariṇāme_pariṇāma samādhi--_samādhi paripāke_paripāka sati_as amṛta--_amṛta upamam_upama vivikā--_vivikā ātma--_ātman prakāśāt_prakāśa pīyūṣa--_pīyūṣa pravāha--_pravāha nipātavat_nipātavat bhavati_bhū yat_yad ca_ca ātma--_ātman sambandhinyāḥ_sambandhin buddheḥ_buddhi prasādāt_prasāda jāyate_jan tat_tad sāttvikam_sāttvika sukham_sukha tad--_tad prasādaḥ_prasāda ca_ca viṣaya--_viṣaya sambaandha--_sambandha mālinya--_mālinya vinivṛttiḥ_vinivṛtti 37_37

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ ebhiḥ_idam prakṛti--_prakṛti sambhavaiḥ_sambhava sattva--_sattva ādibhiḥ_ādi tribhiḥ_tri guṇaiḥ_guṇa muktam_muc prāṇi--_prāṇin jātam_jāta anyat_anya vā_vā yat_yad syāt_as tat_tad pṛthivyām_pṛthivī manuṣya--_manuṣya loka--_loka ādiṣu_ādi divi_div deveṣu_deva ca_ca kvāpi_kvāpi na_na asti_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ asti_as syāt_as triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmakam_ātmaka tatra_tatra sāttvikam_sāttvika eva_eva upādeyam_upādā rājasa--_rājasa tāmase_tāmasa tu_tu na_na upādeyaḥ_upādā iti_iti prakaraṇa--_prakaraṇa tātparyam_tātparya

saṅgṛhṇāti_saṃgrah pṛthivyām_pṛthivī manuṣya--_manuṣya ādiṣu_ādi divi_div svarga--_svarga ādau_ādi deveṣu_deva ca_ca prakṛtim_prakṛti saṃsṛṣṭeṣu_saṃsṛj brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi stamba--_stamba anteṣu_anta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tat_tad sattvam_sattva prāṇi--_prāṇin jātam_jāta anyat_anya ca_ca vastu_vastu na_na asti_as yat_yad ebhiḥ_idam prakṛti--_prakṛti jaiḥ_ja tribhiḥ_tri guṇaiḥ_guṇa muktam_muc virahitam_virah syāt_as tathā_tathā ca_ca triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmakeṣu_ātmaka vastuṣu_vastu sāttvikasya_sāttvika eva_eva upayogi--_upayogin tvāt_tva tat_tad eva_eva grāhyam_grah anyat_anya tu_tu tyājyam_tyaj iti_iti prakaraṇa--_prakaraṇa arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa kṣatriya--_kṣatriya viśām_viś śūdrāṇām_śūdra ca_ca paraṃtapa_paraṃtapa
karmāṇi_karman pravibhaktāni_pravibhaj svabhāva--_svabhāva prabhavaiḥ_prabhava guṇaiḥ_guṇa

div.p: evam_evam sarva--_sarva gīta--_gīta artha--_artha sāram_sāra saṅgṛhya_saṃgrah pradarśayitum_pradarśay prakaraṇa--_prakaraṇa antaram_antara ārabhate_ārabh brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa iti_iti ādi_ādi yāvat_yāvat adhyāya--_adhyāya samāpti_samāpti he_he parantapa_paraṃtapa he_he śatru--_śatru tāpana_tāpana brāhmaṇānām_brāhmaṇa kṣatriyāṇām_kṣatriya viśām_viś ca_ca śūdrāṇām_śūdra ca_ca karmāṇi_karman pravibhaktāni_pravibhaj prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa vibhāgataḥ_vibhāga vihitāni_vidhā śūdrāṇām_śūdra samāsāt_samāsāt pṛthak_pṛthak karaṇam_karaṇa dvija--_dvija tva--_tva abhāvena_abhāva vailakṣaṇyāt_vailakṣaṇya vibhāga--_vibhāga upalakṣaṇam_upalakṣaṇa āha_ah svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva sāttvika--_sāttvika ādiḥ_ādi prabhavati_prabhū prādurbhavati_prādurbhū yebhyaḥ_yad taiḥ_tad guṇaiḥ_guṇa upakakṣaṇa--_upakakṣaṇa bhūtaiḥ_bhū yat_yad vā_vā svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva pūrva--_pūrva janma--_janman saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra tasmāt_tasmāt prādurbhūtaiḥ_prādurbhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sattva--_sattva upasarjana--_upasarjana rajaḥ--_rajas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna kṣatriyāḥ_kṣatriya tamaḥ--_tamas upasarjana--_upasarjana rajaḥ--_rajas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna vaiśyāḥ_vaiśya rajaḥ--_rajas upasarjana--_upasarjana tamaḥ--_tamas pradhānāḥ_pradhāna śūdrāḥ_śūdra

āha_ah sva--_sva bhāvena_bhāva utpattyā_utpatti eva_eva prabhavanti_prabhū prādurbhavanti_prādurbhū ye_yad guṇāḥ_guṇa sattva--_sattva ādayaḥ_ādi taiḥ_tad prakarṣeṇa_prakarṣa vibhaktāni_vibhaj pṛthak_pṛthak kṛtāni_kṛ karmāṇi_karman brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādīnām_ādi vihitāni_vidhā santi_as iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

anutiṣṭheyuḥ_anuṣṭhā ārabhate_ārabh brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa iti_iti ṣaṭkena_ṣaṭka śūdrāṇam_śūdrāṇa samāsāt_samāsa pṛthak_pṛthak karaṇam_karaṇa dvija--_dvija tva--_tva abhāvāt_abhāva brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādīnām_ādi caturṇām_catur karmāṇi_karman svabhāv--_svabhāva prabhavaiḥ_prabhava guṇaiḥ_guṇa saha_saha śāstreṇa_śāstra pravibhaktāni_pravibhaj svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva prāktana--_prāktana saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra tasmāt_tad prabhavanti_prabhū ye_yad guṇāḥ_guṇa sattva--_sattva ādyāḥ_ādya taiḥ_tad saha_saha śāstreṇa_śāstra teṣām_tad evam_evam guṇaka--_guṇaka brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādayaḥ_ādi teṣām_tad etāni_etad karmāṇi_karman iti_iti tatra_tatra sattva--_sattva pradhānaḥ_pradhāna brāhmaṇaḥ_brāhmaṇa praśānta--_praśam tvāt_tva sattva--_sattva upasarjan_upasarjan rajaḥ--_rajas pradhānaḥ_pradhāna kṣatriyaḥ_kṣatriya īśvara--_īśvara svabhāva--_svabhāva tvāt_tva tamaḥ--_tamas upasarjana--_upasarjana rajaḥ--_rajas karmāṇi_karman tu_tu agre_agra vācyāni_vac

lg.l: śamaḥ_śama damaḥ_dama tapaḥ_tapas śaucam_śauca kṣāntiḥ_kṣānti ārjavam_ārjava eva_eva ca_ca
jñānam_jñāna vijñānam_vijñāna āstikyam_āstikya brahma--_brahman karma_karman svabhāva--_svabhāva jam_ja

div.p: āha_ah śamaḥ_śama citta--_citta uparamaḥ_uparama damaḥ_dama bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya uparamaḥ_uparama tapaḥ_tapas pūrva--_pūrva uktam_vac śārīta--_śārīta ādi_ādi śaucam_śauca bāhya--_bāhya abhyantaram_abhyantara kṣāntiḥ_kṣānti kṣamā_kṣamā ārjavam_ārjava ṛju--_ṛju tā_tā eva_eva ca_ca jñānam_jñāna vijñānam_vijñāna āstikyam_āstikya āstika--_āstika bhāvaḥ_bhāva brāhmyam_brāhmya karma_karman brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa jāte_jan karma_karman svabhāva--_svabhāva jam_ja yat_yad uktam_vac svabhāva--_svabhāva prabhavaiḥ_prabhava guṇaiḥ_guṇa pravibhaktāni_pravibhaj iti_iti tat_tad eva_eva uktam_vac svabhāva--_svabhāva jam_ja iti_iti 42_42

Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha tatra_tatra sattva--_sattva pradhānānām_pradhāna brāhmaṇānām_brāhmaṇa svabhāvikāni_svabhāvika karmāṇi_karman āha_ah śamaḥ_śama iti_iti damaḥ_dama bāhya--_bāhya indriya--_indriya nigrahaḥ_nigraha tapaḥ_tapas śarīra--_śarīra ādi_ādi jñāna--_jñāna vijñāne_vijñāna śāstra--_śāstra anubhava--_anubhava utthe_uttha āstikyam_āstikya śāstra--_śāstra arthe_artha dṛḍha--_dṛḍha viśvāsaḥ_viśvāsa evam_evam ādi_ādi brahma--_brahman karma_karman brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa karma_karman svabhāva--_svabhāva jam_ja 42_42

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa svābhāvikam_svābhāvika karma_karman āha_ah śamaḥ_śama iti_iti śamaḥ_śama antaḥkaraṇasya_antaḥkaraṇa saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama damaḥ_dama bahiḥkaraṇasya_bahiḥkaraṇa tapaḥ_tapas śāstrīya--_śāstrīya kāya--_kāya kleśaḥ_kleśa śaucam_śauca dvividham_dvividha uktam_vac kṣāntiḥ_kṣānti sahiṣṇu--_sahiṣṇu tā_tā ārjavam_ārjava avakra--_avakra tvam_tva jñānam_jñāna śāstrāt_śāstra parāvara--_parāvara tattva--_tattva avagamaḥ_avagama vijñānam_vijñāna tasmāt_tad eva_eva tad--_tad ekānta--_ekānta dharma--_dharma adhigamaḥ_adhigama āstikyam_āstikya sarva--_sarva veda--_veda vedyaḥ_vid hariḥ_hari nikhila--_nikhila eka--_eka karaṇam_karaṇa sva--_sva vihitaiḥ_vidhā karmabhiḥ_karman ārādhitaḥ_ārādhay kevalayā_kevala bhaktyā_bhakti ca_ca santoṣitaḥ_saṃtoṣay sva--_sva paryantam_paryanta sarvam_sarva arpayati_arpay iti_iti śāstra--_śāstra adhigate_adhigam arthe_artha satya--_satya tva--_tva viniścayaḥ_viniścaya etat_etad svābhāvikam_svābhāvika brahma--_brahman karma_karman tathā_tathā api_api sattva--_sattva prādhānyāt_prādhānya brāhmaṇasya_brāhmaṇa iti_iti bhaṇitiḥ_bhaṇiti evam_evam uktam_vac viṣṇunā_viṣṇu

lg.l: kṣamā_kṣamā satyam_satya damaḥ_dama śaucam_śauca
dānam_dāna indriya--_indriya saṃyamaḥ_saṃyama
ahiṃsā_ahiṃsā guru--_guru śuśrūṣā_śuśrūṣā
tīrtha--_tīrtha anusaraṇam_anusaraṇa dayā_dayā

div.p: ārjavam_ārjava lobha--_lobha śūnya--_śūnya tvam_tva deva--_deva brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa pūjanam_pūjana anabhyasūyā_anabhyasūyā ca_ca tathā_tathā dharma--_dharma sāmānyaḥ_sāmānya ucyate_vac

lg.l: śauryam_śaurya tejaḥ_tejas dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti dākṣyam_dākṣya yuddhe_yuddha ca_ca api_api apalāyanam_apalāyana
dānam_dāna īśvara--_īśvara bhāvaḥ_bhāva ca_ca kṣātram_kṣātra karma_karman svabhāva--_svabhāva jam_ja

div.p: āha_ah śauryam_śaurya parākramaḥ_parākrama tejaḥ_tejas prāgalbhyam_prāgalbhya dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti dhairyam_dhairya dākṣyam_dākṣya kauśalam_kauśala yuddhe_yuddha ca_ca api_api apalāyanam_apalāyana a_a parāṅmukha--_parāṅmukha tā_tā dānam_dāna audāryam_audārya īśvara--_īśvara bhāvaḥ_bhāva niyamana--_niyamana śaktiḥ_śakti etat_etad kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya svābhāvikam_svābhāvika karma_karman
div.l: āha_ah
div.p: Baladevaḥ_Baladeva kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya āha_ah śauryam_śaurya iti_iti śauryam_śaurya yuddhe_yuddha nirbhayā_nirbhaya pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti tejaḥ_tejas paraiḥ_para adhṛṣya--_adhṛṣya tvam_tva dhṛtiḥ_dhṛti mahati_mahat api_api saṅkaṭe_saṃkaṭa deha--_deha indriya--_indriya an_an avasādaḥ_avasāda dākṣyam_dākṣya kriyā--_kriyā siddh--_siddh kauśalam_kauśala yuddhe_yuddha sva--_sva mṛtyu--_mṛtyu niścaye_niścaya api_api apalāyanam_apalāyana tatra_tatra avaimukhyam_avaimukhya dānam_dāna asaṅkocaena_asaṃkoca sva--_sva vitta--_vitta tyāgaḥ_tyāga īśvara--_īśvara bhāvaḥ_bhāva prajā--_prajā pālana--_pālana arthaḥ_artha īśitavyeṣu_īś śāsana--_śāsana atigeṣu_atiga prabhu--_prabhu tva--_tva śakti--_śakti prakāśaḥ_prakāśa etat_etad kṣatriyasya_kṣatriya svābhāvikam_svābhāvika karma_karman

lg.l: kṛṣi--_kṛṣi gaurakṣya--_gaurakṣya vāṇijyam_vāṇijya vaiśya--_vaiśya karma_karman svabhāva--_svabhāva jam_ja
paricaryā--_paricaryā ātmakam_ātmaka karma_karman śūdrasya_śūdra api_api svabhāva--_svabhāva jam_ja

div.p: āha_ah kṛṣiḥ_kṛṣi karṣaṇam_karṣaṇa gāḥ_go rakṣati_rakṣ iti_iti gau--_go rakṣaḥ_rakṣas tasya_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva gaurakṣyam_gaurakṣya pāśupālyam_pāśupālya iti_iti arthaḥ_artha vāṇijyam_vāṇijya kraya--_kraya vikraya--_vikraya ādi_ādi etat_etad vaiśyasya_vaiśya svabhāva--_svabhāva jam_ja karma_karman travarṇika--_travarṇika paricaryā--_paricaryā ātmakam_ātmaka śūdrasya_śūdra api_api svabhāva--_svabhāva jam_ja

āha_ah gāḥ_go raksati_rakṣ iti_iti go--_go rakṣaḥ_rakṣas tasya_tad bhāvaḥ_bhāva gaurakṣyam_gaurakṣya rajaḥ--_rajas upasarjana--_upasarjana tamaḥ--_tamas pradhānānām_pradhāna śūdrāṇām_śūdra karma_karman āha_ah paricaryā--_paricaryā ātmakam_ātmaka brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa kṣatriya--_kṣatriya viśām_viś paricaryā--_paricaryā rūpam_rūpa

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva vaiśyasya_vaiśya āha_ah kṛṣi_kṛṣi iti_iti annādi--_annādi utpattaye_utpatti hala--_hala ādinā_ādi bhūmeḥ_bhūmi vilekhanam_vilekhana kṛṣiḥ_kṛṣi pāśupālyam_pāśupālya gorakṣyam_gorakṣya vaṇij--_vaṇij karma_karman vāṇijyam_vāṇijya kraya--_kraya vikraya--_vikraya laksaṇam_lakṣaṇa vṛddhau_vṛddhi dhana--_dhana prayogaḥ_prayoga kuśīdam_kuśīda api_api atra_atra antargatam_antargam etat_etad svabhāva--_svabhāva siddham_sidh vaiśya--_vaiśya karma_karman atha_atha śūdrasya_śūdra āha_ah pari_pari iti_iti brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādīnām_ādi dvijanmanām_dvijanman paricaryā_paricaryā śūdrasya_śūdra svābhāvikam_svābhāvika karma_karman etāni_etad cāturāśramya--_cāturāśramya karmaṇām_karman upalakṣaṇāni_upalakṣaṇa

lg.l: sve_sva sve_sva karmaṇi_karman abhirataḥ_abhiram saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi labhate_labh naraḥ_nara
sva--_sva karma--_karman nirataḥ_niram siddhim_siddhi yathā_yathā vindati_vid tat_tad śṛṇu_śru

div.p: āha_ah sva--_sva sva--_sva adhikāra--_adhikāra vihite_vidhā karmaṇi_karman abhirataḥ_abhiram pariniṣṭhitaḥ_pariniṣṭhā naraḥ_nara saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi jñāna--_jñāna yogya--_yogya tām_tā labhate_labh karmaṇām_karman jñāna--_jñāna prāpti--_prāpti prakāram_prakāra āha_ah sva--_sva karma_karman iti_iti sārdhena_sārdha sva--_sva karma--_karman pariniṣṭhitaḥ_pariniṣṭhā yathā_yathā yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra tattva--_tattva jñānam_jñāna labhate_labh tat_tad prakāram_prakāra śṛṇu_śru
Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha no_no comment_comment

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva uktānām_vac karmaṇām_karman jñāna--_jñāna hetutām_hetutā āha_ah sve_sva sve_sva iti_iti sva--_sva sva--_sva varṇa--_varṇa āśrama--_āśrama vihite_vidhā karmaṇi_karman abhirataḥ_abhiram tad--_tad anuṣṭhātā_anuṣṭhātṛ naraḥ_nara saṃsiddhim_saṃsiddhi viśa--_viśa tantu--_tantu vat_vat karma--_karman antargatam_antargam jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā labhate_labh nanu_nanu bandhakena_bandhaka karmaṇām_karman vimocikā_vimocaka jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā katham_katham iti_iti ced_ced buddhi--_buddhi viśeṣāt_viśeṣa iti_iti āha_ah sva--_sva karma_karman iti_iti

lg.l: yatas_yatas pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti bhūtānām_bhūta yena_yad sarvam_sarva idam_idam tatam_tan
sva--_sva karmaṇā_karman tam_tad abhyarcya_abhyarc siddhim_siddhi vindati_vid mānavaḥ_mānava

div.p: āha_ah yatas_yatas antathāmiṇaḥ_antathāmin parameśvarāt_parameśvara bhūtānām_bhūta prāṇinām_prāṇin pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti ceṣṭā_ceṣṭā bhavati_bhū yena_yad ca_ca kāraṇa--_kāraṇa ātmanā_ātman sarvam_sarva idam_idam viśvam_viśva tatam_tan vyāptam_vyāp tam_tad īśvaram_īśvara sva--_sva karmaṇā_karman abhyarcya_abhyarc pūjayitvā_pūjay siddhim_siddhi labhate_labh manuṣyaḥ_manuṣya
tuṣyatu_tuṣ

Baladevaḥ_baladeva yatas_yatas iti_iti yatas_yatas parameśvarāt_parameśvara bhūtānām_bhūta janma--_janman ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti bhavati_bhū yena_yad ca_ca idam_idam sarvam_sarva jagat_jagant tam_tad vyāptam_vyāp tam_tad indra--_indra ādi--_ādi devatā--_devatā ātmanā_ātman avasthitam_avasthā sva--_sva vihitena_vidhā karmaṇā_karman abhyarcya_abhyarc etena_etad karmaṇā_karman samarpya_samarpay mānavaḥ_mānava siddhim_siddhi jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā vindati_vid

lg.l: śreyān_śreyas svadharmaḥ_svadharma viguṇaḥ_viguṇa su_su anuṣṭhitāt_anuṣṭhā
svabhāva--_svabhāva niyatam_niyam karma_karman kurvan_kṛ na_na āpnoti_āp kilbiṣam_kilbiṣa

div.p: āha_ah viguṇaḥ_viguṇa api_api sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma samyak_samyak anuṣṭhitāt_anuṣṭhā api_api para--_para dharmāt_dharma śreyān_śreyas śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha na_na ca_ca bandhu--_bandhu vadha--_vadha ādi--_ādi muktāt_muc yuddha--_yuddha ādeḥ_ādi svadharmāt_svadharma bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aṭana--_aṭana ādi_ādi para--_para dharmaḥ_dharma śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha iti_iti mantavyam_man yatas_yatas svabhāvena_svabhāva pūrva--_pūrva uktena_vac niyatam_niyam niyamena_niyama uktam_vac karma_karman kurvan_kṛ kilbiṣam_kilbiṣa na_na āpnoti_āp 47_47

āha_ah para--_para dharmāt_dharma śreṣṭhāt_śreṣṭha api_api su_su anuṣṭhitāt_anuṣṭhā samyak_samyak anuṣṭhitāt_anuṣṭhā api_api svadharmaḥ_svadharma viguṇaḥ_viguṇa nikṛṣṭaḥ_nikṛṣṭa api_api samyak_samyak anuṣṭhātum_anuṣṭhā aśakyaḥ_aśakya api_api śreṣṭhaḥ_śreṣṭha tena_tena bandhu--_bandhu vadha--_vadha ādi--_ādi doṣavattāt_doṣavattā sva--_sva dharmam_dharma yuddham_yuddha tyaktvā_tyaj bhikṣā--_bhikṣā aṭana--_aṭana ādi--_ādi rūpa--_rūpa para--_para dharmaḥ_dharma tvayā_tvad na_na anusṭheyaḥ_anuṣṭhā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 47_47

āha_ah sva--_sva dharmaḥ_dharma viguṇaḥ_viguṇa nikṛṣṭaḥ_nikṛṣṭa api_api samyak_samyak anuṣṭhitaḥ_anuṣṭhā api_api vā_vā para--_para dharmāt_dharma utkṛṣṭāt_utkṛṣṭa su_su anuṣṭhitāt_anuṣṭhā ca_ca śreyān_śreyas ati_ati praśastaḥ_praśaṃs vihita--_vidhā tvāt_tva

lg.l: sahajam_sahaja karma_karman kaunteya_kaunteya sa_sa doṣam_doṣa api_api na_na tyajet_tyaj
sarva--_sarva ārambhāḥ_ārambha hi_hi doṣeṇa_doṣa dhūmena_dhūma agniḥ_agni iva_iva āvṛtāḥ_āvṛ

div.p:
manyase_man āha_ah sahajam_sahaja svabhāva--_svabhāva vihitam_vidhā karma_karman sa_sa doṣam_doṣa api_api na_na tyajet_tyaj hi_hi yasmāt_yasmāt sarve_sarva api_api ārambhāḥ_ārambha dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa arthāni_artha sarvāṇi_sarva api_api karmāṇi_karman doṣeṇa_doṣa kenacid_kaścit āvṛtāḥ_āvṛ vyāptāḥ_vyāp eva_eva yathā_yathā sahajena_sahaja dhūmena_dhūma agniḥ_agni āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ itivat_itivat atas_atas yathā_yathā agneḥ_agni dhūma--_dhūma rūpam_rūpa doṣam_doṣa apākṛtya_apākṛ pratāpaḥ_pratāpa eva_eva tamaḥ--_tamas śīta--_śīta ādi--_ādi nivṛttaye_nivṛtti sevyate_sev tathā_tathā karmaṇaḥ_karman api_api doṣa--_doṣa aṃśam_aṃśa vihāya_vihā guṇa--_guṇa aṃśaḥ_aṃśa eva_eva sattva--_sattva śuddhaye_śuddhi
iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

asti_as asti_as āha_ah sahajam_sahaja svabhāva--_svabhāva vihitam_vidhā hi_hi yatas_yatas sarve_sarva api_api ārambhāḥ_ārambha dṛṣṭa--_dṛś adṛṣṭa--_adṛṣṭa sādhanāni_sādhana karmāṇi_karman doṣeṇa_doṣa āvṛtāḥ_āvṛ eva_eva yathā_yathā dhūmena_dhūma doṣeṇa_doṣa āvṛtaḥ_āvṛ eva_eva vahniḥ_vahni dṛśyate_dṛś atas_atas dhūma--_dhūma rūpam_rūpa doṣam_doṣa apākṛtya_apākṛ tasya_tad tāpaḥ_tāpa eva_eva tamaḥ--_tamas śīta--_śīta ādi--_ādi nivṛttaye_nivṛtti yathā_yathā sevyate_sev tathā_tathā karmaṇaḥ_karman api_api doṣa--_doṣa aṃśam_aṃśa vihāya_vihā guṇa--_guṇa aṃśaḥ_aṃśa eva_eva sattva--_sattva śuddhaye_śuddhi sevyaḥ_sev iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 48_48
