brahma--_brahman dharmāḥ_dharma ca_ca tathā_tathā iti_iti āha_ah sahajam_sahaja iti_iti sahajam_sahaja svabhāva--_svabhāva prāptam_prāp karma_karman sa_sa doṣam_doṣa api_api hiṃsā--_hiṃsā ādi--_ādi miśram_miśra api_api na_na tyajet_tyaj api_api tu_tu vihita--_vidhā tvāt_tva kuryāt_kṛ eva_eva nirdoṣa--_nirdoṣa tva--_tva buddhyā_buddhi brahma--_brahman karmaṇā_karman caret_car iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yatas_yatas sarvā_sarva iti_iti sarveṣām_sarva brāhmaṇa--_brāhmaṇa ādi--_ādi varṇānām_varṇa ārambhāḥ_ārambha karmāṇi_karman triguṇa--_triguṇa ātmaka--_ātmaka tvāt_tva dravya--_dravya sādhya--_sādhay tvāt_tva ca_ca sāmānyatas_sāmānyatas kenacid_kaścit doṣeṇa_doṣa āvṛtāḥ_āvṛ vyāptāḥ_vyāp eva_eva bhavanti_bhū dhūmena_dhūma iva_iva agniḥ_agni iti_iti yathā_yathā agneḥ_agni dhūma--_dhūma aṃśam_aṃśa apākṛtya_apākṛ śīta--_śīta ādi--_ādi nivṛttaye_nivṛtti tāpaḥ_tāpa sevyate_sev tathā_tathā karmaṇām_karman bhagavat--_bhagavant arpaṇena_arpaṇa doṣa--_doṣa aṃśam_aṃśa nirdhūya_nirdhū ātma--_ātman darśanāya_darśana
sevyaḥ_sev

lg.l: asakta--_asakta buddhiḥ_buddhi sarvatra_sarvatra jita--_ji ātmā_ātman vigata--_vigam spṛhaḥ_spṛhā
naiṣkarmya--_naiṣkarmya siddhim_siddhi paramām_parama saṃnyāsena_saṃnyāsa adhigacchati_adhigam

div.p: sampadyate_sampad āha_ah asaktā_asakta saṅga--_saṅga śūnyā_śūnya buddhiḥ_buddhi yasya_yad jita--_ji ātmā_ātman nirahaṅkāraḥ_nirahaṃkāra vigata--_vigam spṛhaḥ_spṛhā vigatā_vigam spṛhā_spṛhā phala--_phala viṣaya--_viṣaya icchā_icchā saḥ_tad evambhūtena_evambhūta saṅgam_saṅga tyaktvā_tyaj phalam_phala ca_ca eva_eva sa_tad tyāgaḥ_tyāga sāttvikaḥ_sāttvika mataḥ_man iti_iti evam_evam pūrvoktena_pūrvokta karma--_karman āsakti--_āsakti tad--_tad phalayoḥ_phala tyāga--_tyāga lakṣaṇena_lakṣaṇa sannyāsena_saṃnyāsa naiṣkarmya--_naiṣkarmya siddhim_siddhi sarva--_sarva karma--_karman nivṛtti--_nivṛtti lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa sattva--_sattva śuddhim_śuddhi adhigacchati_adhigam yadi_yadi api_api saṅga--_saṅga phalayoḥ_phala tyāgena_tyāga karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna api_api naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya eva_eva kartṛ--_kartṛ tva--_tva abhiniveśa--_abhiniveśa abhāvāt_abhāva yat_yad uktam_vac na_na eva_eva kiñcid_kaścit karomi_kṛ iti_iti yuktaḥ_yuj manyeta_man tattva--_tattva vid_vid sannyāsena_saṃnyāsa paramām_parama naiṣkarmya--_naiṣkarmya siddhim_siddhi sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman manasā_manas sannyasya_saṃnyas āste_ās sukham_sukham vaśī_vaśin iti_iti evaṃ_evam lakṣaṇa--_lakṣaṇa pāramahaṃsya--_pāramahaṃsya apara--_apara paryāyām_paryāya āpnoti_āp 49_49

āha_ah asakta--_asakta buddhiḥ_buddhi sarvatra_sarvatra api_api prākṛta--_prākṛta vastuṣu_vastu na_na saktā_sañj āsakti--_āsakti śūnyā_śūnya buddhiḥ_buddhi yasya_yad saḥ_tad atas_atas jita--_ji ātmā_ātman vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ cittaḥ_citta vigatā_vigam brahma--_brahman loka--_loka paryanteṣu_paryanta api_api sukheṣu_sukha spṛhā_spṛhā yasya_yad saḥ_tad tatas_tatas ca_ca sannyāsena_saṃnyāsa karmaṇām_karman svarūpeṇa_svarūpa api_api tyāgena_tyāga naiṣkarmyasya_naiṣkarmya paramām_parama śreṣṭhām_śreṣṭha siddhim_siddhi adhigacchati_adhigam prāpnoti_prāp yoga--_yoga ārūḍha--_āruh daśāyām_daśā tasya_tad naiṣkarmyam_naiṣkarmya atiśayena_atiśaya siddhiḥ_siddhi bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 49_49

tyajet_tyaj āha_ah sarvatra_sarvatra ātma--_ātman atirikteṣu_atiric vastuṣu_vastu asakta--_asakta buddhiḥ_buddhi yatas_yatas jita--_ji ātmā_ātman sva--_sva ātma--_ātman ānanda--_ānanda āsvādena_āsvāda vaśīkṛta--_vaśīkṛ manāḥ_manas ataeva_ataeva vigata--_vigam spṛhaḥ_spṛhā ātma--_ātman atirikta--_atiric vastu--_vastu sādhyeṣu_sādhay nānā_nānā vidheṣu_vidha ānandeṣu_ānanda spṛhā--_spṛhā sva--_sva ātma--_ātman ānanda--_ānanda āsvāda--_āsvāda vikṣepakānām_vikṣepaka karmaṇām_karman sannyāsena_saṃnyāsa svarūpataḥ_svarūpa tyāgena_tyāga paramām_parama naiṣkarmya--_naiṣkarmya lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa siddhim_siddhi adhigacchati_adhigam yoga--_yoga ārūḍhaḥ_āruh san_as evam_evam eva_eva uktam_vac tṛtīye_tṛtīya yaḥ_yad tu_tu ātma--_ātman ratiḥ_rati eva_eva syāt_as iti_iti ādinā_ādi 49_49

lg.l: siddhim_siddhi prāptaḥ_prāp yathā_yathā brahma_brahman tathā_tathā āpnoti_āp nibodha_nibudh me_mad
samāsena_samāsena eva_eva kaunteya_kaunteya niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā jñānasya_jñāna yā_yad parā_para

div.p: āha_ah prāptaḥ_prāp naiṣkarmya--_naiṣkarmya siddhim_siddhi prāptaḥ_prāp san_as yathā_yathā yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra brahma_brahman prāpnoti_prāp tathā_tathā tam_tad prakāram_prakāra saṅkṣepeṇa_saṃkṣepa eva_eva me_mad vacanāt_vacana nibodha_nibudh pratiṣṭhitā_pratiṣṭhā yā_yad brahma--_brahman prāptiḥ_prāpti tām_tad imām_idam tathā_tathā darśayitum_darśay āha_ah niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā jñānasya_jñāna yā_yad parā_para iti_iti niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā paryavasānam_paryavasāna parisamāptiḥ_parisamāpti iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

prāpnoti_prāp anubhavati_anubhū sā_tad eva_eva jñānasya_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā parā_para paramaḥ_parama antaḥ_anta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha avidyāyām_avidyā uparata--_uparam prāyāyām_prāya vidyāyāḥ_vidyā api_api uparama--_uparama ārambhe_ārambha yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra jñāna--_jñāna sannyāsam_saṃnyāsa kṛtvā_kṛ brahma_brahman anubhavet_anubhū tam_tad budhyasva_budh iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

Baladeva_Baladeva siddhim_siddhi iti_iti vihitena_vidhā karmaṇā_karman harim_hari ārādhya_ārādhay tad--_tad prasāda--_prasāda jām_ja sarva--_sarva karma--_karman tyāga--_tyāga antām_anta ātma--_ātman dhyāna--_dhyāna niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā prāptaḥ_prāp yathā_yathā yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra sthitaḥ_sthā brahma_brahman prāpnoti_prāp āvirbhāvita--_āvirbhāvay guṇa--_guṇa aṣṭakam_aṣṭaka svarūpam_svarūpa tathā_tathā tam_tad prakāram_prakāra samāsena_samāsena gadataḥ_gad me_mad mattaḥ_mad nibodha_nibudh jñānasya_jñāna yā_yad parā_para niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā pareśa--_pareśa viṣayā_viṣaya jñāna--_jñāna niṣṭhā_niṣṭhā tvām_tvad prati_prati mayā_mad ucyate_vac tām_tad ca_ca śṛṇu_śru

lg.l: buddhyā_buddhi viśuddhayā_viśudh yuktaḥ_yuj dhṛtya_dhṛ ātmānam_ātman niyamya_niyam ca_ca
śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi viṣayān_viṣaya tyaktvā_tyaj rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa vyudasya_vyudas ca_ca
vivikta--_vivikta sevī_sevin laghu--_laghu āśī_āśin yata--_yam vāc--_vāc kāya--_kāya mānasaḥ_mānasa
dhyāna--_dhyāna yoga--_yoga paraḥ_para nityam_nityam vairāgyam_vairāgya samupāśritaḥ_samupāśri
ahaṃkāram_ahaṃkāra balam_bala darpam_darpa kāmam_kāma krodham_krodha parigraham_parigraha
vimucya_vimuc nirmamaḥ_nirmama śāntaḥ_śam brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp

div.p:
āha_ah uktena_vac prakāreṇa_prakāra viśuddhayā_viśudh pūrva--_pūrva uktayā_vac sāttvikyā_sāttvika buddhyā_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj dhṛtyā_dhṛti sāttvikyāḥ_sāttvika ātmānam_ātman tām_tad eva_eva buddhim_buddhi niyamya_niyam niścalām_niścala kṛtvā_kṛ śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi viṣayān_viṣaya tyaktvā_tyaj tad--_tad viṣayau_viṣaya rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa vyudasya_vyudas ādīnām_ādi brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya kalpate_kﾱp iti_iti tṛtīyena_tṛtīya anvayaḥ_anvaya 51_51 kim_ka ca_ca vivikta--_vivic iti_iti vivikta--_vivikta sevī_sevin śuci--_śuci deśa--_deśa avasthāyī_avasthāyin laghu--_laghu āśī_āśin mita--_mita bhojī_bhojin etaiḥ_etad upāyaiḥ_upāya yata--_yam vāc--_vāc kāya--_kāya mānasaḥ_mānasa saṃyata--_saṃyam vāc--_vāc deha--_deha cittaḥ_citta bhūtvā_bhū nityam_nityam sarvadā_sarvadā dhyānena_dhyāna yaḥ_yad yogaḥ_yoga brahma--_brahman saṃsparśaḥ_saṃsparśa tad--_tad paraḥ_para vairāgyam_vairāgya samyak_samyak upāśritaḥ_upāśri bhūtvā_bhū 52_52 tatas_tatas ca_ca ahaṃkāram_ahaṃkāra iti_iti viraktaḥ_virañj aham_mad iti_iti ādi_ādi ahaṃkāram_ahaṃkāra balam_bala durāgraham_durāgraha darpam_darpa yoga--_yoga balāt_bala unmārga--_unmārga pravṛtti--_pravṛtti lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa prārabdha--_prārabh vaśāt_vaśa prāpyamāneṣu_prāp api_api viṣayeṣu_viṣaya kāmam_kāma krodham_krodha parigraham_parigraha ca_ca vimucya_vimuc viśeṣeṇa_viśeṣeṇa tyaktvā_tyaj balāt_bala
san_as śāntaḥ_śam paramām_parama upaśāntim_upaśānti prāptaḥ_prāp brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya brahmā_brahman aham_mad iti_iti naiścalyena_naiścalya avasthānāya_avasthāna kalpate_kﾱp yogyaḥ_yogya ca_ca bhavati_bhū

dhyānena_dhyāna bhagavat--_bhagavant cintanena_cintana eva_eva yaḥ_yad paraḥ_para yogaḥ_yoga tad--_tad parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa balam_bala kāma--_kāma rāga--_rāga yuktam_yuj na_na tu_tu sāmarthyam_sāmarthya ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra ādīn_ādi vimucya_vimuc iti_iti avidyā--_avidyā uparamaḥ_uparama śāntaḥ_śam sattva--_sattva guṇasya_guṇa api_api upaśāntimān_upaśāntimat iti_iti kṛta--_kṛ jñāna--_jñāna sannyāsaḥ_saṃnyāsa iti_iti arthaḥ_artha jñānam_jñāna ca_ca mayi_mad sannyaset_saṃnyas iti_iti ekādaśa--_ekādaśan ukteḥ_ukti brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya brahma--_brahman anubhavāya_anubhava kalpate_kﾱp samarthaḥ_samartha bhavati_bhū

āha_ah viśuddhayā_viśudh sāttvikyā_sāttvika buddhyā_buddhi yuktaḥ_yuj tādṛśyā_tādṛśa dhṛtyā_dhṛti ca_ca ātmānam_ātman manaḥ_manas niyamya_niyam samādhi--_samādhi yogyam_yogya kṛtvā_kṛ śabda--_śabda ādīn_ādi viṣayān_viṣaya tyaktvā_tyaj tān_tad sannihitān_saṃnidhā vidhāya_vidhā rāga--_rāga dveṣau_dveṣa ca_ca tad--_tad hetukau_hetuka vyudasya_vyudas dūratas_dūratas vivikta--_vivikta sevī_sevin nirjana--_nirjana sthaḥ_stha laghu--_laghu āśī_āśin mita--_mita bhuj_bhuj yatāni_yam dhyeya--_dhyā abhimukhīkṛtāni_abhimukhīkṛ vāc--_vāc ādīni_ādi yena_yad saḥ_tad nityam_nityam dhyāna--_dhyāna yoga--_yoga paraḥ_para hari--_hari cintana--_cintana nirataḥ_niram vairāgyam_vairāgya ātma--_ātman itara--_itara vastu--_vastu mātra--_mātra viṣayakam_viṣayaka aham_mad ahaṃkāraḥ_ahaṃkāra deha--_deha ātma--_ātman abhimānaḥ_abhimāna balam_bala tad--_tad vardhakam_vardhaka vāsanā--_vāsanā rūpam_rūpa darpaḥ_darpa tad--_tad hetukaḥ_hetuka prārabdha--_prārabh śeṣa--_śeṣa vaśāt_vaśa upāgateṣu_upāgam bhogyeṣu_bhogya kāmaḥ_kāma abhilāṣaḥ_abhilāṣa teṣu_tad anyaiḥ_anya apahṛteṣu_apahṛ krodhaḥ_krodha parigrahaḥ_parigraha ca_ca tad--_tad karmakaḥ_karmaka etān_etad ahaṅkāra--_ahaṃkāra ādīn_ādi vimucya_vimuc nirmamaḥ_nirmama san_as brahma--_brahman bhūyāya_bhūya guṇa--_guṇa aṣṭaka--_aṣṭaka viśiṣṭa--_viśiṣ sva--_sva ātma--_ātman rūpa--_rūpa tvāya_tva kalpate_kﾱp tat_tad anubhavati_anubhū śāntaḥ_śam nistaraṅga--_nistaraṅga sindhuḥ_sindhu iva_iva sthitaḥ_sthā

lg.l: brahma--_brahman bhūtaḥ_bhū prasanna--_prasad ātmā_ātman na_na śocati_śuc na_na kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ
samaḥ_sama sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta mad--_mad bhaktim_bhakti labhate_labh parām_para

div.p: āha_ah brahma--_brahman bhūtaḥ_bhū brahmaṇi_brahman avasthitaḥ_avasthā prasanna--_prasad cittaḥ_citta naṣṭam_naś na_na śocati_śuc na_na ca_ca aprāptam_aprāpta kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ deha--_deha ādya--_ādya abhimāna--_abhimāna abhāvāt_abhāva ataeva_ataeva sarveṣu_sarva api_api bhūteṣu_bhūta samaḥ_sama san_as rāga--_rāga dveṣam_dveṣa ādi--_ādi kṛta--_kṛ vikṣepa--_vikṣepa abhāvāt_abhāva sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta mad--_mad bhāvanā--_bhāvanā lakṣaṇṃm_lakṣaṇa parām_para bhaktim_bhakti labhate_labh

guṇa--_guṇa mālinyā_mālinya apagamāt_apagama prasannaḥ_prasad ca_ca asau_adas ātmā_ātman ca_ca iti_iti saḥ_tad tatas_tatas ca_ca pūrva--_pūrva daśāyām_daśā iva_iva naṣṭam_naś na_na śocati_śuc na_na ca_ca aprāptam_aprāpta kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ deha--_deha ādi--_ādi abhimāna--_abhimāna abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva sarveṣu_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta bhadra--_bhadra abhadreṣu_abhadra bālakaḥ_bālaka iva_iva samaḥ_sama bāhya--_bāhya anusandhāna--_anusaṃdhāna abhāvāt_abhāva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

tatas_tatas ca_ca nirindhana--_nirindhana agnau_agni iva_iva jñāne_jñāna śānte_śam api_api anaśvarām_anaśvara jñāna--_jñāna antarbhūtām_antarbhū mad--_mad bhaktim_bhakti śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana ādi--_ādi rūpām_rūpa labhate_labh tasyāḥ_tad mad--_mad svarūpa--_svarūpa śakti--_śakti vṛtti--_vṛtti tvena_tva māyā--_māyā śakti--_śakti bhinna--_bhid tvāt_tva avidyā--_avidyā avidyayoḥ_avidyā apagame_apagama api_api anapagamāt_anapagama ataeva_ataeva parām_para jñānāt_jñāna anyām_anya śreṣṭhām_śreṣṭha niṣkāma--_niṣkāma karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna ādi--_ādi urvarita--_urvarita tvena_tva kevalām_kevala iti_iti arthaḥ_artha labhate_labh iti_iti pūrvam_pūrvam jñāna--_jñāna vairāgya--_vairāgya ādiṣu_ādi mokṣa--_mokṣa siddhi--_siddhi artham_artha kalayā_kalā vartamānāyāḥ_vṛt api_api sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta antaryāminaḥ_antaryāmin iva_iva tasyāḥ_tad spaṣṭā_spaṣṭa upalabdhiḥ_upalabdhi na_na āsīt_as iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva ataeva_ataeva kurute_kṛ iti_iti an_an uktvā_vac labhate_labh iti_iti prayuktam_prayuj māṣam_māṣa udga--_udga ādiṣu_ādi militām_mil teṣu_tad naṣṭeṣu_naś api_api anaśvarām_anaśvara kāñcana--_kāñcana maṇikām_maṇikā iva_iva tebhyaḥ_tad pṛthaktayā_pṛthaktā kevalām_kevala labhate_labh itivat_itivat sampūrṇāyāḥ_sampṛ prema--_preman bhakteḥ_bhakti tu_tu prāyas_prāyas tadānīm_tadānīm lābha--_lābha sambhavaḥ_sambhava asti_as nā_na api_api tasyāḥ_tad phalam_phala sāyujyam_sāyujya iti_iti atas_atas parā_para śabdena_śabda prema--_preman lakṣaṇā_lakṣaṇa iti_iti vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā

āha_ah brahma--_brahman bhūtaḥ_bhū sākṣāt_sākṣāt kṛta--_kṛ aṣṭa--_aṣṭan guṇaka--_guṇaka sva--_sva svarūpaḥ_svarūpa prasanna--_prasad ātmā_ātman kleśa--_kleśa karma--_karman vipāka--_vipāka āśayānām_āśaya vigamāt_vigama ati_ati svacchaḥ_svaccha nadyaḥ_nadī prasanna--_prasad salilāḥ_salila iti_iti ādau_ādi ati_ati vaimalyam_vaimalya prasnna--_prasad śabda--_śabda arthaḥ_artha saḥ_tad evambhūtaḥ_evambhūta mad--_mad anyāt_anya kāṃścid_kaścit prati_prati na_na śocati_śuc na_na ca_ca tān_tad kāṅkṣati_kāṅkṣ sarveṣu_sarva mad--_mad anyeṣu_anya uccāvaceṣu_uccāvaca bhūteṣu_bhūta samaḥ_sama heya--_hā tva--_tva aviśeṣāt_aviśeṣa loṣṭra--_loṣṭra kāṣṭhavattvāni_kāṣṭhavattva manyamānaḥ_man īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa san_as parām_para mad--_mad bhaktim_bhakti niṣṭhām_niṣṭhā jñānasya_jñāna yā_yad parā_para iti_iti (Gītā_Gītā
mad--_mad anubhava--_anubhava lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa mad--_mad vīkṣaṇa--_vīkṣaṇa samāna--_samāna ākārām_ākāra sādhyām_sādhay bhaktim_bhakti vindati_vid iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: bhaktyā_bhakti mām_mad abhijānāti_abhijñā yāvān_yāvat yaḥ_yad ca_ca asmi_as tattvataḥ_tattva
tatas_tatas mām_mad tattvataḥ_tattva jñātvā_jñā viśate_viś tad--_tad anantaram_anantaram

div.p: tathā_tathā ca_ca parayā_para bhaktyā_bhakti tattvataḥ_tattva mām_mad abhijānāti_abhijñā kathambhūtam_kathaṃbhūta yāvān_yāvat sarva--_sarva vyāpī_vyāpin yaḥ_yad ca_ca asmi_as sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda ghanaḥ_ghana tathābhutam_tathābhūta tatas_tatas ca_ca mām_mad evam_evam tattvataḥ_tattva jñātvā_jñā tad--_tad anantaram_anantara tasya_tad jñānasya_jñāna uparame_uparama sati_as mām_mad viśate_viś parama--_parama ānanda--_ānanda rūpaḥ_rūpa bhavati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 55_55

syāt_as āha_ah aham_mad yāvān_yāvat yaḥ_yad ca_ca asmi_as tam_tad mām_mad tad--_tad padārtham_padārtha jñānī_jñānin vā_vā nānāvidhaḥ_nānāvidha bhaktaḥ_bhakta vā_vā bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva tattvataḥ_tattva abhijānāti_abhijñā bhaktyā_bhakti aham_mad ekayā_eka grāhyaḥ_grah iti_iti mad--_mad ukteḥ_ukti yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam tasmāt_tasmāt prastutaḥ_prastu sa_tad jñānī_jñānin tatas_tatas tayā_tad bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva tad--_tad anantaram_anantara vidyā--_vidyā uparamāt_uparama uttara--_uttara kāle_kāla eva_eva mām_mad jñātvā_jñā mām_mad viśati_viś mad--_mad sāyujya--_sāyujya sukham_sukha anubhavati_anubhū mama_mad māyā--_māyā atīta--_atī tvāt_tva avidyāyāḥ_avidyā ca_ca māyā--_māyā tvāt_tva vidyayā_vidyā api_api aham_mad avagamya_avagam iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

yat_yad tu_tu sāṅkhya--_sāṃkhya yogau_yoga ca_ca vairāgyam_vairāgya tapaḥ_tapas bhaktiḥ_bhakti ca_ca keśave_keśava pañca--_pañcan parvā_parvan eva_eva vidyā_vidyā iti_iti nārada--_nārada pañcarātre_pañcarātra vidyā--_vidyā vṛtti--_vṛtti tvena_tva bhaktiḥ_bhakti śrūyate_śru tat_tad khalu_khalu hlādinī--_hlādinī śakti--_śakti vṛtteḥ_vṛtti bhakteḥ_bhakti eva_eva kalā_kalā kācid_kaścit vidyā--_vidyā sāphalya--_sāphalya artham_artha vidyāyām_vidyā praviṣṭā_praviś karma--_karman sāphalya--_sāphalya artham_artha karma--_karman yoge_yoga api_api praviśati_praviś tayā_tad vinā_vinā karma--_karman jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga ādīnām_ādi śrama--_śrama mātra--_mātra tva--_tva ukteḥ_ukti bhavati_bhū

kim_ka ca_ca sattvāt_sattva sañjāyate_saṃjan jñānam_jñāna iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti tat_tad ca_ca sattvam_sattva vidyā--_vidyā śabdena_śabda ucyate_vac yathā_yathā tathā_tathā bhakti--_bhakti uttham_uttha jñānam_jñāna bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva sā_tad eva_eva kvacid_kvacid bhakti--_bhakti śabdena_śabda kvacid_kvacid jñāna--_jñāna śabdena_śabda ca_ca ucyate_vac iti_iti jñānam_jñāna api_api dvividham_dvividha draṣṭavyam_dṛś tatra_tatra prathamam_prathama jñānam_jñāna saṃnyasya_saṃnyas dvitīyena_dvitīya jñānena_jñāna brahma--_brahman sāyujyam_sāyujya āpnuyāt_āp iti_iti ekādaśa--_ekādaśan skandha--_skandha pañcaviṃśati--_pañcaviṃśati adhyāya--_adhyāya dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi api_api jñeyam_jñā atra_atra kecid_kaścit bhaktyā_bhakti vinā_vinā eva_eva kevalena_kevala eva_eva jñānena_jñāna sāyujya--_sāyujya arthinaḥ_arthin te_tad jñāni--_jñānin māninaḥ_mānin kleśa--_kleśa mātra--_mātra phalāḥ_phala ati_ati vigītāḥ_vigā eva_eva anye_anya tu_tu bhaktyā_bhakti vinā_vinā kevalena_kevala jñānena_jñāna na_na muktiḥ_mukti iti_iti jñātvā_jñā bhakti--_bhakti miśram_miśra eva_eva jñānam_jñāna abhasyantaḥ_abhasyat bhagavān_bhagavant tu_tu māyā--_māyā upādhiḥ_upādhi eva_eva iti_iti bhagavat--_bhagavant vapuḥ_vapus guṇa--_guṇa mayam_maya manyamānāḥ_man yoga--_yoga ārūḍha--_āruh tva--_tva daśām_daśā api_api vimukta--_vimuc māninaḥ_mānin vigītāḥ_vigā eva_eva yat_yad uktam_vac

lg.l: mukha--_mukha bāhu--_bāhu ūru--_ūru pādebhyaḥ_pāda
puruṣasya_puruṣa āśramaiḥ_āśrama saha_saha
catvāraḥ_catur jajñire_jan varṇā_varṇa
guṇaiḥ_guṇa vipra--_vipra ādayaḥ_ādi pṛthak_pṛthak

div.p:
yaḥ_yad evam_evam puruṣam_puruṣa sākṣāt_sākṣāt ātma--_ātman prabhavam_prabhava īśvaram_īśvara na_na bhajanti_bhaj avajānanti_avajñā
sthānāt_sthāna bhraṣṭāḥ_bhraṃś patanti_pat adhas_adhas

asya_idam arthaḥ_artha ye_yad na_na bhajanti_bhaj ye_yad ca_ca bhajantaḥ_bhaj api_api avajānanti_avajñā te_tad sannyāsinaḥ_saṃnyāsin api_api vinaṣṭa--_vinaś vidyāḥ_vidyā api_api adhas_adhas patanti_pat tathā_tathā ca_ca hi_hi uktam_vac

ye_yad anye_anya aravinda--_aravinda akṣa_akṣa vimukta--_vimuc māninaḥ_mānin tvayi_tvad asta--_asta bhāvāt_bhāva aviśuddha--_aviśuddha buddhayaḥ_buddhi āruhya_āruh kṛcchreṇa_kṛcchra param_para padam_pada tatas_tatas
patanti_pat adhas_adhas an_an ādṛta--_ādṛ tvad--_tvad aṅghrayaḥ_aṅghri

atra_atra āṅghri--_āṅghri padam_pada bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva prayuktam_prayuj vivakṣitam_vivakṣita an_an ādṛta--_ādṛ yuṣmad--_tvad aṅghrayaḥ_aṅghri iti_iti tanoḥ_tanu guṇa--_guṇa maya--_maya tva--_tva buddhiḥ_buddhi eva_eva tanoḥ_tanu anādaraḥ_anādara yat_yad uktam_vac

avajānanti_avajñā mām_mad mūḍhā_muh
mānuṣīm_mānuṣa tanum_tanu āśritam_āśri 9.11_9.11

vastutas_vastutas tu_tu mānuṣī_mānuṣa sā_tad tanuḥ_tanu saccidānandam_saccidānanda api_api eva_eva tasyāḥ_tad dṛśya--_dṛś tvam_tva tu_tu dustarkya--_dustarkya tadīya--_tadīya kṛpā--_kṛpā śakti--_śakti prabhāvāt_prabhāva eva_eva yat_yad uktam_vac nārāyaṇa--_nārāyaṇa adhyātma--_adhyātma vacanam_vacana

nitya--_nitya avyaktaḥ_avyakta api_api bhagavān_bhagavant īkṣyate_īkṣ nija--_nija śaktitaḥ_śakti tām_tad ṛte_ṛte parama--_parama ānandam_ānanda kaḥ_ka paśyet_paś tam_tad imam_idam prabhum_prabhu iti_iti

evam_evam ca_ca bhagavat--_bhagavant tanoḥ_tanu saccidānanda--_saccidānanda maya--_maya tve_tva saccidānanda--_saccidānanda vigraham_vigraha śrī--_śrī vṛndāvana--_vṛndāvana sura--_sura bhūruha--_bhūruha tala--_tala āsīnam_ās iti_iti śābdam_śābda brahma_brahman vapuḥ_vapus dadhat_dhā iti_iti ādi_ādi śrutiḥ--_śruti smṛti--_smṛti para--_para sahasra--_sahasra vacaneṣu_vacana pramāṇeṣu_pramāṇa satsu_as api_api māyām_māyā tu_tu prakṛtim_prakṛti vidyāt_vid māyinam_māyin tu_tu maheśvaram_maheśvara iti_iti iti_iti śruti--_śruti dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi eva_eva bhagavān_bhagavant api_api māyā--_māyā svarūpa--_svarūpa bhūtayā_bhū nitya--_nitya śaktyā_śakti māyā--_māyā ākhyayā_ākhyā yutaḥ_yuta atas_atas māya--_māya mayam_maya viṣṇum_viṣṇu pravadanti_pravad sanātanam_sanātana iti_iti mādhva--_mādhva bhāṣya--_bhāṣya pramāṇita--_pramāṇay śruteḥ_śruti māyām_māyā tu_tu iti_iti atra_atra māyā--_māyā śabdena_śabda svarūpa--_svarūpa bhūtā_bhū cic--_cic śaktiḥ_śakti eva_eva abhidhīyate_abhidhā na_na tu_tu asvarūpa--_asvarūpa bhūtā_bhū triguṇa--_triguṇa mayī_maya eva_eva śaktiḥ_śakti iti_iti tasyāḥ_tad śruteḥ_śruti artham_artha na_na manyante_man yat_yat vā_vā prakṛtim_prakṛti durgām_durga māyinam_māyin tu_tu maheśvaram_maheśvara śambhum_śambhu vidyāt_vid iti_iti artham_artha api_api nā_na eva_eva manyante_man

atas_atas bhagavat--_bhagavant aparādhena_aparādha jīvan--_jīv muktva--_muktva daśām_daśā prāptāḥ_prāp api_api te_tad adhas_adhas patanti_pat yat_yad uktam_vac vāsanā--_vāsanā bhāṣya--_bhāṣya dhṛtam_dhṛ pariśiṣṭa--_pariśiṣṭa vacanam_vacana
jīvan--_jīv muktāḥ_muc api_api punar_punar yānti_yā saṃsāra--_saṃsāra vāsanām_vāsanā yadi_yadi acintya--_acintya mahā--_mahat śaktau_śakti bhagavati_bhagavant aparādhinaḥ_aparādhin iti_iti

te_tad ca_ca phala--_phala prāptau_prāpti satyām_as arthāt_artha na_na asti_as sādhana--_sādhana upayogaḥ_upayoga iti_iti matvā_man jñāna--_jñāna sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa kāle_kāla jñānam_jñāna tatra_tatra guṇī--_guṇī bhūtām_bhū bhaktim_bhakti api_api santyajya_saṃtyaj mithyā_mithyā eva_eva aparokṣa--_aparokṣa anubhavam_anubhava tu_tu asya_idam manyante_man śrī--_śrī vigraha--_vigraha aparādhena_aparādha bhaktyā_bhakti api_api jñānena_jñāna sārdham_sārdham antardhānāt_antardhāna bhaktim_bhakti te_tad punar_punar nā_na eva_eva labhante_labh bhaktyā_bhakti vinā_vinā ca_ca tad--_tad padārtha--_padārtha ananubhāvāt_ananubhāva mṛṣā_mṛṣā samādhayaḥ_samādhi jīvan--_jīv mukta--_muc māninaḥ_mānin eva_eva te_tad jñeyāḥ_jñā yat_yad uktam_vac ye_yad anye_anya aravinda--_aravinda akṣa_akṣa vimukta--_vimuc māninaḥ_mānin iti_iti

ye_yad tu_tu bhakti--_bhakti miśram_miśra jñānam_jñāna abhyasyantaḥ_abhyas bhagavat--_bhagavant mūrtim_mūrti sat--_sat cit--_cit ānanda--_ānanda mayīm_maya eva_eva mānayānāḥ_mānay krameṇa_krameṇa avidyā--_avidyā avidyayoḥ_avidyā uparāme_uparāma parām_para bhaktim_bhakti labhante_labh te_tad jīvan--_jīv muktāḥ_mukta dvividhāḥ_dvividha eke_eka sāyujya--_sāyujya artham_artha bhaktim_bhakti kurvantaḥ_kṛ tayā_tad eva_eva tat_tad padārtham_padārtha a_a parokṣīkṛtya_parokṣīkṛ tasmin_tad sāyujyam_sāyujya labhante_labh te_tad saṅgītāḥ_saṃgīta eva_eva apare_apara bhūri--_bhūri bhāgāḥ_bhāga yādṛcchika--_yādṛcchika śānta--_śam mahā--_mahat bhāgavata--_bhāgavata saṅga--_saṅga prabhāvena_prabhāva tyakta--_tyaj mumukṣāḥ_mumukṣā śuka--_śuka ādi--_ādi vat_vat bhakti--_bhakti rasa--_rasa mādhurya--_mādhurya āsvāde_āsvāda eva_eva nimajjanti_nimajj te_tad tu_tu parama--_parama saṅgītāḥ_saṃgīta eva_eva yat_yad uktam_vac

ātma--_ātman ārāmāḥ_ārāma ca_ca munayaḥ_muni nirgranthāḥ_nirgrantha api_api urukrame_urukrama kurvanti_kṛ ahaitukīm_ahaituka bhaktim_bhakti
itthambhūta--_itthambhūta guṇaḥ_guṇa hariḥ_hari iti_iti
div.l: tat_tad evam_evam caturvidhāḥ_caturvidha jñāninaḥ_jñānin dvaye_dvaya vigītāḥ_vigīta patanti_pat dvaye_dvaya saṅgītāḥ_saṃgīta taranti_tṛ saṃsāram_saṃsāra iti_iti
div.p: tatas_tatas kim_ka tat_tad āha_ah bhaktyā_bhakti iti_iti svarūpataḥ_svarūpa guṇataḥ_guṇa ca_ca yaḥ_yad aham_mad vibhūtitaḥ_vibhūti ca_ca yāvān_yāvat aham_mad asmi_as tam_tad mām_mad parayā_para mad--_mad bhaktyā_bhakti tat_tad tu_tu abhijānāti_abhijñā anubhavati_anubhū tatas_tatas mad--_mad parama--_parama bhaktitaḥ_bhakti hetoḥ_hetu ukta--_vac lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa mām_mad tattvataḥ_tattva yāthātmyena_yāthātmya jñātvā_jñā anubhūya_anubhū tad--_tad anantaram_anantara tatas_tatas eva_eva hetoḥ_hetu mām_mad viśate_viś mayā_mad saha_saha yujyate_yuj puram_pura praviśati_praviś iti_iti atra_atra pura--_pura saṃyogaḥ_saṃyoga eva_eva pratīyate_pratī na_na tu_tu pura--_pura ātmaka--_ātmaka tvam_tva

atra_atra tattvataḥ_tattva abhijñāne_abhijñāna praveśe_praveśa ca_ca bhaktiḥ_bhakti eva_eva hetuḥ_hetu uktaḥ_vac bodhyaḥ_budh bhaktyā_bhakti tu_tu ananyayā_ananya śakyaḥ_śakya iti_iti (Gītā_Gītā 11.54_11.54 ādi_ādi pūrva--_pūrva ukteḥ_ukti tad--_tad anantaram_anantaram iti_iti mad--_mad svarūpa--_svarūpa guṇa--_guṇa vibhūti--_vibhūti tāttvika--_tāttvika anubhavāt_anubhava uttarasmin_uttara kāle_kāla iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā parayā_para bhaktyā_bhakti mām_mad tattvataḥ_tattva jñātvā_jñā tatas_tatas tām_tad bhaktim_bhakti ādāya_ādā eva_eva mām_mad viśate_viś lyap--_lyap lope_lopa karmaṇi_karman pañcamī_pañcamī mokṣe_mokṣa api_api bhaktiḥ_bhakti asti_as iti_iti āha_ah sūtra--_sūtra kṛt_kṛt ā_ā prāyaṇāt_prāyaṇa tatra_tatra api_api hi_hi dṛṣṭam_dṛś iti_iti ā_ā prāyaṇāt_prāyaṇa ā_ā mokṣāt_mokṣa tatra_tatra api_api ca_ca bhaktiḥ_bhakti anuvartate_anuvṛt iti_iti śrutau_śruti dṛṣṭam_dṛś iti_iti sūtra--_sūtra arthaḥ_artha bhaktyāḥ_bhakti vinaṣṭa--_vinaś avidyānām_avidyā bhaktyāḥ_bhakti svādaḥ_svāda vivardhate_vivṛdh sitayā_sitā naṣṭa--_naś pittānām_pitta sitā--_sitā āsvāda--_āsvāda vat_vat iti_iti rahasya--_rahasya vidaḥ_vid ittham_ittham ca_ca sa_sa niṣṭhānām_niṣṭhā
_

lg.l: sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman api_api sadā_sadā kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ mad--_mad vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya
mad--_mad prasādāt_prasāda avāpnoti_avāp śāśvatam_śāśvata padam_pada avyayam_avyaya

div.p: upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ sarvāṇi_sarva nityāni_nitya naimittikāni_naimittika ca_ca karmāṇi_karman purva--_purva ukta--_vac krameṇa_krama sarvadā_sarvadā kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ mad--_mad vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya aham_mad eva_eva vyāpāśrayaḥ_vyāpāśraya āśrayaṇīyaḥ_āśri na_na tu_tu svarga--_svarga ādi--_ādi phalam_phala yasya_yad sa_tad mad--_mad prasādāt_prasāda śāśvatam_śāśvata anādi_anādi sarva_sarva

prāpnoti_prāp mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta tu_tu mām_mad yathā_yathā prāpnoti_prāp tat_tad api_api śṛṇu_śru iti_iti āha_ah sarva--_sarva iti_iti mad--_mad vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya mām_mad viśeṣataḥ_viśeṣataḥ apakarṣeṇa_apakarṣa sa_sa kāmatayā_kāmatā api_api yaḥ_yad āśrayate_āśri saḥ_tad api_api kim_kim punar_punar niṣkāma--_niṣkāma bhaktaḥ_bhakta iti_iti arthaḥ_artha sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman api_api nitya--_nitya naimittika--_naimittika kāmyāni_kāmya putra--_putra kalatra--_kalatra ādi--_ādi poṣaṇa--_poṣaṇa lakṣaṇāni_lakṣaṇa vyavahārikāṇi_vyavahārika api_api sarvāṇi_sarva kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ kim_ka punar_punar tyakta--_tyaj karma--_karman yoga--_yoga jñāna--_jñāna devatā--_devatā antara--_antara upāsanāni_upāsana anya--_anya kāmāni_kāma a_a

atra_atra āśrayate_āśri samyak_samyak sevate_sev iti_iti āṭ--_āṭ upasargena_upasarga sevāyāḥ_sevā pradhānībhūta--_pradhānībhū tvam_tva karmāṇi_karman api_api iti_iti api_api śabdena_śabda apakarṣa--_apakarṣa bodhakena_bodhaka karmaṇām_karman guṇībhūta--_guṇībhū tvam_tva atas_atas ayam_idam karma--_karman miśra--_miśra bhaktimān_bhaktimat na_na tu_tu bhakti--_bhakti miśra--_miśra karmavān_karmavat iti_iti prathama--_prathama ṣaṭka--_ṣaṭka ukte_vac karmaṇi_karman na_na ativyāptiḥ_ativyāpti śāśvatam_śāśvata mahat_mahat padam_pada mad--_mad dhāma_dhāman vaikuṇṭha--_vaikuṇṭha mathurā--_mathurā dvārakā--_dvārakā ayodhyā--_ayodhyā ādikam_ādika āpnoti_āp

nanu_nanu mahā--_mahat pralaye_pralaya tat_tad tat_tad dhāma_dhāman katham_katham sthāsyati_sthā tatra_tatra āha_ah avyayam_avyaya mahā--_mahat pralaye_pralaya mad--_mad dhāmnaḥ_dhāman kim_ka api_api na_na vyayati_vye mad--_mad atarkya--_atarkya prabhāvāt_prabhāva iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu jñānī_jñānin khalu_khalu anekaiḥ_aneka janmabhiḥ_janman aneka--_aneka tapaḥ--_tapas ādi--_ādi kleśaiḥ_kleśa sarva--_sarva viṣaya--_viṣaya indriya--_indriya uparāmeṇa_uparāma eva_eva naiṣkarmye_naiṣkarmya sati_as eva_eva yat_yat sāyujyam_sāyujya prāpnoti_prāp tasya_tad te_tvad nityam_nitya dhāma_dhāman sa_sa karmaka--_karmaka tve_tva sa_sa kāmaka--_kāmaka tve_tva api_api tvad--_tvad āśrayaṇa--_āśrayaṇa mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva katham_katham prāpnoti_prāp tatra_tatra āha_ah mad--_mad prasādāt_prasāda iti_iti mad--_mad prasādasya_prasāda atarkyam_atarkya eva_eva prabhāva--_prabhāva tvam_tva jānīhi_jñā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

āha_ah mad--_mad vyapāśrayaḥ_vyapāśraya mad--_mad ekāntī_ekāntin sarvāṇi_sarva sva--_sva vihitāni_vidhā karmāṇi_karman yathā_yathā yogam_yoga kurvāṇaḥ_kṛ api_api śabdāt_śabda gauṇa--_gauṇa kāle_kāla mad--_mad ekāntinaḥ_ekāntin tasya_tad mukhya--_mukhya kāla--_kāla abhāvāt_abhāva āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra sarvathā_sarvathā api_api tatra_tatra vā_vā ubhaya--_ubhaya liṅgāt_liṅga īdṛśaḥ_īdṛśa sa_tad mad--_mad prasādāt_prasāda mad--_mad atyanugrahāt_atyanugraha śāśvatam_śāśvata nityam_nitya avyayam_avyaya apariṇāmi--_apariṇāmin jñāna--_jñāna ānanda--_ānanda ātmakam_ātmaka padam_pada param_para vyoma--_vyoman ākhyam_ākhyā avāpnoti_avāp labhate_labh

lg.l: cetasā_cetas sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman mayi_mad saṃnyasya_saṃnyas mad--_mad paraḥ_para
buddhi--_buddhi yogam_yoga upāśritya_upāśri mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta satatam_satatam bhava_bhū

div.p: sarvāṇi_sarva karmāṇi_karman cetasā_cetas mayi_mad saṃnyasya_saṃnyas samarpya_samarpay mad--_mad paraḥ_para aham_mad eva_eva paraḥ_para prāpyaḥ_prāp puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha yasya_yad sa_tad vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikayā_ātmaka buddhyā_buddhi yogam_yoga upāśritya_upāśri satatam_satatam karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna kāle_kāla api_api brahma--_brahman arpaṇam_arpaṇa brahma--_brahman haviḥ_havis cittam_citta yasya_yad tathābhūtaḥ_tathābhūta bhava_bhū 57_57

Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha nanu_nanu tarhi_tarhi mām_mad prati_prati tvam_tvad niścayena_niścaya kim_ka ājñāpayasi_ājñāpay kim_kim aham_mad ananya--_ananya bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhavāmi_bhū kim_kim vā_vā anantara--_anantara ukta--_vac lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa sa_sa kāma--_kāma bhaktaḥ_bhakta eva_eva tatra_tatra sarva--_sarva prakṛṣṭaḥ_prakṛṣ ananya--_ananya bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhavitum_bhū na_na prabhaviṣyasi_prabhū na_na api_api sarva--_sarva bhakteṣu_bhakta apakṛṣṭaḥ_apakṛṣṭa sa_sa kāma--_kāma bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhava_bhū kintu_kiṃtu tvam_tvad madhyama--_madhyama bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhava_bhū iti_iti āha_ah cetasā_cetas iti_iti sarva--_sarva karmāṇi_karman sva--_sva āśrama--_āśrama dharmān_dharma vyavahārika--_vyavahārika karmāṇi_karman ca_ca mayi_mad sannyasya_saṃnyas samarpya_samarpay mad--_mad paraḥ_para aham_mad eva_eva paraḥ_para prāpyaḥ_prāp puruṣa--_puruṣa arthaḥ_artha yasya_yad sa_tad niṣkāmaḥ_niṣkāma iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yad uktam_vac pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva
yat_yad karoṣi_kṛ yat_yad aśnāsi_aś yat_yad juhoṣi_hu dadāsi_dā yat_yad yat_yad tapasyasi_tapasy kaunteya_kaunteya tat_tad kuruṣva_kṛ mad--_mad arpaṇam_arpaṇa iti_iti (Gītā_Gītā
div.l: buddhi--_buddhi yogam_yoga vyavasāya--_vyavasāya ātmikayā_ātmaka buddhyā_buddhi yogam_yoga satatam_satatam mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta karma--_karman anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna kāle_kāla anyadā_anyadā api_api mām_mad smaran_smṛ bhava_bhū
div.p: _ bhava_bhū etat_etad ca_ca tvām_tvad prati_prati prāk_prāk api_api uktam_vac yat_yad karoṣi_kṛ iti_iti ādinā_ādi arpayitvā_arpay eva_eva karmāṇi_karman kuru_kṛ na_na tu_tu kṛtvā_kṛ arpaya_arpay iti_iti 57_57

lg.l: mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta sarva--_sarva durgāṇi_durga mad--_mad prasādat_prasāda tariṣyasi_tṛ
atha_atha ced_ced tvam_tvad ahaṃkārāt_ahaṃkāra na_na śroṣyasi_śru vinaṅkṣyasi_vinaś

div.p: bhaviṣyati_bhū śṛṇu_śru mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta san_as mad--_mad prasādāt_prasāda sarvāṇi_sarva api_api durgāṇi_durga dustarāṇi_dustara sāṃsārika--_sāṃsārika duḥkhāni_duḥkha tariṣyasi_tṛ vipakṣe_vipakṣa doṣam_doṣa āha_ah atha_atha ced_ced yadi_yadi punar_punar tvam_tvad ahaṃkārān_ahaṃkāra jñātṛ--_jñātṛ tva--_tva abhimānāt_abhimāna mat_mad uktam_vac evam_evam na_na śroṣyasi_śru tarhi_tarhi vinaṅkṣyasi_vinaś puruṣa--_puruṣa arthāt_artha bhraṣṭaḥ_bhraṃś bhaviṣyasi_bhū 58_58
div.l: āha_ah
div.p: tariṣyasi_tṛ tatra_tatra te_tvad na_na cintā_cintā tāni_tad aham_mad bhakta--_bhakta bandhuḥ_bandhu apaneṣyami_apanī dāsyāmi_dā ca_ca ātmānam_ātman iti_iti pariniṣṭhitānām_pariniṣṭhā sādhana--_sādhana sādhya--_sādhay paddhatiḥ_paddhati uktā_vac atha_atha ced_ced ahaṅkārāt_ahaṃkāra kṛtyā--_kṛtyā akṛtya--_akṛtya viṣayaka--_viṣayaka jñāna--_jñāna abhimānāt_abhimāna tvam_tvad mad--_mad uktam_vac na_na śroṣyasi_śru tarhi_tarhi vinaṅkṣyasi_vinaś svārthāt_svārtha vibhraṣṭaḥ_vibhraṃś bhaviṣyasi_bhū na_na hi_hi kaścid_kaścit prāṇinām_prāṇin kṛtyā--_kṛtyā akṛtyoḥ_akṛtyu vijñātā_vijñātṛ praśāstā_praśāstṛ vā_vā mattaḥ_mad anyaḥ_anya vartate_vṛt 58_58

lg.l: yat_yat ahaṃkāram_ahaṃkāra āśritya_āśri na_na yotsye_yudh iti_iti manyase_man
mithyā_mithyā eṣa_etad vyavasāyaḥ_vyavasāya te_tvad prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti tvām_tvad niyokṣyati_niyuj

div.p: kariṣyāmi_kṛ āha_ah mad--_mad uktam_vac an_an ādṛtya_ādṛ kevalam_kevala ahaṅkāram_ahaṃkāra avalambya_avalamb yuddham_yuddha na_na kariṣyāmi_kṛ iti_iti yat_yad manyase_man tvam_tvad adhyavasyasi_adhyavaso eṣa_etad tava_tvad vyavasāyaḥ_vyavasāya mithyā_mithyā eva_eva asvatantra--_asvatantra tvāt_tva tava_tvad tat_tad eva_eva āha_ah prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti tvām_tvad rajaḥ--_rajas guṇa--_guṇa rūpeṇa_rūpa pariṇatā_pariṇam satī_as niyokṣyati_niyuj pravartayiṣyati_pravartay iti_iti 59_59

icchāmi_iṣ āha_ah prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva adhunā_adhunā tvam_tvad mad--_mad vacanam_vacana na_na mānayasi_mānay yadā_yadā tu_tu mahā--_mahat vīrasya_vīra tava_tvad svābhāvikaḥ_svābhāvika yuddha--_yuddha utsāhaḥ_utsāha durvāraḥ_durvāra evā_eva udbhaviṣyati_udbhū tadā_tadā yudhyamānaḥ_yudh svayam_svayam eva_eva bhīṣma--_bhīṣma ādīn_ādi gurūn_guru haniṣyan_han mayā_mad hasiṣyase_has iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva 59_59
div.l: manyase_man tava_tvad eṣa_etad vyavasāyaḥ_vyavasāya niścayaḥ_niścaya mithyā_mithyā niṣphalaḥ_niṣphala bhāvī_bhāvin prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti mad--_mad māyā_māyā rajaḥ--_rajas guṇa--_guṇa ātmanā_ātman pariṇatā_pariṇam mad--_mad vākya--_vākya avahelinam_avahelin tvām_tvad guru--_guru ādi--_ādi vadhe_vadha nimitte_nimitta yuddhe_yuddha niyokṣyati_niyuj pravartayiṣyati_pravartay eva_eva 59_59

lg.l: svabhāva--_svabhāva jena_ja kaunteya_kaunteya nibaddhaḥ_nibandh svena_sva karmaṇā_karman
kartum_kṛ nā_na icchasi_iṣ yat_yad mohāt_moha kariṣyasi_kṛ tat_tad

div.p: svabhāvaḥ_svabhāva kṣatriya--_kṣatriya tva--_tva hetuḥ_hetu pūrva--_pūrva janma--_janman saṃskāraḥ_saṃskāra tasmāt_tad jātena_jan svīyena_svīya karmaṇā_karman śaurya--_śaurya ādinā_ādi pūrva--_pūrva uktena_vac nibaddhaḥ_nibandh yantritaḥ_yantray tvam_tvad mohāt_moha yat_yad karma_karman yuddha--_yuddha lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa kartum_kṛ na_na icchasi_iṣ
div.l: vivṛṇoti_vivṛ
div.p: upapādayati_upapāday icchasi_iṣ kariṣyasi_kṛ

lg.l: īśvaraḥ_īśvara sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta hṛd--_hṛd deśeḥ_deśa juna_juna tiṣṭhati_sthā
bhrāmayan_bhrāmay sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta yantra--_yantra ārūḍhāni_āruh māyayā_māyā

div.p: idānīm_idānīm sva--_sva matam_mata āha_ah īśvaraḥ_īśvara iti_iti dvābhyām_dvi sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta hṛd--_hṛd madhye_madhya īśvaraḥ_īśvara antaryāmī_antaryāmin tiṣṭhati_sthā kim_ka kurvan_kṛ sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta māyayā_māyā nija--_nija śaktyā_śakti bhrāmayan_bhrāmay tad--_tad tad--_tad karmasu_karman pravartayan_pravartay yathā_yathā dāru--_dāru yantram_yantra ārūḍhāni_āruh kṛtrimāni_kṛtrima bhūtāni_bhūta sūtradhāraḥ_sūtradhāra loke_loka bhrāmayati_bhrāmay tadvat_tadvat iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā yantrāṇi_yantra śarīrāṇi_śarīra ārūḍhāni_āruh bhūtāni_bhūta deha--_deha abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin jīvān_jīva bhramayan_bhramay iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tathā_tathā ca_ca śvetāśvatārāṇām_śvetāśvatāra mantraḥ_mantra

ekaḥ_eka devaḥ_deva sarva--_sarva bhūteṣu_bhūta gūḍhaḥ_guh sarva--_sarva vyāpī_vyāpin sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta antarātmā_antarātman karma--_karman adhyakṣaḥ_adhyakṣa sarva--_sarva bhūta--_bhūta adhivāsaḥ_adhivāsa sākṣī_sākṣin cetā_cetṛ kevalaḥ_kevala nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa ca_ca

antaryāmi--_antaryāmin brāhmaṇam_brāhmaṇa ca_ca yaḥ_yad ātmani_ātman tiṣṭhan_sthā ātmānam_ātman antaraḥ_antara yamayati_yamay yam_yad ātmā_ātman na_na veda_vid yasya_yad ātmā_ātman śarīram_śarīra eva_eva te_tvad ātmā_ātman antaryāmī_antaryāmin amṛtaḥ_amṛta iti_iti ādi_ādi
div.l: āha_ah yaḥ_yad pṛthivyām_pṛthivī tiṣṭhan_sthā pṛthivyāḥ_pṛthivī antaraḥ_antara yam_yad pṛthivī_pṛthivī na_na veda_vid yasya_yad pṛthivī_pṛthivī śarīram_śarīra yaḥ_yad pṛthivīm_pṛthivī antaraḥ_antara yamayati_yamay iti_iti

lg.l: yat_yad ca_ca kiñcid_kaścit jagati_jagatī asmin_idam
dṛśyate_dṛś śrūyate_śru api_api vā_vā
antar_antar bahis_bahis ca_ca tat_tad sarvam_sarva
vyāpya_vyāp nārāyaṇaḥ_nārāyaṇa sthitaḥ_sthā

div.p: iti_iti ādi_ādi śruti--_śruti pratipāditaḥ_pratipāday īśvaraḥ_īśvara antaryāmī_antaryāmin hṛdi_hṛd tiṣṭhati_sthā kim_ka kurvan_kṛ sarvāṇi_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta māyayā_māyā nija--_nija śaktyā_śakti bhrāmayan_bhrāmay bhramayan_bhramay tad--_tad tad--_tad karmāṇi_karman pravartayan_pravartay yathā_yathā sūtra--_sūtra sañcāra--_saṃcāra ādi--_ādi yantram_yantra ārūḍhāni_āruh kṛtrimāṇi_kṛtrima pāñcālikā--_pāñcālikā rūpāṇi_rūpa sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta māyā_māyā arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā yantra--_yantra ārūḍhāni_āruh śarīra--_śarīra ārūḍhān_āruh sarva--_sarva jīvān_jīva iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 61_61

upadiśati_upadiś he_he arjuna_arjuna tvam_tvad ced_ced svam_sva vijṇam_vijṇa manyase_man tarhi_tarhi antaryāmi--_antaryāmin brāhmaṇāt_brāhmaṇa tvayā_tvad jñātaḥ_jñā yaḥ_yad īśvaraḥ_īśvara sarva--_sarva bhūtānām_bhūta brahma--_brahman ādi--_ādi sthāvara--_sthāvara antānām_anta hṛd--_hṛd deśe_deśa tiṣṭhati_sthā māyayā_māyā sva--_sva śaktyā_śakti tāni_tad bhrāmayan_bhrāmay sarva--_sarva bhūtāni_bhūta viśinaṣṭi_viśiṣ yantra--_yantra iti_iti yat_yad karma--_karman anuguṇam_anuguṇa māyā--_māyā nirmitam_nirmā deha--_deha indriya--_indriya prāṇa--_prāṇa lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa yantram_yantra tad--_tad ārūḍhāni_āruh rūpakeṇa_rūpaka upamā_upamā atra_atra vyajyate_vyañj yathā_yathā sūtra--_sūtra dhāraḥ_dhāra dāru--_dāru yantra--_yantra ārūḍhāni_āruh kṛtrimāṇi_kṛtrima bhūtāni_bhūta bhrāmayati_bhrāmay tadvat_tadvat 61_61

lg.l: tam_tad eva_eva śaraṇam_śaraṇa gaccha_gam sarva--_sarva bhāvena_bhāva bhārata_bhārata
tad--_tad prasādāt_prasāda parām_para śāntim_śānti sthānam_sthāna prāpsyasi_prāp śāśvatam_śāśvata

div.p: yasmāt_yasmāt evam_evam sarve_sarva jīvāḥ_jīva parameśvara--_parameśvara paratantrāḥ_paratantra tasmāt_tasmāt ahaṅkāram_ahaṃkāra parityajya_parityaj sarva--_sarva bhāvena_bhāva sarva--_sarva ātmanā_ātman tam_tad īśvaram_īśvara eva_eva śaraṇam_śaraṇa gaccha_gam tatas_tatas ca_ca tasya_tad eva_eva prasādāt_prasāda parām_para uttamām_uttama śāntim_śānti sthānam_sthāna ca_ca pārameśvaram_pārameśvara śāśvatam_śāśvata nityam_nityam prāpsyasi_prāp 62_62

āha_ah parām_para avidyā--_avidyā avidyayoḥ_avidyā nivṛttim_nivṛtti tatas_tatas ca_ca śāśvatam_śāśvata sthānam_sthāna vaikuṇṭham_vaikuṇṭha iyam_idam antaryāmi--_antaryāmin śaraṇāpattiḥ_śaraṇāpatti antaryāmi--_antaryāmin upāsakānām_upāsaka bhagavat--_bhagavant upāsakānām_upāsaka tu_tu bhagavat--_bhagavant śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āpattiḥ_āpatti agre_agra vakṣyate_vac eva_eva iti_iti kecid_kaścit āhuḥ_ah anyaḥ_anya tu_tu yaḥ_yad mad--_mad iṣṭa--_iṣ devaḥ_deva śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇaḥ_kṛṣṇa saḥ_tad eva_eva mad--_mad guruḥ_guru mām_mad bhakti--_bhakti yogam_yoga anukūlam_anukūla hitam_hita ca_ca upadeśam_upadeśa upadiśati_upadiś ca_ca tam_tad aham_mad śaraṇam_śaraṇa prapadye_prapad iti_iti aniśam_aniśam bhāvaya_bhāvay iti_iti yat_yad uktam_vac uddhavena_uddhava

na_na eva_eva upayanti_upe apacitim_apaciti kavayaḥ_kavi tava_tvad īśa_īśa brahmayusā_brahmayus api_api kṛtam_kṛ ṛddha--_ṛdh mudaḥ_mud smarantaḥ_smṛ yaḥ_yad antar_antar bahis_bahis tanu--_tanu bhṛtām_bhṛt aśubham_aśubha vidhunvan_vidhū ācārya--_ācārya caittya--_caittya vapuṣā_vapus sva--_sva gatim_gati vyanakti_vyañj

gaccha_gam tatas_tatas kim_ka iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah tat_tad iti_iti parām_para śāntim_śānti nikhila--_nikhila kleśa--_kleśa viśleṣa--_viśleṣa lakṣaṇām_lakṣaṇa śāśvatam_śāśvata nityam_nitya sthānam_sthāna ca_ca tat_tad viṣṇoḥ_viṣṇu paramam_parama padam_pada iti_iti ādi_ādi śruti--_śruti gītam_gā tat_tad dhāma_dhāman prāpsyasi_prāp sa_tad ca_ca īśvaraḥ_īśvara aham_mad eva_eva tvad--_tvad sakhaḥ_sakha sarvasya_sarva ca_ca aham_mad hṛdi_hṛd sanniviṣṭaḥ_saṃniviś iti_iti viśva--_viśva rūpa--_rūpa darśane_darśana pratyakṣita--_pratyakṣita tvāt_tva ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt mad--_mad upadeśe_upadeśa tiṣṭha_sthā iti_iti 62_62

lg.l: iti_iti te_tvad jñānam_jñāna ākhyātam_ākhyā guhyāt_guhya guhyataram_guhyatara mayā_mad
vimṛśya_vimṛś etat_etad aśeṣeṇa_aśeṣeṇa yathā_yathā icchasi_iṣ tathā_tathā kuru_kṛ

div.p: āha_ah iti_iti anena_idam prakāreṇa_prakāra te_tvad tubhyam_tvad sarvajñena_sarvajña parama--_parama kāruṇikena_kāruṇika mayā_mad jñānam_jñāna ākhyātam_ākhyā upadiṣṭam_upadiś kathambhūtam_kathaṃbhūta guhyāt_guhya gopyāt_gup rahasya--_rahasya mantra--_mantra yoga--_yoga ādi--_ādi jñānāt_jñāna api_api guhyataram_guhyatara etat_etad mayā_mad upadiṣṭam_upadiś gītā--_gītā śāstram_śāstra paryālocya_paryālocay paścāt_paścāt yathā_yathā icchasi_iṣ tathā_tathā kuru_kṛ etasmin_etad paryālocite_paryālocay sati_as tava_tvad mohaḥ_moha nivartiṣyate_nivṛt iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha sarva--_sarva gīta--_gīta artham_artha upasaṃharati_upasaṃhṛ karma--_karman yogasya_yoga aṣṭāṅga--_aṣṭāṅga yogasya_yoga jñāna--_jñāna yogasya_yoga ca_ca jñānam_jñāna jñāyate_jñā anena_idam iti_iti jñānam_jñāna jñāna--_jñāna śāstram_śāstra guhyāt_guhya guhyataram_guhyatara iti_iti ati_ati rahasya--_rahasya tvāt_tva kaiḥ_ka api_api api_api sva--_sva sva--_sva kṛta--_kṛ śāstreṇa_śāstra aprakāśitam_aprakāśita yat_yad vā_vā teṣām_tad sārvajñyam_sārvajñya āpekṣikam_āpekṣika mama_mad tu_tu ātyantikam_ātyantika iti_iti atas_atas te_tad tu_tu etat_etad ati_ati guhya--_guhya tvāt_tva na_na jānanti_jñā mayā_mad api_api ati_ati guhya--_guhya tvāt_tva eva_eva te_tvad sarvathā_sarvathā eva_eva na_na etat_etad upadiṣṭāḥ_upadiś iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva etat_etad aśeṣeṇa_aśeṣeṇa niḥśeṣataḥ_niḥśeṣa eva_eva vimṛśya_vimṛś yathā_yathā yena_yad prakāreṇa_prakāra sva--_sva abhirucitam_abhiruc yat_yad kartum_kṛ icchasi_iṣ tathā_tathā tat_tad kuru_kṛ iti_iti antyam_antya jñāna--_jñāna ṣaṭkam_ṣaṭka sampūrṇam_sampṛ ṣaṭka--_ṣaṭka trikam_trika idam_idam sarva--_sarva vidyā--_vidyā śiraḥ--_śiras ratnam_ratna śrī--_śrī gītā--_gītā śāstram_śāstra mahānarghya--_mahānarghya rahasyatama--_rahasyatama bhakti--_bhakti sampuṭam_sampuṭa bhavati_bhū prathamam_prathama karma--_karman ṣaṭkam_ṣaṭka yasya_yad ādhāra--_ādhāra pidhānam_pidhāna kānakam_kānaka bhavati_bhū antyam_antya jñāna--_jñāna ṣaṭkam_ṣaṭka yasya_yad uttara--_uttara pidhānam_pidhāna maṇi--_maṇi jaṭitam_jaṭay kānakam_kānaka bhavati_bhū tayoḥ_tad madhya--_madhya varti--_vartin ṣaṭka--_ṣaṭka gatā_gam bhaktiḥ_bhakti trijagat--_trijagant anarghyā_anarghya śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa vaśīkāriṇī_vaśīkārin mahā--_mahat maṇi--_maṇi matallikā_matallikā virājate_virāj yasyāḥ_yad paricārikā_paricārikā tad--_tad uttara--_uttara pidhāna--_pidhāna ardha--_ardha gatā_gam mad--_mad manāḥ_manas bhava_bhū iti_iti ādi_ādi bhavati_bhū iti_iti budhyate_budh

āha_ah iti_iti pūrva--_pūrva ukta--_vac prakārakam_prakāraka jñānam_jñāna gītā--_gītā śāstram_śāstra jñāyante_jñā karma--_karman bhakti--_bhakti jñānāni_jñāna anena_idam iti_iti nirukteḥ_nirukti tat_tad mayā_mad te_tvad tubhyam_tvad ākhyātam_ākhyā samproktam_sampravac guhyāt_guhya rahasya--_rahasya mantra--_mantra ādi--_ādi śāstrāt_śāstra guhyataram_guhyatara iti_iti gopyam_gup etat_etad śāstra--_śāstra śeṣeṇa_śeṣa sāmastyena_sāmastya vimṛśya_vimṛś paścāt_paścāt yathā_yathā icchasi_iṣ tathā_tathā kuru_kṛ etasmin_etad paryālocite_paryālocay tava_tvad moha--_moha vināśaḥ_vināśa mad--_mad vacasi_vacas sthitiḥ_sthiti ca_ca bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti

lg.l: sarva--_sarva guhyatamam_guhyatama bhūyas_bhūyas śṛṇu_śru me_mad paramam_parama vacaḥ_vacas
iṣṭaḥ_iṣ asi_as me_mad dṛḍham_dṛḍham iti_iti tatas_tatas vakṣyāmi_vac te_tvad hitam_hita

div.p: kathayati_kathay sarvebhyaḥ_sarva guhyebhyaḥ_guhya guhyatamam_guhyatama me_mad vacaḥ_vacas tatra_tatra tatra_tatra uktam_vac api_api bhūyas_bhūyas punar_punar api_api vakṣyamaṇam_vac śṛṇu_śru punar_punar punar_punar kathane_kathana hetum_hetu āha_ah dṛḍham_dṛḍham atyantam_atyantam me_mad mama_mad tvam_tvad iṣṭaḥ_iṣ priyaḥ_priya asi_as iti_iti matvā_man tatas_tatas eva_eva hetoḥ_hetu te_tvad hitam_hita vakṣyāmi_vac yat_yat vā_vā tvam_tvad mama_mad iṣṭaḥ_iṣ asi_as mayā_mad vakṣyamāṇam_vac ca_ca dṛḍham_dṛḍha sarva--_sarva pramāṇa--_pramāṇa upetam_upe iti_iti niścitya_niści tatas_tatas te_tvad vakṣyāmi_vac iti_iti arthaḥ_artha dṛḍha--_dṛḍha matiḥ_mati iti_iti kecid_kaścit paṭhanti_paṭh

aham_mad eva_eva śloka--_śloka aṣṭakena_aṣṭaka bravīmi_brū alam_alam te_tvad tad--_tad tad--_tad paryālocana--_paryālocana kleśena_kleśa iti_iti āha_ah sarva--_sarva iti_iti bhūyas_bhūyas iti_iti rāja--_rājan vidyā--_vidyā rāja--_rājan guhya--_guhya adhyāya--_adhyāya ante_anta pūrvam_pūrvam uktam_vac

lg.l: mad--_mad manāḥ_manas bhava_bhū mad--_mad bhakto_bhakta
mad--_mad yājī_yājin mām_mad namaskuru_namaskṛ
mām_mad eva_eva eṣyasi_i yuktvā_yuj evam_evam
ātmānam_ātman mad--_mad parāyaṇaḥ_parāyaṇa

div.p: yat_yad tat_tad eva_eva paramam_parama sarva--_sarva śāstra--_śāstra artha--_artha sārasya_sāra gītā--_gītā śāstrasya_śāstra api_api sāram_sāra guhyatamam_guhyatama iti_iti na_na atas_atas param_para kiñcana_kaścana guhyam_guhya asti_as kvacid_kvacid kutaścid_kutaścid katham_katham api_api akhaṇḍam_akhaṇḍa iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva kathane_kathana hetum_hetu āha_ah iṣṭaḥ_iṣ asi_as me_mad dṛḍham_dṛḍham atiśayena_atiśaya eva_eva priyaḥ_priya me_mad sakhā_sakhi bhavasi_bhū iti_iti tatas_tatas eva_eva hetoḥ_hetu hitam_hita te_tvad iti_iti sakhāyam_sakhi vinā_vinā ati_ati rahasyam_rahasya na_na kam_ka api_api kaścid_kaścit api_api brūte_brū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva dṛḍha--_dṛḍha matiḥ_mati iti_iti ca_ca pāṭhaḥ_pāṭha

stauti_stu sarveṣu_sarva guhyeṣu_guhya madhye_madhya atiśayitam_atiśī guhyam_guhya iti_iti sarva--_sarva guhyatamam_guhyatama bhūyas_bhūyas iti_iti rāja--_rājan vidyā--_vidyā adhyāye_adhyāya mad--_mad manāḥ_manas bhava_bhū iti_iti ādinā_ādi pūrvam_pūrva api_api mama_mad ati_ati priya--_priya tvāt_tva ante_anta punar_punar ucyamānam_vac śṛṇu_śru paramam_parama sarva--_sarva sārasya_sāra api_api gītā--_gītā śāstrasya_śāstra sāra--_sāra bhūtam_bhū punar_punar kathanena_kathana hetuḥ_hetu iṣṭaḥ_iṣ asi_as iti_iti tvam_tvad mama_mad iṣṭaḥ_iṣ priyatamaḥ_priyatama asi_as mad--_mad vākyam_vākya dṛḍham_dṛḍha nikhila--_nikhila pramāṇa--_pramāṇa upetam_upe iti_iti niścinoṣi_niści atas_atas te_tvad hitam_hita vakṣyāmi_vac tathā_tathā api_api etat_etad eva_eva anuṣṭheyam_anuṣṭhā iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva _

lg.l: mad--_mad manāḥ_manas bhava_bhū mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta mad--_mad yājī_yājin mām_mad namaskuru_namaskṛ
mām_mad eva_eva eṣyasi_i satyam_satya te_tvad pratijāne_pratijñā priyaḥ_priya asi_as me_mad

div.p: āha_ah mad--_mad manāḥ_manas mad--_mad cittaḥ_citta bhava_bhū mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta mad--_mad bhajana--_bhajana śīlaḥ_śīla bhava_bhū mad--_mad yājī_yājin mad--_mad yajana--_yajana śīlaḥ_śīla bhava_bhū mām_mad eva_eva namaskuru_namaskṛ evam_evam vartamānaḥ_vṛt tvam_tvad mad--_mad prasādāt_prasāda labdha--_labh jñānena_jñāna mām_mad eva_eva eṣyasi_i prāpsyasi_prāp atra_atra ca_ca saṃśayam_saṃśaya mā_mā kārṣīḥ_kṛ tvam_tvad hi_hi me_mad priyaḥ_priya asi_as atha_atha satyam_satya yathā_yathā bhavati_bhū evam_evam tubhyam_tvad aham_mad pratijāne_pratijñā pratijñām_pratijñā karomi_kṛ

bhava_bhū san_as cintaya_cintay na_na tu_tu jñānī_jñānin yogī_yogin vā_vā bhūtvā_bhū mad--_mad dhyānam_dhyāna kuru_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha yat_yat vā_vā mad--_mad manāḥ_manas bhava_bhū mahyam_mad śyāmasundarāya_śyāmasundara su_su snigdha--_snigdha ākuñcita--_ākuñcay kuntalakāya_kuntalaka sundara--_sundara bhrū--_bhrū vallī--_vallī madhura--_madhura kṛpā--_kṛpā kaṭākṣa--_kaṭākṣa amṛta--_amṛta varṣi--_varṣin vadana--_vadana candrāya_candra svīyam_svīya deya--_dā tvena_tva manaḥ_manas yasya_yad tathābhūtaḥ_tathābhūta athavā_athavā śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi indriyāṇi_indriya dehi_dā iti_iti āha_ah mad--_mad bhaktaḥ_bhakta bhava_bhū śravaṇa--_śravaṇa kīrtana--_kīrtana mad--_mad mūrti--_mūrti darśana--_darśana mad--_mad mandira--_mandira mārjana--_mārjana lepana--_lepana puspā--_puspā haraṇa--_haraṇa mad--_mad mālā--_mālā alaṅkāra--_alaṃkāra chatra--_chattra cāmara--_cāmara ādibhiḥ_ādi sarva--_sarva indriya--_indriya karaṇakam_karaṇaka mad--_mad bhajanam_bhajana kuru_kṛ athavā_athavā mahyam_mad gandha--_gandha puṣpa--_puṣpa dhūpa--_dhūpa dīpa--_dīpa naivedyāni_naivedya dehi_dā iti_iti āha_ah mad--_mad yājī_yājin bhava_bhū mad--_mad pūjanam_pūjana kuru_kṛ athavā_athavā mahyam_mad namaskāra--_namaskāra mātram_mātra dehi_dā iti_iti āha_ah mām_mad namaskuru_namaskṛ bhūmau_bhūmi nipatya_nipat aṣṭa--_aṣṭan aṅgam_aṅga vā_vā praṇāmam_praṇāma kuru_kṛ eṣām_idam caturṇām_catur mad--_mad cintana--_cintana sevana--_sevana pūjana--_pūjana praṇāmāṇām_praṇāma samuccayam_samuccaya ekataram_ekatara vā_vā tvam_tvad kuru_kṛ mām_mad eva_eva eṣyasi_i prāpsyasi_prāp manaḥ--_manas pradānam_pradāna śrotra--_śrotra ādi--_ādi indriya--_indriya pradānam_pradāna gandha--_gandha puṣpa--_puṣpa ādi--_ādi pradānam_pradāna vā_vā tvam_tvad kuru_kṛ tubhyam_tvad aham_mad ātmānam_ātman eva_eva dāsyāmi_dā iti_iti satyam_satya te_tad tava_tvad eva_eva na_na atra_atra saṃśayiṣṭhāḥ_saṃśī iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva satyam_satya śapatha--_śapatha tathyayoḥ_tathya iti_iti amaraḥ_amara

nanu_nanu māthura--_māthura deśa--_deśa udbhūtāḥ_udbhū lokāḥ_loka prativākyam_prativākya eva_eva śapatham_śapatha kurvanti_kṛ satyam_satya tarhi_tarhi pratijāne_pratijñā pratijñām_pratijñā kṛtvā_kṛ bravīmi_brū tvam_tvad me_mad priyaḥ_priya asi_as nahi_nahi priyam_priya kaḥ_ka api_api iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

Baladevaḥ_Baladeva etat_etad vacaḥ_vacas prāha_prāh mad--_mad manāḥ_manas bhava_bhū iti_iti vyākhyātam_vyākhyā prāk_prāk mad--_mad manaḥ--_manas tvāt_tva viśiṣṭaḥ_viśiṣ mām_mad eva_eva nīlotpala--_nīlotpala śyāmala--_śyāmala tva--_tva ādi--_ādi guṇakam_guṇaka tvad--_tvad atipriyam_atipriya devakī--_devakī nandanam_nandana kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa eva_eva manuṣya--_manuṣya sanniveśitam_saṃniveśay eṣyasi_i na_na tu_tu mama_mad rūpa--_rūpa antaram_antara sahasra--_sahasra śīrṣa--_śīrṣan tva--_tva ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa aṅguṣṭha--_aṅguṣṭha mātram_mātra antaryāmiṇam_antaryāmin vā_vā nṛsiṃha--_nṛsiṃha varāha--_varāha ādi--_ādi lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa vā_vā iti_iti arthaḥ_artha tubhyam_tvad aham_mad ātmānam_ātman eva_eva tvad--_tvad sakham_sakha dāsyāmi_dā iti_iti te_tvad tava_tvad satyam_satya śapathaḥ_śapatha satyam_satya śapatha--_śapatha tathyayoḥ_tathya iti_iti nānā_nānā artha--_artha vargaḥ_varga atra_atra na_na saṃśayiṣṭhāḥ_saṃśī iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

nanu_nanu māthura--_māthura tvāt_tva tava_tvad śapatha--_śapatha karaṇāt_karaṇa api_api me_mad na_na saṃśaya--_saṃśaya vināśaḥ_vināśa tatra_tatra āha_ah pratijāne_pratijñā pratijñām_pratijñā kṛtvā_kṛ aham_mad abruvam_brū yat_yat tvam_tvad me_mad priyaḥ_priya asi_as snigdha--_snigdha manasā_manas hi_hi māthurāḥ_māthura priyam_priya na_na pratārayanti_pratāray kim_ka punar_punar preṣṭham_preṣṭha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva yasya_yad mayi_mad ati_ati prītaḥ_prī tasmin_tad mama_mad api_api tathā_tathā tad--_tad viyogam_viyoga soḍhum_sah aham_mad na_na śaknomi_śak iti_iti pūrvam_pūrvam eva_eva mayā_mad uktam_vac priyaḥ_priya hi_hi ityādinā_ityādi tasmāt_tasmāt mad--_mad vāci_vāc viśvasihi_viśvas mām_mad eva_eva prāpsyasi_prāp

lg.l: sarva--_sarva dharmān_dharma parityajya_parityaj mām_mad ekam_eka śaraṇam_śaraṇa vraja_vraj
aham_mad tvā_tvad sarva--_sarva pāpebhyaḥ_pāpa mokṣyayiṣyāmi_mokṣyay mā_mā śucaḥ_śuc

div.p: āha_ah mad--_mad bhaktyā_bhakti eva_eva sarvam_sarva bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti dṛḍha--_dṛḍha viśvāsena_viśvāsa vidhi--_vidhi kaiṅkaryam_kaiṅkarya tyaktvā_tyaj mad--_mad eka--_eka śaraṇam_śaraṇa bhava_bhū evam_evam vartamānaḥ_vṛt karma--_karman tyāga--_tyāga nimittam_nimitta pāpam_pāpa syāt_as iti_iti mā_mā śucaḥ_śuc mokṣam_mokṣa mā_mā kārṣīḥ_kṛ yatas_yatas tvam_tvad mad--_mad eka--_eka śaraṇam_śaraṇa sarva--_sarva pāpebhyaḥ_pāpa aham_mad mokṣayiṣyāmi_mokṣay

karomi_kṛ āha_ah vraja_vraj parityajya_parityaj sannyasya_saṃnyas iti_iti na_na vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā arjunasya_arjuna kṣatriya--_kṣatriya tvena_tva sannyāsa--_saṃnyāsa adhikārāt_adhikāra na_na ca_ca arjunam_arjuna lakṣīkṛtya_lakṣīkṛ anya--_anya jana--_jana samudāyam_samudāya eva_eva upadideśa_upadiś bhagavān_bhagavat iti_iti vācyam_vac lakṣya--_lakṣya bhūtam_bhū arjunam_arjuna prati_prati upadeśam_upadeśa yojayitum_yojay aucitye_aucitya sati_as eva_eva anyasya_anya api_api upadeṣṭavya--_upadiś tvam_tva sambhavet_sambhū na_na tu_tu anyathā_anyathā na_na ca_ca parityjya_parityaj iti_iti asya_idam phala--_phala tyāgaḥ_tyāga eva_eva tātparyam_tātparya iti_iti vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā asya_idam vākyasya_vākya

lg.l: deva--_deva ṛṣi--_ṛṣi bhūta--_bhūta āpta--_āpta nṝṇām_nṛ pitṝṇām_pitṛ
na_na ayam_idam kiṅkaraḥ_kiṃkara na_na ayam_idam ṛṇī_ṛṇin ca_ca rājan_rājan
sarva--_sarva ātmanā_ātman yaḥ_yad śaraṇam_śaraṇa śaraṇyam_śaraṇya
gataḥ_gam mukundam_mukunda parihṛtya_parihṛ kartam_karta
martyaḥ_martya yadā_yadā tyakta--_tyaj samasta--_samasta karmā_karman
nivedita--_niveday ātmā_ātman vicikīrṣitaḥ_vicikīrṣ me_mad
tadā_tadā amṛta--_amṛta tvam_tva pratipadyamānaḥ_pratipad
mayā_mad ātma--_ātman bhūyāya_bhūya ca_ca kalpate_kﾱp vai_vai
tāvat_tāvat karmāṇi_karman kurvīta_kṛ
na_na nirvidyeta_nirvid yāvatā_yāvat
mad--_mad kathā--_kathā śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādau_ādi vā_vā
śraddhā_śraddhā yāvat_yāvat na_na jāyate_jan
ājñāya_ājñā eva_eva guṇān_guṇa doṣān_doṣa
mayā_mad ādiṣṭān_ādiś api_api svakān_svaka
dharmān_dharma santyajya_saṃtyaj yaḥ_yad sarvān_sarva
mām_mad bhajet_bhaj sa_tad ca_ca sattamaḥ_sattama

div.p: iti_iti ādibhiḥ_ādi bhagavat--_bhagavant vākyaiḥ_vākya saha_saha eka--_eka arthasya_artha avaśya--_avaśya vyākhyeya--_vyākhyā tvāt_tva atra_atra ca_ca pari_pari śabda--_śabda prayogāt_prayoga ca_ca atas_atas ekam_eka mām_mad śaraṇam_śaraṇa vraja_vraj na_na tu_tu dharma--_dharma jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga devatā--_devatā antara--_antara ādikam_ādika iti_iti arthaḥ_artha pūrvam_pūrvam hi_hi mad--_mad anya--_anya bhaktau_bhakti sarva--_sarva śreṣṭhāyām_śreṣṭha tava_tvad adhikāraḥ_adhikāra na_na asti_as iti_iti atas_atas tvam_tvad yat_yad karoṣi_kṛ yat_yad aśnāsi_aś ityādi--_ityādi bruvāṇena_brū mayā_mad karma--_karman miśrāyām_miśra bhaktau_bhakti tava_tvad adhikāraḥ_adhikāra uktaḥ_vac samprati_samprati tu_tu ati_ati kṛpayā_kṛpā tubhyam_tvad ananya--_ananya bhaktau_bhakti eva_eva adhikāraḥ_adhikāra tasyāḥ_tad ananya--_ananya bhakteḥ_bhakti yādṛcchika--_yādṛcchika mad--_mad aikāntika--_aikāntika bhakta--_bhakta kṛpā--_kṛpā eka--_eka labhya--_labh tva--_tva lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa niyamam_niyama sva--_sva kṛtam_kṛ api_api bhīṣma--_bhīṣma yuddhe_yuddha sva--_sva pratijñām_pratijñā na_na ca_ca mad--_mad ājñayā_ājñā nitya--_nitya naimittika--_naimittika karma--_karman tyāge_tyāga tava_tvad prayavāya--_prayavāya śaṅkā_śaṅkā sambhavet_sambhū veda--_veda rūpeṇa_rūpa mayā_mad eva_eva nitya--_nitya karma--_karman anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna ādiṣṭam_ādiś adhunā_adhunā tu_tu sva--_sva rūpeṇa_rūpa eva_eva tad--_tad tyāgaḥ_tyāga ādiśyate_ādiś iti_iti atas_atas katham_katham te_tvad nitya--_nitya karma--_karman akaraṇe_akaraṇa pāpāni_pāpa sambhavanti_sambhū pratyuta_pratyuta atas_atas param_param nitya--_nitya karmaṇi_karman mad--_mad ājñā--_ājñā laṅghanāt_laṅghana iti_iti avadheyam_avadhā

nanu_nanu yaḥ_yad hi_hi yad--_yad śaraṇaḥ_śaraṇa bhavati_bhū sa_tad hi_hi mūlya--_mūlya krītaḥ_krī paśuḥ_paśu iva_iva tad--_tad adhīnaḥ_adhīna sa_tad tam_tad yat_yad kārayati_kāray tat_tad eva_eva karoti_kṛ yatra_yatra sthāpayati_sthāpay tatra_tatra eva_eva tiṣṭhati_sthā yat_yad bhojayati_bhojay tat_tad eva_eva bhuṅkte_bhuj iti_iti śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āpatti--_āpatti lakṣaṇasya_lakṣaṇa dharmasya_dharma tattvam_tattva yat_yad uktam_vac vāyu--_vāyu purāṇe_purāṇa

ānukūlyasya_ānukūlya saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa prātikūlyasya_prātikūlya varjanam_varjana rakṣiṣyati_rakṣ iti_iti viśvāsaḥ_viśvāsa goptṛ--_goptṛ tve_tva varaṇam_varaṇa tathā_tathā niḥkṣepanam_niḥkṣepana akārpaṇyam_akārpaṇya ṣaḍvidhā_ṣaḍvidha śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgatiḥ_āgati

bhakti--_bhakti śāstra--_śāstra vihitā_vidhā sva--_sva abhīṣṭa--_abhīṣ devāya_deva rocamānā_ruc pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti ānukūlyam_ānukūlya tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta prātikūlyam_prātikūlya goptṛ--_goptṛ tve_tva iti_iti saḥ_tad eva_eva mama_mad rakṣakaḥ_rakṣaka na_na anyaḥ_anya iti_iti yat_yat rakṣiṣyati_rakṣ iti_iti sva--_sva rakṣaṇa--_rakṣaṇa prātikūlya--_prātikūlya vastuṣu_vastu upasthiteṣu_upasthā api_api sa_tad mām_mad rakṣiṣyati_rakṣ eva_eva iti_iti draupadī--_draupadī gaja--_gaja indra--_indra ādīnām_ādi iva_iva viśvāsaḥ_viśvāsa niḥkṣepanam_niḥkṣepana svīya--_svīya sthūla--_sthūla sūkṣma--_sūkṣma deha--_deha sahitasya_sahita eva_eva svasya_sva śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa arthe_artha eva_eva viniyogaḥ_viniyoga akārpaṇyam_akārpaṇya na_na anyatra_anyatra kvāpi_kvāpi sva--_sva dainya--_dainya jñāpanam_jñāpana iti_iti ṣaṇṇām_ṣaṣ vastūnām_vastu vidhātṛ--_vidhātṛ anuṣṭhānam_anuṣṭhāna yasyām_yad sā_tad śaraṇāgatiḥ_śaraṇāgati iti_iti

tat_tad adya_adya ārabhya_ārabh yadi_yadi aham_mad tvām_tvad śaraṇam_śaraṇa gataḥ_gam eva_eva varte_vṛt tarhi_tarhi tva--_tvad uktam_vac bhadram_bhadra abhadram_abhadra vā_vā yat_yad bhavet_bhū tat_tad eva_eva mama_mad kartavyam_kṛ tatra_tatra yadi_yadi tvam_tvad mām_mad dharmam_dharma eva_eva kārayasi_kāray tadā_tadā na_na kācid_kaścit cintā_cintā yadi_yadi tu_tu īśvara--_īśvara tvāt_tva svaira--_svaira ācāraḥ_ācāra tvam_tvad mām_mad adharmam_adharma eva_eva kārayasi_kāray tadā_tadā kā_ka gatiḥ_gati tatra_tatra āha_ah aham_mad iti_iti prācīna--_prācīna arvācīnāni_arvācīna yāvanti_yāvat vartante_vṛt yāvanti_yāvat vai_vai aham_mad kārayiṣyāmi_kāray tebhyaḥ_tad sarvebhyaḥ_sarva eva_eva pāpebhyaḥ_pāpa mokṣayiṣyāmi_mokṣay na_na aham_mad anya--_anya śaraṇyaḥ_śaraṇya iva_iva tatra_tatra asamarthaḥ_asamartha iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva

tvām_tvad a_a lambya_lamb eva_eva śāstram_śāstra idam_idam loka--_loka mātram_mātra eva_eva upadiṣṭavān_upadiś asmi_as mā_mā śucaḥ_śuc sva--_sva artham_artha para--_para artham_artha vā_vā śokam_śoka mā_mā kārṣīḥ_kṛ yuṣmad--_tvad ādikam_ādika sarvaḥ_sarva eva_eva lokaḥ_loka sva--_sva para--_para dharmān_dharma sarvān_sarva eva_eva parityajya_parityaj mad--_mad cintana--_cintana ādi--_ādi paraḥ_para mām_mad śaraṇam_śaraṇa āpadya_āpad sukhena_sukhena eva_eva vartatām_vṛt tasya_tad pāpa--_pāpa mocana--_mocana bhāraḥ_bhāra saṃsāra--_saṃsāra mocana--_mocana bhāraḥ_bhāra api_api mayā_mad aṅgīkṛtaḥ_aṅgīkṛ eva_eva

an_an anyāḥ_anya cintayantaḥ_cintay mām_mad ye_yad janāḥ_jana paryupāsate_paryupās teṣām_tad nitya--_nitya abhiyuktānām_abhiyuj
yoga--_yoga kṣemam_kṣema vahāmi_vah aham_mad
div.l: hanta_hanta etāvān_etāvat bhāraḥ_bhāra mayā_mad sva--_sva prabhau_prabhu nikṣiptaḥ_nikṣip iti_iti api_api śokam_śoka mā_mā akārṣīḥ_kṛ bhakta--_bhakta vatsalasya_vatsala mama_mad na_na tatra_tatra āyāsa--_āyāsa leśaḥ_leśa api_api iti_iti na_na atas_atas param_param adhikam_adhika upadeṣṭavyam_upadiś asti_as iti_iti śāstram_śāstra samāptīkṛtam_samāptīkṛ
div.p: na_na vinaśyeyuḥ_vinaś iti_iti ced_ced tatra_tatra āha_ah sarva--_sarva iti_iti prāktana--_prāktana pāpa--_pāpa prāyaścitta--_prāyaścitta bhūtān_bhū kṛcchra--_kṛcchra ādīn_ādi sa_sa vihitān_vidhā ca_ca sarvān_sarva dharmān_dharma parityajya_parityaj svarūpataḥ_svarūpa tyaktvā_tyaj mām_mad sarveśvaram_sarveśvara kṛṣṇam_kṛṣṇa nṛsiṃha--_nṛsiṃha dāśarathi--_dāśarathi ādi--_ādi rūpeṇa_rūpa bahudhā_bahudhā āvirbhūtam_āvirbhū viśuddha--_viśudh avidyā--_avidyā paryanta--_paryanta sarva--_sarva kāma--_kāma vināśam_vināśa ekam_eka na_na tu_tu mattaḥ_mad anyam_anya śiti--_śiti kaṇṭha--_kaṇṭha ādim_ādi śaraṇam_śaraṇa vraja_vraj prapadyasva_prapad śaraṇyaḥ_śaraṇya sarveśvaraḥ_sarveśvara aham_mad sarva--_sarva pāpebhyaḥ_pāpa prāktana--_prāktana karmabhyaḥ_karman tvām_tvad śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgatam_āgam mokṣayiṣyāmi_mokṣay iti_iti mithas_mithas kartavya--_kṛ tā_tā darśitā_darśay tvam_tvad mā_mā śucaḥ_śuc acira--_acira āyuṣā_āyus mayā_mad hṛd--_hṛd viśuddham_viśudh icchatā_iṣ ati_ati cira--_cira sādhyāḥ_sādhay duṣkarāḥ_duṣkara ca_ca te_tvad kṛcchra--_kṛcchra ādayaḥ_ādi katham_katham anuṣṭheyāḥ_anuṣṭhā iti_iti śokam_śoka mā_mā kārṣīḥ_kṛ iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

atra_atra mad--_mad prapattuḥ_prapattṛ na_na bhavet_bhū iti_iti uktam_vac śrutiḥ_śruti ca_ca evam_evam āha_ah na_na karmaṇā_karman na_na prajayā_prajā dhanena_dhana tyāgena_tyāga eva_eva ke_ka amṛta--_amṛta tvam_tva ānaśuḥ_aś iti_iti śraddhā--_śraddhā bhakti--_bhakti dhyāna--_dhyāna yogāt_yoga avaiti_ave iti_iti ca_ca evam_evam ādyā_ādya saniṣṭhānām_saniṣṭha hṛd--_hṛd viśuddhaye_viśuddhi pariniṣṭhitānām_pariniṣṭhā ca_ca loka--_loka saṅgrahāya_saṃgraha yathāyatham_yathāyatham kāryāḥ_kṛ te_tvad dharmaḥ_dharma tam_tad etam_etad iti_iti ādibhyaḥ_ādi satyena_satya labhyaḥ_labh tapasā_tapas hi_hi eṣaḥ_etad ātmā_ātman iti_iti ādibhyaḥ_ādi ca_ca śrutibhyaḥ_śruti

na_na ca_ca vihita--_vidhā tyāge_tyāga pratyavāya--_pratyavāya lakṣaṇam_lakṣaṇa pāpam_pāpa syāt_as iti_iti śokam_śoka mā_mā kuru_kṛ iti_iti vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā veda--_veda nideśena_nideśa agni--_agni hotṛ--_hotṛ ādi--_ādi tyāge_tyāga yateḥ_yati iva_iva tad--_tad tyāge_tyāga tad--_tad prapattuḥ_prapattṛ tad--_tad ayogāt_ayoga pratyuta_pratyuta tad--_tad nideśa--_nideśa atikrame_atikrama doṣa--_doṣa āpattiḥ_āpatti syāt_as na_na ca_ca svarūpataḥ_svarūpa vihita--_vidhā tyāge_tyāga pratyavāya--_pratyavāya āpatteḥ_āpatti sarvāṇi_sarva dharma--_dharma phalāni_phala iti_iti vyākhyeyam_vyākhyā phala--_phala tyāge_tyāga tad--_tad anāpatteḥ_anāpatti tasmāt_tasmāt prapannasya_prapad svarūpataḥ_svarūpa dharma--_dharma tyāgaḥ_tyāga na_na ca_ca na_na hi_hi kvacid_kvacid iti_iti ādi_ādi nyāyena_nyāya svadharma--_svadharma anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna āpattiḥ_āpatti tad--_tad yajana--_yajana ādi--_ādi niratasya_niram tena_tad nyāyena_nyāya tad--_tad anāpatteḥ_anāpatti tathā_tathā ca_ca sanniṣṭhasya_saṃniṣṭha ātma--_ātman anubhava--_anubhava antar_antar pariniṣṭhitasya_pariniṣṭhā ca_ca parātma--_parātman anubhava--_anubhava antaḥ_anta yathā_yathā dharma--_dharma ācāraḥ_ācāra tathā_tathā prapattuḥ_prapattṛ śuddhāntaḥ_śuddhānta saḥ_tad iti_iti evam_evam eva_eva uktam_vac ekādaśe_ekādaśa

tāvat_tāvat karmāṇi_karman kurvīta_kṛ na_na nirvidyeta_nirvid yāvatā_yāvat mad--_mad kathā--_kathā śravaṇa--_śravaṇa ādau_ādi vā_vā
śraddhā_śraddhā yāvat_yāvat na_na jāyate_jan
eṣā_etad śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgatiḥ_āgati śabditā_śabday prapattiḥ_prapatti ṣaṣ--_ṣaṣ aṅgikā_aṅgika

ānukūlyasya_ānukūlya saṅkalpaḥ_saṃkalpa prātikūlyasya_prātikūlya varjanam_varjana rakṣiṣyati_rakṣ iti_iti viśvāsaḥ_viśvāsa goptṛ--_goptṛ tve_tva varaṇam_varaṇa tathā_tathā ātma--_ātman nikṣepa--_nikṣepa kārpaṇye_kārpaṇya ṣaḍvidhā_ṣaḍvidha śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āgatiḥ_āgati iti_iti vāyu--_vāyu purāṇāt_purāṇa

bhakti--_bhakti śāstra--_śāstra vihitā_vidhā haraye_hari rocamānā_ruc pravṛttiḥ_pravṛtti ānukūlyam_ānukūlya tad--_tad viparītam_viparīta tu_tu prātikūlyam_prātikūlya ātma--_ātman nikṣepaḥ_nikṣepa śaraṇye_śaraṇya tasmin_tad sva--_sva bhara--_bhara nyāsaḥ_nyāsa kārpaṇyam_kārpaṇya anugharṣaḥ_anugharṣa nikṣepaṇam_nikṣepaṇa akārpaṇyam_akārpaṇya iti_iti kvacid_kvacid pāṭhaḥ_pāṭha tatra_tatra kārpaṇyam_kārpaṇya tatas_tatas anyasmin_anya sva--_sva dainya--_dainya prakāśaḥ_prakāśa sphuṭam_sphuṭa anyat_anya

lg.l: idam_idam te_tvad na_na atapaskāya_atapaska na_na abhaktāya_abhakta kadācana_kadācana
na_na ca_ca aśuśrūṣave_aśuśrūṣu vācyam_vac na_na ca_ca mām_mad yaḥ_yad abhyasūyati_abhyasūy

div.p: āha_ah idam_idam gīta--_gā artha--_artha tattvam_tattva te_tvad tvayā_tvad atapaskāya_atapaska dharma--_dharma anuṣṭhāna--_anuṣṭhāna hīnāya_hā na_na vācyam_vac na_na ca_ca abhaktāya_abhakta gurau_guru īśvare_īśvara ca_ca bhakti--_bhakti śūnyāya_śūnya kadācid_kadācid api_api na_na vācyam_vac na_na ca_ca aśuśrūṣave_aśuśrūṣu paricaryām_paricaryā akurvate_akurvat vācyam_vac mām_mad parameśvaram_parameśvara yaḥ_yad abhyasūyati_abhyasūy manuṣya--_manuṣya dṛṣṭyā_dṛṣṭi doṣa--_doṣa āropeṇa_āropa nindati_nind tasmai_tad na_na ca_ca vācyam_vac 67_67

āha_ah atapaskāya_atapaska a_a saṃyata--_saṃyam indriyāya_indriya manaḥ_manas ca_ca indriyāṇām_indriya ca_ca aikāgryam_aikāgrya paramam_parama tapaḥ_tapas iti_iti smṛteḥ_smṛti saṃyata--_saṃyam indriye_indriya sati_as api_api abhaktāya_abhakta na_na vācyam_vac saṃyata--_saṃyam indriya--_indriya tva--_tva ādi--_ādi dharma--_dharma traya--_traya vattve_vattva api_api yaḥ_yad mām_mad abhyasūyati_abhyasūy mayi_mad nirupādhi--_nirupādhi pūrṇa--_pṛ brahmaṇi_brahman māyā--_māyā sāvarṇya--_sāvarṇya doṣam_doṣa āropayati_āropay tasmai_tad sarvathā_sarvathā eva_eva na_na vācyam_vac 67_67

deyam_dā upadiśati_upadiś idam_idam śāstram_śāstra te_tvad tvayā_tvad atapaskāya_atapaska ajita--_ajita indriyāya_indriya na_na vācyam_vac tapasvine_tapasvin api_api abhaktāya_abhakta śāstra--_śāstra upadeṣṭari_upadeṣṭṛ tvayi_tvad śāstra--_śāstra pratipādye_pratipāday mayi_mad ca_ca sarva--_sarva īśa--_īśa bhakti--_bhakti śūnyāya_śūnya na_na vācyam_vac tapasvine_tapasvin api_api bhaktāya_bhakta a_a śuśrūṣave_śuśrūṣu śrotum_śru an_an icchave_icchu na_na vācyam_vac yaḥ_yad mām_mad sarva--_sarva īśvaram_īśvara nitya--_nitya guṇa--_guṇa vigraham_vigraha abhyasūyati_abhyasūy mayi_mad māyika--_māyika guṇa--_guṇa vigraha--_vigraha tām_tā āropayati_āropay tasmai_tad tu_tu nā_na eva_eva vācyam_vac iti_iti atas_atas bhinnayā_bhid vibhaktyā_vibhakti tasya_tad nirdeśaḥ_nirdeśa evam_evam āha_ah sūtrakāraḥ_sūtrakāra an_an āviṣkurvan_āviṣkṛ anvayāt_anuyā iti_iti 67_67

lg.l: yaḥ_yad idam_idam paramam_parama guhyam_guhya mad--_mad bhakteṣu_bhakta abhidhāsyati_abhidhā
bhaktim_bhakti mayi_mad parām_para kṛtvā_kṛ mām_mad eva_eva eṣyati_i asaṃśayaḥ_asaṃśaya

div.p: āha_ah karoti_kṛ prāpnoti_prāp
āha_ah bhavati_bhū
āha_ah bhavati_bhū

lg.l: na_na ca_ca tasmāt_tasmāt manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya kaścid_kaścit me_mad priya--_priya kṛttamaḥ_kṛttama
bhavitā_bhū na_na ca_ca me_mad tasmāt_tasmāt anyaḥ_anya priyataraḥ_priyatara bhuvi_bhū

div.p: tasmāt_tasmāt mad--_mad bhaktebhyaḥ_bhakta gītā--_gītā śāstra--_śāstra vyākhyātuḥ_vyākhyātṛ sakāśāt_sakāśa anyaḥ_anya manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya madhye_madhya kaścid_kaścit api_api mama_mad priya--_priya kṛttamaḥ_kṛttama atyantam_atyantam paritoṣa--_paritoṣa kartā_kartṛ nā_na asti_as na_na ca_ca kāla--_kāla antare_antara bhavitā_bhū bhaviṣyati_bhū mama_mad api_api tasmāt_tasmāt anyaḥ_anya priyataraḥ_priyatara adhunā_adhunā bhuvi_bhū tāvat_tāvat nā_na asti_as na_na ca_ca kāla--_kāla antare_antara api_api bhaviṣyati_bhū iti_iti arthaḥ_artha 69_69
div.l: asti_as asti_as asti_as asti_as
div.p: na_na ca_ca iti_iti tasmāt_tad gīta--_gīta upadeṣṭuḥ_upadeṣṭṛ sakāśāt_sakāśa anyaḥ_anya manuṣyeṣu_manuṣya madhye_madhya mama_mad priya--_priya kṛttamaḥ_kṛttama paritoṣa--_paritoṣa kartā_kartṛ pūrvam_pūrvam na_na abhūt_bhū na_na ca_ca bhaviṣyati_bhū mama_mad tasmāt_tad anyaḥ_anya priyataraḥ_priyatara bhuvi_bhū na_na abhūt_bhū na_na ca_ca bhaviṣyati_bhū

lg.l: adhyeṣyate_adhī ca_ca yaḥ_yad imam_idam dharmyam_dharmya saṃvādam_saṃvāda āvayoḥ_mad
jñāna--_jñāna yajñena_yajña tena_tad aham_mad iṣṭaḥ_yaj syām_as iti_iti me_mad matiḥ_mati

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara paṭhataḥ_paṭh phalam_phala āha_ah adhyeṣyataḥ_adhī āvayoḥ_mad śrī--_śrī kṛṣṇa--_kṛṣṇa arjunayoḥ_arjuna imam_idam dharmyam_dharmya dharmāt_dharma an_an apetam_ape saṃvādam_saṃvāda yaḥ_yad adhyeṣyate_adhī japa--_japa rūpeṇa_rūpa paṭhiṣyati_paṭh tena_tad puṃsā_puṃs sarva--_sarva yajñebhyaḥ_yajña śreṣṭhena_śreṣṭha jñāna--_jñāna yajñena_yajña aham_mad iṣṭaḥ_yaj syām_as bhaveyam_bhū yadi_yadi api_api asau_adas gīta--_gīta artham_artha a_a budhyamānaḥ_budh eva_eva kevalam_kevalam japati_jap tathā_tathā api_api mama_mad tat_tad śṛṇvataḥ_śru mām_mad eva_eva asau_adas prakāśayati_prakāśay iti_iti buddhiḥ_buddhi bhavati_bhū yathā_yathā loke_loka yaṛcchayā_yaṛcchā api_api yadā_yadā kaścid_kaścit kadācid_kadācid kasyacid_kaścit nāma_nāman gṛhṇāti_grah tadā_tadā asau_adas mām_mad eva_eva ayam_idam āhavayati_āhavay iti_iti matvā_man tad--_tad pārśvam_pārśva āgacchati_āgam tathā_tathā aham_mad api_api tasya_tad sannihitaḥ_saṃnidhā bhaveyam_bhū ataeva_ataeva ajāmila--_ajāmila kṣatra--_kṣatra bandhu--_bandhu pramukhānām_pramukha kathañcid_kathaṃcid nāma--_nāman uccāraṇa--_uccāraṇa mātreṇa_mātra prasannaḥ_prasad asmi_as tathā_tathā eva_eva asya_idam api_api prasannaḥ_prasad bhaveyam_bhū iti_iti bhāvaḥ_bhāva
div.l: Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha etat_etad adhayana--_adhayana phalam_phala āha_ah adhyeṣyataḥ_adhī
div.p: āha_ah adhyeṣyate_adhī atra_atra yaḥ_yad jñāna--_jñāna yajñaḥ_yajña varṇitaḥ_varṇay tena_tad aham_mad etad--_etad pāṭha--_pāṭha mātreṇa_mātra eva_eva iṣṭaḥ_yaj abhyarcitaḥ_abhyarcay syām_as iti_iti me_mad matiḥ_mati tasya_tad aham_mad sulabhaḥ_sulabha iti_iti arthaḥ_artha _

lg.l: śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat anasūyaḥ_anasūya ca_ca śṛṇuyāt_śru api_api yaḥ_yad naraḥ_nara
saḥ_tad upi_api muktaḥ_muc śubhān_śubha lokān_loka prāpnuyāt_prāp puṇya--_puṇya karmaṇām_karman

div.p: śṛṇoti_śru āha_ah yaḥ_yad naraḥ_nara śraddhā--_śraddhā yuktaḥ_yuj kevalam_kevalam śṛṇuyāt_śru api_api śraddhāvān_śraddhāvat api_api yaḥ_yad kaścid_kaścit kim_ka artham_artha uccais_uccais japati_jap abaddhaḥ_abaddha vā_vā japati_jap iti_iti vā_vā doṣa--_doṣa dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi karoti_kṛ tad--_tad vyāvṛtti--_vyāvṛtti artham_artha āha_ah anasūyaḥ_anasūya ca_ca asūya_asūya muktaḥ_muc san_as aśvamedha--_aśvamedha ādi--_ādi puṇya--_puṇya kṛtām_kṛt lokān_loka prāpnuyāt_prāp
div.l: āha_ah _
div.p: āha_ah yaḥ_yad kevalam_kevalam śraddhayā_śraddhā śṛṇoti_śru anasūyaḥ_anasūya kim_ka artham_artha uccais_uccais aśuddham_aśuddha vā_vā paṭhati_paṭh iti_iti doṣa--_doṣa dṛṣṭim_dṛṣṭi akurvān_akurvat saḥ_tad api_api nikhilaiḥ_nikhila pāpaiḥ_pāpa muktaḥ_muc puṇya--_puṇya karmaṇām_karman aśvamedha--_aśvamedha ādi--_ādi yājinām_yājin lokān_loka prāpnuyāt_prāp yat_yat vā_vā puṇya--_puṇya karmaṇām_karman bhaktimatām_bhaktimat lokān_loka dhruva--_dhruva loka--_loka ādīn_ādi vaikuṇṭha--_vaikuṇṭha bhedān_bheda iti_iti arthaḥ_artha

lg.l: kaccit_kaccit etat_etad śrutam_śru pārtha_pārtha tvayā_tvad ekāgreṇa_ekāgra cetasā_cetas
kaccit_kaccit ajñāna--_ajñāna saṃmohaḥ_sammoha pranaṣṭaḥ_praṇaś te_tvad dhanaṃjaya_dhanaṃjaya

div.p: upadekṣyāmi_upadiś āha_ah
div.l: upadekṣyāmi_upadiś āha_ah
div.p: pṛcchati_pracch upadekṣyāmi_upadiś

lg.l: arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac
naṣṭaḥ_naś mohaḥ_moha smṛtiḥ_smṛti labdhā_labh tvad--_tvad prasādāt_prasāda mayā_mad acyuta_acyuta
sthitaḥ_sthā asmi_as gata--_gam saṃdehaḥ_saṃdeha kariṣye_kṛ vacanam_vacana tava_tvad

div.p: śrīdharaḥ_śrīdhara kṛtārthaḥ_kṛtārtha san_as arjunaḥ_arjuna uvāca_vac naṣṭaḥ_naś iti_iti ātma--_ātman viṣaye_viṣaya mohaḥ_moha naṣṭaḥ_naś yatas_yatas ayam_idam aham_mad asmi_as iti_iti svarūpa--_svarūpa anusandhāna--_anusaṃdhāna rūpā_rūpa smṛtiḥ_smṛti tvad--_tvad prasādāt_prasāda mayā_mad labdhā_labh atas_atas sthitaḥ_sthā asmi_as yuddhāya_yuddha utthitaḥ_utthā asmi_as gataḥ_gam dharma--_dharma viṣayaḥ_viṣaya sandehaḥ_saṃdeha yasya_yad saḥ_tad aham_mad tava_tvad ājñām_ājñā kariṣye_kṛ iti_iti

Viśvanātha_Viśvanātha kim_ka atas_atas param_para pṛcchāmi_pracch aham_mad tu_tu sarva--_sarva dharmān_dharma parityajya_parityaj tvām_tvad śaraṇam_śaraṇa gataḥ_gam niścintaḥ_niścinta eva_eva tvayi_tvad viśrambhavān_viśrambhavat asmi_as iti_iti āha_ah naṣṭaḥ_naś iti_iti kariṣye_kṛ iti_iti atas_atas param_param śaraṇasya_śaraṇa tava_tvad ājñāyām_ājñā sthitiḥ_sthiti eva_eva śaraṇa--_śaraṇa āpannasya_āpad mama_mad dharmaḥ_dharma na_na tu_tu sva--_sva āśrama--_āśrama dharmaḥ_dharma na_na tu_tu jñāna--_jñāna yoga--_yoga ādaraḥ_ādara te_tad tu_tu adya_adya ārabhya_ārabh tyaktvā_tyaj eva_eva tatas_tatas ca_ca bhoḥ_bhoḥ priya--_priya sakha_sakha arjuna_arjuna mama_mad bhū--_bhū bhāra--_bhāra haraṇe_haraṇa kiñcid_kaścit avaśiṣṭam_avaśiṣ kṛtyam_kṛtya asti_as tat_tad tu_tu tad--_tad dvārā_dvār eva_eva cikīrṣāmi_cikīrṣ iti_iti bhagavatā_bhagavant ukte_vac gāṇḍīva--_gāṇḍīva pāṇiḥ_pāṇi arjunaḥ_arjuna yoddhum_yudh udatiṣṭhāt_utthā iti_iti

pṛṣṭaḥ_pracch pārthaḥ_pārtha śāstra--_śāstra anubhavam_anubhava phala--_phala dvāreṇa_dvāra aha_ah naṣṭaḥ_naś mohaḥ_moha viparīta--_viparīta jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa mama_mad naṣṭaḥ_naś tvad--_tvad prasādāt_prasāda eva_eva smṛtiḥ_smṛti ca_ca yathā_yathā avasthita--_avasthā vastu--_vastu niṣṭhayā_niṣṭhā mayā_mad labdhā_labh aham_mad gata--_gam sandehaḥ_saṃdeha chinna--_chid saṃśayaḥ_saṃśaya sthitaḥ_sthā adhunā_adhunā asmi_as tava_tvad vacanam_vacana kariṣye_kṛ etat_etad uktam_vac bhavati_bhū deva--_deva mānava--_mānava ādayaḥ_ādi nikhilāḥ_nikhila prāṇinaḥ_prāṇin sarve_sarva sva--_sva sva--_sva karmasu_karman svatantrāḥ_svatantra deha--_deha abhimāninaḥ_abhimānin māna--_māna vaira--_vaira rcitāḥ_arcay devāḥ_deva tebhyaḥ_tad abhīṣṭa--_abhīṣ pradāḥ_prada yaḥ_yad tu_tu īśvaraḥ_īśvara kaḥ_ka api_api asti_as sa_tad hi_hi nirguṇaḥ_nirguṇa nirākṛtiḥ_nirākṛti udāsīnaḥ_udāsīna tad--_tad sannidhānāt_saṃnidhāna prakṛtiḥ_prakṛti jagat--_jagant hetuḥ_hetu iti_iti evam_evam viparīta--_viparīta jñāna--_jñāna lakṣaṇaḥ_lakṣaṇa yaḥ_yad mohaḥ_moha pūrvam_pūrvam mama_mad abhūt_bhū sa_tad tvad--_tvad upalabdhāt_upalabh upadeśāt_upadeśa vinaṣṭaḥ_vinaś sa_tad ca_ca tvam_tvad eva_eva mad--_mad sakhaḥ_sakha vasudeva--_vasudeva sūnuḥ_sūnu iti_iti tāttvikam_tāttvika jñānam_jñāna mama_mad abhūt_bhū atas_atas param_param tvām_tvad aham_mad prapannaḥ_prapad sthitaḥ_sthā asmi_as tvam_tvad mām_mad kadācid_kadācid api_api na_na tyakṣyasi_tyaj iti_iti sandehaḥ_saṃdeha ca_ca me_mad chinnaḥ_chid atha_atha bhū--_bhū bhāra--_bhāra haraṇam_haraṇa sva--_sva prayojanam_prayojana ced_ced prapannena_prapad mayā_mad cikīrṣitam_cikīrṣ tarhi_tarhi tad--_tad vacanam_vacana tava_tvad kariṣyāmi_kṛ iti_iti arjunaḥ_arjuna dhanuḥ--_dhanus pāṇiḥ_pāṇi udatiṣṭhat_utthā iti_iti _
